Genesis1:1 Sɩngr wẽndẽ, Wẽnnaam naana yĩngr la tẽnga." 
Genesis1:2 Tẽngã rag n ka tar yalẽ ye, a rag n yaa vɩʋʋgo. Likã rag n luda zĩ-zulumsã. La Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã rag n laanda koomã zugu." 
Genesis1:3 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bɩ vẽenem zĩndi.» La vẽenem zĩndame." 
Genesis1:4 Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ vẽenemã yaa sõama. La bãmb welga vẽenemã ne likã toore. 
Genesis1:5 Wẽnnaam pʋda vẽenemã yʋʋr tɩ ‹wĩndga›, la b pʋd likã yʋʋr tɩ ‹yʋngo.› Zaabr la yibeoog zĩndame. Yaa pipi daarã." 
Genesis1:6 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bɩ sa-gãongã zĩnd n welg koomã ne taaba.» 
Genesis1:7 Wẽnnaam naana sa-gãongo, n welg koom ning sẽn be sa-gãongã tẽngrã ne koom ning sẽn be yĩngrã ne taaba. La a yɩɩ woto." 
Genesis1:8 Wẽnnaam pʋda sa-gãongã yʋʋr tɩ ‹saasẽ.› Zaabr ne yibeoog zĩndame. Yaa yiibẽ daarã. 
Genesis1:9 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bɩ koomã fãa sẽn be saagã tẽngrã tigim taab zĩ-yende, tɩ tẽn-gãongã puki.» La a yɩɩ woto." 
Genesis1:10 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam pʋda tẽn-gãongã yʋʋr tɩ ‹tẽnga›, la b pʋd koomã sẽn tigma yʋʋr tɩ ‹ko-kãsemse.› Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ bõn-kãng yaa sõama." 
Genesis1:11 La Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bɩ bõn-vãad buud toor-toor yi: Mood sẽn womd biisi, tɩɩs sẽn womd b biis wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to dũniyã zugã.» La a yɩɩ woto." 
Genesis1:12 Bõn-vãad buud toor-toor yii tẽn-gãongã zugu, la mood buud toor-toor sẽn womd biis wa sẽn zems b buudã yiime, tɩ tɩɩs buud toor-toor sẽn womd biis yi wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to wã. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ bõn-kãng yaa sõama." 
Genesis1:13 Zaabr la yibeoog zĩndame. Rẽ yaa rasem a tãab daarã. 
Genesis1:14 La Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ ãdsã zĩnd sa-gãongẽ wã, n tõog n welg wĩndgã ne yʋngo. Bãmb na n yɩɩ bãn n wilg wakate, rayã, la yʋʋmã." 
Genesis1:15 Bɩ ãdsã zĩnd sa-gãongẽ wã n kõt dũniyã vẽenem. La a yɩɩ woto. 
Genesis1:16 Wẽnnaam naana vẽenem sẽn yaa kãsems a yiibu: n kɩt tɩ vẽenem ning sẽn yaa kãseng n yɩɩdã soog wĩndga, la tɩ vẽenem ning sẽn yaa bilfã, soog yʋngo. La bãmb naana ãdse." 
Genesis1:17 Wẽnnaam ninga bãmb sa-gãongẽ wã, n kɩt tɩ b kõt dũniyã vẽenem." 
Genesis1:18 La bãmb n so wĩndg ne yʋngo. La b welga vẽenemã ne likã. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ bõn-kãng yaa sõama." 
Genesis1:19 Zaabre, la yibeoog zĩndame, rẽ yaa rasem a naas daarã." 
Genesis1:20 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bɩ bõn-vɩɩlɩ pid ko-kãsengã pʋg n saagdẽ, tɩ bõn-yɩgdɩ me zĩnd dũniyã zugu, n yɩgd yĩngri.»" 
Genesis1:21 La Wẽnnaam leb n naana parwẽna sẽn be ko-kãsengã pʋgã, wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to, la b naan bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins sẽn dugd koomã pʋgã wa sẽn zems b buudu, la b yaa wʋsg n saagd koomã pʋga. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam leb n naana bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa wa sẽn zems b buudu. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ bõn-kãng yaa sõama." 
Genesis1:22 Woto, Wẽnnaam ning-b-la bark n yeele: «Bɩ y rog n fɩɩg n pid ko-kãsemsã, la bɩ bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fɩɩg wʋsg dũniyã zugu.»" 
Genesis1:23 Zaabr la yibeoog zĩndame. Rẽndã yɩɩ rasem a nu wã daare. 
Genesis1:24 Wẽnnaam leb n yeelame: «Bɩ bõn-vɩɩs buud toor-toor zĩnd dũniyã zugu. Yaa yir dũmsi, bõn-vuudsi, la we-rũmsi, bãmb fãa, buud toor-toore.» La a yɩɩ woto." 
Genesis1:25 Wẽnnaam naana we-rũms buud toor-toore, yir rũmsã buud toor-toore, la b naan bõn-bãooneg nins sẽn saagd tẽngã wa sẽn zems b buudu. Wẽnnaam yãame tɩ bõn-kãng yaa sõama." 
Genesis1:26 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yeelame: «D maan ninsaal t'a yɩ wa tõndo, n tar tõnd wẽnego. Bɩ ninsaal soog zĩmã sẽn be koomã pʋgã, la a soog bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã ne yir rũmsã, la dũniyã gill fãa ne bõn-vuuds nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Genesis1:27 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam naana ninsaalbã n wẽneg b menga. Wẽnnaam naan-b lame n wẽneg bãmb a Wẽnnaam mengã. Wẽnnaam naana bãmb pag ne raoa." 
Genesis1:28 Wẽnnaam ning-b-la bark n yeel-ba: «Rog-y kamb n fɩɩg n pid dũniyã, la y soog-a. Soog-y zĩmã sẽn be ko-kãsengẽ wã, ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã, la y soog rũmsã sẽn vuud tẽn-gãongã zugã.»" 
Genesis1:29 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Ade, mam kõta yãmb mood nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã pʋg n womd biisã, ne tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn womd biisã. Bãmb na n yɩɩ yãmb dɩɩbo." 
Genesis1:30 La rũms nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã, ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn vuud tẽn-gãongã zugã, bõn-vɩɩs nins fãa sẽn vɩ dũniyã rɩɩb na n yɩɩ mo-maasa.» La a yɩɩ woto." 
Genesis1:31 Wẽnnaam yãndame tɩ bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn naanã sɩd yaa sõama hal wʋsgo. Zaabr la yibeoog zĩndame. Rẽndã yɩɩ rasem a yoob daarã. 
Genesis2:1 Yɩɩ woto la Wẽnnaam naan yĩngrã ne tẽngã, la bũmb nins sẽn be b pʋsẽ wã n sɛ." 
Genesis2:2 La sẽn wa n na n ta rasem a yopoe daarã, rẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam naana bũmbã fãa n sɛ. La rasem a yopoe daarã, Wẽnnaam vʋʋsa ne b tʋʋmã fãa." 
Genesis2:3 Woto, Wẽnnaam ninga rasem a yopoe wã daar barka, n welg-a toor b mengã yĩnga. Bala, bãmb vʋʋsa badaar ne tʋʋm nins fãa bãmb sẽn maanã." 
Genesis2:4 Yaa woto la b naan yĩngrã ne tẽngã b naanegã wakate. Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n naan yĩngr la tẽngã wakate," 
Genesis2:5 rẽ tɩ tɩɩg baa a yembr ka be tẽn-gãongã zugu, la mood me rag n nan ka yi wetã pʋs ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n nan ka kɩt tɩ saag ni dũniyã zug ye, la ninsaal me rag n ka be dũniyã zug n na n ko-a ye." 
Genesis2:6 La koom n dag n pusgd n yit n zãgsd tẽn-gãongã. 
Genesis2:7 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka tẽngã tom n maan ninsaala. La Wẽnnaam fʋʋsa ninsaal yõ-bogdã pʋga, n ning vɩɩm ninsaal pʋgẽ. La ninsaal lebga nin-vɩɩga." 
Genesis2:8 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n maana zẽed zĩig n ning Edɛn tẽngã yaanga, la b rɩka ninsaal bãmb sẽn naanã n ning beenẽ." 
Genesis2:9 Wẽnnaam dag n kɩtame tɩ tɩɩs yi. Yaa tɩɩs buud toay-toay sẽn yaa neeba, la sẽn tar bi-nood sẽn tõe n dɩ. La zẽedã zĩig tẽn-sʋka, Wẽnnaam ninga tɩɩg sẽn kõt vɩɩm, ne wẽng la sõmb bãngr tɩɩga." 
Genesis2:10 Ko-zoetem n dag n yit Edɛn tẽngã pʋg n zãgsd zẽedã zĩiga. La zẽedã zĩigẽ wã, ko-zoetmã welga ko-soay a naase." 
Genesis2:11 Pipi Ko-sorã yʋʋr boondame tɩ ‹Pison.› Ko-so-kãng gilga Havɩla tẽngã. Havɩla yaa tẽng sẽn tar sãnem. 
Genesis2:12 Havɩla tẽng sãnemã yaa sãnem halaale. Soolem-kãng pʋgẽ me, tɩɩs buud sũm sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la kugr buud b sẽn boond tɩ Onigs n be beenẽ." 
Genesis2:13 Ko-sor a yiibẽ soabã yʋʋr boondame tɩ ‹Gihon.› Ko-so-kãng zoetame n gilgd Kuus tẽngã. 
Genesis2:14 Ko-sor a tãabẽ soabã yʋʋr boondame tɩ ‹tɩɩgre.› Ko-so-kãng zoetame n teesd Asiiri tẽngã yaanga. La yaoolem ko-sorã sẽn yaa naasẽ soabã yʋʋr boondame tɩ Efrate. 
Genesis2:15 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab talla ninsaal n tɩ ning Edɛn zẽedã zĩig pʋga, t'a ko-a la a ges a yelle." 
Genesis2:16 La Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo ninsaal noor n yeele: «Fo tõe n dɩɩ tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn be zẽedã zĩig pʋgẽ wã biisi.» 
Genesis2:17 Bãmb leb n yeela ninsaala: «Yaa tɩɩg ning sẽn kɩtd tɩ ned bãng wẽnga, ne sõmb n bakã biis bal la fo ka tog n dɩ. Bala, daar ninga fo sẽn na n dɩ tɩ-kãngã bilã, fo na n kiime.»" 
Genesis2:18 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «A ka neer tɩ ninsaal zĩnd a yembr ye. Mam na n maana sõngd sẽn wẽnd yẽnda n kõ-a.» 
Genesis2:19 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka tẽngã tom n maan we-rũmsã fãa, la bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa. Wẽnnaam talla bãmb n wa ninsaal nengẽ, n na n ges yẽnda sẽn na n pʋd b yʋyã to-to, tɩ bõn-vɩɩsã fãa yembr-yembr tõe n paam yʋʋr wa ninsaal sẽn na n kõ-a wã." 
Genesis2:20 Ninsaal pʋda yir dũmsã fãa yʋyã, la bõn-yɩgdɩ sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã yʋyã, la a pʋd we-rũmsã fãa yʋyã. La ninsaal ka tol n yãnd sõangd sẽn wẽnd yẽnda ye." 
Genesis2:21 Woto, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ gõe-kãseng yõk ninsaal t'a gũsi. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yãka ninsaal sĩif kõbr a yembre, la b lebs nemdã n page." 
Genesis2:22 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka sĩifã kõbr ning bãmb sẽn yãk ninsaalã sĩifẽ wã n naan pag n tall-a n wa ninsaal nengẽ. 
Genesis2:23 La ninsaal yeelame: «Ade, moasã, yõwã yaa mam kõabã kõbre, la mam yĩngã neongo. B na n boonda yẽnda tɩ paga: Bala, b yãka yẽnda rao yĩngẽ.»" 
Genesis2:24 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩte, tɩ rao na n bas a ba ne a ma, n tɩ loe a meng ne a paga. La bãmb na n lebga yĩng a yembre." 
Genesis2:25 Raoã ne a pagã fãa rag n yaa b zaala, la b rag n ka mi yãnd ye." 
Genesis3:1 Waaf rag n yaa sɩlem soab n yɩɩd we-rũmsã fãa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maanã. Waafã soka pagã yaa: «Sɩd-sɩdã, rẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam yeela yãmb tɩ y ra rɩ tɩɩsã fãa sẽn be zẽedã zĩigẽ wã biis sɩda?»" 
Genesis3:2 Pagã yeela waafã yaa: «Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ tõnd tõe n dɩɩ tɩɩsã sẽn be zẽedã zĩig pʋgẽ wã biisi. 
Genesis3:3 La sã n yaa ne tɩɩg ning sẽn be-a zẽedã zĩig tẽn-sʋkã, Wẽnnaam yeelame yaa: ‹Ra yãk-y-yã a biisã n dɩ, la y ra tol n sɩɩs-a me ye. Sã ka rẽ, yãmb sã n sɩɩs-a, yãmb na n kiime.› »" 
Genesis3:4 Dẽ, waafã yeela pagã yaa: «Yãmb ka na n tol n ki ye!" 
Genesis3:5 La yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam miime, tɩ yãmb sã n dɩ tɩɩgã bil daare, yãmb yamã na n wekame tɩ yãmb lebg wa Wẽnnaam, n mi sõama ne wẽng n bake.»" 
Genesis3:6 Pagã gesame tɩ tɩɩgã biis yaa sõama tɩ rɩ, la a bee neer tɩ gese, la a yaa tɩɩg sẽn wat ne ratem tɩ rɩ n paam yam vẽnegre. Dẽ, pagã yãka tɩɩgã bil n dɩ, la a kõ a sɩdã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã me t'a rɩ." 
Genesis3:7 Woto, bãmb b yiibã yam wekame, la bãmb bãngame tɩ b yaa b zaala. Dẽ, bãmb pãnema kankang vãad n sẽgne." 
Genesis3:8 Zaab-noor wakate, raoã ne a pagã wʋma Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n gõod zẽedã zĩig pʋg rãamde. Dẽ bãmb kẽe zẽedã zĩig tɩɩs sʋk n solg b meng ne Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Genesis3:9 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab boola raoã n sok-a yaa: «Fo bee yɛɛnẽ?» 
Genesis3:10 Raoã leokame: «Mam wʋma yãmb rãamd zẽedã zĩig pʋga, dẽ, rabeem yõka maam. Bala, mam yaa m zaala. Dẽ kɩtame tɩ mam zoe n soonde.»" 
Genesis3:11 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ãnda n yeel foom tɩ f yaa f zaala? M mi tɩ fo ka rɩ tɩɩg ning mam sẽn yeel foom tɩ f ra rɩ wã biis la?» 
Genesis3:12 Raoã leokame: «Yaa yãmb sẽn kõ maam pag ning t'a be ne maamã n yãk tɩɩgã bil n kõ maam tɩ m dɩ.» 
Genesis3:13 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka pagã yaa: «Paga, yaa bõe tɩ fo maan woto?» La pagã leokame: «Yaa waafã n belg maam n kɩt tɩ mam dɩ tɩɩgã bila.»" 
Genesis3:14 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela waafã yaa: «Fo sẽn maan woto wã yĩnga, kãab-wẽng bee fo zugu, yir rũmsã fãa ne we-rũmsã fãa sʋka. Fo kẽndã na n yɩɩ ne f pʋgã, la tẽngã tom n na n yɩ fo rɩɩbo, hal fo vɩɩmã tɛka." 
Genesis3:15 Mam na n ninga beem foom ne pagã sʋka, la fo yagengã ne pagã yageng sʋka. Pagã yageng na n bedsa fo zugu, la fo na n pogla yẽnda nao-kãsenkãare.»" 
Genesis3:16 Wẽnnaam yeela pagã yaa: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo tʋdb wakat yɩ toog wʋsg ne-fo. Fo rogem na n yɩɩ toogo. Fo ratmã ne f yamã na n loee ne f sɩdã. La fo sɩdã na n sooga foom ne f ratmã fãa.» 
Genesis3:17 Wẽnnaam yeela raoã yaa: «Fo sẽn sak f pagã noorã, n dɩ tɩɩg ning mam sẽn dag n yeel foom tɩ f ra rɩ wã biisã yĩnga, mam na n ninga kãab-wẽng tẽn-gãongã zugu. Tẽn-gãongã na n paama kãab-wẽng fo yĩnga. Fo vɩɩmã tɛka, f na n namsa wʋsg n yaool n paam f rɩɩbo." 
Genesis3:18 Gõos ne mo-gõos na n yii tẽn-gãongã zugu. Weoogã moodã na n yɩɩ fo rɩɩbo. 
Genesis3:19 La fo na n kaaga f rĩir tʋʋlg n yaool n paam dɩɩb n dɩ. Hal tɩ ta daar ning fo sẽn na n lebg n leb tẽng tomẽ wã. B sẽn yãk tẽng tom n maan foomã yĩnga. Bala, fo yaa tẽng tom, la fo na n leb n leba tẽng tomẽ.»" 
Genesis3:20 A Ãdem pʋda a pagã yʋʋr t'a Hawa, sẽn dat n togs t'a ‹vɩɩm›, yẽnda sẽn yaa nin-vɩɩsã fãa ma wã yĩnga." 
Genesis3:21 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka gãnd n maan fut n yeelg a Ãdem ne a pagã. 
Genesis3:22 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Moasã, ninsaal lebga wa tõndo, n mi sõama ne wẽng n bake, rẽ wã, bɩ d gũus t'a ra wa yãk tɩɩg ning biis sẽn kõt vɩɩmã me n dɩ, n kell n vɩ n ka kiidẽ ye.»" 
Genesis3:23 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab riga yẽnda n yiis zẽedã zĩigẽ, n kɩt tɩ b ko tẽn-gãongã sẽn yaa zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tomã n maan bãmbã." 
Genesis3:24 Wẽnnaam sẽn dig ninsaal n yiis zẽedã zĩig pʋgẽ wã loogr zugẽ, b ninga Serubẽ-rãmb Edɛn zẽedã zĩig yaanga, ne sʋʋg sẽn wit bugum t'a wẽnemded zĩigã fãa, n gũud zẽedã zĩigã sor ning sẽn dabd tɩɩg ning biis sẽn kõt vɩɩmã sẽnẽ wã." 
Genesis4:1 A Ãdem bãnga a pag a Hawa, la a rɩka pʋg n dog biig n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Kayẽ. Pagã yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõnga maam tɩ m dog raoa.»" 
Genesis4:2 Rẽ zugẽ, yẽnda roga a Kayẽ yao a Abɛlle. La a Abɛll lebga rũm-kɩɩmda rũm-bãoonego, t'a Kayẽ yaa ka-koaada." 
Genesis4:3 La sẽn be n beẽ, a Kayẽ yãka bõn-koaadlã biisi, tɩ yaa kũuni, t'a na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Genesis4:4 A Abɛll me yãka yẽnda rũm-bãoonegã kom-dẽems kẽer sẽn tar kaamã n tall n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yɩɩ noog ne a Abɛlle, la ne a kũunã." 
Genesis4:5 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka reeg a Kayẽ ne a kũunã ye. Dẽ kɩtame, t'a Kayẽ sũurã puug hal wʋsgo, hal t'a nengã gãneme." 
Genesis4:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka a Kayẽ yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo puugd f sũur woto tɩ f neng gãneme? 
Genesis4:7 Fo sã n maan sẽn yaa sõama, f na n tõog n zẽka f zugu, la f sã n ka maan sẽn yaa sõama, yel-wẽnã wũga fo rignoorẽ, la a rat n sooga foom, bee ne foom tɩ f tõog-a.»" 
Genesis4:8 Woto, a Kayẽ goma ne a yao a Abɛll gomde. La bãmb sẽn wa n be we-kɛɛnga, a Kayẽ yika zabr ne a Abɛlle, n kʋ-a." 
Genesis4:9 Rẽ zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka a Kayẽ yaa: «Fo yao a Abɛll bee yɛɛnẽ?» La yẽnda leokame: «Mam ka mi ye! Rẽ yĩnga, mam yaa m yao wã gũud la?»" 
Genesis4:10 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam leb n yeel-a lame: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maanã? Fo yao wã zɩɩm bee tẽn-gãongã zug n kelemdẽ tɩ tat maam." 
Genesis4:11 Moasã, kãab-wẽng bee fo zugu, fo na n zãaga ne tẽng ning sẽn yaag a noor n deeg fo yao wã zɩɩmã fo sẽn daag ne f meng nusã." 
Genesis4:12 Fo sã n ko tẽn-gãongã, a ka na n leb n kõ foom a bi-sõama wã ye. Fo na n yeeba dũniyã, n ka yas zĩ-yɛng ye.»" 
Genesis4:13 A Kayẽ yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Mam kongrã sɩbgr yaa kãseng wʋsg n yɩɩd mam sẽn tõe n zɩ. 
Genesis4:14 Yãmb digda maam dũndã n yiisd tẽng ning sẽn sakd koobã pʋga, tɩ mam ka na n tõog n leb n yãnd yãmb yɛs ye, la m na n yɩɩ yɛɛbda, n ka yas zĩ-yɛng dũniyã zug ye. La ned ning sẽn yãnd maam, a na n kʋʋ maam.»" 
Genesis4:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ned sã n kʋ a Kayẽ, mam na n doka m sũur ne a soab naoor a yopoe.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Kayẽ bãnde, tɩ ned sã n yãnd-a bɩ a ra kʋ-a ye." 
Genesis4:16 La a Kayẽ yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n loog n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Nood tẽngã sẽn be Edɛn zẽedã zĩig yaangã. 
Genesis4:17 A Kayẽ kẽe ne a pagã, la a rɩka pʋga, n dog a Enoke. Rẽ zugẽ, a Kayẽ tii tẽng n kẽ, n pʋd tẽngã yʋʋr tɩ Enok wa yẽnda bi-riblã yʋʋrã." 
Genesis4:18 A Enok n dog a Iraade, t'a Iraad dog a Mehuyayɛlle, t'a Mehuyayɛll dog a Metusayɛlle, t'a Metusayɛll dog a Lemeke." 
Genesis4:19 A Lemek peega pagb a yiibu, t'a yembr boondẽ t'a Ada, t'a to wã yʋʋr yaa a Sɩla." 
Genesis4:20 A Ada roga a Yaballe. Neb nins fãa sẽn be fu-rot pʋsẽ n gʋʋnd dũmsã yaa a Yaball yagense. 
Genesis4:21 A Yaball yao wã yʋʋr boondame t'a Yuballe. Neb nins sẽn wẽed pends la b peebd wɩɩsã yaa yẽnda yagense. 
Genesis4:22 La a Sɩla roga a Tuball-Kayẽ. Yẽnda yaa sãy n kut zũud ne kut teed buudã fãa. A Tuball-Kayẽ yao bi-puglã yʋʋr la a Naama. 
Genesis4:23 A Lemek yeela a pagbã: «A Ada ne a Sɩla, kelg-y mam koɛɛgã: A Lemek pagba, yok-y y tʋb n kelg mam goamã! Mam kʋʋ raoa, m poglgã yĩnga, la m kʋ biiga, m sãmpogrã yĩnga." 
Genesis4:24 B sã n dok b sũur naoor a yopoe a Kayẽ yĩnga, b na n doka b sũur naoor pis-yopoe la a yopoe maam a Lemek yĩnga.»" 
Genesis4:25 A Ãdem leb n kẽe ne a pagã, la a roga bi-ribl n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Sɛte. Bala, a yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kõo biig a to n ledg a Abɛll a Kayẽ sẽn kʋ wã zĩigẽ.»" 
Genesis4:26 A Sɛt me paama bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Enoose. Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, nebã sɩngame n pʋʋsd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre." 
Genesis5:1 Ad sebr ning sẽn wilgd a Ãdem yagensã. Daar ning Wẽnnaam sẽn naan ninsaalbã, bãmb naan-b lame n wẽneg b menga." 
Genesis5:2 Wẽnnaam naana bãmba, raoa la paga. Wẽnnaam ninga bãmb bark n pʋd b yʋʋr tɩ ninsaala, b sẽn naan bãmbã wakate." 
Genesis5:3 A Ãdem sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã, a roga bi-ribl n wẽneg a menga, wa yẽnda yalẽ wã sẽn yaa to-to wã, la a pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Sɛte." 
Genesis5:4 A Ãdem vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm kobs-nii a Sɛt rogmã zugẽ. La a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli. 
Genesis5:5 A Ãdem vɩɩmã tɛk fãa yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la pis-tã, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:6 A Sɛt sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabg la a nu, a roga a Enoose." 
Genesis5:7 A Enoos rogmã zugẽ, a Sɛt vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm kobs-nii la a yopoe, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:8 A Sɛt vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la piig la a yiibu, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:9 A Enoos sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-wɛ, a roga a Kenan." 
Genesis5:10 A Kenan rogmã zugẽ, a Enoos vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nii la piig la a nu, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:11 A Enoos vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la a nu, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:12 A Kenan sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-yopoe, a roga a Mahalalɛlle." 
Genesis5:13 A Mahalaleyɛll rogmã zugẽ, a Kenan vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nii la pis-naase, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:14 A Kenan vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la piiga, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:15 A Mahalaleyɛll sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-yoob la a nu, a roga a Yerɛɛde." 
Genesis5:16 A Yerɛɛd rogmã zugẽ, a Mahalaleyɛll vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nii la pis-tã, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:17 Mahalaleyɛll vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-nii la pis-wɛ la a nu, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:18 A Yerɛɛd sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabg la pis-yoob la a yiibu, a roga a Enoke." 
Genesis5:19 A Enok rogmã zugẽ, a Yerɛɛd vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nii, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:20 A Yerɛɛd vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la pis-yoob la a yiibu, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:21 A Enok sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-yoob la a nu, a roga a Matusela." 
Genesis5:22 A Matusela rogmã zugẽ, a Enok tũu Wẽnnaam yʋʋm kobs-tã, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:23 A Enok vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-tã la pis-yoob la a nu. 
Genesis5:24 A Enok tũu Wẽnnaam, la a wa n ka beẽ ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam zẽk-a lame n looge." 
Genesis5:25 A Matusela sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabg la pis-nii la a yopoe, a roga a Lemeke." 
Genesis5:26 A Lemek rogmã zugẽ, a Matusela vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-yopoe la pis-nii la a yiibu, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:27 A Matusela vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la pis-yoob la a wɛ, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:28 A Lemek sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabg la pis-nii la a yiibu, a roga bi-ribla." 
Genesis5:29 A Lemek pʋda a biigã yʋʋr t'a Nowe, n yeele: «Bi-kãngã na n yɩɩ belsg tõnd yĩnga, d tʋʋm-toodã yĩnga. Yaa tʋʋm nins tõnd sẽn tʋmd tẽn-gãong ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kãab wẽngã zugã.»" 
Genesis5:30 A Nowe rogmã zugẽ, a Lemek vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nu la pis-wɛ la a nu, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:31 A Lemek vɩɩmã zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-yopoe la pis-yopoe la a yopoe, la a kiime." 
Genesis5:32 A Nowe sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm kobs-nu, a roga a Sɛm, a Kam ne a Zafɛte." 
Genesis6:1 Ninsaalbã sẽn wa n sɩng n fɩɩgd n lebgd wʋsg dũniyã zugã, bãmb doga kom-pugli." 
Genesis6:2 Wẽnnaam kom-dibli wã gesame tɩ ninsaalbã kom-pugli wã yaa neeba, la bãmb baoo kom-pugli bãmb sʋkã n maan b pagba." 
Genesis6:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam sɩɩgã ka na n kell n pa ninsaal pʋgẽ wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩng ye. Bala, ninsaal yaa yĩng bala. Dẽ, yẽnda yʋʋmã na n yɩɩ koabg la pisi.»" 
Genesis6:4 Wakat-kãng tɩ nin-wobd bee dũniyã zugu, la b kell n zĩnda rẽ zugẽ me. Wẽnnaam kom-dibli wã sẽn wa n dɩgs ninsaalbã kom-pugli wã n maan b pagbã, b kẽe ne-ba, la b roga kamb n kõ-ba. Yaa kom-bãmb n dag n yaa kʋdem-wẽndẽ gãndaado, la b yɩɩ neb yʋʋr sẽn yi." 
Genesis6:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gesame tɩ ninsaalbã wẽngã lebga wʋsg dũniyã zugu, la daar fãa, ninsaal tagsda wẽng maaneg yell bala." 
Genesis6:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sãama ne b menga, bãmb sẽn maan ninsaal n ning dũniyã zugã, la bãmb sũur sãama wʋsgo." 
Genesis6:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam na n menesa ninsaal mam sẽn maanã dũniyã zugu, la yaa sẽn sɩng ne ninsaal n tall n tɩ tãag rũmsã ne bõn-bãoonegã, la ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã. Bala, mam sũurã sãama ne mam sẽn naan bãmbã.»" 
Genesis6:8 La a Nowe paama Sẽn-Ka-Saab nimbãan-zoeere. 
Genesis6:9 A Nowe yagensã la woto. A Nowe zamaanã neb fãa sʋka, yẽnda rag n yaa nin-tɩrga, n yaa burkĩna. A Nowe rag n tũuda Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis6:10 A Nowe roga kom-dibli a tãabo: A Sɛm ne a Kam, la a Zafɛte." 
Genesis6:11 Dũniyã rag n sãama Wẽnnaam nifẽ. Zĩiga fãa nebã rag n maanda taab pãnga. 
Genesis6:12 Wẽnnaam gesame tɩ dũniyã sãama zãnga. Bala, ninsaalbã fãa rag n tʋmda tʋʋm-beed dũniyã zugu." 
Genesis6:13 Woto, Wẽnnaam yeela a Nowe yaa: «Mam yãka yam n na n menes bõn-vɩɩsã buud fãa. Bala, bãmb kɩtame tɩ dũniyã pid ne tʋʋm-beedo. Woto yĩngã, mam na n naag-b-la ne dũniyã n sãame." 
Genesis6:14 Dẽ wã, bɩ f bao tɩɩg raad sẽn tar pãng n maan koom koglg f mengã yĩnga. Fo tog n maana koom koglgã, t'a tar pʋse. La f bao sũud n bol a pʋgã ne a yɩngã." 
Genesis6:15 Ad fo sẽn na n maan koom koglgã to-to: Koom koglgã woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg kobs-tã, t'a yalmã yɩ kãntɩɩg pis-nu, t'a zãntlmã yɩ kãntɩɩg pis-tã." 
Genesis6:16 Fo tog n paga a yĩngrã, la pagdgã zãntlem tog n zẽk n taa kãntɩɩg a yembre, fo tog n paga koglgã yĩngri, t'a tẽn-sʋkã zẽk n ta kãntɩɩg a yembre, la f ning koom koglgã noor koglgã kɩrenga. Maan koglgã t'a yɩ ro-tomdem sẽn doglem taab a tãabo. Tẽngr roto, yiibẽ doto, la tãabẽ doto." 
Genesis6:17 La mam na n kɩtame tɩ sa-kẽeng ni dũniyã zugu, n sãam bũmb ning fãa sẽn vɩ, n vʋʋsd ne yõor n be saasã tẽngrã. Bũmb ning fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã na n sãamame." 
Genesis6:18 La mam na n maana m kaool ne foom. Fo na n kẽe koom koglgã pʋga, foom ne f kom-dibli wã, la f pagã ne f bi-pagbã." 
Genesis6:19 Fo na n kɩtame me, tɩ bõn-vɩɩsã gill fãa wa kẽ koglgã pʋg yiib-yiib n naag foom n paam n vɩɩmde. Fo tog n kẽesa raoog ne yãanga," 
Genesis6:20 kãadem-kãadem, wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to, bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, rũmsã, bõn-bãoonegã sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã fãa na n waa fo nengẽ, n tõog n vɩɩmde." 
Genesis6:21 La fo tog n baoo rɩɩb buud fãa sẽn tõe n dɩ, n bĩng f nengẽ, tɩ yãmb ne bãmb tõe n paamd rɩɩb n dɩtẽ.»" 
Genesis6:22 La a Nowe sɩd maana woto. A Nowe maana bũmbã fãa wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã kɛpɩ. A maana a woto. 
Genesis7:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Nowe yaa: «Bɩ foom ne f pagã, la f zakã rãmb fãa kẽ koom koglgã pʋga. Bala, mam gesame, tɩ fo zamaanã nebã sʋka, yaa foom f yembr n yaa nin-tɩrg mam taoore." 
Genesis7:2 Yãk rũm-sõama wã buud fãa kãadem-kãadem a yopoe-poe n ning f nengẽ, raoog ne yãanga. La f yãk rũms nins sẽn ka sõama m nifẽ wã me, raoog ne yãanga." 
Genesis7:3 La f yãk bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã me kãadem-kãadem yopoe-poe, raoog ne yãanga, tɩ bãmb me buudã tõe n zĩnd dũniyã zugu." 
Genesis7:4 Bala, ka ne rasem a yopoe, mam na n kɩtame tɩ saagã wa ni dũniyã zug rasem pis-naase, la yʋnd pis-naase, la mam na n menesa bõn-vɩɩsã buud fãa mam sẽn naanã.»" 
Genesis7:5 A Nowe maana bũmbã fãa wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã kɛpɩ. 
Genesis7:6 Sa-kẽengã sẽn wa n na n wa dũniyã zugã, rẽ t'a Nowe rag n tara yʋʋm kobs-yoobe." 
Genesis7:7 A Nowe kẽe koom koglgã pʋga, yẽnda ne a kom-dibli wã, la a pagã ne a bi-pagbã, n na n paam n põs sa-kẽengã koom." 
Genesis7:8 Rũm-sõama wã ne rũms nins sẽn ka sõama wã, n paas bõn-yɩgdɩ wã ne bõn-bãoonegã sẽn saad tẽn-gãongã zugã waame," 
Genesis7:9 la b kẽe koglgã pʋg kãadem-kãadem n naag a Nowe, raoog ne yãanga, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeel a Nowe wã." 
Genesis7:10 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, sa-kẽengã sɩnga niib dũniyã zugu." 
Genesis7:11 A Nowe sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm kobs-yoobã yʋʋmde, kiuug a yiib soabã rasem piig la a yopoe daarã, tẽngã zĩ-zulumsã ko-ninã pusame n yi, tɩ sa-gãongã ko-ninã pagse." 
Genesis7:12 La saagã nii dũniyã zug rasem pis-naase, la yʋnd pis-naase." 
Genesis7:13 La badaar bala, a Nowe ne a pagã, ne a kom-dibli a tãabã, a Sɛm, ne a Kam la a Zafɛte, ne b pagb a tãabã kẽe koom koglgã pʋga." 
Genesis7:14 La b kẽe ne we-rũmsã fãa wa sẽn zems b buudu, la yir rũmsã fãa wa sẽn zems b buudu, la ne bõn-bãoonegã fãa sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã wa sẽn zem b buudu, bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa wa sẽn zems b buudu, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn tar pɩgs n yɩgdã." 
Genesis7:15 Bũmb nins fãa sẽn tar vʋʋsmã kẽe koglgã pʋg kãadem-kãadem, n naag a Nowe." 
Genesis7:16 Bãmb fãa kẽe beenẽ raoog ne yãang raoog ne yãanga, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeel a Nowe wã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab paga koom koglgã t'a Nowe be pʋgẽ." 
Genesis7:17 Sa-kẽengã nii dũniyã zug n kaoos rasem pis-naase. Koomã lebga wʋsgo, la a zẽka koglgã t'a bas tẽn-gãongã." 
Genesis7:18 Koomã rag n paasdame n lebgd wʋsg dũniyã zugu, la koglgã rag n dugda koomã zugu." 
Genesis7:19 Koomã rag n lebgda wʋsg dũniyã zug n paasdẽ. La a lima tãms nins fãa sẽn yaa lug-lug n be dũniyã zugã. 
Genesis7:20 Koomã lima tãmsã hal n zʋʋg t'a zulmã ta kãntɩɩg piig la a nu. 
Genesis7:21 Bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n vɩ dũniyã zugã kiime. Yaa bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, la yir rũmsi, we-rũmsi, la bõn-bãooneg nins fãa sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã, la ne ninsaalbã fãa." 
Genesis7:22 Bũmb nins fãa sẽn vʋʋsd ne yõor n dag n be tẽn-koɛɛngã zugã kiime. 
Genesis7:23 Wẽnnaam menesa bõn-vɩɩs nins fãa sẽn dag n be dũniyã zugã, yaa ninsaalbã, rũmsã, bõn-bãoonegã ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã. B menesa bãmb fãa dũniyã zugu. Yaa a Nowe ne sẽn dag n be-b koglgã pʋgã bal n põse." 
Genesis7:24 Koomã kell n yɩɩ wʋsg dũniyã zug n kaoos rasem koabg la pis-nu. 
Genesis8:1 Wẽnnaam tẽega a Nowe ne we-rũmsã ne yir dũmsã fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda koglgã pʋgẽ wã yelle, dẽ, b kɩtame tɩ sobg fʋʋs dũniyã zugu, la koomã boogame." 
Genesis8:2 Zĩ-zulumsã ko-ninã ne saagã ko-ninã fãa lebs n pagame, la saagã yoogame." 
Genesis8:3 Koomã rag n fẽbgda bilf-bilf dũniyã zugu, la rasem koabg la pis-nu pʋgẽ, a boogame." 
Genesis8:4 Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig la a yopoe daarã, koglgã tɩ yalsa Ararat tãngã zugu." 
Genesis8:5 Koomã rag n ket n boogdame hal tɩ ta kiuug piig soabã. Kiuug piig soabã pipi daarã, tãmsã zut pukame." 
Genesis8:6 La sẽn ta rasem pis-naase, a Nowe paka koglgã võor ninga yẽnda sẽn dag n maanã." 
Genesis8:7 A Nowe basa gãabg t'a yi, la a kẽngdame la a lebgd n watẽ, hal tɩ koomã wa kʋɩ dũniyã zugu." 
Genesis8:8 A Nowe basa manwall me t'a yi, sẽn na n ges koomã sã n yõbga tẽn-gãongã zugu." 
Genesis8:9 La manwallã ka paam zĩig n na n zaoond ye, la a lebg n waa a Nowe nengẽ koglgã pʋga, bala, koomã rag n ket n bee tẽn-gãongã zãng fãa zugu. La a Nowe tẽega a nug tɩ wallã zomb t'a kẽes-a koglgã pʋga." 
Genesis8:10 La a Nowe leb n yals gũume tɩ ta rasem a yopoe, n yaool n leb n bas wallã t'a yi koglgã pʋga." 
Genesis8:11 La zaabr sasa, manwallã lebg n waame, la ade, b mikame t'a yãka oliiv tɩɩg vãoog n zãad a noorẽ. Dẽ, a Nowe bãngame tɩ koomã yõbga dũniyã zugu." 
Genesis8:12 A Nowe leb n yaasa rasem a yopoe n paase, n yaool n leb n bas manwallã t'a yi. La wallã ka lebg n wa yẽnda nengẽ yɛs ye." 
Genesis8:13 A Nowe sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm kobs-yoob la a yembrã yʋʋmde, pipi kiuugã pipi daare, koomã kʋɩɩ dũniyã zugu. A Nowe paka koglgã limdã n ges n mik tɩ tẽn-gãongã zugã fãa kʋɩɩme." 
Genesis8:14 Kiuug a yiib soabã rasem pisi la a yopoe daarã, tẽngã zãng rag n yaa koɛɛnga." 
Genesis8:15 Woto, Wẽnnaam yeela a Nowe yaa:" 
Genesis8:16 «Bɩ foom ne f pagã, la f kom-dibli wã, ne f bi-pagbã yi koglgã pʋga." 
Genesis8:17 Kɩt tɩ bõn-vɩɩlɩ wã buud fãa sẽn be ne foomã tũ foom n yi. Yaa bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, ne rũmsã la bõn-bãoonegã sẽn saagd tẽngã zugã. Bɩ bãmb doge, n fɩɩg n pid dũniyã.»" 
Genesis8:18 A Nowe ne a kom-dibli wã, la a pagã ne a bi-pagbã yiime." 
Genesis8:19 Rũmsã fãa ne bõn-bãoonegã fãa, la bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn saagd dũniyã zugã wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to wã fãa yii koglgã pʋga." 
Genesis8:20 A Nowe mee tẽn-kugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. A Nowe yãka rũm-sõama wã buud fãa, la bõn-yɩgdɩ nins fãa sẽn yaa sõama wã, n kʋ n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Genesis8:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma yũ-noogã, la bãmb yeela b sũurẽ: «Mam ka na n leb n kãab dũniyã kãab-wẽng ninsaal yĩng ye. Bala, hal ninsaal yãadem wakate, a tagsda wẽng maaneg bal a sũurẽ. La mam ka na n leb n sãam bõn-vɩɩsã wa mam sẽn zoe n maanã ye." 
Genesis8:22 Dũniyã sẽn na n zĩnd tɛka, bʋdb wakat ne tigsg wakat kõn kong ye. Waood wakat ne tʋʋlg wakat kõn kong ye. Sẽoog ne sɩpaolg na n zĩndame. Wĩntoog ne yʋng na n kell n zĩndame.»" 
Genesis9:1 Wẽnnaam ninga a Nowe ne a kom-dibli wã bark n yeel-b yaa: «Bɩ y rog n fɩɩg n pid dũniyã. 
Genesis9:2 Rũmsã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã, ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, la ne bõn-kẽndsã, ne zĩmã fãa sẽn be koomã pʋgã na n zoee yãmb wʋsgo. Yãmb na n sooga bãmba." 
Genesis9:3 Bõn-kẽnds nins fãa sẽn vɩ wã na n yɩɩ yãmb dɩɩbo. Mam kõt-b-la yãmba, wa mam sẽn kõ yãmb bõn-vãadã." 
Genesis9:4 La bũmb sẽn be bala, yaa tɩ yãmb ka tog n dɩ rũng ne a vɩɩm ye. Rat n yeelame tɩ y ra rɩ-a ne a zɩɩmã ye." 
Genesis9:5 Sẽn na n daag-a yãmb zɩɩm sẽn yaa y vɩɩmã, mam kõn bas a soab taal n ka sok-a ye. Sã n yaa rũng n kʋ neda, wall sã n yaa ninsaal n daag a ba-biig zɩɩm, mam na n sok-a lame." 
Genesis9:6 La ninsaal sã n daag a to zɩɩm, ninsaal me n na n daag yẽnda zɩɩm. Bala, Wẽnnaam naana ninsaal wa bãmb mengã wẽnego." 
Genesis9:7 La yãmba, rog-y kamb n pid dũniyã, la y fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg dũniyã zugu.»" 
Genesis9:8 Wẽnnaam leb n goma ne a Nowe ne a kambã n yeel-b yaa: 
Genesis9:9 «Ade, mam maanda m kaool maam ne yãmb sʋka, la yãmb yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl yãmbã sʋka." 
Genesis9:10 La kaoolã na n zĩnda maam ne bõn-vɩɩsã buud fãa sẽn be ne yãmbã sʋka. Yaa bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, rũmsã, la ne we-rũms buudã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã, la ne bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins fãa sẽn yi koom koglgã pʋgã, la ne we-rũms nins fãa sẽn na n zĩnd dũniyã zugã sʋka." 
Genesis9:11 Mam viginda m kaoolã ne yãmba. B ka na n leb n sãam bõn-vɩɩsã ne sa-kẽeng ye, sa-kẽeng ka na n leb n zĩnd n sãam dũniyã yɛs ye.»" 
Genesis9:12 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Ad kaool ning mam sẽn maand ne yãmbã bãnde. Bãndã na n zĩnda maam ne yãmb sʋka, la ne bõn-vɩɩsã sẽn be ne yãmbã sʋka, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Genesis9:13 Mam ningda m saag gomtɩʋʋg sawatẽ, la a na n yɩɩ kaoolã bãnde, maam ne dũniyã sʋka." 
Genesis9:14 Mam sã n wa n tigim sawatã dũniyã zugu, saag gomtɩʋʋgã na puka sawatẽ wã," 
Genesis9:15 la mam na n leb n tagsa mam kaoolã sẽn be maam ne yãmb sʋkã, la ne bõn-vɩɩsã sʋkã yelle. La koomã ka na n leb tigim n yɩ sa-kẽeng sẽn na n sãam bõn-vɩɩsã fãa ye." 
Genesis9:16 Saag gomtɩʋʋgã na n zĩnda sawatẽ, la mam na n ges-a lame n tags tɩ kaool n be maam a Wẽnnaam ne bõn-vɩɩsã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã sʋk wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.»" 
Genesis9:17 Wẽnnaam yeela a Nowe yaa: «Ade, yaa bõn-kãng n na n yɩ bãnde, n wilg kaool ning mam sẽn maan maam ne bõn-vɩɩsã sẽn be dũniyã zugã sʋkã.»" 
Genesis9:18 A Nowe kom-dibli nins sẽn yi koglgã pʋgã yaa a Sɛm, a Kam ne a Zafɛte. A Kam yaa a Kana baaba." 
Genesis9:19 Yaa a Nowe kom-dibli a tãabã yagensã n leb n sãeeg n be dũniyã fãa pʋga. 
Genesis9:20 A Nowe sɩnga tẽn-gãongã koobo, la a sela reezẽ tɩɩse." 
Genesis9:21 La a Nowe yũu reezẽ rãam t'a nengã yilim t'a gãe a zaal fasɩ, a fu-roogã pʋga." 
Genesis9:22 A Kam sẽn yaa Kana nebã yaabã yãnda a ba a Nowe zaalã, n dɩk n yi yɩng n togs a ba-biis a yiibã." 
Genesis9:23 Dẽ, a Sɛm ne a Zafɛt rɩka fu-goabg n palg b bãgdo, n tar po-tula n tɩ lud b ba wã sẽn dag n gãe a zaalã. Bãmb sẽn dag n wẽnemd b nensã n get kɛɛngã yĩnga, bãmb ka yãnd b ba wã yãndã ye." 
Genesis9:24 La a Nowe rãamã sẽn yi, a wʋma yẽnda bi-yao wã sẽn maan yẽnda bũmb ningã." 
Genesis9:25 Dẽ, a Nowe yeelame: «Bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd a Kana zugu! Yẽnda na n yɩɩ a ba-biisã yembsã yamba.»" 
Genesis9:26 A Nowe leb n yeelame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sẽn yaa a Sɛm Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre. Bɩ a Kana yɩ bãmb yamba!" 
Genesis9:27 Bɩ Wẽnnaam kɩt t'a Zafɛt soolmã yalge! Bɩ yẽnda zĩnd a Sɛm fu-rotã pʋse, t'a Kana yɩ bãmb yamba!»" 
Genesis9:28 Sa-kẽengã loogr poore, a Nowe leb n vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-tã la pis-nu n paase." 
Genesis9:29 A Nowe sẽn wa n na n ki wã t'a tara yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la pis-nu. 
Genesis10:1 A Nowe kom-dibli wã, a Sɛm ne a Kam la a Zafɛt yagens la woto. Sa-kẽengã loogr zugẽ, bãmb doga kom-dibli." 
Genesis10:2 A Zafɛt kom-dibli wã yaa: A Gomeere, a Magooge, a Madayi, a Yavan, a Tuballe, a Mesɛke, ne a Tɩɩrase." 
Genesis10:3 A Gomeer kom-dibli yaa: A Askenaaze, a Rifate, ne a Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 A Yavan kom-dibli yaa: A Eliiza, a Tarsɩɩse, a Kitim, ne a Dodanim." 
Genesis10:5 Yaa bãmb yagensã n sãeeg n be tẽms nins sẽn koom sẽn gũbgã, n lebg soolem-dãmb n tar b tẽmse, soolem fãa ne a goamã, la a roto." 
Genesis10:6 A Kam kom-dibli yaa: A Kuusi, ne a Mitsrayim, ne a Put la a Kana." 
Genesis10:7 A Kuus kom-dibli yaa a Seba, a Havɩla, a Sabta, a Rama, ne a Sabteka. A Rama kamb yaa a Seba, ne a Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 A Kuus me n dog a Nimroode. Yaa a Nimrood n yɩ pipi gãndaoog dũniyã zugu. 
Genesis10:9 Yẽnda rag n yaa tãoos gãndaoog sẽn tar pãng Zu-soabã taoore. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ b mi n yetẽ tɩ: «Gãndaoog wa tãoos a Nimrood sẽn yɩ pãng soab Zu-soabã taoorã.» 
Genesis10:10 Yẽnda reng n yɩɩ naab Babɛlle, Erɛke, Akaade, ne Kalne sẽn be Sineyaar soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis10:11 A Nimrood yii beenẽ n kẽng Asʋʋre, n tɩ tilg Niniiv tẽngã, ne Rehobot tẽngã, ne Kala tẽngã," 
Genesis10:12 ne Rezɛn tẽngã sẽn yaa tẽn-kãseng n be Niniiv ne Kala sʋka. 
Genesis10:13 A Mitsrayim yagens la Luud buudã, ne Anam buudã, ne Lehaab la Naftuwa buudã," 
Genesis10:14 ne Patroos la Kaslu buudã, yaa bãmb sʋk la Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Kaftoor-dãmbã yi yã." 
Genesis10:15 A Kana roga a bi-kãseng a Sɩdõ, ne a Ɛte." 
Genesis10:16 A Kana yagens yaa Zebuus-rãmbã ne Amoor-dãmbã, ne Girgaaz-rãmbã," 
Genesis10:17 ne Hevi-rãmbã, la ne Harki-rãmbã ne Sĩn nebã," 
Genesis10:18 la ne Arvaad-rãmbã, ne Semaar nebã, la Hamat-rãmbã. Rẽ zugẽ, Kana buudã neb yaool n sãeegame." 
Genesis10:19 Kana buudã neb soolem tɛk sɩngda ne Sɩdõ n dabd Geraar n tall n tɩ tãag Gaaza, n leb n yi Sodom sẽnẽ, n dabd Gomoor ne Adma la Seboyim, n tall n tɩ tãag Lesa." 
Genesis10:20 Woto yaa a Kam yagense, wa sẽn zems b rotã ne b buudã goamã sẽn yaa to-to, b tẽmsã ne b soolma pʋse." 
Genesis10:21 A Zafɛt kẽem a Sɛm me paama kom-dibli. Yaa a Sɛm n yaa a Hebɛɛr buudã yaaba. 
Genesis10:22 A Sɛm kom-dibli wã la woto: Yaa a Elam, a Asʋʋre, a Arpaksaade, a Luudi ne a Aram." 
Genesis10:23 A Aram kamb la woto: a Utsi, a Ulli, a Getɛɛr ne a Maase." 
Genesis10:24 A Arpaksaad n dog a Sela, t'a Sela rog a Hebɛɛre." 
Genesis10:25 A Hebɛɛr doga kom-dibli a yiibu. A pipi biigã yʋʋr la a Pelɛɛge, bala, yẽnda wakatẽ wã tɩ b rag n pʋɩɩ tẽngã, la a yao wã yʋʋr boondame t'a Yoktan." 
Genesis10:26 A Yoktan doga a Almodaad ne a Selɛf la a Hatsarmavɛt ne a Yera," 
Genesis10:27 la a Hadoram ne a Uzall la a Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 la a Oball ne a Abimayɛll la a Seba," 
Genesis10:29 ne a Ofɩɩre, la a Havɩla ne a Yobaabe. Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa a Yoktan kamba." 
Genesis10:30 Bãmb tilga b zagsã Mesa sẽn be sẽn dabd Sefaar tẽngã, n tall n tãag tãms nins sẽn be yaang sẽnẽ wã." 
Genesis10:31 Bãmb yaa a Sɛm yagense, wa sẽn zems b buudu, la goam buudu, la b tẽms ne b soolem." 
Genesis10:32 A Nowe kom-dibli wã yagens la woto, wa sẽn zems b roto, la b soolem. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne bãmba, la buud toor-toorã sãeeg n pid dũniyã sa-kẽengã loogr zugẽ." 
Genesis11:1 Dũniyã gill fãa rag n gomda gom-bu-yende, tɩ gom-biisã yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Genesis11:2 Bãmb sẽn yik yaangã, b tɩ yãnda zĩ-long sẽn be Sineyaar soolmẽ wã, la bãmb tii beenẽ n kẽ." 
Genesis11:3 La bãmb yẽsa ne taab n yeele: «Wa-y tɩ d wẽ tãn-koɛɛma, n wʋme.» Dẽ, tãn-koɛɛma reega kug zĩiga, tɩ tan sũud reeg tãn-maas zĩig meebã yĩnga." 
Genesis11:4 Bãmb leb n yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d me tẽnga, la d me gãosgo, t'a zugã woglem tẽkd saagã, la d bao yʋʋr n kõ d menga, n da wa sãeeg n pid dũniyã zãng ye.»" 
Genesis11:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sigame n na n ges tẽngã ne gãosgã ninsaalbã kamb sẽn dag n metã. 
Genesis11:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Ade, nebã yaa bũmb a yembre! La b fãa gomda gom-bu-yende, la ad bãmb sẽn sɩng n na n maane! Moasã, bũmb ka leb n tõe n gɩdg-b tɩ b ka maan b sẽn dat n maanã ye." 
Genesis11:7 Dẽ wã, d sig n gẽdg b goamã taaba, tɩ b ka leb n wʋmd taab goam ye.»" 
Genesis11:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b yi n zãag ne beenẽ n sãeeg n kẽ dũniyã gill fãa. La bãmb basa tẽngã meebo. 
Genesis11:9 Yaa woto n kɩte, tɩ b pʋd zĩ-kãng yʋʋrã tɩ ‹Babɛlle›, bala, yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ dũniyã nebã fãa goam gẽdg taaba. La yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ b sãeeg n be dũniyã zĩigã fãa." 
Genesis11:10 Ad a Sɛm yagensã la woto: A Sɛm sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm koabga, a roga a Arpaksaade, la rẽ tɩ yaa sa-kẽengã loog tɩ yʋʋm-yiiblẽ." 
Genesis11:11 A Arpaksaad rogmã zugẽ, a Sɛm vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-nu, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:12 A Arpaksaad sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu, a roga a Sela." 
Genesis11:13 A Sela rogmã zugẽ, a Arpaksaad vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-naas la a tãabo, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:14 A Sela sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã, a roga a Hebɛɛre." 
Genesis11:15 A Hebɛɛr dogma zugẽ, a Sela vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-naas la a tãabo, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:16 A Hebɛɛr sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã la a naase, a roga a Pelɛɛge." 
Genesis11:17 A Pelɛɛg rogmã zugẽ, a Hebɛɛr vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-naase, la a rog kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:18 A Pelɛɛg sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã, a roga a Rewu." 
Genesis11:19 A Rewu rogmã zugẽ, a Pelɛɛg vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobessi la a wɛ, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:20 A Rewu sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiibu, a roga a Seruugi." 
Genesis11:21 A Seruug rogmã zugẽ, a Rewu vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobessi la a yopoe, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:22 A Seruug sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-tã, a roga a Nahoore." 
Genesis11:23 A Nahoor dogma zugẽ, a Seruug vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobessi, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:24 A Nahoor sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ, a roga a Teera." 
Genesis11:25 A Teera rogmã zugẽ, a Nahoor vɩɩmda yʋʋm koabg la piig la a wɛ, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:26 A Teera sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-yopoe, a roga a Abram, a Nahoor ne a Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Ad a Teera yagensã: A Teera roga a Abram, a Nahoor ne a Haran. La a Haran roga a Lote." 
Genesis11:28 A Haran kiime t'a ba a Teera ket n vɩ, la yaa yẽnda sẽn dog tẽng ningã pʋgẽ, yaa Ʋʋr sẽn be Kalde rãmba soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis11:29 A Abram ne a Nahoor kẽe kãadem, la a Abram pagã yʋʋr la a Sarayi, t'a Nahoor pagã yʋʋr yaa a Milka, n yaa a Haran bi-pugla. A Haran yaa a Milka ne a Yiska ba." 
Genesis11:30 A Sarayi rag n yaa kiiri, n ka tar biig ye." 
Genesis11:31 A Teera peega a biig a Abram ne a yageng a Lot sẽn yaa a Haran bi-riblã, ne a bi-pag a Sarayi sẽn yaa yẽnda bi-ribl a Abram pagã, la bãmb tũu taab n yi Ʋʋr sẽn be Kalde rãmba soolmẽ wã, n kẽng Kana tẽnga. Bãmb sẽn ta Haran tẽngã, bãmb zĩnda beenẽ." 
Genesis11:32 A Teera vɩɩmda yʋʋm kobessi la a nu, la a kii Haran tẽngã pʋga." 
Genesis12:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Abram yaa: «Yi n loog n bas f tẽngã, ne f ba-yirã, la f buudã n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn na n wilg foomã." 
Genesis12:2 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg buud wʋsg ba, la m na n ning-f-la barka. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yʋʋrã yi, la m kɩt tɩ fo yɩ bark sore." 
Genesis12:3 Neb nins sẽn na n ning foom barka, mam na n ning-b-la barka. Ned ning sẽn na n kãab-a foom wẽnga, mam na n kãaba a soab wẽnga. Fo zug maasem yĩnga, dũniyã nebã buud fãa na n paama barka.»" 
Genesis12:4 A Abram yiime n loog wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. La a Lot tũu yẽnda n looge. 
Genesis12:5 A Abram sẽn wa n yit Haran wã t'a rag n tara yʋʋm pis-yopoe la a nu. A Abram peega a pag a Sarayi ne a yao a Haran biig a Lote, la b wʋka b paoongã fãa, la b peeg neb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n paam Haran tẽngã. Bãmb yiime n na n kẽng Kana tẽngã. La bãmb tõog n taa Kana soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis12:6 A Abram pɩʋʋga tẽngã hal n tɩ ta Moore terebẽnt tɩɩsã sẽn be Sɩkɛmã. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Kana nebã n dag n be soolem-kãng pʋga. 
Genesis12:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b meng ne a Abram n yeele: «Mam na n kõo fo yagensã tẽn-kãngã tɩ b sooge.» La a Abram mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn puk b meng ne yẽnda wã yĩnga." 
Genesis12:8 La yẽnda yika beenẽ n viig a fu-roogã, n kẽng tãmsã sẽn be Betɛll tẽngã yaanga. Yẽnda tɩ tilga a fu-roogã Betɛll ne Ayi sʋka, tɩ Betɛll be nin-taoor tɩ Ayi be yaanga. A Abram mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n pʋʋs ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre." 
Genesis12:9 A Abram leb n yii beenẽ n tees Negɛɛv sẽnẽ, n kẽnd la a yalsd zĩig-zĩiga." 
Genesis12:10 Kom n wa n kẽ tẽngã, la a Abram yi n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda sãand Ezɩpt tẽnga. Bala, komã rag n namsda tẽngã wʋsgo." 
Genesis12:11 La bãmb sẽn wa n kolg Ezɩpt tẽngã, a Abram yeela a pag a Sarayi yaa: «Ade, mam miime tɩ fo yaa pʋg-neer wʋsgo." 
Genesis12:12 Rẽ wã, Ezɩpt tẽng nebã sã n yãnd foom, b na n yeelame: ‹Yaa yẽnda paga.› La b na n kʋʋ maam la b bas foom." 
Genesis12:13 Mam kota foom tɩ f yeel tɩ fo yaa mam tão, tɩ b reeg-m neere, tɩ fo maasem yĩng bɩ m paam n põse.»" 
Genesis12:14 La a Abram sẽn ta Ezɩpt tẽngã, Ezɩpt tẽngã neb yãame tɩ pagã sɩd yaa neer hal wʋsgo." 
Genesis12:15 La rĩm a Faarõ kug-zĩidbã sẽn yãnd pagã, b kẽng n tɩ pẽga pagã rĩm a Faarõ taoore. La b peega a Sarayi n wa rĩmã yiri." 
Genesis12:16 La b gesa a Abram yell neere, a Sarayi zug maasem yĩnga. Dẽ, bãmb kõo a Abram rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛda. Bõense, ne yem-daoodo, la yem-pogse, ne bõn-yãanse la yʋgma." 
Genesis12:17 La a Abram pag a Sarayi poorẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga a Faarõ ne a yirã rãmb fãa ne to-kãsemse." 
Genesis12:18 Dẽ, rĩm a Faarõ boola a Abram n yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo maan maam a woto? Bõe yĩng tɩ fo ka togs maam tɩ pagã yaa fo paga?" 
Genesis12:19 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo yeel tɩ yẽnda yaa fo tão. Fo sẽn maana kɩtame tɩ mam dɩk-a n na n maan m paga. Moasã, ad f pagã, peeg-a n yi n looge!»" 
Genesis12:20 A Faarõ kõo nebã noor tɩ b bas a Abram t'a loog ne a pagã, ne a sẽn so bũmb ninsã fãa." 
Genesis13:1 A Abram yii Ezɩpt tẽngã ne a pagã, la ne bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn so wã, n lebg n leb Negɛɛve sẽnẽ, la a Lot dag n tũuda yẽnda." 
Genesis13:2 A Abram rag n yaa arzɛg-kẽeng soaba. A rag n tara rũms ne wanzuri la sãnem wʋsgo. 
Genesis13:3 Yẽnda yii Negɛɛv n kẽnd la a yalsd zĩig-zĩiga, hal n tɩ ta Betɛlle. Beenẽ yaa zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn dag n tilg a fu-roogã sɩngrẽ wã. Yaa Betɛll ne Ayi tẽngã sʋka," 
Genesis13:4 zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn dag me tẽn-kugr sɩngrẽ wã. La a Abram pʋʋsa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr beenẽ. 
Genesis13:5 A Lot sẽn dag n tũud a Abramã me rag n tara rũm-bãoonego, la rũm-bɛd ne fu-rot me." 
Genesis13:6 Tẽngã rag n yaa bilf n ka sekd bãmb b yiibã ye. Bala, bãmb b yiibã arzegsã rag n yaa wʋsg tɩ b ka leb n tõe n zĩnd ne taab ye." 
Genesis13:7 La a Abram rũm-kɩɩmbã ne a Lot rũm-kɩɩmbã rag n zabda taaba. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Kana nebã ne Ferɛɛz-rãmbã n dag n be soolem-kãng pʋga. 
Genesis13:8 A Abram yeela a Lot yaa: «Mam kotame tɩ zabr da zĩnd maam ne foom sʋka, wall fo rũm-kɩɩmbã ne mam rũm-kɩɩmbã sʋk ye. Bala, tõnd yaa rogem." 
Genesis13:9 Ade, tẽngã fãa la fo sẽn ne wã. Bɩ f welg n bas maam. Fo sã n dabd goabga, mam na n kẽnga rɩtgo, la fo sã n dabd rɩtgo, mam na n kẽnga goabga.»" 
Genesis13:10 Dẽ, a Lot zẽk n gesa Zʋrdẽ kunkubã fãa sẽnẽ zĩisã sẽn paam zãgsg sõama wã. La yaa sẽn deng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n nan ka sãam Sodom ne Gomoorã, la a rag wẽnda wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽed zĩiga, wa Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn yaa to-to wã, n tall n tɩ tãag Sowaar tẽngã." 
Genesis13:11 La a Lot yãka Zʋrdẽ kunkubã zĩisã fãa, la a loogame n kẽng yaangã sẽnẽ. Rẽ, yɩɩ woto tɩ bãmb welg n bas taaba." 
Genesis13:12 A Abram paa Kana tẽnga, la a Lot tɩ zĩnda tẽms nins sẽn be kunkubẽ wã, la a tɩ tilga a fu-rotã Sodom tẽnga." 
Genesis13:13 Sodom tẽngã neb rag n yaa nin-wẽns meng-menga, la b maanda yel-wẽn n beegd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Genesis13:14 A Lot sẽn welg n bas a Abramã poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Abram yaa: «Ade, pa zĩig ning fo sẽn be wã n zẽk f neng n ges goabg la rɩtgo, la f ges yaang la taoore." 
Genesis13:15 Bala, mam na n dɩka soolem ning fo sẽn ne wã, n kõ foom ne f yagensã tɩ y soog wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Genesis13:16 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã yɩ wʋsg wa tẽng tom. Ned sã n tõog n sõd tẽngã tomã sõore, a na n tõog n sõda fo yagensã me sõore." 
Genesis13:17 Yik n gilg tẽngã n ges a woglmã ne a yalmã, bala, mam na n kõ-a-la foom tɩ f sooge.»" 
Genesis13:18 Dẽ, a Abram tilga a fu-rotã Mamre tɩɩsã sẽnẽ, n yegl Ebrõ n kẽ. La a Abram mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Genesis14:1 Sineyaar dĩm a Amrafɛll ne Elazaar dĩm a Arzok wakatã, ne Elam dĩm a Kedorlaomeer la Goyim dĩm a Tideyall wakate," 
Genesis14:2 rĩm-dãmb-bãmb fãa naaga taab n yik zabr ne Sodom dĩm a Beera, la ne Gomoor dĩm a Birsa ne Adma dĩm a Sineyaabe, la Seboyim dĩm a Semebɛɛre, la ne a Sowaar sẽn yaa Bela rĩma." 
Genesis14:3 Bãmb fãa kẽng n tɩ tigma taab Sidim longẽ wã, beenẽ yaa yamsem ko-kãseng zĩiga." 
Genesis14:4 Dĩm a Kedorlaomeer rag n sooga bãmb fãa yʋʋm piig la yiibu, la yʋʋm piig la a tãabã yʋʋmde, b zãgsame." 
Genesis14:5 La yʋʋm piig la a naasã yʋʋmd pʋgẽ, a Kedorlaomeer ne rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn dag n be yẽnda poorẽ wã waa n zab n tõoga Refayim nebã sẽn dag n be Asterot-Karnayimã, ne Zuzim nebã sẽn be Hama wã, la ne Enim-dãmbã sẽn be Kiriyatayim tẽn-nabdrẽ wã." 
Genesis14:6 La b tõoga Hoor-dãmbã sẽn be Seyɩɩr tãmsã sʋkã, hal n tɩ tãag Paarã tɩɩsã sẽn pẽ we-raoogã." 
Genesis14:7 Rẽ poore, bãmb lebgame, la b taa Kadɛɛs b sẽn boond tɩ Eyin-Mispatã, la b zaba ne Amalɛk-rãmbã b soolmã fãa pʋga, la b zaba ne Amoor nebã sẽn be Hatsatsõ-Tamaarã." 
Genesis14:8 Woto, Sodom dĩmã ne Gomoor dĩmã, la Adma rĩmã ne Seboyim rĩmã, la rĩm ning sẽn so Bela sẽn yaa Sowaarã yiime n tak zabr ne bãmb Sidim tãngã long pʋga." 
Genesis14:9 Bãmb zaba ne a Kedorlaomeer sẽn yaa Elam dĩma, la ne Goyim dĩm a Tideyalle, la Sineyaar rĩm a Amrafɛlle, la ne Elasaar dĩm a Arzoke. Yaa rĩm-dãmb a naas sẽn na n zab ne rĩm-dãmb a nu." 
Genesis14:10 Sũud bogd wʋsg n dag n be Sidim longã pʋga, la Sodom dĩmã ne Gomoor dĩma zoeeme n tɩ lʋɩ bog-bãmb pʋse. La neb nins sẽn ket-bã zoeeme n tees tãngã sẽnẽ." 
Genesis14:11 Neb nins sẽn tõog bãmbã wʋka Sodom ne Gomoor nebã paoongã ne b rɩɩbã n tall n looge. 
Genesis14:12 Bãmb yõka a Abram yao wã biig a Lot sẽn dag n be Sodomã, la b wʋk a teedã n tall n looge." 
Genesis14:13 Ned a yembr n zoe n põs n wa togs Ebre ned a Abram yellã sẽn yɩ to-to. A Abram dag n bee Mamre tɩɩsã sʋka. A Mamre yɩɩ Amoor-dãmbã buud neda, n yaa a Ɛskoll ne a Aneer saam-biiga. Bãmb dag n maana kaool ne a Abram." 
Genesis14:14 A Abram sẽn wa n wʋm tɩ b yõka yẽnda biigã, a baoo zab-teed n kõ yẽnda tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn dog yẽnda zakẽ wã, la sẽn yaa gãndaadã, b sõorã yaa neb kobs-tã la piig la a nii. A Abram peega bãmb n babs rĩm-dãmbã hal n tɩ tãag Dan." 
Genesis14:15 A Abram welga a nebã n na n zab ne-b ne yʋngo. La yaa yẽnda ne a tʋmtʋmdbã. La a Abram dãmb tõog-b lame n dig-b hal n tãag Hoba sẽn be Damaas tẽngã nug-goabgã. 
Genesis14:16 A Abram tɩ reega teedã fãa, la a peeg a biig a Lot me ne a paoongã fãa, la ne pagbã la nebã b sẽn dag n yõgã." 
Genesis14:17 A Abram sẽn tõog Kedorlaomeer tẽngã ne rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn be ne bãmbã n lebgdẽ, Sodom rĩma yiime n seg yẽnda Saave tãngã longẽ, longã boondame tɩ rĩm tãng longo." 
Genesis14:18 A Melkisedɛk sẽn yaa Salɛm dĩma kɩtame tɩ b wa ne buri la reezẽ rãam. A Melkisedɛk yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam maan-kʋʋda. 
Genesis14:19 Yẽnda ninga a Abram bark n yeele: «Abram, bɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, sẽn yaa-a yĩngr la tẽng naandã, ning foom a Abram zug barka!" 
Genesis14:20 Bɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩte, tɩ f tõog f bɛɛbã paam pẽgre!» La a Abram yãka bũmbã fãa piig pʋɩɩr n kõ yẽnda." 
Genesis14:21 La Sodom rĩma yeela a Abram yaa: «Kõ maam nebã, la fo soog teedã.»" 
Genesis14:22 La a Abram leoka Sodom rĩmã yaa: «Mam zẽkda m nug n wẽend ne Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yĩngr la tẽng naandã," 
Genesis14:23 tɩ mam ka na n yãk yãmb bũmb baa fɩ ye, baa fu-pĩim mengã, wall neoodr sẽbdg meng ye. Tɩ yãmb da wa n yeel tɩ yaa yãmb maasem yĩng la maam a Abram lebg arzɛk soab ye." 
Genesis14:24 Mam ka rat bũmb baa fɩ ye, sã n ka kom-bɩɩsã sẽn dɩ bũmb ningã, la neb nins sẽn tũ maam n kẽng zabrã pʋɩɩr bala. Yaa a Aneere, a Ɛskolle, ne a Mamre. Bãmb tog n deega b pʋɩɩre.»" 
Genesis15:1 Bõn-kãensã loogr zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Abram vẽnegr pʋgẽ n yeele: «Abram, da zoe rabeem ye! Mam meng n yaa fo gãongo, la fo keoor na n yɩɩ kãseng wʋsgo.»" 
Genesis15:2 La a Abram leokame: «Mam Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n kõo maam bõe? Mam na n loogame n ka paam biig ye. La ned ning sẽn na n yõd n soog-a mam zakã, yaa Damaas rao a Eliyezɛɛr sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã.»" 
Genesis15:3 A Abram leb n yeelame: «Yãmb ka kõ maam biig ye, rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam zakẽ rakõor n na n yõd n soog mam paoongã.»" 
Genesis15:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne yẽnda n yeele: «Ka yẽnda n na n soog fo zakã ye. Na n yɩɩ fo mengã sẽn na n dog biig ningã n na n soog fo zakã.» 
Genesis15:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab peega a Abram n yi yɩng n yeel-a yaa: «Ade, ges sa-gãongã, la f sõd ãdsã n ges fo tõe n bãnga b sõore.» La b paasame n yeele: «Fo yagensã sõor na n yɩ a woto.»" 
Genesis15:6 La a Abram tẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, woto kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab geelg a tẽebã wa tɩrlem." 
Genesis15:7 Bãmb leb n yeela a Abram yaa: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, maam n yiis foom Ʋʋr tẽngã sẽn be Kalde rãmbã soolmẽ wã, n wa kõ foom tẽn-kãngã tɩ f sooge.»" 
Genesis15:8 A Abram leokame: «Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bõe n wilgd tɩ mam na n sooga tẽngã?»" 
Genesis15:9 Bãmb yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yõk nag-sadg sẽn tar yʋʋm a tãabo, la f bao bʋ-yãang sẽn tar yʋʋm a tãabo, ne pe-raoog sẽn tar yʋʋm a tãabo, la f bao walle, ne man-wan-bila n wa kõ maam.»" 
Genesis15:10 Yẽnda baoo rũm-bãmba fãa, n pasg pʋɩ-sʋgse, n dɩk bogr fãa n dɩgl n yegl a to, la yẽnda ka pas bõn-yɩgdɩ wã ye." 
Genesis15:11 La yɩbrend waa n na n dɩɩ nemdã, la a Abram dig-b lame." 
Genesis15:12 Wĩndgã sẽn wa n dat n kẽ, gõe-kãseng yõka a Abram, la zĩigã sẽn lebgd likã, rabeem-kãseng yõka yẽnda." 
Genesis15:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Abram yaa: «Bãng tɩ fo yagensã na n yɩɩ sãamb n zĩnd tẽng sẽn ka bãmb tẽng pʋga. Bãmb na n lebga yembse, la b na n namsa bãmb yʋʋm kobs-naase." 
Genesis15:14 La mam na n bʋʋ soolem ning sẽn na n kẽes-a bãmb yembdã bʋʋdo, la fo yagensã na n yii beenẽ ne paoong wʋsgo." 
Genesis15:15 La sã n yaa ne fo mengã, fo na n saka f saam-dãmb ne bãane, la f na n paama sũ-noog f kʋʋlem wakate, n yaool n ki tɩ b mum-fu." 
Genesis15:16 La zamaan a naas loogr zugẽ, bãmb na n lebg n waa zĩ-kãngã. Bala, Amoor-dãmbã wẽngã maaneg nan ka lebg wʋsg n loog nug ye.»" 
Genesis15:17 Wĩndgã sẽn wa n kẽ, zĩigã lebga lik bida, la zĩig pʋgẽ, wʋng sẽn tar bug-zõos ne bug-witim n pɩʋʋg rũms nins a Abram sẽn dag n pas n dʋʋgã sʋka." 
Genesis15:18 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana kaool ne a Abram n yeele: «Mam kõta fo yagensã tẽn-kãngã tɩ b sooge. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne Ezɩpt kʋɩlgã, n tall n tɩ tãag Efrat kʋɩl-kãsengã." 
Genesis15:19 Tẽn-bãmb yaa Kɛn nebã, ne Keniiz nebã, la Kadmon-rãmbã," 
Genesis15:20 ne Hɛt-rãmbã, ne Ferɛɛz nebã, la Refayim-dãmbã," 
Genesis15:21 la Amoor-dãmbã, ne Kana-rãmbã, la Girgaaz nebã, la Zebuus nebã tẽmse.»" 
Genesis16:1 A Abram pag a Sarayi rag n ka tõog n dog biig n kõ a Abram ye. A Sarayi rag n tara a yem-poak a yembr sẽn yaa Ezɩpt tẽng bi-pugla, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Agaare." 
Genesis16:2 A Sarayi yeela a Abram yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ka kõ maam dogmã yĩnga, m kot-y lame tɩ y kẽ ne mam yem-poakã, tɩ daar ninga a na rog bi-ribl n kõ-ma.» Dẽ, a Abram kelga a Sarayi goamã." 
Genesis16:3 A Abram sẽn zĩnd Kana soolem tɩ yʋʋm piiglẽ, yẽnda pag a Sarayi rɩka a yem-poak a Agaar sẽn yaa Ezɩpt buudã nedã n kõ a sɩd a Abram t'a maan a paga." 
Genesis16:4 A Abram kẽe ne a Agaare, la a rɩka pʋga. La a Agaar sẽn mik tɩ yẽnda tara pʋgã, yẽnda ka leb n nand a zu-soben-poakã ye." 
Genesis16:5 Dẽ, a Sarayi yeela a Abram yaa: «Paoogr ning mam sẽn paamd moasã wã bee yãmb zugu. Yaa mam meng n dɩk m yem-poak n kõ yãmba. La moasã, a sẽn mik t'a tʋtame wã, a ka leb n nand maam ye. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩ yel-kãngã sẽn be yãmb ne maam sʋkã bʋ-kaooda.»" 
Genesis16:6 A Abram leoka a Sarayi yaa: «Fo yem-poakã bee fo nugẽ, maan fo sẽn dat ne-a.» La a Sarayi namsa a Agaar hal wʋsg t'a Agaar zoe n bas-a." 
Genesis16:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yãnda a Agaar ko-bundum zĩig sɛɛg we-raoogã pʋga. Yaa ko-bundum zĩig ning sẽn be Suur sorã noorã. 
Genesis16:8 Malɛɛkã yeela a Agaar yaa: «A Sarayi yem-poak a Agaare, fo yii yɛɛnẽ woto, la fo rabda yɛ?» A Agaar leokame: «Mam zoetame n na n zãag ne m zu-soben-poak a Sarayi.»" 
Genesis16:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela yẽnda: «Lebg n kẽng f zu-soben-poakã nengẽ n tɩ sik f meng a taoore.» 
Genesis16:10 Malɛɛkã leb n yeel-a-lame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã yɩ wʋsgo, la b na yɩɩ wʋsg tɩ ned ka tõe n sõd-b n sɛ ye.»" 
Genesis16:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeel-a lame: «Ade, fo tʋtame! Fo na n doga bi-ribla. La fo na n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Ismayɛlle. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma fo koɛɛgã, f paoogrã pʋga." 
Genesis16:12 Bi-kãng na n yɩɩ wa we-bõanga, yẽnda na n zabda ne nebã fãa, la nebã fãa na n zabda ne yẽnda, La yẽnda na n vɩɩmda toor ne a ba-biisã fãa.»" 
Genesis16:13 A Agaar pʋda Wẽnnaam ning sẽn gom ne yẽndã wã yʋʋr tɩ: Ata-Ɛll-Royi. Sẽn dat n yeele: «Bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ne maam!» Bala, a yeelame: «Mam yãnda bãmb n ket n vɩ.»" 
Genesis16:14 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ b pʋd bulgã yʋʋr tɩ ‹Lakayi-Royi.› Sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹sẽn vɩ-a n ne maamã bulga.› Bulgã bee Kadɛɛs ne Berɛɛd sʋka. 
Genesis16:15 A Agaar roga a Abram bi-ribla. La a Abram pʋda yẽnda biig ninga a Agaar sẽn dogã yʋʋr t'a Ismayɛlle. Sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Wẽnnaam wʋmdame.› 
Genesis16:16 A Agaar sẽn wa n dog a Abram biig a Ismayɛllã, t'a Abram dag n tara yʋʋm pis-nii la a yoobe." 
Genesis17:1 A Abram sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-wɛ la a wɛ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b meng ne yẽnda, n yeel-a yaa: «Mam yaa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Tõe-Fãa! Bɩ f tũ maam ne burkĩndi." 
Genesis17:2 Mam na n maana m kaoolã ne foom, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yagensã fɩɩg n hal wʋsgo.»" 
Genesis17:3 La a Abram lʋɩɩme n fõgen a neng tẽnga. La Wẽnnaam yeela yẽnda yaa: 
Genesis17:4 «Sã n yaa ne maam, ad kaool ning sẽn na n zĩnd foom ne maam sʋkã! Fo na n lebga buud wʋsg ba." 
Genesis17:5 B ka na n leb n bool foom t'a Abram ye. B na n boola foom t'a Abrahaam. Bala, mam kɩtame tɩ fo lebg buud wʋsg ba." 
Genesis17:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo rog hal wʋsgo, la m na n kɩtame tɩ buud wʋsg yi fo pʋgẽ. La rĩm-dãmb na n yii fo pʋgẽ." 
Genesis17:7 Mam na n vigla m kaoolã ne foom, la ne fo yagensã sẽn na n wa pʋgl foom n wa wã, zamaan woo zamaane. Na n yɩɩ kaool sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa. Woto yaa sẽn wilgd tɩ mam na n yɩɩ foom ne f yagensã sẽn na n wa fo loogr zugẽ wã Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis17:8 Mam na n kõo foom ne f yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl foom f loogr zugẽ wã Kana soolmã. Yaa soolem ning fo sẽn yaa sãan a pʋgẽ wã, la mam na n kõ-f tɩ f soog wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga, la mam na n kell n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Genesis17:9 La Wẽnnaam yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Sã n yaa ne foom, kell n tall mam kaoolã, la bɩ foom ne f yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl foom n wa wã sak kaool ninga mam sẽn viglã, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Genesis17:10 Ad yãmb sẽn na n sak kaool ning mam sẽn vigindã to-to. Yaa kaool mam sẽn ning yãmb ne y yagensã ne maam sʋkã: Bi-ribl fãa sẽn be yãmb sʋkã tog n kẽe bãongo. 
Genesis17:11 Bãongã kẽesg na n yɩɩ kaoolã bãnde, maam ne yãmb sʋka." 
Genesis17:12 Zamaan woo zamaan fãa, yãmb bi-ribl sã n wa tar rasem a nii, bɩ y kẽes-a bãongo. La a tog n yɩɩ woto me ne kom-dibli nins fãa sẽn dog fo zakã pʋgã, la ne yembs nins fo sẽn da ne ligd tɩ b yaa sãamb n ka yãmb buudã nebã." 
Genesis17:13 Neb nins fãa sẽn be fo zakã pʋgã, la ne yembs nins fãa fo sẽn da ne ligdã tog n kẽe bãongo. Dẽ, mam kaoolã bãnd na n bee yãmb yĩngã zugu. La a na n yɩɩ kaool sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Genesis17:14 La ned ninga fãa sẽn ka kẽ-a bãongo, b na n yiisa a soabã a buudã sʋka, yẽnda sẽn ka sak mam kaoolã yĩnga.»" 
Genesis17:15 Wẽnnaam leb n yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Ade, fo pag a Sarayi yʋʋr ka na n leb n yɩ a Sarayi yɛs ye. Yẽnda yʋʋr na n lebga a Saara." 
Genesis17:16 Mam na n ninga a Saara barka, n kɩt t'a rog fo bi-ribla. Mam na n ning-a-la bark n kɩt tɩ buud wʋsg yi yẽnda pʋgẽ. Rĩm-dãmb ne buud wʋsg na n yii yẽnda pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis17:17 La a Abrahaam yĩgimdame, n fõgen a neng tẽng n la, bala, yẽnda rag n tagsda a sũurẽ n yetẽ: «Rẽ yĩnga, mam sẽn yaa nin-kẽem sẽn tar yʋʋm koabgã, tõe n leb n doge, bɩ a Saara sẽn tar yʋʋm pis-wɛ wã, n tõe leb n dog biiga?»" 
Genesis17:18 A Abrahaam yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «M sẽn kot yaa t'a Ismayɛll we n vɩɩmd yãmb taoore!» 
Genesis17:19 La Wẽnnaam yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Ka na n yɩ woto ye! Yaa fo pag a Saara n na n dog bi-ribl n kõ-fo, tɩ f pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Izake, sẽn dat n togs t'a ‹laado›, la mam na n vigla m kaoolã ne yẽnda, la yaa wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga. La yaa yẽnda ne a yagensã yĩnga." 
Genesis17:20 La sẽn paas me, mam wʋma fo sẽn kos bũmb ning a Ismayɛll wɛɛngẽ wã. Mam na n ning-a-la barka, n kɩt t'a rog kamba, n fɩɩg n yɩ wʋsgo. Nanams piig la a yiib n na n yi yẽnda pʋgẽ, la mam na n kɩtame t'a Ismayɛll yɩ bu-kãseng ba." 
Genesis17:21 La sẽn kẽed ne mam kaoolã wɛɛngẽ, yaa ne a Izak sẽn yaa bi-ribl ning fo pag a Saara sẽn na n dog vẽer woto wẽndã la m na n vigl-a.»" 
Genesis17:22 Wẽnnaam sẽn gom woto ne a Abrahaam n sɛ, bãmb basa a Abrahaam n looge." 
Genesis17:23 Dẽ poore, a Abrahaam peega a biig a Ismayɛlle, ne yem-daad nins sẽn dog yẽnda zakẽ wã, ne yem-daad nins yẽnda sẽn da ne ligdã, sẽn dat n yeel tɩ raop nins fãa sẽn be yẽnda zakã pʋgẽ wã. La a Abrahaam kẽesa bãmb bãong badaare, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel yẽnda wã." 
Genesis17:24 A Abrahaam sẽn wa n na n kẽ bãongã, rẽ t'a tara yʋʋm pis-wɛ la a wɛ." 
Genesis17:25 A Abrahaam biig a Ismayɛll kẽe bãongã wakat-kãnga, la rẽ t'a Ismayɛll tara yʋʋm piig la a tãabo." 
Genesis17:26 Yaa badaar la a Abrahaam ne a bi-ribl a Ismayɛll kẽ bãongo. 
Genesis17:27 Baa ne yembs nins sẽn dog a Abrahaam zakẽ wã, ne yẽnda sẽn da yembs nins ne ligd sãambã nengẽ wã fãa naaga yẽnda n kẽ bãongo." 
Genesis18:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b meng ne a Abrahaam Mamre tɩɩsã zĩigẽ, wakat ning yẽnda sẽn wa n zĩ a fu-roogã noor tʋʋlg wakatã." 
Genesis18:2 A Abrahaam zẽka a neng n gese, la a yãnda raop a tãab sẽn yas yẽnda neng-taoore. A Abrahaam sẽn yãnd-bã, a yika a fu-roogã noor n wudg n seg-b n wõgemd tẽnga," 
Genesis18:3 n yeele: «Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n nonga maam, mam kot-y lame tɩ y ra loog n ka yals mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã nengẽ ye." 
Genesis18:4 Yaas-y tɩ b tall koom n wa kõ-y tɩ y waas y naoã! La y yals tɩ-kãngã tẽngr n vʋʋse. 
Genesis18:5 Tɩ m kẽng n tɩ tall rɩɩb bilf n wa tɩ y rɩ n paam pãnga. Rẽ poore, y na yaool n dɩk y sor n looge. Woto, yãmb sẽn wa mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã zakẽ wã kõn yɩ zaalem ye.» Bãmb leoka a Abrahaam yaa: «Beneere, bɩ f maan wa fo sẽn yeelã.»" 
Genesis18:6 A Abrahaam wudg n kẽe fu-roogã pʋg n yeel a Saara yaa: «Saara, yik tao-tao n yãk zom-bãaneg wũmbl a tãab n nag n maan maasa.»" 
Genesis18:7 La a Abrahaam bas n wudgame n kẽ a rũmsã sʋka, n yõk nag-bi-poll sẽn yaa sõama n kɩs bi-bɩɩg sẽn yaa yẽnda tʋmtʋmd t'a maneg n segle." 
Genesis18:8 Dẽ, a Abrahaam baoo bĩis-gõeem ne bĩis-naare, la a rɩk nag-bila nemdã sẽn dʋgã n tall n wa tẽgen bãmb taoore. A Abrahaam kell n yalsa yĩngr bãmb sɛɛgẽ tɩɩgã tẽngre, tɩ bãmb dag n dɩtẽ." 
Genesis18:9 Dẽ, bãmb soka a Abrahaam yaa: «Fo pag a Saara bee yɛɛnẽ?» T'a leok t'a Saara bee fu-roogã pʋga." 
Genesis18:10 La raop a tãabã ned a yembr yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Ade, vẽer woto wẽnde, mam na n lebg n waa fo nengẽ, la rẽ tɩ fo pag a Saara roga bi-ribla.» Wakat-kãng t'a Saara rag n bee bãmb poorẽ, fu-roogã noor n yas n kelgdẽ." 
Genesis18:11 A Abrahaam ne a Saara rag n kʋʋlame, la b yʋʋmã rag n yaa wʋsgo. La a Saara rag n ka leb n yaa pag sẽn yãt a pekr ye." 
Genesis18:12 Woto, a Saara la a sũurẽ n yeele: «Maam la sẽn lebg pʋg-yãan-kʋdrã la! Mam leb n tara bõe ratem? Mam soaalã me la sẽn lebg nin-kẽema la!»" 
Genesis18:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Bõe yĩng t'a Saara la, n yetẽ tɩ yẽnda yaa pʋg-yãang n ka leb n tõe n dog biiga?" 
Genesis18:14 Rẽ yĩnga, bũmb bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ka tõe n maan sɩda? Vẽer woto wẽnde, mam na n lebg n waa fo nengẽ, la rẽ t'a Saara paama bi-ribla.»" 
Genesis18:15 La a Saara sẽn yɛɛsa yĩnga, a yaga zĩrẽ tɩ yẽnda ka la ye. La bãmb yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fo laame sẽ!»" 
Genesis18:16 Raop a tãabã yikame n na n looge, la b rag n geta Sodom tẽngã sẽnẽ. A Abrahaam yãaga bãmb n na n pʋʋs-b wẽnd-na-taase." 
Genesis18:17 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam na n solga a Abrahaam bũmb ning mam sẽn dat n maanã sɩda?" 
Genesis18:18 A Abrahaam na n lebga bu-kãseng sẽn tar pãnga. Yẽnda zug maasem yĩnga, mam na n ninga dũniyã nebã fãa barka." 
Genesis18:19 Bala, mam yãka yẽnda t'a wilg a kambã ne a yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl yẽnda n wa wã, tɩ b tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sore, la b maan sẽn yaa tɩrga la sẽn zemse. Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n pidsa bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dag n gom a Abrahaam wɛɛngẽ wã n kõ-a.»" 
Genesis18:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «B sẽn gomd Sodom ne Gomoor tʋʋm-beedã yellã yaa wʋsgo, la b yel-wẽnã yaa wẽng wʋsgo." 
Genesis18:21 Dẽ, mam na n sigame n ges bãmb sã n sɩd maanda wa b sẽn gomd tɩ mam wʋmdẽ wã. La mam na n bãnga sã n yaa sɩda wall ka sɩda.»" 
Genesis18:22 Raopã wẽnemdame n na n kẽng Sodom. La a Abrahaam kell n paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. 
Genesis18:23 Dẽ, a Abrahaam kolgame n sok yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb na n naaga nin-tɩrsã ne nin-wẽnsã n sãam bɩ?" 
Genesis18:24 Tõeeme tɩ nin-tɩrs pis-nu bee tẽngã pʋga. Dẽ, yãmb na n sãama bãmb me n ka kõ tẽn-kãng sugr nin-tɩrs pis-nu wã sẽn be beenẽ wã yĩng sɩda?" 
Genesis18:25 Tɩ naag nin-tɩrs ne nin-wẽns n kʋ? Yell a woto buud maaneg zãra ne yãmba. Yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ nin-tɩrs paam sɩbgr ning nin-wẽnsã sẽn na n paamã sɩda? Yel-kãng buud maaneg zãra ne yãmba. Yãmb sẽn yaa dũniyã fãa bʋ-kaoodã, yãmb na n maana a wãn n kao bʋʋdã kegre.»" 
Genesis18:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam sã n yãnd nin-tɩrs pis-nu sẽn be Sodom tẽngã pʋga, mam na n kõo tẽn-kãng nebã sugr neb pis-nu wã maasem yĩnga.»" 
Genesis18:27 A Abrahaam leb n yeelame: «Mam leb n maanda raood n na n gom ne Zu-soabã. Mam yaool n yaa tẽng tom, la tompeglem bala." 
Genesis18:28 La nin-tɩrs pis-nu sã n ka beẽ, tɩ yaa nin-tɩrs pis-naas la a nu n be, neb a nu wã sẽn paoogã yĩnga, yãmb na n baas n sãama tẽngã?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam sã n yãnd nin-tɩrs pis-naas la a nu beenẽ, mam ka na n sãam tẽngã ye.»" 
Genesis18:29 A Abrahaam kell n kẽnga taoor n gom n yeele: «La daar ninga, tõeeme tɩ nin-tɩrs pis-naas beeme.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Nin-tɩrs pis-naas sã n be, mam kõn maan tẽngã bũmb ye.»" 
Genesis18:30 A Abrahaam yeelame yaa: «Mam Zu-soaba, m kot-y lame tɩ y ra yik y sũur ye, tɩ m leb n gom ne-yã. La sã n mikame tɩ nin-tɩrs pis-tã n be beenẽ.» La Zu-soabã yeelame: «Mam sã n yãnd nin-tɩrs pis-tã beenẽ, mam kõn maan tẽngã bũmb ye.»" 
Genesis18:31 La a Abrahaam yeelame yɛsa: «Mam maana raood n gom ne m Zu-soabã. La tõeeme tɩ nin-tɩrs pisi bee beenẽ.» La Zu-soabã yeelame: «Nin-tɩrs pisi sã n be beenẽ, bãmb maasem yĩnga, mam ka na n sãam tẽngã ye.»" 
Genesis18:32 A Abrahaam leb n yeelame: «Mam Zu-soaba, ra yik-y y sũur ye. Mam sã n gom woto n paase, mam ka na n leb n gom ye. Tõeeme tɩ b tõe n yãnda nin-tɩrs piig beenẽ.» La Zu-soabã yeelame: «Nin-tɩrs piig sã n be beenẽ, bãmb maasem yĩnga, mam ka na n sãam tẽngã ye.»" 
Genesis18:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom a woto ne a Abrahaam n sɛ, b loogame. La a Abrahaam lebg n kuila a yiri." 
Genesis19:1 Malɛgs a yiibã taa Sodom tẽngã wĩndgã kõom wakate. La a Lot dag n zĩi Sodom tẽngã noore. A Lot sẽn yãnd-bã, a yikame n kẽng n na n seg-ba, la a wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
Genesis19:2 A Lot yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam zu-soben-dãmba, mam kot-y lame tɩ y wa sig y tʋmtʋmdã zakẽ n gãand yʋngã, la y waas y naoã, n yaool n sãd beoog n looge.» La raopã zãgsame n yeel tɩ bãmb na n tɩ gãanda zĩ-vɩʋʋgẽ wã." 
Genesis19:3 La a Lot pẽdga bãmb hal wʋsgo, tɩ b kong n wẽnemd n tũ yẽnda n na n kuil a yirã. A Lot maana tigr bãmb yĩnga, n maan bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩll n kõ bãmba, la b rɩɩme." 
Genesis19:4 Wakat ning bãmb sẽn dag n nan ka kẽ gãagã, Sodom tẽngã nebã fãa gilli, sẽn sɩng ne b kom-bɩɩs tɩ tãag b nin-kẽembã wa n gũbga roog ning bãmb sẽn be wã." 
Genesis19:5 Bãmb tool n boola a Lot n yeel yaa: «Raop nins sẽn wa n sig fo zakẽ wã yʋngẽ wã bee yɛɛnẽ? Yiis-b n kõ tõnd tɩ d gãand-ba.» 
Genesis19:6 A Lot yii n bʋʋga bãmb roogã noore, la a lebs kʋɩlengã n page." 
Genesis19:7 A Lot yeelame: «M saam-biisi, mam kot-y lame tɩ y ra maan yel-beedã ye!" 
Genesis19:8 Ade, mam tara kom-pugli a yiib sẽn nan ka bãng rao ye, mam na n yiisa bãmb n kõ-yã, tɩ y maan bãmb wa y sẽn date. La bũmb sẽn be bala, ra maan-y rao-bãmbã bũmb ye. Bala, bãmb wa n siga mam zakẽ.»" 
Genesis19:9 Tẽngã nebã yeela a Lot yaa: «Kẽng n yi beenẽ.» La b leb n yeele: «Nin-kãngã waa kaanẽ a yembre, n yaa sãana, n wa rat n wilg tõnd sẽn segde. Beneere, sã n yaa woto, tõnd sẽn na n maan foom bũmb ningã wẽng na n yɩɩga nin-bãmbã rẽndã.» Dẽ, bãmb tusa a Lot ne pãng n na n kolg n sãam kʋɩlengã." 
Genesis19:10 Woto, Malɛgsã tʋma b nus yɩng n tak a Lot n kẽes roogã pʋg n naag b menga, la b lebs kʋɩlengã n page." 
Genesis19:11 Malɛgsã lobga neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be roogã noor yɩngã zondo, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem tɩ ta yao-zʋʋga. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ bãmb babl n nams n ka leb n ne roogã noor sẽn beẽ ye." 
Genesis19:12 Raopã soka a Lot yaa: «Fo tara neb a taab sẽn be ka bɩ? Peeg f reem-dãmbã, f kom-dibli wã ne f kom-pugli wã, la f wʋk fo sẽn so bũmb ninsã fãa tɩ be tẽngã pʋgã n yi ka n looge." 
Genesis19:13 Bala, tõnd na n sãama tẽngã. Tẽn-kãngã nebã tʋʋm-beedã yell goam yaa wʋsg n zẽk n ta Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma tõnd tɩ d wa sãam tẽngã.»" 
Genesis19:14 La a Lot yiime n na n gom ne a reem-dãmbã sẽn yaa yẽnda kom-pugli wã sɩdbã n yeel-b yaa: «Yik-y n yi-y n bas-y zĩ-kãngã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sãama tẽngã.» La yẽnda reem-dãmbã geelga a Lot goamã wa kʋʋsem goamã." 
Genesis19:15 La beoogã sẽn wa n kolg vẽegre, malɛgsã pẽdga a Lot n yeel-a yaa: «Yik n peeg f pagã ne f kom-pugli a yiibã sẽn be ka ne foomã n zoe, tɩ tẽngã kongr sɩbgr da wa rɩ foom ye.»" 
Genesis19:16 La a Lot dag n ka maand tao-tao ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n dat n fãag bãmbã yĩnga, b gãda a Lot nugã, la b gãd a pagã ne a kom-pugli a yiibã nusi, n tɛ-b n yiis tẽngã." 
Genesis19:17 Bãmb sẽn tall-b n yiis tẽngã n sɛ, raopã ned a yembr yeela a Lot yaa: «Zoe n paam n fãag f yõore. Ra wẽnemd n ges f poorẽ ye, la f ra yals soolem-kãngã zĩig baa a yembr pʋg ye! Zoe n kẽng tãmsã sẽnẽ n da wa ki ye.»" 
Genesis19:18 La a Lot yeela bãmb yaa: «Ayo! M Zu-soaba! Maan-y sugri! 
Genesis19:19 Y kabre, Zu-soaba! Yãmb maana mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã neere, la yãmb leb n zoee mam nimbãaneg wʋsg n fãag mam vɩɩmã. Ad-y mam ka tõe n zoe n ta tãmsã n paam n põs tɩ sɩbgrã ka paam maam n kʋ ye." 
Genesis19:20 Yãmb nee tẽngã sẽn be yambã wã? Mam kotame n na n zoe n ta beenẽ, yaa tẽn-bil bala. Bas-y tɩ m zoe n ta beenẽ n põse.»" 
Genesis19:21 Dẽ, malɛɛkã yeela a Lot yaa: «Beneere, m sakame, fo yĩnga, mam na n basa tẽng ning fo sẽn gom a yellã n ka sãam-a ye." 
Genesis19:22 Haya! Zoe n ta beenẽ n põse, bala, mam ka tõe n maan bũmbu, sã n ka tɩ fo tõog n zoe n taa beenẽ.» Yaa rẽndã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b pʋd tẽn-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Sowaare." 
Genesis19:23 A Lot sẽn wa n na n ta Sowaar tẽngã, rẽ tɩ sõorã pukdame." 
Genesis19:24 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ kidbr ne bugum yi saasẽ n ni wa saag Sodom tẽngã ne Gomoor tẽngã zugu. Bõn-kãng yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ." 
Genesis19:25 Bãmb sãama tẽn-bãmb b yiibã, ne b kunkubã, la b tẽngã nebã fãa, la ne bõn-bɩtsã sẽn yi tẽn-gãongã zugã zãnga." 
Genesis19:26 La a Lot pagã wẽnegame n ges a poorẽ, la a lebga yams-kugri." 
Genesis19:27 A Abrahaam sãda beoog n kẽng zĩig ninga yẽnda sẽn dag n yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã. 
Genesis19:28 A Abrahaam zẽka a neng n ges Sodom ne Gomoor tẽngã sẽnẽ, ne tẽngã kunkuba fãa, la yẽnda yãnda bug-zõos sẽn nukd wa wʋng bug-zõose." 
Genesis19:29 Wakat ning Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n na n sãam tẽms nins sẽn be kunkubã zutã, bãmb tẽega a Abrahaam yelle, la b yiisa a Lot t'a põs sãoongã, wakat ning bãmb sẽn wa n na n sãam tẽms nins a Lot sẽn dag n beẽ wã." 
Genesis19:30 A Lot yii Sowaar tẽngã n tall a kom-pugli a yiibã n kẽng tãmsã sẽnẽ, bala, yẽnda rag n zoeta rabeem n ka rat n zĩnd Sowaar tẽngã ye. Bãmb kẽng n tɩ kẽe tãng bokẽ." 
Genesis19:31 La bi-pugl-kãsmã yeela a yao-bi-puglã yaa: «Tõnd baaba wã kʋʋlame, tɩ raop me yaool n ka be tẽn-kãngã n na n bao tõnd wa sẽn zems ninsaalb miningã ye." 
Genesis19:32 Dẽ wã, wa tɩ d yũnug d ba wã rãam n paam n kẽ ne-a, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n kɩt tɩ d baaba wã paam yagense.»" 
Genesis19:33 La badaar yʋngo, bãmb yũnuga b ba wã rãam, la bi-pugl-kãsmã kẽng n tɩ gãanda ne a ba wã, la a ba wã ka bãng a gãandgo, wall a yikr wakat ye." 
Genesis19:34 La vẽkembeoogo, bi-pugl-kãsmã yeela a yao-bi-puglã yaa: «Yʋngẽ, mam kẽe ne m baaba. Wa tɩ d leb n yũnug-b rãam yʋngã tɩ fo kẽng n tɩ kẽ ne-ba, sẽn na yɩl tɩ d ba wã paam yagense.»" 
Genesis19:35 Badaar yʋngo, bãmb leb n yũnuga b ba wã rãam, la yao-bi-puglã kẽe n gãanda ne a ba wã. La a ba wã ka bãng wakat ning yẽnda sẽn gãande, la a sẽn yik wakat ning ye." 
Genesis19:36 Woto, a Lot kom-pugli a yiibã fãa rɩka b ba wã pʋse." 
Genesis19:37 Bi-pugl-kãsmã roga bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Moaabe. Yaa yẽnda n yaa Moaab buudã sẽn be rũndã wã yaaba." 
Genesis19:38 Yao-bi-puglã me roga bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Bɛn-Ami. Yaa yẽnda n yaa Amo-rãmbã sẽn be rũndã wã yaaba." 
Genesis20:1 A Abrahaam yii beenẽ n kẽng Negɛɛve. La yẽnda zĩnda Kadɛɛs ne Sʋʋr sʋka. La a leb n zĩnda Geraare. 
Genesis20:2 A Abrahaam dag n yetame t'a pag a Saara yaa yẽnda tão. Geraar naab a Abimelɛk kɩtame tɩ b tɩ peeg a Saara n wa. 
Genesis20:3 La Wẽnnaam waa a Abimelɛk nengẽ yʋng zãmsd pʋg n yeel-a yaa: «Fo na n kii pag ning fo sẽn peegã poorẽ. Bala, yẽnda tara sɩda.»" 
Genesis20:4 La rẽ t'a Abimelɛk dag n nan ka kẽ ne a Saara ye. Dẽ, yẽnda sokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, yãmb na n sak n sãama maam ne m tẽnga, baa mam sã n tar bʋʋm?" 
Genesis20:5 Ka yẽnda meng n yeel maam tɩ yaa yẽnda tão la? Tɩ pagã me yeel maam tɩ yaa yẽnda kẽem la? Dẽ, mam sẽn maan yel-kãngã wã yaa ne pʋ-peelem, la m ka beeg ye.»" 
Genesis20:6 Wẽnnaam leoka yẽnda zãmsdã pʋg n yeele: «Mam miime tɩ yel-kãngã pʋgẽ, fo bee f pʋ-peelem zugu. Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam mengã gɩdg foom tɩ f ra wa beeg maam ye. Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ mam ka bas tɩ fo sɩɩs pagã ye." 
Genesis20:7 Moasã, lebs raoã a pagã, bala, a yaa no-rɛɛsa, la a na n pʋʋsa fo yĩnga tɩ f ra ki ye. La fo sã n ka lebs pagã, bɩ f bãng tɩ foom ne f sẽn so-b rãmbã fãa na n kiime.»" 
Genesis20:8 A Abimelɛk yika yibeoog pĩnda n bool a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa n togs-b bõn-kãens fãa. La rabeem kãseng yõka bãmba. 
Genesis20:9 Dẽ, a Abimelɛk boola a Abrahaam me n yeel-a yaa: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maan tõnd woto wã? Mam beega foom ne bõe, tɩ fo na n kɩt tɩ mam soolmã ne mam mengã na n maan yel-wẽn-kẽen-kãngã? Fo maana maam bũmb ned sẽn ka segd n maan a to ye.»" 
Genesis20:10 La a Abimelɛk yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Fo tagsa a wãn-wãn n wa maand yel-kãngã?» 
Genesis20:11 A Abrahaam leokame: «Mam tagsame tɩ zĩ-kãngã nebã ka zoet Wẽnnaam ye, la b tõe n kʋʋ maam m pagã yĩnga." 
Genesis20:12 La sẽn paasd yõwã, yaa sɩd tɩ yẽnda yaa mam tão. Bala, yẽnda yaa mam ba-biiga, la yẽnda ka mam ma-biig ye, la yẽnda lebga mam paga." 
Genesis20:13 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yi n bas m tẽngã n gilgdẽ wã, mam yeela a Saara yaa: Mam kota foom tɩ f sak n maan mam sẽn na n yeel foom bũmb ningã, tɩ tõnd sẽn na n kẽng zĩig ning fãa, bɩ f yeel tɩ mam yaa fo tão.»" 
Genesis20:14 A Abimelɛk yãka rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛda, la a bao yem-daad ne yem-pogse, n kõ a Abrahaam. La a rɩk a pag a Saara me n lebs-a." 
Genesis20:15 A Abimelɛk yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Ade, foom la sẽn ne mam soolmã zãng la. Kẽng n bao zĩig ning sẽn noom foom n zĩndi.»" 
Genesis20:16 A Abimelɛk yeela a Saara yaa: «Ade, mam kõta f kẽema wanzuri wakɩ-koeems tusri, sẽn na n wilg neb nins sẽn be ne foomã, tɩ fo ka maan yell ye.»" 
Genesis20:17 La a Abrahaam pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam a Abimelɛk yĩnga, la Wẽnnaam maaga yẽnda ne a pagã, la a yem-pogsã n kõ-b rogem." 
Genesis20:18 Bala, Wẽnnaam dag n kɩtame t'a Abimelɛk zakã pagb fãa lebg kiyã, a Abrahaam pag a Saara yĩnga." 
Genesis21:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega a Saara yell wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana wa bãmb sẽn dag n goma." 
Genesis21:2 A Saara rɩka pʋg n dog a Abrahaam bi-ribl a kʋʋlem wakate, wa sẽn zems wakat ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n togs yẽnda wã." 
Genesis21:3 La a Abrahaam pʋda yẽnda bi-ribl ning a Saara sẽn dogã yʋʋr t'a Izake, sẽn dat n togs t'a ‹Laado.›" 
Genesis21:4 A Abrahaam bi-ribl a Izak sẽn wa n tar rasem a nii, a kẽes-a-la bãongo, wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda t'a maanã." 
Genesis21:5 A Abrahaam dag n tara yʋʋm koabga, yẽnda biig a Izak rogmã wakate." 
Genesis21:6 Dẽ, a Saara yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kõo maam laado. Ned ning fãa sẽn na n wʋm-a yel-kãngã, na n pusga laad mam wɛɛngẽ!»" 
Genesis21:7 A Saara leb n yeelame: «Ãnda n dag n na n yeel a Abrahaam t'a Saara na n yẽsma kamba? La baoosgo, mam doga a Abrahaam bi-ribl a kʋʋlem wakate.»" 
Genesis21:8 Biigã bɩɩme, la a b yãk-a-la bĩisim. La b sẽn yãk a Izak bĩismã daare, a Abrahaam maana tig-kãsenga." 
Genesis21:9 A Saara yãnda a Abrahaam biig ning Ezɩpt tẽng bi-pugl a Agaar sẽn dogã sẽn laade. 
Genesis21:10 La a Saara yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Rig-y yem-poakã ne a biigã tɩ b looge, bala, yem-pog-kãngã biigã ka na n naag mam biig a Izak n paam dogem pʋɩɩr ye.»" 
Genesis21:11 Gom-kãngã ka tol n yɩ a Abrahaam noog ye, a Ismayɛll me sẽn yaa yẽnda bi-ribla yĩnga." 
Genesis21:12 La Wẽnnaam yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Da maan sũ-sãang f bi-riblã ne f yem-poakã yĩng ye. Maan bũmb nins fãa a Saara sẽn kot foomã n kõ-a. Bala, na n yɩɩ ne a Izak la fo na n paam yagens sẽn na n tar fo yʋʋrã." 
Genesis21:13 Mam na n kɩtame me, tɩ fo yem-poakã biig yɩ bu-kãsenga, bala, yẽnda me yaa fo biiga.»" 
Genesis21:14 A Abrahaam yika yibeoog pĩnda, n bao rɩɩbo, la a sui koom ne waooga n kõ a Agaar t'a palg a bãoko. La a rɩk biigã me n kõ-a, la a rig-a t'a looge. A Agaar loogame n menem n kẽ Bɛɛr-Seba weoogã n gõodẽ." 
Genesis21:15 La Ko-waoogã koom wa n sɛɛme, dẽ, a Agaar rɩka biigã n gãneg tuug tẽngr maasmẽ," 
Genesis21:16 la a bas n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd yɩɩg sẽn zems tãp pĩim tãoobo. Bala, yẽnda rag n yetame: «Mam ka rat n get m biigã t'a kiidẽ ye!» Woto, a Agaar zĩndame n tees n get biigã, la a yãbd n wiisdẽ." 
Genesis21:17 Wẽnnaam wʋma bi-riblã koɛɛga. La Wẽnnaam malɛɛk zĩnda yĩngr n bool a Agaar n yeel-a yaa: «Agaare, yaa bõe n tar foom? Da zoe rabeem ye, tɩ bala, Wẽnnaam wʋma bi-riblã koɛɛgã a sẽn beẽ wã." 
Genesis21:18 Yik n dɩk biigã, la f gãd a nugã tɩ mam na n kɩtame t'a yɩ bu-kãsenga.»" 
Genesis21:19 Wẽnnaam puka a Agaar ninã t'a yãnd bulg sẽn tar koom, la a kẽng n tɩ pidsa a ko-waoogã n kõ a biigã t'a yũ." 
Genesis21:20 La Wẽnnaam dag n bee ne biigã, la a bɩɩme, n zĩnd weoogã pʋg n lebg tãb-tãood sẽn mi tãp tãoob sõama." 
Genesis21:21 A Ismayɛll zĩnda Paarã weoogã pʋga, la a ma wã baoo Ezɩpt tẽng bi-pugl n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
Genesis21:22 Wakat-kãnga, a Abimelɛk tãb-biisã naab a Pikoll tũu yẽnda tɩ b wa a Abrahaam nengẽ, n yeel a Abrahaam yaa: «Wẽnnaam bee ne foom f tʋʋma fãa pʋse." 
Genesis21:23 Dẽ wã, bɩ f wẽen ne Wẽnnaam yʋʋre, tɩ f ka na n zãmb maam bɩ m kambã, wall mam yagensã ye. La tɩ fo na n maana maam ne soolem ning fo sẽn yaa sãan a pʋgẽ wã neere, wa mam sẽn maan foom neerã.»" 
Genesis21:24 A Abrahaam yeelame: «Mam na n wẽena woto.» 
Genesis21:25 La a Abrahaam yẽgma ne a Abimelɛk bulg ninga a Abimelɛk tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yõk n deeg ne pãngã poorẽ. 
Genesis21:26 La a Abimelɛk yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Mam ka mi sẽn yaa ned ning n maan yel-kãng ye. Fo ka togs maam bõn-kãng ye, la sã n ka rũndã, mam dag n ka bãng ye.»" 
Genesis21:27 Woto, a Abrahaam yãka rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd n kõ a Abimelɛke, la bãmb maana kaool bãmb b yiibã ne taab sʋka." 
Genesis21:28 A Abrahaam yãka pe-yãans a yopoe piisã sʋk n welg toore. 
Genesis21:29 La a Abimelɛk yeela a Abrahaam yaa: «Fo sẽn yãk pe-bi-bãmba b yopoe wã n welg toorã yaa bõe yĩnga?» 
Genesis21:30 A Abrahaam leokame: «Mam datame tɩ yãmb sak n deeg pe-bãmba b yopoe wã tɩ yɩ kaset tɩ yaa maam n tu bul-kãngã!» 
Genesis21:31 Yaa woto n kɩte, tɩ b boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Bɛɛr-Seba. Bala yaa beenẽ la bãmb b yiibã wẽen ne taaba." 
Genesis21:32 Dẽ, bãmb maana kaool ne taab Bɛɛr-Seba. Rẽ poore, a Abimelɛk yika ne a tãb-biisã naab a Pikoll tɩ b lebg n leb Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ." 
Genesis21:33 A Abrahaam sela tɩɩg sẽn boond tɩ Tamariis beenẽ, la a pʋʋs ne Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre." 
Genesis21:34 A Abrahaam zĩnda sãand Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ n kaoos wʋsgo. 
Genesis22:1 Bõn-kãensã fãa loogr zugẽ, Wẽnnaam maka a Abrahaam n yeele: «Abrahaam!» T'a sak tɩ naaba." 
Genesis22:2 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ade, rɩk f biigã, fo bi-ribl-yendã, a Izak fo sẽn nongã, n kẽng Moriiza, la f sã n ta beenẽ, bɩ f rɩk-a n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tãng ning mam sẽn na n wilg foomã zugu.»" 
Genesis22:3 A Abrahaam sãda beoog n ning a bõang yolgo, la a peeg a tʋmtʋmdb a yiib sẽn yaa kom-bɩɩse, la a peeg a Izake. La a wesa raad maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga, n dɩk sor n dabd zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n wilg yẽnda wã." 
Genesis22:4 La rasem a tãabã daare, a Abrahaam zẽka a neng n gese, la a yãnda zĩigã sẽn tond hal yɩɩga." 
Genesis22:5 Dẽ, a Abrahaam yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Bɩ Yãmb pa ka ne bõangã, tɩ maam ne bi-bɩɩgã na n kẽnga tãngã zug n tɩ pʋʋs Wẽnnaam la d lebg n wa paam yãmba.»" 
Genesis22:6 A Abrahaam rɩka maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã raadã n tʋk a biig a Izake, la a rɩk bugmã ne sʋʋgã n zãad a nugẽ. Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã rag n tũuda taab n kẽnda." 
Genesis22:7 La a Izak yeela a ba a Abrahaam yaa: «M baaba!» T'a Abrahaam sak tɩ m biiga yaa a wãna. T'a Izak yeele: «Bugmã yẽ la woto wɛ, raadã me la woto, la pesgã sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Genesis22:8 A Abrahaam leoka a Izak n yeele: «M biiga, Wẽnnaam meng n na n ges tɩ peosg sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã wa.» La bãmb b yiibã rag n kell n tũuda taab n kẽnda." 
Genesis22:9 La bãmb sẽn ta zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n wilg a Abrahaamã, a Abrahaam maana tẽn-kugri, n dɩk raadã n dogle. La a sẽb a biig a Izak n dogl raadã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã zugu." 
Genesis22:10 La a Abrahaam rɩka sʋʋgã n na n kodg a biigã. 
Genesis22:11 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam malɛɛkã zĩnda yĩngr n bool a Abrahaam n yeele: «Abrahaam! Abrahaam!» La yẽnda sakame tɩ naaba." 
Genesis22:12 La malɛɛkã yeel-a lame yaa: «Ra sɩɩs bi-bɩɩgã ye. Ra maan-a bũmb ye. Bala, mam miime moasã, tɩ fo zoeta Wẽnnaam. Fo sẽn ka zãgs tɩ f ka na n dɩk f bi-riblã sẽn yaa fo bi-yendã n kõ maamã yĩnga.»" 
Genesis22:13 La a Abrahaam sẽn zẽk a nengã, a yãnda pe-raoog sẽn be yẽnda poorẽ wã, t'a yɩɩlã gaag kãgre, la a Abrahaam kẽngame n tɩ yõk-a n wa maan maoong n yõog bugum n ledg a biig a Izak zĩigẽ." 
Genesis22:14 A Abrahaam pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ ‹Adonay-Yɩɩre› sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n gese.› Rẽ kɩtame tɩ hal tɩ ta rũndã, b ket n yetame tɩ: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngã zugu, bãmb geta yelle.›" 
Genesis22:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã zĩnda saasẽ n bool a Abrahaam naoor a yiibẽ soaba. 
Genesis22:16 Malɛɛkã yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne m menga! Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga. Fo sẽn maan bõn-kãngã n ka zãgs tɩ f ka na n kõ maam f biigã sẽn yaa fo bi-ribl-yendã," 
Genesis22:17 mam na n ninga foom bark hal wʋsgo, la m na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã fɩɩge, n lebg wa ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã, la wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã. Fo yagensã na n deega b bɛɛbã tẽms n sooge." 
Genesis22:18 Fo yagensã zug maasem yĩnga, dũniyã nebã buud fãa na n paama barka. Bala, fo saka mam noorã.»" 
Genesis22:19 A Abrahaam lebg n leba kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã nengẽ, la bãmb tũu taab n leb Bɛɛr-Seba, bala, a Abrahaam rag n bee Bɛɛr-Seba." 
Genesis22:20 Bõn-kãensã fãa loogr zugẽ, b yeela a Abrahaam tɩ yẽnda yao a Nakoor pag a Milka me rog a Nakoor kamba." 
Genesis22:21 A Uts n yaa pipi biiga, t'a Buuz pʋgda, a Kemuwɛll yaa a Aram ba," 
Genesis22:22 ne a Kesɛɛd la a Haazo, ne a Pildaase, la a Yildafe, ne a Betuwɛlle." 
Genesis22:23 A Betuwɛll n dog a Rebeka. Yaa a Milka sẽn dog a Abrahaam yao a Nakoor kamb a nii wã la woto. 
Genesis22:24 Yẽnda pʋg-rɩkdgã yʋʋr boondame t'a Rewuma. La a paama kamb me ne pʋg-kãngã. Yaa a Teba, a Gaham, a Tahaase, ne a Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 A Saara vɩɩmda yʋʋm koabg la pisi la a yopoe. Yaa woto n yɩ a Saara yʋʋmã sõore. 
Genesis23:2 A Saara kii Kiryat-Arba, sẽn dat n togs tɩ yaa Ebrõ sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã. La a Abrahaam wa n yãba a Saara kʋʋrã." 
Genesis23:3 Woto, a Abrahaam yikame n bas a pag a Saara kũumã, la a gom ne Hɛt-rãmbã n yeele:" 
Genesis23:4 «Mam yaa sãana, la nin-loaagdg n be ne yãmba, dẽ wã, sõng-y maam tɩ m paam yaad zĩig yãmb nengẽ n dɩk m pagã kũum n mum.»" 
Genesis23:5 Hɛt-rãmbã leoka a Abrahaam yaa: 
Genesis23:6 «M zu-soaba, kelg-y tõndo, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam na-biiga, n be tõnd sʋka, bao-y yaoog ning sẽn ta yãmb yam tõnd yaadã sʋka, n mum y pagã. Tõnd ned baa a yembr kõn zãgs t'a ka na n kõ yãmb a yaoog tɩ y mum y pagã kũum ye.»" 
Genesis23:7 A Abrahaam yikame n wõgemd tẽngã nebã sẽn yaa Hɛt-rãmbã taoore. 
Genesis23:8 Yẽnda yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n sakame tɩ mam na n dɩk m pagã kũum n tɩ mume, bɩ y kelg maam neere, la y yõk a Sofaar biig a Efrõ sɛɛg n kõ-ma," 
Genesis23:9 t'a tõe n sak n kõ maam Makpela tãn-bokã sẽn yaa yẽnda n so tɩ be a pʋʋgã noorã. Bɩ a koos-a ne maam tɩ m da ne m ligdi, tɩ lebg mam yaad zĩig yãmb sʋka.»"
