Genesis23:10 A Efrõ rag n bee Hɛt-rãmbã sẽn yaa yẽnda buudã sʋka. La a Efrõ leoka a Abrahaam Hɛt nebã fãa ne neb nins sẽn dag n tũud yẽnda tẽngã rignoorẽ n kẽedẽ wã fãa nifẽ, n yeele:" 
Genesis23:11 «Ayo! M soaala, kelg-y maam! Mam kõta yãmb pʋʋgã ne tãn-bokã sẽn be beenẽ wã. Mam kõt-a-la yãmb mam buudã nebã fãa taoor tɩ y mum y pagã kũum.»" 
Genesis23:12 La a Abrahaam wõgemda tẽngã nebã fãa taoore. 
Genesis23:13 A Abrahaam yeela a Efrõ tẽngã nebã fãa nifẽ yaa: «Bɩ fo me kelg maam moasã! Mam na n daa pʋʋgã ne ligdi. Mam kot-f lame tɩ f sak n deeg ligdã mam sẽn na n yao wã, tɩ mam tõe n mum m pagã kũum beenẽ.»" 
Genesis23:14 A Efrõ leoka a Abrahaam n yeel yaa: 
Genesis23:15 «M soaala, kelg-y maam! Zĩig ligd sẽn zems wakɩ-koeems kobs-naas yõod yaa bõe maam ne yãmb sʋka? Bɩ y tɩ mum y pagã kũum.»" 
Genesis23:16 Dẽ, a Abrahaam sẽn wʋm a Efrõ sẽn gom woto wã, yẽnda sõda ligdã tɩ zems sõor ning b sẽn dag n yeelã Hɛt nebã fãa nifẽ n kõ-a, yaa wanzuri wakɩ-koeems kobs-naase, wa sẽn zems lɛɛbdbã sẽn tar n leebdẽ wã." 
Genesis23:17 Woto, sẽn sɩng ne badaare, a Efrõ pʋʋgã sẽn be Makpela n dabd Mamre sẽnẽ wã, pʋʋg ning tãn-bokã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, ne tɩɩsã sẽn gũbg pʋʋgã fãa," 
Genesis23:18 lebga a Abrahaam soolem. La yaa Hɛt nebã fãa, ne neb nins sẽn dag n kẽed tẽngã rignoorẽ wã taoore." 
Genesis23:19 Rẽ poore, a Abrahaam muma a pag a Saara tãn-bok ning sẽn be Makpela pʋʋgã pʋgẽ wã pʋga, yaa Mamre tẽnga noore. Rat n yeelame tɩ yaa Ebrõ sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis23:20 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ pʋʋgã ne tãn-bokã sẽn be a pʋgã kell n lebg a Abrahaam yaad zĩig a sẽn da ne a ligd Hɛt nebã nengẽ. 
Genesis24:1 A Abrahaam dag n kʋʋlame n tar yʋʋm wʋsgo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning-a-la bark bũmbã fãa pʋgẽ. 
Genesis24:2 A Abrahaam yeela a zakã tʋmtʋmd ning sẽn yaa kãsem n kaoos yẽnda zakẽ wã, n dag n get yẽnda laogã fãa yellã yaa: «Tik mam gerã," 
Genesis24:3 tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ f wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ la dũniyã Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, tɩ f ka na n bao Kana soolmã mam sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã bi-pugl n kõ mam bi-riblã ye." 
Genesis24:4 La tɩ fo na n kẽnga mam mengã tẽngẽ wã, mam ba-yirã, n tɩ bao pag beenẽ n wa kõ mam bi-ribl a Izake.»" 
Genesis24:5 La tʋmtʋmdã leoka a Abrahaam yaa: «Tõeeme tɩ pagã tɩ zãgs t'a ka na n tũ maam n wa tẽn-kãngã ye, dẽ wã, mam tog n lebg n wa peega yãmb biig a Izak n tall-a n kẽng tẽng ning yãmb sẽn yiẽ wã bɩ?»" 
Genesis24:6 La Abrahaam leokame: «Gũus f meng n da wa peeg mam bi-riblã n leb tẽng ning mam sẽn yiẽ wã ye! 
Genesis24:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yi n bas m buudã ne m ba-yirã, bãmb sẽn gom ne maam n wẽen n yeel tɩ bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ mam yagensã soog tẽn-kãngã wã, bãmb mengã na n tʋma b malɛɛk t'a lʋɩ fo taoore, la yaa beenẽ la fo na n bao pag n wa kõ mam biigã." 
Genesis24:8 Pagã sã n tɩ zãgs t'a ka na n tũ foom n wa, wẽeneg ning mam sẽn kɩt tɩ fo wẽenã taal ka na n zĩnd fo zug ye. La bũmb ning sẽn be bala, ra tall m biigã n kẽng beenẽ ye.»" 
Genesis24:9 Tʋmtʋmdã rɩka a nug n tik a zu-soab a Abrahaam gerã n wẽen n yeel t'a na n maana wa b sẽn yeelã. 
Genesis24:10 Tʋmtʋmdã yãka a soaal a Abrahaam yʋgma piiga, ne a soaalã bõn-sõama fãa, la a loogame. Tʋmtʋmdã yikame n kẽng n ta Mezopotami tẽngã n ta a Nakoor tẽngã." 
Genesis24:11 Yẽnda pẽnega tẽngã n kɩt tɩ yʋgma wã gãand bulg sɛɛgẽ. La rag n yaa zaabre, wakat ning pagbã sẽn yit n kẽnd n toogd koomã." 
Genesis24:12 Tʋmtʋmdã pʋʋsame n yeele: «M soaal a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kota yãmb tɩ y sõng-ma, tɩ m paam bũmb ninga mam sẽn baoodã rũndã, la m kot-y lame tɩ y maan m soaal a Abrahaam neere!" 
Genesis24:13 Ade, mam na n yalsa ko-nifã sɛɛga, la tẽngã pʋg-sadb na n yiime n wa toog koom ka." 
Genesis24:14 Dẽ, pʋg-sad ning mam sẽn na n yeel tɩ m kotame t'a sik a yʋʋrã tɩ m yũ koomã, t'a leoke: ‹Bɩ y yũ, la mam na n yũnuga yãmb yʋgma wã me.› Mam datame tɩ yɩ pʋg-sad-kãng la yãmb yãk yã, t'a na n yɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Izak paga! Dẽ, mam na n bãngame tɩ yãmb maana mam soaal a Abrahaam neere.»" 
Genesis24:15 La yẽnda sẽn nan ket n gomd bal yee, a nee a Rebeka sẽn yi tẽngã pʋg n palg a yʋʋr a bãokẽ n watẽ. A Rebeka yaa a Betuwɛll bi-pugla. A Betuwɛll yaa a Nakoor pag a Milka bi-ribla, la a Nakoor yaa a Abrahaam yao." 
Genesis24:16 Pʋg-sadã rag n yaa neer hal wʋsgo. La a rag n yaa pʋg-sad sẽn ka mi rao ye, la rao baa a yembr dag n nan ka bao-a ye. Pʋg-sadã siga ko-nifẽ wã n toog koomã n pid a yʋʋrã n lebg n yi." 
Genesis24:17 A Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã wudgame n seg-a n yeel-a: «Mam kotame tɩ f kõ-m f yʋʋrã koom bilf tɩ m yũ.» 
Genesis24:18 La pʋg-sadã leokame: «M zu-soaba, yũ-y-yã!» La a kɩlla a yʋʋrã noor tao-tao n kõ tʋmtʋmdã koomã t'a yũ." 
Genesis24:19 Pʋg-sadã sẽn kõ tʋmtʋmdã koomã t'a yũ n sɛ, pʋg-sadã yeelame: «Mam na n wii koomã n yũnug yãmb yʋgma wã me hal tɩ b yũ n tɩge.»" 
Genesis24:20 Pʋg-sadã wudga tao-tao n kiig a yʋʋrã koom gaolgã pʋga, la a wudg n kẽng bulgẽ wã n na n tɩ toog koomã yɛs n wa. La a wii koomã n yũnug yʋgma wã fãa." 
Genesis24:21 La raoã rag n sĩndame, la a sokd a meng a Rebeka wɛɛngẽ n na n bãng sã n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dat n maneg yẽndã sorã la woto." 
Genesis24:22 Yʋgma wã sẽn yũ n sɛ, raoã yãka sãnem tʋblond zɩslem sẽn ta wakɩ-koɛɛng pʋɩ-sʋk zɩslem, la a bao zũy a yiibu, b zɩslem sẽn zems wakɩ-koeems piig zɩslem, n kõ pʋg-sadã." 
Genesis24:23 Tʋmtʋmdã soka pʋg-sadã yaa: «Fo yaa ãnda bi-pugla? Mam kotame tɩ f togs maam. Rẽ yĩnga, zĩig bee fo ba wã zakẽ tɩ tõnd tõe n bõos n gãand be yʋngã?»" 
Genesis24:24 Pʋg-sadã leokame: «Mam baaba yaa a Betuwɛlle. A Betuwɛll yaa a Nakoor pag a Milka bi-ribla.» 
Genesis24:25 Pʋg-sadã leb n yeelame: «Tõnd tara kãenkãe la yamd wʋsg yiri, la zĩig me bee yãmb sẽn tõe n gãand yʋngã.»" 
Genesis24:26 Woto, raoã wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Genesis24:27 Yẽnda pʋʋsa a woto: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam soaal a Abrahaam Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre! Bãmb wilga b nonglem ne b pʋ-peelem mam soaalã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab talla maam n wa kẽes mam soaalã roagdb zakẽ.» 
Genesis24:28 La bi-puglã zoe n kẽnga a ma nengẽ n tɩ togs-a yellã fãa. 
Genesis24:29 La mikame t'a Rebeka rag n tara kẽem-bi-ribl yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Labã. La a Labã yiime n zoe n babs raoã ko-nifã sɛɛga. 
Genesis24:30 A Labã sẽn yãnd tʋb-londã ne zũyã sẽn be a yao a Rebeka nugẽ wã, la a sẽn wʋm a Rebeka sẽn dag n gomd n togsd raoã sẽn yeel bũmb ninsã, yẽnda zoeeme n babs raoã, n mik-a t'a yas ne a yʋgma wã ko-nifã sɛɛga." 
Genesis24:31 A Labã yeela raoã yaa: «Yãmb yaa soab ning sẽn tar Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka! Wa-y-yã! Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yas yɩnga? Mam manega roogo, la m bao zĩig yʋgma wã yĩnga.»" 
Genesis24:32 Raoã kẽe zakã pʋga. A Labã kɩtame tɩ b sik yʋgma wã zɩɩbã n bao kãenkãe ne yamd n kõ-ba, la a bao koom n kõ raoã ne neb nins sẽn tũ yẽnda wã tɩ b waas b nao." 
Genesis24:33 La b talla rɩɩb n wa kõ raoã. La yẽnda yeelame: «Mam ka na n dɩ, n nan ka togs koɛɛg ning mam sẽn tar n dat n togsã ye.» La a Labã yeelame: «Togs-y-yã.»" 
Genesis24:34 Dẽ, tʋmtʋmdã yeelame: «Mam yaa a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmda." 
Genesis24:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga mam soaal a Abrahaam bark wʋsgo. Bãmb lebga nin-kãsenga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo mam soaal a Abrahaam rũm-bɛd ne rũm-bãoonego, la wanzuri ne sãnem, la b kõ-b yem-daad ne yem-pogse, la yʋgma ne bõense." 
Genesis24:36 Mam soaal a Abrahaam pag a Saara roga mam soaalã bi-ribl a kʋʋlem wakate. La b rɩka b paoongã fãa n kõ bi-ribl-kãnga. 
Genesis24:37 Mam soaalã kɩtame tɩ mam wẽene.» Bãmb yeelame: «Wẽen tɩ f ka na n bao pag Kana soolmã pʋga, tẽng ning pʋg tõnd sẽn beẽ wã kom-pugli sʋka, n kõ mam biigã ye." 
Genesis24:38 Kẽng mam ba-yirã, mam buudã sʋka, n tɩ bao pag be n wa kõ mam biigã.»" 
Genesis24:39 La mam yeela m soaalã tɩ tõeeme, tɩ pagã ka sak n na n tũ maam n wa ye." 
Genesis24:40 Mam soaalã yeelame: «Mam sẽn tũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning mam sẽn tũudã na n tʋma b malɛɛk t'a yãag foom n kɩt tɩ f kẽndã yɩ neere. Bao pag mam ba-yirã, mam buudã sʋka, n wa kõ mam biigã." 
Genesis24:41 Sẽn na yɩl tɩ wẽenegã taal ra zĩnd fo zugu, fo sã n ta mam buudã sʋka, tɩ bãmb ka sak n kõ foom bi-pugla, wẽeneg ninga mam sẽn kɩt tɩ fo wẽenã taal ka na n zĩnd fo zug ye." 
Genesis24:42 Dẽ, mam taa bulgẽ wã rũndã, la mam yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «M soaal a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, sõng-y-m tɩ m so-toakã yɩ neere." 
Genesis24:43 Ade, mam na n yalsa ko-nifã sɛɛga, tɩ pʋg-sad ning sẽn na n wa-a, n wa toog koomã, tɩ mam yeel-a: mam kotame tɩ f sulg n kɩll f yʋʋrã n kõ-m koom bilfã›," 
Genesis24:44 t'a leok maam tɩ m yũ wã, la a yeel t'a na n tooga koomã n kõ mam yʋgma wã me wã, bɩ yɩ pʋg-sad-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãk yã, n na n kõ mam soaalã bi-ribla!" 
Genesis24:45 La mam sẽn dag n nan ket n gomd m sũurẽ, la a Rebeka sẽn yi n palg a yʋʋr a bãokẽ n wa ta n kẽ bulgã pʋg n toog koomã. Dẽ, mam yeel-a lame: ‹Mam kotame tɩ f kõ-m koom tɩ m yũ!›" 
Genesis24:46 La a sulgame n kɩll a yʋʋrã a sẽn dag n tʋkã tao-tao, n yeel maam tɩ m yũ. La a yeel t'a na n wii koomã n kõ mam yʋgma wã me tɩ b yũ. Mam yũume, la a kõo mam yʋgma wã me tɩ b yũ." 
Genesis24:47 Dẽ, mam sok-a lame: ‹Fo yaa ãnda bi-pugla?› La a leoka maam tɩ yẽnda yaa a Betuwɛll bi-pugla. T'a Betuwɛll yaa a Nakoor ne a pag Milka bi-ribla. Dẽ, mam baoo tʋb-long n ning a yõorã, la m bao zũy n pid a nusã." 
Genesis24:48 Rẽ poore, mam wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n pẽg mam soaal a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb sẽn maan pʋ-peelem n yãag maam tɩ m na n tõog n peeg mam soaalã roagd bi-pugl n tɩ kõ m soaalã bi-riblã yĩnga." 
Genesis24:49 Moasã, yãmb sã n na n wilga y nonglem ne y sɩd mam soaalã yĩnga, bɩ y togs maam, la y sã n ka na n maan woto me, bɩ y togs maam tɩ m tõe n bãng m sẽn na n maanega.»" 
Genesis24:50 Dẽ, a Labã ne a Betuwɛll leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Yel-kãngã yita Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng nengẽ, tõnd ka tar koɛɛg n na n yeel yãmb ye. Tõnd ka tõe n yeel tɩ n-yẽe, d ka tõe n yeel tɩ ayo." 
Genesis24:51 A Rebeka yẽ la sẽn yas yãmb taoorã la, peeg-y-yã-a n tall n looge, t'a tõe n tɩ yɩ yãmb soaalã bi-ribl paga, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã.»" 
Genesis24:52 A Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã sẽn wʋm a Labã ne a Betuwɛll sẽn gom woto wã, yẽnda wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Genesis24:53 Tʋmtʋmdã yiisa wanzuri fan-teedo, la sãnem fan-teedo, ne futu, n kõ a Rebeka. Tʋmtʋmdã kõo a Rebeka tão wã ne a ma wã me kũuni." 
Genesis24:54 Rẽ poore, a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã ne neb nins sẽn yãag yẽnda wã rɩɩme, la b yũ, la b gãand be yʋn-kãnga. Beoogã sẽn vẽege, bãmb yikame t'a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã yeele: «Kõ-y-m sor tɩ m lebg n leb m soaalã nengẽ.»" 
Genesis24:55 A Rebeka tão wã ne a Rebeka ma wã yeelame: «Bas-y tɩ pʋg-sadã zĩnd ne tõnd rasem piig n paase, rẽ poore, y tõe n yaool n loogame.»" 
Genesis24:56 A Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã yeelame: «Ra kɩt-y tɩ m leb n kaoos ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab manega mam so-toakã, dẽ wã, bɩ y bas-m tɩ m lebg n leb n soaalã nengẽ.»" 
Genesis24:57 La bãmb yeelame: «Sã n yaa woto, bɩ d bool pʋg-sadã meng n sok n gese.»" 
Genesis24:58 Woto, bãmb boola a Rebeka n sok-a: «Fo na n sak n tũu raoã n looge?» La a Rebeka leokame tɩ n-yẽe." 
Genesis24:59 Dẽ, bãmb basa b tão-poak a Rebeka ne a yaoondã tɩ b tũ a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã ne a tũud-n-taasã n looge." 
Genesis24:60 Bãmb ninga a Rebeka bark n yeele: «Foom, d tão sõngo, bɩ f fɩɩg n lebg tus-kẽema! Bɩ fo yagensã tõog b bɛɛbã n deeg b tẽmsã n sooge!»" 
Genesis24:61 A Rebeka yika ne a tʋmtʋmd-pogsã n zomb yʋgma n tũ raoã tɩ b na n looge. A Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã peega a Rebeka n tall n looge. 
Genesis24:62 Wakat-kãnga, rag n nan yaa a Izak sẽn yi Lakayi-Royi bulgã n wa. Bala, yẽnda rag n tɩ tilga Negɛɛv soolem." 
Genesis24:63 La daar a yembr zaabre, a Izak yiime n na n kẽng we-kɛɛng n kok pemsem. La a Izak sẽn zẽk n gese, a nee yʋgma sẽn wate." 
Genesis24:64 A Rebeka me zẽkame n gese, la a yãnda a Izake. Dẽ, a yɩka yʋgemdã zug n sigi." 
Genesis24:65 A Rebeka soka a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã tɩ yaa yɛɛnẽ dao la sẽn kẽnd n segd bãmbã. 
Genesis24:66 La tʋmtʋmdã leokame tɩ yaa yẽnda soaalã. Dẽ, a Rebeka rɩka a peendã n pil a menga. La a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdã togsa a Izak yẽnda sẽn maan bũmb ningã fãa." 
Genesis24:67 A Izak peega a Rebeka n tɩ kẽes-a a ma a Saara fu-roogẽ. La a Izak peega a Rebeka n maan a paga, la a Izak nonga a Rebeka. Woto, a Izak paama belsg wʋsg a ma a Saara kũumã poore." 
Genesis25:1 A Abrahaam leb n peega pag a to n paase. Pʋg-kãng yʋʋr la a Ketʋra. 
Genesis25:2 A Ketʋra roga a Abrahaam kamba. Yaa a Zimran ne a Yoksan la a Medan ne a Madiyã la a Yisebak ne a Suwa. 
Genesis25:3 A Yoksan n dog a Seba ne a Dedan. A Dedan yagens yaa Asʋʋr-dãmbã la Letʋʋs-dãmba, ne Lewum-dãmbã." 
Genesis25:4 A Midiyã kamb yaa a Efa, a Efɛɛre, a Henoke, a Abida ne a Ɛldaa. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa a Ketʋra kom-dibli." 
Genesis25:5 A Abrahaam rɩka bũmbã fãa n kõ a biig a Izake. 
Genesis25:6 Sẽn deng a Abrahaam kũum, a baoo kũun n kõ a pʋg-rɩkdsã kambã, la a kɩt tɩ b yi n kẽng tẽms nins sẽn be yaangã n zãag ne yẽnda biig a Izake." 
Genesis25:7 A Abrahaam vɩɩmdame n kaoos yʋʋm koabg la pis-yopoe la a nu. 
Genesis25:8 A Abrahaam kiime. Yẽnda paama yõ-wok n yaool n ki. A Abrahaam vɩɩmdame n kaoose, la a paama sũ-noog a kʋʋlem wakate, n yaool n ki tɩ b mum-a t'a bʋʋg a saam-dãmba." 
Genesis25:9 A Abrahaam kambã, a Izak ne a Ismayɛll tɩ muma a Abrahaam Makpela tãn-bokã sẽn be Hɛt rao a Sowaar biig a Efrõ pʋʋgã pʋgã, n pẽneg Mamre." 
Genesis25:10 Yaa pʋ-kãng la a Abrahaam sẽn dag n da Hɛt nebã nengẽ wã. B muma a Abrahaam ne a pag a Saara beenẽ. 
Genesis25:11 A Abrahaam kũumã zugẽ, Wẽnnaam ninga a Abrahaam biig a Izak zug barka. A Izak rag n tilga a yirã n pẽneg Lakayi-Royi bulgã." 
Genesis25:12 Ad a Abrahaam biig a Ismayɛll a Saara yem-poak a Agaar sẽn yaa Ezɩpt nedã sẽn dogã yagense. 
Genesis25:13 Ad a Ismayɛll kom-dibli wã yʋy wa sẽn zems b buudã roto: Yaa a Ismayɛll bi-kãseng a Nebayote, a Kedaare, a Adbeyɛlle, a Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 a Misma, a Duma, a Masa," 
Genesis25:15 a Hadaade, a Tema, a Yetʋʋre, a Nafis ne a Kedma. Bãmb yaa a Ismayɛll yagense." 
Genesis25:16 Yaa bãmb yʋyã ne b tẽmse, la b sik zĩisi. Yaa nanambs piig la a yiibu, wa b buudã sẽn yaa to-to wã." 
Genesis25:17 A Ismayɛll vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe. A Ismayɛll kiime n bʋʋg a saam-dãmba. 
Genesis25:18 A Ismayɛll yagensã kell n zĩnda sẽn sɩng ne Havɩla n tɩ ta Sʋʋr tẽngã sẽn be Ezɩpt yaangã, n dabd Asiiri soolmã sẽnẽ. A Ismayɛll yagensã tilga b yiyã n tees b saam-biisã fãa." 
Genesis25:19 Ad a Abrahaam biig a Izak yagense. A Abrahaam n dog a Izake. 
Genesis25:20 A Izak sẽn wa n na n peeg a Rebeka n maan a pagã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-naase. A Rebeka yaa Aram tẽng ned a Betuwɛll sẽn be Padan-Aramã bi-pugla, n yaa a Labã sẽn yaa Aram tẽng nedã tão-poaka." 
Genesis25:21 A Izak pʋʋs n kosa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, a pag a Rebeka yĩnga. Bala, a rag n ka tar dogem ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma a kosgã. La a Izak pag a Rebeka rɩka pʋga." 
Genesis25:22 La kambã sẽn dag n bee a Rebeka pʋgẽ wã rag n zabda taaba, t'a Rebeka mi n yetẽ tɩ: «Yaa bõe tɩ yel-kãngã paamd maam?» A Rebeka kẽngame n tɩ sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n gese." 
Genesis25:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Rebeka yaa: «Yaa soolem a yiib n be fo pʋgẽ wã. La buud a yiib-kãens na n welga taaba, fo sẽn na n dog-bã wakate. Buud a yembr pãng na n yɩɩga a to, la yao wã na n sooga kãsmã.»" 
Genesis25:24 A Rebeka rogmã wakat sẽn wa n ta, b mikame tɩ yaa kinkirs n dag n be a pʋgẽ wã." 
Genesis25:25 Pipi biigã yiime, la a yaa moeega, n tar yĩn-kõabnenga, la b pʋda yẽnda yʋʋr t'a Ezayu." 
Genesis25:26 La rẽ poore, yao wã pʋgl n yiime, la a nugã rag n gãda a Ezayu nao-kãsenkãarã. La b pʋda yẽnda yʋʋr t'a Zakoobe. Bãmb sẽn wa n na n dogã, t'a Izak rag n tara yʋʋm pis-yoobe." 
Genesis25:27 Kom-dibli a yiibã bɩɩme. A Ezayu lebga tãoosa, n mi tãoosg sõama, n gõod weoogẽ. La a Zakoob dag n yaa ned sẽn zĩ sɩɩ, n vɩ fu-rot pʋse." 
Genesis25:28 A Izak rag n nonga a Ezayu, bala, a dag n wat n kõta yẽnda weoog nemd t'a wãbdẽ. La a Rebeka rag n nonga a Zakoobe." 
Genesis25:29 La daar a yembre, a Zakoob rag n dʋgda a rɩɩbo, la a Ezayu yii a weoogã n lebg n wa, la a rag n yɛɛ zãnga." 
Genesis25:30 A Ezayu yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Mam kotame tɩ f yãk f rɩ-moomdã n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ. Bala, mam yɛɛ zãnga.» Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b pʋd a Ezayu yʋʋr t'a Edom, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹rɩ-moomde.›" 
Genesis25:31 A Zakoob yeela a Ezayu yaa: «Bɩ f reng n koos f bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩrã ne maam nanda.» 
Genesis25:32 La a Ezayu leokame: «Gese, mam dat n kiime, dẽ wã, bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩrã yõod ne maam yaa bõe?»" 
Genesis25:33 Dẽ, a Zakoob yeel-a lame: «Sã n yaa woto, bɩ f reng n wẽene.» La a Ezayu wẽena ne a Zakoobe, n dɩk a bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩrã n koos ne a Zakoobe." 
Genesis25:34 La a Zakoob yãka buri, ne bɛnga n kõ a Ezayu. La a rɩɩme la a yũ, la a yi n looge. Yɩɩ woto, t'a Ezayu ka geelg a bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩrã ye." 
Genesis26:1 Kom n kẽ tẽngã, la a yɩɩ kom-kãseng n yɩɩd kom ning sẽn dag n zĩnd a Abrahaam wakatẽ wã. La a Izak yii n kẽnga Filistẽ-dãmbã rĩm a Abimelɛk nengẽ Geraar tẽnga." 
Genesis26:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka a meng ne a Izak n yeel-a yaa: «Ra kẽng Ezɩpt ye, pa tẽng ning mam sẽn na n wilg foomã pʋga." 
Genesis26:3 Zĩnd sãand tẽn-kãng pʋga, bala, mam bee ne foom, la m na n ning-f-la barka. Bala, mam na n dɩka tẽn-bãmb fãa n kõ foom ne f yagensã tɩ y sooge. Mam na n maana woto, n pids wẽeneg ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen ne fo ba a Abrahaamã." 
Genesis26:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã fɩɩge n lebg wʋsg wa yĩngr ãdse. Mam na n kõo fo yagensã tẽn-bãmbã fãa. La dũniyã nebã fãa na n paama bark fo yagensã zug maasem yĩnga. 
Genesis26:5 Bala, a Abrahaam saka mam koɛɛgã, a tũu mam tʋlsmã ne mam koeesã, la a saka m noyã ne m tõodã.»" 
Genesis26:6 Woto kɩtame t'a Izak kell n pa Geraar tẽnga. 
Genesis26:7 La soolem-kãng nebã sã n dag n sok a Izak a pagã sẽn yaa ned ninga, yẽnda yetame tɩ yaa yẽnda tão-poaka. Bala, yẽnda rag n zoeta rabeem t'a sã n yeel tɩ yaa yẽnda paga, tẽngã nebã na n kʋʋ yẽnda. Bala, a Rebeka rag n yaa pʋg-neere." 
Genesis26:8 La a Izak sẽn zĩnd soolmẽ be n kaoose, daar a yembre, Filistẽ-dãmbã rĩm a Abimelɛk rag n lɩkda roog võorẽ n getẽ, la a yãame t'a Izak reemd ne a pag a Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Rĩm a Abimelɛk kɩtame tɩ b bool a Izak t'a yeel-a: «Kelg wɛ! Rẽnd pagã yaa fo pag wɛ? La maana a wãn tɩ fo yeel tɩ yaa fo tão-poaka?» La a Izak leoka rĩma yaa: «Mam sẽn yeel woto wã yaa tɩ mam zoee rabeem tɩ b na n wa kʋ maam yẽnda poorẽ.» 
Genesis26:10 A Abimelɛk yeela a Izak yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo maan tõnd woto? Kellẽ-la bilfu, tɩ tẽngã ned gãandẽ fo pagã, la fo rag n na n kɩtame tɩ tõnd yɩ koangdba.»" 
Genesis26:11 Woto, a Abimelɛk kɩtame tɩ b togs tẽngã nebã fãa tɩ ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a nin-kãngã ne a pagã, bɩ b kʋ a soaba." 
Genesis26:12 A Izak koo tẽngẽ be, la yʋʋm-kãnga, a paama koodã tɩ ta yẽnda sẽn mi n paamdẽ wã noor koabga, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning-a-la barka." 
Genesis26:13 La a Izak lebga arzɛk soaba, la a paoongã rag n tara paasg wakat fãa, la a lebga rakãag-kẽenga." 
Genesis26:14 A Izak rag n tara rũm-bãoonego, la rũm-bɛd wʋsgo, la a tar tʋmtʋmdb wʋsgo. Woto kɩtame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã maan sũ-kiir ne a Izak paoongã." 
Genesis26:15 Filistẽ-dãmbã wʋka tom n yẽd buls nins fãa a Izak ba a Abrahaam tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn dag n tu a Abrahaam wakatẽ wã. 
Genesis26:16 Dẽ, a Abimelɛk yeela a Izak yaa: «Yi la f bas tõnd tẽngã. Bala, fo lebga pãng soab n yɩɩd tõndo.»" 
Genesis26:17 La a Izak yii beenẽ n kẽng n tɩ tilg a zak Geraar ko-soogẽ n zĩnd be. 
Genesis26:18 A Izak lebs n yoosa buls nins b sẽn dag n tu yẽnda ba a Abrahaam wakatẽ wã, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n lebs n yẽd-b a Abrahaam kũumã poorã. La yẽnda kell n pʋda bulsã yʋy wa yʋy nins yẽnda ba a Abrahaam sẽn dag n pʋdã." 
Genesis26:19 A Izak tʋmtʋmdbã tuka bulg Geraar ko-soogẽ, la b paama ko-bundum zĩig sẽn yaa sõama." 
Genesis26:20 Geraar tẽngã pe-kɩɩmb yika zabr ne a Izak pe-kɩɩmbã n yeel tɩ koomã yaa bãmb n so. Dẽ, a Izak pʋda bulgã yʋʋr tɩ Ezɛke, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹nokoɛɛm bulga.› Bala, b maana zabr ne yẽnda." 
Genesis26:21 A Izak tʋmtʋmdbã tuu bulg a to, la b leb n zaba ne bãmb bul-kãng poorẽ. La a Izak pʋda bul-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Sitna." 
Genesis26:22 A Izak viiga a yirã n yik n yi beenẽ n kẽng zĩig a to. La bãmb leb n tɩ tuu bulg beenẽ, la ned ka maan zabr ne bãmb bul-kãng poorẽ yɛs ye. La a pʋda bul-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Rehobote, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹yalenga.› Bala, yẽnda yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo tõnd zĩ-yalenga, n na n kɩt tɩ tõnd paoongã fɩɩg tẽngã pʋga.»" 
Genesis26:23 A Izak yika beenẽ n kẽng Bɛɛr-Seba. 
Genesis26:24 Badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b meng ne yẽnda n yeele: «Mam yaa fo ba a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, da zoe rabeem ye. Bala, mam bee ne foom. Mam na n ninga fo zug barka, n kɩt tɩ fo yagensã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo, mam tʋmtʋmd a Abrahaam zug maasem yĩnga.»" 
Genesis26:25 La a Izak mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ n pʋʋs ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. La a tilga a fu-roogã beenẽ, la yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã tuka bulg be." 
Genesis26:26 A Abimelɛk yii Geraar ne a zoa a Awuzate, la tãb-biis naab a Pikolle, n kẽng a Izak nengẽ." 
Genesis26:27 A Izak yeela bãmb yaa: «Yaa a wãn tɩ yãmb wat mam nengẽ? Ka yãmb n kisg maam n dig maam n yiis yãmb sʋk la?» 
Genesis26:28 Bãmb leoka a Izak yaa: «Tõnd yãame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne foom. Yaa rẽ yĩng la tõnd tags tɩ yaa neere, tɩ fo wa tɩ d maan pʋleng ne taaba, n maan kaool tõnd ne taab sʋka." 
Genesis26:29 Tɩ bõn-kãng wilgdẽ, tɩ fo ka na n maan tõnd wẽnga, wa tõnd me sẽn ka maan foom wẽngã. Tõnd maana foom neer bala, la tõnd basa foom tɩ f loog ne bãane. La moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga foom barka.»" 
Genesis26:30 La a Izak maana tigr bãmb yĩnga, tɩ b rɩ, la b yũ." 
Genesis26:31 La bãmb sãda beoogo, n yik n maan pʋleng ne taaba. La a Izak bas-b lame tɩ b looge, la bãmb yii beenẽ ne bãan n looge." 
Genesis26:32 Badaar bala, a Izak tʋmtʋmdbã wa n togsa yẽnda bulgã bãmb sẽn tu wã yell sẽn yaa to-to. Bãmb yeela a Izak yaa: «Tõnd paama koom.»" 
Genesis26:33 La a Izak pʋda bulgã yʋʋr tɩ Siba. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b pʋd tẽn-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Bɛɛr-Seba hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
Genesis26:34 A Ezayu sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-naase, a peega pagba. Yaa Hɛt ned a Beeri bi-pugl a Zehuditi, ne Hɛt ned a Elon bi-pugl a Basmate." 
Genesis26:35 La a Izak ne a pag a Rebeka paama sũ-toog pʋg-bãmbã yĩnga. 
Genesis27:1 A Izak rag n lebga nin-kẽema, t'a ninã pãng boog t'a ka leb n neẽ ye. A Izak boola yẽnda bi-kãseng a Ezayu, la a yeelame: «Ad-ma.»" 
Genesis27:2 La a Izak yeela a Ezayu yaa: «Mam lebga nin-kẽema, la mam ka mi m kũum daar ye." 
Genesis27:3 Dẽ wã, m kot-f lame tɩ f rɩk f rao-teedã moas-moasã bala, f lokã ne f tãpã, n kẽng weoogẽ n tɩ bao we-nemd n wa kõ-ma." 
Genesis27:4 Segl rɩ-noog sẽn ta m yam n tall n wa kõ-m tɩ m dɩ, la m ning f zug barka, la m yaool n ki.»" 
Genesis27:5 La a Rebeka rag n kelgda a Izak sẽn dag n gomd ne a biig a Ezayu wã. La a Ezayu yiime n loog weoog n na n tɩ bao we-nemd n wa. 
Genesis27:6 La a Rebeka yeela a biig a Zakoob yaa: «Ade, mam wʋma koɛɛga. F baaba rag n sõsda ne fo kẽem a Ezayu." 
Genesis27:7 A yeel-a lame t'a tɩ bao we-nemd n wa segl rɩ-noog n kõ-a t'a rɩ, la a ning-a bark Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la a yaool n ki." 
Genesis27:8 M biig sõngo, kelg mam goamã neere, ad mam sẽn dat tɩ f maan bũmb ninga." 
Genesis27:9 M kot-f lame tɩ f kẽng rũmsã sʋk n tɩ bao bʋ-poal a yiib sẽn yaa sõama n wa, tɩ m na n maana rɩ-noog f baaba sẽn nong n kõ-a." 
Genesis27:10 Fo na n talla rɩɩbã n tɩ kõ f baaba t'a rɩ, la a ning-f bark sẽn deng a kũum.»" 
Genesis27:11 A Zakoob yeela a ma a Rebeka yaa: «Yaa sɩda, la mam kẽemã yaa yĩn-kõabneng soaba, tɩ mam yaool n ka yĩn-saalg soaba." 
Genesis27:12 M baaba tõe n saaga maam n gese, la a na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa zãmb soaba. Mam tõe n baoo kãab-wẽng n kõ m menga, tɩ ka yɩ bark ye.»" 
Genesis27:13 A Zakoob ma a Rebeka yeel-a lame: «M biiga, bɩ kãab-wẽn-kãng lʋɩ mam zugu! Fo we n kelg mam goamã, la f kẽng n tɩ bao bʋ-poalã n wa kõ-ma.»" 
Genesis27:14 Dẽ a Zakoob kẽngame n tɩ bao bʋ-poalã n wa kõ a ma t'a maan rɩ-noog sẽn ta a baaba wã yam. 
Genesis27:15 Rẽ poore, a Rebeka rɩka a Zakoob kẽem a Ezayu fu-neeb nins sẽn dag n pẽ yambẽ wã, n be roogã pʋgã n yeelg yẽnda bi-yao a Zakoobe." 
Genesis27:16 A Rebeka rɩka bʋ-poalã gãndã n pil a Zakoob nusã ne a yublã sẽn ka tar yĩn-koabnengã. 
Genesis27:17 Rẽ poore, a Rebeka rɩka rɩ-noogã ne burã yẽnda sẽn seglã n kɩs a biig a Zakoobe." 
Genesis27:18 A Zakoob kẽnga a ba a Izak nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «M baaba!» T'a Izak leoke: Ad-ma! M biiga, ãnda la foom?" 
Genesis27:19 La a Zakoob leoka a baaba yaa: «Mam yaa yãmb bi-kãseng a Ezayu. Mam maana yãmb sẽn kosã, yik-y n zĩnd-y n deeg-y m we-nemdã n wãbe, la y ning-m barka.»" 
Genesis27:20 A Izak yeela a biig a Zakoob yaa: «Ad f paama nemdã tao-tao wɛ m biiga!» La a Zakoob leokame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ we-rũmsã wa mam sẽn beẽ wã.» 
Genesis27:21 La a Izak yeela a Zakoob yaa: «M biiga, bɩ f kolg tɩ m saag-f n ges fo sã n sɩd yaa mam biig a Ezayu.»" 
Genesis27:22 Dẽ, a Zakoob kolga a ba a Izake, t'a saag-a, n bas n yeele: «Koɛɛgã wẽnda a Zakoob koɛɛg wɛ, la nusã yaa a Ezayu nusi.»" 
Genesis27:23 La a Izak ka bãng a Zakoob ye. Bala, yẽnda nusã rag n tara kõbd wa a kẽem a Ezayu nusã sẽn tarã, la a Izak ninga a Zakoob zug barka." 
Genesis27:24 A Izak sokame: «Fo sɩd yaa mam biig a Ezayu bɩ?» T'a leok tɩ n-yẽe. 
Genesis27:25 Dẽ, a Izak yeelame: «M biiga, yãk we-nemdã n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ la m ning-f barka. La a Zakoob yãkame n kõ a Izak t'a rɩ.» La a tall reezẽ rãam n wa kõ-a t'a yũ." 
Genesis27:26 Dẽ poore, a ba a Izak yeel-a lame: «M biiga, kolg n mok-ma.»" 
Genesis27:27 La a Zakoob kolgame n mok-a, la a Izak sẽn wʋm futã yũugã, a ning-a-la bark n yeele: «N-yẽe! Mam biigã yũug wẽnda wa pʋʋgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ning barka!" 
Genesis27:28 Bɩ Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ yĩngr meenem sig f zugu. N kɩt tɩ f paam tẽngã bõn-koaadla, tɩ f paam bɩle ne reezẽ rã-paalg wʋsgo!" 
Genesis27:29 Bɩ soolem toay-toayã neb sak foom, tɩ buud toay-toayã wõgemd fo taoore! Fo na n yɩɩ f saam-biisã soaala. La bɩ fo ma-biisã wõgemd fo taoore! Ned ning sẽn na n kãab-a foom wẽnga, a soab na n paama kãab-wẽnga, La ned ning sẽn na n ning-a fo zug barka, A soab na n paama barka!»" 
Genesis27:30 A Izak sẽn ning a Zakoob bark n sɛ t'a Zakoob yik n yi bal yee, la a kẽem a Ezayu sẽn yi tãoosgã n be waoongẽ." 
Genesis27:31 A Ezayu me segla rɩ-noog n tall n na n wa kõ a baaba. Yẽnda yeela a baaba yaa: «M baaba, yik-y n deeg-y y biigã we-nemdã n wãb la y ning m zug barka.»" 
Genesis27:32 La a ba Izak sok-a lame: «Yaa ãnda la foom?» T'a leoke: «Mam yaa yãmb bi-kãseng a Ezayu.» 
Genesis27:33 La a Izak pɛlengã yɩkame t'a rigda. A Izak pɛlengã yɩka wʋsg t'a soke: «La yaa ãnda la sẽn wa ne we-nemdã n wa kõ maamã? Mam zoe n paama fãa n dɩ tɩ fo nan ka wa ye, la mam zoe ninga a soab zug barka, la a na n paama barka.»" 
Genesis27:34 A Ezayu sẽn wʋm a ba wã goamã, a zẽka a koɛɛg n kelme, n yãb ne sũ-toog wʋsg n yeel a baaba yaa: «M baaba, ning-y maam me barka.»" 
Genesis27:35 La a Izak leok-a lame: «Fo yao wã wa n maana sɩlem n deeg fo barkã.» 
Genesis27:36 A Ezayu yeelame: «Yaa b sẽn pʋd yẽnda yʋʋr t'a Zakoobã yĩng la yẽnda sẽn zãmb maam hal naoor a yiib fãa wã bɩ? Yẽnda reng n deega mam bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩrã, la a leb n deeg mam barkã yɛsa.» A Ezayu soka a baaba yaa: «Yãmb ka leb n tar bark baa bilf mam yĩnga?»" 
Genesis27:37 La a Izak leoka a Ezayu yaa: «Ade, mam kɩtame t'a na n lebg fo soaala, mam kõo yẽnda a saam-biisã fãa tɩ b na n yɩ yẽnda tʋmtʋmdba, la mam yeelame t'a paam koodo, la reezẽ rã-paalga. Dẽ wã, m biiga, bõe la mam tõe n leb n maan n kõ foom?»" 
Genesis27:38 A Ezayu yeela a baaba yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, yaa bark a yembr bal la yãmb tar la? M baaba, ning-y maam me barka.» La a Ezayu zẽka a koɛɛg n yãbe." 
Genesis27:39 A ba wã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ade, fo yir na zãaga ne zĩ-bʋgsã, la a zãag ne saasẽ la yĩngr meenem me." 
Genesis27:40 Fo na n talla f sʋʋg n zab n paam n vɩɩmde. Fo yao wã n na n sooga foom. La fo sẽn na n yeebdẽ, n gilgd n kẽnd ka la ka wã yĩnga, fo na n tõogame t'a ka leb n soog foom ye.»" 
Genesis27:41 A Ezayu kisga a Zakoob a ba wã sẽn ning yẽnda barkã yĩnga. A Ezayu rag n tagsda a sũurẽ n yetẽ: «M baaba kũum kolgame, b kũumã poore, mam na n kʋʋ m yao a Zakoobe.»" 
Genesis27:42 B rɩka a Rebeka bi-kãseng a Ezayu goamã n tɩ togs a Rebeka. Dẽ, a Rebeka boola a bi-yao a Zakoob n yeel-a yaa: «Ade, fo kẽem a Ezayu rat n kʋ-f lame n dok a sũuri." 
Genesis27:43 Moasã, m biiga, kelg mam goamã neere! Yik n zoe n kẽng mam tão a Labã sẽn be Haarã wã nengẽ n tɩ soonde!" 
Genesis27:44 Kell n zĩnd yẽnda nengẽ tɩ yɩ rasem a yiibu, hal tɩ fo kẽemã sũur wa sigi." 
Genesis27:45 Fo kẽemã sũur sã n wa n sig ne foom, t'a yĩm bũmb ning fo sẽn dag n maan yẽnda wã, mam na yaool n kɩt tɩ f lebg n wa. Bala, na n yɩɩ a wãn tɩ mam na n kong yãmb y yiibã fãa daar a yembr pʋgẽ?»" 
Genesis27:46 A Rebeka yeela a Izak yaa: «Mam yamã yii ne m vɩɩmã, Hɛt nebã kom-pugli wã yĩnga. A Zakoob sã n dɩk Hɛt-rãmbã pʋg-sadbã sʋk pʋg-sad wa pʋg-bãmbã, mam vɩɩmã yõod bee yɛ?»" 
Genesis28:1 A Izak boola a Zakoob n ning-a bark n kõ-a noor n yeele: «Da rɩk Kana tẽng bi-pugl n maan f pag ye. 
Genesis28:2 Yik n kẽng Padan-Aram, fo ma wã ba-yirã, a Betuwɛll nengẽ, n tɩ peeg bi-pugl a yembr f ma wã tão a Labã kom-pugli wã sʋk n maan f paga." 
Genesis28:3 Bɩ Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam ning f zug barka, la b kõ-f rogem, n kɩt tɩ f fɩɩge, n lebg buud wʋsgo!" 
Genesis28:4 Bɩ Wẽnnaam kõ foom ne f yagensã fãa a Abrahaam barkã, n kɩt tɩ f soog tẽng ning fo sẽn yaa sãan a pʋgẽ wã. Wẽnnaam dag n dɩk-a lame n kõ a Abrahaam!»" 
Genesis28:5 Woto, a Izak kɩtame t'a Zakoob loog n kẽng Padan-Aram, a Betuwɛll biig a Labã sẽn yaa Aram nedã yiri. A Labã yaa a Zakoob ne a Ezayu ma a Rebeka tão." 
Genesis28:6 A Ezayu mikame t'a Izak ninga a Zakoob zug barka, la a tʋma t'a kẽng Padan-Aram n tɩ bao pag beenẽ. La a ning-a bark n yeel-a t'a ra bao Kana tẽng pʋg-sad n maan a pag ye." 
Genesis28:7 La a Zakoob saka a baaba ne a ma noore, la a loogame n kẽng Padan-Aram tẽnga." 
Genesis28:8 A Ezayu mikame tɩ Kana kom-pugli wã ka ta yẽnda ba a Izak yam ye. 
Genesis28:9 Dẽ, a Ezayu yiime n kẽng a Ismayɛll nengẽ. Yẽnda tɩ rɩka a Abrahaam bi-ribl a Ismayɛll bi-pugl a Mahalat sẽn yaa a Nebayot tão-poakã n maan a paga, n paas a pagbã." 
Genesis28:10 A Zakoob yii Bɛɛr-Seba n kẽng Haarã. 
Genesis28:11 Yẽnda taa zĩig a yembre, la a gãanda beenẽ yʋn-kãnga, bala, wĩndgã rag n kẽeme. Yẽnda rɩka kugr beenẽ n kʋgl n gãand zĩ-kãngã." 
Genesis28:12 Yẽnda paama zãmsdo. Yẽnda yãnda raodg sẽn tilg tẽng zugu, t'a zugã tẽkd saasã. La Wẽnnaam malɛgs n dag n dʋʋd beenẽ la b sigda." 
Genesis28:13 La mikame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yasa raodgã zugẽ n yetẽ yaa: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa fo yaab a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, la a Izak Wẽnnaam. Fo sẽn gãe tẽng ning zugã, mam na n kõ-a-la foom ne f yagensã tɩ y sooge." 
Genesis28:14 Fo yagensã sõor na n yɩɩ wʋsg wa tẽng tom. Fo yagensã na n saag n pida poorẽ la taoore, ne goabg la rɩtgo. Dũniyã nebã fãa na n paama bark foom ne f yagensã zug maasem yĩnga." 
Genesis28:15 La gese, mam mengã bee ne foom. Mam na n gũu foom zĩig ning fãa fo sẽn na n kẽnge, la mam na n talla foom n lebg n wa soolem-kãngã pʋga. Bala, mam ka na n tol n bas foom ye, mam na n pidsa bũmb ning mam sẽn yeel foomã.»" 
Genesis28:16 La a Zakoob sẽn nek a gõeemẽ wã, a yeelame: «Mam mii hakɩɩka, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee zĩ-kãngã, la mam dag n ka mi ye!»" 
Genesis28:17 Dẽ, rabeem yõka yẽnda t'a yeele: «Ad zĩ-kãngã seka zoeese! Bala, zĩ-kãngã sɩd yaa Wẽnd doog bala. Zĩ-kãngã yaa arzãn dignoore.»" 
Genesis28:18 A Zakoob yika yibeoog pĩnda, n dɩk kugr ning yẽnda sẽn kʋgl n gãandã, n vigl tẽn-kugri, n kiig kaam a zugu." 
Genesis28:19 Yẽnda pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ Betɛlle, la tẽngã meng yʋʋr dag n yaa Luuzi." 
Genesis28:20 Yẽnda maana pʋleng n yeele: «Wẽnnaam sã n sɩd bee ne maam, la b sã n gũ maam sorã zug m kẽndã pʋga, la b sã n kõ maam dɩɩb tɩ m dɩ, la b kõ maam fut tɩ m yeelge," 
Genesis28:21 la b sã n sõng maam tɩ mam tõog n lebg n leb n ba wã zakẽ ne bãane, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ mam Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis28:22 Kug-kãngã mam sẽn vigl tɩ yaa tẽn-kugrã na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam doogo. Mam na n yãka bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n kõ maamã piig pʋɩɩr n kõ yãmba.» 
Genesis29:1 A Zakoob yiime n dɩk sor n kẽng neb nins sẽn be yaangã tẽngẽ. 
Genesis29:2 La yẽnda yãnda bulg sẽn be pʋʋg pʋga, tɩ rũm-kʋʋng sul a tãab sẽn yaa rũm-bãooneg gũm bulgã sɛɛga. Bala, rag n yaa bulgẽ be la b wat n yũnugd rũmsã. La mikame tɩ kugr ninga b sẽn tar n pagd bulgã noorã yaa bedr wʋsgo." 
Genesis29:3 Rũmsã fãa rag n wat n tigma taab beenẽ, tɩ b bilg kugrã n serg n bas bulgã noore, tɩ b yũnug piisã, la b lebs kugrã n pag bulgã noore." 
Genesis29:4 A Zakoob soka pe-kɩɩmbã yaa: «M saam-biisi, yãmb yita yɛɛnẽ?» La pe-kɩɩmbã leokame tɩ bãmb yita Haarã." 
Genesis29:5 La a Zakoob sok-b lame tɩ bãmb mii a Nahoor biig a Labã bɩ? La b leokame tɩ n-yẽe, tɩ bãmb mi-a lame." 
Genesis29:6 La yẽnda soka bãmb t'a Labã keemame. Bãmb leokame t'a tara laafɩ. La b yeele: «Ad a Labã bi-pugl a Rasɛll sẽn wat ne a rũmsi.» 
Genesis29:7 A Zakoob yeelame: «Ad-y wĩndgã nan ka kẽ ye. Rũmsã tiging wakat me nan ka ta ye. Rẽ wã, yũnug-y y piisã, la y wãben-ba.»" 
Genesis29:8 La b leoka a Zakoob yaa: «Tõnd ka tõe n maan a boto tɩ rũmsã fãa sã n nan ka tigim taab ye. Yaa rũmsã sẽn wat n tigim taab n sɛ, la b bilgd kugrã n bas bulgã noor tɩ b yaool n yũnug piisã.»" 
Genesis29:9 A Zakoob sẽn nan ket n gomd ne bãmb bal yee, la a Rasɛll sẽn be waoongẽ ne a ba wã piisi. Bala, yaa a Rasɛll n dag n gũud piisã." 
Genesis29:10 A Zakoob sẽn yãnd a ma wã tão a Labã bi-pugl a Rasɛll ne a Labã piisã, yẽnda kolgame n bilg kugrã n bas bulgã noore, n yũnug a yɛsb a Labã piisã." 
Genesis29:11 La a Zakoob moka a Rasɛll n bas n yãbda. 
Genesis29:12 A Zakoob yeela a Rasɛll tɩ yẽnda yaa a Rasɛll baaba wã roagda. Tɩ yẽnda yaa a Rebeka bi-ribla. A Rasɛll wudgame n kuil n tɩ togs a baaba bõn-kãnga. 
Genesis29:13 La a Labã sẽn wʋm tɩ yẽnda tão-poak a Rebeka biig a Zakoob n wa wã, yẽnda wudgame n seg a Zakoob n mobg-a, n mok-a. La a tall-a n kuil a yiri. Yẽnda togsa a Labã bũmbã fãa." 
Genesis29:14 Dẽ, a Labã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Sɩd-sɩdã, fo yaa mam mengã kõabã kõbre, la mam yĩngã neongo.» La yẽnda zĩnda a Labã nengẽ kiuug a yembre." 
Genesis29:15 A Labã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Yaa sɩd tɩ fo yaa mam doagda, la fo ka na n tʋm zaalem n kõ maam ye. Togs maam fo sẽn dat tɩ mam yao foom to-to.»" 
Genesis29:16 A Labã yaool n dag n tara kom-pugli a yiibu. Bi-pugl-kãsmã yʋʋr la a Leya, tɩ bi-pugl-yao wã yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Rasɛlle." 
Genesis29:17 A Leya ninã rag n ka tar pãng ye, la a Rasɛll dag n yaa pʋg-sad-neer hal wʋsgo." 
Genesis29:18 La a Zakoob rag n nonga a Rasɛlle. Dẽ, a Zakoob yeelame: «Mam na n tʋma yʋʋm a yopoe n kõ yãmba, yãmb bi-pugl-yao a Rasɛll yĩnga.»" 
Genesis29:19 A Labã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Mam sã n kõ foom a Rasɛll n são mam sẽn na n dɩk-a n kõ rao a to. Kell n pa ne maam!» 
Genesis29:20 Woto, a Zakoob tʋma yʋʋm a yopoe a Rasɛll yĩnga. Yʋʋm a yopoe wã looga tao-tao wa rasem bilf a Zakoob nifẽ. Bala yẽnda rag n nonga a Rasɛlle." 
Genesis29:21 A Zakoob yeela a Labã yaa: «Kõ-y maam m pagã tɩ mam tʋʋmdã wakat pidame tɩ m dat n peeg m pagã.» 
Genesis29:22 La a Labã tigma soolem-kãng nebã n maan tigri. 
Genesis29:23 La zĩigã sẽn sobge, a Labã peega a bi-pugl a Leya n tɩ kõ a Zakoobe, la a Zakoob kẽe ne-a." 
Genesis29:24 A Labã rɩka a yem-poak a Zilpa n kõ a bi-pugl a Leya t'a yɩ a tʋmtʋmda. 
Genesis29:25 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, bõe la wã, a Zakoob mikame tɩ yaa a Leya. Dẽ, yẽnda yeela a Labã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maan maam woto? Mam sẽn tʋm n kõ yãmbã ka a Rasɛll yĩng la? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb zãmb maam?»" 
Genesis29:26 La a Labã yeelame: «Tõnd zamaanẽ wã, b ka rengd n kuils bi-pugl-yao n bas a kẽemã ye." 
Genesis29:27 Kell n baas f rasem a yopoe wã ne Leya. Rẽ poore, f na yaool n leb n tʋm yʋʋm a yopoe n kõ maam tɩ d yaool n dɩk a yao wã n kõ-fo.»" 
Genesis29:28 Dẽ, sẽn maana, a Zakoob kell n baasa rasem a yopoe wã ne a Leya. La a Labã rɩka a bi-pugl a Rasɛll n kõ a Zakoob t'a maan a paga." 
Genesis29:29 A Labã rɩka a yem-poak a Bila, n kõ a bi-pugl a Rasɛll t'a yɩ a tʋʋmtʋmda." 
Genesis29:30 A Zakoob peega a Rasɛlle, la a rag n nonga a Rasɛll n yɩɩd a Leya. La a Zakoob leb n tʋma a Labã nengẽ yʋʋm a yopoe yɛsa." 
Genesis29:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãnd tɩ b rag n ka nong a Leya wã, bãmb kõ-a-la rogem, la a Rasɛll dag n yaa kiiri." 
Genesis29:32 A Leya rɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Rubɛn. Bala, yẽnda rag n yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãnda mam namsgã, la moasã, mam sɩdã na n nonga maam.»" 
Genesis29:33 La a leb n dɩka pʋg yɛsa, n dog bi-ribla. La a yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋmame tɩ b ka nong maam ye. Dẽ, b kõo maam bi-kãngã.» La a pʋda bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Sɩmyõ." 
Genesis29:34 A leb n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribl yɛsa. La a yeelame: «Moasã wã yẽ, mam sɩdã sũur na yɩ noog ne-ma. Bala, mam doga kom-dibli a tãab n kõ-a.» Yaa rẽndã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b pʋd bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Leevi." 
Genesis29:35 A leb n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla. A Leya yeelame: «Moasã wã, mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yaa rẽ t'a pʋd bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Zʋʋda.» Dẽ, a Leya rogmã sɛɛ woto." 
Genesis30:1 A Rasɛll sẽn mik tɩ yẽnda ka rog a Zakoob biigã, a maana sũ-kiir ne a kẽem a Leya. A Rasɛll yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Kõ-y maam kamba, sã n ka rẽ, mam na n kiime!»" 
Genesis30:2 A Zakoob sũurã yika ne a Rasɛll t'a yeel-a yaa: «Mam bee Wẽnnaam ning sẽn gɩdg-a fo rogmã zĩigẽ la?» 
Genesis30:3 La a Rasɛll yeelame: «Ad mam yem-poak a Bila. Kẽ-y ne-a t'a tõe n dog mam naoã zutu, tɩ mam me tõe n paam kamb yẽnda maasem yĩnga.»" 
Genesis30:4 A Rasɛll rɩka a yem-poak a Bila, n kõ a Zakoob t'a maan a paga. A Zakoob kẽe ne a Bila," 
Genesis30:5 la a Bila rɩka pʋg n dog a Zakoob bi-ribla. 
Genesis30:6 Woto, a Rasɛll yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kõo maam bʋʋm. Bãmb wʋma mam me koɛɛgã n kõ maam bi-ribla.» Rẽ, a pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Dan." 
Genesis30:7 A Rasɛll yem-poak a Bila leb n dɩka pʋg naoor a yiibẽ soab n dog a Zakoob bi-ribla. 
Genesis30:8 A Rasɛll yeelame: «Mam zaba ne m kẽemã Wẽnnaam zabre, la m paama tõogre.» La a Rasɛll pʋda bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Neftali." 
Genesis30:9 A Leya sẽn mik tɩ yẽnda rogmã sɛɛme, a rɩka a yem-poak a Zilpa n kõ a Zakoob t'a maan a paga." 
Genesis30:10 A Leya yem-poak a Zilpa roga a Zakoob bi-ribla. 
Genesis30:11 Dẽ, a Leya yeelame: «Ad yaa zu-noog menga.» La a pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Gaade." 
Genesis30:12 A Leya yem-poak a Zilpa leb n doga a Zakoob biig yɛsa. 
Genesis30:13 La a Leya yeelame: «Ad maam la sũ-noog soaba! N-yẽe, pagbã fãa na n pʋʋsa maam n yeel tɩ maam la sũ-noog soaba!» La a Leya pʋda bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Azɛɛre." 
Genesis30:14 Bɩle wã tigsg wakate, a Rubɛn yiime n tɩ yãnd mandragoor weoogã pʋga. La a yãk-a lame n tall n wa kõ a ma a Leya. Woto, a Rasɛll yeela a Leya yaa: «M kotame tɩ f yãk f biigã mandragoorã n kõ-m wɛ.»" 
Genesis30:15 La a Leya leoka a Rasɛll n yeele: «Fo sẽn deeg mam sɩdã n bas-ma ka sek foom, tɩ f rat n deeg m biigã mandragoor me n paase?» Dẽ, a Rasɛll yeelame: «Beneere! Kõ maam f biigã mandragoorã, la yʋngã, a Zakoob na n wa gãanda ne foom.»" 
Genesis30:16 Zaabr sẽn ta, t'a Zakoob yi weoog n watẽ, a Leya yiime n sega a Zakoob n yeele: «Yãmb tog n wa kẽe ne maam yʋngã, bala, mam dɩka m biigã mandragoor n yao n na deeg yãmba.» Dẽ, badaar yʋngo, a Zakoob gãanda ne a Leya." 
Genesis30:17 La Wẽnnaam leoka a Leya kosgo, la a rɩka pʋg n dog a Zakoob bi-ribla, la rẽ n tõkd a Leya rogem a nu soaba." 
Genesis30:18 La a Leya yeelame: «Wẽnnaam yaoo maam, mam sẽn dɩk m yem-poakã n kõ m sɩdã yĩnga.» Dẽ, a pʋda bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Isakaare." 
Genesis30:19 A Leya leb n dɩka pʋg naoor a yoobẽ soab n dog a Zakoob biiga. 
Genesis30:20 A Leya yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kõo maam kũun sẽn yaa neere. Moasã wã yẽ, mam sɩdã na n paa ne maam, bala, mam doga kom-dibli a yoob n kõ-a.» La a Leya pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Zabulõ." 
Genesis30:21 Rẽ zugẽ, a Leya rɩka pʋg n dog bi-pugla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Wẽnnaam leb n tagsa a Rasɛll yelle, n leok a kosgã n kɩt t'a paam dogem." 
Genesis30:23 A Rasɛll rɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla. La a yeelame: «Wẽnnaam yiisa mam yãndã.» 
Genesis30:24 A Rasɛll pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Zozɛfe. A Rasɛll yeelame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n kõ maam bi-ribl n paase.» 
Genesis30:25 A Rasɛll sẽn wa n dog a Zozɛfã, a Zakoob yeela a Labã yaa: «Kõ-y maam sor tɩ m kuil m ba-yirã." 
Genesis30:26 Kõ-y maam m pagbã ne m kambã, tɩ bala, yaa bãmb yĩng la mam sẽn tʋm yãmb yĩngã. Bas-y-m tɩ m looge. Bala, yãmb meng mii tʋʋm nins mam sẽn tʋm yãmb yĩngã.»" 
Genesis30:27 A Labã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Fo sã n nonga maam, bɩ f kelg maam! Mam tẽn-kugã wilga maam tɩ yaa fo zug maasem yĩng la Wẽnnaam ning mam zug barka." 
Genesis30:28 Dẽ wã, togs maam mam sẽn tog n yao foom bũmb ninga, la mam na n yaoo foom.»" 
Genesis30:29 A Zakoob leoka a Labã yaa: «Yãmb mengã mii mam sẽn tʋm yãmb yĩng to-to, la rũmsã me sẽn lebg to-to mam zug maasem yĩnga." 
Genesis30:30 Bala, yãmb sẽn dag n tar rũms bilf ning sẽn deng mam waoongã fɩɩgame n lebg wʋsgo. La sẽn sɩng ne daar ning mam sẽn kẽ yãmb zakẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga yãmb barka. Woto wã, yaa wakat a wãn la mam na n tʋm m zakã rãmb me yĩnga?»" 
Genesis30:31 A Labã soka a Zakoob yaa: «Yaa bõe la mam tog n kõ foom?» La a Zakoob yeela a Labã: «Yãmb ka tog n kõ maam bũmb ye. Yãmb sã n sake, mam kotame tɩ y maan mam sẽn n na n kos yãmbã n kõ-ma. Mam na n kell n zĩnd n gũu yãmb rũm-bãoonegã." 
Genesis30:32 La rũndã, mam na n kẽe yãmb rũmsã sʋka, tɩ y welg piis nins sẽn yaa pẽrem-pẽrmã ne wad-wadã, ne sẽn ya-b sablã, la bʋʋsã sʋk me, bɩ y maan woto, n welg pẽrem-pẽrmã ne sẽn ya-b wad-wadã. Yaa rẽndã n na n yɩ mam yaoodo." 
Genesis30:33 Wakat sẽn wate, mam pʋ-peelmã n na n wilg mam sẽn yaa ned ninga. Yãmb sã n wa n wa mam nengẽ, n na n ges mam yaoodã, n mik tɩ bʋʋg bɩ peosg n be mam rũmsã sʋk n ka pẽrem-pẽrem, la a ka wad-wada, tɩ peosg be beenẽ n ka sablga, rẽnd mam zuu rũm-bãmba.»" 
Genesis30:34 A Labã yeelame: «Beneere, mam sakame, bɩ d maan wa fo sẽn yeelã.»" 
Genesis30:35 Badaar bala, a Labã welga boees nins sẽn yaa pẽrem-pẽremã, la sẽn yaa wad-wadã ne bʋʋs nins fãa sẽn yaa pẽrem-pẽrmã, la sẽn dag n tẽgs-b pɛɛl-pɛɛlã fãa, ne piis nins sẽn dag n yaa sablã. La a rɩka rũm-bãmb n kɩs a kambã." 
Genesis30:36 La a kɩtame t'a kambã tall-b n zãag ne a Zakoob sẽn tat rasem a tãab kẽnde, la a bas a Zakoob t'a kɩɩmd rũms nins sẽn ketã." 
Genesis30:37 A Zakoob kɛɛga pepliye, noabga la gãaka, raoog n pẽeg b paokã n gilgi, t'a peelmã puki, tɩ yaa sabl-sabla, la pɛɛl-pɛɛla." 
Genesis30:38 La a Zakoob rɩka raadã yẽnda sẽn pẽegã n los gaolgã pʋga, tɩ rũmsã sã n wa na n yũ koomã, bɩ b rʋʋd taaba, tɩ b nensã get raadã." 
Genesis30:39 Rũmsã sẽn dag n dʋʋd taab la b get raadã yĩnga, b rogda kamb sẽn yaa pẽrem-pẽrem ne wad-wada." 
Genesis30:40 La a Zakoob rag n welgda pe-bi wã, n dɩk-b n tees rũms nins sẽn yaa pẽrem-pẽrmã, ne sẽn ya-b sabl n be a Labã rũmsã sʋkã. A Zakoob maana woto n welg a meng rũmsã toore, n ka bas tɩ b naag a Labã rũmsã ye." 
Genesis30:41 La wakat fãa, rũn-yãans nins sẽn tar pãngã sã n wa be rʋʋb ratem pʋga, a Zakoob rɩkda rasabã n ning gaolgẽ wã tɩ rũmsã rʋʋd taaba, la b get rasabã." 
Genesis30:42 La a rũms nins sẽn yaa wagã sã n dat n dʋ taaba, a Zakoob ka ningd rasabã ye, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ rũm-bãmb yɩ a Labã rẽnda, tɩ rũms nins sẽn tar pãngã yaa yẽnda a Zakoob rẽnda." 
Genesis30:43 Woto, rao a Zakoob rag n lebgda rakãag-kẽenga. Yẽnda paama rũms wʋsgo, ne yem-pogse, la yem-daado, ne yʋgma, la bõense." 
Genesis31:1 A Zakoob wa n wʋma a Labã kom-dibli wã sẽn gomd n yetẽ: «A Zakoob reega tõnd ba wã laog zãnga. La yaa tõnd ba wã laogã yĩng n kɩt t'a lebg arzɛk soaba.» 
Genesis31:2 La a Zakoob mikame t'a Labã sũurã ka leb n noom ne yẽnda wa pĩndã ye. 
Genesis31:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Lebg n kuil f ba-yirã, f buudẽ wã, la mam na n zĩnda ne foom.»" 
Genesis31:4 A Zakoob kɩtame tɩ b tɩ bool a Rasɛll ne a Leya sẽn dag n be we-kɛɛng n gũud yẽnda rũm-bãoongã tɩ b wa. 
Genesis31:5 Yẽnda yeel-b lame: «Mam neeme tɩ yãmb ba wã neng ka leb n wẽnd a zaamẽ ne maam ye. La mam ba wã Wẽnnaam zĩnda ne maam. 
Genesis31:6 Yãmb mensã miime tɩ mam tʋma ne m pãnga fãa n kõ y ba wã. 
Genesis31:7 La yãmb ba wã bao n na n zãmba maam n tek mam yaoodã naoor piiga. La Wẽnnaam ka sak n bas tɩ yẽnda maan maam wẽng ye. 
Genesis31:8 Wakat fãa, y baaba sã n yeel tɩ yaa rũm-pẽrem-pẽrmã n yaa mam yaoodo, rũmsã fãa rogda pẽrem-pẽrem, la bãmb sã n yeel tɩ yaa rũm-wad-wadã n na n yɩ mam yaoodo, rũmsã fãa rogda wada." 
Genesis31:9 Wẽnnaam deega yãmb ba wã rũm-kʋʋngã n kõ maam. 
Genesis31:10 Wakat ning rũmsã sẽn wat n na n dʋ taabã, mam zãmsd pʋga mam sã n gese, mam neeme tɩ boees nins sẽn dʋʋd yãansã yaa pẽrem-pẽrem, wad-wada, la bẽesem-bẽesem." 
Genesis31:11 Wẽnnaam malɛɛkã yeela maam zãmsdã pʋgẽ yaa: Zakoobe! Tɩ mam sake. 
Genesis31:12 La malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: Zẽk f neng n gese. Boees nins fãa sẽn dʋʋd yãansã yaa pẽrem-pẽrem, la wad-wada, la bẽesem-bẽesem. Bala, mam yãnda a Labã sẽn maan foom bũmb ningã fãa." 
Genesis31:13 Mam yaa Betɛll Wẽnnaam, zĩig ninga fo sẽn maan tẽn-kugr n ning bark n maan pʋleng ne maamã. Moasã, yik n yi tẽn-kãngã n lebg n kuil fo sẽn dog tẽng ningã.»" 
Genesis31:14 Dẽ, a Rasɛll ne a Leya leoka a Zakoob yaa: «Tõnd ka leb n tar zĩig wall pʋɩɩr d ba wã zakẽ ye. Tõnd ba wã geta tõnd wa sãamba. Bala, bãmb koosa tõnd n dɩ d ligdã." 
Genesis31:15  
Genesis31:16 Wẽnnaam sẽn deeg arzegs nins fãa tõnd ba wã nengẽ n kõ yãmbã yaa tõnd ne d kambã n so. Dẽ wã, bɩ y maan fãa wa Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maanã.»" 
Genesis31:17 A Zakoob yikame n kɩt t'a kambã ne a pagbã zomb yʋgma. 
Genesis31:18 A Zakoob kãaga a rũmsã fãa, la a wʋk a laogã yẽnda sẽn dag n paama zãnga. Yaa ne rũms nins yẽnda sẽn dag n paam Padan-Aram soolmẽ wã. A Zakoob yiime n loog n na n kẽng a Ba a Izak nengẽ Kana tẽnga." 
Genesis31:19 La mikame t'a Labã rag n kẽnga a rũm-bãooneg wõrsgo. A Rasɛll zuu a ba wã wẽn-naandse. 
Genesis31:20 La a Zakoob belga Aram ned a Labã n soos n zoe n ka togs-a ye. 
Genesis31:21 A Zakoob wʋka a sẽn so wã fãa n zoe. Yẽnda yikame n pɩʋʋg kʋɩlgã n kẽng Galaad soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã sẽnẽ. 
Genesis31:22 La rasem a tãabẽ daarã, b tɩ togsa a Labã t'a Zakoob zoeeme." 
Genesis31:23 A Labã peega a saam-biisã tɩ b tũ yẽnda. Bãmb pʋgla yẽnda n kẽn rasem a yopoe kẽnde, n yaool n na n tɩ paam a Zakoob Galaad soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋga." 
Genesis31:24 La Wẽnnaam wa n goma ne Aram ned a Labã yʋng zãmsd pʋgẽ n yeele: «Gũus f meng n da yeel a Zakoob tɩ bũmb ye.» 
Genesis31:25 A Labã paama a Zakoobe. A Zakoob rag n tilga a fu-roogã tãngã zugu. A Labã ne a saam-biisã me tilga b fu-roogã Galaad tãngã zugu. 
Genesis31:26 Dẽ, a Labã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maan a woto wã? Yaa bõe tɩ fo zãmb maam n tall mam kom-pugli wã n loog wa b sẽn yõg yem-pogs tãpẽ?" 
Genesis31:27 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo zãmb maam n soos n zoe n ka togs maam? Fo sã n dag n togsẽ, mam dag n na n kõẽ-la foom sor tɩ f loog ne sũ-noogo, la ne yɩɩla, la sɩlsãgs ne pends wẽebo." 
Genesis31:28 La fo ka sak n yaas tɩ mam pʋʋs m kom-dibli wã ne m kom-pugli wã ye! Fo sẽn maana yaa yalemdo! 
Genesis31:29 Mam tara pãng n tõe n maan yãmb wẽnga, yãmb ba wã Wẽnnaam yeela maam yʋngẽ yaa: ‹gũus f meng n da yeel a Zakoob tɩ bũmb ye!›" 
Genesis31:30 Moasã, fo rɩka f sor n kuiisẽ, tɩ bala, fo ba-yirã yamleoog n tolg n tar-fo, la yaa bõe tɩ fo zu mam wẽn-naandsã?»" 
Genesis31:31 A Zakoob leoka a Labã n yeele: «Mam dag n zoeta rabeem. Bala, mam dag n tagsdame tɩ yãmb na n yõka maam n deeg y kom-pugli wã sẽn be ne maamã ne pãnga." 
Genesis31:32 La yãmb sẽn na n yãnd y wẽn-naandsã ned ning nengẽ wã ka na n vɩɩmd ye! Ade, vees-y mam teedã d saam-biisã taoor n gese, yãmb bũmb bee beenẽ.» La a Zakoob rag n ka bãng t'a Rasɛll zuu wẽn-naandsã ye." 
Genesis31:33 A Labã kẽe a Zakoob fu-roogẽ wã, la a kẽ a Leya fu-roogẽ wã, la a kẽ yem-pogs a yiibã fu-roogẽ wã. La yẽnda ka yãnd bũmb ye. La a sẽn yi a Leya fu-roogẽ wã, a kẽe a Rasɛll fu-roogẽ wã." 
Genesis31:34 A Rasɛll rɩka wẽn-naandsã yẽnda sẽn dag n zu wã, n ning yʋgemdã gaar tẽngre, n zomb a zugu. Dẽ, a Labã veesa fu-roogã zãnga, la a ka yãnd bũmb ye." 
Genesis31:35 La a Rasɛll yeela a baaba yaa: «M soaala, y kabre, ra yik-y y sũur ne maam, mam sẽn ka yik yĩngr yãmb taoorã yĩnga. Bala, mam yãnda m pekre.» A Labã baoome, la a ka yãnd wẽn-naandsã ye." 
Genesis31:36 A Zakoob sũurã puugame t'a yik zabr ne a Labã. Yẽnda yeela a Labã yaa: «Mam beegrã yaa bʋgo? Yaa yel-wẽn-bʋg la mam maan yã, tɩ yãmb pʋgd maam a woto ne sũuri?" 
Genesis31:37 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb sẽn vees mam teedã zãngã, yãmb yãnda bõe beenẽ sẽn yaa yãmb zakã bũmbu? Bɩ y wilg-a maam, mam saam-biisã ne yãmb saam-biisã taoore, tɩ bãmb yɩ tõnd d yiibã bʋ-kaoodba." 
Genesis31:38 Ade, mam zĩnda yãmb nengẽ yʋʋm pisi, la yãmb pe-yãang bɩ y bʋ-yãang ka tol n fab ye, la mam ka tol n wãb yãmb rũmsã pe-raoog baa a yembr nemd ye." 
Genesis31:39 Mam ka tol n tall yãmb rũng we-rũng sẽn kʋ nem-begs n wa kɩs yãmb ye. Rẽ fãa yɩɩ maam n bao n lebse. Wagdr sã n dag n zuk yãmb rũng wĩndg bɩ yʋngo, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam yao." 
Genesis31:40 Wĩndga, tʋʋlg namsa maam, la yʋngo, waood namsa maam! La mam dag n ka tõe n gũs ye." 
Genesis31:41 Yaa yʋʋm pisi la woto mam sẽn zĩnd yãmb yirã. Mam tʋma yãmb yĩng yʋʋm piig la a naase, n yaool n paam yãmb kom-pugli a yiibã, la m tʋm yʋʋm a yoobe, yãmb rũm-bãoonegã gũub yĩnga, la yãmb teka mam yaoodã naoor piiga." 
Genesis31:42 Mam ba wã Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa a Abrahaam Wẽnnaamã, m ba a Izak sẽn zoet a soabã sã n dag n ka beẽ ne maam, yãmb dag n na n kɩtame tɩ mam kuil nug-zaala. La Wẽnnaam yãnda mam paoogrã ne m nusã tʋʋm-toodã, dẽ, yʋngẽ, bãmb kaoo yel-kãng bʋʋdo.»" 
Genesis31:43 Dẽ, a Labã leoka a Zakoob n yeele: «Kom-pugli wã yaa mam kom-pugli, kom-dibl-bãmbã me yaa mam kamba, rũm-kʋʋngã me yaa mam rũmsi. Bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn ne wã yaa maam n so. Rẽ wã, bõe la mam tõe n maan rũndã m kom-pugli wã ne kamb nins bãmb sẽn dogã yĩnga?" 
Genesis31:44 Woto yĩngã, bɩ f wa tɩ d maan kaool ne taaba, tɩ kaset be maam ne foom sʋka!»" 
Genesis31:45 Dẽ, a Zakoob rɩka kugr n vigli." 
Genesis31:46 La a yeela a saam-biisã tɩ b wʋk kuga. La bãmb rɩka kugã n zam taaba. La bãmb rɩɩ b rɩɩbã kug-rʋrã zugu. 
Genesis31:47 La a Labã pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ ‹Yegaar-Sahaduta›, la a Zakoob pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ ‹Galɛɛde›." 
Genesis31:48 A Labã yeelame: «Kug-rʋr-kãngã yaa kaset maam ne foom sʋk rũndã!» Yaa rẽndã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b pʋd a yʋʋrã tɩ Galɛɛde, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹kaset rʋre.›" 
Genesis31:49 B boonda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr me tɩ Mispa. Bala, a Labã rag n yeelame «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũus maam ne foom, baa tõnd sã n wa n ka leb n yãnd taaba." 
Genesis31:50 Fo sã n nams mam kom-pugli wã, wall f peeg pagb a taab n paase, ka ninsaal n na n ges yel-kãng yell ye, yaa Wẽnnaam mengã n na n yɩ maam ne fo kaset soaba, rẽ wã, bɩ f gũusi.»" 
Genesis31:51 A Labã leb n yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Ad kug-rʋrã ne tẽn-kugrã mam sẽn ning maam ne foom sʋkã. 
Genesis31:52 Kug-rʋrã yaa kaseto, la tẽn-kugrã me yaa kaset tɩ mam ka na n yõsg kug-rʋrã n kẽ fo toadgẽ ye, la fo me ka na n yõsg kug-rʋrã ne tẽn-kugrã n kẽ mam toadgẽ wã n maan wẽng ye." 
Genesis31:53 Bɩ a Abrahaam ne a Nahoor Wẽnnaamã, ne bãmb ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã yɩ bʋ-kaood tõnd d yiibã sʋka.» A Zakoob maana pʋleng ne yẽnda ba a Izak sẽn zoet a soabã yʋʋre." 
Genesis31:54 A Zakoob maana maoong tãngã zug n bool a saam-biisã tɩ b wa naag yẽnda n dɩ. Bãmb sẽn dɩ rɩɩbã n sɛ, b gãanda tãngã zug yʋn-kãnga." 
Genesis32:1 La a Labã sãda beoogo, n mogs a kom-pugli wã ne a kom-dibli wã, la a ning-b barka. Rẽ zugẽ, a Labã lebg n kuila a yiri." 
Genesis32:2 A Zakoob kell n dɩka a sor n looge. La Wẽnnaam malɛgs n seg-a. 
Genesis32:3 A Zakoob sẽn yãnd malɛgsã, a yeelame: «Kaanẽ yaa Wẽnnaam sik zĩiga.» La a pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ ‹Mahanayim.›" 
Genesis32:4 A Zakoob tʋma neb tɩ b reng yẽnda taoor n kẽng a kẽem a Ezayu nengẽ, Seyɩɩr tẽngã sẽn be Edom soolmã pʋgẽ wã." 
Genesis32:5 A Zakoob yeel-b lame: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n yeel m soaal a Ezayu tɩ bũmb ninga: ‹Yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Zakoob yeelame yaa: ‹mam zĩnda sãand a Labã zakẽ n kaoos be n tãag rũndã. 
Genesis32:6 Mam tara niigi, bõense, ne rũm-bãoonego, la m tar yem-daado la yem-pogse. Yaa rẽ tɩ mam tʋmd neb tɩ b wa togs m soaalã, n kos-a t'a sak n deeg-ma.› »" 
Genesis32:7 Koe-toagsdbã lebg n wa a Zakoob nengẽ n wa yeel yaa: «Tõnd kẽnga yãmb kẽem a Ezayu nengẽ, la bãmb me yikame n kẽnd n wat n na n seg yãmba. La neb kobs-naas n tũud-ba.»" 
Genesis32:8 La rabeem-kãseng yõka a Zakoob hal t'a yɛɛse. Dẽ, a Zakoob welga neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã sul a yiibu, la a welg rũm-bãoonegã ne rũm-bɛdã, la yʋgma wã me sul a yiibu. A Zakoob rag n tagsdame n yetẽ:" 
Genesis32:9 «A Ezayu sã n wa n zab n tõog sull a yembre, sull a to wã paamdame n zoe n põse.»" 
Genesis32:10 A Zakoob yeelame: «M yaab a Abrahaam Wẽnnaam, ne m ba a Izak Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yeela maam yaa: ‹Lebg n leb f tẽngẽ wã, leb f ba-yirã tɩ mam na n maan-f-la neere.›" 
Genesis32:11 Mam paooda wʋsgo, dẽ, mam ka zems tɩ paam maan-neer ning ne pʋ-peelem ninga yãmb sẽn maan mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã yĩngã ye. Bala, mam sẽn wa n na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, rag n yaa dasaar bal la mam tara. La moasã, mam lebga sul a yiibu." 
Genesis32:12 Woto yĩngã, mam kot-y lame, tɩ y fãag maam m kẽem a Ezayu nugẽ! Bala, mam zoeta rabeem t'a na n wa kʋ maam ne m pagbã ne b kambã!" 
Genesis32:13 Yãmb yaool n yeela maam tɩ: ‹Mam na n maan-f-la neere, n kɩt tɩ f yagensã lebg wʋsg wa ko-kãsengã noor bĩisrã, tɩ b ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye.› »" 
Genesis32:14 A Zakoob paa beenẽ n gãand yʋn-kãnga. A Zakoob yãka bũmb nins yẽnda sẽn so wã n na n kõ a kẽem a Ezayu. 
Genesis32:15 A Zakoob yãka bʋ-yãans kobessi, la a yãk boees pisi, la pe-yãans kobessi, ne pe-raad pisi," 
Genesis32:16 la a yãk yʋgem-yãans pis-tã ne b kamb sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ, la a yãk nag-yãans pis-naase, ne lols piiga, la a yãk bõn-yãans pisi ne bõn-daad piiga." 
Genesis32:17 La a Zakoob welga rũmsã buud fãa toor-toor n dɩk-b fãa n kɩs a tʋmtʋmdbã, la a yeel-b yaa: «Bɩ yãmb lʋɩ mam taoore, la y bas vɩʋʋg rũm-sull ne a to sʋka.»" 
Genesis32:18 A Zakoob yeela pipi tʋmtʋmdã yaa: «Mam kẽem a Ezayu sã n seg foom n sok-f tɩ fo yaa yɛ neda, la f rabda yɛɛnẽ, tɩ la yaa ãnda n so rũm-kʋʋngã sẽn be fo taoorã," 
Genesis32:19 bɩ f yeel-a tɩ yaa yẽnda tʋmtʋmd a Zakoob n so. La f yeel-a tɩ yaa kũun a Zakoob sẽn kɩs tɩ b kõ yẽnda a Ezayu. Tɩ la mam meng bee poorẽ n watẽ.» 
Genesis32:20 A Zakoob goma ne yiib soabã, la ne tãab soabã, la ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n pʋgd rũmsã a woto, n yeel-b tɩ yẽnda kẽem a Ezayu sã n seg bãmb bɩ b yeel-a a woto." 
Genesis32:21 A Zakoob yeelame: «Yeel-y-yã-a tɩ yẽnda tʋmtʋmd a Zakoob bee poorẽ n pʋgd yãmb n watẽ.» Woto fãa yaa t'a Zakoob rag n tagsdame n yetẽ: «Mam sã n tʋm kũun tɩ reng taoor n tɩ kõ a Ezayu, tõe t'a sũurã sigi. Dẽ, mam tõe n yaool n pʋglame n kẽng a nengẽ. La tõeeme t'a sak n deeg maam sõama.»" 
Genesis32:22 Dẽ, kũunã renga a Zakoob taoor n looge. La yẽnda mengã kell n paa sikã zĩigẽ yʋn-kãnga." 
Genesis32:23 A Zakoob yika badaar yʋngo, n peeg a pagb a yiibã, la a peeg a yem-pogs a yiibã, la a peeg a kamb piig la a yembrã, n dʋʋg Yabok kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde." 
Genesis32:24 A Zakoob peega bãmb n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, n kɩt tɩ b tall yẽnda sẽn so wã fãa n pɩʋʋge." 
Genesis32:25 A Zakoob kell n paa beenẽ yẽnda a yembre. La rao n wa n mao ne yẽnda hal tɩ beoogã vẽege. 
Genesis32:26 La raoã sẽn mik tɩ yẽnda ka na n tõog a Zakoobã, a sɩɩsa a Zakoob kɩʋʋlgã, la a kɩʋʋlgã rãmba wakat ning yẽnda sẽn dag n maood ne raoã." 
Genesis32:27 Raoã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Bas maam tɩ m loog tɩ beoogã rat n vẽegame.» A Zakoob leok-a lame: «Yãmb sã n ka ning mam zug barka, mam kõn bas yãmb tɩ y loog ye.»" 
Genesis32:28 Dẽ, raoã soka a Zakoob yaa: «Fo yʋʋr la a bõe?» A Zakoob leokame tɩ yẽnda yʋʋr la a Zakoobe." 
Genesis32:29 La raoã yeela a Zakoob yaa: «B ka na n leb n bool fo yʋʋr t'a Zakoob ye. B na n boola foom t'a Israyɛlle. Bala, fo maoo ne Wẽnnaam, la f mao ne ninsaalb n paam tõogre.»" 
Genesis32:30 Woto, a Zakoob yeela raoã yaa: «Mam kota yãmb tɩ y togs maam yãmb yʋʋre.» La raoã yeelame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo sokd n dat n bãng mam yʋʋre?» La yẽnda ninga a Zakoob zug bark zĩ-kãngã." 
Genesis32:31 A Zakoob boola zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Peniyɛlle. Bala, yẽnda yeelame tɩ yẽnda yãnda Wẽnnaam neng n ket n vɩ." 
Genesis32:32 La sõorã sẽn wa n na n pukã, rẽ t'a Zakoob pɩʋʋga Penuwɛll kʋɩlgã. La a Zakoob rag n kẽnd n keoosdame, yẽnda kɩʋʋlgã sẽn dãmbã yĩnga." 
Genesis32:33 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩte, tɩ Israyɛll buudã ka rɩt kɩʋʋlg gĩind hal tɩ ta rũndã. Bala, Wẽnnaam sɩɩsa a Zakoob kɩʋʋlgã gĩindi." 
Genesis33:1 A Zakoob sẽn zẽk a neng n gese, a nee a Ezayu sẽn wate, tɩ neb kobs-naas tũud-a. Woto, a Zakoob pʋɩɩ kambã n kɩt t'a Leya kambã bʋʋg-a, t'a Rasɛll kambã bʋʋg-a, tɩ yem-pogs a yiibã me kamb bʋʋg-ba." 
Genesis33:2 A Zakoob kɩtame tɩ yem-pogsã ne b kambã lʋɩ taoore, t'a Leya ne a kambã pʋgle, t'a Rasɛll ne a Zozɛf yaool n pʋgl poorẽ." 
Genesis33:3 La yẽnda mengã lʋɩɩ bãmb fãa taoore, n wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽng naoor a yopoe n yaool n na n ta a kẽemã sẽn beẽ wã." 
Genesis33:4 La a Ezayu wudgame n seg yẽnda, n mobg-a, n mok-a. La bãmb b yiibã fãa naaga taab n yãbe." 
Genesis33:5 La a Ezayu sẽn zẽk a neng n yãnd pagbã ne kambã, a sokame: «Yaa yɛ rãmb la sẽn pʋgd foom woto wã?» La a Zakoob leokame: «Yaa kamb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn maan nimbãan-zoeer n kõ mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã.»" 
Genesis33:6 Yem-pogsã ne b kambã kolgame n wõgemde. 
Genesis33:7 La a Leya me ne a kambã kolgame n wõgemde. Rẽ poore, a Zozɛf ne a ma a Rasɛll me kolgame n wõgemde." 
Genesis33:8 A Ezayu sokame yaa: «Fo rat n maana bõe ne rũm-kʋʋng ning mam sẽn segã?» A Zakoob leok-a lame: «Yaa sẽn na n kõ yãmb m soaalã tɩ y tõe n sak n deeg-ma.» 
Genesis33:9 A Ezayu yeela a Zakoob yaa: «M yao sõngo, mam zoe n tarame tɩ seke, dẽ wã, tall f rẽnda.»" 
Genesis33:10 Dẽ, a Zakoob leokame: «Ayo! Yãmb sã n sɩd basa maam taale, mam kotame tɩ y sak n deeg kũunã mam meng sẽn kõt yãmbã. Bala, rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam sẽn yãnd yãmb nengã yaa wa mam sẽn yãnd Wẽnnaam neng bala, la wilgdame tɩ yãmb sak n deega maam sõama." 
Genesis33:11 Dẽ wã, bɩ y sak n deeg mam kũunã mam sẽn yãk n kõt yãmbã, tɩ bala, Wẽnnaam ninga mam zug bark hal tɩ mam tar mam sẽn dat fãa.» La a Zakoob pẽdga a Ezayu hal t'a wa sak n deeg a kũunã." 
Genesis33:12 A Ezayu yeelame: «Yik tɩ d looge. Yik tɩ d sɩng kẽna, la maam n na n lʋɩ taoore.»" 
Genesis33:13 A Zakoob leoka a Ezayu yaa: «M soaala, yãmb la sẽn mi tɩ mam kambã ka tar pãngã la! Sẽn paas me, yaa tɩ mam tara piis ne niig sẽn tar kom-peend sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ. Dẽ wã, b sã n na n modg bãmb tɩ b kẽn daarã tõre, rũm-bãoonegã fãa na n kiime." 
Genesis33:14 Sẽn yaa woto wã, m soaala, m kot-y lame tɩ y reng maam taoore, tɩ mam na n kẽna bãanem-bãanem, n zems rũmsã sẽn be ne maamã pãnga, la sẽn zems kambã me sẽn tõe n kẽne, hal n wa n ta yãmb nengẽ Seyɩɩr tẽnga.»" 
Genesis33:15 A Ezayu yeelame: «Sã n yaa woto, mam na n yãka neb kẽer sẽn tũud maamã n bas ne foom.» La a Zakoob leokame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dat n maan boto? Mam kotame tɩ m soaalã sak mam kosgã bala.»" 
Genesis33:16 Badaar bala, a Ezayu rɩka Seyɩɩr tẽngã sor n lebg n kuili." 
Genesis33:17 A Zakoob yikame n kẽng Sukote. La yẽnda mee a roog beenẽ, la a maan yãg n kẽes a rũmsã. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b pʋd zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ ‹Sukote.›" 
Genesis33:18 A Zakoob sẽn yi Padan-Aramã, a taa Sɩkɛm sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã ne laafɩ. La yẽnda kolga tẽngã n tilgi." 
Genesis33:19 A Zakoob raa zĩig a Hamoor sẽn yaa a Sɩkɛm ba wã kamb nengẽ, wakɩ-koeems koabga, n tilg a fu-roogã beenẽ." 
Genesis33:20 A Zakoob maana tẽn-kugr beenẽ n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ ‹Ɛll-Elohe-Israyɛll.› 
Genesis34:1 Daar a yembre, a Leya sẽn dog a Zakoob bi-pugl ning t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Dina wã yiime n na n tɩ ges tẽngã kom-pugli." 
Genesis34:2 Hevi ned a Hamoor sẽn yaa tẽngã naabã biig a Sɩkɛm yãnda a Dina, la a yõk-a lame n tɩ gãand-a, n sãam-a." 
Genesis34:3 A Sɩkɛm yamã rag n loee ne a Zakoob biig a Dina. Yẽnda rag n nonga pʋg-sadã hal wʋsgo, rẽ, yẽnda goma gom-nood n na n noog a Dina sũuri." 
Genesis34:4 A Sɩkɛm tɩ yeela a ba a Hamoor yaa: «Kos-y pʋg-sad-kãngã n kõ maam tɩ m maan m paga.» 
Genesis34:5 La a Zakoob rag n wʋmame t'a Sɩkɛm sãama yẽnda bi-pugl a Dina, la sẽn seg tɩ yẽnda kom-dibli wã rag n bee weoogẽ wã ne yẽnda rũmsã yĩnga, yẽnda kell n sĩnda a noor n gũ a kambã waoongo." 
Genesis34:6 A Sɩkɛm ba a Hamoor yiime n na n tɩ gom ne a Zakoobe. 
Genesis34:7 A Zakoob kom-dibli wã sẽn yi weoogẽ wã n wa, b wʋma yellã. Dẽ, bãmb sũyã sãama hal wʋsgo, la b sũyã yikame, a Sɩkɛm sẽn maan tʋʋm-beed ning a Israyɛll buudã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga. Yaa yẽnda sẽn gãand a Zakoob bi-pugl a Dina wã, yaool n dag n yaa bũmb sẽn yaa kisgu." 
Genesis34:8 A Hamoor goma ne bãmb n yeel yaa: «Mam biig a Sɩkɛm yamã loee ne yãmb bi-puglã hal wʋsgo. Mam kot-y lame tɩ y rɩk-a n kõ m biigã t'a maan a paga. 
Genesis34:9 Woto, tõnd tõe n maana zood ne taaba, yi-kãadmã yĩnga, tɩ yãmb dɩkd y kom-pugli n kõt tõndo, la y peegd tõnd kom-pugli n maand y pagba." 
Genesis34:10 Dẽ, yãmb tõe n zĩnda ne tõndo, tɩ soolmã lebg yãmb me rẽnda. Zĩnd-y ne tõnd n leeb n paam yõod soolmã pʋga.»" 
Genesis34:11 A Sɩkɛm yeela a Dina baaba wã ne a Dina kẽem-dãmbã yaa: «Yãmb sã n sake, yãmb sẽn na n yeel maam tɩ m maan bũmb ningã fãa mam na n maan-a lame." 
Genesis34:12 Yeel-y maam tɩ m wa ne pʋg-belong yaood wʋsgo, la m wa ne kũuni, la mam na n kõo yãmb bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n yeel maamã. Yãmb we n sak n kõ maam pʋg-sadã tɩ m maan m pag bala.»" 
Genesis34:13 A Zakoob kambã maaga b meng n leoka a Sɩkɛm ne a ba a Hamoor ne sɩlem, a Sɩkɛm sẽn sãam bãmb tão a Dina wã yĩnga." 
Genesis34:14 A Zakoob kambã yeela bãmb yaa: «Tõnd ka tõe n dɩk d tão wã n kõ ned sẽn ka kẽ bãong t'a maan a pag ye, yõwã yaa yãnd ne tõndo." 
Genesis34:15 Tõnd ka tõe n sak yãmb sẽn datã, sã n ka tɩ raop nins fãa sẽn be yãmb sʋkã n kẽ bãong n lebg wa tõndo." 
Genesis34:16 Sã n yɩ woto, tõnd na yaool n sak n dɩka d kom-pugli n kõ yãmba, la d peeg yãmb kom-pugli n maan d pagba. La tõnd na n zĩnda yãmb sʋka, n lebg buud a yembr ne yãmba." 
Genesis34:17 La yãmb sã n ka sak n maan wa tõnd sẽn yeelã n kẽ bãongo, tõnd na n wa peega d bi-puglã n looge.»" 
Genesis34:18 La bãmb sẽn gom to-to wã yɩ a Hamoor ne a biig a Sɩkɛm noogo. 
Genesis34:19 Bi-bɩɩg a Sɩkɛm ka yals n kaoos n maan bõn-kãng ye, bala, yẽnda rag n nonga a Zakoob bi-puglã ne a sũur fãa. B rag n nanda a Sɩkɛm n yɩɩd a ba wã zakã rãmb fãa." 
Genesis34:20 A Hamoor ne a biig a Sɩkɛm kẽnga b tẽngã noor n tɩ sõs ne nebã n yeele: 
Genesis34:21 «Nin-bãmbã yaa nin-sõama ne tõndo. Wa-y tɩ bas-b tɩ b zĩnd tõnd tẽngã pʋg n leebdẽ, bala, tõnd tẽngã yalem tõe n seka bãmb me zĩndgu. Dẽ, tõnd tõe n peega bãmb kom-pugli wã n maan d pagba, la d rɩk d kom-pugli wã me n kõ bãmb tɩ b maan b pagba." 
Genesis34:22 La sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ nin-bãmbã sak n zĩnd ne tõnd n lebg buud a yembr ne tõndo, rẽndame tɩ tõnd tẽngã raopa fãa sak n kẽ bãong wa bãmb sẽn kẽedã." 
Genesis34:23 Bãmb rũmsã ne b paoongã, la b rũm-bãoonegã fãa kõn lebg tõnd dẽnd sɩda? Tõnd we n sak b sẽn datã bal tɩ b zĩnd ne tõndo.»" 
Genesis34:24 Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n yi n kẽng tẽngã noorã saka a Hamoor ne a biig a Sɩkɛm sẽn yeelã. Dẽ, b kẽesa tẽngã raop nins fãa sẽn dag n be-b tẽngã noorã bãongo." 
Genesis34:25 La ra-tãtẽ daar sẽn ta, tɩ bãongã ket n zabdẽ, a Zakoob kamb a yiibã, a Sɩmyõ ne a Leevi sẽn yaa a Dina tãopã yikame n bob b zabr sʋʋs n soos n kẽ tẽngã tɩ ned ka bãng ye, la b kʋʋ tẽngã raopã fãa." 
Genesis34:26 La bãmb kʋʋ a Hamoor ne a biig a Sɩkɛm ne sʋʋga, la b peeg a Dina sẽn dag n be a Sɩkɛm doogẽ wã n yi n looge." 
Genesis34:27 A Zakoob kambã kẽngame n tɩ kʋ tẽngã nebã, la b zɛ b sẽn so wã, tɩ bala, b sãama bãmb tão-poaka." 
Genesis34:28 Bãmb yõga rũm-bãoonegã, ne rũm-bɛdã ne bõensã, la b wʋk bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, ne wetẽ wã." 
Genesis34:29 Bãmb wʋka tẽngã laogã, la b yõg b kambã ne b pagbã, la b wʋk bũmb nins fãa sẽn be rotã pʋsã." 
Genesis34:30 Dẽ, a Zakoob yeela a Sɩmyõ ne a Leevi yaa: «Yãmb baoo yell n kõ maam, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã nebã, ne Kana nebã, la Ferɛɛz-rãmbã na n kisg maam. Mam nebã ka wʋsg ye, b sõorã yaa bilfu. Tẽngã nebã na n tigma taab n wa zab ne maam n sãam maam ne m zakã rãmba.»" 
Genesis34:31 Bãmb leoka a Zakoob yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, a zemsame tɩ bãmb maan tõnd tão wã wa pʋg-yoodr sɩda?»" 
Genesis35:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Yik n kẽng Betɛll n tɩ zĩnd be. Fo sã n ta beenẽ, bɩ f lugl tẽn-kugr n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam ning sẽn dag n vẽneg b meng ne foom wakat ning fo sẽn wa n zoet n na n põs f kẽem a Ezayu wã.»" 
Genesis35:2 A Zakoob yeela a zaka rãmb ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be yẽnda zakẽ wã yaa: «Yiis-y wẽn-naandsã sẽn be yãmb nengẽ wã, la y yɩlg y mense, la y tek futu." 
Genesis35:3 Tõnd na n yikame n kẽng Betɛlle. D sã n ta be, mam na n lugla tẽn-kugr n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam ning sẽn leok maam m sũ-sãangã wakatã, la b yãag maam m so-toakã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Genesis35:4 Bãmb wʋka b wẽn-naandsã b sẽn dag n tarã, ne b tʋblondã n kɩs a Zakoobe. La a Zakoob rɩk-b lame n bus terebẽnt tɩɩsã sẽn pẽ ne Sɩkɛmã tẽngre." 
Genesis35:5 Rẽ poore, bãmb loogame. La Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ rabeem yõk tẽms nins sẽn pẽ bãmbã nebã, la b ka babs a Zakoob kambã ye." 
Genesis35:6 La a Zakoob ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã taa Luuz sẽn yaa Betɛllã, beenẽ yaa Kana soolem." 
Genesis35:7 La a Zakoob mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ, n pʋd zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Ɛll-Betɛlle, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Betɛll Wẽnnaam.› Bala, yaa zĩ-kãng la Wẽnnaam vẽneg b meng ne yẽnda wakat ning yẽnda sẽn wa n zoet n na n põs a kẽem a Ezayu wã." 
Genesis35:8 A Rebeka bi-yaool a Deboora kiime, la bãmb mum-a-la Betɛll longẽ wã, sɛn tɩ-kẽeng tẽngre, la b pʋd zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ yãbr tɩɩga." 
Genesis35:9 A Zakoob sẽn yi Padan-Aram n wa wã, Wẽnnaam leb n vẽnega b meng ne yẽnda, la b ning-a-la barka." 
Genesis35:10 Wẽnnaam yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Fo yʋʋr la a Zakoobe. La b ka na n leb n bool foom t'a Zakoob ye, fo yʋʋr na n lebga a Israyɛlle.» Dẽ, Wẽnnaam pʋda a Zakoob t'a Israyɛlle." 
Genesis35:11 Wẽnnaam yeela a Zakoob yaa: «Mam yaa Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam. Bɩ f paam dogem n fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo, fo na n yɩɩ bu-kãsenga, la buud wʋsg na n yii fo pʋgẽ. La rĩm-dãmb na n yii fo pʋgẽ." 
Genesis35:12 Mam na n kõo foom tẽng ninga, mam sẽn dag n kõ a Abrahaam ne a Izakã. La fo loogr zugẽ, mam na n kõo fo yagensã tẽn-kãngã.»" 
Genesis35:13 La Wẽnnaam zẽkame n loog n bas yẽnda zĩig ninga bãmb sẽn dag n gom ne yẽnda wã. 
Genesis35:14 A Zakoob baoo kugr n lugl tẽn-kugr zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn gom ne yẽnda wã, la a maana maoong kug-kãng zugu, la a walg kaam a zugu." 
Genesis35:15 A Zakoob pʋda zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n gom ne yẽnda wã yʋʋr tɩ Betɛlle. 
Genesis35:16 Bãmb yii Betɛll n na n looge, la bãmb sẽn kolg Efrate, a Rasɛll rogame. A Rasɛll rogmã yɩɩ toog wʋsg ne-a." 
Genesis35:17 La a Rasɛll sẽn wa n kʋmd rogmã wakate, pʋg-roagsã yeel-a lame yaa: «Da zoe rabeem ye, fo leb n paama bi-ribla!»" 
Genesis35:18 La wakat ning a Rasɛll sẽn namsd n dat n ki wã, a pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Bɛn-Oni, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹mam toog bi-ribla›, la a ba a Zakoob pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Benzame, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹mam nug-rɩtg bi-ribla.›" 
Genesis35:19 A Rasɛll kiime, la b mum-a-la Efrat tẽngã sorẽ. B boonda zĩ-kãng rũndã-rũndã tɩ Betlehɛm." 
Genesis35:20 A Zakoob baoo kugr n lugl a Rasɛll yaoogã zugu. La a Rasɛll yaoogã kugr keta beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
Genesis35:21 A Israyɛll yikame n kẽng n tɩ tilg a yirã Migdall-Edɛɛr taoore. 
Genesis35:22 A Israyɛll sẽn wa n ket n be tẽn-kãngã, a Rubɛn kẽngame n tɩ gãand a ba wã pʋg-rɩkdg a Bila. La a Israyɛll wʋma yellã. A Zakoob kambã sõor yaa bãmb piig la a yiibu:" 
Genesis35:23 Ad a Leya kamba: Yaa Rubɛn sẽn yaa a Zakoob pipi biigã, a Sɩmyõ, a Leevi, a Zʋʋda, a Isakaar ne a Zabulõ." 
Genesis35:24 Ad a Rasɛll kamba: Yaa a Zozɛf ne a Benzame. 
Genesis35:25 Ad a Rasɛll yem-poak a Bila kamba: Yaa a Dan ne a Neftali. 
Genesis35:26 Ad a Leya yem-poak a Zilpa kamba: Yaa a Gaad ne a Asɛɛre. Bãmb yaa a Zakoob kom-dibli nins a sẽn dog Padan-Aram soolmẽ wã. 
Genesis35:27 A Zakoob waa mamre, a ba a Izak nengẽ, Kiryat-Arba sẽn be Ebrõ soolmẽ wã, zĩig ning a Abrahaam ne a Izak sẽn dag n be sãand weoogã." 
Genesis35:28 A Izak vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pis-nii n yaool n maan kaalem. 
Genesis35:29 A Izak kiime tɩ b mum-a n naag a saam-dãmba. La rẽ t'a Izak kʋʋlame n lebg nin-kẽem-kʋdre. Yaa a Izak kambã, a Ezayu ne a Zakoob n mum-a." 
Genesis36:1 Ad a Ezayu b sẽn boond t'a Edomã roogo: 
Genesis36:2 A Ezayu rɩgsa a pagbã Kana kom-pugli wã sʋka. Yẽnda pagbã yaa a Ada sẽn yaa Hɛt ned a Elon bi-pugla, ne a Oholibama sẽn yaa Hevi ned a Sɩbeyõ ne a Ana bi-pugla," 
Genesis36:3 la a Basmat sẽn yaa a Ismayɛll bi-pugla n yaa a Nebayot tão-poakã. 
Genesis36:4 A Ada roga a Ezayu biig a Elifaaze, t'a Basmat rog a Rewuyɛlle." 
Genesis36:5 La a Oholibama roga a Yewuusi, a Yalam ne a Koore. Bãmb yaa a Ezayu kom-dibli nins a sẽn dog Kana soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis36:6 A Ezayu peega a pagbã ne a kom-dibli, la a kom-pugli wã ne neb nins fãa sẽn yaa yẽnda zakã nebã, ne a niigã la a rũmsã fãa, la a wʋk a paoongã a sẽn dag n paam Kana soolmẽ wã zãnga, n yi n loog n kẽng tẽng a to n zãag ne yẽnda yao a Zakoobe." 
Genesis36:7 Bala, bãmb laogã rag n yaa wʋsg tɩ bãmb ka tõe n zĩnd ne taab ye, sẽn paas me, tẽngã pʋg bãmb sẽn yaa sãamb a pʋgẽ wã rag n ka leb n sekd bãmb rũmsã sẽn yaa wʋsgã ye." 
Genesis36:8 Dẽ, a Ezayu tɩ zĩnda Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋga, la yaa a Ezayu n yaa Edom." 
Genesis36:9 Woto yaa a Ezayu sẽn yaa Edom buudã yaabã sẽn be soolem nins sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã yagense. 
Genesis36:10 Ad a Ezayu kom-dibli wã yʋy: Yaa a Ezayu pag a Ada biig a Elifaaze, ne a Ezayu pag a Basmat biig a Rewuyɛlle." 
Genesis36:11 A Elifaaz kamb yaa a Teman, a Omaare, a Sefo, a Gatam ne a Kenaaze." 
Genesis36:12 A Timna rag n yaa a Ezayu biig a Elifaaz pʋg-rɩkdga. A Timna roga a Elifaaz biig a Amalɛke. Yaa a Ezayu pag a Ada kambã la woto. 
Genesis36:13 Ad a Rewuyɛll kamba: Yaa a Nahate, a Zeera, a Sama ne a Miiza. Yaa bãmb la a Ezayu pag a Basmat kamba." 
Genesis36:14 Ad a Sɩbeyõ biig a Ana bi-pugl a Oholibama sẽn yaa a Ezayu pagã kamba: Yẽnda roga a Ezayu kamba, a Yewuki, a Yalam ne a Koore." 
Genesis36:15 Ad a Ezayu yagensã nanambse. Ad a Ezayu bi-ribl-kãseng a Elifaaz kamba: Yaa naab a Tema, ne naab a Omaare, la naab a Sefo, ne naab a Kenaaze," 
Genesis36:16 la naab a Koore, ne naab a Gatam, n paas naab a Amalɛke. Yaa bãmb n yaa a Elifaaz kamb n yaa nanambs n be Edom soolmẽ wã. Yaa a Ada yagens la bãmba." 
Genesis36:17 Ad a Ezayu bi-ribl a Rewuyɛll kamba. Bãmb yaa naab a Nahate, naab a Zeera, ne naab a Hama n paas naab a Miiza. Bãmb yaa a Rewuyɛll kamb sẽn yaa nanambse, n be Edom soolmẽ wã. Bãmb yaa a Ezayu pag a Basmat kamba." 
Genesis36:18 Ad a Ezayu pag a Oholibama kamba. Yaa naab a Yewuki, naab a Yalam ne naab a Koore. Bãmb yaa a Ana bi-pugl a Oholibama sẽn yaa a Ezayu pagã kambã nanambse." 
Genesis36:19 Woto n yaa a Ezayu kambã ne b kambã sẽn yaa nanambsã. Yaa a Ezayu la b sẽn boond tɩ Edomã. 
Genesis36:20 Ad Hoor ned a Seyɩɩr kambã sẽn yaa tẽngã nebã yʋya. Yaa a Lotan, a Soballe, a Sɩbeyõ, a Ana," 
Genesis36:21 a Dison, a Ɛtsɛɛre, ne a Disan. Bãmb yaa a Seyɩɩr kambã sẽn yaa Hoor nebã sẽn be Edom soolmẽ wã nanambse." 
Genesis36:22 A Lotan kamb yaa a Hori ne a Eman. A Timna n yaa a Lotan tão-poaka. 
Genesis36:23 Ad a Soball kamba: Yaa a Alvã, a Manahate, a Eballe, a Sefo ne a Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Ad a Sɩbeyõ kamba: Yaa a Ava, ne a Ana. Yaa Ana-kãng n yãnd ko-bundum sẽn yaa tʋʋlg weoogã pʋga, wakat ning a sẽn wa n gũud a ba a Sɩbeyõ bõensã." 
Genesis36:25 Ad a Ana kamba: Yaa a Dison ne a Ana bi-pugl a Oholibama. 
Genesis36:26 Ad a Disan kamba: Yaa a Hemdan, a Ɛkban, a Yitran ne a Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Ad a Ɛtsɛɛr kamba: Yaa a Bilhan a Zaavan ne a Akã. 
Genesis36:28 Ad a Disan kamba: Yaa a Uts ne a Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Ad Hoor nebã nanambse: Yaa naab a Lotan, naab a Soballe, naab a Sɩbeyõ, naab a Ana," 
Genesis36:30 naab a Dison, naab a Ɛtsɛɛre, ne naab a Disan. Yaa bãmb n yaa Hoor nebã nanambse, n be Seyɩɩr soolmẽ wã." 
Genesis36:31 Ad nanambs nins sẽn dɩ naam Edom soolmã pʋgẽ wã. Yaa sẽn deng tɩ ned nan ka yɩ rĩm n soog Israyɛll nebã ye. 
Genesis36:32 Nanambsã la woto: Yaa a Bewoor biig a Bela, n yɩ Edom naaba, la yẽnda tẽngã yʋʋr dag n boondame tɩ Dinhaba." 
Genesis36:33 A Bela kiime t'a Botsra biig a Zeera biig a Zobaab reeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam. 
Genesis36:34 A Zobaab kiime tɩ Temna tẽngã ned a Husam reeg a zĩig n dɩ naam. 
Genesis36:35 A Husam kiime t'a Bedaad biig a Hadaad reeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam. Yaa yẽnda n zab ne Madiyã nebã n tõog-b Moaab weoogã pʋgã. Yẽnda tẽngã yʋʋr dag n boondame tɩ Aviti. 
Genesis36:36 A Hadaad kiime, la Masreka ned a Samla reega yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam." 
Genesis36:37 A Samla kiime, la kʋɩlgã noor ned a Rehobot biig a Sayull n deeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam." 
Genesis36:38 A Sayull kiime, la a Akboor biig a Baall-Hanaan n deeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam." 
Genesis36:39 A Akboor biig a Baall-Hanaan kiime t'a Hadaar reeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naam. Yẽnda tẽngã yʋʋr dag n boondame tɩ Pawu, t'a pagã yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Mehetabeyɛlle. Yẽnda yaa a Mezahaad bi-pugl a Matrɛɛd bi-pugla." 
Genesis36:40 Ad a Ezayu yagensã nanambs yʋy wa sẽn zems b rotã, la wa sẽn zems b soolmã, la wa b yʋyã sẽn yaa to-to wã. Yaa naab a Timna, naab a Alva, naab a Yetete," 
Genesis36:41 naab a Oholibama, naab a Ela, naab a Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 naab a Kenaaze, naab a Teman, naab a Mibtsaare," 
Genesis36:43 naab a Magdiyɛlle, ne naab a Iram. Woto n yaa Edom soolem nanambsã ne b zĩisi. Yaa a Ezayu sẽn yaa Edom nebã yaabã soolem." 
Genesis37:1 A Zakoob zĩnda Kana, tẽng ning yẽnda ba wã sẽn dag n zĩnd sãandã." 
Genesis37:2 Ad a Zakoob roogã kibare: A Zozɛf sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm piig la a yopoe, a rag n tũuda a kẽem-dãmbã n gũud piisi, la bʋʋse. La a rag n yaa bi-ribl-bilf bala. A Zozɛf rag n bee ne a ba wã pagb a Bila ne a Zilpa kambã. La a Zozɛf rag n dɩkda a kẽem-dãmbã gom-yoodã n kẽnd n togsd a ba wã." 
Genesis37:3 La a Israyɛll rag n nonga a Zozɛf n yɩɩd a kamb a taabã fãa. Bala, yaa yẽnda kʋʋlem wakate, la a rog a Zozɛfe. A Zakoob rag n sẽe fu-gʋlem n kõ a Zozɛfe." 
Genesis37:4 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã sẽn mik tɩ b baaba nonga a Zozɛf n yɩɩd bãmb fãa wã, bãmb kisg-a lame. Dẽ, bãmb ka leb n tar mo-noog ne-a ye." 
Genesis37:5 A Zozɛf zãmsa zãmsdo, n dɩk n togs a kẽem-dãmbã, la bãmb kisg-a lame n paase." 
Genesis37:6 A Zozɛf yeel-b lame: «Kelg-y mam zãmsdã! 
Genesis37:7 Tõnd dag n bee pʋʋgẽ ne taab n gĩnd ka-gĩna, la mam ka-gĩndã yikame n yals yĩngri, la yãmb ka-gĩnã gũbga mam ka-gĩndã n wõgemded a taoore.»" 
Genesis37:8 Yẽnda kẽem-dãmbã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fo tagsdame tɩ fo na n sooga tõnd bɩ? Bɩ fo tagsdame tɩ f na n yɩɩ tõnd zu-soaba?» La bãmb leb n kisga a Zozɛf n yɩɩg pĩnda, yẽnda zãmsdã ne a goamã yĩnga." 
Genesis37:9 A Zozɛf leb n zãmsa zãmsd a to yɛsa, n leb n dɩk n togs a kẽem-dãmbã. Yẽnda yeelame: «Ges-y-yã! Mam leb n zãmsa zãmsdo! Ade, wĩndgã ne kiuugã la ãds piig la a yembr n dag n wõgemded mam taoore.»" 
Genesis37:10 A Zozɛf rɩka zãmsdã n togs a ba wã ne a kẽem-dãmbã. La a baaba zab-a lame n sok-a yaa: «Yaa bõe zãmsd buud la fo sẽn zãmsã? Fo tagsdame tɩ f ma ne f kẽem-dãmbã ne mam mengã na wa n wõgemda tẽng fo taoor bɩ?» 
Genesis37:11 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã maana sũ-kiir ne yẽnda. La a Zozɛf ba a Zakoob rag n bĩngda yel-kãensã a sũurẽ. 
Genesis37:12 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã wa n kẽnga Sɩkɛm n na n tɩ wãben b ba wã rũm-bãoonego. 
Genesis37:13 A Israyɛll yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Fo kẽem-dãmbã bee Sɩkɛm n wãbend rũmsã. Wa tɩ m tʋm-f b nengẽ!» La a Zozɛf yeelame tɩ b tʋm-a. 
Genesis37:14 A Israyɛll yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ ges f kẽem-dãmbã tara laafɩ, la f bãng bũmb sã n ka tar rũm-bãoonegã! La f lebg n wa togs-ma.» Dẽ, yẽnda zĩnda Ebrõ tãngã longẽ n tʋma a Zozɛfe, la a Zozɛf kẽnga Sɩkɛm." 
Genesis37:15 Rao a yembr n yãnd a Zozɛf t'a be weoogã pʋg n gilimdẽ. Raoã soka a Zozɛf tɩ yaa bõe la yẽnda baooda. 
Genesis37:16 La a Zozɛf leokame: «Mam baooda m kẽem-dãmba. M kot-y lame tɩ y wilg maam b sẽn be zĩig ning n wãbend b rũmsã wɛ!» 
Genesis37:17 Raoã yeelame: «Bãmb yii zĩ-kãngã. Bala, mam dag n wʋmda b sẽn gomd tɩ b na n kẽnga Dotã.» A Zozɛf pʋga a kẽem-dãmbã nao n tɩ yãnd-b Dotã." 
Genesis37:18 Bãmb yãnda a Zozɛf t'a ket n be yɩɩga. La a Zozɛf sẽn nan ka ta bãmb sẽn beẽ wã, bãmb yẽsa ne taab n dat n kʋ-a." 
Genesis37:19 Ad bãmb sẽn gom ne taab n yeele: «Ad zãmsdã naab sẽn wate. 
Genesis37:20 Wa-y tɩ d kʋ-a n lob bulgẽ, la d kuil n tɩ yeel tɩ yaa we-rũng n yõk-a n wãbe, la d ges yẽnda zãmsdã sẽn na yɩ bũmb ninga.»" 
Genesis37:21 La a Rubɛn sẽn wʋm b goamã, yẽnda yãka yam n na n fãag a Zozɛfe. A Rubɛn yeel-b lame: «Wa-y tɩ d ra kʋ-a ye!»" 
Genesis37:22 A Rubɛn leb n yeelame: «Da raag-y-yã a zɩɩm ye. Lob-y-yã-a bulgã pʋg weoogẽ wã, la y ra sɩɩs-a ye.» A Rubɛn dag n maana woto n na n fãag a Zozɛf bãmb nusẽ n tall-a n tɩ lebs a baaba." 
Genesis37:23 Dẽ, a Zozɛf sẽn ta a kẽem-dãmbã nengẽ, b yõk-a lame n yeeg a fu-gʋlmã a sẽn dag n yerã." 
Genesis37:24 Bãmb yõka a Zozɛf n lob bulgã pʋga. La bulgã rag n yaa bul-koɛɛng sẽn ka tar koom ye. 
Genesis37:25 Dẽ poore, bãmb zĩndame n na n dɩ b rɩɩbo. Bãmb sẽn zẽk n gese, b yãnda Ismayɛll buudã neb sẽn yi Galaad n tũud taab wʋsg n watẽ. Bãmb yʋgma wã rag n zɩlga tɩdare, ne kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la wisdu, n tar n dabd Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis37:26 La a Zʋʋda yeela a ba-biisã yaa: «Tõnd sã n kʋ d yao wã n mume, a nafda tõnd ne bõe?" 
Genesis37:27 Wa-y tɩ d koos-a ne Ismayɛll buudã nebã, la d ra maan-a bũmb ye. Bala, yẽnda yaa tõnd yao, a yaa bũmb a yembr ne tõndo.» La a Zʋʋda ba-biisã sak n deega a koɛɛgã." 
Genesis37:28 Woto, Madiyã toandbã sẽn wa n loogdẽ wã, bãmb yiisa a Zozɛf bulgẽ wã, n koos-a ne Ismayɛll buudã neb wanzuri ligd pisi, la b talla a Zozɛf n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis37:29 La a Rubɛn sẽn lebg n wa bulgẽ wã n wa mik t'a Zozɛf ka be beenẽ wã, a pãrsa a futu," 
Genesis37:30 n lebg n leb a yaopã nengẽ n tɩ sok-b yaa: «Mam na n kẽe yɛ? Biigã ka leb n be bulgẽ wã ye!» 
Genesis37:31 Dẽ, bãmb kʋʋ bull n dɩk a Zozɛf fuugã, n los zɩɩmẽ wã." 
Genesis37:32 La bãmb dɩka fuugã n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kɩs b baaba n yeele: «Tõnd yãnda woto n dɩke, reeg-y n ges-y yaa yãmb biigã fuugã bɩ, bɩ ka rẽnda?»" 
Genesis37:33 La a Zakoob bãngame tɩ yaa a Zozɛf fuugã, la a yeelame: «Yaa mam biigã fuugu, yaa we-rũng n wãb-a! B fãsa a Zozɛfe!»" 
Genesis37:34 A Zakoob pãrsa a futu, n sẽgen boto, n yãb a Zozɛf kʋʋrã n kaoos rasem wʋsgo." 
Genesis37:35 A Zakoob kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã fãa yikame n bels a Zakoobe, la a ka sak belsgã ye. Yẽnda yeelame: «Mam na n yãbame n ki n bʋʋg m biig a Zozɛf kɩɩm-kulgu.» La yẽnda yãba a biigã yĩnga." 
Genesis37:36 Madiyã nebã tɩ koosa a Zozɛf Ezɩpt tẽng ne a Potifaar sẽn dag n yaa Faarõ sõgen-kãsengã, n yaa gũudbã naabã." 
Genesis38:1 Wakat-kãnga, a Zʋʋda zãagame n bas a ba-biisã n kẽng Adulam tẽng rao a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Ira nengẽ." 
Genesis38:2 La beenẽ, a Zʋʋda yãnda Kana ned a Suwa bi-pugl n peeg n maan a paga, la a kẽe ne-a." 
Genesis38:3 La pagã rɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla, la b pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Ɛɛre." 
Genesis38:4 Pagã leb n dɩka pʋg yɛs n dog bi-ribla, la b pʋda bi-kãng yʋʋr t'a Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Pagã leb n doga bi-ribl a to n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Sela. Pagã sẽn wa na n dog bi-kãngã, rẽ t'a Zʋʋda rag n bee Keziibi." 
Genesis38:6 A Zʋʋda peega pag yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Tamaar n kõ a bi-ribl-kãseng a Ɛɛr t'a maan a paga. 
Genesis38:7 A Zʋʋda bi-ribl-kãseng a Ɛɛr ka maan sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a ki. 
Genesis38:8 Dẽ, a Zʋʋda yeela a Onan t'a peeg a kẽem a Ɛɛr pagã, n kẽ ne-a n dog kamb a kẽemã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Genesis38:9 La a Onan sẽn ges tɩ kambã ka na n yɩ yẽnda kambã yĩnga, a sã n na n kẽ ne a kẽemã paga, a basdame tɩ rogmã bõn-buud koom raagd tẽnga, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n da rog kamb a kẽemã yʋʋr yĩng ye." 
Genesis38:10 La yẽnda sẽn dag n maan bũmb ningã rag n ka noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ yẽnda me ki. 
Genesis38:11 Dẽ, a Zʋʋda yeela a bi-pag a Tamaar yaa: «Kell n tɩ zĩnd pʋg-kõt f ba wã zakẽ, hal tɩ mam biig a Sela bɩ.» A Zʋʋda rag n tagsdame tɩ yẽnda biig a Sela me na n kii wa a kẽem-dãmbã sẽn ki wã. Woto, a Tamaar lebg n kuila a ba wã zakẽ n tɩ zĩndi." 
Genesis38:12 La kaoosg pʋgẽ, a Suwa bi-puglã sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda pagã wa n kiime. La a Zʋʋda sũ-sãangã sẽn wa n sɛ, yẽnda ne a zoa a Ira sẽn yaa Adulam nedã tũu taab n kẽng Timna, zĩig ning b sẽn wõrsd a Zʋʋda rũm-bãoonegã." 
Genesis38:13 La b togsa a Tamaar t'a sɩdã ba rabda Timna n na n tɩ wõrs a rũm-bãoonego. 
Genesis38:14 Woto, a Tamaar yikame n yees a pʋg-kõtã fut n dʋʋge, la a bao fuug n pil a mengã n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Enayim tẽnga noore, Timna sorã zugu. Bala, pagã yãame t'a Sela bɩɩme, la b ka rɩk yẽnda n kõ a Sela t'a maan a pag ye." 
Genesis38:15 A Zʋʋda sẽn yãnd-a wã, yẽnda tagsame tɩ yaa pʋg-yoodre. Bala, a nengã rag n pilame." 
Genesis38:16 La a Zʋʋda bʋdgame n bao-a n yeel-a yaa: «Wa tɩ mam data foom.» Bala, a Zʋʋda ka bãng tɩ yaa yẽnda bi-pagã ye. La pagã soka a Zʋʋda yaa: «Yãmb na n kõo maam bõe la y yaool n kẽ ne maam?»" 
Genesis38:17 La a Zʋʋda leokame: «Mam na n yãka bull mam rũmsã sʋk n tʋm tɩ b wa kõ-fo.» La pagã yeelame: «Mam datame tɩ yãmb bao bũmb n gãneg ne maam hal tɩ ta yãmb sẽn na n tʋm bullã tɩ wa wã!»
