Genesis38:18 La a Zʋʋda sokame: «Bõe la fo rat tɩ mam gãneg ne foom?» La pagã yeelame: Mam datame tɩ yãmb rɩk y nugbĩngã, y sẽbdgã ne y rasaarã y sẽn zãadã n gãneg ne maam la y yaool n kẽ ne maam.» A Zʋʋda sɩd gãnega bõn-kãens fãa ne-a, la a kẽ ne-a, la a rɩka a Zʋʋda pʋga." 
Genesis38:19 La pagã yikame n looge, n tɩ yees a futã, n dɩk pʋg-kõtã fut n lebs n yeelge." 
Genesis38:20 A Zʋʋda yõka bullã, n tʋm a zoa wã sẽn yaa Adulam nedã, n yeel-a t'a tɩ kɩs pagã, la a reeg a te-gãnegdsã pagã nengẽ n wa. La a zoa wã kẽngame n ka tɩ yãnd pagã ye." 
Genesis38:21 La yẽnda soka tẽngã neb yaa: «Wẽn-naands zĩigẽ pʋg-yoodrã sẽn dag n be Enayim tẽngã noor n zĩ sorã kɩrengã bee yɛɛnẽ?» Bãmb leoka yẽnda tɩ wẽn-naands zĩigẽ pʋg-yoodr ka be beenẽ ye. 
Genesis38:22 La a lebg n leba a Zʋʋda nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a: «Mam ka yãnd pagã ye. Zĩ-kãng nebã meng yeelame tɩ bãmb ka yãnd wẽn-naands zĩigẽ pʋg-yoodr beenẽ ye.» 
Genesis38:23 Dẽ, a Zʋʋda yeelame: «Bɩ a tall bũmb ning sẽn be yẽnda nengẽ wã! Wa tɩ d ra bao yãnd n kõ d meng ye. Ade, mam tʋma bullã, la fo ka tɩ yãnd-a ye.»" 
Genesis38:24 La sẽn wa n zems kiuug a tãab rẽ zugẽ, b wa n togsa a Zʋʋda t'a bi-pag a Tamaar yoome n dɩk yoob pʋga. Dẽ, a Zʋʋda yeelame tɩ b tall-a n yi tẽngã kɩreng n yõog-a bugum." 
Genesis38:25 La b sẽn wa n tar-a n yitã, a tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a sɩdã ba yaa: «Yaa ned ning sẽn so te-bãmbã wã n kõ maam pʋgã! Mam kot-y lame tɩ y ges yaa ãnda n so nugbĩngã, sẽbdgã ne dasaarã.»" 
Genesis38:26 A Zʋʋda sẽn yãnd teedã, a bãngame. Dẽ, a yeelame: «Pagã yaa nin-tɩrg n yɩɩd maam. Bala, mam ka rɩk-a n kõ m biig a Sela ye.» La a Zʋʋda ka leb n kẽ ne-a yɛs ye." 
Genesis38:27 Pagã rogem wakat sẽn ta, b mikame tɩ yaa kinkirs n be pʋgẽ wã." 
Genesis38:28 La a sẽn wa n dogdẽ wã, a yembr n tud a nugu, la pʋg-roagsã gãd-a lame n bao gĩs-miuug n loe a nugã, n yeel tɩ yaa yõwã n deng n yi pipi." 
Genesis38:29 La a sẽn foog a nugã, a to wã me yiime. La pʋg-roagsã yeelame: «Fo modgame n yi ne pãnga!» Dẽ, b pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Perɛtse." 
Genesis38:30 Rẽ poore, biig ning nug b sẽn loe ne gĩs-miuugã yaool n yiime. La b pʋda yẽnda yʋʋr t'a Zeera." 
Genesis39:1 B talla a Zozɛf n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga. La Ezɩpt tẽng rao a Potifaar sẽn yaa Faarõ sõgen-kãsengã, n leb n yaa gũudbã naabã raa a Zozɛf Ismayɛll buudã neb nengẽ. Yaa Ismayɛll buudã neb n tall a Zozɛf n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis39:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Zozɛfe. A Zozɛf rag n paamda tõogr ne bũmbã fãa. Yẽnda rag n bee Ezɩpt nedã sẽn yaa yẽnda soaalã zakẽ. 
Genesis39:3 A Zozɛf soaalã yãame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne a Zozɛfe. La a Zozɛf sã n dat n maan bũmbu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame t'a tõogdẽ." 
Genesis39:4 Yẽnda soaalã rag n nong-a lame, la a kɩtame t'a Zozɛf tʋmd yẽnda tʋʋma, la a kɩt t'a lebg yẽnda zakã yel-gɛta, la a rɩk a bũmbã fãa n ning a Zozɛf nugẽ." 
Genesis39:5 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat ninga a Potifaar sẽn kɩt t'a Zozɛf lebg yẽnda zakã yel-gɛt n get yẽnda bũmbã fãa yellã tɛka, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga Ezɩpt nedã zak bark a Zozɛf zug maasem yĩnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab barkã rag bee a Potifaar sẽn so bũmb nins fãa wã zugu, ne a zakã pʋga, la bũmb nins sẽn be weoogẽ wã me zugu." 
Genesis39:6 A Potifaar dɩka yẽnda sẽn so wã fãa n bas a Zozɛf nugẽ. Yẽnda ka leb n maand baa fɩ, sã n ka rɩɩbã yẽnda sẽn dɩtã bala. A Zozɛf rag n yaa ra-sãn-beelle, n yaa neere." 
Genesis39:7 Sẽn beẽ n beẽ, a Zozɛf soaalã pag nif rag n bee a Zozɛf zugu, la a yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Wa gãand ne maam!»" 
Genesis39:8 La a Zozɛf zãgsame n yeel a soaalã pag yaa: «Gese, mam sẽn be mam soaalã nengẽ tɛka, bãmb ka leb n get bũmb baa yembr yell b zakã pʋg ye. Bãmb dɩka bũmb nins fãa b sẽn so wã n ning mam nugẽ." 
Genesis39:9 Ned ka be zakẽ ka, n yaa nin-kãseng n yɩɩd maam ye. La m soaalã ka gɩdg maam ne bũmb baa a yembre, sã n ka foom bala. Bala fo yaa bãmb paga. Rẽ wã, mam na n yɩɩ a wãn n maan yel-be-kẽen-kãngã n beeg Wẽnnaam?»" 
Genesis39:10 Pagã rag n gomda ne a Zozɛf daar fãa n pẽdgd-a la a kelgd-a ye. A ka sak n gãand ne-a wall a lagem ne-a ye. 
Genesis39:11 La daar a yembre, a Zozɛf kẽe roogẽ n na n maan a tʋʋmde. La mikame, tɩ zakã ned baa a yembr dag n ka be zakã pʋg ye." 
Genesis39:12 Dẽ, pagã gãda a Zozɛf fuugã n yeel-a: «Wa gãand ne maam!» La a Zozɛf wudgame n yi n bas fuugã pagã nugẽ." 
Genesis39:13 La pagã sẽn yãnd t'a Zozɛf basa fuugã yẽnda nugẽ n wudg n yi yɩngã," 
Genesis39:14 a boola a tʋmtʋmdbã n yeel-b yaa: «Ges-y-yã, b talla Ebre nedã n wa ka t'a na n yaal tõndo! Yẽnda waa mam nengẽ n dat n gãand maam, la mam wɩka m meng n kelme." 
Genesis39:15 La a sẽn mik tɩ mam zẽka m koɛɛg n kelemdẽ wã, a basa a fuugã ne maam la a wudg n yi yɩnga.»" 
Genesis39:16 La pagã bĩnga fuugã a nengẽ, hal t'a Zozɛf soaalã lebg n wa yiri." 
Genesis39:17 Pagã goma ne a Potifaar wa a sẽn dag n gom pĩndã, n yeel yẽnda yaa: «Ebre yem-daoog ning yãmb sẽn tall n wa ka wã waa mam nengẽ n na n yaal maam!" 
Genesis39:18 La mam sẽn zẽk m koɛɛg n kelma yĩnga, a wudgame n yi n bas a fuugã ne maam.»" 
Genesis39:19 A Zozɛf soaalã sẽn wʋm pagã sẽn togs yẽnda yem-daoogã sẽn dag n dat n maan bũmb ningã," 
Genesis39:20 a sũur yika wʋsgo, la a kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Zozɛf n kẽes bi-bees roogo. B kẽesa a Zozɛf roog ninga rĩma sẽn kẽesd a bi-beesã. A Zozɛf kell n paa bi-bees roogẽ beenẽ." 
Genesis39:21 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Zozɛfe, la b wilga a Zozɛf b nonglem. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ bi-bees roog gũudbã naab nong a Zozɛfe." 
Genesis39:22 Dẽ, bi-bees roog gũudbã naab rɩka bi-beesã fãa n ning a Zozɛf nugẽ. La b sã n dat n maan bũmbu, a Zozɛf n kõt noor tɩ b yaool n maane." 
Genesis39:23 Bi-bees roog gũudbã naab rag n ka leb n get a Zozɛf sẽn maand bũmb ningã baa yembr yell yɛs ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Zozɛfe. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Zozɛf paamd tõogr ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maandã." 
Genesis40:1 Bõn-kãensã fãa loogr zugẽ, daar a yembre, Ezɩpt rĩmã bõn-yũudlã kɩta, ne a rɩɩbã yel-gɛtã beega b soaalã sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩma." 
Genesis40:2 Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ sũur yika ne a sõgen-kãensã b yiibã: Yaa sõgen-kãsengã sẽn yaa bõn-yũudlã kɩtã, ne rɩɩbã yel-gesg taoor soabã." 
Genesis40:3 La rĩma kɩtame tɩ b yõg-b n kẽng gũudbã naab zakã sẽn be bi-bees roogã zak pʋgã. La b kẽes-b-la zĩig ninga b sẽn dag n pag a Zozɛfã. 
Genesis40:4 Bi-bees roog gũudbã naab rɩka bãmb n gũnug ne a Zozɛfe, t'a sõng-ba. La bãmb zĩnda bi-bees roogã pʋg n kaoos bilfu." 
Genesis40:5 Daar a yembre, yʋn-yɛng pʋgẽ, Ezɩpt rĩmã bõn-yũudl kɩtã ne a rɩɩbã yel-gɛtã sẽn dag n be bi-bees roogã, zãmsa zãmsdo. La ned kam fãa zãmsd yaa toore, t'a bilgrã me yaa toore." 
Genesis40:6 La vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, a Zozɛf waa bãmb nengẽ, la a mikame tɩ bãmb nensã gãnemame." 
Genesis40:7 Woto, a Zozɛf soka Faarõ sõgen-kambã sẽn be ne yẽnda bi-bees roog a soaalã zakẽ wã n na n bãng a võore. Yẽnda sok-b lame yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb nensã gãnem dũndã a woto?»" 
Genesis40:8 Bãmb leoka yẽnda yaa: «Tõnd zãmsa zãmsdo, la ned ka be sẽn na n bilg tõnd a võor ye.» A Zozɛf yeela bãmb yaa: «Ka Wẽnnaam n so bũmbã fãa bilgr la? Togs-y maam yãmb zãmsdã.»" 
Genesis40:9 Bõn-yũudl kɩtã togsa a Zozɛf a zãmsdã n yeel yaa: «Mam zãmsdã pʋga, mam yãndame tɩ reezẽ tɩɩg n be mam taoorã." 
Genesis40:10 La reezẽ tɩɩgã rag n tara wil a tãabo. La a tobame n ning puudu, n wom reezẽ-gĩn sẽn bɩ n mooge." 
Genesis40:11 La Faarõ bõn-yũudlã wamd dag n bee mam nugẽ. La mam dɩka reezẽ-gĩnã n wẽk a koomã n ning Faarõ bõn-yũudlã wamdẽ, n dɩk wamdã n kɩs Faarõ t'a reege.»" 
Genesis40:12 A Zozɛf yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ad yãmb zãmsdã bilgri: Wil a tãabã wilgda rasem a tãabo. 
Genesis40:13 Keta rasem a tãabo, tɩ Faarõ yiis yãmb n zẽk y zugu, n leb n lebs yãmb y tʋʋmdã pʋga. La yãmb na n leb n kõo Faarõ a bõn-yũudlã wa yãmb sẽn dag n maand pĩndã, y sẽn wa n yaa bãmb bõn-yũudl kɩtã." 
Genesis40:14 La mam kota yãmb tɩ y sã n wa n be y sũ-noogã pʋga, bɩ y tẽeg mam yelle, n maan-m neere, n gom ne Faarõ mam yelle, n kɩt tɩ b yiis-m do-kãngã pʋga!" 
Genesis40:15 Bala, b yõka maam Ebre nebã tẽngẽ tall n wa ka, la kaanẽ wã me, b kẽesa maam bi-bees roog tɩ m yaool n ka maan baa fɩ ye!»" 
Genesis40:16 Rɩɩbã yel-gesg taoor soabã sẽn yãnd tɩ zãmsdã bilgr yaa sõama wã, a yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Sã n yaa ne mam zãmsdã pʋga, mam yãame tɩ mam tʋka pet a tãab sẽn pid ne buri." 
Genesis40:17 La peoog ning sẽn tɩ be-a hal zugẽ wã, yaa rɩɩb nins fãa rɩɩb yel-gɛtbã sẽn segend n kõt Faarõ n dag n be beenẽ. La bõn-yɩgdɩ n wa n dɩ rɩɩbã sẽn be peoogã pʋg mam zugẽ wã.»" 
Genesis40:18 A Zozɛf leoka yẽnda n yeel yaa: «Ad fo zãmsdã bilgri: Pet a tãabã mamsda rasem a tãabo. 
Genesis40:19 Ade, keta rasem a tãabo, tɩ Faarõ zẽk fo zug tɩ loog f sẽn date, la b na n luula foom ra-luk zugu, tɩ bõn-yɩgdɩ rɩ fo nemdã.»" 
Genesis40:20 Rasem a tãabã daare, rag n yaa Faarõ rogem tẽegr daare, b maana tigr tʋmtʋmdbã fãa yĩnga. Faarõ kɩtame tɩ b yiis a bõn-yũudlã kɩtã ne a rɩɩb yel-gɛtã n kẽes a tʋmtʋmdbã sʋka." 
Genesis40:21 Rĩm a Faarõ leb n lebsa bõn-yũudl kɩtã a tʋʋmdã pʋga, tɩ yẽnda leb n kɩt Faarõ a bõn-yũudlã." 
Genesis40:22 La a kɩtame tɩ b luul rɩɩb yel-gɛtbã taoor soabã wa a Zozɛf sẽn dag n bilg a zãmsdã võor to-to n kõ-a wã. 
Genesis40:23 La bõn-yũudlã kɩtã ka tẽeg a Zozɛf yell ye. Yẽnda yĩma a Zozɛf yelle. 
Genesis41:1 Yʋʋm a yiib loogr zugẽ, rĩm a Faarõ zãmsa zãmsdo, n yãnd tɩ yẽnda tɩ yasa Nill kʋɩlgã noore." 
Genesis41:2 Yẽnda yãnda nag-yãan-nobds a yopoe sẽn yaa neeba, tɩ b yi kʋɩlgẽ wã. La b rag n bee kʋɩlgã noor n wãbd yamdo." 
Genesis41:3 Rẽ zugẽ, a leb n yãnda nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn yaa waga, n ka neeb ye. Bãmb me yii koomẽ wã, la b bʋʋga nag-yãan-nobds a yopoe wã sẽn yaa neebã, n tɩ yals n yegl bãmb kʋɩlgã noore." 
Genesis41:4 La nag-yãan-wagã sẽn ka neebã wãba nag-yãan-neeb a yopoe wã sẽn nobã. La Faarõ nekame. 
Genesis41:5 La yẽnda leb n gũsame n zãms zãmsd a yiibẽ soaba. Yẽnda yãnda kaaf a yembr sẽn wom ka-zu-bɛd a yopoe sẽn bɩ sõama n yaa neeba. 
Genesis41:6 Dẽ poore, rĩmã leb n yãndame tɩ ka-zu-faad a yopoe, sẽn wẽnd yaang sob-tʋʋlgã sẽn wẽ tɩ b faage, n pʋgl pĩnd dãmbã n yi." 
Genesis41:7 La ka-zut nins sẽn faagã rɩɩ ka-zu-bɛd nins sẽn bɩ sõama wã. Dẽ, Faarõ nekame. Rag yaa zãmsdo." 
Genesis41:8 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, Faarõ pɛlengã yɩkame t'a kɩt tɩ b bool tɩtã-rãmb fãa ne Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩtã-rãmb zãng tɩ b wa. La Faarõ togsa bãmb yẽnda zãmsdã sẽn yɩ to-to. La bãmb ned baa a yembr ka tõog n na n bilg zãmsd baa a yembr võor n kõ Faarõ ye." 
Genesis41:9 Dẽ, sõgen-kãsengã sẽn yaa bõn-yũudlã kɩtã goma ne Faarõ n yeele: «Rũndã, mam na n tẽega m kongrã yelle!" 
Genesis41:10 Faarõ sũur dag n wa n yika ne b tʋmtʋmdbã, tɩ b kɩt tɩ b kẽes maam bi-bees roog gũudbã naab nengẽ. La yɩɩ maam ne rɩɩbã yell gesg taoor soabã." 
Genesis41:11 Maam ne yẽnda, tõnd naaga taab n zãms zãmsd yʋng a yembre, la ned kam fãa zãmsd dag n tara a võore." 
Genesis41:12 La Ebre-rãmbã bi-bɩɩg a yembr n dag n be ne tõnd bi-bees roogã pʋga, n dag n yaa gũudbã naab yem-daoogo. Dẽ, tõnd togsa yẽnda d zãmsdã, la a bilga tõnd ned kam fãa a zãmsd võore." 
Genesis41:13 La bũmbã fãa kell n yɩɩ wa yẽnda sẽn bilg zãmsdã to-to n kõ tõndã. Bala, Faarõ leb n lebsa maam m tʋʋmdẽ, la b kɩt tɩ b luul ned a to wã sẽn yaa rɩɩbã seglg taoor soabã.»" 
Genesis41:14 Dẽ, Faarõ tʋmame tɩ b tɩ tall a Zozɛf n wa. La b tɩ yiisa a Zozɛf bi-bees roogẽ wã tao-tao. B põnga a Zozɛf zugu, n tek a futu, n tall-a n kẽng Faarõ nengẽ." 
Genesis41:15 Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Mam zãmsa zãmsdo, la ned baa a yembr ka tõog n bilg maam a võor ye! La mam wʋmame tɩ b sã n togs foom zãmsdo, fo tõe n bilga a võore.»" 
Genesis41:16 A Zozɛf leoka rĩma n yeele: «Ka maam n na n bilg a võorã ye! Yaa Wẽnnaam n na n bilg zãmsdã võor n kõ Faarõ!» 
Genesis41:17 Dẽ, Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Mam zãmsdã pʋga, mam yãndame tɩ m dag n yasa Nill kʋɩlg noore." 
Genesis41:18 La mam yãnda nag-yãan-nobds a yopoe sẽn yaa neeba, tɩ b yi koomẽ wã n wãbd yamd kʋɩlgã noore." 
Genesis41:19 La nag-yãan-wag a yopoe n pʋgl bãmb n yi, la b ka neeb ye. Mam zɩ n yãnd nag-yãan-wag a woto buud Ezɩpt soolmã pʋg ye." 
Genesis41:20 La nag-yãan-wagã sẽn ka neebã wãba nag-yãan-nobds a yopoe nins sẽn deng n yi wã zãnga. 
Genesis41:21 Nag-yãan-wagã vela nag-yãan-nobdsã n ket n yas wa bãmb ka vel bũmb ye. Bãmb kell n yaa wag wa pĩndã. Dẽ poore, mam nekame." 
Genesis41:22 Ade, mam leb n zãmsame yɛsa, n yãnd ka-zu-bɛd a yopoe sẽn yaa neeb sẽn yi kaaf a yembr zugu." 
Genesis41:23 La ka-zu-faad a yopoe sẽn wẽnd yaang sebgã sẽn wẽ tɩ b faage, n pʋgl bãmb n yi." 
Genesis41:24 La ka-zu-faadã sẽn faagã rɩɩ ka-zu-bɛd a yopoe nins sẽn ya-b neebã. Dẽ, mam togsa tɩtã-rãmb m zãmsdã, la ned baa a yembr ka tol n tõog n bilg maam a võorã sẽn dat n yeel tɩ bũmb ning ye.»" 
Genesis41:25 A Zozɛf yeela Faarõ yaa: «Yãmb zãmsd a yiibã fãa yaa bũmb a yembre. Wẽnnaam vẽnega Faarõ bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dat n maane. 
Genesis41:26 Nag-yãan-nobds a yopoe wã mamsda yʋʋm a yopoe, tɩ ka-zu-bɛd a yopoe wã me mamsd yʋʋm a yopoe. Zãmsdã yaa bũmb a yembr bala." 
Genesis41:27 La nag-yãan-wag a yopoe wã sẽn ka neebã sẽn yi n pʋgl pipi rãmbã mamsda yʋʋm a yopoe. La ka-zu-faad a yopoe wã yaang sob-tʋʋlgã sẽn wẽ tɩ yõogã wilgda yʋʋm a yopoe kom. 
Genesis41:28 Woto, wa mam sẽn zoe n yeel Faarõ tɩ loogã, yaa Wẽnnaam n wilgd Faarõ bãmb a Wẽnnaam sẽn dat n maan bũmb ninga." 
Genesis41:29 Ade, yʋʋm a yopoe n wate, n na n yɩ tɩgr yʋʋm Ezɩpt soolmã zãng pʋga." 
Genesis41:30 La yʋʋm a yopoe sẽn yaa kom-kãseng yʋʋm n na n pʋgl n wa. La nebã fãa na n yĩma tɩgrã sẽn dag n zĩnd Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã yelle. Komã na n sooga Ezɩpt soolmã zãnga. 
Genesis41:31 Kom ning sẽn watã toolem yĩng na n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã ka leb n mi tɩ tɩgr n dag n zind ye. 
Genesis41:32 Sã n yaa ne Faarõ zãmsdã sẽn yɩlem naoor a yiibã, rat n yeelame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam meng n yãk yam n na n maan bõn-kãnga, la Wẽnnaam na n pids-a-la tao-tao." 
Genesis41:33 Moasã, rẽndame tɩ Faarõ bao ned sẽn tar bãngre, la yam, n kõ yẽnda naam t'a ges Ezɩpt soolmã yelle." 
Genesis41:34 Bɩ Faarõ sɩng moasã n yãk neb n kõ-b noor soolmã pʋgẽ, tɩ tɩgrã sẽn na n zĩnd yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ wã, bɩ b reeg koodã peoog a nu sʋk fãa peoog a yembre. La tɩgrã sẽn na n zĩnd yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ," 
Genesis41:35 bɩ bãmb tigs koodã fãa, n wa kɩs Faarõ t'a kɩt tɩ rɩɩb zĩnd tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ, n kɩt tɩ b gũ." 
Genesis41:36 Dẽ, tẽngã na n paama rɩɩbo, tɩ komã sẽn na n wa zĩnd yʋʋm a yopoe Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã ra tõog n sãam tẽngã ye.»" 
Genesis41:37 Rĩm a Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa sũur yɩɩ noog ne gom-kãngã. 
Genesis41:38 La Faarõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Tõnd tõe n leb n yãnda ned sẽn tar yam wa nin-kãngã, tɩ Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã be a zug sɩda?»" 
Genesis41:39 Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Ade, Wẽnnaam sẽn tõog n kɩt tɩ fo bãng bõn-kãensã wã, tõnd ka leb n tõe n yãnd ned a to sẽn tar bãngre, la a tar yam wa foom ye." 
Genesis41:40 Moasã, yaa foom n na n soog mam yirã, la mam nebã fãa na n saka fo noore. Yaa mam naamã bal n na n yɩɩg foom.»" 
Genesis41:41 Faarõ leb n yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Gese, mam dɩka Ezɩpt soolmã gill n ning fo nugẽ.»" 
Genesis41:42 Faarõ pidga a meng nugbĩngã sẽn tar nug-tikr bãndã n pid a Zozɛf nug-bila, la a kɩt tɩ b yeelg-a fu-neeb sẽn pɩnda, la a pid a Zozɛf loorã ne sãnem yãndo." 
Genesis41:43 La rĩm a Faarõ kɩtame t'a Zozɛf kẽ Saar a yiibẽ soabã sẽn pʋgd yẽnda wã, la nebã rag n kelemdame n yetẽ tɩ: «Wõgemd-y-yã!» Rẽ, yɩɩ woto tɩ Faarõ kõ a Zozɛf noor t'a soog Ezɩpt soolmã zãnga." 
Genesis41:44 Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yɛsa: «Yaa maam la Faarõ, la sã n ka foom n kõ ned noor t'a maan bũmbu, ned kõn zẽk a nug-bil bɩ a naoor Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã ye.»" 
Genesis41:45 Rĩm a Faarõ pʋda a Zozɛf yʋʋr t'a Safnat-Paneya, la a rɩk bi-pugl a Asnat n kõ a Zozɛf t'a maan a paga. A Asnat yaa maan-kʋʋd a Poti-Feera sẽn be Onã wã bi-pugla. Dẽ, a Zozɛf yiime n na n gilg n ges Ezɩpt soolmã." 
Genesis41:46 A Zozɛf sẽn wa n na n kẽng rĩm a Faarõ taoorã, rẽ t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã. La yẽnda sẽn yi Faarõ nengẽ wã, a tɩ gilga Ezɩpt soolmã zãng n gese." 
Genesis41:47 Tɩgrã yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋga, pʋtã bõn-koaadl woma hal sõama." 
Genesis41:48 La yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, a Zozɛf tigsa Ezɩpt soolmã koodã fãa. A Zozɛf tigsa koodã n bĩng tẽng fãa pʋgẽ. Yẽnda tigsa tẽng fãa pʋt bõn-koaadl n bĩng tẽng fãa pʋgẽ." 
Genesis41:49 A Zozɛf sẽn wʋk koodã yaa wʋsg wa ko-kãsengã noor bĩisri, la rag n yaa wʋsg hal tɩ b ka leb n sõt ye. Bala, koodã rag n ka leb n tar sõor ye." 
Genesis41:50 Sẽn deng kom-kãsengã sẽn na n sɩngã, rẽ tɩ On maan-kʋʋd a Poti-Feera bi-pugl a Asnat roga a Zozɛf kom-dibli a yiibu." 
Genesis41:51 A Zozɛf pʋda yẽnda bi-ribl-kãsengã yʋʋr t'a Manaase, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹yĩmbu.› Bala, a Zozɛf yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ mam yĩm m toogã ne m ba-yirã fãa yelle.»" 
Genesis41:52 A Zozɛf pʋda yiibẽ soabã yʋʋr t'a Efrayiim. Bala, yẽnda yeelame: «Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ mam paam dogem tẽng ning mam sẽn paam paoogrã pʋga.»" 
Genesis41:53 Yʋʋm a yopoe wã sẽn yɩ tɩgr yʋʋm Ezɩpt tẽngã wa n loogame. 
Genesis41:54 La yʋʋm a yopoe kom-kãsengã sɩnga waoong wa a Zozɛf sẽn dag n togsã. La kom-kãsengã kẽe tẽmsã fãa pʋse. La Ezɩpt soolmã rag n tara rɩɩbo. 
Genesis41:55 Dẽ, kom-kãsengã sẽn wa n sɩng n na n kẽ Ezɩpt soolmã gillã, nebã kelmame n yeel Faarõ t'a kõ bãmb rɩɩbo. La Faarõ yeela Ezɩpt nebã fãa yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ yãnd-y-yã a Zozɛfe, la a sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb ning bɩ y maane!»" 
Genesis41:56 Kom-kãsengã rag n bee zĩiga fãa. Dẽ, a Zozɛf pagsa bao wã fãa, n koos koodã ne Ezɩpt tẽngã nebã. La komã wa n lebgda toog wʋsg Ezɩpt soolmã pʋg n paasdẽ." 
Genesis41:57 La nebã rag n yita dũniyã zĩisã fãa pʋs n wat Ezɩpt tẽng n daad koodã a Zozɛf nengẽ. Bala, kom-kãsengã rag n kẽe dũniyã gill fãa." 
Genesis42:1 La a Zakoob mikame tɩ kood bee Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã. Dẽ, a Zakoob yeela a kom-dibli wã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb zĩ n get taab woto?»" 
Genesis42:2 La a yeel-b lame yaa: «Mam wʋmame tɩ kood bee Ezɩpt tẽnga, kẽng-y beenẽ n tɩ ra kood n wa, tɩ d paam n põs n da ki ye.»" 
Genesis42:3 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmb piigã kẽnga Ezɩpt n na n tɩ ra koodo. 
Genesis42:4 La a Zakoob ka bas t'a Zozɛf yao a Benzame tũ bãmb ye. Bala, a Zakoob tagsame tɩ yẽnda sã n bas t'a tũ, bũmb tõe n tek n maan-a lame." 
Genesis42:5 La a Israyɛll kom-dibli wã tũu neb a taabã n wa n na n da kood wa nebã fãa. Bala, komã rag n kẽe Kana soolmã gilli." 
Genesis42:6 La mikame tɩ yaa a Zozɛf n dag n yaa Ezɩpt soolmã balem-naaba. La yaa yẽnda n kõt noor tɩ b koosd koodã ne nebã fãa. Dẽ, a Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã wa n wõgemdame, n fõgen b nens tẽng yẽnda taoore." 
Genesis42:7 A Zozɛf sẽn yãnd a ba-biisã, a bãng-b lame, la a maana a meng wa yẽnda ka mi-b ye, n gom ne bãmb ne nen-keglem n yeele: «Hey! Yãmba! Yãmb yita yɛɛnẽ?» La b leokame: «Tõnd yii Kana soolem n wa n na n da koodo.»" 
Genesis42:8 A Zozɛf bãnga a kẽem-dãmbã, la bãmb ka bãng yẽnda ye." 
Genesis42:9 A Zozɛf tẽega zãmsd nins yẽnda sẽn dag n zãms bãmb wɛɛngẽ wã. La a yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb yaa tẽn-gũusdba! Yãmb wa n na n bãnga tẽngã pãn-komsem zĩiga.» 
Genesis42:10 Bãmb leokame: «Ayo! D soaala, ka woto ye! Yãmb yembsã wa n na n daa koodo!" 
Genesis42:11 Tõnd fãa yaa ned a yembr kom-dibli. Yaa sɩd la tõnd sẽn togsdã! Yãmb yembsã ka tẽn-gũusdb ye.» 
Genesis42:12 La a Zozɛf yeel-b lame: «Ka sɩd ye. Yãmb wa n dat n bãnga tẽngã pãn-komsem zĩiga.» 
Genesis42:13 Bãmb leokame n yeele: «Tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba! Ade, tõnd ba wã roga tõnd piig la a yiibu. Tõnd fãa yaa rao a yembr sẽn be Kana tẽngã kamba. La tõnd yao a yembr n pa yir ne tõnd ba wã, la a yembr n ka be.»" 
Genesis42:14 A Zozɛf yeel-b lame yaa: «Yaa wa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã bala. Yãmb yaa tẽn-gũusdba. 
Genesis42:15 Ad makr ning mam sẽn na n mak yãmb n gese: ‹Ne Faarõ yʋʋre, tɩ yãmb yao-zʋʋgã sã n ka wa ka, yãmb kõn yi ka ye.›" 
Genesis42:16 Bɩ y tʋm yãmb ned a yembr t'a tɩ peeg yãmb yao wã n wa. La yãmb neb nins sẽn ketã na n kẽe bi-bees roogo. Tõnd na n maka yãmb goamã n ges yãmb sã n togsda sɩda. La sã n ka rẽ, mam wẽenda ne Faarõ yʋʋr tɩ yãmb yaa tẽn-gũusdba.»" 
Genesis42:17 La a Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b kẽes b fãa bi-bees roog rasem a tãabo. 
Genesis42:18 Rasem a tãabã daar sẽn ta, a Zozɛf yeela bãmb yaa: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n paam n vɩɩmde. Mam zoeta Wẽnnaam!" 
Genesis42:19 Yãmb sã n yaa sɩd dãmba, bɩ yãmb ned a yembr kell n pa bi-bees roogã pʋg ka, tɩ sẽn ket-bã tall koodã n kuil n tɩ kɩs yãmb yirã rãmba, komã yĩnga." 
Genesis42:20 La y tall y yao wã n wa mãm nengẽ, tɩ tõnd tõe n bãng yãmb goamã sã n yaa sɩda, tɩ yãmb tõe n paam n vɩɩmde.»" 
Genesis42:21 Dẽ, bãmb sɩd maana woto, n gom ne taab n yeele: «Sɩdã, tõnd maana d yao wã wẽnga. Bala, tõnd yãnda a sũ-sãangã, yẽnda dag n kosa tõnd tɩ d zoe yẽnda nimbãanega, la tõnd ka kelg-a ye. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ yel-pak-kãngã paamd tõndo.»" 
Genesis42:22 A Rubɛn goma ne bãmb n yeele: «Mam dag n ka reng n togs yãmb sɩda? Mam ka yeel tɩ d ra maan biigã wẽnga? La yãmb ka kelg maam ye. La moasã, ade, yẽnda zɩɩmã yell bee tõnd zugu.»" 
Genesis42:23 La bãmb dag n ka mi t'a Zozɛf wʋmda bãmb goamã ye. Bala, no-rɛɛs n dag n deesd a Zozɛf goamã n togsd bãmba." 
Genesis42:24 A Zozɛf sergame n bas bãmb n tɩ yãbe. La a lebgame n wa gom ne bãmba, la a yiisa a Sɩmyõ bãmb sʋk n tɩ kẽes bi-bees roog bãmb nifẽ." 
Genesis42:25 A Zozɛf kõo noor n yeel tɩ b sui bãmb yondã ne kood tɩ pidi, la b lebs ned ka fãa ligd a yolgẽ, la b bao rɩɩb n kõ bãmb b kẽnda yĩnga. La b sɩd maana bãmb woto." 
Genesis42:26 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã rɩka b koodã n zɩlg b bõens n yi beenẽ n dɩk sor n looge. 
Genesis42:27 La bãmb sẽn ta sik zĩigẽ wã, bãmb ned a yembr sãrga a yolg n na n yãk ki n kõ a bõanga, la a mikame tɩ yẽnda ligdã be a yolgã noore." 
Genesis42:28 La a yeela a ba-biisã: «B lebsa maam m ligdã. Ad ligdã sẽn be yolgã noore!» La bãmb pelensã yɩkame, tɩ bãmb fãa rigda. La b soka taab yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ Wẽnnaam maand tõnd a woto?»" 
Genesis42:29 Bãmb sẽn ta b ba a Zakoob nengẽ Kana tẽnga, bãmb togsa yẽnda bãmb sẽn paam yɛl ninsã fãa." 
Genesis42:30 Bãmb yeelame yaa: «Rao ning sẽn so soolmã goma ne tõnd ne nen-keglem, a yeela tõnd tɩ d wa n na n gũusa tẽngã." 
Genesis42:31 La tõnd yeela yẽnda tɩ tõnd yaa sɩd dãmba, la d ka tẽn-gũusdb ye." 
Genesis42:32 La d yeel-a lame me tɩ tõnd yaa tõnd piig la a yiibu, la tõnd fãa yaa ned a yembr kamba, la tõnd yao a yembr n ka leb n be ye. La d yeel-a t'a yembr n pa ne tõnd baaba wã Kana tẽnga." 
Genesis42:33 Dẽ, rao ning sẽn yaa tẽngã soaalã yeelame: ‹Ad bũmb ning sẽn na n wilg tɩ yãmb yaa sɩd dãmba. Bas-y yãmb ba-biig a yembr ne maam ka, tɩ sẽn ket-bã tall koodã n tɩ kɩs yirã rãmba, tɩ komã yaa wʋsgo." 
Genesis42:34 La y sã n kẽng bɩ y tall y yao-zʋʋgã n wa mam nengẽ. Dẽ, mam na n bãngame tɩ yãmb ka tẽn-gũusdba, la y yaa sɩd dãmba. Rẽ, mam na yaool n lebs yãmb y ba-biigã, tɩ y saag soolmã pʋg n manes y yɛla.› »" 
Genesis42:35 La bãmb sẽn zuk b yondã, b mikame tɩ bãmb ned kam fãa korg ne a ligd saga a yolgẽ. Bãmb ne b baaba wã fãa sẽn yãnd ligdã rabeem kãseng yõka bãmba." 
Genesis42:36 Dẽ, bãmb ba a Zakoob yeel-b lame: «Yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam kong m kambã fãa! A Zozɛf ka be ye, a Sɩmyõ me ka be ye, tɩ yãmb leb n dat n deeg a Benzame yɛsa. Woto fãa yaa yɛl sẽn lʋɩt mam zug bala!»" 
Genesis42:37 La a Rubɛn yeela a baaba yaa: «Mam sã n ka tall a Benzame n lebg n wa, bɩ y kʋ mam kom-dibli a yiibã. Bas-y-yã-a ne maam, la mam na n lebg n tall-a lame n wa kõ-fo.»" 
Genesis42:38 A Zakoob yeelame: «Mam ka na n sak tɩ m biigã tũ yãmb n kẽng ye. Bala, yẽnda kẽema kiime, tɩ kell yẽnda a yembre. Yãmb sẽn na n dɩk sorã tɩ bũmb sã n tek n maan-a, yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ mam sig kɩɩm-kulg ne m zoob-peendã la ne sũ-sãanga.»" 
Genesis43:1 Kom-kãsengã rag n ket n tara pãng soolmã pʋga. 
Genesis43:2 A Zakoob ne a yirã rãmb sẽn dɩ kood ning b sẽn tɩ tall Ezɩpt n wa wã n sɛ, a Zakoob yeela a kambã yaa: «Lebg-y n leb-y Ezɩpt tẽng n tɩ ra kood n wa.»" 
Genesis43:3 La a Zʋʋda yeela a ba a Zakoob yaa: «Ade, Ezɩpt soolmã naab keooga tõnd vẽeneg n yeele: yãmb yao wã sã n ka tũ yãmba, mam ka na n deeg yãmb ye." 
Genesis43:4 Dẽ wã, yãmb sã n sak n na n bas tɩ tõnd yao wã tũ tõnd n kẽnge, d na n lebg n lebame n tɩ ra koodã n wa kõ-yã." 
Genesis43:5 La yãmb sã n ka na n sak t'a tũ tõndo, tõnd ka na n kẽng ye. Bala, raoã yeelame tɩ tõnd yao wã sã n ka tũ tõnd n wa, yẽnda ka na n deeg tõnd ye.»" 
Genesis43:6 Dẽ, a Israyɛll yeelame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb maan wẽng woto, n togs raoã tɩ yãmb tara yao a to?»" 
Genesis43:7 Bãmb leokame: «Raoã soka tõnd d yirã rãmb kibar ne pẽdgre. A soka tõnd d mensã yelle, la a sok tɩ tõnd ba wã ket n vɩɩme bɩ, tɩ tõnd tara yao a to bɩ. Dẽ, tõnd leoka a sokdsã. Tõnd dag n ka tõe n bãng t'a na n yeelame tɩ d tɩ tall d yao wã n wa ye.»" 
Genesis43:8 A Zʋʋda yeela a ba a Israyɛll yaa: «Bas-y-yã a Benzame t'a tũ maam. Tõnd na n yikame n kẽnge, n da wa ki ye. Yaa yãmb ne tõnd kambã, la tõnd mens yĩnga." 
Genesis43:9 Yaa mam meng n dɩkd sard n na n yɩ a Benzame gũuda. Mam na n lebg n tall-a lame n wa lebs yãmba. Mam sã n ka tall-a n wa lebs-yã, la m kɩt t'a yals yãmb taoor ka, bɩ mam kell yɩ koangd yãmb taoor m yõor tɛka." 
Genesis43:10 Tõnd sã n dag n ka kaoosẽ, woto tɩ tõnd dag n kẽngẽ lame n lebg n wa, n lebg n leb naoor a yiibẽ soab n leb n lebg n wa.»" 
Genesis43:11 Bãmb ba a Israyɛll yeela bãmb yaa: «Sã n yaa woto, ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Bao-y tẽngã bõn-sõama wã n sui y yondẽ wã n tall n tɩ kõ raoã. Yãk-y tɩdar bilfu, sɩɩd bilfu, wisdu, kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, Pistaas biisi, ne Amand-dãmba." 
Genesis43:12 Zã-y ligd tɩ yɩɩg yãmb sẽn zã pĩndã naoor a yiibu, la y rɩk ligd ning b sẽn lebs yãmb yondã pʋsã n zã. Bala, tõeeme tɩ yɩɩ tudgri." 
Genesis43:13 Yik-y n peeg-y y yao wã n lebg n leb raoã nengẽ. 
Genesis43:14 Bɩ Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam kɩt tɩ raoã zoe yãmb nimbãaneg n bas tɩ yãmb ba-biig a yembrã ne a Benzame tũ yãmb n wa. La sã n mikame tɩ mam na n konga m kambã, bɩ kong-ba!»" 
Genesis43:15 Dẽ, bãmb dɩka kũunã, la b bao ligdã b sẽn tarã naoor a yiibu n zã, la b peeg a Benzame ta tũ. La bãmb loogame n ta Ezɩpt tẽnga, n kẽng a Zozɛf nengẽ." 
Genesis43:16 A Zozɛf sẽn yãnd a Benzame sẽn tũ bãmb n wa wã, a yeela a zakã naab yaa: «Tall nin-bãmb n tɩ kẽes mam zakẽ wã, la f bao rũms n kʋ n segle, tɩ mam na n dɩɩ ne bãmb rũndã!»" 
Genesis43:17 Raoã maana wa a Zozɛf sẽn yeelã, n tall-b n kẽng a Zozɛf yirã." 
Genesis43:18 B sẽn tall bãmb n kẽng a Zozɛf zakẽ wã, rabeem kãseng yõka bãmb tɩ b gom ne taab n yeele: «Yaa tõnd sẽn wa pĩnd tɩ b lebs ligdã tõnd yondã pʋsã yĩng la b sẽn wa ne tõnd ka wã. Bãmb dat n yõga tõnd n modg-d n kẽes yembdo, la b rees tõnd bõensã.»" 
Genesis43:19 Dẽ, bãmb kolg a Zozɛf zakã naab sẽn yas zakã noorã n gom ne-a." 
Genesis43:20 Bãmb yeelame: «Y kabre, m soaala! Tõnd dag n zoe n waa ka n wa ra koodo." 
Genesis43:21 La tõnd sẽn ta toandbã sik zĩigẽ wã, tõnd loka d yondã n mik tɩ ned kam fãa ligd saga a yolgẽ. La ligdã sõor kell n yaa wa tõnd sẽn dag n zã wã bala. Dẽ, tõnd talla ligdã n lebg n wa." 
Genesis43:22 La tõnd leb n zãa ligd a to me n wa n dat n da koodo. Tõnd ka mi sẽn yaa ned ning n lebg n dɩk tõnd ligdã n lebs tõnd yondã pʋs ye.» 
Genesis43:23 Yẽnda leokame: «Bɩ y paam laafɩ, la y da yɛɛs ye! Yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yaa yãmb ba wã Wẽnnaamã n ning arzɛkã yãmb yondã pʋse. Mam deega yãmb ligdã.» La a kɩtame tɩ b tɩ yiis a Sɩmyõ n tall n wa ne bãmb nengẽ." 
Genesis43:24 Raoã talla bãmb n kẽ a Zozɛf zakẽ wã, la a kõ-b koom tɩ b waas b nao, la a bao yamd n kõ b bõensã." 
Genesis43:25 Woto, bãmb segla b kũunã n gũud t'a Zozɛf sã n wa wĩntoogã bɩ b kõ-a. Bala, bãmb dag n wʋmame tɩ b gomd tɩ bãmb na n dɩɩ beenẽ." 
Genesis43:26 La a Zozɛf sẽn wa yiri, bãmb kẽe roogã pʋg n kõ yẽnda kũun ning b sẽn tarã, la b wõgemd yẽnda taoore." 
Genesis43:27 A Zozɛf pʋʋs-b lame n sok b keelem, n yeele: «Yãmb ba wã, sẽn yaa nin-kẽem ning yãmb sẽn dag n gom ne maam a yellã keemame? Bãmb ket n vɩɩme bɩ?»" 
Genesis43:28 La bãmb leokame: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sẽn yaa tõnd ba wã keemame, la b ket n vɩɩme.» La bãmb leb n sulgame n wõgemde." 
Genesis43:29 La a Zozɛf sẽn zẽk a neng n yãnd a yao a Benzame sẽn yaa yẽnda ma-biigã, a yeelame: «Yaa yãmb yao ninga yãmb sẽn dag n gom ne maam a yellã la yõwã bɩ?» La a leb n yeele: «M biig sõngo, Wẽnd na ning f zug barka!»" 
Genesis43:30 A Zozɛf maana koɛɛg-koɛɛga, tɩ bala, yẽnda rag n dat n yãbame. Yẽnda paama yĩn-sidg hal wʋsg a yao wã yĩnga. La a Zozɛf kẽe a roogẽ n yãbe." 
Genesis43:31 La yẽnda sẽn widga a neng n sɛ, a lebg n yiime, la a modg n gãda a menga, n yeele: «Ning-y rɩɩbã.»" 
Genesis43:32 La b ninga a Zozɛf rɩɩbã toore, la b ning a kẽem-dãmbã rẽnd toore, la b ning Ezɩpt neb nins sẽn mi n dɩt ne yẽnda wã me toore. Bala, Ezɩpt tẽng nebã ka tõe n naag Ebre rãmbã n dɩ ye. Bala, bõn-kãng yaa yel-beed ne Ezɩpt nebã." 
Genesis43:33 La a Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã zĩnda ne yẽnda n na n dɩ. La b zĩndga bãmb kãsem-pʋgdg fãa ne a zĩiga, n tɩ tãag yao-zʋʋgã. Bõn-kãng yɩɩ lingr ne bãmb ned kam fãa t'a gomd ne a yaka." 
Genesis43:34 A Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b yãk rɩɩbã yẽndã taoorã n kõ-ba, la b kõo a Benzame n yɩɩg bãmb fãa rẽndã naoor a nu. Bãmb naaga a Zozɛf n yũ n tɩg tɩ b nensã yilme." 
Genesis44:1 A Zozɛf kõ a zakã naab noor n yeel yaa: «Bao kood n pids nin-bãmbã yondã, n zems b sẽn tõe n zɩ n looge, la f rɩk ned kam fãa ligd n ning a yolgẽ." 
Genesis44:2 La f rɩk mam wũmblã, wanzuri wũmblã n ning yao-zʋʋgã yolgẽ n naag ne a koodã ligdi.» Zak naabã maana bũmbã fãa wa a Zozɛf sẽn yeelã." 
Genesis44:3 La vẽkembeoogã yibeoogo, b basa nin-bãmbã tɩ b loog ne b bõensã." 
Genesis44:4 Bãmb sẽn yi tẽngã n nan ka zãage, a Zozɛf yeela a zak naabã yaa: «Yik n babs raopã n mao n paam-ba. La f sok-b n ges yaa bõe tɩ b maan bãmb neere, tɩ bãmb lebsd wẽnga." 
Genesis44:5 Ka wʋmbl-kãngã la mam soaalã tar n yũud la b lɩkd n get beenẽ n bʋgd b bagrã la? Yãmb sẽn maan bũmb ningã ka zems ye.» 
Genesis44:6 Zak naabã tɩ paam-b lame, n yeel-b gom-kãensã fãa." 
Genesis44:7 Bãmb leoka zak naabã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ mam soaalã gomd a woto? Tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb yembsã kõn sak n maan bũmb a woto bada! 
Genesis44:8 Ade, tõnd yii Kana tẽng n zã ligd ninga tõnd sẽn yãnd tɩ be tõnd yondã pʋsã, n lebg n wa lebs yãmba. Dẽ wã, tõnd na n yɩɩ a wãna, n leb n wa zuud wanzuri bɩ sãnem yãmb soaalã zakẽ?" 
Genesis44:9 Yãmb sẽn na n yãnd bõn-kãng ned ning nengẽ yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã sʋkã, bɩ y kʋ a soabã! La tõnd fãa na n lebga m soaalã yembse.»" 
Genesis44:10 Zak naabã leok-b lame: «Beneere, yãmb n gom n yõk y mense. Mam sẽn na n yãnd bõn-kãng ned ning nengẽ wã na n lebga mam yamba, la yãmb na n paama lohorem.»" 
Genesis44:11 Dẽ, ned kam fãa yɩɩ tao-tao n sik a yolg n loke." 
Genesis44:12 La zak naabã vɛɛsa yondã. Yẽnda sɩnga kãsem n tɩ tãag yao-zʋʋga. La b mikame tɩ wanzuri wũmblã bee a Benzame yolgẽ wã. 
Genesis44:13 Bãmb ned kam pãrsa a futu, la ned kam fãa lebs a bõang zɩɩb n zɩlge. La b lebg n leba tẽnga pʋga." 
Genesis44:14 A Zʋʋda ne a ba-biisã lebg n taa a Zozɛf yirã, la rẽ t'a Zozɛf ket n bee yiri. La bãmb wõgemda a Zozɛf taoor n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
Genesis44:15 La a Zozɛf soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe tʋʋmd la yãmb sẽn maanã? Yãmb ka mi tɩ ned sẽn yaa wa maamã bʋgda bagr n bãngd bũmb ning sẽn be la?» 
Genesis44:16 La a Zʋʋda leokame: «Mam na n yeela m soaalã tɩ bõe? Mam na n gomame n yeel tɩ bõe? Tõnd na n maana bõe n wilg tɩ d ka beege? Yaa Wẽnnaam n puk tõnd beegrã. Ad tõndo, tõnd lebga yãmb yembse, tõnd ne b sẽn yãnd wũmblã ned ning nengẽ wã.»" 
Genesis44:17 La a Zozɛf yeelame: «Ayo! Mam ka na n maan a woto ye. Yaa b sẽn yãnd mam wũmblã ned ning nengẽ wã n na n lebg mam yamba, la yãmb tõe n lebg n leba y ba wã nengẽ ne bãane.»" 
Genesis44:18 La a Zʋʋda kolga a Zozɛf n yeel yaa: «M soaala, y sugri! Y kabre, mam kotame tɩ y sak tɩ y tʋmtʋmdã gom ne-yã, la y ra yik y sũur ne-m ye! Bala, yãmb yaa wa Faarõ meng bala!" 
Genesis44:19 M soaala, yãmb dag n soka y tʋmtʋmdbã n ges b sã n tara baaba bɩ ba-biig a to." 
Genesis44:20 La tõnd dag n leoka m soaalã n yeele tɩ tõnd tara ba sẽn yaa nin-kẽema, la d tar yao-zʋʋg a yembr d ba wã sẽn dog a kʋʋlem zugẽ, la yao-kãng tara a ma-biig sẽn maan kaalem. Dẽ, yẽnda yaa a ma wã bi-yende. La a ba wã nong-a-la wʋsgo." 
Genesis44:21 La yãmb yeela tõnd tɩ d tɩ peeg-a n wa yãmb nengẽ, tɩ yãmb meng nif yãnd-a." 
Genesis44:22 La tõnd dag n leoka m soaalã n yeel yaa: bi-kãngã ka tõe n zãag n bas a ba wã ye, yẽnda sã n bas a ba wã, a ba wã na n kiime." 
Genesis44:23 La yãmb yeelame: Yãmb yao-zʋʋgã sã n ka tũ yãmb n wa, mam ka na n deeg yãmb ye." 
Genesis44:24 Dẽ, tõnd sẽn lebg n leb m baaba sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã nengẽ wã, tõnd togs-a-la yãmb goamã fãa." 
Genesis44:25 La tõnd ba wã yeelame: Lebg-y n leb-y n tɩ ra bɩle n wa. 
Genesis44:26 La tõnd yeela d ba wã tɩ tõnd ka tõe n lebg n lebe, tɩ tõnd yao-zʋʋgã ka tũ ye. Bala, raoã yeelame tɩ tõnd yao wã sã n ka tũ tõndo, bãmb ka na n deeg tõnd ye." 
Genesis44:27 Dẽ, mam baaba wã sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã yeela tõnd yaa: ‹Yãmb mens miime tɩ mam pagã dag n tara kamb a yiibu." 
Genesis44:28 La a yembrã yii mam nengẽ n menem, la mam tagsdame tɩ we-rũms n wãb-a, bala, hal tɩ ta moasã, mam nan ka yãnd-a ye." 
Genesis44:29 Dẽ wã, yãmb sã n deeg bi-kãngã me n bas maam, tɩ bũmb sã n tɩ maan-a, yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ mam sig kɩɩm-kulg ne m zoob-peendã ne sũ-sãanga.›" 
Genesis44:30 Rẽ wã, mam sã n lebg n leb m baaba sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã nengẽ, tɩ biigã ka tũ tõndo," 
Genesis44:31 la tõnd ba wã sã n yãnd tɩ biigã ka tũud tõndo, b na n kiime. Rẽ na n yɩɩ tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã n na n kɩt tɩ mam ba wã sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sig kɩɩm-kulg ne a zoob-peendã la ne sũ-sãanga." 
Genesis44:32 Bala, mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã rɩka sard biigã wɛɛngẽ n yeel m baaba tɩ mam sã n ka tall biigã n lebg n wa, bɩ b ning maam taal m vɩɩmã tɛka." 
Genesis44:33 Rẽ wã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y bas tɩ mam led biigã zĩigẽ n pa ka n lebg yãmb yamba, tɩ biigã lebg n tũ a kẽem-dãmbã n kuili." 
Genesis44:34 Sã n ka rẽ, mam na n maana a wãn n kẽng m ba wã nengẽ, tɩ biigã ka tũ maam? Mam ka rat n yãnd m ba wã sẽn na n paam sũ-sãang ningã ye!»" 
Genesis45:1 La a Zozɛf rag n ka leb n tõe n gãd a meng neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã taoor ye. Dẽ, a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Kɩt-y tɩ nebã yi la b bas maam!» La a Zozɛf sẽn wa n na n vẽneg a meng ne a ba-biisã, rẽ tɩ ned baa a yembr dag n ka leb n be ne bãmb ye." 
Genesis45:2 A Zozɛf zẽka a koɛɛg n yãb hal tɩ Ezɩpt nebã wʋme. Hal baa Faarõ yirã rãmb fãa wʋma yãbrã. 
Genesis45:3 A Zozɛf yeela a ba-biisã yaa: «Yaa maam la a Zozɛfe! M baaba ket n vɩɩme bɩ?» Yẽnda ba-biisã rag n ka tõe n leok yẽnda ye. Bala, bãmb sẽn mik tɩ yaa a Zozɛf taoor la bãmb sẽn be wã, b yɛɛsame." 
Genesis45:4 A Zozɛf yeela a ba-biisã yaa: «M kotame tɩ y wa kolg maam!» La bãmb sẽn kolge, yẽnda yeelame: «Mam yaa yãmb yao a Zozɛf yãmb sẽn dag n koos tɩ b tall n wa Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Genesis45:5 Moasã, da sãam-y y sũy ye, la y ra maan-y y bãngẽ ne yãmb sẽn koos maam tɩ b tall maam n wa ka wã ye. Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ka rat tɩ yãmb ki wã yĩng la b sẽn kɩt tɩ mam deng yãmb taoorã." 
Genesis45:6 Ade, yaa yʋʋm a yiib moasã la kom-kãsengã sẽn kẽ soolmã, la keta yʋʋm a nu tɩ koobo, wall tigsg ka na n zĩnd ye." 
Genesis45:7 Yaa rẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam tʋm maam tɩ m deng yãmb taoor n tɩ segl tɩ yãmb tõe n paam bu-kell soolmẽ wã, la m fãag yãmb ne fãagr kãsenga, tɩ y tõog n põse." 
Genesis45:8 Rẽ wã, ad ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ mam wa kaanẽ ye, yaa Wẽnnaam n tʋm maam! La yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩte, tɩ mam lebg wa Faarõ ba, la m soog a yirã fãa, la m yɩ naab n soog Ezɩpt soolmã zãnga." 
Genesis45:9 Lebg-y tao-tao n kẽng m ba wã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: ‹Yãmb biig a Zozɛf yeelame: Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ mam lebg Ezɩpt soolmã naaba. Rẽ wã, bɩ y wa mam nengẽ n da kaoos ye." 
Genesis45:10 Yãmb na n wa zĩnda Gosɛn tẽngã pʋg n pẽneg maam. Yaa yãmba, y kambã, y yagensã, la y rũm-bãoonegã ne y rũm-bɛdã, la ne bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn so wã zãnga." 
Genesis45:11 Beenẽ, yaa maam n na n ges yãmb bõn-datsã yelle. Bala, kom-kãsengã na n kell n zĩnda yʋʋm a nu n paase. Dẽ, yãmb sã n be ka, b kõn deeg yãmb bũmbu, wall y yirã rãmb bũmb ye. La bũmb kõn maan yãmb sẽn so wã baa a yembr ye.›" 
Genesis45:12 Yãmb mensã nee vẽenega, la mam yao a Benzame me neeme, tɩ yaa maam a Zozɛf la sẽn gomd ne yãmbã." 
Genesis45:13 Bilg-y m baaba mam sẽn tar ziir ning Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã, la y togs yãmb sẽn yãnd bũmb ningã. Kẽng-y tao-tao n tɩ tall m baaba n wa ka.»" 
Genesis45:14 A Zozɛf mobga a yao a Benzame n yãbe, la a Benzame me mobga yẽnda n yãbe." 
Genesis45:15 Dẽ poore, a Zozɛf mogsa a kẽem-dãmbã fãa, la a yãbda. Rẽ zugẽ, yẽnda ne a ba-biisã sõsa ne taaba." 
Genesis45:16 Koɛɛgã saag n taa Faarõ yirã t'a Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã waa Ezɩpt tẽnga. La a Faarõ ne a poorẽ dãmbã fãa sũur yɩɩ noogo. 
Genesis45:17 La Faarõ goma ne a Zozɛf n yeele: «Ad fo sẽn na n yeel f kẽem-dãmbã tɩ b maan bũmb ninga: Yeel-b tɩ b tɩ zɩlg b bõensã, n yik n kẽng Kana tẽnga," 
Genesis45:18 n tɩ tall y baaba wã ne y yirã rãmb n wa mam nengẽ. Mam na n baoo Ezɩpt tẽngã zĩig sẽn welg toor n kõ yãmba, la yãmb na n dɩɩ tẽngã bõn-sõama wã." 
Genesis45:19 Zozɛfe, mam kõta foom noor tɩ f yeel-b yaa: ‹Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: rɩk-y Ezɩpt tẽngã terok-rãmb n tɩ wʋk kambã ne pagbã, la y kɩt tɩ y ba wã me n zomb beenẽ tɩ y tall-a n wa." 
Genesis45:20 Ra zoe-y bũmb ning yãmb sẽn na n bas beenẽ wã bõn ye. Bala, bõn-sõama nins fãa sẽn be Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã na n yɩɩ yãmb dẽnda.› »" 
Genesis45:21 A Israyɛll kambã maana wa b sẽn yeel-bã. A Zozɛf kõo bãmb terok-rãmb wa Faarõ sẽn yeelã, la a kõ-b rɩɩb b so-toakã yĩnga." 
Genesis45:22 A Zozɛf kõo bãmb fãa fut b sẽn na n tekdẽ, la a kõ a Benzame wanzuri ligd kobs-tã, ne fut a nu, t'a tõe n tekdẽ." 
Genesis45:23 Ad bũmb ning a Zozɛf sẽn tʋm tɩ b tɩ kõ a ba wã: Yaa bõens piig sẽn zɩt Ezɩpt tẽngã bõn-sõama buud fãa, la bõn-yãans piig sẽn zɩlg koodo, rɩɩbo, n paas rɩɩb ning a ba wã sẽn na n dɩk sorã n wa wã yĩnga." 
Genesis45:24 Dẽ, a Zozɛf basa a kẽem-dãmbã tɩ b looge. La a yeel-b lame tɩ b ra tek n zab taab sorã zug ye." 
Genesis45:25 Bãmb yii Ezɩpt n kẽng Kana tẽng n tɩ ta bãmb ba a Zakoob nengẽ. 
Genesis45:26 Bãmb yeela b ba a Zakoob yaa: «Ad a Zozɛf ket n vɩɩme, la yaa yẽnda n so Ezɩpt soolmã gilli.» La bõn-kãng rag n ka sɩɩsd a Zakoob sũurã ye. Bala, yẽnda rag n ka tẽed b goamã ye." 
Genesis45:27 Bãmb togsa a Zakoob a Zozɛf sẽn yeelã fãa. La a Zakoob sẽn yãnd terok-rãmbã a Zozɛf sẽn kɩs tɩ b wa rɩk-a wã, a pɛlengã lebame." 
Genesis45:28 La a Israyɛll yeelame: «A sekame! Mam biig a Zozɛf ket n vɩɩme! Mam na n kẽng n tɩ yãnd-a lame la m yaool n ki.» 
Genesis46:1 A Israyɛll talla a sẽn so bũmb ninsã fãa n looge. La bãmb sẽn ta Bɛɛr-Seba, a Israyɛll maana maoong beenẽ n kõ a ba a Izak Wẽnnaamã." 
Genesis46:2 La Wẽnnaam goma ne a Israyɛll yʋng vẽnegr pʋgẽ n yeele: «Zakoobe, Zakoobe!» T'a Israyɛll leok tɩ ad maam." 
Genesis46:3 La Wẽnnaam yeel-a lame: «Mam yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa fo ba wã Wẽnnaam. Ra zoe rabeem tɩ kẽng Ezɩpt ye. Bala, yaa beenẽ la mam na n kɩt tɩ fo lebg bu-kãseng ba." 
Genesis46:4 Mam meng na n yãaga foom n kẽng Ezɩpte, la mam mengã n na n leb n tall foom n wa. Yaa a Zozɛf meng nug n na n mum fo nin f kũum daare.»" 
Genesis46:5 A Zakoob yii Bɛɛr-Seba. A Israyɛll kambã talla b ba a Zakoob ne bãmb kambã ne b pagbã ne terok-rãmb nins Faarõ sẽn dag n kõ tɩ b tɩ rɩk-b n wa wã. 
Genesis46:6 Bãmb kãaga b rũmsã, la b wʋk b paoongã b sẽn dag n paam Kana tẽngã n zã n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga. Dẽ, a Zakoob talla a yirã rãmb fãa n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis46:7 A Zakoob peega a kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã, la a kambã kom-dibli ne a kambã kom-pugli, la a yirã rãmb fãa n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis46:8 Ad a Israyɛll kamb nins sẽn tũ n kẽng Ezɩptã yʋy: Yaa a Zakoob ne a kom-dibli wã: Yaa a Zakoob pipi bi-ribl a Rubɛn. 
Genesis46:9 A Rubɛn kamb yaa a Henoke, a Palu, a Ɛtsron ne a Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 A Sɩmyõ kamb yaa a Yemuwɛlle, a Yamindi, a Ohaade, a Yakin ne a Sokaare, n paas Kana tẽng bi-puglã biig a Sayulli." 
Genesis46:11 A Leevi kamb yaa a Gerson, a Kehat ne a Meraari." 
Genesis46:12 A Zʋʋda kamb yaa a Ɛɛre, a Onan, a Sela, a Perɛtse, ne a Zerake. La a Ɛɛr ne a Onan kii Kana tẽnga. A Perɛts kamb yaa a Ɛtsron ne a Hamulli." 
Genesis46:13 A Isakaar kamb yaa a Tola, a Puuva, a Zoob ne a Sɩmron." 
Genesis46:14 A Zabulõ kamb yaa a Serɛɛde, a Elon ne a Zaheleyɛlle." 
Genesis46:15 Bãmb yaa a Zakoob kamb nins a Leya sẽn dog Padan-Aramã, n paas yẽnda bi-pugl a Dina. Bãmb fãa zãng yaa neb pis-tã la a tã, kom-dibli wã ne kom-pugli wã sẽn naag taaba." 
Genesis46:16 A Gaad kamb yaa a Sifyon, a Hagi, a Suni, a Ɛtsbon, a Eri, a Aarodi ne a Aareli." 
Genesis46:17 A Asɛɛr kamb yaa a Yimna, a Yiseva, a Yisevi ne a Beriya, n paas bãmb tão-poak a Seera. A Beriya kamb yaa a Ebɛɛr ne a Malkiyɛlle." 
Genesis46:18 Bãmb yaa a Zilpa kamba. A Labã sẽn dag n dɩk a soab n kõ a bi-pugl a Leya wã. A Zilpa roga a Zakoob kamba. Bãmb fãa yaa kamb piig la a yoobe. 
Genesis46:19 Ad a Zakoob pag a Rasɛll kamba: Yaa a Zozɛf ne a Benzame. 
Genesis46:20 On maan-kʋʋd a Poti-Feera bi-pugl a Asnat sẽn yaa a Zozɛf pagã roga a Zozɛf kamb a yiib Ezɩpt tẽnga. Yaa a Manaase ne a Efrayiim. 
Genesis46:21 Ad a Benzame kamba: Yaa a Bela, a Bekɛɛre, a Asbɛlle, a Geera, a Naama, a Eki, a Roose, a Mupim, a Hupim ne a Arde." 
Genesis46:22 Bãmb yaa a Zakoob kamb nins a Rasɛll sẽn dogã. Bãmb fãa yaa neb piig la a naase. 
Genesis46:23 A Dan biig la a Husim. 
Genesis46:24 Ad a Neftali kamba: Yaa a Yatseyɛlle, a Guni, a Yetsɛɛr ne a Sɩlɛm." 
Genesis46:25 Bãmb yaa a Bila kamba. A Bila yaa bi-pugl ning a Labã sẽn dag n dɩk n kõ a bi-pugl a Rasɛllã. A Rasɛll kambã fãa yaa neb a yopoe. 
Genesis46:26 Neb nins sẽn tũ a Zakoob n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa sõor yaa neb pis-yoob la a yoobe. La rat n yeelame tɩ yaa a Zakoob kom-dogdsã ne b kambã, a Zakoob kambã pagb sẽn ka naage." 
Genesis46:27 A Zozɛf paama kamb a yiib Ezɩpt tẽnga: Yaa neb a yiibu. Dẽ, a Zakoob yirã rãmb fãa sẽn kẽng Ezɩptã sõor yaa neb pis-yopoe." 
Genesis46:28 A Zakoob tʋma a Zʋʋda t'a kẽng a Zozɛf nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ bãmb rabda Gosɛn tẽnga. La a Zakoob ne a yirã rãmb sẽn ta Gosɛn tẽngã," 
Genesis46:29 a Zozɛf segla a saar n kẽng Gosɛn tẽngã n na n tɩ seg a ba a Israyɛlle. La a Zozɛf sẽn yãnd a baaba, a mobg-a lame, n yãb n kaoose." 
Genesis46:30 A Israyɛll yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Mam sẽn yãnd fo nengã, n bãng tɩ fo ket n vɩɩme wã, baa mam sã n ki moasã, ka yell ye!»" 
Genesis46:31 A Zozɛf yeela a kẽem-dãmbã ne a ba wã zak rãmb fãa yaa: «Mam na n kẽng n tɩ togsa Faarõ, la m wilg-b tɩ mam kẽem-dãmbã ne mam ba wã zak rãmb sẽn dag n be Kana tẽngã waame, n be mam nengẽ." 
Genesis46:32 La m wilg Faarõ tɩ nin-bãmbã yaa gʋʋn-gʋʋndba, la b tara rũms wʋsgo. La b talla b rũm-bãoonegã ne b rũm-bɛdã, la bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn so wã n wa." 
Genesis46:33 Woto, Faarõ sã n wa bool yãmb n sok tɩ yãmb tʋʋmd yaa bõe," 
Genesis46:34 bɩ y leok-b yaa: Tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yaa gʋʋn-gʋʋndba, sẽn sɩng ne yãadem wakat hal tɩ ta rũndã, wa tõnd ba-rãmbã me sẽn dag n yaa gʋʋndbã. Dẽ, b na n bas-y lame tɩ y zĩnd Gosɛn tẽngã pʋga. Bala, Ezɩpt tẽngã neb kisa neb nins fãa sẽn gʋʋnd rũm-bãoonegã.»" 
Genesis47:1 A Zozɛf kẽngame n tɩ togs Faarõ yaa: «Mam kẽem-dãmbã ne m ba wã yii Kana tẽng n wa. B waa ne b rũm-bãoonego, la b rũm-bɛda, ne bũmb nins fãa b sẽn so wã, la b tɩ bee Gosɛn tẽngã pʋga.»" 
Genesis47:2 A Zozɛf peega a ba-biisã sʋk neb a nu, n kẽng Faarõ nengẽ." 
Genesis47:3 Faarõ soka a Zozɛf ba-biisã yaa: «Yãmb tʋmda tʋʋm-bʋgo?» Bãmb leoka Faarõ yaa: «Tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yaa pe-kɩɩmb wa tõnd saam-dãmbã me sẽn dag n yaa pe-kɩɩmbã!» 
Genesis47:4 Bãmb leb n yeela Faarõ yaa: «Tõnd wa n na n zĩnda yãmb tẽngẽ wã, yamd sẽn ka leb n be tõnd rũm-bãoonegã yĩngã yĩnga. Bala, kom-kãsengã kẽe Kana tẽngã gilli. Dẽ wã, d kot-y lame tɩ y kõ-d noor tɩ d tɩ zĩnd Gosɛn tẽngã pʋga.»" 
Genesis47:5 Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Fo ba wã ne f ba-biisã wa n pẽnega foom. 
Genesis47:6 Ezɩpt tẽngã yaa foom n so, zĩndg f ba wã ne f ba-biisã tẽngã zĩig ning sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã. Bɩ b kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Gosɛn tẽngã pʋgẽ. La fo sã n mik tɩ nin-tɩrs bee bãmb sʋka, bɩ f yãk-b tɩ b get m rũmsã yelle.»" 
Genesis47:7 A Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b tall a ba a Zakoob n wa, la a tall-a lame n tɩ wilg Faarõ, la a Zakoob ninga Faarõ zug barka." 
Genesis47:8 Faarõ soka a Zakoob yaa: «Fo tara yʋʋm wãna?» 
Genesis47:9 A Zakoob leoka Faarõ yaa: «Yaa yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã la woto, mam sẽn gõod tẽng-tẽnga. La mam yʋʋmã sõor ka waoog ye, la a yɩɩ toogo. La yʋʋm-kãens sõorã ka ta mam saam-dãmbã yʋʋmã, b sẽn dag n wa n gõod tẽng-tẽngã ye.»" 
Genesis47:10 A Zakoob leb n pʋʋsa Faarõ n ning-a barka, la a yi n looge." 
Genesis47:11 Dẽ, a Zozɛf maana wa Faarõ sẽn yeelã. Yẽnda yãka zĩig Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ n zĩnig a ba wã, ne a ba-biisã. Yaa zĩig sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩda, n be Ramsɛs tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
Genesis47:12 A Zozɛf gesa a ba wã ne ba-biisã rɩɩb yelle, la ne a ba wã zak rãmb fãa yelle, wa sẽn zems a kambã sõore." 
Genesis47:13 Komã yɩɩ toog hal wʋsg tɩ rɩɩb ka leb n be soolmã pʋgẽ ye. Komã yĩng kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt tẽngã ne Kana tẽngã neb pãng sɛtẽ. 
Genesis47:14 A Zozɛf reega Ezɩpt soolmã ne Kana soolmã ligd zãnga. Bala, nebã rag n wat n daada koodã beenẽ. La yẽnda rɩka ligd-kãng n tɩ ning Faarõ yirã." 
Genesis47:15 Ezɩpt tẽngã ne Kana tẽngã ligd sẽn sɛ, Ezɩpt tẽng nebã fãa kẽnga a Zozɛf nengẽ n tɩ yeel yaa: «Kõ-y tõnd dɩɩb tɩ d rɩ! Tõnd na n kii yãmb taoor tõnd sẽn ka tar ligd yĩnga?»" 
Genesis47:16 La a Zozɛf yeelame yaa: «Yãmb sẽn n ka leb n tar ligdã, wa-y ne y rũmsã, n tek n deeg n deeg koodo.»" 
Genesis47:17 La bãmb talla b rũmsã n wa a Zozɛf nengẽ. La a Zozɛf kõo bãmb dɩɩb la a reeg b wiidã, ne b rũm-bãoonegã la b rũm-bɛdã, ne b bõensã. A Zozɛf kõo bãmb rɩɩb yʋʋm-kãnga, la a reeg b rũmsã fãa." 
Genesis47:18 La yʋʋm-kãng sẽn looge, nebã leb n waa a Zozɛf nengẽ yʋʋmd ning sẽn pʋglã n wa yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd ka na n solg d soaalã n ka togs-b ye. Tõnd ligdã sɛɛme, tõnd rũmsã me la d sẽn tall n wa kõ yãmbã. Dẽ, bũmb ning sẽn ket tõnd nengẽ d sẽn tõe n dɩk n kõ d soaalã, yaa tõnd mensã ne d pʋtã." 
Genesis47:19 Rẽ wã, bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd na n tar pʋto, la d kiid yãmb nifẽ? Ra-y tõnd ne d pʋtã, tɩ d paam dɩɩbo, la tõnd na n lebga Faarõ yembse, tɩ b soog tõnd ne d pʋtã, la y kõ-d bõn-buud tɩ d paam n põs n da ki tɩ d pʋtã wa lebg zĩ-vɩɩd ye.»" 
Genesis47:20 Dẽ, a Zozɛf raa Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋtã fãa tɩ lebg Faarõ rẽnda. Bala, Ezɩpt tẽngã nebã ned kam fãa koosa a pʋʋgo, komã sẽn dag n namsd bãmbã yĩnga. Dẽ, tẽngã zãng lebga Faarõ rẽnda." 
Genesis47:21 A Zozɛf yiisa nebã n tegs b tẽmse, Ezɩpt soolmã tẽms fãa pʋse." 
Genesis47:22 La a ka ra maan-kʋʋdbã pʋt ye. Bala, Faarõ rag n yiisa tõog maan-kʋʋdbã sõngr yĩnga, la maan-kʋʋdbã rag n vɩɩ ne bõn-kãnga. Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã ka koos b pʋtã ye." 
Genesis47:23 A Zozɛf yeela nimbuiidã yaa: «Mam daa yãmb rũndã ne y pʋtã n kõ Faarõ. Reeg-y bõn-buudu, n tɩ bʋd y pʋtã." 
Genesis47:24 La tigsgã wakate, yãmb na n yãka y bõn-koaadlã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembr n wa kõ Faarõ, la yãmb tall pʋɩɩr a naasã sẽn kellã, n paam bõn-buud n bʋd y pʋtã, la y paam dɩɩb n dɩlg y mens ne y pagbã, la y kambã.»" 
Genesis47:25 La bãmb yeelame: «Yãmb fãaga tõnd vɩɩm! Tõnd paamame tɩ d soaalã nong tõndo. Dẽ, tõnd na n yɩɩ Faarõ yembse.»" 
Genesis47:26 La a Zozɛf gʋlsa bõn-kãng tɩ lebg tõog n kell n pa n tãag rũndã, sẽn kẽed ne Ezɩpt tẽngã nebã pʋt wɛɛngẽ. Bõn-koaadlã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembr yaa Faarõ rẽnda, la yaa maan-kʋʋdbã pʋt bal n ka Faarõ rẽnda." 
Genesis47:27 A Israyɛll zĩnda Ezɩpt soolmã, Gosɛn tẽngã pʋga. La bãmb soog-a lame. La bãmb paama rogem, n fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo." 
Genesis47:28 A Zakoob zĩnda Ezɩpt soolmã pʋg yʋʋm piig la a yopoe. A Zakoob vɩɩmda yʋʋm koabg la pis-naas la a yopoe. 
Genesis47:29 A Israyɛll vɩɩmã sẽn wa n dabd a sɛɛb zĩigẽ, yẽnda boola a biig a Zozɛf n yeel-a yaa: «Fo sã n nonga maam, mam kot-f lame tɩ f rɩk f nug n tik mam gerã, n wẽen tɩ f na n maan-m-la neere, la f na n maana sɩd ne maam, la f ka na n mum maam Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋg ye!" 
Genesis47:30 Mam sã n wa n sak m saam-dãmba, bɩ f tall maam n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã n tɩ mum m saam-dãmbã yaadẽ.» La a Zozɛf yeelame: «Mam na n maana wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.»" 
Genesis47:31 A Zakoob leb n yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Wẽen tɩ f na n maana wa m sẽn yeel foomã.» La a Zozɛf wẽename. Dẽ, a Israyɛll wõgemda a gãagã zugẽ." 
Genesis48:1 Yel-kãensã fãa loogr zugẽ, b wa n yeela a Zozɛf t'a baaba ka keem ye. La a Zozɛf peega a kamb a yiibã: A Manaase ne a Efrayiim, n kẽng a Zakoob nengẽ." 
Genesis48:2 B togsa a Zakoob n yeel yaa: «Ad yãmb biig a Zozɛf n wa n na n ges-yã. Dẽ, a Israyɛll modgame n yik n zĩnd a gãagã zugu.»" 
Genesis48:3 A Zakoob yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam vẽnega b meng ne maam Luuzi, Kana tẽnga pʋga, la b ninga maam barka." 
Genesis48:4 Bãmb yeela maam yaa: Ad maam! Mam na n kõ-f-la rogem, la m na n kɩtame tɩ f fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo, la m kɩt tɩ f lebg buud wʋsg ba. Fo loogr poore, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã soog tẽn-kãngã wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Genesis48:5 Moasã, fo kamb a yiibã fo sẽn dog Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã sẽn deng mam sẽn na n wa fo nengẽ wã na n lebga mam dẽnda. Yaa a Efrayiim ne a Manaase, wa a Rubɛn ne a Sɩmyõ." 
Genesis48:6 La fo sẽn yaool n dog kamb nins bãmb zugẽ wã na n yɩɩ fo rẽnda. Bãmb na n naaga b ba-biisã n paam pʋɩɩre. 
Genesis48:7 Mam sẽn wa n yi Kana n watẽ wã, fo ma a Rasɛll tek n kii mam sɛɛgẽ, tõnd sẽn wa n be sorẽ n kolg Efratã. La mam mum-a-la beenẽ, Efrat sorã kɩrenga, zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ Betlehɛmã.»" 
Genesis48:8 A Israyɛll gesa a Zozɛf kom-dibli wã n sok yaa: «Yaa ãnda rãmb la woto?» 
Genesis48:9 La a Zozɛf leoka a baaba n yeel tɩ yaa kom-dibli nins Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yẽnda Ezɩpt tẽngã. A Israyɛll yeelame tɩ b tall kambã n kolg-a t'a ning-b barka. 
Genesis48:10 A Israyɛll rag n kʋʋlame t'a ninã pãng boog t'a ka leb n neẽ ye. Dẽ, a Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ kambã kolg a Israyɛlle, la a Israyɛll mobg-b lame n mok-ba." 
Genesis48:11 A Israyɛll yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Mam dag n ka tagsd tɩ mam na n leb n yãnda foom yɛs ye. La ade, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ mam yãnd fo kamba!»" 
Genesis48:12 A Zozɛf taka a kambã n yiis a ba wã rũmẽ, la a wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
Genesis48:13 A Zozɛf peega kamb a yiibã, n gãd a Efrayiim ne a rɩtg n ning a Israyɛll goabga, la a gãd a Manaase ne a goabg n ning a Israyɛll rɩtgo, n kɩt tɩ b yiibã fãa kolg a Israyɛlle." 
Genesis48:14 La a Israyɛll pɩʋʋga a nusã taaba, n dɩk a nug-rɩtgã n tik a Efrayiim sẽn yaa yao wã zugu, la a rɩk a nug-goabgã n tik a Manaase sẽn yaa kãsma zugu." 
Genesis48:15 A Zakoob ninga a Zozɛf zug bark n yeele: «Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning mam yaab a Abrahaam ne m ba a Izak sẽn dag n tũudã, soab ning sẽn yɩ-a mam pe-kɩɩm hal m dogmã daar n tãag rũndã wã," 
Genesis48:16 malɛɛk ning sẽn fãag-a maam wẽng buud fãa pʋgẽ wã, ning kom-bãmbã zut barka. La bɩ b boond kom-bãmbã ne mam yʋʋre, la ne m yaab a Abrahaam la m ba a Izak yʋʋre. Bɩ b fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg tẽng ning pʋg b sẽn be wã.»" 
Genesis48:17 A Zozɛf sẽn yãnd t'a baaba tika a Efrayiim ne a nug-rɩtgã a sũurã ka yɩ noog ye. Dẽ, a Zozɛf gãda a baaba nugã n yãk n na n ning a Manaase zugu." 
Genesis48:18 A Zozɛf yeela a baaba yaa: «Ka woto ye m baaba! Bala, yaa ada soabã n yaa kẽema! Ning-y y nug-rɩtgã yẽnda zugu.»" 
Genesis48:19 La a baaba zãgsame n yeele: «M biig sõngo, mam miime. Mam mii sõama! Yẽnda me na n lebga buud wʋsg ba, la yẽnda yao wã na n yɩɩ kãseng n yɩɩg yẽnda. La yẽnda yagensã na n yɩɩ buud wʋsgo, n zĩnd zĩig fãa.»" 
Genesis48:20 Badaare, a Zakoob ning-b-la bark n yeele: «Yãmb maasem yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã na n ningda nebã bark n yetẽ: ‹Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f yɩ wa a Efrayiim, la wa a Manaase!› » Yɩɩ woto, t'a Zakoob reng n bool a Efrayiim yʋʋre, n yaool na n bool a Manaase yʋʋrã." 
Genesis48:21 A Israyɛll yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Ade, mam yẽ na n kiime! La Wẽnnaam na n zĩnda ne yãmba, la b na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg n leb y yaab-rãmbã tẽngẽ." 
Genesis48:22 Mam kõta foom pʋɩɩr n yɩɩd f kẽem-dãmbã. Yaa bũmb ning mam sẽn dag n zab ne sʋʋg la tãp n deeg Amoor-dãmbã nengẽ wã.» 
Genesis49:1 A Zakoob boola a kambã n yeel-b yaa: «Tigm-y taab tɩ m wilg-y bũmb ning sẽn na n paam yãmb wakat sẽn wate. 
Genesis49:2 A Zakoob kambã, tigm-y taab n kelg-y-yã! Kelg-y yãmb ba a Israyɛlle!" 
Genesis49:3 Rubɛn, fo yaa mam bi-kãsenga, n yaa mam pãnga, la mam bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ bi-rẽenga. Fo tara ziir n yɩɩda, la f tar pãng n yɩɩda." 
Genesis49:4 Fo fõta wa koom, la fo ka na n leb n paam kãsengã ye. Bala, fo kẽe ne f ba paga, la fo sẽn dʋ mam gãagã n dẽgma wã, fo paooga maam." 
Genesis49:5 A Sɩmyõ ne a Leevi yaa ma-biisi. Bãmb tara b sʋʋs n maand nen-kegl-tʋʋma. 
Genesis49:6 Bɩ mam da kẽes m toog bãmb yellẽ ye. Mam kõn tol n paam yam a yembr ne bãmb b tiging pʋgẽ ye. Bala, bãmb sũ-puugrã pʋga, b kʋʋ nebã, la bãmb maana pʋ-toog n pas niig nao-gĩina." 
Genesis49:7 Bɩ kãab-wẽng paam bãmb sũ-puugrã, bala, yaa nen-keglem tʋʋmde. La m kãabd bãmb sũ-yikrã, bala, a yaa nin-kʋʋre. Mam na n weela bãmb a Zakoob kambã sʋka, la m na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n kẽ Israyɛll buudã sʋka." 
Genesis49:8 Zʋʋda, fo saam-biisã na n pẽga foom. Fo nug na n wẽooga f bɛɛbã yubli, la fo ba wã kom-dibli na n wõgemda fo taoore." 
Genesis49:9 A Zʋʋda yaa gɩgem-polle. M biiga, fo yii kʋʋb zĩigẽ n watẽ! A Zʋʋda põta a nao, n gãe wa gɩgemde, n gãe wa gɩgem-yãanga. La yaa ãnda n na n tõog t'a yiki?" 
Genesis49:10 Naam dasaar kõn tol n zãag n bas a Zʋʋda ye. La naam kãnd kõn tol n kong yẽnda naoã tẽngr ye, hal t'ɩ sẽn soa bãmbã wa, tɩ nebã buud fãa sak yẽnda." 
Genesis49:11 Yẽnda na n loee a bõang reezẽ tɩɩga, la a rɩk a bõan-bil n loe ne reezẽ bu-sõng tɩɩg willi. Yẽnda na n pegsa a fut reezẽ rãam pʋga, la a pekda a fu-yerg reezẽ rãam sẽn moog wa zɩɩm pʋga." 
Genesis49:12 Rãam kɩtame tɩ yẽnda nin mooge, la bĩisim na n pelga a yẽna." 
Genesis49:13 A Zabulõ na n zĩnda ko-kãsemsã noore. Yẽnda zĩigã na n yɩɩ koom kogend zĩiga, la yẽnda soolmã na n tall n tɩ tãaga Sɩdõ." 
Genesis49:14 A Isakaar yaa bõan-kɛgeng sẽn gãe yãg a yiib sʋka. 
Genesis49:15 Yẽnda mikame tɩ zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn be wã yaa sõama. La tẽngã yaa noogo. Yẽnda kɩlla a bãok tɩ b zɩlg-a zɩɩbo, la a kẽesa a meng yembd tʋʋm-wɛgl pʋga." 
Genesis49:16 A Dan na n yɩɩ a nebã bʋ-kaooda, wa Israyɛll buud a taabã." 
Genesis49:17 A Dan na n yɩɩ wa waaf sẽn be sor zugu, la wa põeer sẽn be sor zugu, n dũmd wed-moaag nao-bendo, t'a wed-rʋʋdã lʋɩt zãmbɛɛla." 
Genesis49:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam gũuda yãmb fãagrã!" 
Genesis49:19 Sã n yaa ne a Gaade, tãb-bi-sull n na n tigim n zab ne yẽnda, la yẽnda na n tõog-b lame n dig-ba!" 
Genesis49:20 Sã n yaa ne a Asɛɛre, yẽnda tẽngã bõn-koaadlã na n woma biis wʋsgo. Yẽnda na n yãka rɩ-nood n kõ rĩm-dãmba." 
Genesis49:21 A Neftali yaa wa walg sẽn tar lohorem n dogd kom-neeba. 
Genesis49:22 A Zozɛf wẽnda tɩɩg yẽgen-tobengo, a yaa wa tɩɩg sẽn be ko-bundum noor yẽgen-tobengo, la a wilã tãoome n zʋʋg lalgã." 
Genesis49:23 Tãb-biis baoo yẽnda noore, la b tãoo yẽnda ne pɛɛma. Yẽnda bɛɛbã rag n yaa tãb-tãoodba." 
Genesis49:24 La yẽnda kell n gãda a tãpã kãenkãe. A Zakoob pãng-soabã paasa yẽnda nusã pãnga. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ yẽnda lebg pe-kɩɩma, n yaa Israyɛll pĩig kugr sẽn tar pãnga." 
Genesis49:25 Bɩ fo ba wã Wẽnnaam sõng foom. Bɩ Sẽn-Tõe-Fãa wã ning foom barka, yaa bark sẽn na n yi yĩngr saasẽ, yaa bark sẽn yɛdg zĩ-zulumsẽ, yaa bark sẽn kõt rogem." 
Genesis49:26 Fo ba wã bark yaa kãseng n yɩɩd neb nins sẽn dog maamã rẽnda. La a yɩɩda hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ tãmsã barkã. La a yɩɩd pĩnd kunkubã bõn-neeba. Bɩ bark-kãensã zĩnd a Zozɛf zugu, bɩ barkã zĩnd soab ning sẽn welg toor a ba-biisã sʋkã zugu." 
Genesis49:27 A Benzame yaa rigd-n-yĩidga. Yibeoogo, yẽnda wãbda a rũnga. La zaabre, yẽnda pʋɩta a sẽn paamã.»" 
Genesis49:28 Yaa nin-bãmbã n yaa Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã. Yɩɩ woto la bãmb ba wã gom ne bãmba, n ning-b zut barka. Yẽnda ninga ned kam fãa zug bark sẽn yaa toor zalle." 
Genesis49:29 Dẽ, a Zakoob yeela a kambã yaa: «Mam na n kiime n bʋʋg m saam-dãmbã sẽn deng maam n ki wã. Bɩ y mum maam n naag m yaab-rãmbã yaad sẽn be tãn-bok ning sẽn be Hɛt ned a Efrõ pʋʋgẽ wã." 
Genesis49:30 Yaa tãn-bok ning sẽn be Makpela pʋʋgã sẽn pẽ Mamre Kana tẽngã. Yaa pʋʋg ning a Abrahaam sẽn deeg Hɛt ned a Efrõ nengẽ n da n maan yaad zĩigã. 
Genesis49:31 Yaa beenẽ la b mum a Abrahaam ne a pag a Saara, la yaa beenẽ me, la b mum a Izak ne a pag a Rebeka. Dẽ wã, yaa beenẽ la mam me mum a Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Bala, b reega pʋʋgã ne tãn-bokã sẽn be beenẽ wã n da Hɛt nebã nengẽ.»" 
Genesis49:33 A Zakoob sẽn gom ne a kambã woto n sɛ, a rʋʋsa a naoã a gãagã zugu, la a kiime tɩ b mum-a n naag a saam-dãmbã." 
Genesis50:1 A Zozɛf vãbnega a nengã a ba wã neng zug n yãbe, la a mogsd-a." 
Genesis50:2 Rẽ zugẽ, a Zozɛf kɩtame t'a tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda n yaa logtoɛɛmbã segl a ba a Israyɛll kũumã ne wisd buud toor-toore. La logtoɛɛmbã sogla kũumã" 
Genesis50:3 La bãmb rɩka rasem pis-naase, a Israyɛll kũumã seglg yĩnga, wa sẽn zems rasem sõor ning b sẽn tog dɩk n segl kũumã. Ezɩpt tẽng nebã rɩka rasem pis-yopoe n yãb a Israyɛll kũumã." 
Genesis50:4 La rasem sõor ning nebã sẽn tog n dɩk n yãb kũumã yĩngã sẽn sɛ, a Zozɛf goma ne rĩm a Faarõ yirã rãmb n yeele: «Yãmb sã n nong maam, mam kotame tɩ y yeel Faarõ," 
Genesis50:5 tɩ mam ba wã rag n kɩtame tɩ mam wẽen ne-a. A yeela maam a woto: ‹Mam na n kiime! La mam datame tɩ f mum maam yaoog ning pʋg mam sẽn dag n tu Kana tẽngã.› Dẽ wã, mam datame n kẽng n tɩ mum m ba wã la m wa.»" 
Genesis50:6 La Faarõ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ mum f ba wã, wala a sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ fo wẽen to-to wã.»" 
Genesis50:7 Dẽ, a Zozɛf kẽngame n na n tɩ mum a ba wã. Woto, Faarõ na-yirã tʋmtʋmdbã fãa tũume, la Ezɩpt tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã fãa tũume." 
Genesis50:8 A Zozɛf zakã rãmb fãa, ne a kẽem-dãmbã, ne a ba wã zak-rãmb fãa tũume n kẽnge. Yaa kambã bala, ne rũm-bãoonegã ne rũm-bɛdã bal n pa Gosɛn tẽngã pʋga." 
Genesis50:9 La Saar-dãmb ne wed-rʋʋdb me n tũ a Zozɛfe. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ nebã sẽn dag n yãagd yẽnda wã sõor dag n yaa wʋsgo. 
Genesis50:10 La bãmb sẽn wa n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n ta Ataad zĩ-peellã, bãmb yãba wʋsgo, la a Zozɛf yãba a ba wã kʋʋr beenẽ rasem a yopoe." 
Genesis50:11 La Kana tẽngã nebã sẽn yãnd bãmb sẽn be Ataad zĩ-peellẽ wã n yãbdã, bãmb yeelame: «Ad yõwã yaa Ezɩpt tẽng nebã kʋ-kãsenga.» Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b pʋd zĩ-kãng sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã yʋʋr tɩ Abɛll-Mitsrayim, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Ezɩpt kʋʋre.›" 
Genesis50:12 A Zakoob kambã maana wa bãmb ba wã sẽn dag n yeel bãmb tɩ b maanã. 
Genesis50:13 A Zakoob kambã talla yẽnda n kẽng Kana tẽng n tɩ mum Makpela pʋʋgã pʋg tãn-bokã pʋgẽ, sẽn yaa a Abrahaam pʋʋg a sẽn dag n deeg Hɛt ned a Efrõ nengẽ n da tɩ yaa a meng rẽnda, n lebg yaad zĩigã. Zĩ-kãng rag n pẽe Mamre." 
Genesis50:14 A Zozɛf sẽn tɩ mum a ba wã n sɛ, yẽnda ne a kẽem-dãmbã, la neb nins fãa sẽn tũ yẽnda n na n tɩ mum a ba wã, lebg n leba Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Genesis50:15 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã sẽn yãnd tɩ b ba wã kiime wã, bãmb yeelame: «Rẽ yĩnga, a Zozɛf ka na n kisg tõndo, a ka na n maan tõnd wẽng n lebs wẽng ning tõnd sẽn dag n maan yẽnda wã sɩda?»" 
Genesis50:16 Dẽ, bãmb tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeela a Zozɛf yaa: «Ad yãmb ba wã sẽn dag togs bũmb ning n yaool n ki:" 
Genesis50:17 ‹Yeel-y-yã a Zozɛf yaa: Mam kota foom tɩ f maan f kẽem-dãmbã sugri, b beegrã, ne b yel-wẽnã yĩnga. Bala, bãmb maana foom wẽnga! Dẽ, mam kot-f lame tɩ f maan f ba wã Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdb sugr b yel-wẽndã yĩnga!› » La b sẽn togs a Zozɛf gom-kãens n sɛ, a Zozɛf yãbame." 
Genesis50:18 A Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã waa a Zozɛf nengẽ b toore, n ta n wõgemd a Zozɛf taoor n yeel yaa: «Tõnd la woto, tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba.»" 
Genesis50:19 A Zozɛf yeela a kẽem-dãmbã yaa: «Ra zoe-y rabeem ye! Mam bee Wẽnnaam zĩigẽ la? 
Genesis50:20 Yãmb dag n saagame n dat n maan maam wẽnga, la Wẽnnaam wẽnemd-a lame t'a lebg neere, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pids bũmb ning sẽn maand rũndã wã, n fãag buud wʋsg vɩɩm." 
Genesis50:21 Dẽ wã, bɩ y ra leb n zoe rabeem ye. Mam na n gesa yãmb yell ne bũmb fãa, la m ges yãmb kambã yelle.» A Zozɛf goma ne bãmb a woto n bels-ba, la b pɛlgã gãandame." 
Genesis50:22 A Zozɛf ne a yirã rãmb zĩnda Ezɩpt tẽnga. A Zozɛf vɩɩmda yʋʋm koabg la piiga. 
Genesis50:23 A Zozɛf yãnda a Efrayiim kambã, ne a yagense, la a yãnd a yagensã kamba. La a Manaase biig a Makɩɩr kambã roga a Zozɛf nifẽ, la a reeg-b-la a naoẽ." 
Genesis50:24 A Zozɛf yeela a kẽem-dãmbã yaa: «Mam na n wa n kiime! La Wẽnnaam na n wa yiisa yãmb tẽn-kãngã, la yaa bũmb sẽn na n pidsi, la b na n tall-y lame n kẽng tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n kõ a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoobã.»" 
Genesis50:25 A Zozɛf kɩtame t'a Israyɛll kambã wẽene. La a yeel-b lame yaa: «Wẽnnaam sã n wa leok y kosgo, n yiis yãmb tẽn-kãngã, bɩ y zɩ mam kõabã n yi ka n looge.»" 
Genesis50:26 A Zozɛf sẽn wa n na n ki wã, t'a tara yʋʋm koabg la piiga. La b segla a Zozɛf kũumã n ning wisd buud toor-toore, n ning kũum koglg pʋg n bĩng Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga." 
Exodus1:1 Ad a Israyɛll b sẽn boond t'a Zakoobã kamb nins sẽn tũ a yẽnda n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽngã yʋyã, la yaa ned kam fãa ne a zak rãmba:" 
Exodus1:2 Yaa a Rubɛn ne a Sɩmyõ, a Leevi ne a Zʋʋda," 
Exodus1:3 a Isakaar ne a Zabulõ la a Benzame," 
Exodus1:4 a Dan ne a Neftali la a Gaad ne a Asɛɛre. 
Exodus1:5 A Zakoob yagensã fãa rag n yaa neb pis-yopoe. Wakat-kãng t'a Zozɛf bee Ezɩpt tẽnga. 
Exodus1:6 A Zozɛf ne a ba-biisã fãa, la zamaan-kãng nebã fãa wa n kiime." 
Exodus1:7 La Israyɛll yagensã rogame n fɩɩg n pid tẽngã, la b pãngã rag n tara paasgo." 
Exodus1:8 La rĩm-paalg sẽn dag n ka bãng a Zozɛf n wa n na n soog Ezɩpte. 
Exodus1:9 Rĩmã yeela a nebã yaa: «Ade, Israyɛll nebã sõor yɩɩda tõndo, la b pãngã yɩɩda tõndo." 
Exodus1:10 Dẽ wã, wa-y tɩ d maan yam ne-ba, tɩ b ra wa fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg ye. Bala, zabr sã n yiki, b na n naaga tõnd bɛɛbã n zab ne tõndo, la b zoe n yi tẽngã.»" 
Exodus1:11 Dẽ, b yãka yembd tʋʋm taoor dãmba, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b modg Israyɛll nebã n kɩt tɩ b tʋm tʋʋm-wɛgla. Yɩɩ woto tɩ b me teed bĩngr tẽmse, Faarõ yĩnga: Yaa Pitom ne Ramsɛɛse." 
Exodus1:12 La baa ne b sẽn dag n namsd Israyɛll nebã, Israyɛll nebã rag n tara fɩɩgre, tɩ b sõorã tar paasgo. Bõn-kãng kɩtame tɩ b rag n kis Israyɛll nebã." 
Exodus1:13 Dẽ, Ezɩpt nebã modga Israyɛll nebã n kɩt tɩ b maan yembd tʋʋm sẽn yaa toog hal wʋsgo." 
Exodus1:14 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã maan yembd tʋʋm sẽn yaa toogo, n kɩt tɩ b vɩɩmã lebg toogo: Yaa tãnd buiibu, tãn-koɛɛm wẽebo, la pʋt pʋsẽ tʋʋm buud fãa. Woto n dag n yaa yembd tʋʋm nins fãa b sẽn dag n modgd bãmb tɩ b tʋmdẽ wã." 
Exodus1:15 Ezɩpt rĩmã goma ne Ebre nebã pʋg-roagsdbã me. Pʋg-roags a yembr yʋʋr la a Sɩfra t'a yembr yʋʋr yaa a Puwa. 
Exodus1:16 Rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa rogsd Ebre nebã pagbã, yãmb sã n ges b rogmã zĩigẽ n mik tɩ bi-pɛɛlgã yaa bi-ribla, bɩ y kʋ-a, la a sã n yaa bi-pugla, bɩ y bas-a t'a vɩɩmde.»" 
Exodus1:17 La pʋg-roagsdbã zoee Wẽnnaam n ka maan wa Faarõ sẽn yeel bãmbã ye. Bãmb basa kom-dibli wã n ka kʋ ye. 
Exodus1:18 Dẽ, Ezɩpt rĩmã boola pʋg-roagsdbã tɩ b wa, la yẽnda soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maan a woto? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb basd kom-dibli wã n ka kʋʋda?»" 
Exodus1:19 Pʋg-roagsdbã leoka Faarõ n yeel yaa: «Ade, yaa tɩ Ebre nebã pagb ka wẽnd Ezɩpt pagbã ye. Bãmb yaa pagb sẽn tar pãnga, dẽ, bãmb dogda tao-tao tɩ pʋg-roagsã nan ka wa ye.»" 
Exodus1:20 Wẽnnaam maana pʋg-roagsdbã neere, la Ebre nebã fɩɩgame n paam pãng wʋsgo." 
Exodus1:21 Pʋg-roagsdbã sẽn zoe Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam kõ-b-la yagense." 
Exodus1:22 Dẽ, Faarõ yeela a nebã fãa yaa: «Kom-dibli nins fãa sẽn na n dogã bɩ y lob-b Nill kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ, la y bas kom-pugli wã fãa tɩ b vɩɩmde.»" 
Exodus2:1 Leevi buudã rao a yembr peega Leevi buudã bi-pugl a yembr n maan a paga. 
Exodus2:2 Pagã rɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla. Yẽnda sẽn yãnd tɩ biigã yaa neerã, a solg-a-la kiis a tãabo." 
Exodus2:3 Yẽnda sẽn wa n ka leb n tõe n solg biigã n kaoosã, a baoo peoog sẽn maan ne rudum n bolg-a ne sũud la ne kontaale. Yẽnda rɩka biigã n sagl peoogã pʋgẽ n tɩ ning rudmã sẽn be Nill kʋɩlgã noorã sʋka." 
Exodus2:4 La biigã tão rag n yasa yɩɩg bilf n get bũmb ning sẽn na n maan biigã. 
Exodus2:5 Faarõ bi-puglã siga Nill kʋɩlgẽ wã n na n so koom, la pʋg-sadb nins sẽn dag n tũud yẽnda wã rag n yegda kʋɩlgã n kẽnda. Faarõ bi-puglã yãnda peoogã sẽn be rudmã sʋkã. La a tʋma a tʋmtʋmd-poakã t'a tɩ rɩk-a n wa." 
Exodus2:6 Yẽnda sẽn fõk peoogã, a yãnda biigã: Rag n yaa bi-ribl-bilf n dag n be beenẽ n yãbda. Biigã nimbãaneg yõka Faarõ bi-puglã, t'a yeele: «Yõwã yaa Ebre nebã biiga.»" 
Exodus2:7 Dẽ, biigã tão-poak soka Faarõ bi-puglã yaa: «Yãmb datame tɩ mam tɩ bool pag a yembr Ebre pagbã sʋk t'a wa reeg biigã n yẽsem n kõ-y bɩ?»" 
Exodus2:8 Faarõ bi-puglã yeelame t'a kẽnge. Dẽ, bi-puglã kẽngame n tɩ bool biigã ma." 
Exodus2:9 Faarõ bi-puglã yeela pagã t'a reeg biigã n tɩ yẽsem n kõ-a t'a na n yao-a lame. Dẽ, pagã rɩka biigã n tɩ yẽsme." 
Exodus2:10 Biigã sẽn bɩ, pagã tall-a lame n tɩ kɩs Faarõ bi-puglã, t'a lebg wa yẽnda meng biiga. Yẽnda pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Moyiisi, n yeele: «Bala, mam yaaga yẽnda koom pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus2:11 Wakat-kãnga, a Moyiis sẽn wa n lebg bi-kãsenga, a yiime n kẽng n na n tɩ ges a saam-biisã, la a yãnda tʋʋm-wɛglã b sẽn tʋmdã. Yẽnda yãnda Ezɩpt ned a yembr sẽn pãbd Ebre ned sẽn yaa yẽnda saam-biiga." 
Exodus2:12 Dẽ, yẽnda wẽnemdame n ges zĩigã fãa, la a sẽn ka yãnd neda, a kʋʋ Ezɩpt raoã n bus bĩisr pʋgẽ." 
Exodus2:13 La vẽkembeoogo, a Moyiis leb n yiime. Yẽnda yãnda Ebre raop a yiib sẽn zabd taaba. Dẽ, yẽnda soka sẽn ka-a bʋʋmã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo pãbd f to wã?»" 
Exodus2:14 Raoã leoka yẽnda yaa: «Ãnda n kõ foom noor tɩ f soog tõndo la f yɩ tõnd bʋ-kaooda? Fo rat n kʋʋ maam wa fo sẽn kʋ Ezɩpt nedã bɩ?» Dẽ, rabeem yõka a Moyiisi, t'a yeel tɩ yellã pukame." 
Exodus2:15 Faarõ sẽn wʋm yellã, a baoo a Moyiis n na n kʋ. La a Moyiis zoeeme n na n põs Faarõ, la yẽnda kẽnga Madiyã. Yẽnda zĩnda bulg a yembr noore." 
Exodus2:16 Madiyã tẽng maan-kʋʋdã rag n tara kom-pugli a yopoe. La bãmb waame n na n toog koom n ning kogendẽ wã n yũnug b ba wã rũmsi. 
Exodus2:17 La rũm-kɩɩmb n wa n dig bãmba. La a Moyiis yikame n zab n sõng kom-pugli wã tɩ b tõog n yũnug b rũmsã. 
Exodus2:18 Bãmb sẽn lebg n kẽng b ba a Rehuwɛll nengẽ, yẽnda soka bãmb yaa: «Maana a wãn tɩ yãmb lebg n wat tao-tao a woto rũndã?»" 
Exodus2:19 Bãmb leokame: «Ezɩpt ned a yembr n fãag tõnd dũm-kɩɩmbã nusẽ, n tol n toog koom n yũnug tõnd dũmsã.»" 
Exodus2:20 A Rehuwɛll soka a kom-pugli wã yaa: «Nin-kãng bee yɛɛnẽ? Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb bas raoã beenẽ? Kẽng-y n tɩ bool-y-yã-a t'a wa rɩ.» 
Exodus2:21 A Moyiis sakame n na n zĩnd rao-kãng yirã. La a Rehuwɛll rɩka a bi-pugl a Sefoora n kõ-a t'a maan a paga. 
Exodus2:22 A Sefoora roga bi-ribla, la a Moyiis pʋda yẽnda yʋʋr t'a Gersom, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹sãando.› Bala, yẽnda yeelame: «Mam yaa sãan tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus2:23 Sẽn kaoos wʋsg rẽ zugẽ, Ezɩpt rĩmã kiime. La Israyɛll nebã rag n yãbdame la b kelemd b yembdã pʋga. Bãmb sẽn dag n kelemd n baood sõngr b yembdã pʋgẽ wã zẽk n taa Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Exodus2:24 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam wʋma bãmb yãbrã, n tẽeg kaool ning bãmb sẽn dag n maan ne a Abrahaam la a Izak ne a Zakoobã yelle." 
Exodus2:25 Wẽnnaam gesa Israyɛll nebã, la Wẽnnaam bãnga b namsgã." 
Exodus3:1 A Moyiis rag n kɩɩmda a rɛɛmb a Zetro sẽn yaa Madiyã maan-kʋʋdã rũmsi. Yẽnda talla rũmsã n kẽng we-raoogã wã n ta Horɛɛbe, Wẽnnaam tãngẽ wã." 
Exodus3:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã vẽnega a meng ne a Moyiis bug-witim pʋgẽ tuug sʋka. A Moyiis rag n getame, la ade, bugum n dag n wit tuugã sʋka, la a ka rɩt tuugã ye." 
Exodus3:3 A Moyiis yeelame: «Mam na n bʋdg n gesa yel-solem-kãngã. Yaa bõe tɩ bugmã ka rɩt tuugã?» 
Exodus3:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãnd tɩ yẽnda bʋdgame n na n gese, bãmb koɛɛgã yii tuugã sʋk n yeele: «Moyiisi! Moyiisi!» La yẽnda sakame n yeele: «Ad maam!»" 
Exodus3:5 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yeelame yaa: «Da kolg ka ye. Piid f neooda wã, bala, zĩig ning fo sẽn yɛsã yaa zĩig sẽn welg toore.»" 
Exodus3:6 Bãmb leb n yeelame: «Mam yaa fo ba wã Wẽnnaam, n yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam.» La a Moyiis luda a nenga, bala, yẽnda rag n zoeta rabeem n ka rat n ges Wẽnnaam ye." 
Exodus3:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Sɩdã, mam yãnda m nebã sẽn be Ezɩptã namsgã. Mam wʋma bãmb kelemsã, tʋʋm-soaadbã sẽn namsd bãmb tɩ b kelemdẽ wã. N-yẽe! Mam mii toog ning sẽn tar bãmbã." 
Exodus3:8 Mam sigame n na n fãag bãmb Ezɩpt nebã nusẽ, la m yiis bãmb soolem-kãng pʋgẽ n tall bãmb n kẽng tẽn-sõng sẽn yaa bedr pʋgẽ. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo. Yaa tẽng ning Kana-rãmbã ne Hɛt-dãmbã la Amoor-dãmbã ne Ferɛɛz-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn be wã." 
Exodus3:9 Moasã, Israyɛll nebã kelems taa maam. La sẽn paas me, mam yãnda namsg ning Ezɩpt nebã sẽn namsd bãmbã." 
Exodus3:10 Moasã, bɩ f kẽnge. Mam tʋmda foom Faarõ nengẽ tɩ f tɩ yiis mam nebã sẽn yaa Israyɛll kambã Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus3:11 La a Moyiis yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Maam la ãnda n na n kẽng Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt soolem pʋgẽ?» 
Exodus3:12 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Mam na n zĩnda ne foom. La ad bãnd ning sẽn na n kɩt tɩ fo bãng tɩ yaa maam n tʋm foom. Fo sã n tõog n tall nebã n yi Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã, bɩ y waoog Wẽnnaam tãn-kãngã zugu.»" 
Exodus3:13 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Beneere! Wa mam sã n kẽng Israyɛll nebã nengẽ n tɩ yeel bãmb tɩ bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam n tʋm maam b nengẽ, tɩ bãmb sok maam a yʋʋre, mam na n leok-b lame tɩ bõe?»" 
Exodus3:14 La Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Mam yaa m sẽn yaa-a soabã.» La bãmb leb n yeela yẽnda n paase: Tɩ yeel Israyɛll nebã a woto: «A ‹Mam yaa› n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ.» 
Exodus3:15 Wẽnnaam leb n yeela a Moyiis t'a tɩ yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, n yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ.» Yõwã na n yɩɩ mam yʋʋr wakat fãa. Nebã na n boonda maam ne yʋ-kãng zamaan woo zamaane." 
Exodus3:16 Kẽng n tɩ tigs Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã n yeel-b yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã puka b meng ne maam. Bãmb yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam. Bãmb yeela maam yaa: «Mam waame n na n sõng yãmba, b sẽn maand yãmb bũmb ning Ezɩpt tẽngã yĩnga." 
Exodus3:17 Mam yeelame tɩ m na n yiisa yãmb namsg ning b sẽn namsd yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ wã pʋga, n tall yãmb n kẽng Kana nebã ne Hɛt-dãmbã la Amoor-dãmbã ne Ferɛɛz-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuus-rãmbã tẽngẽ. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo.»" 
Exodus3:18 Dẽ, bãmb na n kelga fo koɛɛgã. Bɩ foom ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã kẽng Ezɩpt rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel yẽnda yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã waa tõnd nengẽ. Dẽ, tõnd kota yãmb sor moasã n kẽng rasem a tãab kẽnd we-raoogã pʋgẽ n tɩ maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Exodus3:19 Mam mii hakɩɩk tɩ sã n ka tũ ne nug sẽn tar pãnga, Ezɩpt rĩmã ka na n sak n bas yãmb tɩ y loog ye." 
Exodus3:20 La mam na n tẽega m nug n wẽ Ezɩpt ne bõn-bãn nins fãa mam sẽn na n maan bãmb sʋkã. Dẽ poore, a na n basa yãmb tɩ y looge." 
Exodus3:21 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã nong nin-kãensã. Yãmb sã n wa na n looge, y ka na n loog zaalem ye." 
Exodus3:22 Pag fãa na n kos a yaka, ne pag ning sẽn be yẽnda zakẽ wã wanzuri teed ne sãnem teedo, la futu, tɩ y yeelg y kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli wã. Yaa woto la yãmb na n pɩɩs Ezɩpt nebã paoongã." 
Exodus4:1 A Moyiis yeelame: «Israyɛll nebã ka na n tẽ maam, la b ka na n kelg maam ye. Bãmb na n yeelame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka vẽneg b meng ne maam ye.»" 
Exodus4:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka yẽnda yaa: «Yaa bõe n be fo nugẽ wã?» Yẽnda leokame: «Yaa dasaare.» 
Exodus4:3 La Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Lob-a tẽnga.» Dẽ, yẽnda lob-a-la tẽnga, la a lebga waafo. La a Moyiis zoee waafã taoore." 
Exodus4:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tẽeg f nug n gãd waafã zʋʋre.» A Moyiis tẽega a nug n gãd waafã, la a leb n lebga dasaar yẽnda nugẽ wã." 
Exodus4:5 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Woto yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ nebã tẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, n yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã n vẽneg b meng ne foom.»" 
Exodus4:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne yẽnda n yeele: «M kotame tɩ f tʋm f nugã f yãoogẽ wã.» Dẽ, yẽnda tʋma a nugã a yãoogẽ wã. La a sẽn yiis a nugã, wãood n dag n yõk a nugã t'a lebg pɛɛlg wa neeze." 
Exodus4:7 Dẽ, bãmb leb n yeela yẽnda yaa: «Lebs n tʋm f nugã f yãoogẽ wã.» La yẽnda lebs n tʋma a nugã a yãoogẽ wã. La a sẽn yiis a nugã n gese, a mikame t'a nugã leb n lebga wa yẽnda yĩngã fãa." 
Exodus4:8 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «Bãmb sã n ka tẽ foom, la b sã n ka sak n deeg dẽenem bãndã yĩnga, b na n tẽe yaoolem bãndã yĩnga." 
Exodus4:9 La bãmb sã n ka tẽ bãn-kãens a yiibã fãa, la b sã n ka sak n kelg fo koɛɛgã, bɩ f yãk Nill kʋɩlgã koom n pʋdg tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu, la kʋɩlgã koom fo sẽn na n yãkã na n lebga zɩɩm tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu.»" 
Exodus4:10 A Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «M Soaala, y kabre. Mam ka gom-minim soab ye. Ka zaamẽ, ka rabɩtẽ wall yãmb sẽn sɩng n gomd ne mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã zugẽ me ye. La yaa tɩ mam sɩng n yaa bidga.»" 
Exodus4:11 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ãnda n kɩbg ninsaal noore? La ãnda n kɩtd tɩ ned lebg muk wall wʋnga, la ãnda n kõt ned nin wall a kɩt t'a lebg zoanga? Ka maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab la?" 
Exodus4:12 Moasã, bɩ f kẽng tɩ mam meng na n zĩnda ne fo noorã, la m zãms foom bũmb ning fo sẽn segd n togsã.»" 
Exodus4:13 La a Moyiis leokame: «Y kabre, m Soaala! M kotame tɩ y tʋm yãmb sẽn dat-a soaba!»" 
Exodus4:14 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne a Moyiisi, la b yeelame: «Fo ba-biig a Aarõ sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nedã ka be la? Mam miime tɩ yẽnda tõe n goma naana-naana. Ade, yẽnda wat n na n sega foom. La yẽnda sã n yãnd foom, a sũur na n yɩɩ noogo." 
Exodus4:15 Dẽ, bɩ f gom ne-a n ning goamã a noorẽ. Mam na n zĩnda ne fo noorã, la m zĩnd ne yẽnda noorã, la mam na n wilga yãmb bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tog n maane." 
Exodus4:16 Yẽnda na n goma ne nebã fo yĩnga. La yẽnda na n lebga wa fo noore, la fo na n yɩɩ wa wẽnnaam yẽnda yĩnga." 
Exodus4:17 La bɩ f zã dasaarã f nugẽ, tɩ yaa yẽnda la fo na n tall n maan bõn-bãna.»" 
Exodus4:18 Dẽ, a Moyiis yii zĩ-kãng n kẽng a rɛɛmb a Zetro nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «M kota sor n kuil m ba-biisã sẽn be Ezɩptã nengẽ n tɩ ges b sã n ket n vɩɩme.» La a Zetro yeela a Moyiisi: «Kẽng ne bãane!»" 
Exodus4:19 A Moyiis sẽn be Madiyã soolmẽ wã, Wẽnnaam yeel-a yẽnda: «Lebg n leb Ezɩpte. Bala, neb nins sẽn dag n baood foom n na n kʋ wã kiime.»" 
Exodus4:20 Dẽ, a Moyiis kɩtame t'a pagã ne a kom-dibli wã zomb bõense. La yẽnda leba Ezɩpt tẽnga. A Moyiis rag n zãada Wẽnnaam dasaarã a nugẽ." 
Exodus4:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Moasã, fo sẽn lebg n lebd Ezɩptã, ges mam sẽn ning bõn-bãn nins fãa fo nugẽ wã, n maan-b Faarõ taoore. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Faarõ keng a sũurã n ka sak n kõ nebã sor tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus4:22 Fo na n yeela Faarõ yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Israyɛll yaa mam bi-ribl-kãsenga.›" 
Exodus4:23 Mam yeta foom tɩ f bas m bi-riblã t'a kẽng n tɩ waoog maam. La fo sã n kɩɩs n ka bas yẽnda t'a kẽnge, mam na n kʋʋ fo bi-ribl-kãsengã.»" 
Exodus4:24 Bãmb sẽn wa n be so-toakã zugu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sega a Moyiis sikã zĩigẽ, n baood n na n kʋ-a." 
Exodus4:25 La a Sefoora rɩka kug-sɩleng n wãag a biigã yo-gãongo, n sɩɩs a Moyiis naoã la a yetẽ: «Fo yaa mam zɩɩm sɩda!»" 
Exodus4:26 A Sefoora sẽn yeel tɩ «mam zɩɩm sɩdã,» Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa a Moyiis taale, bãongã kẽesg yĩnga." 
Exodus4:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ seg a Moyiis we-raoogã pʋgẽ.» Dẽ, a Aarõ kẽngame n tɩ seg a Moyiis Wẽnnaam tãngã zugu, n mok-a." 
Exodus4:28 La a Moyiis togsa a Aarõ goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom ne yẽnda n tʋm yẽnda t'a tɩ togsã, la bõn-bãn nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yẽnda noor t'a maanã." 
Exodus4:29 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ kẽngame n tɩ tigim Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã fãa. 
Exodus4:30 La a Aarõ togsa goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Moyiisã. Dẽ, a Moyiis maana bõn-bãnã nebã nifẽ." 
Exodus4:31 La nebã tẽeme. Bãmb sẽn wʋm tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n na n sõnga Israyɛll nebã, tɩ la b yãnda bãmb namsgã, Israyɛll nebã sulga b zut n wõgemd tẽnga." 
Exodus5:1 Dẽ poore, a Moyiis ne a Aarõ kẽnga Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ maan tigr mam yĩng we-raoogẽ wã.»" 
Exodus5:2 La Faarõ leokame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa ãnda tɩ mam na n kelg bãmb koɛɛg n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b looge? Mam ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la m ka na n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b loog ye!»" 
Exodus5:3 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ yeelame: «Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã waa tõnd nengẽ. Tõnd kotame tɩ y bas-d tɩ d kẽng n tɩ kẽn dasem a tãab kẽnd we-raoogẽ wã n maan maand n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, tɩ b ra wa wẽ tõnd ne bã-loangd wall ne zabr sʋʋg ye.»" 
Exodus5:4 La Ezɩpt rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Moyiis ne a Aarõ, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb dat n kɩt tɩ nebã bas b tʋʋmã? Kẽng-y n tɩ maan-y y tʋʋm-wɛglã!»" 
Exodus5:5 Faarõ yeelame: «Tẽngã nin-kãensã sẽn lebg wʋsg moasã wã la yãmb dat n kɩt tɩ bãmb bas b tʋʋm-wɛglã?» 
Exodus5:6 Badaar bala, Faarõ yeela tʋʋm taoor dãmbã ne sẽn gʋnd-b sɛbã yaa:" 
Exodus5:7 «Ra leb-y n kõ-y nebã mood tɩ b wẽ tãn-koɛɛmã wa b sẽn mi n maand raasenkamã ye. Bɩ bãmb mensã kẽng n tɩ wʋke. 
Exodus5:8 La baoosgo, kɩt-y tɩ b wẽ tãn-koɛɛm tɩ b sõor ta wa b sẽn dag n wẽed raasenkamã, la y ra tol n boog b sõorã ye. Bala, nebã lebga kʋɩɩmba. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ bãmb kelemdẽ n yetẽ tɩ b bas bãmb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ maan maoong n kõ bãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Exodus5:9 Paas-y nin-bãmbã tʋʋmã, tɩ b ra leb n paam vɩʋʋg n kelg zĩrẽ goam ye!»" 
Exodus5:10 Dẽ, tʋʋm-soaadbã ne nebã seb-gʋndbã yik n yiime n gom ne nebã n yeele: «Faarõ yeelame t'a ka na n leb n kõ yãmb mood ye." 
Exodus5:11 Kẽng-y toor n tɩ bao mood zĩig ning yãmb sẽn tõe n paamẽ. La b ka na n boog yãmb tʋʋmdã baa bilf ye.» 
Exodus5:12 Dẽ, nebã sãeega Ezɩpt soolmã tɛk fãa n wʋk mood n wõr n kalem ne tãndã." 
Exodus5:13 La tʋʋm taoor dãmbã modga bãmb n yeele: «Maan-y yãmb daar fãa tʋʋmdã n sɛ, wa b sẽn dag n mi n kõt yãmb moodã wakatã!»" 
Exodus5:14 Faarõ tʋʋm-soaadbã tol n pãba neb nins bãmb sẽn dag n yãk Israyɛll nebã sʋk tɩ b yaa seb-gʋndbã, n sok bãmb tɩ yaa bõe tɩ bãmb ka sak n wẽ tãn-koɛɛmã zaamẽ ne rũndã tɩ b sõorã ta wa b sẽn dag n mi n maand raasenkamã?" 
Exodus5:15 Israyɛll nebã seb-gʋndbã kẽnga Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yẽgem ne-a n yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã a woto? 
Exodus5:16 B ka leb n kõt tõnd moodo, la b yaool n yet tõnd tɩ d wẽ tãn-koɛɛmã! B pãbda tõndo, tɩ yaool n yaa yãmb nebã n beege!»" 
Exodus5:17 La Faarõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Yaa kʋɩɩm n tar yãmba! Y yaa kʋɩɩmb bala! Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ y rat n kẽngame n tɩ maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Exodus5:18 Moasã, leb-y y tʋʋmdẽ wã. B ka na n leb n kõ yãmb moodo, la y na n wẽe tãn-koɛɛmã t'a sõorã ta wa yãmb sẽn mi n maand raasenkamã.»" 
Exodus5:19 Israyɛll nebã seb-gʋndbã yãame tɩ b sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ b ra sak n boog daar fãa tãn-koɛɛmã sõorã, yaa yel-pakr pʋg la b kẽes bãmba." 
Exodus5:20 Dẽ, bãmb sẽn yi Faarõ nengẽ wã, b sega a Moyiis ne a Aarõ sẽn dag n yas n gũud bãmba." 
Exodus5:21 B yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ges yãmb yell n bʋ yãmb bʋʋdo. Yãmb n maan tɩ Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã tugd beem ne tõndo. Yãmb dɩka zabr sʋʋg n ning b nugẽ tɩ b na n kʋ tõndo.» 
Exodus5:22 Dẽ, a Moyiis lebg n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «M Soaala, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maan nin-bãmbã wẽnga? Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tʋm maam?" 
Exodus5:23 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning mam sẽn kẽng Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ gom ne yãmb yʋʋrã, yẽnda maanda nebã wẽnga, la yãmb ka tol n fãag y nebã ye!»" 
Exodus6:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Moasã, fo na n yãnda bũmb ning mam sẽn na n maan Faarõ. Yaa nug sẽn tar pãng n na n kɩt tɩ yẽnda bas nebã tɩ b looge. N-yẽe, nug sẽn tar pãng n na n kɩt tɩ Faarõ rig bãmb tɩ b yi n bas a tẽngã.»" 
Exodus6:2 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Exodus6:3 Mam vẽnega m meng ne a Abrahaam la a Izak ne a Zakoob n wilg bãmb tɩ mam yaa Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam. La mam ka kɩt tɩ bãmb bãng tɩ mam yʋʋr la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. 
Exodus6:4 La mam maana kãabg ne bãmb n yeel-b tɩ mam na n kõ-b-la Kana tẽngã, tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n yaa sãamb a pʋgẽ wã." 
Exodus6:5 La sẽn paase, mam wʋma Ezɩpt nebã sẽn kẽes Israyɛll nebã yembd tɩ b yãbdã, la mam tẽega m kãabgã." 
Exodus6:6 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ f yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la m na n yiisa Israyɛll nebã tʋʋm-wɛgl nins Ezɩpt nebã sẽn modg bãmb tɩ b maanã pʋgẽ. La mam na n fãaga bãmb n yiis-b yembd ning pʋg Ezɩpt nebã sẽn kẽes bãmbã. Yaa kang sẽn tar pãng la mam na n tẽeg n fãag yãmba. La mam na n sɩbga bãmb ne sɩbgr sẽn yaa kãseng n fãag yãmba." 
Exodus6:7 Mam na n deega yãmb tɩ y yɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam. La yãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn fãag-a yãmb ne tʋʋm-wɛgl nins Ezɩpt nebã sẽn modg yãmb tɩ y maanã." 
Exodus6:8 Mam na n talla yãmb n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n zẽk m nug n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõo a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoobã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kõo yãmb tẽngã tɩ y sooge.» 
Exodus6:9 A Moyiis togsa Israyɛll nebã gom-kãensã, la b ka kelg a Moyiis ye. Bala, bãmb dag n bee sũ-sãang pʋga, b yembdã sẽn yaa toogã yĩnga." 
Exodus6:10 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa:" 
Exodus6:11 «Kẽng n tɩ togs Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã t'a kõ Israyɛll nebã sor tɩ b yi soolmã pʋgẽ.» 
Exodus6:12 La a Moyiis yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n gom n yeele: «Israyɛll nebã sã n ka kelg maam, Faarõ na n maana a wãn n kelg mam sẽn yaa ned sẽn ka tõe goamã?»"
