Exodus6:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis la Aarõ, n wilg bãmb b sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, sẽn kẽed ne Israyɛll nebã la Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã wɛɛngẽ, sẽn na n yɩl n yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt soolmã pʋga." 
Exodus6:14 Woto yaa bãmb buudã kãsem-dãmb yʋya. A Israyɛll bi-kãseng a Rubɛn kom-dibli yaa a Henoke, a Palu, a Hɛsron ne a Karmi. Bãmb yaa a Rubɛn yagense." 
Exodus6:15 A Sɩmyõ kom-dibli yaa a Yemuwɛlle, a Yamindi, a Ohaade, a Yakindi, a Sokaar la Kana tẽng pagã biig a Sayulli. Bãmb yaa a Sɩmyõ yagense." 
Exodus6:16 Ad a Leevi kom-dibli ne a yagens yʋy wa sẽn zems b roto: A Gerson ne a Kehat la Merari. A Leevi vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe. 
Exodus6:17 A Gɛrson kom-dibli yaa a Libni ne a Sɩmeyi ne bãmb buudu. 
Exodus6:18 A Kehat kom-dibli yaa a Amram ne a Yitsehaar la a Ebrõ ne a Uziyɛlle. A Kehat vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã la a tãabo. 
Exodus6:19 A Merari kom-dibli yaa a Makli ne a Musi. Bãmb fãa yaa a Leevi yagense, wa sẽn zems b roto." 
Exodus6:20 A Amram peega a pʋgdb a Zokebɛɛd n maan a paga, n dog a Aarõ ne a Moyiisi. A Amram vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe." 
Exodus6:21 A Yitsehaar kom-dibli yaa a Koore ne a Nefɛɛg la a Zikri. 
Exodus6:22 A Uziyɛll kom-dibli yaa a Misayɛll ne a Ɛlsafan la a Sitri. 
Exodus6:23 A Aarõ peega a Nakson tão a Eliseba sẽn yaa a Aminadaab bi-puglã n maan a paga. La yẽnda roga a Nadaab ne a Abihu la a Eleyazaar ne a Itamaare. 
Exodus6:24 A Koore kom-dibli yaa a Asɩɩr ne a Ɛlkana la a Abiyazafe. Bãmb yaa a Koore yagense. 
Exodus6:25 A Aarõ bi-ribl a Eleyazaar peega a Putiyɛll bi-pugl a yembr n maan a paga. La yẽnda roga a Fineyaase. Bãmb fãa yaa Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmbã, ne b roto." 
Exodus6:26 Yaa a Aarõ ne a Moyiis kãens la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã, la b kɩt tɩ tãb-biisã tong taab pʋgdg-pʋgdgã." 
Exodus6:27 Yaa a Aarõ ne a Moyiis kãens n gom ne Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ n kɩt t'a bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yi Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã. 
Exodus6:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom ne a Moyiis Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã," 
Exodus6:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Togs Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yet foomã.» 
Exodus6:30 La a Moyiis yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n yeel yaa: «Ade, mam ka mi goam ye. Faarõ na n yɩ a wãn n kelg maam?»" 
Exodus7:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yɩ wa wẽnnaam Faarõ nifẽ. La fo saam-biig a Aarõ na n yɩɩ fo no-rɛɛsa." 
Exodus7:2 Fo na n togsa yẽnda bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn na n yeel foomã. Fo saam-biig a Aarõ na n goma ne Faarõ t'a bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yi yẽnda tẽngẽ wã. 
Exodus7:3 La maam, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Faarõ keng a sũuri, la Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ, mam na n maana bãn ne bõn-bãn n yɩlme." 
Exodus7:4 La Faarõ ka na n kelg yãmb ye. Dẽ, mam na n tẽega m nug Ezɩpt soolmã zug n sɩbg bãmb ne sɩbgr sẽn yaa kãsenga, la m na n yiisa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa m tãb-biisã Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus7:5 Wakat ning mam sẽn na n tẽeg m nugã Ezɩpt tẽngã n yiis Israyɛll nebã bãmb sʋkã, Ezɩpt rãmbã na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Exodus7:6 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ b maanã. 
Exodus7:7 Wakat ning bãmb sẽn kẽng n na n tɩ gom ne Faarõ wã, rẽ t'a Moyiis tara yʋʋm pis-nii, t'a Aarõ tar yʋʋm pis-nii la a tãabo." 
Exodus7:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Exodus7:9 «Faarõ sã n yeel yãmb tɩ y maan bõn-bãnde, bɩ f yeel a Aarõ t'a rɩk a rasaarã n lob tẽng Faarõ taoore, la rasaarã na n lebga waafo.»" 
Exodus7:10 La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ kẽnga Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bãmbã. A Aarõ loba a rasaarã tẽng Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa taoore, la rasaarã lebga waafo." 
Exodus7:11 La Faarõ me boola yam dãmba ne tɩtã-rãmbã. Dẽ, Ezɩpt tɩtã-rãmb me maana woto ne bãmb tɩɩmã." 
Exodus7:12 Bãmb fãa loba b rasabã tẽnga, la b lebga wiisi. La a Aarõ dasaarã vela bãmb dẽndã." 
Exodus7:13 Dẽ, Faarõ sũurã riglmame, la wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã, yẽnda ka kelg a Moyiis ne a Aarõ koɛɛgã ye." 
Exodus7:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Faarõ sũurã riglmame. Yẽnda zãgsame n ka rat n bas nebã tɩ b loog ye. 
Exodus7:15 Kẽng yẽnda nengẽ beoog yibeoogo, wakat ning yẽnda sẽn na n kẽng koomã noorã. Kẽng n tɩ yaas be n seg yẽnda Nill kʋɩlgã noore. La bɩ f zã dasaar ning sẽn dag n lebg waafã f nugẽ." 
Exodus7:16 Yeel Faarõ yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã tʋma maam fo nengẽ tɩ m wa yeel-f tɩ f bas bãmb nebã tɩ b kẽng we-raoogẽ wã n tɩ waoog bãmba. La hal tɩ ta moasã, fo ka kelg ye." 
Exodus7:17 Dẽ, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: Yaa ne bõn-kãngã la fo na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo: Ade, mam na n wẽe Nill kʋɩlgã koom ne dasaar ning sẽn be mam nugẽ wã, la koomã na n lebga zɩɩm." 
Exodus7:18 La zĩmã sẽn be Nill kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ wã fãa na n kiime, tɩ kʋɩlgã koom põog hal tɩ Ezɩpt rãmbã ka tõog n yũ-a ye.»" 
Exodus7:19 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a yeel a Aarõ yaa: «Rɩk f dasaarã n tẽeg f nug Ezɩpt soolmã koom zugu. La bãmb kʋɩlsã ne b Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã, la b bãgsã, ne bãmb zĩis nins fãa b sẽn bĩngd b koomã, koom na n lebga zɩɩm. Zɩɩmã na n zĩnda ko-yũus nins fãa sẽn be Ezɩpt soolmã fãa pʋgẽ wã pʋse, baa ne b sẽn maan-b rãmb ne raad la kugã.»" 
Exodus7:20 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bãmbã. Yẽnda zẽka a rasaarã Nill kʋɩlgã koom zug Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã nifẽ, la Nill kʋɩlgã koom fãa lebga zɩɩm." 
Exodus7:21 La zĩmã sẽn be Nill kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ wã kiime, la Nill kʋɩlgã koom lebga yũugu, tɩ Ezɩpt nebã ka tõe n yũ Nill kʋɩlgã koom ye. Zɩɩmã zĩnda Ezɩpt soolmã fãa pʋgẽ." 
Exodus7:22 Ezɩpt tɩtã-rãmb me maana woto ne b tɩɩmã. La Faarõ sũurã riglmame tɩ yẽnda ka kelg bãmb ye. Kell n yɩɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã. 
Exodus7:23 Faarõ lebg n kuila a yiri, la yẽnda ka ges bõn-kãng wa yell ye." 
Exodus7:24 Ezɩpt nebã fãa tuu buls Nill kʋɩlgã sɛɛgẽ n bao ko-yũudum. Bala, bãmb dag n ka tõe n yũ Nill kʋɩlgã koom ye." 
Exodus7:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wẽ Nill kʋɩlgã koomã kaoosa rasem a yopoe tõre. 
Exodus7:26 Rẽ zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Kẽng Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog maam." 
Exodus7:27 Fo sã n ka sak n bas mam nebã tɩ b looge, mam na n kɩtame tɩ loms wa pid f soolmã zãnga." 
Exodus7:28 Lomsã na n pida Nill kʋɩlgã. La b na n yii be n wa kẽ fo yirã. B na n waa hal fo ro-gãagẽ wã, n dʋ baa fo gãagã zugu. Lomsã na n kẽe fo tʋmtʋmdbã ne f tẽngã neb fãa rotẽ. B na n kẽe baa wʋmsã ne sĩn-bi wã pʋse." 
Exodus7:29 Lomsã na n dʋʋ fo mengã zugu, la fo nebã ne f tʋmtʋmdbã fãa zutu.»" 
Exodus8:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yeel a Aarõ t'a rɩk a dasaarã n tẽeg a nugã tẽngã kʋɩlsã zutu, ne Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã, ne bãgsã fãa zutu, n kɩt tɩ lomsã yi n pid Ezɩpt tẽngã.»" 
Exodus8:2 Dẽ, a Aarõ tẽega a nug Ezɩpt koomã fãa zutu. La lomsã yiime n pid Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus8:3 La tɩtã-rãmb me maana a woto ne b tɩɩmã, n kɩt tɩ loms yi n pid Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus8:4 Dẽ, Faarõ boola a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeel-b yaa: «Yõk-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛga, tɩ b kɩt tɩ lomsã loog n bas maam ne m nebã, la mam na n basa Israyɛll nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ maan maand n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Exodus8:5 La a Moyiis yeela Faarõ yaa: «Yam-yãkrã bee ne foom! Fo ratame tɩ mam kos Wẽnnaam dabʋr n kõ foom ne f tʋmtʋmdbã la f nebã tɩ b sãam lomsã tɩ b bas-yã, la b yi fo yirã, sã n ka Nill kʋɩlgẽ wã bala?»" 
Exodus8:6 Faarõ leokame: «Beoogo.» La a Moyiis yeelame: «A na n yɩɩ wa yãmb sẽn yeelã, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tɩ bũmb a to ka be sẽn zem Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã ye." 
Exodus8:7 Lomsã na n basa fo yirã ne f tʋmtʋmdbã la f nebã. Yaa Nill kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ bal la lomsã na n kell n zĩndi.» 
Exodus8:8 La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ sẽn yi Faarõ nengẽ, a Moyiis zẽka a koɛɛg n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab loms nins bãmb sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa nams Faarõ wã wɛɛngẽ." 
Exodus8:9 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana wa a Moyiis sẽn kosã. Dẽ, lomsã kii rotã ne zagsã la pʋtã pʋsẽ." 
Exodus8:10 La nebã wʋka lomsã n zame, t'a yũugã kell n piuug ne tẽngã." 
Exodus8:11 Faarõ sẽn yãnd tɩ yolsg waame, a kenga a sũur n ka kelg a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã ye." 
Exodus8:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yeel a Aarõ t'a rɩk a rasaarã n wẽ tẽngã tom, la a na n lebga rũm-pigli Ezɩpt soolmã fãa pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus8:13 La bãmb maana woto. A Aarõ tẽega a nug n zẽk a dasaarã n wẽ tẽngã tom, la a lebga rũm-pigli n wa ninsaalbã ne rũmsã zutu. Tẽngã tom fãa lebga rũm-pigli Ezɩpt soolmã fãa pʋgẽ." 
Exodus8:14 Dẽ, tɩtã-rãmb maka ne b tɩtã n na n wa ne rũm-pigli, la bãmb ka tõog ye. La rũm-pigli wã rag n bee ninsaalbã ne rũmsã zutu." 
Exodus8:15 La tɩtã-rãmb yeela Faarõ yaa: «Bõn-kãngã yaa Wẽnnaam nug n maane!» La a yɩɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Faarõ kenga a sũur n ka kelg bãmb ye. 
Exodus8:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yik beoog yibeoog pĩnd n yaas n gũ Faarõ sẽn na n yi n kẽng koomã noorã. Togs-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog maam. 
Exodus8:17 Fo sã n ka bas mam nebã tɩ b looge, mam na n tʋma kɛooda foom ne f poorẽ dãmbã la f nebã nengẽ la fo rotã pʋsẽ. Ezɩpt nebã rot na n pida ne kɛooda, la tẽngã nebã sẽn yas a zugã me na n pida ne kɛooda." 
Exodus8:18 La badaare, mam na n welga Gosɛn tẽngã, zĩig ning mam nebã sẽn be wã. La kɛooda wã ka na n tol n ta be ye, tɩ fo bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab la m bee dũniyã tẽn-sʋka." 
Exodus8:19 La mam na n welga m nebã ne fo nebã. Yaa beoog la bõn-bãn-kãng na n zĩndi.» 
Exodus8:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana woto. La kɛooda wʋsg waa Faarõ roogẽ wã, la yẽnda poorẽ dãmbã rotẽ Ezɩpt soolmã tɛk fãa. La tẽngã sãamã kɛooda wã yĩnga." 
Exodus8:21 La Faarõ boola a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeele: «Kẽng-y n tɩ maan-y maoong tẽn-kãngã pʋg yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga.» 
Exodus8:22 La a Moyiis leokame: «Ka zems tɩ tõnd maan a woto ye. Bala, maand nins tõnd sẽn maand n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa kisg ne Ezɩpt nebã. Tõnd sã n maan maoong sẽn yaa kisg ne Ezɩpt nebã bãmb nifẽ, b ka na n lob tõnd kug sɩda?" 
Exodus8:23 Tõnd na n kẽna rasem a tãab kẽnd we-raoogã pʋgẽ n tɩ maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã wa bãmb sẽn na n yeel tõndã.» 
Exodus8:24 Dẽ, Faarõ yeelame: «Mam na n basa yãmb tɩ y kẽng we-raoogẽ wã n tɩ maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, la bɩ yãmb da kẽng zĩ-zãrgẽ ye. Pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam mam yĩnga.»" 
Exodus8:25 A Moyiis yeelame: «Ade, mam na n yi n basa yãmba, n tɩ pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La beoogo, kɛooda wã na n loogame n bas yãmb ne y poorẽ dãmbã la y nebã. La baoosgo, bɩ y ra leb n belg tõnd n kɩɩs n ka bas nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩmaan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng ye.»" 
Exodus8:26 A Moyiis yii Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yõk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛga. 
Exodus8:27 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana wa a Moyiis sẽn kosã. Kɛooda wã loogame n bas Faarõ ne a poorẽ dãmbã la a nebã. Keoodr baa a ye ka kell ye. 
Exodus8:28 La wakat-kãngã, Faarõ leb n kenga a sũur n ka bas nebã tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus9:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Kẽng Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog maam. 
Exodus9:2 Fo sã n zãgs n ka bas bãmb tɩ b looge, fo sã n ka kõ-b sore," 
Exodus9:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tẽega b nug n kɩt tɩ bã-loangdg sẽn tar pãng wa kʋ fo rũmsã sẽn be weoogẽ wã, ne f wiidã, la f bõensã, ne f yʋgma wã, la f niigã, ne f rũm-bãoonegã." 
Exodus9:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n welga Israyɛll rũmsã toor ne Ezɩpt rũmsã. La Israyɛll rũng ba a yembr ka na n ki ye. 
Exodus9:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka wakat n yeele: Yaa beoog la m na n maan bõn-kãng tẽngã pʋga. 
Exodus9:6 La badaar vẽkembeoog bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩd maana wa b sẽn dag n yeelã. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt rũmsã fãa ki, la Israyɛll rũng ba a yembr ka ki ye." 
Exodus9:7 Faarõ tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ gese, la b tɩ mikame tɩ Israyɛll nebã rũng ba a yembr ka ki ye. La baoosg zãnga, Faarõ sũur kengame t'a ka sak n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b loog ye.»" 
Exodus9:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: Bao-y wʋng vũund n pids y nusã, t'a Moyiis lob-a yĩngr Ezɩpt rimã nifẽ." 
Exodus9:9 La tompeglmã na n lebga wubsg n bui Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa, n kɩt tɩ nod-tãoods yi ninsaalbã ne rũmsã sẽn be Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ wã zutu." 
Exodus9:10 Dẽ, bãmb baoo wʋng vũund n tɩ yals Faarõ taoore. La a Moyiis rɩk-a lame n fãeeg yĩngri. La a lebga nod-tãoods n be ninsaalbã ne rũmsã zutu." 
Exodus9:11 Nod-tãoodsã sẽn dag n tar tɩtã-rãmb yĩnga, bãmb rag n ka leb n tõe n kẽng a Moyiis nengẽ ye. Bala, bãmb yĩnsã rag n pida ne nod-tãoods wa Ezɩpt neb a taabã." 
Exodus9:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ rĩmã sũur kenge. La rĩmã ka kelg bãmb ye. Yɩɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus9:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yik tõdbeoog n kẽng Ezɩpt rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã yetame yaa: Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog maam. 
Exodus9:14 Tɩ bala, so-kãngã, mam na n tʋma m toodã fo mengã zugu, la fo tʋmtʋmdbã ne nebã zugu, tɩ fo bãng tɩ mam ka tar to dũniyã zug ye." 
Exodus9:15 Mam sã n dag n kɩtẽ tɩ bã-wẽng yõk fo nebã, woto tɩ fo menemẽ-la dũniyã zugu." 
Exodus9:16 La mam basa foom tɩ f vɩɩmde, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ fo yãnd mam pãngã, la tɩ mam yʋʋr saag dũniyã fãa pʋgẽ." 
Exodus9:17 Fo sã n leb n gɩdg mam nebã n ka bas-b tɩ b looge," 
Exodus9:18 mam na n kɩtame tɩ beoog wẽn-kãngã bɩ sapɩlem wʋsg ni ne pãnga, t'a buud zɩ n zĩnd Ezɩpte, sẽn sɩng a yẽbgrẽ wã hal tɩ ta moasã ye." 
Exodus9:19 Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f kɩt tɩ b kẽes fo rũmsã ne bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn so tɩ be weoogẽ wã roogẽ. Rũms nins fãa ne neb nins fãa b sẽn ka kẽes roog pʋgẽ wã, sapɩlmã na n pãb bãmb tɩ b ki.»" 
Exodus9:20 A Faarõ tʋmtʋmdb kẽer sẽn dag n zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabã kɩtame tɩ b tall b tʋmtʋmdbã ne b rũmsã n wa kẽes rotẽ. 
Exodus9:21 La neb nins sẽn ka geelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã basa b tʋmtʋmdbã ne b rũmsã weoogẽ wã. 
Exodus9:22 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiisi: «Tẽeg f nug n tees yĩngri, tɩ sapɩlem ni Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ, ninsaalbã ne rũmsã ne moodã fãa zutu." 
Exodus9:23 Dẽ, a Moyiis zẽka a dasaarã n tees yĩngri. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sa-tãs zĩndi, n kɩt tɩ sapɩlem ni, tɩ bugum sig tẽn-gãongã zugu. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sapɩlem ni ne pãng Ezɩpt tẽngã zugu." 
Exodus9:24 La sapɩlmã naaga ne bugum, la Ezɩpt tẽngã kibar pʋgẽ, Ezɩpt nebã zɩ n yãnd sapɩlem a woto buud ye." 
Exodus9:25 Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ, sapɩlmã sãama bũmb nins fãa sẽn be weoogã pʋgẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne ninsaalbã tɩ tãag rũmsã. La sapɩlmã sãama pʋtã moodo, la a kao weoogã tɩɩs zãnga." 
Exodus9:26 La yaa Gosɛn tẽngã pʋg bal la sapɩlmã ka ni. Yaa beenẽ la Israyɛll nebã rag n be.» 
Exodus9:27 Dẽ, Faarõ kɩtame tɩ b bool a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, la a yeel-b lame yaa: «So-kãngã, mam beegame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrga, la yaa maam ne m nebã n konge." 
Exodus9:28 Dẽ wã, yõk-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛga, tɩ b kɩt tɩ sa-tãsã ne sapɩlmã yalse. Woto, m ka na n leb n gɩdg yãmb tɩ y ra loog ye.»" 
Exodus9:29 La a Moyiis leoka rĩmã yaa: «Mam sã n wa n yi tẽngã, mam na n zẽka m nus n tees Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la sa-kelemsã ne sapɩlmã na n yalsame. Woto, fo na bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so dũniyã." 
Exodus9:30 La mam miime tɩ ne rẽ fãa, foom ne f tʋmtʋmdbã kell n ka na n zoe Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye.»" 
Exodus9:31 B sãama lamdã ne orzã tɩ bala, orzã rag n womame, la lamda rag n ninga puudu." 
Exodus9:32 La mui wã ne bõn-koaadlã sẽn ka sãamã, yaa tɩ bãmb ka womd tao-tao ye." 
Exodus9:33 A Moyiis yii Faarõ nengẽ, la a yi tẽngã. La yẽnda zẽka a nus n tees Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽnẽ, la sa-tãsã ne sapɩlmã yalsame, la saagã me yalsame." 
Exodus9:34 La Faarõ sẽn yãnd tɩ saagã ne sapɩlmã la sa-tãsã yalsame wã, a kell n maana yel-wẽnã, la yẽnda ne a tʋmtʋmdbã kenga b sũyã." 
Exodus9:35 Faarõ kenga a sũurã n ka sak n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b looge, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus10:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Kẽng Faarõ nengẽ, bala, yaa maam n kɩt tɩ yẽnda ne a tʋmtʋmdbã sũy kenge, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ mam bõn-yɛɛsdsã puk bãmb sʋka." 
Exodus10:2 Leb n yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ fo togs f kambã ne f yagensã mam sẽn maan Ezɩpt nebã bũmb ninga, la bõn-yɛɛsds nins mam sẽn maan bãmb sʋkã. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Exodus10:3 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne a Aarõ kẽnga Faarõ nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Ebre nebã Wẽnnaamã sokdame yaa: «Fo na n zãgsame tɩ f ka na n sik f meng mam taoor hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Bas mam nebã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog maam." 
Exodus10:4 Fo sã n zãgs n ka bas mam nebã tɩ b looge, beoogo, mam na n tʋma sʋy tɩ b wa fo soolmã pʋga." 
Exodus10:5 Sʋyã na n wa pida tẽngã, tɩ ned ka leb n tõe n yãnd tẽn-gãongã ye. Bãmb na n dɩɩ bũmb nins fãa sapɩlmã sẽn ka sãama, yaa yãmb bũmb nins fãa sapɩlmã sẽn basã, la b na n dɩɩ tɩɩsã sẽn yit yãmb pʋtẽ wã fãa." 
Exodus10:6 Sʋyã na n pida fo rotã, ne f tʋmtʋmdbã roto, la Ezɩpt nebã fãa roto. Hal fo ba-rãmbã ne f yaab-rãmbã sẽn zĩnd dũni zug tɛk tɩ ta rũndã, b ka yãnd bũmb sẽn wẽnd a woto ye.» A Moyiis yii Faarõ nengẽ n looge." 
Exodus10:7 La rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã yeela rĩmã yaa: «Rao-kãngã na n yɩɩ bẽdg tõnd yĩng hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Bas-y nin-bãmbã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã. Yãmb ket n nan ka mi tɩ Ezɩpt tẽngã sãamdame?» 
Exodus10:8 Dẽ, b kɩtame t'a Moyiis ne a Aarõ lebg n wa Faarõ nengẽ t'a yeel-b yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã. La yaa ãnda rãmb n na n kẽngã?»" 
Exodus10:9 A Moyiis leokame yaa: «Yaa tõnd ne d kom-bɩɩsã, la d nin-kẽemsã, ne d kom-dibli wã la d kom-pugli wã, ne d rũm-bãoonegã, la d rũm-bɛdã n na n kẽnge. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigr tõnd yĩnga.»" 
Exodus10:10 Dẽ, Faarõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Sã n yaa woto, mam sã n wa bas yãmb ne y zagsã rãmb tɩ y na n looge, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne yãmba. La mam miime tɩ yãmb sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã yaa wẽnga." 
Exodus10:11 Ayo! Rẽ ka tõe ye! M kotame tɩ yãmb daopã bal kẽng n tɩ waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, yaa woto la yãmb kos yã.» Dẽ, b riga bãmb tɩ b yi Faarõ nengẽ n looge." 
Exodus10:12 Dẽ poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a tẽeg a nug Ezɩpt tẽngã zugu, tɩ sʋy kẽ tẽngã n sãam koodã zãnga, ne bũmb nins fãa sapɩlmã sẽn basã." 
Exodus10:13 A Moyiis tẽega a dasaarã Ezɩpt tẽngã zugu, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sobg yi yaang n wa, la a fuga badaar wĩntoogã ne a yʋngã tõre. La vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, sobg yii yaang n wa ne sʋyã." 
Exodus10:14 La sʋyã siga Ezɩpt tẽngã zĩig fãa. B zɩ n yãnd sʋy sõor sẽn ta a woto, la b kõn tol n yãnd a buud me ye." 
Exodus10:15 Sʋyã rag n luda tẽngã fãa, la tẽn-gãongã zãng rag n sobame. Sʋyã rɩɩ koodã ne tɩɩsã biis zãnga, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn pa sapɩlmã loogr zugẽ wã. Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ, vãoog ka pa tɩɩg zugu, la moog me ka pa pʋtã pʋs ye." 
Exodus10:16 La Faarõ yika tao-tao n kɩt tɩ b bool a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeel-b yaa: «Mam maana yel-wẽnd n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, la m beega yãmb me." 
Exodus10:17 Dẽ wã, bɩ y kõ-m sugr m sẽn leb n beegã yĩnga, la y yõk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sɛɛg m yĩnga, tɩ b tõe n zãag-m ne to-kãngã sẽn dat n kʋ maamã.»" 
Exodus10:18 Dẽ, a Moyiis yii Faarõ nengẽ n looge, la yẽnda tɩ yõka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛga." 
Exodus10:19 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sobg sẽn tar pãng yi nin-taoor n wa kãag sʋyã n tɩ lob rudum ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, la sʋʋr ba a yembr ka pa Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ ye." 
Exodus10:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Faarõ keng a sũuri, n ka sak n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus10:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiisi: «Zẽk f nug n tees yĩngri, tɩ lik bida zĩnd Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ tɩ b tõe n sɩɩs-a." 
Exodus10:22 Dẽ, a Moyiis zẽka a nug n tees yĩngri, la Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa zĩnda lik bida pʋg rasem a tãabo." 
Exodus10:23 La ned ba a yembr dag n ka leb n tõe n yãnd a to ye. Ned kam fãa pa a sẽn dag n beẽ n tãag rasem a tãabã. La Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n beẽ wã rag n tara vẽenem.» 
Exodus10:24 Dẽ, Faarõ kɩtame tɩ b tɩ bool a Moyiisi, la yẽnda yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yãmb tõe n kẽng n tɩ waooga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã ka na n tũ yãmb ye. Yaa yãmb zakã rãmb bal n tõe n tũ yãmb n looge.»" 
Exodus10:25 La a Moyiis leokame: «Yãmb meng n na n kõ tõnd rũms tɩ d maan zems-n-taar maoongã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã." 
Exodus10:26 Tõnd na n zã d rũmsã, la baa rũng naobeng meng ka na n pa ka ye. Bala, yaa bãmb sʋkã la d na n yãk rũms nins sẽn na n tall n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã. La sã n ka tõnd taa beenẽ, tõnd ka tõe n yãg n bãng rũm-bãmb ye.»" 
Exodus10:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Faarõ keng a sũuri, n ka sak n bas bãmb tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus10:28 Faarõ yeela a Moyiisi: «Yi m zakẽ wã! Da leb n saag n bao tɩ wa mam taoor yɛs ye. Daar ning fo sẽn na n wa mam taoorã, badaar na n yɩɩ f kũum daare.»" 
Exodus10:29 La a Moyiis leoka yẽnda yaa: «Yaa yãmb n yeele, la mam kõn tol n leb n wa yãmb taoor yɛs ye.»" 
Exodus11:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog a to paam Ezɩpt rĩmã ne a nebã: Dẽ poore, yẽnda na n basa yãmb tɩ y loog n yi zĩ-kãngã. La a sã n wa kong n na n bas yãmb tɩ y looge, a na n diga yãmb tɩ y yi n looge." 
Exodus11:2 Mam kotame tɩ f gom ne nebã, n yeel-b tɩ sã n yaa raoa, wall paga, bɩ ned fãa kos a yak sãnem ne wanzuri teedo.»" 
Exodus11:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã yik n nong Israyɛll nebã, la tɩ Faarõ nebã ne Ezɩpt nebã rag n waoogda a Moyiis hal wʋsgo." 
Exodus11:4 A Moyiis yeelame: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yʋn-sʋkã, mam na n pɩʋʋga Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga." 
Exodus11:5 La Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa na n kiime. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne Faarõ sẽn zao a naam geerẽ wã bi-rẽenga, hal n tãag yem-pogsã sẽn be neerẽ n werdã kom-dẽemse, ne rũmsã kom-dẽemsã fãa." 
Exodus11:6 Kelems sẽn tat yɩɩg na n zĩnda Ezɩpt tẽngã zĩigã fãa. A buud nan ka zĩndi, la a kõn tol n leb n zĩnd abada." 
Exodus11:7 La sã n yaa ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn beẽ wã, baag meng ka na n wes ned wall rũng ye. Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab welga Ezɩpt nebã ne Israyɛll nebã toore.› »" 
Exodus11:8 Dẽ, fo tʋmtʋmdbã fãa na n wa wõgemda mam taoor n yeele: ‹Bɩ foom ne neb nins fãa sẽn pʋgd foomã yi tẽngã.› Rẽ zugẽ, mam na n yi n loogame.› » A Moyiis yii Faarõ nengẽ ne sũ-puug-kãsenga." 
Exodus11:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Faarõ ka na n kelg yãmb goamã ye. La yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ mam leb n maan bõn-yɛɛsds a taab n yɩlem Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga.» 
Exodus11:10 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ rag n maana bõn-yɛɛsds-kãens fãa Faarõ taoore. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Faarõ keng a sũuri, n ka sak n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yi a tẽngẽ wã n loog ye." 
Exodus12:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ yaa: 
Exodus12:2 «Ki-kãngã na n yɩɩ pipi kiuug kiisã fãa sʋk yãmb yĩnga. A na n yɩɩ yʋʋmdã pipi kiuug yãmb yĩnga. 
Exodus12:3 Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: ‹Ki-kãngã rasem piigã daare, zak fãa tog n baoo pesgo, wall bʋʋga, la yaa rũng a yembre, zak fãa yĩnga.›" 
Exodus12:4 Zakã neb sõor sã n paoodẽ tɩ b ka tõe n sɛ pe-tõre, bɩ b pʋɩ-a ne b yak ning sẽn pẽ n yɩɩdã, wa sẽn zems nebã sõore. Bɩ y pʋɩ pesgã n zems ned fãa sẽn tõe n dɩ to-to." 
Exodus12:5 Pesgã tog n yɩɩ pe-raoog sẽn zems yʋʋmde, la sẽn ka tar zang ye. Yãmb tõe n baoo pe-bila, wall bulla." 
Exodus12:6 Yãmb na n baoo zĩig n bĩng-a tɩ ta ki-kãngã rasem piig la a naasã daare. Israyɛll nebã fãa na n kodg-a-la zaab-noor wakate. 
Exodus12:7 Bɩ b yãk a zɩɩmã n mes y rot nins yãmb sẽn na n zĩnd-b pʋs n dɩ-a wã lug a yiibã zutu, la y mes rignoorã zugẽ." 
Exodus12:8 Badaar yʋngo, bɩ y sẽ rũngã, la y wãb a nemdã ne bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle, la ne mood sẽn yaa toogo." 
Exodus12:9 Bɩ y ra wãb rũngã nemd tɩ ka bɩ n ta, wall y rʋg-a ne koom ye. Sẽ-y-yã a zugã ne a karsã la a pʋ-teedã." 
Exodus12:10 Bɩ y ra bas rũngã neong ba a yembr tɩ vẽeg beoog ye. Beoogã sã n vẽeg tɩ nemdã ketẽ, bɩ y rɩk-a n yõog bugum." 
Exodus12:11 Ad yãmb sẽn na n dɩ-a to-to: Sẽb-y y sẽbdga, la y wid y neooda, tɩ y dasaarã be y nugẽ. Rɩ-y-yã-a ne yãgbo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab Pak tigrã la woto." 
Exodus12:12 Badaar yʋngo, mam na n pɩʋʋga Ezɩpt tẽngã, la m na n kʋʋ Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa kɛpɩ, sẽn sɩng ne ninsaalbã tɩ ta rũmsã, la mam na n sɩbga Ezɩpt wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus12:13 Zɩɩmã sẽn be rot nins yãmb sẽn be b pʋsẽ wã zutã na n yɩɩ bãnd yãmb yĩnga. La mam sã n yãnd zɩɩmã, mam na n zʋʋg n basa yãmba, la toog sẽn sãamdã ka na n paam yãmb wakat ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg Ezɩptã ye." 
Exodus12:14 Daarã na n yɩɩ tẽegr daar yãmb yĩnga. Yãmb na n maan-a lame t'a yɩ tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng n tẽegd da-kãng yelle, la y na n maand-a lame t'a yɩ wa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa yĩnga.»" 
Exodus12:15 Yãmb na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩll dasem a yopoe tõre. La sẽn sɩng ne rasem a yopoe wã pipi daarã, bɩ y yiis rã-bɩllã y rotẽ wã. Ned ning sẽn na n dɩ-a bũmb sẽn ning rã-bɩlle, pipi daarã n tãag rasem a yopoe daarã, b na n yiis-a-la Israyɛll buudã neb sʋka." 
Exodus12:16 Pipi daarã ne rasem a yopoe daarã, bɩ y maan tiging sẽn welg toore. La ned ka tog n tʋm dasem-kãens daarã, sã n ka tɩ segl rɩɩb n kõ yãmb ned kam fãa bala." 
Exodus12:17 Maand-y bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩll tigrã, bala, yaa ra-kãng la mam yiis yãmb tãb-biisã Ezɩpt tẽnga. Bɩ y tẽegd da-kãng yelle, t'a yɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa yĩnga." 
Exodus12:18 Pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daar zaabre, yãmb na n dɩta bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle, n tãag a rasem pisi la a yembrã daar zaabre." 
Exodus12:19 Rasem a yopoe tõre, b ka tog n yãnd rã-bɩll yãmb dotẽ wã ye. Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a bur sẽn ning rã-bɩlle, b na n yiisa a soab Israyɛll buudã neb sʋk n kʋ, sã n yaa sãana, wall tẽng-n-neda." 
Exodus12:20 Bɩ yãmb da rɩ bũmb sẽn ning rã-bɩll ye. Yãmb sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, bɩ y rɩ bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle." 
Exodus12:21 A Moyiis boola Israyɛll kasem-dãmbã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y rũm-bãooneg yãmb yirã rãmb yĩnga, n kʋ n maan Pak tigrã." 
Exodus12:22 Dẽ poore, bɩ y bao izop vãado, n suk zɩɩmã sẽn be laagẽ wã n mes y rignoorã zugu, la y lug a yiibã. La bɩ yãmb ned ba a yembr da yi a roogẽ tɩ beoogã ka vẽeg ye." 
Exodus12:23 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n pɩʋʋgd n na n sɩbg Ezɩpt nebã, n yãnd zɩɩmã sẽn be y rignoorã ne y lug a yiibã zutã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zʋʋga yãmb dignoorã, la b ka na n bas sãamdã ne toogã t'a kẽ yãmb dotã pʋs ye." 
Exodus12:24 Bɩ bõn-kãng yɩ no-tũudg yãmb ne y yagensã yĩng zamaan woo zamaane. 
Exodus12:25 Yãmb sã n wa tɩ kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kãab tɩ b na n kõ-y lame wã, bɩ y maan minin-kãnga." 
Exodus12:26 La yãmb yagensã sã n wa sok yãmb n na n wʋm minin-kãng võore," 
Exodus12:27 bɩ y yeel-b yaa: Yaa Pak tigrã maoong tõnd sẽn maand n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b sẽn zʋʋg n bas Israyɛll nebã rot Ezɩpt tẽngã yĩnga. Bãmb sẽn sɩbg Ezɩpt tẽngã ne toogã, b basa tõnd zagsã n ka maan-b bũmb ye.» Nebã sulgame n wõgemde." 
Exodus12:28 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã kẽngame n tɩ maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis ne a Aarõ wã." 
Exodus12:29 Yʋn-sʋk wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa ki, sẽn sɩng ne Faarõ sẽn zao a naam geerẽ wã bi-kãseng tɩ ta sẽn be-b bi-bees roogẽ wã kom-dẽemse, la rũmsã kom-dẽems me." 
Exodus12:30 Faarõ ne a ʋmtʋmdbã, la Ezɩpt nebã fãa yika ne yʋngã, la kelem-kãsems yika Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ, bala zak ka zĩnd tɩ kũum ka ki ye." 
Exodus12:31 Yʋn-kãng bala, Faarõ boola a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeel-b yaa: «Bɩ yãmb ne Israyɛll nebã yi la y bas m tẽngã. Kẽng-y n tɩ waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa y sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Exodus12:32 Tall-y y rũm-bãoonegã ne y rũm-bɛdã me n looge, wa y sẽn dag n kosã. Kẽng-y la y ning mam me zug barka.»" 
Exodus12:33 Ezɩpt nebã rag n pẽdgda Israyɛll nebã. Bãmb dag n datame tɩ Israyɛll nebã loog n bas tẽngã tao-tao, bala, b rag n tẽedame tɩ bãmb sẽn yaa Ezɩpt nebã na n kii zãnga." 
Exodus12:34 Israyɛll nebã rɩka b zom-nagdɩ wã sẽn nan ka ning rã-bɩllã. Bãmb dag n luda b wamã ne b futu, n bob b bãgdẽ." 
Exodus12:35 Israyɛll nebã maana wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeelã. Bãmb kosa Ezɩpt nebã wanzuri ne sãnem teedo, la futu." 
Exodus12:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã nand Israyɛll nebã, la Ezɩpt nebã kõo bãmb bũmb nins b sẽn kosã. Dẽ, bãmb reesa Ezɩpt nebã sẽn dag n tarã fãa." 
Exodus12:37 Israyɛll nebã yii Ramsɛs n dabd Sukote. Raop nins sẽn dag n kẽnd-b ne naoã sõor dag n kolga neb tus kobs-yoobe, kambã sõor sẽn ka naage." 
Exodus12:38 Neb sẽn yaa buud toor-toor neb me n dag n be ne bãmba, la nin-bãmb rag n tara rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd wʋsgo." 
Exodus12:39 Bãmb dɩka zom-nagdem nins b sẽn yi ne Ezɩptã n maan bur-maas sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle. Bala, b riga bãmb Ezɩpt tɩ b ka paam n yals tɩ zom-nagdmã wuki, la b ka paam n bao rɩɩb n zã me ye." 
Exodus12:40 Israyɛll nebã zĩnda Ezɩpt yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-tã. 
Exodus12:41 La yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-tã wã zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã fãa yii Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus12:42 Badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gesa bãmb yell tɩ b tõog n yi Ezɩpte. Woto me, Israyɛll nebã tog n dɩka ra-kãng tɩ yɩ tẽegr daare, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Exodus12:43 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: «Ade, Pak tigrã no-tũudg la woto: ‹Sãan ba a yembr ka tar noor tɩ rɩ Pak tigrã rɩɩb ye.›" 
Exodus12:44 Yamb ning fãa f sẽn da ne ligd ka tog n dɩ Pak tigrã rɩɩb tɩ f ka reng n kẽes-a bãong ye. 
Exodus12:45 Nin-loaagdg wall tʋmtʋmd sẽn deegd yaood ka tar noor tɩ rɩ Pak tigrã rɩɩb ye. 
Exodus12:46 Yãmb na n wãba nemdã roog a ye pʋgẽ. Yãmb ka tog n tall neong n yi roogã pʋgẽ, la y ka tog n wõrg kõbr ba a yembr ye." 
Exodus12:47 Bɩ Israyɛll buudã neb fãa maan Pak tigrã. 
Exodus12:48 Nin-loaagdg sã n be yãmb sʋkã n dat n maan Pak tigrã n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ a raopã ne kom-dibli nins fãa sẽn be yẽnda zakẽ wã reng n kẽ bãongo. Dẽ poore, a na yaool n naag Israyɛll nebã n maan Pak tigrã. La rao sẽn ka kẽ bãong ka tog n dɩ tigrã rɩɩb ye." 
Exodus12:49 Tõogã tog n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr Israyɛll nebã ne sãamb nins sẽn be yãmb tẽngẽ wã yĩnga.» 
Exodus12:50 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis ne a Aarõ wã kɛpɩ-kɛpɩ." 
Exodus12:51 La badaar bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, tãb-bi-sull-sulli." 
Exodus13:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Exodus13:2 Welg nebã ne rũmsã kom-dẽemsã fãa toor mam yĩnga, bala, Israyɛll bi-ribl-rẽeng ne rũng bi-rẽeng fãa yaa maam n so." 
Exodus13:3 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Tẽeg-y daar ning yãmb sẽn yi Ezɩptã, daar ning yãmb sẽn yi yembd pʋgẽ wã yelle. Bala, yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug sẽn tar pãngã la b yiis yãmb beenẽ. Bɩ ned da rɩ bũmb sẽn ning rã-bɩll ye." 
Exodus13:4 Rũndã, yãmb yita bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã." 
Exodus13:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa kɩt tɩ yãmb kẽ tẽng ning Kana nebã, ne Hɛt nebã, la Amoor nebã, ne Hevi nebã, la Zebuus nebã sẽn beẽ wã pʋga, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab n yeel tɩ b na n kõo y yaab-rãmbã, sẽn yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩdã, bɩ y maan minin-kãng ki-kãng pʋgẽ." 
Exodus13:6 Yãmb na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩll dasem a yopoe. La rasem a yopoe soabã daare, bɩ y maan tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus13:7 Rasem-kãens pʋse, bɩ y rɩ bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle. Yãmb soolmã pʋgẽ, b ka tog n yãnd rã-bɩll beenẽ ye.»" 
Exodus13:8 Badaare, bɩ y yeel y kambã a woto: «Yaa bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan tõnd yĩng wakat ning tõnd sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã yĩnga, la d maand woto.»" 
Exodus13:9 Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bãnd yãmb nusẽ, la a yɩ bãnd yãmb rĩirẽ, n yaa tẽegr yãmb yĩnga, tɩ yãmb tõe n togsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã. Bala, yaa ne nug sẽn tar pãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Exodus13:10 Fo na n sakda tõ-kãng yʋʋmd fãa, wa sẽn zems wakat ning b sẽn yãkã." 
Exodus13:11 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa tall yãmb n tɩ kẽes Kana nebã tẽngẽ, wa bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n kõo yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã, b sã n wa kõ yãmb tẽn-kãnga," 
Exodus13:12 bɩ y welg biig fãa sẽn yaa a ma bi-rẽenga, la ne yãmb rũmsã kom-dẽems nins fãa sẽn yaa raadã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Raadã fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so." 
Exodus13:13 Yãmb na n dɩka bõang bi-rẽeng fãa sẽn yaa raoog n tek ne pe-bila wall ne bʋʋga. La yãmb sã n ka rat n tek bõangã, bɩ y wẽ a kãarã n wãage. Bɩ y ra ninsaalbã kom-dẽemsã fãa sẽn be yãmb kom-dibli wã sʋkã." 
Exodus13:14 Dẽ, yãmb kambã sã n wa sok yãmb nindaar n dat n bãng bõn-kãng võore, bɩ y yeel-ba: Yaa ne nug sẽn tar pãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiis tõnd Ezɩpt yembdã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus13:15 Faarõ sẽn zãgs n ka bas tõnd tɩ d loogã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kʋʋ Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne ninsaalbã kom-dẽems hal tɩ ta rũmsã kom-dẽemse. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ tõnd dɩkd kom-dẽemsã fãa sẽn yaa raopã n maand maand n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la d daad kom-dẽems nins fãa sẽn be tõnd kom-dibli wã sʋkã." 
Exodus13:16 Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bãnd yãmb nusẽ, la a wa bãnd sẽn loe yãmb dĩirẽ. Bala, yaa ne nug sẽn tar pãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiis tõnd Ezɩpt soolem pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus13:17 Faarõ sẽn bas nebã tɩ b loogã, Wẽnnaam ka tall bãmb n dɩk sor ning sẽn tũud Filistẽ-dãmbã soolmẽ wã ye. Baa ne so-kãng sẽn pẽ n yɩɩdã. Bala, Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ nebã sã n yãnd zabrã, b tõe n wa maana b bãngẽ, n tek yam n lebg n leb Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Exodus13:18 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ nebã rɩk we-raoogã sor ning sẽn dabd-a rudum ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ wã. Israyɛll nebã tonga taab tãb-bi-sull-sull n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus13:19 A Moyiis wʋka a Zozɛf kõabã n zã. Bala, a Zozɛf rag n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll kambã wẽene. Yẽnda rag n yeelame: «Wẽnnaam sã n wa maan yãmb neere, bɩ y wʋk mam kõabã n yi ka n looge.»" 
Exodus13:20 Dẽ, bãmb yii Sukot n kẽng n tɩ tilg b sik-zĩigã Etam sẽn be we-raoogã kɩrengã." 
Exodus13:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag lʋɩta bãmb taoor sawad-taok pʋgẽ wĩntoogo, n yãagd bãmb sorã zugu. La yʋngo, sawad-taokã lebgda bugum n kõt bãmb vẽenem, tɩ b tõe n kẽnd wĩntoog ne yʋngo." 
Exodus13:22 La sawad-taokã rag n ka sergd n bas nebã wĩntoogo, la bugmã me ka basd bãmb yʋng me ye." 
Exodus14:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Exodus14:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b lebg n leb poorẽ n tilg tãb-sikã Pi-Hahirot taoore, Migdoll ne ko-kãsengã sʋka, zĩig ning sẽn teesd Baall-Sefondã. Yãmb na n tilga y tãb-sikã ko-kãsengã noor n tees zĩ-kãnga." 
Exodus14:3 Faarõ na n goma Israyɛll nebã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: ‹Bãmb saadame n gilimd we-raoogã pʋgẽ, n ka mi b sẽn dabdẽ ye. Bãmb gɩmba we-raoogã pʋga.›" 
Exodus14:4 Mam na n kenga Faarõ sũuri, t'a yik n pʋgl yãmba. Mam na n paama waoogr Faarõ ne a tãb-biisã fãa yĩnga, la Ezɩpt nebã na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã maana a woto." 
Exodus14:5 B togsa Ezɩpt rĩmã tɩ nebã zoeeme. Dẽ, Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã teka yam Israyɛll nebã yell poorẽ, la b yeelame: «Yaa bõe la tõnd sẽn maan woto wã, n bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b loog n bas tõndo, tɩ b yaool n dag n tʋmd n kõta tõndo?»" 
Exodus14:6 Faarõ kɩtame tɩ b segl yẽnda saarã, la yẽnda peega a nebã tɩ b tũ yẽnda." 
Exodus14:7 Yẽnda rɩka saar-dãmb kobs-yoob sẽn yaa sõama wʋsgã, n paas Ezɩpt soolem saar-dãmbã fãa. La tãb-biis a tãab n dag n be saar fãa pʋgẽ." 
Exodus14:8 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã sũur keng t'a yik n babs Israyɛll nebã. La Israyɛll nebã yaool n dag n yii ne lohorem. 
Exodus14:9 La Ezɩpt rãmba pʋgla bãmba, yaa Faarõ wiidã ne a saar-dãmbã la a wed-rʋʋdbã ne a tãb-bi-kʋʋngã. La bãmb paama Israyɛll nebã b sikã zĩigẽ ko-kãsengã noor sẽn be Pi-Hahirot n tot Baall-Sefondã." 
Exodus14:10 Faarõ sẽn kolgd Israyɛll nebã, bãmb zẽka b neng n yãnd Ezɩpt rãmbã sẽn pʋgd bãmb n watẽ. La rabeem wʋsg yõka bãmba. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã zẽka b koees n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus14:11 Israyɛll nebã yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yaa yaad zĩig n ka be Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋg bɩ, bɩ yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tall tõnd n wa tɩ d na n ki we-raoogẽ ka? Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maan tõnd woto, n yiis tõnd Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ?" 
Exodus14:12 Ka woto la tõnd sẽn dag n deng n gom ne yãmb Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ n yeel yãmb tɩ y bas tõnd tɩ d tʋm Ezɩpt nebã tʋʋmã sɩda? Bala, tõnd sẽn tʋmd Ezɩpt rãmbã tʋʋmã n são tõnd sẽn na n ki we-raoogẽ wã!»" 
Exodus14:13 A Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Yaas-y n ges-y fãagr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n fãag yãmb dũndã wã. Bala, Ezɩpt neb nins yãmb sẽn ne rũndã wã, yãmb kõn leb n yãnd bãmb abada." 
Exodus14:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zaba yãmb yĩnga. Yãmb tɛka, yaa y sĩnd sɩddd...»" 
Exodus14:15 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka a Moyiis yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo zẽkd f koɛɛg n boond maam? Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yik n dɩk sore. 
Exodus14:16 La bɩ fo zẽk f rasaarã n tẽeg f nugã ko-kãsengã zug n welg-a, tɩ Israyɛll nebã kẽ koomã sʋka, n kẽn tẽn-koɛɛng zug n looge." 
Exodus14:17 La sã n yaa ne maam, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã keng b sũyã n pʋgl Israyɛll nebã poore. La mam na n paama waoogr Faarõ ne a tãb-bi-kʋʋngã, la a saar-dãmbã ne a wed-rʋʋdbã fãa yĩnga." 
Exodus14:18 La mam sã n paam waoogr Faarõ ne a saar-dãmbã la a wed-rʋʋdbã fãa yĩnga, Ezɩpt rãmbã na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Exodus14:19 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam malɛɛkã sẽn dag n be Israyɛll nebã taoorã lebgame n leb bãmb poorẽ. La sawad-taokã yii bãmb taoorã n tɩ yals bãmb poorẽ," 
Exodus14:20 la a yalsa Ezɩpt nebã ne Israyɛll nebã sʋka. Sawaodgã lebga libsg yʋngã tɛka. La yʋngã tɛka, Ezɩpt rãmbã ne Israyɛll dãmbã ka tõe n kolg taab ye." 
Exodus14:21 Dẽ, a Moyiis tẽega a nug ko-kãsengã zugu, la yʋngã tɛka, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sob-kãseng yi yaang n pãrg koomã, la ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ lebga koɛɛnga." 
Exodus14:22 Israyɛll nebã kẽna tẽn-koɛɛngã zug ko-kãsengã pʋga. La koomã lebga wa lalg n be bãmb goabg la b rɩtgo. 
Exodus14:23 La Ezɩpt nebã pʋgla Israyɛll nebã n kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, yaa Faarõ wiidã ne a saar-dãmbã la a wed-rʋʋdbã fãa." 
Exodus14:24 Beoogã vẽegr wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn be sawad-taokã pʋgẽ wã sulgame n ges Ezɩpt rãmba. La bãmb kɩtame tɩ rãmbg zĩnd Ezɩpt rãmbã sʋka." 
Exodus14:25 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt rãmbã saar-dãmbã nao sud hal tɩ Ezɩpt nebã kẽnd lebg toogo. La bãmb yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d zoe la d bas Israyɛll nebã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zabda ne Ezɩpt nebã n sõngd-ba.»" 
Exodus14:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tẽeg f nug ko-kãsengã zug tɩ koomã lebs n lim Ezɩpt rãmbã ne b saar-dãmbã la b wed-rʋʋdbã.» 
Exodus14:27 La a Moyiis tẽega a nug ko-kãsengã zugu, la koomã leb n leba a zĩigẽ zĩ-yẽegr wakate. La koomã sẽn segd Ezɩpt nebã, bãmb lebgame n na n zoe, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab luba Ezɩpt nebã ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus14:28 Koomã leb n waame n lim Faarõ tãb-bi-kʋʋngã saar-dãmbã ne b wed-rʋʋdbã fãa sẽn pʋgl Israyɛll nebã poor n kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã. Bãmb ned baa a yembr ka põs ye. 
Exodus14:29 Israyɛll nebã kẽna tẽn-koɛɛngã zug ko-kãsengã pʋga. La koomã yɩɩ wa lalg n be bãmb goabg la b rɩtgo. 
Exodus14:30 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt rãmbã nugẽ. La Israyɛll nebã yãnda Ezɩpt rãmba kũum ko-kãsengã noore." 
Exodus14:31 Israyɛll nebã yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn zab ne Ezɩpt nebã ne pãn-kãseng ningã. La nebã zoee Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb tẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisi." 
Exodus15:1 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne Israyɛll nebã yɩɩla yɩɩn-kãngã n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam na n yɩɩlame n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, bãmb naamã yaa kãsenga. Bãmb luba wiid ne b wed-rʋʋdb ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus15:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pãnga, la b yaa mam pãn-kãsenga, n yaa mam pẽgr yɩɩlle. Bãmb yaa mam fãagda. Bãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam, la mam na n waooga bãmba. Bãmb yaa mam ba wã Wẽnnaam, la mam na n pẽga bãmba." 
Exodus15:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa zabr gãndaoogo. Bãmb yʋʋr la a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Exodus15:4 Bãmb luba Faarõ saar-dãmbã ne a tãb-biisã ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ. Rudum ko-kãsengã lima tãb-biis nins yẽnda sẽn yãkã. 
Exodus15:5 Zĩ-zulums lima bãmba. Bãmb siga zĩ-zulumsẽ wa kugri. 
Exodus15:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nug rɩtg pãng yaa kãsenga. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nug rɩtgã wãa bɛɛbã." 
Exodus15:7 Yãmb naam-kãsengã pʋga, yãmb lubda neb nins sẽn yik n zabd ne yãmbã. Yãmb tʋmda y sũ-kãbre, t'a rɩt bãmb wa moodo." 
Exodus15:8 Yãmb yõ-bogdã pemsem kɩtame tɩ koomã yiki. Koomã wa n sama taaba. Ko-zoetem yalsa yĩngr wa lalga. Ko-kãsengã zĩ-zulums koom gĩsa ko-kãsengã sʋka.» 
Exodus15:9 Bɛ wã rag n yetame: «Mam na n pʋgla bãmba. Mam na n paam-b lame. Mam na n pʋɩɩ te-zɛɛdem n maan m sẽn date. Mam na n wõoga m zabr sʋʋga. Mam nug na n sãamã bãmba.» 
Exodus15:10 Yãmb fʋʋsame n kɩt tɩ ko-kãsengã lim bãmba. Bãmb tisga wa namd ko-kãsemsã pʋsẽ. 
Exodus15:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, ãnda n zem yãmba? Ãnda n tar naam ne sõmblem wa yãmba, n sek zoeese, la sẽn zems waoogre, n maand tʋʋm-kãsemse?" 
Exodus15:12 Yãmb tẽega y rɩtg nugã, la tẽngã vela bãmba." 
Exodus15:13 Yãmb yãaga nin-bãmbã y sẽn fãagã ne y nonglmã. Yãmb pãngã tara bãmb n dabd yãmb yir sẽn welg toorã pʋga. 
Exodus15:14 Nebã wʋmame n digda. Toog tara Filistẽ-dãmbã soolem nebã wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem. 
Exodus15:15 La Edom nanambsã pelens yɩkame. Moaab pãens rãmbã rigdame. Kana nebã fãa gĩin maagame. 
Exodus15:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rabeem-kãseng ne yɛɛsg yõka bãmba, yãmb nugã pãn-kãseng yĩnga. Bãmb lebga mugs wa kugri, hal tɩ yãmb nebã looge, hal tɩ yãmb nebã yãmb sẽn da wã looge." 
Exodus15:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n talla bãmb n wa sel yãmb tãngã zugu, zĩig ning yãmb sẽn segl n na n zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã, yaa zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã, yaa zĩig yãmb sẽn yẽbg ne y meng nusi." 
Exodus15:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa rĩm wakat fãa la wakat sẽn kõn sa.» 
Exodus15:19 Bala, Faarõ wiidã ne a saar-dãmbã la a wed-rʋʋdbã sẽn kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ ko-kãsengã koom lebg n lim bãmba. La Israyɛll nebã kẽna tẽn-koɛɛng zug n pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã." 
Exodus15:20 La no-rɛɛs-poak a Miryam sẽn yaa a Aarõ tão wã rɩka sɩlsãka, la pagbã fãa yii n pʋgla yẽnda n wẽ sɩlsãgs n sao." 
Exodus15:21 La a Miryam rag n deesda bãmb yɩɩllã n yetẽ: «Bɩ y yɩɩl n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, bãmb wilgame tɩ b yaa na-kãsenga. Bãmb luba wiid ne wed-rʋʋdb ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ»" 
Exodus15:22 A Moyiis kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã rɩk sor n yi rudum ko-kãsengã zĩigẽ n kẽng Suur we-raoogã sẽnẽ. La bãmb kẽna rasem a tãab kẽnd we-raoogã pʋgẽ n ka yãnd koom ye. 
Exodus15:23 Bãmb taa Maara, la b ka tõog n yũ Maara koomã ye. Bala, a rag n yaa toogo. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ b pʋd zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ Maara." 
Exodus15:24 La nebã yẽgma ne a Moyiis n yeele: «Tõnd na n yũu bõe?» 
Exodus15:25 Dẽ, a Moyiis zẽka a koɛɛg n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga yẽnda tɩɩg buud a yembre. A Moyiis keega tɩɩgã n los koomã pʋgẽ, la koomã lebga noogo. Yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilg bãmb b no-tũudsã ne b noyã. Leb n yaa zĩ-kãng la bãmb mak nebã." 
Exodus15:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Yãmb sã n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛg neere, yãmb sã n maan sẽn tat bãmb yam, yãmb sã n yok y tʋb n kelg bãmb noyã, la y sã n sak bãmb no-tũudsã fãa, mam kõn lobg yãmb ne bãas nins fãa mam sẽn lobg Ezɩpt nebã ba a yembr ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maagd yãmba.»" 
Exodus15:27 Dẽ, bãmb taa Elim, la ko-bunds piig la a yiib ne koms tɩɩs pis-yopoe n dag n be beenẽ. Bãmb tilga b sik-zĩigã koomã noor beenẽ." 
Exodus16:1 La Israyɛll nebã fãa yii Elim. Bãmb dɩka sor n kẽn n ta Sĩn we-raoogã sẽn be Elim ne Sinayi sʋkã. Bãmb taa be kiuug a yiibẽ soabã rasem piig la a nu daare, bãmb sẽn yi Ezɩptã zugẽ." 
Exodus16:2 La Israyɛll nebã fãa yẽgma ne a Moyiis la a Aarõ we-raoogã pʋgẽ. 
Exodus16:3 Israyɛll nebã yeela bãmb yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n kʋẽ tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã wakat ning tõnd sẽn dag n ket n zĩ nemdã rʋgd sɛɛgẽ, la tõnd sẽn dag n dɩt n tɩgdã n são! Bala, yãmb sẽn tall tõnd n wa we-ra-kãngã pʋgẽ wã yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ kom kʋ kʋʋn-kãngã fãa!»" 
Exodus16:4 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ rɩɩb yi yĩngr n ni wa saag yãmb yĩnga. La nebã na n yii daar fãa n wʋk sẽn sekd daar a yembr dɩɩbo, tɩ mam tõe n mak bãmb n bãng bãmb sã n na n saka mam tõodã." 
Exodus16:5 Rasem a yoobã daare, bɩ b wʋk wʋsg n wa segl n yɩɩd bãmb sẽn mi n wʋkd daar fãa wã, sẽn na zems rasem a yiib rẽnda.»" 
Exodus16:6 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Zaabrã, yãmb na bãng tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus16:7 La beoog yibeoogo, yãmb na n yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziiri. Bala, bãmb wʋma yãmb sẽn yẽgemd ne bãmbã. La tõndo, tõnd yaa bõe tɩ yãmb yẽgemd ne tõndo?»" 
Exodus16:8 La a Moyiis yeelame: «Zaabrã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kõo yãmb nemd tɩ y wãbe, la beoog yibeoogo, bãmb na n kõo yãmb dɩɩb tɩ y rɩ n tɩge. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma yãmb sẽn yẽgemd ne bãmbã. La tõndo, tõnd yaa bõe? Yãmb ka yẽgemd ne tõnd ye, yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Exodus16:9 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Yeel Israyɛll zama wã fãa yaa: ‹Kolg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Bala, bãmb wʋma yãmb yẽgengã.› »" 
Exodus16:10 La a Aarõ sẽn wa n ket n gomd ne Israyɛll zama wã, bãmb wẽnemda b nens n tees we-raoogã sẽnẽ. La ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã puka sawaodg pʋgẽ." 
Exodus16:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele:" 
Exodus16:12 «Mam wʋma Israyɛll nebã yẽgengã. Togs bãmb yaa: Zaabrã, yãmb na n wãba nemdo. La beoog yibeoogo, yãmb na n dɩɩ rɩɩb n tɩge. Dẽ, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Exodus16:13 Zaabr sẽn ta, kodens n wa n lud sik zĩigã. La vẽkembeoogo, meenem n gãneg zĩigã fãa sẽn gilg sik zĩigã." 
Exodus16:14 La meenemã sẽn wa n mesge, bũmb n be tẽn-gãongã zug we-raoogã pʋgẽ n yaa faasga, n yaa bɩrb-bɩrba, n yaa pɛɛlga." 
Exodus16:15 La Israyɛll nebã sẽn yãnd mandã, b soka taab yaa: «Yõwã yaa bõe?» Bala, bãmb dag n ka mi a sẽn yaa bũmb ning ye. La a Moyiis yeela bãmb yaa: «Yõwã yaa rɩɩb Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõt yãmb tɩ y rɩ." 
Exodus16:16 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeele: ‹Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa wʋk sẽn sek a rɩɩbo. Yaa wamd noor a yembr ned kam fãa yĩnga, wa sẽn zems yãmb nebã y sẽn tog n dɩlgã sõore. Bɩ ned kam fãa wʋk tɩ sek a yir dãmba.»" 
Exodus16:17 Israyɛll nebã maana a woto. La neb kẽer wʋka wʋsgo, tɩ neb kẽer me wʋk bilfu." 
Exodus16:18 La bãmb sẽn dɩk wam-makdgã n mak mandã, b mikame tɩ neb nins sẽn wʋk wʋsgã ka paam n yɩɩd sẽn zems ye. La neb nins sẽn wʋk bilfã me, ka paoog-b ye. Bãmb ned kam fãa sẽn wʋkã rag n zemsda ne a sẽn date." 
Exodus16:19 A Moyiis yeela bãmb yaa: «Bɩ ned baa a yembr da bas mandã tɩ beoog vẽeg ye.» 
Exodus16:20 La bãmb ka kelg a Moyiis ye. Neb kẽer bas-a lame t'a vẽeg beoogo. La a pida ne zũnzũy n tar yũugu. A Moyiis sũurã yika ne bãmba. 
Exodus16:21 Dẽ, daar fãa, bãmb wʋkda mandã sẽn zems ned kam fãa rɩɩbo. La wĩndgã sã n bɩ, a boogdame." 
Exodus16:22 La rasem a yoob daarã, bãmb wʋka sẽn zems rasem a yiib rɩɩbo. Yaa wam a yiib-yiib ned kam fãa yĩnga. La nebã nanambsã fãa wa n togsa a Moyiisi." 
Exodus16:23 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela bãmb yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel tɩ b maan a woto. Beoog na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare. Yaa vʋʋsg daar sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn dat n kɩɩm bũmb ninsã, bɩ y kɩɩme, la yãmb sẽn dat n dʋg bũmb ninsã, bɩ y rʋge. La bũmb nins fãa sẽn kellã, bɩ y bĩng tɩ ta beoogo.»" 
Exodus16:24 Dẽ, bãmb yãkame n bĩng tɩ ta beoog wa a Moyiis sẽn yeel bãmbã. La rɩɩbã ka põoge, la zũnzũiy me ka kẽ-a ye." 
Exodus16:25 A Moyiis yeelame: «Bɩ y rɩ-a rũndã. Bala, rũndã yaa vʋʋsg daar Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Rũndã, yãmb ka na n yãnd mandã weoogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Exodus16:26 Yãmb na n wʋk-a-la rasem a yoobe, la rasem a yopoe wã daar sẽn yaa vʋʋsg daarã, a ka na n zĩnd ye.»" 
Exodus16:27 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, kẽer yii nebã sʋk n kẽng n na n tɩ wʋk mandã, la b ka yãnd ye." 
Exodus16:28 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yãmb na n kɩɩsa mam noyã ne m tõodã hal tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Exodus16:29 Ges-y-yã! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmb vʋʋsg daarã yĩng n kɩte, tɩ bãmb kõt yãmb dasem a yiib rɩɩbo, rasem a yoobã daare. Bɩ ned kam fãa kell n pa a zĩigẽ n da yi rasem a yopoe wã daar ye.»" 
Exodus16:30 Dẽ, nebã vʋʋsa rasem a yopoe wã daare." 
Exodus16:31 Israyɛll nebã pʋda rɩɩbã yʋʋr tɩ mande. A rag n wẽnda wa baninga, n yaa pɛɛlga. La a noosmã wẽnda wa bur-maas sẽn maan ne sɩɩdo." 
Exodus16:32 A Moyiis yeelame: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ noor ninga: ‹Yãk-y mandã n pid wam-makdgã n bĩng y yagensã yĩnga, tɩ b wa yãnd rɩɩb ning mam sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y rɩ we-raoogã pʋgẽ, mam sẽn wa n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã wakatã.› »" 
Exodus16:33 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Rɩk-y yʋʋr n sui mandã ne wam makdgã noor a yembr n tẽgn-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n bĩng-a beenẽ yãmb yagensã yĩnga.»" 
Exodus16:34 Dẽ, a Aarõ tẽgna yʋʋrã ne mandã kug-walsã sẽn kɩt Wẽnnaam tõodã kasetã taoore, n bĩng a beenẽ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus16:35 La Israyɛll nebã rɩɩ mandã hal tɩ ta yʋʋm pis-naase, hal n wa n ta tẽng neb sẽn be. Bãmb dɩɩ mandã hal n ta wakat ning bãmb sẽn ta Kana soolmã toadgẽ wã." 
Exodus16:36 Wam-makdgã noor piig yaa peoog a yembre. 
Exodus17:1 Israyɛll kʋʋngã fãa yikame n yi Sĩn we-raoogẽ wã, n dɩk sor n sɩng kẽnd wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel bãmbã. La bãmb siga Refidim. La koom dag n ka be nebã sẽn na n yũ ye." 
Exodus17:2 Dẽ, nebã leb n yika zabr ne a Moyiis n yeele: «Kõ-y tõnd koom tɩ d yũ.» La a Moyiis soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb zabd ne maam? Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb baood Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore?»" 
Exodus17:3 Ko-yũud yõka nebã beenẽ. La nebã yẽgma ne a Moyiis n yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb yiis tõnd Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ, n tall tõnd n wa ka tɩ d na n ki ko-yũudu, tõnd ne d kambã la d rũmsã?»" 
Exodus17:4 A Moyiis zẽka a koɛɛg n gom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam na n maana bõe ne nin-kãensã? Ketẽ-la bilfu, tɩ bãmb lob maam ne kuga.»" 
Exodus17:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Lʋɩ nebã taoore, yãk Israyɛll kãsem-dãmb kẽer tɩ b tũ foom. Rɩk dasaar ning fo sẽn dag n tall n wẽ Nill kʋɩlgã koomã n kẽnge." 
Exodus17:6 La sã n yaa ne maam, mam na n yalsa fo taoor beenẽ, pĩig ning sẽn be Horɛɛbã zugu. La fo na n wẽe pĩigã tɩ koom yi a pʋgẽ tɩ nebã yũ.» A Moyiis maana woto Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã nifẽ." 
Exodus17:7 A Moyiis pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ Masa, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹no-baoodem›, la Meriba, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹zabre.› Bala, Israyɛll nebã zaba ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b bao bãmb noor n yeele: «Rẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee tõnd sʋk bɩ, bɩ b ka be?»" 
Exodus17:8 Amalɛk rãmba waa Refidim n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã. 
Exodus17:9 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Yãk neb tõnd yʋʋr yĩng n yi n tɩ zab ne Amalɛk rãmbã n kõ-do. Beoogo, mam na n zãa Wẽnnaam dasaarã n tɩ yals tãn-bilã zugu.»" 
Exodus17:10 A Zozoe maana wa a Moyiis sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. Yẽnda kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Amalɛk rãmbã. La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ la a Ʋʋr dʋʋ tãn-bilã zugu. 
Exodus17:11 La a Moyiis sã n zẽk a nugã, Israyɛll dãmbã tõogdame, la yẽnda sã n sik a nugã, Amalɛk rãmbã tõogdame." 
Exodus17:12 La a Moyiis nusã sẽn yɛ wã yĩnga, a Aarõ ne a Ʋʋr dɩka kugr n kõ yẽnda t'a zaoonde. La a Aarõ ne a Ʋʋr gãda yẽnda nusã, a yembr dɩtgo, a yembr goabga. Woto, a Moyiis nusã kengame hal tɩ ta wĩndgã kõom." 
Exodus17:13 La a Zozoe tõoga Amalɛk nebã ne sʋʋga. 
Exodus17:14 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gʋls yõwã sebr pʋgẽ tẽegr yĩnga, la bɩ f yeel a Zozoe tɩ mam na n menesa Amalɛk buudã zãnga, tɩ b ka leb n tẽeg b yell saasã tẽngr ye.»" 
Exodus17:15 Dẽ, a Moyiis maana tẽn-kugri, n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ Adonayi-Nisi." 
Exodus17:16 La yẽnda yeelame: «Nug n zẽk n zabd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab geerã. Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yika zabre. Bãmb na n zaba ne Amalɛk rãmbã zamaan woo zamaane.»" 
Exodus18:1 A Moyiis rɛɛmb a Zetro sẽn yaa Madiyã maan-kʋʋdã wʋma bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn maan n kõ a Moyiis ne Israyɛll dãmbã sẽn yaa bãmb nebã. Yẽnda wʋma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã. 
Exodus18:2 A Moyiis rɛɛmb a Zetro peega a Moyiis pag a Sefoora n wa, a Moyiis rag n kɩtame t'a Sefoora" 
Exodus18:3 ne a kom-dibli a yiibã kuili. Bi-ribl a yembr yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Gersom. Bala, a Moyiis rag n yeelame: «Mam yaa sãan n be tẽn-zẽnga.»" 
Exodus18:4 La yẽnda bi-ribl a to wã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Eliyezɛɛre. Bala yẽnda rag n yeelame: «Mam ba wã Wẽnnaam wa n sõnga maam, n fãag maam tɩ Faarõ ka kʋ maam ye.»" 
Exodus18:5 A Moyiis rɛɛmb a Zetro ne a Moyiis kom-dibli wã, la a Moyiis pagã wa n mika a Moyiis a sik zĩigẽ wã we-raoogã pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam tãngẽ wã." 
Exodus18:6 Yẽnda yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Maam a Zetro sẽn yaa fo rɛɛmbã waame n na n ges foom, la fo pagã ne a kom-dibli a yiibã tũu maam.»" 
Exodus18:7 Dẽ, a Moyiis yiime n seg a rɛɛmbã, n wõgemd a taoore, la a mok-a. La bãmb soka taab kibare, la b tũ taab n kẽ a Moyiis fu-roogẽ wã." 
Exodus18:8 La a Moyiis togsa a rɛɛmbã bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan Faarõ ne Ezɩpt rãmbã Israyɛll nebã yĩngã, la namsg nins fãa sẽn paam bãmb sorã zugã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag bãmb to-to." 
Exodus18:9 La a Zetro sũur yɩɩ noog wʋsg ne maan neer ning fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan Israyɛll nebã, n fãag bãmb Ezɩpt rãmbã nusẽ wã." 
Exodus18:10 Dẽ, a Zetro yeelame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn fãag yãmb Ezɩpt nebã ne Faarõ nugẽ wã yĩnga, la b sẽn fãag b nebã Ezɩpt nebã nusẽ wã yĩnga." 
Exodus18:11 Moasã, mam miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãseng n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa, bala, bãmb fãaga b nebã Ezɩpt nebã nusẽ, wakat ning Ezɩpt nebã sẽn dag n maand bãmb pãngã.»" 
Exodus18:12 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɛɛmb a Zetro maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum ne maand a taab n kõ Wẽnnaam. A Aarõ ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã fãa wa n lagma a Moyiis rɛɛmbã n dɩ Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Exodus18:13 Vẽkembeoogo, a Moyiis zĩndame n na n kao nebã bʋʋdo. Nebã yalsa a Moyiis taoor yibeoog hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Exodus18:14 A Moyiis rɛɛmbã sẽn yã bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn maand nebã yĩngã, yẽnda soka a Moyiis yaa: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maand nebã yĩngã? Yaa bõe tɩ fo zĩ kaanẽ f yembre? La bõe yĩng tɩ nebã fãa yɛs fo taoor yibeoog tɩ ta zaabre?»" 
Exodus18:15 A Moyiis leoka a rɛɛmbã yaa: «Nebã wata mam nengẽ n na n sok n bãng Wẽnnaam daabo. 
Exodus18:16 Ned sã n tar yell ne a to, b wata mam nengẽ tɩ mam kao bʋʋdã, la m wilg Wẽnnaam no-tũudsã ne b tõodã.»" 
Exodus18:17 A Moyiis rɛɛmbã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fo sẽn maand bũmb ningã ka neer ye. 
Exodus18:18 Foom ne neb nins fãa sẽn be ne foomã na n gɩmbame. Bala, tʋʋmdã yɩɩda fo pãnga. Foom f yembr ka tõe n maan yõwã ye." 
Exodus18:19 Kelg mam koɛɛgã moasã, mam na n sagla foom, la bɩ Wẽnnaam zĩnd ne foom. Yɩ nebã no-rɛɛs Wẽnnaam taoore, la f tall bãmb yɛlã n kẽng Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Exodus18:20 Bilg bãmb Wẽnnaam no-tũudsã ne b tõodã, la f wilg bãmb sor ning bãmb sẽn tog n tũ, ne bũmb nins bãmb sẽn tog n maanã." 
Exodus18:21 Dẽ poore, yãk nin-yẽesens nebã sʋk sẽn zoet Wẽnnaam, la sẽn yaa sɩd dãmba, la sẽn kis zãmb bũmbu. Yãk neb tusr-tusr nanambse, neb koabg-koabg nanambse, neb pis-nunu nanambse, la neb piig-piig nanambse." 
Exodus18:22 Bɩ nanamb-kãens kaood nebã bʋʋd wakat fãa. Sã n yaa yel-kãsemse, bɩ b tall n wa fo nengẽ, la bɩ b mens kao yel-bãoonegã bʋʋdo. Sak tɩ b sõng foom n boog f zɩɩbã." 
Exodus18:23 Fo sã n maan bõn-kãngã, la Wẽnnaam sã n yeel foom tɩ f maan woto wall woto, fo na n tõoga tʋʋmdã, la nin-bãmbã fãa me na n tõog n ta b zĩigẽ wã ne bãane.»" 
Exodus18:24 A Moyiis sak n deega a rɛɛmbã saglgo, n maan bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn yeelã." 
Exodus18:25 A Moyiis yãka nin-yẽesens Israyɛll nebã fãa sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b lebg neb tusr-tusr nanambse, neb koabg-koabg nanambse, neb pis-nunu nanambse, la neb piig-piig nanambse." 
Exodus18:26 Nanamb-kãens rag n kaooda nebã bʋʋd wakat fãa. Bãmb dag n tallda yel-kãsemsã n wat a Moyiis nengẽ, la bãmb mensã rag n kaooda yel-bãoonegã bʋʋdo." 
Exodus18:27 Dẽ, a Moyiis basa a rɛɛmbã t'a looge, la a rɛɛmbã lebg n kuila a tẽngẽ." 
Exodus19:1 Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ tɩ kiuug a tãabo, bãmb taa Sinayi we-raoogã pʋg kiuug a tãabẽ daarã kɛpɩ." 
Exodus19:2 Bãmb sẽn yi Refidim, bãmb taa Sinayi we-raoogã pʋgẽ n tilg b tãb-sikã we-raoogẽ wã. Israyɛll nebã tilga b tãb-sikã beenẽ, n tees tãngã." 
Exodus19:3 A Moyiis rʋʋ tãngã n kẽng Wẽnnaam nengẽ. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda tãngã zug n bool a Moyiis n yeele: «Ad bũmb ning fo sẽn na n togs a Zakoob buudã. Ad fo sẽn na n wilg Israyɛll yagensã bũmb ninga: 
Exodus19:4 ‹Yãmb mens yãnda mam sẽn maan Ezɩpt nebã bũmb ningã. Mam dɩka yãmb ne pa-nand-tugr pɩgsa, n tall yãmb n wa mam nengẽ." 
Exodus19:5 Moasã, yãmb sã n kelg mam koɛɛgã, la y sak kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne yãmbã, yãmb na n lebga mam mengã paoong buudã fãa sʋka. Bala, dũniyã fãa yaa maam n so." 
Exodus19:6 La sã n yaa ne yãmba, yãmb soolmã na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdb soolem, la buud sẽn welg toor mam yĩnga. Togs Israyɛll nebã a woto.› »" 
Exodus19:7 Dẽ, a Moyiis kẽng n tɩ boola Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã fãa n wilg bãmb goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs yẽnda wã." 
Exodus19:8 La nebã fãa lagma taab n yeele: «Tõnd na n maana bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã.» La a Moyiis rɩka nebã goamã n taas Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Exodus19:9 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Ade, mam na n waa fo nengẽ sawad-taok pʋgẽ, tɩ nebã tõe n wʋm mam sẽn wat n gomd ne foomã, n tẽ foom wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga.» La a Moyiis rɩka nebã goamã n taas Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus19:10 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Kẽng nebã nengẽ n tɩ kɩt tɩ b yɩlg-b rũndã ne beoogo, la b pegs b futu." 
Exodus19:11 Bɩ b segl b mens rasem a tãabẽ soabã yĩnga. Bala, rasem a tãabã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n siga Sinayi tãngã zug nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Exodus19:12 Wilg nebã tãngã tiiri, tɩ b bãng b sẽn ka tog n gãndgã, la f yeel-b tɩ b gũus b mens n da wa rʋ tãngã, wall sɩɩs a pendã ye. Sẽn sɩɩs-a tãngã, bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus19:13 Ned ning sẽn sɩɩs-a tãngã, bɩ ned nug ra sɩɩs a soab ye. B tog n lob-a-la kug n kʋ, ka rẽ bɩ b tão-a ne pɛɛm t'a ki. Sã n yaa rũng wall ninsaala, a ka tog n leb n vɩɩmd ye. Baorgã sã n peeb n kaoose, bɩ b kolg tãngã.»" 
Exodus19:14 Dẽ, a Moyiis siga tãngã zug n kẽng nebã nengẽ n welg-b toore, n kɩt tɩ b pegs b futu." 
Exodus19:15 La yẽnda yeela nebã yaa: «Bɩ y segl y mens rasem a tãab daarã yĩnga, la y ra kolg y pagbã ye.»" 
Exodus19:16 Rasem a tãabã daare, zĩigã yẽegr wakate, sa-kelems ne sa-yãgb n zĩndi, la sawad-taok n sig tãngã zugu. Baorgã peeba ne pãnga, la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be sikã zĩigẽ wã sɩngame n digd ne rabeem." 
Exodus19:17 Dẽ, a Moyiis kɩtame tɩ nebã yi b sikã zĩigẽ n seg Wẽnnaam, la bãmb yalsa tãngã pendẽ." 
Exodus19:18 Sinayi tãngã zugu, bug-zõos n dag n yiti. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tũu bugmã n sig be. Bug-zõosã yii tãngã zug wa bugum sẽn yit wʋng pʋgẽ, la tãngã fãa rigimda wʋsgo." 
Exodus19:19 Baorgã peebg rãamd rag n paasdame. A Moyiis gomdame tɩ Wẽnnaam leokd yẽnda ne sa-kɛlenga. 
Exodus19:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab siga Sinayi tãngã zugu. Sẽn-Ka-Saab boola a Moyiis t'a wa tãngã zugu. La a Moyiis rʋʋ tãngã. 
Exodus19:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Sig n keoog nebã tɩ b ra wa yɩ tao-tao n kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n gese, tɩ neb wʋsg bãmb sʋkã wa sãam ye." 
Exodus19:22 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdbã me sẽn kolgd maamã me yɩlg b mense, tɩ m da wa sãam neb bãmb sʋkã ye.»" 
Exodus19:23 A Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Nebã ka na n dʋ Sinayi tãngã ye. Bala, yãmb mengã keooga tõnd n yeele: Yãk tods tãngã sɛɛga, n welg-a toore.»" 
Exodus19:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Kẽng n sig n peeg a Aarõ tɩ y rʋ. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdbã ne nebã ra gãndg bãmb toadgã n dʋ tãngã n wa mam nengẽ tɩ mam wa wẽ bãmb n kʋ ye.» 
Exodus19:25 Dẽ, a Moyiis sigame n kẽng nebã nengẽ n tɩ togs bãmba." 
Exodus20:1 Wẽnnaam goma gom-kãensã fãa n yeele: 
Exodus20:2 «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa fo Wẽnnaam, la yaa maam n yiis foom Ezɩpt soolem yembdã pʋga." 
Exodus20:3 Ra bao wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba, sã n ka maam bal ye." 
Exodus20:4 Ra maan bõn-naandg sẽn wẽnd bũmb sẽn be saasẽ, wall sẽn be tẽngã zugu, wall sẽn be koom pʋsẽ dũniyã tẽngr ye." 
Exodus20:5 Ra wõgemd bõn-kãens taoor n waoog-b ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Mam yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sũ-kiir soaba. Mam kɩtdame tɩ ba-rãmb nins sẽn kis maamã yel-wẽnã sɩbgr zĩnd b kambã ne b yagensã zutu, hal n tãag zamaan a tãabẽ soabã ne a naasẽ soabã." 
Exodus20:6 Mam maanda neb nins sẽn nong-b maam n sakd mam tõodã yagensã neere, hal n tãag zamaan tusri." 
Exodus20:7 Ra pʋd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr zaalem ye. Bala, ned sã n pʋd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã zaalem, b ka na n bas-a soab taal ye." 
Exodus20:8 Tẽeg vʋʋsg daarã yelle, n kɩt t'a yɩ daar sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus20:9 Rɩk-y rasem a yoobã n tʋm y tʋʋmã fãa, la y maan y sẽn dat n maanã." 
Exodus20:10 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, yaa vʋʋsg daar Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã waoogr yĩnga. Bɩ yãmb ne y kom-dibli wã, la y kom-pugli wã, ne y yem-daadã la y yem-pogsã ne y rũmsã la sãan sẽn be yãmb yiri bas y tʋʋmã." 
Exodus20:11 Bala, yaa rasem a yoobã pʋgẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab naan yĩngr la tẽngã, la ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be b pʋsã. La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bãmb vʋʋsame. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning vʋʋsg daarã bark n kɩt t'a yɩ daar sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus20:12 Waoog y ba la y ma, n tõog n paam yõ-wok soolem ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõt yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus20:13 Ra kʋ ned ye. 
Exodus20:14 Ra yo ye. 
Exodus20:15 Ra zu ye. 
Exodus20:16 Da kɩs kaset sẽn yaa zirẽ n dõd f to ye. 
Exodus20:17 Ra maan sũ-kiir ne f to zak ye. Ra maan sũ-kiir ne f to pag wall a yem-daoogo, bɩ a yem-poaka, wall a loalga, bɩ a bõanga, wall bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa fo to rẽnd ye.»" 
Exodus20:18 Nebã fãa wʋma sa-kelemsã la b yãnd sa-yãgbã, la b wʋm baorgã peebg rãamde, la b yãnd tãngã sẽn nukd bug-zõosã. Nebã sẽn yãnd bõn-kãnga, rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b rigda, la bãmb yalsa yɩɩga." 
Exodus20:19 Bãmb yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gom ne tõnd f toore, tɩ d na n kelg-f lame. La bɩ Wẽnnaam da gom ne tõnd b toore, tɩ d wa ki ye.»" 
Exodus20:20 La a Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Ra zoe-y rabeem ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn wa wã yaa sẽn na n mak yãmba, tɩ yãmb zoe bãmb n da maan yel-wẽnã ye.»" 
Exodus20:21 Nebã yalsa yɩɩga. La a Moyiis kolga sawad-taokã, zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn be wã." 
Exodus20:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b yaa: ‹Yãmb yãame tɩ mam zĩnda saasẽ n gom ne yãmba. 
Exodus20:23 Ra maan-y wẽnnaam-dãmb ne wanzuri wall sãnem yãmb mens yĩnga, n paas maam ye." 
Exodus20:24 Maan-y tãnd tẽn-kugr mam yĩnga. Yãk-y y rũm-bãoonegã ne y rũm-bɛdã n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maoong a zugu. La zĩig ning fãa mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ nebã tẽeg mam yʋʋrã yellã, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ n wa ning yãmb zug barka." 
Exodus20:25 La yãmb sã n na n maan tẽn-kugr ne kug mam yĩnga, bɩ y ra maan-a ne kug-peesdɩ ye. Bala, yãmb sã n pees bãmb ne yãmb larã, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ bãmb lebg rẽgd mam nifẽ." 
Exodus20:26 Bɩ y ra maan mam tẽn-kugrã tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b tũud rʋʋdg n dʋʋd a zug ye, tɩ b ra wa yãnd yãmb zaalã ye.»" 
Exodus21:1 «Ad noy nins fo sẽn na n wilg nebã: 
Exodus21:2 Fo sã n da yamb sẽn yaa Ebre buudã neda, yẽnda na n tʋma yʋʋm a yoobe, la yʋʋm a yopoe wã, yẽnda na n yii ne lohorem n ka yao bũmb ye." 
Exodus21:3 Yẽnda sã n dag n wa a yembre, yẽnda na n leb n yi a yembr bala. La a sã n dag n waa ne a paga, a pagã na n tũ-a lame n yi." 
Exodus21:4 Yẽnda zu-soabã sã n kõ yẽnda paga, t'a pagã rog kom-dibli la kom-pugli, pagã ne a kambã yaa yẽnda zu-soabã n so, yẽnda na n yi a yembr bala." 
Exodus21:5 La yambã sã n yeel t'a nonga a zu-soabã ne a pagã, la a kambã, tɩ la a ka rat tɩ b kõ-a lohorem t'a yi," 
Exodus21:6 bɩ a tall-a n wa Wẽnnaam taoore, n kɩt t'a kolg kʋɩlengã, wall lugrã sɛɛgẽ t'a zu-soabã vʋdg a tʋbrã ne pĩim. La yẽnda na n kell n yɩ a zu-soabã yamb a yõor tɛka." 
Exodus21:7 La ned sã n koos a bi-pugl t'a lebg yem-poakã, bi-pugl-kãng sẽn lebg yem-poakã ka na n yi a yembdã pʋg wa yem-daad sẽn yit to-to wã ye." 
Exodus21:8 La a soaalã sã n ka rat-a, bɩ a tɩ lebs-a la a reeg a ligdi. Yẽnda ka tar noor tɩ koos-a ne sãan ye. Bala, yẽnda belg-a lame." 
Exodus21:9 La yẽnda sã n dat n dɩk-a n kõ a meng biiga, bɩ a maan-a wa sẽn zems b noor ning sẽn kẽed kom-pugli wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Exodus21:10 La a sã n peeg pag a to, bɩ a ra boog dẽenem soabã rɩɩbo, wall a fut ye. Yẽnda tog n kell n kẽeda ne pipi pagã wa sẽn zems kãadem tõogo." 
Exodus21:11 Yẽnda sã n ka maan bõn-kãensã a tãabã n kõ yem-poakã, yem-poakã tõe n yiime n ka kɩs bũmbu, wall a yao ligd ye.»" 
Exodus21:12 «Ned sã n wẽ a to n kʋ, bɩ b kʋ a soabã." 
Exodus21:13 La yẽnda sã n ka maan ne pʋ-toogo, la yaa Wẽnnaam n kɩt t'a nug maane, mam na n wilga foom zĩig yẽnda sẽn tõe n zoe n kẽng n põse." 
Exodus21:14 La ned sã n maan sɩlem n kʋ-a to ne pʋ-toogo, bɩ f yõk-a, ba a sã n bee mam tẽn-kugrã taoore, bɩ f yiis-a beenẽ n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus21:15 Ned sã n wẽ a ba bɩ a ma, bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus21:16 Ned sã n zuk ninsaala, a sã n paam n koos-a lame, wall b sã n yãnd nedã t'a ket a nugẽ, bɩ b kʋ sẽn zuk-a nedã." 
Exodus21:17 Ned sã n tʋʋs a ba bɩ a ma, bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus21:18 Raop a yiib sã n zab taaba, t'a yembr rɩk kugr n wẽ a to wã, wall a wẽ-a ne nug-giulg t'a pogl n ka ki, n gãe a gãagẽ n ka tõe n yiki," 
Exodus21:19 la a sã n wa tõe n yik n tik raoog n yi n kẽne, bɩ b bas sẽn wẽ-a yẽnda wã taale. La baoosgo, bɩ a kõ yẽnda sẽn pogl a soabã ligd sẽn zems wakat ning a sẽn ka tʋmã yaoodo, la a ges a yell hal t'a wa paam laafɩ zãnga." 
Exodus21:20 Ned sã n wẽ a yem-daoogo, wall a pãb a yem-poak ne dasaar n kʋ, bɩ b sɩbg-a n lebse." 
Exodus21:21 La yambã bɩ yem-poakã sã n kell n vɩɩmd daar a yembr wall rasem a yiibu, bɩ b ra sɩbg a soaalã ye. Bala, yambã yaa yẽnda ligdi." 
Exodus21:22 Raop sã n zab taaba, n fão pag sẽn tʋt t'a pʋgã sãam tɩ pagã meng yaool n ka ki, bɩ sẽn fão-b pagã yao sẽn zems pagã sɩd sẽn yaoolg bãmb bũmb ningã, wa sẽn zems bʋ-kaoodbã sẽn yeelã." 
Exodus21:23 La a sã n ki, nedã na n yao a vɩɩm vɩɩm yĩnga," 
Exodus21:24 la nifu, nif yĩnga, la yẽnde, yẽnd yĩnga, la nugu, nug yĩnga, la naoore, naoor yĩnga," 
Exodus21:25 bugum yõogre, bugum yõogr yĩnga, la poglgo, poglg yĩnga, la yĩng bugbu, yĩng bugb yĩnga." 
Exodus21:26 Ned sã n wẽ a yem-daoog bɩ a yem-poak t'a nif feooge, bɩ a kõ-a lohorem a nifã feoogr yĩnga." 
Exodus21:27 Yẽnda sã n wẽ a yem-daoog bɩ a yem-poak n feooge a yẽnde, bɩ a kõ-a lohorem a yẽndã feoogr yĩnga." 
Exodus21:28 Loalg sã n tãag rao bɩ pag t'a ki, bɩ b lob loalgã ne kuga, la b ra wãb a nemdã ye. Bɩ b bas loalgã soab taale." 
Exodus21:29 La loalgã sã n dag n yaa lol-tãadga, tɩ b togs a soabã t'a ka loe-a, a sã n kʋ rao bɩ paga, bɩ b lob loalgã kug n kʋ, la b kʋ a soabã me." 
Exodus21:30 B sã n yaoolg a soabã yaood t'a yao, tɩ b bas-a n ka kʋ, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ yẽnda yao yaood ning fãa b sẽn yeelã, a vɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Exodus21:31 Loalgã sã n tãag bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugla, bɩ b maan-a wa sẽn zems tõ-kãngã me." 
Exodus21:32 Loalgã sã n tãag yem-daoog bɩ yem-poaka, loalgã soab na n yaoo yem-poakã bɩ yem-daoogã soaalã wanzuri ligd pis-tã, la b lob loalgã kug n kʋ." 
Exodus21:33 Ned sã n pak bulga, ka rẽ bɩ a tuu bulg n ka pag a noorã tɩ ned loalg bɩ a bõang lʋɩ a pʋgẽ," 
Exodus21:34 bulgã soab na n yaoo bũmbã sẽn sãamã. A na n yao a soabã rũngã ligdi, la a tall rũm-kɩɩngã." 
Exodus21:35 Ned loalg sã n tã ned a to loalg n kʋ, bãmb na n koosa lol-vɩɩgã n pʋɩ taab ligdã, la bãmb na n pʋɩɩ lol-kɩɩngã nemd me." 
Exodus21:36 La b sã n dag n deng n bãngame tɩ loalgã yaa lol-tãadga, t'a soaba ka loe-a, loalgã soab tog n lebsa ned a to wã loalga, la a tall lol-kɩɩngã." 
Exodus21:37 Ned sã n zuk a to naafo, a pesgo, wall a bʋʋg n kʋ, wall a koos-a, a tog n lebsa loalgã soab niig a nu lol-yendã yĩnga, la rũm-bãooneg a naase, peosg a yembre, wall bʋʋg a yembr fãa yĩnga.»" 
Exodus22:1 Wagdr sã n poog lalg n dat n kẽ tɩ ned ling-a n wẽ n kʋ, yẽnda zɩɩmã raagr taal ka na n zĩnd ned ning sẽn kʋ-a wã zug ye." 
Exodus22:2 La b sã n kʋ-a sõor pukr zugẽ, wagdrã zɩɩm daagr taal na n zĩnda ned ning sẽn kʋ-a yẽnda wã zugu. Wagdr sã n zuk bũmb tɩ b yõk-a, wagdrã tog n lebsa bũmb ning a sẽn zukã, la a sã n ka tar baa fɩ, b tog n koos-a lame n yao a sẽn zukã." 
Exodus22:3 La b sã n yãnd rũng ning a sẽn zukã vɩɩg a nugẽ, sã n yaa naaf bɩ bõang wall pesgo, a na n lebsa rũms a yiibu." 
Exodus22:4 Ned sã n wãbend a rũms a pʋʋgẽ ka rẽ bɩ a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ n bas rũmsã tɩ b tɩ kẽ n sãam ned a to pʋʋgo, yẽnda na n yaoo yaood sẽn zems pʋʋgã bõn-koaadlã, wall reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã bõn-koaadlã a sẽn womd sõama wakate." 
Exodus22:5 Ned sã n yõgen bugum t'a kok moog n tɩ rɩ ned ka-gina, wall kood sẽn bɩ, wall kood sẽn nan sɩngd bɩʋʋngo, bɩ sẽn yõgen-a bugmã yao bũmb ning fãa bugmã sẽn dɩ wã." 
Exodus22:6 Ned sã n dɩk a ligd bɩ a teed n kɩs ned a to t'a bĩngi, tɩ wagdr wa kẽ n zuki, b sã n yãnd wagdrã, bɩ a yao bũmb ning a sẽn zukã naoor a yiibu." 
Exodus22:7 La b sã n ka yãnd wagdrã, dẽ, bɩ yirã soab kolg Wẽnnaam taoor n kɩs kaset tɩ ka yẽnda n dɩk a to wã laogã ye." 
Exodus22:8 Ned sã n yãnd bũmb a to nengẽ n yeel tɩ yaa yẽnda rẽnda, sã n yaa naaf bɩ bõanga, wall pesgo, wall bʋʋga, bɩ fuugu, wall bũmb sẽn meneme, bɩ bãmb b yiibã fãa tũ taab n wa Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg t'a soab ka tar bʋʋmã na n yaoo a to wã naoor a yiibu." 
Exodus22:9 Ned sã n dɩk a rũng n kɩs ned t'a bĩngi, sã n yaa bõang bɩ loalga, wall pesgo, bɩ bʋʋga, wall sẽn yaa rũng ning fãa, rũngã sã n ki, wall a kõbr n kaooge, wall wagdr n zuk tɩ kaset kaẽ," 
Exodus22:10 bɩ bãmb b yiibã wa wẽen Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tɩ ka yakã n dɩk a to wã rẽnd ye. Bɩ rũngã soab sak wẽenegã, la bɩ a to wã ra yao bũmbã ye." 
Exodus22:11 La sã n yaa wagdr n zuk-a yẽnda nengẽ, bɩ a yao rũngã soaba." 
Exodus22:12 Sã n yaa we-rũng n yõk-a n wãbe, bɩ a tall sẽn ketã n wa tɩ yɩ kaseto. La bɩ a ra yao ye." 
Exodus22:13 Ned sã n peng rũng ned a to nengẽ tɩ rũngã yĩng will sã n kaooge, wall a ki a soab sẽn ka be beenẽ wakate, bɩ sẽn peng-a rũngã yao." 
Exodus22:14 La rũngã soab sã n be beenẽ, bɩ a ra yao ye. La b sã n dag n sara ne taab tɩ yẽnda na n yao rũngã soab rũngã tʋʋmdã yĩnga, bɩ a yao rũngã soab a tʋʋmdã yaoodo." 
Exodus22:15 Rao sã n belg pʋg-sad sẽn nan ka tar baood n gãand-a, bɩ a soab yao sẽn zems pag beleng yaoodo, la a reeg-a tɩ yɩ a paga." 
Exodus22:16 La baa pʋg-sadã ba sã n ka sak n na n kõ yẽnda a bi-puglã, bɩ a yao ligd sẽn zems pʋg-sad beleng yaoodo." 
Exodus22:17 Ra sak n bas bag sẽn yaa tɩɩm soab t'a vɩɩmd ye. 
Exodus22:18 Ned sã n gãand rũng bɩ b kʋ-a. 
Exodus22:19 Ned sã n maan maoong n kõ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab tɩ ka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ b welg a soab n sãam-a." 
Exodus22:20 Ra wẽg sãana, la f ra nams-a ye. Bala, yãmb me rag n yaa sãamb Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Exodus22:21 Ra nams pʋg-kõor ne kɩɩb ye. 
Exodus22:22 Fo sã n nams bãmb tɩ b kelem n bool maam, mam na n wʋma bãmb kɛlengã." 
Exodus22:23 La mam sũur na n yika wʋsg tɩ m kɩt tɩ y pa tãpẽ, tɩ y pagbã lebg pʋg-kõapa, tɩ y kambã me lebg kɩɩbse." 
Exodus22:24 Fo sã n dɩk f ligd n peng mam nebã ned a yembr sẽn yaa naong soab n be ne foom, bɩ f ra maan yẽnda wa ned sẽn peng fo ligd ye. Fo ka tog n kɩt tɩ yẽnda yao ne roagleng ye." 
Exodus22:25 Fo sã n deeg ned fu-goabg a sẽn tar fo samd yĩnga, bɩ f lebs-a a fu-goabgã tɩ wĩndg nan ka kẽ ye." 
Exodus22:26 Bala, a ka tar fu-goabg a to ye. Yaa rẽndã la yẽnda me tar n pindẽ. Yẽnda na n pila bõe n gãande? Yẽnda sã n kelem n bool maam, mam na n wʋmame. Bala, mam yaa nimbãan-zoeer soaba." 
Exodus22:27 Ra tʋʋs Wẽnnaam ye. La f ra kãab f nebã naab wẽng ye. 
Exodus22:28 Ra kaoos n yãk f bõn-koaadl dẽenem biisi, wall fo reezẽ rãam sẽn na n deng n yi reezẽ wẽkr koglg pʋgẽ wã ye. La bɩ f rɩk f bi-rẽeng n kõ maam." 
Exodus22:29 La bɩ f maan woto ne f rũm-bɛdã la f rũm-bãoonegã me. Rũm-dẽeng tog n paa ne a ma rasem a yopoe. La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ f tall-a n wa kõ maam." 
Exodus22:30 Yãmb na n yɩɩ neb sẽn welg toor mam yĩnga. Woto, bɩ y ra wãb rũng we-rũms sẽn kʋ nemd ye. Rɩk-y-yã-a n lob baase." 
Exodus23:1 «Da rɩk zĩrẽ koɛɛg n saag ye. Ra naag ne nin-wẽng n kɩs zĩrẽ kaset ye. 
Exodus23:2 Ra lagem neb n maan wẽnga, b sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩng ye. Ra kɩs kaset kegr bʋʋd wakate, fo sẽn dat n tũ neb wʋsgã yĩng ye." 
Exodus23:3 Ra sõng ned bʋʋd zĩigẽ, a sẽn yaa naong soab yĩng ye." 
Exodus23:4 Fo bɛ loalg bɩ a bõang sã n menem tɩ f yãnd-a, bɩ f yõk-a n tɩ kõ-a." 
Exodus23:5 Fo sã n yãnd zɩɩb sẽn zɩsg f bɛ bõang t'a lʋɩ bɩ f ra loog n bas-a ye. Sõng-a n sik a bõangã zɩɩbo. 
Exodus23:6 Ra kɩt tɩ b kao naong soab bʋʋd kegr ye. 
Exodus23:7 Zãag f meng ne zĩrẽ goamã. Ra kʋ ned sẽn yaa bʋʋm soab la nin-tɩrg ye. Bala, mam ka na kõ nin-wẽng bʋʋm ye." 
Exodus23:8 Ra sak n deeg zãmb kũun ye. Bala, zãmb kũun luta yam dãmb nini, la a golemd nin-tɩrs goamã." 
Exodus23:9 Ra nams sãan ye. Bala, yãmb mens mii sãand vɩɩm yelle. Bala, yãmb yɩɩ sãamb Ezɩpt tẽnga.»" 
Exodus23:10 «Bʋd f pʋʋgã yʋʋm a yoobe, n tigs a bõn-koaadlã biisi." 
Exodus23:11 Yʋʋm a yopoe soabã, bɩ f bas-a t'a vʋʋse, tɩ naong rãmbã sẽn be ne foomã wʋk n dɩ, tɩ we-rũms rɩ bãmb sẽn bas bũmb ninsã. Maan woto ne f reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgo, la f oliiv tɩɩsã me." 
Exodus23:12 Maan f tʋʋmdã rasem a yoobe, la rasem a yopoe wã daare, tog n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar fo yĩnga, tɩ fo loalga, ne f bõang me vʋʋse, tɩ f yem-poak biig ne f sãan me paam n vʋʋse.»" 
Exodus23:13 «Sak-y bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã, la y ra pʋd wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab yʋy ye. Ra sak tɩ ned wʋm tɩ fo gomd b yell ye.»" 
Exodus23:14 «Yʋʋmd fãa, bɩ f maan tigr naoor a tãab n waoog maam." 
Exodus23:15 Maan bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigr rasem a yopoe, n dɩ bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll wa mam sẽn yeel foom wakat ning mam sẽn yãk bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã pʋgẽ wã, bala, yaa ki-kãng pʋgẽ la fo yi Ezɩpte. Ned ka tog n wa mam taoor nug-zaal ye." 
Exodus23:16 Maan f tʋʋmdã dẽenem biisã fo sẽn bʋd f pʋʋgẽ wã tigri. La f maan tigsg tigr sɩpaolgo, wakat ning fo sẽn wʋk f bõn-koaadlã biis n wa yirã." 
Exodus23:17 Yʋʋmd fãa, bɩ yãmb daopã fãa wa yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Soaalã taoor naoor a tãabo." 
Exodus23:18 Ra lagem bur sẽn tar dã-bɩll ne mam maoongã zɩɩm ye. Yãmb sã n kʋ tigr maoong n na n waoog maam, bɩ y ra bas a kaamã tɩ gãand n vẽeg beoog ye." 
Exodus23:19 Tall fo dẽenem biisã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã roogẽ. Da rʋg-y bull a ma bĩisim pʋg ye.» 
Exodus23:20 Ade, mam tʋmda malɛɛk t'a lʋɩ yãmb taoore, n gũ yãmb kẽndã fãa pʋgẽ, la a tall yãmb n taas zĩig ning mam sẽn seglã." 
Exodus23:21 Gũus-y neere, n sak koɛɛg ning fãa yẽnda sẽn na n togs yãmbã. Ra kɩt tɩ yẽnda sũur yik ye. Sã n ka rẽ, yẽnda ka na n kõ yãmb sugr y beegrã yĩng ye. Bala, mam yʋʋr bee yẽnda pʋgẽ." 
Exodus23:22 Fo sã n sak yẽnda koɛɛgã neere, n sak bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeelã, mam na n lebga fo bɛɛbã bɛ, la mam na n namsa neb nins sẽn namsd foomã." 
Exodus23:23 Mam malɛɛkã na n lʋɩɩ fo taoor n yãag foom tɩ f ta tẽng ning Amoor-dãmbã ne Hɛt-dãmbã la Ferɛɛz-rãmbã ne Kana-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuuz-rãmbã sẽn be wã. La mam na n menesa bãmb zãnga. 
Exodus23:24 Ra wõgemd bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã taoor n waoog-b ye. La f ra maan wa bãmb sẽn maandã ye. Lub bãmb tẽn-kugã b sẽn luglã n wã. 
Exodus23:25 Bɩ y sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã. La bãmb na n ninga yãmb dɩɩbã ne y ko-yũudmã barka. La mam na n yiisa bãas yãmb sʋka. 
Exodus23:26 Yãmb pag ba a yembr pʋg kõn sãame, la kiir kõn zĩnd yãmb soolmã pʋgẽ me ye. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ f vɩɩmd n kaoose." 
Exodus23:27 Mam na n tʋma mam yɛɛsg tɩ reng yãmb taoore, la m na n kɩtame tɩ rabeem kẽ neb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽng b sʋkã, la m kɩt tɩ y rig y bɛɛbã fãa tɩ b zoe." 
Exodus23:28 Mam na n tʋma kãnenkãas tɩ b reng yãmb taoor n dig Hevi-rãmbã ne Kana-rãmbã la Hɛt-rãmbã tɩ b zoe. 
Exodus23:29 La mam ka na n dig bãmb fãa tɩ b zoe yʋʋmd-yɛng pʋgẽ ye, tɩ tẽngã ra wa lebg we-raoogo, tɩ we-rũms lebg wʋsgo, tɩ wa lebg toog ne yãmb ye." 
Exodus23:30 La mam na n diga bãmb bilf-bilf hal tɩ wakat ta tɩ yãmb nebã wa rog n lebg wʋsgo, tɩ yãmb pãngã sek tɩ soog soolmã." 
Exodus23:31 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb soolmã tɛk yɩ rudum ko-kãsengã noor tɩ ta Filisti ko-kãsengã noore, la we-raoogã tɛk tɩ ta kʋɩl-kãsengã noore. Bala, mam na n ninga tẽngã nebã yãmb nugẽ, la yãmb na n diga bãmb tɩ b zoe." 
Exodus23:32 Ra sak n maan kaool ne bãmba, wall ne bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã me ye." 
Exodus23:33 Bɩ y ra sak tɩ bãmb zĩnd yãmb soolmã pʋgẽ ye. Sã n ka rẽ, bãmb na n wa kɩtame tɩ yãmb maan yel-wẽnd n beeg maam. Bala, yãmb na n waooga bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la, yõwã na n yɩɩ bẽdg yãmb yĩnga." 
Exodus24:1 Rẽ, Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Bɩ foom ne a Aarõ la a Nadaab ne a Abihu la Israyɛll kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe wã kolg tãngã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽnẽ. La bɩ y yaas yɩɩg n wõgemde." 
Exodus24:2 Bɩ a Moyiis bal kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La bɩ neb a taabã ra kolg ye, la bɩ b ra tũ yẽnda n dʋ tãngã ye.»" 
Exodus24:3 A Moyiis kẽngame n tɩ togs nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã fãa la bãmb noyã fãa. La nebã fãa naaga taab n leok n yeele: «Tõnd na n maana bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã.» 
Exodus24:4 La a Moyiis gʋlsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã fãa. La yẽnda yika tõdbeoog n maan tẽn-kugr tãngã pende, ne kug piig la a yiibu Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã yĩnga." 
Exodus24:5 La yẽnda yãka Israyɛll kom-bɩɩs n tʋm tɩ b tɩ maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum, la b kʋ lols n maan zems-n-taar maand n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus24:6 La a Moyiis rɩka maandã zɩɩm pʋɩ-sʋk n ning laas pʋsẽ. La zɩɩmã pʋɩ-sʋk sẽn kellã, yẽnda rɩk-a-lame n mes tẽn-kugrã." 
Exodus24:7 Rẽ, yẽnda rɩka kaoolã sebr n karem tɩ nebã kelge. La nebã yeelame: «Tõnd na n sak n maana bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tõndã.»" 
Exodus24:8 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka zɩɩmã n yãk n mes nebã n yeele: «Woto yaa kaoolã zɩɩm, yaa kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan ne yãmba, wa sẽn zems bãmb goamã fãa wã.»" 
Exodus24:9 La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ la a Nadaab ne a Abihu la Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã pis-yopoe wã rʋʋ tãngã. 
Exodus24:10 La bãmb yãnda Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, la bãmb naoã sẽn tab zĩig ningã wẽnda wa b maana ne safɩɩr kugr sẽn pɩnd wa sa-gãongo." 
Exodus24:11 La bãmb ka tẽeg b nug n sãam Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã ye. La bãmb yãnda Wẽnnaam. La bãmb dɩɩme la b yũ. 
Exodus24:12 A Moyiis sẽn be Sinayi tãngã zugu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Rʋ tãngã n wa mam nengẽ, n yals beenẽ tɩ m kõ-f kug-wals sẽn tar mam tõodã ne m noyã mam sẽn gʋls n na n zãms nebã»" 
Exodus24:13 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne yẽnda sõangd a Zozoe yikame n dʋ Wẽnnaam tãngã zugu." 
Exodus24:14 A Moyiis yeela kãsem-dãmbã yaa: «Yaas-y ka n gũ tõnd tɩ d kẽng la d wa. A Aarõ ne a Ʋʋr bee ne yãmba. Ned sã n tar a yell n dat manegre, bɩ a kẽng bãmb nengẽ.»" 
Exodus24:15 Dẽ, a Moyiis rʋʋ tãngã zugu. La sawaodg luda tãngã." 
Exodus24:16 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziir zĩnda Sinayi tãngã zugu. La sawaodgã luda Sinayi tãngã rasem a yoobe. La rasem a yopoe wã raare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda sawaodgã pʋgẽ n bool a Moyiisi." 
Exodus24:17 Israyɛll nebã yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã sẽn wẽnd bug-kãseng sẽn dɩt tãngã zugu. 
Exodus24:18 La a Moyiis kẽe sawaodgã pʋgẽ n dʋ tãngã zugu. La a Moyiis paa tãngã zug rasem pis-naase, la yʋnd pis-naase." 
Exodus25:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Exodus25:2 «Togs Israyɛll nebã tɩ b bao kũun n kõ maam. Reeg kũun ned kam fãa nengẽ sẽn kõt ne yamleoogo. 
Exodus25:3 Ad kũun nins yãmb sẽn na n deeg bãmb nengẽ wã: yaa sãnem ne wanzuri la zũudu," 
Exodus25:4 ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaama, ne gĩs-miidu, la lamd gĩs-bãanega, ne gĩs sẽn maan ne bʋʋs kõbdo," 
Exodus25:5 la pe-raad gãnd sẽn moneme, ne dofẽ-rãmb gãndo, la akasiya raado," 
Exodus25:6 ne kaam fɩtl-dãmbã yĩnga, la parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noog nug-tikr kaamã ne wisdã yĩnga," 
Exodus25:7 la onigs kuga, ne kug a taab sẽn na n ning maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã, la yãoog lutgã." 
Exodus25:8 Bɩ bãmb maan doog mam yĩnga, tɩ mam tõe n zĩnd bãmb sʋka." 
Exodus25:9 Bɩ yãmb maan sɛk zĩigã ne a teedã fãa tɩ zems wa mam sẽn na n wilg foomã.» 
Exodus25:10 «Bɩ bãmb maan koglg ne akasiya raado. A woglmã na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka, la a yalmã na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka, la a zãntlmã na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus25:11 La bɩ f bolga a pʋgã ne a yɩngã ne sãnem halaale. La f maan kogsr sẽn yaa sãnem n gilg a zugã. 
Exodus25:12 Rõog sãnem tuiid-gils a naas n ning bãmb a kɩrems a naasẽ wã. Ning tuiids a yiibã kɩreng a yembre, la f ning tuiids a yiibã me a kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus25:13 Maan ra-bɩlem ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem." 
Exodus25:14 Rɩk ra-bɩlmã n tui tuiidsã sẽn be koglgã kɩremsã, tɩ b tar bãmb n zãad koglgã." 
Exodus25:15 Ra-bɩlmã tog n paa koglgã tuiidsã pʋse. Ra yiis bãmb ye. 
Exodus25:16 Ning kaset kug-wals nins mam sẽn na n kõ foomã koglgã pʋga. 
Exodus25:17 Maan limd sẽn boond tɩ bas-taal zĩig ne sãnem halaale. A woglmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka, la a yalmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus25:18 Kud sãnem n maan serubẽ-rãmb a yiibu. Maan a yembre bas-taal zĩigã kɩreng a yembre, la f maan a yembrã me a kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus25:19 Maan serubẽ a yembr a kɩreng a yembre, la f maan serubẽ a to a kɩreng a yembrã me, tɩ serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã fãa sẽn be kɩrems a yiibã fãa sũgun ne bas-taal zĩigã sẽn yaa limdã sẽn yaa sãnemã n yaa a yembre." 
Exodus25:20 Serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgsã tog n tẽegame n lud bas-taal zĩigã. B nensã tog n teesa taaba. B nensã tog n teesa bas-taal zĩigã. 
Exodus25:21 Ning kaset kug-walsã mam sẽn na n kõ foomã koglgã pʋgẽ, la f fõgen koglgã ne a limdã sẽn yaa bas-taal zĩigã." 
Exodus25:22 Yaa beenẽ la mam na n seg foom. Mam na n goma ne foom bas-taal zĩigã zugẽ, serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã sẽn be kaset koglgã zugẽ wã sʋka, n kõ foom mam noyã fãa Israyɛll nebã yĩnga.»" 
Exodus25:23 Maan taabl ne akasiya raado. A woglmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yiibu, a yalmã kãntɩɩg a yembre, a zãntlmã kãntɩɩg a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus25:24 Lud-a ne sãnem halaale. Maan kogsr ne sãnem n gilg a zãngã. 
Exodus25:25 Maan da-pɩʋʋgds a naas sẽn zems nug-bi a naas n gilg-a. Maan kogsr ne sãnem n gilg ra-pɩʋʋgdsã. 
Exodus25:26 Maan sãnem tuiids a naase n ning a nao a naasã sokr zĩisẽ. 
Exodus25:27 Ning tuiidsã ra-pɩʋʋgdsã kɩrems tɩ b tui ra-bɩlmã bãmb pʋsẽ n zã taablã. 
Exodus25:28 Maan da-bɩlem ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem n tar bãmb n zãad taablã." 
Exodus25:29 Maan laase, la wũmbli, ne tʋgdo, la laas maandã pʋdgr yĩnga. Maan bãmb ne sãnem halaale." 
Exodus25:30 Fo na n dogla burã b sẽn kõt maamã taabl ning sẽn be mam taoorã zug wakat fãa. 
Exodus25:31 «Maan fɩtl doagendg ne sãnem halaale. Maan-a ne sãnem sẽn kudi. Maan a naoorã ne a sɛɛgã la a laasã ne a yoadã la a puudã fãa tɩ yɩ bũmb a yembre.
