Exodus25:32 Wil a yoob n na n zĩnd fɩtl doagendgã kɩremse. Wil a tãab na n zĩnda a kɩreng a yembre, tɩ wil a tãab me zĩnd a kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus25:33 Will a yembr zugu, b tog ninga laas a tãab sẽn wẽnd amand tɩɩg bila, n tar yoad ne puudu, la will a to wã me zugu, b tog ninga laas a tãab sẽn wẽnd amand tɩɩg bila, n tar yoad ne puudu. B tog n maana a woto ne wil a yoobã fãa sẽn be fɩtl doagendgã zugã." 
Exodus25:34 Maan fɩtl doagendgã, n ning laas a naas sẽn wẽnd amand tɩɩg bila, n tar yoad ne puudu." 
Exodus25:35 Bɩ b maan yodr a yembr n ning a pipi wil a yiibã tẽngre, la yodr a yembr a wil a yiib nins sẽn pʋgdã tẽngre, la yodr a yembr a yaoolem wil a yiibã me tẽngre. A na n yɩɩ woto ne wil a yoobã sẽn yit fɩtl doagendgẽ wã." 
Exodus25:36 Fɩtl-dãmbã yoad ne b wilã na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr ne fɩtl doagendgã. Bãmb fãa na n yɩɩ ne sãnem halaale b sẽn kudi, n yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Exodus25:37 Maan fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe. Dogl fɩtl-dãmbã a zugu, tɩ bãmb vẽenem yãg fɩtl doagendgã taoore." 
Exodus25:38 B tog n maana a yʋʋsã ne tom-peglem laasã ne sãnem halaale. 
Exodus25:39 Bɩ b rɩk sãnem halaal talã a yembr n maan fɩtl doagendgã ne a teedã fãa. 
Exodus25:40 La bɩ f gũusi, n maan bãmb tɩ b zems mamsg ning mam sẽn wilg foom tãngã zugã.»" 
Exodus26:1 «Maan sɛk roogã ne pɛɛl piig sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu, n gʋl serubẽ-rãmb naand pɛɛlã zutu." 
Exodus26:2 Peendã fãa woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pisi la a nii, la a yalmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a naase. Pɛɛlã yalem ne b woglmã fãa tog n zemsa taaba." 
Exodus26:3 Bɩ y bogl a pɛɛl a nu ne taaba, la y bogl a nu wã sẽn ketã me ne taaba." 
Exodus26:4 Maan loets ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo peendã sẽn maan ne pɛɛl a nu sẽn bogl taabã noor kɩreng a ye. La f maan woto ne a to wã me. 
Exodus26:5 Maan loets pis-nu peend a yembr kɩrenga, la f maan loets pis-nu me peend a yiib soabã kɩrenga. Ning bãmb b yiibã fãa loets tɩ b zems taaba." 
Exodus26:6 Maan sãnem sogds pis-nu n sog pɛɛlã ne taaba tɩ b lebg roog a yembre. 
Exodus26:7 Wʋg pɛɛl piig la a yembr ne bʋʋs kõbdo, n lud fu-roogã yĩngrã." 
Exodus26:8 Peend fãa woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pis-tã, la a yalmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a naase. Pɛɛl piig la a yembrã yalem tog n zemsa taaba." 
Exodus26:9 Bogl pɛɛl a nu ne taaba, la f bogl pɛɛl a yoobã sẽn ketã me ne taaba, la sɛk roogã noor sẽnẽ wã, bɩ f põdemd yoobẽ soabã." 
Exodus26:10 Ning loets pis-nu dẽenem peendã sẽn maan ne pɛɛl sẽn bogl taabã kɩreng a yembre. La f ning loets pis-nu a yiib soabã sẽn maan ne pɛɛl sẽn bogl taabã me kɩreng a yembre. 
Exodus26:11 Maan zũud sogds pis-nu n tui loetsã pʋse, n sog-a t'a lebg fu-roog a yembre." 
Exodus26:12 La fu-roogã lutgã sẽn na n kell peend a yembr yalem pʋɩ-sʋkã, bɩ f bas yẽnda t'a palg sɛk roogã poore." 
Exodus26:13 La fu-roogã lutgã woglem sẽn na n kell kãntɩɩg a yembr a noy a yiibã fãa wã, bɩ f bas yẽnda t'a palg sɛk roogã kɩrems a yiibã fãa n lud bãmba." 
Exodus26:14 Maan lutg ne pe-raad gãnd sẽn monem fu-roogã yĩnga, la f maan lutg ne dofẽ-rãmb gãnd n gãneg a zugẽ wã." 
Exodus26:15 Maan da-pegd sɛk roogã yĩnga. Maan-b ne akasiya raado, n yik-b n tilgi." 
Exodus26:16 Ra-peok fãa woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg piiga, la a yalmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus26:17 Ra-peok fãa tog n tara sogds a yiib-yiib sẽn tot taaba. Maan sɛk roogã ra-pegd fãa woto. 
Exodus26:18 Maan da-pegd pisi sɛk roogã yĩnga, n ning-b kɩreng ning sẽn tees goabgã." 
Exodus26:19 Maan wanzuri nao pis-naas sẽn na n ning ra-pegd pisi wã tẽngre. Ning ra-peok a yembr fãa nao a yiibu, a sogds a yiibã yĩnga." 
Exodus26:20 Maan da-pegd pisi sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd rɩtg sẽnẽ wã," 
Exodus26:21 la f maan wanzuri nao pis-naas n ning bãmb yiib-yiib ra-peok a yembr fãa tẽngre. 
Exodus26:22 Maan da-pegd a yoob sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nin-taoorã yĩnga. 
Exodus26:23 La f maan da-pegd a yiib sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nin-taoor lalsã gõdgr zĩis a yiibã yĩnga. 
Exodus26:24 Sẽn sɩng ne tẽngre, bãmb na n welga a yiib-yiibu, la b na n loee bãmb zutã ne wĩir n naag taab yĩngr tuiidsã zĩigẽ. Lals a yiibã fãa gõdgr zĩis me na n yɩɩ a woto." 
Exodus26:25 Bãmb na n yɩɩ ra-pegd a nii ne bãmb wanzuri nao piig la a yoobã. Ra-peok fãa tẽngr na n yɩɩ nao a yiibu. 
Exodus26:26 Maan akasiya ra-bɩlem a nu sɛk roogã kɩreng a yembr ra-pegdã yĩnga. 
Exodus26:27 Maan da-bɩlem a nu sɛk roogã kɩreng a yiib soabã ra-pegd yĩnga. La f maan da-bɩlem a nu sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nin-taoorã yĩnga. 
Exodus26:28 La ra-bɩlemd ning sẽn na n zĩnd-a sʋkã na n pɩʋʋga ra-pegdã fãa sẽn sɩng ne lalga noor kɩreng a yembre, n tãag a noor a to wã." 
Exodus26:29 Bɩ f bolg ra-pegdã ne sãnem. La f maan sãnem tuiids sẽn yaa gils ra-bɩlmã yĩnga. La f bolg ra-bɩlmã ne sãnem. 
Exodus26:30 Tilg sɛk roogã wa sẽn zems mamsg ning mam sẽn wilg foom tãngã zugã. 
Exodus26:31 Wʋg fu-lillidg ne gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã, tʋʋm-mitbã sẽn maandã. La f gʋl serubẽ-rãmbã mamsd a zugu." 
Exodus26:32 Bɩ f yagl-a akasiya ra-lugds a naas sẽn bolg ne sãnem la sẽn tar sãnem yagendsã zutu. Maan bãmb tɩ b rog wanzuri nao a naas zutu. 
Exodus26:33 Yagl fu-lillidgã sogdsã tẽngre, la f tall kaset koglgã n wa fu-lillidgã taoore. Fu-lilldgã tog n bee zĩig sẽn welg toorã ne zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã sʋk yãmb yĩnga." 
Exodus26:34 Fõgen kaset koglgã limd sẽn yaa bas-taal zĩigã sẽn be zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ wã. 
Exodus26:35 Ning taablã zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ, fu-lilldgã yɩnga. La f ning fɩtl doagendgã nug-goabg sẽnẽ, sɛk roogã pʋga, t'a tees taablã sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã." 
Exodus26:36 Maan fu-lillidg ne gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã, tʋʋm-mitbã sẽn maandã, fu-roogã noor yĩnga." 
Exodus26:37 La f maan akasiya ra-lugds a nu fu-lillidgã yĩnga, n lud-b ne sãnem, n ning sãnem yagendsã b zutu. La f rõog zũud nao a nu bãmb yĩnga.»" 
Exodus27:1 «Maan-y tẽn-kugr ne akasiya raado. Maan-y-yã-a t'a woglmã yɩ kãntɩɩg a nu, t'a yalmã me yɩ kãntɩɩg a nu. Maan-a maoko. Maan-a t'a zãntlmã yɩ kãntɩɩg a tãabo." 
Exodus27:2 Maan yɩɩl a kɩremsã gõdgr zĩis a naasẽ wã. Maan-a yɩɩlã tɩ b yɩ yembr ne tẽn-kugrã, la f bolg-a ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:3 Rɩk zũud n maan tẽn-kugrã teed fãa, maan laas sẽn tar n wʋkd tompeglem sẽn lagem ne kaam, la pɛll-dãmb ne maoong zɩɩm laase, la nemd kõsds ne bugum laase. Maan a teedã fãa ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:4 Maan zũud gãmbr a yĩnga, la f maan zũud tuiids a naas sẽn yaa gilsi n ning gãmbrã kɩrems a naasã gõdgr zĩisẽ." 
Exodus27:5 Yagl-a tẽn-kugrã kogrã tẽngre tɩ gãmbrã noor a ye ta tẽnga, t'a noor a ye wã me ta tẽn-kugrã zãntlem pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus27:6 Maan-y akasiya ra-bɩlma, n bolg bãmb ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:7 Bɩ y tui ra-bɩlmã tuiidsã pʋsẽ, tɩ ra-bɩlmã zĩnd tẽn-kugrã kɩrems a yiibã fãa a zãabã yĩnga." 
Exodus27:8 Maan tẽn-kugrã ne ra-pegdo, t'a pʋgã yɩ yoko. Maan-a tɩ zems mamsg ning mam sẽn wilg foom tãngã zugã.»" 
Exodus27:9 «Maan sɛk zĩigã zaka. Maan zakã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nug-goabgã ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. A kɩreng a yembrã woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg koabga. 
Exodus27:10 Lugl da-lugds pisi zũud nao pisi wã zutu, n maan da-lugdsã yagends ne b bãensã ne wanzuri." 
Exodus27:11 La a kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nug-rɩtgã me tog n yɩɩ woto. A pɛɛlã tog n zemsa kãntɩɩg koabg wa zakã woglmã. La bɩ f lugl da-lugdsã pisi wã zũud nao pisi wã zutu, n maan da-lugdsã yagendsã ne b bãensã ne wanzuri." 
Exodus27:12 La zakã pɛɛl nins sẽn be nin-taoorã na n zemsa zakã yalem: A na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pis-nu. La bãmb da-lugdsã na n yɩɩ piiga ne b nao piiga. 
Exodus27:13 La zakã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd yaangã yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pis-nu. 
Exodus27:14 Zakã rignoor kɩreng a yembrã rata pɛɛl yalem sẽn zems kãntɩɩg piig la a nu, ne bãmb ra-lugds a tãabã, la b nao a tãabã." 
Exodus27:15 Zĩig ning sẽn be zakã noor kɩreng a yiib soabã me rata pɛɛl yalem sẽn zems kãntɩɩg piig la a nu, ne bãmb ra-lugds a tãabã ne b nao a tãabã." 
Exodus27:16 Zakã noor fu-lillidgã yalem na n zemsa kãntɩɩg pisi, sẽn wʋg ne gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã, tʋʋm-mitbã sẽn maandã. B tog n ning-a-la ra-lugds a naas ne b nao a naase." 
Exodus27:17 Ra-lugds nins fãa sẽn gũbgd zakã tog n tonga taab ne wanzuri bãense, tɩ yagendsã yaa wanzuri, tɩ b naoã yaa zũudu." 
Exodus27:18 Zakã woglem tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg koabga, la a yalmã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pis-nu, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. Wʋg a pɛɛlã ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la f maan a naoã ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:19 B tog n maana sɛk zĩigã tʋʋm teed fãa ne a biili wã fãa, la zakã biili wã fãa ne zũudu.»" 
Exodus27:20 «Foom, bɩ f yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b tall oliiv kaam bãmb sẽn wõd n wa kõ foom, tɩ f ning fɩtlã tɩ vẽenem zĩnd daar fãa." 
Exodus27:21 Yaa sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, zĩig ning sẽn ka ta fuug sẽn lillid kaset koglgã, la bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã ges fɩtl-dãmbã yelle, tɩ b wid Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor zaabr tɩ ta yibeoogo. Yõwã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, Israyɛll yagensã zamaan fãa yĩnga.»" 
Exodus28:1 «Bool f kẽem a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã tɩ b yi Israyɛll nebã sʋk n wa fo nengẽ, n wa maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd mam waoogr yĩnga. Yaa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, a Nadaabe, ne a Abihu la a Eleyazaar ne a Itamaare.»" 
Exodus28:2 «Maan fut sẽn welg toor n kõ f kẽem a Aarõ, sẽn na n wilg yẽnda a zĩiga, la a naam." 
Exodus28:3 Gom ne tʋʋm-mitb nins fãa mam sẽn kõ yamã tɩ b maan a Aarõ futã tɩ b welg toore, yẽnda sẽn kʋʋd maand mam taoorã yĩnga." 
Exodus28:4 Ad fut nins bãmb sẽn na n maanã: yaa yãoog lutga, ne maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugu, la fu-yor-bil ne fuug sẽn kãde, la zu-vindga, ne sẽbdga. Bɩ bãmb maan fut sẽn welg toor n kõ f kẽemã ne a kom-dibli wã tɩ b maand maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd mam taoore." 
Exodus28:5 Bɩ bãmb dɩk sãnem gĩsi, ne gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg n maan-ba.»" 
Exodus28:6 «Bɩ b maan maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuug sẽn wʋg ne sãnem gĩsi, la gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã, tʋʋm-mitbã sẽn maandã." 
Exodus28:7 B tog n ninga bãg-tabd a yiib a zĩis a yiibã, n tong fuugã taoor ne a poorẽ." 
Exodus28:8 Bɩ b kell n sẽ maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã sẽbdga t'a tabend ne fuugã menga, ne sãnem gĩsi la gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã." 
Exodus28:9 Gʋls Israyɛll buudã yʋy onigs kug a yiib zut ne kɩtga. 
Exodus28:10 Gʋls yʋy a yoob kugr a ye zugu, la f gʋls yʋy a yoobã me kugr a to zug wa sẽn zems kãsem pʋgdg-pʋgdga." 
Exodus28:11 Gʋls Israyɛll kambã yʋy kug a yiib zut wa tʋʋm-mitb sẽn dɩkd kɩtg n gʋlsd kug n maand bãndã. Ning kugã sãnem gãtsã pʋsẽ. 
Exodus28:12 Ning kug a yiibã fãa maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã bãgdẽ. Bãmb na n yɩɩ kug Israyɛll nebã tẽegr yĩnga. Yaa woto la a Aarõ na n zã bãmb yʋyã a bãgd a yiibã zutu, n tẽegd bãmb yell Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Exodus28:13 Maan sãnem loetse," 
Exodus28:14 ne sãnem halaal sogl-bãooneg a yiibu, n kal bãmb wa wĩiri. Tong soglã sẽn kalã ne gãtsã.»" 
Exodus28:15 «Maan yãoog lutg sẽn wilgd bʋʋdo. Tog n yɩɩ tʋʋm-mitb n na n tʋm-a, wa b sẽn tʋm maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã to-to wã. Yaa ne sãnem gĩsi, la gĩs sẽn yaa miuug masɩ, la sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miidu, ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã." 
Exodus28:16 Maan-a ne pɛɛl a yiib sẽn pʋgl taaba, t'a yɩ maoko. A woglmã tog n zemsa nug-yakemd a yembre t'a yalmã me zems nug-yakemd a yembre." 
Exodus28:17 Rɩk kug nins fo sẽn na n ning gãtsã pʋsẽ wã, n munums yãoog lutgã zug ruls a naasã pʋga. Maan dẽenem dulgã ne sardoan la topaaz ne emerood kuga." 
Exodus28:18 B tog n maana rulg a yiibẽ soabã ne ɛskarbukli, la ne safɩɩre, ne diyama kuga." 
Exodus28:19 Rulg a tãabẽ soabã tog n yɩɩ ne opalle, la ne agate, ne ametist kuga." 
Exodus28:20 La rulg a naasẽ soabã tog n yɩɩ ne kirzoliti, ne onigsi, la ne zaspe kuga. B na n ninga bãmb sãnem gãtsã pʋsẽ." 
Exodus28:21 Kugã yʋy ne b sõorã na n zemsa a Israyɛll kom-dibli wã piig la a yiibã yʋyã. Bɩ b gʋls bãmb zut ne kɩtg tɩ b lebg wa bãnde, kugr fãa ne a yʋʋre, sẽn yaa yʋʋr a yembr Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã sʋka." 
Exodus28:22 Maan sãnem halaal sogle, n kal-a wa wĩir n ning yãoog lutgã zugu." 
Exodus28:23 Maan sãnem tuiids a yiib sẽn yaa gils yãoog lutgã yĩnga, n ning-b a kɩrems a yiibã gõdgr zĩisẽ." 
Exodus28:24 Tong sãnem wĩy a yiibã ne tuiids a yiibã sẽn be yãoog lutgã kɩrems a yiibã gõdgr zĩisẽ wã. 
Exodus28:25 Tong wĩy a yiibã noy ne gãtsã sẽn be maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã bãgdẽ wã taoorã. 
Exodus28:26 La f maan sãnem tuiids a yiib n ning bãmb yãoog lutgã kɩrems a yiibã gõdgr zĩisẽ, n ning bãmb pʋgẽ, n tablg ne maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã." 
Exodus28:27 Maan sãnem tuiids a yiib n ning maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã taoor bãgdã tẽngre, zĩig ning sẽbdgã sẽn tong ne fuugã." 
Exodus28:28 Tui gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo yãoog lutgã tuiidsẽ, ne tuiids nins sẽn be maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugẽ wã, n loe tɩ yãoog lutgã kell n pa sẽbdgã zug n ka tõe n lak n bas fuugã ye." 
Exodus28:29 La a Aarõ sã n kẽed sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, a na n zãa Israyɛll buudã yʋy a sũurẽ, wa sẽn gʋls yãoog lutgã sẽn wilgd bʋ-kaoorã zugã, tɩ yɩ tẽegr Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor daar fãa." 
Exodus28:30 Ning urim ne tumim yãoog lutgã sẽn wilgd bʋ-kaoorã pʋgẽ, t'a Aarõ sã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bɩ be a yãoogẽ wã. Woto, a Aarõ na n zãa Israyɛll nebã bʋ-kaoor a yãoogẽ daar fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore.»" 
Exodus28:31 «Maan fu-yor-bil maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã yĩnga, ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo bala." 
Exodus28:32 Kɩbg fuugã loor peendã tẽn-sʋka, n kõog a noorã ne peend t'a yɩ wa gãong fuug loore, t'a ra wa kẽeg ye." 
Exodus28:33 La f maan gernaad-dãmb sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miidu, n ning fuugã noor tẽngr n gilgi. La f maan sãnem bugl n ning fuugã tẽngr n gilgi." 
Exodus28:34 La f ning sãnem buglã ne gernaad-rãmb n lɩʋʋs taab n gilg fuugã noor zãnga. 
Exodus28:35 Bɩ a Aarõ yeelg fu-kãng wakat ning fãa yẽnda sẽn maand maan-kʋʋr kãsem tʋʋmdã, tɩ b wʋm buglã rãamd yẽnda sẽn wat n kẽed Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, la yẽnda sẽn wat n yit wakate. Woto, yẽnda ka na n ki ye." 
Exodus28:36 Maan rĩ-tɛɛg ne sãnem halaale, la f gʋls a zugã ne kɩtga tɩ yɩ wa bãnde. A gʋlsmã na n yɩɩ woto: Welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus28:37 La f ning yẽnda loɛtg sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo t'a zĩnd zu-vindgã taoore. 
Exodus28:38 A na n zĩnda a Aarõ dĩirẽ wã t'a Aarõ zɩ yel-wẽnã sẽn tũud ne kũuni la maand fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn welg n kõtẽ wã. A na n zĩnda yẽnda dĩirẽ wã daar fãa, tɩ bãmb tõe n ta Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Exodus28:39 Wʋg fuug ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la f maan zu-vindg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. La f wʋg sẽbdg sẽn kãde, t'a yaa neere.»" 
Exodus28:40 «Maan fu-yerd n kõ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã. La f maan sẽbds ne pugli me n kõ bãmba, sẽn na n wilg tɩ b tara b zĩiga la b ziiri." 
Exodus28:41 Yeelg f kẽem a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã ne fu-kãense. La f pʋdg kaam bãmb zut n ning tʋʋmdã bãmb zutu, n welg bãmb toor tɩ b maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd mam taoore." 
Exodus28:42 Maan lamd gĩs-bãaneg kur-koees n kõ bãmb tɩ b sẽgen n lud b yãndã, sẽn sɩng ne b seesã tɩ tãag b gɛy wã." 
Exodus28:43 A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã sã n wa na n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, wall b sã n wa na n kolg tẽn-kugrã n maan sɛk zĩigã tʋʋmde, b tog n sẽgna kur-bãmba, tɩ yel-wẽnã ra zĩnd bãmb zut tɩ b wa ki ye. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, a Aarõ ne a yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl yẽnda wã yĩnga.»" 
Exodus29:1 Ad fo sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n welg a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã toore, tɩ b maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã mam yĩnga: Bao loalg ne pe-raad a yiib sẽn ka tar zanga," 
Exodus29:2 ne bur sẽn ka rã-bɩlle, la bur-maas sẽn ka rã-bɩll sẽn kalem ne kaam, la bur-maas sẽn ka tar dã-bɩll b sẽn ning kaam a zugu. Maan bãmb ne bõn-koaadl zom." 
Exodus29:3 Rɩk bãmb n sagl peoog a yembr pʋgẽ n tall n wa. La f tall loalgã ne pe-raad a yiibã n wa. 
Exodus29:4 La f tall a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã n wa sɛk zĩigã noore, n so bãmb koom." 
Exodus29:5 La f rɩk futã n yeelg a Aarõ. Yeelg yẽnda maan-kʋʋr fuugã fu-bilã, la maan-kʋʋr fuugã, ne yãoog lutgã, n dɩk maan-kʋʋr fuugã sẽbdg n sẽbg n naag ne a mengã." 
Exodus29:6 La f vil a zugã ne zu-vindgã, la f fõgn-a pugl sẽn welg toorã n bʋʋg zu-vindgã." 
Exodus29:7 La f rɩk welgrã kaam n pʋdg a zugu. Yaa woto la fo na n ning yẽnda zug kaam n welg-a toore. 
Exodus29:8 Yãmb sã n maan woto n sɛ, bɩ f tall a kom-dibli wã n wa n yeelg bãmb b fu-yerdã." 
Exodus29:9 La f sẽbg a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã sẽbdse, n fõgen bãmb pugli. La maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd na n yɩɩ bãmb dẽnda, n yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta. Yaa woto la fo na n ning tʋʋmdã a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã zutu." 
Exodus29:10 Bɩ f tall lol-pollã n wa sɛk roogã noore, la bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã palg bãmb nus lol-pollã zugu." 
Exodus29:11 La bɩ fo kʋ lol-pollã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor sɛk roogã noore. 
Exodus29:12 La f tẽk f nug-bil lol-pollã zɩɩm pʋgẽ n mes tẽn-kugrã. La f raag zɩɩm ning sẽn kellã fãa tẽn-kugrã sɛɛgẽ. 
Exodus29:13 Rɩk a yãadã kaam la a sãoorã kaam ne a yiim a yiibã fãa ne b kaamã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. 
Exodus29:14 La f yiis lol-pollã nemdã ne a gãongã la a bĩndã sik zĩigã pʋgẽ n yõog bugum yɩnga. A yaa yel-wẽnã maoongo. 
Exodus29:15 Dẽ, bɩ f tall pe-raadã sʋk pe-raoog a yembr n wa, la bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã palg bãmb nus pe-raoogã zugu." 
Exodus29:16 La bɩ f kʋ pe-raoogã n dɩk a zɩɩmã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã fãa. 
Exodus29:17 La f bees pe-raoogã n pek a pʋ-teedã ne a naoã n ning bãmb ne a nemsã ne a zugã tẽn-kugrã zug 
Exodus29:18 n yõog pe-raoogã b sẽn beesã fãa ne bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n tar yũ-noogo. Yaa kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum zãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus29:19 Rɩk pe-raoog a yiibẽ soabã t'a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã palg b nus pe-rao-kãng zugã. 
Exodus29:20 La bɩ f kʋ pe-raoogã n yãk a zɩɩmã n tẽk a Aarõ rɩtg tʋbrã, ne yẽnda kom-dibli wã rɩtg tʋbã, la bãmb dɩtg nug-raadã ne b rɩtg nao-raadã, la bɩ f rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn ketã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã fãa." 
Exodus29:21 Yãk zɩɩm ning sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã ne tikr kaamã n mes a Aarõ ne a futã, la yẽnda kom-dibli wã me ne b futã. Yaa woto la f na n welg yẽnda toor ne a futã, la yẽnda kom-dibli wã me ne b futã b tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Exodus29:22 Rɩk pe-raoogã kaamã ne a zʋʋrã la a yãadã kaam ne a sãoorã kaam la a yiim a yiibã fãa ne b kaamã la a rɩtg gerã, bala, a yaa maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd sɩngr pe-raoogo." 
Exodus29:23 La f yãk bur-gilg a yembre, ne bur-maasr a yembr sẽn maan ne kaam, la bur-maasr sẽn yaa faasga, sẽn lagem ne bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã sẽn be leprã pʋgẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã." 
Exodus29:24 Rɩk bõn-kãens fãa n kɩs a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la f yuum bãmb Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Exodus29:25 Dẽ, bɩ f reeg bõn-kãens b nusẽ wã, n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n tar yũ-noogo. Yaa kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum zãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus29:26 Rɩk pe-raoog ning sẽn yaa maoong sẽn wilgd tɩ b ninga maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd a Aarõ zugã yãoog n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La yẽnda na n yɩɩ fo pʋɩɩre. 
Exodus29:27 Bɩ f welg pe-raoogã yãoog ne a gerã b sẽn zẽk n yuumã toore. Yaa pe-raoog ning b sẽn kʋ wakat ning b sẽn ning maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã zutã. 
Exodus29:28 Yãoogã ne gerã na n yɩɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã pʋɩɩre, la a na n yɩɩ no-tũudr wakat sẽn ka sɛta yĩnga. B tog n yãka bãmb Israyɛll nebã sẽn so wã pʋgẽ. Bõn-kãng yaa pʋɩɩr b sẽn yãkde. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ pʋɩɩr b sẽn yãkd Israyɛll nebã sẽn so wã pʋgẽ. Yaa bãmb zems-n-taar maandã zug la b tog n yãk-a. Yaa kũun bãmb sẽn yãkd n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus29:29 A Aarõ maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã fut sẽn welg toorã na n yɩɩ yẽnda kom-dibli wã sẽn na n led yẽnda wã rẽnda. Bãmb na n yeelga fu-bãmb wakat ning b sẽn na n tik bãmb ne kaam n ning maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd bãmb zutã. 
Exodus29:30 A Aarõ bi-ribl ning sẽn na n led-a yẽnda zĩigẽ wã na n yeelga fu-kãens rasem a yopoe, n yaool n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋgẽ n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋmde." 
Exodus29:31 Rɩk pe-raoog ning b sẽn maan maoong wakat ning b sẽn ning maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd bãmb zutã n dʋg a zĩig sẽn welg toor pʋgẽ. 
Exodus29:32 La bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã wãb pe-raoogã nemdo, ne bur ning sẽn be leprã pʋgẽ wã sɛk roogã noore." 
Exodus29:33 Bãmb tog n dɩɩ b sẽn dɩk bũmb ning n maan paoosg tʋʋmd bãmb yĩnga, n ning maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd bãmb zut n welg bãmb toorã. Yaa bãmb bal n na n dɩ bõn-kãense. Ned sẽn ka maan-kʋʋd ka tog n dɩ-a ye, bala, bõn-kãens yaa bũmb sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:34 La maoong ning sẽn wilgd tɩ b ninga maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd bãmb zutã nemdã ne burã sã n kell n vẽeg beoogo, bɩ b yõog-a bugum. Bɩ y ra rɩ-a ye. Bala, yaa bũmb sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:35 Maan a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã wa sẽn zems bũmb nins mam sẽn wilg foomã. Yaa rasem a yopoe tõr la fo na n dɩk maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã n ning bãmb zutu. 
Exodus29:36 Daar fãa, bɩ f kʋ lol-polle, tɩ yɩ kongr maoongo. Bõn-kãng yaa paoosg yĩnga. Fo sã n maan paoosg maoong tẽn-kugrã zugu, fo na n yiisa tẽn-kugrã yel-wẽndã. Bɩ f ning kaam tẽn-kugrã zug a welgr yĩnga." 
Exodus29:37 Rasem a yopoe fãa bɩ f maan paoosg maoong tẽn-kugrã zug n welg yẽnda a tʋʋmdã yĩnga. La a na n paama welgr hakɩɩka. Bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n sɩɩs tẽn-kugrã me na n lebga bũmb sẽn welg toore. 
Exodus29:38 Ad maoong ning fo sẽn na n maan tẽn-kugrã zug wakat fãa: Daar fãa, yaa pe-bi a yiibu sẽn tar yʋʋmde." 
Exodus29:39 Kʋ pe-bil a yembre, n maan maoong yibeoogo, la f kʋ pe-bil a yiib soabã n maan maoong zaabre." 
Exodus29:40 La ne dẽenem pe-bil a yembrã, bɩ f paas zom-bãaneg wũmbl a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋka, la bɛka sẽn kalem ne oliiv kaam yãmb sẽn wõde, litr a ye la pʋɩ-sʋk la bɛka, la reezẽ rãam litr la pʋɩ-sʋk la bɛka, tɩ yɩ bõn-yũudl kũun maoongo." 
Exodus29:41 La zaabre, bɩ f kʋ pe-bil a yiibẽ soabã. La f kõ bõn-koaadl kũun ne bõn-yũudl kũuni wa sẽn maand yibeoogã, t'a lebg yũug sẽn yaa sõama. Yaa maoong sẽn dɩt bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Exodus29:42 A na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum sɛk zĩigã noore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor yãmb yagensã yĩng zamaan fãa, zĩig ning mam sẽn na n seg foom n gom ne foomã." 
Exodus29:43 La yaa be la mam na n segd Israyɛll nebã, la a na n welga toor mam yʋʋrã sẽn be beenẽ wã yĩnga." 
Exodus29:44 Mam na n welga sɛk zĩigã fu-roogã ne tẽn-kugrã toore. Mam na n welga a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã toor mam maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã yĩnga. 
Exodus29:45 Mam na n paa Israyɛll nebã sʋka, la m na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Exodus29:46 Bãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn yiis bãmb Ezɩpt n na n zĩnd ne bãmba. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam. 
Exodus30:1 Maan tẽn-kugr sẽn na n yõogd wisd a zugu. Maan-a ne akasiya raado. 
Exodus30:2 A woglmã na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yembre, a yalmã me kãntɩɩg a yembre, a tog n yɩɩ maoko, a zãntlmã na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg a yiibu. Maan yɩɩl n ning-a." 
Exodus30:3 Lud a zugã ne a kɩrems a yiibã fãa, la a yɩɩlã ne sãnem halaale. La f maan sãnem kogr n gilg-a." 
Exodus30:4 La f maan sãnem tuiids a yiib a kɩrems a yiibã fãa yĩnga, n ning bãmb a kogrã tẽngre, a kɩremsã gõdgr zĩisẽ. Bãmb yaa tuiids sẽn na n tui da-bɩlem n zã tẽn-kugrã." 
Exodus30:5 La f maan da-bɩlem ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem." 
Exodus30:6 Bɩ f rɩgl tẽn-kugrã fu-lillidg ning sẽn lill kaset koglgã taoore, la sẽn be bas-taal zĩigã sẽn be kaset koglgã zugã taoorã. Yaa zĩ-kãng la mam na n seg foom." 
Exodus30:7 Bɩ a Aarõ yõog wisd sẽn tar yũ-noog a zugu. Yẽnda na n yõogd-a-la yibeoog fãa, yẽnda sẽn wat n manegd fɩtl-dãmbã wakate." 
Exodus30:8 A Aarõ sã n na n yõgen fɩtl-dãmbã zaabre, bɩ a yõog-a. Yaa woto la yãmb na n yõog wisd wakat fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa." 
Exodus30:9 Bɩ y ra yõog wisd yaar a zug ye. La bɩ y ra yõog maoong bɩ zom kũun a zug ye. La y ra pʋdg bõn-yũudl kũun a zug me ye. 
Exodus30:10 Yʋʋmd fãa pʋgẽ, bɩ a Aarõ yãk yel-wẽnã maoong zɩɩm vugr n ning tẽn-kugrã yɩɩlã zut n maan paoosg a yĩnga. Yaa vugr yʋʋmd pʋgẽ la yẽnda na n maan paoosg a zugu, yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa yĩnga. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor meng-meng Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus30:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeel-a yaa: 
Exodus30:12 «Fo sã n sõd Israyɛll nebã n bãng b sõore, bɩ f kɩt tɩ ned Kam fãa yao Sẽn-Ka-Saab a yõor yaoodo, tɩ bã-loangdg da wa yõk bãmb b sõdbã yĩng ye." 
Exodus30:13 Ad yaood ned kam fãa b sẽn sõd sẽn tog n yao. Yaa wanzuri ligd zɩslem sẽn zems garem a yopoe la bɛka, sẽn zems sɛk roogã sɩkɛll pʋɩ-sʋka. Sɩkɛll yaa geera pisi. Yaa yaood bãmb sẽn na n yao Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus30:14 Neb nins b sẽn na n sõdã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne neb nins sẽn tar yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd woto wã na n yaoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab b yõor yaoodo." 
Exodus30:15 La wakat ning yãmb sẽn na n yao Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãmb yõor yaoodã, arzɛk rãmbã ka na n yao sẽn yɩɩd ye, la naong rãmbã me ka na n yao sẽn ka ta sɩkɛll pʋɩ-sʋk ye." 
Exodus30:16 Bɩ y reeg wanzuri Israyɛll nebã nengẽ tɩ yɩ b yõor yaood sɛk roogã tʋʋmã yĩnga, tɩ yɩ tẽegr Israyɛll nebã yĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, na n yɩɩ bãmb mengã yaoodo.»" 
Exodus30:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Exodus30:18 «Maan zũud sĩnga, t'a naoã yaa zũudu, waasg yĩnga. Rɩk-a n dɩgl sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã sʋka, n ning koom a pʋgẽ." 
Exodus30:19 A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã na n yãka koomã be n nudg b nusi la b waas b naoã. 
Exodus30:20 Bãmb sã n na n kẽ sɛk roogẽ wã, bɩ b nudg b nusi, la b waas b naoã ne ko-kãnga, n da wa ki ye. La bãmb sã n na n kolg tẽn-kugrã me n maan b tʋʋmde, n yõog maoong bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga," 
Exodus30:21 bɩ b nudg b nusi, la b waas b naoã, n da wa ki ye. A na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, a Aarõ ne a yagensã yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaane.»" 
Exodus30:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Exodus30:23 «Rɩk parfẽ buud toor-toor sẽn yaa sõama wʋsgo, rɩk miir halaal kɩlo a nii la garem koabg la pis-nii la a nu, la sinamom sẽn tar yũ-noog sẽn zems miirã zɩslem pʋɩ-sʋka, sẽn dat n togs tɩ kɩlo a naase la garem pis-wɛ la a tãabo, la parfẽ sẽn tar yũ-noog sẽn zems kɩlo a naase, la garem pis-wɛ la a tãabo," 
Exodus30:24 la kass sẽn zems kɩlo a nii la garem koabga la pis-nii la a nu, sẽn zems sɛk roogã sẽn tar n makd bũmb zɩslem, la oliiv kaam sẽn zems litr a yoob la bɛka." 
Exodus30:25 Rɩk bõn-kãens fãa n maan nug-tikr kaam sẽn welg toore, n yaa kaam buud toor-toor sẽn kalem taaba, t'a yɩ wa parfẽ maand sẽn maand to-to wã. A na n yɩɩ nug-tikr kaam b sẽn tar n maand welg toor tʋʋmdã." 
Exodus30:26 Yãk ka-kãng n tik sɛk roogã ne kaset koglgã," 
Exodus30:27 la taablã ne a teedã fãa, la fɩtl doagendgã ne a teedã fãa, la tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõog wisd a zugã," 
Exodus30:28 la tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõog maand bugum a zugã ne teedã fãa, la sĩngã me ne a tɛbendgã." 
Exodus30:29 Welg-y bãmb tɩ b lebg bũmb sẽn welg toor wʋsgo. La bũmb sã n sɩɩs bãmba, bõn-kãng me na n welga toore." 
Exodus30:30 La bɩ f pʋdg kaam a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã zutu, n welg bãmb toor tɩ b maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã mam waoogr yĩnga." 
Exodus30:31 Togs Israyɛll nebã tɩ kaam bu-kãng sẽn pʋdgd maan-kʋʋdbã zutã welga toor mam yĩnga, yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa yĩnga." 
Exodus30:32 B ka tog n dɩk ka-kãngã n sõog ned yaar ye. La yãmb ka tog n maan kaam sẽn wẽnd ka-kãng buudu, wa sẽn zems teed nins yãmb sẽn tall n maan-a wã ye. Ka-kãng yaa bũmb sẽn welg toore, la a na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor yãmb yĩnga." 
Exodus30:33 Ned sã n maan ka-kãngã buudu, wall ned sã n ning-a ned sẽn ka maan-kʋʋd zugu, bɩ b yiis-a a buud sʋk n kʋ.»" 
Exodus30:34 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Rɩk kaam buud toor-toor b sẽn boond tɩ ɛstakte ne onigs la galbanom. Yaa parfẽ bu-kãens la wisd zom-bãanegã. Bãmb fãa zɩslem tog n zema taaba. 
Exodus30:35 Rɩk bõn-kãens n maan wisd sẽn tar yũ-noogo, wa sẽn maand-a parfẽ wã sẽn maand to-to wã. Maan-a t'a tar yamsem, n yaa sõama zãnga, n welg toore." 
Exodus30:36 Yãk-a n to t'a lebg bãanega, tɩ f yãk-a n ning kaset koglgã taoor sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, zĩig ning mam sẽn na n seg foomã. A na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor wʋsg yãmb yĩnga." 
Exodus30:37 Bɩ y ra maan wisd a woto buud yãmb mensã yĩng ye. Ne foom, a na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus30:38 Ned sã n maan wisd sẽn wẽnd a woto buudu, n na n kok a yũ-noogã, bɩ b yiis a soab a buudã sʋk n kʋ.»" 
Exodus31:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Exodus31:2 «Ade, mam meng n bool a Ʋʋr biig a Uuri biig a Betsaleyɛll a yʋʋre. Yẽnda yaa Zʋʋda buudã neda." 
Exodus31:3 Mam pida yẽnda ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã n kõ yẽnda yam ne minim, la bãngre, tʋʋmã buud toor-toor fãa yĩnga," 
Exodus31:4 t'a tõe n maan bũmb wʋsg ne sãnem la wanzuri la zũudu," 
Exodus31:5 la a pees kug ne pɛɛsdga, sẽn na n ning gãtsã pʋse, la a pees raado la a maan tʋʋmd buud fãa." 
Exodus31:6 Mam yãka a Ayisamak biig a Oholiyaab sẽn yaa Dan buudã t'a sõng yẽnda. La mam kõo bãmb bãngre tɩ b maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel foomã. 
Exodus31:7 Bɩ bãmb maan sɛk roogã ne kaset koglgã la a limdã sẽn boond tɩ bas-taal zĩigã, ne fu-roogã teed fãa," 
Exodus31:8 la taablã ne a teedã, la fɩtl doagendgã sẽn yaa sãnem halaalã ne a teedã fãa, la tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõogd wisd a zugã," 
Exodus31:9 la tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõogd maand bugum a zugã ne a teedã fãa, la sĩngã ne a tebendsã," 
Exodus31:10 la maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ futã sẽn welg toorã, ne a kambã futã, tʋʋmdã yĩngã," 
Exodus31:11 la nug-tikr kaam la wisd sẽn tar yũ-noog sɛk roogã yĩnga. Bãmb na n maan-a lame t'a yɩ wa mam sẽn yeel foomã kɛpɩ.» 
Exodus31:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Exodus31:13 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b tog n tũu mam vʋʋsg rayã. Yõwã na n yɩɩ bãnd maam ne yãmb sʋk zamaan nins sẽn watã pʋgẽ, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sẽn welg-a yãmb tɩ y yɩ toorã." 
Exodus31:14 Bɩ y sak vʋʋsg raarã, bala, mam welga yẽnda toor yãmb yĩnga. Ned sã n sãam vʋʋsg raarã, bɩ b kʋ a soaba. Ned ning fãa sẽn tʋm vʋʋsg raarã, bɩ y yiis a soab a buudã sʋka." 
Exodus31:15 Yãmb na n tʋma rasem a yoobe, la rasem a yopoe raarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsgo. A na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Ned sã n tʋm vʋʋsg raare, bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus31:16 Bɩ Israyɛll nebã sak mam vʋʋsg daarã, n maan wa sẽn zemse, tɩ yɩ kaool sẽn kõn sɛ bãmb yagensã zamaan woo zamaane." 
Exodus31:17 Vʋʋsg raarã na n yɩɩ bãnd maam ne Israyɛll nebã sʋk wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab naana yĩngr la tẽngã rasem a yoob pʋgẽ, la rasem a yopoe wã daare, bãmb basa b tʋʋmã n vʋʋse.»" 
Exodus31:18 Bãmb sẽn gom ne a Moyiis Sinayi tãngã zug n sɛ, b kõo yẽnda kaset kug-walse, bãmb kõ-a-la kaset kug-wals a yiibu, Wẽnnaam mengã sẽn gʋls ne b nug-bila." 
Exodus32:1 Nebã sẽn yãnd t'a Moyiis kaoosda tãngã zug n ka sigdã, bãmb tigma taab a Aarõ nengẽ n yeel yẽnda yaa: «Maan wẽnnaam n kõ tõnd t'a lʋɩ tõnd taoor n tɛ tõndo. Bala, Moyiis-kãngã, rao ning sẽn yiis-a tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã, tõnd ka mi bũmb ning sẽn paam-a ye.»" 
Exodus32:2 La a Aarõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Bɩ y yãgs sãnem tʋb-londã sẽn be yãmb pagbã tʋbẽ wã, la yãmb kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli wã tʋbẽ wã n wa kõ maam.»" 
Exodus32:3 Nebã fãa yãgsa sãnem tʋb-londã sẽn be bãmb tʋbẽ wã n wa kɩs a Aarõ. 
Exodus32:4 La yẽnda reega sãnemã bãmb nugẽ, n ning-a boaag pʋg n dõog sãnem nag-bila. La nebã yeelame: «Israyɛll nebã, wẽnnaam-dãmb nins sẽn yiis-b yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã la woto.»" 
Exodus32:5 La a Aarõ sẽn yãnd bõn-kãnga, yẽnda maana tẽn-kugr sãnem nag-bilã taoore. La yẽnda mooname n yeele: «Beoog na n yɩɩ tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga.»" 
Exodus32:6 Nebã yika yibeoog pĩnd n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum, la b wa ne zems-n-taar maando. Nebã zĩndame n dɩ la b yũ, la b yik n maan deem." 
Exodus32:7 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Lebg n sigi. Bala, fo nebã fo sẽn yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã sãama b mense." 
Exodus32:8 Bãmb basa sor ning mam sẽn wilg bãmbã tao-tao. Bãmb maana sãnem nag-bila, n wõgemd a taoore, n maan maand a yĩng n yeele: ‹Israyɛll nebã, wẽnnaam-dãmb nins sẽn yiis-b yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã la woto.› »" 
Exodus32:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Mam yãame tɩ nin-bãmbã sũyã yaa kegemse. 
Exodus32:10 La moasã, bas tɩ mam sũ-kãbrã wɩng n dɩ-ba. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud sẽn yaa kãseng yi fo pʋgẽ.»" 
Exodus32:11 La a Moyiis baoome n na n sigs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã sũuri. Yẽnda soka bãmb yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb sũur kãbd wʋsg ne yãmb nebã yãmb sẽn yiis Ezɩpt ne pãn-kãsenga, la ne nug sẽn tar pãngã?" 
Exodus32:12 Yaa bõe tɩ Ezɩpt nebã na n yeele: ‹Wẽnnaam yiisa bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã n na n tɩ kʋ-b tãmsã sʋka, tɩ b buudã menem tẽng zugu!› Bas-y yãmb sũ-kãbrã, la y ra maan y nebã wẽng ning y sẽn dag n dat n maan-bã ye." 
Exodus32:13 Tẽeg-y yãmb tʋmtʋmdb a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Israyɛll yãmb sẽn dag n wẽen ne bãmb ne yãmb meng yʋʋr n yeel tɩ: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yagensã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg wa ãds sẽn be yĩngrã. Mam na n kõo yãmb yagensã tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n gom a yellã n yeel t'a na n yɩɩ bãmb pʋɩɩr wakat sẽn ka sɛtã.» 
Exodus32:14 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame n ka maan bãmb nebã wẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b na n maaname wã." 
Exodus32:15 A Moyiis lebg n yii tãngã zug n sigi. La yẽnda rag n zãada kaset kug-wals a yiibã a nugẽ. Gʋlsem n dag n be kug-walsã nems a yiib fãa zutu, b poorẽ la b taoore." 
Exodus32:16 Kug-walsã yaa Wẽnnaam n maane, la gʋlsmã yaa Wẽnnaam n gʋlse, tɩ wẽnd wa ned sẽn gʋls ne kɩtg kug-wals zutu." 
Exodus32:17 A Zozoe sẽn wʋm nebã sẽn kaasdã, yẽnda yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Zabr kelems n be nebã sik zĩigẽ wã!»" 
Exodus32:18 La a Moyiis leokame yaa: «Yõwã ka tõogr yɩɩl ye. La yɩɩlã ka wẽnd b sẽn tõog neb tɩ b yɩɩndẽ me ye. Mam sẽn wʋmd bũmb ningã yaa neb sẽn yɩɩnd n deesd taaba!» 
Exodus32:19 La bãmb sẽn kolg nebã sik zĩigã n yãnd nag-bilã la nebã sẽn saood warbã, a Moyiis sũur yika wʋsg t'a lob kug-walsã tẽng tɩ b wã tãngã sɛɛga." 
Exodus32:20 Dẽ, yẽnda rɩka nag-bil ning b sẽn maanã n yõog bugum n wer-a t'a lebg zom-bãanega, la yẽnda rɩk-a lame n fẽrg koomã pʋgẽ n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã yũ-a." 
Exodus32:21 La a Moyiis soka a Aarõ yaa: «Nebã maana foom bõe tɩ fo sak tɩ yel-wẽn-kẽeng a woto wa bãmb zugu?» 
Exodus32:22 La a Aarõ leokame: «M zu-soaba, da puug-y y sũur ye. Yãmb meng mii nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa neb ninsi. Bãmb datmã yaa tɩ maan wẽnga." 
Exodus32:23 Nebã yeela maam yaa: ‹Maan wẽnnaam n kõ tõnd t'a lʋɩ tõnd taoor n tɛ-do. Bala, Moyiis-kãngã, rao ning sẽn yiis-a tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã, tõnd ka mi bũmb ning sẽn paam-a ye.›" 
Exodus32:24 La mam yeela bãmb yaa: ‹Bɩ neb nins fãa sẽn tar-b sãnem teedã yãgs-b n wa ne. La bãmb dɩk-b lame n wa kõ maam. La mam dɩka sãnem te-bãmb n ning bugmẽ, la nag-bi-kãngã yii beenẽ.»" 
Exodus32:25 La a Moyiis sẽn yãnd tɩ nebã wegmame t'a Aarõ me kell n bas bãmb b wegengã pʋgẽ tɩ b lebg nin-faad b bɛɛbã sʋkã. 
Exodus32:26 Yẽnda yalsa sikã zĩig noor n yeele: «Neb nins fãa sẽn dat Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, wa-y mam nengẽ ka.» La Leevi buudã fãa wa n tigma taab yẽnda nengẽ." 
Exodus32:27 La yẽnda yeela bãmb yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Ned kam fãa bob a sʋʋg n pɩʋʋg sik zĩigẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne noor a yembre, n tɩ tãag noor a to, n kʋ a ba-biiga, a zoa la a roagda.»" 
Exodus32:28 La Leevi buud nebã saka a Moyiis noore, la badaar bala, nebã sʋka, neb tus a tãab n ki." 
Exodus32:29 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeelame: «Rũndã, a bee yãmb zug tɩ y ges maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã yell Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga, tɩ bark zĩnd yãmb zug moasã. Bala, yãmb ned kam fãa kisga a biiga la a ba-biiga.»" 
Exodus32:30 Vẽkembeoogo, a Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Yãmb kongame n maan yel-wẽn-kãsenga. La mam na n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ moasã. Daarninga, mam na n paama sugr yãmb yel-wẽnã yĩnga.»" 
Exodus32:31 La a Moyiis lebg n leba Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «M Zu-soabã, m kãntɩɩga! Nin-kãensã maana yel-wẽn-kãsenga. Bãmb maana sãnem wẽnnaam b mensã yĩnga." 
Exodus32:32 Baoosgo, kõ-y bãmb b yel-wẽnã sugri. La yãmb sã n ka na n kõ bãmb b yel-wẽnã sugri, m kotame tɩ y yẽes mam yʋʋrã yãmb sẽn dag n gʋls yãmb sebrã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Exodus32:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yaa ned ning sẽn beeg maamã yʋʋr la m na n yẽes m sebrã pʋga. 
Exodus32:34 Moasã, kẽng n tɩ tall nebã tɩ b ta zĩig ning mam sẽn wilg foomã. La ade, mam malɛɛkã na n lʋɩɩ fo taoore. Baoosgo, mam sũ-kãbrã daare, mam na n sɩbga bãmb b kongrã yĩnga.»" 
Exodus32:35 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga nebã, nag-bil ning bãmb ne a Aarõ sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Exodus33:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Bɩ foom ne neb nins fo sẽn yiis Ezɩpt soolem pʋgẽ wã yi ka n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kãab a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob n yeel tɩ m na n kõo bãmb yagensã. 
Exodus33:2 Mam na n tʋma mam malɛɛk t'a reng foom taoore. La mam na n diga Kana-rãmbã ne Amoor-dãmbã la Hɛt-dãmbã ne Perɛɛz-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuuz-rãmbã. 
Exodus33:3 Kẽng-y tẽng ning sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsgã. La mam ka na n yãag yãmb ye, mam sã n yãag yãmba, mam na n wa sãama yãmb sorã zugu. Bala, yãmb yaa neb sũy sẽn yaa kegemse.»" 
Exodus33:4 Nebã sẽn wʋm koe-kãng sẽn yaa toogã, b sũyã sãamame. La ned baa a yembr ka yeelg a fan-teed ye." 
Exodus33:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb sũyã yaa kegemse, mam sã n wa yãmb sʋk wakat bilf bala, mam na n sãama yãmba. La moasã, bɩ y yiis y fan-teedã tɩ mam bãng mam sẽn na n maan yãmb bũmb ninga.»" 
Exodus33:6 Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne bãmb sẽn be Hoorɛɛb tãngã, Israyɛll nebã yiisa b fan-teedã." 
Exodus33:7 La a Moyiis rɩka fu-roog n yi kɛɛng n tɩ tilg n zãag ne sik zĩigã bilfu. La yẽnda pʋda a yʋʋr tɩ sɛk roogo. La neb nins fãa sẽn dag n baood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yii sik zĩigẽ wã n kẽng sɛk roogã sẽn dag n be kɛɛngã. 
Exodus33:8 La a Moyiis sã n yi sik zĩigẽ wã n dabd sɛk roogã sẽn beẽ wã, ned kam fãa yikame n yals a rignoorẽ n get a Moyiis hal tɩ yẽnda tɩ kẽ fu-roogẽ wã." 
Exodus33:9 La a Moyiis sẽn kẽ fu-roogẽ wã, sawad-taokã sigame n yals rignoorẽ wã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n gomda ne a Moyiisi." 
Exodus33:10 Nebã fãa rag n nee sawad-taokã sẽn sigd n yals sɛk roogã rignoorẽ wã. Dẽ, bãmb yikdame, tɩ ned kam fãa wõgemd a fu-roog noore." 
Exodus33:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n gomda ne a Moyiis neng ne neng wa ned sẽn gomd ne a zoa. La a Moyiis sã n wa lebg n lebd sik zĩigẽ wã, bi-bɩɩg a Zozoe sẽn yaa yẽnda sõangda, n yaa a Nun biigã ka yit fu-roogẽ wã ye." 
Exodus33:12 A Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Ade, yãmb n yeel maam tɩ m yik n tall nin-bãmbã n looge! La yãmb yaool n ka wilg maam yãmb sẽn na n tʋm a soab t'a yãag maam ye. Baoosgo, yãmb yeelame: ‹Mam mii foom ne f yʋʋre, la fo tara bark mam nifẽ me.›" 
Exodus33:13 Moasã, sã n yaa tɩ mam paama bark yãmb nifẽ, mam kotame tɩ y kɩt tɩ mam bãng yãmb soayã, dẽ, mam na bãng yãmba, n kell n paam bark yãmb nifẽ. Ade, nin-bãmbã yaa yãmb mengã nebã!»" 
Exodus33:14 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam mengã n na n yãag foom, la mam na n kõo foom vʋʋsgo.»" 
Exodus33:15 A Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yãmb meng sã n ka na n yãag tõndo, bɩ y ra sak tɩ tõnd yi ka ye." 
Exodus33:16 Dẽ, yaa ne bõe la ned na n bãng tɩ maam ne yãmb nebã paama bark yãmb nifẽ? Ka yãmb sẽn yãagd tõndã yĩng sɩda? Yaa rẽ yĩng la maam ne yãmb nebã yaa toor ne neb a taabã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã.»" 
Exodus33:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Mam na n maana wa fo sẽn kosã kɛpɩ. Bala, fo paama bark mam nifẽ, la mam mii foom ne f yʋʋre.»" 
Exodus33:18 A Moyiis yeelame: «Mam kotame tɩ y wilg maam yãmb ziirã.» 
Exodus33:19 La bãmb yeelame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ mam sõmblmã fãa lʋɩ fo taoore, la m wilg foom m yʋʋrã sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la mam na n ninga m sẽn dat n ning a soab zug barkã barka, la m zoe mam sẽn dat n zoe a soab nimbãanegã nimbãanega.»" 
Exodus33:20 La bãmb yeelame: «Fo ka tõe n yãnd mam nengã ye. Bala, ninsaal ka tõe n yãnd maam n ket n vɩ ye.»" 
Exodus33:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeelame: «Ad zĩig sẽn pẽ ne maam. Yals pĩigã zugu. 
Exodus33:22 La mam ziirã sã n tũud beenẽ n loogdẽ, mam na n kẽesa foom pĩig bokẽ. La mam sẽn wat loogdẽ wã wakate, mam na n luda foom ne m nugu." 
Exodus33:23 La m sã n wa loog n sɛ, m na n yaool n yãka m nugã tɩ f yãnd mam kudgã. Bala, ned ka tõe n yãnd mam nengã ye.»" 
Exodus34:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Pees kug-wals a yiib sẽn zems wa pĩnd-dãmbã. Mam na n gʋlsa m goam nins sẽn dag n be dẽenem kug-wals nins fo sẽn wã wã zutã b zugu. 
Exodus34:2 Segl f meng n dʋ Sinayi tãngã zug beoog zĩ-yẽegr wakate, n yals beenẽ mam taoore." 
Exodus34:3 Bɩ ned da tũ foom n dʋ tãngã ye, la bɩ ned da kẽng n ta zĩig baa a yembr tãngã zug me ye. La sẽn paase, bɩ rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd me ra kolg tãngã pend n wãb yamd ye.»" 
Exodus34:4 La a Moyiis peesa kug-wals a yiib sẽn zems wa pĩnd-dãmbã. La yibeoog pĩnda, yẽnda zãa kug-wals a yiibã a nugẽ n dʋ Sinayi tãngã zug wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda wã." 
Exodus34:5 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab siga sawaodgã pʋgẽ n yals beenẽ ne yẽnda. Yẽnda pʋʋsa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. 
Exodus34:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab looga yẽnda taoor n moon n yeele: «Mam yʋʋr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa nimbãan-zoɛta, la bark kõata. Mam sũur ka yikd tao-tao ye, la mam yaa nonglem soaba, la m maanda sɩda." 
Exodus34:7 La mam maanda sɩd hal tɩ ta zamaan tusri, n kõt neb sugr b beegrã ne b kɩɩsgã la b yel-wẽnã fãa yĩnga. La baoosgo, mam ka na n bas yãmb taal y beegrã yĩng ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ba-rãmbã beegrã sɩbgr zĩnd bãmb kambã zutu, la bãmb yagensã zut hal tɩ ta zamaan a tãabo, la ne a naase.»" 
Exodus34:8 Dẽ, tao-tao bala, a Moyiis sulgame hal n tãag tẽng n wõgemde." 
Exodus34:9 La yẽnda yeelame: «M Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n nonga maam, baa nebã sũyã sã n yaa kegemse, mam kotame tɩ y yãag tõndo. La y kõ tõnd sugr d kongrã ne d yel-wẽnã yĩnga. La tõnd na n yɩɩ yãmb dẽnda.»" 
Exodus34:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Ade, mam na n maana kaool ne foom. Mam na n maana bõn-bãnd fo nebã fãa taoore, yaa bõn-bãnd sẽn nan zɩ n maan buud baa a yembr sʋk dũniyã pʋgẽ ye. La nebã fãa sẽn be ne foomã na n yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã sẽn sek zoeesã, mam sẽn na n tall foom n maanã." 
Exodus34:11 Gũus neer n sak bũmb ning mam sẽn wilgd foom dũndã wã. La mam na n diga Amoor-dãmbã ne Kana-rãmbã la Hɛt-dãmbã ne Perɛɛz-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuuz-rãmbã fo taoore. 
Exodus34:12 Fo sã n ta zĩig ning fo sẽn dabdã, bɩ f gũus n da wa maan kaool ne tẽngã nebã, tɩ b lebg wa bẽdg yãmb sʋk ye." 
Exodus34:13 La bɩ y sãam bãmb tẽn-kugã ne b kug-vigindsã bãmb sẽn viglã, la y kɛ bãmb wẽn-naandg a Aseera ra-lugdsã n lubi." 
Exodus34:14 Bɩ y ra wõgemd wẽnnaam a to taoor ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sũ-kiir soaba, bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sũ-kiir soaba." 
Exodus34:15 Ra maan kaool ne tẽngã neb ye. Bãmb sẽn maand yoob ne b wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩnga, bɩ b ra wa bool foom tɩ f naag-b n dɩ bãmb wẽn-naandsã maand nemd ye." 
Exodus34:16 La bɩ f ra peeg bãmb kom-pugli n kõ f kamb tɩ b maan b pagb ye, tɩ bãmb kom-pugli wã sẽn maand yoob ne b wẽnnaam-dãmbã, ra wa kɩt tɩ fo kom-dibli wã maan yoob ne bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã ye." 
Exodus34:17 Ra rõog kut bõn-naandg baa a yembre tɩ yɩ fo wẽnnaam ye. 
Exodus34:18 Maan bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã. Rɩ bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll dasem a yopoe b sẽn yãk bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã pʋgẽ wã, wa mam sẽn yeel foomã. Bala, yaa bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã pʋgẽ la fo yi Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Exodus34:19 Bi-rẽeng buudã fãa sẽn deng n yi a ma pʋgẽ yaa maan n so. Yaa fo rũm-daoog fãa sẽn yaa bi-rẽega, rũmsã sʋka, sã n yaa nag-bila, pe-bila wall bulla." 
Exodus34:20 Rɩk pe-bila, wall bʋʋg n tek bõang fãa sẽn yaa a ma bi-rẽenga. La fo sã n ka rat n tek bõangã, bɩ f wẽ a kãar n wãage. La fo kom-dibli wã fãa sẽn yaa kom-dẽemsã. Bɩ ned da wa mam taoor ne nug-vɩɩd ye." 
Exodus34:21 Tʋm dasem a yoobe, la f vʋʋs rasem a yopoe wã daare. Vʋʋse, baa sã n yaa peseng wakat bɩ tigsg wakate." 
Exodus34:22 Yʋʋmdã vẽkre, bɩ f maan dasem a yopoe-poe tigrã sẽn yaa bõn-koaadlã dẽenem biis kẽebgã, n paas tigsgã tigrã." 
Exodus34:23 Yʋʋmd fãa pʋgẽ, bɩ raop nins fãa sẽn be ne foomã wa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã taoor naoor a tãabo." 
Exodus34:24 Bala, mam na n diga buud wʋsg tɩ b zoe fo taoore, la mam na n yalga fo soolmã. Fo sã n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã nengẽ naoor a tãab yʋʋmd fãa pʋgẽ, ned ka be sẽn na n bao tɩ soog fo tẽngã ye." 
Exodus34:25 Ra lagem bur sẽn tar dã-bɩll ne maoong zɩɩm ye. Ra bas Pak tigrã maoong nemd tɩ kell n vẽeg beoog ye. 
Exodus34:26 Tall fo tẽn-gãongã dẽenem biisã sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã roogẽ. Da rʋg-y bull a ma bĩisim pʋg ye.» 
Exodus34:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gʋls gom-kãensã. Bala, yaa ne gom-kãensã la mam maand kaool ne foom, la ne Israyɛlle.»" 
Exodus34:28 A Moyiis paa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab rasem pis-naase, n ka rɩ rɩɩbo, la a ka yũ koom ye. La yẽnda gʋlsa kãabg goamã sẽn yaa tõod piigã kug-walsã zutu." 
Exodus34:29 A Moyiis siga Sinayi tãngã zugu, la yẽnda rag n zãada kaset kug-wals a yiibã a nugẽ. Yẽnda sẽn wa n sigd tãngã zugã, a rag n ka mi tɩ yẽnda sẽn gom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã kɩtame tɩ yẽnda nengã pɩnd ye." 
Exodus34:30 A Aarõ ne Israyɛll nebã fãa yãndame t'a Moyiis nengã pɩndame. Dẽ, bãmb zoee rabeem n ka rat n kolg-a ye." 
Exodus34:31 A Moyiis boola bãmba. La a Aarõ ne Israyɛll nebã nanambsã fãa waa yẽnda nengẽ, la a Moyiis goma ne bãmba." 
Exodus34:32 Dẽ poorẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa yaool n kolgame, la yẽnda togsa bãmb bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs yẽnda Sinayi tãngã zugã." 
Exodus34:33 La a Moyiis sẽn gom ne bãmb n sɛ, yẽnda luda a nengã ne peende." 
Exodus34:34 La a Moyiis sã n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n na n tɩ gom ne bãmba, a pilgda peendã, hal tɩ yẽnda yi sɛk roogã pʋgẽ. La yẽnda sã n yi, a togsda Israyɛll nebã bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs yẽnda wã." 
Exodus34:35 Israyɛll nebã yãndame t'a Moyiis nengã pɩndame. Dẽ, a Moyiis lebgd n luda a nengã ne peendã yɛsa, hal tɩ ta yẽnda sẽn na n leb n kẽ n gom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Exodus35:1 A Moyiis tigsa Israyɛll nebã fãa n yeel bãmb yaa: «Ad bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet yãmb tɩ y maane. 
Exodus35:2 Tʋm-y rasem a yoobã, la rasem a yopoe daarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar sẽn welg toor yãmb yĩnga. Yaa daar sẽn yaa toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Ned sã n maan tʋʋmd badaar bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus35:3 Bɩ y ra widg bugum y yiyã pʋse, vʋʋsg daarã daar ye.»" 
Exodus35:4 A Moyiis yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maane. 
Exodus35:5 Yãk-y bũmb nins yãmb sẽn so wã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bɩ ned ning fãa sũur sẽn noom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa ne kũun n wa kõ bãmba: Yaa sãnem ne wanzuri la zũudu," 
Exodus35:6 la gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miid ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la gĩs sẽn maan ne bʋʋs kõbdo," 
Exodus35:7 la pe-raad gãnd sẽn moneme, ne dofẽ-rãmb gãndo, la akasiya raado," 
Exodus35:8 ne kaam, fɩtl-dãmbã yĩnga, la parfẽ sẽn tar yũ-noogo, nug-tikr kaamã ne wisdã yĩnga," 
Exodus35:9 la onigs kug ne kug a taab sẽn na n ning maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã la yãoog lutgã. 
Exodus35:10 Bɩ tʋʋm-mitb nins fãa sẽn be yãmb sʋkã maan bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. 
Exodus35:11 Maan-y sɛk roogã sẽn yaa fu-roogã ne a lutgã, la a yagendsã ne a ra-pegdã la a ra-bɩlmã ne a ra-lugdsã la b naoã," 
Exodus35:12 la kãoobg koglgã ne a ra-bɩlmã, la bas-taal zĩigã ne fu-lillidgã," 
Exodus35:13 la taablã ne a ra-bɩlmã, la a teedã fãa ne burã b sẽn kõtã." 
Exodus35:14 Ne fɩtl-doagendgã ne a teedã fãa la fɩtl-dãmbã ne kaamã sẽn na n ning n widgã," 
Exodus35:15 la wisd yõogr tẽn-kugrã ne a ra-tuiidsã, la nug-tikr kaamã ne wisd sẽn tar yũ-noogã, la sɛk roogã rignoor fu-lillidgã," 
Exodus35:16 ne maand sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã, ne a zũud gãmbrã ne a ra-tuiidsã, la a lagdã fãa, ne a sĩngã ne a tebendgã," 
Exodus35:17 ne zakã pɛɛlã la a ra-lugdsã ne b naoã, la zakã rignoor fu-lillidgã," 
Exodus35:18 ne sɛk roogã biili la zakã biili ne b wĩyã," 
Exodus35:19 la fut nins sẽn welg toor maan-kʋʋdbã tʋʋmd yĩnga: Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ fut sẽn yaa toor zallã ne a kambã futã b sẽn na n yeelg n maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã sɛk roogã pʋgã.» 
Exodus35:20 Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn dag n tigmã yiime n bas a Moyiisi. 
Exodus35:21 La neb nins fãa sũur sẽn dag n noom tɩ kõ ne yamleoogã talla b kũun n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã manegr yĩnga, la a tʋʋmã teed fãa yĩnga, la maan-kʋʋdbã fut sẽn welg toorã yĩnga." 
Exodus35:22 Raopã ne pagbã fãa sẽn dag n tar sũ-noog tɩ kõ wã talla kũun n wa: kẽer yaa sogdse, kẽer yaa tʋb-londo, kẽer yaa nug-bĩnsi, kẽer yaa yãndo, yaa sãnem teed buud toor-toor fãa, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dɩk b sãnem n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã." 
Exodus35:23 La neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tar gĩsã waa ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miid la lamd gĩs-bãanega, ne bʋʋs kõbd la pe-raad gãnd sẽn moneme, la dofẽ-rãmb gãndo." 
Exodus35:24 La neb nins fãa sẽn dat n kõ wanzuri ne zũudã talla bãmb kũunã n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La neb nins fãa sẽn tar akasiya raad sẽn zems tʋʋmdã yĩngã tallame n wa. 
Exodus35:25 La pagb nins fãa sẽn mi wĩibã wĩi gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama la gĩs-miid ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg n tall n wa. 
Exodus35:26 La pagb nins fãa sẽn mi tʋʋmde, la sẽn nong tʋʋm-kãngã wĩi gĩs ne bʋʋs kõbdo." 
Exodus35:27 La nanambsã waa ne onigs kuga, la kug buud a taab b sẽn na n ning gãtsã sẽn be maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã la yãoog lutgã zugã pʋsã." 
Exodus35:28 La bãmb waa ne parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ne kaam fɩtl-dãmbã yĩnga, la nug-tikr kaamã, ne wisd sẽn tar yũ-noogo." 
Exodus35:29 Israyɛll raopã, ne pagb nins fãa sẽn dat n kõ bũmb tʋʋmdã yĩng wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiis t'a maanã, talla b kũunã n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yamleoogo." 
Exodus35:30 A Moyiis yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka a Ʋʋr biig a Uuri biig a Betsaleyɛll sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã nedã." 
Exodus35:31 La bãmb pida yẽnda ne Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã n kõ yẽnda yam ne yẽesem la bãngr t'a maan tʋʋmã buud fãa. 
Exodus35:32 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yẽnda tõog n bãng n maan tʋʋm buud wʋsg ne sãnem la wanzuri ne zũudu," 
Exodus35:33 la a pees kug ne litla, n ning gãtsã pʋse, la a pees raad n tʋm tʋʋm-minim tʋʋm buudã fãa." 
Exodus35:34 B kõo yẽnda ne a Ayisamak biig a Oholiyaab sẽn yaa Dan buudã nedã yam tɩ b zãms neb a taabã me. 
Exodus35:35 Bãmb kõo bãmb yam tɩ b maan tʋʋmã buud fãa tɩ yɩ neere: Yaa kug peesg tʋʋmde, la sʋnd wʋgbo, la sẽn bokd peend tɩ yɩ gʋlma ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu la lamd gĩs-bãanega. Yaa tʋʋm buud nins fãa tʋʋm-mit sẽn maandã.»" 
Exodus36:1 A Betsaleyɛll ne a Oholiyaab la tʋʋm-mitb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yam la yẽesem tɩ b maan tʋʋmã fãa sɛk roogã yĩngã maana bũmb fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. 
Exodus36:2 A Moyiis boola a Betsaleyɛll ne a Oholiyaab ne tʋʋm-mitb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yamã sẽn dat n wa sɩng tʋʋmdã ne yamleoogã. 
Exodus36:3 La bãmb kẽnga a Moyiis nengẽ n tɩ reeg kũun nins fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn tall n wa sɛk roogã meeb yĩngã. La yibeoog fãa nebã ket n tallda kũunã n wat yẽnda nengẽ ne yamleoogo. 
Exodus36:4 La tʋʋm-mitb nins fãa sẽn maand sɛk roogã tʋʋmdã basa tʋʋm nins fãa bãmb sẽn maandã 
Exodus36:5 n wa yeel a Moyiis yaa: «Nebã wata ne bũmb wʋsg n yɩɩd sẽn zems tʋʋm nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tɩ b maanã.» 
Exodus36:6 Dẽ, a Moyiis kõo noor tɩ b pɩʋʋg nebã sik zĩigẽ n moon n yeele: «Bɩ raopã ne pagbã ra leb n wa ne kũun sɛk zĩigã yĩng ye.» La yẽnda gɩdga nebã tɩ b ra leb n tall n wa ye." 
Exodus36:7 Bala, bũmb nins nebã sẽn kõ wã yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd b sẽn tog n tall n tʋm tʋʋmdã." 
Exodus36:8 Tʋʋm-mitbã fãa sẽn tʋmd tʋʋmdã maana sɛk roogã ne pɛɛl piig sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miidu, la b gʋla serubẽ-rãmb pɛɛlã zutu. Rag sɩd yaa tʋʋm-mit tʋʋmde." 
Exodus36:9 Peend a yembr fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nii, la a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a naase. B maga pɛɛlã fãa tɩ b yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Exodus36:10 B bogla pɛɛl a nu wã ne taaba, la a bogl a nu wã sẽn ketã me ne taaba." 
Exodus36:11 La b maana gãts ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo peendã noor kɩreng a yembr sẽn maan ne pɛɛl a nu sẽn bogl taabã, la b maana woto ne peend a yiib soabã me noor kɩreng a yembr sẽn maan ne pɛɛl a nu sẽn bogl taabã." 
Exodus36:12 B maana gãts pis-nu peend a yembrã zugu, la b maan gãts pis-nu peend a yiib soaba me kɩrenga. B ninga bãmb b yiibã fãa gãtsã tɩ b zems taaba." 
Exodus36:13 La yẽnda maana sãnem sogds pis-nu n sog pɛɛlã ne taab tɩ b lebg roog a yembre. 
Exodus36:14 Yẽnda wʋga pɛɛl ne bʋʋs kõbd sẽn na n lud sɛk roogã. Yẽnda wʋga pɛɛl piig la a yembre. 
Exodus36:15 Peend a yembr fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã, la a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a naase. B maga pɛɛl piig la a yembrã tɩ b yalmã ne b woglmã zem taaba." 
Exodus36:16 B bogla pɛɛl a nu wã ne taaba, la b bogl a yoobã sẽn kellã me ne taaba." 
Exodus36:17 La b maana gãts pis-nu dẽenem peendã sẽn maan ne pɛɛl sẽn bogl taabã kɩreng a yembre. La b maana gãts pis-nu me n ning a yiib soabã sẽn maan ne pɛɛl sẽn bogl taabã kɩreng a yembre. 
Exodus36:18 La b maana zũud sogds pis-nu n sog-a t'a lebg fu-roog a yembre. 
Exodus36:19 La b maana lutg ne pe-raad gãnd sẽn monem fu-roogã yĩnga, la b maan lutg a to ne dofẽ-rãmb gãnd n pʋgl a zugã." 
Exodus36:20 B maana ra-pegdã sɛk roogã yĩnga. B maana bãmb ne akasiya raado, n yik-b n yals yĩngri." 
Exodus36:21 Ra-peok a ye fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩg piiga, la a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus36:22 Ra-peok fãa tara sogds a yiib sẽn na n sog bãmb ne taaba. B maana sɛk roogã ra-pegdã fãa woto. 
Exodus36:23 B maana ra-pegd sɛk roogã yĩnga. Kɩreng ning sẽn be goabgã yaa ra-pegd pisi, tɩ kɩreng ning sẽn be rɩtgã me yaa ra-pegd pisi." 
Exodus36:24 La b maana wanzuri nao pis-naas sẽn na n ning ra-pegd pisi wã tẽngre. Yẽnda ninga ra-peok fãa nao a yiib a sogds a yiibã yĩnga. 
Exodus36:25 B maana ra-pegd pisi sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn be rɩtgã yĩnga," 
Exodus36:26 ne wanzuri nao pis-naas n ning bãmb yiib-yiib ra-peok a yembr fãa tẽngre. 
Exodus36:27 B maana ra-pegd a yoob sɛk roogã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd taoorã yĩnga. 
Exodus36:28 La b maana ra-pegd a yiib sɛk roogã lals gõdgr zĩis a yiibã sẽn be roogã yaangã yĩnga. 
Exodus36:29 Sẽn sɩng ne tẽngrã, bãmb bogla a yiibu, la bãmb zutã tɩ teeg taab yĩngr tuiidgã zĩigẽ. Lals a yiibã fãa gõdgr zĩis yɩɩ woto." 
Exodus36:30 Bãmb yaa ra-pegd a nii ne b wanzuri nao piig la a yoobe. Ra-peok a yembr fãa tẽngr tara nao a yiibu. 
Exodus36:31 B maana akasiya da-bɩlem a nu sɛk roogã kɩreng a yembr da-pegd yĩnga," 
Exodus36:32 la ra-bɩlem a nu a kɩreng a yiib soaba me ra-pegd yĩnga. La b maana ra-pegd a nu me sɛk roogã yaang sẽn teesd taoorã yĩnga. 
Exodus36:33 B maana ra-bɩlemd ning sẽn na n zĩnd sʋkã n pɩʋʋg ra-pegdã fãa sẽn sɩng ne lalgã noor a yembre, hal tɩ ta a noor a to wã." 
Exodus36:34 B luda ra-pegdã ne sãnem. La a maana sãnem tuiids sẽn yaa gils ra-bɩlmã yĩnga, n bolg ra-bɩlmã ne sãnem." 
Exodus36:35 B wʋga fu-lillidg ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu, la lamd gĩs-bãanega, yẽnda maan-a-la wa tʋʋm-mit sẽn maande, n gʋl serubẽ-rãmb a zugu." 
Exodus36:36 B maana akasiya ra-lugds a naas a yĩnga, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem. Bãmb yagendsã yaa sãnem. La b maana wanzuri nao a naas b yĩnga." 
Exodus36:37 B maana fu-lillidg sẽn na n ning fu-roogã noor ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu, la lamd gĩs-bãaneg sẽn tar tʋʋm-mitbã nug tʋʋmd a zugu." 
Exodus36:38 La b maana fu-lillidgã ra-lugds a nu wã ne b yagendsã, n bolg bãmb pugli wã ne sãnem n ning yagendsã bãmb zutu. La b maana bãmb nao a nu wã ne zũudu." 
Exodus37:1 A Betsaleyɛll maana koglg ne akasiya raado, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka, t'a zãntlmã me yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:2 Yẽnda bolga a pʋgã ne a yɩngã ne sãnem halaale, n maan kogr ne sãnem n gilg a zugã." 
Exodus37:3 La yẽnda rõoga sãnem tuiids sẽn yaa gils a naase, n ning a nao a naasã. Yẽnda ninga tuiids a yiibã kɩreng a yembre, la a ning a yiibã me kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus37:4 Yẽnda maana ra-bɩlem ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem." 
Exodus37:5 Yẽnda tuii ra-bɩlmã tuiidsã koglgã kɩremse, n zã koglgã." 
Exodus37:6 Yẽnda maana limd sẽn boond tɩ bas-taal zĩig ne sãnem halaale. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka, a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:7 La yẽnda maana serubẽ-rãmb a yiib sẽn kud ne sãnem n ning bas-taal zĩigã kɩrems a yiibã. 
Exodus37:8 Yẽnda maana serubẽ a yembr kɩreng a yembre, la maan a to wã me kɩreng a to. Serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã fãa sẽn be kɩrems a yiibã lagma taab n yaa bũmb a yembr ne bas-taal zĩigã." 
Exodus37:9 Serubẽ-rãmbã tẽega b pɩgs a zug n lud bas-taal zĩigã. La bãmb teesa taaba. Serubẽ-rãmbã nems teesa bas-taal zĩigã. 
Exodus37:10 Yẽnda maana taabl ne akasiya raado. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu, a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre, la a zãntlem yaa kãntɩɩg a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:11 Yẽnda luda taablã ne sãnem halaal n maan kogr ne sãnem n gilg-a. 
Exodus37:12 La yẽnda maana ra-pɩʋʋgds sẽn zems nug-bi a naas n gilg-a. Yẽnda maana kogr ne sãnem n gilg ra-pɩʋʋgdsã. 
Exodus37:13 Yẽnda maana sãnem tuiids a naas sẽn yaa gilsi, n ning bãmb a nao a naasã fãa sokr zĩisẽ." 
Exodus37:14 Yẽnda ninga tuiidsã da-pɩʋʋgdsã kɩremse n tui da-bɩlem a bãmb pʋse n zã taablã. 
Exodus37:15 Yẽnda maana ra-bɩlem ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem n na n zã taablã." 
Exodus37:16 Yẽnda maana teed nins sẽn na n dogl taablã zug ne sãnem halaale, yaa laase, ne wũmbli, la tʋgdo la laas sẽn na n tall n pʋdg rãam n maan maando." 
Exodus37:17 Yẽnda kuda sãnem halaal n maan fɩtl doagendgã. A naoorã ne a sɛɛgã, la a yoadã ne a puudã fãa yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Exodus37:18 Wil a yoob n dag n be fɩtl doagendgã kɩremse. Wil a tãab rag n bee kɩreng a yembre, tɩ wil a tãab me be kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus37:19 Fɩtl doagendgã will a yembrã rag n tara laas a tãab sẽn yaa wa amand tɩɩg puudu, ne a yoadã, la a puudã, t'a will a to wã me rag n tar laas a tãab sẽn yaa wa amand tɩɩg puudu, ne a yoadã, la a puudã." 
Exodus37:20 Fɩtl doagendgã tɩɩg tara laas a naas ne puud sẽn wẽnd wa amand tɩɩg puudu, ne b yoadã, la b puudã." 
Exodus37:21 Yodr a yembr n dag n be a pipi wil a yiibã tẽngre, tɩ yodr a yembr be wil a yiibã sẽn pʋgdã tẽngre, tɩ yodr a yembr me be yaoolem wil a yiibã tẽngre. Yɩɩ woto ne wil a yoobã fãa sẽn dag n yit be wã." 
Exodus37:22 Yoadã ne wilã lagma taab n yaa bũmb a yembr ne fɩtl doagendgã sẽn maan ne sãnem halaal sẽn kudã. 
Exodus37:23 Yẽnda maana fɩtl-doagendgã fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe wã ne yʋʋse, la bug-zẽend laasã ne sãnem halaale." 
Exodus37:24 Yẽnda maana fɩtl doagendgã ne a teedã fãa ne sãnem halaal ne talã a yembre. 
Exodus37:25 Yẽnda maana tẽn-kugr ne akasiya raado, tɩ b na n yõog wisd a zugu. A yaa maoko. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre, a yalmã me yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre, la a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu. A yɩɩlã naaga ne a mengã." 
Exodus37:26 Yẽnda bolga a zugã ne a kɩremsã fãa ne a yɩɩlã ne sãnem, n maan sãnem kogr n gilg-a." 
Exodus37:27 Yẽnda maana sãnem tuiids a yiib-yiib a kɩrems a yiibã fãa yĩnga, n ning a kogrã tẽngre, a kɩremsã gõdgr zĩisẽ. Yaa tuiid-kãens la b na n tuiid ra-bɩlmã n zãad tẽn-kugrã." 
Exodus37:28 Yẽnda maana ra-bɩlmã ne akasiya raado, n bolg bãmb ne sãnem." 
Exodus37:29 Yẽnda maana nug-tikr kaam sẽn welg toore, ne wisd halaal sẽn tar yũ-noogo, wa parfẽ-maand sẽn maand to-to wã." 
Exodus38:1 Yẽnda maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugr ne akasiya raado. Tẽn-kugrã yaa maoko. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, a yalem me yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. A zãntlem yaa kãntɩɩg a tãabo." 
Exodus38:2 Yẽnda maana yɩɩl tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã gõdgr zĩis a naasẽ wã. Yɩɩlã ne tẽn-kugrã naaga taaba. La yẽnda lud-a-la ne zũudu. 
Exodus38:3 Yẽnda rɩka zũud n maan tẽn-kugrã teed fãa: yẽnda maana laas sẽn tar n wʋkd tompeglem ne pɛll-dãmba, la maoong zɩɩm laas ne maand kõsdse, la bugum laase." 
Exodus38:4 Yẽnda maana zũud gãmbr n yagl tẽn-kugrã kogrã tẽngre, tɩ gãmbrã noor a ye ta tẽnga, t'a noor a ye wã ta tẽn-kugrã zãntlem pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus38:5 Yẽnda rõoga zũud tuiids a naas sẽn yaa gilsi, n ning gãmbrã kɩrems a naasã gõdgr zĩisẽ, n na n tui ra-bɩlmã b pʋsẽ." 
Exodus38:6 Yẽnda maana akasiya ra-bɩlmã n bolg bãmb ne zũudu. 
Exodus38:7 Yẽnda tuii ra-bɩlmã tuiids nins sẽn be tẽn-kugrã kɩrems a yiibã fãa wã pʋse, sẽn na yɩl n zã tẽn-kugrã. Yẽnda maana tẽn-kugrã ne ra-pegdo, t'a pʋgã yaa yoko." 
Exodus38:8 Yẽnda rɩka pagb nins sẽn tʋmd sɛk roogã noorã nin-getsã n maan zũud pekr sĩngã ne a naoã. 
Exodus38:9 Yẽnda maana zakã. Zakã kɩreng ning sẽn sɩng ne rɩtg n dabd goabg sẽnẽ wã tara pɛɛl sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. Bãmb woglmã zemsa kãntɩɩg koabga, rẽndã n dag n yaa zakã." 
Exodus38:10 B lugla ra-lugds pisi zũud nao pisi wã zut pɛɛlã yĩnga, la a maana ra-lugdsã yagendsã ne b bãensã ne wanzuri." 
Exodus38:11 La zakã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nug-rɩtgã pɛɛlã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg koabg wa zakã woglem sẽn yaa bũmb ningã. La ra-lugds pisi ne zũud nao pisi n be be. La ra-lugdsã ne b bãensã yaa wanzuri. 
Exodus38:12 La kɩreng ning sẽn be nin-taoorã pɛɛl yalem yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu wa zakã yalem sẽn yaa bũmb ningã. La a tara ra-lugds piig ne b nao piiga. La ra-lugdsã tuiidsã ne b bãensã maana ne wanzuri. 
Exodus38:13 Zakã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd yaangã, wĩntoog sẽn pukdẽ wã yalem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu." 
Exodus38:14 Zakã rignoor kɩreng a yembr pɛɛlã yalem zemsa kãntɩɩg piig la a nu ne b ra-lugds a tãabã, la b nao a tãabã." 
Exodus38:15 Zakã noor kɩreng a to wã me pɛɛlã yalem zemsa kãntɩɩg piig la a nu ne b ra-lugds a tãabã, la b nao a tãabã." 
Exodus38:16 Pɛɛl nins fãa sẽn gilg zakã wʋga ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. 
Exodus38:17 Ra-lugds nins sẽn gũbg zakã soga taab ne wanzuri bãense. B bola bãmb pugli wã ne wanzuri, la b naoã maana ne zũudu." 
Exodus38:18 Zakã noor fu-lillidgã wʋga ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miid ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg tʋʋm-mitba sẽn maandã. A yalem zemsa kãntɩɩg pisi, la a zãntlem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, wa zakã peendã yalem sẽn yaa bũmb ningã." 
Exodus38:19 Zakã noor da-lugdsã yaa a naas ne b zũud nao a naase. Bãmb yagendsã maana ne wanzuri. B bãensã rag n yaa wanzuri, la b rag n bolga b pugli wã ne wanzuri." 
Exodus38:20 B rag n maana sɛk roogã biili wã fãa, ne zakã sẽn gilg yẽnda wã biili fãa ne zũudu." 
Exodus38:21 Ad sɛk roogã sẽn yaa kaset roogã meeb gɛɛla. Gɛɛlã zemsa wa a Moyiis sẽn kõ Leevi nebã noor tɩ b maanã. Maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Itamaar n soog a yellã. 
Exodus38:22 A Ʋʋr biig a Uuri biig a Betsaleyɛll sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã nedã maana bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus38:23 La a Ayisamak biig a Oholiyaab sẽn yaa Dan buudã nedã sõnga yẽnda. A Oholiyaab yaa kug-pɛɛsa, la sʋn-wʋgd sẽn kãt pɛɛl tɩ yɩ gʋlma, ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaama, ne gĩs-miidu, la lamd gĩs-bãanega." 
Exodus38:24 Sãnem nins fãa nebã sẽn kõ tɩ b rɩk n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋmdã zɩslem yaa kɩlo tusr la kobs-naas la pis-tã la a yoob la garem kobsi la pis-nu, sẽn zems ne sɛk roogã sẽn tar zɩslem makdg ning n makd sãnem zɩslmã." 
Exodus38:25 La neb nins b sẽn sõdã yaoo wanzuri kɩlo tus a naase la kobs-wɛ, wa sẽn zems ne sɛk roogã sẽn tar zɩslem makdg ning n makd wanzuri zɩslmã." 
Exodus38:26 Yõwã yaa sɛk roogã sɩkɛll pʋɩ-sʋka sẽn dat n togs tɩ wanzuri zɩslem garem a nii la bɛka, ned kam fãa b sẽn sõdã sẽn yao. Yaa raop nins fãa sẽn ta yʋʋm pisi, wall sẽn yɩɩd woto. Bãmb sõorã taa neb tus kobs-yoob la a tãabo, la kobs-nu la pis-nu." 
Exodus38:27 B rõoga wanzuri zɩslem talã koabga, sɛk roogã naoã la fu-lillidgã ra-lugdsã naoã yĩnga. Bãmb yaa wanzuri nao koabga. Naoor a yembr fãa zɩslem zemsa talã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ kɩlo pis-naas la a wɛ." 
Exodus38:28 La yẽnda rɩka wanzuri zɩslem sẽn zems kɩlo pisi la a wɛ la garem pis-nu la a yoob n maan da-lugdsã yagendse, la yẽnda luda ra-gilsã pugli wã ne wanzuri la a maan a bãensã." 
Exodus38:29 Nebã sẽn kõ zũudã wa sẽn zems miningã, zɩslem zemsa kɩlo tus a tãab la kobs-naas la pis-yoob la a wɛ, la garem kobsi la pis-nii la a nii." 
Exodus38:30 La yẽnda rɩka zũudã n maan sɛk roogã noor fu-lillidgã da-lugdsã naoã la zũudã tẽn-kugrã ne a zũud gãmbre, la tẽn-kugrã teed fãa." 
Exodus38:31 La ra-lugds nins sẽn gũbg zakã naoã ne ra-lugds nins sẽn be zakã noorã naoã, la sɛk roogã biili, la zakã biili fãa maana ne zũudu." 
Exodus39:1 B wʋga fut nins maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn na n yeelg n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋmdã ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu la lamd gĩs-bãanega. B maana a Aarõ fu-sõama wã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus39:2 B maana maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã ne sãnem gĩsi, la gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, la gĩs-miid ne lamd gĩs-bãanega." 
Exodus39:3 B kuda sãnem tɩ lebg faasga, n bẽes tɩ lebg wa gĩsi. La b kalma sãnemã ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miid la lamd gĩs-bãanega, n wʋge, n kãd t'a yaa wa tʋʋm-mit sẽn tʋme." 
Exodus39:4 B maana bãg-tabds a yiib n tong maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã poorẽ la a taoore. 
Exodus39:5 B rag n naaga sẽbdg ning sẽn tar n sẽbgdẽ wã ne maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã n sẽ, la a tara sãnem gĩsi, la gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo ne gĩs-moaama, ne gĩs-miid ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus39:6 B maana onigs kug n ning sãnem gãtsã pʋse. La Israyɛll kambã yʋy gʋlsa kugã zut wa tʋʋm-mit sẽn dɩk kɩtga, n bẽes kug n maan bãnde." 
Exodus39:7 La b ninga kugã maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã bãg-tabdẽ wã. Yaa kug sẽn na n tẽegd Israyɛll nebã yell wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus39:8 B maana yãoog lutg n bok ne sãnem gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu, la lamd gĩs-bãaneg t'a yaa wa tʋʋm-mitbã tʋʋma wa maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã." 
Exodus39:9 B maana yãoog lutgã ne pɛɛl a yiib sẽn pʋgl taaba, tɩ yɩ maoko. A woglmã zemsa nug-yakemd a yembre, la a yalmã me zemsa nug-yakemd a yembre." 
Exodus39:10 B rɩka kug nins b sẽn ning gãtsã pʋsã n ning yãoog lutga zug ruls a naase. Dẽenem rulgã tara sardoan ne topaaze, la emerood kuga." 
Exodus39:11 Rulg a yiib soabã maana ne ɛskarbukl la safɩɩr ne diyama kuga. 
Exodus39:12 Rulg a tãab soaba tara opall ne agat la ametist kuga. 
Exodus39:13 La rulg a naas soaba tara kirzolite ne onigs la zaspe kuga. B ninga kugã sãnem gãtsã pʋsẽ. 
Exodus39:14 Kugã yʋy ne b sõor zemsa ne Israyɛll kom-dibli piig la a yiibã yʋyã. B gʋlsa bãmb zut ne kɩtg tɩ b yɩ wa bãnde. Kugr fãa tara a yembre. 
Exodus39:15 B kala wĩir ne sãnem yãoog lutga yĩnga. 
Exodus39:16 Bãmb maana sãnem gãts a yiibu, la sãnem nugbĩns a yiib sẽn yaa gilsi, la b ning sãnem nugbĩn-gils a yiibã yãoog lutgã kɩremsã gõdgr zĩis a yiibẽ wã." 
Exodus39:17 B tonga sãnem wĩy a yiibã ne nugbĩns nins sẽn be yãoog lutgã kɩremsã gõdgr zĩisẽ wã. 
Exodus39:18 La bãmb tonga sãnem wĩy a yiibã noy ne gãts a yiibã n ning maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã bãgd taoore. 
Exodus39:19 La b maana sãnem nugbĩns a yiib n ning yãoog lutgã kɩrems a naasã gõdgr zĩisẽ, la b ning nugbĩnsã pʋgẽ." 
Exodus39:20 La b maana sãnem nugbĩns a yiib n ning maan-kʋʋd kãsem fuugã bãgd tẽngre zĩig ning sẽbdgã sẽn tong ne fuugã. 
Exodus39:21 B baoo wĩ-kẽeg n loe yãoog lutgã nugbĩnsã ne maan-kʋʋr fuugã nugbĩnsã, tɩ yãoog lutgã tõog n tabl maan-kʋʋr fuugã n da lak ye, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus39:22 Yẽnda wʋga maan-kʋʋr fuugã fu-wokã fãa ne gĩs-kẽega. 
Exodus39:23 B kɩbga fuugã loor peendã tẽn-sʋka, n bal-a ne peend sẽn yaa taok t'a yɩ wa zabr fuug loore, t'a ra wa kẽeg ye." 
Exodus39:24 B maana gernaad-dãmb ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miidu la lamd gĩs-bãaneg n ning fuugã noore. 
Exodus39:25 B maana bugla me ne sãnem halaal n ning gernaad-dãmbã sʋk n gilg fuugã noore. 
Exodus39:26 Bugla ne gernaadã lɩʋʋsa taab n gilg fu-yor-bila noore. Fu-kãng yaa maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem tʋʋmd yĩng wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus39:27 B maana fu-yord me sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã yĩnga. 
Exodus39:28 La b maana zug peend ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la pugli sẽn yaa sõama ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la b maana põg-rãmb me ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã." 
Exodus39:29 La b maana sẽbds n kãd-b ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo la gĩs-moaam ne gĩs-miid sẽn tar tʋʋm-mitbã nug tʋʋmd wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a maanã. 
Exodus39:30 B maana rĩ-tɛɛgã sẽn yaa sõama sẽn wilgd yẽnda welgrã ne sãnem, la b gʋlsa a zug ne kɩtg tɩ yɩ wa bãnde. A gʋlsmã yaa: Welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Exodus39:31 La b loee yẽnda ne loɛtg sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo t'a zĩnd zug peendã zugu, a wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus39:32 Yaa woto la b maan fu-roogã sẽn yaa sɛk roogã tʋʋmã n sɛ. Israyɛll nebã maana bũmb fãa tɩ zems wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. Bãmb maana woto bala. 
Exodus39:33 Nebã talla sɛk zĩiga teed fãa n wa a Moyiis nengẽ. Yaa fu-roogã ne a teedã fãa, a sogds ne a ra-pegdã, la a ra-bɩlmã ne a ra-lugdsã ne b naoã," 
Exodus39:34 la lutg ning sẽn maan ne pe-raad gãnd sẽn monemã, la lutg ning sẽn maan ne dofẽ-rãmb gãndã, la fu-lillidgã," 
Exodus39:35 la kaset koglgã ne a ra-bɩlem la a limdã sẽn yaa bas-taal zĩigã," 
Exodus39:36 la taablã ne a teedã fãa la kaset burã," 
Exodus39:37 la fɩtl doagendgã b sẽn maan ne sãnem halaalã ne b fɩtl-dãmbã sẽn be b zĩisẽ wã, la b teedã fãa ne b kaamã fãa, la kaam sẽn na n ning fɩtl-dãmbã," 
Exodus39:38 la sãnem tẽn-kugrã ne kaam sẽn pʋdgd maan-kʋʋdbã zut b sẽn welg bãmb b tʋʋmdã yĩng wakatã, la tɩdar zom sẽn na n yõog wisdu, la fu-lillidg sẽn na n ning fu-roogã noore," 
Exodus39:39 la zũud tẽn-kugrã ne a gãmbrã sẽn yaa zũudã, la a ra-bɩlmã ne a teedã fãa, la pekr sĩngã ne a naoorã," 
Exodus39:40 la zakã pɛɛlã ne a ra-lugdsã, la a ra-lugdsã naoã, ne zakã noor fu-lillidgã ne a wĩyã, la a biili wã, la a teedã fãa sɛk roogã tʋʋmd yĩnga," 
Exodus39:41 la maan-kʋʋdbã tʋʋmd fut b sẽn na n yeelg n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋmde. Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ fu-sõama wã ne a kom-dibli wã fut b sẽn yeelgd n maand maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã. 
Exodus39:42 Israyɛll nebã maana tʋʋmdã fãa tɩ zems wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiisã kɛpɩ. 
Exodus39:43 A Moyiis gesa tʋʋmdã fãa n mik tɩ bãmb maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel bãmb tɩ b maanã. La a Moyiis ninga bãmb zut barka. 
Exodus40:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Exodus40:2 «Pipi kiuugã pipi daare, bɩ f tilg fu-roogã sẽn yaa sɛk roogã." 
Exodus40:3 La f rɩgl kaset koglgã be n yagl fu-lillidgã n lill koglgã. 
Exodus40:4 La f wa ne taablã n wa ning teedã a zug b zĩisẽ. La f wa ne fɩtl doagendgã n dogl fɩtl-dãmbã a zugu. 
Exodus40:5 Rɩgl sãnem tẽn-kugrã sẽn na n tar n yõogd wisdã kaset koglgã taoore, la f yagl fu-lillidgã sɛk roogã noore." 
Exodus40:6 Rɩgl tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõogd maand bugum a zugã fu-roogã sẽn yaa sɛk roogã noor yɩnga. 
Exodus40:7 La f rɩgl sĩngã sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã sʋka, n ning koom a pʋgẽ." 
Exodus40:8 Maan zak n gilg sɛk roogã n yagl fu-lillidgã zakã noore. 
Exodus40:9 Yãk kaam ning sẽn pʋdgd maan-kʋʋdbã zutã n ning sɛk roogã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã zut n welg roogã ne a teedã fãa tɩ b yɩ sõama. 
Exodus40:10 La f yãk kaamã n ning tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn yõogd maand a zugã zugu, ne a teedã fãa. Welg tẽn-kugrã toore, t'a yɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa." 
Exodus40:11 La f ning kaam sĩngã me ne a naoorã me zug n welg-ba. 
Exodus40:12 Kɩt t'a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã me kolg sɛk roogã noor tɩ f so-b koom. 
Exodus40:13 La f sã n so bãmb koomã n sɛ, bɩ f yeelg a Aarõ a fut sẽn welg toorã, n pʋdg a zug kaam, n welg-a toor t'a maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd mam taoore." 
Exodus40:14 La f kɩt tɩ yẽnda kom-dibli wã kolg tɩ f yeelg bãmb b futu. 
Exodus40:15 La f pʋdg kaam bãmb zut wa fo sẽn dag n pʋdg bãmb ba wã zugã tɩ bãmb me yɩ maan-kʋʋdb mam taoore. La kaam ning sẽn pʋdg bãmb zutã na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb yagensã yɩ maan-kʋʋdb bãmb zamaanã fãa tɛka.» 
Exodus40:16 A Moyiis maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã kɛpɩ. A maana a woto. 
Exodus40:17 Yʋʋm a yiibẽ soabã pipi kiuugã pipi daarã, b tilga sɛk roogã." 
Exodus40:18 A Moyiis tilga sɛk roogã. A vigla a naoã, n tilg a ra-pegdã, la a ning a ra-bɩlmã b zĩisẽ, la a lugl a ra-lugdsã." 
Exodus40:19 B yɛdga fu-roogã sɛk roogã zugu, n yɛdg fu-roogã zugẽ lutgã n lud-a, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus40:20 B rɩka kaset kug-walsã n ning kaset koglgã pʋgẽ, la yẽnda rɩka ra-bɩlmã n tui koglgã, la a fõgen koglgã a limdã sẽn yaa bas-taal zĩigã." 
Exodus40:21 Dẽ, b talla koglgã n tɩ rɩgl sɛk roogã pʋga. La b yagl fu-lillidgã n lill kaset koglgã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus40:22 B rɩgla taablã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ nug rɩtgo n kolg fu-lillidgã. 
Exodus40:23 La b rogla burã b zĩisẽ taablã zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus40:24 B rɩgla fɩtl doagendgã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ nug goabga t'a tees taablã. 
Exodus40:25 B rogla fɩtl-dãmbã b zĩisẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus40:26 B rɩgla sãnem tẽn-kugrã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ n kolg fu-lillidgã. 
Exodus40:27 B yõoga wisd sẽn tar yũ-noog a zug wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus40:28 B yagla fu-lillidgã sɛk roogã noore. 
Exodus40:29 B rɩgla tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn na n yõog maoong a zugã fu-roogã sẽn yaa sɛk roogã noorã yɩnga. La b yõoga maandã ne kũunã bugum a zug wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Exodus40:30 B rɩgla pekr sĩngã sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã sʋka, n ning koom a pʋgẽ pekr yĩnga." 
Exodus40:31 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ la a Aarõ kom-dibli wã yãka koomã n nudg nusi, la b waas b nao." 
Exodus40:32 Bãmb sã n dat n kẽ sɛk roogẽ wã, wall b sã n dat n kolg tẽn-kugrã, b nudgda b nusi, la b waas b nao wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Exodus40:33 Yẽnda maana zak n gũbg sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã, la yẽnda yagla fu-lillidg zakã noore. Yaa woto la a Moyiis maan tʋʋmdã fãa n sɛ." 
Exodus40:34 A Moyiis sẽn maan woto n sɛ, sawaodg waa n luda sɛk roogã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã pida sɛk zĩigã." 
Exodus40:35 A Moyiis rag n ka tõe n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, sawaodgã be a zugu, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziir pida sɛk zĩigã." 
Exodus40:36 Sawaod-taokã sã n wa n zẽk n bas sɛk roogã, Israyɛll nebã me yikdame n sɩng kẽnde, wa sẽn zems b yalsg fãa zĩiga." 
Exodus40:37 La sawaodgã sã n ka zẽke, bãmb ka yikd ye, bãmb paada beenẽ hal tɩ ta daar ning sawaodgã sẽn na n zẽkã." 
Exodus40:38 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sawaodgã paada sɛk roogã zug wĩntoog ne yʋngo. La yʋngo, sawaodgã tara bugum tɩ Israyɛll buudã fãa neẽ, hal n tãag b yalsgã zĩis fãa." 
Leviticus1:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda sɛk roogã pʋg n bool a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus1:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb sʋkã ned sã n dat n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kũuni, bɩ a bao rũm-bedre, wall rũm-bila, n tall n wa kõ bãmba.› »" 
Leviticus1:3 Yẽnda sã n dat n kõ naaf tɩ b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, a tog n kõo loalg sẽn ka tar zanga. A tog n tall-a lame n kolg sɛk-zĩigã noore, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab reege." 
Leviticus1:4 La bɩ a rɩk a nug n palg rũngã zugu. Yaa rũng ning b sẽn na n tall n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab reeg la b kõ-a sugrã. 
Leviticus1:5 Yẽnda na n kodga naafã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã na n dɩka maoongã zɩɩm n mes n gilg tẽn-kugrã sẽn be sɛk roogã noorã." 
Leviticus1:6 La bɩ yẽnda sɩɩg maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũngã, n bees-a." 
Leviticus1:7 Bɩ maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ kom-dibli wã yõgen bugum tẽn-kugrã zug n ning raad bugmẽ wã. 
Leviticus1:8 Bɩ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã rɩk nemdã sẽn beesã ne zugã, la ne kaamã n dogl raadã b sẽn yõgen bugum tẽn-kugrã zugã." 
Leviticus1:9 La bɩ yẽnda pegs a pʋ-teedã ne a naoã ne koom, n kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋdã yõog a fãa bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽnda na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, yaa kũun b sẽn yõog bugum, t'a yũugã yɩ noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus1:10 B sã n dat n kõ rũm-bila, sã n yaa peosg wall bulla, tɩ b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, bɩ a kõ rũm-daoog sẽn zems zãng n ka tar zang ye." 
Leviticus1:11 Bɩ a kɩt tɩ b kodg rũngã tẽn-kugrã rɩtg kɩrengã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La bɩ a Aarõ kambã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã rɩk zɩɩmã n mes n gilg tẽn-kugrã. 
Leviticus1:12 Bɩ a bees rũngã n welg a zugã ne a kaamã toore, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk rẽnda fãa n dogl raadã b sẽn yõgen bugum tẽn-kugrã zugã." 
Leviticus1:13 La bɩ a pegs rũngã pʋ-teedã ne a naoã ne koom, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk fãa n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, t'a yũugã yɩ noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus1:14 La sã n mikame tɩ yẽnda kũunã yaa bõn-pɩgs la a rat n dɩk n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ a bao wala, wall manwal-poal a yiibu." 
Leviticus1:15 La maan-kʋʋdã na n deeg-a lame n maan maoong tẽn-kugrã zugu. Maan-kʋʋdã na n kolga tẽn-kugrã n gãd a zugã n wẽnemd n fiuugi, n dɩk zugã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, la a rɩk a zɩɩmã n mes tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã zutu." 
Leviticus1:16 Bɩ yẽnda yãk a yoosengã ne a kõbdã n lob tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga, kɩreng ning sẽn teesd yaangã, zĩig ning b sẽn dʋʋgd tompeglmã." 
Leviticus1:17 Bɩ a gãd a pɩgsã, n pãrg-a, la a ra fãsg-a ye. La maan-kʋʋdã na n deeg-a lame n dogl raadã b sẽn yõgen bugum tẽn-kugrã zugã zugu. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, n yaa kũun b sẽn yõog bugum, t'a yũug yɩ noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus2:1 Ned sã n dat n kõ zom kũuni, tɩ yɩ maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, a tog n waa ne zom-bãanega. La a tog n walga zomã kaam, la a ning-a tɩdare." 
Leviticus2:2 Yẽnda tog n talla a kũunã n kẽng a Aarõ kambã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã nengẽ. La bɩ a yõng zom-bãanegã sẽn ning kaamã ne tɩdarã ne nugu, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-a n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, t'a yɩ tẽegr yĩnga. Rẽndã yaa kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yɩ noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus2:3 Bõn-koaadl kũunã zom ning sẽn kellã na n lebga a Aarõ ne a kambã n so. Rẽ yaa bũmb sẽn welg toore, b sẽn yãk kũun ning sẽn yõogd bugum n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋgẽ wã." 
Leviticus2:4 Fo sã n dat n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kũun ne bũmb sẽn wʋm wʋngẽ, bɩ f rɩk zom-bãanegã sẽn nag ne kaamã, n maan boaal-boaal sẽn ka rã-bɩlle, ne bur-maas sẽn ka rã-bɩlle, n tar kaam." 
Leviticus2:5 Fo kũunã sã n yaa bõn-koaadl kũun b sẽn kɩɩm dʋk pʋgẽ, bɩ f maan-a ne zom-bãaneg b sẽn nage, n ka tar rã-bɩll ye." 
Leviticus2:6 Bɩ f wes-a bãooneg-bãoonego, n ning kaam tɩ yɩ zom kũuni." 
Leviticus2:7 Fo sã n dat n kõ bõn-koaadl kũun sẽn kɩɩm dʋk pʋgẽ, bɩ f maan-a ne zom-bãaneg sẽn nag ne kaam." 
Leviticus2:8 La fo sã n tall zomã n maan woto n sɛ n na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ f rɩk-a n wa kõ maan-kʋʋdã t'a ning-a tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga." 
Leviticus2:9 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yãk zom-nagdgã sẽn na n yɩ tẽegrã rẽndã, n ning tẽn-kugrã zug n yõog bugum. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ kũun sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yɩ noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus2:10 La bõn-koaadl kũunã zom sẽn kellã na n yɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rẽnda. Rẽndã yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor n yaa sõama zãnga, kũun sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã sʋka." 
Leviticus2:11 Bõn-koaadl kũun ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ka tog n ning rã-bɩll ye. Bala, yãmb ka tog n dɩk bũmb sẽn ning rã-bɩlle, wall sẽn ning sɩɩdo, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor ye." 
Leviticus2:12 Yãmb tõe n yãka rã-bɩll ne sɩɩd dẽenem biis n kõ, la b ka tõe n dɩk-a n dogl tẽn-kugrã zugu n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum sẽn tar yũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng ye." 
Leviticus2:13 Fo sã n dat n kõ bõn-koaadl kũun buudã fãa tɩ yɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, bɩ f ning-a yamsem. Da kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zom kũun n ka ning-a yamsem ye. Bala, yamsmã mamsda kaool ning sẽn be foom ne f Wẽnnaamã sʋkã. Fo sã n na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum fãa n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ f ning yamsem." 
Leviticus2:14 Fo sã n yãk dẽenem biis n na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yɩ bõn-koaadl kũuni, bɩ f yãk ka-paal n sẽ bugmẽ n sãre, ne bɩle paalg sẽn to tɩ lebg zom n dɩk tɩ yɩ fo dẽenem biisã bõn-koaadl kũuni." 
Leviticus2:15 Bɩ f walg kaam kũunã zugu, la f ning-a tɩdare. Rẽndã yaa zom kũuni." 
Leviticus2:16 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yãk ka-sãrdɩ wã b sẽn to wã sẽn ning kaamã ne tɩdarã n yõog bugum tɩ yɩ tẽegre. Rẽndã yaa kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. 
Leviticus3:1 Ned kũun sã n yaa zems-n-taar maoongo, t'a wa ne rũm-bedre, a tog n talla rũm-yãang bɩ raoog n wa, la tog n yɩɩ rũng sẽn ka tar zang la a talld n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus3:2 Bɩ a tik a nug rũng ning b sẽn na n kʋ wã zugu, la a kodg-a sɛk-zĩigã noore. La bɩ a Aarõ kambã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã rɩk zɩɩmã n mes n gilg tẽn-kugrã." 
Leviticus3:3 Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan zems-n-taar maoongã sẽn yõogd bugmã to-to n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yaa yãadã kaamã, ne kaamã sẽn be pʋ-teedã zutã fãa." 
Leviticus3:4 La yiim-biis a yiibã ne kaam ning sẽn be b zutã, la ne kaamã sẽn be gɛyã sʋkã, ne sãoorã kaamã yẽnda sẽn na n yiis ne yiim a yiibã." 
Leviticus3:5 Bɩ a Aarõ kambã rɩk bõn-kãng n paas maoongã sẽn be bugmã raad zutã, n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽnda na n yɩɩ kũun b sẽn yõgd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus3:6 Ned sã n dat n tall rũm-bil n wa kõ, bɩ a yãk rũng sẽn yaa raoogo, wall yãang sẽn ka tar zanga, n wa maan zems-n-taar maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus3:7 Ned sã n wa ne pe-bil n na n maan maoongo, bɩ a tall-a n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus3:8 Bɩ a rɩk a nug n tik rũngã zugu, la a kodg-a sɛk roogã noore. La bɩ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã rɩk zɩɩmã n mes n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã fãa." 
Leviticus3:9 Yẽnda sã n na n maan zems-n-taar maoongã, tɩ yɩ kũun sẽn yõogd bugum, ad yẽnda sẽn na n yãk wils nins n yõog bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã: Yaa kaamã ne zʋʋrã tõre, n tall n tɩ tãag zʋ-kɛɛgã, la rũngã yãadã kaam ne a pʋ-teedã kaam zãnga." 
Leviticus3:10 Yaa yiim a yiibã ne kaamã sẽn be b zutã, ne kaam ning sẽn be gɛyã sʋkã. La kaamã sẽn gãneg sãoorã zugã, ne kaam ning yẽnda sẽn na n yãk yiimã zutã." 
Leviticus3:11 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yõog bõn-kãens fãa bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽndã yaa rɩɩb b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. 
Leviticus3:12 A soabã kũunã sã n yaa bʋʋga, bɩ a tall-a n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore."
