Leviticus3:13 La bɩ a rɩk a nug n tik rũng ning b sẽn na n kʋ wã zugu, la a kodg-a sɛk roogã noore. La bɩ a Aarõ kambã reeg zɩɩmã n mes n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã fãa." 
Leviticus3:14 Ad yẽnda sẽn na n yãk maoongã bũmb ning tɩ yɩ kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga: Yaa kaamã sẽn be yãadã zugã ne pʋ-teedã zutã fãa. 
Leviticus3:15 La sẽn paas yaa yiim a yiibã ne kaam ning sẽn be b zutã, la kaam ning sẽn be rũngã gɛyã sʋkã, la kaamã sẽn gãneg sãoorã n be sãoorã ne yiimã sʋkã." 
Leviticus3:16 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã na n yõoga bõn-kãens fãa bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, tɩ yɩ rɩɩb kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noogo. Kaamã zãng fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so." 
Leviticus3:17 Woto yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga, la yãmb sẽn na n zĩnd zĩig ning fãa, bɩ y ra rɩ rũng kaam, la y ra rɩ zɩɩm ye." 
Leviticus4:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeel-a yaa: 
Leviticus4:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b woto: Ned sã n maan kongr ne yĩdgu, n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõ-bãmbã sẽn gɩdgã n maan tʋʋmd sẽn ka zemse, ad a sẽn tog maane:" 
Leviticus4:3 Sã n mikame tɩ yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã b sẽn pʋdg a zug kaamã n beege, n kɩt tɩ nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã, yẽnda tog n waa ne loalg sẽn ka tar zanga, tɩ b maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yẽnda tõe n paam a kongrã sugri." 
Leviticus4:4 Yẽnda tog n talla loalgã n wa sɛk roogã noore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La a rɩk a nug n palg loalgã zugu, n kodg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus4:5 Maan-kʋʋr kãsma b sẽn pʋdg kaamã a zugã, na n dɩka loalgã zɩɩmã n tall n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋga." 
Leviticus4:6 Yẽnda na n dɩka a nug-bil n tẽk zɩɩmã pʋga, n mes-a naoor a yopoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n tees fu-lillidgã sẽn be zĩ-sõngẽ wã sẽnẽ." 
Leviticus4:7 Maan-kʋʋr kãsma na n dɩka zɩɩmã n ning tẽn-kugr ninga zug b sẽn yõogd wisd sẽn tar yũ-noogã, sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã, n be sɛk roogã pʋgã. La a tog n dɩka loalgã zɩɩmã sẽn kellã zãng n kiig tẽn-kugr ning b sẽn yõogd maand a zugã sɛɛgẽ, sẽn dabd sɛk roogã noorã sẽnẽ." 
Leviticus4:8 Yẽnda tog n yãka loalgã kaamã b sẽn yãk n na n kõ kongrã sugr kosg yĩngã, yaa yãadã ne pʋ-teedã kaamã," 
Leviticus4:9 n leb n paas ne yiim a yiibã ne kaam ning sẽn gãneg b zutã, la kaamã sẽn be gɛyã sʋkã, ne kaam ning yẽnda sẽn na n yãk sãoorã ne yiimã zutã." 
Leviticus4:10 Yẽnda sã n yãk loalgã b sẽn maan zems-n-taar maoogã kaam, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg n yõog bugum maoong tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Leviticus4:11 La sã n yaa ne loalgã gãongã, ne a nemdã fãa, ne a zugã la a karsã, la a pʋ-teedã ne a bĩndã," 
Leviticus4:12 ne rũngã sẽn ketã fãa, a yita ne bõn-kãng sik zĩigẽ wã n kẽng zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã, b sẽn lobd tompeglmã n tɩ ning-a raad zut n yõog-a bugum. Bɩ b yõog-a zĩig ning b sẽn lobd kaamã tompeglmã zugu." 
Leviticus4:13 Israyɛll nebã zãng sã n tudgi, n maan yell sẽn kɩɩsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã tõog a yembr ne yĩudg n ka bãnge, n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo," 
Leviticus4:14 tɩ bãmb kongrã wa n puki, bɩ nebã zãng bao loalg sẽn na n maan maoong b kongrã yĩng n tall n wa. La bɩ b tall-a n wa sɛk roogã noore." 
Leviticus4:15 Bɩ Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmb kolg n dɩk b nus n palg loalgã zugã zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la bɩ b kodg loalgã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus4:16 La bɩ maan-kʋʋd ning b sẽn pʋdg kaam a zugã tall loalgã zɩɩm n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋga. 
Leviticus4:17 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã tẽk a nug-bil zɩɩmã pʋga, n mes-a naoor a yopoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n tees fu-lillidgã." 
Leviticus4:18 La a yãk zɩɩmã n ning tẽn-kugrã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor sɛk roogã pʋgã yɩɩlã zutu. La bɩ a rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn kellã n kiig maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã sẽn be sɛk roogã noorã kɩrenga. 
Leviticus4:19 La a tog n yãka loalgã kaamã zãng n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. 
Leviticus4:20 Bɩ yẽnda maan lol-kãng wa b sẽn maand kongr loalgã to-to wã. Yaa woto la maan-kʋʋdã na n maane, tɩ b paam yel-manegre, la b na n kõ-b-la b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Leviticus4:21 Yẽnda na n talla loalgã n yi n bas sik zĩigã n kẽng kɛɛng n tɩ yõog-a bugum wa yẽnda sẽn dag n yõog pipi loalgã to-to wã. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ nebã fãa kongr maoongo. 
Leviticus4:22 Taoor soab sã n tudg n maan yel-wẽnd ne yĩdgu, n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã tõodã tõog a yembre, tɩ lebg kongr ne yẽnda," 
Leviticus4:23 yẽnda sã n wa n bãng t'a beegame, bɩ a wa ne kũun sẽn yaa boɛɛg sẽn ka tar zang tɩ b maan maoongo." 
Leviticus4:24 Bɩ taoor soabã rɩk a nug n palg boɛɛgã zugu, la a kodg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, zĩig ning b sẽn kodgd maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũngã. Woto n yaa kongr maoongo." 
Leviticus4:25 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã tẽk rũng ning b sẽn kõ tɩ yɩ kongrã maoongã zɩɩm ne a nug-bila, n tẽgs maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã yɩɩla, la a rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn kellã n kiig tẽn-kugr ninga b sẽn yõogd maoong bugmã sɛɛga." 
Leviticus4:26 Bɩ a rɩk kaamã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, wa b sẽn minim n maand zems-n-taar maoongã to-to wã. Yaa woto la maan-kʋʋdã tog n maan taoor soabã yĩnga, a kongrã yiisg yĩnga." 
Leviticus4:27 La Israyɛll nebã ned a yembr sã n maan bũmb ne yĩdgu, tɩ kɩɩsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã tõog a yembre, a lebga bɛɛgda." 
Leviticus4:28 La yẽnda sã n bãng t'a beegame, bɩ a tall bʋ-yãang n wa tɩ yɩ kũuni, a kongrã yĩnga. La tog n yɩɩ bʋʋg sẽn ka tar zanga." 
Leviticus4:29 Bɩ a palg a nugã kongr bʋʋgã zugu, la a kodg-a zĩig ning b sẽn kodgd maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũngã." 
Leviticus4:30 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã tẽk rũng ning b sẽn maan maoongã zɩɩm ne a nug-bila, n tẽgs maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã yɩɩla, la a rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn kellã zãng n kiig maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã tẽn-kugr sɛɛga." 
Leviticus4:31 La bɩ a yãk rũngã kaam, wa b sẽn yãkd zems-n-taar maoongã rũng kaam to-to wã, n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. La bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ yũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Yaa woto la maan-kʋʋdã na maan nin-kãng kongrã yĩnga, la a na n paama a kongrã sugri." 
Leviticus4:32 La sã n mikame tɩ bɛɛgdã waa ne peosg n na n maan maoong n kos a kongrã sugri, bɩ a wa ne pe-yãang sẽn ka tar zanga." 
Leviticus4:33 Bɩ a rɩk a nug n palg rũngã b sẽn kõ yel-wẽnã maoong yĩngã zugu, la bɩ a kodg-a zĩig ning b sẽn maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã noore." 
Leviticus4:34 Bɩ Maan-kʋʋdã tẽk rũngã zɩɩmã ne a nug-bila, n ning maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã tẽn-kugr yɩɩlã zutu, la a rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn kellã n daag tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga." 
Leviticus4:35 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yãk kaamã zãng wa b sẽn yãkd zems-n-taar maoongã peosg kaamã to-to wã, n dɩk-a n dogl maoongã nemd zug tẽn-kugrã zugu, n yõog bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Yaa woto la maan-kʋʋdã na n maan n yiis ned ning sẽn kongã kongrã a sẽn dag n maana, la a na paama a kongrã sugri.»" 
Leviticus5:1 Ned tʋbr sã n wʋm yelle, wall a nif sã n yãnd tɩ ned n maan yelle, la yẽnda sã n wʋm tɩ b kotame tɩ b wa kɩs yellã kaseto, t'a ka kẽng n tɩ kɩs kasetã, yẽnda maana yel-wẽnde." 
Leviticus5:2 Sã n mikame tɩ ned n sɩɩs bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgdo, rat n yeel tɩ rũm-rẽgd sẽn yaa kɩɩnga, sã n yaa we-rũnga, wall yir dũnga, baa sã n yaa ne yĩdgu, a soabã lebga rẽgdo, la a ninga yell a meng zugu." 
Leviticus5:3 Ned sã n sɩɩs ninsaal sẽn yaa rẽgdo, n dẽgem a meng n ka bãnge, n yaool n wa bãng tɩ yẽnda sɩɩsa kũum, a ninga yell a meng zugu." 
Leviticus5:4 Ned sã n gom kʋʋsem goam n ka gũus a menga, n wẽen n yeel tɩ yẽnda na n maana wẽnga, bɩ a na n maana sẽn yaa sõama, n yaool n wa bãng yẽnda sẽn maanã, gom-kãens yell na n zĩnda yẽnda zugu." 
Leviticus5:5 Dẽ wã, ned sã n kong ne yɛl nins b sẽn wilgã yell a yembre, a tog n kosa a kongrã sugri," 
Leviticus5:6 la yẽnda tog n talla rũm-sãd-bãooneg n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yaa pe-sãdga, bɩ bʋ-sãdg la a wat ne tɩ b maan maoong a kongrã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Leviticus5:7 Yẽnda sã n ka tar pãn-tõog n tõe n da rũngã, bɩ a tall wal a yiibu, wall manwan-bi a yiib n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n wa maan maoong a kongrã yĩnga. A yembr n tog n yɩ yẽnda kongrã sugr kũun yĩnga, la a to wã yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum." 
Leviticus5:8 Yẽnda tog n talla bãmb n kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ, t'a reng n dɩk kongrã sugr kũun dẽndã n kodg-a ne nug-yẽega, la a ka tog n fiuug a zugã ye." 
Leviticus5:9 Maan-kʋʋdã tog n yãka kongr maoongã zɩɩm n mes tẽn-kugrã kɩrenga, la a rɩk zɩɩm ning sẽn kellã n daag tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga. Woto yaa kongr sugr kosg maoongo." 
Leviticus5:10 Dẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdã tog n dɩka sẽn ket-a wã, n maan wa sẽn zems miningã, la a rɩk-a n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, a soabã kongrã yĩnga, la a na n paama a kongrã sugri." 
Leviticus5:11 Ned ning sẽn beegã sã n ka tar pãn-tõog n na n da wal a yiibã, bɩ man-wal a yiibã, bɩ a wa ne zom-bãaneg sẽn zems wamd a yembre, tɩ yɩ kũun a kongrã yĩnga. La a ka tog n ning zomã kaam bɩ tɩdar ye. Bala, yaa kongr maoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus5:12 Yẽnda tog n talla zomã n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdã, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã yõng zomã n pid a nugu, tẽegr yĩnga, la a rɩk-a n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. A tog n naag-a-la ne maand a taabã b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã. Rẽndã yaa kongr maoongo." 
Leviticus5:13 Yaa woto la maan-kʋʋdã tog n maan tɩ yɩ sugr kosg yẽnda kongrã yĩnga, t'a paam sugri. La zom ning sẽn kellã na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdã rẽnda, bala yaa bõn-koaadl kũuni." 
Leviticus5:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus5:15 «Ned sã n beege, baa beegrã sã n yaa yĩdgu, a sã n yãk bũmb ning sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, ad bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn tog n tall n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor a beegrã yĩnga: Yaa pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zang a sẽn yãk a rũm-bãoonegã sʋka, la pe-raoog ning sẽn na n yɩ maoong beegrã yĩngã ligd tog n zemsa ne yaood ning b sẽn zĩnig sɛk roogã pʋgẽ wã." 
Leviticus5:16 La yẽnda tog n yaoo bũmb ning sẽn welg toor Zu-soabã yĩng tɩ yẽnda rɩkã, la a tog n dogla yaoodã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembre, n dɩk-a n kɩs maan-kʋʋdã. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk pe-raoogã n maan paasg maoong a beegrã yĩnga, la a na n paama sugri." 
Leviticus5:17 Ned sã n maan bũmb sẽn ka zemse, n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã, baa sã n yaa ne yĩdgu, yẽnda na n yɩɩ bɛɛgda, la yellã bee a meng zugu." 
Leviticus5:18 Yẽnda tog n talla pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zang n wa ne maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ, la tog n yaa rũng sẽn zems yaood ning b sẽn yãkã. La maan-kʋʋdã na n deega pe-raoogã n maan maoong yẽnda sẽn beeg ne yĩdgã yĩnga, la yẽnda na n paama a beegrã sugri." 
Leviticus5:19 Maoon-kãng yaa beegr maoongo, bala, nedã sẽn dag n maanã yaa beegr meng-meng a sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Leviticus5:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeel-a yaa: 
Leviticus5:21 «Ned sã n maan yel-wẽnd n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yag zĩrẽ ne a ba-biig bũmb a sẽn bĩng a nengẽ wɛɛngẽ, wall bũmb a sẽn gãneg ne-a wɛɛngẽ, bɩ bũmb a sẽn zuk wɛɛngẽ, wall a sẽn maan zãmb n deeg a to bũmbu," 
Leviticus5:22 sã n ka rẽ bɩ a yãnda bũmb sẽn menem n dɩk n yaool n wẽendẽ tɩ yaa yẽnda rẽnda, wall a wẽen n yeel tɩ yẽnda ka maan beegr nins b sẽn sõdgã baa a yembre," 
Leviticus5:23 a sã n maan a woto, a maana yel-wẽnd n beege. Dẽ, yẽnda na n lebsa bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn dag n zukã, wall a sẽn dag n maan pãng n deegã zãnga, wall b sẽn dag n gũnug yẽnda ne bũmb ningã." 
Leviticus5:24 Wall sã n yaa bũmb a to yẽnda sẽn maan kaset-zĩrẽ n deege, yẽnda na n lebs-a-la zãnga, la a paas bũmbã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembre, n dɩk-a n kɩs bũmbã soaba. La tog n yɩɩ daar ninga yẽnda sẽn na n maan a beegrã maoongã." 
Leviticus5:25 Rẽ zugẽ, bɩ a tall pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zang n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdã, yẽnda sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga. La a tog n baoo pe-raoogo, t'a ligdã zems wa beegr maoong rũng ligd b sẽn tog n kõ maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus5:26 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan sugr kosg tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la yẽnda na n paama a beegrã sugri, baa sẽn dag n yaa yell ning la yẽnda maan yã.»" 
Leviticus6:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus6:2 «Yeel a Aarõ ne a kambã a woto: ‹Ad tõog ning sẽn kẽed ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã wɛɛngẽ wã. Maoongã tog n kell n paa tẽn-kugrã bug-toaalg zug yʋngã tõre, hal tɩ tãag yibeoogo, la tẽn-kugrã bugum tog n kell n wita beenẽ." 
Leviticus6:3 Maan-kʋʋdã tog n yeelga a fuug ning sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-bãanegã, la a sẽgen gĩs-bãaneg põge. La bɩ a yãk bugmã sẽn dɩ maoongã tompeglem tẽn-kugrã zugã, n dʋʋg-a tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga." 
Leviticus6:4 Rẽ poore, bɩ a yees a futã, la a ning fut a taaba, n dɩk tompeglmã n yi sik zĩigã pʋg n kẽng zĩig sẽn welg toor pʋga." 
Leviticus6:5 La bugmã tog n kell n wita tẽn-kugrã zugu, la a ka tog n ki ye. Yibeoog fãa, maan-kʋʋdã tog n yõgna raado, la a rɩk maoongã n dogl zugẽ, la a yõog laafɩ maoongã kaam." 
Leviticus6:6 Bugmã tog n wita wakat fãa tẽn-kugrã zugu, la a ka tog n ki ye." 
Leviticus6:7 Ad tõog ning sẽn kẽed ne bõn-koaadl kũunã wɛɛngẽ wã la woto. A Aarõ kamb n tog n maan maoon-kãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n tees tẽn-kugrã nen-taoore." 
Leviticus6:8 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yõng bõn-koaadl kũun zom-bãanegã, ne kaamã, la ne wisdã b sẽn naag kũunã, n dɩk bõn-kãng n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zug tẽegr yĩnga, tɩ yɩ yũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus6:9 Bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rɩ sẽn kellã. La b tog n dɩ-a lame n ka ning rã-bɩll ye. La yaa zĩ-sõngã sẽn yaa sɛk roogã samandã pʋg la b tog n dɩ-a. 
Leviticus6:10 B ka tog n ning zomã rã-bɩll n yaool n dʋg-a ye. Bala, maand ning sẽn yõogd bugum mam yĩnga pʋga, rẽndã yaa pʋɩɩr mam sẽn kõ bãmba. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toore. A na n yɩɩ wa kongr maoongã ne beegr maoongã sẽn yaa to-to wã." 
Leviticus6:11 A Aarõ kambã sẽn ya-b kom-dibli wã tõe n dɩɩ rɩ-kãnga. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta sẽn kẽed ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã wɛɛngẽ, yãmb zamaan-dãmbã fãa yĩnga. La bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n sɩɩs-a na n welga toore.»" 
Leviticus6:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus6:13 «Daar ning b sẽn na n sudg a Aarõ ne a kambã zut kaamã, ad kũun ning bãmb sẽn na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo: ‹B tog n waa ne zom-bãaneg wamde, tɩ yɩ kũun wakat fãa yĩnga, la b welg zom wamdã a yiib n wa ne pʋɩ-sʋkã yibeoogo, la a wa ne pʋɩ-sʋk a to wã zaabre." 
Leviticus6:14 B tog n naga zomã ne kaam n kɩɩm-a ne rʋko. La bɩ f rɩk-a n kalem taab n wes-a n kõ tɩ yɩ kũun b sẽn kɩɩme, t'a yũugã yaa noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus6:15 A Aarõ biig ning sẽn paam kaam sudgr n lebg maan-kʋʋd n na n deeg a ba wã zĩigã tog n kõo kũun-kãnga. Yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. B tog n yõoga maoon-kãng bugum zãnga. 
Leviticus6:16 Maan-kʋʋd fãa kũun tog n yõoga bugum zãnga, la b ka tog n dɩk-a n dɩ ye.»" 
Leviticus6:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus6:18 «Yeel a Aarõ ne a kambã yaa: ‹Ad yel-wẽnã maoong tõog sẽn yaa to-to. Yaa zĩig ning b sẽn maand maoongã la b na n kodg rũngã b sẽn kõ yel-wẽnã yĩngã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Yõwã yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor zãnga. 
Leviticus6:19 Maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn na n kodg-a rũngã yel-wẽnã yĩngã tõe n dɩ-a lame. B tog n dɩ-a-la zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋga, yaa sɛk roogã samandẽ." 
Leviticus6:20 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n sɩɩs-a maoongã nemd na n lebga bũmb sẽn welg toore. La a zɩɩmã sã n yɩk n tosg fuugu, bɩ f pek-a zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋga, zĩig ning zɩɩmã sẽn yi wã." 
Leviticus6:21 B tog n wãaga tãnd dʋk ning b sẽn tall n kɩɩm nemdã. Sã n mikame tɩ yaa zũud rʋk la b tall n dʋg-a, bɩ y ru rʋkã, la y waaga ne koom." 
Leviticus6:22 La maan-kʋʋd fãa sẽn yaa rao tõe n dɩ-a lame. Yõwã yaa bũmb sẽn yaa sõama zãng fasɩ. 
Leviticus6:23 La b sã n maan maoong yel-wẽnã yĩnga, n yãk a zɩɩmã n tall n wa ne sɛk roogẽ wã n maan sugr kosg zĩ-sõngã pʋga, bɩ b ra rɩ-a ye. B tog n yõog-a-la bugum.»" 
Leviticus7:1 Ad beegr maoong tõogo: Yõwã yaa bũmb sẽn yaa sõama zãng fasɩ. 
Leviticus7:2 B tog n kodga beegr maoong rũngã zĩig ning b sẽn maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk maoongã zɩɩmã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã. 
Leviticus7:3 La bɩ b rɩk kaamã fãa ne zʋʋrã, la kaam ning sẽn be pʋ-teedã zutã zãng n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus7:4 Sẽn leb n paas yaa yiim a yiibã ne b kaamã, ne zʋ-kɛɛgã kaam, la kaam ning sẽn pɛ gɛyã sʋkã, ne kaam ning sẽn be sãoorã ne yiimã zutã." 
Leviticus7:5 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk bõn-kãng n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽndã yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Woto yaa yel-manegr maoongo. 
Leviticus7:6 Yaa maan-kʋʋdbã buud neb nins sẽn yaa raopã bal n tar noor tɩ rɩ maoon-kãngã nemdã. B tog n dɩ-a-la zĩig sẽn welg toor pʋga, bala, a yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor zãng fasɩ." 
Leviticus7:7 Yel-manegr maoongã tõod ne yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoongã tõod fãa yaa bũmb a yembre. Rũng ning b sẽn maan maoongã yaa maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn maan-a paasg maoongã n so. 
Leviticus7:8 Ned sã n tall rũng n wa tɩ b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, yaa maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn maan-a maoongã n tog n soog rũngã gãongo." 
Leviticus7:9 Bõn-koaadl kũun ning fãa b sẽn na n wʋm wʋng pʋgẽ, bɩ b rʋg rʋkẽ, wall b kɩɩm laagẽ, fãa tog n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn maan-a tʋʋmdã n so." 
Leviticus7:10 La kũun ning fãa sẽn nag ne kaam wall sẽn nag koɛɛnga, na n yɩɩ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã rẽnda, la b tog n pʋɩ-a lame tɩ zems taaba." 
Leviticus7:11 Ad zems-n-taar maoong sẽn kõt Sẽn-ka-Saabã tõod sẽn yaa to-to: 
Leviticus7:12 Ned sã n wa ne zems-n-taar maoong sẽn yaa bark pʋʋsg maoongo, maoongã tog n naaga ne boaal-boaal sẽn nag ne kaam n ka ning rã-bɩlle, la a wa ne bur-maas sẽn nag ne kaam n yaool n ka ning rã-bɩlle, la a wa ne maas sẽn maan ne zom-bãaneg sẽn kalem ne kaam." 
Leviticus7:13 La b tog n waa ne bur sẽn ning rã-bɩlle, n naag bark pʋʋsg maoongã sẽn yaa zems-n-taar maoongã." 
Leviticus7:14 La bɩ b yãk-yãk kũunã buud toor-toorã n wilg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn maan-a zems-n-taar maoongã, la a yãk zɩɩmã n mesã pʋɩɩre." 
Leviticus7:15 La b tog n dɩɩ bark pʋʋsg maoongã sẽn yaa zesm-n-taar maoongã rũngã nemd maoongã kʋʋb daare, n da bas-a t'a kell n vẽeg beoog ye." 
Leviticus7:16 La sã n mikame tɩ ned maoong n yaa pʋleng pidsg maoongo, wall yamleoog maoongo, b tog n dɩɩ maoongã nemd maoongã daare, la a sã n kelle, b tõe n dɩ-a-la a vẽkembeoogo." 
Leviticus7:17 La maoongã nemdã sã n kell n ta rayɩtẽ-daare, b tog n yõog-a-la bugum." 
Leviticus7:18 La ned sã n baas n wãb a zems-n-taar maoong nemdo, maoongã yɩ tɩ rabɩtẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n deeg a maoongã ye. La b ka na n geelg yẽnda maoongã ye, la a soabã rẽgma a menga. La ned ning sẽn wãb-a maoongã nemdã rogenda yell a meng zugu." 
Leviticus7:19 La nemdã sã n sɩɩs bõn-dẽgdo, bɩ b ra leb n wãb-a ye. B tog n yõog-a-la bugum. La yaa ned ning sẽn yaa yɩlemd bal n tõe n wãb zems-n-taar maoongã nemdo." 
Leviticus7:20 La ned sã n yaa rẽgdo, n yaool n dɩ zems-n-taar maoong ning b sẽn maan n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nemdo, bɩ b yiis-a a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus7:21 La ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgdo, sã n yaa nin-saan-dẽgdo, wall rũm-dẽgdo, wall sẽn yaa rẽgd ning fãa sẽn yaa kisgu, la a yaool n dɩ zems-n-taar maoongã b sẽn maan n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nemdo, bɩ b yiis nin-kãng a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus7:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus7:23 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Yãmb ka tog n dɩ naaf kaam, peosg kaam ne bʋʋg kaam ye." 
Leviticus7:24 Rũng sã ki a toore, wall sã n yaa we-rũng n wãb-a t'a ki, yãmb tõe n dɩka a kaamã n maan bũmb a to, la y ka tog n dɩ-a ye." 
Leviticus7:25 Rũng ning fãa b sẽn kʋ tɩ yɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, ned ka tog n dɩ a kaamã ye. La ned sã n kɩɩs n dɩ-a, bɩ b yiis a soabã a buudẽ." 
Leviticus7:26 Yãmb sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, y ka tog n dɩ zɩɩm ye. Sã n yaa liuula wall yaa rũng a to zɩɩm." 
Leviticus7:27 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ zɩɩm, bɩ b yiis a soabã a buudã sʋka.»" 
Leviticus7:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeel-a yaa: 
Leviticus7:29 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Ned ning fãa sẽn na n maan-a zems-n-taar maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ a yãk Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋɩɩr n wa kɩse." 
Leviticus7:30 Yaa yẽnda meng a toor n tog n tall maoongã nem-kaam n wa kɩs tɩ b yõog bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La a tog n naaga ne yãoogã n wa ne, la b tog n deega yãoogã n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ yɩ kũuni." 
Leviticus7:31 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã reegda nem-kaamã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, la yãoogã na n yɩɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rẽnda." 
Leviticus7:32 Yãmb sã n maan y zems-n-taar maoongã, bɩ y yãk rũngã rɩtg gerã n paas maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus7:33 Rũngã rɩtg gerã na n yɩɩ a Aarõ bi-ribl ning sẽn dɩk-a zɩɩmã ne kaamã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã pʋɩɩre. 
Leviticus7:34 Bala, mam yãka Israyɛll nebã zems-n-taar maoongã rũng yãoogã sẽn yuumdã, ne a rɩtg gerã n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta. Bãmb tog n deega bõn-kãng Israyɛll nebã nengẽ." 
Leviticus7:35 Yaa bõn-kãng n na n yɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã pʋɩɩre, maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã zugu. La yaa sẽn sɩng ne daar ning bãmb sẽn lebg maan-kʋʋdb n sɩng b maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã.› »" 
Leviticus7:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo Israyɛll nebã tõ-kãngã, n yeel tɩ b kõ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã bõn-kãnga, sẽn sɩng daar ning b sẽn sudg bãmb zut kaam n welg-b toor tʋʋmdã yĩngã. La yõwã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, bãmb ne b yagensã yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaane." 
Leviticus7:37 Woto yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tõogo, la kũun maoongo, ne yel-wẽnã maoongo, la beegr maoongo, la b sẽn na n sudg maan-kʋʋdbã zut kaam b tʋʋmdã sɩngr yĩng maoongo, la zems-n-taar maoongo." 
Leviticus7:38 Yaa tõ-kãensã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiis Sinayi tãngã zugã, daar ning b sẽn yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng Sinayi weoogã pʋgã." 
Leviticus8:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeel-a yaa: 
Leviticus8:2 «Peeg a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la f rɩk fut ne kaam ning b sẽn pʋdgd maan-kʋʋdbã zutã, ne loalg sẽn na n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga, la f wa ne pe-raad a yiibu, ne bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩll peoogo." 
Leviticus8:3 La f tigim Israyɛll nebã fãa sɛk roogã noore.» 
Leviticus8:4 A Moyiis maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. La nebã wa n tigma taab sɛk roogã noore. 
Leviticus8:5 A Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tɩ d maan bũmb ningã la woto.» 
Leviticus8:6 A Moyiis kɩtame t'a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã kolge, la yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b so bãmb koom." 
Leviticus8:7 La a rɩka fuugã n yeelg a Aarõ, la a rɩk sẽbdg n sẽbg a Aarõ sɛɛgã. A Moyiis yeelg-a-la fu-wokã, la a ning-a yãoog lilldgã, la a naag-a n loe ne yãoog lilldgã sẽbdg a poorẽ wã." 
Leviticus8:8 B rɩka yãoog lilldg n ning-a, la b rɩk Urimã ne Tumimã n ning pʋgẽ." 
Leviticus8:9 A Moyiis leb n dɩka rĩ-tɛɛgã n vil a Aarõ zugã, n yaool n dɩk maan-kʋʋr bãndã sẽn maan ne sãnemã n ning a rĩirẽ wã n naage, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a maan to-to wã." 
Leviticus8:10 Rẽ poore, a Moyiis rɩka bark ningr kaamã n ning sɛk roogã, ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã n welg-b toore." 
Leviticus8:11 A Moyiis rɩka kaamã n mes tẽn-kugrã naoor a yopoe, la a mes tẽn-kugrã ne a teedã fãa, la ne yɩlg-m-meng laagã ne a rogendsã." 
Leviticus8:12 A Moyiis rɩka bark ningr kaamã n sudg a Aarõ zug n na n welg-a toore. 
Leviticus8:13 A Moyiis kɩtame t'a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã kolge, la a yeelg-b-la b futã, n sẽbg-b ne sẽbdse, la a fõgen bãmb pugli wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Leviticus8:14 A Moyiis kɩtame tɩ b kolg ne loalg ning b sẽn na n maan maoong yel-wẽnã yĩngã. Dẽ, a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rɩka b nus n palg loalg ning sẽn na n maan maoong yel-wẽnã yĩngã zugã." 
Leviticus8:15 A Moyiis kodga loalgã, n dɩk a zɩɩmã, n tẽk ne nug-bil n ning tẽn-kugrã kũnã zĩigẽ, n gilg tẽn-kugrã n yɩlg-a. A Moyiis rɩka zɩɩmã n walg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã n yɩlg-a." 
Leviticus8:16 La a Moyiis rɩka pʋ-teedã kaamã zãnga, ne sãoorã kaamã, ne yiim a yiibã ne b kaamã, n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Leviticus8:17 La b rɩka loalgã gãongã, a nemdã ne a bĩndã n yiis sik zĩigã yɩng n yõog bugum, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Leviticus8:18 La a Moyiis kɩtame tɩ b wa ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã pe-raoogã. A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rɩka b nus n tik pe-raoogã zugu. 
Leviticus8:19 Dẽ, a Moyiis kodga pe-raoogã, n dɩk a zɩɩmã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã." 
Leviticus8:20 A Moyiis pasa pe-raoogã, n dɩk a zugã ne a nem-võyã la a kaamã n yõog bugum." 
Leviticus8:21 A Moyiis peka pe-raoogã pʋ-teedã ne a karsã ne koom, la a rɩk pe-raoogã tõr n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Rẽndã yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, t'a yũugã yaa noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, tɩ yɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Leviticus8:22 A Moyiis waa ne pe-raoog a to wã. Pe-rao-kãng yaa maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd sɩngr maoong peosgo. A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rɩka b nus n palg pe-raoogã zugu. 
Leviticus8:23 A Moyiis kodga pe-raoogã, n yãk a zɩɩmã n tẽgs a Aarõ rɩtg tʋb-kɩrgã, ne a rɩtg nug-raoogã, ne a rɩtg nao-raoogã." 
Leviticus8:24 Dẽ, a Moyiis kɩtame t'a Aarõ kom-dibli wã kolge, la yẽnda rɩka zɩɩmã n tẽgs b rɩtg tʋb-kɩrsã, ne b rɩtg nug-raadã, la b rɩtg nao-raadã. La a Moyiis rɩka zɩɩmã sẽn kellã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã fãa." 
Leviticus8:25 A Moyiis yãka kaamã, ne zʋʋrã, ne kaam ning sẽn gãneg pʋ-teedã zutã, ne kaam ning sẽn be sãoorã zugã ne yiim a yiibã ne b kaamã, n paas ne rɩtg gerã." 
Leviticus8:26 A Moyiis gesa bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩllã peoogã sẽn dɩg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã pʋga, n yãk boaal-boaal sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle, ne bur sẽn nag ne kaam, la samsa. La a rɩk-b lame n dogl rũngã kaamã ne rɩtg gerã zugu." 
Leviticus8:27 La a Moyiis rɩka rẽ fãa n ning a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã nusẽ, n kɩt tɩ b yuum-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ yɩ kũuni." 
Leviticus8:28 Dẽ poore, a Moyiis reega kũun-kãens bãmb nengẽ n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, n naag maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã. Yaa rẽndã n yaa maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd sɩngr maoongo. Woto yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus8:29 A Moyiis rɩka pe-raoogã yãoog n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Rẽnda n yɩ a Moyiis pʋɩɩr wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. 
Leviticus8:30 A Moyiis rɩka bark ningr kaamã ne zɩɩmã sẽn dag n be tẽn-kugrã zugã n mes a Aarõ ne a futã, la a mes a kom-dibli wã me ne b futã. Woto, yẽnda welga a Aarõ ne futã, la a kom-dibli wã me ne b futã toore, b tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Leviticus8:31 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela a Aarõ ne a kambã yaa: «Kɩt-y tɩ b rʋg nemdã sɛk roogã noore, la yaa beenẽ la yãmb tog n wãb nemdã, ne bur ning sẽn be peoogã pʋgã, wa mam sẽn dag n yeel yãmb tɩ yaa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã n tog n dɩ-a wã." 
Leviticus8:32 La yãmb tog n dɩka nemdã ne burã sẽn kellã n yõog bugum. 
Leviticus8:33 La yãmb na n paa sɛk roogã noor rasem a yopoe, hal tɩ yãmb yãkrã rasem wa sɛ. Bala, yaa rasem a yopoe n tog n yɩ yãkrã yĩnga." 
Leviticus8:34 Bũmb ning sẽn maand rũndã wã, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel tɩ b maan-a yãmb yɩlgr yĩnga." 
Leviticus8:35 Dẽ wã, yãmb na n paa sɛk roogã noor rasem a yopoe. La yʋng ne wĩndga, yãmb tog n maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb da ki ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab dag n yeela maam woto.»" 
Leviticus8:36 A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã maana bũmbã fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a Moyiis togs bãmbã. 
Leviticus9:1 Rasem a nii wã daare, a Moyiis boola a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la a bool Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã." 
Leviticus9:2 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Bao lulla, yel-wẽnã maoong yĩnga, la f bao pe-raoogo, maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga. La rũm-bãmb tog n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar zanga, la f tall-b n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus9:3 Fo na n goma ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b yaa: Wa-y ne boɛɛg tɩ yɩ maoong yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la y wa ne lulla, ne pe-bil sẽn tar yʋʋmd la pʋɩ-sʋka, n ka tar zang ye. Rũm-kãens na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum." 
Leviticus9:4 La y wa ne loalga, la pe-raoogo, tɩ yɩ zems-n-taar maoongã yĩnga. La b tog n kood-b-la Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La b naag ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam n tall n wa. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n vẽnega b meng ne yãmb rũndã.»" 
Leviticus9:5 Bãmb talla bũmb nins fãa a Moyiis sẽn yeelã n wa sɛk roogã noore. La nebã fãa kolgame n yals yĩngr Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. 
Leviticus9:6 A Moyiis yeelame: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tɩ y maan bũmb ninga. Yãmb sã n maan woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã na n pukame.»" 
Leviticus9:7 Rẽ zugẽ, a Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Kolg tẽn-kugrã. Maan f maoongã yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la f maan f maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, n yɩlg f menga, la f yɩlg nebã. Bɩ f rɩk nebã kũun me n kõ n yɩlg-ba, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã.»" 
Leviticus9:8 A Aarõ kolga tẽn-kugrã, la a kodga nag-bilã yẽnda mengã yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Leviticus9:9 La a Aarõ kom-dibli wã koka rũngã zɩɩmã n kɩs a Aarõ, la yẽnda tẽka zɩɩmã ne a nug-bil n ning tẽn-kugrã kogsã zutu, la a rɩk zɩɩmã sẽn kellã n daag tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga." 
Leviticus9:10 A Aarõ rɩka nem-kaamã, ne yiimã, ne sãoorã kaamã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu, yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a maan to-to wã." 
Leviticus9:11 La a rɩka rũngã mengã ne a gãongã n yi sik zĩigã pʋg n tɩ yõog bugum kɛɛnga. 
Leviticus9:12 A Aarõ kodga rũngã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. La yẽnda kom-dibli wã koka zɩɩmã n kɩs yẽnda, la a rɩka zɩɩmã n daag n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã fãa." 
Leviticus9:13 Kom-dibli wã rɩka maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã nemdã n pase, n naag ne a zugã, n dɩk fãa n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Leviticus9:14 La yẽnda pegsa pʋ-teedã ne naoã n dɩk-b n dogl nem-pasdɩ wã zug n naag n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. 
Leviticus9:15 Rẽ poore, a Aarõ maana maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, nebã yel-wẽnã yĩnga. Yẽnda yõka boɛɛg sẽn na n yɩ maoong nebã yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga, la a kodg-a lame n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yɩ maoong nebã beegr yĩnga, wa yẽnda sẽn maan pipi maoongã to-to wã." 
Leviticus9:16 Yẽnda maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wa sẽn zems tõogã. 
Leviticus9:17 Dẽ, a Aarõ rɩka zomã kũun n na n kõ. La yẽnda yõnga zomã n pid a nug n ning tẽn-kugrã zug n yõog bugum n paas maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yẽnda sẽn maan yibeoogẽ wã." 
Leviticus9:18 Yẽnda kodga loalgã ne pe-raoogã, tɩ yɩ zems-n-taar maoong nebã yĩnga. A Aarõ kom-dibli wã rɩka zɩɩmã n kɩs-a t'a raag n gilg tẽn-kugrã kɩremsã." 
Leviticus9:19 Sẽn paase, bãmb dɩka loalgã kaamã, ne pe-raoogã kaamã ne a zʋʋrã, ne yiimã, ne kaam ning sẽn be sãoorã zugã," 
Leviticus9:20 la bãmb ninga kaamã yãoogã zugu, n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Leviticus9:21 A Aarõ rɩka yãoogã ne rɩtg gerã n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ yɩ kũuni, wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b maan to-to wã." 
Leviticus9:22 Dẽ poore, a Aarõ tẽega a nug n tees nebã n ning-b barka. La yẽnda sẽn maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne zems-n-taar maoongã n sɛ, a sigame." 
Leviticus9:23 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ tũu taab n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋga. La bãmb sẽn lebg n yi, b ninga nebã barka. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã puka nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Leviticus9:24 La bugum yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n dɩ maoongã ne kaamã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã. La nebã fãa sẽn yãnd woto, b kaasa ne sũ-noog n wõgemd n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
Leviticus10:1 A Aarõ kom-dibli a yiibã, a Nadaab ne a Abiyu, ned kam fãa rɩka wisd laaga, n ning bug-saala, n yõng wisd n yugl bugmã zugu. Bãmb talla bugum sẽn ka zems n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la bõn-kãng ka zems ne noor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ bãmbã ye." 
Leviticus10:2 Dẽ, bugum yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n dɩ bãmba. Bãmb kii zĩig pʋgẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus10:3 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yeelame: ‹Neb nins sẽn kolgd maamã tog bãngame tɩ mam welga toore, la tɩ nebã fãa tõe n waoog maam.› » La a Aarõ ka leb n yeel tɩ bũmb yɛs ye." 
Leviticus10:4 A Moyiis boola a Mikayɛll ne a Ɛltsafan sẽn yaa a Aarõ yɛsb a Uziyɛll kom-dibli wã n yeel-b yaa: «Wa-y n dɩk-y y saam-biisã kũumã sɛk roogã noor n yiis sik zĩigã pʋga.» 
Leviticus10:5 Dẽ, bãmb wa n dɩka kũumã ne b futã n yiis sik zĩigã pʋg wala a Moyiis sẽn yeelã." 
Leviticus10:6 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, a Elyazaar ne a Itamaare: «Da zũndg-y y zoobdã, la y ra pãrs y fut n wilg tɩ y bee sũ-sãang pʋg ye. Dẽ, yãmb kõn ki, la y kõn tak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã n sik nebã zug ye. Bas-y tɩ yãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã yãb neb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ bugmã rɩ n kʋ wã yĩnga." 
Leviticus10:7 Bɩ yãmb ra serg n bas sɛk roogã noor ye. Sã n ka rẽ, yãmb na n kiime. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaamã b sẽn pʋdg maan-kʋʋdbã zutã pʋdga yãmb zugu. Bãmb maana wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeelã.»" 
Leviticus10:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Aarõ n yeele: 
Leviticus10:9 «Foom ne f kom-dibli wã sã n wa n dat n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋga, bɩ y ra yũ reezẽ rãam, wall bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng ye. Sã n ka rẽ, yãmb na n kiime. Bõn-kãngã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga." 
Leviticus10:10 Woto yaa sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yãmb tõog n bãng bũmb ning sẽn yaa kisgu, ne bũmb ning sẽn ka kisg n bake, la y bãng bũmb ning sẽn yaa rẽgdo ne bũmb ning sẽn ka rẽgd n welge." 
Leviticus10:11 Bɩ y rɩk noy nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã, n kɩt t'a Moyiis zãms bãmb tõ-kãense.»" 
Leviticus10:12 A Moyiis yeela a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli nins sẽn kell n ka ki wã, a Elyazaar ne a Itamaare: «Rɩk-y bõn-koaadl kũunã b sẽn wa ne tɩ yɩ kũun sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã sẽn kellã, n yals tẽn-kugrã sɛɛg n dɩ-a, la y ra ning-a bɩll ye. Bala, bõn-kãng yaa bũmb sẽn welg toore." 
Leviticus10:13 Yãmb tog n dɩ-a-la zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋga. Woto yaa noor b sẽn kõ foom ne f kom-dibli wã yĩnga, sẽn kẽed maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã wɛɛngẽ. Bala, b yeela maam tɩ m maan a woto." 
Leviticus10:14 La bɩ foom ne f kom-dibli wã, la f kom-pugli wã kẽng zĩig sẽn yaa sõama pʋg n tɩ rɩ yãoogã b sẽn yuumã, ne ger ning sẽn yãk tɩ yaa kũunã. Bala, bõn-kãng yaa foom ne f kambã pʋɩɩre. B yãka bõn-kãens zems-n-taar maandã b sẽn maand Israyɛll nebã yĩngã sʋka." 
Leviticus10:15 Israyɛll nebã tog n talla kaam ning sẽn yõogd bugmã ne ger ning b sẽn yãk n kõ wã, la yãoogã b sẽn yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tɩ yɩ kũunã n wa. Bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ foom ne f kom-dibli wã rẽnda, la a na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã.»" 
Leviticus10:16 A Moyiis bao n na n bãnga boɛɛg ning sẽn yaa kongr maoongã yell sẽn yaa to-to. La a mikame tɩ b yõog-a-la bugum. La a Moyiis sũurã yika ne a Aarõ kom-dibli wã, a Elyazaar ne a Itamaare. Bãmb yaa Aarõ kamb nins sẽn kell n vɩɩmd n ka ki wã. A Moyiis yeel-b lame:" 
Leviticus10:17 «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb ka kẽng zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋg ne kongr maoongã rũng n tɩ rɩ-a? Bõn-kãng yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor zãng fasɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka bõn-kãng n kõ yãmba, tɩ yãmb tõe n tʋk Israyɛll nebã kongrã, n maan paasg tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõe n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Leviticus10:18 Ade, yãmb ka tall rũngã zɩɩm n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋg ye, yãmb dag n tog n wãba rũngã nemd zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋg wa mam sẽn dag n togs yãmbã.»" 
Leviticus10:19 A Aarõ yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gese, bãmb maana maoong rũndã, yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Dẽ wã, rũndã, yãmb meng mii yell ning sẽn be mam zugu, mam sã n dag n dɩẽ kongr maoongã rũng nemd rũndã, a yaa bũmb sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor sɩda?»" 
Leviticus10:20 A Moyiis sẽn wʋm a Aarõ sẽn gom woto wã, a reegame, la a bas taale." 
Leviticus11:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeel-b yaa: 
Leviticus11:2 «Yeel-y Israyɛll nebã yaa: Rũmsã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã wɛɛngẽ, ad yãmb sẽn tõe n dɩ-b rãmba:" 
Leviticus11:3 Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ rũms nins fãa sẽn tar nao-ben-boagla, la sẽn bɩɩsdã." 
Leviticus11:4 La ka rũms nins fãa sẽn bɩɩsdã, wall sẽn tar nao-ben-boaglã fãa la yãmb tog n dɩ ye. Ad yãmb sẽn ka tõe n dɩ rũms ninsi: Yaa yʋgemde, bala, a bʋkdame, la a ka tar nao-ben-boagl ye. Bɩ y geelg yẽnda wa rũm-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:5 Yaa seere, bala, a bʋkdame, la a ka tar nao-ben-boagl ye. Bɩ y geelg yẽnda wa rũm-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:6 Yaa soaamba, bala, a bʋkdame, la a ka tar nao-ben-boagl ye. Bɩ y geelg yẽnda wa rũm-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:7 Yaa kurkuri, bala, yẽnda tara nao-ben-boagl sẽn yaa sɩlemse, la a ka bɩɩsd ye. Bɩ y geelg-a wa rũm-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:8 Da wãb-y rũm-bãmbã nemd ye, la ra-y sɩɩs-y b kũum me ye. Bɩ y geelg-b wa rũm-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:9 Ad koomẽ bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins yãmb sẽn tõe n dɩ wã: Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins fãa sẽn tar gɛda, la b tar pagdã, la b vɩ koomẽ wã. Sã n yaa ko-kãsengã, wall kʋɩlsã pʋse." 
Leviticus11:10 La sã n yaa ne bõn-bãoonegã, wall bõn-vɩɩlɩ a taab nins fãa sẽn vɩ koomẽ wã, sã n yaa ko-kãsemsẽ, tɩ yaa kʋɩlsẽ, n ka tar gɛda, la b ka tar pagdo, bãmb fãa na n yɩɩ yel-beed yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:11 Bãmb na n yɩɩ yel-beed yãmb yĩnga, la yãmb ka tog n dɩ bãmb nemdo, la y ka tog n sɩɩs b kũum me ye." 
Leviticus11:12 Bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins fãa sẽn be koomẽ, n yaool n ka tar gɛda, la b ka tar pagdã na n yɩɩ yel-beed yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:13 Bõn-yɩgdɩ wã sʋka, ad yãmb sẽn tog n ges b rãmb wa yel-beed yãmb yĩnga, la y sẽn ka tog n dɩ-b-rãmba: Yaa yɩbrgo, pa-nand-tugri, ne sɩl-faoogo." 
Leviticus11:14 Leb n yaa kosenkonde, ne wɩbga, la bõn-yɩgdɩ sẽn wẽnd woto." 
Leviticus11:15 Yaa gãabgo, ne bõn-yɩgdɩ sẽn wẽnd woto." 
Leviticus11:16 Yaa neoongo, ne viuugu, la lʋre, ne wɩbga, la sɩls buud sẽn wẽnd woto." 
Leviticus11:17 Yaa viu-liuula, ne koom-daoogo, la kɩɩm-liuula." 
Leviticus11:18 Yaa faoogo, ne salsanga, la yɩbrgo." 
Leviticus11:19 Yaa bulwãoogo, ne rãongo, bãmb buud a taaba, la ne nakomsugri, ne zãnkita." 
Leviticus11:20 Bõn-bãooneg nins fãa sẽn tar-b pɩgsã, la sẽn tar nao a naas n tũud taab n kẽndã na n yɩɩ yel-beed yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:21 Bõn-bãooneg nins fãa sẽn tar-b pɩgsã, la sẽn tar nao a naas n tũud taab n kẽndã sʋka, yãmb tõe n dɩɩ sẽn tar-b gɛy n tõe n tão n yɩk n tiims tẽngã." 
Leviticus11:22 Ad sʋy buud nins yãmb sẽn tõe n dɩ: Yaa kalwaare, mogdr-zẽenga, ka-saamba, pakenlagemde, ne sʋy buud sẽn wẽnd woto." 
Leviticus11:23 Bõn-bãooneg nins a taabã fãa sẽn tar pɩgs ne nao a naasã na n yɩɩ yel-beed yãmb yĩnga. 
Leviticus11:24 Bãmb tõe n kɩtame tɩ yãmb lebg rẽgdo. Ned sã n sɩɩs bãmb kũum, a soabã na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre," 
Leviticus11:25 la ned sã n dɩk bãmb kũum bɩ a soabã pegs a futu, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:26 Rũms nins fãa sẽn tar nao-ben-boagl sẽn ka sɩlemse, la a ka bɩɩsdẽ na n yɩɩ rẽgd yãmb yĩnga. Ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a rũm-bãmb na n lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:27 Rũms nins fãa sẽn tar nao a naas n kẽnd ne nao-kidã na n yɩɩ bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga, ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a bãmb kũum na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:28 Ned sã n dɩk bãmb kũum, a soabã na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre. Bɩ y ges rũm-bãmb wa bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:29 Rũm-bãooneg nins sẽn vuudã sʋka, ad yãmb sẽn tog n ges b rãmb wa bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga: Yaa Sãbtõaasga, yõngre, ne bãngenlegsre, wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to," 
Leviticus11:30 yaa kosenkongo, weoogẽ-dao-a-kõbre, bãngenlegsre, kuri, ne gomtɩʋʋgo." 
Leviticus11:31 Bɩ y geelg rũm-bãmba wa bõn-dẽgdo, rũm-vuudsã fãa sʋka. Ned sã n sɩɩs bãmb kũum, a soabã na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:32 Bõn-bãmbã a yembr sã n ki n lʋɩ bũmb zugu, bõn-kãng na n lebga rẽgdo. Sã n yaa laok sẽn maan ne raoogo, sã n yaa fuugu, gãongo, bɩ korgo. Baa sã n yaa laok buud fãa b sẽn tar n tʋmdẽ, bɩ b los-a koomẽ, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre, la rẽ zugẽ, a na n yaool n yɩɩ yɩlemde." 
Leviticus11:33 Bõn-bãmbã a yembr sã n ki n lʋɩ yagd laok pʋga, bũmb ning fãa sẽn be laokã pʋgã lebga rẽgdo. Bɩ y wãag laokã." 
Leviticus11:34 B sã n dɩk laok-kãng koom n walg bõn-dɩtl buudã fãa, rɩ-kãng na n lebga rẽgdo, la baa sã n yaa bõn-yũudl la b ning laokã pʋga, bõn-yũud-kãng na n lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:35 Bõn-bãmbã a yembr sã n ki n lʋɩ bũmb zugu, bõn-kãng na n lebga rẽgdo. A sã n lʋɩ wʋng wall yɩgr zugu, bɩ b pãb-b n wã, bãmb lebga rẽgdo, la b yaa bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:36 La baoosgo, sã n yaa ko-bundum pʋg bɩ bulgẽ la a lʋɩ yã, koomã na n kell n yɩɩ yɩlemde, la yaa ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a bãmb kũumã bal n na n lebg rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:37 Bãmb sã n ki n lʋɩ bõn-buud b sẽn dɩk n na n bʋd pʋga, bõn-buudã na n kell n yɩɩ yɩlemde." 
Leviticus11:38 La sã n mikame tɩ b wʋlga bõn-buudã ne koom, tɩ b kũumã lʋɩ a pʋgẽ, bɩ y geelg bõn-buudã wa bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:39 Yãmb sẽn tar noor tɩ rɩ rũms ninsã a yembr sã n ki, tɩ ned sɩɩs a kũumã, a soabã na n lebga rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:40 Ned sã n wãb rũng a woto nemdo, bɩ a pegs a futu, la a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre, la ned ning me sẽn dɩk-a rũm-kɩɩngã, a na n pegsa a futã, la a na kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:41 Rũm-bãooneg nins fãa sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã na n yɩɩ bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga, bɩ ned ra saag n dɩ bãmb ye." 
Leviticus11:42 Yãmb ka tog n dɩ rũm-bãoonegã sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã baa a yembr ye, la y ka tog n dɩ sẽn vuud-b b pʋsã zutã me ye, la y ka tog n dɩ sẽn kẽnd-b ne nao a naasã wall sẽn tar-b nao kʋʋngã ye. Bala, bãmb yaa bõn-dẽgd yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus11:43 Da sɩɩs-y bõn-vuudsã n dẽgem yãmb mens ye. Ra sak-y tɩ b sɩɩs yãmb n dẽgm-y ye. Yãmb sã n sɩɩs bãmba, yãmb na n lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:44 Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Yãmb tog n manega y mens n yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba. Bala, mam yaa pʋ-peelem soaba. Dẽ wã, ra sak-y n bas-y tɩ rũm-bãoonegã sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã rẽgem yãmb ye." 
Leviticus11:45 Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yaa maam n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽnga pʋga, n na n kell n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam. Rẽ wã, bɩ y yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba. Bala, mam yaa pʋ-peelem soaba." 
Leviticus11:46 Yõwã yaa tõogo, la yaa sẽn kẽed ne rũmsã wɛɛngẽ, ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, ne bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins fãa sẽn saagd koomẽ wã, la bõn-vɩɩsã sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã." 
Leviticus11:47 Woto yaa sẽn na n sõng tɩ b bãng sẽn yaa rẽgd ne sẽn ka rẽgd n bake, la b bãng rũng ning b sẽn tõe n dɩ, n welg ne rũng ning b sẽn ka tõe n dɩ.»" 
Leviticus12:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus12:2 Ad bũmb ning fo sẽn na n togs Israyɛll nebã: Yeel-b tɩ pag sã n dɩk pʋg n dog bi-ribla, pʋg-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem a yopoe. Yẽnda na n yɩɩ rẽgd wa yẽnda sẽn yãnd a pekr wakate." 
Leviticus12:3 La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ b kẽes biigã bãongo." 
Leviticus12:4 La pagã tog n kell n yalsa rasem pis-tã la a tãab n paase, n yɩlg a menga, a rogma zɩɩmã yĩnga. La yẽnda ka tog n sɩɩs bũmb sẽn welg toor ye, la a ka tog n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋg me ye, hal t'a yɩlgrã rasem sõor pidi." 
Leviticus12:5 Pag sã n dog bi-pugla, pʋg-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem piig la a naase, wa yẽnda sẽn yãnd a pekr wakate, la a tog n kell n yalsa rasem pis-yoob la a yoobe, n yɩlg a menga, a rogmã zɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Leviticus12:6 Pagã yɩlgr rasem sõor sã n pidi, sã n yaa bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugl la a rog yã, a tog n talla pe-ribl sẽn zems yʋʋmd n wa maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ sɛk roogã noore, tɩ b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, la a wa ne man-wan-bila, bɩ walle, tɩ b maan maoong a yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Leviticus12:7 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg bõn-kãens n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n maan paasg pagã yĩnga. Rẽ, pagã na n lebga yɩlemde, a zɩɩmã sẽn daagã yĩnga. Woto yaa pag sẽn dog bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugl tõogo." 
Leviticus12:8 La sã n mikame tɩ pagã ka tar pãn-tõog n na n paam pe-ribla, bɩ a wa ne wal a yiibu, wall man-wãn-bi a yiibu, t'a yembr yɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga, t'a to wã yɩ maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan paasg pagã yĩnga, la yẽnda na n lebga yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Leviticus13:2 B sã n wa n mik tɩ ned n tar yũur a yĩn-gãongã zugu, ka rẽ bɩ a soabã gãong fʋkdame, wall a sã n yãk zĩig n pelge, n lebg wa wãood bãag gãongã zugu, bɩ b tall a soab n kẽng maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ nengẽ, sã n ka rẽ bɩ a Aarõ bi-ribl a yembr nengẽ." 
Leviticus13:3 Maan-kʋʋdã na n maaga a meng n ges nodrã sẽn be yĩn-gãongã zugã. Sã n mikame tɩ yĩn-koabnengã sẽn be nodrã pʋgã lebga pɛɛlga, tɩ nodrã zĩig võd n kẽ pʋgẽ, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood nodre. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges a soaba, la a wilg t'a yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:4 La sã n mikame tɩ bõn-pɛɛlg n be yĩn-gãongã zugu, t'a zĩigã ka võd n kẽ pʋgẽ, la tɩ yĩn-kõabnengã me ka lebg pɛɛlga, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ning ned ning sẽn tar-a nodrã kɛɛnga rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:5 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges-a. Sã n mikame tɩ nodrã ka paasde, la a ka yalgd yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã leb n ning a soabã kɛɛng rasem a yopoe yɛsa." 
Leviticus13:6 Rasem a yopoe-kãens sã n pidi, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã leb n ges-a naoor a yiibẽ soaba. Sã n mik tɩ nodrã boogame, n ka yalg yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa yɩlemde. Rẽ, rat n yeelame tɩ yaa yĩn-fʋkr bala, la bɩ a soabã pegs a futu, n lebg yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:7 La maan-kʋʋdã sẽn ges-a n yeel t'a yaa yɩlemdã poore, b sã n mik tɩ yĩn-fʋkrã yɛdga yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ a lebg n leb maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ naoor a yiibẽ soaba," 
Leviticus13:8 tɩ maan-kʋʋdã leb n ges-a. Sã n mikame tɩ yĩn-fʋkrã yɛdga yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a yaa rẽgdo, bala, yaa wãoodo." 
Leviticus13:9 Wãood sã n puk ned yĩn-gãong zugu, bɩ b tall a soabã n kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ," 
Leviticus13:10 tɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges-a. Sã n mikame tɩ nod-pɛɛlg n be yĩn-gãongã zugu, la nodrã sã n kɩtame tɩ yĩn-kõabnengã pelge, la yĩn-nemdã sã n nudgame n yi nodrã pʋga," 
Leviticus13:11 wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood sẽn paam pãng nin-kãng yĩn-gãongã zugu. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. B ka leb n baood n ning a soabã kɛɛng ye. Bala, a zoe n yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:12 La wãoodã sã n yɛdg n kẽ ned ning sẽn tar-a nodrã yĩn-gãongã zĩig fãa, n sɩng ne a zugã n tall n tɩ tãag a naoã, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã tõe n yãnd tɩ yaa zĩigã fãa," 
Leviticus13:13 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges-a. La sã n mikame tɩ wãoodã yɛdg n luda a yĩngã zãnga, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg tɩ ned ning sẽn tar-a nodrã yaa yɩlemde. Bala, yẽnda mengã zãng lebga pɛɛlga, dẽ, a yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:14 La daar ninga b sẽn na n mik tɩ yĩn-nemdã nudgame wã, yaa badaar la b na n yeel t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:15 Maan-kʋʋdã sã n yãnd tɩ yĩn-nemdã nudgame, bɩ a wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Nodr yaa rẽgdo. Bala, yaa wãood buud a to." 
Leviticus13:16 La yĩn-nemdã sẽn nudgã sã n tek n lebg pɛɛlga, bɩ nodrã soab kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ," 
Leviticus13:17 t'a ges-a. Dẽ, nodrã sã n yaa pɛɛlga, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg tɩ ned ning sẽn tar-a nodrã yaa yɩlemde, a ka leb n yaa rẽgd ye." 
Leviticus13:18 Yĩn-gãong bãag sã n yõk ned n lebg n maage," 
Leviticus13:19 tɩ b wa n mik tɩ yũur n puk zĩig ning nodrã sẽn dag n zĩndã, n tẽgs-tẽgs pɛɛl-pɛɛla, la miid-miidu, bɩ a soabã kẽng tɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges-a." 
Leviticus13:20 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges a zĩigã. B sã n mik tɩ nodrã zĩigã võd n kẽe pʋgẽ, tɩ yĩn-kõabnengã lebg pɛɛlga, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Rat n yeelame tɩ yaa wãood n puk nodrã zugu." 
Leviticus13:21 La maan-kʋʋdã sã n mik tɩ yĩn-kõaben-pɛɛlg ka tol n be tẽgsem-tẽgsmã zugu, la a ka võd n kẽ pʋgẽ, la a pʋs n maagdame, bɩ a ning a soabã kɛɛng rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:22 La rẽ zugẽ, tẽgsem-tẽgsmã sã n yɛdg n kẽ yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Wilgdame tɩ yaa wãoodo." 
Leviticus13:23 La b sã n mik tɩ tẽgsem-tẽgsmã ka teke, la a ka yɛdge, wilgdame tɩ yaa nod-rãoongo. Bɩ a wilg t'a soabã yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:24 Bugum sã n dag n yõog neda, tɩ b wa n mik tɩ bugmã nodrã tẽgsa pɛɛl-pɛɛla, wall pɛɛl ne miidu," 
Leviticus13:25 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges a soabã. B sã n mik tɩ yĩn-kõabnengã sẽn be tẽgsmã pʋgã lebga pɛɛlga, la a zĩigã sã n võdame, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood n puk bugmã nodr zugu. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg tɩ nin-kãng yaa rẽgdo. Bala, yaa wãoodo." 
Leviticus13:26 Maan-kʋʋdã sã n ges n mik tɩ yĩn-kõaben-pɛɛlg ka be tẽgsmã zugu, la nodrã sã n ka võde, la sã n mik t'a maagame, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ning a soabã kɛɛng rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:27 La rasem a yopoe wã daar sã n ta, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges-a. A sã n mik tɩ nodrã yɛdga yĩn-gãongã zugu, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Bala, yaa wãoodo." 
Leviticus13:28 La nodrã sã n kell n pa zĩ-yɛnga, la a sã n ka yɛdg yĩn-gãongã zugu, la sã n mik t'a maagame, wilgdame tɩ yaa bugum nodr bala. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa yɩlemde, bala, yaa bugum nod-rãoongo." 
Leviticus13:29 Yĩn-gãong bãag sã n yõk rao bɩ pag zugu, ka rẽ bɩ a lemde," 
Leviticus13:30 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges bãagã sẽn beẽ wã. Sã n mikame t'a zĩigã võdame n kẽ, tɩ yĩn-koabnengã yaa kõodre, wilgdame t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Woto yaa sẽn wilgd tɩ yaa rasempʋɩɩga. Rẽndã yaa zug bɩ lemd wãoodo." 
Leviticus13:31 La maan-kʋʋdã sã n mik tɩ rasempʋɩɩgã ka võd n kẽ pʋgẽ, la a ges tɩ yĩn-koabnengã ka sablga, bɩ a ning rasempʋɩɩgã sẽn tar a soabã kɛɛng rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:32 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges nodrã. La a sã n mik tɩ rasempʋɩɩgã ka yalge, la yĩn-kõabnengã sã n ka kõodr-kõodre, la nodrã zĩig sã n ka võd n kẽ pʋgẽ," 
Leviticus13:33 bɩ a soabã põng a zugu, la a põng n gil rasempʋɩɩgã zĩig n base. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã leb n ning a soabã kɛɛng rasem a yopoe yɛsa." 
Leviticus13:34 La rasem a yopoe kãens sã n pidi, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges rasempʋɩɩgã zĩigã. La sã n mikame tɩ rasempʋɩɩgã ka yalg yĩn-gãongã zugu, la a zĩigã sã n ka võd n kẽ pʋgẽ, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a yaa yɩlemde. La a soabã tog n pegsa a futu, n lebg yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:35 La sã n mikame tɩ b sẽn wilg t'a yaa yɩlemdã loogr zugẽ, rasempʋɩɩgã yalga yĩn-gãongã zugu," 
Leviticus13:36 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã leb n maag a meng n leb n ges-a yɛsa, la sã n mik tɩ rasempʋɩɩgã yalga yĩn-gãongã zugu, ka leb n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ maan-kʋʋdã bao n bãng yĩn-koabnengã sã n teka kõbg ye. Wilgdame bal t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:37 La sã n wẽnda wa rasempʋɩɩgã ka yalg n paase, la sã n mik tɩ yĩn-kõabnen-sabl n yita, wilgdame tɩ rasempʋɩɩgã maagame. A soabã yaa yɩlemde. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:38 Rao bɩ pag sã n wa n tar tẽgsem-pɛɛl a yĩn-gãongã zugu," 
Leviticus13:39 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges a soabã. Sã n mikame tɩ zĩ-pɛɛlgã ka pɩnda, wilgdame tɩ yaa yũy n puk a soabã yĩng zugu. Dẽ, yẽnda soab yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:40 Ned zoobd sã n sʋʋg t'a soab lebg zu-kõogo, yẽnda yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:41 Ned rĩir zoobd sã n sʋʋge, yẽnda soab yaa dĩirẽ zu-kõogo. A soab yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:42 La nodr sẽn tẽgs pɛɛl-pɛɛl miid-miid sã n puk dĩirã sẽn kõogã zugu, wall kãarã sẽn kõogã zugu, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood n puk a soabã zugu." 
Leviticus13:43 Wakat-kãnga, maan-kʋʋdã tog n maaga a meng n ges a soabã. Dẽ, b sã n mik tɩ bãagã zĩigã lebga nodre, n tar pɛɛl la miid rĩirẽ wã bɩ kãarẽ wã, n wẽnd wa wãood sẽn yaa to-to yĩn-gãong zugã," 
Leviticus13:44 rat n togsame t'a soabã yaa wãoore, la a yaa rẽgdo. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wilg t'a soabã yaa rẽgdo. Bala, wãood n yõk a soabã zugu." 
Leviticus13:45 Sã n wa n yaa a woto, bɩ wãoorã yeelg fu-kʋdse, la a ra leb n sãas a zug ye. Bɩ a lud a no-kõbdã n kelem n yeele: Rẽgdo! Rẽgdo!" 
Leviticus13:46 La bãagã sẽn na n tall yẽnda wã tɛka, a na n yɩɩ rẽgdo. A soabã sẽn lebg rẽgdã yĩnga, a tog n vɩɩmda a yembre. Yẽnda tog n yii sik zĩigã pʋg n tɩ vɩɩmd kɛɛnga." 
Leviticus13:47 B sã n mik tɩ wãood n puk fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbd zugu, sã n ka rẽ bɩ fuug sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩsg zugu," 
Leviticus13:48 a sã n bee pãnd zugu, wall gĩs-lobr zugu, wall a sã n bee gãong zugu, bɩ zapd teed zugu," 
Leviticus13:49 bãagã sẽn puk zĩig ningã sã n lebg kẽega, bɩ miuug fuugã zugu, wall gãongã zugu, sã n ka rẽ bɩ pãndã bɩ gĩs-lobrã zugu, wall zapdã teed zugu, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood bãaga. Bɩ b tall-a n tɩ wilg maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus13:50 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maag a meng n ges-a, la a rɩk bũmb nins wãoodã sẽn tarã n ning kɛɛng rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:51 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ a gese. Sã n mik tɩ bãagã yalga fuugã zugu, bɩ pãnda, wall gĩs-lobrã zugu, sã n ka rẽ bɩ zapdã teed zugu, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood sẽn sɩd yaa wẽnga. Dẽ, bõn-kãng lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:52 Dẽ, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk bãmb n yõog bugum. Sã n yaa fuugu, bɩ pãnde, wall gĩs-lobre, bɩ pe-kõbdo, wall lamd gĩsga, wall sã n leb n yaa zapd teed zug la bãagã be, yaa wãood sẽn yaa wẽnga. Sẽn yaa teed nins fãa, bɩ b yõog-a bugum." 
Leviticus13:53 La maan-kʋʋdã sã n mik tɩ bãagã ka yalg fuugã bɩ pãndã zugu, wall a ka yalg gĩs-lobrã bɩ zapdã teed zugu," 
Leviticus13:54 bɩ a kɩt tɩ b pek bũmb ning bãagã sẽn yõkã, t'a reeg-a n leb n ning kɛɛng rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:55 B sã n pek bũmbã n sɛ, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-a n maag a meng n ges-a. Bãagã sã n ka tek yalẽ, la baa a sã n ka yalge, bũmbã ket n yaa rẽgdo, la a tog n yõog-a-la bugum. Bãagã sã n bee bũmbã nen-lebendẽ tɩ yaa a nen-sõngẽ, ka rẽ la yellã ye." 
Leviticus13:56 La maan-kʋʋdã sã n mik tɩ pekrã poore, bãagã boogame, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã wolg gĩsgã, wall zapdã teoogã zĩ-kãngã." 
Leviticus13:57 La bãagã sã n leb n puk fuugã zugu, sã n ka rẽ bɩ pãndã zugu, wall zapdã teoog zugu, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãoodo. Wakat-kãng bɩ b yõog bũmb ning bãagã sẽn yõkã bugum." 
Leviticus13:58 La b sã n pek fuugã, bɩ pãndã, sã n ka rẽ bɩ zapdã teoogã, n mik tɩ bãagã yi n bas-a lame, bɩ b leb n pek-a naoor a yiibẽ soaba, n kɩt t'a lebg yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:59 Woto yaa tõogo, wãood wɛɛngẽ, sẽn kẽed ne fuugu, pãnde, gĩsga, wall zapd teed wɛɛngẽ. Tõ-kãngã kɩtdame tɩ b bãng bũmb ning b sẽn yeel tɩ yaa yɩlemde, wall yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus14:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus14:2 Daar ning b sẽn na n tall yĩn-gãong bãag soab n wa maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ tɩ b yɩlg-a wã, ad tõog ning sẽn kẽed bõn-kãng wɛɛngẽ." 
Leviticus14:3 Maan-kʋʋdã yita sik zĩigẽ wã n maag a meng n ges yĩn-gãong bãagã soaba, la a sã n mik t'a yĩn-gãong bãagã sãoogame n bas-a," 
Leviticus14:4 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yeel tɩ b bao liuun-vɩɩs a yiib sẽn yaa yɩlmã, ne sɛɛdr tɩɩg raado, la peen-miuugu, ne izop tɩɩg vãad n tall n wa ne bãadã meng yɩlgr yĩnga." 
Leviticus14:5 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kɩt tɩ b kodg liuun-vɩɩg a yembr yagd laag ning ko-sõngã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã zugu. 
Leviticus14:6 La bɩ a rɩk liuun-vɩɩg ning sẽn ketã, ne sɛɛdr tɩɩgã raado, la peen-miuugã n paas ne izop tɩɩgã vãadã, n suk liuul ning b sẽn kodg ko-sõngã zugã zɩɩm pʋga." 
Leviticus14:7 Bɩ a yãk zɩɩmã n mes ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgr ne a wãoodã naoor a yopoe. Dẽ poore, bɩ a wilg t'a soabã lebga yɩlemde, la a rɩk liuun-vɩɩgã n bas t'a yɩk n kẽ weoogã." 
Leviticus14:8 Ned ning sẽn paam-a yɩlgrã tog n pegsa a futu, la a põng a yĩngã kõbdã zãnga, la a so koom. Dẽ, a lebga yɩlemd zãnga. Rẽ sã n looge, a soabã tõe n yaool n kẽe sik zĩigã pʋga, la a tog n paa yɩng rasem a yopoe n yaool n kẽ a fu-roogẽ wã." 
Leviticus14:9 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ a põng a yĩngã kõbd zãnga, a põng a zugã, a toɛɛngã, ne a nin-kõbdã. Yaa a yĩngã kõbd zãng la a tog n põnge. Rẽ zugẽ, bɩ a pegs a futu, la a so koom. Dẽ, a lebga yɩlemde." 
Leviticus14:10 La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ a soabã wa ne pe-ribli a yiibu sẽn ka tar zanga, ne pe-bi-sadg sẽn zems yʋʋmde, n ka tar zanga, la zom-bãaneg sẽn zems wamd pidingu, b sẽn nag ne kaam, n paas ne kaam sẽn zems litr pʋɩ-sʋka, tɩ yɩ bõn-koaadl kũuni." 
Leviticus14:11 Bɩ maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn get-a yɩlgrã yellã tall ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã ne a kũunã, n kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n yals sɛk roogã noore." 
Leviticus14:12 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg pe-ribl a yembre, n naag ne kaamã litr pʋɩ-sʋkã, n maan maoong tɩ yɩ kũun a beegrã sugr kũun yĩnga. La bɩ a kẽng ne bõn-kãens Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n tɩ yuum-b wa sẽn zems miningã." 
Leviticus14:13 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kodg pe-riblã zĩig ning b sẽn kʋʋd beegr rũngã ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋgã. Bala, beegr maoongã rũngã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũng yaa maan-kʋʋdã n so. Yẽnda yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor wʋsgo." 
Leviticus14:14 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk beegr maoongã zɩɩmã, n yãk n tẽk ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã rɩtg tʋbre, ne a rɩtg nug-raoogo, la a rɩtg nao-raoogo." 
Leviticus14:15 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk kaamã litr pʋɩ-sʋkã n pʋdg a goabg nugã pʋga. 
Leviticus14:16 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã tẽk kaamã sẽn be yẽnda goabg nugã pʋgã ne a rɩtg nug-bil n mes Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor naoor a yopoe. 
Leviticus14:17 Maan-kʋʋdã tog n dɩka kaamã sẽn ket yẽnda nugẽ wã, n yãk bilf n tẽk ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã rɩtg tʋbre, ne a rɩtg nug-raoogo, la a rɩtg nao-raoogo. A tẽkdame n bʋʋg beegr maoongã zɩɩm yẽnda sẽn dag n tẽgsã." 
Leviticus14:18 Dẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdã rɩkda kaamã sẽn kell yẽnda nugẽ wã, n ning ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã zugu, n yiis nin-kãng yel-wẽnã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus14:19 Rẽ zugẽ, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan maoong n kos sugr a soabã yel-wẽnd yĩnga. Yẽnda tog n maana woto tɩ ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã rẽgdã tõe n paam yẽesgo. Rẽnda sã n sɛ, maan-kʋʋdã kodgda maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũnga." 
Leviticus14:20 Maan-kʋʋdã tog n dɩka maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne bõn-koaadl kũunã n naag taab n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã yɩlg-a, la a na n lebga yɩlemde." 
Leviticus14:21 Sã n mikame t'a yaa naong soab n ka tar pãn-tõog sẽn sekde, bɩ a bao pe-ribl-yend n wa ne tɩ yɩ beegr maoongã yĩnga, tɩ b yuum-a n maan paoosg yẽnda yĩnga. La a bao zom-bãaneg wam-yɛng sẽn nag ne kaam, la kaam litr pʋɩ-sʋk n wa ne tɩ yɩ kũuni." 
Leviticus14:22 La a wa ne wal a yiibu, wall man-wan-bi a yiib sẽn zems a pãnga, t'a yembrã yɩ maoong yel-wẽndã yĩnga, t'a to wã yɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga." 
Leviticus14:23 La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ a tall kũun-kãens fãa n wa maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ, sɛk roogã noor Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, a mengã yɩlgr yĩnga." 
Leviticus14:24 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg pe-riblã ne kaamã litr pʋɩ-sʋkã n maan beegr maoongã, n yuum-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus14:25 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kodg maoongã pe-riblã. La a tẽk beegr maoong rũngã zɩɩmã, n ning ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã rɩtg tʋbre, ne a rɩtg nug-raoogo, la a rɩtg nao-raoogo." 
Leviticus14:26 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk kaamã n kiig a goabg nugã pʋga. 
Leviticus14:27 La bɩ a rɩk a rɩtg nug-bilã n tẽk kaamã sẽn be yẽnda nug-goabgã pʋgã n mes Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor naoor a yopoe. 
Leviticus14:28 La maan-kʋʋdã tog n yãka zɩɩmã sẽn ket yẽnda nugẽ wã, n tẽk ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã rɩtg tʋbre, ne a rɩtg nug-raoogo, la a rɩtg nao-raoogo. A tog n tẽk-a lame n bʋʋg beegr maoongã zɩɩm yẽnda sẽn dag n tẽkã." 
Leviticus14:29 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk kaam ning sẽn kell yẽnda nugẽ wã n kiig sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã zugu, n kɩt t'a paam a beegrã sugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus14:30 Rẽ poore, bɩ a reeg wallã, bɩ man-wãn-bil a yembr ning a sẽn wa ne wa sẽn zems a sẽn maan a pãng sẽn tõe" 
Leviticus14:31 n paamã, n maan maoong a beegrã yĩnga, la a rɩk a to wã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n naag ne bõnkoaadl kũunã. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan yɩlgr tʋʋmd ned ning sẽn dat-a yɩlgrã yĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus14:32 Yõwã yaa ned sẽn tar wãood yɩlgr tõogo, t'a soabã paoong yaool n ka waoogẽ ye." 
Leviticus14:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Leviticus14:34 Yãmb sã n wa n ta Kana tẽngã mam sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ, tɩ mam kɩt tɩ wãood bãag puk tẽngã roog zugu," 
Leviticus14:35 bɩ ned ning sẽn so-a roogã kẽng n tɩ togs maan-kʋʋdã n yeele: «Mam yãnda bũmb sẽn puk mam doogã zug wa bãaga. 
Leviticus14:36 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kõ noor tɩ b vaag roogã teed zãng tɩ yẽnda yaool n kẽ n maag a meng n ges bãagã. Woto, bũmb ning fãa sẽn dag n be roogã pʋgẽ wã ka rẽgem ye. Rẽ poore, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kẽ n ges roogã." 
Leviticus14:37 Bɩ a ges bãagã. Maan-kʋʋdã sã n mik tɩ lond n be roogã lals zug n yaa kẽega, wall miuugu, n wẽnd wa a võda lalgã n kẽ pʋgẽ," 
Leviticus14:38 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã lebg n yi roogẽ wã, la a sã n ta roogã noore, bɩ a lebs roogã n pag n bas tɩ ta rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus14:39 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã lebg n leb roogẽ wã. La a sã n tɩ mik tɩ bãagã yalga roogã lals zugu," 
Leviticus14:40 bɩ a kõ noor tɩ b yãk kug nins bãagã sẽn be b zutã, n tall-b n yi tẽngã kɩreng n tɩ lob zĩ-rẽgd zĩigẽ." 
Leviticus14:41 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kɩt tɩ b pẽeg roogã bolbã, n wʋk boalgã n yi tẽngã kɩreng n tɩ lob zĩ-rẽgd zĩigẽ." 
Leviticus14:42 Rẽ poore, bɩ b bao kug a taab n lebs b sẽn yãk-b rãmbã zĩigẽ. La b bao boalg a to n lebs n bol roogã." 
Leviticus14:43 La b sẽn yãgs kugã, la b pẽeg roogã boalgã, n lebs n bol-a wã poore, b sã n mik tɩ bãagã leb n pukame," 
Leviticus14:44 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã lebg n leb roogẽ wã, la a sã n yãnd tɩ bãagã yalga roogã lals zutu, wilgdame tɩ yaa wãood sẽn ka sɛt n tar doogã. Ro-kãng lebga bõn-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus14:45 Bɩ b siig roogã, la b wʋk a kugã ne a sugrã zãnga, ne roogã boalgã, n yi tẽngã kɩreng n tɩ lob zĩ-rẽgd zĩigẽ." 
Leviticus14:46 La roogã sẽn ket n pagã wakate, ned sã n kẽ a pʋgẽ, a soab na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus14:47 La ned ning sẽn na n gãand-a roogã pʋg tog n pegsa a futu. Ned ninga me sẽn na n dɩ-a roogã pʋg tog n pegsa a futu. 
Leviticus14:48 La b sẽn lebs roogã n bolã poore, maan-kʋʋdã sã n lebg n leb n tɩ mik tɩ bãagã ka yalge, bɩ a wilg tɩ roogã yaa yɩlemde. Tɩ bala, bãagã sɛɛme." 
Leviticus14:49 La b sã n na n yɩlg roogã, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã bao liuuli a yiibu, ne sɛɛdr tɩɩg raado, la peen-miuugu, ne izop vãado, n tall n wa." 
Leviticus14:50 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kodg liuul a yembr yagd laagẽ, ko-bundum sẽn be a pʋgẽ." 
Leviticus14:51 La bɩ a rɩk sɛɛdr tɩɩg raoogã, ne izop vãadã, la peen-miuugã, ne liuun-vɩɩgã, n suk bãmb liuul ning b sẽn kʋ wã zɩɩmã ne ko-bundmã sẽn be yagd laagã pʋgã. La a rɩk-a n mes roogã zug naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus14:52 Maan-kʋʋdã sã n dɩk liuulã zɩɩm, ne ko-bundmã, la liuun-vɩɩgã ne sɛɛdr tɩɩgã raadã, la izop vãadã ne peen-miuugã n yɩlg roogã n sɛ," 
Leviticus14:53 bɩ a bas liuun-vɩɩgã t'a yɩke, n yi tẽngã n kẽ weoogo. Yaa woto la a tog n maan n yɩlg roogã, la roogã na n yɩɩ yɩlemde." 
Leviticus14:54 Yõwã yaa tõog wãood buud fãa ne rasempʋɩɩg buud fãa yĩnga," 
Leviticus14:55 la ne fut bãaga, la roog bãag yĩnga." 
Leviticus14:56 Yaa bã-moatga, ne nodr buud fãa sẽn pelge." 
Leviticus14:57 A yaa zãmsg sẽn wilg bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgdo ne bũmb sẽn ka rẽgdo. Woto yaa tõogo, wãood wɛɛngẽ.»" 
Leviticus15:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Leviticus15:2 «Yeel-y Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Taoor bãag sã n yõk raoa, kɩtdame t'a lebg rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:3 Ad bũmb ning yĩng sẽn kɩt tɩ taoor bãagã sẽn tar a soabã lebg rẽgdã. A zɩɩm sã n yita wall ka yita, baoosg zãnga, a soabã ket n yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:4 Sã n wa yaa a woto, ned ning zɩɩm sẽn yitã sẽn gãand gãag ning zugu, gã-kãng lebga rẽgdo, la a soabã sẽn na n zĩnd bũmb ning zug fãa lebgda rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:5 Ned sã n sɩɩs gã-kãngã, bɩ a soab pegs a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:6 Ned sã n zomb zĩig ning ned ning zɩɩmã sẽn daagdã sẽn zombẽ wã, a soabã tog n pegsa a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:7 Ned sã n sɩɩs rao ning zɩɩmã sẽn daagd a soabã yĩnga, a tog n pegs a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:8 Ned ning zɩɩm sẽn daagdã sã n tʋbs ned sẽn yaa yɩlemde, nin-kãng tog n pegs a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:9 Ned ning zɩɩm sẽn daagdã sẽn na n zomb gaar ning fãa n tog sore, gaarã lebgda rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:10 Ned ning zɩɩm sẽn daagdã sã n zĩnd n bʋʋg bũmbu, baa sẽn yaa bũmb ninga, tɩ ned sɩɩs bũmbã, nin-kãng tog n pegsa a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:11 Ned ning zɩɩm sẽn yitã sã n sɩɩs neda, n ka reng n pegs a nusã ne koom, bɩ a soabã pegs a futu, la a so koom, la baoosgo, a na kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:12 Ned ning zɩɩm sẽn yitã sã n sɩɩs yagd laoko, bɩ b wãag laok-kãnga, la a sã n yaa laok sẽn maan ne raoogo, bɩ b los-a koomẽ n peke." 
Leviticus15:13 Ned ning sẽn tar-a pend bãag t'a zɩɩm yitã sã n dat n yɩlg a menga, bɩ a rɩk rasem a yopoe tõr a yɩlgrã yĩnga. Yẽnda tog n pegs a futu, la a tɩ bao ko-bundum n so, n yaool n tõog n yɩ yɩlemde." 
Leviticus15:14 La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ a bao wal a yiibu, wall man-wan-bi a yiibu, n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, sɛk roogã noore, n dɩk-b n kɩs maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus15:15 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-b n dɩk a yembr n maan yel-wẽnã maoongo, la a rɩk a to wã, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan a woto n yɩlg a soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, a zɩɩmã sẽn yitã yĩnga." 
Leviticus15:16 Rao rogem bõn-buud koom sã n daagdẽ, a soabã tog n so a yĩngã tõr koom, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:17 Rogem bõn-buudã koom sã n daag n mad fuugu, wall gãongo, bɩ b los-b koomẽ n pegse, la b na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:18 Rao ne pag sã n kẽ ne taaba, bɩ b so koom, la b na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre.› »" 
Leviticus15:19 «Pag sã n yãnd a pekre, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem a yopoe tõre. La ned sã n sɩɩs-a, yẽnda soab na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:20 Pʋg-kãng sã n gãand gãag zug a pekrã wakate, gãagã na n yɩɩ rẽgdo, la bũmb ninga fãa zug pʋg-kãng sẽn na n zomb na n yɩɩ rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:21 Ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a gãag ning pʋg-kãng sẽn gãand a zugã, tog n pegs a futu, la a so koom, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:22 Ned ning sẽn sɩɩs-a bũmb ning pʋg-kãng sẽn zombã, a soabã tog n pegsa a futu, la a so koom, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:23 Pagã sẽn gãand gãag ning zugã, wall a sẽn zomb bũmb ningã, ned sã n sɩɩs-ba, a soab na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:24 Rao sã n gãand ne pʋg-kãngã, t'a zɩɩmã sẽn daagdã bol-a, rao-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem a yopoe, la gãag ning fãa zug rao-kãng sẽn na n gãandã na yɩɩ rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:25 Pag zɩɩm sã n daagdẽ t'a pekr wakat ka ta, wall a pekrã sã n kaoos n yɩɩg rasem sõor ning sẽn zems pekr rasmã, pʋg-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal n tãag a zɩɩmã raagr sɛɛbo, wa yẽnda sẽn yãnd a pekrã wakatã." 
Leviticus15:26 La yẽnda sẽn na n gãand gãag ning fãa zug na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd wa gãag ning zug yẽnda sẽn gãand a pekrã wakatã, la bũmb ning fãa yẽnda sẽn na n zomb a zugu, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd wa yẽnda sẽn yãnd a pekrã wakatã." 
Leviticus15:27 Ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a bãmb na n yɩɩ rẽgdo. A soabã tog n pegs a futu, la a so koom, la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:28 Pagã sã n paam yɩlgr ne a zɩɩmã sẽn daagdã, na n taa rasem a yopoe, t'a yaool n yɩ yɩlemde." 
Leviticus15:29 La rasem a nii wã daare, bɩ a bao wal a yiibu wall man-wan-bi a yiibu, n tall n tɩ kɩs maan-kʋʋdã sɛk roogã noore." 
Leviticus15:30 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-b n yãk a yembr n maan yel-wenã maoongo, la a rɩk a to wã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan a woto n yɩlg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, t'a paam a meng ne zɩɩmã sẽn dag n dẽgm-a wã." 
Leviticus15:31 Bɩ y kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã sã n wa be rẽgd pʋga, bɩ b zãag b mens ne sɛk-roogã. Dẽ, bãmb ka na n ki b rẽgdã yĩng ye. Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ bãmb da wa rẽgem mam sɛk-zĩigã sẽn be bãmb sʋkã ye." 
Leviticus15:32 Woto yaa tõog pend bãag yĩnga, la ne rogem bõn-buud koom sẽn daagd yĩnga." 
Leviticus15:33 Yaa pag sẽn yãnd a pekre, wall pag bɩ rao zɩɩm sẽn daagde, la rao sẽn na n kẽ ne pag sẽn yãnd a pekre.»" 
Leviticus16:1 A Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n ki wã loogr zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiisi." 
Leviticus16:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yeel f kẽem a Aarõ t'a ra n kẽed sɛk roogã pʋg wakat fãa ye, t'a ra lɩk fu-lillidgã sẽn be kaset koglgã sɛɛgã ye. Sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a ra wa ki ye. Bala, mam na n puka m meng sawadg pʋg bas-taal koglgã zugu." 
Leviticus16:3 Ad a Aarõ sẽn na n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋg to-to. A tog n zãa loalg sẽn na n maan kongr maoongo, la a zã pe-raoog sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum." 
Leviticus16:4 Yẽnda tog n yeelga fu-yor-wɛlgdgã b sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la a sẽgen lamd gĩs-bãanega, la a sẽbg sẽbdg b sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega, la a vil a zug ne zu-vindg b sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. Bãmbã fãa yaa te-yerdɩ sẽn welg toore, la a tog n soo koom n yaool n yeelg-ba." 
Leviticus16:5 A Aarõ tog n deega boees a yiib Israyɛll nebã nengẽ yel-wẽnã maoong yĩnga, la a reeg pe-raoog maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:6 A Aarõ tog n baoo loalg n maan a mengã yel-wẽn maoongo, n maan paoosg yẽnda mengã ne a yirã rãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:7 Yẽnda tog n dɩka boees a yiibã n yalsg-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, sɛk roogã noore." 
Leviticus16:8 Bɩ a Aarõ maan poeer boees a yiibã zutu, yaa poeer sẽn na n maan n bãng boɛɛg ning sẽn na n yɩ-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽndã, la sẽn na n yɩ-a a Azazɛll rẽnda." 
Leviticus16:9 La bɩ a Aarõ rɩk boɛɛg ning poeerã sẽn yãk tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽndã n maan yel-wẽnã maoongo. 
Leviticus16:10 La bɩ b tall boɛɛg ning poeerã sẽn yãk tɩ yaa a Azazɛll rẽndã, n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor vɩɩga, n maan paoosg tʋʋmd ne-a, la b rig-a n kẽes weoog a Azazɛll yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:11 Bɩ a Aarõ wa ne loalg ning sẽn na n yɩ-a yel-wẽnã maoong yĩngã, n maan paoosg yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb yĩnga. Yẽnda tog n kodga loalgã a mengã yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:12 A Aarõ tog n dɩka wisd laag n yãk tẽn-kugrã zug bugmã bug-saal n pids-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la a yõng wisd-zomã nug-pidung a yiib n ningi, n tall bõn-kãens fãa n kẽ fu-lillidgã poore." 
Leviticus16:13 A tog n yãka wisdã n ning bugmã zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ wisdã bug-zõos lud bas-taal zĩigã sẽn be koglgã limdã zugã. Woto, yẽnda ka na ki ye." 
Leviticus16:14 Bɩ a tẽk loalgã zɩɩmã ne a nug-bil n mes bas-taal zĩigã yaangã. Bɩ a tẽk zɩɩmã ne a nug-bil n mes bas-taal zĩigã taoor naoor a yopoe. 
Leviticus16:15 La bɩ a kodg nebã yel-wẽnã maoongã boɛɛg n kok a zɩɩmã n tall n kẽ fu-lillidgã pʋga. Yẽnda tog n dɩka zɩ-kãng n maan wa yẽnda sẽn dag n maan to-to ne loalgã zɩɩmã, n yãk-a n mes bas-taal zĩigã zugu, ne a taoore." 
Leviticus16:16 Yaa a woto la yẽnda tog n maan zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã sẽn dẽgmã ne b tʋʋm-beedã, la b yel-wẽnã fãa yĩnga. Yẽnda tog n maana a woto me ne sɛk roogã sẽn be ne bãmb b rẽgdã sʋkã." 
Leviticus16:17 A Aarõ sã n wa n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋg n na n maan yɩlgr tʋʋmdã, bɩ ned ra kẽ sɛk roogã pʋg ye, hal t'a Aarõ wa n yi be. A Aarõ tog n kosa sugr a mengã yĩnga, la a zakã rãmb yĩnga, ne Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:18 Bɩ a Aarõ yi n kẽng tẽn-kugrã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã n tɩ yɩlg-a. Bɩ yẽnda yãk loalgã ne boɛɛgã zɩɩm n ning tẽn-kugrã kogsã fãa zut n gilgi. 
Leviticus16:19 A Aarõ tog n tẽka zɩɩmã ne a nug-bil n mes tẽn-kugrã zug naoor a yopoe. Yẽnda na n maana a woto n yɩlg tẽn-kugrã la a welg-a toore, Israyɛll nebã sẽn dẽgmã yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:20 A Aarõ sã n yɩlg zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã ne sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã n sɛ, bɩ a tall boe-vɩɩgã n kolge." 
Leviticus16:21 Bɩ a Aarõ rɩk a nus a yiibã n tik boe-vɩɩgã zugu, n vẽneg n togs Israyɛll nebã kongrã fãa ne b yel-beedã zãnga, ne b yel-wẽnã fãa tɩ sig boe-vɩɩgã zugu. Yẽnda sã n sik yel-bãmb boɛɛgã zug n sɛ, bɩ a rɩk-a n kɩs rao ning sẽn pẽ yẽnda sɛɛgẽ t'a rig-a n kẽes weoogo." 
Leviticus16:22 La boɛɛgã na n zɩɩ bãmb kongrã fãa a zug n zoe n kẽng zĩ-zãrga. Bɩ b rig boɛɛgã n kẽes weoogo. 
Leviticus16:23 Dẽ, bɩ a Aarõ lebg n kẽ sɛk roogã pʋga, n yees a fut nins sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩsã, yẽnda sẽn dag n yeelg wakat ning a sẽn wa n dat n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ wã, n bas-b beenẽ." 
Leviticus16:24 Yẽnda tog n kẽe zĩig b sẽn welg toorã pʋg n so koom, la a lebs a futã n yeelge, n yi n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum yẽnda mengã yĩnga, la a maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum nebã yĩnga. Woto yaa sẽn na n yɩlg a meng la a yɩlg nebã me." 
Leviticus16:25 Bɩ a rɩk maoongã rũng kaam n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zug yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. 
Leviticus16:26 Ned ning sẽn dig boɛɛgã n kẽes weoog a Azazɛll yĩngã tog n pegsa a futu, la a so koom. Rẽ poore, a na yaool n kẽ sik zĩigã pʋga." 
Leviticus16:27 La loalg ning ne boɛɛg ning b sẽn kʋ yel-wẽnã yĩng n yãk b zɩɩmã n kẽ zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋg n maan paoosgã, b tog n dɩka bãmb n yiis sik zĩigã pʋg n yõog bugum ne b gãndã, la b nemdã ne b pʋ-teedã." 
Leviticus16:28 Ned ning sẽn na n yõog-a bãmb bugmã tog n pegsa a futã, la a so koom, la rẽ poore, a na yaool n kẽ sik zĩigã pʋga." 
Leviticus16:29 Ad no-tũudg ning sẽn ka sɛtã, b sẽn kõ yãmb t'a tog n pa wakat fãa yĩngã. Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig daare, bɩ y loe noore, la y bas y tʋʋmã fãa, sã n yaa tẽng-n-neda, wall sãan sẽn wa n be yãmb sʋka." 
Leviticus16:30 Bala, yaa badaar la b maand paasg tʋʋmd yãmb yĩnga, n yɩlg yãmba. Dẽ, yãmb na n paama yɩlgr ne y yel-wẽnã fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus16:31 Badaar na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar yãmb yĩnga, la yãmb tog n loee noore. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta." 
Leviticus16:32 Yaa maan-kʋʋd ning b sẽn yãk n pʋdg a zug kaam n ning maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd a zug t'a tõe n ledg a ba zĩig maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd pʋgã, n na n yeelg a fut nins sẽn welg toorã sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩsã, n maan paoosg tʋʋmdã." 
Leviticus16:33 Maan-kʋʋdã tog n maana paoosg tʋʋmdã zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã yĩnga, la sɛk roogã yĩnga, la ne tẽn-kugrã yĩnga, la a maan paoosg maan-kʋʋdbã yĩnga, la Israyɛll nebã yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:34 No-tũud-kãngã yaa yãmb yĩng wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yʋʋmd pʋgẽ fãa vugri, bɩ yãmb maan bõn-kãng n yɩlg Israyɛll nebã yel-wẽnã fãa.» Bãmb maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Leviticus17:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus17:2 «Yeel a Aarõ ne a kambã, la Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: ‹Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame:" 
Leviticus17:3 Israyɛll buudã ned sã n kodg naaf bɩ pesgo, wall bʋʋg sik zĩigã pʋga, wall a yɩnga," 
Leviticus17:4 n ka reng n tall-a n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã noor n wa rɩk-a n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b na n soka a soabã, a sẽn daag zɩɩmã yĩnga. Yẽnda sẽn daag zɩɩmã yĩnga, b na n yiisa yẽnda a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus17:5 Woto yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Israyɛll nebã ra tall b maoongã n tɩ maan we-kɛɛnga, la tɩ b tõe n tall-a n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ sɛk roogã noore, maan-kʋʋdã taoore, tɩ b maan vɩ-bãan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus17:6 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk zɩɩmã n mes Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã zugu, sɛk roogã noore, la a rɩk kaamã n yõog bugum tɩ yɩ yũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus17:7 Israyɛll nebã ka tog n leb n maan b maoongã tẽn-kugã sẽn yaa boeesã zutu, bõn-kãng yaa wa yoobo. Yõwã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, bãmb ne b yagensã yĩnga." 
Leviticus17:8 Dẽ wã, yeel-b yaa: ‹Israyɛll buudã neda, bɩ sãan sẽn be yãmb sʋkã sã n dat n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wall maoong a to," 
Leviticus17:9 n ka reng n tall-a n wa sɛk roogã noor tɩ yɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, b na n yiisa nin-kãngã soab a buudã sʋka.› »" 
Leviticus17:10 «Israyɛll buudã neda, wall sãamb nins sẽn be bãmb sʋkã ned sã n dɩ zɩɩm, baa sẽn yaa bũmb ning zɩɩm, mam na n wẽnemda m neng n bas a soabã, a sẽn dɩ zɩɩmã yĩnga, la mam na n yiisa yẽnda a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus17:11 Bala, yĩngã vɩɩm bee zɩɩmẽ wã. Mam kõt-a-la yãmb tɩ y raag-a tẽn-kugrã zugu, tɩ yãmb tõe n paam y yel-wẽnã sugri. Bala, yaa vɩɩm sẽn be zɩɩmã pʋgẽ wã yĩng n kɩt tɩ zɩɩm tõe n pek yel-wẽnã." 
Leviticus17:12 Yaa rẽndã yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: Bɩ yãmb ned baa a yembr da rɩ zɩɩm ye. La sãan sẽn be yãmb sʋkã me ka tog n dɩ zɩɩm ye. 
Leviticus17:13 Israyɛll nebã sʋk neda, bɩ sãamb nins sẽn be bãmb sʋkã ned sã n kẽng tãoosg n tɩ paam rũng bɩ bõn-yɩgdre, b sẽn tar noor n tõe n wãb a nemdã, bɩ b raag a zɩɩmã tẽng n bus-a ne tom." 
Leviticus17:14 Bala, bõn-vɩɩl buudã fãa vɩɩm bee a zɩɩmẽ. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: Da rɩ-y bũmb zɩɩm ye. Bala, bõn-vɩɩl buudã fãa vɩɩm be a zɩɩmẽ. La ned sã n dɩ zɩɩm b na n yiis-a-la buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus17:15 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a rũng sẽn ki a toore, wall rũng a to sẽn kʋ, sã n yaa tẽng-n-neda, wall sãana, bɩ a soab pegs a futu, la a so koom, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre, n yaool n lebg yɩlemde." 
Leviticus17:16 La a soabã sã n ka pegs a futu, la a so koom, a kongrã na n zĩnda a meng zugu.»" 
Leviticus18:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis n yeele: 
Leviticus18:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. 
Leviticus18:3 Yãmb ka tog n maan wa Ezɩpt tẽngã nebã sẽn maandã ye, tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n beẽ wã ye. La da maan-y wa Kana tẽngã, zĩig ning mam sẽn tar yãmb n dabdã nebã sẽn maandã ye. Da sak-y n tũ-y bãmb noyã ye." 
Leviticus18:4 Bɩ y sak mam noyã, la y sak mam no-tũudsã. Bɩ y sak-ba. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus18:5 Bɩ y tall mam no-tũudsã ne m noyã. Ned ning sẽn na n sak-a bãmba, b na n kɩtame t'a vɩɩmde. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus18:6 Bɩ yãmb ned baa a yembr da kẽ ne pag sẽn yaa a roagd ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Leviticus18:7 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ba, bɩ f ma ye. A sẽn yaa fo ma wã yĩnga, fo ka tog n kẽ ne-a ye." 
Leviticus18:8 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ba pag ye. Yẽnda yaa fo ba rẽnda. 
Leviticus18:9 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ba-bi-poaka, wall f ma-bi-poak ye. A sã n doga yiri, wall kɛɛnga." 
Leviticus18:10 Bɩ ned ra kẽ ne a bi-ribl bi-pugla, wall a bi-pugl bi-pugl ye. Bala yaa yẽnda mengã yĩn-neongo." 
Leviticus18:11 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ba pag bi-pugl sẽn yaa yẽnda ba wã meng biiga, bala, yẽnda yaa a tão-poaka." 
Leviticus18:12 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f pʋgdb ye. Bala yẽnda yaa f ba wã tão-poaka. 
Leviticus18:13 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ma ba-bi-poak ye. Yẽnda yaa fo ma. 
Leviticus18:14 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f saamba, wall kẽ ne a saamb pag ye. Bala yẽnda yaa f ma." 
Leviticus18:15 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f bi-pag ye. Bala yẽnda sẽn yaa fo biigã pagã, fo ka tog n kẽ ne-a ye." 
Leviticus18:16 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f ba-biig pag ye. Yẽnda yaa f ba-biigã rẽnda. 
Leviticus18:17 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne paga, la f kẽ ne pagã bi-pugl ye. La f ra peeg a bi-ribl bi-pugla, wall a bi-pugl bi-pugl n kẽ ne-a ye. Bala bãmb yaa bũmb a yembre, dẽ, bõn-kãng yaa yãnde." 
Leviticus18:18 Bɩ f ra peeg f pag tão-poak n paas tɩ rẽ wata ne pʋg-ta-zaba. Bɩ f ra kẽ ne-a tɩ f pagã ket n vɩ ye. 
Leviticus18:19 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne pag a sẽn yãnd a pekr wakat ye, tɩ rẽ t'a yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus18:20 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne f tẽng-n-bi-taag pag n dẽgem f meng ne-a ye. 
Leviticus18:21 Bɩ f ra rɩk f kamb n kɩs tɩ b yõog bugum n kõ wẽn-naandg a Molok n paoog fo Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Leviticus18:22 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne rao wa fo sẽn kẽed ne pag to-to wã ye. Yõwã yaa yel-beedo. 
Leviticus18:23 Bɩ f ra kẽ ne rũng n dẽgem f meng ne-a ye. Bɩ pag me ra rɩk a meng n kõ rũng t'a gãand-a ye. Yõwã yaa yel-beedo. 
Leviticus18:24 Bɩ y ra maan yel-bãmbã baa a yembr n dẽgem y mens ye. Bala, buud nins mam sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb digã rag n maanda yel-be-bãmbã." 
Leviticus18:25 Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ tẽngã rẽgem, la mam sɩbg-a-la a yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la tẽngã yiisa a nebã." 
Leviticus18:26 Rẽ wã, bɩ y sak mam no-tũudsã ne m noyã, la y ra maan yel-be-bãmbã baa a yembr ye, sã n yaa tẽng-n-neda, wall sãan sẽn wa n be yãmb sʋkã." 
Leviticus18:27 Bala, neb nins sẽn dag n deng yãmb n be tẽn-kãng pʋgã rag n maanda yel-be-bãmbã, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã lebg rẽgdo." 
Leviticus18:28 Woto wã, bɩ y ra leb n dẽgem tẽngã n kɩt t'a zãgs yãmb wa a sẽn dag n zãgs neb nins sẽn dag n deng yãmb n be beenẽ wã ye." 
Leviticus18:29 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn na n maan-b yel-be-bãmbã a yembre, b na n yiisa a soab kɛɛng n kʋ." 
Leviticus18:30 Bɩ y sak mam tõogã, la y ra tol n maan yel-beed nins neb nins sẽn deng yãmbã sẽn dag n maandã ye. Bɩ y ra maan bõn-kãens n dẽgem y mens ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Leviticus19:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus19:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nin-buiidã n yeel-b yaa: Yɩ-y pʋ-peelem dãmba, bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa pʋ-peelem soaba." 
Leviticus19:3 Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa waoog a ba, la a ma, la a sak mam vʋʋsg rayã. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:4 Da waoog-y wẽn-naandse, la y ra yẽneg kut n maan wẽn-naands ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:5 Yãmb sã n na n maan zems-n-taar maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y maan-a wa sẽn zemse, tɩ mam tõe n sak n deeg-a." 
Leviticus19:6 Yãmb tog n wãba maoongã rũng nemd maoongã daare, wall a vẽkembeoogo. La a sã n kell n ta rasem a tãabo, bɩ y rɩk-a n yõog bugum." 
Leviticus19:7 Ned sã n dɩ nem-kellã rasem a tãabã daare, mam ka na n deeg a soab ye. Bala, nemdã yaa bõn-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus19:8 Ned ning sẽn dɩt-a nem-kãng rogenda yell a meng zugu, bala, yẽnda paooga bũmb ning sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã. Bɩ y yiis nin-kãng soab a buudã sʋk n kʋ." 
Leviticus19:9 Yãmb sã n wa n tigsd y bõn-koaadlã y tẽngã pʋga, bɩ y bas kood nins sẽn be pʋʋgã kɩrengã n da kẽeb ye. La da leb-y poorẽ n wʋk kood ning sẽn pa pʋʋgẽ wã tigsgã poorã ye." 
Leviticus19:10 Sẽn paas me, yãmb ka tog n tõs reezẽ-gĩnã sẽn pa wilẽ wã tigsgã poorã ye. La y ra lebg n wʋk reezẽ-bɛɛlã sẽn dʋʋgã ye. Bɩ y bas bõn-kãense, ninbãan-nebã ne sãambã yĩnga. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:11 Bɩ y ra zu ye. Bɩ yãmb ned ba a yembr da rõd a tẽng-n-bi-taaga, la ra-y zãmb-y-yã-a ye." 
Leviticus19:12 Bɩ y ra wẽen zĩrẽ wẽeneg ne mam yʋʋr ye. Bala, y sã n maan woto, y paoogda mam yʋʋrã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus19:13 Bɩ f ra wẽg f to, la ra zu-a ye. Da bas f tʋm-tʋmd yaood f nengẽ n vẽeg beoog ye." 
Leviticus19:14 Ra kãab wʋng kãab-beed ye. La ra f ning bẽdg zoang taoor t'a lak ye. Bɩ f zoe Wẽnnaam. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Leviticus19:15 Da kao bʋʋd kegr ye. Ra mong naong soab bʋʋm a naongã yĩnga, la f ra kõ nin-kãseng bʋʋm a sẽn yaa nin-kãsengã yĩng ye. Bɩ y kao ba-biig bʋʋd tɩrga." 
Leviticus19:16 Bɩ y ra kãneg taab ye. Ra rõd f to tɩ b kʋ-a ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Leviticus19:17 Bɩ f ra kisg f ba-biig f sũurẽ ye, bɩ f wilg-a a kongre, n da wa n bao yell n dogl f meng yẽnda yĩng ye." 
Leviticus19:18 Ra rok f sũuri ye, la f ra tall sũur ne f tẽngã ned ye. Nong f to wa f menga. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus19:19 Bɩ y sak mam tõodã. Bɩ f ra rɩk rũms buud toor-toor a yiib n kɩt tɩ b rʋ taab ye. Da rɩk bõn-buud buud toor-toor a yiib n bʋd f pʋʋgẽ ye. La fo ka tog n yeelg fuug sẽn wʋg ne gĩs buud a yiib ye. 
Leviticus19:20 Rao sã n gãand yem-poak b sẽn dag n dɩk n kõ ned t'a na n maan paga, tɩ b mik t'a soabã nan ka yaoo ligdã, wall a yem-poakã soaalã sã n nan ka kõ-a lohorem, bɩ b sɩbg-a soabã, la b ka tog n kʋ-b ye. Bala, yem-poakã nan ka paam lohorem ye."
