Leviticus19:21 La raoã tog n talla pe-raoog n wa ne sɛk roogã noore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ b maan paoosg maoong a beegrã sugr yĩnga." 
Leviticus19:22 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk beegr pe-raoogã n maan paoosg maoong a soabã yel-wẽnd yĩnga, la b na n kõo yẽnda sugr a beegrã yĩnga." 
Leviticus19:23 Yãmb sã n wa n tɩ kẽ tẽngã pʋga, n sel tɩɩs buud toor-toor sẽn womd biisi, bɩ y ges tɩ-biisã wa b sẽn ka kẽ bãongo. Yãmb tog n geelg-b-la a woto hal tɩ ta yʋʋm a tãabo, n ka tol n yãk-b n dɩ ye." 
Leviticus19:24 La yʋʋm a naasẽ yʋʋmdã, bɩ y yãgs b biisã fãa, la y maan tigr n welg-b toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus19:25 Yʋʋm a nu soabã tɛka, yãmb tõe n dɩɩ tɩɩsã biisi, la yãmb na n wobda tɩɩsã biis y meng sõngr yĩnga. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:26 Bɩ y ra rɩ rũng ne a zɩɩm ye. Bɩ y ra yɩ tɩ-rɩtba, la y ra yɩ bag-bʋgdb ye." 
Leviticus19:27 Bɩ y ra põng y zut gils-gils ye. Bɩ f ra põng f toɛɛng kɩrems ye. 
Leviticus19:28 Bɩ y ra bog y yĩnsã kũum yĩnga, la y ra gʋl y yĩnsã me ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus19:29 Ra modg f bi-pugl n kẽes yoob pʋga, n wa kɩt tɩ tẽngã nebã maan yoobo, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã pid ne yãn-tʋʋm ye." 
Leviticus19:30 Bɩ y sak mam vʋʋsg rayã, la y waoog mam sɛk roogã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus19:31 Da wẽnemd-y n bao-y neb nins sẽn boond sɩɩse, wall bag-bʋgdb ye. Da bao-y nin-bãmbã rãmb n wa rẽgem y meng ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-saabo, n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:32 Bɩ y põond n waoog zoob-peend soaba, la y waoog nin-kẽema. Bɩ f zoe Wẽnnaam. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus19:33 Sãan sã n wa n be ne yãmb y tẽngã pʋga, bɩ y ra wẽg-a ye." 
Leviticus19:34 Bɩ y maan sãan sẽn be yãmb sʋkã neer wa yãmb sẽn maand tẽng-n-ned sẽn be yãmb sʋkã to-to wã. Bɩ f nong-a wa f menga, tɩ bala, yãmb me yɩɩ sãamb Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:35 Da maan-y tʋʋm-kɛg ye, sã n yaa bʋʋd zĩigẽ wall woglem makre wɛɛngẽ, sã n ka rẽ bɩ zɩslem makdg wɛɛngẽ, wall sã n yaa poɛɛm makr wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Leviticus19:36 Bɩ y tall makds sẽn yaa sõama, sã n yaa zɩslem makdga, kug makdga, wall poɛɛm-makdga. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga." 
Leviticus19:37 Bɩ y gũusi, n sak mam no-tũudsã ne m noyã n maan wa b sẽn yeelã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Leviticus20:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a 
Leviticus20:2 wilg Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Israyɛll nebã sʋk neda, wall sãan sẽn be yãmb sʋkã sã n dɩk a biig n kɩs tɩ b kõ Moloke, a soabã sɩbgr na n yɩɩ kũum. Tẽngã nebã tog n loba a soab ne kug t'a ki." 
Leviticus20:3 Mam na n kisga a soabã, la m na n yiisa a soabã a buudã sʋk n kɩt tɩ b kʋ, tɩ bala, yẽnda rɩka a biig n kɩs tɩ b kʋ n kõ Moloke, n kɩt tɩ mam sɛk roogã rẽgme, la a kɩt tɩ mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã paam paoogre." 
Leviticus20:4 Tẽngã nebã sã n yãk yam n mum b nin n bas ned ning sẽn dɩk-a a biig n kõ Molokã, la b sã n bas-a n ka kʋ," 
Leviticus20:5 mam meng n na n sɩbg a soabã, la m sɩbg a buudã, la mam na n yiisa a soabã a buudã sʋka, la mam na n yiisa neb nins fãa sẽn wẽnemd n bas maam n maan yoob ne a Molokã." 
Leviticus20:6 Ned sã n wẽnemd n bas maam n pʋʋs kɩɩmse, wall a bas n pʋg bagba, bõn-kãng wẽnda yoobo, la mam na n wẽnemdame n zab ne a soabã, la m na n yiis-a-la a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus20:7 Bɩ y yɩlg y mens n yɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba, bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa pʋ-peelem soaba." 
Leviticus20:8 Bɩ y sak mam tõodã, n sak n maan wa b sẽn wilgã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yaa maam n welg yãmb toore." 
Leviticus20:9 Ned sã n tʋʋs a ba, bɩ a ma, a soab sɩbgr tog n yɩɩ kũum. Yẽnda sẽn tʋʋs a ba wã bɩ a ma wã yĩnga, yẽnda zɩɩmã raagr taal be a meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:10 Ned sã n maan yoob ne pag sẽn tar sɩda, a sã n maan yoob ne a to paga, bɩ b kʋ pagã ne raoã sẽn yaa yoaadbã fãa." 
Leviticus20:11 Rao sã n kẽ ne a ba paga, n ning a ba wã yãnde, bɩ b kʋ raoã ne pagã, la bãmb zɩɩmã taal bee b meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:12 Rao sã n kẽ ne a bi-paga, bɩ b kʋ bãmb b yiibã fãa. Bãmb maana yel-beedo, dẽ bãmb zɩɩmã taal bee bãmb meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:13 Raop a yiib sã n gãand taab wa rao sẽn kẽed ne pag to-to wã, bãmb b yiibã fãa maana yel-beedo. Bãmb b yiibã fãa tog n kiime, la bãmb zɩɩmã taal be b meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:14 Rao sã n dɩk bi-pugl ne a ma n maan a pagba, yaa yãn-tʋʋmã. Bɩ b yõog raoã ne pagbã fãa bugum, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãn-tʋʋm-kãngã ra leb n zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye." 
Leviticus20:15 Rao sã n gãand rũnga, bɩ b kʋ a soabã, la b kʋ rũngã me." 
Leviticus20:16 Pag sã n dɩk a meng n kõ rũng t'a gãand-a, bɩ b kʋ pagã ne rũngã fãa. Bɩ y kʋ-ba, la b zɩɩmã taal bee b meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:17 Rao sã n peeg a tão-poaka, n kẽ ne-a, sã n yaa a ba-biig bɩ a ma-biiga, yaa yãnde. Bɩ b rig-b b tẽngã nebã fãa nifẽ n yiis b buudã sʋka. Bala, rao-kãng kẽe ne a tão, la a kongrã taal be a meng zugu." 
Leviticus20:18 Rao sã n peeg pag n kẽ ne-a a pekr wakate, n yãnd pagã zɩɩmã, tɩ pagã me yã zɩɩmã, bɩ b rig bãmb b yiibã fãa n yiis b buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus20:19 Bɩ f ra sak n kẽ ne f ma tão-poaka, wall ne f ba tão-poak ye. Bala, f maana yãnd ne f roagdba. Neb nins sẽn maan-b woto wã kongrã taal na n zĩnda b mens zutu." 
Leviticus20:20 Rao sã n kẽ ne a ba kẽem paga, bɩ a ba yao paga, bãmb yel-wẽndã taal na n zĩnda b meng zugu, la bãmb na n kiime n ka paam biig ye." 
Leviticus20:21 Ned sã n dɩk a ba-biig pag n maan a paga, a maana rẽgdo. Bãmb ka na n tol n paam kamb ye." 
Leviticus20:22 Bɩ y sak mam no-tũudsã fãa ne mam noyã fãa, la y ning-b b nao-kẽndr zugu, dẽ, tẽng ning mam sẽn na n tall yãmb n kẽng tɩ y tɩ zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã ka na n zãgs yãmb ye." 
Leviticus20:23 Bɩ y ra sak buud nins mam sẽn na n dig yãmb taoorã no-tũudsã ye. Bala, bãmb maana tʋʋm-be-kãensã fãa tɩ mam yamã yi-ba." 
Leviticus20:24 Mam yeela yãmb tɩ yaa yãmb n na n deeg tẽngã n sooge. Mam mengã n na n kõ yãmb tẽngã tɩ y sooge. Beenẽ yaa tẽng sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩdo. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn welg yãmb toor buud a taabã sʋka." 
Leviticus20:25 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ yãmb tog n bãng rũms nins sẽn yaa yɩlmã n welg ne rũms nins sẽn ya-b rẽgdã, la y bãng bõn-yɩgdɩ nins sẽn yaa rẽgdã n welg ne sẽn ya-b yɩlmã wã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb mensã ra lebg bõn-dẽgd rũm-bãmbã yĩnga, la ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, la ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã mam sẽn lebs kɛɛng n wilg-y tɩ b yaa rẽgdã yĩng ye." 
Leviticus20:26 Yãmb tog n yɩɩ pʋ-peelem dãmb mam yĩnga, bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa pʋ-peelem soaba. Mam welga yãmb toor buud a taabã sʋka, tɩ yãmb tõe n yɩ mam dẽnda." 
Leviticus20:27 Rao bɩ pag sã n tar pãn-tõog n tõe n bool kɩɩms wall a yaa baga, bɩ b kʋ-ba. B tog n loba bãmb ne kug tɩ b ki. La bãmb zɩɩmã taal na n zĩnda b meng zugu.»" 
Leviticus21:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yeel a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã yaa: ‹Maan-kʋʋd ka tog n sɩɩs a buudã ned kũum n dẽgem a meng ye. 
Leviticus21:2 Sã n ka tɩ mikame tɩ yaa a roagd meng-menga, rat n yeel t'a ma, a ba, a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugla, a kẽem bɩ a yao," 
Leviticus21:3 la a tão-poak sẽn nan ka bãng raoa, a sẽn dag n nan ka kẽ kãadmã, yẽnda tõe n sɩɩs-a lame, rao sẽn dag n nan ka so-a wã yĩnga. Yẽnda tõe n dẽgma a meng a tão-poakã yĩnga." 
Leviticus21:4 Maan-kʋʋdã sẽn yaa taoor soab a nebã sʋkã yĩnga, a ka tog n maan yaar n dẽgem a meng ye." 
Leviticus21:5 Maan-kʋʋdbã ka tog n põng b zug tẽn-sʋka, la b ka tog n kok b toɛɛnga, la b ka tog n bog b yĩngã ye." 
Leviticus21:6 Bãmb tog n yɩɩ pʋ-peelem dãmb b Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la b ra paoog b Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr ye. Bala, bãmb n wat ne rɩɩb kũun b Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, n maand maand sẽn yõogd bugum n kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb tog n yɩɩ pʋ-peelem dãmba." 
Leviticus21:7 Bãmb ka tog n peeg pʋg-yoodr bɩ bi-pugl sẽn sãam n maan b pag ye. B ka tog n dɩk pag a sɩd sẽn dig n bas n maan b pag ye. Bala, maan-kʋʋd yaa pʋ-peelem soab a Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Leviticus21:8 Bɩ y geelg maan-kʋʋd wa ned sẽn welg toore, bala, yaa yẽnda n kõt yãmb Wẽnnaamã kũunã. Yẽnda tog n yɩɩ pʋ-peelem soab fo yĩnga, bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa pʋ-peelem soaba, la yaa maam n kɩt tɩ yãmb yaa pʋ-peelem dãmba." 
Leviticus21:9 Maan-kʋʋd bi-pugl sã n maan yoob n dẽgem a menga, a paooga a ba. B tog n lob-a-la bugmẽ." 
Leviticus21:10 Maan-kʋʋd ning b sẽn pʋdg a zug kaam n dogl-a maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã, la b yeelg-a fu-welgdsã n kɩt t'a yaa a saam-biisã kãsmã ka tog n zũndg a zoobdo, la a ka tog n pãrs a fut me ye." 
Leviticus21:11 Maan-kʋʋr kãsmã ka tog n pẽneg kũum n dẽgem a meng ye, baa sã n yaa a ba bɩ a ma n ki." 
Leviticus21:12 Maan-kʋʋr kãsmã ka tog n yi sɛk roogã pʋg ye, la a ka tog n paoog yẽnda Wẽnnaamã sɛk roogã ye. Bala, b pʋdga yẽnda zug ne a Wẽnnaamã nug-tikr kaam n welg-a toore. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus21:13 Maan-kʋʋr kãsmã tog n peega pag sẽn nan ka bãng rao n maan a paga. 
Leviticus21:14 Yẽnda ka tog n dɩk pʋg-kõore, a ka tog n dɩk pag b sẽn digi, a ka tog n dɩk pʋg-yoodre, wall a rɩk bi-pugl sẽn sãam n maan a pag ye. La a tog n peega a buudã sʋk bi-pugl sẽn nan ka bãng rao n maan a paga." 
Leviticus21:15 Woto, maan-kʋʋr kãsmã ka na n dog kamb sẽn ka zems n kẽes a buudã sʋk ye. Bala, yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n welg yẽnda toore.»" 
Leviticus21:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis 
Leviticus21:17 t'a yeel a Aarõ yaa: «Fo yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl foomã sʋka, ned baa a yembr sẽn tar zang a yĩngã pʋg ka tog n kolg n na n dɩk a rɩɩb kũun n kõ a Wẽnnaamã ye." 
Leviticus21:18 Ned ning yĩng sẽn tar zang t'a ka tõe n kolg n kõ kũunã la woto: Yaa zoanga, woabga, wall ned yõor sẽn golme, wall a yĩngã wil a yembr sẽn yaa koɛɛg tɩ looge, wall will a yembr sẽn yaa wok tɩ looge." 
Leviticus21:19 Leb n yaa ned naoor bɩ a nug sẽn kaooge," 
Leviticus21:20 bɩ ned sẽn yaa yẽoogo, bɩ ned sẽn yaa wagre, la sẽn tar nin-bulga, wall sẽn tar rasempʋɩɩga, bɩ nod-kʋdre, sã n ka rẽ bɩ a yaa ned lan-biis sẽn pusi." 
Leviticus21:21 Maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ yagensã sʋka, ned sã n be beenẽ n tar zanga, a ka tog n kolg n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Yẽnda sẽn tar zangã yĩnga. Yẽnda ka tog n kolg n dɩk a rɩɩb kũunã n kõ a Wẽnnaamã ye." 
Leviticus21:22 Yẽnda tõe n yãka a Wẽnnaamã rɩɩb b sẽn kõ tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor wʋsgã, ne bũmb nins b sẽn welg toorã n dɩ." 
Leviticus21:23 La bũmb sẽn be yaa tɩ yẽnda ka tog n kolg fu-lillidgã, wall a kolg tẽn-kugrã ye. Yẽnda sẽn tar zang a yĩngẽ wã yĩnga. Bɩ yẽnda ra maan n paoog mam zĩ-sõngã ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn welg bãmb toore.»" 
Leviticus21:24 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka gom-kãens n togs a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la ne Israyɛll nebã fãa." 
Leviticus22:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus22:2 «Wilg a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã tɩ mam yeelame: ‹Gũus-y y mens ne kũun sẽn welg toorã Israyɛll nebã sẽn wat n kõt maamã n da wa paoog mam yʋʋrã ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› » 
Leviticus22:3 Bɩ f yeel-b yaa: «Zamaan woo zamaane, yãmb yagensã ned ning sẽn dat-a n kolg kũun ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, n yaool n be rẽgd pʋga, bɩ b yiis nin-kãng mam taoor n tɩ kʋ. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus22:4 A Aarõ yagensã sʋka, yĩn-gãong bãag bɩ taoor bãag sã n tar neda, a soabã tog n gũusame n da rɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã, hal t'a wa n lebg yɩlemde. A yaa woto me ne ned ning sẽn sɩɩs ned a to sẽn sɩɩs kũum n dẽgem a menga, wall a sẽn sɩɩs neda, a soab rogem bõn-buud koom sẽn daagd wakate," 
Leviticus22:5 wall ned sã n sɩɩs bõn-saagdg n dẽgem a menga, wall a sẽn sɩɩs ninsaal sẽn lebg rẽgdo, n dẽgem a menga." 
Leviticus22:6 Ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre. La yẽnda ka tog n dɩ kũun ning sẽn welg toorã ye, la a tog n soo koom," 
Leviticus22:7 la wĩntoogã kõom poore, a soabã na n yaool n lebga yɩlemde, la wakat-kãnga, a tõe n dɩɩ kũun ning sẽn welg toorã, bala, yaa yẽnda rɩɩbo." 
Leviticus22:8 Maan-kʋʋd ka tog n dɩ rũng sẽn ki a toore, wall rũng a to sẽn kʋ n dẽgem a meng ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus22:9 Bãmb tog n gũusa neer n sak mam tõogã n da wa paoog-a, tɩ yel-wẽnd lʋɩ b zug n kɩt tɩ b ki ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn welg bãmb toore." 
Leviticus22:10 Ned sã n ka maan-kʋʋda, a ka tog n dɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã ye. Nin-loaagdg sã n sig yãmba, wall yãmb sã n dɩk ned tʋʋmd n yaood-a, a soab ka tog n dɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã ye." 
Leviticus22:11 La maan-kʋʋdã sã n da yamb ne ligdi, yambã tõe n dɩɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã. Sẽn paase, yamb sẽn dog zakã pʋg me tõe n dɩɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã. Bãmb tõe n dɩɩme tɩ bala, yaa b soaal rɩɩbo." 
Leviticus22:12 Maan-kʋʋdã bi-pugl ning sẽn kẽ-a kãadem ne ned sẽn ka maan-kʋʋd ka tog n dɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã ye. 
Leviticus22:13 La sã n mikame tɩ maan-kʋʋdã bi-pugl yaa pʋg-kõore, wall a yaa pag a sɩd sẽn base, t'a ka tol n paam biiga, t'a lebg n wa be a ba wã zakẽ wa yẽnda sẽn dag n be beenẽ a pʋg-sademd wakatã, yẽnda tõe n dɩɩ a ba wã rɩɩbo. La ned sã n ka maan-kʋʋda, a ka tog n dɩ-a ye." 
Leviticus22:14 La ned sã n dɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã ne yĩdgu, bɩ a yao maan-kʋʋdã wa sẽn zems rɩɩbã yaoodo, la a paas yaoodã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a ye." 
Leviticus22:15 Maan-kʋʋdbã ka tog n maan yaar ne nebã kũun sẽn welg toorã bãmb sẽn yãk n na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ye. 
Leviticus22:16 Bãmb sã n bas tɩ Israyɛll nebã rɩ kũun sẽn welg toorã tɩ yaool n ka zemse, bãmb rogenda yell Israyɛll nebã zugu. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yaa maam n welg maan-kʋʋdbã toore.»" 
Leviticus22:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus22:18 «Gom ne a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, la ne Israyɛll nebã fãa n yeel-b yaa: Israyɛll ned bɩ sãan sẽn be Israyɛll tẽngã sã n dat n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sã n ka rẽ bɩ a sã n dat n pids a pʋlengo, wall sã n yaa yamleoog kũuni, baa sẽn yaa kũun ning fãa," 
Leviticus22:19 bɩ a bao rũm-daoog sẽn ka tar zang rũmsã sʋka, sã n yaa naafo, bɩ pesgo wall bʋʋga, tɩ mam yaool n sak n deege." 
Leviticus22:20 Bɩ y ra wa ne rũng sẽn tar zang n na n wa kõ maam ye. Bala, mam ka na n sak n deeg-a ye." 
Leviticus22:21 Ned sã n dat n wa ne rũm-bedr bɩ rũm-bil n maan zems-n-taar maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sã n yaa pʋleng pidsgu, wall sã n yaa yamleoog kũuni, tog n yɩɩ rũng sẽn ka tol n tar zanga, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n deege. Rũngã ka tog n tar zang ye." 
Leviticus22:22 Yãmb ka tog n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rũng sẽn yaa zoanga, nao-fiuungu, sẽn pogle, wall sẽn tar nodre, wall burguudu bɩ nod-pags sẽn tar ye. Yãmb ka tog n dɩk rũng a woto n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã zug n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
Leviticus22:23 Fo tõe n dɩka loalg bɩ pe-ribl sẽn tar nao-wogd n maan yamleoog kũun maoongo, la b ka tõe n dɩk-a n maan pʋleng pidsg maoong ye." 
Leviticus22:24 Da rɩk-y rũng lan-biis sẽn pogle, wall sẽn kudi, sã n ka rẽ bɩ sẽn kɩsge, wall b sẽn fiuugi, n maan maoong y tẽngã pʋg n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
Leviticus22:25 Baa sãan sã n wa ne rũng a woto buud bɩ y ra reeg-a tɩ yɩ rɩɩb kũun yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩng ye. Bala, yaa rũng sẽn tar zanga, n ka sõama ye. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam ka na n sak n deeg yãmb kũun-kãng ye.»" 
Leviticus22:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus22:27 «Naafo, bɩ pesgo, wall bʋʋg sã n doge, b kambã tog n paa ne b ma wã rasem a yopoe. La rasem a nii wã tɛk n tar n dabdã, a tõe n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus22:28 Bɩ y ra kʋ nag-yãanga, pe-yãanga wall bʋ-yãang ne a biig daar a yembr ye." 
Leviticus22:29 Yãmb sã n na n maan maoong n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, bɩ y maan-a wa sẽn segde, tɩ bãmb deeg yãmba." 
Leviticus22:30 B tog n wãba rũngã nemd zãng maoongã daar bala, la b ka tog n bas-a t'a vẽeg beoog ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus22:31 Bɩ y sak mam tõodã, n maan wa b sẽn yeelã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus22:32 Bɩ y ra paoog mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã ye. Kɩt-y tɩ m yʋʋrã paam pẽgr Israyɛll nebã sʋka. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn welg yãmb toore," 
Leviticus22:33 la m yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã n na n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam. Mam yaa Sẽn-ka-Saabo.» 
Leviticus23:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus23:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Yãmb sã n na n maan tig-bɛdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, bɩ y maan-b tɩ b yɩ tigind sẽn welg toore. Ad mam tig-bɛdã la woto." 
Leviticus23:3 Yãmb tõe n tʋma rasem a yoobe, la rasem a yopoe wã daar na n welga toor n yɩ vʋʋsg daare, la yãmb ka tog n tʋm ye. Dẽ, yãmb sẽn na n zĩnd zĩig ninga fãa, a na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:4 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab tig-bɛda: Yaa yãmb sẽn na n tigim taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, wa sẽn zems wakat ning yãmb sẽn yãkã." 
Leviticus23:5 Pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daar zaabre, yãmb na n maana Pak tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:6 La kiuugã rasem piig la a yoobã daare, maan-y bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigr n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Rɩ-y bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã tigr rasem a yopoe tõre." 
Leviticus23:7 Bɩ y maan tiging sẽn welg toor tigrã pipi daarã, la y ra tʋm tʋʋmd ba a yembr ye." 
Leviticus23:8 Rasem a yopoe wã fãa pʋga, bɩ y wa ne kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. La rasem a yopoe wã daare, maan-y tiging sẽn welg toore, la y ka tog n tʋm badaar ye.› »" 
Leviticus23:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus23:10 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Yãmb sã n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ, n na n tigs y bõn-koaadlã, bɩ y yãk y koodã dẽenem biis ka-gĩn n wa kõ maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus23:11 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-a n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tɩ yɩ kũuni, tɩ bãmb tõe n deeg yãmb kũunã. Yaa vʋʋsg daarã vẽkembeoog la maan-kʋʋdã tog n yuum kũunã." 
Leviticus23:12 La yãmb sẽn na n yuum kũunã daare, bɩ y bao pe-ribl sẽn zems yʋʋmde, n ka tar zanga, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus23:13 La sẽn paase, yaa bõn-koaadl kũuni, la tog n yɩɩ zom-bãaneg wamde, sẽn nag ne kaam tɩ yɩ kũun sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yaa yũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n leb n paas reezẽ rãam litr a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Leviticus23:14 Yãmb ka tog n wãb buri, wall ka-sãrdɩ, bɩ ka-paala, hal tɩ ta daar ning yãmb sẽn na n yãk-a n kõ y Wẽnnaamã. Bõn-kãng yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga, la y sẽn na n tɩ zĩnd zĩig ning fãa, wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:15 Sẽn sɩng ne vʋʋsg dãarã vẽkembeoogo, daar ning yãmb sẽn na n tall ka-gĩnã n wa tɩ b yuuma, bɩ y sõd rasem pis-naas la a wɛ." 
Leviticus23:16 Bɩ y sõd rasem pis-nu sẽn yaa vʋʋsg daarã rasem a yopoeẽ soabã vẽkembeoogã, tɩ ra-kãng me yɩ tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n wa ne ka-paalg tɩ yɩ kũuni." 
Leviticus23:17 Yãmb sã n yit y zagsã pʋse, bɩ y zã bur a yiib sẽn na n kõ tɩ b yuume. Bur-kãens tog n yɩɩ bur sẽn maan ne zom-bãaneg sẽn ning rã-bɩll n kɩɩme. Rẽndã na n yɩɩ dẽenem biis kũun Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:18 Bũmb ning sẽn tog n paas burã, yaa tɩ yãmb tog n maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, ne pe-ribli a yopoe sẽn zems yʋʋmde, n ka tar zanga, ne lol-polle, la pe-raad a yiibu, n paas ne bãmb bõn-koaadl kũunã ne kũun ning b sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã." 
Leviticus23:19 Yãmb tog n kʋʋ boɛɛg yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la y maan zems-n-taar maoong ne pe-ribli a yiib sẽn zems yʋʋmde." 
Leviticus23:20 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdã reeg-b n yuum Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tɩ yɩ kũuni, n paas ne dẽenem biisã bur n kõ n naag ne pe-ribli a yiibã. Bɩ b rɩk-b n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdã rẽnda." 
Leviticus23:21 Badaar bala, bɩ y maan tigr Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Ra-kãng na n yɩɩ daar sẽn welg toore. Bɩ y ra maan tʋʋmd ba a yembr badaar ye. Yõwã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga, la zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n tɩ zĩndẽ." 
Leviticus23:22 Yãmb sã n wa n na n tigs y tẽngã koodã, bɩ y bas y pʋʋgã kɩreng n da tigs ye. La y ra wʋk bũmb ning sẽn kell tɩ b tõe n yiisã ye. Bɩ y bas rẽndã tɩ nimbãan-nebã ne sãambã paame. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.› »" 
Leviticus23:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus23:24 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Kiuug a yopoe soabã pipi daarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg yãmb yĩnga. Bɩ y tigim taab n tẽegd a yelle. Yaa tigr sẽn welg toore. 
Leviticus23:25 Badaare, bɩ y ra maan tʋʋmd ye. Maan-y maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Leviticus23:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus23:27 «Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piigã daare, na n yɩɩ yel-wẽnã sugr kosg daare. La yãmb tog n maana tiging sẽn welg toore, n loe noore, la y maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus23:28 Badaare, yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd ye. Bala, yaa yel-wẽnã sugr kosg daare. Dẽ, yãmb tog n maana bõn-kãng n yɩlg y meng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoore." 
Leviticus23:29 Ned ning fãa sẽn ka sika a meng badaare, b na n yiisa a soabã a nebã sʋka." 
Leviticus23:30 Ned ning sẽn na n tʋma tʋʋmd badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sãam a soabã a buudã sʋka." 
Leviticus23:31 Yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaane, la yãmb sẽn na n tɩ zĩnd zĩig ning fãa yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:32 Badaar na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daar yãmb yĩnga, yãmb sẽn tog n vʋʋse. La yãmb tog n loee noore. La sẽn sɩng ki-kãng rasem a wɛ wã daar zaabre, maan-y vʋʋsg daarã tigr n tɩ tãag vẽkembeoogã zaabr ning sẽn pʋgdã.»" 
Leviticus23:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus23:34 Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig la a nu daarã, bɩ y maan zãn tigri. La a na n yɩɩ rasem a yopoe tigri, Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:35 Tigrã pipi daarã na n yɩɩ tigin-kãseng sẽn welg toor daare. Bɩ y ra tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye. 
Leviticus23:36 Bɩ y rɩk rasem a yopoe tõre, n wa ne kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La a rasem a niiẽ wã daare, bɩ y maan tigin-kãseng sẽn welg toore, la y wa ne kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Badaar na n yɩɩ tigin-kãseng daare, dẽ, yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye." 
Leviticus23:37 Ade, tigin-bãmbã n yaa tig Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Yaa tigind yãmb sẽn na n tigim nebã, tɩ yaa tigind sẽn welg toore, n wa ne kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum, ne maand sẽn yõogd bugum, la bõn-koaadl kũuni, ne maand a taaba, la bõn-yũudl kũuni, wa sẽn zems noor ning b sẽn kõ daar fãa yĩngã wɛɛngẽ." 
Leviticus23:38 Sẽn paas Sẽn-Ka-Saab vʋʋsg rayã, yãmb tog n waa ne y kũunã, la y pʋleng pidsg kũunã, ne y yamleoog kũunã fãa, n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus23:39 Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, yãmb sã n dɩk y tẽngã bõn-koaadlã, bɩ y maan tigr n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab rasem a yopoe. Pipi daarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsgo, la rasem a niiẽ daarã me na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare." 
Leviticus23:40 Pipi daarã, bɩ y bao tɩ-sõama wã biisi, ne koms vãado, tɩɩs wil sẽn tar vãado, ne ko-soodã noor yɩlsã, n tall-b n maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor rasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus23:41 Yʋʋmd fãa yãmb tog n maana tig-kãngã n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab rasem a yopoe. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaane. Bɩ y maan tig-kãngã kiuug a yopoe soabã pʋga." 
Leviticus23:42 Yãmb tog n zĩnda sẽgd pʋs rasem a yopoe. Ned ning fãa sẽn yaa-a Israyɛll tẽngã neda, a tog n zĩnda sẽgd pʋse." 
Leviticus23:43 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb yagensã fãa tõog n bãng tɩ mam sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã poore, mam kɩtame tɩ b zĩnd sẽgd pʋse. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Leviticus23:44 Yaa woto la a Moyiis gom ne Israyɛll nebã, n wilg-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab tig-kãsemsã." 
Leviticus24:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus24:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b tall oliiv kaam bãmb sẽn wõd n wa kõ foom, tɩ f ning fɩtlã tɩ vẽenem zĩnd daar fãa." 
Leviticus24:3 A Aarõ tog n ninga fɩtl-dãmbã sɛk roogã pʋg n pẽneg fu-lillidgã sẽn lill kaoolã koglgã. La a tog n yõgen-b-la zaabr fãa tɩ b be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n wit hal tɩ ta yibeoogo. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga." 
Leviticus24:4 A Aarõ tog n dɩka fɩtl-dãmbã n dogl sãnem halaal fɩtl-dogendsã zut tɩ b wit Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor daar fãa.» 
Leviticus24:5 «Bɩ f bao zom-bãaneg n maan bur-maas piig la a yiibu, bur-maasr fãa tog n yɩɩ wũmbl a yembre." 
Leviticus24:6 Bɩ f rɩk-b n tong taab sãnem taablã zugu, rulg a yiibu, yoob-yoobe, Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Leviticus24:7 Bɩ f rɩk wisd zom-bãaneg n yugl rulg fãa zugu, zomã tog n zĩnda maasã zug tɩ yɩ tẽegre, la kũun b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus24:8 Vʋʋsg daar fãa, bɩ b ning bur-kãens Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. B tog n yãka bõn-kãng Israyɛll nebã sẽn so wã pʋga. Yõwã yaa kaool sẽn paad wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
Leviticus24:9 Bõn-kãng na n yɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rẽnda, la bãmb tog n dɩ-a-la zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋga, tɩ bala, kũun sẽn welg toor wʋsgã b sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩngã sʋka, bur-kãens n na n yɩɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã pʋɩɩre. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta.»" 
Leviticus24:10 Daar a yembre, Israyɛll neb a yiib n zab taab sik zĩigã pʋga. La a yembrã ma yaa Israyɛll bi-pugla, t'a baaba wã yaa Ezɩpt tẽng raoa. Bãmb dag n wa n kẽeda Israyɛll nebã sʋka." 
Leviticus24:11 Israyɛll bi-pugl-kãng biigã tʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n paoog b yʋʋrã. La b tall-a lame n kẽng a Moyiis nengẽ. Bi-kãng ma wã yʋʋr boondame t'a Selomiti, n yaa a Dibri bi-pugla, n yaa Dan buudã neda." 
Leviticus24:12 B baoo zĩig n tɩ ning-a, n gũudẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng noor gomd wilg yellã sẽn na n yɩ a soaba." 
Leviticus24:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus24:14 «Kɩt tɩ b yiis ned ning sẽn tʋʋs-a maamã sik zĩigã pʋga, la bɩ y kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn wʋm tʋʋsgã rɩk b nusã n tik a zugã, tɩ nebã fãa lob-a ne kug t'a ki." 
Leviticus24:15 Ad fo sẽn na n yeel Israyɛll nebã to-to: ‹Ned sã n paoog a Wẽnnaamã, a yel-wẽndã taal na n zĩnda a meng zugu." 
Leviticus24:16 Ned ning sẽn na n tʋʋs-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, a sɩbgr na n yɩɩ kũum. Nebã fãa na n lob-a-la kug t'a ki. Ba a sã n yaa sãana, wall tẽng-n-neda, a soabã sẽn tʋʋs Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã yĩnga, a tog n kiime." 
Leviticus24:17 Ned sã n wẽ ninsaal n kʋ, bɩ b kʋ a soabã." 
Leviticus24:18 Ned sã n wẽ a to rũng n kʋ, bɩ a bao rũng n lebse." 
Leviticus24:19 Ned sã n pogl a to, bɩ b pogl a soab pogl-kãng buud n lebse." 
Leviticus24:20 Sã n yaa kaoobo, bɩ b kaoog n lebse, la nifu, nif yĩnga, la yẽnde, yẽnd yĩnga. Poglg ning a soabã sẽn pogl a to wã, b na n pogl-a-la pogl-kãng n lebse." 
Leviticus24:21 Ned sã n wẽ a to rũng n kʋ, bɩ a bao rũng n lebse, la sã n yaa ned n wẽ a to n kʋ, bɩ b kʋ a soabã." 
Leviticus24:22 Tõogã tog n yɩɩ a yembr nebã fãa yĩnga, sã n yaa sãana wall tẽng-n-neda. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Leviticus24:23 A Moyiis rɩka koe-kãens n taas Israyɛll nebã. La b yiisa sẽn tʋʋs-a wã sik zĩigã yɩng n lob kug n kʋ. Israyɛll nebã maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. 
Leviticus25:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis Sinayi tãngã zug yaa: 
Leviticus25:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n wilg-b tɩ b sã n wa n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ bãmbã pʋgẽ, bɩ b bas tẽn-gãongã t'a vʋʋse, tɩ rẽndã yɩ vʋʋsgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus25:3 Yãmb tõe n bʋda y pʋtã yʋʋm a yoobã pʋga, la y yos y reezẽ tɩɩse, la y wob b biisã yʋʋm a yoobã pʋse." 
Leviticus25:4 La yʋʋm a yopoeẽ soabã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg yʋʋmde, tɩ y bas tẽn-gãongã t'a vʋʋse. Rẽndã yaa vʋʋsgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga. Yʋʋm-kãnga, yãmb ka tog n bʋd y pʋtã, la y ka tog n yos y reezẽ tɩɩsã ye." 
Leviticus25:5 Yãmb ka tog n tigs ka-yogd sẽn yi wã biisi, la y ka tog n wob y reezẽ tɩɩsã y sẽn ka yosã biis me ye. Bala, yaa vʋʋsg yʋʋmde. Yʋʋm-kãng yaa tẽn-gãongã vʋʋsg yʋʋmde." 
Leviticus25:6 Bũmb ning sẽn na n yi weoogã pʋg vʋʋsg yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ wã n na n dɩlg yãmb ne y yem-daadã, la y yem-pogsã, ne y tʋmtʋmdbã y sẽn dɩk n yaood-b ligdã, la ne nin-loogds nins sẽn yaa sãamb n be ne yãmbã," 
Leviticus25:7 n paas ne yãmb rũmsã ne we-rũmsã sẽn be yãmb tẽngẽ wã. Bõn-kãng biisã fãa n na n yɩɩ b rɩɩbo.» 
Leviticus25:8 «Bɩ y sõd vʋʋsg yʋʋm a yopoe-poe naoor a yopoe, sẽn dat n togs tɩ yʋʋm pis-naas la a wɛ." 
Leviticus25:9 Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piigã daar sẽn yaa yel-wẽnã sugr kosg daarã, bɩ y kɩt tɩ b peeb baorg ne pãnga, bɩ y peeb baorgã t'a rãamdã ta yãmb tẽngã tɛk fãa pʋga." 
Leviticus25:10 La bɩ y welg yʋʋmd pis-nu yʋʋmdã toore, n moon lohorem tõog yãmb tẽngã pʋga, nebã fãa yĩnga. Yʋʋm-kãng na n yɩɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmd yãmb yĩnga. La yãmb ned kam fãa na n leb n sooga a pʋto, la a lebg n leb a meng nebẽ." 
Leviticus25:11 Yʋʋm pis-nu yʋʋmdã na n yɩɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmd yãmb yĩnga. Yãmb ka tog n bʋde, la y ka tog n tigs bõn-koaadl ning sẽn yi a toor pʋtã pʋsã biisi, la y ka tog n wob reezẽ tɩɩsã y sẽn ka yosã biis ye." 
Leviticus25:12 Bala, yʋʋm-kãng yaa kɩdeng yʋʋmde. Bɩ y welg yʋʋm-kãng toore. Bɩ y rɩ pʋtã biisi." 
Leviticus25:13 Kɩdeng yʋʋmdã pʋga, yãmb ned kam fãa tog n leb n deega a sẽn dag n so." 
Leviticus25:14 Yãmb sã n na n koos bũmb ne y saam-biiga, wall y sã n dat n da bũmb a nengẽ, bɩ y ra wẽg-a ye." 
Leviticus25:15 Yãmb sã n dat n da y saam-biig bũmbu, bɩ y sõd n bãng kɩdeng yʋʋmdã sẽn loog yʋʋm sõore. La a tog n sõda yʋʋm sõor sẽn ket tɩ kɩdengã yʋʋmd ta wã n yaool n koos ne foom." 
Leviticus25:16 Yʋʋmã sõor sã n keta wʋsgo, bɩ f yao wʋsgo. La yʋʋmã sõor sã n ket bilfu, bɩ f yao bilfu. Bala, yaa bõn-bɩʋʋngã sasa sõor la a geend n yaool n koos ne foom." 
Leviticus25:17 Bɩ yãmb ned ba a yembr da wẽg a ba-biig ye, bɩ y zoe yãmb Wẽnnaamã. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus25:18 Bɩ y sak m tõodã, ne m noyã, la y maan wa b sẽn yeelã. Dẽ, yãmb na n zĩnda y tẽngã pʋg ne bãane." 
Leviticus25:19 Yãmb tẽngã bõn-koaadl na n woma biisi, la yãmb na n dɩɩ n tɩgame, la y na n zĩnda beenẽ ne bãane." 
Leviticus25:20 Yãmb sã n sokdẽ: ‹Yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋga, tõnd na n dɩɩ bõe, tɩ tõnd yaool n ka bʋtẽ, la d ka tigsdẽ?" 
Leviticus25:21 Yʋʋm a yoobã pʋga, mam na n ninga yãmb barka, n kɩt tɩ bõn-koaadlã wom yʋʋm a tãab koodo." 
Leviticus25:22 La yʋʋm a nii yʋʋmdã pʋga, yãmb na n bʋdame, la y na n kell n dɩ y ka-kʋdgã n tɩ tãag yʋʋm a wɛ wã pʋga. Yãmb na n dɩɩ ka-kʋdgã hal tɩ ta bõn-bɩʋʋngo." 
Leviticus25:23 Yãmb ka tog n koos pʋʋg tɩ b soog-a wakat fãa yĩng ye. Bala, tẽn-gãongã yaa maam n so, tɩ bala, yãmb bee mam nengẽ wa sãamba, la wa kaoos-weto." 
Leviticus25:24 Dẽ wã, bɩ y zĩnig tõog tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã fãa pʋgẽ, n wilgdẽ tɩ ned sã n koos a pʋʋgo, a tõe n leb n yao n deeg-a lame." 
Leviticus25:25 Naong sã n yõk yãmb ba-biiga, t'a yãk a pʋʋg n koose, yẽnda buudã ned sẽn yaa a meng roagd tõe n wa yaoome n deeg a ba-biigã pʋʋgã a sẽn koosã." 
Leviticus25:26 La sã n mik t'a ka tar ned a buudã sʋk sẽn tõe n yao n deege, tɩ yaa yẽnda mengã n na n yao n deege," 
Leviticus25:27 bɩ a sõd yʋʋm nins sẽn loog pʋʋgã koosg zugẽ wã, la a yao sẽn da-a pʋʋgã ligdã n dogl yõodo, la a leb n soog a pʋʋgã." 
Leviticus25:28 La sã n mikame tɩ yẽnda ka tar bũmb n na n yao n deege, pʋʋgã na n kell n paa raadã nugẽ n tãag kɩdeng yʋʋmdã. La kɩdeng yʋʋmdã pʋga, pʋʋgã na n leb n lebga a soabã rẽnda." 
Leviticus25:29 Ned sã n dɩk a zag-gãadg sẽn be tẽng sẽn gũbg ne lals pʋg n koose, yẽnda tog n basame tɩ ta yʋʋmd t'a yaool n yao n deeg a zakã. Yaa yʋʋmd a yembrã poor la yẽnda tõe n yao n deeg a zakã." 
Leviticus25:30 La b sã n ka tõog n yao n deeg zakã sẽn be tẽng sẽn tar lalsã pʋgã, n bas tɩ yʋʋmdã pidsi, zakã na n lebga ned ning sẽn da-a wã ne a yagensã rẽnd wakat fãa. La baa kɩdeng yʋʋmdã sã n ta, a ka na n leb n lebs-a ye." 
Leviticus25:31 La sã n yaa ne zags nins sẽn be tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn ka tar-b lalsã pʋsẽ wã, b tog n maana bãmb wa b sẽn maand pʋtã to-to wã. B tõe n leb n yaoome n deeg-a, la kɩdeng yʋʋmdã sã n ta, bɩ sẽn da-a zakã lebs zakã a soaba." 
Leviticus25:32 La sã n yaa ne Leevi buudã tẽmsã, ne zags nins sẽn yaa bãmb rẽndã, Leevi buudã tara noor wakat fãa tɩ leb n yao n deeg-ba." 
Leviticus25:33 Baa sã n yaa Leevi buudã ned n da zakã, kɩdengã yʋʋmd sã n ta, bɩ a yi n bas zakã, wall tẽngã yẽnda sẽn dag n so wã, tɩ bala, Leevi buudã zagsã ne tẽmsã sẽn be Israyɛll nebã sʋkã, yaa b soolem." 
Leviticus25:34 La b ka tog n dɩk pʋt nins sẽn pẽ bãmb tẽmsã n koos ye. Bala, rẽndã na n yɩɩ bãmb soolem wakat fãa yĩnga.»" 
Leviticus25:35 «Fo ba-biig sẽn be ne foom, sã n wa lebg naong soaba, n ka tar bũmb n na n yao foom f samde, bɩ f sõng-a, baa sã n yaa sãana wall nin-loaagdga, bɩ f sõng-a t'a tõog n kell n vɩɩmde." 
Leviticus25:36 Bɩ f ra sõng-a n bao yõodo, wall bũmb roagleng ye. Zoe fo Wẽnnaamã, tɩ f ba-biigã tõe n vɩɩmd ne-fo." 
Leviticus25:37 Bɩ f ra peng-a ligd n baood yõod ye, la f ra kõ-a rɩɩb n baood bũmb a to ye." 
Leviticus25:38 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Maam n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tenga, n wa kõ yãmb Kana tẽngã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n kell n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus25:39 Naong sã n yõk f ba-biig sẽn be ne foomã, t'a rɩk a mengã n koos ne foom, bɩ f ra kẽes-a yembd tʋʋmdẽ ye." 
Leviticus25:40 Yẽnda tog n bee ne foom wa tʋmtʋmd sẽn dɩkd yaoodo, la wa nin-loaagdga. Yẽnda tog n tʋm n kõo foom hal tɩ ta kɩdeng yʋʋmdã." 
Leviticus25:41 Wakat-kãnga, fo tog n basa yẽnda ne a kambã tɩ b yi n lebg n leb b nebẽ, la b mengã yaab-rãmb soolem pʋgẽ." 
Leviticus25:42 Bala, Israyɛll nebã yaa mam tʋmtʋmdb mam sẽn yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã. B ka tog n koos bãmb wa b sẽn koosd yembs ye." 
Leviticus25:43 Fo ka tog n soog yẽnda ne pãng ye. Bɩ f zoe fo Wẽnnaamã. 
Leviticus25:44 Yaa soolem nins sẽn gũbg yãmbã pʋs la yãmb tog n tɩ yãk y yem-daoogo, wall y yem-poaka, tɩ b yɩ yãmb rẽnda. Yaa soolem-kãens pʋs la yãmb tog n kẽng n tɩ ra y yem-daoog bɩ y yem-poaka." 
Leviticus25:45 Yãmb tõeeme me n da sãambã sẽn be yãmb nengẽ wã kamba, wall buud nins sẽn be yãmb tẽngẽ wã kambã sẽn dog-b rãmbã. Bãmb na n yɩɩ yãmb n so." 
Leviticus25:46 Yãmb tog n dɩka bãmb tɩ b yɩ yãmb kambã sẽn na n pʋgl yãmbã rogem-pʋɩɩre, n yaa b soolem. Yãmb na n kell n talla bãmb tɩ b yɩ yãmb yembs wakat fãa yĩnga. La sã n yaa sẽn kẽed ne yãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã wɛɛngẽ, yãmb ned ba a yembr ka tog n soog a ba-biig ne pãng ye." 
Leviticus25:47 Sãana, bɩ nin-loaagdg sẽn be yãmb sʋkã sã n yaa rakãagre, tɩ naong yõk yãmb saam-biig sẽn be ne-a, t'a koos a meng ne sãanã, wall ne nin-loaagdgã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, wall ne sãanã buud neda," 
Leviticus25:48 b tõe n kell n yaoome n deeg-a, baa ne a sẽn koos a mengã. Yẽnda ba-biig tõe n yao n deeg-a lame." 
Leviticus25:49 A ba wã yao bɩ a ba wã yao biiga, sã n ka rẽ bɩ a buudã ned tõe n yaoome n deeg-a. Wall sã n yaa yẽnda mengã n tar pãn-tõogo, a yao n deeg a menga." 
Leviticus25:50 Bɩ yẽnda ne ned ning sẽn da-a yẽnda wã sõd yʋʋmã sõore, sẽn sɩng ne yʋʋmd ning yẽnda sẽn koos a mengã, n tãag kɩdeng yʋʋmdã n bãng a sõore. La bɩ a yao wa sẽn zems yʋʋmã sõor sẽn yaa to-to wã. La b tog n geelga yaoodã tɩ zems wa b sẽn tog n yao tʋmtʋmd to-to wã." 
Leviticus25:51 La sã n mikame tɩ yaa yʋʋm wʋsg n ket tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã yaool n ta, bɩ a yao wa sẽn zems sẽn da-a yẽnda wã ligd-raadgã." 
Leviticus25:52 La sã n mikame tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã ka leb n zãra, bɩ b geelg yʋʋmã sõor n yao wa sẽn zems yʋʋm-kãens sẽn ketã." 
Leviticus25:53 Yʋʋmd fãa yaood na n zemsa tʋmtʋmd sẽn tʋmd ned nengẽ yaoodo, la y ra sak n bas tɩ b soog y ba-biigã ne pãng tɩ y getẽ ye." 
Leviticus25:54 La sã n wa n mik tɩ yõwã fãa pʋga, b ka tõog n yao n deeg y ba-biigã, bɩ a bas tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã sã n ta, bɩ a peeg a kambã tɩ b tũ yẽnda n yi.»" 
Leviticus25:55 «Bala, Israyɛll nebã yaa mam yembse. Bãmb yaa mam tʋmtʋmdb mam sẽn yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Leviticus26:1 Ra maan-y wẽn-naands ye. Ra maan-y bõn-naands n kõ y mense, wall y vigl kug bɩ raad y tẽngã pʋga, n wõgemd n waoog-b ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus26:2 Bɩ y sak mam vʋʋsg rayã, la y waoog mam sɛk roogã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus26:3 Yãmb sã n sak mam noyã, la y sak mam tõodã n maan wa b sẽn yeelã," 
Leviticus26:4 mam na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni yãmb wa sẽn zems a wakate, la y koodã na n womame, la tɩɩsã sẽn be weoogẽ wã na n woma biisi." 
Leviticus26:5 La yãmb na n pãba kood hal tɩ ta tɩɩs wobr wakate, la y na n woba tɩɩs hal tɩ ta bʋdb wakate. Yãmb na n paama rɩɩb tɩ sek yãmba, la y na n zĩnda y tẽngã pʋg ne bãane." 
Leviticus26:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd y tẽngã pʋga, la yãmb na n gãandame n gũs tɩ ned ka kẽes yãmb dabeem ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ we-rũm-wẽnsã menem n bas yãmb tẽngã. La zabr kõn tol n zĩnd yãmb tẽngẽ wã ye." 
Leviticus26:7 Yãmb na n diga y bɛɛbã, n kɛ-b ne sʋʋs n kʋ." 
Leviticus26:8 Yãmb neb a nu na n diga bãmb neb koabga, la yãmb neb koabg na n diga bãmb neb tus-piiga. La yãmb na n tõoga y bɛɛbã ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Leviticus26:9 Mam na n wẽnemd n gesa yãmb yelle, la m na n kɩtame tɩ y paam dogem, la m kɩt tɩ y lebg wʋsgo, la mam na n vigla m kaoolã ne yãmba." 
Leviticus26:10 Yãmb na n dɩɩ ka-kʋdgo, la y na n vaaga y ka-kʋdgã n yiis la y lebs ka-paalg n sui." 
Leviticus26:11 Mam na n tilga m yir yãmb sʋka, la mam ka na n kisg yãmb ye." 
Leviticus26:12 Mam na n kẽna yãmb sʋka, n kell n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam, tɩ yãmb yɩ mam nebã." 
Leviticus26:13 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã, tɩ yãmb kõn leb n yɩ bãmb yembs ye. Mam kaoo yãmb balgrã ra-tuiidsã, n kɩt tɩ yãmb kẽn ne zu-zẽkre." 
Leviticus26:14 La yãmb sã n ka kelg maam, la y sã n ka sak mam tõodã," 
Leviticus26:15 la y sã n kɩɩs mam noyã, la y kisg mam koeesã, la y sã n ka n sak mam tõodã fãa, la y sã n sãamd mam kaoolã," 
Leviticus26:16 ad mam sẽn na n maan yãmb bũmb ninga: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y namse, yãmb na n bẽeme n faag ne yĩn-wɩngre, la a na n kɩtame tɩ y nina pãng booge, tɩ y sũyã sãame. Yãmb na n namsa y meng n bʋd y koodã zaalem. Bala, yaa yãmb bɛɛbã n na n dɩ-a." 
Leviticus26:17 Mam na n wẽnemda m neng n bas yãmba, la yãmb bɛɛbã na n tõoga yãmba. Neb nins sẽn kis yãmbã na n sooga yãmba, la yãmb na n zoeeme tɩ ned ka rigd yãmb ye." 
Leviticus26:18 La baa ne rẽ fãa tɩ yãmb sã n kell n ka kelg maam, mam na n sɩbga yãmb naoor a yopoe n yɩɩda, y yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Leviticus26:19 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y sẽn tar pãng n wɩkdẽ wã sɛ, la m kɩt tɩ saagã lebg wa kutu, tɩ y tẽn-gãongã lebg wa zũudu." 
Leviticus26:20 Yãmb na n tʋmame tɩ y pãng sɛ zaalem. Yãmb tẽn-gãongã ka na n sak kood ye, la tẽngã tɩɩsã ka na n wom biis ye." 
Leviticus26:21 Yãmb sã n kɩɩs maam, n ka sak n kelg maam, mam na n sɩbg yãmb naoor a yopoe n yɩɩda, wa sẽn zems y yel-wẽnã." 
Leviticus26:22 Mam na n tʋma we-rũms tɩ b wa zab ne yãmba, n kʋ yãmb kambã, la b kʋ y rũmsã, la b kɩt tɩ y sõorã lebg bilfu. La yãmb soayã na n lebga vɩɩdo." 
Leviticus26:23 La baa ne woto fãa, tɩ yãmb sã n ka sak tɩ mam dems yãmba, la yãmb sã n kɩɩs maam," 
Leviticus26:24 mam me na n basa yãmba, la yãmb yel-wẽnã yĩnga, mam na n sɩbga yãmb naoor a yopoe n yɩɩda." 
Leviticus26:25 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wa zab ne yãmb ne sũ-dokr zabr sʋʋga, n dok kaoolã sũuri. Yãmb sã n zoe n tɩ tigim y tẽmsã pʋse, mam na n tʋma bã-loangdg yãmb sʋka, la m bas tɩ y bɛɛbã tõog-yã." 
Leviticus26:26 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kom kẽ yãmba, la pagb piig na n moee sag-rʋg-yɛng pʋga, la b na n talla rɩɩb bilf bal n wa kõ yãmba, la yãmb na n dɩɩme, la y ka na n tɩg ye." 
Leviticus26:27 Woto fãa pʋgẽ, tɩ yãmb sã n kell n ka kelg maam, la y ka sak maam," 
Leviticus26:28 mam me na n basa yãmb ne sũ-puugri, la yãmb yel-wẽnã yĩnga, mam na n sɩbga yãmb naoor a yopoe n yɩɩda." 
Leviticus26:29 Yãmb na n wãba y kom-dibli ne y kom-pugli nemdo. 
Leviticus26:30 Mam na n sãama yãmb maoong kʋʋb zĩisã, la m wã y wisd tẽn-kugã, la m wʋk y kũumã n dʋʋg wẽn-naan-kɩɩmsã zutu, la mam na n kisga yãmba." 
Leviticus26:31 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb tẽmsã lebg raboodo, la mam na n sãeega y pʋʋsgã zĩisi, la m ka na n leb n kok-y maandã yũ-noogã ye." 
Leviticus26:32 Yaa mam mengã n na n sãam tẽngã, la yãmb bɛɛbã sẽn na n wa zĩnd beenẽ wã na n yɛɛsame." 
Leviticus26:33 Mam na n sãeega yãmb n kẽes buud a taabã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b rig yãmb ne zabr sʋʋga. Yãmb soolmã na n wãame, tɩ y tẽmsã lebg raboodo." 
Leviticus26:34 Dẽ, wakat ning fãa yãmb sẽn zĩnd sãang pʋga, n be y bɛɛbã soolmẽ wã, yãmb tẽngã na n vʋʋsame. Vʋʋs-kãng yaa sẽn na n lebs vʋʋsg yʋʋmã sẽn ka tõog n yɩ wã." 
Leviticus26:35 Wakat ning fãa tẽngã sẽn lebg vɩʋʋgã, a na n vʋʋsame n lebs vʋʋsg yʋʋm nins a sẽn dag n ka paam n vʋʋs wakat ning yãmb sẽn wa n ket a pʋgẽ wã." 
Leviticus26:36 La yãmb neb nins sẽn na n kell n vɩɩmd b bɛɛbã tẽngẽ wã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ rabeem yõk-ba, la tɩɩg vão-koɛɛng bʋrg na n diga bãmba. Bãmb na n zoee wa b sẽn digd ned ne sʋʋga, la b na n lags n lʋɩɩme tɩ ned ka rigd-b ye." 
Leviticus26:37 Bãmb na n kanda taab n lʋɩt taab zutu, wa b sẽn digd ned ne zabr sʋʋga, tɩ ned yaool n ka rigd-b ye. Yãmb ka na n tõog n yals n zab ne y bɛɛbã ye." 
Leviticus26:38 La yãmb na n kii bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la yãmb bɛɛbã tẽng n na n dɩ yãmba." 
Leviticus26:39 La yãmb sʋkã neb nins sẽn na n põsã na n kii yãmb bɛɛbã tẽng pʋga, bãmb kongrã, ne b ba-rãmbã kongr yĩnga." 
Leviticus26:40 La nin-bãmb vẽneg n togsa bãmb kongrã, ne b ba-rãmbã kongr b sẽn maan n beeg maamã, la kɩɩsg ning bãmb sẽn kɩɩs maamã." 
Leviticus26:41 Yaa rẽ tɩ mam me bas-b n tall-b n tɩ kẽes b bɛɛbã tẽngẽ. Woto, bãmb kɩɩsgã yĩnga, b na n paama paoogre, n deeg b kongrã yaood sẽn yaa sɩbgre." 
Leviticus26:42 La mam na n leb n tẽega mam sẽn maan kaool ning ne a Zakoobã, la a Izakã, la ne a Abrahaamã yelle, la m tẽeg b tẽngã yelle." 
Leviticus26:43 La bãmb sẽn yi n bas tẽngã yĩnga, tẽngã na n vʋʋsame, a sẽn lebg vɩʋʋgã yĩnga. Bãmb na n paama b kongrã sɩbgre. Bala, bãmb kɩɩsa mam tõodã, la b kisga mam noyã." 
Leviticus26:44 La bãmb sẽn wat n be b bɛɛbã tẽngẽ wã wakate, mam ka na n bas-ba, la m ka na n kisg-b hal n sãam-b zãng ye. La m ka na n sãam kaoolã sẽn be maam ne bãmb sʋkã ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus26:45 Mam na n leb n tẽega pipi kaoolã yelle. Yaa kaool ning mam sẽn maan n yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ buud a taabã yãndã, la m lebg bãmb Wẽnnaamã. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Leviticus26:46 Ad yaa bõn-kãensã n yaa no-tũuds ninsi, ne noy ninsi, la tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vigl bãmb ne Israyɛll nebã sʋkã. Bãmb tũnuga a Moyiis n togs bõn-kãens Sinayi tãngã zugu." 
Leviticus27:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Leviticus27:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: ‹Ned sã n pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel t'a na n kõo ninsaala, bɩ a yao ligd sẽn zems b sẽn wilgã." 
Leviticus27:3 Sã n yaa rao sẽn zems yʋʋm pisi tɩ ta yʋʋm pis-yoob yaoodo, bɩ f geelg sẽn zems wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-nu n yao, wa sẽn zems sɛk roogã bõn-makdgã." 
Leviticus27:4 La sã n yaa paga, bɩ f geelg sẽn zems wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-tã n yao." 
Leviticus27:5 Yẽnda sẽn dɩk a soab n pʋlmã sã n yaa ned sẽn zems yʋʋm a nu tɩ ta yʋʋm pisi, bɩ f geelg sẽn zems wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pisi bi-ribl yĩnga, la wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piiga, bi-pugl yĩnga." 
Leviticus27:6 La a soabã sã n zemsa kiuug a yembre, n tɩ ta yʋʋm a nu, bɩ f geelg sẽn zems wanzuri wakɩ-koeems a nu, bi-ribl yĩnga, la wanzuri wakɩ-koeems a tãabo, bi-pugl yĩnga." 
Leviticus27:7 La sã n yaa ned sẽn tar yʋʋm pis-yoobe, bɩ sẽn yɩɩd woto, bɩ f geelg sẽn zems wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piig la a nu rao yĩnga, la wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piiga, pag yĩnga." 
Leviticus27:8 La sã n mikame tɩ ned ning sẽn maan-a pʋlengã yaa naong soab wʋsg n ka tar n na n yao wa sẽn zems gɛɛlã, bɩ b tall-a n kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ, la bɩ maan-kʋʋdã geelg n zems sẽn maan-a pʋlengã sẽn tõe n yao." 
Leviticus27:9 La sã n yaa rũng sẽn zems b sẽn tõe n dɩk n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, dẽ, b sẽn pʋlem rũng ningã fãa na n kell n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:10 B ka tog n tek rũngã, la b ka tog n dɩk rũm-sõngã n tek ne rũng sẽn ka sõama ye. B ka tõe n dɩk rũng sẽn ka sõama n tek ne rũm-sõng ye. B sã n dɩk rũng n tek ne a to, rũms a yiibã fãa na n lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:11 La sã n mikame tɩ rũngã yaa rũm-dẽgdo, tɩ b ka tõe n dɩk-a n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, baa sẽn yaa rũng ninga, bɩ a tall rũngã n kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ." 
Leviticus27:12 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges rũngã n wilg a sã n yaa rũm-sõng bɩ a ka rũm-sõngo, la a saag a ligdã, la maan-kʋʋdã sẽn yeel ligd ningã la b tog n yao." 
Leviticus27:13 La b sã n dat n leb n yao n deeg rũngã, bɩ b rogl yaoodã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembre, yaoodã zugu." 
Leviticus27:14 Ned sã n dɩk a roog n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã ges roogã n bãng a sã n yaa sõama wall ka sõama, n wilg a ligdã wa sẽn zems a sẽn yaa to-to wã, la roogã soab na n yaoo wa maan-kʋʋdã sẽn yeel bũmb ningã." 
Leviticus27:15 La roogã soab sã n dat n leb n yao n deeg a roogã, bɩ a rogl roogã ligd sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembre, yaoodã zugu. Dẽ, roogã na n leb n lebga yẽnda rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:16 Ned sã n dɩk a pʋʋg n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ f geelg t'a ligdã zems wa pʋʋgã kood waooglem sẽn yaa bũmb ningã. Kood konkong piig a la a nii la bɛk ligd segd n zemsa wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-nu." 
Leviticus27:17 Sã n yaa sẽn sɩng ne kɩdeng yʋʋmdã la yẽnda rɩk a pʋʋgã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ a yao wa sẽn zems fo sẽn geelg to-to wã." 
Leviticus27:18 La sã n mikame tɩ yaa kɩdeng yʋʋmdã poor la a rɩk a pʋʋgã n kõ, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã geelg ligdã tɩ zems yʋʋm sõor ning sẽn ket tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã yaool n ta wã, n boog-a tɩ zems fo sẽn geelg n wilgã." 
Leviticus27:19 Ned ning sẽn dɩk-a a pʋʋgã n kõ wã sã n dat n yao n leb n deeg a pʋʋgã, bɩ a rogl pʋʋgã yaood sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembr yaoodã zugu, la pʋʋgã na n kell n yɩɩ yẽnda rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:20 La yẽnda sã n ka yao n deeg a pʋʋgã, tɩ b rɩk-a n koos ne ned a to, b ka leb n tõe n yao n deeg-a ye." 
Leviticus27:21 Ned ning sẽn dag n da-a pʋʋgã sã n bas tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã ta, pʋ-kãng na n lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, n yaa pʋʋg sẽn welg toore. Yaa maan-kʋʋdã n so pʋ-kãnga." 
Leviticus27:22 La ned sã n da pʋʋgo, n dɩk-a n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yaool n ka yẽnda meng pʋʋgo," 
Leviticus27:23 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã geelg yʋʋm sõor ning sẽn ket tɩ kɩdeng yʋʋmdã ta wã, n wilg a sẽn geelã ligdi, n kɩt tɩ sẽn dɩk-a pʋʋgã n kõ wã yao. La yaa badaar bal la a tog n yao. Bala, lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:24 La kɩdeng yʋʋmdã sã n ta, bɩ b rɩk pʋʋgã n leb n lebs ned ning sẽn dag n koos-a wã. Bala, dag n yaa yẽnda pʋʋgo." 
Leviticus27:25 Gɛɛl buudã fãa tog n zemsa ne sɛk roogã magdgã. Wanzuri koɛɛng a yembr yaa wakɩy piiga. 
Leviticus27:26 Ned ka tõe n dɩk a rũng bi-rẽeng n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sã n yaa naafo wall pesgo, wall bʋʋg ye. Bala, bi-rẽeng fãa zoe n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:27 La sã n mikame tɩ yaa rũm-dẽgd bi-rẽenga, a soabã tõe n yaoo n deeg-a lame. La a tog n dogla rũngã yaood sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu yaood ning maan-kʋʋdã sẽn wilgã zugu. La a sã n ka tõog n yao n deeg-a, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã koos-a wa sẽn zems yaood ning yẽnda sẽn wilgã." 
Leviticus27:28 Bũmb ning fãa ned sẽn na n dɩk n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b sẽn dɩk n kõ tɩ lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, b ka tõe n koos-a wall b yao n deeg-a, baa sẽn yaa bũmb ning fãa. Sã n yaa ninsaala, rũnga wall pʋʋg sẽn yaa yẽnda soolem." 
Leviticus27:29 La b sã n dɩk ninsaal n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b ka tõe n yao n deeg-a ye. B tog n kʋ a soabã." 
Leviticus27:30 Bũmb sẽn be me, b tog n yãka tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadl biis piig pʋɩɩr n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Sã n yaa bũmb ning b sẽn bʋt tẽn-gãongã zugu, wall tɩɩsã biisi, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽndã. Bõn-kãng yaa bũmb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Leviticus27:31 Ned sã n dat n lebg n deeg a piig pʋɩɩrã bɛk n da, bɩ a soabã rogl yaoodã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembre." 
Leviticus27:32 La sẽn kẽed ne rũmsã piig pʋɩɩre, sã n yaa rũm-bãooneg wall rũm-bɛda, piig fãa pʋgẽ, a yembr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so. Yẽnda tog n tẽega rasaare, tɩ rũmsã fãa pɩʋʋgd rasaarã tẽngr n loogdẽ. La piigẽ soabã, a ningd-a-la bãnd t'a lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Leviticus27:33 La wakat-kãnga, rũmsã soab ka tog n tũusi, sã n yaa rũm-sõng bɩ rũm-dẽgd ye. Yẽnda sã n dɩk rũng a to n tek ne a to, bãmb b yiibã fãa na n lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, la a ka leb n tõe n yao n deeg ba a yembr ye.»" 
Leviticus27:34 Woto yaa tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiis Sinayi tãngã zug t'a kõ Israyɛll nebã. 
Numbers1:1 Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt soolmã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a yiib soabã pipi daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, Sinayi we-raoogẽ wã n yeele:" 
Numbers1:2 «Bɩ foom ne a Aarõ sõd Israyɛll nebã, n gʋls rao fãa ne a yʋʋre. Sõd-y bãmb roog-roogo, la zak-zaka." 
Numbers1:3 Bɩ y sõd Israyɛll raop nins fãa sẽn ta yʋʋm pisi, la sẽn yɩɩd woto, n tõe n yɩ Israyɛll tãb-biisã. Bɩ y sõd bãmb wa sẽn zems ned kam fãa ne a buudã tãb-sika." 
Numbers1:4 La buud fãa pʋgẽ, b na n yãka taoor soab a ye t'a sõng yãmba." 
Numbers1:5 Ad raop nins sẽn na n sõng-b yãmbã yʋya: A Rubɛn buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Sedewʋʋr biig a Elisʋʋre." 
Numbers1:6 A Simyõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Suurisadayi biig a Selumiyɛlle." 
Numbers1:7 A Zʋʋda buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Aminadaab biig a Nakõ." 
Numbers1:8 A Isakaar buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Suwaar biig a Netaneyɛlle." 
Numbers1:9 A Zabulõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Elõ biig a Elyaabe." 
Numbers1:10 Sã n yaa ne a Zosɛf kambã, Efrayiim buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Amiwuud biig a Elisama, t'a Manaase buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Pedasʋʋr biig a Gameliyɛlle." 
Numbers1:11 A Benzame buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Gidoni biig a Abidãn." 
Numbers1:12 A Dan buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Amisadayi biig a Ayiyezɛɛre." 
Numbers1:13 A Asɛɛr buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Okrã biig a Pagiyɛlle." 
Numbers1:14 A Gaad buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Dewuwɛll biig a Elyazafe." 
Numbers1:15 A Neftali buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Enan biig a Ayira.»" 
Numbers1:16 Yaa nin-bãmbã la b yãk Israyɛll buudã pʋgẽ, tɩ bãmb ned kam fãa na n yɩ a buudã taoor soaba. La leb n yaa bãmb n yaa Israyɛll buudã fãa tãb-biisã nanambse." 
Numbers1:17 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ peega raop nins yʋy b sẽn bool tʋʋm-kãng yĩnga. 
Numbers1:18 A Moyiis ne Aarõ tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa kiuug a yiib soabã pipi daare, n kɩt tɩ b sõd bãmb roog-roogo, ne zak-zaka, ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre, la yaa sẽn tar-b yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd dẽnda wã." 
Numbers1:19 A Moyiis kɩtame tɩ b sõd Israyɛll raopã Sinayi we-raoogẽ wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã." 
Numbers2:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Numbers2:2 «Israyɛll ned kam fãa tog n ti a fu-roog n yegl a buudã tãb-sikã, n pẽneg a buudã tãb-kaoorã. La bãmb tog n zãaga bilf n ti n gũbg sɛk roogã.»" 
Numbers2:3 Tãb-bi-sul nins sẽn gũbg Zʋʋda tãb-kaoorã tog n zĩnda yaanga. Dẽ, ad buud fãa ne a tãb-biis naaba:" 
Numbers2:4 Zʋʋda buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Aminadaab biig a Nakõ. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-yopoe la a naas la kobs-yoobe. 
Numbers2:5 La Isakaar buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Suwaar biig a Netaneyɛlle. 
Numbers2:6 Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-nu la a naas la kobs-naase. 
Numbers2:7 Sẽn pʋgd yaa Zabulõ. Yẽnda tãb-biisã naab yaa a Elõ biig a Elyaabe. 
Numbers2:8 A Zabulõ tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus-pis-nu la a yopoe la kobs-naase. 
Numbers2:9 Tãb-bi-sul nins sẽn gũbg Zʋʋda tãb-kaoorã yaa tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii la a yoob la kobs-naase. La yaa bãmb n na yɩ pipi n yiki. 
Numbers2:10 Nug-goabgã, yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg Rubɛn tãb-kaoorã n na n ti be. La Rubɛn buudã raop nins b sẽn sõd n yãk tɩ b na n yɩ tãb-biisã, b naab yaa a Sedewʋʋr biig a Elisʋʋre. Rubɛn buudã tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-naas la a yoob la kobs-nu. Sɩmyõ buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Suurisadayi biig a Selumiyɛlle. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-nu la a wɛ la kobs-tã. Gaad buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Rehuwɛll biig a Elyazafe. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-yoob la pis-nu." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12  
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16 Dẽ, tãb-bi-sul nins sẽn gũbg Rubɛn tãb-kaoorã yaa tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nu la a ye, la kobs-naas la pis-nu. La yaa bãmb n na n pʋgl pipi sullã." 
Numbers2:17 Sẽn pʋgde, yaa Leevi buudã n na n yik ne sɛk roogã n pʋgle. Dẽ, bãmb na n zĩnda sʋka. La sulã fãa me na n yikda pʋgdg-pʋgdg wa bãmb sẽn ti to-to wã, ned kam fãa ne a zĩiga la a tãb-kaoore." 
Numbers2:18 Nin-taoorã yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg a Efrayiim tãb-kaoorã n na n ti be. Efrayiim buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Amiwuud biig a Elisama. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-naas la kobs-nu. La Manaase buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Pedasʋʋr biig a Gameliyɛlle. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-tã la a yiib la kobs-yi. Benzame buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Gidoni biig a Abidãn. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-tã la a nu la kobs-naase. 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20  
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24 Dẽ, tãb-bi-sul nins sẽn gũbg a Efrayiim tãb-kaoorã yaa tãb-biis tus koabg la a nii la koabga. Bãmb n na n yɩ sull a tãabẽ soab n yiki." 
Numbers2:25 Nug-rɩtgã, yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg a Dan tãb-kaoorã n na n ti be. Dan buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Amisadayi biig a Ayiyezɛɛre. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-yoob la yiib la kobs-yopoe. A Asɛɛr buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Okrã biig a Pagiyɛlle. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-naas la a ye la kobs-nu. Neftali buudã tãb-biisã naab yaa a Enan biig a Ayira. Yẽnda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus pis-nu la a tãab la kobs-naase." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27  
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31 Dẽ, tãb-bi-sul nins sẽn gũbg Dan tãb-kaoorã yaa tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nu la a yopoe la kobs-yoobe. Bãmb n na n yɩ yaoolem n yiki. Sull fãa na n gũbga a tãb-kaoor n kẽnda." 
Numbers2:32 Israyɛll nebã fãa b sẽn sõd buud-buudu, la tãb-bi-sull-sullã fãa sõor yɩɩ neb tus kobs-yoob la a tã la kobs-nu la pis-nu." 
Numbers2:33 La bãmb maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã, n ka naag Leevi buudã ne Israyɛll buud a taabã n sõd ye." 
Numbers2:34 Israyɛll nebã kell maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg a Moyiisã. Tãb-bi-sull fãa dag n tiid n pẽnega a tãb-kaoore, la b yikrã wakate, b yikda buud-buudu, la roog-roogo." 
Numbers3:1 A Aarõ ne a Moyiis pendã neb la woto, wakat ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Moyiis Sinayi tãngã zugã." 
Numbers3:2 A Aarõ dag n tara kom-dibli a naase. Bi-kãsengã yʋʋr la a Nadaabe, la a taabã yʋy boondame t'a Abihu, a Eleyazaare, ne a Itamaare." 
Numbers3:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n welga bãmb toor tɩ b yɩ maan-kʋʋdba, la bãmb sɩnga b maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmde." 
Numbers3:4 La a Nadaab ne a Abihu kii zĩ-sõngẽ wã, Sinayi we-raoogã pʋga. Bala, bãmb talla bugum sẽn ka zems n wa n na n yõog kũunã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La bãmb ned ba a yembr dag n nan ka paam bi-ribl ye. Dẽ, yɩ a Eleyazaar ne a Itamaar bal n kell n naag b ba wã n maan maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmde." 
Numbers3:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers3:6 «Kɩt tɩ Israyɛll neb nins sẽn yaa Leevi buudã wa sõng maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ. 
Numbers3:7 Bãmb na n sõnga a Aarõ n maan b tʋʋmdã sɛk roogã noore, Israyɛll nebã fãa yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Numbers3:8 Bãmb na n gesa sɛk roogã teed fãa yelle, la bãmb n na n deega Israyɛll nebã zĩig n ges sɛk roogã tʋʋm yelle." 
Numbers3:9 Bɩ f rɩk Leevi buudã n kõ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, tɩ b tõe n sõng a Aarõ ne sɛk roogã tʋʋmde, Israyɛll nebã fãa yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Numbers3:10 Bɩ f bãng tɩ yaa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã bal n tog n maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã. La nin-zaalg sã n kolg be bɩ f kɩt tɩ b kʋ-a.» 
Numbers3:11 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers3:12 «Ade, yaa mam mengã n yãk Leevi buudã Israyɛll nebã sʋka, tɩ b tõe n led Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽemsã. La Leevi buudã na n yɩɩ mam dẽnda." 
Numbers3:13 Sɩd me, daar ning mam sẽn kʋ Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa wã, mam welga Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽems toor m mengã yĩnga, la bãmb rũmsã kom-dẽemsã fãa me yaa maam n so. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Numbers3:14 Sinayi weoogã pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa:" 
Numbers3:15 «Bɩ f sõd Leevi buudã nebã zak-zaka, la roog-roogo. Bɩ f sõd raopã fãa ne kom-dibli nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ.»" 
Numbers3:16 La a Moyiis sõda nebã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. 
Numbers3:17 A Leevi kom-dibli wã yaa a Gɛrsõ, a kehate, ne a Meraari." 
Numbers3:18 Ad a Gɛrsõ kambã yʋy wa sẽn zems b rotã. Yaa a Libni, ne a Sɩmeyi." 
Numbers3:19 Ad a kehat kambã yʋy wa sẽn zems b rotã. Yaa a Amram, ne a Yitseyaare, la a Ebrõ, ne a Uzɩyɛlle." 
Numbers3:20 Ad a Meraari kambã yʋy wa sẽn zems b rotã. Yaa a Mali ne a Musi. Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa a Leevi buudã neb b sẽn sõd roog-roogo, la zak-zakã." 
Numbers3:21 A Gɛrsõ yagensã pʋɩɩ rot a yiibu: yaa Libni roogã, la Sɩmeyi roogã." 
Numbers3:22 Gɛrsõ roogã neb nins b sẽn sõdã yaa neb tus a yopoe la kobs-nu. La yaa raopã ne kom-dibli nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd woto." 
Numbers3:23 Gɛrsõ yagensã ra tii nin-taoore, n be sɛk roogã kuidgẽ." 
Numbers3:24 A Layɛll biig a Elyazaf n dag n yaa Gɛrsõ nebã naaba. 
Numbers3:25 Ad bũmb nins yell Gɛrsõ yagensã sẽn dag n get sɛk roogã pʋgẽ: yaa sɛk roogã fuugu, a fu-pindgã, ne a gãn-luts a yiibã, la sɛk roogã noor peen-lillã." 
Numbers3:26 Bãmb n leb n dag n get sɛk roogã zak gũbgr pɛɛlã, ne zakã rignoor peen-lillã yelle, la ne wĩy nins sẽn na n tall n ti sɛk roogã tõrã yelle. La zakã gũbga sɛk roogã ne tẽn-kugrã, la yaa Gɛrsõ yagensã n dag n get bõn-kãens fãa yelle." 
Numbers3:27 A Kehat yagensã pʋɩɩ rot a naase: yaa Amram roogã, a Yitseyaar roogã, a Ebrõ roogã, ne a Uziyɛll roogã." 
Numbers3:28 Raopã ne kom-dibli nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã sõor yaa neb tus a nii la kobs-yoobe. Yaa bãmb n get sɛk roogã teed yelle." 
Numbers3:29 A Kehat yagensã rag n tii b fu-rotã sɛk roogã nug-goabga. 
Numbers3:30 Yaa a Uziyɛll biig a Elisafan n dag n yaa Kehat buudã naaba. 
Numbers3:31 A Kehat yagensã n da get kaoolã koglgã yelle, la b get taablã, ne fɩtl doagendgã, la tẽn-kug a yiibã, ne lagd nins fãa b sẽn tar n tʋmd zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ tʋʋmã, n paas ne peen-lillã sẽn lill zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã sɛk roogã pʋgã, ne a teed a taabã fãa yelle." 
Numbers3:32 Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar n dag n yaa Leevi buudã naaba. Yẽnda n dag n yaa neb nins fãa sẽn tʋmd zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ wã taoor soaba. 
Numbers3:33 A Meraari yagensã pʋɩɩ zĩis a yiibu: yaa Mali roogã, ne Musi roogã." 
Numbers3:34 Raopã ne kom-dibli nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽnda wã sõor yaa neb tus a yoob la kobs-yi." 
Numbers3:35 Yaa Abigayɩll biig a Suriyɛll n dag n yaa Meraari buudã naaba. Meraari buudã dag n tii b fu-rotã sɛk roogã nug-rɩtgo. 
Numbers3:36 Meraari buudã n dag n get sɛk roogã ra-pegdã, a ra-paadsã, ne a ra-lugdsã ne b tebendsã yelle, ne teed a taabã fãa yelle." 
Numbers3:37 Leb n yaa bãmb n get ra-lugds nins sẽn gũbg zakã ne b tebendsã yelle, ne biili wã ne b wĩyã fãa yelle." 
Numbers3:38 A Moyiisi, a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã rag n tii b fu-rotã yaanga, sɛk roogã neng taoore. Bãmb n dag n get sɛk roogã tʋʋm yelle, Israyɛll nebã yʋʋr yĩnga. La nin-zaalg sã n kolg be, b tog n kʋ-a lame." 
Numbers3:39 Leevi buudã raopã ne kom-dibli yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã fãa sõor yaa neb tus pisi la yiibu. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n kɩt t'a Moyiis ne a Aarõ sõd bãmb roog-roogo." 
Numbers3:40 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Sõd Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽems nins fãa sẽn ya-b raop yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã, n gʋls ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre." 
Numbers3:41 Bɩ f welg Leevi buudã neb toore, tɩ b yɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, n led Israyɛll kom-dẽems nins fãa sẽn yaa raopã zĩiga. La f welg Leevi buudã nebã rũms kom-dẽems me toor tɩ b yɩ mam dẽnda, n led Israyɛll nebã rũms kom-dẽems zĩigẽ.»" 
Numbers3:42 La a Moyiis sõda Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽems nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuug la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã." 
Numbers3:43 Dẽ, kom-dẽemsã b sẽn sõd n gʋls ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋrã sõor yaa neb tus pisi la a yiib la kobs-yi la pis-yopoe la a tãabo." 
Numbers3:44 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers3:45 «Bɩ f welg Leevi buudã neb toore, tɩ b yɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, n led Israyɛll kom-dẽems nins fãa sẽn yaa raopã zĩigẽ. La f welg Leevi roogã nebã rũms kom-dẽems me toor tɩ b yɩ mam dẽnda, n led Israyɛll nebã rũms kom-dẽems zĩigẽ." 
Numbers3:46 La Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽems kobs-yi la pis-yopoe la tãab n yɩɩd Leevi buudã neb sõore. Bɩ f kɩt tɩ b yao yaood nin-bãmb zĩigẽ. 
Numbers3:47 Bãmb ned kam fãa zugu, fo na n deega wakɩ-koeems a nu, t'a yembr fãa zɩslem tat garem piiga, wa ligd nins b sẽn tar n dɩt zĩ-sõngẽ wã." 
Numbers3:48 Bɩ f rɩk ligd-kãng n kõ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã. Rẽnda na n yɩɩ yaoodo, f sẽn yao neb nins sõor sẽn zʋʋg Leevi buudã neb sõorã yĩnga.»" 
Numbers3:49 A Moyiis reega ligd ning b sẽn yao neb nins sõor sẽn zʋʋg Leevi buudã neb sõorã yĩngã," 
Numbers3:50 la ligdã fãa sõor yɩɩ wakɩ-koeems tusr la kobs-tã la pis-yoob la a nu, wa ligd nins b sẽn tar n dɩt zĩ-sõngẽ wã." 
Numbers3:51 La a Moyiis rɩka ligdã n kõ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã." 
Numbers4:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Numbers4:2 «Sõdg-y Kehat yagensã sẽn be Leevi buudã neb sʋkã roog-roogo la zak-zaka, n gʋls b yʋyã. Yaa neb yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n tar n dabd pis-nu wã. Neb nins fãa sẽn tõe n maan tʋʋm sɛk roogã pʋgẽ." 
Numbers4:3  
Numbers4:4 Bãmb tʋʋmd yaa tɩ get teed nins b sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã yĩngã yelle. 
Numbers4:5 Israyɛll nebã sã n wa na n looge, bɩ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã yak peen-lillã sẽn lill zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã sɛk roogã pʋgã, n dɩk-a n pil kaoolã koglgã, kaoolã kug-wals sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã." 
Numbers4:6 La bãmb na n dɩka gãn-taokã, n lud koglgã zugu, la b rɩk peend sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-kẽeg haoo, n tẽeg n pil a fãa. La b rɩk ra-bɩlmã n tui a tuiidsẽ wã, tɩ b tõe n dɩk-a." 
Numbers4:7 La bɩ bãmb rɩk peend a to me sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-kẽeg haoo, n tẽeg n lud kaset burã taablã, n yaool n dogl laasã, wũmbli wã, ko-teesã, ne tʋgdã b sẽn tar n ningd reezẽ rãam kũunã yĩngã. La kaset burã ka tog n kong taablã zug ye." 
Numbers4:8 La bɩ bãmb dɩk peend sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-miuugu, n tẽeg n lud-a. La b rɩk gãn-taokã, n lud a zãngã, n yaool n dɩk ra-bɩlmã n tui taablã tuiidsẽ wã." 
Numbers4:9 Bɩ b rɩk peen-kẽeg haoo, n pil fɩtl doagendgã ne a fɩtl-dãmbã, la a teed a taabã fãa: Yaa yɩʋʋdã, bug-zẽen-laasã, la kaam tʋgdã." 
Numbers4:10 La bɩ b rɩk gãn-taokã, n lud a fãa, la b yaool n dɩk-a n dogl pãndar zugu." 
Numbers4:11 Bɩ b rɩk peen-kẽeg haoo n tẽeg n pil wisd yõogr sãnem tẽn-kugrã, la b lud a zugã ne gãn-taokã, n yaool n dɩk ra-bɩlmã n tui tẽn-kugrã tuiidsẽ wã." 
Numbers4:12 Rẽ fãa zugẽ, bɩ b rɩk teed nins fãa b sẽn tar n tʋmd zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ wã, n bao peen-kẽeg haoo n vil-ba, n dɩk gãn-taokã n lud-ba, la b yaool n tebg te-bãmb fãa n dogl pãndar zugu." 
Numbers4:13 Rẽ poore, bɩ b wʋk tompeglmã sẽn be zũud tẽn-kugrã b sẽn yõogd maoong a zugã, la b lebs peen-miuug n tɩʋ tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Numbers4:14 La bɩ b rɩk maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmã teed fãa n dogl a zugu: yaa wisd yõogr laasã, kõsdsã, pɛll-dãmba, ne laasã b sẽn tar n kokd zɩɩmã. La b rɩk gãn-taokã n lud b fãa, n yaool n dɩk ra-bɩlmã n tui tẽn-kugrã tuiidsẽ wã, tɩ b tõe n dɩk-a." 
Numbers4:15 La yikr fãa wakate, yaa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã n tog n deng n wa vil zĩ-sõngã teedã ne a te-tũudsã n sɛ, tɩ Kehat yagensã yaool n wa tʋk-ba. Bala, a Kehat yagensã ka tog n sɩɩs zĩ-sõngã teedã meng ye. B sã n sɩɩse, b na n kiime. Yaa a Kehat yagensã n na n tʋkd zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ teedã." 
Numbers4:16 La yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar n na n get fɩtl doagendgã kaam yelle, la wisdã sẽn na n yõogã, ne daar fãa bõn-koaadlã kũunã, la nug-tikr kaamã yelle. Yaa yẽnda n na n ges zĩ-sõngã ne a pʋgẽ teedã fãa yelle, sã n yaa teed nins sẽn welg toorã, la te-tũudsã.»" 
Numbers4:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Numbers4:18 «Bɩ y modg t'a Kehat yagensã ra wa menem zãng Leevi buudã sʋk ye. 
Numbers4:19 Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ning tɩ Kehat yagensã ra wa ki zĩ-sõngã teed yell gesg pʋgẽ ye: Bɩ foom a Aarõ ne f kom-dibli wã tall bãmb ned kam fãa n kẽng a zĩigẽ, n tɩ wilg-a a tʋʋmde, la teoog ning a sẽn tog n tʋke." 
Numbers4:20 Woto, bãmb ka na n tol n saag n kẽ n ges teed nins sẽn welg toorã, bala, yaa rẽnda n tõe n wa ne b kũum.»" 
Numbers4:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers4:22 «Bɩ f sõdg a Gɛrsõ yagensã me zak-zaka, la roog-roogo, n gʋls b yʋyã." 
Numbers4:23 Fo na n sõda neb nins yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã, n tar n dabd yʋʋm pis-nu wã. Yaa bãmb la b na n yãk tɩ b ges sɛk roogã pʋgẽ tʋʋm kẽer yelle." 
Numbers4:24 Ad a Gɛrsõ yagensã sẽn tog n maan tʋʋm ninsi: 
Numbers4:25 Bãmb n na n tʋkd sɛk roogã fuugu, a fu-pindgã, ne a gãn-luts a yiibã, la sɛk roogã noor peen-lillã." 
Numbers4:26 Leb n yaa bãmb n na n tʋkd sɛk roogã zak gũbgr pɛɛlã, ne zakã rignoor peen-lillã sẽn gũbg zĩ-sõngã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã, ne zakã gũbr wĩyã, la ne teed a taabã, la lagd nins b sẽn tar n maand b tʋʋmdã." 
Numbers4:27 Tʋʋm nins a Gɛrsõ yagensã sẽn tog n maana, yaa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã n tog n wilg bãmb b tʋʋmde. Yaa teedã tʋkre, ne tʋʋm nins fãa b sẽn tog n maanã." 
Numbers4:28 Gɛrsõ yagensã tʋʋm na n yɩɩ woto sɛk roogã pʋgẽ. La yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Itamaar n na n yɩ bãmb tʋʋmã taoor soaba.» 
Numbers4:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Bɩ f sõd a Meraari buudã nebã roog-roogo, la zak-zaka." 
Numbers4:30 Bɩ f sõd raop nins yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n tar n dabd pis-nu wã. B na n kõo bãmb tʋʋm kẽer sɛk roogã zak pʋgẽ. 
Numbers4:31 Ad tʋʋm nins bãmb sẽn tog n maan sɛk roogã zak pʋgẽ: Bãmb n na n tʋkd sɛk roogã ra-pegdã, a ra-paadsã, a ra-lugdsã ne b tebendsã," 
Numbers4:32 la ra-lugds nins fãa sẽn gũbg sɛk roogã zakã, ne b tebendsã, la b biili wã, ne wĩyã, la ne teed nins fãa bãmb sẽn tar n maand a tʋʋmdã. Bɩ maan-kʋʋdbã wilg bãmb ned kam fãa teed nins a sẽn tog n tʋke." 
Numbers4:33 Tʋʋmd ning a Meraari yagensã sẽn maand sɛk roogã zak pʋgẽ wã la woto. La yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Itamaar n yaa bãmb taoor soaba.» 
Numbers5:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers5:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yiis neb nins fãa sẽn yaa rẽgdã sik zĩigẽ wã: Yaa sẽn bẽed-b yĩn-gãong bãaga, bɩ sẽn tar-b taoor bãaga, wall sẽn sɩɩs-b kũumã." 
Numbers5:3 Yaa pag tɩ yaa raoa, bɩ y yiis b fãa sik zĩigẽ wã, tɩ b ra wa rẽgem sik zĩig ning pʋg mam sẽn be wã ye.»" 
Numbers5:4 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiisã. Bãmb yiisa neb nins fãa sẽn yaa rẽgdã sik zĩigẽ wã." 
Numbers5:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Pag bɩ rao sã n zuk a to bũmbu, yẽnda beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers5:6  
Numbers5:7 Bɩ yẽnda wa togs a kongrã, la a lebs bũmbã soab a bũmbu, la a bao bũmbã sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a nu pʋɩɩr a yembr n paase." 
Numbers5:8 La sã n mikame tɩ bũmbã soab kiime, tɩ ned ka be n na n deeg bũmbã, bɩ bɛɛgdã rɩk bũmbã n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yɩ maan-kʋʋdã rẽnda, la sẽn paase, bɛɛgdã tog n waa ne pe-raoogo, tɩ b maan maoongo, a beegrã yĩnga. Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã rɩkda rũngã n maan b paoosg tʋʋmdã, a soabã yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Numbers5:9 Kũun ning fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yãk Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng n tall n tɩ kɩs maan-kʋʋdã, yaa maan-kʋʋdã n so." 
Numbers5:10 Ned sã n wa ne kũun n na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maan-kʋʋdã la a kɩta. La ned sã n tall kũun n wa kõ maan-kʋʋdã, kũun-kãng yaa maan-kʋʋdã n so.»" 
Numbers5:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ pag sã n zãmb a sɩd n yo," 
Numbers5:12  
Numbers5:13 a paooga a menga, a sẽn soos n kẽ ne rao a to wã yĩnga. La bũmb tõeeme n ka n be n wilgdẽ tɩ yaa sɩda, la ned me ka yãnd-a a yoobã zĩigẽ ye." 
Numbers5:14 La sũ-kiir sã n yõk a sɩdã, t'a tagsdẽ t'a pagã rẽgma a menga, tɩ sũ-kiirã sẽn yõk a sɩdã yĩnga, a tagsdame t'a pagã yoome, tɩ yaool n ka sɩda," 
Numbers5:15 tɩ raoã baas n ket n sãmbd ne-a, bɩ a tall a pagã n kẽng maan-kʋʋdã nengẽ. La bɩ raoã tall kũun ning a sẽn tog n yao pagã yĩngã n wa ne. Yaa Oorz zom wũmbl a tãabo. La a ka tog n ning zomã kaam bɩ tɩdar ye. Bala, yaa sũ-kiir kũun b sẽn kõte, beegr tẽegr yĩnga." 
Numbers5:16 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kɩt tɩ pagã kẽng n tɩ yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. 
Numbers5:17 La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk yagd laag n toog koom ning sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, la a yõng sɛk roogã pʋgẽ tẽngã tom n ning koomẽ wã." 
Numbers5:18 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã na n kɩtame tɩ pagã yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, t'a zũndg pagã zoobdã, la a rɩk sũ-kiir kũunã sẽn yaa beegr tẽegr kũunã pagã sɩd sẽn tall n wa wã, n sagl pagã nugẽ. La bɩ maan-kʋʋdã meng zã kãab-wẽng koomã a nugẽ." 
Numbers5:19 La maan-kʋʋdã na n kɩtame tɩ pagã wẽene, t'a yeel-a yaa: Sã n yaa tɩ rao a to ka tol n kẽ ne foom, la tɩ fo ka soos n zãmb f sɩdã n dẽgem f mengã, bɩ ko-kãngã sẽn yaa kãab-wẽng koomã ra maan-f bũmb ye." 
Numbers5:20 La sã n mikame tɩ fo zãmba f sɩdã n soos n dẽgem f mengã, tɩ rao a to kẽ ne foom," 
Numbers5:21 bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kɩt tɩ pagã wẽene, n kãabe. La bɩ a yeel pagã yaa: Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg-fo, n kɩt tɩ f lebg kiiri, tɩ f pʋgã wuki, tɩ f buudã neb sã n wa kãabd kãab-wẽnga, bɩ b kãabd ne fo yʋʋre." 
Numbers5:22 La bɩ ko-kãngã sẽn yaa kãab-wẽng koomã kẽ n wɩk ne f pʋgã, n kɩt tɩ f lebg kiiri, n ka leb n tõe dog ye. La bɩ pagã yeel tɩ Ãmina! Ãmina!»" 
Numbers5:23 «La maan-kʋʋdã na n gʋlsa kãab-wẽngã goamã sebr zugu, n dɩk-a n los ko-tɩɩsengẽ wã n yẽes gʋlsmã." 
Numbers5:24 Sẽn deng tɩ maan-kʋʋdã rɩk ko-tɩɩsengã n kõ pagã t'a yũ tɩ sig a pʋgẽ," 
Numbers5:25 Maan-kʋʋdã reegda sũ-kiir kũunã sẽn yaa beegr tẽegr kũunã pagã sɩd sẽn tall n wa wã, n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n tɩ maan b rog-n-mikã, la a tall kũunã n kẽng tẽn-kugrẽ wã." 
Numbers5:26 La bɩ yẽnda yõng tẽegr maoongã zom ne nug n yõog tẽn-kugrã zugu. La rẽ poore, bɩ a rɩk ko-tɩɩsengã n kõ pagã t'a yũ." 
Numbers5:27 Maan-kʋʋdã sã n kɩt tɩ pagã yũ koomã n sɛ, tɩ b mik tɩ pagã sɩd zãmba a sɩdã n yo n dẽgem a mengã, kãab-wẽng koomã sẽn kẽ yẽnda pʋgẽ wã na n wɩka ne a pʋgã, la yẽnda na n lebga kiiri. La yẽnda buudã sʋka, b sã n kãabd kãab-wẽnga b na n kãabda ne yẽnda yʋʋre." 
Numbers5:28 La sã n mikame tɩ pagã ka yo n dẽgem a menga, la a sã n yaa yɩlemde, b ka na n ning-a taal ye. Dẽ, pagã na n põsa kãab-wẽngã, la a na n paama rogem.»" 
Numbers5:29 Woto yaa tõog sẽn wilgd sũ-kiir yelle, pag sẽn zãmb a sɩd n yo n dẽgem a meng wɛɛngẽ." 
Numbers5:30 La tõ-kãngã leb n yaa rao sẽn wat n maand sũ-kiir ne a paga, n tagsdẽ t'a pagã zãmb-a lame n yo. Bɩ raoã tall a pagã n wa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan bũmb nins fãa tõogã sẽn wilgã." 
Numbers5:31 La sã n mikame tɩ pagã beegame, a beegrã sɩbgr na n lʋɩ a zugu, la b ka na n ning a sɩdã taal ye." 
Numbers6:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis 
Numbers6:2 t'a togs Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Rao bɩ pag sã n maan pʋlengo, n yeel tɩ yẽnda na welga toor n lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda," 
Numbers6:3 yẽnda soab ka tog n yũ reezẽ rãam wall rã-toos ye. A ka tog n yũ reezẽ rã-miisenga, wala rã-kumdum ye. La yẽnda ka tog n yũ bõn-yũudl sẽn maan ne reezẽ ye, la a ka tog n leb n dɩ reezẽ-maasa, wall a wãb a koeems ye." 
Numbers6:4 Yẽnda pʋlengã sɩngr hal n tãag a sɛɛbo, a ka tog n tol n leb n dɩ reezẽ bila, la baa reezẽ-paok ka tog n kẽ a noor ye." 
Numbers6:5 La sẽn paas me, Yẽnda sẽn pʋlm t'a na n welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã pʋgẽ, barg ka tog n sɩɩs a zugã, hal n tãag a pʋlengã a sẽn maan ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã pidsg daare ye." 
Numbers6:6 La yẽnda pʋlengã sɩngr n tɩ tãag a sɛɛbo, a leb n ka tog n kolg kũum me ye." 
Numbers6:7 La baa sã n yaa yẽnda ba, bɩ a ma, wall a ba-bi-raoogo, bɩ a ba-bi-poak n ki, a ka tar noor tɩ kolg kũumã n dẽgem a meng ye. Bala yẽnda welga toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga. La yẽnda zoobdã sẽn ka põngã wilgda bõn-kãnga." 
Numbers6:8 La nin-kãngã pʋlengã sɩngr n tɩ tãag a sɛɛbo, a welga toor n lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Numbers6:9 La yẽnda pʋlengã wakatã pʋgẽ, ned sã n be yẽnda sɛɛgẽ, n wẽneg n ki zĩig pʋgẽ, yẽnda lebga rẽgdo, tɩ bala, a sɩɩsa kũum. Dẽ, rasem a yopoe wã daare, yẽnda na n leb n lebga yɩlemde, la a tog n põnga a zugã." 
Numbers6:10 La rasem a nii wã daare, a tog n talla wal a yiibu, wall manwal a yiib n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdã sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers6:11 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã na n dɩka a yembre, n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la a rɩk a yembrã, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. Rẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdã na n maana b paoosg a soabã zugu, t'a sẽn sɩɩs kũumã n lebg rẽgdã bɩ a lebg yɩlemde. La badaar bala, maan-kʋʋdã lebd n dɩka yẽnda n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers6:12 Dẽ, pʋlengã soab lebd n maneg n maana pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa sɩngrẽ wã. La yẽnda wata ne yʋʋmd pe-ribla, tɩ b maan maoong a yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. La b ka tog n leb n geelg ray nins yẽnda sẽn dag n zoe maan tɩ loogã ye. Bala, yẽnda pʋlengã sãamame.»" 
Numbers6:13 Ad no-tũudr ning b sẽn tog n tũ sẽn pʋlm-a ne Wẽnnaamã yĩnga: Yẽnda pʋlengã rasem sõor sẽn na n pidã daare, b talld-a lame n wa sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers6:14 Dẽ, yẽnda tallda a kũunã, n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yẽnda tog n waa ne rũms a tãab sẽn ka tar zanga. Yaa yʋʋmd pe-ribla, maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga, la yʋʋmd pe-sadga, yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maoong yĩnga, n paas ne pe-raoogo, zems-n-taar maoong yĩnga." 
Numbers6:15 Yẽnda leb n tog n waa ne bur-maas b sẽn nag ne kaam n ka ning bɩlle, peoog a yembre, la zom sẽn nag ne kaam n maan maasa. La a tog n tũnuga zom ne reezẽ rãam sẽn yaa kũun maoongã maaneg yĩnga." 
Numbers6:16 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdã rɩkda kũun-kãensã fãa n wa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n maan yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maoongã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã." 
Numbers6:17 Rẽ poore, a na n dɩka pe-raoogã n maan zems-n-taar maoongo, la a rɩk bur sẽn ka ning bɩllã, ne peoogã, la ne zomã, la reezẽ rãamã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers6:18 La ned ning sẽn dag n pʋlm-a a meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã na n põnga a zugã sɛk roogã noore, n dɩk a zoobdã n lob zems-n-taar maoongã bugum pʋga." 
Numbers6:19 La yẽnda sã n põnga a zugã n sɛ, maan-kʋʋdã na n yãka pe-raoogã b sẽn dʋgã bãoko, la a yãk bur-maas sẽn ka ning bɩllã a ye, ne miisug n ning sẽn dag n pʋlm-a wã nusẽ." 
Numbers6:20 Rẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdã meng na n dɩka kũunã n wilg Sẽn-ka-Saabo, la a maan b rog-n-mikã. La kũun-kãens welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b yaa maan-kʋʋdã n so, n paas ne rũngã yãoogã, la a gerã sẽn tog n yɩ maan-kʋʋdã rẽndã. La rẽ fãa zugẽ, ned ning sẽn dag n pʋlm-a wã tõe n leb n yũu reezẽ rãam." 
Numbers6:21 Woto n yaa no-tũudri, ned ning sẽn pʋlem a meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab wɛɛngẽ. La woto me yaa kũun ninsi, ned sẽn maan pʋleng sẽn tog n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La a soabã sã n tar pãn-tõog n tõe n paas bũmbu, a tõe n paasame, la bũmb sẽn be bala, yaa t'a tog n modgame n kõ kũun ning yẽnda sẽn pʋlmã, wa sẽn zems pʋlengã no-tũudsã." 
Numbers6:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers6:23 «Gom ne a Aarõ, ne a kom-dibli wã n yeel-b yaa: Yãmb sã n wa ningd Israyɛll nebã barka, ad goam nins yãmb sẽn tog n gomã:" 
Numbers6:24 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning-y bark la b gũ-yã! 
Numbers6:25 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sulg b neng n ges-yã, la b zoe y nimbãanega!" 
Numbers6:26 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ges y yelle, n maan-y neere!»" 
Numbers6:27 Dẽ, bãmb sã n wa n pʋd mam yʋʋrã Israyɛll nebã zugu, mam na n ning-b-la barka!" 
Numbers7:1 Daar ning a Moyiis sẽn ti sɛk roogã n sɛ wã, a rɩka kaam n pʋdg sɛk roogã zugu, ne a teedã fãa zutu, tɩ b lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda. La a pʋdg kaamã tẽn-kugrã ne a teedã fãa zutu, tɩ lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so." 
Numbers7:2 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã nanambs nins sẽn dag n sõng a Moyiis tɩ b sõd Israyɛll nebã talla b kũun n wa." 
Numbers7:3 Bãmb sẽn tall kũun nins n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-saabã, yaa saar-dãmb yoobe, niig piig la yiibu, dat n yeel tɩ naab fãa ne a naafo, la nanambs a yiib fãa yaa saar a yembre. Dẽ, bãmb talla b kũunã fãa n wa sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers7:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers7:5 «Bɩ f sak n deeg b kũunã. Bala, b na n dɩka saar-dãmbã ne niigã n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋmde. Bɩ f rɩk saar-dãmbã ne niigã n pʋɩ n kõ Leevi buudã wa sẽn zems tʋʋmd ning bãmb sẽn tog n maanã.»" 
Numbers7:6 Dẽ, a Moyiis sak n deega saar-dãmbã ne niigã, la a rɩk-b lame n kõ Leevi buudã nebã." 
Numbers7:7 A Moyiis rɩka saar-dãmb a yiib ne niig a naas n kõ Gɛrsõ yagensã, tɩ b tõe n tall n maan b tʋʋmdã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ." 
Numbers7:8 La yẽnda kõo Meraari yagensã saar-dãmb a naase, la niig a nii, tɩ b tõe n maan b tʋʋmd sɛk roogã pʋgẽ. La yaa maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Itamaar n yaa bãmb taoor soaba." 
Numbers7:9 La a Moyiis ka kõ Kehat yagensã bũmb ye. Bala, yaa bãmb n get zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ teedã yelle, la b rag n tog n zɩɩ te-bãmb b bãgdẽ." 
Numbers7:10 Daar ning b sẽn na n pʋdg kaam tẽn-kugrã zug n ning-a barkã, Israyɛll buudã nanambsã waa ne kũun n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers7:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Nanambsã tog n waa ne b kũunã pʋgdg-pʋgdga, la yaa ned kam fãa ne a daare.»" 
Numbers8:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a 
Numbers8:2 yeel a Aarõ yaa: «Fo sã n wa na n ning fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe wã b zĩigẽ, bɩ f kɩt tɩ b vẽenemã tees fɩtl doagendgã taoore.»" 
Numbers8:3 La a Aarõ maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg a Moyiisã, n dogl fɩtl-dãmbã tɩ b vẽenemã teesd fɩtl doagendgã taoore." 
Numbers8:4 La fɩtl doagendgã sɛɛgã n tɩ tãag a wilsã, b rag n yõg-a-la ne sãnem yeyn-yeyn. La b yõg-a-la wa mamsg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg a Moyiisã." 
Numbers8:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers8:6 «Yiis Leevi nebã Israyɛll buudã sʋk n yɩlg-ba. 
Numbers8:7 Ad fo sẽn na n yɩlg-b to-to: Bɩ f rɩk yɩlgr koomã n mes-ba, la f kɩt tɩ b rɩk barg n põng b yĩngã fãa, la b pegs b futã n lebg yɩlma." 
Numbers8:8 Rẽ zugẽ, bɩ bãmb wa ne lulla, ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam, la bɩ fo mengã wa ne lull sẽn na n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Numbers8:9 Dẽ zugẽ, bɩ f tigim Israyɛll nebã fãa n kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã kolg mam taoor sɛk roogã noore. La bɩ Israyɛll nebã tik bãmb ne b nusi." 
Numbers8:10  
Numbers8:11 Dẽ, a Aarõ na n dɩka Leevi buudã nebã n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ b yɩ kũun Israyɛll nebã yʋʋr yĩnga. La bãmb na n welga toor n maan maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmde." 
Numbers8:12 La Leevi buudã na n dɩka b nus n tik lulli a yiibã zutã. La bɩ foom a Aarõ rɩk lull a yembr n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, la f rɩk a yembrã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, n yaool n maan b paoogã tʋʋmã Leevi buudã neb zugu, tɩ b tõe n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Numbers8:13 La bɩ foom a Moyiis kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã yals a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã taoore, tɩ f rɩk bãmb n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers8:14 Woto, Leevi buudã neb na n welga toore, n yɩ mam dẽnda." 
Numbers8:15 Rẽ zugẽ, Leevi buudã tõe n yaool n maana b tʋʋmdã sɛkã roog pʋgẽ. Bɩ f yɩlg Leevi buudã n dɩk-b n kõ maam," 
Numbers8:16 tɩ bala, b welga bãmb toor Israyɛll nebã sʋka tɩ b lebg mam dẽnda. Mam na n sooga Leevi buudã, la bãmb n na n led Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽems zĩigẽ." 
Numbers8:17 Bala, Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽemsã, ne b rũmsã kom-dẽemsã fãa yaa maam n so. Daar ning mam sẽn kʋ Ezɩpt tẽng nebã kom-dẽemsã, mam welga Israyɛll nebã kom-dẽemsã toore, tɩ b lebg mam dẽnda." 
Numbers8:18 Mam yãka Leevi buudã tɩ b led Israyɛll kom-dẽemsã zĩigẽ. 
Numbers8:19 Mam yãka bãmb Israyɛll nebã sʋka, n dɩk-b n kõ a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã, tɩ b reeg Israyɛll nebã zĩiga, n maan tʋʋmdã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõe n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri. Woto, baa Israyɛll buudã ned sã n kolg zĩ-sõngã, mam ka na n sɩbg a soab ye.»" 
Numbers8:20 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ la Israyɛll nebã fãa maana bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis tɩ b maan Leevi buudã wɛɛngẽ wã. 
Numbers8:21 Leevi buudã yɩlga b mense, n pegs b futu, t'a Aarõ rɩk-b n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La a Aarõ maana b sugr kosg tʋʋmdã, n yɩlg Leevi buudã." 
Numbers8:22 Yaa rẽ poor la Leevi buudã wa a Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã nengẽ tɩ b na n wilg-b tʋʋmdã sɛk roogã pʋgẽ wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis Leevi buudã wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Numbers8:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers8:24 «Ad bũmb ninga fo sẽn na n maan Leevi buudã wɛɛngẽ: Leevi buudã neb nins fãa sẽn n wat n ta yʋʋm pisi la a nu wã, tog n kẽe sɛk roogã tʋʋmd pʋga." 
Numbers8:25 La b sã n wa ta yʋʋm pis-nu, b tog n basa b tʋʋmdã." 
Numbers8:26 Bãmb tõe n sõngda Leevi buud nins sẽn ket n maand b tʋʋmd sɛk roogã pʋgẽ wã, la b ka tog n leb n kõ bãmb tʋʋmd toor zall ye. Leevi buudã tʋʋmd wɛɛngẽ, yaa woto la fo na n maane.»" 
Numbers9:1 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, pipi kiuugã pʋgẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis Sinayi we-raoogẽ wã n yeel-a yaa:" 
Numbers9:2 «Bɩ Israyɛll nebã maan Pak tigrã wa sẽn zems wakat ning b sẽn yãkã. 
Numbers9:3 Bɩ y maan Pak tigrã kiu-kãnga rasem piig la naasã daar zĩ-sobdo, la y maan wa sẽn zems tõod la minind nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Pak tigrã wɛɛngẽ wã.»" 
Numbers9:4 Dẽ, a Moyiis kõo Israyɛll nebã noor tɩ b maan Pak tigrã." 
Numbers9:5 La Israyɛll nebã kell n maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. Bãmb maana Pak tigrã Sinayi we-raoogẽ wã, pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daar zĩ-sobdo." 
Numbers9:6 La mikame tɩ neb n dag n be be n sɩɩs kũum n dẽgem b mense, n ka tõe n maan Pak tigrã badaar ye. Dẽ, nin-bãmb yikame n kẽng n tɩ yãnd a Moyiis ne a Aarõ." 
Numbers9:7 La bãmb yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tõnd sɩɩsa kũum n dẽgem d mense, n ka leb n tar noor tɩ tall d kũunã n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa Israyɛll neb a taabã sẽn maandã ye. Dẽ wã, tõnd na n maana a wãna?»" 
Numbers9:8 La a Moyiis leoka bãmb yaa: «Bɩ y yaas tɩ m sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ges b sẽn na n yeel tɩ bũmb ninga.» 
Numbers9:9 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers9:10 «Wilg Israyɛll nebã tɩ Pak tigrã maaneg wakate, ned sã n be bãmb sʋkã, n sɩɩs kũum n dẽgem a menga, wall a soab sã n tog so-woko, baoosgo, a soab tog n maana Pak tigrã n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La yaa kiuug ning sẽn na n pʋgl-a wã rasem piig la naasã daar zĩ-sobdo. Bãmb tog n dɩɩ tigrã ne bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle, la ne zẽ-vã-toodo. La tõ-kãngã yaa bãmb ne b kambã la b yagensã yĩnga." 
Numbers9:11  
Numbers9:12 La bɩ bãmb ra bas rɩɩb baa a yembr tɩ kell n vẽeg beoog ye. La bɩ b ra tol n kaoog rũngã kõbr baa a yembr me ye. Bɩ b maan Pak tigrã wa sẽn zems a rog-n-mikã.
