Numbers9:13 La ned sã n zãgs n ka maan Pak tigrã, n yaool n yaa yɩlemde, la a ka tog sor me, bɩ b yiis a soab Israyɛll buudã sʋka. Bala, yẽnda sẽn ka wa ne kũun n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa sẽn zems wakat ning b sẽn yãkã, yẽnda beegame." 
Numbers9:14 La sãamb sã n be yãmb sʋkã n dat n maan Pak tigrã, b tõe n maaname. La yaa tɩ bãmb tog n tũu Pak tigrã tõod ne a rog-n-mikã. Tõ-kãngã na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr nebã fãa yĩnga, sã n yaa sãana, wall Israyɛll buudã neda.»" 
Numbers9:15 Daar ning b sẽn ti sɛk roogã n sɛ wã, sawad-taok n wa n lud sɛk roogã zĩig ning kaoolã koglgã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. La zĩigã sã n sobge, sawaodgã lebgda vẽenem hal tɩ beoogã vẽege." 
Numbers9:16 La rag n yaa woto wakat fãa. Zĩigã sã n sobge, sawad-taokã luta sɛk roogã, la yʋngo, a rag n lebgda vẽenem." 
Numbers9:17 La sawad-taokã sã n wa zẽk n bas sɛk roogã, Israyɛll nebã yikdame n sɩng kẽna. La sawad-taokã sẽn tɩ yals zĩig ningã, yaa beenẽ la bãmb tiid b fu-rotã." 
Numbers9:18 Israyɛll nebã sã n na n yik n looge, rẽnd tɩ b paam Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore. La b sã n na n tɩ tilg me, rẽndame tɩ b leb n paam Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore. La sã n ka sawaodgã n wa n zẽk n bas sɛk roogã, Israyɛll nebã ka yikd ye." 
Numbers9:19 La baa sawaodgã sẽn pa sɛk roogã zug n kaoosd to-to, Israyɛll nebã sakda Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã n ka yik ye." 
Numbers9:20 La wakat ninga, sawaodgã yalsda rasem bilf bala. La ne rẽ fãa, Israyɛll nebã sakda Sẽn-Ka-Saab noor n ti b fu-rotã, la b sã n na n yik n loog me, yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore." 
Numbers9:21 La wakat ning me, sawaodgã yalsda zaabr n tãag vẽkembeoogo, wall daar a yembre, bɩ yʋng a ye. La a sã n wa yik bala, Israyɛll nebã me viigda b fu-rotã n looge." 
Numbers9:22 La baa sawadgã sã n yals sɛk roogã zug rasem a yiibu, bɩ kiuugu, wall a kaoos n yɩɩg rẽ, Israyɛll nebã ka yikd tɩ sã n ka sawaodgã n zẽk ye." 
Numbers9:23 Yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab noor la Israyɛll nebã tilgd b fu-rotã, la yaa ne bãmb noor me la b yikda. Bãmb dag n sakda bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilgd a Moyiis t'a taasd bãmbã." 
Numbers10:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers10:2 «Kɩt tɩ b maan tãntãad a yiib ne wanzuri yeyn-yeyn. Dẽ, y sã n wa rat tɩ nebã tigme, yaa bãmb la yãmb na n peebe. La y sã n wa rat tɩ nebã yik me, leb n yaa bãmb la y peebda." 
Numbers10:3 La tãntãad a yiibã sã n wa naag taab n peebe, bɩ nebã fãa wa tigim taab fo taoor sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers10:4 La sã n yaa tãontaõog a yembr la b peeb yã, yaa nanambsã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã bal n tog n tigim taab fo taoore." 
Numbers10:5 La tãntãadã sã n wa peeb vugr ne pãnga, yaa neb nins sẽn be yaangã n tog n yiki." 
Numbers10:6 Tãntãadã sã n leb n peeb ne pãng naoor a yiibẽ soabã, yaa nug goabg rãmbã n tog n yiki. B sã n na n yik fãa, b tog n peeba tãntãadã ne pãnga." 
Numbers10:7 La b sã n na n peeb n tigim nebã, b ka tog n peeb ne pãng ye." 
Numbers10:8 Yaa maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagensã bal n tar noor tɩ peeb tãntãadã. Yõwã na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb ne y yagensã yĩnga." 
Numbers10:9 Yãmb sã n wa be y tẽngẽ wã, n yi n na n tɩ zab ne y bɛɛbã, bɩ y peeb y tãntãadã ne pãnga, la maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n tẽega yãmb yell n fãag yãmb y bɛɛbã nugẽ." 
Numbers10:10 Yãmb sũ-noog daare, ne y tigr daare, la y ki-paalg tigr wakate, bɩ y peeb y tãntãadã wakat ning yãmb sẽn maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne y zems-n-taar maoongã. Woto, mam ka na n yĩm yãmb yell ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Numbers10:11 Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt soolmã pʋg tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a yiib soabã rasem pisi daare, sawad-taokã zẽk n basa kaoolã sɛk roogã." 
Numbers10:12 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yii Sinayi we-raoogẽ wã n loog pʋgdg-pʋgdga, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilgã. La sawad-tãokã wa n tɩ yalsa Paarã weoogẽ wã." 
Numbers10:13 Woto yɩɩ pipi yikr Israyɛll nebã sẽn yiki, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Numbers10:14 Dẽ, yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg a Zʋʋda tãb-kaoorã n yik pipi. La yaa a Aminadaab biig a Nakõ n dag n yaa Zʋʋda buudã tãb-bi-sullã naaba." 
Numbers10:15 La a Suwaar biig a Netaneyɛll n dag n yaa Isakaar tãb-bi-sullã naaba. 
Numbers10:16 T'a Helõ biig a Elyaab dag n yaa Zabulõ tãb-bi-sullã naaba. 
Numbers10:17 La b viiga sɛk roogã, tɩ Gɛrsõ ne Meraari yagensã tʋk-a n looge." 
Numbers10:18 La tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg Rubɛn doogã neb tãb-kaoorã n pʋgl bãmba, la yaa a Sedewʋʋr biig a Elisʋʋr n dag n yaa tãb-bi-sul-kãng naaba." 
Numbers10:19 La a Suurisadayi biig a Selumiyɛll n dag n yaa Sɩmyõ tãb-bi-sullã naaba. 
Numbers10:20 T'a Dehuwɛll biig a Elyasaf dag n yaa Gaad tãb-bi-sullã naaba. 
Numbers10:21 Rẽ poore, yaa Kehat yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi roogã neb n tʋkd zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ teedã n pʋgle. B rag n tog n tii sɛk roogã n sɛ, sẽn deng a Kehat yagensã waoongo." 
Numbers10:22 Sull ning sẽn pʋgl-a yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg Efrayiim tãb-kaoorã. La a Efrayiim tãb-bi-sullã naab dag n yaa a Amihuub biig a Elisama. 
Numbers10:23 La Manaase tãb-bi-sullã naab dag n yaa a Pedasʋʋr biig a Gameliyɛlle. 
Numbers10:24 Tɩ Benzame tãb-bi-sullã naab yaa a Gidoni biig a Abidãn. 
Numbers10:25 La yaoolem sull ning sẽn pʋgl yaa tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn gũbg Dan tãb-kaoorã. Sul-kãng n yɩ yaoolem. La yaa a Amisadayi biig a Ahiyezɛɛr n dag n yaa bãmb naaba. 
Numbers10:26 La a Asɛɛr tãb-bi-sullã naab dag n yaa a Okrã biig a Pagiyɛlle. 
Numbers10:27 Tɩ Neftali tãb-bi-sullã naab yaa a Enan biig a Ayira. 
Numbers10:28 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã sẽn yik sull-sull n loogã yɩɩ woto." 
Numbers10:29 A Moyiis yeela a rɛɛmb a Rehuyɛll sẽn yit Madiyã wã biig a Obaab yaa: «Tõnd dabda tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab n yeel tɩ b na n kõ-d lame wã pʋgẽ. Dẽ wã, wa tũ tõndo, tɩ d na n kɩtame tɩ f naag tõnd n paam maan-neer ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab Israyɛll nebã.»" 
Numbers10:30 La a Obaab leoka bãmb yaa: «Mam ka na n tũ yãmb n loog ye. Mam na n leba m meng tẽngẽ, n tɩ zĩnd ne m buudã nebã.»" 
Numbers10:31 A Moyiis yeela yẽnda: «Mam kot-f lame tɩ f ra loog n bas-d ye. Bala, sẽn yaa foom n mi zĩis nins tõnd sẽn tõe n tilg d sik zĩigã weoogã pʋgã, bɩ f wa lʋɩ tõnd taoor n wilg-du." 
Numbers10:32 Fo sã n tũ tõndo, d na n kɩtame tɩ f naag tõnd n paam maan-neer ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kõ tõndã.»" 
Numbers10:33 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngẽ wã, la b kẽna rasem a tãab kẽnde. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã rag n bee bãmb taoore, n na n bao sik zĩig n kõ-ba." 
Numbers10:34 La wĩndga, bãmb sã wa yik n loogdẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sawad-taokã lut-b-la ne a maasmã." 
Numbers10:35 La Leevi buudã sã n wa tʋk kaoolã koglgã tɩ b n na looge, a Moyiis pʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Kɩt-y tɩ y bɛɛbã sãeege! La y rig sẽn kis-b yãmbã tɩ b zoe!»" 
Numbers10:36 La Leevi buudã sã n wa sik kaoolã koglgã, a Moyiis zẽkda a koɛɛg n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bɩ y lebg n wa Israyɛll buudã neb sʋka, tɩ bala, b yaa neb kʋʋngo!»" 
Numbers11:1 Daar a yembre, Israyɛll nebã yẽgma wʋsg ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b sũurã puuga wʋsgo, tɩ b kɩt tɩ bugum sig n dɩ sik zĩigã kɩrengã." 
Numbers11:2 Dẽ, nebã kelem n kosa a Moyiis t'a sõng-ba. La a Moyiis pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bãmb yĩnga, la bugmã kiime." 
Numbers11:3 La b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Tabeera, sẽn dat n togs tɩ «bugum». Bala, yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ bugum dɩ bãmb sik zĩigã kɩrenga." 
Numbers11:4 Daar a to, nin-sãams buud toor-toorã sẽn da be Israyɛll nebã sʋkã yikame tɩ velem tar-ba. La Israyɛll nebã me leb n sɩnga yẽgeng n yetẽ: «Tõnd na n maana a wãn n paam nemd ka n wãbe?»" 
Numbers11:5 Tõnd ket n tẽrame tɩ Ezɩpt tẽngã, tõnd dag n dɩta d sẽn date: kʋmba, yoaga, niiri, gãbdo, la albasle." 
Numbers11:6 La tõnd sẽn be ka wã, tõnd tara faagr bala. Sã n ka mandã, d ka tar rɩɩb a to ye." 
Numbers11:7 Mandã rag n yaa pɛɛlg wa baninga, n wẽnd tɩɩg sũm." 
Numbers11:8 Yʋng sã n ta, mandã naagda meenemã n dʋʋgd sik zĩigẽ wã, la yibeoogo, nebã yit n saagdame n wʋkd-a. Bãmb sã n wʋk-a, b werd-a-la neerẽ, wall b to-a teoogẽ. Rẽ poore, b ningd-a-la rʋkẽ n kɩɩme, ka rẽ bɩ b maan-a maasa, t'a noosmã yaa wa bur-maasa." 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 A Moyiis wʋma Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yi n yals b fu-rotã noy roog-roogo, n yẽgemdẽ. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga hal wʋsgo, la bõn-kãng sãama a Moyiis sũurã." 
Numbers11:11 La a Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand maam woto? Yãmb ka maan maam neer ye! Nin-kãensã sẽn yaa wʋsgã zãab yaa toogo, la yaa bõe tɩ y modg maam n dɩk-m n lʋɩɩs bãmb taoore?" 
Numbers11:12 Yaa maam n dog nin-bãmbã la? Bɩ yaa maam n wa ne-b dũni zugu, tɩ yãmb dat tɩ mam zã bãmb wa bi-yaoond sẽn zãad bi-pɛɛlga, n tall-b n ta tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kãab tɩ y na n kõ b yaab-rãmbã." 
Numbers11:13 Mam na n yãnda nemd yɛɛnẽ n kõ nin-bãmbã fãa? Bala, bãmb yãbda ne maam n yetẽ tɩ rẽnd mam kõ bãmb nemd tɩ b wãbe." 
Numbers11:14 Maam m yembr ka tõe n zã bãmba fãa ye. Bala, yɩɩda mam pãnga." 
Numbers11:15 Sã n yaa woto la y na n maan maam, bɩ y tolg n kʋ-m tɩ sɛ! Y sã n kʋ-ma, y maan-m-la neere. Woto, mam ka na n yãnd toog ning sẽn na n paam maamã ye.»" 
Numbers11:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Bɩ f yãk neb pis-yopoe Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã sẽn yaa nanambsã sʋka, n tall-b n wa kɩt tɩ b yals mam taoor ne foom sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers11:17 Mam na n siga beenẽ n gom ne foom. La mam na n yãka Sɩɩg ning fo sẽn tarã bilfu, n kõ bãmba, tɩ b tõe n sõng foom n zã nebã. Dẽ, fo ka na n leb n yɩ f yembr ye." 
Numbers11:18 Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: yɩlg-y y mens tɩ beoogo, y na n paama nemd n wãbe. Bala, yãmb yẽgmame n yeel tɩ y na n maana a wãn n paam nemd n wãbe, la y yeel tɩ yãmb sẽn dag n be Ezɩpt tẽngã, bũmb da ka paoogd yãmb ye.» Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋmame, la b yeelame: «Ka nemd la yãmb dat la? Y na paam nemd n wãbe." 
Numbers11:19 La ka daar a ye bɩ a yiib bal la yãmb na n paam nemdã n wãb ye. Leb n ka rasem a nu, bɩ rasem piiga, wall rasem pisi tɛk bal ye." 
Numbers11:20 Yãmb na n wãba nemdã kiuug tõre. Y na n wãb-a lame t'ɩ loog-yã, hal n wa yit y yõ-bogdẽ wã, tɩ y yamã yi-a. Bala yãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn be ne yãmbã, n yẽgem n yeel tɩ maana a wãn tɩ b yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã.»" 
Numbers11:21 A Moyiis leoka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Nebã sẽn be ne maam n kẽndã sõor taa neb tus kobs-yoobe. Yãmb tagsdame tɩ y na n tõog n yãnda nemd n kõ-b tɩ b wãb kiuug tõre! 
Numbers11:22 Baa tõnd sã n kʋ d piisã, ne d bʋʋsã, la d niigã fãa n kõ-ba, ka tõe n sek-b ye. La baa tõnd sã n dag n tõe n yõg zĩmã fãa sẽn be ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã, baoosgo, yõwã ka tõe n sek ye.»" 
Numbers11:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Moyiis yaa: «Dẽ yĩngã, mam ka tar pãng tɩ sek sɩda? Ade, moasã la fo na n yãnd gomd ning mam sẽn yeel foomã sã n na n paama pidsgu, wall a sã n ka na n paam pidsgu.»" 
Numbers11:24 Dẽ, a Moyiis yiime n togs nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bũmb ningã. Rẽ zugẽ, yẽnda tigma Israyɛll kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe wã n kɩt tɩ b yals n gũbg sɛk roogã." 
Numbers11:25 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab siga sawad-taokã pʋgẽ, n gom ne a Moyiisi. La bãmb yãka Sɩɩg ning sẽn da be ne a Moyiisã bilfu, n kõ kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe wã. La wakat ninga Sɩɩgã sẽn sig bãmb zutã, b sɩngame n gomd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, la b ka leb n gom a buud nindaar ye." 
Numbers11:26 Kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe wã sʋk neb a yiib n dag n pa sik zĩigẽ wã, yaa a Ɛldaade, ne a Medaade. La bãmb da paa sik zĩigẽ wã, n ka yi n tũ n kẽng sɛk roogẽ wã ye. La ne rẽ fãa, Sɩɩgã siga bãmb zutu, n kɩt tɩ b gom pĩnd-n-bãngr goam sik zĩigẽ wã." 
Numbers11:27 La bi-bɩɩg a ye n zoe n tɩ togs a Moyiis t'a Ɛldaad ne a Medaad bee sik zĩigẽ wã n gomd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã. 
Numbers11:28 La a Nun biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa a Moyiis sõangd hal a yãadem wakatã yeela a Moyiis yaa: «M zu-soaba, kɩt-y tɩ b sĩndi.»" 
Numbers11:29 A Moyiis leoka a Zozoe yaa: «Fo maanda sũ-kiir mam yĩng la? Baa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n pʋdg b Sɩɩgã Israyɛll nebã fãa zutu, n kɩt tɩ b lebg no-rɛɛsdba, yõwã ka yell ye!»" 
Numbers11:30 Rẽ zugẽ, a Moyiis ne kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe wã lebg n leba sik zĩigẽ wã." 
Numbers11:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sobg yik ko-kãsengẽ wã. La sebgã fugame n peng kodens tɩ b wa rʋʋg sik zĩigẽ wã. Kodensã rag n gũbga sik zĩigã. B yɛdg n taa daar ye kẽnde, la b samame n kolg kãntɩɩg a yiibu." 
Numbers11:32 La Israyɛll nebã sõsa ne kodensã wʋkr badaar wĩntoog ne a yʋngã tõre, la a vẽkembeoogo. Neb nins sẽn ka wʋk-b wʋsg yaa pet piiga, la b yɛdg-b lame n gilg sik zĩigã." 
Numbers11:33 La Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n sɩng nemdã wãbr bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga ne bãmba, la b sɩbga bãmb ne to-kãsenga." 
Numbers11:34 Dẽ, b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Kibrot-Taava, sẽn dat n togs tɩ «veles yaado.» Bala yaa beenẽ la b mum Israyɛll neb nins velmã sẽn yõkã." 
Numbers11:35 Dẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã yii Kibrot-Taava n kẽng Aserote, la yaa beenẽ la bãmb tɩ ti fu-rotã." 
Numbers12:1 A Moyiis da rɩka Kuus tẽng bi-pugl n maan a paga, la a Aarõ ne a Miryam wɩda yẽnda yi-kãadem-kãng yĩnga." 
Numbers12:2 Bãmb yeelame yaa: «Ka a Moyiis a ye bal la Sẽn-Ka-Saab gom ne ye. B goma ne tõnd me» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma a Aarõ ne Miryam goamã. 
Numbers12:3 La a Moyiis yaool n dag n yaa sik-m-meng soab hal wʋsgo, n yɩɩd ninsaalbã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã." 
Numbers12:4 La tao-tao bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ la a Miryam yaa: «Bɩ yãmb y tãabã fãa yik n wa sɛk roogẽ wã.» La bãmb yikame n kẽnge." 
Numbers12:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab siga sawad-taokã pʋgẽ n yals sɛk roogã noore. La bãmb boola a Aarõ ne a Miryam. La bãmb b yiibã kolgame." 
Numbers12:6 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Kelg-y bũmb ning mam sẽn na n yeel yãmbã neere. No-rɛɛs sã n be yãmb sʋkã, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnegda m mengã ne a soab zãmsd pʋgẽ." 
Numbers12:7 La sã n yaa ne mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis nengẽ wã, yaa toore. Bala, yẽnda maanda sɩd mam nebã yell gesg pʋgẽ." 
Numbers12:8 Mam gomda ne yẽnda neng ne nenga. Mam ka solgd m meng n gom ne yẽnda ye. La yaa bõe tɩ yãmb ka zoe rabeem tɩ wɩd mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisi?» 
Numbers12:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puugame tɩ b looge. 
Numbers12:10 Sawadgã sẽn wa n zẽk n bas sɛk roogã, b mikame t'a Miryam yĩn-gãongã tẽgsa pɛɛla, n yaa wa lampalga. Yaa yĩn-gãong bãaga. La Aarõ sẽn wẽnemd n ges a Miryam, a mikame tɩ yaa wãood n tar-a." 
Numbers12:11 Dẽ, a Aarõ yeela a Moyiis yaa: «M zu-soaba, y sugri! Tõnd beegame, la d kot-y lame tɩ y ra sɩbg tõnd d kongrã yĩng ye." 
Numbers12:12 Bɩ a Miryam yĩngã ra fiu wa bi-kɩɩng yĩng sẽn fiuud to-to a rogem wakatã ye.» 
Numbers12:13 Dẽ, a Moyiis pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Mam Wẽnnaam, mam kot-y lame tɩ y maag a Miryam!»" 
Numbers12:14 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel a Moyiis yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, a Miryam ba wã sã n dag n tʋbs a nengã kolkoodo, yẽnda rag n kõn zĩnd ne yãnd rasem a yopoe sɩda? Dẽ wã, bɩ b yiis a Miryam sik zĩigẽ wã, t'a maan dasem a yopoe, n yaool n lebg n wa.»" 
Numbers12:15 Dẽ, b yiisa a Miryam sik zĩigẽ wã t'a tɩ maan rasem a yopoe. La Israyɛll nebã kell n paa b sik zĩigẽ wã hal t'a Miryam lebg n wa." 
Numbers12:16 Dẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã yii Hatserot n kẽng n tɩ tilg b fu-rotã Paarã we-raoogẽ wã." 
Numbers13:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers13:2 «Tʋm neb tɩ b tɩ ges Kana tẽngã mam sẽn na n kõ Israyɛll nebã. La bɩ b yãk Israyɛll buud fãa pʋgẽ nanambsã sʋk nin-yɛnga, n kɩt tɩ b kẽnge.»" 
Numbers13:3 Dẽ, a Moyiis maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã, n tʋm neb tɩ b yi Paarã weoogã n na n kẽnge, la nin-bãmb fãa rag n yaa Israyɛll buudã nanambse." 
Numbers13:4 Ad neb nins b sẽn tʋmã yʋy: Rubɛn buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zakʋʋr biig a Samuwa." 
Numbers13:5 Sɩmyõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Hori biig a Safate." 
Numbers13:6 Zʋʋda buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛbe." 
Numbers13:7 Isakaar buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zozɛf biig a Yigalle." 
Numbers13:8 Efrayiim buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Nun biig a Ooze." 
Numbers13:9 Benzame buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Rafu biig a Palti." 
Numbers13:10 Zabulõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Sodi biig a Gadiyɛlle." 
Numbers13:11 A Zozɛf biig a Manaase roogã pʋgẽ, yaa a Susi biig a Gadi" 
Numbers13:12 Dan buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Gemali biig a Amiyɛlle." 
Numbers13:13 Asɛɛr buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Mikayɛll biig a Setuure." 
Numbers13:14 Neftali buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Vofsi biig a Nabi." 
Numbers13:15 Gaad buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Maki biig a Guwɛlle." 
Numbers13:16 A Moyiis sẽn tʋm neb nins tɩ b tɩ ges Kana tẽngã, yʋy yɩɩ woto. La a Moyiis pʋda a Nun biig a Ooze yʋʋr t'a Zozoe." 
Numbers13:17 A Moyiis sẽn wa n na n tʋm bãmb tɩ b tɩ ges Kana tẽngã, a yeel-b lame yaa: «Bɩ y yi Negɛɛv sẽnẽ, n tɩ rʋ tãmsã n paam n kẽ Kana." 
Numbers13:18 La y ges tẽngã sẽn yaa to-to. Ges-y neb nins sẽn be tẽngẽ wã sã n tara pãnga, bɩ b ka tare. La y ges b sõorã sã n waoogame bɩ ka waooge." 
Numbers13:19 La y ges tẽng ning pʋg b sẽn be wã sã n yaa sõama, bɩ a ka sõama. La y ges b tẽmsã sã n tara lals sẽn gũbgi, bɩ b ka tare." 
Numbers13:20 La y ges tẽngã sã n sakda bɩle bɩ a ka sakde. La y ges tɩɩs sã n bee be bɩ ka be. Paam-y raoodo, n kẽng n tɩ tall tẽngã tɩɩs biis n wa.» La rẽ wakat tɩ reezẽ rag n sɩngda moogre." 
Numbers13:21 B sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã kẽngame n tɩ ges tẽngã, sẽn sɩng ne Sĩn weoogã, hal n tɩ tãag Rehoob sẽn be Lebo-Hamat tẽngã noorã." 
Numbers13:22 Bãmb kẽname n tɩ kẽ Negɛɛv soolmã, n kolg Ebrõ tẽngã. La yaa Ahima, ne Sesayi, la a Talmayi buudã sẽn yaa a Anak yagensã n dag n be beenẽ. Ebrõ tẽngã meeb tɩ yʋʋm-yopoɛɛlẽ, la b yaool n na n me Sowan tẽngã sẽn be Ezɩptã soolmẽ wã." 
Numbers13:23 Dẽ zugẽ, bãmb kẽnga Ɛskoll ko-soogẽ wã, la bãmb kɛɛga reezẽ tɩɩg will ne reezẽ-gĩnd a ye, n naag ne tɩ-biis a taab sẽn boond tɩ gernaade, ne kankama, n yagl ra-paads zut tɩ neb a yiib tʋk n palg b bãgdo." 
Numbers13:24 La b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Ɛskoll ko-soogo, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹reezẽ-gĩnd ko-soogo› Israyɛll nebã sẽn yãk reezẽ-gĩnd beenẽ wã yĩnga." 
Numbers13:25 La rasem pis-naas zugẽ, neb nins b sẽn tʋm tɩ b tɩ ges Kana tẽngã lebg n waame." 
Numbers13:26 La bãmb lebg n leba a Moyiis ne a Aarõ nengẽ, la Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn be Kadɛɛsã Paarã weoogã pʋgẽ wã nengẽ. Dẽ, bãmb togsa a Moyiis bũmb ning fãa bãmb sẽn yãndã, la b wilga bãmb tẽngã tɩɩs biisi." 
Numbers13:27 Ad koees nins bãmb sẽn togs a Moyiisã: «Yãmb sẽn tʋm tõnd tɩ d kẽng tẽng ningã, tõnd kẽngame. La tẽngã sɩd pida ne sɩɩd la bĩisim. Dẽ, tẽngã tɩɩs biis la woto." 
Numbers13:28 La yell ning sẽn be, yaa tɩ tẽn-kãng nebã tara pãnga, la b tara tẽm-bɛd b sẽn me lals n gũbgi. La tõnd tol n yãnda nin-wobg a Anak yagensã beenẽ." 
Numbers13:29 La Amalɛk nebã bee Negɛɛv tẽngã, tɩ Hɛt-dãmbã ne Zebuus-rãmbã, la Amoor-dãmbã be tãmsẽ wã. La Kana-rãmbã n be ko-kãsengã, ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore.»" 
Numbers13:30 Dẽ, a Kalɛɛb kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn da yẽgemd ne a Moyiisã sĩndi, la a yeele: «Yik-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ reeg tẽngã. Tõnd na n tõog-b-lame!»" 
Numbers13:31 La a Kalɛɛb tũud-n-taasã yeelame yaa: «Tõnd ka tõe n zab ne nin-bãmbã ye. Bala, b tara pãng n yɩɩd tõndo.»" 
Numbers13:32 Dẽ, nin-bãmb sɩngame n gom n sãbs tẽng ning bãmb sẽn kẽng n tɩ gesã Israyɛll nebã taoor n yeele: «Tẽng ning tõnd sẽn tɩ gilg n gesã rɩta a nebã, la sẽn paase, neb nins fãa tõnd sẽn yãnd be wã yaa nin-wobdo." 
Numbers13:33 La tõnd tol n yãnda nin-wobdã sẽn yaa a Anak yagensã beenẽ, la tõnd sã n yas b sɛɛgẽ, tõnd geta d mensã wa sʋy bala, la bãmb mensã sẽn get tõndã, d sɩd yaa woto me.»" 
Numbers14:1 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wʋm goam nins b sẽn togsã, bãmb zẽka b koeesã n yãb yʋngã tõr hal tɩ beoogã vẽege." 
Numbers14:2 Dẽ, bãmb yẽgma ne a Moyiis la a Aarõ n yeel-b yaa: «Tõnd sã n dag n kiẽ Ezɩpt tẽngã, bɩ weoogã pʋg n são." 
Numbers14:3 Yaa bõe tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab talld tõnd n na n kẽes tẽng a woto pʋgẽ? Tõnd na n kii zabrẽ wã, tɩ b wʋk d pagbã ne d kambã. Tõnd sã n lebg n leb Ezɩpt tẽngã n são.»" 
Numbers14:4 Dẽ, bãmb goma ne taab n yeele yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d yãk ned t'a yɩ d taoor soaba, tɩ d lebg n leb Ezɩpt tẽngã!»" 
Numbers14:5 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ lʋɩ n fõgna b nens tẽng Israyɛll nebã fãa taoore. 
Numbers14:6 A Nun biig a Zozoe, ne a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb sẽn yaa neb nins sẽn tɩ ges tẽngã sʋk neb a yiibã sũy sãama hal wʋsgo, tɩ b pãrs b futã." 
Numbers14:7 La bãmb yeela nebã yaa: «Tẽng ning tõnd sẽn kẽng n tɩ gesã yaa tẽn-sõng wʋsgo. 
Numbers14:8 Tẽngã tara bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsgo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n nong tõndo, bãmb na n talla tõnd n tɩ kẽes tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ, la b na n deega tẽngã n kõ-do." 
Numbers14:9 Bũmb ning sẽn be bala, bɩ y ra kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã, la y ra zoe tẽn-kãngã nebã ye. Tõnd na n tõog-b lame. Bala, bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã bas-b lame. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne tõndo. Dẽ wã, bɩ y ra zoe bãmb ye.»" 
Numbers14:10 La nebã fãa yeelame tɩ b lob bãmb ne kug n kʋ. La wakat-kãng bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã puka sɛk roogã zug nebã fãa taoore." 
Numbers14:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Nin-bãmbã na n kell n kɩɩsa maam hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Baa ne bõn-bãn-kãsems nins mam sẽn maan bãmb sʋkã, bãmb ket n ka tẽed maam ye." 
Numbers14:12 Mam na n sɩbg-b-la ne bã-longdem n kɩt tɩ b sãam zãnga. Dẽ poore, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f rog buud sẽn yaa wʋsgo, n tar pãng n yɩɩd Israyɛll nebã.»" 
Numbers14:13 La a Moyiis leoka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Ezɩpt nebã bãngame tɩ yãmb yiisa y nebã bãmb soolmẽ wã ne y pãn-kãsengã. 
Numbers14:14 La bãmb dɩka bõn-kãng n togs tẽn-kãngã nebã, tɩ bãmb miẽ tɩ yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee y nebã sʋka. La yãmb pukda y meng ne y nebã vẽeneg-vẽenega. La b wʋmame me tɩ yãmb gũuda y nebã, la y lʋɩta bãmb taoor n kẽnda. Wĩndga, yaa sawad-taok pʋg la y be. La yʋngo, y bee bug-witim pʋgẽ." 
Numbers14:15 La moasã, yãmb sã n kʋ y nebã wakat a ye pʋgẽ, buud a taabã sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd yãmb tʋʋm-kãsẽmsã yellã na n yeelame yaa:" 
Numbers14:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tõog n na n tall b nebã n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n kãab n yeel tɩ b na n kõo bãmbã pʋgẽ ye. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-b zãng weoogã pʋgẽ.» 
Numbers14:17 Dẽ wã yĩnga, mam kot-y lame yaa, Zu-soaba, tɩ y wilg y pãngã, n maan wa yãmb sẽn da yeelã." 
Numbers14:18 Yãmb yeelame: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yaa sũ-maasem soaba, la maan-neer soaba. Mam kõta yel-wẽn ne kɩɩsg sugri. La mam ka basd yel-wẽnã soab taal ye. Mam sɩbgda yẽnda ne a yagensã hal tɩ ta zamaan a tãabo, wall a naase." 
Numbers14:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn yaa sõmblem soabã yĩnga, bɩ y kõ y nebã sugri, tɩ bala, hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning b sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ ta moasã, yãmb kõt-b-la sugri.»" 
Numbers14:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Mam kõt-b-la sugr wa fo sẽn kosã. 
Numbers14:21 Sã n yaa tɩ mam vɩɩme, la mam ziirã sã n pida dũniyã gilli, mam wẽendame tɩ nin-bãmbã ba a yembr ka na n kẽ Kana tẽngã pʋg ye. Bala, bãmb yãnda mam ziirã ne tʋʋm-kãsems nins mam sẽn maan Ezɩpt pʋgẽ wã, ne weoogã pʋgã, la b baas n yaool n kell n paooga maam la b kɩɩs maam. Rẽ yĩngã, bãmb ned ba n ye nif ka na n yãnd tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kãab b yaab-rãmbã ye." 
Numbers14:22  
Numbers14:23  
Numbers14:24 La mam tʋmtʋmd a Kalɛɛb paama yam toor n sak m noorã. Rẽ wã yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda kẽ tẽng ning a sẽn tɩ gesã pʋgẽ, la m kɩt tɩ tẽn-kãng lebg yẽnda kambã ne a yagensã rẽnda." 
Numbers14:25 Amalɛk nebã ne Kana nebã na n paa tãn-longẽ wã. La beoogo, bɩ y wẽnemd n lebg n pɩʋʋg weoogã n tees tãnwĩis ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ.»" 
Numbers14:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa: 
Numbers14:27 «Mam wʋma Israyɛll nebã sẽn yẽgemd ne maamã. La nin-wẽn-kãensã na n yẽgma ne maam hal tɩ ta dabʋre? 
Numbers14:28 Ade, kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-b tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã meng wẽendame n yetẽ: Mam na n maana bãmb wa sẽn zems b no-goamã." 
Numbers14:29 Neb nins fãa sẽn be yãmb sʋkã n tar yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ tɩ b sõd-bã na n kii we-raoogã pʋgẽ. Bala, bãmb yẽgma ne maam." 
Numbers14:30 Mam wẽendame tɩ yãmb ned ba a yembr ka na n kẽ tẽng ninga mam sẽn da kãab tɩ y na n zĩnda a pʋgẽ wã ye. Yaa a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb ne a Nun biig a Zozoe bal n na kẽ tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ. 
Numbers14:31 La yãmb kambã yãmb sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b na yɩ y bɛɛbã yembsã, yaa kom-bãmb la mam na n kɩt tɩ b kẽ tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n sãbsã pʋgẽ. La bãmb na n bãnga tẽngã." 
Numbers14:32 La yãmb mensã na n kii weoogẽ wã. 
Numbers14:33 Yãmb kambã na n yeeba weoogã pʋg yʋʋm pis-naase. La yãmb kɩɩsgã sɩbgr na n lʋɩɩ bãmb zutu, hal tɩ yãmb fãa wa sɛ." 
Numbers14:34 Yãmb dɩka rasem pis-naas n gilg n ges Kana tẽngã. La yãmb kɩɩsgã yĩnga, y na n namsa yʋʋm pis-naase, sẽn dat n togs tɩ daar a yembr yaa yʋʋmde. Woto, yãmb na bãng mam kɩɩsg sẽn wat ne bũmb ninga." 
Numbers14:35 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yet yãmb woto. La mam yeta yãmb vẽenega, tɩ m na n maan-y-la wa m sẽn yeelã. Bala, yãmb yaa nin-wẽns buudu, la y naaga taab n kɩɩs maam. Yãmb fãa na n kii weoogã pʋga, la yãmb ned ba a yembr ka na n põs ye.»" 
Numbers14:36 Dẽ, neb nins a Moyiis sẽn da tʋm tɩ b tɩ ges tẽngã sẽn lebg n wa gom a yell wẽng to-to wã, kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã yẽgem ne a Moyiisi." 
Numbers14:37 La nin-bãmb sẽn bilg-b tẽngã yellã kii zĩig pʋgẽ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽe bãmba, b sẽn gom tẽngã yell n yeel tɩ ka tẽn-sõngã yĩnga." 
Numbers14:38 La nin-bãmb sʋkã, yaa a Zozoe ne a Kalɛɛb bal n ka ki." 
Numbers14:39 A Moyiis togsa Israyɛll nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda bũmb ningã, la Israyɛll nebã sũy sãama wʋsg ne bõn-kãnga." 
Numbers14:40 La vẽkembeoog yibeoog pĩnda, bãmb yik n dɩka sor n tees tẽms nins sẽn be tãmsã zutã sẽnẽ. Bãmb dag n kẽndame la b yetẽ: «Sɩd-sɩdã, tõnd beegame, la moasã, tõnd bee sorẽ n dabd zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg tõnd tɩ d kẽngã.»" 
Numbers14:41 Dẽ, a Moyiis soka bãmb yaa: «Yaa bõe la yãmb sẽn maandã? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noor la yãmb sẽn kɩɩsdã, la y ka na n tõog n maan y sẽn dat n maanã ye." 
Numbers14:42 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka be ne yãmb ye. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ ra n wa saag n kẽng tɩ y bɛɛbã na n tõog-y lame." 
Numbers14:43 Amalɛk ne Kana nebã bee taoor n gũud yãmba. La b na n tõoga yãmb n kʋ-y zãng zabrã pʋgẽ. Bala, yãmb wẽnemdame n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Dẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n zĩnd ne yãmb ye.»" 
Numbers14:44 La baoosg zãnga, Israyɛll nebã kell n kenga b sũy n na n kẽng n tɩ zab ne tẽms nins sẽn be tãmsã zutã. La a Moyiis kell n paa sik zĩigẽ wã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã." 
Numbers14:45 La Amalɛk ne Kana nebã yii tãmsã zut n sig n zab ne Israyɛll nebã, n tõog-b n dig n tãag Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa tɩ kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn na n kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ," 
Numbers15:2  
Numbers15:3 n wa rat n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sã n yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, wall yaa zems-n-taar maoongo, ka rẽ bɩ pʋleng pidsg maoongo, wall y yamleoog kũuni, wall tigr daar maoongo, bɩ y yãk y rũm-bɛdã, bɩ y rũm-bãoonegã sʋk n maan maoongã, tɩ yɩ yũ-noog sẽn tat Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers15:4 Ned sã n dat n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ a paas zom wamd sẽn nag ne kaam lengr pʋɩ-sʋka, n tall n wa." 
Numbers15:5 La sã n yaa pe-ribl la yẽnda tall n wa n na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, wall zems-n-taar maoongã, a tog n naaga ne reezẽ rãam lɩnga." 
Numbers15:6 Sã n yaa pe-raoog maoongo, yẽnda na n paasa zom wam a yiib sẽn nag ne kaam lens a yiibu." 
Numbers15:7 La a paas reezẽ rãam lɩms a yiibu, la bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ yũ-noog sẽn tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers15:8 La sã n yaa lull la b tall n na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, wall zems-n-taar maoongo, ka rẽ bɩ yamleoog maoongo, wall pʋleng pidsg maoongo," 
Numbers15:9 bɩ b paas zom wam a tã sẽn nag ne kaam lens a tãabo, n naag ne rũngã n tall n wa." 
Numbers15:10 La b paas reezẽ rãam lɩms a tãabo, tɩ bõn-kãng yɩ yũ-noog sẽn tat mam yam." 
Numbers15:11 La wakat fãa, y sẽn na n maan loalg maoongo, bɩ pe-raoog maoongo, wall pe-ribl maoongo, ka rẽ bɩ bʋʋg maoongo, yaa woto la y segd n maane." 
Numbers15:12 Baa rũms nins yãmb sẽn dat n kõ wã sõor sẽn yaa to-to, yãmb tog n paasa kũun nins b sẽn wilgã rũng fãa zugã." 
Numbers15:13 Israyɛll ned ning fãa sẽn dat n maan-a maoong sẽn yõogd bugum sẽn tar yũ-noog mam yĩnga, a soab tog n maana a boto." 
Numbers15:14 La sãamb nins sẽn nan wa-b yãmb sʋk tɩ ka kaoosã, wall sãamb nins sẽn sɩng n be-b ne yãmb hal sẽn kaoosã sã n wa rat n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum sẽn tar yũ-noog sẽn tat mam yam, bɩ b tũ tõod nins yãmb sẽn tũudã." 
Numbers15:15 Tõodã na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr nebã fãa yĩnga, sã n yaa yãmb sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã, wall sãamb nins sẽn be-b yãmb sʋkã. La no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, welgr ka be Israyɛll nebã ne sãambã sʋkã ye." 
Numbers15:16 Tõodã ne noyã na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembre, yãmb Israyɛll nebã ne sãambã yĩnga.»" 
Numbers15:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis 
Numbers15:18 t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa tɩ kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn na n tall yãmb n kẽngã pʋgẽ," 
Numbers15:19 n paam tẽngã bɩle n na n dɩ, bɩ y reng n yãk kũun n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers15:20 Yãmb na n yãka zom-bãaneg sẽn nan nag paalem, n maan bur-maasr n kõ maam, tɩ bõn-kãng tõe n yɩ dẽenem biis kũuni, yãmb sẽn yãk y zom-nagdmã pʋgẽ, y koodã pãbr zugẽ wã." 
Numbers15:21 Woto, yãmb na n kõo maam dẽenem bur-maasre, y sẽn kɩɩme. Tõ-kãngã na n yɩɩ zamaan woo zamaan sẽn wat yĩnga.»" 
Numbers15:22 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tũnug a Moyiis n kõ yãmb ne y yagensã tõod ninsã, yãmb sã n kɩɩs tõ-bãmb ne yĩdgu, n ka sak-ba, la sã n mikame tɩ nebã ka bãng tɩ yãmb kɩɩsa tõogã ne yĩdgu, bɩ b fãa naag taab n tall lull n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, t'a yɩ yũ-noog mam yĩnga. La bɩ b paas zom-bãaaneg ne reezẽ rãam tɩ yɩ kũuni, wa sẽn zems tõogã sẽn yeelã, ne boɛɛg sẽn na n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24  
Numbers15:25 Rẽ poore, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã maan b sugr kosg tʋʋmdã tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa tõe n paam b yel-wẽnã sugri. Bala, yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum ne sugr kũun maoong b sẽn maan n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b sẽn kɩɩs tõogã ne yĩdgã yĩnga." 
Numbers15:26 La Israyɛll nebã fãa ne sãamb nins fãa sẽn be bãmb sʋkã na n paama sugri. Bala, nebã fãa naag n beega ne yĩdgu." 
Numbers15:27 La sã n mikame tɩ yaa nin-yɛng n beeg ne yĩdgu, a soab tog n waa ne bʋʋg sẽn ta yʋʋmde, n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga." 
Numbers15:28 Dẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdã na n yalsa mam taoor n maan b sugr kosg tʋʋmdã bɛɛgdã zugu, t'a tõe n paam a yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Numbers15:29 La tõ-kãngã na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr neb nins sẽn na n beeg ne yĩdgã yĩnga, sã n yaa Israyɛll neda, wall sãambã sẽn be bãmb sʋkã." 
Numbers15:30 La Israyɛll ned wall sãan sã n maan yel-wẽnd ne yamleoogo, a beega maam, la b tog n diga a soabã n yiis Israyɛll nebã sʋka." 
Numbers15:31 Yẽnda soab paooga Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã, la a kɩɩs bãmb tõodã. Dẽ, bɩ b yiis nin-kãngã soab Israyɛll nebã sʋka, la a yellã be a meng zugu." 
Numbers15:32 Daar a yembre, Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n be we-raoogã pʋgã, bãmb sʋkã neb kẽer n tɩ ling rao a yembr t'a wɩɩsd raad vʋʋsgã daarã." 
Numbers15:33 Dẽ, bãmb talla nin-kãng n kẽng a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, la Israyɛll nebã fãa taoore." 
Numbers15:34 La b baoo zĩig n ning-a, bala, b rag n nan ka wilg b sẽn tog n maan-a bũmb ning ye." 
Numbers15:35 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Nin-kangã soab segda ne kʋʋbo. Dẽ wã, bɩ y tall-a n yiis sik zĩigã pʋgẽ, tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa lob-a ne kug n kʋ.»" 
Numbers15:36 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiisã. Bãmb talla raoã n yiis sik zĩigã pʋg n tɩ lob-a ne kug t'a ki." 
Numbers15:37 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis 
Numbers15:38 t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Bɩ yãmb ne y yagensã ning y futã noy zerdo, n bao gĩs-kẽeg haoo n ning zerdã zutu." 
Numbers15:39 Dẽ, bɩ y ningd fut sẽn tar zerdo, tɩ yãmb sã n wa n ges zerdã, bɩ y tẽeg maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã yell n sak-ba. Woto, yãmb kõn tol n leb n maan y sẽn date, n bas tɩ y tagsgã ne y ninã gesgã tus yãmb n kẽes wẽn-naands pʋʋsg pʋg ye." 
Numbers15:40 Dẽ, yãmb na n tẽega mam tõodã fãa yell n sak-ba. Yãmb na n welga toor y Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Numbers15:41 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Mam yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga, n na n lebg yãmb Wẽnnaam. N-yẽe! Yaa maam n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Numbers16:1 Leevi roogã ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Koore, n yaa Kehat roogã ned a Yitseyaare biigã Pirsa a Elyaab kambã: a Datã, a Abiram, ne a Pelɛt biig a One, b tãabã fãa yaa a Rubɛn yagense," 
Numbers16:2 n paas ne neb kobs-yi la pis-nu sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã taoor-dãmbã, tɩ b na n zab ne a Moyiisi." 
Numbers16:3 Dẽ, bãmb tɩ tigma taab n zab ne a Moyiis la a Aarõ n yeele: «Tõnd yamã yii ne yãmb manesmã! Bala, nebã fãa welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee bãmb sʋka. La bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb zẽkd y mens wa yãmb yɩɩda neb a taabã?»" 
Numbers16:4 A Moyiis sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã wã, a wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
Numbers16:5 La Moyiis yeela a Koore ne a poorẽ dãmbã yaa: «Beoog yibeoogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ b bãng ned ning sẽn welg toor n yaa bãmb dẽnda, n kɩt t'a kolg bãmba, la yaa bãmb sẽn na n yãk a soabã n na n kolge." 
Numbers16:6 Dẽ wã, ad foom a Koore ne f poorẽ dãmbã sẽn na n maane: bɩ y rɩk wisd yõogr laase." 
Numbers16:7 La beoogo, bɩ y ning bugum ne wisd b pʋse, n tall n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Woto, d na n bãnga ned ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã. La yaa nin-kãng soab n welg toore. Bala, yãmb a Leevi nebã sẽn maandã yaa n looga nugu.»" 
Numbers16:8 Rẽ poore, a Moyiis yeela a Koore yaa: «Leevi buudã, kelg-y-yã!" 
Numbers16:9 Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn welg yãmb toor Israyɛll nebã sʋkã, n kɩt tɩ yãmb tõe n kolg n maan bãmb sɛk roogã tʋʋmdã, la y yals Israyɛll nebã taoor n sõng-bã ket n ka sek yãmba?" 
Numbers16:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sakame tɩ foom a Koore ne f saam-biisã fãa sẽn yaa Leevi yagensã tõe n kolg bãmba, tɩ yãmb leb n baood n dat n yɩ maan-kʋʋdba!" 
Numbers16:11 Foom ne f poorẽ dãmbã sẽn maan woto wã wilgdame tɩ yãmb naaga taab noor a yembr n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bala, ka ne a Aarõ la yãmb sẽn yẽgemdã ye.»" 
Numbers16:12 Rẽ zugẽ, a Moyiis tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool a Datã, ne a Abiram sẽn yaa a Elyaab kom-dibli wã tɩ b wa. La bãmb yeelame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Moyiis yaa: «Tõnd ka na n wa ye." 
Numbers16:13 Fo yiisa tõnd tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsg pʋgẽ, n tall tõnd n wa weoogã pʋgẽ ka tɩ d na n ki, tɩ rẽndã ka sek foom ye, tɩ f leb n dat n modg tõnd n soog-do!" 
Numbers16:14 Sẽn paas menga, ka tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsg pʋgẽ la fo tall tõnd n tɩ kẽes ye. Leb n ka pʋt ne reezẽ tɩɩs la f kõ-d me ye. Fo tẽedame tɩ nebã yaa zoens la? Tõnd ka na n wa ye.»" 
Numbers16:15 La a Moyiis sũurã puuga hal wʋsg t'a yeel Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Da sak-y n deeg-y nin-bãmbã kũunã ye. Bala, mam nan zɩ n deeg bãmb ned ba a yembr bũmbu, baa bõang mengã ye. La mam nan zɩ n maan b ned ba a yembr wẽng me ye.»" 
Numbers16:16 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela a Koore yaa: «Beoogo, bɩ foom ne f poorẽ dãmbã wa yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La bɩ a Aarõ me wa." 
Numbers16:17 Bɩ yãmb ne y neb kobs-yi la pis-nu wã ned kam fãa rɩk a wisd yõogr laag n zã, la a ning wisd a pʋgẽ n tall n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. La bɩ foom ne a Aarõ me maan a woto.»" 
Numbers16:18 La bãmb ned kam fãa rɩka a wisd yõogr laag n ning bug-saala, la a yugl wisd bug-saalã zugu, n tall n kẽng n tɩ yals sɛk roogã noore. La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ me rag n bee be." 
Numbers16:19 A Koore tigma a poorẽ dãmbã fãa, n kɩt tɩ b wa yals a Moyiis ne a Aarõ taoor sɛk roogã noore. La wakat-kãng bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã pukame tɩ nebã fãa yãnde." 
Numbers16:20 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa:" 
Numbers16:21 «Yi-y nebã sʋk n leb kɛɛnga, tɩ m na n sãam-b-la wakat-kãngã bala.»" 
Numbers16:22 La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽng n yeel yaa: «Wẽnnaam! Yaa yãmb n kõt bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn naanã vɩɩm! Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb na n yika y sũur ne nin-kãensã fãa, tɩ yaool n yaa nin-yɛng bal n beegã?»" 
Numbers16:23 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers16:24 «Yeel nebã tɩ b zãag b mens ne a Koore la a Datã ne a Abiram fu-rotã.» 
Numbers16:25 Dẽ, a Moyiis yikame n kẽng a Datã, ne a Abiram nengẽ, la Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã me yik n pugla yẽnda n kẽnge." 
Numbers16:26 La a Moyiis yeela nebã yaa: «Zãag-y y mens ne nin-wẽn-kãensã rotã, la y ra sɩɩs bãmb bũmb ba a yembr ye, tɩ bãmb yel-wẽnã yĩng ra wa n kɩt tɩ yãmb naag n ki ye.»" 
Numbers16:27 Dẽ, nebã zãag n basa a Koore ne a Datã, la a Abiram dotã. La a Datã ne Abiram yiime n yals b fu-rotã noyã, ne b pagbã, la b kambã ne b yagensã." 
Numbers16:28 Dẽ a Moyiis yeelame yaa: «Yãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tʋm maam tɩ m maan bõn-kãense, la ka maam n yãk yam n maandẽ ye." 
Numbers16:29 Nin-bãmbã sã n ki kũ-zaall wa nebã fãa sẽn kiidã, rẽnd ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tʋm maam ye." 
Numbers16:30 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n maan bũmb sẽn zɩ n zĩndi, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã yaag a noor n vel bãmb ne bũmb nins fãa b sẽn so wã, tɩ b sig kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ vɩɩse, yãmb na yaool n bãng tɩ nin-bãmbã paooga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Numbers16:31 A Moyiis sẽn nan gom n sɛ bal yee, la tẽn-gãongã sẽn pãrg a Datã ne a Abiram naoã tẽngre." 
Numbers16:32 Tẽn-gãongã yaaga a noor n vel a Datã ne a Abiram ne b yirã rãmb fãa, n paas a Koore nebã fãa, ne b laogã zãnga." 
Numbers16:33 Nin-bãmbã siga kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ vɩɩse, ne b sẽn so wã fãa, la tẽngã lebs n munums-b lame. Yɩɩ woto tɩ bãmb menem Israyɛll buudã sʋka." 
Numbers16:34 La Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n pẽ bãmbã sẽn wʋm b kelemsã, bãmb zoeeme. Bala, b rag n yɛɛsdame tɩ tẽn-gãongã na n wa vel bãmb me." 
Numbers16:35 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bugum wa rɩ neb kobs-yi la pis-nu wã sẽn dag n zãad b wisd yõogr laasã n yasẽ wã. 
Numbers17:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers17:2 «Yeel maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar t'a yiis wisd yõogr laasã sẽn be bugmẽ wã, n tɩ lob bug-saalã zĩ-zãrgẽ, tɩ bala, laasã lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Numbers17:3 Neb nins sẽn dag n so-b la-bãmbã maana yel-wẽna, n deeg b yel-wẽnã yaood sẽn yaa kũum. La ne rẽ fãa, b sẽn tall la-bãmb n wa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã yĩnga, b lebga maam n so. Rẽ wã, bɩ y rɩk la-bãmb n kud tɩ lebg paklse, tɩ y tall-b n lud tẽn-kugrã, la bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ keoogr bãnde, Israyɛll nebã yĩnga.»" 
Numbers17:4 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar wʋka neb nins bugmã sẽn kʋ wã zũud laasã sẽn yaa wisd yõogr laasã, n kud tɩ b lebg paklse, t'a rɩk-b n lud tẽn-kugrã." 
Numbers17:5 Woto, kud-pakles-kãens rag n tẽegda Israyɛll nebã tɩ sã n ka a Aarõ yagensã bala, nin-zẽng ka tar noor tɩ yõog wisd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor ye. La ned sã n kɩɩs tõ-kãngã, sɩbgr ning sẽn paam a Koore ne a poorẽ dãmbã na n paama a soaba, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a yeel a Aarõ wã." 
Numbers17:6 La bõn-kãng yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa yikame n yẽgem ne a Moyiis ne a Aarõ n yeele: «Yãmb n maan la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã sẽn ki wã.»" 
Numbers17:7 Israyɛll nebã tɩ gũbga a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, n na n zab ne-ba. La a Moyiis ne a Aarõ sẽn wẽnemd b nens n tees sɛk roogã sẽnẽ, b yãame tɩ sawad-taok n lud sɛk roogã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã pukame." 
Numbers17:8 Woto, a Moyiis ne a Aarõ kẽnga sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers17:9 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers17:10 «Yi-y nebã sʋk n leb kɛɛnga, tɩ m na n sãam-b-la wakat-kãngã bala.»" 
Numbers17:11 Dẽ poore, a Moyiis yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Rɩk f wisd yõogr laagã, n yãk bugum tẽn-kugrã zug n ningi, la f yugl wisd a zugu, n tall n kẽng sik zĩigẽ wã tao-tao, n tɩ maan sugr kosg tʋʋmdã nebã zugu, b beegrã yĩnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yikame, tɩ sãoongã zoe n sɩnge.»" 
Numbers17:12 Dẽ, a Aarõ maana wa a Moyiis sẽn yeelã. Yẽnda rɩka wisd yõogr laagã n zoe n kẽng nin-buiidã sʋka, n ta zĩig ninga sãoongã sẽn da zoe n sɩngã, la yẽnda yõoga wisdã n maan sugr kosg tʋʋmdã nebã yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Numbers17:13 La a Aarõ tɩ yalsa sẽn ki-bã ne sẽn vɩ-bã sʋka, la sãoongã yalsame." 
Numbers17:14 Neb nins sẽn ki-b sãoongã pʋgã sõor yaa neb tus-piig la a naas la kobs-yopoe, a Koore poorẽ dãmbã sẽn dag n zoe n ki wã sõor sẽn ka naage." 
Numbers17:15 La sãoongã sẽn yalsã, a Aarõ lebg n leba a Moyiis nengẽ sɛk roogã noore." 
Numbers17:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers17:17 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b kɩt tɩ buud fãa kãsem tall dasaar n wa kɩs-fo. Yaa rasab piig la a yiib la f tog n deege. La bɩ fo gʋls buud fãa yʋʋr a dasaar zugu. 
Numbers17:18 La Leevi buudã dasaar zugu, yaa Aarõ yʋʋrã la fo tog n gʋlse. Woto, buud fãa kãsem tara a dasaare." 
Numbers17:19 Fo tog n talla rasab-kãens n kẽng sɛk roogẽ wã n tɩ rɩgl-b kaoolã koglgã taoore, zĩig ning mam sẽn vẽnegd m meng ne yãmbã." 
Numbers17:20 Ad bũmb ning sẽn na n maane: ned ninga mam sẽn na n yãkã, a soabã dasaar na n tobame. Woto, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã sẽn yẽgemd ne yãmb tɩ tat maamã sɛ.»" 
Numbers17:21 La a Moyiis wilga Israyɛll nebã bũmb ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Dẽ, buud fãa kãsem talla a dasaar n wa kɩs a Moyiisi. La a Aarõ dasaarã sẽn naage, yaa rasab piig la yiibu." 
Numbers17:22 Woto, a Moyiis talla rasabã n tɩ rɩgl Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, sɛk roogã pʋgẽ." 
Numbers17:23 La rẽ yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, a Moyiis kẽe sɛk roogẽ wã. La a mikame t'a Aarõ sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nedã dasaar tobame. Rasaarã rag n tobame n ning puudu, n tol n tar biis sẽn mooge." 
Numbers17:24 Dẽ, a Moyiis wʋka rasabã fãa sẽn da be sɛk roogã pʋgẽ wã n wilg Israyɛll nebã. Israyɛll nebã fãa yãnda rasabã, la kãsem fãa leb n deega a dasaare." 
Numbers17:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tall a Aarõ dasaarã n tɩ lebs kaoolã koglgã taoore. Bɩ y bas-a beenẽ, t'a tõe n yɩ tẽegr bãnde, kɩɩsdbã yĩnga. Dẽ, fo na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã bas b yẽgengã mam taoore, n da wa ki ye.»" 
Numbers17:26 La a Moyiis maana bũmbã fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel-a t'a maan-a. 
Numbers17:27 Israyɛll nebã yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Fo ka ne nebã sẽn tar kũum! Tõnd tara sãoong bala, d na n ki n sɛɛ zãnga!" 
Numbers17:28 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn kolg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã kiidame. Rẽ yĩnga, yaa so-kãngã la tõnd fãa na n tũ n ki zãnga?»" 
Numbers18:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Ned sã n maan bũmb sẽn ka zems zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ, yellã bee foom ne f kom-dibli wã, la Leevi buudã zugu. La sã n yaa foom ne f kom-dibli wã n beege, y tʋʋmdã maaneg pʋgẽ, yellã na n zĩnda yãmb mens zutu." 
Numbers18:2 Bɩ f kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã sẽn yaa fo saam-biisã wa fo nengẽ. La foom ne f kom-dibli wã sã n wa n kẽng kaoolã sɛk roogẽ wã n na n maan y tʋʋmdã, b na n pʋgdame bal n sõngd foom." 
Numbers18:3 Leevi buudã sẽn yaa fo saam-biisã na n maana fo sẽn date, la b maan sɛk roogã tʋʋma. La bãmb ka tog n kolg bũmb nins sẽn welg toorã, wall tẽn-kugrã ye. Woto, bãmb ne yãmb ka na n ki ye." 
Numbers18:4 Bãmb na n sõngda yãmb sɛk roogã tʋʋm fãa pʋgẽ. La ned sẽn ka Leevi buudã ka tog n wa naag yãmb ye. 
Numbers18:5 Yaa yãmb bal n tog n maand sɛk roogã tʋʋmde, la tẽn-kugrã tʋʋmd me. Woto, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã ka na n leb n yik ne Israyɛll nebã ye." 
Numbers18:6 Ade, mam yãka yãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa Leevi roogã neb Israyɛll buudã suka, tɩ bãmb yaa mam dẽnda, la mam dɩk-b lame n kõ yãmb tɩ b tõe n maand sɛk roogã pʋgẽ tʋʋmã." 
Numbers18:7 La foom a Aarõ ne f kom-dibli wã na n maana y maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã tẽn-kugrẽ wã, ne zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa wã sẽn be fu-lillidgã poorẽ wã. Yaa maam n kõ yãmb tʋʋm-kãnga. La nin-zaalg sẽn ka Leevi ned sã n kolg be, bɩ b kʋ-a.»" 
Numbers18:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõta foom noore, tɩ f get kũun nins fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n talld n wat n kõt maamã yelle. Mam dɩkda kũun-kãens n kõt foom ne f kom-dibli wã, ne bũmb nins fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn wat n kõtẽ wã, tɩ yɩ fo nug-tikr kaamã pʋɩɩre, la a yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta.»" 
Numbers18:9 Rẽ wã, b sã n wa yãk kũun ning sẽn yaa mam dẽndã n yõog bugum tẽn-kugrã zug n sɛ, sẽn kell-a wã na n yɩ fo pʋɩɩre. Yaa zomã kũunã, yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maoongã kũuni, ne zems-n-taar maoongã kũun Israyɛll nebã sẽn tall n wa kõ maamã. Kũun-kãensã fãa b sẽn wa n kõ maamã na n yɩɩ foom ne f yagensã rẽnda." 
Numbers18:10 Bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ yãmb dɩɩbo. La yaa raopã ne kom-dibli wã bal n tar noor tɩ rɩ rɩ-kãnga, bala, a yaa rɩɩb sẽn welg toore." 
Numbers18:11 Kũun a taab nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n tall n wa ne wã, bɩ y reeg rẽ me. Mam kõta foom kũun-kãense. La yaa foom ne f kom-dibli wã la f kom-pugli wã, la ne fo buudã neb nins fãa sẽn ka rẽgem b mensã n tõe n dɩ bõn-kãense, t'a yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta." 
Numbers18:12 Mam leb n kõta foom bõn-koaadlã dẽenem biis nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn kõt maamã: Yaa kaam sẽn yaa sõama, ne reezẽ rã-paalga, la ka-paandã Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n yãk n wa kõ maamã." 
Numbers18:13 Tẽngã bõn-koaadlã biis bãmb sẽn na n tall n wa kõ maamã fãa, na n yɩɩ fo rẽnda. Ned ning fãa sẽn be fo zakã pʋgẽ n yaa yɩlemd tõe n dɩ-b lame." 
Numbers18:14 Dẽ, bũmb nins fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn kõt maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã na n yɩɩ yãmb dẽnda." 
Numbers18:15 Sẽn paase, ninsaalbã ne rũmsã kom-dẽemsã fãa b sẽn kõ maamã na n yɩɩ yãmb dẽnda. La baoosgo, fo na n deega yaoodo, n ledg ninsaalbã kom-dẽemsã, la rũms nins sẽn yaa-b rẽgdã kom-dẽems zĩigẽ." 
Numbers18:16 Bi-ribl-rẽeng buudã fãa sẽn ta kiuugu, b na n yaoo wanzuri wakɩ-koeems a nu, wa sẽn zems sɛk roogã ligd zɩslem makdgã." 
Numbers18:17 Bɩ f ra kɩt tɩ b wa yao n deeg nag-yãang bi-rẽenga, bɩ pe-yãang bi-rẽeng wall bʋ-yãang bi-rẽeng ye. Kom-dẽem-kãens yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so. Bɩ y raag bãmb zɩɩmã tẽn-kugrã zugu, la y rɩk b kaamã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, t'a yɩ yũ-noog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Numbers18:18 Rẽ poore, bãmb nemdã na n yɩɩ yãmb dẽnda, wa zems-n-taar maoongã rũng b sẽn tall n wa kõ maamã yãoogã ne a rɩtg gerã sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã." 
Numbers18:19 Woto, mam kõta yãmb kũun nins fãa Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n yãk kũun sẽn welg toor n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã. Kũun-kãens na n yɩɩ foom ne f kom-dibli wã la f kom-pugli wã pʋɩɩre, n yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, wa sẽn zems yamsem kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne foom la ne f yagensã yĩng zamaan fãa wã." 
Numbers18:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela a Aarõ yaa: «Tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã pʋgẽ, fo ka na n paam zĩiga, wall pʋɩɩr ye. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n yɩ fo pʋɩɩr la f paoongo, Israyɛll nebã sʋka.»" 
Numbers18:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeelame: «Ad pʋɩɩr ning mam sẽn na n kõ Leevi buudã tɩ yɩ b yaoodo, tʋʋmd ning bãmb sẽn maand sɛk roogã yĩngã yĩnga. Bõn-koaadl nins fãa piig pʋɩɩr Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n yãk n wa kõ maamã na n yɩɩ bãmb dẽnda." 
Numbers18:22 Bɩ Israyɛll buudã neb a taabã ra kolg sɛk roogã, n wa beeg maam n ki ye." 
Numbers18:23 Yaa Leevi roogã neb bal n tog n maan sɛk roogã tʋʋma. Dẽ, bãmb sã n wa beeg b tʋʋmdã maaneg pʋga, yellã na n paa bãmb mens zugu. Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, yãmb yagensã fãa yĩnga. La Leevi buudã ka na n paam zĩig tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre, wa Israyɛll buud a taabã ye." 
Numbers18:24 La mam na n kõo bãmb pʋɩɩre. Yaa piig pʋɩɩrã Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n yãkd n wat n kõt maamã n na n yɩ bãmb dẽnda. Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam yeel tɩ Leevi buudã ka na n lagem Israyɛll neb a taabã n paam zĩigã.»" 
Numbers18:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers18:26 «Ad bũmb ning fo sẽn na n wilg Leevi buudã: Israyɛll nebã sã n tall b piig pʋɩɩrã mam sẽn yeel tɩ yaa yãmb n so wã n wa kõ yãmba, bɩ yãmb me yãk pʋɩ-kãng piig pʋɩɩr n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers18:27 Dẽ, bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ yãmb kũun wa koodã y sẽn yãkd-y zeesẽ wã, wall b reezẽ rã-paalgã b sẽn wẽkd n ning-b b sĩmsẽ wã." 
Numbers18:28 Dẽ, woto na n yɩɩ kũun yãmb me sẽn tall n wa kõ maam. La yaa Israyɛll neb a taabã sẽn yãkd b piig pʋɩɩrã n wat n kõt yãmbã pʋgẽ, la y na n yãk pʋɩ-kãnga, n dɩk n tɩ kõ maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ, tɩ yɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda." 
Numbers18:29 La kũun nins fãa b sẽn na n wa kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ, bɩ y yãk sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers18:30 Bɩ f leb n yeel Leevi nebã yaa: Yãmb sã n wa yãk y pʋɩ-kãng n sɛ, bɩ yãmb mens soog sẽn kellã, wa Israyɛll nebã me sẽn yãkd b koodã, ne b reezẽ rãamã la b kaamã n kõt maamã, la b soog sẽn kellã." 
Numbers18:31 Yãmb ne y zakã rãmb tõe n dɩ-b-la zĩig ning fãa y sẽn date. Bala, rẽnda yaa tʋʋmd ning yãmb sẽn maand sɛk roogã pʋgẽ wã yaoodo." 
Numbers18:32 Yãmb sã n wa n yãk pʋɩɩr ning sẽn yaa sõamã wã n kõ maam n sɛ, yãmb tõe n dɩɩ sẽn kellã, tɩ yell ka zĩnd yãmb zug ye. La yãmb ka na n ki ye.»" 
Numbers19:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne Aarõ yaa: 
Numbers19:2 «Ad tõod nins mam sẽn kõt yãmba: Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ b tall nag-zẽeg sẽn ka tar zanga, la sẽn nan ka zɩlg zɩɩbo, n wa kõ-yã." 
Numbers19:3 La yãmb na n dɩka naafã n kɩs maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare. La yẽnda na n tall-a lame n yi sik zĩigã kirẽng n kɩt tɩ b kodg-a yẽnda nifẽ. 
Numbers19:4 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar na n tẽka naafã zɩɩm ne a nug-bila, n tees sɛk roogã noorã n mes naoor a yopoe." 
Numbers19:5 La b na n yõoga naafã ne a gãongã, la a nemdã ne a zɩɩmã n paas a pʋ-teedã maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar nifẽ." 
Numbers19:6 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar na n dɩka sɛɛdr raado, la izop ne pe-kõbd b sẽn moneme, n naag b fãa n lob bugmã sẽn dɩt naafã pugẽ." 
Numbers19:7 Dẽ zugẽ, maan-kʋʋdã na n pegsa a futã, la a so koom, n yaool n leb sikã zĩigẽ. La baoosgo, yẽnda na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal n tãag zaabre." 
Numbers19:8 Ned ning sẽn na n yõog-a naafã na n pegsa a futã, la a so koom. La baoosgo, a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal n tãag zaabre." 
Numbers19:9 La bɩ ned sẽn ka rẽgem a meng wʋk naafã tompeglmã, n yi sikã zĩig kɩreng n tɩ bao zĩig sẽn welg toor n dʋʋg-a be. La b na n bĩng-a-la be tɩ Israyɛll nebã yãkd n maand yɩlgr koom. Woto fãa yaa sẽn na yɩl n paam yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Numbers19:10 La ned ning sẽn na n wʋk-a naafã tompeglmã me na n pegsa a futã, la baoosgo, yẽnda na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd hal n tãag zaabre. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, Israyɛll nebã ne sãamb nins sẽn be bãmb sʋkã yĩnga.»" 
Numbers19:11 «Ned sã n sɩɩs ninsaal kũum, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem a yopoe." 
Numbers19:12 La rasem a tãab daarã ne a rasem a yopoe daarã, yẽnda tog n mesa a meng ne yɩlgr koomã, n lebg yɩlemde. Yẽnda sã n ka yɩlg a meng a rasem a tãab daarã ne rasem a yopoe daarã, yẽnda nan ket n yaa rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:13 Ned sã n sɩɩs ninsaal kũum n yaool n ka yɩlg a menga, yẽnda soab rẽgemda maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk zĩigã, la b na yiisa yẽnda Israyɛll buudã sʋka. Bala, b sẽn ka mes yẽnda ne yɩlgr koomã yĩnga, yẽnda ket n yaa rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:14 Ad tõod a taab mam sẽn kõt foom: Ned sã n wa ki fu-roog pʋgẽ, neb nins sẽn kẽed-b fu-roogã pʋgẽ, wall sẽn be fu-roogã pʋgẽ wã yaa rẽgd hal tɩ ta rasem a yopoe." 
Numbers19:15 La laok sã n be fu-roogã pʋg tɩ b ka lud-a sõama, bũmb ning fãa sẽn be laokã pʋgẽ wã na n lebga rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:16 Ned sẽn be weoogẽ sã n kẽn n tɩ lak kũum tɩ yaa ned b sẽn kʋ ne sʋʋga, wall ned sẽn ki a meng yĩnga, yẽnda soab na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ tãag rasem a yopoe. A na n yɩɩ woto me ne ned sẽn kẽn n tɩ lak ninsaal kõaba, bɩ yaoogo." 
Numbers19:17 Sẽn na yɩl n yɩlg nin-kãngã, b na n yãka naafã b sẽn kʋ n yõog yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga tompeglem, n ning laok pʋgẽ, la b yãk ko-yɩlemd n ningi." 
Numbers19:18 La bɩ ned sẽn ka rẽgem a meng rɩk izop wãad n sũk ko-kãng pʋg n mes fu-roog ning kũumã sẽn ki-a pʋgẽ wã, la a mes teed nins fãa la neb nins fãa sẽn da be roogã pʋgẽ wã. Ka rẽ bɩ a mes ned ning sẽn sɩɩs-a ninsaal kõabã, bɩ ninsaal kũumã, wall yaoogã." 
Numbers19:19 La rasem a tãab daarã ne rasem a yopoe daarã, ned ning sẽn ka rẽgem a mengã na n yãka yɩlgr koomã, n mes ned ning sẽn dẽgem a mengã. La rasem a yopoe wã daare, yẽnda na n pegsa a futã, la a so koom, la zaabr sã n ta, yẽnda na n lebga yɩlemde." 
Numbers19:20 La ned sẽn dẽgem sã n ka yɩlg a menga, b na n yiisa yẽnda Israyɛll buudã sʋka, tɩ bala, yẽnda rẽgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩ-sõngã. Bala, b sẽn ka mes yẽnda ne yɩlgr koomã yĩnga, yẽnda ket n yaa rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:21 Yõwã yaa no-tũudg sẽn ka sɛta, Israyɛll nebã yĩnga. Ned sã n yãk yɩlgr koomã n mes ned sẽn dẽgem a menga, a tog n pegsa a futã, la ned ning sẽn sɩɩs-a ko-kãng na n yɩɩ rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Numbers19:22 Ned sã n yaa rẽgdo, a sẽn sɩɩs bũmb ning fãa lebgda rẽgdo, la ned ning sẽn sɩɩs-a nin-kãng me na n lebga rẽgd hal tɩ ta zaabre.»" 
Numbers20:1 Israyɛll nebã fãa taa Sĩn weoogã pʋg pipi kiuugã pʋgẽ, n tɩ zĩnd Kadɛɛse. La yaa beenẽ la a Miryam ki yã, tɩ b mum-a." 
Numbers20:2 La koom dag n ka be be nebã sẽn na n yũ ye. Dẽ, bãmb tigma taab n na n zab ne a Moyiis ne a Aarõ." 
Numbers20:3 Bãmb yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tõnd sã n dag n naagẽ d saam-biisã n ki Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n são. 
Numbers20:4 Bõe yĩng tɩ y tall tõnd sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã n wa weoogẽ ka, tɩ tõnd ne d rũmsã na n ki?" 
Numbers20:5 Bõe yĩng tɩ y yiis tõnd Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã, n tall-d n wa zĩ-yo-kãngã pʋgẽ? Zĩ-kãngã ka zĩig tõnd sẽn tõe n bʋd bũmb ye. Kankams ka be, reezẽ tɩɩs ka be, la tɩɩs sẽn womd biis me ka be, la koom meng ka be n yũud ye.»" 
Numbers20:6 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne Aarõ basa nebã n loog n kẽng sɛk roogã noore. La bãmb wõgemdame n fõgen b nensã tẽnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b ziirã ne bãmba." 
Numbers20:7 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa:" 
Numbers20:8 «Dɩk f rasaarã tɩ foom ne f kẽem a Aarõ kẽng n tɩ tigim Israyɛll nebã. La y yals bãmb taoor n gom ne pĩigã yãmb sẽn ne wã, la pĩigã na n pusga koom tɩ y yũ. Fo na n maana woto n kɩt tɩ koom yi pĩigã pʋgẽ, tɩ Israyɛll nebã ne b rũmsã fãa yũ.»" 
Numbers20:9 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka a rasaarã sẽn da be Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogẽ wã." 
Numbers20:10 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ tigma nebã pĩigã sɛɛgẽ, n yeel bãmb yaa: «Yãmb a tõatbã, kelg-y-yã! Tõnd tõeeme n kɩt tɩ koom pusg n yi pĩ-kãngã zug sɩda?»" 
Numbers20:11 Dẽ, a Moyiis zẽka a rasaarã n wẽ pĩigã naoor a yiibu, la wakat-kãng bala, koom pusga pĩigã zug n yi wʋsgo, tɩ Israyɛll nebã ne b rũmsã yũ." 
Numbers20:12 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne Aarõ yaa: «Yãmb sẽn ka maan tẽeb ne maam, n wilg Israyɛll nebã tɩ mam yaa Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩdã yĩnga, ka leb n yaa yãmb n na n tall Israyɛll nebã n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ-bã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Numbers20:13 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ b boond ko-kãng tɩ Meriba koom, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹zabr koom.› Bala, yaa beenẽ, la Israyɛll nebã zab ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilg-b tɩ bãmb la Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩda." 
Numbers20:14 La a Moyiis zĩnda Kadɛɛs n tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng Edom rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Ade, fo saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã yeelame yaa: Yãmb miime tɩ tõnd paama tood buud toor-toore." 
Numbers20:15 Hal pĩnda, tõnd yaab-rãmbã rag n kẽng n tɩ kẽe Ezɩpte, n zĩnd be n kaoos wʋsgo, la Ezɩpt nebã namsa tõnd ne d yaab-rãmbã." 
Numbers20:16 Tõnd kelmame n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb wʋma tõnd kelemsã n tʋm malɛɛk t'a wa yiis tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã. Moasã, tõnd bee Kadɛɛse, tẽng ning sẽn yaa toadg ne fo tẽngã." 
Numbers20:17 Bɩ y kõ-d sor tɩ d pɩʋʋg y tẽngã n looge. Tõnd ka na n bʋdg y koodã, wall f reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã n loog ye. La d ka na n yũ tẽngã buls koom me ye. Yaa so-kõodrã bal la d na n tũ, la d ka na n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtgo, hal n wa tɩ yi y tẽngã ye.»" 
Numbers20:18 La Edom naabã leokame yaa: «Ayo! Y ka na n pɩʋʋg mam tẽngã n loog ye! Yãmb sã n kɩɩse, m na n yika zabr ne-yã.»" 
Numbers20:19 La Israyɛll nebã kell n leb n yeelame: «Yaa sorã bal la d na n tũ, la tõnd ne d rũmsã sã n yũ y tẽngã koom, y d na n yao a ligdi. Tõnd sẽn kot yãmb bũmb ning bala, yaa tɩ y bas tõnd tɩ d pɩʋʋg y tẽngã n looge.»" 
Numbers20:20 La Edom naabã yeelame: «Ayo! Yãmb ka na n tũ ka ye!» Dẽ, Edom nebã yii ne tãb-biis wʋsg sẽn tar pãnga, n na n seg Israyɛll nebã," 
Numbers20:21 n gɩdg-b tɩ b ra pɩʋʋg b tẽngã n loog ye. La Israyɛll nebã wẽnemdame n dɩk sor a to. 
Numbers20:22 Israyɛll nebã fãa yii Kadɛɛse, n loog n kẽng Hoor tãngã" 
Numbers20:23 sẽn be Edom tẽngã toadgẽ wã. La beenẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ yaa:" 
Numbers20:24 A Aarõ na n kiime n sak a saam-dãmba. Yẽnda ka na n kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã ye. Bala, Meriba koomã zĩigẽ, yãmb kɩɩsa mam noorã." 
Numbers20:25 Bɩ foom a Moyiis tall a Aarõ ne a biig a Eleyazaare, n kɩt tɩ b rʋ Hoor tãngã zugu." 
Numbers20:26 La y sã n ta tãngã zugu, bɩ f yees a Aarõ futã n yeelg a biig a Eleyazaare. Bala yaa beenẽ la a Aarõ na n ki n sak a saam-dãmba." 
Numbers20:27 A Moyiis maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Bãmb b tãabã fãa rʋʋ Hoor tãngã zugu, Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Numbers20:28 La a Moyiis yeesa a Aarõ futã n yeelg a Eleyazaare, la a Aarõ kii tãngã zug beenẽ. Dẽ poore, a Moyiis ne Eleyazaar yii tãngã zug n sigi." 
Numbers20:29 La Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yã t'a Aarõ kiime wã, b yãba a kʋʋrã rasem pis-tã." 
Numbers21:1 Araad naabã sẽn be Negɛɛv soolmẽ wã rag n yaa Kana neda. Yẽnda sẽn wʋm tɩ Israyɛll nebã rɩka Atarim tẽngã sor n watẽ, a yiime n tɩ zab ne bãmb n yõg bãmb neb kẽere." 
Numbers21:2 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã pʋlma Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Yãmb sã n sõng tõnd tɩ d tõog tẽn-kãngã nebã, d na n sãama a tẽmsã zãnga.»" 
Numbers21:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka Israyɛll nebã pʋʋsgo, n kɩt tɩ bãmb tõog Kana nebã. Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ Kana nebã, la b sãam b tẽngã zãnga, la b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Hoorma, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Raboogo.›" 
Numbers21:4 Israyɛll nebã yii Hoor tãngẽ wã n dɩk Mog-miuugã sore, sẽn na n yɩl n gil Edom tẽngã. La bãmb sẽn wa n be weoogã pʋg n kẽnda, b raoodã boogame." 
Numbers21:5 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã sɩngame n yẽgem ne Wẽnnaam, la ne a Moyiis n yeele: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yiis tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ d na n wa ki weoogẽ ka? Bur ka be ka, koom me ka be ka. La tõnd yamã me yaa n yii ne mandã sẽn yaa nin-bãan-dɩɩbã»" 
Numbers21:6 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma wag-toos Israyɛll nebã sʋka, la wiisã rũma bãmb neb wʋsg tɩ b ki." 
Numbers21:7 La neb nins sẽn ket-bã kẽnga a Moyiis nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd beegame! Bala, tõnd yẽgma ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la ne foom. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f pʋʋs n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b kɩt tɩ wiisã loog n bas-do.» Dẽ, a Moyiis pʋʋsa nebã yĩnga." 
Numbers21:8 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Rõog wag-toaagã naand ne zũudu, n dɩk-a n yagl ra-lugdg zugu. Woto, waaf sẽn dũm ned ninga fãa, a sã n nak n ges zũudã waafã, a ka na n ki ye.»" 
Numbers21:9 Dẽ, a Moyiis rõoga zũud waaf n yagl ra-lugdg zugu. La ned ning fãa waaf sẽn dũm t'a nak n ges zũud waafã, a soabã rag n ka kiid ye." 
Numbers21:10 Dẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã yika be, la bãmb tɩ siga Obote." 
Numbers21:11 La bãmb yika Obot n tɩ sig Ye-Abarim sẽn be weoogã pʋga, Moaab yaangã sẽnẽ." 
Numbers21:12 Bãmb leb n yii be n kẽng n tɩ sig n Zerɛɛd ko-soogã noore. 
Numbers21:13 La bãmb leb n yii zĩ-kãng n kẽng n tɩ ti Arno kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde. Arno kʋɩlgã ko-zoetem pɩʋʋgda Amoor-dãmbã soolem, n dabd weoogã pʋga. Bala, Arno kʋɩlgã n yaa toadga, Moaab tẽngã ne Amoor-dãmbã soolem sʋka." 
Numbers21:14 Yaa rẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zab yɩɩl sebr pʋga, b gomdã Wahɛɛb tẽngã sẽn be Sufa soolmẽ wã ko-soayã yelle, la a leb n gomda Arno ko-soayã yelle." 
Numbers21:15 La Arno koomã sẽn zoet n teesd Aar tẽngã, n yaa Moaab tẽngã toadga." 
Numbers21:16 Israyɛll nebã yii Arno n ta zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ ‹Bulgã.› La yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel a Moyiis t'a tigim Israyɛll nebã tɩ b kõ-b koom tɩ b yũ. 
Numbers21:17 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã pʋda yɩɩll n yeel yaa: «D kaas ne sũ-noogo, tɩ bulgã pusga koom!" 
Numbers21:18 Bul-kãng yaa nanambsã n tuki, Bul-kãng yaa kasem-dãmbã n tuki, B tuk-a-la ne b naam dasabã.» Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yii weoogẽ wã n kẽng Mataniya," 
Numbers21:19 n yi Mataniya n kẽng Nahalɩyɛlle, la bãmb yii Nahalɩyɛlle n kẽng Baamote," 
Numbers21:20 n yaool n yi Baamot n kẽng tãn-long ning sẽn pasgd Moaab tẽngã n teesd Pisga tãngã. Ned sã n be tãn-kãng zugu, a nee weoogã fãa gilli." 
Numbers21:21 Israyɛll nebã tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel Amoor-dãmbã naab a Sihon yaa: 
Numbers21:22 «Tõnd kot n na n pɩʋʋga yãmb tẽngã n looge. Tõnd ka na n bʋdg y koodã, wall f reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã n loog ye. La d ka na n yũ tẽngã buls koom me ye. Yaa so-kõodrã bal la d na n tũ, la d ka na n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtgo, hal n wa tɩ yi y tẽngã ye.»" 
Numbers21:23 La baoosgo, Amoor-dãmbã naab a Sihon ka sak tɩ Israyɛll nebã pɩʋʋg a tẽngã n loog ye. Yẽnda tigma a tãb-biisã fãa n na n yi n seg Israyɛll nebã weoogẽ wã. Yẽnda kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Israyɛll nebã Yakaas tẽngã." 
Numbers21:24 La Israyɛll nebã tõoga Amoor-dãmbã n deeg b tẽngã, sẽn sɩng ne Arno kʋɩlgã n tɩ tãag Yaaboke, n ta Amo nebã tẽngã toadga, bala, Amo nebã tẽngã toadgã rag n meeme n gũbgi." 
Numbers21:25 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã reega Amoor-dãmbã tẽmse, ne Hɛsbon la a tẽn-kɩremsã n sooge, la bãmb tɩ zĩnda be." 
Numbers21:26 Hɛsbon rag n yaa Amoor-dãmbã naab a Sihon na-tẽnga. Bala, yẽnda rag n zaba ne Moaab rãmbã pipi naabã n deeg a soolmã tẽmsã fãa, hal n tãag Arno." 
Numbers21:27 Yaa rẽ tɩ yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã yɩɩnd n yetẽ: «Wa-y Hɛsbon tẽngã, Tɩ d lebs n me a Sihon tẽngã t'a yalse." 
Numbers21:28 Bala, bugum n yi Hɛsbon, Bug-witim n yi a Sihon tẽngã, Bugmã rɩɩ Aar tẽngã sẽn be Moaabã, La a rɩɩ Arno tãmsã zut wẽn-naandsã." 
Numbers21:29 Moaab nebã, yãmb paama toogo! Wẽn-naandg a Kemok pʋʋsdba, yãmb yaa kũum! Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b kom-dibli wã lebg zoɛtba, N kɩt tɩ b kom-pugli wã, Lebg Amoor tẽng naab a Sihon yembse." 
Numbers21:30 Tõnd tãoo Amoor-dãmbã ne d pɛɛmã. Moasã, Hɛsbon sãama zãnga, la tẽngã fãa sãamame n tɩ tãag Dɩbõ. Tõnd wãa tẽnga fãa hal n tãag Nofa. Wakat-kãnga, bugmã rɩɩme n tãag Medeba.»" 
Numbers21:31 Yɩɩ woto la Israyɛll nebã reeg Amoor-dãmbã tẽngã n kẽ. 
Numbers21:32 A Moyiis tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ gilg n ges Yazɛɛr tẽngã. La Israyɛll nebã zab n deega Yazɛɛr tẽngã, ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, n dig Amoor-dãmbã sẽn da be beenẽ wã." 
Numbers21:33 Rẽ poore, bãmb toeema sore, n wẽnemd n dɩk Basan sorã. La Basan naab a Oog yii ne a tẽngã nebã fãa n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Da zoe Basan naab a Oog ye! Bala mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog yẽnda ne a nebã fãa, ne a tẽngã zãnga. Fo na n maana yẽnda wa fo sẽn da maan Amoor-dãmbã naab a Sihon sẽn dag n be Hɛsbondã.»" 
Numbers21:35 Israyɛll nebã tõoga naab a Oog ne a kom-dibli wã, la a tãb-biisã fãa. Bãmb kʋ-b-la zãnga, n ka bas tɩ ned ba a yembr põs ye. La bãmb deega a tẽngã n sooge." 
Numbers22:1 Israyɛll nebã yikame n lebg n tɩ sig Moaab tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd yaangã sẽn teesd Zeeriko wã." 
Numbers22:2 La wakat-kãnga, dag n yaa a Sipoor biig a Balak n yaa Moaab rĩma. Dẽ, yẽnda wʋma bũmb ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn maan Amoor-dãmbã. La rĩmã ne a nebã fãa sẽn yã tɩ Israyɛll nebã yaa wʋsg n watẽ wã, rabeem-kãseng yõk-b lame tɩ b sɩng rigbu. Dẽ, Moaab nebã yeela Madiyã nanambsã yaa: «Zãma-kãensã fãa na n dɩɩ tõnd sẽn so wã zãng fãa, wa naaf sẽn wãbd yamd weoogẽ.»" 
Numbers22:3  
Numbers22:4  
Numbers22:5 Dẽ, Moaab rĩmã tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng a Bewoor biig a Balaam nengẽ. A Balaam dag n bee Petoor sẽn be kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, a tẽngẽ wã. La Moaab rĩmã yeelame tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Neb n yi Ezɩpt n wa, la b yaa wʋsg hal n yɛdg n pid tẽngã, la bãmb wa n tilg n pẽnega mam soolmã." 
Numbers22:6 Dẽ wã, mam kota foom tɩ f wa kãab nin-bãmbã wẽng n kõ-ma, bala, b tara pãng n yɩɩd mam nebã. La fo sã n sak n wa kãab-b wẽnga, daar ning bɩ m tõog-ba, n dig-b n yiis tẽngã. Bala, mam miime tɩ fo sẽn ning ned ning barka, a soab paamda barka, la fo sẽn kãab ned ning wẽnga, kãabgã tũuda a soaba.»" 
Numbers22:7 Dẽ, Moaab ne Madiyã kãsem-dãmbã zãa kũun n kẽng n na n tɩ kõ bãngd a Balaam. La bãmb sẽn ta a Balaam nengẽ, b togs-a-la a Balak koɛɛgã." 
Numbers22:8 La a Balaam yeela bãmb yaa: «Gãand-y ka yʋngã, tɩ beoogo, m na togs-y koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kõ-ma. La Moaab nanambsã pa a Balaam yirã.»" 
Numbers22:9 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam soka a Balaam yaa: «Yaa ãnda rãmb la sẽn be fo zakẽ wã?»" 
Numbers22:10 A Balaam leoka Wẽnnaam yaa: «Yaa a Sipoor biig a Balak sẽn yaa Moaab rĩma n tʋm bãmb tɩ b wa yeel-m yaa: 
Numbers22:11 Neb n yi Ezɩpt n wa, la b yaa wʋsg n pid tẽnga fãa. Dẽ yĩngã, m kot-f lame tɩ f wa kãab bãmb wẽng n kõ-ma. Fo sã sak n kãab-ba, daar ning bɩ m zab ne-b n tõog n dig-ba.»" 
Numbers22:12 La Wẽnnaam yeela a Balaam yaa: «Ra tũ a Balak sẽn tʋm b rãmbã n kẽng ye. La ra kãab neb nins yell bãmb sẽn gomdã wẽng ye. Bala mam ning-b-la barka.» 
Numbers22:13 Dẽ, vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, a Balaam yikame n yeel nanambs nins a Balak sẽn tʋmã yaa: «Lebg-y n leb-y y tẽngẽ, tɩ bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m da tũ yãmb n kẽng ye.»" 
Numbers22:14 La Moaab nanambsã yikame n leb a Balak nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «A Balaam zãgsame t'a ka na n tũ tõnd n wa ye.» 
Numbers22:15 Dẽ, a Balak leb n baoo nanambs wʋsg sẽn tar naam n yɩɩd pĩnd dãmbã, n tʋm a Balaam nengẽ." 
Numbers22:16 Bãmb ta a Balaam nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «Ad a Sipoor biig a Balak koɛɛga: Maam a Sipoor biig a Balake, n kot foom a Balaam tɩ f sak n wa mam nengẽ la f ra zãgs ye." 
Numbers22:17 Fo sã n wa, mam na n kõ-f-la waoogr wʋsgo, la bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn na n kos maam, mam na n maan n kõ-f lame. Mam sẽn kot foom bala, yaa tɩ f wa kãab nin-bãmbã wẽng n kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers22:18 La a Balaam leoka a Balak sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã yaa: «Ba a Balak sã n kõ maam wanzuri wã ne sãnemã sẽn pid yẽnda na-yirã, mam ka tõe n maan bũmb ba a yembr sẽn kɩɩsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã noor ye." 
Numbers22:19 La baoosgo, bɩ yãmb pa ka n gãand yʋngã, tɩ m leb n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bãng b sẽn na n leb n yeel-m koɛɛg ninga.»" 
Numbers22:20 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa a Balaam nengẽ badaar yʋng n yeel-a yaa: «Sã n yaa tɩ nin-bãmbã waame n dat tɩ fo tũ-b n kẽnge, bɩ f yik n tũ-ba. La bɩ f bãng tɩ yaa bũmb ning mam sẽn na n yeel foomã bala, la f na n maane.»" 
Numbers22:21 La vẽkembeoogã yibeoogo, a Balaam yikame n ning a bõang yolg n tũ Moaab nanambsã n looge." 
Numbers22:22 A Balaam sẽn yik n tũ n loogã puuga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũuri. Dẽ, a Balaam dag n zao a bõang n dɩk sor n kẽnd t'a tʋmtʋmdb a yiibã yãagd-a. La ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk n sig n yals sorã zug n na gɩdg a Balaam t'a ra kẽng ye." 
Numbers22:23 Bõangã yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã sẽn yas sorã zug n zãad sʋʋga. Dẽ, bõangã basa sorã n pãrgd pʋtã, la a Balaam pãba bõangã n na n kẽes sorã zugu." 
Numbers22:24 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã kẽnga taoor n tɩ yals so-buk a ye sẽn pɩʋʋgd reezẽ tɩɩs pʋt a yiib sʋka, n tũ lals a yiib sʋka." 
Numbers22:25 Bõangã sẽn yã Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã, a kẽng n tɩ rɩdga lalgã n pogl a Balaam naoorã. La a Balaam leb n pãba bõangã." 
Numbers22:26 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã leb n kẽnga taoor n tɩ yals zĩig ning sorã sẽn yaa sẽk n yɩɩdã, tɩ ned ka tõe n tũ a goabgã bɩ a rɩtgã n loog ye." 
Numbers22:27 Bõangã sẽn yã Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã, a bur n lʋɩɩ tẽng ne a Balaam. La a Balaam sũurã puuga hal wʋsg t'a tar bõangã pãbr ne a rasaarã." 
Numbers22:28 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bõangã gome, n yeel a soaal a Balaam yaa: «Mam maan-y-la bõe, tɩ y pãbd-m hal naoor a tãab fãa?»" 
Numbers22:29 A Balaam leoka bõangã yaa: «Yaa fo sẽn tar maam n yaandẽ wã yĩnga! Mam sã n dag n tarẽ sʋʋga, m dag n na n kʋ-f-la zĩig pʋgẽ.»" 
Numbers22:30 La bõangã yeela a Balaam yaa: «Mam ka yãmb bõang la? Yãmb zombda maam wakat fãa, la rẽ yĩnga, mam minim n maanda yãmb a woto sɩda?» La a Balaam leokame tɩ ayo." 
Numbers22:31 Wakat-kãng bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka a Balaam ninã t'a yã malɛɛkã sẽn yas sorã zug n zãad sʋʋg a nugẽ. La zĩig pʋgẽ, a Balaam wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
Numbers22:32 Dẽ, malɛɛkã yeela a Balaam yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo pãbd f bõangã hal naoor a tãab fãa? Ade, mam waame n na gɩdg foom tɩ f ra kẽng ye. Bala, sor ninga fo sẽn dɩkã rabda sãoong zĩigẽ." 
Numbers22:33 Fo bõangã yãnda maam, n bʋdg naoor a tãab n bas maam. Bõangã sã n dag n ka bʋdgẽ, mam dag n na n kʋʋ foom, la m bas bõangã t'a vɩɩnde.»" 
Numbers22:34 La a Balaam yeela malɛɛkã yaa: «Mam kongame! Bala, mam dag n ka mi tɩ yãmb n yas sorã zug ye. La moasã, sã n mikame tɩ so-tog-kãngã ka noom yãmba, mam na n lebg n kuilame.»" 
Numbers22:35 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã leoka a Balaam yaa: «Kell n tũ nebã n kẽnge, la bɩ f bãng tɩ yaa goam nins mam sẽn na n togs foomã bal la f na n gome.» Dẽ, a Balaam kell n tũu nanambs nins a Balak sẽn tʋmã n looge." 
Numbers22:36 Moaab naab a Balak sẽn wʋm t'a Balaam watame, yẽnda yiime n kẽng n na n tɩ seg-a Moaab tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Aar pʋgẽ. Tẽn-kãng rag n bee Arno kʋɩlgã sẽn yaa Moaab tẽngã toadgã noore." 
Numbers22:37 Dẽ, a Balak soka a Balaam yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo ka sak n tũ neb nins mam sẽn tʋm pipi tɩ b wa bool foomã n wa? Fo rag n tagsdame tɩ mam ka tõe n waoog foom tɩ f sũur yɩ noog bɩ?»" 
Numbers22:38 A Balaam leoka naab a Balak yaa: «Yaa sɩda, mam waame, la mam ka tar koɛɛg n na n tosg yãmb ye. Yaa gomd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn na n ning m noorẽ wã bal la m na n togse.»" 
Numbers22:39 Dẽ, a Balaam tũ a Balak n looge, la bãmb taa tẽng ning sẽn boond tɩ Kiriyat-husotã." 
Numbers22:40 La naab Balak kʋʋ niig ne piis n maan maando. La yẽnda yãkame n tʋm tɩ b kõ a Balaam ne nanambs nins sẽn be ne-a wã. 
Numbers22:41 La vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, a Balak talla a Balaam n dʋ Bamot-Baall tãngã zugu, la beenẽ b rag n nee Israyɛll nebã begr bala." 
Numbers23:1 A Balaam yeela a Balak yaa: «Me tẽn-kug a yopoe ka, la f tall lols a yopoe, ne pe-raad a yopoe n wa kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers23:2 La a Balak saka a Balaam gomdã. La tẽn-kugr fãa zugu, bãmb dɩka loalg a ye, ne pe-raoogo, n maan maoongo." 
Numbers23:3 Dẽ, a Balaam yeela a Balak yaa: «Pa ka, n yals maoongã fo sẽn maanã sɛɛgẽ, tɩ m leb kɛɛnga, n ges Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõn vẽneg b meng ne-ma. B sã n vẽneg b meng ne-ma, m na togs-f koɛɛg ning b sẽn na n kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers23:4 Woto, Wẽnnaam vẽnega b meng ne a Balaam. La a Balaam yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Ade, mam mee tẽn-kug a yopoe, la tẽn-kugr fãa zugu, m maana loalg ne pe-raoog maoongo.»" 
Numbers23:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga a Balaam gomd ninga yẽnda sẽn tog n tɩ togsã." 
Numbers23:6 A Balaam lebg n leba naab a Balak nengẽ, n tɩ mik t'a ket n yas maoongã sɛɛgẽ, yẽnda ne Moaab nanambsã." 
Numbers23:7 Dẽ, a Balaam goma gom-minim goam n yeel yaa: «Moaab naab a Balak kɩtame tɩ b bool maam, Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ m yi Siiri tãmsã sẽn be yaangã n wa, Yẽnda yeela maam yaa: Wa kãab a Zakoob yagensã wẽng n kõ-ma, Wa kãab Israyɛll nebã wẽnga!" 
Numbers23:8 La mam na n yɩɩ wãna, N kãab Wẽnnaam sẽn ka kãab b rãmb wẽngã wẽnga?" 
Numbers23:9 Mam zĩnda tãmsã zut n get nin-bamba, Mam da bee tãmsã zut n get-ba, La mam mikame tɩ yaa buud sẽn welg toore, La bãmb miime tɩ b welga toor ne buud a taabã." 
Numbers23:10 Ãnda n tõe n sõd Israyɛll nebã n sɛ? Ãnda n tõe n bãng a Zakoob yagensã sõore? Bãmb yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd tẽng tom. Bɩ m kũumã yɩ wa nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa nin-tɩrsã kũum, La bɩ m baoosgã yɩ wa Israyɛll nebã baoosgo!»" 
Numbers23:11 Woto, a Balak yeela a Balaam yaa: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maan maam woto wã? Mam boola foom tɩ f wa kãab m bɛɛbã wẽnga, la maan a wãn tɩ fo wa kãabd bãmb kãab-noogo!»" 
Numbers23:12 La a Balaam leoka a Balak yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel maam bũmb ningã la mam tog n togs sɩda?»" 
Numbers23:13 La a Balak yeela a Balaam yaa: «Wa tũ maam tɩ d kẽng zĩig a to, la be, fo na n tõog n yãnd-b-la gilli, dẽ, f na kãab-b wẽng n kõ-ma. Bala, ka wã, fo nee bãmb bɛk bala.»" 
Numbers23:14 Dẽ, a Balak talla a Balaam n kẽng Sofim pʋʋgã sẽn be Pisga tãngã zugã. La beenẽ, a Balak leb n mee tẽn-kug a yopoe, la tẽn-kugr fãa zugu, yẽnda kʋʋ loalg ne pe-raoog n maan maoongo." 
Numbers23:15 A Balaam yeela yẽnda yaa: «Pa ka n yals n pẽneg maoongã fo sẽn maanã, tɩ m leb kɛɛng n tɩ gũ koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers23:16 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n sega a Balaam, n wilg-a gomd ninga yẽnda sẽn tog n tɩ gomã. La bãmb yeela a Balaam t'a lebg n leb a Balak nengẽ." 
Numbers23:17 A Balaam lebg n leba a Balak nengẽ, n tɩ mik t'a ket n yas a maandã sɛɛgẽ, yẽnda ne Moaab nanambsã." 
Numbers23:18 Dẽ, a Balaam goma ne gom-minim n yeel yaa: «Sipoor biig a Balake, Yik n kelg maam neere!" 
Numbers23:19 Wẽnnaam ka ninsaal n yagd zĩrẽ ye, La bãmb leb n ka ninsaal n tekd yam ye! Bãmb sã n yeel bũmbu, b pidsd-a lame." 
Numbers23:20 Ade, yaa Wẽnnaam meng n kõ maam noore, N yeel tɩ m ning nin-bãmbã barka. Dẽ wã, mam ka tõe n tek bũmb ye." 
Numbers23:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka ne yell a Zakoob yagensã zug ye, La b ka ne wẽng a Zakoob buudã sʋk ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, La bãmb bee b nebã sʋka. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab reegda b nebã waoogre." 
Numbers23:22 Yaa Wẽnnaam n yiis bãmb Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ, Ne pãn-kãseng sẽn wẽnd we-naaf pãnga." 
Numbers23:23 Tɩɩm ka tõe n maan a Zakoob yagensã bũmb ye, La bagr me ka tõe Israyɛll nebã ye. Wẽnnaam vẽnegda bãmb bũmb fãa, Wa sẽn zems a wakate." 
Numbers23:24 Ade, nin-bãmbã yikda wa gɩgem-yãanga, N yikd n yas wa gɩgem-daoogo. A ka gãanded t'a ka wãb rũng ning a sẽn yõka nemdo, La a ka gãanded t'a ka yũ rũng ning a sẽn kʋ wã zɩɩm ye.»" 
Numbers23:25 A Balak yeela a Balaam yaa: «Fo sã n mi tɩ f ka rat n kãab nin-bãmbã wẽnga, bɩ f ra ning-b bark me wɛ.»" 
Numbers23:26 La a Balaam leoka a Balak yaa: «Mam pĩnd n togsa foom tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yeel maamã bal la m na n maane!» 
Numbers23:27 Dẽ, a Balak leb n yeela a Balaam yaa: «Sã n yaa woto bɩ f wa tɩ m tall f tɩ d kẽng zĩig a to, tɩ daar ning bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sak tɩ f kãab nin-bãmbã wẽng n kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers23:28 La a Balak talla a Balaam n dʋ Pewoor tãngã zugu, zĩig ning sẽn teesd weoogã." 
Numbers23:29 Dẽ, a Balaam yeela a Balak yaa: «Me tẽn-kug a yopoe ka, la f tall lols a yopoe, ne pe-raad a yopoe n wa kõ-ma.»" 
Numbers23:30 La a Balak saka a Balaam gomdã. La a Balak rɩka loalg ne pe-raoogo, n maan maoong tẽn-kugr fãa zugu." 
Numbers24:1 A Balaam bãngame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tolg n dat n ninga Israyɛll nebã barka. Dẽ, a Balaam ka leb n nams a meng n na n bao vẽnegr wa pĩndã ye. Yẽnda wẽnemda a neng n tees weoogã." 
Numbers24:2 A Balaam sẽn zẽk a nenga, a yãnda Israyɛll buudã neb sẽn be b sikã zĩigẽ. La Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã siga a Balaam zugu." 
Numbers24:3 La a Balaam goma gom-minim goam n yeel yaa: «Ade, maam a Balaam, a Bewoor biigã n gomde. Yaa soab ninga nin sẽn puk t'a neẽ wã n gomde." 
Numbers24:4 Ade, maam n gomde, mam yaa soab ning sẽn wʋmd Wẽnnaam goamã, La m yaa soab ning sẽn ne Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam vẽnegrã. La m yaa Soab ning sẽn wõgemded n waoogd Wẽnnaam, Tɩ nin pukdẽ tɩ m wʋmd goamã." 
Numbers24:5 Israyɛll nebã, a Zakoob yagense, Ad-y y fu-rotã sɩd be neere." 
Numbers24:6 Y fu-rotã yɛdga wa ko-soayã, Wa zẽed zĩig sẽn be kʋɩlg noore, Wa Alowɛs tɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sele, Wa sɛɛdr tɩɩs sẽn sel kʋɩlg noor wogle," 
Numbers24:7 Bãmb wẽnda koom sẽn pid bulg n puugdẽ, Tɩ pʋtã paamd koom wʋsgo, Israyɛll rĩma na n tõoga Agaag-rãmbã, La bãmb soolmã pãng na n paasame." 
Numbers24:8 Yaa Wẽnnaam n yiis bãmb Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ, La yɩɩ ne pãn-kãseng sẽn wẽnd we-naaf pãnga. La buud nins sẽn wat n zabd ne bãmbã, bãmb sãamd-b-la zãnga. Bãmb wõrda b bɛɛbã kõaba. La b tãood-b ne pɛɛma." 
Numbers24:9 Bãmb wũunduda wa gɩgemde, N wũg wa gɩgem-yãanga, La ãnda n tõe n modg-b tɩ b yiki? Israyɛll nebã, ned ning fãa sẽn ningd yãmb barka, A soab na n paama barka, La ned ning fãa sẽn kãabd yãmb wẽnga, A soab na n paama kãab-wẽnga.»" 
Numbers24:10 A Balak sũurã puuga hal wʋsg ne a Balaam. Dẽ, a Balak mesa a nus n yeel a Balaam yaa: «Mam boola foom ka, n yet tɩ f wa kãab m bɛɛbã wẽng n kõ-ma. La yaa naoor a tãabẽ soab la woto, fo sẽn tar bãmb bark ningr bala!" 
Numbers24:11 Moasã wã, kẽng n looge, kuil f yiri. Mam da pʋlma foom tɩ m na n kõ-f-la waoogr wʋsgo, la Zu-soabã mong-f-la waoog-kãnga.»" 
Numbers24:12 A Balaam yeela a Balak yaa: «Mam yaool n dag n pɩnd n togsa neb nins fo sẽn tʋmã n yeel-b yaa: 
Numbers24:13 Ba a Balak sã n kõ maam wanzuri wã ne sãnemã sẽn pid yẽnda na-yirã, mam ka tõe n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã noor ye. La yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n wilg maam koɛɛg ningã bal la m na n togse.»" 
Numbers24:14 Moasã, m na n lebg n leba m nebẽ. La sẽn deng rẽ, wa tɩ m wilg-f Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n maan Moaab nebã bũmb ninga wakat sẽn wate." 
Numbers24:15 Dẽ, a Balaam goma gom-minim n yeel yaa: «Ad maam a Balaam, a Bewoor biigã gomde, Soab ning sẽn ne sẽn watã." 
Numbers24:16 Ad ned ning sẽn wʋmd-a Wẽnnaam goamã sẽn yeta. Yaa ned ning sẽn tar-a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab bãngrã koɛɛga. Soab ning sẽn wõgemded n waoogd Pãng-Soabã, la nin sẽn puk-a wã goamã." 
Numbers24:17 Mam nee sẽn wat beoogo, la ka rũndã ye. Mam ne-a lame, la a ket n zãrame, Mam nee ãdg sẽn puk a Zakoob yagensã sʋka. Rĩm n na n zĩnd Israyɛll buudã pʋgẽ, La yẽnda na n pogla Moaab zugã ne-a naamã dasaare. La a kʋ a Sɛt kambã fãa." 
Numbers24:18 Yẽnda na n deega Edom n sooge, La a tõog Seyɩɩr nebã sẽn yaa a bɛɛbã, n deeg b tẽngã n sooge. Israyɛll nebã na n paama tõogre." 
Numbers24:19 A Zakoob yagengã na n sooga a bɛɛbã, la a na n sãama tẽngã neb nins sẽn kellã.»" 
Numbers24:20 Dẽ zugẽ, a Balaam sẽn yã Amalɛk nebã, a goma gom-minim n yeel yaa: «Amalɛk tẽngã tara pãng n yɩɩd tẽmsã fãa, La daar n wate, tɩ b na n sãam-a zãnga.»" 
Numbers24:21 A Balaam sẽn yã Kɛn nebã me, a goma gom-minim n yeel yaa: «Kɛn nebã, yãmb vɩ y tẽngẽ tɩ y pɛlg yaa kãenkãe, Wa liuul sẽn tɩʋ a tʋk pĩig zugu." 
Numbers24:22 La baoosgo, Kayẽ rotã na n dɩɩ bugum, Asiiri nebã sã n a tall-y n tɩ kẽes yembdo.»" 
Numbers24:23 A Balaam leb n goma gom-minim n yeel yaa: «Wẽnnaam sã n yãk yam n na n sãame, Ãnda soab n tõe n põse?" 
Numbers24:24 Neb na n yii Sɩpr ne koom kogend n wa, La bãmb na n sãama Asiiri ne Ebɛɛr nebã, La Ebɛɛr me na n sãamame.»" 
Numbers24:25 A Balaam sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a lebg n kuila a yiri, la a Balak me lebg n loogame." 
Numbers25:1 Israyɛll nebã kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Sitim, la beenẽ, bãmb maana yoob ne Moaab kom-pugli wã." 
Numbers25:2 La Moaab kom-pugli wã kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã kʋ maand n kõ bãmb wẽn-naandsã. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã naaga Moaab kom-pugli wã n wãb b maandã nemdo, la b pʋʋs b wẽn-naandsã." 
Numbers25:3 Woto, Israyɛll nebã tɩ naag n pʋʋsa Pewoor wẽn-naandg a Baalle, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga ne Israyɛll nebã." 
Numbers25:4 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Yõg Israyɛll buudã taoor dãmb n kɩt tɩ b luul-b wĩnto-sʋka mam taoore, dẽ, mam sũurã sẽn yik wʋsg ne Israyɛll nebã na n sigame.»" 
Numbers25:5 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela Israyɛll bʋ-kaoodbã yaa: «Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa kʋ a buudã neb nins sẽn pʋʋsd Pewoor wẽn-naandg a Baallã.»" 
Numbers25:6 Wakat ning a Moyiis ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n be sɛk roogã noor n yãbdã, b yãnda Israyɛll ned a yembr sẽn tall Madiyã bi-pugl n wa kẽ a roogẽ." 
Numbers25:7 La Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagengã yika nebã sʋk n dɩk kãnde. 
Numbers25:8 Yẽnda pʋgla raoã n tɩ kẽ n bʋʋg yẽnda ne pagã fu-roogẽ wã, n kõs bãmb b yiibã fãa pɛlã, tɩ b ki. La wakat-kãng bala, bãagã sẽn dag n kʋʋd Israyɛll nebã yalsame." 
Numbers25:9 La bãagã sẽn da zoe n kʋ neb ninsã sõor yaa neb tus-pisi la a naase. 
Numbers25:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers25:11 «Gese, maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ yageng a Fineyaas sẽn yaa a Eleyazaar biigã kɩtame tɩ mam sũurã sẽn da yik ne Israyɛll nebã sigi. Bala, bãmb sʋkã, yaa yẽnda n ka sak mam poorẽ, rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam sẽn ka sakd tɩ b waoog wẽnd a to n paas maamã yĩnga, mam ka kʋ Israyɛll nebã zãng ye." 
Numbers25:12 Woto yĩngã, bɩ f yeel a Fineyaas tɩ m na n maana zems-n-taar kaool ne-a." 
Numbers25:13 Kaool-kãng yaa yẽnda ne a yagensã yĩnga, la a kɩtdame tɩ bãmb lebg maan-kʋʋdb zamaan fãa yĩnga. Bala, yẽnda wilgame tɩ mam sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã, yẽnda sɩd bee mam poorẽ. Bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn maanã kɩtame tɩ mam kõ Israyɛll nebã b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Numbers25:14 Israyɛll ned ning a Fineyaas sẽn lagem ne Madiyã bi-puglã n kʋ wã yʋʋr boondame t'a Zimri, n yaa Sɩmyõ buudã taoor soab a Salu biiga." 
Numbers25:15 La Madiyã bi-puglã b sẽn kʋ wã yʋʋr da boondame t'a Kozbi. A baaba yʋʋr la a Sʋʋre, n yaa Madiyã buud a yembr rot wʋsg naaba.»" 
Numbers25:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers25:17 «Yik-y n Zab-y ne Madiyã nebã n sãam-b zãnga! 
Numbers25:18 Bala, bãmb maana sɩlem ne yãmba, bãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb pʋʋs Pewoor wẽn-naandg a Baallã yĩnga. Bãmb naab a yembr bi-pugl a Kozbi kii wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n sɩbgd nebã. Bala, bãmb tɩ pʋʋsa Pewoor wẽn-naandg a Baalle.»" 
Numbers25:19 Toogã loogr zugẽ. 
Numbers26:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis ne a Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar yaa: 
Numbers26:2 «Sõd-y Israyɛll nebã fãa buud-buudu. Sõd-y raop nins sẽn ta yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd woto, n tõe yɩ tãb-biisã.»" 
Numbers26:3 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne a Eleyazaar goma ne Israyɛll nebã Moaab weoogẽ wã, wakat ning b sẽn wa n be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn tees ne Zeeriko wã, n yeel-b yaa:" 
Numbers26:4 «D na n sõda Israyɛll raop nins yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi la sẽn yɩɩd woto wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã.»" 
Numbers26:5 Pipi yaa a Zakoob bi-kãseng a Rubɛn buudã nebã. Bãmb yaa Hanok roogã sẽn yaa Hanok yagensã, la Palu roogã sẽn yaa a Palu yagensã." 
Numbers26:6 La Hɛsron roogã yaa a Hɛsron yagense, tɩ Karmi roogã yaa a Karmi yagense." 
Numbers26:7 Ad a Rubɛn buudã nebã la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-naas la a tãab la kobs-yopoe la pis-tã. 
Numbers26:8 A Elyaab yaa a Palu yagenga la yẽnda n doga a Nemwɛlle, a Datã, ne a Abiram. La a Datã ne a Abiram da yaa buudã kãsem-dãmb nins sẽn naag a Koore nebã n yẽgem ne Wẽnnaam n zab ne a Moyiisã ne a Aarõ wã." 
Numbers26:9  
Numbers26:10 Tẽngã yaaga a noor n vel bãmb ne a Koore, la yɩɩ daar ninga bugmã sẽn dɩ a Koore poorẽ dãmbã n kʋ neb kobs-yi la pis-nu wã. Bõn-kãng yɩɩ keoogr Israyɛll neb a taabã yĩnga." 
Numbers26:11 La a Koore kom-dibli wã ka naag n ki badaar ye. 
Numbers26:12 A Sɩmyõ buudã rot la woto: «Yaa a Nemuwɛll dotã sẽn yaa Nemuwɛll yagensã, a Yamin dotã sẽn yaa Yamin yagensã, la a Yakin rotã sẽn yaa Yakin yagensã." 
Numbers26:13 A Zeera rotã sẽn yaa a Zeera yagensã, la a Sayull dotã sẽn yaa Sayull yagensã." 
Numbers26:14 Ad Sɩmyõ buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-yi la a yiib la kobs-yi.» 
Numbers26:15 A Gaad buudã rot la woto: Yaa a Sefõ rotã sẽn yaa Sefõ yagensã, la a Hagi rotã sẽn yaa Hagi yagensã, a Suni rotã sẽn yaa Suni yagensã," 
Numbers26:16 A Ozni rotã sẽn yaa Ozni yagensã, la a Eri rotã sẽn yaa Eri yagensã." 
Numbers26:17 A Arood rotã sẽn yaa Arood yagensã, la a Areli rotã sẽn yaa Areli yagensã." 
Numbers26:18 Ad Gaad buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-naas la kobs-nu.
