Numbers26:19 A Zʋʋda buudã rot la woto: A Zʋʋda kamb a Ɛɛr ne a Ona kii Kana tẽnga pʋgẽ. A Sela rotã sẽn yaa Sela yagensã, a Perɛɛz rotã sẽn yaa Perɛɛz yagensã, la a Zeera rotã n yaa a Zeera yagensã. A Perɛɛz yagensã la woto: Yaa a Ɛsron rotã sẽn yaa Ɛsron yagensã, la a Amull rotã sẽn yaa Amull yagensã." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 A Zʋʋda buudã neb la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-yopoe la a yoob la kobs-nu. 
Numbers26:23 A Isakaar buudã rot la woto: Yaa a Tola rotã sẽn yaa Tola yagensã, la a Puuva rotã sẽn yaa Puuva yagensã." 
Numbers26:24 A Yasuub rotã sẽn yaa Yasuub yagensã, la a Sɩmrõ rotã sẽn yaa Sɩmrõ yagensã." 
Numbers26:25 A Isakaar buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-yoob la a naas la kobs-tã. 
Numbers26:26 A Zabulõ buudã rot la woto: Yaa a Serɛɛd rotã sẽn yaa Serɛɛd yagensã, a Elõ rotã sẽn yaa Elõ yagensã, la a Zalehɛll rotã sẽn yaa Zalehɛll yagensã." 
Numbers26:27 A Zabulõ buudã neb la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-yoob la kobs-nu. 
Numbers26:28 A Manaase ne Efrayiim buudã rot yaa Zozɛf yagensã fãa. 
Numbers26:29 A Manaase buudã yaa a Makɩɩr dotã sẽn yaa Makɩɩr yagensã, la a Makɩɩr biig a Galaad rotã sẽn yaa Galaad yagensã." 
Numbers26:30 A Galaad rotã yaa a Yezɛɛr rotã sẽn yaa Yezɛɛr yagensã, a Helɛk rotã sẽn yaa Helɛk yagensã," 
Numbers26:31 a Asriyɛll rotã sẽn yaa Asriyɛll yagensã, a Sekɛm rotã sẽn yaa Sekɛm yagensã," 
Numbers26:32 a Semida rotã sẽn yaa Semida yagensã, a Efɛɛr dotã sẽn yaa Efɛɛr yagensã." 
Numbers26:33 A Efɛɛr biig a Selofaad ka paam bi-ribl ye. Yẽnda roga kom-pugli bala. Bãmb yʋyã la woto: Yaa a Mala, a Hogla, a Milka, a Noha ne a Tɩrsa." 
Numbers26:34 A Manaase buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-nu la a yiib la kobs-yopoe. 
Numbers26:35 A Efrayiim buudã rot la woto: Yaa a Sutela rotã sẽn yaa Sutela yagensã, a Bekɛɛr dotã sẽn yaa Bekɛɛr yagensã, a Tahãn rotã sẽn yaa Tahãn yagensã," 
Numbers26:36 la a Sutela biig a Ɛɛrã rotã sẽn yaa Ɛɛrã yagensã. 
Numbers26:37 A Efrayiim buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-tã la a yiib la kobs-nu. Bu-kãens a yiibã rot yaa a Zozɛf yagense. 
Numbers26:38 A Benzame buudã rot la woto: yaa a Bela rotã sẽn yaa Bela yagensã, a Asbɛll dotã sẽn yaa Asbɛll yagensã, a Ahiram doogã sẽn yaa Ahiram yagensã," 
Numbers26:39 a Sufam doogã sẽn yaa Sufam yagensã, ne a Ufam doogã sẽn yaa Ufam yagensã." 
Numbers26:40 A Bela roogã yaa a Ard dotã sẽn yaa Ard yagensã, ne a Naama roogã sẽn yaa Naama yagensã." 
Numbers26:41 A Benzame buudã rot la woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-yoobe. 
Numbers26:42 A Dan buudã roog yaa a yembr bala: yaa a Suham doogã sẽn yaa Suham yagensã. 
Numbers26:43 A Dan roogã neb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-yoob la a naas la kobs-naase. 
Numbers26:44 A Asɛɛr buudã rot la woto: yaa Imna roogã sẽn yaa Imna yagensã, la a Isvɩ roogã sẽn yaa Yisevi yagensã, a Beriya roogã sẽn yaa Beriya yagensã." 
Numbers26:45 A Beriya roogã yaa a Ebɛɛr doogã sẽn yaa Ebɛɛr yagensã, ne a Malkiyɛll doogã sẽn yaa Malkiyɛll yagensã." 
Numbers26:46 A Asɛɛr da tara bi-pugl t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Seera. 
Numbers26:47 A Asɛɛr buudã rot neb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-nu la a tãab la kobs-naase. 
Numbers26:48 A Neftali buudã rot la woto: yaa a Yasiyɛll roogã sẽn yaa Yasiyɛll yagensã, a Guni rotã sẽn yaa Guni yagensã," 
Numbers26:49 a Yetsɛɛr dotã sẽn yaa Yetsɛɛr yagensã, ne a Sɩlɛm dotã sẽn yaa Sɩlɛm yagensã." 
Numbers26:50 A Neftali buudã rot neb sõorã yaa raop tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-naase. 
Numbers26:51 Israyɛll neb nins fãa b sẽn sõdã sõor yaa raop tus kobs-yoob la a yembre, la kobs-yopoe la pis-tã." 
Numbers26:52 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers26:53 «Bɩ f pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ tɩ Israyɛll buud fãa paam a pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems a buudã neb sõore. 
Numbers26:54 Buud fãa tog n paama zĩig wa sẽn zems a nebã sõore. Buud ning neb sõor sẽn yaa wʋsg tog n paama zĩ-bedre, la buud ning neb sõor sẽn paoodã, tog n deega zĩ-bila." 
Numbers26:55 Baa ne rẽ fãa, tẽnga pʋɩɩb pʋgẽ, b tog n maana poeere, tɩ buud fãa paam wa zems a nebã sõore." 
Numbers26:56 La yaa poeerã n na n wilg buud fãa sẽn segd n deeg zĩig ninga. Sã n yaa bu-kãsenga, a reegda zĩ-bedre, la sã n yaa buud sẽn paooda, a reegda zĩ-bilfu.»" 
Numbers26:57 Ad a Leevi buudã neb b sẽn sõdã: a Gɛrsõ roogã sẽn yaa Gɛrsõ yagensã. A Kehat roogã sẽn yaa Kehat yagensã, ne a Meraari roogã sẽn yaa a Meraari yagensã." 
Numbers26:58 La Leevi buudã rot pʋsẽ, rot a taab n be beenẽ tɩ b nebã ka waoog ye: Yaa Libni roogã, la Ebrõ roogã, la Maali roogã, la Musi roogã, ne a Koore roogã. A Kehat n dog a Amram." 
Numbers26:59 La a Amram kẽe kãadem ne a Zokebɛɛde, sẽn yaa a Leevi bi-pugl ning a sẽn dog Ezɩpt tẽngã. La a Zokebɛɛd doga a Amram kamb a Tãabo: Yaa a Aarõ, a Moyiisi, ne b tão-poak a Miryam." 
Numbers26:60 A Aarõ doga kamb a naase. Yaa a Nadaabe, a Abiyu, ne a Eleyazaar la a Itamaare." 
Numbers26:61 La a Nadaab ne a Abiyu kii wakat ning bãmb sẽn tall bug-zẽng sẽn ka tẽn-kugrã zug bugmã, n wa yõog wisdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã." 
Numbers26:62 Raopã, ne kom-dibli nins yʋʋm sẽn ta kiuugu, la sẽn yɩɩd woto wã fãa sõor yaa neb tus pis-yi la tãabo. La b ka sõd bãmb n naag Israyɛll buudã neb a taabã ye. Bala, bãmb dag n ka segd n paam zĩig tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩr wa Israyɛll buud a taabã ye." 
Numbers26:63 Israyɛll nebã a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar sẽn sõdã yɩɩ woto. Yaa Moaab weoogã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn tees Zeeriko tẽngã la b maan sõd-kãnga. 
Numbers26:64 La Israyɛll neb nins b sẽn sõdã sʋka, b ka leb n yãnd neb nins a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ sẽn dag n sõd Sɩnayi weoogã pʋgẽ wã ye." 
Numbers26:65 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab dag n keooga bãmb n yeel-b tɩ b na n kii weoogã pʋga. Dẽ, sã n ka a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb ne a Nun biig a Zozoe bala, ned ba a yembr ka kell ye." 
Numbers27:1 A Zozɛf biig a Manaase buudã pʋgẽ, rao a ye n dag n be be t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Selofaade. Yẽnda yaa a Makɩɩr biiga, a Makɩɩr yaa a Galaad biiga, t'a Galaad yaa a Hefɛɛr biiga. La a Selofaad dag n tara kom-pugli. Bãmb yʋy la woto: «Yaa a Mala, a Noa, a Ogla, a Milka, ne a Tirsa.»" 
Numbers27:2 Bãmb kẽnga a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, ne Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ, la nebã fãa taoor sɛk roogã noor n tɩ yeel yaa:" 
Numbers27:3 «Tõnd ba wã kii weoogã pʋgẽ. La yẽnda rag n ka naag a Koore ne a poorẽ dãmbã n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Yẽnda ki a mengã kongr yĩnga. La a yaool n dag n ka paam bi-ribl ye. 
Numbers27:4 Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd ba wã yʋʋr na n menema a buudã neb sʋka, a sẽn ka tar bi-riblã yĩnga? Bɩ y kõ tõnd zĩig d ba wã ba-biisã sʋka!»" 
Numbers27:5 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka bãmb kosgã n wilg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers27:6 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Moyiis n yeel yaa: 
Numbers27:7 «A Selofaad kom-pugli wã tara bʋʋm! Bɩ f kõ bãmb zĩig b ba wã ba-biisã sʋka, tɩ yɩ bãmb pʋɩɩre. Yaa bãmb n na n deeg b ba wã pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers27:8 Rẽ poore, bɩ f yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: Rao sã n ki n ka bas bi-ribla, bɩ y rɩk a paoongã n kõ a bi-puglã t'a sooge." 
Numbers27:9 La sã n mikame tɩ kiidã ka tar bi-pugl me, bɩ y rɩk a paoongã n kõ a ba-biisã." 
Numbers27:10 La kiidã sã n ka tar ba-biisi, bɩ y rɩk a paoongã n kõ a ba wã ba-biisi." 
Numbers27:11 La kiidã ba wã sã n ka tar ba-biisi, bɩ y rɩk a paoongã n kõ a buudã pʋgẽ ned ninga rogem sẽn tɩ pẽ ne kiidã n yɩɩda. Bõn-kãngã na n yɩɩ no-tũuds Israyɛll nebã sẽn tog n tũ, wa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg a Moyiisã.»" 
Numbers27:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Rʋ Abarim tãngã zug n ges tẽng ning mam sẽn na n kõ Israyɛll nebã. 
Numbers27:13 Fo na n yãnda tẽngã, la fo me na n kii wa f kẽem a Aarõ." 
Numbers27:14 Bala, Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n zabd ne maam n yẽgemd Sĩn weoogã pʋgẽ tɩ b rata koomã, yãmb kɩɩsa mam noorã, n ka wilg Israyɛll nebã tɩ mam yaa Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩd ye. Bãmb sẽn dag n gomdã yaa Meriba koomã yelle. Yaa yẽgengã sẽn zĩnd koomã poorẽ Kadɛɛs sẽn be Sĩn weoogã pʋgã wɛɛngẽ.»" 
Numbers27:15 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa:" 
Numbers27:16 «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n kõt bõn-naandsã fãa vɩɩm, bɩ y yãk ned n lʋɩɩs y nebã taoore." 
Numbers27:17 Bɩ a yɩ ned sẽn na n tõog n lʋɩ bãmb taoor n tɛ-b wakat fãa. Dẽ, bãmb kõn yɩ wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩm ye.»" 
Numbers27:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Moyiis n yeela yaa: «Yãk a Nun biig a Zozoe n tik-a ne f nusi, bala mam Sɩɩgã be a zugu." 
Numbers27:19 Bɩ f tall-a n kẽng maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, la nebã fãa taoore, n kɩt t'a reeg f zĩig nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Numbers27:20 La bɩ kõ yẽnda noor ning f sẽn tarã, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa sak-a." 
Numbers27:21 La yẽnda na n pʋgda maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, t'a wat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore n deesd koeesã n togsd-a. La a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa tog n saka no-kãense.»" 
Numbers27:22 La a Moyiis maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. Yẽnda talla a Zozoe n kẽng maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar ne Israyɛll nebã fãa taoore. 
Numbers27:23 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka a nus n tik a Zozoe, n kɩt t'a reeg yẽnda zĩiga, wa noor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ yẽnda wã." 
Numbers28:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiisi," 
Numbers28:2 t'a gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b yaa: «Ade, yãmb tog n talla y maandã ne y kũunã sẽn yõogd bugmã n wa kõ maam wa sẽn zems a wakate. La bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ yũ-noog sẽn tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers28:3 La daar fãa, yãmb tog n talla pe-ribli a yiib sẽn ka tar zanga, n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam. La y na n maanda maoon-kãng daar fãa." 
Numbers28:4 Bɩ b rɩk pe-ribl a yembr n maan maoong yibeoogo, la b rɩk a to wã n maan maoong zaabre." 
Numbers28:5 La b tog n paasa zom wam a tã sẽn nag ne oliiv kaam lengr la pʋɩ-sʋka. 
Numbers28:6 Daar fãa maoon-kãngã, sẽn yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũugã sẽn yaa noogã tat mam yamã, na n kell n yɩɩ wa maoong ning b sẽn maan n kõ maam Sɩnayi tãngã zugã." 
Numbers28:7 La y sã n na n maan yibeoog pe-riblã maoongo, bɩ y paas reezẽ rãam litr a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka, tɩ b tall n wa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Numbers28:8 La zaabre, bɩ y rɩk pe-ribl a yiibẽ soabã n maan maoongo, la y paas reezẽ rãam lɩng a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka, wa yãmb sẽn paas yibeoog maoongã. La a na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũugã yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers28:9 La vʋʋsg daarã, yãmb na n talla yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yiib sẽn ka tar zanga, n wa maan maoongo. Yãmb tog n paasa ne zom wũmbli a yoob sẽn nag ne kaam, la ne reezẽ rãam." 
Numbers28:10 La vʋʋsg daar fãa, bɩ y maan maoon-kãng n paas daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n naagd ne zom la reezẽ rãamã." 
Numbers28:11 Kiuug fãa pipi daare, yãmb na n maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Maoon-kãng yaa lulli a yiibu, ne pe-raoog a ye, la yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe sẽn ka tar zanga." 
Numbers28:12 La yãmb na n naga zom ne kaam n tũnug rũng fãa. Lull fãa yaa zom kɩlo a wɛ, la pe-raoog yaa zom kɩlo a yoobe." 
Numbers28:13 La pe-ribl fãa na n yɩɩ zom kɩlo a tãabo, la bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers28:14 La yãmb sã na n wa ne reezẽ rãam kũuni, loalg fãa yaa reezẽ rãam lɩms a tãabo, la pe-raoog yaa lɩms a yiibu, la pe-ribl fãa yaa lɩng a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka. Woto yaa maoong b sẽn tog maan yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ kiuug fãa pipi daare." 
Numbers28:15 La yãmb tog n maana boɛɛg maoongo, y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga, n paas daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n naagd ne reezẽ rãam n kõtẽ wã." 
Numbers28:16 Yʋʋmdã pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naas daarã, yãmb na n tigma taab Pak tigrã yĩng n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers28:17 La kiu-kãng rasem piig la nu wã daare, yãmb na n sɩngame n maan tigrã rasem a yopoe, la rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, yãmb tog n wãba bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle." 
Numbers28:18 La tigrã pipi daare, yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd ye, la y segd n tigma taab n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers28:19 Yãmb tog n talla lulli a yi, la pe-raoog a ye, ne yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe sẽn ka tar zãnga, n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers28:20 La rũng fãa, yãmb na n paasa zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Lull fãa yaa zom kɩlo a wɛ, la pe-raoog yaa zom kɩlo a yoobe." 
Numbers28:21 La pe-ribli a yopoe wã, a yembr fãa yaa zom kɩlo a tãabo." 
Numbers28:22 La yãmb na n talla boɛɛg n wa tɩ b kʋ n maan maoong y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. 
Numbers28:23 Maan-bãmbã fãa na n paasa yibeoog fãa maoongã b sẽn yõogd bugmã. 
Numbers28:24 La tigrã rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, bɩ y maan dɩɩb kũun daar fãa, n yõog bugum t'a yũug yɩ noog n ta Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam. La kũun-kãens tog n naaga daar fãa maoongã ne a reezẽ rãamã b sẽn tũnugdã." 
Numbers28:25 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ y tigim taab n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye." 
Numbers28:26 Daar ninga yãmb sẽn na n tigs y pipi bõn-koaadlã, bɩ y yãk y koodã dẽenem biisi, n tall n wa kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La badaare, bɩ y tigim taab n waoog maam. La y ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye." 
Numbers28:27 Yãmb tog n talla lols a yi, la pe-raoog a ye, ne yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe sẽn ka tar zãnga, n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers28:28 La rũng fãa, yãmb na n paasa zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Lull fãa yaa zom kɩlo a wɛ, la pe-raoog yaa zom kɩlo a yoobe." 
Numbers28:29 La pe-ribli a yopoe wã, a yembr fãa yaa zom kɩlo a tãabo." 
Numbers28:30 La yãmb na n talla boɛɛg n wa tɩ b kʋ n maan maoong y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. 
Numbers28:31 La yãmb tog n maana maoon-kãngã, n paas daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n naag ne a zomã, la a reezẽ rãamã. Bɩ y wa ne rũms sẽn ka tar zanga, n paas reezẽ rãamã b sẽn naagdã." 
Numbers29:1 Kiuug a yopoe soabã pipi daarã, bɩ y tigim taab n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye, bala yaa kɩdeng daare." 
Numbers29:2 Yãmb tog n waa ne lulla, la pe-raoogo, ne yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe, la b fãa tog n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar zanga, n tall n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, tɩ yũugã yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers29:3 La rũng fãa zugu, yãmb tog n naaga zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Lull yaa zom kɩlo a wɛ, tɩ pe-raoog yaa zom kɩlo a yoobe." 
Numbers29:4 La pe-ribl fãa na n yɩɩ zom kɩlo a tãabo. 
Numbers29:5 La yãmb tog n talla boɛɛg n wa kʋ n maan maoong n kõ maam, y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga." 
Numbers29:6 La yãmb tog n maana maoon-kãng n paas daar fãa maoongã, ne kiuug fãa pipi daar maoongã, b sẽn naagd ne zomã la reezẽ rãamã. Bãmb na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam.»" 
Numbers29:7 Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piigã daare, yãmb tog n tigma taab n loe noor n waoog maam, la y ka tog n tʋm badaar ye." 
Numbers29:8 Bɩ y maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam, ne lulla, la pe-raoogo, ne yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe, la b fãa tog n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar zang ye." 
Numbers29:9 La rũng fãa tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Sã n yaa lulla, y tũnugda zom kɩlo a wɛ, la pe-raoog na n yɩɩ zom kɩlo a yoobe." 
Numbers29:10 La pe-ribl fãa tog n yɩɩ zom kɩlo a tãabo. 
Numbers29:11 La yãmb tog n talla boɛɛg n wa kʋ n maan maoong n kõ maam y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. La maoon-kãens tog n naaga badaar sugr kosg maoongã, bala, yaa sugr kosg daare, n naag daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n tũnugd ne a zomã, la a reezẽ rãamã." 
Numbers29:12 La kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, bɩ y tigim taab n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La badaare, yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd ye. Yãmb tog n dɩka rasem a yopoe wã fãa n maan tigrã." 
Numbers29:13 La pipi daarã, yãmb tog n talla lulli piig la a tãabo, ne pe-raad a yiibu, la yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũug tat Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam, la tog n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar zang ye." 
Numbers29:14 La rũng fãa, y tog n tũnuga ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Sã n yaa lulla, yaa zom kɩlo a wɛ. La pe-raoog yaa zom kɩlo a yoobe," 
Numbers29:15 La pe-ribl fãa zugu, yaa zom kɩlo a tãabo." 
Numbers29:16 La yãmb tog n talla boɛɛg n wa kʋ n maan maoong n kõ maam, y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. La maoon-kãens tog n naaga daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n tũnugd ne a zomã, la a reezẽ rãamã." 
Numbers29:17 La tigrã rasem a yiibã daare, n tɩ tãag a rasem a yopoe daarã, yãmb tog n maana maoong ne rũms sẽn ka tar zanga, n tũnug ne zomã la reezẽ rãamã kũuni, n paas daar fãa maoongã b sẽn yõogd bugmã. Rũmsã la woto: Yiibẽ daarã, yaa lull piig la yiibu, ne pe-raad a yiibu, la yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga." 
Numbers29:18 Tãabẽ daarã, yaa lull piig la a ye, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga. Rasem a naasã daare, yaa lulli piiga, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga. Rasem a nu wã daare, yaa lulli a wɛ, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga. Rasem a yoobã daare, yaa lulli a nii, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga. Rasem a yopoe wã daare, yaa lulli a yopoe, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd pe-ribli piig la a naase, n paas boɛɛga." 
Numbers29:19 La tigrã rasem a nii daarã sẽn yaa yaoolem daar yãmb sẽn tog n maan tigin-kãseng sẽn welg toorã, yãmb ka tog n tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye." 
Numbers29:20 Bɩ y tall lulla, ne pe-raoogo, la yʋʋmd pe-ribli a yopoe, sẽn ka tar zanga, n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, t'a yũug yaa noog n tat maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam." 
Numbers29:21 La rũng fãa, yãmb tog n tũnuga zom sẽn nag ne kaam, la reezẽ rãam, wa sẽn zems noor ning b sẽn kõ wã." 
Numbers29:22 La yãmb tog n talla boɛɛg n wa kʋ n maan maoong n kõ maam, y yel-wẽnã sugr kũun yĩnga. La maoon-kãens tog n naaga daar fãa maoongã b sẽn maande, n tũnugd ne a zomã, la a reezẽ rãamã." 
Numbers29:23 Yaa maoon-kãensã la y na n maand tigr fãa n kõt maam a Sẽn-ka-Saabo, n paas daar fãa maandã, ne a zomã sẽn nag ne kaamã, la a reezẽ rãamã. La y tõe n paasa y zems-n-taar maoongã ne y pʋleng pidsg maoongã." 
Numbers30:1 La a Moyiis togsa Israyɛll nebã tõod nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg yẽnda wã. 
Numbers30:2 Dẽ zugẽ, a Moyiis boola buudã kãsem-dãmb n yeel-b yaa: «Ad noy a taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ:" 
Numbers30:3 Ned sã n pʋlem t'a na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo kũuni, bɩ a wẽename t'a na n maana bũmbu, bɩ a ra bas n ka pids ye. Yẽnda tog n modg n pidsa bũmb ning sẽn yi a noorẽ wã." 
Numbers30:4 La bi-pugl sẽn ket a ba zakẽ sã n maan pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wall a wẽename t'a na n maana bũmbu," 
Numbers30:5 a ba wã sã n bãng t'a maana pʋlengo, n yaool n ka yeel-a tɩ bũmbu, bi-puglã tog n pidsa a pʋlengã." 
Numbers30:6 La daar ning a ba wã sẽn bãngã, a sã n yeel bi-puglã tɩ yẽnda ka sak pʋlengã a sẽn maanã, bɩ bi-puglã bas a pʋlengã n da pids ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n ning-a taal ye. Bala, yaa a ba wã n gɩdg-a." 
Numbers30:7 La bi-puglã sã n maan pʋlengo, wall a wẽen n ka yals n tagse, a sã n wa kuil sɩda," 
Numbers30:8 t'a sɩdã bãnge, n ka yeel-a tɩ bũmb a sẽn bãngã daare, pagã tog n pidsa a pʋlengã." 
Numbers30:9 La daar ning a sɩdã sẽn bãng pʋlengã, a sã n yeel a pagã tɩ yẽnda ka sake, bɩ pagã bas a pʋlengã n da pids ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n ning-a taal ye." 
Numbers30:10 La pʋg-kõor bɩ pag sẽn ka leb n vɩ ne a sɩd sã n maan pʋlengo, a tog n pids-a lame." 
Numbers30:11 La pag sã n vɩ ne a sɩda, n maan pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wall a wẽen t'a na n maana bũmbu," 
Numbers30:12 t'a sɩdã bãnge, n ka yeel-a tɩ bũmbu, pagã tog n pidsa a pʋlengã." 
Numbers30:13 La daar ning a sɩdã sẽn bãngã, a sã n gɩdg a pagã t'a ra pids a pʋlengã, bɩ a ra pids ye. Bala, yaa a sɩdã n gɩdg-a. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n ning-a taal ye." 
Numbers30:14 Pag sã n maan pʋlengo, wall a wẽen n yeel t'a ka na n maan bũmbu, a sɩdã tara noor tɩ sake, wall a gɩdg-a t'a ra pids a pʋlengã ye." 
Numbers30:15 La a sɩdã sã n bãnge, n ka yeel a pagã tɩ bũmbu, hal tɩ ta vẽkembeoogo, a sɩdã sẽn sĩndã wilgdame t'a saka pʋlengã bɩ wẽenegã pidsgu." 
Numbers30:16 La sɩdã sã n bas tɩ vẽeg beoogo, t'a rat n gɩdg pʋlengã pidsgu, taalã bee raoã zugu.»" 
Numbers30:17 Ade, yaa tõ-bãmbã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ a Moyiisi, sẽn kẽed ne pag sẽn vɩ ne a sɩda, wall bi-pugl sẽn ket n vɩ a ba zakẽ wɛɛngẽ." 
Numbers31:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers31:2 «Kẽng n tɩ sɩbg Madiyã nebã n dok Israyɛll nebã sũuri. Rẽ poore, fo na n kiime.»" 
Numbers31:3 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Bɩ y yãk neb kẽer yãmb sʋkã, tɩ b bob b zab-teed n kẽng n tɩ sɩbg Madiyã nebã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã." 
Numbers31:4 Bɩ y yãk tãb-biis tusr Israyɛll buud fãa pʋgẽ. 
Numbers31:5 Dẽ, Israyɛll tãb-bi-sulã pʋgẽ, yãmb na n yãka raop tusr buud fãa pʋgẽ. Woto, tãb-biisã fãa sõorã na n yɩɩ neb tus-piig la a yiibu.»" 
Numbers31:6 Dẽ, a Moyiis kɩtame tɩ b fãa kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ, la a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas tũu bãmba. La yaa a Fineyaas n dag n zãad sɛk roogã teedo, n paas zabrã tãntãado." 
Numbers31:7 Dẽ, bãmb zaba ne Madiyã nebã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã, n kʋ raopã zãnga." 
Numbers31:8 La bãmb kʋʋ Madiyã nanambs a nu wã me: Yaa a Evi, a Rekɛm, a Suuri, a Ʋʋre, ne a Reba, la b kʋ a Bewoor biig a Balaam n paase." 
Numbers31:9 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yõga Madiyã pagbã ne b kambã n maan yembse, la b zɛ b rũmsã fãa, la b sẽn so wã zãnga." 
Numbers31:10 La Israyɛll nebã yõoga Madiyã nebã tẽmsã, ne b sik zĩisã fãa bugum." 
Numbers31:11 La bãmb talla teedã b sẽn wʋkã, ne nebã la rũmsã b sẽn yõgã n looge." 
Numbers31:12 Bãmb talla nebã b sẽn yõgã ne teedã b sẽn wʋkã, n kẽng n tɩ wilg a Moyiis ne a Eleyazaare, la Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Moaab kunkubã zut sẽn yeg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n tees Zeeriko wã nengẽ." 
Numbers31:13 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne a Eleyazaar la Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmb fãa yii sik zĩigẽ wã n na n tɩ seg tãb-biisã." 
Numbers31:14 La a Moyiis sũurã puuga ne tãb-biisã nanambsã sẽn nan yi zabrã zĩigẽ n watẽ wã. A Moyiis yeela bãmb yaa: 
Numbers31:15 «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb bas pagbã n ka kʋ? 
Numbers31:16 Yãmb mensã bãng n sɛɛme tɩ yaa Madiyã pagb la sẽn kelg a Balaam saglsã, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã wẽnemd n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Pewoor wẽn-naandg a Baall yellã wakatã. La yaa yel-kãng pʋgẽ, la bã-wẽngã paam Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã." 
Numbers31:17 Moasã, bɩ y kʋ kom-dibli wã fãa, la y kʋ pʋg-sadb nins fãa sẽn bãng raoã." 
Numbers31:18 La bɩ y bas kom-pugli nins fãa sẽn nan ka mi-b raoã, n da kʋ ye. Soog-y-ba." 
Numbers31:19 Yãmb sʋkã neb nins sẽn zoe n kʋ neda, ne neb nins sẽn sɩɩs-b kũumã tog n yii sikã zĩigẽ wã n tɩ zĩnd kɩreng rasem a yopoe. La yãmb ne yem-pogsã me tog n yɩlga b mens rasem a tãabã ne rasem a yopoe wã daare." 
Numbers31:20 Yãmb tog n yɩlga futã, la teoog buud fãa sẽn maan ne gãongo, la teoog buud fãa sẽn maan ne bʋ-kõbdo, la ne laok buud fãa sẽn maan ne raado.»" 
Numbers31:21 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar yeela tãb-biis nins sẽn kẽng-b zabrã yaa: «Ad bũmb ning sẽn gʋls tõog ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Moyiisã pʋgẽ." 
Numbers31:22 Teoog buud fãa sẽn maan ne sãnemã, wanzuri, zũudu, kutu, la ne namdo, la waasdã," 
Numbers31:23 sẽn dat n togs tɩ teoog buud fãa sẽn ka rɩt bugmã, bɩ y ning-a bugmẽ, tɩ bugmã yɩlg-a. La sã n yaa ne teoog ning fãa sẽn ka tõe ning bugmẽ wã, bɩ los-a yɩlgr koomã pʋga." 
Numbers31:24 La rasem a yopoe daarã, bɩ y pegs y futã, la yãmb na n lebga yɩlma. Dẽ poore, y na yaool n lebg n leb sik zĩigẽ wã.»" 
Numbers31:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers31:26 «Bɩ foom ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, la buudã nanambsã, naag taab n sõd zabrã zĩigẽ teedã b sẽn wʋkã, ne nebã la rũmsã b yõg zabrã zĩigẽ wã." 
Numbers31:27 La bɩ f rɩk teedã n pʋɩ pʋɩ-sʋk n kõ neb nins sẽn kẽng-b zabrã, ne neb a taabã fãa sẽn ketã." 
Numbers31:28 La pʋɩɩr ning fo sẽn kõ neb nins sẽn kẽng-b zabrã zĩigẽ wã pʋgẽ, fo na n yãka pʋɩɩr n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo: Neb kobs-nu pʋgẽ, yaa nin-yɛnga. La rũm-bɛdã ne bõensã la rũm-bãoonegã sʋka, bãmb kobs-nu pʋgẽ, yaa rũng a ye. La pʋɩɩr-kãng yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so." 
Numbers31:29 La fo na n dɩka pʋɩɩrã n yãk pʋɩɩr n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, tɩ yɩ kũun maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Numbers31:30 La pʋɩɩr ning sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã sẽn ketã rẽndã pʋgẽ, fo tog n yãka nin-yɛng neb pis-nu pʋgẽ, la niigã ne bõensã, la rũm-bãoonegã, rũmsã fãa, yaa rũm-yɛng rũms pis-nu pʋgẽ, la f yãkd n kõ Leevi buudã, tɩ yaa bãmb n get Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã yelle.»" 
Numbers31:31 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Numbers31:32 Zabrã te-zɛɛdmã pʋga, sẽn kellã yaa rũm-bãooneg tus kobs-yoob la pis-yopoe la a nu." 
Numbers31:33 Niig tus pis-yopoe la a yiibu. 
Numbers31:34 Bõens tus pis-yoob la a yembre. 
Numbers31:35 La pʋg-sadb sẽn nan ka mi raoã tus pis-tã la a yiibu. 
Numbers31:36 B sẽn yãk tãb-biisã pʋɩɩrã yɩɩ rũm-bãooneg tus kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu. 
Numbers31:37 La b yãka rũm-bãooneg kobs-yoob la pis-yopoe la a nu n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Numbers31:38 Leb n yaa niig tus pis-tã la a yoobe, tɩ b yãk bãmb pis-yopoe la a yiib n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo," 
Numbers31:39 n paas bõens tus pis-tã la kobs-nu, tɩ b yãk bãmb pis-yoob la a yembre, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers31:40 La ninsaalbã sõor yɩɩ tus piig la a yoobe, tɩ b yãk neb pis-tã la a yiib n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Numbers31:41 La a Moyiis rɩka pʋɩɩr ning b sẽn yãk Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Moyiisã." 
Numbers31:42 La pʋɩɩrã pʋɩ-sʋk ning b sẽn yãk n kõ Israyɛll nebã, rat n yeel tɩ pʋɩɩr ning a Moyiis sẽn yãk n kõ tãb-biisã tɩ kellã," 
Numbers31:43 yaa rũm-bãooneg tus kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu. 
Numbers31:44 La niig tus pis-tã la a yoobe. 
Numbers31:45 N paas bõens tus pis-tã la kobs-nu. 
Numbers31:46 La ninsaalbã sõor yɩɩ tus piig la a yoobe. 
Numbers31:47 La pʋɩɩr ning sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã rẽndã pʋgẽ, a Moyiis yãka nin-yɛng neb pis-nu pʋgẽ, la rũm-yɛng rũms pis-nu pʋgẽ, n kõ Leevi buudã nebã. Tɩ bala, yaa bãmb n get Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã tʋʋmd yelle, wa zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Numbers31:48 Tãb-bi-sul nanambsã, ne tãb-biis tusr-tusr nanambsã, la tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã kẽnga a Moyiis nengẽ," 
Numbers31:49 n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd sõda tãb-biis nins tõnd sẽn so wã n mik tɩ ned ka paoog ye. 
Numbers31:50 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ tõnd ned kam fãa tall sãnem teed nins tõnd sẽn wʋkã n wat n na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yɩ kũuni, tɩ b tõe n bas-d tɩ põse. Yaa yãndo, zũyã, nugbĩnsi, tʋb-londo, la te-bobdɩ.»" 
Numbers31:51 Dẽ, a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar n reega sãnem teed nins fãa b sẽn tall n wa wã." 
Numbers31:52 La sãnem teed nins fãa Tãb-bi-sul nanambsã, ne tãb-biis tusr-tusr nanambsã, la tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã sẽn tall n wa wã zɩslem rag n taa kɩlo koabg la pis-yopoe." 
Numbers31:53 La tãb-biisã ned kam fãa rag n wʋka teed a meng yĩnga. 
Numbers31:54 La a Moyiis ne a Eleyazaar rɩka sãnem teed nins fãa tãb-bi-sul nanambsã, ne tãb-biis tusr-tusr nanambsã, la tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã sẽn tall n wa wã n tɩ bĩng sɛk roogã pʋgẽ, tɩ tõe n yɩ tẽegr Israyɛll nebã yĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Numbers32:1 Rubɛn ne Gaad nebã da tara rũms wʋsgo, la bãmb yãame tɩ Yayezɛɛr ne Galaad tẽngã rag n yaa sõama rũmsã yĩnga." 
Numbers32:2 Dẽ, Gaade, ne Rubɛn nebã kẽnga a Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, la Israyɛll nebã nanambsã nengẽ n tɩ yeel yaa:" 
Numbers32:3 «Atarote, la Dɩbõ, ne Yazɛɛre, la Nimra, la Ɛsbon, ne Elale, la Sebam, ne Nebo, la Beyõ tẽmsã" 
Numbers32:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõogã yaa tẽms sẽn yaa sõama ne rũms gʋʋlgo. La tõnd me la sẽn yaool n tar rũmsã la.» 
Numbers32:5 Dẽ, bãmb leb n yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Tõnd kotame tɩ y sak kõ-d noor tɩ d soog tẽn-kãngã, la y ra kɩt tɩ d kẽng Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd ye.»" 
Numbers32:6 A Moyiis leoka bãmb yaa: «Na n yɩ a wãn tɩ yãmb saam-biisã na n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ, tɩ yãmb dat n pa ka?" 
Numbers32:7 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dat n boog Israyɛll nebã raood tɩ b ka tõog n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ-bã pʋgẽ? 
Numbers32:8 Yãmb ba-rãmbã me maana a woto, wakat ning mam sẽn zĩnd Kadɛɛs-Barneya n tʋm-b tɩ b kẽng n tɩ ges Kana tẽngã." 
Numbers32:9 Bãmb kẽname n tɩ ta Ɛskoll ko-soogã, la bãmb sẽn tɩ ges tẽngã n lebg n wa wã, b booga Israyɛll neb a taabã raoodo, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b ra kẽng n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Numbers32:10 La baraare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga ne bãmba, la b wẽename n yeele:" 
Numbers32:11 «Neb nins fãa sẽn yi-b Ezɩpt tẽngã, sẽn da tar-b yʋʋm pisi, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã, ka na n yãnd tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõ a Abrahaam, ne a Izake, la a Zakoobã ye. Bala, b ka sak mam noorã ye." 
Numbers32:12 Yaa a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb sẽn yaa a Kenaaz roogã nedã, ne a Nun biig a Zozoe bal n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã zãnga." 
Numbers32:13 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga ne Israyɛll nebã, tɩ b kɩt tɩ b yeeb weoogã pʋgẽ, yʋʋm pis-naase, hal tɩ zamaan-kãng neb nins sẽn maan sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wã fãa ki weoogã pʋgẽ zãnga." 
Numbers32:14 Tɩ yãmb me rat n dɩk y ba-rãmb naoore, n yɩ nin-kɩɩsdb kamb n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã leb n puug ne Israyɛll nebã yɛs n yɩɩd pĩnda!" 
Numbers32:15 Bala, yãmb sã n wẽnemd n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã kaoos weoogã pʋgẽ n paase, la y na n kɩt tɩ nin-bãmbã fãa sãame.»" 
Numbers32:16 Dẽ, bãmb kolga a Moyiis n yeel yaa: «Tõnd na n tii yãg ka n kẽes d rũmsã, la d me tẽms n kõ d zagsã rãmba." 
Numbers32:17 Dẽ poore, tõnd na yii tao-tao n dɩk d zab-teedã n luɩ Israyɛll nebã taoor n tall-b n tɩ kẽes tẽngẽ wã. La rẽ tɩ tõnd zagsã rãmb bee tẽms d sẽn me n gũbg pʋsẽ, sẽn na tõog n kogl-b tɩ tẽngã nebã ra maan-b bũmb ye." 
Numbers32:18 Dẽ wã, tõnd ka na n lebg n kuil tɩ sã n ka Israyɛll ned kam fãa n wa n paam a zĩig ye." 
Numbers32:19 La tõnd ka na n naag bãmb n deeg pʋɩɩr Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, bɩ sẽn zʋʋg beenẽ ye. Bala, tõnd na n paam d zĩig ka sẽn yaa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yaangã.»" 
Numbers32:20 Dẽ, a Moyiis yeela bãmb yaa. «Yãmb sã n maan wa y sẽn yeelã, n dɩk y zab-teed n zab Sẽn-Ka-Saab zabre," 
Numbers32:21 la neb nins fãa sẽn be ne yãmbã sã n dɩk b zab-teed n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, hal n tõog n dig bãmb bɛɛbã zãnga," 
Numbers32:22 la yãmb sã n zab n tõog tẽngã n yaool n lebg n kuili, wakat-kãnga, yãmb paama y meng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la Israyɛll nebã me taoore. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, soolem-kãngã na n lebga yãmb dẽnda." 
Numbers32:23 La yãmb sã n ka maan a woto, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab la y beeg yã. La bɩ y bãng tɩ y yel-wẽnã sɩbgrã na n lʋɩ y zugu." 
Numbers32:24 Rẽ wã, bɩ y me tẽms n kõ y zagsã rãmba, la y ti yãg n kẽes y rũm-bãoonegã, la y maan wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.»" 
Numbers32:25 Dẽ, Gaad ne Rubɛn nebã yeela a Moyiis yaa: «D zu-soaba, tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba, rẽ wã, d na n maana wa y sẽn yeelã." 
Numbers32:26 Dẽ, tõnd kambã ne d pagbã, la d rũmsã fãa na n paa Galaad tẽngã pʋga." 
Numbers32:27 La tõnd fãa sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã na n boba d zab-teed n tɩ zab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» 
Numbers32:28 Dẽ, a Moyiis kõo maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, ne a Nun biig a Zozoe noore, la ne Israyɛll nebã nanambsã noor nin-bãmb yĩnga." 
Numbers32:29 A Moyiis yeel-b lame yaa: «Gaad ne Rubɛn nebã sã n bob b zab-teed n naag yãmb n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ zab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ y tõog tẽngã, bɩ y kõ bãmb Galaad tẽngã tɩ yɩ bãmb pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers32:30 La bãmb sã n ka bob b zab-teed n naag yãmb n kẽng n tɩ zabe, bɩ b kell n pa yãmb sʋk Kana tẽnga pʋgẽ.»" 
Numbers32:31 Dẽ, Gaad ne Rubɛn nebã leb n yeelame yaa: «Tõnd na n maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã." 
Numbers32:32 Tõnd na n boba d zab-teed n kẽng Kana tẽngã n tɩ zab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la tõnd dat n paama d zĩig Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd ka.»" 
Numbers32:33 Dẽ, a Moyiis rɩka Amoor naab a Sihon soolmã, la Basan naab a Oog soolmã tẽmse, la a wetã, la tẽms nins sẽn yeg-b bãmbã, n kõ Gaad ne Rubɛn buudã, la a Zozɛf biig a Manaase buud pʋɩ-sʋkã." 
Numbers32:34 La Gaad yagensã leb n me Dibõ, Atarote, la Arowɛɛr tẽmsã." 
Numbers32:35 Atro-sofã, ne Yayezɛɛre, la Yogbeha," 
Numbers32:36 Bɛt-Nimra, ne Bɛt-Harã. Bãmb me tẽn-bãmb n gũbgi, la b wẽ yãg n gũbg n na n ning b rũmsã." 
Numbers32:37 La a Rubɛn yagensã yik n lebs n mee Ɛsbon, ne Eleyale, la Kiriyatayim tẽmsã." 
Numbers32:38 N paas Nebo, ne Ball-Meyon, la sɩbma, la b bao yʋʋr n kõ tẽms kẽer b sẽn me wã sʋka." 
Numbers32:39 A Manaase biig a Makɩɩr yagensã yikame n kẽng Galaad soolmã n tɩ zab ne Amoor nebã sẽn da be beenẽ wã n dig-b n deeg b tẽngã," 
Numbers32:40 Dẽ, a Moyiis dɩka galaad tẽngã n kõ a Manaase biig a Makɩɩr t'a zĩndi." 
Numbers32:41 A Manaase biig a to yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Yayɩɩre, yagensã kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Amor nebã n deeg b tẽmsã, la bãmb pʋd-b lame t'a Yayɩɩr tẽmse." 
Numbers32:42 A Noba kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Kena nebã n deegb b tẽngã, la tẽn-bãoonegã. La yẽnda pʋda tẽn-bãmb yʋʋr tɩ Noba wa a mengã yʋʋr sẽn yaa to-to wã." 
Numbers33:1 A Moyiisi, ne a Aarõ sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ wã, kẽn la b sigb zĩis la woto." 
Numbers33:2 A Moyiis gʋlsa b kẽna, la b sigbã zĩis ball-balle, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. Bãmb sẽn kẽna la b yalsgã zĩis yɩɩ woto." 
Numbers33:3 Yʋʋmdã pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, Pak tigrã yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, Israyɛll nebã yii a Ramsɛɛs tẽngã pʋg ne lohorem, Ezɩpt nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Numbers33:4 La wakat-kãng tɩ Ezɩpt nebã da mumda b kom-dẽemsã sẽn ki wã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga Ezɩpt nebã woto n na n kao b wẽnnaam-dãmbã bʋʋdo. 
Numbers33:5 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yii Ramsɛɛse, la bãmb tɩ siga sukote." 
Numbers33:6 Bãmb yii Sukot n tɩ sig Etam sẽn be hal weoogã kɩrengã 
Numbers33:7 La bãmb yii Etam, n wẽnemd n kẽng Pi-Ayɩrot sẽn tees Ball-Sefõ wã, la bãmb tɩ siga Migdoll taoore." 
Numbers33:8 Bãmb yika Pi-Ayɩrot n pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã n tees weoogã sẽnẽ, bãmb kẽna dasm a tãab kẽnd Etam weoogã pʋgẽ, la bãmb tɩ siga Maara." 
Numbers33:9 Bãmb yika Maara n ta Elim, b yãnda ko-bundum zĩis piig la a yiib la koms tɩɩs pis-yopoe, la yaa beenẽ la b sig yã." 
Numbers33:10 Bãmb sẽn leb n yik Elimã b tɩ pẽnega mogr miuugã n sigi. 
Numbers33:11 La bãmb leb n yika ko-kãsengã sɛɛgẽ n kẽng tɩ sig Sĩn weoogã pʋga. 
Numbers33:12 Bãmb yika Sĩn weoogã pʋg n tɩ sig Dofka. 
Numbers33:13 N yika Dofka n tɩ sig Aluusi. 
Numbers33:14 N yi Aluus n kẽng Refidim, la be, nebã ka paam koom n na yũ ye." 
Numbers33:15 Dẽ, bãmb yii Refidim, n tɩ sig Sɩnayi weoogã pʋga." 
Numbers33:16 La bãmb yii Sɩnayi weoogẽ wã n tɩ sig Kibrot-Hataava. 
Numbers33:17 Bãmb leb n yii Kibrot-Hataava n tɩ sig Hatserote. 
Numbers33:18 Bãmb yii Hatserot n tɩ sig Ritma. 
Numbers33:19 La bãmb yii Ritma n tɩ sig Rimo-Perɛts 
Numbers33:20 N yi Rimo-Perɛts n tɩ sig Libna. 
Numbers33:21 N yi Libna n tɩ sig Risa. 
Numbers33:22 N yi Risa n tɩ sig Kehelata. 
Numbers33:23 N yi Kehelata n tɩ sig Sefɛɛr tãngã. 
Numbers33:24 La bãmb yii Sefɛɛr tãngã n kẽng Araada," 
Numbers33:25 n yi Araada n kẽng Makelote," 
Numbers33:26 n yi Makelot n kẽng Tahat 
Numbers33:27 n yi Tahat n kẽng Teera," 
Numbers33:28 n yi Teera n kẽng Mitka," 
Numbers33:29 n yi Mitka n kẽng Asemona," 
Numbers33:30 n yi Asemona n kẽng Moserote. 
Numbers33:31 Bãmb yii Moserot n kẽng Bene-Yakã 
Numbers33:32 n yi Bene-Yaakã n kẽng Hoor-Gɩdgaade 
Numbers33:33 n yi Hoor-Gɩdgaad n kẽng Zotbata. 
Numbers33:34 La bãmb yii Zotbata n kẽng Abrona," 
Numbers33:35 n yi Abrona n kẽng Esɩyõ-Gebɛɛre," 
Numbers33:36 La bãmb yii Esɩyõ-Gebɛɛr n kẽng Kadɛɛs sẽn be Sĩn weoogẽ wã n tɩ sigi. 
Numbers33:37 N yi Kadɛɛs n tɩ sig Hoor tãngã sẽn be Edom tẽngã kɩrengã sɛɛga. 
Numbers33:38 Yaa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ tɩ yʋʋm pis-naasã, kiuug a nu soabã pipi daarã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Aarõ t'a rʋ Hoor tãngã zugu. La yẽnda kii tãngã zug a yʋʋm koabg la pisi la a tãabo." 
Numbers33:39  
Numbers33:40 La wakat-kãnga, Kana tẽngã naab a ye sẽn be tẽngã nug-rɩtgã, wʋma Israyɛll nebã waoongã." 
Numbers33:41 Bãmb yika Hoor tãngẽ wã n sig Salmona. 
Numbers33:42 N yi Salmona n tɩ sig Puno 
Numbers33:43 La bãmb yii Puno n tɩ sig Obote. 
Numbers33:44 N yi Obot n tɩ sig Ye-Abarim sẽn be Moaab toadgẽ wã. 
Numbers33:45 La bãmb yii Ye-Abarim n tɩ sig Dɩbõ-Gaad 
Numbers33:46 N leb n yi Dɩbõ-Gaad n tɩ sig Almo-Diblatayim. 
Numbers33:47 La bãmb yii Almo-Diblatayim n tɩ sig Abarim tãmsã sẽn tees Nebo tãngã. 
Numbers33:48 N yi Abarim tãmsã n tɩ sig Moaab weoogã pʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn tees Zeeriko wã. 
Numbers33:49 Dẽ, bãmb tilga b fu-rotã Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore. La yaa sẽn sɩng ne Bɛt-Ayesimote, n tɩ tãag Abɛll-Sitim." 
Numbers33:50 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis a sẽn wa be Moaab weoogã pʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn tees Zeeriko wã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiisi 
Numbers33:51 t'a yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽ Kana tẽngã," 
Numbers33:52 bɩ y rig tẽngã neb fãa, la y sãam b wẽn-naands nins bãmb sẽn pees ne kuga, wall sẽn kud ne kutã, la y sãam b tẽn-kugã." 
Numbers33:53 La yãmb na n deega tẽngã n sooga, la y zĩnd a pʋgẽ, bala, maam n kõ yãmb tẽn-kãng tɩ y sooge." 
Numbers33:54 Yãmb na n maana poeer n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ buud fãa la roog fãa. Buud ningã neb sõor sẽn waooge, yãmb na n kõ-a la tẽn-bedre, la buud ninga neb sõor sẽn ka waooge, yãmb na n kõ-a tẽn-bila. La ned kam fãa na n paa zĩig ning b sẽn poe n kõ-a wa sẽn zems a buudã pʋɩɩrã." 
Numbers33:55 La yãmb sã n ka rig tẽngã nebã n yiis tẽngã, y sẽn na n bas b rãmba na n namsa yãmba. Bãmb na n yɩɩ wa gõos sẽn na n kõs yãmb nina, la a sɩ y poayã, la bãmb na n zaba ne yãmb tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n zĩndã pʋgẽ." 
Numbers33:56 La sã n yɩ woto, mam sẽn da rat n sɩbg-b to-to wã, moasã, lebgda yãmb la m na n sɩbge.»" 
Numbers34:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis 
Numbers34:2 t'a gom ne Israyɛll nebã n wilg-ba: «Yãmb sã n wa kẽ Kana soolmã pʋgẽ, Ade tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n soogã todse." 
Numbers34:3 Nug-rɩgoab sẽnẽ, yãmb soolmã toadg na n sɩnga ne Sĩn weoogã n yegl Edom tẽngã. La yamsem ko-kãsengã sɛtmẽ n tees yaanga." 
Numbers34:4 La toadgã na n gõdga nug-rɩtgã n yi Akrabim tãngã rʋʋdgã, n tɩ yi Sĩn n baas Kadɛɛs-Barneya rɩtgã, n lɛɛg n yi Atsaar-Adaare, la Asmone." 
Numbers34:5 La a na n leb n yii Asmone, tɩ toadgã wẽnemd n tɩ sok Ezɩpt ko-soogã, n kẽng n tɩ ta ko-kãsengã." 
Numbers34:6 Nin-taoorã, yãmb soolmã toadgã na n yɩɩ ko-kãsengã wogellã." 
Numbers34:7 La rɩtgã, yãmb soolmã toadg na n yɩɩ ko-kãsengã sẽn tees Hoor tãngã." 
Numbers34:8 La a yi Hoor tãngã, n tũ lebo-Hamate, ne Sedaade." 
Numbers34:9 La a na n kell n yii Zɩfron, n tɩ baas Atsaar-Enan. Yãmb soolmã toadg rɩtgã na n yɩɩ woto." 
Numbers34:10 La yaangã, yãmb soolmã toadg na n yii Atsaar-Enan, n tees Sefam." 
Numbers34:11 La a na yii be n tees Arbela sẽn be Ayin yaangã, la a na n kẽnga taoor n tɩ tãag Kinerɛt kʋɩlgã noor sigdsã sẽn be yaangã," 
Numbers34:12 n tɩ yek Zʋrdẽ n tall n tɩ tãag yamsem ko-kãsengã. Woto n na n yɩ yãmb tẽngã todse.» 
Numbers34:13 Dẽ, a Moyiis togsa Israyɛll nebã bũmb ning b sẽn wilg yẽnda wã. La a yeel-b yaa: «Tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ noor tɩ b pʋɩ buud a wɛ a taabã, la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã la woto." 
Numbers34:14 Bala, Rubɛn ne Gaad buudã, la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk zoe n paama b zĩisi." 
Numbers34:15 La zĩis nins b sẽn kõ-bã teesa Zeeriko, n be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yaanga.»" 
Numbers34:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers34:17 «Ade, yaa maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaare, ne a Nun biig a Zozoe, n na n pʋɩ zĩisã n kõ buud fãa." 
Numbers34:18 La buud fãa pʋgẽ yãmb na n yãka naab a ye t'a wa sõng bãmba. 
Numbers34:19 Nebã yʋy la woto: Zʋʋda buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛbe." 
Numbers34:20 Sɩmyõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Amiwuud biig a Semuyɛlle." 
Numbers34:21 Benzame buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Kɩslõ biig a Elidaade." 
Numbers34:22 Dan buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Yogli biig a Buki." 
Numbers34:23 A Zozɛf biig a Manaase buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Efood biig a Haniyɛlle." 
Numbers34:24 A Zozɛf biig a Efrayiim buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Sɩftã biig a Kemuwɛlle." 
Numbers34:25 Zabulõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Parnak biig a Elisafan." 
Numbers34:26 Isakaar buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Azan biig a Paltɩyɛlle." 
Numbers34:27 Asɛɛr buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Selomi biig a Ayiwuudi." 
Numbers34:28 Neftali buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Amiwuud biig a Pedahɛlle.»" 
Numbers34:29 Neb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk tɩ b pʋɩ zĩisã n kõ Israyɛll nebã la woto. 
Numbers35:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Moyiis Moaab weoogã pʋgẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn tees Zeeriko wã n yeel-a yaa:" 
Numbers35:2 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ bãmb sẽn na n zab n deeg tẽms ninsã sʋka, bɩ b yãk tẽms n kõ Leevi buudã tɩ b tõe n tɩ zĩndi. La y tog n kõo Leevi nebã pʋ-wees tẽn-bãmb yĩnga." 
Numbers35:3 Dẽ, Leevi buudã n na n paama tẽms n kẽ, la b paam pʋ-wees b rũmsã yĩnga, ne b laogã, la b rũmsã buud fãa yĩnga." 
Numbers35:4 La pʋ-wees nins yãmb sẽn na n kõ Leevi buudã nebã, tog n sɩnga tẽngã lalg poore, n tall n tɩ tãag kãntɩɩg tusr zĩigẽ, n gũbg tẽngã." 
Numbers35:5 Tẽngã yaangã, bɩ y mak kãntɩɩg tus a yi, a goabgã, kãntɩɩg tus a yi, a nin-taoorã kãntɩɩg tus a yi, a rɩtgã me kãntɩɩg tus a yi. Dẽ, tẽngã bee sʋka. Woto n na yɩ bãmb tẽmsã pʋ-weese.»" 
Numbers35:6 La tẽms nins yãmb sẽn na n kõ Leevi buudã pʋgẽ, bɩ y kõ-b weem-tẽmse a yoobe, tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, bɩ a tõe n zoe n tɩ kẽ be. La y kõ-b tẽms pis-naas la a yiib n paase." 
Numbers35:7 La tẽms nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n kõ Leevi buudã sõor na n yɩɩ pis-naas la a nii, ne b pʋ-weese." 
Numbers35:8 Tẽms nins yãmb sẽn na n yãk Israyɛll nebã sẽn so wã pʋg n kõ wã, sẽn tar-b wʋsgã na n kõo wʋsgo, la sẽn tar-b bilfã na n kõo bilfu. Tẽng fãa na n kõo Leevi nebã wa sẽn zems pʋɩɩr ning a sẽn tog n paame." 
Numbers35:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: 
Numbers35:10 «Yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: Ade, yãmb sã n wa pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ kẽ Kana tẽngẽ wã," 
Numbers35:11 bɩ y yãk tẽms sẽn na n yɩ weem-tẽmse, tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, bɩ a zoe n tɩ kẽ be." 
Numbers35:12 Tẽn-bãmb na n yɩɩ weem-tẽms yãmb yĩnga, tɩ y tõe n zoe n põs ne sẽn dokda a sũurã. Dẽ, b kõ kʋ ned sẽn kʋ-a to t'a nan ka yals nebã taoor tɩ b bʋ a bʋʋd ye." 
Numbers35:13 Tẽms nins yãmb sẽn na n kõ Leevi buudã sʋka, tẽms a yoob n na n yɩ weem-tẽmse." 
Numbers35:14 Tẽms a tãab n na n zĩnd Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã poore, t'a tãab zĩnd Kana tẽngã pʋga. Tẽn-bãmb na n yɩɩ weem-tẽmse." 
Numbers35:15 La tẽn-bãmb b yoobã na n yɩɩ weem-tẽms Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, la sãambã, ne neb nins sẽn be-b yãmb sʋk wakat bilf yĩngã. Dẽ, ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, a tõe n zoe n tɩ kẽe be." 
Numbers35:16 Ned sã n tall kut n wẽ a to t'a ki, bɩ b geelg-a wa nin-kʋʋda. La a sɩbgr tog n yɩɩ kũum." 
Numbers35:17 La sã n yaa kugr la a tall n wẽ a to wã t'a ki, bɩ b geelg-a wa nin-kʋʋda. La a sɩbgr tog n yɩɩ kũum." 
Numbers35:18 Sã n yaa raoog la a tall n wẽ a to wã t'a ki, bɩ b geelg-a wa nin-kʋʋda. La a sɩbgr tog n yɩɩ kũum." 
Numbers35:19 La ned ning sẽn tog n dok-a kiidã sũurã, sã n paam nin-kʋʋdã bɩ a kʋ-a." 
Numbers35:20 Ned sã n kisg a to n tus-a n lubi, wall a rɩk bũmb n lobg-a ne pʋ-toog t'a ki," 
Numbers35:21 ka rẽ bɩ a wẽ-a-la ne nug-giulg beem yĩng t'a ki, a soabã yaa nin-kʋʋda. La ned ning sẽn tog n dok-a kiidã sũurã, sã n paam nin-kʋʋdã bɩ a kʋ-a." 
Numbers35:22 La ned sã n tus a to ne yĩdgu, tɩ beem ka be b sʋka, wall a lobg bũmb tɩ yõg-a ne yĩudg t'a ki," 
Numbers35:23 wall a sã n maan tɩ kugr lʋɩ n yõg ned ne yĩudg t'a ki, tɩ beem dag n ka be b sʋka, la a rag n ka rat-a ne wẽnga," 
Numbers35:24 ad soay nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n tũ n kao bʋʋdã, sẽn kʋ a to ne yĩdgã ne sẽn dat-a n dok kiidã sũurã sʋka." 
Numbers35:25 Bɩ Israyɛll nebã kogl sẽn kʋ-a a to ne yĩdgã, n sõng-a t'a põs ned ning sẽn dat-a n dok kiidã sũurã. B tog n kɩtame tɩ sẽn kʋ-a a to ne yĩdgã lebg n leb weem-tẽng ning pʋg yẽnda sẽn dag n zoe n tɩ soondã pʋgẽ. La yẽnda tog n paa be hal n tãag maan-kʋʋr kãsem ning b sẽn pʋdg a soab zug kaamã kũum." 
Numbers35:26 La ned ning sẽn kʋ-a a to ne yĩdgã sã n yi weem-tẽngẽ wã," 
Numbers35:27 tɩ ned ning sẽn dat-a n dok kiidã sũurã seg-a tẽngã kɩreng n kʋ, b ka na n ning yẽnda taal rẽ yĩng ye." 
Numbers35:28 Bala, ned ning sẽn kʋ a to ne yĩdgã ka tog n yi weem-tẽngẽ wã, sã n ka tɩ maan-kʋʋr kãsmã n wa n ki ye. Maan-kʋʋr kãsmã kũum poore, ned ning sẽn kʋ a to ne yĩdgã tõe n yaool n lebg n leba a tẽngẽ." 
Numbers35:29 Woto na n yɩɩ tõod yãmb sẽn tog n tũ zamaan woo zamaane, la yaa zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n tɩ zĩndẽ." 
Numbers35:30 Ned sã n kʋ a to, b ka tog n kʋ nin-kʋʋdã nin-yɛng kaset yĩng ye. Rẽndame tɩ b paam neb wʋsg kaseto." 
Numbers35:31 Yãmb ka tog n deeg yaoodo, n bas nin-kʋʋd sẽn zems kũum t'a vɩɩmd ye. Bala, yẽnda tog n kiime." 
Numbers35:32 La yãmb ka tog n deeg yaoodo, n bas ned sẽn zoe n tɩ soond weem-tẽngẽ t'a lebg n leb a tẽngẽ, tɩ sã n ka maan-kʋʋr kãsmã n wa n ki ye." 
Numbers35:33 Yãmb ka tog n dẽgem tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n zĩndã ye. Bala, zɩɩm rẽgemda tẽnga. La tẽngã ka na n paam yɩlgre, tɩ sã n ka b kʋʋ nin-kʋʋdã n lebs ye." 
Numbers35:34 Yãmb ka tog n dẽgem tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ wã ye. La y ka tog n dẽgem tẽng ning mam sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã ye. Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n bee Israyɛll nebã sʋka.»" 
Numbers36:1 A Manaase biig a Makɩɩr biig a Galaad roogã taoor-dãmbã sẽn yaa a Zozɛf yagensã, waa a Moyiis ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ n yeel-b yaa:" 
Numbers36:2 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ yãmb maan poeer n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ Israyɛll buudã. La b leb n kõo yãmb noor tɩ y rɩk tõnd saam-biig a Selofaad pʋɩɩrã n kõ a kom-pugli wã. 
Numbers36:3 Dẽ, bãmb sã n kẽ kãadem ne Israyɛll buud a to neda, b na n welga bãmb pʋɩɩr toor ne tõnd ba-rãmbã pʋɩɩre, n paas buud ning bãmb sẽn tɩ naagã pʋɩɩre. Woto na n booga poeerã sẽn n kõ tõnd pʋɩɩr ningã." 
Numbers36:4 La Israyɛll nebã yʋʋm pis-nu tigrã sã n wa ta, b na n dɩka bãmb pʋɩɩrã n paas buud ning sẽn na n soog bãmbã pʋɩɩre. Dẽ, tõnd ba-rãmbã pʋɩɩr na n boogame.»" 
Numbers36:5 Dẽ, a Moyiis togsa Israyɛll nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg bũmb ninsã, n yeel-b yaa:" 
Numbers36:6 «Ade, a Zozɛf yagensã tara bʋʋm, la ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg a Selofaad kom-pugli wã yĩnga: bãmb tõe n kẽe kãadem ne ned ninga b sẽn date, la yaa tɩ tog n yɩɩ bãmb ba wã buud pʋga." 
Numbers36:7 B ka tog n dɩk Israyɛll buud a ye pʋɩɩr n kõ buud a to ye. Israyɛll buud fãa tog n sooga a ba-rãmb pʋɩɩre. 
Numbers36:8 Bi-pugl sã n tar pʋɩɩr Israyɛll buudã pʋgẽ, a tog n kẽe kãadem ne a ba wã buudã neda, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Israyɛll ned fãa kell n soog a ba-rãmb pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers36:9 B ka tog n dɩk Israyɛll buud a ye pʋɩɩr n kõ buud a to ye. Israyɛll buud fãa tog n sooga a ba-rãmb pʋɩɩre.» 
Numbers36:10 Dẽ, a Selofaad kom-pugli wã maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg a Moyiisã." 
Numbers36:11 A Selofaad kom-pugli wã, a Mala, a Tɩrsa, a Hogla, a Milka, ne a Noa kẽe kãadem ne b ba wã saam-biis kom-dibli." 
Numbers36:12 Bãmb kẽe kãadem ne a Zozɛf biig a Manaase yagensã. Dẽ, bãmb pʋɩɩrã paa b ba wã buud pʋgẽ." 
Numbers36:13 Woto n yɩ tõod la noy nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Moyiis t'a kõ Israyɛll nebã, Moaab weoogã pʋgẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor sẽn teesd Zeeriko wã." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ad goam nins a Moyiis sẽn gom ne Israyɛll nebã fãa b sẽn wa n nan ka rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n be weoogã pʋgã, tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã pʋgẽ, sẽn tot ne Suf tẽngã sẽn be Paarã ne Tofɛll la Labã ne Hatserot la Di-Zahaab sʋkã." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Fo sã n yi Orɛɛbe, n dɩk Seyɩɩr soolmã sẽn be tãms sʋkã sor n dat Kadɛɛs-Barneya, fo na n kẽna rasem piig la a yembre." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas yʋʋmdã, kiuug piig la a yembr soabã pipi daarã, la a Moyiis togs nebã bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg yẽnda t'a togs Israyɛll nebã." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Yaa yẽnda sẽn wa n zab n tõog Amoor-dãmbã naab a Sihon sẽn be Hɛsbõ wã, ne Basan naab a Oog sẽn be Astarot ne Edreyi wã zugẽ." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Yaa Moaab tẽngã pʋgẽ, b sẽn wa n ket n nan ka rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, la a Moyiis sɩng n bilg tõ-kãngã n yeele:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã goma ne tõnd Horɛɛb tãngã zug n yeele: Yãmb kaoosa tãn-kãngã sɛɛgẽ wʋsgo. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Yik-y n wẽnemd-y n kẽng-y Amoor-dãmbã tãms sʋka, la Araba sẽn yegd bãmbã, la tãmsã sʋka, ne tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, la Negɛɛv ne ko-kãsengã noore, la Kana tẽngã, ne Libã hal tɩ ta kʋɩl-kãseng ning sẽn boond tɩ Efratã." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Gese, mam kõo yãmb tẽngã. Kẽng-y n tɩ soog-y tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmb a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoob tɩ m na n kõo bãmb ne b yagensã.»" 
Deuteronomy1:9 «Wakat-kãnga, mam yeela yãmb tɩ maam m yembr ka tõe n zã yãmb fãa ye." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ yãmb fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo. Rũndã, yãmb yaa wʋsg wa ãdsã sẽn be saasẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã kɩt tɩ yãmb yɩ wʋsg naoor tusr n yɩɩd y sẽn yaa bũmb ning rũndã wã, la b ning-y bark wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Rẽ yĩnga, maam m yembr tõe n zã yãmba, la m tʋk yãmb nokoɛɛmã ne y yɛlã zɩɩb sɩda." 
Deuteronomy1:13 Yãk-y neb yãmb sʋkã sẽn tar yam ne bãngre, la nebã, nebã sẽn mi sõama, n wa tɩ m lʋɩɩs-b yãmb taoore.»" 
Deuteronomy1:14 La yãmb fãa leoka maam tɩ bũmb ning mam sẽn dat n maanã yaa sõama. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Dẽ, mam dɩka yãmb buudã kãsem-dãmbã sẽn tar yam la neb nins nebã sẽn mi sõama wã, n lʋɩɩs yãmb taoore, n kɩt tɩ kẽer lebg neb tusr-tusr nanambse, tɩ kẽer lebg neb koabg-koabg nanambse, tɩ kẽer lebg neb pis-nunu nanambse, tɩ kẽer lebg neb piig-piig nanambse, tɩ kẽer yɩ seb-gʋndb yãmb buudã toor-toorã pʋse." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Wakat-kãnga, mam kõo yãmb bʋ-kaoodbã noor n yeel-ba: «Kelg-y y saam-biisã koeese, la y bʋ bʋʋdã tɩrga, Israyɛll ned ne a saam-biig sʋka, la Israyɛll ned ne sãan sʋka." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Yãmb sã n na n bʋ bʋʋdã, bɩ y ra maan welgr nebã ne taab sʋk ye. Kelg-y nin-talsã ne nin-bɛdã. Ra-y zoe-y ned ba a yembr nif ye. Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam n so bʋʋdo. La yellã sã n yaa toog ne yãmb tɩ y ka tõe n bʋ a bʋʋdo, bɩ y tall-a n wa mam nengẽ tɩ m kelg-a.»" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Woto, mam wilga yãmb wakat-kãnga, y sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninsã fãa." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tõnd yikame n yi Horɛɛb n kẽn n pɩʋʋg we-rao-kẽen-kãngã sẽn dɩt nebã wala y sẽn tẽrã. Tõnd dɩka Amoor-dãmbã tãng sor wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeel tõndã, la tõnd taa Kadɛɛs-Barneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Dẽ, mam yeela yãmb tɩ y taa Amoor-dãmbã tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ tõndã." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Gese, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kõo yãmb tẽngã, kẽng-y n tɩ soog-y-yã-a wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmbã. Ra yɛɛs-y ye, la ra-y zoe-y rabeem ye." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Yãmb fãa kolga maam n yeel tɩ d tʋm neb tɩ b reng taoor n tɩ ges tẽngã n wa wilg tõnd sor ning d sẽn tog n tũ, la tẽms nins d sẽn tog n ta wã." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Mam sɩd mikame tɩ yãmb sẽn yeel bũmb ningã yaa sõama. Woto, mam yãka neb piig la a yiibu, buud fãa pʋgẽ ned a ye." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Woto, bãmb lebgame n dʋ tãmsã n kẽng n ta Ɛskoll ko-soogã n ges tẽngã." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Bãmb yãka tẽngã tɩɩs biis n tall n wa kõ tõndo, la b yeele: «Tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ tõndã yaa sõama.»" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Ne rẽndã fãa, yãmb ka sak n na n kẽng ye. Yãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõodã." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Yãmb zĩnda y fu-rotẽ wã n yẽgem n yeele: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kis tõndã yĩng la b sẽn yiis tõnd Ezɩpt n na n dɩk tõnd n kõ Amoor-dãmbã tɩ b sãam tõndã. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tõnd na n kẽnga yɛɛnẽ? Tõnd saam-biisã kɩtame tɩ d raood sɛ, bãmb sẽn yeel tɩ tẽngã nebã yaa nin-bɛd la wogd n yɩɩd tõndã yĩnga, la b sẽn yeel tɩ tẽmsã yaa kãsemse, tɩ b lalsã tat saasã, la b sẽn yeel tɩ b yãnda a Anak yagensã be wã yĩnga.»" 
Deuteronomy1:29 La mam yeela yãmb tɩ y ra yɛɛs ye, la y ra zoe rabeem ye." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn lʋɩ yãmb taoor n kẽndã na n zab n kõo yãmb wa b sẽn dag n maan Ezɩpt to-to yãmb fãa nifẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Weoogã pʋga, yãmb yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn buk yãmb wa ned sẽn buk a biiga, kẽndã fãa pʋgẽ hal tɩ yãmb wa tãag zĩ-kãngã wã." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Baa ne rẽndã fãa, yãmb ned ba a yembr ka tẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ye." 
Deuteronomy1:33 Yaool n yaa bãmb n dag n lʋɩt yãmb taoor sorã zugu, n na n bao sik zĩig n kõ-yã. La yʋngo, bãmb bee vẽenem pʋga, n na n wilg yãmb sor ning y sẽn tog n dɩkã, la wĩntoogo, bãmb bee sawad-taok pʋga." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma yãmb goamã. La b sũ-yikrã pʋga, b wẽename n yeele:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 «Zamaan-kãngã nebã sẽn yaa nin-wẽnsã baa a yembr kõn tol n yãnd tẽn-noog ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõo yãmb yaab-rãmbã ye," 
Deuteronomy1:36 sã n ka a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb bala. Yẽnda na n yãnda tẽngã. La mam na n kõo yẽnda ne a yagensã tẽng ning yẽnda naoã sẽn tabã t'a sooge. Bala, yẽnda tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a sũur fãa." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yaa yãmb yĩng me la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik ne maam tɩ b yeel maam tɩ mam me ka na n kẽ tẽn-noogẽ wã ye. 
Deuteronomy1:38 La a Nun biig a Zozoe sẽn sõngd foomã na n kẽe beenẽ. Keng a raoodo, tɩ yaa yẽnda n na n tall Israyɛll nebã n tɩ kẽes tẽngẽ wã tɩ yɩ b soolem." 
Deuteronomy1:39 La yãmb zakã neb nins yãmb sẽn dag n gomd tɩ b na n yõg-b lame n tɩ kẽes yembdã, la yãmb kamb nins sẽn nan ka mi b nensã na n kẽe beenẽ. Yaa bãmb la mam na n kõ tẽngã tɩ b sooge." 
Deuteronomy1:40 La sã n yaa ne yãmba, wẽnemd-y n dɩk-y we-raoogã sor n tees Rudum ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Dẽ, yãmb leoka maam n yeel yaa: «Tõnd beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Tõnd na n kẽngame n tɩ zab wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeel tõndã.» Dẽ, yãmb fãa sũu tãp n tagsdẽ tɩ na n yɩ naana ne yãmb tɩ rʋ tãmsã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Yeel-b tɩ b ra kẽng n tɩ zab ye. Bala, mam sẽn ka be yãmb sʋkã yĩnga, yãmb bɛɛbã na n tõog-y lame.»" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Dẽ, mam goma ne yãmb la yãmb ka kelg ye. Yãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noor n maan y mens yam n kẽng tãmsã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy1:44 La Amoor-dãmba sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã yiime n zab ne yãmb n tõog yãmb n dig-y wa sĩ sẽn digd neda, la bãmb kʋʋ yãmb nebã sẽn sɩng ne Seyɩɩr hal n tãag Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Yãmb sẽn lebg n wa wã, yãmb yãba Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka wʋme, la b ka sak n kelg yãmb sidgrã ye." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Woto n kɩte, tɩ yãmb pa Kadɛɛs n kaoos wʋsgo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Tõnd wẽnemdame n dɩk we-raoogã sor n tees rudum ko-kãsengã n kẽ weoogã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel maamã. Tõnd dɩka weer wʋsg n gil Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã. 
Deuteronomy2:2 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 Yãmb gilga tãn-kãngã n kaoos wʋsgo. Bɩ y wẽnemd n kẽng nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Yeel nebã woto: «Yãmb na n pɩʋʋga y saam-biisã sẽn yaa a Ezayu yagensã tẽngã sẽn yaa Seyɩɩrã. Bãmb na n zoee yãmba, la maan-y gũusg neere." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Ra bao-y bãmb noor ye. Bala, mam ka na n kõ yãmb bãmb tẽngã baa bilf tɩ y soog ye. Bala, yaa maam n kõ a Ezayu Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã t'a sooge." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Yãmb na n da y rɩɩbã y sẽn na n dɩ wã ne ligdi, baa ne koomã y sẽn na n yũ wã, y na n daa ne ligdi." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ninga bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn maandã barka. B yãnda y kẽnã fãa we-raoogã pʋgẽ ka. Yʋʋm pis-naas la woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn be ne yãmba, la bũmb ka paoog yãmb ye.»" 
Deuteronomy2:8 Tõnd lakame n zãag n bas d saam-biisã sẽn yaa a Ezayu yagensã sẽn be Seyɩɩrã, n loog n bas Araba sorã ne Elat la Etsɩyõ-Gebɛɛre, n wẽnemd n tees Moaab we-raoogã sore." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: Ra yik zabre, la f ra bao Moaab nebã noor ye. Bala, mam ka na n kõ yãmb bãmb tẽngã baa bilf ye. Yaa a Lot yagensã la mam kõ Aar tɩ b sooge." 
Deuteronomy2:10 Emim neb n dag n be be pĩndã. Bãmb waoogame n yaa bɛd la wogd wa a Anak yagensã. 
Deuteronomy2:11 B rag n geelgda bãmb me wa Refayim-dãmba, wa a Anak yagensã. La Moaab nebã rag n boonda bãmb tɩ Emim-dãmba." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Hoor neb n dag n be Seyɩɩr tẽngã t'a Ezayu yagensã kʋ bãmb n deeg zĩigã wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n maan tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ bãmbã pʋgẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy2:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela tõnd tɩ d yik n dʋʋg Zerɛɛd kʋɩlgã. La tõnd dʋʋg-a lame. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Tõnd sẽn yi Kadɛɛs-Barneya wã, maana yʋʋm pis-tã la a nii tɩ tõnd yaool n dʋʋg Zerɛɛd kʋɩlgã, tɩ zamaan-kãng raop nins sẽn dag n tõe n kẽng zabrã fãa ki wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wẽen ne bãmbã." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug zĩnda bãmb sik zĩigã zug hal n menes-b fãa zãnga. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Nebã sʋk neb nins sẽn tõe n kẽng-b tãpã fãa sẽn wa n ki zãnga," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Dũndã, yãmb na n tũu Aar n pɩʋʋg Moaab toadgã." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Yãmb sã n kẽ Amo nebã tẽngẽ, ra zab-y ne-ba, la y ra bao b noor ye. Bala, mam ka na n kõ yãmb bãmb tẽngã baa bilf tɩ y soog ye. Yaa a Lot yagensã la mam kõ tẽn-kãng tɩ b sooge." 
Deuteronomy2:20 B rag n geelgda soolem-kãng wa Refayim nebã tẽnga. Refayim nebã n dag n deng n be beenẽ, la Amo nebã boonda bãmb tɩ Zamzumim." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bãmb dag n yaa buud sẽn tar pãnga, n yaa wʋsgo, la b yaa nin-wobd wa Anak buudã nebã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Amo nebã kʋ bãmb n deeg b soolmã n zĩndi." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n maana a woto me n kõ a Ezayu yagensã sẽn dag n be Seyɩɩre, wakat ning bãmb sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b kʋ Hoor nebã n deeg b tẽngã n kẽ n be beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Deuteronomy2:23 La sã n yaa ne Aava nebã sẽn dag n be tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn tall n tɩ tãag Gaaza wã, yaa Kaftoor nebã sẽn yit Kaftoorã n sãam bãmb n deeg b zĩigã n zĩndi." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Yik-y n dɩk-y sor n dʋʋg Arno ko-soogã. Gese, mam kõo yãmb pãng tɩ y tõog Amoor nebã naab a Sɩhon sẽn be Hɛsbõ wã ne a tẽngã fãa. Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y-yã a Sihon noor n zab ne-a n deeg a tẽngã n sooge." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Sẽn sɩng ne rũndã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã zugã zoe yãmba. Bãmb sã n wʋm yãmb kibare, rabeem na n yõk-b lame tɩ b pelens yɩke." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Dẽ, mam tʋma neb tɩ b yi Kedemot we-raoogẽ wã n kẽng a Sihon nengẽ Hɛsbõ ne vɩ-bãan koɛɛg n tɩ yeel-a yaa:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 «Bas-y tɩ m pɩʋʋg y tẽngã n looge. Mam na n tũu sorã bala, mam ka na n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Tall-y rɩɩb n wa tɩ d ra n dɩ, la y wa ne koom tɩ d ra n yũ. Mam datame bal n pɩʋʋg y tẽngã n loog n ka yals ye." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Yaa woto la a Ezayu yagensã sẽn be Seyɩɩrã, ne Moaab nebã sẽn be Aarã me maan yã. Bɩ yãmb me kõ-d sor hal tɩ d wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ tõndã." 
Deuteronomy2:30 La Hɛsbõ naab a Sihon ka sak n bas tõnd tɩ d tũ a tẽngã pʋgẽ n loog ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kenga a sũurã t'a kɩɩs n tõdge, sẽn na yɩl n kɩt tɩ yãmb zab ne-b n tõog-b wa yãmb sẽn ne rũndã wã.»" 
Deuteronomy2:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Gese, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam dɩkda a Sihon ne a tẽngã n kõ foom tɩ f sooge.»" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Dẽ, a Sihon yi ne a nebã zãng n na n zab ne tõnd Yakatse." 
Deuteronomy2:33 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ tõnd tõog yẽnda ne a kambã, la a nebã fãa gilli." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Wakat-kãnga, tõnd deega a tẽmsã fãa n kʋ pagbã ne raopã la kambã n ka bas yẽnda ned baa a ye t'a põs ye." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Yaa rũmsã ne teedã bal la tõnd zɛ tẽms nins tõnd sẽn deesã pʋsẽ. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Sẽn sɩng ne Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã noorã, ne tẽng ning sẽn be ko-soogẽ wã, hal n tãag Galaade, la tẽng ka zĩnd sẽn tar pãng tɩ tõnd ka tõog n deeg-a ye: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã rɩka bãmb fãa n kõ tõndo." 
Deuteronomy2:37 La yãmb ka kolg Amo nebã tẽnga, sẽn sɩng ne Yabok ko-soogã hal tɩ ta bãmb tẽms nins sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã ye. Yãmb maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n gɩdg yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Dẽ, tõnd dɩka sor n tees Basan. La Basan rĩm a Oog ne a nebã fãa yiime n na n seg tõnd Edreyi n zab ne tõndo." 
Deuteronomy3:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Ra zoe-a ye. Bala, mam dɩka yẽnda ne a nebã fãa la a tẽngã n ning yãmb nugẽ. La fo na n maana yẽnda wa fo sẽn maan Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon sẽn be Hɛsbõ wã.»" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã rɩka Basan naab a Oog me ne a nebã fãa n ning tõnd nugẽ. Dẽ, tõnd kʋʋ bãmb zãng n ka tol n bas ned baa a yembr t'a põs ye." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tõnd deega yẽnda tẽmsã fãa wakat-kãnga. Bãmb tẽng baa a yembr ka be tõnd sẽn ka reeg ye. Yaa Basan rĩm a Oog soolmã tẽms pis-yoob sẽn be Argoob tẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Deuteronomy3:5 Tẽn-bãmb fãa rag n tara pãnga la b tara lal-bɛd ne kʋɩlems sẽn pagde. La tẽn-bãooneg wʋsg me n dag n be n ka tar lals ye. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tõnd maana bãmb wa tõnd sẽn dag n maan Ɛsbon rĩm a Sihon n kʋ a tẽmsã raopã ne pagbã, la kambã fãa wã." 
Deuteronomy3:7 La tõnd wʋka rũmsã ne laog nins sẽn dag n be-a tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã fãa. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Yaa woto la tõnd deeg Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmb a yiibã tẽms sẽn dag n be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd wakat-kãnga, sẽn sɩng ne Arno longã hal tɩ ta Hɛrmo tãngã." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Yaa Hɛrmo tãngã la Sidõ nebã sẽn boond tɩ Siriyõ wã, tɩ Hamoor-dãmbã boondẽ tɩ Seniirã." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Tõnd deesa tẽms nins fãa sẽn be tẽn-nabdrẽ wã ne Galaad fãa la Basan fãa hal tɩ ta Salka la Edreyi sẽn yaa tẽms sẽn be Basan rĩm a Oog soolmẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy3:11 Refayim nebã sʋka, yaa Basan rĩm a Oog a yembr bal n kelle. Yẽnda gãagã rag n yaa kutu, n be Amo nebã tẽng ning sẽn boond tɩ Raba wã. A woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg a wɛ, la a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a naase, wa sẽn tat nin-bedr kãntɩɩga." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Wakat-kãnga, tõnd deega tẽn-kãng n sooge. Mam kõo a Rubɛn yagensã ne a Gaad yagensã tẽng ning sẽn sɩng Arowɛɛr n tũud Arno ko-soogã noorã, ne Galaad soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋɩ-sʋka, ne a tẽmsã." 
Deuteronomy3:13 La mam dɩka Galaad tẽngã sẽn ketã n kõ Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã, la Basan, ne Argoob tẽmsã fãa sẽn yaa a Oog soolem b sẽn boond tɩ Refayim nebã tẽngã." 
Deuteronomy3:14 A Manaase yageng a Zayɩɩr deega Argoob tẽngã fãa hal tɩ ta Gesuur nebã, ne Maaka nebã tẽngã toadgã, la a rɩka a meng yʋʋr n pʋd Basan tẽn-bãoonegã tɩ b boond bãmb t'a Yayɩɩr tẽms hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Mam dɩka Galaad soolmã n kõ a Makɩɩre. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Mam kõ a Rubɛn yagensã ne a Gaad yagensã Galaad tẽngã pʋɩ-sʋka, hal n tãag Arno ko-soogã, la hal tɩ ta Yabok ko-soogã sẽn yaa Amo nebã toadgã." 
Deuteronomy3:17 La tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã sẽn dɩk Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã foollã sẽn sɩng ne Kenerɛt hal tɩ ta yamsem ko-kãsengã sẽn be Pisga tãngã sɛɛga sẽn be yaangã. 
Deuteronomy3:18 Wakat-kãnga, mam yeela yãmb tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kõo yãmb tẽngã tɩ y sooge. Mam yeela yãmb tãb-biisã fãa tɩ b sũ tãp n lʋɩ b saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã taoore." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Yaa yãmb pagbã ne y kambã ne y rũmsã sẽn yaa wʋsgã bal n na n pa tẽms nins mam sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋsẽ," 
Deuteronomy3:20 hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa kõ yãmb saam-biisã zĩig wa b sẽn kõ yãmbã, tɩ b soog tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n kõ bãmb Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. Dẽ poore, yãmb ned kam fãa tõe n lebg n waa zĩig ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Wakat-kãnga, mam kõ a Zozoe noor n yeel-a: «Fo yãnda bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n maan nanambs a yiibã. Bãng tɩ yaa woto la bãmb na n maan soolem nins fãa fo sẽn na n pɩʋʋgã." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Bɩ y ra zoe bãmb ye: bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n na n zab n kõ yãmba.»" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Wakat-kãnga, mam bõosa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb sɩngame n na n wilg mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã y ziirã la y pãnga. Wẽnnaam a to ka be tẽng zugu, wall yĩngri, n tõe n maan tʋʋm-kãsems nins yãmb sẽn maanã ye." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Mam kotame tɩ y bas maam tɩ m kẽng n tɩ ges tẽn-noog ning sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, tẽn-neerã sẽn be tãms sʋkã, la ne Libã tẽngã." 
Deuteronomy3:26 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur dag n yika ne maam yãmb yĩnga, tɩ b ka sak n kelg maam ye. Bãmb yeela maam yaa: Sekame, ra leb n gom yell-kãng yell ne maam yɛs ye." 
Deuteronomy3:27 La bɩ f rʋ Pisga tãngã n zẽk f neng n ges tẽngã nin-taoor ne a goabga, la a rɩtgo, ne a yaanga. Bala, fo ka na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã ye." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Wilg a Zozoe bũmb nins yẽnda sẽn tog n maanã, la f kɩt t'a paam pãng la raoodo. Bala, yaa yẽnda n na n tall nebã n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kɩt tɩ b tɩ soog tẽng ning fo sẽn na n yãndã." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Dẽ, tõnd paa longẽ wã, zĩig ning sẽn tot Bɛt-Pewoorã." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Moasã, Israyɛll nebã, bɩ y kelg minindã ne tõod nins mam sẽn zãmsd yãmbã, la y sak bãmb n tõog n vɩɩmde, la y kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ra-y paas-y bũmb goam nins mam sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋga, la y ra boog bũmb me a pʋgẽ ye. Sak-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõod nins mam sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Yãmb nin yãnda bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn maan Baall-Pewoor yellã wakatã. Bãmb menesa neb nins fãa sẽn tũ Baall-Pewoorã. 
Deuteronomy4:4 La yãmb fãa sẽn ket n vɩ rũndã wã, yaa yãmb sẽn tũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Ges-y-yã, mam zãmsa yãmb no-tũudsã ne noyã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ maam noor to-to wã, yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ y tõe n sak bãmb tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Sak-y tõodã ne minindã n maan wa b sẽn wilg yãmbã. Woto n na n wilg tɩ yãmb tara yam la bãngre, buud a taabã sẽn na n wʋm tɩ b gomd yãmb minindã yellã nifẽ. Bãmb na n yeelame: «Bu-kãsen-kãngã yaa neb sẽn sɩd tar yam la bãngre.»" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Sɩd me, bu-kãsen-bʋg n be n tar wẽnnaam-dãmb sẽn pẽ ne-a wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn pẽ ne tõnd daar fãa d sẽn wat n boond bãmbã?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Bu-kãsen-bʋg n be n tar tõod ne minind sẽn yaa tɩrs wa tõ-kãngã mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Bũmb sẽn be bala, gũus-y y mens neer y yõor tɛk n da wa bas bũmb nins yãmb ninã sẽn yãndã n yĩm b yell ye. Rɩk bãmb n zãms y kambã ne y yagensã n wilg bãmb tɩ" 
Deuteronomy4:10 daar ning yãmb sẽn yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor Horɛɛb tãngã sɛɛgã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Tigim nebã f nengẽ. Mam dat n togsa bãmb mam koɛɛgã, tɩ b zãms tɩ zoe wakat ning fãa bãmb sẽn be dũniyã zugã, la b rɩk-a n zãms b kom-dibli wã.»" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Yãmb kolgame n yals yĩngr tãngã sɛɛga. Bugum n dag n wit tãngã zug n zẽkd n tat sa-gãongã. Rag n yaa lik ne sawad-taok la lik bida. 
Deuteronomy4:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã yii bugum pʋg n gom ne yãmba. Yãmb wʋma goamã, la y ka yã bũmb ye. Yaa koɛɛgã bal la yãmb wʋm yã." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Bãmb wilga yãmb b kaoolã sẽn yaa to-to. Kaool-kãng yaa tõod piigã yãmb sẽn tog n sakã. Bãmb gʋls-b-la kug-wals a yiib zutu. 
Deuteronomy4:14 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m zãms yãmb no-tũudsã ne noyã tɩ y sak-b tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:15 «Gũus-y y mens neere, bala, wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã sẽn da yi bugum pʋgẽ Horɛɛb tãngã zug n gom ne yãmbã, yãmb ka yã bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Gũus-y y mens n da wa maan wẽng ye. Da maan-y bõn-naandg baa a sẽn yaa bũmb ning y mens yĩnga tɩ yɩ raoa wall pag wẽnego," 
Deuteronomy4:17 wall rũng sẽn be tẽng zug wẽnego, wall liuuli sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã wẽnego," 
Deuteronomy4:18 wall bõn-vuudg wẽnego, wall zĩm sẽn be dũniyã koom pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy4:19 La yãmb sã n nak n ges yĩngr n yãnd kiuugã ne wĩndgã la ãdsã la bũmb nins fãa sẽn be yĩngrã, bɩ y gũus t'a ra wa yɩ makr ne yãmb tɩ y wõgemd n waoog bãmb ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kõo dũniyã nebã fãa bõn-kãense." 
Deuteronomy4:20 La yãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn wẽnd wʋng sẽn yẽnegd kutã pʋga, tɩ y lebg bãmb meng neb wa y sẽn yaa bũmb ning rũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Yaa yãmb yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika ne maam, tɩ b wẽen n yeel tɩ mam ka na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n kẽ tẽn-noog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Mam na n kii tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, mam ka na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã ye. La yãmb na n dʋʋgame n tɩ soog tẽn-sõngã." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Gũus-y neer n da wa yĩm kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn maan ne yãmbã ye. Da maan-y bũmb baa a yembr wẽneg tɩ yɩ bõn-naandg ye. Tɩ bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yeela tõnd tɩ d ra maan bũmb a woto ye." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa bugum sẽn dɩte. Bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sũ-kiir soaba." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Yãmb sã n wa rog kamb n paam yagense, la y zĩnd tẽngã pʋgẽ n kaoose, yãmb sã n wa maan wẽnga, n maan bũmb wẽneg t'a yɩ bõn-naandg n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n maan sẽn ka noom bãmba," 
Deuteronomy4:26 mam dɩkda saasã ne tẽngã tɩ b yaa mam kaset dãmb dũndã, tɩ yãmb na n menema tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ soogã pʋgẽ tao-tao. Yãmb ka na n zĩnd be n kaoos ye, yãmb na n sãama zãnga." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb sãeeg n kẽ buud a taabã fãa tẽms pʋsẽ. La yãmb na n yɩɩ bilf bal buud a taab nins pʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n tall yãmb n kẽngã sʋka. 
Deuteronomy4:28 La beenẽ, yãmb na n tɩ tũu bõn-naands ninsaalbã sẽn naan ne raado, la kuga. Bãmb ka ne, b ka wʋmde, b ka rɩte, b ka wʋmd yũugu." 
Deuteronomy4:29 La yãmb sã n zĩnd be n bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaamã ne y sũyã fãa, la ne y yamã fãa, y na n yãnd-b lame." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Y yel-pakrã pʋga, yel-kãensã fãa sã n wa paam yãmba, yãmb na n lebg n waa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ, la yãmb na n kelga bãmb koɛɛgã." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa nimbãan-zoeer soaba, la bãmb ka na n bas yãmba, la b kõn yĩm kãabg ning bãmb sẽn dag n kãab yãmb yaab-rãmbã yell ye.»" 
Deuteronomy4:32 «M kot-y lame tɩ y sok n bãng bũmb ning sẽn zĩnd wakat nins sẽn loog tɩ yãmb dag n nan ka beẽ wã yelle, sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning bãmb sẽn naan ninsaalbã n ning tẽngã zugã, la y tags n ges zĩigã fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã yell n gese, bõn-kãseng a woto zoe n zĩndame, wall b zoe n wʋma bũmb a woto yell sɩda?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Dẽ yĩnga, buud zoe n zĩnda sẽn wʋm Wẽnnaam koɛɛg sẽn yit bugum pʋgẽ wa yãmb sẽn wʋm n ket n vɩ wã?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Wẽnnaam bʋg n zoe n mak tɩ reeg buud buud a to nugẽ ne bõn-makre, la bãn ne bõn-yɛɛsds la zabre, ne a nugã pãng n maan tʋʋm-kãsems sẽn kẽesd rabeem? Yaa bõn-kãens la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã maan n kõ yãmb Ezɩpt tẽng tɩ y nin yãndã." 
Deuteronomy4:35 B wilga yãmb tɩ y bãng tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa Wẽnnaam. B ka tar to ye. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Bãmb zĩnda saasẽ n kɩt tɩ yãmb wʋm bãmb koɛɛgã, la b zãmsa yãmba. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ y yãnd bãmb bug-kãsengã tẽng zugu, la y wʋm bãmb goam nins sẽn yi bugmã pʋgẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Bãmb sẽn nong yãmb yaab-rãmbã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b loogrã poore, b yãk bãmb yagensã, la bãmb mengã n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã ne pãn-kãsenga." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Bãmb diga bu-kãsems sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩd yãmba, n deeg b tẽmsã n kõ yãmb tɩ y soog wa bãmb sẽn maand rũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Dẽ, yãmb na n tagsame, la y bãng rũndã, tɩ saasã sẽn be yĩngrã pʋga, la dũniyã sẽn be tẽngrã pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa Wẽnnaam, la b ka tar to ye." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Woto yĩnga, sak-y bãmb no-tũudsã ne b tõodã mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã, tɩ yãmb ne y kambã vɩɩm tõe n yɩ noogo, la tɩ yãmb tõe n vɩɩmd n kaoos tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soog wakat fãa yĩngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Dẽ, a Moyiis yãka tẽms a tãab Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd wĩndg sẽn yitẽ," 
Deuteronomy4:42 tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, tɩ kisgr rag n ka be b sʋka, bɩ a zoe n kẽ tẽn-bãmb tẽng a ye pʋgẽ n fãag a vɩɩm." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Tẽmsã yaa Betsɛɛr sẽn be weoogã pʋgẽ wã, Rubɛn nebã yĩnga, Ramot sẽn be Galaad tẽngã Gaad nebã yĩnga, la Golan sẽn be Basan wã, Manaase nebã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ad tõod nins a Moyiis sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ad zãmsgã ne no-tũudsã ne noy nins a Moyiis sẽn wilg Israyɛll nebã b sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt wakatã. 
Deuteronomy4:46 Dag n yaa b sẽn wa n be Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihõn sẽn be Hɛsbõ wã tẽngẽ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd longã sẽn tot ne Bɛt-Pewoorã. Yaa yẽnda la a Moyiis ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn tõoge, b sẽn wa n yi Ezɩptã poorã." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bãmb deega yẽnda tẽngã ne Basan rĩm a Oog tẽngã me. Bãmb n dag n yaa Amoor-dãmbã nanambs a yiibã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Bãmb soolmã sɩnga ne Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã, hal n ta Sɩyõ tãngã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ Hɛrmo tãngã," 
Deuteronomy4:49 La tẽn-nabdr ning fãa sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã sẽn be yaang sẽnẽ wã, n tɩ tãag Araba kʋɩlgã sẽn be Pisga sigdgẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy5:1 A Moyiis boola Israyɛll nebã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y no-tũudsã ne noy nins mam sẽn togsd yãmb dũndã wã, la y zãms bãmb n gũus la y maan wa b sẽn yeelã." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã maana kaool ne tõnd Horɛɛb tãngã zugu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ka yɩ ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan kaoolã ye, yaa ne tõnd sẽn be ka rũndã n vɩ wã." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng kɩtame tɩ b koɛɛgã yi bugum pʋgẽ, n gom ne yãmb neng ne neng tãngã zugu.»" 
Deuteronomy5:5 Wakat-kãnga, mam dag n yasa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yãmb sʋk n na n togs yãmb bãmb goamã. Bala, rabeem dag n tara yãmb bugmã yĩnga, tɩ y ka rʋ tãngã ye. Bãmb yeelame yaa:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa fo Wẽnnaam, la yaa maam n yiis foom Ezɩpt soolem yembdã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Ra bao wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab ye, sã n ka maam bala." 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ra maan bõn-naandg ba a yembre, sẽn yaa bũmb sẽn be saasẽ wẽnego, wall sẽn be tẽngã zugu, wall sẽn be koom pʋsẽ dũniyã tẽngr ye." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ra wõgemd bõn-kãens taoor n waoog-b ye. Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sũ-kiir soaba, la m kɩtdame tɩ ba-rãmbã sẽn kis maamã kongr sɩbgr lʋɩ bãmb kambã zutu, n tãag zamaan a tãabo, ne zamaan a naase." 
Deuteronomy5:10 La mam maanda neb nins sẽn nong maam n sakd mam tõodã yagensã neere, hal tɩ ta zamaan tusri." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ra pʋd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr zaalem ye. Bala, ned sã n pʋd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã zaalem, b ka na n bas-a soab taal ye." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Sak-y vʋʋsg daarã tõogo, n kɩt t'a yɩ daar sẽn welg toor wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Rɩk-y rasem a yoobã n tʋm y tʋʋmã fãa, la y maan y sẽn dat n maanã." 
Deuteronomy5:14 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, yaa vʋʋsg daar Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã waoogr yĩnga. Bɩ yãmb ne y kom-dibli wã, la y kom-pugli wã, ne y yem-daadã la y yem-pogsã, ne y loalga, la y bõanga, la sẽn yaa yãmb rũng fãa, la sãamb nins sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋgẽ wã bas b tʋʋmã fãa, tɩ yãmb yem-daadã ne y yem-pogsã paam n vʋʋs wa yãmba." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb me rag n yaa yembs Ezɩpt tẽnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zẽka b nug sẽn tar pãngã n yiis yãmb beenẽ. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yetẽ tɩ yãmb maan vʋʋsg daare. 
Deuteronomy5:16 Waoog f ba la f ma, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel foomã, n tõog n paam yõ-wok la sũ-noog tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ foomã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Da kʋ ned ye. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Da yo ye. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ra zu ye. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Da kɩs kaset sẽn yaa zirẽ n dõd f to ye. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Ra maan sũ-kiir ne f to pag ye. Ra tʋlg f to zaka, wall a pʋʋgo, bɩ a yem-daoogo, wall a yem-poaka, bɩ a loalga, wall a bõanga, bɩ bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa fo to rẽnd ye.»" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Gom-kãensã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gom ne yãmb nebã fãa ne koe-kãseng tãngã zugu, bugum la sawat la lik bida pʋgẽ. Bãmb ka paas gomd ye. Bãmb gʋlsa bãmb kug-wals a yiib zut n kõ maam." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Wakat ning yãmb sẽn wʋm koɛɛgã sẽn yit lik bidã pʋgẽ tɩ tãngã zãng wit bugmã, yãmb buudã nanambsã ne kãsem-dãmbã kolga maam" 
Deuteronomy5:24 n yeele: Gese, rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ tõnd yãnd b ziirã ne b naamã, la tõnd wʋma bãmb koɛɛg sẽn yit bugum pʋgẽ. Rũndã, tõnd bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam tõe n goma ne ninsaal t'a kell n vɩɩmd n ka ki ye." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Moasã, bõe yĩng tɩ d na n ki? Tõnd sã n ket n wʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã koɛɛga, bug-kãsengã na n dɩɩ tõndo! Tõnd na n kiime." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Yaa yɛ ned n na n wʋm Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ koɛɛgã sẽn yit bugum pʋgẽ n ket n vɩ? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Kolg n kelg bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yeel foomã, la fo na yaool n wa wilg tõnd bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn gom ne foomã tɩ d kelge, la d sake." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma goam nins yãmb sẽn yeel maamã. Dẽ, bãmb yeela maam yaa: Mam wʋma goam nins nebã sẽn gom ne foomã. Bãmb sẽn yeel bũmb ninsã fãa yaa sõama." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Mam dag n nongẽ lame tɩ bãmb yam yɩ woto wakat fãa tɩ b zoe maam n sak mam tõodã fãa, tɩ bãmb ne b kambã paam sũ-noog daar fãa." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Kẽng n tɩ yeel bãmb tɩ b lebg n leb b fu-rotẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy5:31 La foom, bɩ f yaas ka ne maam tɩ m wilg-f tõodã fãa, la no-tũudsã, ne noy nins fo sẽn na n zãms bãmb tɩ b sak-b tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ-b tɩ b soogã pʋgẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Gũus-y la y maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmbã. La y ra bʋdg n leb goabg wall rɩtg ye. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Bũmb fãa pʋgẽ, tũ-y sor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn wilg yãmbã bala, tɩ yãmb tõe n vɩɩmde, la y paam sũ-noogo, ne yõ-wok tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ reeg n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ad tõodã la no-tũudsã la ne noy nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel maam tɩ m zãms yãmb tɩ y sak bãmb tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ. 
Deuteronomy6:2 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb vɩɩmã tɛka, bɩ yãmb ne y kambã la y yagensã zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n sak bãmb no-tũudsã la b tõodã fãa mam sẽn vigl yãmb yĩngã, tɩ y tõe n paam yõ-woko." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Woto yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y la y gũusi, la y sak bãmba, n tõog n paam sũ-noog n lebg wʋsg tẽng ning sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgã pʋgẽ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y-yã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa b yembr bal tãa." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Bɩ y nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ne y sũur fãa, la ne y yalẽ fãa la ne y pãngã fãa." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Gom-kãensã mam sẽn gomd ne yãmb rũndã wã na n paa yãmb sũyã pʋse. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Yãmb na n dɩk-a lame n zãms y kambã. Yãmb sã n zĩ y zakẽ, bɩ y gomd a yelle, la y sã n kẽnd sor zug me, bɩ y gomd a yelle. Gom-y-yã-a yell y gãandg la y yikr wakate." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Yãmb na n loee bãmb y nugẽ, tɩ b yɩ wa bãnde, la y teeg-a y rĩirẽ, y ninã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Gʋls-y bãmb y lugã zutu, la y tẽngã kʋɩlems zutu." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa kɩt tɩ yãmb kẽ tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmbã, a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoob tɩ b na n kõo yãmbã, tẽng ning sẽn tar tẽn-bɛd sẽn yaa tẽn-neeb yãmb sẽn ka me wã pʋgẽ," 
Deuteronomy6:11 la rot sẽn pid ne bõn-sõama buud toor-toor yãmb sẽn ka bĩngi, la buls yãmb sẽn ka tu, la reezẽ ne oliiv tɩɩs yãmb sẽn ka sele, yãmb sã n wa rɩ n tɩge," 
Deuteronomy6:12 bɩ y gũus y mens n da wa yĩm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã y sẽn wa n be yembd pʋgẽ wã yell ye. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Zoe-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n sak bãmb bala, la y wẽen ne bãmb yʋʋre." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ra tũ-y wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab sẽn be buud a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmbã wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋk ye. 
Deuteronomy6:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã ka rat tɩ b rɩk b waoogrã n kõ ned a to ye. Bãmb sũurã na n puuga ne yãmb tɩ b kɩt tɩ y menem tẽngã zugu." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ra mak-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, wa y sẽn dag n maan Masa wã ye." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Gũus-y y mens n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã goamã ne b zãmsgã la tõod nins bãmb sẽn kõ yãmbã. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Maan-y sẽn zemse, la sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ y vɩɩm yɩ noogo, la y tõog n kẽ tẽn-noog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab y yaab-rãmbã tɩ b soogã." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Yãmb na n diga y bɛɛbã fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Yãmb kambã sã n wa sok yãmb zãmsgã ne tõodã la minind nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã võore," 
Deuteronomy6:21 bɩ y yeel-ba: «Tõnd dag n yaa Faarõ yembs Ezɩpte, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiisa tõnd be ne pãn-kãsenga." 
Deuteronomy6:22 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ d yãnd bãn ne bõn-bãn-kãsemse, la tood nins bãmb sẽn maan Ezɩpt nebã ne Faarõ ne a yir dãmbã fãa wã." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Bãmb yiisa tõnd be n tall tõnd n wa kẽes tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n yeel d yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõo tõndã. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela tõnd tɩ d sak tõ-kãensã fãa la d zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, n tõog n paam sũ-noog daar fãa n kell n vɩɩmd wa tõnd sẽn yaa bũmb ning rũndã wã.»" 
Deuteronomy6:25 Tõnd sã n gũus d mens n sak tõ-kãensã fãa wa bãmb sẽn yeel tõndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã na n gesa tõnd wa nin-tɩrse." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa tall yãmb n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n soogã pʋgẽ, bãmb sã n wa rig buud wʋsg nins sẽn be f taoorã sẽn yaa Hɛt-rãmbã ne Girgaaz-rãmbã la Amoor-dãmbã ne Kana-rãmbã la Ferɛɛz-rãmbã ne Hevi-rãmbã la Zebuuz-rãmbã, buud a yopoe wã sẽn yaa wʋsg n tar pãng n yɩɩd yãmbã," 
Deuteronomy7:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa kɩt tɩ y tõog bãmba, bɩ y sãam-b zãnga. Ra maan-y kaool ne bãmba, la y ra zoe b nimbãaneg ye." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ra maan yi-kãadem ne bu-bãmb ye. Da rɩk f bi-pugl n kõ bãmb tɩ b maan b pag ye. La ra peeg bãmb bi-pugl n kõ f kamb tɩ b maan b pag ye. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Bala, b na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb kambã bas maam n tɩ tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur na n puuga ne yãmb tɩ b sãam yãmb tao-tao." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bãmb bũmb ninga: Yãmb na n wã b tẽn-kugã la y kɛ b ra-lugdsã, la y yõog b bõn-naandsã b sẽn peesã bugum."
