Deuteronomy7:6 Bala, yãmb yaa buud sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yãka yãmb buud nins sẽn be tẽngã zugã sʋk tɩ y yɩ bãmb nebã." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Ka yãmb sẽn yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd buud a taabã fãa wã yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong yãmb n yãk yãmbã ye. Sɩda, yãmb yaa bilf n yɩɩd buud a taabã fãa." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong yãmbã yĩnga, la yaa bãmb sẽn dag n dat n pids b pʋlengã ne y yaab-rãmbã yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yiis yãmb yembdã pʋgẽ ne nug sẽn tar pãngã, n fãag yãmb Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã nugẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Bɩ y bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n yaa Wẽnnaam menga. Bãmb yaa sɩd Wẽnnaam. Bãmb pidsda b kaoolã, n nong neb nins sẽn nong bãmb la b sakd bãmb tõodã hal tɩ ta zamaan tusri." 
Deuteronomy7:10 La bãmb sɩbgda neb nins sẽn kis-b bãmbã, n menesd bãmb tao-tao. Bãmb ka kaoosd n sɩbg bãmb ye. Bãmb sɩbgda bãmb tao-tao." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ y gũus neer n sak tõodã la minindã ne no-tũuds nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Yãmb sã n kelg tõ-kãensã n sak bãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n pidsa nonglem kaool ning bãmb sẽn dag n maan ne yãmb yaab-rãmbã." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Bãmb na n nonga yãmba, b na n ning-y-la barka, n kɩt tɩ y lebg wʋsgo. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ y kambã paam barka, la b kɩt tɩ y tẽngã bõn-koaadl ne ki wã, la y reezẽ rãamã ne y kaamã, la y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã kamb zĩnd bark tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõo bãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Yãmb na n paama bark n yɩɩd buud a taabã fãa. B ka na n yãnd rao bɩ pag yãmb sʋk t'a yaa kiiri, wall rũms sẽn yaa kiir y rũmsã sʋk me ye." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n zãag-y-la ne bãas buud fãa. Bãmb ka na n kɩt tɩ Ezɩpt bã-wẽns nins yãmb sẽn mi wã yõk yãmb ye. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b yõk neb nins sẽn kis-b yãmbã. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Fo na n sãama buud nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n kɩt tɩ f tõogã. Ra zoe b nimbãaneg ye. Ra tũ-b wẽnnaam-dãmbã ye. Bala, na n yɩ bẽdg fo yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Yãmb sã n wa yeel y sũurẽ: «Bu-bãmbã yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd tõndo, tõnd ka tõe n tõog-b ye.»" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Bɩ y ra zoe bãmb ye. Tẽeg-y bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n maan Faarõ ne Ezɩpt nebã fãa wã yelle. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Yaa to-kãsems nins yãmb sẽn yãndã, ne bãn la bõn-bãnã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã pãngã ne b nugã sẽn zẽk n yiis yãmb be wã. Yaa woto la bãmb na n maan buud nins fãa yãmb sẽn zoetã." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Sẽn paase, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ kãnenkãas wãb neb nins sẽn ket n vɩ n solgd n dat n põsã hal tɩ b wa menem zãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ra zoe-y bãmb rabeem ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã yaa Wẽnnaam kãsenga, la b seka zoeese." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n diga bu-kãens yãmb taoor bilf-bilfu. Yãmb ka na n tõog n sãam bãmb fãa wakat a yembr ye. Sã n ka rẽ, we-rũmsã na n lebga wʋsg n yɩɩd yãmba." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n sõnga yãmb tɩ y tõog-ba. B na n kɩtame tɩ yɛɛsg yõk bãmb hal tɩ b wa sãam zãnga. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Bãmb na n sõnga yãmb tɩ y tõog bãmb rĩm-dãmbã, la yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b yʋʋr menem tẽng zugu. Bãmb ned baa a yembr ka na n tõog n yals n zab ne yãmba, hal tɩ yãmb wa sãam-b zãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Yãmb na n yõoga bãmb wẽn-naandsã bugum. Ra zoe-y bõn n wʋk wanzuri wã ne sãnemã sẽn be wẽn-naandsã zutã, tɩ wa lebg bẽdg ne yãmb ye. Bala, bõn-kãens yaa yel-beed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ra tall-y bũmb sẽn yaa yel-beed n kẽ y roogẽ n wa paam kãab-beed wa bãmb ye. Yãmb na n geelga bãmb wa yel-beed la yel-wẽnse, bala b kãaba bãmb wẽnga." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Gũus-y la y sak tõod nins fãa mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũnda wã n tõog n vɩɩmde, n lebg wʋsgo, n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n kõ y yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ n soog-a." 
Deuteronomy8:2 La y tẽeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn tall yãmb n gilim we-raoogã pʋgẽ yʋʋm pis-naasã, sẽn na n yɩl n nams yãmb la b mak yãmb n bãng bũmb ning sẽn be yãmb sũyẽ wã, y sã n na n saka bãmb tõodã, wall y sã n ka na n sake." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ y yã toogo, n kɩt tɩ kom nams yãmba, n yaool n kõ-y mande, yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n ka mi, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ y bãng tɩ ninsaal ka na n vɩ ne rɩɩb bal ye, la a na n vɩɩ ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Yãmb sẽn dag n yer fut ninsã ka ki ye, la y naoã ka mod yʋʋm pis-naasã pʋgẽ me ye." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Bãng-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã rag n sagenda yãmb wa ned sẽn sagend a biiga. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Sak-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõod la y tũ bãmb soayã, la y zoe bãmba." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n talla yãmb n tɩ kẽes tẽn-noog ning ko-zoetem ne bulsi, la ko-bunds koom sẽn pusgd a toor pʋt pʋsẽ, la tãms zutu." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Yaa tẽng sẽn sakd koodo, oorze, la reezẽ tɩɩse, ne kankamse, la gernaad tɩɩse, ne oliiv tɩɩse, la sẽn tar sɩɩdo." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Yaa tẽng yãmb sẽn na n dɩt y yam n ka kẽgsdẽ, bũmb sẽn ka na n paoog yãmbã yĩnga. Tẽn-kãng kugã yaa kutu, la yaa tẽng yãmb sẽn na n yãkd zũud a tãmsã pʋse." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Yãmb sã n wa rɩ n tɩge, bɩ y pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã bark tẽn-noog ning b sẽn kõ yãmbã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Gũus-y y mens n da wa yĩm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yelle, n bas bãmb tõodã ne b minindã, la b no-tũuds nins mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã ye." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Yãmb sã n wa rɩ n tɩge, la y wa me ro-sõama n kẽ," 
Deuteronomy8:13 tɩ y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã fɩɩgdẽ, tɩ y wanzuri wã ne y sãnemã paasdẽ, tɩ y paoongã fɩɩgdẽ," 
Deuteronomy8:14 bɩ y gũus n da wa wuk y mens n yĩm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt yembdã pʋgẽ wã yell ye. 
Deuteronomy8:15 Yaa bãmb n kɩt tɩ yãmb kẽn we-raoog ning sẽn kẽesd rabeemã pʋgẽ, tẽng ning sẽn tar wag-toose, la namse, n yaa ko-bulga, la ko-yũudã. La bãmb kɩtame tɩ koom yi pĩig pʋgẽ yãmb yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Bãmb dɩlga yãmb we-raoogã pʋgẽ, n kõ yãmb mand y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n ka mi. Sẽn na n yɩl n sãam y sũurã, n mak yãmb n ges n yaool n maan-y neere." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Ra wa n yeel-y tɩ yaa y pãngã ne y nus tʋʋm yĩng la y paam arzegs a woto ye. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tẽeg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yelle. Bala, yaa bãmb n kõ yãmb pãng tɩ y paam arzɛka, n na n pids bãmb kaool ning b sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmbã wa b sẽn maand dũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Yãmb sã n saag n yĩm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yelle, n tũ buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb n waoog-ba, mam yeta yãmb hakɩɩk rũndã, tɩ yãmb na n menema zãnga." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Yãmb na n menema wa buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ b menem yãmb taoorã. Bala, yãmb ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛg ye." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y-yã! Dũndã, yãmb na n dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ deeg soolem sẽn yɩɩd yãmb tɩ b pãng yɩɩd yãmb n deeg b tẽngã n sooge. Yaa tẽn-kãsems sẽn tar lal-bɛd sẽn zẽk n tat saasẽ." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Bãmb buudã yaa bu-kãsenga, n yaa nin-wobdo. Yaa Anak nebã yãmb sẽn mi wã, la y sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd b yell n yetẽ: «Ãnda n tõe n yals Anak yagensã taoore?»" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Dẽ wã, bãng-y rũndã tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã meng lʋɩta yãmb taoor wa bugum sẽn dɩta, la yaa bãmb meng n na n sãam-ba. Yaa bãmb n na n kɩt tɩ b paam yãnd yãmb taoore. La yãmb na n diga bãmb n menes-b tao-tao wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa rig bãmb n zãag ne yãmba, ra-y yeel-y tɩ: «Yaa tõnd tɩrlem yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ tõnd na n soog tẽngã.» Bala, yaa bu-kãens sẽn yaa wẽnsã yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rigd bãmb n yiisd yãmb taoore." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ka yãmb tɩrlmã ne y pʋ-peelmã yĩng n kɩt tɩ y na n deeg b tẽngã n soog ye. Yaa bu-kãens sẽn yaa wẽnsã yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã rig bãmb n yiis yãmb taoore, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pids wẽeneg ning bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmb a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoobã." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Bãng-y tɩ ka yãmb tɩrlem yĩng n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ yãmb tẽn-sõngã tɩ y soog ye. Bala, yãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa tõatba." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Tẽeg-y-yã, ra-y yĩm-y yãmb sẽn dag n maan bũmb ning n yik Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur we-raoogã pʋgẽ wã yell ye. Sẽn sɩng ne daar ning yãmb sẽn yi Ezɩpt hal n wa ta zĩ-kãngã wã, yãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horɛɛb tãngã zugu, yãmb yika Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur hal tɩ b rag n dat n sãam yãmba." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Mam dag n dʋʋ tãngã n na n tɩ reeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan kaool nins ne yãmbã kug-walse. Mam paa tãngã zug n kaoos rasem pis-naase, wĩntoog ne yʋngo, n ka rɩ rɩɩbo, la m ka yũ koom ye." 
Deuteronomy9:10 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam kug-wals a yiibã b sẽn gʋls ne b mengã nug-bilã, wa sẽn zems goam nins bãmb sẽn dag n gom ne yãmb tãngã zug bugmã pʋgẽ wã, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n tigmã." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Yaa rasem pis-naasã ne yʋnd pis-naasã sẽn wa n ta, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n kõ maam kug-wals a yiibã sẽn tar bãmb kaoolã." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Yik n yi tãngã zug n sig tao-tao, tɩ fo nebã fo sẽn yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã maana wẽnga. Bãmb bʋdga tao-tao n bas sor ning mam sẽn wilg bãmb tɩ b tũ wã. Bãmb yẽnega kut n maan bõn-naandg b mensã yĩnga.»" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne maam n yeele: «Mam yãnda nin-bãmbã. Yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata. 
Deuteronomy9:14 Bas tɩ m sãam-ba, n yẽes b yʋʋrã tẽng zugu, la m kɩt tɩ fo lebg bu-kãseng sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩd bãmba, tɩ b sõorã me yɩɩd-ba." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Dẽ, mam yii tãngã zug n lebg n sigi, tɩ kaoolã kug-wals a yiibã be mam nusẽ. Tãngã zãng rag n wita bugum." 
Deuteronomy9:16 La gese, mam yãndame, tɩ yãmb maana yel-wẽnd n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n maan sãnem nag-bil y mensã yĩnga. Yãmb bʋdga tao-tao n bas sor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg yãmb tɩ y tũ wã." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Mam dɩka kug-wals a yiibã ne m nus a yiib n lobe, la mam wãa bãmb yãmb nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Mam wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor dasem pis-naase, wĩntoog ne yʋng wa m sẽn dag n maan pĩndã. Mam ka rɩ la m ka yũ, yel-wẽn nins fãa yãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga. Bala, yãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan sẽn ka noom bãmba." 
Deuteronomy9:19 La rabeem dag n tara maam, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-kãbrã, ne b sũurã sẽn yik ne yãmb wʋsg hal tɩ b rat n sãam yãmbã yĩnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n kelga maam wakat-kãng me." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yika wʋsg ne a Aarõ hal tɩ b rag n dat n sãam-a, la mam yõka sɛɛg wakat-kãng me a Aarõ yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Mam dɩka nag-bil ning yãmb sẽn dag n maan n wa ne kongrã, n yõog bugum, n wese, la m neem-a t'a lebg zom, la m yaool n dɩk-a zomã n lob ko-soog ning sẽn yit tãngã zug n sigdã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Yãmb leb n kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik ne yãmb Tabeera ne Masa la Kibrot-Taava me. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n kɩt tɩ yãmb yi Kadɛɛs-Barneya wã, bãmb yeela yãmb yaa: «Yik-y n kẽng-y tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã n tɩ zab n deeg-a n sooge.» La yãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã noore, yãmb ka tẽ bãmba, la y ka sak bãmb koɛɛgã ye." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mam sẽn mi yãmbã tɛka, yãmb tõdgda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Dẽ, mam wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor dasem pis-naase, la yʋnd pis-naase, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b na n sãama yãmbã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Mam yõka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg n yeele: «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, da-y sãam-y y nebã sẽn yaa yãmb soolmã y sẽn fãag y kãosengã pʋgẽ, n yiis-b Ezɩpt tẽngã ne pãngã ye." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Tẽeg-y yãmb tʋmtʋmdb a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoob yelle. Da-y ges-y nin-kãensã tõdgrã ne b yel-wẽnã la b kongrã ye. 
Deuteronomy9:28 Sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ neb nins sẽn be tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n yiis tõndã ra wa yeele: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ka tõe n tall bãmb n taas tẽng ning b sẽn kãab bãmbã pʋgã yĩnga, la yaa b sẽn ka nong bãmbã yĩnga, la b yiis bãmb n tɩ kʋ we-raoogã pʋgẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Bãmb yaa yãmb mengã nebã, n yaa yãmb soolem y sẽn yiis Ezɩpt tẽng ne y pãn-kãsenga, la ne yãmb nugã sẽn tẽegã pãnga." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Pees kug-wals a yiib sẽn wẽnd pĩnd-dãmbã n tall n wa mam nengẽ tãngã zugu, la f maan raad koglgo." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Mam na n gʋlsa goam nins sẽn dag n be pipi kug-wals nins fo sẽn wã wã zutã, kug-wal-kãens zutu. La f bĩng bãmb koglgã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Dẽ, mam dɩka akasiya raad n maan koglgo. La mam peesa kug-wals a yiib wa pipi rãmbã n zã n dʋ tãngã zugu." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gʋlsa kug-walsã zut wa bũmb ning sẽn dag n gʋls pipi rãmbã zutã. Yaa tõod piig nins bãmb sẽn kõ yãmb tãngã zug bugum pʋgã, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn tigim taabã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka kug-walsã n kõ maam." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Dẽ, mam lebg n yii tãngã zug n sig n bĩng kug-walsã koglg ning mam sẽn dag n maanã pʋga, tɩ b pa be wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel maamã." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Israyɛll nebã yikame n yi Beerot-Bene-Yaakan bulsã zĩigẽ n kẽng Mosera. Yaa beenẽ la a Aarõ ki yã, la b mum-a-la be, t'a biig a Eleyazaar led a zĩigẽ n lebg maan-kʋʋr kãsma." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bãmb yii beenẽ n kẽng Gudgoda, n yi Gudgoda n kẽng Yotbata, tẽng sẽn tar kʋɩlse." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Wakat-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab welg Leevi buudã toor tɩ b tõe n zã Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã, la b yals bãmb taoor n maan b tʋʋmde, n ning nebã bark ne bãmb yʋʋr hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã ka lagem b saam-biisã n paam pʋɩɩr ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa bãmb pʋɩɩr wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeel yãmb wɛɛngẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy10:10 Mam paa tãngã zug rasem pis-naas la yʋnd pis-naase, wa mam sẽn dag n maan pĩndã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kelga maam wakat-kãng me, bãmb ka tʋlg yãmb sãoong ye." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Yik n lʋɩ nebã taoor n tall-b n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel b yaab-rãmbã tɩ m na n kõ-b lame tɩ b soogã pʋgẽ.» 
Deuteronomy10:12 La moasã, Israyɛll nebã, bõe la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rat ne yãmba, sã n ka tɩ y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n tũ bãmb soayã, la y nong bãmba, n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ne y sũyã fãa la ne y yamã fãa," 
Deuteronomy10:13 la y sak bãmb noyã ne b tõod nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã n paam sũ-noogo. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Gese, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n so saasã ne saasã saase, la dũniyã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy10:15 La baoosgo, yaool n yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga, la bãmb loogr zugẽ, yaa bãmb yagensã, yaa yãmb la b yãk buudã fãa sʋka, wa yãmb sẽn ne rũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Bao-y yam sõama n kõ y mense, la y ra yɩ tõatb ye." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa wẽnnaam-dãmbã Wẽnnaam, la zu-sob-n-dãmbã Zu-soaba. Bãmb yaa kãsenga, n tar pãnga. Bãmb zemsa zoeese. Bãmb ka tũusd ned ye, la b ka reegd kũun n maan wẽng ye." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Bãmb zabd n sõngda kɩɩbs ne pʋg-kõapa. Bãmb nonga sãamb n kõt-b rɩɩb ne futu. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Bɩ yãmb me nong sãamba, tɩ bala, yãmb me rag n yaa sãamb Ezɩpt soolmẽ." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Zoe-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã la y sak bãmb n gãd bãmba, la y wẽen ne bãmb yʋʋre." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Bãmb yaa yãmb ziiri, bãmb yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Yaa bãmb n maan bõn-kãsems sẽn sek zoeese, tɩ yãmb ninã yãnde." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn wa n na n kẽng Ezɩptã tɩ b sõorã rag n yaa pis-yopoe. La moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ y lebg wʋsg wa yĩngr ãdse." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Yãmb na n nonga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n sak bãmb no-tũudsã ne b noyã la b tõodã daar fãa." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Bãng-y rũndã, tɩ mam ka gomd ne yãmb kambã sẽn ka bãng la b ka yã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zãmsgã, b kãosengã, ne b nug sẽn tar pãngã la b nugã sẽn tẽegã ye." 
Deuteronomy11:3 B ka yãnd bãnã ne tʋʋm nins bãmb sẽn maan Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgã, la b sẽn maan Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã ne a tẽngã fãa wã," 
Deuteronomy11:4 la bũmb nins bãmb sẽn dag n maan Ezɩpt tãb-biisã ne b wiidã la b saar-dãmbã, ne bãmb sẽn maan to-to n kɩt tɩ rudum ko-kãsengã lim bãmb wakat ning b sẽn digd yãmbã ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab menesa bãmb hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Deuteronomy11:5 B ka yãnd bũmb nins bãmb sẽn maan n kõ yãmb we-raoogã pʋgẽ hal tɩ y wa ta zĩ-kãngã wã ye. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Bãmb ka yãnd bũmb ning bãmb sẽn maan a Rubɛn biig a Eliyaab yagensã, a Datã ne a Abiramã, tẽngã sẽn yaag a noor n vel bãmb ne b yirã rãmba, la ne b fu-rotã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn tũ bãmb Israyɛll nebã fãa sʋkã ye." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Yaa yãmb mens nin n yãnd tʋʋm-kãseng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maanã. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Rẽ yĩnga, sak-y tõod nins fãa mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã n paam pãng n tõog n deeg tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dabd n na n tɩ soogã," 
Deuteronomy11:9 la y kaoos tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõo bãmb ne b yagensã tɩ b soogã pʋgẽ. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã ka wẽnd Ezɩpt tẽngã yãmb sẽn yiẽ wã ye. Beenẽ, yãmb dag n bʋta y bõn-buudã, n zãgsd-a koom wa ned sẽn zãgsd zẽedo." 
Deuteronomy11:11 La tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dabd n na n tɩ soogã tara tãms ne londo. Saag niida beenẽ n kõt-a koom. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Yaa tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn get a yell daar fãa, sẽn sɩng ne yʋʋmdã sɩngr n tɩ tãag a saabo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Yãmb sã n sak mam tõod nins mam sẽn kõt yãmb rũndã wã, n nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n sak bãmb ne y sũyã fãa la ne y yamã fãa," 
Deuteronomy11:14 mam na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni yãmb tẽngã sẽn zems a wakate. Na n yɩɩ dẽenem saaga, la yaoolem saaga, tɩ y paam bɩle la reezẽ rãam ne kaam." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yamd yi wetã pʋsẽ, y rũmsã yĩnga. Yãmb na n dɩ n tɩgame." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Gũus-y neer tɩ ned ra belg yãmb n kɩt tɩ y bʋdg n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab n wõgemd n waoog-b ye. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Woto na n kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik ne yãmb tɩ b pag saasã tɩ saag ka leb n ni, tɩ tẽngã ka leb n kõ bõn-koaadl ye. Dẽ, na n kɩtame tɩ y menem tao-tao tẽn-noog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Bĩng-y gom-kãensã mam sẽn kõt yãmbã y sũyã pʋsẽ, ne y yamẽ, la y loe bãmb y nugẽ, la y teeg-a y rĩirẽ, y ninã sʋka, tɩ b yɩ bãnde." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Rɩk-y bãmb n zãms y kambã, yãmb sã n wa zĩ y rotã pʋsẽ, wall y sã n bee sor zugu, wall y gãandg ne y yikr wakate." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Gʋls-y bãmb y lugã, ne y rotã noy yĩngri, la y tẽngã rignoy zutu." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Dẽ, yãmb ne y kambã rasem na n kaoosa wa saasã sẽn be yĩngrã sẽn kaoosd to-to wã, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõ-b lame tɩ b soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Yãmb sã n gũus neer n sak tõod nins fãa mam sẽn kõt yãmb tɩ y tũ wã, n nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n tũ bãmb sorã, la y loe y meng ne bãmba," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y rig bu-kãensã fãa. Yãmb na n tõoga buud sẽn yaa kãseng n tar pãng n yɩɩd yãmba. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Zĩig ning fãa yãmb naoã sẽn tabã na n yɩɩ yãmb n na n sooge. Yãmb soolmã na n sɩnga ne we-raoogã hal tɩ ta Libã, la a sɩng ne Efrat kʋɩlgã hal tɩ ta ko-kãsengã sẽn be wĩndgã sẽn lʋɩtẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Ned baa a yembr ka na n tõog n yals n zab ne yãmb ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn kẽngã pʋgẽ, bɩ rabeem la rigb yõk tẽngã nebã fãa wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Gese, rũndã, mam ningda bark la kãab-beed yãmb taoore." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Yãmb sã n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõod nins mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã, a na n yɩɩ bark yãmb yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy11:28 La yãmb sã n ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõodo, yãmb sã bʋdg n bas sor ning mam sẽn wilgd yãmb dũndã wã, n na n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab yãmb sẽn ka mi, na n yɩɩ kãab-beed yãmb yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sã n tall foom n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning fo sẽn na n soogã pʋgẽ, bɩ f zĩnd Garizim tãngã zug n ning barka, la f zĩnd Eball tãngã zug n kãab wẽnga." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Tãn-kãens bee Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, n teesd wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ, Kana nebã sẽn be zĩig ning sẽn yaa tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã, Araba sẽn tot ne Gilgall sẽn yeg Moore terebẽnt tɩɩsã." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Bala, yãmb na n dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ soog tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã. Yãmb na n deega tẽngã n sooge, n kẽ beenẽ n zĩndi." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Bɩ y maan gũusg n sak no-tũudsã la noy nins mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã.» 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ad no-tũudsã ne noy nins yãmb sẽn tog n maan gũusg n sak n tũ, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soog y vɩɩmã tɛk dũni ka wã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Menes-y zĩis ninsi, wall buud nins yãmb sẽn na n tõogã sẽn pʋʋsd b wẽnnaam-dãmbã, sẽn be tãms ne kunkub zutã, la tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem tẽngrã." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Bɩ y siig b tẽn-kugã la y wã b kug-vigindsã la y yõog Aseera ra-lugdsã bugum. Menes-y b bõn-naands nins b sẽn pees n maan b wẽnnaam-dãmbã tɩ b yʋʋr menem zĩ-kãense. 
Deuteronomy12:4 La ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã wɛɛngẽ, ra maan-y a woto ye." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Yaa zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãk yãmb buudã sʋk n ning b yʋʋrã la y na n kẽng n tɩ waoog-ba. Yaa beenẽ bal la yãmb na n kẽnge. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Yaa beenẽ la yãmb na n tall y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne y maand a taabã, la y piig pʋɩyã, ne y kũunã, la bũmb nins yãmb sẽn dag n pʋlem Wẽnnaamã, la yamleoog kũunã, ne yãmb rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã kom-dẽemsã n kẽnge." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor beenẽ, la y na n dɩ, tɩ yãmb ne y zagsã rãmb maan sũ-noog ne bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn tarã, tʋʋm nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n ning-y bark b pʋsẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Bɩ d ra maan wa tõnd sẽn maand rũndã wã, tɩ ned kam fãa maand wa a sẽn tagsd tɩ yaa sõama wã ye." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Bala, yãmb nan ka ta vʋʋsg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy12:10 La yãmb sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋga, la b sã n kɩt tɩ y tõog y bɛɛbã fãa sẽn gũbg yãmbã n kõ yãmb vʋʋsg ne vɩ-bãane," 
Deuteronomy12:11 yaa zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãk n ning b yʋʋrã la y na n tall bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel yãmbã n wa: Yãmb maand nins sẽn yõogd bugmã ne y maand a taabã, la y piig pʋɩyã ne y kũunã, la bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saabã." 
Deuteronomy12:12 La y maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor be, yãmb ne y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli, la y yem-daadã ne y yem-pogsã, la a Leevi buudã nebã sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã. Bala, a Leevi buudã ned ba a yembr ka paam zĩig yãmb sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Gũus-y-yã, la y ra wa sak n yõog maand bugum zĩigã fãa y sẽn paam ye." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Yaa zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yãk yãmb buud a ye sʋkã, la yãmb na n maan y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã. Yaa beenẽ la y na n maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy12:15 La baoosgo, wakat ning fãa yãmb sẽn data, yãmb tõe n kʋʋ rũms n wãb b nemd tẽms nins fãa yãmb sẽn be wã pʋgẽ, sẽn zems bark ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n kõ yãmbã. Ned sẽn yaa yɩlemd ne ned sẽn ka yɩlemd fãa tõe n dɩɩme, wa b sẽn na n wãb yãk bɩ walga." 
Deuteronomy12:16 La baoosgo, bɩ y ra rɩ zɩɩmã ye. Bɩ y raag zɩɩmã tẽng wa koom." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Yãmb ka tõe n dɩ y koodã, ne y reezẽ rãamã, la y kaamã piig pʋɩɩrã ne y rũm-dẽemsã, ne bũmb nins yãmb sẽn pʋlem Wẽnnaamã, la yãmb yamleoog kũunã, ne y kũun a taabã y sẽn kɩtã, y tẽmsã pʋsẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy12:18 La yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor bala, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yãkã, la yãmb ne y bi-ribla, la y bi-pugla, ne y yem-daadã, la y yem-pogsã, ne Leevi buudã ned sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsã na n dɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoore, n maan sũ-noog ne bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tarã." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Gũus-y y mens y yõor tɛka, n da wa mong Leevi ned bũmb y tẽmsã pʋsẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n yalg yãmb soolmã wa b sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã, tɩ nemd velem wa yõk yãmb tɩ y yeele: «Tõnd nongẽ lame n paam nemd n wãbe!» Bɩ y bao nemd n wãb wa y sẽn date." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yãk n ning b yʋʋrã sã n zãr ne yãmba, yãmb tõe n yãka y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmbã n kʋ wa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã. La yãmb tõe n dɩ-a-la y tẽmsã pʋsẽ wa y sẽn data." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Yãmb tõe n wãba yõwã wa b sẽn wãbd walg bɩ yãk nemdo. Ned sẽn yaa rẽgd ne ned sẽn yaa yɩlemd fãa tõe n dɩɩme. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Bũmb sẽn be bala, gũus-y y mens n da rɩ zɩɩm ye. Bala, zɩɩm yaa vɩɩm. Da lagm-y vɩɩm ne nemd n dɩ ye." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Da rɩ-y-yã-a ye, raag-y-yã-a tẽng wa koom." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Da rɩ-y-yã-a ye, tɩ yãmb ne y kamba la y yagensã vɩɩm tõe n yɩ noogo, yãmb sẽn maand sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Tall-y bũmb nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, ne bũmb nins yãmb sẽn pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, n kẽng zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Rɩk-y maand nins sẽn yõogd bugmã nemdã ne a zɩɩmã n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugrã zugu. La y sã n maand maand a taabã, bɩ y rɩk b zɩɩmã n daag Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugr zugu, la y wãb b nemdã." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Gũus-y y mense, n kelg la y sak bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yet yãmb dũndã wã, tɩ yãmb ne y kambã la y yagensã vɩɩm tõe n yɩ noog wakat fãa, yãmb sẽn maand sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n sãam buud nins yãmb sẽn na n deeg b tẽngã, y sã n wa reeg b tẽngã n kẽ n zĩndi," 
Deuteronomy12:30 gũus-y n da lʋɩ-y b bẽdgã pʋgẽ, tɩ y sẽn sãam-bã, bɩ y leb n yik n maand wa bãmb ye. Gũus-y n da wa sok n na n bãng b wẽn-naandsã yelle, n wa sokd y mens n yetẽ: «Bu-bãmbã rag n tũuda b wẽn-naandsã wãn-wãna? Mam me na n maana wa bãmba!»" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ra maan-y-yã a woto Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nifẽ ye. Bala, nin-bãmb dag n maanda yel-beed buud toor-toor nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kisã b wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩnga. Bãmb tol n dag n dɩkda b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli n yõogd bugum n kõt b wẽnnaam-dãmbã." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Yãmb na n deega goam nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã, la y sak-ba. Ra paas-y bũmbu, la y ra boog bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy13:2 No-rɛɛsa, wall ned sẽn paam vẽnegr zãmsd pʋg sã n wa yik n togs yãmb bãnd wall bõn-bãnde," 
Deuteronomy13:3 tɩ bãndã ne bõn-bãndã paam pidsgu, t'a yeel yãmb tɩ y wa tɩ b tɩ tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab yãmb sẽn ka mi, la y waoog-ba," 
Deuteronomy13:4 bɩ y ra kelg no-rɛɛs-kãng wall nin-kãng soab goamã ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n makd yãmb n dat n bãng yãmb sã n tũuda bãmb ne y sũyã fãa la ne y yamã fãa." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Bɩ y tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã la y zoe bãmba. Sak-y bãmb tõodã n kelg b koɛɛgã, la y waoog bãmb n gãd-b kãenkãe." 
Deuteronomy13:6 No-rɛɛs-kãng wall zãmsdã soab tog n kiime. Bala, yẽnda zãmsa neb tɩ b zãgs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt yembd pʋgẽ wã, n dat n kɩt tɩ y bʋdg n bas sor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y tũ wã. Yaa woto la y na n yiis bũmb ning sẽn yaa wẽngã yãmb sʋka." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Fo ba-biig sẽn yaa f ma-biiga, wall fo bi-ribl bɩ f bi-pugla, wall fo pʋg-rʋmd bɩ f zoa f sẽn nong wa f meng sã n soos n belg n yeel foom tɩ f wa tɩ y pʋʋs buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka mi," 
Deuteronomy13:8 sẽn yaa neb nins sẽn gũbg yãmbã wẽnnaam-dãmba, sẽn pẽ-b ne yãmb la sẽn zãr-b ne yãmba, la sẽn be zĩigã fãa tẽngã zugu," 
Deuteronomy13:9 bɩ f ra sake, la f ra kelg-a me ye. Ra zoe a soabã nimbãanega, la f ra bas-a t'a põs ye. Ra maan sugr ne a soab me ye." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Kʋ a soabã. Foom n tog n yɩ pipi n lobg-a ne kugr tɩ neb a taabã wa sõng foom tɩ y kʋ-a. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Fo na n loba a soabã ne kug n kʋ, yẽnda sẽn dat n kɩt tɩ fo bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt yembd pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Israyɛll nebã fãa na n wʋma bõn-kãng tɩ rabeem yõk-b tɩ b ka leb n maan yel-wẽnd a woto buud yãmb sʋk ye. 
Deuteronomy13:13 Yãmb sã n wʋm ned sẽn gomd yãmb tẽng a yembr Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y zĩndã pʋgẽ wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: 
Deuteronomy13:14 «Nin-yood n yi yãmb sʋkã n kɩt tɩ tẽngã nebã bʋdge, n yeel tẽngã nebã tɩ b wa tɩ b kẽng n tɩ tũ buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb yãmb sẽn ka mi,»" 
Deuteronomy13:15 bɩ y sok n bãng a yell neere. La y sã n mik tɩ b sɩd maana yel-wẽn-kãng yãmb sʋka," 
Deuteronomy13:16 bɩ y kʋ tẽngã neb ne b rũmsã fãa ne zabr sʋʋga. Sãam-y tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy13:17 Bɩ y wʋk teedã fãa n wa tẽngã zĩ-sõasdgẽ, la y yõog tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, t'a lebg bug-toaalg wakat fãa. Bɩ b ra leb n me-a ye." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ra sak-y n dɩk-y bũmb nins sẽn yaa kãab-wẽngã ba a yembr ye. Bas-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sig tɩ b zoe yãmb nimbãaneg n kɩt tɩ y fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg wa b sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmbã. 
Deuteronomy13:19 Yãmb wee n kelgd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã, la y sakd bãmb tõod nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã, n maan sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã bala.»" 
Deuteronomy14:1 Yãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kamba. Ra bog-y y yĩnsã, la y ra põng y zut kũum yĩng ye." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Bala, yãmb yaa neb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yãka yãmb buud nins sẽn be tẽng zugã sʋk n maan b meng nebã." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Da rɩ-y bũmb sẽn kis ye. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ad rũms nins yãmb sẽn tog n dɩ: Yaa naafo, pesgo, bʋʋga," 
Deuteronomy14:5 walga, yãka, beoko, we-bʋʋga, molfo, we-pesgo, ne wilpeoolgo." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ rũms nins fãa sẽn tar nao-ben-boaga, la b bʋkd-b yamdã." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Baoosgo, rũms nins fãa sẽn bɩɩsd-b n tar nao-ben-boagã la sẽn ka nao-ben-boagã sʋka, ra rɩ-y yʋgemde, soaamba, la seer ye. Bala, bãmb bɩɩsdame la b nao-bendã ka boag ye. Bɩ y kisg bãmba." 
Deuteronomy14:8 La y kisg kurkuri. Bala, a tara nao-ben-boaga, la a ka bɩɩsd ye. Da wãb-y bãmb nemdo, la y ra sak n sɩɩs b kũum me ye." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ad bũmb nins sẽn be koom pʋgẽ tɩ yãmb tog n dɩ. Yaa zĩm nins sẽn tar gɛda la sẽn tar pagdã. Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ bãmba. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Bɩ y ra rɩ zĩm nins sẽn ka tar gɛda, la b ka tar pagdã ye. Bãmb yaa rẽgd yãmb yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ liuuli nins fãa sẽn yaa yɩlma wã. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ad liuuli nins yãmb sẽn ka tog n dɩ: Yaa yɩbrgo, kosenkonde, pa-nand-tugri," 
Deuteronomy14:13 wɩbga, sɩl-faoogo," 
Deuteronomy14:14 gãabd buud toor-toore," 
Deuteronomy14:15 neoongo, viuugu, lʋre, vitamba," 
Deuteronomy14:16 kɩɩm-liuula, bulyẽoogo, sɩl-faoogo," 
Deuteronomy14:17 bakaorgo, koom-daoogo, bulwãoogo," 
Deuteronomy14:18 nakomsugri, rãongo, salsanga ne zankiti buudã fãa." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Bõn-yɩgdɩ sẽn tũud taab wʋsgã yaa kisg ne yãmba. Ra rɩ-y bãmb ye. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Yãmb tõe n wãba bõn-yɩgdɩ buud nins fãa sẽn yaa yɩlma wã nemdo. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Da rɩ-y rũng sẽn ki a toor ye. Rɩk-y-yã-a n kõ sãamb nins sẽn be yãmb tẽngã pʋgẽ wã tɩ b rɩ, ka rẽ bɩ y koos-a ne sãambã. Bala, yãmb yaa buud sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Da rʋg-y bull a ma bĩisim pʋg ye." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Yʋʋmd fãa, yãk-y y koodã yãmb pʋtã sẽn womdã pʋɩɩr a ye piig fãa pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Rɩ-y yãmb bõn-koaadlã piig pʋɩɩre, la y reezẽ rãamã ne y kaamã piig pʋɩɩre, la y rũm-dẽemsã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, zĩig ning b sẽn na n yãk n ning b yʋʋrã, tɩ yãmb tõe n zãms tɩ zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã daar fãa." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk n ning b yʋʋrã sã n zãr wʋsg ne yãmba, tɩ y ka tõe n tall bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn ning yãmb bark ne bũmb ningã piig pʋɩɩr n kẽng be," 
Deuteronomy14:25 bɩ y koos-a n zã a ligdã n kẽng zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yãkã. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Yãmb tõe n dɩka ligdã n da bũmb ning fãa sẽn ta yãmb yam. Yãmb tõe n daa rũm-bɛda, wall rũm-bãoonego, wall reezẽ rã-noodo, wall rã-kũmdum, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn noom foom. Bɩ yãmb ne y yirã rãmb rɩ-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor beenẽ n maan sũ-noogo." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Ra mong-y Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã bũmb nins bãmb sẽn tog n paamã ye. Bala, Leevi buudã nebã ka lagem yãmb n paam zĩig tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩr ye." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Yʋʋm a tãab fãa, bɩ y yiis yãmb koodã fãa piig pʋɩɩr n bĩng y tẽmsã pʋsẽ." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Dẽ, Leevi buudã ned sẽn ka paam zĩig tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩr yãmb sʋkã, ne sãana, la pʋg-kõore, ne kɩɩb sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã, na n dɩ n tɩgame, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ning yãmb nus tʋʋmã fãa yãmb sẽn maandã barka." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Yʋʋm a yopoe fãa, bɩ y bas y sam-dãmbã taale." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ad b sẽn na n bas sama taal to-to: B sã n wa moon bas taal yʋʋmdã, ned ning fãa sẽn peng a to bũmb tog n basa taale. A ka tõe n leb n modg a to, wall a ba-biig t'a lebs-a a bũmbã wakat ning b sẽn zoe n moon bas-taal yʋʋmdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã ye." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Yãmb tõe n modga sãan t'a yao yãmb y samde, la y bas sam nins y saam-biisã sẽn tarã taale." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Nimbãan-ned ka na n zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n ninga tẽngã barka, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã." 
Deuteronomy15:5 Yãmb sã n sak n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã n gũus n maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã," 
Deuteronomy15:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n ninga yãmb bark wa b sẽn yeel yãmbã. Buud wʋsg na n gãnega bũmb ne yãmb n paam n peng bũmb yãmb nengẽ, la yãmb ka na n bõos bãmb bũmb ye. Yãmb na n sooga buud wʋsgo, la bãmb ka na n tol n soog yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Fo saam-biisã sʋk ned sã n yaa naong soab n be yãmb tẽmsã tẽng a yembr sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã tɩ y soogã pʋga, bɩ f ra keng f sũur n mong f ba-biigã sẽn yaa naong soabã bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Puk f nug n peng-a bũmb ning a sẽn datã. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Gũus f meng n da wa paam tags-yood n yeele: «Yʋʋm a yopoe yʋʋmdã sẽn yaa bas taal yʋʋmdã kolgdame» n ka zoe f saam-biigã sẽn yaa naong soabã nimbãanega, n mong-a bũmbu, fo yĩng sã n kɩt t'a yãb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fo na n konga bʋʋm." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Kõ-a ne yamleoogo, la ka ne rok-m-zugẽ ye. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n ninga foom bark f tʋʋmã, ne bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn dat n maanã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Bala, naong rãmb na n zĩnda tẽngã pʋgẽ wakat fãa. Yaa rẽndã yĩng la mam yet yãmb tɩ y tẽeg y nug n sõng y saam-biigã, ne naong soabã la nimbãan-dãmb sẽn be yãmb tẽngẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Fo saam-biig sẽn yaa Ebre neda, sã n yaa rao bɩ paga, sã n koos a meng ne foom, bɩ a tʋm fo tʋʋmd yʋʋm a yoobe. La yʋʋm a yopoe wã yʋʋmd sã n ta, bɩ f kõ-a lohorem." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Fo sã n kõ-a lohorem n bas-a t'a na n yi fo zakẽ wã, bɩ f ra bas-a t'a loog nug-zaal ye." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Yãk rũm-bãooneg ne bõn-koaadla, la bũmb ning sẽn be fo reezẽ rãam wẽkr zĩigẽ wã, n kõ-a wa sẽn zems bark ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ foomã." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb me rag n yaa yembs Ezɩpt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã fãag yãmba. Yaa rẽndã yĩng la m kõt yãmb no-kãngã rũndã. 
Deuteronomy15:16 Baoosgo, yambã sã n yeel foom: «Mam ka rat n yi yãmb zakẽ wã ye,» a sẽn nong foom ne f yirã rãmbã yĩnga, t'a sẽn be fo zakẽ wã noom-a lame," 
Deuteronomy15:17 bɩ f rɩk pĩim n dɩdg a tʋbrã ne lugr n vʋdg t'a lebg f yamb wakat fãa. Bɩ f maan f yem-poak me woto. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Fo sã n bas-a, bɩ f ra zoe bõn ye. Bala, yʋʋm a yoobã pʋgẽ, yẽnda tʋmame n naf foom naoor a yiib n yɩɩd ned sẽn tʋmd n baood ligdi. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n ninga yãmb bark ne bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n maanã." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Bɩ f rɩk f rũm-bɛdã ne f rũm-bãoonegã kom-dẽems nins sẽn yaa raadã fãa n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã. Da rɩk f niig kom-dẽems n maan nag-koods ye. La f ra wõrs f piis kom-dẽems kõbd ye. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Bɩ foom ne f zakã rãmb rɩ rũm-bãmb yʋʋmd fãa yʋʋmd fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoore, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yãkã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Rũngã sã n tar zang n yaa woabg bɩ zõanga, wall zang buud a to, bɩ f ra rɩk-a n maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩng ye." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Bɩ f rɩ-a f meng tẽmsã pʋse. Ned sẽn yaa rẽgd ne ned sẽn yaa yɩlemd tõe n dɩ-a-la wa walg ne yĩisri. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Da rɩ a zɩɩmã ye, raag-a tẽng wa koom." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Maan-y Pak tigrã bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã pʋgẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ ne yʋngo, bõn-bɩʋʋng kiuugã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Bɩ y yãk rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd n maan Pak tigrã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãk n ning b yʋʋrã." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Tigrã rasem a yopoe wã fãa pʋga, yãmb ka tog n dɩ bũmb sẽn ning rãbɩll ye. Yãmb tog n dɩta bur sẽn ka ning rãbɩll rasem a yopoe wã fãa. Yaa namsg buri, bala, yãmb yii Ezɩpt ne yãgbo. Yaa sẽn na n tẽegd yãmb daar ning yãmb sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã y yõor tɛka." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, bɩ y ra bas tɩ rãbɩll zĩnd y soolmã pʋgẽ ye. La ra bas-y maoong ning sẽn kʋʋd pipi daarã zaabrã nemd baa bilf tɩ kell n vẽeg beoog ye." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Yãmb ka tõe n kʋ Pak tigrã maoong tẽms nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y zĩndã pʋgẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy16:6 Yaa zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãk n ning b yʋʋrã la yãmb tog n kʋ Pak tigrã maoong zaabre, wĩndgã kõom wakate, sẽn zems wakat ning yãmb sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Rʋg-y-yã-a n dɩ zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãkã. La beoog sã n vẽege, bɩ y lebg n leb y fu-rotẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Rɩ-y bur sẽn ka rãbɩll rasem a yoobe. La rasem a yopoe wã daar na n yɩɩ tiging raar Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã waoogr yĩnga. Ra tʋm-y badaar ye. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Fo na n sõda rasem a yopoepoe naoor a yopoe, sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning b sẽn na n dɩk goeoogã n na wʋr bɩle wã." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Maan-y rasem a yopoepoe naoor a yopoe wã tigrã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, bɩ y kõ yamleoog kũunã wa sẽn zems bark ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Maan-y sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, bɩ yãmb ne y kom-dibli wã la y kom-pugli wã ne y yem-daadã, la y yem-pogsã ne a Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã, la sãambã ne kɩɩbsã la pʋg-kõap nins sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoore, zĩig ning bãmb sẽn na n yãk n ning b yʋʋrã." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb me yɩɩ yembs Ezɩpt tẽnga, dẽ, sak-y no-tũud-kãensã fãa, la y ning-b b nao-kẽndr zugu." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Yãmb sã n wʋk y bõn-koaadlã zeesẽ wã n sɛ, la y wẽk y reezẽ biis koom n sɛ, bɩ y maan zãn tigr rasem a yopoe." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Bɩ yãmb ne y kom-dibli wã, la y kom-pugli wã, ne y yem-daadã, la y yem-pogsã, ne a Leevi buudã nebã, la sãambã ne kɩɩbsã, ne pʋg-kõapã sẽn be yãmb tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã maan sũ-noog tig-kãng wakate." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Maan-y tigrã rasem a yopoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã waoogr yĩnga, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãkã pʋga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n ninga yãmb bark tɩ y paam koodo, la b ning yãmb nus tʋʋmã fãa barka, tɩ y maan sũ-noog wʋsg ne y sũur fãa." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Yʋʋmd fãa, yãmb daopã fãa tog n wa yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor naoor a tãabo, zĩig ning bãmb sẽn na n yãkã pʋga: Yaa bur sẽn ka rãbɩll tigrã wakate, la rasem a yopoepoe naoor a yopoe wã tigr wakate, la zãnã tigr wakate. Ned ka tog n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor nug-zaal ye." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Ned kam fãa na n kõo wa a sẽn tõe, wa sẽn zems bark ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yẽnda wã." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Yãmb na n yãka bʋ-kaoodb la seb-gʋndba, n ning-b tẽms nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋsẽ wã dignoyẽ, wa sẽn zems y buudã fãa sõore, tɩ b bʋ nebã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Bɩ y ra bʋ bʋʋdã kɛg ye, la y ra tũus neb ye. Bɩ y ra reeg kũun ye. Bala, kũun luta yam dãmb nini, la a golemd nin-tɩrs goamã." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Kell-y n maan-y tɩrlem, n tõog n vɩɩmd n soog tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Ra vigl-y tɩɩg ba a yembr daoog Aseera yʋʋr yĩng n yegl Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugrã, yãmb sẽn na n maan y meng yĩngã ye." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Ra vigl-y kug-viginds n pʋʋs ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kisa bõn-kãense." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Da-y rɩk-y naaf bɩ pesgo, wall bʋʋg sẽn tar zang bɩ bãnde, n maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩng ye. Bala, bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Sã n mikame tɩ tẽms nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋga, rao bɩ pag n be tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ, n maand sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nifẽ, n bas b kaoolã," 
Deuteronomy17:3 n kẽng n tɩ wõgemd wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab taoor n waoog-ba, wall a waoog wĩndgã bɩ kiuugã wall ãdsã, n kɩɩs noor ning mam sẽn kõ wã," 
Deuteronomy17:4 tɩ ned sã n togs yãmba, bɩ yãmb n wʋm tɩ b gomd a yelle, bɩ y fees n bao n bãnge: dẽ yĩnga yel-be-kãngã sɩd maanã Israyɛll pʋgẽ sɩda? Yãmb sã n mik tɩ bõn-wẽng a woto n sɩd maan Israyɛll nebã sʋka," 
Deuteronomy17:5 bɩ y yiis raoã bɩ pag ning sẽn maan-a yel-wẽn-kãngã wã tẽngã noor n lob-a ne kug t'a ki. Sã n yaa raoa wall paga, bɩ b lob-a ne kug t'a ki." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ned sã n segd ne kũum, b tog n kʋ-a lame, la yaa neb a yiib bɩ a tãab kaset yĩnga. B ka tog n kʋ a soabã nin-yend kaset yĩng ye." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Kaset-dãmbã n tog n yɩ pipi n lobg-a kugrã tɩ neb a taabã yaool n pʋgle. Woto, yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã yãmb sʋka.»" 
Deuteronomy17:8 «Nin-kʋʋre, bɩ zabre, wall sãmpogr yell sã n wa beẽ, tɩ b tall n wa y tẽmsã rignoy tɩ bʋʋdã kaoob yaa toogo, bɩ y yik n kẽng zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãkã." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Fo na n tɩ yãnda Leevi neb nins sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, la ned ning sẽn yaa-a bʋ-kaood wakat-kãngã n wilg bãmb yellã, tɩ b kao bʋʋdã n kõ yãmba." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Maan-y wa bãmb sẽn kao bʋʋdã to-to n kõ yãmb zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yãkã pʋgẽ. Sak-y n maan-y bũmbã fãa wa bãmb sẽn yeel yãmbã kɛpɩ. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Maan-y wa sẽn zems tõog ning bãmb sẽn na n wilg yãmbã, la a wa sẽn zems bãmb sẽn na n kao bʋʋdã to-to n kõ yãmbã. Ra bʋdg-y goabg bɩ rɩtg n bas bũmb ning bãmb sẽn na n yeel yãmbã ye." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Ned sã n maan tɩtaam n kɩɩs maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn be beenẽ n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã ne bʋ-kaoodã n ka sak n maan wa b sẽn yeelã, b tog n kʋʋ nin-kãngã! Woto, yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã Israyɛll nebã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Dẽ, nebã fãa na n wʋmame n zoe rabeem, la bãmb kõn leb n maan tɩtaam ye.»" 
Deuteronomy17:14 Yãmb sã n wa tɩ kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋg n soog-a n zĩndi, n yeele: «Tõnd data rĩm t'a soog tõnd wa buud nins sẽn gũbg tõndã,»" 
Deuteronomy17:15 yaa ned ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yãkã n tog n yɩ yãmb dĩma. Yaa yãmb saam-biisã sʋk la y na n yãk ned t'a lebg y rĩmã. Yãmb ka tog n yãk sãan sẽn ka yãmb buudã ned t'a yɩ yãmb naab ye. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Yẽnda ka tog n tall wiid wʋsg ye, sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a ra wa tall nebã n leb Ezɩpt soolmẽ, a sẽn tar wiid wʋsgã yĩng ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yãmb tɩ y ra leb n tũ so-kãng yɛs ye." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Yẽnda ka tog n peeg pagb wʋsg tɩ b wa kɩt t'a bʋdg ye. La a ka tog n tall wanzuri ne sãnem wʋsg me tɩ loog ye. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Rĩmã sã n wa zĩnd a naamã geer zugu, bɩ a kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã wa ne tõogã sebre, t'a kɩt tɩ b gʋls tõ-kãng sebr a to zug yẽnda mengã yĩnga, tɩ yɩ tõogã sebr a to." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Yẽnda tog n tara tõogã sebrã a nengẽ, n karemd-a daar fãa n tãag a yõor tɛka, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n zãms tɩ zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã, la a sak tõodã goamã fãa, ne a no-tũud-kãens fãa, la a ning-b b nao-kẽndr zugu," 
Deuteronomy17:20 sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a ra wa wuk a meng ne a saam-biisã n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg n bas tõ-kãensã ye. Woto, yẽnda ne a kambã na n paama yõ-woko, Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã fãa ka na n naag Israyɛll buud a taabã n paam zĩig Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ ye. Maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã sẽn kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, ne b pʋɩɩrã n na n yɩ bãmb dɩɩbo." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Bãmb ka na n paam pʋɩɩr b saam-biisã sʋk ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa bãmb pʋɩɩr wa b sẽn dag n yeel bãmb wɛɛngẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy18:3 Ad bũmb ning maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tog n paam nebã nengẽ. Ned ning fãa sẽn na n kʋ loalg bɩ pesgo, wall bʋʋga, a na n kõo maan-kʋʋdã bãokã ne lemdã, la pʋʋrã." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Yãmb na n kõo bãmb y koodã, la y reezẽ rãamã, ne y kaamã dẽenem biisi, la rũm-bãooneg nins yãmb sẽn wõrs pipi wã kõbdo." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Bala, yaa bãmb ne b yagensã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yãk buud fãa sʋka, tɩ b yaas bãmb taoor n tʋm ne bãmb yʋʋr wakat fãa." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Leevi buud ned sã n dat n yi yãmb tẽmsã tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ, ba a sẽn be zĩig ning Israyɛll soolmã pʋga, a tõe n kẽnga zĩig ning a sẽn date, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yãkã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Yẽnda tõe n tʋma ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr wa a saam-biis nins sẽn yaa a Leevi buudã nebã me sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n tʋmdẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy18:8 B na n kõo yẽnda pʋɩɩre, a rɩɩbã yĩng wa neb a taabã me sẽn paamdã, a sẽn na n koos a ba wã paoong sẽn yãk a toogo." 
Deuteronomy18:9 «Yãmb sã n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã, bɩ y ra zãms-y tɩ maan yel-beed nins buud a taabã sẽn be beenẽ n maandẽ wã ye." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Bɩ b ra yãnd ned baa a yembr yãmb sʋkã sẽn dɩk a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugl n kɩt tɩ b yõog bugum ye. Bɩ b ra yãnd ned baa a yembr sẽn yaa tɩɩm soaba, kinkir baga, wall ned sẽn togsd beoog yelle, bɩ ned sẽn maand sõod tʋʋmã," 
Deuteronomy18:11 wall baga, bɩ tɩɩm soaba, wall ned sẽn gomd ne zĩn-dãmba, bɩ ned sẽn boond kɩɩms ye." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ned ning fãa sẽn maand woto yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yaa yel-be-kãng yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩt tɩ b rig neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Bɩ y yɩ neb sẽn zems zãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nifẽ.» 
Deuteronomy18:14 Bala, buud nins yãmb sẽn na n digã kelgda kinkir bagb ne tɩɩm dãmba. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ka kõt yãmb noor tɩ y maan a woto ye." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n zẽka yãmb saam-biig a yembr n maan b no-rɛɛs t'a yɩ wa maam n kõ yãmba. Kelg-y-yã a soaba. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Yaa woto la yãmb sẽn dag n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã Horɛɛb tigingã daarã. Yãmb yeelame: «D ka rat n leb n wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã ye, la d ka rat n leb n yãnd bug-kãngã n wa ki ye.»" 
Deuteronomy18:17 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Bãmb sẽn gom woto wã yaa neere. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Mam na n yãka no-rɛɛs wa foom bãmb saam-biisã sʋk n kõ bãmba. Mam na n ninga m goamã a noorẽ t'a togs bãmb bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn na n yeelã. 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ned sã n ka sak mam goam nins yẽnda sẽn gomd ne mam yʋʋrã, yaa mam meng n na n sok a soaba." 
Deuteronomy18:20 La no-rɛɛs sã n wuk a meng n yeel gomd ne mam yʋʋr tɩ mam ka yeel-a t'a gome, bɩ a sã n gom ne wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab yʋʋre, bɩ b kʋ no-rɛɛs-kãnga.»" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Daarninga, yãmb na n yeelame: «D na n maana a wãn n bãng goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ka gomã?»" 
Deuteronomy18:22 No-rɛɛsã sã n gom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, tɩ gomdã ka paam pidsgu, wall a sã n ka yɩ, ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gom gom-kãens ye. Yaa no-rɛɛsã n wuk a meng n gome. Bɩ y ra zoe-a ye." 
Deuteronomy19:1 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa sãam buud nins bãmb sẽn dɩk b tẽmsã n kõ yãmbã, tɩ y reeg b tẽmsã ne b rotã n kẽ b pʋsẽ." 
Deuteronomy19:2 Yãk-y tẽms a tãab tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõt yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ," 
Deuteronomy19:3 n maneg soayã, la y welg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã zĩis a tãabo, tɩ ned sã n kʋ ned bɩ a zoe n tɩ kẽ be." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ad sẽn na n tũ ne bũmb ning tɩ nin-kʋʋdã wa zoe n tõog n kẽ tẽn-bãmb pʋsẽ n paam n põsã. Yaa a sẽn na n kʋ ned ne yĩdgu, tɩ beem yaool n dag n ka be b sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Yaa a sẽn na n tũ a to n kẽng weoogẽ n na n tɩ kɛ raado, n zẽk larã t'a na n kɛ tɩ larã baag n kɛ a to wã n kʋ. Nin-kãng soabã tõe n zoee n kẽe tẽn-bãmb tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ n fãag a yõore." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ned ning sẽn ki wã ned ra paam ned ning sẽn kʋ nedã n kʋ ne sũ-toog ye. Yẽnda ka zems kũum ye, yẽnda sẽn dag n ka kis a to wã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Yaa rẽ yĩng la mam kõt yãmb noor tɩ y welg tẽms a tãab toore. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa yalg yãmb soolmã wa b sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmbã, la b sã n kõ yãmb soolem ning fãa bãmb sẽn dag n kãab tɩ b na n kõ yãmb yaab-rãmbã." 
Deuteronomy19:9 Yãmb sã n maan gũusg n sak tõ-kãensã fãa mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã n nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n tũ bãmb sorã daar fãa, dẽ, bɩ y yãk tẽms a tãab n paas tẽn-bãmbã." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b ra wa raag bʋʋm-soab zɩɩm tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ, tɩ zɩɩm taal ra wa zĩnd yãmb zug ye." 
Deuteronomy19:11 La ned sã n kis a to n solg n gũus-a n tɩ wẽ-a n kʋ, yẽnda sã n zoe n tɩ kẽ tẽn-bãmb tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ," 
Deuteronomy19:12 bɩ a tẽngã kãsem-dãmb tʋm tɩ b tɩ yõk-a beenẽ n tall n tɩ kɩs yẽnda sẽn kʋ ned ningã ned t'a kʋ-a n lebse. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Bɩ y ra zoe a nimbãaneg ye. Bɩ y yiis bʋʋm soabã zɩɩm daagr taal Israyɛll nebã zutu, n paam sũ-noogo." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Bɩ y ra serg toadgã kugr ning sẽn be yãmb ne y yak pʋʋg sʋkã, y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n ning tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ wã ye.»" 
Deuteronomy19:15 Nin-yend kaset yĩng ka sek tɩ b wilg tɩ ned maana kongr bɩ yel-wẽnde, baa sẽn yaa yel-wẽnd ning yĩng ye. B ka tog n kao ned bʋʋdo, tɩ ka ne neb a yiib bɩ a tãab kaset yĩng ye." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ned sã n kɩs kaset zirẽ n dõd ned n yeel t'a maana wẽnga," 
Deuteronomy19:17 bɩ neb nins sẽn zabd taabã kẽng n tɩ yaas Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne maan-kʋʋdbã la bʋ-kaoodb nins sẽn kaood bʋʋd wakat-kãngã taoore. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Bɩ bʋ-kaoodbã fees yellã neere. La bãmb sã n mik tɩ kaset-soabã yaga zirẽ n dõd a saam-biigã," 
Deuteronomy19:19 bɩ y maan-a wa yẽnda sẽn dag n dat tɩ b maan a saam-biigã to-to wã. Woto, yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã yãmb sʋka." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Dẽ, neb a taabã na n wʋmame n zoe rabeem. La b kõn leb n maan wẽng a woto yãmb sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Bɩ y ra zoe a soab nimbãaneg ye. Yaa vɩɩm vɩɩm yĩnga, la nif nif yĩnga, la yẽnd yẽnd yĩnga, la nug nug yĩnga, la naoor naoor yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Yãmb sã n yi n na n tɩ zab ne y bɛɛbã n yãnd tɩ b tara wiid la saar-dãmb la tãb-biis wʋsg n yɩɩd yãmb sẽn tarã, bɩ y ra zoe bãmb ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩptã bee ne yãmba." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Zabrã sɩngr sã n wa kolge, bɩ maan-kʋʋdã kolg Israyɛll nebã n gom ne bãmb n yeel yaa:" 
Deuteronomy20:3 «Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y-yã! Rũndã, yãmb segda y bɛɛbã n na n zabe. Da sak-y tɩ y sũyã sãam ye. Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Da yɛɛs-y-yã, la ra rig-y bãmb taoor ye." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yãagda yãmba, n na n zab ne y bɛɛbã n fãag yãmba.»" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Dẽ, seb-gʋndbã na n yeela nebã: «Ned bee yãmb sʋkã n me roog n nan ka paam n kẽ a pʋgẽ bɩ? Bɩ a lebg n kuili n da wa ki zabrã pʋgẽ tɩ ned a to tɩ kẽ a roogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ned bee ka n sel reezẽ tɩɩs n nan ka rɩ a biis bɩ? Bɩ a lebg n kuili, n da wa ki zabrã pʋgẽ, tɩ ned a to reeg-a n soog ye." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ned bee ka n belem pag n nan ka peege? Bɩ a lebg n kuili, n da wa ki zabrã pʋgẽ, tɩ ned a to yõdg n peeg-a ye.»" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Seb-gʋndbã na n kell n goma ne nebã n yeel-ba: «Rabeem sẽn tar a soab t'a sũur ka keeme, bɩ a lebg n kuili, n da wa kɩt tɩ rabeem yõk a saam-biis a taabã ye." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Seb-gʋndbã sã n wa gom ne nebã n sɛ, bɩ b yãk tãnsoben-dãmba, n kɩt tɩ b lʋɩ nebã taoore." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Yãmb sã n kolg tẽng n na n zab ne-a, bɩ y reng n gom ne-a vɩ-bãan goamã." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Bãmb sã n sak vɩ-bãanã n pak b tẽngã n kõ yãmba, bɩ y modg tẽngã nebã fãa tɩ b yɩ y tʋmtʋmdb la y yembse." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Bãmb sã n ka sak yãmb ne vɩ-bãan n dat n zab ne yãmba, bɩ y gũbg b tẽngã." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog-a, la yãmb na n kʋʋ raopã fãa ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Deuteronomy20:14 La yãmb na n sooga b pagbã ne b kambã, la b rũmsã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, n dɩ y bɛɛbã bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Yaa woto la yãmb tog n maan tẽms nins sẽn zãr-b ne yãmba, n ka naag buud nins sẽn be ka wã tẽmsã ye." 
Deuteronomy20:16 La sã n yaa ne buud nins tẽms Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ, ra bas-y bũmb baa a yembr tɩ vɩɩmd ye." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Yãmb na n sãama Hɛt ne Amoor-dãmbã, la Kana-rãmbã, ne Ferɛɛz la Hevi la Zebuuz-rãmbã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ b ra wa zãms yãmb tɩ y maan tʋʋm-beed nins bãmb sẽn maand b wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩng n beegd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ye. 
Deuteronomy20:19 Yãmb sã n gũbg tẽng n kaoose, n na n zab ne-a n deeg-a, bɩ y ra zẽk lar n kɛ tɩɩsã ye. Yãmb tõe n dɩɩ bãmb biisã, dẽ wã, bɩ y ra kɛ-b ye. Tɩɩsã sẽn be weoogẽ wã yaa ninsaalb tɩ yãmb na n zab ne-b la?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Yãmb tõe n sãamame, la y kɛ tɩɩs nins yãmb sẽn mi tɩ b biisã ka rɩtã, n tall-b n maan teed n tɩ n gũbg tẽng ning sẽn zabd ne yãmbã, n zab ne-a hal n wa tõog-a zãnga.»" 
Deuteronomy21:1 B sã n yãnd ned sẽn ki n dɩg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã weoog pʋgẽ, tɩ b ka mi sẽn yaa ned ning n kʋ a soabã," 
Deuteronomy21:2 bɩ yãmb kãsem-dãmbã ne y bʋ-kaoodbã kẽng n tɩ mak tẽms nins sẽn pẽ kũumã zãrem. 
Deuteronomy21:3 La b sã n bãng tẽng ning sẽn pẽ-a n yɩɩdã, bɩ tẽn-kãng kãsem-dãmbã rɩk nag-sadg a yembr sẽn nan ka tʋm la sẽn nan ka zɩlg zɩɩbo," 
Deuteronomy21:4 bɩ tẽn-kãng kãsem-dãmbã tall nag-sadgã n kẽng long sẽn tar ko-zoetem sẽn ka sɛt zĩigẽ, la b sẽn nan ka ko a pʋgẽ, n wẽ nag-sadgã kãar n wã ko-zoetmã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Dẽ, Leevi yagensã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã na n kolgame. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yãka bãmb tɩ b tʋm bãmb tʋʋmdã, n ning bark ne bãmb yʋʋre. Yaa bãmb n tar noor ne yell buud fãa, sãmpogr buud fãa bʋʋdo." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Tẽng ning sẽn pẽ kũumã kãsem-dãmbã fãa na n nudga b nus nag-sadg ning b sẽn wẽ a kãar n wã ko-zoetemã koom pʋgẽ. 
Deuteronomy21:7 Bãmb na n yeelame: «Tõnd ka raag zɩ-kãngã, la d ka yãnd a raagdã me ye." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kõ-y Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã y sẽn fãagã sugri. Ra ning-y Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã taale, bʋʋm soabã zɩɩm daagr poorẽ ye.»" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Yaa woto la yãmb na n yiis bʋʋm soabã zɩɩm daagr taal yãmb sʋka. Bala, yãmb maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Yãmb sã n wa kẽng n na n tɩ zab ne y bɛɛbã, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩt tɩ y tõog-b n yõg n maan yembse," 
Deuteronomy21:11 tɩ yãmb yãnd pʋg-neer bãmb sʋkã n dat-a n peeg n tɩ maan y paga," 
Deuteronomy21:12 bɩ y tall-a n kuil y yiri, n põng a zugã, la y wõrs a nug-yẽesã," 
Deuteronomy21:13 la y yees fut nins a sẽn dag n yer a yõkrã wakatã. Kɩt-y t'a zĩnd y yirã n yãb a ba wã ne a ma wã yĩng kiuug a yembre. Rẽndã loogr zugẽ, yãmb tõe n yaool n peeg-a lame n maan y paga." 
Deuteronomy21:14 A sã n wa ka leb n ta fo raabo, bɩ f bas-a, la f ra koos-a, la f ra maan-a wa yamb ye. Bala, fo modg-a lame n kẽese." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Ned sã n tar pagb a yiib n nong a yembr n yɩɩd a yembre, tɩ pʋg-rʋmdã ne pʋg-beoogã fãa rog kamba, tɩ pʋg-beoogã biig yaa bi-kãsenga," 
Deuteronomy21:16 yẽnda sã n wa rat n dɩk a paoongã n kõ a kambã, a ka tog n dɩk kãosengã n kõ pʋg-rʋmdã biig n bas pʋg-beoogã biig sẽn yaa a bi-kãsengã ye." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Bɩ a nong a pʋg-beoogã biig sẽn yaa a bi-kãsengã n pʋɩ a paoongã zĩis a tãabo n yãk a yiib n kõ a bi-kãsengã. Bala, yaa yẽnda n yaa a pãngã sɩngre. Yẽnda tog n paama bi-kãsen-pʋɩɩre." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Ned sã n tar bi-tõatg sẽn yaa kɩɩsda, n ka kelgd a ba ne a ma goamã, tɩ b sagl-a n mak n konge," 
Deuteronomy21:19 bɩ a ba wã ne a ma wã yõk-a n tall n kẽng bãmb tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ, tẽngã rignoorẽ." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Bɩ b yeel tẽngã kãsem-dãmb yaa: «Tõnd bi-kãngã yaa bi-tõatga. A ka sakd tõnd noor ye. A yaa tʋʋm-beed soaba, la rã-yũuda." 
Deuteronomy21:21 La bɩ tẽngã raopã fãa lob-a ne kug t'a ki. Yaa woto la y na n yiis wẽngã yãmb sʋka. Israyɛll nebã fãa na n wʋmame tɩ rabeem yõk-ba.» 
Deuteronomy21:22 Ned sã n maan wẽng sẽn zems kũum tɩ b kʋ-a, tɩ yãmb lulg-a tɩɩg zugu," 
Deuteronomy21:23 bɩ y ra bas kũumã tɩɩgã zug yʋng ye. Mum-y kũumã baraar bala. Bala, kũum sẽn luul yaa kãab-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Ra rẽgm-y tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ yaa y soolmã ye." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Fo sã n yãnd f saam-biig naaf bɩ a pesgo, wall a bʋʋg sẽn meneme, ra bas-a n loog ye. Tall-a n tɩ kɩs f saam-biigã." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Fo saam-biigã yir sã n ka pẽ ne foom wall fo sã n ka mi sẽn yaa a soab rũnga, bɩ f tall-a n kuil f yiri, hal tɩ f saam-biigã sã n wa bolge, bɩ f yaool n kɩs-a." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Maan a woto me ne a bõanga, baa ne a fuugu, la fo sẽn na n yãnd f saam-biig bũmb sẽn menem fãa. Ra maan f toor ka ye." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Fo sã n yãnd f saam-biig bõang bɩ a loalg sẽn lʋɩ n gãe sor zugu, ra maan f toor ka be ye. Sõng f saam-biigã n yik-a." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Bɩ pag ra yeelg rao fuug ye, la bɩ rao ra yeelg pag fuug ye. Bõn-kãng yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Fo sã n kẽnd sor zug n yãnd liuul tʋk tɩɩg zugu, bɩ tẽnga, tɩ liuun-bi wall gɛl be beenẽ, tɩ b ma põg be, bɩ f ra yõk ma wã la f wʋk a kambã ye." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Bas b ma wã t'a looge, la f wʋk a kambã, tɩ fo vɩɩm tõe n yɩ noogo, la f tõe n paam yõ-woko." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Fo sã n me ro-paalga, bɩ f ning a zugã kogre, tɩ ned ra wa rʋ a zug n lʋɩ t'a zɩɩmã taal wa be fo roogã zug ye." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ra bʋd reezẽ tɩɩs buud a yiib f reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgẽ, tɩ fo sẽn bʋd bũmb ningã biis ne fo reezẽ wã zãng biis ra wa lebg bũmb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng ye." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Da rɩk loalg ne bõang n balg n naag taab n ko ye. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Da rɩk pe-kõbd ne lamd gĩs n lagem taab n wʋg fuug n yeelg ye. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Ning f fu-goabg noy a naasã fãa zerdo. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Ned sã n peeg pag n kẽ ne-a n yaool n yeel t'a ka nong-a," 
Deuteronomy22:14 la a sã n dõd-a ne tʋʋm-beed n sãam a yʋʋrã, n yeele: «Mam peega pʋg-kãngã, la mam sẽn kẽ ne-a wã, mam mikame t'a ka tar bãnd ning sẽn wilgd t'a ka bãng rao ye.»" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Bɩ pʋg-sadã ba wã ne a ma wã tall a pʋ-peelmã bãnã n kẽng n tɩ wilg tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã tẽngã rignoorẽ. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Bɩ pʋg-sadã ba wã yeel tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã a woto: «Mam dɩka m bi-pugl n kõ rao-kãngã t'a maan a paga, la a ka nong-a ye." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Yẽnda rõd-a-la ne tʋʋm-beedo, n yeel t'a ka yãnd bãnd sẽn wilg tɩ mam bi-puglã ka mi rao ye. Ad mam bi-puglã sẽn ka mi raoã bãnde.» Dẽ, bɩ b tẽeg fuugã tẽngã kãsem-dãmb taoore." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Bɩ tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã yõk raoã n sɩbge. 
Deuteronomy22:19 La raoã sẽn sãam Israyɛll pʋg-sad sẽn ka mi rao yʋʋrã yĩnga, bɩ tẽngã kãsem-dãmb yaoolg-a wanzuri wakɩ-koeems koabga, tɩ b rɩk n kõ pʋg-sadã baaba. La pʋg-sadã na n kell n yɩɩ yẽnda paga, la yẽnda ka tõe n leb n bas-a hal n tãag a yõor tɛka." 
Deuteronomy22:20 La sã n mikame tɩ yellã yaa sɩda, tɩ b ka yãnd pagã sẽn ka mi raoã bãnde," 
Deuteronomy22:21 bɩ b yiis-a a ba wã zak noore, t'a tẽngã neb lob-a kug t'a ki, yẽnda sẽn maan yel-wẽnd Israyɛll nebã sʋka, a sẽn zĩnd a ba wã zakẽ n maan yoobã yĩnga. Woto yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã yãmb sʋka." 
Deuteronomy22:22 B sã n yãnd tɩ rao maand yoob ne pag sẽn tar sɩda, bɩ b kʋ raoã ne pagã fãa n yiis wẽngã Israyɛll nebã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy22:23 B sã n dɩk pʋg-sad sẽn ka mi rao n kõ ned t'a na n maan a paga, tɩ rao a to yãnd-a tẽngã pʋg n peeg-a n gãande," 
Deuteronomy22:24 bɩ y yiis bãmb b yiibã fãa tẽngã rignoorẽ, n lob-b kug tɩ b ki, la yaa pʋg-sadã sẽn sĩnd a noor n ka wẽ no-bɩng tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, la raoã sẽn sãam a to pagã yĩnga. Woto, yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã yãmb sʋka." 
Deuteronomy22:25 La sã n yaa weoogẽ la raoã yãnd pʋg-sadã b sẽn pʋlem sɩdã, n yõk-a n gãand ne pãnga, yaa rao ning sẽn gãand-a pʋg-sadã a yembr bal la b tog n kʋ." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Bɩ y ra maan pʋg-sadã bũmb ye. Pʋg-sadã ka maan bũmb sẽn yaa yel-wẽnde, sẽn sek kʋʋb ye. Yẽnda yellã yaa wa ned sẽn zab ne a to n kʋ-a." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Bala, yaa weoog pʋgẽ la raoã paam yẽnda. La tõeeme tɩ pʋg-sadã b sẽn pʋlem sɩdã kelmame tɩ ned rag n ka be n na n fãag-a ye." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Ned sã n yãnd pʋg-sad sẽn ka mi raoa, b sẽn ka pʋlem sɩda, n yõk-a n gãande, tɩ b yãnd-ba," 
Deuteronomy22:29 bɩ rao ning sẽn gãand-a pʋg-sadã yao pʋg-sadã ba wã wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-nu, la a peeg-a n maan a paga, yẽnda sẽn sãam-a wã yĩnga. La yẽnda ka tõe n leb n bas-a hal n tãag a yõor tɛka." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Bɩ ned ba a yembr da peeg a ba paga, la a ra kẽ ne-a me ye." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Ned lam-biis sẽn bedse, wall ned raoolem sẽn fiuug ka tõe n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã tiging pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Tãmpĩir ka tõe n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tiging pʋgẽ ye. Baa yẽnda yagens ne a yagen-tʋb-ra-kẽes n tɩ tãag zamaan piig ka tõe n kẽ beenẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Amo nebã ne Moaab nebã ka tõe n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã tiging zĩigẽ ye. Baa bãmb yagens ne a yagen-tʋb-ra-kẽes n tɩ tãag zamaan piig ka tõe n kẽ beenẽ ye. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ woto wakat fãa. 
Deuteronomy23:5 Bala, bãmb ka tall rɩɩb ne koom n seg yãmb sorã zug y sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt wakatẽ wã ye. La sẽn paas me, bãmb kõo a Bewoor biig a Balaam sẽn yit Petoor sẽn be Mezopotami soolmẽ wã ligd t'a kãab yãmb wẽnga." 
Deuteronomy23:6 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ka sak n kelg a Balaam ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã teka kãab-wẽngã tɩ lebg bark yãmb yĩnga. La yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn nong yãmbã yĩnga. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ra bao-y tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd bãmb sʋka, la ra bao-y b sũ-noogo, hal yãmb vɩɩmã tɛka." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ra ges-y Edom nebã wa yel-beed ye. Bãmb yaa yãmb saam-biisi. Ra ges-y Ezɩpt nebã wa yel-beed ye. Yãmb dag n yaa sãamb bãmb tẽngẽ. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Bãmb yagen-tʋb-ra-kẽesã, sẽn sɩng ne zamaan a tãabã tõe n kẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã tiging pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Yãmb sã n yi n kẽng n na n tɩ zab ne y bɛɛbã, bɩ y gũus y mens ne wẽng buudã fãa." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Yãmb ned a yembr sã n gãand yʋng n dẽgem a menga, bɩ a yi kɛɛnga, n da kẽ tãb-sikã zĩigẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Wĩndgã sã n kɩlle, bɩ a so koom tɩ wĩndgã sã n kẽ, bɩ a yaool n kẽ tãb-sikã zĩigẽ." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Yãk-y zĩig sẽn vẽsg bilf ne yãmb tãb-sikã, y we-kɛɛng yĩnga, tɩ we-kɛɛng sã n wa tar yãmba," 
Deuteronomy23:14 bɩ y zã wãka, tɩ y sã n maan we-kɛɛngã n sa, bɩ y tuk bok n bus bĩndã." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã bee yãmb tãb-sikã zĩigẽ, n na n fãag yãmba, la b sõng-y tɩ y tõog y bɛɛbã. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ yãmb tãb-sikã tog n yɩ zĩig sẽn welg toore, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ra wa yãnd bũmb sẽn ka sõama yãmb sʋk n wẽnemd n bas yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Yamb sã n bas a zu-soab n zoe n wa fo nengẽ, bɩ f ra tall-a n tɩ kɩs a zu-soabã ye." 
Deuteronomy23:17 A na n paa ne foom, Israyɛll tẽng ning pʋg a sẽn yãk n na n zĩndã pʋga. Da kɩt t'a tʋm n kõ foom zaalem ye." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Bɩ Israyɛll bi-pugl baa a yembr ra lebg wẽn-naandg pʋg-koos-m-meng ye. La bɩ Israyɛll rao baa a yembr da yɩ yoaad wẽn-naandg yĩng ye. 
Deuteronomy23:19 Da tall-y pʋg-koos-m-meng yaood wall baag ligd n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã roogẽ, n wa rol pʋleng ning yãmb sẽn dag n pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ye. Baa sẽn yaa yaood ninga. Bala, bãmb b yiibã fãa yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Ra peng-y y saam-biig bũmb n bao roagleng ye. Sã n yaa ligdi, wall rɩɩbo, wall sẽn yaa bũmb ning fãa, bɩ y ra peng n bao roagleng ye." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Yãmb tõe n penga sãan n bao roaglenga, la ra sak-y n peng-y y saam-biig n bao roaglenga, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ning yãmb bark ne tʋʋm nins fãa yãmb sẽn maand tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kẽ n na n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Fo sã n pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, bɩ f ra kaoos n dol f pʋlemdã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n ninga foom taal tɩ lebg fo yel-wẽnde." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Fo sã n ka pʋlme, kongr ka be f zug ye." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Gũus ne bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn gomdã, la f rol pʋlemd ning fãa fo sẽn pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ne yamleoogã, tɩ yaa f meng noor n gome." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Fo tõe n kẽe f to reezẽ pʋʋgẽ n yãk reezẽ wã n dɩ tɩ sek-fo. La f ka tõe n yãk n ning f peoogẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy23:26 Fo sã n kẽ f to pʋʋgẽ, fo tõe n yãka kood n tẽg n wãbe, la f ka tõe n kẽ ne goeoog n na n wʋr ye." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Rao sã n peeg pag n wa mik t'a maana yãnd t'a sũur puugi, a na n gʋlsa basg sebr n kõ-a n yeel-a t'a leb a ba-yiri." 
Deuteronomy24:2 A na n yii rao-kãng nengẽ n looge, la a tõe n tɩ lebga rao a to paga." 
Deuteronomy24:3 La yẽnda sẽn tɩ rɩk rao ningã me sã n wa ka leb n dat-a, bɩ a gʋls basg sebr n kõ-a, la a yeel-a t'a loog la a bas zakã. Wall sã n mikame tɩ rao ning sẽn dɩk-a yẽnda wã kiime," 
Deuteronomy24:4 a pipi sɩdã sẽn dag n bas-a wã ka leb n tõe n peeg-a n maan a paga, b sẽn dẽgm-a wã yĩnga. Bala, bõn-kãng yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Da ning-y yel-wẽnd tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã zug ye." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Rao sã n peeg pʋg-paala, bɩ a ra tũ n kẽng zabr ye. La b ka tog n modg-a t'a maan bũmb ba a yembr ye. Bas-y-yã-a taal yʋʋmde, t'a pa yir n noog pag ning a sẽn peegã sũuri." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Ned sã n dɩk neer bɩ ne-biig n wa n na n gãneg ne foom n deeg bũmb bɩ f ra reeg ye. Bala, wẽnda wa ned sẽn dɩk a vɩɩm n wa n na n gãneg ne foom." 
Deuteronomy24:7 B sã n yãnd ned sẽn yõk a saam-biig sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã ned n maan a yamba, wall a koos-a, bɩ y kʋ nin-kãng soaba. Woto, yãmb na n yiisa wẽngã yãmb sʋka." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Maan-y gũusg ne yĩn-gãong bãagã, n tõog n gũus n ges n maan wa sẽn zems bũmb ning maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã sẽn na n zãms yãmbã, n gũus n maan wa noor ning mam sẽn kõ maan-kʋʋdbã bal kɛpɩ." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Tẽeg-y bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n maan a Miryam sorã zug yãmb sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt wakatã. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Fo sã n dɩk f bũmb n peng f to, bɩ f ra kẽ a zakẽ n dɩk bũmb ning a sẽn tog n gãnegã ye." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Yaas yɩng tɩ ned ning fo sẽn dɩk f bũmbã n pengã tall bũmb ning a sẽn tog n gãnegã n wa kɩs foom. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Yẽnda sã n yaa naong soaba, bɩ f ra tall a bũmbã n gãand n vẽeg beoog n ka lebs-a ye." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Wĩndgã sã n kẽ, lebs-a a fu-goabgã t'a pil n gãand la a ning-f barka. La fo na n paama tɩrlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Fo saam-biig bɩ sãan sẽn yaa naong soaba, bɩ nimbãan ned sã n tʋmd fo nengẽ n baood ligdi, bɩ f ra nams-a ye." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Yao-a a ligdã tɩ wĩndgã nan ka kẽ ye. Bala, yẽnda yaa naong soaba, la a ligdã yaa bõn-kãseng ne-a. Sã n ka woto, yẽnda tõe n dɩka foom n bas ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ lebg yel-wẽnd fo yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy24:16 B ka tog n kʋ ba-rãmb b kamb yĩnga, la b ka tog n kʋ kamb b ba-rãmb yĩng ye. B tog kʋʋ ned kam fãa a meng yel-wẽnd yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Da bʋ-y sãan bɩ kɩɩb bʋʋd kegre, la ra reeg-y pʋg-kõor fuug n gãneg n yaool n kõ-a bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb me rag n yɩɩ yembs Ezɩpt tẽnga, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tɩ fãag yãmb be. Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ y sak n tũ noor ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Fo sã n wa tigsd f pʋʋgã koodo, n yĩm ka-gĩnd pʋʋgẽ wã, bɩ f ra lebg n leb n tɩ rɩk-a ye. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ sãambã ne kɩɩbsã la pʋg-kõapã rẽnda, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ning yãmb nus tʋʋmã fãa barka." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Fo sã n wa miimd f oliiv tɩɩse, bɩ f ra lebg n leb n tɩ yiis biis nins sẽn pa yĩngrã ye. Bãmb yaa sãambã ne kɩɩbsã, la pʋg-kõapã rẽnda." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Fo sã n wob f reezẽ tɩɩse, bɩ f ra leb n leb poorẽ n tɩ yiis biis nins sẽn kellã ye. Bãmb yaa sãambã ne kɩɩbsã, la pʋg-kõapã rẽnda." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb dag n yaa yembs Ezɩpt soolmẽ. Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ mam yet yãmb tɩ y sak n tũ noor ning mam sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy25:1 Neb a yiib sã n wa tar yell ne taab n kẽng bʋʋd zĩigẽ, bɩ bʋ-kaoodã kao bʋʋdã n kõ bʋʋm soabã bʋʋm la a mong sẽn ka tar-a bʋʋmã bʋʋm." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Sẽn ka tar-a bʋʋmã sã n tog pãbre, bɩ bʋ-kaoodã kɩt t'a gãand tẽng tɩ b pãb-a yẽnda taoore. Pãbrã tog n zemsa yẽnda sẽn maan yel-wẽndã sẽn yaa bũmb ninga." 
Deuteronomy25:3 A ka tog n kɩt tɩ b pãb-a tɩ wẽedã sõor yɩɩd naoor pis-naas ye. Bala, b sã n pãb-a tɩ looge, y ba-biigã tõe n wa paama yãnd wʋsg fo nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Da ning naaf ning sẽn tabd-a ki wã noor yʋk ye. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Ned ne a ba-biis sã n be ne taaba, tɩ ned a yembr ki t'a pagã ka tol n paam biiga, bɩ pʋg-kõorã ra kuil ned yaar sẽn ka a sɩdã buud ye. Bɩ a sɩdã saam-biig peeg-a n maan a paga, n tall-a wa ned sẽn tog n tall a saam-biig pag to-to." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Pipi biig ning pagã sẽn na n dogã, na n deega kiidã yʋʋre, sẽn na n yɩl t'a yʋʋrã da menem Israyɛll nebã sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy25:7 La rao-kãng sã n ka rat n deeg a saam-biigã paga, bɩ pagã kẽng kãsem-dãmbã nengẽ tẽnga noor n tɩ yeel-ba: «M sɩdã saam-biig ka rat t'a saam-biigã yʋʋr kaoos Israyɛll nebã sʋk ye. Yẽnda zãgsame t'a ka rat n maan ne maam wa ned sẽn ki saam-biig sẽn tog n maan to-to wã ye.»" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Tẽngã kãsem-dãmb na n boola raoã n gom ne-a, la a sã n kell n yeele: «M ka rat n kẽ kãadem ne-a ye,»" 
Deuteronomy25:9 bɩ pagã kolg raoã kãsem-dãmbã nifẽ, n pidg a neoodrã, la a tʋbs a nengã kolkoodo, la a yeel tɩ yaa woto la b maand ned sẽn ka rat n me a saam-biig roogo." 
Deuteronomy25:10 La Israyɛll nebã na n boola yẽnda yirã tɩ ‹b sẽn pidg a soab neoodr yiri.› 
Deuteronomy25:11 Neb a yiib sã n zabd taab tɩ ned a ye pag wa n na n sõng-a, n tʋm a nug n gãd ned a to wã raolem," 
Deuteronomy25:12 bɩ y fiuug pagã nugu. Ra zoe-y-yã a nimbãaneg ye. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Ra zã zɩslem bõn-makds a yiib f korg pʋgẽ, t'a yembr yaa zɩsg t'a yembr yaa faasg ye." 
Deuteronomy25:14 La f ra tall pe-makds a yiib f zak pʋgẽ, t'a yembr yaa bedr t'a yembr yaa bilf ye." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Tall zɩslem makdg ne pe-makds sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrse, tɩ rẽ la fo na n paam yõ-wok tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ka nong neb nins sẽn maand woto n ka maand sɩdã ye." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Tẽeg-y bũmb ning Amalɛk nebã sẽn dag n maan yãmb sorã zug yãmb sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã wakatã. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Yãmb sẽn dag n yɛ n ka leb n tar pãngã, bãmb sega yãmb sorã zug n zab ne yãmba. La bãmb kʋʋ yãmb neb nins sẽn dag n be poorẽ wã n ka zoe Wẽnnaam ye." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa fãag yãmb ne y bɛɛb nins fãa sẽn gũbg yãmbã, n kõ yãmb vʋʋsg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã pʋgẽ, bɩ y yẽes Amalɛk buudã yʋʋr tẽng zug tɩ b ra leb n tẽeg b yell ye. Da yĩm bõn-kãngã ye." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Yãmb sã n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã n tilg y yiya," 
Deuteronomy26:2 bɩ y yãk kood nins fãa yãmb sẽn paam tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã dẽenem biisi, n ning peoog pʋgẽ, n tall n kẽng zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yãk n ning b yʋʋrã." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Kẽng-y maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn tʋmd wakat-kãngã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Rũndã, mam wilgda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnaamã tɩ m kẽe tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel d yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõo tõndã.»" 
Deuteronomy26:4 La maan-kʋʋdã na n deega peoogã fo nugẽ n tẽgen Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugrã taoore. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Bɩ f yeel Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor yaa: «Mam yaabã rag n yaa Siiri neda, n saad tẽng-tẽnga. La bãmb ne b nebã sẽn ka waoogã wa n siga Ezɩpt tẽnga, n pa sãand weoog beenẽ. Dẽ, bãmb paa beenẽ n lebg bu-kãseng sẽn tar pãnga, n yaa wʋsgo." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Ezɩpt nebã namsa tõnd n maan tõnd pãnga, n kẽes-d yembd sẽn yaa toog pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy26:7 La tõnd kelmame n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã tɩ b wa sõng-do. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma tõnd koɛɛgã, n yãnd d sũ-sãangã ne tõnd tʋʋm-toogã, la d namsgã." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Bãmb tẽega b nug sẽn tar pãngã, la sẽn wat ne yɛɛsg wʋsgã, ne bãnã, la bõn-bãnã, n yiis tõnd Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Bãmb talla tõnd n wa ka, n wa kõ tõnd tẽn-kãngã. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo." 
Deuteronomy26:10 La ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam waa ne tẽn-gãongã dẽenem biis nins yãmb sẽn kõ maamã!» Dẽ, bɩ f tẽgen dẽenem biisã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor be, la f waoog-ba." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Bɩ yãmb ne a Leevi buudã nebã, la sãamb nins sẽn be ne yãmbã maan sũ-noog ne bõn-sõama nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb ne y yirã rãmbã." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Yʋʋm a tãab yʋʋmdã sẽn yaa piig pʋɩɩr yʋʋmdã sã n ta, tɩ y tigs y paoongã fãa piig pʋɩɩrã zãnga, bɩ y rɩk n kõ a Leevi buudã nebã ne sãambã, la kɩɩbsã ne pʋg-kõapã, tɩ b rɩ n tɩg y tẽmsã pʋsẽ." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Dẽ, bɩ y yeel Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor yaa: Mam yiisa bũmb ning sẽn welg toorã m zakã pʋgẽ n kõ a Leevi buudã nebã, ne sãambã la kɩɩbsã la pʋg-kõapã, wa sẽn zems tõod nins fãa yãmb sẽn kõ maamã. Mam ka bas tõog baa a yembre, la m ka yĩm ba a yembr yell ye." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Mam ka tol n yãk-a n dɩ m sũ-sãang pʋgẽ, mam ka sɩɩs-a m sẽn yaa rẽgd wakate, la m ka yãk-a n pʋʋs kʋʋr ye. Mam kelga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã, n maan wa bãmb sẽn yeel maamã bal kɛpɩ." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Zĩnd-y y zĩig sẽn welg toorã sẽn be yĩngrã pʋgẽ, n sulg n ning Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã, ne tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kõ tõndã barka, wa yãmb sẽn dag n wẽen ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yeta yãmb tɩ y sak no-tũudsã ne noy-kãensã, la y reeg-b neer n sak-b ne y sũyã fãa, la ne y yamã fãa." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Yãmb maana kaool ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab rũndã n yeel tɩ bãmb yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, la y na n tũu bãmb soayã, la y sak bãmb no-tũudsã ne b tõodã la b noyã, la y kelg bãmb koɛɛgã." 
Deuteronomy26:18 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab me maana kaool ne yãmb rũndã, n yeel tɩ yãmb yaa bãmb nebã, wa b sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã, la y sak bãmb tõodã fãa." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Dẽ, bãmb na n zẽka yãmb n kõ yãmb waoogre, la b kɩt tɩ y yʋʋr yi, la b kõ yãmb ziir n yɩɩg buud a taabã fãa bãmb sẽn naanã, tɩ yãmb tõe n lebg neb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, wa b sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy27:1 A Moyiis ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã yeela nebã yaa: «Sak-y tõod nins tõnd sẽn kõt yãmb rũndã wã. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Daar ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã, bɩ y lugl kug-bɛd n bolg-b goore." 
Deuteronomy27:3 La y gʋls tõ-kãensã goamã fãa bãmb zut n yaool n yik n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩd wʋsgo, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Yãmb sã n wa rʋʋg zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, yãmb na n lugla kug nins mam sẽn yeel yãmb dũndã tɩ y lugl Eball tãngã zug n bolg-b ne goorã." 
Deuteronomy27:5 La beenẽ, yãmb na n mee tẽn-kugr ne kug sẽn ka pees ne kutu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Yãmb na n mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugr ne kug sẽn ka peese. La yaa beenẽ, la yãmb na n maan y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy27:7 La yãmb na n maana zems-n-taar maand me beenẽ, la y zĩnd beenẽ n dɩ la y maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnaamã taoore." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Gʋls-y tõ-kãensã goamã fãa kugã zut tɩ yɩ vẽenega.» 
Deuteronomy27:9 A Moyiis ne maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Israyɛll nebã, sĩnd-y sɩddd... n kelge! Rũndã, yãmb lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nebã." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛga, la y sak bãmb tõodã ne b minindã wa mam sẽn wilgd yãmb dũndã wã.»" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Badaar bala, a Moyiis yeela nebã yaa:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 «Yãmb sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, bɩ a Simeyõ ne a Leevi, la a Zʋʋda ne a Izakaar, la a Zozɛf ne a Benzame buudã yaas Garizim tãngã zug n ning nebã barka." 
Deuteronomy27:13 La bɩ a Rubɛn ne a Gaad la a Azɛɛr ne a Zabulõ, la a Dan ne a Neftali buudã yaas Eball tãngã zugu n kãab nebã wẽnga.»" 
Deuteronomy27:14 La Leevi buudã na n zẽka b koɛɛgã Israyɛll nebã fãa taoor n yeel yaa: 
Deuteronomy27:15 «Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn peesd-a, wall sẽn dõogd-a bõn-naandg zugu. Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka nong tʋʋm-mit sẽn maand bõn-naandg n soos n solg-a ye. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn paoogd a ba ne a ma. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:17 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn sersd toadg ning sẽn be yẽnda ne a yak pʋʋg sʋkã bãnã. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:18 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn kɩtd tɩ zõang tudg sore. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:19 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn kaood sãan ne kɩɩb la pʋg-kõor bʋʋd kegrã. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:20 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn gãand ne a ba paga, n lak a fuugu. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn gãand rũnga, baa sẽn yaa rũng ninga. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn gãand ne a tãoã, sã n yaa a ba-biig bɩ a ma-biiga. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn gãand ne a pag ma. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:24 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn soos n kʋ a to. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:25 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn deegd kũun n kʋʋd bʋʋm soaba. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina. 
Deuteronomy27:26 Kãab-wẽng bee ne ned ning sẽn ka tũud tõ-kãensã fãa la a ka sakd bãmbã. La bɩ nebã fãa yeel tɩ ãmina.» 
Deuteronomy28:1 Yãmb sã n sɩd kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã n gũus y mens n sak tõod nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb rũndã wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n zẽka yãmb tɩ y yɩɩg buud a taabã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ad bark nins fãa sẽn na n sig yãmb zugu, yãmb sẽn na n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã yĩnga:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 Yãmb na n paama bark y tẽngã ne y pʋʋgã pʋga. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Yãmb kambã la y rũmsã kamba, y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã kamb na n paama barka." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Yãmb peoogã ne y teoogã ne y koodã na n paama barka. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Yãmb na n paama bark y kõom la y yiib wakate. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog y bɛɛb nins sẽn dat n zab ne yãmbã. Bãmb sã n yi n na n zab ne yãmba, b na n tũu sor a ye n wa. La yãmb na n diga bãmb tɩ b tũ soay a yopoe n zoe." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ barkã zĩnd yãmb baoã ne y tʋʋmã pʋga. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ barkã zĩnd yãmb tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Yãmb sã n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã la y tũ bãmb sorã, bãmb na n welga yãmb toor b meng yĩng wa b sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã na n yãame tɩ b boond yãmb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, la bãmb na n zoee yãmba." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana yãmb neer wʋsgo, n kɩt tɩ yãmb kambã ne y rũmsã la y koodã fɩɩg tẽng ning bãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõo yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n paka saasã sẽn yaa bãmb laog-sõngã zĩigã n kɩt tɩ saag ni sẽn zems a wakat yãmb tẽngã pʋgẽ. La bãmb na n ninga yãmb nus tʋʋmã fãa barka. Buud wʋsg na n wa pemsa yãmba, la yãmb kõn peng bũmb bãmb nengẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Yãmb sã n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõod nins mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã neer n sak-ba, la y ka bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg n bas goam nins mam sẽn wilg yãmb dũndã wã, n tũ buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yɩ zugu, n da yɩ zʋʋr ye. Yãmb na n yɩ taoor-dãmba, y ka na n yɩ poorẽ dãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:14  
Deuteronomy28:15 La yãmb sã n ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã, n gũus y mens n sak tõodã ne minind nins fãa mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã, ad kãab-wẽns nins sẽn na n paam yãmba:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Yãmb na n paama kãab-wẽng y tẽmsã ne y pʋtã pʋse.
