Deuteronomy28:17 Kãab-wẽng na n zĩnda y petã ne y toɛyã pʋse. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Yãmb kambã ne y koodã la y rũm-bɛdã ne y rũm-bãoonegã na n paama kãab-wẽnga. 
Deuteronomy28:19 Yãmb na n paama kãab-wẽng y kõom la y yiib wakate. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tʋma kãab-wẽngã t'a sig yãmb zugu, bãmb na n yɛɛsa yãmb n kẽes-y rabeem y tʋʋmã fãa pʋgẽ, hal tɩ yãmb wa sãam zãnga, n menem tao-tao, yãmb manesmã sẽn yaa wẽngã, la yãmb sẽn bas maamã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ bã-loangdg yõk yãmb hal n sãam-y zãng n kɩt tɩ y wa menem tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ yĩn-faagr ne yĩn-wɩngre, bã-motem, la nod-kegems sẽn yõogd wa bugum, ne ware, la wãoong ne gãnem yõk yãmb hal tɩ y wa sãam zãnga." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Saasã sẽn be y zugẽ wã na n lebga wa zũudu, tɩ tẽngã yãmb sẽn tabdã lebg wa kutu." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ bĩisr ne wubsg led sa-koomã zĩigẽ n sig yãmb zut hal tɩ y wa sãame. 
Deuteronomy28:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb bɛɛbã tõog yãmba. Yãmb na n tũu sor a ye n tɩ zab ne-ba, la y bɛɛbã na n diga yãmb tɩ y tũ soay a yopoe n zoe. La yãmb na n kẽe dũniyã nebã fãa soolem pʋsẽ n lebg wa bõn-wẽnga." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Liuuli ne we-rũms na n wãba yãmb nemd tɩ ned ka rig-b ye. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nod-tãooda wã ne se-noadã la zãnkadã ne tarmangãsã yõk yãmb n ka tõe n maag ye. 
Deuteronomy28:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ gãeemd ne zondo, la nen-yiling yõk yãmba." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Yãmb na n babla wĩnto-sʋk wa zõang sẽn babend lik-bida pʋgẽ. Bũmb nins yãmb sẽn dat n maanã ka na n tõog ye. B na n maana yãmb pãnga, n fã yãmb daar fãa tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n sõng yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Fo na n belma pag tɩ ned a to reeg-a n gãande. Fo na n mee roogo, la f ka na n kẽ ye. Fo na n sela reezẽ tɩɩs f pʋʋgẽ, la f ka na n dɩ-a biis ye." 
Deuteronomy28:31 B na n kʋʋ fo naaf f nifẽ, la f ka na n wãb a nemd ye. B na n deega fo bõang ne pãng f nifẽ, la b ka na n lebs-a ye. B na n dɩka fo piis n kõ f bɛɛba, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n fãag foom ye." 
Deuteronomy28:32 B na n dɩka fo kom-dibli wã ne kom-pugli wã n kõ buud a to tɩ f yã. Fo na n dat-b-la daar fãa hal tɩ f sũur sãame, la f ka tõe n maan bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Buud yãmb sẽn ka mi na n dɩɩ yãmb tẽn-gãongã koodã ne y sẽn tʋm n paam bũmb ninsã fãa. La bãmb na n namsa yãmb n maan-y pãng daar fãa. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Bũmb nins y nin sẽn yã wã na n kɩtame tɩ y yik gãeemdo. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ nod-tãooda yõk yãmb dũma ne y gɛy wã tɩ ka tõe n maag ye. Nod-tãooda wã na n yõka yãmb nao-sɩlpamã n tall n tãag y zug tẽn-sʋkã. 
Deuteronomy28:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb ne y rĩmã sẽn so yãmbã kẽn ne nao n kẽng tẽng yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka mi. La beenẽ, yãmb na n tũu buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb b sẽn maan ne raado, la ne kuga." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n tall yãmb n kẽng zĩig ning fãa, nebã na n yɛɛsame, la b rɩk yãmb yellã n maan yel-bũndi, la b yaal yãmba." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Yãmb na n bʋda bõn-buud wʋsgo, la y na n tigsa bilfu. Bala, sʋy na n dɩ-a lame." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Yãmb na n sela reezẽ tɩɩs n maneg-b n ko, la y ka na n paam reezẽ rãam n yũ, wall y rɩ b biis me ye. Bala, zũnzũiy na n dɩ-b lame." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Oliiv tɩɩs wʋsg na n zĩnda yãmb soolmã fãa pʋgẽ, la yãmb ka na n paam kaam n sõog y nens ye. Bala, b biisã na n sʋʋgame." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Yãmb na n doga kom-dibli, ne kom-pugli, la y ka na n soog-b ye. Bala, b na n kẽes-b-la yembdo." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Sʋy na n dɩɩ yãmb tɩɩsã ne y tẽn-gãongã koodã fãa. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Sãamb nins sẽn be yãmb sʋkã na n paama pãng n yɩɩg yãmba, la b na n paama paoong n paase, tɩ yãmb pãngã boog n lebg bilfu." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Yãmb na n kẽnga sãamb nengẽ n tɩ peng bũmbu, la bãmb ka na n wa yãmb nengẽ n wa peng bũmb ye. Bãmb na n lebga zug tɩ yãmb yɩ zʋʋre." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Kãab-wẽn-kãensã fãa na n waa yãmb zutu. Kãab-wẽn-kãensã fãa na n diga yãmb n paam hal tɩ y sãame, yãmb sẽn ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛga, la y sẽn ka sak bãmb tõodã ne b noy nins bãmb sẽn kõ yãmbã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Bãmb na n lebga bãnã, la bõn-bãn ne yãmb ne y yagensã wakat fãa." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Yãmb sẽn ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnaamã ne sũ-noogo, la ne y sũyã fãa wã yĩnga, yãmb sẽn paam bũmb fãa wʋsgã pʋgẽ wã," 
Deuteronomy28:48 yãmb na n tʋma bɛɛb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n tʋm yãmb nengẽ wã yĩng ne kom, la ko-yũudu, la bɛɛla, n ka tar baa fɩ ye. Bɛɛbã na n balga yãmb kut yubl balgre, n zɩsg y poayã, hal n wa sãam yãmba." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ buud sẽn be zĩ-zãrgẽ wa rɩk yãmb wa sɩlg sẽn dɩk noaaga. Yaa buud yãmb sẽn ka wʋmd b goamã. 
Deuteronomy28:50 Yaa buud sẽn yaa kegemse. Bãmb ka waoogd nin-kẽema, la b ka zoet yãag nin-bãaneg ye." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Bãmb na n dɩɩ yãmb rũmsã kamb ne y koodã hal tɩ yãmb sãame. Bãmb ka na n bas yãmb koodã, wall y rã-noodã, wall y kaamã ne y rũm-bɛdã, ne y rũm-bãoonegã kamb tɩ kelle, hal tɩ b wa kɩt tɩ yãmb sãame." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Bãmb na n gũbga yãmb tẽmsã fãa tɩ yɩ sẽbgr ne yãmba, hal tɩ tẽmsã lal-bɛdã sẽn tar pãng tɩ yãmb teeg-bã lʋɩ yãmb soolmã zĩig fãa. Bãmb na n gũbga yãmb tẽmsã fãa noyã, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Yãmb yel-pakrã pʋgẽ, wakat ning y bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg yãmbã, yãmb na n wãba y kambã, yãmb na n wãba yãmb mensã kom-dibli, la y kom-pugli nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Rao ning sẽn nong a meng t'a nug são n yɩɩd a taabã na n zoee bõn ne a ba-biig ne a pʋg-rʋmd la a kamb nins sẽn ketã," 
Deuteronomy28:55 n ka rat n sak n yãk a kamb nins a sẽn kʋ wã nemd n kõ-b ye. Tɩ bala, yẽnda bũmb ka na n kell ye, yãmb bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg yãmb n wa ne yel-pakr yãmb tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ wã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Pag sẽn nong a meng t'a nug são n yɩɩd a taabã t'a ka rat n tabg tẽngã me ka na n zoe a kambã nimbãaneg ye. 
Deuteronomy28:57 Yãmb bɛɛbã sẽn na n gũbg yãmb tẽmsã noy tɩ lebg yel-pakr sẽn yaa toog ne yãmb y tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã yĩng na n kɩtame tɩ pag ning sẽn nong a meng t'a nug são n yɩɩd a taabã soos n wãb a zãr ning sẽn lʋɩt a naoã tẽngrã, la kamb nins a sẽn dogã me." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Yãmb sã n ka gũus y mens n sak tõodã goam nins fãa sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, la y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã sẽn zems waoogr la zoeesã," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ bã-sãams ne bã-toos sẽn kaoosda, la bã-wẽns sẽn ka maagd yõk yãmb ne y yagensã." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt bã-longds nins yãmb sẽn da zoetã leb n wa yõk yãmba. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Sẽn paase, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ bãas ne bã-longds nins sẽn ka gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã yõk yãmb hal tɩ yãmb sãame." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Yãmb sẽn dag n yaa wʋsg wa yĩngr ãdsã, y na n lebga bilf bala, yãmb sẽn ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sẽn dag n yɩ noog to-to tɩ b maan yãmb neer n kɩt tɩ y lebg wʋsgã, woto me, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur na n leb n yɩɩ noog tɩ b menes yãmba, la b sãam-yã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yiisa yãmb tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y sãeeg n kẽ buud a taabã fãa sʋka, n ta dũniyã ween-vɩɩsã fãa. La beenẽ, yãmb na n tũu neb a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb sẽn maan ne daad la kuga, yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n ka mi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Yãmb ka na n paam vɩ-bãan bu-kãens sʋk ye. La yãmb ka na n paam zĩig n tabg y naoor n paam n vʋʋs me ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ rabeem yõk-yã, tɩ y ninã pãng booge, tɩ y sũyã sãame." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Yãmb na n vɩɩ wa y kiime. Yãmb na n zoee rabeem yʋng ne wĩntoogo, yãmb vɩɩmã ka na n tall yõod ne yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Yibeoogo, yãmb na n yeelame tɩ y ratẽ lame tɩ yaẽ-la zĩ-sobdo, la zĩ-sobdo, yãmb na n yeelame tɩ y ratẽ lame tɩ yaẽ-la yibeoogo, yãmb sũyã sẽn kiuusdã yĩnga, la bũmb nins y nin sẽn yãtã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y kẽ koom kogend n leb n leb Ezɩpt tẽnga, tɩ y tũ sor ning mam sẽn dag n yeel yãmb tɩ y ka na n leb n yãnd-a wã. Yãmb na n dat n koosa y meng ne y bɛɛbã beenẽ, n lebg bãmb yembse. La bãmb ned ba a yembr ka na n da yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:69 Ad kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yell a Moyiis t'a maan ne Israyɛll nebã Moaab tẽngã n paas kaool ning bãmb sẽn dag n maan ne bãmb Horɛɛbã. 
Deuteronomy29:1 A Moyiis boola Israyɛll nebã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb yãnda bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n maan Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã, la a soolmã fãa sẽn yaa Ezɩptã yãmb nifẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Yaa to-kãsems nins ne bãn ninsi, la bõn-yɛɛsds nins yãmb nifã sẽn yãndã." 
Deuteronomy29:3 La hal tɩ ta rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka kõ yãmb yam tɩ y bãnge, wall nin tɩ y yãnde, wall tʋb tɩ y wʋm ye." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Mam talla yãmb we-raoogã pʋgẽ yʋʋm pis-naase, la fut nins yãmb sẽn dag n yerã ne neoodã nins yãmb sẽn pidã ka ki ye." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Yãmb ka wãb buri, la y ka yũ reezẽ rãam bɩ rã-toose, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Yãmb waa zĩ-kãnga, la Hɛsbõ rĩm a Sihon ne Basan rĩm a Oog yiime n zab ne tõndo. La tõnd tõoga bãmba." 
Deuteronomy29:7 La tõnd deega bãmb tẽngã n kõ a Rubɛn ne a Gaad yagensã la a Manaas buud pʋɩ-sʋkã yagensã tɩ b sooge. 
Deuteronomy29:8 Woto yĩnga, gũus-y y mens n sak kaool-kãngã goamã fãa, la y rɩk-b n ning b nao-kẽndr zugu, tɩ y tõe n paam tõogr bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn maandã pʋga." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor la yãmb sẽn yas rũndã wã, yãmb fãa ne y buudã nanambse, y kãsem-dãmbã, y seb-gʋndbã, ne Israyɛll daopã fãa," 
Deuteronomy29:10 la yãmb pagbã ne y kambã, la sãamb nins sẽn be yãmb sikã zĩigẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne neb nins sẽn kɛɛd raadã n tɩ ta neb nins sẽn yõngd koom n kõt yãmbã," 
Deuteronomy29:11 n na n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kaoolã pʋgẽ ne wẽeneg ning bãmb sẽn wẽen n maan kaool ne yãmb dũndã wã," 
Deuteronomy29:12 n na kɩt tɩ yãmb yɩ bãmb nebã, tɩ bãmb meng yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam wa b sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel yãmbã, la a wa b sẽn dag n yeel yãmb yaab-rãmb a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoobã." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Ka ne yãmb bal la mam maand kaool-kãngã, la ne wẽeneg-kãngã ye." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Yaa ne neb nins sẽn be ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor ne tõnd dũndã wã, la ne neb nins sẽn ka be ne tõndã, n na n yaool n wa tõnd poorẽ wã me." 
Deuteronomy29:15 Yãmb mengã bãnga tõnd sẽn zĩnd Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn yɩ to-to, la tõnd sẽn yɩ to-to n pɩʋʋg buud a taab nins sʋk yãmb sẽn tũ n loogã." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Yãmb yãnda yel-beed nins bãmb sẽn maandã, la bõn-naands nins sẽn maan ne raad la kug la wanzuri ne sãnemã bãmb sẽn tarã." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Bɩ raoa, wall paga, bɩ roog wall buud tõr ra wa zĩnd yãmb sʋkã, n bʋdg n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n tũ bu-kãens wẽnnaam-dãmbã, n wa ne zẽnem la sũ-toog yãmb sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ned sã n wʋm goam nins b sẽn gom wẽen-kangã pʋgã, bɩ a ra kãab a meng noog n yeele: «Baa mam sã n tũ m sũurã tagsg n maan tʋʋm-wẽns tɩ looge, yell ka na n paam maam ye.»" 
Deuteronomy29:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n kõ yẽnda sugr ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-kãbrã ne b sũ-kiirã na n yika ne a soaba, tɩ tood nins fãa sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã wa a soab zugu. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame t'a yʋʋr menem tẽng zugu." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n welga yẽnda Israyɛll buudã sʋka, t'a paam toog wa sẽn zems kaoolã kãabd nins fãa sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Deuteronomy29:21 Zamaan nins sẽn na n pʋgl n wa wã, yãmb yagensã sẽn na n pʋgl yãmbã, ne sãamb nins sẽn yi tẽn-zãrgẽ n wa wã sã n yãnd tẽn-kãngã toodã ne bãas nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ yõk nebã na n yeelame:" 
Deuteronomy29:22 «Kidbr bugum ne yamsem dɩɩ tẽngã gilli. Bʋdb ka tõe n bʋde, bõn-buud me ka tõe n yi, la tɩɩg me ka tobd ye. Yaa wa Sodom la Gomoore, wa Adma la Seboyim, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sãam b sũ-yikrã ne b sũ-kãbrã pʋgã." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Buud a taabã fãa na n sokame tɩ yaa bõe tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan tẽngã woto, la bõe n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik wʋsg woto?»" 
Deuteronomy29:24 La b na n leokame: «Yaa nebã sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã kaoolã, bãmb sẽn dag n maan ne bãmb wakat ning b sẽn yiis bãmb Ezɩptã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Bãmb tũu wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab bãmb sẽn dag n ka mi, n wõgemd bãmb taoore, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n gɩdga bãmb tɩ b ra waoog-b ye." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika ne tẽngã tɩ kãab-beed nins fãa sẽn gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã paam-a." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiisa bãmb b tẽngẽ wã ne sũ-puugri, la sũ-kãbre, ne sũ-yik-kãsenga, n tɩ lobg bãmb tẽn-taaga. Bõn-kãng yĩng n kɩt tɩ yellã yaa a woto rũndã." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Bũmb nins sẽn solgã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã n so. La bũmb nins b sẽn vẽnegã yaa tõnd ne d kambã yĩng wakat fãa, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ tõnd dɩk tõ-kãensã goamã fãa n ning b nao-kẽndr zugu.»" 
Deuteronomy30:1 Bark-kãensã ne kãab-wẽn-kãensã fãa mam sẽn wilg yãmbã sã n wa paam yãmba, tɩ y tags b yell buud a taabã tẽms nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n dig yãmb tɩ y kẽngã pʋga," 
Deuteronomy30:2 yãmb ne y kambã sã n lebg n leb Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ, n sak n kelg bãmb koɛɛgã ne bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn wilgd yãmb dũndã wã ne y sũyã fãa, la ne y yamã fãa," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n zoee yãmb nimbãaneg n yiis yãmb yembdã pʋgẽ, buud nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dig yãmb tɩ y kẽng b nengẽ wã sʋka." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Baa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sã n wa rig yãmb tɩ y saag dũniyã tɛk fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n tigma yãmb n yiis beenẽ." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n talla yãmb n wa tẽng ning yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n so wã n kõ yãmb tɩ y sooge. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n maana yãmb neere, n kɩt tɩ y lebg wʋsg n yɩɩg y yaab-rãmbã." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n teka yãmb ne y yagensã sũy tɩ y nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ne y sũyã fãa, la ne y yamã fãa n tõog n vɩɩmde." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ kãab-wẽn-kãensã fãa paam y bɛɛbã ne sẽn kis-b yãmb n namsd yãmbã. 
Deuteronomy30:8 La yãmba, yãmb na n leb n kelga Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã, n sak bãmb tõod nins fãa mam sẽn kõ yãmb dũndã wã." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n kõo yãmb paoong wʋsgo, n kɩt tɩ yãmb nus tʋʋmã fãa biis fɩɩge: sã n yaa y kambã, wall y rũmsã kamba, wall y koodã. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur na n leb n yɩɩ noog ne yãmba, y sẽn tar sũ-noogã yĩnga, wa b sẽn dag n tar sũ-noog ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n tar sũ-noogã." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Yãmb sã n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã n sak bãmb tõodã ne no-tũuds nins sẽn gʋls tõogã seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, yãmb sã n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ ne y sũyã fãa, la ne y yamã fãa, bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ woto." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Tõ-kãngã mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã ka yɩɩd yãmb pãng ye, la a ka zãr ne yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy30:12 A ka be yĩngr tɩ y na n yeel tɩ ãndã n na n dʋ be n tall-a n wa kõ yãmb tɩ y wʋm la y sak-a ye. 
Deuteronomy30:13 A ka be ko-kãsengã rʋʋnd tɩ y na n yeel tɩ ãndã n na n dʋʋg n tɩ tall-a n wa kõ yãmb tɩ y wʋm la y sak-a ye. 
Deuteronomy30:14 Gomdã pẽe ne foom. A bee fo noorẽ, a bee fo sũurẽ, tɩ f tõe n sak-a." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Gese, rũndã, mam ningda vɩɩm ne naare, la kũum ne toog y taoore." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Noor ning mam sẽn kõt yãmb dũndã wã, yaa tɩ y nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, la y sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n tũ bãmb soyã la y sak bãmb tõodã, ne b no-tũudsã la b noyã, n tõog n vɩɩmd n lebg wʋsgo, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ning-y bark tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy30:17 La yãmb sã n bʋdge, yãmb sã n ka kelge, la y sã n bas tɩ b peeg yãmb tɩ y sak n wõgemd n waoog buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmba," 
Deuteronomy30:18 mam yeta yãmb dũndã tɩ y na n menema zãnga. Yãmb ka na n vɩɩmd n kaoos tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ wã n tɩ kẽ n soogã pʋgẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Dũndã, saasã la tẽngã yaa mam kaset-dãmba, tɩ mam ninga vɩɩm la kũum, ne bark la kãab-wẽns y taoore. Yãk-y vɩɩmã, tɩ yãmb ne y yagensã tõe n vɩɩmde," 
Deuteronomy30:20 la y nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, n sak bãmb koɛɛgã n loe y sũurã ne bãmba. Yaa bãmb n kõt yãmb vɩɩm la yõ-woko, sẽn na yɩl tɩ yãmb tõe n zĩnd tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel y yaab-rãmb a Abrahaam ne a Izaak la a Zakoob tɩ b na n kõo bãmbã." 
Deuteronomy31:1 A Moyiis leb n goma gom-kãensã ne Israyɛll nebã fãa n yeele: 
Deuteronomy31:2 «Rũndã, mam tara yʋʋm koabg la pisi. Mam ka tõe n leb n kẽnd la m watẽ ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam, tɩ m ka na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã ye.»" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n na n lʋɩ yãmb taoore. Bãmb na n sãama bu-kãensã yãmb taoore, n kɩt tɩ y reeg b tẽngã n sooge. Yaa a Zozoe n na n lʋɩ nebã taoor wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana bu-kãens wa b sẽn dag n maan Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmbã a Sihon ne a Oog ne b tẽmsã. Bãmb sãam-b lame. 
Deuteronomy31:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n dɩka bãmb n kõ yãmb tɩ y maan-b wa mam sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Nang-y pãnga. Paam-y raado. Ra zoe-y rabeem ye. Ra sak-y tɩ y sũyã kiuus bãmb taoor ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã meng yãagda yãmba. Bãmb sõngrã ka na n vaale, la b ka na n bas yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy31:7 A Moyiis boola a Zozoe n yeel-a Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ yaa: «Nang pãng n keng f sũuri. Bala, yaa foom n na n tall nin-kãensã n kẽ tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n wẽen ne b yaab-rãmbã n yeel tɩ b na n kõo bãmbã. La yaa foom n na n kõ-b tẽn-kãng tɩ b sooge." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n na n lʋɩ fo taoore. Bãmb bee ne foom. Bãmb sõngrã ka na n vaal ye. Bãmb ka na n bas foom ye. Ra zoe rabeem ye, la f ra sak tɩ f pɛleng yɩk ye.»" 
Deuteronomy31:9 A Moyiis gʋlsa tõ-kãensã fãa n kõ a Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdb n zãad Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã, ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã." 
Deuteronomy31:10 A Moyiis kõo bãmb noor n yeele: «Yʋʋm a yopoe fãa sẽn yaa bas-taal yʋʋmdã, sẽn zems zãnã tigr wakatã," 
Deuteronomy31:11 Israyɛll nebã fãa sã n wa tigim Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n yãkã, bɩ y karem tõodã fãa Israyɛll nebã fãa taoor tɩ b wʋme." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Tigm-y nebã fãa, raopa, pagba, kamba ne sãamb nins sẽn be y tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã tɩ b wʋme, la b zãms Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zoeese, n gũus b mens n sak tõodã goamã fãa," 
Deuteronomy31:13 woto, bãmb kamb nins sẽn ka mi tõodã me na n tõog n wʋme, n zãms Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zoees wakat fãa, yãmb sẽn be tẽng ning y sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ reeg n soogã pʋgẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gese, fo kũum daar kolgame. Bɩ f peeg a Zozoe n kẽng n tɩ yals sɛk roogã pʋgẽ tɩ m wilg-a a sẽn na n maane.» La a Moyiis ne a Zozoe kẽngame n tɩ yals sɛk roogã pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnega b meng sawad-taok pʋgẽ. La sawaodgã yaasa sɛk roogã rignoorẽ. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Gese, fo na n kiime n bʋʋg f saam-dãmba. La nebã na n yikame n tũ buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmba, tẽng ning bãmb sẽn na n zĩndã pʋgẽ. Bãmb na n basa maam n sãam mam kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne bãmbã." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Baraare, mam sũur na n yika ne bãmba, la mam na n bas-b lame, n solg m meng ne-b tɩ b sãame. Tood la namsg wʋsg na n paama bãmba, tɩ b yeel tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ka be ne bãmbã yĩng n kɩt tɩ to-kãensã fãa paam bãmba." 
Deuteronomy31:18 La badaare, mam na n solga m menga, bãmb sẽn maan wẽng n bʋdg n tũ buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy31:19 La moasã, gʋls yɩɩn-kãngã n zãms Israyɛll nebã, la f ning-a bãmb noyã pʋsẽ, t'a yɩ kaset n ningd bãmb taale." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Sɩda, mam na n talla bãmb n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsg wa mam sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel b yaab-rãmbã, bãmb na n dɩɩme n tɩge, bãmb na n nobame, la b wẽnemd n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba, n paoog maam la b sãam m kaoolã." 
Deuteronomy31:21 La toog ne namsg wʋsg sã n paam bãmba, yɩɩn-kãngã na n yɩɩ kaset ne bãmba. Bala, a na n paa bãmb yagensã noyẽ, tɩ b ka yĩm a yell ye. Bala, mam mii bũmb nins bãmb sẽn dat n maanã rũndã, tɩ m nan ka tall-b n tɩ kẽes tẽng ning mam sẽn wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõ-b lame wã ye.»" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Badaar bala, a Moyiis gʋlsa yɩɩllã n zãms Israyɛll nebã." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Nun biig a Zozoe yaa: «Nang pãnga, keng f sũuri. Bala, yaa foom n na n tall Israyɛll nebã n kẽ tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen tɩ mam na n kõo bãmbã. La mam mengã na n zĩnda ne foom.»" 
Deuteronomy31:24 A Moyiis sẽn gʋls tõodã gom-kãens fãa sebrã pʋgẽ n sɛ," 
Deuteronomy31:25 yẽnda yeela a Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn zãad Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã yaa: 
Deuteronomy31:26 Reeg-y tõodã sebrã n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã sɛɛgẽ, n bas-a beenẽ t'a yɩ kaset ne yãmba." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Bala, mam mii yãmb kɩɩsgã, la m miime tɩ yãmb yaa tõatba. Gese, yãmb sẽn kɩɩsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ mam ket n vɩ n be ne yãmbã, mam sã n wa ki, yãmb na n maana woto n yɩɩda." 
Deuteronomy31:28 Bool-y y buudã nanambsã ne y kãsem-dãmbã tɩ b wa tigim mam nengẽ, tɩ m togs-b gom-kãensã. La m na n dɩka yĩngr ne tẽng tɩ b yɩ kaset-dãmb ne bãmba." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Bala, mam miime tɩ mam kũum poorẽ, yãmb na n maana wẽnga, yãmb na n basa sor ning mam sẽn wilg yãmbã, la wakat sẽn wata, toog na n paama yãmba, yãmb sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ b sũur yik ne yãmb y tʋʋm-wẽnsã poorẽ wã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy31:30 A Moyiis togsa yɩɩn-kãngã goamã fãa n tãag a tɛk tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa wʋme. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Yĩngri, yok f tʋb tɩ m na n gomame! Tẽnga, kelg goam nins sẽn yit m noorẽ wã!" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Bɩ mam bãngrã sig wa saag sẽn niida! Bɩ m goamã rʋʋg wa meenem, wa sa-luk sẽn madgd moogo, wa koom sẽn tosd moog zugu!" 
Deuteronomy32:3 Bala, mam na n moona Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre! Bãng-y tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa kãsenga!" 
Deuteronomy32:4 Bãmb yaa Pĩiga! Bãmb tʋʋmã zemsa zãnga! Bãmb soayã fãa yaa tɩrse! Bãmb tʋʋmã zemsa zãnga! Bãmb yaa sɩd soab wakatã fãa! Zãmb ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye. Bãmb yaa sɩda, la tɩrga." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Israyɛll kambã sã n maand wẽnga, ka Wẽnnaam yell ye. Yaa Israyɛll kambã la b tog n paooge. Bãmb zamaanã yaa zamaan-yoog sẽn pid ne yel-kɛga." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Yaa woto la yãmb lebsd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo? Buud sẽn yaa yalemb n ka tar yam, ka bãmb n yaa y ba n naan yãmb la? Ka bãmb n naan yãmb la b zĩndg yãmb tẽng zug la?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Tẽeg-y kʋdemd wẽndẽ wã yelle. Tẽeg-y zamaan nins sẽn loogã yelle. Sok f ba t'a wilg-fu. Sok f kãsem-dãmbã tɩ b togs-fo. 
Deuteronomy32:8 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-To sẽn kõ bu-zẽmsã zĩisã, n welg ninsaalbã, bãmb ninga soolmã tods wa sẽn zems Israyɛll nebã sõore." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã yaa bãmb pʋɩɩre. Bãmb dɩka a Zakoob yagensã n kõ b menga." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yãnda bãmb we-raoog pʋgẽ, yaa we-raoog sẽn yaa koɛɛng n pid ne we-rũms yãbre. Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũbga bãmba. Bãmb gesa b yelle. Bãmb gũu bãmb wa b nin-beelle." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana bãmb wa sɩl-kẽeng sẽn nekd a kamb a tʋkẽ, n zãmsd bãmb yɩgbo, n yaool n tẽegd a pɩgs n kokd bãmb tɩ b zao a pɩgsã zutu." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab b yembr bal n tɛ bãmba, Wẽn-sãang a to ka zĩnd ne bãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩniga bãmb tẽngã tãms zutu, tɩ b rɩt b pʋtã kood biisi. B rag n kõta bãmb kugr zug sɩɩd tɩ b rɩtẽ, la b kõt-b kaam sẽn yit pĩig zugu," 
Deuteronomy32:14 la b kõt bãmb niig bĩis-gõeem ne piis la bʋʋs bĩis-naare, ne pe-bi kaam la Basan pe-raad ne a boees nemdo, la zom bãanega! Yãmb dag n yũuda reezẽ biis ko-miuugu, yaa reezẽ rã-toaaga." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Israyɛll nobame n lebg tõata. Bãmb nobame n lebg bɛda. La bãmb basa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa b naandã, n paoog pĩig ning sẽn fãagd bãmbã." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ sũ-kiir yõk Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb sẽn tũud wẽn-sãamsã yĩnga. Bãmb kɩɩsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yel-beed nins b sẽn maandã. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Bãmb maana maand n kõ zĩn-dãmb sẽn ka Wẽnnaam ye, la wẽnnaam-dãmb bãmb sẽn ka mi sẽn yaool n wa, yãmb yaab-rãmb sẽn dag n ka waoogda." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Yãmb basa pĩig ning sẽn dog-a yãmbã, n yĩm Wẽnnaam ning sẽn wa-a ne yãmb dũniyã pʋgẽ wã yelle." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãnda yõwã, la b sũur yika ne bãmb kom-dibli wã, la b kom-pugli wã sẽn kɩɩsd bãmbã yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Bãmb yeelame: Mam na n solga m meng ne bãmb n gese, b na n maana wãna. Bala, bãmb yaa nin-tõtse. Bãmb yaa zamaan neb yam sẽn yuusda." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bãmb tũu sẽn ka Wẽnnaam, n kɩt tɩ sũ-kiir yõk maam. Bãmb yika mam sũur ne b bõn-naandse. Woto, mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud sẽn ka buud meng-meng sũ-kiir yõk bãmba. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud sẽn yaa yalem yik bãmb sũyã." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Bala, mam sũ-puugrã bugum widgame. A na n dɩɩme hal n ta kɩɩm-kulgu. A na n dɩɩ tẽngã ne a koodã fãa. A na n dɩɩ n tãaga tãmsã yẽbgrẽ." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Mam na n sama tood bãmb zutu. Mam na n dɩka m pɛɛmã fãa n tão bãmba. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Komã sã n wa yõk bãmb tɩ b faage, tɩ b yĩnsã wɩng tɩ bã-longdsã rɩt bãmb wa bugum, mam na n tʋma rũm-toos ne wag-toos tɩ b wãb bãmba." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Yɩnga, zabr sʋʋs n na n kʋ bãmb kambã, la rotã pʋsẽ, na n yɩɩ rabeem. B na n kʋʋ kom-bɩɩsã ne b pʋg-sadbã, la nusẽ kambã ne nin-kẽembã." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Mam dag n yeelame, tɩ m na n sãam-b-la zãnga, n kɩt tɩ b yʋʋr menem dũniyã," 
Deuteronomy32:27 la mam zoee b bɛɛbã na n wa paoog maam n tudg n yeel tɩ yaa bãmb n tõoge, la ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan yõwã fãa ye." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Bala, bãmb yaa buud sẽn ka tar saagr ye. Bãmb ka mi baa fɩ ye." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Bãmb sã n dag n tarẽ yam, b rag n na n tagsẽ lame n bãng bõn-kãng võore, n tõog n gũus ne b beoog vɩɩmã yelle." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Nin-yend na n yɩɩ wãn n dig neb tusri, la neb a yiib na n yɩɩ wãn n dig neb tus piiga, tɩ sã n ka kugr ning bãmb sẽn teegã n koos bãmba? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bas bãmba." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bala, bãmb fãagr kugrã ka wẽnd tõnd fãagr pĩigã ye. Tõnd bɛɛbã mens mii bõn-kãnga." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Bala, bãmb reezẽ tɩɩsã yẽgr yita Sodom ne Gomoor soolmã reezẽ tɩɩsã yẽgrẽ. Bãmb reezẽ biisã tara zẽnem. B reezẽ-gĩnã yaa toog liga." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Bãmb reezẽ rãamã yaa wa wag-bees zẽnem. Yaa wa wag-toos zẽnem. 
Deuteronomy32:34 Bõn-kãens solga mam nengẽ. B bee mam laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ. 
Deuteronomy32:35 Bãmb sã n saad n yuusdẽ, sũ-dokr bee ne maam, tɩ m na n dol ned kam fãa! Bala, bãmb sãoong daar kolgame. Bũmb ning sẽn segl bãmb yĩngã wata tao-tao." 
Deuteronomy32:36 N-yẽe! Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n kao b nebã bʋʋdo. Bãmb sã n yãnd tɩ b nebã pãng sɛɛme, tɩ yembs ne burkĩmb ka leb n beẽ, bãmb na n zoee b tʋmtʋmdbã nimbãanega." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Dẽ, bãmb na n sokame yaa: Bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã bee yɛ? Bãmb sẽn da teeg a soabã bee yɛ?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Wẽnnaam-dãmb nins sẽn dag n dɩt yãmb maand nemd kaamã la b yũud y reezẽ rãamã bee yɛɛnẽ? B yik moasã n sõng-yã. B yik n kogl-yã! 
Deuteronomy32:39 Moasã, bãng-y tɩ yaa maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be tɩ ka maam ye. Yaa maam n kõt vɩɩm, yaa maam n kʋʋde. Yaa maam n pogende, la maam n maagde. Ned ka tõe n deeg bũmb mam nugẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Bala, mam zẽkda m nug yĩngri, n yetẽ tɩ m vɩɩ wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Mam sã n saas m sʋʋgã n dat n maan sɩda, mam sã n yãk m bʋʋdã daare, mam na n doka m sũur ne m bɛɛbã, la m sɩbg neb nins sẽn kis-b maamã." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ pɛɛmã monem ne zɩɩm, la m tɩgs m zabr sʋʋgã ne b sẽn yõg-b rãmb n kʋ wã nemdo, la b zɩɩm, la ne zɩɩm sẽn yit bɛɛbã nanambs zutu." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Bu-zẽmse, pẽg-y bãmb nebã. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rokda b sũur b tʋmtʋmdbã zɩɩm daagr yĩnga. Bãmb dokda b sũur ne b bɛɛbã. La bãmb na n yɩlga b tẽngã ne b nebã." 
Deuteronomy32:44 A Moyiis ne a Nun biig a Zozoe kẽngame n togs yɩɩn-kãngã goamã fãa Israyɛll nebã taoore. 
Deuteronomy32:45 La a Moyiis sẽn togs Israyɛll nebã fãa gom-kãensã n sɛ, yẽnda yeela bãmb yaa:" 
Deuteronomy32:46 «Tags-y goam nins fãa mam sẽn togs yãmb dũndã wã yell neere, la y rɩk bãmb n wilg y kamba, tɩ b gũus b mens n sak tõ-kãensã fãa goamã." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Bala, b yaa bõn-kãseng ne yãmba. B yaa yãmb vɩɩm. Yaa ne bãmb la yãmb na n vɩɩmd n kaoos tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ soogã pʋgẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Baraar bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 «Rʋ Nebo tãng ning sẽn be Abarim tãmsã sʋkã, Moaab tẽngã pʋgẽ n teesd Zeeriko wã n ges Kana tẽngã mam sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã tɩ b soogã." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Fo na n kii tãng ning fo sẽn na n dʋ wã zugu, n tɩ lagem f nebã sẽn ki wã, wa f kẽem a Aarõ sẽn da ki Hoor tãngã zug n tɩ lagem a nebã sẽn ki wã." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Bala, fo beega maam Israyɛll nebã sʋk Kadɛɛs Meriba koomã zĩigẽ, Sĩn we-raoogã pʋgẽ, n ka wilg mam pʋ-peelmã Israyɛll nebã sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Fo na n yãnda tẽngã sẽn be yɩɩga, tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ Israyɛll nebã, la fo ka na n kẽ beenẽ ye.»" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ad bark ning Wẽnnaam dao a Moyiis sẽn ning Israyɛll nebã, sẽn deng a kũumã." 
Deuteronomy33:2 A Moyiis yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab yii Sinayi n wa. Bãmb waa Seyɩɩr wa sõ-pukri, n yãg Paarã tãngã zugu. Bãmb waa b nebã sʋk ne malɛgs tus-kẽemã. Bãmb tʋm-b-la b tõogã bugum ne b nug-rɩtgo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 N-yẽe, bãmb nonga nebã. Bãmb pʋ-peelem dãmbã fãa bee bãmb nugẽ. Bãmb yalsa yãmb sɛɛgẽ, bãmb yaa yãmb koe-taasda." 
Deuteronomy33:4 A Moyiis kõo tõnd tõodã, tɩ yaa a Zakoob yagensã pʋɩɩre." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yaa Israyɛll dĩm wakat ning buudã nanambsã sẽn tigimd ne Israyɛll nebã fãa. 
Deuteronomy33:6 Wẽnd na kaoos a Rubɛn buudã, t'a vɩɩmd n da ki ye. Bɩ a nebã sõor kell n yɩ bilfu!" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ad bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn yeel a Zʋʋda buudã neb wɛɛngẽ: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kelg-y Zʋʋda buudã, n lebg n tall-a n wa a nebẽ wã. Tɩ b nusã zab n sõng-ba, wa-y n sõng-y-ba, la y fãag-b b bɛɛbã nugẽ.»" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Yẽnda goma a Leevi buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: «Bãmb kõo yãmb Tumimã ne Urimã ned ning sẽn maanã sɩd ne yãmbã. Yaa yẽnda la yãmb mak Masa, n bao zabr ne a Meriba koomã zĩigẽ." 
Deuteronomy33:9 A Leevi goma a ba wã ne a ma wã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: «Mam ka get bãmb ye!» Yẽnda ka leb n mi a ba-biiga, a ka leb n mi a kamb ye. Bala, bãmb sakda yãmb goamã n zãad yãmb kaoolã." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bãmb zãmsda a Zakoob yagensã yãmb minindu, la b zãmsd Israyɛll nebã yãmb tõodo. Bãmb yõogda tɩdar t'a yũug kẽ yãmba, la b yõogd maand y tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ning-y bãmb pãngã barka. Reeg-y bãmb nus tʋʋmã. Kao-y bãmb zabd-n-taasã, ne neb nins sẽn kis bãmbã sees tɩ b ra leb n yik ye.»" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Yẽnda goma a Benzame buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: Bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-nongds sẽn paad bãmb nengẽ ne bãane. Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũuda bãmb daar fãa. Bãmb zaoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab bãgdẽ n vʋʋsdẽ. 
Deuteronomy33:13 Yẽnda goma a Zozɛf buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga bãmb tẽngã barka, t'a paam kũun sẽn yit yĩngri, t'a paam meenem sẽn yaa sõama, ne ko-bundum sẽn yit zĩ-zulums pʋsẽ," 
Deuteronomy33:14 la a paam wĩndgã sẽn bɩɩsd koodã, ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn bund n yit kiuug fãa wã," 
Deuteronomy33:15 la a paam bi-sõama nins kʋdem-wẽndẽ tãmsã sẽn kõtã, kʋdem-wẽndẽ kunkubã sẽn kõt bi-sõamã ninsã," 
Deuteronomy33:16 la a paam bũmb nins sẽn yit tẽn-gãongã zug n womd bi-sõama wã. Bɩ sẽn zĩnd-a tuugã pʋgẽ wã bark zĩnd a Zozɛf b sẽn welg toor a ba-biisã sʋkã zugu. 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yẽnda yaa wa nag-sadg bi-rẽeng sẽn yaa lull n tar ziiri, t'a yɩɩlã yaa wa we-naaf yɩɩla. Yaa ne yɩɩn-bãmb la a tar n tãad buud a taabã fãa sẽn be zĩigã fãa tẽng zugã. A Efrayiim nebã tus-kẽemã yaa woto. La a Manaase nebã tus-kẽemã wã me yaa woto.»" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Yẽnda goma Zabulõ buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Zabulõ nebã, maan-y sũ-noog y yiib wakate! Izakaar nebã, maan-y sũ-noog y fu-rotã pʋse!" 
Deuteronomy33:19 Bãmb na n boola buud a taabã tɩ b wa tãngã zugu. Yaa beenẽ la b na n maan tɩrlem maando. Bala, bãmb na n dɩɩ bõn-sõama nins sẽn be ko-kãsemsã pʋgẽ wã yõodo, la b na n sooga laog ning sẽn solg bĩisrẽ wã.»" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Yẽnda goma a Gaad buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Bɩ sẽn sõng-a a Gaad buudã paam pẽgre. A Gaad wũunduda wa gɩgem-yãanga, n zendemd kangã ne zugã." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yaa bãmb n yãk tẽngã zĩig sẽn welg toor n kõ b mense, bala, b yãka zĩig beenẽ tãb-biis naab yĩnga. Yẽnda n lʋɩ Israyɛll nebã taoore, yẽnda maana sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩrlmã, a maana wa sẽn zemse, Israyɛll nebã yĩnga.»" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Yẽnda goma a Dan buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «A Dan yaa wa gɩgem-poll sẽn fõt n yit Basan tẽngã n watẽ.» 
Deuteronomy33:23 Yẽnda goma a Neftali buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩgsa a Neftali ne kũuni, b ning-a-la bark hal tɩ seke. Yẽnda reega nin-taoor la nug-goabg soolmã n sooge.»" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Yẽnda goma a Azɛɛr buudã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Bɩ a Azɛɛr paam bark n yɩɩd a Israyɛll kamb a taabã fãa. Bɩ a ba-biisã sũy yɩ noog ne-a, la bɩ a sagla a nao kaamẽ." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Bɩ fo kʋɩlemsã yɩ kut la zũudu. La bɩ fo pãng sek foom f yõor tɛka. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Israyɛll nebã, ned ka be n yɩɩd Wẽnnaam sẽn zao saasẽ n pɩʋʋgd yĩngr ne naamã, n wat n na n sõng yãmbã ye." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, Wẽnnaam yaa yãmb zĩ-soalgdga, bãmb n dig y bɛɛbã n yetẽ: ‹Sãam-y-a.›" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Israyɛll nebã zĩi b zĩigẽ ne bãane. A Zakoob ko-bundgã bee toore, tẽng sẽn tar kood ne reezẽ rãam pʋgẽ. N-yẽe! Meenem yita yĩngri, n sigd yẽnda zugu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb tara sũ-noogo. Ãnda n yaa wa yãmba? Buud Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãage, bãmb yaa yãmb sõngr gãongo. Bãmb yaa yãmb naam zabr sʋʋg sẽn tõogde. Yãmb bɛɛbã na n wõgemda yãmb taoore, la yãmb na n taba b maoong kʋʋb zĩisã.»" 
Deuteronomy34:1 A Moyiis basa Moaab tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã n dʋ Nebo tãngã n ta Pisga tãngã zug sẽn teesd Zeeriko wã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga yẽnda tẽngã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Galaad hal tɩ ta Dan" 
Deuteronomy34:2 la a Neftali nebã tẽngã, la a Efrayiim ne a Manaase tẽngã, la a Zʋʋda tẽngã fãa hal tɩ ta ko-kãsengã sẽn be nin-taoorã," 
Deuteronomy34:3 la Negɛɛv ne Zeeriko zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ koms tɩɩs tẽngã longã hal tɩ ta Soaare. 
Deuteronomy34:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Moyiis yaa: «Woto yaa tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen ne a Abrahaam la a Izaak ne a Zakoob tɩ m na n kõo b yagensã. Mam kɩtame tɩ fo nin yãnd-a, la f ka na n pɩʋʋg n kẽ beenẽ ye.»" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis kii beenẽ, Moaab tẽngã pʋgẽ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã." 
Deuteronomy34:6 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab mum-a-la Moaab long ning sẽn teesd Bɛt-Pewoorã pʋgẽ, la hal tɩ ta rũndã, ned ka mi a yaoog zĩig ye." 
Deuteronomy34:7 A Moyiis kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la pissi n yaool n ki. A ninã ne a yĩnsã pãng ka tol n boog ye. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Israyɛll nebã yãba a Moyiis kũumã yĩng hal rasem pis-tã Moaab tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã pʋgẽ. La rasem pis-tã wã, bãmb yãba kũumã yĩng n sɛ." 
Deuteronomy34:9 A Nun biig a Zozoe pida ne yam wʋsgo. Bala, a Moyiis rag n tika yẽnda ne a nusi. La Israyɛll nebã saka a Zozoe n maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a to ka leb n zĩnd Israyɛll nebã sʋka, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab mi-a neng ne neng wa b sẽn mi a Moyiisã ye." 
Deuteronomy34:11 A to ka zĩnd n maan bãn ne bõn-bãn wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tʋm a Moyiis t'a maan Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã, la Ezɩpt tẽngã soolmã fãa wã ye." 
Deuteronomy34:12 A to ka zĩnd n tall pãng n maan tʋʋm-kãsems Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ wa a Moyiis sẽn maanã ye. 
Joshua1:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis kũumã zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Nun biig a Zozoe sẽn yɩ a Moyiis rakõorã n yeele:" 
Joshua1:2 «Mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis kiime. Moasã, bee ne foom tɩ f yik n tall nebã fãa n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn kõt Israyɛll nebã." 
Joshua1:3 Mam kõta yãmb zĩig ning fãa yãmb naoor sẽn na n tabge, wa mam sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Joshua1:4 Yãmb soolmã na n sɩnga ne we-raoogã, la Libã tãmsã yãmb sẽn ne wã, hal tɩ ta kʋɩl-kãsengã b sẽn boond tɩ Efratã, la Hɛt-rãmba tẽngã fãa, n tɩ ta ko-kãsengã sẽn be wĩndgã sẽn lʋɩtẽ wã." 
Joshua1:5 Fo vɩɩmã tɛka, ned ba a ye kõn tõog n teeg a yãoog ne foom ye. Bala, mam na n zĩnda ne foom wa m sẽn zĩnd ne a Moyiisã. Mam na n yãaga foom, la mam kõn tol n bas n ka sõng-f ye." 
Joshua1:6 Keng f meng n paam daoodo. Bala, yaa foom n na n kɩt tɩ m nebã soog tẽng ning mam sẽn wẽen n yeel b yaab-rãmbã tɩ m na n kõ-b lame wã." 
Joshua1:7 Fo we n keng f meng n paam daood bala, la f mao n sak tõog ning mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn kõ foomã neere. Fo sã n dat n paam tõogr ne bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn na n maanã, bɩ f ra bʋdg n leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
Joshua1:8 Karem tõogã koees daar fãa, n tags a yell wĩndg la yʋngo, n sak n maan wa bũmb nins sẽn gʋls a pʋgẽ wã. Yaa woto la f na n tõog n maan f tʋʋmã tɩ yɩ sõama, la yaa woto la f na n tõog ne f tʋʋmdã." 
Joshua1:9 Mam ka yeel foom tɩ f keng f meng n paam daood la? Da zoe rabeem ye, da yɛɛs ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã na n zĩnda ne foom zĩig ninga fãa fo sẽn na n kẽnge.»" 
Joshua1:10 A Zozoe yeela nebã kãsem-dãmbã yaa: 
Joshua1:11 «Saag-y tãb-sikã fãa n yeel nebã yaa: Bao-y rɩɩb sẽn na n zã, bala, keta rasem a tãab tɩ yãmb pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ reeg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y soogã.»" 
Joshua1:12 Dẽ, a Zozoe goma ne a Rubɛn la a Gaad buudã, ne a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã n yeel-b yaa:" 
Joshua1:13 «Tẽeg-y bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã. B rag n yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kõta yãmb vʋʋsgo, la b kõo yãmb tẽn-kãngã.»" 
Joshua1:14 Woto, yãmb pagbã ne y kambã ne y rũmsã na n paa tẽng ning a Moyiis sẽn kõ yãmb Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. La sã n yaa ne yãmb sẽn yaa raopã, n yaa gãndaadã, yãmb na n boba y zab-teedo, n lʋɩ y ba-biisã taoor n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n zab n sõng-ba." 
Joshua1:15 Maan-y woto, hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ges y ba-biisã yell wa b sẽn ges yãmb yellã, tɩ b na tõog n soog tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõt bãmbã. Rẽ zugẽ, yãmb na yaool n lebg n wa reeg soolem ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n kõ yãmb tɩ yaa y pʋɩɩrã sẽn be yaangã Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã." 
Joshua1:16 Bãmb leoka a Zozoe n yeele: Tõnd na n maana bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n yeel tõnd tɩ d maanã, la d na n kẽnga zĩig ning fãa yãmb sẽn na n tʋm tõndo." 
Joshua1:17 Tõnd na n saka yãmb ne bũmb fãa wa tõnd sẽn dag n sak a Moyiisã. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zĩnd ne yãmba, wa b sẽn dag n be ne a Moyiisã." 
Joshua1:18 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n kɩɩs yãmb koɛɛgã, la a zãgs t'a ka na n sak yãmb sẽn yeel bũmb ning fãa wã, a sɩbgr na n yɩɩ kũum. Yãmb we n paam daoodo, la y keng y menga." 
Joshua2:1 A Nun biig a Zozoe zĩnda Sitim n tʋm tẽn-gũusdb a yiib n yeel-b yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ soos-y n ges-y Zeeriko tẽngã, n bãng a yell neere.» Bãmb kẽngame, la b tɩ siga pʋg-yoodr a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Rahaab zakẽ, n yõg gãag sobendo." 
Joshua2:2 La neb n tɩ togs Zeeriko rĩmã tɩ Israyɛll neb n wa badaar yʋng n na n gũus tẽngã. 
Joshua2:3 Dẽ, Zeeriko rĩmã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Rahaab yaa: «Kɩt tɩ raop nins sẽn wa n sig fo zakẽ wã yi, bala, b waame n na n gũus tẽngã fãa n bãng a yell neere.»" 
Joshua2:4 La a Rahaab peega raop a yiibã n tɩ solge. A leoka nebã n yeel yaa: «Yaa sɩda, raop a yiibã sɩd waa mam nengẽ, la mam ka mi b sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Joshua2:5 Zĩ-sobdã wakate, b sẽn wa n dat n pag tẽngã kʋɩlemsã, raopã soos n loogame tɩ mam ka bãng b sẽn teesẽ ye. La yãmb sã n pʋgl-b tao-tao, y na n paam-b lame.»" 
Joshua2:6 La mikame tɩ pagã rag n peega raopã n dʋʋs a roogã yĩngri, n wʋk lẽ wil raado yẽnda sẽn dag n bĩng n lud-ba." 
Joshua2:7 Dẽ, rĩmã sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã pʋgla raopã n tees Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã sẽnẽ n tɩ ta zĩ-rʋʋgdgẽ wã, la b bãmb loogrã zugẽ, b paga tẽngã noyã." 
Joshua2:8 Sẽn deng raop a yiibã sẽn nan ka gũsi, a Rahaab rʋ n bʋʋg-b-la roogã zugu," 
Joshua2:9 n yeel-b yaa: «Mam miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka tẽngã n ning yãmb nugẽ, la yãmb rabeem tara tõndo, la tẽngã nebã fãa rigdame." 
Joshua2:10 Bala, tõnd wʋmame tɩ wakat ning yãmb sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ tãnwĩis ko-kãsengã lebg koɛɛng tɩ yãmb tõog n pɩʋʋg-a. Tõnd leb n wʋma bũmb ning yãmb sẽn maan Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmb a yiibã, a Sihon ne a Oog sẽn dag n be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. Yãmb sãam-b-la zãnga." 
Joshua2:11 Tõnd sẽn wʋm woto wã, tõnd gĩinã fãa maagame, tɩ tõnd ned ba a yembr ka tõe n yals yãmb taoor ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa yĩngr la tẽng Wẽnnaam." 
Joshua2:12 Moasã, mam kota yãmb tɩ y wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, tɩ yãmb me na wa n maana mam ba wã zak rãmb neere, wa mam sẽn maan yãmb neerã. Kõ-y maam bãnd sẽn wilgd tɩ na n yɩ wa yãmb sẽn yeelã." 
Joshua2:13 Wẽen-y tɩ y na n basa m ba wã ne m ma wã, la m tãopã ne m ba-bi-pogsã ne bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn so wã tɩ b vɩɩmde, la y na n kɩtame tɩ tõnd põs kũum.»" 
Joshua2:14 Raop a yiibã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fo sã n ka wilg ned tõnd zĩiga, tõnd na n gẽnega d yõy yãmb yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n ning tẽngã tõnd nugẽ, d na n wilga foom d pʋ-peelem n maan-f neere.»" 
Joshua2:15 A Rahaab rɩka wĩir n tũnug a roogã võorẽ n sik raopã, bala, yẽnda roogã rag n tonga ne tẽngã lalga." 
Joshua2:16 Pagã yeela raopã yaa: «Zoe-y n tɩ soond-y tãmsã sẽnẽ, n pa be rasem a tãabo, hal tɩ neb nins sẽn baood-b yãmbã lebg n wa. Rẽ poore, y na yaool n dɩk sor n looge.»" 
Joshua2:17 Raopã yeela a Rahaab yaa: «Ad tõnd sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n pids wẽeneg ning fo sẽn kɩt tɩ tõnd wẽenã: 
Joshua2:18 Tõnd sã n wa n kẽ tẽngã, bɩ f rɩk wĩ-kãngã sẽn yaa miuugã n loe võor ninga fo sẽn tũnug n sik tõndã, la f peeg f ba wã ne f ma wã, fo tãopã ne fo buudã fãa n wa tigim fo roogã pʋga." 
Joshua2:19 Ned ning sẽn na n yi-a fo roogã pʋg badaare, yaa yẽnda soab n bao a kũum, la taal ka be tõnd zug ye. La ned sã n kẽ fo roogã pʋg n sɩɩs neda, yel-kãng taal bee tõnd zugu." 
Joshua2:20 La fo sã n togs ned tõnd sẽn yẽs ne taabã, fo sẽn kɩt tɩ tõnd wẽen wẽeneg ningã ka leb n be tõnd zug ye.»" 
Joshua2:21 Pagã yeelame: «A na yɩɩ wa yãmb sẽn yeelã bala.» Yẽnda kõ-b-la sor tɩ b looge, la b loogame. La yẽnda loee wĩ-miuugã roogã võorẽ." 
Joshua2:22 Raop a yiibã loogame, la b sẽn ta tãmsẽ wã, b paa be rasem a tãabo, hal tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n baood bãmbã lebg n kuili. Neb nins sẽn dag n pʋgl bãmbã baoo bãmb sorã zugu, la b ka yãnd-b ye." 
Joshua2:23 Dẽ, raop a yiibã yii tãmsã zut n sig n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n lebg n wa a Nun biig a Zozoe nengẽ. B togsa a Zozoe bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã." 
Joshua2:24 Bãmb yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Sɩd hakɩɩkã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka tẽngã zãng n ning tõnd nugẽ, hal tɩ tẽngã nebã fãa rigd ne rabeem, b sẽn wʋm tõnd kibarã yĩnga.»" 
Joshua3:1 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa yika yibeoog pĩnda, n yi Sitim n kẽng n tɩ sig Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore. La bãmb gãanda beenẽ yʋn-kãng sẽn deng kʋɩlgã rʋʋgre." 
Joshua3:2 Kãsem-dãmbã rɩka rasem a tãab tõre, n saag tãb-sikã gilli," 
Joshua3:3 n yeel nebã yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa n yãnd tɩ Leevi buudã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã tʋk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã, bɩ y yik n yi zĩig ning yãmb sẽn beẽ wã n pʋgl a poore." 
Joshua3:4 La baoosgo, bas-y vɩʋʋg sẽn tat nao-yakem tus a yi, yãmb ne kaoolã koglgã sʋka, la y ra kolg-a ye. Woto, yãmb na n bãnga sor ning y sẽn tog n dɩke, bala, yãmb nan zɩ n tũ so-kãng ye.»" 
Joshua3:5 Dẽ, a Zozoe yeela nebã yaa: «Yɩlg-y y mense, bala beoogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana bõn-yɛɛsds yãmb sʋka.»" 
Joshua3:6 A Zozoe yeela maan-kʋʋdbã yaa: «Tʋk-y kaoolã koglgã n lʋɩ nebã taoore.» La bãmb tʋka kaoolã koglgã n lʋɩ nebã taoore. 
Joshua3:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Sẽn sɩng ne rũndã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg nin-kãseng Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ. La bãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam bee ne foom wa m sẽn dag n be ne a Moyiisã." 
Joshua3:8 Yeel maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn zãad-b kaoolã koglgã, tɩ b sã n ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, bɩ b kẽ koomã pʋg n yalse.»" 
Joshua3:9 A Zozoe yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Kolg-y ka n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã goamã.» 
Joshua3:10 A Zozoe yeelame: «Ad bũmb ning sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã sɩd bee ne yãmba, la b na n diga Kana-rãmbã, Hɛt nebã, la Hevi-rãmbã, ne Ferɛɛz-rãmba, la Girgaaz nebã, ne Amoor-dãmbã ne Zebuus nebã tɩ b zoe yãmb taoore." 
Joshua3:11 Ade, dũniyã gill fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã na n lʋɩɩ yãmb taoor n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
Joshua3:12 Moasã, yãk-y raop piig la a yiib Israyɛll buudã sʋka, la buud fãa pʋgẽ yaa rao a yembre." 
Joshua3:13 Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk-b kaoolã koglgã nao sã n tabg Zʋrdẽ koomã pʋga, koomã na n welgame. Koom ning sẽn yit-a zugẽ n watẽ wã na n yalsame n tãoos n kuil yĩngr wa lalga.»" 
Joshua3:14 Nebã sẽn viig b fu-rotã n na n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk-b kaoolã koglgã lʋɩɩ bãmb taoor n kẽnda." 
Joshua3:15 Wakat-kãng rag n yaa bɩle tigsg wakate, tɩ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã koom rag n pid n saale. Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk-b kaoolã koglgã taa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, la b naoã sẽn tabg koomã pʋgã bal yee," 
Joshua3:16 koomã sẽn yit zugẽ n watẽ wã sẽn ta Ãdem sẽn pẽ Sartanã wã yalsame n tãoos n kuil yĩngr n lebg wa lalga. La koom ning sẽn zoet n sigd n dabd Araba ne yamsem ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ wã welg n looga zãnga. La nebã pɩʋʋga kʋɩlgã Zeeriko sẽnẽ n kẽng rʋʋndã. 
Joshua3:17 Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn dag n tʋk Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã yalsa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩl-koɛɛngã tẽn-sʋk n ka serg ye, hal tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa pɩʋʋg kʋɩlgã koɛɛng n looge." 
Joshua4:1 Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n sɛ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa:" 
Joshua4:2 «Yãk raop piig la a yiibu, rao a yembr buud fãa pʋgẽ," 
Joshua4:3 n yeel-b tɩ b wʋk kug piig la a yiib Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tẽn-sʋka, zĩig ningã maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yalsẽ wã, n tall n tɩ rʋʋg zĩig ning yãmb sẽn na n gãand rũndã yʋngã.»" 
Joshua4:4 Dẽ, a Zozoe boola neb piig la a yiibã yẽnda sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b yãk Israyɛll buudã sʋkã, buud fãa pʋgẽ rao a yembrã," 
Joshua4:5 n yeel-b yaa: «Loog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglg taoore, n kẽ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tẽn-sʋka, tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa rɩk kugr n palg a bãoko, tɩ sõorã zems ne Israyɛll buudã sõore." 
Joshua4:6 Woto, bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bãnd sẽn be yãmb sʋka, tɩ yãmb kambã sã n wa sok yãmb tɩ kug-kãensã võor yaa bõe," 
Joshua4:7 bɩ y leok-b yaa: Daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã sẽn wa n na n pɩʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, a koomã welgame. Dẽ, kug-kãensã na n tẽegda Israyɛll nebã bõn-kãng wakat fãa.»" 
Joshua4:8 Israyɛll nebã maana wa a Zozoe sẽn yeelã. Bãmb yãka kug piig la a yiib Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tẽn-sʋka, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Zozoe wã, wa sẽn zems Israyɛll buudã sõore. La b talla kugã n pɩʋʋg kʋɩlgã n tɩ rʋʋg b sikã zĩigẽ." 
Joshua4:9 La a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b vigl kug piig la a yiibã Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tẽn-sʋka, zĩig ning maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk kaoolã koglgã sẽn dag n tab n yasẽ wã, la kug-kãens keta be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua4:10 Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk kaoolã koglgã kell n yalsa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tẽn-sʋka, hal tɩ b maan bũmbã fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Zozoe t'a yeel nebã tɩ b maanã. La kell n yɩɩ wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n wilg a Zozoe wã. Dẽ, nebã rʋʋga kʋɩlgã tao-tao." 
Joshua4:11 La nebã fãa sẽn dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n sɛ, kaoolã koglgã ne maan-kʋʋdbã lʋɩɩ nebã taoore." 
Joshua4:12 A Rubɛn buudã ne a Gaad buudã n paas a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk zãa b zab-teed n lʋɩ Israyɛll nebã taoor wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel-b tɩ b maanã. 
Joshua4:13 Raop sõor sẽn kolg tus pis-naas n bob b zab-teedo, n lʋɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg taoore, n dabd Zeeriko tẽn-nabdrã sẽnẽ." 
Joshua4:14 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Zozoe lebg nin-kãseng Israyɛll nebã nifẽ, la b waoog-a-la wa b sẽn waoog a Moyiis a vɩɩmã tɛkã." 
Joshua4:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: 
Joshua4:16 «Yeel maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk kaoolã koglgã tɩ b yi Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã pʋg n yals yɩnga.» 
Joshua4:17 Dẽ, a Zozoe yeela maan-kʋʋdbã tɩ b yi kʋɩlgã pʋga." 
Joshua4:18 Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋk kaoolã koglgã sẽn yi kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ wã bala, b sẽn yiis b naoã kʋɩlgã pʋgẽ n tabg tẽn-koɛɛngã zugã bal yee, la Zʋrdẽ koomã sẽn leb n sɩng zoees n pid n tãag a kogsã." 
Joshua4:19 Yɩɩ pipi kiuugã rasem piig daare, la Israyɛll nebã rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n tɩ sig Gilgall sẽn be Zeeriko tẽngã yaanga." 
Joshua4:20 Kug piig la a yiibã b sẽn dag n wʋk Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã pʋgã, a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b tu n vigl-b Gilgalle." 
Joshua4:21 A Zozoe yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb kambã sã n wa n sok yãmb nindaare, tɩ kug-kãensã võor yaa bõe," 
Joshua4:22 ad yãmb sẽn na n leok-ba: Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã lebga koɛɛng tɩ Israyɛll nebã pɩʋʋg n looge. 
Joshua4:23 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kʋɩɩsa Zʋrdẽ koomã yãmb yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb tõog n pɩʋʋg wa b sẽn dag n kʋɩɩs mogr miuugã tõnd taoor tɩ tõnd tõog n pɩʋʋgã." 
Joshua4:24 Woto fãa yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ dũniyã rãmb fãa bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara pãnga, la yaa tɩ yãmb me tõe n zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã daar fãa.»" 
Joshua5:1 Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd nin-taoorã, ne Kana rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn be ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ wã sẽn wʋm tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Zʋrdẽ koomã kʋɩ tɩ Israyɛll nebã pɩʋʋgã, rabeem yõk-b lame tɩ b ka leb n tar daood Israyɛll nebã taoor ye." 
Joshua5:2 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Rɩk kug n maan sʋʋse, n leb n kẽes Israyɛll nebã bãongo.»" 
Joshua5:3 A Zozoe rɩka kug n maan sʋʋse, n kẽes Israyɛll nebã bãongo, tãng ning b sẽn boond tɩ bãong kẽoosg tãngã sɛɛga." 
Joshua5:4 Ad bũmb ning sẽn kɩt t'a Zozoe kẽes bãmb bãongã: Yaa tɩ wakat ning nebã fãa sẽn yi Ezɩptã, raop nins fãa sẽn dag n tõe n kẽng zabrã fãa kiime, b sẽn wa n ket n be weoogã pʋg n kẽndã wakate." 
Joshua5:5 Raop nins fãa sẽn dag n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã rag n kẽe bãongo, la neb nins sẽn dog weoogẽ wã wakat ning b sẽn be sorã zug n kẽndã ned ba a yembr ka kẽ bãong ye." 
Joshua5:6 Sɩd me, Israyɛll nebã rag n kẽna yʋʋm pis-naas weoogã pʋga, hal tɩ raop nins fãa sẽn tõe n kẽng zabrã sẽn dag n yi Ezɩpt n yaool n ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã fãa ki. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽena ne bãmb n yeel tɩ bãmb ka na n kɩt tɩ b yãnd tẽng ning bãmb sẽn kãab b yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõ-d lame wã ye. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Joshua5:7 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ bãmb kom-dibli wã led bãmb zĩigẽ n kẽ tẽngẽ wã, la yaa kom-dibl-kãens la a Zozoe sẽn kẽes bãongã. Bala, b rag n nan ka kẽ bãong ye, b sẽn ka tõog n kẽes-b bãongã wakat ning b sẽn be sorã zugã yĩnga." 
Joshua5:8 B sẽn kẽes nebã fãa bãong n sɛ, b kell n paa sikã zĩigẽ hal tɩ b noadã maage." 
Joshua5:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Rũndã, mam yiisa Ezɩpt rãmbã yãnd yãmb zutu.» La b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Gilgalle, la a yʋʋrã kell n paa woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua5:10 Israyɛll nebã siga Gilgalle, n maan Pakã tigr kiuugã rasem piig la a naas daarã zaabre, Araba tẽn-nabdrã sẽn be Zeeriko sẽnẽ wã." 
Joshua5:11 Pakã tigr vẽkembeoogo, badaar bala, Israyɛll nebã rɩɩ tẽngã koodo. Yaa bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle, la bɩle b sẽn kɩɩme." 
Joshua5:12 Bãmb sẽn dɩ tẽngã koodã n sɛ, mandã sẽn dag n dʋʋgdã yalsame. La Israyɛll nebã ka leb n paam mandã ye. Dẽ, bãmb dɩɩ Kana tẽngã bõn-koaadl yʋʋm-kãnga." 
Joshua5:13 Daar a yembre, a Zozoe sẽn kolg Zeeriko tẽngã, n zẽk a neng n getẽ, a yãnda rao sẽn yas yẽnda taoore, n zãad zabr sʋʋga. A Zozoe kẽng n kolg-a lame n sok-a yaa: «Fo bee ne tõnd bɩ f bee ne tõnd bɛɛbã?»" 
Joshua5:14 Raoã leokame: «Mam ka yãmb baa a yembr ned ye, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãb-biisã naaba, mam waa moas-moasã bala.» A Zozoe wõgemdame, n fõgen a neng tẽng n yeele: «M Zu-soaba y yeta y tʋmtʋmda t'a maan bõe?»" 
Joshua5:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãb-biisã naab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Piid f neooda wã, bala, zĩig ning fo sẽn yasã welga toor n yaa zĩ-sõngo.» La a Zozoe maana wa b sẽn yeelã." 
Joshua6:1 Israyɛll nebã yĩng kɩtame tɩ Zeeriko nebã pag b tẽngã kʋɩlems sõama. Ned ka yita, la ned ka kẽed me ye." 
Joshua6:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Gese, mam ningda Zeeriko ne a rĩmã ne a gãndaadã fãa fo nugẽ." 
Joshua6:3 Foom ne f tãb-biisã na n gilga tẽngã vugr daar fãa hal tɩ ta rasem a yoobe. 
Joshua6:4 Gilgrã wakate, bɩ maan-kʋʋdb a yopoe zã bard a yopoe sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla, n lʋɩ kaoolã koglgã taoore. Rasem a yopoe wã daare, bɩ y gilg tẽngã naoor a yopoe, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã peeb bardã." 
Joshua6:5 La yãmb sã n wʋm baorgã peebg rãamde, bɩ nebã fãa zẽk b koees n kaas ne koe-kãsenga. La wakat-kãng bala, tẽngã lalg na n sirgame n lʋɩ a toore, la ned kam fãa na n kell n tũu zĩig ning a sẽn beẽ wã n kẽ.»" 
Joshua6:6 A Nun biig a Zozoe boola maan-kʋʋdbã n yeel-b yaa: «Bɩ y tʋk kaoolã koglgã, tɩ maan-kʋʋdb a yopoe zã bard a yopoe sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla, n lʋɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã taoore.»" 
Joshua6:7 Dẽ, a Zozoe yeela nebã yaa: «Kẽng-y-yã, gilg-y tẽngã, la bɩ tãb-biis nins sẽn tog n lʋɩ taoorã lʋɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg taoore.»" 
Joshua6:8 B maana bũmbã fãa wa a Zozoe sẽn yeel tɩ b maanã: Maan-kʋʋdb a yopoe wã sẽn dag n zãad bard a yopoe sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩlã lʋɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã taoor n kẽnd la b peebd bardã. 
Joshua6:9 Tãb-biis nins sẽn tog n lʋɩ-b taoorã rag n bee maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn peebd bardã taoore, tɩ tãb-biis nins sẽn tog n pa poorẽ wã pʋgd kaoolã koglgã. La nebã rag n tũuda bardã peebg n kẽnda." 
Joshua6:10 A Zozoe rag n yeela nebã a woto: «Da kaas-y ye, la ra zẽk-y y koɛɛg tɩ ned wʋm ye, la da sak-y tɩ gomd ba a yembr yi yãmb noorẽ ye, hal tɩ ta daar ning mam sẽn na n yeel yãmb tɩ y zẽk y koees n kaasã, tɩ y yaool n kaase.»" 
Joshua6:11 B talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg n gilg tẽngã, b gilg-a-la vugr n sege, la b lebg n leb sikã zĩigẽ n tɩ gãand yʋn-kãnga." 
Joshua6:12 A Zozoe sãda beoogo, la maan-kʋʋdbã tʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã." 
Joshua6:13 Maan-kʋʋdb a yopoe wã sẽn zãad bard a yopoe sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩl n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg taoorã sɩnga kẽna, la b peebd bardã. Tãb-biis nins sẽn tog n be taoorã lʋɩ bãmb taoore, tɩ tãb-biis nins sẽn tog n pa poorẽ wã pʋgd Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgo. Bardã rag n peebdame tɩ nebã kẽnda." 
Joshua6:14 Rasem a yiibã daare, b gilga tẽngã vugr bala, la b lebg n leb sik zĩigẽ wã. B maana a woto rasem a yoobã tõre." 
Joshua6:15 La rasem a yopoe wã daare, b sãda beoogo, n gilg tẽngã wa b sẽn sɩng n maandẽ wã, n gilg-a naoor a yopoe n sege. Yaa badaar bal la b gilg tẽngã naoor a yopoe." 
Joshua6:16 La gilgr a yopoe soabã sẽn pidi, maan-kʋʋdbã peeba bardã, la a Zozoe yeela nebã: «Kaas-y zabr kaasgo, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo yãmb tẽngã." 
Joshua6:17 Tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so, la b segd n sãam-b lame. Yaa pʋg-yoodr a Rahaab ne neb nins sẽn be yẽnda roogẽ wã bal n na n põse. Bala, yẽnda solga neb nins tõnd sẽn dag n tʋmã." 
Joshua6:18 La bɩ ned kam fãa gũus n da sɩɩs bũmb ning b sẽn segd n sãamã ye, tɩ b sẽn segd n sãam-bã, bɩ ned da rɩk b bũmb ye. Ned sã n maan woto, a na n waa ne kãab-wẽng ne zũnglug Israyɛll tãb-biisã zugu." 
Joshua6:19 La wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn maan ne zũudu, la kutã fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so. B tog n naag-b-la Sẽn-Ka-Saab laog bĩngr zĩigẽ.»" 
Joshua6:20 Bardã sẽn peebã, nebã kaasa zabr kaasgo. Nebã sẽn wʋm bardã peebgã, b kaasa ne pãnga, la lalgã lʋɩ a toor bala, la nebã wudg n kẽe tẽngã. Ned kam fãa kell n tũ a sẽn dag n be zĩig ningã n kẽ. La b reega tẽngã." 
Joshua6:21 Bãmb sãama bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgã. Bãmb kʋʋ raopã, pagbã, kambã la nin-kẽembã, la b kʋ niigã, piisã la bõensã fãa ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Joshua6:22 A Zozoe rag n yeela neb a yiib nins sẽn tɩ gũus tẽngã yaa: «Kẽng-y pʋg-yoodrã roogẽ n tɩ yiis-a ne bũmb nins yẽnda sẽn so wã, wa yãmb sẽn dag n pʋlem ne yẽnda to-to wã.»" 
Joshua6:23 Dẽ, kom-bɩɩs a yiibã sẽn dag n tɩ gũus tẽngã kẽng n tɩ yiisa a Rahaabe, a ba wã, a ma wã ne a kẽem dãmbã ne a yaopã la bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn so wã. La b yiisa a Rahaab roagdbã fãa, n tall-b n zãag ne Israyɛll nebã tãb-biisã zĩiga, tɩ bũmb ka tõe n maan-b ye." 
Joshua6:24 B yõoga tẽngã bugum ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã. Yaa wanzuri wã, sãnemã la bũmb nins sẽn maan ne zũudu, la kutã bal la b tall n tɩ ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ." 
Joshua6:25 La pʋg-yoodr a Rahaab ne a buudã, ne neb nins sẽn yaa yẽnda nebã, a Zozoe bas-b lame n ka kʋ ye. La a Rahaab kell n paa ne Israyɛll nebã n tãag rũndã. Yẽnda sẽn dag n solg neb nins a Zozoe sẽn dag n tʋm tɩ b tɩ gũus Zeeriko tẽngã yĩnga." 
Joshua6:26 Wakat-kãnga, a Zozoe kãabame n yeele: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kãab-wẽng zĩnd ned ning sẽn na n bao tɩ lebs n me Zeeriko tẽngã zugu. Tẽngã lalg yẽbgre, a pipi bi-riblã na n kiime, la tẽngã kʋɩlems ningr wakat na n yɩ a bɩ-yao-zʋʋgã kũum.»" 
Joshua6:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Zozoe, n kɩtdẽ t'a yʋʋrã saagd tẽngã fãa." 
Joshua7:1 La wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã beega Wẽnnaam, n sɩɩs bũmb ning sẽn kisã: A Zeera biig a Zabdi biig a Karmi biig a Akã sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã nedã yãka teed nins sẽn yaa kisgã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne Israyɛll nebã." 
Joshua7:2 A Zozoe zĩnda Zeeriko n tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng Ayi sẽn pẽ ne Bɛt Avɛn sẽn be Betɛll tẽngã yaangã. A yeel-b lame yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ soos-y n ges-y tẽngã.» La bãmb kẽng n tɩ gesa Ayi," 
Joshua7:3 n lebg n wa a Zozoe nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «Ka tɩlɛ tɩ tãb-biisã fãa kẽng Ayi ye. Neb tus a yi, wall tus a tãab bal tõe n tõoga Ayi. Da nams-y nebã fãa zab-kãngã yĩng ye. Ayi tẽngã nebã sõor ka waoog ye.»" 
Joshua7:4 Dẽ, yɩɩ neb tus a tãab n yi Israyɛll nebã sʋk n na n tɩ zab ne Ayi nebã, la Ayi rãmbã riga Israyɛll nebã tɩ b zoe." 
Joshua7:5 Ayi rãmbã kʋʋ Israyɛll neb sẽn kolg pis-tã la a yoobe. Bãmb diga Israyɛll nebã sẽn sɩng ne tẽngã noor n tɩ ta Sebarim. La yaa tãngã sigdgẽ la b kʋ Israyɛll nebã. Rabeem yõka Israyɛll nebã tɩ b gĩinã maage. 
Joshua7:6 A Zozoe sũurã sãamame t'a kẽes a futu, n wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã taoor n pa be tɩ ta zaabre, yẽnda ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã. La b yuga b zut tom." 
Joshua7:7 A Zozoe yeelame yaa: «Kayto, m Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tall y nebã n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n yaool n na n bas tɩ Amoor-dãmbã sãam-do? Tõnd sã n dag n yãkẽ yam n paẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd n são." 
Joshua7:8 Mam Zu-soaba, Israyɛll bɛɛbã sẽn dig-b tɩ b zoe wã, mam na n yeelame tɩ bõe moasã?" 
Joshua7:9 Kana nebã ne tẽngã neb a taabã sã n wʋm yõwã, b na n yik n gũbga tõndo, n kɩt tɩ tõnd yʋʋrã menem dũniyã zugu. Wakat-kãngã, yãmb na n maana bõe tɩ b bãng tɩ y yʋʋrã yaa kãsenga?»" 
Joshua7:10 Wẽnnaam yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Yiki! Yaa bõe tɩ f fõgend f neng tẽnga? 
Joshua7:11 Israyɛll nebã beegame. Bãmb sãama kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne bãmbã. Bãmb yãka bũmb ning sẽn yaa kisgã. B zuk-a lame n solge, b bĩng-a-la b teedã pʋga." 
Joshua7:12 Rẽ wã yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã kõn tol n tõog n yals n zab ne b bɛɛbã ye. Bãmb bɛɛbã na n dig-b lame tɩ b zoe, bala kãab-wẽngã bee b zutu. Yãmb sã n ka menes bũmb ning sẽn yaa kisgã yãmb sʋka, mam ka na n leb n zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye." 
Joshua7:13 Yik n yɩlg nebã la f yeel-b tɩ b maneg b mense, n yɩ yɩlma beoog yibeoogo, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Israyɛll nebã, bũmb ning sẽn kisã bee yãmb sʋka. Yãmb sã n ka yiis bũmb ning sẽn kisã yãmb sʋka, yãmb kõn tol n tõog n yals y bɛɛb taoor ye." 
Joshua7:14 Rẽ wã, beoog yibeoogo, yãmb na n waa mam nengẽ buud-buudu, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wilg sẽn yaa buud ninga, bɩ bu-kãng rãmb kolg roog-roogo, la roog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã na n kolga zak-zaka, tɩ zak ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã neb wa yembr-yembre." 
Joshua7:15 La b sẽn na n yãk ned ning n wilg tɩ yaa yẽnda n wa ne kãab-wẽngã, b na n yõog-a-la bugum, yẽnda ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn so wã. Bala, a kɩɩsa kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kãabã, n maan sẽn kisi, n wa ne yell Israyɛll zugu.»" 
Joshua7:16 A Zozoe sãda yibeoog pĩnda, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã kolg buud-buudu. La b yãka a Zʋʋda buudã." 
Joshua7:17 Dẽ, a kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda buudã kolg roog-roogo. La b yãka a Zeera roogã. Rẽ poore, a kɩtame t'a Zeera roogã zak fãa kolge. Dẽ, b yãka a Zabdi zakã." 
Joshua7:18 B kɩtame t'a Zabdi zakã rãmb kolg yembr-yembre, la poeerã yõka a Akã sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã nedã. A Akã yaa a Zeera biig a Zabdi biig a Karmi biigã." 
Joshua7:19 A Zozoe yeela a Akã yaa: «M biiga, zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã la f togs sɩda. Togs maam fo sẽn maan bũmb ninga, la f ra solg maam ye.»" 
Joshua7:20 A Akã leoka a Zozoe n yeele: «Yaa sɩda, yaa maam n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. Ad bũmb ning mam sẽn maanã:" 
Joshua7:21 Mam gesa te-zɛɛdmã pʋga, n yãnd Mezopotami kobr sẽn yaa neer wʋsgo, n paas ne wanzuri ligd kobs-yi, ne sãnem-giulg sẽn kolg kɩlo a yembre. B bõnã yõka maam wʋsgo, la m dɩk-b lame. B bee bok pʋga, mam fu-roogẽ wã, tɩ wanzuri wã be tẽngre.»" 
Joshua7:22 A Zozoe tʋma neb tɩ b zoe n kẽng fu-roogẽ wã. La b tɩ mika teedã sẽn solg beenẽ, tɩ wanzuri wã be tẽngre." 
Joshua7:23 Bãmb dɩka te-kãens fãa n yi fu-roogẽ wã n tall n wa a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa nengẽ, la b rʋʋga teedã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Joshua7:24 A Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Zeera biig a Akã, la b wʋk wanzuri wã, la kobrã ne sãnem giulgã, la b yõg yẽnda kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã, la a niigã, ne a bõensã, n paas a rũm-bãoonegã ne a fu-roogã, la a sẽn so wã fãa. La Israyɛll nebã naaga a Zozoe tɩ b tall-b n kẽng Akoor tãngã longẽ." 
Joshua7:25 A Zozoe yeela a Akã yaa: «Gese, fo kɩtame tɩ tõnd paam toogo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ fo me paam toog rũndã.» Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa loba bãmb kug tɩ b ki. La b yõoga bãmb bugum, la b lob bãmb kuga." 
Joshua7:26 La b wʋka kug n zam a Akã zugu, la kug-rʋrã ket n beeme hal tɩ ta rũndã. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sigame. Yaa rẽnda yĩng n kɩt tɩ b ket n boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Akoore, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹toog tãn-long› hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua8:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Da zoe rabeem ye, la ra yɛɛs ye. Peeg f tãb-biisã fãa, n yik n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Ayi. Gese, mam dɩka Ayi rĩmã ne a nebã, la a tẽngã ne a soolmã n ning fo nugẽ." 
Joshua8:2 Fo sẽn maan Zeeriko ne a rĩmã to-to wã, f na n maana Ayi ne a rĩmã me a woto. La y sã n tõog tẽngã, bɩ y wʋk te-zɛɛdmã ne rũmsã n sooge. Bɩ f yãk tãb-biis n tʋm tɩ b tɩ soond Ayi tẽngã poore.»" 
Joshua8:3 A Zozoe yika ne a tãb-biisã fãa n na n tɩ zab ne Ayi. A Zozoe yãka tãb-biis sẽn yaa gãndaad tus a tãabo, n tʋm bãmb ne yʋngo." 
Joshua8:4 La a Zozoe yeel-b lame yaa: «Kelg-y-yã, yãmb na n kẽnga tẽngã poor n tɩ soonde. Da zãag-y ne tẽngã wʋsg ye. La y segl y mens n gũudẽ." 
Joshua8:5 La maam ne neb nins fãa sẽn be ne maamã, na n kolga tẽngã. La wakat ning b sẽn wat n yi n na n seg tõnd wa b sẽn maan pĩndã, d na n lebgame n zoetẽ tɩ b rigd tõndo." 
Joshua8:6 B na n yiime n digd tõndo, la tõnd na n maana a woto hal n tall-b n zãag ne tẽngã. Bala, b na n yeelame: Tõnd digd-b lame tɩ b zoet wa pĩndã. La tõnd sẽn ket n zoetã wakate," 
Joshua8:7 bɩ y yi n kẽ tẽngã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog-a. 
Joshua8:8 Yãmb sã n ta tẽngã, bɩ y yõog-a bugum. Maan-y wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Gũus-y y mens n maan wa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã.»" 
Joshua8:9 A Zozoe yeela bãmb tɩ b kẽnge. La bãmb kẽng n tɩ soonda Betɛll ne Ayi sʋka, Ayi tẽngã nin-taoore. A Zozoe kell n paa nebã sʋk yʋn-kãnga." 
Joshua8:10 A Zozoe yika yibeoog pĩnd n saag n ges nebã. La yẽnda ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã lʋɩɩ nebã taoor n na n tɩ zab ne Ayi. 
Joshua8:11 A Zozoe ne tãb-biisã fãa kẽngame n kolg Ayi tẽngã. La bãmb sẽn pẽneg tẽngã, bãmb tilga b tãb-sikã Ayi tẽngã rɩtgo. Long n dag n be bãmb ne Ayi tẽngã sʋka." 
Joshua8:12 A Zozoe yãka raop sẽn kolg tus a nu n kɩt tɩ b kẽng n tɩ soond Betɛll ne Ayi sʋka, Ayi tẽngã nin-taoore." 
Joshua8:13 Tãb-biisã sẽn tilg b tãb-sikã n sɛ, tɩ sẽn nan wa-bã be tẽngã rɩtgo, tɩ sẽn nan na n wa sõng-bã be tẽngã nin-taoorã, a Zozoe paa nebã sʋk yʋn-kãnga, longã pʋga." 
Joshua8:14 Dẽ, Ayi rĩmã sẽn yã woto, yẽnda ne a nebã fãa yika tao-tao n yi n na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã tãngã sigdg sẽn be Araba tẽn-nabdrã neng taoorã. La Ayi rĩmã rag n ka mi tɩ neb n solg tẽngã nin-taoor ye." 
Joshua8:15 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã basame tɩ Ayi nebã rigd-b tɩ b zoet n teesd weoogã sẽnẽ. 
Joshua8:16 B wẽe kũng tɩ Ayi nebã fãa yi n na n dig Israyɛll nebã. Bãmb diga a Zozoe rãmb n zãag ne tẽngã. 
Joshua8:17 Ned ka kell Ayi ne Betɛll tẽngã sẽn ka yi n na n dig Israyɛll nebã ye. La b basa b tẽngã noy vɩɩdo, n ka page, n na n zoe n babs Israyɛll nebã." 
Joshua8:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Rɩk f kãn-dibgã sẽn be fo nugẽ wã n tees Ayi. Bala, mam kɩtame tɩ f na n tõog tẽngã.» A Zozoe tẽega kãnda sẽn dag n be yẽnda nugẽ wã, n tees Ayi tẽngã." 
Joshua8:19 Wakat-kãng bala, neb nins sẽn dag n soondã yii soondgã zĩigẽ tao-tao n zoe n kẽ tẽngã n yãmbe, n ning-a bugum." 
Joshua8:20 La Ayi nebã sẽn wẽnemd n ges poorẽ, bõe la wã. B yãnda b tẽngã bug-zõos sẽn zẽkd n kuiis yĩngri. La b ned kam fãa gĩin maagame, la bãmb ka tar sẽn zoet n kẽ zĩig ning ye. La Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n zoet n teesd weoogã sẽnẽ wã wẽnemdame n zab ne sẽn digd-b bãmbã." 
Joshua8:21 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yã tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n soondã tõoga tẽngã t'a bug-zõosã zẽkd n kuiis yĩngrã, b wẽnemdame n zab ne Ayi nebã." 
Joshua8:22 Israyɛll neb a taabã yii tẽngẽ wã n seg bãmba, la Israyɛll nebã gũbga Ayi nebã zĩigã fãa tɩ b be sʋka. Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ bãmb tɩ ned ba a yembr ka põs ye." 
Joshua8:23 La b yõka Ayi rĩmã vɩɩg n tall-a n kẽng a Zozoe nengẽ. 
Joshua8:24 Israyɛll nebã sẽn kʋ Ayi tẽngã neb nins sẽn dag n digd bãmb n teesd weoogẽ wã, n ka bas tɩ Ayi ned ba a yembr põsã, Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n kẽe Ayi tẽngã n kʋ neb nins sẽn ketã ne zabr sʋʋse." 
Joshua8:25 Neb nins sẽn ki badaarã sõor yaa neb tus piig la a yiibu, pagbã ne raopã sẽn naag taaba. Yaa Ayi nebã fãa." 
Joshua8:26 A Zozoe kell n tẽega a nugã ne kãn-dibgã hal tɩ b kʋ Ayi nebã fãa zãng n sɛ. 
Joshua8:27 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã wʋka tẽngã te-zɛɛdmã ne rũmsã n soog wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Zozoe wã." 
Joshua8:28 A Zozoe yõoga Ayi tẽngã bugum n kɩt t'a lebg raboog hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
Joshua8:29 B luula Ayi rĩmã tɩɩg zugu, la b bas-a-la beenẽ hal tɩ ta zaabre. La wĩndgã sẽn kẽ, a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b sik kũumã tɩɩgã zugu, n tɩ lob tẽngã noore. La b zama kug a zugu, la kugã keta beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua8:30 Dẽ, a Zozoe mee tẽn-kugr Eball tãngã zug n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
Joshua8:31 Yẽnda mee tẽn-kugrã wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel Israyɛll nebã tɩ be a Moyiis tõodã sebr pʋgẽ wã: Yaa tẽn-kugr sẽn maan ne kug-mum kut sẽn nan ka tol n sɩɩs-b ye. La b maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum zãng tẽn-kugrã zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b maan zems-n-taar maand beenẽ." 
Joshua8:32 La a Zozoe yalsa Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ n gʋls tõod nins a Moyiis sẽn dag n gʋlsã kugã zutu. 
Joshua8:33 Israyɛll nebã ne b kãsem-dãmbã ne b gʋlsdbã, la b bʋ-kaoodbã, ne nebã fãa, la tẽng-n-dãmbã ne sãambã fãa yalsame n gũbg tɩ b nensã tees kaoolã koglgã. B fãa nensã dag n teesa a Leevi buudã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tʋk Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã. Pʋɩ-sʋk rag n yasa Garizim tãngã sẽnẽ tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk yas Eball tãngã kɩreng sẽnẽ. La bũmbã fãa maana wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b maanã, la b ninga Israyɛll nebã barka." 
Joshua8:34 Rẽ zugẽ, a Zozoe karma tõodã koees gilli, kãab-noodã la kãab-wẽnsã, wa sẽn gʋls tɩ be tõodã sebr pʋgẽ wã." 
Joshua8:35 A Zozoe karma bũmb nins fãa a Moyiis sẽn dag n gʋlsã, Israyɛll nebã ne b pagbã la b kambã ne bu-zẽmsã sẽn dag n be bãmb sʋkã nifẽ, n ka kell bũmb ye." 
Joshua9:1 Rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd ne sẽn be-b tãmsã sʋkã, la kunkubã sʋkã ne ko-kãsengã noorã hal n tall n tɩ tãag Libã wã, sẽn yaa Hɛt ne Amoor la Kana-rãmbã, ne Ferɛɛz la Hevi ne Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn wʋm tɩ Israyɛll nebã sãama Ayi tẽngã," 
Joshua9:2 bãmb lagma taab n dat n zab ne a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã. 
Joshua9:3 Gabawõ nebã me wʋma a Zozoe sẽn maan Zeeriko ne Ayi bũmb ningã. 
Joshua9:4 Gabawõ nebã maana yam n bao neb tɩ b rɩk yol-kʋd n zɩlg b bõensã, la b bao ko-wao-kʋd sẽn pãrs tɩ b maneg n sẽ." 
Joshua9:5 Bãmb dag n wida neood-zagd b sẽn maneg n zape, la b yeelg fu-kʋɩdse. La burã b sẽn dag n zãadã yaa bur-koeems sẽn kao-kao." 
Joshua9:6 Bãmb kẽnga a Zozoe nengẽ, b sikã zĩigẽ Gilgalle, n tɩ yeel a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Tõnd yii tẽng sẽn zãre, n wa ka. La d kota yãmb tɩ y maan kaool ne tõndo.»" 
Joshua9:7 La Israyɛll nebã yeela Hevi-rãmba yaa: «Tõeeme tɩ yãmb yaa tõnd yagse. Dẽ, tõnd na n maana a wãn n maan kaool ne yãmba?»" 
Joshua9:8 La bãmb yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba.» La a Zozoe leok-b lame n yeele: «Yãmb yaa ãnda rãmba, la yãmb yita yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Joshua9:9 Bãmb leoka a Zozoe yaa: «Tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba, d yii tẽng sẽn zãra, bala, d wʋmame tɩ b gomd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kibare. Tõnd wʋma bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maan Ezɩptã." 
Joshua9:10 Tõnd wʋma bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn maan Amoor dãmbã rĩm-dãmb a yiibã Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. Yaa a Sɩhon sẽn yaa Hɛsbon rĩmã, la a Oog sẽn yaa Basan rĩm n be Astarotã." 
Joshua9:11 Tõnd nin-kẽembã ne tõnd tẽngã neb yeela tõnd tɩ d zã rɩɩb d kẽndã yĩnga, n wa yãmb nengẽ n wa yeel-y yaa: Tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba. Moasã, bɩ y maan kaool ne tõndo." 
Joshua9:12 Ges-y tõnd burã. Tõnd sẽn wa n yit yir n na n wa yãmb nengẽ wã, rẽ t'a ket n yaa tʋʋlga. La moasã, a kʋɩɩ fasɩ n lebg gɩrse." 
Joshua9:13 Ko-wao-bãmbã yãmb sẽn ne wã, tõnd sẽn wa n suiid-b dɩvẽ wã, rẽ tɩ b yaa paala, la moasã, b pãrsame. Tõnd futã ne d neooda wã yãmb sẽn ne tɩ sãama zãngã, yaa sorã sẽn yaa wokã yĩnga.»" 
Joshua9:14 Israyɛll nebã reega Gabawõ nebã rɩɩbã n ka bao n na n sok Wẽnnaam n ges ye. 
Joshua9:15 A Zozoe maana laafɩ kaool ne bãmb n yeel-b tɩ b kẽng tɩ bãmb kõn sak tɩ bũmb sɩɩs-b ye. La Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã me wẽena a woto. 
Joshua9:16 La bãmb sẽn wẽen ne bãmb tɩ rab-tãtẽ, Israyɛll nebã wʋmame tɩ neb nins sẽn wa bãmb nengẽ wã yaa bãmb yags sẽn pẽ bãmb be bala." 
Joshua9:17 Israyɛll nebã n yikame na n kẽng b tẽngẽ wã, la b taa beenẽ rasem a tãab pʋgẽ. Tẽn-kãens la woto: Yaa Gabawõ, Kefira, Beerote la Kiryat-Yeyarim." 
Joshua9:18 Israyɛll nebã ka kʋ-b ye, kãsem-dãmbã sẽn dag n maan kaool ne bãmb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã yĩnga. La nebã fãa yẽgma ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã." 
Joshua9:19 La kãsem-dãmbã yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Tõnd maana kaool ne bãmba, ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre. Dẽ wã, tõnd ka leb n tõe n sɩɩs-b ye." 
Joshua9:20 Ad tõnd sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Tõnd na n bas-b lame tɩ b vɩɩmde, n da wa kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugr sig d mens zutu, wẽeneg ning tõnd sẽn wẽen ne bãmbã yĩng ye.»" 
Joshua9:21 Israyɛll nanambsã yeela nebã yaa: «Bas-y-b tɩ b vɩɩmde! La bãmb na n wesda raado, la b wiid koom n kõt nebã fãa.» La nebã saka nanambsã sẽn yeel bũmb ningã." 
Joshua9:22 A Zozoe bool-b lame n sok a woto: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tudg tõnd n yeel tɩ yãmb yii tẽng sẽn zãre, n mik tɩ yãmb wẽneg n bee ne tõnd ka bala?" 
Joshua9:23 Moasã, kãab-wẽng bee yãmb zutu. Rũndã tɛka, yãmb na n lebga tõnd yembse. Yãmb n na n wesd raadã la y wiid koom mam Wẽnnaamã roog yĩnga.»" 
Joshua9:24 Bãmb leoka a Zozoe n yeel-a yaa: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã wʋma bũmb nins fãa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis tɩ b na n menesa tẽn-kãngã nebã fãa la b reeg tẽngã n kõ yãmbã. Yãmb rabeem yõka tõnd wʋsgo, tɩ d baood n fãag d vɩɩm. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ d maan a woto." 
Joshua9:25 Moasã, tõnd bee yãmb nugẽ. Maan-y tõnd wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn tog n maan-do.»" 
Joshua9:26 Ad bũmb nins a Zozoe sẽn maan-ba: Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b põs Israyɛll nebã nusẽ tɩ b ka kʋ-b ye. 
Joshua9:27 La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b kɛɛd raado la b toogd koom nebã yĩnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã yĩnga, zĩig ning b sẽn yãk n na n zĩndã hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua10:1 Zeruzalɛm dĩm a Adoni-Sedɛk wʋmame t'a Zozoe tõoga Ayi n sãam-a zãnga, n menes-a ne a rĩmã wa a sẽn dag n maan Zeeriko ne a rĩmã to-to wã. A leb n wʋmame tɩ Gabawõ nebã yõga zood ne Israyɛll nebã n vɩ b sʋka." 
Joshua10:2 Dẽ, rabeem-kãseng yõka yẽnda, bala, Gabawõ rag n yaa tẽn-kãseng wa rĩm-dãmb tẽmse. A rag n yaa tẽn-kãseng n yɩɩd Ayi tẽngã menga, la a nebã fãa yaa nin-wobdo." 
Joshua10:3 Zeruzalɛm dĩm a Adoni Sedɛk yeela Ebrõ rĩm a Hokam ne Yarmut rĩm a Piram, ne Lakiis rĩm a Yafiya, ne Eglõ rĩm a Debɩɩr yaa:" 
Joshua10:4 «Wa-y n sõng-y maam tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zab ne Gabawõ nebã, bala, b kẽng n tɩ yõga zood ne a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã.»" 
Joshua10:5 Dẽ, Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmb a nu wã lagma taaba: Yaa Zeruzalɛm dĩmã, Ebrõ rĩmã, Yarmut rĩmã, Lakiis rĩmã, ne Eglõ rĩmã. Bãmb yii ne b tãb-biisã fãa n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã Gabawõ tẽngã noor n na n zab ne-ba." 
Joshua10:6 La Gabawõ nebã tʋmame tɩ b kẽng sikã zĩigẽ Gilgall n tɩ yeel a Zozoe yaa: «Da bas-y y tʋmtʋmdbã ye. Wa-y tao-tao n wa fãag-do, sõng-y-do. Bala, Amoor-dãmbã rĩm-dãmbã fãa sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã tigma taab n dat n zab ne tõndo.»" 
Joshua10:7 A Zozoe yii Gilgall ne a tãb-biisã fãa, ne yẽnda gãndaadã n tũ taab n kẽnge." 
Joshua10:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Ra zoe-b lɛlɛ ye. Bala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog-ba, la b ned ba a ye kõn tol n tõog n teeg a yãoog fo taoor ye.»" 
Joshua10:9 A Zozoe yii Gilgall n kẽn yʋngã tõre. La a tɩ ling-b lame. 
Joshua10:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã rig-b tɩ b zoe. Bãmb tõog-b-la ne pãng Gabawõ sɛɛga, la b rig-b lame n dɩk sor ning sẽn teesd Bɛt-Horon tãngã rʋʋdgã, n kʋ-b hal n tɩ ta Azɛka ne Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n digd Amoor-dãmbã tɩ b zoetẽ wã, b sẽn wa n ta Bɛt-Horon tãngã sigdgã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sapɩlem bɛd-bɛd yi yĩngr n lʋɩ n pãb bãmb n tɩ tãag Azɛka, la b kiime. Neb nins sapɩlmã sẽn kʋ wã sõor yɩɩda Israyɛll nebã sẽn kʋ-b rãmb ne zabr sʋʋgã." 
Joshua10:12 Dẽ, daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog Amoor-dãmbã, a Zozoe goma ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab Israyɛll nebã nifẽ n yeel yaa: «Wĩntoogã, yals Gabawõ zugẽ! Kiuugã, fo me yals Ayalõ longẽ wã.»" 
Joshua10:13 La wĩntoogã ka serg a zĩigẽ ye, la kiuugã me yalsame, hal tɩ nebã rok b sũur ne b bɛɛbã. B gʋlsa a woto nin-tɩrg sebrẽ wã: Wĩntoogã yalsa sa-gãongã sʋk n kaoos sẽn kolg daar tõre, n ka kẽ ye." 
Joshua10:14 Daar sẽn wẽnd woto dag n nan zɩ n zĩnd ye. A buud ka zĩnd sẽn deng rẽndã, wall rẽ loogr poore, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sak ninsaal noor a woto ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n zabd n sõngd Israyɛll nebã." 
Joshua10:15 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n leba b sikã zĩigẽ Gilgalle. 
Joshua10:16 La mikame tɩ rĩm-dãmb a nu wã zoeeme n tɩ soond tãng bokẽ Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 B tɩ togsa a Zozoe tɩ rĩm-dãmb a nu wã tɩ soonda tãng bokẽ Makeda. 
Joshua10:18 A Zozoe yeelame: «Bilm-y kug-bɛd n pag bokã noore, la y yãk neb n ning be tɩ b gũ-a." 
Joshua10:19 La bɩ yãmb da yals ye. Pʋgl-y y bɛɛbã, n gɩdg-ba, tɩ b ra tõog n kẽ b tẽmsẽ wã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ning-b-la yãmb nusẽ.»" 
Joshua10:20 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã zaba ne pãng hal n tõog n kʋ-b zãnga. La ned ka kell ye. Yaa neb kẽer sẽn zoe n paam n tɩ kẽ tẽms sẽn gũbg ne lalsã pʋgã bal n põse. 
Joshua10:21 Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n wa a Zozoe nengẽ Makeda sik zĩigẽ wã ne laafɩ, tɩ ned baa a yembr ka saag n gom Israyɛll nebã wẽng ye." 
Joshua10:22 A Zozoe yeelame yaa: «Pak-y tãngã bok noor n yiis rĩm-dãmb a nu wã n wa kõ-ma.» 
Joshua10:23 Woto, b yiisa rĩm-dãmb a nu wã tãngã bokẽ n tɩ kɩs a Zozoe. Yaa Zeruzalɛm dĩmã, Ebrõ rĩmã, Yamut rĩmã, Layiis rĩmã ne Eglõ rĩmã." 
Joshua10:24 La b sẽn yiis rĩm-dãmb a nu wã n tall-b n kẽngã, yẽnda boola Israyɛll nebã fãa, n yeel tãb-biis nanambs nins sẽn dag n tũ yẽnda wã yaa: «Kolg-y-yã! Tabg-y nanambs a nu wã yubli ne y naoore.» B kolgame n tabg b yubli wã." 
Joshua10:25 La a Zozoe yeela bãmb yaa: «Da zoe-y rabeem la y ra yɛɛs ye! Keng-y y mense, la y paam raoodo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana yãmb bɛɛb nins fãa y sẽn zab ne wã a woto.»" 
Joshua10:26 Dẽ poore, a Zozoe kʋʋ rĩm-dãmbã. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b luul-b tɩɩs a nu zutu, la b bas-b-la tɩɩsã zut hal tɩ ta zaabre." 
Joshua10:27 Wĩndgã sẽn wa n kolg kõom, a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ b sik-b tɩɩsã zutu, n tall b kũumã n tɩ lob bok ning bãmb sẽn dag n zoe n tɩ soondã pʋga, n bilim kug-bɛd n pag bokã noore. La kugã ket n bee be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua10:28 Badaar bala, a Zozoe tõoga Makeda tẽngã, n kʋ a nebã ne b rĩmã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yẽnda kʋʋ nebã fãa ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgẽ be wã, n ka bas tɩ ned ba a yembr põs ye. Yẽnda maana Makeda rĩmã wa yẽnda sẽn dag n maan Zeeriko rĩmã to-to wã." 
Joshua10:29 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã tũu taab n kẽng Libna n tɩ zab ne Libna nebã. 
Joshua10:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog Libna nebã ne b rĩmã n kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋga, la b kʋ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽn-kãngã fãa. Bãmb ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye. Yẽnda maana Libna rĩmã wa yẽnda sẽn dag n maan Zeeriko rĩmã to-to wã." 
Joshua10:31 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã tũu taab n yi Libna n kẽng Lakiisi. Bãmb tɩ tilga b sik zĩigã Lakiis neng-taoorã n na n zab ne-a. 
Joshua10:32 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga Lakiis Israyɛll nebã nugẽ n kɩt tɩ b tõog-a rasem a yiibã daare, n kʋ b nebã fãa, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽnga pʋgã ne zabr sʋʋga, wa bãmb sẽn dag n maan Libna to-to wã." 
Joshua10:33 La Gezɛɛr rĩm a Horam yikame n na n sõng Lakiis rĩmã. La a Zozoe kʋʋ yẽnda ne a nebã zãnga, n ka bas tɩ ned baa a yembr põs ye." 
Joshua10:34 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã tũu taab n yi Lakiis n kẽng Eglõ. Bãmb tɩ tilga b sik zĩigã Eglõ neng-taoorã n na n zab ne-a. 
Joshua10:35 La b tõoga Eglõ badaar bala, n kʋ a nebã ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgã ne zabr sʋʋga. A Zozoe sãama tẽngã zãng badaar wa a sẽn dag n maan Lakiis to-to wã." 
Joshua10:36 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã fãa tũu taab n yi Ɛglõ n kẽng Ebrõ n tɩ zab ne-a. 
Joshua10:37 Bãmb tõog-a lame n kʋ a nebã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yẽnda kʋʋ tẽngã nebã, ne a rĩmã, la b sãam a tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn gũbg-a wã fãa. La b kʋ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽn-kãng pʋgã, wa b sẽn maan Eglõ to-to wã. A Zozoe ka bas ned baa a yembr tɩ põs ye. A sãama b fãa, ne neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã." 
Joshua10:38 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã wẽnemdame n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Debɩɩre. 
Joshua10:39 Bãmb tõoga Debɩɩr tẽngã ne a rĩmã, ne tẽn-bãooneg nins fãa yẽnda sẽn so wã. Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ Debɩɩr nebã ne zabr sʋʋga, baa ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, n ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye. A Zozoe maana Debɩɩr tẽngã ne a rĩmã wa yẽnda sẽn dag n maan Ebrõ la Libna neb rĩm-dãmbã to-to wã." 
Joshua10:40 A Zozoe tõogã kɩren-kãng tẽmsã. Yaa tẽms nins sẽn be tãms sʋkã, ne sẽn be-b Negɛɛvã, la sẽn be-b kunkubã sʋkã, ne b rĩm-dãmbã. Bãmb ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye, la b sãama bũmb ning fãa sẽn vʋʋsd ne yõore, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Joshua10:41 A Zozoe tõog n deega tẽmsã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Kadɛɛs Barneya n tɩ ta Gaaza ne Gosɛn hal n tɩ tãag Gabawõ." 
Joshua10:42 A Zozoe tõoga rĩm-dãmb-kãens ne b tẽmsã wakat a ye pʋgẽ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã rag n zabd n sõngda Israyɛlle." 
Joshua10:43 A Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã tũu taab n lebg n leb b sikã zĩigẽ Gilgalle. 
Joshua11:1 Hasoor dĩm a Zabẽ sẽn wʋm bõn-kãense, yẽnda tʋma neb Madõ rĩm a Yokaab nengẽ, ne Simron dĩmã nengẽ, la Akaf rĩmã nengẽ," 
Joshua11:2 ne rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn be rɩtg kɩrengã sẽn be tãmsẽ wã, la sẽn be-b Araba tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, la sẽn be Kinerɛt ko-kãsengã goabgã, ne sẽn be-b kunkubã sʋkã, la sẽn be-b Door tẽngã nin-taoorã," 
Joshua11:3 la Kana neb nins sẽn be-b yaang la taoorã nengẽ, la Amoor-dãmbã nengẽ, la Hɛt-rãmbã nengẽ, la Ferɛɛz rãmbã nengẽ, la Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn be tãngã zugã nengẽ, la Hevi-rãmbã sẽn be Hɛrmo tãngã pendã, Mispa tẽngã nengẽ." 
Joshua11:4 Rĩm-dãmb-kãens naaga taab n yi ne b tãb-biisã fãa, n yaa wʋsg wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã, tɩ ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. La b waa ne wiidi, la zabr saar-dãmb wʋsgo." 
Joshua11:5 Rĩm-dãmb-kãens zemsa taaba, n wa tilg b tãb-sikã Merom koomã sɛɛga, n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã." 
Joshua11:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Da zoe-b ye. Bala, beoog woto wẽnde, mam na n ning-b-la yãmb nugẽ n kɩt tɩ y kʋ-b zãnga. Bɩ f kɛ b wiidã nao-gĩin n pase, la y yõog b zabr saar-dãmbã bugum.»" 
Joshua11:7 A Zozoe ne a tãb-biisã wa n linga b bɛɛbã Merom kooma sɛɛgẽ n zab ne-ba. 
Joshua11:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog-ba. B kʋ-b lame n dig-b n tɩ ta Sɩdõ kãsengẽ wã, hal n tɩ tãag Misrefot-mayim, n tɩ tãag Mispa longã sẽn dabd yaangã sẽnẽ. Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ bãmb n ka bas tɩ ned ba a yembr põs ye." 
Joshua11:9 A Zozoe maana bãmb wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda t'a maan-b to-to wã. Yẽnda kɛɛ wiidã nao-gĩin n pase, la a yõog b zabr saar-dãmbã bugum." 
Joshua11:10 Badaare, a Zozoe sẽn yi beenẽ n lebgdẽ, bãmb tees n wẽe Hasoor n deege, n kʋ a rĩmã ne zabr sʋʋga. Hasoor n dag n yaa soolem-kãens fãa na-tẽnga." 
Joshua11:11 B kʋʋ bãmb fãa ne zabr sʋʋga, la b sãam neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgã, n ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye. La b yõoga Hasoor tẽngã bugum." 
Joshua11:12 A Zozoe tõoga tẽn-bãmb fãa ne b rĩm-dãmbã n kʋ ne zabr sʋʋga. Yẽnda sãama b fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. 
Joshua11:13 Israyɛll nebã ka tol n yõog tẽms nins sẽn be kunkubã zutã ba a yembre, sã n ka a Zozoe sẽn yõog Hasoor tẽngã bugmã bala." 
Joshua11:14 Israyɛll nebã wʋka tẽn-bãmb paoongã fãa ne b rũmsã n sooge. La b kʋʋ nebã fãa ne zabr sʋʋg n ka bas ned baa yembr tɩ vɩɩmd ye.
