Joshua11:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis bũmb ningã, a Moyiis togs-a-la a Zozoe, la a Zozoe maana wa b sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. A Zozoe ka bas bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg a Moyiisã tɩ vaal ye." 
Joshua11:16 Woto, a Zozoe reega tẽn-kãensã fãa: Tãngã ne Negɛɛv fãa, la Gosɛn tẽngã zãnga, la kunkubã ne Araba tẽn-nabdrã, la Israyɛll tãngã ne a tãmsã sigdsã fãa." 
Joshua11:17 Sẽn sɩng ne tãn-beellã sẽn teesd Seyɩɩr sẽnẽ hal tɩ ta Baall-Gaad sẽn be Libã, Ɛrmon tãngã pendã, a Zozoe reega bãmb fãa. A Zozoe tõoga tẽn-bãmb rĩm-dãmbã, n kʋ-ba." 
Joshua11:18 A Zozoe zaba ne rĩm-dãmb-kãens n kaoos wʋsgo. 
Joshua11:19 Tẽng ba a yembr ka zĩnd sẽn dag n dat n bao laafɩ ne Israyɛll nebã ye, sã n ka Hɛt nebã sẽn dag n be Gabawõ wã bala. Israyɛll zaba ne zabr sʋʋg n deeg b fãa." 
Joshua11:20 Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ b riglim b sũyã n na n zab ne Israyɛlle, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Israyɛll nebã sãam-b zãng n ka zoe b nimbãanega, n menes-b wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã." 
Joshua11:21 Wakat-kãens bala, a Zozoe kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Anak-rãmbã sẽn dag n be Ebrõ tãngã, Debɩɩr tãngã, Anaab tãngã, ne tãms nins fãa sẽn be Zʋʋda, la Israyɛll tãmsã fãa, a Zozoe sãama bãmb fãa ne b tẽmsã." 
Joshua11:22 Anak-rãmba ned baa a yembr ka kell Israyɛll nebã tẽngẽ ye. Yaa b neb nins sẽn dag n be Gaaza, Gate ne Asdoodã bal n kelle." 
Joshua11:23 Dẽ, a Zozoe tõog n deega tẽngã gill wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiisã. La a Zozoe rɩka tẽngã n pʋɩ n kõ Israyɛll nebã wa sẽn zems b buudã sõore. La tẽngã zĩnda bãane, tɩ zabr ka leb n beẽ ye." 
Joshua12:1 Ad tẽngã rĩm-dãmb nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn tõog n kʋ n deeg b tẽmsã Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yaangã, sẽn sɩng ne Arno ko-soogã hal n tɩ tãag Hɛrmo tãngã ne Araba tẽn-nabdrã zãng sẽn dabd yaangã." 
Joshua12:2 Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon sẽn dag n be Hɛsbonnã, n dag n so Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã noorã, la sẽn sɩng ne Galaad tẽngã pʋɩ-sʋka, hal n tɩ tãag Yabok ko-soogã sẽn yaa Amoor-dãmbã toadgã," 
Joshua12:3 n paas ne Araba tẽn-nabdrã, Kinerɛt ko-kãsengã sẽn be yaangã, n tãag Araba ko-kãsengã sẽn yaa yamsem ko-kãsengã sẽn be yaangã n teesd Bɛt-Yesimot sẽnẽ, ne sẽn dabd goabgã, n sigd n dabd Pisga sigdgã sẽnẽ." 
Joshua12:4 Rĩm a to sẽn põs yaa Basan rĩm a Oog sẽn be Refayim soolmã sẽn be Astarot ne Edreyi wã. 
Joshua12:5 Rĩm-kãng rag n soo tãng ning sẽn boond tɩ Hɛrmo wã, ne Salka la Basan gillã fãa n tall n tɩ tãag Gesʋʋr dãmbã ne Maaka rãmbã tẽnga, ne Galaad pʋɩ-sʋkã sẽn yaa Hɛsbon rĩm a Sihon toadgã." 
Joshua12:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis ne Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ bãmb fãa, n dɩk b tẽngã n kõ Rubɛn buudã, Gaad buudã ne Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Joshua12:7 Moasã, ad tẽngã rĩm-dãmb nins a Zozoe ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn tõog Zʋrdẽ nin-taoor rʋʋndã, yaa sẽn sɩng ne Baall-Gaad sẽn be Libã tãn-longẽ wã, n tall n tɩ tãag Tãn-Beellã sẽn teesd Seyɩɩr sẽnẽ wã. A Zozoe rɩka tẽn-kãens n kõ Israyɛll nebã wa sẽn zems b buudã sõorã sẽn yaa to-to wã." 
Joshua12:8 Yaa tãngã zugã ne kunkubã la Araba tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, la tãngã sigdgẽ wã, ne sẽn teesd weoogã la Negɛɛve, ne Hɛt-rãmbã, la Amoor-dãmbã ne Kana-rãmbã, la Ferɛɛz rãmbã, ne Hevi-rãmbã, n paas Zebuus-rãmbã tẽmsã." 
Joshua12:9 Rĩm-dãmb nins b sẽn tõogã yaa Zeeriko rĩmã, Ayi sẽn pẽ Betɛllã rĩmã," 
Joshua12:10 yaa Zeruzalɛm rĩmã, Ebrõ rĩmã," 
Joshua12:11 Zarmut rĩmã, Lakiis rĩmã," 
Joshua12:12 Eglõ rĩmã, Gezɛɛr rĩmã," 
Joshua12:13 Debɩɩr dĩmã, Gedɛɛr rĩmã," 
Joshua12:14 Horma rĩmã, Araad rĩmã," 
Joshua12:15 Libna rĩmã, Adulam rĩmã," 
Joshua12:16 Makeda rĩmã, Betɛll rĩmã," 
Joshua12:17 Tapuwa rĩmã, Hefɛɛr dĩmã," 
Joshua12:18 Afɛk rĩmã, Lakarõ dĩmã," 
Joshua12:19 Madõ rĩmã, Hasoor rĩmã," 
Joshua12:20 Simron-Meron rĩmã, Aksaf rĩmã," 
Joshua12:21 Taanak rĩmã, Megido rĩmã," 
Joshua12:22 Kedɛɛs rĩmã, Zokneyam rĩmã, Karmell rĩmã," 
Joshua12:23 Door sẽn be Door soolmẽ wã rĩmã, Goyim sẽn pẽ Gilgallã rĩmã," 
Joshua12:24 Tirtsa rĩmã. Rĩm-dãmbã fãa sõor yaa rĩm-dãmb pis-tã la a yembre. 
Joshua13:1 A Zozoe rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame yaa: «Fo lebga nin-kẽema, fo kʋʋla wʋsgo, la tẽms nins sẽn ket yãmb sẽn tog n deegã yaa wʋsgo." 
Joshua13:2 Ad tẽms nins sẽn ket yãmb sẽn tog n deegã: Yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn so wã fãa, ne Gesʋʋr dãmbã soolem zãnga." 
Joshua13:3 Sẽn sɩng ne Sɩhoor kʋɩlgã sẽn zoet n dabd Ezɩptã hal n tãag Ekrõ sẽn be rɩtgã, bãmb fãa rag n yaa Kana-rãmbã n so-ba. La b lebga Filistẽ-dãmbã rĩm-dãmb a nu wã soolem: yaa Gaaza, Asdoode, Askalon, Gate, ne Ekrõ rĩmã, n paas ne Ave-rãmbã." 
Joshua13:4 Sẽn sɩng ne goabgã, yaa Kana-rãmba tẽng zãnga, ne Meytara sẽn yaa Sɩdõ nebã soolmã, hal n tãag Afɛke, n tɩ ta Amoor-dãmbã tẽng toadga," 
Joshua13:5 la ne Geball rãmbã tẽnga, ne Libã yaang tẽmsã, sẽn sɩng ne Baall-Gaad sẽn be Hɛrmo tãngã pendã n tɩ tãag Hamat tẽngã noore," 
Joshua13:6 n paas neb nins sẽn be-b tãmsã zutã, sẽn sɩng ne Libã n tɩ tãag Misrefot-Mayim, ne tẽms nins fãa Sɩdõ nebã sẽn so wã. Mam na n deesa tẽn-bãmbã fãa tɩ yɩ Israyɛll nebã pʋɩɩre. La bũmb sẽn be bala, pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ Israyɛll nebã tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre wa mam sẽn dag n yeel foomã." 
Joshua13:7 Moasã, bɩ f pʋɩ-a n kõ Israyɛll buud a wɛ wã ne Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã.»" 
Joshua13:8 Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk a yembrã, ne Rubɛn buudã la Gaad buudã rag n zoe n deega b zĩis Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yaanga, wa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n kõ-bã." 
Joshua13:9 Yaa sẽn sɩng ne Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã noorã, la ne tẽng ning sẽn be longã pʋgẽ wã, n paas Medeba tẽn-nabdrã hal n tãag Dibõ." 
Joshua13:10 Yaa sẽn naag ne Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon tẽmsã fãa. Rĩm-kãng rag n dɩta naam Hɛsbon, la a so tẽngã hal n tɩ tãag Amo-rãmbã toadga," 
Joshua13:11 n paas Galaad sẽn yaa Gesʋʋr dãmbã ne Maaka rãmbã soolmã, ne Hɛrmo tãngã zug rãmbã ne Basan gillã fãa n tɩ tãag Salka." 
Joshua13:12 Tẽn-kãens yaa rĩm a Oog sẽn be Basan wã soolem. A Oog rag n soo Astarot ne Edreyi sẽn dag n yaa Refayim dãmbã yaoolem tẽngã. A Moyiis n dag n zab n tõog n dees tẽn-bãmba. 
Joshua13:13 La baoosgo, Israyɛll nebã ka reeg Gesʋʋr dãmbã ne Maaka rãmbã tẽms ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Gesʋʋr tẽngã ne Maaka tẽngã neb ket n be Israyɛll nebã sʋk hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua13:14 Yaa Leevi buudã bal la b ka kõ tẽms tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre. Bãmb pʋɩɩr yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yĩngã, wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeel b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisã." 
Joshua13:15 Dẽ, a Moyiis kõo Rubɛn nebã b pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b roto." 
Joshua13:16 Bãmb soolmã sɩngda Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã noorã, ne tẽng ning sẽn be longã pʋgẽ wã, n paas tẽn-nabdrã sẽn pẽ Medeba wã," 
Joshua13:17 n paas Hɛsbon ne a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa sẽn be tẽn-nabdrẽ wã. Yaa Dibõ, Bamot-baalle, Bɛt-baale, Meyõ," 
Joshua13:18 Yatsa, Kedmote, Mifaate," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriyatayim la Sibma ne Serɛt-Sahaar sẽn be longã pʋgẽ kunkubrã zugã," 
Joshua13:20 n paas Bɛt-pewoor ne Pisga sigdsã, la Bɛt-Yesimote," 
Joshua13:21 n paas tẽms nins fãa sẽn be tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, n naag ne Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon sẽn dag n dɩt naam Hɛsbonnã sẽn so tẽms ninsã. A Moyiis rag n tõoga yẽnda ne a nanamb-bãoonegã fãa: Yaa Madiyã rãmbã, Evi rãmbã, Rekɛm dãmbã, Suur dãmbã, Ʋʋr dãmbã, ne Reba rãmbã, b fãa rag n yaa Sihon nanamb-bi n be tẽn-kãngã." 
Joshua13:22 Israyɛll nebã sẽn kʋ neb nins ne zabr sʋʋgã sʋka, a Bewoor biig a Balaam sẽn yaa bagã rag n naaga be." 
Joshua13:23 Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã ne a kʋɩl-koakã n dag n yaa Rubɛn nebã toadga. Ad Rubɛn nebã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b roog-roogo: Yaa tẽmsã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã. 
Joshua13:24 A Moyiis kõo Gaad buudã b pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b rotã." 
Joshua13:25 Bãmb soolmã yaa Yazɛɛre, ne Galaad tẽmsã fãa, n paas Amo-rãmbã soolem pʋɩ-sʋka, n tall n tɩ tãag Arowɛɛr sẽn teesd Raba sẽnẽ," 
Joshua13:26 sẽn sɩng Hɛsbon n tɩ ta Ramat-Mitspe, ne Betonim, sẽn sɩngd ne Mahanayim n tɩ tãag Debɩɩr toadgã," 
Joshua13:27 n paas ne longẽ wã, la Bɛt-Haram, ne Bɛt-Nimra, Sukote, n paas ne Safon sẽn yaa Hɛsbon rĩm a Sihon soolmã kellã, ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã ne a kɩremsã, hal n tãag Kinerɛt ko-kãsengã zãng sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã yaangã." 
Joshua13:28 Ad pʋɩɩr ning b sẽn kõ Gaad rãmbã wa sẽn zems b roto. Yaa tẽmsã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã. 
Joshua13:29 A Moyiis dag n kõo Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã b pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b roto." 
Joshua13:30 Bãmb soolmã toadg sɩngda Mahanayim ne Basan gillã fãa, Basan rĩm a Oog soolmã fãa, ne Yayɩɩr tẽms pis-yoobã fãa sẽn dag n be Basan soolmẽ wã." 
Joshua13:31 Galaad soolmã pʋɩ-sʋka, ne Astarot la Edreyi sẽn yaa Basan rĩm a Oog soolmã tẽmsã yɩ a Makɩɩr sẽn yaa a Manaase yagensã pʋɩ-sʋkã pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b roto." 
Joshua13:32 Tẽn-bãmbã yaa tẽms nins a Moyiis sẽn dag n pʋɩ Moaab tẽn-nabdrã pʋgã, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, sẽn teesd yaangã, Zeeriko tẽngã sẽnẽ wã." 
Joshua13:33 A Moyiis ka kõ Leevi buudã pʋɩɩr ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã n yaa bãmb pʋɩɩre, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis bãmb wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Joshua14:1 Ad Israyɛll nebã sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ning Kana tẽngã pʋga, yaa maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar ne a Nun biig a Zozoe ne Israyɛll rotã kãsem-dãmb n kõ-b rẽndã tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre." 
Joshua14:2 Bãmb maana poeer n kõ bãmb b pʋɩɩrã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n togs a Moyiis t'a kõ Israyɛll buud a wɛ wã la pʋɩ-sʋkã. 
Joshua14:3 Bala, a Moyiis rag n kõo buud a yiibã ne pʋɩ-sʋkã b pʋɩɩr Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde. La yẽnda rag n ka kõ Leevi buudã pʋɩɩr b taabã sʋk ye." 
Joshua14:4 A Zozɛf kambã rag n yaa buud a yiibu: yaa a Manaase ne a Efrayiim. La b ka kõ Leevi buudã soolem tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩr ye. B kõo bãmb tẽms tɩ b zĩnd bala, la b tõog n wãbneg b rũmsã tẽmsã pʋ-weesẽ wã, la b tõog n ges b paoongã yelle." 
Joshua14:5 Israyɛll nebã pʋɩɩ tẽngã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis to-to wã. 
Joshua14:6 Zʋʋda nebã wa a Zozoe nengẽ Gilgalle, la Kenaaz tẽng rao a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Yãmb ket n tẽra bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne Wẽnnaam dao a Moyiis Kadɛɛs-Barneya sẽn kẽed ne maam ne yãmb wɛɛngẽ wã?" 
Joshua14:7 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn na n tʋm maam tɩ m kẽng Kadɛɛs-Barneya n tɩ soos n ges tẽngã, rẽ tɩ mam dag n tara yʋʋm pis-naase, la mam wa n togsa bãmb bũmbã fãa sẽn yɩ to-to ne pʋ-peelem." 
Joshua14:8 Mam ba-biis nins sẽn dag n tũ maam n kẽngã kẽesa nebã rabeem, la mam yẽ, mam kell n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã zãnga." 
Joshua14:9 Badaare, a Moyiis wẽename n yeele: Mam wẽendame tɩ tẽng ning fo naoorã sẽn tabgã na n yɩɩ foom ne f kambã pʋɩɩre, wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga, fo sẽn sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã zãngã yĩnga." 
Joshua14:10 La moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam yõ-woko, wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã. Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas la a nu sẽn looge, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n gom a woto ne a Moyiisi, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n ket n be weoogã pʋg n kẽndã. La rũndã-rũndã wã, mam tara yʋʋm pis-nii la a nu." 
Joshua14:11 La mam ket n tara pãng wa wakat ning a Moyiis sẽn wa n tʋm maamã. Mam ket n tara pãng wa wakat-kãngã, n tõe n kẽng zabre, n kẽng la m lebg n wa." 
Joshua14:12 Dẽ wã, bɩ y kõ maam tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom a yell badaarã. Bala, yãmb wʋma b sẽn yeel tɩ yaa Anak yagensã n be beenẽ, la b tara tẽms sẽn tar pãngã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n zĩnd ne maam, mam na n diga bãmb n deeg b tẽngã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã.»" 
Joshua14:13 A Zozoe ninga a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb zug barka, n dɩk Ebrõ n kõ-a t'a sooge." 
Joshua14:14 Yaa woto n kɩte, t'a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb ne Kenaaz yagensã ket n so Ebrõ tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩr hal tɩ ta rũndã. Bala, b saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã zãnga." 
Joshua14:15 Wakat sẽn looge, b rag n boonda Ebrõ tɩ Arba tẽnga. Anak nebã fãa sʋka, a Arba n yɩ bãmb nin-wobg n yɩɩd nebã fãa." 
Joshua15:1 Pʋɩɩr ning Zʋʋda buudã sẽn paam wa sẽn zems b rotã toadg sɩngda Edom, n teesd Sĩn we-raoogã sẽnẽ, n tat wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ." 
Joshua15:2 Bãmb soolmã toadg sẽn be goabgã sɩngda ne yamsem ko-kãsengã, a sɩlengã zĩigẽ n be Negɛɛv nen-taoore." 
Joshua15:3 A tall n taa Akrabim rʋʋdgã n pɩʋʋgd Sĩn we-raoogã, n dabd Kadɛɛs-Barneya goabga. A rag n tũuda Hɛsron n teesd Adaar sẽnẽ, n wẽnemd n dabd Karka." 
Joshua15:4 A lebg n tũu Asmon n tɩ ta Ezɩpt ko-soogã, woto, toadgã teegda ko-kãsengã, la goabgã n na n yɩ yãmb toadga." 
Joshua15:5 Yaangã, toadgã sɩnga ne yamsem ko-kãsengã n tall n tɩ tãag Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã kɩreng ning sẽn zoet n kẽed yamsem ko-kãsengã pʋgã. La rɩtg toadgã sɩnga ne ko-kãsengã sɩlengã zĩig sẽn teeg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã satmẽ wã." 
Joshua15:6 Toadgã tall n tɩ tãaga Bɛt-Holga sẽnẽ, n yit Bɛt-Arba rɩtgã n zẽk n tɩ tãag a Rubɛn yageng a Bohã kugrã," 
Joshua15:7 la toadgã kell n tũu Debɩɩr n yegl Akoor longã sẽn be rɩtgã n teesd Gilgall sẽnẽ, n kell n get Adumim rʋʋdgã sẽn be ko-soogã goabgã. A yegda Ɛn-Semees ko-bundmã, n tɩ tãag Ɛn-Rogɛlle." 
Joshua15:8 Toadgã tũuda Bɛn-Hinom longã n yegd Zebuus ning b sẽn boond rũndã tɩ Zeruzalɛmã goabga, n zẽk n dʋʋd tãngã sẽn be Hinom longã neng taoorã, n be nin-taoorã, la a yaa Refayim dãmbã longã goabga." 
Joshua15:9 Toadgã yita tãngã zug n sigd n dabd Neftoa ko-bundmã, n kell n teesd tẽms nins sẽn be Efron tãngã sẽnẽ wã, n tũud Baala sẽn yaa Kiryat-Yeyarima." 
Joshua15:10 Toadgã yii Baala n wẽnemd n tees nin-taoore, Seyɩɩr tãngã sẽnẽ, n yegd weoogã tãms goabg sẽn yaa Kesalõ wã, n sigd n dabd Bɛt-Semeese, n tũud Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Toadgã kell n tãaga Ekron kɩrengã, rɩtgo, n kell n sigd n dabd Sɩkeron sẽnẽ, n tũud Baala tãngã zugu, n tɩ tãag Yabneyɛlle, n yek ko-kãsengã." 
Joshua15:12 Nin-taoor toadgã sɩngda ne ko-kãsengã ne a kɩremsã. Tod-bãmbã fãa yaa Zʋʋda nebã soolem todse, wa sẽn zems b rotã." 
Joshua15:13 B kõo a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛb zĩig a Zʋʋda kambã sʋka, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Zozoe wã. Yaa Kiryat-Arba sẽn yaa Ebrõ wã. A Arba rag n yaa a Anak ba." 
Joshua15:14 A Kalɛɛb riga a Anak kamb a tãabã n yiis beenẽ: yaa Sekayi, Ayimande ne a Talmayi, b fãa yaa a Anak kamba." 
Joshua15:15 A Kalɛɛb yii be n tɩ zab ne Debɩɩr nebã. B rag n boonda Debɩɩr tẽngã tɩ Kiryat-Sefɛɛre. 
Joshua15:16 A Kalɛɛb yeelame yaa: «Ned ning sẽn na n tõog n zab n deeg Kiryat-Sefɛɛr tẽngã, mam na n dɩka m bi-pugl a Aksa n kõ-a t'a maan a paga.»" 
Joshua15:17 A Otniyɛll sẽn yaa a Kenaaz biigã, n yaa a Kalɛɛb ba-biigã zab n deega Kiryat-Sefɛɛre. Dẽ, a Kalɛɛb rɩka a bi-pugl a Aksa n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
Joshua15:18 A Aksa sẽn ta a Otniyɛll yirã, a pirsa a sɩdã t'a kos a ba a Kalɛɛb pʋʋgo. Pagã siga a boangã zugu, la a Kalɛɛb sok-a lame tɩ yaa a wãna?" 
Joshua15:19 A leokame n yeele: «M nong n kos-y-la bũmbu, bala, yãmb sẽn kõ maam zĩig ningã yaa Negɛɛv tẽn-koɛɛngã. Bɩ y kõ-m ko-bunds zĩis me.» Dẽ, a Kalɛɛb kõo yẽnda ko-bunds zĩis nins sẽn be hal taoorã ne sẽn be-b yambẽ wã." 
Joshua15:20 Woto n yɩ Zʋʋda buudã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b rotã. 
Joshua15:21 Yaa tẽms nins sẽn be Zʋʋda yagensã soolmã satmẽ wã, sẽn dabd Edom toadgã sẽnẽ sẽn be Negɛɛvã: Kabseyɛlle, Edɛɛre, Yagʋʋre," 
Joshua15:22 n paas Kina ne Dimona la Adaada," 
Joshua15:23 n paas Kedɛɛs-Hatsoore, Itãne," 
Joshua15:24 Zɩfe, Telɛm, Beyalote," 
Joshua15:25 Hatsoor-Hadata, Keriyot-Hɛtsron sẽn yaa Hatsoorã," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, Molaada," 
Joshua15:27 Hatsaar-Gaada Hɛsmon, Bɛt-Palɛte," 
Joshua15:28 Hatsaar-Suwalle, Bɛɛr-Seba, Biziyotiya," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iyim, Atsɛm," 
Joshua15:30 Ɛltolaade, Kesɩlle, Horma," 
Joshua15:31 Siklaage, Madmana, Sãnsãna," 
Joshua15:32 Lebawote, Silim, Ayin ne Rimon. Tẽmsã fãa sõor yaa pisi la a wɛ ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:33 Tẽms nins sẽn be-b kunkubã sʋkã la woto: Yaa Ɛstaolle, Soreya, Akna," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, En-Ganim, Tapuwa, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Yarmuti, Adulam, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Saarayim, Aditayim, Gedeera ne Gederotayim. Yaa tẽms piig la a naas ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Hadasa, Migdall-Gaade." 
Joshua15:38 Dileyan, Mitspe, Yokteyɛlle," 
Joshua15:39 Lakɩɩse, Botskate, Ɛglõn," 
Joshua15:40 Kabon, Lakmaase, Kitliisi," 
Joshua15:41 Gederote, Bɛt-Dagon, Naama ne Makeda. Yaa tẽms piig la a yoobe, ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Etɛɛre, Aaza," 
Joshua15:43 Yifta, Asna, Netsɩɩbe," 
Joshua15:44 Keyila, Akziib ne Maresa. Yaa tẽms a wɛ ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron sẽn so tẽms ninsã ne b tẽn-kɩremse," 
Joshua15:46 yaa sẽn sɩng Ekron a nin-taoorã, la tẽms nins fãa sẽn pẽ Asdoodã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Joshua15:47 Asdoode, ne tẽms nins yẽnda sẽn so wã ne b tẽn-kɩremse, Gaaza ne a sẽn so wã, ne b tẽn-kɩremse, hal n tɩ tãag Ezɩpt ko-soogã, la ko-kãsengã ne a kɩrengã." 
Joshua15:48 Tẽms nins sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã yaa: Samiiri, Yatɩɩre, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiryat-Sana sẽn yaa Debɩɩrã," 
Joshua15:50 Anaabe, Ɛstemo, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gosɛn, Holon Gɩdo. Yaa tẽms piig la a yembr ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:52 Araabe, Duma, Eseyãn," 
Joshua15:53 Yanum, Bɛt-Tapuwa, Afɛka," 
Joshua15:54 Humeta, Kiryat-Arba sẽn yaa Ebrõ ne Siyoore. Yaa tẽms a wɛ ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:55 Mawon, Karmelle, Zɩfe, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Zizreyɛlle, Yokdeyam, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kayin, Gibeya ne Timna. Yaa tẽms piig ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:58 Halulli, Bɛt-Sʋʋre, Gedoore," 
Joshua15:59 Maarate, Bɛt-Anot ne Ɛltekon. Yaa tẽms a yoob ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:60 Kiryat-Baall sẽn yaa Kiryat-Yeyarim ne Raba, yaa tẽms a yiib ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:61 Tẽms nins sẽn dag n be weoogã pʋgẽ wã la woto: Yaa Bɛt-Araba, Medin, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsan, Ir-Hamela ne Ɛn-Gedi, yaa tẽms a yoob ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua15:63 Zʋʋda kambã ka tõog n dees Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã tẽms ye. Dẽ, Zebuus-rãmbã kell n paa Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Joshua16:1 Zĩis nins b sẽn yãk n kõ a Zozɛf kambã sɩngda ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã sẽn pẽ Zeeriko wã, n dabd Zeeriko ko-bundsã yaangã, n tũud weoogã n yit Zeeriko n dʋʋd Betɛll tãngã sẽnẽ." 
Joshua16:2 Toadgã yii Betɛll n dabd Luuzi, n pɩʋʋgd Ark rãmbã ne Atarot rãmbã toadg sẽnẽ." 
Joshua16:3 La toadgã wẽnemdame n dabd nin-taoore n teesd Yaflɛt rãmbã toadg sẽnẽ, n tɩ tãag Bɛt-Horon longã, n sigd n dabd Gezɛɛr n tɩ yek ko-kãsengã." 
Joshua16:4 Rẽndã yɩ a Zozɛf kamb a Manaase ne a Efrayiim pʋɩɩre. 
Joshua16:5 Ad a Efrayiim kambã toadga, wa sẽn zems b rotã. Bãmb soolmã toadg sɩngda nin-taoore, Atrot-Adaare, hal n tãag Bɛt-Horon zugẽ." 
Joshua16:6 Toadgã yekda sẽn dabd nin-taoor sẽnẽ, n tall n tɩ tãag Mikmetat rɩtgo, n gõdg goabg n teesd Taanat-Silo sẽnẽ, n pɩʋʋgd rɩtgã n dabd Yanoa sẽnẽ." 
Joshua16:7 A yii Yanoa n sigd n dabd Atarot ne Naarata, n tɩ teeg Zeeriko n ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
Joshua16:8 Toadgã yii Tapuwa n teesd nin-taoore, Kana ko-soogã sẽnẽ, n na n tɩ tãag ko-kãsengã. Rẽndã yɩɩ a Efrayiim kambã pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b rotã." 
Joshua16:9 La a Efrayiim kambã kell n sooga tẽms nins b sẽn dag n kõ bãmb tɩ be Manaase kambã pʋɩɩrã sʋkã, tẽmsã fãa ne b tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Joshua16:10 Bãmb ka tõog n dig Kana nebã sẽn dag n be Gezɛɛrã n deeg tẽngã ye. Dẽ, Kana nebã kell n paa Efrayiim nebã sʋk hal tɩ ta rũndã. La Efrayiim nebã modga bãmb tɩ b tʋmd b tʋʋm-wɛgl wa yembs n kõt-ba." 
Joshua17:1 A Manaase sẽn yaa a Zozɛf bi-rẽengã reega pʋɩɩre. A Manaase bi-rẽengã sẽn yaa a Galaad ba wã, paama Galaad ne Basan, bala, a rag n yaa gãndaoog zabr pʋga." 
Joshua17:2 B yãka zĩis n kõ a Manaase kamb a taabã, wa sẽn zems b rotã sõore. Yaa sẽn kẽed ne a Abiyezɛɛr kambã, a Helɛk kambã, a Asriyɛll kambã, a Sɩkɛm kambã, a Hefɛɛr kambã ne a Semida kambã. Bãmba fãa yaa a Zozɛf biig a Manaase kom-dibli, wa sẽn zems b rotã sõore." 
Joshua17:3 A Manaase biig a Makɩɩr biig a Galaad biig a Hefɛɛr biig a Selofaad ka paam bi-ribl ye. Yẽnda roga kom-pugli bala. Kom-pugli wã yʋy la woto: Yaa a Mala, a Noa, a Hogla, a Milka ne a Tirsta." 
Joshua17:4 Bãmb kẽng n tɩ yãnda maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar ne a Nun biig a Zozoe, ne nanambsã n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo a Moyiis noor t'a kõ tõnd zĩis d ba-biisã sʋka.» Dẽ, b kõo bãmb pʋɩɩr b ba wã kamb sʋka, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Joshua17:5 B maana poeer n kõ a Manaase zĩis piiga, n paas Galaad ne Basan tẽngã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã." 
Joshua17:6 Bala, a Manaase yagensã paama b pʋɩɩr b yaab a Manaase yagensã sʋka, t'a Manaase yagens a taabã soog a Galaad tẽngã." 
Joshua17:7 A Manaase soolmã toadg ra sɩngda ne Asɛɛr sẽn be Mikmeta wã neng ne neng ne Sɩkɛm, n teesd rɩtgo, Ɛn-Tapuwa nebã sẽnẽ." 
Joshua17:8 Tapuwa tẽngã rag n yaa a Manaase yagensã n so, la Tapuwa ning sẽn be Manaase yagensã toadgẽ wã yaa Efrayiim yagensã n so." 
Joshua17:9 Toadgã sigd n dabda Kana ko-soogã goabga. Tẽn-bãmb yaa a Efrayiim n so n tãag Manaase tẽmsã sʋka. Manaase nebã toadg sẽn be ko-soogã rɩtgã tɩ tãaga ko-kãsengã. 
Joshua17:10 Nug-goabg soolmã rag n yaa Efrayiim nebã n so, tɩ Manaase nebã so rɩtg tẽmsã. Dẽ, yaa ko-kãsengã n yaa bãmb toadga. Todsã tɩ yeka Asɛɛr soolmã sẽn be rɩtgã sẽnẽ tɩ Isakaar soolmã be yaangã." 
Joshua17:11 A Isakaar ne a Asɛɛr soolmã pʋga, a Manaase paama Bɛt-Seyã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã n paas Yibleyam ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la b soog neb nins sẽn be Door tẽngã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã, ne neb nins sẽn be Ɛn-doorã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã, ne neb nins sẽn be Taanakã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã, ne neb nins sẽn be Megido wã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã. Yaa soolem a tãabo." 
Joshua17:12 A Manaase yagensã ka tõog n deeg tẽn-bãmb ye. Dẽ, Kana nebã kell n yãka yam tɩ b na n paa soolem-kãng pʋga." 
Joshua17:13 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n paam pãngã, b modga Kana nebã tɩ b tʋm bãmb tʋʋm-wɛglã, la b ka tõog n dig-b n yiis tẽngã ye." 
Joshua17:14 A Zozɛf yagensã kẽng n tɩ yẽgma ne a Zozoe n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga tõnd zug bark hal tɩ ta rũndã, tɩ tõnd lebg wʋsgo, la yaa bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb kõ tõnd pʋɩɩr a yembr bala, zĩig a ye tãa bala?»" 
Joshua17:15 A Zozoe yeela bãmb yaa: «Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb yaa wʋsgo, bɩ y kẽng n tɩ kɛ tʋgã sẽn be Ferɛɛz rãmbã ne Refayim nebã tẽmsẽ wã n kẽ, bala, Refayim tãngã yaa sẽk ne yãmba.»" 
Joshua17:16 A Zozɛf yagensã yeelame yaa: «Yaa sɩd tɩ tãngã yaa sẽk ne tõndo, la sẽn paas me, Kana nebã sẽn be longã pʋgã fãa, ne neb nins sẽn be Bɛt-Seyã wã, ne b tẽn-kɩremsã, ne neb nins sẽn be Zizreyɛll longã pʋgã fãa tara kut saar-dãmba.»" 
Joshua17:17 A Zozoe yeela a Zozɛf yagensã, a Manaase ne a Efrayiim yagensã yaa: «Yãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa wʋsgo, n tar pãng wʋsgo. Dẽ wã, y ka na n deeg pʋɩɩr a yembr bal ye." 
Joshua17:18 Woto wã yĩnga, yãmb na n sooga tãngã, baa ne a sẽn yaa tʋgrã. Yãmb na n kɛ-a lame n sooge. Yãmb na n diga Kana nebã, baa ne bãmb sẽn tar kut saar-dãmba, la baa ne b sẽn tar pãngã.»" 
Joshua18:1 Israyɛll nebã tigma taab Silo, n tilg b sɛk roogã beenẽ. Rẽ tɩ b zab n tõoga tẽngã zãnga." 
Joshua18:2 Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Israyɛll buud a yopoe n ket n dag n nan ka paam b pʋɩɩr ye. 
Joshua18:3 A Zozoe yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yãmb na n basame tɩ ta dabʋr tɩ y yaool n deeg tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã? 
Joshua18:4 Yãk-y neb a tãab buud fãa sʋka, tɩ mam na n tʋm-b lame. Bãmb na n kẽng n gilga tẽngã n gese, n gʋls b sẽn na n pʋɩ tẽngã to-to wa sẽn zems b buudã, la b lebg n wa wilg maam." 
Joshua18:5 Bãmb na n pʋɩ-a-la zĩis a yopoe. Zʋʋda buudã na n kell n paa b toadgã sẽn be goabgã pʋga, t'a Zozɛf buudã me kell n pa b soolmã sẽn be rɩtgã pʋga." 
Joshua18:6 Yãmb na n pʋɩɩ tãngã zĩis a yopoe, n gʋls n tall n wa ne ka. Dẽ, mam na n maana poeer Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã taoor ka." 
Joshua18:7 La a Leevi yagensã ka tog n paam pʋɩɩr yãmb sʋk ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd n yaa bãmb puɩɩre. Dẽ, a Gaad buudã ne a Rubɛn buudã la a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã reega Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, wa sẽn zems pʋɩɩr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n pʋɩ n kõ bãmb yaangã.»" 
Joshua18:8 B sẽn yãk neb nins sẽn tog n tɩ ges tẽnga pʋɩɩb yellã sẽn yik n na n looge, a Zozoe yeela bãmb yaa: «Kẽng-y n gilg-y n ges-y tẽngã sẽn yaa to-to, n gʋls n tall n wa mam nengẽ. Dẽ, mam na n maana poeer Sɩlo ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor yãmb yĩnga.»" 
Joshua18:9 La nin-kãens gilga soolmã gilli. La b gʋlsame n bilg tẽngã zĩis a yopoe wã sẽn yaa to-to sebr zugu, wa sẽn zems tẽmsã sẽn yaa bũmb ningã. La bãmb lebg n waa Sɩlo a Zozoe nengẽ." 
Joshua18:10 A Zozoe maana poeer bãmb yĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ Israyɛll nebã wa sẽn zems b pʋɩɩrã sẽn yaa to-to." 
Joshua18:11 B maana poeerã pipi n yãk Benzame yagensã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b rotã, la bãmb soolmã toadg be a Zʋʋda yagensã ne a Zozɛf yagensã soolem sʋka." 
Joshua18:12 B toadgã sẽn be rɩtgã sɩngda ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã. B toadgã kell n yegda Zeeriko rɩtgo, n zẽk n dʋʋd tãngã n dabd nin-taoorã sẽnẽ, n tɩ yek Bɛt-Avɛn weoogã." 
Joshua18:13 Toadgã yii beenẽ n tũud Luuz n yegd a kɩreng ning b sẽn boond tɩ Betɛllã goabga, n sigd n dabd Atarot-Adaare, n pɩʋʋgd tãngã sẽn be Bɛt-Horon sẽn be longẽ wã goabga." 
Joshua18:14 Toadgã yii tãngã nin-taoor n gõdg n tees ko-kãsengã sẽn be goabgã sẽnẽ, tãngã sẽn yaa neng ne neng ne Bɛt-Horon goabgã, n tɩ yek Kiryat-Baall b sẽn boond tɩ Kiryat-Yeyarim sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda yagensã tẽngã. Nin-taoorã kɩrengã toadg la woto." 
Joshua18:15 Goabg kɩrengã toadg sɩnga Bɛt-Yeyarim satmẽ wã, n tud n tãag nin-taoor ko-bundsã sẽn be Neftoa wã." 
Joshua18:16 Toadgã sig n tãaga tãng ning sẽn tees Bɛn-Hinom longã satmã sẽn be Refayim nebã longã sẽn be rɩtgã. Toadgã sig n tũnuga Hinom longã, n yegd Zebuus nebã tẽng goabga, n kell n tɩ tãag Ɛn-Rogɛlle." 
Joshua18:17 Toadgã gõdg n yii rɩtg n tɩ tãag Ɛn-Semeese, n tɩ ta Gelilot sẽn tees Adumim kunkubrã, n lebg n sigd n dabd a Rubɛn yageng a Bohã kugrã." 
Joshua18:18 Toadgã kell n yegda rɩtg kɩrengã, sẽn tees Araba tãngã, n sigd n dabd Araba," 
Joshua18:19 la toadgã kell n tũu Bɛt-Hogla rɩtgã sẽnẽ, n na n tɩ tãag yamsem ko-kãsengã sẽn be rɩtgã sẽn yaa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yekr zĩigã sẽn be goabgã. Woto rag n yaa goabg toadgã." 
Joshua18:20 Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n yaa nin-taoor toadgã sɩngre. Rẽndã n yɩ Benzame yagensã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b buudã sẽn yaa to-to, ne b todsã fãa sẽn gilgã." 
Joshua18:21 Ad tẽms nins b sẽn kõ Benzame buudã wa sẽn zems b buudã sõore: Yaa Zeeriko, Bɛt-Hogla, Emek-ketsitsi," 
Joshua18:22 Bɛt-Araba, Semarayim, Betɛlle," 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Para, Ofra," 
Joshua18:24 Kefaar-Amonayi, Ofni ne Geba. Yaa tẽms piig la a yiib ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua18:25 Gabawõ, Rama, Beyerote," 
Joshua18:26 Mitspe, Kefira, Motsa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekɛm, Yirpeyɛlle, Tareyala," 
Joshua18:28 Sela, Elɛfe, Zebuus-rãmbã tẽnga, sẽn yaa Zeruzalɛmã, Gibeyat ne Kiryate. Yaa tẽms piig la a naas ne b tẽn-kɩremse. Woto n yɩ a Benzame yagensã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b buudã." 
Joshua19:1 B maana poeerã naoor a yiibẽ soaba, n yãk a Sɩmyõ yagensã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b buudã sõore. Bãmb soolmã rag n bee Zʋʋda yagensã pʋɩɩr tẽn-sʋka." 
Joshua19:2 Bãmb pʋɩɩrã pʋga, b paama Bɛɛr-Seba, Seba, Molaada," 
Joshua19:3 Hatsaar-Suwalle, Bala, Atsɛm," 
Joshua19:4 Ɛltolaade, Betulli, Horma," 
Joshua19:5 Siklage, Bɛt-markabote, Hatsaar-Suwa," 
Joshua19:6 Bɛt-Lebaot ne Saruhɛn. Yaa tẽms piig la a tãab ne b tẽn-kɩremse. 
Joshua19:7 Ayin, Rimon, Etɛɛre, ne Aaza. Yaa tẽms a naas ne b tẽn-kɩremse," 
Joshua19:8 n paas ne tẽn-bãmb tẽn-bãooneg nins fãa sẽn gilgã, n tɩ tãag Baalat-Bɛɛre, sẽn yaa Ramat sẽn be goabgã. A Sɩmyõ buudã yagensã pʋɩɩr yɩɩ woto, wa sẽn zems b rotã sõore." 
Joshua19:9 Yaa Zʋʋda buudã yagens soolmã pʋga, la b kẽ n yãk a Sɩmyõ buudã pʋɩɩr n kõ-ba. Bala, Zʋʋda buudã soolmã rag n yaa kãseng ne-ba. Dẽ, b yãka pʋɩɩr bãmb soolmã pʋg n kõ a Sɩmyõ buudã yagense." 
Joshua19:10 Poeerã yãka zĩig a tãabẽ soabã n kõ a Zabulõ buudã yagense, wa sẽn zems b rotã sõore. Bãmb soolmã toadg tall n tɩ tãaga Sariidi." 
Joshua19:11 Toadgã yii be n tees n dabd nin-taoore, la a tees n dabd Mareyala, n tɩ teeg Dabesɛt ne ko-soog ning sẽn pɩʋʋgd Yokneyam neng taoorã." 
Joshua19:12 Toadgã yii Sariid n gõdg n dabd yaanga, wĩntoogã sẽn pukdẽ wã, Kislot-Taboor toadgẽ wã, n tɩ tãag Dabrat n kell n kẽng n tãag Yafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Toadgã yii beenẽ n kẽng yaanga, n kell n tũ Gita-Hefɛɛre, ne Ita-Katsin, n tɩ tãag Rimon, n gõdg n tɩ tãag Neya." 
Joshua19:14 Toadgã kell n gõdga Hanaton rɩtg n tɩ yek Yifta-Ɛll bokã. 
Joshua19:15 Tẽms nins sẽn paase, yaa Katate, Nahalalle, Simron, la Yideyala ne Betlehɛm. Yaa tẽms piig la a yiib ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua19:16 Tẽn-bãmb ne b tẽn-kɩremsã n yɩ a Zabulõ buudã yagens pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b rotã sõore." 
Joshua19:17 Poeerã yãka zĩig a naasẽ soabã n kõ Isakaar buudã yagense, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua19:18 Bãmb toadgã tãagda Yizreyɛlle, Kesulote, Sunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hafa-rayim, Sɩyõ, Anaharate," 
Joshua19:20 Rabite, Kisiyõ, Abɛɛse," 
Joshua19:21 Remete, Ɛn-Ganim, Ɛn-Hada ne Bɛt-Pasɛɛse," 
Joshua19:22 toadgã tɩ teega Taboor ne Sahatsima, ne Bɛt-Semeese, n tɩ yek Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã. Yaa tẽms piig la a yoobe, ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua19:23 Tẽn-bãmb ne b tẽn-kɩremsã n yaa Isakaar buudã yagens pʋɩɩre, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua19:24 Poeerã yãka zĩig a nu soabã n kõ a Asɛɛr buudã yagense, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua19:25 Bãmb tẽngã tods yaa Helkate, Hali, Betɛn, Aksafe," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelɛke, Ameyaad ne Miseyalle, bãmb toadgã rag n tɩ tãaga nin-taoore, Karmell ne Sihoor-Libnat sẽnẽ." 
Joshua19:27 Dẽ, toadgã wẽnemdame n teesd wĩndgã sẽn pukdẽ wã sẽnẽ, Bɛt-Dagõ, n tɩ yek Zabulõ rãmbã soolem ne Yifta-Ɛll longã n kell n dabd rɩtgo, Bɛt-Emek ne Neyiyɛll sẽnẽ, n tɩ tãag Kabull sẽn be goabgã," 
Joshua19:28 la Ebrõ, Rehoobe, Hamon ne Kana, hal n tãag Sɩdõ-kãsengẽ wã." 
Joshua19:29 Dẽ, toadgã wẽnemdame n teesd Rama sẽnẽ, n tɩ tãag Tɩɩr tẽngã sẽn tar pãngã, la sẽn dabd Ooza sẽnẽ, n na n tũ Akziib soolmã n tɩ yek ko-kãsengã." 
Joshua19:30 Tẽms sẽn paas yaa Huma, Afɛke ne Rehoobe. Yaa tẽms pisi la a yiib ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua19:31 Tẽn-bãmbã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã yaa Asɛɛr buudã soolem wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore. 
Joshua19:32 Poeerã yãka zĩig a yoobẽ soabã n kõ Neftali buudã, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua19:33 Neftali buudã toadg sɩnga hal Helɛfe, ne hal Elõ, n pɩʋʋgd Sanaanim, Adami-Nekɛɛb ne Yabneyɛlle, hal n tãag Lakum, n tɩ yek Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
Joshua19:34 Toadgã gõdg n teesa yaanga, Aaznot-Taboor sẽnẽ, n yi beenẽ n dabd Ukoke. Toadgã tɩ yeka Zabulõ nebã soolem nug-goabga, ne Asɛɛr nebã soolem yaanga ne Zʋʋda. Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rag n bee wĩntoogã sẽn pukdẽ wã." 
Joshua19:35 Tẽms nins sẽn dag n tar pãngã yaa: Sidim, Sɛɛre, Hamate, Rakate, Kinerɛte," 
Joshua19:36 Ãdma, Rama, Hasoore," 
Joshua19:37 Kedɛɛse, Ederyi, Ɛn-Hasoore," 
Joshua19:38 Yireyon, Migdall-Ɛlle, Horɛm, Bɛt-hanat ne Bɛt-Semeese. Yaa tẽms piig la a wɛ ne b tẽn-kɩremse." 
Joshua19:39 Tẽn-bãmb ne b tẽn-kɩremsã yaa Neftali buudã pʋɩɩr wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore. 
Joshua19:40 Poeerã yãka zĩig a yopoe soabã n kõ Dan buudã, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua19:41 Bãmb soolmã toadg sɩngda Soreya, Ɛstaolle, Ir-Semeese," 
Joshua19:42 Saalabin, Ayalõ, la Yitala," 
Joshua19:43 Elõ, Timnata, Ekrõ," 
Joshua19:44 Ɛlteke, Gibetõ, Baalate," 
Joshua19:45 Yehuude, Bene-Berake, Kat-Rimon." 
Joshua19:46 Leb n paasa Yarkõ ko-bundsã ne Rakõn, la soolem ning sẽn be Zafa neng taoorã." 
Joshua19:47 B rag n yõka Dan buudã n deeg b soolmã. Dẽ, Dan nebã boba b zab-teed n tɩ zab ne Lesɛm nebã. Dan nebã tõoga bãmb n kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋga, n deeg tẽngã n sooge, n pʋd-a yʋʋr tɩ Dan, wa a Dan sẽn yaa bãmb yaabã yʋʋrã." 
Joshua19:48 Tẽn-bãmbã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã yaa Dan buudã soolem wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore. 
Joshua19:49 Israyɛll nebã sẽn pʋɩ tẽngã n sɛ, n yãgs tẽngã todsã fãa, Israyɛll nebã yãka zĩig sʋkã n kõ a Nun biig a Zozoe." 
Joshua19:50 Bãmb kõ a Zozoe tẽng ning a sẽn date, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b maan to-to wã. Yaa Timnat-Seera sẽn be Efrayiim tãngã zugã. A Zozoe lebsa tẽngã n me n kẽ." 
Joshua19:51 Tẽn-bãmbã fãa yaa tẽms nins maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar ne a Nun biig a Zozoe, la Israyɛll buudã rot kãsem-dãmb sẽn pʋɩ wa sẽn zems poeerã b sẽn maan sɛk roogã noor Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Sɩlo wã. Dẽ, bãmb pʋɩɩ tẽngã n sɛ." 
Joshua20:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zozoe n yeel-a yaa: 
Joshua20:2 «Gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel-b yaa: Yãk-y weem-tẽms yãmb sẽn tõe n tɩ kẽ n soonde, wa mam sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a togs yãmbã." 
Joshua20:3 Ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, tɩ ka ne pʋ-toogo, bɩ a zoe n kẽng beenẽ. Tɩ sẽn ki-a wã neb sã n dat n dok b sũur ne yẽnda, a sẽn kʋ b nedã yĩnga, bɩ b ra paam-a ye." 
Joshua20:4 Ned sã n kʋ a to, a tog n zoe n kẽnga tẽn-bãmb tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ. A sã n ta tẽngã noore, bɩ a yals be n togs a yellã tẽngã kãsem-dãmba. Kãsem-dãmbã na n deeg-a-la b tẽngã pʋga, n bao zĩig n kõ-a t'a zĩnd bãmb sʋka." 
Joshua20:5 Ned ning sẽn dat n dok a sũurã sã n pʋgl yẽnda n wa, bɩ kãsem-dãmb ra sak n yõk sẽn kʋ-a nedã n kɩs ye. Bala, a ka kʋ a to wã ne pʋ-toog ye, yaa yĩdgu, beem sẽn dag n ka be b sʋkã yĩnga." 
Joshua20:6 Bɩ yẽnda zĩnd tẽn-kãng pʋg hal tɩ b wa bʋ a bʋʋd Israyɛll nebã taoore, la hal tɩ maan-kʋʋr kãsem ning sẽn vɩ wakat-kãngã ki. Dẽ, sẽn kʋ-a nedã tõe n lebg n leba a tẽngẽ wã, ne a nebẽ wã, tẽng ning yẽnda sẽn yi n zoe wã pʋgẽ.»" 
Joshua20:7 Israyɛll nebã yãka Galɩle tẽng a ye sẽn boond tɩ Kedɛɛs n be Neftali tãmsã sʋka, ne Sɩkɛm sẽn be Efrayiim tãmsã sʋkã, n paas ne Kiryat-Arba b sẽn boond tɩ Ebrõ n be Zʋʋda tãmsã sʋkã." 
Joshua20:8 La Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, Zeeriko nin-taoorã, b yãka Bɛtsɛɛr sẽn be weoogẽ wã, yaa tẽn-nabdrẽ sẽn be Rubɛn nebã tẽngã pʋgã. Bãmb yãka Ramot sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã sẽn yaa Gaad buudã soolmã sʋkã. B leb n yãka Golan sẽn be Basannã, Manaase buudã soolmã sʋka." 
Joshua20:9 Tẽn-bãmbã n yaa tẽms nins b sẽn yãk Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, ne sãambã sẽn be bãmb sʋkã yĩnga, tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, bɩ a zoe n kẽng be, tɩ b ra wa kʋ-a n dok b sũur t'a nan ka yals nebã taoor tɩ b kao a bʋʋd ye." 
Joshua21:1 Leevi buudã rot kãsem-dãmbã kẽnga maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar ne a Nun biig a Zozoe, ne Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmb nengẽ," 
Joshua21:2 Sɩlo tẽngã sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã, n yeel-b yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n goma ne a Moyiis n yeel tɩ b yãk tẽms n kõ tõnd tɩ d kẽ, la d soog a pʋ-weesã n wãbneg d rũmsi.»" 
Joshua21:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã kõo Leevi buudã tẽms nins sẽn pʋgdã tɩ b sooge, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tɩ b maan to-to wã." 
Joshua21:4 B maana poeer a Kehat yagensã yĩnga, la b paama tẽms piig la a tãabo, Maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã sʋka, la yaa tẽms sẽn be Zʋʋda buudã ne Sɩmyõ buudã la Benzame buudã soolem pʋse." 
Joshua21:5 La b maana poeerã yɛsa, n yãk tẽms piiga, Efrayiim buudã ne Dan buudã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk rot soolem pʋsẽ, n kõ a Kehat yagens a taabã." 
Joshua21:6 B maana poeere, n yãk tẽms piig la a tãab Isakaar buudã ne Asɛɛr buudã ne Neftali buudã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã sẽn be Basan wã soolem pʋgẽ n kõ a Gɛrsõ yagensã." 
Joshua21:7 B yãka tẽms piig la a yiib Rubɛn buudã ne Gaad buudã ne Zabulõ buudã soolem pʋgẽ, n kõ a Meraari yagensã wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore." 
Joshua21:8 Israyɛll nebã maana poeer n yãk tẽn-bãmbã ne b tẽn-kɩremsã n kõ Leevi yagensã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Moyiis t'a maanã. 
Joshua21:9 Tẽms nins b sẽn yãk n na n kõ Zʋʋda buudã ne Sɩmyõ buudã yʋy la d sẽn na n sõdgã. 
Joshua21:10 B yãka tẽn-bãmb n kõ a Leevi yagensã sẽn yaa a Kehat yagensã sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagensã. Bala, poeerã reng n yãka bãmb pipi." 
Joshua21:11 B kõo bãmb Kiryat-Arba b sẽn boond tɩ Ebrõ wã. A bee Zʋʋda tãmsã sʋka, la yaa ne a tẽn-kɩremsã sẽn gũbg-a wã. A Arba rag n yaa a Anak ba." 
Joshua21:12 La b rɩka tẽngã pʋtã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã n kõ a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛbe. 
Joshua21:13 B yãka weem-tẽms n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ yagensã, tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to bɩ a zoe n tɩ soond be. Yaa Ebrõ ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Libna ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Joshua21:14 Yaa ne Yatɩɩre ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Ektemoa ne a tẽn-kɩremsã," 
Joshua21:15 n paas Holon ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Debɩɩr ne a tẽn-kɩremsã," 
Joshua21:16 Ayin ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Yuta ne a pʋ-weesã, n paas Bɛt-Semees ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a wɛ la b kõ buud a yiibã." 
Joshua21:17 B sẽn yãk Benzame buudã tẽms ninsã yaa Gabawõ ne a pʋ-weesã, Geba ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:18 n paas Anot ne a pʋ-weesã, n naag ne Almon ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:19 A Aarõ yagensã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã tẽmsã fãa sõor yaa tẽms piig la a tãabo. 
Joshua21:20 B maana poeerã n yãk Efrayiim yagensã soolem tẽms n kõ a Kehat yagens a taabã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã. 
Joshua21:21 B maana poeer n yãk tẽms n kõ a Kehat yagensã tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to, bɩ a zoe n tɩ soond be: yaa Sɩkɛm sẽn be Efrayiim tãmsã sʋkã ne a pʋ-weesã, la Gezɛɛr ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:22 n paas Kibtesayim ne a pʋ-weesã, n naag ne Bɛt-Horon ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:23 Dan buudã tẽms b sẽn yãkã la woto: Ɛlteke ne a pʋ-weesã, ne Gibetõ ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:24 n paas Ayalõ ne a pʋ-weesã, n naag ne Gat-Rimo ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a naase," 
Joshua21:25 Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã tẽms b sẽn yãkã yaa: Taanak ne a pʋ-weesã, ne Gat-Rimo ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a yiibu." 
Joshua21:26 A Kehat yagens a taabã tẽms yaa tẽms piig ne b pʋ-weese. 
Joshua21:27 B yãka tẽms a yiib ne b pʋ-wees Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã soolem pʋgẽ n kõ a Gɛrsõ yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã, tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to bɩ a zoe n tɩ soond beenẽ. Yaa Golan sẽn be basannã ne a pʋ-weesã, n paas Bɛstra ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a yiibu." 
Joshua21:28 B leb n yãka Kisyõ ne a pʋ-weesã, n paas Dabrat ne a pʋ-weesã Isakaar buudã soolmã pʋgẽ," 
Joshua21:29 n paas Yarmut ne a pʋ-weesã, n naag ne Ɛn-Ganim ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:30 B leb n yãka Miseyall ne a pʋ-weesã, Abdõ ne a pʋ-weesã Asɛɛr buudã soolem pʋgẽ," 
Joshua21:31 n paas ne Hɛlkat ne a pʋ-weesã, ne Rehoob ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:32 Neftali soolmã pʋga, b yãka tẽms beenẽ tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to, bɩ a zoe n kẽng be. Yaa Kadɛɛs sẽn be Galɩle wã ne a pʋ-weesã, Hamot-Door ne a pʋ-weesã, n paas ne Kartãn ne a pʋ-weesã, yaa tẽms a tãabo." 
Joshua21:33 Gɛrsõ yagensã paama tẽms piig la a tãab wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõore. 
Joshua21:34 Leevi buudã rot neb sẽn ket yaa a Meraari yagensã. B yãka Zabulõ soolmã tẽms n kõ bãmba. Yaa Yokneyam ne a pʋ-weesã, Karta ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna ne a pʋ-weesã, n paas Nahalall ne a pʋ-weesã. Rẽ yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:36 Rubɛn buudã soolem pʋgẽ, b yãka Bɛtsɛɛr ne a pʋ-weesã, Yatsa ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:37 n paas Kedmot ne a pʋ-weesã, ne Mefat ne a pʋ-weesã. Rẽ yaa tẽms a naase." 
Joshua21:38 Gaad buudã soolem pʋgẽ, b yãka tẽms tɩ ned sã n kʋ a to ne yĩdgu, bɩ a zoe n tɩ soond be. Yaa Ramot sẽn be Galaadã ne a pʋ-weesã, Mahanayim ne a pʋ-weesã," 
Joshua21:39 n paas Hɛsbon ne a pʋ-weesã, ne Yazɛɛr ne a pʋ-weesã. Yaa tẽms a naas la fãa." 
Joshua21:40 B sẽn maan poeerã n yãk tẽms nins n kõ a Meraari yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã kellã, wa sẽn zems b buudã rot sõorã, yaa tẽms piig la a yiibu." 
Joshua21:41 Leevi buudã sẽn paam tẽms nins Israyɛll nebã soolem pʋgẽ wã, yaa tẽms pis-naas la a nii, ne b pʋ-weesã." 
Joshua21:42 Tẽn-kãensã tẽng fãa rag n tara a pʋ-wees tɩ gũbg-a. Tẽmsã fãa rag n yaa woto. 
Joshua21:43 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana a woto, n kõ Israyɛll nebã tẽngã wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãab b yaab-rãmbã tɩ b na n kõ-b lame wã. Israyɛll nebã reega tẽngã n kẽ." 
Joshua21:44 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã soolmã sẽn gilgã fãa zĩnd ne laafɩ, wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãab Israyɛll kambã yaab-rãmb tɩ b na n maaname wã. Israyɛll nebã bɛ baa a yembr ka tõog n yals n teeg a yãoog ne bãmb ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bãmb tõog b bɛɛbã fãa." 
Joshua21:45 Kãab-nood nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab Israyɛll buudã baa a yembr ka vaal ye, b fãa paama pidsgu." 
Joshua22:1 Dẽ, a Zozoe boola Rubɛn buudã, Gaad buudã ne Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã n tigme." 
Joshua22:2 A Zozoe yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb sak n maana bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeel yãmb tɩ y maanã, la y sak n maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã." 
Joshua22:3 Hal daar zãr tɩ ta rũndã, yãmb ka tol n bas y ba-biisã ye. Yãmb saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb ningã." 
Joshua22:4 Dẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn sõng yãmb ba-biisã tɩ b zĩ ne bãan wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãab bãmbã, moasã, bɩ y lebg n kuil y tẽngẽ wã. Kẽng-y n tɩ zĩnd-y tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n kõ yãmb Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã." 
Joshua22:5 La bũmb sẽn be bala, modg-y n sak-y noy ninsi, la tõod nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n wilg yãmbã. B yeelame yaa: Nong-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, la y tũ bãmb soayã neere, n sak bãmb tõodã, la y mobg bãmba, la y tʋm bãmb yĩng ne y sũyã fãa, ne y yamã fãa.»" 
Joshua22:6 A Zozoe ninga bãmb bark n yeel-b tɩ b kuili, la b kuila b yiyã." 
Joshua22:7 A Moyiis rag n kõ a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã zĩig Basan soolmã pʋg tɩ b sooge, la a Zozoe kõo pʋɩ-sʋk ning sẽn ketã zĩig sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã nin-taoore, n yegl b saam-biisã. A Zozoe sẽn yeel-b tɩ b kuilã, a ning-b-la barka," 
Joshua22:8 n yeel-b yaa: «Lebg-y n kuil-y y tẽngẽ wã ne arzegs wʋsgo, ne rũmsi wʋsgo, ne wanzuri, ne sãnem, ne zũudu, ne kutu la ne futu. Rɩk-y laog ning yãmb sẽn wʋk y bɛɛbã nengẽ wã n pʋɩ ne y saam-biisã.»" 
Joshua22:9 Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã basa Israyɛll nebã Sɩlo sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã n lebg n leb Galaad soolmẽ wã, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Moyiis t'a kõ-b tɩ b soogã." 
Joshua22:10 Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã sẽn wa n ta Zʋrdẽ soolmã sẽn yaa Kana-rãmbã soolmã, bãmb mee tẽn-kug-kẽeng beenẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore." 
Joshua22:11 Israyɛll nebã wʋmame tɩ b gomd tɩ Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã, la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã mee tẽn-kugr n tees Kana-rãmbã tẽngẽ Zʋrdẽ soolmã pʋga, kɩreng ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn beẽ wã." 
Joshua22:12 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wʋm woto, Israyɛll nebã fãa tigma taab Sɩlo n na n tɩ zab ne-ba." 
Joshua22:13 Israyɛll nebã tʋma maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buud pʋɩ-sʋkã nengẽ," 
Joshua22:14 la buudã nanambs piig n tũ yẽnda. Israyɛll buudã roog fãa yaa naab a yembre, bãmb fãa yaa nanambse, n be b buudã pʋga, Israyɛll neb kʋʋngã sʋka." 
Joshua22:15 Bãmb kẽnga Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buud pʋɩ-sʋkã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: 
Joshua22:16 «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã fãa sokdame yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã a woto. Yãmb wẽnemd n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan tẽn-kugr y mens yĩnga, n wẽnemd n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab rũndã?" 
Joshua22:17 Tõnd beegrã d sẽn maan Pewoorã nan yaa bilf d yĩnga, tɩ d yaool nan ka yɩlg d mens n sɛ hal tɩ ta rũndã ye, la sɩbgrã sẽn leb n paam tõnd sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam nebã!" 
Joshua22:18 Yãmb sã n yik n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab rũndã, yãmb sã n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, beoogo, bãmb sũurã na n yika ne Israyɛll nebã fãa." 
Joshua22:19 Yãmb sã n mikame tɩ b sẽn kõ yãmb tẽng ningã rẽgmame, bɩ y yi n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽngẽ wã, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab belmã sẽn beẽ wã, n paam zĩig tõnd sʋk n zĩndi. La y ra kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y ra welg y mens ne tõndo, n maan tẽn-kugr y mens yĩnga, n paas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugr ye." 
Joshua22:20 A Zerak biig a Akã sẽn dag n maan yel-wẽnd n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa n kẽ kongr pʋga, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puugi. La ka yɩ yẽnda a yembr n ki a beegrã yĩng ye.»" 
Joshua22:21 Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã leoka Israyɛll nin-buiidã nanambs n yeel-b yaa: 
Joshua22:22 «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabã n mi tõnd sẽn maan a woto wã võore! La Israyɛll nebã me na n bãnga a võore! Sã n yaa kɩɩsg yĩng la tõnd sẽn maan woto wã, sã n yaa sẽn na n maan sẽn ka zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, bɩ b ra fãag tõnd rũndã ye!" 
Joshua22:23 Tõnd sẽn me tẽn-kugrã sã n yaa tɩ tõnd dat n wẽnemd n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la sã n yaa tɩ tõnd maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum a zugu, n wa ne bõn-koaadl kũun a zugu, la d sã n maana zems-n-taar maand a zugu, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg tõnd rẽ yĩnga." 
Joshua22:24 La yellã ka woto ye. Sɩdã, tõnd sẽn maan woto wã yaa tɩ rabeem n yõk-do. Tõnd tagsame tɩ yãmb kambã na n wa yeela tõnd kambã nindaar sẽn wate: Bõe lagem-n-taar n be yãmb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sʋka?" 
Joshua22:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tɩ yɩ toadg tõnd ne yãmb sẽn yaa Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã sʋka. Dẽ wã, yãmb ka tar lagem-n-taar ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye! Rẽ tõe n kɩtame tɩ yãmb kambã yel-manesem kɩt tɩ tõnd kambã ka zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem ye." 
Joshua22:26 Dẽ, tõnd yeela d mens yaa: Wa-y tɩ d me tẽn-kugri, la ka sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wall d maan maoong a to a zug ye." 
Joshua22:27 La yaa sẽn na n yɩ kaset tõnd ne yãmb sʋka, la a yɩ kaset tõnd yagensã ne yãmb yagensã sʋk tõnd loogr zugẽ. Sẽn wilgd tɩ tõnd naaga taaba, n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum la zems-n-taar maando, ne maand a taaba, n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yãmb kambã ra wa yeel tõnd kambã tɩ b ka tar lagem-n-taar ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye!" 
Joshua22:28 Tõnd yeelame: Gomd a woto buud sã n wa zĩnd tõnd sʋka, wall tõnd yagensã sʋka, tõnd na n leok-b lame yaa: Bɩ y ges Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã mamsgã tõnd yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã. B ka maan-a maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wall maand a taab yĩng ye, la b maan-a lame t'a tõe n yɩ kaset tõnd ne yãmb sʋka." 
Joshua22:29 Dẽ wã, tõnd sã n tagsd n dat n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo wall d sã n dat n wẽnemd n bas bãmb rũndã n maan tẽn-kugr n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum a zugu, wall d maan bõn-koaadl kũun maoongo, bɩ maand a taaba, n paas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugr sẽn be bãmb sɛk roogã noorã, yõwã yaa yel-beedo!»" 
Joshua22:30 Maan-kʋʋd a Fineyaas ne Israyɛll nebã nanambsã la Israyɛll nin-buiidã taoor dãmbã sẽn dag n yas ne yẽnda wã sẽn wʋm goam nins fãa Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã sẽn gomã, b sũyã yɩɩ noogo." 
Joshua22:31 Maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas yeela Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã yaa: «Moasã, tõnd miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne tõndo, yãmb sẽn ka beeg bãmb wa tõnd sẽn dag n tẽedã yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn maan woto wã, yãmb fãaga Israyɛll nebã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgrã.»" 
Joshua22:32 Maan-kʋʋd a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas ne nanambsã yii Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã nengẽ Galaad tẽnga, n lebg n wa Israyɛll nebã nengẽ Kana tẽnga, n wa togs-b bũmbã fãa sẽn yɩ to-to." 
Joshua22:33 Israyɛll nebã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãense, b sũyã yɩɩ noogo, la b pẽga Wẽnnaam. La bãmb ka leb n gom tɩ b na n kẽnga Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã tẽngẽ n tɩ zab ne-b ye." 
Joshua22:34 Rubɛn nebã ne Gaad nebã pʋda tẽn-kugrã yʋʋr tɩ: «A kaseto.» Bala, tẽn-kugrã yaa kaset tõnd fãa yĩnga, n wilgdẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam." 
Joshua23:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog b bɛɛbã fãa sẽn gũbg bãmbã. Dẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã zĩnda ne bãan n kaoose. A Zozoe rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo." 
Joshua23:2 Dẽ, a Zozoe boola Israyɛll nebã fãa ne b kãsem-dãmbã, b nanambsã, b bʋ-kaoodbã, la b tãb-biis nanambsã, n yeel-b yaa: «Mam yaa nin-kẽema, m kʋʋla wʋsgo." 
Joshua23:3 La yãmb yãnda bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn maan buud a taabã n sõng yãmbã. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n zab n sõng yãmba." 
Joshua23:4 Mam maana poeer n pʋɩ soolmã n kõ yãmb tɩ y sooge, wa sẽn zems y buudã rot sõore. Yaa tẽms nins sẽn ket sẽn sɩng ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tɩ y tog n deegã, ne tẽms nins fãa mam sẽn zab n deegã, hal n tãag ko-kãsengã, wĩndgã sẽn lʋɩtẽ wã sẽnẽ." 
Joshua23:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã na n dig-b lame tɩ b zãag ne yãmba, n kɩt tɩ y tõog-ba, la y reeg b tẽngã, wa yãmb Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n yeel yãmbã." 
Joshua23:6 Modg-y ne y sũyã fãa, n nang pãng n sak bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã, la y maan wa b sẽn yeel be wã, la y ra bʋdg n bas-a n kẽng goabg bɩ rɩtg ye," 
Joshua23:7 la y ra naag buud a taabã sẽn ket n be ne yãmbã ye. Da sak-y n pʋd-y bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã yʋy y sʋka, la y ra saag n wẽen ne-ba, la y ra waoog-b ye. La y ra saag n wõgemd b wẽnnaam-dãmbã taoor ye." 
Joshua23:8 Kell-y n gãd-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã wa yãmb sẽn sɩng n maandẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã wã. 
Joshua23:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ yãmb dig buud wʋsg sẽn tar pãnga. La hal tɩ ta rũndã, ned ba a yembr nan ka tõog n yals n teeg a yãoog ne yãmb ye." 
Joshua23:10 Yãmb ned a yembr tõe n diga bãmb neb tusri, bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n zabd n sõngd yãmb wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Joshua23:11 Dẽ wã, bɩ y gũus y mens neere, la y nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Joshua23:12 Yãmb sã n wẽnemd n naag buud a taabã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, la y bao zood ne-b n dɩgs b kom-pugli wã n maan y pagba, la y maan lagem-n-taar ne bãmba," 
Joshua23:13 bɩ y bãng neere, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ka na n leb n sõng yãmb tɩ y tõog n dig bu-kãensã ye. Bu-kãensã na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb lʋɩ bẽdg pʋg n paam toogo, b na n namsa yãmb wa b sẽn pãbd ned ne kalwaase, la wa gõos sẽn kõs ned nini, hal tɩ yãmb wa menem n bas tẽn-sõng-kãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã." 
Joshua23:14 La ne maam, sã n yɩ bilfu, mam na n yii dũniyã, wa neb a taabã. Moasã, yãmb mens mi y sũyã pʋse, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n kãab yãmb kãab-nood ninsã fãa paama pidsg n ka vaal ye. Kãabdã fãa paama pidsg yãmb yĩnga, la bãmb ba a yembr ka vaal ye." 
Joshua23:15 Beneere, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kãab-noodã fãa sẽn paam pidsg wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãab yãmb to-to wã, woto me, yãmb sã n sãam kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn maan ne yãmbã, bãmb na n pidsa kãab-wẽns nins fãa b sẽn dag n kãab yãmb n kɩt tɩ y menem n bas tẽn-noog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã, la yãmb sã n tɩ pʋʋs wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba, n wõgemd n waoog-ba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur na n yika tao-tao ne yãmba, la b na n menesa yãmb tao-tao n kɩt tɩ y yi n bas tẽn-sõng ning b sẽn kõ yãmbã.»" 
Joshua23:16  
Joshua24:1 A Zozoe tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa Sɩkɛm, n bool Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã, b nanambsã, b bʋ-kaoodbã ne b tãb-biis nanambsã, la b fãa yalsa Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Joshua24:2 A Zozoe yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yeelame: Yãmb yaab-rãmbã: a Teera ne a kambã, a Abrahaam ne a Nahoor dag n bee Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd hal daar zãra, la b rag n waoogda wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba." 
Joshua24:3 La mam yãka yãmb yaab a Abrahaam Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, n kɩt t'a saag Kana tẽngã fãa. Mam kɩtame t'a yagensã yɩ wʋsgo, n kõ yẽnda a Izake." 
Joshua24:4 Mam kõ a Izak kamba: a Zakoob ne a Ezayu. Mam kõ a Ezayu Seyɩɩr soolmã sẽn be tãms sʋkã t'a sooge, la a Zakoob ne a kambã kẽnga Ezɩpte." 
Joshua24:5 Mam tʋma a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, la mam maana bõn-bãn Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ n sɩbg-ba, la mam yiisa yãmb beenẽ." 
Joshua24:6 Mam yiisa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpte, n wa ta ko-kãsengã noore, tɩ Ezɩpt rãmbã yik ne b saar-dãmb la b wiid n pʋgl yãmb yaab-rãmbã n ta tãnwĩis ko-kãsengã noore." 
Joshua24:7 La yãmb yaab-rãmbã kelmame n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ lik zĩnd yãmb yaab-rãmbã ne Ezɩpt nebã sʋka. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ ko-kãsengã lebg n lim bãmba, n dɩ bãmba. Yãmb nin yãnda bũmb ning mam sẽn maan Ezɩpt nebã. Yãmb zĩnda weoogã pʋg n kaoos wʋsgo." 
Joshua24:8 Mam talla yãmb n kẽng Amoor-dãmbã tẽng sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, la b zaba ne yãmba. Mam kɩtame tɩ y tõog-ba, n deeg b tẽngã, la mam sãam-b-la yãmb nifẽ." 
Joshua24:9 A Sipoor biig a Balak sẽn yaa Moaab rĩmã yikame n zab ne Israyɛlle. A Balak kɩtame tɩ b bool a Bewoor biig a Balaam t'a wa kãab yãmb wẽnga. 
Joshua24:10 La mam ka kelg a Balaam ye. La yɩɩ kãab-nood bal la a rag n kãabd yãmba, la mam fãaga yãmb a Balak nugẽ." 
Joshua24:11 Yãmb pɩʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n ta Zeeriko. Zeeriko rãmbã yikame n zab ne yãmba, n paas ne Amoor-dãmbã, Perɛɛz-rãmbã, Kana-rãmbã, Hɛt-rãmbã, Garazim-rãmbã, Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuus-rãmbã. La mam kɩtame tɩ yãmb tõog-ba." 
Joshua24:12 Mam tʋma kãnenkãas tɩ b reng yãmb taoor n dig Amoor-dãmbã nanambs a yiibã tɩ b zoe n bas yãmba. La ka yɩ ne yãmb zabr sʋʋgã, wall y tãbdã pãng ye." 
Joshua24:13 Mam kõo yãmb tẽms yãmb sẽn ka nams n paam ye, la m kõ-y tẽms yãmb sẽn ka tilg n kẽ, la m kõ-y reezẽ tɩɩs pʋto, ne oliiv tɩɩs yãmb sẽn ka sele, tɩ yãmb yaool n dɩt-ba.»" 
Joshua24:14 A Zozoe paasame n yeel yaa: «Moasã, bɩ y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab la y sak bãmb ne burkĩnd la ne pʋ-peelem. Zãag-y y mens ne wẽnnaam-dãmb nins yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n pʋʋsd Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã la Ezɩpt pʋgẽ wã, la y tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Joshua24:15 Yãmb sã n ka rat n tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y bao y sẽn na n tũ a soab rũndã: Sã n yaa wẽnnaam-dãmb nins yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n tũud Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã la y rat n tũ, bɩ y tũ. Sã n leb n yaa Amoor-dãmbã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã wẽnnaam-dãmb la y rat n tũ, bɩ y tũ. La maam ne m zakã rãmb yẽ, tõnd na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Joshua24:16 Nebã leokame n yeel yaa: «Tõnd sã n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba, yaa yel-beedo." 
Joshua24:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam. Yaa bãmb n yiis tõnd ne d yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpt tẽng yembdã pʋga. Yaa bãmb n maan bõn-bãn-kãsemsã tõnd nifẽ, la yaa bãmb n gũ tõnd sorã zug d kẽndã wakate, la b gũ tõnd tɩ d pɩʋʋg buud a taabã fãa tẽms n looge." 
Joshua24:18 Bãmb n dig buud a taabã fãa tɩ b zoe tõnd taoore, ne Amoor-dãmbã sẽn dag n be tẽn-kãngã pʋgã me. Dẽ wã, tõnd me na n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, bãmb yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam.»" 
Joshua24:19 A Zozoe yeela nebã yaa: «Yãmb ka na n tõog n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bala, b yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa pʋ-peelem soaba, la b yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ka sakd tɩ b bas bãmb n waoog wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab ye. Bãmb ka na n bas yãmb beegrã ne y yel-wẽnã taal ye." 
Joshua24:20 Yãmb sã n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sak wẽn-sãamse, bãmb na n wẽnemd n bas-y lame, n sɩbg-yã, la b na n menes-y lame, baa ne b sẽn dag n maan yãmb neerã.»" 
Joshua24:21 Nebã yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Ayo! Tõnd ka na n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab ye. Tõnd na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» 
Joshua24:22 A Zozoe yeela nebã yaa: «Yãmb yaa y mens kaset dãmba, tɩ yaa yãmb n yãk yam tɩ y na n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» Nebã leokame n yeele: «N-yẽe! Tõnd yaa d mens kaset dãmba." 
Joshua24:23 Sã n yaa a woto, bɩ y yiis bu-zẽmsã wẽn-sãamsã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã, la y wẽnemd n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ne y sũyã fãa.»" 
Joshua24:24 Nebã leb n yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Tõnd na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã la d sak bãmb sẽn yeelã.» 
Joshua24:25 Badaare, Sɩkɛm tẽngã pʋga, a Zozoe maana kaool ne Israyɛll nebã, n kõ-b tõod la noyã." 
Joshua24:26 A Zozoe gʋlsa bõn-kãensã fãa Wẽnnaam tõodã sebr pʋga. Yẽnda rɩka kug-bedr n vigl terebẽnt tɩɩg ning sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩ-sõngã zĩig tẽngrã. 
Joshua24:27 Dẽ, a Zozoe yeela nebã yaa: «Ade, kug-kãngã na n yɩɩ kaset tõnd yĩnga, bala, kugrã wʋma goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom ne tõndã. Dẽ wã, a na n yɩɩ kaset tõnd yĩnga, tɩ yãmb da wa kɩɩs y Wẽnnaamã ye.»" 
Joshua24:28 Dẽ poore, a Zozoe kɩtame tɩ nebã ned kam fãa kuil a yiri." 
Joshua24:29 Bõn-kãens fãa loogr zugẽ, a Nun biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdã kiime. La wakat-kãng t'a tara yʋʋm koabg la piiga." 
Joshua24:30 B tɩ mum-a-la a meng soolmã pʋg Timnat-Seera sẽn be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋga, Gaas tãngã nug-rɩtgo." 
Joshua24:31 Israyɛll nebã saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, a Zozoe vɩɩmã wakate, la nin-kẽemb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Zozoe wã vɩɩm wakate, la b sẽn da ket n tẽr Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan bũmb nins fãa n kõ Israyɛll nebã wakate." 
Joshua24:32 Israyɛll nebã muma a Zozɛf koabã bãmb sẽn dag n tall n yi Ezɩpt n wa wã Sɩkɛmã, zĩig ning a Zakoob sẽn dag n deeg a Sɩkɛm ba a Hamoor kom-dibli wã nengẽ n da wanzuri koabgã. Rẽnda fãa yɩɩ a Zozɛf kambã soolem." 
Joshua24:33 A Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar kiime tɩ b mum-a a biig a Fineyaas soolem tãngã zugu. B rag n dɩka tãn-kãng sẽn be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã n kõ a Fineyaase. 
Judges1:1 A Zozoe kũumã zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yaa bu-bʋg tõnd sʋkã, n tog n lʋɩ taoor n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Kana nebã?»" 
Judges1:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame yaa: «Yaa Zʋʋda buudã n tog n lʋɩ taoore, bala, mam ninga tẽngã bãmb nugẽ.»" 
Judges1:3 Zʋʋda buudã yeela Sɩmyõ buudã sẽn yaa bãmb ba-biisã yaa: «Wa-y n naag-y tõndo, tɩ d kẽng soolem ning b sẽn pʋɩ n kõ tõndã, n tɩ zab ne Kana nebã n deeg tẽngã. Dẽ poore, tõnd me na n naaga yãmb n tɩ zab n reeg y soolmã n kõ-yã.» Dẽ, a Sɩmyõ yagensã kẽng n tɩ naaga Zʋʋda yagensã." 
Judges1:4 Zʋʋda buudã kẽnga zabrã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõnga bãmb tɩ b tõog Kana nebã ne Perɛɛz-rãmbã, n kʋ b neb tus piig Bezɛke." 
Judges1:5 Sɩd me, bãmb tɩ mika a Adoni-Bezɛk Bezɛk n zab ne-a, la b tõoga Kana nebã ne Perɛɛz-rãmbã." 
Judges1:6 La a Adoni-Bezɛk zoeeme, la Israyɛll nebã rig-a lame n tɩ yõke, la b fiuusa a nug-raadã ne a nao-raadã." 
Judges1:7 La a Adoni-Bezɛk yeelame yaa: «Mam dag n fiuusa nanambs pis-yopoe nus-raad ne b nao-raad tɩ b wat n dɩgsd mam rɩ-kɛl n dɩtẽ. Dẽ wã, yaa Wẽnnaam n dol maam m tʋʋmde.» La b talla a Adoni-Bezɛk n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, la a kii be." 
Judges1:8 Zʋʋda buudã kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Zeruzalɛm nebã n deeg tẽngã. Bãmb kʋʋ Zeruzalɛm nebã ne zabr sʋʋga la b yõog tẽngã bugum. 
Judges1:9 Dẽ poore, Zʋʋda buudã kẽngame n na n tɩ zab ne Kana neb nins sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã, la sẽn be-b kunkubẽ wã ne sẽn be-b goabgã." 
Judges1:10 Zʋʋda nebã kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Kana nebã sẽn be Ebrõ, b sẽn dag n boond tɩ Kiryat-Araba wã. La b tõoga Sesayi buudã, Ayimane buudã ne Talmayi buudã." 
Judges1:11 La bãmb yii beenẽ n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Debɩɩr nebã. Wakat sẽn looge, b rag n boonda tẽn-kãng tɩ Kiryat-Sefɛɛre." 
Judges1:12 A Kalɛɛb yeela a nebã yaa: «Ned ning sẽn na n tõog n zab n deeg Kiryat-Sefɛɛre, mam na n dɩka m bi-pugl a Aksa n kõ a soab t'a maan a paga.»" 
Judges1:13 A Kalɛɛb dag n tara yao t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Kenaaze. A Kenaaz rag n tara biig t'a yʋʋr la a Otiniyɛlle, la yaa bi-kãng n tɩ zab n deeg tẽngã. Dẽ, a Kalɛɛb rɩka a bi-pugl a Aksa n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
Judges1:14 A Aksa sẽn ta wã, a pẽdga a Otiniyɛll t'a kos a baaba t'a kõ-b pʋʋgo. La pagã siga a bõangã zugu, la a Kalɛɛb sok-a lame yaa: «Fo rata bõe?»" 
Judges1:15 A Aksa leokame: «M baaba, maan-y sugri, yãmb sẽn kõ maam zĩig ning sẽn be tẽngã goabgã yaa zĩ-koɛɛng fasɩ. Bɩ y kõ maam ko-bunds zĩis me.» La a Kalɛɛb kõo yẽnda ko-bundsã zĩis nins sẽn be kunkubẽ wã ne sẽn be-b tẽn-nabdrẽ wã." 
Judges1:16 A Moyiis rɛɛmbã sẽn yaa Kɛn nedã yagensã tũu Zʋʋda yagensã n yi komsã tẽngã, n kẽng Zʋʋda weoogã sẽn yegd Araad goabgã, n tɩ zĩnd Amalɛk rãmbã sʋka." 
Judges1:17 Zʋʋda buudã, ne a Sɩmyõ buudã sẽn yaa bãmb saam-biisã tũu taab n tɩ zab ne Kana nebã sẽn dag n be Sefatã. Bãmb sãama tẽngã zãnga, la b boola tẽn-kãng tɩ Horma, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹sãoongo.›" 
Judges1:18 Zʋʋda buudã leb n deega Gaaza ne a soolmã fãa, la Askalon ne a soolmã fãa, ne Ekrõ ne a soolmã fãa." 
Judges1:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda ne Zʋʋda buudã tɩ b tõog n deeg zĩis nins sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã, la bãmb ka tõog n dig neb nins sẽn be-b tẽn-nabdrẽ wã n deeg b tẽngã ye. Bala, nin-bãmb dag n tara kut saar-dãmba." 
Judges1:20 B rɩka Ebrõ n kõ a Kalɛɛb wa a Moyiis sẽn dag n yeelã. La a Kalɛɛb tõog n diga a Anak buud a tãabã tɩ b yi beenẽ. 
Judges1:21 A Benzame buudã ka tõog n dig Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛmã n deeg tẽngã ye. Dẽ kɩtame tɩ Zebuus-rãmbã kell n pa Zeruzalɛm ne a Benzame yagensã hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
Judges1:22 A Zozɛf yagensã me kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Betɛll nebã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda ne bãmba." 
Judges1:23 Bãmb tʋma gũudb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ ges Betɛll tẽngã. Tẽn-kãng yʋʋr dag n boondame tɩ Luuzi. 
Judges1:24 Gũudbã yãnda ned a yembr sẽn yit tẽngã pʋg n sok-a yaa: «D kotame tɩ f wilg tõnd d sẽn tõe n tũ zĩig ning n kẽ tẽngã pʋga. Woto, tõnd na n maan-f-la neere.»" 
Judges1:25 La raoã wilg-b-la b sẽn tõe n tũ zĩig ning n kẽ tẽngã pʋga. Dẽ, bãmb kʋʋ tẽngã neb zãnga, la b basa rao ning sẽn wilg bãmb zĩigã ne a zakã rãmb tɩ b põse." 
Judges1:26 Raoã kẽnga Hɛt-rãmbã soolmẽ, la a tɩ tilga tẽng beenẽ n pʋd tẽngã yʋʋr tɩ Luuzi. Yaa yʋ-kãng n kell n pa tɩ ta rũndã." 
Judges1:27 A Manaase yagensã ka tõog n dig Bɛt-Seyã nebã ne b tẽn-bãoonegã, Taanak nebã ne b tẽn-bãoonegã, Door nebã ne b tẽn-bãoonegã, Yibleyam nebã ne b tẽn-bãoonegã, la b ka tõog n dig Megido nebã ne b tẽn-bãoonegã n deeg b tẽmsã me ye. Dẽ, Kana nebã kell n pa tẽngẽ be." 
Judges1:28 La Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n paam pãnga, b modga Kana nebã tɩ b tʋmd bãmb tʋʋm-wɛglã, la b ka tõog n dig-b n deeg tẽngã ye." 
Judges1:29 Efrayiim yagensã ka tõog n rig Kana nebã sẽn dag n be Gezɛɛrã n deeg b tẽngã ye. Dẽ, Kana nebã kell n paa Efrayiim nebã sʋk Gezɛɛre." 
Judges1:30 Zabulõ yagensã ka tõog n dig Kitron ne Nahaloll nebã n deeg b tẽngã ye. Dẽ, Kana nebã paa Zabulõ nebã sʋka, la Zabulõ nebã modga bãmb tɩ b tʋmd bãmb tʋʋm-wɛglã." 
Judges1:31 Asɛɛr yagensã ka tõog n dig neb nins sẽn be Ako ne Sɩdõ la sẽn be-b Halaabe, ne sẽn be-b Akziibã la sẽn be-b Helã wã, ne sẽn be-b Afik ne Rehoobã n deeg b tẽngã ye." 
Judges1:32 Woto, Asɛɛr nebã kell n vɩɩmda Kana nebã sẽn yaa tẽngã rãmbã sʋka, bala, b ka tõog n dig bãmb n deeg b tẽngã ye." 
Judges1:33 Neftali yagensã ka tõog n dig Bɛt-Semees ne Bɛt-Anat nebã n deeg b tẽngã ye. La bãmb kell n paa Kana nebã sẽn yaa tẽngã nebã sʋka, la b modga Bɛt-Semees ne Bɛt-Anat nebã tɩ b tʋmd bãmb tʋʋm-wɛglã." 
Judges1:34 Amoor-dãmbã riga Dan yagensã n lebs tãmsã zutu, n ka bas-b tɩ b sig tẽn-nabdrẽ wã ye." 
Judges1:35 Amoor-dãmbã kell n modg n paa Haar-Herɛɛs ne Ayalõ la Salbim, la a Zozɛf yagensã pãng yɩɩga bãmba, n modg-b tɩ b tʋmd bãmb tʋʋm-wɛglã." 
Judges1:36 Amoor-dãmbã tẽng toadg sɩnga ne Akrabim tãngã rʋʋdga, n tall n tãag Sela n ket n tutẽ." 
Judges2:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk yii Gilgall n kẽng Bokim n tɩ yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Mam yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽnga, n tall yãmb n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõ y yaab-rãmbã. La mam yeelame: Mam ka na n tol n leb n sãam kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne yãmbã ye." 
Judges2:2 Bɩ yãmb da wa saag n maan kaool ne tẽn-kãngã nebã ye. La bɩ y wã bãmb tẽn-kugã. La yãmb ka kelg mam koɛɛgã ye. Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maan woto? 
Judges2:3 Dẽ, mam yeelame yaa: Mam ka na n leb n dig y bɛɛbã n kõ-y ye. Bãmb na n bee ne yãmba, tɩ bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã lebg bẽdg yãmb yĩnga.»" 
Judges2:4 Malɛɛkã sẽn gom ne Israyɛll nebã a woto n sɛ, Israyɛll nebã zẽka b koees n yãbe." 
Judges2:5 La bãmb pʋda zĩigã yʋʋr tɩ Bokim sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹yãbdba›, la bãmb maana maoong beenẽ n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges2:6 A Zozoe kuilsa Israyɛll nebã, la Israyɛll buud fãa kẽng n tɩ kẽ n sooga tẽng ning b sẽn pʋɩ n kõ-a wã." 
Judges2:7 A Zozoe vɩɩmã tɛka, nebã saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yẽnda kũumã zugẽ, kãsem-dãmb nins sẽn yãnd tʋʋm-kãsems nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan n kõ Israyɛllã vɩɩm tɛka, nebã kell n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges2:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Zozoe sẽn yaa a Nun biigã kii a yʋʋm koabg la piiga. 
Judges2:9 B muma a Zozoe soolem ning sẽn yaa yẽnda soolmã pʋgẽ, Timnat-Herɛɛs sẽn be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãmsã sʋka, Gaas tãngã rɩtgo." 
Judges2:10 Zamaan-kãng nebã fãa me kiime n sak b saam-dãmba, la zamaan a to n pʋgl bãmb n wa, n dag n ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka mi tʋʋm-kãsems nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan n kõ Israyɛll nebã me ye." 
Judges2:11 Israyɛll nebã maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Bãmb pʋʋsa Baall wẽn-naandse. 
Judges2:12 Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã sẽn yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã, n kẽng n tɩ tũud buud nins sẽn gũbg bãmbã wẽn-naandse. Bãmb wõgemda wẽn-naandsã taoor n pʋʋs-ba, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puugi." 
Judges2:13 Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋʋsg n tɩ pʋʋsd Baall ne Astarte rãmba. 
Judges2:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne Israyɛll nebã, la b basame tɩ fãadb fã-ba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ b bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg bãmbã nusẽ, la bãmb dag n ka leb n tar pãng n na n tõog n zab ne b bɛɛbã ye." 
Judges2:15 Rẽ, wakat fãa, Israyɛll nebã sã n kẽng n na n tɩ zabe, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sẽn ket n puud ne bãmbã yĩnga, b bɛɛbã tõogd-b-la wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel bãmbã, la wa b sẽn dag n wẽen ne bãmbã. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ yellã pak Israyɛll nebã wʋsgo." 
Judges2:16 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka bʋ-kaoodb n lʋɩɩs Israyɛll nebã taoore, tɩ b zabd n fãagd bãmb b fãadbã nusẽ." 
Judges2:17 La Israyɛll nebã kell n ka sak b bʋ-kaoodbã me ye. Bala, Israyɛll nebã basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n koos b mens ne wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab n wõgemd b taoore. Bãmb wẽnemda tao-tao n bas b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n tũud sor ning n sakd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã. Bãmb ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã wa b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã ye." 
Judges2:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n yãk bʋ-kaood n kõ Israyɛll nebã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n dag n be ne bʋ-kaoodã a vɩɩm tɛka, n sõngd-a t'a tõogd n fãagd Israyɛll nebã ne b bɛɛbã. Bala, bãmb wõosgã pʋga, la neb nins sẽn maand bãmb pãng n namsd-bã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoeta bãmb nimbãanega." 
Judges2:19 La bʋ-kaoodã sã n wa n ki, bãmb lebd n wẽnemdame n maan wẽngã n yɩɩg b ba-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã, n tũud wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba, la b pʋʋsd-ba, n wõgemded bãmb taoore. La b ka basd b tʋʋm-beedã ne b sũ-keglmã ye." 
Judges2:20 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne Israyɛll nebã tɩ b yeele: «Bu-kãngã sẽn sãam mam kaoolã mam sẽn dag n gʋls n kõ b yaab-rãmbã, la b sẽn ka kelg mam goamã yĩnga," 
Judges2:21 mam me ka na n kɩt tɩ b tõog n zab n deeg a Zozoe sẽn ki n bas tẽms ninsã baa a yembr ye. 
Judges2:22 Bõn-kãens na n yɩɩ makr maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n mak Israyɛll nebã n gese, b na n sak n tũu mam sorã wa b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n tũ wã bɩ, bɩ b ka na n tũ.»" 
Judges2:23 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa bu-kãens tɩ b vʋʋse, n ka rig-b tao-tao ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka kɩt t'a Zozoe rig bãmb ye." 
Judges3:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa buud kẽer tẽngã pʋgẽ, n na n mak Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n ka zĩnd-b Kana zabrã wakatã." 
Judges3:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n datame bala, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll yagens nins sẽn ka mi zabrã tõog n zãms zabre, la b bãng zabr sẽn yaa bũmb ninga." 
Judges3:3 Bãmb sẽn bas buud nins tẽngẽ wã la woto, yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã soolem nanambs a nu wã, ne Kana-rãmba fãa, la Sɩdõ nebã, ne Hevi-rãmbã sẽn dag n be Libã tãmsã sʋkã, sẽn sɩng ne Baall-Hɛrmo tãngã n tɩ tãag Lebo-Hamate." 
Judges3:4 Bãmb sẽn bas bu-bãmb beenẽ wã, yaa sẽn na n yɩl n mak Israyɛll nebã, n ges b sã n na n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã b sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiis t'a kõ b yaab-rãmbã." 
Judges3:5 Woto, Israyɛll nebã zĩnda Kana-rãmbã ne Hɛt-rãmbã, la Amoor-dãmbã ne Perɛɛz-rãmbã la Hevi-rãmbã ne Zebuus-rãmbã sʋka." 
Judges3:6 Israyɛll nebã peega bu-bãmb kom-pugli wã n maan b pagba, la b rɩgs b kom-pugli n kõ bu-bãmb kom-dibli wã tɩ b maan b pagba, la b pʋʋs bu-bãmb wẽn-naandsã." 
Judges3:7 Israyɛll nebã maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Bãmb yĩma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã yelle, n waoog Baall wẽn-naands ne Aseera wẽn-naandse." 
Judges3:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne Israyɛll nebã, tɩ b kɩt tɩ Mezopotami rĩm a Kusã-Risatayim tõog-ba. La yẽnda sooga Israyɛll nebã yʋʋm a nii." 
Judges3:9 La Israyɛll nebã kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kos tɩ b sõng-ba, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka fãagd n kõ Israyɛlle. Yaa a Kalɛɛb yao a Kenaaz biig a Otiniyɛlle." 
Judges3:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã siga a Otiniyɛll zugu, la a lebga Israyɛll bʋ-kaooda, la yẽnda kẽngame n tɩ zabe. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Otiniyɛll tõog a Kusã-Risatayim sẽn yaa Mezopotami rĩmã, la yɩɩ ne tõog-kãsenga." 
Judges3:11 Dẽ, tẽngã zĩnda bãan yʋʋm pis-naase. La a Kenaaz biig a Otiniyɛll kiime." 
Judges3:12 Israyɛll nebã leb n maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo Moaab rĩm a Eglõ pãng t'a tõog Israyɛll nebã, bãmb sẽn maan tʋʋm-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wã yĩnga." 
Judges3:13 Rĩm a Eglõ kɩtame tɩ Amo nebã ne Amalɛk rãmbã wa naag yẽnda tɩ b tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã n tõog n deeg komsã tẽngã. 
Judges3:14 Woto, Moaab rĩm a Eglõ sooga Israyɛll nebã yʋʋm piig la a nii." 
Judges3:15 Israyɛll nebã leb n kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka fãagd n kõ-ba, yaa Benzame buudã ned a Geera biig a Ewuudi. La a Ewuud dag n yaa gobre. Israyɛll nebã kɩsa a Ewuud yaood t'a tɩ kõ Moaab rĩm a Eglõ." 
Judges3:16 A Ewuud maana zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiibu, t'a woglmã tat kãntɩɩga. Yẽnda sẽbga sʋʋgã a rɩtg gere, a futã tẽngre." 
Judges3:17 A Ewuud rɩka yaoodã n kõ Moaab rĩm a Eglõ. La a Eglõ yaool n dag n yaa ned sẽn nob wʋsgo. 
Judges3:18 A Ewuud sẽn kɩs rĩmã yaoodã n sɛ, a talla neb nins sẽn tʋk yaoodã tɩ b yi n looge." 
Judges3:19 La a Ewuud sẽn wa n ta kug wẽn-naandsã zĩig sẽn be Gilgallã, a lebg n waa rĩm a Eglõ nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «N-na! Ad-y mam tara m koɛɛg n dat n togs yãmb y yembr bala.» La rĩmã kɩtame tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be-b be wã yi yɩnga." 
Judges3:20 Rĩmã rag n be a yĩngr doogã pʋg a yembr n zĩ n kokd pemsem. Dẽ, a Ewuud kolga rĩmã n yeele: «Koɛɛg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ maam tɩ m wa taas-yã la woto.» A Eglõ yika a zaoogẽ wã." 
Judges3:21 Dẽ, a Ewuud wõoga zabr sʋʋgã sẽn dag n be a rɩtg gerẽ wã ne a goabga, n kõs a Eglõ pʋgã." 
Judges3:22 Sʋʋgã ne a gãtgã fãa kẽeme, tɩ kaamã lebg n lud sʋʋgã, la a Ewuud basa sʋʋgã n ka feoog ye, la sʋʋgã sãag n yi a poorã zugu." 
Judges3:23 A Ewuud lebsa yĩngr doogã noy n pag ne kʋɩlen-bila, n yaool n tũ no-bilẽ n yi n looge." 
Judges3:24 A Ewuud sẽn yi n loogã poore, rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb waa n mikame tɩ yĩngr doogã paga ne kʋɩlen-bila. Dẽ, bãmb yeelame: «Naab tog n maanda we-kɛɛnga.»" 
Judges3:25 Tʋmtʋmdbã yasa yɩng n gũudẽ, la b sẽn mik tɩ rĩmã kaoosdame n ka pakd yĩngr doogã kʋɩlengã, bãmb rɩka kʋɩlen-bil n pak n na n gese, la bõe la wã? B soaalã ki n dɩga tẽnga." 
Judges3:26 Tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn wa n yas roogã noor n gũudẽ wã, rẽ t'a Ewuud paama n zoe n zãagame. A Ewuud zoeeme n loog kug wẽn-naandsã zĩig n tees Seyɩɩrã sẽnẽ n põse." 
Judges3:27 Yẽnda sẽn ta beenẽ, yẽnda peeba baorg Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãmsã sʋka. La Israyɛll nebã yi n babsa yẽnda tãngã zug n tũ-a n sigi, la yẽnda rag n bee b taoore." 
Judges3:28 A Ewuud yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Pʋg-y maam, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga Moaab nebã sẽn yaa y bɛɛbã y nugẽ.» Dẽ, bãmb tũu yẽnda n sig n gɩd Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã zĩ-rʋʋgdgã sẽn dabd Moaab sẽnẽ wã, la b ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ rʋʋg kʋɩlgã ye." 
Judges3:29 Wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã sẽn kʋ Moaab nebã sõor kolga tus piiga. Moaab tãb-biisã rag n yaa pãens rãmba, la b yaa gãndaado, la bãmb ned ba a ye ka põs ye." 
Judges3:30 Badaare, Israyɛll nebã tõoga Moaab nebã n ning-b yãnde. La sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, tẽngã zĩnda bãan yʋʋm pis-nii." 
Judges3:31 A Ewuud loogr zugẽ, yaa a Anat biig a Samgaar n pʋgle. A Samgaar talla niig rasaar n tõog n kʋ Filistẽ-dãmbã neb kobs-yoobe. A Samgaar me yɩɩ ned sẽn fãag Israyɛll nebã." 
Judges4:1 A Ewuud kũumã zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã leb n maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
Judges4:2 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Kana rĩm a Yabẽ sẽn dag n dɩt naam Hasoor tẽngã tõog Israyɛll nebã. Rĩm a Yabẽ tãb-biisã naab yʋʋr la a Sizera. A Sizera rag n bee Harosɛt-Goyim." 
Judges4:3 Rĩm a Yabẽ dag n tara kut saar-dãmb kobs-wɛ, la a rag n namsda Israyɛll nebã n maand-b pãng hal yʋʋm pisi. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges4:4 Wakat-kãnga, rẽ tɩ yaa a Lapidot pag a Deboora sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã n yaa Israyɛll bʋ-kaooda." 
Judges4:5 A Deboora rag n zĩndida koang ning b sẽn boond t'a Deboora koangã sẽn be Rama ne Betɛll sʋkã tẽngre, n kaood bʋʋdã. Zĩ-kãng bee Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã. La Israyɛll nebã rag n kẽnda yẽnda nengẽ tɩ b kaood bʋʋdã." 
Judges4:6 A Deboora kɩtame tɩ b tɩ bool Kedɛɛs sẽn be Neftali soolmẽ wã rao a Abinoam biig a Barak t'a wa. La Deboora yeel-a lame yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kõta foom noor n yetẽ: Kẽng n tɩ yãk neb tus piig Neftali ne Zabulõ buudã sʋka, n tall-b n dʋ Taboor tãngã." 
Judges4:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ rĩm a Yabẽ tãb-biisã naab a Sizera ne a kut saar-dãmbã, la a tãb-bi-kʋʋngã wa seg foom Kisõ ko-soogã noore, la m na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog-ba.»" 
Judges4:8 A Barak yeela a Deboora yaa: «Fo sã n na n yãag maam, mam na n kẽngame, la fo sã n ka na n yãag maam, mam ka na n kẽng ye.»" 
Judges4:9 Dẽ, a Deboora leokame: «Beneere, mam na n yãag-f lame. La bɩ f bãng tɩ f ka na n paam ziir zab-kãngã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ pag tõog a Sizera.» Woto, a Deboora yikame n tũ a Barak n kẽng Kedɛɛse." 
Judges4:10 A Barak boola Zabulõ ne Neftali buudã tɩ b wa Kedɛɛse. Yaa neb tus piig n tũ yẽnda, la a Deboora me tũume." 
Judges4:11 Kɛn ned a Hebɛɛr sẽn yaa a Moyiis rɛɛmb a Hobaab biigã rag n welgame n bas Kɛɛb nebã n tɩ tilg a fu-roogã Sanayim tɩ-kãsengã sɛɛgẽ, n pẽneg Kedɛɛse." 
Judges4:12 B tɩ togsa a Sizera t'a Abinoam biig a Barak rʋʋ Taboor tãngã zugu. 
Judges4:13 A Sizera tigma a kut saar-dãmb kobs-wɛ wã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tũud yẽnda wã Harosɛt-Goyim, tɩ b na n kẽng Kisõ ko-soogã noore." 
Judges4:14 Dẽ, a Deboora yeela a Barak yaa: «Yik moasã, bala, yaa rũndã daarã la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩt tɩ f tõog a Sizera. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n lʋɩɩ fo taoore.» Dẽ, a Barak siga Taboor tãngã zugu, la neb tus piigã tũu yẽnda." 
Judges4:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ rabeem-kãseng kẽ a Sizera ne a kut saar-dãmbã fãa ne a tãb-biisã fãa. La a Barak kʋ-b-la ne zabr sʋʋga. A Sizera sig n basa a kut saarã n zoe ne nao. 
Judges4:16 A Barak riga saar-dãmbã ne tãb-biisã n tɩ tãag Harosɛt-Goyim. La bãmb kʋʋ a Sizera tãb-biisã zãng ne zabr sʋʋga, n ka bas ba a ye tɩ põs ye." 
Judges4:17 A Sizera zoee ne nao n tɩ kẽ Kɛn ned a Hebɛɛr pag a Zayɛll fu-roogẽ. Bala, wakat-kãng tɩ Hasoor dĩm a Yabẽ ne Kɛn dao a Hebɛɛr buudã rag n nooma ne taaba." 
Judges4:18 A Zayɛll yi n sega a Sizera n yeel-a yaa: «M soaala, zoe-y n wa-y-yã! Wa-y n kẽ-y mam doogẽ wã! Da zoe-y rabeem ye!» A Sizera zoe n kẽe a Zayɛll fu-roogẽ wã, la a Zayɛll baoo fu-goabg n pil a Sizera." 
Judges4:19 A Sizera yeela pagã yaa: «M kot-f lame tɩ f kõ-m koom bilf tɩ m yũ, tɩ ko-yũud n tar-ma.» A Zayɛll rɩka waoog ne bĩisim n kõ a Sizera t'a yũ, la a lebs n pil-a." 
Judges4:20 Yẽnda leb n yeela pagã yaa: «Yals roogã noor tɩ ned sã n sok foom tɩ ned ka kẽ ka, bɩ f leok-a tɩ ayo.»" 
Judges4:21 A Sizera rag n yɛɛ hal wʋsgo. Dẽ, a gãandame n gũs gõe-kãsenga. La a Hebɛɛr pag a Zayɛll feooga fu-roogã baaf a yembre, n dɩk zãare, n maag a meng n lams n kolge, n dɩdg a Sizera tʋb-kɩrgã n ka ne baafã t'a sãag n kɩ tẽnga, la a Sizera kiime." 
Judges4:22 A Barak sẽn dag n digd a Sizera wã wẽneg n taame, la a Zayɛll yi n seg-a lame n yeele: «Wa-y tɩ m wilg-y rao ning yãmb sẽn baoodã zĩiga. La a Barak sẽn kẽ pagã fu-roogẽ, bõe la wã, a Sizera n ki n dɩga, tɩ baafã ket n sel a yɛgdgã.»" 
Judges4:23 Badaare, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog Kana rĩm a Yabẽ." 
Judges4:24 Zabr ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn zab ne Kana rĩm a Yabẽ wã talla pãnga, hal tɩ b kʋ-a." 
Judges5:1 Badaare, a Deboora ne a Abinoam biig a Barak yɩɩlame n yeel yaa:" 
Judges5:2 «Israyɛll tẽngã pʋga, Tãb-biisã segl n sɛɛme, tẽngã neb rɩka b meng n kõ ne yamleoogo. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges5:3 Rĩm-dãmba, kelg-y-yã, na-biisi, yok-y y tʋba! Mam na n yɩɩlame, n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n-yẽe, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽg-ba! Mam na n yɩɩlame n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
Judges5:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn wa n yi Seyɩɩrã tãmsã pʋgã, Wakat ning yãmb sẽn yi hal Edom tẽngã pʋgã, tẽn-gãongã rigimdame, sa-gãongã kiigame, la sawatã rʋʋga koom." 
Judges5:5 Tãmsã sirga Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, B sirga wa Sinayi tãngã, b sirga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã taoore." 
Judges5:6 A Anat biig a Samgaar wakate, a Hebɛɛr pag a Zayɛll wakate, kẽn-kẽndb basa b soay tũubu, tɩ so-toagdbã tũ so-gõdem-gõdem." 
Judges5:7 Israyɛll tẽmsã ka leb n tar nanambs ye. B rag n basa Israyɛll tẽmsã, hal tɩ ta daar ning foom a Deboora sẽn yik n lebg Israyɛll ma wã." 
Judges5:8 Israyɛll nebã rag n bas n pʋgda wẽn-sãamse. Rẽ me n kɩte, tɩ zabã pid tẽngã, Israyɛll tãb-biis tus pis-naas rag n ka tõe n paam gãong tɩ b gomd kãnd ye." 
Judges5:9 Mam nonga Israyɛll tãb-biis nanambsã, Mam nonga Israyɛll neb nins sẽn kẽng zabrã ne yamleoogã. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges5:10 Yãmb dãmb sẽn zao bõn-yãan-peelsã, yãmb dãmb sẽn maneg fu-bʋgs n tɩʋ n zĩẽ wã, yãmb dãmb sẽn kẽnd ne naoã. Tags-y-yã." 
Judges5:11 Bɩ pe-kɩɩmbã sẽn be gaolgẽ wã, naag-y taab n kaas n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b tɩrlem tʋʋmã yĩnga. Bãmb kõo Israyɛll nebã tõogre. Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã reega tẽngã n pag a kʋɩlemsã." 
Judges5:12 Deboora, neke! Neke! Nek n pʋd yɩɩlle, a Abinoam biig a Barake, yik n tall f sẽn yõg-b rãmbã n looge." 
Judges5:13 Neb nins sẽn põs zabrã pʋgã, zoe n kẽnga nanambsã nengẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã yi n segda maam gãndaadã sʋka." 
Judges5:14 Neb nins sẽn tilg Amalɛk-rãmbã soolmẽ wã yii Efrayiim tẽng n wa. Tãb-biis nins sẽn pʋg-b foomã sʋka, a Benzame yagensã naaga be. Tãb-biis nanambs yii Makɩɩr n wa naag n zabe, la neb nins sẽn gʋlsd zab-mitbã yʋyã yii Zabulõ yagensã sʋka." 
Judges5:15 A Isakaar buudã nanambsã tɩ naaga a Deboora, a Isakaar tũu a Barak n kẽng tẽn-nabdrẽ wã. La Rubɛn buudã yẽ, nokoɛɛm wẽeb bal n yɩ b tʋʋmde." 
Judges5:16 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo yas yãgã sʋka, n kelgd pe-kɩɩmbã sẽn boond b rũmsã? N-yẽe, Rubɛn buudã yasame tɩ yaa nokoɛɛm wẽeb bal la b tʋʋmde." 
Judges5:17 Galaad nebã paa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd n ka serg ye. Bõe yĩng tɩ Dan nebã kẽng n tɩ be koom kogendã sẽn beẽ wã? Asɛɛr buudã kẽng n tɩ bee ko-kãsengã noore, Bãmb tɩ paa koom kogendã yalsg zĩigẽ ko-kãsengã noore!" 
Judges5:18 La Zabulõ nebã, ne Neftali yaa nebã sẽn gẽneg b yõore, n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ." 
Judges5:19 Rĩm-dãmb waame n wa zabe, Kana rĩm-dãmbã wa n zabame, b wa n zaba Taanake, ne Megido koomã noore, la b ka tol n deeg wanzuri tɩ yɩ b yaood ye." 
Judges5:20 Baa ne ãdsã zĩnda yĩngr n zabe, b pa b soayã zut n zab ne a Sizera." 
Judges5:21 Kisõ ko-soogã koom kãaga bãmba, Kisõ kʋdem-wẽndẽ ko-soogã koom n kãag-b lame. Mam na n kẽna ne raoodo!" 
Judges5:22 Wiid nao-bend bʋrg rãamd yitame, b zoetame, bãmb zab-zabdbã zoetame.»" 
Judges5:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeelame: «Kãab-y Merooz tẽngã wẽnga, kãab-y-yã a nebã wẽnga! Bala, b ka wa sõng Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bãmb ka wa n naag gãndaadã n sõng Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
Judges5:24 Bɩ Kɛn ned a Hebɛɛr pag a Zayɛll paam bark n yɩɩd pagbã fãa! Bɩ a Zayɛll paam bark n yɩɩd pagb nins fãa sẽn vɩ fu-rot pʋsã! 
Judges5:25 A Sizera kosa yẽnda koom, t'a kõ-a bĩisim! A Zayɛll ninga bĩis-gõeem wam-neer pʋg n kõ-a." 
Judges5:26 A Zayɛll rɩka baaf ne a goabga, n dɩk tʋmtʋmdbã zãar ne a rɩtgo, n ka a Sizera tʋb-kɩrgã ne zãarã, la a Sizera zugã wã," 
Judges5:27 A Sizera yĩgimda a Zayɛll taoore, a lʋɩɩme n dɩg tẽng yẽnda taoore. A Sizera yĩgimdame n vik n lʋɩ tẽng a Zayɛll taoore. A sẽn vik n lʋɩ zĩig ningã, a paa beenẽ n ki." 
Judges5:28 A Sizera ma wã rag n bee roog võorẽ n lɩkd n getẽ, la a kelemd n yetẽ: Bõe yĩng t'a Sizera kut saarã kaoosd waoongo? Yaa a wãn t'a kut saar-dãmbã kẽnd maasg-maasga?" 
Judges5:29 La a roog pagb nins sẽn tar yamã leokame, yẽnda mengã me rag n tagsdame:" 
Judges5:30 Tõeeme tɩ tãb-biisã wʋkda te-zɛɛdem, tõeeme tɩ b pʋɩta taab te-zɛɛdem, tɩ tãb-biig fãa na n paam pʋg-sad-yɛnga, wall a yiibu. Kũuni: peen-gʋndga, ne peen-neer a Sizera yĩnga. La peend sẽn los gare, ne peen-gʋlem a yiibu, tɩ tõaagdã tar n palgd a bãgdo." 
Judges5:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ y bɛɛbã me sãam a woto! La y kɩt tɩ sẽn nong-b yãmbã yãge, wa wĩntoog sẽn yãgd ne pãngã fãa.» Dẽ, tẽngã zĩnda bãan yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Judges6:1 Israyɛll nebã leb n maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ Madiyã nebã tõog-ba, n soog-b hal yʋʋm a yopoe." 
Judges6:2 Madiyã nebã maana Israyɛll nebã pãng wʋsgo. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tɩ soond tãmsã pẽgsẽ, tãmsã bogdẽ, la tãmsã zug tẽn-sʋgse." 
Judges6:3 Israyɛll nebã sã n dag n bʋd n sɛ, Madiyã-rãmbã ne Amalɛk-rãmbã ne neb nins sẽn yit-b yaangã wat n zabda ne-ba." 
Judges6:4 Nin-kãens rag n kẽngd n tɩ tilga b tãb-sikã Israyɛll tẽngã sɛɛgẽ. Dẽ, bãmb dag n sãamda Israyɛll nebã tẽngã koodã, hal n tall n tɩ tãag Gaaza. Bãmb dag n ka basd Israyɛll nebã bũmb baa a yembr ye: koodã, piisã, niigã, la ne b bõensã fãa." 
Judges6:5 Sɩd me, nin-bãmb rag n kẽnda ne b rũmsã fãa, ne b fu-rotã, la b sã n kẽnd n watẽ, wẽnda wa sʋy sẽn yɛdg n pid tẽn-gãongã, la ned dag n ka tõe n bãng bãmb ne b yʋgma wã sõor ye. Bãmb sã n wa tẽngã pʋgẽ, b sãamd-a-la zãnga." 
Judges6:6 Woto, Madiyã nebã kẽesa Israyɛll nebã pɛt la nimbãaneg pʋga, la bãmb kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges6:7 Israyɛll nebã sẽn kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabã t'a fãag-b Madiyã-rãmbã nugẽ wã," 
Judges6:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma b no-rɛɛs t'a tɩ yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam kɩtame tɩ yãmb yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, mam yiisa yãmb y yembdã pʋga." 
Judges6:9 Mam fãaga yãmb Ezɩpt nebã nugẽ, la m fãag yãmb neb nins fãa sẽn dag n namsd yãmbã nusẽ. Mam dig-b lame n kõ yãmba, la m kõ yãmb b tẽmsã tɩ y sooge." 
Judges6:10 Mam yeela yãmb tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. La m yeel-y tɩ y ra waoog Amoor-dãmba sẽn be tẽng ning yãmb sẽn be wã wẽnnaam-dãmbã ye. La yãmb ka kelg mam goamã ye.»" 
Judges6:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk n wa n zĩnda a Abiyezɛɛr buudã ned a Zoaas tɩɩgã sẽn be Ofra wã tẽngre. A Zoaas biig a Zedyõ dag n soos n bee tɩɩgã tẽngr n pãbd a Oorz reezẽ rãam wẽkr koglg pʋga, a sẽn dag n zoet Madiyã nebã yĩnga." 
Judges6:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã puka a meng ne a Zedyõ n yeel-a yaa: «Fo yaa tãb-bi gãndaoog halaale, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne foom.»" 
Judges6:13 La a Zedyõ leokame yaa: «Y kabre m soaala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n bee ne tõndo, bõe yĩng tɩ yel-bãmbã fãa paamd tõndo? La bãmb sẽn dag n maan bõn-bãn nins fãa tɩ tõnd yaab-rãmbã togsd tõndã bee yɛɛnẽ? Tõnd yaab-rãmb yeela tõnd tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yiis tõnd Ezɩpt tẽnga.» La maana a wãn moasã, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas tõnd tɩ Madiyã nebã soog tõndo?" 
Judges6:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnegame n ges yẽnda n yeel-a yaa: «Kẽng ne pãng ning fo sẽn tarã, la f na n tõog n fãaga Israyɛll nebã Madiyã nebã nugẽ. Kẽng tɩ yaa maam n tʋmd-fo!»"
