Judges6:15 A Zedyõ yeela malɛɛkã yaa: «Y kabre m soaala, mam na n maana a wãn n tõog n fãag Israyɛll nebã? Ade, Manaase buudã fãa pʋgẽ, yaa tõnd doogã n tɩ yaa naong rãmba. Sẽn paase, mam ba wã zak pʋga, maam n yaa b fãa yao-zʋʋga.»" 
Judges6:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame: «Mam mengã na n zĩnda ne foom, la fo na n tõoga Madiyã nebã fãa, wa f sẽn tõog nin-yende.»" 
Judges6:17 Dẽ, a Zedyõ yeelame: «Yãmb sũur sã n sɩd yaa noog ne maam, bɩ y kõ maam bãnd sẽn wilgd tɩ sɩd yaa yãmb a Wẽnnaam n gom ne maam." 
Judges6:18 La m kotame tɩ y ra yi zĩ-kãngã, hal tɩ m kẽng n tɩ tall kũun n wa kõ-yã.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ tɩ b na n yalsame hal t'a tɩ tall n wa." 
Judges6:19 A Zedyõ kẽng n tɩ kʋʋ bulla, n dɩk zom kɩlo pis-tã n maan bur sẽn ka rã-bɩlle. A Zedyõ ninga nemdã tɛɛgẽ, la a sɩlg bɩɩmã n ning sĩn-bil pʋga, n tall fãa n kẽng tɩ-kãsengã tẽngr n tɩ kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã." 
Judges6:20 Wẽnnaam malɛɛkã yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Rɩk nemdã ne bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã n dʋʋg kug-kangã zugu, la f rɩk bɩɩmã n walg a zugu.» La a Zedyõ maana a woto." 
Judges6:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã rɩka a rasaarã a sẽn dag n zãadã n sɩɩs nemdã ne bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩllã, la bugum n yi kugrẽ wã n dɩ nemdã ne bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩllã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã menema zĩig pʋgẽ yẽnda taoore." 
Judges6:22 Dẽ, a Zedyõ bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛka, la a yeelame: «Kayto! Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam ki yã! Bala, mam yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã neng ne nenga.»" 
Judges6:23 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Gãneg f yam, la f ra yɛɛs ye. Fo ka na n ki ye.»" 
Judges6:24 Dẽ, a Zedyõ mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt vɩ-bãane.» Tẽn-kug-kãng ket n bee a Abiyezɛɛr doogã tẽngẽ Ofra hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Judges6:25 Badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Yõk f baaba loalgã, la f bao yʋʋm a yopoe loalg n paase. La f kẽng n wã Baall tẽn-kugrã f ba wã sẽn pʋʋsdã, la f kɛ Aseera ra-lugdgã sẽn be a sɛɛgẽ wã." 
Judges6:26 Rẽ poore, bɩ f rʋ kunkubrã zug n me tẽn-kugr n maneg-a sõama Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. La f rɩk loalg a yiibẽ soabã, n maan maoong n yõog-a bugum ne Aseera raoog ningã fo sẽn kɛ n kʋrgã.»" 
Judges6:27 A Zedyõ yãka neb piig a tʋmtʋmdbã sʋka, n kẽng n tɩ maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. La a Zedyõ sẽn dag n yɛɛsd a ba wã yirã rãmbã, la a zoet tẽngã nebã yĩnga, a ka maan bõn-kãng wĩntoog ye, a maan-a-la ne yʋngo." 
Judges6:28 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, bõe la wã? Tẽngã nebã yi n mikame tɩ b wãa Baall tẽn-kugrã la b kɛ Aseera ra-lugdgã sẽn dag n be a sɛɛgẽ wã, la b mik tɩ b kʋʋ loalg a yiibẽ soabã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugr ning sẽn nan me wã zugu." 
Judges6:29 Dẽ, nebã soka taab tɩ yaa ãnda n maan bõn-kãnga? Bãmb sogsa neb a taaba, la b bao n na n bãng sẽn yaa ned ninga. B togsa bãmb tɩ yaa a Zoaas biig a Zedyõ n maan bõn-kãnga." 
Judges6:30 Woto, tẽngã neb tɩ yeela a Zoaas t'a yiis a biig a Zedyõ n wa ne tɩ b kʋ, tɩ bala, a wãa tẽn-kugrã la a kɛ Aseera ra-lugdgã sẽn dag n be Baall tẽn-kugrã sɛɛgẽ wã." 
Judges6:31 Dẽ, a Zoaas yeela neb nins sẽn wa-b yẽnda nengẽ wã yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, bee ne yãmb tɩ y zab n sõng Baall sɩda? Yãmb tõe y zab n fãaga Baall sɩda? Ned ning sẽn na n zab-a n sõng Baall na n kiime tɩ beoogã ka vẽeg ye. Baall sã n yaa wẽnde, bɩ a zab n sõng a menga, b sẽn sãam yẽnda tẽn-kugrã yĩnga.»" 
Judges6:32 Badaare, a Zedyõ sẽn sãam Baall tẽn-kugrã yĩnga, b pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Zeruballe, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Baall zab n sõng a menga.› A Zedyõ kota bãnde." 
Judges6:33 Madiyã nebã fãa ne Amalɛk nebã, ne neb nins sẽn yit-b yaangã tigma taab n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n kẽng n tɩ ti b tãb-sikã Zizreyɛll tẽn-nabdrẽ wã pʋga." 
Judges6:34 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã kẽ a Zedyõ, la a peeba baorg n bool a Abiyezɛɛr roogã neb fãa tɩ b wa yãag-a." 
Judges6:35 A Zedyõ tʋma neb tɩ b taas Manaase buudã fãa koɛɛgã, la a boola bãmb fãa tɩ b wa yãag-a. La a tʋm neb tɩ b tɩ togs Asɛɛr buudã, Zabulõ buudã ne Neftali buudã. La b fãa yiime n na n seg a Zedyõ rãmba." 
Judges6:36 A Zedyõ yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Yãmb sã n dat n talla maam n fãag Israyɛll nebã wa yãmb sẽn dag n yeelã," 
Judges6:37 ade, mam na n dɩka pe-kõbd n yɛdg zɛɛgẽ wã. Yãmb sã n kɩt tɩ meenem madg pe-kõbdã bala, tɩ zĩigã fãa sẽn gilg pe-kõbdã yaool n ket n yaa koɛɛnga, na n yɩɩ bãnd sẽn wilgd tɩ yãmb sɩd na n talla maam n fãag Israyɛll nebã wa yãmb sẽn dag n yeelã.»" 
Judges6:38 La bũmba fãa kell n yɩɩ wa a Zedyõ sẽn kosã. Vẽkembeoogo, a Zedyõ yika yibeoog pĩnda, n dɩk pe-kõbdã n wẽke, tɩ meenemã rʋʋg n pid wũmbla." 
Judges6:39 A Zedyõ yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «M kotame tɩ y ra yik y sũur ne-m ye. Bala, mam sã n gom woto, m ka na n leb gom ye. Mam dat n leb n paama bãnd a to ne pe-kõbdã n paase. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ pe-kõbdã yɩ koɛɛnga, tɩ zɛɛgã zĩiga fãa madge.»" 
Judges6:40 La badaar yʋngo, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ yɩ a woto bala. Pe-kõbdã rag n yaa koɛɛnga, tɩ zɛɛgã zĩigã fãa yaa meenem." 
Judges7:1 A Zedyõ b sẽn boond t'a Zerubaallã, ne tãb-biis nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yika tõd-beoogo, n kẽng n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã n pẽneg Harood ko-bundmã zĩiga. La Madiyã nebã tãb-sik rag n bee a Zedyõ rãmb tãb-sikã rɩtgo, sẽn sɩng ne Moore kunkubrã n tall n tɩ tãag tẽn-nabdrã." 
Judges7:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Tãb-biisã sẽn be ne foomã sõor yaa wʋsg tɩ looge. Mam sã n kɩt tɩ b tõog Madiyã nebã, Israyɛll nebã na n wuka b mens n yeel tɩ yaa ne bãmb meng pãng la b tõog n fãag b mense." 
Judges7:3 Rẽ wã, bɩ f moon n yeel tãb-biisã fãa, tɩ ned ning sẽn yɛɛsd n digda, bɩ a yi Galaad tãngã zug ka moas-moasã bal n lebg n kuili.» Zĩig pʋgẽ bala, raop tus pisi la a yiib n yi tãb-biisã sʋk n lebg n kuili, n bas neb tus-piiga." 
Judges7:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Nebã ket n yaa wʋsgo. Kɩt tɩ b kẽng koomã noore, la beenẽ, mam na n yãka sẽn tog n tũ-b foomã n kõ-fo. Mam sẽn na n yeel tɩ ned ning tũ foom, yaa yẽnda soab n na n tũ foom. La ned ning mam sẽn na n yeel t'a ka tog n tũ foomã, a ka tog n tũ ye.»" 
Judges7:5 Dẽ, a Zedyõ talla nebã n kẽng koomã noore, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Welg neb nins fãa sẽn na n kaad koomã ne b nus n legd wa baasã toore, la f welg neb nins sẽn na n yĩgimd b rũmã zut n yũud koomã me toore.»" 
Judges7:6 Neb nins sẽn dag n kaad koomã ne b nus n yũudã sõor yaa raop kobs-tã, la neb nins sẽn ketã fãa yĩgimda b rũmã zut n na n yũ koomã." 
Judges7:7 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Mam na n talla neb kobs-tã wã sẽn leg koomã n kɩt tɩ f tõog Madiyã nebã, n tõog n fãag Israyɛll nebã. La sã n yaa ne neb a taabã sẽn ketã, ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri.»" 
Judges7:8 Bãmb reesa neb nins sẽn tog n kuilã rɩɩbã ne b bardã, la b bas-b tɩ b kuili. A Zedyõ kuilsa Israyɛll nebã fãa, la a peeg neb kobs-tã wã bala. Madiyã nebã tãb-sik rag n bee tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, t'a Zedyõ ne a tãb-biisã be kunkubrã zugu." 
Judges7:9 Badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zedyõ n yeel-a: «Yik n kẽng Madiyã nebã tãb-sik zĩigẽ, bala, mam kõta foom pãng tɩ f tõog-ba." 
Judges7:10 Fo sã n zoet rabeem n ka rat n kẽng f yembre, bɩ f peeg f rakõor a Pura tɩ y kẽng n kolg b tãb-sikã." 
Judges7:11 Maag-y y meng n kelg b goamã. Dẽ, f pɛlg na n yɩɩ kãenkãe, tɩ f kẽng n tɩ zab ne-ba.» Dẽ, a Zedyõ ne a rakõor a Pura kẽngame n kolg bɛɛbã tãb-sikã pipi gũudbã sẽn beẽ wã." 
Judges7:12 Madiyã-rãmba, Amalɛk-rãmb ne yaang nebã fãa yiime n tigim taab tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, n yaa wʋsg wa sʋyã, tɩ b yʋgma wã sõor yaa wʋsg wa ko-kãsengã noor bĩisrã." 
Judges7:13 A Zedyõ sẽn kolgã, yẽnda wʋma ned a yembr sẽn togsd a tũud-n-taag a zãmsdo, n yetẽ: «Mam zãmsa zãmsdo. Ade, mam yãnda bur sẽn maan ne Oorz zom, t'a bilimd n pɩʋʋgd tõnd tãb-sikã, la a bilmame n tɩ wẽ fu-roogã, la fu-roogã lʋɩɩ tẽnga. La a zũndg-a-la zãng n leeb-a n lubi.»" 
Judges7:14 Raoã tũud-n-taagã yeelame: «Yõwã ka bũmb a to, yaa Israyɛll rao a Zoaas biig a Zedyõ zabr sʋʋgã bala. Wẽnnaam dɩka Madiyã nebã ne b tãb-sikã n ning a Zedyõ nugẽ.»" 
Judges7:15 A Zedyõ sẽn wʋm zãmsdã ne a bilgrã sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, yẽnda wõgemda tẽnga, la a lebg n waa Israyɛll nebã tãb-sikẽ wã n wa yeele: «Yik-y-yã, yik-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka Madiyã nebã ne b tãb-sikã n ning yãmb nugẽ.»" 
Judges7:16 A Zedyõ welga neb kobs-tã wã sul a tãabo, n kõ bãmb ned kam fãa baorgo, ne rʋg-vɩʋʋgo, tɩ bug-vɩleng sag-rʋk fãa pʋgẽ." 
Judges7:17 A Zedyõ yeela nebã: «Yãmb tog n geta maam, la mam sẽn na n maan bũmb ningã, bɩ yãmb me maan woto. Mam sã n wa ta tãb-sikã noore, bɩ yãmb me maan wa mam sẽn na n maanã." 
Judges7:18 Maam ne neb nins sẽn be ne maamã sã n wa n peeb d bardã, bɩ yãmb fãa sẽn karg n gũbg tãb-sikã me peeb y bardã, la y yetẽ: Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a Zedyõ yĩnga.»" 
Judges7:19 A Zedyõ ne neb koabg sull a yembr sẽn tũud yẽnda taa Madiyã nebã tãb-sikã noor yʋn-sʋka. Yaa wakat ning b sẽn tekd gũudbã. Bãmb peeba b bardã n wã rʋgdã b sẽn dag n zãadã. 
Judges7:20 A Zedyõ nebã sul a tãabã fãa naaga taab n peeb b bardã, la b wã rʋgdã, la b gãd bug-vɩlemsã ne b gobse, la b zãad bardã ne b rɩtg n na n peebe, la b zẽk b koees n yetẽ: «Zabr sʋʋgã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a Zedyõ yĩnga.»" 
Judges7:21 Bãmb ned kam fãa kell n yals a zĩigẽ tɩ b gũbg tãb-sikã. La Madiyã nebã fãa sẽn be tãb-sikẽ wã yikame n zoetẽ. Bãmb dag n kaasdame la b zoet n kẽed moogo. 
Judges7:22 Israyɛll tãb-biis kobs-tã wã peeba b bardã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn be Madiyã nebã tãb-sikẽ wã wẽnemd n kɛ taab ne zabr sʋʋse. Tãb-sikã nebã fãa zoeeme hal n tɩ ta Bɛt-Sita sẽn be Sereya sẽnẽ wã, hal n tãag Abɛll-Mehola sẽn pẽ Tabatã noore." 
Judges7:23 Israyɛll nebã tigma taaba: Neftali buudã, Asɛɛr buudã ne Manaase buudã zãnga, la b riga Madiyã nebã." 
Judges7:24 A Zedyõ tʋma neb tɩ b saag Efrayiim soolem nins fãa sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã n moon n yeele: «Yi-y n seg-y Madiyã nebã, zoe-y n tɩ reng-y-b n deeg koomã zĩisi, hal n tɩ tãag Bɛt-Bara ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã.» Dẽ, Efrayiim nebã fãa tigma taaba, la b reega koomã zĩisi, hal n tãag Bɛt-Bara ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
Judges7:25 Bãmb tõog n yõga Madiyã nebã nanambs a yiibã. Yaa a Orɛɛb ne a Zeebe. Bãmb kʋ a Orɛɛb Orɛɛb kugrã zugu, la b kʋ a Zeebe, Zeeb reezẽ rãam wẽkr koglgã zĩigẽ. La bãmb riga Madiyã nebã, la b tall a Orɛɛb ne a Zeeb zutã n kẽng n tɩ kɩs a Zedyõ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde." 
Judges8:1 Efrayiim nebã yeela a Zedyõ: «Yaa bõe la yãmb sẽn maan tõnd woto wã? Yãmb sẽn wa n na n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Madiyã nebã, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb ka bool tõndo?» La bãmb goma a Zedyõ hal wʋsgo." 
Judges8:2 A Zedyõ leok-b lame n yeele: «Rẽ yĩnga, mam sẽn tʋmã tõe n dɩk n maka ne yãmb sẽn tʋmã sɩda? Efrayiim buudã sẽn maan bũmb ningã, baa ne a sẽn yaa bilfã, a ka yɩɩd Abiyezɛɛr doogã sẽn maanã sɩda?" 
Judges8:3 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ yãmb tõog Madiyã nanambsã: a Orɛɛb ne a Zeebe. Rẽ wã, bõe la mam maan n yɩɩd yãmb sẽn maanã?» A Zedyõ sẽn gom woto wã, Efrayiim nebã sũyã sigame." 
Judges8:4 A Zedyõ ne a neb kobs-tã wã taa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, la b rʋʋg-a lame. La baa ne bãmb sẽn dag n yɛ wʋsgã, b rag n ket n digda b bɛɛbã." 
Judges8:5 A Zedyõ yeela Sukot nebã yaa: «Mam kota yãmb tɩ y bao rɩɩb n kõ neb nins sẽn tũud maamã tɩ b rɩ, bala, b yɛɛ wʋsgo, la tõnd yaool n digda Madiyã nanambsã: a Zeba ne a Salmuna.»" 
Judges8:6 Sukot nanambsã leoka a Zedyõ yaa: «Tõnd na n yɩ a wãn n kõ yãmb tãb-biisã rɩɩbo, tɩ yãmb yaool n nan ka tõog a Zeba ne a Salmuna?»" 
Judges8:7 A Zedyõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Beneere! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n sõng maam tɩ m tõog a Zeba ne a Salmuna, mam na n lebg n waame n wa yor yãmb yĩnsã ne gõose, la ne gõpayãndga.»" 
Judges8:8 A Zedyõ yii beenẽ n kẽng Penuwɛll n tɩ kos bãmb wa poorẽ wã, la Penuwɛll nebã me leoka yẽnda wa Sukot nebã sẽn dag n leok yẽnda to-to wã." 
Judges8:9 A Zedyõ keooga Penuwɛll nebã me n yeele: «Mam sã n kẽng n tɩ tõog m bɛɛbã n lebg n wa, mam na n luba yãmb tẽngã gãs-bedrã.»" 
Judges8:10 A Zeba ne a Salmuna rag n bee Karkoor ne b tãb-bi-sulã. La tãb-bi-kãens fãa sõor dag n ka leb n yɩɩd tus-piig la a nu ye. Bala, tãb-biis nins sẽn zabd ne sʋʋsã sõor sẽn tat tus koabg la pisi n pa zabrã pʋgẽ. Tãb-bi-kãens fãa yaa neb sẽn yit yaanga." 
Judges8:11 A Zedyõ rɩka kẽn-kẽndbã sor sẽn be Noba ne Yogbowa yaangã, la yẽnda tɩ linga bɛɛbã tãb-sikã n tõog-ba." 
Judges8:12 A Zeba ne a Salmuna sẽn yaa Madiyã nanambs a yiibã yiime n na n zoe, la a Zedyõ pʋgl-b lame n tɩ yõg-ba, la a kɩt tɩ b tãb-biisã fãa sãeege." 
Judges8:13 A Zoaas biig a Zedyõ yii zabrã zĩigẽ n lebgdẽ, la yẽnda gilg n tũu sor ning sẽn tees Herɛɛs tãngã rʋʋdgẽ wã." 
Judges8:14 A Zedyõ yõka Sukot tẽngã bi-bɩɩg a yembre, n sok-a Sukot nanambsã ne b kãsem-dãmbã yelle. La bi-bɩɩgã gʋlsa tẽngã nanambsã ne b kãsem-dãmbã yʋy n kõ yẽnda. La b sõorã yaa bãmb pis-yopoe." 
Judges8:15 Dẽ, a Zedyõ lebg n waa Sukot nebã nengẽ n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb dag n ka yaand maam a Zeba ne a Salmuna poorẽ, n yetẽ tɩ y ka tõe n kõ mam tãb-biisã sẽn yɛ wã rɩɩbo, tɩ b yaool n nan ka tõog a Zeba ne a Salmuna sɩda?» Ade, bãmb la woto!" 
Judges8:16 Dẽ, a Zedyõ rɩka gõos ne gõpayãndse, n sɩbg Sukot tẽngã nebã." 
Judges8:17 La a luba Penuwɛll tẽngã gãs-bedrã, la a kʋ tẽngã nebã." 
Judges8:18 Rẽ poore, a Zedyõ soka a Zeba ne a Salmuna yaa: «Neb nins yãmb sẽn kʋ Taboorã rag n yaa wãn-wãna?» La bãmb leokame yaa: «Bãmb ra wẽnda foom a Zedyõ, la b ned kam fãa rag n yaa wa na-biiga.»" 
Judges8:19 Dẽ, a Zedyõ yeelame: «Bãmb yaa mam ma-biisi. Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, tɩ yãmb sã n dag n ka kʋẽ nin-bãmbã, mam dag n ka na n kʋ yãmb me ye.»" 
Judges8:20 La a Zedyõ yeela a bi-ribl-kãseng a Yetɛɛr yaa: «Yik n kʋ-ba!» La bi-bɩɩgã ka sak n wõog a sʋʋgã ye. A rag n yɛɛsdame, bala, a rag n ket n yaa biig nanda." 
Judges8:21 A Zeba ne a Salmuna yeelame yaa: «Zedyõ, fo meng yik n kʋ-do! Bala, f sã n ta rao zĩigẽ, f tʋmda raood tʋʋmde.» Dẽ, a Zedyõ yikame n kʋ a Zeba ne a Salmuna. La yẽnda wʋka b fan-teedã sẽn dag n be b yʋgma wã yubliẽ wã." 
Judges8:22 Israyɛll nebã yeela a Zedyõ yaa: «Bɩ y sak n yɩ tõnd soaala, tɩ yãmb biigã me ne yãmb yagensã wa soog tõndo, bala, yãmb fãaga tõnd Madiyã nebã nusẽ.»" 
Judges8:23 A Zedyõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam ka na n yɩ yãmb naaba, la mam biig me ka na n soog yãmb me ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n yɩ yãmb soaala.»" 
Judges8:24 A Zedyõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam tara m kosg n dat n kos yãmba: bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa yãk tʋb-long a yembr a te-zɛɛdmã sʋk n kõ maam.» Sɩd me, Israyɛll bɛɛbã rag n tara sãnem tʋblond wʋsgo, bãmb sẽn yaa a Ismayɛll yagensã yĩnga." 
Judges8:25 Israyɛll nebã yeelame yaa: «Beneere, tõnd na n kõ-y lame.» La b yɛdga fu-goabga, tɩ ned kam fãa yãk tʋb-long a te-zɛɛdmẽ, n kolg n lob fuugã zugu." 
Judges8:26 Sãnem tʋblondã a Zedyõ sẽn kos tɩ b kõ-a wã fãa zɩslem kolga kɩlo pisi, fan-teedã ne tʋblondã, la fu-neebã sẽn yaa miidã Madiyã nanambsã sẽn dag n yerã toor sẽn ka naage, la fan-teed nins sẽn dag n be b yʋgma wã yubliẽ wã me toor sẽn ka naage." 
Judges8:27 A Zedyõ talla sãnemã n maan bõn-naandg n tɩ ning a meng tẽngã pʋgẽ Ofra, la Israyɛll nebã fãa rag n kẽnda beenẽ n waoogd bõn-naandgã. Dẽ, bõn-naan-kãng lebga bẽdg Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga, la a Zedyõ ne a yirã rãmb me yĩnga." 
Judges8:28 Israyɛll nebã tõoga Madiyã rãmbã n ning-b yãnde, tɩ b ka leb n tõe n zẽk b zug ye. La a Zedyõ vɩɩmã tɛka, tẽngã zĩnda bãan yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Judges8:29 A Zoaas biig a Zeruball lebg n kuila a yir n tɩ zĩndi. 
Judges8:30 A Zedyõ roga kom-dibli pis-yopoe. Bala, yẽnda rag n tara pagb wʋsgo." 
Judges8:31 A Zedyõ pʋg-rɩkdg ning sẽn dag n be Sɩkɛmã roga bi-ribl n kõ-a, t'a pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Abimelɛke." 
Judges8:32 A Zoaas biig a Zedyõ kʋʋla wʋsg n yaool n ki. La b tɩ mum-a-la a ba a Zoaas yaoogẽ, Ofra tẽnga sẽn yaa a Abiyezɛɛr buudã soolmã pʋga." 
Judges8:33 A Zedyõ kũumã zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã leb n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n leb n sɩng Baall wẽn-naandsã pʋʋsgo. La bãmb dɩka Baall-Berit n maan b wẽnnaam." 
Judges8:34 Israyɛll nebã yĩma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã, Wẽnnaam ning sẽn fãag-a bãmb ne b bɛɛbã fãa sẽn dag n gũbg bãmbã yelle." 
Judges8:35 Baa ne maan-neer nins fãa a Zedyõ b sẽn boond t'a Zerubaallã sẽn maan Israyɛll nebã yĩngã, Israyɛll nebã ka maan a Zedyõ yirã rãmb neer ye." 
Judges9:1 A Zeruball biig a Abimelɛk kẽnga Sɩkɛm n tɩ gom ne a yɛs-rãmbã, la ne a ma wã buudã fãa n yeele:" 
Judges9:2 «Sok-y Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmbã n gese, a Zeruball kambã pis-yopoe wã sẽn na n soog-b n são bɩ? Bɩ nin-yend sẽn na n soog bãmb n são? La y ra yĩm tɩ mam yaa yãmb roagd ye.»" 
Judges9:3 Yẽnda yɛs-rãmbã togsa Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmbã fãa goam nins fãa yẽnda sẽn gomã, la bãmb fãa yamã wẽnemd n kẽe a Abimelɛke, bala, b yeelame tɩ yẽnda yaa b roagda." 
Judges9:4 Bãmb yãka b wẽn-naandg a Baall-Berit roogã wanzuri ligd pis-yopoe n kõ a Abimelɛke. La a Abimelɛk rɩka ligdã n da nin-saan-yaalse, la bi-bees tɩ b pʋgd-a." 
Judges9:5 A Abimelɛk kẽnga Ofra, a ba wã zakẽ, n tɩ kʋ a ba a Zeruball kom-dibli pis-yopoe wã fãa sẽn yaa yẽnda ba-biisã kugr a yembr zugu. Yaa a Zeruball bi-yao a Zotam bal n põse, bala, yẽnda rag n zoe n tɩ soondame." 
Judges9:6 Dẽ, Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmbã fãa ne Milo nebã fãa tigma taaba, n na n kẽng kugr ning b sẽn vigl tɩ pẽ ne Sɩkɛm tɩ-kẽengã, n na n kõ a Abimelɛk naam beenẽ." 
Judges9:7 B rɩka yellã n tɩ togs a Zotam. La yẽnda kẽng n tɩ rʋʋ Garizim tãngã zugu, n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: «Sɩkɛm taoor-dãmba, kelg-y maam neere, la bɩ Wẽnnaam kelg yãmba!" 
Judges9:8 Daar a yembre, tɩɩsã yiime, n na n tɩ yãk b rĩm t'a soog-ba. Bãmb yeela oliiv tɩɩg yaa: wa yɩ tõnd dĩma." 
Judges9:9 La oliiv tɩɩgã yeelame: Mam bas m kaamã b sẽn yãkd n waoogd wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la b tar n waoogd ninsaalbã, n tɩ yɩ tɩɩs rĩma?" 
Judges9:10 La tɩɩsã yeela kankang yaa: Sã n yaa woto, bɩ fo yɩ tõnd dĩma." 
Judges9:11 La kankang leoka bãmb yaa: Mam tõe n bas m bi-noodã, m biisã sẽn noom wʋsgã wombo, n kẽng n tɩ yɩ tɩɩs rĩma?" 
Judges9:12 Dẽ, tɩɩsã yeela reezẽ tɩɩg yaa: Bɩ fo wa yɩ tõnd dĩma." 
Judges9:13 La reezẽ tɩɩgã yeelame yaa: Mam bas m reezẽ rãamã sẽn noogd wẽnnaam-dãmb sũurã, la a noogd ninsaalbã sũurã, n lebg tɩɩs rĩma?" 
Judges9:14 Dẽ, tɩɩsã fãa yeela gõaag yaa: Bɩ fo wa lebg tõnd dĩma." 
Judges9:15 Tɩ gõaag leok-b yaa: Yãmb sã n sɩd data ne y sũur fãa, n yãk maam tɩ m lebg y rĩma, n soog-yã, bɩ y wa zĩnd mam maasmẽ wã. Yãmb sã n ka maan woto, bɩ bugum yi m gõosẽ wã, n dɩ hal baa Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩsã.»" 
Judges9:16 A Zotam kẽnga taoor n yeel yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb sẽn yãk a Abimelɛk t'a lebg y rĩma, yaa ne sɩd la burkĩndlim bɩ? Yãmb maana a Zeruball ne a yirã rãmb neer n lebs-a wa a sẽn maan yãmbã sɩda?" 
Judges9:17 Bala, mam ba wã zaba yãmb yĩnga, bãmb gẽnega b yõor zabrã zĩigẽ n fãag yãmb Madiyã nebã nusẽ." 
Judges9:18 La baa ne rẽ fãa, yãmb yika rũndã n zabd ne mam ba wã yir dãmba. Yãmb kʋʋ bãmb kamb pis-yopoe wã kugr a yembr zugu, la y yãk m baaba yem-poakã biig a Abimelɛk t'a yɩ Sɩkɛm taoor-dãmbã naaba, a sẽn yaa yãmb roagdã yĩnga." 
Judges9:19 Sã n mikame tɩ yãmb sẽn maan a Zeruball ne a yirã rãmb rũndã wã yaa ne sɩd la burkĩndlim, bɩ y maan sẽn noom a Abimelɛke, tɩ yẽnda me maan sẽn noom yãmba." 
Judges9:20 La sã n mikame me tɩ ka woto, bɩ bugum yi a Abimelɛk nengẽ n dɩ Sɩkɛm ne Bɛt-Milo tẽngã taoor-dãmbã, tɩ bugum yi Sɩkɛm ne Bɛt-Milo tẽngã taoor-dãmb nengẽ n dɩ a Abimelɛke.»" 
Judges9:21 A Zotam sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a yii be n zoe n kẽng Beer n zãag ne a ba-biig a Abimelɛke." 
Judges9:22 A Abimelɛk sooga Israyɛll nebã yʋʋm a tãabo. 
Judges9:23 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ welgr kẽ a Abimelɛk ne Sɩkɛm nebã sʋka, la Sɩkɛm nebã zãmba a Abimelɛke." 
Judges9:24 Yɩɩ woto tɩ wẽng ning fãa a Abimelɛk sẽn dag n maanã leb-a. A Abimelɛk sẽn kʋ a ba-biis pis-yopoe wã sẽn yaa a Zeruball kom-dibli wã zɩɩm lʋɩɩ yẽnda zugu. Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmb me paama taale, bãmb sẽn sõng yẽnda t'a kʋ a ba-biisã yĩnga." 
Judges9:25 Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmb baoo neb n kɩt tɩ b tɩ soond tãmsã zutu, n fãad so-loaadbã sẽn tũud be n loogdẽ wã. La b tɩ togsa a Abimelɛk bõn-kãense." 
Judges9:26 A Ebɛɛd biig a Gaal ne a ba-biisã rag n pɩʋʋgda Sɩkɛm tẽngã n loogdẽ. La Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor-dãmb kɩsa sɩd ne a Gaale. 
Judges9:27 Sɩkɛm tẽngã neb yi n kẽnga b pʋtẽ, n tɩ wob b reezẽ n wẽk a koomã, la b maan tigri, n kẽng b wẽnnaamã roogẽ n tɩ rɩtẽ la b yũuda, la b kãabd a Abimelɛk kãab-wẽnga." 
Judges9:28 Dẽ, a Ebɛɛd biig a Gaal sokame: «A Abimelɛk yaa yɛ neda? Sɩkɛm dãmba yaa yɛ nebã? Bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd na n bas t'a Abimelɛk soog tõndo? Yẽnda ka a Zeruball biig bal la? Ka a Zebull n yaa yẽnda tʋʋmã yel-gɛt bal la? Kelg-y-yã, wa-y tɩ d bas t'a Hamoor yagensã sẽn yaa Sɩkɛm nebã soog-do. Bõe yĩng meng tɩ tõnd na n sak a Abimelɛke?" 
Judges9:29 Sɩkɛm nebã sã n dag n sakẽ n yãkẽ maam tɩ m lebg b naaba, mam na n sikẽ-la a Abimelɛke. Mam dag n na yeel-a: Abimelɛke, paas f tãb-biisã sõor n wa tɩ d zabe.»" 
Judges9:30 A Zebull sẽn yaa tẽngã komber sẽn wʋm a Ebɛɛd biig a Gaal goamã, a sũurã puugame." 
Judges9:31 Dẽ, a Zebull soos n tʋma neb a Abimelɛk nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Ade, a Ebɛɛd biig a Gaal ne a ba-biisã waa Sɩkɛm tẽngã pʋga, la b pirsda nebã n yetẽ tɩ b ra sak yãmb ye." 
Judges9:32 Sẽn yaa woto wã, yʋngã, bɩ y peeg neb nins sẽn be-b ne yãmbã tɩ y kẽng n tɩ soond pʋtã pʋse." 
Judges9:33 Beoogã sã n vẽege, tɩ sõorã puki, bɩ y kẽng n tɩ ling tẽngã nebã. Dẽ, a Gaal ne a nebã sã n yi n na n zab ne yãmba, bɩ y maan yẽnda wa sẽn segde.»" 
Judges9:34 A Abimelɛk ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yika ne yʋngo, n welg taab sul a naase, n kẽng n tɩ soond Sɩkɛm tẽngã noore." 
Judges9:35 A Ebɛɛd biig a Gaal yiime n tɩ yas tẽngã noore. Woto, a Abimelɛk ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yii b soondgã zĩigẽ." 
Judges9:36 A Gaal sẽn yã nebã, a yeela a Zebull yaa: «Gese, mam nee neb sẽn sigd tãngã zugu.» A Zebull yeela yẽnda tɩ yaa tãmsã maasem la yẽnda yã n tẽed tɩ yaa nebã." 
Judges9:37 A Gaal kell n yeelame: «Ges neere, yaa neb la sẽn sigd tãngã sẽn be sʋkã zugã. La sull a yembr n sigd n tũud bagbã tɩɩg sẽnẽ.»" 
Judges9:38 A Zebull yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yãmb gom-minimã bee yɛɛnẽ? Ka yãmb n dag n tãoosd raood n yetẽ t'a Abimelɛk yaa yɛ neda, tɩ tõnd na n sak-a wã la? Bãmb ka neb nins yãmb sẽn dag n paoogdã wɛ? Moasã, bɩ y yik n kẽng n tɩ zab ne-ba.»" 
Judges9:39 A Gaal boola Sɩkɛm tẽngã taoor dãmba, n lʋɩ b taoor tɩ b na n tɩ zab ne a Abimelɛke." 
Judges9:40 A Abimelɛk riga a Gaal t'a zoe, la neb wʋsg pogla wʋsgo, la b zoeeme n ta tẽngã noor n lʋɩ n ki." 
Judges9:41 A Abimelɛk sẽn ta Aruma, a yalsa beenẽ. La a Zebull riga a Gaal ne a ba-biisã, n ka bas-b tɩ leb n zĩnd Sɩkɛm tẽngã ye." 
Judges9:42 Vẽkembeoogo, Sɩkɛm nebã yiime n na n kẽng b pʋtẽ. La b tɩ togsa a Abimelɛk bõn-kãnga." 
Judges9:43 A Abimelɛk peega a nebã, n pʋɩ-b zĩis a tãabo, n kẽng n tɩ soond pʋtã pʋse. Yẽnda sẽn yã nebã sẽn yi tẽngã pʋg n watẽ, bãmb yiime n seg-b n zab ne-ba." 
Judges9:44 A Abimelɛk ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã wudgame n tɩ gɩd tẽngã noore. Yẽnda nebã sul a yiib kẽng n tɩ linga Sɩkɛm nebã sẽn dag n be pʋtẽ wã n tɩ kʋ. 
Judges9:45 Badaare, a Abimelɛk zaba ne Sɩkɛm tẽngã neb daarã tõre. Yẽnda tõog n deega tẽngã, la a kʋ neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã. A Abimelɛk wãa tẽngã, n bao yamsem n fẽrg a tẽn-gãongã." 
Judges9:46 Neb nins sẽn be Sɩkɛm gãs-bedrã pʋgẽ wã sẽn wʋm yel-kãnga, bãmb zoeeme n tɩ kẽ b Wẽnnaam a Baall-Berit roogã zĩ-soalgdgẽ." 
Judges9:47 B kẽng n tɩ togsa a Abimelɛk tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Sɩkɛm gãs-bedrã pʋgẽ wã tigma taaba. 
Judges9:48 Dẽ, a Abimelɛk ne a nebã fãa kẽng n tɩ rʋʋ Salmon tãngã zugu. La a Abimelɛk rɩka a lare, n kɛɛg tɩɩg will n palg a bãoko, la a yeel neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa maan wa mam sẽn maan tao-tao.»" 
Judges9:49 Woto, bãmb ned kam fãa kɛɛga tɩɩg will n palg a bãoko, la b fãa tũu a Abimelɛke. Bãmb rɩka wilã n pag Baall-Berit roogã zĩ-soalgdgã noore n ning-a bugum tɩ sẽn be-b be wã fãa ki. Yɩɩ woto la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Sɩkɛm gãs-bedrã pʋgẽ wã ki yã. La rag n yaa raop ne pagb sõor sẽn kolg tusri." 
Judges9:50 Dẽ zugẽ, a Abimelɛk kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Tibɛɛs tẽngã. Yẽnda ne a nebã tɩ gũbga tẽngã n zab n deeg-a." 
Judges9:51 Tẽngã sʋka, gãs-bedr sẽn tar pãng n dag n be beenẽ, la tẽngã pagbã ne a raopã ne a taoor dãmbã fãa zoe n tɩ kẽe beenẽ n pag b mense. La bãmb dʋʋ gãsgã bɛoong zugu." 
Judges9:52 A Abimelɛk kẽnga gãsgẽ wã n tɩ zab ne bãmba, hal n kolg n ning a noorã bugum." 
Judges9:53 Dẽ, pag n zĩnd be n dɩk ne-biig n lobg a Abimelɛk zugã n wã." 
Judges9:54 La zĩig pʋgẽ, a Abimelɛk boola a rakõor ning sẽn zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã n yeel-a: «Wõog f zabr sʋʋgã n kʋ-m n baase, tɩ b ra wa yeel tɩ yaa pag n kʋ maam ye.» La bi-bɩɩgã kõs-a lame t'a ki." 
Judges9:55 Israyɛll nebã sẽn mik t'a Abimelɛk kiime, bãmb ned kam fãa lebg n kuila a yiri." 
Judges9:56 Yɩ a woto la Wẽnnaam lebs a Abimelɛk wẽng ning yẽnda sẽn dag n maan a ba wã. Yẽnda rag n kʋ a ba wã kom-dibli pis-yopoe sẽn yaa yẽnda ba-biisã. 
Judges9:57 La yɩɩ woto me la Wẽnnaam lebs Sɩkɛm nebã wẽng ning fãa bãmb sẽn dag n maanã. La kell n yɩɩ woto, tɩ kãab-wẽng ning a Zeruball biig a Zotam sẽn dag n kãab Sɩkɛm nebã paam pidsgu." 
Judges10:1 A Abimelɛk kũumã zugẽ, a Tola sẽn yaa Isakaar buudã nedã yikame n na n fãag Israyɛll nebã. Yẽnda rag n yaa a Dodo biig a Puya biiga, t'a yir be Samiir tẽnga, Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋga." 
Judges10:2 A Tola yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pisi la a tãabo. La a kiime tɩ b tɩ mum-a Samiir tẽnga. 
Judges10:3 A Tola loogr zugẽ, yaa Galaad buudã ned a Yayɩɩr n yɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu." 
Judges10:4 Yẽnda rag n tara kom-dibli pis-tã tɩ b tar bõens pis-tã n zao n kẽnda. La bãmb dag n soo tẽms pis-tã, la b ket n boonda tẽn-bãmb tɩ Yayɩɩr tẽn-bãooneg sẽn be Galaad soolem, hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Judges10:5 La a Yayɩɩr kiime tɩ b tɩ mum-a Kamon tẽngã pʋga. 
Judges10:6 Israyɛll nebã leb n maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Bala, bãmb waooga Baall ne Astarte wẽn-naandse, la Siiri ne Sɩdõ, ne Moaab-rãmba la Amo-rãmba, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã wẽn-naandse. Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ka leb n sakd-b ye." 
Judges10:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne Israyɛll nebã, tɩ b bas-b Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Amo nebã nugẽ." 
Judges10:8 Yʋʋm-kãnga, bu-bãmb namsa Israyɛll nebã wʋsgo. Bãmb namsa Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã sẽn yaa Amo nebã tẽng sẽn be Galaadã, n kaoos yʋʋm piig la nii." 
Judges10:9 Amo nebã pɩʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n na n tɩ zab ne Zʋʋda buudã la Benzame buudã, la ne Efrayiim buudã nebã. La Israyɛll nebã rag n ka leb n mi b sẽn kẽedẽ ye." 
Judges10:10 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tõnd beega yãmba, tõnd basa yãmb sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, n tɩ waoog Baall wẽn-naandsã.»" 
Judges10:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Wakat n zĩndi, tɩ Ezɩpt nebã, ne Amoor-dãmbã, la Amo-rãmbã, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã nams yãmba." 
Judges10:12 Sɩdõ nebã, ne Amalɛk-rãmbã, la Mawõ-rãmbã me sẽn wa n namsd yãmbã, tɩ yãmb kelem n bool maamã, mam ka fãag yãmb b nusẽ sɩda." 
Judges10:13 La baa ne rẽ fãa, yãmb basa maam n waoog wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba. Yaa rẽnda yĩng n kɩt tɩ m ka na n leb n fãag yãmb ye." 
Judges10:14 Lebg-y n tɩ kos-y wẽnnaam-dãmb nins yãmb sẽn yãk yam n tũudẽ wã tɩ b sõng-yã. Kelem-y n bool-y bãmb tɩ b wa fãag yãmb y yel-pakrã pʋga!» 
Judges10:15 Israyɛll nebã yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yaa sɩda, tõnd beega yãmba, maan-y yãmb sẽn dat ne-do. D sẽn kot-y bala, yaa tɩ y fãag-d rũndã!»" 
Judges10:16 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yiisa wẽn-sãamsã sẽn da be b sʋkã, la b waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La b sẽn dag n namsd Israyɛll nebã sãama Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũuri." 
Judges10:17 Amo-rãmbã sũu tãpo, n kẽng n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã Galaade, tɩ Israyɛll nebã me sũ tãp n kẽng n tɩ tilg b tãb-sik Mispa." 
Judges10:18 Galaad nebã ne b nanambsã yẽsa ne taaba, n sok tɩ yaa ãnda soab n na n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Amo-rãmbã. La b yeel tɩ ned ning sẽn na n yɩ-a pipi n yik n zab ne Amo-rãmbã, yẽnda soab n na n lebg Galaad nebã fãa naaba." 
Judges11:1 Galaad rao a Zefte rag n yaa tãb-bi gãndaoog halaale. Yẽnda rag n yaa pʋg-yoodr biiga. A ba wã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Galaade. 
Judges11:2 A Galaad pag meng-mengã roga kom-dibli. La kom-dibli wã sẽn wa n bɩ n bãng b nense, bãmb riga a Zefte, n yeel-a: «Fo ka na n naag tõnd n paam pʋɩɩr tõnd ba wã zakẽ ye. Bala, fo yaa pag a to biiga.»" 
Judges11:3 Woto kɩtame t'a Zefte zoe n zãag ne a ba-biisã n tɩ zĩnd Toob tẽnga. La nin-yaals n tɩ naag a Zefte n sõngd-a tɩ b kẽnd n zabdẽ. 
Judges11:4 Sẽn wa n kaoos bilfu, Amo-rãmbã yika zabr ne Israyɛll nebã." 
Judges11:5 Wakat ning Amo-rãmbã sẽn wa n zabd ne Israyɛll nebã, Galaad kãsem-dãmbã kẽnga Toob tẽng n tɩ bool a Zefte." 
Judges11:6 Bãmb yeela a Zefte yaa: «Wa-y n lebg-y tõnd tãb-biisã taoor soaba, tɩ d zab ne Amo-rãmbã.»" 
Judges11:7 A Zefte leoka Galaad kãsem-dãmbã yaa: «Yãmb kisga maam, n dig maam tɩ m yi n bas m ba wã zaka. Yãmb sẽn be yel-pakr pʋgẽ moasã wã la yãmb baood mam zĩiga?»" 
Judges11:8 Galaad kãsem-dãmbã yeela a Zefte yaa: «N-yẽe! Yaa tõnd sẽn be yel-pakr pʋgã la d wat n na n kos yãmba, tɩ y wa lʋɩ d taoore, n zab ne Amo nebã, la y lebg tõnd naaba, n soog Galaad nebã fãa.»" 
Judges11:9 A Zefte leoka Galaad kãsem-dãmbã yaa: «Sɩd-sɩdã, yãmb sã n tall maam n kuil tɩ m tɩ zab ne Amo nebã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n sõng maam tɩ m tõog-ba, maam n na n lebg yãmb naaba.»" 
Judges11:10 La Galaad kãsem-dãmbã yeela a Zefte: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tõnd kaset soaba. Tõnd na n maana wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» 
Judges11:11 Dẽ, a Zefte tũu Galaad kãsem-dãmbã n looge. Israyɛll nebã rɩka a Zefte n kɩt t'a yɩ b taoor soaba, la b tãb-biis naaba. A Zefte yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa n leb n togs goam nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n gomã." 
Judges11:12 A Zefte tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ sok Amo-rãmba rĩm yaa: «Bõe beem n be maam ne yãmb sʋka, tɩ yãmb wat n na n zab ne mam tẽngã?»" 
Judges11:13 Amo-rãmbã rĩm leoka a Zefte nebã yaa: «Yaa tɩ Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, b wa n deega mam tẽmse, sẽn sɩng ne Arno kʋɩlgã n tɩ tãag Yabok kʋɩlgã ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã. Lebs-y maam m tẽmsã tɩ ket n maasa.»" 
Judges11:14 A Zefte leb n tʋma neb Amo-rãmbã rĩm nengẽ," 
Judges11:15 n yeel tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «A Zefte yeelame tɩ Israyɛll nebã ka reeg Moaab tẽnga, b leb n ka reeg Amo-rãmbã tẽng me ye." 
Judges11:16 Sɩd me, Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, bãmb pɩʋʋga we-raoogã, n tɩ ta rudum ko-kãsengã n kẽng Kadɛɛse." 
Judges11:17 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ kos Edom rĩmã t'a bas-b tɩ pɩʋʋg a soolmã n looge, la a ka sak ye. La Israyɛll nebã leb n tʋmame tɩ b tɩ kos Moaab rĩmã me t'a bas tɩ b pɩʋʋg a soolmã n looge, la yẽnda me zãgsame. Woto, Israyɛll nebã kell n paa Kadɛɛse." 
Judges11:18 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã pãrga we-rasempʋɩɩgã n gilg Edom ne Moaab tẽmsã, n tɩ tũ Moaab soolmã yaangã n looge. Bãmb tɩ siga Arno kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, n ka sak n kẽ Moaab nebã soolmẽ ye. Bala, Arno kʋɩlgã yaa Moaab tẽngã toadga." 
Judges11:19 Rẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã tʋma neb rĩm a Sihon sẽn yaa Amoor-dãmbã ne Ɛsbon tẽngã rĩmã nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a tɩ Israyɛll nebã yeelame, tɩ b kotame t'a bas tɩ b pɩʋʋg a tẽngã n loog n kẽng b sẽn tog n kẽngẽ wã." 
Judges11:20 La rĩm a Sihon sẽn ka bas yard ne Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, a ka sak tɩ b pɩʋʋg a soolmã n loog ye. Woto, a tigma a tãb-biisã n kẽng Yahats n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã." 
Judges11:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ bãmb nebã tõog a Sihon ne a nebã fãa. La Israyɛll nebã reega Amoor-dãmba soolem zãnga. 
Judges11:22 Israyɛll nebã tõog n deega Amoor-dãmbã soolem zãnga, sẽn sɩng ne Arno kʋɩlgã sẽn be goabgã, n tɩ tãag Yabok kʋɩlgã sẽn be rɩtgã, la sẽn sɩng ne we-rasempʋɩɩgã sẽn be yaangã n kell n tall n tɩ tãag Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã sẽn be nin-taoorã." 
Judges11:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog n dig Amoor-dãmbã n deeg b soolmã, tɩ yãmb yik moasã n dat n dig tõnd sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã n yiisi!" 
Judges11:24 Yãmb Wẽnnaam a Kemoos sẽn deeg tẽms ning n kõ yãmb tɩ y kẽedẽ wã ka yãmb n so la? Dẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã me sẽn deeg tẽms nins n kõ tõnd tɩ d soogã yaa tõnd dẽnda!" 
Judges11:25 Yãmb yɩɩda a Sipoor biig a Balak sẽn dag n yaa Moaab rĩmã la? Yãmb yãnda a sẽn tol n bao Israyɛll nebã noore, bɩ yãmb zoe n yãnda a sẽn zab ne-ba?" 
Judges11:26 Israyɛll nebã sẽn be Ɛsbon ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, la b be Arowɛɛr ne a tẽn-bãoonegã pʋsã, ne tẽms nins fãa sẽn be Arno kʋɩlgã noorã, yaa yʋʋm kobs-tã la woto. La maana a wãn tɩ yãmb ka rig bãmb wakat-kãnga?" 
Judges11:27 Mam yẽ ka maan yãmb wẽng ye, yaa yãmb n maan maam wẽnga, n yik n baood zabr ne maam. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng sẽn yaa bʋ-kaoodã bʋ yell ning sẽn be Israyɛll nebã ne Amo nebã sʋkã bʋʋd rũndã.»" 
Judges11:28 Amo-rãmbã rĩm ka kelg koɛɛg ning a Zefte sẽn tʋm yẽnda nengẽ wã ye. 
Judges11:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã siga a Zefte zugu. La yẽnda saaga Galaad soolmã ne Manaase soolmã, n kell n tũ Mispa sẽn be Galaadã soolem. Yẽnda yii Mispa n pɩʋʋg n ta Amo nebã soolmẽ." 
Judges11:30 A Zefte maanã pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sã n sõng maam tɩ m tõog Amo nebã," 
Judges11:31 mam sã n lebg n watẽ, ned ning sẽn na n yɩ-a pipi n yi mam zakẽ wã n seg maamã, mam na n dɩka yẽnda soab n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum yãmb yĩnga.»" 
Judges11:32 Dẽ, a Zefte pɩʋʋga toadgã n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Amo-rãmbã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a tõog-ba." 
Judges11:33 A Zefte tõoga Amo-rãmbã, sẽn sɩng ne Arowɛɛr n tall n tɩ tãag Minit sẽnẽ, la yaa tẽms pisi. Yẽnda rig-b lame n tɩ tãag Abɛll-Keramim. Amo-rãmbã rɩɩ yãnd Israyɛll nebã taoore." 
Judges11:34 A Zefte sẽn lebg n ta a yir Mispa, yẽnda yã a meng bi-puglã sẽn zãad gãngão-bil n wẽedẽ, la a saood n segd yẽnda. Yaool n yaa yẽnda la a bi-yende. Sã n ka bi-pugl-kãnga, a Zefte ka paam bi-ribla wall bi-pugl a to ye." 
Judges11:35 A Zefte sẽn yãnda a bi-puglã, yẽnda pãrsa a futu, n yeel yaa: «M ba yee! M biig sõngo, fo kõo maam sũ-sãanga! Fo kẽesa maam yel-kãseng pʋga. Mam goma wʋsg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la mam ka tõe n lebs m noorã poorẽ ye.»" 
Judges11:36 Bi-puglã yeela a baaba yaa: «M baaba, sã n yaa tɩ yãmb goma wʋsg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõng yãmb tɩ y tõog n dok y sũur ne Amo-rãmbã sẽn yaa y bɛɛbã, bɩ y maan maam wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn pʋlem bũmb ningã.»" 
Judges11:37 Dẽ, bi-puglã yeela a baaba yaa: «Mam kot-y-la bũmb a yembr bala: Kõ-y maam kiis a yiibu, tɩ m kẽng tãmsã zutu, n bool m zo-rãmb tɩ d yãbe, mam sẽn ka paam n bãng raoã yĩnga.»" 
Judges11:38 A Zefte yeela a biigã t'a kẽnge. La a kõo yẽnda weer kiis a yiibu. Bi-puglã peega a zo-rãmb tɩ b kẽng tãmsã zut n tɩ yãbe, yẽnda sẽn ka paam n bãng raoã yĩnga." 
Judges11:39 Kiis a yiibã sẽn pidi, bi-puglã lebg n waa a ba wã nengẽ. La a Zefte rɩka yẽnda n pids a pʋlengã wa yẽnda sẽn dag n pʋlmã. Bi-puglã kiime n ka bãng rao ye. Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, b rɩka bõn-kãng tɩ lebg mining Israyɛll buudã sʋka." 
Judges11:40 Woto, yʋʋmd fãa, Israyɛll kom-pugli wã kẽnd n yãbda Galaad rao a Zefte bi-puglã yĩng rasem a naase." 
Judges12:1 Efrayiim nebã tigma taab n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽng Safon n tɩ yeel a Zefte yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb kẽng n tɩ zab ne Amo-rãmbã n ka bool tõnd tɩ d wa sõng-yã? Tõnd na n naaga foom ne f roogã n yõog bugum.» 
Judges12:2 A Zefte leoka bãmb yaa: «Maam ne m nebã rag n bee zab-kãseng pʋga, n zabd ne Amo nebã. La mam boola yãmb tɩ y wa fãag-do, la yãmb ka wa fãag tõnd bãmb nusẽ ye." 
Judges12:3 Mam sẽn mik tɩ y ka wat n na n fãag tõndã, mam gẽnega m yõore, n pɩʋʋg n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Amo nebã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngame tɩ m tõog-ba. La moasã, yaa bõe yĩng tɩ y wat n dat n zab ne-ma?»" 
Judges12:4 Dẽ, a Zefte tigma Galaad nebã fãa n zab ne Efrayiim nebã. La Galaad nebã tõoga Efrayiim nebã. Dẽ, Efrayiim nebã dag n yetame: «Galaad nebã, yãmb yaa Efrayiim neb sẽn zoe n tɩ nok Manaase buudã bala.»" 
Judges12:5 Dẽ, Galaad nebã kẽng n tɩ gɩda Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã zĩ-rʋʋgdsã sẽn be Efrayiim kɩrengã. Woto, b sã n yãnd Efrayiim ned sẽn zoet n wat n na n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, Galaad nebã sokd-a lame: «Fo yaa Efrayiim ned bɩ?» La a leokdame tɩ ayo." 
Judges12:6 Dẽ, bãmb yet-a lame yaa: «Beneere, bɩ f yeel tɩ Sɩbolɛte.» La a yetame tɩ fɩbolɛte, bala, yẽnda ka tõe n yeel tɩ zems ye. Dẽ, b yõkda yẽnda n kʋ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã zĩ-rʋʋgdgẽ wã. Wakat-kãnga, b kʋʋ Efrayiim neb tus pis-naas la a yiibu." 
Judges12:7 Galaad dao a Zefte yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã bʋ-kaood yʋʋm a yoobe. Dẽ poore, a kiime tɩ b mum-a Galaad tẽngã pʋga." 
Judges12:8 A Zefte loogr zugẽ, a Ibsan sẽn yit Betlehɛmã n lebg Israyɛll bʋ-kaooda." 
Judges12:9 Yẽnda paama kom-dibli pis-tã la kom-pugli pis-tã n kuils-b sɩdb ne yɩng nebã, la a kẽng n tɩ bao yɩng neb kom-pugli pis-tã n wa kõ a kom-dibli wã tɩ b kẽ kãadem. La yẽnda yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã bʋ-kaood yʋʋm a yopoe." 
Judges12:10 Dẽ poore, a Ibsan kiime tɩ b mum-a Betlehɛm." 
Judges12:11 A Ibsan loogr zugẽ, Zabulõ buudã ned a Elõ n lebg Israyɛll bʋ-kaooda. Yẽnda yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm piiga." 
Judges12:12 Rẽ poore, a kiime, la b tɩ mum-a-la Zabulõ soolmã tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Ayalõ." 
Judges12:13 A Elon loogr zugẽ, yaa Piraton tẽng rao a Ilɛll biig a Abdõ n lebg Israyɛll bʋ-kaooda." 
Judges12:14 A Abdõ paama kom-dibli pis-naase la yagens pis-tã, la bãmb zaoo bõens pis-yopoe n kẽnda. A Abdõ yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm a nii." 
Judges12:15 Dẽ poore, Piraton ned a Ilɛll biig a Abdõ kiime tɩ mum-a Piraton sẽn be Efrayiim soolmẽ wã, Amalɛk nebã tãng zugu." 
Judges13:1 Israyɛll nebã leb n maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã soog-b yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Judges13:2 Dan buudã ned a yembr n dag n be Soreya t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Manoake. La a Manoak paga rag n yaa kiiri, a rag n ka tar biig ye." 
Judges13:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk n vẽneg a meng ne a Manoak pagã n yeel-a: «Sɩdã, fo yaa kiiri, fo ka tar biig ye. La fo na n dɩka pʋg n doga bi-ribla." 
Judges13:4 Moasã, m kot-f lame tɩ f gũus f menga, n da yũ reezẽ rãam, wall bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng ye. La f ra rɩ bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ye." 
Judges13:5 Fo na n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla. La barg ka tog n sɩɩs a zugã ye. Bala, bi-kãng na n welga toor n lebg Wẽnnaam dẽnda, t'a nan ket a ma pʋgẽ, la yaa bi-kãngã, n na n sɩng n fãag Israyɛll nebã Filistẽ-dãmbã nusẽ.»" 
Judges13:6 La pagã kẽng n tɩ yeela a sɩdã yaa: «Wẽnnaam dao n wa mam nengẽ, la a nengã rag n wẽnda Wẽnnaam malɛɛk nenga, la a gesg ra kõta rabeem. La mam ka sok-a n ges a sẽn yitẽ, la a ka togs maam a yʋʋr me ye." 
Judges13:7 La ad raoã sẽn yeel maam: Gese, fo na n dɩka pʋg n doga bi-ribla, la sẽn sɩng ne moasã, fo ka tog n leb n yũ reezẽ rãam wall bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng ye. La f ka tog n dɩ bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ye. Bala, bi-kãngã na n welga toor n lebg Wẽnnaam dẽnda, t'a nan ket a ma pʋgẽ, hal n tãag a yõor tɛka.»" 
Judges13:8 A Manoak pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam kot-y lame tɩ y kɩt tɩ rao ningã yãmb sẽn dag n tʋmã leb n lebg n wa tõnd nengẽ, n wa wilg tõnd d sẽn tog n maan to-to ne biigã, a rogmã poore.»" 
Judges13:9 La Wẽnnaam wʋma a Manoak pʋʋsgã. Dẽ, bãmb malɛɛkã leb n waa pagã nengẽ. Wakat-kãng tɩ pagã zĩi pʋʋgã sʋka, la a sɩd a Manoak rag n ka be ne yẽnda ye." 
Judges13:10 Pagã wudga tao-tao n tɩ yeel a sɩdã yaa: «Rao ningã sẽn wa mam nengẽ nindaarẽ wã leb n waame.» 
Judges13:11 A Manoak yikame n tũ a pagã n kẽng raoã nengẽ, n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yaa yãmb n gom nindaarẽ ne pʋg-kãngã wã bɩ?» Malɛɛkã leokame tɩ yaa yẽnda." 
Judges13:12 A Manoak yeelame: «La woto wã, yãmb sẽn yeelã sã n paam pidsgu, bõe ne bõe la tõnd tog n maan sẽn kẽed bi-kãngã wɛɛngẽ?»" 
Judges13:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela a Manoak yaa: «Bɩ pagã gũus a meng ne bũmb nins mam sẽn wilg yẽnda wã. 
Judges13:14 Bɩ a ra sak n sɩɩs bũmb ning fãa b sẽn maan ne reezẽ tɩɩg biis ye. La a ra yũ reezẽ rãam wall bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng ye. La a ra sak n dɩ bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ye. A maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel-a wã.» 
Judges13:15 A Manoak yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y yals tɩ d kʋ bull n segl-yã.» 
Judges13:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela a Manoak yaa: «Fo sã n gɩdg maam me, mam ka na n dɩ f rɩɩbã ye. Fo sã n dat n dɩk bõn-kãng n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ f maane!» A Manoak rag n ka mi tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk ye." 
Judges13:17 Dẽ, a Manoak soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yaa: «Yãmb yʋʋr la a bõe, tɩ yãmb sẽn yeelã sã n sɩd wa n paam pidsg bɩ tõnd tõe n waoog yãmba?»" 
Judges13:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã leoka yẽnda yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo baood n bãng mam yʋʋre? Mam yʋʋrã yaa yel-solemde.» 
Judges13:19 A Manoak rɩka bullã ne bõn-koaadl kũunã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum pĩig kugr zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Dẽ, a Manoak ne a pagã sẽn yas n get maoongã bugum wakate, yel-soalem n maane." 
Judges13:20 Bugmã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zug n zẽkd n kuiis yĩngrã wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã kell n tũu bugmã n zẽk n looge. La a Manoak ne a pagã sẽn yãnd bõn-kãnga, b wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
Judges13:21 Woto, malɛɛkã ka leb n vẽneg a meng ne a Manoak ne a pagã ye. Dẽ, a Manoak bãngame tɩ rag n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛka." 
Judges13:22 La a Manoak yeela a pagã yaa: «Mam mii vẽeneg tɩ tõnd na n kiime. Bala, tõnd yãnda Wẽnnaam neng ne nenga.»" 
Judges13:23 A Manoak pagã leoka a Manoak yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n datẽ tõnd kʋʋbo, bãmb dag n ka na n deeg tõnd maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne d bõn-koaadl kũunã ye, la b rag n ka na n sak tɩ tõnd yãnd bũmb nins fãa tõnd sẽn yã wã ye, la b rag n ka na n bas tɩ tõnd wʋm bũmb nins tõnd sẽn wʋmã ye.»" 
Judges13:24 A Manoak pagã roga bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Samsõ. Biigã bɩɩme, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning-a-la barka." 
Judges13:25 Yaa Dan buudã sik zĩig sẽn be Soreya ne Ɛstaoll sʋkã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã sɩng n na n tall yẽnda n tʋme." 
Judges14:1 A Samsõ kẽnga Timna, la beenẽ, a yãnda pʋg-sad Filistẽ-dãmbã kom-pugli sʋka." 
Judges14:2 La a Samsõ sẽn wa n lebg n kuilã, a yeela a baaba ne a ma yaa: «Mam sẽn kẽng Timna wã mam yãnda pʋg-sad Filistẽ-dãmbã kom-pugli sʋka, kẽng-y n tɩ kos-y-yã-a n kõ-m tɩ m maan m paga.»" 
Judges14:3 A Samsõ ba wã ne a ma wã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yaa pag n ka be fo roagdbã kom-pugli sʋk bɩ? Bɩ tõnd buudã fãa sʋka, pag n ka be beenẽ, tɩ fo wa tɩ rat Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã biig n maan f paga?» La a Samsõ yeela a baaba yaa: «Kos-y yẽnda n kõ-ma, bala, yaa yẽnda n ta mam yam.»" 
Judges14:4 A Samsõ ba wã ne a ma wã rag n ka mi tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan a woto, n na n tũnug a Samsõ, sẽn na n yɩl n paam n sɩbg Filistẽ-dãmbã ye. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã n dag n so Israyɛll nebã." 
Judges14:5 Dẽ, a Samsõ tũ a baaba ne a ma n kẽng Timna, la bãmb sẽn ta Timna reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, gɩgem-poll n yi zĩig pʋgẽ n kelemd n segd a Samsõ." 
Judges14:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã siga a Samsõ zugu, la baa ne yẽnda sẽn dag n ka zãad rao-teoogã, a gãda gɩgemdã ne a nus n tak-a n yang wa bulla. La yẽnda rag n ka togs a ba wã ne a ma wã yẽnda sẽn maan bũmb ningã ye." 
Judges14:7 A Samsõ kẽng n tɩ sõsa ne Filistẽ-dãmbã pʋg-sadã, la pʋg-sadã rag n taa yẽnda yam." 
Judges14:8 Rasem bilf rẽ zugẽ, a Samsõ lebg n dabda Timna n na n tɩ peeg a pagã, n tek n bʋdg n na n ges gɩgem-kɩɩngã. La yẽnda mikame tɩ sĩ-loll n kẽ gɩgem-wɛɛgã pʋg n maan sɩɩdo." 
Judges14:9 A Samsõ yãka sɩɩdã n zãad n dɩtẽ la a kẽnda. La yẽnda sẽn ta a ba wã ne a ma wã nengẽ, a yãka sɩɩdã n kõ bãmb me tɩ b rɩ. La a ka yeel bãmb t'a yãka sɩɩdã gɩgem-wɛɛg pʋgẽ ye." 
Judges14:10 A Samsõ ba wã kẽnga pʋg-sadã ba-yiri. La a Samsõ maana yi-kãadem tigr-beenẽ. Bala, kom-bɩɩsã rag n minim n maanda a woto." 
Judges14:11 Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn yãnd a Samsõ sẽn wa wã, b tũusa kom-bɩɩs pis-tã n yeel-b tɩ b wa be ne a Samsõ." 
Judges14:12 A Samsõ yeela kom-bɩɩsã yaa: «Mam na n wẽe yãmb yel-bũndi, la tigrã rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, yãmb sã n tõog n bilg maam yel-bũndã võore, mam na n kõo yãmb fu-yerd pis-tã ne koab pis-tã.»" 
Judges14:13 La yãmb sã n ka tõog n bilg maam yel-bũndã võore, yaa yãmb n na n kõ maam fu-yerd pis-tã ne koab pis-tã. La kom-bɩɩsã yeela a Samsõ t'a wẽ a yel-bũndã tɩ bãmb kelgdame." 
Judges14:14 A Samsõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Rɩɩb yii rɩt pʋgẽ, la sẽn yaa noog yii pãng soab pʋgẽ.» Maana rasem a tãabo, tɩ kom-bɩɩsã ka tõog n bilg yel-bũndã võor ye." 
Judges14:15 Rasem a yopoe wã daare, kom-bɩɩsã yeela a Samsõ pagã yaa: «Belg f sɩdã t'a togs tõnd yel-bũndã võore, sã n ka rẽ, tõnd na n yõoga foom ne f ba wã zak bugum. Yãmb boola tõnd n dat n fã la?»" 
Judges14:16 A Samsõ pagã rag n yãbda ne a Samsõ wʋsg n yetẽ: «Yãmb kisa maam, y ka nong maam ye. Yãmb wẽe mam buudã kom-bɩɩsã yel-bũndi, n yaool n ka sak n bilg maam a võorã ye.» La a Samsõ yeela yẽnda yaa: «Mam ka tol n bilg-a m ba wã bɩ m ma wã ye. Dẽ wã, na n yɩɩ a wãn tɩ mam na n bilg foom a võore?»" 
Judges14:17 Pagã yãba ne a Samsõ tigrã rasem a yopoe wã tõre. La rasem a yopoe wã daare, a Samsõ bilga pagã a yel-bundã võore. Bala, pagã rag n namsda yẽnda wʋsgo. Dẽ, pagã rɩka yel-bũndã võor n tɩ togs a buudã kom-bɩɩse." 
Judges14:18 Rasem a yopoe wã daare, sẽn deng wĩndgã kõom, tẽnga nebã wa n yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Bõe n yaa noog n yɩɩd sɩɩdo? La bõe n tar pãng n yɩɩd gɩgemde?» La a Samsõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb sã n dag n ka tallẽ mam nag-sadgã n ko, yãmb dag n kõn bãngẽ mam yel-bũndã võor ye.»" 
Judges14:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã kẽ a Samsõ, la yẽnda kẽnga Askalon, n tɩ kʋ neb pis-tã beenẽ n wʋk b koabã n wa kõ neb nins sẽn bilg yel-bũndã võorã. Dẽ, a Samsõ lebg n kuila a ba wã yir ne sũ-puugri." 
Judges14:20 Woto, b rɩka a Samsõ pagã n wẽneg n kõ a Samsõ zoa ning sẽn yãag-a a Samsõ a yi-kãadmẽ wã." 
Judges15:1 Rasem bilf sẽn paase, bɩle wã tigsg wakate, a Samsõ talla bull n kẽng n na n tɩ ges a pagã. Dẽ, a Samsõ kosame n na n kẽ a pagã roogẽ, la pagã ba ka sak t'a kẽ ye." 
Judges15:2 Pagã baaba yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Mam tagsame tɩ fo ka leb n nong f pagã ye. Dẽ, mam dɩk-a lame n kõ fo zoa ning sẽn sõng-a foom f kãadmã wakatã. A yao wã neerem ka yɩɩd yẽnda sɩda? Peeg-a t'a ledg a kẽemã zĩigẽ.»" 
Judges15:3 A Samsõ yeel-b lame: «Moasã wã yẽ, mam sã n maan Filistẽ-dãmbã wẽnga, ned kõn ning maam taal ye.»" 
Judges15:4 A Samsõ bas n loogame. La a kẽng n tɩ yõga we-baas kobs-tã n naag b zʋyã ne taab yiib-yiib n ning vɩlems sʋk n loe. 
Judges15:5 A Samsõ yõgna vɩlemsã bugum, n bas we-baasã tɩ b kẽ Filistẽ-dãmbã pʋtã, tɩ bugmã rɩ koodã sẽn kẽeb n dʋʋgã ne sẽn nan ka kẽebã, la reezẽ tɩɩsã ne oliiv tɩɩsã fãa b sẽn selã." 
Judges15:6 Woto, Filistẽ-dãmbã sokame tɩ yaa ãnda soab n maan yel-kãngã. La b leokame tɩ yaa Timna raoã rɛɛmb a Samsõ. Tɩ bala Timna raoã rɩka a Samsõ pagã n kõ a Samsõ zoa. Woto, Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽngame n tɩ yõog pagã ne a ba wã bugum." 
Judges15:7 Dẽ, a Samsõ yeelame: «Yãmb sẽn maan a woto wã yĩnga, mam kõn tol n bas yãmb n ka rok m sũur ne yãmb ye.»" 
Judges15:8 A Samsõ zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã n tõog-b ne tõog-kãsenga, la a lebg n kẽng n tɩ kẽ Etam tãngã bokẽ." 
Judges15:9 Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽng n tɩ tilga b tãb-sikã Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, n teedg b tãb-biisã n tɩ tãag Leyi n na n zab ne Zʋʋda nebã." 
Judges15:10 Dẽ, Zʋʋda nebã sok-b lame yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb wa n dat n zab ne tõndo?» La Filistẽ-dãmbã leokame yaa: «Tõnd waame n dat n sẽb a Samsõ n tall-a n tɩ maan wa yẽnda sẽn maan tõndã.»" 
Judges15:11 Woto, Zʋʋda neb tus a tãab kẽnga Etam tãngã bokẽ n tɩ yeel a Samsõ yaa: «Fo ka mi tɩ yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã n so tõnd la? Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maan tõnd woto wã?» A Samsõ leokame: «Yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn maan maam bũmb ningã yĩnga, la mam sẽn maan bãmb me a woto wã.»" 
Judges15:12 Zʋʋda nebã yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Tõnd waame n na n sẽb foom n kɩs Filistẽ-dãmbã.» La a Samsõ yeela bãmb yaa: «Bɩ y wẽen tɩ yãmb ka na n kʋ maam ye.» 
Judges15:13 Bãmb leoka a Samsõ n yeel yaa: «Ayo, tõnd dat n sẽba foom bal n tɩ kɩs-ba, la tõnd ka na n kʋ foom ye.» Dẽ, bãmb sẽba a Samsõ ne wĩ-paala, n tʋk-a n yiis tãngã bok pʋga." 
Judges15:14 A Samsõ sẽn wa n ta Leyi, Filistẽ-dãmbã kelmame n seg yẽnda. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩɩg kẽ a Samsõ. La wĩyã b sẽn dag n sẽb yẽnda kamsã ne a nusã kaoome n dʋʋg wa bugum sẽn dɩ gĩsi." 
Judges15:15 A Samsõ yãnda bõang b sẽn nan kʋ paalem yeer kõbre, la a rɩk-a lame, n tall kʋ neb tusri." 
Judges15:16 Dẽ, a Samsõ yeelame: «Mam dɩka bõang yeere, bõang yeer bal la m tall yã, la ne bõangã yeere, mam kʋʋ neb tusri.»" 
Judges15:17 A Samsõ sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a rɩka bõangã yeer kõbr n lobe. La b pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Rama-Leyi." 
Judges15:18 Ko-yũud namsa a Samsõ wʋsgo, la a pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Yaa yãmb n kõ y tʋmtʋmdã tõog-kãseng a woto. La moasã, yãmb na n sak n basa maam tɩ ko-yũud wʋm maam tɩ nin-bãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã wa paam maam n yõke?»" 
Judges15:19 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Leyi pĩigã pusg tɩ koom yi beenẽ. A Samsõ sẽn yũ koomã n sɛ, a pãngã leb n waame, la a nengã yẽegame. La b pʋda ko-bund-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Ɛn-Hakoore. La a ket n bee Leyi hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Judges15:20 Wakat ning Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn dag n so Israyɛll nebã, a Samsõ yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pisi." 
Judges16:1 Daar a yembre, a Samsõ kẽnga Gaaza. La a tɩ yãnda pʋg-yoodr beenẽ, n kẽ ne-a." 
Judges16:2 B yeela Gaaza nebã t'a Samsõ waa tẽngẽ be. La Gaaza nebã tɩ gũbgame n sor yʋngã tõre, n gũud a Samsõ yiibu. La yʋngã tõre, bãmb ka maan bũmb ye. B rag n yetame tɩ beoogã sã n vẽege, bãmb n na n kʋ a Samsõ." 
Judges16:3 A Samsõ kell n paa be n gãand tɩ ta yʋn-sʋka, la yẽnda yikame n kẽng n tɩ gãd tẽngã noor kʋɩlemsã ne b ra-lugds a yiibã n tak-b n vik ne b kʋɩlen-kuyã fãa n palg a bãok n tall n kẽng tãng ning sẽn be Ebrõ neng taoorã zugu." 
Judges16:4 Rẽ fãa loogr zugẽ, a Samsõ yãnda pag a yembr Sorɛk ko-soogẽ wã, n nongẽ. Pagã yʋʋr la a Dalɩla." 
Judges16:5 Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs kẽnga a Dalɩla nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Belg a Samsõ t'a wilg foom yẽnda pãn-kãsengã sẽn yitẽ, la tõnd sẽn na n maan to-to n tõog n sãam a pãngã, n paam-a n yõk n sẽb t'a ka tõog n fãag ye. Woto, tõnd ned kam fãa na n kõo foom wanzuri ligd-koeems tusr la koabga.»" 
Judges16:6 Dẽ, a Dalɩla kẽng n tɩ yeela a Samsõ yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y wilg maam yãmb pãn-kãsengã sẽn yitẽ, la b sẽn tõe n tall bũmb ning n sẽb yãmb tɩ y ka tõog n fãag ye.»" 
Judges16:7 A Samsõ yeela yẽnda yaa: «B sã n sẽb maam ne wĩ-maas a yopoe sẽn nan ka kʋɩ, mam pãngã na n sɛɛme tɩ mam lebg wa neb a taabã bala.»" 
Judges16:8 Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambsã talla wĩ-maas a yopoe sẽn nan ka kʋɩ n wa kɩs a Dalɩla. La a Dalɩla rɩka wĩ-bãmb n sẽb a Samsõ. 
Judges16:9 La mikame tɩ pagã rag n kɩtame tɩ neb soond roogã pʋg n gũudẽ. La pagã yeelame: «Samsõ! Filistẽ-dãmbã wat n na n yõk-y lame!» La a Samsõ kaoo wĩyã wa bugum sẽn dɩt gĩsi. Dẽ, bãmb kell n ka bãng a Samsõ pãngã sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Judges16:10 A Dalɩla yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Yãmb belga maam, n ka togs maam sɩd ye. Mam kot-y lame moasã, tɩ y togs maam b sẽn tõe n tall bũmb ning n sẽb yãmba.»" 
Judges16:11 A Samsõ yeel-a lame yaa: «B sã n sẽb maam ne wĩ-paal b sẽn nan ka tall n sẽb bũmbu, mam pãngã na n sɛɛme tɩ mam lebg wa neb a taabã bala.»" 
Judges16:12 Woto, a Dalɩla rɩka wĩ-paala, n sẽb a Samsõ, la a kelem n yeel yaa: «Samsõ, Filistẽ-dãmbã wat n na n yõk-y lame!» Neb n yaool n dag n solg roogã pʋga. La a Samsõ kaoo wĩyã wa b sẽn dag n sẽb yẽnda nusã wa gĩsi." 
Judges16:13 La a Dalɩla leb n yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Hal tɩ ta moasã, yãmb yaga maam zĩrẽ, n ka togs maam sɩd ye. Togs-y maam b sẽn tõe n tall bũmb ning n sẽb yãmba.» A Samsõ yeela yẽnda yaa: «Fo sã n dɩk mam gɛm a yopoe wã n tui koɛɛrã pʋgẽ, n naag ne koeer-wamd n sẽbe, mam pãngã na n sɛɛme la mam na n lebga wa neb a taabã bala.»" 
Judges16:14 A Dalɩla kɩtame t'a Samsõ gũsi, la a rɩka a Samsõ gɛmã n tui koɛɛrã pʋga, n sẽb ne koeer wamdã la a yeel a Samsõ yaa: «Samsõ, Samsõ! Filistẽ-dãmbã wat n na n yõka yãmba!» A Samsõ nekame n tak koɛɛrã ne a gɛmã n gʋsge." 
Judges16:15 A Dalɩla yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Woto la yãmb yet tɩ y nonga maam, n yaool ka kɩs sɩd ne maam? Ade, yaa naoor a tãab la woto moasã yãmb sẽn belg maam, n ka sak n wilg maam yãmb pãn-kãsengã sẽn yitẽ ye.»" 
Judges16:16 La pagã rag n pẽdgda a Samsõ daar fãa n namsd-a, hal t'a Samsõ yamã wa yaa n yi." 
Judges16:17 Dẽ, a Samsõ pelga a pʋg ne pagã n yeel yaa: «Mam sẽn dogã tɛka, barg nan ka pɩʋʋg mam zugẽ wã ye. Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam n so maam tɩ m nan ket m ma pʋgẽ! Mam sã n põng m zugã, mam pãngã na n loog n basa maam, la mam na n lebga wa neb a taabã bala.»" 
Judges16:18 A Dalɩla sẽn bãng t'a Samsõ pelga a pʋg ne yẽnda wã, a tʋmame tɩ b bool Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambsã n yeel-b yaa: «Wa-y tɩ moasã wã yẽ, a Samsõ pelga a pʋg ne maam.» Dẽ, Filistẽ-dãmba nanambsã talla wanzuri wã n kẽng a Dalɩla nengẽ." 
Judges16:19 A Dalɩla kɩtame t'a Samsõ gãand yẽnda naoẽ wã n gũsi, la a boola ned a yembr t'a kolg n põng a Samsõ zugã n wõrs a gɛm a yopoe wã. Pagã sɩngame n tõogd a Samsõ. La a Samsõ pãngã yi n bas-a lame." 
Judges16:20 La pagã yeela a Samsõ yaa: «Samsõ! Samsõ! Filistẽ-dãmbã wat n na n yõka yãmba!» A Samsõ sẽn neke, a tagsame tɩ yẽnda na n tõog n fãaga a meng wa raasenkamã. Yẽnda rag n ka mi tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas-a lame ye." 
Judges16:21 Filistẽ-dãmbã yõka a Samsõ n kɩɩd a ninã, n tall-a n kẽng Gaaza. Beenẽ, b balga yẽnda ne zũud sogle, n kɩt tɩ yẽnda werd koodã bi-bees roogã pʋga." 
Judges16:22 La rẽ fãa zugẽ, b sẽn da põng a Samsõ zugã, a zoobdã leb n sɩngame n yita." 
Judges16:23 Daar a yembre, Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs tigma taab n na n maan maoon-kãseng n kõ b wẽn-naandg a Dagõ, la b maan sũ-noogo. Bãmb yeelame yaa: «Tõnd wẽnnaamã yõka d bɛ a Samsõ n kõ-do.»" 
Judges16:24 La nebã sẽn yãnd a Samsõ wã, b kaasame n pẽg b wẽn-naandgã n yeele: «Tõnd wẽnnaamã yõka tõnd bɛ wã n kõ-do. B yõka ned ning sẽn dag n sãamd tõnd tẽngã, la a kʋʋd tõnd neb wʋsgã n kõ-do.»" 
Judges16:25 Bãmb sũyã sẽn dag n nooma yĩnga, b yeelame: «Bool-y-yã a Samsõ t'a wa maan tɩ d la!» Bãmb boola a Samsõ t'a yi bi-bees roogẽ wã n wa yals bãmb taoore. A saoome tɩ b gese. B talla a Samsõ t'a tɩ yals roogã ra-lugds nins sẽn tebend roogã sʋka." 
Judges16:26 La a Samsõ yeela bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n gãd-a yẽnda n tatẽ wã yaa: «Sõng-m tɩ m tik ra-lugds nins sẽn tebend roogã n paam n delle.» 
Judges16:27 Pagb ne raop n dag n pid roogã. Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambsã fãa rag n bee be. La neb sõor sẽn kolg tus a tã n dag n be roogã bɛoong zugu. Yaa pagb la raopa. La b rag n geta a Samsõ sẽn saoodã. 
Judges16:28 La a Samsõ pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kot-y lame tɩ y tẽeg m yelle. Mam Wẽnnaam, leb-y n kõ-y maam pãng wakat-kãngã yĩng bala, tɩ m tõog n dok m sũur vugr ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, mam nin a yiibã kɩɩdg yĩnga.»" 
Judges16:29 Dẽ, a Samsõ tika roogã tẽn-sʋk ra-lugds a yiibã. A tika a yembr ne a rɩtgo, la a tik a ye ne a goabga." 
Judges16:30 A Samsõ yeelame yaa: «Bas-y-m tɩ m naag Filistẽ-dãmbã n ki.» Dẽ, a tusa ra-lugdsã ne pãnga, la roogã lʋɩ n zãba Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambsã ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã. A Samsõ sẽn kʋ neb nins a kũumã wakatã sõor yɩɩda yẽnda sẽn dag n kʋ neb nins a vɩɩmã wakatã." 
Judges16:31 A Samsõ saam-biisã ne a ba-yirã rãmb fãa kẽng n tɩ rɩk-a lame n looge. Bãmb sẽn ta yiri, b tɩ mum-a-la Soreya ne Ɛstaoll sʋka, a ba a Manoak yaoogẽ. A Samsõ yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pisi." 
Judges17:1 Ned a yembr n dag n be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋga, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Mika." 
Judges17:2 A Mika yeela a ma wã yaa: «Mam wʋma fo sẽn dag n kãabd ned ning sẽn zuk-a fo wanzuri ligd koeems tusr la koabgã. Ade, wanzuri wã bee ne maam, yaa maam n dag n dɩk-a.» La a ma wã yeel-a lame yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab barkã zĩnd m biigã zugu.»" 
Judges17:3 La a Mika rɩka wanzuri ligd koeems tusr la koabgã n lebs a ma wã. La a ma wã yeelame: «Mam na n welga wanzuri-kãngã toor kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, n kɩt tɩ b yẽneg n dõog wẽn-naandg m biigã yĩnga. Rẽ wã, m biiga, mam dɩkd-a lame n lebsd foom moasã.»" 
Judges17:4 La biigã lebg n dɩka wanzuri wã n lebs a ma. A ma wã yãka wanzuri ligd koeems kobs-yi n kɩs yõaka, la yõakã rɩk-a lame n yẽneg n dõog wẽn-naandga. La b rɩka wẽn-naandgã n ning a Mika roogẽ wã." 
Judges17:5 A Mika kell n maana wẽn-naands pʋʋsg roogo. Yẽnda maana a maan-kʋʋr fuugu, la a maan a wẽn-naandse, la a yãk a biig a yembr t'a lebg yẽnda maan-kʋʋda." 
Judges17:6 Wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã rag n ka tar dĩm ye. Ned kam fãa rag n maanda wa a sẽn tagsd tɩ zemsame." 
Judges17:7 Leevi buudã bi-bɩɩg a yembr n dag n wa n kẽed Betlehɛm sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã soolmã pʋga. 
Judges17:8 Rao-kãng yii Betlehɛm sẽn yaa Zʋʋda soolmã n na n kẽng n tɩ bao zĩig a to n kẽ. La yẽnda kẽname n tɩ ta Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n ta a Mika yirã." 
Judges17:9 A Mika sok-a lame t'a yita yɛɛnẽ. La a leokame tɩ yẽnda yaa Leevi neda, n yit Betlehɛm sẽn yaa Zʋʋda soolmẽ, n baooda zĩig a sẽn tõe n paam n kẽ." 
Judges17:10 La a Mika yeel-a lame yaa: «Bɩ y wa zĩnd ne maam, n lebg m ba la m maan-kʋʋda, la yʋʋmd fãa, mam na n kõo yãmb wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piiga, la m kõ-y fut ne rɩɩb tɩ sek-yã.» La Leevi bi-bɩɩgã yam dag n yuusdame." 
Judges17:11 La yẽnda baas n sakame n zĩnd a Mika yirã. Dẽ, a Mika rag n get-a-la wa a meng biiga." 
Judges17:12 A Mika kɩtame tɩ Leevi bi-bɩɩgã lebg yẽnda maan-kʋʋda la a kell n paa yẽnda yirã. 
Judges17:13 Dẽ, a Mika yeelame yaa: «Moasã, mam miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maan-m-la neere, bala, mam paama Leevi buudã ned t'a lebg m maan-kʋʋda.»" 
Judges18:1 Wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã rag n ka tar dĩm ye. La wakat-kãng me tɩ Dan buudã rag n baooda tẽng n na n kẽ. Bala, hal tɩ ta sasa-kãnga, Dan buudã rag n nan ka paam zĩig ba a ye Israyɛll buudã sʋka, n na n maan b tẽng ye." 
Judges18:2 Dẽ, Dan buudã yãka gãndaad a nu bãmb sʋkã, n na n tʋm-b tɩ b yi Soreya ne Ɛstaoll n kẽng n tɩ gilg n ges tẽngã, n bãng a sẽn yaa to-to. Bãmb yeela neb a nu wã yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ gilg-y n ges-y tẽngã.» Dẽ, bãmb taa Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, a Mika yirã sẽn be zĩig ningã, la bãmb gãanda beenẽ yʋn-kãnga." 
Judges18:3 Bãmb sẽn dag n ka zãr ne a Mika zakã yĩnga, bãmb dag n wʋmda koe-sãang sẽn yit be, la rag n yaa Leevi bi-bɩɩgã koɛɛga. La bãmb lebg n kẽngame n tɩ sok-a yaa: «Ãnda n wa ne foom ka? Fo wa n bee zĩ-kãngã n maand bõe? Bõe tʋʋmd la fo tʋmd kaanẽ?»" 
Judges18:4 Bi-bɩɩgã leoka bãmb n yeel t'a Mika gesa yẽnda yelle, n dɩk-a t'a lebg a maan-kʋʋda, la a yaood-a ligdi." 
Judges18:5 Bãmb yeela bi-bɩɩgã yaa: «D kotame tɩ f sok Wẽnnaam n ges tõnd so-toakã sã n na n yɩɩ neere.» 
Judges18:6 La maan-kʋʋdã yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽng ne laafɩ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zĩnda ne-b b so-toakã pʋgẽ." 
Judges18:7 Dẽ, neb a nu wã kẽng n tɩ taa Lakiis, la bãmb mikame tɩ tẽngã neb vɩɩ ne laafɩ la bãane, wa Sɩdõ tẽngã nebã sẽn vɩ to-to wã, tɩ rabeem ka tar-b ye. La soolmã pʋga, tẽms nins sẽn yaa bãmb yagsã ba a ye rag n ka tar yell ne bãmba, la ned me rag n ka be tẽngã pʋg n weoogd bãmb ye. Bãmb dag n zãra ne Sɩdõ tẽngã, la b rag n ka baood lagem-n-taar ne ned ye." 
Judges18:8 Dẽ, neb a nu wã lebg n leba b saam-biisã sẽn be Soreya ne Ɛstaollã nengẽ. La bãmb saam-biisã sok-b lame yaa: «Yãmb kẽngame tɩ yaa a wãna?»" 
Judges18:9 La neb a nu wã leokame: «Yik-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zab ne-ba, bala, tõnd yãame tɩ tẽngã yaa sõama wʋsgo. Yãmb na n zĩi ka zaalem bala? Da maan-y kʋɩʋʋng ye. Yik-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ reeg tẽngã." 
Judges18:10 Yãmb sã n ta, y na n mikame tɩ yaa neb sẽn zĩ ne laafɩ la bãane. Tẽngã yaa yalenga, la Wẽnnaam dɩk-a lame n ning yãmb nusẽ. Bũmb ka be dũniyã zug n ka be beenẽ ye.»" 
Judges18:11 Dẽ, Dan buudã neb kobs-yoob boba b zab-teedo, n sũ tãpo, n yi Soreya ne Ɛstaoll n na n tɩ zabe." 
Judges18:12 Bãmb kẽngame, n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã Kiryat-Yayerim sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ b ket n boond zĩig ning sẽn be Kiryat-Yayerim Nin-taoorã tɩ Mahane-Dan sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Dan tãb-sika› hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Judges18:13 Bãmb yii beenẽ n pɩʋʋg Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n ta a Mika yirã." 
Judges18:14 Dẽ, neb a nu wã sẽn dag n kẽng n tɩ gilg n ges Layiis tẽngã yeela b saam-biisã yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb miime tɩ ro-bãmbã sẽn tondã, maan-kʋʋr fuugu, ne wẽn-naandse, la wẽn-naandga, n paas wẽn-naandg b sẽn bolg ne wanzuri n be beenẽ sɩda? Bee ne yãmb tɩ y bãng y sẽn na n maaneg moasã.»" 
Judges18:15 Bãmb bʋdgame n tɩ kẽ Leevi bi-bɩɩgã zakã sẽn be a Mika yirã n pʋʋs-a n sok a keelem. 
Judges18:16 Wakat-kãng tɩ Dan buudã neb kobs-yoobã rag n boba zab-teedã n yas zakã noore. 
Judges18:17 Dẽ, neb a nu wã sẽn dag n kẽng n tɩ gilg n ges tẽngã kẽngame n tɩ kẽ roogẽ wã n dɩk wẽn-naandgã, la b rɩk maan-kʋʋr fuugã, la b wʋk wẽn-naandsã ne wẽn-naandgã b sẽn bolg ne wanzuri wã. La wakat-kãng tɩ maan-kʋʋdã rag n yasa zakã noor ne neb kobs-yoobã sẽn bob b zab-teedã." 
Judges18:18 La maan-kʋʋdã sẽn yãnd b sẽn wʋkd te-bãmbã, a sok-b lame yaa: «Yaa bõe la yãmb sẽn maandã?»" 
Judges18:19 La bãmb leoka yẽnda yaa: «Sĩnd f noor la f wa tũ tõnd n tɩ lebg tõnd ba la d maan-kʋʋda. Rẽ yĩnga, fo sẽn yaa nin-yɛng zak maan-kʋʋd n yaa sõama bɩ? Bɩ fo sẽn na n lebg Israyɛll buud a yembr maan-kʋʋd n yaa sõama?»" 
Judges18:20 La maan-kʋʋdã sũur yɩɩ noogo, t'a rɩk maan-kʋʋr fuugã, ne wẽn-naandsã, la wẽn-naandgã n wa yals n naag nebã." 
Judges18:21 Dẽ, bãmb lebgame n dɩk b sor n loogdẽ. Bãmb dɩka neb nins sẽn ka tõe n zab-b zabrã, ne rũmsã, la teedã n lʋɩɩs taoore." 
Judges18:22 Dan buudã neb sẽn wa n zãag ne a Mika yirã, neb nins fãa sẽn dag n yaa a Mika yagsã sũu taab n na n babs Dan buudã." 
Judges18:23 Bãmb dag n sũu taab n pʋgd Dan buudã. Dẽ, Dan buudã neb wẽnemdame n sok a Mika yaa: «Yaa bõe n tar foom, bõe yĩng la nebã sẽn sũ taab n pʋgd tõnd woto?»" 
Judges18:24 La a Mika leokame yaa: «Yãmb sẽn wʋk mam wẽn-naandsã m sẽn dag n maanã fãa la y peeg m maan-kʋʋd n tar n loogdẽ wã, y bas-m-la ne bõe, n leb n be be n sokdẽ tɩ yaa bõe n tar-ma?»" 
Judges18:25 Dan nebã yeela a Mika yaa: «D ka rat n leb n wʋm f sẽn yaag f noorã ye! Ka rẽ, neb kẽer sũur na n yikame tɩ b wẽnemd n kẽ-fo, n kʋ-f ne f yirã rãmba.»" 
Judges18:26 Woto, Dan nebã kell n dɩka b sor n looge. A Mika sẽn yã tɩ Dan nebã pãng yɩɩda yẽnda wã, a lebg n kuila a yiri." 
Judges18:27 Dan nebã kell n talla wẽn-naands nins a Mika sẽn dag n maanã, ne yẽnda maan-kʋʋdã n looge. Dan nebã kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Layiis nebã sẽn dag n zĩ ne laafɩ la bãanã, n kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋga, la b yõog b tẽngã bugum." 
Judges18:28 Ned rag n ka be n na n fãag Layiis nebã ye. Bala, bãmb tẽngã rag n zãra ne Sɩdõ tẽngã, la bãmb dag n ka tar lagem-n-taar ne tẽng ba a yembr ye. Layiis tẽngã rag bee Bɛt-Reoob tãn-longã pʋgẽ. Dan nebã lebs n mee tẽngã n kẽ." 
Judges18:29 Dẽ, bãmb pʋda tẽngã yʋʋr tɩ Dan wa a Zakoob biig a Dan sẽn yaa bãmb yaabã yʋʋre. La tẽngã pipi yʋʋrã yaool n dag n boondame tɩ Layiisi." 
Judges18:30 Dan nebã vigla a Mika wẽn-naandgã n waoogd-a. Dẽ, a Moyiis yageng a Gersom yageng a Zonatã ne a kambã n kell n yɩ Dan buudã maan-kʋʋdba, hal tɩ ta wakat ning b sẽn tall tẽngã nebã n tɩ kẽes yembd pʋgã." 
Judges18:31 Dan nebã vigla wẽn-naandgã a Mika sẽn dag n maanã, la a kell n paa beenẽ wakat ning fãa Sɩlo Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn zĩndã." 
Judges19:1 Wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã rag n ka tar dĩm ye. Leevi ned a yembr n dag n tɩ kẽed Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã yaanga, n tar pʋg-rɩkdg sẽn yaa Betlehɛm sẽn be Zʋʋda wã bi-pugla." 
Judges19:2 Leevi nedã pʋg-rɩkdgã zaba ne yẽnda n zoe n kuil a ba-yir Betlehɛm, n tɩ zĩnd be kiis a naase." 
Judges19:3 Leevi nedã yikame n peeg a rakõore, la a tall a bõens a yiib n kẽng a pʋg-rɩkdgã nengẽ n na n tɩ bels-a n tall n wa. Pagã talla a sɩdã n kẽ a ba wã zakẽ, la a ba wã sẽn yãnd a biigã sɩdã, a reeg-a-la ne sũ-noogo." 
Judges19:4 Pagã baaba kosa a rɛɛmbã t'a pa ne bãmba, la Leevi nedã paa a pagã baaba zakẽ n gãand rasem a tãabo, tɩ b rɩtẽ la b yũuda." 
Judges19:5 La rasem a naasã daare, bãmb yika yibeoog pĩnda, tɩ Leevi nedã yeel t'a na n kuilame. La pagã baaba yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yaas-y tɩ b maan dɩɩb tɩ y rɩ n paam pãng n yaool n dɩk sore.»" 
Judges19:6 Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã zĩndame n naag taab n dɩ la b yũ. La pagã baaba yeela pagã sɩd yaa: «M kot-f lame, tɩ f kell n pa n gãand ka yʋngã n noog f sũuri.»" 
Judges19:7 Pagã sɩdã yikame t'a na n looge, la a rɛɛmbã sẽn pẽdg-a wã yĩnga, a leb n paa be n gãand badaar yʋngo." 
Judges19:8 Rasem a nu wã daare, Leevi nedã leb n yika yibeoog pĩnd t'a na n kuili. La a pagã baaba yeel-a lame yaa: «Yãmb ka na n dɩ la y yals tɩ zĩigã maag tɩ y yaool n looge?» Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã naaga taab n dɩ." 
Judges19:9 La Leevi nedã yika ne a pagã, la a rakõorã n na n looge, la a rɛɛmbã yeel-a lame yaa: «Yãmb ka ne tɩ zĩiga maagame tɩ rat n lebg yʋngo? Dẽ wã, pa-y ka n gãand n noog y sũuri, tɩ y na yik beoog yibeoog pĩnd n dɩk sor n kuili.»" 
Judges19:10 La pagã sɩdã rag n ka leb n dat n gãand beenẽ ye. Dẽ, a yikame n looge. Woto, yẽnda ne a bõens a yiibã sẽn zɩt zɩɩbo, n paas a pʋg-rɩkdgã kẽn n tɩ taa Zebuus tẽngã b sẽn boond tɩ Zeruzalɛmã." 
Judges19:11 Bãmb sẽn kolg Zebuusã, rẽ tɩ wĩndgã kẽe wʋsgo. Rakõorã yeela a soaalã yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d bʋdg n kẽng Zebuus-rãmbã tẽng sẽn tondã n tɩ gãande.»" 
Judges19:12 La a soaalã leok-a lame: «Tõnd ka na n bʋdg n kẽng bu-zẽms tẽngẽ, Israyɛll neb sẽn ka beẽ ye. Tõnd na n kẽng n tɩ gãanda Gɩbeya.»" 
Judges19:13 Pagã sɩdã leb n yeela a rakõorã yaa: «D modg n ta Gɩbeya bɩ Rama n gãand be.» 
Judges19:14 La bãmb kell n tara kẽna, la zĩigã sẽn wa na n sobgã tɩ bãmb kolga Gɩbeya sẽn yaa Benzame buudã soolmã." 
Judges19:15 Dẽ, bãmb bʋdgame n na n tũ Gɩbeya n gãande. La bãmb sẽn ta tẽngã pʋgẽ, bãmb kẽnga raagẽ wã n tɩ zĩndi, la tẽngã ned ba a yembr ka reeg bãmb gãag sobend a yir yʋn-kãng ye." 
Judges19:16 La zĩ-sobd wakate, nin-kẽem a yembr n tɩ tʋm a pʋʋgẽ n lebg n kuiisẽ. Rao-kãng rag n yaa Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã neda, n dag n tɩ kẽed Gɩbeya tẽngã, la tẽngã nebã yaa Benzame buudu." 
Judges19:17 Nin-kẽemã zẽka a neng n yãnd sãanã t'a zĩ tẽngã raag pʋga. La nin-kẽemã soka sãanã a sẽn yitẽ, la a sẽn dabdẽ." 
Judges19:18 Dẽ, sãanã leokame: «Tõnd yii Betlehɛm sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmã n dabd Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã yaanga, tɩ bala m yaa be neda. Mam dag n kẽnga Betlehɛm sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã. Dẽ, mam lebg n lebda Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, la ned baa a yembr ka reeg maam sãand a yir ye." 
Judges19:19 La tõnd yaool n tara moodo, la yamd d bõensã yĩnga, la d tar dɩɩbo, ne reezẽ rãam maam ne m pagã la m rakõorã sẽn tũud maamã yĩnga. Bũmb ka paoog tõnd ye.»" 
Judges19:20 Nin-kẽemã yeelame yaa: «Bɩ y gãneg y yam. Mam na n deega yãmb m yiri, la m ges y yell ne bũmb fãa. Bɩ y ra gãand raagẽ wã ye.»" 
Judges19:21 Dẽ, nin-kẽemã talla bãmb n kuil a yiri, n kõ yẽnda bõensã yamdo. La sãambã waasa b nao, la b rɩɩme la b yũ." 
Judges19:22 Dẽ, wakat ning bãmb sẽn maand sũ-noogã, ade, nin-yood n yi tẽnga pʋgẽ n wa gũbg nin-kẽemã yirã. Nin-bãmb dag n pãbda kʋɩlengã, la b yet nin-kẽemã sẽn yaa yirã soabã yaa: «Yiis rao ning sẽn kẽ fo roogẽ wã n kõ tõnd tɩ d gãand-a.»" 
Judges19:23 La yirã soab yiime n yeel-b yaa: «Ayo! M saam-biisi, mam kot-y lame tɩ y ra maan wẽng ye. Bala, yaa mam zakẽ la raoã sẽn sigã. Dẽ wã, bɩ y ra maan yel-beed a woto ye." 
Judges19:24 Ade, mam tara bi-pugl sẽn nan ka mi rao ye, n paas raoã pʋg-rɩkdgã. Bas-y tɩ m yiis bãmb n kõ-yã, tɩ y maan y sẽn dat ne-ba, la y ra maan yel-beed a woto ne rao-kãngã ye.»" 
Judges19:25 La nin-kãensã ka kelg yirã soab goam ye. Dẽ, raoã taka a pʋg-rɩkdgã n yiis n kõ-ba. Bãmb gãanda pagã n nams-a yʋngã tõre, hal tɩ beoogã vẽege. Dẽ, zĩigã sẽn sɩng yẽegre, bãmb basa pagã t'a looge." 
Judges19:26 Zĩ-yẽegr wakate, pagã lebg n waa nin-kẽemã yiri, zĩig ning a sɩdã sẽn be wã. La a vik n lʋɩɩ roogã noore, n pa be hal tɩ beoogã vẽege." 
Judges19:27 La yibeoogo, Leevi nedã yik n paka roogã noor n yi n na n looge, la a mikame t'a pʋg-rɩkdgã lʋɩ n dɩg roogã noore, t'a nusã palg rigno-koakã." 
Judges19:28 Raoã yeela a pagã t'a yik tɩ b looge. La pagã ka leok tɩ bũmb ye. Dẽ, raoã rɩk-a lame n palg a bõang n loog n kuil a yiri." 
Judges19:29 Leevi nedã sẽn ta a yiri, a rɩka a sʋʋg n pas a pagã zĩis piig la a yiibu, n tʋm Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse." 
Judges19:30 Neb nins fãa sẽn yãnd bõn-kãngã wã yeelame: «Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã hal tɩ ta rũndã, bũmb a woto nan zɩ n zĩnd ye. Tags-y n ges-y-yã, la y yẽs ne taab n bãng y sẽn na n maanega.»" 
Judges20:1 Israyɛll nebã fãa naaga taab noor a yembre, n yi sẽn sɩng ne Dan buudã sẽn be rɩtgã, n tall n tɩ tãag Bɛɛr-Seba sẽn be goabgã, ne Galaad soolmã sẽn be yaangã, n wa tigim taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa." 
Judges20:2 Israyɛll buudã fãa kãsem-dãmb zãng tigma taab ne Wẽnnaam nebã. Bãmb sõorã rag n yaa tãb-biis tus kobs-naas sẽn kẽnd ne nao n zãad zabr sʋʋse. 
Judges20:3 Benzame nebã wʋmame tɩ Israyɛll nebã kẽnga Mispa. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yeela pagã sɩdã t'a togs bãmb yel-be-kãngã sẽn yɩ to-to." 
Judges20:4 Dẽ, Leevi nedã sẽn yaa pag ning b sẽn kʋ wã sɩdã yeelame: «Maam ne m pʋg-rɩkdgã kẽnga Gɩbeya sẽn yaa Benzame soolmã n na n tɩ yõg gãag sobendo." 
Judges20:5 Gɩbeya tẽnga taoor dãmb yika ne yʋngo, n wa gũbg roog ning mam sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã, n na n zab ne maam. Yaa mam mengã la b rag baood n na n kʋ. La b baas n modga mam pagã n yõg-a hal t'a ki." 
Judges20:6 Dẽ, mam dɩka m pagã, n pas-a n tʋm Israyɛll buudã soolmã zĩiga fãa. Bala, nin-bãmbã sẽn maan bũmb ningã yaa yel-beed meng-meng Israyɛll pʋgẽ." 
Judges20:7 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb fãa la sẽn be ka wã la! Yẽs-y ne taaba, n yãk yam zĩ-kãngã bala, ne yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga!»" 
Judges20:8 Dẽ, nebã fãa naaga taab noor a yembr n yik n yeele: «Tõnd ned ba a yembr ka na n kẽ a fu-roogẽ wall a lebg n kuil a yir ye." 
Judges20:9 Ad tõnd sẽn na n maan Gɩbeya nebã bũmb ninga: Tõnd na n maana poeere, n bãng d sẽn na n tɩ zab ne-b to-to." 
Judges20:10 Israyɛll buudã fãa sʋka, tõnd na n yãka neb piig neb koabg pʋgẽ, la d yãk neb koabg neb tusr pʋgẽ, la neb tusr neb tus-piig pʋgẽ. Nin-bãmb na n kẽngame, n tɩ bao rɩɩb n wa kõ Israyɛll neb nins sẽn kẽng n na n tɩ sɩbg Gibeya sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã nebã, wa sẽn zems yel-beed ning b sẽn maan Israyɛll pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Judges20:11 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa naaga taab noor a yembr n na n tɩ zab ne Gɩbeya tẽngã." 
Judges20:12 Israyɛll buudã tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Benzame buudã fãa nengẽ n tɩ sok-b yaa: «Maana a wãn tɩ yel-beed a woto wa tʋmd yãmb sʋka? 
Judges20:13 Tõnd datame tɩ yãmb yiis nin-yood nins sẽn be Gɩbeya wã n kõ tõnd tɩ d kʋ, n yiis wẽngã Israyɛll nebã sʋka.» La Benzame nebã ka kelg Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã goam ye." 
Judges20:14 Benzame buudã neb yii b tẽmsẽ wã n tɩ tigim taab Gɩbeya n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã. 
Judges20:15 Badaare, b sõda Benzame buudã tãb-biisã sẽn yi b tẽmsẽ wã n wa wã, la b sõorã yaa neb tus pisi la a yoob sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋse, Gɩbeya tẽngã gãndaad kobs-yopoe wã sõor sẽn ka naage." 
Judges20:16 Tãb-bi-kãensã fãa sʋka, gãndaad kobs-yopoe n dag n be beenẽ n yaa goaba. Bãmb ned ba a ye ka lobgd zoobg ne loaabg n yõsg ye." 
Judges20:17 La b sõda Israyɛll nebã, n ka naag Benzame buudã neb ye. Israyɛll tãb-biisã sõor yaa tus kobs-naas sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋse, n mi zabr sõama." 
Judges20:18 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã yikame n kẽng Betɛll n na n tɩ sok Wẽnnaam yaa: «Yaa bu-bʋg tõnd sʋkã, n tog n lʋɩ taoor tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zab ne Benzame nebã?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame tɩ yaa Zʋʋda buudã n tog n lʋɩ taoore." 
Judges20:19 Israyɛll nebã yika yibeoog pĩnda, n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã n na n zab ne Gɩbeya nebã." 
Judges20:20 Woto, Israyɛll nebã sũu tãpo, n teedg n na n zab ne Benzame nebã, la b sega taab Gɩbeya neng taoore." 
Judges20:21 Benzame buudã yii Gɩbeya n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã, la badaare, b kʋʋ Israyɛll neb tus pisi la a yiibu." 
Judges20:22 Israyɛll nebã kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n tɩ yãb tɩ wĩntoog kẽ. Bãmb soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Tõnd tog n lebg n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Benzame buudã sẽn yaa tõnd saam-biisã bɩ?» La Zu-soabã yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ zab ne-ba. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã paama raoodo, n leb sũ tãp zĩig ning bãmb sẽn dag n zĩnd pipi daarã." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Rasem a yiibã daare, Israyɛll nebã kolgame n na n zab ne Benzame buudã." 
Judges20:25 Benzame nebã yii Gɩbeya badaar sẽn yaa rasem a yiibã daarã n na n seg Israyɛll nebã, la bãmb kʋʋ Israyɛll neb tus piig la nii. La neb nins sẽn ki wã yaa neb sẽn tõe n tall zabr sʋʋg n zabe." 
Judges20:26 Dẽ, Israyɛll tãb-biisã ne nebã fãa kẽnga Betɛlle, n tɩ pa be n yãb Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la b loe noor badaar hal tɩ ta zaabre, la b maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum, la zems-n-taar maando, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Judges20:27 Wakat-kãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã rag n bee Betɛlle, la yaa a Aarõ biig a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas n dag n yaa maan-kʋʋda. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n bãng b sã n tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Benzame buudã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã, bɩ b ka tog n kẽnge. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame n yeele: «Kẽng-y-yã! Bala beoogo, mam na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog Benzame nebã.»" 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Woto, Israyɛll nebã kɩtame tɩ neb kẽng n tɩ soond n gũbg Gɩbeya." 
Judges20:30 Dẽ, rasem a tãabã daare, Israyɛll nebã kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Benzame buudã. Bãmb kẽng n tɩ sũu tãp Gɩbeya tẽngã noor wa raasenkamã." 
Judges20:31 La Benzame nebã yiime n na n seg Israyɛll nebã n zabe. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã basame tɩ Benzame nebã rig-b n zãag ne Gɩbeya tẽngã. Benzame nebã sɩngame n kʋʋd Israyɛll nebã Betɛll ne Gɩbeya soayã zut wa raasenkamã, hal n tɩ kẽ weoogã la b kʋʋ Israyɛll neb sẽn kolg pis-tã." 
Judges20:32 Benzame buudã rag n tagsdame tɩ bãmb tõoga Israyɛll nebã wa pĩndã, n digd-b tɩ b zoetẽ. La Israyɛll nebã rag n yetame: «Wa-y tɩ d zoe, tɩ b pʋg tõnd n zãag ne b tẽngã n ta soayã zutu.»" 
Judges20:33 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa yii bãmb sẽn be zĩig ningã, n kẽng n tɩ sũ tãp Baall-Tamaar n na n zabe. Dẽ, Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n soond n gũbg tẽngã yii Geba tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, zĩig ning bãmb sẽn dag n soondã n na n zabe." 
Judges20:34 Israyɛll gãndaad tus piigã b sẽn dag n yãk Israyɛll buudã fãa pʋgẽ wã kẽng n tɩ teedga Gɩbeya tẽngã neng taoore. Zabrã yɩɩ toog wʋsgo, la Benzame buudã rag n ka mi tɩ toog n na n paam-b ye." 
Judges20:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog Benzame buudã n dig-b tɩ b zoe. La badaare, Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ Benzame buudã tãb-biis tus pisi la a nu, la neb koabga. Neb nins sẽn ki-bã rag n yaa tãb-biis sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋs n zabdẽ." 
Judges20:36 La Benzame nebã mikame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõoga bãmba. Israyɛll nebã rag n targame n bas Benzame nebã, bala, bãmb dag n teega neb nins sẽn dag n tɩ soond n gũbg Gibeya wã." 
Judges20:37 Neb nins sẽn dag n soondã yii tao-tao n kẽ Gɩbeya tẽngã n kʋ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgã ne zabr sʋʋse. 
Judges20:38 Israyɛll nebã rag n seda ne b neb nins sẽn dag n tɩ soondã, n yeel-b tɩ b sã n kẽ Gɩbeya tẽngã, bɩ b kɩt tɩ bug-zõos yi tẽngã pʋgẽ n zẽke." 
Judges20:39 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã wẽnemdame n na n zab ne Gɩbeya nebã. La Benzame nebã sẽn dag n zoe n kʋ Israyɛll neb kolga pis-tã, la b rag n tagsdame tɩ b leb n tõoga Israyɛll nebã wa pĩndã." 
Judges20:40 La Wakat-kãng bala, bug-zõos n sɩng n nukd Gɩbeya tẽnga pʋga. Benzame nebã sẽn wẽnemd n ges b poorẽ, b mikame tɩ tẽngã tõr dɩt bugum t'a bug-zõosã tʋkd n kuiis yĩngri." 
Judges20:41 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã wẽnemdame n zabd ne Benzame nebã. Benzame nebã sẽn mik tɩ lebga yell ne-bã, rabeem kãseng yõk-b lame." 
Judges20:42 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã riga Benzame nebã tɩ b zoe n tees we-rasempʋɩɩgã sẽnẽ. La ne rẽ fãa, Benzame nebã ka tõog n põs zabrã ye. Bala, Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n kẽ-b Gibeya tẽngã yi n naaga Israyɛll neb a taabã tɩ b gũbg Benzame nebã sʋka, n kʋ-b zãnga." 
Judges20:43 Bãmb gũbga Benzame nebã, n dig-b n tɩ tãag Gɩbeya tẽngã wĩndg sẽn yitẽ, n sãam-ba." 
Judges20:44 Benzame nebã tãb-biis tus piig la a nii n pa zabrẽ wã. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa gãndaado. 
Judges20:45 Benzame neb nins sẽn dag n zoe n kẽ we-rasempʋɩɩgã n tees Rimo pĩigã sẽnẽ wã sʋka, Israyɛll nebã paama bãmb neb tus a nu sorã zut n kʋ. La b kell n diga bãmb n tãag Gɩdeyom n kʋ bãmb neb tus a yiibu." 
Judges20:46 Benzame neb nins sẽn pa zabrã pʋgẽ badaarã sõor yaa tãb-biis tus pisi la a nu sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋse. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa gãndaado. 
Judges20:47 La baoosgo, Benzame neb nins sẽn dag n zoe n kẽ we-rasempʋɩɩgã n tees Rimo pĩigã sẽnẽ wã sʋka, neb kobs-yoob n põse. Bãmb paa beenẽ kiis a naase." 
Judges20:48 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã lebg n waa Benzame nebã nengẽ n tɩ kʋ-b fãa ne zabr sʋʋga. B sãama tẽngã zãnga, n kʋ baa ne rũmsã, la ne bõn-vɩɩlɩ nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋgã. Israyɛll nebã yõoga tẽms nins fãa bãmb sẽn tɩ mik beenẽ wã bugum." 
Judges21:1 Israyɛll nebã rag n wẽena Mispa, n yeel tɩ bãmb ned ba a yembr ka na n dɩk a biiga, n kõ Benzame buudã ned t'a maan a pag ye." 
Judges21:2 La Israyɛll nebã lebg n leba Betɛlle, la b paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor beenẽ n tãag zaabre. La bãmb zẽka b koees n yãbd wʋsgo," 
Judges21:3 la b yet Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, maana a wãna, tɩ yell a woto paam Israyɛlle? Maana a wãn tɩ Israyɛll buud a yembr sɛ zãnga?»" 
Judges21:4 Vẽkembeoog yibeoog pĩnda, nebã yikame n me tẽn-kugr beenẽ, la b maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maando." 
Judges21:5 Israyɛll nebã sokame yaa: «Israyɛll buudã fãa sʋka, yaa bu-bʋg n ka tũ nebã n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa? Bala, tõnd dag n wẽename n yeel tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn ka tũ-a n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa, bɩ b kʋ a soaba.»" 
Judges21:6 Benzame buudã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã saam-biisã nimbãaneg yõka bãmb tɩ b rag n yetẽ yaa: «Ade, Israyɛll buudã sʋka, buud a yembr n sɛ zãnga." 
Judges21:7 Tõnd na n maana a wãn n sõng b neb nins sẽn ketã tɩ b paam pagba? Bala, tõnd dag n wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr n yeel tɩ tõnd ka na n dɩk d kom-pugli wã n kõ-b tɩ b maan b pagb ye.»" 
Judges21:8 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã sokame yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, buud bee Israyɛll buudã sʋk n ka tũ n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa bɩ?» La b mikame tɩ Galaad-Yabɛɛs ned ba a yembr ka wa tiging sẽn zĩnd tãb-sikẽ wã ye." 
Judges21:9 Dẽ, b kɩtame tɩ b sõd nebã, la b ka tol n yãnd Galaad-Yabɛɛs tẽngã ned ba a yembr be ye." 
Judges21:10 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã tʋma gãndaad tus piig la a yiib n yeel-b yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ kʋ-y Galaad-Yabɛɛs nebã. Kʋ-y pagbã ne kambã." 
Judges21:11 Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Kʋ-y raopã fãa, ne pagb nins fãa sẽn zoe n mi raoã.»" 
Judges21:12 Dẽ, bãmb yãnda Galaad-Yabɛɛs kom-pugli kobs-naas sẽn nan ka tol n bãng raoa, n peeg-b n kẽng tãb-sikẽ wã Sɩlo sẽn be Kana soolmẽ wã." 
Judges21:13 Israyɛll nebã fãa naaga taab n tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng Benzame buudã sẽn be Rimo pĩigã sẽnẽ wã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b tɩ zabr ka leb n be Israyɛll nebã ne Benzame nebã sʋk ye. 
Judges21:14 Wakat-kãnga, Benzame nebã lebg n waame. Dẽ, b rɩka Galaad-Yabɛɛs kom-pugli nins b sẽn bas n ka kʋ wã n kõ Benzame nebã tɩ b maan b pagba, la pagbã sõor ka sek tɩ ta bãmb fãa ye." 
Judges21:15 Benzame nebã nimbãaneg yõka Israyɛll nebã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll buud a yembr sɛ." 
Judges21:16 Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmbã sokame: «Tõnd na n maana a wãn tɩ neb nins sẽn kell-bã paam pagba? Bala, pagb la sẽn ka leb n ket Benzame buudã pʋgẽ la.»" 
Judges21:17 Dẽ, kãsem-dãmbã kell n yeelame yaa: «A yaa neere, tɩ Benzame buudã sẽn põsã kell n paam kamba, tɩ Israyɛll buudã buud a yembr tõr da menem zãng ye." 
Judges21:18 Tõnd yaool n ka tõe n dɩk d mens kamb n kõ-b tɩ b maan b pagb ye. Bala, Israyɛll nebã rag n wẽename n yeel tɩ Israyɛll ned sã n dɩk a biig n kõ Benzame buudã ned t'a maan a paga, bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd a soab zugu.»" 
Judges21:19 Israyɛll nebã leb n yeelame: «Ade, yʋʋmd fãa, b maanda tigr Sɩlo n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» Sɩlo bee Betɛll rɩtgo, n kell n be sor ning sẽn yit Betɛll n dabd Sɩkɛmã yaang sẽnẽ, n be Lebona goabga." 
Judges21:20 Woto, bãmb yeela Benzame nebã yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ soond-y reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã pʋs n gũusdẽ." 
Judges21:21 La yãmb sã n wa n yãnd Sɩlo pʋg-sadbã sẽn yi n na n sao, bɩ y yi tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa wudg n yõk pʋg-sad a yembr n tall n kuil a yir Benzame nebã soolmẽ n tɩ maan a paga." 
Judges21:22 Sã n mik tɩ bãmb ba-rãmbã bɩ b tãopã rat n wa zaba ne tõndo, tõnd na n yeel-b lame tɩ b maan Benzame buudã sugri, tɩ bala, Yabɛɛs zabrã wakate, tõnd ka paam pagb n kõ bãmb ned kam fãa ye. Sẽn ka yãmb mens n dɩk y kom-pugli wã n kõ-bã, taal ka na n zĩnd yãmb zut ye.»" 
Judges21:23 Dẽ, Benzame nebã maana a woto. Bãmb ned kam fãa yõka pʋg-sad a yembr pʋg-sadb nins sẽn yi n na n sao wã sʋk n tall n kuil a yiri. Bãmb lebg n tɩ lebs n mee tẽmsã n kẽ." 
Judges21:24 Badaar bala, Israyɛll nebã fãa loogame, tɩ ned kam fãa leb a soolmẽ, a buudẽ, la a roogẽ." 
Judges21:25 Wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã rag n ka tar dĩm ye. La ned kam fãa rag n maanda a sẽn tagsd tɩ zemsame." 
Ruth1:1 Wakat ning bʋ-kaoodbã sẽn dag n so Israyɛll nebã, kom-kãseng n zĩnd Kana soolem pʋgẽ. La rao a ye n yi Zʋʋda tẽng a ye pʋgẽ sẽn boond tɩ Betlehɛm, ne a pag la a kamb a yiib n na n tɩ zĩnd Moaab weoogẽ wã." 
Ruth1:2 Rao-kãng yʋʋr boondame t'a Elimelɛke, t'a pagã yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Naoomi, t'a kamb a yiibã yʋy yaa a Maklõ, ne Kilyõ, bãmb dag n yaa neb sẽn be Betlehɛm, Zʋʋda soolmã pʋgẽ, tɩ b boond-b tɩ Efrat-dãmba. Bãmb taa Moaab weoogẽ wã n zĩnd be." 
Ruth1:3 Dẽ zugẽ, a Naoomi sɩd a Elimelɛk wa n kiime, la yẽnda paa be n zĩnd ne a kamb a yiibã." 
Ruth1:4 La a Naoomi kom-dibli wã peega Moaab kom-pugli wã n maan b pagba. A yembr yʋʋr boondame t'a Orpa, t'a yembrã yʋʋr yaa a Ruti. La bãmb zĩnda be yʋʋm piiga." 
Ruth1:5 La a Maklõ ne a Kilyõ me wa n kiime. Woto, a Naoomi n ka leb n tar sɩda, la yẽnda n ka leb n tar biiga." 
Ruth1:6 A Naoomi ne a bi-pagbã zĩnda Moaab tẽngã n wʋm tɩ Zu-soabã maana b nebã neer n kõ-b rɩɩbo, dẽ, bãmb yikame n yi be n dɩk sor n na n lebg n leb Zʋʋda." 
Ruth1:7  
Ruth1:8 La a Naoomi yeela a bi-pagb a yiibã yaa: «Lebg-y n kuil-y y ma-rãmb rotẽ, la bɩ Zu-soabã maan yãmb neer wa yãmb sẽn maan maam ne sẽn ki-bã neerã."
