Ruth1:9 Bɩ Zu-soabã kõ yãmb y yiibã fãa sɩdb tɩ y zĩnd ne laafɩ. La a Naoomi moka bãmba, la a bi-pagb a yiibã zẽka b koees n yãbe.»" 
Ruth1:10 La bãmb yeela a Naoomi yaa: «Ayo! Tõnd na n tũu yãmb n kuil y nebẽ wã.» 
Ruth1:11 La a Naoomi yeelame: «M kamba, lebg-y n kuil-y-yã. Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb dat n tũ maam? Mam tõe n leb n doga kom-dibli tɩ yɩ yãmb sɩdb yɛs bɩ?»" 
Ruth1:12 M kamba, kẽng-y n kuil-y-yã. Bala, mam yaa pʋg-yãang sẽn ka tõe n leb n kuil sɩd ye. La baa mam sã n yeel tɩ tõeeme, la mam sã n paam sɩd rũndã yʋngã n dog kom-dibli," 
Ruth1:13 Yãmb na tõog n yaas tɩ bãmb bɩ sɩda? Yaa yõwã yĩng n na n kɩt tɩ yãmb zĩnd a woto n ka kuil sɩdb bɩ? Ayo! M kamba, mam sũ-toogã yɩɩda yãmba, Zu-soabã nug sẽn zɩsg mam zug a woto wã yĩnga." 
Ruth1:14 La bãmb leb n zẽka b koees n yãbe. A Orpa moka a sɩda ma wã n bas-a n looge. La a Rut sũurã loee ne a sɩd-ma wã. 
Ruth1:15 Dẽ, a Naoomi yeelame: «Ade, fo pʋg-to wã lebg n leba a nebẽ, la a wẽnnaam-dãmbẽ, bɩ f lebg n tũ-a tɩ y kuili.»" 
Ruth1:16 La a Rut yeelame: «Da pẽdg-y maam tɩ m lebg n loog n bas-y ye. Bala, zĩig ning yãmb sẽn na n kẽngẽ wã, mam me na n kẽnga be, la zĩig ning yãmb sẽn na n tɩ zĩndã, mam me na n zĩnda be, yãmb nebã na n yɩɩ mam neba, la yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n yɩɩ mam Wẽnnaam," 
Ruth1:17 Yãmb sẽn na n ki zĩig ningã, mam me na n kii be, la b na muma maam beenẽ. Bũmb sã n tõog n welg maam ne yãmba, tɩ ka kũum, bɩ Zu-soabã sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga.»" 
Ruth1:18 La a Naoomi sẽn yã t'a Rut rat n tũu yẽnda ne a sũur fãa wã, a basa a Rut pẽdgre." 
Ruth1:19 Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã tũu taab n kẽn n ta Betlehɛm, la b sẽn kẽ Betlehɛm tẽngã pʋga, nebã fãa sũy sãamame, tɩ b gomda, tɩ pagbã sokdẽ: «Rẽ yĩnga, yaa Naoomi la woto bɩ?»" 
Ruth1:20 La a Naoomi yeela pagbã yaa: «Da bool-y maam t'a Naoomi, sẽn dat n yeel t'a ‹sũ-noog› ye, bool-y maam t'a ‹Maara›, sẽn dat n yeel t'a ‹sũ-toogo.› Tɩ bala, Pãng-Soabã kɩtame tɩ mam vɩɩmã lebg toog wʋsgo." 
Ruth1:21 Mam sẽn wa n loogdẽ wã tɩ m tara bũmb fãa, la Zu-soabã talla maam n lebg n wa ne nug-zaala. Yaa bõe tɩ y boond maam t'a Naoomi? Zu-soabã monga maam bʋʋm, Pãng-Soab a Wẽnd sɩbga maam.»" 
Ruth1:22 A Naoomi sẽn yi Moaab n lebg n wa wã yɩɩ woto. Yẽnda bi-pag a Rut sẽn yaa Moaab tẽng bi-puglã me yii be n tũ yẽnda n wa. La bãmb sẽn wa n ta Betlehɛmã, tɩ zemsa koodã tigsg sɩngr wakate." 
Ruth2:1 A Naoomi rag n tara a sɩdã ned a yembr sẽn yaa nin-kãseng n tar arzegse. A yʋʋrã boondame t'a Boaaze, n yaa a Elimelɛk buudã neda." 
Ruth2:2 Dẽ, daar a yembre, Moaab bi-pugl a Rut yeela a Naoomi yaa: «M kota sor n na n kẽng pʋtẽ wã, tɩ ned ning sẽn na n sak-a, bɩ m kẽ a pʋʋgẽ wã n yiis bɩle.» La a Naoomi yeel-a lame t'a kẽnge." 
Ruth2:3 Dẽ, a Rut kẽnga pʋʋg a yembr pʋg n tɩ pʋgd tigsdbã n yiisd koodo. La mikame tɩ pʋʋg ning pʋg yẽnda sẽn be wã, yaa a Boaaz sẽn yaa a Elimelɛk buudã nedã n so." 
Ruth2:4 Rẽ poore, a Boaaz yii Betlehɛm n wa n na n pʋʋs tigsdbã, yẽnda pʋʋs-b lame n yeel tɩ Zu-soabã zĩnd ne-ba, la bãmb leokame tɩ: «Bɩ Zu-soabã bark zĩnd ne yãmba.»" 
Ruth2:5 La a Boaaz soka tigsdbã taoor soab yaa: «Yaa ãnda pag la woto?» 
Ruth2:6 Dẽ, tigsdbã taoor soab leokame: «Yaa Moaab bi-pugla. Yẽnda tũ a Naoomi n yi Moaab tẽng n wa." 
Ruth2:7 Yẽnda kosa maam n na n pʋgd tigsdbã n yiisd koodo. La a sẽn wa hal yibeoogẽ tɛkã, a nan ka tol n vʋʋs ye.»" 
Ruth2:8 Dẽ, a Boaaz yeela a Rut yaa: «M biiga, kelg neere, da kẽng pʋʋg a to pʋg n tɩ yiis koodã ye, kell n pa ka ne mam tʋmtʋmd-pogsã." 
Ruth2:9 Ges bãmb sẽn tigsd zĩig ningã neere, n pʋgl b poore. Bala, mam yeela m tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b ra sɩɩs foom ye, la ko-yũud sã n wa tar foom, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ yãk tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn toog koom ning tɩ be ko-yũusẽ wã n yũ.»" 
Ruth2:10 Dẽ, a Rut yĩgimdame n fõgen a neng tẽng n yeele: «M maana yãmb bõe tɩ y maand m neer woto fãa, tɩ m yaool n yaa sãana.»" 
Ruth2:11 La a Boaaz leok-a lame yaa: «B togsa maam bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn maan n kõ f sɩd-ma wã f sɩdã kũumã poorã, la fo sẽn bas f ba la f ma, la tẽng ning pʋgẽ fo sẽn dogã, n na n tɩ zĩnd ne buud a to fo sẽn dag n ka mi wã.»" 
Ruth2:12 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab keo foom wa sẽn zems bũmb ningã fo sẽn maanã! La bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, fo sẽn wa n soond a soab maasmẽ wã keo foom tɩ seke." 
Ruth2:13 A Rut yeelame yaa: «M soaala, yãmb maana maam neere, yãmb sẽn bels maamã, yãmb nooga y tʋmtʋmd-poakã sũuri, tɩ mam yaool n ka zem yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poak ba a yembr ye.»" 
Ruth2:14 Rɩɩbã wakate, a Boaaz yeela yẽnda yaa: «Kolg tɩ d dɩ rɩɩbã, yãk burã n suk zẽedã.» La a Rut zĩnd n yegla tigsdbã. A Boaaz kõo yẽnda ka-sẽedem t'a wãb n tɩge, la a bĩng sẽn kellã." 
Ruth2:15 La yẽnda sẽn yik n na yiis koodã, a Boaaz yõd n yeel a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Bas-y-yã-a t'a yiis koodã, ba a sã n wa be koodã sʋka, bɩ y ra yeel-a tɩ bũmb ye.»" 
Ruth2:16 Sẽn paase, yãkd-y koodã ka-zut kẽer n basdẽ tɩ lʋɩtẽ t'a tõe n paamd n dɩgsdẽ, la y ra zab-a ye." 
Ruth2:17 A Rut yiisa koodã pʋʋgã pʋg hal tɩ ta zaabre. La yẽnda soga koodã yẽnda sẽn yiisã, la a kolga peoog pidbu." 
Ruth2:18 Woto, a Rut tʋka koodã a sẽn yiisã, n kuil n tɩ wilg a sɩd-ma wã, la a rɩk ka-sẽedmã yẽnda sẽn dag n wãb n kellã kõ a sɩd-ma wã." 
Ruth2:19 A Naoomi sok-a lame yaa: «Yaa yɛ la fo yiis koodã rũndã? Pʋ-bʋg pʋg la fo tʋm yã? Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning sẽn maan-a foom neerã zug barka!» La a Rut togsa a sɩd-ma wã b sẽn maan yẽnda bũmb ningã fãa, la a yeel tɩ pʋʋgã soab yʋʋr la a Boaaze." 
Ruth2:20 Dẽ, a Naoomi yeela a bi-pagã yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilgd b nonglem wakat fãa ne nin-vɩɩsã, la ne sẽn ki-bã ning rao-kãng barka.» La a Naoomi leb n yeela a Rut yaa: «Rao-kãngã yaa mam sɩdã roagda, la yẽnda yaa neb nins sẽn tog n deeg foom n zã wã sʋk ned a yembre.»" 
Ruth2:21 La a Rut leb n yeelame: «Sẽn paas me, a Boaaz yeela maam tɩ mam pa ne yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã hal tɩ ta tigsgã sɛɛbo.»" 
Ruth2:22 Dẽ, a Naoomi yeela a bi-pag a Rut yaa: «M biiga, a yaa sõama tɩ fo kell n pʋgd rao-kãngã tʋmtʋmd-pogsã bal n yiisdẽ, la f ra sak n kẽng pʋʋg a to pʋgẽ, tɩ b wa tɩ namsd-f ye.»" 
Ruth2:23 Dẽ, a Rut kell n paa ne a Boaaz tʋmtʋmd-pogsã n yiisd koodã hal tɩ tigsgã fãa wa sɛ. La yẽnda rag n ket n bee ne a sɩd-ma wã." 
Ruth3:1 Daar a yembre, a Naoomi yeela a bi-pag a Rut yaa: «M biig sõngo, mam tagsdame tɩ yaa neer tɩ m sõng-f tɩ f paam zĩig tɩ f sũur yɩ noogo." 
Ruth3:2 Fo meng miime t'a Boaaze, ned ning sẽn bas-a tɩ fo pʋg a tʋmtʋmd-pogsã n yiis koodã yaa tõnd doagda. Yẽnda yaool n tara a ka-pãbr a zɛɛgẽ wã rũndã yʋngã." 
Ruth3:3 Rẽ wã, bɩ f maneg n so koom, n zɛ kaam, la f rɩk f fu-soãma wã n yeelg n kẽng zɛɛgẽ wã. La sã n ka a wa n dɩɩme la a yũume n sɛ, bɩ f ra lik t'a yãnd-f ye." 
Ruth3:4 A Boaaz sã n wa na n gãande, bɩ f gũus n ges zĩig ning a sẽn na n gãandẽ wã, t'a sã n gũsi, bɩ f yaool n kolg n maag f meng n lak a fu-goabgã n gãand a naoã sɛɛgẽ. Rẽ zugẽ, yẽnda mengã n na n wilg foom f sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga.»" 
Ruth3:5 A Rut yeela a sɩd-ma wã yaa: «Mam na n maana wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» 
Ruth3:6 Woto, a Rut kẽnga a Boaaz zɛɛgẽ wã, la a sɩd maana wa a sɩd-ma wã sẽn yeel-a wã." 
Ruth3:7 A Boaaz sẽn dɩ la a yũ n sɛ t'a sũur noomẽ, a kẽng n tɩ gãanda a ka-rʋrã sɛɛgẽ. Woto, a Rut maag a meng n kolg n lak a Boaaz fu-goabgã n gãand a naoã sɛɛga." 
Ruth3:8 La yʋn-sʋk wakate, a Boaaz yɩɩ birbir n neke, la yɩɩ lingr ne yẽnda, a sẽn mik tɩ pag n gãe a naoã sɛɛgã." 
Ruth3:9 La a Boaaz sokame: «Fo yaa ãnda?» La a Rut leokame: «Yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poak a Ruti, sak-y tɩ m zĩnd y sɛɛgẽ, tɩ bala, yãmb n yaa ned ning sẽn tõe n deeg-a maam n zã, rẽ wã, bɩ y tẽeg y fu-goabgã noor n pil-ma.»" 
Ruth3:10 La a Boaaz yeelame: «M biig sõngo, bɩ Zu-soabã ning-f barka! Bala, fo sẽn maana wilgdame tɩ f kɩsa sɩd ne f sɩd-ma wã buud n yɩɩd pĩndã, bala, fo rag n tõe n baoo bi-bɩɩg sẽn yaa arzɛk soab bɩ naong soaba, la fo ka maan woto ye." 
Ruth3:11 M biig sõngo, sã n yaa woto, bɩ f ra maan rabeem ye. Mam na n maana bũmb ning fo sẽn kotã n kõ-fo, bala, ned ka be tẽngã pʋg ka, n ka mi tɩ fo yaa bark pag ye." 
Ruth3:12 Yaa sɩd tɩ mam yaa y roagd sẽn tõe n deeg foom n zã, la ned a to n be n tar rogem ne yãmb n yɩɩd maam." 
Ruth3:13 Dẽ wã, bɩ f gãand ka yʋngã, woto beoog yibeoogo, d na ges a sã n na n sakame n deeg-fo. La a sã n ka tʋlg n na n deeg-fo, mam pʋlemda foom ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, tɩ m na n deeg-f lame n zã! La nananda, pa n gãand n gũ beoogo.»" 
Ruth3:14 Dẽ, a Rut kell n pa a Boaaz naoẽ wã n gãand n ta tõd-beoogo, la a sãdame n loog tɩ zĩigã nan ka yẽeg ye. Bala, a Boaaz rag n ka rat tɩ ned bãng t'a Rut waa beenẽ ye." 
Ruth3:15 La a Boaaz yeela a Rut yaa: «Tẽeg f fu-bilã n gãd sõama.» La a Rut tẽega a fuugã, la a Boaaz maka koodã wam a yoob n kiig-a, n sõng-a t'a tʋke. Rẽ poore, a Rut lebg n leba tẽnga pʋga." 
Ruth3:16 A Rut taa a sɩd-ma wã nengẽ, la a sok-a lame: «M biig sõngo, f kẽngame tɩ tɩg n yɩ a wãna?» Dẽ, a Rut rɩka a Boaaz sẽn maan yẽnda bũmb ningã fãa n togs a sɩdã ma." 
Ruth3:17 A Rut leb n yeelame: «Bãmb tol n kõo maam bɩle wam a yoobe, n yeel maam tɩ m ka tog n lebg wa yãmb nengẽ nug-zaal ye.»" 
Ruth3:18 A Naoomi yeelame yaa: «M biig-sõngo, fo we n maag f yĩng tɩ d na n gũ n gesa yellã sẽn na n baas to-to. Bala, a Boaaz na n maana a sẽn tõe tɛk tɩ yellã paam manegr rũndã.»" 
Ruth4:1 Dẽ, a Boaaz kẽnga tẽnga noor n tɩ zĩndi. La mikame, tɩ yẽnda sẽn dag n gom ned ning yell n yeel t'a tog n deega a Rutã n loogd be. La a Boaaz yeel-a lame: «Kolg ka wɛ m ned sõngo, wa zĩndi.» La yẽnda kolgame n zĩndi." 
Ruth4:2 Dẽ, a Boaaz kosa tẽnga nin-kẽemb piiga, tɩ b wa zĩnd ne-ba, la b wa n zĩndame." 
Ruth4:3 Woto, a Boaaz yeela raoã yaa: «A Naoomi sẽn yi Moaab n wa wã rat n koosa pʋʋg ninga tõnd ba-biig a Elimelɛk sẽn dag n so wã." 
Ruth4:4 Dẽ, mam tagsame tɩ yaa sõama, tɩ tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã, ne neb nins sẽn be ka wã nifẽ, bɩ m wilg-fu, tɩ sã n ta f yam, bɩ f reeg pʋʋgã n da! Sã n mikame tɩ fo rata pʋʋgã n da, bɩ f ra! La f sã n ka rat-a, bɩ f togs-ma. Bala, fo sẽn yãk f toogo, yaa maam n pʋgde.» La a leokame tɩ yẽnda na n daame." 
Ruth4:5 Dẽ, a Boaaz yeelame: «Yell kae ye, la yaa f bãng tɩ daar ning fo sẽn na n da pʋʋgã a Naoomi nengẽ wã, fo tog n kell n peega Moaab bi-pugl a Rut n maan f paga, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ pʋʋg ning a sɩdã sẽn ki n basã kell n yɩ a buudã rẽnda t'a yʋʋrã ra menem ye.»" 
Ruth4:6 Rao ning sẽn dag n tog n da-a pʋʋgã yeelame: «Sã n yaa woto, mam ka na n tõog n da-a ye, bɩ fo mengã reeg-a n da. Mam zoeta m na wa sãam m paoongã.»" 
Ruth4:7 Sã n yaa ne pĩndã, Israyɛll nebã rag n tara miningu, tɩ ned sã n dat n yao n deeg bũmbu, wala a tek-a ne bũmb a to, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yell ra wa zĩndi, ned a ye n yãkd a neoodr n kõ a to wã, n na n gãneg raagã. Woto dag n yaa rog-n-mik Israyɛll pʋgẽ." 
Ruth4:8 La ned ning sẽn dag n tog n da pʋʋgã yeela a Boaaz yaa: «Fo tõe n daa pʋʋgã.» La yẽnda yãka a neoodrã n kõ a Boaaze. 
Ruth4:9 Dẽ, a Boaaz yeela kãsem-dãmbã ne neb nins fãa sẽn be beenẽ wã yaa: «Dũndã, yãmb yaa mam kaset-dãmb tɩ mam deega a Elimelɛk ne a Kilyõ, la Maklõ sẽn dag n so wã fãa n da a Naoomi nengẽ." 
Ruth4:10 La mam kell n naag n deega Moaab bi-pugl a Rut sẽn dag n yaa a Maklõ pagã n maan m paga, sẽn na n yilẽ tɩ kiidã sẽn so wã tõe n yɩ buudã rẽnda, la t'a tõe n dog kamba, t'a yʋʋrã ra menem a saam-biisã sʋk ye. Dẽ, a kõn kong ned sẽn na n wa leok gomd a buudã pʋg ye. Woto wã, yãmb yaa bõn-kãng kaset-dãmb dũndã.»" 
Ruth4:11 Kãsem-dãmbã ne neb nins sẽn dag n zĩ tẽngã noorã yeelame: «N-yẽe! D yaa kaset-dãmba. La bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ pag ning sẽn na n kẽ fo zakẽ wã yɩ wa a Rasɛll la a Leya. Yaa bãmb b yiibã n yalg Israyɛll buudã. Bɩ f paoongã paas Efrata, la bɩ f yʋʋrã yi, n yɩ kãseng Betlehɛm pʋgẽ." 
Ruth4:12 Bɩ kamb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kõ pʋg-kãngã wã yɩ wʋsgo, wala a Zʋʋda pag a Tamaar biig a Perɛɛz buudã.»" 
Ruth4:13 Dẽ, a Boaaz peega a Rut n maan a paga, la a kẽe ne-a, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a rɩk pʋg n dog bi-ribla." 
Ruth4:14 Woto, Betlehɛm pagbã yeela a Naoomi yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr paam waoogre, bala, rũndã daarã, bãmb kõo foom ned sẽn na n zã-fo. Bɩ bi-kãngã yʋʋrã yi, n yɩ kãseng Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ." 
Ruth4:15 Bi-kãngã na n kɩtame tɩ fo vɩɩmd ne sũ-noogo, la a zã foom f kʋʋlem wakate. Sɩd-sɩdã, fo bi-pagã tara yõod n yɩɩd raop a yopoe, a nonga foom, a leb n doga bi-ribl n kõ-fo!»" 
Ruth4:16 Dẽ, a Naoomi reega biigã n mobge, la yaa yẽnda n wub-a." 
Ruth4:17 La yagsã yeelame: «A Naoomi paama bi-ribla!» La b pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Obɛɛde, la yaa a Obɛɛd n dog a Izayi, t'a Izayi rog a Davɩɩde." 
Ruth4:18 A Perɛts yagensã la woto: «A Perɛts rog a Ɛtsron," 
Ruth4:19 t'a Ɛtsron dog a Ram, t'a Ram dog a Aminadaabe." 
Ruth4:20 A Aminadaab n dog a Nakõ, t'a Nakõ dog a Salma." 
Ruth4:21 A Salma n dog a Boaaze, t'a Boaaz rog a Obɛɛde." 
Ruth4:22 A Obɛɛd n dog a Izayi, t'a Izayi rog a Davɩɩde.»" 
1Samuel1:1 Dao a ye n dag n be Ramatayim-Sofim sẽn be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋgẽ, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Ɛlkana. Yẽnda yaa a Elihu biig a Zerokam biiga, n yaa Efrat ned a Suf biig a Tohu yagenga." 
1Samuel1:2 A Ɛlkana rag n tara pagb a yiibu. A yembr yʋʋr la a Ãnde, t'a yembrã yʋʋr yaa a Penina. A Penina rag n tara kamba, la a Ãnd dag n ka paam biig ye." 
1Samuel1:3 Yʋʋmd fãa, a Ɛlkana rag n yita a tẽngẽ wã n kẽnd Sɩlo n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, la a maand maand n kõt-ba. A Eli kamb a yiibã, a Ofni ne a Fineyaas rag n bee beenẽ n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdba." 
1Samuel1:4 A Ɛlkana sã n maan a maoongã daare, a pʋɩta rũngã nemd n yãk n kõ a Penina ne a kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã fãa." 
1Samuel1:5 La a yãkda pʋɩɩr a yiib n kõ a Ãnde, bala, yẽnda rag n nonga a Ãnde, baa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a yaa kiirã." 
1Samuel1:6 A Ãnd pʋg-to wã rag n namsd-a lame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan t'a yaa kiirã yĩnga." 
1Samuel1:7 Yʋʋmd fãa, a Ãnd sã n dag n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, a Penina rag n namsd-a-la a woto bala. A Penina yaanda a Ãnd wa yẽnda sẽn mi n maandẽ wã, t'a yãbd n ka rat rɩɩb ye." 
1Samuel1:8 Woto, a Ãnd sɩd a Ɛlkana sokd-a lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo yãbd n ka rat rɩɩbo? Yaa bõe tɩ f sũur sãamd a woto? Mam ka yɩɩd kom-dibli piig fo yĩng sɩda?»" 
1Samuel1:9 Bãmb sẽn zĩnd Sɩlo n dɩ la b yũ n sɛ, a Ãnd yikame. Maan-kʋʋd a Eli rag n zĩ a goeel zug Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noore." 
1Samuel1:10 A Ãnd sũ-sãangã pʋgẽ, a pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãb wʋsgo." 
1Samuel1:11 Yẽnda pʋlma Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, yãmb sã n zoe mam sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmd-poakã nimbãanega, n tẽeg m yelle, n ka yĩm m yelle, la y sã n kõ-m bi-ribla, mam na n dɩk-a lame n kõ yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab a yõor tɛka, la barg kõn tol n tik a zug ye.»" 
1Samuel1:12 A Ãnd sẽn wa n pʋʋsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kaoosdẽ wã, a Eli rag n geta a no-bɩmsã." 
1Samuel1:13 A Ãnd dag n gomda a sũur pʋgẽ, la yaa yẽnda no-bɩmsã bal n dag n yaagde, la a koɛɛgã rag n ka yit ye. Dẽ, a Eli tagsame t'a yũu rãam t'a neng yilimdẽ." 
1Samuel1:14 A Eli yeel-a lame yaa: «Fo rãamã na n yi n bas-f-la wakat-bʋgo? Kẽng n tɩ gãand tɩ f rãamã yi!» 
1Samuel1:15 La a Ãnd leoka a Eli yaa: «Ayo! M soaala, mam ka yũ reezẽ rãam wall bũmb sẽn yilimd neng ye. Mam yaa pag sẽn be sũ-sãang pʋga, la mam togsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab m sũ-sãangã." 
1Samuel1:16 Da geelg-y mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poakã wa nin-yaalg ye. Ad-y yaa mam sũ-sãangã la m toogã n kɩt tɩ m gomd hal tɩ ta moasã.» 
1Samuel1:17 A Eli yeela a Ãnd yaa: «Bɩ f kẽng ne bãane, la bɩ Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kõ foom bũmb ning fo sẽn kosã.»" 
1Samuel1:18 A Ãnd leokame n yeele: «Bɩ y maan y tʋmtʋmd-poakã neere.» La yẽnda loogame n tɩ rɩ la a yũ, la yẽnda nengã toeemame." 
1Samuel1:19 A Ɛlkana ne a zakã rãmb yika yibeoog pĩnd n wõgemd n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b lebg n kuil b yir Rama. A Ɛlkana kẽe ne a pagã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega a Ãnd yelle." 
1Samuel1:20 Dẽ, yʋʋmdã sẽn wa n na n sɛ, tɩ yẽnda tara pʋga, la a roga bi-ribla. Yẽnda pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Sãmwɛlle, bala, yẽnda kos-a-la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Samuel1:21 A Ɛlkana ne a zakã rãmb fãa kẽngame n na n tɩ maan yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd maoongã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la a pids a pʋlengã." 
1Samuel1:22 La so-kãnga, a Ãnd ka tũ n kẽng ye. Bala, a rag n yeela a sɩdã t'a na n basame tɩ biigã sigi, t'a yaool n tall-a n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ t'a tɩ pa beenẽ a yõor tɛka." 
1Samuel1:23 A sɩd a Ɛlkana yeel-a lame: «Maan bũmb ning sẽn yaa sõama ne foom. Kell n pa kaanẽ hal tɩ biigã wa sigi. Sẽn-Ka-Saab weeg n pids b gomdã!» Dẽ, a Ãnd paa yiri. Yẽnda yẽsma a biigã hal t'a wa sigi." 
1Samuel1:24 Biigã sẽn sigi, a Ãnd peeg-a lame, la a bao lols a tãabo, ne zom wamde, la reezẽ rãam ne ko-waooga, n tall n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã Silo. La biigã rag n ket n yaa bilfu." 
1Samuel1:25 Bãmb kʋʋ loalgã, la b tall biigã n kẽng a Eli nengẽ." 
1Samuel1:26 A Ãnd yeelame: «M soaala, y kabre! Mam wẽenda ne yãmba, tɩ yaa maam la pag ning sẽn dag n zĩnd-a yãmb sɛɛgẽ kaanẽ n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabã." 
1Samuel1:27 Yaa bi-kãngã raab yĩng la mam sẽn dag n pʋʋsdã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam bũmb ning mam sẽn kosã." 
1Samuel1:28 Woto, mam me rat n dɩk-a lame n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ b soog-a a vɩɩmã tɛka. Dẽ, bãmb wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor beenẽ n waoog-ba.»" 
1Samuel2:1 A Ãnd pʋʋsame n yeele: «Mam kɩdemda ne sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋgẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab paasa maam pãnga, la mam tõe n la m bɛɛbã. Mam sũur yaa noogo, y sẽn fãag-ma yĩnga." 
1Samuel2:2 Ned ka be n yaa pʋ-peelem soab wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Ned a to ka be tɩ sã n ka yãmb ye. Ned ka be t'a pãng zem Wẽnnaam ye. 
1Samuel2:3 Da gom-y wuk-m-meng goam ye. Da sak-y tɩ y noor yiis tɩtaam goam ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn mi fãa. Bãmb makda nebã fãa tʋʋmã." 
1Samuel2:4 Gãndaadã tãbd kaoome, la ka-pãens rãmbã leb n paama pãnga." 
1Samuel2:5 Sẽn dag n dɩt-b n tɩgdã koosda b mens rɩɩb yĩnga, tɩ kom sẽn dag n tar-b rãmbã rɩt n tɩgda. Pʋg-kiir dogda naoor a yopoe, tɩ sẽn dag n dogd-a wʋsgã lebg kiiri." 
1Samuel2:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe tɩ ned ki, la b tõe tɩ ned vɩɩmde. Bãmb n tõe tɩ ned sig kɩɩm-kulgu, la b tõe t'a vʋʋge." 
1Samuel2:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe tɩ ned lebg naong soaba, la b tõe tɩ ned lebg arzɛk soaba. Bãmb n tõe n sik neda, bãmb n tõe n zẽk-a." 
1Samuel2:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yiisd nimbãan-ned wubsg pʋgẽ. Bãmb n yiisd naong soab tãmpʋʋrẽ, n kɩt t'a zĩnd ne nanambse. Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ b paam waoogr zĩig tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre. Bala, dũni wã yẽbgr fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so. La yaa yẽbg-kãens zug la b zaoolg dũni wã." 
1Samuel2:9 Bãmb gũuda neb nins sẽn sakd bãmbã nao-yakmã, la nin-wẽnsã na n menema lik pʋgẽ. Bala, ninsaal ka tõe n tõog ne a meng pãng ye." 
1Samuel2:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bɛɛbã na n sãamame. Bãmb na n zĩnda saasẽ, tɩ b sa-tãsã sig b bɛɛbã zutu. Bãmb na n kaoo dũni rãmb fãa bʋʋdo. Bãmb na n kõo b rĩmã pãnga, la b paas b nin-tũusdgã pãnga.»" 
1Samuel2:11 Dẽ poore, a Ɛlkana lebg n kuila a yir Rama, la biigã paa maan-kʋʋd a Eli nengẽ n maand Wẽnnaam tʋʋmde." 
1Samuel2:12 A Eli kambã rag n yaa kom-yoodo, b rag n ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
1Samuel2:13 Ad maan-kʋʋd-kãens sẽn dag n maand bũmb nins Wẽnnaam nebã nifẽ: ned sã n dag n wa n na n maan maoongo, maan-kʋʋdã tʋmtʋmd wata ne nemd kõsdg sẽn tar yẽn a tãab nemdã rʋgb wakate," 
1Samuel2:14 n tʋm bugum dʋkã pʋga, wall kut rʋkã pʋga, wall rʋg-bedrã pʋga, wall rublã pʋga, la nemd nins fãa kõsdgã sẽn na n yiisã yaa maan-kʋʋdã n deegde. Yaa a woto la b rag n maand ne Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n kẽnd Sɩlo wã." 
1Samuel2:15 Baa sẽn deng b sẽn na n yõog nem-kaamã, maan-kʋʋdã tʋmtʋmd kẽngdame n tɩ yeel ned ning sẽn maand maoongã yaa: «Yãk-y nemdã n kõ maan-kʋʋdã t'a kɩɩme, bala, a ka rat nem-dʋgdg ye, a rata nem-kãado.»" 
1Samuel2:16 La maoongã soab sã n yeel tɩ b na n deng n yõoga kaamã t'a yaool n yãk a sẽn date, tʋmtʋmdã yetame yaa: «Ayo! Fo sã n ka kõ maam moas-moasã, mam na n yãka ne pãnga.»" 
1Samuel2:17 A Eli kambã yel-wẽndã rag n yaa beeg-kãseng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, bala, b rag n ka nand maand nins b sẽn maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã ye." 
1Samuel2:18 A Sãmwɛll dag n yeelga maan-kʋʋr fuug b sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩsi, n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmde." 
1Samuel2:19 Yʋʋmd fãa, a Sãmwɛll ma wã rag n wʋgda fu-bila, t'a sã n wa tũud a sɩdã n dabd Sɩlo n na n tɩ maan maoongã, bɩ a zɩ n tɩ kõ-a." 
1Samuel2:20 A Eli ninga a Ɛlkana ne a pagã zug bark n yeel yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ pʋg-kãngã rog kamb n kõ foom tɩ b ledg biig ning yãmb sẽn kos n dɩk n kõ bãmbã zĩigẽ.» La bãmb lebg n kuilame. 
1Samuel2:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Ãnd barka, la a leb n dɩka pʋga, n dog kom-dibli a tãabo, ne kom-pugli a yiibu. La biig a Sãmwɛll dag n bɩta Sẽn-Ka-Saab belmã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel2:22 A Eli rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo, la a wʋma bũmb nins fãa yẽnda kambã sẽn dag n maand ne Israyɛll nebã. Yẽnda leb n wʋmame tɩ b rag n gãee pagb nins sẽn dag n tʋmd sɛk roogã noorã." 
1Samuel2:23 Woto, a Eli yeela a kambã yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb maand tʋʋm-yood a woto? Bala, mam wʋmda nebã fãa sẽn gomd yãmb tʋʋm-beedã yelle." 
1Samuel2:24 M kamb sõmse, da maan-y-yã a woto ye. Mam sẽn wʋmd bũmb ninsã ka sõama ye. Bala, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã kẽed kongr pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel2:25 Ned sã n beeg a to, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n welg yellã. La ned sã n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ãndã n na n yõk sɛɛg a soab yĩnga?» Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yãk yam t'a Eli kambã na n kiime wã yĩnga, b ka kelg b ba wã goam ye." 
1Samuel2:26 La biig a Sãmwɛll dag n bɩtame, la a rag n taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne nebã fãa yam." 
1Samuel2:27 Daar a yembre, Wẽnnaam dao n kẽng a Eli nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga: Dẽ yĩnga, fo yaab-rãmbã sẽn wa n ket n be Ezɩpt tẽng n yaa Faarõ yembsã, mam ka puk m meng ne-b sɩda?" 
1Samuel2:28 Mam yãka bãmb Israyɛll buudã fãa sʋk tɩ b yɩ mam maan-kʋʋdba, n get maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd yelle, la b kẽnd m tẽn-kugrẽ wã n yõogd wisdu, la b yeelgd maan-kʋʋr futã mam taoore. La mam dɩka Israyɛll nebã kũunã buud fãa, ne maand nins sẽn yõogd bugmã n kõ y yaab-rãmbã." 
1Samuel2:29 La yaa bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb ka nand mam maandã ne kũun nins mam sẽn yeel tɩ b maan m sɛk roogã zĩigẽ wã? Yaa bõe tɩ fo nand f kambã n yɩɩd maam? Yãmb yãkda Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã maandã fãa nemd nins sẽn yaa sõama wã n dɩt n nobda.» 
1Samuel2:30 Beneere, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame yaa: «Mam dag n yeelame tɩ yãmb doogã ne y yaab-rãmbã roog na n maana mam tʋʋmdã wakat fãa yĩnga. La moasã, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ kãab-kãngã kõn tol n leb n paam pidsg yɛs ye. Bala, mam waoogda neb nins sẽn waoogd maamã, la neb nins sẽn paoogd maamã na n paama paoogre.»" 
1Samuel2:31 Ade, daar n wate, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ foom ne f buudã pãng sɛ, la ned sẽn kʋʋl ka na n leb n zĩnd fo buudã sʋk ye." 
1Samuel2:32 Fo na n yãnda bõn-sõama nins fãa mam sẽn na n maan n kõ Israyɛll nebã, la ned sẽn kʋʋl kõn leb n zĩnd fo buudã sʋk abada." 
1Samuel2:33 La mam na n basame tɩ fo buudã ned a yembr kell n zĩnd m maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmdẽ, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ fo ges tɩ sũ-toog yõk-f tɩ f ninã yiigi. La fo buudã neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tõe n yɩ fo zu-zẽkrã na n paa tãpẽ." 
1Samuel2:34 Bũmb ning sẽn na n paam fo kamb a yiib a Ofni ne a Fineyaasã na n yɩɩ bãnd fo yĩnga. Bãmb b yiibã fãa na n kii daar a yembre. 
1Samuel2:35 La mam na n yãka maan-kʋʋd sẽn yaa sɩd soaba, m mengã yĩnga, sẽn maand sẽn noom maam, la sẽn tat mam yam. Mam na n kɩtame t'a yagensã maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã ne sɩda, la b kell n kẽn mam nin-tũusdgã taoor wakat fãa." 
1Samuel2:36 La fo yagens nins sẽn kellã na n tɩ wõgemda maan-kʋʋdã taoore, n kos ligd ne rɩɩbo, la a yeele: «M kotame tɩ y kõ-m tʋʋmd a yembr maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmã sʋka, tɩ m tõe n paamd rɩɩb n dɩtẽ.»" 
1Samuel3:1 Bi-bɩɩg a Sãmwɛll dag n bee ne a Eli n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmde. Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka wɛ n gomd ne nebã ye. La vẽnegrã me rag n ka wʋsg ye." 
1Samuel3:2 Daar a yembre, a Eli rag n gãee a gãagẽ. A ninã pãng rag n booga wʋsgo, t'a ka leb n neẽ ye." 
1Samuel3:3 Wẽnnaam fɩtlã rag n ket n witame, la a Sãmwɛll dag n gãee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, zĩig ning kaoolã koglgã sẽn dag n be wã." 
1Samuel3:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab boola a Sãmwɛll t'a sak tɩ: «Ad maam!» 
1Samuel3:5 La yẽnda yikame n wudg n kẽng a Eli nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «Ad maam! Bala, yãmb boola maam.» La a Eli leokame: «Ayo! Mam ka bool-f ye! Lebg n tɩ gãande!» La a Sãmwɛll lebg n tɩ gãandame." 
1Samuel3:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n boola a Sãmwɛlle. La a Sãmwɛll leb n yik n kẽnga a Eli nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «Ad maam! Bala, yãmb boola maam.» La a Eli leokame: «Ayo, m biiga! M ka bool-f ye! Lebg n tɩ gãande!»" 
1Samuel3:7 A Sãmwɛll dag n nan ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye, la a rag n nan zɩ n wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab goam vẽeneg-vẽeneg ye." 
1Samuel3:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n boola a Sãmwɛll naoor a tãabẽ soaba. La a yikame n leb n kẽng a Eli nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a: «Ad maam! Bala, yãmb boola maam.» Dẽ, a Eli bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n boond biigã." 
1Samuel3:9 A Eli yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ gãande, la b sã n leb n bool foom bɩ f leok yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, gom-y tɩ y tʋmtʋmdã kelgdame.» Woto, a Sãmwɛll lebg n tɩ gãandame." 
1Samuel3:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n waa a Sãmwɛll nengẽ. Bãmb leb n bool-a-la wa pĩndã: «Sãmwɛlle! Sãmwɛlle!» La a Sãmwɛll leokame: «Gom-y tɩ y tʋmtʋmdã kelgdame.» 
1Samuel3:11 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Gese, mam na n maana bũmb Israyɛll pʋgẽ, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n wʋm-a bɩ a yɛɛse!" 
1Samuel3:12 Badaare, mam na n pidsa bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn togse, sẽn kẽed ne a Eli roogã wɛɛngẽ wã. Mam sẽn sɩng bũmb ningã, mam na n baas-a lame." 
1Samuel3:13 Mam dag n wilga a Eli tɩ mam meng n na n sãam a roogã wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga. Bala, yẽnda rag n bãngame t'a kambã beegda maam, la yẽnda yaool n bas-b lame n ka gɩdg-b ye." 
1Samuel3:14 Yaa woto yĩng n kɩte, tɩ mam wẽend n yetẽ tɩ maand bɩ kũun ka tol n tõe n yẽes a Eli roogã yel-wẽnã ye.»" 
1Samuel3:15 A Sãmwɛll kell n gãandame tɩ beoogã vẽege, t'a yaool n yik n pags Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã kʋɩlemse. A Sãmwɛll dag n zoeta rabeem n ka rat n wilg a Eli vẽnegr ning yẽnda sẽn paamã ye." 
1Samuel3:16 La a Eli boola a Sãmwɛll n yeele: «M biig a Sãmwɛlle!» La a Sãmwɛll leokame: «Ad maam!» 
1Samuel3:17 La a Eli sok-a lame: «Yaa bõe koɛɛg la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ foom? M kotame tɩ f ra solg-m bũmb ba a yembr ye. Fo sã n solg maam bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel foomã baa bilfu, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg foom sɩbg-kãsenga.»" 
1Samuel3:18 Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll togsa a Eli bũmbã fãa n ka solg ba a yembr ye. La a Eli yeelame: «Bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bɩ b maan sẽn noom bãmba.»" 
1Samuel3:19 A Sãmwɛll dag n bɩtame, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne yẽnda, n ka bas b gomd ba a yembr tɩ vaal ye." 
1Samuel3:20 Israyɛll nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Dan hal tɩ ta Bɛɛr-Seba wã bãngame t'a Sãmwɛll sɩd yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛsa." 
1Samuel3:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ket n vẽnegda b meng Sɩlo. Sɩlo tẽngã pʋgẽ, bãmb dag n tũnugda a Sãmwɛll n vẽnegd b meng b goamã pʋga." 
1Samuel4:1 A Sãmwɛll goamã rag n yaa Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga. Israyɛll nebã yiime n na n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã. Bãmb tɩ tilga b tãb-sikã Ebɛn-Ezɛɛre, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã Afɛke." 
1Samuel4:2 Filistẽ-dãmbã sũu tãpo, n teedg n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã. Zabrã sɩngame, la Filistẽ-dãmbã tõoga Israyɛll nebã zabrã zĩigẽ, n kʋ neb sõor sẽn kolg tus a naase." 
1Samuel4:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã lebg n leba b tãb-sikẽ wã, la Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã sokame: «Yaa wãn tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã tõog tõndo? Wa-y tɩ d kẽng Sɩlo n tɩ tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n wa. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa tõnd sʋka, n fãag-d d bɛɛbã nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel4:4 Woto, Israyɛll nebã tʋma neb Sɩlo tɩ b tɩ tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n wa. Yaa koglg ning zug Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn zĩ serubẽ-rãmbã sʋkã. A Eli kamb a yiibã, a Ofni ne a Fineyaas rag n bee ne Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã." 
1Samuel4:5 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã sẽn ta tãb-sikẽ wã, Israyɛll nebã fãa kaasame, la tẽngã fãa rigimdame." 
1Samuel4:6 Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm kaasgã, b sokame: «Yaa bõe bʋr-kãseng la sẽn yit Ebre rãmbã tãb-sikẽ wã?» La b wa n bãngame tɩ yaa b sẽn tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n wa b tãb-sikẽ wã yĩnga." 
1Samuel4:7 Dẽ, rabeem-kãseng yõka bãmb tɩ b yeele: «Wẽnnaam waa tãb-sikẽ wã! Tõnd na n paama toogo, bala, yellã ka na n leb n yɩ wa pĩndã ye!" 
1Samuel4:8 Tõnd na n paama toogo! Ãnda n na n fãag tõnd Wẽnnaam sẽn tar pãn-kãseng a woto wã nugẽ? Yaa bãmb n sãam Ezɩpt nebã ne tood buud toor-toor we-raoogã pʋgẽ. 
1Samuel4:9 Filistẽ-dãmba, keng-y y mens n yɩ raopa, n da wa lebg Ebre rãmbã yembs wa bãmb sẽn yaa yãmb yembsã ye. Bɩ yãmb yɩ raop n zabe.»" 
1Samuel4:10 Filistẽ-dãmbã zab n tõoga Israyɛll nebã, la Israyɛll nebã ned kam fãa zoe n kuila a yiri. Sãoongã yɩɩ kãsenga: b kʋʋ Israyɛll tãb-biis tus pis-tã." 
1Samuel4:11 Filistẽ-dãmbã zabame n yõk Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n deege, la b kʋʋ a Eli kamb a yiibã, a Ofni ne a Fineyaase." 
1Samuel4:12 Benzame buudã ned a yembr n yi zabrã zĩigẽ badaar n zoe n ta Sɩlo. La a futã fãa rag n pãrsame t'a zugã fãa yaa tom. 
1Samuel4:13 Raoã taame n mik t'a Eli rag n zĩ a goeel zug sorã noore, n gũud kibare, bala, yẽnda rag n yɛɛsda kaoolã koglgã yĩnga. Raoã sẽn ta tẽngã pʋgẽ, a togsa bũmb nins sẽn maanã, la tẽngã neb fãa wiisame." 
1Samuel4:14 A Eli sẽn wʋm nebã wiisgã, a sokame tɩ yaa bõe wiisg la sẽn wiisdã? La raoã zoee tao-tao n tɩ togs a Eli bũmb nins sẽn maanã." 
1Samuel4:15 Wakat-kãng t'a Eli rag n tara yʋʋm pis-wɛ la a nii, la a ninã rag n ka leb n ne ye." 
1Samuel4:16 Raoã yeela a Eli yaa: «Ade, mam yii zabrã zĩigẽ. Yaa rũndã la mam yi beenẽ n zoe n wa.» La a Eli sok-a lame yaa: «M biiga, yaa bõe yell n maane?»" 
1Samuel4:17 Raoã leokame: «Ade, Filistẽ-dãmbã riga Israyɛll nebã tɩ b zoe, la nebã paama sãoong-kãsenga. Baa yãmb kamb a yiibã, a Ofni ne a Fineyaas kiime, la Filistẽ-dãmbã yõka Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n deege.»" 
1Samuel4:18 Raoã sẽn wilg kaoolã koglgã yellã bal yee, la a Eli sẽn yi a goeelã zug n lʋɩ a zãmbɛɛl tẽngã rignoor sɛɛgẽ, t'a yublã kao t'a ki. Bala, a rag n yaa nin-kẽema, la a mengã rag n zɩsame. A Eli yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pis-naase." 
1Samuel4:19 A Eli biig a Fineyaas pagã rag n kẽnda ne pʋ-bɩɩng n kolg rogem. Pagã sẽn wʋm tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã reega kaoolã koglgã, la a wʋm a sɩdã ba wã ne a sɩdã kũumã, a pʋgã yika zabr zĩig pʋgẽ, la a yĩgimdame n doge." 
1Samuel4:20 La toogã sẽn sãag-a t'a rat n ki wã, pagb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yeel-a lame: «Da zoe rabeem ye. Bala, fo roga bi-ribla.» La a ka tõog n leok tɩ bũmb ye. A ka kelg-b meng ye." 
1Samuel4:21 Yẽnda pʋda bi-riblã yʋʋr tɩ Ikaboode, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Israyɛll ziirã loogame.› A rag n goma woto, b sẽn deeg kaoolã koglgã, n paas a sɩdã ne a sɩdã ba sẽn ki wã yĩnga" 
1Samuel4:22 Pagã yeelame: «Israyɛll ziirã loog n bas-a lame!» Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn yõk Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n deegã yĩngã. 
1Samuel5:1 Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn yõk Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n deegã, b yii ne-a Ebɛn-Ezɛɛr n tall n kẽng Asdoode." 
1Samuel5:2 Filistẽ-dãmbã rɩka Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n tɩ kẽes b wẽn-naandg a Dagõ roogẽ wã, n dɩgl-a n yegl a Dagõ." 
1Samuel5:3 Vẽkembeoogo, Asdood nebã yika yibeoog pĩnd n mik t'a Dagõ lʋɩɩ yão-vãbg Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã taoore. La bãmb rooga wẽn-naandg a Dagõ n lebs n yalsg-a a zĩigẽ wã." 
1Samuel5:4 La vẽkembeoogo, b yikame n leb n mik t'a Dagõ lʋɩ yão-vãbg Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã taoore, t'a nusã ne a naoã kao n dʋr digno-koakã zugu, la yaa a mengã bal n dag n kete." 
1Samuel5:5 Woto yĩng n kɩte, t'a Dagõ maan-kʋʋdbã ne neb nins sẽn wat Asdood n kẽed a Dagõ roogẽ wã ka sakd n tab rigno-koakã hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Samuel5:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga Asdood nebã wʋsgo, tɩ sũ-sãang kẽ-ba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ nod-kegems yõk Asdood ne a soolmã fãa nebã." 
1Samuel5:7 Asdood raopã sẽn yã toog ning sẽn paam-bã, b yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d da bas tɩ Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã pa tõnd nengẽ ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ toog paamd tõndo, la ne tõnd wẽnnaam a Dagõ.»" 
1Samuel5:8 Bãmb tʋmame tɩ b bool Filistẽ nanambsã n tigim n yeel-b yaa: «Tõnd na n maana a wãn ne Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã?» Nanambsã yeelame tɩ b tall Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglg n kẽng Gat tẽngã, la b tall-a lame n kẽnge." 
1Samuel5:9 Dẽ, b sẽn tall-a n kẽng beenẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga tẽngã rãmb ne sɩbg-kãsenga. Sũ-sãang wʋsg zĩndame, bala, nod-kegems yõka tẽngã rãmba, sẽn sɩng ne kom-bãoonegã hal tɩ ta kom-kãsemsã fãa." 
1Samuel5:10 Woto, Gat nebã talla Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n kẽng Ekrõ. La kaoolã koglgã sẽn ta beenẽ, Ekrõ tẽngã neb kelmame n yeele: «B talla Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglg n wa ka, n dat tɩ tõnd ne d nebã fãa ki." 
1Samuel5:11 Dẽ, bãmb tʋmame tɩ b bool Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambsã, n tigim-b n yeel-b yaa: ‹Tɩ lebs-y Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã a zĩigẽ, t'a ra wa kɩt tɩ maam ne b nebã ki ye! Bala, kũum dabeem n dag n kẽ tẽngã.› Wẽnnaam sɩbgrã rag n yaa kãsenga." 
1Samuel5:12 Nod-kegemsã yõga neb nins sẽn dag n põs kũumã, la nebã sẽn dag n baood sõngrã kelems rag n zẽkd n tata saasẽ.»" 
1Samuel6:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã paa Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ kiuug a yopoe. 
1Samuel6:2 La Filistẽ-dãmbã boola b maan-kʋʋdbã ne b bagbã n sok-b yaa: «Tõnd na n maana a wãn ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã? Sõng-y tõnd tɩ d bãng d sẽn na n maan to-to n lebs-a a sẽn yiẽ wã.» 
1Samuel6:3 Bãmb leokame: «Yãmb sã n na n tɩ lebs Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã, bɩ y ra tɩ lebs-a zaalem ye. Bao-y kũun tɩ yɩ maoong y beegrã yĩnga. Dẽ, yãmb na n paama maagre, la y na n bãnga bũmb ning sẽn kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam sɩbg yãmbã.»" 
1Samuel6:4 Filistẽ-dãmbã sokame tɩ yaa bõe kũun la b tõe n kõ Wẽnnaam b beegrã yĩnga. La maan-kʋʋdbã ne bagbã leokame: «Maan-y noad a nu mamsg ne sãnem, ne yõens a nu mamsg ne sãnem, wa sẽn zems Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs a nu wã sõore. Bala, yaa bãag a yembr n yõk yãmb ne y nanambsã." 
1Samuel6:5 Maan-y noadã ne yõens nins sẽn sãamd-b yãmb tẽngã mamsdo, la y kõ Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã waoogre, tɩ daar ning bɩ Wẽnnaam boog yãmb ne y tẽngã sɩbgrã, la sɩbgr ning sẽn be y wẽnnaam-dãmbã zugã." 
1Samuel6:6 Yaa bõe tɩ y na n keng y sũy wa Ezɩpt nebã ne Faarõ sẽn dag n maanã? Wẽnnaam mengã sẽn sɩbg-bã, b ka bas Israyɛll nebã tɩ b loog sɩda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Moasã, kɩt-y tɩ b maan terok-paalle, la y bao nag-yãans a yiib sẽn tar kamb sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ, la sẽn nan ka tall n tʋme, n balg terokã, la y tall b kambã sẽn tũud-bã n leb yiri." 
1Samuel6:8 Rɩk-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n sagl terokã pʋga, la y rɩk teed nins fãa yãmb sẽn maan ne sãnem beegrã yĩngã, n ning koglg a to pʋgẽ n sagl n yegl kaoolã koglgã n dig niigã tɩ b looge." 
1Samuel6:9 La bɩ yãmb meng ges sõama: B sã n dɩk Bɛt-Semees toadgã sore, rat n yeelame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ to-kãsengã paam tõndo. La b sã n ka rɩk so-kãnga, tõnd na n bãngame tɩ ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sɩbg tõnd ye, yaa toog sẽn wa n paam tõnd a woto bala.»" 
1Samuel6:10 Dẽ, Filistẽ-dãmbã maana a woto. Bãmb yõga nag-yãans a yiib sẽn tar kamb sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ, n balg terokã n yaool n pag b kambã yiri." 
1Samuel6:11 Bãmb sagla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã, ne koglg ning sẽn tar sãnem yõensã ne sãnem noadã mamsd terokã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel6:12 Niigã rɩka Bɛt-Semees sorã tɩrg bal n ka bʋdg ye. B rɩka sorã bal n yãbd n loogdẽ, n ka bʋdg goabg wall rɩtg ye. Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs pʋgla bãmb hal n tɩ ta Bɛt-Semees toadgã." 
1Samuel6:13 Bɛt-Semees nebã rag n bee bãoogẽ n tigsd b bɩle. La b sẽn zẽk b neng n gese, b yãnda kaoolã koglgã, la b maana sũ-noog rẽ yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:14 Terokã taa Bɛt-Semees rao a Zozoe pʋʋgẽ wã, la a yalsame. Kug-bedr n dag n be beenẽ. Nebã kell n wesa terokã raado, la b yõg nag-yaansã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:15 Leevi nebã sika Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã ne koglg ning sẽn tar teed nins sẽn maan ne sãnemã, n dogl kug-bedrã zugu. Badaare, Bɛt-Semees nebã maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, ne maand a taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:16 La Filistẽ nanambs a nu wã sẽn yã rẽ wã zugẽ, b lebg n leba Ekrõ badaar bala." 
1Samuel6:17 Ad sãnem noad mamsd nins Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn maan n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab b beegrã yĩngã: A yembr yaa Asdood yʋʋr yĩnga, a yembr Gaaza yʋʋr yĩnga, a yembr Askalon yʋʋr yĩnga, a yembr Gat yʋʋr yĩnga, la a yembr yaa Ekrõ yʋʋr yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:18 Sãnem yõens a nu me n dag n be beenẽ Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽms tẽng fãa yʋʋr yĩnga, la yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs a nu wã n dag n so tẽn-bãmba. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne tẽng ning sẽn gũbg ne lalsã, n tɩ ta tẽn-bilã sẽn ka tar lalgã, hal n tɩ ta kug-kẽeng ning sẽn be Bɛt-Semees rao a Zozoe pʋʋgẽ wã. Yaa kug-kãng zug la b rogl Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã, la kugrã ket n bee be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Samuel6:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kʋʋ Bɛt-Semees neb kẽere, b sẽn lɩk n ges Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã pʋgẽ wã yĩngã. Neb tus pis-nu wã sʋka, bãmb kʋʋ neb pis-yopoe. Nebã sũyã sãama hal wʋsgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgrã sẽn yɩ toog wʋsgã yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:20 Bɛt-Semees nebã sokame yaa: «Ãndã n tõe n yals Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa pʋ-peelem soabã taoore? La kaoolã koglgã sã n yi tõnd nengẽ, yɛ la a na n kẽnge?»" 
1Samuel6:21 Bãmb tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Kiryat-Yeyarim nebã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Filistẽ-dãmbã lebg n talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg n wa. Wa-y n tall-y-yã-a n kẽng y nengẽ.» 
1Samuel7:1 Kiryat-Yeyarim nebã wa n talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n looge. Bãmb kẽng n tɩ sik-a-la a Abinadaab zakã sẽn be tãngã zugã pʋga. Bãmb yãka a Abinadaab biig a Eleyazaar t'a gũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã. 
1Samuel7:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã paa Kiryat-Yeyarim n kaoose. A paa be yʋʋm pisi. Israyɛll nebã wiisa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. 
1Samuel7:3 La a Sãmwɛll yeela Israyɛll buudã fãa yaa: «Sã n mikame tɩ yaa ne y sũyã fãa la y rat n lebg n tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y yiis bu-zẽmsã wẽnnaam-dãmbã, ne Astarte wẽn-naandsã yãmb sʋka. La y wẽnemd y sũyã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y tũ bãmb b yembr bala. Woto, bãmb na n fãaga yãmb Filistẽ-dãmbã nusẽ.»" 
1Samuel7:4 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã menesa Baall-dãmbã, la Astarte wẽn-naandsã bãmb sʋka, la b tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab b yembr bala." 
1Samuel7:5 A Sãmwɛll yeelame: «Tigm-y Israyɛll nebã fãa Mispa, tɩ m pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab y yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel7:6 Dẽ, bãmb tigma Mispa, la b toog koom n daag Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Bãmb maana no-loeer badaare, la b yeelame: «Tõnd beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» A Sãmwɛll dag n yaa Israyɛll nebã bʋ-kaood Mispa." 
1Samuel7:7 Filistẽ-dãmbã wʋmame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tigma Mispa. Dẽ, b nanambsã ne b nebã yikame n na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã. Israyɛll nebã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãngã, Filistẽ-dãmbã rabeem yõka bãmba." 
1Samuel7:8 Israyɛll nebã yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Ra sĩnd f noor ye! Kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã n kõ-do, tɩ b fãag-d Filistẽ-dãmbã nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel7:9 A Sãmwɛll dɩka pe-bil sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ, n maan maoongo, n yõog-a fãa bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. A Sãmwɛll kelmame n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saab Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a kosgã." 
1Samuel7:10 A Sãmwɛll sẽn wa n maand maoongã wakate, Filistẽ-dãmbã kolgame n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã. Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sa-tãs zĩnd Filistẽ-dãmbã sʋka, n kẽes-b rabeem, la Israyɛll nebã tõoga bãmba." 
1Samuel7:11 Israyɛll nebã yii Mispa n dig Filistẽ-dãmbã hal n tãag Bɛt-Kaare. 
1Samuel7:12 A Sãmwɛll dɩka kugr n lugl Mispa ne zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ Yẽndã sʋka, n pʋd kugrã yʋʋr tɩ Ebɛn-Ezɛɛre, sẽn dat n togs tɩ sõngr kugri, la a yeele: «Hal tɩ ta kaanẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõnga tõndo.»" 
1Samuel7:13 Woto, Israyɛll nebã tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã n ning-b yãnde, la b ka leb n tol n wa Israyɛll soolmẽ wã ye. A Sãmwɛll vɩɩmã tɛka, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga Filistẽ-dãmbã." 
1Samuel7:14 Israyɛll nebã leb n deega b tẽms nins fãa Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn dag n deegã, sẽn sɩng ne Ekrõ hal n tɩ ta Gat ne b tẽn-kɩremsã me. Israyɛll fãaga tẽn-bãmb Filistẽ-dãmbã nugẽ. Vɩ-bãan zĩnda Israyɛll nebã ne Amoor nebã sʋka." 
1Samuel7:15 A Sãmwɛll yɩɩ Israyɛll bʋ-kaood a vɩɩmã tɛka. 
1Samuel7:16 Yʋʋmd fãa, yẽnda rag n kẽnda Betɛll ne Gilgall la Mispa, n kaood Israyɛll nebã bʋʋd zĩ-kãens fãa." 
1Samuel7:17 La rẽ poore, yẽnda lebgd n kuila a yir Rama. Yẽnda mi n kaooda Israyɛll nebã bʋʋd beenẽ me. Yẽnda mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Samuel8:1 A Sãmwɛll sẽn wa n kʋʋlã, a yãka a kambã tɩ b lebg Israyɛll bʋ-kaoodba." 
1Samuel8:2 A Sãmwɛll bi-kãsengã yʋʋr la a Zowɛlle, la yiibẽ soabã yʋʋr la a Abiya. Bãmb dag n yaa Bɛɛr-Seba bʋ-kaoodba." 
1Samuel8:3 A Samwɛll kambã ka rɩk a Sãmwɛll naoor ye. Bãmb dag n nonga kũuni, b rag n deegda kũuni, la b kaood bʋʋdã kɛga." 
1Samuel8:4 Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmb fãa tigma taab n kẽng a Sãmwɛll nengẽ Rama: 
1Samuel8:5 Bãmb yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Yãmb kʋʋlame, la yãmb kambã me ka rɩk yãmb naoor ye. Dẽ wã, bao-y rĩm n kõ-do, t'a soog tõnd wa buud a taabã fãa me sẽn tarã.»" 
1Samuel8:6 A Sãmwɛll sũurã sãama ne Israyɛll sẽn yeel tɩ b rata rĩm sẽn na n yɩ bãmb bʋ-kaoodã, la yẽnda pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Samuel8:7 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Kelg nebã, la f maan bũmb nins fãa b sẽn kot foomã n kõ-ba. Bala, ka foom la b zãgsd ye, yaa maam la b zãgs yã. Bala, b ka leb n dat tɩ mam yɩ b rĩm ye." 
1Samuel8:8 Bãmb sẽn maand to-to ne foomã, kell n yaa wa b sẽn dag n sɩng n maand ne maam wakat ning mam sẽn yiis-b Ezɩpt tẽngã hal tɩ ta moasã wã. Bãmb basa maam n tũ wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba." 
1Samuel8:9 Dẽ wã, bɩ f kelg-ba, la f keoog-b sõama, la f wilg-b rĩm ning sẽn na n wa soog bãmbã sẽn na n tall noor ning ne bãmba.»" 
1Samuel8:10 A Sãmwɛll rɩka Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã fãa n taas nebã sẽn kot yẽnda tɩ b rata rĩmã. 
1Samuel8:11 A yeel-b lame yaa: «Ad rĩm ning sẽn na n soog-a yãmbã sẽn na n tall noor ne bũmb ninga: Yẽnda na n dɩka yãmb kom-dibli wã n maan a tãb-biisi, n kɩt tɩ kẽer zoet ne saar-dãmba, tɩ kẽer yɩ a wed-rʋʋdba, la kẽer na n lʋɩɩ a saar-dãmbã taoore, n yɩ a gũudba." 
1Samuel8:12 A na n kɩtame tɩ kẽer lebg tãb-biis tusr-tusr nanambse, tɩ kẽer lebg tãb-biis pis-nunu nanambse. Yẽnda na n kɩtame tɩ kẽer ko a pʋtã, la b tigs a koodã, tɩ kẽer me maan a zab-teedã ne saar-dãmbã teedo." 
1Samuel8:13 Yẽnda na n dɩka yãmb kom-pugli wã tɩ b maand parfẽ-rãmba, tɩ kẽer segend dɩɩbo, tɩ kẽer maand buri." 
1Samuel8:14 Yẽnda na n deesa yãmb pʋ-sõama wã ne y reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, la y oliiv tɩɩs pʋtã n kõ a tʋmtʋmdbã." 
1Samuel8:15 Yẽnda na n deega y bõn-koaadlã ne y reezẽ tɩɩs biisã piig pʋɩɩre, n kõ a nanambsã ne a zakã tʋmtʋmdbã." 
1Samuel8:16 Yẽnda na n deega yãmb yem-daadã ne y yem-pogsã, la y kom-bɩɩsã ne y bõens nins sẽn yaa sõama wã n kɩt tɩ b tʋm a tʋʋmã." 
1Samuel8:17 Yẽnda na n deega yãmb rũm-bãoonegã piig pʋɩɩre. Yãmb mensã na n lebga a yembse. 
1Samuel8:18 Wakat-kãnga, yãmb na n zẽka y koees n yãb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rĩm ning yãmb sẽn yãkã wɛɛngẽ, la badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n leok yãmb ye.»" 
1Samuel8:19 Nebã kɩɩsame n ka kelg a Sãmwɛll ye. Bãmb yeelame yaa: «Ayo! Tõnd data rĩm t'a soog tõndo. 
1Samuel8:20 Woto, tõnd me na n lebga wa buud a taabã fãa. Tõnd dĩmã n na n kaood tõnd bʋʋdo, la a lʋɩt tõnd taoor zabr wakate, n zabd n kõt-do.»" 
1Samuel8:21 A Sãmwɛll wʋma nebã goamã fãa, la a rɩkame n togs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Samuel8:22 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Kelg b goamã, bao rĩm n kõ-ba.» La a Sãmwɛll yeela Israyɛll nebã tɩ ned fãa lebg n leb a tẽngẽ." 
1Samuel9:1 Benzame buudã ned a ye n dag n be, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Kiisi, n yaa a Abiyɛll biiga. A Abiyɛll ba la a Seroore, t'a Seroor ba yaa a Bekorate, sẽn yaa a Afiya sẽn yaa Benzame buudã ned a yembr biiga. A Kiis rag n yaa gãndaoogo." 
1Samuel9:2 A Kiis rag n tara biig t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Sayulli. Israyɛll nebã fãa sʋka, bi-kãng rag n yaa bi-bɩɩg sẽn tar da-sãnd n yɩɩda, la a zugã woglem me rag n yɩɩda b fãa." 
1Samuel9:3 A Sayull ba a Kiis bõn-yãans n meneme, la a Kiis yeela a biig a Sayull yaa: «M kotame tɩ f peeg tʋmtʋmd a ye, tɩ y kẽng n tɩ bao bõensã.»" 
1Samuel9:4 Dẽ, bãmb pɩʋʋga Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n tɩ pɩʋʋg Salisa soolmã, la b pɩʋʋg Saalim soolmã, la b ka yã bõensã ye. Bãmb pɩʋʋga Benzame tẽngã n kell n ka yãnd-b ye." 
1Samuel9:5 Bãmb sẽn wa n ta Suf tẽngã, a Sayull yeela a tʋmtʋmdã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «Wa tɩ d kuili, tɩ m baaba ra wa bas bõensã yell tagsgo, n maand yɩɩr tõnd yĩng ye.»" 
1Samuel9:6 Tʋmtʋmdã yeelame yaa: «Ad Wẽnnaam dao a ye n be tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, tɩ neb wʋsg sɩd waoogd-a. A sẽn yeel bũmb ning fãa paamda pidsgu. Wa-y tɩ d kẽng beenẽ, tɩ daar ninga, a na n wilga tõnd sor ning d sẽn segd n dɩke.»" 
1Samuel9:7 La a Sayull leoka a tʋmtʋmdã yaa: «Tõnd na n talla bõe n tɩ kõ Wẽnnaam daoã? Rɩɩb ning sẽn dag n be tõnd yondẽ wã la sẽn sɛ wã la. Tõnd leb n ka tar kũun me n na n tɩ kõ-a ye. La bõe la tõnd tar n tõe n tɩ kõ-a?» 
1Samuel9:8 Tʋmtʋmdã leoka a Sayull yaa: «Mam tara wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng sẽn pʋɩ zĩis a naase. Mam na n dɩkame n kõ Wẽnnaam daoã, t'a wilg tõnd d sẽn tog dɩk sor ninga.»" 
1Samuel9:9 Hal pĩnda, Israyɛll tẽngã pʋga, ned sã n dag n dat n sok Wẽnnaam bũmbu, a yetame: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng yãta nengẽ. Bala, bãmb dag n boonda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã tɩ yãtba.»" 
1Samuel9:10 A Sayull yeela a tʋmtʋmdã yaa: «Yaa sõama! Wa tɩ d kẽnge!» La b tũu taab n kẽng tẽng ning Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn dag n beẽ wã. 
1Samuel9:11 Bãmb sẽn wa n kẽed tẽngã pʋgẽ, b yãnda kom-pugli sẽn yi tẽngã n dabd n na n tɩ toog koom. La b sok-b lame yaa: «Yaa ka la yãtã sẽn be wã bɩ?»" 
1Samuel9:12 La kom-pugli wã leokame: «N-yẽe! Yãtã renga yãmb taoor n wa. Kẽng-y tao-tao. B waa tẽngã pʋg rũndã. Bala, maoong maaneg n be maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ nebã yĩnga." 
1Samuel9:13 Yãmb sã n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ, yãmb na n yãnd-b lame tɩ b nan ka rʋ maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ n na n dɩ ye. Bala, nebã ka na n dɩ tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã nan ka wa ye. Yaa bãmb n segd n ning maandã barka, tɩ nebã yaool n dɩ. Bɩ y kẽng moasã bala, tɩ y na n yãnd-a lame.»" 
1Samuel9:14 La wakat ning a Sayull ne a tʋmtʋmdã sẽn wa n ta tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, ade, b mikame t'a Sãmwɛll dag n yiime n dabd maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ, la Sãmwɛll yi n seg-b lame." 
1Samuel9:15 A Sayull waoongã ket tɩ beoogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n zoe n keooga a Sãmwɛll n yeele:" 
1Samuel9:16 «Beoog woto wẽnde, mam na n tʋma Benzame buudã rao a yembr fo nengẽ, la fo na n ninga a zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã rĩmã. Yẽnda na n fãaga mam nebã Filistẽ-dãmbã nusẽ, bala, mam yãnda m nebã namsgã, la m wʋma b kɛlengã.»" 
1Samuel9:17 A Sãmwɛll sẽn yã a Sayullã wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Ad rao ning yell mam sẽn dag n gom ne foomã. Yaa yẽnda n na n soog mam nebã.»" 
1Samuel9:18 A Sãmwɛll sẽn wa n be tẽngã noorã, a Sayull kolg-a lame n sok-a yaa: «M soaala, m kotame tɩ y wilg-m yãtã yir sẽn be zĩig ninga.»" 
1Samuel9:19 A Sãmwɛll leoka a Sayull yaa: «Yaa maam la yãtã. Wa tũ maam tɩ d rʋ maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ. Yãmb na n naaga maam n dɩ rũndã, la beoog yibeoogo, mam na n wilga foom bũmb ning fo sẽn dat n bãngã, la m yaool n kõ-f sor tɩ f kuili." 
1Samuel9:20 Da maan yɩɩr ne f bõensã sẽn menem dasem a tãab rũndã wã ye. Bala, b yãnd-b lame. Ãndã soab n na n soog Israyɛll bõn-sõamyã fãa? Ka foom ne f ba wã zak rãmb fãa la?»" 
1Samuel9:21 A Sayull leokame: «Mam yaa Benzame buudã neda, la Israyɛll buudã sʋka, ka tõnd buudã n yaa bilf n yɩɩd sɩda. Benzame buudã pʋgẽ me, ka tõnd doogã neb n yaa bilf n yɩɩda? La yɩta a wãn tɩ yãmb gomd ne maam a woto?»" 
1Samuel9:22 A Sãmwɛll peega a Sayull ne a tʋmtʋmdã n tall-b n kẽes rɩɩbã roogẽ, n zĩnig bãmb neb pis-tã wã b sẽn dag n boolã taoore." 
1Samuel9:23 A Sãmwɛll yeela rɩ-segendã t'a wa ne nemd ning yẽnda sẽn dag n kõ-a t'a bĩng toorã. 
1Samuel9:24 Rɩ-segendã talla gerã ne a nemsã zãng n wa rɩgl a Sayull taoore. La a Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Ad nemdã tõnd sẽn bĩng foomã. Rɩk n wãbe, bala, yaa pʋɩɩr tõnd sẽn bĩng tɩ f wa lagem ne neb nins tõnd sẽn boolã n dɩ.» Woto, a Sayull naaga a Sãmwɛll n dɩ badaare." 
1Samuel9:25 Bãmb tũu taab n yi maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ n sig n kẽ tẽngã pʋga, la a Sãmwɛll dʋʋ gãsgã zug n sõs ne a Sayulli." 
1Samuel9:26 Vẽkembeoogã yibeoog pĩnda, zĩ-yẽegr wakate, a Sãmwɛll boola a Sayull roogã zug n yeel-a yaa: «Yik tɩ m yãag-f tɩ f looge.» A Sayull yikame, la bãmb b yiibã fãa rɩka sore." 
1Samuel9:27 Bãmb sẽn kẽn n ta tẽngã kɩrenga, a Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull t'a kɩt t'a tʋmtʋmdã reng bãmb taoore. Tʋmtʋmdã sẽn looge, a Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull t'a yals t'a wilg-a Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel bũmb ninga." 
1Samuel10:1 A Sãmwɛll dɩka tʋk ne kaam n pʋdg a Sayull zugã, la a mok-a n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga fo zug naam kaam tɩ f lebg bãmb nebã naaba." 
1Samuel10:2 Rũndã, fo sã n yi mam nengẽ, fo na n tɩ yãnda raop a yiib a Rasɛll yaoogã sẽn be Sɛlsa sẽn be Benzame soolmã toadgẽ wã sɛɛga. Bãmb na n togsa foom tɩ b yãnda bõens nins fo sẽn dag n baoodã, la fo ba wã basa bõensã yelle, n maand yɩɩr yãmb yĩng n yetẽ: Mam na n maana a wãn ne m biigã yelle?" 
1Samuel10:3 La fo sã n yi be n ta Taboor tɩ-kẽengã sẽn beẽ wã, fo na n sega neb a tãab tɩ b rabd Betɛll n na n tɩ waoog Wẽnnaam. Ned a yembrã tɛta bulli a tãabo, t'a yembrã zãad bur a tãabo, t'a yembrã tar reezẽ rãam ne ko-waooga." 
1Samuel10:4 Bãmb na n pʋʋsa foom, la b rɩk bur a yiib n kõ foom tɩ f reege." 
1Samuel10:5 Dẽ zugẽ, fo na n taa Gɩbeya sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tãngã, sẽn yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sik zĩigã. Fo sã n wa kẽed tẽngã, fo na n sega Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb sull tɩ b yit maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ, tɩ b manesmã yaa no-rɛɛsdb manesem. La neb n na n be b taoor n wẽed koal ne sɩlsãgse, la wɩɩs ne pendse." 
1Samuel10:6 Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã na n kẽe foom la fo me na n naaga bãmb n maan no-rɛɛs manesem, la fo na n tekame n lebg ned a to." 
1Samuel10:7 Bãn-kãens fãa sã n wa paam pidsg fo zugu, bɩ f maan bũmb nins fo sẽn tog n maanã, bala, Wẽnnaam bee ne foom." 
1Samuel10:8 La rẽ poore, bɩ f reng maam n kẽng Gilgalle, tɩ mam na n wa paama foom beenẽ, n wa maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maando. Fo na n yalsa beenẽ rasem a yopoe hal tɩ mam wa wilg foom bũmb ning f sẽn na n maanã.»" 
1Samuel10:9 A Sayull sẽn yi a Sãmwɛll nengẽ wã bal yee, Wẽnnaam kõ-a-la yam-paalga, la bãn nins fãa a Sãmwɛll sẽn togsã paama pidsg badaar bala." 
1Samuel10:10 A Sayull ne a tʋmtʋmdã sẽn ta Gɩbeya, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb sull n wa n seg bãmba. Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kẽ a Sayulli, t'a naag bãmb n maand no-rɛɛs manesem." 
1Samuel10:11 Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n mi a Sayullã sẽn yã t'a naaga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã n maand no-rɛɛs manesmã, b rag n sokda taab yaa: «Bõe n tar a Kiis biig a Sayulli? Yẽnda me lebga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs la?»" 
1Samuel10:12 Tẽngã ned a yembr yeelame yaa: «Ãndã la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã taoor soaba?» La bõn-kãng lebga yel-bũnd tɩ b tar n yetẽ: «A Sayull me yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs la?» 
1Samuel10:13 A Sayull sẽn maan no-rɛɛs manesmã n sɛ, yẽnda kẽnga maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel10:14 A Sayull baaba-bilã soka a Sayull ne a tʋmtʋmdã yaa: «Yãmb dag n kẽnga yɛɛnẽ?» A Sayull leokame: «Tõnd dag n kẽnga bõensã baoobo, la d ka yãnd-b ye. Dẽ, tõnd kẽnga a Sãmwɛll nengẽ.»" 
1Samuel10:15 A Sayull baaba-bilã leb n sokame: «M kot-f lame tɩ f togs maam a Sãmwɛll sẽn yeel yãmb bũmb ninga!» 
1Samuel10:16 A Sayull leoka a baaba-bilã yaa: «A Sãmwɛll yeela tõnd tɩ b yãnda bõensã.» La b ka sak n togs yẽnda a Sãmwɛll sẽn gom rĩungã wɛɛngẽ wã ye. 
1Samuel10:17 A Sãmwɛll boola nebã tɩ b tigim Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Mispa," 
1Samuel10:18 la yẽnda yeela Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta: «Yaa maam n yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpte. Mam fãaga yãmb Ezɩpt nebã nugẽ, la ne soolem-dãmb a taab nins fãa sẽn dag n namsd yãmbã nugẽ." 
1Samuel10:19 La rũndã, yãmb kɩɩsa y Wẽnnaamã sẽn fãagd yãmb y toogã la y sũ-sãamsã pʋgẽ wã, n yetẽ tɩ b bao rĩm n kõ-y t'a soog-yã. Moasã, bɩ y kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, buud-buudu, la roog-roogo.»" 
1Samuel10:20 A Sãmwɛll kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll buudã fãa kolge, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka Benzame buudã." 
1Samuel10:21 La a leb n kɩtame tɩ Benzame buudã kolg roog-roogo, la b yãka a Matri roogã. Dẽ zugẽ, b yãka a Kiis biig a Sayulli. La b baoo a Sayull n ka yã ye." 
1Samuel10:22 B leb n soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Ned a to waa ka bɩ?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame: «A solga teedã poore.» 
1Samuel10:23 La b wudg n tɩ yiisa a Sayull beenẽ n tall n wa t'a yals nebã sʋka, la yẽnda zugã woglem dag n yɩɩda nebã fãa." 
1Samuel10:24 A Sãmwɛll yeela nebã fãa yaa: «Yãmb yãnda ned ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yãkã? Buudã fãa pʋgẽ, yẽnda ka tar to ye.» La nebã fãa kelmame n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos rĩmã!»" 
1Samuel10:25 Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll yalsa nebã taoor n sõdg bũmb nins fãa rĩmã sẽn tar noor ne wã, la yẽnda gʋls-b-la sebr pʋgẽ n dɩgl Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n yaool n kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri." 
1Samuel10:26 A Sayull me lebg n kuila a yir Gɩbeya. La Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ gãndaad bãmb sẽn yãk yãag a Sayulli. 
1Samuel10:27 La nin-yood me n zĩnd be n dag n yetẽ yaa: «Ayii! Nin-kãngã tõe n fãag tõndo!» Bãmb paooga a Sayull n ka tol n kõ-a kũun meng ye, la a Sayull ka leok-b tɩ bũmb ye." 
1Samuel11:1 Amo ned a Nahaas kẽnga ne a nebã n tɩ tilg b tãb-sikã Yabɛɛs sẽn be Galaadã n na n zab ne-a. Yabɛɛs nebã fãa yeela a Nahaas t'a maan kaool ne bãmb n soog-ba. 
1Samuel11:2 La Amo ned a Nahaas leok-b lame: «Yãmb sã n dat tɩ mam maan kaool ne yãmba, rẽndame tɩ mam deng n feoog yãmb ned kam fãa rɩtg nifri, n ning Israyɛll nebã fãa yãnde.»" 
1Samuel11:3 Yabɛɛs nebã kãsem-dãmb yeelame: «Bɩ y kõ-d weer dasem a yopoe, tɩ d tʋm neb tɩ b togs Israyɛll nebã fãa, la ned sã n ka be n na n fãag tõndo, d na yaool n sak yãmb sẽn datã.»" 
1Samuel11:4 Neb nins b sẽn tʋmã sẽn ta Gɩbeya a Sayull sẽn beẽ wã n togs koe-kãngã tɩ nebã wʋma, b fãa zẽka b koees n yãbe." 
1Samuel11:5 La mikame t'a Sayull dag n yi a pʋʋgẽ ne a nag-koods n watẽ, la a sokame tɩ yaa bõe n tar nebã tɩ b yãbda. La b togs-a-la Yabɛɛs nebã sẽn yeelã." 
1Samuel11:6 A Sayull sẽn wʋm gom-kãense, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kẽe yẽnda, la a sũurã yika hal wʋsgo." 
1Samuel11:7 Yẽnda yãka niig a yiib n kʋ n beese, n kɩs neb nins sẽn wa ne koɛɛgã tɩ b tɩ kɩs Israyɛll soolmã fãa, n yeel tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn ka na n tũ a Sayull ne a Sãmwɛll n kẽng zabrã, b na n maana a soab niigã me a woto. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem yõka Israyɛll nebã, la b lagma taab n yik wa nin-yende." 
1Samuel11:8 A Sayull tigma Israyɛll nebã Bezɛke. Bãmb sõorã taa tus kobs-tã, tɩ Zʋʋda nebã sõor dag n yaa tus pis-tã." 
1Samuel11:9 Bãmb yeela neb nins sẽn yi Yabɛɛs n wa ne koɛɛgã tɩ b lebg n leb Yabɛɛs sẽn be Galaadã n tɩ yeel nebã, tɩ b na n paama fãagr beoog yibeoogo, wĩndgã sã n wa zẽkdẽ. La b sẽn tɩ taas Yabɛɛs nebã koɛɛgã, b maana sũ-noog wʋsgo." 
1Samuel11:10 La Yabɛɛs nebã yeela Amo nebã tɩ beoogo, bãmb na n sakame n wa tɩ b maan bãmb wa b sẽn date." 
1Samuel11:11 Vẽkembeoogo, a Sayull welga a nebã sags a tãabo. La bãmb kẽe Amo-rãmbã tãb-sikẽ tõd-beoogo, n kʋ-b hal tɩ ta wĩntoogo. Neb bilf nins sẽn põsã sãeegame tɩ ned ka leb n tũ a to ye." 
1Samuel11:12 Nebã yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Yaa ãndã rãmb la sẽn dag n yet t'a Sayull ka na n yɩ tõnd dĩmã? Tall-y-b n wa tɩ d kʋ.» 
1Samuel11:13 La a Sayull yeelame: «Ayo! B ka na n kʋ ned rũndã daarã ye. Bala, rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab waa ne fãagr Israyɛll tẽngã pʋgẽ.»" 
1Samuel11:14 Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll yeela nebã yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng Gilgall n tɩ yeel t'a Sayull la tõnd dat t'a yɩ d rĩmã.»" 
1Samuel11:15 Nebã fãa kẽnga Gilgall n tɩ kõ a Sayull naamã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor beenẽ. Bãmb maana zems-n-taar maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la a Sayull ne nebã fãa maana sũ-no-kãseng beenẽ." 
1Samuel12:1 A Sãmwɛll yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Ade, mam kelga yãmb sẽn kos bũmb ningã fãa, n kõ yãmb rĩm t'a soog-yã." 
1Samuel12:2 Moasã, ad rĩm ning sẽn na n lʋɩ yãmb taoorã. Sã n yaa ne maam, mam lebga nin-kẽema, la mam zug pelgame. La mam kambã bee ne yãmba. Mam lʋɩɩ yãmb taoor hal m yãadem wakat tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Samuel12:3 Ad-m sẽn yase! Leok-y maam Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne rĩm ning bãmb sẽn yãkã taoore, tɩ b yɩ kaset rãmba. Ãnda naaf la m deeg yã? Ãnda bõang la m deeg yã? Ãnda la m maan pãnga? Ãnda la m nams yã? Ãnda kũun la m deeg yã, n mum m nin n kao a soab bʋʋd kegre? Bɩ y togs tɩ m bao n lebs a soaba.»" 
1Samuel12:4 Nebã leokame: «Yãmb ka nams tõndo, yãmb ka reeg kũun d nengẽ, la y ka reeg ned bũmb ne pãng me ye.»" 
1Samuel12:5 A Sãmwɛll leb n yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne rĩm ning bãmb sẽn yãkã yaa kaset rãmb dũndã, tɩ yãmb bũmb ka be m nengẽ ye.» La nebã leokame: «B yaa kaset rãmba.»" 
1Samuel12:6 A Sãmwɛll yeela nebã yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, la b yiis y yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
1Samuel12:7 Moasã, yals-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ m bʋ ne-yã, sẽn kẽed ne tɩrlem nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan n kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã wɛɛngẽ." 
1Samuel12:8 A Zakoob ne a nebã sẽn wa n kẽng Ezɩptã, yãmb yaab-rãmbã kelmame n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngre. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma a Moyiis ne a Aarõ tɩ b yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã, n tall-b n wa zĩ-kãngã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel12:9 La bãmb yĩma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã yelle, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas-b Hatsoor tẽngã tãb-biis naab a Sisera nugẽ, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, la Moaab rĩmã nugẽ, tɩ b zab n tõog-ba." 
1Samuel12:10 Bãmb kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: ‹Tõnd beegame. Bala, tõnd basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n tũ Baall ne Astarte wẽn-naandsã. Bɩ y fãag tõnd d bɛɛbã nusẽ moasã, tɩ d na n tũu yãmba.› »" 
1Samuel12:11 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma a Yeruball ne a Bedan la a Zɛfte ne a Sãmwɛlle, tɩ b fãag yãmb y bɛɛb nins sẽn dag n gũbg yãmbã nugẽ, la yãmb vɩɩmda ne bãane." 
1Samuel12:12 Moasã, yãmb sẽn yã tɩ Amo nebã naab a Nahaas wat n na n zab ne yãmbã, la yãmb sẽn yeel maam tɩ yãmb data rĩm sẽn na n soog yãmbã. Yaool n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n yaa yãmb dĩma." 
1Samuel12:13 Moasã, ad rĩm ning yãmb sẽn yãkã, ad rĩm ning yãmb sẽn kosã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ-y-la rĩm t'a soog-yã." 
1Samuel12:14 Yãmb sã n zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n tũ bãmb la y sak bãmb noorã, yãmb sã n ka kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã, yãmb ne rĩm ning sẽn so-a yãmbã na n kell n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
1Samuel12:15 La yãmb sã n ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore, yãmb sã n kɩɩs bãmb goamã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sɩbga ne y yaab-rãmbã." 
1Samuel12:16 Moasã, segl-y y mens n ges bõn-kãseng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n maan yãmb nifẽ wã." 
1Samuel12:17 Ka bɩle tigsg wakat la woto sɩda? Mam na n kosa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b tʋm sa-kelems ne saaga. Dẽ, yãmb na bãng tɩ y sẽn kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ y rata rĩmã yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
1Samuel12:18 A Sãmwɛll kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b kɩtame tɩ sa-kelems zĩndi tɩ saag ni badaare, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a Sãmwɛll dabeem yõka nebã fãa." 
1Samuel12:19 Nebã fãa yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa y Wẽnnaamã, tõnd sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdbã yĩnga, tɩ d ra ki ye. Bala, tõnd paasa d yel-wẽnã sõore, tõnd sẽn kos tɩ d rata rĩmã yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel12:20 A Sãmwɛll yeela nebã yaa: «Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Yaa sɩd tɩ yãmb maana wẽnga, la ra wẽnemd-y n bas-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Sak-y bãmb ne y sũyã fãa." 
1Samuel12:21 Da bʋdg-y n bas-y bãmba, n tɩ tũ bõn-zaals sẽn ka nafde, la sẽn ka fãagd ye. Bala, b yaa bõn-zaals sẽn ka tar yõodo." 
1Samuel12:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, b ka na n bas b nebã ye. Bala, taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam tɩ b yãk yãmb tɩ y lebg bãmb nebã." 
1Samuel12:23 Mam kõn tol n bas n ka pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãmb yĩnga, n wa beeg bãmb ye. Mam na n zãmsa yãmb sor sẽn yaa sõama, la tɩrga." 
1Samuel12:24 La bũmb sẽn be bala, bɩ y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y tũ bãmb ne sɩda, la ne y sũyã fãa. Ges-y bõn-kãsems nins bãmb sẽn maan yãmb sʋkã." 
1Samuel12:25 La yãmb sã n maan wẽnga, b na n sãama yãmb ne y rĩmã.»" 
1Samuel13:1 A Sayull sẽn wa n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm sẽn zems bala. La a rag n zoe n dɩɩ naam Israyɛll yʋʋm a yiibu. 
1Samuel13:2 A Sayull yãka Israyɛll neb tus a tãabo, la bãmb sʋkã neb tus a yiib n dag n be ne yẽnda Mikmaas ne Betɛll tãmsã zutu, la neb tusr n dag n be ne a Zonatã Gɩbeya tẽngã sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã. A Sayull kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn kellã ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri." 
1Samuel13:3 A Zonatã tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-bi-sull ning sẽn dag n be Gɩbeya wã, la Filistẽ-dãmbã fãa wʋma yellã. A Sayull kɩtame tɩ b peeb baorg tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ n yeele: «Bɩ Ebre-rãmbã kelge!»" 
1Samuel13:4 Israyɛll nebã fãa wʋmame tɩ b gomd t'a Sayull tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-bi-sulli, la Filistẽ-dãmbã kisga Israyɛll nebã. La nebã fãa tigma a Sayull nengẽ Gilgalle." 
1Samuel13:5 Filistẽ-dãmbã tigmame n na n zab ne Israyɛll nebã. Bɛɛbã rag n tara saar-dãmb tus pis-tã, wed-rʋʋdb tus a yoobe, la b nebã rag n yaa wʋsg wa kʋɩlg noor bĩisri. Bãmb kẽng n tɩ tilga b tãb-sikã Mikmaas sẽn be Bɛt-Avɛn yaangã." 
1Samuel13:6 Israyɛll nebã yãame tɩ b bee yell pʋga, bala, bɛɛbã rag n dɩdga bãmba. Bãmb zoe n tɩ soonda tãms bogd pʋse, bogdẽ, pĩis sʋka, yogdẽ, ne buls pʋsẽ." 
1Samuel13:7 La Ebre-rãmbã neb kẽer dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n na n kẽng Gaad ne Galaad soolmẽ. Rẽ t'a Sayull dag n ket n bee Gilgalle, la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be-b ne yẽnda wã rag n digda ne rabeem." 
1Samuel13:8 A Sayull paa Gilgall n gũ rasem a yopoe, wa a Sãmwɛll sẽn dag n yeelã, la a Sãmwɛll dag n ket n ka wat ye. Nebã me rag n sãeegdame." 
1Samuel13:9 Dẽ, a Sayull yeela nebã yaa: «Tall-y maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã rũmsi, ne zems-n-taar maandã n wa.» La yẽnda maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã." 
1Samuel13:10 Yẽnda sẽn maan maandã n sɛ bal yee, la a Sãmwɛll sẽn be waoongẽ. A Sayull yiime n seg a Sãmwɛll n pʋʋs-a." 
1Samuel13:11 A Sãmwɛll soka a Sayull yaa: «Yaa bõe la yãmb maan yã?» La a Sayull leokame yaa: «Mam sẽn wa n mik tɩ nebã sãeegdame n basd maamã, tɩ yãmb me kaoosd n ka wat wa y sẽn yeelã, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã yaool n tigim Mikmaasã," 
1Samuel13:12 mam tagsame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã na n waa Gilgall n wa zab ne maam tɩ m nan ka paam n sigs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur ye! Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ mam keng m sũur n maan maoongã.» 
1Samuel13:13 A Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Yãmb sẽn maanã yaa yalemdo. Yãmb ka sak noor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ yãmbã ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n na n kɩtẽ lame tɩ yãmb ne y yagensã soog Israyɛll rĩungã wakat fãa. 
1Samuel13:14 La moasã, yãmb rĩungã ka na n kaoos ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab baoo ned sẽn ta bãmb yam t'a na n yɩ b nebã naaba, bala, yãmb ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmb noor ningã ye.»" 
1Samuel13:15 Woto, a Sãmwɛll yii Gilgall n kẽng Gɩbeya sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã. A Sayull sõda nebã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, la bãmb kolga neb kobs-yoobe." 
1Samuel13:16 A Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã, la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne bãmbã siga Gɩbeya sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã. La Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n tilga b tãb-sikã Mikmaase." 
1Samuel13:17 Sãamdb sul a tãab n yi Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikẽ wã: Sull a yembr dɩka Ofra sore, n teesd Suwall tẽngã sẽnẽ," 
1Samuel13:18 tɩ sull a yembr dɩk Bɛt-Horon sore, t'a yembrã rɩk toadgã sor ning sẽn dabd Seboyim longã sẽn be we-raoogã sẽnẽ wã." 
1Samuel13:19 Wakat-kãnga, sãab rag n ka leb n be Israyɛll tẽngã zĩig ba a yembr ye. Bala, Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n gɩdga Ebre-rãmbã tɩ b ra leb n kud sʋʋs ne kãn ye." 
1Samuel13:20 Dẽ, Israyɛll ned ning fãa sẽn dag n dat-a n toos a wãk bɩ a soanga, wall a saas a lare ne a sʋʋga, rag n yaa tɩlɛ ne-a t'a kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã nengẽ." 
1Samuel13:21 Bãmb dag n yaooda wakɩ-koeems a yiibu, layã ne sʋʋsã manegr yĩnga, la wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, wãgsã ne somsã yĩnga la pĩim nins sẽn tar n tikd nag‑koodsã." 
1Samuel13:22 Zabr sã n yiki, mikdame tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Sayull la a Zonatã wã sʋk ned ba a yembr ka tar sʋʋg tɩ b gomd kãnd ye. Yaa a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã bal n dag n tare." 
1Samuel13:23 Filistẽ-dãmbã sull a yembr yiime n kẽng Mikmaas tãngã zĩ-lɛngẽ wã. 
1Samuel14:1 Daar a yembre, a Sayull biig a Zonatã yeela bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã yaa: «Wa tɩ d kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikã sẽn be hal ka sẽnẽ wã.» A Zonatã yaool n dag n ka wilg a ba a Sayull ye." 
1Samuel14:2 A Sayull dag n bee Gɩbeya toadgẽ wã, n zĩ gernaad tɩɩg ning sẽn be Migrõ wã tẽngre. Neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã sõor kolga neb kobs-yoobe." 
1Samuel14:3 Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa a Akiya n dag n yeelgd maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã. Akiya yaa a Ikabood ba-biig a Akituub biiga. A Akituub yaa a Fineyaas biiga, la a Fineyaas yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋd a Eli sẽn dag n be Sɩlo wã biiga. Tãb-bi-sullã ka bãng a Zonatã loogr ye." 
1Samuel14:4 A Zonatã sẽn tɩ tũ zĩig ning n na n pɩʋʋg n kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikẽ wã, pĩig kug-sɩlems a yiib n dag n be goabg la rɩtgo. B rag n boonda a yembr tɩ Botsɛte, la b boond a yembrã tɩ Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 A yembr bee rɩtgo, n teesd Mikmaase, t'a yembr be goabga, n teesd Geba sẽnẽ." 
1Samuel14:6 A Zonatã yeela a rakõorã sẽn zãad yẽnda zab-teedã yaa: «Wa tɩ d kẽng nin-bãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã tãb-sikẽ. Daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sõnga tõndo, bala, bũmb ka be n tõe n gɩdg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b tũnug neb bilf wall neb wʋsg n fãag ye.»" 
1Samuel14:7 Yẽnda rakõorã leok-a lame: «Yãmb sẽn dat n maan bũmb ning fãa, bɩ y maan tɩ mam bee ne yãmba.»" 
1Samuel14:8 La a Zonatã yeelame: «Beneere, wa tɩ d kẽng b sẽnẽ, n maan tɩ b yã-do." 
1Samuel14:9 Bãmb sã n yeel tõnd tɩ d yals tɩ b wa, tõnd na n yalsame n ka kẽng b nengẽ ye." 
1Samuel14:10 La bãmb sã n yeel tõnd tɩ d wa b nengẽ, bɩ d kẽnge, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩk-b lame n ning tõnd nugẽ. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bãnde.»" 
1Samuel14:11 Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã fãa likame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã yãnd-ba, n yeele: «Ad Ebre neb sẽn yit bogd nins b sẽn dag n solgã pʋsẽ.»" 
1Samuel14:12 La Filistẽ-dãmbã yeela a Zonatã ne ned ning sẽn zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã yaa: «Wa-y tõnd nengẽ tɩ d wilg-y bũmbu.» A Zonatã yeela ned ning sẽn zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã: «Pʋg maam tɩ d kẽnge, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩk-b lame n ning Israyɛll nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel14:13 A Zonatã ne a rakõorã kũnumame n dʋ tãngã. A Zonatã rag n pãbda Filistẽ-dãmbã n lubdẽ, t'a rakõorã pʋgd n baasdẽ." 
1Samuel14:14 Zab-kãng pʋga, a Zonatã ne a rakõorã sẽn zãad yẽnda zab-teedã kʋʋ neb pisi, la b kʋ-b-la zĩ-sẽk pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel14:15 Rabeem-kãseng yõka Filistẽ-dãmbã b tãb-sikẽ wã, ne soolmã nebã, la nebã fãa. Rabeem kẽe baa ne tẽn-gũusdbã ne sãamdbã. Tẽngã rigimdame, la yɩɩ rabeem sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
1Samuel14:16 A Sayull tẽn-gũusdb nins sẽn dag n be Gɩbeya sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã yãame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã zoet n sãeegd n kẽed goabg la rɩtgo. 
1Samuel14:17 Woto, a Sayull yeela neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «M kotame tɩ y sõd nebã n bãng neb nins sẽn ka be sõore!» Dẽ, bãmb sõda nebã, la b mikame tɩ yaa a Zonatã ne sẽn zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã n ka be b sʋka." 
1Samuel14:18 Dẽ, a Sayull yeela a Akiya t'a kɩt tɩ b tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n kolge. Bala, wakat-kãng tɩ kaoolã koglgã bee ne Israyɛll nebã." 
1Samuel14:19 A Sayull sẽn wa n ket n gomd ne maan-kʋʋdã, rẽ tɩ rãmbgã rag n paasda Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikẽ wã. La a Sayull yeela maan-kʋʋdã t'a ra leb n nams a meng n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. La a Sayull ne a tãb-biisã fãa sẽn be ne yẽnda wã tigmame n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel14:20 La b yãame, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã fãa rɩka b sʋʋs n wẽnemd n kɛɛd taaba. Rag n lebga rãmbg-kãseng meng-menga." 
1Samuel14:21 Ebre neb n dag n be ne Filistẽ-dãmbã n sõngd-ba. Bãmb tũu Filistẽ-dãmbã n kẽng b tãb-sikã zĩigẽ wã. Ebre nin-bãmb wẽnemdame n naag Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Sayull ne a Zonatã wã. 
1Samuel14:22 Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n solg Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã sẽn wʋm tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã zoetame wã, bãmb me yiime n naag n dig Filistẽ-dãmbã n zab ne-ba." 
1Samuel14:23 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga Israyɛlle, la b zab n tõoga b bɛɛbã hal n tãag Bɛt-Avɛn zugẽ." 
1Samuel14:24 Israyɛll nebã namsa badaare, bala, a Sayull kɩtame tɩ nebã wẽen n yeel tɩ ned sã n lemb rɩɩb tɩ zaabr ka ta, tɩ yẽnda nan ka paam n dok a sũurã ne a bɛɛbã, bɩ kãab-wẽng paam a soaba. Dẽ, bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tol n lemb rɩɩb ye." 
1Samuel14:25 Nebã fãa kẽnga weoogã pʋgẽ, la b yãnda sɩɩd sẽn be weoogã zĩig zãnga." 
1Samuel14:26 Nebã sẽn kẽ weoogã pʋgẽ wã, b yãnda sɩɩdã, la ned ba a yembr ka tol n lemb-a ye, nebã sẽn dag n zoet wẽeneg ning b sẽn dag n wẽenã yĩnga." 
1Samuel14:27 A Zonatã rag n ka bãng t'a baaba rag n kɩtame tɩ nebã wẽen ye. Dẽ, yẽnda rɩka rasaar ning a sẽn dag n zãadã, n leok sɩɩdã n dɩ, la a nengã yẽegame." 
1Samuel14:28 Ned a yembr yeela a Zonatã yaa: «Yãmb ba wã rag n kɩtame tɩ nebã wẽen n yeel tɩ ned ning sẽn lemb-a rɩɩb rũndã daarã, bɩ kãab-wẽng paam a soaba.» La nebã yaool n dag n yɛɛme." 
1Samuel14:29 La a Zonatã leokame: «M baaba baoo toog bal n kõ nebã. Yãmb ka ne tɩ mam sẽn lemb sɩɩdã bilfã, mam nengã yẽegame sɩda?" 
1Samuel14:30 Nebã sã n dag n dɩẽ bũmb nins b sẽn yã b bɛɛbã zĩisẽ wã, b rag n na n tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã n yɩɩd a woto.»" 
1Samuel14:31 Badaare, bãmb tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn sɩng Mikmaas hal n tãag Ayalon, la nebã rag n yɛɛ wʋsgo." 
1Samuel14:32 Israyɛll nebã zɛɛ b bɛɛbã laogã. B yõga rũm-bãoonegã, ne rũm-bɛdã, la b nag-bi wã, n kʋ-b zĩig pʋgẽ, n wãb-b ne b zɩɩmã." 
1Samuel14:33 La nebã kẽng n tɩ yeela a Sayull yaa: «Nebã beegda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n wãbd nemd ne zɩɩm.» La a Sayull yeelame: «Yãmb sẽn maanã yaa kɩɩsgo. Bilm-y kug-bedr n wa ne ka tao-tao." 
1Samuel14:34 La y kẽ nebã sʋk n yeel-b tɩ bãmb ned kam fãa tall a naaf wall a peosg n wa kʋ kaanẽ. Rẽ zugẽ, b na yaool n wãbe, la b ra wãb nemdã ne zɩɩmã n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye.» Badaar yʋngo, ned kam fãa talla a naaf n wa kʋ zĩ-kãngã." 
1Samuel14:35 A Sayull mee tẽn-kugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la yɩɩ pipi tẽn-kugr a sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Samuel14:36 A Sayull yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã yʋngã tõr hal tɩ beoogã vẽege, la d ra bas ned ba a yembr t'a põs ye.» Nebã yeela a Sayull t'a maan a sẽn date. Maan-kʋʋdã yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d kolg Wẽnnaam taoor kaanẽ.»" 
1Samuel14:37 La a Sayull soka Wẽnnaam yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã bɩ? Yãmb na n dɩk-b lame n ning Israyɛll nebã nugẽ bɩ?» La Wẽnnaam ka leok a Sayull tɩ bũmb badaar ye." 
1Samuel14:38 A Sayull yeelame: «Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa nebã nanambsã, yãmb mens bãnga bũmb ning sẽn wilgd tɩ yãmb beega rũndã wã." 
1Samuel14:39 Bala, mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll fãagdã, tɩ baa sã n yaa mam biig a Zonatã n beege, a na n kiime.» La nebã fãa sẽn tigmã ka leok yẽnda ye." 
1Samuel14:40 A Sayull yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Bɩ y yals toore, tɩ maam ne m biig a Zonatã me yals toore.» La nebã yeela a Sayull t'a maan wa a sẽn date." 
1Samuel14:41 A Sayull yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Israyɛll Wẽnnaam! Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb ka leok maam dũndã? Sã n yaa maam bɩ m biig a Zonatã n beeg yãmba, bɩ y yãk Urim. La sã n yaa Israyɛll nebã fãa n konge, bɩ y yãk Tumim.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka a Zonatã ne a Sayulli. La taal yii nebã zugu." 
1Samuel14:42 A Sayull yeelame: «Maan-y poeer maam ne m biig a Zonatã sʋka.» La poeerã yãka a Zonatã. 
1Samuel14:43 A Sayull yeela a Zonatã: «Togs maam fo sẽn maan bũmb ninga.» La a Zonatã yeelame: «Mam dɩka m dasaar n leok sɩɩd bilf bal n lembe. Ad maam! Bɩ y kʋ-ma.» 
1Samuel14:44 A Sayull yeelame: «Zonatã, mam sã n ka kʋ foom, bɩ Wẽnnaam sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga.»" 
1Samuel14:45 Nebã yeela a Sayull yaa: «Bõe! N kʋ a Zonatã? Ka a Zonatã n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã paam tõog-kãsengã la? Abada! Tõnd wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yẽnda zoobg ba a ye ka na n lʋɩ tẽng ye. Bala, yaa ne Wẽnnaam sõngr la a maan tʋʋm-kãngã rũndã daarã.» Woto, nebã fãaga a Zonatã, tɩ b ka kʋ-a ye." 
1Samuel14:46 La a Sayull basa Filistẽ-dãmbã rigbu, la Filistẽ-dãmbã lebg n kuilame." 
1Samuel14:47 A Sayull sẽn deeg Israyɛll naamã zugẽ, a zaba ne a bɛɛbã zĩig fãa. Yẽnda zaba ne Moaab rãmbã, ne Amo-rãmbã, la Edom dãmbã, ne Soba rĩm-dãmbã, la Filistẽ-dãmbã. La yẽnda sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa, a paamda tõogre." 
1Samuel14:48 Yẽnda rɩka a pãngã fãa, n zab ne Amalɛk n tõog-ba, n fãag Israyɛll nebã neb nins sẽn dag n fãad bãmbã nugẽ." 
1Samuel14:49 A Sayull kambã rag n yaa a Zonatã ne a Yisvi, la a Malkisuwa. La a kom-pugli a yiibã yʋy la woto: Kãsmã yʋʋr la a Meraabe, tɩ yao wã yʋʋr la a Mikalle." 
1Samuel14:50 A Sayull pagã yʋʋr la a Ayinoam, n yaa a Ayimaas bi-pugla. La a tãb-biisã naab yʋʋr la a Abneer sẽn yaa a Sayull saamb a Neer biigã." 
1Samuel14:51 A Sayull ba a Kiis ne a Abneer ba a Neer dag n yaa a Abiyɛll kom-dibli. 
1Samuel14:52 A Sayull vɩɩmã tɛka, a zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã ne sũuri. A Sayull sã n dag n yãnd ned sẽn yaa gãndaoogo, a rɩkd-a lame t'a lebg a tãb-biiga." 
1Samuel15:1 A Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Yaa maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋm tɩ m wa ning fo zug kaam tɩ f lebg rĩm n soog Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã. Dẽ wã, bɩ f kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet bũmb ningã.»" 
1Samuel15:2 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame yaa: «Mam na n sɩbga Amalɛk nebã, bala, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n yi Ezɩpt tẽngã, bãmb tek n gɩdg-b-la sorã zugu." 
1Samuel15:3 Moasã, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ zab ne Amalɛk nebã, n sãam bũmb nins b sẽn tarã zãnga. Da zoe-y b nimbãaneg ye. Kʋ-y pagbã ne raopã, kambã ne kom-peelsã, niigã ne piisã, la yʋgma wã ne bõensã fãa.»" 
1Samuel15:4 A Sayull boola tãb-biisã n tigim-b Telayim n sõd-ba. La b sõorã rag n yaa tãb-biis tus kobessi sẽn kẽnd ne nao, n paas Zʋʋda neb tus piiga." 
1Samuel15:5 A Sayull kẽname n ta Amalɛk-rãmbã tẽngẽ, n kɩt tɩ neb soond ko-soogẽ wã." 
1Samuel15:6 A Sayull yeela Kɛn nebã yaa: «Yi-y n zãag-y ne Amalɛk-rãmbã tɩ m da wa naag-y ne bãmb n sãam ye. Bala, yãmb maana Israyɛll nebã fãa neer wakat ning b sẽn wa n yi Ezɩptã.» La Kɛn nebã yiime n bas Amalɛk nebã." 
1Samuel15:7 A Sayull tõoga Amalɛk nebã, sẽn sɩng Havɩla hal n tãag Suur sẽn be Ezɩpt neng taoorã noore." 
1Samuel15:8 Yẽnda yõka Amalɛk rĩm a Agaag vɩɩga, la a kʋ nebã fãa ne sʋʋga." 
1Samuel15:9 La a Sayull ne nebã basa a Agaag n ka kʋ ye. La b basa rũm-bãoonegã ne rũm-bɛd nins fãa sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩdã. Bãmb ka sak n sãam rũm-kãens ye. La yaa rũms nins fãa sẽn yaa wag n ka tar yõodã bal la b kʋ zãnga. 
1Samuel15:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: 
1Samuel15:11 «Mam maanda m bãngẽ m sẽn yãk a Sayull t'a lebg mam nebã rĩmã yĩnga. Bala, yẽnda basa maam n ka sak mam noorã ye.» A Sãmwɛll sũurã sãama ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Yẽnda kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋngã tõre." 
1Samuel15:12 A Sãmwɛll yika yibeoog pĩnda, n na n tɩ seg a Sayulli. La b yeela yẽnda t'a Sayull kẽnga Karmell n tɩ me bõn-naandg a meng waoogr yĩnga, n lebg n kẽng Gilgalle." 
1Samuel15:13 A Sãmwɛll kẽnga a Sayull nengẽ, la a Sayull yeel-a lame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning y zug barka! Mam maana Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã.»" 
1Samuel15:14 A Sãmwɛll sokame: «Yaa bõe rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd yãbr la mam sẽn wʋmdã?» 
1Samuel15:15 La a Sayull leokame: «Yaa rũms nebã sẽn tall Amalɛk-rãmbã nengẽ n wa. B basa rũm-bãoonegã, la rũm-bɛd nins sẽn yaa sõama wã, n na n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã. La rũms a taabã sẽn kellã, tõnd kʋ-b-la zãnga.»" 
1Samuel15:16 A Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Yals tɩ m togs-f bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilg maam yʋngẽ.» A Sayull yeelame t'a togse. 
1Samuel15:17 Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll yeelame: «Ka fo sẽn wa n tagsdẽ tɩ f ka fɩ wã la f lebg Israyɛll buudã naab sɩda? Ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk foom tɩ f lebg Israyɛll rĩm sɩda?" 
1Samuel15:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma foom, n yeel-f tɩ f kẽng n tɩ sãam Amalɛk-rãmbã sẽn yaa nin-wẽnsã, la f zab ne-b n menes-b zãnga." 
1Samuel15:19 La yaa bõe tɩ fo ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore? Yaa bõe tɩ f zoe n bir paoongã, n maan sẽn yaa wẽng n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo?»" 
1Samuel15:20 A Sayull leoka a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Mam saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore. Mam kẽnga zĩig ning bãmb sẽn tʋm maamã, la m waa ne a Agaag sẽn yaa Amalɛk-rãmbã rĩmã, la m kʋʋ Amalɛk nebã zãnga." 
1Samuel15:21 La yaa nebã n yãk rũm-bãoonegã ne rũm-bɛd nins sẽn yaa sõama wã, n na n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã Gilgalle.»" 
1Samuel15:22 A Sãmwɛll yeelame: «Dẽ yĩnga, maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne maand a taab nooma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur n yɩɩd bãmb goamã sakr sɩda? Gese! Sakr yɩɩda maando, la kelgr yɩɩda pe-raad kaam." 
1Samuel15:23 Bala, kɩɩsg yaa wẽng wa bagr bʋgb sẽn yaa wẽngã, la tõdgr yaa wẽnga, wa bõn-naands pʋʋsg sẽn yaa wẽngã. La fo sẽn zãgs Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã yĩnga, bãmb me basa foom tɩ f ka na n leb n yɩ rĩm ye.»" 
1Samuel15:24 Dẽ, a Sayull yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Mam beegame, bala, mam kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore, la m kɩɩs yãmb goamã. Mam zoee nebã n sak n maan b sẽn datã." 
1Samuel15:25 Moasã, mam kotame tɩ y kõ-m sugr m beegrã yĩnga, la y lebg n wa yãag-m tɩ m tɩ wõgemd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n waoog-ba.»" 
1Samuel15:26 A Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Mam ka na n yãag foom ye. Bala, fo kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore, la bãmb me basa foom, tɩ f ka na n leb n yɩ Israyɛll buudã rĩm ye.»" 
1Samuel15:27 La a Sãmwɛll sẽn lebg t'a na n looge, a Sayull gãda a fuugã noor n tak tɩ kẽege." 
1Samuel15:28 A Sãmwɛll yeel-a lame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n deega fo naamã rũndã, n kõ ned a to sẽn são foom." 
1Samuel15:29 Soab ning sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam wakat sẽn ka sɛtã ka yagd zĩrẽ, la b ka ninsaal n na n maan b bãngẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel15:30 A Sayull leb n yeelame: «Mam beegame! La baoosgo, mam kot-y lame, tɩ m nebã kãsem-dãmbã ne Israyɛll buudã fãa taoore, bɩ y ra ning-m yãnd ye. Lebg-y n wa-y n yãag-y-m tɩ m tɩ waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã.»" 
1Samuel15:31 Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll lebg n tũ a Sayull t'a tɩ wõgemd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n waoog-ba." 
1Samuel15:32 A Sãmwɛll yeelame tɩ b tall a Agaag sẽn yaa Amalɛk-rãmbã rĩmã n wa. A Agaag kolga ne sũ-noogo, n tagsdẽ tɩ b ka na n leb n kʋ-a ye." 
1Samuel15:33 La a Sãmwɛll yeel-a lame: «Wa fo sʋʋgã sẽn kʋ neb wʋsg n kɩt tɩ b ma-rãmbã kong b kambã, woto me, fo ma wã me na n konga a biigã.» Dẽ, a Sãmwɛll kʋʋ a Agaag Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Gilgalle." 
1Samuel15:34 A Sãmwɛll kẽnga Rama, la a Sayull lebg n kuila a yir Gɩbeya." 
1Samuel15:35 A Samwɛll kiime n ka tol n leb n kẽng a Sayull nengẽ ye. A Sãmwɛll yãba a Sayull yĩng wʋsgo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sãama ne b menga, bãmb sẽn yãk a Sayull t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã yĩnga." 
1Samuel16:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Fo na n yãba a Sayull yĩng hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Mam zãgsame t'a ka na n leb n yɩ Israyɛll rĩm ye. Pids f yɩɩllã kaam n yik n sɩng kẽnde, tɩ mam tʋmda foom a Izayi zakẽ wã Betlehɛm. Bala, mam yãnda biig a yembr yẽnda kom-dibli wã sʋk mam sẽn yãk t'a na n yɩ rĩmã.»" 
1Samuel16:2 A Sãmwɛll yeelame: «Mam na n maana a wãn n kẽnge? A Sayull sã n bãnge, a na kʋ maam.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame: «Tall nag-sadg n kẽnge, la f yeel tɩ f waame n na n maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel16:3 La f bool a Izayi t'a wa maoongã zĩigẽ. Yaa mam mengã n na n wilg foom bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn segd n maane, la f ning soab ning m sẽn na n wilg foomã zug rĩung kaam." 
1Samuel16:4 A Sãmwɛll maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel t'a maan bũmb ningã. Yẽnda kẽnga Betlehɛm, la tẽngã kãsem-dãmb yiime n seg-a ne rabeem n digda, la b sok-a lame yaa: «Yaa noog tɩ y wat kaanẽ?»" 
1Samuel16:5 A Sãmwɛll leokame: «Yaa noogo. Mam waame n na n maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Yɩlg-y y mens n tũ maam tɩ d kẽng maoongã zĩigẽ.» A Sãmwɛll kɩtame t'a Izayi ne a kambã me yɩlg b mense, t'a peeg-b n kẽng maoongã zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel16:6 La bãmb sẽn ta beenẽ, a Sãmwɛll gesa a Eliyaab n tags a sũurẽ yaa: «Hakɩɩka, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk-a soabã la sẽn be bãmb taoorã.»" 
1Samuel16:7 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Da ges a ra-sãndã ne a woglmã ye. Bala, mam zãgs-a lame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka get wa ninsaal sẽn getã ye. Ninsaal geta sẽn be ra-sãnde, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab geta sũuri.»" 
1Samuel16:8 A Izayi boola a biig a Abinadaab t'a kolg a Sãmwɛll taoore. 
1Samuel16:9 La a Sãmwɛll yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka yãk bi-kãngã me ye.» Dẽ, a Izayi kɩtame t'a biig a Sama kolge, la a Sãmwɛll yeelame tɩ leb n ka yẽnda me la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãkɩ ye." 
1Samuel16:10 A Izayi kɩtame t'a kom-dibli a yopoe wã kolg a Sãmwɛll taoore, la a Sãmwɛll yeela a Izayi yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka yãk ned ba a yembr bãmb sʋkã ye.»" 
1Samuel16:11 La a Sãmwɛll soka a Izayi yaa: «Yaa yãmb kom-dibli wã tɛk la woto bɩ?» La yẽnda leokame: «Yao-zʋʋgã bal n kete, la a gũuda piisi.» La a Sãmwɛll yeela a Izayi yaa: «Tʋm tɩ b tɩ tall-a n wa, bala, tõnd ka na n tol n zĩndi, sã n ka yẽnda n wa ye.»" 
1Samuel16:12 Dẽ, a Izayi tʋmame tɩ b tɩ tall-a n wa. La a Davɩɩd dag n yaa moeega, t'a ninã ne a mengã be ra-sãnde. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Sãmwɛll yaa: «Yik n ning rĩung kaam a zugu, bala, yaa yẽnda la mam yãk yã.»" 
1Samuel16:13 A Sãmwɛll dɩka yɩɩllã ne kaamã, n pʋdg yẽnda zug a ba-biisã nifẽ. Sẽn sɩng ne badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã kẽ a Davɩɩde. La a Sãmwɛll yikame n lebg n leb Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã sẽn yi n bas a Sayullã, sɩ-wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tʋm n wa n kẽ-a, n kẽesd-a rabeem-kãsenga." 
1Samuel16:15 A Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã yeel-a lame yaa: «Sɩ-wẽng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋmã kẽe yãmb n kẽesd-y rabeem-kãsengã.» 
1Samuel16:16 D soaala, d kotame tɩ y kõ-d noore, tɩ d bee ka yãmb yĩnga. Tõnd na n baoo bi-bɩɩg sẽn mi kʋnd wẽebo, tɩ sɩ-wẽnsã sã n wa yik-yã, bɩ a wẽ kʋndã tɩ y paam yolsgo.»" 
1Samuel16:17 A Sayull leoka a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «M kotame tɩ y bao ned sẽn mi kʋnd wẽeb sõama n tall-a t'a wa.» 
1Samuel16:18 Dẽ, yẽnda tʋmtʋmd a ye yeelame: «Mam yãnda Betlehɛm tẽng rao a Izayi biig a ye sẽn mi kʋnd wẽeb sõama. A yaa gãndaoog n mi zabr sõama, a mii goamã, a yaa ra-sãnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne-a.»" 
1Samuel16:19 A Sayull tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Izayi t'a kõ yẽnda a biig a Davɩɩd sẽn gũud piisã. 
1Samuel16:20 A Izayi baoo bõanga, n zɩlg bur ne ko-waoog sẽn pid ne reezẽ rãam, n paas bulla, n tʋm a biig a Davɩɩd t'a tɩ kõ a Sayulli." 
1Samuel16:21 A Davɩɩd sẽn ta a Sayull nengẽ, a Sayull sũurã yɩɩ noog ne-a wʋsgo, t'a kɩt t'a lebg a rakõor n zãad yẽnda zab-teedã." 
1Samuel16:22 A Sayull tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Izayi yaa: «Mam kotame tɩ f bas a Davɩɩd t'a pa ne maam, bala, a taa mam yam.»" 
1Samuel16:23 Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋm sɩ-wẽng ning tɩ wa kẽ a Sayullã sã n wa namsd-a, a Davɩɩd rɩkda a kʋndã n wẽ, tɩ sɩ-wẽngã yi n bas-a." 
1Samuel17:1 Filistẽ-dãmbã tigma b tãb-biisã n na n kẽng zabre. Bãmb tigma taab Soko sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, la b tilga b tãb-sik Efɛɛz-Damim sẽn be Soko ne Azeka sʋkã." 
1Samuel17:2 La a Sayull ne Israyɛll nebã me tigmame. Bãmb tilga b tãb-sikã Terebẽnt tɩɩsã longẽ wã, n na n zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã."
