1Samuel17:3 Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n bee tãng a yembr zugu, tɩ Israyɛll nebã rag n be tãng a to zugu, la long n dag n be bãmb sʋka." 
1Samuel17:4 Gãndaoog a yembr n yi Filistẽ-dãmbã sʋka, n kolg Israyɛll nebã. Yẽnda yʋʋr yaa a Golyate, n yit Gat soolem, t'a woglem dag n tat kãntɩɩg a yoobe, la nug-yakemde." 
1Samuel17:5 Yẽnda rag n fõgna zũud pugla, n yeelg fuug sẽn maan ne zũudu, t'a zɩslmã tat kɩlo pis-yoobe." 
1Samuel17:6 Yẽnda karsã rag n luda ne zũudu, la a rag n boba zũud kãn-dibga." 
1Samuel17:7 La yẽnda kãndã raoog taglem rag n taa koeer bõanga, la a kãn-bilã zɩslem rag n yɩɩda kɩlo a yopoe. Ned n dag n be yẽnda taoor n zãad gãn-bedrã." 
1Samuel17:8 Yẽnda yalsame, n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne Israyɛll nebã n yeel yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb sũ tãpo? Ka maam la Filistẽ daoã tɩ yãmb yaa a Sayull yembsã la? Yãk-y ned a ye t'a wa zab ne maam." 
1Samuel17:9 Yẽnda sã n zab ne maam n tõog n kʋ maam, tõnd na n yɩɩ yãmb yembse. La mam sã n tõog-a, mam sã n zab ne-a n tõoge, yãmb na n yɩɩ tõnd yembse.»" 
1Samuel17:10 Filistẽ daoã leb n yeelame: «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sã n yaa raopa, bɩ y yãk ned a ye rũndã t'a wa tɩ d zab ne taaba.»" 
1Samuel17:11 A Sayull ne Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn wʋm Filistẽ daoã goamã, bãmb pɛlengã yɩkame tɩ rabeem-kãseng kẽ-ba." 
1Samuel17:12 A Davɩɩd dag n yaa Efrat ned a Izayi sẽn be Zʋʋda Betlehɛmã biiga. A Izayi rag n tara kom-dibli a nii, la a Sayull wakatẽ wã, a Izayi rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo." 
1Samuel17:13 A Izayi kom-dibl-kãsems a tãabã rag n tũ a Sayull n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ. Yẽnda kom-dibli a tãabã sẽn kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ wã yʋy la woto: bi-kãsengã yaa a Eliyaabe, tɩ yiibẽ soabã yaa a Abinadaabe, tɩ tãabẽ soabã yaa a Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 A Davɩɩd n dag n yaa yao-zʋʋga. Yẽnda kẽem-dãmb a tãabã rag n tũ a Sayulli. 
1Samuel17:15 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd dag n kẽnda a Sayull nengẽ, la a lebgd n wat Betlehɛm n gũud a ba wã piisi." 
1Samuel17:16 Yibeoog ne zaabr fãa, Filistẽ daoã rag n yit n kolga Israyɛll nebã n yasẽ. Yẽnda maana a woto rasem pis-naase." 
1Samuel17:17 A Izayi yeela a biig a Davɩɩd yaa: «M kotame tɩ f rɩk ka-sẽedmã ne peoogã, la bur piigã n zoe n kẽng tãb-sikẽ wã n tɩ kõ f kẽem-dãmbã," 
1Samuel17:18 la f tall formaaz-gil piiga, n tɩ kõ b tãb-biis tusr naabã, la f ges f kẽem-dãmbã n bãng b keelem, la f lebg n wa ne b nug bũmb sẽn wilgd tɩ b tara laafɩ.»" 
1Samuel17:19 A Davɩɩd kẽem-dãmbã rag n bee ne a Sayull ne Israyɛll nebã Terebẽnt tɩɩsã longẽ wã n zabd ne Filistẽ-dãmbã. 
1Samuel17:20 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd sãda yibeoog pĩnda, n bas a piisã ne ned a to la a rɩk rɩɩbã n kẽnge, wa a ba wã sẽn yeel-a wã. Yẽnda sẽn wa n ta tãb-sikẽ wã tɩ Israyɛll nebã yiime n kaasd n dabd zabrã zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel17:21 Israyɛll nebã ne Filistẽ-dãmbã yiime, n teedg n tees taab n na n zabe." 
1Samuel17:22 A Davɩɩd sika a rɩɩbã n bas ne ned ning sẽn gũud teedã, la a wudg n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ. A sẽn ta beenẽ, a pʋʋsa a kẽem-dãmbã n sok b keelem." 
1Samuel17:23 Yẽnda sẽn wa n gomd ne bãmbã wakate, Filistẽ gãndaoogã sẽn yaa Gat tẽng rao t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Golyatã leb n yii Filistẽ-dãmbã sʋka, n gom goam nins a sẽn mi n gomd daar fãa wã, la a Davɩɩd wʋmame." 
1Samuel17:24 Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yã Filistẽ-dãmbã raoã, bãmb zoeeme n leb poorẽ, bala, rabeem-kãseng n kẽ-ba." 
1Samuel17:25 Israyɛll nebã rag n yetame: Yãmb nee rao-kãngã sẽn watã? Yẽnda wat n na n baoo Israyɛll nebã noore. Ned ning sẽn na n tõog-a n kʋ rao-kãngã, rĩmã na n kõ a soab arzegs wʋsgo, la a rɩk a bi-pugl n kõ-a t'a maan a paga, la b kɩt t'a ba wã ra leb n yao yõor yaood ye." 
1Samuel17:26 A Davɩɩd soka neb nins sẽn dag n pẽ yẽnda wã yaa: «Ned sã n tõog n kʋ Filistẽ dao-kãngã n dok Israyɛll nebã yãndã, b na n kõ a soab bõe? Filistẽ nin-kãngã yaa ãnda, n paoogd Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ tãb-biisã? Ned sẽn ka kẽ bãongo!»" 
1Samuel17:27 Nebã leb n dɩka a Sayull sẽn yeelã, n togs a Davɩɩd bũmb nins b sẽn na n kõ a soab ning sẽn na n kʋ Filistẽ daoã." 
1Samuel17:28 A Davɩɩd kẽem a Eliyaab sẽn wʋm goam nins a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n gomd ne nebã, a sũurã yika ne a Davɩɩd t'a yeele: «Fo waa ka n na n maan bõe? Fo basa piisã ne ãnda we-raoogẽ wã? Mam mii fo wilg-m-mengã ne f yam-yoodã yelle. Yaa zabrã la fo wa n na n gese.»" 
1Samuel17:29 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Mam maana bõe bala? M yaa n ka tõe n sok n bãng bũmbu?» 
1Samuel17:30 La a Davɩɩd wẽnemdame n sok ned a to sok-kãense. La b leoka yẽnda wa pĩnd soabã bala. 
1Samuel17:31 Neb nins sẽn wʋm a Davɩɩd goamã kẽng n tɩ togsa a Sayulli, la a Sayull yeelame tɩ b tɩ bool-a t'a wa." 
1Samuel17:32 A Davɩɩd yeela a Sayull yaa: «Bɩ ned ba a yembr sũur da sãam Filistẽ nin-kãngã yĩng ye. Mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã na n kẽngame n tɩ zab ne-a.» 
1Samuel17:33 La a Sayull yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Fo ka tõe n tɩ zab ne nin-kãngã ye. Bala, fo yaa biiga, la yẽnda yaa rao sẽn zãms zabr hal a yãadem wakate.»" 
1Samuel17:34 A Davɩɩd yeela a Sayull yaa: «Mam sẽn gũud m ba wã piisã, gɩgemd bɩ rigd-n-yĩidg sã n wa yõk rũnga," 
1Samuel17:35 mam digd-a lame n pãb n deeg rũngã a noorẽ wã. La a sã n dat n zab ne maam, mam gãta a lɛlmã n pãb-a n kʋ." 
1Samuel17:36 Yaa woto la mam maan n kʋ gɩgmã ne kata. La a na n yɩɩ woto me ne Filistẽ nin-kãngã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã, bala, yẽnda paooga Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã tãb-biisi!»" 
1Samuel17:37 A Davɩɩd leb n yeelame yaa: «Wẽnnaam ning sẽn fãag-a maam ne gɩgmã wã la rigd-n-yĩidsã na n fãaga maam ne Filistẽ nin-kãngã me.» Dẽ, a Sayull yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Bɩ f kẽnge, la bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne foom!»" 
1Samuel17:38 A Sayull yeesa a zab-teedã n yeelg a Davɩɩde. Yẽnda fõgna a Davɩɩd zũud pugla, la a loe-a ne kut gãntika." 
1Samuel17:39 Yẽnda rɩka a Sayull zabr sʋʋgã n sẽbg a sɛɛga. La a Davɩɩd makame n na n kẽne, la a ka tõog ye, a sẽn ka minimã yĩnga. Dẽ, a yeela a Sayull yaa: «Mam ka tõe n tall te-kãensã fãa n kẽn ye. Bala, mam ka minim ye.» Woto, yẽnda yees-b lame n dʋʋge," 
1Samuel17:40 la a rɩk a rasaare, n kẽng ko-soogẽ wã n tɩ wʋk kug-saal a nu, n sui a rũm-kɩɩm-korgẽ wã. La yẽnda rag n zãada a loaabgã n kolgd Filistẽ daoã." 
1Samuel17:41 Filistẽ daoã kɩtame tɩ ned lʋɩ a taoor n zãad a gãntikã, t'a kolgd a Davɩɩd bilf-bilfu." 
1Samuel17:42 Filistẽ daoã sẽn yã a Davɩɩdã, a ka nan-a ye. A gesame t'a Davɩɩd yaa moeeg sẽn tar ra-sãnd bala." 
1Samuel17:43 La Filistẽ daoã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam yaa baag la, tɩ fo wat n na n zab ne maam ne rasaba?» Yẽnda kãaba a Davɩɩd ne Filistẽ-dãmbã wẽnnaam-dãmb yʋʋre." 
1Samuel17:44 Filistẽ daoã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Wa tɩ m na n kʋ-f lame, n kõ yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms tɩ b rɩ.»" 
1Samuel17:45 A Davɩɩd yeela Filistẽ daoã yaa: «Fo segda maam ne zabr sʋʋga, la ne kãnd ne kãn-dibga, la maam, mam segda foom ne Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll tãb-biisã Wẽnnaamã fo sẽn paoogdã yʋʋre." 
1Samuel17:46 Rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ m tõog-fo. Mam na n kʋ-f lame n fiuug f zugã. La mam na n kʋʋ Filistẽ tãb-biisã b tãb-sikẽ wã, n kõ yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms tɩ b rɩ. Woto, dũniyã neb fãa na n bãngame tɩ Israyɛll tara Wẽnnaam." 
1Samuel17:47 La neb nins fãa sẽn be kaanẽ wã na n bãngame tɩ ka ne sʋʋg wall kãnd la Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãagd b nebã ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so zabrã, la yaa bãmb n kɩt tɩ d na n tõog yãmba.»" 
1Samuel17:48 Filistẽ daoã sẽn leb n kẽnd n kolgd a Davɩɩde, a Davɩɩd wudga tao-tao n seg yẽnda n na n zab ne-a." 
1Samuel17:49 A Davɩɩd tʋma a nug a korgã pʋgẽ, n yãk kugr n ning a loaabgẽ wã n lobg-a, tɩ kugrã yõg Filistẽ daoã rĩiri, n võd n kẽ pʋgẽ t'a lʋɩ a yão-vãbga." 
1Samuel17:50 Woto, yɩɩ ne loaabg la kugri, la a Davɩɩd tõog Filistẽ daoã. Yẽnda kʋ-a lame tɩ ka tũ ne zabr sʋʋg ye." 
1Samuel17:51 A Davɩɩd wudgame n tɩ yals Filistẽ daoã zugẽ, n wõog raoã sʋʋg n kʋ-a n baase, la a fiuug a zugã. Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn yã tɩ b gãndaoogã kiime wã, b zoeeme." 
1Samuel17:52 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã ne Zʋʋda nebã kaasame, la b rig Filistẽ-dãmbã hal n tɩ tãag longẽ wã, ne Ekrõ tẽngã noyã. Filistẽ-dãmbã kũum yɛdga Sarayim sorã zug hal n tãag Gat ne Ekrõ." 
1Samuel17:53 Israyɛll nebã riga Filistẽ-dãmbã ne sũuri, la b lebg n kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikẽ n wʋk b teedã." 
1Samuel17:54 A Davɩɩd talla Filistẽ daoã zug n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, la yẽnda bĩnga raoã zab-teed a fu-roogẽ wã." 
1Samuel17:55 A Sayull sẽn wa n yãnd t'a Davɩɩd rabd n na n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ daoã, yẽnda soka a tãb-biis naab a Abneer yaa: «Abneere, bi-bɩ-kãngã yaa ãnda biiga?» La a Abneer leokame: «N-na, m wẽendame tɩ m ka mi ye.»" 
1Samuel17:56 La rĩmã yeela a Abneer t'a sok n bãng a sẽn yaa ned ning biiga. 
1Samuel17:57 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd sẽn kʋ Filistẽ gãndaoogã n lebg n watẽ, a Abneer tall-a lame n kẽng a Sayull nengẽ. A Davɩɩd dag n zãada Filistẽ daoã zugu." 
1Samuel17:58 A Sayull sok-a lame yaa: «M biig sõngo, fo yaa ãnda biiga?» La a Davɩɩd leokame: «Mam yaa Betlehɛm tẽng rao a Izayi sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã biiga.»" 
1Samuel18:1 A Davɩɩd sẽn gom ne a Sayull n sɛ wã poore, a Zonatã yamã kẽ a Davɩɩde, t'a nong-a wa a menga." 
1Samuel18:2 Badaar bala, a Sayull reega a Davɩɩd a nengẽ, n ka bas-a t'a leb a ba wã zakẽ ye." 
1Samuel18:3 A Zonatã maana kaool ne a Davɩɩde, yẽnda sẽn nong-a wa a mengã yĩnga." 
1Samuel18:4 Yẽnda yeega a fu-bedrã ne zab-futã, la a sʋʋgã ne a tãpã la a sẽbdgã, n kõ a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel18:5 A Sayull sẽn tʋm a Davɩɩd zĩig ning fãa, a paamda tõogre. Dẽ, a Sayull kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd lebg tãb-biisã naaba. La nebã fãa rag n nong-a lame, hal baa ne a Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã." 
1Samuel18:6 A Davɩɩd sẽn kʋ Filistẽ daoã n sɛ tɩ nebã yi zabrã zĩigẽ n lebg n kuiisẽ wã, pagbã yii Israyɛll tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, n yɩɩndẽ la b saood n segd rĩm a Sayulli, la b wẽed sɩlsãgs ne kʋla, la b kilsdẽ." 
1Samuel18:7 Pagbã yɩɩnda ne sũ-noog n sokd taaba, la b yetẽ yaa: «A Sayull kʋʋ tusri, t'a Davɩɩd kʋ tus piiga.»" 
1Samuel18:8 Gom-kãng kɩtame t'a Sayull sũurã yik wʋsgo, t'a yeele: «B yetame t'a Davɩɩd n kʋ tus piiga, tɩ mam kʋ tusri. A sẽn ka tar bũmb ning yaa naamã bala.»" 
1Samuel18:9 Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne badaare, a Sayull dag n geta a Davɩɩd ne gũus-m-menga." 
1Samuel18:10 Vẽkembeoogo, sɩ-wẽngã Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋmã wa n kẽ a Sayulli, t'a yik n sɩng biulung a roogã pʋgẽ. La a Davɩɩd wẽe kʋnde, wa yẽnda sẽn mi n maand wakat fãa wã. La a Sayull dag n zãada kãnd a nugẽ." 
1Samuel18:11 A Sayull zẽka a kãndã n tão a Davɩɩd la a yet a sũurẽ: «Mam na n tãoo a Davɩɩd n ka-a ne roogã.» La a Davɩɩd kuuga naoor a yiib tɩ kãndã ka paam-a ye. 
1Samuel18:12 A Sayull dag n zoeta a Davɩɩde, bala, yẽnda bãngame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne a Davɩɩde, n yaool n bas yẽnda a Sayulli." 
1Samuel18:13 A Sayull kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd yi a zakẽ wã, n lebg tãb-biis naaba. La a Davɩɩd dag n lʋɩta nebã taoor tɩ b kẽnd n zabdẽ la b watẽ." 
1Samuel18:14 A Davɩɩd dag n paamda tõogr ne bũmb fãa, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne yẽnda." 
1Samuel18:15 A Sayull sẽn yã t'a Davɩɩd paamda tõogr wakat fãa wã, a rag n zoet-a-la wʋsgo." 
1Samuel18:16 La Israyɛll nebã ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa rag n nonga a Davɩɩde, yẽnda sẽn lʋɩt bãmb taoor tɩ b kẽnd n zabdẽ la b watẽ wã yĩnga." 
1Samuel18:17 A Sayull yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Ad mam bi-pugl-kãseng a Meraabe. Mam na n dɩk-a lame n kõ foom tɩ f maan f paga. Fo we n yɩ gãndaoog n tʋm mam yĩnga, la f zab Sẽn-Ka-Saab zabã. A Sayull dag n tagsdame tɩ we n da tũ ne yẽnda nug t'a Davɩɩd ki ye. Bala, a rag n datame tɩ tũ ne Filistẽ-dãmbã nugu.»" 
1Samuel18:18 A Davɩɩd yeela a Sayull yaa: «Mam yaa ãnda, la mam buudã ne m ba wã zak rãmb yaa ãnda rãmb Israyɛll buudã sʋka, tɩ mam na n lebg rĩmã rɛɛmba?»" 
1Samuel18:19 La wakat ning b sẽn da tog dɩk a Sayull bi-pugl a Meraab n kõ a Davɩɩdã sẽn ta, b rɩk-a lame n kõ Mehola rao a Adriyɛll t'a maan a paga." 
1Samuel18:20 A Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall dag n nonga a Davɩɩde. Dẽ, b togsa a Sayulli, la bõn-kãng taa rĩmã yam." 
1Samuel18:21 A Sayull rag n yeta a sũurẽ woto: «Mam na n dɩka m bi-pugl a Mikall n kõ a Davɩɩd tɩ yɩ bẽdg a yĩnga, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã paam-a n kʋ.» La a Sayull leb n yeela a Davɩɩd naoor a yiibẽ soab t'a na n dɩka a biigã n kõ-a t'a lebg a rɛɛmba." 
1Samuel18:22 A Sayull yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b soos n wɩdg a Davɩɩde, n yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd ne rĩmã nong-f lame, la bɩ f reeg rĩmã bi-pugl n maan f paga, n lebg rĩmã rɛɛmba.»" 
1Samuel18:23 A Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã goma woto ne a Davɩɩde, la a Davɩɩd leoka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ yaa nana tɩ lebg rĩm dɛɛmb la? Mam yaa naong soaba, la sẽn paas me, mam yaa talga.»" 
1Samuel18:24 A Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã togs-a-la a Davɩɩd sẽn gom bũmb ninsã. 
1Samuel18:25 La a Sayull yeela bãmb tɩ b tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd yaa: «Rĩmã ka baood pʋʋsem sẽn kẽed ne yi-kãadmã wɛɛngẽ ye. Rĩmã sẽn dat bala, yaa tɩ f wa ne Filistẽ-dãmbã yo-gãnd koabga, tɩ b rok b sũur ne b bɛɛbã.» A Sayull dag n tagsdame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã na n tõog n kʋ a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel18:26 A Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã taasa a Davɩɩd gom-kãense, la yellã ta a Davɩɩd yam t'a na n deeg rĩmã biiga, n lebg rĩmã rɛɛmba. La sẽn deng wakat ning b sẽn yãkã taabo," 
1Samuel18:27 a Davɩɩd yika ne a tãb-biisã n tɩ kʋ Filistẽ-dãmb kobessi. Yẽnda talla b fãa yo-gãnã n wa kõ rĩmã, la b sõd-b-la rĩmã taoore, t'a Davɩɩd tõe n lebg rĩmã rɛɛmba. Dẽ, a Sayull dɩka a Mikall n kõ a Davɩɩd t'a maan a paga." 
1Samuel18:28 A Sayull yãame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne a Davɩɩde, la yẽnda bi-pugl a Mikall dag n nonga a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel18:29 Dẽ, a Sayull dag n zoeta a Davɩɩd n paasdẽ, la yẽnda kisga a Davɩɩd a vɩɩmã tɛka." 
1Samuel18:30 La wakat-kãng tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs rag n yitame n zabd ne Israyɛll nebã. La b sã n tɩ zab fãa, a Davɩɩd tõogdame n yɩɩd a Sayull tʋmtʋmdb a taabã fãa, la yẽnda yʋʋrã rag n yii wʋsgo." 
1Samuel19:1 A Sayull yeela a biig a Zonatã ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa, tɩ yẽnda rat n kʋ a Davɩɩde. La a Zonatã sẽn yaa a Sayull biigã yaool n dag n nonga a Davɩɩd hal wʋsgo." 
1Samuel19:2 A Zonatã rɩka yellã n taas a Davɩɩde, la a yeel a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam ba a Sayull dat n kʋʋ foom. Dẽ wã, m kotame tɩ beoog yibeoogo, bɩ f maan gũusgu, n bao zĩig n solge." 
1Samuel19:3 Mam na n yiime n yals m ba wã sɛɛgẽ, pʋʋg ning fo sẽn na n zĩndẽ wã. Mam na n goma fo yell ne bãmb n bãng b ratmã, n yaool n wa togs foom.»" 
1Samuel19:4 A Zonatã pẽga a Davɩɩd a ba a Sayull taoor n yeele: «N-na, m kotame tɩ y ra maan y tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd wẽng ye. Bala, a ka beeg-y ye. Yẽnda maana yãmb neer wʋsgo." 
1Samuel19:5 Yẽnda gẽnega a yõore, n kʋ Filistẽ daoã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab tall-a lame n wa ne fãag-kãseng Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga. Yãmb yãnda bõn-kãng tɩ y sũurã yɩ noog hal wʋsgo. La maana a wãn moasã, tɩ y rat n maan wẽnga, n kʋ a Davɩɩd n daag bʋʋm soab zɩɩm zaalem?»" 
1Samuel19:6 A Sayull kelga a Zonatã goamã, la a wẽen n yeele: «Ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, mam ka na n kʋ a Davɩɩd ye!»" 
1Samuel19:7 Dẽ, a Zonatã boola a Davɩɩd n togs-a gom-kãens fãa, la a tall-a n leb a Sayull nengẽ, t'a tɩ maand a tʋʋmdã wa pĩndã." 
1Samuel19:8 Zabrã leb n yikame, t'a Davɩɩd kẽng n na n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã. A Davɩɩd paama tõog-kãsenga, n kʋ b neb wʋsgo, la a rig-b tɩ b zoe." 
1Samuel19:9 La sɩ-wẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n tʋmã leb n kẽ a Sayulli, a sẽn wa n zĩ a roogẽ wã n zãad a kãndã, la a Davɩɩd me rag n wẽeda a kʋndã." 
1Samuel19:10 A Sayull rag n dat n dɩdga a Davɩɩd ne roogã n tão ne a kãndã n kʋ. La a Davɩɩd kuugame tɩ kãndã yõg roogã. Woto, a Davɩɩd yiime n zoe ne yʋngã n põse." 
1Samuel19:11 A Sayull tʋma neb ne yʋngã, tɩ b gũus a Davɩɩd a zakẽ wã tɩ vẽkembeoogã yibeoog bɩ b kʋ-a. La a Mikall sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd pagã rɩka yellã n wilg a Davɩɩde, n yeel-a yaa: «Yʋn-kãngã tɩ yãmb sã n ka zoe, beoogo y na n yɩɩ kũum.»" 
1Samuel19:12 Dẽ, a Mikall kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd tũ roogã võorẽ n sig n zoe, n paam n põse." 
1Samuel19:13 La a Mikall rɩka bõn-naandg n gãneg a Davɩɩd gãagẽ wã, n kʋgl-a ne zu-kʋk sẽn maan ne bʋʋg kõbdo, n yaool n bao fu-goabg n pil-a." 
1Samuel19:14 A Sayull tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yõk a Davɩɩde, la a Mikall yeelame t'a Davɩɩd ka keem ye." 
1Samuel19:15 Dẽ, a Sayull leb n tʋma nebã tɩ b tɩ ges a Davɩɩde. Yẽnda yeela bãmb yaa: «Bɩ y tɩ tall a Davɩɩd ne a gãagã fãa n wa tɩ m kʋ-a.»" 
1Samuel19:16 B sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã kẽ a Davɩɩd doogẽ wã, la b yãame tɩ bõn-naandg n be gãagã zugu, tɩ bʋʋg kõbd be a zugã tẽngre." 
1Samuel19:17 A Sayull soka a Mikall yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo belg maam a woto tɩ m bɛ wã põse?» La a Mikall leokame yaa: «A Davɩɩd yeelame tɩ m sã n ka bas-a t'a looge, a na n kʋ-m lame.»" 
1Samuel19:18 Yɩɩ woto t'a Davɩɩd tõog n zoe n põse. Dẽ, yẽnda kẽnga a Sãmwɛll nengẽ Rama n tɩ wilg-a bũmb nins fãa a Sayull sẽn maan yẽnda wã. La yẽnda tũ a Sãmwɛll n tɩ zĩnd Nayote." 
1Samuel19:19 B wa n togsa a Sayull t'a Davɩɩd bee Nayot sẽn be Rama wã. 
1Samuel19:20 Dẽ, a Sayull tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yõk a Davɩɩde. La nin-kãens yãnda Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb wʋsg tɩ b maand no-rɛɛs manesem, la a Sãmwɛll n dag n yaa bãmb taoor soaba. Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kẽe bãmba, tɩ bãmb me sɩng n maand no-rɛɛs manesem." 
1Samuel19:21 B rɩka yellã n tɩ togs a Sayulli, la yẽnda leb n tʋma neb a taaba, la bãmb me sɩng n maanda no-rɛɛsdb manesem. A Sayull leb n tʋma neb naoor a tãabẽ soaba, la bãmb me sɩngame n maand no-rɛɛsdb manesem." 
1Samuel19:22 Dẽ, a Sayull kẽnga Rama a toore, la yẽnda sẽn ta bul-kẽengã sẽn be Seku wã, a sokame yaa: «A Sãmwɛll ne a Davɩɩd bee yɛɛnẽ?» La b leokame tɩ b bee Nayot sẽn be Rama wã." 
1Samuel19:23 Woto, a Sayull yii be n kẽng Nayot sẽn be Rama wã. Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kẽe yẽnda me, t'a rɩk sorã n kẽnd la a togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam hal n tɩ ta Nayot sẽn be Rama wã." 
1Samuel19:24 Yẽnda sẽn ta beenẽ, yẽnda me yeesa a futu, n sɩng n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam a Sãmwɛll taoore. La yẽnda lʋɩɩme n vãbend n pa be daarã ne yʋngã tõre. Woto n kɩt tɩ nebã wẽed yel-bũnd n yetẽ yaa: «A Sayull me lebga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs la?»" 
1Samuel20:1 A Davɩɩd yii Nayot sẽn be Rama wã n zoe n kẽng a Zonatã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Mam maana bõe? Mam kongrã yaa bõe? Mam maana yel-wẽn-bʋg n beeg y baaba tɩ b rat n kʋ-ma?» 
1Samuel20:2 A Zonatã leoka yẽnda yaa: «A ka na n yɩ a woto ye. Fo ka na n ki ye. M baaba ka maand bũmb tɩ b ka reng n wilg maam ye. Bõe tɩ b na n solg maam yel-kãngã? Yellã ka woto ye.» 
1Samuel20:3 La a Davɩɩd leb n wẽename n yeele: «Yãmb ba wã mii vẽeneg tɩ yãmb nonga maam. Daar ninga, b tagsame tɩ yãmb sã n bãnge, y sũurã na n sãamame. La mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, la ne yãmba, tɩ mam ka leb n zãr ne kũum ye.»" 
1Samuel20:4 La a Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Fo sẽn dat tɩ mam maan bũmb ning fãa, mam na n maaname.»" 
1Samuel20:5 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd leoka a Zonatã yaa: «Ade, beoog yaa ki-paalgã tigri, mam segd n zĩnda ne rĩmã n dɩ. Bas-m tɩ m kẽng weoogẽ wã n tɩ soond hal n tãag rayɩt zaabre." 
1Samuel20:6 La f baaba sã n wa bãng tɩ mam ka be, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ mam kosa yãmb sor ne pẽdgr n kuil m tẽngẽ wã Betlehɛm, bala, yaa m buudã fãa yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd maoong maaneg daare." 
1Samuel20:7 La b sã n yeel tɩ yell ka be, rẽnd b ka rat n maan maam wẽng ye. La b sũurã sã n yiki, bɩ y bãng tɩ b paam n yãka yam, n dat n maan maam wẽnga.»" 
1Samuel20:8 Bɩ y maan y tʋmtʋmdã neere, tõnd sẽn lagem taab n maan kaool Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã yĩnga. Mam sã n maana wẽng bɩ y kʋ-ma. Yaa bõe tɩ y na n tall-m n kẽng y baaba nengẽ?" 
1Samuel20:9 A Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Da tags a woto ye. Ra tẽ tɩ m baaba tõe n dat n maana foom wẽnga, tɩ mam miẽ n yaool n ka wilg-f ye.»" 
1Samuel20:10 A Davɩɩd soka a Zonatã yaa: «La y ba sã n leok yãmb ne sũ-yikri, yaa ãndã n na n wa togs-ma?»" 
1Samuel20:11 A Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Wa tɩ d kẽng weoogẽ wã.» Dẽ, bãmb b yiibã kẽngame." 
1Samuel20:12 A Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, tɩ m na n soka m baaba beoog wall rayɩt woto wẽnde. B sã n ka baood foom ne wẽnga, m na n tʋmame tɩ wa togs-fo." 
1Samuel20:13 Sã n leb n mikame tɩ b rata foom ne wẽng tɩ mam ka tʋm tɩ b wa togs foom, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga. Mam na n togsa foom tɩ f loog ne bãane, la bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne foom wa b sẽn dag n be ne m ba wã." 
1Samuel20:14 La mam vɩɩmã fãa tɛka, bɩ y maan-m neere, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab nimbãan-zoeerã, la y ra kʋ-m ye." 
1Samuel20:15 Baa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n menes yãmb bɛɛbã fãa dũni zugu, bɩ y kell n tall nonglem ne m yirã rãmb wakat fãa. Bɩ y ra bas tɩ m yʋʋrã menem m buudã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel20:16 Dẽ, a Zonatã maana kaool ne a Davɩɩd roogã n yeele: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rok b sũur ne a Davɩɩd bɛɛbã.»" 
1Samuel20:17 A Zonatã kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd leb n wẽen a zoodã yĩnga, bala, yẽnda rag n nonga a Davɩɩd wa a menga." 
1Samuel20:18 A Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Ade, beoog yaa ki-paalgã tigri. La b na n yãame tɩ y ka be be ye. Bala, y zĩigã na n yɩɩ vɩʋʋgo." 
1Samuel20:19 La rayɩta, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ soond zĩig ning yãmb sẽn dag n tɩ soondẽ pĩndã, n pa Ezɛll kugrã poore." 
1Samuel20:20 Mam na n teesa kugrã n tão pɛɛm a tãabo, wa yaa bũmb la m dat n tão." 
1Samuel20:21 Dẽ poore, mam na n tʋma m tʋmtʋmdã t'a tɩ gẽes pɛɛmã. Mam sã n yeel m dakõorã tɩ pɛɛmã be a taoor la a rɩk-ba, bɩ f wa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr tɩ yell ka be ye." 
1Samuel20:22 La mam sã n yeel-a tɩ pɛɛmã bee hal taoore, bɩ f loog tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yet tɩ f looge." 
1Samuel20:23 La sã n yaa ne kaool ning tõnd sẽn maan ne taabã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ tõnd kaset soab wakat fãa.»" 
1Samuel20:24 Woto, a Davɩɩd tɩ soonda weoogã pʋgẽ. Rag n yaa ki-paalgã tigr daare, la rĩmã zĩndame n na n dɩ." 
1Samuel20:25 Rĩmã zĩnda b zĩigẽ, lalgã sɛɛga, wa b sẽn mi n maandẽ wã. A Zonatã yikame t'a Abneer zĩnd n pẽneg rĩm a Sayulli, la a Davɩɩd zĩigã rag n yaa vɩʋʋgo." 
1Samuel20:26 La badaare, a Sayull ka yeel tɩ bũmb ye. Bala, yẽnda rag n tagsdame tɩ daar ninga, tõe t'a Davɩɩd ka yɩlg a meng ye." 
1Samuel20:27 La vẽkembeoogã sẽn yaa ki-paalgã rasem a yiib daarã, a Davɩɩd zĩigã rag n ket n yaa vɩʋʋgo. Dẽ, a Sayull soka a biig a Zonatã yaa: «Maana a wãn t'a Izayi biigã ka wa rɩ zaamẽ ne rũndã fãa?»" 
1Samuel20:28 La a Zonatã leoka a Sayull yaa: «A Davɩɩd kosa maam ne pẽdgr tɩ m kõ-a sor t'a kẽng Betlehɛm. 
1Samuel20:29 A kosame tɩ m bas-a t'a kuili, t'a buudã tara maoong n dat n maane, t'a kẽemã tʋm tɩ b bool-a t'a wa. La a yeelame tɩ m sã n nong-a, bɩ m kõ-a sor t'a kẽng n tɩ ges a kẽem-dãmbã la a lebg n wa. Yaa rẽ n kɩt t'a ka wa n naag rĩmã n na n dɩ ye.»" 
1Samuel20:30 Woto, a Sayull sũurã yika ne a Zonatã t'a yeel-a yaa: «Pʋg-kõb-wẽng pʋg-tõatg biiga, mam miime tɩ fo be a Izayi biigã poorẽ. Fo ninga f meng yãnde, la f ning f ma sẽn dog foomã yãnde." 
1Samuel20:31 A Izayi biigã sã n ket n vɩ, fo kõn tol n paam laafɩ, la fo kõn paam rĩungã me ye. Tʋm neb tɩ b tɩ yõk-a n wa, bala, a toga ne kʋʋbo.»" 
1Samuel20:32 A Zonatã leoka a Sayull yaa: «Yaa bõe yĩng tɩ b rat n kʋ a Davɩɩde? A maana bõe?» 
1Samuel20:33 A Sayull dɩka a kãndã n na n tão a Zonatã. Dẽ, a Zonatã bãngame t'a baaba sɩd yãka yam n dat n kʋ a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel20:34 A Zonatã sũurã yika hal wʋsgo, t'a yik n bas rɩɩbã. Yẽnda ka tol n dɩ ki-paalgã tigr dasem a yiib daarã rɩɩb ye. Yẽnda sũurã sãama a Davɩɩd yĩnga, a ba wã sẽn ning-a yãndã yĩnga." 
1Samuel20:35 Vẽkembeoogã yibeoogo, a Zonatã kẽnga weoogẽ wã, n na n tɩ seg a Davɩɩd wa b sẽn dag n sedã, la bi-bɩɩg a yembr n tũ yẽnda." 
1Samuel20:36 A Zonatã yeela bi-bɩɩgã yaa: «M kotame tɩ f wudg n tɩ wʋk pɛɛm nins mam sẽn na n tão wã n wa.» Dẽ, bi-bɩɩgã zoeeme, la a Zonatã tãoo peemdã tɩ zʋʋg bi-bɩɩgã n tɩ lʋɩ taoore." 
1Samuel20:37 La bi-bɩɩgã sẽn ta zĩig ning peemdã sẽn lʋɩẽ wã, a Zonatã zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: «Peemdã bee hal taoore." 
1Samuel20:38 Zoe tao-tao n da yals ye.» La bi-bɩɩgã wʋka pɛɛmã n wa kɩs a soaal a Zonatã. 
1Samuel20:39 La bi-bɩɩgã ka bãng bõn-kãng võor ye. La a Zonatã ne a Davɩɩd rag n mi a võore. 
1Samuel20:40 A Zonatã rɩka a zab-teedã n kɩs a bi-bɩɩgã, n yeel-a t'a tall-b n kẽng tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel20:41 Bi-bɩɩgã loogr poore, a Davɩɩd yika goabg sẽnẽ wã n yi, n wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽng naoor a tãabo. A Davɩɩd ne a Zonatã moka taab n yãbe, la a Davɩɩd zẽka a koɛɛg n yãb n yɩɩd a Zonatã." 
1Samuel20:42 La a Zonatã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Moasã, kẽng ne bãane. Tõnd d yiibã fãa wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr n yeele: bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd maam ne foom sʋka, la mam yagensã ne fo yagensã sʋk wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel21:1 A Davɩɩd yikame n looge, la a Zonatã lebg n leba tẽngã pʋga." 
1Samuel21:2 A Davɩɩd kẽnga Noob maan-kʋʋd a Ayimelɛk nengẽ. La a Ayimelɛk wudg n sega a Davɩɩd ne rabeem n sok-a yaa: «Yaa a wãn tɩ f wat f yembr tɩ ned ka tũud-fu?» 
1Samuel21:3 A Davɩɩd leoka maan-kʋʋd a Ayimelɛk yaa: «Yaa rĩmã n tʋm maam, la b yeelame tɩ ned ka segd n bãng bũmb ning yĩng bãmb sẽn tʋm maamã, la noor ning b sẽn kõ maamã ye. Mam yãka sɛk zĩig n wilg m nebã tɩ d na n sega taab beenẽ." 
1Samuel21:4 La moasã, bõe rɩɩb la yãmb tara? Kõ-y-m bur a nu wall y sẽn tar bala.»" 
1Samuel21:5 Maan-kʋʋdã leoka a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam ka tar bur-zaalg ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam doogã bur bal n be kaanẽ. Y kom-bɩɩsã sã n ka lagem ne pagb bɩ y rɩke.» 
1Samuel21:6 A Davɩɩd leoka maan-kʋʋdã yaa: «B gɩdga tõnd tɩ d ra lagem paga, wa mam sẽn minim n maand zabr kẽnd wakatã. Dẽ, sã n yaa tɩ kom-bɩɩsã yɩlgda b teedã kẽn-zaall daar yĩnga, bõe yĩng tɩ b ka na n yɩlg b teedã rũndã daarã n yɩɩda?»" 
1Samuel21:7 Woto, maan-kʋʋdã rɩka bur ning sẽn dag n be Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã n kõ a Davɩɩde, bũmb a to sẽn dag n ka be wã yĩnga. Yaa bur ning sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ b yiisd-a daar fãa n ledgd ne bur-tʋʋlgã bal n dag n be." 
1Samuel21:8 La mikame tɩ badaare, a Sayull tʋmtʋmd n dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor beenẽ. Yẽnda rag n yaa Edom ned t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Doɛɛge, n yaa a Sayull pe-kɩɩmbã naaba." 
1Samuel21:9 A Davɩɩd soka a Ayimelɛk yaa: «Yãmb ka tar kãnd bɩ zabr sʋʋg n kõ-ma? Mam ka tõog n yals n dɩk m zabr sʋʋgã wall m zab-teedã ye. Bala, rĩmã sẽn tʋm maam tɩ m tɩ maan bũmb ningã rag n yaa yãgb yelle.»" 
1Samuel21:10 Maan-kʋʋdã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Ad Filistẽ ned a Golyate, rao ning fo sẽn dag n kʋ Ela tɩɩsã long pʋgẽ wã sʋʋga. B vil-a-la ne fuug t'a be maan-kʋʋr fuugã poore. F sã n dat-a lame bɩ f rɩke, tɩ m ka tar a to kaanẽ ye.» A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Sʋʋg ka leb n be n yɩɩd sʋ-kãngã ye. Rɩk-y-yã-a n kõ-ma.»" 
1Samuel21:11 Badaar bala, a Davɩɩd yikame n zoe n zãag ne a Sayulli. La yẽnda taa Gat rĩm a Akiis nengẽ." 
1Samuel21:12 A Akiis tʋmtʋmdbã yeel-a lame: «Rẽ yĩnga, ka Israyɛll dĩm a Davɩɩd la woto sɩda? Ka yẽnda yĩng la nebã sẽn saood n yɩɩndẽ n yetẽ tɩ: ‹A Sayull kʋʋ neb tusri, t'a Davɩɩd kʋ neb tus piigã wɛ?›»" 
1Samuel21:13 Gom-kãens kẽesa a Davɩɩd rabeem, la yẽnda rag n zoeta Gat rĩm a Akiis wʋsgo." 
1Samuel21:14 A Davɩɩd maana a meng wa gãeeng bãmb taoore, n wʋkd teed n sõod zagsã noyã, la a bas a kolkoodã tɩ sedgd ne a toɛɛngã." 
1Samuel21:15 A Akiis yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Yãmb ka ne tɩ rao-kãngã yaa gãeeng sɩda? La yaa a wãn tɩ y tar-a n wat mam nengẽ? 
1Samuel21:16 Rẽ yĩnga yaa gãeems n ka be kaanẽ bɩ? Bɩ yaa bõe tɩ y wat ne nin-kãngã t'a wa maand a gãeemdã mam taoore? Ned a woto kõn kẽ mam zakẽ wã ye.» 
1Samuel22:1 A Davɩɩd yii beenẽ n zoe n kẽng Adulam tãngã bokẽ n tɩ soonde. A Davɩɩd kẽem-dãmbã ne a yirã rãmb fãa sẽn wʋm woto, b kẽng n tɩ bʋʋg-a-la beenẽ." 
1Samuel22:2 Neb nins fãa sẽn tar yel-pakre, ne sẽn tar-b samã la sũ-pa-noaang rãmbã kẽng n tɩ tigma taab a Davɩɩd nengẽ, t'a lebg b naaba. Nebã sẽn wa n tigim yẽnda nengẽ wã sõor dag n taa neb kobs-naase." 
1Samuel22:3 A Davɩɩd yii beenẽ n kẽng Mitspe sẽn be Moaabã. La yẽnda yeela Moaab rĩmã yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y sak tɩ m ba wã ne m ma wã zĩnd ne yãmb hal tɩ m wa bãng Wẽnnaam sẽn dat n tall maam n maan bũmb ninga.» 
1Samuel22:4 La yẽnda peega a ba wã ne a ma wã n kẽng Moaab rĩmã nengẽ, la b zĩnda beenẽ wakat ning fãa yẽnda sẽn zĩnd tãmsã bogd pʋsẽ wã." 
1Samuel22:5 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Gaad yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Da zĩnd tãmsã bogd pʋsẽ ye. Yik n kẽng Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ.» La a Davɩɩd yii beenẽ, n kẽng Herɛt weoogã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel22:6 A Sayull wʋmame tɩ b paama a Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã kibare. A Sayull dag n bee Gɩbeya tãngã zug n zĩ tɩɩg tẽngr n zãad a kãnde, t'a nanambsã gũbg-a." 
1Samuel22:7 A Sayull yeela tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «Benzame nebã, m kotame tɩ y kelge! A Izayi biigã na n kõo yãmb fãa pʋt ne reezẽ tɩɩs bɩ? Yẽnda na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg neb tusr-tusr bɩ koabg-koabg nanambs la?" 
1Samuel22:8 Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb fãa sɩɩg taab noor n ka rat n togs maam tɩ m biigã maana kaool ne a Izayi biigã? Yãmb ned ba a ye ka zoe mam nimbãanega, n wilg maam tɩ m biigã kɩtame tɩ mam tʋmtʋmdã yik zabr ne maam, n soosd n dat n kʋ maam wa b sẽn maan rũndã wã la?»" 
1Samuel22:9 Edom rao a Doɛɛg sẽn dag n be ne a Sayull tʋmtʋmdbã yeelame yaa: «Mam yãnda a Izayi biigã sẽn kẽng Noobe, a Akituub biig a Ayimelɛk nengẽ." 
1Samuel22:10 A Ayimelɛk soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab a Davɩɩd sẽn tog n maane, la yẽnda kõ-a-la rɩɩbo, la a rɩk Filistẽ dao a Golyat zabr sʋʋgã n kõ-a.»" 
1Samuel22:11 Rĩmã tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ bool a Akituub biig a Ayimelɛk sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdã ne a yirã rãmba, la maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn be Noobã tɩ b wa. La bãmb fãa waa rĩmã nengẽ." 
1Samuel22:12 A Sayull yeelame: «Akituub biiga! Mam kotame tɩ f kelge!» La yẽnda yeelame: «N-na, ad-ma!»" 
1Samuel22:13 La rĩmã soka a Ayimelɛk yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ foom ne a Izayi biig a Davɩɩd sɩɩg taab noor n na n zãmb maam a woto? Bõe yĩng tɩ fo kõ-a rɩɩb la zabr sʋʋga, la f sok Wẽnnaam n kõ-a, t'a kɩɩsd maam n dat n soos n kʋ maam rũndã?»" 
1Samuel22:14 A Ayimelɛk leoka rĩmã yaa: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã fãa sʋka, ned ka be n yaa sɩd soab wa a Davɩɩd ye. Yẽnda yaa yãmb rɛɛmba, n yaa y gũudbã naaba, la a tara waoogr yãmb yirã rãmb fãa nifẽ." 
1Samuel22:15 Ka rũndã bal la mam sok Wẽnnaam n kõ yẽnda ye. Bɩ rĩmã ra ning maam wall m tʋmtʋmdbã taal ye. Bala, y tʋmtʋmdã ka tol n mi tɩ yell n be yãmb sʋk ye.»" 
1Samuel22:16 La rĩmã yeela a Ayimelɛk tɩ yẽnda ne a buudã fãa na n kiime. 
1Samuel22:17 Rĩmã yeela gũudb nins sẽn be yẽnda sɛɛgẽ wã tɩ b kẽng n kʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdbã, bala, bãmb me sõnga a Davɩɩde. B bãngame t'a ra zoetame, la b ka sak n togs yẽnda ye. La rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb ka sak t'a kẽng n kʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdbã ye." 
1Samuel22:18 Woto, rĩmã yeela a Doɛɛg t'a kẽng n kʋ maan-kʋʋdbã. La Edom dao a Doɛɛg kʋʋ maan-kʋʋdbã. Badaare, yẽnda kʋʋ maan-kʋʋdb pis-nii la a nu sẽn dag n yer maan-kʋʋr futu." 
1Samuel22:19 A Sayull kɩtame tɩ b kʋ Noob sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdb tẽngã nebã fãa. Bãmb kʋʋ pagbã ne raopã la kambã, ne kom-peelsã la niigã, ne bõensã la piisã fãa." 
1Samuel22:20 A Akituub biig a Ayimelɛk biig a yembr bal n põs n zoe n kẽng a Davɩɩd nẽngẽ. Yẽnda yʋʋr boondame t'a Abiyataare. 
1Samuel22:21 Yẽnda togsa a Davɩɩd t'a Sayull kʋʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdbã fãa. 
1Samuel22:22 La a Davɩɩd yeela a Abiyataar yaa: «Mam sẽn yã Edom dao a Doɛɛg sẽn dag n be beenẽ badaarã, mam bãngame t'a ka tõe n ka togs a Sayull fãa. Yaa maam n wa ne fo buudã fãa kũum." 
1Samuel22:23 Pa ka ne maam, la f ra zoe rabeem ye. Ned sã n baood n kʋ foom, yaa maam la a soab rat n kʋ. Fo sã n zĩnd ne maam, bũmb ka na n maan-f ye.»" 
1Samuel23:1 Daar a yembre, b wa n togsa a Davɩɩd tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã yika zabr ne Keyila nebã, n wat n wʋkd b koodã b zeesẽ wã." 
1Samuel23:2 A Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ges yẽnda sã n tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Filistẽ nebã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame t'a kẽng n tɩ zab ne-b n fãag Keyila nebã. 
1Samuel23:3 La a Davɩɩd nebã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Gese, tõnd sẽn be Zʋʋda kaanẽ tɩ rabeem tar tõndã, tõnd sã n kẽng Keyila n na n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, na n yɩ a wãna?»" 
1Samuel23:4 A Davɩɩd leb n soka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame: «Yik n kẽng Keyila, tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo tõog Filistẽ-dãmbã.»" 
1Samuel23:5 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã kẽnga Keyila. Bãmb zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, n tõog-b ne tõog-kãsenga, la b kãag b rũmsã. Woto, bãmb fãaga Keyila nebã." 
1Samuel23:6 A Ayimelɛk biig a Abiyataar sẽn wa n zoet n dabd a Davɩɩd nengẽ Keyila wã t'a rag n zãada maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã. 
1Samuel23:7 B tɩ togsa a Sayull t'a Davɩɩd kẽnga Keyila. A Sayull tagsame: «Wẽnnaam bas-a lame tɩ m na n paam-a. Bala, yẽnda sẽn tɩ kẽ tẽng ningã yaa tẽng sẽn tar kʋɩlems ne kʋɩlen-kuyã.»" 
1Samuel23:8 A Sayull boola a nebã fãa tɩ b sũ tãp n kẽng Keyila n na n tɩ gũbg a Davɩɩd ne a nebã. 
1Samuel23:9 A Davɩɩd sẽn bãng t'a Sayull dat n maan-a yẽnda wẽngã, a yeela maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar t'a rɩk maan-kʋʋr fuugã n wa." 
1Samuel23:10 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda, la mam wʋmame t'a Sayull dat n waa Keyila n wa sãam tẽngã, mam sẽn be beenẽ wã yĩnga." 
1Samuel23:11 Keyila pãn-soaadbã na n yõka maam n kõ a Sayull bɩ? A Sayull sɩd na n waa wa mam sẽn wʋmã bɩ? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, m kot-y lame tɩ y leok y tʋmtʋmdã!» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame t'a Sayull na n waame." 
1Samuel23:12 A Davɩɩd sokame: «Keyila pãn-soaadbã na n yõka maam ne m nebã n kõ a Sayull bɩ?» Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame: «Bãmb na yõka foom n kõ a Sayulli.» 
1Samuel23:13 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd ne a nebã sẽn kolg kobs-yoobã yii Keyila n kẽng zĩig a to. A Sayull wʋmame t'a Davɩɩd zoeeme n yi Keyila, la a basame n ka leb n kẽng beenẽ ye." 
1Samuel23:14 A Davɩɩd paa Zɩf we-raoogã tãms sẽgsẽ. La daar fãa, a Sayull dag n baood-a lame, la Wẽnnaam ka sak t'a paam-a ye." 
1Samuel23:15 A Davɩɩd sẽn bãng t'a Sayull sɩd baood-a lame n dat n kʋ wã, a kell n paa Zɩf we-raoogã sẽn dag n be Horsa tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel23:16 Daar a yembre, a Sayull biig a Zonatã kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ Horsa n na n tɩ paas-a raood Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel23:17 Yẽnda yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Da zoe rabeem ye, m ba a Sayull ka na n paam foom ye. Yaa foom n na n lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, la maam n na n yɩ yãmb pʋgdga. M ba a Sayull meng mii bõn-kãng vẽenega.»" 
1Samuel23:18 Bãmb b yiibã maana kaool ne taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. A Davɩɩd paa Horsa weoogã pʋgẽ, la a Zonatã kuila a yiri." 
1Samuel23:19 Zɩf neb kẽer kẽnga Gɩbeya n tɩ yeel a Sayull yaa: «A Davɩɩd solga tõnd tẽngã pʋgẽ Horsa, Hakɩla kunkubã pẽgsẽ, zĩ-koɛɛngã sẽn be nug goabgã sẽnẽ." 
1Samuel23:20 N-na, yãmb sã n data, bɩ y wa tɩ tõnd na n yõk-a lame n kõ-yã.»" 
1Samuel23:21 La a Sayull yeelame yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning y zug barka, y sẽn zoe mam nimbãanegã yĩnga." 
1Samuel23:22 M kot-y lame tɩ y lebg n kẽng n tɩ ges neere, n bãng zĩig ning a sẽn be wã, la y wa togs maam sẽn yaa ned ning n yãnd-a beenẽ. Bala, b yeela maam t'a tara sɩlem wʋsgo." 
1Samuel23:23 Bɩ y mao n bãng zĩ-solgdsã fãa. La y sã n wa bãng a sẽn be zĩig ningã vẽenega, bɩ y wa wilg-m tɩ m tũ-y n kẽnge. A sã n bee tẽngã pʋgẽ, mam na n bao-a lame, baa sã n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam gẽes-a Zʋʋda buudã fãa sʋka.»" 
1Samuel23:24 La Zɩf nebã yikame n deng a Sayull n kẽng Zɩfe. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã rag n bee Mawõ we-raoogã pʋgẽ, zĩ-koɛɛngã sẽn be nug-goabgã sẽnẽ." 
1Samuel23:25 A Sayull ne a nebã kẽnga a Davɩɩd baoobo. B tɩ togsa a Davɩɩde, la a Davɩɩd yii pĩisã zut n tɩ zĩnd Mawõ we-raoogã pʋgẽ. A Sayull sẽn wʋm dẽ, a kẽnga Mawõ we-raoogã pʋgẽ n na n tɩ yõk a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel23:26 A Sayull ne a nebã rag n bee tãngã kɩreng a yembr n kẽnda, t'a Davɩɩd ne a nebã me be kɩreng a to wã. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã rag n kẽnda tao-tao n dat n paam n põse, la a Sayull ne a nebã rag n gũbga bãmb n dat n paam n yõge." 
1Samuel23:27 Wakat-kãng bala, ned n wa n yeel a Sayull t'a wa tao-tao tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã waame n dat n zab ne soolmã." 
1Samuel23:28 Dẽ, a Sayull basa a Davɩɩd rigbu, n na n lebg n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Sela-Malkote, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹welgr pĩig kugri.›" 
1Samuel24:1 A Davɩɩd yii beenẽ, n kẽng Ɛn-Gedi tãmsã sẽgsẽ n tɩ soonde." 
1Samuel24:2 A Sayull sẽn tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã n lebg n wa, b yeela yẽnda t'a Davɩɩd bee Ɛn-Gedi we-raoogã pʋga." 
1Samuel24:3 Dẽ, a Sayull yãka Israyɛll gãndaad tus a tãab tɩ b kẽng n na n tɩ bao a Davɩɩd ne a nebã hal tɩ ta we-bʋʋsã pĩig kug zĩisẽ." 
1Samuel24:4 A Sayull wa n taa piisã yãg sẽn be sorã noorã sẽnẽ. La bok n dag n be beenẽ, la a yẽnda kẽe be n na n yols a menga. Rẽ t'a Davɩɩd ne a nebã rag n zĩi bokã pʋga." 
1Samuel24:5 Woto, a Davɩɩd nebã yeel-a lame: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yãmba: Mam na n kõo foom f bɛ wã tɩ f maan f sẽn dat ne-a. Ra-kãng la woto.» A Davɩɩd soos n kolgame n wõrg a Sayull fuugã noore." 
1Samuel24:6 La rẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd sũurã kiuusame, a sẽn wõrg a Sayull fuugã yĩnga." 
1Samuel24:7 Woto, a Davɩɩd yeela a nebã yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãag maam ne yell a woto maanego. Bɩ b ra sak tɩ mam nug sɩɩs m soaalã sẽn yaa soab ning bãmb sẽn yãkã ye. Bala, yaa bãmb la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãk yã.»" 
1Samuel24:8 A Davɩɩd gom-kãensã gɩdga a nebã tɩ b ka maan a Sayull bũmb ye. La a Sayull yikame n yi bokã pʋgẽ n dɩk a sor n looge. 
1Samuel24:9 Rẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd me yii bokã pʋgẽ. La a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel a Sayull yaa: «M dĩm la m soaala!» A Sayull wẽnemdame n ges a poorẽ, la a Davɩɩd fõgna a neng tẽnga," 
1Samuel24:10 n yeel a Sayull yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb kelgd neb nins sẽn yet yãmb tɩ maam a Davɩɩd rat n maana yãmb wẽngã? 
1Samuel24:11 Bɩ yãmb meng gese: rũndã daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yõka yãmb n kõ maam tãngã bok pʋgẽ. Nebã yeela maam tɩ m kʋ-yã! La mam zoee yãmb nimbãaneg n yeel tɩ m ka na n sɩɩs soab ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã ye." 
1Samuel24:12 M dĩma, ges-y yãmb fuugã noor mam sẽn wõrg n zãada. Mam sẽn wõrg yãmb fuugã noor n yaool n bas yãmb n ka kʋ wã, bɩ y bãng tɩ m ka rat-y ne wẽnga, la m ka zabd ne-y me ye. Mam ka beeg yãmb ye, la baoosgo, yãmb digda maam n dat n kʋ." 
1Samuel24:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n yɩ bʋ-kaood maam ne yãmb sʋka. Yaa bãmb n na n dok mam sũur ne yãmba, bala, mam nug kõn tol n sɩɩs yãmb ye." 
1Samuel24:14 Wa yel-bũn-kʋdrã sẽn yetã: Wẽng yita nin-wẽns nengẽ. Dẽ wã, mam nug ka na n sɩɩs yãmb ye." 
1Samuel24:15 Israyɛll dĩmã kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne ãnda? Yãmb digda ãnda? Yaa ba-kɩɩng bɩ, bɩ yaa karenga?" 
1Samuel24:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n kao bʋʋdã. Bãmb n na n yɩ bʋ-kaood maam ne yãmb sʋka. Bãmb n na n zab n sõng maam. Bãmb na n fãaga maam yãmb nugẽ.» 
1Samuel24:17 A Davɩɩd sẽn gom ne a Sayull a woto n sɛ, a Sayull yeelame: «M biig a Davɩɩde! Yaa fo koɛɛg la mam sẽn wʋmdã bɩ?» Dẽ, a Sayull yãba wʋsgo." 
1Samuel24:18 Yẽnda yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Fo tɩrlmã yɩɩda maam, bala, baa ne mam sẽn maan foom wẽngã, fo maana maam neere." 
1Samuel24:19 Rũndã, fo wilga f sõmblem ne maam, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yõka maam n kõ foom, la fo basa maam n ka kʋ ye." 
1Samuel24:20 Ned paamda a bɛ n leb n bas-a t'a loog ne laafɩ sɩda? Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rol foom maan-neer ning fo sẽn maan maam dũndã wã yĩnga. 
1Samuel24:21 Moasã, mam miime tɩ foom n na n lebg rĩmã, la Israyɛll rĩungã na n paa fo nugẽ." 
1Samuel24:22 Dẽ wã, bɩ f wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr tɩ mam loogr poore, f ka na n menes m yagensã, la f ka na n yẽes m yʋʋrã m buudã sʋk ye.»" 
1Samuel24:23 Woto, a Davɩɩd wẽena ne a Sayulli. La a Sayull lebg n kuila a yiri, la a Davɩɩd ne a nebã lebg n kẽnga b zĩ-soalgdgẽ wã." 
1Samuel25:1 A Samwɛll kiime. La Israyɛll nebã fãa tigma taab n yãb-a, la b tɩ mum-a-la a yirã Rama. Rẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd yikame n kẽng Paarã we-raoogã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel25:2 Rao a ye n dag n be Mawõ, n kẽnd n tʋmd Karmelle. A rag n yaa nin-kãseng n tar piis tus a tãab ne bʋʋs tusri. La yẽnda rag n bee Karmell n wõrsd a piisi." 
1Samuel25:3 Rao-kãng yʋʋr la a Naballe, t'a pagã yʋʋr la a Abigayɩlle. A Abigayɩll dag n yaa pʋg-sõng la pʋg-neere, la a sɩdã rag n yaa nin-toaag n maand tʋʋm-wẽnse. Yẽnda yaa a Kalɛɛb buudã neda." 
1Samuel25:4 A Davɩɩd zĩnda we-raoogã pʋgẽ n wʋm t'a Naball wõrsda a piisi. 
1Samuel25:5 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tʋma kom-bɩɩs piig tɩ b kẽng a Naball nengẽ Karmell n tɩ pʋʋs-a n sok a keelem yẽnda yʋʋr yĩnga," 
1Samuel25:6 la b yeel-a yaa: «Bɩ yãmb ne y yirã la bũmb nins yãmb sẽn so wã fãa zĩnd ne bãane! 
1Samuel25:7 Mam wʋmame tɩ y wõrsda y piisi, yaa woto tɩ m yeel tɩ b wa wilg-y tɩ yãmb pe-kɩɩmbã zĩnda ne tõnd la tõnd ka nams-b ye. Wakat ning fãa bãmb sẽn zĩnd ne tõnd Karmellã, b bũmb ka menem ye." 
1Samuel25:8 Sok-y yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã n ges tɩ b na n wilg-y lame tɩ yɩ a woto. La a Davɩɩd yeelame tɩ y ges b tʋmtʋmdbã yell neere, bala, tõnd waa tigr daare! Dẽ, d kotame tɩ y bao y nug bũmb n kõ tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã, ne a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb biigã.»" 
1Samuel25:9 A Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn ta a Naball nengẽ, b kell n togs-a-la goam nins fãa a Davɩɩd sẽn yeelã, la b bas n gũud a Naball leokre." 
1Samuel25:10 A Naball leoka a Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «A Davɩɩd la ãnda? A Izayi biig la ãnda? Rũndã-rũndã wã, yembs wʋsg n zoet n basd b zu-soben-dãmba." 
1Samuel25:11 Mam ka na n dɩk m dɩɩbã ne m koomã la m nemdã m sẽn segl n na n kõ m pe-wõrsdbã, n kõ neb m sẽn ka mi ye.»" 
1Samuel25:12 A Davɩɩd nebã lebg n leba a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ togs-a goam nins fãa a Naball sẽn gomã. 
1Samuel25:13 Woto, a Davɩɩd yeela a nebã fãa tɩ b rɩk b zabr sʋʋs n sẽbg b seese. A Davɩɩd me rɩka a zabr sʋʋg n bobe. Neb kobs-naas n tũ a Davɩɩde, tɩ neb kobessi pa n na n gũ teedã." 
1Samuel25:14 A Naball tʋmtʋmd a yembr n tɩ yeel a Naball pag a Abigayɩll yaa: «A Davɩɩd tʋma neb tɩ b yi we-raoogã pʋgẽ n wa ning tõnd soaalã barka, la yẽnda leng-b lame." 
1Samuel25:15 Nin-bãmb yaool n maana tõnd neer wʋsgo. B ned ba a ye ka maan tõnd wẽng ye. La wakat ning fãa tõnd sẽn zĩnd ne bãmb weoogẽ wã, b ned ka reeg tõnd bũmb ba a yembr ye." 
1Samuel25:16 Wakat ning fãa tõnd sẽn zĩnd ne bãmb n gũ d rũmsã, b yɩɩ wa yãgr tõnd yĩng wĩndg la yʋngo." 
1Samuel25:17 Moasã, bɩ y ges yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, bala, b zoe n yãka yam n na n sãam tõnd soaalã ne a zakã rãmba. A Naball la sẽn yaa nin-yoog tɩ ned ka tõe n gom ne-b la!»" 
1Samuel25:18 Dẽ, a Abigayɩll yika tao-tao n yãk bur kobessi ne reezẽ rãam ko-waoos a yiibu, la piis a nu b sẽn segle, la ka-sẽedem peoog a nu ne reezẽ-gil-koeems koabga, la kankam-koeems-gil kobessi, n zɩlg bõense." 
1Samuel25:19 A Abigayɩll yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b rengdẽ taoor t'a watẽ. La yẽnda ka yeel a sɩd a Naball tɩ bũmb ye. 
1Samuel25:20 Yẽnda zomba bõanga, n tũud tãngã kɩreng a ye n sigda, la a Davɩɩd ne a nebã rag n watame n tek n seg yẽnda sorã zugu." 
1Samuel25:21 A Davɩɩd dag n yetame: «Mam sẽn gũ rao-kãngã paoongã fãa we-raoogẽ wã, t'a sẽn so wã bũmb ba a yembr ka menemã yaa zaalem bala. Mam maana yẽnda neere, la yẽnda lebsa maam wẽnga." 
1Samuel25:22 Mam sã n bas a Naball yirã bi-ribl a ye meng tɩ ta beoogo, bɩ Wẽnnaam sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga!»" 
1Samuel25:23 A Abigayɩll sẽn yãnda a Davɩɩde, a siga a bõangã zug tao-tao, n fõgen a neng tẽng a Davɩɩd taoore." 
1Samuel25:24 Yẽnda wõgemda a Davɩɩd taoor n yeele: «M soaala, yaa maam n konge. M kotame tɩ y sak tɩ m gom ne-yã, la y kelg y tʋmtʋmd-poakã goamã." 
1Samuel25:25 M kot-y lame tɩ y ra rɩk nin-yoog a Naball manesmã n ning y sũurẽ ye. Yẽnda kell n yaa wa a yʋʋrã: nabd bala. Mam ka yã neb nins yãmb sẽn tʋmã ye. 
1Samuel25:26 La moasã, m soaala, mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, la ne yãmb me, tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gɩdg yãmb tɩ y ra raag zɩɩm, n bao tɩ fãag y meng ye. Bɩ yãmb bɛɛbã ne neb nins sẽn dat-b yãmb ne wẽnga lebg wa a Naballe." 
1Samuel25:27 Dẽ wã, m soaala, reeg-y kũun nins mam sẽn zã n wa n na n kõ yãmbã, n kõ kom-bɩɩs nins sẽn be ne yãmbã." 
1Samuel25:28 M kot-y lame tɩ y kõ y tʋmtʋmd-poakã sugr a beegrã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y roogã me, bala, yãmb zabda Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Bɩ ned da yã wẽng yãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
1Samuel25:29 Ned sã n yik n dat n sãam yãmba, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã n na n gũ yãmb vɩɩmã. La b na n lobga y bɛɛbã wa ned sẽn dɩk kugr n ning loaabgẽ n lobge." 
1Samuel25:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa maan yãmb neer wa b sẽn yeelã, n kɩt tɩ y lebg Israyɛll dĩma," 
1Samuel25:31 yãmb ka na n maan y bãngẽ, la y sũur kõn sãam y sẽn ka raag zɩɩm zaalmã yĩnga, la y sẽn ka bao tɩ fãag y mengã yĩng ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa maan m soaalã neere, bɩ y tẽeg y tʋmtʋmd-poakã yelle.»" 
1Samuel25:32 A Davɩɩd yeela a Abigayɩll yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, sẽn tʋm-a foom tɩ f wa seg maam dũndã daarã paam pẽgre!" 
1Samuel25:33 Mam pẽgda fo yamã, bɩ f paam barka, fo sẽn gɩdg maam tɩ m ka raag ned zɩɩm n bao m meng fãagrã yĩnga." 
1Samuel25:34 M wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã, sẽn gɩdg-a maam tɩ m ka maan foom wẽngã, tɩ sã n ka fo sẽn wa tao-tao n wa seg maamã, ka ne sõorã pukri, bi-ribl ba a yembr ka na n kellẽ a Naball zakã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel25:35 A Davɩɩd reega kũunã a Abigayɩll sẽn wa ne wã, la a yeel-a yaa: «Lebg n kuil ne bãane, bala, mam kelga f koɛɛgã, la m saka f sẽn kosã.»" 
1Samuel25:36 A Abigayɩll sẽn lebg n ta a Naball yiri, a mikame t'a maanda tigr wa rĩm tigri. A Naball sũurã rag n yaa noog hal wʋsgo. Yẽnda yũu reezẽ rãam t'a neng yilimdẽ. La a Abigayɩll ka togs-a baa fɩ, hal tɩ beoogã vẽege." 
1Samuel25:37 La beoogã sẽn vẽeg tɩ reezẽ rãamã yi n bas a Naballã, a pagã togs-a-la bũmb nins fãa sẽn maanã. La a Naball pɛlengã yɩkame t'a sobg n gãe." 
1Samuel25:38 La rasem piig rẽ zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽ a Naball t'a ki." 
1Samuel25:39 A Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm t'a Naball kiime, yẽnda yeelame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre! Bala, bãmb doka mam sũur ne a Naballe, a sẽn paoog maamã yĩnga, la b gɩdg maam tɩ m ka maan wẽng ye! Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ wẽng ning a Naball sẽn maanã leb-a.» Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ wilg a Abigayɩll t'a rat-a lame n maan a paga." 
1Samuel25:40 A Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã kẽnga a Abigayɩll nengẽ Karmell n tɩ yeele: «A Davɩɩd n tʋm tõnd tɩ d wa peeg-f n wa t'a maan a paga.» 
1Samuel25:41 A Abigayɩll fõgna a neng tẽng n yeele: «Ad-ma, mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poaka. Mam na n tũume n tɩ waasd m soaalã tʋmtʋmdb nao.»" 
1Samuel25:42 A Abigayɩll yika tao-tao n zomb bõanga, la yem-pogs a nu n tũ yẽnda. Bãmb tũ a Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã, la a Abigayɩll tɩ lebga a Davɩɩd paga." 
1Samuel25:43 A Davɩɩd peega Zizreyɛll tẽng bi-pugl a Ayinoam me n maan a paga, la bãmb b yiibã fãa lebga a Davɩɩd pagba." 
1Samuel25:44 A Sayull dɩka a biig a Mikall sẽn dag n yaa a Davɩɩd pagã n kõ Galim ned a Layiis biig a Palti t'a maan a paga. 
1Samuel26:1 Zɩf nebã kẽnga a Sayull nengẽ Gɩbeya n tɩ yeel-a t'a Davɩɩd solga Hakɩla kunkubã sẽn be zĩ-koɛɛngã neng taoorã. 
1Samuel26:2 Dẽ, a Sayull yika ne Israyɛll tãb-biis tus a tãab nins b sẽn yãk tãb-biisã sʋkã n kẽng Zɩf we-raoogã pʋgẽ n na n tɩ bao a Davɩɩde." 
1Samuel26:3 A Sayull tilga a tãb-sikã Hakɩla kunkubã sẽn be zĩ-koɛɛngã neng taoorã zutu, n pẽneg sorã noore. A Davɩɩd dag n bee we-raoogã pʋgẽ, la a sẽn wʋm t'a Sayull waa beenẽ n baood-a wã," 
1Samuel26:4 a tʋma tẽn-gũusdb tɩ b tɩ gese, la b sɩd tɩ mikame t'a Sayull waame." 
1Samuel26:5 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yik n kẽnga zĩig ning a Sayull sẽn tilg a tãb-sikã, la a yãnda zĩig ning a Sayull ne a tãb-biisã naab a Neer biig Abneer sẽn gãeẽ wã. A Sayull dag n gãee tãb-sikã tẽn-sʋka, t'a nebã gũbg-a." 
1Samuel26:6 A Davɩɩd soka Hɛt ned a Ayimelɛk ne a Seruya biig a Abisayi sẽn yaa a Zoaab ba-biigã yaa: «Ãnda n na n tũ maam tɩ d kẽng a Sayull tãb-sikẽ wã?» La a Abisayi yeelame t'a na n tũume. 
1Samuel26:7 A Davɩɩd ne a Abisayi tũu taab ne yʋng n kẽng a Sayull nebã sẽn beẽ wã, la b tɩ mikame t'a Sayull gãee tãb-sikã tẽn-sʋka, n gõe t'a kãndã kɩ tẽng a zugẽ wã. La a Abneer ne a nebã rag n gãeeme n gũbg yẽnda." 
1Samuel26:8 A Abisayi yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Rũndã yẽ, Wẽnnaam yõka y bɛ wã n kõ-yã. M kotame tɩ y bas tɩ m dɩdg-a ne tẽngã n kõs-a ne m kãndã vugr bala, ka na n yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ m leb n kõs-a ye!»" 
1Samuel26:9 A Davɩɩd yeela a Abisayi yaa: «Da kʋ-b ye. Bala, ned sã n sɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk-a soabã, a na n konga bʋʋm.»" 
1Samuel26:10 La a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n na n yãk yam ne a sẽn na n ki to-to, tõe n yɩ a daar n ta, wall a kẽnga zabr n tɩ pa tãpẽ." 
1Samuel26:11 Abada! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõng-m tɩ nug ra sɩɩs soab ning bãmb sẽn yãkã ye. M kotame tɩ y rɩk b kãndã sẽn yeg b zugã ne b lɩngã bal n looge.» 
1Samuel26:12 A Davɩɩd dɩka kãndã ne lɩngã sẽn dag n be a Sayull zugẽ wã n looge, tɩ ned ka yãnd-ba, wall bãng ye. La ned ka nek me ye. Bala, b fãa rag n gõeeme. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n kɩtame tɩ gõe-kãseng yõk bãmba." 
1Samuel26:13 A Davɩɩd leba tãngã kɩreng a to wã hal yɩɩga, n tɩ rʋ kunkubr ning sẽn dag n yeg bãmbã. La vɩʋ-kãseng n dag n be bãmb ne taab sʋka." 
1Samuel26:14 La a Davɩɩd zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel nebã ne a Neer biig a Abneer yaa: «Leok-m wɛ Abneere!» La a Abneer leokame: «Foom la ãndã n zẽkd f koɛɛg ne rĩmã?» 
1Samuel26:15 T'a Davɩɩd leoke: «Yãmb ka rao la? Yãmb to bee Israyɛll sɩda? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb ka gũ rĩmã sẽn yaa yãmb soaalã sõama? Bala, tẽngã ned a yembr n dag n wa beenẽ n na n kʋ rĩmã sẽn yaa yãmb soaalã." 
1Samuel26:16 Yãmb sẽn maan bũmb ningã ka neer ye. Mam wẽenda ne Wẽnnaam tɩ yãmb zemsa kũum, bala, yãmb ka gũ y soaalã sẽn yaa soab ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã ye. Moasã, ges-y bãmb kãndã ne b lɩngã sẽn dag n dɩg b zugẽ wã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
1Samuel26:17 A Sayull bãnga a Davɩɩd koɛɛgã n yeele: «Yaa m biig a Davɩɩd bɩ?» A Davɩɩd leokame: «N-yẽe, m dĩm la m soaala, yaa maam!»" 
1Samuel26:18 A Davɩɩd leb n yeelame: «N-na! Yaa bõe tɩ y rigd-ma? M maan-y-la bõe? Mam maana bõe sẽn ka zemse? 
1Samuel26:19 Moasã, m dĩm la m soaala, m kotame tɩ y kelg-ma: Sã n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tusd yãmb tɩ y maan maam wẽnga, bɩ b sak n deeg kũun tɩ b sũurã sigi. La sã n yaa ninsaalb n maan a woto, bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd b rãmb zut Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Bala, b rigda maam dũndã, tɩ m ka tar zĩig tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ b nebã pʋgẽ ye. Bãmb yetame tɩ m kẽng n tɩ waoog bu-zẽmsã wẽnnaam-dãmbã." 
1Samuel26:20 Bɩ mam zɩɩm da raag zĩig a to tɩ ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽngã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, Israyɛll dĩmã yika zabre, n baood maam wa ned sẽn baood karenga, n digd-m wa ned sẽn digd koadeng tãng zug n dat n kʋ.»" 
1Samuel26:21 A Sayull yeelame: «M biig a Davɩɩde, lebg n wa tɩ mam kongame. Lebg n wa tɩ m ka na n leb n maan-f wẽng ye. Rũndã daarã, fo gesame tɩ mam vɩɩmã tara yõod wʋsgo. Ade, mam maana yalemdo, n tudg m meng tudg-kãsenga.»" 
1Samuel26:22 A Davɩɩd leokame: «Rĩmã, ad y kãndã! Tʋm-y y rakõor a yembr t'a wa reege.»" 
1Samuel26:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n lebsa ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tɩrlem ne a pʋ-peelem. Bala, rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga yãmb mam nugẽ, la mam dag n ka rat n sɩɩs soab ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãkã ye." 
1Samuel26:24 Rũndã, mam sẽn ges tɩ yãmb vɩɩmã yaa bõn-kãsengã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab me na n gesa mam vɩɩmã wa bõn-kãsenga, n fãag maam ne toog buud fãa." 
1Samuel26:25 A Sayull yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «M biig a Davɩɩde, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning f zug barka! Bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn na n maane, f na n paama tõogre.» A Davɩɩd dɩka a sor n looge, la a Sayull kuilame." 
1Samuel27:1 A Davɩɩd tagsame t'a sã n ka zoe n kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ, a Sayull na n wa baas n paam-a lame n kʋ. Yẽnda tagsame t'a sã n maan a woto, a Sayull na n wa basa yẽnda baoob Israyɛll tẽngã pʋgẽ t'a paam n põse." 
1Samuel27:2 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd ne neb kobs-yoob nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yikame n kẽng a Maook biig a Akiis sẽn yaa Gat rĩmã nengẽ." 
1Samuel27:3 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã zĩnda a Akiis nengẽ Gate, ned kam fãa ne a zak rãmba, a Davɩɩd me ne a pagb a yiibã: a Akinoam sẽn yaa Zizreyɛll tẽng biigã, ne Karmell tẽng biig a Abigayɩll sẽn dag n yaa a Naball pagã." 
1Samuel27:4 Nebã togsa a Sayull t'a Davɩɩd zoe n kẽnga Gat tẽnga, la a Sayull basame n ka leb n bao-a ye." 
1Samuel27:5 A Davɩɩd yeela a Akiis yaa: «Yãmb sã n nonga maam, m kot-y lame tɩ y bao zĩig sẽn be tẽngã kɩreng n kõ maam tɩ m zĩndi, la m da zĩnd ne yãmb na-tẽngã pʋg ye.»" 
1Samuel27:6 Dẽ, badaar bala, a Akiis rɩka Siklaag tẽngã n kõ a Davɩɩde. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã so Siklaag hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Samuel27:7 A Davɩɩd sẽn zĩnd Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ wã yɩɩ yʋʋmde, la kiis a naase." 
1Samuel27:8 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã rag n kẽnd n zabda ne Gesʋʋr nebã, Girsi nebã, ne Amalɛk nebã. Bala, yaa bu-kãens n dag n sɩng n be Sʋʋr hal n tɩ tãag Ezɩpte." 
1Samuel27:9 A Davɩɩd dag n zabd n tõogda tẽngã nebã, n kʋʋd b pagbã ne b raopã zãnga, la a wʋkd rũm-bãoongã ne rũm-bɛdã, la bõensã ne yʋgma wã, la futã n talld n kẽnd a Akiis nengẽ." 
1Samuel27:10 A Akiis sã n sok a Davɩɩd b sẽn tɩ zab tẽng ningã, a Davɩɩd leokdame tɩ yaa Zʋʋda tẽngã nug goabga, bɩ Zerakmeyɛll tẽngã nug goabga, wall Kɛn nebã tẽng nug goabga." 
1Samuel27:11 A Davɩɩd kʋʋda pagbã ne raopã fãa, n ka basd nin-vɩɩg ba a ye meng n tall n wa Gat ye. Yẽnda rag n yɛɛsdame tɩ b na n wa tɩ togs bũmb nins yẽnda sẽn maandã. A Davɩɩd sẽn zĩnd Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ wã tɛka, yaa woto la a rag n maanda." 
1Samuel27:12 A Akiis rag n kɩsa sɩd ne a Davɩɩde, n tagsdẽ t'a baoo beem ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa a meng nebã, n na n lebg yẽnda tʋmtʋmd wakat fãa yĩnga." 
1Samuel28:1 Wakat-kãnga, Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n tigma b tãb-biisã n na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã. A Akiis yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Bãng tɩ foom ne f nebã na n wa tũu mam tãb-biisã n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ.»" 
1Samuel28:2 A Davɩɩd leoka a Akiis yaa: «Beneere! Bee ne yãmb tɩ y ges y sẽn dat tɩ y tʋmtʋmdã maan bũmb ninga.» Dẽ, a Akiis yeela a Davɩɩd t'a ratame t'a Davɩɩd lebg yẽnda mengã gũud wakat fãa." 
1Samuel28:3 A Sãmwɛll dag n kiime, tɩ Israyɛll nebã yãb-a, la b mum-a-la a tẽngẽ wã Rama. A Sayull dag n diga kinkir-bagbã ne bagbã fãa n yiis tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel28:4 Filistẽ-dãmbã tilga b tãb-sikã Sunem. La a Sayull tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa, n tilg b tãb-sikã Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 A Sayull sẽn yã Filistẽ nebã tãb-sikã, rabeem-kãseng yõk-a lame t'a pɛlengã yɩke." 
1Samuel28:6 A Sayull soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab a sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka leok ne zãmsdo, ne Urim, wall ne bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã koɛɛg ye." 
1Samuel28:7 A Sayull yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b wilg-a pag sẽn yaa kinkir-bag zĩiga, t'a kẽng n tɩ gese. Yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã yeel-a lame tɩ pag a yembr n be Ɛn-Door n yaa kinkir-baga." 
1Samuel28:8 La a Sayull toeema fut n yeelg fut a taaba. La yẽnda ne neb a yiib n tũ taab n kẽnge. Bãmb taa pagã nengẽ ne yʋngo. A Sayull yeela pagã yaa: «M kotame tɩ f bool ned a yembr sẽn ki n kõ-ma. Kɩt tɩ ned ning yʋʋr mam sẽn na n pʋdã puki.» 
1Samuel28:9 Pagã yeelame: «Yãmb mi a Sayull sẽn maan bũmb ningã, yẽnda kʋʋ kinkir-bagbã ne tɩ-rɩtbã fãa tẽngã pʋgẽ. Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb makd maam n na n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ma?»" 
1Samuel28:10 La a Sayull wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr n yeele: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ b ka na n ning foom taal yel-kãngã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel28:11 Pagã sokame tɩ ãnda la b rat t'a bool n kõ-ba? A Sayull leokame t'a bool a Sãmwɛll n kõ-a. 
1Samuel28:12 La pagã sẽn yãnd a Sãmwɛllã, a kelmame n yeel a Sayull yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ y belg maam? Yaa yãmb la a Sayulli!»" 
1Samuel28:13 Rĩmã yeel-a lame «Da zoe rabeem ye. Fo nee bõe?» Pagã leoka a Sayull yaa: «Mam nee wẽnnaam a ye sẽn pukd tẽngã pʋgẽ n watẽ.» 
1Samuel28:14 Dẽ, a Sayull sokame n na n bãng a sẽn wẽnd bũmb ninga. Pagã leokame tɩ yaa nin-kẽem n pukdã, la a pila fuugu. A Sayull bãngame tɩ yaa a Sãmwɛlle, la yẽnda wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
1Samuel28:15 A Sãmwɛll yeela a Sayull yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ f nams maam n kɩt tɩ m puki?» A Sayull leokame: «Mam bee sũ-sãan-kãseng pʋga. Bala, Filistẽ-dãmbã zabda ne maam, la Wẽnnaam basa maam. Bãmb ka leok maam ne bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã, wall zãmsd pʋgẽ me ye. Mam boond-y lame tɩ y wilg-m m sẽn tog n maam bũmb ninga.»" 
1Samuel28:16 A Sãmwɛll yeel-a lame: «Sã n yaa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa foom n lebg f bɛ, yaa bõe tɩ y sokd maam?" 
1Samuel28:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maanda foom wa b sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ m yeel foomã. Bãmb deega f naamã n kõ a Davɩɩde. 
1Samuel28:18 Fo sẽn ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã, la f ka sak n sãam Amalɛk nebã ne bũmb nins fãa b sẽn tarã wa sẽn zems b sũ-puugrã, yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan foom woto rũndã." 
1Samuel28:19 Sẽn paase, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã tõog foom ne Israyɛll nebã. Beoogo, foom ne f kambã na n zĩnda ne maam, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã tõog Israyɛll tãb-biisã.»" 
1Samuel28:20 Zĩig pʋgẽ bala, a Sayull lʋɩɩ tẽng a woglmã tɛka, la a Sãmwɛll goamã kɩtame tɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-a. Sẽn paase, yẽnda rag n ka leb n tar pãng ye. Bala, yẽnda ka rɩ rɩɩb badaare, wĩndgã ne yʋngã tõr ye." 
1Samuel28:21 Pagã sẽn kolg a Sayull n yãnd t'a yɛɛsa wʋsgã, a yeel-a lame: «Gese, mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poakã gẽnega m yõor n maan bũmb ning yãmb sẽn yeel maam tɩ m maanã." 
1Samuel28:22 Moasã, m kotame tɩ yãmb me kelg y tʋmtʋmd-poakã koɛɛga. Bas-y tɩ m wa ne rɩɩb bilf tɩ y rɩ n paam pãng sorã zugu.»" 
1Samuel28:23 A Sayull zãgsame n yeel t'a kõn dɩ ye. La a tʋmtʋmdbã ne pagã pẽdg-a lame t'a yaool n sak n dɩ. La yẽnda tik n yikame, n zaoond gãagã zugu." 
1Samuel28:24 Pagã rag n tara nag-bi-wubdg a yãgrẽ wã. Yẽnda kẽnga tao-tao n yõk nag-bilã n kʋ n segle, la a yãk zom n nag n maan bur sẽn ka ning rã-bɩlle." 
1Samuel28:25 Pagã rɩka rɩɩbã n wa rɩgl a Sayull ne a tʋmtʋmdbã, la bãmb dɩɩme, la b yik yʋn-kãng bal n looge." 
1Samuel29:1 Filistẽ-dãmbã tigma b tãb-biisã fãa Afɛke, la Israyɛll nebã tilga b tãb-sikã Zizreyɛll ko-bundgã sɛɛgẽ." 
1Samuel29:2 Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs kolga ne neb koabg-koabga, la neb tusr-tusri, la a Davɩɩd ne a nebã tũ a Akiis n be poorẽ n pʋgda." 
1Samuel29:3 Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs sokame tɩ Ebre nin-kãensã maanda bõe kaanẽ? A Akiis leok-b lame: «Yaa Israyɛll rĩm a Sayull tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩde. Yaa hal daar zãr la yẽnda wa n be ne maam, la mam nan ka yã a sẽn maan bõn-wẽng ye.»" 
1Samuel29:4 La Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs sũy yika ne a Akiis tɩ b yeel-a yaa: «Kɩt-y tɩ rao-kãngã lebg n leb zĩig ning yãmb sẽn kõ-a wã. La a ra tũ tõnd n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ, n wa tɩ lebg tõnd bɛ zabrã wakat ye. Yẽnda na n yɩɩ wãn t'a soaalã sũur sig ne-a, sã n ka a sẽn na n fiuus tõnd nebã zutu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ka Davɩɩd-kãng yĩng la b sẽn dag n yɩɩnd la b saood n yetẽ tɩ: ‹A Sayull kʋʋ tusri, t'a Davɩɩd kʋ tus piigã› wɛ?»" 
1Samuel29:6 A Akiis boola a Davɩɩd n yeel-a yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ fo yaa nin-tɩrga, la m sũur nooma ne fo sẽn na n tũ maam n kẽnd n zabdẽ la d lebgd n wat tãb-sikẽ wã. Fo sẽn be ne maamã tɛka, mam ka yã bõn-wẽng fo zug ye. La baoosgo, nanambsã sũy ka noom ne foom ye." 
1Samuel29:7 Moasã, bɩ f lebg n kuil ne bãane, la f ra maan bũmb sẽn na n sãam Filistẽ nanambsã sũy ye.»" 
1Samuel29:8 A Davɩɩd soka a Akiis yaa: «M soaala, mam maana bõe? Mam sẽn be ne yãmbã tɛka, mam maana bõe tɩ y ka rat tɩ m tũ yãmb n kẽng n tɩ zab ne y bɛɛbã?»" 
1Samuel29:9 A Akiis leoka a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam miime tɩ fo tara bʋʋm wa Wẽnnaam malɛɛka, la Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs yeelame tɩ fo ka tõe n tũ tõnd n kẽng zabrã ye." 
1Samuel29:10 Woto yĩngã, bɩ foom ne neb nins sẽn tũ-b foomã sãd yibeoog pĩnd n looge.»" 
1Samuel29:11 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã sãda yibeoog pĩnd n lebg n leb Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ, la Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽnga Zizreyɛlle." 
1Samuel30:1 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã sẽn ta Siklaag rasem a tãabã daare, b mikame tɩ Amalɛk buudã rag n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne nug goabg sẽnẽ nebã la ne Siklaage, n tõog-b n ning b tẽngã bugum." 
1Samuel30:2 Bãmb yõga pagbã ne neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã fãa n looge, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem n tɩ ta yao-zʋʋga. La b ka kʋ ned ba a yembr ye. B yõg-b lame n tall n kuili." 
1Samuel30:3 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã sẽn ta tẽngã pʋgẽ, b mikame tɩ b ninga tẽngã bugum, la b talla bãmb pagbã ne b kom-dibli wã la b kom-pugli wã n looge." 
1Samuel30:4 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã zẽka b koees n yãbe, hal tɩ b pãngã sɛ." 
1Samuel30:5 Amalɛk-rãmbã rag n yõga a Davɩɩd pagb a yiibã me n looge. Yaa Zizreyɛll biig a Akinoam, ne Karmell dao a Naball pag a Abigayɩlle." 
1Samuel30:6 Sũ-sãan-kãseng n yõk a Davɩɩde, bala, nebã rag n gomdame tɩ b na n lob-a-la kuga, bãmb fãa sũyã sẽn sãam b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã yĩngã yĩnga. La a Davɩɩd paama pãng sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã nengẽ." 
1Samuel30:7 Yẽnda yeela a Ayimelɛk biig a Abiyataar sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdã yaa: «M kotame tɩ f tall maan-kʋʋr kãsem fuugã n wa.» La a Abiyataar tall-a lame n wa kɩs a Davɩɩde. 
1Samuel30:8 A Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Mam sã n pʋgl nin-bãmbã, m na n paam-b lame bɩ?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka yẽnda yaa: «Fo na n paam-b lame n fãag neb nins b sẽn tall n loogã.»" 
1Samuel30:9 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd ne neb kobs-yoobã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã rɩka sore, n kẽn n ta Besoor ko-soogã." 
1Samuel30:10 La a Davɩɩd kell n kẽnga taoor ne neb kobs-naasã, bala, neb kobs-yi n yals beenẽ, b sẽn yɛ wʋsg n ka leb n tõe n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã yĩnga." 
1Samuel30:11 Bãmb yãnda Ezɩpt ned a yembr weoogã pʋgẽ n peeg-a n wa a Davɩɩd nengẽ. Bãmb kõ-a-la rɩɩb t'a rɩ la koom t'a yũ. 
1Samuel30:12 B leb n kõ-a-la kankam-gil-koeemse, ne reezẽ-gĩn-koeems a yiibu. Yẽnda sẽn dɩ n sɛ, a nengã vẽnegame. Bala, rag n yaa rasem a tãab la yʋnd a tãab yẽnda sẽn ka paam koom ne rɩɩb ye." 
1Samuel30:13 A Davɩɩd sok-a-la a sẽn yaa ned ning yamba, la a sẽn yitẽ. Yẽnda leokame: «Mam yaa Ezɩpt neda, n yaa Amalɛk ned a yembr yamba, la yaa hal rab-tãtẽ la mam zu-soabã loog n bas maam, mam sẽn lʋɩ bãag yĩnga." 
1Samuel30:14 Tõnd kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Kerɛt tẽng nug goabg sẽnẽ nebã, ne Zʋʋda soolem nebã, la Kalɛɛb nug goabg sẽnẽ nebã, n ning Siklaag tẽngã bugum.»" 
1Samuel30:15 A Davɩɩd soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo tõe n yãaga tõnd n kẽng nin-bãmb nengẽ bɩ?» La yẽnda leokame: «Yãmb sã n wẽen ne Wẽnd tɩ y ka na n kʋ-ma, la y ka na n dɩk-m n kõ m soaalã, mam na n tall-y lame n kẽnge.»" 
1Samuel30:16 Yẽnda yãaga a Davɩɩd n kẽnge, la b tɩ mikame tɩ Amalɛk-rãmbã pida tẽngã n dɩtẽ la b yũuda, la b maand sũ-noogo, bala, b rag n wʋka te-zɛɛdem wʋsg Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Zʋʋda nebã tẽms pʋsẽ." 
1Samuel30:17 A Davɩɩd zaba ne bãmb yibeoog pĩnd hal tɩ ta vẽkembeoogã zaabre, la bãmb ned ba a yembr ka põse, sã n ka kom-bɩɩs kobs-naasã sẽn zomb yʋgmã wã n zoe wã bala." 
1Samuel30:18 A Davɩɩd leb n deega Amalɛk-rãmbã sẽn dag n wʋk bũmb ninsã fãa, la a leb n deeg a pagb a yiibã." 
1Samuel30:19 La sã n yaa ne a Davɩɩd dãmb neb nins b sẽn dag n yõgã, ned ba a yembr ka paoog ye, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem tɩ tãag yao-zʋʋga, kom-dibli la kom-pugli, la baa Amalɛk rãmbã sẽn dag n wʋk teed ninsã, ba a yembr ka menem ye. A Davɩɩd talla bõn-kãens fãa n looge." 
1Samuel30:20 A Davɩɩd wʋka rũm-bɛdã ne rũm-bãoonegã. La neb nins sẽn lʋɩ rũmsã taoor n gɩbend-bã rag n yetame: «Ad a Davɩɩd sẽn tɩ zab n deeg la woto fãa!» 
1Samuel30:21 A Davɩɩd sẽn ta zĩig ning neb kobs-yi wã sẽn dag n yɛ wʋsg n ka tõe n leb n kẽng taoorã tɩ b bas-b Besoor ko-soogã noorã, nin-bãmb yiime n na n seg a Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn dag n be-b ne a Davɩɩdã. A Davɩɩd kolg-b lame n pʋʋs-b n sok b keelem." 
1Samuel30:22 Nin-yood ne nin-wẽns nins fãa sẽn dag n tũ a Davɩɩdã yeelame: «Bãmb sẽn ka tũ tõnd n kẽngã, bãmb ka n na paam bũmb nins tõnd sẽn zab n deegã ye. Ned kam fãa na n deega a pag ne a kamb bal n looge.»" 
1Samuel30:23 La a Davɩɩd yeel-b lame yaa: «M saam-biisi, da maan-y-yã a woto ne bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ tõndã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũu tõndo, la b kɩtame tɩ tõnd tõog neb nins sẽn wa n zab ne tõndã." 
1Samuel30:24 Ãnda soab n na n kelg yãmb yel-kãngã pʋga? Neb nins sẽn kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ wã pʋɩɩre, ne neb nins sẽn pa-b poorẽ n gũ teedã pʋɩɩr segd n zema taaba. Bãmb ned kam fãa na n paama pʋɩɩre.»" 
1Samuel30:25 Sẽn sɩng ne badaare, b kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãng lebg no-tũudg ne tõog Israyɛll nebã yĩng hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Samuel30:26 A Davɩɩd sẽn ta Siklaagã, yẽnda yãka teedã n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kõ Zʋʋda nebã kãsem-dãmbã sẽn yaa yẽnda zo-rãmbã, la a yeel-b yaa: «Ad kũun mam sẽn yãk Sẽn-Ka-Saab bɛɛbã teed pʋgẽ yãmb yĩnga!»" 
1Samuel30:27 Woto, yẽnda yãkame n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kɩs Betɛll kãsem-dãmbã, ne Ramot sẽn be nug goabgã kãsem-dãmbã, la Yatɩɩr kãsem-dãmbã," 
1Samuel30:28 ne Arowɛɛr kãsem-dãmbã, la Sifmot kãsem-dãmbã, ne Ɛstemoa kãsem-dãmbã," 
1Samuel30:29 la Rakall kãsem-dãmbã, ne Yerameyɛll tẽmsã kãsem-dãmbã, la Kɛn nebã tẽms kãsem-dãmbã," 
1Samuel30:30 ne Horma kãsem-dãmbã, la Boor-Asãn kãsem-dãmbã, ne Hatak kãsem-dãmbã." 
1Samuel30:31 La a tʋm tɩ b tɩ kɩs Ebrõ kãsem-dãmbã ne zĩis nins fãa a Davɩɩd ne a nebã sẽn dag n kẽngã. 
1Samuel31:1 Filistẽ-dãmbã yika zabr ne Israyɛll nebã Gilboa tãngã zugu, la yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne Israyɛll nebã tɩ b zoe sẽn na yɩl n põs Filistẽ-dãmbã. Israyɛll neb wʋsg kii tãngã zugu." 
1Samuel31:2 Filistẽ-dãmbã kolg n dɩdga a Sayull ne a kom-dibli wã, n kʋ a Zonatã ne a Abinadaab la a Malki-Suwa sẽn yaa a Sayull kom-dibli wã." 
1Samuel31:3 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, zabrã wa n lebga a Sayull bal la b baooda. Tãb-tãoodbã yãnd-a lame, la rabeem yõk-a lame t'a rigd hal wʋsgo." 
1Samuel31:4 La a Sayull yeela bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã yaa: «Wõog f sʋʋgã n kõs-m n kʋ, tɩ nin-bãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã ra wa yaal-m n yaool n kʋ-m ye.» La bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã ka sak ye. Bala, rabeem dag n tar-a lame. Dẽ, a Sayull dɩka a sʋʋgã n tilg n bas a meng n lʋɩ a zugu." 
1Samuel31:5 Bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a a Sayull zab-teedã sẽn yã t'a Sayull kiime, yẽnda me rɩka a sʋʋgã n tilg n bas a meng n lʋɩ a zug n ki." 
1Samuel31:6 Yɩɩ woto la a Sayull ne a kom-dibli a tãabã, la a sẽn dag n zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã ne a nebã fãa naag taab n ki badaare." 
1Samuel31:7 Israyɛll nebã sẽn be Zizreyɛll longã sẽnẽ wã ne neb nins sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã sẽn yã tɩ Israyɛll nebã zoeeme, la t'a Sayull ne a kambã kiime wã, bãmb basa b tẽmsã n zoe, la Filistẽ-dãmbã tɩ zĩnda tẽn-kãens pʋsẽ." 
1Samuel31:8 Vẽkembeoogo, Filistẽ-dãmbã wa n wʋka sẽn ki-bã teedo, la bãmb yãnda a Sayull ne a kom-dibli wã sẽn ki n dɩg Gilboa tãngã zugu." 
1Samuel31:9 Dẽ, bãmb fiuuga a Sayull zugã, la b yees a zab-teedã. La b tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽms pʋsẽ n tɩ togs koe-noogã b bõn-naandsã rotẽ ne b nebã fãa." 
1Samuel31:10 Bãmb bĩnga a Sayull zab-teedã Astarte-rãmbã roog pʋgẽ, la b yagl a kũumã Bɛt-Sam lalgã zugu." 
1Samuel31:11 Galaad-Yabɛɛs nebã sẽn wʋm bũmb nins Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn maan a Sayullã," 
1Samuel31:12 b gãndaadã fãa yikame n kẽn yʋngã tõre, n tɩ sik a Sayull ne a kambã kũum Bɛt-Sam lalgã zugu, n tall-b n kẽng Yabɛɛs n tɩ yõog bugum." 
1Samuel31:13 Dẽ, bãmb wʋka b kõabã n tɩ mum Yabɛɛs tɩɩgã tẽngre, la b loe noor dasem a yopoe." 
2Samuel1:1 A Sayull kũumã wakate, t'a Davɩɩd dag n tõoga Amalɛk n lebg n wa Siklaag n zĩnd be rasem a yiibu." 
2Samuel1:2 Da-tãtẽ daarã, ned a ye n yi a Sayull tãb-sika zĩigẽ n wa be, la a futa fãa rag n pãrsame t'a zugã yaa tom. Yẽnda sẽn ta a Davɩɩd nengẽ, yẽnda wõgemda tẽnga." 
2Samuel1:3 A Davɩɩd sok-a lame t'a yii yɛ. Yẽnda leokame t'a yii Israyɛll nebã tãb-sik zĩigẽ. 
2Samuel1:4 A Davɩɩd sok-a lame yaa: «M kotame tɩ f togs-ma! Yaa bõe n maan beenẽ?» Dẽ, yẽnda leokame: «Nebã zoeeme, la wʋsg kiime. A Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã me kiime.»" 
2Samuel1:5 A Davɩɩd sok-a lame: «Fo maana a wãn n bãng t'a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã me kiime?» 
2Samuel1:6 Bi-bɩɩgã leokame: «Mam dag n bee Gilboa tãngã zugu, la m yãame t'a Sayull tik a kãnde, la Saar dãmbã ne wed-rʋʋdbã rag n kolg n dɩdg-a lame." 
2Samuel1:7 Dẽ a Sayull sẽn wẽneg n yãnd maam, a boola maam tɩ m wa. La mam leokame tɩ n-na! M waame." 
2Samuel1:8 Dẽ, bãmb soka maam tɩ m yaa ãnda? Mam leokame tɩ m yaa Amalɛk neda." 
2Samuel1:9 Dẽ, bãmb yeela maam yaa: «M kotame tɩ f wa kʋ-m n baase, bala, mam toogã yaa wʋsgo, la m ka kiid ye." 
2Samuel1:10 La mam kolgame n baas-ba. Bala, mam bãngame tɩ b ka tõe n leb n põs b poglgã pʋgẽ ye. Dẽ, mam dɩka b maanfã, ne b zũurã sẽn dag n be b nugẽ wã n wat n na n kõ yãmba m soaalã.»" 
2Samuel1:11 A Davɩɩd sũurã sãamame t'a pãrs a futu, la neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã me maana a woto." 
2Samuel1:12 Bãmb wiisame n yãbe, la b loe noor hal tɩ ta zaabre a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã yĩnga, ne Israyɛll buudã sẽn pa tãp pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel1:13 A Davɩɩd soka bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn togsã yẽ kibarã t'a yaa yɛ neda? La yẽnda leokame t'a yaa sãan biiga, la yẽnda yaa Amalɛk buudu." 
2Samuel1:14 A Davɩɩd sok-a lame tɩ yɩɩ wãn tɩ yẽnda kʋ Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk-a soab t'a lebg rĩmã, n ka zoe rabeem." 
2Samuel1:15 A Davɩɩd boola bi-bɩɩg a ye t'a wa kʋ-a, la bi-bɩɩgã kolg n kʋ-a lame." 
2Samuel1:16 A Davɩɩd dag n yeela Amalɛk nedã yaa: «Fo yell bee f meng zugu. Bala, fo meng n togs tɩ f kʋʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk ned ning t'a lebg rĩmã.»" 
2Samuel1:17 A Davɩɩd yɩɩla sũ-sãang yɩɩll a Sayull ne a bi-ribl a Zonatã yĩnga. 
2Samuel1:18 La yẽnda yeelame tɩ b zãms Zʋʋda kambã yɩɩllã. Yɩɩllã bee nin-tɩrg sebrã pʋgẽ. 
2Samuel1:19 «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb ziirã paa tãmsã zutu. Maana a wãn tɩ gãndaadã sãame?" 
2Samuel1:20 Da gom-y-yã a yell Gat tẽngã pʋgẽ ye. Da gom-y koe-kãngã Askalon soayã zutu, tɩ Filistẽ pagbã wa maan sũ-noogo, la tɩ moosã pagb wa kɩdem ye." 
2Samuel1:21 Gilboa tãmse! Bɩ meenem la saag da leb n ni yãmb zutu, wall y pʋtã ra wom ye. Bala, gãndaadã gãn-tigs paama paoogr beenẽ, la a Sayull gãongã kõn tol n leb n paam kaam ye." 
2Samuel1:22 A Zonatã tãpã ka lebg n ka kʋ gãndaadã ye. A Sayull sʋʋgã ka lebg n ka raag bɛɛbã zɩɩm ye. 
2Samuel1:23 A Sayull ne a Zonatã, nebã rag n nong-y lame, b sɩd rag n nong-y lame, B rag n bee ne taab vɩɩmã pʋga, la b naaga taab kũumã pʋg me. Bãmb dag n yaa faasg ne zoeese, wala sɩlse, la b rag n tara pãng wa gɩgma." 
2Samuel1:24 Israyɛll pagba, yãb-y-yã a Sayull yĩnga, sẽn dag n kõt-a yãmb fu-miid sẽn yaa neeba, sẽn dag n kõt yãmb sãnem fãn-teedã." 
2Samuel1:25 Yɩɩ wãn tɩ gãndaadã pa tãpẽ? Maana a wãn t'a Zonatã ki tãmsã zutu? 
2Samuel1:26 M saam-biig a Zonatã, mam tara sũ-sãan-kãsenga, fo yĩnga. Mam dag n nong-f-la hal wʋsgo. Fo nonglmã dag n tara pãng wʋsg n yɩɩd ned sẽn nong pagba." 
2Samuel1:27 Maana a wãn tɩ gãndaadã lʋɩ? Maana a wãn tɩ b zab-teeda sãame?» 
2Samuel2:1 Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd kolga Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sok-b t'a kẽng Zʋʋda tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ bɩ? La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame n yeel t'a kẽnge. A Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yɛɛnẽ la a segd n kẽnge? Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame t'a kẽng Ebrõ." 
2Samuel2:2 A Davɩɩd kẽnga be ne a pagb a yiibã: Ya a Zizreyɛll biig a Ahinoam ne Karmell biig a Abigayɩll sẽn dag n yɩ a Naball pagã. 
2Samuel2:3 A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã ned fãa peeg a zak rãmb n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Ebrõ tẽmsã pʋse. 
2Samuel2:4 Zʋʋda nebã waa beenẽ, la b sudga a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam n kɩt t'a lebg Zʋʋda buudã rĩmã. Neb n tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd tɩ Yabɛɛs nebã sẽn be Galaadã muma a Sayulli." 
2Samuel2:5 A Davɩɩd tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel Yabɛɛs nebã yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning y zut barka, yãmb sẽn maan y rĩm a Sayull neere, n mum-a wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel2:6 La moasã, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilg b sõmblem ne yãmba, n maan-y neere. La mam me na n maana yãmb neere, y sẽn maan bõn-kãngã wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel2:7 La moasã, bɩ y keng y mens n yɩ gãndaado, yaa sɩd tɩ yãmb zu-soab a Sayull kiime, la Zʋʋda nebã sudga maam rĩung kaam n kɩt tɩ m lebg rĩmã.»" 
2Samuel2:8 A Neer biig a Abneer sẽn dag n yaa a Sayull tãb-biisã naabã peega a Sayull biig a Is-Bosɛt n kẽng Mahanayim. 
2Samuel2:9 A Abneer kɩtame t'a Is-Bosɛt lebg Galaad ne Asʋʋr la Zizreyɛll ne Efrayiim ne Benzame, rat n yeel tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa naaba." 
2Samuel2:10 A Sayull biig a Is-Bosɛt dag n tara yʋʋm pis-naas a sẽn wa n lebg Israyɛll naabã, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm a yiibu. Wakat-kãng tɩ Zʋʋda nebã rag n bee ne a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel2:11 A Davɩɩd sẽn yɩ rĩm Ebrõ n soog Zʋʋda wã, yɩɩ yʋʋm a yopoe la kiis a yoobe." 
2Samuel2:12 A Neer biig a Abneer ne a Sayull biig a Is-Bosɛt nebã yii Mahanayim n kẽng Gabawõ. 
2Samuel2:13 La a Seruza biig a Zoaab yiime n seg bãmb Gabawõ bãka noore. A Davɩɩd nebã bee bãka kɩreng a yembre, t'a Is-Bosɛt nebã be bãka kɩreng a to." 
2Samuel2:14 A Abneer yeela a Zoaab tɩ kom-bɩɩsã yik n zab ne taaba. La a Zoaab yeelame tɩ b yiki. 
2Samuel2:15 Dẽ, bãmb yikame tɩ b sõorã zems taaba. Benzame neb piig la a yiib n yik a Is-Bosɛt yĩnga, la a Davɩɩd neb me piig la a yiib n yiki." 
2Samuel2:16 Bãmb ned kam fãa gãda a zabd-n-taaga zugu, n kõs a lʋgrã ne sʋʋg tɩ b lagem taab n lʋɩ. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ zĩ-kãng sẽn pẽ Gabawõ wã yʋʋr boondẽ tɩ zabr sʋʋs pʋʋgo." 
2Samuel2:17 Badaare, zabrã yɩɩ toog wʋsgo, la a Davɩɩd nebã tõoga a Abneer ne Israyɛll nebã." 
2Samuel2:18 La a Seruza kom-dibli a yiib n dag n be beenẽ: A Zoaabe, a Abisayi, ne a Azayɛlle. La a Azayɛll naoã rag n yaa faasg wa walga." 
2Samuel2:19 Yẽnda riga a Abneer n ka bʋdg goabg wall rɩtg n bas-a ye. 
2Samuel2:20 A Abneer wẽnegame n ges a poorẽ n sok tɩ yaa a Azayɛll bɩ? La a Azayɛll leokame tɩ yaa yẽnda. 
2Samuel2:21 A Abneer yeel-a lame t'a bʋdg n yõk a tãb-biig a ye n dees a teedã, la a Azayɛll ka sak n na n bʋdg n bas-a ye." 
2Samuel2:22 A Abneer leb n yeela a Azayɛll yaa: «Lebg n bas-ma, bõe yĩng tɩ mam na n kʋ-fo? Mam sã n kʋ foom, mam na n leb n maana a wãn n doog m zug f kẽem a Zoaab taoore?»" 
2Samuel2:23 La a Azayɛll zãgsame t'a ka na n lebg ye. Woto a Abneer kõsa a pʋgã ne a kãndã sɛɛg tɩ sãag n yi a poorẽ t'a lʋɩ n ki zĩig pʋgẽ. Neba sã n dag n kẽn n ta zĩig ning a Azayɛll sẽn ki wã, b yaasdame." 
2Samuel2:24 A Zoaab ne a Abisayi riga a Abneer la wĩndga kõom wakate, b taa Amma kunkubrã sẽn be Giya yaanga, Gabawõ we-raoogã sor zugu." 
2Samuel2:25 Benzame neb wʋsg tigmame n tũ a Abneer n tɩ yaas tãngã zugu. 
2Samuel2:26 A Abneer boola a Zoaab n yeele: «Sʋʋg na n tara kɛɛb n ka vʋʋsdẽ sɩda? Yãmb ka mi t'a baoosg na n yɩɩ sũ-toog la? Dabʋr la fo na n yeel f nebã tɩ b bas b saam-biisã rigbu?» 
2Samuel2:27 A Zoaab leokame: «Mam wẽenda ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ, tɩ yãmb sã n dag n ka gome, dag n na n taa beoogo, tɩ nebã yaool n bas b saam-biisã rigbu.»" 
2Samuel2:28 A Zoaab peeba baorgo, la nebã fãa yalsame n ka leb n dig Israyɛll nebã ye, la b basa zabrã." 
2Samuel2:29 Badaar yʋngã tõre, a Abneer ne a nebã kẽna Araba tẽngã pʋgẽ. Bãmb dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n tũ Bitrõ n ta Mahanayim." 
2Samuel2:30 A Zoaab sẽn bas nebã rigb n lebg n kuilã, a tigma a nebã fãa, la yẽnda mikame t'a Azayɛll ne neb piig la a wɛ n dag n ka be." 
2Samuel2:31 La a Davɩɩd nebã kʋʋ a Abneer neb kobs-tã la pis-yoobe, sẽn yaa Benzame buudã." 
2Samuel2:32 Bãmb talla a Azayɛll kũumã n tɩ mum a ba yaoogẽ Betlehɛm. A Zoaab ne a nebã kẽna badaar yʋngã tõre, la b taa Ebrõ tɩ zĩigã yaool n yẽege." 
2Samuel3:1 Zabrã kaoosa wʋsg a Davɩɩd buudã ne a Sayull buudã sʋka. A Davɩɩd pãngã rag n paasdame la a Sayull buudã pãng da boogdame. 
2Samuel3:2 A Davɩɩd doga kom-dibli Ebrõ. Yẽnda bi-kãsenga yaa a Amno, t'a ma yʋʋr la a Akinoam sẽn yaa a Zizreyɛll biiga." 
2Samuel3:3 Yẽnda bi-pʋgdg la a Kileyab t'a ma yʋʋr la a Abigayɩll sẽn yɩ Karmell dao a Naball pagã. Tãabẽ soabã yaa a Absalom, t'a ma yʋʋr la a Maaka sẽn yaa Gesʋʋr naab a Talmayi biigã." 
2Samuel3:4 Naasẽ soaba yaa a Adoniza, t'a ma yʋʋr la a Hagiti. A nu soabã yaa a Sefatiya, a ma yʋʋr la a Abitalle." 
2Samuel3:5 A yoob soabã yaa a Zitreyam, a Davɩɩd pag a Egla biiga. Bãmb yaa a Davɩɩd kamb sẽn dog Ebrõ wã." 
2Samuel3:6 Zabr ning sẽn dag n be a Davɩɩd buudã ne a Sayull buudã sʋk wakatã, a Abneer paama pãng a Sayull buudã sʋka." 
2Samuel3:7 A Sayull dag n tara pʋg-rɩkdga t'a yʋʋr la a Ritspa n yaa a Aya biiga. A Is-Bosɛt yeela a Abneer yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb kẽ ne m ba wã paga?» 
2Samuel3:8 Rẽ, a Abneer sũurã yika wʋsg a Is-Bosɛt goamã yĩnga, t'a yeel-a: «Mam yaa Zʋʋda nebã baag la? Mam maana pʋ-peelem ne f ba a Sayull yirã rãmba, ne a saam-biisã, la a zo-rãmbã, la mam ka bas t'a Davɩɩd tõog foom ye, tɩ fo wa yas rũndã n ningd maam taal pʋg-kãngã poorẽ?" 
2Samuel3:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n wẽename n yeel a Davɩɩd tɩ bãmb na n deega a Sayull rĩungã n kõ-a t'a soog Israyɛll soolmã ne Zʋʋda, sẽn sɩng ne Dan hal tɩ ta Bɛɛr-seba. Mam sã n ka kɩt tɩ yellã yɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wẽen n togs a Davɩɩdã, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ra bas maam ye.»" 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 A Is-Bosɛt ka saag n leok a Abneer tɩ bũmb ye. Bala, yẽnda ra zoet-a lame." 
2Samuel3:12 A Abneer tʋma neb a Davɩɩd nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Tẽngã yaa ãndã n so? Maan-y kaool ne maam tɩ m kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa wẽnemd n kẽ-yã.» 
2Samuel3:13 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Beneere! Mam na n maana kaool ne foom. La yaa bũmb a yembr bal la mam kot foom. Yaa tɩ f sã n dat n yãnd mam nengã, bɩ f reng n kɩt tɩ b tall a Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall n wa kõ-ma, tɩ fo mengã yaool n wa.»" 
2Samuel3:14 La a Davɩɩd tʋma neb a Sayull biig a Is-Bosɛt nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Lebs maam m pag a Mikall mam sẽn dag n wõrs Filistẽ-dãmbã yo-gãnd koabg n yao n deeg-a n maan m pagã.» 
2Samuel3:15 A Is-Bosɛt tʋmame tɩ b tɩ deeg a Mikall a sɩd a Paltiyɛll sẽn yaa a Layik biiga nengẽ n wa. 
2Samuel3:16 A sɩd a Paltiyɛll dag n pʋgd-a lame, la a yãbda, hal n tɩ tãag Bahurim. La a Abneer yeel-a lame t'a lebg n kuili. Dẽ, yẽnda lebgame n kuili." 
2Samuel3:17 A Abneer yẽsa ne Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmb n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb dag n sɩng n datame t'a Davɩɩd yɩ y rĩmã! 
2Samuel3:18 Moasã, bɩ y maan wa yãmb sẽn dag n datã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab dag n goma b yell n yeel tɩ yaa ne b tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd la b na n fãag Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã Filistẽ nebã nusẽ, la bãmb bɛɛbã fãa nusẽ.»" 
2Samuel3:19 Dẽ, a Abneer goma ne Benzame nebã me woto. La yẽnda kẽnga Ebrõ n tɩ togs a Davɩɩd bũmb nins Israyɛll nebã la Benzame nebã fãa sẽn dat n maanã." 
2Samuel3:20 Neb pisi n yãag a Abneer n kẽng a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ. La a Davɩɩd maana tigr bãmb yĩnga. 
2Samuel3:21 A Abneer yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam na n kẽngame n tɩ tigim Israyɛll nebã fãa tɩ b yam kẽ yãmba. Bãmb na n maana kaool ne yãmba, la y na n dɩ y naamã wa y sẽn date.» A Davɩɩd basa a Abneer t'a lebg n kuil ne bãane." 
2Samuel3:22 Sẽn yɩ bilfu, a Davɩɩd nebã ne a Zoaab yii zabr weoog n wat ne teed wʋsgo. La rẽ t'a Abneer dag n ka leb n be a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ ye. Bala, a Davɩɩd dag n kõ-a-la sor t'a lebg n kuil ne laafɩ." 
2Samuel3:23 La a Zoaab ne tãb-biis nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã sẽn ta, b togsa a Zoaab yaa: «Ade, a Neer biig Abneer waa rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ, la bãmb bas-a lame t'a lebg n kuil ne laafɩ.»" 
2Samuel3:24 A Zoaab kẽnga rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Yaa Bõe la yãmb sẽn maan a woto wã? A Abneer waa yãmb nengẽ, la yɩɩ wãn tɩ yãmb bas-a t'a loog ne laafɩ?" 
2Samuel3:25 Yãmb meng mi a Neer biig a Abneer sẽn yaa ned ninga. Yẽnda waame n na n belg yãmb n bãng y sẽn saagd n na n kẽng zĩis ninsi, la y sẽn dat n na n maan bũmb ningã fãa.»" 
2Samuel3:26 A Zoaab sẽn yi a Davɩɩd nengẽ, a tʋma neb tɩ b babs a Abneer n tɩ paam-a Sira bulga noor n tall-a n lebg n wa. La a Davɩɩd dag n ka bãng ye." 
2Samuel3:27 A Abneer sẽn lebg n wa Ebrõ wã, A Zoaab tall-a lame n kẽng tẽngã noore, wa a rat n lillame n togs-a koɛɛga. La a Zoaab kõsa a Abneer pʋga t'a ki. A Zoaab maana woto n na n dol a yao a Azayɛll kũumã." 
2Samuel3:28 A Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm yellã, a yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab miime t'a Neer biig a Abneer kũumã taal ka rog maam ne m rĩungã zug ye." 
2Samuel3:29 Bɩ a Abneer zɩɩmã raagr taal zĩnd a Zoaab ne a zakã rãmb fãa zugu. Bɩ ned da kong a Zoaab buudã pʋgẽ, sẽn tar taoor bãaga, bɩ wãoodo, wall nin-saan-paga, wall ned sẽn ki ne sʋʋga, bɩ ned sẽn ka tar n dɩtẽ ye.»" 
2Samuel3:30 Yɩɩ woto la a Zoaab ne a yao a Abisayi kʋ a Abneere, yẽnda sẽn dag n kʋ bãmb yao a Azayɛll zabrã zĩigẽ Gabawõ wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel3:31 A Davɩɩd yeela a Zoaab ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be-b ne yẽnda wã tɩ b pãrs b futu, n yeelg sũ-sãang futu, n yãb a Abneer kũumã yĩnga. La rĩm a Davɩɩd dag n kẽndame n pʋgd kũumã pãndare." 
2Samuel3:32 Bãmb muma a Abneer Ebrõ. La rĩmã yãba nintãm, la nebã fãa me yãbame." 
2Samuel3:33 Rĩmã pʋda sũ-sãang yɩɩll n yeele: «A Abneer ka tog n ki wa yalem ye. 
2Samuel3:34 B rag n ka sẽb fo nusã ye, la b rag n ka balg f nao ne bãens me ye. La b yaool n kʋʋ foom wa nin-wẽnsã sẽn kʋʋd ned to-to wã.»" 
2Samuel3:35 La nebã fãa leb n yãba a Abneer yĩnga. Nebã fãa kolga a Davɩɩd badaar n na n yeel-a t'a rɩ tɩ wĩndgã nan ka kẽ ye. La a Davɩɩd wẽename n yeele: «Mam sã n lemb rɩɩbo, tɩ wĩndgã nan ka kẽ, bɩ Wẽnnaam da bas-m ye.»" 
2Samuel3:36 Nebã fãa yãame tɩ rĩmã sẽn maanã yaa sõama wa a sẽn zoe n maan tɩ loogã. 
2Samuel3:37 Badaare, Zʋʋda nebã ne Israyɛll nebã fãa bãngame, tɩ ka rĩm a Davɩɩd n dag n kõ noor tɩ b kʋ a Neer biig Abneer ye." 
2Samuel3:38 Rĩmã yeela a nebã yaa: «Yãmb ka mi tɩ na-biig sẽn yaa nin-kãseng n ki Israyɛll tẽngã pʋg rũndã la? 
2Samuel3:39 Baa ne b sẽn pʋdg mam zug rĩung kaam tɩ m lebg rĩmã, mam ket n ka tar pãng ye. La nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa a Seruza kambã nen-keglem yɩɩda maam. Ned ning sẽn maan-a wẽnga, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab rol yẽnda wa sẽn zems wẽng ning a sẽn maanã.»" 
2Samuel4:1 A Is-Bosɛt sẽn wʋm t'a Abneer kii Ebrõ wã, yẽnda gĩina fãa maagame la Israyɛll nebã fãa yɛɛsame." 
2Samuel4:2 A Is-Bosɛt rag n tara tãb-biis nanambs a yiibu. A yembr yʋʋr la a Baana, la a to wã yʋʋr la a Rekaabe. Bãmb yaa Benzame buudu, n yaa Beerot dao a Rimon kamba. B rag n geelgdame tɩ Beerot yaa Benzame buudã tẽng a yembre." 
2Samuel4:3 Rẽ kitame tɩ Beerot nebã rag n zoe n tɩ kẽed Gitayim, la b paa be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Samuel4:4 A Sayull biig a Zonatã rag n tara biig sẽn yaa põore. Wakat ning nebã sẽn yi Zizreyɛll n wa togs a Sayull ne a Zonatã kũumã, tɩ biigã rag n tara yʋʋm a nu. Pag ning sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda yaoondã buk-a lame n na n zoe, la yẽnda yãgba pʋgẽ, biigã lʋɩɩme t'a naoã komse. Biigã yʋʋr la a Mefibosɛte." 
2Samuel4:5 Beerot dao a Rimon kamb a Rekaab ne a Baana kẽnga a Is-Bosɛt yirã ne wĩntoogo, n tɩ mik t'a gãeeme n vʋʋsdẽ." 
2Samuel4:6 Bãmb kẽe hal zakã yaanga, wa b rag n tara Oorz n watẽ, la bãmb soosame n kẽ n mik t'a Is-Bosɛt gãe a gãagẽ, la b kõsa a pʋgã. Dẽ, a Rekaab ne a yao a Baana yiime n zoe. Bãmb kʋ-a lame n fiuug a zugã n tall n loog n dɩk Araba tẽngã sore, n kẽn yʋngã tõre." 
2Samuel4:7  
2Samuel4:8 Bãmb talla a Is-Bosɛt zugã n kẽng rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Ad yãmb bɛ a Sayull sẽn dag n dat n kʋ yãmba biig a Is-Bosɛt zugu. Rũndã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roka yãmb sũur ne a Sayulli, la ne a roogã.»"
