2Samuel4:9 Rĩm a Davɩɩd leoka Beerot dao a Rimon biig a Rekaab ne a yao a Baana yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã sẽn fãag maam sũ-sãangã fãa pʋgẽ wã! 
2Samuel4:10 Ned ning sẽn wa n togs-a maam a Sayull kʋʋrã rag n tẽedame t'a wa n taasa maam koe-noogo. La mam kɩtame tɩ b yõk-a n kʋ Siklaag n dol koɛɛg ninga yẽnda sẽn togsã. 
2Samuel4:11 Nin-wẽns na n yɩ a wãna, n tɩ kẽ nin-tɩrg roogẽ, n kʋ-a a gãagẽ, tɩ mam bas-ba, n ka rol-b b sẽn daag zɩɩmã yĩnga, n kɩt tɩ b menem dũni moasã?»" 
2Samuel4:12 A Davɩɩd kõ a kom-bɩɩsã noor tɩ b kʋ-ba. Kom-bɩɩsã yõga bãmb n fiuus b nusã ne b naoã, n tall-b n tɩ luul Ebrõ bãka noore. La b rɩka a Is-bosɛt zugã n mum a Abneer yaoogẽ wã Ebrõ." 
2Samuel5:1 Israyɛll buudã fãa kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Tõnd ne yãmb yaa bũmb a yembre. 
2Samuel5:2 A Sayull sẽn dag n yaa tõnd dĩmã wakate, yaa yãmb n dag n luɩt Israyɛll nebã taoor wakat fãa tɩ b kẽnd n zabdẽ, la y lʋɩt b taoor tɩ b lebg n wa.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yãmb yaa: «Foom n na n yɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã pe-kɩɩma, foom n na n lebg Israyɛll naaba.»" 
2Samuel5:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã fãa kẽnga rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ, la rĩm a Davɩɩd maana kaool Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor ne bãmb Ebrõ. Bãmb pʋdga a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã." 
2Samuel5:4 A Davɩɩd sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã. La yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-naase. 
2Samuel5:5 Yẽnda rɩɩ naam Ebrõ n soog Zʋʋda yʋʋm a yopoe la kiis a yoobe. La yẽnda rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm n soog Israyɛll gilli, ne Zʋʋda nebã yʋʋm pis-tã la a tãabo." 
2Samuel5:6 Rĩm a Davɩɩd ne a nebã kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ zab ne Zebuus-rãmbã sẽn dag n be tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã. La bãmb yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Yãmb kõn kẽ ka ye! Zoensã ne wobsã b yeyn-yeyn bal n na n gɩdg yãmba.» B rat n yeelame t'a Davɩɩd ka na n kẽ be ye. 
2Samuel5:7 La baoosgo, a Davɩɩd zab n deega Sɩyõ tẽngã pãng zĩiga. Yaa be la b sẽn boond t'a Davɩɩd tẽngã." 
2Samuel5:8 Badaare, a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Ned sã n dat n tõog Zebuus-rãmbã, bɩ a tũ ko-sorã n kʋ põyã ne zoensã tɩ b yaa mam bɛɛba.» Yaa woto yĩng la b sẽn yet tɩ zoensã ne põyã ka tõe n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roog pʋg ye." 
2Samuel5:9 A Davɩɩd zĩnda tẽn-kãng sẽn yaa pãngã zĩigã, la a pʋd-a tẽngã yʋʋr t'a Davɩɩd tẽnga. Yẽnda mee lalg Milo n tɩ yek a zakã." 
2Samuel5:10 A Davɩɩd dag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaamã rag n bee ne yẽnda." 
2Samuel5:11 Tɩɩr dĩm a Hiram tʋma neb a Davɩɩd nengẽ ne sɛɛdr daado, la a kɩt tɩ tãn-metb ne ra-wãadb kẽng n tɩ me zak n kõ a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel5:12 Woto, a Davɩɩd bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk yẽnda n kɩt t'a lebg Israyɛll dĩma, la a rĩungã rag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ, Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã maasem yĩnga." 
2Samuel5:13 A Davɩɩd sẽn yi Ebrõ n wa Zeruzalɛmã, a peega pagb a taaba, pʋg-rɩkdse ne kãadem pagba, la bãmb me roga a Davɩɩd kom-dibli la a kom-pulgi a taaba." 
2Samuel5:14 Kamb nins a Davɩɩd sẽn dog Zeruzalɛmã yʋy la woto: yaa a Simeya ne a Sobaabe, la a Natã ne a Salmo," 
2Samuel5:15 la a Yibaar ne a Elisuwa, la a Nefɛɛg ne a Zafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 la a Elisama ne a Eliyada la a Elifelɛte. 
2Samuel5:17 Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm tɩ b pʋdga a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, bãmb fãa kẽngame n tɩ baood-a n na n yõke. A Davɩɩd wʋmame n kẽng n tɩ kẽ tẽngã pãng zĩigẽ." 
2Samuel5:18 Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽng n tɩ sũu tãp Refayim longẽ wã. 
2Samuel5:19 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Mam tog n kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã bɩ? Yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ mam tõog Filistẽ nebã bɩ?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Davɩɩd yaa: «Kẽng tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog Filistẽ-dãmbã.»" 
2Samuel5:20 A Davɩɩd kẽnga Baall-Peratsim n tɩ zab n tõog Filistẽ-dãmbã, n bas n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab larga mam bɛɛbã m taoore, wa koom sẽn pãrg bɛoongo.» Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ b pʋd zĩ-kãng yʋʋre, tɩ Baall-Peratsim, rat n yeel tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab pãrgda sore." 
2Samuel5:21 Filistẽ-dãmbã zoeeme n bas b wẽn-naandsã be, t'a Davɩɩd ne a nebã wʋk n looge." 
2Samuel5:22 Filistẽ-dãmbã leb n kẽng n tɩ sũu tãp Refayim longã pʋga. 
2Samuel5:23 A Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ra kẽng n tɩ seg-b ye. Gilg b poorẽ wã, n tɩ paam-b tɩɩsã neng taoore.»" 
2Samuel5:24 La fo sã n wa wʋm bʋrg sẽn wẽnd nao rãamd tɩɩsã zutu, bɩ f yik tao-tao tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dat n lʋɩ f taoor n zab n tõog Filistẽ nebã tãb-biisã.»" 
2Samuel5:25 A Davɩɩd maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã, la yẽnda tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã, n dig-ba, sẽn sɩng ne Geba hal n tɩ tãag Gezɛɛre." 
2Samuel6:1 A Davɩɩd leb n tigma Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa, la b sõorã yaa neb tus-pis-tã." 
2Samuel6:2 A Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yii Baall-Zʋʋda n na n kẽng n tɩ rɩk Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n wa. Yaa kogl-kãng taoore, la b boond Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn zĩ Serubẽ dãmbã sʋkã yʋʋre." 
2Samuel6:3 Bãmb kẽnga a Abinadaab zakã sẽn be tãngã zugã, n tɩ yiis kaoolã koglgã n dogl sarɛt-paalg pʋgẽ. A Abinadaab kambã, a Uuza ne a Akiyo n dag n get sarɛt-paalgã yell t'a kẽnda." 
2Samuel6:4 Dẽ, bãmb dɩka kaoolã koglgã, la a Akiyo lʋɩɩ koglgã taoore." 
2Samuel6:5 A Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll buudã fãa rag n deemda ne yʋʋm-teed buud toor-toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Yaa pendse, kʋla, sɩlsãgse, waase, la ne kɛma." 
2Samuel6:6 Bãmb sẽn wa n ta a Nakõ zɛɛgẽ wã, niigã lengame n maan tɩ Kãabg-koglgã kɩlle, t'a Uuza tẽeg a nug n gãd-a." 
2Samuel6:7 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne a Uuza, la bãmb kɩtame t'a ki zĩig pʋgẽ, yẽnda sẽn maan sẽn kisã yĩnga. Woto, a Uuza kii Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã sɛɛgẽ." 
2Samuel6:8 A Davɩɩd pɛlengã yɩka wʋsgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sɩbg a Uuza ne sɩbgr a woto wã yĩnga. B pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Perets-Uuza, sẽn dat n togs t'a ‹Uuza sɩbgr zĩiga›, la zĩigã yʋʋr ket n yaa woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Samuel6:9 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem yõka a Davɩɩd t'a yeele: «Mam na n maana a wãn n tõog n deeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã m nengẽ?»" 
2Samuel6:10 A Davɩɩd ka sak n na n deeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n kẽes a tẽngã pʋgẽ ye. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b tek n sik-a Gat rao a Obɛɛd-Edom yiri. 
2Samuel6:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã paa Gat rao a Obɛɛd-Edom zakẽ wã kiis a tãabo. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Obɛɛd-Edom ne a yirã rãmb fãa barka." 
2Samuel6:12 B tɩ togsa dĩm a Davɩɩd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Obɛɛd-Edom yirã rãmba, ne yẽnda sẽn so bũmb ninsã fãa barka, Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã yĩnga. Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yikame n kẽng n tɩ tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã sẽn be a Obɛɛd-Edom zakẽ wã, n wa a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgẽ ne sũ-no-kãsenga." 
2Samuel6:13 Neb nins sẽn tʋk kaoolã koglgã sã n kẽn n maan nao-yakem a yoobe, a Davɩɩd kʋʋda loalga, ne lull sẽn nob n tar kaam n maan maoongo." 
2Samuel6:14 A Davɩɩd rag n dɩka maan-kʋʋr fuug sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs n sẽgen a sɛɛga, n saood warb ne a pãngã fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
2Samuel6:15 A Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll buudã fãa kɩtame tɩ b tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n kaasdẽ la b peebd bard n watẽ. 
2Samuel6:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã sẽn wa n kẽed a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, a Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall dag n bee roog peem-lɛɛgẽ n lɩk n getẽ. A Mikall yãame tɩ rĩm a Davɩɩd yɩgd n kɩdemdẽ, la a saood Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la a paooga a Davɩɩd a sũurẽ." 
2Samuel6:17 B sẽn tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n wa wã zugẽ, b ning-a-la fu-roog ning a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n segl a yĩnga pʋgẽ. A Davɩɩd maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum, ne zems-n-taar maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
2Samuel6:18 A Davɩɩd sẽn maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne zems-n-taar maoongã n sɛ, a ninga nebã zug bark ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yʋʋre." 
2Samuel6:19 La dĩm a Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b pʋɩ Israyɛll nin-buiidã fãa rɩɩbo, b raopa ne b pagba, la ned kam fãa paama bur-yend ne nem-sẽedgo, la sibi. La ned fãa lebg n kuila a yiri." 
2Samuel6:20 A Davɩɩd lebg n kuilame n na n tɩ ning a yirã rãmb barka. La a Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall yiime n seg a Davɩɩd n yeel-a yaa: «Israyɛll dĩmã paama ziir rũndã. Bala, bãmb yeesa b fut b tʋmtʋmdbã ne yem-pogsã taoore, n maan b meng wa nin-yaalga.»" 
2Samuel6:21 A Davɩɩd leok-a lame yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor la mam maan bõn-kãngã. Bãmb basa fo ba wã ne f buudã fãa, la b yãk maam tɩ m yɩ Israyɛll nebã rĩmã. Dẽ, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab-kãng taoor la mam sao yã." 
2Samuel6:22 Mam nongẽ lame tɩ b yaal maam n yɩɩd a woto, la m sik m meng n paase. La baoosgo, mam na n kell n paama waoogre, yem-pogs nins fo sẽn gomd-b yellã taoore.»" 
2Samuel6:23 La a Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall ka tol n paam biig la a tɩ ki ye. 
2Samuel7:1 Wakat ning rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn wa n kẽ a na-zakẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg-a wã bas-a laafɩ." 
2Samuel7:2 La daar a yembre, rĩm a Davɩɩd yeela Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã yaa: «Gese, fo neeme tɩ mam bee roog sẽn me ne raad sẽn yaa sõama pʋga, tɩ Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã yaool n be fu-roog pʋga.»" 
2Samuel7:3 A Natã yeela rĩmã yaa: «Bɩ y maan wa yãmb sẽn tags bũmb ningã, tɩ bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne-yã.»" 
2Samuel7:4 La badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Natã n yeele:" 
2Samuel7:5 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yaa: Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga: ‹Ka Foom n na n me roog n kõ maam tɩ m zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye. 
2Samuel7:6 Bala, mam sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã daar n tãag rũndã, mam ka tol n zĩnd roog pʋgẽ ye. Mam dag n bee fu-roog pʋgẽ n kẽnd ne yãmba." 
2Samuel7:7 Zĩis nins fãa mam sẽn tall Israyɛll nebã n kẽna, mam ka tol n yeel Israyɛll taoor soab baa a ye tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b ka me roog ne raad sẽn yaa sõama n kõ-m ye.› »" 
2Samuel7:8 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Natã t'a yeel a Davɩɩd tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yeelame: «Fo rag n bee weoogẽ n gũud rũmsi, tɩ mam yiis foom beenẽ tɩ f wa lebg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã rĩmã." 
2Samuel7:9 Mam zĩnda ne foom zĩis nins fãa fo sẽn kẽngã, la mam kʋʋ fo bɛɛbã f taoore, la m kɩt tɩ f yʋʋrã yi wa nin-kãsems nins sẽn be dũni wã zugã yʋy sẽn yi wã." 
2Samuel7:10 Mam kõo Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã zĩiga, la mam vigl-a lame t'a pa beenẽ, n ka leb n vigs ye, tɩ nin-wẽnsã me da leb n yaal-a wa pĩndã," 
2Samuel7:11 wakat ning mam sẽn dag n vigl taoor dãmb tɩ b soog Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã ye. Mam fãaga foom f bɛɛbã fãa nusẽ n kɩt tɩ f zĩnd bãane. Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilgda foom tɩ b na n kɩtame tɩ b roogã me. 
2Samuel7:12 Fo daarã sã n wa ta, tɩ f ki n bʋʋg f saam-dãmbã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f biig a ye sẽn na n yi fo pendẽ wã ledg fo zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã, la mam na n kɩtame t'a naamã tall pãnga." 
2Samuel7:13 Yaa yẽnda n na me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩnga. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda yagensã rɩ naam wakat fãa. 
2Samuel7:14 Mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda ba, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ mam biiga. Yẽnda sã n beege, mam na n sɩbg-a-la wa ned sẽn sɩbgd a biiga." 
2Samuel7:15 Mam ka na n tol n bas yẽnda wa mam sẽn dag n bas a Sayull n deeg a naamã n kõ foomã ye. 
2Samuel7:16 Wakat fãa, ned kõn tol n kong sẽn na n soog fo roogã ne f rĩungã ye, la fo naamã na n yalsa kãenkãe wakat fãa.»" 
2Samuel7:17 Dẽ, a Natã rɩka gom-kãensã fãa ne vẽneg-kãngã fãa, n tɩ togs a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel7:18 Rĩm a Davɩɩd kẽng n tɩ yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n yeele: «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yaa ãnda, la m doogã bee yɛ tɩ y tall maam hal n ta zĩig ning mam sẽn beẽ dũndã wã?" 
2Samuel7:19 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rẽ ket n ka sek ye, tɩ y leb n gomd y sẽn tar saagr ning y tʋmtʋmdã yagens wɛɛngẽ, wakat sẽn wat yĩnga? Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yaool n yaa ninsaal bala!" 
2Samuel7:20 Maam a Davɩɩd na n leb n yeela yãmb tɩ bõe? Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb mi y tʋmtʋmdã." 
2Samuel7:21 Yaa yãmb goamã yĩnga, la sẽn ta yãmb yamã yĩnga, la yãmb maan bõn-kãsem-kãensã n wilg y tʋmtʋmdã." 
2Samuel7:22 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sɩd yaa kãsengã, bala, sã n yaa ne tõnd sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomdã, ned ka be n zem yãmb ye. Wẽnd a to ka be tɩ sã n ka yãmb ye." 
2Samuel7:23 Rẽ yĩnga, buud bee dũni wã zugu, n yaa wa Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã, tɩ b wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãag-b tɩ b lebg b nebã, la b kõ-b yʋʋre? Yãmb nebã taoore, yãmb maana bõn-kãsemse, ne bõn-yɛɛsds y tẽngã yĩnga, n fãag bãmb n yiis Ezɩpt tẽms toay-toay pʋse, ne b wẽnnaam-dãmbã nusẽ, tɩ b lebg yãmb mengã nebã." 
2Samuel7:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yãka Israyɛll nebã n kɩt tɩ b lebg yãmb neb wakat fãa yĩnga, tɩ yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebg bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
2Samuel7:25 Moasã, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ gomd ning yãmb sẽn gom ne maam a yãmb tʋmtʋmdã ne a yagensã wɛɛngẽ wã paam pids wakat fãa. Maan-y wa y sẽn yeelã." 
2Samuel7:26 Bɩ yãmb yʋʋrã kell n yɩ kãseng wakat fãa, tɩ nebã yeel tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam! Bɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd doogã kell n paam pãnga yãmb taoore." 
2Samuel7:27 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, yãmb vẽnega mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã ne bõn-kãnga, n yeel tɩ y na n mee roog n kõ-ma. Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ m pɛlg keemẽ tɩ m pʋʋsd yãmb a woto." 
2Samuel7:28 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam la y goamã yaa sɩda, la yãmb n yeel tɩ y na n maana bõn-neer a woto n kõ mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã moasã." 
2Samuel7:29 Woto yĩnga, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y ning-y y tʋmtʋmdã roog barka, t'a tõe n zĩnd yãmb taoor wakat fãa. Bala, yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome, la yaa yãmb barka yĩnga, la m yagensã na n paam bark wakat fãa.»" 
2Samuel8:1 Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã, n ning-b yãnde, n deeg tẽms nins Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn dag n so wã." 
2Samuel8:2 Rẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd zab n tõoga Moaab nebã, n kɩt tɩ b gãand tẽng t'a mak-b ne wĩiri. A Davɩɩd makda wĩirã naoor a yiibu n kɩt tɩ b kʋ nin-bãmbã, la a mak tãabẽ soabã n kɩt tɩ b bas bãmb n ka kʋ ye. A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ Moaab nebã lebg a yembse, la a kɩt tɩ b yao yẽnda yõor yaoodo." 
2Samuel8:3 Wakat ning a Davɩɩd sẽn wa n kẽng n tɩ soog Efrat kʋɩlgã, yẽnda zaba ne a Rehoob biig a Hadadezɛɛr sẽn yaa Soba rĩmã, n tõog-a." 
2Samuel8:4 A Davɩɩd deega a Adadezɛɛr wed-rʋʋdb tusr la kobs yopoe, ne tãb-biis tus pisi sẽn ka zao wiidi. A Davɩɩd yãka wiid koabg sẽn tat saar-dãmbã, la a kɛ wiid a taabã fãa nao-gĩin n pase." 
2Samuel8:5 Siiri nebã yii Damaas n wa n na n sõng Soba rĩm a Adadezɛɛre, la a Davɩɩd kʋʋ Siiri neb tus pisi la a yiibu." 
2Samuel8:6 A Davɩɩd tilga tãb-sigs Siiri nebã nengẽ Damaase, n kɩt tɩ Siiri nebã lebg a yembse, la a kɩt tɩ b yaood yẽnda yõor yaoodo. Zĩig ning fãa a Davɩɩd sẽn kẽngẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame t'a paam tõogre." 
2Samuel8:7 A Davɩɩd deega sãnem logd nins a Adadezɛɛr nebã sẽn dag n bobã, n tall n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel8:8 Beta ne Berotayi sẽn yaa a Hadadezɛɛr tẽmsã pʋse, rĩm a Davɩɩd leb n deega zũud wʋsgo." 
2Samuel8:9 Hamat rĩm a Toyi sẽn wʋm t'a Davɩɩd tõoga a Adadezɛɛr tãb-biisã fãa wã," 
2Samuel8:10 yẽnda tʋma a biig a Zoram a Davɩɩd nengẽ t'a tɩ pʋʋs-a, n pẽg-a, a sẽn zab n tõog a Hadadezɛɛrã yĩnga. Bala, a Hadadezɛɛr dag n zabda ne a Toyi naoor wʋsgo. A Zoram zãa sãnem ne wanzuri, la zũud teedo, n tall n tɩ kõ dĩm a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel8:11 Rĩm a Davɩɩd rɩka bõn-kãens n kõ Sẽn-Ka-saabo, wa yẽnda sẽn dag n zoe n tõog buud a taabã fãa n wʋk wanzuri wã ne sãnemã n wa kõ wã." 
2Samuel8:12 Buud a taab kãens yaa Siiri nebã, Moaab nebã, la Amoa, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, la Amalɛk nebã, la a yãk a Rehoob biig a Hadadezɛɛr sẽn yaa Soba rĩmã teedã yẽnda sẽn dag n wʋkã n paase." 
2Samuel8:13 A Davɩɩd tɩ kʋʋ Siiri neb tus piig la a nii yamsem longã pʋgẽ. La yẽnda sẽn lebg rẽ zugẽ n wa, a yʋʋrã yii wʋsg n paase." 
2Samuel8:14 A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ tãb-biis tɩ zĩnd Edom nebã tẽms pʋse, la Edom nebã lebga yẽnda soolem. A Davɩɩd sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngd-a lame t'a paam tõogre." 
2Samuel8:15 A Davɩɩd yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa rĩmã. Yẽnda rag n kaooda bʋʋd tɩrga, la a maand tɩrlem ne a nebã fãa." 
2Samuel8:16 A Seruza biig a Zoaab n dag n yaa tãb-biisã naaba, la a Akiluub biig a Zozafat n dag n yaa tẽngã seb-bĩngda." 
2Samuel8:17 A Akituub biig a Sadok ne a Abiyataar biig a Ayimelɛk n dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdba. 
2Samuel8:18 A Seraza rag n yaa seb-gʋnda. A Zehozada biig a Benaya sooga a Davɩɩd gũudb nins sẽn yaa a Kerɛt ne Pelɛt buudã, la a Davɩɩd kambã n dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdba." 
2Samuel9:1 Daar a yembre, a Davɩɩd sokame yaa: «A Sayull buud ned ka ket tɩ m tõe n maan-a neer a Zonatã maasem yĩnga?»" 
2Samuel9:2 A Sayull zakẽ wã tʋmtʋmd a ye yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Siba n dag n bee beenẽ, la b kɩtame t'a wa a Davɩɩd nengẽ. La rĩmã sok-a lame: «Yaa foom la a Siba bɩ?» T'a leoke: «N-na, yaa maam!»" 
2Samuel9:3 Rĩmã sokame: «A Sayull roogã ned ka ket tɩ m maan-a neer Wẽnnaam yĩnga?» A Siba leoka rĩmã yaa: «A Zonatã biig bal n ket n beẽ, la a yaa põore.»" 
2Samuel9:4 Rĩmã sokame tɩ biigã bee yɛɛnẽ? La a Siba leokame t'a bee Lodebaar tẽng rao a Amiyɛll biig a Makɩɩr yiri. 
2Samuel9:5 Rĩm a Davɩɩd tʋmame tɩ b kẽng be n tɩ tall-a n wa. 
2Samuel9:6 La a Sayull biig a Zonatã biig a Mefibosɛt waa n yĩgimda rĩm a Davɩɩd taoor n fõgen a neng tẽnga. A Davɩɩd boola a Mefibosɛte, la a leokame: «N-na! Ad-ma!»" 
2Samuel9:7 A Davɩɩd yeela yẽnda: «Da zoe rabeem ye. Mam na n maana foom neere, fo ba a Zonatã maasem yĩnga. Mam na n lebsa foom f yaab a Sayull pʋtã fãa, la fo na n naagda maam daar fãa n dɩtẽ.»" 
2Samuel9:8 A Mefibosɛt wõgemdame n yeel yaa: «N-na! Mam me yaa ãnda, tɩ y get m yelle? Mam sẽn yaa wa ba-kɩɩng balã.»" 
2Samuel9:9 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b bool a Sayull tʋmtʋmd a Siba n yeel-a yaa: «Mam na n kõo fo soaal a Sayull yagengã bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n yaa a Sayull ne roogã rẽndã. 
2Samuel9:10 Bɩ foom ne f kambã la f tʋmtʋmdbã ko n kõ a Mefibosɛte, la f tall koodã n wa tɩ f zu-soabã biig paam dɩɩb n dɩ. La a Mefibosɛt na n naagda maam n dɩt daar fãa.» A Siba rag n tara kom-dibli piig la a nu, la tʋmtʋmdb pisi." 
2Samuel9:11 La a Siba yeela rĩmã yaa: «Mam na n maana bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» La a Mefibosɛt dag n naagda rĩm a Davɩɩd daar fãa n dɩtẽ, wa rĩmã meng biiga." 
2Samuel9:12 A Mefibosɛt rag n tara bi-ribla t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Mika. Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be a Siba zakẽ wã lebga a Mefibosɛt tʋmtʋmdba. 
2Samuel9:13 La a Mefibosɛt sẽn dag n tog n naagd rĩmã daar fãa n dɩtẽ wã yĩnga, yẽnda tɩ zĩnda Zeruzalɛm, bala, a rag n yaa põore." 
2Samuel10:1 Dẽ poore, Amo nebã rĩmã kiime, t'a biig a Hanun led a zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
2Samuel10:2 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Mam na n maana a Nakaas biig a Hanun neere, bala, yẽnda ba wã maana maam neere.» Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tʋma a zakã neb tɩ b kẽng a Hanun nengẽ n tɩ pʋʋs-a, a ba wã sẽn maan kaalmã yĩnga. La a Davɩɩd nebã sẽn ta Amo nebã tẽngẽ," 
2Samuel10:3 Amo nebã na-biisã yeela b soaal a Hanun yaa: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ yaa yãmb ba wã waoogr yĩng la a Davɩɩd sẽn tʋm nin-bãmbã tɩ b wa pʋʋs yãmbã bɩ? Yãmb ka tagsd t'a sẽn tʋm a nebã yãmb nengẽ wã yaa sẽn na n yɩl n ges tẽngã n bãng a yell sõama, n wa tõog n sãam-a sɩda?»" 
2Samuel10:4 Dẽ, a Hanun kɩtame tɩ b yõg a Davɩɩd nebã n põng b toeemsã n bas begse, la b wõrs b futã n b bas b seesã yɩnga, n yaool n yeel-b tɩ b looge." 
2Samuel10:5 B rɩka yellã n taas a Davɩɩde, la yẽnda tʋma ned t'a kẽng n tɩ seg-ba, bala, nin-bãmbã sɩd dag n bee yãn-kẽeng pʋga. Rĩmã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Pa-y Zeeriko hal tɩ y toeemsã yi, tɩ y yaool n wa.»" 
2Samuel10:6 Amo nebã sẽn mik tɩ bãmb sẽn maanã yika a Davɩɩd sũurã, b kẽng n tɩ rɩka Siiri ne Bɛt-Rehoob la Soba tãb-biis tus-pisi. B leb n yãka Maaka neb tusri, ne Toob tãb-biis tus-piig la a yiibu." 
2Samuel10:7 A Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm woto, a tʋma a Zoaab ne tãb-bi-gãndaadã fãa beenẽ." 
2Samuel10:8 Amo nebã sũu tãp n yi n yals b tẽngã noore. Siiri neb nins sẽn yit Soba ne Bɛt-Rehoobã, la Toob ne Maaka nebã rag n bee zĩig a to weoogã pʋga." 
2Samuel10:9 A Zoaab sẽn yã tɩ zabrã na n yɩɩ nems a yiibu, poorẽ la taoore, a tũusa Israyɛll tãb-biis nins sẽn ya-b sõama n yɩɩdã, tɩ b tɩ zab ne Siiri rãmba." 
2Samuel10:10 La a Zoaab kɩtame t'a yao a Abisayi lʋɩ tãb-biis nins sẽn kellã taoore, tɩ b na n zab ne Amo-rãmbã." 
2Samuel10:11 A Zoaab yeela a yao a Abisayi yaa: «Sã n wa n mik tɩ Siiri nebã rat n tõoga maam, bɩ f wa sõng-ma. La mam sã n wa neẽ tɩ Amo nebã rat n tõoga foom, mam na n wa sõng-f lame." 
2Samuel10:12 Keng f meng tɩ d yɩ gãndaad n zab d nebã yĩnga, ne tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽms yĩnga, la bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan b raabo.»" 
2Samuel10:13 La a Zoaab ne a nebã kolgame n na n zab ne Siiri nebã, la Siiri nebã zoee bãmb taoore." 
2Samuel10:14 La Amo-rãmbã sẽn yã tɩ Siiri nebã zoeeme wã, bãmb me zoe a Abisayi ne a tãb-biisã taoor n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ. Dẽ, a Zoaab yalsa zabrã, n lebg n bas Amo-rãmbã, la a kuil Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel10:15 Siiri nebã sẽn yã tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog-b lame wã, b leb n tigma b tãb-biisã fãa." 
2Samuel10:16 A Hadadezɛɛr tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ tigim Siiri neb nins sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlga rʋʋndã. La a Sobak sẽn yaa a Hadadezɛɛr tãb-biisã naabã n lʋɩ bãmb taoor n tall-b n kẽng Elam. 
2Samuel10:17 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm woto, a tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n kẽng Elam. Dẽ, Siiri nebã sũu tãp n zab ne a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel10:18 La Israyɛll nebã riga bãmb tɩ b zoe. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã kʋʋ neb kobs-yopoe sẽn tar saar-dãmbã, ne wed-rʋʋdb tus-pis-naase. La b pogla bãmb tãb-biisã naab a Sobak t'a kell n ki zĩ-kãngã." 
2Samuel10:19 A Hadadezɛɛr sẽn so nanambs nins fãa wã sẽn yã tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõoga bãmba, b baoome tɩ zood zĩnd bãmb ne Israyɛll nebã sʋka, la Israyɛll nebã sooga bãmba. Siiri nebã ka tol n saag n na n leb n sõng Amo nebã ye." 
2Samuel11:1 Yʋʋm-vẽkrã sẽn zems wakat ning rĩm-dãmbã sẽn yit n kẽnd zabã, a Davɩɩd tʋma a Zoaab ne a tãb-biisã nanambs a taabã, ne Israyɛll tãb-biisã tɩ b tɩ sãam Amo nebã, la b tɩ zab ne Raba sẽn yaa b na-tẽngã. La a Davɩɩd meng paa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel11:2 Daar a yembr zaabre, a Davɩɩd yika a gãagẽ n be a roogã bɛoong zug n kẽnd n gilgdẽ, la a zĩnda be n yãnd pag sẽn sood koom. Pagã rag n yaa pʋg-neer hal wʋsgo." 
2Samuel11:3 A Davɩɩd tʋma ned tɩ b tɩ sok n ges sẽn yaa ned ningã paga. La b wa n togsa a Davɩɩd tɩ yaa a Eliyam biiga. La a yʋʋr la a Batseba, n yaa Hɛt rao a Uuri paga." 
2Samuel11:4 A Davɩɩd tʋmame tɩ b tɩ peeg-a n wa, la a Davɩɩd kẽe ne-a. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa pagã sẽn nan yɩlga a meng bal a pekr zugẽ. La pagã kuilame." 
2Samuel11:5 La pagã rɩka pʋga, la a tʋmame tɩ b tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd tɩ yẽnda tʋtame." 
2Samuel11:6 La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, a Davɩɩd tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zoaab t'a kɩt tɩ Hɛt rao a Uuri wa yiri. La a Zoaab kɩtame tɩ Hɛt rao a Uuri lebg n kẽng a Davɩɩd nengẽ." 
2Samuel11:7 La a Uuri sẽn ta rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ, rĩmã soka yẽnda a Zoaab ne a nebã yelle, la zabrã kɩbar sẽn yaa to-to." 
2Samuel11:8 La a Davɩɩd yeela a Uuri t'a kuil n tɩ vʋʋse. A Uuri sẽn yi rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ, rĩmã kɩsa kũun tɩ b tɩ kõ-a." 
2Samuel11:9 La a Uuri ka kuil ye, a kẽnga na-yirã samandẽ, n na n tɩ naag rĩmã na-yirã gũudb n gãande." 
2Samuel11:10 La rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm dẽ, a yeela a Uuri yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo yi so-wok n wa, n ka kuiis f yiri?»" 
2Samuel11:11 A Uuri yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «N-na! Mam na n yɩ a wãn n kuil n tɩ rɩ la m yũ, la m gãand ne m paga, tɩ kaoolã koglgã ne Israyɛll nebã la Zʋʋde nebã yaool n be fu-rotẽ, tɩ mam zu-soab a Zoaab ne a nebã tilg b tãb-sik n be weoogẽ wã? Mam wẽenda ne yãmb tɩ mam kõn tol n maan bũmb a woto abada.»" 
2Samuel11:12 Woto, rĩm a Davɩɩd yeela a Uuri yaa: «Beneere, kell n pa n gãand ka tɩ beoogo, m na yaool n kõ-f sor tɩ f lebe.» Dẽ, a Uuri kell n paa Zeruzalɛm badaare, n ta vẽkembeoogo." 
2Samuel11:13 La a Davɩɩd boola a Uuri t'a wa naag-a n dɩ. Dẽ, a Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b kõ a Uuri rãam t'a yũ wʋsg t'a neng yilimdẽ. La ne rẽ fãa, a Uuri ka kuil ye, a yi n dɩgla a pĩir n yegl rĩmã na-yir gũudbã n gãand badaar yʋngo." 
2Samuel11:14 La vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, a Davɩɩd gʋlsa sebr n kɩs a Uuri t'a tɩ kõ a Zoaabe." 
2Samuel11:15 La sebrã pʋgẽ, rĩmã yeelame: «Zoaabe, lʋɩɩs-y-yã a Uuri taoore, zabrã sẽn wɩng wʋsg zĩig ningã, la y targ n leb poorẽ n bas-a tɩ bɛɛbã kʋ-a.»" 
2Samuel11:16 A Zoaab gesa tẽngã n bao zĩig ning bɛɛbã sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩdã, n ning a Uuri beenẽ." 
2Samuel11:17 La tẽngã neb yiime n zab ne Israyɛll nebã, n kʋ a Davɩɩd neb kẽere, la Hɛt rao a Uuri me naaga be." 
2Samuel11:18 A Zoaab tʋma ned t'a tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd bũmb nins fãa sẽn maan zabrã pʋgẽ. 
2Samuel11:19 La a Zoaab yeela nin-kãng yaa: «Fo sã n ta n togs rĩmã bũmb nins sẽn maan zabrã pʋgẽ wã n sɛ," 
2Samuel11:20 tõeeme tɩ b sũurã yik tɩ b sok tɩ yaa a wãn tɩ yãmb kolg tẽngã a woto n na n zabe? Yãmb ka mi tɩ bɛɛbã tõe n zĩnda lalgã zug n tão yãmb la? 
2Samuel11:21 Yɩɩ ãnd n kʋ a Zerubesɛt biig a Abimelɛk Tebɛɛz tẽngã? Ka pag n zĩnd lalg zug n lobg-a ne ne-biig t'a ki la? La yɩ a wãn tɩ yãmb tɩ kolgd lalgã? Dẽ, rĩmã sã n gom woto, bɩ f togs-b tɩ bãmb tʋmtʋmd a Uuri sẽn yaa Hɛt neda me kiime.»" 
2Samuel11:22 B sẽn tʋm-a soabã kẽngame n tɩ togs rĩm a Davɩɩd bũmb nins fãa a Zoaab sẽn yeelã. 
2Samuel11:23 La yẽnda yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Tẽngã gũudb pãng rag n yɩɩda tõndo. Bãmb yii tẽngã pʋgẽ n wa n na n zab ne tõnd weoogẽ wã, la baoosg zãnga, tõnd dig-b lame n tɩ ta tẽngã noore." 
2Samuel11:24 Dẽ, b tãb-tãoodbã zĩnda lalgã zug n tão tõndo, n kʋ yãmb neb kẽere, la y tʋmtʋmd a Uuri me naaga be.»" 
2Samuel11:25 A Davɩɩd yeela b sẽn tʋm-a soabã yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Zoaab t'a ra sãam a sũur yel-kãng yĩng ye. Bala, zabr ka tõe n maane, tɩ yãmb neb wall y bɛɛbã neb ka ki ye. Yẽnda we n keng a sũur n nang pãng n zab n tõog tẽngã, n sãam-a.»" 
2Samuel11:26 A Uuri pag a Batseba sẽn wʋm t'a sɩdã kiime, a yãba a kʋʋre." 
2Samuel11:27 La a Betseba sẽn yãb a sɩdã kʋʋr n sɛ, a Davɩɩd tʋmame tɩ b tɩ peeg-a n wa. Woto, a Davɩɩd rɩk-a lame t'a lebg a paga. Rẽ zugẽ, a Betseba roga a Davɩɩd bi-ribla. A Davɩɩd sẽn maan bũmb ningã sãama Wẽnnaam sũuri." 
2Samuel12:1 Bõn-kãens fãa loogr zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma a Natã t'a yeel a Davɩɩd yaa: «Raop a yiib n dag n be tẽng a yembre, a ye yaa rakãagre, t'a ye yaa naong soaba." 
2Samuel12:2 Dakãagrã rag n tara piis ne niig wʋsgo. 
2Samuel12:3 La naong soabã rag n tara a pe-bi-sadg a ye, a sẽn da n gʋʋndẽ. Raoã rag n naag-a a kambã ne pesgã n wubda. Bãmb sẽn dag n dɩt rɩɩb ningã, pesgã rɩta rẽ, bãmb sẽn dag n yũud bũmb ningã, pesgã me yũuda rẽ. La pesgã rag n gãee ne-a. Raoã rag n geta pesgã wa a biig bala." 
2Samuel12:4 Daar a ye, sãan n wa n sig rakãagrã yiri, la rakãagrã rag n ka rat n yãk a peosg bɩ a naaf n kʋ n moe a sãanã ye. Yẽnda kẽng n tɩ yõka naong soabã pe-bi-yɛngã n kʋ n na n segl a sãanã.»" 
2Samuel12:5 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd sũur yika wʋsg ne rakãagrã manesmã, la yẽnda yeela a Natã yaa: «M wẽen ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã tɩ ned ning sẽn maan-a woto wã segda ne kʋʋbo." 
2Samuel12:6 Nin-kãngã sẽn maan woto n ka yɩ nimbãan-zoɛtã yĩnga, a na n baoo piis a naas n lebse.»" 
2Samuel12:7 Dẽ, a Natã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «N-na! Sẽn maan-a yel-kãngã wã, yaa yãmba. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Yaa maam n yãk foom, n kɩt tɩ f lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, la yaa maam n fãag foom a Sayull nugẽ." 
2Samuel12:8 Mam dɩka fo zu-soab a Sayull zakã ne a pagbã n kõ foom. La mam kɩt tɩ f soog Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã fãa. La bõn-kãens sã n dag n ket n paoodẽ, mam dag n na n kõ-f lame n paase." 
2Samuel12:9 La yaa bõe tɩ fo paoog maam, n maan yel-beed a woto mam nifẽ? Fo kɩtame tɩ b kʋ Hɛt rao a Uuri, la f rɩk a pagã n maan f paga. Fo kɩtame tɩ Amo-rãmbã kʋ a Uuri ne sʋʋga." 
2Samuel12:10 Beneere, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, toog ka na n tol n kong fo yirã ye. Bala, fo sẽn dɩk Hɛt rao a Uuri pagã yĩnga, fo paooga maam.»" 
2Samuel12:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed kẽ fo zakã. Mam na n dɩka fo pagbã f nifẽ n kõ fo pendã ned a yembr t'a gãand-b tɩ nebã fãa yã. 
2Samuel12:12 Bala, fo soosame n maane, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãng maan ne wĩnto-sʋka, tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa yã.»" 
2Samuel12:13 A Davɩɩd yeela a Natã yaa: «Sɩd-sɩdã, mam beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.» La a Natã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Sã n yaa woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõta foom sugri, la f ka na n ki ye." 
2Samuel12:14 La yaa f bãng bala, tɩ f beegrã yaa kãseng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Woto yĩnga, fo biig ning sẽn nan dog-a wã na n kiime.»" 
2Samuel12:15 La rẽ zugẽ, a Natã lebg n kuilame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd biig ning a Uuri pagã sẽn dogã lʋɩ bãaga." 
2Samuel12:16 A Davɩɩd yõka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg biigã yĩnga, la a loee noore. Yẽnda sã n dag n kẽ yʋng n na n gãande, a gãee tẽnga." 
2Samuel12:17 Na-yirã nin-kãsems kẽngame n tɩ kos a Davɩɩd t'a yiki, la a ka sak ye. La yẽnda tol n zãgsame meng t'a kõn naag bãmb n dɩ ye." 
2Samuel12:18 La rasem a yopoe zugẽ, biigã kiime. Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã rag n yɛɛsdame n ka rat n togs-a a biigã kũum ye. Bãmb yeelame yaa: «Biigã sẽn dag n ket n vɩ-wã menga, tõnd goma ne rĩmã tɩ b rag n ka sakd n kelg tõnd ye. La moasã, tõnd na n maana a wãn n togs-b tɩ biigã kiime? Rẽ yĩnga, b kõn maan b meng yell sɩda?»" 
2Samuel12:19 A Davɩɩd sẽn yã t'a tʋmtʋmdbã tar wal-wal ne taabã, yẽnda bãngame tɩ yell n maane. Dẽ, yẽnda soka bãmb yaa: «Mam biigã kiime la?» La bãmb leokame: N-na! A kiime!" 
2Samuel12:20 Woto, a Davɩɩd tik n yikame n tɩ so koom, la a zɛ kaam n tek a futu. La yẽnda kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n tɩ waoog bãmba. La rẽ zugẽ, a lebg n kuilame n tɩ yeel tɩ b kõ-a rɩɩbo, la yẽnda reegame n dɩ." 
2Samuel12:21 Yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã sokame: «N-na! Tõnd ka wʋmd yãmb sẽn maandã võor ye! Biigã sẽn wa n ket n vɩ-wã, yãmb dag n loeta noore, la y yãbda. La yaa bõe tɩ biigã ki, tɩ yãmb yaool n yik moasã n na n dɩ?»" 
2Samuel12:22 A Davɩɩd leokame: «Yaa sɩda, biigã sẽn dag n ket n vɩ-wã, mam dag n loeta noore, la m yãbda, n tẽed tɩ daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zoee mam nimbãaneg n fãag biigã." 
2Samuel12:23 La moasã, biigã sẽn ki wã, mam sã n leb n yik n zãgsd rɩɩbo, a tara yõod sɩda? Mam tõeeme tɩ biigã lebg n wa sɩda? Mam miime tɩ daar n wat tɩ mam na n kẽng yẽnda nengẽ, la yẽnda ka na n tol n leb n wa mam nengẽ ye.»" 
2Samuel12:24 A Davɩɩd kẽng n tɩ belsa a pag a Batseba sũuri. La yẽnda kẽe ne-a, t'a rɩk pʋg n dog bi-ribla, la a Davɩɩd pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Salmo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n nonga a Salmo. Dẽ, bãmb tʋma b no-rɛɛs a Natã t'a tɩ wilg a Davɩɩde. La a Natã sẽn ta, a Davɩɩd dɩka biigã n sagl yẽnda nugẽ, la a Natã pʋda biigã yʋʋr t'a Zedidiya, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong a soabã.›" 
2Samuel12:25  
2Samuel12:26 Wakat-kãnga a Zoaab zaba ne Amo nebã n tõog-b n deeg Raba sẽn yaa b na-tẽngã. 
2Samuel12:27 La yẽnda tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam zaba ne Raba nebã n tõog n deeg b tẽngã ko-bao zĩisi. 
2Samuel12:28 Moasã, bɩ y tigim tãb-biis nins sẽn ketã n tilg y tãb-sikã n zab ne tẽngã n deeg-a, tɩ waoogrã ra wa yɩ maam a Zoaab rẽnd bal ye.»" 
2Samuel12:29 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tigma a nebã fãa n kẽng n tɩ zab n deeg Raba tẽngã." 
2Samuel12:30 La bãmb doka maanf ninga b sẽn dag n fõgen Amo-rãmbã wẽn-naandg a Milkomã. Maanfã rag n maana ne sãnem, t'a zɩslmã yaa kɩlo pistã. La kug-neer la b rag n tall n tablg maanfã. Bãmb laka kug-kãng n tablg a Davɩɩd maanfã. Sẽn leb n paase, bãmb wʋka teed wʋsg tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel12:31 La a Davɩɩd modga tẽngã neb n kɩt tɩ kẽer wãad raado, tɩ kẽer peesd kuga, tɩ kẽer me kɛɛd tɩɩs ne laya. La a kɩt tɩ kẽer wẽed tãn-koeema. La b maana Amo nebã tẽms a taabã me a woto. La rẽ poore, a Davɩɩd ne a nebã lebg n kuila Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel13:1 Ad bũmb nins sẽn maan bõn-kãens zugẽ. A Davɩɩd dag n tara biig t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Absalom, yẽnda rag n tar yao-bi-pugl t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Tamaare. La a Tamaar dag n yaa pʋg-neer wʋsgo. A Davɩɩd dag tara a biig a to yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Amno. A Amno yamã kẽ a Tamaare." 
2Samuel13:2 A Amno rag n namsda wʋsgo, a sẽn dat a Tamaarã yĩnga. La yẽnda rag n ka mi a sẽn na n maan to-to n kolg a Tamaar ye. Bala, a Tamaar dag n nan ka mi rao ye." 
2Samuel13:3 A Amno rag n tara a zoa t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Yonadaabe. A Yonadaab rag n yaa a Davɩɩd kẽem a Simeya biiga, la a rag n tara sɩlem wʋsgo." 
2Samuel13:4 Dẽ, a Yonadaab soka a Amno yaa: «Yaa a wãn tɩ fo kẽnd daar fãa wa nimbãan-neda, n yaool n yaa na-biiga? Togs maam yell ning sẽn tar foom.» A Amno togsa a Yonadaab tɩ yaa a ba-biig a Absalom yao-bi-pugl a Tamaar la yẽnda rata." 
2Samuel13:5 A Yonadaab yeel-a lame: «Beneere, gãand n maan wa f ka keem ye. La f baaba sã n wa n na n ges-fo, bɩ f yeel-a woto: ‹M kotame tɩ y kõ m tão a Tamaar sor t'a wa segl rɩɩb m nifẽ, la a rɩk rɩɩbã ne a meng nug n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ.› »" 
2Samuel13:6 La a Amno sɩd gãanda wa a ka keem ye. La rĩmã sẽn wa n na n ges-a, a yeelame yaa: «M kotame tɩ y kõ m tão a Tamaar sor t'a wa segl rɩɩb m nifẽ, la a rɩk rɩɩbã ne a meng nug n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ.»" 
2Samuel13:7 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tʋma ned t'a tɩ yeel a Tamaar yaa: «M kos tɩ f kẽng f kẽem a Amno nengẽ n tɩ segl dɩɩb n kõ-a.»" 
2Samuel13:8 La a Tamaar kẽngame n tɩ mik t'a kẽem a Amno gãe a gãagẽ. A yãka zom n nag n maan dɩɩb a Amno nifẽ n kõ-a. 
2Samuel13:9 La a Tamaar dɩka rɩɩbã ne laagã n na n kõ a Amno, la a zãgsa rɩɩbo, n kɩt tɩ b yeel nebã fãa tɩ b yi. La nebã fãa yiime n bas-a." 
2Samuel13:10 La a Amno yeela a Tamaar t'a tall rɩɩbã n wa kõ yẽnda a ro-gãagẽ wã, la a yãk ne a meng nug n kõ-a t'a rɩ. A Tamaar dɩka dɩɩbã n tall n kẽ a ba-biig a Amno ro-gãagẽ wã." 
2Samuel13:11 La a Tamaar sẽn kolg n na kõ a Amno rɩɩbã, a Amno gãd-a lame n yeel-a: «Tamaare, wa gãand ne maam.»" 
2Samuel13:12 Dẽ, a Tamaar yeel-a lame yaa: «Ayo! M soaala, da maan-y-m pãng ye. Bala, bõn-kãngã yaa kisg Israyɛll pʋgẽ. Da maan wɩɩbd a woto ye." 
2Samuel13:13 Mam na n deega yãnd a woto n kẽ yɛɛnẽ? La fo mengã na n lebga nin-yaalg Israyɛll pʋgẽ. Maan sugr la f tɩ gom ne rĩmã, tɩ tõe tɩ daar ning bɩ b sak n dɩk maam n kõ foom.»" 
2Samuel13:14 La a Amno ka kelg-a ye. Dẽ, yẽnda pãngã sẽn yɩɩd a Tamaarã yĩnga, a yõg-a lame." 
2Samuel13:15 La bõn-kãng zugẽ, a Amno kisg-a a Tamaar wʋsgo. A kisgrã talla pãng wʋsg n yɩɩd a sẽn dag n nong-a wã. A Amno yeela a Tamaar yaa: «Yik n yi!»" 
2Samuel13:16 La a Tamaar yeel-a lame: «Ayo! M soaala, fo sã n dig maam woto, yellã na n yɩɩ wẽng n yɩɩg fo sẽn zoe n maan maamã.» La a Amno kell n ka sak n kelg-a ye." 
2Samuel13:17 Dẽ, a Amno boola a tʋmtʋmdã n yeel-a yaa: «M kotame tɩ f yiis yõwã yɩng la f lebs kʋɩlengã n pag ne kʋɩlen-bila.»" 
2Samuel13:18 La tʋmtʋmdã yiis-a lame, la a lebs kʋɩlengã n pag ne kʋɩlen-bila. A Tamaar dag n yera fu-gʋleng sẽn tar nus-wogdo. Yaa fu-bãmb buud la rĩm-dãmbã kom-pugli nins sẽn ka mi-b raoã dag n yer wakat-kãnga." 
2Samuel13:19 Dẽ, a Tamaar sẽn yi, a yuga a zugã tompeglem, la a pãrs fuugã, n kʋk a zug n wiisdẽ la a loogdẽ." 
2Samuel13:20 A Tamaar ma-biig a Absalom sẽn yãnd a Tamaarã, a sok-a lame: «Fo kẽem a Amno yõga foom la? Da rɩk yellã n gom tɩ ned wʋm ye. Bala, a Amno yaa fo ba-biiga. Da rɩk yel-kãngã n ning f sũurẽ ye.» La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, a Tamaar kell n pa a ma-biig a Absalom yirã wa pag a sɩd sẽn digi." 
2Samuel13:21 La rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm yellã, a sũurã puuga hal wʋsgo. La yẽnda yaool n ka tol n yeel a Amno tɩ bũmb ye. La a Amno sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda bi-kãsengã yĩnga, a rag n nong-a-la hal wʋsgo." 
2Samuel13:22 La a Absalom ka tol n yeel a Amno tɩ bũmb ye. La a yaool n kisga a Amno, a sẽn yõg yẽnda ma-biig a Tamaarã yĩnga." 
2Samuel13:23 Daar a yembre, yellã maan n loog tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, a Absalom boola a pe-wõrsdbã a yirã Baal-Hatsoor sẽn be Efrayiim noorã. La a Absalom boola rĩmã kom-dibli fãa tɩ b wa." 
2Samuel13:24 A Absalom kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «N-na! Pe-wõrsdb n wa mam yirã, n na n wõrs mam piisã. Yaa rẽ yĩng la m wa n na n kos rĩmã ne b nanambsã, tɩ b wa naag-d n maan tigrã.»" 
2Samuel13:25 Rĩmã leoka a Absalom yaa: «Ayo! M biig sõngo, maan sugr tɩ tõnd fãa ka tõe n naag taab n wa fo yirã ye. Bala, na n yɩɩ zɩɩb ne foom.» A Absalom pẽdga rĩmã, la rĩmã ka sak n na n kẽng ye. La rĩmã ning-a-la barka." 
2Samuel13:26 A Absalom yeela rĩmã yaa: «Sẽn yaa woto tɩ yãmb meng ka na n tõog n wa wã, m kotame tɩ y kõ m kẽem a Amno noor t'a wa naag-do.» La rĩmã soka yẽnda yaa: «Bõe yĩng t'a Amno na n wa fo yiri?»" 
2Samuel13:27 La a Absalom rag n ket n pẽdgda rĩmã, la rĩmã wa n baas n sakame t'a Amno ne rĩmã kom-dibli a taabã fãa tũ a Absalom n kẽnge." 
2Samuel13:28 La a Absalom yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Ade, m kot-y lame tɩ y gũusd a Amno, t'a sã n wa yũ rãamã n tɩg t'a sũurã noomẽ, tɩ mam yeel-y tɩ y kʋ-a, bɩ y kʋ-a n da yɛɛs ye. Bala, yaa mam mengã n kõ-y noor tɩ y kʋ-a. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ y kẽng n wilg y raoodo.»" 
2Samuel13:29 Dẽ, a Absalom tʋmtʋmdbã maana wa a Absalom sẽn yeel bãmbã. Bãmb kʋ a Amno, la tao-tao bala, rĩmã kom-dibli a taabã yik n basa rɩɩbã n zomb b bõens n zoe." 
2Samuel13:30 La bãmb sẽn wa n ket n be sorẽ, ned n tɩ togs rĩmã t'a Absalom kʋʋ bãmb kom-dibli wã zãnga, n ka bas ba a yembr tɩ põs ye." 
2Samuel13:31 La rĩmã sũur sãamame t'a pãrs a futã n gãand tẽnga, la a nanambsã fãa me pãrsa b fut n dag n yas a sɛɛgẽ." 
2Samuel13:32 A Davɩɩd kẽemã a Simeya biig a Yonadaab yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «N-na! Ra tags-y tɩ b kʋʋ yãmb kambã fãa ye. Ad-y yaa a Amno a yembr bal n ki. Bala, hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning a Amno sẽn yõg a Absalom tão a Tamaarã, a Absalom dag n yãka yam n dat n kʋ-a." 
2Samuel13:33 Dẽ yĩngã, da wa tags-y tɩ b kʋʋ yãmb kambã fãa ye. Ayo! Yaa a Amno a ye bal la b kʋ yã.»" 
2Samuel13:34 La a Absalom bas n zoeeme. Wakat-kãng bala, tẽn-gũudã zẽka a nengã n yãnd neb wʋsg sẽn be Horonayim sorã zug n yit tãngã sigdgẽ n watẽ. La yẽnda tɩ yeela rĩmã yaa: «Mam yãnda neb wʋsg sẽn be Horonayim sorã zug n yit tãngã sigdgẽ n watẽ.»" 
2Samuel13:35 La a Yonadaab yeela rĩmã yaa: «Ad-y yaa yãmb kambã n wate. Kell n yaa mam sẽn dag n togs yãmbã bala.» 
2Samuel13:36 A Yonadaab sẽn nan gom n sɛ bal yee, la rĩmã kamb sẽn be taabẽ. La bãmb ninga nintãm. Dẽ, rĩmã ne a nanambsã me yãba wʋsgo." 
2Samuel13:37 A Absalom sẽn zoe wã, a kẽnga Gesʋʋr rĩm a Amihuud biig a Talmayi nengẽ. Yẽnda zĩnda be yʋʋm a tãabo. Dẽ, yʋʋm-kãens fãa pʋga, a Davɩɩd yãba a biig a Amno sẽn ki wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel13:38  
2Samuel13:39 Dẽ, rĩm a Davɩɩd basa a Absalom pʋgbo, bala, yẽnda paama belsg a biig a Amno kũumã yĩnga." 
2Samuel14:1 A Seruza biig a Zoaab mikame tɩ rĩm a Davɩɩd dag n tagsda a Absalom yelle. 
2Samuel14:2 Dẽ, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ pag a yembr sẽn tar yam yi Tekoa n wa, la yẽnda yeel-a lame yaa: «M kotame tɩ f yeelg kʋʋr futu, la f ra zɛ kaam ye. Maan wa f ned n ki tɩ f be sũ-sãang pʋg hal daar zãra." 
2Samuel14:3 La f kẽng rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ gom ne-b wa mam sẽn na n togs foomã. Dẽ, a Zoaab togsa pagã a sẽn segd n tɩ gom ne rĩmã to-to.»" 
2Samuel14:4 La pagã kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ fõgen a neng tẽng n yeel rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Sõng-y-ma!» 
2Samuel14:5 Rĩmã soka pagã yaa: «Yaa bõe yell n tar-fo?» La pagã leokame: «Mam sɩda kiime n bas-m pʋg-kõto. 
2Samuel14:6 Mam dag n tara kom-dibli a yiibu, la bãmb b yiibã zaba taab weoogẽ, la ned sẽn ka zĩnd yambẽ n na n paas-bã yĩnga, a yembrã wẽ a to wã n kʋ." 
2Samuel14:7 Dẽ, buudã neb fãa yik n zabda ne maam. B yeelame tɩ rẽnd mam tall biig ning sẽn kʋ-a a to wã n wa tɩ b kʋ n dol a ba-biigã kũum, n kell n menes ned ning sẽn dag n segd n soog a ba wã paoongã. Bãmb dat n maana woto n kʋ m bi-yɛngã sẽn kellã sẽn yaa m fãa-fãa wã, n kɩt tɩ m sɩdã yʋʋr menem dũni zugu.»" 
2Samuel14:8 Dẽ, rĩmã yeela pagã yaa: «Lebg n kuil f yiri, tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ b maneg f yellã n kõ-fo.»" 
2Samuel14:9 Pagã leoka rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Yellã sẽn na n yɩ-a soab fãa, taalã bee maam ne m buudã zugu. Yãmb ne y rĩungã toor ka naag be ye.»" 
2Samuel14:10 Rĩmã yeelame: «Ned sã n gom foom wẽnga, bɩ f tall-a n wa mam nengẽ, la a soab kõn leb n saag a buud ye.»" 
2Samuel14:11 Pagã yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na, m kotame tɩ y wẽen ne yãmb Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, tɩ y ka na n bas tɩ sũ-roakdã kʋ m bi-yendã sẽn ketã n dol a ba-biigã a sẽn kʋ wã, n wã zakã n baas ye.» Rĩmã yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, tɩ bũmb kõn tol n maan fo biigã ye.»" 
2Samuel14:12 Pagã yeelame: «N-na! Y kabre! M kotame n na n gom ne-y bilf n paase.» La rĩmã yeel-a lame t'a gome. 
2Samuel14:13 Pagã yeelame: «N-na, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb tar yel-manesem a woto ne Wẽnnaam nebã? Bala, yãmb goamã wilgdame tɩ yãmb yel-manesmã ka zems ye. Sã n ka rẽ, bõe tɩ yãmb ka kɩt t'a Absalom yãmb sẽn digã lebg n wa yiri?" 
2Samuel14:14 Yaa sɩd tɩ d fãa yaa kiidba, n wẽnd koom sẽn daage, tɩ b ka tõe n leb n wʋk-a ye. Wẽnnaam ka na n vʋʋg sẽn ki-a wã ye. La bãmb daabo, yaa tɩ maan sor tɩ b sẽn dig-a soabã tõe n lebg n wa n da pa moog ye." 
2Samuel14:15 N-na, mam sẽn wa n na n gom ne yãmb yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ wã, yaa tɩ yaa nebã n kẽes maam dabeem. La mam tagsame tɩ m sã n wa gom ne yãmba, daar ninga, y na sak n maan wa mam sẽn kosã." 
2Samuel14:16 M tagsame tɩ rĩmã na n kelg-m lame, la b fãag maam ne m biigã ned ning sẽn dat-a n sãam tõnd n yiis-d Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdsã sʋkã nugẽ." 
2Samuel14:17 N-na! Sɩdã, m kotame tɩ yãmb goamã kɩt tɩ m yam gãande. Bala, m dĩmã, yãmb yaa wa Wẽnnaam malɛɛk bala. Y mii sõama ne wẽng n bake. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã zĩnd ne yãmba.»" 
2Samuel14:18 Rĩmã yeela pagã yaa: «Mam na n sok-f-la bũmbu, la m datame tɩ f leok maam n da solg bũmb ye.» La pagã yeelame: «N-na! Sok-y tɩ m kelgdame.»" 
2Samuel14:19 La rĩmã sokame: «Dẽ yĩnga, ka a Zoaab n tʋm foom tɩ f wa gom a woto sɩda?» La pagã leokame: «N-na! Mam wẽenda ne yãmba, tɩ kell n yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã. Sɩd yaa yãmb tãb-biisã naab a Zoaab n wilg maam goam nins mam sẽn wa n gom ne yãmbã." 
2Samuel14:20 Yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Zoaab sẽn maan woto wã, yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yellã toeem nenga. Yãmb tara yam wa Wẽnnaam malɛɛka, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn maandã ka põsgd yãmb ye.»" 
2Samuel14:21 Rẽ zugẽ, rĩmã yeela a Zoaab yaa: «Beneere, mam na n maana wa fo sẽn yeelã. Kẽng n tɩ tall a Absalom n wa.»" 
2Samuel14:22 Dẽ, a Zoaab fõgna a neng tẽng n pʋʋs rĩmã bark n yeel yaa: «N-na! Moasã, mam bãngame tɩ yãmb nonga mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã, bala yãmb maana bũmb ningã mam sẽn kosã.»" 
2Samuel14:23 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zoaab yik n kẽnga Gesʋʋr n tɩ peeg a Absalom n wa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel14:24 La rĩmã yeelame: «Bɩ a Absalom lebg kuil a yiri, la a ra wa mam nengẽ ye.» Dẽ, a Absalom kuilame n pa yã rĩmã ye." 
2Samuel14:25 Israyɛll tẽngã pʋga, ned dag n ka be t'a ra-sãnd ta a Absalom ye. Sẽn sɩng ne a zugã n tɩ tãag a nao-tẽngã, a rag n ka tol n tar zang ye." 
2Samuel14:26 Yʋʋm-vẽkr fãa, a Absalom dag n wõrsda a zugã, bala, a zoobdã rag n zɩsgd-a lame. La yẽnda sã n dag n mak a zoobdã zɩslem, a mikdame t'a tata kɩlo a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka, wa sẽn zems na-yirã zɩslem makdgã." 
2Samuel14:27 A Absalom dag n paama kamb a naase: kom-dibli a tãabo, la bi-pugl a ye. Bi-puglã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Tamaare, la yẽnda rag n yaa pʋg-neer hal wʋsgo." 
2Samuel14:28 A Absalom zĩnda Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a yiibu, la yẽnda ka tol n paam n yãnd rĩmã ye." 
2Samuel14:29 Daar a yembre, a Absalom tʋmame tɩ b bool a Zoaab t'a wa, t'a tʋm-a rĩmã nengẽ. La a Zoaab tõdgame t'a ka wat ye. Yẽnda leb n tʋma ned naoor a yiib soaba, la a Zoaab kell n tõdgame." 
2Samuel14:30 Dẽ, a Absalom yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «Yãmb mi a Zoaab pʋʋgã sẽn yeg mam pʋʋgã, kẽng n tɩ ning-y-yã-a bugum.» Dẽ, Absalom tʋmtʋmdbã kẽng n tɩ maana wa a sẽn yeelã." 
2Samuel14:31 Wakat-kãng bala, a Zoaab yik n kẽnga a Absalom yirã n tɩ sok-a yaa: Sɩngame tɩ bõe tɩ tʋmtʋmdbã wa tɩ yõogd mam pʋʋgã bugum?" 
2Samuel14:32 La a Absalom leoka a Zoaab yaa: «Yaa mam sẽn tʋm naoor a yiib tɩ b wa bool foom tɩ fo zãgs n ka wa wã yĩnga. Mam dag n dat n tʋma foom rĩmã nengẽ, tɩ f tɩ sok-b n gese, mam sẽn yi Gesʋʋr n wa ka wã yõod yaa bõe? Mam sã n dag n paẽ beenẽ n são. Moasã, mam yaa n datame n yãnd rĩmã. La sã n mikame tɩ mam kongame, bɩ b kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ma.»" 
2Samuel14:33 A Zoaab kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ togs-b a Absalom koeesã. La rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b bool a Absalom. La yẽnda wa n taame n wõgemd rĩmã taoor n fõgen a neng tẽnga, la rĩmã mok-a lame." 
2Samuel15:1 Bõn-kãng zugẽ, a Absalom baoo saar ne wiidi, la a yãk neb pis-nu tɩ b be a taoor n yãagd-a." 
2Samuel15:2 La tõd-beoog fãa, a Absalom dag n yikdame n tɩ yals tẽngã rignoorẽ sorã kɩrenga. La ned sã n tũud be n dabd rĩmã nengẽ n na n tɩ welg a yelle, a Absalom boonda a soabã n sok-a a sẽn yitẽ. La a soabã sã n wilg a sẽn yaa Israyɛll buud ninga neda," 
2Samuel15:3 a Absalom yet-a yẽnda yaa: «Beneere, fo tara bʋʋm, la f yellã be a sɩd zugu, la zu-bʋkã, yaa tɩ ned ka be rĩmã sẽn na n yãk t'a welg fo yellã ye.»" 
2Samuel15:4 La a Absalom dag n yetame: «B sã n dag n yãkẽ maam tɩ m yaa bʋ-kaood tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, ned ninga fãa sẽn na n wa-a mam nengẽ ne a yelle, mam na n welga a yellã n kõ-a.»" 
2Samuel15:5 La ned sã n dag n kolg a Absalom n na n wõgemd tẽng n pʋʋs-a, yẽnda tẽegda a nug n pʋʋs a soabã, la a gãd-a n moke." 
2Samuel15:6 A Absalom dag n maanda a woto ne Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tar b yɛl n dabd rĩmã nengẽ wã. La yẽnda maana sɩlem a woto n paam tɩ Israyɛll nebã yam wẽnemd n kẽ-a. 
2Samuel15:7 La yʋʋm a naas loogr zugẽ, daar a yembre, a Absalom yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Mam kot-y-la sor n na n kẽng Ebrõ n tɩ pids pʋlengo, mam sẽn dag n pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Samuel15:8 Bala, mam sẽn wa n be Gesʋʋr sẽn be Siiri wã, mam pʋlma Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel tɩ b sã n sõng maam tɩ m lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm, mam na n maana maoong n waoog-ba.»" 
2Samuel15:9 Dẽ, rĩmã kõ-a-la sor t'a kẽnge. La a Absalom yikame n kẽng Ebrõ." 
2Samuel15:10 A Absalom sẽn ta Ebrõ wã, a soos n tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Israyɛll buudã fãa nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb sã n wa wʋm baorg peebgo, bɩ y moon t'a Absalom lebga rĩm Ebrõ tẽngã pʋgẽ.»" 
2Samuel15:11 La mikame t'a Absalom dag n boola neb kobs-yi tɩ b yi Zeruzalɛm n yãag yẽnda n kẽng Ebrõ. La nin-bãmb dag n ka mi bũmb ning a Absalom sẽn dag n dat n tɩ maanã ye. 
2Samuel15:12 La a Absalom sẽn wa n be Ebrõ n maand maanda wakate, a leb n tʋma ned t'a kẽng Gilo tẽngã, n tɩ bool a Ayitofɛll sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd sagendã t'a wa. La a Absalom nebã sõor dag n tara paasgo, tɩ yellã me paamd pãng n paasdẽ." 
2Samuel15:13 La wakat-kãnga, ned n kẽng n tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd tɩ Israyɛll nebã basa bãmb n tɩ kẽ a Absalom." 
2Samuel15:14 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yeela neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d zoe, tɩ sã n ka rẽ, a Absalom sã n wa paam tõnd ka, a ka na n bas-d ye. D maan tao-tao, tɩ sã n ka rẽ, a Absalom ka na n kaoos la a wa ye. La a sã n wa me, a na n kʋʋ tẽngã neb gilli, n kẽes tẽngã sũ-sãang pʋga.»" 
2Samuel15:15 Rĩmã neb yeel-a lame: «N-na! Yãmb sẽn na n yãk yam-yãkr ninga fãa, tõnd bee ne yãmba.»" 
2Samuel15:16 Dẽ, rĩmã ne a yirã rãmb yi n looga ne nao, la b basa pʋg-rɩkds piig tɩ b yõd n gũ zakã." 
2Samuel15:17 Rĩmã ne a yirã rãmb fãa sẽn wa n yit tẽngã, b taa tẽngã yiib yaoolem zakã, la b yalsa beenẽ." 
2Samuel15:18 Rĩmã zakã neb fãa, ne Kerɛt nebã, la Pelɛt nebã ne Gat tẽngã tãb-biis kobs-yoob nins sẽn dag n tũ-b rĩmã n yi Gat n wa wã rag n pɩʋʋgda rĩmã taoor n loogdẽ." 
2Samuel15:19 Rĩmã yeela Gat rao a Itayi yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo rat n tũ tõndo? Lebg n tɩ pa ne rĩm-paalgã, tɩ bala, fo yaa sãan sẽn yi tẽn-zẽng n wa." 
2Samuel15:20 Bala, fo sẽn wa tõnd nengẽ nan ka kaoos ye. Dẽ, na n yɩɩ a wãn tɩ mam zoe n peegd foom n loogdẽ, tɩ mam meng yaool n ka tar m sẽn dabdẽ. Woto yĩngã, peeg f saam-biisã tɩ y lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm. La mam kota Sẽn-Ka-saabo, tɩ b wilg b sõmblem ne b tɩrlem ne foom.»" 
2Samuel15:21 La a Itayi leoka rĩm a Davɩɩd yaa: «N-na, mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la ne yãmb me, tɩ zĩig ninga fãa yãmb sẽn na n kẽngẽ, mam na n tũu yãmba, ba sã n na tũ ne mam yõore.»" 
2Samuel15:22 Dẽ, dĩm a Davɩɩd yeela a Itayi yaa: «Sã n yaa woto, bɩ f wa looge.» La Gat rao a Itayi ne a nebã la b pagbã ne b kambã fãa me tũ n loogame." 
2Samuel15:23 La nebã sẽn wa n be a Davɩɩd taoor tɩ b loogdẽ wã, tẽngã neb fãa rag n wiisdame. La rĩmã ne a nebã rʋʋga Sedrõ ko-soogã n tũ we-raoogã sor n looge." 
2Samuel15:24 La maan-kʋʋd a Sadok me rag n bee be, la Leevi buudã rag n bee ne yẽnda, n zãad Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã. La Leevi nebã sika kaoolã koglgã n dɩgle, la maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar yikame n yals n maan maoong hal tɩ nebã fãa sẽn yit tẽngã pʋgẽ wã wa loog zãnga." 
2Samuel15:25 Rĩmã yeela a Sadok yaa: «Lebg n leb ne kaoolã koglgã tẽngã pʋgẽ. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dat n maan maam neere, b na n kɩtame tɩ mam tõog n lebg n wa yã kaoolã koglgã ne bãmb doogã." 
2Samuel15:26 La sã n mikame tɩ bãmb ka leb n dat maam ne neere, bɩ b maan maam wa b sẽn date.»" 
2Samuel15:27 La rĩm a Davɩɩd leb n yeela maan-kʋʋd a Sadok yaa: «Fo neeme, bɩ foom ne f biig a Ayimaase, la a Abiyataar ne a biig a Zonatã pĩnd n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel15:28 La ne maam, mam na n tɩ yalsa we-raoogẽ wã, zĩig ning sẽn pẽ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga noorã. Mam na n paa be, hal n wa paam n wʋm yãmb kibare.»" 
2Samuel15:29 Woto, a Sadok ne a Abiyataar talla Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm n tɩ pa beenẽ." 
2Samuel15:30 A Davɩɩd dag n dʋʋda oliiv tɩɩs tãngã la a yãbda. Yẽnda rag n pila a zug peende, n kẽnd nao-zaala. La neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tũud a Davɩɩdã me rag n pila b zut pɛɛla, la b yãbda." 
2Samuel15:31 B wa n togsa a Davɩɩd t'a Ayitofɛll bee ne neb nins sẽn naag a Absalom n dat n maan a Davɩɩd wẽngã sʋka. La a Davɩɩd zẽka a koɛɛg n pʋʋs n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kot-y lame tɩ y kɩt t'a Ayitofɛll saglsã yɩ zaalem.»" 
2Samuel15:32 La a Davɩɩd sẽn ta tãngã zugu, zĩig ning b sẽn waoogd Wẽnnaamã, a yãnda Ark tẽng rao a Husayi sẽn yaa yẽ sagendã sẽn pãrs a futu, n yugl a zug tom n watẽ." 
2Samuel15:33 A Davɩɩd yeel-a lame: «Ra tũ maam ye. Bala, fo tũubã ka na n tall yõod ne maam ye." 
2Samuel15:34 Dẽ wã, bɩ f lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm n tɩ yeel a Absalom yaa: ‹N-na! Mam waame n na n yɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmda. Bala, mam dag n yaa yãmb ba a Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmda, la mam wat n na n yɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmda.› Fo sã n maan woto, f na n sõnga maam n kɩt t'a Ayitofɛll saglgã yɩ zaalem." 
2Samuel15:35 La a Sadok ne a Abiyataar sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã na n sõnga foom. Dẽ, fo na n dɩka goam nins fãa sẽn yit na-yirẽ wã tɩ fo wʋmdẽ wã n togs bãmba." 
2Samuel15:36 La a Sadok biig a Ayimaas ne a Abiyataar biig a Zonatã bee ne bãmb beenẽ. Dẽ, koees nins fãa yãmb sẽn na n wʋma, bɩ y tʋm bãmb tɩ b wa togs-ma.»" 
2Samuel15:37 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd sagend a Usayi sẽn wa n kẽed Zeruzalɛmã, mikame tɩ yaa a Absalom me sẽn nan tate." 
2Samuel16:1 A Davɩɩd sẽn wa n yi tãngã zug n sigda, la a Mefibosɛt tʋmtʋmd a Siba sẽn wa n seg yẽnda. A Siba rag n tata bõens a yiib sẽn zɩlg bur kobs-yi ne reezẽ-gĩn-koeems koabga, la tɩɩs biis peoogo, la reezẽ rãam ne waooga." 
2Samuel16:2 Rĩmã soka a Siba t'a rat n maana bõe ne woto fãa. La a Siba leokame: «N-na! Bõensã na yɩɩ yãmb ne y yirã rãmb bõn-zombdse, tɩ burã ne tɩɩsã biis yɩ y rakõapã rɩɩbo, tɩ reezẽ rãamã yɩ neb nins yaams sẽn na n yõk we-raoogẽ wã yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel16:3 Rĩmã sok-a lame t'a Mefibosɛt sẽn yaa yẽnda soaal a Sayull biigã bee yɛɛnẽ. La a Siba leoka rĩmã yaa: «Yẽ paa Zeruzalɛm, bala, a tagsame tɩ daar ninga, Israyɛll nebã na n kõo yẽnda a ba wã naam dũndã.»" 
2Samuel16:4 Rĩmã yeela a Siba yaa: «Beneere, a Mefibosɛt paoongã fãa lebga foom n so.» Dẽ, a Siba wõgemdame n yeele: «M soaala! Mam pʋʋsd-y-la barka, y sẽn maan-m neerã yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel16:5 Rĩmã taa Bahurim. La gese, a Sayull roogã ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Simeyi, n yaa a Gera biiga, n yi n yals n yɛdg a yãoog n kãabd a Davɩɩd kãab-beedo," 
2Samuel16:6 la a wʋkd kug n lobd a Davɩɩd ne a tʋmtʋmdbã. A Davɩɩd gãndaadã ne nebã rag n gũbga a Davɩɩd goabg la rɩtgo. 
2Samuel16:7 A Simeyi kãabsã pʋga, a rag n tʋʋda rĩm a Davɩɩd n yetẽ: «Kẽng n meneme! Menem n bao zĩiga! Nin-kʋʋdã! Nin-yaalgã!" 
2Samuel16:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgda foom, fo sẽn kʋ a Sayull roogã nebã yĩnga. Fo maana a Sayull pãng n deeg a naamã n dɩtẽ. Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab me reeg fo naamã n kõ f biig a Absalom, n bas-f tɩ f be toog pʋgẽ. Bala fo yaa nin-kʋʋda.»" 
2Samuel16:9 La a Seruza biig a Abisayi yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Bõe yĩng tɩ b na n bas ba-kɩɩn-kãngã t'a tar yãmb n tʋʋd woto? M kot-y lame tɩ y bas tɩ m kẽng n tɩ fiuug a zugã!» 
2Samuel16:10 Rĩm a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Seruza kamba, yãmb toog ka be yel-kãngã pʋgẽ ye. Sã n yaa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ nin-kãngã sor t'a tʋʋd maam woto, ned ka be sẽn tõe n leok-a ye.»" 
2Samuel16:11 A Davɩɩd leb n yeela a Abisayi ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa yaa: «Mam meng bi-roak sã n baood maam n dat n kʋ, Benzame buudã nin-kãngã sẽn maandã ka lingr ne maam ye. Bas-y-yã-a, la y ra maan-a bũmb ye. Sã n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel-a t'a tʋʋs maam, bɩ a tʋ-ma!" 
2Samuel16:12 Daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na yã m nimbãanegã, n tek kãab-wẽng ning sẽn paamd maam dũndã wã tɩ lebg kãab-noogo.»" 
2Samuel16:13 A Davɩɩd ne a nebã kell n dɩka b sor n loogdẽ, la a Simeyi rag n bee tãngã kɩreng a yembrã, n kẽnd n yegd-ba. La yẽnda rag n kẽndame, la a ket n tar a Davɩɩd tʋya, la a toond n lobd-b kuga, la a wʋkd tom n fẽed-ba." 
2Samuel16:14 Rĩmã ne a nebã sẽn wa n na n ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noorã, tɩ b fãa yɛɛ wʋsgo. Dẽ, b zĩnda beenẽ n vʋʋse." 
2Samuel16:15 Wakat-kãnga, a Absalom kẽe Zeruzalɛm ne Israyɛll nebã fãa, la a Ayitofɛll me rag n bee ne yẽnda." 
2Samuel16:16 La Ark tẽng rao a Husayi sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd zoa wã sẽn ta a Absalom nengẽ, a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã!»" 
2Samuel16:17 La a Absalom soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo pʋ-peelmã ne f zoa a Davɩɩdã la woto tɛk bɩ? Yaa bõe tɩ f ka tũ f zoa wã n looge?» 
2Samuel16:18 A Husayi leoka a Absalom yaa: «Maam n dag n ka rate. Bala, mam bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yãk-a soab t'a yɩ rĩmã poorẽ, la mam na n paa ne yẽnda!" 
2Samuel16:19 Ba sã n ka rẽ menga, mam ka tʋmd ned yaar yĩng ye. Yãmb yaa mam zoa wã biiga, bɩ bõe? Dẽ wã, mam sẽn dag n tʋmd yãmb ba wã yĩng to-to wã, mam na n tʋma a woto me yãmb yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel16:20 A Absalom yeela a Ayitofɛll yaa: «Bɩ y yẽs ne taab tɩ d bãng d sẽn segd n maan-a soaba!» 
2Samuel16:21 Dẽ, a Ayitofɛll yeela a Absalom yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ gãand-y y ba wã pʋg-rɩkds nins b sẽn bas tɩ b yõd n gũ na-zakã. Yãmb sã n maan woto, wilgdame tɩ beem n be yãmb ne y ba wã sʋka. Rẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa na n wʋma bõn-kãnga, la neb nins fãa sẽn be ne yãmbã na n paama raoodo.»" 
2Samuel16:22 Woto, b tɩ tilga fu-roog na-yirã bɛoong zugu, la a Absalom gãanda a ba wã pʋg-rɩkdsã beenẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ." 
2Samuel16:23 Wakat-kãnga, b rag n kelgda a Ayitofɛll saglsã fãa wa yaa Wẽnnaam meng n gomde. A Davɩɩd ne a Absalom dag n geelgda a Ayitofɛll saglsã wa goam sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
2Samuel17:1 A Ayitofɛll yeela a Absalom yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ kõ-m noor tɩ m yãk neb tus-piig la a yiibu, n yik yʋngã bal n babs a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel17:2 Mam na n tɩ ling-b-la wakat ning b sẽn yɛ, tɩ b raoodã boogã, n yɛɛs-ba, n kɩt tɩ b nebã fãa sẽn be ne-bã zoe n sãeeg n bas-ba. Wakat-kãnga, yaa rĩmã b yembr bal la mam na n kʋ." 
2Samuel17:3 Mam sã n wa paam n kʋ ned ning yãmb sẽn baoodã, mam na n talla nebã fãa tɩ b lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ, n wa vɩɩmd ne bãane.»" 
2Samuel17:4 La gomdã ta a Absalom ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã fãa yam. 
2Samuel17:5 La baoosgo, a Absalom yeelame yaa: «M kos tɩ y tɩ bool Ark tẽng rao a Husayi me t'a wa tɩ b kelg yẽnda me koɛɛga.»" 
2Samuel17:6 A Husayi sẽn kẽng a Absalom nengẽ, a Absalom togs-a-la a Ayitofɛll sẽn gomã. La a Absalom soka yẽnda yaa: «Tõnd tog n maana wa a Ayitofɛll sẽn yeelã bɩ? Sã n ka segde, bɩ f wilg f tagsgo.»" 
2Samuel17:7 A Husayi leoka a Absalom yaa: «So-kãngã yẽ, a Ayitofɛll saglgã ka sõama ye." 
2Samuel17:8 Yãmb meng miime tɩ y ba wã ne a nebã yaa gãndaado, la b sũyã yika wa b sẽn yõg gɩgem-yãang sẽn be weoogẽ kamb t'a wurdẽ. Yãmb ba wã yaa rao sẽn mi zabr sõama. Rẽ wã, bãmb ka na n sak n gãand b nebã sẽn be zĩig ningã ye." 
2Samuel17:9 B na n solga bok ning pʋgẽ, wall zĩig a to. La zabr sã n yik tɩ b kʋ yãmb neb kẽere, nebã na n wʋmame tɩ b tõoga yãmb nebã." 
2Samuel17:10 La a sã n yɩ woto, neb nins sẽn tar-b pãng tɩ b sũyã yaa wa gɩgma sũyã na n yɛɛsame. Bala nebã fãa miime tɩ y ba yaa gãndaoogo, la neb nins sẽn be-b ne bãmbã me tara sũ-keelem." 
2Samuel17:11 Mam sagenda yãmb tɩ y reng n bool Israyɛll nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Dan hal tɩ ta Bɛɛr-Seba tɩ b wa yãmb nengẽ n yɩ wʋsg wa bĩisr sẽn be ko-kãsengã noore. La bɩ yãmb mengã yãag-b zabrã zĩigẽ." 
2Samuel17:12 Woto, baa bãmb sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, d tõe n ling-b lame n paam-b wa meenem sẽn dʋʋgd tẽn-gãongã zugu, la bãmb ne neb nins fãa sẽn be ne-bã ka na n tõog n põs ye." 
2Samuel17:13 La baa bãmb sã n kẽ tẽng a ye pʋgẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa na n talla wĩy n kẽ beenẽ n kãag tẽngã n tɩ lob ko-soogẽ, hal tɩ kugr baa a ye meng da kell be ye.»" 
2Samuel17:14 A Absalom ne Israyɛll nebã fãa yeelame t'a Husayi saglgã yaa sõama n yɩɩd a Ayitofɛll saglgã. Yaool n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n dat t'a Ayitofɛll saglgã lebg zaalem, sẽn na yɩl tɩ yel-beed paam a Absalom." 
2Samuel17:15 A Husayi togsa maan-kʋʋdb a Sadok ne a Abiyataar a Ayitofɛll sẽn sagl a Absalom ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã bũmb ninsã, ne yẽnda mengã sẽn dag n togsã." 
2Samuel17:16 Yẽnda wilga a Sadok ne a Abiyataar tɩ b tʋm ned tao-tao t'a tɩ wilg a Davɩɩd t'a rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽng taoor n zãage, la a ra gãand we-raoogã tẽn-lamdẽ wã ye. Sã n ka rẽ, b na n kʋʋ rĩmã ne neb nins fãa sẽn be ne bãmbã." 
2Samuel17:17 A Zonatã ne a Ayimaas dag n yasa Ɛn-Rogɛlle, la yem-poak a yembr n wa n togs bãmb tɩ b tɩ togs naab a Davɩɩde, bala bãmb dag n ka tõe n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ tɩ b ka yãnd-b ye." 
2Samuel17:18 La bi-bɩɩg a ye n yãnd bãmb n tɩ togs a Absalom. La bãmb b yiibã zoe tao-tao n ta Bahurim ned a ye zakẽ. Bulg n dag n be a soabã zakẽ, la bãmb kẽe bulgẽ wã." 
2Samuel17:19 Pagã rɩka pĩir n lud bulgã noore, n yɛdg ki pĩirã zugu, tɩ ned ra wa sãmb tɩ bũmb n be beenẽ ye." 
2Samuel17:20 A Absalom tʋmtʋmdbã kẽe zakã pʋgẽ n sok pagã yaa: «A Ayimaas ne a Zonatã bee yɛɛnẽ?» Pagã yeelame tɩ b rʋʋga kʋɩlgã n zoe. Bãmb babs-b lame n ka yãnd-b ye. La b lebg n kẽnga Zeruzalɛm. 
2Samuel17:21 Bãmb sẽn loogã, a Ayimaas ne a Zonatã yii bulgã pʋgẽ, n kẽng n tɩ togs naab a Davɩɩde. Bãmb yeelame: «Bɩ yãmb ne neb nins fãa sẽn be ne yãmbã yik n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã tao-tao.» Bãmb togsa a Davɩɩd a Ayitofɛll sẽn sagl a Absalom bũmb ninsã." 
2Samuel17:22 A Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn be-b ne bãmbã yikame n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã. La beoogã ne a na n vẽege, rẽ tɩ ned ka be sẽn nan ka paam n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã ye." 
2Samuel17:23 A Ayitofɛll sẽn yã tɩ b ka reeg a saglgã, a zomba a bõang n kuil a yiri. La a basa a yaoolem koees ne a zakã rãmba, n yaool n kẽng n tɩ luuli. B mum-a-la a ba yaoogẽ." 
2Samuel17:24 A Absalom ne Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn wa n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, rẽ tɩ yaa a Davɩɩd sẽn tat Mahanayim." 
2Samuel17:25 A Absalom kɩtame t'a Amasa reeg a Zoaab zĩig n lebg tãb-biisã naaba. A Amasa rag n yaa Israyɛll ned a Yitra biiga. A Yitra rag n peega a Nakaas bi-pugl a Abigayɩll n maan a paga. A Abigayɩll yaa a Zoaab ma a Seruya tão-poaka. 
2Samuel17:26 A Absalom ne Israyɛll nebã fãa tilga b tãb-sikã Galaad tẽnga. 
2Samuel17:27 A Davɩɩd sẽn ta Mahanayimã, neb n wa n kõ yẽnda kũuni: Yaa a Nakaas biig a Sobi sẽn yaa Amo nebã tẽng a ye b sẽn boond tɩ Raba wã neda, ne Lodebaar rao a Amiyɛll biig a Makɩɩre, la Galaad tẽng ned a Barzɩlayi sẽn be Rogelimã." 
2Samuel17:28 Bãmb waa ne fu-gobse, laase, rʋgdo, orze, zom, ka-sãrdɩ, bɛnga," 
2Samuel17:29 sɩɩdo, piis bĩis-gõeem, ne niig bĩis-kaam, n tɩ kõ a Davɩɩd ne neb nins sẽn be ne bãmbã tɩ b rɩ. Bala bãmb dag n miime tɩ kom, ne yaamse la ko-yũud n dag n tar bãmb we-raoogã pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel18:1 A Davɩɩd sõda neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã, n kõ-b nanambse. Kẽer lebga neb tusr-tusr nanambse, tɩ kẽer lebg neb koabg-koabg nanambse." 
2Samuel18:2 A Davɩɩd pʋɩɩ a tãb-biisã zĩis a tãabo, n kɩt t'a Zoaab soog sull a ye, t'a Seruya biig a Abisayi sẽn yaa a Zoaab yao wã soog a ye, tɩ Gat rao a Itayi me soog a ye. La rĩmã yeela nebã yaa: «Mam me na n yãaga yãmb n kẽng zabrã zĩigẽ.»" 
2Samuel18:3 La nebã yeelame: «Da yãag-y tõnd n kẽng ye. Bala, ka yell ne bãmb tõnd neb kẽer sã n zoe, wall tõnd nebã pʋɩ-sʋk sã n ki ye. Yãmb yɩɩda tõnd neb tus-piiga. Sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩda, yaa tɩ yãmb pa tẽngã pʋgẽ n tʋmd tõnd sõngre.»" 
2Samuel18:4 Rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Beneere, mam na n maana wa yãmb sẽn datã.» Rĩmã yalsa tẽngã noor tɩ tãb-biisã yit koabg-koabga, la tusr-tusr n loogdẽ." 
2Samuel18:5 Rĩmã yeela a Zoaab ne a Abisayi la a Itayi yaa: «Mam yĩnga, bɩ y zoe m biig a Absalom nimbãanega.» La nebã fãa wʋma goam nins rĩmã sẽn yeel nanambsã fãa a Absalom yellã poorẽ wã." 
2Samuel18:6 Nebã yiime n kẽng weoogã pʋgẽ, n na n tɩ seg Israyɛll nebã, la bãmb zaba ne taab Efrayiim we-raoogã tɩɩs sʋka." 
2Samuel18:7 A Davɩɩd nebã tõoga Israyɛll nebã. Badaare, b kʋʋ bãmb neb tus pisi." 
2Samuel18:8 Zabrã wakate, nebã sãeegame n zabd zĩigã fãa. La neb nins sẽn ki we-raoogã pʋg b toorã sõor yɩɩda neb nins b sẽn kʋ ne sʋʋsã." 
2Samuel18:9 A Absalom wa n mikame t'a Davɩɩd nebã teedga yẽnda neng ne nenga. Yẽnda rag n zaoo bõn-wɛɛga, la bõn-wɛɛgã zoeeme n tɩ kẽ tɩɩg tẽngre t'a Absalom zugã sẽgemd tɩɩgã willẽ, la yẽnda kell n yagemda beenẽ tɩ bõn-wɛɛga looge." 
2Samuel18:10 Ned a yembr n yãnde, n tɩ togs a Zoaab tɩ yẽnda yãnda a Absalom t'a yag tɩɩg zugu." 
2Samuel18:11 A Zoaab soka nedã yaa: «Fo sɩd yãnd-a lame? Yaa bõe tɩ fo ka kʋ-a be bala? Mam dag n na kõẽ foom wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piig ne sẽbdga.» 
2Samuel18:12 Nedã yeela a Zoaab yaa: «Ba b sã n ning wanzuri tusr mam nugẽ, mam ka na n sɩɩs rĩmã biig ye. Bala tõnd dag n wʋmda rĩmã sẽn dag n yet yãmb ne a Abisayi la a Itayi tɩ bãmb yĩnga, bɩ y ra sak tɩ bũmb maan a Absalomã." 
2Samuel18:13 Mam sã n dag n yag tɩ m ka wʋme, n kʋ a Absalom, rĩmã rag n na n wʋmame, la yãmb dag n na n foosa y nus n bas maam.»" 
2Samuel18:14 A Zoaab yeel-a lame: «Mam ka na n sãam m weer ne foom ye.» A Zoaab rɩka kãn a tãab n kẽng n tɩ kõs a Absalom sũurã a sẽn ket n vɩ n yag tɩɩgã zug wakate. 
2Samuel18:15 La a Zoaab rakõap piigã sẽn zãad a zab-teedã wa n baasa a Absalom. 
2Samuel18:16 A Zoaab kɩtame tɩ b peeb baorgo, n yeel a nebã tɩ b bas Israyɛll nebã rigbu, la b sakame." 
2Samuel18:17 Bãmb rɩka a Absalom kũumã n lob bok pʋgẽ we-raoogã sʋka, la b zama kug wʋsg a zug t'a lebg kug-rʋre. La Israyɛll nebã fãa zoeeme n kuili." 
2Samuel18:18 A Absalom sẽn dag n ket n vɩ wakate, a kɩtame tɩ b pees kugr ning sẽn vig rĩmã long pʋgẽ wã, a meng tẽegr yĩnga. Bala, yẽnda rag n tagsame yaa: «Mam ka tar bi-ribl sẽn na n kɩt tɩ m yʋʋrã ra menem ye.» La yẽnda rɩka a meng yʋʋr n pʋd kugrã. La b boonda kug-kãng t'a Absalom kugr hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Samuel18:19 A Sadok biig a Ayimaas yeelame: «M kos tɩ y Bas tɩ m zoe n tɩ togs rĩmã kiba-noogã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga bãmb ne b bɛɛbã.»" 
2Samuel18:20 A Zoaab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Sã n ka daar a to, rũndã, fo ka na n kẽng n tɩ togs koe-kãngã ye. Bala, ka kiba-noog ye, yaa rĩmã biig n ki.»" 
2Samuel18:21 Dẽ, a Zoaab yeela Kuus nedã yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ wilg rĩmã bũmb ning fo sẽn yã wã.» La Kuus nedã wõgemda a Zoaab taoore, n yik n wudg n looge." 
2Samuel18:22 A Sadok biig a Ayimaas leb n yeela a Zoaab yaa: «Ba sẽn na n yɩ-a soab bɩ yɩ! M kotame tɩ y bas tɩ mam me zoe n pʋgl Kuus nedã.» A Zoaab yeela a Ayimaas yaa: «M biiga, yaa bõe yĩng tɩ fo rat n zoe? Ka kibar togsg sẽn na n tall yõod fo yĩng ye.»" 
2Samuel18:23 A Ayimaas yeelame: «Sẽn na yɩl bɩ yɩ, mam na n zoe n kẽngame.» La a Zoaab yeel-a lame tɩ sã yaa a woto bɩ a zoe n kẽnge. La a Ayimaas zoeeme n tũ Zʋrdẽ tẽn-lamdã sor n deng Kuus nedã." 
2Samuel18:24 A Davɩɩd dag n zĩi tẽngã noy a yiibã sʋka. La gũud a ye n dʋ bɛoongã sẽn be tẽngã rignoorã, n kẽng lalgã zugu, n tool n yãnd ned a ye sẽn zoet n watẽ." 
2Samuel18:25 Gũuda zẽka a koɛɛg n togs rĩmã tɩ ned n zoet n watẽ. La rĩmã yeelame: «A soab sã n yaa a yembre, rẽnd a tara kiba-noodo.» La nedã sẽn wa n kolgd n paasdẽ," 
2Samuel18:26 gũudã yãnda ned a to me sẽn zoet n watẽ. La gũudã leb n kelmame n yeel ned ning sẽn be-a tẽngã rignoorẽ wã yaa: «Gese, ned a to me n zoet n wat a yembre.» Rĩmã yeelame: «Yẽ me wata ne kiba-noogo.»" 
2Samuel18:27 Gũudã leb n yeelame: «Pipi soabã zoees wẽnda a Sadok biig a Ayimaas zoeese.» Rĩmã yeelame: «Yẽ yaa nin-sõngo. A wata ne kiba-noodo.» 
2Samuel18:28 La a Ayimaas taame n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeel rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Laafɩ beeme!» Yẽnda wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽng n yeele: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr paam waoogre. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ y tõog neb nins sẽn dag n zabd-b ne rĩmã sẽn yaa m soaalã.» 
2Samuel18:29 Rĩmã sokame t'a Absalom bee laafɩ bɩ? A Ayimaas yeelame yaa: «Wakat ninga a Zoaab sẽn wa n tʋmd maam ne yãmb tʋmtʋmd a to wã, mam yãnda rãmbg kãsenga, la mam ka bãng rãmbgã võor ye.»" 
2Samuel18:30 Rĩmã yeel-a lame t'a kẽng n yals kɩrenga, la yẽnda kẽngame n tɩ yals kɩrengã." 
2Samuel18:31 La Kuus nedã me taame n yeel yaa: «Bɩ rĩmã sẽn yaa mam soaalã bãng kiba-noogã! Rũndã Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga yãmb ne neb nins sẽn dag n zabd-b ne yãmbã.» 
2Samuel18:32 Rĩmã soka Kuus nedã t'a Absalom yaa laafɩ bɩ? La Kuus nedã yeelame: «Bɩ m soaalã bɛɛbã ne neb nins fãa sẽn dat-b yãmb ne wẽnga yɩ wa bi-bɩ-kãngã.» 
2Samuel19:1 Rĩmã sũur sãama hal wʋsgo, tɩ b rʋʋd n dabd tẽngã noor doog a ye pʋgẽ, la b yãbda. Rĩmã rag n kẽndame la b yetẽ: «M biig a Absalom, m biig a Absalom mam sã n dag n ki tɩ fo põs n são. M biiga! M biiga!»" 
2Samuel19:2 Neb n tɩ wilg a Zoaab tɩ rĩmã yãbdame n wiisd a Absalom yĩnga. 
2Samuel19:3 La badaare, tõogrã lebga sũ-sãang nebã fãa yĩnga, bala, nebã fãa wʋmame tɩ rĩmã maanda sũ-sãang a biigã yĩnga." 
2Samuel19:4 Badaare, nebã soosame n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ wa neb sẽn bas zabr n zoe tɩ yãnd tar-ba." 
2Samuel19:5 Rĩmã pila a neng n zẽk a koɛɛg n yãb n yeel yaa: «M biig a Absalom! Absalom! M biiga! M biiga!» 
2Samuel19:6 A Zoaab kẽe roogã pʋg n yeel rĩmã yaa: «Rũndã, yãmb ningda y tʋmtʋmdb nins fãa sẽn fãag yãmb ne y kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli wã, la y pagbã ne y pʋg-rɩkdsã yãnde." 
2Samuel19:7 Bala, yãmb nonga y bɛɛbã, la y kis neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã. Tõnd bãnga rũndã tɩ tãb-biisã nanambs ne tãb-biisã kũum ka yell ne yãmb ye. Mam bãnga rũndã, tɩ yãmb sã n dag n paame tɩ tõnd fãa ki t'a Absalom vɩɩmde, woto n yaa sõama ne yãmba." 
2Samuel19:8 Moasã, yik-y n yi-y n gom-y ne nebã n paas b raoodo. Mam wẽenda ne Wẽnnaam tɩ yãmb sã n ka yi, ned ba a ye kõn pa ne yãmb rũndã yʋngã ye, la woto na n yɩɩ toog ne yãmb n yɩɩd tood nins fãa sẽn paam yãmb y yãadmẽ hal tɩ ta moasã wã.»" 
2Samuel19:9 La rĩmã yikame n yi n tɩ zĩnd tẽngã noore. La b wilga nebã tɩ rĩmã zĩi tẽngã noore, la bãmb kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ. La rẽ tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa zoeeme n kuili." 
2Samuel19:10 Israyɛll buudã fãa pʋgẽ, nebã rag n sõsda ne taab n yetẽ: «Rĩmã fãaga tõnd d bɛɛbã nusẽ. Yaa bãmb n fãag tõnd Filistẽ-dãmbã nusẽ, la b yaool n zoeeme n zãag tẽngã, a Absalom yĩnga." 
2Samuel19:11 Tõnd dag n yãka a Absalom t'a soog tõndo, la yẽnda paa tãp pʋgẽ. La moasã, yaa bõe tɩ y zĩẽ n sĩnda, n ka na n kɩt tɩ b bool rĩmã tɩ b wa?»" 
2Samuel19:12 Rĩm a Davɩɩd tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel maan-kʋʋdb a Sadok ne a Abiyataar tɩ b yeel Zʋʋda kãsem-dãmbã: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb na n bas tɩ nebã fãa reng yãmb n peeg rĩmã n kuil a na-yirã? Bala, goam nins Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn gomã, rĩmã zĩnda a sẽn beẽ wã n wʋme." 
2Samuel19:13 Yãmb yaa mam saam-biisi, yãmb ne maam n yaa bũmb a yembre, la maana a wãn tɩ neb a taab na n deng yãmb n wa peeg maam n kuili?»" 
2Samuel19:14 La rĩmã leb n yeelame tɩ b yeel a Amasa yaa: «Foom ne maam ka bũmb a yembr sɩda? Mam sã n ka kɩt tɩ fo reeg a Zoaab zĩig n lebg mam tãb-biisã naab wakat fãa, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga.»" 
2Samuel19:15 A Davɩɩd goamã tõogame tɩ Zʋʋda nebã fãa paam yam a yembre, n lebg wa nin-yende. La Zʋʋda nebã tʋma koɛɛg n yeel rĩmã t'a lebg n wa ne a nebã fãa." 
2Samuel19:16 Rĩmã lebg n waa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, la Zʋʋda nebã kẽnga Gilgall n tɩ seg rĩmã n sõng-a t'a rʋʋg kʋɩlgã." 
2Samuel19:17 Benzame ned a Geera biig a Simeyi sẽn be Bahurimã zoee tao-tao n tũ Zʋʋda nebã n tɩ seg rĩm a Davɩɩde. 
2Samuel19:18 Benzame neb tusr n dag n tũud a Simeyi, ne a Siba sẽn dag n tʋmd a Sayull yirã ne a kom-dibli piig la a nu wã, la a tʋmtʋmdb pisi wã. Bãmb renga rĩmã n ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
2Samuel19:19 La wakat-kãnga, ko-rugdbã sõnga rĩmã yir dãmb tɩ b rʋʋg kʋɩlgã wa sẽn zems rĩmã tʋlsmã. Rĩmã sẽn wa n pɩʋʋg kʋɩlgã n sɛ, a Geera biig a Simeyi wa n lʋɩɩme n fõgen a neng tẽng rĩmã taoor n yeel-b yaa:" 
2Samuel19:20 «Bɩ m soaalã ra geelg mam kongrã ye. Bɩ b ra tẽeg b tʋmtʋmdã sẽn maan beegr ning daar ning yãmb sẽn yi Zeruzalɛmã ye. Da bĩng-y yel-kãngã y sũurẽ ye. 
2Samuel19:21 Bala, mam miime tɩ m beegame, yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ mam yaa a Zozɛf roogã fãa pipi ned sẽn wa n na n seg yãmb m soaalã sẽn yaa m dĩmã.»" 
2Samuel19:22 A Seruya biig a Abisayi yeelame: «B segd n kʋ a Simeyi yel-kãng yĩnga, bala, yẽnda tʋʋsa Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk-a soabã.»" 
2Samuel19:23 La a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Seruya kamba, da maan-y beem ne maam tɩ y toor ka be yel-kãngã pʋgẽ ye. B ka na n kʋ Israyɛll ned rũndã daarã ye. Mam miime tɩ m yaa Israyɛll dĩmã.»" 
2Samuel19:24 La rĩmã wẽename n yeel a Simeyi yaa: «Fo ka na n ki ye.» 
2Samuel19:25 A Sayull yageng a Mefibosɛt me kẽngame n tɩ seg rĩmã. Sẽn sɩng ne daar ning a Davɩɩd sẽn yi Zeruzalɛm n zoe wã, n tãag a sẽn na n lebg n wa ne laafɩ wã, a Mefibosɛt ka tol n waas a nao, wall a wõrs a no-kõbdã, wall a pegs a fut ye." 
2Samuel19:26 La a Mefibosɛt sẽn yi Zeruzalɛm n seg rĩmã, rĩmã sok-a lame: «Mefibosɛte, yaa bõe tɩ fo ka tũ maam?»" 
2Samuel19:27 La yẽnda leokame: «Dĩmã sẽn yaa m soaala, mam tʋmtʋmd n belg maam. Mam yeel-a lame t'a wa kõ-m bõang tɩ m zomb n yãag yãmb tɩ m yaa põore." 
2Samuel19:28 La yẽnda waa yãmb nengẽ n wa kãneg maam. La yãmb yaa wa Wẽnnaam malɛɛka. Maan-y wa yãmb sẽn date. 
2Samuel19:29 Bala, mam ba wã zak-rãmb fãa yɩɩ neb sẽn zems kũum yãmb taoore, la baoosgo, yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam lagem neb nins sẽn dɩt ne yãmbã n dɩtẽ. Mam maana bõe sẽn zems tɩ m tõe n leb n yõk rĩmã sɛɛg n kos-b bũmb a to?»" 
2Samuel19:30 Rĩmã yeel-a lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ f gomd a woto? Mam yeelame tɩ foom ne a Siba pʋɩ taab pʋtã.» 
2Samuel19:31 La a Mefibosɛt yeela rĩmã: «Dĩm sẽn yaa m soaala, bas-y t'a reeg fãa n sooge, yãmb sẽn tõog n lebg n wa yir ne laafɩ wã sekame.»" 
2Samuel19:32 Galaad rao a Barzɩlayi yii Rogelim n wa yãag rĩmã n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n pʋʋs-b wẽnd na taase. 
2Samuel19:33 A Barzɩlayi rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo, n tar yʋʋm pis-nii. Yẽnda rag n yaa nin-kãsenga. La yaa yẽnda n dag n kõt rĩmã rɩɩb b sẽn wa n be Mahanayimã wakate." 
2Samuel19:34 Rĩmã yeela a Barzɩlayi yaa: «Wa tũ maam n kẽng mam yirã Zeruzalɛm tɩ m tɩ ges f yelle.» 
2Samuel19:35 La a Barzɩlayi leokame yaa: «Mam vɩɩmã rasem sõor ka leb n yaa wʋsg ye, dẽ wã, ka tɩlɛ tɩ mam tũ yãmb n kẽng Zeruzalɛm ye." 
2Samuel19:36 Mam tara yʋʋm pis-nii moasã. Mam ka leb n mi bũmb sẽn yaa noogo, ne bũmb sẽn ka noog n bak ye. Mam ka leb n mi rɩ-noog ne rã-noog ye. Yɩɩn-yɩɩndb yɩɩl noosem ka leb n kẽed maam ye. Dẽ wã, ka tɩlɛ tɩ mam wa yãmb nengẽ, n wa nams yãmb ye." 
2Samuel19:37 Mam na n dʋʋga kʋɩlgã ne yãmba, n yãag-y bilf la m lebge. Yaa bõe yĩng tɩ rĩmã rat n dol maam woto fãa?" 
2Samuel19:38 M kotame tɩ y bas y tʋmtʋmdã, t'a kuil a tẽngẽ n tɩ ki tɩ b mum-a zĩig ning a ba wã ne a ma wã yaad sẽn beẽ wã. La ade, a Kimham bee kaanẽ, bɩ yẽnda tũ yãmb tɩ y maan-a wa y sẽn data.»" 
2Samuel19:39 Rĩmã yeelame: «Bɩ a Kimham wa tũ maam, la mam na n maana bũmb ning fo sẽn datã n kõ-a. Mam na n maana bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn date.»" 
2Samuel19:40 Rĩmã ne nebã fãa sẽn dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n sɛ, rĩmã moka a Barzɩlayi n ning a zug barka. La a Barzɩlayi lebg n kuilame." 
2Samuel19:41 Rĩmã pɩʋʋgame n kẽng Gilgall sẽnẽ, la a Kimham tũu bãmba. Zʋʋda nebã fãa ne Israyɛll nebã pʋɩ-sʋk yãaga rĩmã n pɩʋʋg kʋɩlgã." 
2Samuel19:42 La Israyɛll nebã fãa tũu taab n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa d saam-biisã kẽng n tɩ peeg yãmb ne y yirã dãmbã, la y nebã fãa n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n ka wilg tõndo?»" 
2Samuel19:43 Zʋʋda nebã leoka Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Yaa rĩmã sẽn yaa tõnd roogã nedã yĩnga. Yaa wãn tɩ yãmb sũy yikd yõwã yĩnga? Yaa rĩmã n dag n dɩlgd tõnd la? Bɩ rĩmã kõo tõnd bũmbu?» 
2Samuel19:44 La Israyɛll nebã yeela Zʋʋda nebã yaa: «Baa rĩmã sã n yaa yãmb buudu, bãmb yaa tõnd buud naoor piig n yɩɩda. Yaa bõe tɩ y paoogd tõndo? Ka tõnd n yɩ pipi n yeel tɩ d ratame tɩ rĩmã lebg n wa la?» La Zʋʋda nebã goma ne pãng n yɩɩd Israyɛll nebã." 
2Samuel20:1 Nin-yoog a yembr n dag be Gilgalle, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Seba, yẽnda yaa Benzame buudã ned a Bikri biiga. A Seba peeba baorg n yeele: «Tõnd bũmb ka be a Davɩɩd nengẽ ye, Tõnd ka tar lagem-n-taar ne a Izayi biigã ye. Israyɛll nebã, bɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri.»" 
2Samuel20:2 La Israyɛll nebã fãa basa a Davɩɩd n tũ a Bikri biig a Seba. La Zʋʋda nebã kell n tũu b rĩmã n yãag-b Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tãag Zeruzalɛm. 
2Samuel20:3 A Davɩɩd kuila a yir Zeruzalɛm, la yẽnda rɩka pʋg-rɩkds piigã yẽnda sẽn dag n bas tɩ b gũ zakã n bao zak toor zall n ning-ba, n pag-ba. Yẽnda rag n geta b yelle, la a ka leb n kẽed ne-b ye. B kell n paga pʋg-bãmb be, tɩ b vɩɩmd wa pʋg-kõap n tãag b kũum." 
2Samuel20:4 Rĩmã yeela a Amasa yaa: «Bool Zʋʋda nebã tɩ b wa kaanẽ ra-tãta, la bɩ fo mengã me tũ bãmb n wa.»" 
2Samuel20:5 A Amasa kẽngame n na n tɩ bool Zʋʋda nebã, la yẽnda kaoosame n yɩɩd rĩmã sẽn dag n kõ wakat ningã." 
2Samuel20:6 Woto, a Davɩɩd yeela a Abisayi yaa: «Gese, a Bikri biig a Seba na n maana tõnd wẽng n yɩɩd a Absalom. Bao neb tɩ y kẽng n tɩ yõk-a, t'a ra tõog n bao tẽms sẽn tar lals n kẽ n soond tɩ y ka yãnd-a ye.»" 
2Samuel20:7 A Zoaab ne a tãb-biisã yiime, tɩ Kerɛt nebã, ne Pelɛt nebã ne b gãndaadã fãa yi Zeruzalɛm n kẽng n na n tɩ yõk a Bikri biig a Seba." 
2Samuel20:8 La bãmb sẽn ta Gabawõ pĩig kug-kãsengã sɛɛga, la a Amasa sẽn be waoongẽ, n ta n yals bãmb taoore. A Zoaab rag n yera a zabr futu, n lulg a sʋʋg a sɛɛg sẽbdgẽ, la yẽnda sẽn wa n kolgd a Amasa wã, sʋʋgã lʋɩɩme." 
2Samuel20:9 A Zoaab pʋʋsa a Amasa n gãd a toɛɛngã ne a rɩtg n mok-a n yeele: «Laafɩ beeme m saam-biiga?» 
2Samuel20:10 La a Amasa ka gũus ne sʋʋgã sẽn dag n be a Zoaab goabg nugẽ wã ye. La a Zoaab kõsa a Amasa pʋgã t'a yãada yʋlem tẽnga, la a ka leb n kõs-a n paas ye, kõs-vukã bal n kʋ a Amasa. A Zoaab ne a ba-biig a Abisayi kẽnga taoor n na n pʋgl a Bikri biig a Seba." 
2Samuel20:11 A Zoaab nebã sʋka, ned a yembr n yaas a Amasa zug n yeel yaa: «Bɩ neb nins fãa sẽn dat a Zoaab ne a Davɩɩdã tũ a Zoaabe.»" 
2Samuel20:12 A Amasa rag n dɩga tẽng a mengã zɩɩm pʋgẽ, sorã zugu. La rao-kãng sẽn yã tɩ nebã sã n ta zĩ-kãngã, b yalsdame wã, a vuuga kũumã n serg sorã zugu, n tɩ lob pʋʋg pʋgẽ, n bao fuug n pil-a." 
2Samuel20:13 Yẽnda sẽn vuug a Amasa kũumã n serg sorã zugã, nebã fãa yaool n tũ a Zoaab n na n tɩ yõk a Bikri biig a Seba." 
2Samuel20:14 A Seba pɩʋʋga Israyɛll buudã fãa tẽms hal tɩ ta Abɛll-Bɛt-Maaka, la Berim nebã fãa tũ a Seba n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel20:15 A Zoaab ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã kẽng n tɩ gũbga Abɛll-Bɛt-Maaka, n na n zab ne-a n paam n yõk a Seba. Bãmb zama tom tẽngã lalg sɛɛgẽ, la b tuu lalgã tẽngre, n na n lub-a." 
2Samuel20:16 La tẽngã pag a yembr sẽn tar yam zĩnda tẽngã pʋg n kelem n yeel yaa: «Kelg-y-yã! Kelg-y-yã! M kotame tɩ y yeel a Zoaab t'a kolg ka tɩ m dat n goma ne-a.» 
2Samuel20:17 La a Zoaab kolgame, tɩ pagã sok-a tɩ yaa yẽnda la a Zoaabã bɩ? La a Zoaab yeelame: «Yaa maam.» Pagã yeelame: «M soaala kelg-y mam goamã.» La a Zoaab yeelame: «Mam kelgdame.»" 
2Samuel20:18 Pagã yeelame: «Kʋdem-dãmbã rag n yetame: Kẽng-y Abɛll n tɩ sok n paam saglgo. La b sã n mi n maan a woto, yellã manegdame." 
2Samuel20:19 Tõnd tẽngã bee Israyɛll tẽms nins sẽn tar-b laafɩ la pʋ-peelem n tɩ yɩɩdã sʋka. La yaa bõe tɩ yãmb baood n sãam tẽng sẽn yaa wa ma Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ? Yaa bõe tɩ y rat n sãam tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn so wã?» 
2Samuel20:20 A Zoaab yeelame yaa: «Kõn tol n yɩ a woto abada. Mam kõn menes tẽngã, wall m sãam-a ye." 
2Samuel20:21 Yellã ka bũmb a woto ye. La yaa t'a Bikri biig a Seba sẽn yit Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n yik n dat n zab ne rĩm a Davɩɩde. Yiis-y yẽnda a yembr bal n kõ-ma, la m na loog n bas y tẽngã.» Pagã yeela a Zoaab yaa: «Beneere, b na n loba a zugã lalgã poor tɩ y rɩke.»" 
2Samuel20:22 La pagã kẽngame n tɩ gom ne tẽngã nebã fãa ne yam. La b fiuuga a Bikri biig a Seba zugã n lob yɩng lalgã poor t'a Zoaab rɩke. La a Zoaab peeba baorg t'a nebã loog n bas tẽngã, ned kam fãa leb a yiri. La a Zoaab me lebg n leba rĩmã nengẽ Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel20:23 A Zoaab sooga Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa, t'a Zehozada biig a Benaya soog Kerɛt ne Pelɛɛg nebã," 
2Samuel20:24 t'a Adoram yaa tʋʋm-wɛglã yel-gɛta. A Ahiluud biig a Zozafat n yaa seb-bĩngda. 
2Samuel20:25 A Seeva n yaa seb-gʋnda, t'a Sadok ne a Abiyataar yaa maan-kʋʋdba." 
2Samuel20:26 La Yayɩɩr dao a Iira me n yaa a Davɩɩd maan-kʋʋd a yembre. 
2Samuel21:1 A Davɩɩd wakatẽ wã, kom n zĩnd yʋʋm a tãabo. A Davɩɩd soka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n ges yaa a wãn tɩ komã yaa a woto? La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Nin-kʋʋdbã yell bee a Sayull ne a roogã zugu, yẽnda sẽn kʋ Gabawõ nebã yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel21:2 Gabawõ nebã yaa a Amoor buudã neb bilf ning sẽn dag n ketã. Bãmb dag n ka Israyɛll buud ye. Israyɛll nebã rag n wẽename n yeel tɩ bãmb ka na n maan Gabawõ nebã bũmb ye. La baoosgo, yẽnda a Sayull sãama bãmba, yẽnda sẽn dag n tar nonglem-kãseng Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã yĩngã. Rĩm a Davɩɩd boola Gabawõ nebã n na n gom ne-ba." 
2Samuel21:3 Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb datame tɩ mam maan bõe tɩ y ra leb n geelg Israyɛll nebã kongrã, la y ning b zut barka?»" 
2Samuel21:4 Gabawõ nebã yeelame: «Wanzuri ne sãnem ka tõe n maneg yell ning sẽn be tõnd ne a Sayull buudã sʋkã ye, la Israyɛll ned kũum me ka tõe n dol ye.» A Davɩɩd leokame: «Kos-y yãmb sẽn dat bũmb ning tɩ m maan n kõ-yã»" 
2Samuel21:5 Bãmb yeela rĩmã yaa: «A Sayull dag n kʋʋ tõnd nebã n dat n menes tõnd buudã zãnga, tɩ tõnd ned baa a ye da leb n kell Israyɛll tẽngã pʋgẽ ye." 
2Samuel21:6 Tõnd kotame tɩ y yãk a Sayull yagensã sʋk neb a yopoe n kõ tõndo tɩ d luul-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Gibeya, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk a Sayull tẽng ningã pʋgẽ wã.» Rĩmã yeelame: «Mam na n yãk-b lame n kõ yãmba.»" 
2Samuel21:7 La rĩmã basa a Sayull biig a Zonatã biig a Mefibosɛt n ka kʋ, wẽeneg ning yẽnda sẽn dag n wẽen ne a Zonatã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã yĩnga." 
2Samuel21:8 Dẽ, ad neb a yopoe nins rĩmã sẽn yãk n kõ Gabawõ nebã tɩ b kʋ wã: Yaa a Armoni ne a Mefibosɛt sẽn yaa a Aya bi-pugl a Ritspa sẽn yaa a Sayull pʋg-rɩkdgã kambã, n paas a Sayull bi-pugl a Meraab sẽn yaa Mehola rao a Barzɩlayi biig a Adriyɛll pagã kamb a nu wã." 
2Samuel21:9 A Davɩɩd rɩk-b lame n kõ Gabawõ nebã tɩ b luul-b Gibeya Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tãngã zugu. Bãmb b yopoe wã fãa naaga taab n ki wakat yɛnga. B kʋʋ bãmb bõn-bɩʋʋng sɩngr wakate, oorzã kẽebg sasa." 
2Samuel21:10 A Aya bi-pugl a Ritspa rɩka yolg n tɩʋ pĩiga zug n yegl kũumã, n zĩnd be bõn-bɩʋʋng sɩngr wakate, n pa be n tãag sigr saagã sẽn wa n pãb kũumã. La wĩntoogo, yẽnda ka bas tɩ bõn-yɩgdɩ rɩ-ba, la yʋng me, yẽnda ka bas tɩ we-rũms wa n dɩ-b ye." 
2Samuel21:11 B tɩ togsa a Davɩɩd a Sayull pʋg-rɩkdg a Ritspa sẽn maan bũmb ningã. 
2Samuel21:12 La a Davɩɩd kẽng n tɩ reega a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã kõaba Yabɛɛs tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã nebã nengẽ. Bala, wakat ning Filistẽ nebã sẽn wa n tõog a Sayull Gilboa wã, b lulga yẽnda ne a biigã kũum Bɛt-Sãn. Dẽ, Yabɛɛs tẽngã neb rag n kẽnga Bɛt-San tẽngã n tɩ zuk a Sayull ne biigã kũum n lebg n tɩ mum Zabɛɛse." 
2Samuel21:13 A Davɩɩd tɩ wʋka a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã kõabã, la a kɩt tɩ b wʋk neb a yopoe wã b sẽn dag n luulã me kõaba." 
2Samuel21:14 B muma a Sayull ne a biig a Zonatã kõaba a Sayull ba a Kiis yaoogã pʋgẽ Sela tẽngã sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã. La b maana bũmb nins fãa rĩmã sẽn yeelã. Yõwã zugẽ, Wẽnnaam sũurã siga ne tẽngã." 
2Samuel21:15 Filistẽ nebã leb n yika zabr ne Israyɛll nebã. La a Davɩɩd ne a tãb-biisã kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ nebã. La a Davɩɩd dag n yɛɛme. 
2Samuel21:16 A Zisbi-Benoob rag n yaa nin-wobdã yageng a yembre, la a kãndã zɩslem dag yɩɩda zũud kɩlo a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋka, la a rag n tara sʋ-paalg sẽn be a sɛɛgẽ, yẽnda yeelame t'a na n kʋ a Davɩɩde." 
2Samuel21:17 La a Seruza biig a Abisayi sõnga a Davɩɩd n zab ne Filistẽ raoã n kʋ-a. A Davɩɩd nebã wẽename n yeel-a yaa: «Da leb-y n tũ-y tõnd n kẽng zabr yɛsa, n wa kɩt tɩ Israyɛll fɩtlã ki ye.»" 
2Samuel21:18 Bõn-kãng zugẽ, zabr leb n yika Israyɛll nebã ne Filistẽ nebã sʋk Goob tẽnga. La Husa tẽng rao a Sibekayi kʋʋ nin-wobdã yageng a Safe." 
2Samuel21:19 Israyɛll nebã ne Filistẽ nebã leb n zaba ne taab Goobe. La Betlehɛm dao a Yare-Oregim biig a Ɛlkana kʋʋ Gat tẽng rao a Golyaate. 
2Samuel21:20 Zabr leb n zĩnda Gat tẽnga. Nin-wobg a yembr n dag be beenẽ, n tar nug-bi a yoob-yoobe la nao-bi a yoob-yoobe. Yẽnda me rag n yaa nin-wobdã yagenga." 
2Samuel21:21 Yẽnda tʋʋsa Israyɛll nebã, la a Davɩɩd kẽem a Simeyi biig a Zonatã kʋ-a lame." 
2Samuel21:22 Nin-bãmb b naasã n dag n yaa Gat tẽng nin-wobdã yagense. A Davɩɩd ne a tʋmtʋmdbã kʋʋ bãmb fãa. 
2Samuel22:1 Daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag a Davɩɩd ne a bɛɛbã fãa wã, la b fãag-a a Sayull nugẽ wã, yẽnda goma ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Samuel22:2 A yeelame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pĩiga, bãmb yaa mam pãng zĩiga, la b yaa mam fãagda." 
2Samuel22:3 Bãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam, la b yaa mam pĩiga. Mam zĩ-soalgdg yaa bãmb nengẽ. Bãmb yaa mam gãongo, la pãng sẽn fãagd maam. Mam pãng zĩiga, la m zĩ-soalgdga. Yãmb n fãagd maam nen-keglem dãmbã nugẽ." 
2Samuel22:4 Mam sã n zẽk m koɛɛg n yeele: ‹Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr paam pẽgre›, bãmb fãagda maam m bɛɛbã fãa nusẽ." 
2Samuel22:5 Bala, kũum ko-wĩis rag n gũbga maam, la sãoong ko-zoetem kẽes-m-la rabeem." 
2Samuel22:6 Kɩɩm-kulg wĩy rag n vila maam, kũum gãmbr dag n bee mam taoore." 
2Samuel22:7 Mam sũ-sãangã pʋga, mam boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boola m Wẽnnaamã tɩ b sõng-ma. Bãmb zĩnda b ro-sõngẽ wã n wʋm m boaalã. Mam sẽn bool-b n kot sõngrã b wʋmame." 
2Samuel22:8 Tẽn-gãongã rigimdame n miime, la saasẽ yẽbgrã rĩmsame. Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã rĩmsa bãmba."
