2Samuel22:9 Bug-zõos rag n yita bãmb yõyẽ wã n zẽkdẽ, bug-witim n dag n yit bãmb noorẽ, bug-pãrs me n dag n yit be." 
2Samuel22:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zõnega sa-gãongã n tab n sigi, bãmb taba sawad-taok n sigi." 
2Samuel22:11 Bãmb zomba Serubẽ n yɩgda, bãmb zomba sobg pɩgs n puki." 
2Samuel22:12 Bãmb dɩka lik n maan fu-roog n gũbg b menga, wa koom sẽn be sawad-lik pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel22:13 Sa-yãgb ning sẽn deng bãmb taoorã pʋgẽ, bug-pãrs n yit beenẽ." 
2Samuel22:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda saasẽ n tãse. Sẽn-Ka-To kɩtame tɩ b wʋm b koɛɛg rãamde. 
2Samuel22:15 Bãmb tãoo pɛɛm n sãeeg b bɛɛbã, la b tʋm sa-yãgb n kẽes bɛɛbã rabeem." 
2Samuel22:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tãsã, ko-kãsengã tẽngr pukame, b vʋʋsmã ne b yõ-bogdã pemsem kɩtame tɩ dũni wã yẽbgr puki." 
2Samuel22:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda yĩngr n tẽeg b nug n gãd maam n yiis ko-kãsemsã pʋga. 
2Samuel22:18 Bãmb fãaga maam m bɛyã sẽn tar pãngã nugẽ. B fãag-m-la sẽn kis-b maam n tar pãng n yɩɩd maamã nugẽ. 
2Samuel22:19 Nin-bãmbã bẽda toogã sẽn paam maamã daare, n na n zab ne maam, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n sõnga maam." 
2Samuel22:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga maam, n yols-ma. B sẽn fãag-ma, yaa b sẽn nong-ma yĩnga." 
2Samuel22:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana maam wa sẽn zems m tɩrlem. Bãmb keoo maam wa sẽn zems mam nus tʋʋm-sõamyã sẽn yaa to-to wã. 
2Samuel22:22 Bala, mam saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab raabã, n ka bʋdg n bas m Wẽnnaamã wa nin-wẽnsã ye." 
2Samuel22:23 Mam tagsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-tũudsã fãa yelle. La mam ka zãagd m meng ne bãmb tõodã ye. 
2Samuel22:24 Mam maana burkĩnd ne bãmba, n gũus m meng ne yel-wẽn buud fãa." 
2Samuel22:25 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab keoo maam wa sẽn zems m tɩrlem, wa sẽn zems m sẽn maan sõmblem ning bãmb nifẽ wã." 
2Samuel22:26 Sẽn maand-a pʋ-peelem, yãmb maanda pʋ-peelem ne-a, sẽn yaa-a gãndaoog n yaa burkĩna, yãmb wilgda a soab y burkĩndlim." 
2Samuel22:27 Sẽn maand-a sõmblem, yãmb wilgda a soab tɩ y yaa sõmblem soaba. La ned ning sẽn wilgd t'a tara yam, yãmb wilgd-a lame tɩ yãmb yam n yɩɩde." 
2Samuel22:28 Yãmb fãagda nimbãan-dãmbã, la y sã n ges wuk-m-mens rãmbã, b sikda b mense." 
2Samuel22:29 Yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa mam vẽenem. Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnegda maam lik bida pʋgẽ. 
2Samuel22:30 Ne yãmb pãnga, mam zoet n segda tãb-bi-sulli, ne mam Wẽnnaamã pãnga, mam gãndgda lalse." 
2Samuel22:31 Wẽnnaam soayã zemsa zãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yaa sɩda, la b yaa gãongo, neb nins fãa sẽn soonded bãmb nengẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Samuel22:32 Sã n ka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Wẽnnaam a to bee yɛɛnẽ? La ãndã n yaa pĩig kugri, sã n ka tõnd Wẽnnaamã?" 
2Samuel22:33 Wẽnnaam-kãng n yaa mam pãng zĩiga, la bãmb n manegd mam sore, tɩ zems zãnga." 
2Samuel22:34 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ mam naoã yaa faasg wa walg nao, la b sõngd maam tɩ m dʋʋd zĩ-zãongls zutu." 
2Samuel22:35 Bãmb n zãmsd maam zabr sẽn zabd to-to, la b sõngd maam tɩ m yãagd zũud tãpo." 
2Samuel22:36 Yãmb kõta maam y fãagrã tɩ yaa m gãongo, yãmb sẽn leokd maamã bɩɩsda maam." 
2Samuel22:37 Yãmb sõngda maam tɩ m zoet n ka yɛɛdẽ ye. La m nao-sẽbã yaa kãenkãe tɩ m ka lagsdẽ ye. 
2Samuel22:38 Mam digda m bɛɛbã, n tɩ sãam-ba, mam ka lebgd n ka sãam-b zãng ye." 
2Samuel22:39 Mam sãamd-b lame, m kɛɛd-b lame n pase, tɩ b ka leb n tõe n yik ye. Bãmb lʋɩta tẽng tɩ m tabda." 
2Samuel22:40 Yãmb kõta maam pãng tɩ m tõe n zabe, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam tõog m bɛɛbã." 
2Samuel22:41 Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam bɛɛbã zoet mam taoore, la m na n menesa sẽn kis-b maamã zãnga." 
2Samuel22:42 Bãmb yong n getame, la ned ka be n na n fãag-b ye. B boonda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka leokd-b ye." 
2Samuel22:43 Mam neema bãmb wa tẽng tom, mam bedsd-b lame, n tabd-b wa sor zug begdo." 
2Samuel22:44 Yãmb fãagda maam ne m nebã zabã, la y lʋɩɩs-m bu-zẽms taoore, n kɩt tɩ m soog buud m sẽn dag n ka mi." 
2Samuel22:45 Bu-zẽmsã belemda maam, mam sã n gom bala, b sakdame." 
2Samuel22:46 Bu-zẽmsã pãng sɛɛme, b yita b zĩ-solgdsẽ wã, n digda." 
2Samuel22:47 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre, bɩ mam pĩigã paam barka! Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa pĩig sẽn fãagd maamã paam waoogre." 
2Samuel22:48 Wẽnnaam-kãng n dokd m sũur n kõt-ma, n kɩtdẽ tɩ m soogd bu-zẽmse." 
2Samuel22:49 Bãmb n sõngd maam tɩ m põs m bɛɛbã! Yãmb zẽkda maam tɩ m yɩɩg m zabd-n-taasã, yãmb fãagda maam nin-toaag nugẽ." 
2Samuel22:50 Rẽ n kɩt yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ mam na n pẽg yãmb bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la m yɩɩl n pẽg yãmb yʋʋrã." 
2Samuel22:51 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maanda tʋʋm-kãsems n fãagd b rĩmã, bãmb wilgda b nonglem ne b nin-tũusdgã. Bãmb wilga b nonglem ne a Davɩɩde, la ne a Davɩɩd yagensã, wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel23:1 Gom-kãensã yaa a Izayi biig a Davɩɩd yaoolem goamã. Yaa a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã sẽn yãk-a soab t'a yɩ Israyɛll rĩmã, n kɩt t'a lebg nin-kãsengã n gomde. A Davɩɩd dag n yaa Israyɛll yɩɩn-yɩɩnda." 
2Samuel23:2 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã rɩka maam n gomda. Bãmb goamã bee mam zelemdẽ. 
2Samuel23:3 Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã gomame, Israyɛll pĩig kugrã yeela maam yaa: ‹Ned sã n soog neb ne tɩrlem la Wẽnnaam rabeem zoeese," 
2Samuel23:4 yẽnda soab wẽnda wa yibeoog sõor sẽn pukdi. La a wẽnda wa wĩntoog sẽn kõt a vẽenem, tɩ saag niid n kɩtdẽ tɩ mood yit dũni wã zugu.›" 
2Samuel23:5 N-yẽe! Mam doogã me na n yɩɩ woto Wẽnnaam taoore. Bala, bãmb maana kaool sẽn kõn sɛ ne maam. Bũmbã fãa manegame tɩ zemse. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ m paam fãagre, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa sõama." 
2Samuel23:6 La nin-yoodã sẽn paoogd-b Wẽnnaamã, yaa wa gõos neb sẽn kɛɛd n lobda. La ned ka tõe n dɩk-b ne b nus ye." 
2Samuel23:7 La ned ka tõe n sɩɩs-b me ye. Sã n ka tɩ b kãas-b n yõog bugum bala.» 
2Samuel23:8 Ad a Davɩɩd gãndaadã yʋya: Takmoon dao a Yosɛɛb-Basebɛte, sẽn yaa gãndaadã sull a yembr ned a yembrã. Yaa yẽnda n tall kãnd zabr pʋgẽ n kʋ neb kobs nii zĩig pʋgẽ balã. B rag n boond-a lame me t'a Ɛsni tẽng rao a Adino." 
2Samuel23:9 La sẽn pʋgd yẽnda, yaa a Akoki biig a Dodo biig a Eliyazaare. Yẽnda yaa gãndaad a tãabã nin-yende. Bãmb n dag n be ne a Davɩɩd wakat ning Filistẽ nebã sẽn wa n tigim taab n dat n zab ne a Davɩɩdã. Sasa-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã fãa rag n zoeeme n dʋ tãmsã zutu." 
2Samuel23:10 A Eliyazaar yikame n kʋ Filistẽ nebã ne sʋʋg hal t'a nugã yɛ, n wa tabend ne a sʋʋgã. Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a paam tõog-kãsenga. Israyɛll nebã lebg n wa tũu a Eliyazaar tɩ b tɩ wʋk neb nins sẽn ki wã teedo." 
2Samuel23:11 Sẽn pʋgd yẽnda, yaa Haraar dao a Aage biig a Sama. Filistẽ nebã rag n tigma Leki tẽnga, la bɛng pʋʋg n dag n be beenẽ, Filistẽ nebã riga Israyɛll nebã tɩ b zoe." 
2Samuel23:12 La a Sama tɩ yalsa pʋʋgã tẽn-sʋka n na n deeg pʋʋgã, la a zaba ne Filistẽ nebã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo bãmb nebã fãagr-kãsenga." 
2Samuel23:13 Koodã tigsg wakate, nanambs pis-tã wã neb a tãab kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ Adulam tãngã bok pʋgẽ wakat ning Filistẽ nebã tãb-bi-sull a ye sẽn dag n tilg b tãb-sikã Refayim longẽ wã." 
2Samuel23:14 Wakat-kãng t'a Davɩɩd dag n ket n bee tãmsã pẽgsẽ, la Filistẽ tãb-biisã rag n tilga b sik zĩigã Betlehɛm." 
2Samuel23:15 Ko-yũud n wa n yõk a Davɩɩd t'a yeele: «Yaa ãndã n na n sõng maam tɩ m paam bulgã sẽn be Betlehɛm tẽngã noorã koom n yũ?» 
2Samuel23:16 La gãndaad a tãabã modgame n pɩʋʋg Filistẽ nebã tãb-sikã sʋka, n tɩ toog koomã Betlehɛm tẽngã noor bulgã pʋgẽ n wa kõ a Davɩɩde. La yẽnda ka sak n yũ koomã ye. Yẽnda raaga koomã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore," 
2Samuel23:17 n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam ka tõe n sak n maan a woto ye. Bala, a na n yɩɩ wa mam sẽn yũud neb nins sẽn gẽneg b yõy n kẽngã zɩɩm.» La yẽnda ka yũ koomã ye. Gãnda-kãens a tãabã me sẽn leb n tʋm la woto." 
2Samuel23:18 A Zoaab sẽn yaa a Seruya biiga yao a Abisayi talla kãnd n kʋ neb kobs-tã zĩig pʋgẽ. La yẽnda me yʋʋrã yii wa gãndaad a tãabã sullã. 
2Samuel23:19 Yẽnda yʋʋrã yiime n yɩɩd neb pis-tã wã fãa. Yẽnda yaa bãmb naaba, la yẽnda ka ta pipi gãndaad a tãabã ye." 
2Samuel23:20 A Zehozada biig a Benaya rag n yaa gãndaoog sẽn paam tõogr wʋsgo. Yẽnda rag n yaa Kabseyɛll neda. Yaa yẽnda n kʋ Moaab gãndaad a yiibã. La daar a yembre, wao-kãseng wakate, yẽnda kẽe bokẽ n kʋ gɩgemde." 
2Samuel23:21 Leb n yaa a Benaya n kʋ Ezɩpt nin-daoog a yembrã. Ezɩpt nin-daoogã rag n zãada kãnd n segd a Benaya, la a Benaya rag n zãada dasaare. A Benaya reega Ezɩpt nedã kãndã n wẽneg n kõs-a n kʋ." 
2Samuel23:22 A Zehozada biig a Benaya maana a woto t'a yʋʋrã yi wa gãndaad a tãabã. 
2Samuel23:23 Gãndaad pis-tã wã fãa sʋka, yẽnda me yɩɩ ned yʋʋr sẽn yi n yɩɩda. La yẽnda rag n ka be pipi gãndaad a tãabã sʋk ye. La a Davɩɩd yãka yẽnda t'a lebg a gũudbã naaba." 
2Samuel23:24 Ad neb pis-tã wã sull neb a taabã yʋya: A Zoaab yao a Azayɛll yaa gãndaad pis-tã wã ned a yembre, ne Betlehɛm dao a Dodo biig a Ɛlkana," 
2Samuel23:25 la Harood daop a Sama ne a Elika," 
2Samuel23:26 la Pelɛt dao a Helɛs ne Tekoa rao a Ikɛs biig a Iira. 
2Samuel23:27 La Anatot rao a Abiyezɛɛr ne Husa rao a Mebunayi," 
2Samuel23:28 la Akoki rao a Salmon ne Netofa rao a Maharayi," 
2Samuel23:29 la Netofa tẽng rao a Baana biig a Helɛɛbe, ne Gibeya sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã rao a Ribayi biig a Itayi." 
2Samuel23:30 La Piraton tẽng rao a Benaya ne Gaas ko-soogẽ dao a Hidayi," 
2Samuel23:31 la Araba tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ dao a Abi-Albon, ne Bahurim rao a Azmavɛte," 
2Samuel23:32 la Salbon tẽng rao a Eliyakba ne a Bene-Yasɛm, la a Zonatã," 
2Samuel23:33 ne Haraar dao a Sama, la Araar dao a Saraar biig a Akiyam," 
2Samuel23:34 ne Maaka rao a Akasbayi biig a Elifelɛte, la Gilo rao a Ayitofɛll biig a Eliyam," 
2Samuel23:35 ne Karmell dao a Hɛsrayi, la Araab rao a Parayi" 
2Samuel23:36 ne Soba rao a Natã biig a Yigyalle, la Gaad buudã rao a Bani," 
2Samuel23:37 ne Amo rao a Selɛke, la Beerot rao a Naharayi sẽn dag n zãad a Seruya biig a Zoaab zab-teedã." 
2Samuel23:38 N paas Yetɛɛr raop a Iira ne a Garɛɛbe," 
2Samuel23:39 la Hɛt dao a Uuri. Bãmbã fãa sõorã yaa neb pis-tã la a yopoe. 
2Samuel24:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur leb n yika ne Israyɛll nebã, la b kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd maan yell n yeel tɩ b sõd Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa." 
2Samuel24:2 Dẽ, rĩmã yeela tãb-biis naab a Zoaab sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «M kotame tɩ f kẽng n tɩ sõd Israyɛll buudã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Dan hal tɩ ta Bɛɛr-seba, tɩ m tõe n bãng b sõorã.»" 
2Samuel24:3 La a Zoaab yeela rĩmã yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩt tɩ nebã sõor paas naoor koabg n yɩɩd woto, tɩ rĩmã sẽn yaa m soaalã tõe n yã. La bõe yĩng tɩ rĩmã rat n maan bũmb a woto?»" 
2Samuel24:4 La rĩmã pẽdgr sẽn dag n yaa wʋsgã, a Zoaab ne tãb-biisã nanambs sak n maana bũmb ning a sẽn yeelã. A Zoaab ne tãb-biisã nanambs yii rĩmã nengẽ n na n tɩ sõd Israyɛll nebã." 
2Samuel24:5 Bãmb dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n sɩng sõadgã Arowɛɛre, ne tẽng ning sẽn be ko-soogẽ wã, n tees Gaad tẽngã sẽn be Yayezɛɛr sẽnẽ wã." 
2Samuel24:6 Bãmb kẽnga Galaad soolem ne Tatim-Hodsi, la b kẽng Dãn-Yaan ne Sidõ sẽnẽ." 
2Samuel24:7 Bãmb kẽnga Tɩ soolem b sẽn me lals n gũbgã pʋgẽ, ne Hevi nebã ne Kanan nebã tẽms fãa pʋgẽ. La bãmb sẽn yi beenẽ, bãmb kẽng n tɩ baasa sõadgã Bɛɛr-seba sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmã nug goabgã." 
2Samuel24:8 Woto, bãmb saaga soolmã fãa kiis a wɛ la rasem pisi pʋgẽ, la b lebg n leba Zeruzalɛm." 
2Samuel24:9 Dẽ, a Zoaab wilga rĩmã nebã b sẽn sõdã sõore. Israyɛll gãndaad nins sẽn tõe n bob zab-teedã sõor yaa neb tus kobs-nii, la Zʋʋda tãb-biisã sõor yaa neb tus kobs-nu." 
2Samuel24:10 A Davɩɩd sẽn sõd nebã zugẽ, a sũurã sãamame t'a yeel Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Mam beega beeg-kãseng ne bũmb ning mam sẽn maanã. Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kot-y lame tɩ y kõ mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sugr a beegrã yĩnga. Bala, mam sẽn maanã yaa yalemd meng-menga.»" 
2Samuel24:11 A Davɩɩd sẽn yik vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela bãmb no-rɛɛs a Gaad sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd bãngdã yaa:" 
2Samuel24:12 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Davɩɩd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam wilgda foom tood a tãabo. Yãk a yembr bãmb sʋkã, tɩ m sɩbg-f ne to-kãnga.»" 
2Samuel24:13 Dẽ, a Gaad kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yaa to-bʋg la yãmb data? Yʋʋm a yopoe kom bɩ? Bɩ y bɛɛbã sẽn na n dig-y tɩ y zoe kiis a tãab bɩ? Bɩ rasem a tãab bã-loangdga? Moasã, tags-y-yã, la y kõ-m koɛɛg ning m sẽn na n tɩ leok sẽn tʋm-a maamã.»" 
2Samuel24:14 A Davɩɩd leoka a Gaad yaa: «Sũ-sãan-kãseng n tar maam! Mam kot-f lame tɩ f bas tɩ d lʋɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugẽ, la d ra lʋɩ ninsaalb nusẽ ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nimbãan-zoeerã yaa kãsenga.»" 
2Samuel24:15 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bã-loangdg kẽ Israyɛll soolmẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne yibeoogo, hal n tãag wakat ning b sẽn yãkã. La sẽn sɩng ne Dan n tɩ tãag Bɛɛr-seba, neb tus pis-yopoe n ki." 
2Samuel24:16 La wakat ning malɛɛkã sẽn kʋʋd nebã sẽn wa n tẽeg a nug n na n sãam Zeruzalɛmã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sãama ne sɩbgrã tɩ b yeele: «A sekame! Base. Yãk f nugu.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yalsa zĩig sẽn pẽ ne Zebuus rao a Aravna zɛɛgã." 
2Samuel24:17 A Davɩɩd sẽn yã Malɛɛkã sẽn kʋʋd nebã, a yeelame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maam n beeg yãmba. La nin-bãmbã maana bõe? M kotame tɩ y sɩbgrã yɩ maam ne m yirã rãmba.»" 
2Samuel24:18 Badaare, a Gaad kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yik-y n kẽng-y Zebuus rao a Aravna zɛɛgẽ wã, n tɩ me tẽn-kugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel24:19 La a Davɩɩd saka a Gaad sẽn yeel yẽnda wã, n yik n kẽng zɛɛgẽ wã, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n togsã." 
2Samuel24:20 A Aravna sẽn wa n be tãngã zugu, a tool n yãnda rĩmã ne a tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn wat yẽnda nengẽ. La a Aravna yi a sẽn beẽ wã, n wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽng rĩmã taoor n yeel yaa:" 
2Samuel24:21 «Yaa noog tɩ m dĩmã wat b tʋmtʋmdã nengẽ?» La a Davɩɩd wilg-a lame t'a rat n da-a zɛɛgã n me tẽn-kugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, tɩ bã-loangdgã sẽn tar nebã sɛ." 
2Samuel24:22 A Aravna yeelame: «Mam dĩma, la m soaala, reeg-y zɛɛgã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn datã. Reeg-y niigã m sẽn tar n pãbd m koodã n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, la y reeg b ra-vuudsã ne b ra-balgdsã n maan maoongã bugum daado." 
2Samuel24:23 M dĩmã, maam a Aravna kõta yãmb bõn-kãensã fãa.» La a Aravna leb n yeela rĩmã yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã reeg y maoongã.»" 
2Samuel24:24 La rĩmã leoka a Aravna yaa: «Ayo, mam na n daa bõn-kãens fo nengẽ wa sẽn zems b ligdã. Mam ka na n dɩk zaalem bũmb n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã ye.» Dẽ, a Davɩɩd raa zɛɛgã ne niigã wakɩ-koeems pis-nu." 
2Samuel24:25 A Davɩɩd mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yẽnda maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maando. Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sigame tɩ b kɩt tɩ bã-loangdgã sẽn da sãamd Israyɛll soolmã looge." 
1Kings1:1 Rĩm a Davɩɩd dag n kʋʋla hal wʋsgo. Ba b sã n dag n pil-a fu-gobse, a waoodã ka yit ye." 
1Kings1:2 Dẽ, rĩm a Davɩɩd tʋmtʋmdbã yeel-a lame yaa: «N-na, bas-y tɩ d bao pʋg-sad sẽn ka mi rao t'a wa be y sɛɛgẽ n get y yelle, la a tõe n gãand y sɛɛgẽ n wɩngd y yĩnsã.»" 
1Kings1:3 La b saaga Israyɛll soolmã gilli, n na n bao pʋg-sad-neere, la b yãnda Sunem tẽng pʋg-sad a yembre, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Abisaage. La b peeg-a lame n wa rĩmã nengẽ." 
1Kings1:4 Pʋg-sadã dag n sɩd yaa neer wʋsgo. A gesa rĩmã yell neere, la a tɩbs-a. La rĩmã ka tol n kẽ ne-a ye." 
1Kings1:5 Wakat-kãnga, a Davɩɩd ne a pag a Hagit biig a Adoniza rag n zẽkda a meng n yetẽ: «Yaa maam n na n lebg rĩmã.» Dẽ, yẽnda baoo saar-dãmb ne wed-rʋʋdba, la a bao neb pis-nu tɩ b be a taoor n zoetẽ t'a pʋgda." 
1Kings1:6 A Adoniza sẽn dogã tɛka, a ba wã zɩ n tãs-a n yeel tɩ yaa bõe t'a maand woto wall woto ye. La sẽn yɩɩd fãa, a Adoniza dag n yaa ra-sãn-beelle, la a yaa a Absalom yao." 
1Kings1:7 A Adoniza sõsa ne a Seruza biig a Zoaabe, la ne maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataare, la bãmb lebga yẽnda poorẽ dãmba." 
1Kings1:8 La maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne a Zehozada biig a Benaya, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã, ne a Simeyi la a Reyi ne a Davɩɩd gãndaadã ka zĩnd a Adoniza poorẽ ye." 
1Kings1:9 Daar a yembre, a Adoniza kẽnga Zowelɛt pĩigã sẽn be Rogɛll ko-bundgã noorã sɛɛg n tɩ maan rũm-bãoonego, ne rũm-bɛd maando, la ne rũm-nobds buud toay-toaya. Dẽ, yẽnda boola a yaopã fãa sẽn yaa rĩmã kom-dibli wã, la a bool Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã." 
1Kings1:10 La yẽnda ka bool Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã ne a Benaya, la rĩmã gãndaadã ye. A leb n ka bool a yao a Salmo me ye." 
1Kings1:11 Dẽ, a Natã yeela a Salmo ma a Batseba yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, fo bãngame t'a Hagit biig a Adoniza lebga rĩm tɩ tõnd soaal a Davɩɩd ka bãng sɩda?" 
1Kings1:12 Rẽ wã, m kotame tɩ f bas tɩ m sagl-fo, n wilg foom f sẽn na n maan to-to tɩ foom ne f biig a Salmo paam n põse." 
1Kings1:13 Kẽng n tɩ yã rĩm a Davɩɩd n yeel-b yaa: ‹N-na, yãmb dag n ka pʋlem maam n yeel tɩ yaa mam biig a Salmo n na n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã la! La maana a wãn tɩ wa yaa a Adoniza n yaa rĩmã?›" 
1Kings1:14 Dẽ, wakat ning fo sẽn ket n gomd ne rĩmã, mam meng na n pʋgla foom n kẽ, n yeel tɩ fo sẽn yeelã yaa sɩda.»" 
1Kings1:15 Woto, a Batseba kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ, a ro-gãagẽ wã. Rĩmã rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo. La yaa Sunem tẽng bi-pugl a Abisaag n dag n get rĩmã yelle." 
1Kings1:16 La a Batseba wõgemdame, n sulg a neng tẽng rĩmã taoore, la rĩmã sok-a lame yaa: «Fo rata bõe?»" 
1Kings1:17 A Batseba leoka rĩmã yaa: «M soaala, yãmb dag n pʋlma y tʋmtʋmd-poakã, ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, n yeel tɩ yaa yãmb biig a Salmo n na n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã, la yaa yẽnda n na n zaoond y zaoorẽ wã n soog rĩungã." 
1Kings1:18 M dĩmã, la m soaala, maana a wãn moasã tɩ lebg a Adoniza n dɩt naamã tɩ yãmb ka miẽ!" 
1Kings1:19 A Adoniza maana maoong ne lolse, la nag-nobdse, ne rũm-bãooneg wʋsgo. Yẽnda boola rĩmã kambã fãa, la a bool maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar ne tãb-biisã naab a Zoaabe, n yaool n ka bool yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Salmo ye." 
1Kings1:20 M dĩma, la m soaala, moasã, Israyɛll nebã fãa geta yãmba, n dat tɩ yãmb wilg sẽn yaa ned ning n na n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings1:21 Sã n ka rẽ, yãmb loogr poore, b na n gesa maam ne m biig a Salmo wa nin-wẽnse.»" 
1Kings1:22 A Batseba sẽn nan ket n gomd ne rĩmã yee, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã sẽn be waoongẽ." 
1Kings1:23 B togsa rĩmã tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã n wa. Dẽ, a Natã ta n wõgemda rĩmã taoor n fõgen a neng tẽnga." 
1Kings1:24 La a Natã soka rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Rẽ yĩnga, yaa yãmb n yeel tɩ yaa Adoniza n na n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ n zaoond y zaoorẽ wã n dɩ naamã?" 
1Kings1:25 Bala, rũndã, a Adoniza kẽngame n tɩ maan maoong ne lolse, la nag-bi-nobdse, ne rũm-bãooneg wʋsgo. La a boola rĩmã kambã fãa, ne tãb-biis nanambsã, la maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataare. Dẽ, bãmb fãa bee yẽnda nengẽ n dɩtẽ la b yũuda, la b yetẽ: ‹Wẽnd na kaoos rĩm a Adoniza.›" 
1Kings1:26 La yẽnda yaool n ka bool mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã, a ka bool maan-kʋʋd a Sadoke, a ka bool a Zehozada biig a Benaya, a leb n ka bool yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Salmo me ye.»" 
1Kings1:27 Dẽ, a Natã sokame yaa: «N-na! Rẽ yĩnga, yaa yãmb n kõ noor tɩ b maan bũmb a woto, n yaool n ka reng n togs yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sẽn tog n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã sɩda?»" 
1Kings1:28 Dẽ, rĩm a Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b bool a Batseba. La a wa n yalsa rĩmã taoore." 
1Kings1:29 La rĩm a Davɩɩd yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, soab ning sẽn dag n fãag-a maam m sũ-sãangã pʋgẽ wã," 
1Kings1:30 ‹tɩ mam sẽn dag n wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã, n yeel tɩ yaa fo biig a Salmo n na n led mam zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã, a na n kell n yɩɩ woto.› La yaa rũndã bal la mam na n maan bõn-kãnga.»" 
1Kings1:31 La a Batseba wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽng rĩmã taoor n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos m soaal a Davɩɩde.» 
1Kings1:32 Dẽ, rĩm a Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b bool maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã ne a Zehozada biig a Benaya tɩ b wa. La bãmb waa rĩmã nengẽ." 
1Kings1:33 La rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Peeg-y mam tʋmtʋmdbã, la y zombg m biig a Salmo mam meng bõn-wɛɛgã zugu, n tall-a n kẽng Gihon." 
1Kings1:34 Yãmb sã n ta beenẽ, bɩ maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã pʋdg a Salmo zug naam kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã. La y peeb baorgo, n kaas n yeel tɩ Wẽnd na kaoos rĩm a Salmo." 
1Kings1:35 Rẽ poore, bɩ y lʋɩɩs-a taoore, n pʋg-a t'a wa zaoond mam zaoorẽ wã, bala yaa yẽnda n na n led mam zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã. Mam kõta yẽnda noore, t'a soog Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã nebã.»" 
1Kings1:36 A Zehozada biig a Benaya leoka rĩmã yaa: «Ãmina! Woto yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd dĩmã Wẽnnaamã n gome. 
1Kings1:37 Bɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne a Salmo, wa b sẽn dag n zĩnd ne rĩm a Davɩɩdã. La b kɩt t'a Salmo naamã yɩ kãseng n yɩɩg tõnd dĩm a Davɩɩd naamã.»" 
1Kings1:38 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã, ne a Zehozada biig a Benaya la Kerɛt nebã ne Pelɛt nebã kẽng n tɩ zombga a Salmo rĩm a Davɩɩd bõn-wɛɛgã tɩ b peeg-a n kẽng Gihon." 
1Kings1:39 Woto, maan-kʋʋd a Sadok kẽe sɛk roogẽ wã, n dɩk yɩɩllã ne kaamã n pʋdg a Salmo zugu. La b peeba baorgo, la nebã fãa kaasame n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos rĩm a Salmo.»" 
1Kings1:40 Dẽ, nebã fãa rag n pʋgda a Salmo n peebd wɩɩse, la b maand sũ-noog wʋsgo, la bãmb kelemsã rag n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã rĩmda." 
1Kings1:41 La a Adoniza ne a sẽn dag n bool-b rãmbã sẽn dɩ n sɛ, b wʋma kelemse. La a Zoaab sẽn wʋm baorgã peebg rãamdã, a yeelame: «Yaa bõe bʋrg la sẽn maand tẽngã pʋgẽ wã?»" 
1Kings1:42 La wakat ning yẽnda sẽn ket n gomdã, la maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar biig a Zonatã be waoongẽ. La a Adoniza yeelame: «Wa ka, fo yaa nin-sõngo, la m miime tɩ f wata ne kiba-noodo.»" 
1Kings1:43 A Zonatã leoka a Adoniza yaa: «Yaool n ka woto ye! Mam watame n na n togs yãmb tɩ rĩm a Davɩɩd yãka a Salmo n kɩt t'a lebg rĩm n na n led bãmb zĩigẽ. 
1Kings1:44 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã la a Zehozada biig a Benaya, ne Kerɛt la Pelɛt nebã yãag a Salmo. Bãmb zombg-a-la rĩm a Davɩɩd meng bõn-wɛɛgã." 
1Kings1:45 Maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã pʋdga naam kaam a Salmo zug Gihon tẽngã, t'a lebg rĩmã. La bãmb yii beenẽ ne sũ-noogo, tɩ nebã kaasgã pid tẽngã. Yaa rẽndã bʋrg la yãmb sẽn wʋmdã." 
1Kings1:46 A Salmo mengã tol n zomba naamã geer zugu. 
1Kings1:47 La rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb kẽng n tɩ pʋʋsa rĩm a Davɩɩd n yeele: Bɩ yãmb Wẽnnaamã kɩt t'a Salmo yʋʋr yi n yɩɩg yãmba, t'a naamã pãng yɩɩg yãmb naamã. La rĩmã pa a gãagã zug n wõgemde," 
1Kings1:48 n waoog Wẽnnaam n yeele: Mam pʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã barka, bãmb sẽn yãk ned rũndã daarã t'a tõe n ledg mam zĩigẽ, tɩ mam mengã nin yãndã yĩnga.»" 
1Kings1:49 A Adoniza sẽn dag n bool neb ninsã fãa yɛɛsame n digda. La ned kam fãa yikame n dɩk a sor n teese. 
1Kings1:50 A Adoniza sẽn dag n zoet a Salmo wã yĩnga, a kẽng n tɩ gãda tẽn-kugrã yɩɩla." 
1Kings1:51 La b kẽng n tɩ togs a Salmo n yeele: «Ade, a Adoniza kẽng n tɩ gãda tẽn-kugrã yɩɩl n yeele: Bɩ rĩm a Salmo wẽen dũndã tɩ yẽnda ka na n kʋ a tʋmtʋmdã ye.»" 
1Kings1:52 La a Salmo yeelame: «A Adoniza sã n maan sẽn yaa sõama, yẽnda zoobg ba a yembr kõn lʋɩ tẽng ye. La a sã n tagsd n dat n maan sẽn yaa wẽnga, bɩ a bãng t'a na n kiime.»" 
1Kings1:53 Rĩm a Salmo tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yiis-a tẽn-kugrẽ wã n wa. La a wa n ta n wõgemda rĩm a Salmo taoore. La rĩmã yeel-a lame t'a yik n kuili. 
1Kings2:1 A Davɩɩd sẽn wa n kolg kũum, a bool-a lame n yeel-a yaa:" 
1Kings2:2 «Mam na n kiime n kẽng zĩig ning ninsaalbã fãa sẽn dabdẽ wã. Dẽ yĩngã, keng f meng n yɩ raoa." 
1Kings2:3 Sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã no-tũusdsi, n maan bãmb tʋlsmã, la f tũ b tõodã, ne b noyã, la b zãmsgã, ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã. Woto, fo na n paama tõogr bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn dat n maanã pʋgẽ, la f sẽn saagd n na n maanã pʋgẽ me." 
1Kings2:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n pidsa kãabg ning b sẽn dag n kãab maamã. Bãmb kãaba maam n yeele: ‹Fo yagensã sã n gũus ne b yel-manesmã, la b sak maam ne b sũyã fãa, fo roogã kõn tol n kong ned sẽn na n deeg naamã n soog Israyɛll nebã ye.›" 
1Kings2:5 Fo meng mii pag a Seruza biig a Zoaab sẽn maan maam bũmb ningã. Yẽnda kʋʋ a Neer biig a Abneer ne a Yetɛɛr biig a Amasa sẽn yaa Israyɛll tãb-biisã nanambs a yiibã. Yẽnda kʋ-b-la wakat ning sẽn yaa laafɩ wakatã. Yẽnda maana zabr n daag zɩɩm tɩ mad a sẽbdgã a sẽn dag n sẽbg a sɛɛgã, ne a neooda wã a sẽn dag n pidã." 
1Kings2:6 Bɩ f maan wa sẽn zems yam ning fo sẽn tarã, la f ra bas-a t'a kʋʋl n ki ye." 
1Kings2:7 Maan Galaad rao a Barzɩlayi kambã neere, la f kɩt tɩ b naagd foom n dɩtẽ. Bala, bãmb sõnga maam wakat ning mam sẽn wa n zoet n dat n põs fo kẽem a Absalomã." 
1Kings2:8 Ade, Bawurim tẽng rao a Gera sẽn yaa Benzame buudã nedã biig a Simeyi bee ne foom. Daar ning mam sẽn wa n loogd n dabd Mahanayima, yẽnda paooga maam wʋsgo. A yi n sega maam Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, la mam wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr n yeel tɩ m ka na n kʋ yẽnda ne sʋʋg ye." 
1Kings2:9 Da bas-a n ka sɩbg ye. Bala, fo tara yam, la fo mi f sẽn na n maan-a bũmb ninga. Bɩ f kɩt t'a zoob-peendã monem ne zɩɩm n sig kɩɩm-kulgu.»" 
1Kings2:10 La a Davɩɩd saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b tɩ mum-a a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga." 
1Kings2:11 A Davɩɩd sẽn dɩ naamã Israyɛllã yɩɩ yʋʋm pis-naase: A rɩɩ naam Ebrõ yʋʋm a yopoe, la Zeruzalɛm yaa yʋʋm pis-tã la a tãabo." 
1Kings2:12 Dẽ, a Salmo leda a ba a Davɩɩd zaoorẽ, la a naamã paama pãng wʋsgo." 
1Kings2:13 A Hagit biig a Adoniza kẽnga a Salmo ma a Batseba nengẽ. La a Batseba soka yẽnda yaa: «Yaa noog tɩ fo wat m nengẽ?» La yẽnda leokame tɩ yaa noogo. 
1Kings2:14 A Adoniza yeela a Batseba yaa: «Mam tara koɛɛg n dat n togs foom.» La a Batseba yeel-a lame t'a togse. 
1Kings2:15 A Adoniza yeelame: «Fo mengã miime tɩ naamã rag n yaa maam n so, la Israyɛll nebã fãa ra tẽedame tɩ maam n na n lebg rĩmã. La naamã wẽnemd n lebga mam yao a Salmo rẽnda, tɩ bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ-a." 
1Kings2:16 La bũmb a yembr bal la mam dat n kos foom moasã, ra zãgs m kosgã ye.» La a Batseba yeelame t'a togse." 
1Kings2:17 La yẽnda yeelame: «Mam kot-f lame tɩ f tɩ gom ne rĩm a Salmo, bala, fo sã n kos-ba b ka na n zãgs ye. Kos-b tɩ b rɩk Sunem tẽng bi-pugl a Abisaag n kõ-m tɩ m maan m paga.»" 
1Kings2:18 A Batseba yeelame: «Beneere, mam meng na n tɩ goma ne rĩmã fo yelle.»" 
1Kings2:19 A Batseba kẽngame n na n tɩ gom ne rĩm a Salmo, a Adoniza wɛɛngẽ. La rĩmã yikame n seg-a n wõgemd a taoore, la a lebg n tɩ zaoond a geerã, la b talla naam geer a to n wa rɩgl dĩmã rɩtg t'a ma zaoonde." 
1Kings2:20 La a Batseba yeelame: «Mam tara m kosg bilf n dat n kos foom. Ra zãgs ye!» La rĩmã yeelame yaa: «M ma, kos-y-yã, tɩ m ka na n zãgs ye.»" 
1Kings2:21 Dẽ, a Batseba yeelame tɩ: «M kotame tɩ f rɩk Sunem tẽng bi-pugl a Abisaag n kõ f kẽem a Adoniza t'a maan a paga.»" 
1Kings2:22 La rĩm a Salmo yeela a ma yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb kot Sunem tẽng bi-pugl a Abisaag bal n na n kõ a Adoniza? A Adoniza ka mam kẽem la? Kell-y n kos-y rĩungã me n kõ yẽnda ne maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar la a Seruza biig a Zoaabe, tɩ bãmb n be ne taaba!»" 
1Kings2:23 Naab a Salmo wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam sã n ka kʋ a Adoniza yel-kãngã poorẽ bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga. 
1Kings2:24 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ maam rĩungã, n kɩt tɩ m zaoond m ba a Davɩɩd geerã zugu, la b kɩt tɩ m buudã tar pãnga, wa bãmb sẽn dag n kãabã. La mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ rũndã, a Adoniza na n kiime.»" 
1Kings2:25 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo tʋma a Zehozada biig a Benaya t'a tɩ kʋ a Adoniza." 
1Kings2:26 Rĩmã yeela maan-kʋʋd a Abiyataar yaa: «Yik n kẽng Anatot sẽn yaa fo zĩigã, bala, m dag n tog n kʋʋ foom, la rũndã, m ka na n kʋ-f ye. Bala, fo rag n tʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Zu-soabã kaoolã koglgã n lʋɩ m ba a Davɩɩd taoore, la f naaga m ba a Davɩɩd b namsgã fãa pʋga.»" 
1Kings2:27 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo riga a Abiyataar n yiis Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd pʋga, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom a Eli roogã wɛɛngẽ Sɩlo wã paam pidsgu." 
1Kings2:28 La a Zoaab sẽn wʋm woto, yẽnda zoee n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogẽ wã, n tɩ gãd tẽn-kugrã yɩɩla, bala, a Zoaab tɩ kẽ a Adoniza n yaool n da ka kẽ a Absalom ye." 
1Kings2:29 La b togsa rĩm a Salmo t'a Zoaab zoe n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogẽ wã, n tɩ be tẽn-kugrã sɛɛgẽ. Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo tʋma a Zehozada biig a Benaya n yeel-a t'a kẽng n tɩ kʋ-a." 
1Kings2:30 A Benaya sẽn ta Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogẽ wã, a yeela a Zoaab tɩ rĩmã yeelame t'a yi be. La a Zoaab yeelame t'a ka na n yi ye, tɩ yẽnda na n paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã pʋg n ki. A Benaya lebg n tɩ togsa rĩmã a Zoaab sẽn yeelã fãa." 
1Kings2:31 La rĩm a Salmo yeelame: «Beneere, maan wa yẽnda sẽn yeelã. Kʋ-a, la f rɩk-a n mume. Woto, f na n yiisa a Zoaab sẽn daag neb nins zɩɩm zaalma yell maam ne m buudã zugu." 
1Kings2:32 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame t'a Zoaab yellã pa a meng zugu. Bala, yẽnda rag n kʋʋ neb a yiib sẽn yaa nin-tɩrse, la nin-sõamyã n yɩɩd yẽnda, tɩ m ba a Davɩɩd ka bãng ye. Yaa a Neer biig a Abneer sẽn dag n yaa Israyɛll tãb-biisã naabã, ne a Yetɛɛr biig a Amasa sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋda tãb-biisã naabã." 
1Kings2:33 Bɩ nin-bãmbã b yiibã yell zĩnd a Zoaab ne a yagensã zug wakat sẽn kõn sa. La bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ rĩm a Davɩɩd ne b yagensã, la b buudã ne b rĩungã zĩnd ne bãan wakat sẽn kõn sa.»" 
1Kings2:34 Dẽ, a Zehozada biig a Benaya kẽng n tɩ kʋ a Zoaabe. La b mum-a-la a yirã sẽn be we-raoogã pʋgã." 
1Kings2:35 La rĩm a Salmo kɩtame t'a Zehozada biig a Benaya led a Zoaab zĩigẽ n lʋɩ Israyɛll tãb-biisã taoore, la b kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Sadok led a Abiyataar zĩigẽ." 
1Kings2:36 Rĩmã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool a Simeyi, t'a yeel-a yaa: «Kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ me roog f mengã yĩnga, la f zĩnd be n da tol n yi be n kẽng zĩig ba a yembr ye." 
1Kings2:37 La bãng tɩ daar ning fo sẽn na n yi beenẽ n pɩʋʋg Sedrõ ko-soogã, f na n kiime, la f zɩɩm na n zĩnda f meng zugu.»" 
1Kings2:38 La a Simeyi leoka rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Beneere! Yãmb tʋmtʋmdã na n maana wa yãmb sẽn yeelã.» A Simeyi zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n kaoos wʋsgo. 
1Kings2:39 Dẽ, yʋʋm a tãab loogr zugẽ, a Simeyi yembs a yiib n zoe n kẽng a Maaka biig a Akiis sẽn yaa Gat rĩmã nengẽ. B togsa a Simeyi t'a yembsã bee Gat tẽnga." 
1Kings2:40 La a Simeyi yikame n ning a bõang yolg n zomb n kẽng a Akiis nengẽ Gat tẽnga, n na n tɩ reeg a yembsã. Yẽnda tɩ reega a yembsã Gat tẽng n lebg n kuili." 
1Kings2:41 La b tɩ togsa rĩm a Salmo t'a Simeyi yii Zeruzalɛm n kẽng Gat tẽng n lebg n kuili. 
1Kings2:42 La rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b tɩ bool a Simeyi t'a wa, tɩ b yeel-a yaa: «Mam dag n ka kɩt tɩ fo wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr sɩda? La mam dag n ka yeel foom tɩ daar ning fo sẽn na n yi Zeruzalɛm n kẽng zĩig a to f na n kiime? Fo ka leok maam n yeel tɩ beneere, tɩ f wʋmame?" 
1Kings2:43 Dẽ wã, maan a wãn tɩ fo kɩɩs wẽeneg ning fo sẽn wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n ka sak mam noorã?»" 
1Kings2:44 Rĩmã yeela a Simeyi yaa: «Fo mengã mii wẽng ning fãa fo sẽn maan m ba a Davɩɩdã. Dẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ f wẽnemã fãa leb-fo." 
1Kings2:45 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga rĩm a Salmo barka, la rĩm a Davɩɩd rĩungã na n kell n paama pãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wakat sẽn kõn sa.»" 
1Kings2:46 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo yeela a Zehozada biig a Benaya t'a kʋ a Simeyi. La a Benaya yiime n kʋ-a. Woto kɩtame t'a Salmo naamã tall pãnga." 
1Kings3:1 Rĩm a Salmo baoo zood ne Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ, n peeg a bi-pugl n maan a paga. La a peeg-a lame n kẽng a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgẽ, n tɩ zĩnd beenẽ n gũ wakat ning a sẽn na n me a na-zakã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, la lals nins sẽn gũbg Zeruzalɛmã n sɛ." 
1Kings3:2 Wakat-kãnga, nebã rag n maanda b maandã maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã. Bala, b rag n nan ka me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr yĩng ye." 
1Kings3:3 A Salmo rag n nonga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n maand bũmb nins a ba Davɩɩd sẽn dag n wilg yẽnda wã. La yaa maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã la yẽnda me rag n maand a maandã, la a yõogd tɩdarã." 
1Kings3:4 Rĩm a Salmo kẽnga Gabawõ n na n tɩ maan maoongo, bala yaa beenẽ n yaa maoong kʋʋb zĩisã zĩ-kãseng n yɩɩda. La beenẽ, rĩm a Salmo maana maand tusr sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
1Kings3:5 La rĩm a Salmo sẽn wa n be Gabawõ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnega b meng ne-a yʋng zãmsd pʋgẽ. Wẽnnaam yeela rĩm a Salmo yaa: «Kos maam fo sẽn dat bũmb ninga, la m na n kõ-f lame.»" 
1Kings3:6 La rĩm a Salmo leokame yaa: «Yãmb maana m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdã neer wʋsgo, bala bãmb dag n tũuda yãmb ne sɩda la tɩrlem, la ne pʋ-peelem. Yãmb maana bãmb neer wʋsg n kɩt tɩ b biig led bãmb zĩigẽ, n zaoond b geerã n dɩt naam dũndã." 
1Kings3:7 Moasã, mam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb n yãk mam sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdã, n kɩt tɩ m led m ba a Davɩɩd zĩigẽ, n lebg rĩmã, la mam yaa yãaga, n ka mi m sẽn na n zã nebã to-to ye." 
1Kings3:8 Rẽ wã, yãmb tʋmtʋmdã bee yãmb nebã y sẽn yãkã sʋka. La b yaa wʋsgo, tɩ ned ka tõe n bãng b sõore, wall a sõd-b n sɛ ye." 
1Kings3:9 Bɩ y kõ y tʋmtʋmdã yam, t'a tõog n zã y nebã, la a bãng sõama ne wẽng n bake. Sã n ka rẽ, ãndã n tõe n zã yãmb nebã sẽn yaa wʋsg a woto wã?»" 
1Kings3:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yɩɩ noog ne a Salmo kosgã. 
1Kings3:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Salmo yaa: «Sã n yaa bõn-kãng la fo kota, n ka kos yõ-woko, la f ka kos arzɛk f mengã yĩnga, la f ka kos f bɛɛbã kũum, n kot yam n na n tõog n maan sẽn yaa tɩrgã," 
1Kings3:12 mam na n maana wa fo sẽn kosã. Mam na n kõo foom yam ne bãngre. La neb nins sẽn zĩnd sẽn deng foomã, ne neb nins sẽn na n pʋgl foomã kõn tol n wẽneg foom ye." 
1Kings3:13 La baa ne bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn ka kosã, mam na n kõ-f lame. Mam na n kõ-f-la arzɛka, la ziiri. La fo vɩɩmã tɛka, rĩm-dãmba sʋka, ned ba a ye kõn tõog n wẽneg foom ye." 
1Kings3:14 La fo sã n maan mam daabo, n sak mam no-tũudsã ne m tõodã, wa f ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n maanã, mam na n kõo foom yõ-woko.»" 
1Kings3:15 A Salmo nekame n mik tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n gomd ne yẽnda zãmsd pʋgẽ. La yẽnda lebg n kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n tɩ yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã taoore, n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne laafɩ maando, la a maan tigri, a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa yĩnga." 
1Kings3:16 Daar a yembre, pʋg-yoaadb a yiib n tũ taab n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ." 
1Kings3:17 La a yembrã yeelame yaa: «N-na, y kabre! Maam ne pʋg-kãngã rag n gãee ne taab roog a yembre, la mam zĩnda roogẽ be n dog m biiga." 
1Kings3:18 La mam sẽn dog m biigã tɩ rab-tãtẽ, pʋg-kãngã me roga a biiga. Ned a to rag n ka be n paas tõnd ye. Yaa tõnd d yiibã bal n dag n be roogã pʋga." 
1Kings3:19 La yʋngẽ, pʋg-kãngã gãand n põda a biigã n kʋ." 
1Kings3:20 La a yika yʋn-sʋka, mam sẽn gõe wakate, n dɩk mam bi-vɩɩgã n gãneg a sɛɛgẽ, la a rɩk yẽnda bi-kɩɩngã n gãneg mam sɛɛgẽ." 
1Kings3:21 La mam sẽn yik yibeoog tɩ m na n yẽsem m biiga, mam mikame tɩ yaa bi-kɩɩnga. Zĩigã sẽn yẽege, mam maaga m meng n ges biigã neere, la mam mikame tɩ ka biig ning mam sẽn dogã ye.»" 
1Kings3:22 La pag a yembrã yeelame yaa: «Ka sɩd ye! Bi-vɩɩgã yaa mam biiga, tɩ bi-kɩɩngã yaa fo biiga.» La pipi soabã kɩɩsame n yeel yaa: «Ayo! Ka woto ye! Yaa foom n so bi-kɩɩngã, tɩ bi-vɩɩgã yaa mam biiga.» Bãmb b yiibã wẽe nokoeemd ne taab woto rĩmã taoore." 
1Kings3:23 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo yeelame yaa: «Yãmb ned a yembr yeelame tɩ bi-vɩɩgã yaa yẽnda biiga, tɩ bi-kɩɩngã yaa a to wã biiga. La yembrã kɩɩsame tɩ ka sɩd ye, tɩ bi-kɩɩngã yaa a to wã biiga, tɩ bi-vɩɩgã yaa yẽnda biiga.»" 
1Kings3:24 Rĩm a Salmo yeelame tɩ b tɩ wa ne sʋʋga. La b tɩ talla sʋʋg n wa. 
1Kings3:25 La rĩmã yeelame tɩ b kɛ bi-vɩɩgã n pasg a yiibu, n dɩk bogr a yembr n kõ pag a ye, la b rɩk bogr a ye wã n kõ pag a to wã." 
1Kings3:26 La bi-vɩɩgã nimbãaneg yõka a ma wã t'a yeele: «N-na, m kot-y lame tɩ kõ-a bi-vɩɩgã, la y ra kʋ-a ye.» La pag a yembrã yeelame: «Pasg-y biigã zĩis a yiibu, tɩ tõnd fãa konge.»" 
1Kings3:27 Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame tɩ b rɩk bi-vɩɩgã n kõ pipi pagã, la b ra kʋ-a tɩ bala, yaa yẽnda la bi-vɩɩgã ma." 
1Kings3:28 Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn wʋm dĩm a Salmo sẽn kao bʋʋdã to-to wã, bãmb zoee rĩmã. Bala, b yãame tɩ rĩmã tara Wẽnnaam yam n maand a tʋʋmã ne tɩrlem." 
1Kings4:1 Rĩm a Salmo rag n yaa Israyɛll nebã fãa rĩmã. 
1Kings4:2 Rĩm a Salmo kug-zĩidbã la woto: Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Azariya sẽn yaa a Sadok biigã," 
1Kings4:3 ne a Sɩsa kambã, a Elikorɛf ne a Akiya, bãmb dag n yaa seb-gʋndba, ne a Akiluud biig a Zozafate, sẽn yaa seb-bĩngda." 
1Kings4:4 La yaa a Zehozada biig a Benaya n yaa tãb-biisã naaba. A Sadok ne a Abiyataar n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã. 
1Kings4:5 A Natã biig a Azariya n yaa kombɛɛmbã taoor soaba. A Natã biig a Zabuud n dag n yaa rĩmã maan-kʋʋda, n yaa rĩmã meng zoa." 
1Kings4:6 A Akisaar n dag n yaa rĩmã sõgen-kãsenga. A Abda biig a Adoniram n dag n yaa tʋʋm-wɛglã taoor soaba. 
1Kings4:7 Rĩm a Salmo rag n tara kombɛɛmb piig la a yiib Israyɛll soolmã fãa pʋgẽ. Yaa bãmb n dag n get rĩmã ne a zakã rãmb rɩɩb yelle. La yʋʋmd pʋgẽ, bãmb ned kam fãa rag n tog n dɩlga rĩmã zakã kiuug a yembre." 
1Kings4:8 Ad kombɛɛmbã yʋyã: Yaa a Ʋʋr biigã n dag n so tẽng ning sẽn be Efrayiim tãmsã sʋkã. 
1Kings4:9 A Dekɛɛr biigã n dag n so Maka ne Saalbim, la Bɛt-Semees ne Elõ-Bɛt-Hanan tẽmsã." 
1Kings4:10 A Hesɛɛd biigã sẽn be Arubot tẽngã, n dag n so Soko ne Hefɛɛr tẽmsã zãnga." 
1Kings4:11 A Abinadaab biigã n dag n so Door tẽngã zĩis nins sẽn yaa kunkubã zãnga. A Salmo bi-pugl a Tafat n dag n yaa yẽnda paga. 
1Kings4:12 A Akiluud biig a Baana n dag n so Taanak ne Megido, la yẽnda n so Bɛt-Seyãn sẽn pẽ Sartan sẽn be Yiizreyɛll sɛɛgã fãa. Yẽnda soolmã sɩngda Bɛt-Seyãn n tall n tɩ tãag Abɛll-Mehola n tɩ tãag Zokmeyam zugẽ." 
1Kings4:13 A Gebɛɛr biigã sẽn be Ramot sẽn yaa Galaad tẽngã, n dag n so a Manaase biig a Yayɩɩr tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn be Galaadã. Leb n yaa yẽnda n dag n so Argoob soolmã sẽn be Basan tẽngã. Beenẽ yaa tẽn-bɛd pis-yoob sẽn gũbg ne lalse, ne noy sẽn pagd ne zũud kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
1Kings4:14 A Ido biig a Akinadaab n dag n so Mahanayim. 
1Kings4:15 A Akimaas n dag n so Neftali. Yẽnda me dag n peega a Salmo biig a Basmat n maan a paga. 
1Kings4:16 A Husayi biig a Baana n dag n so Asɛɛr ne Beyalot soolmã. 
1Kings4:17 A Paruwa biig a Zozafat n dag n so Isakaar soolmã. 
1Kings4:18 A Ela biig a Simeyi n dag n so Benzame soolmã. 
1Kings4:19 A Uuri biig a Gebɛɛr sẽn dag n be Galaad soolmã, n dag n so Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon, ne Basan rĩm a Oog soolmã. Dag n yaa komber a yembr bal n so soolem-kãnga." 
1Kings4:20 Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll nebã sõor dag n yaa wʋsg wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã. Bãmb dag n dɩtame la b yũuda, la b maand sũ-noogo." 
1Kings5:1 Rĩm a Salmo sooga Israyɛll tẽmsã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Efrat kʋɩlgã, hal tɩ ta Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngã ne Ezɩpt todsã. Tẽn-bãmb fãa rag n wata ne kũun n kõt a Salmo, la rĩm a Salmo sooga bãmb a vɩɩmã tɛka." 
1Kings5:2 Daar fãa, rĩm a Salmo moenegda a zakã ne zom-bãaneg yond a yoobe, la zom-yãas yond piig la a yiibu," 
1Kings5:3 n paas nag-nobds piiga, ne nag-zaals pisi, la rũm-bãooneg koabga, ne walse, la yãgse, wilpeendo ne noose, kolokolo-rãmba, kĩini, lad-rãmb sẽn nob sõama." 
1Kings5:4 Rĩm a Salmo rag n soo tẽms nins fãa sẽn dag n be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã ne b nanambsã, sẽn sɩng ne Tifsa n tɩ tãag Gaaza. La yẽnda rag n vɩɩ bãan ne a yagsã fãa." 
1Kings5:5 La Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll tẽmsã pʋga, sẽn sɩng ne Dan buudã soolem n tɩ tãag Bɛɛr-Seba, nebã fãa rag n vɩɩ ne bãan la laafɩ. La rĩm a Salmo vɩɩmã tɛka, nebã fãa rag n vɩɩ ne bãane, n kood b reezẽ tɩɩs pʋto la b send b kankamse." 
1Kings5:6 A Salmo rag n tara wiid tus pis-naase, a saar-dãmbã yĩnga. La a tar wed-rʋʋdb tus-piig la a yiibu." 
1Kings5:7 Soolmã kombɛɛmb piig la a yiibã ned kam fãa n dag n dɩlgd rĩm a Salmo ne neb nins sẽn dɩt na-yirã kiuug fãa, la b ka basd tɩ bũmb paoog ye." 
1Kings5:8 Kombɛɛmbã dag n baooda koodo, la yamdo, wiidã, la wed-kɩɩmbã yĩnga, n tall n kẽng n tɩ bĩng zĩig ning rĩmã sẽn be wã, la ned kam fãa maanda wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde." 
1Kings5:9 Wẽnnaam kõ a Salmo yam ne bãng-kãsenga. La yẽnda minimã rag n yaa wʋsg wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã. 
1Kings5:10 A Salmo yamã rag n yɩɩda yam dãmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be yaangã ne Ezɩpt tẽngã. 
1Kings5:11 A Salmo yamã rag n yɩɩda nebã fãa. Yẽnda yamã rag n yɩɩda Ezrak rao a Etãn, ne a Maholl kambã: yaa a Eman, a Kalkolle, ne a Darda. La rẽ kɩtame t'a Salmo yʋʋrã yi n saag soolem nins fãa sẽn dag n gũbg bãmbã." 
1Kings5:11 A Salmo yamã rag n yɩɩda nebã fãa. Yẽnda yamã rag n yɩɩda Ezrak rao a Etãn, ne a Maholl kambã: yaa a Eman, a Kalkolle, ne a Darda. La rẽ kɩtame t'a Salmo yʋʋrã yi n saag soolem nins fãa sẽn dag n gũbg bãmbã." 
1Kings5:12 Rĩm a Salmo wẽe yel-bũn tus a tã, la a yɩɩlã sõor tata yɩɩl tusr la yɩɩl a nu." 
1Kings5:13 Rĩm a Salmo goma tɩɩs yelle, sẽn sɩng ne Libã Sɛɛdr dãmbã, n tãag izop rãmbã sẽn yit lalsã seesã me yelle. A leb n goma rũms ne bõn-yɩgdɩ yelle, ne bõn-vuudsã la zĩmã yelle." 
1Kings5:14 Buud toor-toorã rĩm-dãmbã sẽn be dũniyã zugã sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd rĩm a Salmo yamã yellã, b tʋma neb tɩ b wa kelg rĩm a Salmo yam goamã." 
1Kings5:15 Tɩɩr dĩm a Hiram dag n yaa a Davɩɩd zoa hal daar zãra, dẽ, a Hiram sẽn wʋm tɩ b pʋdga a Salmo zug kaam t'a lebg rĩm n deeg a ba zĩiga, yẽnda tʋma neb a Salmo nengẽ." 
1Kings5:16 Rĩm a Salmo tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel rĩm a Hiram yaa: 
1Kings5:17 «Yãmb bãngame tɩ m ba a Davɩɩd dag n dat n mee roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la b ka tõog ye. Bala, bɛɛbã rag n yita zĩig fãa n wat n zabd ne bãmba, hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa kɩt tɩ b tõog b bɛɛbã." 
1Kings5:18 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã kɩtame tɩ mam soolmã fãa zĩ bãane, la b kɩt tɩ mam ka leb n tar bɛyã, la toog me ka leb n beẽ ye." 
1Kings5:19 Dẽ yĩngã, mam tagsdame n dat n me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yeela m ba a Davɩɩd woto: Fo bi-ribl ning mam sẽn na n kɩt t'a led fo zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã, n na n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
1Kings5:20 Dẽ wã, bɩ y kɩt tɩ y ra-kɛɛdbã kẽng Libã tãmsã zut n tɩ kɛ sɛɛdr tɩɩsã raad n wa kõ-ma. Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n wa sõnga yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã n tʋme, la mam na n yaoo yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yaoodo, wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn na n yeel tɩ m yao-b to-to wã. Bala, tõnd ka tar neb sẽn mi raad kɛɛb n ta Sɩdõ nebã ye.»" 
1Kings5:21 A Hiram sẽn wʋm rĩm a Salmo sẽn gom goam ninsã, a sũurã yɩɩ noog wʋsgo, la a yeelame yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã paam pẽgr rũndã daarã, bãmb sẽn kõ a Davɩɩd bi-ribl sẽn tar yam a woto t'a na n soog bu-kãsen-kãngã wã yĩnga.»" 
1Kings5:22 A Hiram tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Salmo yaa: «Yãmb sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa togs maam koɛɛg ningã ta-m lame, la m na n maana bũmb ning fãa yãmb sẽn date. Yaa sẽn kẽed ne sɛɛdr tɩɩsã ne sɩprɛs tɩɩsã raad wɛɛngẽ wã." 
1Kings5:23 Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n talla raadã n yi Libã n kẽng n tɩ sik ko-kãsengã noore. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sẽb-b kil-kila, n tũnug-b ko-kãsengã n ta zĩig ning yãmb sẽn na n wilg maamã. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ b logs ra-kilã n bas beenẽ, tɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ wʋke. La mam sẽn kot yãmb bũmb ning bala, yaa tɩ yãmb kɩt rɩɩbo, m na-yirã neb rɩlgr yĩnga.»" 
1Kings5:24 Dẽ, a Hiram kõ a Salmo raad tɩ sek wa a sẽn datã tɛka." 
1Kings5:25 Woto, rĩm a Salmo rag n kõta rĩm a Hiram Oorz yond tus pisi, la oliiv kaam rʋgd kobsi t'a rɩlgd a zakã rãmb yʋʋmd fãa." 
1Kings5:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ a Salmo yam wa b sẽn dag n yeelã. La rĩm a Hiram ne rĩm a Salmo rag wʋmda taaba, la b maana kaool ne taaba." 
1Kings5:27 Rĩm a Salmo yãka neb tus pis-tã Israyɛll tẽngã gill fãa pʋgẽ tɩ b tʋmd tʋʋm-wɛgla. 
1Kings5:28 La kiuug fãa, rĩmã rag n tʋmda bãmb tus piig-piig tɩ b kẽnd Libã n deesd taaba. Neb tus piig sã n tʋm kiuug a yembr Libã, b lebgd n kuil n tɩ vʋʋsa kiuug a yiibu. Yaa a Adoniram n dag yaa pãng tʋʋmã taoor soabã." 
1Kings5:29 Rĩm a Salmo dag n tara kug-zɩtb tus pis-yopoe, la kug-pɛɛsdb tus pis-nii tɩ b tʋmd tãmsã zutu." 
1Kings5:30 La sẽn paase, yẽnda dag n tara tʋʋm taoor dãmb tus a tã la kobs-tã, tɩ b so tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b tʋmdẽ." 
1Kings5:31 Rĩm a Salmo rag n kõo noor tɩ b tũus kug-bɛd n pees tɩ yaa neeba, tɩ b na n tall n yẽbg Wẽnnaam doogã." 
1Kings5:32 Rĩm a Salmo ne rĩm a Hiram tʋmtʋmdbã ne Gibal nebã peesa kugã, la b segl raadã, roogã meeb yĩnga." 
1Kings6:1 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn wa n na n sɩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã meebã, rẽ tɩ yaa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yi Ezɩpt yembdã pʋg tɩ yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-nii. La wakat-kãng yaa a Salmo sẽn deeg naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ. Dag n yaa yʋʋmdã kiuug a yiib soabã b sẽn boond tɩ Zɩɩv kiuugã pʋga." 
1Kings6:2 Roog ning rĩm a Salmo sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr yĩngã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã." 
1Kings6:3 La a ro-pʋg ning sẽn be-a noorẽ wã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, n zems wa roogã woglmã, la a ro-yɩngã ne a pʋgẽ dotã yaa kãntɩɩg piig-piiga." 
1Kings6:4 La roogã lalg zugu, rĩmã yãka võ-yalemse, n pɩg-b ne bãens tɩ yaa yãasenga." 
1Kings6:5 Rĩmã mee rot n dogl taab n dɩdg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne zĩ-sõngã, n tong ne ro-pʋs n gilgi." 
1Kings6:6 Tẽngr dotã yalem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, tɩ tẽn-sʋk rãmbã yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe, tɩ tãabẽ soabã sẽn tong yĩngrã yaa kãntɩɩg a yopoe. Woto, bãmb maana koag roogã yɩngã n gilgi, n palg raadã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ raadã ra palg roogã lalg zug ye." 
1Kings6:7 B mee roogã ne kug b sẽn dag n zoe n peese. Woto, roogã meeb wakate, b ka tol n dɩk zãar n wẽ bũmbu, wall b tall lar bɩ kut buud n kɛ wall b pesg bũmb ye." 
1Kings6:8 Sʋk rotã noy rag n bee Wẽnd doogã nug-rɩtgo, la b rag n tũuda rʋʋdg n dʋʋd yĩngr dotã." 
1Kings6:9 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn me Wẽnd doogã n sɛ, a kɩtame tɩ b bao sɛɛdr ra-paads ne ra-lugdsi, n lud a yĩngrã fãa." 
1Kings6:10 La a sẽn me rot nins n dogl taabã rɩdga Wẽnnaam doogã, la roog fãa zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, la b rɩka sɛɛdr tɩɩs ra-paads n kell n tõk-b ne Wẽnnaam doogã." 
1Kings6:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Salmo n yeel-a yaa: 
1Kings6:12 «Ro-kãngã fo sẽn met mam yʋʋrã yĩngã, fo sã n sak n kẽn wa sẽn zems mam tõodã ne m minindã, la f sak mam no-tũudsã fãa, mam na n pidsa bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn dag n kãab fo ba a Davɩɩdã fo yĩnga." 
1Kings6:13 Mam na n zĩnda Israyɛll nebã sʋka, la mam kõn tol n bas Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã ye.»" 
1Kings6:14 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn kɩt tɩ b me roogã n sɛ, a baoo sɛɛdr ra-pegd n lud a pʋgẽ lalsã n zẽk n tãag yĩngrã, la b gãneg a tẽngã ne sɩprɛs ra-pegdo." 
1Kings6:15  
1Kings6:16 Dẽ, b maka kãntɩɩg pisi sẽn sɩng ne roogã yaanga, n bao sɛɛdr ra-pegd n pasg tɩ lebg ro-pʋga, la ra-pegdã tilga tẽng n zẽk n tãag lalgã zãntlem. La b boonda taoor do-kãng tɩ zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa." 
1Kings6:17 Ro-pʋg ning b sẽn pasg n kellã woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-naase. 
1Kings6:18 B peesa sɛɛdr ra-pegd n lud roogã pʋgã, la b gʋla kãana ne tɩ-puud naana ra-pegdã zutu tɩ yaa neere. Roogã pʋgã gill fãa rag n luda ne sɛɛdr ra-pegd tɩ ned ka tõe n yãnd kugã ye." 
1Kings6:19 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b maneg zĩig ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa wã, n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã beenẽ." 
1Kings6:20 Ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, la a zãntlmã me yaa kãntɩɩg pisi. La b bolg-a-la ne sãnem halaale, la ro-taoorã kõom zĩigẽ, b maana tẽn-kugr n lud-a ne sɛɛdr ra-pegdo." 
1Kings6:21 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b bolg roogã pʋg zãng ne sãnem halaale, la a kɩt tɩ b maan sãnem yãmdo, n ning ro-taoorã a sẽn bolg ne sãnemã noore." 
1Kings6:22 La a rag n kɩtame tɩ b bolg roogã zãng fãa ne sãnem, n kɩt tɩ b bolg tẽn-kugrã sẽn be ro-taoorã noorã me ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:23 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b bao oliiv tɩɩg raad n naan serubẽ-rãmb a yiib n ning ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋga. La serubẽ a ye fãa zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg piiga. 
1Kings6:24 Pipi serubẽ wã pɩgsr a yembr woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, t'a ye wã me woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne pɩgsr a yembrã satmẽ n tɩ tãag a to wã satmẽ wã, yaa kãntɩɩg piiga." 
1Kings6:25 La serubẽ a yiibẽ soabã me pɩgs a yiibã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg piiga. Woto, serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã naandã ne b woglmã fãa zema taaba." 
1Kings6:26 Pipi serubẽ wã ne yiibẽ soabã zãntlem dag n zema taaba. 
1Kings6:27 Rĩm a Salmo ninga serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ. Serubẽ a yembr fãa pɩgsr tika roogã lalga, la bãmb b yiibã pɩgs teega taab roogã sʋka." 
1Kings6:28 A Salmo kɩtame tɩ b bolg serubẽ-rãmbã ne sãnem. 
1Kings6:29 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b pees roogã lalgã raadã, la a pʋgẽ wã ne a yɩngã, b naana serubẽ-rãmba, la komse, ne tɩ-puud sẽn yaa neeb raadã zug n gilg zĩigã fãa." 
1Kings6:30 Yẽnda gãnega sʋk roogã ne ro-taoorã tẽngã ne sãnem. 
1Kings6:31 La a baoo oliiv tɩɩs raad n maan kʋɩlems a yiib sẽn bogl taab n ning zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã roog noore. Rignoorã raadã ne a teedsã taa bãmb b nu. 
1Kings6:32 La b rag n maana kʋɩlems a yiibã ne weoogẽ oliiv tɩɩs raado. La b naan serubẽ-rãmb ne komse, la tɩ-puud sẽn yaa neeb kʋɩlemsã zutu, n bolg-b ne sãnem. La b bolga serubẽ-rãmbã ne komsã me sãnem." 
1Kings6:33 Rĩm a Salmo maana roogã noor me ne weoogẽ oliiv tɩɩs ra-pegd a naase. 
1Kings6:34 La a maan kʋɩlemsã ne sɩprɛs tɩɩs raado. Pipi kʋɩlengã maana ne ra-pegd a yiib sẽn pakd goabg la rɩtgo, la yiibẽ soabã, b ninga fu-lillids a yiib sẽn pakd goabg la rɩtgo." 
1Kings6:35 La kʋɩleng fãa zugu, rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b gʋl serubẽ-rãmb ne komse, la tɩ-puud sẽn yaa neeba, n kɩt tɩ b bolg-b ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:36 A Salmo mee pʋgẽ zakã lalg ne kug sẽn pees rulg a tãabo, la a rogl sɛɛdr raad rulg a yembre." 
1Kings6:37 Yaa a Salmo sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, Zɩɩv kiuugã pʋgẽ, la b yẽbg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
1Kings6:38 A Salmo sẽn deeg naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembre, kiuug a nii soabã sẽn yaa Bull kiuugã pʋgẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã me n sɛ zãng fasɩ, la roogã yɩɩ wa a sẽn dag n tog n yɩ to-to wã. A Salmo mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yʋʋm a yopoe pʋgẽ." 
1Kings7:1 La sã n yaa ne rĩm a Salmo meng na-yirã, a me-a lame n sɛ yʋʋm piig la a tãab pʋgẽ." 
1Kings7:2 A Salmo reng n mee roog ning sẽn boond tɩ ‹Libã tɩɩs roogã.› La ro-kãng woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg koabga, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã. B tilga roogã ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs ra-lugds ruls a naase, la b yaool n dɩk sɛɛdr tɩɩs ra-paadsã, n palg b zutu." 
1Kings7:3 La ra-bãmb ra palga ra-lugdsã zutu. Ra-paadsã sõor dag n yaa bãmb pis-naas la a nu, la b pʋɩ-b-la ruls a tãabo, tɩ rulg fãa yaa ra-paads piig la a nu. Roogã yĩngrã paga ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raado." 
1Kings7:4 La roogã kɩremsã fãa, b maana võy n tong ruls a tãabo, la võor fãa rag n teesa a to." 
1Kings7:5 Rignoyã ne võ-yalemsã fãa maaname tɩ yaa mags-magse, la bãmb me rag n tota taaba. La võ-yalemsã rag n tonga taab zĩis a tãabo." 
1Kings7:6 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b me roog a to ne ra-lugdsi, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã. La ro-kãng rag n bee roog ning sẽn boond tɩ ‹Libã tɩɩs roogã› neng taoore. La rĩmã ninga ra-lugds roogã noor n maan zãnde." 
1Kings7:7 Rĩm a Salmo mee roog n ning bʋʋd geer beenẽ, tɩ yaa bʋ-kaoor doogo. La roogã tẽngã n tɩ tãag a yĩngrã, b gãneg-a-la ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs ra-pegdo." 
1Kings7:8 Rĩm a Salmo mee roog a to sẽn wẽnd ‹Libã tɩɩs roogã›, la ro-kãng rag n bee zak a to pʋgẽ, bʋʋdã roog poore. La a mee ro-kãng buud n kõ Faarõ bi-puglã sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda pagã." 
1Kings7:9 La ro-bãmba fãa, sẽn sɩng ne b tẽngrã n tãag b yĩngrã, b talla kug-bɛd sẽn pees tɩ yaa neeba, n me ro-kãense, la ro-yɩngã ne zag-kãsengã pʋgã." 
1Kings7:10 Kug nins b sẽn tall n yẽbg roogã rag n yaa kug-neeba, n yaa bɛda. Kug kẽer woglem yaa kãntɩɩg piig-piiga, tɩ kẽer yaa kãntɩɩg a nii-nii." 
1Kings7:11 La pipi kugã zutu, b rogla kug-bɛd a taab sẽn pees tɩ yaa neeba, n paas ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raado." 
1Kings7:12 B mee zag-kãsengã lalg ne kug-bɛd ruls a tãab sẽn dogl taaba, ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raad rulg a yembre, tɩ kell n yaa wa zak ning sẽn be pʋgẽ n gũbg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne a noorẽ doogã sẽn me to-to wã." 
1Kings7:13 Rĩm a Salmo tʋmame tɩ b kẽng Tɩɩr n tɩ bool a Hiram. 
1Kings7:14 A Hiram ma wã rag n yaa pʋg-kõore, n yaa Neftali buudu. La a ba wã yaa Tɩɩr neda. A Hiram dag n yaa yõaka n mi zũud tʋʋmde, la a tara yam la minim ne bãngr wʋsgo. La a rag n tõe n talla zũud n maan bũmb wʋsgo. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ rĩm a Salmo tʋm tɩ b kẽng Tɩɩr n tɩ bool-a t'a wa tʋm zũudã tʋʋm fãa." 
1Kings7:15 La a Hiram maana zũud ra-lugds a yiibu. Pipi ra-lugdgã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a nii, la ra-lugdg a yiibẽ soabã taglem yaa wĩir woglem sẽn tat kãntɩɩg piig la a yiib n tõe n vilimd-a n sege." 
1Kings7:16 A Hiram rõoga zũud pugli a yiib n dogl ra-lugdsã zutu. La pugl fãa zãntlem dag n taa kãntɩɩg a nu. 
1Kings7:17 A Hiram leb n maana nag-teed a taab ne zũud n ning pugli wã zutu. Yaa gãmba sẽn yaa neeba. La pugl fãa rag n tara nag-teed a yopoe. 
1Kings7:18 Yẽnda leb n naana te-neeb sẽn wẽnd gernaad tɩɩg biis ruls a yiib n ning n gilg gãmbã wã n lud pugli a yiibã sẽn be ra-lugdsã zutã. 
1Kings7:19 Pugli a yiib n dag n be ra-lugdsã sẽn be yɩng roogã noorã zutu. Pugli wã zãntlem yaa kãntɩɩg a naase, la b ra wẽnda tɩ-puudu." 
1Kings7:20 Pugli wã sẽn be ra-lugds a yiibã zutã, b rag n gilg-b-la ne gernaad tɩɩg biis kobessi, la b ra bee yĩngr n pẽ sẽn tʋʋgẽ wã." 
1Kings7:21 A Hiram lugla ra-lugds a yiib Wẽnd doogã noore. La yẽnda pʋda nug-rɩtg soabã tɩ Yakĩn, la a pʋd nug-goabg soabã tɩ Boaaze." 
1Kings7:22 Ra-lugds a yiibã zut rag n maaname tɩ wẽnd tɩ-puudu. Yɩɩ woto la b maan ra-lugdsã n sɛ. 
1Kings7:23 A Hiram yẽnega zũud n maan sĩn-bedre. La sĩn-bedrã noorã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg piiga. La a rag n yaa gilga, a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. La yaa wĩir woglem sẽn tat kãntɩɩg pis-tã n tõe n gilg-a n sege." 
1Kings7:24 B maana kãana, n ning-b n gilg sĩn-bedrã noor zãnga, la kãntɩɩg fãa yaa bãmb piig-piiga. La kãanã yaa ruls a yiibu. B naaga sĩn-bedrã ne kãanã n yõg tɩ kell n yaa bũmb a yembre." 
1Kings7:25 Sĩn-bedrã ra roga zũud lols piig la a yiib zugu. Lols a tãab nens ra teesa yaanga, t'a tãab tees nin-taoore, t'a tãab tees goabga, t'a tãab tees rɩtgo, tɩ sĩn-bedrã rog bãmb zugu, la lolsã fãa sees teega taab sĩn-bedrã tẽngre." 
1Kings7:26 Sĩn-bedrã taglem dag n taa nug-yakemde. La b maana a noorã tɩ wẽnd wũmbl noore, n yaa wa tɩ-puudu. Sĩn-bedrã dag n tõe n deega ko-yʋy tus a yiib koom." 
1Kings7:27 A Hiram maana zũud terok-rãmb piiga, la terok a yembr fãa woglem ne a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a naas-naase, tɩ b zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a tãab-tãabo." 
1Kings7:28 Ad b sẽn maan terok-rãmbã to-to: B rag n maana b wamsã ne zũud sẽn yaa paklse, la b rɩk b wamsã n sog ne tebendsã." 
1Kings7:29 B rag n gʋla gɩgma, lolse, la serubẽ-rãmb naana pɩgdsã sẽn dag n dog wamsã zugã zutu. La b maana nag-teed sẽn yaa tɩ-puud buud n ning gɩgma wã ne lolsã yĩngr ne b tẽngr tɩ luundẽ." 
1Kings7:30 Terok fãa rag n tara zũud nao gils a naase, b sẽn ning zũud tebends zutu. La terokã sogs a naasã zĩisẽ, b rag n ninga zũud gãts sĩngã tẽngre, la gãtsã rag n bee nag-teedã zugẽ." 
1Kings7:31 La sĩng fãa b sẽn dag n dɩk n sagl terok fãa pʋgẽ wã, noor ra tʋʋg n yii yɩng sẽn tat kãntɩɩg a yembre. La sĩng fãa noor dag n yaa gilga, t'a yaadmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka. La b rag n gʋla nag-teed sĩng fãa noor zugu. La tebendsã rag n yaa magdo, b ka gils ye." 
1Kings7:32 Nao-gils a naasã rag n bee kud-paklsã tẽngre, tɩ gãtsã tong ne terokã n yõge. Naoor a yembr fãa zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
1Kings7:33 B maana naoã tɩ yaa wa saar nao. B gãtsã ne b zãnt-rãmbã ne b reyõ-rãmbã, n paas b moyo-rãmbã fãa maana ne kutu." 
1Kings7:34 Terok fãa rag n tara sogs a naas sẽn naag ne terokã meng n yõge. 
1Kings7:35 La terokã zugu, tẽgdg sẽn yaa gilg n dag n be be, t'a zãntlmã zems kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka. La terokã zugu, b naaga tebendsã ne a kud-paklsã n yõge." 
1Kings7:36 La b gʋla serubẽ-rãmba, gɩgma ne koms tɩɩs naana terokã zugu, ne a tebendsã zutu, la b gʋl tɩ-puud n gilg a zãngã." 
1Kings7:37 Yɩɩ a woto la a Hiram maan terok-rãmb piigã tɩ b wẽnd taaba: Kutã yaa bũmb a yembre, la b magbã ne b yalẽ wã fãa yaa yembre." 
1Kings7:38 A Hiram maana zũud sĩn-bi piiga. La sĩn-bil a yembr fãa tõe n deega ko-yʋy pis-naase. La a yembr fãa zãntlem tata kãntɩɩg a naase. La terok fãa zugu, sĩn-bil a ye n dog be." 
1Kings7:39 Yẽnda rɩka terok-rãmb a nu n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rɩtgo, la a nu n ning roogã goabga. La a rɩka sĩn-bedrã n ning roogã rɩtgo, n tees wĩndg sẽn pukdẽ sẽnẽ." 
1Kings7:40 A Hiram maana laase, ne pɛll-dãmba ne zɩɩm mesb laase. A Hiram maana tʋʋm nins rĩm a Salmo sẽn yeel-a t'a maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã n sɛ." 
1Kings7:41 Yẽnda maana ra-lugds a yiibu, la a maan pugli n dogl ra-lugdsã zutu. La a maan gãmba a yiib n lud pugli wã sẽn be ra-lugdsã zutã." 
1Kings7:42 La yẽnda maana te-neeb sẽn wẽnd gernaade. 
1Kings7:43 La yẽnda maana sĩn-bi piigã n dogl terok-rãmb piigã zutu," 
1Kings7:44 la a maana sĩn-bedrã n dogl lols piig la a yiibã zutu," 
1Kings7:45 ne tompeglem laasã, ne pɛll-dãmbã la ne zɩɩm mesb laasã. Teed nins fãa a Hiram sẽn maan n kõ rĩm a Salmo Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã maana ne zũud halaale." 
1Kings7:46 Yaa Zʋrdẽ tẽn-nabdrã zug la rĩm a Salmo kɩt tɩ b yẽneg zũudã yak pʋg n maan te-bãmba. Zĩ-kãng bee Sʋkot ne Sartan sʋka. 
1Kings7:47 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b maan teedã fãa n ka bao n na n mak zũudã n bãng a zɩslem, teedã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
1Kings7:48 Rĩm a Salmo leb n maana Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed a taabã me. Yaa sãnem tẽn-kugrã, sãnem taabl ning b sẽn dogend kaset burã a zugã." 
1Kings7:49 B talla sãnem halaal n maan fɩtl dogends piiga, n ning a nu ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã rĩgnoorã rɩtgo, la b ning a nu goabga, ne tɩ-puudã, la fɩtl-dãmbã ne b sãnem gãtsã," 
1Kings7:50 ne la-bãoonegã, la sʋʋsã, ne zɩɩm mesb laasã, ne tʋgdã, la wisd yõogr laasã sẽn maan ne sãnem halaalã, ne sãnem kʋɩlems wẽnemdedse, ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã yĩnga, la ro-yɩngã kʋɩlemsã fãa yaa sãnem." 
1Kings7:51 Yɩɩ woto la b maan tʋʋm nins fãa rĩm a Salmo sẽn kɩt tɩ b maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã n sɛ. Rĩm a Salmo rɩka wanzuri wã ne sãnemã la teed nins a ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n tall-b n wa bĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ." 
1Kings8:1 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã ne Israyɛll buudã nanambsã ne b rotã nanambs wa tigim bãmb nengẽ Zeruzalɛm, n na n kɩt tɩ b kẽng Sɩyõ sẽn yaa rĩm a Davɩɩd tẽngã, n tɩ tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
1Kings8:2 Dẽ, Israyɛll raopã fãa tigma taab rĩm a Salmo nengẽ, la yɩɩ Etanim kiuugã sẽn yaa kiuug a yopoe soabã tigr wakate." 
1Kings8:3 La Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã fãa sẽn na n wa wã, tɩ rag n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã n tʋk kaoolã koglgã." 
1Kings8:4 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã tʋka kaoolã koglgã ne sɛk roogã, la teed nins fãa sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩngã." 
1Kings8:5 Rĩm a Salmo ne Israyɛll nebã b sẽn bool tɩ b wa bãmb nengẽ wã rag n yasa yĩngr kaoolã koglgã taoor ne yẽnda. La b maana rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd maoongo. La rũmsã yɩɩ wʋsg hal tɩ ned ka tõog n bãng b sõor ye. 
1Kings8:6 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n tɩ ning-a a zĩigẽ, ro-taoorã sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ. La b rɩgl-a-la serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgs tẽngre." 
1Kings8:7 Bala, serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgsã rag n yɛdgame n lud zĩig ning kaoolã koglgã sẽn beẽ wã. Serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgs luda kaoolã koglgã ne a ra-bɩlmã sẽn be a zugã." 
1Kings8:8 B rag n maana ra-bɩlmã tɩ b yaa wogd n sãde, tɩ ned sã n be zĩ-sõngẽ wã bɩ a tõe n yãnd-ba. La ned sã n be yɩnga, a ka tõe n yãnd-b ye. Bãmb kell n paa beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Kings8:9 Bũmb a to rag n ka be kaoolã koglgã pʋga, n zʋʋg kug-wals a yiibã a Moyiis sẽn ning be Horɛɛb tãngã zugã, wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan kaool ne Israyɛll nebã b sẽn wa n yit Ezɩpt yembdã pʋgẽ wã ye." 
1Kings8:10 La maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn wa n yit zĩ-sõngẽ wã, sawaodg n wa n pid Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
1Kings8:11 Sawaodgã yĩng kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã ka tõog n na n yals n maan b tʋʋmdã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã rag n pida b roogã." 
1Kings8:12 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yeelame tɩ y rat n zĩnda zĩ-libsgẽ." 
1Kings8:13 Yaa woto tɩ mam me roog sẽn tar ziir n na n kõ yãmba. Tɩ yãmb tõe n zĩnd be wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.» 
1Kings8:14 Israyɛll nebã fãa ra yasa yĩngri, la rĩm a Salmo wẽnemdame n tees-b n ning-b barka." 
1Kings8:15 Rĩm a Salmo yeelame yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr paam waoogre. Bala, yãmb pidsa kãab-noog ning yãmb sẽn dag n kãab m ba a Davɩɩd n yeel tɩ:" 
1Kings8:16 ‹Hal daar ning mam sẽn yiis Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ ta rũndã, mam ka yãk tẽng ba a yembr Israyɛll buudã tẽms sʋk n yeel tɩ b me roog mam yʋʋrã sẽn na n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye. La mam yãka a Davɩɩd t'a yɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naaba.›" 
1Kings8:17 Mam ba a Davɩɩd dag n data ne b sũur fãa n me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã yĩnga. 
1Kings8:18 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela m ba a Davɩɩd yaa: ‹Fo sẽn tags n dat n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩngã, fo maana neere." 
1Kings8:19 La bũmb sẽn be bala, ka foom n na n me roogã ye. Yaa fo meng bi-roak n na n me roogã mam yʋʋrã yĩnga.›" 
1Kings8:20 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab pidsa b kãabgã. Mam leda m ba a Davɩɩd zĩigẽ, n dɩt naam Israyɛlle, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã, la mam mee roogã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
1Kings8:21 Mam yãka zĩig roogã pʋga, tɩ zĩ-kãng yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg bĩngr zĩiga. Yaa kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n maan ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã, wakat ning bãmb sẽn yiis-b Ezɩpt tẽngã.»" 
1Kings8:22 Rĩm a Salmo yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã taoore, tɩ b nengã tees Israyɛll nebã fãa. La a zẽka a nus n tees yĩngr n yeele:" 
1Kings8:23 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, saasẽ ne tẽng zug ka, Wẽnnaam a to ka be sẽn zem yãmb ye. Yãmb ka sãamd y kaoola, la y nonga neb nins sẽn tũud yãmb ne b sũur fãa wã wakat fãa." 
1Kings8:24 Yãmb pidsa kãab-noog ning yãmb sẽn dag n kãab m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Yãmb noorã sẽn yeel bũmb ninsã, yãmb pids-b-la rũndã ne yãmb meng nusi." 
1Kings8:25 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, bɩ y maan wa yãmb sẽn dag n yeel m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Yãmb dag n yeelame: ‹Fo yagensã sã n gũus ne b yel-manesmã, la b tũ maam wa fo sẽn tũ maamã, ned ka na n kong bãmb sʋkã sẽn na n led fo zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã Israyɛll ye.›" 
1Kings8:26 Moasã, Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, m kot-y lame tɩ y kɩt tɩ goam nins yãmb sẽn dag n togs m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã paam pidsgu." 
1Kings8:27 Dẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam sɩd tõe n zĩnda dũniyã zug la? Yĩngr ne a yalmã, a ka tõe n deeg yãmb a Wẽnnaam ye. Dẽ, roog ning mam sẽn me wã na n maana a wãn n tõog n deeg yãmba?" 
1Kings8:28 Woto yĩngã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, bɩ y wʋm mam sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdã pʋʋsgã, ne m kosgã, la y kelg m sẽn kelemd n boond yãmb rũndã wã." 
1Kings8:29 Bɩ y kɩt tɩ y belmã zĩnd ro-kãngã pʋg wĩndg la yʋngo, bala, a yaa zĩig yãmb sẽn dag n yeel tɩ y yʋʋrã na n zĩnda a pʋgẽ! Moasã, bɩ y kelg y tʋmtʋmdã sẽn be ro-kãngã pʋg n pʋʋsd yãmbã." 
1Kings8:30 N-yẽe! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kelg y tʋmtʋmdã kosgã. La Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sã n tees zĩ-kãngã n kos yãmba, bɩ y kelg-ba. Bɩ y zĩnd yĩngr yãmb sẽn beẽ wã n kelg tõnd zĩ-kãngã, la y kõ-d sugri." 
1Kings8:31 B sã n dõd ned n yeel t'a beega a to, tɩ b kɩt t'a wẽen ro-kãngã pʋg yãmb tẽn-kugrã taoore," 
1Kings8:32 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã yĩngr n kelge. La y kao y tʋmtʋmdbã bʋʋd n kɩt tɩ sẽn ka tar-a bʋʋmã paam sɩbgr wa sẽn zems a sẽn tʋmã, la y bas sẽn tar-a bʋʋmã t'a loog ne laafɩ." 
1Kings8:33 Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã bɛɛb sã n tõog bãmb b sẽn beeg yãmb yĩnga, b sã n lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ, n wa waoog yãmb yʋʋrã, la b pʋʋs yãmb ro-kãngã pʋg n kose," 
1Kings8:34 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ yĩngr n kelg-ba. Bɩ y kõ Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sugr b beegrã yĩnga, la y kɩt tɩ b lebg n wa tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kõ b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ." 
1Kings8:35 Bãmb sã n beeg yãmba, tɩ yãmb sɩbg-b n kɩt tɩ saagã ka niida, b sã n pʋʋs yãmb zĩ-kãngã, la b waoog yãmb yʋʋrã, la b bas b yel-wẽnã," 
1Kings8:36 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã yĩngr n kelg-ba, la y kõ y tʋmtʋmdbã ne Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sugr b beegrã yĩnga. Woto, yãmb zãmsda bãmb tɩ b rɩk so-sõng ning b sẽn tog n tũ wã, la y kɩtdame tɩ saagã ni tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n kõ y nebã tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩrã pʋgẽ." 
1Kings8:37 Kom wall bã-loangdg sã n kẽ tẽngã, ka rẽ bɩ wãoong ne gãnem, wall sʋy bɩ zũnzũy sã n kẽ tẽngã, la baa bɛɛbã sã n zab ne yãmb nebã n tõog n deeg tẽngã, la baa bãas buud toor-toor sã n kẽ tẽngã," 
1Kings8:38 tɩ toodã kɩt tɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sũyã sãame, tɩ b tẽeg b nus n tees ro-kãngã n pʋʋs yãmb n kose," 
1Kings8:39 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ yĩngr n kelg-ba, la y kõ-b b yel-wẽnã sugri, la y keo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã. Bala, yaa yãmb y yembr bal n mi ninsaalbã fãa sũyã tagsgo." 
1Kings8:40 Rẽ na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã sẽn be tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kõ tõnd yaab-rãmbã zoe yãmb wakat fãa. 
1Kings8:41 Woto me, sãamb nins sẽn ka Israyɛll buudã sã n yi zĩ-zãrsẽ n wa yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga," 
1Kings8:42 b sẽn wʋm tɩ yãmb yʋʋrã yaa kãseng n tar pãngã, la y maanda tʋʋm-kãsemsã yĩnga, b sã n kẽ ro-kãngã pʋg n pʋʋs yãmba," 
1Kings8:43 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ yĩngr n kelg-ba, la y leok-ba, tɩ buudã fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã tõe n bãng yãmb yʋʋrã la b zoe yãmb wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn zoet yãmbã. La b tõe n bãng tɩ yãmb yʋʋrã bee ro-kãngã me sẽn me wã pʋga." 
1Kings8:44 Yãmb nebã sã n yi n na n tɩ zab ne b bɛɛbã n sak n tũ sor ning yãmb sẽn wilg-bã, la b sã n tees tẽng ning yãmb sẽn yãkã, ne roog ning mam sẽn me yãmb yʋʋrã yĩngã n pʋʋs yãmba," 
1Kings8:45 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ n kelg b pʋʋsgã ne b kosgã, la y sõng-ba." 
1Kings8:46 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ned ka be n ka beegdẽ ye. La yãmb nebã sã n beeg yãmba, tɩ yãmb sũurã yik ne-ba, tɩ yãmb bas tɩ bɛɛbã tõog-ba, n yõg-b n kẽes yembd tẽn-zãrgẽ wall tẽng sẽn pẽ pʋga," 
1Kings8:47 bãmb sã n zĩnd b yembdã tẽng pʋgẽ, n tek yam n wẽnemd n bao yãmba, n yõk yãmb sɛɛg n yeele: ‹Tõnd beegame, tõnd maana sẽn ka zemse, tõnd maana sẽn yaa wẽnga!›" 
1Kings8:48 Bãmb sã n zĩnd b yembdã tẽng pʋg n wẽnemd n bao yãmb ne b sũyã fãa, ne b yamã fãa, la b sã n tees Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, tẽng ning yãmb sẽn yãk Israyɛll tẽmsã sʋk n kõ b yaab-rãmbã, la b tees roog ning mam sẽn me yãmb yʋʋrã yĩngã n pʋʋse," 
1Kings8:49 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ yĩngr n kelg b pʋʋsgã ne b kosgã, la y leok-ba." 
1Kings8:50 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kõ y nebã sugri, b sẽn beeg yãmbã yĩnga, la y kõ-b sugr wẽng ning fãa b sẽn maanã yĩnga. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn kẽes bãmb yembdã zoe bãmb nimbãanega." 
1Kings8:51 Bala, Israyɛll nebã yaa yãmb nebã, n yaa yãmb pʋɩɩre. Bãmb dag n bee kut wʋng pʋg Ezɩpt tẽnga, tɩ yãmb fãag-ba." 
1Kings8:52 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y ges y tʋmtʋmdã se-yõkrã, la y kelg Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã kosgo, wakat ning fãa b sẽn na n bool yãmba." 
1Kings8:53 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb welga Israyɛll nebã toor ne dũniyã neb a taabã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg yãmb pʋɩɩre, wa yãmb sẽn dag n yeel y tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis wakat ning yãmb sẽn yiis tõnd yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpt tẽngã.»" 
1Kings8:54 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn yĩgimd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã taoor n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la a maan a kosgã n sɛ, a yikame n yals n zẽk a nus n tees yĩngri," 
1Kings8:55 n zẽk a koɛɛg n ning Israyɛll nebã fãa zut bark n yeele: 
1Kings8:56 «Mam pʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka. Bãmb kõo Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã vɩ-bãane, wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã! Kãab-nood nins bãmb sẽn dag n tũnug b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis n kãabã fãa paama pidsgu." 
1Kings8:57 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã zĩnd ne tõndo, wa bãmb sẽn dag n be ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã. Bɩ b ra bas-do, la bɩ b ra zãag ne-d ye." 
1Kings8:58 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnemd tõnd sũyã n tees bãmba, n kɩt tɩ tõnd sak bãmb tʋlsmã fãa, ne b tõodã la b noyã ne b minind nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n kõ tõnd yaab-rãmbã." 
1Kings8:59 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽeg kosg nins fãa mam sẽn kot bãmb rũndã wã wĩndg ne yʋngo, n sõng bãmb tʋmtʋmdã ne Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã daar fãa." 
1Kings8:60 Woto, dũniyã nebã fãa na n bãngame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n yaa Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye." 
1Kings8:61 Yãmb sẽn nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne y sũyã fãa to-to rũndã wã, bɩ y kell n nong bãmb woto wakat fãa, la y sak bãmb noyã, n kẽn wa sẽn zems bãmb tõodã.»" 
1Kings8:62 La rĩm a Salmo ne Israyɛll nebã naaga taab n maan maand n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
1Kings8:63 Rĩm a Salmo maana zems-n-taar maando. Yẽnda rɩka rũm-bɛd tus pisi la a yiibu, ne rũm-bãooneg tus koabg la pisi n maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. La rĩmã ne Israyɛll nebã fãa ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã barka." 
1Kings8:64 Badaare, rĩmã welga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã samand toore, n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum la b kõ bõn-koaadl kũunã, la b yõog zems-n-taar maandã kaam beenẽ, bala, zũud tẽn-kugrã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã neng taoorã yaa bilf n ka tõe n deeg maan-kãens fãa ye." 
1Kings8:65 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Salmo ne Israyɛll neb kʋʋngã maana tigr rasem a yopoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã taoore. Yɩɩ neodg meng-menga. Neb kẽer yii hal sẽn sɩng ne Lebo-Hamat tẽn-kɩrengã n tall n tɩ tãag Ezɩpt ko-soogã. La b leb n maana rasem a yopoe n paase, la fãa yaa rasem piig la a naase." 
1Kings8:66 La rasem a nii wã daare, rĩm a Salmo kuilsa nebã. Nebã kãaba rĩmã kãab-noodo, la b kuili. Bãmb dag n kɩdemdame n maand sũ-noog ne bõn-sõama nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan n kõ b tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll nebã." 
1Kings9:1 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne na-yirã, la a maan bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n tagsd a sũur pʋgẽ n dat n maanã n sɛ," 
1Kings9:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnega b meng ne yẽnda naoor a yiibẽ soaba, wa bãmb sẽn dag n vẽneg b meng ne yẽnda Gabawõ wã." 
1Kings9:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Mam wʋma fo pʋʋsgã ne f kosgã f sẽn kos maamã. Dẽ, mam na n welga roog ning fo sẽn me n kõ maamã toore, n ning m yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wakat fãa yĩnga, la mam belmã ne m sũurã na n zĩnda ro-kãngã pʋg wakat fãa." 
1Kings9:4 La foom a Salmo sã n tũ maam ne pʋ-peelem, la ne burkĩndi, wa f ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n tũud maamã, la f maan bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel foom tɩ f maanã, fo sã n sak mam noyã ne m minindã," 
1Kings9:5 mam na n kɩtame tɩ f soog Israyɛll rĩungã wakat fãa, wa mam sẽn dag n yeel f ba a Davɩɩdã. Mam dag n yeel-a lame yaa: ‹Fo kõn tol n kong yageng sẽn na n led fo zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã Israyɛll ye.›" 
1Kings9:6 La foom ne f yagensã sã n yãk yam n wẽnemd n bas maam, n kɩɩs mam tõodã ne m noyã mam sẽn kõ yãmbã, n kẽng n pʋg wẽn-naandse, la y waoog-ba," 
1Kings9:7 mam na n yiisa Israyɛll nebã tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ-bã pʋgẽ, la mam na n zãaga m meng ne roog ning mam sẽn welg toor m yʋʋrã yĩngã. Woto, Israyɛll nebã na n lebga wa bõn-yaalga, la buud a taabã na n yaala bãmba." 
1Kings9:8 Ro-kãngã sẽn tar ziir to-to wã na n lebga raboogo, tɩ ned sã n pɩʋʋgd a sɛɛgẽ n loogdẽ bɩ a yɛɛse, n fɩɩle, n yeele: ‹Yaa bõe tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan tẽn-kãngã ne ro-kãngã a woto?›" 
1Kings9:9 La b na n leoka a soab yaa: ‹Ad yaa Israyɛll nebã sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã, sẽn yiis-a bãmb yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpt tẽngã, n tɩ pʋgd wẽn-naands n waoogd-bã yĩng n kɩte, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab me bas tɩ yel-beed a woto paam-ba.› »" 
1Kings9:10 Rĩm a Salmo rɩka yʋʋm pisi n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne na-yirã n sɛ. 
1Kings9:11 Tɩɩr dĩm a Hiram rag n tallda sɛɛdr ne sɩprɛs tɩɩs raado, n wat n kõt rĩm a Salmo, la ne sãnem sẽn zems rĩmã sẽn dat tɛka. Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo yãka tẽms pisi Galɩle soolmã pʋgẽ n kõ a Hiram." 
1Kings9:12 Woto, rĩm a Hiram yii Tɩɩr n na n tɩ ges tẽms nins rĩm a Salmo sẽn kõ yẽnda wã. La a tɩ mikame tɩ tẽmsã ka ta yẽnda yam ye." 
1Kings9:13 Dẽ, rĩm a Hiram yeela rĩm a Salmo yaa: «M saam-biiga, yaa bõe tẽms la fo sẽn kõ maamã?» La a pʋda tẽmsã yʋʋr tɩ Kabulli, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹ka võor ye›, la b ket n boonda tẽn-bãmb a woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Kings9:14 Naab a Hiram yaool n dag n tʋmame tɩ b tɩ kõ rĩm a Salmo sãnem kɩlo tus a naase. 
1Kings9:15 Ad tʋʋm-wɛgl nins rĩm a Salmo sẽn modg nebã tɩ b tʋmã: Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne a na-yirã meebo, la Milo ne Zeruzalɛm lalgã, la Hatsoor ne Megido, la Gezɛɛr tẽmsã meebo." 
1Kings9:16 Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ dag n kẽng n tɩ zab n tõoga Gezɛɛr tẽngã n ning-a bugum, la a kʋ Kana nebã sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã. La a rag n dɩka tẽn-kãng n kõ a bi-pugl ning sẽn yaa rĩm a Salmo pagã, a kuilsgã wakate." 
1Kings9:17 Rĩm a Salmo lebs n mee Gezɛɛr tẽngã, ne Bɛt-Horon sẽn be longẽ wã," 
1Kings9:18 la Baalat ne Tadmoor tẽngã zĩig ning sẽn be we-raoogẽ wã. 
1Kings9:19 La b mee tẽms nins fãa rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n bĩngd a laogã, ne a saar-dãmbã, la a wiidã. Rĩm a Salmo mee bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn datã Zeruzalɛm ne Libã, la a soolmã fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Kings9:20 La neb nins sẽn pa tẽngã pʋgẽ n ka Israyɛll buudã neb yaa Amoor-dãmbã, Hɛt-rãmbã, Perɛɛz-rãmbã, Hevi nebã ne Zebuus-rãmbã." 
1Kings9:21 La bu-bãmb yagensã sẽn dag n ket n be tẽngã pʋg tɩ Israyɛll nebã dag n ka tõog n kʋ wã, rĩm a Salmo rɩka bãmb tɩ b yaa yembs n tʋmd tʋʋm-wɛglã hal tɩ tãag rũndã." 
1Kings9:22 Rĩm a Salmo ka tol n yãk Israyɛll ned ba a yembr n kẽes yembd ye. Bala, Israyɛll nebã n dag n yaa yẽnda tãb-biisi, la a tʋmtʋmdba, la a nanambse ne a tãb-biisã nanambse, tɩ kẽer yaa a saar-dãmbã ne a wed-rʋʋdbã nanambse." 
1Kings9:23 Neb nins b sẽn yãk tɩ b get rĩm a Salmo tʋʋmã yellã yaa neb kobs-nu la pis-nu. Yaa bãmb n dag n so nebã tɩ b tʋmd tʋʋmã. 
1Kings9:24 Yaa Faarõ bi-puglã sẽn yi a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ wã n kẽng n tɩ kẽ zag-paall ning rĩm a Salmo sẽn me n kõ-a wã poore, la a Salmo maneg Milo zĩigã." 
1Kings9:25 Yʋʋmd fãa, rĩm a Salmo rag n maanda maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maand naoor a tãabo, tẽn-kugr ning yẽnda sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩngã zugu, la a yõogd tɩdar tẽn-kugr ning sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã zugu. Yɩɩ woto la rĩm a Salmo me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã n sɛ." 
1Kings9:26 Rĩm a Salmo maana koom kogend Esɩyõ-Gebɛɛr sẽn pẽ Eyilat tẽng sẽn be rudum ko-kãsengã sẽn be Edom tẽngã. 
1Kings9:27 Naab a Hiram tʋma a meng tʋmtʋmdb sẽn mi koom koglg rugsg sõama, tɩ b tɩ sõng rĩm a Salmo koom kogl-rugsdbã." 
1Kings9:28 Bãmb kẽnga Ofɩɩr tẽng n tɩ rɩk sãnem kɩlo tus piig la a naas la kobs-yopoe n tɩ kõ rĩm a Salmo. 
1Kings10:1 Rĩm-poak a yembr sẽn yit Seba wʋmame tɩ b gomd rĩm a Salmo yʋʋrã sẽn yi wã yelle. Dẽ, a wa n na n maka a Salmo ne yel-bũna." 
1Kings10:2 Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã kẽnga Zeruzalɛm ne a poorẽ dãmb wʋsgo. B waa ne yʋgma sẽn zɩt parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ne sãnem wʋsgo, la kug-sõama. La a sẽn ta rĩm a Salmo nengẽ, a soka a Salmo sokds nins fãa sẽn dag n be a sũurẽ." 
1Kings10:3 Rĩm a Salmo leoka rĩm-poakã sokdsã fãa. La sokr baa a yembr ka zĩnd rĩm a Salmo sẽn ka tõog n leok ye. 
1Kings10:4 Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã sẽn yãnd rĩm a Salmo sẽn tar yam to-to wã, la a yã roog ning rĩmã sẽn me wã," 
1Kings10:5 ne rɩ-nood nins sẽn be rĩmã taabl zugã, la rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã rotã sẽn yaa to-to wã, ne sõgen-kambã sẽn tʋmd to-to wã, la b yer fut ninsã, ne b sẽn get rĩmã bõn-yũudlã yell to-to wã, la maand sẽn yõogd bugmã rĩmã sẽn maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgã, a maka goam n konge." 
1Kings10:6 Dẽ, a yeela rĩmã yaa: «Mik mam sẽn dag n bee m tẽngẽ wã n wʋmd b sẽn gomd yãmb yellã, ne y yamã yellã sɩd yaa sɩda!" 
1Kings10:7 Sã n ka mam sẽn wa tɩ m ninã yãndã, mam dag n ka sak n deeg tɩ yaa sɩd ye. Mam sẽn dag n wʋmdã ka ta mam sẽn yã wã pʋɩ-sʋk meng ye. Yãmb yamã ne y arzegsã yɩɩda mam sẽn dag n wʋm tɩ b gomd to-to wã." 
1Kings10:8 Neb nins sẽn be ne yãmbã, ne neb nins sẽn tʋmd ne yãmb daar fãa wã yaa zu-nood-rãmba. Bala, bãmb bee ne yãmb n wʋmd yãmb yam goamã wakat fãa!" 
1Kings10:9 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre, bala, taa bãmb yam tɩ b yãk yãmb n kɩt tɩ y yɩ Israyɛll rĩmã! Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong Israyɛll nebã wakat fãa yĩngã n kɩt tɩ bãmb yãk yãmb tɩ y yɩ rĩmã, n kaood bʋʋdã ne sɩda, la ne tɩrlem.»" 
1Kings10:10 Rẽ poore, Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã kõo rĩm a Salmo sãnem kɩlo tus a naas la kobessi, ne parfẽ-rãmb wʋsg sẽn tar yũ-noog wʋsgo, la kug-sõama. Ned ka tol n leb n wa ne parfẽ-rãmb wʋsg sẽn tar yũ-noog a woto wa Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã sẽn wa n kõ rĩm a Salmo wã ye." 
1Kings10:11 A Hiram koom kogl-bɛdã sẽn da kẽnd Ofɩɩr tẽng n wat ne sãnemã me talla ra-sõama ne kug-sõama wʋsg n wa kõ rĩm a Salmo. 
1Kings10:12 Rĩm a Salmo rɩka ra-sõmy wã n pees ra-kʋgs Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne na-yirã yĩnga, la b maana kʋl buud toay-toayã, yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã yĩnga. La hal tɩ ta rũndã, b ka tol n leb n wa ne ra-sõmy wʋsg a woto buud Israyɛlle, la ned me ka leb n yãnd a buud ye." 
1Kings10:13 Rĩm a Salmo kõo Seba rĩm-poakã bũmb nins fãa a sẽn date, la a sẽn kose, n paas kũun a taaba, wa sẽn zems rĩm sẽn ta yẽnda a Salmo wã sẽn tog n kõ. Rẽ zugẽ, Seba rĩm-poakã ne a poorẽ dãmbã lebg n kuila b tẽngẽ." 
1Kings10:14 Yʋʋmd fãa, b rag n wat n kõta rĩm a Salmo sãnem kɩlo tus pisi la a tãab la kobs-tã la piiga," 
1Kings10:15 n paas ne yaood nins yẽnda sẽn deegd toandbã ne lɛɛbdbã nengẽ wã, la ne soolem-dãmb a taabã rĩm-dãmba, wall tẽngã kombɛɛmbã sẽn wat n yaood yaood ninsã." 
1Kings10:16 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b kud sãnem gãn-bɛd kobessi, la a yembr fãa yaa sãnem zɩslem sẽn tat kɩlo a yoob la b tall n maane." 
1Kings10:17 La rĩm a Salmo leb n kɩtame tɩ b kud sãnem gãn-bãooneg kobs-tã, la a yembr fãa yaa sãnem zɩslem sẽn tat kɩlo a ye la pʋɩ-sʋk la b tall n maane. La a bĩnga bãmb roog ning b sẽn boond tɩ Libã tɩɩs roogã pʋga." 
1Kings10:18 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b maan geer sẽn yaa bedre, ne wobd yẽna, n bolg-a ne sãnem halaale." 
1Kings10:19 Geerã dag n tara rʋʋdg sẽn tar kogs a yoobe. Geerã rellgã zĩigẽ dag n yaa gilga. B maana nus rogends geerã kɩrems a yiibã fãa, la b maan gɩgma a yiib tɩ b yas yĩngr n yegl nus rogendsã, a yembr goabga, a yembr dɩtgo." 
1Kings10:20 La b maana gɩgma piig la yiibu, tɩ b yas yĩngri. Rʋʋdgã koak fãa zugu, gɩgma a yiib n yas goabg la a rɩtgo. Soolem a to ka tol n maan bũmb a woto buud ye." 
1Kings10:21 Lagd nins rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n tar n yũudã maana ne sãnem, la teed nins fãa sẽn dag n be roog ning b sẽn boond tɩ Libã tɩɩs roogã pʋgẽ wã maana ne sãnem halaale. Bũmb dag n ka be beenẽ sẽn maan ne wanzuri ye. Bala, rĩm a Salmo zamaanẽ wã, b rag n ka geelgd wanzuri wa bũmb sẽn tar yõod wʋsg ye." 
1Kings10:22 Bala, rĩmã rag n tara koom kogl-bɛd sẽn yit Tarsɩɩs yʋʋm a tãab fãa, n tũud a Hiram koom kogl-bɛdã n wat ne sãnem, wanzuri, wobd yẽna, la wãams ne bulwãado." 
1Kings10:23 Rĩm a Salmo arzegsã ne a yamã rag n yɩɩda dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã fãa. 
1Kings10:24 Dũniyã ween-vɩɩs a naasã fãa neb rag n baood n yãnda rĩm a Salmo, sẽn na yɩl n wʋm a yam goamã Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-a wã." 
1Kings10:25 La yʋʋmd fãa, nin-kãensã ned kam fãa sã n dag n watẽ, a zãada a kũuni. Yaa wanzuri teedo, sãnem teedo, futu, zab-teedo, parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la wiid ne bõense." 
1Kings10:26 Rĩm a Salmo tigma saar-dãmb ne wiid wʋsgo. A Salmo rag n tara saar-dãmb tusr la kobs-naase, la wed-rʋʋdb tus piig la a yiibu. Rĩm a Salmo yãka tẽms tɩ yaa saar-dãmbã ne wiidã bĩngr zĩiga, la a ning kẽer Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ n pẽneg a menga." 
1Kings10:27 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ wanzuri wã lebg wʋsg wa kug Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, la a kɩt tɩ sɛɛdr tɩɩsã raad lebg wʋsg wa wom-seesã sẽn be kunkubẽ wã." 
1Kings10:28 Rĩm a Salmo rag n tara toandb tɩ b tũud taab sull-sull n kẽnd Ezɩpt ne Silisi tẽng n daad wiidã n watẽ. B rag n daad-b-la wa b ligdã sẽn zem to-to wã. 
1Kings10:29 Saar a yembr ligd yaa wanzuri kɩlo a nu la pʋɩ-sʋka, la weef a yembr ligd yaa wanzuri kɩlo a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka. Rĩmã toandb rag n wata ne wiid me n koosd ne Hɛt la Siiri rĩm-dãmbã." 
1Kings11:1 Rĩm a Salmo rɩgsa bu-zẽms kom-pugli wʋsg n maan a pagba, n paas Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ bi-puglã. Pʋg-kãens dag n yaa Amo, Moaabe, Edom, ne Sidõ la Hɛt buudã kom-pugli." 
1Kings11:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n goma ne Israyɛll nebã bu-bãmb wɛɛngẽ n yeele: «Bɩ y ra kẽng n tɩ naag bu-kãense, la y ra bas-b tɩ b wa naag yãmb ye. Bala, b na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yamã tek tɩ y wẽnemd n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tũ b wẽn-naandsã.» La a Salmo sẽn dag n nong pʋg-bãmbã wã yĩng kɩtame t'a loe a meng ne-ba." 
1Kings11:3 Rĩm a Salmo rag n tara na-bi-pogs kobs-yopoe tɩ yaa a pagba, la pʋg-rɩkds kobs-tã. La pʋg-kãens tõog n wẽnemda a yamã." 
1Kings11:4 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn wa n kʋʋle, a pagbã tõog n wẽnemda a yamã t'a tũ wẽn-naandse, la a yamã rag n ka loe ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã zãnga, wa a ba a Davɩɩd yamã sẽn dag n loe ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab to-to wã ye." 
1Kings11:5 Yẽnda tũu Sɩdõ nebã wẽn-naan-poak a Astarte, la a pʋʋs Amo-rãmbã wẽn-naan-yoog a Milkom." 
1Kings11:6 A Salmo maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n ka tũ bãmb ne a sũur fãa wa a ba Davɩɩd ye." 
1Kings11:7 Dẽ, yẽnda mee maoong kʋʋb zĩig tãng ning sẽn tees Zeruzalɛm tẽngã n kõ Moaab-rãmbã wẽn-yook a Kemoose, la a me maoong kʋʋb zĩig n kõ Amo nebã wẽn-yook a Moloke." 
1Kings11:8 A Salmo rag n maanda a woto n kõt a pagb nins fãa sẽn yaa bu-zẽmsã. Pʋg-kãens dag n yõogda wisdu, la b maand maand n kõt b wẽn-naandsã." 
1Kings11:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika ne a Salmo, yẽnda yamã sẽn wẽnemd n bas bãmbã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yaool n dag n vẽnega b meng ne a Salmo naoor a yiibu." 
1Kings11:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n goma ne a Salmo yel-kãng wɛɛngẽ n yeel-a t'a ra sak n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam a to ye. La a Salmo ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã ye. 
1Kings11:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Salmo yaa: «Fo sẽn maan yel-kãngã n ka sak mam kaoolã ne m tõodã mam sẽn dag n kõ foomã yĩnga, mam na n welga f rĩungã n dɩka n kõ f tʋmtʋmda." 
1Kings11:12 La fo ba a Davɩɩd maasem yĩnga, mam ka na n maan bõn-kãng fo sẽn ket n vɩ wakat ye. Mam na n maan-a-la wakat ning sẽn wat n yaa fo biig n dɩt naamã." 
1Kings11:13 La baoosgo, m ka na n deeg naamã zãng ye. Mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd maasem yĩnga, ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã mam sẽn yãkã yĩnga, mam na n basame tɩ f biig soog buud a yembre.»" 
1Kings11:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Salmo paam bɛyã. Yaa Edom tẽngã na-biig a Hadaade. 
1Kings11:15 Wakat ning rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n tɩ zab ne Edom nebã n tõog-bã, yẽnda tãb-biisã naab a Zoaab dag n kẽng n tɩ muma neb nins sẽn ki-b zabrẽ wã, la a tɩ kʋ Edom raopã zãnga." 
1Kings11:16 A Zoaab kell n paa beenẽ kiis a yoob ne Israyɛll nebã, hal n tõog n kʋ Edom raopã zãnga." 
1Kings11:17 La wakat-kãng t'a Hadaad dag n yaa bi-ribl-bilf bala, la yẽnda tũu Edom neb kẽer sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda ba wã tʋmtʋmdb n zoe n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga."
