1Kings11:18 Bãmb yii Madiyã n kẽng Paarã we-raoogẽ wã. La b peega Paarã raop kẽer tɩ b tũ bãmb n kẽng Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ nengẽ. La Faarõ kõ a Hadaad roogo, n ges a rɩɩb yelle, la a kõ-a pʋʋgo." 
1Kings11:19 La Faarõ dag n nonga a Hadaad hal wʋsgo, n tol n dɩk a na-pʋg-rʋmd a Tapenes yao-bi-pugl n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
1Kings11:20 A Tapenes yao-bi-puglã roga a Hadaad bi-ribl t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Genubate. A Tapenes kɩtame tɩ b wub biigã Faarõ zakẽ wã. Biigã naaga Faarõ kambã n be na-yirã. 
1Kings11:21 Wakat ning a Hadaad sẽn wa n be Ezɩpt n wʋm t'a Davɩɩd kiime, la a Zoaab sẽn yaa yẽnda tãb-biisã naabã me kiime. A kosa Faarõ yaa: «M kotame tɩ y bas-m tɩ m lebg n leb m tẽngẽ.»" 
1Kings11:22 Faarõ soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo sẽn be ne maamã, bõe n paoog foom tɩ f rat n lebg n kuil f tẽngẽ?» A Hadaad yeelame: «Bũmb ka paoog-m ye, la yãmb we n bas-m tɩ m kuili.»" 
1Kings11:23 Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a Salmo leb n paam bɛ a to. Yaa a Elyada biig a Reezõ. Yẽnda rag n zoe n basa a soaal a Hadadezɛɛr sẽn yaa Soba rĩmã. 
1Kings11:24 Wakat ning rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kʋ a soaal a Hadadezɛɛr tãb-biisã zãngã, a Reezõ tigma neb n lebg b tãb-biis naaba. Dẽ, bãmb zoe n kẽnga Damaas n tɩ zĩnd be n dɩ naam." 
1Kings11:25 A Salmo vɩɩmã tɛka, a Reezõ yɩɩ Israyɛll nebã bɛ. La a maana wẽng wa a Hadaad sẽn maan Israyɛllã. La a Reezõ sẽn yɩ Siiri rĩmã tɛka, a kisga Israyɛll nebã." 
1Kings11:26 Baa ne a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n yaa a Salmo tʋmtʋmd-tɩrgã yika zabr ne rĩm a Salmo. A Zeroboaam rag n yaa Sereda sẽn be Efrayiim tẽngã rao a Nebat biiga. La a ma wã yaa pʋg-kõore, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Seruwa." 
1Kings11:27 A Zeroboaam dag n yaa a Salmo tʋmtʋmda, la a zaba ne rĩmã. Ad bũmb ning sẽn kɩt tɩ b zab taabã. A Salmo manega zĩig tãngã zug n na n ko, la a yẽd võorã sẽn dag n be yẽnda ba a Davɩɩd tẽngã lalgẽ wã." 
1Kings11:28 A Zeroboaam dag n yaa gãndaoog n tar pãnga. La rĩm a Salmo sẽn yã bi-bɩ-kãng sẽn tʋmd sõama to-to wã, a kɩtame tɩ yẽnda soog Efrayiim ne Manaase buudã neb tɩ b tʋmd tʋʋm-wɛglã." 
1Kings11:29 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeroboaam yii Zeruzalɛm, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Akiya sẽn yit Sɩlo tẽng raoã tek n sega yẽnda sorẽ. A Akiya dag n yera fu-paalle. La yaa bãmb b yiibã bal n dag n be weoogã pʋga." 
1Kings11:30 A Akiya gãda fu-paall ning yẽnda sẽn yerã n tak n pãrs zĩis piig la a yiibu. 
1Kings11:31 La a Akiya yeela a Zeroboaam yaa: «Reeg peen-gɩrs piigã n sooge. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam na n deega naamã a Salmo nugẽ, la mam na n kõo foom buud piig tɩ f sooge." 
1Kings11:32 La mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd maasem yĩnga, ne Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa tẽng mam sẽn yãk Israyɛll tẽmsã sʋkã yĩnga, a Salmo biig n na n soog buud a yembr bala." 
1Kings11:33 Bala, bãmb basa maam n waoog Sɩdõ nebã wẽn-naan-poak a Astarte, ne Moaab nebã wẽn-naandg a Kemoose, ne Amo nebã wẽn-naandg a Milkom. La bãmb ka sak n tũ maam, n kẽn wa sẽn zemsd mam tõodã ne m noyã, wa a Salmo ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kẽn to-to wã, n maan sẽn yaa tɩrg mam nifẽ ye." 
1Kings11:34 Mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd mam sẽn yãkã sẽn sak maam, n kẽn wa sẽn zems mam tõodã ne m noyã maasem yĩnga, mam ka na n deeg soolmã zãng n bas a Salmo ye. Yẽnda na n kell n yɩɩ rĩm a vɩɩmã tɛka." 
1Kings11:35 La yaa a Salmo biig nugẽ, la m na n deeg naamã, la m na n kõo foom a Zeroboaam buud piig tɩ f sooge." 
1Kings11:36 Baoosgo, mam na n kõo a biigã buud a yembr t'a sooge, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yʋʋrã ra menem mam taoor Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa tẽng ning mam sẽn yãk m yʋʋrã yĩngã pʋgẽ ye." 
1Kings11:37 La mam na n kɩtame tɩ foom a Zeroboaam dɩ naamã wa f sẽn date, n yɩ Israyɛll rĩmã." 
1Kings11:38 Fo sã n sak n maan bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel foomã neere, n sak n kẽn wa mam sẽn datã, la f maan sẽn tat mam yam, n tũ mam tõodã ne m noyã, wa mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n maandã, mam na n zĩnda ne foom n kɩt tɩ f roogã kaoos wa mam sẽn maan a Davɩɩd yĩngã, la m kɩt tɩ f soog Israyɛlle." 
1Kings11:39 Mam na n maana a woto n ning a Davɩɩd doogã yãnde, la ka na n yɩ wakat fãa yĩng ye.»" 
1Kings11:40 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo baoome n na n kʋ a Zeroboaam. La a Zeroboaam yikame n zoe n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽng rĩm a Sɩsak nengẽ. A Zeroboaam zĩnda be hal n tãag a Salmo kũum." 
1Kings11:41 Rĩm a Salmo yɛl a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa, ne a yamã tʋʋmã fãa gʋlsa a Salmo tʋʋmã sebr pʋga." 
1Kings11:42 Rĩm a Salmo rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm n soog Israyɛll nebã yʋʋm pis-naase. 
1Kings11:43 Rĩm a Salmo saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a ba a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La a Salmo biig a Roboaam n deeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings12:1 A Roboaam kẽnga Sɩkɛm, la Israyɛll nebã kẽnga beenẽ n na n tɩ kõ-a naam." 
1Kings12:2 A Nebat biig a Zeroboaam wʋma bõn-kãnga, la rẽ tɩ yẽnda ket n bee Ezɩpt tẽnga, bala, yẽnda dag n zoe n kẽnga beenẽ n na n paam n põs rĩm a Salmo." 
1Kings12:3 B tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool-a. La a Zeroboaam ne a Israyɛll nebã tũu taab n wa, la b goma ne a Roboaam n yeel-a yaa:" 
1Kings12:4 «Yãmb ba wã dag n namsda tõnd wʋsgo, dẽ, tõnd kot-y lame tɩ y yols tõnd ne namsg ning y ba sẽn dag n namsd tõndã, woto, d na n yɩɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdba.»" 
1Kings12:5 Rĩm a Roboaam yeel-b lame tɩ b kuil la b lebg n wa ra-yɩt-n-daare. La nebã kuilame. 
1Kings12:6 Woto, rĩm a Roboaam soka nin-kẽemb nins sẽn dag n zĩnd ne yẽnda ba a Salmo wã yaa: «Ne yãmba, y sagenda maam tɩ m maan a wãna?»" 
1Kings12:7 Nin-kẽembã yeela a Roboaam yaa: «Yãmb sã n sak n maan nin-bãmbã sẽn datã, la y gom ne-b gom-noodo, b na n yɩɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdba.»" 
1Kings12:8 La rĩm a Roboaam ka geelg nin-kẽembã saglsã ye. A bas n kẽng n tɩ kosa kom-bɩɩs nins sẽn be ne yẽnda n dag n yaa yẽnda reed-n-taasã saglse. 
1Kings12:9 Rĩm a Roboaam soka kom-bɩɩsã yaa: «Nin-bãmbã sẽn kot maam bũmb ningã, yãmb sagenda maam tɩ m leok-b tɩ bõe? B yeela maam tɩ m yols-b ne zɩɩb ning m ba sẽn dag n zɩlg-bã.»" 
1Kings12:10 Kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa a Roboaam reed-n-taasã yeela a Roboaam yaa: Ad yãmb sẽn na n yeel-b bũmb ningã la woto: « ‹Y ba zɩlga tõnd wʋsgo, la yãmba, yols-y-do.› Yeel-y-b tɩ yãmb nug-bi-kɛmblã yɩɩda y ba wã kanga." 
1Kings12:11 La sẽn paase, y ba sã n dag namsa bãmba, yãmb na n paasa bãmb namsgã tɩ yɩɩd rẽ. Yeel-y-b tɩ y ba sã n dag n sɩbga bãmb ne kalwaase, yãmb na n sɩbg-b-la ne kalwaas sẽn tar gõose.»" 
1Kings12:12 Rasem a tãabã daar sẽn ta, a Zeroboaam ne Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n waa rĩm a Roboaam nengẽ, wa yẽnda sẽn dag n yeelã." 
1Kings12:13 Dẽ, a Roboaam basa nin-kẽembã sẽn sagl yẽnda wã, n leok nebã ne mo-beedo." 
1Kings12:14 A Roboaam reega a kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa yẽnda reed-n-taasã sagls n yeele: «M ba rag n namsa yãmba, la mam na n paasa yãmb namsgã n yɩɩda, m ba dag n sɩbga yãmb ne kalwaase, la mam na n sɩbga yãmb ne kalwaas sẽn tar gõose.»" 
1Kings12:15 Woto, rĩmã ka kelg nin-buiidã ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n dat tɩ yɩ a woto, tɩ bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Sɩlo rao a Akiya togs a Nebat biig a Zeroboaamã tõe n paam pidsgu." 
1Kings12:16 La Israyɛll neb nins sẽn be ne a Zeroboaamã fãa sẽn yã tɩ rĩmã ka kelg bãmbã, b yeelame: «Tõnd toog ka leb n be ne a Davɩɩd buudã neb ye. Tõnd ka leb n tar lagem-n-taar ne a Izayi biigã ye. Israyɛll nebã, d lebg n kuili! Moasã wã, bɩ a Davɩɩd yagensã tall b roogo!» Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã lebg n kuilame." 
1Kings12:17 Dẽ, yaa Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n be Zʋʋda tẽmsẽ wã bal n dag n get a Roboaam wa b rĩmã." 
1Kings12:18 Baoosgo, rĩm a Roboaam tʋma a Adoram sẽn dag n get tʋʋm-wɛglã yellã Israyɛll nebã nengẽ. La Israyɛll nebã fãa naaga taab n lob a Adoram kug t'a ki. Dẽ, yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne rĩm a Roboaam t'a kẽ saar pʋg n zoe n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
1Kings12:19 Yɩɩ woto tɩ Israyɛll kell n welg ne a Davɩɩd doogã neb hal tɩ ta rũndã. 
1Kings12:20 Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn wʋm t'a Zeroboaam lebg n waame, b tigma taab n kɩt tɩ b bool-a t'a wa, la b kɩtame t'a lebg Israyɛll nebã fãa rĩmã. La rag n yaa Zʋʋda buudã neb bal n kell n pa a Davɩɩd ne a roogã poorẽ." 
1Kings12:21 A Roboaam sẽn lebg n ta Zeruzalɛm, a tigma Zʋʋda buudã fãa ne Benzame buudã tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii sẽn mi zabr sõama, tɩ b na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll buud a taabã neb n deeg soolmã n lebs a Salmo biig a Roboaam." 
1Kings12:22 La Wẽnnaam goma ne b no-rɛɛs a Semaya n yeel-a yaa: 
1Kings12:23 «Yeel a Salmo biig a Roboaam sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã ne Zʋʋda buudã ne Benzame buudã fãa ne neb a taabã sẽn ketã," 
1Kings12:24 tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: Bɩ y ra kẽng n tɩ zab ne y saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã ye! Bɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri, bala, yaa maam n kɩt tɩ yellã yɩ a woto.» Bãmb saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã n maan wa b sẽn yeelã n lebg n kuili." 
1Kings12:25 A Zeroboaam kɩtame tɩ b me lals n gũbg Sɩkɛm sẽn be Efrayiim tãmsã sʋkã t'a kẽ be. Yẽnda zĩnda be n yi n tɩ me lals n gũbg Penuwɛll tẽngã. 
1Kings12:26 A Zeroboaam tagsa a sũurẽ a woto: «Yellã sẽn lebg to-to wã, naamã tõe n wa lebg n leba a Davɩɩd doogã neb nugẽ." 
1Kings12:27 Dẽ wã, nebã sã n ket n kẽnd Zeruzalɛm n maand maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga, b tõe n wa teka yam n wẽnemd n bas maam, n tɩ kẽ Zʋʋda rĩm a Roboaam sẽn dag n yaa b soaalã. Woto, b na n kʋʋ maam n lebg n kẽ yẽnda.»" 
1Kings12:28 A Zeroboaam kõo a meng yam n maan sãnem nag-bi a yiibu, n yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa: «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sẽn kẽnd Zeruzalɛmã yaa wʋsgo. Moasã, wẽn-naands nins sẽn yiis yãmb Ezɩpt yembdã pʋgẽ wã la woto.»" 
1Kings12:29 A Zeroboaam rɩka nag-bil a yembr n tɩ ning Betɛlle, la a rɩk a yembrã n tɩ ning Dan." 
1Kings12:30 A Zeroboaam manesem-kãng kẽesa nebã beegr pʋga. La nebã rag n kẽnda hal Dan n waoogd nag-bil ning sẽn be-a be wã. 
1Kings12:31 A Zeroboaam kɩtame tɩ b me rot maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã, la a basa Leevi buudã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, n yãk nin-zaals n kɩt tɩ b lebg maan-kʋʋdba." 
1Kings12:32 A Zeroboaam yãka kiuug a nii soabã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, tɩ yaa tigr daare. La tig-kãng kell n zemsda ne Zʋʋda tigrã daare. La yẽnda meng n yik n maan maand tẽn-kugrã zugu. A Zeroboaam maana a woto Betɛll n maand maand n kõt nag-bi nins yẽnda sẽn maanã. Yẽnda zĩniga maan-kʋʋdb maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã Betɛlle." 
1Kings12:33 Kiuug a nii soabã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, a Zeroboaam maana tigr Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, wa sẽn zems daar ning yẽnda sẽn dag n yãkã. Badaare, yẽnda yõoga wisd tẽn-kugr ning yẽnda sẽn me Betɛllã zugu." 
1Kings13:1 Wakat ninga a Zeroboaam sẽn wa n be Betɛll n yas n yõogd wisd tẽn-kugrã zugã, Wẽnnaam dao a yembr n yi Zʋʋda n wa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga." 
1Kings13:2 Wẽnnaam daoã kãaba tẽn-kugrã wẽng wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wilgã n yeele: «Tẽn-kugri! Tẽn-kugri! Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ bi-ribl n na n dog a Davɩɩd buudã pʋgẽ, la b na n pʋd-a a yʋʋr t'a Zoziyaase. La maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yõogd wisd fo zugã, bi-kãng na n kʋ-b-la fo zugu, la b na n yõoga ninsaalb kõab fo zugu.»" 
1Kings13:3 Badaar bala, Wẽnnaam daoã wilga a Zeroboaam bũmb ning sẽn na n maanã n yeele: «Ad bãnd ning sẽn wilgd tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome. Tẽn-kugrã na n wãame tɩ tompeglmã sẽn be a zugã sãeege.»" 
1Kings13:4 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Zeroboaam sẽn wʋm kãabg ning Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn kãab tẽn-kugrã, a tẽega a nug n zʋʋg tẽn-kugrã n tees Wẽnnaam daoã n yeel tɩ b yõk-a. La nug ning rĩm a Zeroboaam sẽn dɩk n tees Wẽnnaam daoã kʋɩɩme n tɩre, n ka leb n tõe n sik ye." 
1Kings13:5 La Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn dag n wilg bãnd ningã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã paama pidsgu. Tẽn-kugrã sɩd wãame tɩ tompeglmã sẽn dag n be a zugã sãeege. 
1Kings13:6 Rĩmã zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel Wẽnnaam daoã yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã, la f pʋʋs m yĩng tɩ m nugã tõe n leb n wa a zĩigẽ.» Dẽ, Wẽnnaam daoã pʋʋs n kosa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la rĩmã nugã leb n wa a zĩigẽ." 
1Kings13:7 Rĩm a Zeroboaam yeela Wẽnnaam daoã yaa: «Wa tũ maam n kuili, tɩ m tɩ kõ-f rɩɩb tɩ f rɩ, la m bao kũun n kõ-fo.»" 
1Kings13:8 Wẽnnaam daoã leoka rĩmã yaa: «Baa yãmb sã n dɩk y zakã pʋɩ-sʋk n kõ maam, mam kõn tũ yãmb n kuil ye. Mam ka na n lemb y rɩɩbo, mam kõn yũ y koom me ye." 
1Kings13:9 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m da rɩ rɩɩbo, la m da yũ koom, la m da leb n tũ sor ning m sẽn tũ n wa wã n kuil ye.»" 
1Kings13:10 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam daoã rɩka sor a to n kuiisẽ, n ka leb n tũ sor ning yẽnda sẽn dag n tũ n wa Betɛllã ye." 
1Kings13:11 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdr a ye n dag n be Betɛlle. Yẽnda biig a yembr n wa n togs-a bũmb nins fãa Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn maan Betɛll badaarã, la goam nins Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn togs rĩmã. Kambã sẽn togs b ba wã rẽ fãa n sɛ," 
1Kings13:12 b ba wã sok-b lame yaa: «Wẽnnaam daoã rɩka so-bʋgo?» La kambã wilga b ba wã Zʋʋda raoã sẽn dɩk sor ningã. 
1Kings13:13 Dẽ, b ba wã yeel-b lame tɩ b ning a bõangã yolgo. La b maana woto n kõ-a t'a zombe." 
1Kings13:14 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã tɩ paam-a Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn yit Zʋʋda wã t'a zĩ tɩɩg tẽngre, t'a sok-a yaa: «Yaa foom la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ning sẽn yi Zʋʋda n wa wã bɩ?» T'a leok tɩ: «N-yẽe! Yaa maam!»" 
1Kings13:15 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Yik n wa tũ maam tɩ d kuil n tɩ rɩ.»" 
1Kings13:16 La Wẽnnaam daoã yeelame yaa: «Mam ka tõe n tũ yãmb n kuil ye! Mam ka tog n lemb rɩɩbo, wall m yũ koom tẽn-kãngã ye!»" 
1Kings13:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m da lemb tẽn-kãngã rɩɩbo, wall m yũ a koom, la m da leb n tũ sor ning m sẽn tũ n wa wã me n lebg n kuil ye." 
1Kings13:18 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã yeela yẽnda yaa: «Mam me yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs wa foom. La malɛɛk n wa n togs maam Zu-soabã koɛɛg n yeele: Kẽng n tɩ peeg Wẽnnaam daoã n kuil f yir t'a tɩ rɩ la a yũ.» Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã yaool n dag n yagda zĩrẽ. 
1Kings13:19 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam daoã lebg n tũu yẽnda n kuil a yirã n na n tɩ rɩ la a yũ." 
1Kings13:20 La b sẽn ket n zĩ n dɩtẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã sẽn yit Betɛllã." 
1Kings13:21 Dẽ, a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn yit Zʋʋda wã yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga: Fo kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã n ka sak bãmb tõogã bãmb sẽn dag n wilg foomã ye." 
1Kings13:22 Fo sẽn lebg n wa rɩ la f yũ tẽn-kãngã wã, tɩ b yaool n dag n yeela foom tɩ f ra rɩ tẽn-kãngã rɩɩbo, la f ra yũ a koomã, fo na n kiime, la b ka na n mum fo kũumã f saam-dãmbã yaadẽ ye.»" 
1Kings13:23 B sẽn dɩ la b yũ n sɛ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã ninga bõang yolg n kõ Wẽnnaam daoã yẽnda sẽn tɩ peeg n wa wã" 
1Kings13:24 t'a zomb n looge. La Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn be sorẽ, gɩgemd n tek n yõk-a n kʋ n dɩgl sorã zugu. La yẽnda bõangã ne gɩgemdã ra ket n yas n yega a kũumã." 
1Kings13:25 La so-loaadb n wa n loogd be n yãnd kũumã sẽn dɩg sorã zugã, tɩ gɩgemdã yas kũumã sɛɛgẽ. So-loaadbã sẽn ta Betɛll sẽn yaa tẽng ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã sẽn beẽ wã, b goma bõn-kãng yelle." 
1Kings13:26 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã sẽn wʋm woto, a yeelame: «Yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ning sẽn kɩɩs-a Wẽnnaam noorã, la Wẽnnaam bas tɩ gɩgemd yõk n kʋ, wa bãmb sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã.»" 
1Kings13:27 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã yeela a kambã tɩ b ning a bõangã yolgo, la b ninga a bõangã yolgo." 
1Kings13:28 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã kẽngame n tɩ mik tɩ kũumã rɩga, tɩ bõangã ne gɩgemdã yas n yeg kũumã. La gɩgemdã ka wãb kũumã, la a ka yõk bõangã me ye." 
1Kings13:29 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kʋdrã rɩka kũumã n palg bõangã n tall n kuili. Nin-kẽemã talla kũumã n kuil Betɛll n na n tɩ yãb a kʋʋrã la a mum-a." 
1Kings13:30 Yẽnda muma Zʋʋda raoã kũumã a meng yaoogẽ, la a yãb n wiis n yeele: «Kayto! M saam-biiga.»" 
1Kings13:31 A sẽn mum kũumã n sɛ, a yeela a kambã yaa: «Mam sã n wa n ki, bɩ y mum maam n naag Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã. Gãneg-y maam n yegl a kõabã." 
1Kings13:32 Bala mam mii hakɩɩka, tɩ kãabd nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a kãab Betɛll tẽn-kugrã, ne a sẽn gom maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ pʋʋsg rotã fãa sẽn be Samaari tẽmsẽ wã wɛɛngẽ wã na n paama pidsgu.»" 
1Kings13:33 Bõn-kãensã fãa zugẽ, a Zeroboaam kell n ka wẽnemd n bas wẽngã maaneg ye. Yẽnda leb n yãka nin-zaals Israyɛll nebã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b lebg maan-kʋʋdb maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã. Ned ning fãa sẽn dag n dat-a n yɩ maan-kʋʋda, yẽnda yãkd-a lame n kɩt t'a lebg maan-kʋʋda." 
1Kings13:34 Manesem-kãng kẽesa a Zeroboaam ne a yirã rãmb kongr pʋga. Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b sãam a Zeroboaam yirã zãnga, n menes-b dũniyã zugu." 
1Kings14:1 Wakat-kãnga, a Zeroboaam bi-ribl a Abiya lʋɩɩ bãaga." 
1Kings14:2 Dẽ, a Zeroboaam yeela a pagã yaa: «M kotame tɩ f yik n teem fut ned sẽn kõn yãnd n bãng tɩ yaa foom la rĩm a Zeroboaam pagã ye. Kẽng Sɩlo tẽnga, tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Akiya bee be. Yaa yẽnda la sẽn dag n yeel maam tɩ m na n lebga Israyɛll nebã rĩmã." 
1Kings14:3 Bao bur piiga, ne sams bilfu, la sɩɩdo, n zã n tɩ kõ-a. Fo sã n kẽnge, yẽnda na n wilga foom tõnd biigã yell sẽn na n baas to-to.»" 
1Kings14:4 Dẽ, a Zeroboaam pagã maana wa a sɩdã sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. A yikame n kẽng Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Akiya nengẽ Silo. La a Akiya dag n kʋʋla wʋsg t'a ninã ka leb n neẽ ye." 
1Kings14:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yeela a Akiya yaa: «Ade, a Zeroboaam pagã biig n yaa bãada, t'a wat n na n yãnd foom n sok a biigã yell sẽn na n yɩ to-to. La a na n maana a mengã, fo sẽn kõn bãng tɩ yaa yẽnda ye. La mam na n wilga foom, fo sẽn na n togs-a bũmb ninga.»" 
1Kings14:6 La pagã sẽn ta roogã noore, a Akiya wʋma a naoã rãamd n yeel-a yaa: «A Zeroboaam paga, wa kẽ wɛ. Yaa bõe tɩ f solgd f meng n ka rat tɩ b bãng tɩ yaa foom? Fo sẽn maaneg me, b tʋma maam tɩ m togs-f koe-beedo." 
1Kings14:7 Lebg n kẽng n tɩ yeel a Zeroboaam tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yeetame: ‹Fo rag n yaa nin-zaalg n be Israyɛll nebã sʋka, tɩ mam sẽn zẽk foom n kɩt tɩ f lebg Israyɛll nebã naaba." 
1Kings14:8 Mam deega naamã a Davɩɩd buudã nugẽ n kõ foom. La fo ka sak n maan wa mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd sẽn sak mam tõodã, n tũ maam ne a sũur fãa, n ka tol n maan bũmb sẽn ka tat mam yamã ye." 
1Kings14:9 Fo maana wẽng n yɩɩd rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn deng-b foomã. Fo wẽnemd n basa maam, n maan f meng wẽn-naandse, n kɩt tɩ m sũurã yiki." 
1Kings14:10 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed paam a Zeroboaam buudã. Mam na n sãama a Zeroboaam buudã raopã ne kom-dibli wã fãa sẽn be Israyɛllã, sã n yaa yembse, wall burkĩmba. Mam na n pɩɩsa foom a Zeroboaam buudã wa ned sẽn pɩɩsd sagdo, n kɩt t'a menem zãnga." 
1Kings14:11 La fo buudã ned sã n ki tẽngã pʋgẽ, baas n na n wãb-a, la a sã n ki weoogẽ, weoogã bõn-yɩgdɩ n na dɩ-a. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n yeele.› »" 
1Kings14:12 La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Akiya leb n yeela pagã yaa: «Foom a Zeroboaam paga, yik n kuil f yiri! La bãng tɩ yaa wakat ning fo naoorã sẽn na n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ wã la fo biigã na n ki." 
1Kings14:13 Israyɛll nebã fãa na n yãba biigã kʋʋre, la b mum-a. A Zeroboaam buudã sʋka, yaa bi-kãng bal n na n paam yaoogo. Bala, a Zeroboaam buudã sʋka, bi-kãng a yembr bal pʋgẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yã bũmb sẽn ta bãmb yam." 
1Kings14:14 Rẽ zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yãka rĩm n kõ Israyɛlle, la yaa rĩm-kãng n na n menes a Zeroboaam buudã. La rũndã bala, bõn-kãng zoe n sɩngame." 
1Kings14:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sɩbga Israyɛlle, la b miim-a wa tãnwĩig sẽn be koom noore. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yiisa Israyɛll nebã tẽn-sõng-kãngã bãmb sẽn dag n kõ b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ, n kɩt tɩ b sãeeg n kẽng hal Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde. Bala, bãmb peesa ra-lugds wẽn-naan-poak a Aseera yĩng n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puugi." 
1Kings14:16 A Zeroboaam sẽn beeg n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n basa Israyɛll nebã.»" 
1Kings14:17 A Zeroboaam pagã yikame n lebg n kuil a yir Tirsa. La yẽnda sẽn ta a roogã noor bal yee, la a bi-riblã sẽn be kũumẽ." 
1Kings14:18 Dẽ, b muma biigã, la Israyɛll nebã fãa yãba a kʋʋre, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b no-rɛɛs a Akiya togsã." 
1Kings14:19 A Zeroboaam tʋʋm a taabã sẽn wilgd yẽnda sẽn zab zabã ne a rĩungã yɛlã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
1Kings14:20 A Zeroboaam dɩɩ naam yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu. La a saka a saam-dãmba, t'a biig a Nadaab reeg a zĩig n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings14:21 Rĩm a Salmo biig a Roboaam dɩɩ naam Zʋʋda. Yẽnda sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-naas la a yembre. Yẽnda rɩɩ a naamã yʋʋm piig la a yopoe Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk n ning b yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã. A Roboaam ma wã rag n yaa Amo neda, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Naama." 
1Kings14:22 Zʋʋda buudã neb maana wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n yɩɩd b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yik ne-ba." 
1Kings14:23 Bãmb me mee tẽn-kuga, la maoong kʋʋb zĩisi, la b pees kug-viginds ne ra-lugds n vigl kunkubã fãa zutu, ne tɩɩs nins sẽn tar maasmã tẽngre." 
1Kings14:24 Bãmb dag n tara pagb ne raop sẽn be pʋʋsg rotã zĩisẽ n maand yoob n waoogd wẽn-naandse. Bãmb maana tʋʋm-beed buud toor-toore, wa buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã rigã sẽn dag n maandã." 
1Kings14:25 A Roboaam sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm nuunẽ, la Ezɩpt rĩm a Sɩsak yik zabr ne Zeruzalɛm." 
1Kings14:26 A Sɩsak wʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog zãnga, la a wʋk na-yirã laogã me zãnga. Yẽnda wʋka sãnem gãnd nins fãa rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b maanã." 
1Kings14:27 Rĩm a Roboaam maana zũud gãndo, n ledg sãnem gãndã zĩigẽ, la a rɩk-b n gũnug tãb-biis nins sẽn yaa rĩmã gũudbã nanambsã sẽn gũud rĩmã zak noorã." 
1Kings14:28 Wakat ning fãa rĩmã sẽn dabd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, tãb-biisã sẽn gũud rĩmã zãada gãndã n yãagd rĩmã. La b sã n sɛ, b lebgd n tɩ lebsa gãndã tãb-biisã sẽn yaa rĩmã gũudbã roogẽ." 
1Kings14:29 Rĩm a Roboaam tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
1Kings14:30 Rĩm a Roboaam ne a Zeroboaam dag n zabda taab wakat fãa. 
1Kings14:31 A Roboaam saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag a saam-dãmbã, a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. Yẽnda ma wã rag n yaa Amo neda, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Naama. La a Roboaam biig a Abiyam n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings15:1 A Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, la a Abiyam lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
1Kings15:2 A Abiyam rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a tãabo. A ma wã yʋʋr la a Maaka, n yaa a Absalom bi-pugla." 
1Kings15:3 A Abiyam maana beegr nins fãa a ba wã sẽn dag n maanã. Yẽnda rag n ka loe a meng zãng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã, wa a yaab a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n loe a meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab to-to wã ye." 
1Kings15:4 La baoosgo, a Davɩɩd zug maasem yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã kɩtame t'a bi-ribl a yembr led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naam Zeruzalɛm, sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a Davɩɩd yʋʋrã ra meneme, la tɩ Zeruzalɛm tõe n kell n yɩ soolmã na-tẽnga." 
1Kings15:5 Bala, rĩm a Davɩɩd dag n maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la yẽnda vɩɩmã tɛka, a ka tol n kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda t'a maan bũmb ninsã ba a yembre, sã n ka Hɛt rao a Uuri yellã poorẽ wã bala." 
1Kings15:6 A Roboaam vɩɩmã tɛka, yẽnda ne a Zeroboaam dag n zabda taaba." 
1Kings15:7 Rĩm a Abiyam tʋʋm a taaba ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. Zabr kell n zĩnda a Abiyam ne a Zeroboaam sʋka. 
1Kings15:8 A Abiyam saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La a biig a Aaza n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings15:9 Yaa Israyɛll rĩm a Zeroboaam sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pisiiblẽ, la a Aaza lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
1Kings15:10 Yẽnda rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pis-naas la a yembre. A Aaza ma yʋʋr dag n yaa a Maaka sẽn yaa a Absalom bi-puglã. 
1Kings15:11 A Aaza maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa a yaab a Davɩɩde." 
1Kings15:12 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b rig maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ yoaadbã fãa n yiis tẽngã pʋga, la a kɩt tɩ b yiis wẽn-naandsã fãa yẽnda yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã." 
1Kings15:13 A Aaza tol n kɩtame t'a yaab-poak a Maaka sẽn yaa rĩmã ma wã ka leb n tar waoogr ning a sẽn tog n paamã ye. Bala, a Maaka maana wẽn-naan-yooko, wẽn-poak a Aseera yĩnga. Rĩm a Aaza kɩtame tɩ b pãb wẽn-naandgã n wã, n yõog-a bugum Sedrõ ko-soogã pʋga." 
1Kings15:14 Baoosg zãnga, b ka tõog n menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã zãng ye. La a Aaza vɩɩmã tɛka, a kell n loee a meng zãng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Kings15:15 A Aaza rɩka kũun nins a ba wã sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, ne kũun nins yẽnda mengã sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n tall n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã. Yaa wanzuri, sãnem ne teed buud toor-toore." 
1Kings15:16 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza ne Israyɛll rĩm a Basa vɩɩmã tɛka, b rag n zabda taaba." 
1Kings15:17 Daar a yembre, Israyɛll rĩm a Basa yika zabr ne Zʋʋda, la a me lalg n gũbg Rama tẽngã, tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza nebã ka leb n tõe n tũ beenẽ n yi wall b kẽng a Aaza nengẽ ye." 
1Kings15:18 Woto, rĩm a Aaza wʋka wanzuri wã ne sãnemã gill sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ wã, la a wʋk na-yirã laogã, n kɩt t'a tʋmtʋmdbã tall n tɩ kɩs a Heziyõ biig a Tabrimo biig a Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn yaa Siiri rĩm n be Damaasã, la b yeel-a yaa:" 
1Kings15:19 «Wa-y tɩ d maan kaool ne taaba, wa yãmb ba wã ne mam ba wã sẽn dag n maan kaool ne taabã. Ad kũun mam sẽn kõt yãmba: yaa wanzuri ne sãnem. Mam kot-y lame tɩ y sãam kaool ning sẽn be yãmb ne Israyɛll rĩm a Basa sʋkã, t'a zãag a meng ne maam.»" 
1Kings15:20 A Bɛn-Hadaad saka rĩm a Aaza sẽn yeelã, n tʋm a tãb-biisã nanambsã tɩ b tɩ zab ne Israyɛll tẽmsã. Yẽnda reega Iyon, ne Dãn, la Abɛll-Bɛt-Maaka tẽmsã, n paas ne Kinerot la Neftali soolmã zãnga." 
1Kings15:21 A Basa sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, a basa Rama meebo, la a kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Tirsa tẽnga." 
1Kings15:22 Woto, rĩm a Aaza boola Zʋʋda nebã fãa n ka bak ned ba a yembre, n kɩt tɩ b tɩ wʋk kugã ne raad nins fãa rĩm a Basa sẽn dag n tigs n na n me Rama lalgã. La rĩm a Aaza talla ra-kãens ne kug-kãens n me Geba tẽngã sẽn be Benzame soolmẽ wã ne Mispa tẽngã." 
1Kings15:23 Rĩm a Aaza tʋʋm a taabã, ne a gãndaalmã fãa, la bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã, ne tẽms nins a sẽn me wã gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. La rĩm a Aaza sẽn wa n kʋʋlã, a bẽe nao bãaga." 
1Kings15:24 A Aaza saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a yaab-rãmb yaadẽ, a yaab a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Zozafat n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings15:25 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, la a Zeroboaam biig a Nadaab lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, la a rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm a yiibu." 
1Kings15:26 A Nadaab maana wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda me maana wẽng wa a ba wã sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã. 
1Kings15:27 Dẽ, Isakaar buudã ned a Akiya biig a Basa ra baood n na n kʋʋ rĩm a Nadaabe. Wakat ning rĩm a Nadaab ne Israyɛll tãb-biisã sẽn wa n be Filistẽ nebã soolmẽ, n gũbg Gibetõ tẽngã n zabd ne-a wã, la a Basa kʋ rĩm a Nadaab beenẽ." 
1Kings15:28 La yɩɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, la a Basa kʋ a Nadaab n deeg Israyɛll naamã." 
1Kings15:29 La a Basa sẽn lebg rĩmã, a kʋʋ a Zeroboaam roogã gilli, n ka tol n bas a ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye. Yẽnda kʋ-b-la zãng wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Sɩlo tẽng no-rɛɛs a Akiya togsã." 
1Kings15:30 Yaa a Zeroboaam sẽn beeg n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yikã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b maan a woto." 
1Kings15:31 A Nadaab tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb ninsã fãa a sẽn maanã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
1Kings15:32 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza ne Israyɛll rĩm a Basa vɩɩmã tɛka, b rag n zabda taaba." 
1Kings15:33 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, la a Akiya biig a Basa reeg naam n soog Israyɛll nebã fãa n zĩnd Tɩrsa tẽnga. La yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi la a naase." 
1Kings15:34 Rĩm a Basa maana wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã." 
1Kings16:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Hanani biig a Zehu sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã n yeel-a t'a yeel a Basa yaa: 
1Kings16:2 «Fo rag n yaa nin-zaalg n be Israyɛll nebã sʋka, tɩ mam yãk foom n kɩt tɩ f lebg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naaba. La fo rɩka a Zeroboaam naoore, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã beege, tɩ m sũurã yiki." 
1Kings16:3 Woto yĩnga, mam na n sãama foom a Basa ne f roogã, wa m sẽn dag n sãam a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam roogã to-to wã." 
1Kings16:4 Foom a Basa roogã ned sã n ki tẽng pʋgẽ, baas n na n wãb-a, la a sã n ki weoogẽ, weoogã bõn-yɩgdɩ n na n dɩ-a.»" 
1Kings16:5 A Basa tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã, ne a gãndaalmã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
1Kings16:6 A Basa saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Tɩrsa tẽnga. Yẽnda biig a Ela n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings16:7 A Basa ne a buudã wɛɛngẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n goma ne a Hanani biig a Zehu sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã. La yaa wẽng ning a Basa sẽn maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n kɩt tɩ b sũurã yikã poorẽ. Bala yẽnda maana wẽng wa a Zeroboaam ne a roogã sẽn maan tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbg-bã." 
1Kings16:8 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a yoaablẽ, a Basa biig a Ela lebga Israyɛll rĩmã. La yẽnda rɩɩ a naamã yʋʋm a yiib Tɩrsa." 
1Kings16:9 Israyɛll rĩm a Ela tʋmtʋmd a yembr n dag n be beenẽ t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Zimri, n yaa saar-dãmbã pʋɩ-sʋk naaba. A Zimri dag n baood n na n kʋʋ rĩm a Ela. La wakat-kãng tɩ rĩm a Ela rag n bee balem-naab a Arsa zakẽ wã Tɩrsa n yũud rãam. A yũume hal t'a neng yilimdẽ." 
1Kings16:10 Dẽ, a Zimri wa n kẽe beenẽ n kʋ rĩm a Ela n deeg a naamã. Rẽ tɩ yaa Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a yopoɛɛlẽ." 
1Kings16:11 A Zimri sẽn deeg naamã bal yee, a yikame n kʋ a Basa roogã gilli, n ka bas tɩ rao wall bi-ribl ba a yembr põs ye. Yẽnda kʋ a Basa roagdbã ne a zo-rãmbã fãa." 
1Kings16:12 A Zimri kʋ a Basa roogã fãa wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b no-rɛɛs a Zehu gomã. 
1Kings16:13 La yaa a Basa ne a biig a Ela sẽn waoog wẽn-naands n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sũur yikã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yɩ a woto." 
1Kings16:14 A Ela tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
1Kings16:15 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg a naam tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a yopoe, a Zimri me reega naam Tɩrsa, n dɩ rasem a yopoe. Rẽ tɩ Israyɛll nebã rag n tilga b tãb-sikã Gibeton sẽn yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã soolmã, n na n zab ne Filistẽ nebã." 
1Kings16:16 Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n be zabrã zĩigẽ wã wʋmame tɩ b yetẽ t'a Zimri zãmba rĩmã n kʋ-a. La badaar bala, Israyɛll nebã yãka a Omri sẽn yaa tãb-biisã naabã n kɩt t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã." 
1Kings16:17 A Omri ne Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa yii Gibetõ n kẽng n tɩ gũbg Tɩrsa tẽngã n zab ne-a n na n deeg-a. 
1Kings16:18 A Zimri sẽn mik tɩ b tõog n deega tẽngã, a wudgame n kẽ na-yirã roog ning sẽn tar pãngã pʋgẽ, n bas n ning roogã bugum. La bugmã rɩ-a lame t'a ki." 
1Kings16:19 La rẽ fãa yaa a Zimri sẽn maan sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wã yĩnga. Yẽnda rɩka a Zeroboaam naoor n maan yel-wẽn nins a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maane, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã." 
1Kings16:20 A Zimri tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn dag n baood n na n kʋ a Ela wã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
1Kings16:21 A Zimri kũumã zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã welga taab zĩis a yiibu. Israyɛll neb kẽer dag n datame t'a Ginat biig a Tibni lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, tɩ kẽer me rat t'a Omri yɩ rĩmã." 
1Kings16:22 Neb nins sẽn be a Omri poorẽ wã pãng yɩɩga a Ginat biig a Tibni poorẽ dãmbã, la b kʋ a Tibni t'a Omri lebg Israyɛll rĩmã." 
1Kings16:23 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yembre, la a Omri lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, n dɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yiibu. A Omri rɩ a naamã yʋʋm a yoob Tɩrsa tẽngã." 
1Kings16:24 Dẽ poore, a Omri raa tãngã, wanzuri wakɩ-koeems tus a yoobe, rao a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Semeer nengẽ, n me tẽng tãngã zugu, n pʋd tẽngã yʋʋr tɩ Samaari, wa sẽn dag n so-a tãngã yʋʋrã sẽn yaa a Semeerã." 
1Kings16:25 A Omri maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda maana wẽng n yɩɩd rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn deng-b yẽnda n zĩndã. 
1Kings16:26 Yẽnda manesmã kell n yɩɩ wa a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sũur yik ne-bã. Bala, bãmb pʋʋsa wẽn-naandse." 
1Kings16:27 A Omri tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã, la a gãndaalmã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
1Kings16:28 Rĩm a Omri saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Samaari. La yẽnda biig a Akaab leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings16:29 Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a nii, la a Omri biig a Akaab lebg Israyɛll rĩmã. La a Omri biig a Akaab zĩnda Samaari n dɩ Israyɛll naamã yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu." 
1Kings16:30 A Omri biig a Akaab maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ n yɩɩd rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn deng-b yẽnda n zĩndã. 
1Kings16:31 A Akaab rɩka a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam naoor n maan sẽn yaa wẽnga. La sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd fãa, a kẽng n tɩ rɩka Sɩdõ nebã rĩm a Ɛtball bi-pugl a Zezabɛll n maan a paga, n sak n wõgemd wẽn-naandg a Baall taoor n waoog-a." 
1Kings16:32 A Akaab mee roog a Baall yĩng Samaari, la a me tẽn-kugr zĩ-kãng a yĩnga." 
1Kings16:33 A Akaab peesa ra-lugdg wẽn-poak a Aseera yĩnga. A Akaab maana yɛl a taab sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd Israyɛll rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn deng-b yẽnda n zĩndã. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sũur yiki. 
1Kings16:34 Yaa rĩm a Akaab zamaanẽ, la Betɛll rao a Iyɛll lebs n me Zeeriko tẽngã. A Iyɛll sẽn zĩnig tẽngã yẽbgrã, a bi-kãseng a Abiram kiime. A sẽn me n sɛ n lugl tẽngã kʋɩlemsã, a bi-yao a Seguub kiime. Rẽ kell n yɩɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt t'a Nun biig a Zozoe gomã." 
1Kings17:1 Rao a ye n dag n be t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Eli, n yit Tisbe sẽn be Galaad tẽnga. Yẽnda yeela a Akaab yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã, mam sẽn yaa a soab tʋmtʋmdã, tɩ yʋʋm nins sẽn watã pʋgẽ, meenem ka na n zĩndi, la saag me ka na n ni, hal tɩ mam leb n wa gome.»" 
1Kings17:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Eli yaa: 
1Kings17:3 «Yi ka n kẽng yaang sẽnẽ n tɩ soond Kerit ko-soogã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã neng-taoorã sɛɛga. 
1Kings17:4 Fo na n yũuda ko-soogã koom, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ gãabd wat n kõt foom dɩɩb beenẽ.»" 
1Kings17:5 A Eli loogame, la a maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel-a wã, n tɩ soond Kerit ko-soogã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã neng taoorã sɛɛga." 
1Kings17:6 La yibeoog ne zaabr fãa, gãabdã rag n kẽnd n kõta a Eli buri, ne nemdo, la yẽnda rag n yũuda Kerit ko-soogã koom." 
1Kings17:7 La sẽn wa n kaoos bilfu, ko-soogã koom sɛɛme, bala saag ka tol n ni tẽngã ye." 
1Kings17:8 Rẽ zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Eli n yeel-a yaa:" 
1Kings17:9 «Yik n kẽng Sarepta sẽn be Sɩdõ soolmẽ wã n tɩ zĩndi. Mam kɩtame tɩ pʋg-kõor a yembr sẽn be beenẽ na n dɩlg foom.» 
1Kings17:10 A Eli yikame n dɩk Sarepta sore, la yẽnda sẽn ta tẽngã noore, a yãnda pʋg-kõor sẽn dag n wɩɩsd raado. A Eli boola pʋg-kõorã n yeel-a: «Paga, m kotame tɩ f kẽng n tɩ toog koom bilf ne wamd n wa kõ-m tɩ m yũ.»" 
1Kings17:11 Pʋg-kõorã kẽng n tɩ tooga koomã n wa. A Eli leb n boola pʋg-kõorã n yeel-a yaa: «Mam leb n kotame tɩ f kẽng n tɩ bao rɩɩb bilf n wa kõ-ma.» 
1Kings17:12 Pʋg-kõorã leokame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ m ka leb n tar sag-võr meng ye. Yaa zom sẽn ka yɩɩd nug pʋgẽ bal n be rʋk pʋga, n paas kaam bilf sẽn be lengrẽ. Yãmb sẽn ne mam sẽn wɩɩsd ribli a yiibã, yaa sẽn na n kuil n tɩ segl rɩɩb tɩ maam ne m biigã rɩ la d ki.»" 
1Kings17:13 A Eli leoka pʋg-kõorã yaa: «Ra zoe rabeem ye! Kẽng n kuil n tɩ maan wa fo sẽn yeelã bala. La bũmb ning sẽn be, reng n segl rɩɩb bilf n wa kõ maam, la f yaool n kẽng n tɩ segl foom ne f biigã yĩnga." 
1Kings17:14 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Zom ning sẽn be rʋkẽ wã ka na n sɛ ye. La kaamã sẽn be lengrẽ wã me kõn sɛ, hal tɩ ta daar ning maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kɩt tɩ saagã ni tẽng zugu.› »" 
1Kings17:15 Dẽ, pʋg-kõorã kẽng n tɩ maana wa a Eli sẽn yeel-a wã. La yẽnda ne a zakã rãmba, la a Eli mengã paama rɩɩb n dɩ rasem wʋsgo." 
1Kings17:16 La zomã sẽn dag n be rʋkẽ wã ka tol n sɛ, la kaamã sẽn dag n be lengrẽ wã me ka sɛ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt t'a Eli togsã." 
1Kings17:17 Bõn-kãens fãa zugẽ, pʋg-kõorã biig lʋɩɩ bãaga, la bãagã yɩɩ kɛgeng wʋsgo, tɩ biigã ki." 
1Kings17:18 La pʋg-kõorã yeela a Eli yaa: «Wẽnnaam daoa, yaa bõe beem n be maam ne yãmb sʋka? Yãmb wa n na n kɩtame tɩ m biigã ki, tɩ m tẽeg tɩ m konga ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo?»" 
1Kings17:19 La a Eli yeela pʋg-kõorã t'a wa ne biigã yẽnda nengẽ. Dẽ, a Eli reega biigã pagã nugẽ, n tall-a n dʋ yĩngr doog ning pʋg yẽnda sẽn dag n gãeẽ wã, n gãneg biigã yẽnda gãagã zugu." 
1Kings17:20 A Eli zẽka a koɛɛg n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n sak n maana pʋg-kõ-kãngã mam sẽn sig-a soab yirã wẽnga, halɩ n kɩt t'a biig ki?»" 
1Kings17:21 A Eli gãandame n tẽeg a meng biigã zug naoor a tãab n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam Wẽnnaam, mam kot-y lame tɩ y kɩt tɩ biigã leb n paam vɩɩm!»" 
1Kings17:22 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma a Eli kosgã, n kɩt tɩ biigã vʋʋge." 
1Kings17:23 A Eli talla biigã n sig n kɩs-a a ma, n yeele: «Gese, fo biigã vɩɩme!»" 
1Kings17:24 Pʋg-kõorã yeela a Eli yaa: «Moasã, mam bãngame tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam ned meng-menga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yãmb sẽn togsdã yaa sɩda.»" 
1Kings18:1 La wakat wʋsg loogr zugẽ, warã sẽn sɩng tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Eli yaa: «Kẽng rĩm a Akaab nengẽ, tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ saagã ni tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu.»" 
1Kings18:2 Dẽ, a Eli kẽngame n na n tɩ vẽneg a meng ne rĩm a Akaabe." 
1Kings18:3 Komã rag n paama pãng Samaari tẽngã pʋgẽ. Dẽ, rĩm a Akaab kɩtame tɩ b bool a balem-naab a Abdyaas t'a wa. La a Abdyaas yaool n dag n yaa ned sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋsgo." 
1Kings18:4 Wakat ning a Zezabɛll sẽn wa n kʋʋd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, a Abdyaas rag n peega no-rɛɛsdb koabg n tɩ solg-b pis-nunu tãng bogd a yiib pʋgẽ, n kẽnd n kõt-b rɩɩb ne koom." 
1Kings18:5 Rĩm a Akaab yeela a Abdyaas yaa: «Wa tɩ d na n gilga tẽngã gilli. D na n kẽnga ko-bundum zĩisẽ, ne ko-soayẽ wã, tɩ daar ninga, d yãta mo-maas zĩig n paam yamd n wa kõ d wiidã ne d bõensã, tɩ b ra ki ye. Woto, ka lebd n yɩ tɩlɛ tɩ d kʋ rũms kẽer ye.»" 
1Kings18:6 Dẽ, bãmb pʋɩɩ tẽngã, n welg taab n na n gilgi. Rĩm a Akaab rɩka sor a yembre, t'a Abdyaas rɩk sor a yembre." 
1Kings18:7 A Abdyaas sẽn wa n be sorã zug n kẽndã, a sega a Eli n bãng tɩ yaa yẽnda. Dẽ, yẽnda wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽnga, n yeele: «M soaal a Eli, yaa yãmb bɩ?»" 
1Kings18:8 La a Eli leok-a lame: «N-yẽe, yaa maam! Kẽng n tɩ yeel f soaal a Akaab tɩ maam a Eli bee ka!»" 
1Kings18:9 A Abdyaas yeela a Eli yaa: «Mam beega bõe tɩ y rat n yõk-m n kõ rĩm a Akaab t'a kʋ-ma? 
1Kings18:10 M wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ zĩiga, bɩ soolem ka be mam soaal a Akaab sẽn ka tʋm tɩ b tɩ gẽes yãmb ye. La nebã sã n yeel tɩ yãmb ka be beenẽ, rĩmã kɩtdame tɩ tẽngã bɩ soolmã nin-kãensã wẽene, n yeel tɩ b sɩd ka yãnd yãmb ye." 
1Kings18:11 Yãmb sẽn yeel maam tɩ m kẽng n tɩ yeel m soaalã tɩ yãmb bee ka wã," 
1Kings18:12 mam sã n loog n bas yãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã tõe n wa rɩka yãmb n kẽng zĩig ning mam sẽn ka mi. Dẽ, mam sã n kẽng n tɩ togs a Akaab tɩ yãmb bee ka, tɩ bãmb wa bao yãmb n konge, b na n kʋʋ maam. Mam yaool n zoeta Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem hal mam yãadem wakate." 
1Kings18:13 M soaala, b ka togs yãmb bũmb ning mam sẽn maan wakat ning a Zezabɛll sẽn wa n kʋʋd Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã la? Mam solga Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛsdb koabg tãng bogd a yiib pʋgẽ, m solg-b-la pis-nunu, n kẽnd n kõt-b rɩɩb ne koom." 
1Kings18:14 Moasã, tɩ yãmb yet maam tɩ m kẽng n tɩ yeel a Akaab tɩ yãmb a Eli bee ka! Mam sã n tɩ yeel a woto, rĩm a Akaab na n kʋʋ maam!»" 
1Kings18:15 La a Eli yeel-a lame: «Mam yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn vɩ wã tʋmtʋmda, la mam wẽenda ne bãmb yʋʋre, tɩ rũndã, mam na n kẽnga a Akaab nengẽ.»" 
1Kings18:16 A Abdyaas kẽng n tɩ sega a Akaab n togs-a yellã fãa. Woto, a Akaab kẽng n na n tɩ sega a Eli." 
1Kings18:17 Rĩm a Akaab sẽn yã a Eli, a yeela a Eli yaa: «Ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã namsdẽ wã wɛ?»" 
1Kings18:18 La a Eli leok-a lame: «Ka maam n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã namsdẽ ye. Yaa yãmb ne y ba wã roog neb n kɩt tɩ b namsdẽ. Bala yãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã sakre, n tũud a Baall wẽn-naandse." 
1Kings18:19 Dẽ wã, bɩ y kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa wa tigim taab mam nengẽ Karmell tãngã zugu. La y bool Baall no-rɛɛsdb kobs-naas la pis-nu wã, ne wẽn-poak a Aseera no-rɛɛsdb kobs-naasã sẽn naagd a Zezabɛll n dɩtẽ wã me tɩ b wa.»" 
1Kings18:20 Rĩm a Akaab tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool Israyɛll nebã fãa, la a kɩt tɩ b tigim no-rɛɛsdbã Karmell tãngã zugu." 
1Kings18:21 La a Eli kolga nebã fãa n yeele: «Yãmb na n saad n yeebda goabg la rɩtg hal tɩ ta rabʋre? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n yaa Wẽnnaam, bɩ y tũ-ba, la Baall sã n yaa Wẽnnaam, bɩ y tũ-a.» La nebã ka leok yẽnda tɩ bũmb ye." 
1Kings18:22 A Eli yeela nebã yaa: «Maam m yembr bal n yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs sẽn kete, la Baall no-rɛɛsdbã yaa bãmb kobs-naas la pis-nu." 
1Kings18:23 Bɩ y tall lols a yiib n wa kõ-do, tɩ Baall no-rɛɛsdbã yãk loalg ning bãmb sẽn date, n kʋ-a n beese, n dogl a nemdã raad zugu, la b ra ning bugum ye. La mam me na n yõka a yembrã n maan a woto me n palg raad zugu n ka ning bugum ye." 
1Kings18:24 Dẽ poore, bɩ y pʋʋs ne yãmb wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, tɩ mam me pʋʋs ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. La Wẽnnaam ning sẽn na n leok-a n kɩt tɩ bugum sigã, yaa wẽnnaam-kãng n yaa Wẽnnaam meng-menga.» La nebã fãa yeelame tɩ b sakame." 
1Kings18:25 Dẽ, a Eli yeela Baall no-rɛɛsdbã yaa: «Yãmb sẽn yaa wʋsg n yɩɩdã yĩnga, bɩ y yɩ pipi n yãk loalg a yembr n kʋ n maan maoongo, la y pʋʋs ne y wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, la y ra ning bugum ye.»" 
1Kings18:26 Bãmb dɩka loalg b sẽn kõ bãmbã n maneg maoongã yĩnga. La bãmb pʋʋsa ne a Baall yʋʋr yibeoog hal tɩ ta wĩnto-sʋka. Bãmb dag n kelemdame n yetẽ: «Baalle! Leok-d wɛ!» La bãmb ka wʋm koɛɛga, la ned ka leok me ye. Bãmb dag n bee tẽn-kugrã bãmb sẽn maanã taoor n yɩgd n tiimsdẽ." 
1Kings18:27 Sẽn ta wĩnto-sʋka, a Eli yaala bãmb n yeele: «A Baall sẽn yaa wẽndã yaa, bɩ y zẽk y koees n kelem n bool-a. Bool-y-yã-a, tɩ tõeeme t'a tagsdame, wall a tʋmdame, ka rẽ bɩ a toga sore. Tõeeme meng t'a gõeeme. Mao-y t'a neke.»" 
1Kings18:28 Bãmb zẽka b koeesã n kelem ne pãnga, la b maand wa b sẽn minim n maandẽ wã. Bãmb wã b mens ne sʋʋse, la b kõs b mens ne kãn hal tɩ zɩɩm yita." 
1Kings18:29 Wĩnto-sʋkã loogr poore, b sɩngame n gom n ta zaabr sẽn yaa maoongã maaneg wakatã. La bãmb ka tol n wʋm koɛɛg tɩ b gomd leokre, la bãnd me ka zĩnd ye." 
1Kings18:30 Dẽ, a Eli yeela nebã fãa yaa: «Wa-y n kolg-y maam!» La nebã fãa kolga a Eli. Woto, a Eli manega Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã b sẽn dag n siigã n lebs n me." 
1Kings18:31 A Eli rɩgsa kug piig la yiib wa sẽn zems a Zakoob kambã sõore, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom n yeelã: «B na n boola foom t'a Israyɛlle.»." 
1Kings18:32 Dẽ, a Eli talla kug-bãmb n me tẽn-kugr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩnga. Yẽnda tuu bok n gilg tẽn-kugrã. La bokã zulum tõe n deega rʋg-bɛd a yiib koom." 
1Kings18:33 A Eli manega raad n palg tẽn-kugrã zugu, la a kʋ loalgã n bees-a n dogl raadã zugu." 
1Kings18:34 La a Eli yeelame yaa: «Pids-y ko-yʋy a naasã koom n wa kiig maoongã ne raadã zugu.» La a leb n yeel tɩ b tall n wa ne yɛsa, la b maana a woto. La a Eli yeelame tɩ b leb n maan a woto naoor a tãabẽ soaba, la b maaname." 
1Kings18:35 Koomã zoeeme n gilg tẽn-kugrã, la b pidsa bokã me ne koom." 
1Kings18:36 Maoongã maaneg wakat sẽn ta, Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛs a Eli kolgame n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kɩt tɩ b bãng rũndã tɩ yaa yãmb la Israyɛll nebã Wẽnnaam, la mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda. La y kɩt tɩ b bãng tɩ bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn maandã, yaa yãmb n yeel maam tɩ m maane." 
1Kings18:37 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, leok-y-ma! Leok-y-m tɩ nin-bãmbã bãng tɩ yãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n yaa Wẽnnaam, la yaa yãmb n tõe n kɩt tɩ b tek yam.»" 
1Kings18:38 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bugmã sigame n dɩ maoongã ne raadã la kugã, ne tomã, la a fõog koomã sẽn dag n pid bokã." 
1Kings18:39 Nebã fãa sẽn yã bõn-kãnga, b wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽng n yeele: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n yaa Wẽnnaam, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam.»" 
1Kings18:40 A Eli yeelame tɩ b yõg Baall no-rɛɛsdbã, la b ra bas tɩ b ned ba a yembr põs ye. Dẽ, b yõg-b lame, la a Eli tall-b lame n sig tãngã n kẽng n tɩ kood Kizõ ko-soogã noore." 
1Kings18:41 A Eli yeela rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Lebg-y n tɩ rɩ-y la y yũ, bala mam wʋmda saag kɛleng rãamde.»" 
1Kings18:42 La a Akaab kẽng n na n tɩ rɩɩme la a yũ. A Eli rʋʋ Karmell tãngã zugu, n yĩgimdi, n gõd a mengã t'a nengã ta a rũmã sʋka." 
1Kings18:43 La a Eli yeela a rakõorã yaa: «M kos tɩ f rʋ n ges ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ.» La a rakõorã rʋʋme n ges n yeele: «Mam ka ne bũmb ye.» A Eli tʋm-a lame t'a tɩ ges naoor a yopoe. 
1Kings18:44 La naoor a yopoe soabã, rakõorã lebg n wa yeelame yaa: «Mam nee sawad-bil sẽn ka yɩɩd nug-giulg sẽn zẽkd ko-kãsengã zugu.» A Eli yeela a rakõorã yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ togs a Akaab t'a segl a wiidã n zomb n lebg n sig tãngã n sɩng zoeese, tɩ saagã ra wa gɩdg a kuilb ye.»" 
1Kings18:45 La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, zĩigã lebga libsgu, tɩ sebgã sɩng fugbu, la sa-kẽeng n sɩng niibu. Dẽ, a Akaab kẽ a saarã n zoe n tɩ rɩk Yiizreyɛll sore." 
1Kings18:46 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ a Eli pãnga, la yẽnda rɩka a sẽbdg n sẽbg a sɛɛg n lʋɩ a Akaab taoor n zoe n ta Yiizreyɛll tẽngã noore." 
1Kings19:1 Rĩm a Akaab tɩ togsa a pag a Zezabɛll bũmb nins fãa a Eli sẽn maanã, ne a sẽn kʋ Baall no-rɛɛsdbã fãa to-to ne sʋʋgã." 
1Kings19:2 A Zezabɛll tʋma ned t'a tɩ yeel a Eli yaa: «Beoog woto wẽnde, tɩ mam sã n ka maan foom wa fo sẽn maan Baall no-rɛɛsdbã, bɩ wẽnnaam-dãmbã ra bas-m ye.»" 
1Kings19:3 A Eli sẽn wʋm woto, a yikame n zoe n na n fãag a yõore. La yẽnda zoe n taa Bɛɛr-Seba sẽn yaa Zʋʋda soolmã, la a basa a rakõorã beenẽ." 
1Kings19:4 A Eli mengã kẽna daar tõr we-raoogã pʋga, la a tɩ zĩnda tɩɩg tẽngre, la a kosa kũum n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, moasã wã, mam yaa n yɛɛme. Reeg-y m vɩɩmã tɩ mam ka yɩɩd m yaab-rãmbã ye.»" 
1Kings19:5 A Eli gãanda tɩɩgã tẽngr n gũsi. La malɛɛk n wa n sɩɩs-a n yeele: «Yik n dɩ.» 
1Kings19:6 A Eli sẽn gese, a mikame tɩ bur sẽn wʋm kug-tʋʋls zut rɩg a sɛɛgẽ, tɩ koom ne yubl tẽga. La a rɩɩme la a yũ, n lebg n gãande." 
1Kings19:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã leb n waa a Eli nengẽ naoor a yiibẽ soaba, n sɩɩs-a n yeele: «Yik n dɩ! Bala, fo na n kẽna kẽn-woko.»" 
1Kings19:8 Dẽ, a Eli yikame n dɩ la a yũ. La rɩɩb ning yẽnda sẽn dɩ wã kõo yẽnda pãng t'a kẽn rasem pis-naase, la yʋnd pis-naase. La yẽnda taa Horɛɛb sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tãngã." 
1Kings19:9 La beenẽ, a Eli kẽe tãngã bokẽ n gãand be yʋn-kãnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne yẽnda n yeele: «Eli, bõe la fo be ka n maandẽ?»" 
1Kings19:10 La a Eli leokame: «Mam tʋma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yĩng ne m sũurã fãa, la Israyɛll nebã basa yãmb kaoolã, la b luba y tẽn-kugã, la b kʋ yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã ne sʋʋga. Yaa maam m yembr bal n ket n vɩ, la b baooda maam me n dat n kʋ.»" 
1Kings19:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Eli yaa: «Yi tãngã bokẽ n tɩ yals maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tãngã zugu, n ges mam sẽn na n looge!» Dẽ, sob-kãseng n yiki, n pãrg tãmsã n kɩt tɩ pĩisã wãad Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka be sebgã pʋg ye. Sebgã loogr poore, tẽn-digimdg n zĩndi, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka be tẽn-digimdgã pʋg ye." 
1Kings19:12 La tẽn-digimdgã loogr poore, bugum n pʋgle, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka be bugmẽ wã ye. Bugmã loogr poore, a Eli wʋma pemsem sẽn fʋʋsd rãamde." 
1Kings19:13 A Eli sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, a rɩka a fuugã n lud a neng n yi n yals tãngã bok noore, la a wʋma koɛɛg sẽn gomd ne yẽnda n yetẽ yaa: «Eli! Bõe la fo be ka n maandẽ?»" 
1Kings19:14 A Eli leokame: «Mam tʋma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yĩng ne m sũurã fãa, la Israyɛll nebã basa yãmb kaoolã, la b pãba y tẽn-kugã n wã, la b kʋ yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã ne sʋʋga. Yaa maam m yembr bal n ket n vɩ, la b baooda maam me n dat n kʋ.»" 
1Kings19:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Eli yaa: «Lebg n tũ we-raoogã sor sẽn teesd Damaas sẽnẽ wã, la fo sã n ta Damaase, bɩ f pʋdg a Azayɛll zug naam kaam t'a lebg Siiri rĩmã." 
1Kings19:16 La f pʋdg a Nimsi biig a Zehu naam kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã. La f pʋdg Abɛll-Mehola rao a Safat biig a Eliize kaam t'a reeg f zĩig n lebg no-rɛɛsa. 
1Kings19:17 Ned ning sẽn na n põs a Azayɛll sʋʋgã, a Zehu n na n kʋ-a, la sẽn põs-a a Zehu sʋʋgã, a Eliize n na n kʋ-a." 
1Kings19:18 La Israyɛll pʋgẽ, mam na n basa raop tus a yopoe tɩ b põse. Yaa neb nins sẽn ka yĩgimd Baall taoore, la b ka mogs-a wã.»" 
1Kings19:19 A Eli yii be n looge, la a tɩ mika a Safat biig a Eliize t'a tar niig sẽn balg yiib-yiib zĩis piig la a yiib n kooda. La a Eliize rag n bee ne piig la a yiibẽ soabã. A Eli tũu yẽnda nengẽ n dɩk a fuug n lob a Eliize zugu." 
1Kings19:20 A Eliize basa a niigã, la a wudg n pʋgl a Eli n yeele: «M kotame tɩ y kõ-m sor tɩ m kuil n tɩ pʋʋs m ba ne m ma la m wa!» A Eli leokame: «Kẽng la f lebg n wa! Bala mam ka maan-f bũmb ye.»" 
1Kings19:21 A Eliize sẽn yi a Eli nengẽ, a kẽng n tɩ yõga niig a yiib n maan maoongo, la a rɩka nag-koodsã raad n dʋg b nemdã n kõ nebã tɩ b wãbe, la a yik n tũ a Eli n lebg a tʋmtʋmda." 
1Kings20:1 Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad tigma a tãb-biisã fãa, ne a nanambs pis-tã la a yiibã sẽn dag n be ne-a wã, la a rag n tara wiid ne Saar-dãmba. Yẽnda ne a tãb-biisã yiime n tɩ gũbg Samaari tẽngã n na n zab ne-a." 
1Kings20:2 Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad tʋma neb Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab nengẽ. 
1Kings20:3 Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad kɩtame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛll rĩmã yaa: «Rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad yetame: Yãmb wanzuri wã ne y sãnemã yaa maam n so. Y pagbã ne y ra-sãmbã yaa maam n so.» 
1Kings20:4 La Israyɛll rĩmã leok-a lame n yeele: «Mam zu-soab la m dĩma, yaa wa yãmb sẽn yeelã bala. Maam ne mam sẽn tarã fãa yaa yãmb n so.»" 
1Kings20:5 B sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã lebg n wa yeelame yaa: «Ad a Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn yeele: Mam yeelame tɩ b wa togs foom tɩ f rɩk f wanzuri wã ne f sãnemã, la f pagbã ne f kambã n kõ maam." 
1Kings20:6 Beoog woto wẽnde, bãng-y tɩ mam na n tʋma m tʋmtʋmdbã fo nengẽ. Bãmb na n kẽe fo na-zakã n veese, la b vees fo tʋmtʋmdbã roto, n wʋk bũmb ning fãa sẽn tar yõod ne foomã n looge.»" 
1Kings20:7 Woto, Israyɛll rĩmã boola soolmã kãsem-dãmbã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «M kos tɩ yãmb mengã ges tɩ nin-kãngã baooda tõnd ne wẽnga! Bala, yẽnda tʋma neb tɩ b wa yeel maam tɩ m dɩk m pagbã ne m kambã, la m wanzuri wã ne m sãnemã n kɩs tɩ b wa kõ-a. La mam ka zãgs ye.»" 
1Kings20:8 La Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã ne nebã fãa yeela rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Da kelg-y-yã-a ye, la ra sak-y n maan-y wa a sẽn yeelã me ye.»" 
1Kings20:9 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab yeela a Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y m soaal a Bɛn-Hadaad tɩ mam saka pipi kosgã, la moasã wã yẽ, m ka sak ye.» A Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã lebg n kẽng n tɩ togsa a Bɛn-Hadaad koe-kãnga." 
1Kings20:10 A Bɛn-Hadaad leb n tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Mam sã n ka kɩt tɩ Samaari tẽngã tom sãeege, tɩ bũmb ka kell sẽn sekd tãb-biis nins sẽn tũud maamã nug pidbu, bɩ wẽnnaam-dãmbã sɩbg maam ne sɩbg-kãsenga.»" 
1Kings20:11 Israyɛll rĩmã leokame n yeele: «Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y-yã a Bɛn-Hadaad tɩ sẽn dabd-a zabr ka pẽgd a meng wa sẽn kẽng-a n tɩ zab n tõog n lebg n wa ye.» 
1Kings20:12 B sẽn wa n na n togs a Bɛn-Hadaad koe-kãngã wã, rẽ t'a rag n zĩi ne rĩm-dãmb zãn tẽngr n yũud rãam. Woto, a yeela a tãb-biisã yaa: «Bɩ ned kam fãa rɩk a zab-teedo.» Dẽ, bãmb sũu tãp n teedg n tees Samaari tẽngã." 
1Kings20:13 La wakat-kãng bala, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs n wa n yeel Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Fo nee kʋʋngã sẽn tondã? Rũndã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog-ba, dẽ, fo na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› »" 
1Kings20:14 Rĩm a Akaab sokame: «Na n tũu ne ãnda nug tɩ d paam tõogre?» La no-rɛɛsã leokame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yaa soda-kom-bɩɩsã soolem nanambsã sẽn yãkã, la mam na n tũnug n kɩt tɩ y tõoge.» Rĩm a Akaab sokame: «Ãnda n tog n deng n sɩng zabrã?» No-rɛɛsã leb n leokame: «Yaa yãmba!»" 
1Kings20:15 Woto, Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab tigma soda-kom-bɩɩsã n sõde, la b sõorã rag n yaa neb kobessi la pis-tã la a yiibu. Dẽ poore, yẽnda tigma Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa n sõd n mik tɩ b sõorã yaa tãb-biis tus a yopoe." 
1Kings20:16 Rĩm a Akaab ne a tãb-biisã yii wĩnto-sʋk n na n tɩ zabe. Wakat-kãnga, rẽ t'a Bɛn-Hadaad ne nanambs pis-tã la a yiibã sẽn wa n na n sõng yẽnda wã rag n zĩi zãnã tẽngr n yũud rãam tɩ b nems yilimdẽ." 
1Kings20:17 Israyɛll soda-kom-bɩɩsã n deng yi. A Bɛn-Hadaad tʋmame tɩ b tɩ ges n bãng yɛlã sẽn yaa to-to, la b togs-a lame tɩ neb n yi Samaari n watẽ." 
1Kings20:18 A Bɛn-Hadaad yeelame: «B sã n wat n na n baoo laafɩ, bɩ y yõg-b vɩɩse. La b sã n wat n na n baoo zabr me, bɩ y yõg-b vɩɩse!»" 
1Kings20:19 Soda-kom-bɩɩsã yii tẽngã n lʋɩ taoor tɩ Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa yaool n pʋgda. 
1Kings20:20 Bãmb ned kam fãa tõog n kʋʋ ned a yembre, la Siiri nebã rag n zoetame tɩ Israyɛll nebã pʋgd n digd-ba. Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad zomba wed-moaag n tũ wed-rʋʋdb kẽer n zoe." 
1Kings20:21 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab yiime n kʋ wiidã n sãam saar-dãmbã, la a tõoga Siiri nebã ne tõog-kãsenga." 
1Kings20:22 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã kẽng n tɩ yeela Israyɛll rĩmã yaa: «Paam-y raoodo, la y tags n ges y sẽn na n maanega, bala, yʋʋmdã sã n vẽke, Siiri rĩmã na n lebg n wa zaba ne yãmba.»" 
1Kings20:23 Siiri rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb yeel-a lame: «Israyɛll nebã Wẽnnaamã yaa tãms Wẽnnaam. Yaa rẽ yĩng la b sẽn tõog tõndã. Dẽ wã, wa-y tɩ d kẽng tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, n tɩ zab ne-b n ges d kõn tõog-ba." 
1Kings20:24 Rẽ yĩngã, ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Reeg-y nanam-bãmb fãa naamã, la y kɩt tɩ kombɛɛmb led b zĩisẽ." 
1Kings20:25 Bɩ yãmb mengã yãk tãb-biis sõor sẽn zem sẽn ki-bã, la y bao wiid ne saar-dãmb sõor sẽn zem pĩnd dãmbã, tɩ d kẽng tẽn-nabdrẽ wã n tɩ zab ne-ba. Woto, d na ges d sã n kõn tõog-ba.» La a Bɛn-Hadaad kelga b saglgã, la a maana wa b sẽn yeelã." 
1Kings20:26 La yʋʋmdã sẽn vẽke, rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad tigma Siiri rãmbã n kẽng Afɛk n na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã." 
1Kings20:27 Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab me tigma a tãb-biisã, n kõ-b rɩɩbo, tɩ b yi n na n seg Siiri nebã. Israyɛll nebã tãb-sik rag n bee Siiri rãmbã neng taoore. La Israyɛll nebã ka wʋsg ye, b sõorã rag n ka yɩɩd bʋʋs bãg a yiib ye, tɩ Siiri nebã yaool n yɛdg n pid zĩigã." 
1Kings20:28 Wẽnnaam daoã leb n waa Israyɛll rĩmã nengẽ n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Siiri nebã yetame tɩ mam yaa tãms Wẽnnaam, tɩ m ka tãn-lond Wẽnnaam ye. Woto yĩngã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog kʋʋn-kãngã yãmb sẽn ne wã, la yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
1Kings20:29 Israyɛll nebã ne Siiri nebã yalsa beenẽ rasem a yopoe tɩ b nensã tees taaba. La rasem a yopoe wã daare, bãmb yika zabrã, la Israyɛll nebã kʋʋ Siiri tãb-biis tus koabg daar a yembr pʋgẽ." 
1Kings20:30 La sẽn kell-bã zoe n tuda Afɛk tẽngã sẽnẽ. La lalgã lʋɩ n põda neb tus pisi la a yopoe n kʋ. Wakat-kãnga, rẽ tɩ rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad dag n zoeeme n kẽ tẽngã pʋga, n tɩ kẽ roog yaang ro-pʋgẽ n soonde." 
1Kings20:31 A Bɛn-Hadaad kug-zĩidbã yeel-a lame yaa: «Tõnd wʋmame tɩ b yetẽ tɩ Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã tara nimbãan-zoeer wʋsgo. Rẽ wã yĩnga, wa-y tɩ d sẽgen sũ-sãang futu, la d loe d zutã ne tãando, n yi n kẽng Israyɛll rĩmã nengẽ, tɩ daar ninga, a na bas yãmb n ka kʋ-y ye.»" 
1Kings20:32 Dẽ, b baoo sũ-sãang fut n yeelge, la b loe b zutã tãando, n kẽng Israyɛll rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Bɛn-Hadaad yõkd-y-la sɛɛga, n kotẽ tɩ y bas-a la y ra kʋ-a ye.» La a Akaab sokame: «Rẽ yĩnga, a Bɛn-Hadaad ket n vɩɩme la? Ad a yaa mam saam-biiga.»" 
1Kings20:33 Bãmb sẽn mik tɩ yellã rat n zemsame, b yeelame: «A Bɛn-Hadaad yaa yãmb saam-biig wɛ!» La a Akaab yeelame tɩ b tɩ tall-a n wa. A Bɛn-Hadaad yi a sẽn dag n solgẽ wã n kẽng a Akaab nengẽ. La a Akaab kɩtame t'a kẽ n naag yẽnda a saarã pʋga." 
1Kings20:34 A Bɛn-Hadaad yeela a Akaab yaa: «Mam na n lebsa yãmb tẽms nins mam ba wã sẽn dag n dees yãmb ba wã nengẽ wã. Woto, yãmb tõe n kẽnda Damaas n koosd y teed wa mam ba wã me sẽn dag n maand Samaari wã.» Dẽ, rĩm a Akaab yeelame: «Maam a Akaab na n maana kaool ne yãmba, la m yaool n kõ-y lohorem tɩ y looge.» Bãmb sẽn maan kaoolã n sɛ, a Akaab kõ-a-la lohorem t'a looge." 
1Kings20:35 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela b no-rɛɛsdbã ned a yembr t'a yeel a to wã yaa: «M kot-f lame tɩ f wẽ-ma!» La a yembrã zãgsame t'a ka na n wẽ-a ye." 
1Kings20:36 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a yembrã yeelame: «Gese, fo sã n yi ka, gɩgemd n na n tek n yõk foom n kʋ, fo sẽn ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã yĩnga.» La a to wã sẽn sɩd yi beenẽ, gɩgemd n tek n yõk-a n kʋ." 
1Kings20:37 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-kãng leb n yãnda ned a to n yeel-a: «M kotame tɩ f wẽ-ma!» La yẽnda wẽ-a lame n pogle. 
1Kings20:38 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã kẽng n tɩ yalsa rĩmã sẽn na n loog sor ningã zugu. La a rag n luda a nengã ne peende. 
1Kings20:39 La rĩmã wa n loogda beenẽ, tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã kelem n yeel-a yaa: «N-na! Mam dag n kẽnga zabre, la ned n yi zabrã zĩigẽ n tall ned n wa kɩs maam n yeele: Gũ nin-kãngã t'a ra zoe ye. Fo sã n bas-a t'a meneme, yaa foom la b na n kʋ n lebse. Ka rẽ, bɩ f yao wanzuri ligd-koeems tus a tã!" 
1Kings20:40 La mam wa n basa raoã gũub n maand tʋʋm a taaba, la a zoe n menemame.» Tɩ Israyɛll rĩmã leok-a yaa: «Foom n kao f meng bʋʋdo.»" 
1Kings20:41 La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã pilga peendã n bas a nengã, la Israyɛll rĩmã bãngame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã ned a yembre." 
1Kings20:42 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã yeela Israyɛll rĩmã yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Fo sẽn bas ned ning mam sẽn kãab t'a tog n kiime wã t'a põsã, b na n kʋʋ foom n lebse, la b kʋ fo nebã n led yẽnda nebã zĩigẽ.› »" 
1Kings20:43 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩmã lebg n kuila a yir Samaari ne sũ-sãang la sũ-puugri." 
1Kings21:1 Bõn-kãensã loogr zugẽ, ad bũmb ning sẽn zĩndi. Yiizreyɛll rao a ye yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Nabot n dag n tar a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgo, la pʋʋgã rag n pẽe Samaari rĩm a Akaab na-yirã." 
1Kings21:2 Dẽ, a Akaab yeela a Nabot yaa: «Kõ maam f reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã tɩ m maan m zẽed zĩiga, bala, a pẽe ne mam zakã. La mam na n kõo foom reezẽ tɩɩs pʋ-sõng a to n led a zĩigẽ. Fo sã n leb n dat me, mam na n yaoo foom ligdi, wa sẽn zems pʋʋgã ligd sẽn yaa to-to.»" 
1Kings21:3 La a Nabot leoka a Akaab yaa: «Abada! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ra sak tɩ m dɩk m yaab-rãmbã zĩis n kõ yãmb ye.» 
1Kings21:4 Yiizreyɛll rao a Nabot sẽn yeel tɩ yẽnda ka na n dɩk a yaab-rãmbã zĩis n kõ a Akaabã yĩnga, a Akaab lebg n kuil a yir ne sũ-sãanga, la sũ-puugri. Yẽnda tɩ kẽ a roogẽ n gãande, n wẽnemd a neng n tees lalgã n ka sak n dɩ rɩɩb ye." 
1Kings21:5 A Akaab pag a Zezabɛll wa n sok-a lame yaa: «Yaa bõe sũ-sãang n tar-y tɩ y ka rat n dɩ rɩɩbo?» 
1Kings21:6 La rĩmã leokame yaa: «Mam goma ne Yiizreyɛll dao a Nabot n yeel-a t'a kõ-m a pʋʋgã tɩ m da, wall a sã n data, m na n kõ-a-la reezẽ tɩɩs pʋ-sõng a to n led a zĩigẽ. La a leoka maam t'a ka na n kõ maam a pʋʋgã ye!»" 
1Kings21:7 Dẽ, rĩm a Akaab pag a Zezabɛll yeel-a lame yaa: «Ka yãmb la Israyɛll rĩm la! Yik-y n dɩ-y-yã, la y maan sũ-noogo. Mam na n deega Yiizreyɛll dao a Nabot pʋʋgã n kõ yãmba.»" 
1Kings21:8 Dẽ, a Zezabɛll gʋlsa sɛb rĩm a Akaab yʋʋr yĩnga, n ning a Akaab nug-tikr bãndã sɛbã zutu. La yẽnda tʋma sɛbã tɩ b tɩ kɩs kãsem-dãmbã ne kug-zĩidbã sẽn be tẽng ning a Nabot sẽn beẽ wã." 
1Kings21:9 Ad goam nins a Zezabɛll sẽn gʋls a sɛbã pʋse: «Moon-y no-loeere, tigm-y nebã n kɩt t'a Nabot zĩnd b taoore." 
1Kings21:10 La y yãk nin-yaals tɩ b zĩnd n tees-a n dõd-a n yeel t'a tʋʋsa Wẽnnaam, la a tʋʋs rĩmã me. Rẽ poore, yiis-y-yã-a tẽngã kɩreng n lob-a kug t'a ki.»" 
1Kings21:11 Dẽ, a Nabot sẽn be tẽng ningã nebã, ne kãsem-dãmbã la kug-zĩidbã maana wa a Zezabɛll sẽn yeel-b tɩ b maanã. B maana wa a sẽn gʋls sɛbã pʋs n tʋm bãmbã." 
1Kings21:12 Woto, bãmb moona no-loeerã tigr n kɩt t'a Nabot zĩnd nebã taoore." 
1Kings21:13 Dẽ, nin-yaals a yiibã wa n zĩnd n teesa a Nabote, n dõd-a nebã nifẽ n yeele: «A Nabot tʋʋsa Wẽnnaam, la a tʋʋs rĩmã.» La b yiisa a Nabot tẽngã kɩreng n lob-a kug t'a ki." 
1Kings21:14 B tʋmame tɩ b tɩ togs a Zezabɛll tɩ b loba a Nabot kug t'a ki. 
1Kings21:15 A Zezabɛll sẽn wʋm tɩ b loba a Nabot kug t'a ki, a yeela rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Yik-y n tɩ reeg-y Yiizreyɛll rao a Nabot pʋʋgã n sooge. Yẽnda sẽn dag n zãgsd t'a ka na n koos a pʋʋgã ne yãmbã, moasã wã, a Nabot ka leb n vɩ ye, a kiime.»" 
1Kings21:16 Rĩm a Akaab sẽn wʋm woto, a yikame n kẽng n na n tɩ reeg Yiizreyɛll dao a Nabot pʋʋgã n sooge." 
1Kings21:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne Tisbe rao a Eli sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã n yeel-a yaa: 
1Kings21:18 «Yik n tɩ seg Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab sẽn be Samaari wã. Yẽnda be a Nabot pʋʋgẽ wã, n dat n deeg pʋʋgã n sooge." 
1Kings21:19 Kẽng n tɩ yeel-a tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Akaabe, fo kʋʋ neda, la f reeg a sẽn so. La maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ zĩig ning baasã sẽn leg a Nabot zɩɩmã, zĩ-kãng bala, baas n na n leg fo me zɩɩmã.»" 
1Kings21:20 Dẽ, a Eli sẽn kẽngã, rĩm a Akaab yeel-a lame yaa: «M bɛyã, foom n leb n wa n mik maam?» La a Eli leokame: «N-yẽe! Maam n leb n wa n mik yãmba. Bala, yãmb koosa y meng ne wẽngã n maan sẽn ka sõama Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
1Kings21:21 Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed paam-fo. Mam na n pɩɩsa f roogã zãnga, mam na n kɩtame t'a Akaab yagensã menem zãnga, sã n yaa yamba, wall burkĩn sẽn be Israyɛll pʋgẽ." 
1Kings21:22 Mam na n kɩtame t'a Akaab roogã lebg wa a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam roogã, la wa a Akiya biig a Basan roogã. Bala, fo maaname tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋga, n kɩt tɩ m sũurã yiki." 
1Kings21:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma a Zezabɛll me yell n yeel t'a na n kiime tɩ baas wãb a nemdã Yiizreyɛll lalgã sɛɛga. 
1Kings21:24 A Akaab roogã ned sã n ki tẽng pʋgẽ, baas n na n wãb-a, la a roogã ned sã n ki weoogẽ, yɩbrend n na n dɩ-a.»" 
1Kings21:25 Ned nan ka sak n koos a meng ne wẽng n maan sẽn ka sõama Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wa a Akaab sẽn maanã ye. La yaa yẽnda pag a Zezabɛll n kɩt t'a maan woto. 
1Kings21:26 Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa wẽng hal wʋsg n yɩɩd fãa. A tũu wẽn-naandse, n waoog-b wa Amoor-dãmbã me sẽn dag n waoogd wẽn-naands tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã rig-b n deeg tẽngã." 
1Kings21:27 Rĩm a Akaab sẽn wʋm Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Eli sẽn gomã, a pãrsa a futu, n yeelg sũ-sãang futu, n loe noore. La a rag n gãee ne fu-kãense. La a sã n kẽnda, a kẽnda soaa-soaa." 
1Kings21:28 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne Tisbe rao a Eli n yeel-a yaa:" 
1Kings21:29 «Fo yãnda a Akaab sẽn sik a meng to-to mam taoorã bɩ? Yẽnda sẽn sik a meng mam taoorã yĩnga, mam ka na n kɩt tɩ yel-beedã paam-a a sẽn ket n vɩ wã wakat ye. La yaa wakat ning yẽnda biig sẽn wat n dɩt naamã la mam na n kɩt tɩ yel-beedã paam a roogã.»" 
1Kings22:1 Maana yʋʋm a tãab tɩ zabr ka leb n zĩnd Israyɛll nebã ne Siiri-rãmbã sʋk ye. 
1Kings22:2 Yʋʋm a tãabẽ soabã pʋgẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat kẽnga Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab nengẽ." 
1Kings22:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩmã soka a kug-zĩidbã yaa: «Yãmb miime tɩ Ramot sẽn be Galaadã yaa tõnd soolem! La yaa bõe tɩ tõnd zĩ n ka maand baa fʋɩ n na n tɩ reeg tẽngã Siiri rĩmã nugẽ?»" 
1Kings22:4 Rĩm a Akaab yeela Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat yaa: «Fo na n tũu maam n kẽng Ramot sẽn be Galaadã n tɩ zab bɩ?» A Zozafat leoka Israyɛll rĩmã n yeele: «N-yẽe! Maam ne yãmb yaa bũmb a yembre. Mam neb yaa yãmb nebã, mam wiid yaa yãmb wiidi.»" 
1Kings22:5 Dẽ, a Zozafat leb n yeela rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Moasã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y reng n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ges bãmb sẽn na n yeel tɩ bũmb ninga.»" 
1Kings22:6 Woto, Israyɛll rĩmã tigma a no-rɛɛsdb sõor sẽn kolg kobs-naase, n sok-b yaa: «Mam tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Ramot sẽn be Galaadã bɩ, bɩ m ka tog n kẽnge?» La no-rɛɛsdbã leokame: «Kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne-ba. Zu-soabã na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog-ba.»" 
1Kings22:7 La a Zozafat sokame: «Dẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛs a to ka leb n be ka tɩ tõnd tõe n kɩt t'a sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gese?»" 
1Kings22:8 Woto, Israyɛll rĩmã leoka a Zozafat yaa: «Nin-yend bal n ket tõnd sẽn tõe n kɩt t'a sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gese, la mam yaool n kisa no-rɛɛs-kãnga, bala a zɩ n togs maam koe-noog ye, yaa koe-beed bala. Yaa a Yimla biig a Miise.» A Zozafat yeelame: «Rĩma, da gom-y woto ye!»" 
1Kings22:9 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩmã boola a sõgen a yembr n yeel-a t'a tɩ bool a Yimla biig a Miise t'a wa tao-tao." 
1Kings22:10 La wakat-kãng tɩ Israyɛll rĩmã ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat yeelga b naam futu, tɩ b ned kam fãa zao a naam geere, n zĩ zĩ-vɩʋʋg ning sẽn pẽ Samaari tẽngã noorã, tɩ no-rɛɛsdbã fãa togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam bãmb taoore." 
1Kings22:11 No-rɛɛsdbã sʋka, no-rɛɛs a Sedesiyaas sẽn yaa a Kenana biigã rag n kɩtame tɩ b maan kut yɩɩl n kõ-a, la a yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Fo na n talla yɩɩn-bãmbã n tã Siiri nebã n kʋ zãnga.»" 
1Kings22:12 La no-rɛɛsdb a taabã fãa me rag n togsda pĩnd-n-bãngr goam a boto, n yetẽ: «Kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne Ramot sẽn be Galaadã tɩ y na n paama tõogre. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ rĩmã tõog-ba.»" 
1Kings22:13 Ned ning sẽn kẽng n na n tɩ bool a Miise wã yeela a Miise yaa: «Ade, no-rɛɛsdb a taabã fãa naaga taab n togsd rĩmã gom-noodo. M kotame tɩ y mao tɩ yãmb me sẽn na n gomã zems ne bãmb dẽndã. Togs-y rĩmã gom-nood bala!»" 
1Kings22:14 A Miise leok-a lame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n togs maam bũmb ningã bal la m na n togse.»" 
1Kings22:15 A Miise sẽn ta rĩmã nengẽ, rĩmã sok-a lame: «Miise, tõnd tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Ramot sẽn be Galaadã bɩ? Bɩ d ka tog n kẽnge?» La a Miise leokame yaa: «Kẽng-y tɩ y na n tõogame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ rĩmã tõoge.»" 
1Kings22:16 Woto, rĩmã yeela a Miise yaa: «Miise, fo ratame tɩ mam yeel foom naoor a wãna, tɩ f wẽen tɩ f ka na n leb n togs maam bũmb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, tɩ yaool n ka sɩda?»" 
1Kings22:17 A Miise leokame: «Mam yãnda Israyɛll nebã sẽn sãeegd tãmsã zutu, wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩma! La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: Nin-kãensã ka tar soaal ye, bɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yir ne laafɩ.»" 
1Kings22:18 Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩmã yeela a Zozafat yaa: «Mam dag n ka pĩnd n yeel foom sɩda? A Miise zɩ n togs maam pĩnd-n-bãngr goam sẽn yaa sõama ye. A togsda maam koe-beed bala.»" 
1Kings22:19 Dẽ, a Miise yeelame yaa: «Beneere, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! Mam yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn zao b naam geerã zugu, tɩ saasẽ dãmbã karg n gũbg-b goabg la rɩtgo." 
1Kings22:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: ‹Ãnda n na n tɩ belg a Akaab t'a kẽng n tɩ zab ne Ramot sẽn be Galaadã tɩ b kʋ-a?› La yõwã soab yeelame tɩ woto, tɩ yõwã soab yet tɩ woto." 
1Kings22:21 Dẽ, sɩɩg n yi n yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n yeele: ‹Maam n na n kẽng n tɩ belg-a.› Tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sok-a yaa: ‹Fo na n belg-a-la wãn-wãna?› »" 
1Kings22:22 Sɩɩgã leokame: «Mam na n kẽngame n tɩ kɩt tɩ no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã togs-a zĩrẽ.» Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Fo sã n sɩd maan a woto, fo na n belg-a lame n tõoge. Dẽ wã, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ maan a woto!»" 
1Kings22:23 La a Miise leb n yeelame: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ zĩrẽ sɩɩg kẽ yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã fãa, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n kãaba yãmb kãab-beedo.»" 
1Kings22:24 La wakat-kãng bala, a Kenana biig a Sedesiyaas kolg n wẽ a Miise pɛk n yeele: «Dabʋr la Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã yi mam nengẽ n wa gomd ne foom?»" 
1Kings22:25 A Miise leokame: «Wakat ning fo sẽn wat n saad n zoet n baood roog yaang ro-pʋg n na n soondã la f na n bãnge.» 
1Kings22:26 Israyɛll rĩmã yeela a tʋmtʋmd a yembr yaa: «Yõk a Miise n tall n tɩ kɩs tẽngã naab a Amo ne rĩmã biig a Zoaase. 
1Kings22:27 La f yeel-b tɩ rĩmã yeelame tɩ b kẽes rao-kãngã bi-bees roogo, la b ra kõ-a rɩɩb tɩ sã n ka bur-koeems ne koom bala, hal tɩ m kẽng la m lebg n wa ne tõogre.»" 
1Kings22:28 A Miise leoka rĩm a Akaab yaa: «Yãmb sã n kẽng n lebg n wa ne tõogre, dẽnd ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ mam gom ye.» A Miise leb n yeelame yaa: «Bɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa kelge!»" 
1Kings22:29 Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne Ramot sẽn be Galaadã. 
1Kings22:30 Israyɛll rĩm a Akaab yeela Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat yaa: «Mam na n teema fut n kẽng zabrã tɩ b ra bãng-m ye, la yãmb tõe n yeelga y naam futã.» Dẽ, Israyɛll rĩmã maana wa a sẽn yeelã n kẽng zabrã." 
1Kings22:31 La mikame tɩ Siiri rĩmã rag n yeela a saar-dãmbã nanambs pis-tã la a yiibã yaa: «Da bao-y ned baa a yembr ye. Zab-y ne Israyɛll rĩmã bala.» 
1Kings22:32 Saar-dãmbã nanambs sẽn yãnd a Zozafate, bãmb tẽeme tɩ yaa Israyɛll rĩmã, la b kẽngame n na n tɩ zab ne-a. La a Zozafat kelmame n yeele: «Wa-y n fãag-y-ma!»" 
1Kings22:33 Saar-dãmbã nanambs sẽn mik tɩ ka Israyɛll rĩmã, b loog n bas-a lame." 
1Kings22:34 La bãmb ned a yembr yãaga a tãp n tão yaar bala, la peemdã tɩ tũnuga Israyɛll rĩmã kut fuugã sogb zĩigẽ n kõs-a. La rĩmã yeela ned ning sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda saarã pʋg n get saarã yellã yaa: «Wẽnemd n bas zabrã n leb kɩrenga, bala, mam paama sãmpogre.»" 
1Kings22:35 Zabrã wɩnga wʋsg badaare, la b kell n gãda Israyɛll rĩmã t'a yas saarã pʋg n tees Siiri nebã. La Israyɛll rĩmã kii badaar zaabre. Rĩmã sãmpogrã zɩɩm daaga saarã pʋga." 
1Kings22:36 Wĩntoogã kõom sasa, b moona tãb-sikã zãng pʋgẽ, n yeel tɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a tẽngẽ." 
1Kings22:37 Woto, Israyɛll rĩmã kiime, la b talla a kũumã n kẽng Samaari n tɩ mume." 
1Kings22:38 B tɩ peka saarã Samaari bãkã pʋga, la baas n tɩ leg zɩɩmã, tɩ pʋg-yoaadb tɩ so a koomã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n togsã." 
1Kings22:39 A Akaab tʋʋm a taabã, ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã, la na-zak ning yẽnda sẽn me n nags ne wobd yẽna, ne tẽms ninsã fãa a sẽn me wã gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
1Kings22:40 A Akaab saka a saam-dãmba, la a biig a Akaziyaas n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings22:41 Yaa a Akaab sẽn wa n lebg Israyɛll rĩm tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, la a Aaza biig a Zozafat lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
1Kings22:42 A Zozafat sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu, la a rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pisi la a nu. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Azuuba, n yaa a Sili bi-pugla." 
1Kings22:43 A Zozafat rɩka a ba a Aaza naoor n ka bʋdg ye. Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. 
1Kings22:44 La baoosg zãnga, b ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Nebã rag n ket n kẽnd n maanda maand la b yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã." 
1Kings22:45 A Zozafat kɩtame tɩ laafɩ zĩnd yẽnda ne Israyɛll rĩmã sʋka. 
1Kings22:46 A Zozafat tʋʋm a taabã ne a gãndaalmã tʋʋmã, la zabã a sẽn zabã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
1Kings22:47 Maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ yoaadbã sẽn zĩnd hal a Zozafat ba a Aaza zamaanẽ wã, sẽn dag n ket n be tẽngã pʋgã, a Zozafat menes-b-la zãnga." 
1Kings22:48 Edom tẽngã rag n ka tar dĩm ye. Yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã n yãk komber t'a tɩ soog bãmba. 
1Kings22:49 Rĩm a Zozafat kɩtame tɩ b maan Tarsɩɩs koom kogl-bɛdã buudu, tɩ b na n kẽng Ofɩɩr tẽng n tɩ bao sãnem, la bãmb ka tõog n ta ye, bala koom kogendã tek n sãama Esɩyõ-Gebɛɛre." 
1Kings22:50 A Akaab biig a Akaziyaas yeela rĩm a Zozafat yaa: «Mam datame tɩ mam tʋmtʋmdbã tũ yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã n kẽng ne koom kogendã.» La rĩm a Zozafat ka sak ye. 
1Kings22:51 A Zozafat saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag a ba-rãmbã, a yaab a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Zoram n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
1Kings22:52 A Akaab bi-ribl a Akaziyaas reega Israyɛll rĩungã n dɩ naam Samaari. Wakat-kãnga, rẽ tɩ yaa Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yopoɛɛlẽ. A Akaziyaas rɩɩ Israyɛll naamã yʋʋm a yiibu." 
1Kings22:53 A Akaziyaas maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda maana wa a ba ne a ma sẽn dag n maanã, n kẽn wa a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kẽes Israyɛll nebã kongr pʋgã." 
1Kings22:54 Yẽnda wõgemda Baall taoor n waoog-a, wa yẽnda ba wã sẽn dag n maanã, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sũur yiki." 
2Kings1:1 Rĩm a Akaab kũumã zugẽ, Moaab nebã zãgsame tɩ Israyɛll nebã kõn leb n soog-b ye." 
2Kings1:2 Samaari tẽngã pʋga, rĩm a Akaazɩya yi a na-yirã yĩngr doogã zug n lʋɩ n pogle. Dẽ, yẽnda tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ sok Ekrõ nebã Wẽnnaam a Baall-Zebuub n ges yẽnda na n põsa a poglgã pʋgẽ bɩ, bɩ a ka na n põse." 
2Kings1:3 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela Tisbe rao a Eli yaa: «Yik n tɩ seg Samaari rĩmã sẽn tʋm neb ninsã n yeel-b yaa: ‹Yaa Wẽnnaam n ka be Israyɛll bɩ, bɩ yaa bõe tɩ yãmb dabd n na n tɩ sok Ekrõ nebã Wẽnnaam a Baall-Zebuub n gese?›" 
2Kings1:4 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ yaa: ‹Gãag ning zug fo sẽn gãe wã, fo ka na n yik ye, fo na n kii beenẽ.› » A Eli sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a loogame." 
2Kings1:5 Rĩm a Akaazɩya sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã lebg n leba a Akaazɩya nengẽ, la a sok-b lame tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b lebg n watẽ." 
2Kings1:6 Dẽ, bãmb leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Rao a yembr n tek n seg tõndo, la a yeela tõnd yaa: Lebg-y n leb-y rĩm ning sẽn tʋm-a yãmbã nengẽ, n tɩ yeel-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: Rẽ yĩnga, yaa Wẽnnaam n ka be Israyɛll bɩ, bɩ yaa bõe tɩ fo tʋm tɩ b tɩ sok Ekrõ nebã Wẽnnaam a Baall-Zebuub n gese? Bõn-kãng yĩnga, fo kõn tol n leb n yik f gãagẽ wã ye. Fo na n kiime.»" 
2Kings1:7 A Akaazɩya sokame yaa: «Rao ning sẽn seg-a yãmb n gom woto wã yaa a wãn-wãna?» 
2Kings1:8 Bãmb leoka yẽnda yaa: «Yaa rao sẽn yer fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdo. La a sẽbga a sɛɛgã ne gãong sẽbdga.» Rĩm a Akaazɩya yeelame: «Yõwã ka ned a to n zʋʋg Tisbe rao a Eli ye!» 
2Kings1:9 Rĩm a Akaazɩya tʋma tãb-biis pis-nu naab ne a tãb-biis pis-nu wã a Eli nengẽ. Tãb-biis pis-nu naabã kẽnga a Eli nengẽ, n tɩ mik t'a zĩ tãng zugu, la a yeela a Eli yaa: «Wẽnnaam daoa, rĩmã yeelame tɩ y sig n wa!»" 
2Kings1:10 La a Eli leoka tãb-biis naabã yaa: «Mam sã n sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam daoa, bɩ bugum yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ foom ne f tãb-biis pis-nu wã!» La bugum yii yĩngr n sig n dɩ bãmb fãa." 
2Kings1:11 Rĩm a Akaazɩya leb n tʋma tãb-biis pis-nu naab a to ne a tãb-biis pis-nu. La tãb-biis pis-nu na-kãng me sẽn ta, a yeela a Eli yaa: «Wẽnnaam daoa, rĩmã yeelame tɩ y sig tao-tao n wa!»" 
2Kings1:12 A Eli leoka yẽnda yaa: «Mam sã n sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam daoa, bɩ bugum yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ foom ne f tãb-biis pis-nu wã!» La bugum yii yĩngr n sig n dɩ bãmb fãa." 
2Kings1:13 Rĩm a Akaazɩya leb n tʋma tãb-biis pis-nu naab a to naoor a tãabẽ soaba, la yẽnda me tãb-biis pis-nu wã tũ-a lame. Tãb-biis naab a tãabẽ soabã kẽngame, la yẽnda sẽn ta, a yĩgimda a rũmã zug a Eli taoore, n yõk-a sɛɛg n yeele: «Wẽnnaam daoa, mam kot-y lame tɩ y zoe maam ne neb pis-nu-kãensã nimbãanega, la y ra kʋ-d ye!" 
2Kings1:14 Ade, mam bãngame tɩ bugum n yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ pipi tãb-biis pis-nunu nanambs a yiibã ne b tãb-biisã. Rẽ wã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y zoe m nimbãanega, la y fãag m vɩɩmã!»" 
2Kings1:15 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela a Eli t'a sig n tũ-a, la a ra zoe rabeem ye. La a Eli sigame n tũ yẽnda n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ." 
2Kings1:16 A Eli sẽn ta, a yeela rĩmã yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Fo sẽn tʋm tɩ b kẽng n tɩ sok Ekrõ nebã wẽn-naandg a Baall-Zebuubã, rat n yeelame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n ka be Israyɛll tẽngã pʋg tɩ b tõe n sok-b n ges bɩ?› Bõn-kãng yĩnga, fo kõn tol n leb n yik f gãagẽ wã ye. Fo na n kiime!»" 
2Kings1:17 Dẽ, rĩm a Akaazɩya kii wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a Eli togsã. La a Akaazɩya sẽn dag n ka paam bi-riblã yĩnga, yẽnda yao a Zoram n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat biig a Zoram sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ." 
2Kings1:18 Rĩm a Akaazɩya tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings2:1 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ sɩlmandã rɩk a Eli n loog saasẽ wã, rẽ tɩ yaa a Eli ne a Eliize sẽn yi Gilgall n tũud taab n kẽnda." 
2Kings2:2 A Eli yeela a Eliize yaa: «M kotame tɩ f pa kaanẽ, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma maam tɩ m kẽng hal Betɛlle.» A Eliize leoka a Eli yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, la ne yãmb sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ mam kõn pa ka n bas yãmb ye!» Dẽ, bãmb kell n tũu taab n kẽng Betɛlle." 
2Kings2:3 No-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis n dag n be Betɛlle. Bãmb yii n sega a Eliize n sok-a yaa: «Fo bãngame tɩ rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zẽka f soaal a Eli t'a loog saasẽ?» A Eliize leokame tɩ b sĩnd tɩ yẽnda me bãngame." 
2Kings2:4 A Eli yeela a Eliize yaa: «Eliize, m kotame tɩ f lebg ka, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma maam tɩ m kẽng Zeeriko.» La a Eliize yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, la ne yãmba, tɩ mam kõn lebg n bas yãmb ye!» Dẽ, bãmb tũu taab n ta Zeeriko." 
2Kings2:5 No-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis sẽn dag n be Zeeriko wã kolga a Eliize n sok-a yaa: «Fo bãngame tɩ rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zẽka f soaal a Eli t'a loog saasẽ?» A Eliize leokame yaa: «Sĩnd-y tɩ mam me bãngame.»" 
2Kings2:6 A Eli yeela a Eliize yaa: «Eliize, m kot-f lame tɩ f pa ka, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma maam tɩ m kẽng Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga.» La a Eliize yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, la ne yãmb sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ mam kõn pa ka n bas yãmb ye!» Woto, bãmb b yiibã kell n tũu taab n dɩk sore." 
2Kings2:7 No-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis sʋka, no-rɛɛsdb pis-nu n yi n yals a Eli ne a Eliize taoor hal yɩɩga, la bãmb b yiibã rag n yasa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore." 
2Kings2:8 La a Eli yeega a fuugã n wẽ koomã, la koomã welga goabg la rɩtgo, la bãmb b yiibã fãa tũu taab n pɩʋʋg tẽn-koɛɛngã n looge." 
2Kings2:9 La bãmb sẽn ta kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, a Eli yeela a Eliize yaa: «Kos maam bũmb ning fo sẽn dat tɩ m maan n kõ-fo, sẽn deng b sẽn na n zẽk maam tɩ m loog n bas foomã.» A Eliize leokame: «Mam kotame tɩ y kõ maam sɩɩg ning yãmb sẽn tarã naoor a yiibu.»" 
2Kings2:10 A Eli yeela a Eliize yaa: «Fo sẽn kot bũmb ningã yaa toogo, la fo sã n tõog n yãnd b sẽn na n dɩk maam n loog n bas foomã, fo na n paama bũmb ning fo sẽn kotã. La fo sã n ka yã mam loogrã, fo kõn paam bõn-kãng ye.»" 
2Kings2:11 Bãmb sẽn tũud taab n kẽnd la b sõsda, bugum saar ne bugum wiid n wa n kẽ bãmb b yiibã sʋka. La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, sɩlmand n wa n dɩk a Eli n loog saasẽ." 
2Kings2:12 A Eliize sẽn yãnd a Eli sẽn loogdã, a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: «M ba, m ba! Israyɛll saar-dãmb ne b wiidi!» La yẽnda ka leb n yãnd a Eli ye. Dẽ, yẽnda gãda a fuug n tak n kẽeg a yiibu." 
2Kings2:13 La a Eliize zõondame n dɩk fuugã a Eli sẽn bas tɩ lʋɩ wã, n lebg n kuiisẽ. La yẽnda sẽn ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, a yalsame." 
2Kings2:14 A Eliize rɩka fuugã a Eli sẽn bas tɩ lʋɩ wã n wẽ koomã n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa a Eli Wẽnnaamã bee yɛɛnẽ?» Dẽ, yẽnda me wẽe koomã, t'a welg zĩis a yiibu, goabg la rɩtgo, la yẽnda pɩʋʋgame n looge." 
2Kings2:15 No-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis nins sẽn be Zeeriko tẽngã noorã sẽn yãnd a Eliize sẽn maanã, b yeelame: «A Eli pãngã siga a Eliize zugu!» La bãmb kẽng n tɩ sega a Eliize, n wõgemd a taoor n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
2Kings2:16 Bãmb yeela a Eliize yaa: «Ade, tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã sʋka, gãndaad pis-nu n be be. Nin-bãmb tõe n kẽngame n tɩ bao yãmb soaal a Eli, tɩ tõeeme tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã rɩk-b lame n kẽng tãng ning zugu, wall tãng long ning pʋga!» La a Eliize yeel-b lame tɩ b ra tʋm ned ye." 
2Kings2:17 Bãmb kell n pẽdga a Eliize. Dẽ, a Eliize yeelame tɩ b tʋm-b tɩ b kẽnge. Woto, bãmb tʋma neb pis-nu wã tɩ b kẽng n tɩ bao a Eli hal rasem a tãabo, la b ka yãnd-a ye." 
2Kings2:18 La bãmb lebg n waa Zeeriko n mik t'a Eliize ket beenẽ. A Eliize yeel-b lame: «Mam dag n ka yeel yãmb tɩ y ra kẽng sɩda?» 
2Kings2:19 Zeeriko tẽngã neb wa n yeela a Eliize yaa: «Tẽn-kãngã pʋg vɩɩm yaa noogo. Karen-saamba, yãmb meng la sẽn ne wã la! Yaa tẽngã koom bal n ka sõama, la tẽn-gãongã ka sakd bɩle ye.»" 
2Kings2:20 A Eliize yeel-b lame tɩ b tall la-paall n wa, la b bao yamsem n ning laagã pʋga. Dẽ, bãmb talla laagã ne yamsmã n wa." 
2Kings2:21 La a Eliize yiime n kẽng ko-bundmã sẽnẽ, la a loba yamsmã koomã pʋg n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam yɩlga ko-kãngã t'a lebg ko-sõngo. Ned kõn leb n yũ ko-kãngã n ki ye. La tẽn-gãongã na n leb n saka koodo.»" 
2Kings2:22 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, koomã lebga yɩlemd hal tɩ ta rũndã wa a Eliize sẽn yeelã." 
2Kings2:23 A Eliize yii Zeeriko n dabd Betɛlle. La yẽnda sẽn be sorẽ n kẽnda, kom-bãooneg n yi tẽngã pʋg n paoog yẽnda n yeele: «Zu-kõogã, looge! Zu-kõogã, looge!»" 
2Kings2:24 La a Eliize wẽnemdame n ges kambã, n kãab-b wẽng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. Dẽ, rigd-n-yĩids a yiib n yi tʋgrẽ n yõg kamb pis-naas la a yiib bãmb sʋkã n kʋ." 
2Kings2:25 A Eliize sẽn yi Betɛlle, a kẽnga Karmell tãngã n tɩ zĩndi, n yi beenẽ n lebg n leb Samaari." 
2Kings3:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, la a Akaab biig a Zoram me lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽnga. Yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yiibu." 
2Kings3:2 La a Zoram maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Baoosgo, yẽnda wẽngã maaneg ka ta a ba wã ne a ma wã sẽn dag n maanã ye. Bala, yẽnda pãba a ba wã sẽn dag n vigl kugr ning n kõ a Baallã fãa n wã." 
2Kings3:3 Baoosg zãnga, yẽnda kell n maana yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã. La a ka tol n bas yel-wẽn-kãens maaneg ye." 
2Kings3:4 Moaab rĩm a Mesa dag n yaa gʋʋn-gʋʋnda. La yʋʋmd fãa, yẽnda rag n yaooda Israyɛll dĩmã yaoodo. Rag n yaa pe-ribli tus-koabga, ne pe-raad tus-koabga, ne b kõbdã sẽn ka wõrse." 
2Kings3:5 Rĩm a Akaab sẽn wa n ki wã, Moaab rĩmã zãgsame tɩ yẽnda ka na n leb n yao Israyɛll dĩmã yaoodã ye." 
2Kings3:6 Dẽ, rĩm a Zoram yii Samaari n saag n sõd Israyɛll nebã fãa." 
2Kings3:7 Rĩm a Zoram sẽn lebg n kuili, a tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ yeel Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat yaa: «Moaab rĩmã kɩɩsa mam noore. Yãmb na n sak n tũu maam n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Moaab nebã bɩ?» Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat leokame n yeele: «Mam na n wa tũu yãmb tɩ d kẽnge. Maam ne yãmb yaa bũmb a yembre, mam nebã yaa yãmb nebã, mam wiidã yaa wa yãmb wiidi.»" 
2Kings3:8 Rĩm a Zozafat leb n yeelame: «Yaa so-bʋg la tõnd na n tũ n kẽng zabrã?» La rĩm a Zoram yeel-a lame tɩ yaa Edom we-raoogã sore. 
2Kings3:9 Israyɛll dĩmã ne Zʋʋda rĩmã, n paas Edom dĩmã tũu taab n na n kẽng zabrã. Bãmb kẽna rasem a yopoe. La bãmb dɩka so-gõdem-gõdem, la koom wa n ka leb n be nebã ne rũmsã sẽn tũud bãmbã sẽn na n yũ ye." 
2Kings3:10 Woto, Israyɛll dĩmã yeelame: «Kayto! Sẽn-Ka-Saab peega tõnd d tãabã sẽn yaa rĩm-dãmbã n na n wa kõ Moaab nebã.»" 
2Kings3:11 La Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat sokame: «Rẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛs ba a yembr ka be ka tɩ tõnd tõe n kɩt t'a sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gese?» Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã tʋmtʋmd a yembr leokame: «A Safat biig a Eliize sẽn dag n tũud a Eli n sõngd-a wã n be ka.»" 
2Kings3:12 Rĩm a Zozafat yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne a Eliize, la b gomda ne-a.» Woto, Israyɛll dĩmã ne a Zozafat n paas Edom dĩmã tũu taab n kẽng a Eliize nengẽ."
