2Kings3:13 A Eliize yeela Israyɛll dĩmã yaa: «Mam toor ka be ne yãmb ye! Kẽng-y yãmb ba wã ne y ma wã no-rɛɛsdb nengẽ.» Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã yeela a Eliize yaa: «Ayo, m ka na n kẽng be ye! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab talla tõnd d tãabã n na n wa kõ Moaab rãmbã tɩ b kʋ.»" 
2Kings3:14 A Eliize leokame: «Mam wẽenda ne Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn vɩ wã, mam sẽn pʋʋsd-a soabã, tɩ sã n ka Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat yĩnga, mam kõn kelg yãmba, la mam kõn wẽneg n ges-y meng ye.»" 
2Kings3:15 A Eliize kell n yeelame: «Moasã, kẽng-y n tɩ tall-y yʋʋm n wa.» La yʋʋmã sẽn wa n yɩɩndẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab pãngã siga a Eliize zugu." 
2Kings3:16 A Eliize yeelame: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ y sig ko-soogã pʋg n tu bogd yãmb sẽn tõe tɛka." 
2Kings3:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ yãmb ka na n yãnd sebgo, wall saag ye. La kʋɩl-koɛɛn-kãngã na n pida ne koom tɩ yãmb ne y rũmsã yũ." 
2Kings3:18 La bãng-y tɩ woto nan ka baa fɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ y tõog Moaab nebã. 
2Kings3:19 Yãmb na n sãama b tẽms nins sẽn tar pãngã ne b tẽn-bɛdã. Yãmb na n kɛɛ b tɩ-rɩtsã fãa, la y yẽd b bulsã sẽn bund koomã, la y wʋk kug n dʋʋg b pʋtã pʋse, n sãam-ba.»" 
2Kings3:20 Beoogã sẽn vẽege, sẽn zems maoong maaneg wakate, ade, koom n yi Edom tẽngã sẽnẽ n wa pid tẽn-gãongã zãnga." 
2Kings3:21 Wakat-kãnga, Moaab nebã sẽn wʋm tɩ rĩm-dãmb a tãabã wat n na n zaba ne bãmbã, b tigma neb nins fãa yʋʋm sẽn sek tɩ bob zab-teedã, tɩ b fãa kẽng n tɩ yals toadgẽ wã." 
2Kings3:22 Dẽ, Moaab nebã yika yibeoog pĩnda, wakat ning sõorã sẽn puk n yãgd koomã zugã, la b yãame tɩ koomã yaa miuug wa zɩɩm." 
2Kings3:23 Woto, bãmb yeelame: «Ad-y yaa zɩɩm! Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã zaba taab n kʋ taaba. Haya! Moaab nebã, wa-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zɛ b teedã.»" 
2Kings3:24 La Moaab nebã sẽn ta Israyɛll nebã tãb-sikẽ wã, Israyɛll nebã yikame n zab ne-b n tõog-b tɩ b zoe. La Israyɛll nebã ne b poorẽ dãmbã kell n pʋgl-b lame n kẽ b tẽngẽ wã n kʋ-b zãnga." 
2Kings3:25 Israyɛll nebã sãama tẽmsã, la b ned kam fãa rɩka kugri, n lob Moaab nebã pʋ-sõama wã pʋs tɩ pidi. La b yẽda bãmb ko-bundsã zĩis fãa, n kɛ b tɩ-rɩtsã fãa n lubi. Rag n yaa Kɩɩr-Haresɛt tẽngã bal n dag n keta. Dẽ, neb nins sẽn zabd ne loobsã gũbga tẽngã n zab ne-a." 
2Kings3:26 Moaab rĩmã sẽn mik tɩ zabrã yɩɩda a pãnga, a peega raop kobs-yopoe sẽn zãad zabr sʋʋse, tɩ b na n wẽdg ne pãnga, sẽn na n yɩl n tõog n ta Edom dĩmã nengẽ, la b ka tõog ye." 
2Kings3:27 Woto, Moaab rĩmã rɩka a bi-ribl-kãsengã sẽn dag n tog n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum lalgã zugu. Dẽ, bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã sũy sãam wʋsgo, la b lebg n basa Moaab rĩmã n kuili." 
2Kings4:1 Daar a yembre, no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biig a ye pag wa a Eliize nengẽ n kelem n yeel-a yaa: «Mam sɩdã sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdã kiime, la yãmb miime t'a rag n yaa ned sẽn zoet Wẽnnaam. A rag n tara ned a ye samde, la sam-soabã waame n dat n yõg mam kom-dibli a yiibã n tɩ maan yembse.»" 
2Kings4:2 La a Eliize yeela pagã yaa: «Bõe la f rat tɩ m maan n kõ-fo? Wilg maam fo sẽn tar bũmb ning f roogã pʋga.» Pagã leokame: «Mam ka tar bũmb ye. Yaa kaam bilf bal la m tar tɩ be yir ne tʋko.» 
2Kings4:3 Woto, a Eliize yeel-a lame: «Kẽng f yagsã fãa nengẽ n tɩ kos rʋg-vɩɩdo, la f sã n na n kose, bɩ f kos rʋgd wʋsgo." 
2Kings4:4 Fo sã n lebg n ta yiri, bɩ foom ne f kambã kẽ roogẽ, n lebs roogã noor n page. La f rɩk kaamã n kiig rʋgdã fãa pʋse, tɩ sẽn pid-bã, bɩ f lebs bãmb kɛɛnga.»" 
2Kings4:5 Pagã basa a Eliize n looge. La yẽnda ne a kambã kẽng n tɩ kẽe roogẽ wã n page, la kambã rag n dɩgsda rʋgdã n kɩt b ma wã t'a kiigd kaamã." 
2Kings4:6 Rʋgdã fãa wa n pidame, la pagã yeela a biigã t'a kõ-a rʋk t'a kiig kaamã, la a biigã yeel-a lame tɩ rʋg-vɩʋʋg ka leb n ketẽ ye. Dẽ, kaamã sẽn dag n bundã yalsame." 
2Kings4:7 Pagã kẽngame n tɩ togs Wẽnnaam daoã bũmb ning sẽn maanã. La Wẽnnaam daoã yeel-a lame t'a kẽng n tɩ koos kaamã n yao a samdã, la a rɩk sẽn kellã tɩ yẽnda ne a kambã rɩtẽ." 
2Kings4:8 Daar a yembre, a Eliize rag n pɩʋʋgda Sunem tẽngã n loogdẽ, la pag a ye n dag n be tẽn-kãng n yaa nin-kãsenga, la a pẽdga a Eliize t'a wa sig yẽnda yirã t'a kõ-a rɩɩbo. Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne badaare, a Eliize sã n wa n tũud tẽn-kãng n loogdẽ, a sigda pagã zakẽ n dɩ la a looge." 
2Kings4:9 La pagã wa n yeela a sɩdã yaa: «Ges-y-yã, ad-y rao ning sẽn sigd-a tõnd yirã wakat fãa wã yaa Wẽnnaam ned sẽn yaa pʋ-peelem soaba." 
2Kings4:10 Dẽ wã, wa-y tɩ d me ro-bil doogã zugu, n ning gãaga, la taable, ne goeele, n paas fɩtl doagendga. Woto, a sã n mi n wa sig tõndo, a tõe n kẽe beenẽ.»" 
2Kings4:11 Dẽ, daar a yembre, a Eliize wa n siga beenẽ, la yẽnda kẽe yĩngr doogẽ wã n na n vʋʋse." 
2Kings4:12 A Eliize yeela a rakõor a Geyaazi t'a bool Sunem pagã. La a Geyaazi kẽng n tɩ bool-a lame t'a wa. 
2Kings4:13 La a Eliize yeela a Geyaazi t'a sok pagã yaa: «Fo namsda tõnd yĩng wʋsgo, bõe la fo rat tɩ d maan n kõ-fo? Fo ratame tɩ m kos bũmb rĩmã nengẽ, wall tãb-biis naabã nengẽ, n kõ-f bɩ?» Pagã yeelame: «Ayo! Mam bee ne m nebã, la ka bũmb n paoog-m ye.»" 
2Kings4:14 A Eliize soka a Geyaazi yaa: «Bõe la tõnd tõe n maan n kõ pagã?» A Geyaazi yeelame: «Bũmb sẽn be, yaa t'a ka tar biig ye. La a sɩdã me yaool n kʋʋlame.»" 
2Kings4:15 A Eliize yeela a Geyaazi t'a bool pagã t'a wa. La a Geyaazi bool-a lame t'a wa ta n yals roogã noore. 
2Kings4:16 A Eliize yeela pagã yaa: «Vẽer woto wẽnde, tɩ fo bugda bi-ribla.» Dẽ, pagã yeelame: «Sɩd bɩ, m kẽem sõngo? Wẽnnaam neda, da-y belg-y-m ye!»" 
2Kings4:17 Sɩd me, pagã wa n dɩka pʋga, la sẽn vẽk yʋʋmde, a roga bi-ribla, wa Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize sẽn dag n yeel-a wã." 
2Kings4:18 Biigã bɩɩme. La daar a yembre, a baaba wã sẽn wa n be ne bõn-koaadl tigsdbã, biigã yiime n kẽng a nengẽ." 
2Kings4:19 La biigã yeela a baaba yaa: «M zug wɛɛ! M zug wɛɛ!» A ba wã yeela a rakõorã t'a tall-a n tɩ kɩs-a a ma. 
2Kings4:20 Woto, rakõorã talla biigã n tɩ kɩs-a a ma. La biigã pa a ma wã naoẽ hal n tãag wĩnto-sʋka, la a maana kaalem." 
2Kings4:21 La pagã talla biigã n dʋ yĩngr doogã n gãneg-a Wẽnnaam daoã gãag zugu, la a lebs roogã noor n pag biigã pʋgẽ, la a bas n yi." 
2Kings4:22 Pagã boola a sɩdã n yeel-a yaa: «Mam kotame tɩ y yãk rakõapã ned a yembr t'a tall bõn-yãang n wa yãag-m tɩ m zoe n ta Wẽnnaam daoã nengẽ la m lebg n wa.» 
2Kings4:23 A sɩdã sok-a lame: «Yaa noog tɩ f rabd Wẽnnaam daoã nengẽ rũndã? Bala, ka ki-paalga, leb n ka vʋʋsg daar me.» La pagã leok-a lame tɩ yell ka be ye." 
2Kings4:24 Dẽ, pagã kɩtame tɩ b ning bõangã yolgo, la a yeel rakõor ning sẽn tog n yãag-a yẽnda wã yaa: «Lʋɩ taoor tɩ d kẽnge, la mam sã n ka yeel foom tɩ f yals bɩ f ra yals ye.»" 
2Kings4:25 Woto, pagã kẽng n tɩ paama Wẽnnaam daoã Karmell tãngã zugu. Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn yãnd pagã sẽn ket n be yɩɩg n watẽ, a yeela a rakõor a Geyaazi yaa: «Gese, yaa Sunem pagã la sẽn watã." 
2Kings4:26 M kos tɩ f yik n wudg n seg-a, n sok-a n ges yaa noogo! La f sok-a n gese, a sɩdã ne a biigã sã n tara laafɩ.» La a Geyaazi sẽn kẽngã, pagã leokame tɩ yell ka be ye." 
2Kings4:27 Dẽ, pagã sẽn ta Wẽnnaam daoã nengẽ Karmell tãngã zugu, a wudg n mobga Wẽnnaam daoã nao. La a Geyaazi kolgame n na n tus-a n serge, la Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize yeela a Geyaazi yaa: «Bas-a, bala, a bee sũ-sãan-kãseng pʋga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab solga maam bõn-kãnga, n ka wilg maam ye.»" 
2Kings4:28 La pagã yeelame yaa: «M kẽem sõngo, mam dag n kosa yãmb tɩ m data biig sɩda? Mam dag n ka pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ y ra belg-m sɩda?»" 
2Kings4:29 A Eliize yeela a Geyaazi yaa: «Yik n sẽbg f sɛɛga, n deeg mam dasaarã n zoe n kẽnge. Fo sã n seg neda, bɩ f ra pʋʋs-a ye, la ned sã n pʋʋs foom, bɩ f ra reeg a pʋʋsmã ye. Fo sã n ta, bɩ f rɩk mam dasaarã n sɩɩs biigã nenga.»" 
2Kings4:30 Biigã ma yeelame: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la ne yãmb sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ mam kõn tol n serg n bas yãmb ye.» Dẽ, a Eliize yikame n tũ pagã n looge." 
2Kings4:31 A Geyaazi rag n denga bãmb taoore, n ta n dɩk rasaarã n sɩɩs biigã nenga, la biigã ka tol n maan rãamde, wall a yẽrg ye. La Geyaazi lebg n sega a Eliize n yeel-a yaa: «Biigã ka nek ye.»" 
2Kings4:32 A Eliize sẽn ta, a mikame tɩ biigã kiime n gãe yẽnda gãagã zugu." 
2Kings4:33 La a kẽeme, n lebs roogã noor n page, tɩ yaa yẽnda ne biigã bal n be pʋgẽ, n na n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Kings4:34 La a Eliize gãandame n vãbend n tẽeg a meng biigã zugu, n dɩk a noorã n tugl biigã noore, t'a ninã me tees biigã ninã, n dɩk a nusã n ning biigã nusẽ. A Eliize sẽn vãbend biigã zugu, biigã yĩngã leb n lebga tʋʋlga." 
2Kings4:35 La a Eliize yikame n kẽnd n gilgd roogã pʋga. La yẽnda lebg n leb n tɩ gãandame, n vãbend biigã zug yɛsa, la biigã tĩsa naoor a yopoe, n puk a ninã n getẽ." 
2Kings4:36 Dẽ, a Eliize boola a Geyaazi n yeel-a yaa: «Bool Sunem pagã t'a wa.» La a Geyaazi boola pagã, la a wa a Eliize nengẽ, t'a yeel-a yaa: «Rɩk f biigã.»" 
2Kings4:37 Pagã wudgame n tɩ yĩgimd a Eliize taoore, n wõgemd n fõgen a neng tẽnga, n yik n dɩk a biigã n yi." 
2Kings4:38 A Eliize lebg n waa Gilgalle. Rẽ tɩ kom-kãseng n dag n kẽ tẽngã. Wakat-kãnga, no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis rag n wa n bee ne a Eliize, la yẽnda yeela a rakõorã t'a rɩk rʋg-bedrã n dʋgl n maan dɩɩb n kõ no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biisi." 
2Kings4:39 Dẽ, bãmb sʋkã ned a yembr yiime n kẽng we-kɛɛng n na n tɩ bao zẽedo. La yẽnda yãnda niri n wʋk n pids a fuugu. Yẽnda sẽn ta yiri, a bog-b lame n ning rʋkã pʋga. Ned ba a yembr dag n ka mi niir bãmbã ye." 
2Kings4:40 Bãmb yãka niri wã sẽn dʋgã n kõ nebã. La bãmb sẽn zĩnd n sɩng rɩɩb bal yee, la b sẽn kelem n yeele: «Wẽnnaam daoa, yaa kũum n be rʋkẽ wã!» Dẽ, bãmb ka tõog n dɩ-a ye." 
2Kings4:41 Woto, a Eliize yeelame: «Ka yell ye. Tall-y zom n wa kõ-ma!» A Eliize reega zomã n ning rʋkã pʋga, la a yeel tɩ b vaag rɩɩbã n kõ nebã tɩ b rɩ. Nebã mikame tɩ rɩɩbã lebga sõama n ka leb n yaa toog ye." 
2Kings4:42 Rao a yembr n yi Baall-Salisa n tall Oorz zom-paalg bur pisi, ne bɩle dẽenem biis a sẽn sui a korgẽ n zã n wa kõ Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize. La a Eliize yeelame tɩ b rɩk n kõ nebã tɩ b rɩ." 
2Kings4:43 A Eliize rakõorã yeelame yaa: «Mam na n maana a wãn n tõog tɩ yõwã sek neb koabg rɩlgre?» Dẽ, a Eliize yeel-a lame: «Rɩk n kõ nebã tɩ b rɩ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb na n dɩ n tɩgame tɩ kelle.› »" 
2Kings4:44 Dẽ, b rɩka burã n kõ nebã, la b rɩ n tɩgame tɩ kell wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
2Kings5:1 Siiri rĩmã rag n tara a tãb-biis naab t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Naama. Rao-kãng rag n yaa nin-kãsenga, la a soaalã rag n nong-a-la hal wʋsgo. Bala, yɩɩ yẽnda n kɩt tɩ Siiri nebã paam tõogre. La a Naama bẽeda wãoodo." 
2Kings5:2 Siiri nebã kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Israyɛll nebã wakat a yembre, la b yõka Israyɛll bi-pugl-bilf a yembr n tall n kuil Siiri. La bi-puglã rag n lebga a Naama pagã tʋmtʋmd-poaka." 
2Kings5:3 Daar a yembre, bi-puglã yeela a zu-soben-poakã yaa: «M soaalã sã n dag n kẽngẽ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ningã sẽn be Samaari wã nengẽ, b rag n na n maagẽ-la b yĩn-gãong bãagã.»" 
2Kings5:4 La a Naama kẽngame n tɩ togs a soaalã bũmb ning Israyɛll bi-puglã sẽn yeelã. 
2Kings5:5 Dẽ, Siiri rĩmã yeela a Naama yaa: «Beneere, bɩ f kẽnge! La mam na n gʋlsa sebr n kɩs-f tɩ f tall n tɩ kõ Israyɛll dĩmã.» Woto, a Naama yiime n dɩk sore, la a zãa wanzuri kɩlo kobs-tã, ne sãnem kɩlo pis-yoobe, n paas fu-neeb piiga." 
2Kings5:6 A Naama sẽn ta Israyɛll dĩmã nengẽ, a kɩs-a-la Siiri rĩmã sebrã. Sebrã yeta woto: «Maam n tʋmd m tʋmtʋmd a Naama yãmb nengẽ ne seb-kãngã, tɩ yãmb tõe n maag a yĩn-gãong bãagã.»" 
2Kings5:7 La Israyɛll dĩmã sẽn karem sebrã n sɛ, a pãrsa a futu, n yeele: «Mam yaa Wẽnnaam n tõe n kʋ wall m vʋʋg ned la? Bõe yĩng tɩ Siiri rĩmã na n tʋm ned t'a wa mam nengẽ tɩ m maag a wãoodo? Yãmb mens neeme tɩ yaa mam noor la a baooda.»" 
2Kings5:8 Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize sẽn wʋm tɩ Israyɛll dĩmã pãrsa a futã, yẽnda tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel rĩmã yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb pãrsd y futu? M kotame tɩ y tʋm daoã t'a wa mam nengẽ, t'a na bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs bee Israyɛlle.»" 
2Kings5:9 A Naama kẽng n tɩ yalsa a Eliize zakã noor ne a wiidã la a saarã. 
2Kings5:10 A Eliize tʋma ned t'a yi n yeel a Naama yaa: «Kẽng Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã pʋg n tɩ lis naoor a yopoe, la f yĩn-gãong bãagã na n sɛɛme tɩ f lebg yɩlemde.»" 
2Kings5:11 La a Naama sũurã puugame t'a lebg n loogdẽ la a yetẽ: «Ade, mam dag n tẽedame tɩ yẽnda mengã n dag n na n yi n seg maam n tik bãagã zĩigẽ, n pʋʋs ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, tɩ mam yĩn-gãong bãagã sɛ." 
2Kings5:12 Rẽ yĩnga, Damaas ne Abana la Parpaar ka tar kʋɩls sẽn são Israyɛll kʋɩlsã zãng la? Mam dag n ka tõe n lisẽ kʋɩl-bãmb pʋs n paam m yĩn-gãong bãagã maagr sɩda?» Dẽ, a Naama lebg n looga ne sũ-yikri." 
2Kings5:13 A Naama tʋmtʋmdbã kolga yẽnda n gom ne-a n yeele: «M soaala, Wẽnnaam daoã sã n dag n yeelẽ yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb sẽn yaa toog n yɩɩd woto, yãmb dag n kõn maanẽ sɩda? La a yaool n ka yeel yãmb tɩ y maan bũmb a to, n zʋʋg a sẽn yeel-y bal tɩ y kẽng n tɩ lis koomẽ wã, tɩ y na n lebga yɩlemdã ye!»" 
2Kings5:14 Dẽ, a Naama sigame n kẽ Zʋrdẽ koomã pʋg n lis naoor a yopoe wa Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. La a yĩn-gãong bãagã sɛɛme, t'a lebg yɩlemde. A yĩngã rag n lebga wa bi-bilf yĩnga." 
2Kings5:15 A Naama ne a nebã fãa tũu taab n lebg n leb Wẽnnaam daoã nengẽ. La bãmb sẽn ta, a Naama yalsa Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize taoor n yeel-a yaa: «Moasã, mam bãngame tɩ dũniyã gill fãa pʋga, Wẽnnaam ka be zĩig a to tɩ sã n ka Israyɛll ye. Dẽ, mam kotame tɩ y sak n deeg kũun ning mam sẽn na n kõ yãmbã!»" 
2Kings5:16 A Eliize leoka yẽnda n yeele: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, mam sẽn yaa-a soab tʋmtʋmdã, tɩ mam kõn deeg bũmb ye!» La a Naama pẽdga a Eliize n dat t'a sak n deeg kũunã, la a Eliize zãgsame t'a ka na n deeg ye." 
2Kings5:17 Dẽ, a Naama yeelame: «Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb zãgsame tɩ y ka na n deeg kũunã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y kõ noore, tɩ b wʋk y tẽngã tẽn-gãongã tom sẽn zems bõn-wees a yiib zɩlgre, n kõ y tʋmtʋmdã. Bala, yãmb tʋmtʋmdã ka na n leb n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wall maoong a to n kõ wẽnd a to, sã n ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab bala." 
2Kings5:18 Mam sẽn kote, yaa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan maam sugri, bala, mam soaalã sã n mi n kẽng wẽn-naandg a Rimo roogẽ wã n na n tɩ pʋʋse, bãmb tikda maam la mam me naagda bãmb n wõgemd n waoog a Rimo. Dẽ yĩngã, mam sã n wa n wõgemd wẽn-naandg a Rimo roogẽ wã, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ-m sugri.»" 
2Kings5:19 A Eliize yeela a Naama yaa: «Kẽng ne laafɩ.» La a Naama loogame. La a Naama sẽn loog n zãag bilfu," 
2Kings5:20 Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize rakõor a Geyaazi yeela a sũurẽ yaa: «Gese, mam soaalã basa Siiri rao a Naama t'a loog n ka sak n deeg kũun ning a sẽn wa ne wã ye. La mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ mam na n wudg n babs-a lame n tɩ reeg bũmbu!»" 
2Kings5:21 Dẽ, a Geyaazi zoeeme n na n babs a Naama. La a Naama sẽn yã yẽnda sẽn zoet n watẽ wã, a siga tao-tao n bas a saarã n na n seg a Geyaazi n sok-a n ges yaa noogo." 
2Kings5:22 A Geyaazi leokame: «Yaa noogo! Mam soaalã n tʋm maam tɩ m wa yeel-y tɩ kom-bɩɩs a yiib n yi no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis nins sẽn be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãmsã sʋkã sʋka, n wa n sig bãmba. La m soaalã kotame tɩ y kõ-b wanzuri kɩlo pis-tã, ne fu-neeb a yiibu.»" 
2Kings5:23 La a Naama yeel-a lame yaa: «Sã n yaa woto bɩ f reeg wanzuri kɩlo pis-yoobe.» Dẽ, a Naama pẽdg-a lame n ning wanzuri kɩlo pis-yoob yond a yiib pʋg n sẽbg n kõ-a, la a kõ-a fu-neeb a yiibã, n kɩt tɩ yẽnda tʋmtʋmdb a yiib tʋk-b n lʋɩ a Geyaazi taoore." 
2Kings5:24 Bãmb sẽn wa n ta zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ Ofɛllã, a Geyaazi reega kũunã n bĩng a roogẽ, la a yeel a Naama tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b looge, la b lebg n loogame." 
2Kings5:25 Dẽ poore, a Geyaazi mengã lebg n wa a soaal a Eliize nengẽ, la a Eliize sok-a lame yaa: «Fo rag n kẽnga yɛɛnẽ?» La a Geyaazi leokame tɩ yẽnda rag n ka kẽng ni ye." 
2Kings5:26 Woto, a Eliize yeela a Geyaazi yaa: «Fo tẽedame tɩ raoã sẽn wa n sig a saarã zug n segd foomã, mam ka yã la? Rẽ yĩnga, yaa wakat fo sẽn tog n deeg fu-neeba, la wanzuri sẽn na n yɩl n da oliiv tɩɩse, ne vĩy pʋto, la rũm-bɛd ne rũm-bãoonego, la f paam yem-daad ne yem-pogs sɩda?" 
2Kings5:27 Fo sẽn maan a woto wã yĩnga, a Naama yĩn-gãong bãagã na n yõka foom ne f yagensã wakat sẽn kõn sa.» Dẽ, a Geyaazi ne a na n yi a Eliize nengẽ wã tɩ yĩn-gãong bãagã yõk-a lame t'a yĩngã lebg pɛɛlg wa lam-palga." 
2Kings6:1 Daar a yembre, no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biis yeela a Eliize yaa: «Ges-y-yã, zĩig ning tõnd sẽn be ne yãmbã yaa sẽka." 
2Kings6:2 Dẽ wã, d kot-y lame tɩ y kõ-d noor tɩ d kẽng Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, tɩ ned kam fãa kɛɛg raoogo, n wa ti roog n kẽ.» La a Eliize yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽnge." 
2Kings6:3 Woto, bãmb ned a yembr kosa a Eliize yaa: «M kotame tɩ y yãag-d tɩ d kẽnge?» A Eliize leokame yaa: «Beneere! Mam na n yãag-y lame.»" 
2Kings6:4 Dẽ, a Eliize tũu bãmb n kẽnge. La bãmb sẽn ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noore, b sɩnga tɩɩsã kɛɛbo." 
2Kings6:5 La bãmb ned a yembr sẽn kɛɛd raoogo, a larã baagame n lʋɩ koomẽ wã. Dẽ, a kelmame n yeele: «Kayto! M soaala, mam yaool n dag n penga larã!»" 
2Kings6:6 Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo larã lʋɩɩ zĩ-bʋgo?» La raoã wilga larã sẽn lʋɩ zĩig ningã. La a Eliize kɛɛga raoog n lob zĩig ning larã sẽn lʋɩẽ wã, la larã ruka koomã zugu." 
2Kings6:7 A Eliize yeela raoã t'a yaag larã. La raoã tẽega a nug n yaag-a. 
2Kings6:8 Wakat n zĩndi, tɩ Siiri rĩmã rag n zabd ne Israyɛll nebã. Dẽ, Siiri rĩmã yẽsa ne a tãb-biis nanambsã n wilg-b b sẽn na n kẽng zĩig ning n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll nebã." 
2Kings6:9 La Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize tʋmame tɩ b tɩ togs Israyɛll dĩmã yaa: «Siiri nebã bee zĩ-kãngã, dẽ wã, gũus-y n da wa kẽng be ye.»" 
2Kings6:10 Israyɛll dĩma rag n tʋmda neb zĩig ning a Eliize sẽn wilg yẽnda wã tɩ b kẽnd be n gũusdẽ. Bõn-kãng ka yɩ vugr bɩ naoor a yiib bal ye. 
2Kings6:11 Yel-kãng kɩtame tɩ Siiri rĩmã sũur sãame. Dẽ, a boola a tãb-biis nanambsã n yeel-b yaa: «Wilg-y maam ned ning sẽn be tõnd sʋkã n dɩkd tõnd yɛlã n kẽnd n togsd Israyɛll dĩmã.»" 
2Kings6:12 Yẽnda tʋmtʋmdbã ned a yembr yeela yẽnda yaa: «N-na! Ka tõnd sʋkã ned baa a yembr n kẽnd n togsdẽ ye! Yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Eliize sẽn be Israyɛllã. Yẽnda tõe n dɩka goam nins fãa yãmb sẽn zĩnd y ro-gãagẽ wã n gomã, n togs Israyɛll dĩmã.»" 
2Kings6:13 Siiri rĩmã yeelame: «Kẽng-y n tɩ bãng-y zĩig ning a Eliize sẽn beẽ wã, la y wa togs-ma. Mam na n tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yõk-a n wa.» Neb nins sẽn kẽngã lebg n wa togsa rĩmã t'a Eliize bee Dotã tẽnga." 
2Kings6:14 Dẽ, Siiri naabã tʋma wiid ne saar-dãmba, la tãb-biis wʋsgo, tɩ b kẽng ne yʋng n tɩ gũbg tẽngã gilli." 
2Kings6:15 La Wẽnnaam daoã rakõor yika tõd-beoog n yi, n mik tɩ tãb-biis ne wiidi, la saar-dãmb n gũbg tẽngã. Dẽ, yẽnda yeela Wẽnnaam daoã yaa: «M soaala! Tõnd na n kẽe yɛ?»" 
2Kings6:16 A Eliize yeela yẽnda: «Da zoe rabeem ye. Bala, sẽn be-b ne tõndã sõor yɩɩda sẽn be-b ne bãmbã.»" 
2Kings6:17 La a Eliize pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kot-y lame tɩ y puk bi-bɩɩgã nin t'a tõog n yãnde.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka bi-bɩɩgã nini, la a yãndame tɩ tãngã kell n pida ne tãb-biisi, la bugum saar-dãmb n gũbg a Eliize." 
2Kings6:18 Siiri nebã yii tãngã zug n sig n kẽnd n wat a Eliize nengẽ. La Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam kota yãmb tɩ y kɩt tɩ nin-bãmbã fãa lebg zoense!» Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Siiri nin-bãmb lebg zoens wa a Eliize sẽn kosã." 
2Kings6:19 A Eliize yeela bãmb yaa: «Ka kaanẽ la sorã ye! Leb n ka tẽngã la ka me ye! Wa-y tɩ m yãag-y n kẽng ned ning yãmb sẽn baoodã nengẽ!» Dẽ, a Eliize talla bãmb n kẽng Samaari tẽngã pʋga." 
2Kings6:20 Bãmb sẽn ta Samaari tẽngã pʋga, a Eliize yeelame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kotame tɩ y puk nin-bãmbã ninã tɩ b yã.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab puka b ninã, la b mikame tɩ bãmb sẽn beẽ wã yaa Samaari tẽngã sʋka." 
2Kings6:21 Israyɛll dĩmã sẽn yã Siiri nebã, a sokame: «M saamba, m tog n kʋ-b lame bɩ?»" 
2Kings6:22 A Eliize leokame: «Ra-y kʋ-y-b ye. Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb na yõg neb zabr zĩigẽ n maan yembs n leb n kʋʋd-ba? Bao-y rɩɩb ne koom n kõ-b tɩ b rɩ la b yũ. La y bas-b tɩ b leb b soaalã nengẽ.»" 
2Kings6:23 Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã kɩtame tɩ b bao rɩɩb sõama, n kõ-b tɩ b rɩ la b yũ. Dẽ poore, b bas-b lame tɩ b looge, la b lebg n leba b soaalã nengẽ. Rẽ tɛka, Siiri nebã ka leb n wa n zab ne Israyɛll nebã yɛs ye." 
2Kings6:24 Rẽ loogr zugẽ, Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad tigma a tãb-biisã fãa n kẽng n tɩ gũbg Samaari tẽngã n na n zab ne-a." 
2Kings6:25 Dẽ, Siiri nebã sẽn dag n gũbg Samaari tẽngã n kaoos to-to wã kɩtame tɩ kom-kãseng kẽ Samaari tẽngã, hal tɩ bõang zug koosd wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-nii, tɩ wall bĩnd ne wũmbl koosd wanzuri wakɩ-koeems a nu." 
2Kings6:26 Daar a yembre, Israyɛll dĩmã rag n bee tẽngã lalg zug n kẽnd n gilgdẽ. Dẽ, pag a yembr kelmame n bool rĩmã n yeele: «M soaala, sõng-y-ma!»" 
2Kings6:27 Rĩmã leokame: «Sã n ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n sõng foom, mam na n sõnga foom ne bõe? Mam ka tar koodo, m ka tar reezẽ rãam me ye!»" 
2Kings6:28 La rĩmã wẽnemd n soka pagã yaa: «Yaa bõe yell n tar-fo?» Tɩ pagã leoke: «Ade, nindaarẽ, pʋg-kãngã yeela maam yaa: Rɩk f biigã n wa tɩ d wãb rũndã, tɩ beoogo, bɩ d wãb mam biigã." 
2Kings6:29 Dẽ, tõnd sɩd dʋga mam biigã n wãbe. La vẽkembeoogo, mam yeel-a lame t'a rɩk a biigã n wa tɩ d rʋg n wãbe. La a rɩka a biigã n tɩ solge.»" 
2Kings6:30 Rĩmã sẽn wʋm pagã goamã, a pãrsa a futu. La rĩmã sẽn dag n be lalgã zug n kẽndã, nebã yãame t'a yera bot a futã tẽngre." 
2Kings6:31 Israyɛll dĩmã rag n yeta a sũurẽ yaa: «Mam sã n ka fiuug a Safat biig a Eliize zugã rũndã, bɩ Wẽnnaam da bas-m ye.»" 
2Kings6:32 Wakat-kãnga, a Eliize rag n be a roogẽ wã n zĩẽ, la tẽngã kãsem-dãmb rag n bee ne yẽnda. La rĩmã tʋma ned a Eliize nengẽ. La sẽn deng nin-kãng sẽn na n ta, rẽ t'a Eliize yeela kãsem-dãmbã yaa: «Ges-y-yã, nin-kʋʋd biigã tʋma ned t'a wa fiuug mam zugã! Ade, gũus-y neere, la y pag kʋɩlengã n gɩdg-a t'a ra kẽ ye. Yẽnda soaalã pʋgd-a lame n watẽ.»" 
2Kings6:33 A Eliize sẽn nan ket n gomd ne kãsem-dãmbã bal yee, la rĩmã sẽn be waoongẽ, n ta n yeel a Eliize yaa: «Sã n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bas tɩ to-kãensã fãa paamd tõndo, mam na n leb n teega bãmb n maan bõe?»" 
2Kings7:1 A Eliize yeelame yaa: «Kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Beoog woto wẽnde, Samaari tẽngã noore, b na n daa zom kɩlo piig la a yiib wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, tɩ Oorz kɩlo pisi la a naas raad wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre.› »" 
2Kings7:2 Dẽ, wed-kɩɩm-naab ning sẽn tũud-a rĩmã yeela Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize yaa: «Gese, baa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wurg sa-gãongã, bũmb a woto ka tõe n zĩnd ye.» La a Eliize yeel-a lame yaa: «Beneere, fo nin na n yãnda bõn-kãnga, la f kõn dɩ-a ye.»" 
2Kings7:3 Neb a naas wãood sẽn tar n dag n be Samaari tẽngã noore. Bãmb goma ne taab n yeel yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd zĩ ka n gũud kũum? 
2Kings7:4 Tõnd sã n yet tɩ d na n leba tẽngã pʋga, komã sẽn be beenẽ wã yĩnga, d na n kiime. Tõnd sã n leb n pa ka me, d na n kiime. Rẽ wã, d yik n kẽng Siiri nebã tãb-sikẽ wã. Bãmb sã n bas-d n ka kʋ, rẽ la woto. B sã n kʋ-do, rẽ me la bala.»" 
2Kings7:5 Dẽ, zĩigã sẽn dat n sobge, neb a naasã wãood sẽn tarã yikame n na n kẽng Siiri tãb-biisã tãb-sikẽ. Bãmb sẽn kolg Siiri rãmbã tãb-sikã, b mikame tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n be beenẽ ye." 
2Kings7:6 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n kɩtame tɩ Siiri nebã zĩnd b tãb-sikẽ wã n wʋm saar-dãmb ne wiidi, la tãb-bi-kʋʋng rãamde. Dẽ, Siiri tãb-biisã goma ne taab n yeel yaa: «Israyɛll dĩmã kẽng n tɩ zemsa ne Hɛt-rãmbã rĩm-dãmbã, la ne Ezɩpt rĩm-dãmbã n kõ-b ligdi, n yeel-b tɩ b wa zab ne tõndo.»" 
2Kings7:7 Woto, Siiri rãmbã yika ne zĩ-sobd n bas b fu-rotã ne b wiidã, la b bõensã ne b tãb-sikã ne a teedã fãa n na n zoe n paam n põse." 
2Kings7:8 Neb a naasã sẽn ta tãb-sikã noore, b kẽe fu-roog a yembr pʋga, n mik rɩɩbo, n dɩ la b yũ. Dẽ, bãmb wʋka wanzuri, ne sãnem la fut n tɩ bao zĩig n solge. Bãmb lebg n wa kẽe fu-roog a to pʋga, n wʋk teed a taab n tɩ solge." 
2Kings7:9 Dẽ, bãmb goma ne taab n yeel yaa: «Tõnd sẽn maandã ka zems ye! Rũndã daarã yaa kiba-noog daare! Tõnd sã n bas tɩ beoogã vẽege, n ka togs neda, tõnd na n paama sɩbgre. Dẽ wã, wa-y tɩ d kẽng na-yirã n tɩ togse.»" 
2Kings7:10 Bãmb kẽng n tɩ boola gũud a yembr sẽn dag n be tẽngã noor n yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd kẽnga Siiri rãmbã tãb-sikẽ, la tõnd mikame tɩ ned ba a yembr ka be beenẽ ye, la tõnd ka wʋm ned rãamd me ye. Dag n yaa wiidã ne bõensã b sẽn loe be wã, n paas fu-rotã ne b teedã fãa bal n be beenẽ.»" 
2Kings7:11 Dẽ, tẽngã noor gũudbã tool n boola ned n togs-a t'a tɩ togs koɛɛgã na-yirã." 
2Kings7:12 Israyɛll dĩmã yika ne yʋng n yeel a tʋmtʋmdbã yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y bas tɩ m bilg-y Siiri nebã sẽn maand a woto wã võore. B miime tɩ kom n tar tõndo. Yaa rẽ yĩng la b sẽn yi n bas b tãb-sikã n kẽ weoogã n soondã, n gũudẽ tɩ tõnd sã n yi d tẽngã pʋga, bɩ b yõg tõndo, la b paam n deeg d tẽngã.»" 
2Kings7:13 Rĩmã tʋmtʋmd a yembr yeelame yaa: «N-na! Sã n yaa woto, m kotame tɩ y bas tɩ d yãk wiid a nu wiid nins sẽn ketã sʋka, n tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ gese. Bala, baa sẽn yaa-a soab me, bãmb me na n kii wa Israyɛll neb kʋʋngã sẽn na n ki wã.»" 
2Kings7:14 Dẽ, rĩmã yãka saar-dãmb a yiibu, ne wiidã n tʋm neb tɩ b pʋgl Siiri-rãmbã tãb-biisã. La rĩmã yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ ges la b wa." 
2Kings7:15 Bãmb pʋgla Siiri nebã n ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã. La bãmb yãame tɩ sorã zug pida ne futu, la teed wʋsg Siiri nebã sẽn dag n basd tɩ lʋɩt b zoeesã wakate. Woto, b sẽn tʋm neb ninsã lebg n wa togsa rĩmã bũmb nins bãmb sẽn yã wã." 
2Kings7:16 Wakat-kãng bala, Israyɛll nebã yiime n kẽng Siiri nebã tãb-sikẽ, n tɩ zɛ b teedã. Dẽ, badaare, b rag n daada zom kɩlo piig la a yiib wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, tɩ Oorz kɩlo pisi la a naas raad wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
2Kings7:17 Rĩmã rag n kɩtame t'a wed-kɩɩm-naab ning sẽn tũud yẽndã wã kẽng n tɩ ges tẽngã rignoor yelle. La neb kʋʋngã taba yẽnda beenẽ n kʋ. Kell n yɩɩ wa Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn dag n yeel wakat ning rĩmã sẽn wa yẽnda nengẽ wã. 
2Kings7:18 Wẽnnaam daoã dag n yeela rĩmã yaa: «Beoog woto wẽnde, b na n daa zom kɩlo piig la a yiib wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, tɩ Oorz kɩlo pisi la a naas raad wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembr Samaari tẽngã noore.»" 
2Kings7:19 La wed-kɩɩm-naabã yaool n dag n yeela Wẽnnaam daoã tɩ baa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wurg sa-gãongã, bũmb a woto ka tõe n zĩnd ye. La a Eliize rag n leok-a lame t'a na n yãnda bõn-kãng ne a nini, la a ka na n dɩ-a ye." 
2Kings7:20 Dẽ, yaa bũmb ning Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn yeelã n kell n paam wed-kɩɩm-naabã. Neb kʋʋngã sɩd tab-a-la tẽngã noor t'a ki." 
2Kings8:1 A Eliize rag n yeela pag ning biig yẽnda sẽn dag n vʋʋgã yaa: «Peeg f yirã rãmb n bao zĩig n kẽnge. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ kom kẽ tẽngã. La komã na n kaoosa yʋʋm a yopoe.»" 
2Kings8:2 Pagã yikame n maan wa Wẽnnaam daoã sẽn yeel-a wã. Yẽnda ne a yirã rãmb yiime n looge. La bãmb tɩ zĩnda Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ yʋʋm a yopoe. 
2Kings8:3 Yʋʋm a yopoe wã sẽn pidi, pagã yii Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngẽ n lebg n wa n na n yãb n kos rĩmã tɩ b sõng-a t'a leb n paam a zakã ne a pʋʋgã." 
2Kings8:4 Wakat-kãng tɩ rĩmã rag n sõsda ne Wẽnnaam daoã rakõor a Geyaazi. La rĩmã yeela a Geyaazi yaa: «M kotame tɩ f togs maam tʋʋm-kãsems nins fãa a Eliize sẽn maanã.» 
2Kings8:5 La a Geyaazi sẽn wa n togsd rĩmã a Eliize sẽn vʋʋg kũumã to-to wã, la pag ning biig b sẽn dag n vʋʋgã sẽn be waoongẽ. Pagã taame n yãb n kos rĩmã tɩ b sõng-a t'a leb n paam a zakã ne a pʋʋgã. A Geyaazi yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! M soaala, ad pag ning yell mam sẽn dag n gomdã, ad a biigã a Eliize sẽn vʋʋgã.»" 
2Kings8:6 Rĩmã soka pagã, la pagã togsa bũmbã fãa sẽn yɩ to-to. Woto, rĩmã yãka a sõgen a yembr n yeel-a yaa: «Kɩt tɩ b lebs pagã a sẽn so wã fãa, la b lebs-a a pʋʋgã ne b sẽn yõd n ko n paam yõod ningã, sẽn sɩng ne daar ning a sẽn yi tẽngẽ wã, hal tɩ ta rũndã wã.»" 
2Kings8:7 A Eliize kẽnga Damaase. La mikame tɩ Siiri rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad rag n gãee ne bãaga. La b togsa rĩm a Bɛn-Hadaad tɩ Wẽnnaam daoã waa tẽngẽ beenẽ. 
2Kings8:8 Rĩmã yeela a Azayɛll yaa: «Bao kũun n zã n kẽng Wẽnnaam daoã nengẽ n tɩ kõ-a, la f kos-a t'a sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gese, bãag ning sẽn tar maamã na n sãoogame bɩ?»" 
2Kings8:9 A Azayɛll kẽnga a Eliize nengẽ, la a talla kũuni, la a bao Damaas tẽngã bõn-sõama buud fãa n zɩlg yʋgma pis-naas n zã n na n tɩ kõ a Eliize. A Azayɛll sẽn ta a Eliize nengẽ, a yeelame: «Yãmb biig a Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn yaa Siiri rĩmã tʋma maam yãmb nengẽ, tɩ m wa sok-y n gese, bãag ning sẽn tar bãmbã na n sãoogame bɩ?»" 
2Kings8:10 A Eliize leoka yẽnda yaa: «N-yẽe! Kẽng n tɩ yeel-a t'a na n sãoogame! La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n wilga maam t'a na n kiime.» 
2Kings8:11 La Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize yalsame, n get a Azayɛll kuii, n wa yãbda." 
2Kings8:12 La a Azayɛll sokame: «M soaala, yaa a wãn tɩ yãmb yãbda?» T'a Eliize leok-a yaa: «Mam sẽn yãbdã, yaa tɩ mam nee wẽng ning fo sẽn na n wa maan Israyɛll nebã. Bala, wakat n wate, tɩ fo na n yõog b tẽms nins b sẽn me lals n gũbgã bugum, la f kʋ b kom-bɩɩsã ne zabr sʋʋga, la f kʋ bãmb kom-bãoonegã, la f weed b pagb nins sẽn tʋtã pʋse.»" 
2Kings8:13 A Azayɛll leokame: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmdã me la ãnda? Baag wa maamã me na n yɩɩ wãn n tõog n maan yel-bɛd a woto?» A Eliize yeel-a lame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga maam tɩ foom n na n wa lebg Siiri rĩmã.» 
2Kings8:14 A Azayɛll lebgame n kẽng rĩmã sẽn yaa a soaalã nengẽ. La a soaalã sok-a lame t'a Eliize yeelame tɩ bõe. T'a leok t'a Eliize yeelame t'a ka na n ki ye. 
2Kings8:15 La vẽkembeoogo, a Azayɛll rɩka fu-goabg n los koomẽ n dɩk n pil rĩmã neng t'a ki, la yẽnda leda a zĩigẽ n dɩ naam." 
2Kings8:16 Israyɛll dĩm a Akaab biig a Zoram sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm nuunẽ, la a Zozafat biig a Zehoram me lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings8:17 Yẽnda sẽn wa n deegd naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiibu, la a rɩ a naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a nii." 
2Kings8:18 Yẽnda me maana wa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmb a taabã sẽn maanã, la wa a Akaab buudã me sẽn maanã. Bala, yẽnda peega a Akaab bi-pugl n maan a paga, n maan sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
2Kings8:19 La Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd zug maasem yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka rat n sãam Zʋʋda ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yeelame tɩ b na n kɩtame t'a Davɩɩd ne a yagensã kell n soog Israyɛll naamã wakat fãa." 
2Kings8:20 Yaa a Zehoram zamaanẽ, la Edom nebã zab n zãgs tɩ b ka rat tɩ Zʋʋda rĩmã soog-b ye. La bãmb yãka b ned a ye n kɩt t'a lebg b rĩmã." 
2Kings8:21 A Zehoram yikame n dɩk a saar-dãmbã fãa n kẽng Sayɩɩr tẽnga. A yika ne yʋngo, n peeg a tãb-biisã nanambs sẽn get saar-dãmbã yellã, n tɩ zab ne Edom nebã sẽn dag n wa n gũbg bãmbã, n tõog-ba, la Edom nebã lebg n zoe n kuilame." 
2Kings8:22 La hal tɩ ta rũndã, Edom nebã kell n kɩɩsame tɩ b ka na n sak tɩ Zʋʋda nebã soog-b ye. Wakat-kãnga, Libna nebã me zãgsame tɩ b ka na n sak ye." 
2Kings8:23 A Zehoram tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings8:24 A Zehoram saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag ba-rãmbã, a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Akaazɩya n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings8:25 Israyɛll dĩm a Akaab biig a Zoram sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yiiblẽ, la Zʋʋda rĩm a Zehoram biig a Akaazɩya lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings8:26 A Akaazɩya sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu, la a rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm-yɛnga. A Akaazɩya ma yʋʋr la a Atali, n yaa Israyɛll dĩm a Omri roogã bi-pugla." 
2Kings8:27 Yẽnda me rɩka rĩm a Akaab naoore, n maan sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa a Akaab buudã me sẽn dag n maanã. Bala, yẽnda rag n yaa a Akaab buudã rɛɛmba." 
2Kings8:28 Rĩm a Akaazɩya tũu rĩm a Akaab biig a Zoram n kẽng Ramot sẽn be Galaadã n na n tɩ zab ne Siiri rĩm a Azayɛlle, la Siiri rãmbã pogla rĩm a Zoram." 
2Kings8:29 Rĩm a Zoram lebg n leba Zizreyɛll n na n tɩ tɩp a poglgã. La a Akaazɩya sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã kẽnga Zizreyɛll n na n tɩ ges a Akaab biig a Zoram gãaga, bala, a poglgã rag n namsd-a-la wʋsgo." 
2Kings9:1 Daar a yembre, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Eliize boola no-rɛɛsdbã karen-biig a yembr n yeel-a yaa: «Yik n sẽbg f sɛɛga, n deeg tʋg-kãngã ne kaamã n kẽng Ramot sẽn be Galaadã." 
2Kings9:2 Fo sã n ta beenẽ, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ bao a Nimsi biig a Zozafat biig a Zehu. Fo sã n yãnd-a, bɩ f kɩt t'a yik n yi a tũud-n-taasã sʋka, tɩ f peeg-a n kẽ ro-pʋgẽ, tɩ yaa yãmb y yiib bal n be be." 
2Kings9:3 Dẽ moasã, bɩ f rɩk tʋkã ne kaamã n pʋdg a zugu, la f yeel-a tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam ningda fo zug naam kaam tɩ f lebg Israyɛll dĩma.› La rẽ poore, bɩ f pak roogã noor n yi n zoe n loog n da yals ye.»" 
2Kings9:4 Bi-bɩɩgã sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsa yikame n kẽng Ramot sẽn be Galaadã. 
2Kings9:5 Yẽnda sẽn ta beenẽ, a mikame tɩ tãb-biisã nanambs dag n tigma taaba. Yẽnda yeelame: «Naaba, mam tara koɛɛg yãmb yĩnga.» La a Zehu sokame tɩ yaa bãmb sʋkã nin-bʋg yĩnga. La bi-bɩɩgã yeelame: «Naaba, yaa yãmb yĩnga.»" 
2Kings9:6 Dẽ, a Zehu yikame n kẽ roogẽ wã, la bi-bɩɩgã rɩka kaamã n pʋdg a Zehu zugu, la a yeel-a: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam pʋdgda fo zug kaam tɩ f lebg rĩmã, n soog Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã." 
2Kings9:7 Fo na n kʋʋ f soaal a Akaab buudã, tɩ mam tõe n dok m sũur ne a Zezabɛlle, yẽnda sẽn dag n daag maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛsdbã ne m tʋmtʋmdbã fãa zɩɩmã yĩnga." 
2Kings9:8 A Akaab buudã gill na n sãamame. Mam na n menesa a Akaab buudã raopã fãa sẽn be Israyɛllã, sã n yaa yembse, wall burkĩmba." 
2Kings9:9 La mam na n kɩtame t'a Akaab roogã yɩ wa a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam doogã, la wa a Ayiya biig a Basa roogã." 
2Kings9:10 La sã n yaa ne a Zezabɛlle, baas n na n wãb a kũumã Zizreyɛll zĩ-vɩʋʋgẽ wã, tɩ ned ka yãnd-a n dɩk n mum ye.› » La bi-bɩɩgã sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a paka roogã noor n yi n zoe." 
2Kings9:11 A Zehu yiime n lebg n leb a soaalã tãb-biis nanambs a taabã nengẽ, la b sok-a lame yaa: «Yaa noog tɩ gãeen-kãngã wa yãmb nengẽ?» A Zehu leok-b lame yaa: «Yãmb mens mii raoã ne a gom-toogã halɩ!»" 
2Kings9:12 La b yeela a Zehu yaa: «Ka sɩd ye. D kotame tɩ f togs tõnd raoã sẽn yeel tɩ bũmb ninga.» Dẽ, a Zehu yeel-b lame yaa: «Ade, a goma ne maam bũmb wʋsg yelle. A yeela maam tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam ningda fo zug kaam tɩ f lebg Israyɛll dĩma.»" 
2Kings9:13 Bãmb sẽn wʋm woto, b yeesa b futã n dʋʋg rʋʋdgã zugu, n kɩt t'a Zehu zĩndi, la b peeb baorg n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos rĩm a Zehu!»" 
2Kings9:14 Woto, a Nimsi biig a Zozafat biig a Zehu baood n zãmba a Zoram. Wakat-kãng t'a Zoram ne Israyɛll nebã fãa rag n bee Ramot sẽn be Galaadã n gũud tẽngã, tɩ Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll ra wa tõog n zab ne-a ye." 
2Kings9:15 La mikame t'a Zoram sẽn dag n zab ne a Azayɛll tɩ Siiri rãmbã pogl-a wã, a rag n lebg n leba Zizreyɛll n na n tɩ tɩp a menga. A Zehu yeela tãb-biisã yaa: «Yãmb sã n bee mam poorẽ, bɩ y gũus tɩ ned da wa yi tẽngã pʋg n kẽng Zizreyɛll n tɩ togs bũmb ning sẽn maan ka wã ye.»" 
2Kings9:16 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zehu kẽng n tɩ kẽ a saar n na n kẽng Zizreyɛlle. Bala, a Zoram sãmpogrã ra gãneg-a lame, tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaazɩya me rag n kẽng be n na n tɩ ges-a." 
2Kings9:17 Tẽn-gũud ning sẽn dag n be Zizreyɛll tẽn-gũudbã gãosgã zugã zĩnda lalgã zug n yãnd kʋʋng sẽn tũud a Zehu n watẽ, la a yeelame tɩ yẽnda nee kʋʋng sẽn wate. La a Zoram yeelame t'a tʋm wed-rʋʋd t'a tɩ seg-b n sok n ges yaa noogo." 
2Kings9:18 La wed-rʋʋdã tɩ sega a Zehu n yeele: «Rĩmã yeelame tɩ b wa sok-y n ges yaa noogo?» T'a Zehu leok-a: «Yaa noog tɩ ka noogo, bʋg n pak foom? Wa loog n tũ maam.» La tẽn-gũudã togsame tɩ wed-rʋʋdã taame, la a ka lebg n watẽ ye." 
2Kings9:19 Rĩm a Zoram leb n kɩtame tɩ b tʋm wed-rʋʋd a to. La wed-rʋʋdã taa a Zehu rãmb nengẽ n yeele: «Rĩmã sokdame tɩ yaa noogo?» T'a Zehu leoke: «Yaa noog tɩ ka noogo, bʋg n pak foom? Wa loog n tũ maam.»" 
2Kings9:20 La tẽn-gũudã togsame tɩ wed-rʋʋdã taame, la yẽnda me ka wat ye, tɩ la sẽn paasde, ned ning sẽn be-a taoorã zoees wẽnda a Nimsi biig a Zozafat biig a Zehu. Bala, yẽnda zoeta wa gãeenga." 
2Kings9:21 A Zoram yeelame tɩ b sog a saarã. La b soga a saarã. Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩm a Zoram ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaazɩya ned kam fãa kẽ a saar pʋga, tɩ b yi n na n seg a Zehu, la b tɩ seg-a-la Zizreyɛll dao a Nabot pʋʋgã pʋga." 
2Kings9:22 A Zoram sẽn yãnd a Zehu wã, a sok-a lame yaa: «Zehu, yaa noogo?» La a Zehu leokame: «Na n yɩ a wãn n yɩ noog tɩ yãmb ma a Zezabɛll ket n waoogd wẽn-naandse, la a bʋgd bagre?»" 
2Kings9:23 A Zoram wẽnemda tao-tao t'a na n zoe, la a yeela a Akaazɩya yaa: «Akaazɩya, b zãmba maam!»" 
2Kings9:24 La a Zehu rɩka a tãp n yãag n tão a Zoram bãgdã sʋka, la peemdã tɩ kõsa a sũurã n sãag n yi, la a Zoram lʋɩ a saarã pʋg n ki." 
2Kings9:25 La a Zehu yeela a wed-kɩɩm-naab a Bidkaar sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yaa: «Rɩk-a n lob Zizreyɛll rao a Nabot pʋʋgẽ wã. Bala, fo meng tẽra kãab-wẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab a Zoram wakat ning maam ne foom sẽn wa n zao d wiidã n tũud yẽnda ba a Akaabã." 
2Kings9:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng yeelame yaa: ‹Zaamẽ, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yã a Nabot ne a kambã zɩɩm fo sẽn daagã. Pʋ-kãngã pʋga, mam na n daaga fo me zɩɩm n lebse!› La a Zehu yeelame: Dẽ wã, rɩk-a n lob pʋʋgã pʋga, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng sẽn dag n yeelã.»" 
2Kings9:27 Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaazɩya sẽn yãnd woto, a rɩka Bɛt-Gãn sor n na n zoe. La Zehu pʋgla yẽnda, la a kõ noor n yeel tɩ b kʋ yẽnda me. La b tão a Akaazɩya a saarã pʋg n pogle. Dag n yaa b sẽn wa n dʋʋd Guur tãngã sẽn pẽ Yibleyamã, la a Akaazɩya zoe n kẽnga Megido n tɩ pa be n ki." 
2Kings9:28 A Akaazɩya tʋmtʋmdbã rɩka a kũumã n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ mum-a a yaoogẽ wã a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgẽ, n naag a saam-dãmbã." 
2Kings9:29 Yaa a Akaab biig a Zoram sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembrẽ, la a Akaazɩya rag n lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings9:30 A Zehu sẽn wa n kẽed Zizreyɛll tẽngã pʋgã, a Zezabɛll wʋmame n yik n ning a nin kɩrʋ, la a maneg a zugu, n kẽng n tɩ be a roogã võorẽ n lɩkd n getẽ." 
2Kings9:31 A Zehu sẽn ta tẽngã noore, a Zezabɛll soka yẽnda yaa: «Nin-kʋʋd wa a Zimri, yaa noogo? Ka foom n kʋ f soaalã wɛ?»" 
2Kings9:32 La a Zehu nakame n ges roogã võorẽ n sok yaa: «Ned ka be beenẽ n be mam poorẽ la? Ned ka be?» Dẽ, zu-soben-dãmb a yiib bɩ a tãab n zĩnd yĩngrã n lɩk n ges a Zehu." 
2Kings9:33 La a Zehu yeelame: «Rɩk-y-yã-a n lob tẽnga.» Woto, b rɩka a Zezabɛll n tũnug roogã võor n tus-a t'a lʋɩ tẽng t'a zɩɩmã yɩg n fẽ lalgã ne wiidã. La a Zehu tab-a-la ne a saarã n looge." 
2Kings9:34 Dẽ poore, a Zehu kẽe na-yirã n dɩ la a yũ, n yaool n yeel neb nins sẽn be beenẽ wã yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ rɩk-y pʋg-yoog a Zezabɛll n mume, bala a yaa rĩm biiga.»" 
2Kings9:35 Bãmb sẽn kẽng n na n tɩ rɩk a Zezabɛll n mumã, b tɩ mikame tɩ yaa a zu-wangã ne a naoã la a nusã bal n dag n kete." 
2Kings9:36 Woto, bãmb lebg n tɩ togsa a Zehu bõn-kãnga. La yẽnda yeelame: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã n paam pidsgu. Bãmb dag n goma ne Tisbe tẽng rao a Eli sẽn yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdã n yeele: Baas n na n wãb a Zezabɛll nemd Zizreyɛll zĩ-vɩʋʋgẽ wã." 
2Kings9:37 A Zezabɛll kũumã na n zendmame n sãeeg weoogã pʋg wa birg b sẽn gãneg pʋʋgo, Zizreyɛll pʋʋgã pʋga, hal tɩ ned ka tõe n yeel t'a Zezabɛll la woto ye!»" 
2Kings10:1 Rĩm a Akaab kom-dibli pis-yopoe n dag n be Samaari tẽnga. A Zehu gʋlsa sɛb n tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng Samaari tẽngã, n tɩ kɩs Zizreyɛll nanambsã, kãsem-dãmbã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n get a Akaab kom-dibli wã yellã. A sẽn gʋls sɛbã pʋgã la woto:" 
2Kings10:2 «Ade, yãmb soaalã kom-dibli pis-yopoe wã bee ne yãmba, la yãmb tara saar-dãmba, y tara wiidi, y tẽngã me n gũbgame, y leb n tara zab-teedo. Woto, seb-kãngã sã n ta yãmb nengẽ," 
2Kings10:3 bɩ y ges yãmb soaalã kom-dibli sʋka, n yãk biig ning sẽn yaa-a sõama, n ka tar yelle, n kɩt t'a lebg yãmb dĩm n zaoond a ba wã zaoorẽ n dɩ naamã, tɩ y zab n fãag y soaal a Akaab buudã.»" 
2Kings10:4 Woto, rabeem-kãseng yõka bãmb fãa tɩ b yeele: «Sã n yaa tɩ yẽnda tõoga rĩm-dãmb a yiibu, tõnd na n maana a wãn n tõog-a.»" 
2Kings10:5 La na-yirã balem-naabã ne tẽngã tãb-biis naabã, la kãsem-dãmbã, ne neb nins sẽn get-b a Akaab kom-dibli wã yellã, tʋma ned t'a kẽng n tɩ yeel a Zehu yaa: «Tõnd yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba, dẽ wã, yãmb sẽn yeel tõnd tɩ d maan bũmb ning fãa, tõnd na n maaname. La sã n yaa ne koɛɛg ning yãmb sẽn yeel tõndã, tõnd ka na n yãk ned ba a yembr t'a lebg tõnd dĩm ye. Bɩ y maan bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tagsd tɩ yaa sõama.»" 
2Kings10:6 Woto, a Zehu leb n gʋlsa sebr a to n yeele: «Sã n mikame tɩ yãmb bee mam poorẽ, la y sã n sakda maam, bɩ y fiuus y soaalã kamb zut n tall n wa kõ maam Zizreyɛll beoog woto wẽnde.» Rĩmã kamb pis-yopoe wã rag n bee Samaari tẽngã nin-bɛd nins sẽn get bãmb yellã zagsẽ." 
2Kings10:7 Bãmb sẽn deeg sebrã, bãmb tigma rĩmã kom-dibli pis-yopoe wã fãa, n kʋ-b n fiuus b zutã n ning pet pʋse, n tʋm tɩ kẽng a Zehu nengẽ Zizreyɛll tẽnga." 
2Kings10:8 B kẽ n togsa a Zehu tɩ b talla rĩmã kom-dibli zut n wa. Dẽ, a Zehu yeelame: «Rʋʋg-y zutã zĩis a yiib tẽngã rignoorẽ, n bas-b be hal tɩ ta beoog yibeoogo.»" 
2Kings10:9 Vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, a Zehu yi n yalsa nebã fãa taoor n yeele: «Ra ning-y y mens taal ye! Mam yẽ n zãmb m soaalã n kʋ-a. La nin-bãmbã fãa, yaa ãnda soab n kʋ-ba?»" 
2Kings10:10 Dẽ wã, bɩ y bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom a Akaab buudã wɛɛngẽ wã, gomd ba a yembr ka na n pa n ka paam pidsg ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab pidsa bãmb gomd ning b sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ bãmb tʋmtʋmd a Eli togsã." 
2Kings10:11 Woto, a Zehu kʋʋ a Akaab buudã neb nins fãa sẽn dag n ket n be Zizreyɛllã zãnga. Yẽnda kʋ a nin-kãsemsã, a zo-rãmbã, la a maan-kʋʋdbã n ka bas ba a yembr tɩ põs ye." 
2Kings10:12 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zehu rɩka sor n na n kẽng Samaari. La yẽnda sẽn ta Bɛt-Ekɛɛd sẽn yaa rũm-kɩɩmbã sɛk zĩigã," 
2Kings10:13 yẽnda sega Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaazɩya saam-biisi, n sok-b yaa: «Yãmb yaa ãnda rãmba?» Dẽ, bãmb leokame: «Tõnd yaa a Akaazɩya saam-biisi, la tõnd dabd n na n tɩ pʋʋsa rĩmã kamba, ne rĩmã ma kamba.»" 
2Kings10:14 A Zehu yeelame tɩ b yõg-b vɩɩse. Dẽ, a Zehu tũud-n-taasã yõga bãmb vɩɩse, n kood-b n dɩk b kũumã n lob bok ning sẽn be Bɛt-Ekɛɛdã. Nin-bãmb sõorã rag n yaa neb pis-naas la a yiibu, la a Zehu ka bas bãmb ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye." 
2Kings10:15 A Zehu sẽn yi beenẽ, a yãnda a Rekaab biig a Yonadaab sẽn kẽnd n segd yẽnda, la a Zehu pʋʋs-a lame n sok-a: «Fo pʋgã peela ne maam wa mam pʋgã sẽn peel ne foomã bɩ?» A Yonadaab leokame tɩ n-yẽe. La a Zehu yeel-a lame yaa: «Sã n yaa tɩ fo pʋgã peela ne maam, bɩ f yõk mam nugã.» La a Yonadaab yõka a Zehu nugu. Dẽ, a Zehu kɩtame t'a Yonadaab kẽ n naag yẽnda a saarã pʋga." 
2Kings10:16 A Zehu yeela a Yonadaab yaa: «Wa n tũ maam, la fo na yãnd mam sẽn nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab to-to.» Woto, a Zehu talla a Yonadaab a saarã pʋga, tɩ b looge." 
2Kings10:17 A Zehu sẽn ta Samaari, yẽnda kʋ a Akaab buudã neb nins sẽn dag n ket Samaari tẽngã n sãam-b zãnga, tɩ kell n yɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt t'a Eli togsã." 
2Kings10:18 A Zehu tigma Samaari tẽngã nebã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «A Akaab tũu Baall bilfu, la maam a Zehu na n tũu Baall wʋsgo." 
2Kings10:19 Rẽ wã, bool-y Baall no-rɛɛsdbã fãa, neb nins sẽn pʋʋsd-b Baallã zãnga, ne b maan-kʋʋdbã fãa tɩ b wa mam nengẽ, la y ra bas bãmb ned ba a yembr n ka bool ye. Bala, mam dat n maana maoon-kãseng n kõ Baalle. Ned sã n vaal tigin-kãngã, b na n kʋʋ a soaba.» A Zehu sẽn dag n maandã yaa ne sɩlem, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n tõog n sãam neb nins fãa sẽn tũud Baallã." 
2Kings10:20 La a Zehu yeelame tɩ b moon tigr a Baall yĩnga. La b moona tigrã. 
2Kings10:21 A Zehu tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Israyɛll tẽngã zĩigã fãa, n kɩt tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd Baallã wa. La bãmb ned ba a yembr ka pa n ka wa ye. Dẽ, bãmb fãa kẽe Baall pʋʋsg roogẽ wã, la roogã pida zãnga." 
2Kings10:22 A Zehu yeela ned ning sẽn get futã bĩngr yellã yaa: «Yiis futã n kõ neb nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd Baallã.» La yẽnda yiisa futã n kõ-bã. 
2Kings10:23 La a Zehu ne a Rekaab biig a Yonadaab tũu taab n wa Baall pʋʋsg roogẽ wã. La a Zehu yeela neb nins fãa sẽn pʋʋsd Baallã yaa: «Gẽes-y n ges-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd ra wa zĩnd sʋk ye. Mam datame tɩ yɩ Baall pʋʋsdbã bala.» 
2Kings10:24 Dẽ poore, bãmb kẽeme n na n maan maoongo, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. La mikame t'a Zehu rag n yãka tãb-biis pis-nii tɩ b be yɩnga. Yẽnda yeela neb pis-nii wã yaa: «Ade, mam ningda nin-bãmbã yãmb nugẽ, ned ning sẽn na n bas-a nin-bãmbã ned a ye t'a põse, yaa yẽnda soab la mam na n kʋ n lebse.»" 
2Kings10:25 A Zehu sẽn maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã n sɛ, a yeela gũudbã ne b wed-kɩɩm-nanambsã yaa: «Kẽ-y-yã! Kʋ-y-b zãnga, la y ra bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye.» Woto, tãb-biisã ne b nanambsã kʋʋ Baall pʋʋsdbã zãng ne zabr sʋʋga. B kʋ-b lame n lobe, la b sãag n kẽ tẽng ning Baall pʋʋsg roogã sẽn beẽ wã." 
2Kings10:26 Bãmb yiisa Baall kug-viginds nins sẽn be Baall roogã pʋg n yõog bugum. 
2Kings10:27 La bãmb pãba Baall kug-vigindgã n wã, la b wã Baall pʋʋsg roogã me, n kɩt t'a zĩigã lebg bĩnd sãab zĩig hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Kings10:28 Woto, a Zehu menesa Baall Israyɛll soolmã pʋga." 
2Kings10:29 Baoosg zãnga, a Zehu ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye. Bala, a Zeroboaam dag n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã maan sãnem nag-bi n ning Betɛll ne Dan n waoogdẽ." 
2Kings10:30 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zehu yaa: «Beneere, fo maana sẽn yaa tɩrg mam nifẽ. Fo kell n maana a Akaab buudã wa mam sẽn dag n yeelã. Dẽ wã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã soog Israyɛll rĩungã hal tɩ ta zamaan a naase.»" 
2Kings10:31 La baa ne rẽ fãa, a Zehu ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã tõodã ne a sũur fãa ye. Yẽnda kell n maana yel-wẽn nins a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã." 
2Kings10:32 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩngame n na n boogd Israyɛll nebã soolem. La a Azayɛll zaba ne Israyɛll nebã b soolmã fãa pʋga." 
2Kings10:33 Bãmb zab n tõoga Israyɛll nebã n deeg b soolmã tẽmse, sẽn sɩng ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã yaangã. Yaa Galaad ne Gaad nebã tẽmse, la Rubɛn nebã ne Manaase nebã tẽmse. Leb n yaa sẽn sɩng ne Arowɛɛr sẽn be Arno ko-soogã noorã hal tɩ ta Galaad ne Basan." 
2Kings10:34 A Zehu tʋʋm a taabã fãa, ne a gãndaalmã tʋʋmã fãa, la a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings10:35 A Zehu saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Samaari tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Zoakaaz n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naam." 
2Kings10:36 A Zehu zĩnda Samaari n dɩ Israyɛll naamã yʋʋm pisi la a nii. 
2Kings11:1 A Akaazɩya ma a Atali sẽn mik tɩ yẽnda biigã kiime, a yikame n kɩt tɩ b kʋ na-biisã zãnga." 
2Kings11:2 Wakat ning b sẽn wa n kʋʋd rĩmã kom-dibli wã, rĩm a Zoram bi-pugl a Zoseba sẽn yaa a Akaazɩya tão wã soosame, n dɩk rĩm a Akaazɩya bi-ribl a Zoaas n yiis rĩmã kamb sʋka, n loog ne-a tɩ ned ka bãng ye. La a talla a Zoaas ne a ma-wubdgã n tɩ solg gãasã roog pʋga. B solga a Zoaas tɩ rĩmã ma a Atali ka yãnd-a ye. Dẽ, b ka paam bi-kãng n kʋ ye." 
2Kings11:3 Woto, biigã kell n paa ne a ma-wubdgã n soond Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg yʋʋm a yoobe. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa a Atali n so tẽngã n dɩt naam." 
2Kings11:4 Yʋʋm a yopoe soabã pʋga, maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Zehozada tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool sãambã sẽn yaa tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã ne gũudbã tɩ b wa. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b wa yẽnda nengẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. Yẽnda maana kaool ne-ba, n kɩt tɩ b wẽen Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, n yaool n wilg-b rĩmã biiga." 
2Kings11:5 Dẽ poore, a kõo bãmb noor n yeele: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Yãmb neb nins sẽn dɩkd b tʋʋmd vʋʋsg daarã, na n pʋɩɩ nebã sul a tãabo, tɩ sull a yembr gũud na-yirã," 
2Kings11:6 tɩ sull a yembr gũud Wẽnnaam doogã zak noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Suurã, t'a yembr gũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak noor ning sẽn be gũudbã roog poorẽ wã. Yãmb na n gũuda roogã a woto n deesd taaba." 
2Kings11:7 La yãmb sul a yiib nins sẽn ka tʋmd vʋʋsg daarã na n wa gũu Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, zĩig ning rĩmã sẽn beẽ wã." 
2Kings11:8 Yãmb ned kam fãa na n zãada a zab-teed a nugẽ n gũbg rĩmã. La ned sã n wa rat n kolg yãmb sullã, bɩ y kʋ-a. Yãmb na n bee rĩmã sɛɛgẽ wakat fãa, n yãagd-a t'a kẽnd a sẽn datẽ la a watẽ.»" 
2Kings11:9 Dẽ, tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã kell n maana wa maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada sẽn yeel-b tɩ b maanã. Bãmb ned kam fãa peega a neb nins sẽn tʋmd vʋʋsg daarã, ne neb nins sẽn sigd-b tʋʋm vʋʋsg daarã n kẽng maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada nengẽ." 
2Kings11:10 Maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada rɩka rĩm a Davɩɩd kãnã ne a gãn nins sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, n kɩs tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã." 
2Kings11:11 Gũudbã ned kam fãa rag n zãada a zab-teed a nugẽ, n yas Wẽnnaam doogã rɩtg kɩrengã, n tɩ tãag a goabgã, n pẽneg tẽn-kugrã ne na-yirã, n gũbg rĩmã sẽn beẽ wã." 
2Kings11:12 La maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Zehozada kɩtame tɩ b wa ne rĩmã biigã, t'a rɩk rĩungã kaset teedã n ning-a, la a rɩk naam maanfã n fõgn-a. La b ning a zug naam kaam n kõ-a rĩungã. La bãmb wẽe nug-pogs n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos rĩmã.»" 
2Kings11:13 A Atali sẽn wʋm gũudbã ne nin-buiidã sẽn kilsdã, yẽnda me yiime n bʋʋg-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Kings11:14 La yẽnda sẽn ta, a yãnda rĩmã sẽn yas ra-lugdgã sɛɛg wa sẽn zems b rog-n-mikã, tɩ tãb-biisã nanambsã ne bar-pɛɛbdbã be rĩmã sɛɛgẽ, tɩ tẽngã nebã fãa maand sũ-noogo, la b peebd bardo. A Atali sẽn yã rẽ, a pãrsa a fut n kelem n yeele: «Yaa zãmbo! Yaa zãmbo!»" 
2Kings11:15 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada yeela tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã yaa: «Tall-y-yã a Atali n yi nebã sʋka, la ned sã n yeel t'a be a poorẽ, bɩ y kʋ a soab ne zabr sʋʋga.» Bala, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada rag n yeelame tɩ b ra kʋ-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ye." 
2Kings11:16 Woto, b yõka a Atali, n tall-a n tũ sor ning wiidã sẽn tũud n kẽed na-yirã, n ta na-yirã zak noore, la b kʋ-a-la beenẽ." 
2Kings11:17 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada kɩtame tɩ rĩmã ne nebã maan kaool n yeel tɩ b na n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La a leb n kɩt tɩ nebã wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n saka rĩmã." 
2Kings11:18 Rẽ poore, tẽngã nebã fãa kẽnga Baall pʋʋsg roogẽ wã, n tɩ pãb-a n wã, la b pãb a tẽn-kugã ne a bõn-naandsã fãa n wã, la b kʋ wẽn-naandg a Baall maan-kʋʋd a Matã tẽn-kugã sɛɛgẽ. La Wẽnnaam maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada yãka gũudb n kɩt tɩ b gũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
2Kings11:19 La yẽnda peega tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã ne sãamb nins sẽn yaa tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã ne gũudbã, la tẽngã nebã fãa. La b talla rĩmã n yi Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n tũ gũudbã sẽn be noor ningã n kẽ na-yirã. Bãmb sẽn ta beenẽ, a Zoaas zaoonda a naamã geer zugu." 
2Kings11:20 Tẽngã nebã fãa rag n maanda sũ-noogo, la tẽngã rag n gãee bãane. Yɩɩ woto la b kʋ a Atali ne zabr sʋʋg na-yirã pʋga." 
2Kings12:1 A Zoaas sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm a yopoe. 
2Kings12:2 Yaa a Zehu sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yopoɛɛlẽ, la a Zoaas lebg rĩmã. A Zoaas rɩ a naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pis-naase. A ma yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Sibiya n yaa a Bɛɛr-Seba biiga." 
2Kings12:3 A Zoaas vɩɩmã tɛka, a maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, bala, maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Zehozada dag n zãms-a-la sõama." 
2Kings12:4 Baoosg zãnga, b kell n ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Nebã rag n ket n kẽnd n maanda maand la b yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã." 
2Kings12:5 A Zoaas yeela maan-kʋʋdbã yaa: «Ligd ning fãa b sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng tɩ b talld n wat Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, ne ligd ning ned kam fãa sẽn tog n yao wã, la ligd ning fãa nebã sẽn wat n kɩt Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ne yamleoogã," 
2Kings12:6 bɩ yãmb a maan-kʋʋdbã ned kam fãa rees ligd-kãens a mitb nengẽ, n tall n maneg Wẽnnaam doogã zĩis nins sẽn pusã.»" 
2Kings12:7 La rĩm a Zoaas sẽn deeg a naamã taa yʋʋm pisi la a tãabo, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã rag n ket n nan ka maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zĩis nins sẽn pusã ye." 
2Kings12:8 Woto, rĩm a Zoaas boola maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada ne maan-kʋʋdb a taabã n yeel-b yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb ket n nan ka maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zĩis nins sẽn pusã? Ade, moasã, yãmb ka leb n tar noor tɩ reeg ligd y mitbã nengẽ ye. Bɩ y bas ligd-kãng tɩ b kɩs tɩ b maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã.»" 
2Kings12:9 Maan-kʋʋdbã sakame n bas n ka na n leb n deeg ligd nebã nengẽ, la b ka na n leb n lʋɩ taoor n soog Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã manegr yell ye." 
2Kings12:10 Woto, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada maana koglg n kɩbg võor a limdã zugu, n dɩk-a n dɩgl tẽn-kugrã rɩtgo, zĩig ning nebã sẽn loogd n kẽed Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã. Maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn dag n gũud rignoorã rag n dɩkda ligd ning fãa nebã sẽn talld n watẽ wã n ningd koglgẽ wã." 
2Kings12:11 B sã n wa n mik tɩ ligdã lebga wʋsg koglgã pʋga, rĩmã seb-gʋndã ne maan-kʋʋr kãsmã kẽngdame n tɩ vaag ligdã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n sui yond pʋse, n tɩ sõde." 
2Kings12:12 Bãmb sã n sõd ligdã n sɛ, b rɩkd-a lame n kɩs neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋm yellã. B tara ligd-kãng n yaood ra-wãadbã ne neb nins sẽn tʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmã." 
2Kings12:13 Leb n yaa ligd-kãng la b tar n yaood tãn-metbã ne kug-pɛɛsdbã, la b raad raadã ne kug nins b sẽn na n pees Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã manegr yĩnga, la b maand tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã manegr wɛɛngẽ wã." 
2Kings12:14 La b ka tol n yãk ligdã nebã sẽn tar n wat Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n maan wanzuri laase, wall sʋʋse, bɩ zɩɩm mesb laase, wall bardo, bɩ sãnem wall wanzuri teed ye." 
2Kings12:15 B rag n dɩkda ligd-kãens fãa n kɩt neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋm yellã. 
2Kings12:16 Bãmb sã n dag n sõd ligdã n kɩs tɩ b yao tʋmtʋmdbã, b ka leb n sokd bãmb b sẽn tall ligdã n maan bũmb ning ye. Bala, bãmb dag n tʋmda tʋʋmdã ne pʋ-peelem." 
2Kings12:17 Beegr maoongã ligdi, ne yel-wẽnã maoongã ligd rag n ka wat Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ye. Ligd-kãng yaa maan-kʋʋdbã n so." 
2Kings12:18 Wakat-kãnga, Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Gat tẽngã n tõog n deeg-a. La a Azayɛll dag n dat n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Zeruzalɛm." 
2Kings12:19 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoaas wʋka teed nins fãa sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã. Yaa teed nins fãa yẽnda yaab-rãmb a Zozafat ne a Zehoram la a Akaazɩya, sẽn dag n yɩ Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã, sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, ne teed nins yẽnda mengã sẽn dag n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n paas sãnem ning fãa sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ wã ne na-yirã. Yẽnda rɩka te-bãmb fãa n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kɩs Siiri rĩm a Azayɛlle, la a Azayɛll ka leb n zab ne Zeruzalɛm ye." 
2Kings12:20 A Zoaas tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings12:21 A Zoaas tʋmtʋmdbã zemsa taab n na n zãmb-a. Bãmb zemsa taab n kʋ a Zoaas Bɛt-Milo, sor ning sẽn sigd n dabd Silla wã zugu." 
2Kings12:22 A Simeyat biig a Yozabaad ne a Someer biig a Yehozabaad sẽn yaa a Zoaas tʋmtʋmdbã n kɛ a Zoaas n kʋ. La b mum-a-la a saam-dãmbã yaadẽ, a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. Dẽ, yẽnda biig a Amatsɩya n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings13:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaazɩya biig a Zoaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a tãablẽ, la a Zehu biig a Zoakaaz me lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽnga. La yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yopoe." 
2Kings13:2 Rĩm a Zoakaaz maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda maana yel-wẽns nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã, la yẽnda kell n ka bas yel-wẽn-kãens maaneg ye." 
2Kings13:3 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika ne Israyɛll nebã. Dẽ, bãmb basame tɩ Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll ne a biig a Bɛn-Hadaad tõog Israyɛll nebã wakat fãa." 
2Kings13:4 La a Zoakaaz yõka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛga, n kos-b tɩ b maan sugri, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a pʋʋsgã, bala, bãmb yãnda namsg ning Siiri rĩmã sẽn dag n namsd Israyɛll nebã." 
2Kings13:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka fãagd n kõ Israyɛll nebã, la sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, b paama b meng ne Siiri nebã sẽn dag n namsd-bã. Woto, Israyɛll nebã leb n tõog n vɩɩmda b fu-rotã pʋs wa pĩndã." 
2Kings13:6 La baoosg zãnga, bãmb ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Zeroboaam doogã neb sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã ye. Bãmb maana yel-wẽn-kãense, n kell n bas wẽn-naandg a Aseera ra-lugdgã t'a ket n be Samaari tẽnga." 
2Kings13:7 Bũmb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn bas ne a Zoakaaz yaa wed-rʋʋdb pis-nu, ne saar-dãmb piiga, n paas tãb-biis tus-piig sẽn kẽnd ne nao. Bala, Siiri rĩmã sãama bãmb n kɩt tɩ b lebg zaalem wa tẽng tom tɩ b tabd ne nao." 
2Kings13:8 A Zoakaaz tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã, ne a gãndaalmã gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings13:9 A Zoakaaz saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Samaari tẽnga, la a biig a Zoaas n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings13:10 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yopoɛɛlẽ, la a Zoakaaz biig a Zoaas lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽnga. Yẽnda rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yoobe." 
2Kings13:11 Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda ka tol n bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye. Yẽnda me kell n maana yel-wẽn-bãmba. 
2Kings13:12 A Zoaas tʋʋm a taabã, ne a yɛl a taabã n paas a gãndaalmã, ne yẽnda sẽn zab ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya wã kibar gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings13:13 A Zoaas saka a saam-dãmba, la a Zeroboaam n led yẽnda zĩigẽ. B muma a Zoaas Samaari tẽng n naag Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã." 
2Kings13:14 A Eliize lʋɩɩ bãaga, la rag n yaa a yõor bãaga. Israyɛll dĩm a Zoaas kẽnga a Eliize nengẽ n tɩ yãb a zug n yeele: «M ba! M ba! Israyɛll saar-dãmb ne a wed-rʋʋdba!»" 
2Kings13:15 La a Eliize yeel-a lame yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ bao tãp ne pɛɛm n wa.» Yẽnda tɩ baoo tãpã ne pɛɛmã n wa. 
2Kings13:16 La a Eliize yeela Israyɛll dĩmã yaa: «Rɩk f tãpã n dʋʋse.» La rĩmã sẽn dʋʋs tãpã, a Eliize rɩka a nus n tik rĩmã nus n yeele:" 
2Kings13:17 «Lak võorã sẽn teesd yaangã!» La rĩmã laka võorã. A Eliize yeelame t'a tão tãpã. La rĩmã tãoome. La a Eliize yeelame: «Yõwã yaa tõogr peemd sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ. Yaa peemd sẽn na n kɩt tɩ yãmb tõog Siiri nebã. Fo na n tõoga Siiri nebã n dig-b n ta Afɛk n menes-b zãnga.» 
2Kings13:18 A Eliize leb n yeela rĩmã t'a rɩk a pɛɛmã. La a rɩk-b lame. Dẽ, a Eliize yeela Israyɛll dĩmã yaa: «Rɩk-y pɛɛmã n wẽ tẽngã!» Dẽ, rĩmã rɩka pɛɛmã n wẽ tẽng naoor a tãab n bas n yalse." 
2Kings13:19 Wẽnnaam dao a Eliize sũurã yika ne rĩmã t'a yeele: «Yãmb dag n kõn wẽe naoor a nu bɩ a yoobe. Woto, yãmb dag n na n tõog n menesa Siiri nebã zãnga. La moasã wã, yãmb na n tõog-b-la naoor tãab bala.»" 
2Kings13:20 A Eliize kiime tɩ b mum-a. La yʋʋmdã sẽn vẽke, Moaab tãb-biisã kẽe Israyɛll tẽngã." 
2Kings13:21 La daar a yembre, neb n dag n dabd kũum mumbu, la b yãnda Moaab tãb-bi-sull a ye sẽn wate. Dẽ, b rɩka kũumã n lob a Eliize yaoogẽ wã. La raoã kũum sẽn sɩɩs a Eliize kõabã, raoã vʋʋgame n yik n yalse." 
2Kings13:22 A Zoakaaz vɩɩmã tɛka, Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll namsa Israyɛll nebã." 
2Kings13:23 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoee Israyɛll nebã nimbãanega, n maan-b neere. Kaool ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n maan ne a Abrahaam la Izak ne a Zakoobã yĩnga, b ka tʋlg n na n sãam Israyɛll nebã ye. La hal tɩ ta rũndã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka rig-b tɩ b zãag ne bãmb me ye." 
2Kings13:24 Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll kiime, la a biig a Bɛn-Hadaad n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
2Kings13:25 A Zoaas zaba ne a Bɛn-Hadaad n tõog-a, n deeg tẽms nins a Bɛn-Hadaad ba a Azayɛll sẽn dag n zab n deeg yẽnda ba a Zoakaaz nengẽ wã. A Zoaas zaba ne a Bɛn-Hadaad naoor a tãabo, n tõog n leb n deeg Israyɛll tẽmsã n lebse." 
2Kings14:1 A Zoakaaz biig a Zoaas sẽn lebg Israyɛll dĩm tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, la a Zoaas biig a Amatsɩya me lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings14:2 A Amatsɩya sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu. La a rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ. A Amatsɩya ma yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Yewohadan, la a yaa Zeruzalɛm bi-pugla." 
2Kings14:3 A Amatsɩya maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la baoosg zãnga, yẽnda ka tõog n maan wa a yaab a Davɩɩd ye. Yẽnda kell n maana wa a ba a Zoaas sẽn dag n maanã." 
2Kings14:4 Baoosg zãnga, b ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Nebã rag n ket n maanda maando, la b yõogd wisd tẽn-kugã sẽn be maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã." 
2Kings14:5 A Amatsɩya rĩungã sẽn wa n paam pãnga, a kʋʋ yẽnda tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn dag n kʋ yẽnda ba wã." 
2Kings14:6 La wa b sẽn guls a Moyiis tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã, Amatsɩya ka kʋ nin-kʋʋdbã kamb ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n kõ a Moyiis noor tõog sebrã pʋg n yeele: «Bɩ y ra kʋ ba, a biig yel-wẽnd yĩng ye. La y ra kʋ biiga, a ba yel-wẽn yĩng ye. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa ki, a meng beegr yĩnga.»" 
2Kings14:7 Yaa a Amatsɩya n kʋ Edom neb tus piig yamsem longã pʋgẽ. La zabrã wakate, yẽnda tõog n deega Sela tẽngã, la a pʋda tẽngã yʋʋr tɩ Yokteyɛlle, la tẽngã yʋʋr ket n yaa woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Kings14:8 La a Amatsɩya tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zehu biig a Zoakaaz biig a Zoaas sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã t'a wa tɩ b seg taab n zabe. 
2Kings14:9 Israyɛll dĩm a Zoaas tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya yaa: «Daar a yembre, Libã gõaagã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩgã yaa: ‹Rɩk f bi-puglã n kõ mam bi-riblã t'a maan a paga! La Libã tẽng we-rũng n kẽn n tab gõaagã." 
2Kings14:10 Fo zabame n tõog Edom nebã tɩ f pẽgd f menga. Kell n pa pẽg-m-men-kãng pʋga, la f kell n pa f tẽngẽ. Bõe yĩng tɩ f na n yik n bao yell n kõ f menga? Fo na n sãamame, la Zʋʋda nebã me na n naaga foom n sãame!› »" 
2Kings14:11 La Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya ka kelg a Zoaas goamã ye. Woto, Israyɛll dĩm a Zoaas yikame n kẽnge, tɩ yẽnda ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya na n yek taab Bɛt-Semees sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmã n zab taaba." 
2Kings14:12 Israyɛll nebã tõoga Zʋʋda nebã, tɩ b ned kam fãa lebg n zoe n kuil a yiri." 
2Kings14:13 Israyɛll dĩm a Zoaas yõka a Akaazɩya biig a Zoaas biig a Amatsɩya sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã n kẽes yembd Bɛt-Semeese. Yẽnda yii beenẽ n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, la yẽnda luba Zeruzalɛm lalgã kɩreng ning sẽn sɩng ne noor ning sẽn teesd Efrayiimã, hal tɩ tãag tẽngã noor sẽn be lalsã gõdr zĩigẽ wã. B sẽn lub lalgã woglem tata kãntɩɩg kobs-naase." 
2Kings14:14 A Zoaas wʋka sãnemã ne wanzuri wã, ne teed nins fãa sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ne rĩmã zak laog bĩngr zĩigẽ wã. Yẽnda yõga yembs me n lebg n leb Samaari tẽnga." 
2Kings14:15 A Zoaas tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã, la a gãndaalmã tʋʋmã, ne a sẽn zab ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya wã gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings14:16 A Zoaas saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Samaari n naag Israyɛll dĩm-dãmb a taabã. Yẽnda biig a Zeroboaam n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings14:17 Israyɛll dĩm a Zoakaaz biig a Zoaas kũumã zugẽ, Zʋʋda naab a Zoaas biig a Amatsɩya kell n vɩɩmd n kaoosa yʋʋm piig la a nu." 
2Kings14:18 Amatsɩya tʋʋm a taabã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings14:19 Neb n sɩɩg taab noor Zeruzalɛm n dat n kʋ-a, la a Amatsɩya zoeeme n kẽng Lakɩɩse. La b tʋma neb tɩ b pʋgla n kẽng Lakɩɩs tẽng n tɩ kʋ." 
2Kings14:20 La b rɩka a Amatsɩya ne saar wiid sẽn tɛte, n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ mum n naag a saam-dãmbã, a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga." 
2Kings14:21 Woto, Zʋʋda nebã naaga taab n yãk a Azariya sẽn dag n tar yʋʋm piig la a yoobã, n kɩt t'a led a ba a Amatsɩya zĩigẽ n soog rĩungã." 
2Kings14:22 Rĩmã kũum zugẽ, yɩ a Azariya n deeg Elat tẽngã n lebs n me, n dɩk-a n kõ Zʋʋda nebã." 
2Kings14:23 A Zoaas biig a Amatsɩya sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a nuunẽ, la a Zoaas biig a Zeroboaam me lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽngã pʋga. Yẽnda rɩɩ a naamã yʋʋm pis-naas la a yembre." 
2Kings14:24 Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n ka tol n bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maane, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã ba a yembr ye." 
2Kings14:25 Yẽnda lebs n deega Israyɛll tẽmsã sẽn sɩng ne Lebo-Hamat sẽn be nug-rɩtgã, n tɩ tãag yamsem ko-kãsengã sẽn be Araba tẽn-nabdrã sẽn be nug goabgã. Dẽ, kell n yɩɩ wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Gat-Hefɛɛr dao a Amitayi biig a Zonaas sẽn yaa bãmb no-rɛɛsã togsã." 
2Kings14:26 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n nee Israyɛll nebã sẽn be namsg-kãseng pʋgẽ wã. La ned ba a yembr dag n ka be, sã n yaa yamba, wall burkĩna, n na n fãag Israyɛll nebã ye." 
2Kings14:27 La Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n ka yeel tɩ b na n menesa Israyɛll yʋʋr dũniyã zug ye. Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tũnuga a Zoaas biig a Zeroboaam, n fãag bãmba." 
2Kings14:28 A Zeroboaam tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa, la a sẽn yɩ gãndaoog zabã pʋgẽ wã, ne a sẽn maan to-to n deeg Damaas ne Hamat tẽmsã sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋda n so n lebs Israyɛllã, bõn-kãens fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings14:29 A Zeroboaam saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã. Yẽnda biig a Zakari n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings15:1 Israyɛll dĩm a Zeroboaam sẽn wa n deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a yopoɛɛlẽ, la a Amatsɩya biig a Azariya lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings15:2 A Azariya sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a rag n tara yʋʋm piig la a yoobe, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-nu la a yiib Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr la Yekoliya n yaa Zeruzalɛm bi-pugla." 
2Kings15:3 A Azariya maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda kell n maana wa a ba a Amatsɩya sẽn dag n maanã. 
2Kings15:4 La baoosg zãnga, b ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Nebã rag n ket n kẽnd n maanda maand la b yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã." 
2Kings15:5 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ wãood yõk rĩmã hal n tãag a kũum. Rẽ rag n kɩtame tɩ rĩmã welg n tɩ vɩ kɛɛng n ka naag nebã ye. Dẽ, yẽnda biig a Zotam lebga na-yirã zak naaba, n soog tẽngã neb fãa." 
2Kings15:6 A Azariya tʋʋmã fãa ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:7 A Azariya saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag a ba-rãmbã a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Zotam n led yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings15:8 Zʋʋda rĩm a Azariya sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a niinẽ, la a Zeroboaam biig a Zakari me lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽnga, la yẽnda rɩ a naamã kiis a yoobe." 
2Kings15:9 A Zakari maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda ba-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã. Yẽnda ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye." 
2Kings15:10 Ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Salum n yaa a Yabɛɛs biig zãmba a Zakari, n kʋ-a nebã fãa nifẽ, n deeg yẽnda zĩig n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings15:11 A Zakari tʋʋm a taabã gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:12 Bõn-kãens paama pidsg wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Zehu wã. Bãmb dag n yeelame: «Fo yagensã na n dɩɩ Israyɛll naamã hal n tɩ tãag zamaan a naasẽ soabã.» La a yɩɩ woto. 
2Kings15:13 Zʋʋda rĩm a Azariya sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a wɛɛlẽ, la a Yabɛɛs biig a Salum lebg rĩmã. A Yabɛɛs rɩɩ naamã kiuug a yembr bal Samaari tẽngã pʋga." 
2Kings15:14 A Gadi biig a Menahɛm yii Tirsa n kẽng Samaari n tɩ kʋ a Yabɛɛs biig a Salum n deeg naamã. 
2Kings15:15 A Salum tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn zãmb a Zakari wã gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:16 Wakat-kãnga, a Menahɛm kẽnga Tifsa n tɩ kʋ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã, la a kʋ neb nins sẽn dag n be toadgẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne Tirsa tẽngã n tɩ tãag Tifsa. Yẽnda sãama tẽn-bãmb b sẽn ka sak n deeg yẽnda wã yĩnga. La yẽnda weeda pagb nins sẽn tʋtã fãa pʋse." 
2Kings15:17 Zʋʋda rĩm a Azariya sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a wɛɛlẽ, la a Gadi biig a Menahɛm lebg Israyɛll dĩmã. A Menahɛm rɩ a naamã Samaari tẽng yʋʋm piiga." 
2Kings15:18 A Menahɛm vɩɩmã tɛka, a maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye." 
2Kings15:19 Asiiri rĩm a Pull wa n kẽe tẽngã pʋga. La a Menahɛm kõo yẽnda wanzuri toan pis-tã, n na n kos-a t'a sõng-a t'a rĩungã paam pãnga." 
2Kings15:20 Yaa Israyɛll tẽngã arzegs rãmb nengẽ la a Menahɛm reeg ligd-kãng n kõ Asiiri rĩm a Pulli. Bãmb ned kam fãa yaoo wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-nu. Woto, Asiiri rĩm a Pull lebg n loogame n ka kaoos tẽngã pʋg ye." 
2Kings15:21 A Menahɛm tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:22 A Menahɛm saka a saam-dãmba, t'a biig a Pekaya n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings15:23 Zʋʋda rĩm a Azariya sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-nuunẽ, la a Menahɛm biig a Pekaya lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari. A Pekaya rɩ a naamã yʋʋm a yiibu." 
2Kings15:24 A Pekaya maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, bala, yẽnda ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye." 
2Kings15:25 La a Remaliya biig a Peka sẽn yaa yẽnda wed-kɩɩm-naabã zãmb-a lame. A Peka peega Galaad neb pis-nu n kẽng na-yirã sẽn be Samaari wã, n tɩ kẽ n kʋ rĩm a Pekaya, la a kʋ a Argoob ne a Ariye. A Peka kʋʋ a Pekaya n deeg a zĩig n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings15:26 A Pekaya tʋʋmã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:27 Zʋʋda rĩm a Azariya sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-nu la a yiiblẽ, la a Remaliya biig a Peka lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari tẽnga. Yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi." 
2Kings15:28 A Peka maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda ka bas yel-wẽn nins a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn maan n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã lʋɩ kongr pʋgã ye. 
2Kings15:29 A Peka sẽn wa n yaa Israyɛll dĩmã wakate, Asiiri rĩm a Tɩlgat-Pilezɛɛr wa n zab n deega Iyon, Abɛll-Bɛt-Maaka, ne Yanoak la Kedɛɛse, la a reeg Hatsoor ne Galaad la Galɩle, n paas Neftali tẽngã zãnga, la a yõg tẽn-kãens nebã n tall n kẽng Asiiri." 
2Kings15:30 A Ela biig a Ooze zãmba a Remaliya biig a Peka n kʋ-a, n deeg a zĩig n dɩ naam. La rẽ tɩ yaa a Azariya biig a Zotam sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pissiiblẽ." 
2Kings15:31 A Peka tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:32 A Remaliya biig a Peka sẽn deeg Israyɛll naam tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, la a Azariya biig a Zotam lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings15:33 Yẽnda sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã, t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zeruzalɛm. A Zotam ma wã yʋʋr la a Yeruusa, n yaa a Sadok bi-pugla." 
2Kings15:34 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zotam maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda kell n maana wa yẽnda ba a Azariya sẽn dag n maanã. 
2Kings15:35 La baoosg zãnga, bãmb ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Nebã rag n ket n kẽnd n maanda maand la b yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã. A Zotam mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngr doogã dignoore." 
2Kings15:36 A Zotam tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings15:37 Yaa Wakat-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩng n na n tʋm Siiri rĩm a Retsĩn ne Israyɛll dĩm a Peka sẽn yaa a Remaliya biigã tɩ b na n tɩ zab ne Zʋʋda tẽngã. 
2Kings15:38 Rĩm a Zotam saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a n naag a ba-rãmbã, a yaab a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Akaaz leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings16:1 A Remaliya biig a Peka sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yopoɛɛlẽ, la a Zotam biig a Akaaz lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings16:2 A Akaaz sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi. La a rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm piig la a yoobe. Yẽnda ka maan sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã nifẽ, wa yẽnda yaab a Davɩɩd sẽn maanã ye." 
2Kings16:3 A Akaaz me maana wa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmb a taabã, hal n tol n dɩk a meng biig n kõ tɩ b maan maoong n yõog bugum, wa buud a taabã sẽn dag n maand tʋʋm-beed nins tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã rig-bã." 
2Kings16:4 Yẽnda rag n kẽnd n maanda maand la a yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã ne kunkubã zutu, la ne tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn tar-b maasmã tẽngre." 
2Kings16:5 Woto, Siiri rĩm a Retsĩn ne a Remaliya biig a Peka sẽn dag n yaa Israyɛll dĩmã kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne Zeruzalɛm. Bãmb gũbga a Akaaz n na n zab ne-a, la b ka tõog n zab ne-a ye." 
2Kings16:6 Wakat-kãnga, Siiri rĩm a Retsĩn tõog n deega Elat tẽngã n lebs Siiri nebã nugẽ. A Retsĩn riga Zʋɩf-rãmbã n yiis Elat tẽnga, la Edom nebã wa n kẽe Elat tẽngã n ti, n ket n be beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Kings16:7 A Akaaz tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Tɩlgat-Pilezɛɛr n tɩ yeel Asiiri rĩmã yaa: «Mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda, la y biiga. Wa-y n fãag-y maam Siiri rĩmã ne Israyɛll dĩmã nugẽ, bala, b yik n dat n zaba ne maam.»" 
2Kings16:8 A Akaaz wʋka wanzuri wã ne sãnemã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kõ Asiiri rĩmã. 
2Kings16:9 Asiiri rĩmã kelga a Akaaz goamã, n yik n tɩ zab ne Damaas sẽn yaa Siiri na-tẽngã n tõog n deeg-a, la a yõg tẽngã neb n tall-b n tɩ kẽes yembd Kɩɩr tẽnga, la a kʋ Siiri rĩm a Retsĩn." 
2Kings16:10 Rĩm a Akaaz kẽnga Damaas n na n tɩ seg Asiiri rĩm a Tɩlgat-Pilezɛɛre. Rĩm a Akaaz sẽn tɩ yã tẽn-kugr ning sẽn be Damaasã, a rɩka tẽn-kugrã mamsgã fãa ne a meebã sẽn tog n yɩ to-to wã n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kɩs maan-kʋʋd a Uuri." 
2Kings16:11 Maan-kʋʋd a Uuri mee tẽn-kugrã t'a kell n zems wa mamsg ning rĩm a Akaaz sẽn zĩnd Damaas n tʋm tɩ b wa kõ yẽnda wã. Maan-kʋʋd a Uuri mee tẽn-kugrã n sɛ tɩ rĩm a Akaaz nan ka yi Damaas n wa ye. 
2Kings16:12 Rĩmã sẽn yi Damaas n lebg n wa yã tẽn-kugrã, a kolgame n dʋ a zugu," 
2Kings16:13 n kɩt tɩ b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, ne bõn-koaadl kũunã a zugu, la a rɩk bõn-yũudlã n daag beenẽ, la a rɩk zems-n-taar maandã zɩɩm n mes tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
2Kings16:14 La yẽnda yiisa zũud tẽn-kugrã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Wẽnd doogã noorã, n dɩk-a n tɩ vigl tẽn-kug-paalgã rɩtgo." 
2Kings16:15 Rĩm a Akaaz yeela maan-kʋʋd a Uuri yaa: «Rɩk yibeoog maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne zaabr kũunã, la rĩmã maoong ning sẽn yõogd bugmã ne a bõn-koaadl kũunã, la tẽngã nebã fãa maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne b bõn-koaadl kũunã, n yõog tẽn-kug-paalgã zugu. La f rɩk b bõn-yũudl kũunã n walg a zugu, la f rɩk maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã fãa zɩɩm ne maandã fãa zɩɩmã, n mes tẽn-kugrã zugu. La sã n yaa ne zũud tẽn-kugrã, mam meng n na n ges yẽnda yelle.»" 
2Kings16:16 Woto, maan-kʋʋd a Uuri kell n maana wa rĩm a Akaaz sẽn yeelã." 
2Kings16:17 Rĩm a Akaaz pãba zũud sĩn-bedrã rogendsã n wã, la a sik sĩn-bedrã sẽn dag n zao niigã b sẽn maan ne zũudã zutã. La a rɩka sĩn-bedrã n dogl kug zutu." 
2Kings16:18 A Akaaz sẽn dat n maan sẽn noom Asiiri rĩmã yĩnga, yẽnda toeema zãong ning sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg tɩ b boondẽ tɩ vʋʋsg daar zãongã. B me-a lame t'a tond yɩng tɩ rĩmã tũud be n kẽedẽ." 
2Kings16:19 Rĩm a Akaaz tʋʋm a taabã ne bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maanã gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings16:20 A Akaaz saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a lame n naag a ba-rãmbã a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. Yẽnda biig a Ezekɩyaas n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings17:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaaz sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yiiblẽ, la a Ela biig a Ooze lebg Israyɛll dĩm Samaari. Yẽnda rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a wɛ." 
2Kings17:2 A Ooze maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la baoosg zãnga, yẽnda wẽngã maaneg ka ta Israyɛll dĩm-dãmb a taabã sẽn deng yẽnda wã ye." 
2Kings17:3 Asiiri rĩm a Salmanasaar waame n na n zab ne rĩm a Ooze. La yẽnda tõoga a Ooze n kɩt t'a yaood yaood yʋʋmd fãa. 
2Kings17:4 La Asiiri rĩmã wa n bãngame t'a Ooze zãmbda yẽnda. Sɩd me, a Ooze dag n soos n tʋma neb Ezɩpt rĩm a So nengẽ, n ka yao Asiiri rĩmã yaood ning a sẽn dag n yaood yʋʋmd fãa wã ye. Asiiri rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Ooze n kẽes bi-bees roog n balg-a ne bãense." 
2Kings17:5 Dẽ zugẽ, Asiiri rĩmã zaba ne Israyɛll soolmã tẽms fãa, la yẽnda wa n gũbga Samaari tẽngã yʋʋm a tãabo." 
2Kings17:6 La yaa a Ooze sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm wɛɛlẽ, la Asiiri rĩmã tõog n deeg Samaari tẽngã. Asiiri rĩmã yõga Israyɛll nebã n tall n kẽng a tẽngẽ wã. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tɩ zĩnd Hala, ne Goozã kʋɩlg ning b sẽn boond tɩ Haboorã noore, la Meed rãmbã tẽmsẽ." 
2Kings17:7 Bõn-kãens sẽn yɩ woto wã, yaa tɩ Israyɛll nebã maana yel-wẽn n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã. Bãmb basa Wẽnnaam ning sẽn fãag-a bãmb Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ yembdã pʋgẽ, n yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã, n waoog wẽnnaam-dãmb a taaba." 
2Kings17:8 Israyɛll nebã maana wa buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ bãmb digã sẽn dag n maandã. Yaa woto la Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã rag n maanda. 
2Kings17:9 Israyɛll nebã soos n maana sẽn kisi, n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã. Bãmb mee maoong kʋʋb zĩis b tẽmsã fãa pʋse, sẽn sɩng ne gũudbã gãsdã hal n tɩ tãag tẽms nins sẽn me n gũbg ne lalsã." 
2Kings17:10 Israyɛll nebã baoo kug-viginds ne Aseera ra-lugdsi, n lugl maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã, ne tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn tar maasmã tẽngre." 
2Kings17:11 Woto, Israyɛll nebã yõoga wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã fãa, wa buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b rigã sẽn dag n maandã. Bãmb maana tʋʋm-wẽns wʋsg hal n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puugi." 
2Kings17:12 Bãmb waooga wẽn-naandse, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n yeel bãmb tɩ b ra sak n maan bũmb a woto ye." 
2Kings17:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n kɩtame tɩ bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã ne b bãngdbã fãa keoog Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã n yeel-b yaa: «Wẽnemd-y n bas-y y tʋʋm-wẽnsã, n sak mam tõodã ne m noyã, la y sak tõod nins fãa mam sẽn kɩt tɩ m tʋmtʋmdbã ne m no-rɛɛsdbã togs yãmb ba-rãmbã.»" 
2Kings17:14 La bãmb ka kelg ye. Bãmb kenga b sũyã, wa bãmb ba-rãmbã me sẽn dag n ka tẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
2Kings17:15 Bãmb kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noyã ne b kaoolã b sẽn dag n maan ne bãmb ba-rãmbã, la zãmsg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã. Bãmb nebã lagma b mens ne sẽn ka yõodo, tɩ bãmb mensã lebg sẽn ka yõodo. Bãmb tɩ naaga b mens ne bu-zẽms nins sẽn dag n gũbg bãmbã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n yeela bãmb tɩ b ra maan wa bu-bãmb ye." 
2Kings17:16 Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã tõodã fãa, n yõg nag-bi a yiibu, la b vigl Aseera ra-lugdg n wõgemded a taoor n waoogd-a. Bãmb dag n wõgemded n waoogda yĩngr ãdse, la b waoogd wẽn-naandg a Baalle." 
2Kings17:17 Bãmb dɩka b kom-dibli ne b kom-pugli n maan maoong n yõog bugum. Bãmb dag n maanda tɩto, la b bʋgd bagre. Bãmb maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n kɩt tɩ b sũurã puugi." 
2Kings17:18 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puuga ne Israyɛll nebã hal wʋsgo, tɩ b kɩt tɩ b zãag ne bãmba. La yaa Zʋʋda buudã bal n dag n kete." 
2Kings17:19 La Zʋʋda nebã me ka tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã tõodã ye. Bãmb tũu Israyɛll nebã minindu. 
2Kings17:20 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa Israyɛll buudã zãng n ning-b yãnde, n bas tɩ fãadb wa fã-ba. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab baas n dig-b lame tɩ b zãag ne bãmba." 
2Kings17:21 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n welg Israyɛll buudã n bas a Davɩɩd roogã, rẽ tɩ yaa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yãk a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam t'a yaa rĩmã. La a Zeroboaam tudga Israyɛll nebã n kɩt tɩ b wẽnemd n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab n lʋɩ kong-kãseng pʋgẽ." 
2Kings17:22 Israyɛll nebã maana yel-wẽn nins fãa a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maanã n ka bas ye. 
2Kings17:23 B maana woto hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n wẽnemd b neng n bas-b wa b sẽn dag n kɩt bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yaa b tʋmtʋmdbã togsã. La b yiisa Israyɛll nebã b tẽngẽ wã, n tall-b n kẽng Asiiri tẽngã, la b kell n paa be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Kings17:24 La Asiiri rĩmã kɩtame tɩ Babilond ne Kuta la Ava ne Hamat ne Sefarvayim neb wa kẽ Samaari tẽmsã pʋs n zĩnd be, n led Israyɛll nebã zĩigẽ. Bãmb sooga Samaari tẽngã n zĩnd a tẽmsã pʋse." 
2Kings17:25 Bãmb sẽn wa n kẽ Samaari tẽngã, bãmb ka waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋm gɩgma tɩ b yõg bãmb neb wʋsg n kʋ." 
2Kings17:26 La b kẽng n tɩ yeela Asiiri rĩmã yaa: «Buud nins yãmb sẽn yõg n tall n wa kẽes Samaari tẽmsã pʋsã ka mi tẽngã wẽnnaamã sẽn waoogd to-to ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ wẽnnaamã tʋm gɩgmã tɩ b wa wãb bãmb n kʋ, b sẽn ka sakd Wẽnnaam tõodã yĩnga.»" 
2Kings17:27 Asiiri rĩmã kõo noor n yeele: «Sã n yaa woto, bɩ y kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋdb nins yãmb sẽn yõg n wa Asiiri ka wã ned a yembr kẽng n tɩ zĩnd beenẽ ne bãmba, n zãms-b tẽngã wẽnnaamã sẽn waoogd to-to.»" 
2Kings17:28 Woto, maan-kʋʋdb nins b sẽn yõg n tall n yi Samaari tẽngã ned a yembr yii Asiiri n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Betɛlle, la maan-kʋʋdã zãmsa nebã b sẽn na n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab to-to." 
2Kings17:29 La buud fãa maana a wẽnnaam-dãmba, n dɩk-b n tɩ ning maoong kʋʋb zĩisã rot pʋsẽ, Samaari tẽmsã nebã sẽn dag n me wã. La buud fãa maana woto tẽms nins bãmb sẽn be wã pʋse." 
2Kings17:30 Babilond nebã maana wẽn-naandg a Sukot-Benote, tɩ Kut nebã maan wẽn-naandg a Nergalle, la Hamat nebã maana wẽn-naandg a Asima." 
2Kings17:31 Ava nebã maana wẽn-naandg a Nibaaz ne wẽn-naandg a Tartake. La Sefarvayim nebã rag n dɩkda b kamb n maand maoong n yõogd bugum n kõt a Adramelɛk ne a Anamelɛk sẽn yaa Sefarvayim nebã wẽnnaam-dãmbã. 
2Kings17:32 Bãmb dag n waoogda Sẽn-Ka-Saab me. Woto, bãmb yãka neb bãmb sʋkã, tɩ b yɩ pʋʋsg rotã sẽn be maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã maan-kʋʋdba, n maand maoong b yʋʋr yĩnga." 
2Kings17:33 Woto, bãmb dag n waoogda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b baas n ket n pʋʋsda b mens wẽn-naandsã wa bãmb sẽn yi buud nins sʋk n wa wã sẽn minim n maandẽ wã." 
2Kings17:34 La hal tɩ ta rũndã, bãmb ket n maanda b sẽn minim n maandẽ wã. Bãmb ka waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bãmb ka tũud no-tũuds nins ne minind nins b sẽn zãms bãmbã ye. La b ka sakd tõodã ne noy nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Zakoob yagensã ye. Yaa a Zakoob la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Israyɛllã." 
2Kings17:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n maana kaool ne a Zakoob yagensã n yeele: «Ra waoog-y wẽnnaam-dãmb a taabã ye. Ra wõgemd-y bãmb taoor n pʋʋs-ba, la y ra maan maoong n kõ-b ye." 
2Kings17:36 Bɩ y waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tẽeg b kangã n yiis yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã ne pãn-kãsengã. Yaa bãmb taoor bal la yãmb tog n wõgemde, la yaa bãmb b yembr bal la yãmb tog n maan maoong n kõ." 
2Kings17:37 Bɩ y sak no-tũudsã ne minindã la noyã, ne tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ yãmbã daar fãa, la y ra waoog wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab ye." 
2Kings17:38 Da yĩm-y kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne yãmbã yelle, la y ra waoog wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab ye." 
2Kings17:39 Yãmb tog n waooga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã b yembr bala, yaa bãmb n na n fãag yãmb y bɛɛbã fãa nugẽ.»" 
2Kings17:40 La nebã ka kelg ye. Bãmb kell n maana wa b sẽn minim n maandẽ wã bala. 
2Kings17:41 Bu-kãens rag n waoogda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b pʋʋsd b wẽn-naandsã me. Bãmb kambã ne b yagensã me ket n maanda woto hal tɩ ta rũndã, wa bãmb ba-rãmbã sẽn dag n maandã." 
2Kings18:1 A Ela biig a Ooze sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, la a Akaaz biig a Ezekɩyaas me lebg Zʋʋda rĩmã." 
2Kings18:2 A Ezekɩyaas sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu. La yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zeruzalɛm tẽnga. Yẽnda ma yʋʋr la a Abi, n yaa a Zakari bi-pugla."
