2Kings18:3 A Ezekɩyaas maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda yaab a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n maan to-to wã." 
2Kings18:4 Yẽnda menesa maoong kʋʋb zĩisã, la a wã kug-vigindsã, la a kɛ Aseera ra-lugdsã, la a pãb zũud waafã a Moyiis sẽn dag n maanã n wã, bala, Israyɛll nebã rag n ket n yõogda wisd waafã taoore, la b rag n pʋd-a t'a Nehustan." 
2Kings18:5 A Ezekɩyaas rɩka a teegrã zãng n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. La Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn pʋgl a Ezekɩyaasã ne sẽn deng-b yẽnda n zĩndã sʋka, ned ba a yembr ka tõog n maan wa yẽnda ye." 
2Kings18:6 A Ezekɩyaas sũurã rag n loee ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yẽnda ka tol n wẽnemd n bas-b ye. La yẽnda rag n sakda tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiisã." 
2Kings18:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Ezekɩyaas. A Ezekɩyaas rag n paamda tõogr ne a tʋʋmã fãa. La yẽnda kɩɩsa Asiiri rĩmã, t'a ka leb n sak n bas t'a soog-b ye." 
2Kings18:8 Yaa a Ezekɩyaas n zab n tõog Filistẽ-dãmbã hal n tɩ tãag Gaaza tẽnga, n deeg zĩisã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne gũudbã gãsdã hal n tɩ tãag tẽms nins sẽn me n gũbg ne lalsã." 
2Kings18:9 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, t'a Ela biig a Ooze sẽn lebg Israyɛll dĩm tɩ yʋʋm yopoɛɛlẽ, la Asiiri rĩm a Salmanasaar wa n gũbg Samaari n na n zab ne-a." 
2Kings18:10 A Salmanasaar zaba ne Samaari tẽngã yʋʋm a tãab n yaool n tõog n deeg-a. La yaa rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yoaablẽ, la Israyɛll dĩm a Ooze sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm wɛɛlẽ, la a Salmanasaar tõog n deeg Samaari tẽngã." 
2Kings18:11 Asiiri rĩmã talla Israyɛll nebã n kẽng a tẽngẽ wã, n dɩk-b n tɩ ning Hala, ne Goozã kʋɩlg ning b sẽn boond tɩ Haboorã noore, la ne Meed rãmbã tẽms pʋse." 
2Kings18:12 Sẽn yɩ woto wã yaa tɩ Israyɛll nebã ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛg ye. Bãmb kɩɩsa kaoolã, la b ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis koɛɛgã, n maan bũmb nins fãa a sẽn yeelã ye." 
2Kings18:13 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a naaslẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib wa n na n zaba ne Zʋʋda tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã n deeg-ba." 
2Kings18:14 Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas tʋmame tɩ b kẽng Lakiis tẽng n tɩ yeel Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib yaa: «Mam kongame! Da wa-y n zab-y ne-m ye. Yãmb sẽn na n yaoolg maam yaood ning fãa, mam na n yaoome.» Woto, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib yeela Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas t'a yao yẽnda wanzuri toan a wɛ, ne sãnem kɩlo kobs-wɛ." 
2Kings18:15 Woto, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas wʋka wanzuri ning sẽn be Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgã, ne na-yirã laog bĩngr zĩisẽ wã n kõ Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriibi." 
2Kings18:16 Wakat-kãnga, a Ezekɩyaas pãba Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ra-lugdsã ne kʋɩlemsã n wã n yãk sãnemã sẽn dag n bolg bãmb zutã n tɩ kõ Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriibi." 
2Kings18:17 Asiiri rĩmã tʋma a tãnsoben-kãsengã ne a tãb-biis naabã ne a zu-soben-kãsengã n paas tãb-biis wʋsg tɩ b yi Lakiis n kẽng rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ Zeruzalɛm. Bãmb sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, b kẽng n tɩ yalsa bãkã ko-so-kãsengã sẽn be ga-loasdã pʋʋgã sor noorã." 
2Kings18:18 Bãmb baoome n na n gom ne rĩmã. Woto, a Hilkiiza biig a Eliyakim sẽn yaa na-yirã balem-naabã ne a Sebna sẽn yaa na-yirã seb-gʋndã ne a Azaf biig a Yoa sẽn yaa seb-bĩngdã yiime n tɩ seg bãmba." 
2Kings18:19 La tãb-biis naabã yeela bãmb yaa: «M kotame tɩ y yeel a Ezekɩyaas woto: ‹Ade, rĩm-kãsengã sẽn yaa Asiiri rĩmã yetame: Fo teega bõe?" 
2Kings18:20 Yãmb tẽedame tɩ gom-zaal yaa yam sẽn kõt ned raood ne pãng t'a tõe n kẽng zabr la? Pʋs n yaa ãnda soab la yãmb teeg yã, n yik n dat n kɩɩs maam?" 
2Kings18:21 Moasã fo rɩka f teegrã n teeg Ezɩpte, Ezɩpt yaool n yaa wa tãnwĩ-kaoongo, n kõsd ned ning fãa sẽn tik yẽnda wã nugu. Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ maanda a woto ne neb nins fãa sẽn dɩk b teegr n teeg yẽnda wã." 
2Kings18:22 Daar ning yãmb na n yeela maam yaa: ‹Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã la tõnd teeg yã. La ka Wẽnnaam-kãng maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ne a tẽn-kugã la foom a Ezekɩyaas sẽn dag n sãame n bas tẽn-kugr a yembr n yeel Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã tɩ yaa tẽn-kug-kãng taoor la b na n wõgemded n waoogd Wẽnnaamã la! 
2Kings18:23 Moasã, mam kota foom, tɩ f maan sard ne mam soaalã sẽn yaa Asiiri rĩmã, la sã n mikame tɩ yãmb tara wed-rʋʋdb sẽn tõe n zomb wiidi, mam na n kõo yãmb wiid tus a yiibu." 
2Kings18:24 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb tõe n diga mam soaalã tʋmtʋmd ning sẽn yaa-a bilf n yɩɩdã meng t'a serge. Yãmb sẽn teeg Ezɩptã yaa b sẽn tar saar-dãmb ne wed-rʋʋdbã yĩnga." 
2Kings18:25 Sẽn paas me, yãmb tẽedame tɩ maam n soog n wa zab ne zĩ-kãngã n sãam-a tɩ ka tũ ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab raab la? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel maam yaa: ‹Zab ne tẽn-kãngã n sãam-a.› »" 
2Kings18:26 A Hilkiiza biig a Eliyakim ne a Sebna la a Yoa yeela sõgen-kãsengã yaa: «Tõnd kotame tɩ y gom ne tõnd ne Aram-dãmbã goamã, tɩ tõnd wʋmdame. Da gom-y ne tõnd ne Zʋʋda nebã goam tɩ neb nins sẽn be lalgã zugã wa wʋm ye.»" 
2Kings18:27 Sõgen-kãsengã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ mam soaalã koɛɛgã yaa yãmb ne y soaalã yĩng bal la? Koɛɛgã yaa neb nins sẽn be-b lalgã zugã me yĩnga. Bãmb ne yãmb na n dɩɩ y bĩndã la y yũ y rʋʋd-koomã.» 
2Kings18:28 Dẽ, sõgen-kãsengã yaasa yĩngr n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne Zʋʋda buudã goam n yeele: «Kelg-y Asiiri rĩmã sẽn yaa rĩm-kãsengã koɛɛga." 
2Kings18:29 Asiiri rĩmã yetame: ‹Ra sak-y t'a Ezekɩyaas belg yãmb ye. Bala, yẽnda ka tõe n fãag yãmb mam nugẽ ye." 
2Kings18:30 Da bas-y t'a belg yãmb tɩ y wa tẽed tɩ y sã n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b na n fãaga yãmba, la b ka na n sak tɩ Asiiri rĩmã tõog yãmb tẽngã ye." 
2Kings18:31 Da kelg-y rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ye.› Asiiri rĩmã yetame: ‹Bɩ y bao zems-n-taar ne maam. Bas-y tɩ m soog-yã. Woto, yãmb ned kam fãa na paam lohorem tɩ rɩ a reezẽ tɩɩsã ne a kankamã, la a tõog n yũ a bulgã koom," 
2Kings18:32 hal tɩ mam wa tall yãmb n kẽng tẽng sẽn wẽnd yãmb tẽngã. Yaa tẽng sẽn tar bɩle ne reezẽ rãam, la rɩɩb ne reezẽ tɩɩse, la yaa tẽng sẽn tar oliiv tɩɩs sẽn kõt kaam, la sɩɩd bee be. Woto, yãmb na n vɩɩmdame n ka ki ye. Dẽ wã, da kelg-y-yã a Ezekɩyaas sẽn belgd yãmb n yetẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n fãag-y lame wã ye." 
2Kings18:33 Rẽ yĩnga, buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmb tõog n fãag-b-la Asiiri rĩmã nugẽ sɩda?" 
2Kings18:34 Hamat-rãmbã ne Arpaad nebã wẽnnaam-dãmb bee yɛɛnẽ? Sefarvayim ne Hena la Iva nebã wẽnnaam-dãmbã bee yɛɛnẽ? Wẽnnaam-kãens tõog n fãaga Samaari tẽngã mam nugẽ sɩda? 
2Kings18:35 Tẽmsã fãa wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa sʋka, wẽnnaam-bʋg n tõog n fãag a tẽng mam nugẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wa tõog n fãag Zeruzalɛm mam nugẽ?› »" 
2Kings18:36 Nebã sĩnda b noore. B ka leok yẽnda tɩ bũmb ye. Bala, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas rag n yeelame yaa: «Da leok-y-yã-a ye.»" 
2Kings18:37 A Hilkiiza biig a Eliyakim sẽn yaa na-yirã zak naabã, ne a Sebna sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã ne a Azaf biig a Yoa sẽn yaa seb-bĩngdã pãrsa b futu. Bãmb lebg n leba rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ, n tɩ togs-a goam nins fãa Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã sẽn gomã." 
2Kings19:1 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã wã, a pãrsa a fut n yeelg boto, n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Kings19:2 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas tʋma a Eliyakim sẽn yaa na-yirã zak naabã ne a Sebna sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã, la maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã, a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã nengẽ. La b fãa yeelga bot n kẽnge." 
2Kings19:3 Bãmb yeela a Ezayi yaa: «A Ezekɩyaas yeelame: Rũndã daarã yaa sũ-sãang daare, sɩbgre la yãnd daare. Bala, rogem daar taame, la pãng ka be n na n dog ye." 
2Kings19:4 Daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n wʋma goam nins fãa Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã b sẽn tʋm t'a wa tʋʋs Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã to-to wã. Tõeeme tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n sɩbg-b-la goam nins yẽnda sẽn gom tɩ bãmb wʋmã yĩnga. Woto wã, bɩ y pʋʋs Wẽnnaam neb nins sẽn ketã yĩnga.»" 
2Kings19:5 Dẽ, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn tʋm b rãmbã kẽnga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi nengẽ." 
2Kings19:6 La a Ezayi yeela bãmb yaa: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n kẽng n tɩ yeel y soaalã bũmb ninga: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Da zoe rabeem ne goam nins Asiiri rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn gom n paoog maam tɩ fo wʋmã ye. 
2Kings19:7 Gese, mam na n tʋma sɩɩg yẽnda nengẽ. Yẽnda na n wʋma yell kibare n lebg n leb a tẽngẽ wã, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ yẽnda ne zabr sʋʋg a tẽngẽ wã.› »" 
2Kings19:8 Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã wʋmame t'a soaalã yii Lakɩɩse, n na n tɩ zab ne Libna tẽngã. La yẽnda kẽng n tɩ paam-a-la beenẽ." 
2Kings19:9 La Asiiri rĩmã wʋmame tɩ Kuus tẽng rĩm a Tiraka watame n na n wa zab ne yẽnda. Woto, yẽnda leb n tʋma neb rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ n yeele:" 
2Kings19:10 «Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas yaa: Ra bas tɩ Wẽnnaam ning fo sẽn teegã belg foom, n yeel tɩ Asiiri rĩmã ka na n tõog n deeg Zeruzalɛm ye." 
2Kings19:11 Fo mengã wʋma Asiiri rĩm-dãmb sẽn dag n maan tẽms a taabã fãa bũmb ningã. B sãam-b-la zãnga. Tɩ fo tagsdẽ tɩ foom n na n põse! 
2Kings19:12 Dẽ yĩnga, Goozã ne Haarã la Retsɛf ne Edɛn nebã sẽn be Telasaarã, sẽn yaa buud toay-toay nins mam ba-rãmbã sẽn sãamã wẽnnaam-dãmb tõog n fãag-b lame sɩda?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamat rĩmã ne Arpaad rĩmã la Sefarvayim tẽng rĩmã ne Hena rĩmã la Iva rĩmã bee yɛɛnẽ? 
2Kings19:14 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas reega sebrã koe-toagsdbã nugẽ n karme, la a yik n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n tɩ lak sebrã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
2Kings19:15 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n pʋʋs n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, n zao serubẽ-rãmb zugu, yaa yãmb y yembr bal n yaa dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽnga." 
2Kings19:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelge! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, puk-y y nin n gese. Kelg-y goam nins a Senakeriib sẽn tʋm sõgen-kãsengã t'a wa tʋʋsd yãmb a Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã!" 
2Kings19:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa sɩd tɩ Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã sãama buud toay-toayã, la b wã b tẽmsã." 
2Kings19:18 Bãmb wʋka b wẽnnaam-dãmbã n yõog bugum, n menes-b zãnga. La sɩd-sɩdã, wẽnnaam-bãmb rag n ka wẽnnaam-dãmb sɩd-sɩd ye. Bala, rag n yaa raad ne kug wẽn-naands ninsaalb nus sẽn maane." 
2Kings19:19 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, d kotame tɩ y fãag tõnd a Senakeriib nugẽ, tɩ dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa bãng tɩ yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab y yembr bal n yaa Wẽnnaam.»" 
2Kings19:20 Dẽ, a Amots biig a Ezayi tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ezekɩyaas yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam wʋma fo sẽn pʋʋs n kos maam Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib wɛɛngẽ wã.›»" 
2Kings19:21 Ad sɩbgr gomd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom yẽnda wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: Sɩyõ tẽn-neere, a yaanda foom, la a paoogd foom, Zeruzalɛm tẽn-neere, a bee fo poorẽ n gõmsda a zugu." 
2Kings19:22 Yaa ãnda la fo sẽn tʋʋs la f paoogã? Yaa ne ãnda la fo sẽn zẽk f koɛɛgã? Fo zẽka f neng yĩngr ne wuk-m-meng n zabd ne Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba! 
2Kings19:23 Fo tũnuga f sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã n paoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: «Mam kẽnga ne m saar-dãmb wʋsgo, mam tõog n dʋʋ tãms sẽn lug zutu, n tõog n ta hal Libã yaangã. Mam kɛɛ yẽnda sɛɛdr tɩ-wogdã, ne a sɩprɛs tɩɩs nins sẽn yaa neeb n yɩɩdã, mam tãaga a yaoolem zĩ-soalgdgã, a tʋg-bɛdã zĩisẽ." 
2Kings19:24 Mam tuu buls n yũ sãand weoog koom, mam nao na n kʋɩɩsa Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã fãa koom." 
2Kings19:25 Fo ka bãng tɩ yaa hal daar zãr la mam segl bõn-kãense, tɩ mam maana bãmb hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ? Moasã, mam kɩtdame tɩ b paamd pidsgu, fo tʋʋmd yaa f kɩt tɩ tẽms nins sẽn tar pãngã lebg raboodo." 
2Kings19:26 Tẽn-bãmb nebã ka tar pãng ye, rabeem la yãnd n tar-ba. Bãmb wẽnda wa moog sẽn be weoogẽ, la wa mo-maasa, la wa gãosg zug moogo. Bãmb lebga wa kood sẽn kʋɩ n ka paam n ning biis ye." 
2Kings19:27 Gese, mam mii fo zĩndg wakate, la f yiib ne f kõom wakate. Mam leb n mii wakat ning fo sẽn gʋngde, n dat n zab ne maamã." 
2Kings19:28 Bala, fo yika f sũur ne maam, la fo wuk-m-men-goamã zẽk n taa mam tʋbẽ, mam na n dɩka m bãngã n sog fo yõorã, la m ning fo noorã salbre, n kɩt tɩ f lebg n tũ sor ning fo sẽn tũ n wa wã n lebe.»" 
2Kings19:29 Ad bãnd ning mam sẽn kõt foom a Ezekɩyaas: Rõandã, nebã na n dɩɩ ka-yiisdim, la vẽere, b na n dɩɩ ka-yogdo, la yʋʋm-yɩta, b na n bʋdame la b tigsi, b na n sela reezẽ tɩɩs n dɩ b biisi." 
2Kings19:30 Neb nins sẽn põs Zʋʋda buudã sʋk n ketẽ wã, na n kɩɩ yẽg tẽn-gãongã pʋga, la b na n woma biis b wilã zutu." 
2Kings19:31 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglem-kãsengã na n kɩtame tɩ bu-kell yi Zeruzalɛm, la tɩ neb sẽn põs yi Sɩyõ tãngã zugu." 
2Kings19:32 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gom Asiiri rĩmã wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: ‹Yẽnda ka na n kẽ tẽn-kãngã pʋg ye, la a kõn tol n tão peemd ye. Yẽnda kõn tol n zẽk a gãong ye, la a kõn tol n zam tom-dʋr n zab ne-a ye." 
2Kings19:33 Yẽnda sẽn tũ sor ning n wa wã, a na n lebg n tũu so-kãng n lebe, la yẽnda kõn tol n kẽ tẽn-kãngã pʋg ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
2Kings19:34 Mam na n kogla tẽn-kãngã n fãag-a, mam mengã yʋʋrã yĩnga, la m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yĩnga.›»" 
2Kings19:35 Badaar yʋngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yiime n kẽng Asiiri nebã tãb-sikẽ n tɩ kʋ raop tus koabg la pis nii la a nu. B sẽn yik yibeoogo, b mikame tɩ bãmb fãa yaa kũum n dʋrẽ!" 
2Kings19:36 Dẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib lebg n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Niniivi." 
2Kings19:37 La yẽnda sẽn wa n be a wẽn-naandg a Nisrok pʋʋsg roogẽ wã, yẽnda kambã, a Adarmelɛk ne a Sarɛtsɛɛr kẽng n tɩ kʋ-a-la ne zabr sʋʋg la b bas n zoe n kẽng Araara tẽnga. La a biig Asaradon n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
2Kings20:1 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas lʋɩɩ bãag sẽn dat n kʋ-a. La a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã waa yẽnda nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Maneg f zakã yɛla. Bala, fo ka na n leb n vɩɩmd ye. Fo na n kiime.»" 
2Kings20:2 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas wẽnemda a neng n tees roogã lalgã, n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele:" 
2Kings20:3 «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kotame tɩ y tẽeg m yelle, m kotame tɩ y tẽeg tɩ mam dag n tũuda yãmb ne sɩda la ne m sũur fãa, la mam maana sẽn noom yãmba!» La a Ezekɩyaas yãba nintãm wʋsgo." 
2Kings20:4 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi sẽn yi n nan ket n be zag-bedrã pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne yẽnda n yeele:" 
2Kings20:5 «Lebg n kẽng n tɩ yeel mam nebã naab a Ezekɩyaas yaa: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo yaab a Davɩɩd Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam wʋma fo pʋʋsgã, mam yãnda fo nintãmã. Ade, mam na n maaga f bãagã, tɩ ka ne rasem a tãabo, bɩ f kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Kings20:6 Mam na n paasa fo vɩɩmã woglem yʋʋm piig la a nu. Mam na n fãaga foom ne tẽn-kãngã Asiiri rĩmã nugẽ. Mam mengã yʋʋr yĩnga, la a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã zug maasem yĩnga, mam na n kogla Zeruzalɛm tẽngã.› »" 
2Kings20:7 Dẽ zugẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi kɩtame tɩ b bao kankam n to n bɛ nodrã, la a Ezekɩyaas põsame n ka ki ye." 
2Kings20:8 A Ezekɩyaas rag n soka a Ezayi yaa: «Yaa ne bõe bãnd la mam na n bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maaga maam, tɩ ka ne rasem bɩ mam kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã?»" 
2Kings20:9 A Ezayi yeela yẽnda: «Ad bãnd ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõt foom n wilgdẽ tɩ bãmb na n pidsa b sẽn yeelã: Fo ratame tɩ b kɩt tɩ maasmã kẽng taoor nao-yakem piig bɩ? Bɩ f ratame t'a leb poorẽ nao-yakem piiga?» 
2Kings20:10 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas leokame: «Maasmã sẽn na n kẽng taoor nao-yakem piigã n yaa naana. Dẽ wã, mam datame t'a leb poorẽ nao-yakem piiga!»" 
2Kings20:11 Woto, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ maasmã targ n leb poorẽ nao-yakem piiga, a Akaaz rʋʋdgã zugu." 
2Kings20:12 Wakat-kãng bala, a Baladan biig a Merodak-Baladan sẽn yaa Babilond dĩmã tʋma neb tɩ b zã sebr ne kũun n tɩ kõ rĩm a Ezekɩyaas, bala, yẽnda rag n wʋmame t'a Ezekɩyaas lʋɩɩ bãaga." 
2Kings20:13 A Ezekɩyaas reega b sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã, la a wilga bãmb yẽnda arzɛkã bĩngr zĩisã fãa, wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, la parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogã, ne kaam toay-toayã, la ne a zab-teedã bĩngr zĩiga, ne teed nins fãa sẽn be yẽnda laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ wã. Bũmb ka be a Ezekɩyaas zakẽ wã ne a soolmẽ wã, t'a ka wilg neb nins Babilond dĩmã sẽn tʋmã ye." 
2Kings20:14 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi waa rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ n wa yeel-a yaa: «Nin-bãmbã wa n yeelame tɩ bõe? La b yii yɛɛnẽ?» A Ezekɩyaas leokame yaa: «Bãmb yii tẽn-zãrga, b yii Babilond soolmẽ wã.»" 
2Kings20:15 A Ezayi leb n sokame yaa: «Bãmb yãnda bõe fo zakẽ wã?» La a Ezekɩyaas leokame: «Bãmb yãnda bũmb ning fãa sẽn be mam zakẽ wã. Bũmb ka be mam laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ mam sẽn ka wilg-b ye.» 
2Kings20:16 Woto, a Ezayi yeela a Ezekɩyaas yaa: «Kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga." 
2Kings20:17 ‹Daar n wate, tɩ b na n wʋk bũmb ning fãa sẽn be fo zakẽ wã, ne fo yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n bĩng bũmb ning hal tɩ ta rũndã wã n tall n kẽng Babilonde. Bũmb kõn tol n kell ye.› Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
2Kings20:18 B na n yõga kom-dibli nins sẽn yaa yãmb meng kom-dogdsã n tall n loog tɩ b tɩ lebg zu-soben-dãmb Babilond dĩmã na-yir pʋga.› » 
2Kings20:19 A Ezekɩyaas leoka a Ezayi yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg ning fo sẽn togsã yaa sõama.» A leb n yeelame: Mam sẽn ket n vɩ wã wakate, vɩ-bãan la laafɩ we n zĩndi." 
2Kings20:20 A Ezekɩyaas tʋʋm a taabã, ne a gãndaalmã tʋʋmã fãa, ne bãkã la ko-sorã yẽnda sẽn tu n kɩt tɩ koom kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ wã gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings20:21 A Ezekɩyaas saka a saam-dãmba, la yẽnda bi-ribl a Manaase n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings21:1 A Manaase sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm piig la yiibu. A Manaase rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-nu la a nu Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga. Yẽnda ma yʋʋr dag n yaa a Hɛfsiba. 
2Kings21:2 A Manaase maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Bala, yẽnda maana togs-n-taar ne buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã rigã, n maan tʋʋm-beedo." 
2Kings21:3 A Manaase lebsa maoong kʋʋb zĩis nins yẽnda ba a Ezekɩyaas sẽn dag n pãb n wã wã n me, la a me tẽn-kug a Baall yĩnga, la a lugl Aseera ra-lugdg wa Israyɛll dĩm a Akaab sẽn dag n maanã, la a wõgemd n waoog yĩngr ãdse." 
2Kings21:4 A Manaase mee tẽn-kug Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n yeelame: «Yaa Zeruzalɛm n na n yɩ mam belem la m yʋʋrã waoogr zĩiga.» 
2Kings21:5 A Manaase mee tẽn-kug yĩngr ãdsã fãa yʋʋr yĩng n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zags a yiibã pʋse. 
2Kings21:6 Yẽnda tol n dɩka a biig n maan maoong n yõogd bugum. A bʋga bagre, la a pʋʋs sɩɩse. Yẽnda yãka neb n kɩt tɩ b sokd kɩɩmse, n na n bãng beoog yelle. A Manaase kell n kẽnga taoor n maand sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yiki." 
2Kings21:7 Yẽnda ninga Aseera bõn-naandgã yẽnda sẽn kɩt tɩ b maanã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. Yaa ro-kãng wɛɛngẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Davɩɩd ne a biig a Salmo tɩ: «Yaa ro-kãngã pʋga, ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã la mam yãk Israyɛll buudã fãa sʋka, n na n kɩt tɩ m yʋʋrã zĩnd be wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
2Kings21:8 Israyɛll nebã sã n sak mam noyã, la b kell n maan wa mam sẽn yeel-bã, tɩ fãa zems wa tõog ning mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn kõ bãmbã zãnga, mam ka na n leb n bas tɩ b yi n bas b yaab-rãmbã tẽng n saad n yeebdẽ ye.»" 
2Kings21:9 La Zʋʋda nebã ka kelg ye. A Manaase kẽes-b-la weoogo, n kɩt tɩ b maan wẽng n yɩɩd buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã sãamã sẽn dag n maandã." 
2Kings21:10 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma b no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa:" 
2Kings21:11 «Zʋʋda rĩm a Manaase sẽn tʋm tʋʋm-beedã, la a maan wẽng n yɩɩd Amoor nebã sẽn deng yẽnda wã, n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda nebã pʋʋs wẽn-naands n kẽ beegr pʋgẽ wã yĩnga," 
2Kings21:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed paam Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda, hal tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n wʋm-a bõn-kãngã yɛɛse." 
2Kings21:13 Mam na n sãama Zeruzalɛm wa m sẽn sãam Samaari tẽngã, la m sarm-a wa m sẽn sarem a Akaab roogã. Mam na n nedga Zeruzalɛm wa ned sẽn nedgd wamd n fõgne." 
2Kings21:14 Mam na n basa m neb nins sẽn kellã tɩ b bɛɛbã soog-ba. Bãmb bɛɛbã fãa na n fãa bãmb n dees b sẽn tarã n bas-ba. 
2Kings21:15 Bala, bãmb maana sẽn yaa wẽng n beeg maam. Bãmb kɩɩsa maam hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning bãmb ba-rãmbã sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ ta rũndã.› »" 
2Kings21:16 Sẽn paase, rĩm a Manaase kʋʋ neb wʋsg sẽn ka tar yelle, n daag b zɩɩm n pid Zeruzalɛm tẽngã fãa. Yel-kãens wa n paasa yel-wẽn nins yẽnda sẽn kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda nebã maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wã." 
2Kings21:17 A Manaase tʋʋm a taabã ne a yɛlã fãa, la a sẽn maan yel-wẽn nins gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga." 
2Kings21:18 Rĩm a Manaase saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a yirã zẽed zĩig pʋga, a Uuza zẽedã pʋga. La a biig a Amo n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings21:19 Rĩm a Amo sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu, la a rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a yiibu. Yẽnda ma yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Mesulamete, n yaa Yotba tẽng rao a Haruts bi-pugla." 
2Kings21:20 Rĩm a Amo maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda ba a Manaase sẽn dag n maanã." 
2Kings21:21 Yẽnda kell n maana a yɛlã fãa wa a ba a Manaase sẽn dag n maanã. Yẽnda pʋʋsa wẽn-naands nins yẽnda ba wã sẽn dag n wõgemded b taoorã. 
2Kings21:22 Yẽnda bʋdg n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda saam-dãmbã Wẽnnaamã, n ka tũ bãmb sorã ye." 
2Kings21:23 Rĩm a Amo tʋmtʋmdbã zemsa taab n zãmb-a n kʋ-a na-yirã pʋga. 
2Kings21:24 La tẽngã nebã kʋʋ neb nins fãa sẽn zãmb rĩm a Amo n kʋ wã, la b yãk a Amo bi-ribl a Zoziyaas t'a led a ba zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
2Kings21:25 Rĩm a Amo tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maanã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings21:26 B muma a Amo a meng yaoog pʋga, a Uuza zẽedã zĩigẽ. La a biig a Zoziyaas n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings22:1 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm a nii, la a rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pis-tã la a ye. Yẽnda ma yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Yedida, n yaa Botskat tẽng rao a Adaya bi-pugla." 
2Kings22:2 A Zoziyaas maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n tũ a yaab a Davɩɩd naoor n ka bʋdg n leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
2Kings22:3 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, a tʋma a Mesulam biig a Atsaliya biig a Safãn sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã, n yeel-a yaa:" 
2Kings22:4 «Kẽng maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Hilkiiza nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a t'a sõd ligd ning nebã sẽn talld n wat n kɩt Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noor gũudbã. 
2Kings22:5 Yeel-a t'a rɩk ligd-kãng n kɩs neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmd yellã. Dẽ, bãmb n na n yao neb nins sẽn manegd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zĩis nins sẽn pusã." 
2Kings22:6 Yaa ra-wãadbã, tãn-metbã ne tʋmtʋmdbã, la b ra raadã ne kugã sẽn peesã, roogã manegr yĩnga." 
2Kings22:7 La y ra sok-b b sẽn tall ligdã n maan bũmb ning ye. Bala, b tʋmda ne pʋ-peelem.»" 
2Kings22:8 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Hilkiiza yeela seb-gʋnd a Safãn yaa: «Gese, mam yãnda tõodã sebr Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg n dɩke.» Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza rɩka tõodã sebr n kɩs seb-gʋnd a Safãn t'a zẽk a koɛɛg n karm-a." 
2Kings22:9 Dẽ, seb-gʋnd a Safãn kẽnga rĩm a Zoziyaas nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã tigsa ligd ning sẽn be Wẽnd doogẽ wã n kɩs neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋm yellã taoor-dãmba.»" 
2Kings22:10 Seb-gʋnd a Safãn leb n yeela rĩmã yaa: «Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza kɩsa maam sebre.» La yẽnda zẽka a koɛɛg n karem sebrã rĩmã taoore. 
2Kings22:11 B sẽn karem tõodã sebr tɩ rĩm a Zoziyaas wʋm goam nins sẽn gʋls a pʋgẽ wã, a pãrsa a futu." 
2Kings22:12 Rĩmã yeela maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza ne a Safãn biig a Ayikam, la a Miise biig a Akboore, ne seb-gʋnd a Safãn la rĩmã tʋmtʋmd a Aazaya yaa:" 
2Kings22:13 «Kẽng-y n tɩ sok-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ges sebr ning b sẽn yã wã goamã yell sẽn yaa to-to n wa togs maam ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga wʋsg ne tõndo. Tõnd yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka sak seb-kãngã goamã fãa n maan wa b sẽn gʋls be n wilg tõndã kɩtame, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik ne tõndo.»" 
2Kings22:14 Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza ne a Ayikam la a Akboor ne a Safãn n paas a Aaza kẽnga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-poak a Ulda nengẽ. A Ulda rag n yaa a Haraas biig a Tikva biig a Salum sẽn yaa fut bĩngdã paga. Pʋg-kãng rag n bee Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sag-paallã pʋga. La bãmb dɩka koɛɛgã n togs a Ulda. 
2Kings22:15 Pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «Ade, kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y ned ning sẽn tʋm-a yãmb mam nengẽ wã, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame:" 
2Kings22:16 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam tẽn-kãngã ne a nebã, wa sẽn zems goam nins fãa sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ tɩ Zʋʋda rĩmã karem n yãndã wã." 
2Kings22:17 Bãmb sẽn wẽnemd n bas maam n yõog wisd n kõ wẽn-naandse, la b tʋm tʋʋm-wẽns buud fãa wã yĩnga, mam sũurã yika ne tẽn-kãngã n ka na n sig ye." 
2Kings22:18 La y yeel Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y wa sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gesã yaa: Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel bũmb ninga, goam nins yãmb sẽn wʋmã wɛɛngẽ:" 
2Kings22:19 Mam sẽn wilg m sẽn na n maan Zeruzalɛm ne a nebã bũmb ningã, la m sẽn yeel tɩ m na n sãam-a lame n kɩt t'a yɩ tẽng sẽn ka barkã yĩnga, fo sũurã sãamame, tɩ f sik f meng maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Fo pãrsa f futu, n yãb mam taoore. Woto, mam me wʋmame. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n gome." 
2Kings22:20 Yaa woto yĩnga, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ f ki ne bãane, n sak f saam-dãmba, n gãand f yaoogẽ wã n ka tol n yãnd tood nins mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ tẽn-kãngã paamã ye. Dẽ, bãmb lebg n kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ taas-a no-rɛɛs-poakã leokrã.»" 
2Kings23:1 Rĩmã tʋma neb tɩ b bool Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm kãsem-dãmbã fãa tɩ b wa tigim yẽnda nengẽ. 
2Kings23:2 La rĩmã kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, yẽnda ne Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa, ne maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã, la ne nin-buiidã zãnga, sẽn sɩng ne bãooneg tɩ tãag bɛda. La yẽnda karma kaoolã sebr b sẽn dag n yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã goamã fãa tɩ nebã fãa kelge." 
2Kings23:3 Rĩmã yalsa yĩngri, Wẽnd doogã ra-lugdg sɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n wẽen n yeele: «Mam na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la m sak bãmb tõodã ne b noyã, la goam nins sẽn gʋls tõodã sebr pʋgẽ wã ne m sũur fãa, la ne m yamã fãa.» La nebã fãa naaga rĩmã n wẽen a woto." 
2Kings23:4 Rĩmã yeela maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Hilkiiza ne maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn sõngd yẽnda wã, la roogã noor gũudbã tɩ b yiis teed nins fãa sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã tɩ b tar n waoogd Baall ne Aseera la yĩngr ãdsã. Bãmb talla te-bãmb n yi Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋg n tɩ yõog bugum pʋtã sẽn be Sedrõ longã pʋgã, la b wʋk a tompeglmã n tall n kẽng Betɛlle." 
2Kings23:5 Rĩm a Zoziyaas yiisa maan-kʋʋdb nins Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n yãk tɩ b yõogd wisd maoong kʋʋb zĩisã Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋg ne Zeruzalɛm tẽn-kɩremsã, la b yiis neb nins me sẽn dag n yõogd wisd n kõt Baall wẽn-naandgã ne wĩndgã la kiuugã ne yĩngr ãdsã fãa." 
2Kings23:6 Rĩm a Zoziyaas yiisa wẽn-naandg a Aseera ra-lugdgã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã, n tall-a n yi Zeruzalɛm n kẽng Sedrõ ko-soogẽ wã n tɩ yõog bugum, t'a lebg tompeglem. La b wʋka tompeglmã n lob nin-talsã yaadẽ." 
2Kings23:7 Rĩm a Zoziyaas kɩtame tɩ b wã yoaadbã rotã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋgẽ, tɩ pagbã rag n be ro-bãmb pʋs n wʋgd fut n kõt Aseera wẽn-naandgã pʋʋsdbã." 
2Kings23:8 Dẽ zugẽ, rĩm a Zoziyaas kɩtame tɩ b bool Zʋʋda tẽmsã maan-kʋʋdbã fãa tɩ b wa. La yẽnda sãama maoong kʋʋb zĩisã maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn dag n yõogd wisd b zutã, sẽn sɩng ne Geba hal n tɩ tãag Bɛɛr-Seba. La a sãama maoong kʋʋb zĩisã sẽn dag n be tẽngã rignoyẽ wã. Zĩ-bãmb dag n bee tẽngã naab a Zozoe rignoorẽ wã, n dag n be tẽngã noor goabga." 
2Kings23:9 La baoosg zãnga, b rag n ka basd maoong kʋʋb zĩisã maan-kʋʋdbã tɩ b kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrẽ wã ye. La bãmb dag n naagda b saam-biisã n dɩt bur sẽn ka rã-bɩllã." 
2Kings23:10 Rĩmã sãama Tofɛt sẽn yaa kamb yõogr zĩigã sẽn dag n be Bɛn-Hinom tãn-longẽ wã, sẽn na yɩl tɩ ned da leb n dɩk a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugl n maan maoong n yõog bugum n kõ wẽn-naandg a Molɛk ye." 
2Kings23:11 Rĩm a Zoziyaas yiisa wiid nins Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n welg toor wĩndgã waoogr yĩngã. Wed-bãmb rag n bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noore, n pẽ zu-soab a Netan-Melɛk zakã sẽn be na-yirã zak pʋgã. Rĩmã yõoga saar-dãmb nins b sẽn dag n tar n waoogd wĩndgã." 
2Kings23:12 Rĩmã wãa tẽn-kug nins Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n maan n ning a Akaaz gãosgã zugã ne rĩm a Manaase sẽn maan tẽn-kug nins n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zags a yiibã pʋsã. Rĩmã sẽn wã bãmb n sɛ, a wʋka b tomã n tɩ lob Sedrõ tãn-longã pʋga." 
2Kings23:13 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sãama maoong kʋʋb zĩis nins sẽn dag n be oliiv tɩɩs tãngã goabg n teesd Zeruzalɛmã. Yaa rĩm a Salmo n dag n me tẽn-kug-bãmb Sɩdõ nebã wẽn-naan-wẽng a Astarte ne Moaab nebã wẽn-naan-yoog a Kemoos yĩnga, la Amo-rãmbã yel-beed a Milkom yĩnga." 
2Kings23:14 Rĩmã wãa wẽn-naan-kãens kug-vigindsã, la a kɛ Aseera ra-lugdsã n lubi, n yaool n wʋk ninsaalb kõab n ning b zĩisẽ wã." 
2Kings23:15 Rĩm a Zoziyaas kẽnga Betɛll n tɩ pãb tẽn-kugr ning sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã n wã, la a sãam maoong kʋʋb zĩig ning a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n me n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã kẽ kongr pʋgã. Dẽ, rĩmã sãama tẽn-kugrã ne maoong kʋʋb zĩigã. Yẽnda yõoga maoong kʋʋb zĩigã bugum, n pãb-a t'a lebg tompeglem, la a yõog Aseera ra-lugdgã bugum." 
2Kings23:16 Rĩm a Zoziyaas wẽnemdame n yãnd yaad nins sẽn dag n be tãngã zugã. La yẽnda tʋma neb tɩ b wʋk kõabã yaadẽ wã n wa yõog-b bugum tẽn-kugrã zug n sãam-b wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b no-rɛɛsã togsã. 
2Kings23:17 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sokame: «Yaa ãnda yaoog kugr la sẽn tondã?» Tẽngã nebã leokame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ning sẽn yi Zʋʋda n wa wã yaoogo, tɩ yaa no-rɛɛs-kãng n pĩnd n togs rĩmã sẽn maan Betɛll tẽn-kugrã bũmb ning rũndã wã yelle." 
2Kings23:18 Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame: «Bas-y yao-kãngã, la y ra wʋk a kõabã ye!» Dẽ, b basa no-rɛɛs-kãng kõabã, ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ning sẽn yi Samaari tẽng n wa be wã kõabã." 
2Kings23:19 Rĩm a Zoziyaas kɩtame tɩ b sãam maoong kʋʋb zĩisã pʋʋsg rot nins fãa Israyɛll dĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n me n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yikã. Rĩmã sãama bãmb wa a sẽn sãam Betɛllã. 
2Kings23:20 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b yõg maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ maan-kʋʋdbã fãa n maan maoong tẽn-kugã zutu, la a yõog ninsaalb kõab b zutu. Dẽ poore, rĩmã lebg n kuila Zeruzalɛm." 
2Kings23:21 Rĩmã yeela nebã fãa yaa: «Maan-y Pak tigrã tɩ yɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã waoogr yĩnga, wa sẽn gʋls kaoolã seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
2Kings23:22 Hal sẽn sɩng ne Israyɛll bʋ-kaoodbã wakate, n tɩ ta Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã wakate, b rag n nan zɩ n maan Pak tigr a woto buud ye." 
2Kings23:23 Yaa rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, la b maan Pak tig-kãng Zeruzalɛm Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩnga." 
2Kings23:24 Sẽn paas rẽ, rĩm a Zoziyaas kɩtame tɩ b menes neb nins fãa sẽn boond kɩɩmse, ne bag-bʋgdbã, la tɩtã ne wẽn-naandsã, la bõn-wẽns buudã fãa sẽn dag n be Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm soolmã pʋgẽ wã. Bãmb maana woto n na n sak goam nins sẽn gʋls tõodã sebr ning maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza sẽn yã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg n dɩkã." 
2Kings23:25 Sẽn deng rĩm a Zoziyaase, rĩm a to ka zĩnd sẽn sak n tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a sũur fãa, la ne a yamã fãa, la a pãngã fãa wa a Moyiis tõogã sẽn yeelã ye. La a Zoziyaas loogr poore, rĩm a to sẽn wẽnd yẽnda ka tol n zĩnd ye." 
2Kings23:26 La baoosgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur dag n ket n nan ka sig ne Zʋʋda nebã, a Manaase tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩng ye." 
2Kings23:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Mam na n diga Zʋʋda nebã tɩ b yi mam taoore, wa mam sẽn dig Israyɛll nebã. Mam na n basa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã mam sẽn dag n yãkã, ne roog ning mam sẽn dag n yeel tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ m yʋʋrã zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã.»" 
2Kings23:28 Rĩm a Zoziyaas tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings23:29 Yaa rĩm a Zoziyaas zaamanẽ la Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko yi n kẽng Efrat kʋɩlgã sẽnẽ n tɩ zab ne Asiiri rĩmã. Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Zoziyaas yiime n na n seg-a n zab ne-a. La Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko sẽn yã yẽnda sẽn watã, a kɩtame tɩ b seg rĩm a Zoziyaas Megido n kʋ." 
2Kings23:30 Rĩm a Zoziyaas tʋmtʋmdbã rɩka yẽnda kũumã n sagl saar pʋg n tall n yi Megido n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ mum-a a meng yaoog pʋga. Woto, tẽngã neb yãka a Zoziyaas biig a Zoakaaz n pʋdg a zug kaam t'a led a ba zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
2Kings23:31 A Zoakaaz sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a tãabo. La a rɩɩ naam kiis a tãab Zeruzalɛm. A Zoakaaz ma yʋʋr la a Hamutalle, n yaa Libna tẽng rao a Zeremi bi-pugla." 
2Kings23:32 Rĩm a Zoakaaz maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa a yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã." 
2Kings23:33 Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko yõka a Zoakaaz n balg bãens Ribla sẽn be Hamat-rãmbã tẽng pʋgã tɩ yẽnda ka leb n yaa Zeruzalɛm naab ye. La a yaoolga tẽngã yaoodo, n yeel tɩ b yao wanzuri kɩlo tus a tã, ne sãnem kɩlo pis-tã." 
2Kings23:34 Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko kɩtame t'a Zoziyaas biig a Eliyakim lebg rĩm n deeg a ba a Zoziyaas zĩiga. La yẽnda teka a Eliyakim yʋʋrã n pʋd-a t'a Zoakim. La yẽnda kẽesa a Zoakaaz yembd n tall-a n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga, la yẽnda paa be n ki." 
2Kings23:35 A Zoakim kõo rĩm a Faarõ wanzuri ne sãnem, la a Zoakim kɩtame tɩ tẽngã nebã yao yaood ning Ezɩpt rĩmã sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b yao wã. Yẽnda modga tẽngã nebã, n kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa kõ wa sẽn zems a paoongo. Dẽ, nebã kõo wanzuri ne sãnem, t'a Zoakim tall n tɩ kɩs Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko." 
2Kings23:36 A Zoakim sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu. Yẽnda rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm piig la a yembre. A Zoakim ma yʋʋr la a Zebuda, n yaa Ruma tẽng rao a Peya bi-pugla." 
2Kings23:37 A Zoakim maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maanã." 
2Kings24:1 Yaa a Yoyakim zamaanẽ la Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wa n na n zab ne Zʋʋda nebã. Naab a Nebukatnedzaar sooga a Yoyakim ne a nebã yʋʋm a tãabo, t'a Yoyakim yaool n na n yik n yeel t'a ka sak ye." 
2Kings24:2 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Kalde ne Siiri la Moaab ne Amo nin-fãadbã na n wa zab ne a Yoyakim. Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma bãmb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ zab ne Zʋʋda nebã n sãam b tẽngã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã togsã." 
2Kings24:3 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ bõn-kãng yɩ a woto. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n datame tɩ Zʋʋda nebã zãag ne bãmba, a Manaase sẽn maan yel-wẽn ninsã fãa yĩnga." 
2Kings24:4 La sẽn paase, yaa rĩm a Manaase sẽn dag n daag bʋʋm dãmbã zɩɩm n pid Zeruzalɛm tẽngã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tʋlg n na n kõ-b sugr ye." 
2Kings24:5 A Yoyakim tʋʋm a taabã ne a sẽn maan bũmb ninsã fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. 
2Kings24:6 A Yoyakim saka a saam-dãmba, la yẽnda bi-ribl a Yoyakẽ n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Kings24:7 Ezɩpt rĩmã ka leb n yi a tẽngã pʋgẽ ye. Tɩ bala, Babilond rĩmã rag n deega tẽms nins fãa Ezɩpt rĩmã sẽn dag n so wã zãnga, sẽn sɩng ne Ezɩpt ko-soogã n tall n tɩ tãag Efrat kʋɩlgã." 
2Kings24:8 A Yoyakẽ sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm piig la a nii. La a rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm kiis a tãab bala. A Yoyakẽ ma a Nehusta yaa Zeruzalɛm dao a Ɛlnatãn bi-pugla. 
2Kings24:9 A Yoyakẽ maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda ba wã sẽn dag n maan to-to wã bala." 
2Kings24:10 La wakat-kãnga, Babilond rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nebã kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n na n tɩ zab ne-a, la b gũbg-a lame." 
2Kings24:11 Babilond rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nebã sẽn wa n zabd ne tẽngã wakate, a Nebukatnedzaar meng yi n waa zabrã zĩigẽ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã." 
2Kings24:12 Dẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakẽ yii ne a ma, la a tʋmtʋmdbã ne a kug-zĩidbã la a sõgen-kambã n kõ b mens Babilond rĩmã. Dẽ, Babilond rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kẽesa yẽnda yembdo, la rẽ tɩ yaa Babilond rĩmã sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm niinẽ." 
2Kings24:13 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne na-yirã laogã fãa, la a wã sãnemã teed nins Israyɛll dĩm a Salmo sẽn maan n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
2Kings24:14 A Nebukatnedzaar yõga Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa. Yaa kug-zĩidbã ne gãndaadã fãa. La nebã b sẽn yõga fãa sõor yaa neb tus piiga, n paas tʋʋm-mitbã ne sãabã. Yaa tẽngã nimbãan-dãmb bal la a bas yã." 
2Kings24:15 A Nebukatnedzaar talla rĩm a Yoyakẽ ne a ma wã, la a pagbã ne a zu-sob-n-dãmbã, n paas Zeruzalɛm tẽngã nin-kãsemsã, n tɩ kẽes yembd Babilonde." 
2Kings24:16 Bãmb yõga tẽngã pãens rãmb tus a yopoe, la b yõg tʋʋm-mitbã ne sãabã neb tusri, ne zabr gãndaadã. Babilond dĩmã talla bãmb fãa n tɩ kẽes yembd Babilond tẽnga." 
2Kings24:17 Babilond dĩmã yãka a Mataniya sẽn yaa a Zoakim yɛsbã t'a led a Zoakim zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã, la a teka a Mataniya yʋʋrã tɩ lebg a Sedesiyaase." 
2Kings24:18 A Sedesiyaas sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yembre, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm piig la a yembre. A ma yʋʋr dag n yaa a Amutalle, n yaa Libna tẽng ned a Zeremi bi-pugla." 
2Kings24:19 A Sedesiyaas maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wa a Yoyakim. 
2Kings24:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yel-kãngã paam Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tol n dig-b n zãag ne b menga. A Sedesiyaas kɩɩsa Babilond dĩmã noore. 
2Kings25:1 A Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm wɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig soabã rasem piig daare, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yika ne a tãb-biisã fãa n zab ne Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda tilga a tãb-sikã n gũbg tẽngã, la b tu bok n gilg-a zĩig zãnga." 
2Kings25:2 Babilond dãmbã gũbga Zeruzalɛm tẽngã n tãag a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembrẽ. 
2Kings25:3 Kiuug a naas soabã rasem a wɛ daare, komã wɩnga tẽngã pʋga, hal tɩ tẽngã nebã ka leb n tar dɩɩb baa bilf n na n dɩ ye." 
2Kings25:4 Dẽ, Babilond nebã pooga võor tẽngã lalgẽ. La rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a tãb-biisã fãa soosa ne yʋng n tũ tẽngã noor ning sẽn be lals a yiibã sʋk rĩmã zẽedã zĩig sɛɛgẽ wã n yi. Rĩmã rɩka sor n zoe n kẽng Araba tẽn-nabdrã sẽnẽ. La Kalde rãmbã rag n gũbga tẽngã." 
2Kings25:5 La Kalde rãmbã tãb-biis riga rĩmã n tɩ yõk-a Araba tẽn-nabdrã sẽn be Zeeriko sẽnẽ wã, la rĩm a Sedesiyaas tãb-biisã fãa zoe n sãeeg n bas-a lame." 
2Kings25:6 Kalde rãmbã yõka rĩmã n tall-a n kẽng Babilond dĩmã nengẽ Ribla tẽnga, la b bʋʋ rĩm a Sedesiyaas bʋʋdo." 
2Kings25:7 Babilond dĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kood a Sedesiyaas kambã a nifẽ. Dẽ poore, rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kɩɩd a Sedesiyaas ninã, la b sẽb-a ne zũud bãense, n tall-a n kẽng Babilonde." 
2Kings25:8 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a wɛɛlẽ, kiuug a nu soabã rasem a yopoe daare, a Nebuzaradan sẽn dag n yaa Babilond dĩmã gũudb naabã, n yaa Babilond dĩmã sõgen-kãsengã waa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Kings25:9 Yẽnda ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne rĩmã zakã, la Zeruzalɛm dotã fãa bugum. Yẽnda ninga ro-bɛdã fãa bugum." 
2Kings25:10 Kalde tãb-biisã fãa sẽn dag n be ne gũudbã naabã sãama lals nins sẽn dag n gũbg Zeruzalɛmã. 
2Kings25:11 Gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan talla tẽngã neb nins sẽn kellã, la neb nins sẽn dag n ket tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, ne neb nins sẽn dag n dɩk b mens n kõ Babilond dĩmã, n paas neb-kʋʋngã sʋk neb nins sẽn kellã, n tɩ kẽes yembdo." 
2Kings25:12 La a Nebuzaradan sakame tɩ tẽngã nimbãan-dãmbã pa tẽngã pʋg n get reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã yelle, la b kooda." 
2Kings25:13 Kalde rãmbã wãa zũudã ra-lugdsã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noorã, ne sĩmsã rogendse, la zũud sĩn-bedrã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã samand pʋgã, la b wʋk zũudã n kẽng Babilond tẽnga." 
2Kings25:14 Bãmb wʋka tompeglem laasã ne pɛll-dãmbã ne sʋʋsã la wisd laasã, ne zũud teed nins fãa b sẽn dag n tar n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmã." 
2Kings25:15 Gũudbã naab leb n wʋka wisdã yõogr laas ne bõn-yũudl laasã, n paas teed nins fãa sẽn maan ne sãnem la wanzuri wã." 
2Kings25:16 La sã n yaa sẽn kẽed ne zũud ra-lugds a yiibã, ne zũud sĩn-bedrã la sĩn-bi wã a Salmo sẽn dag n maan n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, ned rag n ka tõe n bãng zũud te-bãmb fãa zɩslmã ye." 
2Kings25:17 Zũud ra-lugdg a yembrã zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a nii. B rag n maana zũud pugl zãntlem sẽn ta kãntɩɩg a tãabo, n dogl ra-lugdg-kãng zugu. La b maana zũud gãmbr n ning zũud gernaad biisi, n gilg-a zãnga. La b kell n maana a woto me ne ra-lugdg a to wã." 
2Kings25:18 Gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan yõga maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Seraya ne a Sofoni sẽn yaa kãsem-pʋgdgã, la a yõg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noor gũudb a tãabã." 
2Kings25:19 Yẽnda leb n yõka zu-soben-kãseng ning sẽn dag n get tãb-biisã yellã, la a yõg rĩmã kug-zĩidb a nu ne tãb-biis naabã seb-gʋndã sẽn dag n get-a tãb-biisã yãkr yellã, la a yõg Zʋʋda tẽngã neb pis-yoob sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga." 
2Kings25:20 Gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan talla bãmb n kẽng Babilond dĩmã sẽn be Ribla tẽngã nengẽ. 
2Kings25:21 Babilond rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kʋ bãmb Ribla sẽn be Hamat soolmã pʋga. Yɩɩ woto la b tall Zʋʋda nebã n zãag ne b soolmã. 
2Kings25:22 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar dag n kɩtame tɩ neb pa Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋga. Nin-bãmb sʋka, b yãka a Safãn biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya n kɩt t'a lebg bãmb naaba." 
2Kings25:23 Tãb-bi-sul nanambsã fãa ne b nebã sẽn wa n wʋm tɩ Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yãka a Gedaliya t'a lebg naabã, bãmb kẽnga a Gedaliya nengẽ Mispa. Neb nins sẽn kẽngã yaa a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛlle, ne a Kareya biig a Zoaana, ne Netofa rao a Tanumet biig a Seraya, ne Maakat rao a Zazaniyahu. Yaa bãmb ne b nebã." 
2Kings25:24 A Gedaliya wẽena ne bãmb ne b nebã n yeele: «Da zoe-y Kalde nebã ye. Kell-y n pa-y tẽngã pʋga, n sak Babilond dĩmã tɩ y na n vɩɩmda bãane.»" 
2Kings25:25 Kiuug a yopoe soabã sẽn ta, a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll sẽn yaa a Elisama yagengã, n yaa na-biigã ne a neb piig tũu taab n kẽng Mispa n tɩ kʋ a Gedaliya ne Zʋʋda nebã, la Kalde neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda Mispa wã." 
2Kings25:26 Rẽnda kɩtame tɩ nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne nin-bãooneg tɩ tãag nin-bɛda, ne tãb-biisã nanambsã fãa yik n zoe n kẽnga Ezɩpt tẽnga, bala, bãmb dag n zoeta Kalde rãmbã." 
2Kings25:27 B sẽn tall Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakẽ n tɩ kẽes yembdã tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yopoɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig la a yiib soabã rasem pisi la a yopoe daare, Babilond dĩm a Evɩll-Merodak yiisa yẽnda bi-bees roogo. La yaa yʋʋmd ning yẽnda sẽn deeg a naamã pʋgẽ bala, la a yiis Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakẽ bi-bees roogã." 
2Kings25:28 A Evɩll-Merodak goma gom-nood ne a Yoyakẽ, n maan-a neere, n kõ-a naam t'a yɩɩd nanambs nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda Babilond tẽngã." 
2Kings25:29 Woto, Babilond dĩm a Evɩll-Merodak kɩtame t'a Yoyakẽ yees a bi-be-futã n toeem futu, la a rag n naagda yẽnda n dɩt daar fãa hal n tãag a yõor tɛka." 
2Kings25:30 Dẽ, yɩɩ Babilond dĩmã n ges a Zoakim yell daar fãa hal n tãag a Yoyakẽ yõor tɛka." 
1Chronicles1:1 A Ãdem yagens yaa a Sɛt ne a Enoos la a Kenan 
1Chronicles1:2 ne a Mehaleyɛll la a Zerɛɛde," 
1Chronicles1:3 ne a Enok la a Metusela ne a Lemeke. 
1Chronicles1:4 A Nowe yagens la a Sɛm ne a Sam la a Zafɛte. 
1Chronicles1:5 A Zafɛt yagens yaa a Gomeere, a Magooge, a Madayi, a Yavan, a Tuballe, ne a Mesɛk la a Tɩraase." 
1Chronicles1:6 A Gomeer yagens yaa a Askenaaz ne a Difat la a Togarma. 
1Chronicles1:7 A Yavan yagens yaa a Elisa ne a Tarsɩɩs la a Kitim ne a Rodanim. 
1Chronicles1:8 A Sam yagens yaa a Kuus ne a Mitsrayim la a Put ne a Kana. 
1Chronicles1:9 A Kuus yagens yaa a Seba, a Havila, a Sabta, a Rama, ne a Sabteka. A Rama yagens yaa a Seba ne a Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 A Kuus n dog a Nimroode. A Nimrood n yɩ pipi gãndaoog dũniyã zugu. 
1Chronicles1:11 A Mitsrayim n dog Luud ne Anam la Lehaab ne Naftu nebã," 
1Chronicles1:12 la Patros ne Kaslu nebã. 
1Chronicles1:13 A Kana roga a bi-kãseng a Sɩdõ ne a Ɛte," 
1Chronicles1:14 la Zebuus ne Amoor la Girgaas nebã," 
1Chronicles1:15 ne Hevi la Ark ne Sĩn nebã," 
1Chronicles1:16 la Arvaad ne Semari la Hamat nebã. 
1Chronicles1:17 A Sɛm yagens yaa a Elam, a Asʋʋre, a Arpaksaade, a Luude, a Aram, a Wutsi, a Ulli, ne a Getɛɛr la a Mesɛke." 
1Chronicles1:18 A Arpaksaad n dog a Sela, t'a Sela rog a Ebɛɛre." 
1Chronicles1:19 A Hebɛɛr doga kom-dibli a yiibu: a yembr yʋʋr yaa a Pelɛɛg tɩ bala, yẽnda rogmã wakat tɩ dũniyã neb rag n welga taaba. A Pelɛɛg ba-biigã yʋʋr yaa a Yoktan." 
1Chronicles1:20 A Yoktan doga a Almodaade, a Selɛfe, a Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 a Hadoram, a Uzalle, a Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 a Eballe, a Abimayɛlle, a Seba, a Ofɩɩre, ne a Havila la a Yobaabe." 
1Chronicles1:23 Nin-bãmbã fãa rag n yaa a Yoktan kom-dibli. 
1Chronicles1:24 A Sɛm doga a Arpaksaade, t'a Arpaksaad rog a Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 t'a Sela rog a Ebɛɛre, t'a Ebɛɛr dog a Pelɛɛge, t'a Pelɛɛg rog a Rewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 t'a Rewu rog a Seruugi, t'a Seruug rog a Nahoore, t'a Nahoor dog a Teera," 
1Chronicles1:27 t'a Teera rog a Abram. A Abram yʋʋrã la sẽn wa n lebg Abrahaamã. 
1Chronicles1:28 A Abrahaam kom-dibli yaa a Izak ne a Ismayɛlle. 
1Chronicles1:29 Bãmb yagens la woto: A Ismayɛll sẽn yaa a Nebayot bi-kãsengã, a Kedaare, a Adbeyɛlle, a Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 a Misma, a Duma, a Masa, a Hadaade, a Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 la a Yetʋʋr ne a Nafis la a Kedma. Bãmb yaa a Ismayɛll yagense. 
1Chronicles1:32 A Ketʋra sẽn yaa a Abrahaam pʋg-rɩkdgã kamb la woto: Yaa a Zimran ne a Yoksan la a Medan ne a Midiyan la a Yisbak ne a Suwa. A Yoksan kamb yaa a Seba ne a Dedan. 
1Chronicles1:33 A Midiyan kom-dibli yaa a Efa, a Efɛɛre, a Henoke, a Abida ne a Ɛldaa. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa a Ketʋra kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles1:34 A Abrahaam doga a Izake, t'a Izak rog a Ezayu ne a Israyɛlle." 
1Chronicles1:35 A Ezayu kamb yaa a Elifaaze, a Rewuyɛlle, a Yewuusi, ne a Yalam la a Koora." 
1Chronicles1:36 A Elifaaz kamb yaa a Temane, a Omaare, a Sefi, a Gatam, a Kenaaze, n paas a Timna ne a Amalɛke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ad a Rehuwɛll kamba: Yaa Nahate, a Zeera, a Sama ne a Miiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 A Seyɩɩr kamb yaa a Lotan, a Soballe, a Sɩbeyõ, a Ana, ne a Dison, la a Ɛtsɛɛr ne a Disan." 
1Chronicles1:39 A Lotan kamb yaa a Hori ne a Homam. A Lotan dag n tara a tão-poak t'a yʋʋr yaa a Timna. 
1Chronicles1:40 A Soball kamb yaa a Aliyan, a Manahate, a Eballe, ne a Sefi la a Onam. A Sɩbeyõ kamb yaa a Aya ne a Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 A Ana biig yaa a Dison, t'a Dison kamb yaa a Hamran ne a Ɛsban la a Yitran ne a Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 A Ɛtsɛɛr kamb yaa a Bilan ne a Zaavan la a Yakan. A Disan kamb yaa a Uts ne a Aran. 
1Chronicles1:43 Ad rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn led taab n soog Edom tẽngã, sẽn deng tɩ rĩm soog Israyɛll tẽngã: yaa a Bewoor biig a Bela sẽn yaa Dinaba tẽng nedã." 
1Chronicles1:44 A Bela wa n kiime, t'a Zeera biig a Yobaab sẽn yit Bosra tẽngã led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles1:45 A Yobaab me wa n kiime, t'a Husam sẽn yit Teman nebã tẽngẽ wã n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles1:46 A Husam kũumã zugẽ, yaa a Bedaad biig a Hadaad n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã. A Hadaad n tõog Madiyã rãmbã Moaab weoogẽ wã. Yẽnda tẽngã yʋʋr dag n yaa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 A Hadaad kũumã zugẽ, yaa Masreka tẽng rao a Samla n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles1:48 A Samla kũumã zugẽ, yaa Rehobot tẽngã sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã noorã rao a Sayull n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles1:49 A Sayull kũumã zugẽ, yaa a Akboor biig a Baall-Hanan n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles1:50 A Baall-Hanan kũumã zugẽ, yaa a Hadaad n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã. Yẽnda tẽngã yʋʋr dag n yaa Payi, la yẽnda pagã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Mehetabeyɛll sẽn yaa a Mezahaab bi-pugl a Matrɛɛd bi-puglã." 
1Chronicles1:51 A Hadaad kũumã zugẽ, yaa nanambs n dag n so Edom tẽngã. Nanamb-kãens yʋy la woto: Yaa a Timna, a Alva, a Yetɛte," 
1Chronicles1:52 a Oholibama, a Ela, a Pino," 
1Chronicles1:53 a Kenaaze, a Teman, a Mibstaare," 
1Chronicles1:54 la a Magdɩyɛll ne a Iram. Nin-bãmb n dag n yaa Edom nanambse. 
1Chronicles2:1 A Zakoob b sẽn boond-a soab t'a Israyɛllã kamb la woto: A Rubɛn, a Sɩmyõ, a Leevi, a Zʋʋda, a Yisakaare, a Zabulõ," 
1Chronicles2:2 a Dan, a Zozefo, a Benzame, a Neftali, la a Gaad ne a Asɛɛre." 
1Chronicles2:3 A Zʋʋda kamb la woto: yaa a Ɛɛr ne a Onan la a Sela. Bãmb b tãabã fãa ma yaa a Suwa sẽn yaa Kana bi-puglã. A Zʋʋda bi-kãseng a Ɛɛr maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt t'a ki." 
1Chronicles2:4 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zʋʋda bi-pag a Tamaar doga a kom-dibli a yiibu: a Perɛɛz ne a Zeera. A Zʋʋda kom-dibli wã fãa sõor yaa bãmb b nu." 
1Chronicles2:5 A Perɛɛz kom-dibli yaa a Ɛtsron ne a Hamulli. 
1Chronicles2:6 A Zeera kom-dibli la woto: a Zimri, a Etan, a Eman, la a Kalkoll ne a Daara. Bãmb fãa sõor yaa bãmb b nu." 
1Chronicles2:7 A Kami bi-ribl yaa a Akaare. A Akaar dag n maana sẽn kisi, n kɩt tɩ toog paam Israyɛll nebã." 
1Chronicles2:8 A Etan bi-ribl yaa a Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 A Ɛtsron kom-dibli yaa a Yerameyɛll ne a Ram la a Kelubayi. 
1Chronicles2:10 A Ram doga a Aminadaabe, t'a Aminadaab rog a Nakõ sẽn yaa Zʋʋda buudã naabã." 
1Chronicles2:11 A Nakõ roga a Salma, t'a Salma rog a Booze," 
1Chronicles2:12 t'a Booz rog a Obɛɛde, t'a Obɛɛd rog a Izayi." 
1Chronicles2:13 A Izayi roga kom-dibli a yopoe: pipi soabã yaa a Eliyaabe, yiibẽ soabã la a Abinadaabe, tãabẽ soabã la a Simeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 naasẽ soabã la a Netaneyɛlle, nu soabã la a Radayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 yoobẽ soabã la a Otsɛm, tɩ yopoe soabã yaa a Davɩɩde." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bãmb dag n tara tão-pogse: a Seruya ne a Abigayɩlle. A Seruya rag n tara kom-dibli a tãabo: a Abisayi ne a Zoaab la a Azayɛlle. 
1Chronicles2:17 A Abigayɩll roga a Amasa, la a Amasa ba wã rag n yaa Ismayɛll buudã ned a Yetɛɛre." 
1Chronicles2:18 A Ɛtsron biig a Kalɛɛb pagbã sẽn yaa a Azuba ne a Yeriyot roga a kom-dibli. Yẽnda kamb nins a Azuba sẽn dogã la woto: Yaa a Yesɛɛr ne a Sobaab la a Ardõ. 
1Chronicles2:19 A Azuba kũumã poore, a Kalɛɛb peega a Efrat n maan a paga, la a roga a biig tɩ b pʋd-a t'a Ʋʋre." 
1Chronicles2:20 A Ʋʋr doga a Uuri, t'a Uuri rog a Betsaleyɛlle." 
1Chronicles2:21 A Ɛtsron sẽn wa n tar yʋʋm pis-yoobe, a kẽe kãadem ne a Galaad ba a Makɩɩr bi-pugla, la a roga biig t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Seguubi." 
1Chronicles2:22 A Seguub roga a Yayɩɩri. La a Yayɩɩr n dag n so Galaad soolem tẽms pisi la a tãabo. 
1Chronicles2:23 La Gesʋʋr ne Siiri rĩm-dãmbã wa n zab n deega Yayɩɩr tẽmsã, n paas Kenat tẽngã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la tẽn-bãmb fãa sõorã yaa tẽms pis-yoobe. La neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tẽn-bãmb pʋgẽ wã rag n yaa a Galaad ba a Makɩɩr yagense." 
1Chronicles2:24 A Ɛtsron sẽn ki Kalɛɛb-Efratã zugẽ, yẽnda pag a Abiya roga yẽnda biig tɩ b pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Asʋʋre. A Asʋʋr yaa a Tekoa ba." 
1Chronicles2:25 A Ɛtsron bi-kãseng a Yerameyɛll kom-dibli la woto: yaa a bi-kãseng a Ram, ne a Buna, la a Orɛn ne a Otsɛm la a Ayiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 A Yerameyɛll paama pag a to t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Atara. Pʋg-kãng n yɩ a Onam ma. 
1Chronicles2:27 A Yerameyɛll bi-kãseng a Ram kom-dibli rag n yaa a Maats ne a Yamin la a Ekɛɛre. 
1Chronicles2:28 A Onam kom-dibli rag n yaa a Samayi ne a Yaada. A Samayi kom-dibli rag n yaa a Nadaab ne a Abisʋʋre. 
1Chronicles2:29 A Abisʋʋr pagã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Abigayɩlle. A Abigayɩll roga a Akban ne a Moliidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 A Nadaab kom-dibli rag n yaa a Selɛɛd ne a Apayim. A Selɛɛd kiime n ka paam bi-ribl ye. 
1Chronicles2:31 A Apayim doga a Yiseyi, t'a Yiseyi rog a Sesan, t'a Sesan rog a Alayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 A Samayi ba-biig a Yaada kom-dibli rag n yaa a Yetɛɛr ne a Zonatã. A Yetɛɛr kiime n ka paam bi-ribl ye. 
1Chronicles2:33 A Zonatã kom-dibli rag n yaa a Pelɛt ne a Zaaza. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa a Yerameyɛll yagense. 
1Chronicles2:34 A Sesan ka paam bi-ribl ye. Yẽnda roga kom-pugli bala. Yẽnda rag n tara yem-daoog sẽn yaa Ezɩpt neda, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Yaara." 
1Chronicles2:35 A Sesan rɩka a bi-pugl a yembr n kõ a Yaara t'a maan a paga. Bi-pugl-kãng roga a biig tɩ b pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Atayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 A Atayi roga a Natã, t'a Natã rog a Zabaade," 
1Chronicles2:37 t'a Zabaad rog a Eflalle, t'a Eflall rog a Obɛɛde," 
1Chronicles2:38 t'a Obɛɛd rog a Zeyu, t'a Zeyu rog a Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 t'a Azariya rog a Helɛtse, t'a Helɛts rog a Elaaza," 
1Chronicles2:40 t'a Elaaza rog a Sismayi, t'a Sismayi rog a Salum," 
1Chronicles2:41 t'a Salum rog a Yekamiya, t'a Yekamiya rog a Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 A Yerameyɛll ba-biig a Kalɛɛb kom-dibli la woto: yaa a bi-kãseng a Mesa sẽn dag n yaa a Zɩf ba, n paas a Maresa sẽn yaa a Ebrõ ba wã kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles2:43 A Ebrõ kom-dibli rag n yaa a Koore, a Tapuwa, la a Rekɛm ne a Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 A Sema n dog a Raham sẽn yaa a Yorkeyam ba, t'a Rekɛm dog a Samayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 A Samayi roga a Mawõ. A Mawõ rag n yaa a Bɛt-Sʋʋr ba. 
1Chronicles2:46 A Efa sẽn dag n yaa a Kalɛɛb pʋg-rɩkdgã roga a Haaran ne a Motsa la a Gazɛɛze. A Haaran doga biig n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Gazɛɛze. 
1Chronicles2:47 A Yadayi kom-dibli yaa a Regɛm, a Yotam, a Gesan, a Pelɛte, la a Efa ne a Saafe." 
1Chronicles2:48 A Kalɛɛb pʋg-rɩkdg a Maaka roga a Sebɛɛr ne a Tɩrana. 
1Chronicles2:49 A Maaka leb n doga a Saaf sẽn yaa a Madmana ba, la a Seeva sẽn yaa a Makbena ne a Gibeya ba. A Kalɛɛb bi-puglã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 A Kalɛɛb kom-dibli la woto: Yaa a Ʋʋr sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Efrata bi-kãsengã. A Ʋʋr yaa a Soball ba, t'a Soball yaa a Kiryat-Yeyarim ba." 
1Chronicles2:51 Leb n yaa a Salma sẽn yaa a Betlehɛm ba wã, ne a Harɛf sẽn yaa a Bɛt-Gadɛɛr ba wã." 
1Chronicles2:52 A Soball sẽn yaa a Kiryat-Yeyarim ba wã yagens yaa Harowe tẽngã nebã, ne Hatsi-Menuhot tẽngã nebã." 
1Chronicles2:53 Kiryat-Yeyarim roogã neb rag n yaa Zetri nebã, Put nebã, Sumat nebã ne Ezɩpt nebã. Sora ne Ɛstawoll nebã yaa bãmb buudã nebã." 
1Chronicles2:54 A Salma yagensã yaa Betlehɛm ne Netofa la Atrot-Bɛt-Yoaab nebã, ne Hatsi-Manahat tẽngã nebã, la Sora tẽngã nebã." 
1Chronicles2:55 Gʋlsdbã rot neb sẽn be Yabɛɛs tẽngã yaa Tɩreyat ne Simeyat la Sukat nebã. Bãmb yaa Kɛn buudã nebã, n yaa Hamat sẽn yaa Rekaab buudã nebã ba." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ad a Davɩɩd kom-dibli nins sẽn dog Ebrõ wã: Pipi soabã yaa a Amno sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Ayinoaam sẽn yit Zizreyɛllã bi-kãsenga. Yiibẽ soabã yaa a Dãniyɛll sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Abigayɩll sẽn yit Karmell tẽngã bi-ribla. 
1Chronicles3:2 Tãabẽ soabã yaa a Absalom sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Maaka bi-riblã. A Maaka yaa Gesʋʋr dĩm a Talmayi bi-pugla. Naasẽ soabã yaa yẽnda pag a Adoniza sẽn yaa a Hagit bi-riblã. 
1Chronicles3:3 Nu soabã yaa a Abitall sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Sefatiya biigã. Yoobẽ soabã yaa a Yitreyam sẽn yaa yẽnda pag a Egla biigã. 
1Chronicles3:4 A Davɩɩd zĩnda Ebrõ n yɩ rĩm yʋʋm a yopoe la pʋɩ-sʋka, la yẽnda kom-bãmbã b yoobã fãa roga yʋʋm-kãens pʋgẽ. Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pis-tã la a tãabo." 
1Chronicles3:5 Kamb nins a Davɩɩd sẽn dog Zeruzalɛmã yʋy la woto: yaa a Simeya ne a Sobaabe, la a Natã ne a Salmo. Bãmb b naasã yaa yẽnda pag a Batseba sẽn yaa a Amiyɛll bi-puglã kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles3:6 A Davɩɩd doga kom-dibli a taaba: yaa a Ibaare, a Elisama, a Ɛlifelɛte," 
1Chronicles3:7 a Noga, a Nefɛɛge, a Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 a Elisama, ne a Eliyaada la a Elifelɛte. Kom-dibl-kãens sõorã yaa bãmb b wɛ," 
1Chronicles3:9 la b fãa yaa a Davɩɩd kamba, pʋg-rɩkdsã kom-dibli sẽn ka naage. B rag n tara tão-poak t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Tamaare." 
1Chronicles3:10 A Salmo yagens la woto: A Roboaam doga a Abiya, t'a Abiya rog a Aaza, t'a Aaza rog a Zozafate," 
1Chronicles3:11 t'a Zozafat rog a Zoram, t'a Zoram dog a Akaazɩya, t'a Akaazɩya rog a Zoaase," 
1Chronicles3:12 t'a Zoaas rog a Amatsɩya, t'a Amatsɩya rog a Azariya, t'a Azariya rog a Yotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 t'a Yotam dog a Akaaze, t'a Akaaz rog a Ezekɩyaas, t'a Ezekɩyaas rog a Manaase," 
1Chronicles3:14 t'a Manaase rog a Amo, t'a Amo rog a Zoziyaase." 
1Chronicles3:15 A Zoziyaas kom-dibli la woto: Bi-kãsengã yaa a Yohanan, yiibẽ soabã yaa a Yehoyakim, tãabẽ soabã yaa a Sedesiyaase, naasẽ soabã yaa a Salum." 
1Chronicles3:16 A Yehoyakim doga kom-dibli a yiibu: a yembr yʋʋr yaa a Yekoniya t'a yembr yʋʋr yaa a Sedesiyaase. 
1Chronicles3:17 Yamb a Yekoniya kom-dibli yaa a Seyaltiyɛlle," 
1Chronicles3:18 a Malkiram, a Pedaya, a Senatsaare, a Yekamiya, la a Hosama ne a Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 A Pedaya kom-dibli yaa a Zorobabɛll ne a Simeyi. A Zorobabɛll kom-dibli yaa a Mesulam ne a Hananiya, la bãmb dag n tara tão-poak t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Selomiti." 
1Chronicles3:20 Dẽ zugẽ, a Pedaya leb n paama kom-dibli a nu: yaa a Hasuba, a Owɛlle, a Berekɩya, a Hasadiya, n paas a Yusaab ne a Hesɛɛde." 
1Chronicles3:21 A Hananiya yagens la woto: yaa a Pelatiya ne a Ezayi, la a Refaya ne a Arnan la a Abdiya ne a Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 A Sekaniya roga bi-ribl-yɛnga: yaa a Semaya. A Semaya kom-dibli yaa a Hatuusi, a Igalle, a Bariya, la a Neyariya ne a Safate." 
1Chronicles3:23 A Neyariya roga kom-dibli a tãabo: yaa a Eliyohenayi ne a Ezekɩyaas la a Aazrikam. 
1Chronicles3:24 A Eliyohenayi roga kom-dibli a yopoe: yaa a Odaviya, a Eliyasɩɩbe, a Pelaya, a Akuubi, a Yohanan, ne a Delaya la a Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 A Zʋʋda kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Perɛɛze, a Hɛsron, a Karmi, ne a Ʋʋr la a Soballe." 
1Chronicles4:2 A Soball biig a Rehaya roga a Yahate, t'a Yahat rog a Ahumayi ne a Lahaade. Bãmb yaa a Soreya buudã nebã." 
1Chronicles4:3 A Etam ba wã yagens la woto: yaa a Yizreyɛlle, a Yisma, ne a Yidbaase. Bãmb dag n tara tão-poak t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Hatselɛlponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 A Penuwɛll rag n yaa a Gedoor ba, t'a Ezɛɛr dag n yaa a Uusa ba. Bãmb dag n yaa a Efrata bi-kãseng a Ʋʋr kom-dibli. A Ʋʋr n yaa a Betlehɛm ba." 
1Chronicles4:5 A Asewʋʋr sẽn dag n yaa a Tekoa ba wã rag n tara pagb a yiibu: yaa a Eleya ne a Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 A Naara roga yẽnda kom-dibli: yaa a Awuzam ne a Efɛɛr la a Temeni ne a Ahastari. 
1Chronicles4:7 A Eleya kom-dibli yaa a Serɛt ne a Sowaar la a Ɛtnan. 
1Chronicles4:8 A Kots roga a Anuub ne a Hatsobeba, n paas a Harum biig a Aharɛll roogã nebã." 
1Chronicles4:9 B rag n nanda a Yabɛɛs n yɩɩd a ba-biisã. A ma pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Yabɛɛs n yeele: Yaa yẽnda rogmã sẽn yɩ toog ne maamã yĩnga. 
1Chronicles4:10 A Yabɛɛs pʋʋsame n kos Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã tɩ b ning a zug bark n yalg a soolmã, la b tẽeg b nug n kogl-a, la b zãag-a ne toog la namsg buud fãa. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam maana a sẽn kosã n kõ-a." 
1Chronicles4:11 A Suwa ba-biig a Keluub roga a Meyɩɩr sẽn dag n yaa a Ɛston ba wã. 
1Chronicles4:12 A Ɛston doga a Rafa buudã, ne a Paseya buudã, la a Teyina buudã. A Teyina rag n yaa a Nahaas ba. Bãmb n dag n yaa Reka tẽngã raopa." 
1Chronicles4:13 A Kenaaz kom-dibli yaa a Otniyɛll ne a Seraya. A Otniyɛll roga a Hatate," 
1Chronicles4:14 t'a Mewonotayi rog a Ofra, t'a Seraya rog a Zoaab sẽn dag n yaa nus-tʋʋm dãmbã tãn-long ba wã. Bala, nin-bãmb dag n yaa nus-tʋʋm dãmba." 
1Chronicles4:15 A Yefune bi-ribl a Kalɛɛb kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Iru, a Ela, a Naam, n paas a Ela kom-dibli wã ne a Kenaaze." 
1Chronicles4:16 A Yehalelɛll kom-dibli yaa a Zɩf ne a Zifa, la a Tɩrya ne a Azareyɛlle." 
1Chronicles4:17 A Ɛsdraas kom-dibli yaa a Yetɛɛre, a Merɛɛde, a Efɛɛre, ne a Yalon. A Merɛɛd pagã roga a Miryam, a Samayi la a Yisba sẽn yaa a Ɛstemoa ba wã." 
1Chronicles4:18 A Merɛɛd pag a to sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋde tẽng bi-puglã roga a Yerɛɛd sẽn yaa Gedoor ba wã, ne a Ebɛɛr sẽn yaa a Soko ba wã, la a Yekutiyɛll sẽn yaa a Zanoa ba wã. Nin-bãmb n dag n yaa a Merɛɛd pag a Bitiya sẽn yaa Faarõ bi-puglã kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles4:19 A Odiya pag ning sẽn yaa a Naham tão-poakã kom-dibli yaa a Keyila ba wã sẽn yaa Garmi nedã, ne Maakat rao a Ɛstemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 A Sɩmo kom-dibli yaa a Amno, a Rina, la a Bɛn-Anan ne a Tɩlon. A Yiseyi kom-dibli yaa a Zowɛt ne a Ben-Zowɛte." 
1Chronicles4:21 Zʋʋda kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa Sela yagensã la woto: yaa a Ɛɛr sẽn yaa a Leka ba wã, ne a Laada sẽn yaa a Maresa ba wã, la sẽn wʋgd-b gĩs-bãanesã sẽn yaa a Asbeya buudã roogo," 
1Chronicles4:22 la a Yokim, ne Kozeba neb a Zoaas ne a Saraf sẽn dag n zab n deeg Moaab soolmã, ne Yasubi-Lehɛm. Kiba-kãens fãa yaa kiba-kʋda." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bãmb dag n yaa yagba, n vɩ zẽed ne yãg zĩisẽ, la b rag n bee ne rĩmã n tʋmd a tʋʋmã." 
1Chronicles4:24 A Sɩmyõ kom-dibli yaa a Nemuwɛlle, a Yamin, a Yariibi, a Zeera, n paas a Sayulli." 
1Chronicles4:25 A Sayull doga a Salum, t'a Salum dog a Mibsam, t'a Mibsam dog a Misma." 
1Chronicles4:26 A Misma roga a Hamuwɛlle, t'a Hamuwɛll dog a Zakʋʋre, t'a Zakʋʋr dog a Simeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 A Simeyi roga kom-dibli piig la a yoobe, la kom-pugli a yoobe. Yẽnda ba-biisã ka rog kamb wʋsg ye. Dẽ kɩtame tɩ bãmb buudã ka fɩɩg wa Zʋʋda kom-dibli wã ye." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bãmb dag n bee Bɛɛr-Seba, Molaada, Hasaar-Suwalle," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bila, Ɛtsɛm, Tolaade," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuwɛlle, Orma, Siklaage," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bɛt-Markabote, Atsaar-Susim, Bɛt-Bireyi, ne Saarayim. Yaa tẽn-bãmb pʋs la bãmb zĩnd hal n tãag a Davɩɩd rĩungã wakate," 
1Chronicles4:32 n paas ne tẽn-bãooneg a nu wã bãmb sẽn so wã: yaa Etam ne Ayin la Rimon ne Tokɛn la Aaza n," 
1Chronicles4:33 n paas ne tẽn-bãooneg nins sẽn dag n karg n gũbg tẽn-kãensã, hal n tãag Baalle. Tẽms nins bãmb sẽn zĩndã, ne b buudã neb nins yʋy sẽn be sõadgã sɛb pʋsẽ wã la woto." 
1Chronicles4:34 Nanambsã ne b buudã neb yʋy la woto: yaa a Mesobaabe, a Yamlɛke, a Amatsɩya biig a Yosa," 
1Chronicles4:35 a Zowɛlle, a Aziyɛll biig a Seraya biig a Yosibiya biig a Zehu," 
1Chronicles4:36 la a Eliyohenayi, a Yakoba, a Yesohaya, a Aazaya, a Adiyɛlle, a Yesimiyɛlle, a Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 a Semaya biig a Simri biig a Yedaya biig a Alõ biig a Sifeyi biig a Ziiza. 
1Chronicles4:38 Neb nins yʋy b sẽn sõdgã rag n yaa b buudã rot nanambse, la b buudã fɩɩga hal wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles4:39 Bãmb kẽnga Gedoor tẽngã rignoor sẽnẽ, hal n tɩ tãag tãn-longã yaanga, n na n tɩ bao wãbneg zĩis b rũm-bãoonegã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles4:40 Bãmb kẽng n tɩ yãnda wãbneg zĩis sẽn yaa sõama, ne tẽng sẽn yalem wʋsgo, n tar laafɩ la bãane. Neb nins sẽn dag n zĩnd tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã rag n yaa a Sam yagense." 
1Chronicles4:41 La Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas wakatẽ wã, b sẽn gʋls neb nins yʋy sebrã pʋgã wa n sãama fu-rotã ne b soondgã zĩis sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã, la b kʋ tẽngã neb gill tɩ b menem hal tɩ ta rũndã. Dẽ, b reega bãmb zĩig n zĩnd beenẽ, bala, wãbneg zĩis rag n bee beenẽ b rũm-bãoonegã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles4:42 A Sɩmyõ buudã neb kobs-nu me rag n kẽnga Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã. A Yiseyi kom-dibli wã n dag n yaa bãmb taoor dãmba: yaa a Pelatiya, a Neyariya, la a Refaya ne a Uziyɛlle." 
1Chronicles4:43 Bãmb kʋʋ Amalɛk yagens nins sẽn dag n põsã, la b reeg b tẽngã n zĩnd be hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Chronicles5:1 A Israyɛll bi-kãseng a Rubɛn kom-dibli la woto. A Rubɛn n dag n yaa a ba wã bi-kãsenga, la yẽnda sẽn kẽ ne a ba pagã yĩnga, b reega a kãosengã n kõ a Zozɛf me sẽn yaa a Israyɛll biigã kom-dibli. Woto, b ka leb n geelg a Rubɛn wa a ba wã bi-kãseng yɛs ye." 
1Chronicles5:2 A Zʋʋda n dag n tar pãng n yɩɩd a ba-biisã, la yẽnda yageng a yembr n lebg Israyɛll dĩma. La baoosgo, a Zozɛf n kell n soog kãosengã." 
1Chronicles5:3 A Israyɛll bi-kãseng a Rubɛn kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Enoke, a Palu, a Ɛtsron ne a Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 A Zowɛll roga a Semaya, t'a Semaya rog a Googe, t'a Goog rog a Simeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 t'a Simeyi rog a Miise, t'a Miise rog a Rehaya, t'a Rehaya rog a Baalle," 
1Chronicles5:6 t'a Baall rog a Beera. A Beera rag n yaa Rubɛn buudã kãsem a yembre, tɩ Asiiri rĩm a Tɩlgat-Pilnezɛɛr kɩt tɩ b yõk-a n tall n kẽng yembdo." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ad a Beera saam-biisã b sẽn sõd roog-roogo, tɩ b yʋyã be sõadgã sebr pʋga, wa sẽn zems b buudu: kãsmã yaa a Yeyiyɛlle, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa a Zakari." 
1Chronicles5:8 Yaoolem soab yaa a Azaaz biig a Bela sẽn yaa a Sema yagenga, la a Zowɛll yagen-tʋbrakẽega. A Beera saam-biisã rag n bee Arowɛɛre, hal n tãag Nebo ne Baall-Meyon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Yaangã sẽnẽ, bãmb dag n bee hal we-raoogã noore, Efrat kʋɩlgã sẽnẽ. Bala, b rũmsã rag n yaa wʋsg Galaad tẽngã." 
1Chronicles5:10 A Sayull rĩungã wakate, a Rubɛn yagensã zaba ne Hagaar nebã n tõog-ba. Bãmb deega b fu-rotã n kẽ n zĩndi, n soog Galaad soolmã yaang tẽmsã fãa." 
1Chronicles5:11 Gaad yagensã sẽn dag n beẽ wã teesa bãmba, sẽn sɩng ne Basan tẽngã n tɩ tãag Salka yaanga." 
1Chronicles5:12 A Zowɛll n dag n yaa naabã, t'a Safam pʋgda, t'a Yanayi ne a Safat sẽn be Basandã pʋgda." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bãmb ba-biis a yopoe wã yʋy la woto buud-buudu: a Mikayɛlle, a Mesulam, a Seba, a Yorayi, a Yakan, a Ziya, ne a Ebɛɛre." 
1Chronicles5:14 A Abigayɩll yagens la woto: yaa a Uuri kom-dibli, a Yaroa kom-dibli, a Galaad kom-dibli, a Mikayɛll kom-dibli, a Yesisayi kom-dibli, a Yado kom-dibli, ne a Buuz kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles5:15 A Guni biig a Abdiyɛll biig a Ayi, n dag n yaa b buudã naabã." 
1Chronicles5:16 B rag n bee Galaad ne Basã, la tẽms nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n so wã, n paas ne Saaron tẽn-kɩremsã n tɩ tãag b todsã." 
1Chronicles5:17 B sõda bãmb fãa Zʋʋda rĩm a Zotam ne Israyɛll dĩm a Zeroboaam wakatẽ wã. 
1Chronicles5:18 A Rubɛn yagensã sẽn yaa Gaad buudã, ne Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã rag n tara gãndaad sẽn tõe n bob gãnd ne zabr sʋʋse, la sẽn yaa tãb-tãoodba. Sẽn tõe n bob-b zab-teedã sõor yaa neb tus pis-naas la a naas la kobs-yopoe la pis-yoobe." 
1Chronicles5:19 Bãmb zaba ne Hagaar nebã, la ne a Yetʋʋr la a Nafiis ne a Nodaabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Bãmb paamame tɩ b sõng-b n zab ne Hagaar nebã. Dẽ, b yõga Hagaar nebã ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne bãmbã. Bala, zabrã wakate, bãmb kelem n boola Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam leoka b kosgã, b sẽn dag n dɩk b teegrã n teeg Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles5:21 B yõga b rũmsã fãa: yaa yʋgma tus pis-nu, rũm-bãooneg tus kobessi la pis-nu, bõens tus a yiibu, n paas neb tus koabga." 
1Chronicles5:22 Bãmb tõog n kʋ b bɛɛbã sʋk neb wʋsg tɩ bala, Wẽnnaam meng n zab zabrã. Dẽ, bãmb deega Hagaar nebã tẽnga, n zĩnd be n tãag wakat ning b sẽn tall-b n loog yembdã." 
1Chronicles5:23 A Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk rag n bee tẽngã pʋga, sẽn sɩng ne Basan n tɩ tãag Baall-Hɛrmon ne Seniir la Ɛrmon tãngã. Bãmb dag n yaa wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles5:24 B buudã nanambs la woto: yaa a Efɛɛre, a Yiseyi, a Eliyɛlle, a Azriyɛlle, a Zeremi, la a Odaviya ne a Yadiyɛlle, n paas gãndaado, ne nin-kãsems sẽn yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmba." 
1Chronicles5:25 La bãmb maana sẽn kisi, n beeg b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, n paam lagem-n-taar ne tẽms nins Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n sãam bãmb nifẽ wã wẽnnaam-dãmba." 
1Chronicles5:26 Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã pirsa Asiiri rĩm a Pulli, ne Asiiri rĩm a Tɩlgat-Pilnezɛɛre, n kɩt t'a Tɩlgat-Pilnezɛɛr yõg Rubɛn nebã ne Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk n tɩ kẽes yembdo. A tall-b lame n kẽng Hala, Haboore, Haara, Gozan kʋɩlgã noore, la b keta beenẽ n tãag rũndã." 
1Chronicles5:27 A Leevi kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Gɛrson ne a Kehat la a Meraari. 
1Chronicles5:28 A Kehat kom-dibli yaa a Aram, a Yitsaare, a Ebrõ ne a Uziyɛlle." 
1Chronicles5:29 A Amram kom-dibli yaa a Aarõ, a Moyiisi, ne a Miryam. A Aarõ kom-dibli yaa a Nadaabe, a Abiyu, a Eleyazaare, ne a Itamaare." 
1Chronicles5:30 A Eleyazaar doga a Fineyaase, t'a Fineyaas rog a Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles5:31 t'a Abisuwa rog a Buki, t'a Buki rog a Uuzi," 
1Chronicles5:32 t'a Uuzi rog a Zeraya, t'a Zeraya rog a Merayote," 
1Chronicles5:33 t'a Merayot roga a Amariya, t'a Amariya rog a Akituube," 
1Chronicles5:34 t'a Akituub rog a Sadoke, t'a Sadok rog a Ayimaase," 
1Chronicles5:35 t'a Ayimaas rog a Azariya, t'a Azariya rog a Yohanan," 
1Chronicles5:36 t'a Yohanan rog a Azariya sẽn dag n yaa roog ning a Salmo sẽn dag n me Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã maan-kʋʋda. 
1Chronicles5:37 A Azariya roga a Amariya, t'a Amariya rog a Akituube," 
1Chronicles5:38 t'a Akituub rog a Sadoke, t'a Sadok rog a Salum," 
1Chronicles5:39 t'a Salum rog a Hilkiiza, t'a Hilkiiza rog a Azariya," 
1Chronicles5:40 t'a Azariya rog a Seraya, t'a Seraya rog a Yehosadake." 
1Chronicles5:41 A Yehosadak looga wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a Nebukatnedzaar yõg Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã n tall n kẽng yembdã. 
1Chronicles6:1 A Leevi kom-dibli yaa a Gersom ne a Kehat la a Meraari. 
1Chronicles6:2 A Gersom kom-dibli wã yʋy la woto: yaa a Libni ne a Simeyi. 
1Chronicles6:3 A Kehat kom-dibli yaa a Amram, a Yitsaare, la a Ebrõ ne a Uziyɛlle." 
1Chronicles6:4 A Meraari kom-dibli yaa a Makli ne a Musi. A Leevi buudã neb la woto, wa sẽn zems b yaab-rãmbã roto." 
1Chronicles6:5 A Gersom doga a Libni, t'a Libni rog a Yahate, t'a Yahat rog a Zima," 
1Chronicles6:6 t'a Zima rog a Yowa, t'a Yowa rog a Ido, t'a Ido rog a Zeera, t'a Zeera rog a Yeyatrayi." 
1Chronicles6:7 A Kehat kom-dibli la woto: yẽnda roga a Aminadaabe, t'a Aminadaab rog a Koore, t'a Koore rog a Asɩɩre," 
1Chronicles6:8 t'a Asɩɩr dog a Ɛlkana, t'a Ɛlkana rog a Ebiyazafe, t'a Ebiyazaf rog a Asiiri," 
1Chronicles6:9 t'a Asɩɩr dog a Tahate, t'a Tahat rog a Uriyɛlle, t'a Uriyɛll dog a Uziya, t'a Uziya rog a Sayulli." 
1Chronicles6:10 A Ɛlkana kom-dibli yaa a Amasayi ne a Ayimote. 
1Chronicles6:11 A Ɛlkana roga a Sofayi, t'a Sofayi rog a Nahate," 
1Chronicles6:12 t'a Nahat rog a Eliyaabe, t'a Eliyaab rog a Yeroham, t'a Yeroham dog a Ɛlkana," 
1Chronicles6:13 n paas a Vasni ne a Abiya sẽn yaa a bi-kãseng a Sãmwɛll kom-dibli wã. 
1Chronicles6:14 A Meraari kom-dibli yaa a Mali, a Libni, a Simeyi, a Uuza," 
1Chronicles6:15 a Simeya, la sa Agiya, ne a Aazaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 A Davɩɩd dag n yãka nin-bãmb tɩ b yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, wakat ning kaoolã koglgã sẽn wat n paam vʋʋsg zĩigã." 
1Chronicles6:17 Bãmb n dag n yas sɛk roogã taoor n yɩɩndẽ, hal n tãag wakat ning a Salmo sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã Zeruzalɛm n sɛ wã. B rag n maanda b tʋʋmdã wa sẽn zems b sẽn wilg-b to-to wã." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ad neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã ne b kom-dibli: a Kehat kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa yɩɩn-yɩɩnd a Eman. Yẽnda yaab-rãmb yaa a Sãmwɛll biig a Zowɛlle, a Ɛlkana biig a Sãmwɛlle," 
1Chronicles6:19 a Ɛlkana biig a Yeroham biiga, a Yeroham biig a Eliyɛlle, a Eliyɛll biig a Toa," 
1Chronicles6:20 a Toa biig a Sufi, a Suf biig a Ɛlkana, a Ɛlkana biig a Mahate, a Mahat biig a Amasayi," 
1Chronicles6:21 a Amasayi biig a Ɛlkana, a Ɛlkana biig a Zowɛlle, a Zowɛlle biig a Azariya, a Azariya biig a Sofoni," 
1Chronicles6:22 a Sofoni biig a Tahate, a Tahat biig a Asɩɩre, a Asɩɩr biig a Ebiyazafe, a Ebiyazaf biig a Koore," 
1Chronicles6:23 a Koore biig a Yitsaare, a Yitsaar biig a Keyate, a Kehat biig a Leevi, a Leevi biig a Israyɛlle." 
1Chronicles6:24 A Leevi ba-biig a Azaf dag n yasa yẽnda nug-rɩtgo. A Azaf yaa a Berekɩya biiga, t'a Berekɩya yaa a Simeya biiga," 
1Chronicles6:25 t'a Simeya yaa a Misɛll biiga, t'a Misɛll yaa a Baaseya biiga, t'a Baaseya yaa a Malkiya biiga," 
1Chronicles6:26 t'a Malkiya yaa a Ɛtni biiga, t'a Ɛtni yaa a Zeera biiga, t'a Zeera yaa a Adaya biiga," 
1Chronicles6:27 t'a Adaya yaa a Etan biiga, t'a Etan yaa a Zima biiga, t'a Zima yaa a Simeyi biiga," 
1Chronicles6:28 t'a Simeyi yaa a Yahat biiga, t'a Yahat yaa a Gersom biiga, t'a Gersom yaa a Leevi biiga." 
1Chronicles6:29 A Meraari kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa bãmb ba-biisã rag n yasa bãmb nug-goabga. Bãmb taoor soab rag n yaa a Etan. A Etan yaa a Kiisi biiga, t'a Kisi yaa a Abdi biiga, t'a Abdi yaa a Maluk biiga," 
1Chronicles6:30 t'a Maluk yaa a Aazabiya biiga, t'a Aazabiya yaa a Amatsɩya biiga, t'a Amatsɩya yaa a Hilkiiza biiga," 
1Chronicles6:31 t'a Hilkiiza yaa a Amsi biiga, t'a Amsi yaa a Bani biiga, t'a Bani yaa a Semeer biiga," 
1Chronicles6:32 t'a Semeer yaa a Makli biiga, t'a Makli yaa a Musi biiga, t'a Musi yaa a Meraari biiga, t'a Meraari yaa a Leevi biiga." 
1Chronicles6:33 Leevi nebã sẽn yaa bãmb ba-biisã n dag n get Wẽnd doogã tʋʋm fãa yelle. 
1Chronicles6:34 A Aarõ ne a kom-dibli wã n dag n yõogd kũunã maand sẽn yõogd bugmã tẽn-kugr zugu, la wisdã tẽn-kugr zugu. Bãmb dag n maanda b tʋʋmã fãa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ, la b maand yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maandã, Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, wa sẽn zems noor ning Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã." 
1Chronicles6:35 A Aarõ kom-dibli la woto: A Aarõ n dog a Eleyazaare, t'a Eleyazaar dog a Fineyaase, t'a Fineyaas rog a Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:36 t'a Abisuwa rog a Buki, t'a Buki rog a Uuzi, t'a Uuzi rog a Zeraya," 
1Chronicles6:37 t'a Zeraya rog a Merayote, t'a Meyarot dog a Amariya, t'a Amariya rog a Akituubi," 
1Chronicles6:38 t'a Akituub rog a Sadoke, t'a Sadok rog a Ayimaase." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ad tẽngã zĩis nins a Leevi yagensã sẽn zĩndi, wa sẽn zems b sik zĩisã ne b soolmã. Ad tẽms nins b sẽn maan poeer n yãk n kõ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa a Kehat roogã nebã:" 
1Chronicles6:40 yaa Ebrõ sẽn be Zʋʋda wã ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:41 la b yaool n dɩk tẽngã pʋt ne tẽn-bãooneg nins a sẽn so wã, n kõ a Yefune biig a Kalɛɛbe." 
1Chronicles6:42 B rɩka weem-tẽmsã n kõ a Aarõ kom-dibli wã: yaa Ebrõ ne Libna, la Libna kɩremsã, la Yatɩɩr ne a kɩremsã, la Ɛstemoa ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:43 la Ilɛɛz ne a kɩremsã, la Debɩɩr ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:44 la Aaza ne a kɩremsã, la Bɛt-Semees ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:45 la sã n yaa ne Benzame buudã, b kõo bãmb Geba ne a kɩremsã, Alemet ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Anatot ne a kɩremsã. B tẽmsã fãa sõor yaa piig la a tãabo, wa sẽn zems b roto." 
1Chronicles6:46 B leb n maana poeer n yãk tẽms piig Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk sẽn so wã pʋga, n kõ a Kehat kom-dibli a taabã." 
1Chronicles6:47 B kõo a Gersom kom-dibli tẽms piig la a tãabo, wa sẽn zems b roto, la yaa tẽms b sẽn yãk a Yisakaar ne a Asɛɛr la a Neftali ne a Manaase buudã pʋgẽ Basan soolmẽ." 
1Chronicles6:48 B maana poeer n yãk tẽms piig la a yiib Rubɛn ne Gaad la Zabulõ buudã soolmẽ n kõ a Meraari kom-dibli wã wa sẽn zems b roto. 
1Chronicles6:49 Israyɛll nebã rɩka tẽmsã ne b pʋ-weesã n kõ Leevi nebã. 
1Chronicles6:50 B maana poeer n yãk tẽn-kãensã sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda buudã yagense, ne a Sɩmyõ buudã yagense, la a Benzame buudã yagens tẽmsã n kõ-ba, la b rɩka b mensã yʋy n pʋd tẽn-kãense." 
1Chronicles6:51 B yãka tẽms Efrayiim buudã pʋgẽ, n kõ a Kehat rot kẽer yagense, b soolmẽ wã." 
1Chronicles6:52 B kõo bãmb Sɩkɛm sẽn yaa weem-tẽngã ne a kɩremsã, n be Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, Gezɛɛr ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:53 Yokmeyam ne a kɩremsã, Bɛt-Horon ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:54 Ayalon ne a kɩremsã, ne Gat-Rimon ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:55 Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk pʋgẽ, b yãka Aneer ne a kɩremsã, la Balaam ne a tẽn-kɩremsã n kõ a Kehat kom-dibli a taabã roto." 
1Chronicles6:56 Ad tẽms nins b sẽn yãk a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk roogẽ n kõ a Gersom yagensã: yaa Golan, sẽn be Basan ne a kɩremsã, la Astarot ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:57 Yisakaar buudẽ wã, yaa Kedɛɛs ne a kɩremsã, Dabrat ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ramot ne a kɩremsã, la Anem ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:59 A Asɛɛr buudã pʋgẽ, yaa Masall ne a kɩremsã, Abdõ ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:60 Ukok ne a kɩremsã, Rehoob ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:61 A Neftali buudã pʋgẽ, yaa Kedɛɛs sẽn be Galɩle ne a kɩremsã, Amo ne a kɩremsã, la Kiriyatayim ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:62 B yãka tẽms a Zabulõ buudã pʋgẽ n kõ a Meraari kom-dibli a taabã: yaa Rimon ne a kɩremsã, la Taboor ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:63 Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd sẽn tees Zeeriko, Zʋrdẽ yaanga, b yãka tẽms a Rubɛn buudã pʋgẽ n kõ bãmba: yaa Besɛɛr sẽn be we-raoogẽ wã ne a kɩremsã, Yatsa ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:64 Kedmot ne a kɩremsã, n paas Mefaat ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles6:65 Gaad buudã pʋgẽ, b yãka Ramot sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Mahanayim ne a kɩremsã," 
1Chronicles6:66 Hɛsbon ne a kɩremsã, la Yazɛɛr ne a kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles7:1 A Yisakaar doga kom-dibli a naase: yaa a Tola, a Puwa, a Yasuubi, ne a Sɩmron." 
1Chronicles7:2 A Tola kom-dibli yaa a Uuzi, a Refaya, a Yeriyɛlle, a Yamayi, la a Yibsam ne a Sãmwɛlle. Bãmb n dag n yaa a Tola buudã kãsem-dãmba. B rag n yaa gãndaado, wa sẽn zems b roto. A Davɩɩd zamaanẽ wã, b sõorã rag n yaa neb tus pisi la a yiib la kobs-yoobe." 
1Chronicles7:3 A Uuzi biig yaa a Yizraya. A Yizraya kom-dibli yaa a Misɛlle, a Abdyaase, a Zowɛlle, la a Yisiya. Bãmb dag n yaa kãsem-dãmb a nu." 
1Chronicles7:4 B rag n tara tãb-biis tus pis-tã la a yoob zabrã yĩnga, wa sẽn zems b rot la b buudu. Bala, b rag n tara pagb ne kom-dibli wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles7:5 A Yisakaar dotã fãa pʋgẽ, bãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa gãndaadã b sẽn sõdã sõor dag n yaa raop pis-nii la a yopoe." 
1Chronicles7:6 A Benzame doga kom-dibli a tãabo: yaa a Bela, a Bekɛɛre ne a Yediyayɛlle." 
1Chronicles7:7 A Bela kom-dibli yaa a Ɛtsbon, a Uuzi, a Uziyɛlle, a Yerimote, la a Uuri. Bãmb b nu wã rag n yaa buud kãsem-dãmba, n yaa gãndaado. B buudã neb nins b sẽn sõdã yaa neb tus pisi la a yiib la pis-tã la a naase." 
1Chronicles7:8 A Bekɛɛr kom-dibli yaa a Zemira, a Yowaase, a Eliyezɛɛre, a Eliyohenayi, a Omri, a Yeremote, a Abiya, a Anatote, ne a Alemete. Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa a Bekɛɛr kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles7:9 B sõda bãmb roog-roogo, n yãk-b tɩ b yaa buud nanambse, la gãndaado. B sõorã rag n yaa neb tus pisi la kobessi." 
1Chronicles7:10 A Yediyayɛll biig yaa a Bilan. A Bilan kom-dibli yaa a Yewuusi, a Benzame, a Ewuudi, a Kenaana, a Zetan, a Tarsɩɩse, ne a Ayisahaare." 
1Chronicles7:11 Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa a Yediyayɛll kom-dibli nins sẽn yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmb la gãndaadã. Raop nins sẽn tõe n bob zab-teed n kẽng zabrã sõor yaa neb tus piig la a yopoe la kobs-yi. 
1Chronicles7:12 A Supim la a Hupim dag n yaa a Iir kom-dibli, t'a Husim dag n yaa a Ahɛɛr biiga." 
1Chronicles7:13 A Neftali kom-dibli yaa a Yatsiyɛlle, a Guni, a Yetsɛɛre, ne a Salum. Bãmb yaa a Bila kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles7:14 A Manaase kom-dibli la woto: a Asriyɛll sẽn yaa yẽnda pʋg-rɩkdg ning sẽn yaa Siiri bi-puglã biigã. Yẽnda roga a Makɩɩr sẽn yaa a Galaad ba wã. 
1Chronicles7:15 A Makɩɩr peega pagb n kõ a Hupim ne a Supim. A tão-poakã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Maaka. A bi-ribl a yiib soabã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Selofaade. A Selofaad roga kom-pugli bala. 
1Chronicles7:16 A Makɩɩr pag a Maaka roga biiga, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Perɛɛze. A Perɛɛz ba-biigã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Sarɛɛse. A Sarɛɛs kom-dibli yaa a Ulam ne a Rekɛm." 
1Chronicles7:17 A Ulam doga a Bedan. Bãmb n dag n yaa Manaase biig a Makɩɩr biig a Galaad yagense. 
1Chronicles7:18 A Galaad tão-poak a Ha-Molekɛt roga a Yisood ne a Abiyezɛɛr la a Mala. 
1Chronicles7:19 A Semida kom-dibli rag n yaa a Ahiyan, a Sɩkɛm, a Liki, ne a Aniyam." 
1Chronicles7:20 A Efrayiim yagens la woto: a Efrayiim doga a Sutela, t'a Sutela rog a Berɛɛde, t'a Berɛɛd dog a Tahate, t'a Tahat rog a Eleyaada, t'a Eleyaada rog a Tahate," 
1Chronicles7:21 t'a Tahat rog a Zabaade, t'a Zabaad rog a Sutela. A Ezɛɛr ne a Eleyaad me yaa a Efrayiim kom-dibli. Gat neb nins sẽn dog tẽngã pʋgẽ wã kʋʋ bãmb b yiibã, b sẽn kẽng n na n tɩ yõg Gat nebã rũmsã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles7:22 Bãmb ba a Efrayiim yãba b kʋʋr n kaoos wʋsgo, la a ba-biisã waame n na n bels a sũuri." 
1Chronicles7:23 Dẽ zugẽ, yẽnda kẽe ne a pagã t'a rɩk pʋg n dog bi-ribla, t'a pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Beriya tɩ bala, yẽnda zakã pʋg rag n yaa toogo." 
1Chronicles7:24 A Efrayiim doga bi-pugl me, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Seera. A Seera n me Bɛt-Horon sẽn be longẽ wã, ne Bɛt-Horon sẽn be tãmsã zĩisẽ wã, la Uuzen-Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 A Uuzen-Seera roga a Refa, ne a Resɛfe, t'a Resɛf rog a Tela, t'a Tela rog a Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 t'a Tahan rog a Ladan, t'a Ladan rog a Amihuudi, t'a Amihuud dog a Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 t'a Elisama rog a Nun, t'a Nun rog a Zozoe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Tẽms nins Efrayiim yagensã sẽn dag n so wã yaa Betɛll ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Naaran sẽn be yaangã, Gezɛɛr ne a tẽn-kɩremsã sẽn be nin-taoorã, Sɩkɛm ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, hal n tɩ tãag Aya ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles7:29 A Manaase kom-dibli wã rag n soo Bɛt-Seyan ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Taanak ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Megido ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, n paas Door ne a tẽn-kɩremsã. Yaa tẽn-bãmb pʋsẽ la a Israyɛll biig a Zozɛf kom-dibli wã rag n be." 
1Chronicles7:30 A Asɛɛr kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Yimna, a Yisva, a Yisvi ne a Beriya, n paas b tão-poak a Seera." 
1Chronicles7:31 A Beriya kom-dibli yaa a Ebɛɛr ne a Malkiyɛlle. A Malkiyɛll n yaa a Birzot ba. 
1Chronicles7:32 A Hebɛɛr kom-dibli yaa a Yaflɛte, a Semeere, a Otam, n paas b tão a Suwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 A Yaflɛt roga a Pasak ne a Bimhal la a Asvate. Nin-bãmbã yaa a Yaflɛt kom-dibli. 
1Chronicles7:34 A Semeer kom-dibli yaa a Ayi ne a Royega, la a Uba ne a Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 A Semeer ba-biig a Helɛm kom-dibli yaa a Sofa, a Yimna, a Selɛɛse, ne a Amalle." 
1Chronicles7:36 A Sofa kom-dibli yaa a Suwa, a Arnefɛɛre, a Suwalle, a Beeri, a Yimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 a Betsɛɛre, a Hoode, a Sama, a Silsa, la a Yitran ne a Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 A Yetɛɛr kom-dibli yaa a Yefune ne a Pispa la a Aara. 
1Chronicles7:39 A Ula kom-dibli yaa a Aara, a Haniyɛlle, ne a Ritsiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa Asɛɛr yagens nins sẽn dag n yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmba, neb b sẽn tũusi, la gãndaado, la nanambs taoor dãmba. B sõda bãmb n kõ-b zab-teed zabr yĩnga, la b sõorã yaa neb tus pisi la a yoobe." 
1Chronicles8:1 A Benzame roga kom-dibli a nu: a bi-kãsengã yaa a Bela, yiibẽ soabã yaa a Asbɛlle, tãabẽ soabã yaa a Aara," 
1Chronicles8:2 naasẽ soabã yaa a Nowa, tɩ nu soabã yaa a Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 A Bela kom-dibli yaa a Adaare, a Geera, a Abihuudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 a Abisuwa, a Naama, a Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 a Geera, a Sefufande, ne a Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 A Ehuud kom-dibli nins sẽn dag n be Geba nebã sʋk n yaa buudã nanambsã la woto: a Naama, a Ayiya, n paas a Geera. B yõga bãmb n tall n kẽng yembd Manahat tẽnga. Yaa a Geera n kɩt tɩ b tall-b n looge. A Geera kom-dibli yaa a Uuza ne a Ayihuudi." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 A Saharayim sẽn dig a Usim ne a Baara sẽn yaa yẽnda pagbã poore, a kẽnga Moaab tẽngẽ wã n tɩ rog kamb beenẽ." 
1Chronicles8:9 Yẽnda peega pag a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Odɛɛse. Yẽnda paama kom-dibli ne a pag a Odɛɛse: yaa a Yobaabe, a Sibiya, a Mesa, a Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 a Yewutsi, a Sakiya, ne a Mirma. Bãmb n yaa kom-dibli nins sẽn dag n yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmbã." 
1Chronicles8:11 A Saharayim pag a Husim doga kom-dibli a yiibu: a Abituub ne a Ɛlpaalle. 
1Chronicles8:12 A Ɛlpaall kom-dibli yaa a Ebɛɛre, a Miseyam, ne a Semeere. A Semeer n me Ono tẽngã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Lood ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
1Chronicles8:13 A Beriya ne a Sema sẽn dag n be Ayalon tẽngã nebã sʋk n yaa buud kãsem-dãmbã, b riga Gat tẽng nebã tɩ b zoe." 
1Chronicles8:14 A Beriya kom-dibli yaa a Akiyo, a Sasake, a Yeremote," 
1Chronicles8:15 a Zebadiya, a Araade, a Edɛɛre," 
1Chronicles8:16 a Misɛlle, a Yisfa, n paas a Yoha."
