1Chronicles8:17 A Ɛlpaall kom-dibli yaa a Zebadiya, a Mesulam, a Hiski, a Hebɛɛre," 
1Chronicles8:18 a Yismerayi, a Yisliya, n paas a Yobaabe." 
1Chronicles8:19 A Simeyi kom-dibli yaa a Yakim, a Zikri, a Zabdi, a Eliyenayi, a Siltayi, a Eliyɛlle, a Adaya, a Beraya, ne a Simrate." 
1Chronicles8:20  
1Chronicles8:21  
1Chronicles8:22 A Sasak kom-dibli yaa a Yispan, a Ebɛɛre, a Eliyɛlle, a Abdõ, a Zikri, a Hanan, a Hananiya, a Elam, a Ãntotiya, a Yifdeya, n paas a Penuwɛlle." 
1Chronicles8:23  
1Chronicles8:24  
1Chronicles8:25  
1Chronicles8:26 A Zeroham kom-dibli yaa a Samserayi, a Sehariya, a Ataliya, a Yaresiya, a Eliya, ne a Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:27  
1Chronicles8:28 Nin-bãmbã n yaa buudã kãsem-dãmba, wa sẽn zems b roto. Bãmb dag n bee Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles8:29 A Gabawõ ba wã rag n bee Gabawõ, la a pagã yʋʋr la a Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 A bi-kãsengã yʋʋr yaa a Abdõ, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa a Sʋʋre, a Kiisi, a Baalle, a Nadaabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 a Gedoore, a Akiyo, n paas a Zekɛɛre." 
1Chronicles8:32 A Miklot roga a Simeya. Bãmb me rag n bee ne b ba-biisã Zeruzalɛm. 
1Chronicles8:33 A Neer doga a Kiisi, t'a Kiis rog a Sayulli, t'a Sayull rog a Zonatã, a Malki-Suwa, a Abinadaabe, la a Ɛsbaalle." 
1Chronicles8:34 A Zonatã roga a Meriib-Baalle, t'a Meriib-Baall rog a Miise." 
1Chronicles8:35 A Miise kom-dibli yaa a Pitõ, a Melɛke, a Tareya, la a Akaaze." 
1Chronicles8:36 A Akaaz roga a Yehoaada, t'a Yehoaada rog a Alemete, a Azmavɛte, ne a Zimri. A Zimri roga a Motsa." 
1Chronicles8:37 A Motsa roga a Bineya, t'a Bineya rog a Rafa, t'a Rafa rog a Eleyasa, t'a Eleyasa rog a Atsɛlle." 
1Chronicles8:38 A Atsɛll roga kom-dibli a yoobe. Bãmb yʋy la woto: yaa a Aazrikam, a Bokru, a Ismayɛlle, a Sehariya, la a Abdyaase, ne a Hanan. Bãmb fãa yaa a Atsɛll kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles8:39 A Atsɛll ba-biig a Esɛk kom-dibli la woto: a bi-kãsengã yaa a Ulam, tɩ yiibẽ soabã yaa a Yewuusi, tãabẽ soabã la a Elifelɛte." 
1Chronicles8:40 A Ulam kom-dibli wã yɩɩ gãndaad sẽn yaa tãb-tãoodba. Bãmb paama kom-dibli ne yagens wʋsgo. B fãa sõorã yaa neb koabg la pis-nu. Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa Benzame buudã nebã. 
1Chronicles9:1 Israyɛll nebã fãa yʋy rag n gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã sebr pʋgẽ. B yõga Zʋʋda nebã n tall-b n kẽng Babilonde, b sẽn maan sẽn kis n beeg Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles9:2 Neb nins sẽn yɩ pipi n lebg n kuil b soolmẽ wã ne b tẽmsẽ wã yaa Israyɛll nebã, Leevi nebã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Wẽnd doogã tʋmtʋmdba." 
1Chronicles9:3 Zʋʋda ne Benzame la Efrayiim ne Manaase yagensã kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Zeruzalɛm. 
1Chronicles9:4 Zʋʋda nebã yaa a Amihuud biig a Utayi, sẽn yaa a Omri biiga, n yaa a Imri yagenga, la a Bani yagen-tʋbrakẽega, Perɛɛz buudã sʋka." 
1Chronicles9:5 Sela buudã neb yaa a bi-kãseng a Aaza ne a kom-dibli wã. 
1Chronicles9:6 A Zeera kom-dibli yaa a Yehuwɛll ne a ba-biisã. Bãmb fãa sõorã yaa neb kobs-yoob la pis-wɛ. 
1Chronicles9:7 A Benzame kom-dibli yaa a Mesulam biig a Salu sẽn yaa Odaviya yagenga, la a Senuwa yagen-tʋbrakẽega." 
1Chronicles9:8 A Yeroham biig a Yibneya, a Uuzi biig a Ela, a Mikri biig a Uuzi, ne a Sefatiya biig a Mesulam sẽn yaa a Sefatiya biiga, n leb n yaa a Rehuwɛll yagenga, la a Yibneya yagen-tʋbrakẽega," 
1Chronicles9:9 n paas b ba-biisã, wa sẽn zems b roto. B fãa sõor yaa neb kobs-wɛ la pis-nu la a yoobe. Nin-bãmbã fãa rag n yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmba, wa sẽn zems b buudu." 
1Chronicles9:10 Maan-kʋʋdbã rag n yaa a Yedaya, a Yehoyariibi, n paas a Yakin," 
1Chronicles9:11 a Azariya ba la a Hilkiiza, t'a Hilkiiza ba la a Mesulam, t'a Mesulam ba la a Sadoke, t'a Sadok ba la a Merayote, t'a Merayot ba la a Akituubi sẽn dag n yaa Wẽnd doogã taoor soabã." 
1Chronicles9:12 A Adaya yaab-rãmb n dag n yaa a Yeroham, a Pasewʋʋre, la a Malkiya. A Masayi yaab-rãmb yaa a Adiyɛlle, a Yazera, a Mesulam, a Mesilemiti, la a Imeere," 
1Chronicles9:13 ne b ba-biisã sẽn yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmbã. Nin-kãsems nins sẽn dag n tʋmd Wẽnd doogã tʋʋmã sõor yaa neb tusr la kobs-yopoe la pis-yoobe. 
1Chronicles9:14 Leevi buudã neb la woto: a Semaya yaab-rãmb yaa Asuube, a Aazrikam, la a Aazabiya. Bãmb yaa a Meraari yagense." 
1Chronicles9:15 A Bakbakaar yaab-rãmb yaa a Herɛɛse, a Galalle, a Mataniya, a Miise, ne a Zikri, la a Azafe." 
1Chronicles9:16 A Abdyaas yaab-rãmb yaa a Semaya, a Galalle, la a Yedutun. A Berekɩya yaab-rãmb yaa a Aaza ne a Ɛlkana. A Ɛlkana rag n bee Netofa nebã tẽms pʋsẽ." 
1Chronicles9:17 Na-zakã noy gũudb rag n yaa a Salum, a Akʋʋbe, a Talmo, a Ayiman, n paas b ba-biisã. A Salum n dag n yaa b naaba," 
1Chronicles9:18 la hal tɩ ta moasã, yẽnda n ket n gũud rĩmã zak noor ning sẽn tees-a yaangã. Dẽ, nin-bãmbã n dag n yaa Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn dag n yaa gũudbã." 
1Chronicles9:19 A Koore biig a Salum sẽn yaa a Ebiyazaf yageng la a Koore yagen-tʋbrakẽegã ne a ba-biisi, n paas a Koore buudã neb a taabã, n dag n yaa sɛk roogã noor gũudba. Bãmb yaab-rãmbã rag n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã tãb-sik noor gũudba," 
1Chronicles9:20 la a Eleyazaar biig a Fineyaas n dag n yaa b naaba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee ne a Fineyaase. 
1Chronicles9:21 A Meselemiya biig a Zakari dag n yaa sɛk roogã noor gũuda. 
1Chronicles9:22 Gũudb nins b sẽn yãkã sõor dag n yaa neb kobessi la piig la a yiibu, la b gʋlsa b yʋyã wa sẽn zems ned fãa ne a tẽnga. A Davɩɩd ne bãngd a Sãmwɛll n dag n wilg bãmb b wakat fãa tʋʋmdã." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bãmb ne b kom-dibli wã n dag n gũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne sɛk roogã. 
1Chronicles9:24 Rigno-gũudb n dag n be ween-vɩɩs a naasã: yaang la taoore, ne goabg la rɩtgo." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bãmb ba-biis nins sẽn dag n be b tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã ra tog n wata wakat-wakat n sõngd-b rasem a yopoe. 
1Chronicles9:26 Rigno-gũudbã nanambs a naasã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã n dag n be beenẽ wakat fãa. Bãmb n dag n get Wẽnd doogã ro-pʋsã la laogã bĩngr yelle. 
1Chronicles9:27 Yʋngo, bãmb gũbgda Wẽnd doogã tɩ bala, bãmb n dag n gũud-a. Bãmb n dag n pakd Wẽnd doogã rignoy yibeoog fãa." 
1Chronicles9:28 Rigno-gũudbã sʋka, kẽer dag n geta tʋʋmdã lagd yelle. Bãmb n dag n sõt lagd nins b sẽn kẽesd wall b yiisdẽ wã." 
1Chronicles9:29 A taab me rag n geta zĩ-sõngã lagdã fãa, ne zomã, la reezẽ rãamã ne kaamã, la wisdã ne parfẽ-rãmbã yelle." 
1Chronicles9:30 Yaa maan-kʋʋdbã kom-dibli n dag n maand parfẽ-rãmbã. 
1Chronicles9:31 Leevi buudã ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Matitiya, n yaa Koore buudã ned a Salum bi-kãsengã, n dag n tog n kɩɩmd bur-maasã wakat fãa." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bãmb ba-biis kẽer sẽn be a Kehat yagensã sʋkã n dag n maand maandã burã vʋʋsg daar fãa. 
1Chronicles9:33 Dẽ, Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb nins sẽn yaa yɩɩn-yɩɩndb n be rotã pʋsẽ wã la woto. B rag n ka kõ bãmb tʋʋm a taabã tɩ bala, b rag n tʋmda wĩntoog la yʋngo." 
1Chronicles9:34 Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb sẽn yaa nanambs la woto, wa sẽn zems b roto. Bãmb dag n bee Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles9:35 A Yeyiyɛll sẽn yaa Gabawõ ba wã rag n bee Gabawõ, la a pagã yʋʋr boondame t'a Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Yẽnda bi-kãsengã yʋʋr yaa a Abdõ, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa Sʋʋre, a Kɩse, a Baalle, a Neere, a Nadaabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 a Gedoore, a Akiyo, la a Zakari, ne a Miklote." 
1Chronicles9:38 A Miklot roga a Simeyam. Bãmb me rag n bee ne b ba-biisã Zeruzalɛm. 
1Chronicles9:39 A Neer doga a Kɩɩse, t'a Kɩɩs rog a Sayulli, t'a Sayull rog a Zonatã, ne a Malki-Suwa, la a Abinadaab ne a Ɛs-Baalle." 
1Chronicles9:40 A Zonatã roga a Meriib-Baalle, t'a Meriib-Baal dog a Miise." 
1Chronicles9:41 A Miise kom-dibli yaa a Pitõ, a Melɛke, la a Tareya." 
1Chronicles9:42 A Akaaz roga a Yaara, t'a Yaara rog a Alemet ne a Azmavɛt la a Zimri. A Zimri roga a Motsa," 
1Chronicles9:43 t'a Motsa roga a Bineya, t'a Bineya rog a Refaya, t'a Refaya rog a Eleyasa, t'a Eleyasa rog a Atsɛlle." 
1Chronicles9:44 A Atsɛll paama kom-dibli a yoobe. B yʋyã la woto: Yaa a Aazrikam, a Bokru, a Ismayɛlle, a Sehariya, a Abdyaase, n paas a Hanan. Bãmb n yaa a Atsɛll kom-dibli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filistẽ-dãmbã yika zabr ne Israyɛll nebã Gilboa tãngã zugu, la yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne Israyɛll nebã tɩ b zoe sẽn na yɩl n põs Filistẽ-dãmbã. Israyɛll neb wʋsg kii tãngã zugu." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filistẽ-dãmbã kolg n dɩdga a Sayull ne a kom-dibli wã, n kʋ a Zonatã ne a Abinadaab la a Malki-Suwa sẽn yaa a Sayull kom-dibli wã." 
1Chronicles10:3 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, zabrã wa n lebga a Sayull bal la b baooda. Tãb-tãoodbã yãnd-a lame, la rabeem yõk-a lame t'a rigda." 
1Chronicles10:4 La a Sayull yeela bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã yaa: «Wõog f sʋʋgã n kõs-m n kʋ, tɩ nin-bãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã ra wa yaal-m n yaool n kʋ-m ye.» La bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a yẽnda zab-teedã ka sak ye. Bala, rabeem dag n tar-a lame. Dẽ, a Sayull dɩka a sʋʋgã n tilg n bas a meng n lʋɩ a zugu." 
1Chronicles10:5 Bi-bɩɩg ning sẽn dag n zãad-a a Sayull zab-teedã sẽn yã t'a Sayull kiime, yẽnda me rɩka a sʋʋgã n tilg n bas a meng n lʋɩ a zug n ki." 
1Chronicles10:6 Yɩɩ woto la a Sayull ne a kom-dibli a tãabã la yirã fãa naag taab n ki. 
1Chronicles10:7 Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be tãn-longẽ wã yãame tɩ Israyɛll nebã zoeeme. Bãmb me zoe n basa b tẽmsã, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã wa zĩnd be." 
1Chronicles10:8 Vẽkembeoogo, Filistẽ-dãmbã wa n wʋka sẽn ki-bã teedo, la bãmb yãnda a Sayull ne a kom-dibli wã sẽn ki n dɩg Gilboa tãngã zugu." 
1Chronicles10:9 La bãmb wʋka b teedã, la b fiuug a zugã, la b wʋk a zab-teedã. Dẽ poore, b kɩtame tɩ b saag Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽng n togs b bõn-naandsã ne nebã fãa kiba-noogã." 
1Chronicles10:10 B bĩnga a Sayull zab-teedã b wẽnnaamã roogẽ, la b yagl a zu-wangã a Dagõ roogẽ wã." 
1Chronicles10:11 Yabɛɛs tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã neb sẽn wʋm bũmb nins fãa Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn maan a Sayullã," 
1Chronicles10:12 gãndaadã fãa tɩ rɩka a Sayull ne a kom-dibli wã kũumã, n tall n kẽng Yabɛɛs tẽnga. Bãmb muma b kõabã terebẽnt tɩɩg tẽngr Yabɛɛse, la b loe noor dasem a yopoe." 
1Chronicles10:13 A Sayull kiime, a sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga. Bala, yẽnda kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore, n tol n bao kinkir-bagb sõngre." 
1Chronicles10:14 Yẽnda sẽn ka bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngrã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a ki, la b kɩt t'a Izayi biig a Davɩɩd led a zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles11:1 Israyɛll nebã fãa tigma taab a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ n yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd ne yãmb yaa bũmb a yembre. 
1Chronicles11:2 A Sayull sẽn dag n yaa rĩmã wakate, yaa yãmb n dag n luɩt Israyɛll nebã taoor wakat fãa tɩ b kẽnd n zabdẽ, la y lʋɩt b taoor tɩ b lebg n wa.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yeela yãmb yaa: «Foom n na n yɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã pe-kɩɩma. Foom n na n lebg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naaba.»" 
1Chronicles11:3 Woto, Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã fãa waa rĩm a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ, la a Davɩɩd maana kaool ne bãmb Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor Ebrõ. Bãmb pʋdga a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll rĩmã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Sãmwɛll t'a togsã." 
1Chronicles11:4 A Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll nebã fãa kẽname n na n tɩ kẽ Zeruzalɛm, sẽn dat n togs tɩ Zebuusi. Yaa beenẽ la Zebuus nebã rag n be." 
1Chronicles11:5 Zebuus nebã yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Yãmb ka na n kẽ ka ye!» La a Davɩɩd zab n deega Sɩyõ tẽngã pãng zĩiga, sẽn dat n togs t'a Davɩɩd tẽngã." 
1Chronicles11:6 A Davɩɩd dag n yeelame: «Ned ning sẽn na n yɩ-a pipi n tõog Zebuus nebã, yẽnda soab n na n lebg tãb-biisã naaba.» Dẽ, a Seruya biig a Zoaab n yɩ pipi n yik zabrã, la a lebga tãb-biisã naaba." 
1Chronicles11:7 A Davɩɩd zĩnda tẽngã pãng zĩigẽ. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ b bool tẽn-kãng t'a Davɩɩd tẽnga. 
1Chronicles11:8 Yẽnda meeme n gilg tẽngã, sẽn sɩng ne Milo zĩigã ne zĩis nins sẽn pẽ be wã. A Zoaab n lebs n me tẽngã zĩis a taabã." 
1Chronicles11:9 A Davɩɩd dag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ, la Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã rag n bee ne yẽnda." 
1Chronicles11:10 Ad a Davɩɩd gãndaadã nanambse. Bãmb dag n naaga Israyɛll nebã fãa n sõng yẽnda a naamã baoob wakat t'a lebg rĩmã, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom Israyɛll wɛɛngẽ wã." 
1Chronicles11:11 A Davɩɩd gãndaadã la woto: Yaa a Hakmoni biig a Yasobeyam sẽn yaa gũudbã naabã. Yaa a Yasobeyam n dag n dɩk a kãnd n kʋ neb kobs-tã wakat a yembrã. 
1Chronicles11:12 Sẽn pʋgd yaa Akoka tẽng rao a Dodo biig a Eleyazaar sẽn yaa gãndaad a tãabã sʋk ned a yembrã. 
1Chronicles11:13 Yẽnda n dag n be ne a Davɩɩd Pas-Damim sẽn yaa zĩig ning Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn tigim taab zabrã yĩngã. Oorz pʋʋg n dag n be zĩ-kãngã. Israyɛll nebã rag n zoetame n na n põs Filistẽ-dãmbã. 
1Chronicles11:14 A Eleyazaar ne a nebã yalsa pʋʋgã tẽn-sʋk n zab n deeg-a, la b tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bãmb paam tõog-kãsenga." 
1Chronicles11:15 Nanambs pis-tã wã sʋk neb a tãab kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ pĩisã sẽn be Adulam tãngã bokẽ wã sʋka, la rẽ tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n tilga b tãb-sikã Refayim tãn-longẽ wã." 
1Chronicles11:16 Wakat-kãng t'a Davɩɩd bee tãmsã pẽgsẽ. Filistẽ-dãmbã rag n tara b tãb-biis zĩig Betlehɛm. 
1Chronicles11:17 Ko-yũud wa n yõka a Davɩɩd t'a yeele: Ãnda n na n kẽng ko-baoor ning sẽn be Betlehɛm tẽngã noorã n tɩ yõng koom n wa kõ-m tɩ m yũ? 
1Chronicles11:18 Dẽ, nanambs a tãabã pɩʋʋga Filistẽ-dãmbã tãb-sikã n tɩ yõng koom ko-baoor ning sẽn be Betlehɛm tẽngã noorã, n wa kõ a Davɩɩde. La a Davɩɩd ka sak n yũ koomã ye. A rɩk-a lame n daag tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Chronicles11:19 A Davɩɩd yeelame: Abada! Bɩ mam Wẽnnaamã ra sak tɩ mam maan bũmb a woto ye! Nin-kãensã gẽnega b yõor n tɩ yõng koomã n wa kõ maam. Dẽ wã, mam sã n yũ ko-kãngã, a na n yɩɩ wa mam sẽn yũud bãmb zɩɩm. Woto, a Davɩɩd ka sak n yũ koomã ye. Neb a tãabã sẽn maan la woto." 
1Chronicles11:20 A Zoaab yao a Abisayi n dag n yaa neb a tãabã taoor soaba. Yaa yẽnda n dag n dɩk a kãnd n kʋ neb kobs-tã daar a yembre, t'a yʋʋrã yi n yɩɩg neb a yiibã." 
1Chronicles11:21 Sull a yiibẽ soabã pʋgẽ, a Abisayi n paam waoogr neb a tãabã sʋka, la yẽnda n yɩ b naaba. La a ka ta neb a tãabã ye." 
1Chronicles11:22 A Zoyiyada biig a Benaya sẽn yaa Kabtseyɛll tẽng raoã rag n yaa nin-kãsenga. Yẽnda maana bõn-kãsems wʋsgo. Yẽnda n dag n kʋ Moaab gãndaad a yiibã. Leb n yaa yẽnda n sig tãng bokẽ n kʋ gɩgemd sapɩlem daarã. 
1Chronicles11:23 Yẽnda n leb n kʋ Ezɩpt tẽng rao a yembr woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩg a nu wã. Ezɩpt raoã rag n zãada kãnd sẽn yaa bedr wa koeer-bõanga. Yẽnda sega Ezɩpt raoã ne dasaare, la yẽnda reega raoã kãnde, n wẽneg n kʋ-a." 
1Chronicles11:24 Dẽ, a Zoyiyada biig a Benaya sẽn maanã la woto, la gãndaad a tãabã sʋka, yẽnda yʋʋrã n dag n yi n yɩɩda." 
1Chronicles11:25 Nanambs pis-tã wã sʋka, yẽnda n paam waoogr n yɩɩda. La yẽnda ka ta gãndaad a tãabã ye. Dẽ, a Davɩɩd kɩtame t'a lebg a gũudbã naaba." 
1Chronicles11:26 Gãndaadã yʋy la woto: A Zoaab ba-biig a Azayɛlle, Betlehɛm dao a Dodo biig a Ɛlhana," 
1Chronicles11:27 Haroa tẽng rao a Samote, Pelõ tẽng rao a Elɛtse," 
1Chronicles11:28 Tekoa tẽng rao a Ikɛɛs biig a Ira, Anatot tẽng rao a Abiyezɛɛre," 
1Chronicles11:29 Husa tẽng rao a Sibekayi, Akoka tẽng rao a Ilayi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Netofa tẽng rao a Maharayi, Netofa rao a Baana biig a Helɛɛde," 
1Chronicles11:31 Gibeya sẽn yaa Benzame nebã tẽng rao a Ribayi biig a Itayi, Piratõ tẽng rao a Benaya," 
1Chronicles11:32 Gaas tẽng ko-soodẽ dao a Urayi, Tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ dao a Abɩyɛlle," 
1Chronicles11:33 Baharum dao a Azmavɛte, Salbon rao a Eliyaaba," 
1Chronicles11:34 Giizõ rao a Bene-Asɛm, Haraar dao a Sage biig a Zonatã," 
1Chronicles11:35 Haraar dao a Sakaar biig a Ahiyam, a Uur biig a Elifalle," 
1Chronicles11:36 Mekera rao a Efɛɛre, Pelõ rao a Ahiya," 
1Chronicles11:37 Karmell tẽng rao a Ɛtsron, Ɛɛzbayi biig a Naarayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 A Natã ba-biig a Zowɛlle, a Hagri biig a Mibhaare," 
1Chronicles11:39 Amo rao a Selɛke, Beerot dao a Narayi sẽn dag n zãad a Seruya biig a Zoaab zab-teedã." 
1Chronicles11:40 A Yetɛɛr buudã ned a Ira, a Yetɛɛr buudã ned a Garɛɛbe," 
1Chronicles11:41 a Hɛt buudã ned a Uuri, a Alayi biig a Zabaade," 
1Chronicles11:42 a Rubɛn buudã naabã, la tãb-biis pis-tã wã naab a Siiza biig a Adina," 
1Chronicles11:43 a Maaka biig a Hanan, Mitni buudã ned a Zozafate," 
1Chronicles11:44 Astarot tẽng rao a Uziya, Arowɛɛr dao a Otam kom-dibli a Sama ne a Yeyiyɛlle," 
1Chronicles11:45 A Simri biig a Yediyayɛlle, ne a ba-biig a Yoha sẽn yaa Tids tẽng rao nedã," 
1Chronicles11:46 Mahava tẽng rao a Eliyɛlle, a Ɛlnaam kom-dibli a Yeribayi ne a Yosaviya, Moaab tẽng rao a Yitma," 
1Chronicles11:47 N paas a Eliyɛll ne a Obɛɛd la a Yaasiyɛll-Metsobaya. 
1Chronicles12:1 Ad neb nins sẽn kẽng a Davɩɩd nengẽ Siklaage, wakat ning yẽnda sẽn zoet n na n põs a Kiis biig a Sayullã. Nin-bãmb rag n yaa gãndaad nins sẽn sõng a Davɩɩd zabrã wakatã sʋk neb kẽere." 
1Chronicles12:2 Bãmb dag n yaa tãb-tãoodba, la b tõe n loba kug ne b goabgã la rɩtgã ne loaabga, la b tõe n tãoo pɛɛm ne b tãbdã: nin-bãmb yaa Benzame buudã neb n be a Sayull ba-biisã sʋka." 
1Chronicles12:3 B naabã yaa a Ayiyezɛɛre, sẽn pʋgd yaa Gibeya tẽng rao a Sema biig a Zoaase, a Azmavɛt kom-dibli a Yeyiyɛll ne a Yahaziyɛlle, a Beraka, Anatot rao a Zehu," 
1Chronicles12:4 Gabawõ rao a Yismaya sẽn yaa gãndaoog neb pis-tã wã sʋk la b taoor soabã," 
1Chronicles12:5 a Zeremi, a Yahaziyɛlle, a Yohanan, la Gedeera rao a Yozabaade," 
1Chronicles12:6 a Eluzayi, a Yerimote, a Beyaliya, a Semariya, Aruf rao a Sefatiya," 
1Chronicles12:7 Koore buudã neb a Ɛlkana, a Yisiya, a Azareyɛlle, a Yoyezɛɛre, n paas a Yasobeyam," 
1Chronicles12:8 la Gedoor dao a Yeroham kom-dibli a Yoeela ne a Zebadiya. 
1Chronicles12:9 Gãndaad n yi Gaad buudã sʋk n kẽng a Davɩɩd nengẽ we-raoogã pẽgsẽ. Yaa tãb-biis sẽn zãms zabre, n tar gãnd la kãna. Bãmb dag n yaa nin-toos wa gɩgma, la b tõe n zoee wa yãgs sẽn be tãmsã zutu." 
1Chronicles12:10 B naabã yʋʋr la a Ezɛɛre, yiibẽ soab yaa a Abdyaase, tãabẽ soab yaa a Eliyaabe," 
1Chronicles12:11 naasẽ soab yaa a Mismana, nu soab yaa a Zeremi," 
1Chronicles12:12 yoobẽ soab yaa a Atayi, yopoe soab a yaa a Eliyɛlle," 
1Chronicles12:13 nii soab yaa a Yohanan, wɛ soab yaa a Ɛlzabaade," 
1Chronicles12:14 piig soab yaa a Zeremi, tɩ piig la a ye soab yaa a Makbanayi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Bãmb dag n yaa a Gaad yagense, n yaa tãb-biis nanambse. B yao-zʋʋgã a yembr bal pãngã taa tãb-biis koabg pãnga, tɩ kãsmã pãng ta tãb-biis tusr nanambse." 
1Chronicles12:16 Yaa bãmb n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã pipi kiuugã, wakat ning kʋɩlgã sẽn dag n pid n puugdẽ wã, n kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n be tãn-londẽ wã fãa zoe n kẽng yaang la nin-taoorã." 
1Chronicles12:17 Benzame buudã ne Zʋʋda buudã neb me kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ tãmsã pẽgsẽ. 
1Chronicles12:18 La a Davɩɩd yi n sega bãmb n yeel-b yaa: Yãmb sã n wata mam nengẽ ne bãan n na n sõng maam, mam deegda yãmb ne sũ-noogo. La sã n yaa sẽn na n belg maam n sõng m bɛɛbã tɩ m yaool n ka beege, bɩ tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam ges n kao bʋʋdã!" 
1Chronicles12:19 Wakat-kãnga, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã pida a Amasayi sẽn yaa tãb-biis pis-tã naabã t'a zẽk a koɛɛg n yeele: A Izayi biig a Davɩɩde, Bɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd ne foom, Bɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd ned ning sẽn fãagd-a foomã zugu! Bala, fo Wẽnnaamã fãaga foom! Dẽ, a Davɩɩd deega bãmb n kɩt tɩ b lebg a tãb-biisã nanambse." 
1Chronicles12:20 Wakat ning a Davɩɩd sẽn wa n na n zab ne a Sayull la ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, Manaase neb n wa n sõng a Davɩɩd nebã. La a Davɩɩd ne a nebã ka tõog n sõng Filistẽ-dãmbã ye. Bala, Filistẽ-dãmbã nanambs zemsa taab n dig bãmb n yeele: A Davɩɩd dat n belga tõnd n yõk n kõ a soaal a Sayulli." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ad neb nins sẽn tũ a Davɩɩd n leb Siklaagã: yaa a Adna, a Yozabaade, a Yediyayɛlle, a Misɛlle, a Yozabaade, a Eliyu, n paas a Siltayi. Bãmb yaa a Manaase buudã tãb-biis nanambse." 
1Chronicles12:22 Bãmb sõnga a Davɩɩd tãb-biisã, bala, b rag n yaa gãndaado, la b lebga tãb-biisã nanambse." 
1Chronicles12:23 Daar fãa, neb n dag n wat n sõngd a Davɩɩd tãb-biisã, hal tɩ tãb-biisã sõor wa lebg wʋsg wa Wẽnnaam tãb-biisi." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ad neb nins sẽn dag n bob zab-teedã sõore. Bãmb wa a Davɩɩd nengẽ Ebrõ, n na n kɩt t'a led a Sayull zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã." 
1Chronicles12:25 A Zuʋda yagensã sẽn dag n zãad gãn-bedrã ne kãndã sõor yaa tãb-biis tus a yoob la kobs-nii. 
1Chronicles12:26 A Sɩmyõ yagensã, sẽn dag n yaa gãndaadã sõor yaa neb tus a yopoe la koabga." 
1Chronicles12:27 A Leevi yagensã sõor yaa neb tus a naas la kobs-yoobe. 
1Chronicles12:28 A Zoyiyaada sẽn yaa a Aarõ buudã naabã rag n tara neb tus a tã la kobs-yopoe. 
1Chronicles12:29 Gãnda-poll a Sadok ne a buudã sõor yaa nanambs pisi la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles12:30 A Benzame yagensã sẽn yaa a Sayull ba-biisã sõor yaa neb tus a tãabo. Bala, bãmb sʋkã neb wʋsg n dag n get a Sayull zakã tʋʋm yelle." 
1Chronicles12:31 A Efrayiim yagensã sẽn yaa gãndaadã sõor yaa neb tus pisi la kobs-nii. Bãmb dag n yaa b buudã nin-kãsemse. 
1Chronicles12:32 A Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk pʋgẽ, yaa neb tus piig la a nii. Bãmb dag n yaa b buudã nin-kãsems b sẽn yãk tɩ b wa pʋdg a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam." 
1Chronicles12:33 A Yisakaar yagens nins sẽn dag n mi wakatã, la b mi Israyɛll sẽn dag n tog n maan bũmb ningã sʋka, yaa tãb-biis nanambs kobessi, ne b ba-biisã b sẽn dag n so wã." 
1Chronicles12:34 A Zabulõ yagensã sʋka, yaa raop tus pis-nu n dag n tõe n bob zab-teed n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles12:35 A Neftali yagensã sʋka, yaa tãb-biis nanambs tusri, n paas raop tus pis-tã la a yopoe sẽn dag n be ne bãmb n zãad gãn-bedrã ne kãndã." 
1Chronicles12:36 A Dan yagensã sʋka, yaa neb tus pisi la a nii la kobs-yoob sẽn tõe n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles12:37 A Asɛɛr yagensã sʋka, yaa raop tus pis-naas sẽn tõe n bob zab-teed n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles12:38 Buud nins sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, ne a Rubɛn la a Gaad ne a Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã sʋka, yaa raop tus koabg la pisi sẽn tõe n bob zab-teed buud fãa, n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles12:39 Nin-bãmbã fãa sẽn tõe n bob zab-teed n kẽng zabr zĩigẽ wã waa Ebrõ ne yam a yembre, n na n pʋdg a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll soolmã fãa rĩmã. La yɩɩ ne yam a yembr la Israyɛll neb a taabã fãa pʋdg a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles12:40 Bãmb zĩnda Ebrõ ne a Davɩɩd rasem a tãabo, n dɩtẽ la b yũuda, bala b ba-biisã rag n segla rɩɩb bãmb yĩnga." 
1Chronicles12:41 La baa neb nins sẽn dag n pẽ ne bãmb n be Isakaar ne Zabulõ la Neftali wã, rag n zɩlgda rɩɩb ne bõens la yʋgma, la ne bõn-wees ne niigi, n wat n kõt bãmba: rag n yaa rɩɩbo, zom, bur-maasa, kankam-koeem-gila, reezẽ-koeem-gila, reezẽ rãam, kaam, rũm-bɛd la rũm-bãooneg wʋsgo, bala, Israyɛll tẽngã gill rag n maanda sũ-noogo." 
1Chronicles13:1 A Davɩɩd tigma tãb-biis tusr-tusr ne tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã, ne kãsem-dãmbã fãa." 
1Chronicles13:2 La a Davɩɩd yeela Israyɛll nebã fãa yaa: «Sã n nooma yãmba, la sã n taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yam, bɩ d tʋm neb tɩ b tɩ bool tõnd ba-biis a taabã sẽn ket Israyɛll ween-vɩɩs a naasã pʋgẽ, n paas maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã sẽn be bãmb tẽn-kɩremsã, tɩ b wa naag tõnd n tigme." 
1Chronicles13:3 Woto, tõnd na n talla d Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã n kuil d tẽngẽ, bala a Sayull wakatẽ wã, tõnd dag n ka ges a yell neer ye.»" 
1Chronicles13:4 Yam-yãkrã taa Israyɛll nebã fãa yam, la b sakame tɩ b na n maan a woto." 
1Chronicles13:5 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne Sihoor sẽn be Ezɩptã, n tãag Hamat tẽngã noore, n na n kɩt tɩ b kẽng Kiryat-Yeyarim n tɩ tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n wa." 
1Chronicles13:6 A Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll nebã fãa kẽnga Baala sẽn be Kiryat-Yeyarim, Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, n na n tɩ tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã sẽn be serubẽ-rãmbã zut tɩ b boond Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã a zugã, n wa." 
1Chronicles13:7 Dẽ, bãmb dɩka Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã sẽn dag n be a Abinadaab zakẽ wã, n dogl terok-paall zugu. La a Uuza ne a Akiyo n dag n kẽnd n yegd terokã la b get a yelle." 
1Chronicles13:8 Wakat-kãng t'a Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll nebã fãa rag n wɩsga b meng n wẽed pends ne kʋla, sɩlsãgse, kɛma, la ne tãntãado, la b yɩɩnd Wẽnnaam taoore." 
1Chronicles13:9 La bãmb sẽn ta Kidon zɛɛgẽ wã, niigã salgame tɩ koglgã rag n na n lʋɩ, la a Uuza tẽega a nug n na n gãd-a." 
1Chronicles13:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga ne a Uuza, a sẽn tẽeg a nug n na n gãd koglgã yĩnga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a ki zĩig pʋgẽ Wẽnnaam taoore." 
1Chronicles13:11 A Davɩɩd sũur sãamame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt t'a Uuza ki wã yĩnga. Yaa rẽ n so tɩ b boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Perɛɛz-Uuza, sẽn dat n togs t'a Uuza kũum zĩiga, hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
1Chronicles13:12 Badaare, a Davɩɩd zoee Wẽnnaam dabeem, la a yeelame: «Mam na n yɩ a wãn n tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n kẽng m zakẽ wã?»" 
1Chronicles13:13 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd ka tall koglgã n kẽng a zakẽ wã, a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ wã ye. A kɩtame tɩ b tall-a n kẽng Gat rao a Obɛɛd-Edom yirã." 
1Chronicles13:14 Koglgã pa a Obɛɛd-Edom zakẽ wã kiuug a tãabo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Obɛɛd-Edom zakã ne bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n so wã barka." 
1Chronicles14:1 Tɩɩr dĩm a Hiram tʋma neb a Davɩɩd nengẽ ne sɛɛdr daado, la a kɩt tɩ tãn-metb ne ra-wãadb kẽng n tɩ me zak n kõ a Davɩɩde." 
1Chronicles14:2 Woto, a Davɩɩd bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk yẽnda n kɩt t'a lebg Israyɛll dĩma, la a rĩungã rag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ, Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã maasem yĩnga." 
1Chronicles14:3 A Davɩɩd dɩka pagb a taab Zeruzalɛm, la b roga kom-dibli ne kom-pugli a taab n kõ-a." 
1Chronicles14:4 Kamb nins a Davɩɩd sẽn dog Zeruzalɛmã yʋy la woto: yaa a Simeya ne a Sobaabe, la a Natã ne a Salmo," 
1Chronicles14:5 A Yibaare, a Elisuwa, a Ɛlpelɛte," 
1Chronicles14:6 a Noga, a Nefɛɛge, a Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 a Elisama, a Beeliyada, ne a Elifelɛte." 
1Chronicles14:8 Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn wʋm tɩ b pʋdga a Davɩɩd zug rĩung kaam t'a lebg Israyɛll soolmã fãa rĩmã, bãmb fãa kẽngame n tɩ baood-a n na n yõke. La a Davɩɩd bãngame n na n yi n seg bãmba." 
1Chronicles14:9 Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽng n tɩ sũu tãp Refayim longẽ wã. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd soka Wẽnnaam yaa: «Mam tog n kẽngame n tɩ zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã bɩ? Yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ mam tõog Filistẽ nebã bɩ?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka yẽnda yaa: «Kẽng tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog-ba.»" 
1Chronicles14:11 Dẽ, Filistẽ-dãmbã kẽng n tɩ zaba ne a Davɩɩd nebã Baall-Peratsim, la a Davɩɩd tõoga bãmba. A Davɩɩd yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana sor tɩ mam wẽdg m bɛɛbã n looge, wa koom sẽn kaoog bɛoongo. Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ b boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Baall-Peratsim, sẽn dat n togs tɩ bɛoongã soaba." 
1Chronicles14:12 La Filistẽ-dãmbã zoeeme n bas b wẽn-naandsã beenẽ. La a Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b wʋk wẽn-naandsã n yõog bugum. 
1Chronicles14:13 Dẽ poore, Filistẽ-dãmbã leb n kẽng n tɩ sũu tãp longẽ wã." 
1Chronicles14:14 La a Davɩɩd leb n soka Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam yeela yẽnda yaa: «Ra kẽng n tɩ seg-b ye. Gilg b poorẽ wã, n tɩ paam-b tɩɩsã neng taoore.»" 
1Chronicles14:15 Fo sã n wa wʋm bʋrg sẽn yit tɩɩsã zut sẽn wẽnd neb sẽn kẽnd rãamde, bɩ f sɩng zabrã tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n lʋɩt fo taoor n na n sõng foom n zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã." 
1Chronicles14:16 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd maana wa Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. Yẽnda zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, sẽn sɩng ne Gabawõ hal n tãag Gezɛɛre." 
1Chronicles14:17 A Davɩɩd yʋʋrã yii tẽmsã fãa pʋgẽ. La Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ buudã fãa zoe bãmb dabeem. 
1Chronicles15:1 A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b me rot a mengã yĩnga, a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b maneg zĩig n ti fu-roog Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles15:2 La a yeelame: «Yaa Leevi nebã bal n tog n tʋkd Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã, bala, yaa bãmb la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãk yã, tɩ b na n tʋkd Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã la b get a yell wakat fãa.»" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa Zeruzalɛm, n na n kɩt tɩ b rɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n kẽng zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn dag n segl a yĩngã." 
1Chronicles15:4 A Davɩɩd tigma a Aarõ kom-dibli wã ne Leevi nebã. 
1Chronicles15:5 A Kehat kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Uriyɛll la a saam-biisã yaa neb koabg la pisi. 
1Chronicles15:6 A Azaya kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Meraari la a saam-biisã yaa neb kobessi la pisi. 
1Chronicles15:7 A Gersom kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Zowɛll la a saam-biisã yaa neb koabg la pis-tã. 
1Chronicles15:8 A Elitsafã kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Semaya la a ba-biisã sõor yaa neb kobessi. 
1Chronicles15:9 A Ebrõ kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Eliyɛll la a ba-biisã sõor yaa neb pis-nii. 
1Chronicles15:10 A Uziyɛll kom-dibli wã ne b naab a Aminadaab la a ba-biisã sõor yaa neb koabg la piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles15:11 A Davɩɩd boola maan-kʋʋdb a Sadok ne a Abiyataare, n paas Leevi buudã neb a Uriyɛlle, a Aazaya, a Zowɛlle, a Semaya, a Eliyɛlle, ne a Aminadaabe," 
1Chronicles15:12 n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nanambsã, bɩ y yɩlg y mense, la y rɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã, n tall n kẽng zĩig ning mam sẽn segl a yĩngã." 
1Chronicles15:13 Yãmb sẽn dag n ka zĩnd kaanẽ pĩndã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sãama neb wʋsg tõnd sʋkã, tõnd sẽn ka rɩk kaoolã koglgã wa sẽn zems tõogã yĩnga.»" 
1Chronicles15:14 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã yɩlga b mense, n na n tɩ rɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã." 
1Chronicles15:15 Leevi nebã palga Wẽnnaamã kaoolã koglgã b bãgdẽ ne ra-tuiidsi, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg a Moyiis t'a yeelã." 
1Chronicles15:16 A Davɩɩd yeela Leevi buudã nanambsã, tɩ b kɩt tɩ b saam-biisã sẽn yaa yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã wa ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn yaa kʋla, pendse, la kɛma, n yɩɩl n kaas ne sũ-noogo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Dẽ, Leevi nebã yãka a Zowɛll biig a Eman, ne a saam-biig a Azaf sẽn yaa a Meraari kom-dibli wã sʋk ned a yembrã, la a Kusaya biig a Etan sẽn yaa a Meraari kom-dibli wã sʋk ned a yembre." 
1Chronicles15:18 Bãmb saam-biis nins sẽn yaa sull a yiibẽ soab n dag n sõngd bãmbã yaa a Zakari, a Bɛn, a Yahaziyɛlle, a Semiramote, a Yekiyɛlle, a Uni, a Eliyaabe, a Benaya, a Maseya, a Matitiya, a Eliflewu, a Mikneya, a Obɛɛd-Edom, n paas a Yeyiyɛlle. Nin-bãmb n dag n yaa rigno-gũudbã." 
1Chronicles15:19 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndb a Eman ne a Azaf la a Etan dag n wẽeda zũud kɛma. 
1Chronicles15:20 A Zakari, a Aziyɛlle, a Semiramote, a Yekiyɛlle, a Uni, a Eliyaabe, la a Maaseya ne a Benaya rag n wẽeda kʋl sẽn tar bi-yãanse." 
1Chronicles15:21 A Matitiya ne a Eliflewu la a Mikneya ne a Obɛɛd-Edom la a Yeyiyɛll ne a Azaziya rag n wẽeda pends sẽn tar bi-raase. 
1Chronicles15:22 Leevi buudã ned a Kenaniya n dag n yaa koglgã tʋkdb taoor soaba. Bala, a rag n mi a tʋʋmde." 
1Chronicles15:23 A Berekɩya ne a Ɛlkana n dag n gũud koglgã. 
1Chronicles15:24 Maan-kʋʋdb a Sebaniya, a Zozafate, a Netaneyɛlle, a Amasayi, a Zakari, la a Benaya ne Eliyezɛɛre, n dag n peebd tãntãadã Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã taoore. A Obɛɛd-Edom ne a Yehiya n dag n gũud kaoolã koglgã." 
1Chronicles15:25 Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã la tãb-biis nanambsã rɩka sor n na n kẽng a Obɛɛd-Edom zakẽ wã, n tɩ rɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã ne sũ-noogo." 
1Chronicles15:26 Wẽnnaam sõnga Leevi nebã tɩ b tɩ rɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã n tall n wa. Dẽ, bãmb kʋʋ lols a yopoe ne pe-ribli a yopoe n maan maoongo." 
1Chronicles15:27 A Davɩɩd dag n yera fuug sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-bãanega. La Leevi buudã neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tʋkd koglgã, ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, la a Kenaniya sẽn yaa koglgã tʋkdb taoor soabã, nin-bãmb fãa me rag n yera fut sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-bãanega. La a Davɩɩd dag n yeelga maan-kʋʋr fuug sẽn wʋg ne gĩs-bãaneg n paase." 
1Chronicles15:28 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa rɩka Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã la b yɩɩnd n kaasdẽ, la b wẽed nug-poaka, n peebd tãntãado, la b wẽed kɛma, ne kʋl la pendse." 
1Chronicles15:29 Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã sẽn wa n kẽed a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgã, a Sayull bi-pugl a Mikall lɩka roog võorẽ n yãnd a Davɩɩd sẽn saood la a kɩdemdẽ. La yẽnda paooga a Davɩɩd a sũurẽ." 
1Chronicles16:1 B sẽn tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã n wa wã zugẽ, b ning-a-la fu-roog ning a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n segl a yĩnga pʋgẽ, la b maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maand Wẽnnaam taoore." 
1Chronicles16:2 A Davɩɩd sẽn maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne zems-n-taar maoongã n sɛ, a ninga nebã zug bark ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre." 
1Chronicles16:3 Dẽ zugẽ, a pʋɩɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa rɩɩbo. Pag ne rao fãa paama bur-gilg a yembre, tamaaro-gilg a yembre, la reezẽ-koeem-gilg a yembre." 
1Chronicles16:4 A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ Leevi neb kẽer yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã taoore, n yɩɩl n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. Nin-bãmb la woto:" 
1Chronicles16:5 B taoor soabã yaa a Azafe, yiibẽ soab yaa a Zakari, sẽn pʋgd yaa a Yeyiyɛlle, a Semiramote, a Yekiyɛlle, a Matitiya, a Eliyaabe, a Benaya, n paas a Yeyiyɛlle. B rag n wẽeda kʋla, ne pendse. A Azaf rag n wẽeda kɛma." 
1Chronicles16:6 Maan-kʋʋdb a Benaya ne a Yakaziyɛll rag n peebda tãntãad Wẽnnaam kaoolã koglgã taoor wakat fãa. 
1Chronicles16:7 Yaa badaar la a Davɩɩd kɩt t'a Azaf ne a ba-biisã lebg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩn-yɩɩndba. B yɩɩllã la woto. 
1Chronicles16:8 Bɩ y waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y zẽk bãmb yʋʋrã! Kɩt-y tɩ nebã bãng bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Yɩɩl-y bãmb yĩnga, pʋd-y yɩɩl bãmb yĩnga! Tags-y bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã fãa yelle!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Maan-y sũ-noog bãmb yʋ-sõngã yĩnga! Bɩ sẽn baood-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã maan sũ-noogo! 
1Chronicles16:11 Bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bao-y bãmb pãngã, bao-y bãmb wakat fãa!" 
1Chronicles16:12 Yãmb sẽn yaa b tʋmtʋmd a Israyɛll yagensã, yãmb sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagense, n yaa bãmb nin-tũusdsã! Tẽeg-y bõn-yɛɛsds nins bãmb sẽn maanã yelle, tẽeg-y bõn-kãsemsã ne b bʋ-kaoorã yelle!" 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam. Bãmb yaa dũniyã gill fãa bʋ-kaooda." 
1Chronicles16:15 Tẽeg-y bãmb kaoolã yell wakat fãa, Tẽeg-y b gomd ning b sẽn yeel zamaan tusr yĩngã yelle." 
1Chronicles16:16 Tẽeg-y kaool ning b sẽn maan ne a Abrahaamã yelle, la wẽeneg ning bãmb sẽn wẽen ne a Izakã yelle." 
1Chronicles16:17 Bãmb vigla kaool-kãng tɩ yɩ noor a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga, la kaool Israyɛll nebã yĩng wakat fãa," 
1Chronicles16:18 N yeele: «Mam na n kõo foom Kana tẽngã tɩ yɩ yãmb pʋɩɩre.» 
1Chronicles16:19 Yãmb sõorã rag n ka waoog ye, y rag n yaa neb bilf bala. Yãmb dag n yaa sãamb beenẽ." 
1Chronicles16:20 Bãmb dag n yita buud a to pʋga, n kẽng buud a to pʋga, la b yit soolem a to n kẽng neb a taab nengẽ." 
1Chronicles16:21 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka bas tɩ ned ba a yembr nams-b ye. Bãmb lenga rĩm-dãmb bãmb yĩnga, n yeele:" 
1Chronicles16:22 «Da saag-y n sɩɩs-y mam nin-tũusdsã ye, la y ra maan mam no-rɛɛsdbã wẽng ye!" 
1Chronicles16:23 Bɩ dũniyã gill nebã yɩɩl Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! Moon-y bãmb fãagr koe-noogã daar fãa! 
1Chronicles16:24 Togs-y bãmb ziirã bu-zẽmsã sʋka! Togs-y bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã nebã fãa sʋka! 
1Chronicles16:25 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, la b zemsa ne pẽgr buud fãa, bãmb seka zoees n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
1Chronicles16:26 Bala, buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa yaa zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naan saasã." 
1Chronicles16:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengã tara ziir n pɩnda. Bãmb sẽn beẽ wã pida ne pãng la sũ-noogo. 
1Chronicles16:28 Buud toay-toayã roto, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Kõ-y bãmb waoogre, wilg-y b pãngã!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Kõ-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã waoogre! Tall-y kũun n wa bãmb taoore. Wõgemd-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, b sõmblmã sẽn wat n pukdẽ wã." 
1Chronicles16:30 Bɩ dũniyã neb fãa rig bãmb taoor ne rabeem! Bãmb naana dũniyã t'a yas kãenkãe n ka vigsdẽ ye. 
1Chronicles16:31 Bɩ saasẽ maan sũ-noogo, la bɩ dũniyã kɩdme! Bɩ b moon n yeel buudã fãa, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa rĩmã!" 
1Chronicles16:32 Bɩ ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã maan dãamde! Bɩ weoogã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã kɩdme! 
1Chronicles16:33 Bɩ weoogã tɩɩs kaas ne sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bala, bãmb watame! Bãmb wat n na n kaoo dũniyã bʋʋdo.»" 
1Chronicles16:34 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b yaa sõngo. Bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Bɩ y yeele: Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagda, bɩ y fãag-do, tigm-y tõnd n fãag-d bu-zẽmsã nugẽ, tɩ d tõe n balem yãmb yʋ-sõngã, la tɩ tõnd zu-zẽkrã yɩ yãmb waoogr yĩnga!" 
1Chronicles16:36 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgr zamaan woo zamaane! Dẽ, nebã fãa yeelame: «Ãmina!» La bãmb pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Chronicles16:37 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã ne a Azaf la a ba-biisã, tɩ b tõe n maan b tʋʋmd koglgã taoor wakat fãa, wa sẽn zems daar fãa tõogã." 
1Chronicles16:38 A yãka a Yedutun biig a Obɛɛd-Edom, ne a Ooza, n paas b saam-biis pis-yoob la a nii wã, tɩ b yɩ rigno-gũudba." 
1Chronicles16:39 La a basa maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne maan-kʋʋdb a taabã sẽn yaa yẽnda saam-biisã Gabawõ zĩ-sõngẽ wã," 
1Chronicles16:40 tɩ wakat fãa bɩ b maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã beenẽ yibeoog la zaabr Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b maand bũmb nins fãa sẽn gʋls tõog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vigl Israyɛll nebã yĩngã." 
1Chronicles16:41 Neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ ne bãmb yaa a Eman ne a Yedutun, n paas neb a taabã b sẽn dag n yãk tɩ b yɩɩl n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b nonglmã sẽn paad wakat fãa wã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles16:42 A Eman ne a Yedutun dag n peebda bardo, la b wẽed kɛma, n paas Wẽnnaam yʋʋr waoogr yʋʋm-teed a taabã. A Yedutun kom-dibli wã la b rag n yãk tɩ b yaa rignoorã gũudba." 
1Chronicles16:43 Dẽ poore, ned fãa kuila a yiri, la a Davɩɩd me lebg n kuila a yir n na n tɩ ning a yirã rãmb barka." 
1Chronicles17:1 Wakat ning rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn kẽ a na-yirã, a yeela Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã yaa: «Ade, mam sẽn be roog ning pʋgã maana ne sɛɛdr daado, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã yaool n be fu-roog tẽngre.»" 
1Chronicles17:2 La a Natã yeel a Davɩɩd yaa: «Bũmb nins fãa sẽn be fo tagsgẽ bɩ f maane, tɩ Wẽnnaam bee ne-fo.»" 
1Chronicles17:3 Badaar yʋng bala, koɛɛg n yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ n yeel a Natã yaa:" 
1Chronicles17:4 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: ‹Ka foom n na n me roog ning mam sẽn na n zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã ye. 
1Chronicles17:5 Sẽn paas me, hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning mam sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ ta rũndã, mam ka tol n zĩnd roog pʋgẽ ye. Yaa fu-rot pʋgẽ bal la m dag n be n kẽnd zĩig fãa." 
1Chronicles17:6 Rẽ yĩnga, zĩis nins fãa mam sẽn tũ Israyɛll nebã fãa n kẽngã, mam tol n yeela Israyɛll bʋ-kaoodb nins mam sẽn kõ noor tɩ b ges m nebã yellã ned ba a yembre, tɩ yaa bõe tɩ b ka maand sɛɛdr doog n kõ maam?›" 
1Chronicles17:7 Dẽ wã, yeel m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩde, tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame yaa: ‹Yaa mam meng n yãk foom wakat ning fo sẽn wa n gũud rũmsã, n kɩt tɩ f lebg Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naaba." 
1Chronicles17:8 Zĩig ning fãa fo sẽn kẽngẽ, mam zĩnda ne foom, la m sãam f bɛɛbã fãa fo taoore. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yʋʋrã yi, wa dũniyã nin-kãsems yʋy sẽn yi to-to wã." 
1Chronicles17:9 Mam na n yãka zĩig n kõ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã, n kɩt tɩ b zĩnd ne bãane, tɩ nin-wẽnsã ra leb n nams-b wa pĩndã ye." 
1Chronicles17:10 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning mam sẽn yãk bʋ-kaoodb n kɩt tɩ b soog Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã, mam ninga f bɛɛbã fãa yãnde, la mam yeela foom tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kõ-f roogo." 
1Chronicles17:11 Fo daarã sã n wa n ta a tɛk tɩ f sak f saam-dãmba, mam na n yãka fo yagensã sʋk ned a yembr sẽn yit fo pendẽ wã, n kɩt t'a led fo zĩigẽ n yɩ rĩmã, la m na n kɩtame t'a rĩungã paam pãnga." 
1Chronicles17:12 Yaa yẽnda n na n me roog mam yĩnga, la m na n kɩtame t'a naamã paam pãng wakat fãa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda ba, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ mam biiga. Mam ka na n tol n bas kɩs-sɩd ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne yẽnda wã, wa m sẽn bas kɩs-sɩd ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne rĩm ning sẽn deng-a foomã ye." 
1Chronicles17:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda zĩnd mam doogã ne m soolmã pʋg wakat fãa, la yẽnda rĩungã na n paama pãng wakat fãa.› »" 
1Chronicles17:15 Dẽ, a Natã rɩka gom-kãensã fãa ne vẽneg-kãngã fãa, n tɩ togs a Davɩɩde." 
1Chronicles17:16 Rĩm a Davɩɩd kẽng n tɩ yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n yeele: «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yaa ãnda, la m doogã bee yɛ tɩ y tall maam hal n ta zĩig ning mam sẽn beẽ dũndã wã?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Wẽnnaam, rẽ ket n ka sek ye, tɩ y leb n gomd y sẽn tar saagr ning ne mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã yagens wɛɛngẽ, wakat sẽn wat yĩnga? Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, y get-m-la wa nin-kãsenga!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Mam na n leb n yeela yãmb tɩ bõe yɛsa, ziir ning yãmb sẽn kõt maamã poorẽ? Yaa yãmb n yãk maam." 
1Chronicles17:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maam, yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sẽn ta yãmb yamã yĩng la y sẽn maan bõn-kãsems a woto n na n kɩt tɩ nebã yãndã." 
1Chronicles17:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sã n yaa ne tõnd sẽn wʋmd tɩ b gomdã, ned ka be n zem yãmb ye, la Wẽnnaam a to ka be sã n ka yãmb bala." 
1Chronicles17:21 Dẽ yĩngã, buud bee dũniyã zug wa Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã, tɩ b Wẽnnaamã fãag-b n kɩt tɩ b lebg a neb sɩda? Yãmb maana bõn-kãsems ne bõn-yɛɛsdse, n kɩt tɩ nebã bãng tɩ y yaa kãsenga. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ buud toay-toay zoe neb nins yãmb sẽn yiis Ezɩptã taoore." 
1Chronicles17:22 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã lebg yãmb neb wakat fãa yĩnga, tɩ yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebg bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
1Chronicles17:23 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ gomd ning yãmb sẽn gom mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã ne a yagensã wɛɛngẽ wã paam pidsg wakat fãa. Maan-y wa y sẽn yeelã." 
1Chronicles17:24 Bɩ y pids y gomdã, tɩ y yʋʋrã yi wakat fãa tɩ nebã yeele: ‹Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam!› Bɩ maam a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã roog paam pãng yãmb taoore!" 
1Chronicles17:25 Bala, yãmb meng n wilg maam tɩ y na n kɩtame tɩ m yageng a yembr ledg maam m zaoorẽ wã. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩt tɩ m sũur keemẽ tɩ m yas yãmb taoor n pʋʋsdẽ." 
1Chronicles17:26 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n yaa Wẽnnaam, la yaa yãmb n kãab maam bõn-kãnga." 
1Chronicles17:27 Taa yãmb yam tɩ y na n ning m doogã barka, t'a tõe n kaoos yãmb taoor wakat fãa. Bala yaa yãmb n so barka, la yãmb sã n ning barka, yaa wakat fãa yĩnga!»" 
1Chronicles18:1 Dẽ poore, a Davɩɩd tõoga Filistẽ-dãmbã, n ning-b yãnde, n deeg Gat ne a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa." 
1Chronicles18:2 Yẽnda zab n tõoga Moaab nebã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg a yembse, la a kɩt tɩ b yao yẽnda yõor yaoodo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Wakat ning a Davɩɩd sẽn wa n kẽng n tɩ soog Efrat kʋɩlgã, yẽnda zaba ne a Hadadezɛɛr sẽn yaa Soba rĩmã Hamat tẽngã sẽnẽ, n tõog-a." 
1Chronicles18:4 A Davɩɩd deega a Hadadezɛɛr saar-dãmb tusri, la a yõg a wed-rʋʋdb tus a yopoe, ne tãb-biis tus pisi sẽn ka zao wiidi. A Davɩɩd yãka wiid koabg sẽn tat saar-dãmbã, la a kɛ wiid a taabã fãa nao-gĩin n pase." 
1Chronicles18:5 Siiri nebã yii Damaas n wa n na n sõng Soba rĩm a Hadadezɛɛre, la a Davɩɩd kʋʋ Siiri neb tus pisi la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles18:6 A Davɩɩd tilga tãb-sigs Siiri nebã nengẽ Damaase, n kɩt tɩ Siiri nebã lebg a yembse, la a kɩt tɩ b yaood yẽnda yõor yaoodo. Zĩig ning fãa a Davɩɩd sẽn kẽngẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame t'a paam tõogre." 
1Chronicles18:7 A Davɩɩd deega sãnem logd nins a Hadadezɛɛr nebã sẽn dag n bobã, n tall n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles18:8 Tibat ne Kũn sẽn yaa a Hadadezɛɛr tẽmsã pʋse, a Davɩɩd leb n deega zũud wʋsgo. Yaa zũud-kãng la a Salmo tall n maan zũud ko-baoorã ne ra-lugdsã, la teed a taabã sẽn maan ne zũudã." 
1Chronicles18:9 Hamat rĩm a Towu sẽn wʋm t'a Davɩɩd tõoga Soba rĩm a Hadadezɛɛr tãb-biisã fãa wã," 
1Chronicles18:10 yẽnda tʋma a biig a Hadoram t'a kẽng n tɩ pʋʋs rĩm a Davɩɩd n pẽg-a, a sẽn zab n tõog a Hadadezɛɛrã yĩnga. Bala, a Towu rag n zabda ne a Hadadezɛɛre. A Towu leb n kɩsa sãnem teedo, wanzuri teedo, la zũud teed buud toor-toor tɩ b tɩ kõ a Davɩɩde." 
1Chronicles18:11 Rĩm a Davɩɩd rɩka wanzuri wã ne sãnemã yẽnda sẽn dag n deeg buud a taabã fãa nengẽ wã, Edom, Moaabe, Amo nebã, Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Amalɛk nebã nengẽ wã, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Chronicles18:12 A Seruya biig a Abisayi tõoga Edom neb tus piig la a nii, yamsem tãn-longẽ wã." 
1Chronicles18:13 A vigla tãb-sigs Edom, la a kɩtame tɩ Edom nebã fãa lebg a yembse. Zĩig ning fãa a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kẽngdẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõt-a-la tõogre." 
1Chronicles18:14 A Davɩɩd sooga Israyɛll soolmã fãa. Yẽnda rag n maanda sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrg ne a soolmã nebã fãa." 
1Chronicles18:15 A Seruya biig a Zoaab n dag n yaa tãb-biisã naaba. A Ayiluud biig a Zozafat n dag n yaa seb-bĩngda. 
1Chronicles18:16 A Akituub biig a Sadoke, ne a Abiyataar biig a Abimelɛk n dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdba, la a Savsa rag n yaa seb-gʋlsda." 
1Chronicles18:17 A Yoyiyaada biig a Benaya sẽn yaa Kerɛt ne Pelɛt nebã naabã, ne a Davɩɩd kom-dibli wã n dag n so pipi zĩig rĩmã sɛɛgẽ." 
1Chronicles19:1 Dẽ poore, Amo nebã rĩm a Nakaas kiime, t'a biigã led a zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles19:2 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Mam na n maana a Nakaas biig a Hanun neere, bala, yẽnda ba wã rag n maana maam neere.» Dẽ, a Davɩɩd tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng a Hanun nengẽ n tɩ pʋʋs-a, a ba wã sẽn maan kaalmã yĩnga. Woto, a Davɩɩd zakã nebã ta a Hanun nengẽ Amo nebã tẽngẽ n na n pʋʋs-a," 
1Chronicles19:3 la Amo nebã na-biisã yeela a Hanun yaa: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ yaa yãmb ba wã waoogr yĩng la a Davɩɩd sẽn tʋm nin-bãmbã tɩ b wa pʋʋs yãmbã bɩ? Yãmb ka tagsd t'a Davɩɩd nebã sẽn wa yãmb nengẽ wã yaa sẽn na n yɩl n ges tẽngã n bãng a yell sõama, n wa tõog n sãam-a sɩda?»" 
1Chronicles19:4 Dẽ, a Hanun kɩtame tɩ b yõg a Davɩɩd nebã n põng b toeemsã, la b wõrs b futã n bas b seesã yɩnga, n yaool n bas-b tɩ b looge." 
1Chronicles19:5 B wa n togsa a Davɩɩd bũmb ning b sẽn maan nin-bãmbã wã, la yẽnda tʋma ned t'a kẽng n tɩ seg-ba, bala, nin-bãmbã sɩd dag n bee yãn-kẽeng pʋga. Rĩmã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Pa-y Zeeriko hal tɩ y toeemsã yi, tɩ y yaool n wa.»" 
1Chronicles19:6 Amo nebã yãame tɩ b beega a Davɩɩde. Dẽ, a Hanun ne Amo nebã baoo wanzuri ligd-koeems tusri, n tʋm tɩ b tɩ bao saar-dãmb ne wed-rʋʋdb Siiri nebã sẽn be Mezopotami wã nengẽ, la sẽn be-b Maaka ne Soba wã nengẽ me." 
1Chronicles19:7 Woto, b baoo zabr saar-dãmb tus pis-tã la a yiibu, n paas Maaka rĩmã ne a nebã, tɩ b kẽng n tɩ tilg b tãb-sik Medba sɛɛgẽ. Amo nebã yii b tẽmsẽ wã n tigim taab n na n tɩ zabe." 
1Chronicles19:8 A Davɩɩd sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, a tʋma a Zoaab ne a tãb-biis nins sẽn yaa gãndaadã gilli." 
1Chronicles19:9 Woto, Amo nebã boba b zab-teed n yi n yals tẽngã noore. Wakat-kãnga, rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn wa n na n sõng bãmb n zabã yalsa weoogã pʋga." 
1Chronicles19:10 A Zoaab yãame tɩ zabrã yaa zĩis a yiibu, poorẽ la a taoore. Dẽ, yẽnda yãka Israyɛll tãb-biis nins sẽn ya-b gãndaadã, tɩ b na n na n teedg n zab ne Siiri nebã," 
1Chronicles19:11 n yaool n bas tãb-biis a taabã ne a ba-biig a Abisayi, tɩ bãmb me na n teedg n zab ne Amo nebã." 
1Chronicles19:12 A Zoaab yeela a Abisayi yaa: «Siiri nebã sã n wa rat n tõog maam, bɩ f wa sõng-ma. La Amo nebã sã n wa rat n tõog foom, mam me na n wa sõnga foom." 
1Chronicles19:13 Keng f menga, d keng d meng n zab d nebã yĩnga, la d Wẽnnaamã tẽms yĩnga. La bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan b raabo!»" 
1Chronicles19:14 Woto, a Zoaab ne a tãb-biisã kolgame n na n zab ne Siiri nebã, la Siiri nebã zoeeme n na n põs bãmba." 
1Chronicles19:15 Amo nebã sẽn yã tɩ Siiri nebã zoeeme, bãmb me zoeeme, sẽn na yɩl n põs a Zoaab ba-biig a Abisayi, la b kẽe tẽngã pʋga, la a Zoaab lebg n leba Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles19:16 Siiri nebã sẽn yã tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõoga bãmba, b tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ tigim b nebã sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã. A Hadadezɛɛr tãb-biis naab a Sofak n dag n lʋɩ bãmb taoore." 
1Chronicles19:17 La b tɩ togsa a Davɩɩd bõn-kãnga, la yẽnda tigma Israyɛll nebã fãa, n tall-b n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n na n tɩ seg bãmba. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã sũu tãp n zab ne Siiri nebã, la Siiri nebã yika zabr ne bãmba." 
1Chronicles19:18 La yɩɩ tɩlɛ tɩ Siiri nebã zoe n na n põs Israyɛll nebã. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã kʋʋ bãmb wed-rʋʋdb tus a yopoe, la b tãb-biis nins sẽn kẽnd ne naoã bãmb tus pis-naase. A kʋʋ bãmb tãb-biis naab a Sofake." 
1Chronicles19:19 Nanambs nins sẽn dag n yaa a Hadadezɛɛr yembsã sẽn wa n mik tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõogda bãmba, b yõga zood ne a Davɩɩde, n lebg a Davɩɩd yembse. Siiri nebã me ka leb n dat n sõng Amo nebã n zab ye." 
1Chronicles20:1 Yʋʋm-vẽkrã sẽn zems wakat ning rĩm-dãmbã sẽn yit n kẽnd zabã, a Zoaab tigma tãb-biis wʋsgo, n tɩ sãam Amo nebã tẽnga, la b gũbg Raba tẽngã. Rẽ t'a Davɩɩd paa Zeruzalɛm. La a Zoaab zab n tõoga Raba tẽngã n sãam-a zãnga." 
1Chronicles20:2 A Davɩɩd fõka naam maanfã sẽn dag n fõg Amo nebã wẽn-naandg a Milkom zugã. Maanfã zɩslem dag n yɩɩda sãnem kɩlo pis-tã. La kug-neer n dag n be maanfã zugu. Dẽ, b yãka kug-neerã n ning rĩm a Davɩɩd naam puglã zugu. A Davɩɩd ne a nebã wʋka Raba tẽngã teed wʋsg n tall n looge." 
1Chronicles20:3 Sã n yaa ne tẽngã nebã, a Davɩɩd yiis-b lame n tɩ kõ-b ra-wãad-sʋʋs ne kɩts la laya, n kɩt tɩ b maan tʋʋm-wɛgla. A kɩtame tɩ Amo nebã tẽmsã fãa me maan a woto. Dẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd ne a tãb-bi-sulã fãa lebg n leba Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles20:4 Bõn-kãens zugẽ, Israyɛll nebã yika zabr ne Filistẽ-dãmbã Gezɛɛre. La zabrã wakate, Husa tẽng rao a Sibkayi kʋʋ Refayim buudã ned a Sipayi, n ning Filistẽ-dãmbã yãnde." 
1Chronicles20:5 Dẽ poore, zabrã ne Filistẽ-dãmbã leb n yikame. La a Yayɩɩr biig a Ɛlhanan kʋʋ a Lami sẽn yaa Gat tẽng rao a Golyaat ba-biigã. A Lami kãndã raoog taglem dag n taa koeer-bõanga." 
1Chronicles20:6 Zabr a to leb n zĩnda Gat tẽnga. La nin-wobg a yembr n dag n be beenẽ, n tar nug-bi piig la a yiibu, ne nao-biis piig la a yiibu. Yẽnda me rag n yaa a Harafa yagenga." 
1Chronicles20:7 Yẽnda baoo Israyɛll nebã noore, la a Simeya biig a Zonatã sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd ba-biigã kʋʋ yẽnda." 
1Chronicles20:8 Gat tẽng nin-bãmbã fãa rag n yaa a Harafa yagense. La a Davɩɩd ne a nebã tõoga bãmb n kʋ-ba. 
1Chronicles21:1 Daar a yembre, bɛ wã baoome n na n maan Israyɛll nebã wẽnga: A tusa a Davɩɩd t'a na n sõd Israyɛll nebã." 
1Chronicles21:2 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yeela a Zoaab ne nebã nanambsã yaa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ sõd-y Israyɛll nebã, sẽn sɩng Bɛɛrseba hal n tɩ tãag Dan, la y lebg n wa wilg-m tɩ m bãng b sõore.»" 
1Chronicles21:3 La a Zoaab leokame yaa: «N-na! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ y nebã sõor paas naoor koabg n yɩɩd woto! M dĩm la m soaala, dẽ yĩngã, nin-bãmbã fãa ka yãmb tʋmtʋmdb la? La bõe yĩng tɩ y leb n baood n na n bãng b sõore? Bõe yĩng tɩ Israyɛll nebã na n bao beem n kõ b menga?»" 
1Chronicles21:4 La rĩmã pẽdgr sẽn dag n yaa wʋsgã, a Zoaab yiime n saag Israyɛll soolmã gilli, n sõd nebã, la a lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm." 
1Chronicles21:5 Dẽ, a Zoaab wilga a Davɩɩd nebã b sẽn sõdã sõore. Israyɛll soolmã fãa raop sẽn tõe n kẽng zabr yaa raop tus-kẽemd la tus koabga. La Zʋʋda raop sẽn tõe n kẽng zabr yaa raop tus kobs-naas la pis-yopoe." 
1Chronicles21:6 A Zoaab sũurã sẽn sãam ne rĩmã yam-yãkrã yĩnga, yẽnda ka sõd Leevi wall Benzame buudã ned ba a yembr n naag ye." 
1Chronicles21:7 Wẽnnaam sũur ka yɩ noog ne a Davɩɩd yam-yãkrã ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b sɩbg Israyɛlle. 
1Chronicles21:8 A Davɩɩd yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Mam maana yel-kãseng ne bũmb ning mam sẽn maanã. Moasã, m kot-y lame tɩ y kõ mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sugr a beegrã yĩnga, bala, mam sẽn maanã yaa yalemd meng-menga.»" 
1Chronicles21:9 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Davɩɩd bãngd a Gaad yaa: 
1Chronicles21:10 Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Davɩɩd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: Mam ningda tood a tãab fo taoore. Yãk a yembr bãmb sʋkã, tɩ m sɩbg-f ne to-kãnga." 
1Chronicles21:11 Dẽ, a Gaad kẽnga a Davɩɩd nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «To-bãmbã sʋka, bʋg la f yãkda?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Yʋʋm a tãab kom bɩ? Bɩ f bɛɛbã sẽn na n dig-f kiis a tãab n kɛ-f ne zabr sʋʋg bɩ? Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n zab ne yãmb dasem a tãab ne zabr sʋʋg n kɩt tɩ bã-loangdg kẽ y soolmẽ wã n sãam-a zãnga? Moasã, bɩ f leok tɩ m tɩ taas sẽn tʋm-a maamã.»" 
1Chronicles21:13 La a Davɩɩd leoka a Gaad yaa: «Sũ-sãan-kãseng n tar maam! Mam sẽn lʋɩt Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugẽ n são m sẽn lʋɩt ninsaalb nusẽ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nimbãan-zoeerã yaa wʋsgo.»" 
1Chronicles21:14 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bã-loangdg kẽ Israyɛll soolmẽ wã, n kʋ Israyɛll neb tus pis-yopoe." 
1Chronicles21:15 Wẽnnaam tʋma malɛɛk Zeruzalɛm t'a kẽng n tɩ sãam tẽngã. La malɛɛkã sẽn sãamd tẽngã wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gesame la b maana b bãngẽ ne to-kãnga. Dẽ, b yeela malɛɛkã sẽn dag n sãamd tẽngã yaa: Bas woto tɩ sekame! Wakat-kãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã rag n yɛsa a Zebuus ned a Ornan zɛɛgã sɛɛgẽ." 
1Chronicles21:16 A Davɩɩd zẽka a nenga, n yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã sẽn be yĩngr ne tẽng sʋka, n wõog a sʋʋg n tees Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sẽnẽ. La a Davɩɩd ne kãsem-dãmbã pila boto, n lʋɩ n fõgneg b neng tẽnga." 
1Chronicles21:17 A Davɩɩd yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Ka maam n yeel tɩ b sõd nebã la? Yaa maam n maan yel-wẽnde, n maan sẽn yaa wẽngã. La nin-bãmbã maana bõe? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, m yõkd-y-la sɛɛga. Bɩ y sɩbg maam ne m yirã rãmb bala, la y ra kɩt tɩ toog paam y nebã ye!»" 
1Chronicles21:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã rag n yeela a Gaad t'a yeel a Davɩɩde, t'a kẽng n tɩ me tẽn-kugr Zebuus rao a Ornan zɛɛgẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
1Chronicles21:19 La a Davɩɩd kẽngame n tɩ maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel a Gaad t'a yeel-a wã. 
1Chronicles21:20 Wakat-kãng t'a Ornan dag n be a zɛɛgẽ wã n pãbd koodo. Yẽnda wẽnemdame n yãnd malɛɛkã. La yẽnda kom-dibli a naasã sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã zoeeme n tɩ solge. 
1Chronicles21:21 A Davɩɩd sẽn ta a Ornan nengẽ, a Ornan gesame n yãnd yẽnda. Dẽ, yẽnda yi a zɛɛgẽ wã, n fõgen a neng tẽng n wõgemd a Davɩɩd taoore." 
1Chronicles21:22 A Davɩɩd yeela a Ornan yaa: Kõ maam zĩ-kãngã, kõ maam zɛɛgã tɩ m me tẽn-kugr n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ bã-loangdgã sẽn tar nebã sɛ. M na n yao-f-la wa sẽn zems a ligdi." 
1Chronicles21:23 A Ornan leoka a Davɩɩd yaa: M dĩm la m soaala, reeg-y-yã-a n maan y sẽn date. Ges-y-yã, mam kõta yãmb niigã tɩ y maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, la ra-vuudsã tɩ y maan bugum daado, la koodã tɩ y maan zom kũunã. Mam kõta yãmb bõn-kãensã fãa." 
1Chronicles21:24 La rĩm a Davɩɩd yeela a Ornan yaa: Ayo! Mam na n da-a-la wa sẽn zems a ligdã sẽn yaa to-to wã. Mam ka na n deeg zaalem bũmb n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye!" 
1Chronicles21:25 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd kõ a Ornan sãnem kɩlo piiga, la a reeg zĩigã." 
1Chronicles21:26 A Davɩɩd mee tẽn-kugr beenẽ n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yẽnda maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne zems-n-taar maando. Yẽnda pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b leoka yẽnda pʋʋsgã n kɩt tɩ bugum yi yĩngr n sig maandã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã." 
1Chronicles21:27 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne malɛɛkã, la malɛɛkã lebsa a sʋʋgã n sui a wʋʋgẽ wã." 
1Chronicles21:28 Wakat-kãnga, a Davɩɩd sẽn mik tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka yẽnda pʋʋsgã Zebuus rao a Ornan zɛɛgẽ wã, a maana maand beenẽ." 
1Chronicles21:29 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛk roogã ne maand sẽn yõogd bugmã a Moyiis sẽn dag n maan we-raoogẽ wã rag n bee maoong kʋʋb zĩigẽ wã Gabawõ." 
1Chronicles21:30 La a Davɩɩd dag n ka tõe n kẽng n tɩ yõk Wẽnnaam sɛɛg ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã sʋʋg kẽesa yẽnda rabeem-kãsenga." 
1Chronicles22:1 A Davɩɩd yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zĩig na n yɩɩ zĩ-kãngã, la yaa ka la b na n maan tẽn-kugr ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã." 
1Chronicles22:2 A Davɩɩd kɩtame tɩ b tigim sãamb nins sẽn dag n be Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ wã, n kɩt tɩ kug-pɛɛsdb pees kug-bɛd Wẽnnaam doogã meeb yĩnga." 
1Chronicles22:3 Yẽnda leb n segla kut wʋsgo, tɩ b na n tall n maan kaads rignoyã kʋɩlems ne sogdsã yĩnga, la zũud wʋsg me b sẽn ka tõe n mak n bãng a zɩslem," 
1Chronicles22:4 ne sɛɛdr daad ka tɛka, bala Sɩdõ ne Tɩɩr nebã rag n zãa sɛɛdr daad wʋsg n wa kõ a Davɩɩde." 
1Chronicles22:5 A Davɩɩd dag n yetame: Mam biig a Salmo ket n yaa bi-bilfu, la a nan ka mi bũmb ye. La roogã b sẽn na n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã yaool n yaa sẽn na n zẽk b yʋʋrã, la wilg b ziirã tẽmsã fãa pʋse. Dẽ yĩngã, mam na n segla roogã meebo. Woto, a Davɩɩd segla bũmb wʋsg roogã meeb wɛɛngẽ t'a nan ket n vɩ." 
1Chronicles22:6 A Davɩɩd boola a biig a Salmo, n yeel-a t'a me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles22:7 A yeela a Salmo yaa: M biiga, mam dag n data ne m sũur fãa, n me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
1Chronicles22:8 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Fo raaga neb wʋsg zɩɩm, la f zaba zab-kãsemse. Dẽ yĩngã, ka na n yɩ foom n na n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩng ye. Bala, fo raaga neb wʋsg zɩɩm dũniyã zug mam nifẽ." 
1Chronicles22:9 Fo na n doga bi-ribla, la bi-ribl-kãng na n yɩɩ ned sẽn na n wa ne vʋʋsgo. Mam na n kõo yẽnda vʋʋsgo, n kɩt tɩ bɛɛb nins fãa sẽn gũbg yẽnda wã bas-a taale. B na n pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Salmo, la m na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll zĩnd ne laafɩ la bãane, yẽnda vɩɩmã tɛka." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yaa yẽnda n na n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n yɩɩ mam biiga, la mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda ba. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda rĩungã tall pãng Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ wakat fãa.»" 
1Chronicles22:11 Moasã, m biiga, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne-fo, tɩ f paam tõogre, la f tõog n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã roogo, wa b sẽn dag n yeel fo wɛɛngẽ wã." 
1Chronicles22:12 Moasã, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ foom yam la bãngre. Bɩ b kɩt tɩ f naamã tall pãng Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ, tɩ f tõog n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã tõogo." 
1Chronicles22:13 Woto, fo sã n sak noy la no-tũuds nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiis Israyɛll yĩngã, fo na n paama tõogre. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f paam pãng la raoodo, la f ra zoe rabeem, la f ra yɛɛs ye." 
1Chronicles22:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã meeb yĩnga, mam namsame n segl sãnem zɩslem sẽn ta toand tus pis-tã, ne wanzuri zɩslem sẽn ta toand tus-kẽemd a yembre. Sã n yaa ne zũudã ne kutã, b ka tõe n mak-b n bãng b zɩslmã tɛk ye. Bala, b yaa wʋsgo. Sẽn paas me, mam segla raad ne kuga, la f tõe n kell n bao n paasame." 
1Chronicles22:15 Tʋmtʋmdb ka tɛk beeme n na n sõngd foom: kug-pɛɛsdba, kug ne raad zut gʋlsdba, la tʋʋm-mitb toay-toaya." 
1Chronicles22:16 Sãnemã ne wanzuri wã la zũudã ne kutã ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. Moasã, bɩ f yik n sɩng tʋʋmde, la bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnd ne-fo." 
1Chronicles22:17 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd yeela Israyɛll nanambsã fãa tɩ b wa sõng a biig a Salmo. Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa:" 
1Chronicles22:18 Dẽ yĩngã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ka be ne yãmb la? B ka kõ yãmb vʋʋsg zĩig fãa la? Bãmb kõo maam tẽn-kãngã nebã fãa tɩ m sooge, la soolmã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne b nebã n so." 
1Chronicles22:19 Bɩ y bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã ne y sũyã fãa la ne y yamã fãa, la y me Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaamã roogo. Woto, y na n tõog n talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã ne teed nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n tɩ bĩng roog ning y sẽn na n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩngã pʋgẽ." 
1Chronicles23:1 A Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kʋʋl wʋsgã yĩnga, yẽnda kɩtame t'a biig a Salmo lebg Israyɛll dĩma." 
1Chronicles23:2 Dẽ zugẽ, a Davɩɩd tigma Israyɛll nanambsã ne a maan-kʋʋdbã la Leevi nebã fãa." 
1Chronicles23:3 B sõda Leevi neb nins sẽn tar yʋʋm pis-tã la sẽn yɩɩd woto. Bãmb sõorã yaa neb tus pis-tã la a nii. 
1Chronicles23:4 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Yãk-y neb tus pisi la a naas sẽn na n get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋm yelle, la y yãk neb tus a yoob sẽn na n yɩ seb-gʋlsdb ne bʋ-kaoodba, la neb tus a naas sẽn na n yɩ rigno-gũudba," 
1Chronicles23:5 la neb tus a naas sẽn na n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yʋʋm-teed nins mam sẽn maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogr yĩngã.» 
1Chronicles23:6 A Davɩɩd pʋɩɩ Leevi nebã sull-sulli, wa sẽn zems a Leevi yagensã sẽn yaa a Gɛrsõ ne a Kehat la a Meraari." 
1Chronicles23:7 A Gerson kom-dibli yaa a Ladan ne a Simeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 A Ladan roga kom-dibli a tãabo: bi-kãsengã yaa a Yekiyɛlle, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa a Zetam ne a Zowɛlle." 
1Chronicles23:9 A Simeyi roga kom-dibli a tãabo: a Selomit ne a Haziyɛll la a Haarã. Bãmb yaa a Ladan buudã kãsem-dãmba. 
1Chronicles23:10 A Simeyi leb n doga kom-dibli a naase: a Yahat ne a Zina la a Yewuus ne a Beriya. 
1Chronicles23:11 A Yahat n dag n yaa bi-kãsengã, t'a Ziza pʋgda. A Yewuus ne a Beriya ka rog kom-dibli wʋsg ye. Bãmb dag n yaa roog a yembre." 
1Chronicles23:12 A Kehat roga kom-dibli a naase: yaa a Amram ne a Yitsaar la a Ebrõ ne a Uziyɛlle. 
1Chronicles23:13 A Amram kom-dibli yaa a Aarõ ne a Moyiisi. B rag n welga a Aarõ toore, t'a yaa ned sẽn welg toor zalle, tɩ yẽnda ne a yagensã rag n get zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã yelle. Yaa bãmb n dag n tog n yõogd wisdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la b maand bãmb tʋʋmdã, la b leb n ningd bark Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles23:14 Sã n yaa ne Wẽnnaam dao a Moyiisi, b rag n sõda yẽnda kom-dibli wã n naag Leevi buudã." 
1Chronicles23:15 A Moyiis kom-dibli yaa a Gersom ne a Eliyezɛɛre. 
1Chronicles23:16 A Gersom bi-ribl dag n yaa a Sebuwɛlle. 
1Chronicles23:17 A Eliyezɛɛr dag n tara bi-ribl-yende: yaa a Rehabiya. La a Rehabiya rag n tara kom-dibli wʋsgo. 
1Chronicles23:18 A Yitsaar bi-ribl dag n yaa a Selomiti. 
1Chronicles23:19 A Ebrõ rag n tara kom-dibli a naase: Bi-kãsengã yaa a Yeriyahu, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa a Yahazɩyɛll ne a Yokmeyam." 
1Chronicles23:20 A Uziyɛll rag a tara kom-dibli a yiibu: Bi-kãsengã yaa a Miise, tɩ sẽn pʋgd yaa a Yisiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 A Meraari kom-dibli yaa a Makli ne a Musi. A Makli kom-dibli yaa a Eleyazaar ne a Kiisi. 
1Chronicles23:22 A Eleyazaar kiime n ka tol n paam bi-ribl ye. Yẽnda roga kom-pugli bala. La yaa a Kiis kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa bãmb ba-biisã n dag n peeg bãmb n maan b pagba. 
1Chronicles23:23 A Musi rag n tara kom-dibli a tãabo: yaa a Makli ne a Edɛɛr la a Yeremote. 
1Chronicles23:24 Nin-bãmbã n dag n yaa Leevi buudã neb b sẽn sõd roog-roogo, ne b buudã kãsem-dãmbã, neb nins b sẽn sõde, n bool b yʋyã kãsem-kãsmã. Sẽn tar-b yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã n dag n get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yelle." 
1Chronicles23:25 Sɩd me, a Davɩɩd dag n yeela woto: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã kõ b nebã vʋʋsgo, la b na n paa Zeruzalɛm wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
1Chronicles23:26 Woto, ka leb n yaa Leevi buudã n dag n tog n dɩkd sɛk roogã, la b get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed yell yɛs ye." 
1Chronicles23:27 Yaa a Davɩɩd yaoolem koe-kãensã zugẽ la b sɩng Leevi nebã sõdbo, sẽn sɩng ne sẽn tar-b yʋʋm pisi la a nu, la sẽn yɩɩd woto." 
1Chronicles23:28 A Aarõ kom-dibli wã sʋka, bãmb tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ rag n yaa zagsã ne ro-pʋsã yell gesgo, la teed nins sẽn welg toorã yɩlgre, la tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
1Chronicles23:29 Yaa kaset burã, ne zom kũunã, la bur-maasã sẽn ka ning rã-bɩllã, burã sẽn kɩɩmã, wall burã sẽn wʋmã, n paas poɛɛm ne woglem makdsã." 
1Chronicles23:30 Yibeoog ne zaabr fãa, b tog n wata Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n pẽgd-ba, la b waoogd-ba." 
1Chronicles23:31 Vʋʋsg rayã ne ki-paalsã la tigr rayã wakat me, b tog n maana maand sẽn yõogd bugmã fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, wa sẽn zems tõog ning b sẽn kõ bãmbã." 
1Chronicles23:32 Bãmb n na n get sɛk roogã tʋʋm yelle, ne zĩ-sõngã tʋʋm yelle. La b na n naaga a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã, n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmã." 
1Chronicles24:1 A Aarõ yagensã ne b sul la woto: A Aarõ kom-dibli la woto: yaa a Nadaab ne a Abiyu la a Eleyazaar ne a Itamaare. 
1Chronicles24:2 A Nadaab ne a Abiyu renga b ba n ki, n ka rog kamb ye. A Eleyazaar ne a Itamaar n dag n get maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd yelle." 
1Chronicles24:3 A Davɩɩd ne a Eleyazaar yageng a Sadoke, la a Itamaar yageng Ayimelɛke, n welg a Aarõ kom-dibli wã n kõ ned fãa ne a tʋʋmde." 
1Chronicles24:4 A Eleyazaar buudã sʋka, kom-dibli nins sẽn dag n yaa kãsem-dãmbã sõor dag n yɩɩda a Itamaar kom-dibli wã. Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ b pʋɩ a Eleyazaar yagensã sul piig la a yoobe, la b pʋɩ a Itamaar yagensã sul a nii." 
1Chronicles24:5 B maana poeer n yãk ned fãa ne a sulli, bala, yaa a Eleyazaar ne a Itamaar kom-dibli wã n dag n yaa zĩ-sõngã nanambse, n yaa nanambs Wẽnnaam sẽn yãke." 
1Chronicles24:6 A Netaneyɛll biig a Semaya sẽn yaa Leevi buudã ned a yembrã yaa gʋlsda. Yẽnda gʋlsa bãmb yʋyã rĩmã ne na-biisã taoore, la maan-kʋʋd a Sadok ne a Ayimelɛk sẽn yaa a Abiyataar biigã taoore, la maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb taoore. B yãka a Eleyazaar buudã kãsem a yembre, la b yãk a Itamaar buudã me kãsem a yembre." 
1Chronicles24:7 Kãsem-dãmb nins b sẽn yãkã la woto: Pipi poeerã yãka a Yehoyariibi, yiibẽ soabã yãka a Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 tãabẽ soabã yãka a Harim, naasẽ soabã yãka a Seyorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 nu soabã yãka a Malkiya, yoobẽ soabã yãka a Miyamindi," 
1Chronicles24:10 yopoe soabã yãka a Hakoose, nii soabã yãka a Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 wɛ soabã yãka a Zozoe, piig soabã yãka a Sekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 piig la a yembr soabã yãka a Eliyasɩɩbe, piig la a yiibẽ soabã yãka a Yakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 piig la a tãabẽ soabã yãka a Hupa, piig la a naasẽ soabã yãka a Yesebaabe," 
1Chronicles24:14 piig la a nu soabã yãka a Bilga, piig la a yoobẽ soabã yãka a Imeere," 
1Chronicles24:15 piig la a yopoe soabã yãka a Ezɩɩre, piig la a nii soabã yãka a Hapisɛtse," 
1Chronicles24:16 piig la a wɛ soabã yãka a Petakiya, pisi soabã yãka a Ezekɩyɛlle," 
1Chronicles24:17 pisi la a ye soabã yãka a Yakẽ, pisi la a yiibẽ soabã yãka a Gamulli," 
1Chronicles24:18 pisi la a tãabẽ soabã yãka a Delaya, tɩ pisi la a naasẽ soabã yãk a Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Yaa woto la b pʋɩ ned kam fãa ne a tʋʋmde, tɩ b na n kẽed Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, wa sẽn zems noor ning b sẽn dag n tũnug bãmb ba a Aarõ n kõ bãmbã, la wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n yeelã." 
1Chronicles24:20 A Leevi kom-dibli a taabã yʋy la woto: a Amram kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Subayɛlle. A Subayɛll kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Yedeya." 
1Chronicles24:21 A Rehabiya kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Yisiya sẽn yaa a buudã naabã." 
1Chronicles24:22 A Yitsaar kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Selomote. A Selomot kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Yakate." 
1Chronicles24:23 A Ebrõ kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Yeriya sẽn yaa a buudã naabã. Kãsem-pʋgdg yaa a Amariya, tãabẽ soab yaa a Yakaziyɛlle, naasẽ soab yaa a Yekamyam." 
1Chronicles24:24 A Uziyɛll bi-ribl yaa a Mika. A Mika kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Samiiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 A Mika ba-biig a Yisiya kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Zakari." 
1Chronicles24:26 A Meraari kom-dibli yaa a Makli ne a Musi la a Yaaziya. 
1Chronicles24:27 A Meraari bi-ribl a Yaaziya kom-dibli yaa a Soham ne a Zakʋʋr la a Ibri. 
1Chronicles24:28 A Makli kom-dibli yaa a Eleyazaare. A Eleyazaar ka paam bi-ribl ye. 
1Chronicles24:29 A Kiis bi-ribl yaa a Yerameyɛlle," 
1Chronicles24:30 a Musi kom-dibli yaa a Makli ne a Edɛɛr la a Yerimote. Leevi buudã ned fãa ne a roog la woto. 
1Chronicles24:31 Bãmb me ne b ba-biisã sẽn yaa a Aarõ kom-dibli wã maana poeer dĩm a Davɩɩd ne a Sadok la a Ayimelɛk ne maan-kʋʋdbã buudã kãsem-dãmba, la Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb taoore. B maana a woto ne buud fãa kãsma, la hal baa ne sẽn yaa-a yao-zʋʋg b saam-biisã sʋkã." 
1Chronicles25:1 A Davɩɩd ne a tãb-biisã nanambs welga a Azaf ne a Eman la a Yedutun kom-dibli wã toore, tʋʋmdã yĩnga. Nin-bãmb dag n yɩɩnda ne kʋl la pends ne kɛma, n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã. Neb nins sẽn dag n tar tʋʋmã yʋy la woto:" 
1Chronicles25:2 A Azaf kom-dibli wã sʋka, yaa a Zakʋʋre, a Zozɛfe, a Netaniya, ne a Azareyela. Bãmb ba a Azaf n dag n lʋɩt bãmb taoor n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, wa sẽn zems rĩmã sẽn datã." 
1Chronicles25:3 A Yedutun kom-dibli wã yaa bãmb b yoobe: yaa a Gedaliya, a Seeri, a Ezayi, a Simeyi a Aazabiya, la a Matitiya. Bãmb ba wã n dag n lʋɩt taoor n maand no-rɛɛsdb manesem, la a wẽed pɛndg n pẽgd la a waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
1Chronicles25:4 A Eman kom-dibli wã yaa a Bukiya, a Mataniya, a Uziyɛlle, a Sebuwɛlle, a Yerimote, a Hananiya, a Anani, a Eliyata, a Gidalti, a Romamti-Ezɛɛre, a Yosbekasa, a Maloti, a Otiiri, la a Mahaziyote." 
1Chronicles25:5 Nin-bãmbã fãa yaa a Eman kom-dibli. A Eman dag n yaa rĩmã bãngda, sẽn kẽed ne Wẽnnaam yɛlã wɛɛngẽ, sẽn na yɩl n wilg bãmb pãn-kãsengã. Wẽnnaam dag n kõ a Eman kom-dibli piig la a naase, la kom-pugli a tãabo." 
1Chronicles25:6 Nin-bãmbã ba wã n dag n lʋɩt b fãa taoore, tɩ b yɩɩnd Wẽnnaam doogã yɩɩla, la b wẽed kɛm ne pends la kʋl Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgẽ tʋʋmd yĩnga. A Azaf ne a Yedutun la a Eman dag n tʋmda rĩmã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles25:7 Nin-bãmbã ne b saam-biisã sẽn yaa yɩɩn-mitb sẽn waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sõor dag n yaa neb kobessi la pis-nii la a nii. B fãa yaa neb sẽn paam zãmsgo. 
1Chronicles25:8 B maana poeer n yãk ned fãa ne a tʋʋmde, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem tɩ ta yao-zʋʋga, ne karen-saam-dãmb la karen-biisi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Pipi poeerã yãka a Azaf buudã ned a Zozɛfe. A yiibẽ soabã yãka a Gedaliya ne a saam-biisã, la a kom-dibli wã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:10 A tãabẽ soabã yãka a Zakʋʋr ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:11 A naasẽ soabã yãka a Yitseri ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:12 A nu soabã yãka a Netaniya ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:13 A yoobẽ soabã yãka a Bukiya ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:14 A yopoe soabã yaa a Yesareyela ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:15 A nii soabã yãka a Ezayi ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:16 A wɛ soabã yãka a Mataniya ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:17 Piig soabã yãka a Simeyi ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:18 Piig la a yembr soabã yãka a Azareyɛlle, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:19 Piig la a yiibẽ soabã yãka a Hasabiya, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:20 Piig la a tãabẽ soabã yãka a Subayɛlle, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:21 Piig la a naasẽ soabã yãka a Matitiya, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:22 Piig la a nu soabã yãka a Yerimote, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:23 Piig la yoobẽ soabã yãka a Hananiya, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:24 Piig la a yopoe soabã yãka a Yosbekasa, ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:25 Piig la a nii soabã yãka a Anani ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:26 Piig la a wɛ soabã yãka a Maloti ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:27 Pisi soabã yãka a Eliyata ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:28 Pisi la a yembr soabã yãka a Otiir ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:29 Pisi la a yiibẽ soabã yãka a Gidalti ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:30 Pisi la a tãabẽ soabã yãka a Makaziyot ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles25:31 Pisi la a naasẽ soabã yãka a Romamti-Ezɛɛr ne a kom-dibli wã la a saam-biisã. Bãmb yaa neb piig la a yiibu. 
1Chronicles26:1 Rigno-gũudbã sul nebã yʋy la woto: Koore buudã pʋga, yaa a Koore biig a Meselemiya sẽn yaa a Azaf yagensã sʋk ned a yembrã." 
1Chronicles26:2 A Meselemiya roga kom-dibli a yopoe: Bi-kãsengã yaa a Zakari, yiibẽ soabã yaa a Yediyayɛlle, tãabẽ soabã yaa a Zebadiya," 
1Chronicles26:3 naasẽ soabã yaa a Yatiniyɛlle, nu soabã yaa a Elam, yoobẽ soabã yaa a Yohanan, tɩ yopoe soabã yaa a Eliyoenayi." 
1Chronicles26:4 A Obɛɛd-Edom doga kom-dibli a nii: Pipi soabã yaa a Semaya, yiibẽ soabã yaa Yehozabaade, tãabẽ soabã yaa Yowake, naasẽ soabã yaa a Sakaare, nu soabã yaa a Netaneyɛlle," 
1Chronicles26:5 yoobẽ soabã yaa a Amiyɛlle, yopoe soabã yaa a Isakaare, tɩ nii soabã yaa a Pewultayi. Bala, Wẽnnaam dag n ning-a-la barka." 
1Chronicles26:6 A Meselemiya biig a Semaya roga kom-dibli sẽn dag n yaa nin-kãsems b buudã sʋka. B rag n yaa gãndaado. 
1Chronicles26:7 A Semaya kom-dibli wã la woto: yaa a Otini, a Refayɛlle, a Obɛɛde, a Ɛlzabaad ne yaopã sẽn yaa gãndaadã: a Elihu ne a Semakiya." 
1Chronicles26:8 Nin-kãensã fãa rag n yaa a Obɛɛd-Edom yagense. Bãmb ne b kom-dibli wã ne b saam-biisã rag n yaa gãndaado, n tar pãng tʋʋmdã yĩnga. B fãa sõorã rag n yaa neb pis-yoob la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles26:9 A Meselemiya rag n tara kom-dibli la ba-biis sẽn yaa gãndaado, la b sõorã rag n yaa neb piig la a nii." 
1Chronicles26:10 A Meraari yageng a Ooza rag n tara kom-dibli a naase: Pipi soabã yaa a Simri. Baa ne yẽnda sẽn dag n ka bi-kãsengã, a ba a Meraari kõ-a-la naamã." 
1Chronicles26:11 Yiibẽ soabã yaa a Ilkiya, tãabẽ soabã yaa a Tebaliya, tɩ naasẽ soabã yaa a Zakari. A Oosa ne a kom-dibli wã fãa ne a saam-biisã sõor dag n yaa neb piig la a tãabo." 
1Chronicles26:12 Rigno-gũudbã sul-kãens sẽn yaa nanambs wa b ba-biisã rag n be b zĩigẽ n maand b tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ. 
1Chronicles26:13 B maana poeer buud fãa pʋgẽ, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem n tãag yao-zʋʋga, n wilg buud fãa sẽn na n gũ rignoor ninga." 
1Chronicles26:14 Poeerã yãka rignoor ning sẽn be-a yaang sẽnẽ wã, n kõ a Selemiya. B leb n maana poeere, n yãk yẽnda biig a Zakari sẽn yaa sagend sẽn tar yamã, t'a na n gũ nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ rignoorã." 
1Chronicles26:15 Poeerã wilgame t'a Obɛɛd-Edom n na n gũ rignoor ning sẽn be-a goabg sẽnẽ wã, tɩ yẽnda kom-dibli wã gũ teedã bĩngr doto." 
1Chronicles26:16 A Supim ne a Oosa n na n gũ rignoor ning sẽn be-a nin-taoor sẽnẽ, n tees Salekɛt sor ning sẽn dʋʋd tãngã. Sull fãa rag n tota a to." 
1Chronicles26:17 Daar fãa, yaa Leevi neb a yoob n dag n be yaang n gũudẽ, t'a naas be nug-goabga, t'a naas be nug-rɩtgo. Teedã bĩngr zĩisẽ, b ning-b-la yiib-yiibu, zĩis toor-toore." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ro-bilã sẽn be nin-taoorã sẽnẽ, yaa Leevi neb a naase, tɩ sorã sẽnẽ yaa neb a naase, tɩ ro-bilã sẽnẽ yaa neb a yiibu." 
1Chronicles26:19 Dẽ, a Koore ne a Meraari kom-dibli nins sẽn yaa rigno-gũudbã ne b sulã la woto." 
1Chronicles26:20 Leevi ned a Ahiya n dag n get Wẽnnaam doogã laogo, ne laog nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã yelle." 
1Chronicles26:21 Sã n yaa ne Gersom buudã ned a Ladã kom-dibli wã, bãmb kãsem-dãmbã yaa Yeyiyɛll buudã nebã," 
1Chronicles26:22 Yeyiyɛll buudã neb ne b kom-dibli wã, ne a Zetam ne a yao a Zowɛlle, bãmb n get Wẽnnaam doogã laog yelle." 
1Chronicles26:23 Sã n yaa ne a Amram ne a Yitsaare, la a Ebrõ ne a Uziyɛll yagensã," 
1Chronicles26:24 yaa a Moyiis biig a Gersom biig a Sebuwɛlle, n dag n get laogã yelle." 
1Chronicles26:25 Yẽnda saam-biisã sẽn dag n yaa a Eliyezɛɛr buudã la woto: A Eliyezɛɛr doga a Rehabiya, t'a Rehabiya rog a Ezayi, t'a Ezayi rog a Zoram, t'a Zoram dog a Zikri, t'a Zikri rog a Selomiti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Laog nins fãa ne bũmb nins rĩm a Davɩɩd ne buudã kãsem-dãmb la tãb-biis tusr-tusr ne tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambse, la tãb-biisã nanambs sẽn dag n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, yaa Selomot-kãng ne a ba-biisã n dag n get b yelle." 
1Chronicles26:27 Rag n yaa teed b sẽn wʋk zabrã zĩigẽ wã la b yãk n welg toore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã manegr yĩnga." 
1Chronicles26:28 Bũmb nins fãa bãngd a Sãmwɛll ne a Kiis biig a Sayulli, la a Neer biig a Abneere, ne a Seruya biig a Zoaab sẽn dag n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n welg toorã, rag n yaa a Selomit ne a ba-biisã n dag n get b yelle." 
1Chronicles26:29 A Yitsaar buudã sʋka, rag n yaa a Kenaniya ne a kom-dibli wã la b rag n yãk tɩ b get Israyɛll nimbuiidã yɛl welgr yelle, la b leb n yaa seb-gʋlsdb ne bʋ-kaoodba." 
1Chronicles26:30 A Ebrõ buudã sʋka, yaa a Aazabiya ne a ba-biisã sẽn yaa gãndaadã la b rag n yãk tɩ b get Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã ne rĩmã tʋʋmd fãa yell Israyɛll pʋgẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, nin-taoor sẽnẽ, bãmb sõorã rag n yaa neb tusr la kobs-yopoe." 
1Chronicles26:31 A Ebrõ buudã sʋka, yaa a Yeriya n dag n yaa a roogã ne a buudã naabã. A Davɩɩd sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-naaslẽ, b maana vɛɛsgo, n yãnd tɩ gãndaad sẽn yaa a Yeriya buudã neb n dag n be Yazɛɛre, Galaad soolmẽ." 
1Chronicles26:32 Gãndaadã sẽn yaa a Yeriya ba-biisã sõor dag n yaa neb tus a yi la kobs-yopoe. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmba. Rĩm a Davɩɩd yãka bãmb tɩ b yaa Rubɛn ne Gaad la Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋkã taoor dãmba, tɩ b get Wẽnnaam yɛlã fãa ne rĩmã yɛl yelle." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ad Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmba, ne b tãb-biis tusr-tusr la b tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambse, ne b seb-gʋlsdbã sẽn dag n tʋmd rĩmã yĩnga, la b get sul toay-toayã sẽn let taab kiuug-kiuugã yell yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ wã sõore: Sull fãa yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:2 Pipi kiuugã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zabdiyɛll biig a Yasobeyam n get pipi sullã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:3 Yẽnda rag n yaa a Perɛts kom-dibli wã sʋk ned a yembre, la yẽnda n dag n yaa pipi kiuugã tãb-biisã nanambs fãa naaba." 
1Chronicles27:4 Kiuug a yiibẽ soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Akoka tẽng rao a Dodayi n dag n get sull a yiibẽ soabã yelle, la a Miklot n dag n yaa sullã naaba. A Dodayi sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:5 Kiuug a tãabẽ soabã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zehozada biig a Benaya sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã n dag n get sull a tãabẽ soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya-kãng dag n yaa gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋk ned a yembre, la yẽnda n dag n yaa b taoor soaba. Yẽnda biig a Amizabaad dag n bee sul-kãng pʋga." 
1Chronicles27:7 Kiuug a naasẽ soabã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zoaab ba-biig a Azayɛll n dag n get sull a naasẽ soabã yelle. Yẽnda biig a Zebadiya n wa n led yẽnda zĩigẽ. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:8 Kiuug a nu soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Yisrak tẽng rao a Samwut sẽn yaa naabã n dag n get sull a nu soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:9 Kiuug a yoob soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Tekoa tẽng rao a Ikɛɛs biig a Yira n dag n get sull a yoobẽ soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:10 Kiuug a yopoe soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Palon tẽng rao a Elɛts sẽn yaa Efrayiim yagensã sʋk ned a yembrã n dag n get sull a yopoe soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:11 Kiuug a nii soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Husa tẽng rao a Sibkayi sẽn yaa Zerak buudã ned a yembrã n dag get sull a nii soabã yelle. A Sibkayi sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:12 Kiuug a wɛ soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Anatot tẽng rao a Abiyezɛɛr sẽn yaa Benzame buudã ned a yembrã n dag n get sull a wɛ soabã yelle. A Abiyezɛɛr sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:13 Kiuug piig soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Netofa tẽng rao a Maharayi sẽn yaa Zerak buudã ned a yembrã n dag get sull piig soabã yelle. A Maharayi sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:14 Kiuug piig la a yembr soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Piraton tẽng rao a Benaya sẽn yaa Efrayiim yagensã sʋk ned a yembrã n dag n get sull piig la a yembr soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:15 Kiuug piig la a yiib soabã pʋgẽ, yaa Netofa tẽng rao a Ɛldayi sẽn yaa Otniyɛll buudã ned a yembrã n dag n get sull piig la a yiib soabã yelle. Yẽnda sullã neb sõor yaa raop tus pisi la a naase." 
1Chronicles27:16 Israyɛll buudã nanambs la woto: Rubɛn buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Zikri biig a Eliyezɛɛr n yaa b naaba. Sɩmyõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Maaka biig a Sefatiya." 
1Chronicles27:17 Leevi buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Kemuwɛll biig a Aazabiya n yaa b naaba. A Aarõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Sadok n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:18 Zʋʋda buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Eliyu sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd ba-biisã sʋk ned a yembrã n yaa b naaba. Yisakaar buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Misɛll biig a Omri n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:19 Zabulõ buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Abdyaas biig a Yismaya n yaa b naaba. Neftali buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Azriyɛll biig a Yerimot n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:20 Efrayiim buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Azaziya biig a Ooze n yaa b naaba. A Manaase buudã pʋɩ-sʋk a yembr pʋgẽ, yaa a Pedaya biig a Zowɛll n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:21 Manaase pʋɩ-sʋk ning sẽn dag n be Galaad pʋgẽ wã, yaa a Zakari biig a Yido n yaa b naaba. Benzame buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Abneer biig a Yaasɩyɛll n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:22 Dan buudã pʋgẽ, yaa a Yerokam biig a Azareyɛll n yaa b naaba. Nin-bãmbã fãa n yaa Israyɛll buudã nanambse." 
1Chronicles27:23 A Davɩɩd ka kɩt tɩ b sõd neb nins sẽn dag n tar yʋʋm pisi la sẽn yɩɩd woto wã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n yeelame tɩ b na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll buudã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg wa yĩngr ãdsã." 
1Chronicles27:24 A Seruya biig a Zoaab sɩnga nebã sõadga, la a ka baas ye. Sõadgã yĩng kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puug ne Israyɛll nebã. La b ka gʋls nimbuiidã sõor dĩm a Davɩɩd kibayã sebr pʋgẽ ye." 
1Chronicles27:25 A Adiyɛll biig a Azmavɛt n dag n get rĩmã kood bĩngr yelle. A Oozɩyaas biig a Zonatã n dag n get rĩmã koodã b sẽn bĩng pʋtẽ wã, tẽn-bɛdẽ wã, la tẽn-bãoonegẽ wã ne gãsdã pʋsẽ wã yelle." 
1Chronicles27:26 A Keluub biig a Ezri n dag n get tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn dag n be pʋtẽ wã n koodã yelle. 
1Chronicles27:27 Rama tẽng rao a Simeyi n dag n get reezẽ pʋtã yelle. Neb nins sẽn dag n be-b reezẽ pʋtẽ wã n get reezẽ rãamã bĩngr yellã, yaa a Sefam biig a Zabdi n dag n yaa b naaba." 
1Chronicles27:28 Gedɛɛr tẽng rao a Baall-Hanan n dag n get oliiv tɩɩsã ne wom-seesã sẽn be tẽngã nug-goabgã yelle. A Yoaas n dag n get kaamã bĩngr yelle. 
1Chronicles27:29 Saaron tẽng rao a Sitrayi n dag n get rũm-bɛdã wãbneg yell Saaron tẽnga. A Adlayi biig a Safat n dag n get rũm-bɛdã wãbneg yell tãn-londẽ wã. 
1Chronicles27:30 Ismayɛll buudã ned a Obill n dag n get yʋgma wã yelle. Meronot tẽng rao a Yekdeya n dag n get bõensã yelle. 
1Chronicles27:31 Hagaar buudã ned a Yaziiz n dag n get rũm-bãoonegã yelle. Yaa nin-bãmbã fãa n dag get rĩm a Davɩɩd laogã yelle. 
1Chronicles27:32 A Davɩɩd yɛsb a Zonatã rag n yaa sagenda. A Zonatã rag n yaa ned sẽn tar bãngre, la a rag n yaa gʋlsda. A Hakmoni biig a Yekiyɛll n dag n get rĩmã kamb yelle."
