1Chronicles27:33 A Ayitofɛll n dag n yaa rĩmã sagenda. Ark tẽng rao a Usayi rag n yaa rĩmã zoa. 
1Chronicles27:34 A Ayitofɛll loogr zugẽ, yaa a Benaya biig a Yoyada ne a Abiyataar n led yẽnda zĩigẽ. A Zoaab n dag n yaa rĩmã tãb-biis naaba." 
1Chronicles28:1 A Davɩɩd tigma Israyɛll nanambsã fãa Zeruzalɛm: yaa buudã kãsem-dãmba, ne sulã nanambs nins fãa sẽn dag n tʋmd rĩmã yĩngã, la tãb-biis tusr-tusr ne tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã, n paas neb nins sẽn dag n get rĩmã laog fãa ne rĩmã rũmsã la a kom-dibli wã yellã, la a zakã zu-soben-dãmbã ne gãndaadã ne gãnda-sãeemsã fãa gilli." 
1Chronicles28:2 Rĩm a Davɩɩd yik n yalsame yeele: «M saam-biis la m nebã, kelg-y-yã! Mam dag n data ne m sũur fãa, n me roog sẽn yaa vʋʋsg zĩig Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã yĩnga, tɩ yɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã nao roagendga, la m dag n segendame n na n me-a." 
1Chronicles28:3 La Wẽnnaam yeela maam yaa: ‹Ka na n yɩ foom n na n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩng ye. Bala, fo yaa ned sẽn zab zaba, la fo raaga zɩɩm wʋsgo.›" 
1Chronicles28:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yãka maam m buudã fãa sʋka, tɩ m tõe n yɩ Israyɛll rĩm wakat fãa yĩnga. Bala, bãmb yãka a Zʋʋda t'a yaa naaba, la b yãka maam Zʋʋda buudã sʋka. La mam ba wã kom-dibli sʋka, taa bãmb yam tɩ b yãk maam tɩ m yɩ Israyɛll nebã fãa rĩmã." 
1Chronicles28:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam kom-dibli wʋsgo, la bãmb fãa sʋka, yaa mam biig a Salmo la b yãk t'a na n zĩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab soolmã zaoorẽ, n yɩ Israyɛll rĩmã." 
1Chronicles28:6 Bãmb yeela maam yaa: ‹Yaa fo biig a Salmo n na n me m doogã ne m zagsã. Bala, mam yãka yẽnda t'a na n yɩ m biiga, la mam na n yɩɩ yẽnda ba." 
1Chronicles28:7 Yẽnda sã n kell n sak mam tõodã ne m noyã wa a sẽn maand rũndã wã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda naamã tall pãng wakat fãa yĩnga.› »" 
1Chronicles28:8 Moasã, Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã taoore, la tõnd Wẽnnaamã taoore, bɩ y sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã tõod fãa. Woto, yãmb na n sooga tẽn-kãngã sẽn yaa tẽn-noogã, la a na n yɩɩ yãmb yagensã sẽn na n wa led yãmb zĩigẽ wã pʋɩɩre, wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
1Chronicles28:9 La foom m biig a Salmo, bɩ f bao tɩ bãng f ba wã Wẽnnaam. Maan bãmb tʋʋmdã ne f sũur fãa zãnga, maan-a ne yamleoogo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab feesda ned kam fãa sũuri, la a tagsgo. Fo sã n bao bãmba, b na n basame tɩ f yã bãmba. La fo sã n bas bãmba, bãmb me na n basa foom wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
1Chronicles28:10 Gese, moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka foom, tɩ f tõe n me roog sẽn yaa zĩ-sõngo. Paam daood n tʋme." 
1Chronicles28:11 A Davɩɩd rɩka yɩng roogã ne a meng rotã naande, la laogã bĩngr dot ne yĩngr do-gãasã, la pʋgẽ dotã ne yel-wẽnã sugr kũun doogã naande, n kõ a biig a Salmo." 
1Chronicles28:12 A kõ-a-la bũmb nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã meebã naande, ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab laogã la teed nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã bĩngr dotã naand me." 
1Chronicles28:13 A Davɩɩd leb n kõ a Salmo maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã sõor sebre, la tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn tog n maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, ne teed nins fãa b sẽn tog n tall n tʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã fãa." 
1Chronicles28:14 A Davɩɩd wilga a Salmo sãnemã sẽn sekd teed nins fãa sẽn tog n maan ne sãnemã zɩslem, la wanzuri wã sẽn sekd teed nins fãa sẽn tog n maan ne wanzuri wã zɩslem me." 
1Chronicles28:15 A leb n wilga a Salmo sãnem fɩtl dogendsã ne b sãnem fɩtl-dãmbã zɩslem sẽn tog n yɩ to-to, la a wilg fɩtl doagendg fãa ne a fɩtl-dãmbã zɩslem sẽn tog n yɩ to-to. A leb n wilg-a-la wanzuri fɩtl dogendsã ne b wanzuri fɩtl-dãmbã zɩslem sẽn tog n yɩ to-to me, la a wilg fɩtl doagendg fãa ne a fɩtl-dãmbã zɩslem sẽn tog n yɩ to-to, wa sẽn zems fɩtl doagendg fãa ne a tʋʋmde." 
1Chronicles28:16 A Davɩɩd wilga a Salmo sãnemã b sẽn na n tall n maan kaset burã taabl-dãmbã zɩslem, la wanzuri wã b sẽn na n tall n maan wanzuri taabl-dãmbã zɩslem," 
1Chronicles28:17 la sãnem halaalã b sẽn na n tall n maan nemd kõsdsã, ne zɩɩm mesb laasã la lagdã, ne sãnem la wanzuri sĩmsã zɩslem," 
1Chronicles28:18 n paas sãnem halaalã b sẽn na n tall n maan wisdã tẽn-kugrã zɩslem. A kõ-a-la saarã ne sãnem serubẽ-rãmbã sẽn tẽeg b pɩgsã n lud Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglgã naand sẽn tog n yɩ to-to. 
1Chronicles28:19 A Davɩɩd yeelame yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n gʋls ne b nugu, n bilg maam bõn-kãensã fãa, la m sẽn tog n maan bũmb fãa wa sẽn zems a naande.»" 
1Chronicles28:20 A Davɩɩd yeela a Salmo yaa: «M biiga, keng f meng n paam daood n tʋme. Ra zoe rabeem ye, ra yɛɛs ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã na n zĩnda ne foom. Bãmb ka na n zãag b meng ne foom, bãmb ka na n bas foom, hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã meeb tʋʋmd fãa wa sɛ." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ade, maan-kʋʋdbã ne b sula, la Leevi buudã ne b sul sẽn na n maand tʋʋmã buud fãa Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgã la woto. Roogã meeb tʋʋmd fãa yĩnga, tʋʋm-mitb sẽn kõ b meng ne yamleoog tʋʋmã buud toay-toayã yĩngã na n bee fo sɛɛgẽ. Nanambsã ne nebã fãa me bee ka n na n maan bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn na n yeel-b tɩ b maane.»" 
1Chronicles29:1 Rĩm a Davɩɩd yeela zãma wã fãa yaa: Yaa mam biig a Salmo a yembr bal la Wẽnnaam yãk yã, la a yaa bi-bilfu, n nan ka mi bũmb ye. Tʋʋmdã yaool n yaa kãsenga. Bala, ro-bed-kẽen-kãngã ka ninsaal doog ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogo." 
1Chronicles29:2 Mam segla m Wẽnnaamã roog meeb ne m pãngã fãa. Mam segla sãnem, sãnem teedã fãa yĩnga, ne wanzuri, wanzuri teedã fãa yĩnga, la zũudu, zũud teedã fãa yĩnga, ne bãense, bãens teedã fãa yĩnga, la onigs kug-neeb ne kug-sẽgdɩ, la kug-pɩndse, ne kug sẽn tar kõbg buud toor-toore, la kug-sõama buud fãa ne kug-pɛɛl wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles29:3 Sẽn paase, mam sũurã sẽn loe ne m Wẽnnaamã roogã yĩnga, mam dɩkda m meng paoong sẽn yaa sãnem ne wanzuri, n na n paas bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn segl zĩ-sõngã yĩngã, n kõt m Wẽnnaamã roog yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:4 Yaa ofɩɩr sãnem toan koabga, ne wanzuri halaal toan kobessi la pis-naase, sẽn na n tall n bol Wẽnnaam doogã lalse," 
1Chronicles29:5 sãnem, sãnem teedã yĩnga, ne wanzuri, wanzuri teedã yĩnga, la ne tʋʋm nins fãa tʋʋm-mitbã sẽn na n maanã yĩnga. Moasã, ãnda yãmb sʋkã n na n yãk a sãnem ne a wanzuri n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yamleoog rũndã?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Dẽ, buudã kãsem-dãmba, ne Israyɛll buudã nanambse, la tãb-biis tusr-tusr ne tãb-biis koabg-koabg nanambsã, n paas ne rĩmã tʋʋmã taoor dãmb yãka yam, n na n kõ kũun ne yamleoogo." 
1Chronicles29:7 Bãmb kõo sãnem talã-rãmb tus a nu, sãnem wakɩ-koeems tus piiga, wanzuri talã-rãmb tus piiga, zũud talã-rãmb tus piig la a nii, ne kut talã-rãmb tus koabga, Wẽnd doogã tʋʋm yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:8 Neb nins sẽn dag n tar kug-sõama wã tallame n wa kɩs Gersom buudã ned a Yekiyɛlle, t'a ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles29:9 Nebã maana sũ-noog ne kũun nins b sẽn tall n wa ne yamleoogã, bala, yaa ne b sũyã fãa la b sak ne yamleoog n tall n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Rĩm a Davɩɩd me sũurã yɩɩ noog hal wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Dẽ, a Davɩɩd pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãma wã fãa taoor n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd yaab a Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, reeg-y pẽgr zamaan woo zamaane!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Yãmb yaa kãsenga, y tara pãnga, y tara naam la ziiri, la neerlem yaa yãmb n so. Bala, bũmb nins fãa sẽn be yĩngr la tẽngã yaa yãmb n so. Yãmb n so naam, la y so bũmb fãa." 
1Chronicles29:12 Arzɛk la ziir yita yãmb nengẽ, la y yaa bũmb fãa soaala. Yãmb tara pãnga, n tõe tɩ ned lebg kãsenga, la y kõ-a pãnga." 
1Chronicles29:13 Moasã, tõnd Wẽnnaam, tõnd pʋʋsda yãmb barka, la d balemda yãmb yʋʋrã sẽn tar ziirã." 
1Chronicles29:14 Mam yaa ãnda, la mam nebã yaa ãnda rãmba, tɩ tõnd tõe n kõ kũun a woto ne yamleoogo? Bũmb fãa yita yãmb nengẽ, la bũmb nins tõnd sẽn kõt yãmbã fãa yaa yãmb n kõ tõndo." 
1Chronicles29:15 Tõnd yaa sãamb la nin-loogds yãmb taoore, wa d yaab-rãmbã fãa. Tõnd vɩɩmã dũniyã zug ka yaa wa sulunsuku, tɩ tẽeb kaẽ ye." 
1Chronicles29:16 Tõnd Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, arzɛg-kãensã fãa tõnd sẽn segl n na n me roog yãmb yĩnga, la y yʋ-sõngã yĩngã yita yãmb nengẽ. Bũmb fãa yaa yãmb n so." 
1Chronicles29:17 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam miime tɩ yãmb feesda sũyã, la y nonga tɩrlem. Mam kõo yãmb yamleoog kũun-kãensã fãa ne sũur sẽn yaa tɩrga, la yaa ne sũ-noog la mam get yãmb nebã sẽn be ka wã sẽn wa ne kũun n kõt yãmb ne yamleoogã." 
1Chronicles29:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd yaab-rãmb a Abrahaam ne a Izak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kɩt tɩ tagsg a woto kell n zĩnd y nebã sũy pʋse, tɩ b yam kẽ yãmba." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kõ-y mam biig a Salmo sũur sẽn pid ne ratem, t'a tõe n sak yãmb tõodã ne y zãmsgã la y noyã, la a rɩk b fãa n ning b nao-kẽndr zugu, n tõog n me roog ning mam sẽn segl bũmb fãa a yĩngã.»" 
1Chronicles29:20 A Davɩɩd yeela zãma wã fãa yaa: «M kot-y lame tɩ y pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã!» Dẽ, nebã fãa pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã. Bãmb wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la rĩmã taoore." 
1Chronicles29:21 Vẽkembeoogo, Israyɛll nebã maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb kʋʋ lols tusri, ne pe-raad tusri, la pe-bi tusri, ne b bõn-yũudl kũunã, la maand wʋsg n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:22 Badaare, bãmb dɩɩme la b yũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n maan sũ-noogo, la b moon naoor a yiibẽ soab n yeele, t'a Davɩɩd biig a Salmo yaa rĩmã. B pʋdga a Salmo zug rĩung kaam, t'a lebg naab Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b pʋdg a Sadok me zug kaam t'a lebg maan-kʋʋda." 
1Chronicles29:23 A Salmo zaoonda Sẽn-Ka-Saab zaoorẽ wã, n na n led a ba a Davɩɩd zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã. A paama tõogr wʋsgo, la Israyɛll nebã fãa rag n kelgd-a lame." 
1Chronicles29:24 Nanambsã fãa ne gãndaadã, la baa ne rĩm a Davɩɩd kom-dibli a taabã fãa sulga b mens rĩm a Salmo taoore." 
1Chronicles29:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽka a Salmo, n kɩt t'a lebg nin-kãseng Israyɛll nebã fãa nifẽ. Bãmb kɩtame t'a Salmo naamã tall ziir n yɩɩd Israyɛll rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn deng yẽnda wã." 
1Chronicles29:26 A Izayi biig a Davɩɩd rɩɩ naam Israyɛll tõrã fãa zugu. 
1Chronicles29:27 Yẽnda sẽn dɩ naamã Israyɛllã yɩɩ yʋʋm pis-naase: Ebrõ yʋʋm a yopoe, Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm pis-tã la a tãabo." 
1Chronicles29:28 Yẽnda paama sũ-noog a kʋʋlem wakate, n yaool n ki. Yẽnda rag n kʋʋla wʋsgo, n tar arzegs ne ziiri. La yẽnda biig a Salmo n led a zĩigẽ n lebg rĩmã." 
1Chronicles29:29 Rĩm a Davɩɩd kibarã sɩngrã ne a baoosgã fãa gʋlsa bãngd a Sãmwɛll kibarã sebr pʋga, ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã kibarã sebr pʋga, n paas yãt a Gaad kibarã sebr pʋga." 
1Chronicles29:30 Seb-kãens leb n wilgda a Davɩɩd rĩungã fãa ne a gãndaalmã tʋʋmã, la bũmb nins fãa a sẽn maan Israyɛll pʋgẽ, wall tẽmsã soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles1:1 A Davɩɩd biig a Salmo naamã paama pãng hal wʋsgo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã rag n bee ne yẽnda, n kɩt t'a lebg kãsenga." 
2Chronicles1:2 A Salmo goma ne Israyɛll zãmã wã fãa, la neb tusr-tusri, ne neb koabg-koabg nanambsã, la bʋ-kaoodbã, ne Israyɛll kombɛɛmbã fãa, la zak soben-dãmbã." 
2Chronicles1:3 A Salmo ne Israyɛll zãma wã kẽnga pʋʋsgã zĩig sẽn be Gabawõ wã, bala, yaa beenẽ la b ra tilg fu-roog ning Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n maan we-raoogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles1:4 La kãabg koglgã rag n ka be beenẽ ye. Bala, a Davɩɩd rag n yiis-a-la Kiryat Yeyarim n kẽng n tɩ ning-a fu-roog ning yẽnda sẽn da tilg Zeruzalɛmã pʋga." 
2Chronicles1:5 La sã n yaa ne zũud tẽn-kugr ninga a Ʋʋr biig a Uuri biig a Bɛtsalɛll sẽn dag n maanã, b rag n ning-a-la Sẽn-Ka-Saab fu-roogã sẽn be Gabawõ wã noore. Yaa be la a Salmo ne zãmã nins sẽn be ne-a wã, wa n na waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Chronicles1:6 La a Salmo kẽnga zũud tẽn-kugrã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab fu-roogã noorã, n kʋ maand sẽn yõogd bugum tusri." 
2Chronicles1:7 La badaar yʋngo, Wẽnnaam vẽnega b meng ne a Salmo n yeel-a: «Kos maam bũmb ning fãa fo sẽn date, tɩ m na maaname n kõ-fo.»" 
2Chronicles1:8 La a Salmo yeela Wẽnnaam yaa: «Yãmb wilga nonglem kãseng ne m ba a Davɩɩde, la yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam deeg bãmb zĩig n dɩt naamã." 
2Chronicles1:9 La moasã, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ gomd ning yãmb sẽn da gom ne m ba a Davɩɩdã paam pidsgu, bala, yãmb yãka maam tɩ m na n dɩ naam buud sẽn yaa wʋsg wa tẽng tom zugu." 
2Chronicles1:10 Dẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ y kõ maam yam, la bãngre, tɩ m tõog n lʋɩ y zãmã taoor n zã-ba! Bala, ãnda soab n tõe n zã y zãmã sẽn yaa wʋsg woto fãa wã?»" 
2Chronicles1:11 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam yeela a Salmo yaa: «Fo ratmã sẽn yaa woto, tɩ fo ka kos arzegs bɩ paoongo, wa waoogr bɩ f bɛɛbã kũumã, la f ka kos maam baa ne yõ-wokã, la f kot maam yam, la bãngr n na n tõog n zã mam nebã m sẽn kɩt tɩ f rɩt naam b zugã yĩnga," 
2Chronicles1:12 mam na n kõ foom yam, la bãngre. La sẽn paase, m na n kõ-f-la arzegs ne paoong la waoogre, wa rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn deng foomã n zĩndã sẽn zɩ n paame, la sẽn na n wa zĩnd-b fo loogr poorã sẽn kõ tol n paame.»" 
2Chronicles1:13 Dẽ poore, a Salmo yii sɛkã roog zĩig sẽn be Gabawõ wã n leb Zeruzalɛm. La yẽnda dɩɩ naam Israyɛlle." 
2Chronicles1:14 Rĩm a Salmo tigma saar-dãmb ne wed-moos wʋsgo. Yẽnda rag n tara saar-dãmb tusr la kobs-naase, la wed-rʋʋdb tus piig la a yiibu. Rĩm a Salmo yãka tẽms tɩ yaa a saar-dãmbã ne wiidã bĩngr zĩiga, la a ning kẽer Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ n pẽneg a menga." 
2Chronicles1:15 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ wanzuri wã lebg wʋsg wa kug Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, la a kɩt tɩ sɛɛdr tɩɩsã raad lebg wʋsg wa wom-seesã sẽn be kunkubã zutã." 
2Chronicles1:16 Rĩm a Salmo rag n tara toandb tɩ b tũud taab sull-sull n kẽnd Ezɩpte, ne Keeve tẽng n daad wed-moos n watẽ. Rĩmã toandbã rag n daad-b-la Keeve tẽng wa b ligdã sẽn zem to-to wã." 
2Chronicles1:17 Saar a yembr ligd yaa wanzuri kɩlo a nu la pʋɩ-sʋka, la weef a yembr ligd yaa wanzuri kɩlo a yiib la pʋɩ-sʋka. Rĩmã toandb rag n wata ne wed-moos me, n koosd ne Hɛt la Siiri rĩm-dãmbã." 
2Chronicles1:18 A Salmo yeelame tɩ b me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b me na-yir yẽnda mengã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles2:1 A Salmo yãka raop tus pis-yopoe sẽn na n yɩ zɩ-zɩtba, la neb tus pis-nii sẽn na n peesd kugã tãmsã zutu, la neb tus a tã, la kobs-yoobe sẽn na n getẽ tʋmtʋmdbã yelle." 
2Chronicles2:2 Dẽ zugẽ, a Salmo tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Tɩɩr naaba a Huram yaa: «Yãmb da maana m ba Davɩɩd neer n kõ-a sɛɛdr tɩɩs t'a me a yiri. Bɩ y maan a woto me n kõ maam." 
2Chronicles2:3 Bala, mam dat n mee roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩng n kõ-ba. Tɩ b tõe n yõogd tɩdar bãmb taoore, la tɩ b tõe n dɩgend kaset burã bãmb taoor wakat fãa, la b maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum bãmb taoor yibeoog ne zaabre, la vʋʋsg rayã, ne ki-paalã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigã wakat wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn tog n maanã." 
2Chronicles2:4 Roog ning mam sẽn na n me wã tog n yɩɩ kãsenga, bala, tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa kãseng n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
2Chronicles2:5 Sɩdã, ned ka tõe n me roog n kõ bãmb ye. Bala, saasã ne a yalmã ka tõe n deeg bãmb ye. Dẽ, mam yaa ãnda n tõe n me roog bãmb yĩnga? Mam sẽn dat bal yaa tɩ m me zĩig sẽn na yõogd tɩdar bãmb taoore." 
2Chronicles2:6 Moasã, bɩ f tʋm ned sẽn yaa tʋʋm-mit t'a wa m nengẽ, ned sẽn mi sãnem, la wanzuri, la zũudu, ne kutu tʋʋmde, ned sẽn tõe n wʋg pɛɛl n gʋl miuudu, ne moaama, la kẽeg haoo, la sẽn mi gʋlb sõama, t'a tõe n wa tʋm ne neb nins m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn da yãk tɩ b yaa tʋʋm-mit n be ne maam Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm ka wã." 
2Chronicles2:7 Bɩ y tʋm sɛɛdr tɩɩsã sẽn be Libã tãmsã zutã raado, ne sɩprɛse, la Sãntall raado. Bala, mam miime tɩ fo tʋmtʋmdbã mii Libã tɩɩsã kɛɛbo. La ade, mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n wa naaga fo tʋmtʋmdbã." 
2Chronicles2:8 Bɩ b segl daad wʋsgo, bala, roog ning m sẽn na n me wã na n yɩɩ kãseng la neer wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles2:9 Mam na n kõ yãmb tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn na n kɛ b raadã ki yond tus-pisi la baning yond tus-pisi, la reezẽ rãam yʋy tus-pisi, ne kaam dʋgd tus-pisi.»" 
2Chronicles2:10 Dẽ, Tɩɩr dĩmã, a Huram, gʋlsame n leok a Salmo n yeel-a yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong bãmb nebã yĩng la b sẽn kɩt tɩ fo lebg b naabã.»" 
2Chronicles2:11 La a Huram leb n yeelame yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn naan yĩngr la tẽngã paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn kõ a Davɩɩde, biig sẽn tar yam la yẽesem ne bãngre, sẽn na n me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, la a me a na-yir a menga yĩngã." 
2Chronicles2:12 Ade, mam tʋmda ned sẽn yaa tʋʋm-mita, la sẽn tar bãngr sõama f nengẽ," 
2Chronicles2:13 yaa a Huram-Abi, yẽnda ma wã yaa Dan buudã bi-pugla, t'a ba wã yaa tɩɩr neda, yẽnda mii sãnem, wanzuri, zũudu, kutu, kuga, la raad tʋʋmde. La a mi gar buud toor-toor losbo, sã n yaa moaama, miidu, bɩ kẽeg haoo, la ne tʋʋmd ning fãa fo sẽn na n kõ-a t'a maan ne fo tʋʋm-mitbã, la ne f ba a Davɩɩd tʋʋm-mitbã. Sã n yaa ne wʋgb ne gĩs-bãanega, la gʋlb buud toor-toore, la teed buud fãa naanego yẽnda mi-b-la sõama." 
2Chronicles2:14 Moasã, m soaala, mam kot-y lame tɩ y tʋm koodã, ne kaamã, la rãamã y sẽn kãabã." 
2Chronicles2:15 La tõnd na n dʋʋ Libã tãmsã zut n kɛ tɩɩsã y sẽn datã tɛka. La d na n sẽb-b-la kil-kil n ning koomẽ wã n dugs n tãag Zafa, dẽ, yãmb na yaool n tall-b n kẽng Zeruzalɛm.»" 
2Chronicles2:16 A Salmo sõda sãamb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ wã, yẽnda ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n sõdã, la b mikame tɩ yaa neb tus-koabg la pis-nu la a tãab la kobs-yoobe." 
2Chronicles2:17 Dẽ, yẽnda yãka neb tus-pis-yopoe, tɩ b na n yɩ kug-zɩtba, la neb tus-pis-nii, sẽn na n peesd kugã tãmsã zutu, la neb tus a tã la kobs yoob sẽn na n get nebã n kɩt tɩ b tʋʋmdẽ." 
2Chronicles3:1 A Salmo sɩnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã meeb Zeruzalɛm, Moriiza tãngã zugu, Zebu raoa a Orma zɛɛgẽ wã, zĩig ning yẽnda ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n seglã. Yaa zĩ-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab Malɛɛkã sẽn da vẽneg a meng ne a Davɩɩde." 
2Chronicles3:2 La yaa a Salmo sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, kiuug a yiib soabã rasem a yiib daar la a sɩng roogã meebo." 
2Chronicles3:3 Ad a Salmo sẽn yẽbg Wẽnnaam doogã to-to: A woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi wa pĩnd dãmbã kãntɩ-makdgã 
2Chronicles3:4 La a ro-pʋg ning sẽn be-a noorẽ wã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, n zems wa roogã yalmã, la zãntlmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg koabg la pisi. A Salmo bolga roogã pʋg fãa ne sãnem halaale." 
2Chronicles3:5 La yẽnda rag n luda ro-bedrã pʋg zãng ne oliiv tɩɩs raado, n bolg-a ne sãnem halaale, n ning koms vãad la yãmd roogã lalg zugu." 
2Chronicles3:6 La yẽnda nagsa roogã ne kug-neeb buud toor-toore, la sãnemã rag n yita parvayim tẽngã." 
2Chronicles3:7 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b bolg roogã, ne a ra-lugdsã, la rigno-kogsã, ne lalsã, la rignoorã kʋɩlemsã ne sãnem. La a kɩtame tɩ b gʋl serubẽ rãmb lalsã zutu." 
2Chronicles3:8 La roogã pʋgẽ, yẽnda maana zĩig sẽn yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa, t'a woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pisi wa sẽn zems roogã yalmã, t'a yalmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pisi. La b bolga roogã pʋg gill fãa ne sãnem halaal talã tus-pisi." 
2Chronicles3:9 La sãnemã kaads nins b sẽn tall n ka roogã zɩslem rag n taa kɩlo pʋɩ-sʋka, la yẽnda bolga yɩng ro-pʋsã fãa me ne sãnem." 
2Chronicles3:10 La yẽnda maana serubẽ-rãmb a yiib n bolg b zãng ne sãnem n ning zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ 
2Chronicles3:11 Serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgs fãa woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pisi. Pipi soabã pɩgsr woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg a nu wã rag n sɩɩsda roogã lalga, tɩ pɩgsr a yembrã me woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg a nu wã sɩɩsd serubẽ a yembrã pɩgsre." 
2Chronicles3:12 La serubẽ fãa rag n tara pɩgs a yiib sẽn tẽege, tɩ pɩgsr fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, pɩgsr a yembr n dag n sɩɩs roogã lalga, t'a yembrã sɩɩsd serubẽ a to wã pɩgsre." 
2Chronicles3:13 La bãmb b yiibã fãa pɩgsã sẽn tẽegã woglem rag n taa kãntɩɩg pisi. Serubẽ-rãmbã rag n yasa yĩngr tɩ b nensã wẽnemd n get roogã sẽnẽ. 
2Chronicles3:14 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b wʋg fu-lillidgã ne gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la gĩs moaama, ne gĩs miuudu, la lamd gĩs-bãanega, n kãd serubẽ-rãmb a zugu." 
2Chronicles3:15 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b lugl da-lugds a yiib roogã noore, la ra-lugdg fãa woglem rag n taa kãntɩɩg pis-tã la nu, la pugli wã sẽn dag n be ra-lugdsã zutã, a yembr fãa rag n taa kãntɩɩg a nu." 
2Chronicles3:16 La a kɩt tɩ b maan kut yãmd n ning ra-lugdsã zutu. La a kɩt tɩ b maan gernaad biis koabg n ning yãmdã zutu. 
2Chronicles3:17 Yẽnda lugla ra-lugds a yiibã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noore, a yembr dɩtgo a yembr goabga. La yẽnda pʋda rɩtg soabã tɩ Yakĩn, la a pʋd goabg soabã tɩ Boaaze." 
2Chronicles4:1 Yẽnda maana tẽn-kugr ne zũudu, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a yalmã me yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg piiga." 
2Chronicles4:2 Yẽnda maana sĩn-bedr ne zũudu, t'a noorã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg piiga, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, la a sẽn gilg n sogã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã." 
2Chronicles4:3 La sĩngã no-koakã tẽngr sẽn gilgã fãa, b rag n gʋla lols naanã n gilgi, b rag n yaa rulg a yiibu, la kãntɩɩg fãa yaa lols piiga. B rag n naaga bãmb ne sĩng n yag tɩ yaa bũmb a yembre" 
2Chronicles4:4 La sĩngã rag n doga zũud lols piig la a yiib zugu. Lols a tãab nems n wẽnemd n tees goabga, t'a tãab tees yaanga, t'a tãab tees rɩtgo, t'a tãab tees nin-taoore. Sĩngã rag n doga bãmb zugu. La b mensã zãng rag n bee sĩngã tẽngre." 
2Chronicles4:5 La sĩngã taglmã rag n taa nug-yakemd pʋɩ-sʋka. La b rag n maana a noorã tɩ wẽnd wũmbl noore, n yaa wa tɩ-puudu. A rag n tõe n deega sẽn kolg ko-yʋy tus a yiibu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Yẽnda leb n maana sĩm-bi piiga. La yẽnda ninga a nu goabga, la a ning a nu rɩtgo, tɩ b pegsd rũms nins b sẽn kõ tɩ yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã yĩnga. La sĩn-bedrã rag n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã mens yɩlgr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles4:7 Yẽnda maana sãnem fɩtl dogends piig wa sẽn zems nao-tũudrã. La yẽnda ning-b-la Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ, a nu rɩtgo, a nu goabga." 
2Chronicles4:8 Yẽnda maana taabl-dãmb piig n ning bãmb me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ, a nu rɩtgo a nu goabga. La a maan sãnem la-bãooneg koabga." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yẽnda maana zak maan-kʋʋdbã yĩnga, la zak a to sẽn yaa kãseng n ning zag-noorã kʋɩlems n bolg ne zũudu." 
2Chronicles4:10 La b rɩka sĩn-bedrã n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã nug-rɩtg sẽn lebd yaang sẽnẽ. 
2Chronicles4:11 A Huram maana tompeglem laase, kardo, la la-bãoonego. Yɩɩ woto, la Huram maan bũmb nins fãa a Salmo sẽn dag n kos yẽnda t'a maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã n sɛ." 
2Chronicles4:12 Yaa kut ra-lugd-bɛd a yiibã, ne kut pugli a yiibã sẽn dog ra-lugdsã zutã, n paas kut gãmba a yiibã sẽn ning pugli wã sẽn be ra-lugdsã zutã," 
2Chronicles4:13 ne gernaad biis bãmb kobs-naasã sẽn ning gãmba wã sẽn be pugli a yiibã zut rulg a yiib-yiibã," 
2Chronicles4:14 n paas sĩn-bi piigã ne b rogendsã," 
2Chronicles4:15 la sĩn-bedr a yembrã ne a niig piig la a yiibã sẽn be a tẽngrã," 
2Chronicles4:16 ne tompeglmã laasã, la pɛll-dãmba, la kõsdsã sẽn tar n yaasd nemdã. Teed nins fãa a Salmo sẽn kɩt t'a Huram-Abiib maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã, rag n yaa ne zũud sẽn pɩnda." 
2Chronicles4:17 Yaa Zʋrdẽ tãn-longã sẽn be Sukot ne Seredata tẽngã sʋk yagd pʋgẽ, la rĩm a Salmo kɩt tɩ b maan bõn-kãensã fãa." 
2Chronicles4:18 Teedã a Salmo sẽn kɩt tɩ b maana rag n yaa wʋsg hal tɩ b rag n ka tõe n geelg zũudã zɩslem n bãng ye. 
2Chronicles4:19 La a Salmo leb n maana Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgẽ teedã fãa: Yaa sãnem tẽn-kugrã, la taabl nins b sẽn dogend kaset burã," 
2Chronicles4:20 la a maan fɩtl-dogendsã ne a fɩtl-dãmbã sẽn tog n wid zĩ-sõngã noorã ne sãnem halaale. 
2Chronicles4:21 La fɩtl dogendsã tɩ-puudã, ne fɩtl-dãmbã, la yɩʋʋdã ne sãnem halaale." 
2Chronicles4:22 La sʋʋsã, ne la-bãoonegã, la ko-teesã, la wisdã laas ne sãnem halaale. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã dignoyã sẽn tees zĩ-sõngã, ne a kʋɩlemsã, la ro-kãsengã noor kʋɩlemsã me ne sãnem." 
2Chronicles5:1 A Salmo sẽn maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmd fãa n sɛ, a kɩtame tɩ b tall teed nins fãa a ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, n wa ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ. Yaa wanzuri, sãnem, la teed a taabã fãa." 
2Chronicles5:2 A Salmo tigma Israyɛll Kãsem-dãmbã, ne Israyɛll buudã fãa nanambse, la zak sob-n-dãmbã fãa Zeruzalɛm, n kos-b tɩ b tɩ tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab kãabg koglgã a Davɩɩd tẽngã sẽn yaa Sɩyõ wã pʋgẽ n wa." 
2Chronicles5:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll zãma wã fãa tigma taab rĩm a Salmo nengẽ Zeruzalɛm, kiuug a yopoe soabã tigr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles5:4 Kãsem-dãmbã fãa wa n yãaga Leevi nebã tɩ b tɩ tʋk kaoolã koglgo. 
2Chronicles5:5 Bãmb rɩka kaoolã koglgã ne sɛkã fu-roogã, la teed nins fãa sẽn welg toorã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã n tall n wa." 
2Chronicles5:6 Rĩm a Salmo ne Israyɛll nebã b sẽn bool tɩ b wa bãmb nengẽ wã rag n yasa yĩngr kaoolã koglgã taoore. La b maana rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛd maoongo. La rũmsã yɩɩ wʋsg hal tɩ ned ka tõe n sõde, wall bãng b sõor ye." 
2Chronicles5:7 Dẽ zugẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg n tɩ ning zĩig ning b sẽn dag n maneg a yĩngã. Yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã pʋgẽ, serubẽ-rãmb a yiibã pɩgs tẽngre." 
2Chronicles5:8 Serubẽ rãmbã rag n tẽega b pɩgsã koglgã sẽn beẽ wã. Bãmb dag n yɛdga b pɩgsã n lud koglgã ne a ra-tuiidsã. 
2Chronicles5:9 La a ra-tuiidsã rag n yaa wogdo, tɩ ned sã n be zĩ-sõng n yɩɩdã noore, bɩ a tõe n yãnd-b zutã, la ned ka tõe n zĩnd yɩng n yãnd-b ye. La koglgã keta beenẽ hal tɩ ta rũndã" 
2Chronicles5:10 Bũmb dag n ka be koglgã pʋgẽ, sã n ka kug-wals a yiibã, la yaa a Moyiis n dag n sagl-b beenẽ wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa yi Ezɩpt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan kaool ne bãmb Orɛɛb tãngã zugã." 
2Chronicles5:11 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã lebg n yii zõngã pʋgẽ. La maan-kʋʋdbã fãa sẽn dag n be-b be wã ra yɩlga b mense." 
2Chronicles5:12 La Leevi neb nins sẽn yaa yʋʋmbã, a Azafe, a Eman, ne a Yedutun, la b kambã, ne b saam-biisã fãa dag n yera fu-peelse. Bãmb dag n yasa tẽn-kugrã yaang n zãad kɛma, kʋla, la pendse. La maan-kʋʋdb koabg la pisi sẽn mi tãntãad peebg n dag n yeg bãmba." 
2Chronicles5:13 Dẽ, tãntãn-pɛɛbdbã ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã naaga taab n na n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b waoog-b n yeele: «Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, bãmb yaa sõama, la bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa.» La tãntãadã ne kɛmã, la yʋʋm teedã fãa rag n naagame n yɩɩndẽ. La wakat-kãng bala, sawad-taok n wa n sig n pid Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
2Chronicles5:14 Sawadgã ra pida Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tɩ maan-kʋʋdba ra ka leb n tõe n leb n dɩk b tʋʋmã ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã ra pida roogã." 
2Chronicles6:1 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yeelame tɩ y rat n zĩnda zĩ-libsgẽ." 
2Chronicles6:2 La mam me roog sẽn tar ziir n na n kõ yãmba. Tɩ yãmb tõe n zĩnd be wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.» 
2Chronicles6:3 Israyɛll zãma wã fãa rag n yasa yĩngri, la rĩm a Salmo wẽnemdame n tees-b n ning-b barka." 
2Chronicles6:4 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo yeelame: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr paam waoogre. Bala, bãmb nug n pids kãabg ning bãmb noor sẽn dag n yaag n yeel m ba a Davɩɩd tɩ:" 
2Chronicles6:5 ‹Hal daar ning mam sẽn yiis Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã tɩ ta rũndã, mam ka yãk tẽng ba a yembr Israyɛll buudã tẽms sʋk n yeel tɩ b me roog tɩ mam yʋʋrã be a pʋgẽ ye. La m ka yãk ned ba a ye t'a yɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naab ye." 
2Chronicles6:6 La yaa Zeruzalɛm la m yãk n na n ning m yʋʋrã a pʋga. La mam yãka a Davɩɩd t'a yɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã naaba. 
2Chronicles6:7 La m ba a Davɩɩd dag n data ne b sũur fãa n me roog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga," 
2Chronicles6:8 la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela m ba a Davɩɩd yaa: ‹Fo sẽn tags n dat n me roog mam yʋʋrã yĩngã, fo maana neere." 
2Chronicles6:9 La ade, ka na n yɩ foom n na n me roogã ye. Na n yɩɩ biig ning fo sẽn na n dogã n na n me roogã mam yʋʋrã yĩnga.›" 
2Chronicles6:10 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab pidsa b kãabgã. Mam leda m ba a Davɩɩd zĩigẽ, n dɩt naam Israyɛll wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã, la mam mee ro-kãngã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles6:11 La mam tol n ninga koglg ning kaoolã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, kaool ning bãmb sẽn dag n maan ne Israyɛll nebã.»" 
2Chronicles6:12 Rĩm a Salmo yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã taoore, tɩ b nengã tees Israyɛll zãma wã fãa. La b zẽka a nus n tees yĩngr n na n pʋʋse." 
2Chronicles6:13 A Salmo ra maana zaoor sẽn yaa zũud n dɩgl zaka tẽn-sʋka. Zaoorã woglem da yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, t'a yalma yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a tãabo. A Salmo rʋʋ zaoorã zug n yĩgimd t'a nengã tees Israyɛll zãma wã fãa. Dẽ, b zẽka b nus yĩngr n" 
2Chronicles6:14 yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, saasẽ ne tẽng zug ka, Wẽnnaam a to ka be sẽn zem yãmb ye. Yãmb tallda y kaoolã ne y pʋ-peelmã kãenkãe ne neb nins sẽn tũud yãmb ne b sũur fãa wã." 
2Chronicles6:15 Yãmb pidsa kãabg ning yãmb sẽn dag n kãab m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. N-yẽe! Yãmb noorã sẽn yeel bũmb ninsã, yãmb pids-b-la rũndã ne yãmb mengã nusi." 
2Chronicles6:16 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, bɩ y pids kãabg ning yãmb sẽn dag n kãab m ba a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Yãmb dag n yeelame: Fo yagensã sã n gũus ne b yel-manesmã, la b tũ maam wa fo sẽn tũ maamã, ned ka na n kong bãmb sʋkã sẽn na n led fo zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã Israyɛll ye.»" 
2Chronicles6:17 Woto yĩngã, Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, bɩ y pids kãabg ning yãmb sẽn dag n kãab a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã." 
2Chronicles6:18 Dẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam tõe n zĩnda ninsaalb sʋk dũni zug sɩda? Ade, saasã, ne saasẽ-saasẽ ka tõe n deeg yãmb a Wẽnnaam ye. Dẽ, roog ning mam sẽn me wã na n maana a wãn n tõog n deeg yãmba?" 
2Chronicles6:19 La baoosgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, bɩ y wʋm mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã pʋʋsgo, ne m kosgã, la y kelg mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã sẽn kelemd n boond yãmbã." 
2Chronicles6:20 Bɩ y Puk-y y nin wĩndg la yʋng n ges ro-kãngã, bala, yaa zĩig yãmb sẽn yeel tɩ y na n puka y belmã a pʋgẽ! Moasã, bɩ y kelg m pʋʋsgã m sẽn be zĩ-kãngã n pʋʋsd-y wã." 
2Chronicles6:21 Maam, a Salmo, la Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sã n wẽnemd n tees zĩ-kãngã n kos yãmba, bɩ y kelg-do. Bɩ y zĩnd-y saasẽ y sẽn beẽ wã n kelg tõndo, la y kõ-d sugri." 
2Chronicles6:22 Ned sã n beeg a to, tɩ b yeel a soab t'a wẽene, tɩ wẽenegã tũud ne kãab-wẽnse, nin-kãng sã n wa yãmb doogã pʋga, n yals yãmb tẽn-kugrã taoor n wẽene," 
2Chronicles6:23 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelg la y leoke. La y bʋ y tʋmtʋmdbã bʋʋd n kɩt tɩ sẽn ka tar-a bʋʋmã paam sɩbgre, tɩ b bãng tɩ nin-tɩrgã tara bʋʋm." 
2Chronicles6:24 Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã bɛɛb sã n tõog bãmb b sẽn beeg yãmba yĩnga, b sã n tek yam n kos sugri, la b waoog yãmb yʋʋrã, la b pʋʋs yãmb n kos yãmb ro-kãngã pʋgẽ," 
2Chronicles6:25 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelg-ba. Bɩ y kõ Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sugr b beegrã yĩnga, la y kɩt tɩ b lebg n wa tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kõ bãmb ne b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles6:26 Yĩngrã sã n wa pag tɩ saag ka leb n niida, yãmb nebã sẽn beeg yãmb yĩnga, b sã n wẽnemd n tees zĩ-kãngã n pʋʋse, b sã n waoog yãmb yʋʋrã la b bas b yel-wẽnã, yãmb sẽn sɩbg bãmba yĩnga," 
2Chronicles6:27 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelge, la y kõ y tʋmtʋmdbã, ne Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sugri. Woto, yãmb na n zãmsa bãmb tɩ b rɩk so-sõng ning b sẽn tog n tũ wã, la y kɩt tɩ saagã ni yãmb tẽngẽ wã, tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n kõ y nebã tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩrã." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kom sã n kẽ tẽngã, walla bã-loangdg ka rẽ bɩ wãoong ne gãnem, wall sʋy bɩ kalwaar sã n kẽ tẽngã, wall b bɛɛbã n wa n gũbg tẽngã, baa sẽn yaa yel-beed la bãag ning fãa," 
2Chronicles6:29 Sẽn yaa bũmb ning fãa yĩng la b pʋʋsd bɩ b kot yãmba, a sã n yaa nin-yɛnga, bɩ Israyɛll tõrã fãa sẽn yaa yãmb nebã n kote, ned kam fãa sũur sẽn sãam ne toog ning sẽn paama wã, n zẽk a nus n tees ro-kãngã," 
2Chronicles6:30 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelg-ba, la y kõ-b b yel-wẽnã sugri, la y keo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã. Bala, yãmb n mi a sũurã tagsgo, sɩdã, yaa yãmb y yembr bal n mi ninsaalbã fãa sũyã tagsgo." 
2Chronicles6:31 Woto b na zoee yãmba, la b sak yãmb b vɩɩm fãa tɛk tẽng ning yãmb sẽn kõ-d ba-rãmba pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles6:32 Woto me, sãan sẽn ka Israyɛll buudã sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sã n yi zĩ-zãrgẽ n wa yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga, la y nug pãngã, ne y tʋʋm kãsemsã yĩnga, n wa ro-kãngã pʋg n pʋʋs yãmba," 
2Chronicles6:33 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ saasẽ n kelg-a, la y maan wa sãanã sẽn kot yãmb bũmb ningã n kõ-a, tɩ buud nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã tõe n bãng yãmb yʋʋrã, la b zoe yãmb wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa yãmb nebã sẽn zoet yãmbã. La b bãng tɩ y yʋʋrã bee ro-kãngã mam sẽn me wã pʋga." 
2Chronicles6:34 Yãmb nebã sã n yi n na n tɩ zab ne b bɛɛbã n sak n tũ sor ning yãmb sẽn wilg-bã, bãmb sã n wẽnemd n tees tẽng ning yãmb sẽn yãkã, la roog ning mam sẽn me yãmb yʋʋrã yĩngã n pʋʋs yãmba," 
2Chronicles6:35 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelg b pʋʋsgã ne b kosgã, la y sõng-ba." 
2Chronicles6:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ned ka be n ka beegdẽ ye, la yãmb nebã sã n beeg yãmba, tɩ yãmb sũurã yik ne-ba, tɩ yãmb bas tɩ bɛɛbã tõog-ba, n yõg-b n kẽes yembd tẽn-zãrgẽ wall tẽng sẽn pẽ pʋga," 
2Chronicles6:37 bãmb sã n zĩnd b yembdã tẽng pʋgẽ, n tags n tek yam n kos sugri, n yõk yãmb sɛɛg n yeele: «Tõnd beegame, tõnd maana sẽn ka zemse, tõnd yaa bɛɛgdba!»" 
2Chronicles6:38 Bãmb sã n zĩnd b yembdã tẽng pʋg n wẽnemd n bao yãmb ne b sũyã fãa, ne b yamã fãa, la b sã n wẽnemd n tees soolem ning yãmb sẽn kõ b yaab-rãmbã, la tẽng ninga, la roog ning mam sẽn me yãmb yʋʋrã yĩngã n pʋʋse," 
2Chronicles6:39 bɩ y zĩnd y zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n kelg b pʋʋsgã ne b kosgã, la y leok-ba, la y kõ y nebã sẽn beeg yãmbã sugri." 
2Chronicles6:40 La moasã mam Wẽnnaam, puk-y y nin, la y yok y tʋb n kelg sẽn pʋʋsd-b yãmb do-kãngã pʋgã." 
2Chronicles6:41 Moasã, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã, wa-y y vʋʋsgã zĩigẽ, yãmb ne y pãngã sẽn pukd kaoolã koglg ningã pʋgã! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y maan-kʋʋdbã pid ne yãmb fãagrã, la sẽn tũud yãmb ne sɩdã kɩdem ne sũ-noogo" 
2Chronicles6:42 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, da bas-y y nin-tũusdgã ye, tẽeg-y yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd maan-sɩdã yelle." 
2Chronicles7:1 A Salmo sẽn pʋʋs n sɛ wã, bugum n yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ maandã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã pida roogã." 
2Chronicles7:2 La maan-kʋʋdbã rag n ka tõe n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã rag n pida roogã." 
2Chronicles7:3 Israyɛll nebã fãa yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab bugmã ne b ziirã sẽn sigd b roogã zugu, dẽ bãmb fãa yĩgimdame n wõgemde, n fõgen b nens tẽng zĩig ning b sẽn gãneg kug-peesdsã zug n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõama, la bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa." 
2Chronicles7:4 Rĩm a Salmo ne Israyɛll nebã maana maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore 
2Chronicles7:5 Rĩm a Salmo kʋʋ niig tus pisi la a yiibu, la rũm-bãooneg tus-koabg la pisi, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã bark ningr yĩnga. Woto, rĩmã ne Israyɛll nebã ninga Wẽnnaam doogã barka." 
2Chronicles7:6 Maan-kʋʋdbã rag n yasa b zĩigẽ. La Leevi nebã rag n tara Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋm teedã. Yʋʋm teed nins a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b maan n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã. Bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa." 
2Chronicles7:7 Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo welga samandã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noorã toore, tɩ b maand maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne zems-n-taar maandã kaamã beenẽ. Bala, zũud tẽn-kugr ning yẽnda sẽn dag n maanã rag n yaa bilfu, tɩ b ka tõe n yõog maandã fãa be ye." 
2Chronicles7:8 Wakat-kãnga, a Salmo maana tigrã rasem a yopoe, la Israyɛll nebã fãa naaga yẽnda n maane, la zãma kẽeng n yi sẽn sɩng ne Lebo-Hamat tẽngã kõom zĩigẽ, n tɩ tãag tẽms nins sẽn be Ezɩpt kʋɩlgã noorã n wa." 
2Chronicles7:9 La tigrã rasem a nii daarã, zãma wã maana tigin-kãseng sẽn welg toore. Bala, yɩɩ rasem a yopoe la b sẽn dɩk n maan bark ningrã, la tigrã meng yɩɩ rasem a yopoe." 
2Chronicles7:10 La kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem pisi la a tãab daarã, a Salmo kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll ned kam fãa kuil a yiri. La bãmb yii beenẽ ne kɩdeng la sũ-noogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan a Davɩɩde, ne a Salmo, la Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã fãa neerã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles7:11 Dẽ, a Salmo mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, ne na-yirã, la a maan bũmb nins fãa a sẽn dag n tagsd n dat n maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ne a meng zakã n sɛ." 
2Chronicles7:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnega b meng ne yẽnda yʋng n yeel-a yaa: «Mam wʋma fo pʋʋsgã, la mam yãkda zĩ-kãngã mam mengã yĩnga, tɩ yaa maand kʋʋb zĩiga." 
2Chronicles7:13 Mam sã n wa gɩdg saagã t'a ka niida, bɩ m sã n kɩt tɩ sʋy wa sãam y tẽngã, wall m tʋm bã-loangdg m nebã sʋka," 
2Chronicles7:14 mam nebã b sẽn boond ne mam yʋʋrã sã n sik b menga, n pʋʋse, la b bao maam, bãmb sã n bas b tʋʋm-wẽnsã, maam, mam na n zĩnda saasẽ n kelg-ba, la m na n kõ-b-la b yel-wẽnã sugri, la m maag b tẽngã." 
2Chronicles7:15 Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, m na n puka m nini la m yok m tʋb n kelg pʋʋsg ning fãa sẽn na n pʋʋs zĩ-kãngã wã." 
2Chronicles7:16 La moasã mam yãka ro-kãngã, la m welg-a-la toore, tɩ mam yʋʋrã tõe n zĩnd a pʋg wakat fãa yĩnga. Mam nin ne mam sũurã na n zĩnda beenẽ wakat fãa" 
2Chronicles7:17 Sã n yaa ne foom, fo sã n tũ maam wa f ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n tũ maamã, n maan wa mam sẽn wilg foomã, n sak m noyã, ne m minindã," 
2Chronicles7:18 m na n kɩtame tɩ f pa f naamẽ wã, wa m sẽn dag n kãab f ba a Davɩɩd n yeel-a t'a kõn kong yageng sẽn na n dɩ naam Israyɛllã." 
2Chronicles7:19 La yãmb sã n wẽnemd n bas m tõodã ne m noyã m sẽn kõ yãmbã, n kẽng n tɩ tũ wẽn-naands n wõgemd n waoog-ba," 
2Chronicles7:20 mam na n yiis-y-la m tẽngẽ wã, tẽng ning m sẽn dag n kõ y yaab-rãmba pʋgẽ, la ro-kãngã m sẽn welg toor m yʋʋrã yĩngã, m na n bas-a lame, la bu-zẽmsã fãa na n paoog-y lame, la b la-yã." 
2Chronicles7:21 La ne ro-kãngã sẽn yɩ kãseng to-to wã, ned ning fãa sẽn na n pɩʋʋgd be na n yɛɛsame n sokdẽ: ‹Bõe tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan tẽn-kãngã, ne Wẽnd do-kãngã a woto?›" 
2Chronicles7:22 La b na n leok-b lame n yeele: ‹Yaa b sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã, sẽn yiis-a bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã, n tɩ tũ wẽn-naands n waoog-bã yĩng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ yel-beed a woto fãa paam-ba.› »" 
2Chronicles8:1 A Salmo rɩka yʋʋm pisi n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, ne yẽnda mengã na-zakã." 
2Chronicles8:2 Dẽ zugẽ, yẽnda lebg n mee tẽms nins a Huram sẽn dag n kõ yẽnda wã, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll neb tɩ zĩnd b pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles8:3 A Salmo kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Hamat-Soba tẽngã n deeg-a n sooge. 
2Chronicles8:4 La yẽnda maneg n mee Tadmoor sẽn be we-raoogẽ wã, ne kood bĩngr zĩis tẽmsã, n paas ne tẽms nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n zoe n me Hamat soolmã pʋgẽ n na n bĩngd a koodã." 
2Chronicles8:5 Yẽnda maneg n mee Bɛt-Horon tẽngã sẽn be tãngã zugã ne Bɛt-Horon tẽng ning sẽn be tãngã sɛɛgã, n ning lals sẽn tar pãng n gũbgi, la a yãk rignoy n ning kʋɩlems sẽn tar pɩgdse." 
2Chronicles8:6 La a mee Balaate, ne tẽms nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b bĩngd a koodã, sẽn dag n yaa a Salmo rẽndã, la tẽms nins sẽn da bĩngd a zabr-saar-dãmbã, ne tẽms nins a sẽn da bĩngd a wed-moosã. A Salmo sẽn da rat bũmb nins fãa n me wã, a me-b-la Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, la Libã soolem pʋgẽ, la ne tẽms nins fãa yẽnda sẽn so wã pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles8:7 Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Israyɛll pʋgẽ, n yaool n ka Israyɛll buudã neb ye. Yaa Ɛt tẽng nebã, Amo nebã, Perɛɛz nebã, Hɛɛv nebã, la Zebu nebã." 
2Chronicles8:8 Bãmb yaa neb nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn da bas n ka kʋ wã yagense, la b ra keta Zeruzalɛm. Yaa bãmb la a Salmo yãk tɩ b na n maan tʋʋm-wɛglã hal tɩ tãag rũndã." 
2Chronicles8:9 La a Salmo ka kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã maan tʋʋm-wɛglã ye, a kɩtame tɩ bãmb yaa a tãb-biisã la a wed-rʋʋdbã nanambse, la sẽn dag n get-b saar-dãmbã yellã nanambse." 
2Chronicles8:10 A Salmo kɩtame tɩ b yãk nanambs kobs-yi la pis-nu sẽn na n getẽ ninbuiidã fãa yelle. 
2Chronicles8:11 Rĩm a Salmo peega Faarõ bi-puglã sẽn yaa a pagã n yiis a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgẽ, n tɩ kẽes-a roog ning yẽnda sẽn me n kõ-a wã pʋga. Bala, yẽnda rag n yetame tɩ rẽndã yĩng ka tog n kɩt tɩ pag zĩnd Israyɛll rĩm a Davɩɩd na-zakẽ wã ye. Bala, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã koglg sẽn zĩndẽ wã welga toore." 
2Chronicles8:12 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Salmo rag n maanda Sẽn-Ka-Saab maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugr ning yẽnda sẽn me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noorã zugu." 
2Chronicles8:13 La daar fãa, a Salmo rag n maanda maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, ne vʋʋsg rayã, la ki-paalsã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigindã wakate, wa a Moyiis tõogã sẽn da wilg bũmb ningã." 
2Chronicles8:14 Rĩm a Salmo maana wa a ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n wilg yẽnda wã, yẽnda ninga maan-kʋʋd fãa a zĩigẽ, la a ning Leevi nebã b zĩigẽ, tɩ b tõe n pẽgd Sẽn-Ka-Saab daar fãa wã, la b maand b tʋʋmd daar fãa n sõngd maan-kʋʋdbã, la a ning zag-no-gũudbã ned kam fãa ne a zag-no-gũudga, wa sẽn zems ned kam fãa ne a sulli, bala, woto yaa tõog ning Wẽnnaam dao a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n wilgã." 
2Chronicles8:15 La b ka tol n bʋdg n bas rĩmã sẽn dag n wilg tõog ning sẽn kẽed ne maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Leevi nebã, la baa sẽn kẽed laogã wɛɛngẽ." 
2Chronicles8:16 Dẽ, yɩɩ woto la b tõog n maan tʋʋm nins fãa a Salmo sẽn dag n dat n maanã n sɛ, sẽn sɩng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yẽbgrã, n tɩ tãag a baoosgã daare. Dẽ, b maana Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmd n sɛ." 
2Chronicles8:17 A Salmo yikame n kẽng Esɩyõ-Gebɛɛr tẽngã ne Eliyot sẽn be Edom soolmã pʋgẽ ko-kãsengã noorã. 
2Chronicles8:18 La beenẽ, a Huram tʋma a Salmo koom kogendo, ne neb sẽn mi koom kogendã rugsg sõama, tɩ b yãag a Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã n kẽng Ofɩɩr tẽnga. La bãmb talla sãnem kɩlo tus pisi la a yiib la pis-nu n wa kõ rĩm a Salmo." 
2Chronicles9:1 Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã wʋma a Salmo yʋʋrã sẽn yi wã kibare. Dẽ, yẽnda waa Zeruzalɛm n na n mak a Salmo yamã ne sokds sẽn yaa yel-bũnã. Yẽnda wa ne a poorẽ dãmb wʋsgo, la yʋgma sẽn zɩt parfẽ-rãmbã, ne sãnem wʋsgo, la kug-sõama. La yẽnda sẽn ta rĩm a Salmo nengẽ, yẽnda soka a Salmo sokds nins fãa a sẽn da tar-a a sũurẽ wã." 
2Chronicles9:2 La rĩm a Salmo leoka a sokds fãa, la bũmb ba a yembr ka zĩnd sẽn solg t'a Salmo ka tõog n bilg a võor ye." 
2Chronicles9:3 Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã sẽn yãnd a Salmo yamã sẽn ta zĩig ningã, ne a na-zakã a sẽn me wã," 
2Chronicles9:4 la rɩɩb ning b sẽn talldẽ n wat rĩma taoorã, la a tʋmtʋmdbã rot sẽn yaa to-to wã, ne a sõgen-kambã tʋʋmã sẽn pʋɩ to-to wã, la fut ninsã b sẽn yerã, ne b sẽn get rĩmã bõn-yũudlã yell to-to wã, la rĩmã sẽn dʋʋd dʋʋdsã to-to n kẽed Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgã, a maka goam n konge." 
2Chronicles9:5 Dẽ, yẽnda yeela rĩmã yaa: «Rẽnd mam sẽn dag n bee m tẽngẽ wã n wʋmd yãmb goamã kibarã, ne y yamã yellã sɩd yaa sɩd wɛ!" 
2Chronicles9:6 Sã n ka mam sẽn wa tɩ m ninã yãndã, mam da ka sak n deeg tɩ yaa sɩd ye. La ade, mik mam sẽn dag n wʋmdã ka ta mam sẽn yã wã pʋɩ-sʋk meng ye. Yãmb yamã rãamd sẽn yi to-to wã, ne y arzegsã yɩɩda mam sẽn dag n wʋmd tɩ b gomdã." 
2Chronicles9:7 Ad neb nins sẽn be ne yãmbã yẽ tara sũ-noogo, neb nins sẽn tʋmd-b yãmb taoor daar fãa wã, tara sũ-noogo. Bala, bãmb bee ne yãmb wakat fãa n wʋmd y yam goamã!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre. Bala, taa bãmb yam tɩ b yãk yãmb n kɩt tɩ y zaoond bãmb naam geerã zugu, n yɩ rĩma, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr yĩnga! Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong Israyɛlle, la b rat n kɩt t'a pa wakat fãa wã yĩnga, la bãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ yãmb lebg rĩma n soog yẽnda, tɩ yãmb maand sɩda, la y kaood bʋʋd ne tɩrlem.»" 
2Chronicles9:9 Rẽ poore, Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã kõo rĩm a Salmo sãnem kɩlo tus a naas la kobessi, ne parfẽ-rãmb wʋsg sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la kug-sõama. Ned ka tol n leb n wa ne parfẽ-rãmb wʋsg sẽn tar yũ-noog a woto wa Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã sẽn wa n kõ rĩm a Salmo wã ye." 
2Chronicles9:10 Rĩm a Hiram ne rĩm a Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn dag n kẽnd Ofɩɩr tẽng n wat ne sãnemã me talla Sãntall ra-sõama, ne kug-sõama wʋsg n wa kõ rĩm a Salmo." 
2Chronicles9:11 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b rɩka ra-sõama wã n pees ra-kʋgs Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne na-yirã yĩnga, la b maana kʋla ruuds yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã yĩnga. La b ka tol n leb n yãnda buud Zʋʋda tẽnga pʋgẽ yɛs ye." 
2Chronicles9:12 Rĩm a Salmo kõo Seba rĩm-poakã bũmb nins fãa a sẽn dag n dat n kosã. Rĩm a Salmo sẽn kõ Seba tẽng rĩm-poakã bũmb ningã yɩɩda bũmb ninga a sẽn tall n wa kõ yẽnda wã. Rẽ zugẽ, Seba rĩm-poakã lebg n kuila a tẽngẽ, yẽnda ne a poorẽ dãmbã." 
2Chronicles9:13 Sãnem ning rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n paamd yʋʋmd fãa wã yaa kɩlo tus pisi," 
2Chronicles9:14 n paas ne yaood nins yẽnda sẽn dag n deegd toandbã ne lɛɛbdbã nengẽ wã, la ne Araabi rĩm-dãmbã nengẽ wã. Soolem-dãmb a taabã rĩm-dãmbã, ne tẽngã kombɛɛmbã me rag n wat n kõta a Salmo sãnem la wanzuri." 
2Chronicles9:15 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b kud sãnem n maan gãn-bɛd kobessi, la gãong a yembr fãa zɩslem yaa kɩlo a yoobe." 
2Chronicles9:16 La a kɩt tɩ b maan gãn-bãooneg kobs-tã, la b rag n talla sãnem kɩlo a tãab n maan gãn-bil a yembr fãa. Dẽ, rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b bĩng bãmb roog ning b sẽn boond tɩ Libã tɩɩs roogã pʋga." 
2Chronicles9:17 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ b maan geer sẽn yaa bedr ne wobd yẽna, n bolg-a ne sãnem halaale." 
2Chronicles9:18 Geerã rag n tara rʋʋdg sẽn tar kogs a yoobe, la sãnem nao roagendg sẽn tong ne geerã, la b maana nug-gãtse, la nus kʋgs geerã kɩrems a yiibã fãa, la b maan gɩgmã a yiib tɩ b yas yĩngr n yegl nug-kʋgsã, a yembr goabga, a yembr dɩtgo." 
2Chronicles9:19 La b maana gɩgmã piig la yiibu, tɩ b yas rʋʋdsã kogs a yoobã zut n tong goabg la a rɩtgo. B rag n zɩ n maan bũmb a woto buud soolem ba a ye pʋgẽ ye." 
2Chronicles9:20 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n tar lagd nins n yũudã fãa rag n maana ne sãnem, la teed nins fãa sẽn dag n be roog ning b sẽn boond tɩ Libã tɩɩs roogã pʋgẽ wã maana ne sãnem halaale. Bũmb dag n ka be beenẽ sẽn maan ne wanzuri ye. Bala, rĩm a Salmo zamaanẽ wã, b rag n ka geelgd wanzuri wa bũmb sẽn tar yõod wʋsg ye." 
2Chronicles9:21 Bala, rĩmã rag n tara koom kogl-bɛd sẽn digd Tarsɩɩs ne rĩm a Huram nebã. La yʋʋm a tãab fãa, bãmb lebgdẽ n wata ne sãnem, wanzuri, wobd yẽna, la wãamse, ne bulwãado." 
2Chronicles9:22 Rĩm a Salmo waa n lebga kãseng n yɩɩd dũniyã rĩm-dãmba fãa ne arzegse, la ne yam me." 
2Chronicles9:23 Dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã fãa rag n baood n yãnda rĩm a Salmo, sẽn na n yɩl n wʋm yam goam nins Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-a wã." 
2Chronicles9:24 Nin-kãensã ned kam fãa sã n dag n watẽ, a zãada a kũuni. Yaa wanzuri teedo, sãnem teedo, futu, zab-teedo, parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la wed-moos ne bõense. B rag n maanda a woto yʋʋmd fãa." 
2Chronicles9:25 Rĩm a Salmo ra tara ro-bãooneg tus a naase wiidã yĩnga, la a tar saar-dãmba, ne wed-rʋʋdb tus piig la a yiibu. Rĩm a Salmo yãka tẽms tɩ yaa saar-dãmbã ne wiidã bĩngr zĩiga, la a ning kẽer Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ n pẽneg rĩmã." 
2Chronicles9:26 Rĩm a Salmo rag n sooga rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn da be Efrat kʋɩlsã noorã, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽmsã, hal n tɩ tãag Ezɩpt tẽnga toadga." 
2Chronicles9:27 Rĩm a Salmo kɩtame tɩ wanzuri wã lebg wʋsg wa kug-zaals Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, la a kɩt tɩ sɛɛdr tɩɩsã lebg wʋsg wa wom-seesã sẽn be kunkubẽ wã." 
2Chronicles9:28 B rag n tara wed-moos n yit Ezɩpt ne tẽms a taabã fãa n wat n kõt a Salmo. 
2Chronicles9:29 B gʋlsa rĩm a Salmo vɩɩmã kibarã sẽn ketã, a sɩngr n tãag a sɛɛbo, no-rɛɛs a Natã sebrã pʋga, la no-rɛɛs a Ayiya sẽn yit Sɩlo no-reesg koɛɛgã pʋga, la yãt a Yedo vẽnegrã sebr pʋga, a sẽn gomd a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam yellã wɛɛngẽ." 
2Chronicles9:30 A Salmo zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-naas n soog Israyɛll tõrã fãa. 
2Chronicles9:31 Rĩm a Salmo saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a ba a Davɩɩd Tẽngã pʋga. La yaa a biig a Roboaam n deeg a zĩig n lebg rĩmã." 
2Chronicles10:1 A Roboaam kẽnga Sɩkɛm, bala, yaa beenẽ la Israyɛll zãma wã kẽng n na n tɩ kõ-a naamã." 
2Chronicles10:2 A Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn wa n na n wʋm bõn-kãngã, t'a rag n bee Ezɩpt tẽnga. Yẽnda rag n zoe n kẽnga beenẽ n na n paam n põs rĩm a Salmo. Dẽ, yẽnda yii Ezɩpt tẽngã n lebg n wa." 
2Chronicles10:3 Dẽ, b tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool-a. La a Zeroboaam ne Israyɛll nebã kẽng n tɩ goma ne a Roboaam n yeel-a yaa:" 
2Chronicles10:4 «Yãmb ba wã rag n namsda tõnd wʋsgo. Dẽ wã, tõnd kot-y lame tɩ y yols tõnd ne namsg ning y ba wã sẽn dag n namsd tõndã. Woto, tõnd na n yɩɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdba.»" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rĩm a Roboaam yeel-b lame yaa: «Kuil-y la y lebg n wa rasem a tãabo.» La nebã kuilame. 
2Chronicles10:6 Woto, rĩm a Roboaam soka nin-kẽemb nins sẽn dag n zĩnd ne yẽnda ba a Salmo wã yaa: «Ne yãmba, y sagenda maam tɩ m leok nin-bãmbã tɩ bõe?»" 
2Chronicles10:7 Dẽ, nin-kẽembã yeela a Roboaam yaa: «Yãmb sã n sak n maan wa nin-bãmbã sẽn yeelã, la y gom ne b gom-noodo, bãmb na n kell n yɩɩ yãmb tʋmtʋmdb wakat fãa yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles10:8 La rĩm a Roboaam ka geelg nin-kẽembã saglsã ye, yẽnda bas n kẽng n tɩ kosa kom-bɩɩs nins sẽn be-b ne yẽnda n dag n yaa yẽnda reed-n-taasã saglse." 
2Chronicles10:9 Dẽ, rĩm a Roboaam soka kom-bɩɩsã yaa: «Nin-bãmbã kota maam tɩ m yols-b ne namsg ning m ba sẽn dag namsd-bã. Dẽ wã, yãmb sagenda maam tɩ m leok-b tɩ bõe?»" 
2Chronicles10:10 Kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa a Roboaam reed-n-taasã yeela a Roboaam yaa: «Nin-bãmbã ka yeelame tɩ y yols bãmb ne namsg ning y ba sẽn dag n namsd bãmbã la? Beneere ad yãmb sẽn na n leok-b to-to: yeel-y-b tɩ yãmb nug-bi-kɛmblã yɩɩda y ba gere. 
2Chronicles10:11 La sẽn paase, yeel-y-b tɩ y ba sã n dag namsa bãmba, yãmb na n paasa bãmb namsgã tɩ yɩɩg rẽndã. La y ba sã n dag n sɩbga bãmb ne kalwaase, yãmb na n sɩbg-b-la ne namse.»" 
2Chronicles10:12 Rasem a tãab daarã sẽn ta, a Zeroboaam ne Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n waa rĩm a Roboaam nengẽ, wa rĩmã sẽn dag n yeel tɩ: «Lebg-y n wa-y mam nengẽ rasem a tãab sẽn watã.»" 
2Chronicles10:13 La a Roboaam basa nin-kẽembã sẽn sagl yẽnda wã, n gom ne nebã gom kegemse." 
2Chronicles10:14 Dẽ, a Roboaam reega a kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa yẽnda reed-n-taasã sagls n yeel nebã yaa: «M ba rag n namsa yãmba, la mam na n paasa yãmb namsgã tɩ yɩɩg rẽndã, m ba rag n sɩbga yãmb ne kalwaase, la mam na n sɩbga yãmb ne namse.»" 
2Chronicles10:15 Woto, rĩmã ka kelg nin-buiidã ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dag n rat tɩ yɩ a woto, tɩ bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Sɩlo rao a Ayiya togs a Nebat biig a Zeroboaamã tõe n paam pidsgu." 
2Chronicles10:16 La Israyɛll nebã fãa sẽn yãnd tɩ rĩmã ka kelg bãmbã. Nebã leoka rĩmã n yeel-a yaa: «Bõe lagem-n-taar n be tõnd ne a Davɩɩd sʋka. Bõe pʋɩɩr la d tar ne a Davɩɩde, tõnd ka tar pʋɩɩr ne a Izayi biigã ye. Israyɛll nebã, lebg-y n kuil-y-yã! Moasã, Davɩɩd yagense, bɩ f ges f roog yelle! Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa lebgame n kuili.»" 
2Chronicles10:17 La a Roboaam dɩɩ naamã tẽms nins sẽn da be Zʋʋda tẽn-peelmã pʋgẽ wã bala. 
2Chronicles10:18 Dẽ, rĩm a Roboaam tʋma a Adoram sẽn dag n get tʋʋm-wɛglã yellã Israyɛll nebã nengẽ, la Israyɛll nebã naaga taab n lob a Adoram ne kug n kʋ. La rĩm a Roboaam tõog n kẽ saar pʋg n zoe n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles10:19 Yɩɩ woto n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã, kell n kɩɩs a Davɩɩd doogã neb hal n tãag rũndã." 
2Chronicles11:1 A Roboaam sẽn lebg n ta Zeruzalɛmã, a tigma Zʋʋda ne Benzame buudã tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii sẽn mi zabr sõama wã, tɩ b na n tɩ zab ne Israyɛll buud a taabã neb n deeg rĩungã n lebs yẽnda a Roboaam." 
2Chronicles11:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne Wẽnnaam dao a Semaya n yeel-a yaa: 
2Chronicles11:3 «Yeel a Salmo biig a Roboaam sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩma ne Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn be Zʋʋda wã ne Benzame buudã fãa ne neb a taabã sẽn ketã," 
2Chronicles11:4 tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Bɩ y ra kẽng n tɩ zab ne y saam-biisã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã ye! Bɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yiri. Bala, yaa maam n kɩt tɩ yellã yɩɩ a woto.» Dẽ, bãmb saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã n maan wa b sẽn yeelã, n lebg n kuili, n ka tɩ zab ne a Zeroboaam ye." 
2Chronicles11:5 A Roboaam zĩnda Zeruzalɛm. La yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b me lals sẽn tar pãng n gũbg Zʋʋda tẽmsã. 
2Chronicles11:6 Yaa Betlehɛm, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 la Bɛt-Sʋʋre, ne Soko, la Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 ne Gate, la Maresa, ne Zɩfe," 
2Chronicles11:9 la Adorayim, ne Lakɩɩs la Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ne Soreya, la Ayalõ, ne Ebrõ. Tẽn-bãmb fãa bee Zʋʋda ne Benzame soolmã pʋsẽ. Bãmb yaa tẽms sẽn tar pãnga." 
2Chronicles11:11 A Roboaam kɩtame tɩ b maneg n me lalsã sẽn tar pãng n gũbg tẽn-bãmb n ning kombɛɛmba, la a kɩt tɩ b bĩng a koodã ne a kaamã, la a reezẽ rãamã bãmb pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles11:12 La tẽn-kãens fãa pʋsẽ, b ra bĩnga gãnd sẽn yaa bɛda, la kãna. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ tẽn-bãmb tall pãngã. La Zʋʋda ne Benzame tẽmsã kell n yɩɩ yẽnda soolem." 
2Chronicles11:13 Maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã sẽn dag n be Israyɛll tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ wã, yii b tẽmsẽ fãa pʋs n wa naag a Roboaam." 
2Chronicles11:14 Leevi nebã rag n yiime n bas b zagsã, ne b pʋ-weesã, n kẽng n tɩ kẽed Zʋʋda soolem ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga. Bala, a Zeroboaam ne a kambã rag n gɩdgda bãmb tɩ b ka tõe n maan b maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã." 
2Chronicles11:15 La a Zeroboaam mengã rag n baoo neb tɩ b tõe n yɩ maan-kʋʋdba, boeesã ne nag-bi wẽn-naands nins yẽnda sẽn dag n dõog n ning maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles11:16 La Israyɛll buud toor-toorã pʋgẽ neb nins fãa, sẽn dag n dat-b n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, pʋgla Leevi nebã n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, sẽn na n yɩl n tõog n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles11:17 Nin-bãmb paasa Zʋʋda soolmã pãnga, la b paas a Salmo biig a Roboaam raood yʋʋm a tãabo. Bala, yʋʋm a tãab-kãens pʋgẽ, bãmb tũu a Davɩɩd ne a Salmo naoore." 
2Chronicles11:18 A Roboaam peega a Yerimot bi-pugl a Mahalat n maan a paga. A Yerimot ba la a Davɩɩd t'a ma wã la a Abigayɩlle. A Abigayɩlle, dag n yaa a Zeese biig a Eliyaab bi-pugla." 
2Chronicles11:19 A Mahalat doga a Roboaam kom-dibli: yaa a Yewusi, a Semariya, ne a Zaham." 
2Chronicles11:20 Dẽ poore, a Roboaam leb n kẽe kãadem ne a Absalom biig a Maaka, la a roga a Roboaam kom-dibli: yaa a Abiya, a Atayi, a Zɩɩza, ne a Selomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 A Roboaam rag n nonga a Absalom biig a Maaka, n yɩɩd a pagb a taabã ne a pʋg-rɩkdsã fãa. A Roboaam rag n tara pagb piig la a nii, la pʋg-rɩkds pis-yoobe. La yẽnda roga kom-dibli pisi la a nii, la kom-pugli pis-yoobe." 
2Chronicles11:22 A Roboaam rɩka kãsengã n kõ a Maaka biig a Abiya, n lʋɩɩs yẽnda a ba-biisã taoore. Bala, yẽnda rag n datame t'a wa lebg rĩma." 
2Chronicles11:23 Rĩm a Roboaam maana yam n sãeeg a kom-dibli wã fãa, n ning Zʋʋda ne Benzame tẽms nins fãa b sẽn me lals n gũbgã pʋsẽ, n kõt-b rɩɩb tɩ sekd-ba, la a kos pagb wʋsg n kõ-ba." 
2Chronicles12:1 A Roboaam naamã sẽn wa n paam pãnga, la yẽnda mengã me paam pãnga, a basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã sakre, la Israyɛll nebã fãa me maana wa yẽnda." 
2Chronicles12:2 A Roboaam sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm nuunẽ, la Ezɩpt rĩm a Sɩsak yik zabr ne Zeruzalɛm. Bala, bãmb maana yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
2Chronicles12:3 Rĩm a Sɩsak yii Ezɩpt n wa ne zabr saar-dãmb tusr la kobs-yi, la wed-rʋʋdb tus-pis-yoobe, la tãb-biis sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ sẽn yit Libi ne Sukit la Kuus tẽmsẽ wã." 
2Chronicles12:4 Yẽnda zab n deega Zʋʋda tẽms nins sẽn tar-b lalsã, la a sãag n ta Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles12:5 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Semaya kẽng n tɩ yãnda a Roboaam, ne Zʋʋda nanambsã sẽn dag n tigim taab Zeruzalɛm a Sɩsak waoongã wakatã. Yẽnda yeel-b lame yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: Yãmb basa maam! Woto yĩnga, mam me basda yãmb rĩm a Sɩsak nugẽ.»" 
2Chronicles12:6 Dẽ, Israyɛll nanambsã ne rĩma sika b mense, la b yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrlem soaba!»" 
2Chronicles12:7 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãnd tɩ bãmb sika b mensã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Semaya n yeel-a yaa: «Bãmb sẽn sik b mengã yĩngã, mam ka na n sãam bãmb ye. Wakat bilf sã n paase, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b põse. Bala, mam ka na n leb n puug m sũurã ne Zeruzalɛm, n bas tɩ Ezɩpt rĩm a Sɩsak wa sãam-a ye." 
2Chronicles12:8 La baoosgo, mam na n basame tɩ bãmb yɩ a Sɩsak yembse. Dẽ, bãmb na n bãnga welgr ning sẽn be mam sakrã, wall tɩ sak tẽms a taabã soolem sʋka.»" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ezɩpt rĩm a Sɩsak wa n zaba ne Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda wʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laogo, la a wʋk rĩmã na-yirã laogã, yẽnda wʋka fãa. Yẽnda wʋka sãnem gãnd nins fãa rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b maanã." 
2Chronicles12:10 Rĩm a Roboaam maana zũud gãndo, n ledg sãnem gãndã zĩigẽ, la a rɩk-b n gũnug tãb-biis nins sẽn yaa rĩmã gũudbã nanambsã sẽn gũud rĩmã zak noorã." 
2Chronicles12:11 Wakat ning fãa rĩmã sẽn dabd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, tãb-biisã sẽn gũud rĩmã zãada gãndã n yãagd rĩmã. La b sã n sɛ, b lebgd n tɩ lebsa gãndã tãb-biisã sẽn yaa rĩmã gũudbã roogẽ." 
2Chronicles12:12 A Roboaam sẽn sik a mengã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã siga ne yẽnda, la b ka sãam-b zãng me ye. Bala, bõn-sõama rag n ket n bee Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋga." 
2Chronicles12:13 Rĩm a Roboaam dɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm, la a naamã paama pãnga. Yẽnda sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-naas la a yembre, la yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr dag n yaa a Naama, la a rag n yita Amo tẽnga. A Roboaam rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la yopoe Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk Israyɛll tẽmsã fãa sʋk n na n ning b yʋʋrã b nebã sʋkã." 
2Chronicles12:14 Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa wẽnga, bala, yẽnda ka bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a sũur fãa ye." 
2Chronicles12:15 A Roboaam vɩɩmã sɩngr kibar n tɩ tãag a baoosg fãa gʋlsa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Semaya, ne bãngda a Ido sɛbã pʋsẽ. Zabr zĩnda a Roboaam ne a Zeroboaam sʋk wakat fãa." 
2Chronicles12:16 A Roboaam saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La a biig a Abiya n led a zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma." 
2Chronicles13:1 A Zeroboaam naamã yʋʋm piig la a nii soaba la a Abiya lebg Zʋʋda rĩma. 
2Chronicles13:2 Yẽnda rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a tãabo. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr la a Mikaya, n yaa Gibeya rao a Uriyɛll bi-pugla. Zabr zĩnda a Abiya ne a Zeroboaam sʋka." 
2Chronicles13:3 La a Abiya yika zabrã ne tãb-biis tus kobs-naas sẽn yaa gãndaad n mi zabr sõama. La a Zeroboaam me wa ne tãb-biis tus kobs-nii sẽn yaa gãndaad n mi zabr sõama. 
2Chronicles13:4 Dẽ, a Abiya tɩ rʋʋ Semarayim tãngã sẽn be Efrayiim tãmsã sʋkã zug n yeele: «Zeroboaam, la yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y yã!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Yãmb ka mi tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n maan kaool ne a Davɩɩdã b naaga yamsem, n dɩk Israyɛll naamã n kõ yẽnda ne a yagensã tɩ b soog wakat fãa yĩng la?" 
2Chronicles13:6 La a Nebat biig a Zeroboaam sẽn yaa a Davɩɩd biig a Salmo tʋmtʋmdã yikame n kɩɩs a soaalã. 
2Chronicles13:7 La nin-yaals sẽn ka bark lagma yẽnda n tõdg a Salmo biig a Roboaam. La a Roboaam sẽn dag n yaa yãag t'a yamã ka bɩ wã yĩng kɩtame t'a ka tõog n kɩɩs-b ye. 
2Chronicles13:8 La moasã y yetame tɩ y kõn sulg y mens n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab soolmã sẽn be a Davɩɩd yagensã kambã nugẽ wã ye. Ade, yãmb yaa kʋʋn-kãseng sẽn sũ tãpo, la y tar sãnem nag-bi nins a Zeroboaam sẽn dag n maan n kõ yãmbã, tɩ yaa y wẽnnaam-dãmbã." 
2Chronicles13:9 La yãmb diga a Aarõ kom-dibli wã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã, la y yãk neb n maan maan-kʋʋdb wa bu-zẽms a taabã. La ned ning fãa sẽn dag n tallda loalg ne pe-raad a yopoe n wa, lebgda wẽn-naan-bãmb maan-kʋʋdba, la b yaool n ka wẽnnaam-dãmb me ye." 
2Chronicles13:10 Sã n yaa ne tõndo, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, la tõnd ka bas bãmb ye. La maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn maand tʋʋmdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã yaa a Aarõ kambã, ne Leevi nebã." 
2Chronicles13:11 La yibeoog ne zabr fãa bãmb maanda maand sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la b yõogd tɩdare, la b rogend kaset burã sãnem taabl ning sẽn welg toorã zugu. La zaabr fãa bãmb yõgenda sãnem fɩtl doagendgã fɩtl-dãmba. Bala, yaa tõnd n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã tʋʋmde. La yãmba, yãmb basa bãmba." 
2Chronicles13:12 La ade, Wẽnnaam n yaa tõnd naaba, la tõnd tara bãmb maan-kʋʋdbã ne tãntãadã sẽn tar n peebdẽ wã n na n peeb n zab ne yãmba. Dẽ, Israyɛll kamba bɩ y ra zab-y ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmb Wẽnnaamã ye. Bala, yãmb ka na n tõog ye.»" 
2Chronicles13:13 La wakat-kãnga, rẽ t'a Zeroboaam rag n tʋma tãb-biis tɩ b soos n gilg Zʋʋda nebã poorẽ. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã rag n bee Zʋʋda nebã taoore, tɩ nebã b sẽn bẽdã be b poorẽ." 
2Chronicles13:14 Dẽ, yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne Zʋʋda nebã tɩ b wẽnemd n na n zab ne nebã poorẽ, la taoore. Woto, bãmb kelmame n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la maan-kʋʋdbã peeba bardã." 
2Chronicles13:15 Zʋʋda nebã kelma zabr kɛlenga. La bãmb kɛlengã wakate, Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a Abiya ne Zʋʋda nebã tõog a Zeroboaam ne Israyɛll tãb-biisã fãa." 
2Chronicles13:16 Israyɛll nebã zoeeme n na n põs Zʋʋda nebã, la Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda nebã tõog Israyɛll nebã." 
2Chronicles13:17 A Abiya ne a nebã tõoga bãmb ne tõogr kãsenga. Bãmb kʋʋ Israyɛll neb nins sẽn mi zabr sõama wã tus kobs-nu. 
2Chronicles13:18 La wakat-kãnga, Israyɛll nebã paama paoogre, la Zʋʋda nebã paama tõogre. Bala, bãmb dag n teega Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmba Wẽnnaam." 
2Chronicles13:19 A Abiya riga a Zeroboaam n zab ne-a n deeg tẽmse: yaa Betɛll ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, Yesana ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Efrõ me ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
2Chronicles13:20 A Abiya rĩungã wakate, a Zeroboaam ka leb n paam pãng ningã a sẽn dag n tarã ye, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽ-a lame n kʋ." 
2Chronicles13:21 La a Abiya paama pãnga. Yẽnda talla pagb piig la a naase, la a roga kom-dibli pisi la a yiibu, la kom-pugli piig la yoobe." 
2Chronicles13:22 A Abiya vɩɩmã kibar la tʋʋm nins fãa a sẽn maanã gʋlsa bãngda a Ido sebrã pʋga. 
2Chronicles13:23 A Abiya saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda biig a Aaza n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma. La yẽnda vɩɩmã wakate, tẽngã vɩɩmda bãan yʋʋm piiga." 
2Chronicles14:1 A Aaza maana sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã, la sẽn tat bãmb yam." 
2Chronicles14:2 Yẽnda sãama bu-zẽms a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã tẽn-kuga, maoong kʋʋb zĩisã, la a wã kug-vigindsã, la a kɛ a Aseera ra-lugdsã n lubi." 
2Chronicles14:3 La a yeel Zʋʋda nebã tɩ b bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmba Wẽnnaamã, la b sak bãmb tõodã ne b noyã." 
2Chronicles14:4 A Aaza menesa maoong kʋʋb zĩisã sẽn be kunkubã zutã, la wisdã yõogr zĩisã Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, la yẽnda rĩungã wakate, Zʋʋda soolmã zĩnda bãane." 
2Chronicles14:5 Yẽnda mee tẽms sẽn gũbg ne lalse. La tẽngã vɩɩmda bãane, la yʋʋm-kãens fãa pʋgẽ, ned ka leb n wa zab ne yẽnda ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo yẽnda vʋʋsgo." 
2Chronicles14:6 Dẽ, yẽnda yeela Zʋʋda nebã yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d me Zʋʋda tẽmsã n gũbg lals ne gãsdo, n ning kʋɩlems ne pɩgdse, tẽnga fãa sẽn zĩ bãanã yĩnga, bala, tõnd baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, tõnd baoo bãmb la b kõo tõnd vʋʋsg zĩigã fãa.» Dẽ, bãmb rag n meeme, la bãmb tɩlgame." 
2Chronicles14:7 Zʋʋda pʋgẽ, a Aaza rag n tara tãb-biis tus kobs-tã sẽn zãad gãn-bɛd la kãna, la Benzame pʋgẽ yaa tãb-biis tus-kobs-yi la pis-nii sẽn zãad gãn-bi, la sẽn mi tãp tãoob sõama. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa zabr gãndaado." 
2Chronicles14:8 Kuus ned a Zeera waa ne tãb-biis tus-kẽema la saar-dãmb kobs-tã n na n zabe, la yẽnda taa Maseera." 
2Chronicles14:9 La rĩm a Aaza yiime n na n seg yẽnda, la bãmb sũu tãp ne taab Sefata tãn-longã sẽn pẽ Mareesa wã." 
2Chronicles14:10 A Aaza kelmame n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Yãmb y yembr bal n tõe n zab n sõng ka-pãng soabã, wa yãmb sẽn tõe n zab n sõng pãng soabã. Dẽ wã yĩnga, sõng-y-do Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam! Bala, tõnd teega yãmba, la yaa yãmb yʋʋrã yĩng la tõnd wa n na n zab ne kʋʋn-kãngã fãa. Sẽn-Ka-saabo! Yãmb yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, ra bas-y tɩ ninsaalb tõog yãmb ye.»" 
2Chronicles14:11 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame t'a Aaza ne Zʋʋda nebã tõog Kuus nebã, la bãmb zoeeme." 
2Chronicles14:12 A Aaza ne neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã riga Kuus nebã n tãag Geraare, la bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tol n tõog n põs ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne bãmb tãb-biisã kʋʋ bãmb zãnga. La Zʋʋda nebã wʋka paoong wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles14:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeemã sẽn dag n yõk tẽms nins fãa sẽn dag n gilg Geraar tẽngã yĩng kɩtame tɩ bãmb zab ne tẽn-bãmb fãa n tõog-b n zɛ b paoongã fãa. Bala, b rag n tara paoong wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles14:14 La bãmb kɛɛ rũmsã yãg n sãame, n yõg rũm-bãoonego, la yʋgma wʋsgo. Dẽ bãmb lebg n leba Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles15:1 Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã waa a Odɛɛd biig a Azariya zugu," 
2Chronicles15:2 la yẽnda kẽnga rĩm a Aaza nengẽ n tɩ yeele: «Aaza, la yãmb fãa Zʋʋda ne Benzame nebã, kelg-y-yã! Yãmb sã n pa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb me na n paa ne yãmba. Yãmb sã n bao bãmba, bãmb na n basame tɩ y yãnd-ba. La yãmb sã n bas bãmba, bãmb me na n basa yãmba." 
2Chronicles15:3 Hal pĩnda, Israyɛll dag n kaoosame n ka leb n tar Wẽnnaam sɩd-sɩdã, la b ka tar maan-kʋʋd sẽn kõt zãmsgo, la b ka tar tõog ye. La b ra ka tar maan-kʋʋdb sẽn zãmsd bãmb ye, la b ra ka leb n tar Wẽnnaam tõodã me ye." 
2Chronicles15:4 La b toogã pʋgẽ, b lebgame n bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ b yãnd-ba." 
2Chronicles15:5 Wakat-kãng tɩ ned ba a ye rag n ka tõe n yi la a lebg n kẽ ne bãan ye, rag n yaa toog tẽmsã fãa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles15:6 Soolem-dãmbã rag n zabda ne taaba, la tẽmsã me ra zabda ne taaba. Bala, Wẽnnaam dag n rãmbda bãmb ne toog buud toor-toore." 
2Chronicles15:7 La sã n yaa yãmba, keng-y y sũuri, la y ra boog y raood ye. Bala, tʋʋm ninsã fãa yãmb sẽn maandã na n paama keoore.»" 
2Chronicles15:8 A Aaza sẽn wʋm a Odɛɛd biig a Azariya bãngr goamã, a paama raood n menes bõn-naandsã fãa sẽn be Zʋʋda ne Benzame soolmã pʋse, la ne tẽms nins yẽnda sẽn zab n dees Efrayiim tãmsẽ wã fãa pʋsẽ me. Yẽnda lebs n mee tẽn-kugr ning sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãongã noorã." 
2Chronicles15:9 A Aaza tigma Zʋʋda ne Benzame nebã, la neb nins sẽn dag n yi Efrayiim ne Manaase, la Sɩmyõ tẽmsã n be ne yẽnda a soolmã pʋgẽ. Bala, Israyɛll neb wʋsg rag n basa b tẽmsã wa n be yẽnda soolmã pʋgẽ, bãmb sẽn yãnd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã bee ne yẽnda wã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles15:10 La yaa a Aaza sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, kiuug a tãabẽ soabã la bãmb tigim taab Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles15:11 La badaare, bãmb yãka bũmb ningã b sẽn tɩ paam zabrã zĩigẽ wã n maan maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yaa niig kobs-yopoe, la rũm-bãooneg tus a yopoe." 
2Chronicles15:12 Dẽ, bãmb maana kaoola, n dɩk sard tɩ b na n baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã ne b sũur fãa, la ne b yamã fãa." 
2Chronicles15:13 La ned sẽn yaa bi-bɩɩg bɩ kãsmã, bɩ paga wall raoa, sã n ka bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, bɩ b kʋ-a a soaba." 
2Chronicles15:14 Dẽ, bãmb wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab n zẽk b koeesã n kaase, la b wẽ nug poak n peeb bard ne tãntãado," 
2Chronicles15:15 la Zʋʋda nebã fãa maana sũ-noog ne wẽen-kãnga. La bãmb wẽenegã sẽn dag n yaa ne b sũur fãa, la tɩ b baood Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne b sũur fãa wã yĩng kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas tɩ b yãnd bãmba, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b paam vɩ-bãan ne b yagsã fãa." 
2Chronicles15:16 La rĩm a Aaza kɩtame tɩ b ka leb n boond a ma a Maaka tɩ rĩmã ma ye. Bala, rĩmã ma rag n maana wẽn-naan-yoog a Aseera bõn-naandga. A Aaza kɩtame tɩ b lub wẽn-naan-yoog-kãng n pãba n wã n yõog-a bugum Sedrõ kʋɩlgã long pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles15:17 La yẽnda yaool n ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã Israyɛll soolmã pʋgẽ ye. La ne rẽ fãa, yẽnda kell n maana sẽn yaa tɩrg a vɩɩmã fãa tɛka." 
2Chronicles15:18 Yẽnda talla wanzuri wã ne sãnemã yẽnda ne a ba wã sẽn dag n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã n wa bĩng Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgẽ. 
2Chronicles15:19 La hal n tɩ tãag a Aaza naamã reegr tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu yʋʋmdã, zabr ka tol n zĩnd ye." 
2Chronicles16:1 A Aaza naamã reegr tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la yoaablẽ, la Israyɛll rĩm a Basa yik zabr ne Zʋʋda, la yẽnda mee lalg n gũbg Rama, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n gɩdg Zʋʋda rĩm a Aaza t'a ra yi ye." 
2Chronicles16:2 Dẽ, a Aaza yãka wanzuri la sãnem Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ, la rĩma zak laog bĩngr zĩigẽ n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kõ a Bɛn-Hadaad sẽn be Siiri wã. La a yeel-a yaa:" 
2Chronicles16:3 «Kaool ning sẽn be maam ne yãmb sʋkã, la tõnd ba-rãmbã sʋkã yĩnga, ade, mam tʋma wanzuri wã ne sãnemã tɩ b wa kõ yãmbã. Moasã bɩ y kẽng n sãam kaool ning sẽn be yãmb ne Israyɛll rĩm a Basa sʋkã, t'a ra leb n wa zab ne maam ye.»" 
2Chronicles16:4 A Bɛn-Hadaad kelga rĩm a Aaza, dẽ, yẽnda tʋma a tãb-biisã nanambs tɩ b tɩ zab ne Israyɛll tẽmsã. La bãmb tõoga Iyon, Dan, Abɛll-Mayim tẽmsã, la Neftali tẽmsã, a sẽn dag n bĩngd a bɩle zĩis ninsã." 
2Chronicles16:5 A Basa sẽn wʋm dẽ, a bas-a meebã a sẽn dag n met Rama wã." 
2Chronicles16:6 La woto, a Aaza kẽng n tɩ wʋka kuga la raadã fãa n wa Zʋʋda. La b tall-b lame n me Geeva la Mispa tẽmsã, n paas-b pãnga." 
2Chronicles16:7 Yaa wakat-kãng la yãt a Hanani wa dĩmã a Aaza nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «Fo basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabã teegre, n tɩ teeg Siiri rĩmã. Woto yĩng kɩtame tɩ Siiri tãb-biisã na n põsg f nugẽ." 
2Chronicles16:8 Kuus ne Libi tãb-biisã rag n naaga taab n yaa neb kʋʋngo, n tar wiidi la saar-dãmb ka tɛka. Fo sẽn dag n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩngã, b kɩtame tɩ fo tõog-ba." 
2Chronicles16:9 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab geta dũniyã fãa gilli, n na n sõng neb nins sẽn nong bãmb ne b sũyã fãa wã. Yel-kãngã pʋgẽ, fo maana yalemdo, yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ sẽn sɩng ne moasã, fo na n paama zaba.»" 
2Chronicles16:10 A Aaza sũurã puuga ne yãtã, dẽ, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b yõk-a n kẽes roogo, bala, gomdã dag n yika a sũurã wʋsgo. La sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, a Aaza namsa soolmã neb kẽere." 
2Chronicles16:11 A Aaza vɩɩmã kibar sɩngr n tɩ tãag a baoosgã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll la a Zʋʋda dĩm-dãmba sebr pʋgẽ. 
2Chronicles16:12 A Aaza naamã yʋʋmd pis-tã la a wɛ soaba yʋʋmdã, a lʋɩ nao bãag sẽn yaa kɛgeng wʋsgo. La a bãagã pʋgẽ, a basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabã teegre, n teeg tɩt rãmba." 
2Chronicles16:13 A Aaza sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-naas la a ye, la a ki yã." 
2Chronicles16:14 La b mum-a-la yaoog ning a meng sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b tuk a Davɩɩd na-tẽngã pʋgẽ wã. B gãneg-a-la gãag sẽn pid ne parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la kaam buud toor-toor pʋgẽ n na seglg a kũumã. La b yõoga tɩdar me wʋsg a yĩnga." 
2Chronicles17:1 La a Aaza biig a Zozafat n led a ba zaoorẽ, la yẽnda paasa a naamã pãng soolmã fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles17:2 Yẽnda ninga tãb-biis Zʋʋda tẽms nins fãa sẽn tar lalsã pʋsẽ, la a ning tãb-sigs zĩis Zʋʋda tẽngã, la Efrayiim tẽms nins yẽnda ba a Aaza sẽn dag n zab n deesã pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles17:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda ne a Zozafate, bala, yẽnda maana wa a ba a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n maandã. La yẽnda ka pʋg Baall dãmbã ye." 
2Chronicles17:4 Yẽnda baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sẽn yaa a ba a Davɩɩd Wẽnnaamã, yẽnda kẽna wa sẽn zems bãmb tõodã, la yẽnda ka maan wa Israyɛll sẽn dag n maandã ye." 
2Chronicles17:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab paasa a Zozafat rĩungã pãnga. La Zʋʋda nebã fãa rag n tallda kũun n wat n kõt a Zozafate, dẽ kɩtame t'a paam arzɛk la waoogr wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles17:6 A Zozafat paama raood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sakrã pʋgẽ, hal n tol n kɩt tɩ b menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã sẽn be kunkubã zutã, la wẽn-naan-poak a Aseera ra-lugdsã fãa." 
2Chronicles17:7 La yẽnda sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, yẽnda yiisa a nanambs kẽer tɩ b saag n zãms Zʋʋda tẽmsã nebã: Bãmb yaa a Bɛn-Ayɩlle, a Obadiya, a Zakari, a Netaneyɛlle, a Mikaya." 
2Chronicles17:8 La Leevi neb kẽer n yãag-ba. Yaa a Semaya, a Netaniya, a Zebadiya, a Azayɛlle, a Semiramote, a Zonatã, a Adoniza, a Tobiza, a Toob-Adoniza, n paas maan-kʋʋdba a Elisama la a Zoram." 
2Chronicles17:9 Bãmb dag n zãada Sẽn-Ka-Saabã tõodã sebrã n zãmsd Zʋʋda nebã. Bãmb dag n saagda Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa n zãmsd nebã. 
2Chronicles17:10 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ rabeem kãseng yõk tẽms nins sẽn gilg-bã tɩ b ka yik zabr ne a Zozafat ye." 
2Chronicles17:11 Filistẽ-dãmbã me rag n wata ne kũuni, la ligd sẽn yaa yaood n kõt a Zozafate. La baa ne Araab-rãmb me rag n wata ne rũmsi, yaa pe-raad tus a yopoe la kobs-yopoe, la boees tus a yopoe la kobs-yopoe." 
2Chronicles17:12 A Zozafat pãnga rag n tara paasgo, la a mee tẽms sẽn gũbg ne lalse, la bɩle bĩngr zĩis Zʋʋda soolmã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles17:13 A Zozafat rag n tara bɩle wʋsg sẽn bĩng Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋse. La tãb-bi-gãndaad sẽn be Zeruzalɛm. 
2Chronicles17:14 Ad bãmb yʋyã sẽn gʋls wa sẽn zems b roto. Zʋʋda roogã tãb-biis tusr nanambs la woto: yaa a Adna yẽnda yaa tãb-biis tus kobs-tã sẽn yaa gãndaad naaba," 
2Chronicles17:15 leb n yaa a Yokana, yẽnda yaa tãb-biis tus kobs-yi la pis-nii naaba." 
2Chronicles17:16 Sẽn leb n paase, yaa a Zikri biig a Amatsɩya, yẽnda yãka yam ne yamleoog n na n maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã, la tãb-bi-gãndaad tus kobs-yi n dag n be ne yẽnda." 
2Chronicles17:17 Benzame roogã tãb-bi-gãndaoog yaa Eliyada, yẽnda rag n yaa neb tus kobs-yi, sẽn bob logd la tãbd n zãad gãndo." 
2Chronicles17:18 Sẽn paas yẽnda yaa a Zozabaade, yẽnda rag n tara tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii sẽn tar zab teed n yaa b naaba." 
2Chronicles17:19 Yaa tãb-biis nins sẽn tʋmd-b rĩma tʋʋma la woto, la b ka naag neb nins rĩma sẽn dag n ning tẽms nins a sẽn dag n me Zʋʋda soolmã pʋgẽ n gũbg ne lalsã pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Chronicles18:1 A Zozafat paama arzegs la waoogr wʋsgo. La yẽnda yõga reemd ne a Akaabe. 
2Chronicles18:2 La yʋʋm bilf sẽn looge, a Zozafat yikame n na n kẽng Samaari n tɩ pʋʋs a Akaabe. Woto, a Akaab kʋʋ piis la niig ka tɛka, a Zozafat ne a poorẽ dãmba fãa yĩnga, la yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a Zozafat sõng-a t'a tɩ zab ne Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaadã." 
2Chronicles18:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩm a Akaab soka Zʋʋda dĩm a Zozafat yaa: «Yãmb na n sak n wa tũu maam n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaadã bɩ?» La a Zozafat yeelame: «N-yẽe! Tõnd na n tũu yãmb n kẽng zabrã. Yãmb zabr yaa mam zabre, la yãmb nebã zabr yaa mam nebã zabre.»" 
2Chronicles18:4 A Zozafat leb n yeela Israyɛll dĩmã yaa: «La mam kot-y lame tɩ y reng n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gese.» 
2Chronicles18:5 Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã tigma a no-rɛɛsdb kobs-naasã n sok-b yaa: «D tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaadã bɩ, bɩ d tog n basame n ka kẽnge?» La bãmb fãa leokame n yeele: «Kẽng-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n ninga tẽngã rĩma nugẽ.»" 
2Chronicles18:6 La dĩm a Zozafat sokame yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saabã no-rɛɛs ba a ye ka be ka tɩ tõnd tõe n leb n soka n gese?»" 
2Chronicles18:7 La Israyɛll dĩmã leoka a Zozafat yaa: «Ned a ye n ket tɩ d tõe n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saabã n gese, yaa a Yimla biig a Miise, la mam kis-a lame. Bala, a zɩ n togs maam koɛɛg sẽn noom maam ye, yaa koe-beed bala.» La a Zozafat yeelame yaa: «Bɩ rĩma ra gom woto ye.»" 
2Chronicles18:8 Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã boola a sõgen a ye n yeel-a t'a bool a Yimla biig a Miise t'a wa tao-tao!" 
2Chronicles18:9 Israyɛll dĩmã ne Zʋʋda dĩmã dag n yeelga b naam futu, la bãmb ned kam fãa dag n zaoo a naam geer n be zĩ-vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be Samaari tẽngã noorã. La bãngdbã rag n yɛsa b taoore n gomd b bãngrã goamã." 
2Chronicles18:10 A Kenaana biig a Sedesiyaas dag n kuda kut yɩɩla, la a yeelame: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: ‹Ne yɩɩn-bãmbã, fo na n tãa Siiri nebã hal n kʋ-b zãnga.› »" 
2Chronicles18:11 La bãngdbã fãa rag n gomda gom-yɛng n yetẽ: «Kẽng-y Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã, tɩ y na n tõog-a lame! Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n ning-a-la dĩmã nugẽ.»" 
2Chronicles18:12 Ned ning rĩmã sẽn tʋm t'a tɩ bool a Miise wã yeela a Miise yaa: «Bãngdbã fãa zemsa taab noor a ye n gomd n kãabd dĩmã noogo. Bɩ fo me maan wa bãmba, n gom n kãab rĩma noogo.»" 
2Chronicles18:13 Dẽ, a Miise leok-a lame n yeele: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã, tɩ yaa bãmb sẽn na n yeel maam bũmb ninga bal la m na n togse.»" 
2Chronicles18:14 A Miise sẽn ta rĩmã nengẽ wã, rĩmã sok-a lame yaa: «Miise, d tog n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã bɩ, bɩ m tog n basame n ka kẽnge?» La a Miise leokame n yeele: «Kẽng-y tɩ y na n tõogame! La Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ reeg tẽmsã.»" 
2Chronicles18:15 La rĩmã yeela a Miise yaa: «Naoor a wãn la m na n kɩt tɩ f wẽen tɩ f na n togs-m-la sɩd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩnga?» 
2Chronicles18:16 Dẽ, a Miise leokame n yeel yaa: «Mam yãnda Israyɛll nebã gill sẽn sãeeg tãmsã zutu, wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩm ye. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: Nin-bãmbã ka leb n tar Soaal ye. Bɩ ned kam fãa lebg n kuil a yir ne bãane.»" 
2Chronicles18:17 Israyɛll dĩmã yeela a Zozafat yaa: «M dag n ka pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ nin-kãngã zɩ n togs maam koɛɛg sẽn noom tɩ sã n ka koe-beed bala?» 
2Chronicles18:18 Dẽ, a Miise yeelame: «Bɩ y kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga. M yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b zao b geerẽ wã, tɩ saasẽ tãb-biisã yɛs b goabg la rɩtgo." 
2Chronicles18:19 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokame: ‹Ãnda n na n belg Israyɛll dĩm a Akaabe, t'a kẽng Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã n tɩ ki.› La ned n leok gomde, t'a to me leok gomd a to." 
2Chronicles18:20 Woto, sɩɩg n wa n kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n yeele: ‹maam n na n tɩ belg-a!› La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sok-a lame yaa: ‹Fo na n maana wãn-wãn n belg-a?›" 
2Chronicles18:21 Tɩ sɩɩgã yeele: ‹M na kẽngame, la m na n lebga zĩrẽ-beed sɩɩg a bãngdbã fãa noyẽ.› Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeel-a lame yaa: ‹Sã n yaa woto, f na n belg-a lame, la f na n tõog n tudg-a lame, kẽng n maan a boto!›" 
2Chronicles18:22 La a Miise leb n yeelame: ‹Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ zĩrẽ-beed sɩɩg kẽ y bãngdbã tɩ b gomda, la b yaool n yãka yam n na maan yãmb wẽnga.› »" 
2Chronicles18:23 Dẽ, la a Kenaana biig a Sedesiyaas kolg n wẽ a Miise noorã n yeele: «Yaa so-bʋg la Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã tũu n yi mam pʋgẽ wã n wa be fo pʋgẽ n gomda?»" 
2Chronicles18:24 La a Miise yeelame: «Fo sẽn n wat n zoet n kẽed ro-yaang n na n soondã la f na n bãnge.» 
2Chronicles18:25 Woto, Israyɛll dĩmã yeelame yaa: «Yõk-y-yã a Miise, n tɩ kɩs tẽngã komber a Amo, la na-biig a Zoaase." 
2Chronicles18:26 La y yeel-b yaa: ‹Dĩmã koɛɛg la woto: Kẽes-y nin-kãngã roogo, la y kõt a bur la koom bala, n gũud m sẽn na n lɛɛg n wa ne bãane.› »" 
2Chronicles18:27 La a Miise yeelame: «Yãmb sã n tɩ paam tõogr n lebg n wa, rẽnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka gom ne mam noor ye.» La a leb n yeel yaa: «Nebã fãa, bɩ y kelge.»" 
2Chronicles18:28 Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã, ne Zʋʋda dĩm a Zozafate, kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaad soolmẽ wã." 
2Chronicles18:29 La Israyɛll dĩmã yeela a Zozafat yaa: «Ade, mam na n toeema fut n kẽng zabrã, la ne yãmba, bɩ y yeelg-y y naam fuugu.» Dẽ, Israyɛll dĩmã sɩd teema futu, tɩ b kẽng zabrã." 
2Chronicles18:30 La Siiri dĩmã yaool n dag n kõ-a saar-dãmbã nanambs no-kãnga: «Da bao-y n na n zab-y ne nin-naaba, bɩ nin-zaalg ye, zab-y ne Israyɛll dĩmã bala.»" 
2Chronicles18:31 Dẽ, saar-dãmbã nanambse sẽn yãnd a Zozafatã, b yeelame: «Yaa Israyɛll dĩmã!» La woto, b fãa wẽnemdame n tɩ gũbg a Zozafate. La a Zozafat kelmame, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa sõng-a lame n kɩt tɩ b zãag n bas-a." 
2Chronicles18:32 Bala, bãmb sẽn bãng tɩ ka Israyɛll dĩmã yĩnga, b loogame n bas-a." 
2Chronicles18:33 La rao a yembr n waa n yãag a tãp n tão yaare tɩ yõk Israyɛll dĩmã kutã fuug sogbã zĩigẽ wã. Dẽ, dĩmã yeela sẽn tɛt-a saarã yaa: «Wẽnemd tɩ m yi zabrã sʋka, tɩ m paama sãmpogre.»" 
2Chronicles18:34 Zabrã wɩnga wʋsg badaare, la Israyɛll dĩmã kell n yalsa yĩngr a saarã pʋg hal tɩ ta zaabr Siiri nebã taoore, la wĩndgã lʋɩɩs wakate, yẽnda kiime." 
2Chronicles19:1 La sã n yaa ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafate, yẽnda leba a tẽngẽ wã Zeruzalɛm ne laafɩ." 
2Chronicles19:2 A Anani biig a Zehu sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã kẽng n tɩ sega rĩm a Zozafat n yeel-a yaa: «B tog n sõnga nin-wẽng la? Bɩ fo nonga neb nins sẽn kis Sẽn-Ka-Saabã? Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yika ne foom." 
2Chronicles19:3 La baoosgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãame tɩ fo maana sẽn yaa neere. Bala, fo kɩtame tɩ b yõog wẽn-naan-poak a Aseera ra-lugdsã fãa sẽn be soolmã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
2Chronicles19:4 A Zozafat tɩ zĩnda Zeruzalɛm. La dẽ poore, a yi n saag n gesa a nebã, la sẽn sɩng ne Beerseba n tɩ ta Efrayiim tãngã, yẽnda talla nebã tɩ b lebg n wa tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles19:5 La yẽnda lugla bʋ-kaoodb soolmã fãa pʋga, ne Zʋʋda tẽms nins fãa sẽn tar pãngã pʋse, la tẽng fãa pʋga." 
2Chronicles19:6 La a yeel bʋ-kaoodb yaa: «Maan-y gũusg neer ne bũmb ning yãmb sẽn na n maan-a. Bala, ka ninsaal yĩng la yãmb sẽn kaood bʋʋdã ye. La yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. La bãmb na n zĩnda ne yãmb y bʋʋdã kaoob wakate." 
2Chronicles19:7 Moasã, bɩ y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Maan-y gũusgu, la y maan-y tʋʋmã neere. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam ka kaood bʋʋd kegre, la b ka bak ned n bʋ, la b ka reeg kũun n yaool n kao bʋʋd ye.»" 
2Chronicles19:8 La Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ me, a Zozafat yãka Leevi nebã, la maan-kʋʋdba, ne Israyɛll buudã nanambs kẽer n lugl tɩ b na n kaood bʋʋdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr yĩnga, n welsd Zeruzalɛm nebã yɛl ne taaba." 
2Chronicles19:9 La a kõ bãmb me noor n yeel-b yaa: «Yãmb na n maana y tʋʋmã Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees pʋga, la ne sɩd la pʋ-peelem." 
2Chronicles19:10 Yãmb saam-biisã sã n yi b tẽmsã pʋsẽ n wa ne yell tɩ b bʋ, sã n yaa nin-kʋʋb yelle, bɩ tõodo, noyã, wa minind yelle, bɩ y zãms bãmb tɩ b ra wa beeg ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ b sũurã wa yik ne yãmb ne saam-biisã ye. Bɩ y maan-y-yã a woto, la taal kõ zĩnd yãmb zug ye." 
2Chronicles19:11 Ade, maan-kʋʋd kãsmã a Amarya n tar noor ne yãmb fãa, sã n yaa ne yɛl nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã, la Zʋʋda buudã naab a Zevadyahu sẽn yaa a Ismayɛll biigã, n tar noor ne yãmb fãa, sã n yaa ne yɛl nins sẽn kẽed ne rĩmã tʋʋmã, la Leevi nebã n na n sõngd yãmb ne sɛbã gʋlsg yelle. Woto yĩngã, bɩ y paam raoodo, la y tʋme! La bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã zĩnd ne ned ning sẽn na n maan-a neere.»" 
2Chronicles20:1 Bõn-kãens zugẽ, Moaab nebã, ne Amo nebã, n paas Mao nebã, waame n na zab ne a Zozafate." 
2Chronicles20:2 La b wa n togsa a Zozafat n yeel-a yaa: «Neb kʋʋng wʋsg sẽn yi ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde, sẽn sɩng ne Siiri, n wa n na n zab ne yãmba, la b bee Hatsatsõ-Tamaar sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Ɛnd-Gedi.› »" 
2Chronicles20:3 Dẽ, rabeem wʋsg yõka a Zozafate, t'a yãk yam n na n bao Sẽn-Ka-saabo, yẽnda moona no-loeer Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles20:4 Zʋʋda nebã tigmame n na n bao Sẽn-Ka-saabo. Nebã yii Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ n na n wa bao Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
2Chronicles20:5 A Zozafat yalsa Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm zãma wã sʋka, bãmb dag n tigma taab Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋg sẽn teesd zag-paalgã noorã." 
2Chronicles20:6 La a yeelame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb bal n yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn be saasẽ, la y rɩta naam soolem toay-toayã rĩundã fãa zutu. Yãmb tara pãng la tõogo, la ned ba a yembr ka tõe n yals yãmb taoor ye." 
2Chronicles20:7 Tõnd Wẽnnaam, ka yãmb n dig tẽn-kãngã nebã Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã taoore, n dɩk b tẽngã n kõ a Abrahaam sẽn yaa y zoa wã yagens sɩda?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Bãmb kẽe tẽngã n zĩndi, la b mee sɛk roog yãmb yĩnga, la y yʋʋrã yĩnga, n yeele:"
