2Chronicles20:9 ‹Toog sã n wa paam tõndo: Sã n yaa tẽn-kũum, wall bã-longdem bɩ kom, tɩ tõnd sã n yals yãmb taoor do-kãngã y yʋʋrã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã taoore, n kelem n bool yãmb d toogã pʋgẽ, yãmb na n leoka tõndo, n fãag-do.› »" 
2Chronicles20:10 «La moasã, ad Amo ne Moaab tẽngã nebã, la Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã nebã, sẽn wa n na n zab ne tõndo. Yãmb sẽn wa n yiis Israyɛll kambã Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã, yãmb ka sak tɩ Israyɛll kambã kẽ b tẽmsẽ wã ye. Bala, bãmb gila tẽn-bãmb n loog n ka sãam-b ye." 
2Chronicles20:11 La ade, nin-bãmbã sẽn dond tõnd bũmb ninga, yaa tɩ b wa n na n diga tõnd n yiis yãmb soolem ning y sẽn kõ tõndã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles20:12 Tõnd Wẽnnaam, dẽ yĩnga, yãmb kõn kao bãmb bʋʋd sɩda? Bala, tõnd ka pãng ne zãma-kãngã sẽn wa n na n zab ne tõndã ye. Tõnd ka mi d sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga ye. Tõnd ninã geta yãmb bala.»" 
2Chronicles20:13 Zʋʋda nebã fãa rag n yasa Sẽn-Ka-Saabã taoor ne b zagsã rãmb fãa, b pagba, la b kamba." 
2Chronicles20:14 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã siga Leevi ned a Zakari biig a Azayɛll zug zãma wã sʋka. A Zakari yaa a Benaya biiga, t'a Benaya yaa a Yeyiyɛll biiga, t'a Yeyiyɛll yaa Leevi ned a Mataniya biiga, la bãmb yaa a Azaf yagense." 
2Chronicles20:15 Dẽ, a Azayɛll yeelame yaa: «Yãmb sẽn yaa Zʋʋda, ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, la yãmb rĩm a Zozafate! Kelg-y neere, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet yãmba: ‹Da zoe-y rabeem, la y ra yɛɛs-y zãma-kãngã taoor ye. Bala, zab-kãngã ka yãmb zabr ye, yaa Wẽnnaam zabre.›" 
2Chronicles20:16 Beoogo, bɩ y sig n zab ne y bɛɛbã. Ade, bãmb na n tũu Sɩts kunkubrã zug sorã n wa, la yãmb na n yãnda bãmb ko-soogã noor sẽn tees Yeruwɛll we-raoogã." 
2Chronicles20:17 La bãng-y tɩ ka zabr la y na n zab ye. Kẽng-y be n tɩ yalse, yals-y yĩngr bal n ges fãagr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n fãag Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã. Da zoe-y rabeem, la ra yɛɛs-y ye! Beoogo, bɩ y yi n seg-ba, la maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zĩnda ne yãmba.»" 
2Chronicles20:18 A Zozafat sẽn wʋm woto, a wõgemdame n fõgen a neng tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa me wõgemdame n fõgen b nens tẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
2Chronicles20:19 La a Kehat yagensã, ne a Koore yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nebã yikame n zẽk b koees ne pãnga, n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles20:20 La vẽkembeoog yibeoog pĩnda, nebã yikame n yi n na n kẽng Tekoa we-raoogẽ wã. Bãmb sẽn wa n loogdẽ wã, a Zozafat yeel-b lame: «Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, kelg-y maam, teeg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb na n tebenda yãmba, kɩs-y b no-rɛɛsdbã sɩda, la yãmb na n tõogame!»" 
2Chronicles20:21 Woto, a Zozafat yẽsa ne nebã, la a yãk yɩɩn-yɩɩndb Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, tɩ b na n lʋɩ tãb-biisã taoore, n pẽgd Sẽn-Ka-Saab b sẽn yaa pʋ-peelem soabã yĩng n yetẽ: «Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!»" 
2Chronicles20:22 La wakat ning bãmb sẽn zẽk b koees n yɩɩnd pẽgr yɩɩlã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ zũnglug zĩnd Amo ne Moaabe, la Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã nebã sẽn dag n wa Zʋʋda wã sʋka, tɩ b kʋ taaba." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amo ne Moaab nebã naaga taab n zab ne neb nins sẽn yit-b Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n kʋ-b zãnga. Bãmb sẽn kʋ Seyɩɩr nebã zãng n sɛ, bãmb wẽnemdame n kʋ taaba." 
2Chronicles20:24 Zʋʋda nebã sẽn ta kunkubr ning zug b sẽn dʋʋd n get we-raoogã, bãmb wẽnemdame n ges kʋʋngã sẽn beẽ wã sẽnẽ, la b mikame tɩ yaa kũum bal n dʋre, ned ba a yembr ka põs ye." 
2Chronicles20:25 Woto, a Zozafat ne a nebã kẽngame n tɩ zɛ b paoongã, la b yãnda rũms wʋsgo, la arzegse, ne kũum wʋsgo, la te-sõama buud toor-toore. Ned kam fãa wʋkame hal n ka tõe n tʋk ye. La yaa rasem a tãab la bãmb sẽn dɩk n zɛ teedã, bala, teedã rag n yaa wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles20:26 La rasem a naasã daare, bãmb tigma taab Beraka tãn-longẽ wã n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabã barka, yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ b boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Beraka hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
2Chronicles20:27 Dẽ, a Zozafat lʋɩɩ Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa taoore, tɩ b lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm ne sũ-noogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag bãmb b bɛɛbã nusẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles20:28 Bãmb wẽe kʋla, la b wãag ruudsi, la b peebd tãntãad n kẽ Zeruzalɛm hal n ta Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles20:29 Soolem-dãmb a taabã sẽn wʋm tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõnga Israyɛll n zab ne b bɛɛbã, Wẽnnaam dabeem zoees yõka bãmba." 
2Chronicles20:30 Woto, a Zozafat soolmã zĩnda bãane, la yẽnda Wẽnnaamã kõ-a-la vʋʋsg tẽngã todsã fãa pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles20:31 A Zozafat rɩɩ naam Zʋʋda soolmã pʋga. Yẽnda sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu, la yẽnda zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi la a nu, a ma wã yʋʋr la a Azuba, n yaa a Sɩlki biiga." 
2Chronicles20:32 A Zozafat tũ a ba a Aaza naoor n ka tol n bʋdg ye. Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa neer Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. 
2Chronicles20:33 La baoosgo, b kell n ka menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ye. Bala, nebã rag n nan ka loe b sũyã zãng fasɩ ne Wẽnnaam ning sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã wẽnnaamã ye." 
2Chronicles20:34 A Zozafat tʋʋm a taabã a sẽn maanã sɩngr n tɩ tãag a baoosg fãa gʋlsa a Hanani biig a Zehu sebrã pʋgẽ, la yaa seb-kãng la b tall n gʋls Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã sebre." 
2Chronicles20:35 Dẽ zugẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Zozafat tɩ maana lageng ne Israyɛll dĩm a Akaazɩya, la a Akaazɩya yaool n dag n maanda wẽnga." 
2Chronicles20:36 Bãmb lagma taab n na n maan koom kogond sẽn na n kẽnd Tarsɩɩse. Bãmb maana koom kogendã Esɩyõ Gebɛɛr tẽngã. 
2Chronicles20:37 La Maresa tẽng rao a Dodawayu biig a Eliyezɛɛr togsa a Zozafat pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel-a yaa: «Fo sẽn tɩ naag f meng ne a Akaazɩya wã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sãama fo tʋʋma.» La koom kogendã sãamame n ka tol n tõog n kẽng Tarsɩɩs ye." 
2Chronicles21:1 A Zozafat saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a ba-rãmb yaadẽ, a Davɩɩd na-tẽnga pʋga. La a biig a Zoram n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Chronicles21:2 A Zoram rag n tara saam-biisi, yaa a Azariya, a Yekiyɛlle, a Zakari, a Azariya, ne a Mikayɛlle, la a Sefatiya, bãmb fãa rag n yaa Israyɛll rĩm a Zozafat kamba." 
2Chronicles21:3 Bãmb ba a Zozafat ra kõo bãmb kũun wʋsgo. Yaa wanzuri, sãnem, la te-sõmy buud toor-toore, la tẽms sẽn me n gũbg Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ, la yẽnda yaool n dɩka naamã n kõ a Zoram, bala, yẽnda n dag n yaa bi-kãsenga." 
2Chronicles21:4 A Zoram sẽn led a ba wã n dɩ naamã, a naamã waa n paama pãnga, woto, yẽnda yõga a yaopã fãa ne Israyɛll taoor dãmb kẽer n kʋ ne zabr sʋʋga." 
2Chronicles21:5 A Zoram sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiibu, la yẽnda zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋm a nii." 
2Chronicles21:6 La yẽnda rɩka Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã naoore, n maan wa a Akaab buudã sẽn da maanã. Bala, yẽnda da rɩka a Akaab bi-pugl n maan a paga. Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
2Chronicles21:7 Baoosgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n ka rat n sãam a Davɩɩd doogã ye. Bala, bãmb dag n maana kaool ne a Davɩɩd n yeel t'a ka na n kong yageng sẽn na n led a zĩigẽ ye." 
2Chronicles21:8 La a Zoram rĩungã wakate, Edom tẽngã zãgsame tɩ Zʋʋda tẽngã ka na n leb n soog yẽnda ye. La bãmb yãka b toorẽ dĩma." 
2Chronicles21:9 Woto, a Zoram ne a nanambs la a saar-dãmbã fãa kẽngame n na n tɩ zabe. Dẽ, bãmb yika ne yʋng n zab ne Edom nebã sẽn gũbg bãmbã n tõog-b ne b saar-dãmbã nanambsã." 
2Chronicles21:10 La baoosg zãnga, Edom tẽngã kell n zãgsame tɩ Zʋʋda ka na n soog bãmb hal tɩ ta rũndã. La wakat-kãng me, Libna tẽngã neb me yikame n zãgsa a Zoram rĩungã. Bala, yẽnda basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa a yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles21:11 A Zoram tol n kɩtame tɩ b me maoong kʋʋb zĩis Zʋʋda tãmsã zutu, n kɩt tɩ Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã waoog bõn-naandse." 
2Chronicles21:12 La daar a yembre Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Eli gʋlsa a Zoram sebr n yeel-a yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo yaab a Davɩɩd Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta: Fo sẽn ka rɩk f ba a Zozafat la f yaab a Aaza sẽn yɩ Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã naoorã yĩnga," 
2Chronicles21:13 la fo sẽn maan wa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã waoog bõn-naands wa a Akaab buudã sẽn maanã, la fo sẽn kʋ f yaopã sẽn yaa fo saam-biisã tɩ b yaool n dag n são foomã yĩng kɩtame," 
2Chronicles21:14 tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩt tɩ to-kãseng paam f nebã, ne f kambã, la f pagbã, la bũmb ning fãa f sẽn so wã zugu." 
2Chronicles21:15 La fo mengã na n paama bã-kegemse, la na n yɩɩ pʋg-roog bãaga. Bãagã na n tara yãngr daar fãa, hal tɩ f yãadã wa yita.»" 
2Chronicles21:16 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Araab-rãmb nins sẽn be Kuus sẽnẽ wã sũy yik ne a Zoram." 
2Chronicles21:17 La bãmb wa n zaba ne Zʋʋda soolmã, n kẽ tẽngã n wʋk paoong nins fãa sẽn da be rĩmã zak pʋgẽ wã, la baa ne a kom-dibli wã ne a pagbã fãa, yaa a Zoakaaz sẽn dag n yaa bi-yao wã bal n põse." 
2Chronicles21:18 Rẽ loogr poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lobga a Zoram pʋg bãag sẽn ka tõe n maage." 
2Chronicles21:19 Bãaga rag n tara yãngr daar fãa, la yʋʋm a yiibã baoosgẽ, bãagã kɩtame t'a yãadã yi, la a Zoram kii to-kãseng pʋgẽ. La a nebã ka yõog wisd a yĩng wa b sẽn maan ne a yaab-rãmbã ye." 
2Chronicles21:20 A Zoram sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiibu, la yẽnda zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋm a nii. Yẽnda kiime tɩ ned ba a ye ka yãb-a ye. B mum-a-la a Davɩɩd tẽnga pʋga, la ka yɩ rĩm-dãmbã yaadẽ ye." 
2Chronicles22:1 Zeruzalɛm nebã Yãka yẽnda bi-yao a Akaazɩya t'a led a ba zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã. Bala, kʋʋng ning sẽn tũ Araab-rãmb n wa wã ra kʋʋ a kẽem-dãmbã fãa." 
2Chronicles22:2 A Akaazɩya sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-naas la a yiibu, la yẽnda zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋmd a ye. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr la a Atali n yaa a Omri bi-pugla." 
2Chronicles22:3 A Akaazɩya maana wa a Akaab buudã sẽn dag n maan bũmb ningã. Bala, a ma wã rag n sagend-a lame t'a maand wẽnga." 
2Chronicles22:4 A Akaazɩya maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa a Akaab buudã sẽn maan bũmb ningã. Bala, a ba wã kũum poore, a rag n tara sagendb tɩ b sagend-a t'a na n sãame." 
2Chronicles22:5 La yaa bãmb saglsã yĩng n kɩt t'a kẽng n tɩ naag a Akaab biig a Zoram sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã, n na n tɩ zab ne Siiri rĩm a Azayɛll Ramot tẽngã sẽn be Galaadã. La Siiri nebã pogla a Zoram beenẽ." 
2Chronicles22:6 La yẽnda lebg n waa Zɩɩzreyɛll n na n tɩp a meng ne poglg ning yẽnda sẽn paam a sẽn wa n zabd ne Siiri naab a Azayɛll Ramotã. Woto, a Zoram biig a Akaazɩya sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩma kẽnga Zɩɩzreyɛlle, n na n tɩ ges a Akaab biig a Zoram, a sãmpogrã sẽn gãneg-a yĩnga." 
2Chronicles22:7 Wẽnnaam kɩtame t'a Akaazɩya sẽn wa n na n ges a Zoramã tũ ne a kũum. Sɩdã, yẽnda sẽn ta be wã, a yii be ne a Zoram n na n sega a Nimsi biig a Zehu, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n kɩtame tɩ b pʋdg a Zehu zugã kaam n yãka t'a menes a Akaab buudã." 
2Chronicles22:8 A Zehu sẽn wa n pids Wẽnnaam bʋ-kaoorã a Akaab buudã zugã, a sega a Zʋʋda nanambsã ne a Akaazɩya kẽem-dãmbã kamb sẽn da yaa rĩma tʋmtʋmdbã, la yẽnda kʋ-b la zãnga." 
2Chronicles22:9 A Zehu kɩtame tɩ b baoo a Akaazɩya. La a Akaaziyaas rag n kẽe Samaari tẽmsã n soonde. La b yõk-a lame n wa kɩs a Zehu t'a kʋ-a, la b mum-a lame n yetẽ: «Yaa a Zozafat sẽn da baood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ne a sũur fãa wã, biiga.» A Akaazɩya roogẽ wã, ned dag n ka leb n be sẽn dag n tõe n dɩ naam ye." 
2Chronicles22:10 La a Akaazɩya ma a Atali sẽn yã t'a biigã kiime, a yikame n kʋ Zʋʋda buudã na-biis fãa." 
2Chronicles22:11 La a Zoseba sẽn yaa rĩma bi-puglã dɩka a Akaazɩya biig a Zoaas n yiis rĩmã kamb sẽn dag n dat n kʋ wã sʋka, la yẽnda tɩ solga biigã ne a yaoondã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ro-gãag pʋgẽ. Woto Rĩm a Zoram bi-pugl a Zoseba sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada paga, n yaa a Akaazɩya tão-poakã solga a Zoaas tɩ b ka paam-a n kʋ ye." 
2Chronicles22:12 A Zoaas paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg n soond ne pagbã a yiibã yʋʋm a yoobe. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa a Atali n dɩt naamã soolmã pʋgẽ. 
2Chronicles23:1 Yʋʋm a yopoe soabã pʋga, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada paama pãnga, n maan kaool ne tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã. Yaa a Zeroham biig a Azariya, na a Yohanan biig a Ismayɛlle, la a Obɛɛb biig a Azariya, ne a Adaya biig a Maseya, la a Zikri biig a Elisafate." 
2Chronicles23:2 Nin-bãmb yikame n saag Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa, n tigs Leevi nebã, ne Israyɛll buudã nanambs tɩ b wa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles23:3 La zãma wã fãa sẽn tigma maana kaool ne rĩmã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. La a Zehozada yeel-b lame yaa: «Ade, rĩm a Akaazɩya biigã la woto, yẽnda n tog n dɩ naamã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kãab n gom a Davɩɩd kambã wɛɛngẽ wã." 
2Chronicles23:4 Dẽ wã, ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga. Maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi neb nins sẽn tog n maan b tʋʋmdã vʋʋsg daarã, na n weela taab sull a tãabo, sull a ye wã na n gũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoore," 
2Chronicles23:5 tɩ sull a yembrã gũ na-yirã, t'a yembrã zĩnd rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Yesoodã, la nebã fãa sẽn ketã na n zĩnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnd doogã zak pʋga." 
2Chronicles23:6 Ned ba a ye ka tog n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg tɩ sã n ka maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã sẽn tʋmd badaarã ye. Bãmb tõe n kẽeme, bala, b welga bãmb toore. La bɩ nebã fãa sak n maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bũmb ningã." 
2Chronicles23:7 Leevi nebã na n gũbga rĩma. La bãmb ned kam fãa na n zãada a zab-teedo, la ned sã n kɩɩs n kẽ bɩ b kʋ-a, la bãmb tog n yãaga dĩmã a sẽn dabd zĩig ningã fãa.»" 
2Chronicles23:8 Leevi nebã ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa maana wa maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada sẽn yeel bãmb bũmb ningã. Dẽ, tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã fãa peega a nebã. Yaa neb nins sẽn da sɩngd-b tʋʋma, la sẽn sigd-b tʋʋmã vʋʋsg raarã, bala, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada ka bas ned ba a yembr t'a kuil ye." 
2Chronicles23:9 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada wʋka kãna, ne gãn-bɛd la gãn-bãooneg nins sẽn dag n yaa dĩm a Davɩɩd dẽndã sẽn dag n be Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgã, n kõ tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã." 
2Chronicles23:10 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ nebã zãad b zab-teedã n yals sẽn sɩng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rɩtg kɩrengã, n tɩ tãag a goabg kɩrengã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tẽn-kugrã sɛɛga, n yegl Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã n gũbg rĩma." 
2Chronicles23:11 La a Zehozada ne a kambã yiisa rĩma biig n fõgna naamã maanfo, la b kõ-a kãabgã kaset sebr n kõ-a naamã. La bãmb pʋdga yẽnda naam kaam n kelem n yeele: «Wẽnd na kaoos rĩmã.»" 
2Chronicles23:12 A Atali sẽn wʋm nebã sẽn zoet la b kaasdẽ n yetẽ tɩ Wẽnd na kaoos rĩma bʋrgã, yẽnda yikame n bʋʋg nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga." 
2Chronicles23:13 La yẽnda sẽn gesã, a mikame tɩ rĩma yɛsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noore. La bar-pɛɛbdbã, ne tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã ra yɛsa rĩma sɛɛgẽ. La tẽngã nebã fãa ra maanda sũ-noogo, la b ra peebda tãntãado, tɩ yʋʋmbã wẽed b yʋʋm teedã tɩ nebã yɩɩndẽ. Woto a Atali kẽesa a futã n kelem n yeele: «B zãmba maam, b zãmba maam!»" 
2Chronicles23:14 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada kɩtame tɩ tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã sẽn yaa tãb-biisã taoor dãmbã yi, la a yeel-b yaa: «Yiis-y-yã-a nebã sʋka! La ned ning sẽn na n pʋga pʋg-kãngã, bɩ b kʋ a soab ne zabr sʋʋga!» Bala, maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada rag n yeelame tɩ b ra kʋ-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋgẽ ye!" 
2Chronicles23:15 Dẽ, bãmb yõka a Atali n tall-a n tees na-yirã sẽnẽ, la bãmb sẽn ta na-yirã wiidi rignoorẽ wã, b kʋ-a lame." 
2Chronicles23:16 A Zehozada, ne rĩmã, la nin-buiidã maana kaool tɩ bãmb na n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nebã." 
2Chronicles23:17 La nin-buiidã fãa tũu taab n kẽng zĩig ning a Baall doogã sẽn be wã, n tɩ tusa n lubi, la b wã a tẽn-kugã ne a wẽn-naandgã, la b kʋ Baall maan-kʋʋd a Matã tẽn-kugã taoore." 
2Chronicles23:18 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zehozada rɩka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmd yell n kõ maan-kʋʋdbã, la ne Leevi nebã. A Davɩɩd da welg-b lame n kõ ned kam fãa ne a tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgã, tɩ wa a Moyiis tõogã sẽn gʋls to-to wã, bɩ b maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugum ne yɩɩl la sũ-noogo." 
2Chronicles23:19 La Davɩɩd da kɩtame tɩ gũudb gũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoy sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ra tõog n kẽ be ye. 
2Chronicles23:20 Maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada kɩtame tɩ tãb-biis kobs-kobs nanambsã, la nanambsã, la nin-buiidã taoor dãmbã, la tẽngã nebã fãa peeg rĩmã n yiis Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg n tũ yĩngr dignoorã n kẽ na-zakẽ wã, n zaoolg-a a naamã geer zugu." 
2Chronicles23:21 Tẽngã nebã fãa rag n maanda sũ-noogo, la b sẽn kʋ a Atali ne zabr sʋʋgã poore, tẽngã gãanda bãane." 
2Chronicles24:1 A Zoaas sẽn wa n na deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm a yopoe, la yẽnda zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-naase. A Zoaas ma wã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Sɩvya n yit Bɛɛrseba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada vɩɩmã fãa tɛka, a Zoaas maana sẽn noom Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Chronicles24:3 Maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada baoo pagb a yiib n kõ a Zoaase, la a roga kom-dibli, la kom-pugli." 
2Chronicles24:4 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zoaas yãka yam n na n maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
2Chronicles24:5 Woto, yẽnda tigma maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã n yeel-b yaa: «Saag-y Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ yʋʋmd fãa, n deeg ligd Israyɛll nebã fãa nengẽ, tɩ yʋʋmd fãa, bɩ y manegdẽ y Wẽnnaamã roogo, la maan-y tao-tao!» La Leevi nebã ka maan tao-tao ye." 
2Chronicles24:6 Dẽ, rĩm boola maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Zehozada n yeel-a yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo ka kɩt tɩ Leevi nebã saag Zʋʋda pʋgẽ n dees yaood ning a Moyiis ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n lugl Sɛk roogã yĩngã." 
2Chronicles24:7 Bala, sã n yaa ne nin-wẽng a Atali, pʋg-kãngã kambã wurga Wẽnnaam doogã n kẽ n wʋk Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed nins sẽn welg toorã n kõ Baall-dãmbã wẽn-naandsã.»" 
2Chronicles24:8 Dẽ, rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b maan koglg n dɩgl Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã noor yɩngã," 
2Chronicles24:9 la a kɩt tɩ b moon Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, tɩ b tall yaood ning Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn dag n vigl Israyɛll nebã yĩng we-raoogẽ wã, n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Chronicles24:10 Nanambsã ne nin-buiidã fãa maana sũ-noogo, la b talla ligd yaoodgã n wa ning koglgã pʋg hal tɩ pidi." 
2Chronicles24:11 La wakat ning Leevi nebã sẽn wat n yãnd tɩ ligdã lebga wʋsg tɩ b tog n tall n kẽng rĩmã yel-gɛtã nengẽ wã sẽn ta, rĩmã seb-gʋndã, ne maan-kʋʋd kãsmã yel-gɛtã watame n vaag ligdã koglgã pʋgẽ, la b tall koglgã n tɩ lebs a zĩigẽ. La bãmb dag n maanda woto daar fãa, la b paama ligd wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles24:12 Dẽ, rĩmã ne a Zehozada rɩka ligdã n kõ neb nins sẽn get-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmdã yelle, la bãmb talla ligd-kãens n yao kug-pɛɛsdbã, la ra-wãadbã, tɩ b tõe n lebs Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã a zĩigẽ, la sẽn tʋmd-b kutã, la ne sẽn tʋmd-b zũud tʋʋmã, tɩ b tõe n lebs n maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
2Chronicles24:13 Tʋmtʋmdbã sɩnga tʋʋmdã, la tʋʋmã kẽnga taoor b nugẽ. Bãmb kell n manega Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã n paas-a pãnga." 
2Chronicles24:14 Bãmb sẽn tʋm n sɛ, b rɩka ligdã sẽn kellã n tɩ kɩs rĩmã, ne a Zehozada. La b rɩkame n maan teed Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩnga: teed nins sẽn na n maand tʋʋmdã, maand sẽn yõogd bugum teedo, ne la-bãoonego, la sãnem ne wanzuri lagd a taaba. A Zehozada vɩɩmã tɛk fãa, b rag n maanda maand sẽn yõogd bugum wakat fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga." 
2Chronicles24:15 A Zehozada kʋʋla wʋsg n yaool n ki. La a sẽn wa n na n ki wã t'a rag n tara yʋʋm koabg la pis-tã. 
2Chronicles24:16 La b mum-a-la a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋg ne rĩm-dãmb a taabã. La yaa yẽnda sẽn maan neer Israyɛll yĩngã, la ne Wẽnnaam ne b roogã yĩngã." 
2Chronicles24:17 A Zehozada kũumã zugẽ, Zʋʋda nanambsã wa n wõgemda rĩmã taoore, la rĩmã sak n kelga b koɛɛgã." 
2Chronicles24:18 Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã roogo, n waoog a Aseera ra-lugdsã, la wẽn-naands a taaba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puug ne Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm nebã." 
2Chronicles24:19 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma b no-rɛɛsdb bãmb sʋka, tɩ b tɩ keoog-ba, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b lebg n wa tũ bãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka kelg ye." 
2Chronicles24:20 Woto, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã kẽe maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada biig a Zakari, t'a yik n yals nebã fãa taoor n yeel yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb kɩɩsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã? Ade, yãmb ka na n tõog ye! La yãmb sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga, bãmb me na n basa yãmba.»" 
2Chronicles24:21 Dẽ, bãmb seda ne taaba, la rĩmã kõo bãmb noor tɩ b lob-a ne kug n kʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋga." 
2Chronicles24:22 Woto, rĩm a Zoaas kɩtame tɩ b kʋ maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada a biig a Zakari n ka tẽeg maan-neer ning a ba wã sẽn dag n maanã ye. A Zakari sẽn wa n na n ki wã, a yeelame yaa «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gese, la b sɩbge.»" 
2Chronicles24:23 Yʋʋmd sẽn vẽke, Siiri tẽngã tãb-biis kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne a Zoaase, la bãmb waa Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, n yõg nanambsã fãa n kʋ, la b wʋk tẽngã paoong fãa n tɩ kõ Damaas rĩmã." 
2Chronicles24:24 Siiri tãb-biisã rag n ka waoog ye. La baoosgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ bãmb tõog a Zoaas tãb-bi-kʋʋngã. Bala, bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã. Woto Siiri nebã sɩbga a Zoaase." 
2Chronicles24:25 La Siiri nebã sẽn wa n loog n bas a Zoaasã, t'a rag n gãee ne toogo. La yẽnda meng sõgen-kambã seda ne taab n yik n kʋ-a a gãagã zugu, yẽnda sẽn kʋ maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada kom-dibli wã yĩnga. La b muma yẽnda a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋga, la b ka ning yẽnda rĩm-dãmbã yaadẽ ye." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ad neb nins sẽn sed-b ne taab n kʋ a Zoaasã: Yaa a Amo ned a Simeyat biig a Zabaade, la Moaab ned a Simrit biig a Zozabaade." 
2Chronicles24:27 A Zoaas kambã kibare, ne pĩnd-n-bãngr goam nins b sẽn dag n gom n keoog-a wã, a sẽn yaoolg nebã to-to wã, ne a sẽn maneg Wẽnnaam doogã. Bõn-kãens fãa gʋlsa rĩm-dãmbã vɩɩm kibayã sebr pʋga. Yẽnda biig a Amatsɩya leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma." 
2Chronicles25:1 A Amatsɩya sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã t'a rag n tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu, la a rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zeruzalɛm. La yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr da boondame t'a Zewohadan, n yit Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles25:2 A Amatsɩya maana sẽn yaa neer Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nifẽ, la ka yɩ ne-a sũurã fãa ye." 
2Chronicles25:3 La yẽnda naamã sẽn wa n paam pãnga, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ kʋ yẽnda zakã pʋgẽ neb nins sẽn dag n kʋ yẽnda rĩmã sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda ba wã." 
2Chronicles25:4 La yẽnda ka kʋ nin-kʋʋdbã kamb ye, yẽnda maana wa sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma be n yeel yaa: «Ba-rãmb ka tog n ki b kamb beegr yĩng ye. La kambã me ka tog n ki b ba-rãmb beegr yĩng ye. Ned kam fãa na n ki a meng beegr yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles25:5 A Amatsɩya tigma Zʋʋda ne Benzame nebã, n yalsg-b roog-roogo, n vigl neb koabg-koabg la neb tusr-tusr nanambse. La a kɩtame tɩ b sõd sẽn dag n tar-b yʋʋm pisi bɩ sẽn yɩɩd rẽndã wã, la b paama neb sẽn ta tus kobs-tã sẽn mi zabr sõama n tõe n zã kãnd la gãong n zabe." 
2Chronicles25:6 La Amatsɩya baoo gãndaad tus-koabg Israyɛll pʋgẽ, n yao-b wanzuri talã koabga, n kɩt tɩ b lebg a tãb-biisi." 
2Chronicles25:7 La Wẽnnaam dao a yembr n wa yẽnda nengẽ n wa yeel-a yaa: «N'na! Ra bas-y tɩ Israyɛll tãb-biis wa naag yãmb ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka be ne Israyɛll ne Efrayiim nebã ye!»" 
2Chronicles25:8 Bãmb tãb-biisã sã n wa naag yãmba, baa ne yãmb pãngã sẽn yaa to-to ningã fãa, Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ y bɛɛbã tõog-yã. Bala, yaa Wẽnnaam n tar pãng n tõe n kɩt tɩ b tõoge, wall a kɩt tɩ b ra tõog ye." 
2Chronicles25:9 Dẽ, a Amatsɩya soka Wẽnnaam daoã yaa: «La m na maana wãn moasã ne wanzuri talã koabgã mam sẽn kõ Israyɛll tãb-biisã?» La Wẽnnaam daoã leoka yẽnda n yeel-a yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõe n kõo foom sẽn yɩɩd dẽnda.»" 
2Chronicles25:10 Woto, a Amatsɩya kɩtame tɩ tãb-biis nins sẽn yi Efrayiim n wa wã leb b tẽngẽ. Dẽ, tãb-bi-bãmb sũurã yika wʋsg ne Zʋʋda nebã, la bãmb lebg n kuila ne sũ-yikr wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles25:11 Dẽ, a Amatsɩya paama pãnga, la yẽnda talla a tãb-biisã n kẽng yamsem longẽ wã, n tɩ kʋ Seyɩɩr kambã tus-piiga." 
2Chronicles25:12 Zʋʋda nebã leb n yõga bãmb neb tus-piig vɩɩse, n tall-b n dʋ pĩig sẽn lug zug n tus-b tɩ b lʋɩ n bedse." 
2Chronicles25:13 Baoosgo, Israyɛll ne Efrayiim tãb-biis nins a Amatsɩya sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b lebg kuil n ka naag yẽnda zabrẽ wã, b lebg n kẽe Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋs sẽn sɩng ne Samaari, hal n tãag Bɛt-Horon neb sẽn ta tus a tã, la b fã paoong wʋsg n tall n looge." 
2Chronicles25:14 A Amatsɩya sẽn tɩ zab ne Edom nebã n tõog n lebgdẽ wã, yẽnda talla Seyɩɩr kambã wẽn-naands n wa, la a rɩk-b tɩ b lebg yẽnda wẽnnaam-dãmb n wõgemd bãmb taoor n waoog-b la a yõogd wisd n kõt-ba." 
2Chronicles25:15 Woto kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puug ne a Amatsɩya, la bãmb tʋma b no-rɛɛs t'a wa yeel-a yaa: «Bõe tɩ f waoog wẽnnaam-dãmbã sẽn ka tõog n fãag b neb fo meng nugẽ?»" 
2Chronicles25:16 No-rɛɛsã sẽn wa n gomdã wakate, a Amatsɩya leokame yaa: «Ãnda soab n yãk foom tɩ f sagend rĩmã? Bas f goamã woto, tɩ b ra wa kʋ-f ye.» Dẽ, no-rɛɛsã baasa a pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã n yeel-a yaa: «Moasã, mam miime tɩ Wẽnnaam yãka yam n na sãam foom, fo sẽn ka kelg mam saglsã yĩngã.»" 
2Chronicles25:17 Dẽ zugẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya zĩnda ne a nebã n yẽse, a kɩtame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛll rĩm a Zehu biig a Yohakaaz biig a Zoaas yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d zab taaba.»" 
2Chronicles25:18 La Israyɛll dĩm a Zoaas tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya yaa: «Libã gõaag n tʋm tɩ b tɩ yeel Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩgã yaa: ‹Rɩk f bi-puglã n kõ-m biigã t'a maan a paga›, la Libã we-rũng a yembr n wa n pɩʋʋg n tab gõaagã." 
2Chronicles25:19 Ade, fo yetame: ‹mam tõoga Edom nebã.› La fo sũurã yaa noogo, tɩ f waoogd f menga. La pĩnd n pa f zĩigẽ. Bõe yĩng tɩ f baood n na n wã f meng la f naag Zʋʋda nebã fãa me wã?»" 
2Chronicles25:20 La a Amatsɩya ka kelg ye. Bõn-kãng rag n yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Bala, bãmb dag n datame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõog-ba. Bãmb sẽn waoog Edom nebã wẽn-naandsã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles25:21 Woto, Israyɛll dĩmã a Zoaas kẽngame tɩ yẽnda ne Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya seg taab Zʋʋda tẽng a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Bɛtsemees n na n zabe." 
2Chronicles25:22 La Israyɛll nebã tõoga Zʋʋda nebã, la bãmb ned kam fãa zoe n kuila a yiri." 
2Chronicles25:23 Israyɛll rĩm a Zoaas yõka Zʋʋda rĩm a Amatsɩya Bɛtsemees n talla n kẽng Zeruzalɛm. La yẽnda luba Zeruzalɛm lalgã sẽn tat kãntɩɩg kobs-naase, sẽn sɩng ne Efrayiim noore, n tall n ta lalgã gõdrẽ." 
2Chronicles25:24 La yẽnda wʋka sãnemã la wanzuri wã, la teed nins fãa sẽn dag n be Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgẽ a Obɛɛd Edom nengẽ wã. La a wʋk na-yirã arzegsã fãa, la a yõg yembs n tall n leb Samaari." 
2Chronicles25:25 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoaas biig a Amatsɩya kell n vɩɩmda yʋʋm piig la a nu, Israyɛll dĩm a Yohakaaz biig a Zoaas kũumã zugẽ." 
2Chronicles25:26 A Amatsɩya tʋʋmã a taabã a sẽn maanã sɩngr n tɩ tãag baoosg fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibayã sebr pʋga. 
2Chronicles25:27 Sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning a Amatsɩya sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saabã tũubã, neb n sed ne taab Zeruzalɛm n dat n kʋ-a, la a Amatsɩya zoeeme n kẽng Lakɩɩse. La b tʋma neb tɩ b pʋgla n kẽng Lakɩɩs tẽng n tɩ kʋ." 
2Chronicles25:28 La b tall-a-la ne wiidi n wa mum-a Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ n naag a saam-dãmbã. 
2Chronicles26:1 Zʋʋda nebã naaga taab n yãk a Oozɩyaas sẽn dag n tar yʋʋm piig la a yoobã, n kɩt t'a lebg rĩm n led a ba a Amatsɩya zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles26:2 Yɩɩ a Oozɩyaas n tõog n lebs n me Elat tẽngã n kɩt t'a leb Zʋʋda soolem, rĩm a Amatsɩya sẽn ki n bʋʋg a saam-dãmbã zugẽ." 
2Chronicles26:3 A Oozɩyaas sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a rag n tara yʋʋm piig la a yoobe, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-nu la a yiib Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr la Yekoliya n yaa Zeruzalɛm bi-pugla." 
2Chronicles26:4 Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa tɩrg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Yẽnda kell n maana wa a ba a Amatsɩya sẽn dag n maanã. 
2Chronicles26:5 A Oozɩyaas baoo Wẽnnaam a Zakari vɩɩmã tɛka. A Zakari yaa ned sẽn dag n tar Wẽnnaam vẽnegr bãngre. La wakat ninga a Oozɩyaas sẽn dag n baood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sasa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab dag n sõngd-a lame." 
2Chronicles26:6 A Oozɩyaas kẽng n tɩ zaba ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, n wã Gate, ne Yabne la Asdood lalsã. La yẽnda maneg n mee tẽms Asdood pʋgẽ, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã soolem pʋga." 
2Chronicles26:7 Wẽnnaam sõnga yẽnda t'a zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã, ne Araab-rãmb nins sẽn be Gʋʋr-baalã, la Mawõ tẽngã nebã n tõoge." 
2Chronicles26:8 La Amo nebã me rag n yaooda a Oozɩyaas yõor yaoodo, la yẽnda yʋʋrã da zẽkame n saag n ta hal Ezɩpte, bala, a pãngã rag n lebga wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles26:9 A Oozɩyaas mee gãs-bɛd Zeruzalɛm lalgã zugu. Yaa tẽngã rignoorẽ wã, la rignoor ning sẽn be lal-gõdrẽ wã, ne rignoor ning sẽn teesa tãn-longã, la lalgã pẽkẽ dignoorã zugu. La a paas-b-la pãnga." 
2Chronicles26:10 La yẽnda mee gãsd we-raoogẽ wã, la a tu buls wʋsgo, bala, yẽnda rag n tara rũms wʋsg kũnkubã ne zĩ-lamsẽ. A Oozɩyaas rag n tara ka-koaadb londã, la bãadã pʋse, la tar reezẽ tɩɩs pʋt Karmell tãngã zugu, tɩ neb gũudẽ. Sɩdã, yẽnda rag n nonga koobo." 
2Chronicles26:11 A Oozɩyaas rag n tara tãb-biis sẽn mi zabr sõama n tõe n zabe. La b rag n weela bãmb sull-sull sõadg ning seb-gʋnd a Yeyiyɛlle, la seb-gʋnd a Maseya sẽn sõd sõadgã wakatã. La yaa a Hananiya sẽn yaa rĩmã nanambg a yembrã n dag n so bãmba." 
2Chronicles26:12 La nanambs nins sẽn dag n so-b tãb-bi-gãndaadã sõor yaa tus a yi la kobs yoobe. 
2Chronicles26:13 La bãmb dag n soo tãb-biis tus kobs-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu, sẽn tõe n zab ne pãng la raood n sõng rĩmã n zab ne a bɛɛbã." 
2Chronicles26:14 A Oozɩyaas kõ-a tãb-biisã fãa gãndo, kãna, kut-pugli, gãn-tigsi, tãbdo, la loobse." 
2Chronicles26:15 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ tʋʋm-mitb maan zab teed sẽn yaa bɛd sẽn tõe n tall n tão pɛɛm la lob kug-bɛda. La yẽnda ning-b-la gãsd nins sẽn be b lalgã gõadẽ wã. A Oozɩyaas yʋʋrã zẽkame n saag zĩig fãa, bala, Wẽnnaam sõng-a-la ne sõngr sẽn yaa toor zalle, hal t'a wa tar pãng wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles26:16 La yẽnda sẽn wa n mik t'a pãngã lebga wʋsgã, yẽnda wuka a meng tɩ wa ne a sãoongo. Bala, yẽnda maana sẽn ka zems ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã. Yẽnda kẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg n na n yõog tɩdar wisd tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
2Chronicles26:17 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Azariya pʋgla a Oozɩyaas n kẽ ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdb pis-nii sẽn tar sũ-keelem." 
2Chronicles26:18 Bãmb gɩdga rĩmã n yeel-a yaa: «Dĩma Oozɩyaase, ka yãmb n tog n yõog wisd n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Yaa a Aarõ yagensã b sẽn welg toor tɩ b yaa maan-kʋʋdbã bal n tog n maan bõn-kãnga! Bɩ y yi sɛk roogã pʋga, bala, yãmb maanda sẽn ka zemse, la bõn-kãng ka na n yɩ waoogr yãmb yĩng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor ye.»" 
2Chronicles26:19 Rĩm a Oozɩyaas sẽn wa n zãad wisd yõogr laagã, a sũurã yika ne maan-kʋʋdbã. La wakat ning a sũurã sẽn wa n yik ne maan-kʋʋdbã, wãood n puk a rĩirẽ wã maan-kʋʋdbã taoore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga, wisd yõogr tẽn-kugrã sɛɛgẽ." 
2Chronicles26:20 La maan-kʋʋd kãsmã a Azariya ne maan-kʋʋdb a taabã sẽn wẽnemd n ges yẽnda, b mikame tɩ wãood n be a rĩirẽ wã! Dẽ, bãmb yiis-a-la tao-tao, la yẽnda mengã yãgame na n yi, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n sɩbga." 
2Chronicles26:21 A Oozɩyaas paa ne a wãoodã n tãag a kũum. La yẽnda sẽn dag n yaa wãoorã yĩnga, b ning-a-la kɛɛng n ka leb n bas-a t'a kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ye. A biig a Zotam n dag n get a zakã yelle, la a soolmã me yelle." 
2Chronicles26:22 A Oozɩyaas tʋʋmã a taabã a sẽn maanã sɩngr n tɩ tãag a baoosgã fãa, yaa Amots biig a Ezayi n gʋlse." 
2Chronicles26:23 A Oozɩyaas kiime n bʋʋg a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la toor rĩm-dãmbã yaadẽ, bala, b rag n yetame t'a yaa wãoore." 
2Chronicles27:1 A Yotam sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã, t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr la a Yeruusa n yaa a Sadok bi-pugla." 
2Chronicles27:2 A Yotam maana sẽn yaa neer Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nifẽ, wa yẽnda ba a Oozɩyaase, la yẽnda ka sak n kẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ye. La nebã rag n ket n maanda tʋʋm-beedo." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yaa yẽnda n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã no-kãsengã, la a me meeb a taab wʋsg Ofɛll lalgã zugu." 
2Chronicles27:4 A leb n mee tẽms Zʋʋda tãmsã zutu, la a ning tãnsoben-dot la gãsd pʋtã noyã." 
2Chronicles27:5 Yẽnda zaba ne Amo rĩmã n tõog-a. La yʋʋm-kãnga Amo nebã kõ-a Yotam wanzuri talã koabga, la bɩle pet tus-piiga, ne Oorz pet tus-piiga. Yaa woto n yɩ Amo nebã yaoodo, yʋʋm-kãnga, la yʋʋm a yiibẽ soabã ne a tãabẽ soabã me." 
2Chronicles27:6 A Yotam paama pãng wʋsgo, bala, yẽnda rag n kẽnda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Chronicles27:7 A Yotam tʋʋmã a taabã fãa, la a zabã, ne a sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa wã gʋlsa Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmb sebr pʋga." 
2Chronicles27:8 A Yotam sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã, t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles27:9 A Yotam kiime n bʋʋg a saam-dãmba, la b muma yẽnda a Davɩɩd tẽnga pʋga. La a biig a Akaaz leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Chronicles28:1 A Akaaz sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩma, t'a tara yʋʋm pisi. La a rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zeruzalɛm. Yẽnda ka maan sẽn tat Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam wala a yaab a Davɩɩd ye." 
2Chronicles28:2 Yẽnda maana wa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n maanã, n maan kut wẽn-naands baall yĩnga." 
2Chronicles28:3 La yẽnda mengã yõoga wisd Bɛn-Hinom tãn-longẽ wã, la a yõog a kambã bugum, wa buud a taab nins Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sẽn dag n rig Israyɛll nebã taoorã sẽn dag n maand yel-beed ninsã." 
2Chronicles28:4 Yẽnda maana maoong la a yõog tɩdar maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã, la kunkuba zutu, la tɩ-bɛdã tẽngre." 
2Chronicles28:5 Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã kɩt tɩ Siiri rĩmã tõog a Akaaz n yõg a neb wʋsg n tall n kẽng Damaase. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n basame tɩ Israyɛll dĩmã tõog a Akaaze, n kʋ a neb wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles28:6 A Remaliya biig a Peka kʋʋ Zʋʋda tãb-bi-gãndaad tus koabg la pisi daar a yembre. Bala, bãmb dag n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles28:7 La Efrayiim gãndaoog a Zikri kʋʋ rĩma biig a Maseya, la a Aazrikam sẽn yaa sõgen-kãsengã, ne rĩmã pʋgdga a Ɛlkana." 
2Chronicles28:8 Israyɛll kambã yõga b saam-biisã neb tus kobs yi. Yaa pagba, kom-dibli, la kom-pugli. La b leb n wʋka b paoong wʋsg n tall n loog Samaari." 
2Chronicles28:9 La Samaari pʋgẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛs a yembr n dag n be beenẽ t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Obɛɛde. Yẽnda yiime n seg Israyɛll tãb-biisã sẽn lebg n wat Samaari wã n yeel-b yaa: «Ade, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sẽn yik ne Zʋʋda nebã yĩng n kɩt tɩ bãmb bas tɩ yãmb tõog-ba, la yãmb kʋ-b-la ne sũ-yikr sẽn zẽk n tat hal saasẽ." 
2Chronicles28:10 La moasã, yãmb gomdame tɩ y na n dɩka Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm kambã n maan y yembse, la y tʋmtʋmd-pogse! Dẽ yĩnga, yãmb me ka beeg ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã sɩda?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Moasã, bɩ y kelg-y m koɛɛgã, lebs-y yembsã yãmb sẽn yõg y saam-biisã nengẽ wã tɩ b kuili, sã n ka rẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã na n yika ne yãmba.»" 
2Chronicles28:12 Efrayiim nebã nanambs kẽer yika ne sẽn kẽng-b zabrã n lebg n watẽ wã. Yaa a Yohanan biig a Azariya, a Mesilemot biig a Berekɩya, a Salum biig a Ezekɩyaas la a Adlayi biig a Amasa." 
2Chronicles28:13 Bãmb yeel-b lame: «Da kẽ-y ne y sẽn yõg b rãmba ka ye. Bala, bõn-kãng na n kɩtame tɩ d beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn gomdã yaa sẽn paasd tõnd beegrã ne d kongrã, tõnd zoe n tara kongr wʋsgo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã bee Israyɛll zugu.»" 
2Chronicles28:14 Woto, tãb-biisã basa yembsã b sẽn dag n yõgã, ne paoongã b sẽn dag n wʋkã kãsem-dãmba taoore, la zãma wã fãa taoore." 
2Chronicles28:15 La neb nins b sẽn pʋd-b yʋy n boolã yikame n bels yembsã. Bãmb dɩka teed nins tãb-biisã sẽn tall n wa wã, n yeelg b rãmb nins sẽn yaa b bɛɛlã, la b kõ-b futu, neooda, rɩɩbo, la b tɩp b noadã, la b rɩk neb nins fãa sẽn dag n ka tõe n kẽna n zombg bõense, n tall-b n kẽng b saam-biisã nengẽ Zeriko sẽn yaa koms tẽngã. Dẽ, bãmb lebg n leba Samaari." 
2Chronicles28:16 Wakat-kãnga, dĩm a Akaaz tʋmame tɩ b tɩ kos Asiiri rĩmã sõngre." 
2Chronicles28:17 Bala, Edom nebã rag n leb n waame n zab ne Zʋʋda nebã n tõog-b n yõg-b neb n looge." 
2Chronicles28:18 La Filistẽ-dãmbã me rag n yiime n tɩ zab ne tẽms nins sẽn be londẽ wã, la Negɛɛv sẽn yaa Zʋʋda soolmã: Yaa Bɛt-Semeese, Ayalõ, Gederote, Soko ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, Timna ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, Gimzo ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, n deeg-b n sooge." 
2Chronicles28:19 Sɩda, rĩm a Akaaz yĩng kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning Zʋʋda nebã yãnde, bala, a Akaaz rag n kɩtame tɩ nebã maan sẽn ka zems ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
2Chronicles28:20 La Asiiri rĩm a Tɩlgat-Pilnezɛɛr sẽn wa wã a basa a Akaaz sõngr n zab ne-a. 
2Chronicles28:21 La a Akaaz kong n yãka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teedã, ne na-yirã, la a Kug-zĩidbã zakẽ teedã, n kõ Asiiri rĩma, la baoosg zãnga rẽ ka sõng-a ye." 
2Chronicles28:22 La yẽnda sẽn wa n be toogã pʋgã, a kell n maana sẽn ka zems n beeg ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab n paase." 
2Chronicles28:23 A Akaaz maana maoong n kõ Damaas nebã sẽn tõog yẽnda wã wẽn-naands n yeel yaa: «Siiri nebã wẽn-naandsã sẽn sõngd-bã yĩngã, mam me na n maana maoong n kõ-b tɩ b wa sõng-ma.» La yaa wẽn-naands bãmb n wa ne a Akaaz ne Israyɛll nebã sãoongo." 
2Chronicles28:24 A Akaaz wʋka Wẽnnaam doogã teed fãa n pãb n wã, la a pag Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã kʋɩlemsã, la a maan tẽn-kug n ning Zeruzalɛm so-yagsã fãa zutu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Yẽnda maana maoong kʋʋb zĩis Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, n na n yõog tɩdar n kõt buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã, yẽnda maana woto n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles28:26 A Akaaz tʋʋm a taabã fãa ne bũmb ning fãa, a sẽn maanã, a sɩngr ne a baoosg fãa gʋlsa Zʋʋda ne Israyɛlle, rĩm-dãmbã sebr pʋga." 
2Chronicles28:27 A Akaaz kiime n bʋʋg a saam-dãmba, la b muma yẽnda Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga, la ka yɩ rĩm-dãmbã yaadẽ ye. La a biig a Ezekɩyaas leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Chronicles29:1 A Ezekɩyaas sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩma, t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la nu. La a rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zeruzalɛm. La yẽnda ma wã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Abiya, n yaa a Zakari bi-pugla." 
2Chronicles29:2 A Ezekɩyaas maana sẽn yaa neer Sẽn-Ka-Saabã nifẽ, wa a yaab a Davɩɩde." 
2Chronicles29:3 La yẽnda sẽn deeg a naamã pipi yʋʋmdã pipi kiuugã, yẽnda pagsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã kʋɩlemsã n lebs-b n manege." 
2Chronicles29:4 La yẽnda boola maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã, n tigs-b zĩ-yaleng ning sẽn be yaang kɩrengã." 
2Chronicles29:5 A Ezekɩyaas yeel-b lame yaa: «Leevi nebã, kelg-y-yã! Yɩlg-y y mense, la y yɩlg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã roogã, la y yiis rẽgd buud fãa zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles29:6 Bala, tõnd ba-rãmbã maana sẽn kisi, bãmb dag n maana sẽn ka noom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sũuri, bãmb wẽnemd n basa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, n tud-a b kuidga." 
2Chronicles29:7 Bãmb n tol n kiisa fɩtl-dãmbã bugum, la b pag ro-yɩngã rignoyã, n bas n ka leb n yõogd tɩdare, la b ka leb n maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugum zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles29:8 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puug ne Zʋʋda, ne Zeruzalɛm n kɩt tɩ b lebg yel-beed la rabeem bũmbu, wa yãmb sẽn ne t'a yaa a soab rũndã wã." 
2Chronicles29:9 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b kʋ tõnd ba-rãmbã ne zabr sʋʋga, la b yõg d kom-dibli wã, ne d kom-pugli wã, la d pagbã n loog yembdã." 
2Chronicles29:10 Moasã mam dat n maana kaool ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, tɩ bãmb tõe n zãag b sũ-puugrã ne-do." 
2Chronicles29:11 Woto yĩnga, m kamba, da leb-y n lak-y ye. Bala, yaa yãmb la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãk tɩ y yals bãmb taoor n tʋm n kõ bãmba, la y waoog bãmba, la y yõogd tɩdar bãmb yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles29:12 Dẽ, Leevi nebã yikame: A Kehat pendẽ wã, yaa Amasayi biig a Maata, ne a Azariya biig a Zowɛlle, sã n yaa ne a Meraari pendẽ wã, yaa Abdi biig a Kiisi, ne a Yeyalelɛll biig a Azariya, a Gerson pendẽ wã, yaa Zima biig a Zoa, la a Zoa biig a Edɛn." 
2Chronicles29:13 A Elisafan kamba sʋka yaa: a Simri ne a Yeyiyɛlle. A Azaf kambã sʋka: yaa a Zakari ne a Mataniya. 
2Chronicles29:14 A Eman kamba sʋka: yaa a Yekiyɛll ne a Simeyi, a Yedutun kamba sʋka: yaa a Semaya ne a Uziyɛlle." 
2Chronicles29:15 Bãmb tigma b saam-biisã, tɩ b yɩlg b mense. Dẽ poore, bãmb saka rĩmã noor n kẽng n tɩ yɩlg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom bũmb ningã." 
2Chronicles29:16 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã kẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab roog pʋgẽ, n na n yɩlg-a. La bãmb yiisa bũmb nins fãa b sẽn yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab doogã pʋgẽ, tɩ yaa bõn-dẽgdã n dʋʋg zakã pʋga. La Leevi nebã wʋk-b lame n tɩ lob Sedrõ ko-soogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles29:17 Leevi nebã sɩnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak yɩlgr pipi kiuugã pipi daare, la a rasem a nii wã daare, bãmb taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ro-yɩngã. La bãmb tʋma roogã yɩlgr tʋʋmd rasem a nii, la yaa bãmb sẽn sɩng tɩ rasem piig la yoob yĩng la b sɛ roogã." 
2Chronicles29:18 Dẽ poore, bãmb kẽe rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Tõnd yɩlga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã fãa, maoong sẽn yõogd bugum tẽn-kugrã, ne a teedã fãa, la kaset taablã ne a teedã fãa n sɛ," 
2Chronicles29:19 Tõnd manega teed nins rĩm a Akaaz naamã wakat a sẽn maan sẽn ka zems n yiis Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgã n yɩlge, rẽ la sẽn dɩg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã taoorã.»" 
2Chronicles29:20 La rĩm a Ezekɩyaas yika yibeoog pĩnda, n tigs a tẽngã taoor dãmb tɩ b kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles29:21 Bãmb waa ne lols a yopoe, pe-raad a yopoe, pe-ribli a yopoe, n paas boees a yopoe yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoong rĩma zak yĩnga, la zĩ-sõngã, ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa yĩnga. La yẽnda yeela maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagensã tɩ b maan maoongã tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
2Chronicles29:22 Maan-kʋʋdbã kʋʋ rũm-bɛdã n yãk b zɩɩmã n tɩ ning tẽn-kugrã zugu. Bãmb kʋʋ pe-raadã n yãk b zɩɩmã n tɩ ning tẽn-kugrã zugu, la b kʋ pe-ribli wã me n yãk b zɩɩmã n tɩ ning tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
2Chronicles29:23 La bãmb talla boeesã n kẽng rĩmã ne zãma wã taoore, tɩ b tẽeg b nus b zutu." 
2Chronicles29:24 Maan-kʋʋdbã kood-b lame n daag b zɩɩmã tẽn-kugrã zugu tɩ yɩ sugr kosg maoong Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩnga. Bala, rĩmã rag n yeelame tɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne sugr kosg maoongã yaa Israyɛll gillã fãa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles29:25 Bãmb ninga Leevi nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg ne kɛma, kʋla, pendse, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n wilg yãt a Gaad ne a no-rɛɛs a Natã tɩ b rag n wilg a Davɩɩdã." 
2Chronicles29:26 Leevi nebã sẽn wa n dɩk b zĩisã ne a Davɩɩd yʋʋm-teedã n sɛ wã, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã me yasa ne b tãntãadã." 
2Chronicles29:27 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas kõo noor tɩ b kʋ maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã tẽn-kugrã zugu. La b sẽn sɩng maoongã kʋʋbã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩlã me sẽn sɩnge, tɩ tãntãadã peebdẽ, tɩ kɛmã wẽedẽ, tɩ pɛndgã la ruudgã wãagdẽ, wa Israyɛll rĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n viglã." 
2Chronicles29:28 Zãmã wã fãa wõgemdame, la b rag n yɩɩndame, tɩ tãntãadã peebdẽ, hal tɩ b wa n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã n sɛ." 
2Chronicles29:29 La b sẽn maan maoongã n sɛ, dĩmã ne a poorẽ dãmb yĩgimdame, n wõgemde." 
2Chronicles29:30 Dẽ poore, dĩm a Ezekɩyaas ne nanambsã yeela Leevi nebã tɩ b waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne a Davɩɩd yɩɩlã, la ne yãt a Azaf yɩɩlã. Woto, bãmb waooga Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne sũ-noogo, la b yĩgimdi, n wõgemde." 
2Chronicles29:31 A Ezekɩyaas zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: «Moasã, yãmb sẽn dɩk y mens n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, bɩ y kolg ne y lagem-n-taar maandã, la y bark pʋʋsg maandã.» Woto, zãma wã talla lagem-n-taar maandã, ne b bark pʋʋsg maandã n wa, la neb nins fãa sẽn dat n kõ ne yamleoogã waa ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugum rũmsi." 
2Chronicles29:32 Maand sẽn yõogd bugmã rũms nins zãmã wã sẽn tall n wa wã yɩɩ niig pis-yopoe, pe-raad koabga, pe-ribli kobs-yi, la b rɩka fãa n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
2Chronicles29:33 Maand a taab nins b sẽn kõ wã yɩɩ niig kobs-yoobe, la piis tus a tã." 
2Chronicles29:34 La Maan-kʋʋdbã sõor sẽn dag n paood tɩ b ka tõe n sɩɩg maandã fãa wã, b kɩtame tɩ Leevi nebã sõng-b hal tɩ fãa wa sɛ, la tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã fãa me yɩlg b mens n sɛ. Sɩda, Leevi nebã wilga b ratmã, bãmb sẽn deng maan-kʋʋdbã n yɩlg b mensã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles29:35 Bala, maand nins sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne laafɩ maandã kaamã rag n yaa wʋsgo. Yɩɩ woto la b lebg n lebs tʋʋm nins sẽn maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã a zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles29:36 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ne nebã maana sũ-noog ne Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n segl bũmb ning fãa nebã yĩngã, bala, bõn-kãng fãa maana wakat-yɛnga." 
2Chronicles30:1 A Ezekɩyaas tʋma neb tɩ bool Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa, la yẽnda tol n gʋlsa sɛb tɩ b tɩ kõ Efrayiim ne Manaase nebã, n yeel-b tɩ b wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã Zeruzalɛm, tɩ b maan Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã Pak tigrã." 
2Chronicles30:2 Dĩmã ne a nanambsã, la zãma wã maana tiging yãk yam tɩ b na n maana Pak tigrã kiuug n a yiib soaba Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles30:3 Bala, b rag n ka tõe n maan Pak tigrã a wakat ye. Bala, maan-kʋʋdbã wʋsg rag n ka paam n yɩlg b mense, la nebã me rag n ka paam n tigim Zeruzalɛmã me ye." 
2Chronicles30:4 La yam yãk-kãng taa rĩmã ne zãma wã fãa yam. 
2Chronicles30:5 Dẽ, bãmb maana wa b sẽn yãk yam to-to wã. Woto, bãmb tʋma neb tɩ saag Israyɛll soolmã gilli, sẽn sɩng ne Dan, hal n tãag Bɛɛrseba, n bool nebã tɩ b wa Zeruzalɛm, n maan Pak tigrã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Bala, neb wʋsg rag n ka paam n maan tigrã wa sẽn gʋls tõogã sebr pʋgẽ to-to wã ye." 
2Chronicles30:6 Woto, Koe-toagsdbã looga ne sɛb nins rĩmã ne a nanambsã sẽn gʋlsã, Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda soolmã fãa pʋgẽ. La wa rĩmã sẽn kõ noor ninga wã, bãmb dag n moondame n yetẽ: «Israyɛll kamba, yãmb sẽn yaa neb nins sẽn põs Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã sãoongã, lebg-y n wa-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa a Abrahaam, ne a Izake, la a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã nengẽ, la bãmb me na n lebg n wa yãmb sẽn pa-b ka wã nengẽ." 
2Chronicles30:7 Bɩ y ra yɩ wa y ba-rãmbã, bɩ y saam-biisã sẽn maan sẽn ka zems ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb ba-rãmb Wẽnnaamã ye, yaa bõn-kãng yĩng n kɩt tɩ b bas tɩ b sãam-b wa yãmb sẽn ne rũndã wã." 
2Chronicles30:8 Moasã, bɩ y ra keng y sũyã wa y yaab-rãmbã ye. Lebg-y n bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y wa bãmb zĩ-sõngã pʋg bãmb sẽn yãk wakat fãa yĩngã, n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, tɩ bãmb tõe n zãag b sũ-puugrã ne yãmba." 
2Chronicles30:9 Sɩda, yãmb sã n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn dag n yõg yãmb saam-biisã ne y kambã n kẽng yembdã, zoe bãmb nimbãaneg n bas-b tɩ b lebg n wa tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa nimbãan-zoɛta, yãmb sã n lebg n wa bãmb nengẽ, bãmb ka na n leb n bas yãmb ye.»" 
2Chronicles30:10 Koe-toagsdbã saaga tẽng-tẽnga, Efrayiim, ne Manaase soolmã pʋgẽ, hal n tãag Zabulõ soolmẽ wã, la nebã rag n laad-b lame la b yaand-b bala." 
2Chronicles30:11 La baoosgo, Asɛɛre, ne Zabulõ, la Manaase neb kẽer sika b mens n wa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles30:12 La Zʋʋda pʋgẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega b nug tɩ nebã fãa paam yam a yembr n sak noor ning rĩmã ne a nanambsã sẽn yãkã, wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã." 
2Chronicles30:13 Neb wʋsg tigma Zeruzalɛm, n na n maan bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã yʋʋmdã kiuug a yiib soabã. La neb nins sẽn tigim Zeruzalɛmã sɩd yɩɩ zãma kãsenga." 
2Chronicles30:14 Bãmb yikame n pãb tẽn-kug nins sẽn be Zeruzalɛm ne wisdã tẽn-kugã n wã, la b wʋk-b lame n tɩ lob Sedrõ longã pʋga." 
2Chronicles30:15 Bãmb kʋʋ Pakã rũms kiuug a yiib soaba rasem piig la a naas raarã. Yãnd n dag n yõk maan-kʋʋdbã la Leevi nebã, dẽ, b rag n yɩlga b mense, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n tõog n tall maand sẽn yõogd bugmã n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles30:16 La bãmb ned kam fãa rag n yasa a zĩigẽ, wa sẽn zems tõog ning Wẽnnaam daoã a Moyiis sẽn dag n gʋlsã. Woto, maan-kʋʋdbã reega zɩɩmã Leevi nebã sẽn kõt-bã, n kɩrg tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
2Chronicles30:17 La neb wʋsg sẽn dag n be zãma wã sʋk n dag n ka yɩlg b mensã yĩng kɩtame, tɩ Leevi nebã reeg bãmb rũmsã n kʋ b zĩisẽ." 
2Chronicles30:18 Bala, neb wʋsg sẽn dag n yi Efrayiim, ne Manaase, la Izakaare, ne Zabulõ n dag n ka paam n yɩlg b mens ye, la bãmb dɩɩ Pakã tigrã n ka tũ wa sẽn gʋlsã ye, la a Ezekɩyaas yõka sɛɛg bãmb yĩng n yeele: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa sõng soabã kõ neb nins fãa sẽn bao Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam ne b sũur fãa wã sugri, baa ne bãmb sẽn ka tõog n yɩlg b mens wa sẽn gʋlsã.»" 
2Chronicles30:19  
2Chronicles30:20 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Ezekɩyaas pʋʋsgã, n ka sɩbg nebã ye." 
2Chronicles30:21 Israyɛll kamb nins sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛmã maana Pak tigrã dasem a yopoe ne sũ-no-kãsenga, la Leevi nebã ne maan-kʋʋdbã rag n pẽgda Sẽn-Ka-Saabã daar fãa ne b yʋʋm teedã pãng fãa." 
2Chronicles30:22 A Ezekɩyaas goamã sɩɩsa Leevi neb nins fãa sẽn dag n tar yam-yãk sõng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, la bãmb kell n maana tigrã dasem a yopoe, la b maand laafɩ maand n pʋʋsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaam barka." 
2Chronicles30:23 Dẽ poore, zãma wã leb n yẽsa ne taab n yãk yam n na n kell n maan tigrã rasem a yopoe n paase." 
2Chronicles30:24 Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas kõo zãma wã lols tusri, la piis tus a yopoe. Nanambsã me waa ne niig tusri, la piis tus piiga. La maan-kʋʋdb wʋsgo rag n yɩlga b mense." 
2Chronicles30:25 Zʋʋda nebã ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi nebã, la neb nins sẽn yi Israyɛll soolmẽ wã n wa wã, la Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n wa n kẽ Zʋʋda tẽngã maana sũ-noogo." 
2Chronicles30:26 La sũ-noogã yɩɩ kãseng Zeruzalɛm, bala, hal sẽn sɩng a Davɩɩd biig a Salmo zamaane, bũmb a woto rag n na n zɩ n leb n maan ye." 
2Chronicles30:27 Leevi nebã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã yikame n ning nebã barka, la bãmb pʋʋsgã zẽk n taa Wẽnnaam zĩ-sõngẽ wã saasẽ, la b leoka b pʋʋsgã." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tigrã poore, Israyɛll kamba fãa sẽn dag n tigim Zeruzalɛmã kẽe Zʋʋda tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, n wã kug-vigindsã, la b kɛ a Aseera ra-lugdsã, n wã b maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ne b tẽn-kugã fãa n menes-b zãnga, Zʋʋda, ne Benzame, la Efrayiim ne Manaase soolmã fãa pʋsẽ, dẽ, Israyɛll nebã fãa lebg n leba b tẽmsẽ, tɩ ned kam fãa kuil a yiri." 
2Chronicles31:2 A Ezekɩyaas leb n pʋɩɩ maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã sags-sagse, n kõ sak fãa ne a tʋʋmde. Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Leevi nebã n so maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne lagem-n-taar maoongã tʋʋmde, la roogã tʋʋm a taabã, ne bark pʋʋsgã ne pẽgr yɩɩlã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sik zĩigã rignoyẽ wã." 
2Chronicles31:3 Rĩmã rag n yãka pʋɩɩr a paoongã pʋg n kõ tɩ b na n maand yibeoog ne zaabr maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne vʋʋsg rayã maandã, la ki-paalã maandã b sẽn maand wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saabã tõogã sẽn gʋlsã." 
2Chronicles31:4 La rĩmã yeela Zeruzalɛm nebã tɩ b ges maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã yell n kõb-b pʋɩɩre, tɩ b tõe n paam daood Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã sakr pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles31:5 Rĩmã koɛɛgã sẽn saagã kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll kambã wa kõ bɩle wã, la reezẽ rãamã, kaamã, la sɩɩdã, ne bõn-koaadlã fãa dẽenem biisã. La bãmb talla bõn-bãmbã fãa piig pʋɩɩr me n wa." 
2Chronicles31:6 Woto me, Israyɛll kambã ne Zʋʋda neb nins sẽn be-b Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, waa ne rũm-bɛdã la rũm-bãoonegã piig pʋɩɩre, la b wa ne kũun nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã n lagem n sam-b rʋy toay-toaya." 
2Chronicles31:7 La bãmb sɩnga koodã samb rʋy-rʋy kiuug a tãab soabã n wa tɩ basa kiuug a yopoe soabã. 
2Chronicles31:8 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ne a nanambsã wa n gesa kũunã sẽn sam rʋy-rʋyã, la bãmb pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, la b ning nebã barka." 
2Chronicles31:9 A Ezekɩyaas soka maan-kʋʋdba ne Leevi nebã kũunã yell sẽn na n yɩ to-to. 
2Chronicles31:10 La maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Azariya sẽn yaa a Sadok buudã nedã leoka yẽnda n yeele: Nebã sẽn sɩng n wat ne b kũunã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã tɛka, tõnd dɩtame n tɩgda, la baoosgo, keta wʋsgo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga b nebã barka, la yaa sẽn ketã la sẽn sam rʋy-rʋyã." 
2Chronicles31:11 La rĩm a Ezekɩyaas yeelame tɩ b maneg rot Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋga, la b manegame." 
2Chronicles31:12 Woto, b ra tallda dẽenem biisã ne piig pʋɩɩrã, la nonglem kũunã n watẽ. La yaa Leevi ned a Konaniya nea yao Sɩme n dag n yaa teedã bĩngr taoor dãmba." 
2Chronicles31:13 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ne maan-kʋʋd a Azariya yãka a Yeyiyɛlle, ne a Azaziya, la a Nahate, ne a Azayɛlle, la a Yerimote, ne a Zozabaade, la a Eliyɛlle, ne a Ismakiya, la Mahate, ne a Benaya, tɩ b na n yɩ yel-gɛtb n sõngd a Koniya ne a yao a Sime." 
2Chronicles31:14 Leevi ned a Imna biig a Koore sẽn yaa yaang rignoorã gũudã, n dag n yaa nonglem kũunã nebã sẽn kõt Sẽn-Ka-Saabã gũuda. La yaa yẽnda n dag n welgd dẽenem biisã ne kũun sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã n pʋɩta." 
2Chronicles31:15 Maan-kʋʋdbã tẽms pʋse, yaa a Edɛn, a Miniyamin, a Yesuwa, a Semaya, a Amariya ne a Sekaniya n dag n sõngd yẽnda n pʋɩt b saam-biisã rɩɩbã, wa sẽn zems b sagse. La b rag n ka welgd kãsem ne yao n bak ye." 
2Chronicles31:16 La sẽn leb n paas raop nins sẽn tar yʋʋm a tãab la sẽn yɩɩd dẽ wã yʋy sẽn gʋls tɩ b reegdb pʋɩɩrã toog sẽn ka be, b rãmb nins fãa sẽn dag n kẽed Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ n maand tʋʋmdã daar fãa wã, rag n reegda bãmb tʋʋmd ning b sẽn maandã yĩnga, wa sẽn zems a sagse." 
2Chronicles31:17 B rag n gʋlsda maan-kʋʋdbã wa sẽn zems b roto, la sã n yaa ne Leevi nebã, b rag n gʋlsda bãmb wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmdã sulli, la b sagse, la yaa sẽn sɩng ne yʋʋm pisi, la sẽn yɩɩd dẽndã." 
2Chronicles31:18 B rag n naagda b zaka rãmb fãa n gʋlsdẽ: Yaa b pagbã, b kom-dibli wã, la b kom-pugli wã, bala, b fãa rag n yɩlga b mense." 
2Chronicles31:19 La sã n yaa ne maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yaa Aarõ yagensã sẽn be-b tẽmsẽ wã, b rag n yãkã neb tɩ b pʋɩt maan-kʋʋdbã sʋk neb nins sẽn yaa raopã, la Leevi neb nins fãa yʋy b sẽn gʋlsã b pʋɩɩre." 
2Chronicles31:20 A Ezekɩyaas maana woto Zʋʋda soolmã fãa pʋgẽ. Yẽnda maana sẽn yaa sõama, la tɩrga, la sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã nifẽ." 
2Chronicles31:21 La tʋʋmd ning fãa yẽnda sẽn maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã, ne tõogã yẽnda sẽn sakã pʋgẽ, yɩɩ a Wẽnnaamã la a rag n baood nea sũur fãa, la a paama tõogre." 
2Chronicles32:1 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn maanã, la tʋʋm ning fãa b sẽn tʋm ne pʋ-peelmã loogr zugẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib wa Zʋʋda soolmã pʋgẽ n tilg a tãb-sikã n na n zab ne tẽms nins sẽn me n gũbg ne lals n tar pãngã, n tol n kõ noor tɩ b wã-ba." 
2Chronicles32:2 A Ezekɩyaas sẽn yã t'a Senakeriib wat n na zaba ne Zeruzalɛmã," 
2Chronicles32:3 a yẽsa nea nanambsã sẽn na n yɩlẽ n yẽd buls nins sẽn be yɩngã noyã. La bãmb wa n sõng-a lame. 
2Chronicles32:4 Dẽ, neb wʋsg n tigim taaba, la bãmb yẽda bulsã fãa, ne ko-zoetem ning sẽn zoeta tẽngã sʋkã soayã, la b yetẽ yaa: «Tõnd ka na n bas tɩ Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã wa mik koom wʋsg ye.»" 
2Chronicles32:5 Woto, a Ezekɩyaas paama raood n lebs n me lalgã zĩis nins sẽn dag n bisã, la me gãsdo. Yẽnda leb n mee lalg a to yɩngã, la a maneg Milo gãsg ning sẽn be a Davɩɩd tẽngã pʋgã, la a kɩt tɩ b maan kãna, la gãn wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles32:6 A Ezekɩyaas yãka tãb-biis nanambs n lʋɩɩs nebã taoore, la a bool nebã n tigm-y-b tẽnga noore n gome n paas-b raood n yeele:" 
2Chronicles32:7 «Keng-y sũuri, paam-y raoodo! Da zoe-y rabeem ye, da rig-y rabeem Asiiri rĩma ne tãb-bi-kʋʋng ning sẽn pʋgd-a wã taoor ye. Bala, sẽn be-a ne tõndã pãng yɩɩda sẽn be-a ne Asiiri rĩmã." 
2Chronicles32:8 Yẽnda teega ninsaalb pãnga, la tõnd teega Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã. Bãmb n na n zab sõng tõndo!» Kʋʋngã sẽn wʋm Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas goamã, b paama raoodo." 
2Chronicles32:9 Dẽ zugẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib sẽn dag n be Lakɩɩs ne a tãb-biisã fãa wã, tʋma a neb a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ, la Zʋʋda neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛmã nengẽ, tɩ b tɩ gom ne-b n yeel-b yaa:" 
2Chronicles32:10 «Ad Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib sẽn yeta: Yaa bõe la yãmb teeg-y-yã, la y sẽn paad Zeruzalɛm sẽn gũbg ne tãbd n gilgã?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Dẽ yĩnga, ka a Ezekɩyaas n belgd yãmb tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n fãaga yãmb mam nugẽ, ad-y-yã a belgda yãmba, tɩ y na n ki ne kom la ko-yũudu." 
2Chronicles32:12 Dẽ yĩnga, ka Ezekɩyaas-kãng la sẽn menes maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ne b tẽn-kugã, la a yeel Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm dãmbã, tɩ ka tẽn-kugr a yembr taoor bal la b tog n wõgemde, la b yõog tɩdarã a zug bal la?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Yãmb ka bãng maam ne m ba-rãmbã sẽn maan bũmb ninga ne tẽms a taabã fãa nebã la? Rẽ yĩnga, buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmb tõog n fãag-b-la mam nugẽ sɩda?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Tẽn-bãmb m ba sẽn da sãama wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa sʋka, wẽnnaam-bʋg n tõog n fãag a tẽng mam nugẽ, tɩ yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n wa tõog n fãag Zeruzalɛm mam nugẽ?»" 
2Chronicles32:15 La moasã, ra sak-y t'a Ezekɩyaas belg-y la a tudg-y woto ye. Da teeg-y y rĩmã goamã ye. Bala, tẽng ba a ye, bɩ rĩung ba a ye wẽnnaam-dãmb ka tõog n fãag a tẽng mam nugẽ, bɩ m ba-rãmbã me nugẽ ye, woto me yãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã me ka na n tõog n fãag yãmb mam nugẽ ye." 
2Chronicles32:16 Asiiri rĩm Senakeriib sẽn tʋm b rãmba ra ket n gomdame n paoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã la b tʋmtʋmd a Ezekɩyaas. 
2Chronicles32:17 La Senakeriib gʋlsa sɛb n na n tʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. Yẽnda goma sebrã pʋgẽ n yeele: «Tẽms a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã sẽn ka tõog fãag b tẽmsã mam nugẽ wã, woto me, a Ezekɩyaas Wẽnnaamã ka na n tõog n fãag a nebã mam nugẽ ye.»" 
2Chronicles32:18 A Senakeriib sẽn tʋm b rãmba ra zẽkda b koeesã, n gomd ne Zeruzalɛm nebã sẽn zao-b lalgã zugã ne Zʋʋda-rãmbã goam, n dat n kẽes-b rabeem la yɛɛsgo, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam n deeg tẽngã." 
2Chronicles32:19 B ra gomda Zeruzalɛm Wẽnnaamã yelle wa b sẽn gomd tẽms a taabã sẽn be dũniyã zugã wẽnnaam-dãmbã sẽn yaa ninsaalb nus tʋʋmã yelle. 
2Chronicles32:20 Yaa rẽ yĩng la dĩm a Ezekɩyaas nea Amots biig Izayi, sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã pʋʋs Wẽnnaam sẽn be saasẽ wã." 
2Chronicles32:21 La Sẽn-Ka-Saabã tʋma malɛɛk Asiiri rãmbã tãb-sikẽ, t'a tɩ kʋ tãb-bi-gãndaadã fãa, ne tãnsoben-dãmbã, la nanambsã fãa. Woto, Asiiri rĩm a Sãnkeriib yika ne yãnd n lebg n zoe n kuil a tẽngẽ. La wakat ning yẽnda sẽn wa n kẽ a wẽn-naandgã roogẽ wã n na n pʋʋsã, yẽnda kambã kẽe n kɛɛ yẽnda ne sʋʋg n kʋ." 
2Chronicles32:22 Yaa woto la Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãag dĩm a Ezekɩyaas la Zeruzalɛm dãmba, Asiiri dĩmã a Senakeriib nugẽ, la b bɛɛb a taabã me nugẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saabã kɩtame t'a Ezekɩyaas paam laafɩ a soolmã kɩrems fãa pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles32:23 Neb wʋsg talla kũun n wa Zeruzalɛm n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b kõ Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas me. Bala, yell kãensã poore, yẽnda yʋʋrã ra yiime n lebg kãseng bu-zẽmsã sʋka." 
2Chronicles32:24 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas lʋɩɩ bãag sẽn dat n kʋ-a. La a pʋʋsame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maag-a, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Ezekɩyaas n kõ-a bãnde." 
2Chronicles32:25 A Ezekɩyaas ka maan wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sẽn maan n kõ yẽnda wã ye, Yẽnda wuka a meng n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puug ne yẽnda, ne Zʋʋda, la ne Zeruzalɛm nebã." 
2Chronicles32:26 La baa ne a Ezekɩyaas sẽn da zẽk a mengã, yẽnda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã lɛɛg n sika b mense. Dẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sig tɩ b ka sɩbg bãmb a Ezekɩyaas vɩɩmã wakat ye." 
2Chronicles32:27 A Ezekɩyaas paama arzegs wʋsg la waoogre. La a bao laog n bĩngi. Yaa wanzuri, sãnem, kug-sõama sẽn yaa neeba, parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ne gãnã, la te-sõama buud toor-toore." 
2Chronicles32:28 La a me rot a koodã bĩngr yĩnga, la a rãamã ne a kaamã yĩnga. La a mee bãga, la wuba, a rũm-bɛdã, ne a rũm-bãoonegã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles32:29 La yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b me tẽmse, la a paama rũm-bɛda, la rũm-bãooneg wʋsgo, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ra kõ-a-la paoong wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles32:30 Leb n yaa a Ezekɩyaas n pag Giyon kʋɩlgã n gõdga tees a Davɩɩd na-tẽnga, nin-taoorã. A Ezekɩyaas tõoga ne tʋʋmd ning fãa a sẽn da maandã." 
2Chronicles32:31 Wakat ning Babilond nanambsã sẽn tʋm koe-taasdbã tɩ b wa n na n sok n ges bõn-bãnd ning sẽn maan Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yellã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa a Ezekɩyaas n na n mak-a n ges n bãng bũmb ning fãa sẽn be a sũurẽ wã." 
2Chronicles32:32 A Ezekɩyaas tʋʋm a taabã, nea tẽebã tʋʋmã fãa gʋlsa bãngd a Ezayi sẽn yaa Amots biigã sebr pʋga, la Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll rĩm-dãmb kibay sebr me pʋga." 
2Chronicles32:33 A Ezekɩyaas kiime n sak a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-a Davɩɩd kamba yaadẽ tãngã sɛɛgẽ. Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm dãmbã wa n waoog-a-la a kũumã wakate. La yaa yẽnda bi-ribl a Manaase n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Chronicles33:1 A Manaase sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm piig la yiibu. Yẽnda rɩɩ naam n kaoos yʋʋm pis-nu la a nu Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga. 
2Chronicles33:2 A Manaase maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. Bala, yẽnda maana yel-beed wa buud a taab nins Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã rigã." 
2Chronicles33:3 Yẽnda lebs n mee maoong kʋʋb zĩis nins sẽn be kunkubã zut a ba Ezekɩyaas sẽn dag n pãb n wã wã, la a me tẽn-kugr a Baall yĩnga, n lugl a Aseera ra-lugdsi, la a wõgemd n waoog yĩngr ãdse." 
2Chronicles33:4 A Manaase mee tẽn-kug Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n goma ro-kãng yell n yeele: «Yaa Zeruzalɛm la m na n kɩt tɩ m yʋʋrã zĩnd wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles33:5 A Manaase mee tẽn-kug yĩngr ãdsã fãa yʋʋr yĩng n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zags a yiibã pʋse. 
2Chronicles33:6 La yẽnda mengã tol n dɩka a kamb n maan maoong n yõog bugum Bɛn-Hinom longẽ wã. Yẽnda ra sokd n na n bãnga beoog yelle, la a bʋgd bagre, la a maand sõodo. Yẽnda yãka neb tɩ yaa kinkir-bagba, la neb sẽn boond kɩɩmse. A Manaase kell n kẽnga taoor n maand sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã yiki." 
2Chronicles33:7 A Manaase ninga wẽn-naandg Wẽnnaam doogã pʋga, a mengã sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b naane. La Wẽnnaam yaool n dag n goma ne a Davɩɩd ne a biig a Salmo n yeele: «Yaa ro-kãngã pʋga, ne Zeruzalɛm tẽnga pʋga, la mam yãk Israyɛll buudã fãa sʋka, n na n kɩt tɩ m yʋʋrã zĩnd be wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles33:8 La Israyɛll nebã sã n sak mam noyã, la b maan wa mam sẽn yeel-bã, tɩ fãa zems zãng wa tõog ning mam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis sẽn kõ bãmbã, mam ka na n leb n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã yi n bas-b yaab-rãmbã tẽng n saad n yeebdẽ ye." 
2Chronicles33:9 La Manaase kẽesa Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã weoogo, n kɩt tɩ b maan wẽng n yɩɩd buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saabã sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã sãamã sẽn dag n maandã." 
2Chronicles33:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Manaase la ne a nebã, la bãmb ka kelg ye." 
2Chronicles33:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Asiiri tẽngã tãb-biis nanambsã wa zab ne bãmb n yõk a Manaase, n gaag a lemdã ne leoose, n balg-a ne bãens n tall-a n kẽng Babilonde." 
2Chronicles33:12 La a Manaase sẽn wa n be toogã pʋgã, a baoome tɩ sigs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã sũuri. Dẽ, yẽnda sika a mengã wʋsg a ba-rãmbã Wẽnnaam taoore," 
2Chronicles33:13 n bõs Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb sika b sũurã n leok a pʋʋsgã, n kɩt t'a lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm n dɩ naamã. Woto, a Manaase bãngame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam." 
2Chronicles33:14 Dẽ poore, a Manaase mee lalg a Davɩɩd tẽngã yɩnga. Lalgã sɩnga Giyon bulgã nin-taoorã, Sedrõ ko-soogẽ wã, hal n tɩ ta dignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ zĩm dignoorã. Lalgã ra gũbga Ofɛll tãngã, la a ra n mea lame n zẽke. N ning tãnsoben-dãmba Zʋʋda tẽms nins fãa sẽn me n gũbg lalsã pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles33:15 La yẽnda yiisa bu-zẽmsã wẽnnaam-dãmbã, ne bõn-naandgã sẽn da be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã, la a yiis tẽn-kug nins yẽnda sẽn da me n ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tãng zugã, la Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã, n wʋk-b n yi tẽnga kɩreng n lob-ba." 
2Chronicles33:16 Yẽnda mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã, la a kʋ lagem-n-taar maando, la bark pʋʋsg maando. La a wilg Zʋʋda rãmbã tɩ b waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
2Chronicles33:17 La baoosgo, nebã rag n ket n kẽnda maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã, la ra yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã bal la b rag n waoogda." 
2Chronicles33:18 A Manaase tʋʋm a taabã fãa a sẽn pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, la bãngdbã sẽn gomd ne yẽnda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã yĩngã fãa gʋlsa Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã sebr pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles33:19 A Manaase pʋʋsgã, ne Wẽnnaam sẽn leok-a to-to wã, la yẽnda yel-wẽnã ne a sẽn maanã sẽn ka zems ne Wẽnnaamã, la a sẽn me maoong kʋʋb zĩisã, la a lugl a Aseera ra-lugdsã, la bõn-naandgã n yaool n na n sik a mengã fãa gʋlsa a Hozayi sebrã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles33:20 A Manaase kiime n sak a saam-dãmba la b mum-a-la a zakẽ. La a biig a Amo n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã. 
2Chronicles33:21 Rĩm a Amo sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu, la a rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm a yiibu." 
2Chronicles33:22 Rĩm a Amo maana sẽn yaa wẽng n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa yẽnda ba a Manaase sẽn dag n maanã. Yẽnda maana maoong n kõ wẽn-naands nins yẽnda ba wã sẽn dag n maanã, n wõgemd n waoog-ba." 
2Chronicles33:23 Yẽnda ka sik a meng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wa a ba a Manaase sẽn dag n maanã ye. Yẽnda maneg n maana yel-wẽnã n yɩɩd pĩnda. 
2Chronicles33:24 Rĩm a Amo tʋmtʋmdbã zemsa taab noor a yembr n zãmb-a n kʋ-a na-yirã pʋga. 
2Chronicles33:25 La tẽngã nebã kʋʋ neb nins fãa sẽn zãmb rĩm a Amo n kʋ wã. Dẽ, tẽngã rãmb yãka a Amo bi-ribl a Zoziyaas t'a led a ba zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma." 
2Chronicles34:1 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm a nii, la a rɩɩ naamã yʋʋm pis-tã la a ye Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles34:2 A Zoziyaas maana sẽn tat Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam, n tũ a yaab a Davɩɩd naoor n ka bʋdg n leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
2Chronicles34:3 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm niinẽ, n dag n ket n yaa biigã, yẽnda sɩngame n baood a ba a Davɩɩd Wẽnnaamã. La a sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yiiblẽ, yẽnda sɩngame tɩ yɩlg Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm soolmã n yiis maoong kʋʋb zĩisã, la a Aseera ra-lugdsã, ne bõn-naandgã b sẽn yõgã." 
2Chronicles34:4 La b wãa Baall tẽn-kugã yẽnda nifẽ, la yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b wã wisd laasã sẽn dag n be b zutã, la a wã a Aseera ra-lugdsã, la wẽn-naandsã ne bõn-naandgã b sẽn yõgã, n neem-b n kɩt tɩ b lebg zom n wʋk b tomã n tɩ lob neb nins sẽn dag n maand maoong b zutã yaad zugu." 
2Chronicles34:5 La a kɩt tɩ b yõog maan-kʋʋdb-kãens kõabã b tẽn-kugã zutu. Yɩɩ woto la yẽnda yɩlg Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã. 
2Chronicles34:6 A Zoziyaas maana woto me Manaase, ne Efrayiim, la Sɩmyõ ne Neftali tẽmsã pʋsẽ, ne tẽms nins sẽn gilg bãmb n yaa raboodã pʋsẽ." 
2Chronicles34:7 Yẽnda wãa tẽn-kugã, la a kɛ a Aseera ra-lugdsã, la a wã wẽn-naandsã, n neem-b n kɩt tɩ b lebg zom. Yẽnda sãama wisd laas nins fãa sẽn dag n be Israyɛll soolmã fãa pʋgẽ wã, la a lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles34:8 Rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, sẽn na n yɩl n yɩlg tẽngã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, yẽnda tʋma a Atsaliya biig a Safãn ne tẽngã naab a Maseya, la a Yohakaaz biig a Yoha sẽn yaa sɛb-bĩngdã tɩ b tɩ maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã roogo." 
2Chronicles34:9 Dẽ, bãmb kẽnga Maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Hilkiiza nengẽ n tɩ kɩsa ligd ning Leevi neb nins sẽn yaa dignoorã gũudbã sẽn dag n reeg Manaase buudã, ne Efrayiim buudã, la Israyɛll buud a taab nins sẽn ketã nengẽ, n paas Zʋʋda ne Benzame buudã nengẽ wã, la b lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles34:10 La b rɩka ligd-kãng n kɩs neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmd yellã. Dẽ, bãmb dɩka ligdã kõ neb nins sẽn tʋmd n na n maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã n paas-a pãngã." 
2Chronicles34:11 La b kõ ra-wãadbã, la tãn-metbã tɩ b tõe n da kug-bɛd ne raad b sẽn tõe n tall n maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn sãamã." 
2Chronicles34:12 Nebã rag n tʋmda b tʋʋmã ne pʋ-peelem. Sẽn dag n yaa b taoor dãmb n get tʋʋmdã yellã yaa Leevi nebã. Yaa a Yahat ne a Obadiya sẽn yaa a Meraari yagensã, la a Zakari ne a Mesulam sẽn yaa Kehat yagensã. La Leevi nin-bãmb fãa rag n yaa yʋʋmba." 
2Chronicles34:13 La bãmb n dag n get te-zɩtbã yelle, ne sẽn tʋmd-b tʋʋm buud toay-toayã yelle. Leevi neb kẽer rag n yaa seb-bĩngdba, bɩ seb-gʋndba, wall rigno-gũudba." 
2Chronicles34:14 Wakat ning b sẽn wa dɩkd ligdã nebã sẽn tall n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, la Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã tõogã b sẽn dag n kõ b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisã sebre." 
2Chronicles34:15 La Hilkiiza yeela a Safan yaa: «Gese, mam yãnda tõodã sebr Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ n dɩke.» Dẽ, yẽnda rɩka tõodã sebr n kɩs seb-gʋnd a Safan." 
2Chronicles34:16 La seb-gʋnd a Safãn kẽnga rĩm a Zoziyaas nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Yãmb sẽn yeel y nebã tɩ b maan tʋʋmd ningã, b maaname." 
2Chronicles34:17 Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã tigsa ligd ning sẽn be Wẽnd doogẽ wã n kɩs neb nins sẽn get Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋm yellã taoor dãmba.» 
2Chronicles34:18 Seb-gʋnd a Safãn leb n yeela rĩma yaa: «Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza kɩsa maam sebre.» La yẽnda karma sebrã rĩma taoore. 
2Chronicles34:19 B sẽn karem tõodã sebr tɩ rĩm a Zoziyaas wʋm goam nins sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ wã, yẽnda pãrsa a futu." 
2Chronicles34:20 Rĩmã yeela maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza ne a Safãn biig a Ayikam, la a Miise biig a Abdõ, ne seb-gʋnd a Safãne, la rĩmã tʋmtʋmd a Aazaya yaa:" 
2Chronicles34:21 «Kẽng-y n tɩ sok-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bãng sebr ning b sẽn yãndã goam võor n wa togs maam ne Israyɛll la Zʋʋda nebã fãa. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur puuga wʋsg ne tõndo. Bala, tõnd yaab-rãmbã rag n ka sak seb-kãngã goamã ye, la b ka maan wa b sẽn gʋls a pʋgẽ wã me ye.»" 
2Chronicles34:22 Maan-kʋʋd a Hilkiiza ne rĩmã sẽn yãk b rãmbã kẽnga a Hasra biig a Tokhat biig a Salum sẽn yaa fu-bĩngdã pag a Ulda sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã nengẽ. Pʋg-kãng dag n bee Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sag-paall a yembr pʋga. Bãmb sẽn togs pagã n sɛ," 
2Chronicles34:23 pagã yeela bãmb yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Tɩ yeel-y ned ning sẽn tʋm-a yãmb mam nengẽ wã," 
2Chronicles34:24 tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam tẽn-kãngã ne a nebã, wa sẽn zems goam nins fãa sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ tɩ Zʋʋda rĩmã karem n yãndã." 
2Chronicles34:25 La yaa bãmb sẽn bas maam n yõog wisd n kõ wẽn-naandsã yĩnga, la b maan tʋʋm-wẽns buud fãa n beeg maamã yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam sũurã yik ne tẽn-kãngã, n ka na n tol n sig ye.»" 
2Chronicles34:26 La y tɩ yeel Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y wa sok Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Sã n yaa ne goam nins fo sẽn wʋmã, na n yɩɩ woto bala.›" 
2Chronicles34:27 La fo sẽn wʋm b sẽn wilg mam sẽn na n maan Zeruzalɛm ne a nebã to-to, tɩ fo sũurã sãam tɩ f sik f meng mam taoorã, bɩ f bãng tɩ fo sẽn sik f meng n pãrs f futã, n yãb mam taoorã, mam me wʋmame. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
2Chronicles34:28 Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f sak f saam-dãmba n gãand f yaoogẽ ne bãan n ka tol n yãnd tood nins mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ tẽn-kãngã paama ye. La b kẽng n tɩ togsa rĩmã gom-kãens fãa." 
2Chronicles34:29 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b tigim Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm kãsem-dãmbã. 
2Chronicles34:30 Rĩmã kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ne Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa, ne maan-kʋʋdbã la Leevi nebã, ne tẽngã nin-buiidã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne kãsem n tɩ tãag yao zʋʋga. Dẽ, b karma goam ning fãa sẽn gʋls kaoolã sebrã b sẽn yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã goamã fãa, tɩ nebã fãa kelge." 
2Chronicles34:31 Rĩmã yika a zĩigẽ wã n yals Sẽn-Ka-Saabã taoor n maan kaool t'a na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la a sak bãmb tõodã, ne b noyã, la b zãmsgã ne a sũurã fãa, la a yamã fãa, wa kaoolã goam b sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ wã." 
2Chronicles34:32 La yẽnda kɩtame tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn dag n wa Zeruzalɛmã, ne Benzame la Zeruzalɛm nebã, naag yẽnda n wẽene. La b maana wa b yaab-rãmbã tõogã sẽn yeelã." 
2Chronicles34:33 Dẽ zugẽ, a Zoziyaas menesa tẽms a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã sẽn yaa yel-beedã, Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n tarã. La a modga neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Israyɛll pʋgẽ wã tɩ b waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã. A Zoziyaas vɩɩmã tɛka, a ka tol n bʋdg baa bilf n bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb yaab-rãmb Wẽnnaam ye." 
2Chronicles35:1 A Zoziyaas kɩtame tɩ b maan Sẽn-Ka-Saab Pakã tigr Zeruzalɛm, la bãmb kʋʋ Pak pe-bilã pipi kiuugã rasem piig la naas daarã." 
2Chronicles35:2 A Zoziyaas leb n ninga maan-kʋʋd fãa a tʋʋmd sullẽ, la a gesame tɩ ned kam fãa sɩd tõog n maan a tʋʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga." 
2Chronicles35:3 A Zoziyaas yeela Leevi neb nins sẽn da get-b nebã zãmsgã yellã la sẽn da yɩlg b mens Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga yaa: «Ning-y kaoolã koglgã roog ning Israyɛll dĩm a Davɩɩd biig a Salmo sẽn me wã pʋgẽ, tɩ ka leb n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ y palg-a y bãgdẽ ye. Tʋm-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã yĩng me." 
2Chronicles35:4 Yõgen tʋʋmdã roog-roogo, wa sẽn zems y sagsã, wa Israyɛll dĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n gʋls t'a biig a Salmo ra viglã." 
2Chronicles35:5 Yals-y sɛk roogã pʋg wa sẽn zems y buudã sẽn weel to-to wã, la wa sẽn zems Leevi buudã me ne b sagsã." 
2Chronicles35:6 Kʋ-y Pak tigrã pe-bila, la y maneg y mens n yɩ yɩlma, n tõog n segl y saam-biisã wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã bãmb sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiisã.»" 
2Chronicles35:7 A Zoziyaas yãka pe-bi, la bulli tus pis-tã, la lols tus a tãab a rũmsã pʋgẽ, n kõ Pak tigrã yĩnga, la sẽn tigim-bã me yĩnga. B yãka bõn-kãens rĩmã paoongã sʋka." 
2Chronicles35:8 A Zoziyaas nanambsã me yãka yamleoog kũun b rũmsã pʋgẽ, n kõ nebã, ne maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã. A Hilkiiza, ne a Zakari la Yeyiyɛll sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã nanambsã me kõo maan-kʋʋdbã rũm-bãooneg tus a yi la kobs yoobe, la lols kobs tã, Pakã tigr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles35:9 A Konaniya, ne a Semaya, la a Netaneyɛll ne a saam-biis a Hasabiya la a Yeyiyɛll ne a Zozabaad sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nanambsã, kõo Leevi nebã rũm-bãooneg tus a nu, la lols kobs-nu." 
2Chronicles35:10 Woto, bãmb segla tʋʋmã n sɛ, la maan-kʋʋdbã yalsa b zĩisẽ, tɩ Leevi nebã me sẽn zems b sagsã me yalsa b zĩisẽ wa sẽn zems noor ning rĩmã sẽn dag n kõ wã." 
2Chronicles35:11 Woto, b kʋʋ Pakã pe-bi, la maan-kʋʋdbã koka zɩɩmã n tɩ raag tẽn-kugrã zugu. La yaa Leevi nebã n dag sɩɩd piisã." 
2Chronicles35:12 La bãmb dag n yãkda bũmb ninga b sẽn da tog n yãk n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabã toore, n kõ buud fãa tɩ b tõe n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, wa b sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõodã sebr pʋgã. B maana woto me ne rũm-bɛdã." 
2Chronicles35:13 Dẽ, bãmb sẽe Pak pe-bilã nemd wa tõogã sẽn wilgã. La b yaool n dʋg maand a taabã nemd ne rʋgdo, la laase, n zoe tao-tao n saag n kõ nebã." 
2Chronicles35:14 Dẽ zugẽ, bãmb dʋga nemd ning sẽn yaa bãmb ne maan-kʋʋdbã rẽndã, bala, maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagensã da ka tar weer ye, bãmb da yõogda maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, la b yõogd ne maand a taabã nem-kaamã hal tɩ ta yʋngo. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ Leevi nebã rʋg bãmb ne maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yaa a Aarõ yagensã nemdã." 
2Chronicles35:15 La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sẽn yaa a Aazaf yagensã me ra bee b zĩisẽ, wa sẽn zems noor ningã a Davɩɩde, ne a Azafe, la a Eman ne a Yedutun sẽn yaa rĩma bãngdã sẽn da kõ wã. La sẽn da gũudb dignoyã me ka serg n bas-b zĩisã ye, Leevi nebã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã segla bãmb dẽndã n wa kõ-ba." 
2Chronicles35:16 Yɩɩ woto la bãmb maan tʋʋmdã badaar Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã Pak tigrã yĩnga, la b maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã zug wa sẽn zems noor ning rĩm a Zoziyaas sẽn kõ wã." 
2Chronicles35:17 Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n be beenẽ wakat-kãngã maana Pak tigrã, ne bur sẽn ka be rã-bɩllã tigr dasem a yopoe." 
2Chronicles35:18 Hal sẽn sɩng ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Sãmwɛll zamaane, Israyɛll dĩm ba a yembr na n zɩ n maan Pak tigr a woto buud wa rĩm a Zoziyaas ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi nebã, la Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛm ne Zeruzalɛm nebã sẽn maanã ye." 
2Chronicles35:19 Yaa a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, la b maan Pak-kãnga." 
2Chronicles35:20 Bõn-kãens fãa poore, a Zoziyaas sẽn wa n maneg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã n sɛ, Ezɩpt rĩm a Neko yiime n kẽng Karkemis sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã noorã n na n tɩ zabe. La a Zoziyaas yiime n na n seg yẽnda." 
2Chronicles35:21 La a Neko tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Zʋʋda rĩma, yaa wãn tɩ f rat n gɩdg-ma? M ka wat dũndã n na n zab ne foom ye. Yaa ne buud a to la m kẽnd n na n tɩ zab ne. La Wẽnnaam yeel-m lame tɩ m maan tao-tao. Dẽ wã bɩ f ra kɩɩs Wẽnnaam sẽn be ne maamã ye, sã n ka rẽ b na n sãam-f lame.»" 
2Chronicles35:22 La ba ne rẽ fãa, a Zoziyaas ka kelg goam ninga a Neko sẽn gom sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã n lebg n basa a Neko ye, yẽnda toeema a futã n na n tɩ zab ne-a Megido longã pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles35:23 Tãb-tãoodbã tãoome tɩ yõg rĩm a Zoziyaase, dẽ yẽnda yeela a tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b talla n loog t'a sãmpogrã yaa kãsenga." 
2Chronicles35:24 La woto, a Zoziyaas tʋmtʋmdbã yiis-a-la Saar ninga a sẽn be wã pʋgẽ n kẽesa Saar a to pʋgẽ n tall-a n kẽng Zeruzalɛm. A Zoziyaas kiime tɩ b muma a ba-rãmb yaadẽ, la Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm dãmba fãa yãba a kʋʋre." 
2Chronicles35:25 A Zeremi gʋlsa sũ-sãang yɩɩll a Zoziyaas yĩnga, yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sẽn yaa pagb la raopã fãa me goma a Zoziyaas yell b yɩɩlã pʋgẽ. La hal tɩ ta rũndã b yãka noor tɩ bõn-kãng lebg mining Israyɛll pʋgẽ. La yɩɩn-bãmb gʋlsa sũ-sãang yɩɩlã sebr pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles35:26 A Zoziyaas tʋʋm a taabã a sẽn maanã, ne a sẽn maan sɩd ne bũmb ning sẽn gʋls Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã" 
2Chronicles35:27 A Zoziyaas kibarã sɩngr ne a baoosg fãa gʋlsa rĩm-dãmbã sebr pʋgẽ. 
2Chronicles36:1 Woto, tẽngã yãka a Zoziyaas biig a Zoakaaz n kɩt t'a led a ba wã zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma." 
2Chronicles36:2 A Zoakaaz sẽn waa n na n lebg rĩma t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a tãabo. La a rɩɩ naamã kiis a tãab Zeruzalɛm. 
2Chronicles36:3 Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko sika a Zoakaaz naamẽ, n yiis-a Zeruzalɛm. Ezɩpt rĩma yaoolga tẽngã yaoodo, n yeel tɩ b yao wanzuri kɩlo tus a tã la kobs-nu, ne sãnem kɩlo pis-tã la a nu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Ezɩpt rĩmã kɩtame t'a Zoakaaz ba-biig Eliyakim lebg rĩm n dɩ Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm naam. La yẽnda teka a Eliyakim yʋʋrã n pʋd-a t'a Yoyakim. La Ezɩpt rĩm a Neko talla a ba-biig a Zoakaaz n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽnga. 
2Chronicles36:5 A Yoyakim sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã, rẽ t'a tar yʋʋm pisi la a nu. Yẽnda rɩɩ naam Zeruzalɛm n kaoos yʋʋm piig la a yembre. A Yoyakim maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, wa yẽnda yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n maan n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wa n na n zab ne a Yoyakim, la a yõk-a lame n balg ne zũud sogl a yiib n tall-a n kẽng Babilonde." 
2Chronicles36:7 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed buud fãa n tall n loog ne Babilonde, la a tɩ ning-b-la a na-yirã pʋga." 
2Chronicles36:8 A Yoyakim tʋʋm a taabã ne yel-beed nins fãa a sẽn maanã, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn paamã wã gʋlsa Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã kibay sebr pʋga. La yẽnda bi-ribl a Zozakẽ leda yẽnda zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã." 
2Chronicles36:9 A Zozakẽ sẽn wa n na n deeg a naama t'a tara yʋʋm a nii. A rɩɩ a naamã Zeruzalɛm kiis a tãab la rasem piiga. A Zozakẽ maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ. 
2Chronicles36:10 Yʋʋmdã sẽn wa n na n baasã, a Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame tɩ b tall a Zozakẽ ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã te-sõamy wã fãa n kẽng Babilonde. La a kɩt t'a Sedesiyaas lebg rĩm n soog Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm." 
2Chronicles36:11 A Sedesiyaas sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yembre, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm piig la a yembre." 
2Chronicles36:12 A Sedesiyaas maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã nifẽ. Yẽnda ka sik a meng n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi gom ne yẽnda wã ye. 
2Chronicles36:13 Yẽnda tol n yik n zẽka a zug ne a Nebukatnedzaar n kɩɩs wẽeneg ning a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n kɩt t'a wẽen ne Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã. Yẽnda kenga a sũurã n ka sak Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ye. 
2Chronicles36:14 La maan-kʋʋdbã taoor dãmbã ne tẽngã nebã fãa me maana sẽn ka zemse, bãmb maana yel-beed nins fãa buud a taabã sẽn maandã, n dẽgem Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã b sẽn da welg toor Zeruzalɛmã." 
2Chronicles36:15 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb ba-rãmb Wẽnnaam tʋma b no-rɛɛsdb tɩ b wa keoog-ba, bãmb sẽn dag n zoet b nebã, la b roogã nimbãanegã yĩngã." 
2Chronicles36:16 La bãmb dag n yaanda Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdbã n paoogd b goamã, la b yaand-b no-rɛɛsdbã, hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã wa puug ne b nebã tɩ tɩɩm ka ye." 
2Chronicles36:17 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Kalde naabã wa zab ne bãmba, n kʋ b kom-bɩɩsã ne zabr sʋʋs b Wẽnd doogẽ wã, bãmb ka bas bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugla, wall nin-kẽem bɩ ned sẽn tar zoob peend ye. A bas-b-la fãa a nugẽ." 
2Chronicles36:18 Yẽnda wʋka Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed fãa, te-bɛd la te-bãoonego. Yẽnda wʋka rĩmã ne a nanambsã laog fãa n tall n kẽng Babilonde." 
2Chronicles36:19 La a yõoga Wẽnnaam doogã bugum, n wã Zeruzalɛm lalgã, la b yõog na-yiyã fãa, la b sãam te-sõamy wã fãa." 
2Chronicles36:20 La a tall neb nins sẽn põs kũumã n loog yembdo. La bãmb kell n yɩɩ rĩma ne a kamb yembs hal n tãag Pɛrs soolem naabã sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã. 
2Chronicles36:21 Yɩɩ woto la Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Zeremi wã paam pidsgu. Ad bãmb sẽn dag n yeelã: «Tẽngã na n paa vɩʋʋg yʋʋm pis-yopoe, hal n tãag a vʋʋsg rayã sẽn na n wa pidi.»" 
2Chronicles36:22 La sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n gom ne a Zeremi wã paam pidsgu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab neka Pɛrs naab a Siruus yamã, a naamã pipi yʋʋmdã, t'a gʋls n wilg a soolmã neb fãa n yeele:" 
2Chronicles36:23 «Ade, Pɛrs rĩm a Siruus sẽn yetame: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã kõo maam soolem-dãmb nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã. La bãmb yeela maam tɩ m me roog Zeruzalɛm sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmã pʋgẽ wã. Woto, ned ning fãa sẽn yaa bãmb soolmã neda, bɩ a kẽnge, la bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã zĩnd ne-a.»" 
Ezra1:1 Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus naamã pipi yʋʋmdã pʋga, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi togsã paam pidsgu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Siruus sũurẽ n kɩt t'a moone, la a gʋls n togs a soolmã fãa pʋg n yeel yaa:" 
Ezra1:2 Ade, Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã kõo maam pãng tɩ m soog dũniyã soolmã fãa. La b kõo maam tʋʋmd tɩ m me roog Zeruzalɛm, Zʋʋda soolmã pʋg n kõ-ba." 
Ezra1:3 Ned sã n be yãmb sʋkã, n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab neda, bɩ a Wẽnnaam zĩnd ne-a t'a lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, n tɩ me Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã Wẽnnaamã roogo. Wẽnnaam ning sẽn be-a Zeruzalɛmã!" 
Ezra1:4 Israyɛll nebã sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, zĩ-kãng nebã tog n sõnga bãmba, n kõ-b wanzuri, sãnem, laog ne rũmsi. La b tog n kõ-b-la yamleoog kũun me, Zeruzalɛm Wẽnd doogã meeb yĩnga!»" 
Ezra1:5 Dẽ, Zʋʋda buudã ne Benzame buudã kãsem-dãmbã, ne maan-kʋʋdbã, n paas Leevi buudã nebã, ne neb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sɩɩs b sũy tɩ b tɩ me bãmb doogã seglame n na n kẽng n tɩ me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã." 
Ezra1:6 Bãmb yagsã fãa sõng-b lame, n kõ-b wanzuri ne sãnem teedo, la laog a taaba. B kõo bãmb rũmsi, ne teed wʋsg sẽn tar yõodo, n paas yamleoog kũuni, roogã meeb yĩnga." 
Ezra1:7 La rĩm a Siruus lebsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teedã, teed nins naab a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n tɩ wʋk Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã pʋgẽ wã, n wa ning a meng wẽn-naandgã roogẽ wã." 
Ezra1:8 Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus kɩtame tɩ laogã gũud a Mitredat yiis teedã n sõd n kɩs Zʋʋda tẽng na-biig a Sesbatsaare. 
Ezra1:9 Ad teedã sõore: Yaa sãnem laas pis-tã, wanzuri laas tusri, ne sʋʋs pisi la a wɛ." 
Ezra1:10 Sãnem laas pis-tã, wanzuri la-boagl kobs-naas la piiga, n paas teed a taab tusri." 
Ezra1:11 Sãnemã ne wanzuri wã teed fãa sõor yaa tus a nu la kobs-naase. La a Sesbatsaar sẽn wa n na n yi Babilond ne yembsã n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛmã, a wʋka rẽndã fãa n zɩ n looge."
