Ezra2:1 Ad neb nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋgẽ Babilond soolmẽ wã, n lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã yʋyã. Bãmb yaa neb nins Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n yõg n kẽes yembd pʋg Babilond soolmẽ wã. Bãmb ned kam fãa leba a tẽngẽ." 
Ezra2:2 Yaa a Zorobabɛlle, a Zozoe, a Neemi, a Seraya, a Relaya, a Mardoose, a Bilesã, a Mispaare, a Bigvayi, a Rehum ne a Baana, n lʋɩ nebã taoor n tall-b n lebg n lebe." 
Ezra2:3 Ad Israyɛll raopã sõore: A Paroos yagensã sõor yaa neb tus a yiib la koabg la pis-yopoe la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:4 A Sefatiya yagensã sõor yaa neb kobs-tã la pis-yopoe la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:5 A Aara yagensã sõor yaa neb kobs-yopoe la pis-yopoe la a nu. 
Ezra2:6 A Pahat-Moaab sẽn yaa a Zozoe ne a Zoaab yagengã yagens sõor yaa neb tus a yiib la kobs-nii la piig la yiibu. 
Ezra2:7 A Elam yagensã sõor yaa neb tusr la kobsi la pisnu la a naase. 
Ezra2:8 A Zatu yagensã neb sõor yaa neb kobs wɛ la pis-naas la a nu. 
Ezra2:9 A Zakayi yagensã neb sõor yaa neb kobs-yopoe la pis-yoobe. 
Ezra2:10 A Bani yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-yoob la pis-naas la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:11 A Bebayi yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-yoob la pisi la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:12 A Azgaad yagensã neb sõor yaa tusr la kobsi la pisi la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:13 A Adonikam yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-yoob la pis-yoob la a yoobe. 
Ezra2:14 A Bigvayi yagensã neb sõor yaa tus a yiib la pisnu la a yoobe. 
Ezra2:15 A Adin yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-naas la pisnu la a naase. 
Ezra2:16 A Atɛɛr sẽn yaa a Yehizkiya yagengã yagens sõor yaa neb pis-wɛ la a nii. 
Ezra2:17 A Besayi yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-tã la pisi la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:18 A Yora yagensã neb sõor yaa koabg la piig la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:19 A Hasum yagensã neb sõor yaa kobsi la pisi la tãabo. 
Ezra2:20 A Gibaar yagensã neb sõor yaa pis-wɛ la a nu. 
Ezra2:21 Neb nins fãa sẽn yit Betlehɛmã sõor yaa neb kobg la pisi la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:22 La Neb nins sẽn yi Netofa wã sõor yaa neb pisnu la a yoobe. 
Ezra2:23 La neb nins sẽn yit Anatotã sõor yaa neb koabg la pisi la a nii. 
Ezra2:24 La neb nins sẽn yit Azmavɛtã sõor yaa neb pis-naas la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:25 La neb sẽn yit Kiryat-Yeyarim sõor yaa neb kobs-yopoe la pis-naas la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:26 La neb nins sẽn yit Rama ne Geba wã sõor yaa neb kobs-yoob la pisi la a yembre. 
Ezra2:27 La neb nins sẽn yit Mikmaasã sõor yaa neb koabg la pisi la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:28 La neb nins sẽn yit Betɛll ne Ayi wã sõor yaa neb kobsi la pisi la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:29 La neb nins sẽn yit Nebo wã sõor yaa neb pisnu la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:30 A Magbis tẽngẽ nebã sõor yaa neb koabg la pisnu la a yoobe. 
Ezra2:31 La Elam a to n be, la a yagensã sõor yaa neb tusr la kobsi la pisnu la a naase." 
Ezra2:32 A Harim yagensã neb sõor yaa kobs-tã la pisi. 
Ezra2:33 Lood tẽngã, la Hadiid ne Ono tẽngã neb sõor yaa kobs-yopoe la pisi la a nu." 
Ezra2:34 Zeeriko tẽngã neb yaa kobs-tã la pis-naas la a nu. 
Ezra2:35 Sena tẽngã neb yaa tus a tã la kobs-yoob la pistã. 
Ezra2:36 Ad maan-kʋʋdbã sullã nebã: Yaa a Yedaya kambã sẽn yaa Zozoe yagensã. Bãmb yaa neb kobs-wɛ la pis-yopoe la a tãabo. 
Ezra2:37 A Imeer yagensã yaa neb tusr la pisnu la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:38 A Pasewʋʋr yagensã yaa neb tusr la kobsi la pis-naas la a yopoe. 
Ezra2:39 A Harim yagensã yaa neb tusr la piig la a yopoe. 
Ezra2:40 Ad Leevi buudã nebã: Yaa a Zozoe ne a Kadmiyɛlle, la a Hodava yagensã. Bãmb yaa neb pis-yopoe la a naase." 
Ezra2:41 Ad yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sulli: Yaa a Azaf yagensã. Bãmb sõorã yaa neb kobg la pisi la a nii. 
Ezra2:42 Ad zag-noy gũudbã yagense: Yaa a Salum yagensã, a Atɛɛr yagensã, a Talmon yagensã, a Akuub yagensã, a Hatita yagensã, ne a Sobayi yagensã. Bãmb fãa yaa neb koabg la pis-tã la a wɛ." 
Ezra2:43 Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã yaa a Siba yagensã, a Hasufa yagensã, a Tabaot yagensã," 
Ezra2:44 a Keroos yagensã, a Siyaha yagensã, a Padon yagensã," 
Ezra2:45 a Lebana yagensã, a Hagaba yagensã, a Akuub yagensã," 
Ezra2:46 a Hagaab yagensã, a Samlayi yagensã, a Hanan yagensã," 
Ezra2:47 a Gidɛll yagensã, a Gahaar yagensã, a Rehaya yagensã," 
Ezra2:48 a Retsin yagensã, a Nekoda yagensã, a Gaazam yagensã," 
Ezra2:49 a Uuza yagensã, a Paseya yagensã, a Besayi yagensã," 
Ezra2:50 a Asna yagensã, a Mewunim yagensã, a Nefuzim yagensã," 
Ezra2:51 a Bakbuk yagensã, a Hakufa yagensã, a Harhʋʋr yagensã," 
Ezra2:52 a Batslut yagensã, a Mehida yagensã, a Harsa yagensã," 
Ezra2:53 a Barkoos yagensã, a Sizera yagensã, a Tama yagensã," 
Ezra2:54 a Nesiyat yagensã, a Hatifa yagensã." 
Ezra2:55 Ad a Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã yagense: Yaa a Sotayi yagensã, a Soferɛt yagensã, a Peruuda yagensã," 
Ezra2:56 a Yaala yagensã, a Darkon yagensã, a Gidɛll yagensã," 
Ezra2:57 a Sefatiya yagensã, a Hatill yagensã, Pokerɛt-Hasebayim ne a Ami yagensã." 
Ezra2:58 Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã ne a Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã fãa zãng yaa neb kobs-tã la pis-wɛ la a yiibu. 
Ezra2:59 Ad neb nins sẽn yi Tel-Mela ne Tel-Harsa, la Keruub-Adan ne Imeere, n ka tõog n wilg b yaabã sẽn yaa ned ninga, la b ka tõog me n wilg bãmb sẽn yaa ned ninga yagense, sẽn na n yɩl n wilg tɩ bãmb yaa Israyɛll buudã neb ye." 
Ezra2:60 A Delaya, a Tobiza ne a Nekoda yagensã yaa neb kobs-yoob la pisnu la a yiibu." 
Ezra2:61 La ad neb nins sẽn dag n be maan-kʋʋdbã sʋk n be yel-kãng pʋga: Yaa a Habaya yagensã, a Hakoose, ne a Barzɩlayi sẽn yaa ned ning sẽn dag n peeg Galaad tẽng rao a Barzɩlayi biig n maan a pag tɩ b kell n boond-a t'a Barzɩlayi wã yagensã." 
Ezra2:62 Bãmb bao b yaab-rãmbã yʋy sõadg sebrã pʋg n konge. Dẽ, b yiisa bãmb maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã pʋga. Bala, b geelga bãmb wa nin-dẽgdo." 
Ezra2:63 La gʋvɛrneerã meng gɩdga bãmb tɩ b ra rɩ kũunã b sẽn kõ Wẽnnaamã rɩɩb ye. Hal tɩ maan-kʋʋdã wa n sok Wẽnnaam ne Urim la Tumim n ges sã n zemsame tɩ b rɩ. 
Ezra2:64 La nin-buiidã fãa zãng yaa neb tus-pis-naas la a yiib la kobs-tã la pis-yoobe. 
Ezra2:65 Woto fãa, yaa b sẽn ka sõd b yem-daadã ne b yem-pogsã neb tus a yopoe la kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe wã n naage. La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã yaa neb kobsi, raop ne pagba." 
Ezra2:66 Bãmb dag n tara wiid kobs-yopoe la pis-tã la a yoobe ne bõn-wees kobsi la pis-naas la a nu. 
Ezra2:67 La yʋgmã wã yaa kobs-naas la pis-tã la a nu, ne bõens tus a yoob la kobs-yopoe la pisi." 
Ezra2:68 La bãmb sẽn wa n ta Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn be wã pʋgẽ, bãmb buudã nanambs kẽer yãka b kũun ne yamleoog n kõ Wẽnnaam doogã yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b tõe n lebs n me Wẽnnaam doogã a pĩnd zĩigẽ wã." 
Ezra2:69 Bãmb kõo b sẽn tõe fãa, Wẽnnaam doogã meeb yĩnga. B sẽn kõ wã yaa sãnem wakɩ-koeems tus pis-yoob la a yembre, ne wanzuri wakɩ-koeems sẽn tat tus a nu, la b leb n kõ maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd fut koabga." 
Ezra2:70 La maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã nebã, la ninbuiidã, ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, la Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã ned kam fãa kẽng n tɩ zĩnda a tẽngẽ, la Israyɛll nebã me kẽnga b tẽmsẽ." 
Ezra3:1 Yʋʋmdã kiuug a yopoe soabã sẽn ta, Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n be b tẽmsã pʋsẽ wã fãa tigma taab Zeruzalɛm, n lebg noor a yembre." 
Ezra3:2 La maan-kʋʋd a Yosadak biig a Zozoe ne a saam-biisã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, ne a Seyaltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll ne a saam-biisã yikame n lebs n me Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugrã, n na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum beenẽ, wa sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam dao a Moyiis tõogã pʋgẽ wã." 
Ezra3:3 Baa ne bãmb sẽn dag n zoet tẽngã nebã sẽn be tẽngã pʋgã, bãmb lebs n mee tẽn-kugrã a pĩnd zĩigẽ wã. La bãmb maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum beenẽ yibeoog ne zaabre, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezra3:4 Israyɛll nebã maana zãn tigri, wa sẽn gʋls tõogã sebr pʋgã. La bãmb maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum daar fãa wa sẽn zems sõor ning tõogã sẽn yeelã." 
Ezra3:5 La rẽ zugẽ, bãmb kell n maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wakat fãa. Yaa ki-paalg tigr maoongo, ne tig nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel tɩ b maana maando, la yamleoog kũunã b sẽn kõt Sẽn-Ka-saabã." 
Ezra3:6 La kiuug a yopoe soabã pipi daarã bala, bãmb sɩngame n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La baoosgo, b rag n nan ket n ka sɩng Wẽnnaam doogã meeb ye." 
Ezra3:7 Rẽ poore, b baoo ligd n kõ kug-pɛɛsdbã ne ra-wãadbã. La b bao koodo, bõn-yũudla, ne kaam n kõ Sɩdõ ne Tɩɩr tẽng nebã, tɩ b tõe n tall Libã tẽngã sɛɛdr tɩɩsã ra-sĩdim n pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã n wa Zafa, n wa kõ-ba. Bãmb maana wa Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus sẽn kõ noor tɩ b maan to-to wã." 
Ezra3:8 Bãmb sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n wa Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛm pugẽ wã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a yiibẽ soabã pʋgẽ, a Seyaltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll ne a Yosadak biig a Zozoe, ne b saam-biisã sẽn ketã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi buudã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn yi yembdã weoog n wa wã yikame n sɩng tʋʋmã. Bãmb tũusa Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn tar yʋʋm pisi, la sẽn yɩɩd woto wã, n yeel-b tɩ b ges Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã meeb yelle." 
Ezra3:9 Leevi nebã, a Zozoe ne a kambã la a saam-biisã, a Kadmiyɛll ne a kambã sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda yagensã, ne a Henadaad kambã ne b yagensã naaga taab noor a yembr n na n ges tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn tʋmd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã yelle." 
Ezra3:10 La tãn-metbã sẽn wa n yẽbg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, b kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã yeelg b maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd futã, n tɩ yals beenẽ ne tãntãado, t'a Azaf yagensã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã zãad kɛma, tɩ b na n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa Israyɛll dĩm a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n yeelã." 
Ezra3:11 Dẽ, bãmb dag n pẽgda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b waoogd-ba, n yɩɩnd n deesd taab n yetẽ yaa: «Ad bãmb sɩd yaa sõngo, bala bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa Israyɛll yĩnga!» La nebã fãa kaasa ne pãng n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b sẽn yẽbg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩnga." 
Ezra3:12 La maan-kʋʋdbã sʋk neb wʋsgo, ne Leevi buudã sʋk neb wʋsgo, la buudã taoor dãmb sʋk neb wʋsg sẽn yaa nin-kẽembã sẽn dag n yãnd pipi roogã, zẽka b koɛɛg n yãb wakat ning b sẽn wa n yẽbgd Wẽnnaam doogã bãmb nifẽ wã. La neb wʋsg rag n kaasda ne sũ-noogo." 
Ezra3:13 Dẽ, nebã rag n ka leb n tõe n bãng sũ-noogã kaasgo, ne yãbrã bʋrg n bak ye. Bala, nebã rag n kaasda wʋsgo, tɩ ned tõe n zĩnd zĩ-zãrgẽ n wʋme." 
Ezra4:1 Wakat-kãnga, Zʋʋda ne Benzame buudã bɛɛbã sẽn wʋm tɩ sẽn yi-b yembdã pʋg n lebg n wa wã lebs n meta Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã roogo," 
Ezra4:2 bãmb kẽnga a Zorobabɛll ne buudã kãsem-dãmb nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «Tõnd dat n sõnga yãmb n me Wẽnnaam doogã. Bala, tõnd pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam ning yãmb sẽn pʋʋsdã. La hal sẽn sɩng ne daar ning Asiiri rĩm a Asaradon sẽn wa ne tõnd ka wã tɛka, tõnd maanda maand ka bãmb waoogr yĩnga.»" 
Ezra4:3 La a Zorobabɛll ne a Zozoe, ne Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmb leoka bãmb yaa: «Yãmb ka na n naag tõnd n me roog n kõ tõnd Wẽnnaamã ye. Tõnd bal n na n me roogã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, wa Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus sẽn kõ tõnd noor to-to wã.»" 
Ezra4:4 Dẽ, tẽngã neb bao n na n booga Zʋʋda nebã raoodo, la b kẽes-b rabeem, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b bas Wẽnnaam doogã meebo." 
Ezra4:5 Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus sẽn wa n dɩt a naamã, n tɩ tãag rĩm a Daryuus naamã wakate, tẽngã neb kõo sagl-wẽns rãmb yaoodo, sẽn na n yɩl n gɩdg Zʋʋda nebã tɩ b ra tõog n pids b saagrã ye." 
Ezra4:6 Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn wa n deeg a naamã wakate, Zʋʋda nebã bɛɛb gʋlsa sebr n dõd Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã." 
Ezra4:7 Rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs naamã wakate, a Bislam, a Mitredate ne a Tabeyɛll n paas ne bãmb tʋmd-n-taasã gʋlsa sebr n kõ Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩmã. La b gʋlsa sebrã ne Aram tẽng buudã goam gʋls-biisi, la b lebg-a ne Aram tẽng buudã goamã." 
Ezra4:8 La soolmã gʋvɛrneer a Rehum ne a seb-gʋnd a Simsayi me gʋlsa sebr n gom Zeruzalɛm yelle, n tɩ kõ rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛse." 
Ezra4:9 Ad sebrã koeese: «Maam a Rehum sẽn yaa gʋvɛrneerã, ne seb-gʋnd a Simsayi, ne bãmb tʋmd-n-taasã sẽn be Dĩn ne Afarsatake, Tarpɛlle, Afaraase, Erɛke, Babilonde, Suuzi, Deha, ne Elam soolmẽ wã," 
Ezra4:10 la buud a taabã nebã, nin-kãseng a Asnapaar sẽn dag n yõg n tall n wa Samaari tẽmsã pʋsã, ne zĩis a taabã pʋsã sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã n gʋlsd seb-kãngã n tʋmd rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛse.»" 
Ezra4:11 Sebrã yetame: ‹Rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛse, Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã, ne neb nins sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã yetame:" 
Ezra4:12 «Tõnd datame tɩ rĩmã bãnge, tɩ Zʋʋda neb nins sẽn yi yãmb nengẽ n lebg n wa tõnd nengẽ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgã ratame, n lebs n me tẽn-kãngã sẽn yaa tõatã, n yaa wẽnem soabã. Bãmb dat n manega lalsã yẽbgrã, n met-b n zẽkdẽ." 
Ezra4:13 N-na! Bãng-y tɩ b sã n tõog n lebs n me tẽngã, la b maneg a lalsã n yiki, nin-bãmbã ka na n leb n sak n yao yaoodã, la b ka na n yao yõor-yãoodã, b ka na n yao sor zug yaoodã me ye. La sã n yaool n yɩ a woto, n-na, yãmb naamã pãng na n boogame." 
Ezra4:14 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ tõnd sẽn dɩt yãmb nugẽ wã yĩnga, tõnd ka tõe n sak tɩ b paoog yãmb ye. Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ tõnd gʋls seb-kãngã n na n togs-yã." 
Ezra4:15 Seb-kãngã yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb tõe n vees y yaab-rãmbã kibay sebr pʋga, n ges n bãng yellã sẽn yaa to-to. La yãmb na n yãndame, la y na n bãngame tɩ Zeruzalɛm yaa tẽn-tõtre, la a namsa rĩm-dãmba, la soolem toay-toay nanambse. La sẽn sɩng hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, tẽn-kãngã yaa rãmbda. Rẽ meng n kɩt tɩ b sãam-a wã." 
Ezra4:16 Woto n kɩte, tɩ tõnd wilgd rĩmã, tɩ b sã n lebs n me Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, la b yik a lalsã, yãmb kõn tol n leb n tõog n soog Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd ned ye.› »" 
Ezra4:17 Ad rĩmã sẽn gʋls n leok to-to: «Gʋvɛrneer a Rehum, ne seb-gʋnd a Simsayi, la ne b tʋmd-n-taasã sẽn ketã sẽn be Samaari tẽngã ne zĩis a taabã, la Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, mam pʋʋsda yãmba!" 
Ezra4:18 Yaa sɩda, b karma sebr ning yãmb sẽn tʋm maamã vẽeneg mam taoore." 
Ezra4:19 Dẽ, mam kõo noor tɩ b vees n gese, la b sɩd mikame tɩ hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, Zeruzalɛm tẽngã yɩɩ tẽng sẽn kɩɩs rĩm-dãmb noyã, la a sɩd waa ne zũnglgu, la rãmbgo." 
Ezra4:20 La hal pĩnda, rĩm-dãmb sẽn tall pãens n sɩd zĩnd Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, n soog tẽms nins fãa sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, la b rag n deesda yaoodo, la yõor-yaoodo, ne sor zug yaoodo." 
Ezra4:21 Rẽ wã, bɩ y kõ noor n kɩt tɩ nin-bãmbã yals lalgã meebo. B ka tog n lebs n me tẽngã tɩ sã n ka maam n kõ noor ye." 
Ezra4:22 Gũus-y y mens n da wa reem ne yel-kãngã, n bas-a t'a wa lebg yel-kãseng n paase, n wa ne yell rĩm-dãmbã zug ye.»" 
Ezra4:23 Dẽ, b sẽn karem rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sebrã t'a Rehum ne a seb-gʋnd a Simsayi, la b tʋmd-n-taasã wʋma, b yika tao-tao n kẽng Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, Zʋʋda nebã nengẽ, n tɩ modg bãmb ne pãnga, n yeel-b tɩ b yals tʋʋmdã." 
Ezra4:24 Woto, b kɩtame tɩ Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã tʋʋmd yalse. La tʋʋmdã kell n yalsame hal n tãag Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Daryuus sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ." 
Ezra5:1 Daar a yembre, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb a yiibu, a Aaze, ne a Ido biig a Zakari togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr gomde, Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã ne Zʋʋda pʋgẽ wã wɛɛngẽ, ne Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn be ne bãmbã yʋʋre." 
Ezra5:2 Dẽ, a Seyaltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛlle, ne a Yotsadak biig a Zozoe yikame n sɩng Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã meebo. La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn be beenẽ wã sõng-b lame." 
Ezra5:3 La Wakat-kãng bala, gʋvɛrneer a Tatnayi sẽn so Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, ne a Setaar-Boznayi, ne b tʋmd-n-taasã kẽnga bãmb nengẽ n tɩ sok-b yaa: «Yaa ãnda soab n kõ yãmb noor tɩ y lebs n me Wẽnnaam doogã, la y yik a lalsã?»" 
Ezra5:4 Dẽ, b leb n yeelame yaa: «Togs-y tõnd neb nins sẽn naag roogã meeb pʋgẽ wã yʋyã.»" 
Ezra5:5 La Wẽnnaam dag n bee ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã kãsem-dãmba. Dẽ, b ka tõog n kɩt tɩ b yals tʋʋmdã ye. B kẽnga taoore, la b gũud b sẽn na n tɩ togs rĩm a Daryuus yellã, la rĩmã sẽn na n tʋm leokr ning tɩ wa yel-kãng wɛɛngẽ." 
Ezra5:6 Gʋvɛrneer a Tatnayi sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, ne a Setaar-Boznayi ne b tʋmd-n-taasã sẽn yit Afarsak sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã gʋlsa sebr n tʋm dĩm a Daryuusi." 
Ezra5:7 B gʋlsa sebrã n yeel yaa: «Rĩm a Daryuusi, bɩ y vɩɩmd ne laafɩ la bãane!" 
Ezra5:8 Tõnd dat n togsa rĩmã, tɩ tõnd gilga Zʋʋda soolmã pʋga, n kẽng Wẽnnaam-kãsengã roogẽ, la d mikame tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã lebs n meta roogã ne kug-peesdse, la b ningd ra-bɛd n met a lalsã. B sɩd tʋmda tʋʋmdã ne maag-m-menga, la a kẽngda tao-tao." 
Ezra5:9 La tõnd soka kãsem-dãmbã yaa: Ãnda n kõ yãmb noor tɩ y lebs n me ro-kãngã, la y maneg n yik a lalsã?" 
Ezra5:10 La tõnd leb n soka bãmb n na n bãng neb nins sẽn get tʋʋmdã yellã yʋyã, sẽn na n yɩl n gʋls tʋʋmdã taoor dãmb yʋy n wa kõ yãmba." 
Ezra5:11 Ad b sẽn leok tõnd to-to: Tõnd yaa yĩngr la tẽng Wẽnnaamã tʋmtʋmdba, la tõnd lebs n meta roog ning Israyɛll rĩm-kãseng a yembr sẽn dag n me hal yʋʋm zãrã." 
Ezra5:12 La tõnd yaab-rãmbã rag n maaname tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn be yĩngrã sũurã yiki. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam basame tɩ Babilond naab a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa Kalde rãmbã buudã sãam Wẽnd doogã, la a yõg nebã n kẽes yembd Babilonde." 
Ezra5:13 La baoosgo, rĩm a Siruus sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋmde, a kõo noor tɩ b lebs n me Wẽnnaam doogã." 
Ezra5:14 Naab a Nebukatnedzaar dag n wʋka sãnemã ne wanzuri wã teedã sẽn dag n be Wẽnnaam doogã pʋg Zeruzalɛmã, n kẽng n tɩ ning Babilond wẽnd doogã pʋga. La rĩm a Siruus yiisa teedã Babilond wẽnd doogẽ wã n kɩs ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Sesbatsaare. A Sesbatsaar yaa rĩm a Siruus sẽn dag n yãk ned ning n kɩt t'a lebg Zʋʋda gʋvɛrneerã.»" 
Ezra5:15 La rĩmã yeela a Sesbatsaar yaa: «Wʋk te-bãmbã, tɩ b sã n wa lebs n me Wẽnnaam doogã a pĩnd zĩigẽ wã Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ ning-b beenẽ.»" 
Ezra5:16 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, t'a Sesbatsaar wa Zeruzalɛm ka, n wa lebs n yẽbg Wẽnnaam doogã. La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, b meta Wẽnnaam doogã, la a ket nan ka me n sɛ ye." 
Ezra5:17 Dẽ wã, sã n taa rĩmã yam, bɩ b kɩt tɩ b vees Babilond dĩm-dãmbã seb-kʋdã pʋse, n ges rĩm a Siruus sã n dag n kõo noor tɩ b lebs n me Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã bɩ a ka kõ. La rẽ poore, bɩ rĩmã togs tõnd bãmb yam-yãkr sẽn yaa to-to yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ." 
Ezra6:1 Woto, rĩm a Daryuus kõo noor tɩ b bao Babilond soolmã sɛb bĩngr dotã pʋse, la zĩig ning b sẽn bĩngd seb-kʋdã." 
Ezra6:2 La Ekbatan na-tẽngã sẽn be Meed-rãmbã soolmã pʋgẽ wã, b yãnda seb-pindg sẽn be beenẽ tɩ b gʋls tẽegr koe-kãensã:" 
Ezra6:3 «Rĩm a Siruus sẽn deeg a naamã pipi yʋʋmde, a kõo noor n yeel yaa: B tog n lebs n mee Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã, tɩ yɩ maoong maaneg zĩiga. La b tog n lebg n dɩka pĩnd yẽbgrã. A zãntlemã tog n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe, t'a yalmã yɩ kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe." 
Ezra6:4 Bɩ b ning kug-peesds n tong taab ruls a tãabo, ne ra-paal rulg a yembre. La yaa na-yirã n na n ges tʋʋmdã yaood yelle." 
Ezra6:5 Sẽn paase, b tog lebsa teed nins rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n tɩ wʋk Zeruzalɛm Wẽnd doogẽ wã n kẽng Babilondã, yaa sãnem ne wanzuri teedo. La b tog n tɩ lebsa bũmb fãa a zĩigẽ Zeruzalɛm Wẽnd doogã pʋga.»" 
Ezra6:6 Rẽndã yĩng kɩtame tɩ rĩm a Daryuus gʋls sebr n kõ gʋvɛrneer a Tatnayi sẽn so Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, ne a Setaar-Boznayi ne b tʋmd-n-taasã sẽn be kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã n yeel-b yaa: «Yiis-y y toog yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ." 
Ezra6:7 Bas-y Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ b kẽng taoor ne Wẽnnaam doogã meebo. Zʋʋda gʋvɛrneerã, ne b kãsem-dãmbã tog n lebs n mee Wẽnnaam doogã a zĩ-kʋdgẽ wã." 
Ezra6:8 Ad mam sẽn kõt yãmb noor tɩ y maan bũmb ninga: ‹Mam datame tɩ y sõng Zʋʋda kãsem-dãmbã b Wẽnnaamã roog meeb pʋgẽ. La yaa yõor-yaood ning b sẽn deeg kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd n wa yao rĩmã, la yãmb na n yãk n yao nin-bãmbã, tɩ tʋʋmdã ra tol n yals ye.›" 
Ezra6:9 Yãmb tog n kõo Zeruzalɛm maan-kʋʋdbã bũmb ning b sẽn datã daar fãa. Sã n yaa lolse, pe-raado, wall piis sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ yĩngr Wẽnnaamã, la y kõ-b koodo, ne yamsem, la reezẽ rãam, ne kaam." 
Ezra6:10 Rẽndã yaa sẽn na n sõng-b tɩ b paam kũun n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum t'a yũugã yaa noog Saasẽ Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Dẽ, bãmb na n pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam, dĩmã ne a kom-dibli wã vɩɩm yĩnga." 
Ezra6:11 La ned sã n kɩɩs mam sẽn yeelã, mam kõta noor tɩ b vik a soabã roog ra-luk a yembr n vigl n luul-a beenẽ, tɩ rẽndã poor bɩ b sarem a roogã t'a lebg tãmpʋʋre." 
Ezra6:12 Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã meng sɩbg rĩm ning fãa, wall soolem ning sẽn na n mak n dat n sãam Wẽnnaam doogã, wall a kɩɩs mam yam-yãkrã. Yaa maam a Daryuus n kõt no-kãngã, bɩ b maan wa mam sẽn yeelã zãnga.»" 
Ezra6:13 Dẽ, gʋvɛrneer a Tatnayi sẽn so Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd soolmã, ne a Setaar-Boznayi ne b tʋmd-n-taasã saka rĩm a Daryuus noorã, n maan wa a sẽn yeelã." 
Ezra6:14 Zʋʋda kãsem-dãmbã kẽnga taoor n me roogã ne tõogre, wa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdb a Aaze ne a Ido biig a Zakari sẽn dag n yeelã. Bãmb mee roogã n sɛ wa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeelã, la a yɩɩ wa rĩm a Siruus ne rĩm a Daryuus la rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn yaa Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n kõ noorã to-to wã." 
Ezra6:15 La b mee roogã n sɛ Adaar kiuugã rasem a tãab daare. Rag n yaa rĩm a Daryuus sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-yoaablẽ. 
Ezra6:16 Israyɛll nebã, ne Maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi buudã nebã, ne neb a taabã sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n lebg n wa wã maana Wẽnnaam doogã bark ningr tigr ne sũ-noogo." 
Ezra6:17 Wẽnnaam doogã bark ningr yĩnga, b maana maoong ne lols koabga, la pe-raad kobs-yi, ne pe-ribli kobs-naase, la boees piig la a yiibu wa sẽn zems Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã, n na n maan maoong n kos Wẽnnaam sugr Israyɛll nebã fãa yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Ezra6:18 La b zĩniga maan-kʋʋdbã wa sẽn zems ned kam fãa ne a zĩiga, la Leevi buudã nebã, wa sẽn zems ned kam fãa ne a tʋʋmde, Zeruzalɛm Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, wa sẽn gʋls a Moyiis tõodã sebr pʋgã." 
Ezra6:19 Neb nins fãa sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n lebg n wa wã maana Pak tigri, pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daare." 
Ezra6:20 La maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã naaga taab n yɩlg b mense, tɩ b fãa lebg yɩlma. Bãmb maana Pak maoongo, kãsem-dãmbã sẽn yi yembd pʋg n lebg n wa wã, ne b saam-biisã yĩnga, la b mensã yĩnga." 
Ezra6:21 Israyɛll neb nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋgẽ n lebg n wa wã naagame n dɩ Pak tigrã. La yaa ne neb nins fãa sẽn welg b mens ne bu-zẽmsã rẽgdã. La b lagma ne b saam-biisã n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. 
Ezra6:22 Dẽ poore, bãmb maana bur sẽn ka rã-bɩll tigrã rasem a yopoe ne sũ-noogo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n kõo bãmb sũ-noog sɩd-sɩda, b sẽn kɩt tɩ rĩmã tebend bãmb Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã roog meeb wɛɛngẽ wã yĩnga. Bõn-kãng paasa bãmb raoodo, tɩ b tõog n leb n dɩk tʋʋmdã n me Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã roogo." 
Ezra7:1 Bõn-kãens zugẽ, Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs naamã wakate, a Ɛsdraas yii Babilond n wa. Yẽnda rag n yaa a Seraya biiga, n yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Aarõ yagenga. A Seraya yaa a Azariya biiga, t'a Azariya yaa a Hilkiiza biiga," 
Ezra7:2 t'a Hilkiiza yaa a Salum biiga, t'a Salum yaa a Sadok biiga, t'a Sadok yaa a Akituub biiga," 
Ezra7:3 t'a Akituub yaa a Amariya biiga, t'a Amariya yaa a Azariya biiga," 
Ezra7:4 t'a Azariya yaa a Merayot biiga, t'a Merazot yaa a Zerakiya biiga, t'a Zerakiya yaa a Uuzi biiga, t'a Uuzi yaa a Buki biiga." 
Ezra7:5 La a Buki yaa a Abisuwa biiga, t'a Abisuwa yaa a Fine biiga, t'a Fine yaa a Eleyazaar biiga, t'a Eleyazaar yaa Maan-kʋʋd kãsem a Aarõ biiga." 
Ezra7:6 A Ɛsdraas yii Babilond n wa, yẽnda yaa ned sẽn tar bãngre, n mi a Moyiis tõodã sõama. Yaa tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiisã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã yĩnga, rĩmã kõo yẽnda bũmb ning fãa a sẽn kosã." 
Ezra7:7 Rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm yopoɛɛlẽ, Israyɛll neb kẽer waa Zeruzalɛm. Yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, zag-noy gũudbã, ne sẽn tʋmd-b Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã fãa." 
Ezra7:8 La a Ɛsdraas tũu nin-bãmbã n wa Zeruzalɛm kiuug a nu soabã pʋgẽ, rĩmã sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm yopoɛɛlẽ." 
Ezra7:9 A Ɛsdraas yãka yam n yi Babilond pipi kiuugã pipi daare, la Wẽnnaam nug-sõngã sẽn dag n gũud yẽnda wã yĩnga, a taa Zeruzalɛm kiuug a nu soabã pipi daare." 
Ezra7:10 Sɩd me, a Ɛsdraas rag n zãmsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã ne a sũur fãa, la a sakd-ba, la a rɩkd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã ne b noyã n zãmsd Israyɛll nebã." 
Ezra7:11 Ad sebr ning rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn gʋls n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa ned sẽn mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã ne b noyã yell sõama wã. Sebrã koɛɛg yetame: 
Ezra7:12 «Maam a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn yaa rĩm-dãmbã rĩmã n gʋlsd seb-kãngã, n kõt maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa ned sẽn mi Saasẽ Wẽnnaamã tõodã yell sõama wã." 
Ezra7:13 Ade, mam yetame tɩ y bas Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn be mam soolmẽ wã, b maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã nebã sẽn dat n tũ foomã, tɩ b tũ foom n kẽng Zeruzalɛm." 
Ezra7:14 Yaa maam ne m kug-zĩidb a yopoe wã n tʋmd foom tɩ f kẽng Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã ne Zeruzalɛm, n tɩ ges b sã n sakda fo Wẽnnaamã tõod nins fo sẽn zãadã wa sẽn segde." 
Ezra7:15 La f zɩ wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, maam a rĩmã ne m kug-zĩidbã sẽn kõ ne yamleoog Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã yĩngã n kẽnge." 
Ezra7:16 La f kell n zã wanzuri wã ne sãnemã fo sẽn na n dees Babilond soolmã pʋgẽ wã, ne kũun nins fãa nebã ne maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn kõ ne yamleoog bãmb Wẽnnaamã roog sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã yĩngã." 
Ezra7:17 La f sã n ta beenẽ, bɩ y modg n dɩk ligdã n da lolse, pe-raado, pe-ribli, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn segde, sẽn yaa bõn-koaadl kũuni, la reezẽ rãam kũuni, n tall n maan maoong yãmb Wẽnnaamã roog sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Ezra7:18 La rẽ poore, bɩ foom ne neb nins sẽn tũud foomã rɩk sẽn ketã, n maan yãmb sẽn date, wa sẽn zems yãmb Wẽnnaamã tʋlsem." 
Ezra7:19 La f rɩk laasã b sẽn kɩs foomã n tɩ ning fo Wẽnnaamã roog sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã pʋga. 
Ezra7:20 La bũmb sã n ket fo sẽn tog n maan f Wẽnnaamã roog meeb wɛɛngẽ, bɩ f kɩt tɩ b yãk yaoodã na-yirã laog pʋgẽ n kõ-fo." 
Ezra7:21 Maam, dĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛse, mam yeta soolmã ligd-gũudbã fãa sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã, tɩ b kõ a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋda la a yaa Saasẽ Wẽnnaamã tõodã gʋlsdã bũmb ning fãa a sẽn na n kosã." 
Ezra7:22 Bɩ y kõ yẽnda sẽn tõe n ta wanzuri kɩlo tus a tãabo, la ki peoog koabga, ne rãam-yʋy kobs-naase, la kaam litr kobs-naase, ne yamsem, wa yãmb sẽn tõe tɛka." 
Ezra7:23 Saasẽ Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõ noor ning tɩ b maan bũmb nins Wẽnd doogã meeb wɛɛngẽ wã, b tog n maan-a-la wa sẽn segde, tɩ Wẽnnaam sũ-puugr da wa lʋɩ rĩmã soolmã, ne a kom-dibli wã zug ye." 
Ezra7:24 La sẽn paas me, tõnd wilgda ligd-gũudbã tɩ b ka tog n kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Leevi buudã, la yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, ne zag-noy gũudbã, la Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã yao yaoodo, bɩ yõor yaoodo, wall sor yaood ye." 
Ezra7:25 La mam yeta foom a Ɛsdraas tɩ f tall yam ning fo Wẽnnaamã tõod bãngr sẽn be fo nugẽ wã, n yãk bʋ-kaoodba, ne tõodã bãngdba, tɩ b tõe n ges neb nins fãa sẽn be kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, n mi yãmb Wẽnnaam tõodã bʋʋd kaoob yellã. La f kɩt tɩ sẽn ka mi-b tõodã bãng-ba." 
Ezra7:26 La ned ning sẽn na n zãgs-a n ka sak fo Wẽnnaamã tõodã ne rĩmã rẽndã, bɩ b sɩbg a soabã wa sẽn segde, a soabã sã n zems kʋʋbo, bɩ b kʋ-a, wall b yiis-a buudẽ, ka rẽ bɩ b rees a laogã n bas-a, wall b kẽes-a bi-bees roogo.»" 
Ezra7:27 A Ɛsdraas zẽka a koɛɛg n pʋʋs n yeele: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre. Bãmb sẽn ning rĩmã sũurẽ t'a na n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã leb n paam a waoogrã yĩnga. 
Ezra7:28 La yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩte, tɩ rĩmã ne a kug-zĩidbã, la a nin-kãsemsã nong maam. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã nug sẽn be mam zugã yĩnga, b kõo maam pãnga, tɩ m tõog n tigim Israyɛll nanambsã tɩ b na n tũ maam n kẽnge.»" 
Ezra8:1 Ad neb nins sẽn tũ maam n yi Babilond sẽn yaa rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs soolmẽ wã n lebg n wa wã kãsem-dãmb yʋy ne b roto: 
Ezra8:2 A Fine yagensã sʋka, yaa a Gersom, a Itamaar yagensã sʋka, yaa a Dãniyɛlle, a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋka, yaa a Hatuusi," 
Ezra8:3 a Sekaniya yagensã sʋka, ne a Paryoos yagensã sʋka, yaa a Zakari ne neb koabg la pis-nu la b sõd n gʋlse." 
Ezra8:4 La a Pahat-Moaab yagensã sʋka, yaa a Zerakiya biig a Ɛliyoenayi ne neb kobsi sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:5 La a Sekaniya yagensã sʋka, yaa Mahaziyɛll biigã ne neb kobs-tã sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:6 A Adin yagensã sʋka, yaa a Zonatã biig a Ebɛɛd ne neb pis-nu sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:7 A Elam yagensã sʋka, yaa a Ataliya biig a Ezayi ne neb pis-yopoe sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:8 A Sefatiya yagensã sʋka, yaa a Mikayɛll biig a Zebadiya ne neb pis-nii sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:9 A Zoaab yagensã sʋka, yaa a Yekiyɛll biig a Abdyaase, ne neb kobs-yi la piig la a nii sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:10 A Selomit yagensã sʋka, yaa a Yosifa biigã, ne neb koabg la pis-yoob sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:11 A Bebayi yagensã sʋka, yaa a Bebayi biig a Zakari ne neb pisi la a nii sẽn tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:12 A Azgaad yagensã sʋka, yaa a Katan biig a Yohanan ne neb koabg la piigã sẽn tũ yẽnda wã." 
Ezra8:13 La yaoolem dãmb yaa a Adonikam yagensã. Bãmb yʋy la woto: Yaa a Elifelɛte, a Yeyiyɛlle, a Semaya, ne neb pis-yoobã sẽn tũ bãmbã." 
Ezra8:14 A Bigvayi yagensã sʋka, yaa a Utayi ne a Zabuudi, ne neb pis-yopoe wã sẽn tũ bãmbã." 
Ezra8:15 Mam tigma nin-bãmbã fãa kʋɩlg ning sẽn zoet n teesd Ahava wã noore, la tõnd paa beenẽ rasem a tãab tõre. La mam sõda nebã ne maan-kʋʋdbã, n mik tɩ bãmb sʋkã, Leevi buudã yageng ka be beenẽ ye." 
Ezra8:16 Dẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ b bool kãsem-dãmbã. A Eliyezɛɛre, a Ariyɛlle, a Semaya, a Elnatã, a Natã, a Zakari, ne a Mesulam, la a Yoyariib ne Elnatã sẽn yaa zãmsdbã." 
Ezra8:17 Mam tʋma bãmb Kasifiya naab a Ido nengẽ. La m wilga bãmb bũmb ning b sẽn segd n tɩ yeel a Ido ne a ba-biisã sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtumdb n be Kasifiya soolmẽ wã. Mam yeelame tɩ b wilg-b tɩ b bao neb n tall n wa kõ-do, tɩ b tõe n maand tõnd Wẽnnaamã roog tʋʋmde." 
Ezra8:18 Tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn nong tõndã yĩnga, bãmb waa ne a Serebiya. A Serebiya yaa a Makli biig a yembre, la a tara yam, n yaa Leevi yagenga, la a Leevi yaa a Israyɛll biiga. La yẽnda kambã, ne a ba-biisã, yɩɩ bãmb piig la a nii n tũ yẽnda." 
Ezra8:19 La a Meraari yagensã sʋka, yaa a Hasabiya ne a Ezayi ne a saam-biisã ne b kambã sõor sẽn ta pisi." 
Ezra8:20 La paasa ne Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdb nins a Davɩɩd ne nanambsã sẽn dag n yãk tɩ b tʋmd Leevi buudã neb yĩngã. B sõdga bãmb ne b yʋyã, la b yaa neb kobsi la pisi." 
Ezra8:21 La tõnd sẽn wa n be Ahava kʋɩlgã noor beenẽ, mam yãka yam tɩ tõnd fãa na n loee noor n sik d mens tõnd Wẽnnaamã taoore, n kos-b tɩ b sõng tõnd tɩ d so-toakã yɩ sõama, tõnd ne d zagsã, la d laogã zãng yĩnga." 
Ezra8:22 Rag n na n yɩɩ yãnd ne maam, tɩ m kos rĩmã tɩ b yãk tãb-biis n kõ tõnd tɩ b yãag tõnd tɩ d bɛɛbã ra wa tek n yek-d sorã zug ye. Bala, tõnd dag n wilga rĩmã tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã nug-sõngã maanda sẽn baood-b bãmbã fãa neere, n kogend-ba, la b sũur puugda wʋsg ne neb nins fãa sẽn ka baood-b bãmbã." 
Ezra8:23 Dẽ, tõnd loee noor n pʋʋs n kos tõnd Wẽnnaamã tɩ b gũ tõndo, la bãmb leoka tõnd pʋʋsgo." 
Ezra8:24 Rẽ poore, mam welga maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb piig la a yiibu, ne a Serebiya la a Hasabiya ne b saam-biisã sʋk neb piiga." 
Ezra8:25 La mam maka wanzuri wã ne sãnemã bãmb nifẽ, la ne teed nins rĩmã ne a sagendbã la a nanambsã, ne Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n be Babilondã sẽn dag n yãk n kõ tõnd Wẽnnaam doogã yĩngã." 
Ezra8:26 La mam sẽn kɩs bãmbã yaa wanzuri kɩlo tus pisi, la wanzuri lagd zɩslem sẽn tat kɩlo tus a tãabo, ne sãnem kɩlo tus a tãabo," 
Ezra8:27 la sãnem laas pisi, tɩ b ligd tat sãnem wakɩ-koeems tusri, ne zũud la-neeb a yiib sẽn pɩnda, n tar yõod wa sãnemã." 
Ezra8:28 Dẽ poore, mam yeel-b lame: «B sẽn welg yãmb toor to-to Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, te-bãmbã me welga toor a woto Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. La wanzuri wã ne sãnemã yaa nonglem kũun nebã sẽn kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaamã." 
Ezra8:29 Dẽ wã, bɩ y gũus y meng neere, n ges te-bãmbã yell n tall-b n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, n naag bãmb beenẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã taoor dãmb nifẽ, ne Leevi buudã taoore, la Israyɛll buudã nanambs nifẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ro-bãooneg pʋga.»" 
Ezra8:30 Dẽ, Maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã reega wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, la teed nins b sẽn magã n tall n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ ning tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogẽ." 
Ezra8:31 La pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a yiibã daare, tõnd yii Ahava kʋɩlgã n na n kẽng Zeruzalɛm. La tõnd so-toakã zãng pʋga, tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽega b nug n sõng tõndo, la b fãag tõnd ne d bɛɛbã, la ne fãadbã sẽn dag n bẽt tõndã." 
Ezra8:32 La tõnd sẽn ta Zeruzalɛm, tõnd vʋʋsa rasem a tãabo." 
Ezra8:33 La rasem a naasã daare, tõnd kẽng n tɩ maga wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, la te-sõama wã tõnd Wẽnnaam doogã pʋgẽ, n yaool n dɩk-b n kɩs a Uuri biig a Meremot sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdã. La neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, yaa a Fine biig a Eleyazaar ne Leevi nebã, a Zozoe biig a Yozabaade, ne a Binui biig a Noadiya." 
Ezra8:34 La b sẽn sõd fãa la b naag n sɛ, b gʋlsa zɩslmã zãng sebr pʋga." 
Ezra8:35 Neb nins fãa sẽn yi yembdã pʋgẽ n lebg n wa wã maana maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã. Israyɛll nebã fãa yʋʋr yĩnga, bãmb kõo lols piig la a yiibu, pe-raad pis-wɛ la a yoobe, pe-ribli pis-yopoe la a yopoe, ne boees piig la a yiib yel-wẽnã sugr yĩnga. La b yõoga rũm-bãmbã fãa bugum zãng n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezra8:36 La rẽndã zugẽ, bãmb rɩka rĩmã koeesã n taas nanambsã ne gʋvɛrneer-dãmbã sẽn yit Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã sẽn wa n sõng nebã ne Wẽnnaam doogã." 
Ezra9:1 Yel-kãens fãa zugẽ, nanambsã wa n yeela maam yaa: «Israyɛll nebã, ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi nebã ka welg b mens ne tẽn-kãngã nebã ye. Bala, Kana nebã, ne Hɛt nebã, la Perɛɛz nebã ne Zebuus nebã, la Amo nebã, ne Moaab nebã, la Ezɩpt nebã, ne Amoor nebã sẽn maand tʋʋm-beed ninsã, bãmb me maanda a woto." 
Ezra9:2 Bala, bãmb peega nin-bãmb kom-pugli n maan b pagba, la b peeg n kõ b kom-dibli wã me tɩ b maan b pagba, n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam nebã kalem ne tẽn-bãmbã nebã. Yaa nanambsã ne taoor-dãmbã n yɩ pipi n maan yel-be-kãngã.»" 
Ezra9:3 La mam sẽn wʋm yel-kãngã wã, mam pãrsa m futã ne m kobrã, la m gʋsd m zoobdã ne m toɛɛngã, la mam sũurã sãama zãnga, tɩ m lʋɩ n zĩnd tẽng ne sũ-sãanga." 
Ezra9:4 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn yi yembd pʋgẽ n wa wã, n zoet Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, n ka rat n maan yel-beed ning Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn maanã wa n tigmã taab mam nengẽ. La mam kell n paa woto hal tɩ ta zaabr maoongã maaneg wakate." 
Ezra9:5 La zaabr maoongã maaneg wakat sẽn ta, mam yika m sũ-sãangã pʋg n yi. Mam dag n ket n yera m fu-pãrendã ne m kob-pãorengã. Mam yĩgimda m dũmã zutu, n zẽk m nus n tees Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã." 
Ezra9:6 La mam pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam n yeel yaa: «Mam Wẽnnaam, yãnd n tar maam, yãndã tara maam tɩ m ka tol n tõe n zẽk m neng yãmb taoor ye. Tõnd yel-wẽnã yaa wʋsgo, tɩ b zãntlmã yɩɩd tõnd woglmã, tõnd beegrã zamame n tol n tat saasẽ." 
Ezra9:7 Hal sẽn sɩng ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã zamaan tɩ ta rũndã, tõnd buudã maana yel-wẽn-bɛda. La yel-kãens yĩng kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽms rĩm-dãmb tõog tõnd ne d rĩm-dãmbã, la d maan-kʋʋdbã. B tõoga tõnd ne zabr sʋʋga, n kẽes tõnd yembd pʋga, la b fã-do, la b ning tõnd yãnde. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ lebg a woto rũndã wã." 
Ezra9:8 La baoosgo, sẽn nan ka kaoose, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, wilga tõnd y nimbãan-zoeere, n kɩt tɩ tõnd buudã neb nins sẽn põsã lebg n wa zĩnd yãmb a Wẽnnaam soolmã sẽn yaa zĩ-sõngã pʋga. Tõnd Wẽnnaam, yãmb maana woto n kɩt tɩ tõnd nin puki, yãmb leb n kõ-d-la vɩɩm bilf d yembdã pʋga." 
Ezra9:9 Tõnd Wẽnnaam, yaa sɩda, tõnd dag n yaa yembse, la yãmb ka bas tõnd yembdã pʋg ye. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm-dãmbã zoe tõnd nimbãanega. Bãmb basa tõnd tɩ d vɩɩmde, n tõog n lebs n me yãmb roogã, n yik a lal-wedsã, la d paam zĩ-soalgdg sẽn tar pãng Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda pʋgẽ." 
Ezra9:10 La moasã, tõnd Wẽnnaam, bũmb ning sẽn maana poore, tõnd na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Bala, tõnd kɩɩsa yãmb tõodã." 
Ezra9:11 Yaa tõod nins yãmb sẽn dag n tũnug y no-rɛɛsdbã n yeel tɩ: Yãmb sẽn dabd n na n tɩ reeg tẽng ning n soogã yaa tẽn-dẽgdo, bala, neb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yaa rẽgdo. La b maana b tʋʋm-beedã n kɩt t'a pid ne rẽgd zĩiga fãa." 
Ezra9:12 Dẽ wã, da rɩk-y y kom-pugli n kõ bu-zẽm-bãmbã kom-dibli wã tɩ b maan b pagb ye. La y ra bao bãmb kom-pugli wã n kõ y kom-dibli tɩ b maan b pagb me ye. Bɩ yãmb da bao tɩ nin-bãmbã yɩ neer wall b paam naar ye. Dẽ, yãmb na n yɩɩ buud sẽn tar pãnga, la y na n dɩɩ tẽngã laog yõodo, la y na n dɩk-a lame n bas ne y yagensã t'a lebg bãmb pʋɩɩr wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Ezra9:13 Tõnd Wẽnnaam, yaa tõnd tʋʋm-wẽnsã ne d yel-wẽnã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩng la yel-bãmbã sẽn paam tõndã. La baa ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka sɩbg tõnd wa sẽn zems tõnd yel-wẽnã ye. La yãmb kell n basa tõnd tɩ d põse, n wa be ka." 
Ezra9:14 Dẽ wã, na n maana a wãn tɩ tõnd na n leb n kɩɩs yãmb tõodã, n maan lagem-n-taar ne bu-zẽmsã kãadem pʋgẽ, n maan tʋʋm-beed a woto? Sã n yɩ woto, yãmb sũur kõn yik tɩ y sãam tõnd n ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs sɩda?" 
Ezra9:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, yãmb yaa tɩrga, bala, tõnd neb kẽer põsame n ket n vɩ. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ yaa a woto rũndã. Dẽ wã, baa tõnd sẽn yaa yel-wẽn-dãmbã, baa ne tõnd ned ba a yembr sẽn dag n ka tog n põsã, tõnd bee yãmb taoore.»" 
Ezra10:1 A Ɛsdraas sẽn wa n yĩg Wẽnnaam doogã noor n pʋʋsdẽ la a yãbd n kot Wẽnnaam sugrã, Israyɛll neb wʋsg wa n tigmã taab yẽnda nengẽ. La yaa pagb la raopa, ne kamba. La nebã fãa naaga taab n yãb wʋsgo." 
Ezra10:2 La a Yekiyɛll biig a Sekaniya sẽn yaa a Elam yagengã yeela a Ɛsdraas yaa: «Tõnd sẽn peeg tẽngã nebã sẽn yaa bu-zẽmsã kom-pugli n maan d pagbã, tõnd beega Wẽnnaam hal wʋsgo. La baoosg zãnga, tẽeb ket n bee Israyɛll yĩnga." 
Ezra10:3 Moasã, sẽn yaa woto wã, tõnd na n dɩka sard ne tõnd Wẽnnaamã, n dig bu-zẽmsã kom-pugli nins fãa tõnd sẽn peeg n maan d pagbã ne b kambã tɩ b looge. Dẽ, tõnd na n maana wa yãmb ne neb nins sẽn sakd tõnd Wẽnnaamã tõodã sẽn yeelã. Bɩ d maan wa sẽn zems tõogã." 
Ezra10:4 Woto wã, Ɛsdraase, yik tɩ yellã fãa bee fo nugẽ, tõnd bee f poorẽ. Paam daood n maan tʋʋmdã.»" 
Ezra10:5 La a Ɛsdraas yikame n kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi nebã nanambsã, la Israyɛll nebã fãa wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n maana wa sẽn togsã. La bãmb fãa wẽename." 
Ezra10:6 Dẽ poore, a Ɛsdraas yii Wẽnd doogã zak pʋg n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd a Eliyasɩɩb biig a Yohanan yirã. La a Ɛsdraas ka tol n dɩ rɩɩbo, wall a yũ koom ye. Bala, yẽnda sũurã rag n sãama hal wʋsg ne a saam-biis nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n wa wã tʋʋm-beedã." 
Ezra10:7 La b yiisa koɛɛg tɩ saag Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋg n wilgi, tɩ neb nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n wa wã fãa tigim taab Zeruzalɛm." 
Ezra10:8 La ned ning fãa sẽn ka wa-a tigingã rasem a tãabã pʋgẽ, wa nanambsã ne kãsem-dãmbã sẽn yeelã, b na n deesa a paoongã zãnga, la b yiis a soabã neb nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n wa wã sʋka." 
Ezra10:9 La Zʋʋda ne Benzame raopa fãa tigma taab Zeruzalɛm rasem a tãabã pʋgẽ. La yaa kiuug a wɛ soabã rasem pisi (20) wã daar la b sẽn tigmã. Nebã fãa rag n tigma Wẽnd doogã zak pʋg n digd yellã poorẽ, la saagã sẽn dag n niidã me yĩnga." 
Ezra10:10 La maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas yikame n yeel bãmb yaa: «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sẽn pees bu-zẽmsã kom-pugli n maan y pagbã yaa yel-beedo. Yãmb kẽesa Israyɛll nebã beegr pʋg n paase." 
Ezra10:11 Bɩ y vẽneg fãa n togs Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor moasã, tɩ bãmb yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, la y sak bãmb daabã, n welg y mens ne tẽngã nebã, la ne yãmb pagb nins sẽn yaa bu-zẽmsã.»" 
Ezra10:12 La nebã fãa sẽn wa tigingã zẽka b koees n yeele: «Yãmb sẽn goma yaa sɩda! Tõnd sɩd na n maana wa yãmb sẽn yeelã! 
Ezra10:13 Nebã me yaa wʋsgo, la saagã me rag n niidame. Dẽ, tõnd ka tõe n pa yɩng vɩʋʋgẽ wã ye. La sẽn paas me, yel-kãngã manegr ka raar a yembre, wall rasem a yiib tʋʋmd ye. Bala, tõnd neb wʋsg bee beeg-kãngã pʋga." 
Ezra10:14 Tõnd kotame, tɩ tõnd nanambsã yals nebã fãa yʋʋr yĩnga, tɩ Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋg n peeg bu-zẽmsã kamb n maan b pagbã, tũ b tẽngã kãsem-dãmbã ne b bʋ-kaoodbã n wa daar ning b sẽn yãkã. La tõnd na n gesa yel-kãngã yell tɩ manege, hal tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã sũur sẽn yik ne tõnd yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ wã sigi.»" 
Ezra10:15 La a Azayɛll biig a Zonatã, ne a Tikva biig a Yaziya bal n kɩɩs koe-kãnga, a Mesulam ne Leevi ned a Sabtayi rag n bee bãmb poorẽ." 
Ezra10:16 La neb nins sẽn dag n yi yembdã pʋg n wa wã maana wa b sẽn yeelã. Dẽ, b welga maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas toore, la b welg Israyɛll buudã nanambsã toor-toore, n bool ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre. Dẽ, bãmb tigma taab kiuug piig soabã pipi daare, n na n bao n bãng yellã võore." 
Ezra10:17 La yʋʋmdã pipi kiuugã pipi daare, bãmb tõog n gesa raop nins fãa sẽn dag n peeg bu-zẽmsã kom-pugli n maan b pagbã yell fãa n sɛ." 
Ezra10:18 Ad Maan-kʋʋdbã neb nins sẽn peeg bu-zẽmsã kamb n maan b pagbã: A Yotsadak biig a Zozoe ne a saam-biisã kamb sʋka, yaa a Maaseza, a Eliyezɛɛre, a Yariibi, ne a Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Bãmb fãa rɩka sard n yeel tɩ bãmb na n diga b pagbã, la b na n waa ne pe-raoog tɩ b maan maoong n kos Wẽnnaam sugr b beegrã yĩnga." 
Ezra10:20 Sẽn paase, a Imeer yagensã sʋka, yaa a Hanani ne a Zebadiya." 
Ezra10:21 A Harim yagensã sʋka, yaa a Maaseza, a Eli, a Semaya, a Yekiyɛlle, ne a Oozɩyaase." 
Ezra10:22 A Pasewʋʋr yagensã sʋka, yaa a Ɛliyoenayi, a Maaseza, a Ismayɛlle, a Netaneyɛlle, ne a Yozabaad la a Eleyasa." 
Ezra10:23 Leevi buudã sʋka, yaa a Yozabaade, a Simeyi, a Kelaya, b sẽn boond a soab t'a Kelitã, a Petahiya, a Zʋʋda ne a Eliyezɛɛre." 
Ezra10:24 La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sʋka, yaa a Eliyasɩɩbe. La Zag-noy gũudbã sʋka, yaa a Salum, a Telɛm ne a Uuri." 
Ezra10:25 La Israyɛll nebã sʋka, yaa a Paroos yagensã: a Ramiya, a Yiziya, a Malkiya, a Miyamin, a Eleyazaare, ne a Malkiya la a Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 A Elam yagensã sʋka, yaa a Mataniya, a Zakari, a Yekiyɛlle, a Abdi, ne a Yeremot la a Eli." 
Ezra10:27 A Zatu yagensã sʋka, yaa a Eliyohenayi, a Eliyasɩɩbe, a Mataniya, a Yeremote, la a Zabaad ne a Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 A Bebayi yagensã sʋka, yaa a Yohanan, a Hananiya, a Zabayi, ne a Atlayi." 
Ezra10:29 A Bani yagensã sʋka, yaa a Mesulam, a Maluki, a Adaya, a Yasuubi, a Seyall ne a Yeremote." 
Ezra10:30 A Pahat-Moaab yagensã sʋka, yaa a Adna, a Kelalle, a Benaya, a Maaseza, a Mataniya, a Bɛtsalɛlle, a Binui ne a Manaase." 
Ezra10:31 A Harim yagensã sʋka, yaa a Eliyezɛɛre, a Yisiya, a Malkiya, a Semaya, a Sɩmyõ," 
Ezra10:32 a Benzame, a Maluk ne a Semariya." 
Ezra10:33 A Hasum yagensã sʋka, yaa a Matnayi, a Matata, a Zabaade, a Elifelɛte, a Yeremayi, a Manaase ne a Simeyi." 
Ezra10:34 A Bani yagensã sʋka, yaa a Maadayi, a Amram, a Uwɛlle," 
Ezra10:35 a Benaya, a Bediya, a Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 a Vaniya, Meremote, a Eliyasɩɩbe," 
Ezra10:37 a Mataniya, a Matnayi, a Yaasayi," 
Ezra10:38 a Baani, Binui, a Simeyi," 
Ezra10:39 a Selemiya, a Natã, a Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 a Maknadbayi, a Sasayi, a Sarayi," 
Ezra10:41 a Azareyɛlle, a Selemiya, a Semariya," 
Ezra10:42 a Salum, a Amariya ne a Zozɛfe." 
Ezra10:43 A Neebo yagensã sʋka, yaa a Yeyiyɛlle, a Matitiya, a Zabaade, a Zebina, a Yadayi, a Zowɛll ne a Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Nin-bãmbã fãa rag n peesa bu-zẽmsã kom-pugli n maan b pagba. La pʋg-kãens sʋkã, wʋsg rag n paama kamba." 
Nehemiah1:1 A Hakaliya biig a Neemi goamã. Rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-yiiblẽ, Kislɛv kiuugã pʋga, mam dag n bee Suuz na-tẽngẽ wã," 
Nehemiah1:2 la mam saam-biisã ned a yembr yʋʋr sẽn boond t'a Hanani ne neb a taab yii Zʋʋda n wa mam nengẽ. La mam sok-b lame n na n bãng Zʋɩf-rãmb nins b sẽn yõg n kellã, ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã yell sẽn yaa to-to." 
Nehemiah1:3 Dẽ, bãmb leoka maam yaa: «Neb nins b sẽn ka yõg n kẽes yembdã wa n bee Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, la b bee nimbãan-kãseng ne yãnd pʋga. Bala, Zeruzalɛm lalgã lebga weds n gilgi, t'a kʋɩlemsã fãa rɩ bugum.»" 
Nehemiah1:4 Dẽ, mam sẽn wʋm koe-kãensã wã, mam zĩndame n yãbe. Mam dɩka rasem wʋsg n maan sũ-sãanga, la m loe noor n pʋʋs saasẽ Wẽnnaamã." 
Nehemiah1:5 Mam pʋʋsame n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaam, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam-kãseng sẽn tar pãnga, yãmb pidsda y kaoolã ne neb nins sẽn sakd yãmb tõodã, la yãmb maanda neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã neere!" 
Nehemiah1:6 Mam kot-y lame tɩ y kɩll y tʋbr n kelg-ma, la y puk y nin n ges-ma, la y wʋm m pʋʋsgã m sẽn pʋʋsd yãmbã, bala, mam yaa y tʋmtʋmda. Mam bee yãmb taoor dũndã n pʋʋsd yãmb wĩndg la yʋngo, Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yĩnga. Mam vẽnegd n togsda yãmb tõnd Israyɛll nebã yel-wẽnã tõnd sẽn maan n beeg yãmbã. Yaa sɩda, maam ne m buudã kongame." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tõnd sɩd maana sẽn ka zems n beeg yãmba. Tõnd kɩɩsa yãmb tõodã ne y noyã, la y no-tũudsã yãmb sẽn dag n kõ y tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisã." 
Nehemiah1:8 Mam kot-y lame tɩ y tẽeg goam nins yãmb sẽn dag n gom ne y tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisã. Yãmb dag n yeelame: «Yãmb sã n ka sak n tũ maam, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb sãeeg n kẽ bu-zẽmsã sʋka.»" 
Nehemiah1:9 La rẽ poore, yãmb sã n lebg n wa mam nengẽ, n deeg mam tõodã, n sak-ba, mam na n leb n tigsa yãmba, baa yãmb sẽn sãeeg n be dũniyã zĩig ning fãa, mam na n talla yãmb n lebg n wa zĩig ning mam sẽn yãk n ning m yʋʋrã.»" 
Nehemiah1:10 Zu-soaba, bãmb yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdba, la b yaa yãmb nebã. Yaa bãmb la yãmb sẽn fãag ne y pãn-kãsengã, la yaa ne y nug sẽn tar pãngã la y fãag-ba." 
Nehemiah1:11 Dẽ wã yaa Zu-soaba, m kot-y lame tɩ y kɩll y tʋbr n kelg m pʋʋsgã, la y kelg y tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn tar datem tɩ zoe yãmb yʋʋrã pʋʋsgo! Zu-soaba, kɩt-y tɩ mam sẽn dat n maan bũmb ning rũndã wã tõoge, la y kɩt tɩ rĩmã sak n zoe mam nimbãanega, n leok m kosgã. Wakat-kãnga, mam dag n yaa rĩmã bõn-yũudl kɩta." 
Nehemiah2:1 Rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm pis-yiiblẽ, Nisãn kiuugã pʋga, daar a yembre, reezẽ rãamã rag n tẽga rĩmã taoore, tɩ mam dɩk n na n kõ rĩmã, la mam neng zɩ n gãnem rĩmã taoor wa badaarã ye." 
Nehemiah2:2 Dẽ, rĩmã soka maam yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ f neng gãnem a woto? Fo bũmb yaool n ka zabd ye. La yaa bõe sũ-sãang n tar foom?» La rabeem-kãseng yõka maam." 
Nehemiah2:3 La mam yeela rĩmã yaa: «Wẽnd na kaoos-yã! Mam neng ka tõe n ka gãnem ye! Bala, mam yaab-rãmbã yaad sẽn be tẽng ningã sãamame, la a kʋɩlemsã fãa rɩɩ bugum.»" 
Nehemiah2:4 Dẽ, rĩmã soka maam tɩ m datame tɩ b maan bõe n kõ-ma. La mam pʋʋsa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã," 
Nehemiah2:5 la m yaool n na n leok rĩmã n yeel yaa: «N-na! Yãmb sã n data, la y sã n nong maam, bɩ y kõ-m noore, tɩ m kẽng Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã, zĩig ning mam yaab-rãmbã yaad sẽn beẽ wã, n tɩ lebs tẽngã n me.»" 
Nehemiah2:6 Rĩmã pag rag n zĩ a sɛɛgẽ, la rĩmã soka maam yaa: «Fo so-toakã na n dɩka rasem a wãna? La yaa rabʋr la fo na n lebg n wa?» Woto, taa rĩmã yam t'a sak n bas maam tɩ m na n kẽnge, la mam wilga rĩmã mam sẽn na n lebg n wa daar ninga." 
Nehemiah2:7 Mam leb n yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! M kotame tɩ sã n ta y yam, bɩ y gʋls sɛb n kõ-ma, tɩ m tɩ kɩs soolem ning sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã gʋvɛrneer-dãmbã, tɩ b bas-m tɩ m pɩʋʋg b soolmã n kẽng Zʋʋda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Mam data sebr a to me n tɩ kɩs rĩmã tɩɩs naab a Azaf t'a kõ-m daad sẽn na n maneg tãb-sikã kʋɩlems sẽn pẽ Wẽnd doogã. La raad me m sẽn na n maneg tẽngã lalgã, ne roog ninga mam sẽn na n zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã.» Woto, rĩmã kõo maam seb-kãense, bala, mam Wẽnnaamã nug-sõngã rag n bee mam zugu." 
Nehemiah2:9 Dẽ, mam kẽnga gʋvɛrneer-dãmb nins sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã nengẽ, n tɩ kɩs-b rĩmã sɛbã. Rĩmã rag n yãka tãb-biis ne wed-rʋʋdba, n kɩt tɩ b yãagd maam m tʋʋmdã pʋga." 
Nehemiah2:10 Woto, Horon tẽng rao a Sãmbalat ne a tʋmd-n-taag a Tobiza sẽn yaa Amo nedã sẽn wʋm tɩ ned n wat n na n sõng Israyɛll nebã, b sũyã sãama wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah2:11 Woto, mam taa Zeruzalɛm, n pa beenẽ rasem a tãabo." 
Nehemiah2:12 Dẽ, mam yika ne yʋngo, n peeg neb kẽere, la mam yaool n dag n ka tol n togs ned mam Wẽnnaamã sẽn ning mam sũurẽ tɩ m maan bũmb ning Zeruzalɛm tẽngã yĩngã ye. La mam ka tall rũm-zoambdg a to tɩ ka rũng ning mam sẽn dag n zombdã ye." 
Nehemiah2:13 Woto, mam tũu noor ning sẽn teesd longã n yi ne yʋngã, n kẽng bulg ning b sẽn boond tɩ piryõngã sẽnẽ, n tɩ ta noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ tãmpʋʋr noorã. La mam maaga m meng n gilg n ges Zeruzalɛm lalsã, la mam yãame t'a lalsã fãa lebga wedse, la a kʋɩlemsã rɩɩ bugum." 
Nehemiah2:14 Mam kell n kẽng n taa tẽngã noor ning sẽn be ko-bundgã sẽn pẽ rĩmã bãkã sɛɛgẽ, la vɩʋʋgã wa n ka leb n be sẽn sekd mam rũngã m sẽn zombã loogr ye." 
Nehemiah2:15 Dẽ, mam kell n tũu Sedrõ ko-soogã ne yʋngã, n kell n maag m meng n get lalsã. La mam lebgame n tũ longã sẽnẽ noorã n lebg n lebe." 
Nehemiah2:16 La nanambsã ka mi mam sẽn dag n kẽngẽ, la b ka mi mam sẽn dag n maand bũmb ning me ye. Bala, hal tɩ ta badaare, mam dag n ka tol n yeel Zʋʋde tẽng nebã tɩ bũmb ye. Hal baa ne maan-kʋʋdbã, ne kãsem-dãmbã, wall nanambsã, baa ne neb a tãabã sẽn get-b tʋʋmdã yellã fãa, mam ka tol n togs-b tɩ bũmb ye." 
Nehemiah2:17 Dẽ, mam yeel-b lame yaa: «Yãmb nee nimbãaneg ning pʋg tõnd sẽn be wã. Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sãama zãnga, b yõoga a kʋɩlemsã bugum! Rẽ wã, bɩ y wa tɩ d lebs n me Zeruzalɛm lalsã, n tõog n yiis d tẽngã yãnde.»" 
Nehemiah2:18 La mam togsa bãmb mam Wẽnnaamã nug-sõngã sẽn be mam zug to-to wã, la rĩmã sẽn yeel maam bũmb ningã. La zĩig pʋgẽ, bãmb zẽka b koees n yeele: «Yik-y tɩ d me!» Dẽ, bãmb paama raood n na n maan tʋʋm-sõng-kãngã." 
Nehemiah2:19 La Horon dao a Sãmbalat ne a tʋmd-n-taag a Tobiza sẽn yaa Amo nedã, ne Araab a Gesɛm sẽn wʋm kiba-kãngã, b sɩngame n paoog tõndo, la b yaal tõndo. Bãmb rag n sokda tõnd ne paoogr goam a woto: «Yaa bõe la yãmb maanda? Yãmb yik n dat n kɩɩsa rĩmã la?»" 
Nehemiah2:20 Dẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ b tɩ leok-b a woto: «Yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã meng n na n sõng tõnd tɩ d tõoge. Tõnd yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdba. Dẽ, tõnd na n yik n lebs mee tẽngã! La yãmba, yãmb kõn tol n paam pʋɩɩre, wall noor ne bũmb Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgẽ ye. La b kõn tol n leb n tẽeg yãmb yell Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Nehemiah3:1 Maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Eliyasɩɩb ne a saam-biisã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã yikame n naag taab n lebs n me tẽngã noor ning piisã sẽn tũud n yit la b kẽedẽ wã. Bãmb ning-a-la barka, la b vigl a kʋɩlemsã. Bãmb kell n mee lalgã n gũbg n tall n tɩ tãag neb koabg ro-lug-lugã, n ning-a barka, n kell me-a n tɩ tãag a Hananeyɛll gãosgã." 
Nehemiah3:2 La Zeeriko nebã beooga bãmb n metẽ, t'a Yimbri biig a Zakʋʋr beoog Zeeriko nebã n metẽ." 
Nehemiah3:3 A Sena yagensã n me tẽngã noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ zĩm dignoorã. Bãmb ninga a ra-paadsã n sɛ, la b ning a kʋɩlengã, n lugl a ra-lugdsã, la b ning a kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
Nehemiah3:4 La neb nins sẽn beoog bãmb n me lalgã la woto: Yaa a Uuriya biig a Meremote, ne a Hakoos yagensã, la a Berekɩya biig a Mesulam, ne a Mesezabɛll yagensã, n paas a Baana biig a Sadoke." 
Nehemiah3:5 La sẽn pʋgl bãmb yaa Tekoa nebã, la bãmb nanambsã zãgsame tɩ bãmb ka na n sak tɩ b tʋʋmã taoor dãmb soog-b ye." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yaa a Paseya biig a Yozada ne a Besodiya biig a Mesulam n lebs n me tẽngã rigno-kʋdrã. Bãmb ninga a ra-paadsã n sɛ, la b ning a kʋɩlengã, n lugl a ra-lugdsã, la b ning a kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
Nehemiah3:7 Neb nins sẽn beoog-a bãmb n me wã la woto: Yaa Gabawõ ned a Melatiya, ne Meronot ned a Yadon, n paas Gabawõ ne Mispa neb a taaba. Bãmb tʋma gʋvɛrneerã sẽn be Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Nehemiah3:8 La taoor bilfu, yaa a Haraya biig a Uziyɛll sẽn yaa yõakã, la parfẽ maand a Hananiya n beoog yẽnda. Bãmb maana b tʋʋmd Zeruzalɛm n sɛ, la yaa lalgã sẽn yaa yaleng zĩig ningã." 
Nehemiah3:9 A Ʋʋr biig a Refaaza sẽn yaa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sak a yembr naabã kẽng n tɩ beooga bãmb n metẽ. 
Nehemiah3:10 La taoor bilfu, a Harʋmaf biig a Yedaya tɩ beooga a Refaaza n met lalg ning sẽn teesd yẽnda zakã, la a Hasabneya biig a Hatuus beooga yẽnda n tʋmdẽ." 
Nehemiah3:11 A Harim biig a Malkiya ne a Pahat-Moaab biig a Hasuub me manega lalgã zĩig a to, n paas ne gãosgã sẽn be wʋmsã sẽn beẽ wã." 
Nehemiah3:12 A Lokɛɛs biig a Salum sẽn yaa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã sak a yembr naabã ne a kom-pugli wã tɩ beooga a Hasuub n metẽ. 
Nehemiah3:13 A Hanun ne Zanoa tẽng nebã n me Zeruzalɛm tẽngã noor ning sẽn teesd longã. La bãmb sẽn me-a n sɛ, b ninga a ra-lugdsã, a ra-paadsã ne a kʋɩlen-kuyã. Bãmb kell n manega lalgã woglem sẽn yɩɩd kãntɩɩg tusri, n tall n tãag noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ tãmpʋʋr noorã." 
Nehemiah3:14 A Rekaab biig a Malkiya sẽn yaa Bɛt-kerɛm soolem naabã n maneg noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ tãmpʋʋr noorã. La b sẽn maneg-a n me n sɛ, b ninga a ra-lugdsã, a ra-paadsã ne a kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
Nehemiah3:15 A Koll-Hooze biig a Salum sẽn yaa Mispa sak a yembr naabã n lebs n me noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ ko-bundgã. Bãmb me-a lame n sɛ, la b pag-a-la bɛoongo. Bãmb ninga a ra-lugdsã, a ra-paadsã ne a kʋɩlen-kuyã. Yẽnda kell n manega lalg ning sẽn pẽ ne Siloe bãkã. Lal-kãng sɩnga rĩmã zẽedã zĩiga, hal n tɩ tãag rʋʋdg ning sẽn yit a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ wã n sigdã sʋka." 
Nehemiah3:16 La yẽnda zugẽ, yaa a Azbuk biig a Neemi sẽn yaa Bɛt-Sʋʋr sak a yembr naabã n me n tɩ tãag zĩig ning b sẽn boond t'a Davɩɩd yaadã, n kell n kẽng n ta bãkã b sẽn tu wã, hal n ta rĩmã gũudb roogã." 
Nehemiah3:17 Yẽnda zugẽ, yaa Leevi buudã neb sẽn be a Neemi taoor n tʋmdẽ wã: Yaa a Bani biig a Rehum ne a Hasabiya sẽn yaa Keyila sak a yembr naabã." 
Nehemiah3:18 Yẽnda zugẽ, yaa a Henadaad biig a Bavayi sẽn yaa Keyila sak a yembr naabã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã n beoog bãmb n tʋme." 
Nehemiah3:19 La a Zozoe biig a Ezɛɛr sẽn yaa Mispa naabã n yegl bãmb n tʋme. Yẽnda n maneg zĩig ning zab-teedã sẽn bĩngdẽ wã, yaa zĩ-kãng n yaa lalgã gõdgr zĩiga." 
Nehemiah3:20 La yẽnda zugẽ, yaa a Zabayi biig a Baruk n tʋm ne a sũur fãa, sẽn sɩng lalgã gõdgr zĩigẽ, n tall n tɩ tãag maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Eliyasɩɩb zakã noore." 
Nehemiah3:21 La a Baruk zugẽ, yaa a Uuri biig a Meremot ne a Akoos yagensã n beoog n tʋme, sẽn sɩng ne a Eliyasɩɩb zakã noor n tɩ tãag a zakã satmẽ." 
Nehemiah3:22 La maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yit sagsã pʋsã beooga bãmb n tʋme. 
Nehemiah3:23 A Benzame ne a Hasuub me beooga bãmb zĩig a to sẽn tot bãmb zagsã n tʋmdẽ. La a Hananiya yageng a Azariya sẽn yaa a Maaseza biigã n beoog bãmb n me lalgã zĩig ning sẽn pẽ yẽnda roogã. 
Nehemiah3:24 A Henadaad biig a Binui n beoog a Azariya n me lalgã sẽn be a Azariya yirã ne lalgã gõdgrẽ wã sʋkã. 
Nehemiah3:25 A Uzayi biig a Palall teega lalgã gõdrã zĩigẽ n me n kẽng gãs-kẽengã sẽn be rĩmã na-yirã neng taoorã, n pẽneg gũudbã zakã. La taoor bilfu, a Paryoos biig a Pedaya," 
Nehemiah3:26 ne Wẽnd doogã tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn dag n be Ofɛll sakã pʋgã, bãmb me meeme n tɩ tãag gãsg ning sẽn be gõdrã zĩigẽ wã, sẽn be noor ninga b sẽn boond tɩ koom noorã yaangã." 
Nehemiah3:27 Tekoa nebã me beooga yẽnda sẽn sɩng ne gãs-kẽengã sẽn be gõdrẽ wã n tʋm n tɩ teeg Ofɛll lalgã. 
Nehemiah3:28 La sẽn sɩng ne wiid noorã tɛka, maan-kʋʋdbã neb kam fãa manega lalgã zĩig ning sẽn tot a rignoorã." 
Nehemiah3:29 Bãmb zugẽ, yaa a Imeer biig a Sadok me n maneg sẽn tot yẽnda roogã, t'a Sekaniya biig a Semaya sẽn yaa yaang noorã gũudã me beoog yẽnda n tʋme." 
Nehemiah3:30 La a Selemiya biig a Hananiya, ne a Hanun sẽn yaa a Salaf yoobẽ biigã me beooga bãmb n maneg lalgã sẽn pʋgdã, t'a Berekɩya yegl bãmb n maneg sẽn tot yẽnda roogã." 
Nehemiah3:31 A Malkiya sẽn yaa yõakã beooga yẽnda n tʋme. A Malkiya tʋmame n tãag Wẽnd doogã tʋmtʋmdbã ne lɛɛbdbã rotã sẽn be noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Mifkaadã. La kell n tɩ tãaga gũudbã ro-wokã sẽn be lalgã gõdgrã zĩigẽ wã. 
Nehemiah3:32 Dẽ, yõgsã ne lɛɛbdbã sɩnga b tʋʋmdã gũudbã ro-wokã sẽn be lalgã gõdrẽ wã, n tɩ tãag rignoor ning piisã sẽn tũud n kẽedẽ la b yitã." 
Nehemiah3:33 A Sãmbalat sẽn wʋm tɩ tõnd lebs n meta Zeruzalɛm lalgã, a sũurã yika hal wʋsgo, la a paooga Zʋɩf-rãmbã." 
Nehemiah3:34 Yẽnda yalsa a saam-biisã ne Samaari tãb-biisã taoor n yeele: «Yaa bõe la Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn ka võorã rat n maane? Bãmb tagsdame tɩ b na n lebs n me b tẽngã, la b leb n maan maand a pʋg bɩ? Bãmb tagsdame tɩ b na n tõog n tʋma yõwã n sɛ bɩ? Rẽ yĩnga, bãmb tõe n wʋka lalgã sẽn lʋɩ wã kug bugmã sẽn dɩ wã n tõog lebs n me lalgã sɩda?»" 
Nehemiah3:35 La Amo ned a Tobiza sẽn dag n be a Sãmbalat sɛɛgẽ wã yeelame: «B we n nang pãng ne meebo! We-baag bal sã n wudg n fão lal-kãngã, a lubd-a lame!»" 
Nehemiah3:36 Dẽ wã, tõnd Wẽnnaam, kelg-y tõnd bɛɛbã sẽn yaand tõndã, la y kɩt tɩ b yaalgã leb-ba! Zu-soaba, kɩt-y tɩ b yõg-b n kẽes yembd tẽn-zẽnga, tɩ b paam yaalgo!" 
Nehemiah3:37 Zu-soaba, bɩ y ra kõ bãmb b beegrã sugri, la y ra yẽes b yel-wẽnã ye. Bala, tõnd sẽn lebs n met Zeruzalɛm lalgã, bãmb gɩdga metbã tɩ b ra me ye." 
Nehemiah3:38 Dẽ, tõnd sɩd lebs n mee lalgã! Tõnd tõog n me-a lame t'a zẽk n ta a zãntlmã pʋɩ-sʋka, la d me-a lame n gilg tẽngã zãng n sege. Bala, nebã tʋma tʋʋmdã ne b sũur fãa!" 
Nehemiah4:1 A Sãmbalat ne a Tobiza, la Araab-rãmbã, ne Amo nebã la Asdood nebã sẽn wʋm tɩ Zeruzalɛm lalgã meeb kẽngda taoore, la a lal-wedsã yẽtame n dabdã, bãmb fãa sũyã puuga wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah4:2 La bãmb seda ne taab n na n wa zab ne Zeruzalɛm tẽngã n sãam-a. 
Nehemiah4:3 Dẽ, tõnd pʋʋsa d Wẽnnaamã. La nin-bãmbã yĩng kɩtame, tɩ tõnd ning gũudb tɩ b gũud wĩndg ne yʋngo, n tõe n zab ne-b n sõng tõndo." 
Nehemiah4:4 Baa ne rẽ fãa, Zʋʋda nebã yeelame: «Neb nins sẽn wʋkd-b zɩɩbã pãng sɛɛme, la sagdã me yaa wʋsgo. Dẽ wã, tõnd ka na n tol n tõog n me lalgã n sɛ ye.»" 
Nehemiah4:5 Tõnd bɛɛbã rag n yetame: «Tõnd na n soosame hal n tɩ kẽ Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋka, tɩ b ka tol n bãnge, la b ka yãnd tõnd me ye. Woto, tõnd na n kʋ-b lame n kɩt tɩ b tʋʋmdã yalse.»" 
Nehemiah4:6 La Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn pẽ tõnd bɛɛbã waa tõnd nengẽ sẽn tat naoor piiga, n wat n togsd tõnd bɛɛbã sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã. B rag n yetame: «Ya-y n lebg-y n wa tõnd nengẽ!»" 
Nehemiah4:7 Dẽ, mam welga nebã roog-roogo, n ning-b londã sẽn be lalgã poorã tɩ b guudẽ, la b rag n zãada b zabr sʋʋse, b kãnã, la b tãbdo." 
Nehemiah4:8 Mam gesa nebã manesem sẽn yaa to-to. Dẽ, mam yikame n yeel kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã, ne neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã yaa: «Da zoe-y nin-bãmbã ye! Tẽeg-y tɩ Zu-soabã yaa kãsenga, la b tara pãnga. Zab-y y saam-biisã, y kom-dibli wã la y kom-pugli wã, ne y pagbã, la y zagsã yĩnga.»" 
Nehemiah4:9 Tõnd bɛɛbã sẽn wʋm tɩ tõnd bãnga bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dag n dat n maanã, la b sẽn mik tɩ Wẽnnaam sãama bãmb saagrã, tõnd fãa leb n leba lalgã meebẽ, tɩ ned kam fãa leb n dɩk a tʋʋmde." 
Nehemiah4:10 La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, mam tʋmtʋmdbã pʋɩ-sʋk bee tʋʋmdã pʋga, la pʋɩ-sʋk a to wã me zãada kãna, la gãndo, ne tãbdo, la gãntigsi. La nanambsã rag n bee Zʋʋda buudã fãa poorẽ." 
Nehemiah4:11 Neb nins sẽn met tẽngã lalgã ne neb nins sẽn wʋkd kugã ned kam fãa tʋmda ne nug-yende, tɩ nug a yembrã zãad a zab-teoogo." 
Nehemiah4:12 La tãn-metbã ned kam fãa rag n sẽbga zabr sʋʋg a sɛɛga, la a tʋmdẽ. La bar-pɛɛbdã rag n bee ne maam." 
Nehemiah4:13 Dẽ, mam yeela kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã, ne neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã yaa: «Tʋʋmdã ket n yaa wʋsgo, lalgã me wogmame, tõnd yaool n sãeegame n be lalgã zĩig toor-toore, n zãr ne taaba." 
Nehemiah4:14 Rẽ wã, yãmb sã n wa n wʋm baorgã peebgo, bɩ y yi yãmb sẽn beẽ wã, n zoe n wa mam nengẽ, n wa tigim taaba, la tõnd Wẽnnaamã na n zab n sõnga tõndo." 
Nehemiah4:15 Dẽ, yɩɩ woto la tõnd tʋm yã. Tõnd nebã pʋɩ-sʋk zãada kãn b nusẽ, n tʋmd yibeoog tɩ ta zĩ-sobdo, ãdsã pukr sasa." 
Nehemiah4:16 Leb n yaa wakat-kãng me la mam yeel nebã yaa: Bɩ tʋʋmd taoor soab fãa ne a rakõor pa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋg n gãande. Woto, b na n gũu tẽngã yʋngo, tɩ wĩndga, bɩ b fãa yik n tʋme.»" 
Nehemiah4:17 La maam ne m saam-biisã, ne m tʋmtʋmdbã, la gũudbã sẽn dag n tũud maamã ned ba a yembr ka tol n yeeg a fuugu, tõnd ned kam fãa rag n zãada a zab-teoog ne a rɩtgo." 
Nehemiah5:1 Daar a yembre, nebã sʋk neb kẽere, pagb la raopa, yikame n yẽgem wʋsg ne b saam-biisã sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã." 
Nehemiah5:2 Bãmb neb kẽer dag n yetame: «Tõnd yaa wʋsgo, bala, d tara kom-dibli la kom-pugli. Dẽ wã, tõnd nongẽ lame n paam bɩle n dɩ n vɩɩmde.»" 
Nehemiah5:3 La kẽer me rag n yetame: «Komã sasa, tõnd sã n dat n paam koodo, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ d rɩk d pʋtã, d reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã ne d zagsã n gãneg n deege.»" 
Nehemiah5:4 Neb a taab me rag n yetame: «Tõnd sã n dat n yao rĩmã yaoodã, rẽndame tɩ tõnd rɩk d pʋtã ne d reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã n tɩ gãneg n deeg ligd n wa yao." 
Nehemiah5:5 Tõnd fãa yaool n yaa buud a yembre, tɩ tõnd kom-dibli wã me yaa bũmb a yembr ne bãmb kom-dibli wã! Lebga tɩlɛ ne tõnd tɩ d kẽes d kom-dibli la d kom-pugli yembdo, tɩ kẽer meng zoe n yaa yembse? Woto fãa yaa tõnd sẽn ka mi d sẽn na n maanegã yĩnga. Bala, tõnd pʋtã, ne d reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã fãa lebga neb a taab n so!»" 
Nehemiah5:6 Mam sẽn wʋm nebã yẽgengã ne b sẽn gom woto wã, mam sũurã puuga hal wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah5:7 Dẽ, mam yãka yam n na n leng kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã. Mam sok-b lame yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb pengd y saam-biisã n baood yõodo?» Rẽ, mam maana tigin-kãseng ne bãmba." 
Nehemiah5:8 La mam yeel-b lame yaa: «Tõnd saam-biisã b sẽn dag n dɩk n koos ne bu-zẽmsã, tõnd maana d sẽn tõe tɛk n yao n deeg-ba, tɩ yãmb leb n dɩk y saam-biisã ne y tãopã n wẽneg n koosd ne yãmb mensã sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne taaba.» La bãmb sẽn dag n ka tõe n leok tɩ bũmbã yĩngã, b sĩnda sɩddd..." 
Nehemiah5:9 Mam kell n kẽnga taoor n yeel yaa: «Yãmb sẽn maand bũmb ningã ka zems ye! Yãmb dag n tog n vɩɩmda tõnd Wẽnnaam dabeem zoees pʋga, tɩ buud a taabã sẽn yaa tõnd bɛɛbã ra wa tʋʋs yãmb ye." 
Nehemiah5:10 Ade, maam me, ne m saam-biisã, la mam tʋmtʋmdbã rag n dɩka d ligd ne d bɩle n peng nin-bãmbã. Dẽ wã, wa-y tɩ d bas b samdã taale." 
Nehemiah5:11 Rũndã bala, lebs-y bãmb b pʋtã, b reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, ne b oliiv tɩɩsã, la b zagsã, la y ra reeg roagleng ning b sẽn dag n tog n dogl b sẽn peng yãmb nengẽ wã zugã ye. Yaa roaglengã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, sã n yaa ligdi, koodo, reezẽ rãam wall kaam.»" 
Nehemiah5:12 Bãmb fãa leokame: «Tõnd na n maana wa fo sẽn yeelã. Tõnd na n lebsa bũmb ning tõnd sẽn dag n deegã, la d ka na n yeel tɩ b wa ne bũmb ye. Dẽ, mam boola maan-kʋʋdbã tɩ b wa yɩ kaset dãmba, n kɩt tɩ kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã wẽen bãmb taoor n yeel tɩ b na n sak n maana wa b sẽn yeelã.»" 
Nehemiah5:13 Woto, mam fugumda m fuugã noor n yeele: «Bɩ Wẽnnaam fugs ned ning fãa sẽn ka sak-a n pids a pʋlengo! Bɩ b yiis-a a buudã sʋka, la b rees a laogã n bas-a zaalem.» La nebã fãa leokame n yeele: «N-yẽe! Bɩ a yɩ woto!» Nebã fãa yɩɩl n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La ned kam fãa pidsa a pʋlengo." 
Nehemiah5:14 Daar ning rĩmã sẽn yãk maam tɩ m lebg Zʋʋda tẽng gʋvɛrneer n soog Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɛka, sẽn sɩng ne rĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-yiiblẽ n tɩ tãag a yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiiblẽ wã, maam ne m saam-biisã maana yʋʋm piig la a yiibu, n ka tol n deeg yaood wa gʋvɛrneer sẽn segd n deegã ye." 
Nehemiah5:15 Gʋvɛrneer-dãmb a taabã sẽn deng maam n zĩndã rag n namsda nebã, n modgd-b tɩ b wat ne rɩɩbo, reezẽ rãam, n paas wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-naase. Gʋvɛrneerã tʋmtʋmdbã me rag n soo nebã ne pãnga. La mam sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, mam zɩ n maan bũmb a woto ye." 
Nehemiah5:16 Sẽn yɩɩd fãa, mam dɩka m mengã n kõ tẽngã lalg meeb yĩnga. Tõnd ka tol n da pʋʋg d mengã yĩng ye. La mam tʋmtʋmdbã fãa naaga taab n tʋmd lalgã tʋʋmde." 
Nehemiah5:17 Zʋɩf-rãmbã neb ninsi, ne nanambs nins sẽn dag n naagd maam n dɩtẽ wã sõor yaa neb koabg la pis-nu, n paas ne neb nins sẽn yit tẽn-kɩrems n watẽ wã." 
Nehemiah5:18 Daar fãa, b rag n kʋʋda loalga, pe-nobds a yoobe, ne noose, n segl rɩɩbã mam yĩnga. La rasem piig fãa, b wat n kõta maam reezẽ rãam hal tɩ sekdẽ. Baa ne woto fãa, mam ka tol n yeel tɩ b wa ne yaood gʋvɛrneer yĩng ye. Bala, lalgã tʋʋmd rag n zoe n yaa zɩɩb wʋsg nebã yĩnga." 
Nehemiah5:19 Mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y mam yelle, la y maan-m neere, bũmb ning fãa mam sẽn maan nin-bãmbã yĩngã!" 
Nehemiah6:1 A Sãmbalat ne a Tobiza, la a Gesɛm sẽn yaa Araabã, ne tõnd bɛɛb a taabã wʋmame tɩ mam tõog n lebs n mee Zeruzalɛm tẽngã lalga, t'a ka leb n yaa weds ye. Wakat-kãng tɩ mam dag n nan ka lugl tẽngã noy kʋɩlems ra-lugdsã ye." 
Nehemiah6:2 A Sãmbalat ne a Gesɛm tʋmame tɩ b wa bool maam tɩ m wa tɩ d seg taab Kafirim tẽngã sẽn be Ono tãngã longẽ wã. Bãmb dag n tagsd n dat n maana maam wẽnga. 
Nehemiah6:3 Dẽ, mam tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ leok-b n yeele: «Mam ket n tara tʋʋm-kãsenga, rẽ wã, mam ka tõe n bas tʋʋmdã n wa seg yãmb ye.»" 
Nehemiah6:4 Bãmb tʋmame n bool maam sẽn tat naoor a naase, la wakat fãa, mam leokda bãmb wa pĩndã bala." 
Nehemiah6:5 La baoosgo, a Sãmbalat tʋma a meng rakõorã naoor a nu soabã, t'a tall sebr sẽn ka page, n wa kɩs maam." 
Nehemiah6:6 A yeela a sebrã pʋg yaa: «Bu-zẽmsã sʋka, b gomda vũn-vũni, la a Gasmu mengã yeelame tɩ foom ne Zʋʋda nebã tagsdame n dat n yik n kɩɩs rĩmã noore. Tɩ yaa rẽndã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yãmb yik n lebs n met lalgã. Sẽn paas me, b yeelame tɩ fo ratame n lebg bãmb dĩma." 
Nehemiah6:7 B tol n gomdame meng tɩ fo yãka f no-rɛɛsdb tɩ b na n moon Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgẽ n yeel tɩ fo lebga Zʋʋda nebã rĩmã. Moasã, bãng tɩ Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm ka tõe n ka wʋm yel-kãngã ye. Rẽ wã, wa tɩ d seg taab n yẽse.»" 
Nehemiah6:8 Dẽ, mam tʋmame tɩ b tɩ leok a Sãmbalat yaa: «Fo sẽn togsdã ba a yembr ka sɩd ye. Yaa fo mengã n naan bõn-kãensã fãa.»" 
Nehemiah6:9 Sɩdã, nin-bãmbã fãa rag n makdame n dat n kẽes tõnd dabeem. Bãmb dag n tagsdame tɩ tõnd daoodã na n boogame tɩ d bas tʋʋmdã tɩ lʋɩ. «Moasã, Zu-soaba, mam kot-y lame tɩ y kõ maam pãnga.»" 
Nehemiah6:10 Daar a yembre, mam kẽng n na n tɩ gesa a Metabeyɛll yageng a Semaya sẽn yaa a Delaya biigã, la mikame tɩ yẽnda rag n paga a meng roogẽ. A yeelame yaa: «Wa tɩ d seg taab Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ, n kẽng zĩ-sõngã pʋga, la d pag kʋɩlemsã neere, bala, bɛɛbã rat n wa kʋʋ foom, la yaa yʋngã la b rat n wa kʋ-fo.»" 
Nehemiah6:11 Mam leoka yẽnda yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, rao wa maamã leb n baood n zoeeme? Ned wa maamã na leb n zoet n na n kẽ Wẽnd doogẽ n fãag a yõore? Mam sã n maan a woto, mam na n kiime, dẽ wã, mam ka na n kẽng Wẽnd doogẽ wã ye.»" 
Nehemiah6:12 Mam dag n bãngame t'a sẽn togsd maamã ka yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ ye. Yaa a Tobiza ne a Sãmbalat n yao yẽnda ligd n yeel-a t'a gom ne maam a woto. 
Nehemiah6:13 Woto fãa, yaa sẽn na n kẽes maam dabeem, tɩ mam sak a saglgã n kẽ kongr pʋga. La yaa sor b sẽn na n tũ n sãam mam yʋʋrã, n kɩt tɩ yãnd yõk maam." 
Nehemiah6:14 Dẽ wã, mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y-yã a Tobiza ne a Sãmbalat tʋʋmã yelle, la y tẽeg no-rɛɛs-poak a Noadiya ne no-rɛɛsdb a taabã sẽn dag n baood n kẽes maam dabeemã me yelle!" 
Nehemiah6:15 Tõnd mee lalgã n sɛ Elull kiuugã rasem pisi la a nu daare, la yaa rasem pis-nu la a yiib la tõnd dɩk n me lalgã n sɛ." 
Nehemiah6:16 Dẽ, tõnd bɛɛbã fãa sẽn wʋm tɩ tõnd mee lalgã n sɛ, la bu-zẽms nins sẽn gũbg tõndã sẽn yã bõn-kãnga, rabeem yõk-b lame, la yãnd yõk-b-la wʋsgo. Dẽ, bãmb bãngame tɩ tõnd sẽn tõog n maan tʋʋm-kãngã yaa ne tõnd Wẽnnaamã tʋlsem." 
Nehemiah6:17 Wakat-kãnga, Zʋʋda kãsem-dãmbã gʋlsa sɛb wʋsg n tʋm a Tobiza, la a Tobiza me gʋlsa sɛb n tʋm bãmba." 
Nehemiah6:18 Bala, neb wʋsg sẽn dag be Zʋʋda pʋgã rag n tara lagem-n-taar ne a Tobiza, tɩ bala, yẽnda rag n yaa a Aara biig a Sekaniya rɛɛmba, la yẽnda mengã bi-ribl a Yohanan me rag n dɩka a Berekɩya biig a Mesulam bi-pugl n maan a paga." 
Nehemiah6:19 Bãmb dag n pẽgda a Tobiza mam taoore, la b rɩkd mam goamã n kẽnd n togsd a Tobiza. A Tobiza rag n tʋmda maam sɛbã, n dat n kẽes maam dabeem." 
Nehemiah7:1 B sẽn wa n me lalgã n sɛ wã, mam kɩtame tɩ b lebs n lug a kʋɩlemsã. Rẽ zugẽ, tõnd yãka tẽngã rignoy gũudba, ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, la d kɩt tɩ Leevi buudã rɩk b tʋʋmde." 
Nehemiah7:2 Mam kõo noor tɩ b yãk m saam-biig a Hanani, ne tãb-biisã naab a Hananiya sẽn yaa sɩd soaba, n yaa ned sẽn zoet Wẽnnaam wʋsg n yɩɩd neb a taabã, n yeel-b tɩ b soog Zeruzalɛm tẽngã." 
Nehemiah7:3 Mam yeela bãmb yaa: «Wĩntoogã sã n nan ka zẽke, bɩ y ra pak tẽngã noy ye. La y pag rignoyã sõama, tɩ gũudbã ket n be beenẽ. Gũudbã sã n ka ket b zĩigẽ wã, b tog n paga kʋɩlemsã sõama. B tog n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã neb gũ tẽngã n dees taaba. Neb kẽer na n gũuda tẽngã noyã, tɩ neb a taabã ned kam fãa gũuda a roogo.»" 
Nehemiah7:4 Tẽngã rag n yalmame, la a bedmame, la nebã sẽn dag n be a pʋgẽ wã sõor dag n ka waoog ye. La b rag n nan ka lebs n me rotã ye." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mam Wẽnnaamã ninga mam yamẽ, tɩ m tigim kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã, ne neb a taabã sẽn ketã, n sõd-ba. Mam gesa sẽn deng n yi-b yembdã pʋg n wa wã sõadg sebrẽ, la m yãndame tɩ b gʋlsa beenẽ a woto:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Ad neb nins Babilond naab a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n yõg n tɩ kẽes yembdã sʋk neb kẽer sẽn yi beenẽ n lebg n wa Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgã. La ned kam fãa kuila a meng tẽngẽ. 
Nehemiah7:7 Ad neb nins sẽn tall bãmb n wa wã yʋya: Yaa a Zorobabɛlle, a Zozoe, a Neemi, a Azariya, a Raamiya, a Nahamani, a Mordokayi, a Bilsãn, a Misperɛte, a Bigvayi ne a Nehum la a Baana. Ad Israyɛll neb nins sẽn tũ bãmb n wa wã sõore." 
Nehemiah7:8 A Paryoos yagensã yaa neb tus a yiib la koabg la pis-yopoe la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:9 t'a Sefatiya roogã neb yaa kobs-tã la pis-yopoe la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:10 t'a Aara roogã neb yaa kobs-yoob la pis-nu la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:11 la a Pahat-Moaab roogã neb sẽn yaa a Zozoe ne a Zoaab yagensã yaa neb tus a yiib la kobs-nii la piig la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:12 t'a Elam roogã neb yaa tusr la kobsi la pis-nu la a naase," 
Nehemiah7:13 t'a Zatu roogã neb yaa kobs-nii la pis-naas la a nu," 
Nehemiah7:14 t'a Zakayi roogã neb yaa kobs-yopoe la pis-yoobe," 
Nehemiah7:15 t'a Binui roogã neb yaa kobs-yoob la pis-naas la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:16 t'a Bebayi roogã neb yaa kobs-yoob la pisi la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:17 t'a Azgaad roogã neb yaa tus a yiib la kobs-tã la pisi la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:18 t'a Adonikam doogã neb yaa kobs-yoob la pis-yoob la a yopoe," 
Nehemiah7:19 t'a Bigvayi roogã neb yaa tus a yiib la pis-yoob la a yopoe," 
Nehemiah7:20 t'a Adin doogã neb yaa kobs-yoob la pis-nu la a nu," 
Nehemiah7:21 la a Ezekɩyaas ned a Atɛɛr roogã neb yaa pis-wɛ la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:22 t'a Asum doogã neb yaa kobs-tã la pisi la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:23 t'a Besayi roogã neb yaa kobs-tã la pisi la a naase," 
Nehemiah7:24 t'a Harif roogã neb yaa koabg la piig la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:25 t'a Gabawõ roogã neb yaa pis-wɛ la a nu," 
Nehemiah7:26 la Betlehɛm ne Netofa nebã yaa koabg la pis-nii la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:27 tɩ Anatot nebã yaa kobg la pisi la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:28 tɩ Bɛt-Avmawɛt nebã yaa pis-naas la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:29 la Kiryat-Yeyarim ne Kefɩra la Beerot nebã yaa kobs-yopoe la pis-naas la a tãabo," 
Nehemiah7:30 tɩ Rama ne Geeva nebã yaa kobs-yoob la pisi la a yembre," 
Nehemiah7:31 tɩ Mikmaas nebã yaa koabg la pisi la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:32 tɩ Betɛll ne Ayi nebã yaa koabg la pisi la a tãabo," 
Nehemiah7:33 la Neebo tẽng a to wã nebã yaa pis-nu la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:34 tɩ Elam a to me yagensã sõor yaa tusr la kobsi la pis-nu la a naase," 
Nehemiah7:35 t'a Harim roogã neb yaa kobs-tã la pisi," 
Nehemiah7:36 t'a Zeeriko roogã neb yaa kobs-tã la pis-naas la a nu," 
Nehemiah7:37 la a Lood ne a Hadiid la a Ono roogã neb yaa kobs-yopoe la pisi la a yembre," 
Nehemiah7:38 t'a Sena roogã neb tus a tãab la kobs-wɛ la pis-tã," 
Nehemiah7:39 la maan-kʋʋdbã, rat n yeel t'a Yedaya sẽn yaa a Zozoe roogã neb yaa kobs-wɛ la pis-yopoe la a tãabo." 
Nehemiah7:40 A Imeer doogã neb yaa tusr la pis-nu la a yiibu," 
Nehemiah7:41 t'a Pasehʋʋr doogã neb yaa tusr la kobsi la pis-naas la a yopoe," 
Nehemiah7:42 t'a Harim doogã neb yaa tusr la piig la a yopoe," 
Nehemiah7:43 La maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa Leevi buudã, sẽn yaa a Zozoe yagensã, rat n yeel t'a Kadmiyɛll ne a Hodwa neb yaa pis-yopoe la a naase." 
Nehemiah7:44 La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sẽn yaa a Azaf yagensã yaa neb koabg la pis-naas la a nii," 
Nehemiah7:45 Zag-noy gũudbã, a Salum ne a Atɛɛre, la a Talmon, ne a Akuub la a Hatita ne a Sobayi yagensã fãa yaa neb koabg la pis-tã la a nii." 
Nehemiah7:46 Ad tʋmtʋmdbã: yaa a Siha ne a Hasufa, la a Tabaot yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:47 ne a Keroose, la a Siya, ne a Padon yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:48 ne a Levana yagensã, la a Hagaava yagensã, ne a Salmayi yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:49 la a Hanan yagensã, ne a Gidɛll yagensã, la a Gahaar yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:50 ne a Reyaya yagensã, la a Resin yagensã, ne a Nekoda yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:51 la a Gaazam yagensã, ne a Uuza yagensã, la a Paseya yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:52 ne a Bezayi yagensã, la a Mewunim yagensã, ne a Nefisim yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:53 la a Bakbuk yagensã, ne a Hakufa yagensã, la a Harʋʋr yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:54 ne a Baslit yagensã, la a Mehida yagensã, ne a Harsa yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:55 la a Barkoos yagensã, ne a Sizeera yagensã, la a Tama yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:56 ne a Nesiyat yagensã, la a Hatifa yagensã." 
Nehemiah7:57 A Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã yagens yaa a Sotayi yagensã, a Soferɛt yagensã, la a Perida yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:58 ne a Yaala yagensã, la a Darkon yagensã, ne a Gidɛll yagensã," 
Nehemiah7:59 la a Sefatiya yagensã, ne a Hatill yagensã, la a Pokerɛt-Ha-Sebayim yagensã, ne a Amo yagensã." 
Nehemiah7:60 Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã zãnga, ne a Salmo yembsã kamb fãa sõor yaa neb 392." 
Nehemiah7:61 Ad neb nins sẽn yi Tɛll-Mela, ne Tel-Harsa, la Keruub-Adõn, ne Imeer n wa, n yaool n ka tõog n wilg tɩ bãmb ba wã roogo, wall b buudã yaa Israyɛll buudã." 
Nehemiah7:62 Bãmb fãa sõorã rag n yaa neb kobs-yoob la pis-naas la a yiibu, la bãmb yaa a Delaya ne a Tobiza la a Nekoda yagense." 
Nehemiah7:63 Maan-kʋʋdbã sʋk me, yaa a Hobaya yagensã, ne a Hakoos yagensã, la a Barzɩlayi yagensã. A Barzɩlayi rag n peega Galaad rao a Barzɩlayi bi-pugl n maan a paga, tɩ b kell n dɩk a rɛɛmbã yʋʋr n pʋd-a t'a Barzɩlayi." 
Nehemiah7:64 Bãmb vɛɛsa b yaab-rãmbã sõadg sɛb pʋse, n na n ges b sã n yaa Israyɛll buudu, la bãmb ka yã bũmb sẽn wilgd tɩ b yaa Israyɛll buud ye. Dẽ, b geelga bãmb wa bu-rẽgdo, la b yiis-b-la maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã pʋga." 
Nehemiah7:65 La gʋvɛrneerã meng yeela bãmb tɩ b ra tol n dɩ kũunã sẽn welg toorã rɩɩbo, hal tɩ maan-kʋʋdã sok Wẽnnaam ne Urim la Purim n ges b sã n segd n dɩɩme wal b ka segd n dɩ." 
Nehemiah7:66 Israyɛll neb nins sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n lebg n wa wã fãa sõor yaa neb tus-pis-naas la a yiib la kobs-tã la pis-yoobe. 
Nehemiah7:67 La yaa sẽn ka naag ne bãmb tʋmtʋmd-pogsã la tʋmtʋmd-raopã sõor sẽn yaa tus a yopoe la kobs-tã la pis-tã la yopoe, n paas yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, pagb ne raop kobsi la pis-naas la a nu n dag n be b sʋka." 
Nehemiah7:68 Bãmb dag n tara yʋgma kobs-naas la pis-tã la a nu, ne bõens tus a yoob la kobs-yopoe la pisi." 
Nehemiah7:69 Buudã kãsem-dãmbã kẽer kõo kũun tʋʋmdã yĩnga. La gʋvɛrneerã kõo sãnem wakɩ-koeems tusri, ne laas pis-nu, la maan-kʋʋr fut kobs-nu la pis-tã." 
Nehemiah7:70 Buudã kãsem-dãmbã sẽn kõ kũunã tʋʋmdã yĩngã yaa sãnem wakɩ-koeems tus-pisi, ne wanzuri sẽn tat kɩlo tus a yiib la kobsi." 
Nehemiah7:71 La Israyɛll neb a taabã kõo sãnem wakɩ-koeems tus-pisi, ne wanzuri kɩlo tusri, la maan-kʋʋr fut pis-yoob la a yopoe." 
Nehemiah7:72 Woto, maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã, la zag-noy gũudbã, ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, la nebã pʋɩ-sʋka, Israyɛll neb a taab sẽn yaa Wẽnd doogã tʋmtʋmdbã, ne Israyɛll neb a taabã ned kam fãa kẽng n tɩ kẽ b meng tẽmsẽ wã. La kiuug a yopoe soabã sẽn wa n na n ta, tɩ Israyɛll yagensã ned kam fãa be a tẽngẽ." 
Nehemiah8:1 Nebã fãa tigma taab ne yam a yembr Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga, bãmb tigma taab noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ koom noorã nen-taoore. La Israyɛll nebã kosa a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa gʋlsdã t'a tall tõodã sebr wa. Yaa tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ a Moyiis t'a kõ Israyɛll nebã." 
Nehemiah8:2 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas talla tõodã sebr n wa zãma wã taoore. Yaa pagb la raopa, ne neb nins fãa sẽn tõe n kelg n wʋm a võorã taoore. Rag n yaa kiuug a yopoe soabã pipi daare." 
Nehemiah8:3 A Ɛsdraas yalsa koomã rignoor sɛɛga, pagbã la raopa, ne neb nins fãa sẽn tõe n kelg n wʋm a võorã taoore, n karem tõodã sebr yibeoog n tɩ tãag wĩnto-sʋka. La nebã fãa rag n kelgda tõodã sebr kaoreng neer-neere." 
Nehemiah8:4 Gʋlsd a Ɛsdraas rag n dʋʋ ra-pegdã b sẽn maneg n ti kaorengã yĩngã zugu, n yals yĩngri. Neb nins sẽn dag be yẽnda nug-rɩtgã: Yaa a Matitiya, a Sema, a Anaya, a Uuriya, a Hilkiiza, ne a Maseya. La neb nins sẽn dag n be-b yẽnda goabgã, yaa a Pedaya, a Misayɛlle, a Malkiya, a Hasum, a Hasebadana, a Zakari, ne a Mesulam." 
Nehemiah8:5 A Ɛsdraas sẽn dag n beẽ wã zãntame n yɩɩd nebã sẽn beẽ wã, la nebã fãa rag n ne-a lame. Dẽ, yẽnda sẽn lak sebrã, nebã fãa yika yĩngri." 
Nehemiah8:6 La a Ɛsdraas pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam-kãsengã barka, la nebã fãa zẽka b nus n yeel tɩ Ãmina! Ãmina! La bãmb zõondame n wõgemd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n fõgen b nens tẽnga." 
Nehemiah8:7 Rẽ poore, bãmb roogame, la a Zozoe, a Baani, a Sereviya, a Yamindi, a Akuubi, a Sabetayi, a Hodiya, a Maseya, a Kelita, a Azariya, a Yozabaade, a Hanane, ne a Pelaya sɩngame n bilg nebã tõodã võore, la nebã rag n ket n yasa yĩngr zĩ-kãnga" 
Nehemiah8:8 Bãmb dag n karemda Wẽnnaam tõodã sebr sõama vẽeneg-vẽenega, la b bilgd a võorã tɩ ned kam wʋmd b sẽn karmã sẽn dat n yeel a soaba." 
Nehemiah8:9 Dẽ, gʋvɛrneer a Neemi, ne maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa gʋlsdã, ne Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn dag n bilgd tõodã võorã yeela nebã fãa yaa: «Rũndã daarã yaa daar sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Rẽ wã, ka neer tɩ y sãam y sũyã, n yãb ye.» Bala nebã fãa sẽn wʋm kaorengã b yãbame." 
Nehemiah8:10 La a Ɛsdraas yeela nebã yaa: «Kuil-y-yã! Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y rɩ-nood n dɩ, la y bao bõn-yũudlɩ sẽn yaa noog n yũ, la y yãk rɩɩbã n kõ neb nins sẽn ka tõog n seglã! Bala, rũndã daarã yaa daar sẽn welg toor tõnd Zu-soabã yĩnga. Da maan-y sũ-sãang ye! Yaa sũ-noog ning sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ wã n kõt yãmb pãnga.»" 
Nehemiah8:11 Leevi buudã belsa nebã n yeel-b yaa: «Sĩnd-y la y ra yãb ye! Rũndã daarã yaa daar sẽn welg toore. Da maan-y sũ-sãang ye!» 
Nehemiah8:12 Dẽ, nebã fãa kuilame n na n tɩ rɩ la b yũ, la b yãk rɩɩb n kõ sẽn ka tar-bã, la b maan tig-kãsenga, bala, bãmb wʋma goam nins b sẽn bilg bãmbã võore." 
Nehemiah8:13 Rasem a yiibẽ daarã, Israyɛll buudã nanambsã, ne maan-kʋʋdbã la Leevi nebã tigma taab a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa gʋlsdã nengẽ, n na n maneg n kelg tõodã zãmsg sõama n paase." 
Nehemiah8:14 Bãmb yãndame tɩ b gʋlsa tõod nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Moyiisã pʋgẽ, n yeel tɩ kiuug a yopoe soabã tigrã pʋga, Israyɛll nebã tog n zĩnda zãn tẽngre." 
Nehemiah8:15 La b tog n bãnga bõn-kãnga, n moon-a n togs b tẽmsã fãa pʋse, la ne Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã me, n yeel nebã yaa: «Kẽng-y tãmsã zut n tɩ kao oliiv tɩ-sends vãado, wall weoog oliiv tɩɩs vãado, ne mirt tɩɩs vãado, la koms vãado, ne tɩ-poal vãado, n wa maan zãna, wa sẽn gʋls tõodã sebr pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Nehemiah8:16 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã kẽng n tɩ kɛɛ vãadã n wa. La ned kam fãa wa n tii zãnde. Kẽer tii b gãosg zugu, tɩ kẽer ti b zakã pʋga, la kẽer me tii Wẽnd doogã zak pʋga, la kẽer tii rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ koom rignoorẽ wã, ne noor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Efrayiim rignoorẽ wã." 
Nehemiah8:17 Dẽ, Israyɛll neb nins fãa sẽn yi yembdã pʋg n lebg n wa wã tii zãn n kẽ n zĩnd b pʋse. Sẽn sɩng a Nun biig a Zozoe zamaan hal tɩ ta badaare, Israyɛll nebã rag n ka leb n maan bũmb a woto buud ye. La yɩɩ kɩdeng meng-meng daare." 
Nehemiah8:18 La tigrã pipi daarã, n tɩ tãag a yaoolem daarã, b rag n karemda Wẽnnaam tõodã daar fãa. Tigrã kaoosa rasem a yopoe, la rasem a niiẽ wã daare, bãmb maana tigin-kãsenga, wa sẽn zems no-tũudrã." 
Nehemiah9:1 Kiu-kãng rasem pisi la a naasã daare, Israyɛll nebã yeelga boto, n yug b mens tom, la b tigim taab n na n loe noore." 
Nehemiah9:2 Neb nins sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã welga toor n bas sãambã, n na n tɩ kos bãmb yel-wẽnã ne b yaab-rãmbã kongrã sugri." 
Nehemiah9:3 Bãmb yik n yalsa yĩngr lɛɛr a tãabo, n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã tõodã sebr kaorengo. Bãmb leb n dɩka lɛɛr a tãab yɛs n yĩgimd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã taoor n na n kos b yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Nehemiah9:4 La a Zozoe ne a Baani, la a Kadmiyɛlle, ne a Sebaniya, la a Buni, ne a Serebiya, la a Bani ne a Kenani yalsa Leevi-rãmbã rʋʋdgã zugu, n zẽk b koees n kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Nehemiah9:5 Dẽ, a Zozoe ne a Baani, la a Kadmiyɛlle, ne a Hasabneya, la a Serebiya, ne a Hodiya, la a Sebaniya ne a Petahiya sẽn yaa Leevi buudã nebã zẽka b koees n yeel yaa: «Yik-y yĩngri! Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã barka! Pʋʋs-y bãmb bark wakat fãa!» Bɩ yãmb yʋʋrã sẽn tar ziirã paam pẽgre, yãmb yʋʋrã yɩɩda bark la waoogr buudã fãa!" 
Nehemiah9:6 Yãmb y yembr bal n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Yãmb n naan saasã, yãmb n naan saasẽ-saasẽ ne a ãdsã fãa, la y naan tẽn-gãongã ne bũmb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, la y naan ko-kãsemsã ne b pʋsẽ teedã fãa, yãmb n kõt bõn-naandsã fãa vɩɩm, yĩngr ãdsã fãa wõgemdeda yãmb taoore." 
Nehemiah9:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb a Wẽnnaam, n yãk a Abram, n yiis Ʋʋr sẽn be Kalde-rãmbã tẽngẽ wã, n pʋd bãmb yʋʋr t'a Abrahaam." 
Nehemiah9:8 Yãmb yãndame tɩ b kɩsa sɩd ne yãmbã, dẽ, yãmb maana kaool ne bãmba, n kãab bãmb n yeel tɩ y na n kɩtame tɩ b yagensã soog Hɛt-rãmbã, Kana-rãmbã ne Amoor-dãmbã, Perɛɛz-rãmbã la Zebuus-rãmbã, ne Girgaaz-rãmbã tẽmse. La yãmb sɩd pidsa y gomdã. Bala, yãmb yaa tɩrlem soaba." 
Nehemiah9:9 Yãmb yãnda tõnd yaab-rãmbã namsgã Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgã. La yãmb wʋma b sẽn dag n be rudum ko-kãsengã noor n kelemd n kot yãmb sõngrã. 
Nehemiah9:10 Yãmb maana bãna, la bõn-yɛɛsds n sɩbg Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ, la y sɩbg neb nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, ne a tẽngã nebã fãa. Bala, yãmb dag n miime tɩ b wukda b mens n namsd tõnd yaab-rãmbã, la yãmb kɩtame tɩ y yʋʋrã yi, wa a sẽn ket n yaa to-to rũndã wã." 
Nehemiah9:11 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ ko-kãsengã pãrg bãmb taoore, tɩ b tab tẽn-koɛɛng n pɩʋʋge. La yãmb loba sẽn dag n digd-b bãmbã ko-zulumsã pʋsẽ, bãmb lisa bõra, wa b sẽn lob kugr ko-kãseng pʋga." 
Nehemiah9:12 La wĩndga, yãmb tɛta y nebã ne sawaodgo, la yʋngo, yãmb tɛt-b-la ne bug-witim sẽn vẽnegd bãmb sorã." 
Nehemiah9:13 Yãmb yii saasẽ n sig Sinayi tãngã zug n gom ne bãmba. Yãmb kõo bãmb no-tũuds sẽn yaa tɩrse, la y kõ-b zãmsg sẽn yaa sɩda, la tõod sẽn yaa tɩrse, ne minind sẽn zems zãnga." 
Nehemiah9:14 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ y tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis wilg bãmb y vʋʋsg daarã sẽn welg toorã. La yãmb kɩtame t'a zãms bãmb tõodã koees a taabã. 
Nehemiah9:15 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ bur yi yĩngr n sig tɩ b rɩ n yiis b kom, la y kɩt tɩ koom pusg pĩig zug n yi, tɩ b yũ n yiis b ko-yũudu. La yãmb yeel-b lame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ reeg tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n zẽk y nug n wẽen n yeel tɩ y na n kõ-b lame tɩ b soogã." 
Nehemiah9:16 La bãmba ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã wuka b mense, n kɩɩs yãmba, la b ka sak yãmb tõodã ye."
