Nehemiah9:17 Bãmb zãgsame n ka kelg yãmb ye. La b ka tẽeg bõn-bãnã yãmb sẽn maan n kõ bãmbã yell ye. Bãmb kɩɩsgã pʋga, b kenga b sũyã, n yãk taoor soab n dat n lebg n leb b yembdã pʋg Ezɩpt tẽnga. La baa ne rẽ fãa, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt sugri, la y yaa nimbãan-zoɛta, la y yaa maan-neer soaba, la y sũur ka yikd tao-tao ye, la yãmb nonglmã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, yãmb ka bas-b ye." 
Nehemiah9:18 Bãmb tol n dɩka kut n yẽneg n maan nag-bil n yeel yaa: ‹Ad yãmb Wẽnnaam ning sẽn yiis-a yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã!› Bãmb maana woto n paoog yãmb yʋʋrã wʋsgo. 
Nehemiah9:19 Yãmb nonglmã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga, yãmb ka bas bãmb we-raoogã pʋg ye. La sawaodgã ka bas bãmb yãagr wĩndg ye, la yʋngo, bug-witmã kell n yãaga bãmb sorã zug tɩ b kẽnda." 
Nehemiah9:20 Yãmb sõmblmã yĩnga, yãmb kõ-b-la yãmb yam-sõngã, tɩ b tõe n paam bãngre, la yãmb kõo bãmb mandã tɩ b rɩ, la y kõ-b-la koom tɩ b yũ n yiis b ko-yũudu." 
Nehemiah9:21 Yãmb gesa bãmb yell we-raoogã pʋg yʋʋm pis-naase, la bũmb ka paoog bãmb ye. Bãmb futã ka ki, la b naoã me ka mod ye." 
Nehemiah9:22 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ b tõog tẽmse, la buud toay-toaya. Bãmb sooga soolem toay-toaya. Bãmb deega Ɛsbon dĩm a Sihon tẽngã, ne Basan dĩm a Oog tẽngã." 
Nehemiah9:23 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ b kambã fɩɩge, n lebg wʋsg wa ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã, la yãmb kɩtame tɩ b kẽ tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n wẽen n yeel tɩ b yaab-rãmbã na n tɩ reeg n soogame wã pʋgẽ." 
Nehemiah9:24 La bãmb kambã sɩd kẽeme n deeg tẽngã n sooge. Yãmb ninga Kana tẽngã rãmb yãnd bãmb taoore, n kɩt tɩ b tõog-b ne b rĩm-dãmbã, la b tẽngã nebã, n maan-b wa b sẽn date." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bãmb deesa tẽms sẽn tar pãnga, la b rees zĩis sẽn sakd koodo. Bãmb deesa rot sẽn pid ne laog buud toor-toore, la b rees buls b sẽn zoe n tu. Bãmb reesa reezẽ tɩɩs pʋt ne oliiv tɩɩs pʋto, la b rees tɩɩs wʋsg sẽn womd biisi. Yãmb sõmblmã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, bãmb dɩɩme n tɩg n nobe, la b vɩɩmda naar pʋga." 
Nehemiah9:26 La bãmb yik n kɩɩsa yãmba, n tud yãmb b kãare, n wẽnemd n bas yãmb tõodã, la b kʋ yãmb no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn dag n keoogd bãmb tɩ b lebg n wa tũ yãmbã. La bãmb paooga yãmb yʋʋrã wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah9:27 Dẽ, yãmb basame tɩ b bɛɛbã tõog-ba, n nams-ba. La bãmb sũ-sãangã wakate, b kelmame n bool yãmba. La yãmb zĩnda saasẽ, n wʋm b kelemsã, la yãmb nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, yãmb tʋma fãagdb tɩ b wa fãag bãmb b bɛɛbã nusẽ." 
Nehemiah9:28 La bãmb sẽn wa n paam vʋʋsgã, bãmb leb n sɩngame n maand wẽngã yãmb taoore. Dẽ, yãmb leb n bas-b lame tɩ b bɛɛbã tõog-ba, n nams-ba. La bãmb leb n kelmame yɛs n bool yãmba, tɩ yãmb zĩnd saasẽ n wʋm b kɛlengã, la y nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, yãmb fãaga bãmb naoor wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah9:29 Yãmb keooga bãmb n yeel-b tɩ b sak yãmb tõodã. La bãmb tɩtaamã yĩnga, b ka kelg yãmb noyã ye. Bãmb kɩɩsa yãmb no-tũudsã. Yaool n yaa no-tũuds nins sẽn kõt neb nins sẽn sakd-bã vɩɩm. Bãmb yĩgsa b bãgdo, n nak b kãare, n ka sak n kelg yãmb ye." 
Nehemiah9:30 Yãmb maana sũ-mar ne bãmb n kaoos yʋʋm wʋsgo. Yãmb tũnuga y no-rɛɛsdbã n keoog bãmb ne yãmb Sɩɩgã pãnga, la bãmb ka kelg ye. Dẽ, yãmb kɩtame tɩ tẽn-zẽms neb tõog-ba." 
Nehemiah9:31 La yãmb nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, yãmb ka sãam-ba, la y ka bas-b me ye. Bala, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sugr soaba, la nimbãan-zoɛta." 
Nehemiah9:32 Moasã, tõnd Wẽnnaam, yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam-kãseng sẽn tar pãnga, n tõe fãa, yãmb ka viigd y kaool ye, la y yaa pʋ-peelem soaba. Bɩ y ra ges tood nins sẽn paamd tõndã wa bõn-yaalg ye. Toogã paamda tõndo, d rĩm-dãmbã, d nanambsã, ne d maan-kʋʋdbã, la d no-rɛɛsdbã, ne d yaab-rãmbã, ne yãmb nebã fãa. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã zamaan n tãag rũndã." 
Nehemiah9:33 Yell ning fãa sẽn paam tõndã, wilgdame tɩ yãmb yaa sɩd soaba, bala, yãmb wilgame tɩ y yaa sɩd soaba, la yaa tõnd n maan wẽnem." 
Nehemiah9:34 Tõnd dĩm-dãmbã ne d nanambsã, la d maan-kʋʋdbã, ne d yaab-rãmbã ka sak n tũ yãmb tõodã ye. La b ka kelg y noyã ne y keoogrã yãmb sẽn keoog bãmbã ye." 
Nehemiah9:35 Bãmb sẽn dag n wa n ket n be b soolmẽ wã, n be bãmb bõn-sõama nins fãa yãmb sẽn kõ-bã pʋgã, yãmb kɩtame tɩ bãmb zĩnd tẽn-yaleng sẽn yaa bʋgsg pʋgẽ, la bãmb ka sak n wẽnemd n bas b manesem-wẽnsã n tũ yãmb ye." 
Nehemiah9:36 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ rũndã, tõnd be yembd pʋga! Tõnd bee yembd pʋga, tẽng ning yãmb sẽn dag n kõ tõnd yaab-rãmbã, tɩ b tõe n dɩ tẽngã tɩɩs biisi, la b paam a laogã!" 
Nehemiah9:37 Tẽngã tara laog wʋsgo, la tõnd beegrã yĩnga, yãmb kɩtame tɩ rĩm-dãmb soog tõndo, b soo tõnd mensã la b so d rũmsã n maand b sẽn date, n kɩt tɩ tõnd be sũ-sãan-kãseng pʋga." 
Nehemiah10:1 Bõn-kãngã fãa yĩnga, tõnd Israyɛll nebã rɩkda sardo, la d gʋlsd-a-la sebr zugu. La seb-kãngã zugu, tõnd nanambsã, Leevi nebã, ne tõnd maan-kʋʋdbã ninga b nug-tikr bãnde." 
Nehemiah10:2 Ad neb nins sẽn tik b nus sebrã zugã yʋy: Yaa gʋvɛrneer a Neemi sẽn yaa a Hakaliya biigã, a Sedesiyaase," 
Nehemiah10:3 a Sereya, a Azariya, a Zeremi," 
Nehemiah10:4 a Pasewʋʋre, a Amariya, a Malkiiza," 
Nehemiah10:5 a Hatusi, a Sebaniya, a Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:6 a Harim, a Meremote, a Abdyaase" 
Nehemiah10:7 a Dãniyɛlle, a Gineton, a Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:8 a Mesulam, a Abiya, a Miyamindi," 
Nehemiah10:9 n paas ne maan-kʋʋdb a Maziya, a Bilgayi, ne a Semaya." 
Nehemiah10:10 Leevi buudẽ wã, yaa a Azaniya biig a Zozoe, ne a Henadaad roogã ned a Binui, ne a Kadmiyɛlle," 
Nehemiah10:11 ne a ba-biisã, sẽn yaa: A Sebaniya, a Hodiya, a Kelita, a Pelaya, a Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:12 a Miise, a Rehoobe, a Hasabiya," 
Nehemiah10:13 a Zakuuri, a Serebiya, a Sebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:14 a Hodiya, ne a Baani, la a Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:15 Nebã nanambsã yaa: A Paroose, a Pahat-Moaabe, a Elam, a Zatu, a Baani," 
Nehemiah10:16 a Buni, a Azgaade, a Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:17 a Adoniza, a Bigvayi, a Adin," 
Nehemiah10:18 a Atɛɛre, a Ezekɩyaas, a Azʋʋre," 
Nehemiah10:19 a Hodiya, a Hasum, a Betsayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 a Harifi, a Anatote, a Nebayi," 
Nehemiah10:21 a Magpiyaase, a Mesulam, a Hezɩɩre," 
Nehemiah10:22 a Mesezabeyɛlle, a Sadoke, a Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:23 a Pelatiya, a Hanan, a Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:24 a Ooze, a Hananiya, a Hasuubi," 
Nehemiah10:25 a Halowɛɛse, a Pila, a Sobɛke," 
Nehemiah10:26 a Rewum, a Hasabna, a Maseya," 
Nehemiah10:27 a Ahiya, a Hanande, a Anande" 
Nehemiah10:28 a Maluki, a Harim, ne a Baana." 
Nehemiah10:29 La neb nins sẽn ketã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi buudã, ne rignoy gũudbã, la yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, ne Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã, la neb nins fãa sẽn welg b mens ne tẽngã bu-zẽms n sak Wẽnnaam tõogã, ne bãmb pagbã, la b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã, ne neb nins sẽn tõe n wʋm bũmb võorã," 
Nehemiah10:30 naaga b saam-biisã sẽn yaa nanambsã. Bãmb dɩka sardo, la b wẽen n kãab b mense, n yeel tɩ bãmb na n saka Wẽnnaam tõogã b sẽn tũnug b tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis n kõ bãmbã. Yaa sẽn na n yɩl n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soabã no-tũudsã, la d kẽn wa sẽn zems no-tũud-kãense, la b sak bãmb tõodã ne b noyã fãa." 
Nehemiah10:31 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, tõnd pʋlemdame tɩ d ka na n dɩk d kom-pugli wã n kõ bu-zẽms tɩ b maan b pagba, la d ka na n peeg b kom-pugli wã me n kõ d kom-dibli tɩ b maan b pagb ye." 
Nehemiah10:32 La tẽngã neb sã n wa ne b koosem, wall b bɩle buud toor-toor n na n koos vʋʋsg daarã ne daar sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ, tõnd ka na n da ye. La yʋʋm a yopoe fãa, tõnd na n basa d pʋtã tɩ b vʋʋse, la d na n basa d sam-dãmbã taale, tɩ b ra yao b samã ye." 
Nehemiah10:33 Sã n yaa ne tõnd mensã, tõnd yiisa noore, n yeel tɩ yʋʋmd fãa, tõnd na n kõo wanzuri wakɩ-koɛɛng a yembre, tɩ yɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã roog zãab yĩnga." 
Nehemiah10:34 Rẽ na n sõngame tɩ b ra bur n ning Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, la b maan maand sẽn yõogd bugum, ne bõn-koaadl kũun daar fãa, la vʋʋsg daarã maoongo, la ki-paalgã tigr kũuni, wall tig a taaba. Sõng-kãngã leb n tõe n daa bũmb a taab n kõ Wẽnnaam, a leb n tõe n yɩɩ maoong Israyɛll nebã beegr sugr kũun yĩnga, la a tõe n sõnga ne tõnd Wẽnnaam doogã tʋʋmã fãa yĩnga." 
Nehemiah10:35 La tõnd sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Leevi buudã, la neb a taabã sẽn ketã, tõnd maana poeer n na n bãng buud fãa sẽn tog n tall raad n wa kɩs tõnd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, tɩ bala, yʋʋmd fãa, wakat n be, tɩ buud fãa tog n tall raad n wa ne tɩ b yõog maoongã bugum tõnd Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã zugu, wa b sẽn gʋls tõogã sebr pʋgẽ wã." 
Nehemiah10:36 Sẽn paas me, tõnd pʋlmame tɩ yʋʋmd fãa, tõnd na n yãka d tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadlã dẽenem biisi, ne d tɩɩsã dẽenem biisi, n tall n wa kɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
Nehemiah10:37 Tõnd na n talla d kom-dibli wã kom-dẽemsã sẽn yaa raopã, ne d rũmsã kom-dẽemsã n wa kɩs tõnd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, la d wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn be beenẽ n maand tõnd Wẽnnaam tʋʋmdã, wa sẽn gʋls tõogã sebr pʋgẽ n yeel tɩ d tog n talla tõnd niigã, ne d piisã, la d bʋʋsã kom-dẽemsã n wa Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã." 
Nehemiah10:38 Tõnd leb n na n yãka d zom-bãanegã ne d tɩɩsã fãa bi-sõamã wã, la d reezẽ rã-paalgã ne d kaamã n tall n tɩ kɩs maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tʋmd tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogẽ wã. La d na n yãka d tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadl piig pʋɩɩre, n kõ Leevi buudã. Yaa Leevi buudã n tog n kẽng b toor zĩis nins fãa tõnd sẽn koodã n tɩ rees bõn-kãnga." 
Nehemiah10:39 Leevi buudã sã n yi n na n kẽng n tɩ rees piig pʋɩɩrã, bɩ a Aarõ buudã ned sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋd yãag bãmba, tɩ b yãk piig pʋɩɩrã piig pʋɩɩr n kɩs tɩ b wa ning tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogẽ wã, laogã bĩngr doog pʋga." 
Nehemiah10:40 Bala, Israyɛll nebã ne Leevi buudã tog n yãka b koodã, ne b reezẽ rã-paalgã ne kaamã piig pʋɩɩr n wa kɩs laogã bĩngr rotẽ. Yaa beenẽ la zĩ-sõngã teed be, leb n yaa beenẽ la maan-kʋʋdbã yalsd n maand b tʋʋmdã, la zag-noy gũudbã ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã bee beenẽ. Woto, tõnd ka na n bas d Wẽnnaamã roog ye." 
Nehemiah11:1 Nebã nanambsã wa n bee Zeruzalɛm. La neb nins sẽn ketã sʋka, b maana poeer n yãk ned a yembr neb piig sʋka, tɩ b tɩ zĩnd Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa tẽn-sõngã pʋgẽ, la neb a wɛ wã sẽn ketã, tõe n tɩ zĩnda tẽms a taabã pʋse." 
Nehemiah11:2 Dẽ, nebã ninga neb nins fãa sẽn sak ne yamleoog n na n tɩ zĩnd Zeruzalɛmã zut barka." 
Nehemiah11:3 Woto yaa tẽngã nanambs nins sẽn kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Zeruzalɛmã. Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋga, ned kam fãa kẽng n tɩ zĩnda a meng zĩigẽ. La Israyɛll nebã, ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la Leevi buudã, ne Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã, la a Salmo tʋmtʋmdbã yagensã fãa kell n paa tẽngẽ wã." 
Nehemiah11:4 Baoosg zãnga, Zʋʋda ne Benzame buudã neb kẽer wa n zĩnda Zeruzalɛm. Zʋʋda yagensã sʋka, sẽn zĩnd-b beenẽ wã la woto: Yaa a Ataya sẽn yaa a Oozɩyaas biiga, t'a Oozɩyaas yaa a Zekarya biiga, t'a Zekarya yaa a Amarya biiga, t'a Amarya yaa a Sefatya biiga, t'a Sefatya yaa Mahalalell biiga, t'a Mahalalell yaa a Perɛɛz roogã neda." 
Nehemiah11:5 Sẽn paase, yaa a Maaseza yageng a Siloni sẽn yaa a Zakari biigã sẽn yaa a Yoyariib biigã sẽn yaa a Adaya biigã, sẽn yaa a Hazaya biigã, sẽn yaa a Kol-Hooza ne a Baruk biigã." 
Nehemiah11:6 A Perɛɛz yagensã fãa sẽn zĩnd Zeruzalɛmã sõor yaa gãndaad kobs-naas la pis-yoob la a nii. 
Nehemiah11:7 A Benzame buudã sʋk neb la woto: Yaa a Mesulam biig a Salu. A Mesulam yaa a Zoɛɛd biiga, la a Zoɛɛd yaa a Pedaya biiga, la a Pedaya yaa a Kolaya biiga, la a Kolaya yaa a Maseya biiga, la a Maseya yaa a Itiyɛll biiga, t'a Itiyɛll yaa a Ezayi biiga." 
Nehemiah11:8 Yẽnda zugẽ, yaa a Gabayi ne a Salayi. Dẽ, a Benzame buudã neb sõor yaa kobs-wɛ la pisi la a nii." 
Nehemiah11:9 Dag n yaa a Zikiri biig a Zowɛll n yaa bãmb naaba, t'a Senuwa biig a Zʋʋda yaa na-pʋgdg tẽngã pʋga." 
Nehemiah11:10 Maan-kʋʋdbã sʋka: Yaa a Yoyariib biig a Yedaya ne a Yakẽ," 
Nehemiah11:11 ne a Hilkiiza biig a Seraya, la a Hilkiiza yaa a Mesulam biiga, t'a Mesulam yaa a Sadok biiga, t'a Sadok yaa a Merayot biiga, t'a Merayot yaa a Akituub biiga. Yaa Akituub n dag n yaa Wẽnnaam doogã tʋʋmd taoor soaba." 
Nehemiah11:12 Bãmb saam-biisã sẽn dag n get Wẽnnaam doogã tʋʋm yellã sõor yaa neb kobs-nii la pisi la a yiibu. Dag n yaa a Malkiya biig a Pasewʋʋre, a Zakari biig a Amsi, a Pelaliya biig a Yeroham biig a Adaya." 
Nehemiah11:13 La yẽnda saam-biisã sẽn yaa b buudã nanambsã sõor yaa neb kobsi la pis-naas la a yiibu. Yaa a Azaryɛll biig a Amasayi, a Azaryɛll yaa a Hazayi biiga, la a Hazayi yaa a Mesilemot biiga, la a Mesilemot yaa a Imeer biiga." 
Nehemiah11:14 Bãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa gãndaadã sõor yaa koabg la pisi la a nii. A Gedolim biig a Zabdiyɛll n dag n yaa bãmb naaba. 
Nehemiah11:15 Leevi buudã neb sʋka: Yaa a Hasuub biig a Semaya, a Hasuub yaa a Aazrikam biiga, t'a Aazrikam yaa a Hasabiya biiga, t'a Hasabiya yaa a Buni biiga." 
Nehemiah11:16 Yaa a Sabtayi ne a Yozabaad la b yãk Leevi buudã nanambs sʋk n kɩt tɩ b get Wẽnnaam doogã yɩng tʋʋmã yelle. 
Nehemiah11:17 Yaa a Azaf yageng a Zabdi, a Zabdi yageng a Miise, a Miise yageng a Mataniya n dag n lʋɩt taoor n pʋt pẽgr yɩɩla, pʋʋsgã wakate, t'a Bakbukiya sẽn yaa Mataniya ba-biisã sʋk ned a yembrã ne a Abda n pʋgd n sõngd-a. A Abda yaa a Samuwa biiga, t'a Samuwa yaa a Galall biiga, t'a Galall yaa a Yedutun biiga." 
Nehemiah11:18 Leevi buudã neb sẽn be Zeruzalɛm tẽn-sõngã pʋgã sõor yaa kobsi la pis-nii la a naase. 
Nehemiah11:19 Ad tẽngã noy gũudbã: Yaa a Akuubi, a Talmone, ne b saam-biisã. Bãmb n dag n gũud tẽngã noyã. B sõorã yaa neb koabg la pis-yopoe la a yiibu." 
Nehemiah11:20 Sã n yaa ne Israyɛll neb nins sẽn ketã, maan-kʋʋdbã, ne Leevi buudã, rag n bee Zʋʋdã tẽmsã fãa pʋse, la ned kam fãa rag n be a soolmẽ." 
Nehemiah11:21 Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdbã rag n tɩ bee Zeruzalɛm tẽngã zĩig a yembr sẽn boond tɩ Ofɛllã. La rag n yaa a Siha ne a Gispa n yaa Wẽnnaam doogã tʋmtʋmdb taoor dãmba. 
Nehemiah11:22 Leevi buudã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã taoor soab yaa a Bani biig a Uuzi. A Bani yaa a Hakabiya biiga, t'a Hakabiya yaa a Mataniya biiga, la a Mataniya yaa a Miise biiga. Bãmb n yaa a Azaf yagense, n get yɩɩlã tʋʋmd yell Wẽnnaam doogã pʋga." 
Nehemiah11:23 Bala, rĩmã rag n yiisa tõog bãmb wɛɛngẽ, la ne no-tũuds yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã yĩnga, n wilgd b sẽn tog n maan b tʋʋmdã to-to daar fãa." 
Nehemiah11:24 A Mesezabɛll biig a Petahiya sẽn yaa a Zʋʋda buudã yageng a Zeera yagengã n dag n tʋmd Israyɛll nebã yʋʋr yĩnga, rĩmã na-yir pʋga." 
Nehemiah11:25 Zʋʋda buudã neb kẽer kẽng n tɩ zĩnda tẽn-kɩremse. Yaa Kiryat-Arba, ne a tẽn-bãooneg nins sẽn pẽ beenẽ wã, ne Dibõ ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Yekabzeyɛll ne a tẽn-kɩremsã," 
Nehemiah11:26 ne Yesuwa, Molaada, Bet-Pelɛte," 
Nehemiah11:27 Hazaar-Suwalle, Bɛɛr-Seba ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Nehemiah11:28 Siklaage, Mekona ne a tẽn-kɩremsã." 
Nehemiah11:29 Ɛn-Rimonde, Soreya, ne Yarmuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 n paas Zanoa, Adulam, ne a tẽn-kɩremsã. Leb n yaa Lakiis ne a tẽn-kɩremsã, la Azeka ne a tẽn-kɩremsã. Dẽ, bãmb tɩ zĩnda Bɛɛr-seba tẽngã goabg n tall n tɩ tãag Hinom longã sẽn be rɩtgã." 
Nehemiah11:31 Benzame buudã neb kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Geba, Mikmaase, Aya, Betɛll ne a tẽn-kɩremsã pʋsẽ." 
Nehemiah11:32 La b zĩnda Anatote, Noobe, Hananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazoore, Rama, Gitayim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadiidi, Seboyim, Nebalate," 
Nehemiah11:35 Loode, ne Ono ne nug-tʋʋm-dãmbã longã sẽnẽ." 
Nehemiah11:36 Leevi buudã neb kẽer yii Zʋʋda n kẽng n tɩ naag Benzame buudã soolmẽ. 
Nehemiah12:1 Maan-kʋʋdb nins ne Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn tũ a Seyaltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll ne a Zozoe n wa wã yʋy la woto: Yaa a Seraya, a Zeremi, a Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:1 Maan-kʋʋdb nins ne Leevi buudã neb nins sẽn tũ a Seyaltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll ne a Zozoe n wa wã yʋy la woto: Yaa a Seraya, a Zeremi, a Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:2 a Amariya, a Maluki, a Hatusi," 
Nehemiah12:3 a Sekaniya, a Rehum, a Meremote," 
Nehemiah12:4 a Yido, a Ginetoyi, a Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 a Miyamindi, a Maadya, a Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 a Semaya, a Zoyariibi, a Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 a Salu, a Amoke, a Hilkiiza ne a Yedaya. Yaa bãmb n dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmb ne b saam-biisã, a Zozoe wakatẽ." 
Nehemiah12:8 Leevi buudã sʋka, rag n yaa a Zozoe, a Binui, a Kadmiyɛlle, a Serebiya, a Zʋʋda, ne a Mataniya. A Mataniya ne yẽnda buudã neb rag n pʋtã Wẽnnaam waoogr yɩɩla," 
Nehemiah12:9 tɩ Leevi buudã neb a taabã, a Bakbukiya ne a Uni sẽn be bãmb taoor n tʋmdẽ wã reesdẽ." 
Nehemiah12:10 A Zozoe n dog a Yoyakim, t'a Yoyakim dog a Eliyasɩɩbe, t'a Eliyasɩɩb dog a Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 t'a Yoyada rog a Zonatã, t'a Zonatã rog a Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ad a Yoyakim wakatẽ kãsem-dãmbã sẽn dag n yaa maan-kʋʋdbã yʋya: A Seraya buudã ned yaa a Meraya, a Zeremi buudã ned yaa a Hananiya," 
Nehemiah12:13 a Ezra buudã ned yaa a Mesulam, a Amariya buudã ned yaa a Yohanande," 
Nehemiah12:13 a Ezra buudã ned yaa a Mesulam, a Amariya buudã ned yaa a Yohanande," 
Nehemiah12:14 a Meliku buudã ned yaa a Zonatã, a Sebaniya buudã ned yaa a Zozɛfe." 
Nehemiah12:15 A Harim buudã ned yaa a Adna, a Merayot buudã ned yaa a Hɛlkayi," 
Nehemiah12:16 a Ido buudã ned yaa a Zakari, a Gineton buudã ned yaa a Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:17 a Abiya buudã ned yaa a Zikri, a Minyamin ne a Moadya buudã ned yaa a Piltayi." 
Nehemiah12:18 A Bilga buudã ned yaa a Samuwa, a Semaya buudã ned yaa a Zonatã." 
Nehemiah12:19 A Yoyariib buudã ned yaa a Matenayi, a Yedaya buudã ned yaa a Uuzi," 
Nehemiah12:20 a Salayi buudã ned yaa a Kalayi, a Amok buudã ned yaa a Ebɛɛre." 
Nehemiah12:21 A Hilkiiza buudã ned yaa a Hakabiya, a Yedaya buudã ned yaa a Netaneyɛlle." 
Nehemiah12:22 Yaa Eliyasɩɩb ne a Yoyada, la a Yohanan ne a Yaduwa wakate, la b gʋls Leevi neb nins sẽn dag n yaa b buudã kãsem-dãmbã yʋy sõadg sebrã pʋga. La b kell n maana a woto me ne maan-kʋʋdbã, Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Daryuus zamaanẽ." 
Nehemiah12:23 B gʋlsa Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb yʋy kibay sebrã pʋga, hal n tɩ tãag a Eliyasɩɩb yageng a Yohanan wakate." 
Nehemiah12:24 Ad Leevi buudã kãsem-dãmb yʋya: A Hakabiya ne a Serebiya, la a Kadmiyɛll biig a Zozoe rãmb wakatã sã n gilg n ta, tɩ b segd n maan b tʋʋmd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, bãmb yalsda b saam-biisã taoor roog-roogo, n yɩɩnd n pẽgd la b waoogd Wẽnnaam, wa Wẽnnaam dao a Davɩɩd sẽn dag n kõ noorã to-to wã." 
Nehemiah12:25 Tẽngã rignoy gũudbã, a Mataniya, ne a Bakbukiya, la a Obadiya, ne a Mesulam, la a Talmon ne a Akuub rag n yaa gũudb n gũud Wẽnnaam doogã rignoyã." 
Nehemiah12:26 Bãmb zĩnda a Zozoe biig a Yoyakim sẽn yaa a Yosadak yagengã zamaanẽ, ne Gʋvɛrneer a Neemi ne Maan-kʋʋd a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa gʋlsdã zamaanẽ." 
Nehemiah12:27 B sẽn wa n dat n ning Zeruzalɛm lalgã barkã, b kɩtame tɩ Leevi buudã fãa yi zĩis nins fãa b sẽn be wã n wa. La b maana tig-kãseng n maan sũ-noog wʋsgo, n na n wilg tɩ tʋʋmdã maan n sɛɛme. La b yɩɩla pẽgre, la waoogr yɩɩl ne kɛma, la kʋla, ne pendse." 
Nehemiah12:28 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã tigma taab Zeruzalɛm. Bãmb yii tẽn-kɩremsã b sẽn me n gilg Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, wall sẽn pẽ Netofa tẽngã n wa." 
Nehemiah12:29 Bãmb leb n yii Bɛt-Gilgalle, ne Geba soolmẽ wã, ne Azmavɛt soolmã sẽn gilg Zeruzalɛmã n wa." 
Nehemiah12:30 Dẽ, Maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã yɩlga b mense, la b kɩt tɩ nebã me yɩlg b mense. Rẽ zugẽ, b yɩlga tẽngã noy ne a lalsã." 
Nehemiah12:31 Mam kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda nanambsã rʋ lalgã. Dẽ, mam welg-b-la yɩɩn-yɩɩndb sul-bɛd a yiibu. Pipi sullã kẽnga rɩtg lalgã zugu, n teesd tẽngã noor sẽn boond tɩ tãmpʋʋr noorã." 
Nehemiah12:32 La a Ooze ne Zʋʋda nanambsã pʋɩ-sʋk n dag n pʋgd bãmb poore," 
Nehemiah12:33 la sẽn paas yaa a Azariya, a Ezra, a Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:33 la sẽn paas yaa a Azariya, a Ezra, a Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 a Zʋʋda, a Benzame, a Semaya ne a Zeremi." 
Nehemiah12:35 Maan-kʋʋdb n dag n be beenẽ n zãad tãntãado. Yaa a Zonatã biig a Zakari. A Zonatã yaa a Semaya biiga, t'a Semaya yaa a Mataniya biiga, t'a Mataniya yaa a Miise biiga, la a Miise yaa a Zakʋʋr biiga, t'a Zakʋʋr yaa a Azaf biiga." 
Nehemiah12:36 Neb nins sẽn dag n be ne a Zakari wã, yaa a Semaya, a Azarɛlle, a Milalayi, a Gilalayi, a Maayi, a Netaneyɛlle, a Zʋʋda, ne a Hanani. Yaa bãmb n dag n zãad Wẽnnaam dao a Davɩɩd yʋʋm-teedã n pʋgda, t'a Ɛsdraas sẽn yaa gʋlsdã be taoore." 
Nehemiah12:37 Bãmb sẽn wa n ta ko-budum noorã, b tũu lalgã rʋʋdgã n dʋ n ta rĩm a Davɩɩd doogã sẽn be koom noorã sẽnẽ n teesd Zeruzalɛm tẽngã yaangã." 
Nehemiah12:38 La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sul a yiibẽ soabã kẽnga goabga. Dẽ, maam ne nebã pʋɩ-sʋkã kell n paa poorẽ lalgã zug n pʋgda. Tõnd looga wʋmsã gãosgã sɛɛgẽ, n kẽng n ta Lal-taokẽ wã." 
Nehemiah12:39 Dẽ, tõnd kell n kẽng n looga Efrayiim noorã zugẽ, n tɩ ta Yesana noorã ne zĩm noorã. La tõnd looga a Hananeyɛll gãosgã ne neb koabg gãosgã, n loog piisã noore. La tõnd tɩ yalsa gũudbã noore." 
Nehemiah12:40 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sul a yiibã yalsa Wẽnnaam doogã pʋga. La maam ne nanambs nins sẽn be ne maamã me yalsame. 
Nehemiah12:41 Maan-kʋʋdbã, a Eliyakim ne a Maseya, la a Minyamin, ne a Miise la a Eliyohenayi, ne a Zakari, ne a Hanani peeba tãntãadã." 
Nehemiah12:42 La a Maseya, a Semaya, a Eliyazaare, a Uuzi, a Yohanande, a Malkiya, a Elam ne a Ezɛɛr rag n naaga be. La yɩɩla naab a Yiizraya n dag n kɩtd tɩ yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã pʋt yɩɩlã tɩ sãta." 
Nehemiah12:43 Badaare, nebã maana maand wʋsg n kɩdem ne sũ-noogo. Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam dag n kõ-b-la sũ-no-kãsenga. La Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgẽ, pagbã ne kambã sũy rag n yaa noog tɩ b kɩdemdẽ, hal tɩ bʋrgã zẽkdẽ, tɩ ned sã n be hal zĩ-zãrgẽ bɩ a wʋmdẽ." 
Nehemiah12:44 Wakat-kãnga, b yãka neb sẽn na n gũ rot nins b sẽn bĩngd dẽenem biis kũunã, ne piig pʋɩɩrã, la tẽngã bõn-koaadlã biis piig pʋɩɩrã. Nin-bãmb dag n tog n deegda kũun nins fãa tõogã sẽn yeel tɩ b yãk n tall n wa wã, n bĩngd beenẽ n gũudẽ. La kũun-kãens yaa maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã n so. Yaa pʋtã sẽn gũbg tẽmsã bõn-koaadl dẽenem biisi. La Zʋʋda nebã fãa sũur yɩɩ noog ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la ne Leevi nebã sẽn maand tʋʋmdã." 
Nehemiah12:45 Bãmb dag n geta b Wẽnnaamã tʋʋmd yelle, la b maand yɩlgrã tʋʋmde. La yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã ne tẽngã noy gũudbã me rag n maanda b tʋʋmd wa rĩm a Davɩɩd ne a biig a Salmo sẽn dag n kõ noor ningã." 
Nehemiah12:46 Sɩd me, pĩnd-pĩndã, dĩm a Davɩɩd ne yɩɩlã naab a Azaf wakatẽ wã, rag n yaa yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã taoor-dãmb n lʋɩt taoore, tɩ b yɩɩnd n pẽgd Wẽnnaam la b pʋʋsd-b barka." 
Nehemiah12:47 A Zorobabɛll ne a Neemi wakatẽ wã, Israyɛll nebã fãa yãkda b paoongã n kõt yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã ne tẽngã noy gũudbã wa sẽn zems sẽn tog maan daar fãa wã. La Israyɛll nebã rag n leb n yãkda b kũun me n kõt Leevi nebã, tɩ bãmb me reege, la b yãk kũun sẽn welg toorã n kõ a Aarõ yagensã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã." 
Nehemiah13:1 Wakat-kãnga, daar a yembre, b karma a Moyiis tõodã sebr Israyɛll nebã taoore, la b wa n taa zĩig ning b sẽn gʋls n yeel tɩ: «Amo nebã ne Moaab nebã ka tog n naag Wẽnnaam nebã tiging pʋg ye.»" 
Nehemiah13:2 Bala, bãmb dag n ka seg Israyɛll nebã n kõ-b rɩɩb la koom ye. Sẽn paase, Amo nebã ne Moaab nebã rag n yao a Balaam ligd n yeel-a t'a kãab Israyɛll nebã wẽnga. La tõnd Wẽnnaamã teka kãab-wẽngã tɩ lebg barka." 
Nehemiah13:3 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã sẽn wʋm tõogã sẽn yeel woto wã, b yãka yam n na n welg sãamb nins fãa sẽn be bãmb buudã sʋkã toore." 
Nehemiah13:4 Sẽn deng wakat-kãnga, b rag n yãka maan-kʋʋd a Eliyasɩɩb t'a na n get tõnd Wẽnnaamã roog ro-bãoonegã yelle. La rogem n dag n be yẽnda ne a Tobiza sʋka." 
Nehemiah13:5 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ yẽnda kɩt tɩ b maneg ro-bedr n kõ a Tobiza. La hal tɩ ta sasa-kãnga, rag n yaa ro-kãng pʋg la b bĩngd bõn-koaadl kũunã, ne wisd kũunã, la Wẽnnaam doogã teedã, ne kũun ning b sẽn yãkd n kõt maan-kʋʋdbã, la koodã ne kaamã piig pʋɩɩrã sẽn yaa Leevi nebã ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã la tẽngã noy gũudbã rẽndã." 
Nehemiah13:6 La yel-bãmbã fãa maanegã wakate, tɩ mam dag n ka be Zeruzalɛm ye. Bala, mam dag n lebg n leba Babilond dĩm a Artagzɛrzɛɛs nengẽ, la rẽ tɩ yaa a sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiiblẽ. Wakat bilf sẽn paase, mam kosa rĩmã sore," 
Nehemiah13:7 n lebg n leb Zeruzalɛm. Dẽ, mam yãnda tʋʋm-wẽng ning a Eliyasɩɩb sẽn maanã, a sẽn dɩk roog sẽn be Wẽnnaam doogã zak pʋg n kõ a Tobiza wã yĩnga." 
Nehemiah13:8 Mam sũurã yika wʋsgo, la mam kɩtame tɩ b wʋk a Tobiza teed nins fãa sẽn be roogẽ wã n lob yɩng n bas roogã." 
Nehemiah13:9 Rẽ poore, mam kɩtame tɩ b yɩlg roogã, la mam lebsa Wẽnnaam doogã teedã sẽn yaa kũunã ne wisdã, n ning b zĩigẽ." 
Nehemiah13:10 B leb n togsa maam tɩ b ka kõt Leevi buudã nebã b maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã pʋɩɩr ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Leevi nebã ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã ned kam fãa zoe n lebg n leb a meng pʋtẽ. 
Nehemiah13:11 Dẽ, mam zaba nanambsã n yeel-b yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ b bas Wẽnnaam doogã n ka leb n get a yelle?» Rẽ zugẽ, mam lebg n tigma Leevi nebã ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã n kɩt tɩ b ned kam fãa leb n dɩk a tʋʋmde." 
Nehemiah13:12 Dẽ, Zʋʋda nebã fãa leb n sɩng n tallda koodã ne reezẽ rã-paalgã, la kaamã piig pʋɩɩr n wat n kõt laogã bĩngr rotẽ." 
Nehemiah13:13 Mam kõo noor tɩ b kɩt tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Selemiya, ne seb-gʋnd a Sadoke, la Leevi nebã ned a Pedaya get laogã bĩngr rotã yelle, la ned ning sẽn na n sõngd bãmb yaa a Mataniya biig a Zakʋʋr biig a Hanan. Bala, b kɩta kaset tɩ b yaa pʋ-peelem-dãmba. Rag n bee bãmb zug tɩ b lʋɩ taoore, n pʋɩt b saam-biisã kũunã." 
Nehemiah13:14 Dẽ wã, mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y mam yell bõn-kãng yĩnga! La y ra yĩm mam sẽn tʋm mam Wẽnnaamã roog yĩng ne pʋ-peelmã, la m sẽn lebs yãmb waoogrã a zĩigẽ wã yell ye." 
Nehemiah13:15 Wakat-kãnga, mam yãnda Zʋʋda neb tɩ b wẽkd b reezẽ tɩɩs biis koom vʋʋsg daare, tɩ neb kẽer wʋkd b koodo, la b zɩlgd b bõens reezẽ rãam, ne b reezẽ tɩɩs biisi, la kankamã, ne zɩɩb buud toor-toore, n dat n tall n kẽng Zeruzalɛm vʋʋsg daarã. La mam zaba bãmb n yeel-b tɩ b ra koos b koosmã vʋʋsg daarã ye." 
Nehemiah13:16 La Tɩɩr tẽng nebã sẽn dag n be Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋgã rag n wata ne zĩma, la koosem buud a taaba, n na n koos ne Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã vʋʋsg daarã." 
Nehemiah13:17 Dẽ, mam zaba Zʋʋda nanambsã n yeel-b yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb maand tʋʋm-wẽns a woto n paoogd vʋʋsg daarã?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Yãmb yaab-rãmbã me maana a woto, n kɩt tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã sɩbg tõndo, n bas tɩ to-kãensã fãa paam tõnd ne d tẽngã. Rẽ wã, yãmb sẽn paoog vʋʋsg daarã yĩnga, yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ Wẽnnaam sũurã puug wʋsg ne Israyɛll nebã n paase.»" 
Nehemiah13:19 Dẽ, mam kõo noor n yeel tɩ vʋʋsg daarã ket tɩ beoogo, wĩndgã sẽn wat n dat n kẽ, bɩ b pag Zeruzalɛm tẽngã noyã, la b ra pak-b tɩ sã n ka vʋʋsg daarã n loog ye. Dẽ, mam yãka m tʋmtʋmdbã neb kẽer n ning tẽngã noyã, tɩ b tõe n gɩdg tɩ ned ra tall koosem vʋʋsg daarã n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ ye." 
Nehemiah13:20 Dẽ, sẽn yɩɩd vugr bɩ naoor a yiibu, lɛɛbdã buud toor-toorã paa Zeruzalɛm lalgã poor n gãand vʋʋsg daarã yĩnga." 
Nehemiah13:21 Dẽ, mam keooga bãmb n yeele: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb wat n gãe lalgã poor vʋʋsg daarã? Yãmb sã n leb n maan a buudu, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yõg yãmba.» La sẽn sɩng ne badaare, bãmb ka leb n wa beenẽ vʋʋsg daar ye." 
Nehemiah13:22 Dẽ, mam yeela Leevi nebã tɩ b yɩlg b mense, n kẽng n tɩ gũ tẽngã noyã, tɩ nebã tõe n waoog vʋʋsg daarã. Bõn-kãng yĩnga, mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y mam yelle, la y nonglem-kãsengã yĩnga, bɩ y zoe mam nimbãanega." 
Nehemiah13:23 Leb n yaa wakat-kãng me, la mam yã tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmb peeg Asdood ne Amo la Moaab nebã kom-pulgi, n maan b pagba." 
Nehemiah13:24 Bãmb kambã pʋɩ-sʋk gomda Asdood buudã goamã, la bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tol n wʋmd Zʋɩf-rãmbã buud goam ye. Yaa buud toay-toay goam bal la bãmb gomda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Mam zaba bãmb n kãab-b wẽnga. La mam tol n pãba bãmb sʋkã neb kẽere, n võ b zoobdã, la m kɩt tɩ b wẽen ne Wẽnnaam n yeel tɩ bãmb ka na n leb n dɩk b kom-pugli n kõ nin-bãmbã kom-dibli ye. La b ka na n leb n peeg nin-bãmbã kom-pugli wã n kõ b kom-dibli, wall y mens peeg n maan y pagb ye!" 
Nehemiah13:26 Rẽ yĩnga, ka yel-kãngã n kẽes Israyɛll dĩm a Salmo beegr pʋgẽ wã sɩda? Soolem-dãmb wʋsgã sʋka, soolem ba a yembr yaool n dag n ka be n tar dĩm sẽn yaa wa rĩm a Salmo ye. Yẽnda Wẽnnaamã rag n nong-a lame, n yãk-a t'a lebg Israyɛll nebã fãa rĩmã. Baoosgo, pʋg-sãamsã n tus yẽnda t'a lʋɩ yel-wẽnd pʋga!" 
Nehemiah13:27 Tõnd yaool n yãndame tɩ yãmb me maana yel-be-kẽeng-kãngã, n peeg pʋg-sãams n maan y pagba, n beeg tõnd Wẽnnaamã!" 
Nehemiah13:28 Mam diga a Yoyada biig a yembr n yiis Zeruzalɛm, yẽnda yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Eliyasɩɩb yagenga, n yaa Horon tẽng rao a Sãmbalat rɛɛmba!" 
Nehemiah13:29 Mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y b sẽn maanã yelle, bala, bãmb dẽgma maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã, la b rẽgem maan-kʋʋdbã ne Leevi buudã kaoolã!" 
Nehemiah13:30 Mam yiisa sãambã fãa bãmb sʋka, la m lebs maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmd n vigli, n lebs Leevi nebã b zĩigẽ, tɩ ned kam fãa maand a tʋʋmde." 
Nehemiah13:31 Mam lebs n vigla raad kũunã b sẽn tog n kõ wa sẽn zems a wakatã, ne dẽenem biis kũunã me. Mam Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y mam yelle, la y maan-m neere!" 
Esther1:1 Rag n yaa rĩm a Asiruus wakate. Yaa Asiruus ning sẽn dag n dɩt naam Ẽnd soolmã n tɩ tãag Kuus soolmã. Bãmb fãa yaa soolem-dãmb koabg la pisi la a yopoe. 
Esther1:2 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Asiruus zĩnda a naamã geer zug Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga," 
Esther1:3 la yẽnda sẽn deeg a naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, a maana tig-kãseng a nanambsã, ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa yĩnga, la Meed ne Pɛɛrs tãn-soben-dãmbã, la kãsem-dãmbã, la soolem toay-toayã fãa nanambs rag n tigma yẽnda taoore." 
Esther1:4 Woto, yẽnda rɩka rasem koabg la pis-nii, n na n wilg a rĩungã arzegse, la a ziirã, la yẽnda naamã pãng sẽn zẽk n taẽ." 
Esther1:5 La rasem-kãens loogr zugẽ, a Asiruus maana tigr rĩmã samandẽ rasem a yopoe, zẽedã zĩig pʋga, nebã buud fãa sẽn be Suuz na-tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, sã n yaa-b nanambse wall nin-talse." 
Esther1:6 Pɛɛl sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩsi, la lẽ gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo, la b rag n loe ne wĩy sẽn kal ne gĩs-miuugu, la pɛɛlga, n tui wanzuri kalembãens pʋgẽ, n yagl marbr ra-lugsi. La b rag n rɩgla zaoos sẽn yaa sãnem, la zaoos sẽn yaa wanzuri, zĩig sẽn gãneg ne porfiɩre, la marbre, la nakre, la marbr-sablg zugu." 
Esther1:7 B rag n ningda reezẽ rãamã sãnem laas buud toor-toor pʋse, n kõt nebã tɩ b yũuda. La rĩmã kõo reezẽ rãamã wʋsgo, wa rĩm sẽn tõe n kõ tɛka." 
Esther1:8 La ned kam fãa rag n yũuda wa a sẽn date, tɩ gɩdgr ka ye. Bala, rĩmã rag n kõ a na-yirã tʋmtʋmdbã noor tɩ b maan wa sẽn zems ned kam fãa ratem." 
Esther1:9 Rĩm-poak a Vasti me maana tigr rĩm a Asiruus zakẽ wã, pagbã fãa yĩnga." 
Esther1:10 Rasem a yopoe wã daare, rĩmã sẽn yũ reezẽ rãamã t'a sũurã yaa noogã, a boola a Mehuma, ne a Biizta, la a Harbona, ne a Bigta, la a Abagta, ne a Zetaare, la a Karkaas sẽn yaa sõgen-kãsems a yopoe nins sẽn be rĩm a Asiruus taoor n tʋmd yẽnda yĩngã." 
Esther1:11 Yẽnda yeel-b lame tɩ b tɩ tall rĩm-poak a Vasti ne a naam maanfã n wa rĩmã taoore, t'a tõe n wilg-a nebã ne a nanambsã fãa rĩm-poakã neerem sẽn yaa to-to. Bala, a Vasti sɩd dag n yaa neere." 
Esther1:12 La sõgen-kambã sẽn tɩ togs rĩm-poak a Vasti rĩmã sẽn yeel t'a maan bũmb ningã, a zãgsame t'a ka na n kẽng ye. Dẽ, rĩmã sũur yika wʋsgo, la yaa sũ-puug-kãsenga." 
Esther1:13 Rĩmã goma ne yam dãmbã sẽn mi wakatã yɛlã, bala, rĩmã yɛl fãa pʋgẽ, a rag n sokda neb nins sẽn mi tõogã ne bʋʋdã fãa yɛlã võore." 
Esther1:14 La sẽn dag n pẽ-b naabã, yaa a Karkena, ne a Setaare, la a Admata, ne a Tarsɩɩse, la a Merɛɛse, ne a Marsena, la a Memukan. Bãmb yaa Meed ne Pɛrs nanambs a yopoe nins sẽn be soolmã taoor n yaa rĩmã kug-zĩidbã." 
Esther1:15 Rĩmã sokame yaa: «Mam na n yãka tõ-bʋgo, rĩm-poak a Vasti sẽn zãgs t'a ka na n sak n maan wa maam a rĩmã sẽn tʋm m sõgen-kãsemsã tɩ b tɩ yeel-a wã wɛɛngẽ?»" 
Esther1:16 Dẽ, a Memukã yeela rĩmã ne a nanambsã taoor yaa: «Rĩm-poak a Vasti beegrã ka ne rĩmã bal ye, la yaa ne rĩmã nanambsã me, la ne neb nins fãa sẽn be rĩm a Asiruus soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋsã.»" 
Esther1:17 Bala, rĩm-poakã sẽn tall yel-manesem ningã na n saag n taa pagbã fãa, la b sã n wʋm tɩ b gomd tɩ rĩm a Asiruus yeelame tɩ b tɩ tall rĩm-poak a Vasti n wa yẽnda taoor t'a zãgse, pagbã na n kõ b mens bʋʋm n sɩng n paoogd b sɩdbã." 
Esther1:18 Moasã, Pɛrs-rãmbã la Meed nanambsã pagb na n wʋma rĩm-poakã sẽn zãgsã kibare, la bãmb na n yikame kɩɩsd b sɩdbã noore. La pagbã paoogrã na n waa ne raopã sũ-yikri." 
Esther1:19 Sã n mikame tɩ taa rĩmã yam, bɩ b yãk tõog sẽn ka tõe n viigi, n wilgd tɩ rĩm-poak a Vasti kõn tol n leb n wa rĩm a Asiruus taoor yɛs ye. La rĩmã na n dɩka a Vasti naamã n kõ pag a to sẽn são yẽnda. La b kɩt tɩ b gʋls tõ-kãngã Meed ne Pɛrs-rãmbã tõogã sebr pʋgẽ." 
Esther1:20 La soolmã nebã fãa sã n wa wʋm tõog ning rĩmã sẽn yãk n kɩt tɩ b moon soolmã fãa pʋgã, soolmã me la sẽn sɩd yalma la. Dẽ, sẽn sɩng ne nanambsã, n tɩ tãag nin-talsã pagbã fãa na n waooga b sɩdbã." 
Esther1:21 La gom-kãngã taa rĩmã ne a nanambsã yam, la rĩmã maana wa a Memukan sẽn yeelã." 
Esther1:22 Rĩmã kɩtame tɩ b gʋls sɛb n tʋm yẽnda soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse. La b gʋlsa sɛbã wa sẽn zems soolem fãa ne a gʋlsem, la wa sẽn zems buud fãa ne a goamã. La yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ rao fãa tall noor ne a zaka, la a kɩt tɩ b gom b buudã goamã." 
Esther2:1 Yel-kãens loogr zugẽ, rĩm a Asiruus sũurã sẽn n wa n sigi, yẽnda tẽega a Vasti yellã, ne bũmb ning yẽnda sẽn dag n maanã, la b sẽn dag n maan yam-yãkr ning a Vasti wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Esther2:2 Rĩmã sõgen-kambã yeela rĩmã yaa: «Bɩ b bao pʋg-sadb sẽn ka mi raopa, la sẽn yaa neeba, n wa kõ rĩmã.»" 
Esther2:3 Bɩ rĩmã yãk neb b soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse, tɩ b tigs pʋg-sadb sẽn ka mi raopa, la sẽn yaa neeba, n tall n wa Suuz na-tẽngã na-pagb zak pʋga. La bɩ b rɩk bãmb n kõ a Hegayi sẽn yaa rĩmã sõgen-kãseng ning sẽn get-a pagbã yellã, t'a ges b yell n kõ b ka-zɛɛdem buud toay-toay tɩ b maneg b mense." 
Esther2:4 La bi-pugl ning sẽn na n ta rĩmã yam, n na n deeg a Vasti zĩig n lebg rĩm-poaka. Gom-kãng yɩɩ rĩmã noogo, la a maana wa b sẽn yeelã." 
Esther2:5 Zʋɩf a yembr n dag n be Suuz na-tẽngã pʋg t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Mardoose, n yaa a Yayɩɩr biiga, a Yayɩɩr yaa a Sɩmeyi biiga, t'a Sɩme yaa a Kɩɩs biiga, yẽnda yaa Benzame buudã neda." 
Esther2:6 La yẽnda rag n naaga neb nins Babilond rĩm a Nebukatnetzaar sẽn dag n yõg n naag ne Zʋʋda naab a Yekoniya n yiis Zeruzalɛm n tall n wa Babilondã. 
Esther2:7 A Mardoose rag n deega a baaba bilã biig a Adasa b sẽn boond t'a Ɛstɛɛrã n zãada. Bala, a Ɛstɛɛr ba wã ne a ma wã rag n kiime. La pʋg-sadã rag n yaa neer hal wʋsgo." 
Esther2:8 B sẽn moon rĩmã noor tɩ nebã fãa wʋma, b tigma pʋg-sadb wʋsg Suuz na-tẽnga pʋg n ning a Hegayi nugẽ. Dẽ, b talla a Ɛstɛɛr me n kẽng rĩmã zakẽ n tɩ ning a Hegayi sẽn yaa pagbã gũudã nugẽ." 
Esther2:9 La pʋg-sadã rag n taa a Hegayi yam t'a paam t'a na n maan-a neere. Dẽ, a Hegayi yɩɩ tao-tao n kõ a Ɛstɛɛr ka-zɛɛdem nins yẽnda sẽn na n tall n maneg a mengã, la rɩɩb nins a sẽn tog n dɩ wã. La a yãk tʋmtʋmd-pogs a yopoe na-yirã tʋmtʋmd-pogs nins sẽn mi-b tʋʋmd sõama n yɩɩdã sʋka, n kõ a Ɛstɛɛre. La a talla ne a tʋmtʋmd-pogsã, n tɩ kẽes rot nins sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩd na-yirã pagb zak pʋgẽ wã." 
Esther2:10 A Ɛstɛɛr ka maan tɩ b bãng yẽnda roagdbã, la yẽnda sẽn yaa buud ning ye. Bala, a Mardoose rag n gɩdga yẽnda t'a ra togs bõn-kãens ye." 
Esther2:11 La daar fãa, a Mardoose rag n kẽnda pagbã zak sɛɛga, n sokd n na n bãng a Ɛstɛɛr keelem, la b sẽn n get a yell to-to." 
Esther2:12 Pʋg-sad fãa rag n tog n maana kiuug piig la yiibu, n yaool n kẽng rĩm a Asiruus nengẽ, wala sẽn zems b sẽn kõ noor ning pagbã wɛɛngẽ wã. B rag n dɩkda kiuug a yoob n zɛ miir kaam. La b rɩk kiuug a yoobe, n sõ parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ne pagb ka-zɛɛdem buud toor-toore." 
Esther2:13 La pʋg-sad ning fãa sẽn na n yi pagbã zakẽ n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ, b kõt-a-la bũmb ning fãa a sẽn date, t'a zã n kẽng na-zakẽ wã." 
Esther2:14 Yẽnda rag n kẽngda zaabre, la beoog sã n vẽege, yẽnda yitame n kẽ pagbã zak a yiibẽ soabã pʋga, la yaa a Saasgaaz sẽn yaa rĩmã sõgen ning sẽn geta rĩmã pʋg-rɩkdsã yellã nengẽ. La yẽnda ka lebd n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ, tɩ sã n ka rĩmã n wa n dat-a, n pʋd a yʋʋrã n kɩt tɩ b bool-a ye." 
Esther2:15 A Mardoose baaba bil a Abisayɩll bi-pugl a Ɛstɛɛre, yẽnda sẽn dag n deeg n wubdã wakat sẽn ta, t'a tog n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ wã, a ka kos baa fɩ, n zʋʋg sõgen-kãseng a Hegayi sẽn get-a pagbã yellã sẽn wilg yẽnda bũmb ningã ye. La ned ning fãa sẽn dag n yãnd a Ɛstɛɛre, a sũur noomã ne-a." 
Esther2:16 Yaa Rĩm a Asiruus sẽn deeg-a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-yopoɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig la a yiib soabã sẽn yaa Tebɛt kiuugã pʋgẽ, la b peeg a Ɛstɛɛr n kẽng na-zakẽ wã." 
Esther2:17 A Ɛstɛɛr la rĩmã wa n tɩ nong n yɩɩd pagb a taabã fãa, la rĩmã sũur dag n nooma ne a Ɛstɛɛre, n yɩɩd pʋg-sadb a taab nins fãa sẽn ka mi raoã. Dẽ, rĩmã rɩka naam maanf n fõgen a Ɛstɛɛre, n kɩt t'a lebg rĩm-poak n deeg a Vasti zĩiga." 
Esther2:18 Rĩmã maana tig-kãseng a nanambsã ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa yĩnga, n na n waoog a Ɛstɛɛre. La yẽnda kõ a soolem-dãmbã fãa vʋʋsgo, la a kõ kũun wʋsg wa sẽn zems rĩm sẽn tõe n kõ tɛka." 
Esther2:19 B sẽn wa n na n leb n tigim pʋg-sadb nins sẽn ka mi raoã naoor a yiibẽ soabã, rẽ t'a Mardoose rag n zĩi rĩmã zak noore." 
Esther2:20 A Ɛstɛɛr kell n ka maan tɩ b bãng yẽnda roagdbã, ne yẽnda sẽn yaa buud ninga, wa a Mardoose sẽn dag n yeel yẽndã wã. Bala, yẽnda rag n sakda a Mardoose wa wakat ning yẽnda sẽn da ket n be a Mardoose nengẽ wã." 
Esther2:21 Wakat ning a Mardoose sẽn wa zĩ rĩmã zak noorã, a Bigtã, ne a Terɛɛs sẽn yaa rĩmã sõgen-kãsems nins sẽn gũud-b rignoor ning sẽn kẽed-a rĩmã ro-gãasẽ wã, yẽsa ne taab n dat n kʋ rĩm a Asiruusi, bãmb sũurã sẽn yik ne rĩmã yĩnga." 
Esther2:22 La a Mardoose bãnga yel-kãnga, n tɩ wilg rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛre, t'a Ɛstɛɛr rɩk yellã n tɩ togs rĩmã, la a wilg tɩ yaa a Mardoose n togse." 
Esther2:23 La b sẽn vɛɛs n mik tɩ yellã yaa sɩdã, b luula sõgen-bãmb yiibã da-lugds zutu. La b gʋlsa bõn-kãng soolmã kibay sebr pʋgẽ rĩmã taoore." 
Esther3:1 Yel-kãens fãa loogr zugẽ, rĩm a Asiruus waooga Agaag ned a Hamedata biig a Haman n zẽk-a ne waoogr n kɩt t'a naamã yɩɩg a nanamb-taasã fãa." 
Esther3:2 La rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb nins fãa sẽn dag n be rĩmã zak noorã, rag n yĩgimdidame n wõgemd a Haman taoor n waoogd-a. Rĩmã n dag n kõ noor tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn yãnd a Haman, a tog n wõgemd n waoog-a lame. La a Mardoose ka sak n na n yĩgimdi, wall a wõgemd a Haman taoor ye." 
Esther3:3 Rĩmã zaka tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn dag n zĩ Rĩmã rignoorã yeela a Mardoose yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ fo kɩɩsd rĩmã noore?» 
Esther3:4 La daar fãa bãmb da gomda ne a Mardoose, la yẽnda ra ka kelgd-b ye. Bala, yẽnda ra yetame t'a yaa Zʋɩfe. La bãmb tɩ togsa a Haman n na n gese, a Mardoose sẽn yeel tɩ yẽnda yaa zʋɩfã, a na n kell n talla a pĩnd yel-manesmã bɩ?" 
Esther3:5 A Haman sẽn sɩd mik t'a Mardoose ka yĩgimdidã, la a ka wõgemded me n waoog yẽnda wã, a sũurã yika hal wʋsgo." 
Esther3:6 La Haman gesame tɩ yẽnda sã n kʋ a Mardoose a yembre, yaa zaalem ne yẽnda. Bala, b rag n wilga yẽnda, a Mardoose sẽn yaa buud ning neda. Dẽ, yẽnda yãka yam n baood n sãam a Mardoose nebã fãa sẽn yaa zʋɩf-rãmbã buudã, sẽn be rĩm a Asiruus soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋsã." 
Esther3:7 Rĩm a Asiruus sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la yiiblẽ soabã, pipi kiuugã sẽn yaa Nisã kiuugã pʋgẽ wã, a Haman kɩtame tɩ b maan poeere, daar fãa zugu, sẽn sɩng ne pipi kiuugã n tɩ tãag kiuug piig la yiibẽ soabã sẽn yaa Adaar kiuugã, n dat n bãng daar ninga, wall kiuug ning sẽn zems ne yẽnda sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã." 
Esther3:8 Dẽ, a Haman yeela rĩm a Asiruus yaa: «N'na! Buud sẽn yaa toor n sãeeg n be yãmb soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse, la bãmb tõodã welgda bãmb ne buud a taabã, la bãmb ka sakd rĩmã tõog ye.» Dẽ wã, yãmb sã n bas nin-kãensã tɩ b zĩ ne bãane, ka tar yõod ne yãmb ye." 
Esther3:9 A sã n taa rĩmã yam, bɩ b yãk tõog n kɩt tɩ b sãam-ba. La mam na n sõda Talã ligd tus-piig n ning rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn n get-b soolmã nugẽ, tɩ b tɩ ning rĩmã laog bĩngr zĩigẽ." 
Esther3:10 Dẽ, rĩmã pidga a nugbĩngã sẽn yaa nug-tikr bãndã, n kõ Agaag ned a Hamedata biig a Haman sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã bɛ wã." 
Esther3:11 Rĩmã yeela a Haman yaa: «Mam basda ligdã ne nebã fãa fo nugẽ. Bɩ f maan bãmb wa fo sẽn date.» 
Esther3:12 Dẽ, pipi kiuugã rasem piig la tãabã daare, b boola rĩmã sɛb-gʋndbã tɩ b wa. La b gʋlsa a Haman sẽn yãk noor ningã fãa sɛb pʋsẽ, n na n kõ rĩmã kombɛɛmbã, nanambsã, la soolem toay-toayã gʋvɛrneer dãmbã, la buud toay-toayã nanambse. Soolem fãa ne a gʋlsem, la buud fãa me ne a goamã, la b gʋlsa rĩm a Asiruus yʋʋr yĩnga, n ning rĩmã nug-tikr bãnde." 
Esther3:13 La b tʋma seb-kɩtbã ne sɛbã, tɩ b saag soolem toay-toayã fãa pʋsẽ n kɩse: sɛbã rag n kõta noor tɩ b sãam Zʋɩf-rãmbã, n kʋ-ba, la b menes-b zãnga. B kom-bɩɩse, b nin-kẽemba, la pagbã ne kambã fãa, la b zɛ b paoongã. Sãoongã tog n yɩɩ daar a yembr pʋgẽ, yaa kiuug piig la yiib soabã sẽn yaa Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la tãabã daare." 
Esther3:14 La soolem fãa rag n tara noor ning b sẽn yãkã sebre, n tog n moon tɩ nebã fãa wʋm la b segl b mens ra-kãens yĩnga." 
Esther3:15 Rĩmã kõo sɛb-kɩtbã noor tɩ b yi tao-tao n looge. La b moona noor ning b sẽn yãkã Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga. Dẽ, rĩmã ne a Haman rag n zĩime n yũuda, tɩ Suuz na-tẽngã be sũ-sãang pʋga." 
Esther4:1 A Mardoose sẽn wʋm bũmb ning fãa sẽn maanã, yẽnda pãrsa a futã n yeelg boto, n yug a meng tompeglem n na n kẽng tẽngã pʋgẽ, la yẽnda rag n zẽka a koɛɛg n wiisd ne sũ-toogo." 
Esther4:2 La yẽnda kolga rĩmã rignoor n yalse, bala, ned rag n ka segd n yeelg bot n tũ rĩm rignoorã n kẽ ye." 
Esther4:3 Soolem nins fãa pʋs rĩmã sẽn yãk noor ne bũmb ningã sẽn ta, a yɩɩ sũ-sãan-kãseng Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋka. B rag n loeta noore, n yãbd n wiisdẽ. Neb wʋsg rag n gãee bot zutu, la tompeglem pʋga." 
Esther4:4 A Ɛstɛɛr tʋmtʋmd-pogsã ne a zu-soben-dãmbã wa n togsa yẽnda bõn-kãnga, la rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr sũurã sãama wʋsgo. A Ɛstɛɛr kɩsa fut tɩ b tɩ kõ a Mardoose t'a yeeg a botã la a yeelge, la a Mardoose zãgsame." 
Esther4:5 Dẽ, a Ɛstɛɛr kɩtame tɩ b bool a Hatak sẽn yaa zu-soab ning rĩmã sẽn dag n yãk t'a get a Ɛstɛɛr tʋʋmã yellã, n tʋma t'a tɩ sok a Mardoose n gese, yaa bõe yelle, la bõe yĩng tɩ yẽnda maand woto." 
Esther4:6 A Hatak yi n kẽnga a Mardoose nengẽ, zĩig ning nebã sẽn segd taab n sõsdã sẽn tees rĩmã rignoorã." 
Esther4:7 Dẽ, Mardoose togsa yẽnda bũmb ning fãa sẽn paam yẽnda wã, la ligd ning sõor a Haman sẽn kãab t'a na n waa ne tɩ b ning rĩmã ligd-bĩngr roogẽ wã, Zʋɩf-rãmbã sãoongã yĩngã." 
Esther4:8 La yẽnda rɩka rĩmã sẽn yãk noor ning Zʋɩf-rãmbã sãoong wɛɛngẽ wã, b sẽn moon Suuz na-tẽngã pʋgẽ wã sebr n kõ a Hatak t'a tɩ wilg a Ɛstɛɛre, la a togs-a yellã, n yeel-a t'a kẽng rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yõk rĩmã sɛɛg n bõos-a sõngr a buudã yĩnga." 
Esther4:9 A Hatak wa n togsa a Ɛstɛɛr a Mardoose sẽn yeel yẽnda bũmb ningã. 
Esther4:10 A Ɛstɛɛr yeela a Hatak t'a tɩ togs a Mardoose yaa: 
Esther4:11 «Rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã ne nebã fãa sẽn be soolem toay-toayã fãa pʋsẽ wã miime tɩ tõog n be, la tõ-kãng yaa ned buud fãa yĩnga, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n kẽng-a rĩmã nengẽ tɩ ka rĩmã n bool a soaba, nin-kãng tog n kiime, sã n yaa raoa wall paga. La yaa ned ning rĩmã sẽn na n dɩk a sãnem dasaarã n teesã n na n vɩɩmde. La sẽn kẽed mam wɛɛngẽ, yaa rasem pis-tã la woto, rĩmã sẽn ka bool maam tɩ m wa b nengẽ ye.»" 
Esther4:12 La b kẽng n tɩ togsa a Mardoose a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn yeel bũmb ningã. 
Esther4:13 Dẽ, a Mardoose tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Ra tags tɩ yaa foom f yembr n na n põs Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋka, fo sẽn be rĩmã zakẽ wã yĩng ye." 
Esther4:14 Bala, fo sã n sĩnd f noor yel-kãngã pʋga, Zʋɩf-rãmbã yolsg ne b fãagrã na n yii zĩig a to n wa, la foom ne f ba wã zak-rãmb na n sãama zãnga. Sẽn paase, ãnda n mi sã n ka yell a woto yĩng la fo sẽn lebg rĩm-poakã.»" 
Esther4:15 A Ɛstɛɛr tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Mardoose yaa: 
Esther4:16 «Kẽng-y n tigm-y Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn be Suuz na-tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, tɩ y loe noor mam yĩnga, n da rɩ rɩɩbo, la y ra yũ koom, wĩndg la yʋng hal tɩ ta rasem a tãabo. La maam ne m tʋmtʋmd-pogsã me na n loee noor wa yãmba. Dẽ poore, mam na n kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ, baa ne tõogã sẽn gɩdgã. Ba sã n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ mam ki, mam na n kiime.»" 
Esther4:17 Dẽ, a Mardoose kẽngame n tɩ maan bũmbã fãa wa sẽn zems a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn yeelã kɛpɩ-kɛpɩ." 
Esther5:1 La rasem a tãabã daar sẽn ta, a Ɛstɛɛr yeelga a naamã fut n kẽ rĩmã na-yirã pʋgẽ zakã pʋga, n yals na-roogã noore. Wakat-kãnga, rĩmã rag n zao a naamã geer zug na-roogã pʋga, t'a nengã tees rignoorã." 
Esther5:2 Wakat ning rĩmã sẽn yãnd rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn yas na-roogã noorã, a sũurã yɩɩ noog ne a Ɛstɛɛre. Dẽ, rĩmã rɩka a sãnem dasaarã a sẽn zãadã n tees a Ɛstɛɛre, la a Ɛstɛɛr kolgame n sɩɩs dasaarã." 
Esther5:3 Rĩmã soka a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛre, yaa bõe n tar foom? Fo rata bõe? Kose, baa sã n yaa mam soolmã pʋɩ-sʋka, fo na n paam-a lame.»" 
Esther5:4 A Ɛstɛɛr leoka rĩmã yaa: «N'na! Sã n taa yãmb yam, bɩ yãmb ne a Haman tũ taab n wa tigr ning mam sẽn segl yãmb yĩng rũndã wã.»" 
Esther5:5 Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame yaa: «Pẽdg-y-yã a Haman t'a sak n wa a Ɛstɛɛr boolgã.» La rĩmã ne a Haman tũu taab n kẽng tigr ning a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn seglã." 
Esther5:6 Bãmb sẽn wa n maand tigrã wakate, rĩmã soka a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Fo kosgã yaa bʋgo, kos tɩ f na n paamame. Wilg maam fo sẽn datã, baa sã n yaa mam soolmã pʋɩ-sʋka, fo na n paamame.»" 
Esther5:7 A Ɛstɛɛr leokame yaa: «Ad mam kosgã ne m datmã: 
Esther5:8 Sã n yaa tɩ rĩmã nonga maam, la b sã n na n sɩd leoka mam kosgã, n kõ maam m sẽn datã, bɩ rĩmã ne a Haman tũ taab n wa tigr ning mam sẽn na n segl yãmb yĩng beoogã, la m na yaool n leok rĩmã sokrã.»" 
Esther5:9 Badaare, a Haman yii rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr zakẽ wã ne kɩdengo, la sũ-noog wʋsgo. Yẽnda sẽn wa n ta rĩm rignoorẽ wã, a yãnda a Mardoose t'a zĩ zãongẽ wã. A Mardoose ka yiki, la a ka serg a zĩigẽ a Haman taoor ye. Dẽ, a Haman sũurã yika wʋsg ne a Mardoose." 
Esther5:10 La yẽnda tõog a sũurã n kuil a yiri, n kɩt tɩ b tɩ bool a zo-rãmbã ne a pag a Zerɛɛs tɩ b wa." 
Esther5:11 A Haman wilga bãmb yẽnda arzegsã sẽn yaa to-to, la a kambã sõore, la rĩmã sẽn zẽk yẽnda to-to n yɩɩd nanambs a taabã, ne rĩmã zakẽ tʋmtʋmdbã fãa wã." 
Esther5:12 A Haman yeel-b lame yaa: «Sẽn paase, rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr ka bool ned a to t'a tũ rĩmã n wa tigr ning yẽnda sẽn seglã ye, yaa maam m yembr bala.» La a yeel-b yaa: «Rĩm-poakã leb n boola maam tɩ m leb n tũ rĩmã n wa beoogo." 
Esther5:13 La yõwã fãa yaa zaalem mam yĩnga, mam sẽn ket n yãt Zʋɩf a Mardoose t'a zĩ rĩmã zak noorã.»" 
Esther5:14 Dẽ, yẽnda pag a Zerɛɛs ne a zo-rãmbã fãa yeela yẽnda yaa: «Bɩ f kɩt tɩ b maan da-lugdg ta zãntlmã ta kãntɩɩg pis-nu, la beoog yibeoogo, bɩ f kos rĩmã tɩ b kɩt tɩ b luul a Mardoose da-lugdgã zugu. Dẽ, fo tõe n tũu rĩmã n kẽng tigrã ne sũ-noogo.» La gomdã yɩ a Haman noogo, t'a kɩt tɩ b maan da-lugdgã." 
Esther6:1 Badaar yʋngo, rĩmã rag n ka tõe n gũs ye. Dẽ, a kɩtame tɩ b tall soolmã kibay sebrã n wa karemdẽ t'a kelgdẽ." 
Esther6:2 La b karma zĩig ning b sẽn gomd zu-soben-dãmb a yiibã, a Bigtã ne a Terɛɛs sẽn dag n yaa rĩmã rotã noy gũudbã sẽn dag n dat n kʋ rĩm a Asiruus t'a Mardoose vẽneg yellã n togsã." 
Esther6:3 Rĩmã sokame: «Bõe waoogr la b waoog a Mardoose yel-kãng yĩnga?» La rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã leokame: «B ka tol n maan bũmb baa fɩ n kõ-a ye.» 
Esther6:4 Dẽ, rĩmã sokame tɩ ãnda n be zakã pʋga. La mikame tɩ yaa a Haman sẽn dag n nan tat rĩmã pipi samandẽ wã, n dat n kos rĩmã tɩ b luul a Mardoose ra-ludg ning yẽnda sẽn luglã zugu." 
Esther6:5 Rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã yeela rĩmã yaa: «Yaa a Haman n be zakã pʋga.» Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame tɩ b kɩt t'a wa kẽ." 
Esther6:6 A Haman sẽn kẽ, rĩmã sok-a lame yaa: «Rĩmã sã n dat n waoog ned ne waoogr meng-menga, a tog n maana bõe n kõ a soaba?» La a Haman tagsa a sũurẽ a woto: «Yaa ãnda la rĩmã rat n waoog tɩ sã n ka maam.»" 
Esther6:7 Dẽ, a Haman leoka rĩmã yaa: «Ned rĩmã sẽn dat n waooge?»" 
Esther6:8 Bɩ b rɩk naam fuug rĩmã sẽn yeelge, la weef ning rĩmã sẽn zombdã tɩ maanf be a zugẽ wã." 
Esther6:9 La bɩ b kõ a soabã fuugã ne weefã, la b kɩt tɩ naab a yembr nanambsã sʋk zã futã, n tɩ yeelg rĩmã sẽn dat n waoog a soabã, la a zombg-a weefã, n lʋɩ a taoor n tall-a n kẽng tẽngã raasã noyã, la zĩis nins fãa nebã sẽn tigimd taabã, la a moondẽ n yetẽ: «Yaa woto la b maand ned ning rĩmã sẽn dat n waoogã.»" 
Esther6:10 Dẽ, rĩmã yeela a Haman yaa: «Bɩ f tall fuugã ne weefã n kẽng tao-tao n tɩ maan woto ne Zʋɩf a Mardoose sẽn zĩ rĩm dignoorẽ wã wa fo sẽn yeelã, la f ra sak tɩ bũmb ba a yembr paoog fo sẽn togsã fãa pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Esther6:11 Dẽ, a Haman rɩka fuugã n yeelga a Mardoose, n zombg-a weefã, n lʋɩ a taoor n saagd tẽngã n moondẽ n yetẽ: «Yaa woto la b maand ned ning rĩmã sẽn dat n waoogã.»" 
Esther6:12 A Mardoose lebgame n leb rĩmã dignoorẽ wã, la a Haman lebga tao-tao n kuil ne sũ-sãan-kãsenga, la a pila a zugã." 
Esther6:13 A Haman togsa a pag a Zerɛɛse, ne a zo-rãmbã bũmb ning sẽn paam yẽnda wã. La a zo-rãmbã ne a pag a Zerɛɛs yeela yẽnda yaa: «Sã n mikame tɩ Mardoose ning fo sẽn sɩng n paamd paoogr a nifẽ wã yaa zʋɩfe, fo ka na n tõog-a ye. Fo na n konga zãng yẽnda taoore.»" 
Esther6:14 Bãmb sẽn nan ket n gomd ne a Haman bal yee, la rĩmã tʋmtʋmdb sẽn be waoongẽ, n tall a Haman tao-tao n kẽng tigr ning rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn maanã." 
Esther7:1 Rĩmã ne a Haman kẽngame n na n tɩ rɩ tigrã ne rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛre. 
Esther7:2 La rasem a yiibẽ soab-kãng daarã, wakat ning b sẽn wa n yũud reezẽ rãamã, rĩmã soka a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛre, fo kosgã yaa bʋgo, kos tɩ f na n paamame. Wilg maam fo sẽn datã! Baa sã n yaa mam soolmã pʋɩ-sʋka, mam na n kõ-f lame.»" 
Esther7:3 Rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr leokame yaa: «N'na! Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb nonga maam, la sã n taa yãmb yam, mam kotame tɩ y fãag m vɩɩmã, la m sẽn datã, yaa tɩ y fãag m buudã me vɩɩm." 
Esther7:4 Bala, b rɩka maam ne m buudã neb n koose, tɩ b sãam-do, n kʋ-do, n menes-d zãnga. B sã n dag n koosẽ-la tõnd tɩ d na n yɩ yem-daado, la yem-pogse, mam dag n ka na n yeelẽ tɩ bũmb ye. La bɛyã ka geelg wẽng ning a sẽn na n maan rĩmã ye.»" 
Esther7:5 Dẽ, rĩm a Asiruus soka rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Yaa ãnda soaba? Ned ning sũur sẽn pid ne wẽng a woto wã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Esther7:6 A Ɛstɛɛr leokame: «Tõnd zabd-n-taagã la d bɛyã yaa a Haman, nin-wẽn-kãnga.» B sẽn goma a woto wã a Haman kii kɩɩmde, rĩmã ne rĩm-poakã taoore." 
Esther7:7 Rĩmã sũur yikame t'a yik n bas tigrã n kẽng na-yirã zak pʋgẽ, zẽedã zĩigẽ. La a Haman paa be n yãbd n kot rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr tɩ b fãag a vɩɩmã. Bala, a yãame tɩ rĩmã zoe n yãka yam n na n kʋ yẽnda." 
Esther7:8 La rĩmã sẽn yi zakã pʋgẽ n lebg n wat tigrã roogẽ, a mikame t'a Haman lʋɩɩ gãag ning rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn dag n beẽ wã zugu. Dẽ, rĩmã zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Sẽn leb n paase, b rat n yõga rĩm-poakã roogẽ ka mam nifẽ. Gom-kãngã sẽn yi rĩmã noorẽ wã bal yee, b wa n pil a Haman nengã ne peende.»" 
Esther7:9 A Harbona sẽn yaa bãmb sʋkã ned a yembrã yeela rĩmã yaa: «Da-lugdg la a Haman dag n maan n lugl a zakã pʋgẽ n dat n luul a Mardoose, soab ning sẽn dag n gom-a tɩ rĩmã põsã, a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu.» Rĩmã yeelame: «Luul-y-yã-a beenẽ.»" 
Esther7:10 La b luula a Haman da-lugdg ning yẽnda sẽn dag n lugl a Mardoose yĩngã zugu. Dẽ, rĩmã sũur sigame." 
Esther8:1 Badaar bala, rĩm a Asiruus rɩka zʋɩf rãmbã bɛ a Haman zakã n kõ a Ɛstɛɛre. La a Mardoose kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ, bala, a Ɛstɛɛr dag n wilgame t'a Mardoose yaa yẽnda roagda." 
Esther8:2 Dẽ, rĩmã pidga a nugbĩng ning a sẽn dag n deeg a Haman nengẽ wã, n kõ a Mardoose. La a Ɛstɛɛr kɩtame t'a Mardoose soog a Haman yirã." 
Esther8:3 A Ɛstɛɛr lʋɩɩ tẽng n wõgemd rĩmã nao tẽngre, n yãb n bõos rĩmã, t'a sãam saag-wẽng ning Agaag buudã ned a Haman sẽn dag n dat n maanã, sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã buudã sãoongã." 
Esther8:4 Rĩmã rɩka a sãnem dasaarã n tees a Ɛstɛɛre, la yẽnda yikame n yaas rĩmã taoore." 
Esther8:5 A Ɛstɛɛr yeela rĩmã yaa: «Sã n taa rĩmã yam, la sã n yaa tɩ rĩmã nonga maam, la rĩmã sã n dat n maan maam neere, la rĩmã sũur sã n yaa noog ne maam, bɩ b gʋls sebr sẽn wilgd tɩ Agaag ned a Hamedata biig a Haman sẽn dag n gʋls sebr ning n dat n sãam Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa sẽn be rĩmã soolmẽ wã lebga zaalem.»" 
Esther8:6 Mam na n maana a wãn n get toog ning sẽn na n paam mam nebã, n ka yeel tɩ yelle? N-yẽe, mam na n maana a wãn n get mam buudã sãoongã n ka maan bũmbu." 
Esther8:7 Rĩm a Asiruus goma ne a Ɛstɛɛr ne Zʋɩf a Mardoose n yeel-b yaa: «Ade, mam dɩka a Haman yirã zãng n kõ a Ɛstɛɛre, la mam kɩtame tɩ b luul a Haman da-lugdg zugu, yẽnda sẽn dag n dat n sãam Zʋɩf-rãmbã yĩnga.»" 
Esther8:8 Moasã, bɩ yãmb mengã gʋls bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tagsd tɩ yaa sõama n tõe n sõng Zʋɩf-rãmbã ne rĩmã yʋʋre, n ning rĩmã nug-tikr bãnde. Bala, sebr sẽn gʋls ne rĩmã yʋʋr n ning rĩmã nug-tikr bãnd ka tõe n tek ye." 
Esther8:9 Badaar bala, kiuug a tãab soabã sẽn yaa Sɩvan kiuugã rasem pisi la a tãab daarã, b boola rĩmã sɛb-gʋndbã fãa, la b gʋlsa a Mardoose sẽn yãk yam ning zʋɩf-rãmbã wɛɛngẽ wã, n tʋm soolem toay-toayã fãa taoor-dãmba, la guvɛrneer-dãmbã, la nanambsã, sẽn sɩng ne Ẽnd n tɩ tãag Kuus tẽngã. Yaa soolem-dãmb koabg la pisi la a yopoe. B gʋlsa wa sẽn zems soolem fãa ne a gʋlsem la buud fãa me ne a goamã. La b gʋls n kõo Zʋɩf-rãmbã me ne b gʋlsem la b buudã goamã." 
Esther8:10 B gʋlsa sɛbã ne rĩm a Asiruus yʋʋre, n ning rĩmã nug-tikr bãnde, la b rɩk-b n tʋm wed-rʋʋdb nins sẽn zao wiid nins rĩmã sẽn dag n tũus tɩ yaa sõama n tar pãng n be rĩmã zakẽ wã." 
Esther8:11 Ne seb-kãense, rĩmã rag n kõta Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn be tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ wã noore, tɩ b tigim taab n zab n fãag b yõore. La b sãame, la b kʋ, la b menes buud nins fãa neb nins sẽn be tẽmsã pʋsẽ, la rĩmã soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋgẽ, n dat n yik n zab ne Zʋɩf-rãmbã. B yeelame tɩ b kʋ b pagbã ne b kambã, la b zɛ b paoongã me." 
Esther8:12 La yõwã fãa na n yɩɩ daar a yembr pʋgẽ, rĩm a Asiruus soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋsẽ, kiuug piig la a yiib soabã b sẽn boond tɩ Adaar kiuug rasem piig la a tãabã daare." 
Esther8:13 La soolem fãa pʋga, sebrã tog n yɩɩ tõogo, tɩ b tog n moon tɩ buud toay-toayã fãa wʋme, tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmbã me tõog n segl b mens badaar n dok b sũur ne b bɛɛbã." 
Esther8:14 Rĩmã kõo noor tɩ sɛb-kɩtb nins sẽn zao-b wed-moos nins b sẽn tũus na-yirã pʋgẽ wã zoe tao-tao n looge. La b moona koɛɛgã Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga. 
Esther8:15 A Mardoose yii rĩmã nengẽ ne naam fut sẽn gʋl kẽega la pɛɛlga, n fõgen sãnem maanf sẽn yaa bedre, la a yeelg kobr sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs sẽn yaa moaama. Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga, nebã rag n kaasdame n maand sũ-noogo." 
Esther8:16 Zʋɩf-rãmbã sũur dag n yaa noogo, tɩ b kɩdemdẽ, la b rag n paama zu-zẽkre." 
Esther8:17 Rĩmã yam-yakrã ne a tõogã sẽn ta soolem ne tẽng ning la zĩig ning fãa, Zʋɩf-rãmbã maanda sũ-noog n kɩdemdẽ, tɩ lebg tigr daare. La buud a taabã sẽn be soolmã pʋgã maana b mens n lebg Zʋɩf-rãmba. Bala, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rabeem yõka bãmba." 
Esther9:1 Kiuug piig la a yiib soabã sẽn yaa Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la a tãab daare, daar ning rĩmã sẽn kõ noore, la a yiis tõog n wilgd nebã sẽn dag n tog n maanã daar sẽn ta, daar ning Zʋɩf-rãmbã bɛɛb sẽn dag n tẽed tɩ bãmb na n tõoga Zʋɩf-rãmbã, yellã wẽnemdame, n lebg tɩ yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã n tõog b bɛɛbã." 
Esther9:2 Bãmb tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, rĩm a Asiruus soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse, Zʋɩf-rãmbã tigma taab n na n zab ne neb nins sẽn dag n dat bãmb ne wẽngã, la ned ba a yembr ka tõog n yals bãmb taoor ye. Bala, Zʋɩf-rãmbã rabeem yõka nebã fãa." 
Esther9:3 Soolem toay-toayã nanambsã fãa, ne b taoor dãmbã, la b Guvɛrneer-dãmbã, ne rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã fãa sõnga Zʋɩf-rãmbã, a Mardoose rabeem sẽn yõk bãmbã yĩnga." 
Esther9:4 Sɩd me, a Mardoose rag n lebga nin-kãseng rĩmã zak pʋga. A Mardoose yʋʋrã rag n saaga soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse, bala, a rag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ." 
Esther9:5 Woto, Zʋɩf-rãmbã kɛɛ b bɛɛbã ne zabr sʋʋs n kʋ, n sãam-ba, la bãmb maana b bɛɛbã wa b sẽn date." 
Esther9:6 Suuz na-tẽngã pʋgẽ bal a yeyn-yeyn, Zʋɩf-rãmbã kʋʋ neb kobs-nu n sãam-b zãnga." 
Esther9:7 La b kʋ a Parsãndata, ne a Dalfõ, la a Aspata," 
Esther9:8 ne a Porata, la a Adaliya, ne a Aridata." 
Esther9:9 La a Parmasta, ne a Arizayi, la a Aridayi, ne a Vayizata." 
Esther9:10 Bãmb yaa a Hamedata biig a Haman sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã bɛyã kom-dibli piigã. B sẽn kʋ-bã, b ka sɩɩs b paoongã ye." 
Esther9:11 La badaar bala, b togsa rĩmã neb nins sõor b sẽn kʋ Suuz na-tẽngã pʋgã." 
Esther9:12 La rĩmã yeela rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr yaa: «Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga, Zʋɩf-rãmbã kʋʋ neb kobs-nu n sãamb-a, n paas ne a Haman kom-dibli piigã me. La rĩm soolem a taabã pʋse, na n yɩɩ a wãna? La fo kosgã yaa bʋgo, kos tɩ f na n paamame. Wilg maam fo sẽn datã, la fo na n paamame.»" 
Esther9:13 A Ɛstɛɛr yeelame yaa: «Sã n taa rĩmã yam, bɩ b kõ Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn be Suuz na-tẽngã noore, tɩ beoogo, bɩ bãmb maan wa b sẽn maan dũndã wã, la b luul a Haman kom-dibli piigã kũum da-lugds zutu.»" 
Esther9:14 La rĩmã yeelame tɩ b maan a woto. B moona noorã b sẽn yãkã Suuz na-tẽngã pʋga, la b luula a Haman kom-dibli wã kũum da-lugds zutu." 
Esther9:15 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn be Suuz na-tẽnga pʋgã leb n tigma taab Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daare, la b kʋ neb kobs-tã, la b ka sɩɩs b paoongã ye." 
Esther9:16 La Zʋɩf-rãmb a taab nins sẽn be rĩmã soolem toay-toayã pʋsẽ wã, tigma taab n na n zab n fãag b yõore, la b kogl b meng ne b bɛɛbã. Dẽ, bãmb kʋʋ neb tus-pis-yopoe la a nu, la bãmb ka sɩɩs b pãoongã ye." 
Esther9:17 Bõn-kãens fãa maana Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la a tãab daarã. La kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daare, bãmb vʋʋsame. La badaar yɩɩ tigri, la sũ-noog wʋsg daare." 
Esther9:18 Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn be Suuz na-tẽngã sẽn tigim taab kiuugã rasem piig la a tãab ne a rasem piig la a naas daarã, b vʋʋsa kiuugã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, n kɩt t'a lebg tigr la sũ-noog wʋsg daare." 
Esther9:19 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn be-b tẽn-kɩremsẽ wã, tẽms nins sẽn ka gũbg ne lalsã pʋsã, maan Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la a naas daarã tɩ yaa tigri, la sũ-noog wʋsg daare, la daar ned kam fãa sẽn kõt a yak kũuni." 
Esther9:20 A Mardoose gʋlsa bõn-kãens fãa sɛb pʋse, n tʋm Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn be rĩm a Asiruus soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋsẽ wã, sẽn pẽ-ba, la sẽn zãr-ba." 
Esther9:21 A Mardoose rag n wilgda Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ b rɩk Adaar kiuugã rasem piig la a naas daarã, ne a rasem piig la a nu daarã, tɩ yɩ tigr la sũ-noog wʋsg daar yʋʋmd fãa." 
Esther9:22 Bala, yaa rasem-kãens pʋgẽ, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãag b mens b bɛɛbã nugẽ. La yaa kiu-kãng pʋgẽ, la Zʋɩf-rãmbã sũ-sãangã tek n lebga sũ-noogo, tɩ bãmb wiisgã lebg tigri. La a wilg Zʋɩf-rãmbã tɩ b togame n maan ra-kãens tɩ yɩ tigr la sũ-noog daare. La da-kãense, ned kam fãa tog n bao bũmb n kõ a yaka, la a bao kũun n kõ naong rãmba." 
Esther9:23 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã saka a Mardoose sẽn gʋls n yeel bãmb bũmb ningã, n kɩt tɩ lebg mining bãmb yĩnga, n yaa tigri." 
Esther9:24 Bala, Agaag ned a Hamedata biig a Haman sẽn yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa bɛ wã rag n tagsame n dat n sãam zʋɩf-rãmbã buudu. Yẽnda rag n maana poeere, n dag n dat n sãam Zʋɩf-rãmbã sũyã, n menes-b zãnga." 
Esther9:25 La a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn kẽng rĩmã nengẽ wã, rĩmã gʋlsame n yeele: «Bɩ saag-wẽng ning a Haman sẽn dag n saagd n dat n maan Zʋɩf-rãmbã, lebg n sig a Haman mengã zugu. La bɩ b luul yẽnda ne a kom-dibli wã fãa ra-lugdg zugu.»" 
Esther9:26 Woto, Zʋɩf-rãmbã sẽn geelg bũmb nins fãa b sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgã, ne bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn yãndã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn paam bãmbã, b yãka rasem-kãense, n kɩt tɩ b boondẽ tɩ Purim, sẽn dat n togs tɩ poeere." 
Esther9:27 Dẽ, Zʋɩf-rãmbã vigla mining sẽn ka tõe n teke, bãmb ne b yagensã yĩnga, la neb nins fãa sẽn dat n naag bãmbã yĩnga. La yʋʋmd fãa bãmb na n dɩka ra-kãensã a yiibã tɩ yɩ tigr daare, wa b sẽn gʋlsã." 
Esther9:28 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Zamaan fãa pʋgẽ, ne buud fãa pʋgẽ, la soolem fãa pʋgẽ, ne tẽng fãa pʋgẽ, b tog n maana ra-kãens tẽegr tigri. La da-kãens sẽn yaa Purim daarã ka tõe n vaal Zʋɩf-rãmbã buud sʋk ye. Bãmb yagensã ka na n tol n yĩm a yell ye." 
Esther9:29 A Abigayɩll bi-pugl a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn yaa rĩm-poakã, ne a Mardoose rɩka noor ning b sẽn tarã n leb n gʋls sebr naoor a yiibẽ soaba, n na n wilg tɩ Purim tigrã sɩd yaa tõogo." 
Esther9:30 Bãmb tʋma sɛb tɩ b tɩ kõ Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn be rĩm a Asiruus soolem koabg la pisi la a yopoe wã fãa pʋsẽ. Sebrã yetame tɩ b vɩɩmd bãane, la b maan sɩda." 
Esther9:31 Bãmb sẽn maanã yaa sẽn na n kɩte, tɩ b vigl ra-kãens tɩ yaa Purim tigr rayã, wa zʋɩf a Mardoose ne rĩm-poak a Ɛstɛɛr sẽn dag n yãke, bãmb mensã ne b yagensã yĩngã, tɩ yaa no-loeere, la wiisg rayã." 
Esther9:32 A Ɛstɛɛr vɩɩmã kibar kɩtame tɩ Purim tigrã lebg miningu. Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ b gʋls-a seb-kãngã pʋga. 
Esther10:1 Rĩm a Asiruus yiisa yaood tõogo, soolmã ne tẽms nins sẽn be ko-kãsengã sʋkã yĩnga." 
Esther10:2 Rĩmã pãngã ne a gandaalmã tʋʋmã fãa, ne rĩmã sẽn zẽk a Mardoose to-to wã gʋlsa Meed ne Pɛrs-rãmbã soolem rĩm-dãmb kibayã sebr pʋga." 
Esther10:3 Bala, zʋɩf a Mardoose rag n yaa rĩm a Asiruus na-pʋgdg soolmã pʋga. A Mardoose rag n yaa Zʋɩf-rãmbã sʋk nin-kãsenga, la a buudã nebã fãa rag n nong-a lame. A Mardoose rag n baooda a buudã neb ne neere, la a gomdame n baoodẽ t'a buudã neb paam vɩ-bãane." 
Job1:1 Rao a yembr n dag n be Uts tẽngã pʋga, t'a yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Zoobe. Rao-kãng yaa burkĩna, n yaa nin-tɩrga. Yẽnda rag n zoeta Wẽnnaam, la a zãagd a meng ne wẽng maanego." 
Job1:2 Yẽnda rag n tara kom-dibli a yopoe, la kom-pugli a tãabo." 
Job1:3 A rag n tara piis tus a yopoe, ne yʋgma tus a tãabo, la niig tusri, ne bõn-yãans kobs-nu, la a tar tʋmtʋmdb hal wʋsgo. Yaang sẽnẽ nebã fãa sʋka, rao-kãng n dag n yaa nin-kãseng n yɩɩd a taabã." 
Job1:4 A Zoob kom-dibli wã rag n kẽnda ned kam fãa yir n maand tigr n deesd taaba, la b sã n mi n na n maan tigrã, b boonda b tãop a tãabã tɩ b wat n naagd bãmb n dɩtẽ la b yũuda." 
Job1:5 La tigrã rasem sã n wa n looge, a Zoob boonda a kambã tɩ b wa t'a yɩlg-ba. Yẽnda rag n yikda yibeoog pĩnd n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum biig fãa yĩnga. Bala, a Zoob rag n tagsda a woto: «Tõeeme tɩ mam kambã maana yel-wẽnde, n tʋʋs Wẽnnaam b sũyã tagsd pʋgẽ.» A Zoob rag n maanda a woto wakat fãa." 
Job1:6 Daar a yembre, Wẽnnaam kom-dibli wã waa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la sʋtãana me tũu bãmb n wa." 
Job1:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka sʋtãana yaa: «Fo yii yɛɛnẽ?» La sʋtãana leokame: «Mam dag n saad n gilgda dũniyã zugu.» 
Job1:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo yãndã mam tʋmtʋmd a Zoob bɩ? Ned ka be dũniyã zug n yaa wa yẽndã ye. A yaa burkĩna, n yaa nin-tɩrga, la a zoet Wẽnnaam n zãagd a meng ne wẽnga.»" 
Job1:9 Sʋtãana yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «A Zoob zoeta yãmb a Wẽnnaam zaalem yĩng la? 
Job1:10 Yãmb wẽe yãgr n gũbg-a, yẽnda ne a zakã, la ne a sẽn so wã fãa. Yãmb ninga a nus tʋʋmã barka, la a rũmsã fɩɩgdame n pit tẽngã." 
Job1:11 Mam kotame bala, tɩ y tẽeg y nug n sɩɩs a sẽn so wã fãa. La mam mii hakɩɩka, t'a na n tʋʋsa yãmba.»" 
Job1:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela sʋtãana yaa: «Beneere, bũmb ning fãa yẽnda sẽn so wã bee fo nugẽ. Bũmb sẽn be bala, ra saag n sɩɩs a mengã ye!» La sʋtãana yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n looge." 
Job1:13 Daar a yembre, a Zoob kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã fãa rag n bee b kẽem soabã zakẽ n dɩtẽ la b yũud reezẽ rãam." 
Job1:14 La ned n kẽng a Zoob nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «Niigã rag n koodame tɩ bõn-yãansã yegd beenẽ n wãbdẽ. 
Job1:15 La Sabe-rãmbã wa n kãaga bãmba, la b kʋ tʋmtʋmdbã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yaa maam m yembr n põs n wa n na n togs-yã.»" 
Job1:16 Nin-kãng sẽn nan ket n gomda, ned a to n wa n yeel-a yaa: «Wẽnnaam bugum n yi yĩngr n sig n dɩ piisã ne tʋmtʋmdbã n sãam-ba. Yaa maam m yembr bal n põs n wa n na n togs-yã.»" 
Job1:17 Yẽnda soabã sẽn nan ket n gomda, a to n wa n yeel-a yaa: «Kalde rãmbã maana sul a tãab n wa ne tʋʋlem n wa yõg yʋgma wã, la b kʋ tʋmtʋmdbã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yaa maam m yembre bal n põs n wa n na n togs-yã.»" 
Job1:18 Yẽnda me sẽn ket n gomd yee, la ned a to sẽn wa n ta n yeel-a yaa: «Yãmb kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli wã fãa rag n bee b kẽem soabã zakẽ n dɩtẽ la b yũud reezẽ rãam," 
Job1:19 la sob-kãseng n yi we-raoogã sẽnẽ n wa wẽ roogã kɩrems a naasã, tɩ roogã lʋɩ n bʋʋg kom-bɩɩsã, la b kiime. Yaa maam m yembr bal n põs n wa n na n togs-yã.»" 
Job1:20 Dẽ, a Zoob yikame n pãrs a fuugu, la a põng a zugu, n lʋɩ tẽng n yĩgimdi," 
Job1:21 n yeele: «Mam yi m ma pʋgẽ beelle, la mam na n leb n leba beelle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n deege. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr paam pẽgre!»" 
Job1:22 Bõn-kãens fãa pʋga, a Zoob ka tol n maan yel-wẽnde, la a ka yeel tɩ Wẽnnaam maana bũmb sẽn ka zems ye." 
Job2:1 Daar a yembre, Wẽnnaam kom-dibli wã waa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la sʋtãana leb n tũu bãmb n kẽnge." 
Job2:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka sʋtãana yaa: «Fo yii yɛɛnẽ?» La a leokame: «Mam saad n gilgda dũniyã zugu.» 
Job2:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n soka yẽnda yaa: «Fo yãnda mam tʋmtʋmd a Zoob bɩ? Ned ka be dũniyã zug n yaa wa yẽnda ye. A Zoob yaa burkĩna, n yaa tɩrga, la a zoet Wẽnnaam n zãagd a meng ne wẽng maanego. Yẽnda yasa kãenkãe a burkĩndã pʋga, tɩ fo yaool n kɩt tɩ mam nams-a zaalem bala.»" 
Job2:4 Sʋtãana leoka Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Gãongo, gãong yĩnga! Ninsaal dɩkda a sẽn tar fãa n kõ a vɩɩm yĩnga." 
Job2:5 Dẽ wã, m kotame tɩ y sɩɩs a kõabã ne a yĩngã nemd n gese, mam mii vẽeneg t'a na n tʋʋsa yãmb n ka zoe y nif ye.»" 
Job2:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela sʋtãana yaa: «Beneere, a bee fo nugẽ. Bũmb sẽn be bala, ra sɩɩs a vɩɩmã ye!»" 
Job2:7 Dẽ, sʋtãana yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ n looge. Yẽnda lobga a Zoob yĩn-gãong bã-toaag sẽn sɩng ne a nao-pʋsã n tɩ tãag a zugã." 
Job2:8 A Zoob rɩka sa-pees n zagemd a yĩngã, la a zĩ tompeglmẽ." 
Job2:9 A Zoob pagã yeel-a lame yaa: «Yãmb kell n yasa kãenkãe y burkĩndã pʋga? Tʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam la y ki!» 
Job2:10 La a Zoob leoka yẽnda yaa: «Fo gomda wa fo yaa yalma! Wẽnnaam dag n kõta tõnd naarã tɩ d reegdẽ, dẽ wã, d kõn sak n deeg toogã me sɩda!» Bõn-kãng fãa pʋga, a Zoob ka tol n maan yel-wẽnd a noorã goam pʋgẽ ye." 
Job2:11 A Zoob zo-rãmb a tãabã, Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaze, Suhit tẽng rao a Bildaad ne Naama tẽng rao a Sofaar wʋma tood nins fãa sẽn paam a Zoobã. Bãmb ned kam fãa yi a tẽngẽ n wa, la b yẽsa ne taab n na n kẽng n tɩ yãb a Zoob la b bels-a." 
Job2:12 A Zoob zo-rãmbã sẽn zĩnd yɩɩg n tool n yãnd a Zoobã, b tudg-a lame. Dẽ, bãmb sɩngame n yãbd wʋsgo. Bãmb pãrsa b futu, la b wʋkd tom n lobd yĩngr tɩ rʋʋgd b mens zutu." 
Job2:13 Bãmb naaga a Zoob n zĩnd tẽng rasem a yopoe la yʋnd a yopoe. Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tol n tõog n yaag a noor n yeel a Zoob tɩ bũmb ye. Bala, b rag n neeme t'a Zoob toogã yaa kãseng wʋsgo." 
Job3:1 Rẽ poore, a Zoob rɩka koɛɛg n kãab a rogmã daare." 
Job3:2 A Zoob yeelame yaa: 
Job3:3 «Wẽnd na sãam mam dogmã daare, la bɩ yʋng ning b sẽn yeel tɩ: ‹B roga bi-ribla!›" 
Job3:4 Bɩ ra-kãng yɩ lik bida. Bɩ Wẽnnaam da zĩnd yĩngr n tẽeg a yell ye, la bɩ vẽenem da leb n yãg a zug ye!»" 
Job3:5 Bɩ lik la kũum lik bida soog m dogmã daare, bɩ sawat kell n lud yẽnda, bɩ wĩndg lebg lik bida n kẽes-a rabeem!" 
Job3:6 Bɩ lik bida soog yʋn-kãnga! Bɩ a ra naag yʋʋmdã yʋnd a taabã n maan sũ-noog ye. Bɩ b ra sõd-a n naag kitã ray a taabã ye! 
Job3:7 N-yẽe! Bɩ rogem da tol n zĩnd yʋng kãng ye, bɩ sũ-noog kilsg rãamd ra zĩnd a pʋg ye!" 
Job3:8 Bɩ neb nins sẽn kãabd ray wẽngã, la sẽn mi-b tɩ nek piryãongã kãab-a wẽnga!" 
Job3:9 Bɩ a tõd-beoogã ãds ra tol n puk ye! Bɩ a bao vẽenem n da tol n paam-a ye! Bɩ a ra tol n yãnd beoogã vẽegr ye! 
Job3:10 Yaa yẽnda sẽn ka gɩdg pʋg ning sẽn dog maamã yĩnga, yaa yẽnda sẽn ka solg maam ne toogã yĩnga." 
Job3:11 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam ka ki m ma pʋgẽ? Bõe yĩng tɩ mam ka wẽneg n ki m sẽn wa n yi m ma pʋgẽ wã wakate? 
Job3:12 Bõe tɩ b sagl maam b naoẽ? Bõe yĩng tɩ m ma sak n yẽsem maam? 
Job3:13 Woto tɩ mam dag n gãeẽ lame, mam dag n beẽ-la vɩ-bãan pʋga, mam dag n na n gõeẽ lame. Dẽ, mam dag n na n vʋʋsdẽ-la" 
Job3:14 ne rĩm-dãmba, la ne dũniyã nin-kãsems nins sẽn lebs n met b mens raboodã," 
Job3:15 mam dag n na n vʋʋsdẽ-la ne nanambs nins sẽn dag n tar-b sãnem tɩ b rot pid ne wanzuri wã. 
Job3:16 Wall mam sã n dag n dogẽ kɩɩmde, mam dag n ka n na n tol n beẽ ye. La m dag n na n yɩẽ-la wa kamb nins sẽn ka tol n dogã." 
Job3:17 Beenẽ, nin-wẽnsã basda b maoorã, neb nins sẽn yɛ n ka leb n tar pãngã paamda vʋʋsg beenẽ." 
Job3:18 Bi-beesã fãa me vɩɩ ne bãane, la b ka leb n wʋmd b namsdbã koees ye." 
Job3:19 Nin-bãooneg ne nin-kãsems fãa bee beenẽ, yamb paama a meng ne a soaalã." 
Job3:20 Bõe yĩng tɩ Wẽnnaam bas tɩ sẽn namsdb rãmbã rogdẽ, la b kõt sẽn be-b toog pʋgẽ wã vɩɩm?" 
Job3:21 Bãmb gũuda kũum t'a ka watẽ ye, b baooda kũum n yɩɩd arzegse." 
Job3:22 Bãmb sũur noomẽ-la wʋsg b sã n wa rɩk bãmb n loogdẽ, la sẽn kõt-b sũ-noog yaa b sẽn paam yaoogo." 
Job3:23 M yaa ned sẽn ka leb n mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye, wa ned Wẽnnaam sẽn wẽ yãgr n gũbg-ma?" 
Job3:24 Bala, sidgrã n lebg m dɩɩbo, mam wõosgã saagda wa koom." 
Job3:25 Mam sẽn zoet bũmb ningã n paam maam. Bũmb ning sẽn kõt maam dabeemã n paam maam. 
Job3:26 Mam ka leb n tar laafɩ, m ka tar yam-gãnega, m ka tar vʋʋsgo, yaa toog bal n tar maam." 
Job4:1 Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaz leoka a Zoob yaa: 
Job4:2 «Ned sã n yeel foom tɩ bũmbu, f sũur ka na n sãam n paas sɩda? Ned tõe n sĩnda a noor n ka gom sɩda?" 
Job4:3 Ade, fo zãmsa neb wʋsgo, la f keng pãn-koms dãmb pelse," 
Job4:4 fo goam dag n paasda sẽn lengd-bã raoodo, fo rag n paasda neb nins pãng sẽn sɛ wã pãnga." 
Job4:5 La moasã, sẽn ta foomã, fo raoodã boogame! Moasã, bõn-kãng sẽn paam foomã, rabeem yõka foom!" 
Job4:6 Fo sẽn tũud Wẽnnaamã ka kengd fo pɛlg la? Ka fo sẽn kẽnd ne burkĩndã la f teegr la? 
Job4:7 Mam kotame tɩ f tags n gese, bʋʋm soab a bõe la yell loog ne? Wall fo zoe n yãnda nin-tɩrs sẽn sãam sɩda?" 
Job4:8 Mam sẽn yãnde, yaa tɩ tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã, ne sẽn maand-b neb a taab pãngã, yaa b mens bal la b maanda." 
Job4:9 Wẽnnaam sã n fʋʋs bãmb bala, b menemdame, Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã sobg sãamd-b lame." 
Job4:10 Gɩgemd kɛleng sɛɛme, we-rũm-wẽns yãbr sɛɛme, gɩgem-poal yẽn kaoome." 
Job4:11 Gɩgemd sã n ka paam bũmb n yõke, a na n kiime, la gɩgem-yãang kamb sãeegdame." 
Job4:12 B gomda bʋr-bʋr tɩ tat maam, mam meng tʋbr n wʋm tɩ b gomda." 
Job4:13 Yʋng zãmsd sẽn namsd-m wakatã, nebã sẽn wa n be gõeem pʋgẽ wã," 
Job4:14 rabeem kãseng n yõk maam, tɩ mam kõabã fãa rigimdi." 
Job4:15 Bũmb n fʋʋs mam nengã wa sebgo, la mam yĩn-kõabnengã fãa yikame." 
Job4:16 Mam yãnda ned sẽn yase, mam dag n ka mi a sẽn wẽnd bũmb ning ye. Mam ninã rag n nee a naandã bala.» Dẽ, fãa sẽn yaa sɩɩ wã pʋga, mam wʋma koɛɛg sẽn yeel yaa:" 
Job4:17 «Sẽn yaa kiid buudã fãa tõe n yɩɩ tɩrg n yɩɩd Wẽnnaam bɩ? Ninsaal tõe n yɩɩ yɩlemd n yɩɩg a naandã la? 
Job4:18 Wẽnnaam sã n ka kɩs sɩd ne b tʋmtʋmdbã, la sã n yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam yãnda kongr bãmb malɛɛk-rãmbã meng nengẽ," 
Job4:19 ninsaal sẽn maan ne tãndã na n yeelame tɩ bõe, bala, b talla tẽng tom n naan bãmba! B neemda bãmb tao-tao wa mogdo!" 
Job4:20 Yibeoog n tãag zaabr tɩ b zersa bãmba, bãmb na n menema wakat fãa yĩng tɩ ned toog ka ye." 
Job4:21 B kʋʋgda yẽnda fu-roogã wĩiri, la bãmb kiidame n ka tol n paam yam ye.»" 
Job5:1 Kelem n gese! Rẽ yĩnga, ned na n leoka foom sɩda? Pʋ-peelem soab a bõe la f na n boole?" 
Job5:2 Bala, yalem sũ-toog n kʋʋd-a, la ka-yam soab sũ-kiir n kʋʋd-a." 
Job5:3 Mam yãnda yalem sẽn paam pãnga, la tao-tao bala, mam kãaba a yirã wẽng n yeele:" 
Job5:4 «Bɩ a kambã ra tol n paam sõngr ye! Bɩ b kong bʋʋm bʋʋd zĩigẽ, tɩ ned ka be n na n fãag-b ye!" 
Job5:5 Bɩ yẽnda sẽn tʋm n paamã lebg komds rɩɩbo, la b sãag n dɩ ne sẽn be gõos sʋkã! Bɩ b bẽd-a n wʋk a paoongã zãnga.»" 
Job5:6 Wẽng ka yit tẽng tomẽ ye, la toog me ka yit tẽn-gãong pʋgẽ ye." 
Job5:7 Ninsaal doga toog yĩnga, wa bug-pãrs sẽn zẽkd yĩngrã." 
Job5:8 Ne maam, mam na n baoo Wẽnnaam, la yaa Wẽnnaam la m na n togs m yellã." 
Job5:9 Bãmb maanda tʋʋm-kãsems sẽn ka tõe n togse, la b maand bõn-yɛɛsds sẽn ka tar sõore." 
Job5:10 Bãmb n sikd sa-koom dũniyã zugu, n kɩtdẽ tɩ pʋtã paamd koom." 
Job5:11 Bãmb n zẽkd b sẽn paoog-b rãmbã, la yaa sũ-sãang rãmbã n paamd fãagre." 
Job5:12 Bãmb sãamda sɩlem dãmbã saagre, n kɩt tɩ b ka paam tõogr ne b nus tʋʋmã ye." 
Job5:13 Bãmb yõkda yam dãmbã b bãngrã pʋgẽ, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ yel-kɛg rãmbã saagr lebg zaalem." 
Job5:14 Yel-kɛg rãmbã segda lik bida wĩndga, la bãmb babenda wĩnto-sʋk wa yʋngo." 
Job5:15 La Wẽnnaam fãagda naong soab t'a põs b noorã zabr sʋʋga. La b fãag-a pãng soab nugẽ. 
Job5:16 Dẽ kɩtame, tɩ ka-pãng soab tar tẽebo, la nin-wẽng ka tar a sẽn na n yeel ye." 
Job5:17 Dẽ wã, bark bee Wẽnnaam sẽn demsd ned ningã zugu! Ra zãgs Pãng-Soabã zãmsg ye!" 
Job5:18 Bala, yaa bãmb n pogende, la yaa bãmb n tɩpde. Bãmb wẽeda neda, la bãmb nus n maagd a soaba." 
Job5:19 Bãmb na n fãaga foom tood a yoob pʋga, la a yopoe soabã ka na n paam foom ye." 
Job5:20 Kom wakate, bãmb na n fãaga foom tɩ f ra ki ye, la zabr wakate, b na fãaga foom ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Job5:21 Fo na n põsa zelem-toaag no-beedo, fo kõn tol n zoe rabeem ne sãoong sẽn wat ye." 
Job5:22 Fo toog ka be ne sãoong la kom ye. Fo kõn zoe we-rũms rabeem ye. 
Job5:23 Bala, fo na n maana kaool ne weoogã kuga, la we-rũmsã na n vɩɩmda bãan ne foom." 
Job5:24 Fo na n vɩɩmda ne bãan f fu-roogã pʋga. Fo sã n kẽng n na n tɩ ges f sẽn so wã, fo na n mikame tɩ bũmb ka maan-b ye." 
Job5:25 Fo na n paama yagens wʋsgo, la fo pendã neb na n lebga wʋsg wa tẽn-gãongã zug moodo." 
Job5:26 Fo na n kʋʋla sõama n yaool n sig yaoogẽ, wa bɩle sẽn bɩ t'a kẽebg wakat yaool n ta wã." 
Job5:27 Ade, tõnd veesa bõn-kãensã n gese, n mik tɩ sɩd yaa woto! Bee ne foom tɩ f wʋm la f sak n deege!" 
Job6:1 A Zoob leokame n yeele: 
Job6:2 «Kayto! B sã n dag n tõe n makẽ-la mam toogã, b sã n dag n tõe n ningẽ-la mam sũ-sãangã zãng zɩslem makdg zugu," 
Job6:3 a zɩslmã rag n na n yɩɩgẽ-la ko-kãsengã bĩisr zɩslem. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ goam lebg toog ne maam. 
Job6:4 Bala, Pãng-Soabã pɛɛm kõsa maam n sãage, tɩ mam sɩɩgã pid ne b zẽnmã. Wẽnnaam sẽn wat ne yɛɛsg ninsã n seg maam." 
Job6:5 We-bõang paamda yam-noog n leb n yãbd la? Naaf na yas a yamd sɛɛg n leb n yãbda? 
Job6:6 Ned tõe n dɩɩ rɩ-sãbsg tɩ b ka ning yamsem sɩda? Gell ko-pɛɛlg tara noosem sɩda? 
Job6:7 Mam sẽn dag n zãgsd n ka rat n sɩɩs bũmb ningã, bõn-kãng n lebg mam dɩɩbo, ba ne a sẽn põogã!»" 
Job6:8 Kayto! M datẽ-la m kosgã leokre. M datẽ lame tɩ Wẽnnaam pids m sẽn gũudã! 
Job6:9 Bɩ Wẽnnaam tolg n yãk yam n neem maam, bɩ b tẽeg b nugã n baas-ma!" 
Job6:10 Woto, mam dag n na n paamẽ-la belsgo, la mam dag n na n kɩdmẽ-la ne sũ-noogo. Baa ne toogã sẽn tar-ma, mam ka na n kɩɩs Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã goam ye." 
Job6:11 Mam tara m bõe pãng n tõe n yals n gũ? Mam baoosg na n yɩ a wãn tɩ m baood n vɩɩmd n kaoose? 
Job6:12 Mam pãngã zema kugr pãng la? Mam yĩngã yaa wa zũud la? 
Job6:13 Mam sõngrã ka loog n bas maam sɩda? La b ka rig pãng fãa t'a zãag ne-m la? 
Job6:14 Ned ning raood sẽn sɛ tog n paama a zoa nimbãan-zoeere, ba yẽnda sã n ka leb n zoet Pãng-Soabã." 
Job6:15 Mam saam-biisã zãmba maam wa ko-soogo, b wẽnda ko-sood koom sẽn sɛ." 
Job6:16 Waoodã yĩng kɩtame tɩ ko-soodã koom gudgi, neezã yẽnegame n lud-ba." 
Job6:17 La tʋʋlg wẽnde, bãmb kʋɩtame, wĩntoogã tʋʋlem sã n wẽ-ba, b kʋɩta zĩig pʋgẽ." 
Job6:18 Toandbã bʋdgd n basa b sorã, n kẽ weoog n menem." 
Job6:19 Tema tẽng toandbã yong n geta bãmba, Saba tẽng lɛɛbdbã rag n maanda tẽeb ne bãmba." 
Job6:20 Bãmb sũyã sãama b sẽn dag n tẽed koom beenẽ wã yĩnga. Bãmb sẽn ta wã, b sũyã sãamame." 
Job6:21 Moasã, yãmb me ka baa fɩ. Yãmb yãnda mam toogã tɩ rabeem yõk-yã!" 
Job6:22 Dẽ yĩnga, mam zoe n yeela yãmba: «Bao-y bũmb n kõ-ma! Yãk-y y paoongã n kõ maam kũuni!" 
Job6:23 Sõng-y maam tɩ m põs m bɛyã, fãag-y maam nin-toosã nugẽ!»" 
Job6:24 Wilg-y maam m kongrã zĩiga, la mam na n sĩndame. Kɩt-y tɩ mam bãng bõe pʋgẽ la m tudg yã." 
Job6:25 Gom-tɩrs tõeeme tɩ b sak n deege! La yãmb paoogr goamã võor yaa bõe? 
Job6:26 Yãmb tagsdame n mongd mam goamã bʋʋm, la y get sũ-pa-noaang soabã goam wa sebgo?" 
Job6:27 Yãmb tõe n dɩka kɩɩb n maan poeere, la y tõe n dɩka y zoa meng n koose!" 
Job6:28 Moasã, yãk-y yam n ges maam! Mam tõe n yaga zĩrẽ yãmb taoor sɩda?" 
Job6:29 M kotame tɩ y lebg n wa, da maan-y zãmb ye. Lebg-y n wa-y yɛsa, mam tara bʋʋm yel-kãngã pʋga!" 
Job6:30 Rẽ yĩnga, mam noorã gomda sẽn ka sɩd la? Bɩ mam ka mi wẽng n bake?" 
Job7:1 Ninsaal belmã dũni zug yaa bõe tɩ sã n ka tʋʋm-wɛgl tʋʋmã t'a rasmã yaa wa ned sẽn deegd kiuug yaoodo. 
Job7:2 Wa yamb sẽn baood maasmã, la wa tʋmtʋmd sẽn gũud a yaoodã," 
Job7:3 mam yẽ, mam pʋɩɩr yaa namsg kiis wʋsgo, mam sẽn paamd yaa toog yʋng fãa." 
Job7:4 Mam sã n gãande, m sokda m menga: «Wakat-bʋg la m na n yiki? Yʋngã lebga woko. Mam leebdame tɩ beoog vẽege." 
Job7:5 Mam yĩngã pida ne zũnzũiy la ne noada, mam yĩn-gãongã poome n yit meto." 
Job7:6 Mam dasmã loogda tao-tao n yɩɩd sʋn-wʋgd kʋnkʋɩrg tʋʋlem. Mam dasmã sɛtame. Tẽeb ka leb n beẽ ye! 
Job7:7 Wẽnnaam, tẽeg-y tɩ mam vɩɩmã yaa pemsem bala! Mam nin kõn tol n leb n yãnd vɩ-noog ye." 
Job7:8 Nif ning sẽn ne maamã kõn leb n yãnd maam ye. Yãmb na n baoo maam n konge. 
Job7:9 Sawat wɩlgdame n loogdẽ. Woto me, sẽn sigd-a kɩɩm-kulg ka na n leb n yiki," 
Job7:10 a ka leb n wat a yiri, la a sẽn dag n vɩ zĩig ningã ka leb n mi-a ye." 
Job7:11 Woto n kɩt tɩ mam ka na n sĩnd m noor ye. Mam na n goma m sũ-sãangã pʋga, mam na n yẽgma m sũ-toogã pʋga." 
Job7:12 Mam yaa ko-kãseng bɩ m yaa wag-bɛɛg tɩ y na n ning gũudb tɩ b gũusd-ma?» 
Job7:13 Mam sã n yeel tɩ: «Mam gãagã n na n bels-ma, tɩ m sã n gãand la m yẽgengã na n wooge,»" 
Job7:14 wakat-kãng la yãmb kẽesd-m dabeem ne zãmsdo, yãmb kẽesd-m-la yɛɛsg pʋg ne vẽnegre." 
Job7:15 Mam dag n nongẽ lame tɩ b sãr-ma, mam sẽn kiid n são m yĩngã sẽn lebg kõabã!" 
Job7:16 Mam yamã yii ne m vɩɩmã! Mam ka na n vɩɩmd n ka ki ye. Bas-y-ma, mam dasmã loogda wa walem." 
Job7:17 Ninsaal yaa bõe tɩ yãmb nand-a, la y maand yɩɩr a yĩnga," 
Job7:18 n get a yell yibeoog fãa, la y makd-a n get wakat fãa?" 
Job7:19 Dabʋr la y na n bas n ka leb n get-ma? Dabʋr la y na n bas-m tɩ m paam n vel m kolkoodo? 
Job7:20 Ninsaalbã gũuda, sã n yaa tɩ mam maana yel-wẽnde, m yel-wẽndã maand-y-la bõe? Bõe yĩng tɩ y yãk maam n na n sɩbge? Mam vɩɩmã yaa zɩɩb ne yãmb ne bõe?" 
Job7:21 Bõe yĩng tɩ y ka tõe n kõ m kongrã sugri, bõe yĩng tɩ y ka basd m beegrã taale? Bala, moasã, mam na n gãanda tẽng tom pʋga, la yãmb na n baoo maam, rẽ tɩ mam ka leb n be ye." 
Job8:1 Suhit tẽng rao a Bildaad yeelame: 
Job8:2 Fo na n goma a woto hal tɩ ta dabʋre, fo noorã goam sẽn yaa wa sob-raoogã na n talla a woto n tãag dabʋre?" 
Job8:3 Wẽnnaam na n sak n bʋʋ bʋʋd kegr la? Pãng-Soabã na n sak n golma tɩrlem sɩda? 
Job8:4 Fo kambã sã n beega Wẽnnaam, bãmb bas-b lame tɩ kɩɩsgã rɩ-ba." 
Job8:5 La sã n yaa tɩ fo baooda Wẽnnaam, fo sã n bõos Pãng-Soabã," 
Job8:6 fo sã n ka tar yelle, la f sã n be zemsg pʋga, moas-moasã bala, bãmb na n gesa f yell n leb lebs foom f tɩrlmã zugu." 
Job8:7 Fo sẽn yɩ a soab sɩngrã yaa zaalem, fo sẽn na n yɩ a soab baoosgã na n yɩɩ kãseng n yɩɩg rẽndã." 
Job8:8 Sok zamaan nins sẽn loogã n gese, maag f meng n ges bãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn paam bãngr ningã yelle." 
Job8:9 Bala, tõnd nan doga zaamẽ bala, n ka mi baa fɩ ye. Tõnd dasmã dũni zug yaa wa sulunsuk bala." 
Job8:10 Bãmb ka kõt foom zãmsg sɩda? Pĩnd dãmbã na n pelga b pʋg ne foom n yeele: 
Job8:11 «Tãnwĩis yitame tɩ ka bãoog noor sɩda? Rudum bɩtame tɩ ka koomẽ sɩda? 
Job8:12 A sẽn ket n yaa maasrã, baa b sã n ka keeg-a, a kʋɩta tao-tao n yɩɩd mood a taabã fãa." 
Job8:13 Woto n na n paam neb nins sẽn yĩmd Wẽnnaam yellã, la nin-wẽng tẽeb na n sãamame." 
Job8:14 Yẽnda sẽn dag n teeg bũmb ningã na n wãame, bala, yẽnda sẽn dag n teegã yaa sʋlg gaam-gaame." 
Job8:15 Yẽnda rella a roogã, la roogã ka tõe n yals ye. Yẽnda na n gĩda rẽndã kãenkãe, la a ka na n yals ye." 
Job8:16 Yẽnda sẽn tar sũma, n be wĩnto-raagẽ, yẽnda yɛdgda a wilã n lut zẽedã zĩiga," 
Job8:17 yẽnda yẽgã gaama taab kug-rʋrã sẽgsẽ, yẽnda yẽgã kẽeda pĩisã sẽgsẽ.»" 
Job8:18 B sã n võog-a zĩig ning a sẽn dag n be wã, zĩigã na n kɩɩsame n yeel yaa: «Mam zɩ n yãnd bũmb zĩ-kãngã ye!»" 
Job8:19 Sẽn yĩmd-b Wẽnd yellã vɩ-noogã baoosg yaa a woto. Dẽ, neb n na n puk tom-kãngã pʋg n deeg b zĩiga." 
Job8:20 Ayo! Wẽnnaam ka basd burkĩn ye, la bãmb kõn tol n sõng nin-wẽns ye." 
Job8:21 Bilf sã n paase, bãmb na n pidsa f noorã ne laado, tɩ f no-bɩmsã pid ne kilsgu." 
Job8:22 Fo bɛɛbã na n dɩɩ yãnde. Nin-wẽns rot na n menemame. 
Job9:1 A Zoob leoka a Bildaad yaa: 
Job9:2 «Yaa sɩda, mam miime tɩ yaa a woto. Ninsaal na n maana a wãn n yɩ tɩrg Wẽnnaam taoore?" 
Job9:3 Ned sã n dat n zab ne bãmba, a soab na n goma naoor tusri, tɩ b nan ka yaag b noor ye." 
Job9:4 Sã n yaa yam wall pãng soaba, ãndã n na n bao b noor n ka reeg toogo?" 
Job9:5 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ tãmsã sers n ka bãng ye. Bãmb sũ-puugrã pʋga b lubda bãmba. 
Job9:6 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ tẽngã rigimd a sẽn beẽ wã, la a tebendsã miimdame." 
Job9:7 Bãmb sã n yeel wĩntoogã t'a ra puki, a ka pukd ye. Bãmb soga ãdsã tɩ b ka tõe n yi ye." 
Job9:8 Bãmb b yembr bal n yɛdg sa-gãongã, la bãmb n kẽnd ko-kãsengã zugu." 
Job9:9 Bãmb n naan susã ne yʋʋm-toadgã, la b naan tɛtbã ne ãds a taabã sẽn be rɩtgã." 
Job9:10 Bãmb maanda tʋʋm-kãsemse, la tʋʋm ned sẽn ka tõe n bãng b võor ye. B maanda bõn-yɛɛsds sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye." 
Job9:11 Gese, bãmb loogda mam sɛɛgẽ, la mam ka tõe n yãnd-b ye. Bãmb menemdame tɩ mam ka wʋmd a võor ye." 
Job9:12 Bãmb sã n yõk bũmb n deege, ãndã n tõe n lebs n deeg-a?» Ãnda n tõe n sok bãmb tɩ yaa bõe la b maanda?" 
Job9:13 Wẽnnaam sũur sã n yiki, a sigsd ka be ye. Bãmb tabda Rahaab sẽn teegã t'a sirgd bãmb taoore." 
Job9:14 La maam, mam na n leoka bãmb tɩ bõe? Gom-bʋg la mam na n gom bãmb taoore?" 
Job9:15 Ba mam sã n yaa tɩrga, mam ka na n leok-b tɩ bũmb ye. Mam na n kell n yõka m bʋ-kaoodã sɛɛg t'a zoe m nimbãanega." 
Job9:16 Mam sã n bool bãmb tɩ b leok maam, mam ka na n tẽ tɩ b kelga maam ye." 
Job9:17 Bãmb pãbda maam ne b sob-bɛdã, la b yɩlemd mam poglgã zaalem bala," 
Job9:18 n ka basd maam tɩ m vʋʋs ye. La b kɩtdẽ tɩ sũ-toog sekd-ma. 
Job9:19 Sã n yaa ne pãnga, bãmb n yaa pãng soaba! La sã n yaa ne bʋʋd yelle, ãndã n tõe n bool maam bʋʋdo?"
