Job9:20 Ba mam sã n dag n yaẽ-la tɩrga, mam mengã noor goam n mongd maam bʋʋm. Ba mam sã n dag n beẽ-la burkĩndlim pʋga, mam noorã n na n wilg tɩ mam tara yelle." 
Job9:21 Rẽ yĩnga, mam yaa burkĩn bɩ? Ka maam n get m meng yell ye. Mam yamã ya n yii ne m vɩɩmã." 
Job9:22 Ba sẽn yaa a soab fãa, ket n yaa bũmb a yembre. Rẽndã n kɩt tɩ mam yetẽ yaa: «Wẽnnaam sãamda burkĩna, wa b sẽn sãamd nin-wẽngã." 
Job9:23 Sãoong sã n wa zĩig pʋgẽ n kʋʋda, Wẽnnaam toog ka be ne bʋʋm soab toog ye." 
Job9:24 Bãmb dɩka dũniyã n kõ nin-wẽnse. Bãmb luda bʋ-kaoodbã nense. Sã n ka Wẽnnaam n maane, yaa ãnda soaba?" 
Job9:25 Mam dasmã loogda tao-tao n yɩɩd ned sẽn zoete. Bãmb loogdame n ka tol n yãnd vɩ-noog ye. 
Job9:26 Bãmb loogda wa rudum koom koglgo, b loogda wa sɩlg sẽn fõt n dat n dɩk a rɩɩbo." 
Job9:27 Mam sã n yeel tɩ mam dat n yĩma m yẽgengã, la m dat n basa m sũ-sãangã n leb n paam daoodo," 
Job9:28 mam toodã kẽesda maam dabeem. Mam miime tɩ yãmb a Wẽnnaam ka na n ges maam wa ned sẽn ka tar yell ye. 
Job9:29 Yaa maam n na n yɩ bɛɛgdã! Bõe yĩng tɩ m na n nams m meng zaalem? 
Job9:30 Baa mam sã n so m meng ne ko-yɩlemde, mam sã n pegs m nusã ne zẽem," 
Job9:31 yãmb na n baas n kẽesa maam bɛgdẽ, la mam futã ka na n dat n sɩɩs-m ye." 
Job9:32 Bãmb ka ninsaal wa maam tɩ m na n leok-ba, b ka ninsaal wa maam tɩ d tõe n bʋ ne taab ye." 
Job9:33 Bʋ-kaood ka be n tõe n kẽ tõnd d yiibã sʋk n welg yellã ye. 
Job9:34 Bɩ b zãag b rasaarã ne maam, tɩ b yɛɛsgã ra leb n kẽes-m dabeem ye!" 
Job9:35 Dẽ, mam na n gomame n ka zoe bãmb ye. La yellã sẽn ka a woto wã yĩnga, mam paada m yembr ne m menga!»" 
Job10:1 Mam yam yii ne m vɩɩmã! Mam na n basa m yam n gom m toogã yelle. Mam sũ-toogã pʋga m na n gomame. 
Job10:2 Mam yeta Wẽnnaam yaa: «Da mong-y maam bʋʋm ye! Wilg-y maam yell ning y sẽn tar ne maam! 
Job10:3 Rẽ yĩnga, a zemsa ne yãmb tɩ y nams yãmb meng sẽn naan a soabã n paooga, n yaool n kɩt tɩ y vẽenem puk nin-wẽnsã saagr zugu?" 
Job10:4 Yãmb ninã yaa wa ninsaal dẽndã la? Yãmb sẽn ne wã yaa wa ninsaal sẽn ne wã la? 
Job10:5 Yãmb dasmã yaa wa ninsaal rasmã la? La yãmb yʋʋmã yaa wa ninsaal yʋʋmã la? 
Job10:6 La bõe yĩng tɩ y baood n bãng m kongre, la y gẽesd mam yel-wẽnde," 
Job10:7 n yaool n mi sõama tɩ mam ka nin-wẽnga, la ned ka tõe n fãag maam yãmb nugẽ?" 
Job10:8 Yaa yãmb meng nus n naan maam, bãmb n naan maam zãnga, tɩ yãmb wẽnemd n dat n menes maam!" 
Job10:9 M kotame tɩ y tẽeg tɩ yãmb yãka tẽng tãnd n yag maam. Yãmb dat n kɩtame tɩ m leb n leb tẽng tomẽ la? 
Job10:10 Ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ m kẽ m ma pʋgẽ wa bĩis-naar la? Leb n ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ m gĩs wa bĩisim la? 
Job10:11 Yãmb maana maam ne kõab la gĩina, n lud-b ne yĩn-nemdo, n yaool n dɩk yĩn-gãong n yeelg-ma." 
Job10:12 Yãmb kõo maam vɩɩm la pãnga, la y gesa m yell n gũ mam vɩɩmã." 
Job10:13 La ad bũmb nins yãmb sẽn dag n bĩng y sũurẽ, mam mii bũmb ning sẽn dag n be yãmb tagsgẽ wã." 
Job10:14 Mam sã n maan yel-wẽnde, yãmb nee maam, la yãmb ka basd maam taal m kongrã yĩng ye." 
Job10:15 Mam sã n yaa nin-wẽnga, ad yaa toog ne maam bala! Baa mam sã n yaa tɩrga, mam ka saagd n na n doog m zug ye. Paoogrã sek-m lame, mam toogã rɩ-m la zãnga." 
Job10:16 La m sã n saag n zẽk m zugu, yãmb digda maam wa gɩgemde. Yãmb leb n maanda tʋʋm sẽn yɛɛsd maam." 
Job10:17 Yãmb paasda maam to-paala, yãmb sũ-puugrã ne maam lebgda wʋsgo, tãb-biis reesda taab n zabd ne maam." 
Job10:18 Bõe yĩng tɩ y bas tɩ m yi m ma pʋgẽ? Mam sã n dag n kiẽ, ned nif kõn yãndẽ maam ye." 
Job10:19 Rag n na n yɩɩ wa m zɩ n zĩnd ye, mam dag n na n yi m ma pʋgẽ n kẽ yaoogẽ bala." 
Job10:20 Mam dasmã sõor ka bilf bal la? Bɩ b bas-m bala! Bɩ b loog la b bas-ma, tɩ mam leb n paam pemes bilfu," 
Job10:21 sẽn deng mam sẽn na n loog n kẽng lik bida tẽngẽ, la sẽn deng m sẽn na n kẽng kũum maasmẽ, n ka leb n wa wã." 
Job10:22 Beenẽ yaa tẽng sẽn yaa lik-kãsenga, la lik bida zĩiga, zĩig kũum maasem sẽn be, beenẽ yaa zũnglg tɩ vẽenem yaa wa lika.»" 
Job11:1 Naama tẽng rao a Sofaar leoka a Zoob yaa: 
Job11:2 «Goam wʋsg a woto na pa n ka paam leokre? Rẽ yĩnga yaa goam minim n kõt ned bʋʋm la? 
Job11:3 Fo tẽedame tɩ fo pẽg-m-mengã tõeeme tɩ nebã sĩnd b noor bɩ? Fo na n paoogda nebã tɩ ned ka ning f yãnde? 
Job11:4 Fo yetame: ‹Mam bãngrã zemsa zãnga, la mam yaa yɩlemd yãmb nifẽ.›" 
Job11:5 La ade, Wẽnnaam sã n dag n datẽ goamã, b sã n dag n yaagẽ b noor fo taoore," 
Job11:6 b sã n dag n yeelẽ foom b yamã bõn-soalgdga, yam ning sẽn yɩɩd ninsaal tagsg zĩig sẽn zãrã, fo rag n na yaool n bãng tɩ fo wɛɛngẽ, Wẽnnaam luda fo kongrã kẽere." 
Job11:7 Fo tõe n bãnga Wẽnnaam sẽn tagsde, f tõe n bãnga Pãng-Soabã zems-zãngã sẽn taẽ?" 
Job11:8 Bãmb zems-zãngã zãntlem yɩɩda sa-gãna. Fo tõe n maana bõe? A zulum yɩɩda kɩɩm-kulgu. Fo tõe n bãnga bõe a wɛɛngẽ? 
Job11:9 A woglem yɩɩda tẽngã, t'a yalmã yɩɩd ko-kãsengã." 
Job11:10 Wẽnnaam sã n loogdẽ, Wẽnnaam sã n pag ned doogo, Wẽnnaam sã n bool ned bʋʋdo, ãnda soab n tõe n gɩdg-a?" 
Job11:11 Bala, Wẽnnaam mii ninsaan-zĩrẽ-be-nebã. Bãmb nee wẽngã tɩ ka tũ ne toog ye!" 
Job11:12 We-bõang sã n wa tõog n dog yir-bõanga, yalem me na n yaool n paam bãngre!" 
Job11:13 Zoobe, fo sã n maneg f sũurã, la f sã n tẽeg f nus n tees Wẽnnaam," 
Job11:14 fo sã n zãag f meng ne tʋʋm-wẽnse, n ka bas tɩ kegr zĩnd f zakã pʋga," 
Job11:15 wakat-kãng la f na n tõog n zẽk f zug tɩ yell kaẽ ye. Fo na n paama sũ-keelem n ka zoe rabeem ye. 
Job11:16 Bala, fo na n yĩma f toogã, fo na n tẽega a yell wa ko-zoetem sẽn looge." 
Job11:17 Fo vɩɩmã na n leb n yãgame n yɩɩd wĩnto-sʋka, lik bida wã na n lebga wa be-vẽegre," 
Job11:18 fo pɛlg na n gãeeme, bala, tẽeb beeme. Baa ne fo sẽn dag n paam yãndã, fo na n gãanda ne bãane." 
Job11:19 Fo na n gãandame tɩ ned ka be n na n kẽes foom dabeem ye. Neb wʋsg na n baoodame tɩ fo ges b yelle. 
Job11:20 Nin-wẽns nin na n yiigame, la bãmb ka na n tol n yãnd zĩ-soalgdg ye. Bãmb sẽn gũud yaa kũum bala!»" 
Job12:1 A Zoob leokame n yeel yaa: 
Job12:2 «Yaa sɩda, yãmb bal la nebã, la yãmb sã n ki, yam me na n kiime!" 
Job12:3 Mam me tara bãngr wa yãmba, la yãmb ka yɩɩd maam ye. Ãnda n pʋs n be n ka mi bõn-bãmbã?" 
Job12:4 Mam lebga m zo-rãmbã bõn-laadga, b yetame: A bool Wẽnnaam tɩ b na leok-a. Nin-tɩrgã, burkĩnã lebga nebã bõn-laadga!" 
Job12:5 Yaoolg ne paoogre! Woto n lebg neb nins sẽn tar-b sũ-noogã tagsgo, yaa toog neb nins nao sẽn digd tɩ b rat n lʋɩ wã yĩnga." 
Job12:6 Fãadbã yaool n be b zagsẽ tɩ yɩɩr ka ye, sẽn beegd-b Wẽnnaamã vɩɩ bãane, n maand b sẽn dat ne Wẽnnaam." 
Job12:7 M kot-f lame tɩ f sok rũmsã tɩ b na zãms-fo, sok yĩngr liuuli wã tɩ b na togs-fo." 
Job12:8 Gom ne tẽngã t'a na zãms-fo. La ko-kãsengã zĩma na togs-fo. 
Job12:9 Bãmb fãa sʋkã, ãndã n ka mi? Ãnda n ka mi tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan bõn-kãensã fãa?" 
Job12:10 Bõn-vɩɩsã fãa vɩɩm bee bãmb nugẽ, la ninsaal buud fãa vʋʋsem saga b nugẽ." 
Job12:11 Tʋbr yaa goam kelgr yĩnga, wa ragsendak sẽn yaa rɩɩb deegr yĩngã." 
Job12:12 Yam bee nin-kẽembã nengẽ, la yõ-wok wata ne bãngre." 
Job12:13 Yam la pãng bee Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Wẽnnaam n so saglg ne bãngre. 
Job12:14 Wẽnnaam sã n siig bũmbu, ned ka tõe n lebs n me-a ye. Bãmb sã n pag neda, a pakd ka ye." 
Job12:15 Bãmb sã n gãd sa-koomã, bũmbã fãa kʋɩtame. La b sã n bas-a t'a ni, a kãagda dũniyã." 
Job12:16 Yam la pãng bee Wẽnnaam nengẽ. Yaa bãmb n so sẽn menem-a wã, la b so sẽn menesd-a neb a taabã." 
Job12:17 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ sagendb loog nao-zaala. La b kɩt tɩ bʋ-kaoodb yam meneme. 
Job12:18 Bãmb yolsda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn sẽb-b rãmbã. La b sẽb rĩm-dãmb sees ne sẽbds n dems-ba. 
Job12:19 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã loog nao-zaala. Bãmb lubda neb nins sẽn tẽed tɩ b tara pãng tɩ sekã. 
Job12:20 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ gom-mitbã goam sɛtẽ, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ nin-kẽembã bãngr sɛtẽ." 
Job12:21 Bãmb ningda nanambs yãnde. Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ pãens rãmbã sees sẽbds logsdẽ. 
Job12:22 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sẽn be lik bida pʋgẽ puki, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ sẽn yaa lik tuu lebg vẽenem." 
Job12:23 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ buud lebg kãsenga, bãmb n tõe n kɩt t'a menem. Bãmb tõeeme tɩ buud sãeeg n kẽng sẽn zãrẽ, Bãmb n tõe n kɩt t'a lebg n wa." 
Job12:24 Bãmb deega dũniyã nebã rĩm-dãmbã bãngre, bãmb kɩtame tɩ b yeebd vɩʋʋgẽ n ka mi sor ye," 
Job12:25 la b babend lik pʋgẽ tɩ vẽenem ka ye. La b kɩt tɩ b saad n lengd wa neb sẽn yũ rãam n tuumdẽ.» 
Job13:1 Ade, mam nif yãnda bõn-kãng fãa. Mam tʋbr wʋm-a lame, la m wʋma a võore." 
Job13:2 Yãmb sẽn mi bũmb ningã, mam me mii bõn-kãnga, yãmb ka yɩɩd maam ye." 
Job13:3 Bũmb sẽn be bala, yaa tɩ mam dat n goma ne Pãng-Soabã, mam dat n goma Wẽnnaam taoor n yiis m meng yellẽ wã." 
Job13:4 Bala, yãmba, yãmb dɩka zĩrẽ n lut sɩda, yãmb fãa yaa zaalem tɩpdba." 
Job13:5 Hey! Yãmb sã n dag n sĩndẽ y noor n são! B rag n na n gesẽ-la yãmb wa yam dãmba. 
Job13:6 Kelg-y mam goamã. Yok-y y tʋb n kelg mam sẽn wilgd m yellã. 
Job13:7 Yãmb na n gomda sẽn ka sɩd Wẽnnaam yʋʋr yĩnga? La yãmb na n togsa zĩrẽ bãmb yĩnga? 
Job13:8 Yãmb dat n naaga y meng ne Wẽnnaam la? Yãmb dat n yõka sɛɛg n kõ Wẽnnaam la? 
Job13:9 Wẽnnaam sã n fees yãmba, na n yɩɩ sõama ne yãmb sɩda? Bɩ yãmb tẽedame tɩ y tõe n belga Wẽnnaam wa b sẽn belgd ninsaalbã?" 
Job13:10 Yãmb sã n dat soos n sõng Wẽnnaam, yaa vẽeneg tɩ b na n zaba ne yãmba." 
Job13:11 Bãmb naamã ka na n yɛɛs yãmba? B rabeem ka na n kẽ yãmba? 
Job13:12 Yãmb yel-bũnã yaa wa tompeglem. Yãmb sẽn tik bʋʋm ningã n gomdã yaa wa yagdo. 
Job13:13 Baa sẽn yaa yell ning n na n paam maam, sĩnd-y y noor la y bas-m tɩ m gome." 
Job13:14 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam na n gãd m yĩn-nemdã ne m yẽna? Bõe yĩng tɩ m na n gẽneg m yõore? 
Job13:15 B rat bɩ b kʋ maam! Mam ka leb n tar tẽeb ye. Mam na n goma m yell bãmb taoore. 
Job13:16 Bõn-kãng tõe n yɩɩ fãagr mam yĩnga. Bala, wẽn-kɩɩs ka na n saag n kẽng Wẽnnaam taoor ye." 
Job13:17 Kelg-y-yã, kelg-y m goamã neere. Bɩ mam sẽn na n bilg bũmb ningã kẽ y tʋbẽ." 
Job13:18 Ade, bɩ b bas tɩ m gom n bao bʋʋm. Mam miime tɩ m tara bʋʋm." 
Job13:19 Ãnda soab n na n bʋ ne maam? Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam na n sĩndame n ki." 
Job13:20 Mam Wẽnnaam, bũmb a yiib la m dat tɩ y kõ-ma, la m ka na n solg m meng ne yãmb ye." 
Job13:21 Zãag-y y nugã ne maam, tɩ y rabeemã ra wa ne yɛɛsg m yĩng ye." 
Job13:22 La y bool-m tɩ m na n sakame. Wall bɩ m gom tɩ y na n leok-m lame? 
Job13:23 Mam yel-wẽnã ne m kongrã sõor taa wãna? Bɩ y kɩt tɩ m bãng m yel-wẽnã ne m kongrã. 
Job13:24 Bõe yĩng tɩ y solg y neng ne maam, n get maam wa y bɛyã?" 
Job13:25 Yãmb dat n namsa vãoog sobg sẽn dɩkd la? Yãmb dat n diga mo-koeems la? 
Job13:26 Bala, yãmb gʋlsa m yellã tɩ yaa toogo, yãmb sɩbgda maam m yãadmẽ kongrã yĩnga." 
Job13:27 Yãmb balga mam naoã, n gũusd mam sẽn maand bũmb nins fãa wã. Yãmb gũusda maam m naoã sẽn tabgẽ." 
Job13:28 Mam yĩngã põogame n besd n lʋɩtẽ, wa mogd sẽn mok fuugu." 
Job14:1 Ninsaal buud fãa pag sẽn dogã vɩɩm yaa koɛɛg n pid ne yɩɩre. 
Job14:2 Yẽnda yita wa tɩ-puug n wẽneg n lʋɩ. Yẽnda loogda wa sulunsuk n ka kaoosdẽ ye. 
Job14:3 La yãmb a Wẽnnaam nin bee yẽnda zugu! Maam la yãmb bool n na n bʋ ne! 
Job14:4 Ãnda soab n tõe n kɩt tɩ bõn-sõng yi bõn-dẽgd pʋgẽ? Yẽnda soab ka tol n beẽ ye! 
Job14:5 Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb pĩnd n yãka ninsaal dasem sõore, sã n yaa tɩ yãmb sõda kiis nins a sẽn na n kaoosã sõore, sã n yaa tɩ yãmb yãka wakat a sẽn ka na n gãndge," 
Job14:6 bɩ y wẽnemd y neng n bas-a t'a paam yolsgo, t'a tõog n paam sũ-noog wa tʋmtʋmd sẽn paam vʋʋsg daare." 
Job14:7 B sã n kɛ tɩɩga, tẽeb beeme t'a na n leb n tobame, n tão wila." 
Job14:8 A yẽga sã n lebg kʋd tẽngã pʋgẽ t'a giuugã sẽn vig tomẽ wã sɩng kũum," 
Job14:9 baoosgo, a sã n paam koom, a lebd n tobame n ning wil wa tɩ-polle." 
Job14:10 La ninsaal sã n ki, a pãngã sɛɛme. Ninsaal sã n maan kaalem, a bee yɛ?" 
Job14:11 Ko-kãsengã koom tõe n loogame. Kʋɩlsã koom sɛtame tɩ b lebg koeemse. 
Job14:12 Woto me, ninsaal gãandedame n ka leb n yik ye. Sa-gãongã sã n ket a zĩigẽ, ninsaal ka na n leb n yik ye. Yẽnda kõn tol n nek a gõeemẽ wã ye." 
Job14:13 Yãmb sã n dag n solgẽ maam kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ, n bas maam beenẽ tɩ m solg hal tɩ y sũurã sigi, n yaool n yãk wakat n kõ-m t'a sã n ta bɩ y tẽeg m yelle!" 
Job14:14 Ninsaal sã n dag n kiid n vʋʋgdẽ, mam toogã rasem sõor tɛka, mam dag n na n yalsẽ lame n gũ hal tɩ ned a to wa led m zĩigẽ." 
Job14:15 Dẽ, yãmb sã n bool maam, mam na n sakame. Yãmb sũur dag n na n sãama ne mam sẽn yaa y nug tʋʋmdã." 
Job14:16 La moasã, yãmb sõta mam nao-yakmã fãa, n gũusd n get m yel-wẽnã." 
Job14:17 Mam beegrã fãa bee y korgã pʋgẽ, la yãmb na n peka m yel-wẽnã fãa." 
Job14:18 Tãng lʋɩtame n sãeege, la pĩig serga a zĩigẽ." 
Job14:19 Koom tõe n kɩtame tɩ kug pedse, la a sẽn zoetã, a kãagda tẽngã tom. Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ ninsaal tẽebã fãa sɛt a woto." 
Job14:20 Yãmb tusd-a lame n lubdẽ n kɩt t'a loogdẽ. Yãmb sãam-a nengã n dig-a. 
Job14:21 A kambã sã n paamd waoogre yẽnda ka mi ye, la b sã n paamd paoogr me, a ka bãngd ye." 
Job14:22 Yaa yẽnda mengã yĩngã la a namsda. Yẽnda maanda sũ-sãang a mengã yĩng bala. 
Job15:1 Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaz yeelame: 
Job15:2 «Rẽ yĩnga, yam soab leokda ne bãng-vɩʋʋg la? A gomda gom-vɩɩd wa yaang sobg la?" 
Job15:3 A ka tog n gom goam sẽn ka yõod n bao bʋʋm ye. Yaa goam sẽn ka tar võore. 
Job15:4 Fo mengã sãamda wẽnnaam zoeese, la fo gɩdgdame tɩ b ka tõe n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam ye." 
Job15:5 Bala, yaa fo beegrã n so f noorã tɩ f gomda. La fo gomda wa neb nins sẽn tar-b yamã." 
Job15:6 Ka maam n mongd f bʋʋm ye, yaa fo no-goamã n mongd-f bʋʋm. Yaa fo mengã noorã n gomd n paalgd foom." 
Job15:7 Fo renga ninsaalbã fãa n dog la? Fo renga tãmsã n beẽ la? 
Job15:8 Fo wʋma Wẽnnaam yel-solgdsã la? Fo rɩka yamã n na n bao f meng sõngr bal la? 
Job15:9 Fo mii bõe tɩ tõnd ka miẽ? Fo wʋmda bõe võor tɩ tõnd ka wʋmdẽ? 
Job15:10 Neb n be tõnd sʋk n kʋʋl tɩ b zoobd pelge, tɩ b yʋʋmã yɩɩd fo ba wã yʋʋmã." 
Job15:11 Wẽnnaam belsgã ka sek foom, b sẽn bels foom ne gom-nood nins tõnd sẽn gom ne foomã ka seke?" 
Job15:12 Bõe yĩng tɩ f sũur yikdẽ tɩ f nin wẽgsd a woto? 
Job15:13 Yaa bõe tɩ f sũur puug ne Wẽnnaam tɩ f gomd goam a woto? 
Job15:14 Ninsaal yaa bõe n tõe n yeel t'a yaa yɩlemde? Pag sẽn dog a soab buudã fãa yaa bõe n tõe n yeel t'a yaa tɩrga? 
Job15:15 Ade, Wẽnnaam sã n ka kɩs sɩd ne b pʋ-peelem dãmbã, la bãmb sã n ges saasẽ dãmbã wa koangdba," 
Job15:16 ninsaal yaa yel-beedo, n yaa bõn-põosg n yɩɩda. Ninsaal yũuda ka-tɩrlmã wa koom!" 
Job15:17 Kelg maam tɩ m bilg-fu! Mam na n togsa foom mam sẽn yãnde. 
Job15:18 Yaa yam dãmbã sẽn dag n zãms b yaab-rãmbã nengẽ, n togs n ka solgã." 
Job15:19 Yaa bãmb bal la b rag n kõ tẽngã tɩ sãan ba a yembr dag n nan ka pɩʋʋg b sʋk ye. 
Job15:20 Nin-wẽng paamda toog a vɩɩmã tɛka. Baa nin-toaag yʋʋm sõor sẽn yaa to-to," 
Job15:21 yẽnda wʋmda bʋrg n yɛɛsdẽ. Yẽnda sẽn vɩ ne bãanã wakate sẽn sãamd-a bũmb fãa wã wa n zaba ne yẽnda! 
Job15:22 Yẽnda ka tẽed t'a na n tõog n põsa likẽ wã ye, bala, zabr sʋʋg n gũud-a." 
Job15:23 Yẽnda yeebd n baooda a rɩɩbo. A miime tɩ lik wakat n be taoor n gũud yẽ. 
Job15:24 Yel-pakrã ne yɩɩrã n pida yẽnda ne yɛɛsgo, a siga yẽnda zug wa rĩm sẽn sũ tãp n na n tɩ zab zabre." 
Job15:25 Bala, yẽnda zẽka a nug n na n zab ne Wẽnnaam, yẽnda rɩka a zug n wẽ ne Pãng-Soabã." 
Job15:26 Yẽnda kenga a sũuri, n zãad a gãn-tagdã, n zoet n na tɩ zab ne Wẽnnaam." 
Job15:27 A nengã pida ne kaam n põeeda, t'a lʋgã yɛdge." 
Job15:28 La yẽnda na n zĩnda tẽms b sẽn sãam pʋsẽ, la rot neb sẽn yi n bas tɩ yaa rabood n dat n lʋɩ pʋsẽ." 
Job15:29 Yẽnda ka na n tol n yɩ rakãagr ye. A paoongã ka na n fɩɩg yɛs ye. La yẽnda ka na n kɩ yẽg tẽngã pʋg ye. 
Job15:30 Yẽnda ka na n tõog n yi lik pʋgẽ ye. Bugmã na n kʋɩɩsa a wil-poalã, la Wẽnnaam noor pemsem na n tus-a lame n lake." 
Job15:31 Bɩ yẽnda ra belg a meng n teeg wẽng ye! Bala, a rolbã na n yɩɩ wẽnga." 
Job15:32 Bõn-kãng na n pidsame t'a wakatã nan ka ta ye. A wilã ka na n paam n tob ye. 
Job15:33 Yẽnda na n yɩɩ wa reezẽ tɩɩg biis sẽn sʋʋg n ket n yaa kãse, la b na n kɩtame t'a sʋʋg wa oliiv tɩɩg puud sẽn sʋʋgde." 
Job15:34 Neb nins sẽn yaa wẽn-kɩɩsdbã ka na n paam dogem ye. La bugum na n dɩɩ zãmb dãmbã fu-roto. 
Job15:35 Sẽn tʋt-a wẽnem pʋga, a na n doga wẽnga, la a na n kɩtame tɩ zãmbã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yi.»" 
Job16:1 A Zoob leokame yaa: 
Job16:2 «Mam wʋma bũmb wʋsg sẽn wẽnd woto. Yãmb fãa yaa bɛlsdb sẽn namsd nebã. 
Job16:3 Yãmb leoka maam: ‹Gom-bãmbã sẽn yaa wa sebgã na n sɛɛ dabʋre? Bõe n yikd fo sũur f leokrã pʋga?› 
Job16:4 Sã n dag n yaẽ yãmb n be mam zĩigẽ wã, mam me rag n na n gomẽ-la yãmb gom-toaag a woto, la m na n girẽ-la m zug y toogã yĩnga." 
Job16:5 Mam me rag n na n gomame n paas-y raoodo, la m noor dag na n yiisa belsg goam y yĩnga." 
Job16:6 Mam sã n gomda, ka boogd m toogã ye. La m sã n sĩnd n ka gomd me, a ka loogd n bas-m me ye." 
Job16:7 Moasã, kayto! Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ m pãng sɛ, bãmb waa ne sãoong m zakã fãa pʋgẽ." 
Job16:8 Yãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yĩngã yõbã kɩta kaseto, n mongd maam bʋʋm. Mam faagrã yik n bʋʋd ne-ma." 
Job16:9 Bãmb zendma maam b sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ n zab ne maam. Bãmb wãbda b yẽn ne maam. M bɛyã gẽenda maam ne beem. 
Job16:10 Bãmb yaagda b noy hãbbb... ne maam, n dat n maan maam wẽnga, la b pãbd-m pegse. Bãmb tigimda taab n zabd ne maam." 
Job16:11 Wẽnnaam dɩka maam n bas ne kom-bãoonego, b rɩka maam n ning nin-toos nugẽ." 
Job16:12 Mam dag n zĩi ne yam-gãnega, la bãmb dĩmsa maam, bãmb gãda mam yubl n kaoog maam. Bãmb tilga maam n na n tees n tãoodẽ." 
Job16:13 Bãmb pɛɛmã yita zĩig zãng n tat maam. Bãmb kõsa maam tɩ kẽ hal pʋgẽ n ka zoe mam nimbãaneg ye. Bãmb daaga mam yamã tẽnga. 
Job16:14 Bãmb kõsa maam n po võy wʋsgo. Bãmb zoet n kẽeda maam wa tãb-biiga. 
Job16:15 Mam sẽe bot n yeelg m gãongã zugu, la mam fõgna m neng tẽnga." 
Job16:16 Mam yãbame hal tɩ m ninã mooge, mam nin-pagdã modame n mum wa kũum." 
Job16:17 Mam nusã yaool n nan zɩ n maan ned pãng ye. Mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam ne pʋ-peelem. 
Job16:18 Bɩ tẽn-gãongã ra yũ m zɩɩmã ye! Bɩ mam kelemsã sãd n yi tɩ b wʋme! 
Job16:19 Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam tara kaset soab sẽn be yĩngri, mam tara ned m sẽn tõe n teeg saasẽ." 
Job16:20 Mam zo-rãmbã paoogda maam, la mam yãbda nintãm n boond Wẽnnaam." 
Job16:21 Bɩ ned ning mam sẽn teegã wa yɩ zab-paas ninsaal ne Wẽnnaam sʋka, la ninsaal ne a to sʋka." 
Job16:22 Bala, mam yʋʋmã sõor kolga sɛɛbo, tɩ m na n tog sor n ka lebg n wa ye.»" 
Job17:1 Mam vʋʋsmã tulgame. Mam dasmã tara sɛɛb n dabda, mam lebga yaoog rẽnda." 
Job17:2 Sẽn gũbg-b maamã ka neb sẽn yaand maam la? Bãmb tʋyã kɩtame tɩ m ka tõe n gũs ye. 
Job17:3 Wẽnnaam mam kot-y lame tɩ y bas tɩ m teeg yãmb mengã. Sã n ka yãmba, ãnda soab n na n dɩk sard mam yĩnga?" 
Job17:4 Yãmb kɩda b yamã tɩ b ka mi neer ye. Woto yĩngã, bɩ y ra kɩt tɩ b tõog ye." 
Job17:5 Bãmb wẽnda ned sẽn bool a zo-rãmb tɩ b wa naag-a n dɩ, tɩ yẽnda meng kambã yaool n yong n get n ka paamdẽ ye." 
Job17:6 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ m lebg bɛɛb-laada, tɩ b tʋbsd mam nengã kolkoodo." 
Job17:7 Sũ-sãangã kɩtame tɩ m nin pãng booge, mam faagame hal tɩ m yĩngã lebg wa sulunsuku." 
Job17:8 Woto, nin-tɩrs pɛleng yɩkda bõn-kãng yĩnga. La bʋʋm soab yik n zabda ne wẽn-kɩɩsa." 
Job17:9 Bɩ nin-tɩrg kell n yals a tɩrlem sor zug kãenkãe. La nug ning sẽn ka maand wẽng paamda pãng n paasdẽ. 
Job17:10 Bɩ yãmb fãa lebg n wa, lebg-y n wa-y tɩ d gese! Mam kõn tol n yãnd yam soab ba a yembr yãmb sʋkã ye." 
Job17:11 Mam dasmã loogame, mam sẽn dag n maan saagr ninsã sãamame, bũmb nins mam sẽn dag n dat n maan ne m sũur fãa wã vaalame." 
Job17:12 Bãmb yetame tɩ yʋng yaa wĩntoogo, la lik bida pʋgẽ, bãmb yetame tɩ vẽenem kolgame." 
Job17:13 Mam gũuda bõe tɩ ka kɩɩm-kulgu? Lebga lik bida pʋgẽ la mam na n tɩʋ m gãagã. 
Job17:14 Mam boonda yaoog tɩ m ba! La m boond zũnzũur tɩ m ma, la m tão!" 
Job17:15 Dẽ, mam tẽeb gũudum bee yɛɛnẽ? Ãnda n tõe n yãnd mam tẽeb gũudmã?" 
Job17:16 Tõnd sã n wa tũ taab n sig tẽng tomẽ, yẽnda na n sig n taa kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Job18:1 Suhit tẽng rao a Bildaad yeelame: 
Job18:2 «Yãmb na n basa y goamã dabʋre? Tags bilf tɩ tõnd me na n gomame. 
Job18:3 Bõe yĩng tɩ f tagsdẽ tɩ tõnd yaa wa rũms bala? Bõe yĩng tɩ f tagsdẽ tɩ tõnd yaa neb sẽn ka tar yam? 
Job18:4 Fo sũurã sẽn yik tɩ zabd foomã, fo yĩng ka tõe tɩ dũniyã lebg vɩʋʋg ye. La pĩisã kug ka na n sers n bas-b zĩisã fo yĩng me ye." 
Job18:5 N-yẽe! Nin-wẽng vẽenem na n kiime, la a bugmã sẽn witã ka na n leb n wid ye." 
Job18:6 Yẽnda fu-roogã pʋg vẽenem na n lebga lika, la a fɩtlã sẽn wit yẽnda zugẽ wã bugum na n kiime." 
Job18:7 A naoã sẽn kegma na n kẽnd n lamsdame. Yẽnda mengã saagr n na n lubd-a. 
Job18:8 Bala, yẽnda naoã lʋɩɩ bẽdg pʋg tao-tao. A naoã taba bẽodgã gaamdsã pʋga." 
Job18:9 Bẽdgã gãda a nao-kãsenkãare. Bẽdgã wĩy sẽbgd-a lame. 
Job18:10 B busa bẽodgã tomẽ n na n yõk-a. B bẽda kuusr a sorã zugu. 
Job18:11 Pelen-yɩk gũbg-a-la zĩig fãa tɩ yaa rabeem. Pelen-yɩkã pʋgda yẽnda a sẽn dabd zĩig ning fãa. 
Job18:12 Kom booga yẽnda pãnga. La toog lebga yẽnda pak-n-taaga. 
Job18:13 Bãag rɩ a yĩn-gãongã zãnga. Kũum bi-rẽengã rɩɩ yẽnda yĩngã wilã fãa. 
Job18:14 B võoga yẽnda n yiis a fu-roog ning a sẽn dag n be wã pʋga. A talla a meng n tɩ kɩs a yɛɛsg naaba. 
Job18:15 Fo tõe n kell n paa yẽnda fu-roogẽ wã, bala, a ka leb n yaa yẽnda n so ye. B na n yugla a yirã kidbri." 
Job18:16 A yẽgã sẽn be tẽngrã kʋɩɩme, a kʋɩɩme hal tɩ tãag a wil-gelengeesã." 
Job18:17 B ka leb n tẽegd a yell tẽng zug ye. A yʋʋr menema tẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Job18:18 B yiis-a-la vẽenem pʋgẽ n kẽes likẽ, n dig-a n yiis tẽng zugu." 
Job18:19 Yẽnda ka tar doog bɩ yagens a nebã sʋk ye. Nin-vɩɩg ka kell zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn dag n yaa sãan a pʋgẽ wã ye. 
Job18:20 Yẽnda raboogã na n kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn be nin-taoorã pɛleng yɩke. La rabeem na n yõka neb nins sẽn be yaangã. 
Job18:21 Nin-wẽng yir yaa woto. Ned ning sẽn ka mi Wẽnnaam, a zĩig yaa woto!»" 
Job19:1 A Zoob leokame n yeel yaa: 
Job19:2 «Yãmb na n sãama mam sũur hal tɩ ta dabʋre? La yãmb na n namsa maam ne y goamã hal tɩ ta dabʋre? 
Job19:3 Yaa naoor piig soab la woto yãmb sẽn tʋʋd maam. Yãmb sẽn tar maam n yaandẽ wã yãnd ka tar-yã? 
Job19:4 Baa sã n yaa sɩd tɩ mam tudgame, mam tudgrã yell paka maam bala." 
Job19:5 La yãmb sã n wukd y mens ne maam, la y ningd maam taal m paoogrã yĩnga," 
Job19:6 bãng-y tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n namsd maam, bãmb n yõkd maam ne b gãmbre." 
Job19:7 Ade, mam sã n wẽ nobɩng n yeel tɩ b maand-m-la pãnga, ned ka leokd maam ye. Mam sã n bool tɩ b wa sõng-ma, ned ba a yembr toog ka ye." 
Job19:8 Wẽnnaam yẽda mam sorã tɩ m ka tõe n loog ye. La bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam sorã lebg lika. 
Job19:9 Bãmb yeega m ziirã zanga, la b fõk m maanfã n bas-ma." 
Job19:10 Bãmb sãamda mam yell zĩigã fãa, tɩ m lebg kũum bala. Bãmb võoga mam tẽeb gũudmã wa tɩɩg sẽn viki." 
Job19:11 Bãmb sũur yika ne maam. Bãmb geta maam wa bɛyã. 
Job19:12 Bãmb tãb-biisã naaga taab n wa. Bãmb pãrga sor n tãag mam yirã. Bãmb tilga b tãb-sikã n gilg mam fu-roogã. 
Job19:13 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ m saam-biisã zãag ne maam, neb nins sẽn mi maamã me basa maam." 
Job19:14 Mam doagdbã basa maam. Mam zo-rãmbã yĩma mam yelle. 
Job19:15 Mam sẽn dag n deeg neb nins mam yirã, ne mam yem-pogsã geta maam wa sãana. Mam lebga nin-sãang bãmb nifẽ." 
Job19:16 Baa mam sã n yaag m noor n bool m tʋmtʋmd n bõos-a a ka sakd ye. 
Job19:17 Mam noorã waolg lebga bõn-beed ne mam pagã. Mam lebga bõn-põosg mam meng kambã yĩnga. 
Job19:18 Baa kom-bãoonegã paoogda maam. Mam sã n yiki, b wɩta maam." 
Job19:19 Mam sẽn dag n pelgd m pʋg ne neb ninsã fãa geta maam wa bõn-dẽgdo. Neb nins mam sẽn dag n nongã wẽnemdame n zabd ne maam. 
Job19:20 Yaa m gãongã ne m kõaba bal n keta. Mam no-gãonga vɛɛgame n bas m yẽna yɩnga. 
Job19:21 M zo-rãmba, zoe-y m nimbãanega. Bala, Wẽnnaam nug wẽe maam!" 
Job19:22 Bõe yĩng tɩ y pʋgd n digd maam wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dig maamã? Yãmb sẽn namsd mam yĩngã ket n ka sek yãmba? 
Job19:23 Mam nongẽ lame tɩ b sã n dag n tõe n gʋlsẽ-la mam goamã, b sã n dag n tõe n gʋlsẽ-b-la sebr pʋgẽ." 
Job19:24 Bɩ b gʋls bãmb pĩig zug ne kut kɩtga, n bolg-a ne namd tɩ b pa be wakat fãa!" 
Job19:25 Mam miime tɩ mam fãagdã vɩɩme, la b na n yika tẽng zug yaoolem daarã." 
Job19:26 La baa mam gãongã sã n sãame, mam na n yãnda Wẽnnaam m yĩngã pʋgẽ." 
Job19:27 Mam na n yãnda bãmb tɩ b be ne maam. Mam meng nin na n yãnda bãmba, la ka na n yɩ ned a to la m na n yãnd ye. Mam gũume n yɛ tɩ m pãng sɛ.»" 
Job19:28 Yãmb sã n wa n yeele: «D na n maana a wãn n kell n nams-a n paam bũmb n dõd-a? Yaa wakat-kãng la b na n bãng mam yellã võore. 
Job19:29 Bɩ y zoe zabr sʋʋg rabeem y mensã yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn namsd maam ne goam ninsã zema ne zabr sʋʋga, la yãmb na n bãngame tɩ bʋ-kaoor n be.»" 
Job20:1 Naama tẽng rao a Sofaar leokame yaa: 
Job20:2 «Bũmb ning mam sẽn tagsdã kɩtame tɩ m ka tõe n tõog m noorã n ka leok foom ye. 
Job20:3 Mam wʋmda paoogr goam sẽn zabd maam. Mam mii m sẽn na n leok tɩ bũmb ninga. 
Job20:4 Fo ka bãng tɩ hal kʋdemd wẽndẽ, hal wakat ning b sẽn ning ninsaal tẽng zugã," 
Job20:5 nin-wẽng sũ-noogã ka tõe n kaoos la? 
Job20:6 Baa yẽnda woglmã sã n zẽk n tat saagã, baa yẽnda zugã sɩɩsd sawatã," 
Job20:7 yẽnda na n menema wakat fãa yĩng wa a meng bĩndã. La a mitbã na n sokame t'a bee yɛ? 
Job20:8 Yẽnda na n looga wa yʋng zãmsd tɩ b ka leb n yãnd-a ye. B na n diga yẽnda t'a loog wa yʋng vẽnegre. 
Job20:9 Neb nins sẽn da minim n yãt yẽnda wã ka na n leb n yãnd-a ye. La zĩig ning yẽnda sẽn dag n be wã me ka na n leb n yãnd-a ye. 
Job20:10 Yẽnda kom-dibli wã na n yaoo naong rãmba. La yẽnda meng nug n na n lebs bũmb nins a sẽn dag n deeg tɩ yaa a arzegsã. 
Job20:11 Yẽnda yĩngã tõr rag yaa wa bi-bɩɩg yĩng n tar pãnga, la rẽnda fãa na n naag n gãand tẽng tom pʋgẽ." 
Job20:12 Wẽng sẽn dag n yaa noog yẽnda noorẽ wã, tɩ yẽnda solg-a a zelemd tẽngrã," 
Job20:13 n basd-a be t'a kaoosdẽ wã," 
Job20:14 yẽnda rɩɩbã na n leba a yãadẽ wã, n pa be n lebg wa põeer zẽnem." 
Job20:15 Yẽnda na n wʋba arzegs nins yẽnda sẽn dag n dɩ wã. Wẽnnaam na n vaaga bãmb n yiis yẽ pʋgẽ wã. 
Job20:16 Yẽnda yũuda põeer zẽnem. La ruruug zelemd n na n kʋ-a. 
Job20:17 Yẽnda kõn tol n leb n paam tɩ sɩɩd ne bĩis-gõeem zoet wa ko-zoetem wʋsg ye. 
Job20:18 Yẽnda na n lebsa bũmb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n paamã. Yẽnda ka na n dɩ a leebgã yõod ye. 
Job20:19 Bala, yẽnda namsa naong rãmb n ka sõng-b ye. Yẽnda reega rot a sẽn ka me ye." 
Job20:20 Yẽnda zoee bõn n ka bas ye. Yẽnda rat wʋsgã yĩnga, a laog ba a ye kõn põs ye." 
Job20:21 Yẽnda yão-beedã kɩtame tɩ bũmb ka kelldẽ ye. Woto, yẽnda sũ-noog ka na n kaoos ye." 
Job20:22 La yẽnda sẽn tar bũmb fãa tɩ sekã, toog n na n paam-a." 
Job20:23 A sẽn ket n baood n na n pids a pʋga wakate, Wẽnnaam na n tʋma b sũ-kãbgrã tɩ sig dɩ a yĩnsã." 
Job20:24 Yẽnda sã n zoe n na n põs kut zab-teoogo, zũud peemd n na n kõs-a n sãage." 
Job20:25 Yẽnda sã n feoog peemdã a yĩngẽ wã, a sã n yiis pĩimã sẽn pɩndã a sãoorẽ wã, yaa kũum dabeem n na n yõk-a." 
Job20:26 Lik bida bĩnga yẽnda paoongã yĩnga. Bugum ned sẽn ka widg n na n dɩ-a. La bũmb ning fãa sẽn be yẽnda fu-roogẽ wã na yɩɩ bõne. 
Job20:27 Yĩngr na n puka a kongrã. La tẽngã me na n yik n zaba ne-a. 
Job20:28 Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã daare, a yirã paoong fãa na n looga wa ko-zoetem n kãage." 
Job20:29 Ad bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn bĩng nin-wẽng yĩnga. Woto n yaa pʋɩɩr ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yẽnda wã.» 
Job21:1 A Zoob leokame n yeele: 
Job21:2 «Kelg-y-yã, kelg-y mam goamã neere. Yãmb sẽn na n bels maam la woto?" 
Job21:3 Bas-y tɩ mam gom n sɛ, mam sã n wa gom n sɛ, bɩ y yaool n yaal-ma." 
Job21:4 Ne maam, mam yẽgemda ne ninsaal la? Na n yɩɩ a wãn tɩ m ka na n yãge?" 
Job21:5 Wẽnemd-y n ges-y maam tɩ y pɛleng yɩke. La y rɩk y nug n pĩ y noore. 
Job21:6 Mam sã n tagsd m yellã yelle, yaa rabeem n kẽed maam, tɩ m yĩngã rigda." 
Job21:7 Bõe yĩng tɩ nin-wẽns paamd vɩɩm? Bõe yĩng tɩ b kʋʋndẽ? Bõe tɩ b paamd pãng n paasdẽ menga? 
Job21:8 Bãmb yagens naagda bãmb n paamd pãng bãmb nifẽ. 
Job21:9 Bãmb zagsẽ wã yaa vɩ-bãan n be beenẽ. La Wẽnnaam ka sɩbgd bãmb ye. 
Job21:10 Bãmb lolsã tara rogem pãnga, la b nag-yãansã rogdame n ka fabd ye." 
Job21:11 Bãmb basda b kambã tɩ b yit n deemd wa pe-bi, b kambã saad n saoodame." 
Job21:12 Bãmb wẽeda sɩlsãgs ne kʋla, la b peebd wɩɩs n kɩdemdẽ." 
Job21:13 Bãmb vɩɩmã baasda neere. Bãmb ka namsd la b yaool n ki ye.» 
Job21:14 Bãmb yaool n dag n yeta Wẽnnaam yaa: «Zãag-y y meng ne tõndo. Tõnd ka rat n bãng yãmb soayã ye. 
Job21:15 Pãng-Soabã yaa ãnda tɩ d na n waoogd-ba? Tõnd sã n pʋʋsd-ba, bõe nafr n be beenẽ?»" 
Job21:16 Sɩda, bãmb ka yit bãmb mens nengẽ ye. La nin-wẽns saagr zãra ne maam." 
Job21:17 Yãmb nan yãnda b sẽn kiis nin-wẽns fɩtla? Yãmb nan yãndame tɩ nin-wẽns paam toogo? Yãmb nan yãnda Wẽnnaam sũur sẽn puug ne-ba? 
Job21:18 B yaool n yeelame: «Bɩ b yɩ wa mood sobg sẽn dɩkda, la b yɩ wa fɩɩb sob-kãseng sẽn dɩkde." 
Job21:19 Dẽ yĩnga Wẽnnaam bĩnga nin-wẽng sɩbgr a biig yĩng la? Bɩ nin-wẽng sɩbgr lʋɩ a meng zug t'a bãnge. 
Job21:20 Yaa yẽnda mengã n tog n yãnd a mengã sãoongo, la a yũ Pãng-Soabã sũ-puugr dãam." 
Job21:21 Sɩda, yẽnda kitã sõor sã n wa n ta a tɛka, a yirã sẽn na n yõd n yɩ bũmb ningã ka pak-a ye." 
Job21:22 Ned tõe n zãmsa Wẽnnaam bãngr la? Ka bãmb n kaood saasẽ dãmbã bʋʋd la? 
Job21:23 Nina kiida a burkĩnd pʋga, t'a sũur noomẽ tɩ rabeem ka tar-a," 
Job21:24 t'a lʋgã pid ne kaam, t'a kõab me pid ne sɩɩlem." 
Job21:25 La nina me kiida ne sũ-toogo, n ka tol n paam naar ye." 
Job21:26 Bãmb b yiibã naagda taab n gãand tẽng tomẽ tɩ zũnzũy rɩ-ba. 
Job21:27 Ade, mam mii yãmb sẽn tagsd to-to wã, la m mi yãmb sẽn dat n maan maam bũmb ningã.»" 
Job21:28 Bala, yãmb sokdame: «Nin-toosã yir bee yɛɛnẽ?» Nin-wẽnsã sẽn dag n be fu-roog ningã bee yɛɛnẽ?" 
Job21:29 Yãmb ka sok so-loaadbã n ges la? Yãmb ka mi bãmb sẽn yet bũmb ninsã la? 
Job21:30 B fãagda nin-wẽng sãoong wakate. La Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã wakate, yẽnda paamda zĩ-soalgdga." 
Job21:31 Ãnda soab n na n yals yẽnda taoor n yeel-a t'a manesmã ka sõama? La ãndã n na n dol yẽnda a tʋʋm-wẽnsã? 
Job21:32 B rɩka yẽnda n ta a yaoogẽ wã. La b gũuda a yaoogã. 
Job21:33 Longã pʋgẽ tãndã yaa bʋgsg ne yẽnda. Nebã fãa tongda taab n yãagd yẽnda. Neb b sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ n deng yẽnda taoore. 
Job21:34 Yãmb na n maana a wãn n bels maam ne bels-vɩɩdo? Bũmb nins sẽn be yãmb leokrã pʋgã yaa zĩrẽ-beedo. 
Job22:1 Dẽ, Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaz yeelame:" 
Job22:2 «Ninsaal tõe n nafa Wẽnnaam bɩ? Sẽn tar-a yam yaa a meng bal la a nafda. 
Job22:3 Fo sã n yaa nin-tɩrga, a nafda Pãng-Soabã bɩ? Fo manesem sã n yaa sõama, a nafda bãmb ne bõe?" 
Job22:4 Rẽ yĩnga, yaa fo sẽn zoet bãmbã yĩng la b sɩbgd foom la b bʋʋd ne foom bɩ?" 
Job22:5 Rẽ yĩnga, ka wẽngã n yaa wʋsg fo pʋgẽ sɩda? Rẽ yĩnga, fo kongrã ka loog nug sɩda?" 
Job22:6 Fo rag n kɩtame tɩ f saam-biis gãneg b laog ne foom zaalem yĩnga. Fo rag n deesda bãmb fut n basd-b bɛɛla. 
Job22:7 Fo rag n ka kõt ko-yũud sẽn tar-a soab koom t'a yũ ye. La fo ka kõ kom sẽn tar a soab rɩɩb t'a rɩ ye. 
Job22:8 Pãng soab n dag n so tẽngã. Yaa sẽn tar-a zu-zẽkrã n zĩ a pʋgẽ. 
Job22:9 Fo kɩtame tɩ pʋg-kõap loog zaalem. La f maan kɩɩbs pãnga. 
Job22:10 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ bẽdg yõk foom tɩ pelen-yɩk ling-fu. 
Job22:11 Yaa lik tɩ f ka tõe n yãnd-a ye. La a koom lima foom. 
Job22:12 Wẽnnaam ka be hal yĩngr saasẽ sɩda? Ges ãdsã sẽn be yĩngr n zãr ne tõndã. 
Job22:13 Tɩ fo yaool n yetẽ: ‹Wẽnnaam mii bõe? Bãmb tõe n wẽdga lik bida n bãng yelle? 
Job22:14 Fo tagsdame tɩ sawat luda bãmb tɩ b ka tõe n yãnd ye, la b kẽnda sa-gãongã zugu.›" 
Job22:15 Fo rat n tũu kʋdem-wẽndẽ sorã la? Sor ning nin-wẽnsã sẽn dag n tũ wã? 
Job22:16 B kãaga bãmb n loog tɩ wakat nan ka ta ye, bãmb yẽbgrã looga wa ko-zoetem sẽn loogdã." 
Job22:17 Bãmb dag n yeta Wẽnnaam tɩ b zãag n bas bãmba. La b yetẽ tɩ Pãng-soabã tõe n maana bãmb bõe. 
Job22:18 Yaool n yaa Wẽnnaam n dag n pids bãmb zagsã ne laogã. Nin-wẽnsã saagr zãra ne maam. 
Job22:19 Nin-tɩrs na n yãnda bãmb lʋɩɩsã n maan sũ-noogo. Pʋ-peelem soabã sã n yãnd b lʋɩɩsã, a na n yaal-b lame." 
Job22:20 Sẽn dag n zabd-b ne tõndã ka menem sɩda? Bugum ka rɩ bãmb paoongã sɩda? 
Job22:21 Bao zems-n-taar ne Wẽnnaam, la f na paam vɩ-bãane. Dẽ, f na n leb n paama vɩ-noogo." 
Job22:22 Sak n deeg zãmsgã sẽn yit bãmb noorẽ wã, la f bĩng bãmb goamã f sũur pʋgẽ." 
Job22:23 Fo sã n lebg n leb Pãng-Soabã nengẽ, b na n leb n lebsa foom f zĩigẽ, la fo na n kɩtame tɩ wẽnem zãag ne fo fu-roogã." 
Job22:24 Rɩk f sãnem n lob tẽnga, la f lob Ofɩɩr tẽng sãnemã ko-soodã kug sʋka." 
Job22:25 La Pãng-Soabã n na n yɩ fo sãnem la f wanzuri. 
Job22:26 Dẽ, Pãng-Soabã na n yɩɩ fo sũ-noogo, la f na n zẽka f neng n ges Wẽnnaam." 
Job22:27 Fo na n bõosa bãmba, la b na n leoka fo pʋʋsgo. La fo na n pidsa f pʋlengã." 
Job22:28 Bũmb nins fo sẽn yãk yam n na n maanã na n tõogame, la vẽenem na n yãga fo sorã zugu." 
Job22:29 Wẽnnaam sikda tɩtaam soabã, la b fãagda sik-m-meng soabã." 
Job22:30 Bãmb na n fãaga ka-bʋʋm soabã. Fo sã n tar pʋ-peelem, fo na n paama fãagre.»" 
Job23:1 A Zoob leokame n yeel yaa: 
Job23:2 «Rũndã yɛsa, b geta mam yẽgengã wa kɩɩsgo. Tɩ mam pĩ m noor n ka rat n wõos ye." 
Job23:3 Mam sã n dag n miẽ bãmb sẽn beẽ, la mam sã n dag n tõe n kẽng zĩig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn zaoẽ wã," 
Job23:4 mam dag n na n togsẽ-b-la m yellã fãa, la m paam goam wʋsg n gom ne-ba." 
Job23:5 Mam na n bãngẽ-la b sẽn na n leok maam to-to, la mam dag n na n wʋmẽ-la b sẽn na n yeel maam bũmb ningã võore!" 
Job23:6 Wẽnnaam na n zaba ne maam ne b pãngã fãa bɩ? Ayo! Bãmb na n kelga maam neere. 
Job23:7 Beenẽ, nin-tɩrg tõe n goma ne bãmba, la m bʋ-kaoodã na n kõo maam bʋʋm." 
Job23:8 Mam sã n kẽng yaang n tɩ bao bãmba, m ka yãt-b ye. Mam kẽnga nin-taoor n tɩ bao bãmb n konge." 
Job23:9 Daarninga b bee goabg n tʋmdẽ tɩ mam ka yãnd-b ye, wall b solga rɩtg tɩ mam ka tõe n yãnd-b ye." 
Job23:10 Bãmb yaool n mii mam sẽn dɩk sor ninga. Bãmb sã n mak maam n sɛ waa, mam na n yɩɩ yɩlemd wa sãnem halaale." 
Job23:11 Mam naoã tũuda bãmb naoã bogdo. Mam kẽnda bãmb sor zug n ka bʋdgdẽ ye. 
Job23:12 Mam ka kɩɩs tõod nins sẽn yi bãmb noorẽ wã ye. Mam sulga m meng n sak bãmb noorã sẽn togs goam ninsã. 
Job23:13 La Wẽnnaam sã n yãk b yam, ãndã n tõe n kɩt tɩ b teke? Bũmb ning bãmb sẽn dat n maanã, b maandame." 
Job23:14 Bãmb na n pidsa yam yãkr ning bãmb sẽn yãk mam yĩngã. La bãmb na n leb paana yam yãkr a taaba. 
Job23:15 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ rabeem kãseng tar maam ne bãmb segbo. Mam sã n tags bõn-kãens fãa yelle, m pɛlengã yɩkdame." 
Job23:16 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ m sũ-keelem sɛ. Pãng-Soabã kẽesda maam dabeem kãsenga. 
Job23:17 La ka Lik-bida wã n na n tõog n kɩt tɩ mam sĩnd m noor ye. Baa ne lik-bida wã sẽn lud maamã ka tõog ye.» 
Job24:1 Bõe yĩng tɩ Pãng-Soabã ka yãk bʋʋd wakate? Bõe yĩng tɩ bãmb nebã ka mi a daarã? 
Job24:2 Nin-wẽns sersda pʋt todse, la b kãagd neb a taab rũms n wãbendẽ." 
Job24:3 Bãmb deesda kɩɩbs bõens ne pãnga, la b reegd pʋg-kõor naaf n tɩgd gãnegd samd yĩnga." 
Job24:4 Bãmb digda naong rãmb n yiisd sor zugu. Bãmb weoogda tẽngã nimbãan-dãmb tɩ b soondedẽ. 
Job24:5 Gese, bãmb sãta beoog n kẽnd we-raoogã pʋgẽ wa we-bõens n baood rɩɩb n na n paam n dɩ la yaa tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã pʋg la b baood rɩɩb n na n tɩ kõ b kamba." 
Job24:6 Bãmb wʋkda yamd b sẽn bas pʋt pʋsẽ. La bãmb yãgsda tɩ-biis sẽn ket nin-wẽns pʋt pʋsẽ. 
Job24:7 Yʋngo, bãmb gãee bɛɛla. Bãmb ka tar fu-gobs n na n pil waood wakat ye." 
Job24:8 Saag pãbda bãmb tãms zutu. Zĩ-kẽedg kaalem yĩnga, bãmb tɩ soondeda pĩisã seesẽ." 
Job24:9 B fãsgda kɩɩb a ma bĩisrẽ ne pãnga. Bãmb deesda naong soab bũmb n gãneg a samd yĩnga. 
Job24:10 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ naong rãmb kẽnd bɛɛl n ka tar fut ye. La b kɩtdẽ tɩ b tʋkd ka-gĩn tɩ kom tar-ba. 
Job24:11 La b kɩtdẽ tɩ b be yãg pʋsẽ n wõt oliiv kaam, la b wẽkd reezẽ reezẽ wẽkr koglgẽ, tɩ ko-yũud yaool n tar-ba." 
Job24:12 B wʋmda neb sẽn dat n ki wõosg tẽngã pʋgẽ. Sẽn pogl-b rãmbã wiisg rãamd zẽkdame, la Wẽnnaam ka kelgd bãmb pʋʋsgã ye!" 
Job24:13 Nin-wẽns n be beenẽ n kɩɩsd vẽenemã. Bãmb ka bãng vẽenemã soay ye. La bãmb ka tũ a so-bugsã zut ye. 
Job24:14 Nin-kʋʋd yikda tõd-beoogo, n kẽng n tɩ kʋ naong soab ne nimbãan-neda. La yʋngo, yẽnda wẽnda wagdre." 
Job24:15 Nin-yoaad gũuda zĩ-sobdo, la a tagsdẽ tɩ ned ka na n yãnd-a ye. Yẽnda rɩkda peend n pil a nenga." 
Job24:16 Yaa lik-bida wã pʋg la wagda wã pood rotã. La wĩntoogo, bãmb sora b rotẽ. Bãmb ka mi vẽenem ye." 
Job24:17 Nin-bãmbã fãa geta be-vẽegr wa kũum n wate. Bala, bãmb minima lik yɛla." 
Job24:18 B yetame: Koom na n peega nin-wẽng looge t'a tẽngã lebg kãab-wẽnga. Nebã ka leb n dabd nin-bãmb reezẽ pʋtẽ ye. 
Job24:19 War ne tʋʋlg sẽn kʋɩɩsd koom to-to wã, kũum me na n looga ne yel-wẽnã soab a woto." 
Job24:20 Bãmb ma yĩmda b yelle, la zũnzũy rɩt-b lame. B ka tol n leb n tẽeg b yell ye. Nin-wẽng pãng sãama wa tɩɩga." 
Job24:21 Bãmb fãada pʋg-kiir sẽn ka tar biiga. Bãmb ka maand pʋg-kõap neer ye. 
Job24:22 Baoosgo, Wẽnnaam pãngã sẽn kɩtd tɩ nin-toosã menema yikame, la nin-bãmb ka tõe n leb n vɩɩmd ye." 
Job24:23 Wẽnnaam kõta bãmb vɩ-bãane, la bãmb dag n teega bõn-kãnga, la Wẽnnaam ket n geta bãmb tʋʋmã." 
Job24:24 Bãmb paamda zẽkr wakat bilf pʋgẽ, la bãmb ka leb n be ye. Bãmb lʋɩtame, bãmb daarã tata a tɛk wa nebã fãa. Bãmb kũkd n lʋɩɩ wa b sẽn kẽbg ka-zugu." 
Job24:25 Sã n ka woto, ãndã n tõe n kɩɩs maam? Ãnda n tõe tɩ mam goamã yɩ zaalem?" 
Job25:1 Suwak tẽng rao a Bildaad yeelame: 
Job25:2 «Pãng sẽn kẽesd rabeem yaa Wẽnnaam n so. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd yĩngri. 
Job25:3 Bãmb zãma wã ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. Ãnda soab zug la bãmb vẽenemã ka yãgda? 
Job25:4 Ninsaal na n maana a wãn n yɩ tɩrg Wẽnnaam taoore? Pag sẽn dog a soab fãa na n maana a wãn n yɩ yɩlemde? 
Job25:5 Gese, kiuugã peelem sã n yaa zaalem bãmb taoore, tɩ ãdsã me ka yɩlem bãmb nifẽ," 
Job25:6 ninsaal sẽn yaa wa zũnzũurã nengẽ na yɩɩ wãna? Ãdem biig sẽn yaa wa zũnzũur balã na yɩɩ wãna?» 
Job26:1 Dẽ, a Zoob gomame n yeel yaa:" 
Job26:2 «Ad foom n sɩd mi pãn-komsem soab sõngr koe! Foom n sɩd mi ka-pãens rãmbã fãagre! 
Job26:3 Foom n sɩd mi ka-yam soab saglgo! Ad Foom n sɩd mi bãngr sẽn tar pãng pʋdgre! 
Job26:4 Fo goamã yaa ne ãnda la f gomda? La yaa ãndã n kɩt tɩ fo gomd woto? 
Job26:5 Sẽn ki-b rãmbã rigdame. B bee b zĩigẽ ko-kãsengã tẽngr n digda. 
Job26:6 Kɩɩm-kulg ka solg Wẽnnaam taoore ye. Sẽn ki-bã sẽn beẽ wã ka tar lill ye. 
Job26:7 Wẽnnaam n yɛdg nug-rɩtg sa-gãongã t'a luund vɩʋʋgẽ, la b kɩt tɩ dũniyã yag vɩʋʋgẽ." 
Job26:8 Bãmb n ning koom sawat pʋsẽ, la koomã zɩslem ka lubd sawatã ye." 
Job26:9 Bãmb n lut b geerã, n takd sawaodgã yɛdg n lill-a." 
Job26:10 Bãmb dẽega gũbr ko-kãsengã zugu, n welg vẽenem ne lik-bida wã." 
Job26:11 Wẽnnaam sã n tãs saasã ra-lugdsã, b rigimdidame n yɛɛse." 
Job26:12 Bãmb pãngã gudga ko-kãsengã. Bãmb pogla wag-bɛɛgã ne b yamã. 
Job26:13 Bãmb vʋʋsmã pɩɩsa saasã. Bãmb nugã kʋ waaf ning sẽn zoetã. 
Job26:14 Bõn-bãmba wiligda bãmb pãng tʋʋmã bilf bala, tɩ tõnd wʋmd a rãamdã wa waleng bala, dẽ, ãndã n tõe n wʋm b tʋʋm-kãsengã sa-tãs võore?»" 
Job27:1 A Zoob leb n togsa a sũur koɛɛg n yeele: 
Job27:2 «M wẽenda ne Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã sẽn mong-a maam bʋʋmã, pãng soab ning sẽn kõ-a maam sũ-toogã," 
Job27:3 tɩ mam sã n be tẽng zug n vʋʋsd ne yõore, tɩ vʋʋsem ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ maamã sã n ket n yit mam yõ-bogdẽ wã," 
Job27:4 mam noor kõn tol n gom belgr goamã, la mam zelemd kõn tol n yag zĩrẽ ye." 
Job27:5 Mam ka na n tol n kõ yãmb bʋʋm ye! Hal n tãag mam kũum, mam kõn tol n bas m burkĩndã ye." 
Job27:6 Mam na n gãda m tɩrlmã kãenkãe n ka bas ye. Mam sũ-bãngrã kõn mong maam bʋʋm mam vɩɩmã daar baa a yembr pʋg ye. 
Job27:7 Bɩ b rol mam bɛyã wa b sẽn dond nin-wẽnga, la b rol m zabd-n-taagã wa b sẽn dond ka-tɩrlem soaba!" 
Job27:8 Bala, Wẽnnaam sã n deeg ned sẽn yaa nin-wẽng vɩɩm, bõe saagr la yẽnda leb n tarẽ?" 
Job27:9 Toog sã n paam-a, Wẽnnaam wʋmda a kelemsã bɩ?" 
Job27:10 Yẽnda maanda sũ-noog ne Pãng-Soabã n pʋʋsd bãmb daar fãa bɩ? 
Job27:11 Mam na n wilga yãmb Wẽnnaam pãng zãmsgo. Mam ka na n solg yãmb bũmb nins Pãng-Soabã sẽn dat n maanã ye. 
Job27:12 La gese, yãmb fãa yãnd-a lame. Yaa bõe tɩ y gomd gom-vɩɩd a woto?" 
Job27:13 Ad bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn bĩng nin-wẽng yĩngã. Ad pʋɩɩr ning Pãng-Soabã sẽn na n kõ nin-toaag yĩnga: 
Job27:14 Yẽnda sã n dog kom-dibli wʋsgo, b na n paa tãpẽ. La b yagensã ka na n paam dɩɩb tɩ sek-b ye." 
Job27:15 Bãmb neb nins sẽn na n põsã, bã-loangdg n na n kʋ-ba. La b pʋg-kõapã ka na n tõog n yãb b yĩng ye." 
Job27:16 Baa yẽnda sã n paam wanzuri wa tẽng tom, la a paam fut wa tãndo," 
Job27:17 yaa nin-tɩrsã n na n yeelg futã, la yaa bʋʋm dãmbã n na wʋk a wanzuri wã n sooge." 
Job27:18 Yẽnda mee a rogã wa mogdo sẽn maandã la wa pʋʋg gũud sẽn maan a sẽoko. 
Job27:19 Yẽnda kẽeda gãag n yaa arzɛk soaba, n wa nek n mik t'a arzegsã fãa menemame." 
Job27:20 Rabeem-kaseng na n yõka yẽnda wa ko-zoetem. A na n ling-a-la wa yʋng sob-kãsenga. 
Job27:21 Yaang sobg na n dɩk-a lame n looge. A na n võoga yẽnda ne pãng n yiis a zĩigẽ wã. 
Job27:22 B tãooda yẽnda ne pɛɛm n ka zoet a nimbãaneg ye. La rẽndame tɩ yẽnda mao n zoe n põse. 
Job27:23 B wẽeda nug-pogs yẽnda sãoongã yĩnga, la yẽnda sẽn beẽ fãa, b fɩɩnda ne sũ-noogo.»" 
Job28:1 Wanzuri tara zĩig tɩ b tuud n yãkd-a. La sãnem me tara zĩig tɩ b yɩlgd-a. 
Job28:2 B yãkda kut tẽng pʋgẽ. La b yẽnegda kug n yiisd zũudu. 
Job28:3 Bãmb widigda bugum, Bãmb kẽeda tẽngã zĩ-zulums pʋgẽ n baood kug sẽn be lik pʋgẽ, sẽn be kũum maasmẽ wã." 
Job28:4 B yita kɛɛng neb sẽn ka be n tuud bogdo. Zĩig ninga so-loaadba sẽn ka tatẽ wã. Bãmb kẽe bokẽ wã n loe b meng ne wĩir n yag n luundẽ tɩ ned baa a ye ka be be ye. 
Job28:5 Tẽngã sẽn womd koodã tẽngr rɩɩme n lebg wa bugum sẽn dɩ. 
Job28:6 Safɩɩr dãmb bee bãmb kugã pʋsẽ, la tomã me pʋga sãnem n be beenẽ." 
Job28:7 Sɩlg ka mi a sorã ye, la wɩbg nin ka tõe n yãnd a zĩigã ye." 
Job28:8 We-rũng naoor nan ka tabg beenẽ ye. Gɩgemd nan zɩ n pɩʋʋg beenẽ abada ye. 
Job28:9 Ninsaalb tuuda kug sẽn yaa kãenkãe pʋsẽ. Bãmb tuuda tãms sees n leedb-b n lubdẽ. 
Job28:10 Bãmb tuuda bogd pĩisã pʋsẽ n yãt bõn-sõamy buud fãa. 
Job28:11 Yẽnda yẽda ko-ninã n yãkd bũmb sẽn solg tẽngã pʋgẽ n wat vẽenemẽ. 
Job28:12 La yam bee yɛɛnẽ? Bãngr zĩig bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Job28:13 Ninsaal ka mi a yõodã sẽn taẽ ye. B ka yãt-a tẽng zug nin-vɩɩsã sẽn beẽ wã ye. 
Job28:14 zĩ-zulmsã yetame: «A ka be m pʋgẽ ye.» Tɩ ko-kãsengã yeele: «A ka be m pʋgẽ ye.» 
Job28:15 B ka tõe n dɩk sãnem n tek ne-a ye. La b ka tõe n mak wanzuri n da-a ye. 
Job28:16 B ka tõe n dɩk-a n mak ne Ofɩɩr tẽng sãnem, bɩ ne onigs la safɩɩr kug ye." 
Job28:17 B ka tõe n dɩk-a n mak ne sãnem wall vɛɛr ye. B ka tõe n dɩk-a n tek ne sãnem halaal laag ye. 
Job28:18 La b pʋs n ka gomd kĩndi ne vɛɛr ye. Yam tarem bee yõod n yɩɩd kug-sõama. 
Job28:19 Etɩyopi topaaz kugã ka tõe n dɩk n mak ne-a ye. B ka tõe n dɩk sãnem halaal n mak ne yam ye. 
Job28:20 La yam bee yɛɛnẽ? Bãngr zĩig bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Job28:21 B solg-a-la ne bõn-vɩɩsã fãa. B solg-a-la ne yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã. 
Job28:22 Kɩɩm-kulg ne kũum yetame: «Tõnd wʋmame tɩ b gomd a yell bala!» 
Job28:23 Yaa Wẽnnaam bal n mi a sore, la b mi a sẽn be zĩig ninga." 
Job28:24 Bala, bãmb n get dũniyã tɛk fãa, la b nee bũmb nins fãa sẽn be saagã tẽngrã." 
Job28:25 Bãmb n kõ sebgã a zɩslem la b mak koomã," 
Job28:26 la b kõ saagã tõod la b wilg sa-kelemsã ne sa-tãsã b sorã," 
Job28:27 yaa woto la bãmb n yãnd yam n pẽga a sẽn yaa bũmb ninga. Bãmb kɩtame t'a zĩndi, la b fees a yell neere." 
Job28:28 La bãmb yaool n yeela ninsaal yaa: «Gese, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees la yam, la yaa wẽng baosg la bãngre.»" 
Job29:1 A Zoob kell n togsa a sũur koɛɛg n yeele: 
Job29:2 «Mam nongẽ-la m sã n dag n tõe n lebgẽ-la wa pĩndã, wakat ning Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n gũud maamã," 
Job29:3 wakat ning bãmb fɩtlã sẽn dag n yãgd mam zugã, tɩ mam kẽnd lik pʋgẽ ne bãmb vẽenemã." 
Job29:4 Yaa wakat ning mam sẽn dag n tar pãnga, tɩ Wẽnnaam gũud mam yirã ne nonglmã." 
Job29:5 Yaa wakat ning Pãng-Soaba sẽn dag n ket n be ne maamã, tɩ mam kom-dibli wã karg n gũbg maamã." 
Job29:6 Yaa wakat mam sẽn dag n waasd m nao ne bĩis-gõeem, la pĩisã rag n kiigda kaam tɩ zoet wa kʋɩls mam yĩnga!" 
Job29:7 Mam sã n dag n yi n na n kẽng tẽngã noor n tɩ zĩndi, mam kɩtdame tɩ b maneg m zĩigã tẽngã sõasg zĩigẽ." 
Job29:8 Kom-bɩɩs sã n dag n yãnd maam, bãmb loogdame, la nin-kẽembã sã n dag n yãnd maam, b yikdame n yals yĩngri." 
Job29:9 Nanambsã rag n basda b goamã, n dɩk b nus n pĩ b noore." 
Job29:10 Nin-kãsems rag n sĩndida b noore, tɩ b zɛlma tabend b ragsendagse." 
Job29:11 Bala, ned ning fãa sẽn dag n kelgd maam rag n yetame tɩ mam yaa sũ-noog soaba. Sẽn dag n yãnd-a maam kɩta mam kaseto." 
Job29:12 Sɩd me, naong soab sã n dag n kelem n kos sõngre, mam sõngd-a lame. La m sõngd kɩɩbs sẽn ka tar ned sẽn na n sõng-bã." 
Job29:13 Sẽn kiid-bã kãab-nood rag n sigda mam zugu. La mam dag n kɩtdame tɩ pʋg-kõap tar sũ-noogo. 
Job29:14 Mam dag n yera tɩrlem wa fuugu. Zemsgo n dag yaa mam fuyorgo la m zu-vindga. 
Job29:15 Mam yɩɩ wa nin zoens yĩnga, la m yɩ wa nao põyã yĩnga." 
Job29:16 Mam dag n yaa naong rãmb baaba. Mam dag n maoodame n get sãan yell sõama. 
Job29:17 Mam dag n sãamda nin-wẽns pãng n fãagd neb nins bãmb sẽn namsdã. 
Job29:18 Mam dag n tagsdame tɩ m na n ki m gãagẽ, la m yʋʋmã rag n na n yɩɩ wa bĩisri." 
Job29:19 La m dag n yetẽ tɩ mam yẽgã na n tãoome n tãag koom noor tɩ meenem madgd mam vãadã yʋngo. 
Job29:20 Mam ziirã rag n na n palemda m pʋgẽ. Mam tãpã rag n na n talla pãng m nugẽ. 
Job29:21 Neb rag n basdame n kelgd maam, neb rag n sĩnda b noor n kelgd mam saglse." 
Job29:22 Mam sã n gome ned ka kɩɩsd ye. La mam goamã rag n sigda b fãa zutu. 
Job29:23 B rag n gũuda mam leokr wa b sẽn gũud saag niibu. B yaagda b noy wa sigr saag sẽn kaoosd waoongo. 
Job29:24 Mam dag n yõgemda m noor ne bãmba, la bãmb dag n ka tẽed maam ne rẽ ye. Bãmb dag n deegda rẽnda ne sũ-noogo." 
Job29:25 Maam n dag n wilgd bãmb b sẽn tog n maanẽ. Maam n dag n yaa wa bãmb naaba. Mam dag n yaa wa rĩm sẽn be a zãma sʋka, la m yaa ned sẽn belsd sũ-sãang rãmba.»" 
Job30:1 La moasã, kom-bõoneg yaanda maam n laadẽ. Pĩnda mam yaool n dag n ka get b ba rãmbã wa neb sẽn zem baasã sẽn gũud mam piisã ye." 
Job30:2 Bõe pʋgẽ la bãmb tõe n naf maam? Bãmb ka leb n tar pãng ye. 
Job30:3 Naong ne kom kɩtame tɩ b faage. Bãmb tuu zĩ-pɛɛl ne yʋngo, n be namsg pʋgẽ n baood dɩɩbo." 
Job30:4 Bãmb dag n võoda weoogã mood sẽn be tuudã seesã, la b rag n ka tar dɩɩb n dɩtẽ tɩ sã n ka vidb ye." 
Job30:5 B rag n digda bãmb n yiisd nebã sʋka, la b rag n kaasda bãmb wa b sẽn digd wagda." 
Job30:6 Bãmb tɩ bee tãms sẽgsẽ ko-soodã pʋse. Bãmb tɩ bee tãms bogdẽ la pĩis pʋse. 
Job30:7 Bãmb kẽnda tuudã sʋk n kelemdẽ, la b samd taab gõosã tẽngre." 
Job30:8 Bãmb yaa nin-yood sẽn ka tar yʋʋr ye. B rig-b lame n yiis tẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Job30:9 La moasã, yaa maam n lebg b yɩɩle. Mam lebga yel-bũnd ne bãmba." 
Job30:10 Bãmb geta maam wa yel-beedo, n zãagd b mens ne maam. Bãmb tʋbsda mam nenga kolkood tɩ b toor kaẽ ye." 
Job30:11 Bala, Wẽnnaam yolsa mam tãpã n gãneg-m tẽnga. La moasã, nin-kãens ka leb n gũusd b mens ne maam ye." 
Job30:12 Nin-yoodã yika mam dɩtg n tusd maam. Bãmb tukda sãoong sor n tat maam n dat n sãam maam. 
Job30:13 Bãmb gɩta m sor n dat n sãam maam. La b ka baood ned sõngr ye. 
Job30:14 Bãmb zoet n wata wa b tũuda lalg sẽn wedg n na n kẽ, n tusd taab a tãndã zugu." 
Job30:15 Pelen-yɩk wẽnemd n zomba maam. B yiisa m waoogrã tɩ lebg wa sobg n dɩk-a. Mam sũ-noogã looga wa sawaodgo. 
Job30:16 La moasã, mam vɩɩmã sɛt n dabdame, tood daar n paam maam." 
Job30:17 Yʋngo, toog tara maam, m kõabã zabdame. Toog zabda maam n ka basdẽ ye." 
Job30:18 Wẽnnaam gãda m fuugã kokor n sẽbg maam 
Job30:19 bãmb luba maam begd pʋgẽ. Mam yaa wa wubsg ne tompeglem. 
Job30:20 Wẽnnaam, mam boond-y lame tɩ y wa sõng-ma, la y ka leokd ye. Mam sã n pʋʋs yãmba, y ka kelgd-m ye." 
Job30:21 Yãmb lebga nin-toaag ne maam. Yãmb namsda maam ne y nugã pãn-kãsengã. 
Job30:22 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ sobg rɩk maam n zẽk yĩngr n looge. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ y saaga na n ni n boog-ma. 
Job30:23 N-yẽe! Mam miime tɩ yãmb talla maam n taas kɩɩm-kulgu, zĩig ning nin-vɩɩsã fãa sẽn na n seg taabã." 
Job30:24 Ned sẽn na n sãam ka tẽegd a nug n kot sõngr sɩda? Ned sã n be toog pʋga, a ka bõosd sõngr sɩda?" 
Job30:25 Mam ka yãb neb nins sẽn be namsg pʋgẽ wã sɩda? Nimbãan-ned nimbãaneg ka yõk maam sɩda? 
Job30:26 Mam dag n baooda sũ-noogo, la m paama sũ-sãanga. Mam dag n gũuda vẽenem la yaa lik la m paam yã." 
Job30:27 Mam sũur sãama hal wʋsgo. La sũ-sãams daar n paam maam. 
Job30:28 Mam lebgda sablga, la ka wĩndg n yõog-m ye. Mam yikda kʋʋng sʋk n kot sõngre." 
Job30:29 Mam lebga we-baas saam-biiga, naneend n lebg mam tũud-n-taase." 
Job30:30 Mam gãongã lebga sablg n fʋkdẽ. Mam kõabã wɩnga wʋsgo. 
Job30:31 Mam kʋndã lebga sũ-sãang yʋʋm-teoogo, la m wɩɩgã me lebga yãbr yʋʋm-teoogo." 
Job31:1 Mam dag n maana kaool ne m ninã, tɩ m kõn ges pa-kul ne ratem wẽng ye." 
Job31:2 Sã n ka rẽ, yaa pʋɩ-bʋg la Wẽnnaam na n zĩnd yĩngr n kõ maam? Pãng-Soabã na n zĩnda saasẽ n kõ-m bõe?" 
Job31:3 Sãoong ka nin-wẽns yĩng la? La toog ka tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã yĩng la? 
Job31:4 Wẽnnaam dag n ka ne mam yel-manesmã sɩda? Bãmb ka mi mam nao-yakmã fãa sõor sɩda? 
Job31:5 Rẽ yĩnga, mam yaga zĩrẽ la? Rẽ yĩnga, mam dɩka zãmb sor sɩda?" 
Job31:6 Bɩ Wẽnnaam mak maam ne zɩslem makdg sẽn zemse, la b na n mikame tɩ mam tara burkĩndi." 
Job31:7 Mam sã n bʋdg n basa sɩdã sore, mam sũurã ratem sã n tũu mam ninã gesgo, la mam nusã sã n maana sẽn yaa dẽgdo," 
Job31:8 bɩ m bʋd tɩ ned a to wa kẽeb n dɩ. Bɩ b võ m koodã m sẽn bʋdã fãa. 
Job31:9 Mam yamã sã n kẽe m yak paga, tɩ mam soond a zak noor n gũud-a," 
Job31:10 bɩ mam pagã wer n moe ned a to, la bɩ raop a taab peeg-a n yo ne." 
Job31:11 Bala, dag na n yɩẽ-la yel-beed la mam sẽn maanã. Tɩ bʋ-kaoodb tog n kao rẽ bʋʋdo." 
Job31:12 Yell a woto dag n na n yɩẽ-la wa bugum sẽn na n sãam maam zãnga. La a rɩ m sẽn so wã fãa zãnga. 
Job31:13 Mam sã n dag n maanã m yem-daoog bɩ m yem-poak pãng b sẽn wa n tar yell ne maam wakate, n ka kõ-b b sẽn tog n paame," 
Job31:14 Wẽnnaam sã n wa yiki, mam na n maana a wãna? Bãmb sã n sok maam, mam na n leokame tɩ bõe?" 
Job31:15 Yaa sẽn naan-a maam m ma pʋgẽ wã n naan m yembsã me. Yaa Wẽnnaam-yɛngã bal n naan tõnd d ma pʋgẽ. 
Job31:16 Naong rãmb ka bõos maam tɩ m mong-b ye, la pʋg-kõap ka gũ mam sõngr n kong ye." 
Job31:17 Mam ka rɩ m dɩɩb n mong kɩɩb ye. 
Job31:18 Bala, hal mam yãadem tɛka, kɩɩbã bɩɩ mam nengẽ wa a sẽn be ne-a ba. Hal mam rogem wakate, mam wilga pʋg-kõor so-sõngo." 
Job31:19 Mam zoe n yãnda naong soab sẽn ka tar fuugu, wall nimbãan-ned sẽn ka tar fu-goabga," 
Job31:20 tɩ mam ka kõ a fuug sẽn wʋg ne m piis kõbd t'a wɩng a yĩng la a ning-m bark sɩda? 
Job31:21 Mam sã n namsa kɩɩba, mam sẽn mi tɩ bʋ-kaoodbã bee mam poorẽ yĩnga," 
Job31:22 bɩ m bãokã sok tɩ m kangã lʋɩ n kao! 
Job31:23 Bala, mam dag n zoeta sãoong ning sẽn yit-a Wẽnnaam nengẽ wã. La mam ka tõe n maan baa fɩ bãmb naamã taoor ye." 
Job31:24 Mam sã n dag n teegẽ-la m sãnemã, mam sã n dag n yeelẽ lame tɩ m tẽeb bee ne m sãnemã," 
Job31:25 bɩ mam sã n dag n maanẽ-la sũ-noog mam paoongã sẽn yaa wʋsg yĩnga, arzɛk ning mam sẽn tʋm n paama pʋgẽ," 
Job31:26 wall mam sã n dag n gesẽ wĩndgã ne a vẽenemã, la m ges kiuugã sẽn kẽnd ne a ziirã," 
Job31:27 mam sã n dag n sak makr m sũurã pʋgẽ n waoog-ba, la m nug sã n dag n gãd-b lame n moke," 
Job31:28 bõn-kãng rag n na n yɩẽ-la kongr bʋ-kaoodã sẽn tog n sɩbge, la mam dag n na n kɩɩsẽ-la Wẽnnaam sẽn be yĩngrã." 
Job31:29 Maana sũ-noog m bɛ sẽn paam toog yĩng bɩ? Mam kɩdma yell sẽn paam yẽnda yĩng bɩ? 
Job31:30 Mam yaool n dag n zɩ n sak tɩ m noor maan yel-wẽnde ye. Mam zɩ n yaag m noor n kãab m bɛ wẽng n dat t'a ki ye. 
Job31:31 M zakã rãmb dag n yetame: «Ãnda soab la a ka kɩt t'a wãb nemd zakẽ ka n tɩge?» 
Job31:32 Mam ka tol n bas sãan t'a gãand yɩnga, la m pakda m zak noor tɩ so-toagd kẽ." 
Job31:33 Mam zɩ n lud m wẽng wa ninsaalb a taabã sẽn mi n maandẽ wã ye. Mam ka solg m kongrã m sũur pʋgẽ," 
Job31:34 mam sẽn zoet neb wʋsgã goam yĩng ye. Mam ka zoe buud paoogr n sĩnd n ka yi m zakã pʋgẽ ye. 
Job31:35 Ad m yaoolem koɛɛga. Kato! Ãnda n na n kelg maam? Bɩ Pãng-Soabã leok maam! N wilg sẽn dõt-b maamã sẽn gʋls sebr n sõdg yɛl ninsã. 
Job31:36 Woto, mam na n palg-a-la m bãok wa fuugu, la m fõgn-a wa pugla." 
Job31:37 Mam na n wilga Wẽnnaam m yel-manesmã fãa. Mam na n kolga bãmb wa naaba. 
Job31:38 Mam pʋʋgã sã n kelem n yeel tɩ m maand-a-la wẽnga, la a kaalem me sã n yãbe," 
Job31:39 la m sã n dɩ pʋʋgã bõn-koaadlã n yaool n ka yao pʋʋgã ligdi, n kɩt t'a soabã tẽeb sɛ," 
Job31:40 bɩ pʋʋgã tõdg ki womb n yi gõose, la bɩ a tõdg baning wekre n wek nadense. A Zoob goamã baoosgo." 
Job32:1 A Zoob sẽn ges a meng wa nin-tɩrgã, nin-kãens b tãabã basa goam n ka leb n leok-a ye." 
Job32:2 Dẽ, Buuz tẽng rao a Barakeyɛll biig a Elihu sẽn yaa Ram buudã nedã sũur yikame. A sũur yika ne a Zoob sẽn tẽed t'a tara bʋʋm n yɩɩd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Job32:3 A sũur yika ne a Zoob zo-rãmb a tãabã me. Bãmb sẽn ka tol n tõog n yãnd gomd n leok a Zoobã, ne b sẽn maan wa Wẽnnaam ka tar bʋʋmã yĩnga." 
Job32:4 Bãmb fãa sẽn kẽem a Elihu wã yĩnga, a Elihu yalsame tɩ b gom n sɛ t'a yaool n na n gom ne a Zoobe." 
Job32:5 A Elihu sẽn mik tɩ neb a tãabã rag n ka leb n tar leokr n na n leokã, a sũur puugame." 
Job32:6 Buuz tẽng rao a Barakeyɛll biig a Elihu leokame: «Mam yẽ paoodame, la yãmb yaa nin-kẽemba. Rẽ yĩng la m dag n zoet rabeem n digda, n ka rat n wilg yãmb m sẽn mi wã ye." 
Job32:7 Mam dag n tagsdame tɩ kãsem dãmbã na n bãnga goamã, tɩ yʋʋm sẽn waoog-b rãmbã zãms tõnd yam." 
Job32:8 La sɩd-sɩdã, ninsaal pʋgẽ, yaa sɩɩg bal n be, yaa Pãng-Soabã sɩɩg bal n kõt ninsaal bãngre." 
Job32:9 Ka yʋʋm sẽn yaa wʋsg n kõt ned yam ye. Ka kʋʋlem n wat ne tɩrlem bãngr ye. 
Job32:10 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam yetẽ: Kelg maam! Mam me na n wilga m sẽn mi bũmb ninga. 
Job32:11 Gese, mam gũume tɩ yãmb gom n sɛ. Mam yoka m tʋbr n kelg yãmb tagsgã, la m kelgd ned kam fãa sẽn leokd a Zoob to-to." 
Job32:12 Mam maaga m yĩng n kelg yãmb neere. La yãmb ned baa a ye ka tõog n gom n lub a Zoob ye. Ned baa a ye ka tõog n leok a Zoob a goamã pʋg ye. 
Job32:13 Gũus-y y mens n da wa yeel tɩ y paama yam a Zoob nengẽ ye. Wẽnnaam n tõe n gom n lub-a, la ka ninsaal n na n gom n lub-a ye." 
Job32:14 Yẽnda ka gom ne maam ye. La mam leokrã me ka na n yɩ wa yãmb dẽndã ye. 
Job32:15 Yãmb yɛɛsame n ka tar leokr ye, yãmb ka leb n tar gomd y noorẽ ye." 
Job32:16 Mam yalsame n gũ, la y ka gom ye, la yãmb sẽn sĩnd n ka leb n leokdẽ wã," 
Job32:17 taa maam tɩ mam me na n leoke. Mam me na n wilga m sẽn mi bũmb ninga. 
Job32:18 Bala, mam tara bũmb wʋsg n dat n gome. Bũmb n be mam pʋgẽ wã n pẽdgd-ma." 
Job32:19 Tɩ mam sũurã yaa wa reezẽ rãam sẽn wɩk ne ko-waoose, wa ko-wao-paal sẽn dat n pusi." 
Job32:20 Mam na n gomame la m paam n vʋʋse. Mam na n yaaga m noor n leoke. 
Job32:21 Mam ka na n yãk ned n sõng ye, mam ka na n gom no-noom goam ye." 
Job32:22 Bala, mam ka mi no-noom goam ye. Mam sã n gom no-noom goamã, m naandã na n sãama maam tao-tao.»" 
Job33:1 Zoobe, moasã, kelg m goamã. Yok f tʋbr n kelg mam goamã fãa." 
Job33:2 Gese, mam yaagda m noore. Mam zelemd n be m dagsendakẽ n gomda." 
Job33:3 Yaa ne pʋ-peelem la m na n gome. Yaa bãngr sɩd bal la m noorã na n togse. 
Job33:4 Yaa Wẽnnaam sɩɩgã n naan maam. Yaa Pãng-Soab vʋʋsmã n kõ maam vɩɩm. 
Job33:5 Fo sã n tõe bɩ f leok maam, segl f meng n yik n yals mam taoor n gome!" 
Job33:6 Gese, Wẽnnaam taoore, mam yaa wa foom bala. Bãmb naana maam me ne tẽng tom." 
Job33:7 Woto, tõog ning mam sẽn tar n gomdã ka na n kẽes-f rabeem ye. La mam sẽn tar noor ningã ka na n nams-f ye." 
Job33:8 Fo gomame tɩ m tʋb wʋme. Mam wʋma fo sẽn gome: 
Job33:9 «Mam tara bʋʋm, m ka tar beegr ye, mam zemsame, kongr ka be mam pʋgẽ ye." 
Job33:10 La yaa Wẽnnaam n baood n dogl maam yelle, bãmb geta maam wa b bɛyã." 
Job33:11 Bãmb balga mam naoã n gũusd bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn maandã.» 
Job33:12 La mam na n leoka foom tɩ rẽ pʋgẽ, fo ka tar bʋʋm ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam yaa kãseng n yɩɩd ninsaala." 
Job33:13 Bõe yĩng tɩ f baood n zab ne wẽnde? Yaa bãmb sẽn ka leokd fo goamã fãa wã yĩng bɩ? 
Job33:14 Bala, Wẽnnaam gomda ne mansem buud toor-toore, la nebã ka maand gũusg ye." 
Job33:15 Bãmb gomda ne nebã zãmsd la ne yʋng vẽnegr pʋga, b sẽn wat n be gõe-zulung pʋg wakate, la b sẽn wat n gãe b gãagẽ n gõe." 
Job33:16 Bãmb gomda ninsaalb tʋbẽ, n wilg vẽenega b sẽn dat tɩ b gũus ne bũmb ninga," 
Job33:17 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ninsaal bas a tʋʋm-wẽnsã la b gũ sẽn tara pãng ne a wã wilg-m-mengã," 
Job33:18 la b fãag-a ne bokã la ne bẽdgo, tɩ kãn-dibg ra yiis a vɩɩmã ye." 
Job33:19 Wakat ninga b remsda ninsaala n gãneg-a t'a gãe n bẽedẽ, tɩ tooga sãag n kẽ a kõabã," 
Job33:20 Wakat kãnga, a ka leb n nong rɩɩb ye. A ka leb n dat rɩ-nood ye." 
Job33:21 A yĩngã faagdame tɩ nebã neẽ, a kõabã ned sẽn dag n ka ne wã pukame." 
Job33:22 Wakat-kãnga, yẽnda kolgda a yaoogo, a kolgda sẽn wat-b ne kũumã." 
Job33:23 Malɛɛk-rãmb tusr sʋka, malɛɛk a ye sã n be n na n yõk Wẽnnaam sɛɛg n kõ-a, n wilg ninsaal a sẽn tog n maane," 
Job33:24 yẽnda sã n zoe a nimbãaneg n yeel tɩ b ra bas-a t'a sig yaoogẽ wã, mam paama yaood n yao!" 
Job33:25 Dẽ, a yĩngã na n leb n yɩɩ sõama wa yẽnda bi-bɩɩlmẽ wã. Yẽnda na n leb n lebga wa a sẽn dag n yaa to-to a bi-bɩɩlem wakatã." 
Job33:26 Yẽnda na n pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam na n deeg-a lame t'a kẽng bãmb nengẽ ne sũ-noogo. Bãmb na n lebsa ninsaal a sõmblmã." 
Job33:27 Yẽnda yɩɩnda nebã taoor n yetẽ: «Mam maana yel-wẽnã, mam golma sẽn yaa tɩrgã, la Wẽnnaam ka sɩbg-m wa sẽn zems m kongrã ye." 
Job33:28 Wẽnnaam fãag-m-la wakat ning m sẽn dag n dabd yaoogẽ wã, la mam ket n vɩɩ vẽenemẽ.»" 
Job33:29 Ade, Wẽnnaam maanda a woto naoor a yiib wall a tãab ninsaal yĩnga," 
Job33:30 n fãag-a ne yaoogã t'a zĩnd vẽenemẽ ne nin-vɩɩse. 
Job33:31 Zoobe, kelg maam, kelg maam neere. Sĩnd f noor tɩ yaa maam n gomde." 
Job33:32 Fo sã n tar koɛɛg bɩ f leok-ma. Gom tɩ m dat n kõo foom bʋʋm. 
Job33:33 Fo sã n ka tar goam sẽn na n leoke, bɩ f sĩnd n kelg maam tɩ m zãms-f yam." 
Job34:1 A Elihu leb n yeelame yaa: 
Job34:2 «Yam dãmba, kelg-y m goamã. Bãngdba, yok-y y tʋb n kelg m sẽn yetã!" 
Job34:3 Bala, tʋbr mii goam n bake, wa zelemd sẽn mi rɩɩb noosmã." 
Job34:4 Bɩ d yãk zemsgo, la d naag taab n bãng sẽn yaa sõama.»" 
Job34:5 A Zoob yeelame: «Mam yaa nin-tɩrga, la Wẽnnaam monga maam bʋʋm." 
Job34:6 Baa ne mam sẽn tar bʋʋmã, b geta maam wa zĩrẽ-be-neda. Mam poglgã ka tõe n maag ye, tɩ mam yaool n ka beeg ye.»" 
Job34:7 A Zoob meng pʋs n yaa ãnda? Yẽnda nonga yaoolg wa b yũud koom. 
Job34:8 Yẽnda tũuda nin-wẽnse. La a kẽnd ne nin-toose. 
Job34:9 Bala, a Zoob yeelame: «Ned sẽn maand sẽn noom Wẽnnaam ka tar nafr ye.»" 
Job34:10 Woto yĩngã, yam dãmba, kelg-y maam! Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Pãng-Soabã zãra ne wẽng maanego. Bãmb ka tol n maand wẽng ye!" 
Job34:11 Wẽnnaam keooda ninsaal wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã. Bãmb donda ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a manesem. 
Job34:12 Hakɩɩka, Wẽnnaam ka maand wa nin-wẽng ye. Pãng-Soabã ka bʋʋd bʋ-kegr ye." 
Job34:13 Ãnda soab n dɩk dũni n kõ bãmba? Ãnda soab n dɩk dũni gill n gũnug bãmba? 
Job34:14 Bãmb sã n dag n tagsdẽ b meng yell bala, la b sã n deeg b sɩɩgã ne b vʋʋsmã," 
Job34:15 bõn-vɩɩsã fãa rag n na n kiẽ-la wakat-yɛnga, la ninsaal dag n na n lebẽ-la tẽng tomẽ." 
Job34:16 Fo sã n tara bãngr bɩ f kelg bõn-kãngã, yok f tʋbr n kelg mam sẽn togsdã." 
Job34:17 Tɩrlem bɛ tõe n sooga tẽng la? Fo rat n monga sẽn yaa-a tɩrlem la pãng soabã bʋʋm la? 
Job34:18 Bãmb tõe n yeela rĩm-dãmbã tɩ b ka võor ye. La yaa bãmb n tõe n yeel nanambsã tɩ b yaa nin-wẽnse. 
Job34:19 Wẽnnaam ka geelgd nanambs ye, la b ka get arzegs rãmb n yɩɩd naong rãmb ye. Bala, bãmb fãa yaa bãmb nus n naane." 
Job34:20 Bãmb kiida nif kamseg pʋgẽ. Yʋn-sʋk bala tẽngã neb yikdame n wulumd n kʋ a soaalbã. B kɩtdame tɩ pãn-tõog soabã leb kɛɛnga, tɩ rẽ ka tũ ne toog ye." 
Job34:21 Bala, Wẽnnaam geta nebã fãa manesem. Bãmb geta bũmb nins fãa nebã sẽn maandã." 
Job34:22 Lik bida wall zĩ-libsg ka be yel-wẽn maandb sẽn tõe n kẽ n soond ye. 
Job34:23 Wẽnnaam ka baood n gũus ninsaal n ges n kaoos n yaool n bool-a bʋʋd ye. 
Job34:24 Bãmb lubda pãens rãmb tɩ sokr kaẽ ye, la b kɩt tɩ neb a taab reeg bãmb zĩiga." 
Job34:25 Bala, Wẽnnaam mii bãmb tʋʋmã. Bãmb lubda bãmb yʋng tɩ b sãame." 
Job34:26 Wẽnnaam sɩbgda nin-wẽns tɩ nebã fãa yã," 
Job34:27 bãmb sẽn ka leb n sakd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la b sẽn bas bãmb sorã yĩnga." 
Job34:28 Nin-wẽns kɩtame tɩ naong rãmb yãbd n boond Wẽnnaam. La Wẽnnaam wʋmda nimbãan-nebã kɛlenga. 
Job34:29 Wẽnnaam sã n sĩndi, ãnda soab n tõe n mong bãmb bʋʋm? Bãmb sã n solg b nenga, ãndã n tõe n yãnd bãmba? Soolem wall ned ka tõe n maan bũmbu," 
Job34:30 sẽn na n yɩl tɩ nin-wẽng ra rɩ naam ye, la a ra tõog n bẽd neb ne kuusr ye." 
Job34:31 Bala, a Zoob ka tol n yeel Wẽnnaam tɩ: «Mam sak n deega m sɩbgrã la m kõn leb n paas beoog ye." 
Job34:32 Wilg-y maam bũmb ning mam sẽn ka ne wã y toore. Mam sã n dag n maanã sẽn ka zems m kõn leb n paas beoog ye.» 
Job34:33 Fo sẽn kɩɩsd Wẽnnaamã ka tõe tɩ Wẽnnaam bʋ bʋʋdã wa fo sẽn datã ye. Yaa foom n yãkd yam, ka maam ye. Dẽ wã, wilg fo sẽn mi bũmb ninga." 
Job34:34 Neb sẽn tar bãngre, bɩ ned sẽn tar yam sã n kelg mam goamã a na n yeela maam:" 
Job34:35 «A Zoob ka mi a sẽn gomd ye, la a goamã ka tar võor ye.»" 
Job34:36 Bɩ b kell n mak a Zoob n tãag a tɛka, bala, yẽnda leokda wa nin-wẽnga." 
Job34:37 Bala, yẽnda kɩɩsgã wa n paasa a yel-wẽnã. Yẽnda pãbda nug-pogs ne wuk-m-meng tõnd sʋka, la a gomd wʋsg n paoogd Wẽnnaam." 
Job35:1 A Elihu leb n yeelame yaa: 
Job35:2 «Fo tagsdame tɩ fo tara bʋʋm bɩ? Dẽ yĩnga, fo rat n yeelame tɩ fo tɩrlem yɩɩda Wẽnnaam bɩ?" 
Job35:3 Fo yeela Wẽnnaam tɩ fo sẽn ka maan yel-wẽnã yõod bee yɛ. 
Job35:4 Mam na n naaga foom ne f zo-rãmbã n leoke. 
Job35:5 Nak yĩngr n ges sawatã: bãmb lugame n be fo zugẽ. 
Job35:6 Fo sã n maan yel-wẽnã, a maanda Wẽnnaam bõe? Fo beegrã sã n paase, a maanda bãmb bõe?" 
Job35:7 Fo sã n yaa tɩrga, a kõta bãmb bõe? Bãmb deegda bõe fo nengẽ?" 
Job35:8 Yaa ninsaal wa foom bal n paamd toog fo wẽngã yĩnga. Fo tɩrlmã nafda ninsaalbã bala. 
Job35:9 Neb yãbda wʋsg b namsgã yĩnga. Bãmb kota sõngre, neb wʋsg sẽn maan-b pãngã yĩnga." 
Job35:10 La bãmb ned baa a ye ka sokd tɩ Wẽnnaam ning sẽn naan-a bãmbã bee yɛ ye. Bãmb ka sok tɩ sẽn kõt-a bãmb yɩɩl ne yʋngã bee yɛɛnẽ ye. 
Job35:11 La b ka sok tɩ sẽn kõta tõnd zãmsg n yɩɩd rũmsã sẽn be tẽng zugã, la b kõt bãmb yam n yɩɩd bõn-yɩgdɩ wã bee yɛ ye." 
Job35:12 Bãmb boondame, la nin-wẽnsã tɩtaamã yĩnga, Wẽnnaam ka leokd ye." 
Job35:13 Bãmb kelemsã yaa zaalem. Wẽnnaam ka wʋmd ye. Pãng-Soabã ka ne-b ye! 
Job35:14 La sẽn yɩɩda, fo yeelame tɩ fo ka tõe n yãnd bãmba, tɩ f yellã bee bãmb taoore, la f gũuda bãmba." 
Job35:15 La moasã, Wẽnnaam sẽn ka ges fo kɩɩsgã n sɩbg-f ne sũ-yikrã yĩng n kɩte," 
Job35:16 tɩ foom a Zoob yaagd f noor n gomd gom-vɩɩdo, fo gomda wʋsgo, la bãngr yaool n ka tol n be a pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Job36:1 A Elihu leb n kẽnga taoor n yeel yaa: 
Job36:2 «Maag f yĩng bilf tɩ m wilg-fu. Bala, mam ket n tara goam sẽn tõe n wilg tɩ Wẽnnaam tara bʋʋm." 
Job36:3 Mam na n dɩka m daar zãr bãngrã n wilg tɩ sẽn naan-a maamã tara bʋʋm. 
Job36:4 Bɩ f bãng tɩ mam ka yagd zĩrẽ ye. Ned ning fo sẽn ne f taoorã bãngr zemsa zãnga! 
Job36:5 Wẽnnaam yaa pãng soaba, la b ka sãbsd ned ye. Bãmb tara pãng b yam-yãkrã pʋgẽ." 
Job36:6 Bãmb ka basd nin-wẽng t'a vɩɩmd ye. La b sõngda b sẽn namsd neb ninsã. 
Job36:7 Bãmb ka wẽnemded n bas nin-tɩrg ye. Bãmb n zaoolgd rĩm-dãmb zaoorẽ, n kɩt tɩ b zĩnd be wakat fãa yĩng n deeg waoogre." 
Job36:8 La b sã n ning bãmb bãense, wall toog sã n paam bãmba," 
Job36:9 yaa tɩ Wẽnnaam dat n togsa bãmb b tʋʋmã ne b yel-wẽnã la b wilg-m-mengã 
Job36:10 n kɩt tɩ b kelg n paam zãmsgo, la b yeel-b tɩ b bas wẽng maanego." 
Job36:11 Bãmb sã n kelg Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã n sake, bãmb na n zĩnda naar pʋg n tãag b tɛk daare, la b na n taa b yʋʋmã tɛk sũ-noog pʋga." 
Job36:12 La bãmb sã n ka kelg Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã, kãn-dibg n na n kõs-b tɩ b ki n ka bãng ye." 
Job36:13 Nin-wẽnsã sũy yikdame. Baa b sã n sɩbg bãmba, b ka pʋʋsd Wẽnnaam tɩ b sõng-b ye." 
Job36:14 Bãmb kiida b bi-bɩɩlem wakate? maoong zĩisẽ pʋg-yoaadbã sʋka. 
Job36:15 La Wẽnnaam kɩtdame tɩ sẽn namsdbã namsg fãag-ba. Bãmb tũnugda namsgã n yokd b tʋbã. 
Job36:16 Bãmb na n yiisa foom toog pʋgẽ me n ning foom zĩ-yaleng pʋgẽ, tɩ fo paam lohorem la b kɩt tɩ f zakã lɛɛg n pid ne rɩ-nood buud toor-toore." 
Job36:17 La fo sã n kaood bʋʋdã wa nin-wẽnga, bʋ-kaoorã ne zemsgã na n paalga foom." 
Job36:18 Ra sak tɩ f sũura sẽn puugã kɩt tɩ f maan wẽng ye. Ra sak tɩ yaood ning fo sẽn tog n yaoã kɩt tɩ f bʋdg ye. 
Job36:19 Fo kelemsã tõe sõnga foom tɩ f yi toog pʋgẽ bɩ? Fo pãngã ne f raoodã fãa tõe sõnga foom bɩ? 
Job36:20 Ra wẽ sir n bao yʋng ning sẽn na sãamd nebã fãa wã ye. 
Job36:21 Gũus n da wa wẽnemd n maan wẽng ye. Bala, rẽndã n kɩt tɩ f paam namsgã.»" 
Job36:22 «Gese, Wẽnnaam wilgdame tɩ b yaa kãseng n tar pãnga. Ãnda soab n tõe n zãms ned wa bãmba?" 
Job36:23 Ned ka be n tõe n wilg bãmb sor ye. La ãndã n tõe n yeel bãmb tɩ b maana sẽn ka zemse? 
Job36:24 Tẽeg n pẽg tʋʋm nins Wẽnnaam sẽn maan tɩ nebã tar n yɩɩndẽ wã. 
Job36:25 Ninsaalbã buud fãa nee bãmba. Nebã geta bãmb yɩɩg-yɩɩga. 
Job36:26 Gese, Wẽnnaam yaa kãsenga, la tõnd ka mi bãmb sẽn maandã võor ye. Ned ka tõe n bãng bãmb yʋʋmã sõor ye." 
Job36:27 Bãmb takda koom n dʋʋs t'a wa lebg wulg n niida. 
Job36:28 Sawatã basd-a lame t'a niida, a niida ninsaalbã buud fãa yĩnga." 
Job36:29 Ned ka tõe n bãng sawatã ne Wẽnnaam sa-kelemsã yell ye. 
Job36:30 Gese, bãmb gũbga b meng ne vẽenem zĩigã fãa, la bãmb luda zĩ-zulumsã ne ko-kãsengã." 
Job36:31 Bala, yaa ne bõn-kãens la bãmb kõt soolm dãmbã neb vɩɩm, la b kõt rɩɩb wʋsg tɩ sekdẽ." 
Job36:32 Bãmb gãta sa-tãsã ne b nugu, n tʋm-a b sẽn dat zĩig ninga." 
Job36:33 Bãmb sa-kelemsã wilgda bãmb waoongo. La baa rũmsã miime tɩ b waoongã kolgame.» 
Job37:1 Sa-tãsã kɩtame tɩ m sũur kiuusdẽ, tɩ yaa wala a na n fãsgame." 
Job37:2 Kelg-y-yã! Kelg-y Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã rãamde, ne sa-kelems nins sẽn yit bãmb noorẽ wã." 
Job37:3 Bãmb kɩtdame t'a tat dũniyã zĩigã fãa. La bãmb sa-yãgbã tata dũniyã kɩremsã fãa. 
Job37:4 Rẽ poore, saagã kelemdame, yaa bãmb koe-kãsengã rãamd n sãte. Saag sã n kelemdẽ, bãmb ka gɩdgd sa-yãgbã ye." 
Job37:5 Wẽnnaam koɛɛgã sãtame n wilgd bõn-kãsenga. Bãmb maanda tʋʋm-kãsems tɩ tõnd ka miẽ ye. 
Job37:6 Bãmb yeta neezã t'a sig tẽngã zugu! La b yeel sa-kẽengã t'a ni ne pãnga. 
Job37:7 Wẽnnaam kɩtdame tɩ nebã fãa tʋʋmd yalse, tɩ ninsaalbã fãa sak n deeg tɩ bãmb la b naanda." 
Job37:8 We-rũng kẽeda a gãagẽ n soondedẽ. 
Job37:9 Sob-kãsengã yita goabg n watẽ, la waood tũuda rɩtg sebdã n watẽ." 
Job37:10 Wẽnnaam vʋʋsmã kɩtdame tɩ koom gĩsi, la koomã zugẽ fãa lebgda kãenkãe." 
Job37:11 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sawat pid ne koom, la b kɩt t'a bug-pãrsã sãeegdẽ." 
Job37:12 Wẽnnaam n kɩtd tɩ sawatã yãgbã tat zĩig ning fãa bãmb sẽn datã, n maand bũmb ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel-b tɩ b maanã dũniyã gill fãa zugu." 
Job37:13 Wẽnnaam tõe n tʋma saagã dũniyã zug neb sɩbgr yĩnga, wall b tʋm-a t'a tɩ wilg bãmb nonglmã." 
Job37:14 Zoobe, yok f tʋbr n kelg bõn-kãngã! La f yals n tags n wʋm Wẽnnaam tʋʋm-kãsemsã võore." 
Job37:15 Fo mii Wẽnnaam sẽn sigind-b to-to bɩ? Fo mii bãmb sẽn maand to-to tɩ sawatã yiisd sa-yãgb bɩ? 
Job37:16 Fo mii sawatã sẽn maand to-to n yas zĩ-yɛng yĩngrã bɩ? Fo bãnga sẽn mi-a bũmb fãa zãngã tʋʋm-kãsemsã bɩ? 
Job37:17 Goabg sobg ning sẽn wɩngd tẽngã wɩngda fo futã me. 
Job37:18 Fo tõe n yɛdga sa-gãongã wa bãmb sẽn yɛdg-a to-to t'a yaa kãenkãe n pɩnd wa zũud nen-gɛtgã sɩda? 
Job37:19 Wilg tõnd d sẽn tog n yeel Wẽnnaam bũmb ninga. Bala, yaa lik tɩ tõnd ka mi d sẽn na n yɩ wãn n gom ye." 
Job37:20 Mam sã n gome, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ ned tɩ togs Wẽnnaam la? B tog n togsa bãmb bũmb tɩ b yaool n bãng la?" 
Job37:21 Moasã, b ka tõe n leb n yãnd vẽenem ning sawat sẽn ludã ye, bala, sobg pɩʋʋgame n kãag-b n looge." 
Job37:22 Vẽenem sẽn yãgd wa sãnem n yit rɩtg n watẽ. Wẽnnaam ziirã bee rabeem. 
Job37:23 Tõnd ka tõe n tõog n ta Pãng-Soabã nengẽ ye. Bãmb pãngã ne b tɩrlmã yaa wʋsgo, la b ka bʋʋd bʋ-kegr ye." 
Job37:24 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ nebã tog n zoe bãmba. La Wẽnnaam ka get neb nins sẽn tagsd tɩ b yaa yam dãmbã ye. 
Job38:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg yii sobg pʋgẽ n yeel a Zoob yaa: 
Job38:2 «Yaa yɛ ned n gom yalem goam n dat n sãam mam sẽn datã? 
Job38:3 Sẽbg f sɛɛg wa gãndaoog tɩ m sok tɩ f leoke. 
Job38:4 Mam sẽn wa n na n naan dũni tɩ fo bee yɛɛnẽ? Fo sã n tara yam bɩ f togse. 
Job38:5 Fo mii ned ning sẽn mak-a dũniyã? Wall yaa ãnda soab n tẽeg wĩir n mak-a? 
Job38:6 Yaa bõe n tebend a yẽbgrã t'a yasẽ wã? Ãnda soab n tilg a soakã zĩigẽ kugrã," 
Job38:7 tɩ yibeoog ãdsã lagem taab n yɩɩndẽ, tɩ Wẽnnaam kom-dibli wã fãa kaasd ne sũ-noogo?" 
Job38:8 Ãnda soab n pag kʋɩlemsã n gɩdg ko-kãsengã koom sẽn pusg n yit tẽngã pʋgẽ wã?» 
Job38:9 Mam sẽn wa n lud-a ne wulgã, la m pil-a ne sawatã," 
Job38:10 mam sẽn wa n yiis m noyã n kõ-a tods n gɩdg-a ne kʋɩlemsã," 
Job38:11 mam yeelame: «Fo na n yɛdg n tãaga ka, la f ka na n loog beenẽ ye. La bɩ fo ko-wĩ-kãsemsã yaas beenẽ!" 
Job38:12 Fo sẽn dogã tɛka, fo zoe n kõo yibeoog noore? Fo zoe n tõog n kɩtame tɩ beoog vẽege?" 
Job38:13 Fo tõog n kɩtame tɩ zĩig yẽeg tẽng zug wa ned sẽn dɩk fu-goabg n fugs t'a sagd rʋʋge? 
Job38:14 Zĩig sã n yẽege, tẽngã tekda wa ned sẽn dɩk yagd n maan dʋko, wall wa ned sẽn dɩk fuug n los gare." 
Job38:15 La b kɩtdame tɩ nin-wẽnsã vẽenem meneme, tɩ kang ning sẽn zẽkd-a wã kaooge." 
Job38:16 Fo tõog n taa hal ko-kãsengã ko-nin pʋsẽ bɩ? Fo tõog n kẽe ko-zulumsã bok pʋgẽ bɩ? 
Job38:17 B wilga foom kũum dignoor bɩ? Fo yãnda kɩɩm-kulg noor sɩda? 
Job38:18 Fo mii tẽngã yalem? Fo sã n mi yõwã fãa bɩ f togs-ma. 
Job38:19 So-bʋg n dabd vẽenem yiri? La lik yir bee yɛ? 
Job38:20 Fo tõe n yãag-a lame n ta a toadgẽ n wilg-a sor t'a kuili? 
Job38:21 N-yẽe, fo miime, bala, fo reng-b lame n doge, la fo yʋʋmã sõor yaa wʋsgo." 
Job38:22 Fo kẽnga neez bĩngr zĩigẽ bɩ? Fo yãnda sa-pɩlem bĩngr zĩig sẽn beẽ bɩ? 
Job38:23 Mam bĩng-a-la toog wakat yĩnga, la zabr ne tẽn-kũum daar yĩnga." 
Job38:24 Vẽenem tũuda so-bʋg n yãgda? Yaang sobg yita yɛɛnẽ n buiid dũniyã? 
Job38:25 Ãnda soab n tuk sor n kõ ko-wĩiga, la a tuk sor n kõ sa-yãgb ne sa-tãse," 
Job38:26 tɩ saag ni we-raoog pʋg neb sẽn ka beẽ, la a ni we-raoogẽ ninsaalb sẽn ka beẽ," 
Job38:27 n kõ rasempʋɩɩsã koom n kɩt tɩ mood bul n yi beenẽ? 
Job38:28 Sa-koom tara ba bɩ? La ãndã n dog meenemã sẽn dʋʋgdã? 
Job38:29 Galaas ma yaa ãnda soaba? La ãnda soab n dog zɩɩvr sẽn yit yĩngrã? 
Job38:30 Koom maanda a wãn n lebg wa kugri, tɩ ko-kãsengã zug lebg kãenkãe?" 
Job38:31 Fo tõe n loee tɛtbã la f lok yʋʋm todsã wĩyã? 
Job38:32 Fo tõe n kɩtame tɩ ãdsã puk sẽn zems b wakate, la f tɛ susã ne b kambã sɩda?" 
Job38:33 Fo mii yĩngr tõod bɩ? Fo tõe n dɩk-b lame n kɩt tɩ tẽng rãmb sak-b bɩ? 
Job38:34 Fo tõe n zẽka f koɛɛg tɩ ta sawatẽ n kɩt tɩ saag ni n bui foom bɩ? 
Job38:35 Rẽ yĩnga, foom n tʋmd sa-yãgb t'a kẽngdẽ, la f boond-a t'a sakdẽ?" 
Job38:36 Ãnda soab n kõ kʋɩl-peosg yam, la a kõ no-raoog bãngre?" 
Job38:37 Ãnda soab n tar yam n tõe n sõd sawatã, la a tõe n kɩll yĩngr ko-yũusã tɩ koom daag" 
Job38:38 n kɩt tɩ tom lebg tãndo, la a kɩt tɩ tãndagã naag taaba?»" 
Job38:39 «Rẽ yĩnga, foom n baood rɩɩb n kõt gɩgem-yãang bɩ? La foom n yiisd gɩgem-bi kom," 
Job38:40 bãmb sẽn wat n wũg b zĩ-soalgdgẽ wã, la b sẽn wat n sor tuud pʋsẽ wã bɩ?" 
Job38:41 Gãabdã sẽn mi n sãeeg tɩ kom tar-b tɩ b yãbd n boond Wẽnnaamã, yaa ãndã n kõt-b rɩɩbo?»" 
Job39:1 «Fo mii we-bʋʋsã sẽn dogd b kamb wakat ninga? Fo yãta walsã b sẽn wat n dogdẽ wã bɩ? 
Job39:2 Fo tõe n sõda b sẽn tʋtã kiis sõore? Fo mii wakat ning bãmb sẽn dogd b kambã bɩ? 
Job39:3 Bãmb põta b mens n dogd b kambã, la bãmb toogã loogdame n basd-ba." 
Job39:4 Bãmb kambã paamda pãng n bɩt zĩ-pɛɛlẽ wã, la b lakd n basd b ma-rãmb n ka leb n baood b zĩig ye." 
Job39:5 Ãnda soab n bas we-bõang t'a saad yaare? Ãnda soab n logs a sẽbrã n kõ-a lohorem? 
Job39:6 Mam kõo bãmb weoogã tɩ b zĩndi. Mam kõo bãmb lɛɛlgã tɩ b maan b yiri. 
Job39:7 Bãmb toog ka be ne tẽng pʋgẽ bʋrg ye. Bãmb ka wʋmd sẽn tɛt-a bõang tãsg ye. 
Job39:8 Bãmb gõoda tãms zut n gẽesd yamd zĩiga, n baood yam-maas meng-meng zĩiga." 
Job39:9 We-naaf sakd n tʋma fo yir sɩda? A sakd n gãee fo bãgrẽ yʋngo? 
Job39:10 Fo tõe n loee we-naaf ne wĩir n tɛt-a t'a kooda? A tõe n bee fo poorẽ n vuud wãg-koaadg sɩda? 
Job39:11 Fo tõe n teeg-a lame t'a pãng n yaa wʋsg sɩda? Fo nan dɩka f tʋʋmã n bas ne-a t'a tʋmdẽ? 
Job39:12 Fo tõe n teeg-a lame t'a tigs f koodã, la a wʋk-a n wa rʋʋg f zɛɛgẽ wã sɩda?" 
Job39:13 Neoong tẽegda a pɩgs ne sũ-noogo. La a ka tõe n yɩk wa bulwãoog ye. 
Job39:14 Neoong basda a gɛl tẽng tɩ tẽngã tom wɩng-ba. 
Job39:15 A ka tagsd bãmb yell tɩ daarninga ned tõe n wa beds-b lame, la a ka tagsd tɩ we-rũms me tõe n tab-b lame ye." 
Job39:16 A kengda a sũur ne a kamb wa ka yẽnda n so-b ye. Dabeem ka tar-a t'a namsgã na n wa yɩ zaalem ye. 
Job39:17 Yaa maam a Wẽnnaam n mong-a yam. Mam sẽn pʋɩ bãngrã, mam ka yãk n kõ-a ye." 
Job39:18 La yẽnda sã n yik n zoetẽ, a laada weef ne wed-rʋʋda." 
Job39:19 Rẽ yĩnga, yaa foom n kõ wiidã pãnga, la f ning-b yublã gɛd tɩ miimdẽ bɩ?" 
Job39:20 Rẽ yĩnga, foom n kɩt tɩ b yɩgd wa sʋyã? Yẽnda fĩisda ne yẽesem n yɛɛsd nebã." 
Job39:21 Weef bee longẽ n tibd ne pãng t'a sũur noomẽ. Yẽnda zoet n segda bɛɛbã zab-teedo. 
Job39:22 Yẽnda toog ka be ne rabeem ye, a sũur ka kiuusd zabr sʋʋg taoor ye." 
Job39:23 Sẽn zao-b yẽnda wã logd rãamd yitame. La b kãna ne b kãn-dibsã pɩndame. 
Job39:24 A yɩgd n tirsda ne pãng n na n ning tĩiga. Baorg sã n peebe, a ka tõe n leb n yals ye." 
Job39:25 A sã n wʋm baorg peebgo, a kelemdame. A wʋmda zabr yũug yɩɩga. La a wʋmda nanambsã koees ne zabrã kelemse." 
Job39:26 Rẽ yĩnga, yaa fo bãngrã n kɩt tɩ wɩbg yɩkd yĩngr n tẽegd a pɩgs n teesd rɩtg bɩ?" 
Job39:27 Yaa foom n yeel pa-nand-tugr t'a yɩgd yĩngr la? Foom n yeel-a t'a tɩʋ a tʋk yĩngr sɩda? 
Job39:28 Yẽnda bee pĩis zut n gãe be yʋngo, la pĩigã sẽkẽ n yaa yẽnda pãng zĩiga." 
Job39:29 Yaa beenẽ la yẽnda zao n gẽesd zĩ-zãrsẽ n baood bũmb n na n yõk n dɩ. 
Job39:30 A kambã yũuda zɩɩm. Bõn-kɩɩng sẽn be zĩig ninga, yẽnda bee beenẽ.»" 
Job40:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Zoob n yeel-a yaa: 
Job40:2 «Sẽn tar-a bũmb n yetẽ wã baood n zaba ne Pãng soabã bɩ? Sẽn zabd-a ne Wẽnnaamã tara leokr n na n leok bõn-kãens fãa yĩng bɩ?» 
Job40:3 A Zoob yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: 
Job40:4 «Mam paoodame, m na n leoka yãmb tɩ bõe? Mam na n dɩka m nug n pĩ m noor bala." 
Job40:5 Mam goma vugr bala, la m kõn leb n gom ye. Mam zoe n goma wʋsgo, m ka na n leb n paas bũmb ye.»" 
Job40:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda sob-kẽeng pʋgẽ n yeel a Zoob yaa: 
Job40:7 «M kot-f lame tɩ f segl-f meng wa gãndaoogo, tɩ mam na n sok-f lame tɩ f wilg-ma." 
Job40:8 Fo sɩd rat n monga maam bʋʋm bɩ? Fo rat n monga maam bʋʋm n kõ f meng bʋʋm la? 
Job40:9 Fo kangã wẽnda Wẽnnaam kangã la? Fo koɛɛgã sãta wa bãmb koɛɛgã la? 
Job40:10 Sã n yaa woto, m kot-f lame tɩ f yik n yals ne f naamã la f kãosengã, n yeelg f ziirã ne f waoogrã!" 
Job40:11 Bas tɩ f sũ-yikrã ko-wĩis pid n puugi, ges wilg-m-mens rãmbã n ning-b yãnde!" 
Job40:12 Ges wuk-m-mens rãmbã fãa n kɩt tɩ b sulgi! Bɩ f neem nin-wẽnsã wakat-yɛng pʋgẽ. 
Job40:13 Naag bãmb fãa n mum zĩ-yende, pag bãmb kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Job40:14 Dẽ, mam mengã na n pẽga foom, bala, fo meng nug-rɩtg n tõog n fãag foom!" 
Job40:15 Ges yemd ning sẽn yaa parwẽndã, mam naan-a-la wa mam sẽn naan foomã. Yẽnda wãbda yamd wa naafo." 
Job40:16 Ade, yẽnda pãngã be a sɛɛgẽ ne a pʋgã gĩinẽ." 
Job40:17 Yẽnda tõe n tẽega a zʋʋrã tɩ lebg kãenkãe wa sɛɛdr tɩɩg raoogo. A gɛyã gĩin kala taab n tar pãnga. 
Job40:18 A kõabã keelem yaa wa zũudu, la a sĩ-bi wã yaa wa kud-bɩlma." 
Job40:19 Yẽnda yaa mam pipi tʋʋmde. Mam tãsda yẽnda ne sʋʋga. 
Job40:20 Yẽnda paamda rɩɩb tãms zutu, zĩig ning we-rũmsã fãa sẽn deemdã." 
Job40:21 Yẽnda gãee mugnus tẽngre. A soondeda tãnwĩis ne bãtã sʋka. 
Job40:22 Mugnusã kõt-a-la maasem. La ko-soodã tɩɩs gũbgd-a lame. 
Job40:23 Gese, baa kʋɩlgã koom sã n fõta, rabeem ka tar-a ye. Baa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã koom sã n pãbd a noore, a pɛlg yaa kãenkãe." 
Job40:24 Rẽ yĩnga, a sã n puk a nin n getẽ, ãnda soab n tõe n yõk-a? B tõe n bẽd-a lame n yõk n poog n ning bãnga?" 
Job40:25 Fo tõe n yõka parwẽnd ne zĩm-lɛooga? Fo tõe n loe a zelemdã ne wĩiri? 
Job40:26 Fo tõe n tuii a yõorã ne tãnwĩiga? Fo tõe n yõka a gẽgsã ne lɛooga? 
Job40:27 A nan yals n bõosa foom tɩ f zoe a nimbãanega? A nan goma gom-nood ne foom? 
Job40:28 A na n maana kaool ne foom bɩ? Bɩ a na n lebga fo yamb wakat fãa? 
Job40:29 Rẽ yĩnga, fo na n deema ne-a wa f sẽn deemd ne liuula? Fo na n loe-a lame n kõ f kom-pugli tɩ b reeme?" 
Job40:30 B na n koos-a-la ne toandb la? B na n bees-a lame n koos ne raadb la? 
Job40:31 Fo na n vʋda a gãongã ne pɛɛma, la f kõs a zugã ne kõsdg la?" 
Job40:32 Fo sã n sɩɩs-a ne f nug bala, fo kõn leb n paas beoog ye. Fo na n tẽega a zabrã yell bala.»" 
Job41:1 Gese, baa ned pãng sã n waoogẽ, a ka tõe n kolg parwẽnd ye. Yẽnda sã n yãnd-a bala, a na n lʋɩɩ tẽnga." 
Job41:2 Ned ba a ye ka tar raood n tõe n yik Parwẽnd ye. Dẽ, ãnda soab n tõe n yals mam taoore." 
Job41:3 Ãnda soab n peng maam tɩ m tog n lebs-a? Bũmb nins fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã yaa maam n so. 
Job41:4 Mam ka na n sĩnd m noor n ka gom parwẽndã yĩng yell ye. Mam na n goma a pãng tʋʋmã ne a ra-sãndã la a yasrã yelle. 
Job41:5 Ãnda soab n tõog n yeeg a fuugã? Ãnda n tõe n yaag a yɛgã? 
Job41:6 Ãnda soab n tõe n kɩt t'a yaag a noore? A yẽnã bee a noorẽ tɩ nebã zoet-a. 
Job41:7 A poorã ra-pegd yaa kãenkãe n sũg taab sõama wa kugri. 
Job41:8 A ra-pegdã sẽga taab hal tɩ pemsem ka tõe n kẽ ye. 
Job41:9 Bãmb sẽga taab n lebg wa ra-peg-yende, tɩ bũmb ka tõe n welg-b ye." 
Job41:10 Yẽnda tĩsgã kɩtdame tɩ vẽenem yãgda. A ninã wẽnda wa zĩ-yẽegr vẽenem. 
Job41:11 Bug-witim n yit a noorẽ wã. Bug-pãars n yit beenẽ n zẽkdẽ. 
Job41:12 Bug-zõos yita a yõ-bogdẽ wã, wa rʋk sẽn be yɩgr zug n kɛɛda." 
Job41:13 A sã n vʋʋsdẽ, bugum yita a yõorẽ. Bug-witim yita a noorẽ wã." 
Job41:14 Yẽnda pãngã be a yublẽ wã. Ned sã n yãnd-a, rabeem yõkda a soaba." 
Job41:15 A yĩngã tõr sũga taab kãenkãe wa kugri. A tẽenemame n yaa kegemd n ka miimdẽ ye. 
Job41:16 A sũurã kegma wa kugri. A yaa kãenkãe wa neer kugri. 
Job41:17 Yẽnda sã n yiki, rabeem yõkda pãens rãmbã, la b ningda tĩig n sãeege." 
Job41:18 Ned sã n zabd ne-a ne sʋʋga, wall ne kãnd bɩ ne kãn-dibga, wall gãn-tika, yaa zaalem." 
Job41:19 Yẽnda geta kut wa moogo, la a get zũud wa ra-põosgo." 
Job41:20 Pɛɛm ka tõe t'a zoe ye. Loaabg kug yaa wa wudg ne yẽnda. 
Job41:21 Yẽnda geta gʋlg wa moogo. B sã n tãood yẽnda ne kãn-dibga a laadame. 
Job41:22 Parwẽndã tẽngrã yaa wa kug-sɩlemse. La wẽnda wa yẽnda vuuda wãg-koaadg begd zugu. 
Job41:23 A kɩtdame tɩ ko-kãsengã kɛɛd wa rʋko, la a tekd ko-kãsengã t'a lebg wa tɩdar kaam sẽn kɛɛd rʋk pʋgẽ." 
Job41:24 Yẽnda sẽn pɩʋʋgẽ fãa, koomã pɩndame. Ko-puudã yaa pɛɛlg wa nin-kẽem zug sẽn pelge." 
Job41:25 Dũniyã zugu, yẽnda ka tar to ye. B naan-a lame t'a ka mi rabeem ye." 
Job41:26 Yẽnda paoogda bõn-vɩ-kãsemsã fãa. Yẽnda yaa rũm-kãsemsã fãa rĩmã. 
Job42:1 A Zoob leoka Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: 
Job42:2 «Mam miime tɩ yãmb tõee bũmb fãa, la ninsaal tagsg ba a yembr ka lingd yãmb ye." 
Job42:3 Yãmb sokdame tɩ yaa ka-yam soab a bõe n dat n sãam yãmb sẽn dat n maan bũmb ningã. Mam goma m sẽn ka mi. Yaa bõn-kãsems sẽn yɩɩd maam, tɩ mam ka mi-b ye." 
Job42:4 M kotame tɩ f kelg tɩ m na n gomame. Mam na n soka foom tɩ f wilg-ma. 
Job42:5 Mam tʋbr dag n wʋmdame tɩ b gomd yãmb yelle. La moasã, mam nif yãnda yãmba." 
Job42:6 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam lebsd m noor poorẽ, la m maand m bãngẽ n zĩ tomẽ ne tompeglmẽ.»" 
Job42:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom ne a Zoob woto n sɛ, b yeela Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaz yaa: «Mam sũur yika ne foom ne f zo-rãmb a yiibã. Bala, yãmb ka gom mam yell neer wa m tʋmtʋmd a Zoob ye." 
Job42:8 Moasã, bao-y lols a yopoe ne pe-raad a yopoe, n kẽng mam tʋmtʋmd a Zoob nengẽ n tɩ maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum y mensã yĩnga. La mam tʋmtʋmd a Zoob sã n pʋʋs maam yãmb yĩnga, mam sẽn nand-a wã yĩnga, mam na n deega a pʋʋsgã n ka maan yãmb wa sẽn zems y yalemdã ye. Bala, yãmb ka gom mam yell neer wa m tʋmtʋmd a Zoob ye.»" 
Job42:9 Tema tẽng rao a Elifaaz ne Suwak tẽng rao a Bildaad ne Naama tẽng rao a Sofaar kẽngame n tɩ maan wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bãmbã. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Zoob pʋʋsgã. 
Job42:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebs n manega a Zoob vɩɩmã tɩ lebg wa a pĩndã, yẽnda sẽn pʋʋs a zo-rãmbã yĩngã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab tol n paasa a Zoob bũmb nins fãa a sẽn dag n tarã naoor a yiib n yɩɩd pĩndã." 
Job42:11 A Zoob ba-bi-raopã ne a ba-bi-pogsã fãa, la neb nins fãa sẽn dag n yaa yẽnda zo-rãmbã waa yẽnda nengẽ n wa naag-a n dɩ a zakã pʋgẽ. Bãmb yãba a Zoobe, la b bels-a, tood nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn bas tɩ paam yẽnda wã yĩnga. La bãmb ned kam fãa kõ a Zoob ligd ne sãnem nugbĩnga." 
Job42:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninga a Zoob bark a yaoolem yʋʋmã pʋgẽ n yɩɩd a sẽn dag n tar sɩngrẽ wã. A Zoob paama piis tus piig la a naase, ne yʋgmã tus a yoobe, la niig tus a yiibu, n paas bõn-yãans tusri." 
Job42:13 A Zoob lebs n paama kom-dibli a yopoe ne kom-pugli a tãabo.
