Job42:14 Yẽnda pʋda a pipi bi-puglã yʋʋr t'a Yemima, sẽn dat n togs tɩ walle, la a pʋd yiibẽ soabã yʋʋr t'a Ketsiya, sẽn dat n togs tɩ tɩdare, la a pʋd tãabẽ soabã yʋʋr t'a Kerɛn-Happuki, sẽn dat n togs tɩ kɩrʋ tʋko." 
Job42:15 Tẽngã gill fãa pʋga, b ka tol n yãnd pagb sẽn yaa neeb n yɩɩd a Zoob kom-pugli wã ye. Bãmb ba wã pʋɩ a paoongã n kõ bãmb ne b ba-bi-raopã." 
Job42:16 Rẽ zugẽ, a Zoob kell n leb n vɩɩmda yʋʋm koabg la pis-naas n paase. Yẽnda yãnda a kamba, ne a yagense la a yagen-tʋbrakẽese." 
Job42:17 Dẽ, a Zoob kʋʋlame n yaool n ki, la a paama yʋʋm wʋsg tɩ sek-a." 
Psalms1:1 Bark bee ned ning sẽn ka reegd nin-wẽns saglg zugu, sẽn ka tũud yel-wẽn-maandbã sore, la sẽn ka zĩndid ne nin-paoogdbã ye." 
Psalms1:2 Yẽnda nonga Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã, n tagsd a yell wĩndg la yʋngo!" 
Psalms1:3 Yẽnda wẽnda wa tɩɩg sẽn be kʋɩlg noore, n womd a biis a womb wakate, t'a vãadã ka tol n kʋɩtẽ ye. Yẽnda paamda tõogr bũmb ning fãa a sẽn maandã pʋga." 
Psalms1:4 La ka woto ne nin-wẽnsã ye. Bãmb wẽnda wudg sobg sẽn dɩkde. 
Psalms1:5 Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ nin-wẽnsã ka na n tõog n doog b zug bʋʋdã daar ye. La yel-wẽn-maandbã ka na n paam zĩig nin-tɩrsã sʋk ye." 
Psalms1:6 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab mii nin-tɩrsã sore, la nin-wẽnsã sor dabda sãoong zĩigẽ." 
Psalms2:1 Bõe yĩng tɩ buud toay-toayã wurdẽ? La yaa bõe tɩ nebã tar saag-vɩɩdo? 
Psalms2:2 Dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã segenda b mens zabr yĩnga, tɩ nanambsã yẽsd ne taab n dat n zab ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-tũusdgã." 
Psalms2:3 B yetame: «Wa-y tɩ d kao b bãensã, n fãag d mens ne bãmb loeesã!»" 
Psalms2:4 Sẽn be-a yĩngr n dɩt naamã pusga laado, Zu-soabã laada bãmba." 
Psalms2:5 Dẽ, b sũ-yikrã pʋgẽ, b goma ne bãmba, la bãmb sũ-puugrã goam kẽes-b-la rabeem." 
Psalms2:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Maam n zĩndg m dĩmã Sɩyõ, m tãn-sõngã zugu.»" 
Psalms2:7 Mam na n moona Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore: «Fo yaa mam bi-ribla! Maam n dog foom dũndã! 
Psalms2:8 Kos maam, la mam na n kõo foom soolem-dãmb tɩ yɩ f pʋɩɩre, la m kɩt tɩ f soolmã tãag dũniyã tɛk fãa." 
Psalms2:9 Fo na n sãam-b-la ne kut dasaare, la fo na n wãa bãmb wa yagd laoko.»" 
Psalms2:10 Moasã, bɩ yãmb a rĩm-dãmbã paam yam! Dũni bʋ-kaoodba, bas-y tɩ b rems-yã!" 
Psalms2:11 Tʋm-y n kõ-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne waoogre la y maan sũ-noog ne rigbu. 
Psalms2:12 Waoog-y biigã, tɩ b sũurã ra wa yik tɩ b menes-y ye. Bala, bãmb sũurã tõe n yika zĩig pʋgẽ n dɩt wa bugum. La neb nins fãa sẽn paam zĩ-lilldg bãmb nengẽ wã na n paama sũ-noogo." 
Psalms3:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, a sẽn wa n zoet n na n põs a biig a Absalomã wakate." 
Psalms3:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ad-y mam zabd-n-taasã yaa wʋsgo. Sẽn maand-b maam wẽngã sõor yaa wʋsgo." 
Psalms3:3 Neb wʋsg gomda mam yell n yetẽ: «Yẽnda Wẽnnaamã ka na n fãag-a ye.» 
Psalms3:4 Yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa gãong sẽn lilld maam, yãmb yaa mam ziiri, la m zu-zẽkre!" 
Psalms3:5 Mam zẽkda m koɛɛg n kelemd n boond Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb zĩndida b tãn-sõngã zug n leokd maam!" 
Psalms3:6 La maam, mam gãandedame n gũsi, mam nekdame, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt maam vɩɩm." 
Psalms3:7 Mam ka yɛɛsd kʋʋn-kãngã ye. Bãmb gũbga maam zĩigã fãa n dat n zab ne maam. 
Psalms3:8 Mam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Wẽnnaam, fãag-y maam! Yãmb pãbda mam bɛɛbã fãa pegse, yãmb kaooda nin-wẽnsã yẽna." 
Psalms3:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n yaa fãagda. Bɩ yãmb barkã zĩnd y nebã zugu." 
Psalms4:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi." 
Psalms4:2 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam tɩrlem soaba, mam sã n kelem n bool-y-yã, bɩ y leok-ma! Mam sã n wa be yel-pakr pʋga, yãmb yolsda maam. Zoe-y mam nimbãanega, la y leok m kosgã!" 
Psalms4:3 Yãmb a ninsaalb kamba, yãmb na n paooga maam hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Yãmb na n nonga sẽn ka tar yõodã tɩ ta dabʋre? Yãmb na n kell n nonga zĩrẽ-beedã?" 
Psalms4:4 Bãng-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab welgda b nin-nongrã toore. La mam sã n kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb wʋmdame." 
Psalms4:5 Baa yãmb sũyã sã n yiki, bɩ y ra maan yel-wẽnã ye. Yãmb sã n wa gãe y gãagẽ, bɩ y tags y sũurẽ, la y sĩnd y noore." 
Psalms4:6 Maan-y tɩrlem maando, la y teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms4:7 Neb wʋsg yetame: «Ãnda n na n sõng-d tɩ d paam naare?» Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui tõndo!" 
Psalms4:8 Yãmb kõta maam sũ-noog n yɩɩd sũ-noog ning nin-bãmbã sẽn wat n tar b koodã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, ne b reezẽ rã-paalg sẽn yaa wʋsgã wakatã." 
Psalms4:9 Mam sã n gãe m gãagẽ, mam gõee ne bãane. Bala, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n kɩtd tɩ mam vɩ n ka yɛɛsd bũmb ye." 
Psalms5:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, a bee yɩɩlã naab sebrẽ. Yɩɩnda ne wɩɩse." 
Psalms5:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m goamã, la y kelg m wõosgã!" 
Psalms5:3 Mam dĩmã, la mam Wẽnnaam, wʋm-y m sẽn kelemd n kot sõngrã! Bala, yaa yãmb la mam pʋʋsda!" 
Psalms5:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yibeoogo, yãmb wʋmda mam koɛɛgã. Yibeoog fãa, mam wata yãmb taoore, la m geta yãmba." 
Psalms5:5 Bala, yãmb ka Wẽnnaam ning sẽn nong wẽngã ye. La wẽng ka tar zĩig yãmb nengẽ ye!" 
Psalms5:6 Wuk-m-mens rãmbã ka tõe n yals yãmb taoor ye. Yãmb kisa tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa. 
Psalms5:7 Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ zĩrẽ-be-rãmbã sãame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kisa nin-kʋʋdbã ne zãmb dãmbã. 
Psalms5:8 La yãmb nonglmã sẽn yaa kãseng ne maamã yĩnga, mam wata yãmb doogẽ wã, mam na n wõgemda yãmb do-sõngã taoor n waoog yãmba, yãmb sẽn zems waoogrã yĩnga." 
Psalms5:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɛ-y maam yãmb tɩrlmã pʋga, mam bɛɛbã yĩnga. Maneg-y sor ning yãmb sẽn dat tɩ m tũ wã." 
Psalms5:10 Bala, sɩd ka be nin-bãmbã goamã pʋg ye. Bãmb sũyã pida ne sãoong tagsgo. Bãmb noyã goam yaa wa yao-vɩɩdo, la bãmb zɛlma wã gomda zãmb goamã." 
Psalms5:11 Mam Wẽnnaam, da bas-y-b taal ye. Kɩt-y tɩ b saagrã lebg bẽdg n lub-ba! Rig-y-b tɩ b looge, b tʋʋm-beedã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga. Bala, bãmb kɩɩsda yãmba!" 
Psalms5:12 Neb nins fãa sẽn paam zĩ-soalgdg yãmb nengẽ wã na n maana sũ-noogo. Bãmb na n kaasa ne sũ-noog wakat fãa. Neb nins sẽn nong yãmb yʋʋrã, yãmb na n kogla bãmba, la bãmb na n kɩdma ne sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms5:13 Bala, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab ningda nin-tɩrg zug barka, la yãmb nonglmã gũbgda yẽnda wa gãongo." 
Psalms6:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teoog sẽn tar susi. Yaa ne pɛndg sẽn tar sus a nii." 
Psalms6:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ra sɩbg-y maam y sũ-yikrã pʋg ye. Ra sɩbg-y maam y sũ-puugrã pʋg ye." 
Psalms6:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y mam nimbãaneg tɩ m pãngã sɛɛme. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, maag-y maam, bala, mam kõabã rigdame." 
Psalms6:4 Mam pɛlengã yɩkame. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, na n yɩ a woto n ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms6:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, lebg-y n wa-y n fãag-y-ma, yols-y maam y nonglmã yĩnga." 
Psalms6:6 Bala, ned sẽn ki ka tõe n leb n tags yãmb yell ye. Kɩɩm-kulg pʋgẽ, ãnda n tõe n leb n pʋʋs yãmb barka?" 
Psalms6:7 Mam sidgrã kɩtame tɩ m pãng sɛ. Yʋng fãa, mam yãbda m gãagẽ, tɩ m gãagã madg ne m nintãmã." 
Psalms6:8 Sũ-sãangã kɩtame tɩ mam ninã pãng booge. Mam bɛɛbã waooglem yĩng kɩtame tɩ m ninã yiigi. 
Psalms6:9 Tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa, zãag-y y mens ne maam, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma mam yãbrã rãamde." 
Psalms6:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma mam se-yõkrã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sak n deega mam pʋʋsgã." 
Psalms6:11 Mam bɛɛbã fãa na n paama yãnd ne rabeem. Yãnd na n yõk-b-la zĩig pʋgẽ tɩ b targe. 
Psalms7:1 A Davɩɩd sũ-sãang yɩɩlle, a sẽn yɩɩl Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, Benzame buudã ned a Kuus wɛɛngẽ." 
Psalms7:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam baooda zĩ-lilldg yãmb nengẽ. Fãag-y maam m namsdbã fãa nusẽ. Fãag-y maam," 
Psalms7:3 sã n ka rẽ, b na n fãsa maam wa gɩgemd sẽn yõk bũmb tɩ ned ka tõe n fãagã." 
Psalms7:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, sã n yaa tɩ mam maana sẽn ka zemse, wall m maana ned wẽnga," 
Psalms7:5 wall sã n yaa tɩ ned maana maam neere, tɩ mam lebs-a wẽnga, wall mam sã n yõka m bɛ n deeg a bũmb zaalem," 
Psalms7:6 bɩ m bɛyã rig maam n tɩ yõke! Bɩ a lub maam n dʋ n tabe, n vu maam tomẽ n kɩt tɩ m ziirã sɛ!" 
Psalms7:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y y sũ-yikrã pʋga, yik-y n seg-y m bɛɛbã b sũ-puugrã pʋga! Yik-y n sõng-y-ma, bala, yãmb yaa bʋ-kao-tɩrg soaba." 
Psalms7:8 Bɩ soolem toy-toyã nebã fãa tigim n gũbg yãmba, Zĩnd-y y naam geerã zug n soog-ba!" 
Psalms7:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n kaood soolem toy-toyã nebã bʋʋdo, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bʋ-y mam bʋʋd wa sẽn zems mam tɩrlmã, la wa sẽn zems mam burkĩndã." 
Psalms7:10 Mam kot-y lame tɩ y kɩt tɩ nin-wẽnsã tʋʋm sɛ, la y paas nin-tɩrg pãnga. Bala, yãmb yaa tɩrlem Wẽnnaam, yãmb n feesd ninsaalbã sũyã tagsd la b ratem!" 
Psalms7:11 Wẽnnaam yaa mam gãongo, bãmb n fãagd nin-tɩrse." 
Psalms7:12 Wẽnnaam yaa bʋ-kao-tɩrg soaba. La b sũur tõe n yika wakat buud fãa. 
Psalms7:13 Nin-wẽng sã n ka tek yam, Wẽnnaam saasda b sʋʋga, n dʋʋsd b tãp n dat n tão." 
Psalms7:14 Bãmb segenda zab-teed sẽn kʋʋde, la b segend b pɛɛm tɩ yaa bug-vɩlense." 
Psalms7:15 Nin-wẽng saagda wẽnga, a tagsd tʋʋm-beedo, la a rogda zirẽ-beedo." 
Psalms7:16 Yẽnda tukda bok n zulg-a, la a na n wẽneg n lʋɩ a pʋga." 
Psalms7:17 Yẽnda tʋʋm-beedã lʋɩta a meng zugu, la a tʋʋm-wẽnsã sigda a meng zugu." 
Psalms7:18 Mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b tɩrlmã yĩnga. Mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-To yʋʋre." 
Psalms8:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne pɛndga." 
Psalms8:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soaba, Yãmb yʋʋrã yaa kãseng dũniyã fãa pʋgẽ! Yãmb ziirã zẽk n gãndga saasẽ." 
Psalms8:3 Yãmb tũnuga kom-bãoonegã, ne kom-peelsã noy n wilg sẽn zabd-b ne yãmbã y pãng tʋʋmã, la y kɩt tɩ y bɛyã sẽn dat n dok a sũurã noor mume." 
Psalms8:4 Mam sã n get saasã sẽn yaa yãmb nus tʋʋmã, la m get kiuugã ne ãdsã yãmb sẽn ning-b b zĩisẽ wã." 
Psalms8:5 Mam sokda m meng yaa: «Ninsaal yõod zema bõe, tɩ yãmb tẽr a yelle? Ninsaal yaa bõe, tɩ yãmb get a yelle?»" 
Psalms8:6 Yãmb naan-a lame, tɩ kellẽ bilfu, t'a yɩẽ wa Wẽnnaam, yãmb kõ-a-la ziir ne waoogre." 
Psalms8:7 yãmb kɩtame t'a yɩɩd y nugã sẽn naanã fãa, yãmb kɩtame t'a sooge bũmbã fãa:" 
Psalms8:8 Piisã, bʋʋsã ne niigã fãa, la baa ne we-rũmsã," 
Psalms8:9 bõn-yɩgdɩ wã, ne zĩmã sẽn be ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn saagd ko-kãsemsã pʋsẽ wã." 
Psalms8:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Zu-soaba, yãmb yʋʋrã yaa kãseng dũniyã fãa pʋgẽ!" 
Psalms9:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teedo." 
Psalms9:2 Mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark ne m sũur fãa. Mam na n togsa yãmb bõn-bãnã fãa. 
Psalms9:3 Mam na n maana sũ-noog n kɩdem yãmb pʋgẽ. Sẽn-Ka-To, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã!" 
Psalms9:4 Mam bɛɛbã na n lebg n zoeeme, n lagsd n lʋɩt n kiid yãmb taoore." 
Psalms9:5 Bala, yãmb n kao m bʋʋdã tɩrga, yãmb zaba mam zabre. Yãmb sẽn yaa bʋ-kao-tɩrg soabã, yãmb zao y naam geerã zug n kaood bʋʋdo." 
Psalms9:6 Yãmb lengda bu-zẽmsã, n kɩtdẽ tɩ nin-wẽns sãamdẽ. Yãmb menesda b yʋʋr wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms9:7 Bɛɛb ka leb n beẽ ye! Lebga rabood zãnga! Yãmb sãama tẽms tɩ b ka leb n tẽr b yell ye. 
Psalms9:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩta naam wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Bãmb vigla b naam geer n na n kao bʋʋdo. 
Psalms9:9 Bãmb kaooda dũniyã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem, la b kaood nebã bʋʋd ne zemsgo." 
Psalms9:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa pãng zĩig neb nins b sẽn namsdã yĩnga, la b yaa pãng zĩig yel-pakr wakate." 
Psalms9:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ neb nins sẽn mi yãmbã rɩk b teegrã n teeg yãmba. Bala, yãmb ka basd neb nins sẽn baood yãmbã ye." 
Psalms9:12 Bɩ y yɩɩl n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dɩt naam Sɩyõ wã. Moon-y bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã nebã sʋka! 
Psalms9:13 Bala, bãmb ka basd nin-kʋʋdbã taal ye. Bãmb tẽra b nin-kʋʋrã yelle. Bãmb ka yĩmd nimbãan-neb kɛleng ye." 
Psalms9:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y mam nimbãanega! Ges-y mam kisgdbã sẽn namsd maam. Yãmb n fãagd maam ne kũum," 
Psalms9:15 tɩ mam tõe n togs yãmb pẽgrã fãa Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã pʋga, la m kɩdem ne sũ-noog yãmb fãagrã yĩnga." 
Psalms9:16 Bu-zẽmsã wẽneg n lʋɩɩ bok ning bãmb sẽn tu wã pʋga. Bẽdg ning b sẽn solgã wẽneg n yõka bãmb naoã. 
Psalms9:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame tɩ b bãng bãmb sẽn yaa-a soaba, bãmb maanda sẽn yaa tɩrga. Nin-wẽng meng tʋʋmã n na n wẽneg n dɩ-a." 
Psalms9:18 Bɩ nin-wẽnsã kẽng kɩɩm-kulgu, bɩ bu-zẽmsã fãa sẽn yĩmd Wẽnnaam yellã kẽng kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Psalms9:19 La Wẽnnaam kõn tol n yĩm naong rãmbã yell ye. La nimbãan-nebã tẽeb kõn tol n pa n ka pids ye. 
Psalms9:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Yik-y tɩ ninsaal da wa paam tõogr ye! Kɩt-y tɩ bu-zẽmsã yals yãmb taoor tɩ b kao b bʋʋdo!" 
Psalms9:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ rabeem yõk bu-zẽmsã! Kɩt-y tɩ b bãng tɩ b yaa ninsaalb bala!" 
Psalms10:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa bõe tɩ y zãagd y meng ne-ma? Bõe yĩng tɩ y solgd y meng ne maam m yel-pakr wakate?" 
Psalms10:2 Nin-wẽnsã wuk-m-mengã pʋga, b namsda naong rãmba, bãmb sɩlem-wẽngã n wẽnegd n lubd-ba." 
Psalms10:3 Bala, nin-wẽng pẽgda a meng a sũur datem yĩnga. A zãmb paoongã yĩnga, a tʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab n paoogd-ba." 
Psalms10:4 Nin-wẽng wukda a meng n yetẽ: «Wẽnnaam ka sokd ned a sẽn maan ye!» Yẽnda tagsgã fãa pʋgẽ, a yetame: «Wẽnnaam ka be ye.»" 
Psalms10:5 Nin-wẽng paamda tõogr wakat fãa. La Wẽnnaam bʋ-kaoorã zãra ne a wʋmbo. Yẽnda pursda a bɛɛbã fãa. 
Psalms10:6 Yẽnda tagsda a sũurẽ n yetẽ: «Bũmb kõn tol n miim maam ye. Zamaan woo zamaane, yel-beed kõn tol n paam maam ye.»" 
Psalms10:7 Yẽnda noorã pida ne kãab-wẽnga, la zĩrẽ yagbo. Yẽnda maanda neb a taab pãnga. Yẽnda zelemdã yiisda pʋ-toog ne wẽnem." 
Psalms10:8 Yẽnda kẽnd n soondeda tẽn-bãoonegẽ, n yit n kʋʋd neb sẽn ka tar yelle. Yẽnda nin gũusda ka-pãens-rãmbã." 
Psalms10:9 Yẽnda wũga a soondgã zĩigẽ, wa gɩgemd sẽn be tʋgrẽ, yẽnda sorame n dat n ling naong soab n yõke. Yẽnda lingda nimbãan-ned n yõk-a ne a gãmbrã." 
Psalms10:10 Yẽnda wõgemdame n vũnumdẽ, n na n yɩk n yẽeg ka-pãens rãmbã." 
Psalms10:11 Yẽnda yeta a sũur pʋgẽ: «Wẽnnaam yĩmdame, bãmb wẽnemdeda b neng n ka tol n getẽ ye.»" 
Psalms10:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, yik-y-yã! Zẽk-y y nugu! Da-y yĩm-y nimbãan-nebã yell ye." 
Psalms10:13 Bõe yĩng tɩ nin-wẽng tar Wẽnnaam n paoogdẽ? Yẽnda yeta a sũurẽ: «Wẽnnaam ka na n sɩbg-m ye.» 
Psalms10:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nee nimbãan-nedã toogã ne a namsgã, yãmb get-a lame n dat n deeg a yellã n manege. Nimbãan-nedã basda a yellã ne yãmba, Yãmb n yaa kɩɩbs sõangda." 
Psalms10:15 Kao-y nin-wẽngã ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandã kamse, sɩbg-y-ba, tɩ y sã n wa baood b wẽnemã, bɩ y ra tol n yãnd-a ye!" 
Psalms10:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa rĩm daar fãa, la wakat sẽn kõn sa. Bu-zẽmsã menema b soolmẽ wã." 
Psalms10:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb wʋmda nimbãan-dãmbã ratem! Yãmb kengda bãmb pelse, la y kɩllda y tʋbr n kelgd-ba," 
Psalms10:18 n na n kao kɩɩbs ne sẽn namsdbã bʋʋd tɩrga, Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ninsaal buud fãa sẽn be dũniyã ra leb n kẽes a to rabeem ye." 
Psalms11:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga. Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yet maam tɩ m zoe n kẽng tãms zut wa m yaa liuula?" 
Psalms11:2 Ges-y-yã, nin-wẽnsã yãagda b tãpo, bãmb ningda b pɛɛma n dat n tão nin-tɩrsã lik pʋgẽ." 
Psalms11:3 Zamaanã tõod sã n sãame, Nin-tɩrg na n maana a wãna?" 
Psalms11:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee bãmb ro-sõngã pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab geer bee saasẽ, bãmb bee be tɩ b ninã getẽ, bãmb getame n feesd ninsaalbã." 
Psalms11:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab feesda nin-tɩrg ne nin-wẽnga. Bãmb kisa sẽn maand-b taab pãngã. 
Psalms11:6 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni bug-saal ne kidbr bugum nin-wẽnsã zutu, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ sob-tʋʋlg walem wẽ-ba, bõn-kãng n na n yɩ nin-wẽnsã pʋɩɩre." 
Psalms11:7 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrga, bãmb nonga tʋʋm-tɩrse. Yaa nin-tɩrsã n tõe n yãnd bãmb nenga." 
Psalms12:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne pɛndg sẽn tar sus a nii." 
Psalms12:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y-do! Bala, pʋ-peen-neb ka leb n beẽ ye. B ka leb n yãt sɩd dãmb ninsaalbã sʋk ye." 
Psalms12:3 Ned kam fãa yagda zĩrẽ ne a to, nebã gomda no-noom goamã, la sɩd yaool n ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
Psalms12:4 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab menes sẽn gomd-b no-noom goamã, la sẽn gomd-b wuk-m-men-goam" 
Psalms12:5 n yetẽ: «Tõnd no-goamã kõt-d-la tõogre. Tõnd no-bɩmsã mii goamã, tõnd ka leb n zoet ned ye.»" 
Psalms12:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Moasã, naong rãmbã namsg yĩnga, ne nimbãan-nebã sidgr yĩnga, mam na n yikame n fãag b sẽn namsd-b rãmbã.»" 
Psalms12:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yaa sɩd hakɩɩka. B goamã yaa wa wanzuri b sẽn yɩlg boaagẽ naoor a yopoe. 
Psalms12:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n na n gũu yãmb goamã, la yãmb na n kogla tõnd wakat fãa ne zamaan-kãngã sẽn yaa nin-wẽns zamaanã." 
Psalms12:9 Ninsaalbã tʋʋm-beedã sẽn na n lebg wʋsg yĩnga, nin-wẽnsã na n gõoda zĩig zãnga." 
Psalms13:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms13:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n yĩma mam yell hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Yãmb na n solga y neng ne maam tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms13:3 Mam na n maana yɩɩr hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Mam na n maanda sũ-sãang daar fãa hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Mam bɛyã na n tõogda maam hal tɩ ta dabʋre? 
Psalms13:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, ges-y n leok-y-ma! Bɩ y yẽeg m nengã, tɩ m da wa gũs kũum gõeem ye," 
Psalms13:5 tɩ mam bɛyã wa yeel t'a tõoga maam, la tɩ mam namsdbã ra wa maan sũ-noog m lakrã yĩng ye." 
Psalms13:6 La maam, mam teega yãmb nonglmã, la mam kɩdemda yãmb fãagrã yĩnga. Mam na n yɩɩla Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, bala, b maana maam neere." 
Psalms14:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yalem yeta a sũurẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam ka be ye. Bãmb tʋmda tʋʋm-põaasa, la b maand tʋʋm-beedo. Ned ba a yembr ka be n maand neer ye." 
Psalms14:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee saasẽ, n sulg n get ninsaalbã, n dat n bãng ned sã n bee bãmb sʋkã n tar yam n baood Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms14:3 Bãmb fãa bʋdgame, bãmb fãa rɩka wẽng maaneg sore. Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka be n maand neer ye. Nin-yɛng meng ka be ye." 
Psalms14:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Rẽ yĩnga, tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa ka tar bãngr la? Bãmb dɩta mam nebã wa b sẽn dɩt rɩɩbo. Bãmb ka tol n pʋʋsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye.»" 
Psalms14:5 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ rabeem na n yõk bãmba. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne nin-tɩrsã." 
Psalms14:6 Yãmb yaanda nimbãan-neb saagre, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa bãmb zĩ-soalgdga." 
Psalms14:7 Kayto! Ãnda n na n zĩnd Sɩyõ n fãag Israyɛlle? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n yiis b nebã yembdã pʋga, a Zakoob yagensã na n kɩdmame, la Israyɛll na n maana sũ-noogo." 
Psalms15:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ãndã n na n zĩnd yãmb fu-roogã pʋga, la ãndã n tõe n zĩnd yãmb tãn-sõngã zugu?" 
Psalms15:2 Yaa ned ning sẽn kẽnd-a ne burkĩndi, la sẽn maand-a tɩrlem bala, ne sẽn togsd-a sɩd ne a sũur fãa." 
Psalms15:3 Nin-kãng ka tar a noorã n kãnegdẽ, a ka maand a taab wẽnga, la a ka paoogd a taab ye." 
Psalms15:4 Yẽnda kisa ned sẽn maand wẽnga, la a waoogda neb nins sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabã. Yẽnda sã n maan pʋlengo, ba sã n na n yɩɩ toog ne-a, a ka lebsd a noor poorẽ ye." 
Psalms15:5 Yẽnda ka rɩkd a ligd n peng ned n baood yõod ye. La a ka reegd kũun n zãmb bʋʋm soab ye. Ned ning sẽn maand a woto yasa kãenkãe. 
Psalms16:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Mam Wẽnnaam, gũ-y maam, yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga." 
Psalms16:2 Mam yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yãmb yaa Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa mam sũ-noogo, mam ka tar bũmb sẽn yɩɩd yãmb ye.»" 
Psalms16:3 Pʋ-peelem dãmbã sẽn be tẽngã pʋgã, yaa neb sẽn tar ziiri, mam sũur nooma ne-ba." 
Psalms16:4 Nin-wẽnsã wẽn-naandsã lebgda wʋsgo, wẽn-naandg a to sã n wa, tao-tao tɩ b bee beenẽ. Mam kõn tol n maan maoong n daag zɩɩm n kõ zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã ye. Abada! Mam kõn tol n yaag m noor n pʋd b yʋy ye." 
Psalms16:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pʋɩɩre, la b yaa mam bũmb fãa. Yãmb n so mam beoog yelle." 
Psalms16:6 Mam sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ningã yaa zĩig sẽn noom maam. Pʋɩɩr ning yãmb sẽn kõ maamã bee ra-sãnde. 
Psalms16:7 Mam pʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa m sagendã barka. Baa yʋngo, mam sũ-bãngrã keoogda maam." 
Psalms16:8 Mam geta Sẽn-Ka-Saab daar fãa. Bãmb sã n be mam dɩtgo, bũmb kõn tol n miim maam ye." 
Psalms16:9 Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ mam sũur noomẽ, tɩ m sɩɩgã kɩdemd ne sũ-noogo. La m yĩngã me na n gãanda bãane." 
Psalms16:10 Bala, yãmb ka na n bas maam kɩɩm-kulg ye. Yãmb ka na n sak n bas y nin-nongrã t'a põog yaoogẽ ye." 
Psalms16:11 Yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ m bãng vɩɩm sore. Sũ-noog wʋsg bee yãmb nengẽ. Naar meng-meng bee yãmb dɩtg wakat sẽn ka sɛta. 
Psalms17:1 A Davɩɩd pʋʋsgo. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kelg-y m sẽn kot yãmb ne tɩrlmã, wʋm-y m kɛlengã. Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m pʋʋsgã, tɩ m ka pʋʋsd-y ne zãmb ye." 
Psalms17:2 Yãmb n na n kao mam bʋʋdo. Yãmb nin nee tɩrlem sẽn beẽ! 
Psalms17:3 Yãmb feesa mam sũurã, la yʋngo, yãmb gũusa maam. Yãmb maka maam n gese, la y ka yãnd bũmb sẽn yaa wẽng ye. Mam yõka m meng n ka bas tɩ m sẽn tagsã yi m noorẽ ye." 
Psalms17:4 Mam sẽn yãnd nebã tʋʋmã, mam sak n tũu yãmb noorã goamã, mam gũusda m meng n ka rat n tũ nin-wẽnsã sor ye." 
Psalms17:5 Mam tũu yãmb naoore, la m naoor ka tol n lak ye." 
Psalms17:6 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam boonda yãmba, bala, yãmb n leokd maam! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m goamã." 
Psalms17:7 Wilg-y tɩ y yaa nonglem soaba. Neb sã n wa soond yãmb nengẽ, yãmb nug-rɩtg fãagd-b-la b namsdbã nusẽ." 
Psalms17:8 Kogl-y maam wa ned sẽn kogend a nin-beelle. Solg-y maam y pɩgsã tẽngre. 
Psalms17:9 Sõng-y maam tɩ m tõog n põs nin-wẽnsã sẽn namsd maamã, fãag-y maam ne m bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg maam n dat n sãam maamã!" 
Psalms17:10 Bãmb kenga b sũyã n ka zoet ned nimbãaneg ye. Bãmb gomda wuk-m-men-goamã. 
Psalms17:11 Bãmb pʋgda tõnd nao, b zoe n gũbga tõndo. Bãmb gũusdame n baood n gãneg tõnd tẽnga." 
Psalms17:12 Bãmb wẽnda wa gɩgemd sẽn dat n zendem a sẽn yõke. Bãmb wẽnda wa gɩgem-poll sẽn sor n dat n biri! 
Psalms17:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Yik-y n seg-y-b n gãneg-b tẽnga. Rɩk-y y zabr sʋʋgã n fãag-m nin-wẽnsã nugẽ." 
Psalms17:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zẽk-y y nug n sõng-m tɩ m põs dũni-kãngã nebã! Bãmb pʋɩɩr yaa tɩ b yiis-b nin-vɩɩsã sʋka, la y yũnug-b toog ning yãmb sẽn bĩng b yĩngã. Kɩt-y tɩ sɩbg-kãng sek b kambã, n kell n bĩng b yagense!" 
Psalms17:15 Sã n yaa ne maam, yaa tɩrlem pʋg la mam na n yãnd yãmb nenga! Mam sã n gũs n neke, yãmb belmã sekda maam!" 
Psalms18:1 Yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. A Davɩɩd yɩɩndame n pẽgd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag yẽnda ne a bɛɛbã fãa wã, la b fãag-a a Sayull nugẽ wã." 
Psalms18:2 A Davɩɩd yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam pãnga, mam nonga yãmba!" 
Psalms18:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pĩiga, mam pãng zĩiga, la m fãagda! Mam Wẽnnaamã yaa mam pĩig sẽn yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga. Bãmb yaa mam gãongo, la pãng sẽn fãagd maam, ne m pãng zĩiga!»" 
Psalms18:4 Mam sã n zẽk m koɛɛg n yeel tɩ: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr paam pẽgre,» bãmb fãagda maam m bɛɛbã fãa nusẽ!" 
Psalms18:5 Kũum sẽbds rag n sẽba maam, la sãoong ko-zoetem kẽes-m-la rabeem." 
Psalms18:6 Kɩɩm-kulg wĩy rag n vila maam, kũum gãmbr dag n bee mam taoore." 
Psalms18:7 Mam yel-pakrã pʋga, mam boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boola m Wẽnnaamã tɩ b wa sõng-ma, b zĩnda b ro-sõngẽ wã n wʋm m boolgã, la mam sẽn boond bãmb n kot sõngrã lʋɩɩ bãmb tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms18:8 Tẽn-gãongã rigimdame n miime, tãmsã yẽbgr rĩmsame, Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã puugame." 
Psalms18:9 Bug-zõos rag n yita bãmb yõyẽ wã n zẽkdẽ, bug-witim n dag n yit bãmb noorẽ, bug-saal me n dag n yit be." 
Psalms18:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zõnega sa-gãongã n tab n sigi, bãmb yasa sawad-taok zugu." 
Psalms18:11 Bãmb dag n zaoo Serubẽ n yɩgda, bãmb zomba sobg pɩgs n laandẽ." 
Psalms18:12 Bãmb solga b meng lik pʋgẽ, n kɩt t'a lebg roog n gũbg bãmb wa koom sẽn be sawad-lik pʋga." 
Psalms18:13 Vẽen-kãseng n dag n yit sawatẽ wã n be bãmb taoore, la sa-pɩlem ne bug-saal n dag n yit beenẽ." 
Psalms18:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda saasẽ n tãse, Sẽn-Ka-To kɩtame tɩ b wʋm b koɛɛgã rãamde, la bug-saal ne sa-pɩlem zĩndame." 
Psalms18:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tão b pɛɛmã n sãeeg bɛɛbã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sa-yãgb wʋsg zĩnd n kẽes bɛɛbã rabeem. 
Psalms18:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn tãs-bã, y noorã pemsem ne y vʋʋsmã pemsem sẽn yi yãmb yõ-bogdẽ wã kɩtame tɩ koomã tẽngr tẽn-gãongã puki, tɩ dũniyã yẽbgr zɛɛmd n puki." 
Psalms18:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda yĩngr n tẽeg b nug n gãd maam n yiis ko-kãsemsã pʋga. 
Psalms18:18 Bãmb fãaga maam m bɛyã sẽn tar pãngã nugẽ. B fãag-m-la sẽn kis-b maam n tar pãng n yɩɩd maamã nugẽ. 
Psalms18:19 Nin-bãmbã bẽda toogã sẽn paam maamã daare, n na n zab ne maam, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n sõnga maam." 
Psalms18:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yolsa maam n kɩt tɩ m kẽnd ne lohorem. Bãmb fãaga maam, b sẽn nong maamã yĩnga." 
Psalms18:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana maam wa sẽn zems m tɩrlem. Bãmb keoo maam, mam sẽn ka maan yellã yĩnga." 
Psalms18:22 Bala, mam saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab raabã, n ka zãag m meng ne m Wẽnnaamã wa nin-wẽnsã sẽn maandã ye." 
Psalms18:23 Mam tagsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã fãa yelle, la mam ka zãagd m meng ne bãmb noyã ye." 
Psalms18:24 Mam maana burkĩnd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n gũus m meng n da wa kong ne bãmb ye." 
Psalms18:25 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab keoo maam wa sẽn zems m tɩrlem, Bãmb keoo maam, b sẽn ges tɩ mam ka maan yell bãmb nifẽ wã yĩnga." 
Psalms18:26 Sẽn maan-a pʋ-peelem ne yãmba, yãmb maanda pʋ-peelem ne a soaba. Sẽn maan-a burkĩnd ne yãmba, yãmb wilgda a soab y burkĩndi." 
Psalms18:27 Ned sã n maand pʋ-peelem ne yãmba, yãmb wilgda a soab tɩ y yaa pʋ-peelem soaba. La ned ning sẽn tagsd t'a tara sɩlem, yãmb wilgda a soab tɩ yãmb sɩlem n yɩɩde." 
Psalms18:28 Bala, yãmb n fãagd nimbãan-nebã, la y sikd zẽk-m-mens rãmbã." 
Psalms18:29 Yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n widgd mam fɩtla. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã n yaa mam vẽenem lik bida pʋgẽ. 
Psalms18:30 Ne yãmb pãnga, mam zoet n segda tãb-bi-sulli, ne mam Wẽnnaamã pãnga, mam gãndgda lalga." 
Psalms18:31 Wẽnnaam soayã zemsa zãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yaa sɩda, la b yaa gãongo, neb nins fãa sẽn soonded bãmb nengẽ wã yĩnga." 
Psalms18:32 Sã n ka Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Wẽnnaam a to bee yɛɛnẽ? La ãndã n yaa pĩig kugri, tɩ sã n ka tõnd Wẽnnaamã?" 
Psalms18:33 Wẽnnaam-kãng n kõt maam pãnga, n kɩtdẽ tɩ mam manesmã zemsd zãnga." 
Psalms18:34 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ mam naoã yaa faasg wa walg nao, n sõngd maam tɩ m dʋʋd zĩ-zãongls zutu." 
Psalms18:35 Bãmb n zãmsd maam zabr sẽn zabd to-to, la b sõngd maam tɩ m yãagd zũud tãpo." 
Psalms18:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb kõta maam y fãagrã tɩ yaa m gãongo, yãmb nug-rɩtg tebendeda maam, yãmb sẽn leokd maamã bɩɩsda maam." 
Psalms18:37 Yãmb yalgda mam sor tɩ m kẽnda. Mam nao-sẽbã yaa kãenkãe tɩ m kẽnd lebg faasga. 
Psalms18:38 Mam digda m bɛɛbã n tɩ paam-ba, la mam ka lebgd tɩ m ka sãam-b zãng ye." 
Psalms18:39 Mam pãbda m bɛɛbã n pogendẽ, tɩ b ka leb n tõe n yik ye. Bãmb kiid n dʋʋgdame tɩ mam tabd n loogdẽ." 
Psalms18:40 Yãmb kõta maam pãng tɩ m tõe n zabe, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam tõog m bɛɛbã." 
Psalms18:41 Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam bɛɛbã zoet mam taoore, la m na n menesa sẽn kis-b maamã zãnga." 
Psalms18:42 Bãmb kelemd n kota sõngre, la ned ka be n na n fãag-b ye! Bãmb kelemd n boonda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka leokd-b ye." 
Psalms18:43 Mam neema bãmb wa tom sobg sẽn dɩkda, mam kãagd-b-la wa sor zug begdo." 
Psalms18:44 Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ m põs nebã zabã, la y lʋɩɩsd-m bu-zẽms taoore, n kɩtdẽ tɩ m soogd buud m sẽn dag n ka mi." 
Psalms18:45 Mam sã n gom bala, b sakdame, bu-zẽmsã belemda maam." 
Psalms18:46 Bu-zẽmsã pãng sɛɛme, b yita b zĩ-solgdsẽ wã, n digda." 
Psalms18:47 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vɩɩme! Bɩ mam pĩigã paam pẽgre! Bɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam fãagdã paam waoogre! 
Psalms18:48 Wẽnnaam-kãng n dokd m sũur n kõt-ma, n kɩtdẽ tɩ m soogd bu-zẽmse." 
Psalms18:49 Bãmb n sõngd maam tɩ m põsd m bɛɛbã! Yãmb zẽkda maam tɩ m yɩɩg m zabd-n-taasã, yãmb fãagda maam nin-toaag nugẽ." 
Psalms18:50 Rẽ n kɩt yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tɩ mam na n pẽg yãmb bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la m yɩɩl n pẽg yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms18:51 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maanda tʋʋm-kãsems n fãagd b rĩmã, bãmb wilgda b nonglem ne b nin-tũusdgã. Bãmb wilga b nonglem ne a Davɩɩde, la ne a Davɩɩd yagensã, wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms19:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms19:2 Saasẽ moonda Wẽnnaam ziirã, la sa-gãongã togsda bãmb nus tʋʋmã." 
Psalms19:3 Daar kɩta bãmb tʋʋmã kaset ne daar a to, la yʋng wilgda bãmb tʋʋmã yʋng a to." 
Psalms19:4 Ka ne noor goamã ye, leb n ka ne gom-biis me ye. Ned ka wʋmd bãmb koɛɛg rãamd ye." 
Psalms19:5 Bãmb koɛɛgã pukda dũniyã gill pʋga, bãmb koɛɛgã rãamd saagda dũniyã tɛk fãa. Wẽnnaam tilga fu-roog beenẽ n kõ wĩntoogã." 
Psalms19:6 Yibeoogo, wĩndgã pukda wa yikãad-paall sẽn yit a roogẽ, n kɩdemd wa gãndaoog sẽn be sor zug n zoetẽ." 
Psalms19:7 Wĩndgã pukda sa-gãongã kɩreng a yembre, n gilg n tɩ kẽ kɩreng a to, la a walmã wẽeda bũmbã fãa." 
Psalms19:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã zemsa zãnga, la a leb n manegda vɩɩm. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kasetã yaa sɩd zãnga, n kõt ka-yam soabã yam." 
Psalms19:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-tũudsã yaa tɩrse, la b kõta sũ-noogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab noyã yaa vẽenem, la a kɩtdame tɩ nin yãt vẽenega." 
Psalms19:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees yaa bõn-sõngo, la a paada wakat sẽn kõn sɛ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-tũudsã yaa sɩda, la b fãa yaa tɩrse." 
Psalms19:11 Bãmb tara yõod n yɩɩd sãnem halaale, b noom yɩɩda sɩɩdo, b yɩɩda sɩ-kaam sẽn yit sɩ-vãkẽ n tosdẽ." 
Psalms19:12 Yãmb no-tũudsã keoogda mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Ned ning sẽn sakd bãmb paamda yõod wʋsgo. 
Psalms19:13 Ãnda soab n tõe n bãng a tudgri? Kõ-y maam sugr m yel-wẽn nins m sẽn maan n ka bãngã yĩnga. 
Psalms19:14 Gũ-y maam me ne wuk-m-mens rãmbã. Ra bas-y tɩ b soog maam ye! Woto, mam na n yɩɩ burkĩna tɩ beeg-kãseng ka be m zug ye." 
Psalms19:15 Bɩ mam noorã goamã, la m sũurã tagsg ta yãmb yam. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa mam pĩiga, la m fãagda!" 
Psalms20:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms20:2 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab leok foom f yel-pakr wakate, bɩ a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr gũ foom!" 
Psalms20:3 Bɩ b zĩnd b zĩ-sõngẽ wã n tʋm sõngr fo yĩnga. Bɩ b zĩnd Sɩyõ n tebend-fo! 
Psalms20:4 Bɩ b tẽeg f kũunã fãa yelle, bɩ fo maand sẽn yõogd bugmã ta bãmb yam!" 
Psalms20:5 Bɩ bãmb kõ foom f sẽn date, bɩ bãmb pids fo saagrã fãa!" 
Psalms20:6 Tõnd na n kaasa ne sũ-noogo, yãmb fãagrã yĩnga. Tõnd na n zẽka d tãb-kaoor tõnd Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr pẽgr yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leoka f kosdã fãa." 
Psalms20:7 Moasã, mam miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõta b nin-tũusdgã tõogre. Bãmb na n zĩnda b zĩ-sõngẽ wã yĩngr n leok yẽnda. Bãmb na n fãaga yẽnda ne b nug-rɩtgã tʋʋm-kãsemse." 
Psalms20:8 Neb kẽer teega b zabr saar-dãmba, tɩ kẽer teeg b wiidi. La tõndo, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr la tõnd boonda." 
Psalms20:9 Kẽer kɩlldame n lʋɩt tẽnga, la tõndo, tõnd yasa kãenkãe." 
Psalms20:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y sõng rĩmã, tɩ tõnd sã n wa bool-b daare, bɩ y leok-do!" 
Psalms21:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms21:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rĩmã maanda sũ-noogo, yãmb pãngã yĩnga. A kɩdemda ne sũ-noogo, yãmb fãagrã yĩnga." 
Psalms21:3 Yãmb kõo yẽnda a sũurã sẽn dag n datã. A sã n yaag a noor n kosã yãmb bũmbu, yãmb ka zãgsd ye." 
Psalms21:4 Bala, yãmb segda yẽnda ne bark bõn-sõamyã, yãmb fõgna yẽnda ne maanf sẽn maan ne sãnem halaale." 
Psalms21:5 Rĩmã rag n kosa yãmb vɩɩm, la y kõ-a lame. Yãmb kõ-a-la yõ-wok wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
Psalms21:6 A ziirã yaa kãsenga, yãmb sẽn fãag-a wã yĩnga. Yãmb kõ-a-la ra-sãnde, la y waoog-a." 
Psalms21:7 Yãmb kɩtame t'a tar bark wakat fãa. A sẽn be yãmb taoorã kõt-a-la sũ-noogo. 
Psalms21:8 Rĩmã teega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la Sẽn-Ka-To nonglmã yĩnga, a ka vigsd ye." 
Psalms21:9 Yãmb nugã na n paama y bɛɛbã fãa, yãmb nug-rɩtgã na n gãda sẽn kis-b yãmbã." 
Psalms21:10 Daar ning yãmb sẽn na n puk y mengã, yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b yɩ wa wʋng bugum sẽn wɩnge. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ, b na n sãama bãmba, la bugum n na n dɩ bãmba." 
Psalms21:11 Yãmb na n menesa bãmb kambã dũniyã zugu, y na n menesa b yagensã ninsaalbã sʋka." 
Psalms21:12 Bãmb bao n na n maana yãmb wẽnga, b set n dat n zaba ne yãmba, la b ka na n tol n tõog ye." 
Psalms21:13 Bala, yãmb na n dig-b lame tɩ b zoe, la y na n yãaga y tãp n tão-ba." 
Psalms21:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Yik-y n wilg-y y pãngã! Tõnd na n yɩɩla yãmb pãngã, ne yɩɩn-noodo." 
Psalms22:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ «zĩ-yẽegr walga.»" 
Psalms22:2 Mam Wẽnnaam! Mam Wẽnnaam! Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb bas maam? Bõe yĩng tɩ y zãag y meng ne maam? Bõe yĩng tɩ y ka wat n fãag-ma? Bõe yĩng tɩ y ka wʋmd m kɛlengã? 
Psalms22:3 Mam Wẽnnaam, wĩndga mam kelemd n boonda yãmba, la y ka leokd-m ye. Yʋng me, mam ka sĩnd m noor ye." 
Psalms22:4 Yãmb yaool n yaa pʋ-peelem soaba, yãmb dɩta naam Israyɛll nebã pẽgr pʋga!" 
Psalms22:5 Tõnd yaab-rãmbã rag n dɩka b teegrã n teeg yãmba, bãmb teega yãmba, la y fãag-b lame." 
Psalms22:6 Bãmb kelem n boola yãmba, la yãmb sõngd-b lame. Bãmb dɩka b teegrã n teeg yãmba, la b ka paam yãnd ye." 
Psalms22:7 La maam, mam ka leb n yaa wa ninsaal ye. Mam wẽnda wa bɛdeng bala, tɩ nebã paoogd maam, la b yaand maam." 
Psalms22:8 Sẽn yãnd-a maam fãa yaanda maam. Bãmb laada maam la b gõmsd b zut n yetẽ: 
Psalms22:9 «Beneere, a ka yeel t'a basa a yellã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab la! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõng-a t'a põse! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n nong-a lame bɩ b fãag-a!»" 
Psalms22:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n yiis maam m ma pʋgẽ, yãmb n kɩt tɩ mam yẽsem m ma bĩisim ne yam-gãnega." 
Psalms22:11 Mam dogem tɛka, b rɩka maam n gũnug yãmba. La baa mam sẽn dag n ket m ma pʋgẽ, yãmb n yaa mam Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms22:12 Da-y zãag-y meng ne maam ye. Bala, yel-pakr pẽnegda maam, la ned ka be n na n sõng-m ye." 
Psalms22:13 Bɛɛbã yaa wʋsg wa lols n gũbg maam, Basã we-rũmsã gũbga maam." 
Psalms22:14 Bãmb yaaga b noy n tees maam, wa gɩgemd sẽn kelemd n dat n zers bũmbu." 
Psalms22:15 Mam pãngã loogda wa koom sẽn daagde, tɩ mam kõabã fãa sũgsi. Mam sũurã wẽnda wa sɩ-ribdu, a yẽnegda m pʋgẽ." 
Psalms22:16 Mam pãngã sɛɛ wa sar sẽn wã, Mam zelemdã tabendeda m dagsendakã. Yãmb gãnega maam kũum tomẽ." 
Psalms22:17 Bala, baas wʋsg gũbga maam. Nin-wẽns sull gũbga maam, bãmb sẽba mam nusã ne m naoã." 
Psalms22:18 Mam faaga wʋsgo, hal tɩ b tõe n sõd m kõabã fãa yembr-yembre. B geta maam, mam lebga b bõn-gɛtla." 
Psalms22:19 Bãmb dɩka mam fut n pʋɩ taaba, bãmb maana poeer ne mam fu-yorgã." 
Psalms22:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ra-y zãag y meng ne-m ye! Yãmb la mam pãnga, wa-y tao-tao n wa sõng-ma!" 
Psalms22:21 Bɩ y fãag maam ne zabr sʋʋga, fãag-y maam tɩ baasã ra paam-m ye!" 
Psalms22:22 Fãag-y maam gɩgemdã noorẽ, la y fãag maam ne we-niigã yɩɩla. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb leoka maam." 
Psalms22:23 Mam na n moona yãmb yʋʋrã m ba-biisã sʋka. Mam na n pẽga yãmb nebã tiging sʋka. 
Psalms22:24 Yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, pẽg-y bãmba! Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagense, waoog-y bãmba! Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa a Israyɛll yagense, rig-y bãmb taoore." 
Psalms22:25 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka paoogd nimbãan-ned namsg ye. Bãmb ka kisgd-a n wẽnemd b neng n bas-a ye. Nimbãan-nedã sã n kelem n bool n kos sõngre, bãmb kelgd-a lame." 
Psalms22:26 Yãmb la m na n pẽg kʋʋngã sʋka. Mam na n pidsa m pʋlengã sẽn zoet-b yãmbã nifẽ. 
Psalms22:27 Naong rãmbã na n dɩɩ n tɩgame. Sẽn baood-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã na n pẽga bãmba. Bɩ bãmb vɩɩmd wakat sẽn ka sɛta! 
Psalms22:28 Dũniyã gill fãa nebã na n tẽega Sẽn-Ka-Saab yelle, la b na n wẽnemd n baoo bãmba. Buud nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã na n wõgemd n waooga bãmba." 
Psalms22:29 Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dɩt naam. Bãmb yaa bu-zẽmsã fãa soaala!" 
Psalms22:30 Dũniyã pãens rãmbã fãa na n dɩɩme, la b wõgemd bãmb taoore. Ninsaalbã sẽn na n lebg tẽng tomã fãa, ne neb nins sẽn dat n ki-bã na n yĩgimda bãmb taoore." 
Psalms22:31 Bãmb yagensã na n tũu Zu-soabã. Bãmb na n togsa Zu-soabã kibar zamaan ning sẽn watã sʋka. 
Psalms22:32 B na n togsa sẽn na n dog-bã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan bũmb nins bãmb tɩrlmã pʋgẽ wã. 
Psalms23:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pe-kɩɩma, bũmb kõn paoog maam ye." 
Psalms23:2 Bãmb gãnegda maam yam-maas zĩigẽ, bãmb tɛta maam n kẽnd ko-bundum zĩigẽ." 
Psalms23:3 Bãmb leb n manegda mam vɩɩmã, bãmb tallda maam n kẽnd tɩrlem soay zutu, bãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Psalms23:4 Baa mam sã n kẽnd tãng long sẽn yaa lik bida pʋga, mam kõn zoe bũmb ba a yembr dabeem ye. Bala, yãmb bee ne maam. Yãmb gʋlgã ne y rasaarã paasda maam daoodo." 
Psalms23:5 Yãmb kõta maam dɩɩbo, tɩ mam bɛɛbã getẽ. Yãmb sudgda mam zug kaam, mam wamd pidame n daagdẽ." 
Psalms23:6 N-yẽe! Sõmblem ne maan-neer na n yãaga maam, hal n tãag m vɩɩmã tɛka. La mam na n paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, hal n tãag m yõor tɛka." 
Psalms24:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so dũniyã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgã, bãmb n so dũniyã ne a nebã fãa." 
Psalms24:2 Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ning-a ko-kãsemsã zutu, bãmb n kɩt t'a luund kʋɩlsã zutu." 
Psalms24:3 Ãnda n na n dʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngẽ wã? Ãnda n tõe n yals bãmb zĩ-sõngẽ wã? 
Psalms24:4 Yaa ned ning sẽn ka maand-a wẽnga, t'a sũurã yaa yɩlemde. Yaa ned ning sẽn ka yagd zĩrẽ, la a ka wẽend zãmb wẽeneg ye." 
Psalms24:5 Yẽnda soab na n paama Sẽn-Ka-Saab barkã, ne Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa yẽnda fãagdã tɩrlem." 
Psalms24:6 Neb nins sẽn sɩd baood Wẽnnaamã na n yɩ a woto. Sẽn baood-b Wẽnnaamã n yaa a Zakoob yagense. 
Psalms24:7 Kʋɩlemse, pags-y zãnga! Kʋdem-wẽndẽ kʋɩlemse, pags-y-yã, tɩ rĩm sẽn tar ziirã loog n kẽ!" 
Psalms24:8 Rĩm sẽn tar ziirã yaa ãnda? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, pãng soabã, yaa gãndaoogã, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zabr gãndaoogã." 
Psalms24:9 Kʋɩlemse, paas-y y zãntlmã! Kʋdem-wẽndẽ kʋɩlemse, zẽk-y-b n paase! Zẽk-y-b tɩ rĩm sẽn tar ziirã kẽ!" 
Psalms24:10 Rĩm sẽn tar ziirã yaa ãnda? Yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb n yaa rĩm sẽn tar ziirã. 
Psalms25:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Mam Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam zẽkda m neng n get yãmba." 
Psalms25:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam teega yãmba. Da-y bas-y tɩ yãnd yõk maam ye. Da-y bas-y tɩ m bɛɛbã tõog-m ye." 
Psalms25:3 Neb nins sẽn maand tẽeb ne yãmbã kõn tol n paam yãnd ye. La neb nins sẽn maand zãmb zaalmã na n paama yãnde. 
Psalms25:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ m bãng y soayã, zãms-y maam yãmb soayã." 
Psalms25:5 Kɩt-y tɩ m kẽn yãmb sɩdã pʋga, la y zãms-b maam. Bala, yaa yãmb la Wẽnnaam sẽn fãagd maam. Mam maanda tẽeb ne yãmb wakat fãa." 
Psalms25:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y yãmb nimbãan-zoeerã ne y nonglmã sẽn sɩng n be hal wakat fãa wã yelle." 
Psalms25:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, da tẽeg-y mam bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ yel-wẽnã yell ye. Da-y tags-y mam kɩɩsgã yell me ye. Tẽeg-y mam yell wa sẽn zems y nonglmã, bala, yãmb yaa sõmblem soaba." 
Psalms25:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõmblem, la tɩrlem soaba. Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ bãmb wilgd yel-wẽn-maandbã sor ning b sẽn tog n tũ." 
Psalms25:9 Bãmb tɛta naong rãmbã tɩrlem pʋga. Bãmb zãmsda naong rãmbã tɩ b bãng bãmb sorã. 
Psalms25:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab soayã fãa yaa nonglem ne sɩda, neb nins sẽn sakd bãmb kaoolã ne b tʋlsmã yĩnga." 
Psalms25:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kõ maam m beegrã sugri, y yʋʋrã yĩnga, bala, m beegrã yaa wẽng wʋsgo." 
Psalms25:12 Ãnda soab n zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo? Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilgda nin-kãng sor ning a sẽn tog n dɩke. 
Psalms25:13 Yẽnda na n vɩɩmda naar pʋga, la a yagensã na n sooga tẽngã." 
Psalms25:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnegda b yel-solgdsã ne neb nins sẽn zoet bãmbã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame tɩ nin-bãmb bãng bãmb kaoolã. 
Psalms25:15 Mam geta Sẽn-Ka-Saab daar fãa. Bala, bãmb n fãagd maam ne bẽdgo." 
Psalms25:16 Wẽnemd-y n ges-y maam n zoe-m nimbãanega, bala, mam yaa m yembre, la m yaa nimbãan-neda." 
Psalms25:17 Mam sũurã pida ne sũ-sãamse. Bɩ y fãag maam ne m yel-pakrã. 
Psalms25:18 Ges-y mam namsgã ne m toogã, la y kõ maam m yel-wẽnã sugri." 
Psalms25:19 Bɩ y ges mam bɛɛbã sẽn yaa wʋsg to-to. Kisgr ning bãmb sẽn kis maamã tara pãnga. 
Psalms25:20 Bɩ y gũ mam vɩɩmã, la y fãag-ma. Bɩ y ra bas tɩ yãnd yõk-m ye. Bala, yãmb la m zĩ-soalgdga!" 
Psalms25:21 Bɩ burkĩndlim la tɩrlem gũ maam. Bala, mam maanda tẽeb ne yãmba!" 
Psalms25:22 Mam Wẽnnaam, fãag-y Israyɛlle. Fãag-y-yã-a ne a yel-pakdsã fãa!" 
Psalms26:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kao mam bʋʋdo, bala, mam kẽnda burkĩnd pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam teega yãmba, la mam kõn tol n miim ye!" 
Psalms26:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y fees maam, la y mak maam. Mak-y mam sũurã tagsgã." 
Psalms26:3 Bala, mam ninã nee yãmb nonglmã, la mam kẽnda yãmb sɩdã pʋga." 
Psalms26:4 Mam ka zĩndid ne zĩrẽ-yagdbã ye. Mam ka tũud zãmb dãmbã ye. 
Psalms26:5 Mam kisa tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã. Mam ka zĩndid ne nin-wẽnsã ye. 
Psalms26:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam pegsda m nus n wilgdẽ tɩ m ka maan yell ye. Mam gilgda yãmb tẽn-kugrã." 
Psalms26:7 Mam zẽkda m koɛɛg n pʋʋsd barka, la m na n togs nebã yãmb bõn-bãnã fãa." 
Psalms26:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam nonga roog ning yãmb sẽn be a pʋgã, zĩig ning yãmb ziirã sẽn beẽ wã." 
Psalms26:9 Da-y naag-y maam ne yel-wẽn-maandbã ye. La y ra naag-m ne nin-kʋʋdbã ye. 
Psalms26:10 Bãmb nus tʋmda tʋʋm-beedo, b nug-rɩtg pida ne zãmb kũuni." 
Psalms26:11 Mam kẽnda ne burkĩndi, yols-y maam, la y zoe m nimbãanega." 
Psalms26:12 Mam yasa tɩrg m nao zutu, mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, nebã tiging pʋga." 
Psalms27:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam vẽenem, la mam fãagda. Ãnda la mam na n zoe? Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam vɩɩmã gũuda, ãndã n tõe n kẽes maam dabeem?" 
Psalms27:2 Tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã sẽn yaa mam zabd-n-taas la m bɛɛbã sã n kolgd n dat n sãam maam, yaa bãmb n na n lak n lʋɩ." 
Psalms27:3 Tãb-biis sã n tilg b tãb-sik n dat n zab ne maam, mam kõn tol n zoe rabeem ye. La b sã n yik zabr ne maam, baoosgo, mam sũur ket n keemame." 
Psalms27:4 Bũmb a yembr bal la mam kot Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n baood-a ne m sũur fãa. Yaa tɩ m tõog n zĩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã m vɩɩmã tɛka, n tõog n ges Sẽn-Ka-Saab neerlmã, la m tags bãmb roogã yelle." 
Psalms27:5 Bala, yel-pakr wakate, bãmb na n gũu maam b roogã pʋga. Bãmb na n solga maam b fu-roogẽ wã. Bãmb na n zẽka maam n dʋʋs pĩig zugu." 
Psalms27:6 Dẽ, mam paama zu-zẽkr n yɩɩd m bɛɛbã. Mam na n maana maoong n kaas ne sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. Mam na n yɩɩlame, la m wẽ yʋʋm-teed Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Psalms27:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kelg-y mam sẽn boond yãmbã, la y zoe m nimbãaneg n leok-ma." 
Psalms27:8 Mam sũur gomda ne maam yãmb wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: «Bao Sẽn-Ka-Saab nenga!» Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb neng la m baooda!" 
Psalms27:9 Bɩ y ra solg-y y nengã ne maam ye, la y ra leng-m y sũ-yikrã pʋg ye! Bala mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda! Bala, yaa yãmb n sõngd maam. Ra-y zãag-y ne maam, la ra bas-y-m ye. Yãmb la Wẽnnaam sẽn fãagd maam." 
Psalms27:10 Baa mam ba wã ne m ma wã sã n bas maam, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n deega maam." 
Psalms27:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zãms-y maam tɩ m dɩk yãmb sorã, tɛ-y maam tɩ m tũ y tɩrlem sorã, sẽn namsd-b maamã yĩnga." 
Psalms27:12 Da bas-y tɩ m bɛɛbã maan b sẽn dat ne maam ye. Bala, zĩrẽ kaset rãmb n yik n dõt maam, n baood maam ne wẽnga." 
Psalms27:13 Mam sũur keemame tɩ m na n yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõmblmã dũniyã zug ka nin-vɩɩsã sʋka. 
Psalms27:14 Maan tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Paam daoodo, la f keng f menga! Maan tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms28:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kelemd n boonda yãmba. Yãmb yaa mam pĩiga! Bɩ y leok maam, la y ra sĩnd y noor ye. Bala, yãmb sã n sĩnd n ka leok maam, mam na n yɩɩ wa neb nins sẽn ki tɩ b mum-bã." 
Psalms28:2 Mam sã n wa n zẽk m nusã n tees yãmb zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa wã n pʋʋse, bɩ y wʋm m kosgã, wʋm-y mam sẽn boond yãmb n kot sõngrã." 
Psalms28:3 Ra naag-y maam ne nin-wẽnsã ye. Ra naag-y maam ne tʋʋm-beed maandbã n sãam ye. Bãmb noyã baooda zems-n-taar ne neb a taabã, tɩ bãmb sũyã yaool n pid ne wẽnga." 
Psalms28:4 Bɩ y keo bãmb wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã, la wa sẽn zems b tʋʋm-wensã. Yao-y bãmb wa sẽn zems b nusã tʋʋmã. Kɩt-y tɩ b sẽn maan neb a taabã leb-ba!" 
Psalms28:5 Bala, bãmb ka tagsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã ne b nus tʋʋmã yell ye. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab lub-ba, n kɩt tɩ b ra tol n leb n yik ye!" 
Psalms28:6 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre! Bãmb wʋmda mam se-yõkrã. 
Psalms28:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pãnga, la m gãongo. Mam sũur keema ne bãmba, la bãmb sõngda maam. Mam maanda sũ-noog n yɩɩnd n pẽgd bãmba." 
Psalms28:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa b nebã pãnga. Bãmb yaa pãng zĩig b nin-tũusdgã fãagr yĩnga. 
Psalms28:9 Fãag-y y nebã. Bɩ y ning neb nins sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã barka! Bɩ y yɩ bãmb pe-kɩɩma, la y tebl bãmb wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Psalms29:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yãmb a wẽnnaam-dãmb kamba, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, moon-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã ne b pãngã!" 
Psalms29:2 Waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã sẽn tar ziirã! Wõgemd-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bãmb sẽn pukd b sõmblmã pʋga!" 
Psalms29:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽkda b koɛɛg koomã zugu, Wẽnnaam sẽn pid ne ziirã kɩtame tɩ sa-kelems zĩndi. Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ko-kãsemsã zutu." 
Psalms29:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã yita ne pãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã yita ne ziiri." 
Psalms29:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã kaooda sɛɛdr tɩɩse, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lubda Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩse." 
Psalms29:6 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ Libã tãmsã tirsd wa nag-bila. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Libã ne Hɛrmo tãmsã tirsd wa we-nag-bi-polle. 
Psalms29:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdame tɩ bug-witim tãoosdẽ. 
Psalms29:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã kɩtame tɩ we-raoogã rigimdi. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame tɩ Kadɛɛs we-raoogã rigimdi. 
Psalms29:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã kɩtdame tɩ wals rogdẽ, bãmb koɛɛgã vigsda weoog tɩɩse, la bãmb roogã pʋga, nebã fãa yetame: «Reeg-y ziiri!»" 
Psalms29:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩta naam ko-kãsemsã zutu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa rĩm wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms29:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kõ b nebã pãnga. Bãmb na n ninga b nebã barka, n kɩt tɩ b vɩɩmd ne bãane." 
Psalms30:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, roogã bark ningr yĩnga." 
Psalms30:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam waoogda yãmba. Bala, yãmb zẽka maam n yiis bokẽ. Yãmb ka bas tɩ mam bɛɛbã paam sũ-noog mam wɛɛngẽ ye." 
Psalms30:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam boola yãmb n kos sõngre, la yãmb maaga maam." 
Psalms30:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yiisa maam kɩɩm-kulg pʋga, yãmb leb n kõo maam vɩɩm, n kɩt tɩ m zãag ne sẽn sigd-b yaoogẽ wã." 
Psalms30:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-nongdse, yɩɩl-y bãmb yĩnga, n pʋʋs-b barka, bãmb yʋ-sõngã tẽegr yĩnga!" 
Psalms30:6 Bala, bãmb sũ-yikrã kaoosda wakat bilf bala, la bãmb sõmblmã paada vɩɩmã tɛka. Zaabr tõe n yaa yãbre, tɩ yibeoog yaa sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Psalms30:7 Mam vɩ-bãanã wakate, mam yeelame: «Bũmb kõn tol n tõog n miim maam ye.»" 
Psalms30:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sõmblmã pʋga, y rag n kɩtame tɩ mam tãngã paam pãnga, la yãmb sẽn solg y nengã ne maamã, rabeem-kãseng yõka maam." 
Psalms30:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boonda yãmba, Zu-soaba, mam wẽed-y-la kãntɩɩga." 
Psalms30:10 Mam zɩɩm daagr nafda yãmb ne bõe? Mam yaoogẽ sigb yõod ne yãmb yaa bõe? Tẽng tom tõe n leb n pʋʋsa yãmb bark sɩda? Tẽng tom tõe n leb n kɩsa yãmb sɩdã kaseto? 
Psalms30:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kelg-y-ma, la y zoe m nimbãanega! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sõng-y-ma!" 
Psalms30:12 Yãmb teka mam wiisgã tɩ lebg kɩdengo, yãmb yeega mam sũ-sãang fuugã, n yeelg-m tigr fuugu," 
Psalms30:13 tɩ m na n yɩɩl ne m sũur fãa, n waoog yãmb n ka sĩnd ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n pẽga yãmb wakat fãa." 
Psalms31:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms31:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga. Bɩ y ra sak tɩ mam paam yãnd abada ye. Fãag-y maam y tɩrlmã pʋga." 
Psalms31:3 Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg-ma, la y fãag-m tao-tao! Bɩ y yɩ mam pĩig sẽn tar pãnga, la m pãng zĩiga, tɩ mam tõe n paam fãagre!" 
Psalms31:4 Bala, yaa yãmb la mam pĩiga, la m pãng zĩiga. Yãmb na n tɛɛ maam, la y wilg maam sore, yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Psalms31:5 Yãmb na n yiisa maam bẽdg ning b sẽn bẽd maamã pʋgẽ. Bala, yãmb yaa mam pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms31:6 Mam basda m vɩɩmã yãmb nugẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa sɩd Wẽnnaam, yãmb fãaga maam." 
Psalms31:7 Mam kisa sẽn pʋʋsd-b wẽn-naands sẽn ka yõodã. La maam, mam teega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms31:8 Mam kɩdemdame n maand sũ-noog yãmb nonglmã pʋga. Bala, yãmb nee mam nimbãanegã, la yãmb mii mam yel-pakrã." 
Psalms31:9 Yãmb ka bas maam m bɛɛbã nusẽ ye. La yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam nao kẽnd ne lohorem. 
Psalms31:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y mam nimbãanega, bala, mam bee yel-pakr pʋga. Mam yãbame tɩ m ninã pãng booge, tɩ m sɩɩgã ne m yĩngã pãng sɛ." 
Psalms31:11 Mam vɩɩmã bee sũ-sãang pʋga, tɩ sidgrã boogd mam yʋʋmã. Mam kongrã kɩtame tɩ m pãngã sɛtẽ. La mam kõaba fãa sãamdame." 
Psalms31:12 Mam bɛɛbã fãa tara maam n tʋʋda, la m yagsã n paoogd maam n yɩɩda. Mam zo-rãmbã sã n yãnd maam, kõt-b-la rabeem. Sẽn yãt-b maam yɩngã zoet n zãagda ne maam." 
Psalms31:13 B yĩma mam yell wa ned sẽn ki, mam lebga wa bũmb sẽn meneme." 
Psalms31:14 Mam wʋmda tẽn-kãnem goam wʋsgo, lebga rabeem n gũbg maam zĩig fãa! Bãmb seta ne taab n dat n sãam maam, Bãmb yẽsda ne taab n dat n sãam mam vɩɩmã." 
Psalms31:15 Maam, mam dɩka m teegrã n teeg yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Mam yetame: «Yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam!»" 
Psalms31:16 Mam vɩɩmã bee yãmb nugẽ wakat fãa. Fãag-y maam m bɛɛbã ne m namsdbã nusẽ. 
Psalms31:17 Kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Fãag-y maam y nonglmã pʋga! 
Psalms31:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam sã n bool-yã, bɩ y ra sak tɩ m paam yãnd ye. Kɩt-y tɩ yãnd yõk nin-wẽnsã, la y kɩt tɩ b sig kɩɩm-kulg sɩddd..." 
Psalms31:19 Kɩt-y tɩ zĩrẽ-be-nebã noy mume. Bãmb gomda tɩta-goamã, wuk-m-men-goamã, la paoogr goam n dõt nin-tɩrga!" 
Psalms31:20 Yãmb sõmblmã yaa kãsenga, yãmb bĩng-a-la neb nins sẽn zoet yãmbã yĩnga. Ninsaalbã nifẽ, yãmb maanda neb nins sẽn solgd yãmb nengẽ wã neere!" 
Psalms31:21 Yãmb solga y nebã y belmã pʋga n zãag-b ne ninsaalbã sɩlem-wẽnsã. Yãmb solg-b-la zĩ-soalgdgẽ, tɩ b põs ninsaalbã zelem-toosã." 
Psalms31:22 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre! Bãmb wilga b nonglem-kãsengã mam yĩnga, wa tẽng b sẽn me n gũbgi." 
Psalms31:23 La maam, m yãgbã pʋga, mam yeelame: Yãmb diga maam n zãag ne y menga. La baoosgo, mam sẽn kelem n bool yãmb tɩ y sõng-ma, yãmb wʋma mam kosgã." 
Psalms31:24 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã, nong-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũuda neb nins sẽn tẽed bãmbã. La b sɩbgda wuk-m-mens rãmbã hal wʋsgo." 
Psalms31:25 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn maand tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, paam-y raoodo, la y keng y mense!" 
Psalms32:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Bark bee ned ning sẽn paam a beegrã sugri, la a yel-wẽnã yẽesgã zugu." 
Psalms32:2 Bark bee ned ning sẽn paam tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas a kongrã taale, la sẽn ka tar zãmb tagsg a yamẽ wã zugu." 
Psalms32:3 Mam sẽn dag n sĩnd n ka togsd m kongrã, mam kõabã rag n wãgdame, tɩ m wõosd n ka sɛtẽ ye." 
Psalms32:4 Bala, yãmb nugã zɩsgda maam wĩndg ne yʋngo, la mam pãngã sɛɛ wa tʋʋlg sẽn kʋɩɩs mood sɩpaolg wẽnde." 
Psalms32:5 La mam vẽneg n togsa yãmb m yel-wẽndã, mam ka solg m kongrã ye. Mam yeelame: «Mam na n sak n deega Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor tɩ m beegame!» Yãmb kõo maam sugr m kongrã ne m yel-wẽndã yĩnga." 
Psalms32:6 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ yãmb nin-nongdsã tog n pʋʋs yãmb wakat ning sẽn segde! Baa ko-kãsemsã sã n lim bũmb fãa, b kõn tol n sɩɩs-b ye." 
Psalms32:7 Yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga, yãmb zãagda maam ne yel-pakre, yãmb gũbgda maam ne fãagr kaasgo." 
Psalms32:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam na n zãmsa foom, la m wilg foom sor ning f sẽn tog n tũ. Mam na n sagla foom, la mam nin na n bee fo zugu." 
Psalms32:9 Bɩ yãmb da yɩ wa wed-moaaga, wall bõn-wɛɛg sẽn ka tar bãngrã ye. B ningd-b-la salbr ne sãbe n kɩtdẽ tɩ b zoetẽ, wall b yalsdẽ. Woto, bũmb kõn maan yãmb ye." 
Psalms32:10 Nin-wẽng na n paama tood wʋsgo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã na n gũbga sẽn teeg-a bãmbã." 
Psalms32:11 Nin-tɩrse, maan-y sũ-noog n kɩdem Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋgẽ! Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn kẽnd tɩrlem pʋgã, kaas-y ne sũ-noogo!»" 
Psalms33:1 Nin-tɩrse, kaas-y ne sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! Zemsame tɩ nin-tɩrsã pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms33:2 Wẽ-y pɛndg n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, wãag-y ruudg sẽn tar sus piig n pẽg bãmba." 
Psalms33:3 Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalg n pẽg bãmba! Tall-y y yʋʋm-teedã n maan noog n pẽg-ba. 
Psalms33:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã yaa tɩrga. Bãmb tʋʋmã fãa yaa sɩda." 
Psalms33:5 Bãmb nonga tɩrlem ne zemsgo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã pida dũniyã gilli. 
Psalms33:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã n naan saasã, la b noorã pemsem n naan tãb-biisã yĩngrã fãa." 
Psalms33:7 Bãmb tigsda ko-kãsengã koom zĩ-yɛnga, la b bĩngd zĩ-zulumsẽ koomã ko-bao pʋsẽ." 
Psalms33:8 Bɩ dũniyã gill zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bɩ dũniyã nebã fãa rig bãmb taoore! 
Psalms33:9 Bala, bãmb sã n yeel bũmbu, a pidsdame. Bãmb sã n kõ noor tɩ bũmb zĩndi, a zĩndidame." 
Psalms33:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe n kɩt tɩ nebã saagr lʋɩ vɩʋʋgẽ, bãmb n gɩdgd ninsaalbã sẽn dat n maan bũmb ninsã." 
Psalms33:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab saagr ka tol n viigdẽ ye. La bãmb sũur tagsg paada zamaan woo zamaane. 
Psalms33:12 Bark bee soolem ning sẽn tar Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ yaa a Wẽnnaamã zugu! Bark bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk neb nins tɩ yaa b rẽndã zutu! 
Psalms33:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee saasẽ n getẽ, la b nee ninsaalbã fãa," 
Psalms33:14 b bee b zĩigẽ n get dũniyã nebã fãa. 
Psalms33:15 Bãmb n maan ninsaalbã fãa sũyã, la b mii ninsaalbã tʋʋmã fãa." 
Psalms33:16 Ka rĩm tãb-bi-kʋʋng n fãagd-a ye. La ka gãndaoog yãoog pãng n fãagd-a ye. 
Psalms33:17 Ned sã n yeel tɩ wed-moaag n kõt fãagre, ka sɩd ye. Wed-moaag ne a pãngã fãa, a ka tõe n yols ned ye." 
Psalms33:18 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nif bee sẽn zoet-b bãmbã zugu, b nif bee sẽn tẽed-b bãmb nonglmã zugu," 
Psalms33:19 sẽn na n yɩl n fãag bãmb ne kũum, la b sõng-b tɩ b vɩɩmd kom wakate." 
Psalms33:20 Tõnd teega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb yaa tõnd sõangda, la d gãongo." 
Psalms33:21 N-yẽe! Tõnd maanda sũ-noog ne bãmba, tɩ bala, tõnd teega bãmb yʋ-sõngã." 
Psalms33:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ yãmb nonglmã zĩnd tõnd zutu, wa tõnd sẽn tẽed yãmbã." 
Psalms34:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yaa a sẽn wa n toeem a meng n maan wa gãeeng a Abimelɛk taoore, t'a Abimelɛk rig-a t'a loogã." 
Psalms34:2 Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saab wakat fãa, mam noorã na n pẽgda bãmb wakat fãa." 
Psalms34:3 Mam na n kɩdma ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Naong rãmbã sã n wʋme, b maanda sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms34:4 Naag-y maam n balem Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! D lagem taab n zẽk bãmb yʋʋrã! 
Psalms34:5 Mam baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb leoka maam. Mam dabeemã fãa pʋga, bãmb fãaga maam." 
Psalms34:6 Sẽn get-b bãmbã nens pɩndame, la yãnd ka tol n be b nensẽ ye." 
Psalms34:7 Naong soab sã n kelme, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋmdame, la b fãagd-a-la yel-pakr buudã fãa pʋga." 
Psalms34:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã gũuda sẽn zoet-b bãmbã, n fãagd-ba." 
Psalms34:9 Lemb-y n ges-y n bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa noogo! Bark bee ned ning sẽn soonded Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ wã zugu! 
Psalms34:10 Bɩ neb nins sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã zoe bãmba! Bala, bũmb kõn tol n paoog sẽn zoet-b bãmbã ye." 
Psalms34:11 Far ne kom tõe n yõka gɩgem-bi, la bũmb kõn tol n paoog neb nins sẽn baood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã ye." 
Psalms34:12 Mam kamba, wa-y n kelg-y maam! Mam na n zãmsa yãmb tɩ y zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms34:13 Ãnda soab n dat n paam vɩɩmã sũ-noogo, la a nong n paam yõ-wok ne naare?" 
Psalms34:14 Bɩ f gũus tɩ f zelemd da gom wẽnga, la f noor da gom zãmb goam ye." 
Psalms34:15 Zãag f meng ne wẽnga, n maan neere, bao vɩ-bãane, n maan bũmb sẽn wat ne-a." 
Psalms34:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninã bee nin-tɩrsã zutu, la b sã n bool bãmb n kos sõngre, b kelgd-b lame." 
Psalms34:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnemdeda b neng n bas tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã, n na n kɩt tɩ b yʋʋr menem dũniyã zugu." 
Psalms34:18 La nin-tɩrsã sã n kelme, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋmdame, la b fãagd-b-la b yel-pakrã fãa pʋga." 
Psalms34:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab pẽe sũ-sãang rãmbã, la b fãagda sũ-pa-noaang rãmbã." 
Psalms34:20 Nin-tɩrg tõe n paama tood wʋsgo, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab n fãagd yẽnda to-kãens fãa pʋga." 
Psalms34:21 Bãmb gũuda b nin-tɩrgã kõbr fãa, la a kõbr ba a yembr kõn kaoog ye." 
Psalms34:22 Toog na n kʋʋ nin-wẽnga, la sẽn kis-b nin-tɩrgã na n paama sɩbgre." 
Psalms34:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãagda b tʋmtʋmdbã. La neb nins fãa sẽn na n soond Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ wã ba a yembr ka na n paam sɩbgr ye. 
Psalms35:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yɩ-y mam bɛɛbã bɛ, Zab-y ne sẽn zabd-b ne maamã!" 
Psalms35:2 Bɩ y rɩk y gãongã ne y gãntikã, n yik n zab n sõng-ma!" 
Psalms35:3 Zẽk-y y kãndã ne y kãn-dibgã n seg m namsdbã! Yeel-y maam yaa: «Mam n yaa fo fãagre!» 
Psalms35:4 Kɩt-y tɩ sẽn dat-b n yiis mam vɩɩmã paam paoogr ne yãnde! Bɩ sẽn dat-b n maan maam wẽngã targ n dɩ yãnde! 
Psalms35:5 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã rig-ba, tɩ b loog wa sobg sẽn dɩkd wudgu!" 
Psalms35:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã sã n wa rigd-ba, bɩ b sorã lebg lik bida, la salse." 
Psalms35:7 Bãmb bẽda maam ne tãoog tɩ m ka maan-b bũmb ye, bãmb tuu bok n dat n kʋ maam zaalem." 
Psalms35:8 Bɩ sãoong ling n sãam-ba. Bɩ bẽdg ning b sẽn bẽdã wẽneg n yõk-ba, bɩ b lʋɩ bok ning b sẽn tu wã pʋgẽ, la bɩ b paam namsgo." 
Psalms35:9 Mam na n maana sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋga, mam na n kɩdma bãmb fãagrã yĩnga." 
Psalms35:10 Mam na n yeela ne m sũur fãa yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ãndã n zem yãmba, n tõe n fãag ka-pãng soab pãng soab nugẽ, la sẽn tõe n fãag naong soab ne nimbãan-ned b fãadbã nugẽ?»" 
Psalms35:11 Zĩrẽ kaset dãmb n yik n sokd maam yɛl m sẽn ka mi tiiri. 
Psalms35:12 Mam maand-b-la neere, tɩ b lebsd maam wẽnga. Mam lebga m yembr tãa." 
Psalms35:13 La ne maam, bãmb ka-laafɩ wakate, mam yeelga sũ-sãang fuug n maan sũ-sãanga, mam sika m meng n loe noore, la m pʋʋsdame n ka basdẽ ye." 
Psalms35:14 Mam dag n saad n yilimda wa ned sẽn maand a zoa bɩ a ba-biig yĩnga. Mam dag n bee sũ-sãang pʋg wa m ma n ki. 
Psalms35:15 Mam sã n lʋɩ, bãmb tigimda taab n kɩdemdẽ, bãmb tigimda taab n dat n ling n zab ne maam. Sẽn pãbd-b maamã namsda maam n ka basdẽ ye." 
Psalms35:16 Bãmb naaga nin-paoogdbã ne wẽn-kɩɩsdbã, n wãbd b yẽn n dat maam ne wẽnga." 
Psalms35:17 Zu-soaba, yãmb na n sĩnd n geta yel-kãngã hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Kogl-y maam tɩ m põs b sẽn namsd maamã, fãag-y m vɩɩmã ne gɩgem-poalã." 
Psalms35:18 Mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark kʋʋngã sʋka. Mam na n pẽga yãmb neb wʋsg sʋka. 
Psalms35:19 Bɩ mam bɛɛbã sẽn kis maam zaalmã ra kɩdem mam wɛɛngẽ ye. Bɩ neb nins sẽn kis-b maam zaalmã ra ges maam n wẽgs b nin ye! 
Psalms35:20 Bala, bãmb ka tol n gomd n baood vɩ-bãan ye, bãmb saagda zãmb saagr tẽngã neb nins sẽn vɩ-b ne bãanã wɛɛngẽ." 
Psalms35:21 Bãmb yaaga b noor n paoogd maam n yetẽ: N-faa! N-faa! Tõnd nif yãnd-a lame. 
Psalms35:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yãnd-a lame, ra-y sĩnd-y y noor ye! Zu-soaba, ra-y zãag-y y meng ne maam ye!" 
Psalms35:23 Mam Wẽnnaam, la m Zu-soaba, yik-y-yã! Yik-y n wilg-y tɩ m tara bʋʋm. Yik-y n zab-y n sõng-y-ma!" 
Psalms35:24 Mam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bʋ-y m bʋʋdã wa sẽn zems y tɩrlmã! Bɩ nin-bãmbã ra maan sũ-noog mam wɛɛngẽ ye!" 
Psalms35:25 Bɩ bãmb da wa yeel b sũyã pʋs tɩ: «Yaa woto bal la tõnd sẽn dag n datã!» Bɩ bãmb ra wa yeel tɩ: «Tõnd vel-a lame!» 
Psalms35:26 Bɩ sẽn maand-b sũ-noog mam toogã yĩngã naag taab n paam yãnd ne paoogre. Bɩ neb nins sẽn tagsd tɩ b yɩɩda maamã rɩ yãnde, la b paam paoogre!" 
Psalms35:27 Bɩ neb nins sũy sẽn noom ne mam tɩrlmã, kaas n maan sũ-noog n kɩdme. La bɩ b yeel wakat fãa yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, bãmb sũur nooma ne b tʋmtʋmdã sẽn vɩ-bãanã.»" 
Psalms35:28 Mam zelemd na n togsa yãmb tɩrlmã ne y pẽgrã daar fãa! 
Psalms36:1 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms36:2 Nin-wẽngã kɩɩsg gomdã paa mam sũurẽ, yẽnda ka zoet Wẽnnaam ye." 
Psalms36:3 Yẽnda belgda a menga, n ka sakd n deeg a kongr n kisg-a ye." 
Psalms36:4 Yẽnda noorã goam yaa wẽng la zãmbo. Yẽnda zãgsa sẽn yaa sõama, n ka rat n maan neer ye." 
Psalms36:5 Yẽnda sã n gãe, a tagsda wẽng maaneg bala, yẽnda ka tũud so-sõng ye, yẽnda ka zãgsd wẽng maaneg ye." 
Psalms36:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nonglmã bee hal saasẽ, la yãmb pʋ-peelmã tata hal sawatẽ." 
Psalms36:7 Yãmb tɩrlmã zãntlem wẽnda Wẽnnaam tãmse. Yãmb bʋ-kaoorã zulum yɩɩda ko-kãsemse. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n fãagd ninsaalb ne rũmsi." 
Psalms36:8 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb nonglmã tara yõod wʋsgo, ninsaalbã soondeda yãmb pɩgsã maasmẽ." 
Psalms36:9 Yãmb doogã pida ne rɩɩbo, tɩ b rɩt n tɩgda, la yãmb kõt-b-la y sõmblem ko-noogã tɩ b yũuda." 
Psalms36:10 Bala, vɩɩm ko-bundum bee yãmb nengẽ. Yãmb vẽenemã pʋgẽ tõnd tõe n yãa vẽenem." 
Psalms36:11 Kɩt-y tɩ sẽn mi-b yãmbã tɩg ne y nonglmã, la y kɩt tɩ yãmb tɩrlmã zĩnd pʋ-peelem-dãmbã zutu." 
Psalms36:12 Bɩ wuk-m-meng soabã naoor ra tabg m nengẽ ye. La bɩ nin-wẽnsã nug ra tõog n dig maam ye! 
Psalms36:13 Yaa beenẽ la tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã lʋɩta. B leeba bãmb n lubi, la b kõn leb n yik ye!" 
Psalms37:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Ra yik f sũur ne nin-wẽng ye. Ra maan sũ-kiir ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã ye. 
Psalms37:2 Bala, b na n zelga tao-tao wa moodo, la b na n kʋɩɩ wa mo-maasa." 
Psalms37:3 Teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan neere, n zĩnd tẽngã pʋg n vɩɩmd bãane." 
Psalms37:4 Maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋgẽ, la b na n kõo foom f sũur sẽn date." 
Psalms37:5 Bas f yell ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, teeg bãmba, la bãmb na manege." 
Psalms37:6 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ f tɩrlmã puk wa vẽenem, la b kɩt tɩ f zemsgã puk wa wĩnto-sʋka." 
Psalms37:7 Sĩnd f noor Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la f ges bãmb bala. Ra yik f sũur ne ned ning sẽn paamd tõogr a saag-wẽns pʋga, la ne ned sẽn tõogd ne a tags-wẽns ye." 
Psalms37:8 Zãgs sũ-yikri, la f bas sũ-puugri. Sik f sũuri, t'a ra wa kɩt tɩ f maan sẽn yaa wẽng ye." 
Psalms37:9 Bala, b na n menesa tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã, la sẽn tẽed-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã n na n soog tẽngã." 
Psalms37:10 Keta bilf bala, tɩ nin-wẽng ka leb n zĩnd ye! Fo na n gẽes-a lame n ka yãnd ye!" 
Psalms37:11 Sik-m-mens rãmbã n na n soog tẽngã, la b na n paama vɩ-bãane, ne sũ-noog meng-menga." 
Psalms37:12 Nin-wẽng saagd n dat n maana nin-tɩrg wẽnga, n wãbd a yẽn ne-a." 
Psalms37:13 La Zu-soabã laada yẽnda, bala, b neeme tɩ nin-wẽng daarã taame n sɛ." 
Psalms37:14 Nin-wẽns wõogda b sʋʋse, n dʋʋsd b tãbdo, n dat n lub nimbãan-ned ne naong soaba, la b baood n kood sẽn kẽnd-b so-tɩrg zugã." 
Psalms37:15 Bãmb sʋʋsã na n wẽneg n kõsa b mensã sũyã, la b tãbdã na n kaoome." 
Psalms37:16 Nin-tɩrg sẽn tar bũmb bilfu, n são nin-wẽns wʋsg sẽn tar arzegse." 
Psalms37:17 Bala, nin-wẽnsã kams na n kaoome, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab tebendeda nin-tɩrse." 
Psalms37:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab mii burkĩmbã rasmã. Bãmb pʋɩɩr paada wakat fãa. 
Psalms37:19 La toog wakate, yãnd kõn yõk-b ye. Kom wakate, b na n dɩ n tɩgame." 
Psalms37:20 La nin-wẽnsã na n sãamame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab bɛɛbã na n looga wa yam-maasa. Bãmb na n loogame, b na n looga wa bug-zõose." 
Psalms37:21 Nin-wẽng pengdame n ka lebsdẽ ye, la nin-tɩrg zoeta nimbãaneg n kõtẽ." 
Psalms37:22 Bala, bãmb sẽn ning-b rãmb barkã n na n soog tẽngã, la bãmb sẽn kãab b rãmb wẽngã na n sãamame." 
Psalms37:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame tɩ ned kẽnd yɩ sõama, la a manesm tata bãmb yam." 
Psalms37:24 Yẽnda sã n salge, a ka lʋɩt tẽng ye, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gãda yẽnda nugu." 
Psalms37:25 Mam yɩɩ yãaga, moasã, mam lebga nin-kẽema, la mam zɩ n yãnd tɩ b bas nin-tɩrga, wall a yageng t'a bõsd rɩɩb ye." 
Psalms37:26 Wakat fãa, nin-tɩrg zoeta nimbãaneg n pengdẽ, la yẽnda yagensã paamda barka." 
Psalms37:27 Zãag f meng ne wẽnga, n maan neere, la f na vɩɩmd tẽngã pʋg wakat fãa." 
Psalms37:28 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga tɩrlem, la bãmb ka basd sẽn maand-b pʋ-peelem ne bãmbã ye. Bãmb paamda Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũudum wakat fãa, la nin-wẽns yagens sãamdame." 
Psalms37:29 Nin-tɩrsã n na n soog tẽngã, la b na n paa beenẽ wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Psalms37:30 Nin-tɩrg noor yiisda yam goamã, la a zelemd togsda tɩrlem goamã." 
Psalms37:31 Yẽnda bĩngda a Wẽnnaamã tõog a sũurẽ. Yẽnda ka kẽnd n lagsdẽ ye. 
Psalms37:32 Nin-wẽng gũusda nin-tɩrga, n baood n kʋ-a." 
Psalms37:33 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka basd tɩ nin-wẽng paam-a ye. Bãmb ka sakd tɩ nin-tɩrg kong bʋʋm bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye. 
Psalms37:34 Maan tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la f pa bãmb sorã zugu, tɩ bãmb na zẽk-fo, n kɩt tɩ f soog tẽngã. La fo na n yãnda nin-wẽnsã sãoongo." 
Psalms37:35 Mam yãnda nin-wẽng a nin-toolmã pʋga. Yẽnda tãooda wa tɩ-polle. 
Psalms37:36 Nin-wẽng loogdame, n ka leb n beẽ ye. Mam bao-a lame, n ka yãnd ye." 
Psalms37:37 Maag f yĩng n ges burkina, la f ges nin-tɩrga. Sẽn baood-a vɩ-bãan tara beoog neere." 
Psalms37:38 La b na n naaga kɩɩsdbã taab n sãame. Nin-wẽnsã ka tar beoog neer ye. 
Psalms37:39 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n fãagd nin-tɩrse, yel-pakr wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa b pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms37:40 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngd-b lame tɩ b põse. Bãmb na n sõng-b lame n kɩt tɩ b põs nin-wẽnse, n fãag-ba, bãmb sẽn baood zĩ-soalgdg bãmb nengẽ wã yĩnga." 
Psalms38:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, tẽegr yĩnga." 
Psalms38:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ra-y sɩbg-y maam y sũ-yikrã pʋg ye. La y ra leng maam y sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ ye!" 
Psalms38:3 Bala, yãmb pɛɛmã yõga maam. Yãmb nugã wẽe maam." 
Psalms38:4 Yãmb sũ-puugrã kɩtame tɩ mam yĩngã zãng tar toogo. Mam beegrã yĩnga, mam kõabã ka leb n tar laafɩ ye." 
Psalms38:5 Bala, mam yel-wẽnã zãntlem yɩɩda m zugã woglem, la a lebga zɩɩbo, n zɩsg maam hal wʋsgo." 
Psalms38:6 Mam noadã põogame tɩ yũugã yita, la yaa mam yalemdã yĩnga." 
Psalms38:7 Mam gõdame n zĩ ne sũ-sãan-kãsenga. Daar fãa, mam bee sũ-sãang pʋga, wa m ned n ki." 
Psalms38:8 Bala, mam pʋgã fãa wɩnga basɩ, tɩ mam yĩngã fãa tar toogo." 
Psalms38:9 Mam ka leb n tar pãng ye. Mam gĩinã fãa maaga zãnga. Mam sũ-sãangã kɩtame tɩ m sidgdẽ. 
Psalms38:10 Zu-soaba, yãmb mii mam datmã fãa, la mam sidgrã ka solg ne yãmb ye." 
Psalms38:11 Mam sũurã kiuusdame, tɩ m pãngã sɛtẽ. Mam ninã pãng boogdame." 
Psalms38:12 Mam noadã yĩnga, m zo-rãmbã ne m tũud-n-taasã tard n lebda kɛɛnga. Mam doagdbã zãagda b mens ne maam." 
Psalms38:13 Sẽn dat-b n sãam mam vɩɩmã bẽta maam. Sẽn dat-b maam ne wẽngã gomda maam n kãnegd maam la b gomd zãmb goam ne maam daar fãa. 
Psalms38:14 La mam lebga wa wʋnga, n ka leb n wʋmdẽ ye. Mam lebga wa muka, n ka leb n gomd ye." 
Psalms38:15 Mam lebga wa ned sẽn ka wʋmde, n ka tar m sẽn na n leok ye." 
Psalms38:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb la m geta, Mam Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb n na n leok n kõ-ma." 
Psalms38:17 Bala, mam kosa yãmb n yeel yaa: «Ra bas-y tɩ b maan sũ-noog mam wɛɛngẽ ye. Ra bas-y tɩ b wuk b mens m naoorã sẽn wat n lakã ye.»" 
Psalms38:18 Bala, mam dat n lʋɩɩme, la toog tar-m-la daar fãa." 
Psalms38:19 Bala, mam vẽneg n togsa m kongrã, mam sũur sãama m yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Psalms38:20 Mam bɛɛbã fĩisda ne pãnga. Sẽn kis-b maam zaalmã sõor yaa wʋsgo. 
Psalms38:21 Neb nins mam sẽn maan-b neer tɩ b lebsd maam wẽngã zabda ne maam, mam sẽn baood n maan-neer yĩnga." 
Psalms38:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ra bas-y maam ye! Mam Wẽnnaam, da zãag-y y meng ne maam ye!" 
Psalms38:23 Wa-y tao-tao n wa sõng-ma, Zu-soaba, yãmb la mam fãagda!" 
Psalms39:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab a Yedutun yĩnga." 
Psalms39:2 Mam yeelame yaa: «Mam na n gũusa ne m yel-manesem, n da wa beeg ne m noorã goamã ye. Nin-wẽngã sã n be m sɛɛgẽ, mam na n ninga m noorã salbre.»" 
Psalms39:3 Dẽ, mam sĩnda m noor n ka gomd ye. Mam sĩndame, la m ka tar sũ-noog ye. Mam toogã looga nugu." 
Psalms39:4 Mam sũurã rag n yõogda m pʋgẽ, mam wõosdame tɩ rɩt maam wa bugum. Dẽ, mam wa n baas n gomame." 
Psalms39:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩt-y tɩ m bãng m baoosg sẽn na n yɩ to-to, la y wilg maam m dasmã sõore. Kɩt-y tɩ m bãng tɩ m yaa bõn-loaagdg bala." 
Psalms39:6 Ade, yãmb kɩtame tɩ m vɩɩmã woglem ka yɩɩd nug-pʋg ye. La mam vɩɩmã woglem yaa wa walem bal yãmb taoore. Yaa sɩda, ninsaal buudã fãa yaa wa pemsem bala." 
Psalms39:7 N-yẽe! Ninsaal kẽnã fãa yaa wa sulunsuk bala, yẽnda tãnd-tãndã fãa yaa zaalem! Yẽnda baood n zamdame, la a ka mi ned ning sẽn na n soog-a ye." 
Psalms39:8 Zu-soaba, mam na n maana tẽeb ne bõe moasã? Mam na n maana tẽeb ne yãmb bala." 
Psalms39:9 Fãag-y maam ne m yel-wẽnã fãa! Ra bas-y-m tɩ yalem paoog-m ye! 
Psalms39:10 Mam kell n sĩndame, n ka yaagd m noor ye. Bala, yãmb n sak tɩ yɩ a woto." 
Psalms39:11 Ra leb-y n pãb-y-m ye! Yãmb nugã pãbr koms-m lame. 
Psalms39:12 Yãmb lengda ninsaal n demsd-a, a beegrã yĩnga. Yãmb sãamda yẽnda sẽn nong bũmb ningã, wa yõgdr sẽn dɩt bũmbu. Ninsaal buudã fãa yaa wa walem bala!" 
Psalms39:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wʋm-y mam pʋʋsgã, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m sẽn boond yãmb n kot sõngrã! Bɩ y ra sĩnd y noor mam yãbrã pʋg ye. Bala, mam yaa sãan yãmb taoore. Mam yaa nin-loaagdg wa m yaab-rãmbã." 
Psalms39:14 Wẽnemd-y n bas-y-m tɩ m noor tõe leb n paam laado, sẽn deng m sẽn na n loog n ka leb n beẽ ye!" 
Psalms40:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms40:2 Mam maana tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La bãmb sulgame n wʋm m kɛlengã. 
Psalms40:3 Bãmb yiisa maam sãoong bok pʋga, la b yiis-m begdã pʋgẽ. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam naoã yals pĩig zugu, n kɩt tɩ m kẽnd ne pɛl-kɛgenga." 
Psalms40:4 Bãmb ninga yɩɩn-paalg mam noorẽ, yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã pẽgr yɩɩlle. Neb wʋsg na n yãnda bãmb tɩ rabeem yõk-ba, la b na n dɩka b teegrã n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms40:5 Bark bee ned ning sẽn teegd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã zugu, ned ning sẽn ka wẽnemded n tũ tɩta-nebã, la sẽn ka naagd-a zĩrẽ-be-rãmbã!" 
Psalms40:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb maana bõn-bãn wʋsgo, wa sẽn zems saagr ning yãmb sẽn tar tõnd yĩngã. Yãmb ka tol n tar mak-n-taag ye. Mam na n togsa bõn-kãnga, n leb n moon-a. Y tʋʋm-kãsemsã sõor yaa wʋsg tɩ ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye." 
Psalms40:7 Ka maoongo, wall kũun la yãmb nong ye. Yãmb yoka mam tʋba. Ka maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, wall yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maoong la yãmb dat ye." 
Psalms40:8 Dẽ, mam yeelame yaa: «Ade, mam wata ne seb-pindgã b sẽn gʋls mam yĩngã.»" 
Psalms40:9 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam dat n maana yãmb daabo, la m bĩng yãmb tõogã m sũurẽ." 
Psalms40:10 Mam togsa tɩrlem koe-noogã kʋʋn-kãseng sʋka. Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb meng miime, tɩ mam ka sĩnd m noor ye." 
Psalms40:11 Mam ka solgd yãmb tɩrlmã m sũurẽ ye. Mam gomda yãmb pʋ-peelmã ne y fãagrã yelle. Mam ka solgd kʋʋn-kãsengã yãmb nonglmã ne y sɩdã ye. 
Psalms40:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb ka na n mong maam y nimbãan-zoeerã ye. Yãmb nonglmã ne y sɩdã na n yãaga maam wakat fãa." 
Psalms40:13 Bala, tood sẽn ka tar sõor n gũbg maam. Mam yel-wẽnã pʋgda maam, tɩ mam ninã ka leb n tõe n ges-b ye. B sõorã yɩɩda mam zugã zoobdo, la mam daooda boogdame." 
Psalms40:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kotame tɩ y fãag-ma! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa-y tao-tao n wa sõng-ma!" 
Psalms40:15 Bɩ yãnd yõk sẽn baood-b n sãam mam vɩɩmã! Kɩt-y tɩ bãmb fãa paam yãnd ne paoogre! Bɩ yãnd yõk sẽn baood-b maam ne wẽngã tɩ b tar n leb poorẽ! 
Psalms40:16 Bɩ sẽn laad-b maamã rɩ yãnde, tɩ b sũyã sãame!" 
Psalms40:17 Bɩ neb nins fãa sẽn baood yãmbã paam sũ-noog n kɩdem yãmb pʋgẽ! Bɩ sẽn nong-b yãmb fãagrã yeel wakat fãa yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga! 
Psalms40:18 Mam yaa naong soaba, la nimbãan-neda. La Zu-soabã tagsda mam yelle. Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa mam sõangda, la m fãagda. Mam Wẽnnaam bɩ y ra kaoos ye!" 
Psalms41:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms41:2 Bark bee sẽn tagsd-a pãn-komsem soab yell zugu! Bala, toog wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãagda yẽnda." 
Psalms41:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n gũu yẽnda, n kɩt t'a vɩɩmde. Yẽnda na n paama sũ-noog dũniyã zugu. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõn sak t'a bɛɛbã maan b sẽn dat ne-a ye." 
Psalms41:4 Yẽnda sã n wa n gãe ne toogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tebended-a lame. A sã n wa gãe ne bãaga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngd-a lame." 
Psalms41:5 Mam yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y mam nimbãaneg n maag-ma, bala, maam n beeg yãmba.»" 
Psalms41:6 Mam bɛɛbã gomda mam yell wẽnga, n yetẽ: «Dabʋr la a na n ki? Dabʋr la a yʋʋrã na n meneme?»" 
Psalms41:7 M bɛɛbã nin-yɛng sã n wa n na n ges-ma, a gomda zĩrẽ-be-goamã. A sũurã pida ne wẽng bala. Yẽnda sã n yi, yaa rẽnda yell la a tar goam soayã zutu." 
Psalms41:8 Sẽn kis-b maamã fãa seta ne taab n dat n maan maam wẽnga. Bãmb segend n dat n maana maam wẽnga. 
Psalms41:9 Bãmb yetame: «Ad yaa bã-wẽng n tar-a. A sẽn gãe wã, a kõn leb n yik ye!»" 
Psalms41:10 Baa ned ning sẽn dag n yaa mam zoa wã, tɩ mam kɩs sɩd ne-a, la sẽn dag n dɩt-a ne maamã, wẽneg n kisga maam." 
Psalms41:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y mam nimbãanega, la y sõng-m tɩ m leb n yiki! Mam na n lebs-b-la wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã." 
Psalms41:12 Yaa a woto la m na n bãng tɩ y nong-m lame. Bala, mam bɛ wã kõn tol n leb n kɩdem ne sũ-noog a sẽn tõog maamã yĩng ye." 
Psalms41:13 La maam, yãmb sõnga maam m burkĩndã pʋga, n kɩt tɩ m be yãmb taoor wakat fãa." 
Psalms41:14 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgr wakat sẽn kõn sɛ! Ãmina! Ãmina! 
Psalms42:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms42:2 Wa walg sẽn sesd n baood kʋɩlg koom to-to wã, mam sɩɩgã me sesda a woto n baood yãmb a Wẽnnaam!" 
Psalms42:3 Wẽnnaam ko-yũud tara maam, Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã ko-yũud tara maame. Mam na n tɩ yalsa Wẽnnaam taoor dabʋre?" 
Psalms42:4 Wĩndg ne yʋngo, mam nintãm n lebg m dɩɩbo. Nebã sokda maam daar fãa yaa: «Fo Wẽnnaamã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Psalms42:5 Mam sã n tags m vɩɩmã yelle, ad bũmb ning sẽn sɩɩsd mam sũur tɩ m ket n tẽegdẽ: Yaa mam sẽn dag n kẽnd ne kʋʋngã, n tũud-b n dabd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã. Neb kʋʋng-kʋʋngã rag n kɩdemdame n pẽgd Wẽnnaam la b pʋʋsd-b barka." 
Psalms42:6 Bõe yĩng tɩ m na n sãam m sũuri, n sidgdẽ? Mam na n maana tẽeb ne Wẽnnaam, mam na n leb n pʋʋsa bãmb barka, b sẽn fãag-ma yĩnga." 
Psalms42:7 Mam Wẽnnaam, m sũur sãamame, rẽ kɩtame tɩ m na n zĩnd hal Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgẽ wã, ne Hɛrmo la Mitseyaar tãngẽ wã, n tẽeg yãmb yelle." 
Psalms42:8 Zĩ-zulung koom takda zĩ-zulung a to koom tɩ b zoet n yekd taaba, yãmb ko-wĩisã fãa ne y ko-pɛmã looga mam zugu." 
Psalms42:9 Wĩndga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilgda maam b nonglem-kãsengã, la yʋngo, mam na n yɩɩla bãmb yĩnga. Mam pʋʋsda Wẽnnaam ning sẽn so mam vɩɩmã." 
Psalms42:10 Mam sokda Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam pĩigã yaa: Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yĩm m yelle? Bõe yĩng tɩ y bas-m tɩ m kẽnd ne sũ-sãanga, tɩ m bɛyã tar maam n namsdẽ?" 
Psalms42:11 Mam kõabã kaoome, mam zabd-n-taasã paoogd-m-la daar fãa n yetẽ: «Fo Wẽnnaamã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Psalms42:12 Bõe yĩng tɩ m na n sãam m sũuri, n sidgdẽ? Mam na n maana tẽeb ne Wẽnnaam, mam na n leb n pʋʋsa bãmb barka, bãmb la m Wẽnnaam, la m fãagda." 
Psalms43:1 Mam Wẽnnaam, kao-y m bʋʋdã n kõ-ma, Bɩ y zab ne wẽn-kɩɩsdbã n sõng-ma! Sõng-y maam tɩ m põs zãmb soab ne nin-wẽnga!" 
Psalms43:2 Yãmb a Wẽnnaam la mam pãng zĩiga. Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb basd maam? Bõe yĩng tɩ y bas tɩ m bɛyã namsd maam tɩ m kẽnd ne sũ-sãanga? 
Psalms43:3 Bɩ y tʋm y vẽenemã ne y sɩdã, tɩ b wa tɛ maam n kẽng y tãn-sõngẽ wã, zĩig ning yãmb sẽn beẽ wã!" 
Psalms43:4 Mam na n kẽnga yãmb a Wẽnnaam tẽn-kugrã taoore, Wẽnnaam ning sẽn yaa mam sũ-noogã. Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n wẽe pɛndg n pʋʋs yãmb barka!" 
Psalms43:5 Mam sũuri, bõe yĩng tɩ f bondg n sidgdẽ? Maan tẽeb ne Wẽnnaam, mam na n leb n pʋʋsa bãmb barka, bãmb la mam Wẽnnaam, la m fãagda." 
Psalms44:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms44:2 Wẽnnaam, tõnd mens tʋb wʋmame, tõnd yaab-rãmbã togsa tõndo, b togs-d-la tʋʋm nins yãmb sẽn tʋm bãmb wakatẽ wã, sẽn yaa kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã." 
Psalms44:3 Yãmb diga bu-zẽms ne y nug n dees b tẽms n kẽes tõnd yaab-rãmbã. Yãmb sãama neb n kɩt tɩ d yaab-rãmbã fɩɩge. 
Psalms44:4 Bala, tõnd yaab-rãmbã ka reeg tẽngã ne zabr sʋʋg pãng ye. La ka ne bãmb kang pãng la b paam tõogr ye. Yaa yãmb nug-rɩtg pãngã, yaa yãmb kangã ne y nengã vẽenemã yĩnga, bala, yãmb nong-b lame." 
Psalms44:5 Wẽnnaam, yãmb n yaa mam dĩma. Bɩ y kɩt t'a Zakoob yagensã paam tõogre!" 
Psalms44:6 Ne yãmb pãnga, tõnd lubda d bɛɛbã, ne yãmb yʋʋre, tõnd tabda d zabd-n-taasã." 
Psalms44:7 Bala, mam ka teegd m tãpo, la mam zabr sʋʋg ka tõe n fãag-m ye." 
Psalms44:8 Yãmb n fãagd tõnd d bɛɛbã nugẽ, yãmb n ningd sẽn kis-b tõndã yãnde." 
Psalms44:9 Tõnd maanda sũ-noog daar fãa d Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Tõnd na n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã wakat sẽn ka sɛta. 
Psalms44:10 La baoosgo, yãmb basa tõndo, yãmb ninga tõnd yãnde, yãmb ka leb n yãagd tõnd tãb-biisã zabrẽ ye." 
Psalms44:11 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tõnd tard d bɛɛbã taoore, neb nins sẽn kis tõndã zɛɛda b sẽn dat fãa." 
Psalms44:12 Yãmb basa tõnd wa piis tɩ b na n kʋ n dɩ, yãmb sãeega tõnd n kẽes soolem a taab pʋse." 
Psalms44:13 Yãmb dɩka y nebã n koos naana, yãmb ka koos tõnd n dok yõod ye." 
Psalms44:14 Yãmb basame tɩ d yagsã paoogd tõndo, tɩ neb nins sẽn gũbg tõndã laad tõnd la b yaand tõndo." 
Psalms44:15 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tõnd lebg yel-bũnd bu-zẽmsã yĩnga. Bu-zẽmsã girda b zut n paoogd tõndo. 
Psalms44:16 Mam paamda paoogr daar fãa, yãnd luda mam nenga." 
Psalms44:17 Mam sẽn wʋmd paoogrã ne tʋyã, la bɛyã sẽn baood n dok a sũur ne tõndã yĩnga." 
Psalms44:18 Yel-kãensã fãa paamda tõndo, la tõnd yaool n ka yĩm yãmb yelle, d ka kɩɩs yãmb kaoolã me ye." 
Psalms44:19 Tõnd ka wẽnemd n bas yãmb ye. Tõnd ka bʋdg n bas yãmb sorã ye. 
Psalms44:20 La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb bedsa tõnd we-baasã bogdẽ, n lud tõnd kũum maasmẽ." 
Psalms44:21 Tõnd sã n dag n yĩmẽ d wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, tõnd sã n dag n pʋʋsẽ wẽn-sãanga," 
Psalms44:22 Wẽnnaam dag n ka na n bãngẽ sɩda? Bala, bãmb mii sũurẽ yel-solgdse." 
Psalms44:23 Yaa yãmb yĩng la b kʋʋd tõnd daar fãa, n get tõnd wa piis b sẽn tar n dabd koodgo." 
Psalms44:24 Zu-soaba, yik-y-yã! Yaa bõe tɩ y gãe n gõe? Bɩ y neke! Ra bas-y tõnd wakat fãa yĩng ye!" 
Psalms44:25 Bõe yĩng tɩ y solgd y nenga? Bõe yĩng tɩ y yĩmd tõnd farã ne d namsgã yelle? 
Psalms44:26 Bala, tõnd yɛɛme n lʋɩ tompʋlempʋkẽ, tõnd lʋɩ n vãba tẽnga." 
Psalms44:27 Bɩ y yik n sõng-do! Fãag-y tõnd y nonglmã yĩnga! 
Psalms45:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yaa nonglem yɩɩlle." 
Psalms45:2 Gom-nood n kɛɛd mam sũurẽ wã, mam yetame tɩ mam yɩɩlã fãa yaa rĩmã yĩnga! Bɩ mam zelemdã yɩ wa gʋls-mit gʋls-moogo!" 
Psalms45:3 Ninsaalbã sʋka, fo n yaa neer n yɩɩda, fo no-bɩmsã togsda bark goamã. Yaa rẽ yĩng la Wẽnnaam ning-f bark wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms45:4 Tãb-bi-gãndaoogo, sẽbg f zabr sʋʋg f sɛɛgẽ, fo pɩndame n tar da-sãnde." 
Psalms45:5 N-yẽe, fo sɩd tara ra-sãnde! Kẽnge! Zomb f zabr weefã, n tɩ zab sɩdã poorẽ, n kɩt tɩ sik-m-meng wa, n kɩt tɩ tɩrlem zĩndi. Bɩ fo nug-rɩtg tʋm tʋʋm-yɛɛsdse." 
Psalms45:6 Fo pɛɛmã yaa sɩlemse. Fo na n luba bu-zẽmse. Pɛɛmã na n kõsa rĩmã bɛɛb sũuri. 
Psalms45:7 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb geerã paada wakat sẽn kõn sa. Yãmb naam dasaarã yaa tɩrlem dasaare." 
Psalms45:8 Yãmb nonga tɩrlem, n kis wẽnga. Yaa rẽ yĩng yaa Wẽnnaam, tɩ fo Wẽnnaamã pʋdg sũ-noog kaam f zugu, n yãk foom, n bas f tũud-n-taasã." 
Psalms45:9 Yãmb futã fãa tara miir ne alowɛs parfẽ yũ-noogo. La yãmb be y na-yirã sẽn me ne wob-yẽna pʋga, tɩ yʋʋm-teedã noogd yãmb sũuri." 
Psalms45:10 Rĩmã kom-pugli be y nin-nongdsã sʋka, la na-pagã be y rɩtgo, n ning Ofɩɩr tẽng sãnem fan-teedo." 
Psalms45:11 M bi-pugla, kelge, gese, la f yok f tʋb n kelge. Yĩm f buudã ne f ba-yirã yelle." 
Psalms45:12 Rĩma rata foom f neermã yĩnga. Bãmb sẽn yaa fo zu-soabã yĩnga, bɩ f wõgemd bãmb taoore." 
Psalms45:13 Tɩɩr bi-pugla, arzɛg-bɛdã rãmb sẽn be nebã sʋkã na n waa ne kũun n wa belem foom." 
Psalms45:14 Rĩmã bi-pugl sẽn be na-yirã tara ziiri. Yẽnda futã maneg n nagsa ne sãnem. 
Psalms45:15 B yeelg-a-la a fu-gʋlmã n tall-a n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ. Pʋg-sadbã, ne a tũud-n-taasã rag n pʋgda yẽnda poore, tɩ b wat rĩmã nengẽ." 
Psalms45:16 B rag n yãagd-b-la ne sũ-noog la kɩdengo. Bãmb kẽe na-yirã pʋga. 
Psalms45:17 Fo kom-dibli wã n na n deeg f ba-rãmbã zĩiga. La fo na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb yɩ nanambs dũniyã fãa pʋga. 
Psalms45:18 Mam na n leb n tẽega yãmb yʋʋrã yell zamaan woo zamaane. La sẽn paase, nebã na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark wakat fãa n ka tol n bas ye." 
Psalms46:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne wɩɩse. 
Psalms46:2 Wẽnnaam yaa tõnd zĩ-soalgdga, la d pãnga. Yel-pakr pʋga, bãmb sõngda tõnd wakat fãa." 
Psalms46:3 Woto yĩnga, baa tẽn-gãongã sã n digimdi, baa tãmsã sã n sirgd ko-kãsemsã pʋse," 
Psalms46:4 baa ko-kãsemsã sã n guglumd n wukd puudu, n zẽkd n kuiis yĩngr tɩ tãmsã miimdẽ, rabeem ka tar tõnd ye." 
Psalms46:5 Kʋɩlg n be t'a ko-soayã kõt Wẽnnaam tẽngã sũ-noogo, yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yaa Sẽn-Ka-To zagsã." 
Psalms46:6 Wẽnnaam bee tẽn-kãng pʋga, dẽ, a ka miimd ye. Sẽn deng beoog sẽn na n vẽeg fãa, Wẽnnaam sõngda yẽnda." 
Psalms46:7 Bu-zẽmsã yikame n guglumdẽ, soolem toay-toayã miimdame. Wẽnnaam zẽka b koɛɛga, la tẽn-gãongã yẽnegame." 
Psalms46:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã bee ne tõndo, a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã yaa tõnd pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms46:9 Wa-y n ges-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã, wa-y n ges-y sãoong ning bãmb sẽn wa ne dũniyã zugã." 
Psalms46:10 Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ zabã sẽn be dũniyã tɛk fãa wã sɛ. Bãmb kaooda tãbd ne kãna, la b yõogd saar-dãmb bugum." 
Psalms46:11 Bɩ y yalse, la y bãng tɩ mam yaa Wẽnnaam. Maam n so soolem-dãmbã, la m so dũniyã." 
Psalms46:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã bee ne tõndo, a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã yaa tõnd pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms47:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms47:2 Nebã fãa, wẽ-y nug-pogse! Kaas-y ne sũ-noog n pẽg Wẽnnaam!" 
Psalms47:3 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sẽn-Ka-To seka zoeese. Bãmb yaa dũniyã gill fãa rĩm-kãsenga." 
Psalms47:4 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ tõnd soog bu-zẽmse, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ buud a taabã wõgemded tõnd taoore." 
Psalms47:5 Bãmb n yãk tõnd pʋɩɩr n kõ-do, la b nonga tõnd sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagensã." 
Psalms47:6 Wẽnnaam watame tɩ b kilsd-ba, b peebda baorg tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kẽnda." 
Psalms47:7 Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Wẽnnaam, yɩɩl-y-yã! Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y tõnd dĩmã, yɩɩl-y-yã!" 
Psalms47:8 Bala, Wẽnnaam yaa dũniyã fãa rĩmã. Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-noodo!" 
Psalms47:9 Wẽnnaam n dɩt naam bu-zẽmsã sʋka, Wẽnnaam zaoo b sõmblem naam geere." 
Psalms47:10 Bu-zẽmsã nin-kãsemsã tigimda taab n naag a Abrahaam Wẽnnaamã buudu. Bala, dũniyã gãnd yaa Wẽnnaam n so. Bãmb naamã zẽk n yɩɩda fãa." 
Psalms48:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle. 
Psalms48:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, la b zemsa ne waoogre. Tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽng pʋg sẽn yaa bãmb tãn-sõngã." 
Psalms48:3 Kunkubrã tara ra-sãnde, a kõta dũniyã fãa sũ-noogo. Sɩyõ tãngã kɩreng ning sẽn teesd rɩtgã yaa rĩm-kãsengã tẽnga." 
Psalms48:4 Wẽnnaam sã n be tẽngã na-yiy pʋse, b yaa pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms48:5 Bala, rĩm-dãmbã rag n naaga taaba, n na n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Sɩyõ." 
Psalms48:6 Bãmb gesame n yɛɛse, rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b zoe." 
Psalms48:7 Bãmb sɩnga rigb ne rabeem beenẽ, wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem," 
Psalms48:8 tɩ wẽnd wa yaang sobg sẽn wãad Tarsɩɩs koom kogendo. 
Psalms48:9 Tõnd sẽn wʋm bũmb ningã, tõnd yãnda bõn-kãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã tẽngẽ, tõnd yãnd-a-la tõnd Wẽnnaamã tẽng pʋga. La yaa Wẽnnaam n yẽbg-a wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms48:10 Wẽnnaam, yãmb doogã pʋga, tõnd tagsda yãmb nonglmã yelle." 
Psalms48:11 Wẽnnaam, yãmb yʋʋrã sẽn yi to-to wã, Yãmb pẽgrã saaga dũniyã tɛk fãa me a woto. Yãmb nug-rɩtg pida ne tɩrlem." 
Psalms48:12 Sɩyõ tãngã maanda sũ-noogo, la Zʋʋda kom-pugli wã kɩdemdame, yãmb tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã yĩnga." 
Psalms48:13 Kẽn-y n gilg-y Sɩyõ tẽngã, n sõd a gãsdã." 
Psalms48:14 Maag-y y meng n ges a lalsã sẽn gũbgã, la y ges a na-yiyã, n wa tõog n dɩk-a n togs zamaan ning sẽn watã." 
Psalms48:15 Bala, Wẽnnaam-kãngã yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam wakat sẽn kõn sa. Bãmb n na n tɛ tõnd n tãag d yõor tɛka." 
Psalms49:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga.
