Psalms49:2 Nebã fãa, kelg-y-yã, Dũniyã nebã fãa, bɩ y yok y tʋb n kelge." 
Psalms49:3 Nin-tals ne nin-kãsemse, arzegs rãmb ne naong-rãmba, naag-y taab n kelge." 
Psalms49:4 Mam noor na n goma yam goamã, la mam sũur na n tagsa bãngr tagsgo." 
Psalms49:5 Mam na n kelga yel-bũna, mam na n bilga m yel-solgdsã võor ne pɛndga." 
Psalms49:6 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam na n zoe rabeem toog daare? Mam bɛɛbã tʋʋm-beedã gũbga maam. 
Psalms49:7 Bãmb teega b paoongo, la b pẽgd b mense, b arzegsã sẽn waoogã yĩnga." 
Psalms49:8 Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tõe n fãag a to ye. La b ka tõe n yao Wẽnnaam b fãagrã yĩng ye. 
Psalms49:9 Bãmb sɩɩgã fãagr yaood yaa toogo, la b kõn paam fãagr ye." 
Psalms49:10 Ned tõe n vɩɩmdame n ka wa ki? Ned na vɩ bal n ka wa kẽ yaoogẽ? 
Psalms49:11 Bala, d yãtame tɩ yam dãmb kiidame, la yalemb ne nin-yood me kiidame. B fãa loogdame n bas b paoongã tɩ neb a taab yõd n sooge." 
Psalms49:12 Bãmb tagsdame tɩ b rotã na n paa wakat fãa, tɩ la b rotã na n kaoosa zamaan woo zamaane. Bãmb dag n dɩka b yʋy n pʋd zĩisi." 
Psalms49:13 La ninsaal ne a waoogrã ka tol n kaoosdẽ ye. Yẽnda yaa wa rũmsã sẽn kiidã bala. 
Psalms49:14 Neb nins sẽn teeg b mens yalemdã baoosg la a woto. La neb nins sẽn pʋgd bãmbã nonga b goamã. 
Psalms49:15 B tara bãmb wa piis n dabd kɩɩm-kulgu. Kũum na n sooga bãmba. Wakat sẽn wate, nin-tɩrsã na n taba bãmba. Bãmb neermã na n loogame, tɩ kɩɩm-kulg lebg bãmb yiri." 
Psalms49:16 Hakɩɩka, Wẽnnaam na n fãaga maam n yiis kɩɩm-kulgu. Bala, bãmb na n deega maam." 
Psalms49:17 Ned sã n lebgd rakãagre, t'a zakã ziir paasdẽ, bɩ f ra yɛɛs ye." 
Psalms49:18 Bala, yẽnda kũum daare, a ka na n zã baa fɩ n loog ye. La yẽnda ziirã ka na n tũ-a n sig yaoogẽ ye." 
Psalms49:19 Yẽnda tõe n maana sũ-noogo, a vɩɩmã wakate. B na n pẽga foom, f sẽn paam naarã yĩnga." 
Psalms49:20 La baoosgo, fo me na n bʋʋga f saam-dãmbã sẽn ka na n leb n yãnd wĩndg vẽenemã." 
Psalms49:21 Ned sã n tar waoogr n yaool n ka tar yam, a wẽnda wa rũmsã sẽn kiidã." 
Psalms50:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle, Wẽnnaam yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa wẽnnaamã gomdame n boond dũniyã rãmba, sẽn sɩng ne wĩntoog sẽn pukdẽ, n tãag wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ." 
Psalms50:2 Wẽnnaam bee Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã pʋga, tɩ b vẽenemã yãgda." 
Psalms50:3 Tõnd Wẽnnaamã watame, la bãmb ka na n sĩnd ye. Bugum dengda bãmb taoor n dɩtẽ, tɩ sob-kãseng gũbg bãmba." 
Psalms50:4 Bãmb boonda yĩngr la tẽnga, b nebã bʋʋd kaoob yĩng n yetẽ:" 
Psalms50:5 Tigm-y mam nebã n kõ-ma, sẽn maan-b maoong n wilg tɩ b na n saka mam kaoolã!" 
Psalms50:6 Saasẽ na n moona bãmb tɩrlmã. Bala, yaa bãmb la bʋ-kaooda." 
Psalms50:7 Mam nebã, kelg-y-yã! Mam na n gomame, Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y tɩ m na n bʋʋ ne yãmba. Mam yaa Wẽnnaam, m yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms50:8 Ka fo maandã yĩng la m sẽn lengd-fã ye. Fo maanda maoong sẽn yõogd bugum mam taoor wakat fãa. 
Psalms50:9 Mam ka na n yõk loalg f yirã pʋga, la m kõn yõk boɛɛg f wubrẽ ye." 
Psalms50:10 Bala, we-rũmsã fãa yaa maam n so, la tãmsã zut rũm-kʋʋngã fãa yaa maam n so." 
Psalms50:11 Mam mii tãmsã zut liuuli wã fãa, la weoogã rũms fãa yaa mam dẽnda." 
Psalms50:12 Kom sã n dag n tarẽ maam, mam dag n kõn togs foom ye. Bala, dũniyã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yaa maam n so." 
Psalms50:13 Rẽ yĩnga, mam wãbda lols nemd la? Bɩ mam yũuda boees zɩɩm?" 
Psalms50:14 Maoong fo sẽn tõe n maan Wẽnnaam yĩnga, yaa tɩ f pʋʋs-b barka, la f pids f pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-To." 
Psalms50:15 Bool maam f yel-pakr wakate, tɩ mam na n fãaga foom, la fo na n waooga maam." 
Psalms50:16 Wẽnnaam yeta nin-wẽng yaa: Fo sẽn sõdgd mam noyã yõod bee yɛ? Fo noorã togsda mam kaoolã," 
Psalms50:17 la fo yaool n kisa remsgo, n lobd mam goamã f poorẽ!" 
Psalms50:18 Fo sã n yãnd wagdre, fo sũur nooma ne-a, la fo tɩ naaga yoaadba." 
Psalms50:19 Fo tara f noorã n gomd wẽnga, tɩ f zelemdã wʋgd zãmbo." 
Psalms50:20 Fo zĩndidame n gomd f ba-biig wẽnga, fo sãamda f ma-biig yʋʋre." 
Psalms50:21 Woto n yaa fo manesem, tɩ mam sĩnda. Fo tẽedame tɩ mam yaa wa foom? La ade, mam na n ninga foom taale, n vẽneg fãa n wilg-fu." 
Psalms50:22 M kotame tɩ y wʋm bõn-kãens võore, yãmb dãmb sẽn yĩmd Wẽnnaam yellã, gũus-y tɩ m da wa tõos-y zeremse, tɩ ned ka be n na n fãag-y ye." 
Psalms50:23 Ned ning bark pʋʋsg sẽn yaa a maoong waoogda maam, la ned sã n gũusd ne a yel-manesem, mam na n kɩtame t'a yã Wẽnnaam fãagrã." 
Psalms51:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms51:2 Yaa wakat ning Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Natã sẽn kẽng a Davɩɩd nengẽ, a Davɩɩd sẽn maan yoob ne a Batseba wã zugẽ." 
Psalms51:3 Wẽnnaam, zoe-y mam nimbãaneg wa sẽn zems y nonglmã. Yẽes-y mam kongrã, y nimbãan-zoe-kãsengã yĩnga." 
Psalms51:4 Pek-y mam beegrã zãnga, la y yɩlg maam n yiis m yel-wẽnã." 
Psalms51:5 Bala, mam sak n deega m kongrã, la mam yel-wẽnã bee m taoor wakat fãa." 
Psalms51:6 Mam beega yãmb y yembr bala. Mam maana sẽn yaa wẽng yãmb nifẽ. Dẽ wã, yãmb yaa tɩrg y goamã pʋgẽ. Yãmb bʋʋdã kaoob zemsa zãnga." 
Psalms51:7 Ade, mam doga kongrã pʋga. Hal mam sẽn dag n ket m ma pʋgẽ, mam yaa yel-wẽnã soaba." 
Psalms51:8 La bũmb ning sẽn noom yãmba, yaa sɩd sẽn be ninsaal sũ-zulungẽ. Kɩt-y tɩ m paam yam m sũ-zulungẽ wã." 
Psalms51:9 Yɩlg-y maam ne Izop n yiis m yel-wẽnã tɩ m yɩ yɩlemde. Pek-y maam tɩ m yɩ pɛɛlg n yɩɩg lam-palga. 
Psalms51:10 Kɩt-y tɩ m wʋm sũ-noog ne kɩdeng koɛɛga. La kõab nins yãmb sẽn dag n wõrã na n kɩdmame. 
Psalms51:11 Wẽnemd-y y neng n da ges mam yel-wẽnã ye. Yẽes-y mam kongrã zãnga. 
Psalms51:12 Wẽnnaam, kõ-y maam sũur sẽn yaa yɩlemde, la y palem m yamã t'a zemse." 
Psalms51:13 Da rig-y-m tɩ m zãag ne yãmb ye. Da yiis-y y sɩɩgã sẽn welg toorã m pʋgẽ ye. 
Psalms51:14 Kɩt-y tɩ m leb n paam sũ-noog ning y fãagrã sẽn kõtã, bɩ y tebl maam ne yam-yãk-sõng sɩɩgã!" 
Psalms51:15 Mam na n zãmsa wẽn-kɩɩsdbã yãmb soayã, la yel-wẽn-maandbã na n lebg n waa yãmb nengẽ." 
Psalms51:16 Mam Wẽnnaam, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam fãagda, fãag-y maam ne zɩɩm daagre! La mam zelemd na n moona yãmb tɩrlmã." 
Psalms51:17 Zu-soaba, yaag-y m no-bɩmsã, la m noorã na n pẽga yãmba." 
Psalms51:18 Bala, ka maand n noom yãmb ye, sã n ka rẽ, m dag n na n maanẽ-la maoong n kõ-yã. Leb n ka maoong sẽn yõogd bugum me n noom yãmb ye." 
Psalms51:19 Maand sẽn noom yãmb a Wẽnnaam, yaa sik-m-meng sẽn be ned sũurẽ. Ned sẽn sikd a meng zãng fasɩ, yãmb a Wẽnnaam ka tõdgd a soab ye." 
Psalms51:20 Maan-y Sɩyõ neer y nonglmã pʋga, Me-y Zeruzalɛm lalsã!" 
Psalms51:21 Woto, yãmb sũur na n yɩɩ noog ne tɩrlem maando. Yaa maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, ne bark pʋʋsg maoong sẽn yõogd bugum. Dẽ, b na n maanda lols maand y tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Psalms52:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms52:2 Yaa wakat ning Edom tẽng rao a Doɛɛg sẽn wa n togs a Sayull t'a Davɩɩd zoe n kẽnga a Ayimelɛk yirã. 
Psalms52:3 Gãndaoogo, bõe yĩng tɩ fo pẽgd f meng wẽng maaneg pʋgẽ? Wẽnnaam nonglmã paada wakat fãa." 
Psalms52:4 Fo zelemdã saagda wẽng maaneg bala, la a rɩta wa barg sẽn saase, fo yaa zãmb soaba!" 
Psalms52:5 Fo nonga wẽng n yɩɩd sẽn yaa sõama, la f nong zĩrẽ n yɩɩd sɩd goamã." 
Psalms52:6 Fo nong n gomda goam sẽn sãamd sũuri, la f yaa zãmb soaba!" 
Psalms52:7 Woto me, Wẽnnaam me na n sãam-f-la wakat fãa yĩnga. B na n lub-f lame, n vuug-f n yiis f fu-roogẽ wã. B na n yiisa foom nin-vɩɩsã sʋka." 
Psalms52:8 Dẽ, nin-tɩrsã na n yãnda rẽndã, n zoe rabeem, la b na n laa yẽnda n yeele:" 
Psalms52:9 «Ges-y ned ning sẽn dag n ka baood tɩ Wẽnnaam yɩɩ a pãng zĩigã, ned ning sẽn dag n teeg a meng arzɛg-bɛdã, n dag n maand wẽng n kogend a mengã!»" 
Psalms52:10 La sã n yaa ne maam, mam bee Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã, wa Oliiv tɩ-polle, mam teega Wẽnnaam nonglmã daar fãa la wakat sẽn kõn sɛ." 
Psalms52:11 Mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark wakat fãa y tʋʋmã yĩnga. Mam na n tẽe yãmb yʋʋrã. Bala, yãmb maanda neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã neere." 
Psalms53:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne meenem. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms53:2 Yalem yeta a sũurẽ yaa: «Wẽnnaam ka be ye.» Bãmb lebga nin-wẽnse, n tʋmd tʋʋm-beedo. Ned ba a yembr ka be n maand neer ye." 
Psalms53:3 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee saasẽ, n sulg n get ninsaalbã, n dat n bãng ned sã n bee bãmb sʋkã n tar yam n baood Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms53:4 Bãmb fãa bʋdgame n dɩk wẽng sore. Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka be n maand neer ye. Nin-yɛng meng ka be ye. 
Psalms53:5 Rẽ yĩnga, tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa ka tar bãngr la? Bãmb dɩta mam nebã wa b sẽn dɩt rɩɩbo. Bãmb ka tol n pʋʋsd Wẽnnaam ye." 
Psalms53:6 Woto yĩnga, rabeem na n yõka bãmba, tɩ yaool n dag n ka sek rabeem ye. Wẽnnaam na n sãeega sẽn zabd-b ne foomã kõaba. Fo na n ning-b-la yãnde, bala, Wẽnnaam bas-b lame." 
Psalms53:7 Ãnda n na n zĩnd Sɩyõ n fãag Israyɛlle? Wẽnnaam sã n kɩt tɩ b nebã sẽn dag n be yembd pʋgã lebg n wa, a Zakoob yagensã na n kɩdmame, Israyɛll nebã na n maana sũ-noogo." 
Psalms54:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms54:2 Yaa Zɩf tẽng nebã sẽn wa n togs a Sayull t'a Davɩɩd wa n soonda bãmb nengẽ wã. 
Psalms54:3 Mam Wẽnnaam, fãag-y maam y yʋʋrã yĩnga. Kao-y m bʋʋdã n kõ-ma, n wilg tɩ y tara pãnga!" 
Psalms54:4 Mam Wẽnnaam, wʋm-y mam pʋʋsgã. Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m noorã goamã!" 
Psalms54:5 Bala, sãamb n yik n zabd ne maam, nin-wẽns n baood n dat n kʋ maam. Nin-bãmb toog ka tol n be ne Wẽnnaam ye." 
Psalms54:6 La Wẽnnaam n yaa mam sõangda, Zu-soabã bee ne neb nins sẽn teend maamã." 
Psalms54:7 Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kɩt tɩ wẽngã leb m bɛɛbã. Yãmb pʋ-peelmã yĩnga, bɩ y menes-ba!" 
Psalms54:8 Mam na n maana maand ne yamleoog n kõ yãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã, bala, yãmb yʋʋrã yaa sõngo." 
Psalms54:9 Bala, yãmb fãagda maam yel-pakr buud fãa pʋga, la mam bɛɛbã lebga bõn-getse." 
Psalms55:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms55:2 Wẽnnaam, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m pʋʋsgã, Mam sã n wa n kot yãmba, bɩ y ra solg y meng ne-m ye." 
Psalms55:3 Bɩ y kelg-ma, la y leok-ma! Mam yam yuusdame, tɩ m sidgd n maand yɩɩre," 
Psalms55:4 mam sẽn wʋmd bɛyã koɛɛg rãamdã yĩnga, ne nin-wẽngã sẽn namsd maamã yĩnga. Bala, b kɩtdame tɩ toog paamd maam. Bãmb dõta maam ne sũ-puugri." 
Psalms55:5 Mam sũurã kiuusda m pʋgẽ, la kũum dabeem tara maam." 
Psalms55:6 Rabeem ne yɛɛsg yõkda maam, la pelen-yɩk tara maam." 
Psalms55:7 Mam yeelame yaa: «Mam sã n dag n tarẽ pɩgs wa walle, mam dag n na n yɩkẽ lame n bao zĩiga.»" 
Psalms55:8 Sɩdã, mam dag n na n zoeẽ lame n zãag zĩiga, mam dag n na n kẽngẽ lame n tɩ zĩnd we-raoogẽ wã." 
Psalms55:9 Mam dag n na n zoeẽ-la tao-tao n tɩ paam soondg zĩiga, n põs saag sob-kẽeng ne sob-fugdga." 
Psalms55:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sãam-y b saagrã, la y kɩt tɩ b ra yɩ noor a yembr ye! Bala, mam neeme tɩ tẽngã pida ne wẽng la zaba." 
Psalms55:11 Bãmb kẽnda tẽngã lalg zug n gilgd-a wĩndg ne yʋngo, Wẽngã ne tʋʋm-beedã bee tẽngã pʋga." 
Psalms55:12 Tẽngã pʋg pida ne sãoongo, zĩ-sõsdsã fãa pida ne nen-keglem la zãmbo." 
Psalms55:13 Bala, sã n dag n yaẽ mam bɛ n paoogd maam, mam dag n ka na n yeelẽ tɩ bũmb ye. Sã n dag n yaẽ ned ning sẽn kis-a maamã n zabd ne maam, m dag n na solgẽ t'a ka yãnd-m ye." 
Psalms55:14 La yaa fo sẽn yaa mam meng neda, ne m sɩd soaba, la m mitingã!" 
Psalms55:15 Tõnd dag n nooma ne taaba, la d dag n tũud neb kʋʋngã n kẽnd Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã!" 
Psalms55:16 Bɩ kũum ling-ba, tɩ b sig kɩɩm-kulg vɩɩse! Bala, bãmb sũyã pida ne wẽnem, wẽnemã bee bãmb sʋka." 
Psalms55:17 Mam kelemd n boonda Wẽnnaam, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n fãaga maam." 
Psalms55:18 Zaabr la yibeoogo, ne wĩndga, mam wẽeda siri la m sidgdẽ, la bãmb wʋma mam koɛɛgã." 
Psalms55:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga maam n kõ-m vɩ-bãane. Bãmb fãaga maam ne bɛɛbã sẽn yi wʋsg n na n zab ne maamã. 
Psalms55:20 Wẽnnaam ning sẽn zao b geerã hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã na n wʋmame n ning-b yãnde. Bala, bãmb yaa neb sẽn ka tekde, la b ka zoet Wẽnnaam ye." 
Psalms55:21 Bɛyã zabda ne neb nins sẽn dag n tar zems-n-taar ne yẽnda wã. Yẽnda sãamda kaool ning a sẽn dag n maanã. 
Psalms55:22 Yẽnda no-goamã yaa wa bĩis-kaam, t'a sũurã yaool n pid ne zabr datem. Yẽnda goamã bʋgsame n yɩɩd kaam, la b yaool n yaa wa zabr sʋʋg sẽn wõoge." 
Psalms55:23 Bas f yell ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb na n kõo foom bũmb ning f date. Bãmb kõn tol n bas nin-tɩrg t'a miim ye." 
Psalms55:24 La yãmb a Wẽnnaam na n kɩtame tɩ sẽn daagd-b zɩɩmã ne zãmb dãmbã sig yaoogẽ, n ka ta b rasmã sõor pʋɩ-sʋk ye. La maam, mam teega yãmba." 
Psalms56:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ ‹wall sẽn zao Terebẽnt tɩɩs sẽn be yɩɩg zutu.› Yaa wakat ning Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn wa n yõk yẽnda Gat tẽngã." 
Psalms56:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, zoe-y mam nimbãanega. Bala, nebã pʋgd n baooda mam noore. Bãmb zabda ne maam daar fãa, n namsd maam." 
Psalms56:3 Daar fãa, mam bɛɛbã pʋgd n baooda mam noore. Sẽn wukd-b b mens n zabd ne maamã sõor yaa wʋsgo." 
Psalms56:4 Rabeem sã n wa n tar maam daare, yaa yãmb la mam teeg yã." 
Psalms56:5 Mam pẽgda Wẽnnaam b gomdã yĩnga, mam teega Wẽnnaam, n ka zoet rabeem ye. Ninsaalbã tõe n maana maam bõe?" 
Psalms56:6 Daar fãa, bɛɛbã golemda mam goamã. Bãmb sẽn tagsd n dat ne maam yaa wẽng bala." 
Psalms56:7 Bãmb sorame n gũusd maam, bãmb gũusda maam m kẽnã pʋga. Bala, b baood n sãama mam vɩɩmã." 
Psalms56:8 Bãmb tagsdame tɩ b wẽngã maaneg n na n kɩt tɩ b põs bɩ? Wẽnnaam, bas-y tɩ y sũ-puugrã lub-ba!" 
Psalms56:9 Yãmb mii mam zĩ-yeebdsã sõore. Bɩ y kok m nintãmã y ko-waoogẽ. Mam nintãmã yell ka gʋls yãmb sebrẽ wã sɩda? 
Psalms56:10 Mam sã n kelem n bool-y daare, mam bɛɛbã tard n lebda poorẽ. Mam miime tɩ yãmb a Wẽnnaam bee ne-ma." 
Psalms56:11 Mam pẽgda Wẽnnaam b gomdã yĩnga. N-yẽe! Mam pẽgda Sẽn-Ka-Saab b gomdã yĩnga. 
Psalms56:12 Mam dɩka m teegrã n teeg Wẽnnaam, m ka zoet rabeem ye. Ninsaalbã tõe n maana maam bõe?" 
Psalms56:13 Mam Wẽnnaam, m na n pidsa m pʋlengã. Mam na n maana maand n pʋʋs yãmb m zaamẽ." 
Psalms56:14 Bala, yãmb fãaga maam ne kũum. Yãmb sõnga maam tɩ m ka lʋɩ ye. Tɩ mam tõe n leb n kẽn yãmb taoore, n vɩɩmd nin-vɩɩsã sʋka." 
Psalms57:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ «ra sãam ye.» Yaa yẽnda sẽn wa n zoet n na n põs a Sayull tãngã bokẽ wã. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms57:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, zoe-y mam nimbãanega! Mam Wẽnnaam, zoe-y mam nimbãanega! Bala, yãmb n yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga. Mam na n soonda yãmb pɩgsã maasmẽ. Mam na n paa beenẽ hal tɩ sãoongã looge." 
Psalms57:3 Mam boonda Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To, Wẽnnaam ning sẽn maand bũmb fãa sõama n kõt maamã." 
Psalms57:4 Baa ne mam bɛyã sẽn baood mam noor n namsd maamã, Wẽnnaam na n zĩnda yĩngr n fãag maam. Wẽnnaam na n tʋma b nonglmã ne b sɩdã mam yĩnga." 
Psalms57:5 Mam bee gɩgma sʋka. Mam gãee nin-kʋʋdb sʋka. Bãmb yẽnã yaa wa kãna, la wa pɛɛma. Bãmb zɛlma wã yaa wa zabr sʋʋs sẽn dɩte." 
Psalms57:6 Mam Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ y kãosengã yɩɩg saasẽ! Bɩ y kɩt tɩ y ziirã pid dũniyã gill fãa!" 
Psalms57:7 Bãmb gãnega bẽdg mam sorã zugu, mam sɩɩgã rag n namsda toog pʋga. Bɛɛbã tuu bok mam taoore, la bãmb mens n wẽneg n lʋɩ a pʋgẽ." 
Psalms57:8 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam sũur keemame. Mam sũur keemame tɩ m na n yɩɩl ne yʋʋm-teed n pẽg yãmba." 
Psalms57:9 Bɩ mam ziirã neke! Bɩ mam pɛndgã ne m duudgã neke! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tõd-beoog neke! 
Psalms57:10 Zu-soaba, mam na n pẽga yãmb bu-zẽmsã sʋka! Mam na n yɩɩl n waooga yãmb yʋʋr bu-zẽmsã sʋka." 
Psalms57:11 Bala, yãmb nonglmã zẽk n taa saasẽ, tɩ yãmb sɩdã zẽk n ta sawatã." 
Psalms57:12 Mam Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ y kãosengã yɩɩg saasẽ! Bɩ y kɩt tɩ y ziirã pid dũniyã gill fãa!" 
Psalms58:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ «ra sãam ye.»" 
Psalms58:2 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb sɩddd... wã pʋga tɩrlem bee beenẽ sɩda? Ninsaalb kamba, yãmb kaooda bʋʋdã ne tɩrlem sɩda?" 
Psalms58:3 Ka woto ye! Yãmb zoe n maanda wẽng y sũyã pʋse. Dũniyã pida ne y nusã tʋʋm-beedã. 
Psalms58:4 Nin-wẽns wẽnemã sɩnga b ma pʋgẽ, zĩrẽ-be-rãmbã rogem daar la b kẽ moogo." 
Psalms58:5 Bãmb tara zẽnem wa waaf zẽnem, b wẽnda põeer sẽn yaa wʋng sẽn yẽd a tʋba," 
Psalms58:6 n ka sakd n maan sẽn belemd-a yẽnda wã ratem ye. Baa ne sẽn mi-a beleng sõama wã. 
Psalms58:7 Mam Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kao b yẽnã b noyã pʋse! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kao-y gɩgem-poalã yɛyã!" 
Psalms58:8 Kɩt-y tɩ b menem wa koom sẽn zoet n loogdẽ! Bɩ Wẽnnaam tão-b ne pɛɛmã, n koms-ba!" 
Psalms58:9 Bɩ bãmb yẽneg n menem wa garweongo, la bɩ b loog n ka yãnd wĩndgã, wa biig sẽn dog kɩɩmd n ka yãnd wĩndgã!" 
Psalms58:10 Sẽn deng b gõ-payãndsã sẽn na n lebg tuudu, la b sẽn ket n yaa maas n wẽnd wa b kʋɩɩme wã, seb-raoog n na n loog ne-ba." 
Psalms58:11 Nin-tɩrg na n maana sũ-noogo, b sẽn dok a sũur n kõ-a wã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n waasa a nao nin-wẽnsã zɩɩm pʋga." 
Psalms58:12 La ninsaalbã na n yeelame: N-yẽe! Nin-tɩrg na n paama keoore. N-yẽe! Wẽnnaam n be n kaood bʋʋdã dũniyã zugu. 
Psalms59:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ ‹ra sãam ye.› Yaa wakat ning a Sayull sẽn wa n tʋm tɩ b tɩ gũus a Davɩɩd zakẽ n paam-a n kʋ wã." 
Psalms59:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, fãag-y maam m bɛɛbã nusẽ. Kogl-y maam tɩ m zabd-n-taasã ra paam-m ye!" 
Psalms59:3 Fãag-y maam tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã nusẽ, fãag-y maam neb nins sẽn daagd zɩɩmã nusẽ!" 
Psalms59:4 Bala, b sorame n dat n sãam maam. Pãens rãmbã seta taab n dat n zab ne maam. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m yaool n ka beege, m ka maan yel-wẽnd me ye!" 
Psalms59:5 Baa ne mam sẽn ka maan wẽngã, b zoetame n segend b mens n dat n zab ne maam. Nek-y n wa n seg-y maam, la y gese!" 
Psalms59:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam. Yik-y n sɩbg-y bu-zẽmsã fãa! Bɩ y ra zoe zãmb dãmbã sẽn yaa nin-wẽnsã nimbãaneg ye!" 
Psalms59:7 Bãmb lebgd n waa zĩ-sobd n wũund wa baase. Bãmb gilgda tẽngã. 
Psalms59:8 Bãmb noy pida ne tãntãmpuudu, la zabr sʋʋs bee bãmb no-bɩmsẽ. Ãnda n tõe n wʋm b goamã?" 
Psalms59:9 La yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab laada nin-bãmbã. Yãmb yaanda bu-zẽmsã fãa. 
Psalms59:10 Mam geta yãmba, tɩ yãmb la m pãnga, bala, yãmb a Wẽnnaam la m pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms59:11 Mam Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa maan-neer soaba. Wa-y n seg-y maam. Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ mam yãnd m bɛɛbã yãnde. 
Psalms59:12 Ra kʋ-y-b tɩ mam nebã wa yĩm ye. Zu-soabã sẽn yaa tõnd gãongo, y pãngã yĩnga, bɩ y kɩt tɩ b yeebe, kɩt-y tɩ b lʋɩ." 
Psalms59:13 Bãmb maanda yel-wẽn b no-goamã pʋgẽ. Bɩ b mens wuk-m-mengã rɩ-ba, bala, bãmb goamã yaa kãab-wẽng ne zĩrẽ yagbo!" 
Psalms59:14 Sãam-y-b ne sũ-puugri! Sãam-y-b n kɩt tɩ b menem fasɩ! Woto, dũniyã gill fãa na n bãngame t'a Zakoob yagensã yaa Wẽnnaam n so." 
Psalms59:15 Bãmb lebgd n waa zĩ-sobd n wũund wa baase. Bãmb gilgda tẽngã. 
Psalms59:16 Bãmb yeebda goabg la rɩtg n baood rɩɩbo, la yʋngã tõre, bãmb ka paamd n dɩ n tɩg ye." 
Psalms59:17 La maam, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga y pãngã. Yibeoogo, mam na n kilsa yãmb nonglmã. Bala, yãmb yaa mam pãng zĩiga, la y yaa mam zĩ-soalgdg yel-pakr wakate." 
Psalms59:18 Yãmb yaa mam pãng soaba, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga yãmba, bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn nong maamã yaa mam pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms60:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, zãmsg yĩnga. Yɩɩnda wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ ‹rulg lɛlmã yaa kaseto.› Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms60:2 Yaa wakat ning a Davɩɩd sẽn zab ne Siiri rãmbã sẽn be Mezopotami ne Soba wã. Wakat-kãng yaa a Zoaab sẽn wẽnemd n kʋ Edom neb tus piig la a yiibã yamsem longã pʋgã. 
Psalms60:3 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb basa tõndo, yãmb sãeega tõndo, yãmb sũur yikame. Leb-y n lebs-y tõnd d zĩigẽ." 
Psalms60:4 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tẽn-gãongã rigimdi, yãmb kɩtame t'a pãrge. Bɩ y maneg a zĩis nins sẽn pusã t'a miimdame!" 
Psalms60:5 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ to-kãsems paam y nebã, yãmb yũnuga tõnd reezẽ rãam sẽn yilimd nenga." 
Psalms60:6 Yãmb kõo neb nins sẽn zoet-b yãmbã bãnde, tɩ b tõe n zoe n põs bɛyã pɛɛma," 
Psalms60:7 tɩ yãmb nin-nongdsã tõe n paam yolsgo. Fãag-y tõnd ne y nug-rɩtgo, la y leok-do!" 
Psalms60:8 Wẽnnaam zĩnda b ro-sõngẽ wã n yeele: Mam na n tõogame, mam na n pʋɩɩ Sɩkɛm, la m mak Sukot tẽn-nabdrã." 
Psalms60:9 Galaad ne Manaase yaa maam n so. Efrayiim yaa mam zabr pugla, la Zʋʋda yaa mam naam dasaare." 
Psalms60:10 Moaab yaa sĩng mam sẽn tar n sood koom. Mam lobda m neoodr Edom zugu. Filistẽ-dãmba, kaas-y zabr kaasg n seg maam!" 
Psalms60:11 Ãnda n na n tall maam n tɩ kẽes tẽng sẽn tar pãng pʋgẽ? Ãnda n na n tall maam n ta Edom? 
Psalms60:12 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb dag n ka bas tõnd sɩda? Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb dag n ka bas n ka leb n yãagd tõnd tãb-biisã sɩda?" 
Psalms60:13 Bɩ y sõng-do, n yols-d ne d bɛyã! Ninsaalb fãagr yaa zaalem bala." 
Psalms60:14 Wẽnnaam sã n be ne tõndo, tõnd na n maana tʋʋm-kãsemse. Yaa bãmb n na n sãam tõnd bɛɛbã." 
Psalms61:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teoog sẽn tar susi." 
Psalms61:2 Wẽnnaam, wʋm-y mam kɛlengã, kelg-y mam pʋʋsgã!" 
Psalms61:3 Mam bee dũniyã yaang n boond yãmb m sũ-sãangã pʋg n kot sõngre. Tɛ-y maam n dʋʋs pĩig zãntlem sẽn yɩɩd mam sẽn tõe n dʋ zugu! 
Psalms61:4 Bala, yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga, yãmb yaa mam pãng zĩig bɛyã taoore." 
Psalms61:5 Mam dat n zĩnda yãmb fu-roogẽ wã wakat fãa, la m soond yãmb pɩgsã tẽngre." 
Psalms61:6 Bala, yãmb a Wẽnnaam wʋmda mam pʋlengã, yãmb kõo maam pʋɩɩr ning sẽn yaa neb nins sẽn zoet yãmb yʋʋrã rẽndã." 
Psalms61:7 Paas-y rĩmã rasem sõore. Kɩt-y t'a vɩɩmd n kaoos zamaan woo zamaane! 
Psalms61:8 Bɩ a rɩ naamã Wẽnnaam taoor wakat fãa! Kɩt-y tɩ yãmb nonglmã ne y sɩdã gũ-a! 
Psalms61:9 Dẽ, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã wakat fãa, la m na n pidsa m pʋlengã daar fãa." 
Psalms62:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, a Yedutun sẽn yɩɩle. Yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms62:2 N-yẽe! Yaa Wẽnnaam nengẽ bal la mam tar yam-gãnega. Mam fãagr yita bãmb nengẽ. 
Psalms62:3 N-yẽe! Bãmb bal n yaa mam pĩiga, la m fãagda. Bãmb yaa mam pãng zĩiga. Mam kõn tol n miim ye." 
Psalms62:4 Hal tɩ ta dabʋr la yãmb na n naag taab n digd nin-yɛnga, n baood n na n kʋ-a wa lalg sẽn kɩlle, la wa yãgr sẽn dat n lʋɩ?" 
Psalms62:5 N-yẽe! Bãmb baood n yiis-a-la a waoogrã zĩigẽ. Bãmb nonga zĩrẽ yagbo. Bãmb noyã ningda barka, tɩ b sũyã kãabd wẽnga." 
Psalms62:6 N-yẽe! Yaa Wẽnnaam nengẽ bal la mam tar yam-gãnega! Bala, mam teegr yita bãmb nengẽ." 
Psalms62:7 N-yẽe! Bãmb bal n yaa mam pĩiga, la m fãagda. B yaa mam pãng zĩiga, mam kõn tol n miim ye." 
Psalms62:8 Mam fãagrã ne m ziirã bee ne Wẽnnaam. Wẽnnaam yaa mam pĩig sẽn kõt-m pãnga, la b yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga." 
Psalms62:9 Bɩ nebã rɩk b teegrã n teeg Wẽnnaam wakat fãa! Pelg-y y pʋs Wẽnnaam taoore! Wẽnnaam yaa tõnd zĩ-soalgdga. 
Psalms62:10 Ninsaal buud fãa wẽnda pemsem bala! B sã n mak ninsaalbã ne zɩslem makdga, b mikdame tɩ b yaa wa sobg bala! Bãmb fãa zɩslmã ka ta pemsem ye." 
Psalms62:11 Bɩ y ra teeg nen-kegl-tʋʋmã ye, la ra ning-y y tẽebã fãab pʋg ye. Yãmb paoong sã n paasdẽ, bɩ y ra bas tɩ y yamã loe ne-a ye." 
Psalms62:12 Wẽnnaam goma vugri, la mam leb n wʋma b sẽn gom naoor a yiibu: «Pãng yaa Wẽnnaam n so.»" 
Psalms62:13 Zu-soaba, nonglem me yaa yãmb dẽnda, bala, yãmb n keood ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã." 
Psalms63:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, a sẽn wa n be Zʋʋda we-raoogẽ wã." 
Psalms63:2 Wẽnnaam, yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam baooda yãmba. Yãmb ko-yũud tara maam, mam sesd n data yãmba, wa m sẽn be tẽn-koɛɛngẽ, tɩ koom kaẽ ye." 
Psalms63:3 Ade, mam geta yãmb y zĩ-sõngẽ wã, n dat n yãnd yãmb pãngã ne y ziirã." 
Psalms63:4 Bala, yãmb nonglmã sõmblem yɩɩda vɩɩm. Mam noor na n pẽga yãmba." 
Psalms63:5 Woto, mam na n waooga yãmb m vɩɩmã tɛka, mam na n zẽka m nus n pẽg yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms63:6 Mam na n tɩga wa ned sẽn dɩ rɩ-kaam ne sɩɩlem n tɩge. Mam na n kaasa ne sũ-noogo, la m noor na n pẽga yãmba." 
Psalms63:7 Mam sã n tẽeg yãmb yell m gãagẽ, mam tagsda yãmb yell yʋngã tõre." 
Psalms63:8 Bala, yãmb yaa mam sõangda, la mam kaasa ne sũ-noog yãmb pɩgsã tẽngre." 
Psalms63:9 Mam yam loee ne yãmba. Yãmb nug-rɩtg tebendeda maam. 
Psalms63:10 La neb nins sẽn baood n kẽes maam namsg pʋgẽ wã na n siga tãnd tẽngre. 
Psalms63:11 B na n bas-b lame tɩ zabr sʋʋg kʋ-ba, la b na n yɩɩ we-baas rɩɩbo." 
Psalms63:12 La rĩmã na n maana sũ-noog ne Wẽnnaam. Ned ning sẽn wẽend-a ne bãmb na n paama sũ-noogo, bala, zĩrẽ-be-nebã noy na n mumame." 
Psalms64:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms64:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kelg maam m wõosgã pʋga! Bɩ y gũ mam vɩɩmã ne bɛyã rabeem!" 
Psalms64:3 Bɩ y solg maam ne nin-wẽnsã saagrã, Zãag-y maam ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã." 
Psalms64:4 Bãmb saasda b zɛlma wã wa zabr sʋʋga, bãmb tãooda b pɛɛmã sẽn yaa b gom-toosã." 
Psalms64:5 Bãmb be b zĩigẽ n dat n tão burkĩnã. Bãmb soosd n tãood-a lame n ka yɛɛsdẽ ye. 
Psalms64:6 Bãmb yẽsda ne taab n saagd saag-wẽnse. Bãmb gomdame tɩ b na n busa bẽdse, la b yetẽ: «Ãnda n tõe n yãnd bẽdsã?»" 
Psalms64:7 Bãmb seta wẽng sɛdg n yetẽ: «Tõnd sed n sɛɛme, tõnd magbã fãa pidame. Ninsaal tagsg yaa zulunga, ned ka tõe n bãng-a ye.»" 
Psalms64:8 La Wẽnnaam linga bãmb n tão peemde, la zĩig pʋgẽ, bãmb paama poglgo." 
Psalms64:9 Bãmb zɛlma wã n wẽneg n lub-ba. Ned ning fãa sẽn yãnd-a bãmb gõmsda a zug n yaand-ba. 
Psalms64:10 Rabeem yõka ninsaalbã fãa, bãmb moonda Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã. Bãmb na n wʋma Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã võore." 
Psalms64:11 Nin-tɩrg maanda sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋga, la a soondg zĩig yaa bãmb nengẽ. Pʋ-peelem dãmbã na n maana sũ-noogo." 
Psalms65:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms65:2 Wẽnnaam sẽn be Sɩyõ, yãmb zemsa ne pẽgre, tõnd na n pidsa d sẽn pʋlem yãmbã." 
Psalms65:3 Yãmb sẽn kelgd pʋʋsgã yĩnga, ninsaalbã fãa na n waa yãmb nengẽ!" 
Psalms65:4 Kongrã pãng yɩɩda maam, la yãmb na n kõo tõnd sugr d beegrã yĩnga." 
Psalms65:5 Bark bee ned ning yãmb sẽn yãk t'a kolg yãmba, la a pa yãmb doogã samandẽ wã zugu! Yãmb doogã bõn-neebã taa tõnd daabo, yãmb doogã sẽn welg toorã taa tõnd daabo." 
Psalms65:6 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagda, yãmb maana tʋʋm-yɛɛsds ne tɩrlem n leok tõndo. Dũniyã kɩremsã fãa nebã, ne ko-kãsemsã teega yãmba." 
Psalms65:7 Yãmb vigla tãmsã ne y pãngã, yãmb sɩd tara pãng tɩ seke." 
Psalms65:8 Yãmb n kɩtd tɩ ko-kãsemsã bas guglungu, n kɩtdẽ tɩ b ko-wĩisã bas bʋrgo, la y kɩtdẽ tɩ nebã bas nokoɛɛma." 
Psalms65:9 Yãmb bõn-bãnã kẽesa dũniyã gill fãa nebã rabeem. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ yaang ne nin-taoor nebã kaas ne sũ-noogo. 
Psalms65:10 Yãmb geta tẽn-gãongã yelle, n kõt-a koom wʋsgo, yãmb kõt-a-la arzegs tɩ seke. Wẽnnaam ko-soayã pida ne koom. Yãmb segenda bõn-kãng bõn-koaadl yĩnga." 
Psalms65:11 Yãmb zãgsda a gudã koom, n kɩtdẽ t'a kunkubã saremdẽ, n kɩtdẽ tɩ saag niid n bʋkd tẽngã, n ningd a bõn-koaadlã barka." 
Psalms65:12 Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ yʋʋmdã baas neere, yãmb sẽn pɩʋʋgẽ fãa, yaa naar bala." 
Psalms65:13 Yamd pukda we-raoogã pʋga, tɩ sũ-noog kaasg gũbg tãmsã." 
Psalms65:14 Rũm-bãoonegã pida yamd zĩisẽ, la tẽn-nabdrã pida ne koodo, tɩ lebg sũ-noog kaasg ne yɩɩla." 
Psalms66:1 Yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Dũniyã nebã fãa, kaas-y n waoog-y Wẽnnaam!" 
Psalms66:2 Yɩɩl-y n waoog-y bãmb yʋʋrã, pẽg-y bãmb n wilg b ziirã!" 
Psalms66:3 Yeel-y Wẽnnaam yaa: Ad yãmb tʋʋmã seka zoeese! Yãmb pãngã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga, yãmb bɛɛbã kong n waoogda yãmba." 
Psalms66:4 Dũniyã gill wõgemdeda yãmb taoor n yɩɩnd n pẽgd yãmba. B yɩɩnd n waoogda yãmb yʋʋrã. 
Psalms66:5 Bɩ y wa n ges Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã! B tʋʋm-kãsemsã ninsaalb yĩngã seka zoeese. 
Psalms66:6 Wẽnnaam teka ko-kãsengã t'a lebg tẽn-koɛɛnga, b pɩʋʋga kʋɩlsã ne nao n looge. Bõn-kãng kɩtame tɩ tõnd maan sũ-noog bãmb pʋgẽ." 
Psalms66:7 Bãmb n so fãa ne b pãngã wakat fãa, bãmb nin bee tẽmsã zutu. Bɩ kɩɩsdbã ra wuk b mens ye!" 
Psalms66:8 Ninsaalba, waoog-y tõnd Wẽnnaamã, Zẽk-y y koees n pẽg bãmba!" 
Psalms66:9 Bãmb n kõt tõnd vɩɩm, la b ka basd tɩ tõnd naoor lak ye." 
Psalms66:10 Bala, mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb n feesd tõndo! Yãmb yɩlgda tõnd wa b sẽn yɩlgd wanzuri." 
Psalms66:11 Yãmb talla tõnd n tɩ kẽes bẽdgẽ, yãmb dag n zɩlga tõnd zɩɩb sẽn zɩsa." 
Psalms66:12 Yãmb basame tɩ neb tab tõnd zut n looge, n kɩt tɩ tõnd pɩʋʋg bugum ne koom, la yãmb yiisa tõnd be, n kẽes tõnd naar pʋga." 
Psalms66:13 Mam na n kẽnga yãmb doogẽ wã ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, mam na n pidsa m pʋlengã ne yãmba." 
Psalms66:14 Yaa pʋleng ning mam sẽn yaag m noor n pʋlmã, ne mam noorã sẽn gom goam nins m yel-pakrã wakatã." 
Psalms66:15 Mam na n maana rũm-nobds maand sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ yãmba, pe-raad ne wisdu. La m kɩt tɩ rũm-bɛd ne boees maand bug-zõos zẽk n ta yãmba." 
Psalms66:16 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã, wa-y n kelg-y-yã! Wa-y tɩ m na n togs-y-la bũmb nins Wẽnnaam sẽn maan n kõ maam." 
Psalms66:17 Mam yaaga m noor n bool bãmba, la m zelemdã pẽga bãmba." 
Psalms66:18 Wẽng sã n dag n beẽ mam sũurẽ, Zu-soabã rag n kõn kelgẽ maam ye." 
Psalms66:19 Sɩd me, Wẽnnaam kelga maam, bãmb wʋma mam pʋʋsgã." 
Psalms66:20 Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning sẽn ka zãgs-a mam pʋʋsgã, la sẽn ka zãag b nonglmã ne maamã paam pẽgre." 
Psalms67:1 Yɩɩll sẽn yɩɩnd ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms67:2 Bɩ Wẽnnaam zoe tõnd nimbãanega, la b ning-d barka. Bɩ b kɩt tɩ b nengã vẽenem yãg tõnd zugu," 
Psalms67:3 tɩ dũniyã rãmb tõe n bãng yãmb soayã, la tɩ bu-zẽmsã fãa tõe n bãng yãmb fãagrã!" 
Psalms67:4 Wẽnnaam, bɩ buudã fãa pʋʋs yãmb barka, la bɩ nebã fãa pʋʋs yãmb a Wẽnnaam barka." 
Psalms67:5 Bɩ bu-zẽmsã kɩdem n kaas ne sũ-noogo. Bala, yãmb bʋʋda nebã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem. Yãmb n tɛt nebã buud fãa dũniyã zugu." 
Psalms67:6 Wẽnnaam, bɩ buudã fãa pʋʋs yãmb barka, la bɩ nebã fãa pʋʋs yãmb a Wẽnnaam barka." 
Psalms67:7 Tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadl womdame. Tõnd Wẽnnaamã ningda tõnd barka. 
Psalms67:8 Bɩ Wẽnnaam ning tõnd barka! Bɩ dũniyã kɩrems nebã fãa zoe bãmba. 
Psalms68:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms68:2 Wẽnnaam sã n tik n yiki, b bɛɛbã sãeegdame. La sẽn kis-b wẽnnaamã fãa zoeta bãmb taoore." 
Psalms68:3 Nin-wẽnsã menemda Wẽnnaam taoore, wa sɩ-ribd sẽn yẽnegd bugmẽ." 
Psalms68:4 La nin-tɩrsã maanda sũ-noogo, n kɩdemd Wẽnnaam taoore. Bãmb sũur noomame tɩ b kɩdemdẽ." 
Psalms68:5 Yɩɩl-y Wẽnnaam yĩnga, pʋd-y yɩɩl n pẽg b yʋʋrã! Tuk-y sore, n deeg sẽn zao-a sawatã n watẽ wã! Bãmb yʋʋr boondame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Kɩdm-y bãmb taoore!" 
Psalms68:6 Wẽnnaam sẽn be b ro-sõngã pʋgẽ wã n yaa kɩɩbs ba, la b yaa pʋg-kõap sõangda." 
Psalms68:7 Wẽnnaam n kɩtd tɩ sẽn ka tar-a ned paam buudu, la b tõe tɩ bi-bees paam lohorem sũ-noogo. La b kɩtdame tɩ kɩɩsdbã zĩnd tẽn-koɛɛng pʋga." 
Psalms68:8 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb sẽn wa n lʋɩ y nebã taoorã, yãmb sẽn wa n kẽnd zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã," 
Psalms68:9 tẽngã rigimdame, la saasã kiigda koom yãmb a Wẽnnaam taoore, yãmb sẽn yaa Sinayi Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã taoore." 
Psalms68:10 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb sika sa-ko-sõngo! Yãmb nebã rag n yɛɛme, la y leb n kɩtame tɩ b yẽege." 
Psalms68:11 Yãmb nebã bee zĩig ninga, yãmb a Wẽnnaam sẽn segl naong rãmbã yĩng y sõmblmã pʋgẽ wã." 
Psalms68:12 Zu-soabã kõo noore, la pagb nins sẽn moond koe-noogã yaa tãb-bi-kʋʋngo." 
Psalms68:13 Dẽ, tãb-biisã ne b rĩm-dãmbã tara zoeese. Bãmb zoetame tɩ pʋg-neerã sẽn pa yirã pʋɩt te-zɛɛdem." 
Psalms68:14 Tɩ yãmb yaool n leb tãb-sikẽ n gãe, tɩ wall pɩgs bolg ne wanzuri, t'a kõbdã pɩnd wa b bolga sãnem." 
Psalms68:15 Sẽn-Ka-To sẽn wa n sãeeg rĩm-dãmbã, rẽ tɩ neez n dʋʋgd Salmond tãngã zugu." 
Psalms68:16 Wẽnnaam tãnga, Basã tãnga, tãng sẽn tar kũn wʋsgo," 
Psalms68:17 Tãms sẽn tar kũn wʋsgo, bõe yĩng tɩ fo maand sũ-kiir ne tãng ning Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk n na n zĩnd a zugã? Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ beenẽ lebg b zĩ-zĩidg wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Psalms68:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab saar-dãmb sõor tata tusa-tusa, la Zu-soabã bee bãmb sʋka, tɩ Sinayi be zĩ-sõngẽ wã." 
Psalms68:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn wa n dʋʋd yĩngrã, yãmb zãa yembse, yãmb yãka kũun ninsaalb sʋka, baa ne kɩɩsdbã nengẽ, n kɩt tɩ Sɩyõ lebg yãmb zĩ-zĩidga." 
Psalms68:20 Bɩ Zu-soabã paam pẽgr daar woo daare! Bãmb geta d yelle, la yaa Wẽnnaam-kãng n yaa tõnd fãagre." 
Psalms68:21 Wẽnnaam-kãng n yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn fãagd tõndo, Wẽnnaam-kãnga, Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tar pãng n tõe n fãag-d ne kũum." 
Psalms68:22 N-yẽe! Wẽnnaam na n bõgsa b bɛɛbã zutu. Yaa ned ning zug sẽn tar zoobd t'a manesem ka zemsã. 
Psalms68:23 Zu-soabã yeelame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb yi Basã n lebg n wa, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb yi ko-kãsengã zĩ-zulungẽ wã n lebg n wa.»" 
Psalms68:24 Tɩ yãmb naoã tõe n tab zɩɩm, tɩ y baasã zɛlmã paam pʋɩɩr bɛɛbã nengẽ." 
Psalms68:25 Mam Wẽnnaam, bãmb yãnda yãmb sẽn kẽnde. B yãnda mam dĩmã la m Wẽnnaamã sẽn kẽnd n wat zĩ-sõngẽ wã." 
Psalms68:26 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã lʋɩɩ taoore, tɩ sẽn wẽed-b yʋʋm-teedã pʋgda, tɩ pʋg-sadbã be sʋkã n wẽed sɩlsãgse." 
Psalms68:27 Pẽg-y Wẽnnaam kʋʋngã sʋka, Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã nebã!" 
Psalms68:28 Benzame buudã sẽn yaa yao-zʋʋgã n lʋɩt taoore, tɩ Zʋʋda nanambsã sẽn yer b naam futã pʋgda, tɩ Zabulõ ne Neftali buudã nanambs yaool n pʋgle." 
Psalms68:29 Fo Wẽnnaamã yeta foom tɩ f paam pãnga, mam Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ yãmb sẽn maan bũmb nins n kõ tõndã paam pãnga!" 
Psalms68:30 Zĩnd-y y roog ning sẽn lug Zeruzalɛmã pʋga, zĩig ning rĩm-dãmbã sẽn wat n kõt yãmb kũunã," 
Psalms68:31 n leng rũngã sẽn be tãnwĩisẽ wã. Leng-y lol-kʋʋngã ne nebã sẽn wẽnd nag-bi-kʋʋngã. Leng-y sẽn vũnumd-b n kõt yãmb wanzuri wã! Sãeeg-y neb nins sẽn nong zabã! 
Psalms68:32 Nin-kãsemsã sẽn yit Ezɩpt n watẽ wã. Kuus nebã zoet n watame, tɩ b nus teesd Wẽnnaam sẽnẽ." 
Psalms68:33 Dũniyã soolem-dãmba, yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Wẽnnaam, Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Zu-soabã." 
Psalms68:34 Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y sẽn zao-a sa-gãnã, hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ sa-gãnã! Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b koɛɛg rãamd yi tɩ b koɛɛg rãamd yi ne pãnga." 
Psalms68:35 Sak-y n deeg-y tɩ Wẽnnaam tara pãnga! Bãmb dɩta naam Israyɛlle, la bãmb pãngã bee sawatẽ." 
Psalms68:36 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb be y zĩ-sõmsẽ wã, la yãmb seka zoeese. Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã n kõt b nebã pãnga, ne pãn-tõogo. Bɩ Wẽnnaam paam pẽgre!" 
Psalms69:1 Yaa a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yaa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ ‹rulg lɛlma.›" 
Psalms69:2 Wẽnnaam, fãag-y maam, tɩ koomã lima maam n tãag m koakoayã." 
Psalms69:3 Mam suta zĩ-zulumsẽ wã begd pʋgẽ, n ka tõe n yals ye. Mam lisda koomã tẽngre, la ko-zoetmã peega maam n loogdẽ." 
Psalms69:4 Mam kelmame halɩ tɩ m pãng sɛ, mam koeesã kʋɩɩme. Mam gũu m Wẽnnaamã sõngr halɩ tɩ m ninã pãng booge." 
Psalms69:5 Sẽn kis-b maam zaalmã sõor yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd m zugã zoobdo. Neb nins sẽn dat n sãam maam, n tugd beem ne maam zaalmã tara pãnga. Mam sẽn ka rɩk bũmb ningã, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ m bao-a n lebse." 
Psalms69:6 Wẽnnaam, yãmb mii mam yalemdã, la mam kongrã ka solg ne yãmb ye." 
Psalms69:7 Zu-soaba, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, bɩ y ra sak tɩ sẽn maand-b tẽeb ne yãmbã paam yãnd mam yĩng ye! Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, ra bas-y tɩ sẽn baood-b yãmbã paam paoogr mam yĩng ye." 
Psalms69:8 Bala, yaa yãmb yĩng la mam sak n deeg tʋyã, yaa yãmb yĩng la mam deeg paoogre." 
Psalms69:9 Mam lebga sãan m ba-biisã yĩnga, mam lebga nin-zẽng m ma-biisã yĩnga." 
Psalms69:10 Bala, yãmb doogã nonglem sooga maam zãnga, la neb nins sẽn tʋʋd yãmbã tʋy lʋɩɩ mam zugu." 
Psalms69:11 Mam loee noor n yãbe, la rẽ waa ne tʋy mam zugu." 
Psalms69:12 Mam dɩka sũ-sãang fuug n yeelge, la mam lebga yel-bũnd m bɛɛbã yĩnga." 
Psalms69:13 Sẽn zĩ-b tẽngã rignoorẽ wã gomda mam yell wẽnga, la sẽn yũud-b rã-toosã gomda mam yell ne yɩɩla." 
Psalms69:14 La maam, mam pʋʋsda yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Wẽnnaam, yaa wakat yãmb sẽn tog n leok maam, yãmb nonglem-kãsengã yĩnga, la y fãagrã sẽn yaa sɩdã yĩnga!" 
Psalms69:15 Wẽnnaam, yiis-y maam begdẽ wã, tɩ mam da leb n sud ye! Fãag-y maam ne neb nins sẽn kis maamã, la y yiis-m ko-zulungã pʋga!" 
Psalms69:16 Ra bas-y tɩ ko-wĩigã loog ne-m ye, ra bas-y tɩ ko-zulungã rɩ-m ye, ra sak-y tɩ bulgã vel-m ye!" 
Psalms69:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, leok-y-ma! Yãmb nonglmã yaa sõama mam yĩnga. Yãmb nimbãan-zoeer-kãsengã yĩnga, bɩ y wẽnemd n ges-ma." 
Psalms69:18 Da solg y nengã ne y tʋmtʋmdã ye! Bala, mam bee yel-pakr pʋga, rẽ wã, bɩ y leok-m tao-tao!" 
Psalms69:19 Bɩ y kolg maam, la y fãag-ma! M bɛɛbã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga, bɩ y yols-ma!" 
Psalms69:20 Yãmb miime tɩ b tʋʋda maam, la b ningd maam yãnde, la b paoogd maam. Mam zabd-n-taasã fãa bee yãmb taoore." 
Psalms69:21 Paoogrã sãamda m sũuri, tɩ m lebg bãada. Mam dag n tẽedame tɩ neb na wa n zoe m nimbãanega, la m ka yãnd ye. Mam dag n tẽedame tɩ neb na wa n bels-ma, la m ka paam ye." 
Psalms69:22 Bãmb ningda zẽnem mam dɩɩbẽ, la ko-yũud sẽn tar maam yĩnga, b kõta maam miisim tɩ m yũ." 
Psalms69:23 Bɩ b rɩɩbã lebg bẽdg b yĩnga, bɩ b paoongã lebg tãoog b zo-rãmbã yĩnga!" 
Psalms69:24 Bɩ b ninã menem tɩ b ka leb n neẽ ye. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ b seesã koms tɩ b kuud wakat fãa! 
Psalms69:25 Bɩ y sik y sũ-puugrã b zutu! Bɩ yãmb sũ-kãbrã rɩ-ba! 
Psalms69:26 Kɩt-y tɩ b tãb-sikã lebg raboodo, tɩ ned da leb n zĩnd b fu-rotã pʋs ye!" 
Psalms69:27 Bala, bãmb namsda yãmb sẽn zoe n sɩbg-a soabã, la yãmb sẽn pogl-a soabã toog n lebg b sõasga." 
Psalms69:28 Rɩk-y b beeg-kãng n paas b beeg-kʋdgã. Ra bas-y tɩ b paam bʋʋm yãmb taoor ye! 
Psalms69:29 Yẽes-y b yʋyã vɩɩm sebrẽ wã, Bɩ b yʋyã ra naag nin-tɩrsã yʋy ye!" 
Psalms69:30 La maam, mam yaa nimbãan-neda, n be toog pʋgẽ. Mam Wẽnnaam, bɩ yãmb fãagrã sõng-ma!" 
Psalms69:31 Mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga Wẽnnaam yʋʋre. Mam na n zẽka bãmb yʋʋre, la m pʋʋs-b barka." 
Psalms69:32 Bõn-kãng nooma Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yɩɩd mam sẽn na n kõ-b naafo, bɩ loalg ne yɩɩl la nao-bendo!" 
Psalms69:33 Naong rãmbã na n yãnda rẽ n maan sũ-noogo. Yãmb dãmb sẽn baood Wẽnnaamã, paam-y raoodo!" 
Psalms69:34 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kelgda nimbãan-dãmbã, la b ka paoogd neb nins b sẽn kẽes bi-bees roogã ye." 
Psalms69:35 Bɩ yĩngr la tẽnga, la ko-kãsengã ne bõn-vɩɩs nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms69:36 Bala, Wẽnnaam na n fãaga Sɩyõ, la b lebs n me Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsã, tɩ neb kẽ be n soog-ba." 
Psalms69:37 Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmdbã yagens n na n soog tẽn-bãmb tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre, la sẽn nong-b bãmb yʋʋrã n na n zĩnd be." 
Psalms70:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yaa tẽegr yĩnga." 
Psalms70:2 Wẽnnaam, wa-y n fãag-y maam! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa-y tao-tao n sõng-ma!" 
Psalms70:3 Bɩ yãnd la paoogr paam neb nins sẽn dat-b n sãam mam vɩɩmã! Bɩ yãnd yõk sẽn dat-b tɩ toog paam maamã, tɩ b tar n leb poorẽ!" 
Psalms70:4 Bɩ neb nins sẽn yaand maam n yetẽ tɩ n'faa wã, lebg ne yãnde!" 
Psalms70:5 Bɩ neb nins sẽn baood yãmbã maan sũ-noog n kɩdem yãmb pʋga! Tɩ neb nins sẽn nong yãmb fãagrã yeel wakat fãa tɩ Wẽnnaam yaa kãsenga! 
Psalms70:6 Mam yaa naong soab la nimbãan-neda. Wẽnnaam, bɩ y wa tao-tao n sõng-ma! Yãmb la m sõangda, la m fãagda. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y wa la y ra kaoos ye!" 
Psalms71:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb la m zĩ-soalgdga, bɩ y ra tol n bas tɩ yãnd paam maam abada!" 
Psalms71:2 Bɩ y fãag maam yãmb tɩrlmã pʋga, tɩ m tõog n põse! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg-ma, la y fãag-ma!" 
Psalms71:3 Yɩ-y pĩig sẽn yaa mam soondg zĩiga, mam sẽn tõe n kẽngẽ wakat fãa, tɩ yãmb tõe n fãag maam. Bala, yãmb n yaa mam pĩiga, la m pãng zĩiga." 
Psalms71:4 Mam Wẽnnaam, fãag-y maam nin-wẽng nugẽ, fãag-y maam tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã ne nen-keglem dãmbã nusẽ!" 
Psalms71:5 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, mam tẽebã fãa yaa yãmba! Hal mam bi-bɩɩlem wakate, mam teega yãmba." 
Psalms71:6 Mam teega yãmb hal tɩ m ket m ma pʋgẽ. Yãmb n yiis maam m ma pʋgẽ. Yãmb la mam na n pẽgd n ka basdẽ ye. 
Psalms71:7 Neb wʋsg nifẽ, mam wẽnda wa bõn-bãnde, la yãmb n yaa mam zĩ-soalgdg sẽn tar pãnga." 
Psalms71:8 Mam noor pida ne yãmb pẽgre, la ne yãmb ziirã togsg wakat fãa." 
Psalms71:9 Mam kʋʋlem wakate, bɩ y ra zãag y meng ne-m ye. Mam pãngã sã n wa n sɛ, bɩ y ra bas-m ye!" 
Psalms71:10 Bala, mam bɛɛbã gomda mam yelle. Sẽn baood-b n dat n sãam mam vɩɩmã yẽsda ne taaba." 
Psalms71:11 Bãmb yetame: Wẽnnaam bas-a lame. Rig-y-yã-a n tɩ yõke, bala, ned ka be n na n fãag-a ye." 
Psalms71:12 Wẽnnaam, bɩ y ra zãag y meng ne maam ye! Mam Wẽnnaam, wa-y tao-tao n wa sõng-ma!" 
Psalms71:13 Bɩ yãnd yõk sẽn dõt-b maamã tɩ b menem! Bɩ sẽn baood-b maam ne wẽngã rɩ yãnde, la b paam yʋ-sãanga!" 
Psalms71:14 La maam, mam na n kell n talla tẽebo, mam na n kell n pẽgda yãmb n paasdẽ." 
Psalms71:15 Mam noor na n togsda yãmb tɩrlmã ne y fãagrã wakat fãa. Bala, mam ka tõe n sõd-b n sɛ ye." 
Psalms71:16 Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb pãng tʋʋmã yĩnga, mam na n waa yãmb nengẽ. Mam na n gomda yãmb y yembr tɩrlmã yell bala." 
Psalms71:17 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb zãmsa maam hal m bi-bɩɩlem wakate, la hal tɩ ta moasã, mam gomda yãmb bõn-bãnã yelle." 
Psalms71:18 Mam Wẽnnaam, baa mam sã n wa kʋʋl tɩ m zug pelge, bɩ y ra bas-m ye, hal tɩ m tõog n wilg zamaan-kãngã nebã yãmb nugã tʋʋmã, la m wilg zamaan ning sẽn wat-a wã yãmb pãng tʋʋmã." 
Psalms71:19 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb tɩrlmã zẽk n tãaga saasẽ, yãmb maana bõn-kãsemse. Mam Wẽnnaam, ned ka be n zem yãmb ye." 
Psalms71:20 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ yel-pakr ne tood wʋsg paam tõndo. La yãmb n na n leb n kõ maam vɩɩm, yãmb n na n leb n yiis maam bog-zulungã pʋga." 
Psalms71:21 Bɩ y paas maam ziiri, la y paas-m daoodo!" 
Psalms71:22 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb sɩdã yĩnga, mam na n wẽe pɛndg n pʋʋs-y barka. Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, mam na n yɩɩla ne kʋnd n pẽg yãmba." 
Psalms71:23 Mam na n kaasa ne sũ-noog n yɩɩl n pẽg yãmba, yãmb sẽn fãag mam vɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Psalms71:24 Mam zelemdã na n gomda yãmb tɩrlmã yell daar fãa, bala, sẽn dag n baood-b maam ne wẽngã paama yãnde, ne paoogre." 
Psalms72:1 A Salmo yɩɩlle. Wẽnnaam, kõ-y rĩmã yam t'a kao bʋʋd tɩrga, la y kõ rĩmã kamb y tɩrlmã!" 
Psalms72:2 Woto, a na n kao y nebã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem, la a kao nimbãan-nebã bʋʋd tɩ zemse." 
Psalms72:3 Tãmsã na n waa ne vɩ-bãan y nebã yĩnga, tɩ kunkubã wa ne tɩrlem." 
Psalms72:4 Yẽnda na n kao naong rãmbã bʋʋd tɩ zemse, Yẽnda na n fãaga nimbãan-nedã kamba, la a na n sãama sẽn maand-a nebã pãngã." 
Psalms72:5 Wĩndgã sã n ket n pukdẽ, tɩ kiuugã ket n kõt a vẽenem, nebã na n zoee yãmb dabeem zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms72:6 Bɩ rĩmã naamã yɩ wa saag sẽn niid mo-toabeng zugu, la wa sa-kẽeng sẽn niid tɩ tẽn-gãongã mogemde." 
Psalms72:7 Rĩmã naam wakate, tɩrlem na n tobame, la na n yɩɩ vɩ-bãan woo vɩ-bãane, n tãag dũniyã sɛɛbo." 
Psalms72:8 Rĩmã soolem na n sɩnga ko-kãsengã, n tɩ tãag ko-kãseng a yembrã, ne kʋɩl-kãsengã n tɩ tãag dũniyã tɛka." 
Psalms72:9 La we-raoogẽ nebã na n yĩgimda rĩmã taoore, la bãmb bɛɛbã na n moga tom." 
Psalms72:10 Tarsɩɩs tẽngã ne tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã rĩm-dãmbã, la Seba ne Seba tẽms rĩm-dãmbã na n talla kũun n wa kõ yẽnda." 
Psalms72:11 Rĩm-dãmbã fãa na n wõgemda bãmb taoore, la bu-zẽmsã fãa na n saka bãmba." 
Psalms72:12 Bãmb na n fãaga nimbãan-ned sẽn kelemd n kot sõngre, la naong soab sẽn ka tar sõangda." 
Psalms72:13 Bãmb na n zoee pãn-komsem soab ne nimbãan-ned nimbãanega. Bãmb na n fãaga nimbãan-nebã vɩɩm. 
Psalms72:14 Rĩmã na n fãag-b-la ne namsgo, la ne wẽnga, bãmb ka na n sak tɩ b raag b zɩɩm ye." 
Psalms72:15 Bɩ rĩmã vɩɩmd n kaoose, la bɩ nebã kõ bãmb Seba tẽng sãnem! Bɩ b pʋʋs rĩmã yĩng n da bas ye. Bɩ b ning rĩmã bark wakat fãa n da bas ye." 
Psalms72:16 Tẽngã na n pida ne bɩle wʋsgo, la koodã na n miimda tãmsã zut wa Libã tãngã zug tɩɩsã sẽn miimdã. Tẽngã nebã na n fɩɩga wa moogã sẽn be weoogẽ wã." 
Psalms72:17 Rĩmã yʋʋr na n paa wakat fãa, Wĩndgã sã n ket n pukdẽ, bãmb yʋʋrã na n paa wakat fãa. Nebã na n ninga taab bark ne bãmb yʋʋre, la bu-zẽmsã fãa na n yeelame tɩ rĩmã tara barka." 
Psalms72:18 Bɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre! Bãmb b yembr bal n maand bõn-bãna! 
Psalms72:19 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã sẽn tar ziirã paam pẽgr wakat sẽn ka sɛta! Bɩ bãmb ziirã pid dũniyã gilli! Ãmina! Ãmina! 
Psalms72:20 Woto n yaa a Izayi biig a Davɩɩd pʋʋsgã baoosgo. 
Psalms73:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. N-yẽe! Wẽnnaam yaa sõama Israyɛll yĩnga, b yaa sõama pʋ-peelem dãmbã yĩnga." 
Psalms73:2 La maam, kellẽ-la bilf tɩ m lʋɩẽ, bilf bal n kaẽ, tɩ m salg n lʋɩẽ." 
Psalms73:3 Bala, mam dag n maanda sũ-kiir ne wuk-m-mens rãmbã, mam sẽn ne nin-wẽnsã sẽn tɩlgdã yĩnga." 
Psalms73:4 Hal tɩ tãag b kũum, yɩɩr ka namsd bãmb ye. Bãmb nobame tɩ b yĩnsã pɩnda." 
Psalms73:5 Bãmb ka namsd wa neb a taabã ye. Bãmb ka paamd sɩbgr wa ninsaalb a taabã ye. 
Psalms73:6 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ wuk-m-mengã yaa b nag-teoogo, tɩ wẽngã maaneg yaa b fuugu." 
Psalms73:7 Bãmb nobame n pidi, la bãmb sũyã tags-wẽnsã yaa n looga nugu." 
Psalms73:8 Bãmb laada neb a taaba, n gomd ne nen-keglem. B wukda b mense, n gomd b sẽn na n maan neb a taab pãng to-to." 
Psalms73:9 Bãmb tol n yaagda b noy n tʋʋd Wẽnnaam, la b zelemdã saagda dũniyã fãa." 
Psalms73:10 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ nebã wẽnemd n get-ba. B kelgda b goamã n yũud-a wa koom. 
Psalms73:11 La b yetame: Wẽnnaam na n maana a wãn n bãnge? Rẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-To tara bãngr la?" 
Psalms73:12 Ad nin-wẽnsã sẽn yaa to-to: Bãmb vɩɩme n ka yɛɛsd bũmb ye, tɩ b paoongã tar fɩɩgr bala." 
Psalms73:13 Dẽnd mam sẽn yɩlg m mengã yaa zaalem, la mam sẽn nudg m nus tɩ m ka tar yellã yaa zaalem bala." 
Psalms73:14 Daar fãa, mam paamda toogo, yibeoog fãa, mam paamda sɩbgre." 
Psalms73:15 Mam sã n dag n yeelẽ: «Mam me na n goma wa bãmba,» ade, mam dag n na n zãmbẽ-la kambã." 
Psalms73:16 Dẽ, mam tagsame n na n wʋm bõn-kãng võore, la yɩɩ toog ne maam." 
Psalms73:17 Yaa mam sẽn wa n ta Wẽnnaam do-sõngẽ wã, la m bãng nin-wẽng baoosg sẽn na n yɩ a soaba." 
Psalms73:18 N-yẽe! Yãmb ningda bãmb soay sẽn yaa sals zutu, yãmb tusd-b lame n lubd sãoong pʋga." 
Psalms73:19 La nin-wẽnsã sãama nif kamsg pʋgẽ, bãmb taa b tɛka, rabeemã looga ne-ba!" 
Psalms73:20 Zu-soaba, yãmb sã n yiki, y na n menes-b lame, tɩ yaa wa ned sẽn yik a gãagẽ n ka leb n nand a zãmsd ye." 
Psalms73:21 Mam sẽn dag n be sũ-toog pʋgã, hal tɩ mam sũurã sãam wʋsgã," 
Psalms73:22 mam dag n yaa yalma, n ka mi baa fɩ ye. Mam dag n yaa wa rũng bal yãmb taoore." 
Psalms73:23 Baoosg zãnga, mam ket n bee ne yãmba, bala yãmb n zãad mam nugu." 
Psalms73:24 Yãmb saglgã tɛta maam, yãmb na n deega maam ne waoogre." 
Psalms73:25 Mam tara ãnda saasẽ? Mam ka maand sũ-noog dũniyã zugu, sã n ka yãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
Psalms73:26 Mam yĩngã ne m sũurã yɛɛme, la Wẽnnaam n kengd mam pɛlg wakat fãa, la bãmb yaa mam pʋɩɩre." 
Psalms73:27 Bala, sẽn zãagd-b b mens ne yãmbã na n sãamame. Yãmb menesda neb nins fãa sẽn basd yãmbã." 
Psalms73:28 Ne maam, tɩ pa Wẽnnaam sɛɛgẽ n tar yõodo. Mam yãka Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam tɩ b yaa mam soondg zĩiga. Tɩ mam tõe n moon yãmb tʋʋmã fãa." 
Psalms74:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Wẽnnaam, bõe yĩng tɩ y basd tõnd daar fãa? Bõe yĩng tɩ y puugd y sũuri? Bõe yĩng tɩ y puugd y sũur ne y piisã yãmb sẽn dɩlgdã?" 
Psalms74:2 Tẽeg-y y nebã yãmb sẽn da hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ n fãag-bã yelle. Bu-kãng yaa yãmb buudu, la y pʋɩɩre! Tẽeg-y Sɩyõ tãngã sẽn yaa zĩig ning yãmb sẽn dag n be wã yelle." 
Psalms74:3 Zẽk-y y naoor n kẽng rabood sẽn ka tɛkã zĩigẽ! Bɛyã sãama bũmb nins fãa sẽn be zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ wã. 
Psalms74:4 Yãmb zabd-n-taasã meng kelemda zĩig ning yãmb sẽn dag n segd tõndã. Bãmb ninga b mens bãnã beenẽ tɩ yɩ bãnde. 
Psalms74:5 B rag n wẽnda wa neb sẽn yi ne lay n kẽ weoog n na n kɛ tɩɩse. 
Psalms74:6 Moasã, bãmb pãba a bõn-naandɩ wã fãa ne lay la zãy n wã." 
Psalms74:7 Bãmb yõoga yãmb sɛk-zĩigã bugum. Bãmb lub-a-la tẽng n dẽgem zĩig ning yãmb yʋʋrã sẽn be wã. 
Psalms74:8 Bãmb dag n yeta b sũurẽ: «D menes-b wakat-yɛnga!» Bãmb yõoga Wẽnnaam sɛk zĩisã fãa sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã bugum. 
Psalms74:9 Tõnd ka leb n yãt bõn-bãn ye. Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs ka leb n beẽ ye, la tõnd ned ba a ye ka mi rẽ sẽn na n kaoos n ta daar ning ye." 
Psalms74:10 Wẽnnaam, bɛyã na n tara tʋy tɩ ta dabʋre? Bɛyã na n paoogda yãmb yʋʋrã n ka basdẽ?" 
Psalms74:11 Bõe yĩng tɩ y kalemd y nus n sĩnd n get n ka maand bũmbu? Tẽeg-y y nug-rɩtgã n sãam-ba! 
Psalms74:12 Wẽnnaam yaa mam dĩm hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ. Bãmb n wat ne tõogr tẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Psalms74:13 Yãmb n welg ko-kãsengã ne y pãngã. Yãmb n bõgs piryãndã sẽn be koomã pʋgẽ wã zutu. 
Psalms74:14 Yãmb n beds parwẽndã zugu, n kɩt t'a lebg we-rũms rɩɩbo." 
Psalms74:15 Yãmb n kɩt tɩ ko-bunds ne kʋɩls pus n yi. Yãmb n kɩt tɩ kʋɩls nins koom sẽn ka sɛtã kʋɩ. 
Psalms74:16 Wĩndg ne yʋng yaa yãmb n so. Yãmb n kɩt tɩ kiuugã ne wĩntoogã beẽ. 
Psalms74:17 Yãmb n yẽbg dũniyã todsã fãa. Yãmb n kɩt tɩ sẽoog ne sɩpaolg beẽ. 
Psalms74:18 Tẽeg-y bũmb a yembre: Bɛyã paoogda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, buud sẽn ka tar yam n paoogd yãmb yʋʋrã!" 
Psalms74:19 Da rɩk-y y wallã vɩɩm n kõ rũms ye. Da tol y n yĩm-y y nimbãan-nebã yell ye. 
Psalms74:20 Geelg-y y kaoolã, bala, tẽngã zĩis nins sẽn yaa libsgã, yaa wẽnem maneg n pid beenẽ." 
Psalms74:21 Da bas-y tɩ b sẽn namsd-a soabã rɩ yãnd ye! Bɩ nimbãan-ned ne naong soab pẽg yãmb yʋʋrã! 
Psalms74:22 Wẽnnaam, bɩ y yik n zab y meng zabre! Tẽeg-y yalembã sẽn paoogd yãmb n ka basdẽ wã yelle." 
Psalms74:23 Da yĩm-y y zabd-n-taasã kaasgã ye. Da yĩm-y sẽn zabd-b ne yãmbã bʋrgã sẽn zẽkdã ye! 
Psalms75:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnd n yetame: Da sãam ye. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms75:2 Wẽnnaam, tõnd na n pẽga yãmba. Bala, yãmb yʋʋrã n pẽ tõndo. Nebã moonda yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã." 
Psalms75:3 Mam sẽn na n yãk wakat ningã, mam na n kaoo bʋʋdã ne tɩrlem." 
Psalms75:4 Dũniyã na n yẽnega ne a nebã fãa. Yaa maam n vigl dũniyã a zĩigẽ. 
Psalms75:5 Mam yeta pẽg-m-mens rãmbã yaa: Ra pẽg-y y mens ye! La m yet nin-toosã yaa: Ra gʋng-y kang ye! 
Psalms75:6 Da gʋng-y kang tɩ loog ye, la y ra keng y sũur n gom wilg-m-men-goam ye." 
Psalms75:7 Waoogr ka yit yaanga wall taoor ye, la a ka yit we-raoogẽ me ye." 
Psalms75:8 Yaa Wẽnnaam n kaood bʋʋdo. Bãmb n sikd kẽere, la b zẽkd kẽere." 
Psalms75:9 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãada wamd b nugẽ, tɩ dɩvẽ sẽn mik be a pʋgẽ, tɩ b na n kɩrgdẽ, tɩ dũniyã nin-wẽnsã fãa na n yũ-a n tãag wamdã sɛɛga." 
Psalms75:10 La ne maam, mam na n togsa bõn-kãng wakat fãa, mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã." 
Psalms75:11 Mam na n sãama nin-wẽnsã fãa wilg-m-mengã. La nin-tɩrg na n paama zu-zẽkre. 
Psalms76:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. 
Psalms76:2 Zʋʋda rãmb mii Wẽnnaam, Wẽnnaam yʋʋrã yaa kãseng Israyɛll pʋga." 
Psalms76:3 Wẽnnaam fu-roogã bee Salɛm, La bãmb yir bee Sɩyõ." 
Psalms76:4 Beenẽ, bãmb kaoo tãbdo, la b sãam gãndo, n kao sʋʋse, n kɩt tɩ zabr sɛ." 
Psalms76:5 Yãmb pɩndame, n yaa neer n yɩɩda, yãmb yɩɩda tãmsã sẽn ka loogdã." 
Psalms76:6 B reesa tãb-bi-gãndaadã teed n bas-ba, bãmb gũsa b yaoolem gõeem, Gãnda-kãensã fãa ka tõog n zab n sõng b meng ye." 
Psalms76:7 A Zakoob Wẽnnaamã sẽn tãsã, wed-rʋʋdbã ne wiidã fãa kii kɩɩmde." 
Psalms76:8 Yãmb bal n sɩd sek zoeese! Yãmb sũ-yikrã pʋga, ãndã n tõe n yals yãmb taoore?" 
Psalms76:9 Yãmb zĩnda saasẽ n kɩt tɩ b bãng y bʋ-kaoorã. Rabeem kẽe dũniyã t'a zĩnd sɩddd... 
Psalms76:10 Wẽnnaam sẽn yik n kao bʋʋdã, b fãaga dũniyã nin-tals fãa." 
Psalms76:11 Baa ninsaalbã sũ-kãbrã na n lebga y pẽgre. La sẽn ket-b sũ-kãbrã pʋgã na n yeelga sũ-sãang fuugu. 
Psalms76:12 Pʋlm-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, la y pids y pʋlengo! Bɩ neb nins fãa sẽn gũbg bãmbã wa ne kũun n wa kõ sẽn sek-a zoeesã!" 
Psalms76:13 Bãmb n sigsd nanambse, Dũniyã rĩm-dãmb rigda ne rabeem bãmb taoore." 
Psalms77:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle, a Yedutun sẽn yɩɩle. Yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms77:2 Mam zẽkda m koɛɛg n kelemd n boond Wẽnnaam. Mam kelemdame n boond Wẽnnaam, la bãmb kelgda maam." 
Psalms77:3 Mam yel-pakr wakate, mam baooda Zu-soabã. Yʋngo, mam zẽka m nus n tees bãmb n ka yɛɛdẽ ye. Mam zãgsda belsgo." 
Psalms77:4 Mam sã n tẽeg Wẽnnaam yelle, mam sidgdame. Mam sã n tagse, mam sũurã sãamdame." 
Psalms77:5 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ gõeem ka be m ninẽ ye. Mam yamã bondgame tɩ m ka tar m sẽn na n yɛɛlg ye. 
Psalms77:6 Mam tagsa kʋdem-wẽndẽ yelle, m tagsa yʋʋm sẽn loog hal daar zarã yelle." 
Psalms77:7 Mam ket n tẽra m yʋng yɩɩllã pʋgẽ. Mam tagsda m sũurẽ, n baood n wʋm a võore." 
Psalms77:8 Rẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n bas-d-la wakat fãa la? Bãmb ka na n tol n leb n bao d zĩiga?" 
Psalms77:9 Bãmb nonglmã ta a tɛk la? Bãmb sẽn yeelã ka na n leb n zĩnd zamaan woo zamaan la? 
Psalms77:10 Wẽnnaam yĩma b nimbãan-zoeerã yell la? Dẽ yĩnga, bãmb sũ-yikrã kɩtame tɩ b nebã nimbãaneg ka leb n tar bãmb la?" 
Psalms77:11 Mam yetame: Bũmb ning sẽn namsd maam, yaa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-To nug-rɩtgã ka leb n maand wa pĩndã ye." 
Psalms77:12 Mam na n tẽega Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã yelle, mam na n leb n tẽega bõn-bãn nins yãmb sẽn maan hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã yelle." 
Psalms77:13 Mam na n goma yãmb tʋʋmdã fãa yelle. Mam na n tagsa y tʋʋm-kãsemsã yelle. 
Psalms77:14 Wẽnnaam, yãmb sorã yaa sõmblem sore. Wẽn-bʋg n yaa kãseng wa yãmb a Wẽnnaam?" 
Psalms77:15 Yaa yãmb la Wẽnnaam sẽn maand bõn-bãnã. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ nebã bãng yãmb pãngã. 
Psalms77:16 Yãmb fãaga y nebã ne y nugã pãnga. Y fãaga a Zakoob ne a Zozɛf yagensã. 
Psalms77:17 Koomã yãnda yãmb a Wẽnnaam! Koomã yãnda yãmb n yik n dãmbdẽ. N-yẽe! Ko-zulumsã gudgame. 
Psalms77:18 Sawatã kiiga ko-bɛda, Yĩngr sa-tãsã guglmame, N-yẽe! Yãmb pɛɛmã pɩʋʋmda zĩig fãa." 
Psalms77:19 Yãmb sa-kɛlengã koɛɛg yita sob-kãseng pʋgẽ. Sa-yãgbã vẽneem buii dũniyã gilli. La tẽn-gãongã rigimdame n miime. 
Psalms77:20 Yãmb sorã ra bee ko-kãsengã pʋga, yãmb so-bukã bee ko-zulumsã pʋse, la ned ka yã yãmb nao-bogd ye." 
Psalms77:21 Yãmb dɩka a Moyiis ne a Aarõ tɩ b yɩ wa pe-kɩɩmb n tɛ yãmb nebã. 
Psalms78:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Mam nebã, yok-y y tʋb n kelg m zãmsgã! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg mam noorã goamã!" 
Psalms78:2 Mam na n yaaga m noor n togs yel-bũna, la m togs kʋdemd wẽndẽ yel-solgdse." 
Psalms78:3 Tõnd sẽn wʋm bũmb ningã, la d sẽn mi bũmb ningã, ne tõnd yaab-rãmbã sẽn togs tõndã," 
Psalms78:4 tõnd ka na n solg b yagensã bõn-kãens ye. D na n wilga d yagensã Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã, la d togs bãmb b pãngã, ne bõn-bãnã b sẽn maanã." 
Psalms78:5 Bãmb vigla kaset bãnd a Zakoob pʋgẽ. Bãmb vigla tõog Israyɛll pʋgẽ, la b yeel tõnd yaab-rãmbã tɩ b rɩk-a n togs b yagensã." 
Psalms78:6 Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ y yagensã sẽn watã bãng-a, tɩ b kambã sẽn na n dogã bãng-a, tɩ bãmb me wa rɩk-a n togs b kamba." 
Psalms78:7 Dẽ, b na n dɩka b teegrã n teeg Wẽnnaam, la b kõn yĩm Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã ye. Bãmb na n saka Wẽnnaam noyã." 
Psalms78:8 Woto, bãmb kõn maan wa b yaab-rãmbã ye. B yaab-rãmbã yɩɩ tõatb ne kɩɩsdba, b yɩɩ neb sũy sẽn yaa golemse, la bãmb dag n ka maand sɩd ne Wẽnnaam ye." 
Psalms78:9 A Efrayiim yagensã sẽn dag n bob b logd n tãoodẽ wã, kong n lebg n zoee zabrã daare." 
Psalms78:10 Bãmb ka tall Wẽnnaam kaoolã ye. Bãmb ka sak n kẽn wa sẽn zems Wẽnnaam tõogã ye. 
Psalms78:11 Bãmb yĩma Wẽnnaam bõn-bãnã, bõn-bãn nins Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n maan bãmb nifẽ wã." 
Psalms78:12 Wẽnnaam maana bõn-bãnd b yaab-rãmbã nifẽ, Sowan tẽngã sẽn be Ezɩpt soolmẽ wã." 
Psalms78:13 Wẽnnaam welga ko-kãsengã n kɩt tɩ b pɩʋʋg n looge. Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ koomã yals wa lalga. 
Psalms78:14 Wĩndga, Wẽnnaam dag n yãagda bãmb ne sawaodgo, la yʋngã tõre, b rag n yãagd-b-la ne bugum vẽenem." 
Psalms78:15 We-raoogã pʋga, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ pĩis pus tɩ koom yi, wa zĩ-zulumsẽ ko-bundum tɩ bãmb yũ n tɩge." 
Psalms78:16 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ koom yi pĩig pʋgẽ n zoe, la b kɩt tɩ koom zoe wa kʋɩlse." 
Psalms78:17 La b yaab-rãmbã kell n maana yel-wẽn n beeg Wẽnnaam, la b kɩɩsa Sẽn-Ka-To we-rao-koɛɛngã pʋga," 
Psalms78:18 Bãmb maka Wẽnnaam b sũyã pʋse, n kos tɩ b rata rɩɩb sẽn tat bãmb yam." 
Psalms78:19 Bãmb goma Wẽnnaam wẽnga, B yeelame: «Wẽnnaam tõe n yãnd rɩɩb we-raoogẽ ka n kõ tõndo?" 
Psalms78:20 Yaa sɩd tɩ b wẽe pĩig tɩ koom yi, la koom sɩd zoee wʋsgo. La bãmb tõe n yãnd rɩɩb n kõ tõndo, wall b paam nemd n kõ b nebã?»" 
Psalms78:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋmame, la b sũurã puugame. La bugum widgame n zab ne a Zakoob yagensã. Wẽnnaam sũur yika ne Israyɛll nebã," 
Psalms78:22 b sẽn ka tẽ bãmbã yĩnga, la b sẽn ka rɩk b teegrã n teeg Wẽnnaam fãagrã yĩnga." 
Psalms78:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne sawatã sẽn be yĩngrã, la b pagsa yĩngr kʋɩlemsã," 
Psalms78:24 n kɩt tɩ mand sig bãmb zug wa saag sẽn niid tɩ bãmb rɩ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõ-b-la bɩle sẽn yit yĩngri." 
Psalms78:25 Bãmb ned kam fãa paama yĩngr pãens rãmb dɩɩb n dɩ, b tʋma rɩɩb tɩ bãmb dɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms78:26 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ yaang sobg fug saasẽ, bãmb pãngã waa ne sobg sẽn yit goabga." 
Psalms78:27 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ nemd sig bãmb zug wa wubsgu, la b kɩt tɩ liuuli sẽn yaa wʋsg wa ko-kãsengã noor bĩisrã rʋʋge." 
Psalms78:28 B kɩtame tɩ b rʋʋg b sik zĩigã tẽn-sʋka, n gilg b rotã." 
Psalms78:29 Bãmb dɩɩme hal tɩ sek-ba, Wẽnnaam kõ-b-la b sẽn dag n datã." 
Psalms78:30 La bãmb velmã sẽn ket n nan ka yi, tɩ rɩɩbã rag n ket n be b noyẽ wã," 
Psalms78:31 Wẽnnaam sũurã puuga ne Israyɛll nebã, tɩ b kʋ b neb nins sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩdã. B kʋʋ bãmb kom-bɩɩsã." 
Psalms78:32 La ne rẽ fãa, b leb n maana yel-wẽnã, n ka tẽ Wẽnnaam bõn-bãnã ye." 
Psalms78:33 B kɩtame tɩ b rasmã loog wa sebgo, n kɩt tɩ b yʋʋmã lebg pelen-yɩka." 
Psalms78:34 Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n dat n kʋ-bã, la b yaool n yik n baood Wẽnnaam. Bãmb wẽnemdame n baood Wẽnnaam ne b sũyã fãa." 
Psalms78:35 Bãmb tẽegame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam n dag n yaa bãmb pĩig kugri, tɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To n yaa b fãagda." 
Psalms78:36 Bãmb noorã goam pʋga, b rag n dat n zãmba Wẽnnaam. La b zɛlma wã rag n yagda zĩrẽ ne bãmba." 
Psalms78:37 Bãmb dag n ka yas kãenkãe Wẽnnaam pʋgẽ ye. La b rag n ka maand pʋ-peelem ne Wẽnnaam kaoolã ye. 
Psalms78:38 La Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa nimbãan-zoɛtã yĩnga, b kõo bãmb b yel-wẽnã sugri, n ka sãam bãmb ye. Naoor wʋsgo, bãmb tõoga b sũuri, n ka bas tɩ b sũ-puugrã fudg ye." 
Psalms78:39 Wẽnnaam tẽrame tɩ ninsaal yaa yĩng bala, t'a yaa pemsem sẽn loogd n ka leb n watẽ ye." 
Psalms78:40 Wẽnnaam tẽrame tɩ we-raoogã pʋga, wakat kẽere, b kɩɩsa bãmb noorã, n sãam bãmb a Wẽnnaam sũur zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã!" 
Psalms78:41 Bãmb leb n maka Wẽnnaam yɛsa, bãmb leb n baoo Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã noore." 
Psalms78:42 Bãmb ka leb n tẽr Wẽnnaam pãngã yelle, la b rag n ka tẽr daar ning Wẽnnaam sẽn fãag bãmb bɛyã nugẽ wã yell ye." 
Psalms78:43 La b yĩma bãn nins Wẽnnaam sẽn maan Ezɩptã yelle, la b ka tẽr bõn-bãn nins Wẽnnaam sẽn maan Sowan tẽngã ye." 
Psalms78:44 Wẽnnaam teka Nill kʋɩlsã koom tɩ lebg zɩɩm, tɩ b ka leb n tõe n yũ ye." 
Psalms78:45 Wẽnnaam tʋma kɛɛda tɩ b wãb Ezɩpt nebã, la b tʋm loms tɩ b sãam-ba." 
Psalms78:46 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ sʋy rɩ b koodã, la b bas tɩ kalwaar sãam b sẽn tʋm n paamã." 
Psalms78:47 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ sapɩlem dʋʋg n sãam b reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, la b kɩt tɩ wao-kãseng sãam b wom-seesã." 
Psalms78:48 Wẽnnaam basame tɩ sapɩlmã kʋ b rũmsã, n kɩt tɩ sa-tãs kʋ b rũm-kʋʋngã." 
Psalms78:49 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ b sũ-yikrã, ne b sũ-puugrã, la b sũ-kãbrã, ne b sũ-sãangã rɩ Ezɩpt nebã. Bãmb tʋma b malegs tɩ b wa ne tood bãmb zutu." 
Psalms78:50 Bãmb basame tɩ b sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmde, Wẽnnaam ka bas-b n ka kʋ ye. B basame tɩ bã-loangdg sãam b vɩɩmã." 
Psalms78:51 Bãmb kʋʋ Ezɩpt kom-dẽemsã fãa, kom-dẽems nins sẽn yaa yir fãa pãng sɩngrã, a Sam yagensã sʋkã." 
Psalms78:52 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ nebã yi n loog wa piisi. Wẽnnaam tɛɛ b nebã we-raoogã pʋg wa rũm-kʋʋngo. 
Psalms78:53 Wẽnnaam tɛɛ bãmb ne laafɩ, tɩ rabeem ka yõk-b ye. La ko-kãsengã rɩɩ bãmb bɛɛbã." 
Psalms78:54 Wẽnnaam tall-b lame n taas tẽn-sõngẽ wã. B taas-b-la tãng ning bãmb sẽn dag n deeg ne b pãngã. 
Psalms78:55 Wẽnnaam diga bu-zẽmsã bãmb taoore, n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ bãmb tɩ b sooge, n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll buudã reeg bu-zẽmsã fu-rot n kẽ." 
Psalms78:56 Bãmb maka Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To, n kɩɩs b noorã, n ka sak bãmb tõodã ye." 
Psalms78:57 Bãmb zãaga ne Wẽnnaam n lebg zãmb dãmb wa b yaab-rãmbã, bãmb bʋdga wa tãp sẽn fisgi." 
Psalms78:58 Bãmb maana maoong kʋʋb zĩis n kɩt tɩ Wẽnnaam sũurã puugi, la b maan bõn-naands n nek wẽnnaam sũ-kiirã." 
Psalms78:59 Wẽnnaam wʋmame tɩ b sũurã yiki, la bãmb basa Israyɛll zãng fasɩ." 
Psalms78:60 Bãmb basa Sɩlo sɛk roogã, fu-roog ning bãmb sẽn dag n be a pʋg ninsaalb sʋkã." 
Psalms78:61 Bãmb basame tɩ b pãngã kẽ yembdo, tɩ bɛyã yõk-b n deeg b ziirã." 
Psalms78:62 B basame tɩ b kʋ b nebã ne zabr sʋʋga. Bãmb sũurã puuga ne b nebã sẽn yaa b rẽndã. 
Psalms78:63 Bugum dɩɩ bãmb kom-bɩɩsã, la b kom-pugli wã ka paam pẽgr ye." 
Psalms78:64 Bãmb maan-kʋʋdbã paa tãpẽ, la b pʋg-kõapã ka yãb ye." 
Psalms78:65 Zu-soabã neka wa ned sẽn dag n gõe. Bãmb neka wa gãndaoog sẽn tɩg rãam. 
Psalms78:66 Bãmb gilga bɛɛbã poorẽ n wẽ-ba, n ning-b yãnd wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms78:67 Baoosgo, Wẽnnaam basa a Zozɛf roogã. Bãmb ka yãk Efrayiim buudã ye." 
Psalms78:68 Bãmb yãka Zʋʋda buudã, yaa Sɩyõ tãngã bãmb sẽn nongã." 
Psalms78:69 B mee b zĩ-sõngã n zẽk wa saasẽ, b me-a-la wa tẽngã b sẽn yẽbg wakat fãa yĩngã." 
Psalms78:70 Wẽnnaam yãka b tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩde. Bãmb yãk-a-la piis yãg zĩigẽ. 
Psalms78:71 Bãmb yãka a Davɩɩd a sẽn wa n pʋgd a piis n gilgdẽ wã, n na n kɩt t'a rɩlg a Zakoob yagensã sẽn yaa bãmb nebã, ne Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb pʋɩɩrã." 
Psalms78:72 La a Davɩɩd dɩlga bãmb ne burkĩndi, la a tɛ bãmb ne bãngre." 
Psalms79:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Wẽnnaam, bu-zẽmsã reega yãmb pʋɩɩrã, bãmb dẽgmã yãmb ro-sõngã, bãmb kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm lebg raboogo." 
Psalms79:2 Bãmb kʋ y tʋmtʋmdbã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg bõn-yɩgdɩ rɩɩbo, la b kɩt tɩ y nebã lebg we-rũms rɩɩbo." 
Psalms79:3 Bu-zẽmsã raaga y nebã zɩɩm wa koom, b raaga bãmb zɩɩmã n gilg Zeruzalɛm, la ned ka be n na n mum bãmb kũumã ye." 
Psalms79:4 Tõnd lebga d yagsã bõn-yaandga, la sẽn gũbg-b tõndã paoogda tõndo, la b laad tõndo." 
Psalms79:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sũurã na n kell n yikame tɩ ta rabʋre? Yãmb sũ-kãbrã na n dɩta wa bugum tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms79:6 Puug-y y sũur ne bu-zẽmsã la ne neb nins sẽn ka mi yãmbã, la y kãbg y sũur ne soolem nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd ne yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms79:7 Bala, bãmb kʋ a Zakoob yagensã, la b sãam b soolmã." 
Psalms79:8 Da leb-y n tẽeg tõnd kongr nins sẽn loogã yell ye! Seg-y tõnd tao-tao ne nimbãan-zoeere! Bala, tõnd pãngã sɛɛ zãnga." 
Psalms79:9 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagda, sõng-y-do, yãmb yʋʋrã waoogr yĩnga! Fãag-y-do, la y pek d yel-wẽnã, yãmb yʋʋrã maasem yĩnga." 
Psalms79:10 Bõe yĩng tɩ y na n bas tɩ bu-zẽmsã wa sokdẽ: «Bãmb Wẽnnaamã bee yɛ?» Bɩ y rok y sũur ne bu-zẽmsã, b sẽn daag yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã zɩɩmã yĩnga, tɩ tõnd yã." 
Psalms79:11 Bɩ y wʋm b sẽn kẽes-b rãmb bi-bees roogã sidgri. Tall-y yãmb pãn-kãsengã n fãag b sẽn dat n kʋ-b rãmbã! 
Psalms79:12 Zu-soaba, kɩt-y tɩ tõnd yagsã paam paoogr ning b sẽn paoogd yãmbã naoor a yopoe!" 
Psalms79:13 La tõndo, tõnd yaa yãmb nebã, la piis yãmb sẽn dɩlgda, tõnd na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Tõnd na n pẽga yãmb zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms80:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yaa kaset yɩɩlle, b sẽn yɩɩnd wa yɩɩll sẽn boond tɩ ‹rulg lɛlma.›" 
Psalms80:2 Israyɛll pe-kɩɩma, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelge, yãmb n tɛt a Zozɛf yagensã wa rũmsi! Yãmb zĩi serubẽ-rãmbã zugu! Puk-y y meng ne y ziirã," 
Psalms80:3 Efrayiim ne Benzame la Manaase taoore, wa-y ne y pãngã n wa fãag-do!" 
Psalms80:4 Wẽnnaam, leb-y n kõ-y tõnd pãnga! Kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui-du, tɩ d paam fãagre!" 
Psalms80:5 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba! Yãmb na n puuga y sũur ne y nebã pʋʋsg tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms80:6 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ b nintãm lebg b rɩɩbo, yãmb kɩtame tɩ b nintãm lebg b ko-yũudum." 
Psalms80:7 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tõnd yagsã wẽed nokoɛɛmã tõnd wɛɛngẽ, la y kɩt tɩ d lebg bɛɛb laada." 
Psalms80:8 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, leb-y n paas-y tõnd pãnga! Kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui-du, tɩ d paam fãagre!" 
Psalms80:9 Yãmb dag n võoga reezẽ tɩɩgã n yiis Ezɩpt tẽnga, n dig bu-zẽmsã n sel-a." 
Psalms80:10 Yãmb manega zĩig a yĩnga. A kɩɩ yẽga, n tẽ n pid tẽngã fãa." 
Psalms80:11 Yẽnda maasmã rag n buii tãmsã, t'a wilã vind sɛɛdr tɩɩs nins sẽn yaa bɛd n yɩɩdã wila." 
Psalms80:12 Yẽnda wilã tãoome n tãag Mediterane ko-kãsengã, t'a yagensã tão n ta Efrat kʋɩlgã." 
Psalms80:13 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb wurg a yãgrã, tɩ so-loaadbã fãa kẽed n fãsd a bi-gĩnã?" 
Psalms80:14 Reoog yii kãgrẽ n wa sãam-a, a lebga we-rũmsã yamdo." 
Psalms80:15 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, lebg-y n wa-y-yã! Zĩnd-y y sẽn beẽ wã saasẽ n gese! Bɩ y wa n sõng reezẽ tɩ-kãngã!" 
Psalms80:16 Kogl-y bũmb ning yãmb meng nug-rɩtg sẽn selã. Kogl-y bi-ribl ning yãmb meng sẽn kõ pãngã! 
Psalms80:17 B yõog-a-la bugum, b kɛ-a lame! Yãmb sã n tãs-ba, b menemdame." 
Psalms80:18 Bɩ y nug zĩnd ned ning sẽn be yãmb dɩtgã zugu. Bɩ y nug zĩnd ninsaal bi-ribl ning yãmb sẽn kõ pãngã zugu. 
Psalms80:19 Tõnd ka na n leb n wẽnemd n bas yãmb ye. Bɩ y leb n kõ-d vɩɩm, la d na n waooga yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms80:20 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, tall-y tõnd n leb d tẽngẽ wã! Kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui-du, tɩ d paam fãagre!" 
Psalms81:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teedo. 
Psalms81:2 Kils-y ne sũ-noog Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd pãngã yĩnga! Kaas-y ne sũ-noog a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã yĩnga! 
Psalms81:3 Pʋd-y yɩɩla, la y wẽ sɩlsãgse, la y wãag ruudg n maan noogo, la y wẽ kʋnde!" 
Psalms81:4 Peeb-y baorg ki-paalgã pʋga, ki-peoolgã wakate, peeb-y baorg tõnd tigrã daare!" 
Psalms81:5 Bala, yaa noor Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, la a yaa a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã no-tũudga." 
Psalms81:6 Yaa kaset b sẽn kõ a Zozɛf buudã, wakat ning b sẽn yi n zab ne Ezɩpt tẽngã. Mam wʋma bu-zẽng goam sẽn yeele:" 
Psalms81:7 Mam sika zɩɩbã n bas b bãgdã, la peoog fãaga b nusẽ n lʋɩ." 
Psalms81:8 Fo kelma f yel-pakrã pʋga, la mam yolsa foom. Mam tũnuga sa-tãs n leok foom. Meriba koomã noore, mam maka foom n gese." 
Psalms81:9 Mam nebã, kelg-y-yã! Mam dat n keooga yãmba, Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sã n dag n tõe n kelgẽ maam!" 
Psalms81:10 Bɩ y ra sak tɩ wẽn-zẽng zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye! Ra wõgemd-y wẽn-sãang taoor ye! 
Psalms81:11 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, sẽn yiis-a yãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã. Yaag-y y noor sõama, tɩ m pids-a." 
Psalms81:12 La mam nebã ka kelg mam koɛɛgã ye. Israyɛll nebã zãgsa maam. 
Psalms81:13 Dẽ, mam bas-b-la ne b sũ-keelmã, la bãmb tũu b meng sũyã ratem." 
Psalms81:14 Mam nebã sã n dag n kelgdẽ maam, Israyɛll sã n dag n tũudẽ mam soayã," 
Psalms81:15 mam dag n na n ningẽ-la b bɛɛbã yãnd wakat-yɛnga. Mam dag n na n zẽka m nug n wẽ b bɛɛbã. 
Psalms81:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kisgdbã rag n na n wõgemda bãmb taoore, la bãmb rag n na n vɩɩmdẽ-la a woto wakat fãa." 
Psalms81:17 Wẽnnaam dag n na n kõẽ-la Israyɛll kood sẽn yaa sõama wʋsgo, la m na n kɩtẽ lame tɩ b paam pĩig sɩɩd n dɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms82:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. Wẽnnaam bee b nebã sʋka, la b bee wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋk n yaa bʋ-kaooda." 
Psalms82:2 Yãmb na n kaoo bʋʋdã kɛga, la y bʋ n sõng nin-wẽnsã tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms82:3 Kao-y ka-pãng soab ne kɩɩb bʋʋd tɩrga, la y kao nimbãan-ned ne naong soab bʋʋd tɩrga," 
Psalms82:4 Sõng-y ka-pãng soabã ne naong soabã tɩ b põse, fãag-y-b nin-wẽns nugẽ." 
Psalms82:5 Bãmb ka tar bãngre, b ka tar yam ye. Bãmb kẽnda lik bida pʋgẽ. La tẽn-gãongã yẽbgr fãa rigimdame." 
Psalms82:6 Mam dag n yeelame: Yãmb yaa wẽnnaam-dãmbã, yãmb fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-To kamba." 
Psalms82:7 La baoosgo, yãmb me na n kii wa ninsaalbã, yãmb na n lʋɩɩ wa nanambs a taabã." 
Psalms82:8 Mam Wẽnnaam, yik-y n kao-y dũniyã bʋʋdo! Bala, soolem-dãmbã fãa yaa yãmb n so." 
Psalms83:1 A Azaf yɩɩlle. 
Psalms83:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, ra sĩnd-y y noor ye! Da-y yẽd-y y tʋb ye, mam Wẽnnaam, ra-y zĩnd-y sɩddd... n ka maan bũmb ye!" 
Psalms83:3 Bala, yãmb bɛɛbã guglumdame, neb nins sẽn kis-b yãmbã zẽkda b zutu." 
Psalms83:4 Bãmb soos n saagda sɩlem saagr y nebã yĩnga. Bãmb seta ne taab n dat n maan y sẽn kogend-b rãmbã wẽnga. 
Psalms83:5 Bãmb gomda ne taab n yetẽ: «Wa-y tɩ d kɩt tɩ b menem bu-zẽmsã sʋka, tɩ b ra leb n tẽeg Israyɛll yʋʋrã yell ye!»" 
Psalms83:6 Bãmb seta ne taaba, n lebg yam a yembre. Bãmb maanda kaool n dat n zab ne yãmba." 
Psalms83:7 Yaa Edom nebã ne Ismayɛll buudã, la Moaab nebã la Hagaar yagensã." 
Psalms83:8 Geball nebã, Amo-rãmbã, ne Amalɛk nebã, la Filistẽ-dãmbã ne Tɩɩr tẽng nebã." 
Psalms83:9 Asiiri nebã me tɩ naaga bãmba, n na n sõng a Lot yagensã." 
Psalms83:10 Maan-y-b wa yãmb sẽn dag n maan Madiyã buudã ne a Sizera la a Yabẽ Kisõ ko-soogẽ wã. 
Psalms83:11 B sãama bãmb Eyin-Door tẽngã, bãmb lebga birg tẽn-gãongã yĩnga." 
Psalms83:12 Maan-y-b nin-kãsemsã wa y sẽn maan a Orɛɛb ne a Zeebã, la y maan b na-biisã wa y sẽn maan a Zeba ne a Salmuna wã." 
Psalms83:13 Bãmb dag n gomdame n yetẽ: «D kẽng n tɩ reeg zĩis nins sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam dẽndã n sooge!» 
Psalms83:14 Mam Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ b lebg wa yõng-tabdo, la wa ka-fɩɩb sobg sẽn dɩkde." 
Psalms83:15 Kɩt-y tɩ b lebg wa bugum sẽn dɩt kãgre, wa bugum sẽn dɩt tãmse." 
Psalms83:16 Dẽ wã, kell-y n pʋgl-y-b ne yãmb sob-raoogo, kɩt-y tɩ yãmb sob-kẽengã kẽes-b rabeem!" 
Psalms83:17 Kɩt-y tɩ yãnd yõk-b tɩ b wẽnemd n bao yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms83:18 Bɩ yãnd ne rabeem yõk-b wakat fãa, bɩ yãnd yõk-b tɩ b sãame!" 
Psalms83:19 Dẽ, b na n bãngame tɩ yãmb y yembr bal yʋʋr la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa Sẽn-Ka-To sẽn so dũniyã gilli." 
Psalms84:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms84:2 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, zĩig ning yãmb sẽn be wã tara yamleoogo!" 
Psalms84:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã samand ratem tara maam, hal tɩ m sesdẽ tɩ m pãng sɛ. Mam sũurã ne m yĩngã kaasd n boonda Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã." 
Psalms84:4 Baa liuul mengã tara a gãag zĩiga, la sɩlaall me tara a tʋk n wekd kamba, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, n yaa mam dĩm la m Wẽnnaamã tẽn-kugr sɛɛgẽ!" 
Psalms84:5 Bark bee sẽn be-b yãmb doogẽ wã zutu! Bãmb na n pẽga yãmb n ka bas ye. 
Psalms84:6 Bark bee neb nins pãng sẽn yit yãmb nengẽ wã zutu! Bãmb tagsg yaa tɩ kẽng yãmb sɛk zĩigẽ wã. 
Psalms84:7 Bãmb sã n wa n pɩʋʋgd Baka longã, b kɩtdame t'a lebg ko-budum zĩiga, sigr saagã sikda a barkã a zugu." 
Psalms84:8 Bãmb pãngã paasda wakat fãa, bãmb na n yalsa Wẽnnaam taoor Sɩyõ." 
Psalms84:9 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, wʋm-y mam pʋʋsgã! A Zakoob Wẽnnaam, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg-ma!" 
Psalms84:10 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd gãongo, ges-y-yã! Bɩ y ges y nin-tũusdgã nenga!" 
Psalms84:11 Daar a ye yãmb samandẽ wã, n são rasem tusr zĩig a to. Mam yãka yam n na n pa mam Wẽnnaamã roog rigno-koakẽ, n yɩɩd m sẽn na n tɩ zĩnd nin-wẽns zakẽ." 
Psalms84:12 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaamã yaa tõnd wĩntoogo, la b yaa tõnd gãongo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt neb nins sẽn kẽnd ne burkĩndã bark ne ziiri, n ka mongd-b bõn-sõng ba a yembr ye." 
Psalms84:13 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, bark bee ned ning sẽn teeg yãmbã zugu!" 
Psalms85:1 A Koore yagens yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms85:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb wilga y nonglem ne y tẽngã, yãmb kɩtame t'a Zakoob yagensã sẽn dag n be yembdã lebg n wa." 
Psalms85:3 Yãmb kõ y nebã sugr b kongrã yĩnga, yãmb luda b yel-wẽnã fãa." 
Psalms85:4 Yãmb basa y sũ-puugrã fãa tɩ sɛ, yãmb lebg n sika y sũuri." 
Psalms85:5 Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tõnd fãagda, lebs-y tõnd d soolmẽ wã! Bas-y y sũurã sẽn yik ne tõndã tɩ sɛ!" 
Psalms85:6 Yãmb sũur na n yika ne tõnd n ka basdẽ? Yãmb sũ-puugrã na n yɩɩ zamaan woo zamaan yĩng bɩ? 
Psalms85:7 Rẽ yĩnga, ka yãmb n tõe n leb n wa kõ tõnd vɩɩm, n kɩt tɩ yãmb nebã tõe n maan sũ-noog yãmb pʋgẽ sɩda?" 
Psalms85:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wilg-y y nonglmã ne tõndo, la y fãag-do!" 
Psalms85:9 Mam na n kelga Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã. Bala, b gomdame tɩ b nebã ne b nin-nongdsã tõe n paam vɩ-bãane, la tɩ b ra leb n leb b yalem-tʋʋmẽ wã ye." 
Psalms85:10 N-yẽe! Neb nins sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã fãagr kolgame, la bãmb ziirã na n kell n paa tõnd tẽngẽ wã." 
Psalms85:11 La nonglem ne sɩd yeka taaba, tɩ tɩrlem ne vɩ-bãan mobg taaba." 
Psalms85:12 Sɩdã bulame n yi tẽngã zugu, tɩ tɩrlem be saasẽ n sulg n get tẽnga." 
Psalms85:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n kõt naare, la tõnd tẽn-gãongã womda biisi." 
Psalms85:14 Tɩrlem na n lʋɩɩ bãmb taoore, n tukd sorã tɩ bãmb kẽnda." 
Psalms86:1 A Davɩɩd pʋʋsgo. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelge, la y leok-ma! Bala, mam yaa naong soaba la nimbãan-neda." 
Psalms86:2 Gũ-y mam vɩɩmã, bala, mam yaa yãmb nin-nongre! Mam Wẽnnaam, fãag-y y tʋmtʋmdã, mam dɩka m teegrã n teeg yãmba!" 
Psalms86:3 Zu-soaba, zoe-y mam nimbãanega! Bala, mam boonda yãmb daar fãa." 
Psalms86:4 Bɩ y kõ y tʋmtʋmdã sũ-noogo. Zu-soaba, mam wẽnemda m neng n get yãmba." 
Psalms86:5 Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa sõmblem soaba, la y kõta sugri. Yãmb nonglmã yaa kãsenga, neb nins fãa sẽn boond yãmbã yĩnga." 
Psalms86:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m pʋʋsgã. Bɩ y wʋm mam se-yõkrã!" 
Psalms86:7 Mam yel-pakr wakate, m boonda yãmba, la yãmb leokda maam." 
Psalms86:8 Zu-soaba, wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, yãmb ka tar mak-n-taag ye. La yãmb tʋʋmã ka tar to ye." 
Psalms86:9 Zu-soaba, buud toay-toayã fãa yãmb sẽn naanã na n wa wõgemda yãmb taoor n waoog yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms86:10 Bala, yãmb yaa kãsenga, la y maanda bõn-bãna. Yãmb y yembr bal la Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms86:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zãms-y maam tɩ m maan yãmb daabã! Mam na n kẽna yãmb sɩdã pʋga. Kɩt-y tɩ m paam tagsg a yembr bala, sẽn yaa tɩ m zoe yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms86:12 Mam Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark ne m sũur fãa! La mam na n waooga yãmb yʋʋrã wakat fãa." 
Psalms86:13 Bala, yãmb nonglmã yaa kãseng mam yĩnga, la yaa yãmb n fãagd maam ne kɩɩm-kulg zĩ-zulumsã." 
Psalms86:14 Wẽnnaam, wilg-m-mens rãmb n yik n zabd ne maam, nin-toos lagma taab n dat n sãam mam vɩɩmã. Bãmb toog ka tol n be ne yãmb ye." 
Psalms86:15 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yãmb yaa nimbãan-zoeer soaba, la y yaa maan-neer soaba. Yãmb yaa sũ-maasem soaba, yãmb nonglmã yaa kãsenga, la y yaa sɩd soaba." 
Psalms86:16 Wẽnemd-y n ges-y maam, la y zoe m nimbãanega. Kõ-y mam sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdã pãnga, fãag-y y tʋmtʋmd-poakã bi-ribla!" 
Psalms86:17 Maan-y maam neer tɩ yɩ bãnde, tɩ sẽn kis-b maamã yã tɩ yãnd yõk-ba! Bala, yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sõngd maam, la y belsd maam." 
Psalms87:1 A Koore yagensã yɩɩlle, yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teedo. Sɩyõ yẽbga tãn-sõamyã zutu." 
Psalms87:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga Sɩyõ rignoyã n yɩɩd a Zakoob rotã fãa. 
Psalms87:3 Wẽnnaam tẽnga, b gomda fo ziirã yelle!" 
Psalms87:4 Neb nins sẽn mi-b maamã taoore, mam gomda Rahaab ne Babilond yelle. Ad Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngã, yaa Tɩɩr ne Kuusi. Yaa beenẽ la nin-bãmbã rog yã." 
Psalms87:5 La b zĩnda Sɩyõ n yeel yaa: «B fãa roga beenẽ, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-To n paasd-a pãnga.»" 
Psalms87:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõta buud fãa n gʋlse, la b miime tɩ ned kam fãa roga beenẽ." 
Psalms87:7 Sẽn yɩɩnd-bã ne sẽn saood-bã ned kam fãa yetame: «Mam pãngã fãa yita yãmb nengẽ.» 
Psalms88:1 A Koore kom-dibli wã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne wɩɩga. Yaa Ezra tẽng rao a Eman yɩɩlle." 
Psalms88:1 A Koore kom-dibli wã yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yɩɩnda ne wɩɩga. Yaa Ezra tẽng rao a Eman yɩɩlle." 
Psalms88:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa m fãagda! Mam bee yãmb taoor wĩndg la yʋng n boondẽ." 
Psalms88:3 Bɩ mam pʋʋsgã ta yãmb sẽn beẽ wã! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m kɛlengã! 
Psalms88:4 Bala, toodã wʋma maam, mam vɩɩmã pẽnega kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Psalms88:5 B sõta maam n naagd sẽn sigd-b yaoogẽ wã, mam lebga ned pãng sẽn sɛ." 
Psalms88:6 B gãnega maam sẽn ki-bã sʋka, mam wẽnda b sẽn kʋ-b rãmb tɩ b gãe yaoogẽ wã. Mam wẽnda yãmb sẽn ka leb n tẽr-b rãmb yellã, neb nins yãmb sẽn basã." 
Psalms88:7 Yãmb loba maam bog-zulungẽ, tɩ m be lik bida pʋga, hal zĩ-zulumsẽ wã." 
Psalms88:8 Yãmb sũ-puugrã zɩsga maam, la yãmb ko-wĩisã namsda maam." 
Psalms88:9 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam mitbã zãag ne maam, yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam lebg yel-beed b nifẽ. B paga maam tɩ m ka tõe n leb n yi ye." 
Psalms88:10 Namsgã menesa mam ninã. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boonda yãmb daar fãa! Mam zẽkda m nus n teesd yãmba." 
Psalms88:11 Yãmb maanda bõn-bãn sẽn ki-bã yĩng sɩda? Rẽ yĩnga, kũum tõe n yik n pʋʋsa yãmb barka?" 
Psalms88:12 B gomda yãmb nonglmã yell yaoogẽ sɩda? B togsda yãmb pʋ-peelmã yell kɩɩm-kulgu? 
Psalms88:13 B tõe n bãnga yãmb bõn-bãnã lik pʋgẽ bɩ? Bɩ b tõe n bãnga yãmb tɩrlmã yĩmb tẽngẽ? 
Psalms88:14 La maam, mam kelemdame n kot yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõngre. Yibeoogo, mam be y taoor n pʋʋsdẽ." 
Psalms88:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa bõe tɩ y bas-ma? Bõe yĩng tɩ y solgd y neng ne-ma?" 
Psalms88:16 Hal mam bi-bɩɩlem wakate, mam dag n tara nimbãanega, n dat n ki. Yãmb yɛɛsa maam tɩ m pɛleng yɩke." 
Psalms88:17 Yãmb sũ-puugrã yeelga maam wa bugum, yãmb yɩka mam pɛlenga, tɩ m ka leb n tõe n gom ye." 
Psalms88:18 Yãmb sũ-puugrã gũbgda maam daar fãa wa koom, a gũbga maam wakat-yɛnga." 
Psalms88:19 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ mam zo-rãmbã ne m tũud-n-taasã zãag ne maam. Lebga lik bal n yaa mam tũud-n-taaga. 
Psalms89:1 Ezra tẽng rao a Etan yɩɩlle. 
Psalms89:1 Ezra tẽng rao a Etan yɩɩlle. 
Psalms89:2 Mam na n yɩɩla Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã wakat fãa. Mam noor na n moona yãmb pʋ-peelmã zamaan woo zamaane. 
Psalms89:3 Bala, mam yeelame: «Yãmb nonglmã vigla wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga. Yãmb tilga y pʋ-peelmã saasẽ.»" 
Psalms89:4 Yãmb yeelame: «Mam maana kaool ne mam nin-tũusdgã. Mam wẽena ne m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd n yeele: 
Psalms89:5 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yagensã soog naamã wakat fãa, la m kɩt tɩ f zaoorã kaoos zamaan woo zamaane.»" 
Psalms89:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, saasẽ pʋʋsda yãmb bark y bõn-neebã yĩnga! La pʋ-peelem dãmbã tiging pʋga, b pʋʋsda yãmb barka." 
Psalms89:7 Sɩd me, ãnda n be saasẽ n tõe n mak a meng ne yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo? Ãnda n be wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, n zem yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo?" 
Psalms89:8 Pʋ-peelem dãmbã tiging pʋga, Wẽnnaam seka zoees sẽn gũbg-b bãmbã fãa sʋka." 
Psalms89:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, ãndã n yaa wa yãmba? Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb tara pãnga, yãmb sõmblmã gũbga yãmba." 
Psalms89:10 Yãmb n tõe ko-kãsengã ne a zẽk-m-mengã. Ko-kãsengã ko-pɛmã sã n zẽkdẽ, yãmb n tõe tɩ b sigi." 
Psalms89:11 Yãmb bedsa a Rahaab n kɩt t'a lebg wa kũum, yãmb sãeega y bɛɛbã ne y kangã pãnga." 
Psalms89:12 Yĩngr la tẽng yaa yãmb n so. Yãmb n vigl dũniyã la y naan bũmb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. 
Psalms89:13 Yãmb n kɩt tɩ dũniyã rɩtg ne a goabg beẽ. Taboor ne Hɛrmo tãmsã kaasda ne sũ-noog yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga. 
Psalms89:14 Yãmb kangã yaa raood kanga. Yãmb nug tara pãn-kãsenga, y nug-rɩtg zẽkame." 
Psalms89:15 Yãmb naam geerã tilga tɩrlem ne zemsg zugu. La nonglem la sɩd bee ne yãmba. 
Psalms89:16 Bark bee neb nins sẽn mi tɩ kaas n waoog yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã zutu! Bãmb kẽnda yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽenemẽ wã. 
Psalms89:17 Bãmb tara sũ-noog daar fãa yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga. Bãmb tõe n doogã b zug yãmb tɩrlmã yĩnga. 
Psalms89:18 Bala, yãmb n yaa bãmb ziirã ne b pãnga. Yãmb nonglmã yĩnga, tõnd tõe n zẽka d zugu." 
Psalms89:19 Bala, tõnd gãongã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda, tõnd dĩmã yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã n so." 
Psalms89:20 Daar a yembre, yãmb goma ne y nin-nongdsã vẽnegr pʋgẽ n yeele: Mam sõnga gãndaoog a yembre, mam waooga bi-bɩɩg a yembr nebã sʋka." 
Psalms89:21 Mam yãnda m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩde, mam pʋdga m naam kaam yẽnda zugu." 
Psalms89:22 Mam nug sẽn tar pãngã na n tebla yẽnda. Mam kangã na n paas-a-la pãnga. 
Psalms89:23 Bɛ wã kõn tol n tõog n ling-a ye. Nin-wẽng kõn tõog n paoog-a ye. 
Psalms89:24 Mam na n bedsa a bɛɛbã a taoore, la m sãam neb nins sẽn kis-b yẽnda wã." 
Psalms89:25 Mam pʋ-peelmã ne m nonglmã na n zĩnda ne yẽnda, mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, mam na n zẽka a zugu." 
Psalms89:26 Mam na n dɩka ko-kãsengã n ning yẽnda nugẽ, la m dɩk kʋɩlsã n ning yẽnda nug-rɩtgo." 
Psalms89:27 Yẽnda na n boola maam tɩ: «Mam ba, la m Wẽnnaam, mam pĩig sẽn fãagd maam!»" 
Psalms89:28 Mam na n kɩtame t'a lebg m bi-rẽenga, la m kɩt t'a yɩ dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã rĩm-kãsenga." 
Psalms89:29 Mam na n nonga yẽnda wakat fãa, la kaoolã mam sẽn maan ne yẽnda wã kõn tol n vaal ye." 
Psalms89:30 Mam na n kɩtame t'a yagensã rɩ naam wakat fãa, la a naamã geer na n kaoosa wa saasẽ." 
Psalms89:31 Yẽnda yagensã sã n bas mam tõogã, n ka kẽn wa sẽn zemse," 
Psalms89:32 bãmb sã n kɩɩs mam no-tũudsã, n ka sak mam noyã," 
Psalms89:33 mam na n talla rasaar n sɩbg-ba, b kɩɩsgã yĩnga, la m na n pãb-b-la b beegrã yĩnga." 
Psalms89:34 Mam nonglmã kõn tol n sɛ a yĩnga, mam kõn tol n mong yẽnda m pʋ-peelmã ye." 
Psalms89:35 Mam ka na n viig m kaoolã, la m kõn lebs m noorã poorẽ ye." 
Psalms89:36 Mam wẽena vugr bal ne mam mengã sõmblmã tɩ m kõn tol n belg a Davɩɩd ye. 
Psalms89:37 Yẽnda yagensã na n kaoosa wakat fãa. Yẽnda naam geerã na n kaoosa mam taoor wa wĩntoogã. 
Psalms89:38 A geerã na n vigla kãenkãe wakat fãa, wa kiuugã, wa kaset-sɩd soab ning sẽn be saasẽ wã." 
Psalms89:39 La yãmb yaool n basa rĩm ning yãmb sẽn yãkã la y zãgs-a! Yãmb sũur yika ne-a! 
Psalms89:40 Yãmb sãama kaoolã y sẽn dag n maan ne y tʋmtʋmdã. Yãmb fabga a naamã pugl tẽng n dẽgm-a. 
Psalms89:41 Yãmb wura yẽnda lalsã fãa, yãmb siiga a tãn-soben-dotã." 
Psalms89:42 So-loaadbã fãa zɛɛda yẽnda teedã. Yẽnda lebga a yagsã bõn-yaandga. 
Psalms89:43 Yãmb paasa yẽnda zabd-n-taasã pãnga. Yãmb nooga a bɛɛbã fãa sũuri. 
Psalms89:44 Yãmb kɩtame t'a zabr sʋʋgã põde, la y ka sõng-a zabrã wakat ye." 
Psalms89:45 Yãmb kɩtame t'a ra-sãndã sɛ, la y tus a naamã geer n lub tẽnga." 
Psalms89:46 Yãmb kʋʋga a yʋʋmã a bi-bɩɩlem wakate, yãmb kɩtame t'a rɩ yãnde." 
Psalms89:47 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n solga y meng tɩ ta rabʋre? Yãmb sũ-puugrã na n dɩta wa bugum tɩ ta rabʋre?" 
Psalms89:48 Tẽeg-y mam yʋʋmã sẽn ka kaoosdã yelle, la y ges ninsaalbã yãmb sẽn naan tɩ b yaa zaalmã." 
Psalms89:49 Ãnda n na n vɩɩmd n ka tol n ki, ãnda n tõe n põs kɩɩm-kulgu?" 
Psalms89:50 Zu-soaba, nonglem ning yãmb sẽn dag n tar pĩndã bee yɛɛnẽ? Nonglem ning yãmb sẽn dag n wẽen ne y tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd y pʋ-peelmã pʋgã bee yɛɛnẽ?" 
Psalms89:51 Zu-soaba, tẽeg-y yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã b sẽn paoogdã yelle, la y tẽeg neb kʋʋng ning b sẽn dɩk n bobl maamã yelle." 
Psalms89:52 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb bɛɛbã paoogdame, b paoogda y nin-tũusdgã a kẽnã pʋga."
