Psalms90:1 Wẽnnaam dao a Moyiis pʋʋsgo. Zu-soaba, yãmb n yɩ tõnd zĩ-soalgdg zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms90:2 Sẽn deng tãmsã sẽn na n zĩndi, la sẽn deng yãmb sẽn na n naan tẽn-gãongã ne dũniyã, yãmb dag n sɩng n yaa Wẽnnaam zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms90:3 Yãmb n tõe n kɩt tɩ ninsaal leb tẽng tomẽ, la yãmb yetame: «Ãdem yagense, lebg-y n leb-y-yã!»" 
Psalms90:4 Bala, yãmb nifẽ, yʋʋm tusr yaa waa zaamẽ daarã sẽn loogã, la yaa wa yʋng sẽn kẽed tɩ beoog vẽege." 
Psalms90:5 Yãmb dɩkd-b lame n loogdẽ, bãmb wẽnda ned sẽn gũs wakat bilf n neke, la yibeoogo, a loogda wa moog sẽn kʋɩtã." 
Psalms90:6 Yibeoogo, a tobdame n ningd puudu, la zaabre, a zelgdame n kʋɩ." 
Psalms90:7 Yãmb sũ-yikrã rɩta tõndo, yãmb sũ-puugrã kõta tõnd pelen-yɩka." 
Psalms90:8 Yãmb yɛdgda tõnd yel-wẽnã y taoore. Tõnd yel-solgdɩ wã yaa vẽenes yãmb taoore. 
Psalms90:9 Tõnd dasmã loogda yãmb sũ-puugrã yĩnga. Tõnd yʋʋmã loogda wa sir wẽebo. 
Psalms90:10 Tõnd yʋʋmã sõor ka yɩɩd pis-yopoe ye. La yĩns keelem sã n beẽ, a tata pis-nii. La ne rẽ fãa, ket n yaa namsg la nimbãaneg bala. Bala, vɩɩmã loogda tao-tao. La tõnd na n loogame." 
Psalms90:11 Ãnda n tõe n bãng yãmb sũ-yikrã pãng sẽn ta zĩig ninga, la y sũ-kãbrã sẽn kɩt tɩ b zoet yãmbã?" 
Psalms90:12 Dẽ wã, zãms-y tõnd tɩ d sõd d rasmã neere, tɩ tõnd tõe n paam yam." 
Psalms90:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, lebg-y n wa-y-yã! Yãmb na n leb n taa dabʋre? Bɩ y zoe y tʋmtʋmdbã nimbãanega!" 
Psalms90:14 Kɩt-y tɩ tõnd tɩg ne yãmb nonglmã yibeoog fãa. Woto, tõnd na n kaasa ne sũ-noog d vɩɩmã tɛka." 
Psalms90:15 Bɩ y kõ tõnd sũ-noog sẽn zemsd rasem nins yãmb sẽn dag n sɩbg tõndã, la wa sẽn zemsd yʋʋm nins tõnd sẽn yã toogã." 
Psalms90:16 Kɩt-y tɩ tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yã yãmb tʋʋmã, la y kɩt tɩ y ziirã puk d yagensã zutu!"

Psalms91:1 Ned ning sẽn zĩ Sẽn-Ka-To zĩ-soalgdgẽ wã, paamda vʋʋsg Sẽn-Tõe-Fãa wã maasmẽ." 
Psalms91:2 Mam yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga, la m pãng zĩiga, yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam teega yãmba!»" 
Psalms91:3 Bala, yaa bãmb n fãagd foom ne tãoog b sẽn bẽt foomã, la ne bã-loangdg sẽn kʋʋdã." 
Psalms91:4 Bãmb na n luda foom ne b pɩgsã, fo na n soonda bãmb pɩgsã tẽngre, bãmb sɩdã yaa gãong la gãntika." 
Psalms91:5 Fo kõn zoe yʋng bõn-wẽng rabeem, wall peemd sẽn tãood wĩndg ye." 
Psalms91:6 La f kõn zoe bã-loangdg sẽn gõod likẽ, wall sãoong sẽn sãamd wĩnto-sʋk ye." 
Psalms91:7 Baa tusr sã n lʋɩ fo sɛɛgẽ, tɩ tus piig lʋɩ fo rɩtgo, bũmb kõn maan foom ye." 
Psalms91:8 Fo na n gesa ne f nin bala, la f na n yãnda wẽn-kɩɩsdbã yaoodo." 
Psalms91:9 Bala, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga! Fo sã n soond Sẽn-Ka-To nengẽ," 
Psalms91:10 yel-wẽng kõn tol n paam-f ye. Bã-loangdg kõn tol n kolg fo yirã ye. 
Psalms91:11 Bala, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b malegsã gũ foom f kẽnã fãa pʋga." 
Psalms91:12 Bãmb na n tebenda foom ne b nusi, tɩ f naoor da wa lak kugr ye." 
Psalms91:13 Fo na n taba gɩgemd ne põeere, fo na n taba gɩgem-poll ne wag-bɛɛga." 
Psalms91:14 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Yẽnda sẽn nong maamã yĩnga, mam na n fãaga yẽnda, yẽnda sẽn mi mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, mam na n kogla yẽnda." 
Psalms91:15 A sã n bool maam, mam na n leok-a lame. Mam mengã na n zĩnda ne-a yel-pakr pʋgẽ, mam na n fãag-a lame la m waoog-a." 
Psalms91:16 Mam na n kõ-a-la yõ-woko, mam na n kɩtame t'a yã mam fãagre.»" 
Psalms92:1 Yɩɩlle. Yaa vʋʋsg daar yɩɩlle. 
Psalms92:2 Yaa sõama tɩ d pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka. Sẽn-Ka-To, zemsame tɩ d yɩɩl n pẽg yãmb yʋʋrã," 
Psalms92:3 tɩ d moon yãmb nonglmã yibeoog fãa, la tɩ d moon yãmb sɩdã yʋng fãa." 
Psalms92:4 D pẽg-b ne ruudg sẽn tar sus piiga la ne baeela, la pɛndg wẽebo." 
Psalms92:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn maandã kõta maam sũ-noogo! Mam kaasda ne sũ-noog yãmb nus tʋʋmã yĩnga." 
Psalms92:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb tʋʋmã yaa kãsemse, yãmb tagsdã yaa zulums wʋsgo." 
Psalms92:7 Yam-pa-sek soab ka mi baa fɩ ye, la yalem ka tar bãngr ye." 
Psalms92:8 Nin-wẽnsã sã n wa n tobd wa moodo, tɩ tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã yidgdẽ, yaa tɩ b na n sãama wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms92:9 La yãmba, yãmb bee yĩngri, n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Psalms92:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la sã n yaa ne yãmb bɛɛbã, bãmb na n sãama zãnga. La tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa na n sãeegame." 
Psalms92:11 Yãmb paas-m-la pãng wa we-naaf pãnga, b rɩka ka-paalg n sudg mam zugu." 
Psalms92:12 Mam nin nee m namsdbã, la m tʋb wʋmda sẽn zabd-b ne maam n dat n maan maam wẽngã rãamde." 
Psalms92:13 Nin-tɩrs tãooda wa koanga, bãmb bɩta wa Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩse." 
Psalms92:14 B sela bãmb wa tɩɩg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã. Bãmb ningda b puud tõnd Wẽnnaamã roog samandẽ. 
Psalms92:15 Bãmb kʋʋlame n ket n womd biisi, bãmb tara sũm la b tobda vã-paala." 
Psalms92:16 Bõn-kãens wilgdame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrga. Bãmb yaa mam pĩiga, la bũmb sẽn ka zems ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
Psalms93:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa rĩmã, bãmb dɩta naam. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽbga sɩdã tɩ yaa b sẽbdga, La b kɩt tɩ dũniyã yas kãenkãe n ka lʋɩtẽ ye." 
Psalms93:2 Yãmb naam geerã vigla hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ. Yãmb paada zamaan woo zamaane. 
Psalms93:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kʋɩlsã zẽkdame, Kʋɩlsã bʋrg zẽkdame, Kʋɩlsã guglung zẽkdame." 
Psalms93:4 Bãmb zẽkdame n yɩɩd ko-bɛdã, n yɩɩd ko-kãsemsã ko-wĩ-bɛdã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara ziiri, bãmb bee hal saasẽ." 
Psalms93:5 Yãmb zãmsgã sɩd yaa sɩda, yãmb doogã n sɩd yaa sõngo, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bõn-kãng yaa zamaan woo zamaan fãa yĩnga!" 
Psalms94:1 Mam Wẽnnaam sẽn dokd sũuri, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn dokd sũuri, puk-y y menga." 
Psalms94:2 Dũni bʋ-kaooda, yik-y-yã! Keo-y wuk-m-mens rãmbã wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã!" 
Psalms94:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, na n taa dabʋre! Nin-wẽnsã na n maana sũ-noog n ta dabʋre?" 
Psalms94:4 Bãmb gomda wuk-m-men-goamã. Tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã fãa yẽsda ne taaba. 
Psalms94:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b sãamda yãmb nebã, b namsda neb nins sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã." 
Psalms94:6 Bãmb kʋʋda pʋg-kõor ne sãana, bãmb yãgsda kɩɩbs yõya." 
Psalms94:7 Bãmb yetame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka ne bũmb ye. A Zakoob Wẽnnaamã ka mi ye! 
Psalms94:8 Yalemb sẽn yɩɩd fãa, gũus-y yã! Ka-yam dãmbã, yãmb na n paama yam dabʋre?" 
Psalms94:9 Soab ning sẽn maan-a tʋbã ka wʋmd la? Sẽn maan-a ninã ka ne la? 
Psalms94:10 Sẽn demsd-a bu-zẽmsã ka tõe n keoog sɩda? Ka bãmb n zãmsd ninsaalb bãngr la? 
Psalms94:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab mii ninsaalb tagsgo! Ninsaalbã tagsg yaa zaalem! 
Psalms94:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sẽn demsd a soab paamda barka, yãmb zãmsd-a-la y tõodã," 
Psalms94:13 tɩ yel-pakr daare, bɩ a tõe n zĩnd ne bãane, hal tɩ b wa tuk nin-wẽng yaoogo!" 
Psalms94:14 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka basd b nebã ye, bãmb ka na n tol n bas neb nins sẽn yaa bãmb dẽndã ye." 
Psalms94:15 Bãmb na n lebs n kaoo bʋʋdã tɩrga, la nin-tɩrsã na n sak n deegame." 
Psalms94:16 Ãnd n na n yik n sõng maam n zab ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã? Ãnd n na n yik n yals n sõng-m n zab ne nin-wẽnsã? 
Psalms94:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n ka sõngẽ maam, woto tɩ mam sigẽ-la zĩig sẽn yaa sɩddd... pʋgẽ." 
Psalms94:18 Mam sã n yeel tɩ mam nao salsdame, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nonglmã tebendeda maam." 
Psalms94:19 Yɛl wʋsg sã n wa n be m pʋgẽ n namsd-ma, yãmb sẽn belsd maamã kõt-m-la sũ-noogo." 
Psalms94:20 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb na n naaga bʋ-kaood-wẽnsã, n yiis noor sẽn paasd neb toogo?" 
Psalms94:21 Bãmb tigimda taab n dat n sãam nin-tɩrg vɩɩm, la b raag neb sẽn ka tar yell zɩɩm." 
Psalms94:22 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pãng zĩiga, bãmb yaa pĩig kugr sẽn yaa m zĩ-soalgdga." 
Psalms94:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ b tʋʋm-wẽnsã leb-ba, b na n kɩtame tɩ b pʋ-toogã wẽneg n dɩ-ba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ b noyã mume." 
Psalms95:1 Wa-y tɩ d kaas ne sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! D zẽk d koees n pẽg pĩigã sẽn yaa d fãagdã. 
Psalms95:2 D kẽng bãmb taoor ne bark pʋʋsgo. D zẽk d koees n yɩɩl n pẽg bãmba. 
Psalms95:3 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam-kãsenga, b yaa rĩm-kãseng n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms95:4 Dũniyã zĩ-zulumsã fãa bee bãmb nugẽ, la tãmsã yaa bãmb n so." 
Psalms95:5 Ko-kãsengã yaa bãmb dẽnda, bãmb n naan-a. Tẽn-gãongã yaa bãmb nus n naane." 
Psalms95:6 Wa-y tɩ d sulgi, n wõgemde, n yĩgimd d rũmã zut Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd naandã taoore." 
Psalms95:7 Bala, b yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, la tõnd yaa bãmb neb b sẽn dɩlgde, n yaa piis bãmb nugã sẽn kogenda. Kelg-y bãmb koɛɛgã rũndã sẽn yeta:" 
Psalms95:8 «Ra-y keng-y y sũyã wa y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n yãnd mam tʋʋmã we-raoogã pʋgẽ, Meriba ne Masa n mak maam n bao mam noorã ye." 
Psalms95:9  
Psalms95:10 Yʋʋm pis-naas pʋgẽ, zamaan-kãngã nebã maaname tɩ mam yam yi-ba. La mam yeelame: ‹Nin-bãmbã yamã menemame, tɩ b ka tol n mi mam datmã ye.› »" 
Psalms95:11 Dẽ, mam sũ-yikrã pʋga, mam wẽename n yeele: «Nin-bãmbã kõn kẽ vʋʋsg tẽng ning mam sẽn segl b yĩngã pʋgẽ ye!»" 
Psalms96:1 Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! Bɩ dũniyã gill nebã yɩɩl Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! 
Psalms96:2 Yɩɩl-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, pẽg-y bãmb yʋʋrã. Moon-y bãmb fãagr koe-noogã daar woo daare!" 
Psalms96:3 Togs-y bãmb ziirã bu-zẽmsã sʋka! Togs-y bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã nebã fãa sʋka! 
Psalms96:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, la b zemsa ne pẽgr buud fãa, bãmb seka zoees n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms96:5 Bala, buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa yaa zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naan saasã." 
Psalms96:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengã tara ziir n pɩnda. Bãmb zĩ-sõngã pida ne pãng la neerlem. 
Psalms96:7 Buud toay-toayã roto, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Kõ-y bãmb waoogre, wilg-y b pãngã!" 
Psalms96:8 Kõ-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã waoogre! Tall-y kũun n wa bãmb samandẽ wã! 
Psalms96:9 Wõgemd-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, b sõmblmã sẽn wat n pukdẽ wã. Bɩ dũniyã gill rig ne rabeem bãmb taoore." 
Psalms96:10 Yeel-y bu-zẽmsã sʋk tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dɩt naam. Bãmb n vigl dũniyã kãenkãe t'a ka miimdẽ ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaooda nebã bʋʋd tɩrga. 
Psalms96:11 Bɩ saasẽ maan sũ-noogo, la bɩ dũniyã kɩdme! Bɩ ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã maan dãamde!" 
Psalms96:12 Bɩ weoogã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã kɩdme, bɩ weoogã tɩɩs fãa kaas ne sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms96:13 Bɩ b kaas Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bala, bãmb watame! Bãmb wat n na n kaoo dũniyã bʋʋdo. Bãmb watame n na n kao dũniyã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem, la b kao nebã bʋʋd ne sɩda." 
Psalms97:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa rĩmã! Bɩ dũniyã kɩdme, tɩ tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã maan sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms97:2 Sawaodg ne lik-bida n gũbg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb naam geerã tilga tɩrlem ne zemsg zugu. 
Psalms97:3 Bãmb kẽndame tɩ bugum be b taoore. Bugmã rɩta b bɛɛbã sẽn gũbgã. 
Psalms97:4 Bãmb sa-yãgbã kõta dũniyã vẽenem, tẽngã yãnda sa-yãgbã n digimdi." 
Psalms97:5 Tãmsã yẽnegda wa sɩ-ribd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore. Tãmsã yẽnegda dũniyã gill fãa Zu-soabã taoore. 
Psalms97:6 Saasẽ moonda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩrlmã, la nebã fãa nee bãmb ziirã." 
Psalms97:7 Wẽn-naands pʋʋsdbã fãa na n dɩɩ yãnde, yaa neb nins sẽn pẽgd b mens zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩngã. Wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa wõgemdeda Zu-soabã taoore." 
Psalms97:8 Sɩyõ wʋma rẽndã n maand sũ-noogo, Zʋʋda kom-pugli wã kɩdemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab bʋʋdã kaoob yĩnga!" 
Psalms97:9 Bala, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa Sẽn-Ka-To, la y soo dũniyã gill fãa, la yãmb n yɩɩd wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms97:10 Yãmb fãa sẽn nong Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, kisg-y wẽnga! Bãmb kogenda b nin-nongdsã vɩɩm, la b fãagd bãmb nin-wẽns nusẽ." 
Psalms97:11 Vẽenem pukda nin-tɩrg yĩnga, la sũ-noog yaa pʋ-peelem dãmbã rẽnda." 
Psalms97:12 Nin-tɩrse, kɩdm-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋga, la y pʋʋs bãmb bark n tẽeg bãmb sõmblmã yelle!" 
Psalms98:1 Yɩɩlle Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! Bala, bãmb maana bõn-bãna. Bãmb nug-rɩtg ne b kan-sõngã kõo bãmb tõogre." 
Psalms98:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b bãng bãmb fãagrã. B puka b tɩrlmã tɩ bu-zẽmsã yãnde. 
Psalms98:3 Bãmb tẽega b nonglmã ne b pʋ-peelmã b sẽn tar Israyɛll nebã yĩngã yelle. La dũniyã gill fãa yãnda tõnd Wẽnnaamã fãagre. 
Psalms98:4 Bɩ dũniyã nebã fãa kaas n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Kils-y ne sũ-noog n yɩɩl n waoog-ba! 
Psalms98:5 Wẽ-y pɛndg n yɩɩl n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Wẽ-y pɛndg n maan noogo. 
Psalms98:6 Peeb-y bard ne tãntãoogo. Kaas-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa rĩmã taoore! 
Psalms98:7 Bɩ ko-kãsengã ne a pʋgẽ teedã guglume. Bɩ dũniyã ne a nebã maan sũ-noogo. 
Psalms98:8 Bɩ kʋɩlsã wẽ nug-pogse, tɩ tãmsã naag n kaas ne sũ-noogo." 
Psalms98:9 Bɩ b kaas Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bala, b wat n na n kaoo dũniyã bʋʋdo. Bãmb na n kaoo dũniyã bʋʋd ne tɩrlem, la b kao nebã bʋʋd wa sẽn zemse." 
Psalms99:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa rĩmã. Nebã rigdame. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩta naam serubẽ-rãmbã sʋka, la tẽngã rigimdidame." 
Psalms99:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa kãseng Sɩyõ. Bãmb n so nebã fãa. 
Psalms99:3 Bɩ nebã waoog yãmb yʋʋrã sẽn yaa kãsenga, la sẽn sek zoeesã! Bãmb yaa Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba!" 
Psalms99:4 Bɩ nebã waoog rĩmã sẽn nong tɩrlmã pãngã! Yãmb n vigl tɩrlem. Yãmb n kɩt tɩ zemsg ne tɩrlem zĩnd a Zakoob yagensã sʋka. 
Psalms99:5 Kils-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga, la y wõgemd bãmb nao-roagendgã taoore, bala, bãmb yaa pʋ-peelem soaba!" 
Psalms99:6 A Moyiis ne a Aarõ sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdbã sʋkã, ne a Samwɛll sẽn dag n be sẽn boond-b bãmb yʋʋrã sʋkã, b fãa boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b leoka bãmba." 
Psalms99:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n bee sawad-taokã pʋg n gomd ne bãmba. Bãmb saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋlsmã ne noor ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã. 
Psalms99:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, yãmb n leokd bãmb y toore. Yãmb yɩɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa sugr kõt bãmb yĩnga, la y rokda y sũur b tʋʋm-beedã yĩnga." 
Psalms99:9 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, la y wõgemd bãmb tãngã sẽn welg toorã zugu! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa pʋ-peelem soaba!" 
Psalms100:1 Zaamẽ beoog pʋʋsg yɩɩlle. Dũni gilli, wẽ-y nug-pogs Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga!" 
Psalms100:2 Waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne sũ-noogo, kolg-y bãmb ne sũ-noog kilsgu!" 
Psalms100:3 Bãng-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa Wẽnnaam! Bãmb n naan tõndo, la b soo tõndo. Tõnd yaa bãmb neb b sẽn dɩlgde." 
Psalms100:4 Kẽ-y bãmb roogẽ wã ne bark pʋʋsgo, la y kẽ bãmb samandẽ wã ne pẽgre! Waoog-y bãmba, la y zẽk bãmb yʋʋrã!" 
Psalms100:5 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõngo, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa, la bãmb yaa sɩd soab zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms101:1 Yaa a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Mam na n yɩɩla yãmb nonglmã ne y tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã. Mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Psalms101:2 Mam na n gũusame n kẽn ne burkĩndi. Yãmb na n waa mam nengẽ dabʋre? Mam zakã pʋga, m na n kẽna ne pʋ-peelem." 
Psalms101:3 Mam ka na n ges bũmb sẽn ka yõod ye. Mam na n kisga nin-wẽnsã manesmã. Bãmb kõn tol n soog maam ye. 
Psalms101:4 Mam na n zãaga m meng ne tʋʋm-kɛg rãmbã. Mam ka rat n bãng wẽng ye. 
Psalms101:5 Mam na n menesa tẽn-kãn-ned sẽn soosd n lukd a to bãongo. Mam kisa nin-pa-nanda, ne tɩta-nedã." 
Psalms101:6 Mam nin geta tẽngã pʋ-peen-nebã, tɩ bãmb tõe n zĩnd ne maam. Sẽn kẽnd-a ne burkĩnd na n yɩɩ mam tʋmtʋmda." 
Psalms101:7 Zãmb soab ka tar zĩig mam doogã pʋg ye. Zĩrẽ yagd kõn yals mam taoor ye. 
Psalms101:8 Yibeoog fãa, mam na n sãama tẽngã nin-wẽnsã, la m menes tʋʋm-beed maandbã tɩ b ra leb n zĩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽngã pʋg ye." 
Psalms102:1 Nimbãan-ned pãng sẽn sɛ, t'a be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n pʋʋsd n kot sõngre." 
Psalms102:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kelg-y mam pʋʋsgã, bɩ m sẽn kelemd n kot-y sõngrã lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms102:3 Mam yel-pakrã wakate, bɩ y ra solg y nengã ne-m ye! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg maam wakat ning m sẽn boond-y yã! Bɩ y leok maam tao-tao." 
Psalms102:4 Bala, mam dasmã loogda wa bug-zõose, tɩ mam kõabã yõogd wa bug-saala." 
Psalms102:5 Mam sũurã bõdmame n kʋɩ wa moodo. Mam tol n yĩmda m dɩɩb yelle. 
Psalms102:6 Mam sidgame hal tɩ m yĩn-gãongã tabend m kõabã. 
Psalms102:7 Mam wẽnda bakaorg sẽn be we-raoogẽ, mam wẽnda wa we-yũug sẽn be raboodẽ." 
Psalms102:8 Gõeem ka tol n leb n be m ninẽ ye. Mam wẽnda luiil sẽn zao roog zug a yembre. 
Psalms102:9 Mam bɛɛbã tʋʋda maam daar fãa. Neb nins sũy sẽn puud ne maamã kãabda neb a taabã n yetẽ tɩ Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ b yɩ wa maam. 
Psalms102:10 Tompeglem n lebg m dɩɩbo, mam nintãm kalemda m ko-yũudum," 
Psalms102:11 yãmb sũ-puugrã ne y sũ-kãbrã yĩnga. Bala, yãmb dɩka maam n lobg yɩɩga." 
Psalms102:12 Mam vɩɩmã loogda wa maasem, mam kʋɩta wa moodo." 
Psalms102:13 La yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩta naam wakat sẽn kõn sa, la b na n tẽra yãmb yell zamaan woo zamaane." 
Psalms102:14 Yãmb na n yikame n zoe Sɩyõ nimbãanega. Bala, wakat taame tɩ y tog n paam nimbãan-zoeer a yĩnga, wakat ning yãmb sẽn yãkã taame." 
Psalms102:15 Bala, tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã nonga Sɩyõ kugã. Sɩyõ tomã nimbãaneg tara tõndo." 
Psalms102:16 Buudã fãa na n zoee Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã. Dũniyã rĩm-dãmb fãa na n pẽga yãmb ziirã. 
Psalms102:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebs n mee Sɩyõ. Sɩyõ ziirã leb n pukdame." 
Psalms102:18 Bãmb na n leoka nimbãan-nebã pʋʋsgo, la b na n sak n deega b kosgã." 
Psalms102:19 Bɩ b gʋls bõn-kãng n bĩng zamaan sẽn watã yĩnga! La b sẽn na n lebs n naan neb ninsã na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms102:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab be b zĩ-sõngẽ wã saasẽ, n sulg n get dũniyã." 
Psalms102:21 Bãmb kelgda sẽn be-b bi-bees roogã sidgri. Bãmb dat n fãaga b sẽn dat n kʋ-b rãmbã," 
Psalms102:22 tɩ b tõe n moon Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã Sɩyõ pʋgẽ, la b kɩt tɩ bãmb pẽgrã saag Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ," 
Psalms102:23 daar ning buud toay-toayã ne soolem toay-toayã sẽn na n naag taab n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabã. 
Psalms102:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab booga mam pãngã m vɩɩmã wakate, bãmb kʋʋga mam yʋʋmã sõore." 
Psalms102:25 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ m yeele: «Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb vɩɩ zamaan woo zamaane! Dẽ wã, bɩ y ra reeg m vɩɩmã a sẽn wat n be a pʋɩ-sʋkã ye.»" 
Psalms102:26 Yãmb n naan dũniyã hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, la saasẽ yaa yãmb nus tʋʋmã." 
Psalms102:27 Bãmb loogdame, la yãmb paadame. Bãmb fãa na n kʋdga wa fuugu. Yãmb na n teka bãmb wa fuugu, la b na n tekame." 
Psalms102:28 La yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tekd ye. Yãmb yʋʋmã ka sɛt ye. 
Psalms102:29 Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã kamb na n paama zĩiga, la b yagensã na n paama pãng yãmb taoore." 
Psalms103:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bɩ bũmb nins fãa sẽn be mam pʋgẽ wã pẽg bãmb yʋ-sõngã! 
Psalms103:2 Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la m kõn tol n yĩm bãmb maan-neer ba a yembr yell ye!" 
Psalms103:3 Bãmb n kõt maam sugr m beegrã fãa yĩnga, bãmb n maagd mam bãasã fãa." 
Psalms103:4 Bãmb n fãagd maam ne yaoogo, la b wilgd maam b nonglem ne b nimbãan-zoeere." 
Psalms103:5 Bãmb n tɩgsd mam vɩɩmã ne sõmblem, n kɩtdẽ tɩ m todemd wa pa-nand-tugri." 
Psalms103:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaooda bʋʋd ne tɩrlem, bãmb sõngda b sẽn namsd-b rãmbã fãa." 
Psalms103:7 Bãmb wilga a Moyiis b soayã, la b wilg Israyɛll nebã bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã." 
Psalms103:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa nimbãan-zoeer soaba, la maan-neer soaba, bãmb tara sũ-maasem, la b nonglem yaa kãsenga." 
Psalms103:9 Bãmb ka zabd ne ned n zãage, la b ka yikd b sũur n ka basdẽ ye." 
Psalms103:10 B ka sɩbgd tõnd wa sẽn zems d yel-wẽnã ye. B ka lebsd tõnd wa sẽn zems d kongrã ye. 
Psalms103:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã b zoɛtbã yĩngã zãntlem yaa wa yĩngrã ne tẽngã sẽn zãnt ne taab to-to wã. 
Psalms103:12 Yaang ne nin-taoor sẽn zãr ne taab to-to wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãagda tõnd ne d beegrã me a woto." 
Psalms103:13 Ba sẽn zoet a kamb nimbãaneg to-to wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoeta sẽn zoet-b bãmbã nimbãaneg me a woto." 
Psalms103:14 Bãmb mengã mi b sẽn tall bũmb ning n naan tõndo. Bãmb tẽrame tɩ tõnd yaa tẽng tom. 
Psalms103:15 Ninsaal vɩɩmã wẽnda wa moodo, a ningda puud wa weoog tɩ-puudu." 
Psalms103:16 La sobg sã n wẽ-a bilfu, a menemdame, tɩ b ka leb n mi a sẽn dag n beẽ wã ye." 
Psalms103:17 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã ne neb nins sẽn zoet bãmbã paada zamaan woo zamaane. Bãmb tɩrlmã yaa b zoɛtbã yagens yĩnga," 
Psalms103:18 la neb nins sẽn ka basd-b bãmb kaoolã, la b tẽr b no-tũudsã, n sakd-bã yĩnga." 
Psalms103:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab vigla b naam geer saasẽ, la bũmb fãa yaa bãmb n so." 
Psalms103:20 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab malegse, n yaa gãndaad n tar pãnga, n kelgd bãmb goamã la y sakd-bã, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms103:21 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa bãmb saasẽ tãb-biisi, la bãmb tʋmtʋmdb n maand bãmb daabã, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms103:22 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn naane, n be zĩig fãa bãmb soolmã pʋgã, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms104:1 Mam sũuri, pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb sɩd yaa kãsenga! Yãmb pɩndame, la y pida ne ziiri!" 
Psalms104:2 Bãmb yera vẽenem wa fuugu. Bãmb yɛdgda sa-gãongã wa fu-roogo. 
Psalms104:3 Bãmb tilgda b naamã zĩig koomã zugu, bãmb zaoo sawat wa saare, bãmb zaoo sobg pɩgs n kẽnda." 
Psalms104:4 Sebdã yaa bãmb koe-toagsdba, tɩ bug-witim yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdba." 
Psalms104:5 Bãmb vigla tẽngã t'a yas kãenkãe, tẽngã yasame n ka tol n miimdẽ ye." 
Psalms104:6 Yãmb dag n lud-a-la ne bog-zulums wa fuugu, tɩ koomã rag n be tãmsã zutu." 
Psalms104:7 Yãmb sã n tãs koomã, a zoetame, koomã sã n wʋm y sa-tãsã, a zoetame." 
Psalms104:8 A zoet n dʋʋda tãmsã n sigd n kẽed londẽ wã, b kẽnda zĩig ning yãmb sẽn kõ-bã." 
Psalms104:9 Yãmb ninga toadg a sẽn ka tog n gãndge, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ koomã ra wa lim dũni wã ye." 
Psalms104:10 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ koomã zoet n kẽnd kʋɩlsẽ wã, koomã zoeta tãmsã sʋka." 
Psalms104:11 We-rũmsã fãa tõe n wa yũu koomã. We-bõensã wat n yiisda b ko-yũud beenẽ. 
Psalms104:12 Liuuli wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã tʋɩta b tʋgd koomã noore, la b wʋmda b sẽn be tɩɩsã vãadã sʋk n yɩɩndẽ." 
Psalms104:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab be b zĩigẽ wã saasẽ n zãgsd tãmsã koom. Yãmb tʋʋmã biis rɩlgda tẽn-gãongã tɩ seke. 
Psalms104:14 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ moog yit tɩ rũmsã wãbdẽ, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ bõn-koaadl yit tẽn-gãongã zugu, tɩ ninsaalbã kood n paamd b rɩɩbo," 
Psalms104:15 la b paamd reezẽ rãam n yũud n noogd b sũuri, la b paamd kaam n zɛɛdẽ tɩ b nens põeeda, ne rɩɩb sẽn kõt-b pãnga." 
Psalms104:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩɩsã paamda koom tɩ sekd-ba, yaa Libã tɩɩsã bãmb sẽn selã." 
Psalms104:17 Liuuli wã wat n tʋɩta b tʋgd beenẽ, la rãong me maanda a tʋk sɩprɛs tɩɩsã zutu." 
Psalms104:18 Tãn-lug-lugã yaa we-bʋʋs yĩnga, tɩ pĩisã zut lebg kɩɩs soondg zĩiga." 
Psalms104:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab naana kiuugã tɩ b tõe n bãng rayã n sõde, tɩ wĩntoog mi a kõom wakate." 
Psalms104:20 Yãmb n kɩtd tɩ lik beẽ, tɩ lebg yʋngo, tɩ we-rũmsã fãa yit n gõodẽ." 
Psalms104:21 Gɩgem-poalã wũusdame n baood bũmb n na n yõke, b kotame tɩ Wẽnnaam kõ-b rɩɩbo." 
Psalms104:22 Wĩntoogã sã n puki, gɩgem-poalã loogdame n kẽng b gãagẽ." 
Psalms104:23 Ninsaal yitame n kẽng a tʋʋm zĩigẽ, la a tʋmdame n tãag zaabre." 
Psalms104:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb tʋʋmã sõor waooga! Yãmb maana y tʋʋmã fãa ne yam. Dũniyã pida ne bũmb nins yãmb sẽn naanã." 
Psalms104:25 Ade, ko-kãsengã bedmame n yalme, tɩ rũm-bɛd ne rũm-bãooneg sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ be a pʋgẽ n saagdẽ." 
Psalms104:26 Koom kogl-bɛdã kẽnda koomã zutu, la yãmb n naan piryãong t'a reemd koomẽ wã." 
Psalms104:27 Bãmb fãa geta yãmb tɩ y kõ-b b rɩɩb sẽn zems a wakate. 
Psalms104:28 Yãmb sɩd kõt-b-la rɩɩbo, tɩ b reegdẽ. Yãmb sã n puk y nugã bala, b paamda rɩɩb tɩ seke." 
Psalms104:29 Yãmb sã n solg y nenga, rabeem yõkd-b lame. Yãmb sã n deeg b vʋʋsmã, b kiidame n lebs tẽngã a tom." 
Psalms104:30 Yãmb tʋmda yãmb vʋʋsem, n lebs n naan-ba. Yãmb n palemd tẽn-gãongã." 
Psalms104:31 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã zĩnd wakat sẽn kõn sa! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan sũ-noog b tʋʋmã yĩnga! 
Psalms104:32 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n ges tẽngã, a rigimdidame. Bãmb sã n sɩɩs tãmsã, bug-zõos yita b pʋsẽ." 
Psalms104:33 Mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saab m vɩɩmã tɛka. Mam na n yɩɩla ne yʋʋm-teed mam Wẽnnaamã yĩng m yõorã tɛka. 
Psalms104:34 Bɩ mam kosgã ta bãmb yam! Mam na n maana sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋgẽ! 
Psalms104:35 Bɩ yel-wẽn-maandbã menem dũniyã zugu, tɩ nin-wẽnsã ra leb n zĩnd ye! Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms105:1 Bɩ y waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la y zẽk bãmb yʋʋrã! Kɩt-y tɩ nebã bãng bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã!" 
Psalms105:2 Yɩɩl-y bãmb yĩnga, pʋd-y yɩɩl bãmb yĩnga! Tags-y bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã fãa yelle!" 
Psalms105:3 Maan-y sũ-noog bãmb yʋ-sõngã yĩnga! Bɩ sẽn baood-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã maan sũ-noogo! 
Psalms105:4 Bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bao-y bãmb pãngã, bao-y bãmb wakat fãa!" 
Psalms105:5 Yãmb sẽn yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmd a Abrahaam yagensã, yãmb sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagense, n yaa bãmb nin-tũusdsã! Tẽeg-y bõn-yɛɛsds nins bãmb sẽn maanã yelle, tẽeg-y bõn-kãsemsã ne b bʋ-kaoorã yelle!" 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam. Bãmb yaa dũniyã gill fãa bʋ-kaooda." 
Psalms105:8 Bãmb tẽra b kaoolã yell wakat fãa, la b tẽr b gomdã b sẽn yeel zamaan tusr yĩngã yelle." 
Psalms105:9 Bãmb tẽra kaool ning b sẽn maan ne a Abrahaamã yelle, la wẽeneg ning bãmb sẽn wẽen ne a Izakã yelle." 
Psalms105:10 Bãmb vigla kaool-kãng tɩ yɩ noor a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga, la kaool Israyɛll nebã yĩng wakat fãa" 
Psalms105:11 n yeele: «Mam na n kõo foom Kana tẽngã tɩ yɩ yãmb pʋɩɩre.» 
Psalms105:12 Bãmb sõorã rag n ka waoog ye, bãmb dag n yaa neb bilf bala. Bãmb dag n yaa sãamb beenẽ." 
Psalms105:13 Bãmb dag n yita buud a to sʋka, n kẽng buud a to sʋka, la b yit soolem a to n kẽng neb a taab nengẽ." 
Psalms105:14 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka bas tɩ ninsaal ba a yembr nams-b ye. Bãmb lenga rĩm-dãmb bãmb yĩnga, n yeele:" 
Psalms105:15 «Da saag-y n sɩɩs-y mam nin-tũusdsã ye, la y ra maan mam no-rɛɛsdbã wẽng ye!»" 
Psalms105:16 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ kom kẽ tẽngã, n kɩt tɩ rɩɩb buug ka leb n beẽ ye." 
Psalms105:17 B tʋma ned t'a reng bãmb taoore, a Zozɛf b sẽn koos t'a yɩ yambã." 
Psalms105:18 B balga yẽnda naoã ne bãense, la b sog a yublã ne kutu," 
Psalms105:19 hal n tãag daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã sẽn pidsã, hal tɩ ta wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã sẽn wilg t'a ka tar yellã." 
Psalms105:20 Rĩma kõo noor tɩ b baag a Zozɛf bãensã, soolmã nebã naab kɩtame tɩ b yiis-a n base." 
Psalms105:21 Rĩmã kɩtame t'a Zozɛf lebg yẽnda zakã zu-soaba, la a yɩ yẽnda bũmbã fãa soaala." 
Psalms105:22 La a kɩtame t'a nanambsã sakd a Zozɛfe, t'a Zozɛf zãms a kãsem-dãmbã yam." 
Psalms105:23 Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã waa Ezɩpt tẽnga, la a Zakoob tɩ zĩnda sãand weoog a Sam tẽnga." 
Psalms105:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll buudã fɩɩge, n kɩt tɩ b paam pãng n yɩɩd b bɛɛbã." 
Psalms105:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnemda Ezɩpt nebã sũyã, n kɩt tɩ b kisg Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã, n maan bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã zãmbo." 
Psalms105:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma bãmb tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis ne a Aarõ bãmb sẽn yãkã," 
Psalms105:27 n kɩt tɩ b maan bãn Ezɩpt nebã sʋka, la bõn-bãn a Sam tẽngã pʋga." 
Psalms105:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma lika, tɩ zĩigã fãa lebg lik bida. La nebã ka kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã ye." 
Psalms105:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab teka Ezɩpt tẽngã koomã tɩ lebg zɩɩm tɩ b zĩmã ki. 
Psalms105:30 La b kɩt tɩ loms wa pid tẽngã, lomsã tol n kẽe Ezɩpt rĩm-dãmbã ro-gãasẽ." 
Psalms105:31 Wẽnnaam gomame, la kɛooda waame, la b kɩtame tɩ rũm-pigli wa pid b soolmã zãnga." 
Psalms105:32 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sapɩlem ni, la b kɩt tɩ bug-witim sig Ezɩpt tẽngã zugu." 
Psalms105:33 B sãama bãmb reezẽ tɩɩsã ne b kankamsã, Ezɩpt soolmã tɩɩsã fãa kaoome." 
Psalms105:34 Bãmb leb n gomame, la kalwaar ne kitrzĩgnis sẽn ka tar sõor waame." 
Psalms105:35 Bãmb wa n dɩɩ b tẽngã moodã zãnga, la b rɩ tẽngã bõn-koaadl zãnga." 
Psalms105:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kʋʋ Ezɩpt tẽngã kom-dibl-rẽemsã fãa, kom-dibl-rẽemsã sẽn yaa bãmb buudã pãng sɩngrã." 
Psalms105:37 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll nebã loog ne wanzuri la sãnem, Israyɛll buudã pʋga, la bãmb ned ba a yembr ka pa poorẽ ye." 
Psalms105:38 Israyɛll nebã loogr kõo Ezɩpt nebã sũ-noogo, bala, Israyɛll nebã rabeem rag n tar-b lame." 
Psalms105:39 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɛdga sawadg n lud Israyɛll nebã, la yʋngo, sawadgã wita bugum n kõt vẽenem." 
Psalms105:40 Israyɛll nebã kosgã yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab waa ne kodense, la b kɩt tɩ rɩɩb yi yĩngr n sigi, tɩ Israyɛll nebã rɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms105:41 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ pĩig pusg tɩ koom zoe. Koomã zoeeme n yɛdg tẽn-koɛɛngã zug wa kʋɩlga. 
Psalms105:42 Bala, bãmb tẽega b gom-sõng ning b sẽn dag n gom ne b tʋmtʋmd a Abrahaamã." 
Psalms105:43 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b nebã yi n loog ne kɩdengo. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b nin-tũusdsã loog ne sũ-noog kaasgo. 
Psalms105:44 Sẽn-Ka-Saab reesa bu-zẽms tẽms n kõ bãmba. Buud a taabã tʋmame tɩ Israyɛll nebã tɩ rɩ a yõodo," 
Psalms105:45 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b tũ bãmb noyã, la b sak bãmb tõodã. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms106:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b yaa sõngo. Bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms106:2 Ãnda n tõe n togs Sẽn-Ka-Saab pãng tʋʋmã n sɛ? Ãnda n na n wilg Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogrã? 
Psalms106:3 Bark bee neb nins sẽn kẽnd zemsg pʋga, la b maand tɩrlem wakat fãa wã zutu!" 
Psalms106:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y m yelle, yãmb sẽn maand y nebã neerã pʋga! Wa-y n sõng-y maam n fãag-ma," 
Psalms106:5 n sõng-m tɩ m yãnd y nin-tũusdsã sũ-noogã, la m kɩdem y nebã sũ-noog yĩnga, la m naag neb nins sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã n pẽg-yã!" 
Psalms106:6 Tõnd me beega wa d yaab-rãmbã, tõnd wẽnemdame n maan wẽnga, tõnd beegame." 
Psalms106:7 Tõnd yaab-rãmbã sẽn zĩnd Ezɩpt tẽngã, b ka wʋm yãmb bõn-bãnã võor ye. Bãmb ka tẽeg yãmb nonglem-kãsengã yell ye. Rudum ko-kãsengã noore, b kɩɩsa yãmba." 
Psalms106:8 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab baas n fãaga bãmba, b mengã yʋʋr waoogr yĩnga, tɩ nebã tõe n yãnd bãmb pãngã." 
Psalms106:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãsa rudum ko-kãsengã, la a kʋɩɩme, n kɩt tɩ d yaab-rãmbã pɩʋʋg kʋɩl-waokã koɛɛng wa we-raoogo." 
Psalms106:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga bãmb b kisgdbã nugẽ, la bɛɛbã ka tõog n maan-b bũmb ye." 
Psalms106:11 Koomã rɩɩ bãmb zabd-n-taasã zãnga, tɩ b ned ba a yembr ka põs ye." 
Psalms106:12 Bãmb tẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã, n yɩɩl n pẽg bãmba." 
Psalms106:13 La b yĩma Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã yell tao-tao, n ka yals n gũ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab pids b saagrã ye." 
Psalms106:14 We-raoogã pʋga, velem yõka bãmba. Bãmb maka Wẽnnaam zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã." 
Psalms106:15 Wẽnnaam kõo bãmb b sẽn kosã, la b tʋm bãag n kɩt tɩ b faage." 
Psalms106:16 Sik zĩigẽ wã, tõnd yaab-rãmbã maana sũ-kiir ne a Moyiisi, la ne a Aarõ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn welg-a soab toorã." 
Psalms106:17 Tẽn-gãongã yaaga a noor n vel a Datã, tẽn-gãongã munumsa a Abiram poorẽ dãmbã." 
Psalms106:18 Bugum dɩɩ bãmb nebã. Bug-witim dɩɩ nin-wẽnsã. 
Psalms106:19 Horɛɛb tãngã zugu, bãmb maana nag-bila, n wõgemd kutã b sẽn yõgã taoore." 
Psalms106:20 Bãmb dɩka Wẽnnaam ziirã, n tek ne naaf sẽn wãbd yamdã." 
Psalms106:21 Bãmb yĩma Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa b fãagdã sẽn dag n maan bõn-kãsems Ezɩpt tẽngã yelle. 
Psalms106:22 Wẽnnaamã maana bõn-bãn a Sam tẽngẽ wã, la b maan tʋʋm-yɛɛsds rudum ko-kãsengẽ wã." 
Psalms106:23 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ b na n menes-b lame, la b nin-tũusdg a Moyiis bal n na n põse. A Moyiis yõka Wẽnnaam sɛɛga, n na n kos-b tɩ b sik b sũuri, la b ra sãam nebã ye." 
Psalms106:24 Tõnd yaab-rãmbã zãgsa tẽn-noogã. Bãmb ka tẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã ye. 
Psalms106:25 Bãmb pa b fu-rotẽ wã n yẽgme, n ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã ye." 
Psalms106:26 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽka b nug n wẽen n yeel tɩ b na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb pa we-raoogã pʋga. 
Psalms106:27 La b fẽrg bãmb yagensã bu-zẽmsã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b sãeeg tẽmsã fãa pʋse." 
Psalms106:28 Bãmb yam loee ne Baall-Pewoore, la b wãba maand b sẽn kʋ kɩɩms yĩng nemdo." 
Psalms106:29 Bãmb manesmã puugã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũuri, tɩ b kɩt tɩ bã-loangdg yõk-ba." 
Psalms106:30 La a Fineyaas yikame n maneg yellã, n kɩt tɩ bã-loangdgã yalse." 
Psalms106:31 Dẽ, b geelga a Fineyaas manesmã wa tɩrlem, zamaan woo zamaane, la wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms106:32 Bãmb sẽn wa n be Meriba koomã noorã, b yika Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã. La bãmb manesmã waa ne yell a Moyiis zugu." 
Psalms106:33 Bala, bãmb maaname t'a Moyiis sũurã yiki, t'a gom n ka yals n tags ye." 
Psalms106:34 Bãmb ka sãam buud nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel tɩ b sãamã ye. 
Psalms106:35 Bãmb rɩka b meng n fãoog ne bu-zẽmsã, n zãms tɩ maan wa bãmba." 
Psalms106:36 Bãmb waooga bu-zẽmsã wẽn-naandsã, tɩ rẽ lebg bẽdg b yĩnga." 
Psalms106:37 Bãmb dɩka b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli n maan maand n kõ zĩn-dãmba. 
Psalms106:38 Bãmb daaga neb sẽn ka tar yell zɩɩm, yaa b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã zɩɩm. Bãmb dag n dɩkda bãmb n maand maoong n kõt Kana tẽng wẽn-naandsã, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã rẽgem zɩɩmã raagr yĩnga." 
Psalms106:39 Bãmb maana tʋʋm-dẽgd n dẽgem b mense. Bãmb manesmã yaa wa yoobo. 
Psalms106:40 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika ne b nebã, tɩ b kisg neb nins sẽn yaa bãmb dẽndã." 
Psalms106:41 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas-b lame tɩ bu-zẽms tõog-ba. Bãmb kisgdbã sooga bãmba. 
Psalms106:42 Bãmb bɛɛbã namsa bãmba, n kɩt tɩ b paam paoogre." 
Psalms106:43 La naoor wʋsgo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga d yaab-rãmbã. La bãmb kell n kɩɩsame, n sud b yel-wẽnã pʋga." 
Psalms106:44 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wʋm bãmb kelemsã, b yãnda b yel-pakrã." 
Psalms106:45 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tagsa b kaoolã b sẽn maan ne bãmbã yelle, la bãmb nonglem-kãsengã pʋga, b zoee bãmb nimbãanega." 
Psalms106:46 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn kẽes bãmb yembdã zoe bãmb nimbãanega. 
Psalms106:47 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, fãag-y-do! Yiis-y tõnd bu-zẽmsã sʋka, n lebs n tigim-du, tɩ d tõe n balem yãmb yʋ-sõngã, tɩ tõnd zu-zẽkrã yɩ yãmb waoogr yĩnga!" 
Psalms106:48 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgr wakat fãa, la wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga! Bɩ nebã fãa yeel yaa: «Ãmina! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!»" 
Psalms107:1 Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark tɩ b yaa sõngo, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms107:2 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag-b rãmbã yeel a woto. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag neb nins b zabd-n-taasã nugẽ wã yeel a woto. 
Psalms107:3 Yaa neb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yiis tẽms toor-toor n wa tigmã, b yiis-b-la dũniyã kɩrems a naasã fãa!" 
Psalms107:4 Bãmb dag n yeebda we-raoogẽ wã, n pãrgd zĩ-peen-daagã, la b rag n ka ne sor sẽn dabd tẽng b sẽn tõe n tɩ kẽ ye." 
Psalms107:5 Kom ne ko-yũud dag n namsd-b lame, la b pãngã rag n sɛtame." 
Psalms107:6 Bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b fãag-b-la b yel-pakrã pʋga." 
Psalms107:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b rɩk sor sẽn yaa tɩrga, sor sẽn dabd tẽng b sẽn tõe n tɩ kẽ." 
Psalms107:8 Bɩ b pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b nonglmã yĩnga, ne bõn-bãn nins b sẽn maan ninsaalbã yĩngã yĩnga!" 
Psalms107:9 Bala, bãmb kõo ko-yũud sẽn dag n kʋʋd-b rãmbã koom tɩ b yũ, la b kõ kom sẽn dag n tar-b rãmbã rɩɩb tɩ b rɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms107:10 Kẽer dag n bee lik ne kũum maasmẽ, la namsgo, ne bãens balgr pʋga." 
Psalms107:11 Bala, bãmb dag n kɩɩsa Wẽnnaam goamã, bãmb dag n paooga Sẽn-Ka-To saglgã." 
Psalms107:12 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ b paam toog n yaool n sake. Bãmb lakame tɩ ned ka be n sõngd-b ye. 
Psalms107:13 Bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b fãag-b-la b yel-pakrã pʋga." 
Psalms107:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yiis-b-la likã ne kũumã maasmẽ, n kao b balgrã." 
Psalms107:15 Bɩ b pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b nonglmã yĩnga, ne bõn-bãn nins b sẽn maan ninsaalbã yĩngã yĩnga!" 
Psalms107:16 Bala, bãmb kaoo zũud kʋɩlemsã, la b kao kut kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
Psalms107:17 Kẽer maana yalemdo, n kẽes b mens namsg pʋga, b kɩɩsgã ne b yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Psalms107:18 Bãmb yam yii rɩɩb buud fãa. Bãmb dag n pẽnega kũum dignoorẽ. 
Psalms107:19 Bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b fãag-b-la b yel-pakrã pʋga." 
Psalms107:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma b gomdã t'a wa maag-ba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãag-b-la ne kũumã. 
Psalms107:21 Bɩ b pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b nonglmã yĩnga, ne bõn-bãn nins b sẽn maan ninsaalbã yĩngã yĩnga!" 
Psalms107:22 Bɩ b maan bark pʋʋsg maando, la b kaas ne sũ-noog n moon bãmb tʋʋmã!" 
Psalms107:23 Neb nins sẽn dag n kẽed koom kogl-bɛd n togd soayã, la b tʋmd b tʋʋmã ko-kãsemsã zutã," 
Psalms107:24 yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã, ne b bõn-bãnã ko-zulumsã pʋse." 
Psalms107:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomame n kɩt tɩ sob-kãseng yik n zẽkd ko-pɛmã. 
Psalms107:26 Ko-pɛmã rag n zẽkda bãmb n kuiis yĩngri, n lebgd n sigd ne bãmb zĩ-zulumsẽ wã. La bãmb pelens yɩkame tɩ b yamã bondge." 
Psalms107:27 Bãmb nensã yilmame tɩ b tuumd wa rã-yũuda, la bãmb bãngrã fãa sɛɛme." 
Psalms107:28 Bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b yiis-b-la b yel-pakrã pʋga." 
Psalms107:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sob-kãsengã yõke, la b kɩt tɩ ko-pɛmã bas bʋrgo." 
Psalms107:30 Bãmb sũur yɩɩ noogo, sebgã ne ko-pɛmã sẽn yalsã yĩnga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab tall-b lame n kẽng zĩig ning b sẽn dag n datã." 
Psalms107:31 Bɩ b pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b nonglmã yĩnga, ne bõn-bãn nins b sẽn maan ninsaalbã yĩngã yĩnga!" 
Psalms107:32 Bɩ b pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã sʋka, la b waoog bãmb kãsem-dãmbã tiging pʋga." 
Psalms107:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe tɩ kʋɩls lebg we-raoogo, la b tõe tɩ ko-bundum zĩis lebg tẽn-koɛɛnga." 
Psalms107:34 Bãmb n leb n tõe tɩ zĩig ning sẽn sakd bɩle lebg ware, b tẽngã nebã wẽnemã yĩnga." 
Psalms107:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõe n teka we-raoogã t'a lebg ko-kãsenga, la b tõeeme tɩ zĩ-koeemsã lebg ko-bundum zĩisi," 
Psalms107:36 n kɩt tɩ kom sẽn tar-b rãmbã kẽng be, n tɩ me tẽng n kẽ." 
Psalms107:37 Bãmb na n bʋda pʋto, la b sel reezẽ tɩɩs sẽn na n wom wʋsgo." 
Psalms107:38 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n ning-b-la barka, n kɩt tɩ b sõorã lebg wʋsgo, la b ka na n sak tɩ b rũmsã sõor boog ye." 
Psalms107:39 Neb a taab sõor boogdame n lebg bilfu, b sẽn be toog ne namsg pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Psalms107:40 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe n ning nin-kãsems yãnde, la b kɩt tɩ b yeebd weoogẽ n ka tar sor n tũudẽ ye." 
Psalms107:41 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yiisd naong soab a nimbãaneg pʋga, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ buudã fɩɩgd wa rũm-kʋʋngo." 
Psalms107:42 Nin-tɩrsã na n yãnda bõn-kãng n kɩdem ne sũ-noogo, la gom-yood rãmbã na n muma b noyã." 
Psalms107:43 Bɩ sẽn tar-a yam gũus ne bõn-kãens fãa, n wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã võore."

Psalms108:2 Mam Wẽnnaam, m sũur keemame! Mam na n yɩɩlame, mam na n yɩɩla ne yʋʋm-teed n waoog yãmba!" 
Psalms108:3 Bɩ mam ruudgã ne m pɛndgã neke, bala, m dat n maana noog n nek zĩ-yẽegre."

Psalms108:10 Moaab yaa sĩng mam sẽn tar n sood koom. Mam lobda m neoodr Edom zugu. Mam kaasda zabr kaasg n segd Filistẽ dãmbã!»

Psalms108:14 Wẽnnaam sã n be ne tõndo, tõnd na n maana tʋʋm-kãsemse. Yaa bãmb n na n sãam tõnd bɛɛbã." 
Psalms109:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Yãmb a Wẽnnaam la m pẽgda, ra-y sĩnd-y y noor ye."

Psalms109:3 Bãmb kisgrã goam gũbga maam. Bãmb zabda ne maam zaalem.

Psalms109:5 Mam maand-b-la neer tɩ b lebsd maam wẽnga. Mam nong-b lame, la bãmb kisa maam."

Psalms109:23 Mam loogda wa maasem sẽn loogdã. B pĩnga maam wa kalwaare. 
Psalms109:24 No-loeerã komsa mam dũmã, la mam mengã yɛɛme, m sẽn faagã yĩnga." 
Psalms109:25 Mam lebga bãmb bõn-yaandga, bãmb geta maam n gõmsd b zutu."

Psalms109:30 Mam na n zẽka m koɛɛg n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Neb kʋʋngã sʋka, mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka." 
Psalms109:31 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee nimbãan-ned rɩtgo, n dat n fãag-a ne sẽn bʋʋd-b ne yẽnda wã." 
Psalms110:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela mam zu-soabã yaa: «Zĩnd mam dɩtgo, hal tɩ m kɩt tɩ f bɛɛbã lebg f nao roagendga.»" 
Psalms110:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ f naamã pãng sɩng Sɩyõ, b na n kɩtame tɩ f soog f bɛɛbã sẽn gũbg foomã!" 
Psalms110:3 Fo sẽn na n tigim f tãb-biisã daare, gãndaad n na n paam sũ-noog tɩ yãag-f zabrẽ wã. Fo kom-bɩɩsã na n fõd n waa fo nengẽ Wẽnnaam tãngã zugu, wa tõd-beoog meenem sẽn dʋʋgde!" 
Psalms110:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽename, la b kõn lebs b noor poorẽ ye. B yeelame yaa: «Fo yaa maan-kʋʋd wakat fãa, wa a Melkisedɛke.»" 
Psalms110:5 Zu-soabã bee fo nug-rɩtgo, b sũ-yikrã daare, b na n neema rĩm-dãmba."

Psalms110:7 Sorã zugu, rĩmã yũuda ko-soodã koom, n leb n paam daoodo." 
Psalms111:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark ne m sũur fãa, nin-tɩrsã seg-taabã ne b tigingã pʋga." 
Psalms111:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã yaa kãsemse, tɩ sẽn nong-b bãmbã baood n bãng-ba." 
Psalms111:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã pida ne ziiri la b tara ra-sãnde, la bãmb tɩrlem paada wakat fãa." 
Psalms111:4 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b tẽr bãmb bõn-bãnã yelle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara nonglem ne nimbãan-zoeere. 
Psalms111:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõta sẽn zoet-b bãmbã rɩɩbo, bãmb tẽra Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaoolã yell daar fãa." 
Psalms111:6 Bãmb deesa bu-zẽms tẽms n kõ b nebã n wilg bãmb b tʋʋmã pãnga. 
Psalms111:7 Bãmb nug tʋʋmã yaa sɩd la tɩrse. Bãmb no-tũudsã zemsa teegre. 
Psalms111:8 Bãmb no-tũudsã yasa kãenkãe n ka tol n vigsdẽ ye. B yaa sɩd la tɩrse. 
Psalms111:9 Bãmb tʋma fãagr b nebã yĩnga, n vigl b kaoolã wakat fãa yĩnga. Bãmb yʋʋrã welga toore, la a seka zoeese." 
Psalms111:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees yaa yam sɩngre, neb nins fãa sẽn sakd-b no-tũudsã tara yam sõama. Sẽn-Ka-Saab waoogrã paada wakat fãa." 
Psalms112:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bark bee sẽn zoet-a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã zugu, la sẽn nong-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã wʋsgã zugu!" 
Psalms112:2 Yẽnda yagensã na n paama pãng tẽngã pʋga, Nin-tɩrsã yagens na n paama barka." 
Psalms112:3 Nin-tɩrg zak na n pida ne laogo, la arzegse, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n nong-a-la wakat fãa." 
Psalms112:4 Vẽenem yãgda lik pʋgẽ nin-tɩrsã yĩnga. A yãgda sẽn tar-b nonglem, ne nimbãan-zoeere, la tɩrlmã yĩnga." 
Psalms112:5 Nin-sõng zoeta nimbãaneg n pengdẽ. A maanda a yɛlã fãa ne tɩrlem! 
Psalms112:6 Nin-tɩrg pãng kõn tol n miim ye. B kõn tol n yĩm nin-tɩrg yell abada. 
Psalms112:7 Nin-tɩrg ka zoet rabeem tɩ koe-beed na n wa wa ye. A sũur keemame, la a teega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms112:8 Yẽnda sũur ka kiuusdi, la a ka zoet rabeem ye. B na n ninga a bɛɛbã yãnd a nifẽ." 
Psalms112:9 Yẽnda yãkda a paoong n kõt naong rãmba. Yẽnda tɩrlem paada wakat fãa. Yẽnda pãngã paasda ne ziiri. 
Psalms112:10 Nin-wẽng nee rẽ t'a sũur puudẽ, t'a wãbd a yẽna, t'a sũur wurdẽ. Nin-wẽnsã ratem na n sãamame." 
Psalms113:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdbã, pẽg-y bãmba! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã!" 
Psalms113:2 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã paam pẽgre, moasã la wakat sẽn kõn sa!" 
Psalms113:3 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã paam pẽgre, sẽn sɩng ne wĩntoogã pukr n tɩ tãag a kõom!" 
Psalms113:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩda bu-zẽmsã fãa, la bãmb ziirã gãndga saasã." 
Psalms113:5 Ãnda soab n wẽnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã? Bãmb bee hal yĩngr n dɩt b naam. 
Psalms113:6 Bãmb sulgd n geta saasẽ la dũniyã. 
Psalms113:7 Bãmb yiisda ka-pãng soab tomẽ, la b yiisd nimbãan-ned tãmpʋʋrẽ." 
Psalms113:8 Bãmb kɩtdame t'a zĩnd ne nin-kãsemse, n naag a buudã nin-kãsemse." 
Psalms113:9 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ pʋg-kiir paam doogo, n paam kamb t'a sũur noomẽ. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms114:1 Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagensã sẽn wa n yit Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn yaa buud sẽn gomd gom-zẽngã. 
Psalms114:2 Zʋʋda lebga Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩ-sõngo, tɩ Israyɛll lebg bãmb soolem." 
Psalms114:3 Ko-kãsengã sẽn yã Israyɛll nebã, a zoeeme, la Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã sẽn yãnd-bã, a tara po-tula." 
Psalms114:4 Tãmsã rag n tirsda wa pe-raado, tɩ kunkubã tirsd wa pe-bi." 
Psalms114:5 Ko-kãsenga, bõe n tar-f tɩ f zoetẽ? Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, bõe yĩng tɩ f tard po-tula?" 
Psalms114:6 Tãmse, bõe n tar-y tɩ y tirsd wa pe-raado? Kunkuba, bõe yĩng tɩ y tirsd wa pe-bi?" 
Psalms114:7 Bɩ tẽngã rigimd Zu-soabã taoore! Bɩ f rigimd a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã taoore. 
Psalms114:8 Bãmb n tõe n tek pĩig t'a lebg ko-kãsenga, la b tõe n tek kugã tɩ lebg ko-budum zĩiga." 
Psalms115:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ka tõnd n tog ne waoogr ye. Kɩt-y tɩ y yʋʋrã paam waoogre, yãmb maan-neerã ne y sɩdã yĩnga!" 
Psalms115:2 Bõe yĩng tɩ bu-zẽmsã sokdẽ tɩ nin-bãmbã Wẽnnaamã bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Psalms115:3 Tõnd Wẽnnaamã bee saasẽ, n maand b yam sẽn date." 
Psalms115:4 Bu-zẽmsã wẽn-naandsã yaa wanzuri, la sãnem, n yaa ninsaalb nus n naane." 
Psalms115:5 Wẽn-naandsã tara noore, la b ka gomd ye, b tara nini, la b ka ne ye." 
Psalms115:6 Bãmb tara tʋba, la b ka wʋmd ye. Bãmb tara yõya, la b ka wʋmd yũug ye." 
Psalms115:7 B tara nusi, la b ka tõe n sɩɩs bũmb ye, b tara nao, la b ka kẽnd ye. Koɛɛg ka tõe n yi bãmb kokorẽ ye." 
Psalms115:8 Sẽn naan-b bãmbã ne sẽn teeg-b bãmbã fãa na n yɩɩ wa bãmba. 
Psalms115:9 Israyɛll nebã, rɩk-y y teegrã n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa yãmb sõangda, la y gãongo." 
Psalms115:10 A Aarõ yagense, teeg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa bãmb sõangda, la b gãongo." 
Psalms115:11 Sẽn zoet-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, teeg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa bãmb sõangda, la b gãongo." 
Psalms115:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽra tõnd yelle, la b na n ning-d-la barka. Bãmb na n ninga Israyɛll buudã barka, la b na n ninga a Aarõ yagensã barka," 
Psalms115:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n ning sẽn zoet-b bãmbã barka, b nin-talse, la b nin-kãsemse." 
Psalms115:14 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ yãmb ne y yagensã fɩɩge. 
Psalms115:15 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yĩngr la tẽng naandã ning yãmb barka! 
Psalms115:16 Yĩngr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so, la b rɩka tẽngã n kõ ninsaalbã." 
Psalms115:17 Ka kũum n na n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la ka sẽn be-b sɩddd... pʋgẽ wã n na n waoog bãmb ye." 
Psalms115:18 La tõndo, tõnd na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sẽn sɩng ne moasã la wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms116:1 Mam nonga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, bãmb wʋmda mam koɛɛgã, ne m se-yõkrã." 
Psalms116:2 Bãmb kɩlla b tʋbr n kelg maam. Woto yĩnga, mam na n boola bãmb m vɩɩmã tɛka." 
Psalms116:3 Kũum sẽbds rag n loee maam, la kɩɩm-kulg sũ-sãang rag n yõka maam. Mam dag n bee yel-pakr la yɩɩr pʋga." 
Psalms116:4 La mam boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kotame tɩ y fãag-ma!" 
Psalms116:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõmblem soaba, la tɩrlem soaba. Tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa nimbãan-zoɛta." 
Psalms116:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kogenda neb nins sẽn ka tar-b yellã. Mam pãngã rag n sɛɛme, la b fãaga maam." 
Psalms116:7 Mam na n leb n leba m vʋʋsg zĩigẽ, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-m-la neere." 
Psalms116:8 N-yẽe! Yãmb fãaga maam ne kũum, n fãag-m ne nintãm, n kɩt tɩ m naoor ka lak ye." 
Psalms116:9 Mam na n kẽna Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor dũniyã zugu, nin-vɩɩsã sʋka." 
Psalms116:10 Baa mam sẽn dag n yet tɩ m namsda wʋsgã, mam dag n ket n maanda tẽebo!" 
Psalms116:11 Mam sũ-sãangã pʋga, m yeelame: «Ninsaalbã fãa yaa zĩrẽ-be-nebã.»" 
Psalms116:12 Maan-neer ning fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan maamã, mam na n maana bõe n lebs bãmba?" 
Psalms116:13 Mam na n zẽka fãagr wamde, n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka." 
Psalms116:14 Mam na n pidsa m sẽn pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab bũmb ningã, b nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Psalms116:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-nongdsã kũun yaa bõn-kãseng bãmb nifẽ. 
Psalms116:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda, mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmd-poakã biiga. Yãmb logsa mam sẽbdsã." 
Psalms116:17 Mam na n maana bark pʋʋsg maoong yãmb yĩnga, la m na n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã." 
Psalms116:18 Mam na n pidsa m sẽn pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab bũmb ningã, b nebã fãa nifẽ," 
Psalms116:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã samandẽ wã, Zeruzalɛm tẽngã tẽn-sʋka! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms117:1 Bu-zẽmsã fãa, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Nebã fãa, waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms117:2 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã yaa kãseng tõnd yĩnga, la bãmb yaa sɩd soab wakat fãa. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms118:1 Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark tɩ b pida ne sõmblem, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms118:2 Bɩ Israyɛll nebã yeele: «Bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!» 
Psalms118:3 Bɩ a Aarõ pendã neb yeele: «Bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!» 
Psalms118:4 Bɩ sẽn zoet-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yeele: «Bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!» 
Psalms118:5 Mam yel-pakrã pʋga, mam boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo: La b leoka maam, n kõ-m lohorem." 
Psalms118:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne maam, dẽ, rabeem ka tar maam ye. Ninsaalbã tõe n maana maam bõe?" 
Psalms118:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam sõangda, b na n kɩtame tɩ mam bɛɛbã lebg m bõn-gɛtla." 
Psalms118:8 Fo sẽn na n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n são f sẽn na n teeg ninsaalbã." 
Psalms118:9 Fo sẽn na n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n são f sẽn na n teeg dũniyã nin-kãsemse." 
Psalms118:10 Bu-zẽmsã fãa rag n gũbga maam, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã maasem yĩnga, mam kɛ-b lame n pase." 
Psalms118:11 Bãmb gũbga maam, n dɩdg maam zĩigã fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã maasem yĩnga, mam kɛ-b lame n pase." 
Psalms118:12 Bãmb dag n gũbga maam wa sĩ-lolle. Bãmb kii wa gõos bugum. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã maasem yĩnga, mam kɛ-b lame n pase." 
Psalms118:13 B rag n tusda maam n dat n lubi, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa n sõnga maam." 
Psalms118:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pãnga, la m teegr zĩiga. Bãmb n yaa mam fãagda." 
Psalms118:15 Nin-tɩrsã fu-rot pʋse, tõogr kilsg n yit be. Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug-rɩtg tʋmda ne pãnga." 
Psalms118:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug-rɩtg tõogdame! Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug-rɩtg tʋma pãng tʋʋmã! 
Psalms118:17 Mam ka na n ki ye. Mam na n vɩɩmdame, mam na n moona Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋm-sõmyã." 
Psalms118:18 Sɩdã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbga maam, la b ka kʋ-m ye." 
Psalms118:19 Bɩ y pags tɩrlem kʋɩlemsã tɩ m kẽ, mam na n tũu be n kẽ n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka." 
Psalms118:20 Nin-tɩrsã tũuda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩrlem kʋɩlemsẽ wã n kẽedẽ. 
Psalms118:21 Mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb barka, y sẽn leok-ma yĩnga. Bala, yaa yãmb la m fãagda." 
Psalms118:22 Tãn-metbã sẽn zãgs kugr ningã, kug-kãng lebga roogã pãng zĩigẽ kugri." 
Psalms118:23 Bõn-kãng yita Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ. A yaa bõn-bãnd tõnd nifẽ. 
Psalms118:24 Ad daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan n kõ-do: Bɩ d kɩdem n maan sũ-noog ra-kãng yĩnga! 
Psalms118:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, d wẽed-y-la kãntɩɩga, wa-y n fãag-y-do! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, d kotame tɩ y kõ-d tõogre!" 
Psalms118:26 Bark bee ned ning sẽn wat-a ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã zugu! Tõnd bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, n ningd yãmb zut barka." 
Psalms118:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam, bãmb n vẽnegd tõndo. Bɩ y zã vãad n gũbg bãmb n yãag-ba, d yãag-b n tãag tẽn-kugrẽ wã!" 
Psalms118:28 Yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb barka. Mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n balma yãmba." 
Psalms118:29 Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark tɩ b pida ne sõmblem, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms119:1 Bark bee neb nins sẽn kẽnd ne burkĩndã zutu, neb nins sẽn kẽnd wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã!" 
Psalms119:2 Bark bee neb nins sẽn sakd bãmb no-tũudsã zutu, neb nins sẽn baood bãmb ne b sũyã fãa wã!" 
Psalms119:3 Bãmb ka maand wẽng ye. Bãmb kẽnda wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn datã. 
Psalms119:4 Yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab vigla y no-tũudsã, tɩ b tõe n sak-b neere." 
Psalms119:5 Mam dat n gũusa ne m manesem, n tõog n sak yãmb tõodã!" 
Psalms119:6 Mam sã n sakd yãmb noyã zãnga, mam kõn tol n paam yãnd ye." 
Psalms119:7 Mam na n pẽga yãmb ne pʋ-peelem, la m zãmsd yãmb tɩrlem no-tũudsã." 
Psalms119:8 Mam dat n saka yãmb noyã. Bɩ y ra tol n bas-m fasɩ ye. 
Psalms119:9 Bi-bɩɩg na n maana a wãn t'a manesem zemse? Yaa a sẽn na n sakd yãmb goamã. 
Psalms119:10 Mam baooda yãmb ne m sũur fãa. Ra bas-y maam tɩ m bʋdg n bas yãmb noyã ye. 
Psalms119:11 Mam bĩngda yãmb goamã m sũurẽ, sẽn na yɩl n da wa maan yel-wẽn n kong ne yãmb ye." 
Psalms119:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y paam pẽgre! Bɩ y zãms maam yãmb no-tũudsã!" 
Psalms119:13 Mam noorã na n togsa tõod nins fãa sẽn yit yãmb noorẽ wã. 
Psalms119:14 Mam sã n sakd yãmb noyã, mam tara sũ-noogo, tɩ yaa wa mam paama arzegs buud fãa." 
Psalms119:15 Mam tagsda yãmb no-tũudsã yelle, la m get yãmb soayã y sẽn wilgd maamã." 
Psalms119:16 Mam sũur yaa noog tɩ sak yãmb no-tũudsã, la m kõn tol n yĩm yãmb goamã yell ye." 
Psalms119:17 Maan-y mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã neere, tɩ m tõe n vɩɩmde, la m sak yãmb goamã!" 
Psalms119:18 Puk-y m ninã tɩ m tõe n yã yãmb tõogã bõn-bãnã! 
Psalms119:19 Mam yaa sãan dũniyã ka, ra solg-y y noyã ne maam ye." 
Psalms119:20 Yãmb no-tũudsã bãngr datem dɩta maam wakat fãa wa bugum. 
Psalms119:21 Yãmb lengda wuk-m-mens rãmbã, kãab-wẽng sẽn be b rãmb zutã, neb nins sẽn bʋdg n bas yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:22 Yiis-y maam paoogrã ne yaalgã pʋga, bala, mam wɩngda ne yãmb no-tũudsã sakre." 
Psalms119:23 Nanambsã nong bɩ b zĩnd n gom mam yell wẽnga, yãmb tʋmtʋmdã tagsda yãmb noyã yelle." 
Psalms119:24 Yãmb no-tũudsã kõta maam sũ-noogo. Bãmb n sagend maam. 
Psalms119:25 Mam bilimda tomẽ. Sõng-y-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems yãmb goamã! 
Psalms119:26 Mam togsa yãmb m manesmã, la yãmb leoka maam. Zãms-y maam yãmb noyã!" 
Psalms119:27 Sõng-y-m tɩ m wʋm yãmb no-tũudsã võore, tɩ m tõe n tags y bõn-bãnã yelle!" 
Psalms119:28 Mam yãbda ne sũ-sãanga. Leb-y n paas-y maam pãng wa sẽn zems yãmb goamã! 
Psalms119:29 Zãag-y maam ne zĩrẽ sore, la y zoe m nimbãaneg n sõng-m tɩ m sak yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:30 Mam yãka yam n na n tũ pʋ-peelem sore. Mam sakda yãmb no-tũudsã. 
Psalms119:31 Mam loeta m meng ne yãmb no-tũudsã. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, da ning-y maam yãnd ye!" 
Psalms119:32 Mam zoeta yãmb noyã sor zugu, bala, yãmb yoka mam yamã." 
Psalms119:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zãms-y maam y tõodã soayã, tɩ mam tõe n tall-b m vɩɩm tɛka." 
Psalms119:34 Kɩt-y tɩ m wʋm yãmb tõogã võore, tɩ m tõe n bĩng-a, la m sak-a ne m sũur fãa." 
Psalms119:35 Kɩt-y tɩ m kẽn yãmb noyã sor zugu! Bala, mam sũur nooma ne-ba." 
Psalms119:36 Wẽnemd-y m sũurã tɩ m sak y no-tũudsã, la y ra wẽnemd m sũurã n tees zãmb arzegs ye." 
Psalms119:37 Bɩ y kɩt tɩ m wẽnemd n da ges bũmb nins sẽn ka tar yõodã ye. La y sõng-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zemsd yãmb daabã! 
Psalms119:38 Mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda, pids-y yãmb sẽn kãab maam bũmb ningã, tɩ nebã na zoe yãmba!" 
Psalms119:39 Zãag-y maam ne paoogrã mam sẽn zoetã. Bala, yãmb bʋʋdã yaa sõama." 
Psalms119:40 Mam sesdame n dat yãmb no-tũudsã. Kɩt-y tɩ m vɩɩmd yãmb tɩrlmã pʋga! 
Psalms119:41 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wilg-y y nonglmã ne maam, la y fãag maam wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn dag n kãabã!" 
Psalms119:42 Tɩ mam tõe n leok neb nins sẽn paoogd maamã, bala, mam teega yãmb goamã." 
Psalms119:43 Ra yiis-y sɩd-goamã mam noorẽ ye, bala, mam gũuda yãmb bʋ-kaoorã." 
Psalms119:44 Mam na n saka yãmb tõogã wakat fãa n ka bas ye. 
Psalms119:45 Mam na n kẽna lohorem pʋgẽ, bala, mam baooda yãmb no-tũudsã." 
Psalms119:46 Mam na n kɩsa yãmb kasetã rĩm-dãmb taoore, n ka tol n zoe yãnd ye." 
Psalms119:47 Mam maanda sũ-noog ne yãmb noyã. Mam nong-b-la hal wʋsgo. 
Psalms119:48 Mam zẽkda m nus n teesd yãmb noyã m sẽn nongã, la mam tagsda yãmb noorã y sẽn yiisã yelle." 
Psalms119:49 Tẽeg-y gomd ning yãmb sẽn dag n gom ne y tʋmtʋmdã yelle. Bala, gom-kãng kõo maam tẽebo!" 
Psalms119:50 Bõn-kãng n belsd maam m nimbãanegã pʋga. Yãmb sẽn yeelã n kõt maam vɩɩm. 
Psalms119:51 Baa ne tɩtaam dãmbã sẽn paoogd maamã, mam ka basd yãmb tõogã ye." 
Psalms119:52 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam ket n tẽra yãmb bʋ-kaoorã yãmb sẽn maan pĩndã yelle, n paamd belsgo." 
Psalms119:53 Mam sã n get nin-wẽnsã sẽn basd yãmb tõogã, mam sũur puuda wʋsgo." 
Psalms119:54 Mam sãandã weoogo, yaa yãmb sẽn yiis noy ninsã n lebg mam yɩɩl tɩ m yɩɩndẽ." 
Psalms119:55 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yʋngo mam tẽegda yãmb yʋʋrã yelle, la m sakda yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:56 Ad bũmb ning sẽn pak maam, yaa tɩ sak yãmb no-tũudsã." 
Psalms119:57 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yetame, mam pʋɩɩr yaa tɩ sak yãmb goamã." 
Psalms119:58 Mam baooda ne m sũur fãa, n dat n ta yãmb yam, Zoe-y m nimbãanega, wa yãmb sẽn kãabã!" 
Psalms119:59 Mam tagsa m manesmã yelle, n na n wẽnemd n kẽn wa sẽn zems yãmb kasetã." 
Psalms119:60 Mam yãgdame n sakd yãmb noyã, n ka basdẽ tɩ kaoosdẽ ye." 
Psalms119:61 Nin-wẽnsã bẽdg yõka maam, la mam ka yĩmd yãmb tõogã yell ye." 
Psalms119:62 Mam yikda yʋn-sʋk n pʋʋsd yãmb barka, yãmb bʋ-kaoorã sẽn yaa tɩrgã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:63 Mam yaa neb nins fãa sẽn zoet yãmb la b sakd yãmb no-tũudsã zoa. 
Psalms119:64 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nonglmã pida dũniyã gilli. Zãms-y maam tɩ m bãng y tʋlsmã!" 
Psalms119:65 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb maana mam sẽn yaa y tʋmtʋmdã neere, wa yãmb sẽn dag n kãabã." 
Psalms119:66 Zãms-y maam tɩ m paam yam la bãngre, bala, mam kɩsa sɩd ne yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:67 Sẽn deng toogã sẽn na n paam maam, mam dag n kẽe moogo. La moasã, mam sakda yãmb sẽn yeelã." 
Psalms119:68 Yãmb yaa sõmblem soaba, la maan-neer soaba. Zãms-y maam y tʋlsmã." 
Psalms119:69 Wuk-m-mens rãmbã yagda zĩrẽ n sãamd mam yʋʋre, la mam sakda yãmb no-tũudsã ne m sũur fãa." 
Psalms119:70 Nin-bãmb yamã gũsa wa kaam. La yãmb tõogã sakr n kõt maam sũ-noogo. 
Psalms119:71 Toogã sẽn paam maamã manega maam, yaa tɩ mam na zãms n bãng yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:72 Yãmb sẽn kõ tõod ninsã tara yõod ne maam, n yɩɩd sãnem ne wanzuri teed tusa." 
Psalms119:73 Yaa yãmb nus n naan maam, n kõt maam pãnga. Kõ-y maam yam tɩ m zãms yãmb tõodã." 
Psalms119:74 Neb nins sẽn zoet yãmbã sã n yãnd maam, b maanda sũ-noogo. Bala, mam tẽeda yãmb goamã." 
Psalms119:75 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam miime tɩ yãmb bʋ-kaoorã yaa tɩrga, la yãmb tara bʋʋm la y sẽn sɩbg maamã." 
Psalms119:76 Bɩ y maan-neerã bels maam, wa yãmb sẽn dag n kãab y tʋmtʋmdã." 
Psalms119:77 Bɩ y maan nimbãan-zoeer ne maam tɩ m tõe n vɩɩmde. Bala, yãmb tõogã n kõt maam sũ-noogo." 
Psalms119:78 Bɩ y ning wuk-m-mens rãmbã sẽn namsd maam zaalmã yãnde! Mam tagsda yãmb no-tũudsã yelle. 
Psalms119:79 Bɩ sẽn zoet-b yãmbã ne neb nins sẽn mi-b yãmb tʋlsmã wẽnemd n wa mam nengẽ. 
Psalms119:80 Mam na n saka y noyã ne m sũur fãa, n da wa paam yãnd ye." 
Psalms119:81 Mam namsdame n baood yãmb fãagrã, la mam gũuda yãmb goamã ne tẽebo." 
Psalms119:82 Mam gũu yãmb goamã tɩ mam ninã pãng sɛ, tɩ mam sokdẽ: Dabʋr la yãmb na n bels maam?" 
Psalms119:83 Baa mam sã n wa n lebg wa ko-waoog bug-zõos sẽn kʋɩɩse, mam ka yĩmd yãmb tõodã yell ye." 
Psalms119:84 Mam na n vɩɩmda yʋʋm wãna? Dabʋr la y na n bʋ mam namsdbã bʋʋdo? 
Psalms119:85 Wuk-m-mens rãmbã tuuda bogd mam taoore, n kɩɩsd yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:86 Yãmb noyã zãng wilgda yãmb nonglmã. Sõng-y maam tɩ b namsd-m-la zaalem! 
Psalms119:87 Kellẽ-la bilf tɩ b menesẽ maam. La mam ka basd yãmb no-tũudsã sakr ye. 
Psalms119:88 Sõng-y maam tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems y nonglmã, tɩ m tõe n sak yãmb noorã sẽn togsã." 
Psalms119:89 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb goamã bee saasẽ wakat fãa." 
Psalms119:90 Yãmb maan-sɩdã paada zamaan woo zamaane. Yãmb n vigl tẽn-gãongã t'a beẽ. 
Psalms119:91 Yaa yãmb bʋ-kao-tɩrgã yĩng la bũmbã fãa be rũndã. Bala, bũmbã fãa tʋmda yãmb yĩnga." 
Psalms119:92 Sã n ka mam sẽn nong yãmb tõogã yĩnga, toogã rag n na n loogẽ-la ne maam." 
Psalms119:93 Mam kõn tol n yĩm yãmb noyã yell ye. Bala, yãmb tũnuga bãmb n kõ maam vɩɩm." 
Psalms119:94 Fãag-y maam tɩ yãmb n so maam. Bala, mam baood n saka yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:95 Nin-wẽnsã gũuda maam n dat n menes maam, la mam kelgda yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:96 Mam yãame tɩ baa bũmb nins fãa sẽn zems zãngã tara tɛka, la yãmb tõogã ka tar tɛk ye." 
Psalms119:97 Mam sɩd nonga yãmb tõogã! Mam tagsda a yell n ka basdẽ ye. 
Psalms119:98 Yãmb tõogã kõta maam yam n yɩɩd m bɛɛbã, bala, mam tar-a-la wakat fãa." 
Psalms119:99 Mam tara yam n yɩɩd m zu-soben-dãmbã, bala, yaa yãmb noyã yell bal la mam tagsda." 
Psalms119:100 Mam tara bãngr n yɩɩd nin-kẽemba, bala, mam sakda yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:101 Mam gũusdame n ka rɩkd wẽng maaneg sore, sẽn na n yɩl n sak yãmb goamã." 
Psalms119:102 Mam tũuda yãmb no-tũudsã, bala, yãmb n zãms-b maam." 
Psalms119:103 Yãmb goamã nooma mam noorẽ, n yɩɩd sɩɩd sẽn be mam dagsendakẽ." 
Psalms119:104 Yãmb no-tũudsã kõta maam bãngre, la mam kisa zĩrẽ buud fãa." 
Psalms119:105 Yãmb goamã yaa fɩtl mam kẽnd pʋga, a yaa vẽenem mam sor zugu." 
Psalms119:106 Mam wẽen n pidsame, tɩ m na n saka yãmb tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã." 
Psalms119:107 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam bee sũ-sãan-kãseng pʋga, sõng-y maam tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn kãabã!" 
Psalms119:108 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kot-y lame, tɩ y sak n deeg m bark pʋʋsgã tɩ yɩ kũuni, la y zãms maam y tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã!" 
Psalms119:109 Mam vɩɩmã bee yell pʋg wakat fãa, la mam ka yĩmd yãmb tõogã yell ye." 
Psalms119:110 Nin-wẽnsã bẽta maam kũusri, la mam ka bʋdgd n basd yãmb no-tũudsã ye." 
Psalms119:111 Yãmb tʋlsmã n yaa mam pʋɩɩr wakat fãa, bãmb n noogd mam sũuri." 
Psalms119:112 Mam modgdame n sakd yãmb noyã. Bõn-kãng n yaa mam keoor wakat fãa. 
Psalms119:113 Mam kisa yam a yiib rãmbã, la m nonga yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:114 Yãmb yaa mam zĩ-soalgdga, la m gãongo, Mam tẽeda yãmb goamã." 
Psalms119:115 Tʋʋm-wẽns maandba, loog-y n bas-y maam, tɩ mam tõe n sak m Wẽnnaamã noyã!" 
Psalms119:116 Tebend-y maam wa sẽn zems y sẽn kãabã, tɩ m tõe n vɩɩmde. Da ning-y maam yãnd m tẽeb-gũudmã pʋg ye." 
Psalms119:117 Tebend-y maam tɩ m tõe n paam fãagre, la tɩ m tõe n get yãmb noyã wakat fãa!" 
Psalms119:118 Yãmb ka reegd neb nins sẽn bʋdgd n basd yãmb noyã ye. Bala, bãmb sɩlmã fãa yaa zaalem." 
Psalms119:119 Yãmb menesda dũniyã nin-wẽnsã wa sagdo. Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam nong yãmb tʋlsem. 
Psalms119:120 Mam sẽn zoet yãmbã yĩng kɩtame tɩ mam digda. Yãmb bʋ-kaoorã kẽesda maam dabeem. 
Psalms119:121 Mam vɩɩmda zemsgo, la tɩrlem pʋga. Da bas-y maam m namsdbã nusẽ ye." 
Psalms119:122 Gũ-y mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã n kɩt tɩ m yɩ neere. Tɩ wuk-m-mens rãmbã ra leb n nams maam ye. 
Psalms119:123 Mam nin pãng rat n sɛɛ yãmb fãagrã ne y tɩrlmã kãabg baoob yĩnga. 
Psalms119:124 Maan-y mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã wa sẽn zems y nonglmã. Zãms-y maam y noyã! 
Psalms119:125 Mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda. Bɩ y kõ maam yam, tɩ m bãng yãmb tʋlsem." 
Psalms119:126 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wakat taame tɩ y tog n maan bũmbu. Bala, b sãamda yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:127 Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam nong yãmb noyã, n yɩɩd sãnem halaale." 
Psalms119:128 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ bũmbã fãa pʋgẽ, mam getame tɩ yãmb no-tũudsã n yaa tɩrse, la mam kisa zĩrẽ-beed buud fãa." 
Psalms119:129 Yãmb tʋlsmã yaa sõama, rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam sakd-ba." 
Psalms119:130 Sẽn bãng-a yãmb goamã paamda vẽnegre. Yãmb goamã wekda sẽn be-b zɩɩlem pʋgẽ wã yam. 
Psalms119:131 Mam yaagda m noor n sesdẽ, yãmb noyã yamleoog sẽn tar maamã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:132 Wẽnemd-y n ges-y maam, n zoe m nimbãanega, wa sẽn zems y tɩrlmã y sẽn maand neb nins sẽn nong yãmb yʋʋrã yĩngã." 
Psalms119:133 Paas-y maam pãng wa y sẽn yeelã, la y ra bas tɩ wẽng ba a yembr soog-m ye." 
Psalms119:134 Fãag-y maam ne ninsaalbã namsgo, tɩ mam tõe n sak yãmb no-tũudsã." 
Psalms119:135 Kɩt-y tɩ y nengã vẽenem yãg n bui mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã. Zãms-y maam tɩ m sak yãmb noyã. 
Psalms119:136 Mam nintãm daagdame, nebã sẽn ka sakd yãmb tõogã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:137 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa tɩrga, la yãmb bʋ-kaoorã yaa tɩrga." 
Psalms119:138 Yãmb kõ y kasetã ne tɩrlem, la ne maan-sɩd meng-menga." 
Psalms119:139 Mam bɛɛbã yĩmda yãmb goamã yelle, la bõn-kãng kɩtame tɩ nonglem-kãseng ning mam sẽn tar yãmb yĩngã rɩt maam wa bugum." 
Psalms119:140 Yãmb gomdã zemsa zãnga, rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã nong-a." 
Psalms119:141 Mam yaa bilf tɩ b pa nand-m ye. La mam ka yĩmd yãmb noyã yell ye. 
Psalms119:142 Yãmb tɩrlmã n yaa tɩrlem sẽn paad wakat fãa, la yãmb tõogã yaa sɩda." 
Psalms119:143 Yel-pakr la sũ-sãang n tar maam. La yãmb noyã n kõt maam sũ-noogo. 
Psalms119:144 Yãmb tʋlsmã yaa tɩrs wakat sẽn kõn sa, yok-y mam yamã tɩ m wʋm b võor n tõog n vɩɩmde!" 
Psalms119:145 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boonda yãmb ne m sũur fãa, bɩ y leok-ma, tɩ m tõe n sak yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:146 Mam boonda yãmba, fãag-y-ma, tɩ mam tõe n maan yãmb tʋlsmã." 
Psalms119:147 Mam sãta beoog n boondẽ. La mam maanda tẽeb ne yãmb goamã. 
Psalms119:148 Mam pukda m nin tɩ beoog nan ka vẽeg ye, n na n tags yãmb sẽn kãabã yelle." 
Psalms119:149 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kelg maam wa sẽn zems y nonglmã, sõng-y-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems y tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã!" 
Psalms119:150 Sẽn tʋmd-b tʋʋm-wẽnsã kolgda maam, b zãagda b mens ne yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:151 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb bee mam sɛɛgẽ, la yãmb noyã fãa yaa sɩd bala." 
Psalms119:152 Mam miime tɩ hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, yãmb vigla y tʋlsmã wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga." 
Psalms119:153 Ges-y mam namsgã, la y fãag-ma, bala, mam ka yĩmd yãmb tõogã yell ye." 
Psalms119:154 Zab-y n sõng-y-ma, la y fãag-ma. Sõng-y-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems yãmb kãabgã." 
Psalms119:155 Fãagrã zãra ne nin-wẽnse, bala, b ka baood n na n sak yãmb noyã ye." 
Psalms119:156 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nimbãan-zoeerã yaa kãsenga! Sõng-y-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zems yãmb tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã!" 
Psalms119:157 Mam namsdbã ne m bɛɛbã yaa wʋsgo. La mam ka basd yãmb tʋlsmã ye. 
Psalms119:158 Mam sẽn get zãmb-dãmbã, mam yam yii ne bãmba, b sẽn ka sakd yãmb sẽn yeelã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:159 Bɩ y gese, mam nonga yãmb no-tũudsã, sõng-y-m tɩ m vɩɩmd wa sẽn zemsd yãmb nonglmã." 
Psalms119:160 Yãmb goamã fãa yaa sɩda, la yãmb bʋ-kao-tɩrgã fãa paada wakat sẽn kõn sɛ." 
Psalms119:161 Nanambs namsda maam zaalem. La mam sẽn zoet yaa yãmb goamã bala. 
Psalms119:162 Mam sũur nooma ne yãmb sẽn kãabã, tɩ yaa wa ned sẽn paam te-zɛɛdem wʋsgo." 
Psalms119:163 Mam kisa zĩrẽ-beedo, la m yam yii ne-a. Mam sẽn nong yaa yãmb tõogã." 
Psalms119:164 Mam pẽgda yãmb naoor a yopoe daar fãa, yãmb bʋ-kao-tɩrsã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:165 Sẽn nong-b yãmb tõogã vɩɩ ne bãan meng-menga, la bũmb ka be n tõe n lub bãmb ye." 
Psalms119:166 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam maanda tẽeb ne yãmb fãagrã, la m sakd yãmb noyã." 
Psalms119:167 Mam maanda yãmb tʋlsmã, la m nong-b-la hal wʋsgo." 
Psalms119:168 Mam tũuda yãmb no-tũudsã ne y tʋlsmã, bala, mam yel-manesmã fãa bee yãmb taoore." 
Psalms119:169 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wʋm-y mam kɛlengã! Kõ-y maam bãngr wa sẽn zems yãmb goamã!" 
Psalms119:170 Bɩ mam kosgã zẽk n ta y nengẽ! Fãag-y maam wa yãmb sẽn kãabã! 
Psalms119:171 Bɩ mam noorã kils n waoog-yã, bala, yãmb zãmsda maam y noyã." 
Psalms119:172 Bɩ mam zelemdã pʋd yɩɩll n pẽg y goamã, bala, yãmb noyã fãa yaa tɩrse." 
Psalms119:173 Bɩ y tẽeg y nug n sõng-ma, bala, mam yãka yam n na n sak yãmb no-tũudsã." 
Psalms119:174 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam sesdame n dat yãmb fãagrã, la yãmb tõodã kõta maam sũ-noogo." 
Psalms119:175 Sõng-y maam tɩ m vɩɩmd n pẽg yãmba! La bɩ yãmb bʋ-kaoorã sõng-ma! 
Psalms119:176 Mam saada wa peosg sẽn meneme, bɩ y bao y tʋmtʋmdã, bala, mam ka yĩmd yãmb noyã yell ye." 
Psalms120:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Mam boola Sẽn-Ka-Saab m yel-pakrã pʋga, la bãmb leoka maam." 
Psalms120:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y maam ne zĩrẽ-be-nebã. Fãag-y maam ne zãmb dãmbã." 
Psalms120:3 Zĩrẽ goam kõta foom bõe? Zãmb goam yõod ne foom yaa bõe? 
Psalms120:4 Yaa gãndaoog pɛɛm sẽn sɩlse, la kagdg raad bug-saala." 
Psalms120:5 Toog bee mam zugu, mam sẽn yaa sãan nin-toos sʋkã, mam sẽn tɩ vɩ ne nin-wẽnsã!" 
Psalms120:6 Mam vɩɩmda neb nins sẽn kis-b vɩ-bãanã sʋk n kaoose. 
Psalms120:7 Mam baooda vɩ-bãane, la mam sã n gomd vɩ-bãan yelle, bãmb sẽn baood yaa zabre." 
Psalms121:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Mam zẽka m neng n get tãmsã. «Mam sõngr na n yii yɛɛnẽ n wa? 
Psalms121:2 Mam sõngr yita Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ.» Bãmb n yaa yĩngr la tẽng naanda. 
Psalms121:3 Bãmb kõn bas tɩ f naoor lak ye. Sẽn gũud-a foomã ka suusd ye. 
Psalms121:4 Ayo! Sẽn gũud-a Israyɛllã ka suusdi, tɩ b gomd gõeem ye." 
Psalms121:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa fo gũuda, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee fo rɩtgo, bãmb yaa maasem fo yĩnga." 
Psalms121:6 Wĩndga, wĩntoogã ka na n wẽ foom ye. La yʋngo, kiuug vẽenem kõn wa ne yell fo zug ye." 
Psalms121:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n gũu foom ne wẽng buud fãa, bãmb na n gũu fo vɩɩmã." 
Psalms121:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n gũu foom, b na n gũu foom f yiibu, n tãag f kõom, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, la wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Psalms122:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩle. Yaa a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. B sã n wa n yeel maam tɩ m wa tɩ d kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, mam sũurã yaa noogo." 
Psalms122:2 Zeruzalɛm, tõnd kẽn n taa f tẽngã rignoorẽ!" 
Psalms122:3 Zeruzalɛm, b mee fo tẽngã, b me-a lame n gũbg t'a yaa neere!" 
Psalms122:4 Yaa fo nengẽ la buud toay-toayã sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã kẽnda, wa sẽn zems Israyɛll tõogã, n na n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka." 
Psalms122:5 Bala, yaa Zeruzalɛm la bʋʋdã gɛy be, yaa a Davɩɩd roogã naam gɛyã." 
Psalms122:6 Pʋʋs-y tɩ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã zĩnd ne bãane. Zeruzalɛm, bɩ sẽn nong-b foomã vɩɩmd bãane." 
Psalms122:7 Bɩ fo tẽngã fãa zĩnd ne bãane, la bɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd f na-yiyã pʋse!" 
Psalms122:8 Mam ba-biisã ne m zo-rãmbã yĩnga, mam yetame: «Bɩ f zĩnd ne bãane!»" 
Psalms122:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogã yĩnga, mam kosg yaa tɩ f na paam naare." 
Psalms123:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam zẽkda m neng n get yãmb sẽn be y naamã geer zug saasẽ wã." 
Psalms123:2 Ade, wa tʋmtʋmdb sẽn get b soaalã, la wa yem-poak sẽn get a zu-soaben-poakã, woto me, tõnd geta Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, n gũudẽ tɩ b zoe d nimbãanega." 
Psalms123:3 Zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y d nimbãanega. Bala, yaoolgã ya n seka tõndo." 
Psalms123:4 Nin-wẽnsã sẽn yaand tõndã sekd-d lame. Wilg-m-mens rãmbã paoogrã ya n seka tõndo. 
Psalms124:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n ka beẽ ne tõndo, bɩ Israyɛll nebã yeele:" 
Psalms124:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n ka beẽ ne tõnd wakat ning nebã sẽn wa n yik zabr ne tõndã," 
Psalms124:3 nebã rag n na n velẽ-la tõnd vɩɩs wakat ning b sũyã sẽn yik ne tõndã. 
Psalms124:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n ka beẽ ne tõndo, koomã rag n na n limẽ-la tõnd n looge, ko-zoetmã rag n na n dɩẽ-la tõndo." 
Psalms124:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dag n ka beẽ ne tõndo, ko-fõtem dag n na n limẽ-la tõndo." 
Psalms124:6 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn ka bas tɩ d bɛɛbã zendem tõnd ne b yẽnã yĩnga." 
Psalms124:7 Tõnd põsa wa liuul sẽn põs tãoogẽ, tãoogã gĩs kaoome, tɩ tõnd põse." 
Psalms124:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yĩngr la tẽng naandã yʋʋr n fãagd tõndo. 
Psalms125:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Neb nins sẽn teegd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, wẽnda wa Sɩyõ tãngã, a ka miimda, la a paada wakat fãa." 
Psalms125:2 Wa tãmsã sẽn karg n gũbg Zeruzalɛmã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab me gũbgda b nebã a woto, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, la wakat fãa." 
Psalms125:3 Na-toaag kõn tol n dɩ naam nin-tɩrsã tẽng pʋgẽ, tɩ nin-tɩrsã wa ning b nug wẽngã maaneg pʋg ye." 
Psalms125:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, maan-y nin-sõamyã neere, la y maan sẽn kẽnd-b tɩrlem pʋgẽ wã neere." 
Psalms125:5 La sã n yaa ne neb nins sẽn tũud-b so-golemsã, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab naag-b ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã n digi! Bɩ Israyɛll vɩɩmd ne bãane!" 
Psalms126:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n lebs Sɩyõ a zĩigẽ wã, rag n wẽnda wa neb sẽn zãms zãmsdo." 
Psalms126:2 Dẽ, tõnd noyã rag n pida ne laado, tõnd noor dag n kaasda ne sũ-noogo. La bu-zẽmsã rag n yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana bõn-kãsems n kõ-ba!»" 
Psalms126:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana bõn-kãsems n kõ tõndo. Dẽ, tõnd maanda sũ-noogo." 
Psalms126:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, leb-y n lebs-y tõnd d zĩigẽ wã, wa yãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ Negɛɛv kʋɩlsã leb n paam koomã." 
Psalms126:5 Sẽn bʋt-b ne nintãmã na n kẽeba ne sũ-noog kaasgo. 
Psalms126:6 Sẽn zãad-a bõn-buud n dabd bʋdb la a yãbdã na n tʋka a ka-gĩnã n kaasd ne sũ-noog n lebg n watẽ. 
Psalms127:1 Kẽnd yɩɩlle. Yaa a Salmo yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n ka me roogo, tãn-metbã tʋmda zaalem bala. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n ka gũ tẽnga, tẽn-gũudã gũuda zaalem bala." 
Psalms127:2 Yãmb sẽn sãt n yit la y kẽed yʋn-sʋgsã yaa zaalem bala. Yãmb sẽn namsd n na n paam n dɩ wã yaa zaalem. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-nongdsã, ba b sã n gõe, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõt-b-la rɩ-kãnga." 
Psalms127:3 Kamb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab kũuni, b yaa keoor Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõte." 
Psalms127:4 Bi-bɩɩlem wakat kamb wẽnda pɛɛm sẽn be tãb-bi-gãndaoog nugẽ. 
Psalms127:5 Sẽn paam-a peem-kãens n pids a lok tara sũ-noogo! A sã n na n bʋ ne bɛyã tẽngã noore, a kõn tol n paam yãnd ye." 
Psalms128:1 Kẽnd yɩɩlle. Sẽn zoet-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab la b kẽnd bãmb soayã zutã tara sũ-noogo. 
Psalms128:2 Fo na n dɩ f tʋʋmdã yõodo. Fo na n paama sũ-noogo, la naar yaa foom n so!" 
Psalms128:3 Fo pagã wẽnda reezẽ tɩ-woamdga, n be fo roogã yaanga, tɩ fo kambã yaa wa oliiv tɩ-bãoonego, n gũbg n dɩt ne foom." 
Psalms128:4 Sẽn zoet-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n paama bark a woto. 
Psalms128:5 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ b barkã yi Sɩyõ n ta foom, la fo na n yãnda Zeruzalɛm naarã f vɩɩmã tõre." 
Psalms128:6 Fo na n yãnda f kambã kamba. Bɩ Israyɛll zĩnd ne bãane! 
Psalms129:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Hal mam bi-bɩɩlem wakate, b zabda ne maam. Bɩ Israyɛll nebã yeele:" 
Psalms129:2 «Hal mam bi-bɩɩlem wakate, b zaba ne maam, la b ka tõog n maan maam bũmb ye." 
Psalms129:3 Bãmb bõoda mam poorã, wa ka-koaad sẽn bẽesd a pʋʋgo." 
Psalms129:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrlem soaba, bãmb kaoo wĩy nins nin-wẽnsã sẽn tall n sẽb tõndã." 
Psalms129:5 Bɩ yãnd yõk-b tɩ b tare, bɩ yãnd yõk neb nins fãa sẽn kis Sɩyõ wã." 
Psalms129:6 Bɩ b yɩ wa mood sẽn yi bɛoong zugu. Bãmb kʋɩtame tɩ b nan ka võ-b ye! 
Psalms129:7 Sẽn wʋrd-a yẽnda wã ka paamd tɩ pid a nug ye. Mo-sẽbdã ka tõe n paam mo-kill ye.» 
Psalms129:8 La so-loaadbã ka yete: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark zĩnd yãmb zut» ye. Bãmb leb n ka yeta: «Tõnd ningda yãmb bark ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr» ye 
Psalms130:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Mam bee zĩ-zulumsẽ n boond yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms130:2 Zu-soaba, wʋm-y m boaalã! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m se-yõkrã!" 
Psalms130:3 Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb sã n dag n tẽegdẽ tõnd kongrã, ãnda soab n na n põse?" 
Psalms130:4 La sugr bee yãmb nengẽ, tɩ nebã tõe n zoe yãmba." 
Psalms130:5 Mam maanda tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m tẽeda bãmb ne m sũur fãa. La mam tẽeda bãmb goamã." 
Psalms130:6 Mam maanda tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yɩɩd gũudb sẽn gũud zĩig yẽegre, n yɩɩd gũudb sẽn gũud be-vẽegre." 
Psalms130:7 Israyɛll nebã, maan-y tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, bãmb yaa nonglem soaba. La bãmb tara soay buud toay-toay n fãagdẽ." 
Psalms130:8 Yaa bãmb n na n fãag Israyɛll ne a kongrã buud fãa. 
Psalms131:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Yaa Davɩɩd n yɩɩle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wuk-m-meng ka be m sũurẽ ye. Mam ka tar tɩtaam gesg ye. Mam ka baood bõn-kãsems sẽn yɩɩd-ma, la m ka kẽed yɛl sẽn yɩɩd-m pʋgẽ ye." 
Psalms131:2 Mam gãnega m yam n zĩ sɩɩ, wa bi-sigdg sẽn be ne a ma. Mam yaa wa biig sẽn bas bĩisim." 
Psalms131:3 Israyɛll nebã, maan-y tẽeb ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, moasã la wakat sẽn kõn sa!" 
Psalms132:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y-yã a Davɩɩd yelle, tẽeg-y-yã a namsgã fãa yelle." 
Psalms132:2 A Davɩɩd wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yẽnda pʋlma a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã sẽn yaa pãn-kãseng soabã n yeele: 
Psalms132:3 «Mam ka na n kuil m yiri, mam ka na n tɩ gãand m gãagẽ," 
Psalms132:4 mam kõn bas tɩ gõeem yõk-ma, la m nin kõn tol n suusi," 
Psalms132:5 sã n ka m wa n paama zĩig Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, sã n ka m wa n paama roog a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã sẽn yaa pãn-kãseng soabã yĩng ye." 
Psalms132:6 Tõnd wʋmame tɩ b gomda, tɩ kaoolã koglgã paa Efrata. Tõnd tɩ yãnd-a-la Yaar tẽnga." 
Psalms132:7 D kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, n tɩ wõgemd bãmb nao-roagendgã taoore!" 
Psalms132:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yik-y-yã! Wa-y n kẽ-y y vʋʋsg zĩigẽ wã, yãmb ne y kaoolã koglgã sẽn wilgd yãmb pãngã!" 
Psalms132:9 Bɩ yãmb maan-kʋʋdbã yeelg tɩrlem, la bɩ y nin-nongdsã kaas ne sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms132:10 Yãmb tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd maasem yĩnga, bɩ y ra zãgs y nin-tũusdgã ye!" 
Psalms132:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽena ne a Davɩɩde, la b kõn lebs b noor poorẽ ye.» Bãmb yeela a Davɩɩd yaa: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yageng led foom f zaoorẽ wã." 
Psalms132:12 Fo kambã sã n sak n tũ mam kaoolã, ne kaset ning mam sẽn na n zãms bãmbã, bãmb kambã me na n wa zaoonda fo zaoorẽ wã wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga." 
Psalms132:13 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka Sɩyõ, n na n kɩt tɩ beenẽ yɩ b yiri.»" 
Psalms132:14 Bãmb yeelame: «Zĩ-kãngã na n yɩɩ mam vʋʋsg zĩig wakat fãa yĩnga. Mam na n zĩnda ka, bala, yaa ka la m data." 
Psalms132:15 Mam na n ninga Sɩyõ laogã barka, la m kɩt t'a nimbãan-nebã rɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms132:16 Mam na n yeelga a maan-kʋʋdbã ne fãagre, la a nin-nongdsã na n kaasa ne sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms132:17 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ rĩm sẽn tar pãng puk Sɩyõ, a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋka. Mam na n segla fɩtl mam nin-tũusdgã yĩnga." 
Psalms132:18 Mam na n yeelga yẽnda bɛɛbã yãnde, la yẽnda na n fõgna naam maanf sẽn pɩndã.»" 
Psalms133:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Yaa a Davɩɩd n yɩɩle. Ade, ba-biis sã n be ne taaba, yaa sõama, la a bee yamleoogo!" 
Psalms133:2 A yaa wa kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, b sẽn dɩk n sudgd maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Aarõ zugu, tɩ sodgd n tat a toɛɛngã, n sigd n tat a fuugã loore." 
Psalms133:3 A wẽnda wa Hɛrmo tãngã meenem sẽn sigd n tat Sɩyõ tãmsã zutu. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b barkã sigd Sɩyõ, la vɩɩm bee beenẽ wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga." 
Psalms134:1 Zeruzalɛm kẽnd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdbã fãa, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yãmb dãmb sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã yʋng fãa wã, pẽg-y bãmba!" 
Psalms134:2 Zẽk-y y nus n tees zĩ-sõngã, n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms134:3 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yĩngr la tẽng naandã zĩnd Sɩyõ n ning y zug barka! 
Psalms135:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã! Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdba, pẽg-y bãmba!" 
Psalms135:2 Yãmb dãmb sẽn be tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogẽ wã, pẽg-y bãmba!" 
Psalms135:3 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b pida ne sõmblem. Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y b yʋʋrã tɩ b yʋʋrã yaa noogo. 
Psalms135:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka a Zakoobe, tɩ Israyɛll lebg bãmb dẽnda." 
Psalms135:5 Mam mii hakɩɩk tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, tɩ tõnd Zu-soabã yɩɩda wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms135:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa, b maandame, sã n yaa saasẽ, wall dũniyã zugu, sã n yaa ko-kãsengẽ wã, wall zĩ-zulumsẽ wã." 
Psalms135:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩtd tɩ sawatã zẽkd n tat dũniyã zĩig fãa, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ sa-yãgb wat ne sa-koom, n kɩtdẽ tɩ sobg yit b sẽn dag n bĩng-a zĩig ningã." 
Psalms135:8 Bãmb n kʋ Ezɩpt tẽngã kom-dẽemsã, sẽn sɩng ne ninsaalb n tɩ tãag rũmsã." 
Psalms135:9 Ezɩpt nebã, bãmb tʋma bãn ne bõn-bãn yãmb sʋka, n sɩbga Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã fãa." 
Psalms135:10 Bãmb tõoga bu-zẽms wʋsgo, n kʋ rĩm-dãmb sẽn tar pãense." 
Psalms135:11 Yaa Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sɩhon, ne Basã-rãmbã rĩm a Ooge, la Kana soolem dĩm-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms135:12 La b rɩka b tẽmsã n kõ Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb nebã tɩ lebg b soolem. 
Psalms135:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yʋʋrã paada wakat fãa! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b na n tẽra yãmb yell zamaan woo zamaane!" 
Psalms135:14 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kao b nebã bʋʋdo, la b na n zoe b tʋmtʋmdbã nimbãanega." 
Psalms135:15 Bu-zẽmsã wẽn-naands maana ne wanzuri la sãnem, bãmb yaa ninsaalb nus tʋʋmã." 
Psalms135:16 Bãmb tara noore, la b ka gomd ye. B tara nini, la b ka ne ye." 
Psalms135:17 Bãmb tara tʋb la b ka wʋmd ye. Pemsem buud ka tol n yit b noorẽ wã ye. 
Psalms135:18 Sẽn naan-b bãmbã ne sẽn teeg-b bãmbã fãa na n yɩɩ wa bãmba. 
Psalms135:19 Israyɛll buudu, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! A Aarõ buudu, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms135:20 Leevi buudu, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, pẽg-y bãmba!" 
Psalms135:21 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgr sẽn yit Sɩyõ! Bãmb bee Zeruzalɛm! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms136:1 Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab bark b sõmblmã yĩnga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:2 Pʋʋs-y wẽnnaam-dãmb Wẽnnaamã barka, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:3 Pʋʋs-y zu-soben-dãmb Zu-soabã barka, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:4 Bãmb b yembr bal n maand bõn-bãn-kãsemse, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:5 Bãmb n naan saasẽ ne yam, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:6 Bãmb n yɛdg tẽn-gãongã koomã zugu, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:7 Bãmb n naan yĩngr vẽen-kãsemsã, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:8 Bãmb n naan wĩntoog t'a soog wĩndga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:9 Bãmb n naan kiuugã ne ãdsã tɩ b soog yʋngo, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:10 Bãmb kʋʋ Ezɩpt nebã kom-dẽemsã, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:11 Bãmb n yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽnga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:12 Bãmb tẽega b nugã n yiis bãmb ne kang sẽn tar pãnga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:13 Bãmb n kɩt tɩ rudum ko-kãsengã koom pasg zĩis a yiibu, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:14 Bãmb n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll kambã pɩʋʋg koomã n looge, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:15 Bãmb n luba Faarõ ne a tãb-biisã rudum ko-kãsengã pʋga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:16 Bãmb n yãag b nebã we-raoogã pʋga, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:17 Bãmb n kʋ rĩm-kãsemse, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:18 Bãmb n kʋ rĩm-dãmb sẽn tar pãense, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:19 Yaa Amoor-dãmbã rĩm a Sihon, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:20 Ne Basã tẽngã rĩm a Ooge, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:21 N dɩk b tẽmsã n kõ Israyɛll sẽn yaa bãmb meng nebã tɩ b sooge, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:22 B rɩka tẽn-bãmb n kõ b tʋmtʋmd a Israyɛll tɩ yɩ a pʋɩɩre, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:23 Tõnd sẽn wa n be d yembdã pʋgã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega tõnd yelle, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:24 Bãmb n fãag tõnd d bɛɛbã nusẽ, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:25 Bãmb n kõt bõn-vɩɩlɩ wã fãa rɩɩbo, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms136:26 Pʋʋs-y saasẽ Wẽnnaamã barka, bala, bãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa!" 
Psalms137:1 Tõnd dag n bee Babilond kʋɩlsã noore, la tõnd sẽn zĩnd beenẽ n tẽeg Sɩyõ tẽngã yellã, tõnd yãbame." 
Psalms137:2 Tõnd dag n yagenda d pendsã kʋɩlgã noor tɩɩsã zutu. 
Psalms137:3 La beenẽ, sẽn dag n kẽes-b tõnd yembdã yeela tõnd tɩ d yɩɩle. Tõnd namsdbã yeelame tɩ d yɩɩl sũ-noog yɩɩla. B yeelame: «Yɩɩl-y Sɩyõ yɩɩl n kõ-do.»" 
Psalms137:4 Tõnd na n yɩ a wãn n tɩ be sãand weoogo, la d yɩɩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩla?" 
Psalms137:5 Zeruzalɛm, mam sã n yĩm fo yelle, bɩ mam dɩtg nugã ki." 
Psalms137:6 Zeruzalɛm, mam sã n yĩm fo yelle, la m sã n ka maan sũ-noog ne foom n yɩɩd bũmb fãa, bɩ m zelemdã tabend m dagsendakã." 
Psalms137:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y Edom nebã yelle, bala, Zeruzalɛm sãoongã daare, bãmb dag n yetame: «Kõog-y-yã-a, kõog-y tẽngã ne a yẽbgrã zãnga!" 
Psalms137:8 Babilond tẽn-neere, b na n sãama foom. Bark bee neb nins sẽn lebs foom wẽng ning fo sẽn maan tõndã zutu!" 
Psalms137:9 Bark bee neb nins sẽn na n yõg fo kom-bãoonegã n fabs pĩig zugã zutu!» 
Psalms138:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb bark ne m sũur fãa. Mam na n yɩɩl n pẽga yãmb wẽnnam-dãmbã taoore." 
Psalms138:2 Mam na n wõgemd n teesa y ro-sõngã, n pʋʋs yãmb bark y nonglmã ne y sɩdã yĩnga. Bala, yãmb pidsa y goamã n yɩɩd tõnd sẽn dag n wʋmd tɩ b gomdã." 
Psalms138:3 Mam sẽn bool yãmbã, y leok-m lame, yãmb kenga mam pɛlga, n paas-m pãnga." 
Psalms138:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, dũniyã rĩm-dãmb sã n wʋm yãmb noorã goamã, b na n pẽga yãmba." 
Psalms138:5 Bãmb na n yɩɩl n goma Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmã yelle, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã yaa kãsenga." 
Psalms138:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee hal yĩngri, la b nee sik-m-mens rãmbã. Bãmb bee yɩɩga, la b mii wuk-m-mens rãmbã n bake." 
Psalms138:7 Baa mam sã n kẽnd yel-pakr pʋga, yãmb n kõt maam vɩɩm. Mam bɛɛbã sũ-yikr pʋga, y tẽegda y nugu, yãmb tẽegda y nug-rɩtg n fãag maam." 
Psalms138:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtdame tɩ bũmb fãa baas neer mam yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nonglmã paada wakat fãa! Ra-y bas-y neb nins yãmb meng nus sẽn naanã ye!"
