Psalms139:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb feesda maam, yãmb mii maam." 
Psalms139:2 Yãmb mii mam zĩndg la m yikr wakate, yãmb reng n bãnga mam tagsgã tɩ ket n zãra." 
Psalms139:3 Yãmb feesda maam m kẽnd wakate, la m sẽn gãe n vʋʋsdẽ wakate. Yãmb mii mam manesmã fãa." 
Psalms139:4 Sẽn deng tɩ gomd yi mam noorẽ, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoe n bãng-a-la fãa." 
Psalms139:5 Yãmb gũbgda maam poorẽ la taoore, la yãmb nug bee mam zugu." 
Psalms139:6 Yãmb sẽn mi maam zãng a woto wã yaa bõn-bãnd ne maam, a yaa kãseng n yɩɩd mam sẽn tõe n wʋm a võore." 
Psalms139:7 Mam na n kẽnga yɛɛnẽ n zãag ne yãmba? Mam na n zoe n kẽe yɛɛnẽ n põs yãmba? 
Psalms139:8 Baa mam sã n dʋ saasẽ, yãmb bee beenẽ. Ba mam sã n tɩʋ m gãagã kɩɩm-kulgu, yãmb leb n bee be." 
Psalms139:9 Ba mam sã n deeg zĩ-yẽegr pɩgs n yɩk n kẽng ko-kãsengã rʋʋnde," 
Psalms139:10 yãmb nug tɛta maam beenẽ me, la y nug-rɩtg gãta maam." 
Psalms139:11 Mam sã n yeel likã t'a wa lill maam, yʋngã lebgda vẽenem n gũbg maam." 
Psalms139:12 Baoosgo, likã ka lik ne yãmb ye, yʋngã yãgda wa wĩntoogo, la lik yaa wa vẽenem yãmb taoore." 
Psalms139:13 Yãmb n naan maam wa m sẽn yalã, yãmb n yag maam m ma pʋgẽ." 
Psalms139:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam pʋʋsda yãmb barka, bala, yãmb naana maam tɩ m tar ra-sãnde, yãmb tʋʋmã yaa bõn-bãna, mam mii bõn-kãng sõama." 
Psalms139:15 Mam yĩngã ka tar bũmb sẽn solg ne yãmb ye. Yãmb naana maam zĩ-soalgdgẽ. Yãmb wʋga maam tẽn-gãongã zĩ-zulumsẽ wã. 
Psalms139:16 Mam sẽn wa n nan ka tar naande, yãmb dag n nee maam. Mam dasmã fãa rag n zoe n gʋlsa yãmb sebrẽ wã tɩ b ba a yembr dag n nan ka beẽ ye." 
Psalms139:17 Mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb tagsdã võor wʋmb yaa toog wʋsg ne maam. Bãmb sõorã sɩd yaa wʋsgo." 
Psalms139:18 Mam sã n na n sõd-ba, b sõorã yɩɩda bĩisrã. Mam sã n gũs n neke, m ket n bee ne yãmba." 
Psalms139:19 Mam Wẽnnaam, m datẽ lame tɩ y sãam nin-wẽnsã! Nin-kʋʋdba, zãag-y ne maam!" 
Psalms139:20 Mam Wẽnnaam, nin-wẽnsã gomda yãmb yell ne sɩlem-wẽnga, yãmb bɛɛbã sã n boond yãmb yʋʋrã, yaa ne zãmbo!" 
Psalms139:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam ka tõe n ka kisg sẽn kis-b yãmbã ye. Mam yam ka tõe n ka yi neb nins sẽn zabd-b ne yãmbã ye." 
Psalms139:22 Mam tolg n kis-b lame. Bãmb tolg n yaa mam bɛɛba. 
Psalms139:23 Mam Wẽnnaam, fees-y maam n bãng m sũ-zulmã. Fees-y maam n bãng m tagsgã." 
Psalms139:24 Ges-y tɩ mam sã n dɩka so-wẽnga, bɩ y tall maam sor sẽn paad wakat sẽn ka sɛtã zugu!" 
Psalms140:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle, yɩɩlã naab yĩnga." 
Psalms140:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y maam nin-wẽnsã nugẽ. Gũ-y maam ne nen-keglem soaba." 
Psalms140:3 Nin-bãmb saagda saag-wẽns b sũyã pʋse, bãmb baooda zabr daar fãa." 
Psalms140:4 Bãmb sɩlsda b zɛlmã wa wiisi, bãmb noyã pida ne põeer zẽnem." 
Psalms140:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y maam nin-toaag nugẽ. Gũ-y maam ne nen-keglem soaba! Bãmb baoodame n dat n lub maam!" 
Psalms140:6 Wuk-m-mens rãmbã bẽta maam, bãmb gãnega wĩy la gãmbr sorã kɩrenga. Bãmb dɩgla bẽdg mam yĩnga." 
Psalms140:7 La mam yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam!» Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m se-yõkrã!" 
Psalms140:8 Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa pãng sẽn fãagd maam. Zabr sã n yik daare, yãmb n lilld maam." 
Psalms140:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, da-y kõ-y nin-wẽnsã b sẽn datã ye. Da-y bas-y tɩ b sẽn set ne taabã pids tɩ b wa zẽkd b mens ye." 
Psalms140:10 Kɩt-y tɩ nin-wẽnsã sẽn gũbg maamã no-beed lʋɩ b mens zutu. 
Psalms140:11 Bɩ bug-saal rʋʋg b zutu! Bɩ b kɩt tɩ b lʋɩ bugmẽ, bɩ b lʋɩ bog-zulung pʋg n da tõog n leb n yi ye." 
Psalms140:12 Bɩ tẽn-kãn-nedã ra paam zĩig tẽng zug ye. Wẽngã na n pʋga nen-keglem soab n ka bas ye. 
Psalms140:13 Mam miime tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n zabd n sõngd naong soaba, la bãmb n kaood nimbãan-ned bʋʋd tɩrga." 
Psalms140:14 N-yẽe! Nin-tɩrsã na n pʋʋsa yãmb barka, Nin-tɩrsã na n zĩnda ne yãmba." 
Psalms141:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam boonda yãmba. Wa-y tao-tao n wa sõng-ma! Kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg m sẽn boond yãmba!" 
Psalms141:2 Bɩ m pʋʋsgã zẽk wa wisd n ta y nengẽ. Bɩ m nusã sẽn zẽk n tees yãmbã yɩ wa zaabr maoongo! 
Psalms141:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, gũ-y mam noorã. Gũ-y mam no-bɩmsã." 
Psalms141:4 Da bas-y tɩ m sũurã tags wẽng ye. Da sak-y tɩ m naag nin-wẽnsã n tʋm tʋʋm-wẽns ye. Da bas-y tɩ m naag bãmb n maan b sẽn datã ye. 
Psalms141:5 Nin-tɩrg sã n sɩbg maam, a wilga maam a nonglem. A sã n keoog maam, yaa bark m yĩnga. M ka na n tõdg ye. Mam na n pʋʋsame n kɩɩs nin-wẽnsã tʋʋmã." 
Psalms141:6 B na n dɩka b nanambsã n lob pĩig kugr zugu, la nin-wẽnsã na n kelga mam goamã, bala, b yaa noogo." 
Psalms141:7 Wa b sẽn gudgd tẽn-gãongã t'a pusd to-to wã, woto me, tõnd kõabã na n sãeega kɩɩm-kulg noorẽ." 
Psalms141:8 Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb la m geta. Mam zĩ-soalgdg yaa yãmb nengẽ. Da bas-y maam tɩ m ki ye!" 
Psalms141:9 Fãag-y maam ne bẽdg ning b sẽn bẽt maamã, la y fãag-m ne tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã tãoogã!" 
Psalms141:10 Bɩ nin-wẽnsã bẽdg wẽneg n yõk-b tɩ mam paam n põse. 
Psalms142:1 A Davɩɩd sũur gomde. Yaa wakat ning a sẽn wa n be tãngã bokẽ wã. Yaa pʋʋsgo. 
Psalms142:2 Mam zẽkda m koɛɛg n boond Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam zẽkda m koɛɛg bãmb taoor n yõkd b sɛɛga." 
Psalms142:3 Mam bee bãmb taoor n wilgd m kosgã, bãmb taoor la m togsd m yel-pakrã." 
Psalms142:4 Mam daoodã sã n wa n sɛ zãnga, yãmb a Wẽnnaam mii mam sore. Bɛɛbã rɩgla bẽdg mam so-tũudgã zugu." 
Psalms142:5 Wẽneg-y n ges-y mam nug-rɩtgo, ned ka be sẽn yet t'a mii maam ye. Mam ka leb n tar solgr zĩig ye. Ned baa a yembr toog ka be ne mam vɩɩmã ye." 
Psalms142:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam kelemd n boonda yãmba. Mam yetame: «Yãmb la mam zĩ-soalgdga, dũniyã zug ka, ninsaalb sʋka, yãmb la m fãa-fãa.»" 
Psalms142:7 Wʋm-y mam kɛlengã! Bala, mam pãngã sɛɛ zãnga. Fãag-y maam ne sẽn digd-b maamã. Bala, b pãngã yɩɩda maam." 
Psalms142:8 Yiis-y maam bi-bees roogẽ, tɩ mam tõe n pʋʋs yãmb barka. Nin-tɩrsã na n wa gũbga maam, yãmb sẽn maan maam neerã yĩnga." 
Psalms143:1 A Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wʋm-y mam pʋʋsgã, la y kɩll y tʋbr n kelg m se-yõkrã! Bɩ y leok maam y pʋ-peelmã ne y tɩrlmã pʋga." 
Psalms143:2 Bɩ y ra bʋ ne y tʋmtʋmdã ye. Bala, nin-vɩɩsã sʋka, ned ba a yembr ka be n yaa tɩrg yãmb nifẽ ye." 
Psalms143:3 Bɛyã pʋgd n tabda maam, n namsd mam vɩɩmã. Yẽnda kẽesa maam lik bida pʋga, wa neb nins sẽn ki daar zãrã." 
Psalms143:4 Mam daoodã sɛɛ zãnga. Mam gĩinã maaga zãnga. 
Psalms143:5 Mam tẽra kʋdem-wẽndẽ yelle, mam leb n gomda yãmb tʋʋmã yelle, mam tagsda yãmb nus tʋʋmã yelle." 
Psalms143:6 Mam zẽkda m nus n teesd yãmba. Mam baooda yãmb wa tẽn-koɛɛng sẽn dat koom. 
Psalms143:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, leok-y maam tao-tao, mam sɩɩgã yɛɛme. Da solg-y y nengã ne maam ye. Sã n ka rẽ, mam na n lebga wa neb nins sẽn sigd yaoogẽ wã." 
Psalms143:8 Kɩt-y tɩ m wʋm yãmb nonglem koɛɛgã yibeoog fãa! Bala, mam dɩka m teegrã n teeg yãmba. Kɩt-y tɩ m bãng sor ning m sẽn tog n dɩke. Bala, mam geta yãmba." 
Psalms143:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y maam m bɛɛbã nugẽ! Mam soondeda yãmb nengẽ." 
Psalms143:10 Zãms-y maam tɩ m maan yãmb daabo. Bala, yaa yãmb la mam Wẽnnaam. Bɩ yãmb maan-neer sɩɩgã tɛ maam so-sõng zugu." 
Psalms143:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga, bɩ y kõ-m vɩɩm! Yãmb tɩrlmã yĩnga, bɩ y yiis maam yel-pakrã pʋga!" 
Psalms143:12 Yãmb nonglmã yĩnga, bɩ y kɩt tɩ m bɛɛbã noy mume. Bɩ y menes mam zabd-n-taasã zãnga, bala, mam yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmda." 
Psalms144:1 Yaa a Davɩɩd yɩɩlle. Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam pĩigã paam pẽgre. Bãmb n zãmsd maam zabr sẽn zabd to-to, la b segend mam nus zabr yĩnga." 
Psalms144:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam maan-neer soaba. Bãmb yaa mam pãng zĩiga, la m zĩ-soalgdga, la m fãagda. Bãmb yaa mam gãongo, la m zĩ-lilldga. Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ nebã sakd maam!" 
Psalms144:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ninsaal yaa bõe tɩ yãmb nand-a? Ninsaal yaa ãnda tɩ yãmb get a yelle?" 
Psalms144:4 Ninsaal wẽnda rʋk waolg bala, la a yʋʋmã wẽnda maasem sẽn loogda." 
Psalms144:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y saasã n sigi! Sɩɩs-y tãmsã tɩ bug-zõos yi b pʋsẽ!" 
Psalms144:6 Bɩ y tʋm sa-tãs n sãeeg-ba! Tão-y y pɛɛmã n zũndg-ba! 
Psalms144:7 Zĩnd-y yĩngr n tẽeg y nugã, n fãag-ma, fãag-y-m ko-kãsemsã pʋga, fãag-y maam bu-zẽmsã nugẽ." 
Psalms144:8 Bala, b noyã yagda zĩrẽ, la b nug-rɩtg pida ne zãmbo." 
Psalms144:9 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n yɩɩla yɩɩn-paalg yãmb yĩnga. Mam na n wãaga ruudg sẽn tar sus piig yãmb yĩnga." 
Psalms144:10 Yãmb a Wẽnnaam n kõt rĩm-dãmb tõogre. Yãmb n sõngd y tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd t'a põs sãoong zabr sʋʋga. 
Psalms144:11 Yols-y maam, la y fãag-m bu-zẽmsã nugẽ, bala, b noyã yagda zĩrẽ, la b nug-rɩtg pida ne zãmbo." 
Psalms144:12 Tõnd kom-dibli wã wẽnda tɩ-poal sẽn yi n bɩtẽ. Tõnd kom-pugli wã neermã wẽnda tãn-met sẽn nags na-yir ra-lugd-bɩlma. 
Psalms144:13 Tõnd bao wã pida ne bõn-koaadl buud fãa. Tõnd rũm-bãoonegã fɩɩgd n lebgda tusa, b fɩɩgd n lebgda tus piig-piig tõnd wetã pʋse." 
Psalms144:14 Tõnd niigã tara pʋse. Rũm-kũum wall rũng sẽn fabd ka be be ye. Sũ-sãang kɛleng ka be tõnd sõasg zĩigẽ ye! 
Psalms144:15 Bark bee neb nins sẽn paam bõn-kãensã zutu! Bark bee neb nins sẽn paam tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa b Wẽnnaamã zutu! 
Psalms145:1 Mam Wẽnnaam, mam na n waooga yãmba, tɩ yãmb n yaa mam dĩma. Mam na n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã wakat fãa." 
Psalms145:2 Mam na n pẽga yãmb n ka bas ye. Mam na n waooga yãmb yʋʋrã wakat fãa. 
Psalms145:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, la b zemsame tɩ reeg pẽgrã fãa. Ned ka tõe n bãng bãmb kaosengã tɛk ye." 
Psalms145:4 Bɩ zamaan woo zamaan nebã pẽg yãmb tʋʋmã, bɩ b moon yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã." 
Psalms145:5 Mam na n tagsa yãmb bõn-bãnã yelle, ne yãmb ziirã sẽn pɩndã yelle." 
Psalms145:6 B na n goma yãmb pãn-kãsengã yelle, la mam na n moona yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã." 
Psalms145:7 B na n tẽega yãmb tʋʋm-sõmyã yelle, n moon-ba, la b moon yãmb tɩrlmã yelle." 
Psalms145:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõmblem-soaba, la nimbãan-zoɛta, bãmb yaa sũ-mar soaba, la nonglem-kãseng soaba." 
Psalms145:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõmblem soab nebã fãa yĩnga, la b nimbãan-zoeerã yãagda bãmb tʋʋmã fãa." 
Psalms145:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb tʋʋmã fãa na n pẽga yãmba, la sẽn tũud-b yãmbã na n pẽga yãmba." 
Psalms145:11 Bãmb na n togsa yãmb naamã ziiri, la b na n goma y pãn-kãsengã yelle," 
Psalms145:12 n kɩt tɩ ninsaalb bãng yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã, ne yãmb naamã ziir sẽn yaa kãsengã." 
Psalms145:13 Yãmb naamã ka tar sɛɛb ye, la yãmb n so zamaan-dãmbã fãa." 
Psalms145:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kokda sẽn lʋɩtbã, la b yikd neb nins pãng sẽn sɛ wã." 
Psalms145:15 Bãmb fãa wẽnemd n geta yãmb n teeg yãmba, n gũudẽ tɩ y kõ-b rɩɩb wa sẽn zems a wakate." 
Psalms145:16 Yãmb sã n puk y nugã, sẽn vɩ-bã fãa paamda b sẽn dat tɩ seke." 
Psalms145:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa tɩrlem soab b sẽn maandã fãa pʋga, la b yaa sõmblem soab b tʋʋmã fãa pʋga." 
Psalms145:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab pẽe ne neb nins sẽn boond bãmbã, b pẽe neb nins sẽn boond bãmb ne sɩdã." 
Psalms145:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab pidsda sẽn zoet-b bãmbã ratem. B sã n bool-b n kos sõngre, bãmb wʋmdame n wa sõng-ba." 
Psalms145:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũuda neb nins sẽn nong bãmbã, la b sãamda nin-wẽnsã zãnga." 
Psalms145:21 Bɩ mam noorã waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bɩ bõn-vɩɩsã fãa pẽg bãmb yʋ-sõngã. 
Psalms146:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms146:2 Mam vɩɩmã tɛka, mam na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam sã n ket n vɩ, mam na n yɩɩl n waooga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Psalms146:3 Da rɩk-y y teegrã n teeg nanambs ye. Da teeg-y ninsaalbã sẽn ka tõe n fãagã ye. 
Psalms146:4 Bãmb vɩɩmã loogdame, b lebsda tẽngã a tom, la badaar bala, b saagrã tũud-b lame n menem." 
Psalms146:5 Bark bee ned ning sẽn paam t'a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã yaa a sõangdã zugu. Sẽn teeg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b yaa a Wẽnnaam tara barka. 
Psalms146:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naan yĩngr la tẽnga, la b naan ko-kãsengã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgã. Bãmb maanda sɩd wakat fãa!" 
Psalms146:7 Bãmb bʋʋda sẽn namsdbã bʋʋd tɩrga. Bãmb n kõt kom sẽn tar-b rãmbã rɩɩbo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt yembs lohorem. 
Psalms146:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n pugsd zoens nini. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n doogd sẽn kɩll-bã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga nin-tɩrsã. 
Psalms146:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gũud sãamba. Bãmb sõngda kɩɩb ne pʋg-kõore, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ nin-wẽns saagr kẽed moogo." 
Psalms146:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n dɩɩ naam wakat fãa. Sɩyõ nebã, bãmb yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam zamaan woo zamaane! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms147:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Bala, yaa sõama tɩ d yɩɩl n pẽg d Wẽnnaamã, a yaa noogo, la neere, tɩ d pẽg bãmba." 
Psalms147:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebs n meta Zeruzalɛm. B lebs n tigimda Israyɛll neb nins sẽn dag n sãeegã. 
Psalms147:3 Bãmb belsda sũ-sãang rãmbã, la b tɩpd b poglgã." 
Psalms147:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara ãdsã sõore, la b mii ãdg fãa ne a yʋʋre." 
Psalms147:5 Tõnd Zu-soabã yaa kãsenga, n tar pãn-kãsenga, bãmb bãngrã ka tar tɛk ye." 
Psalms147:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽkda naong rãmba, la b sikda nin-wẽnsã n tãag tẽnga." 
Psalms147:7 Pʋd-y yɩɩll n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, Wẽ-y pɛndg n pẽg tõnd Wẽnnaamã!" 
Psalms147:8 Bãmb n lud sa-gãongã ne sawato, bãmb n segend saag tẽn-gãongã yĩnga. Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ mood yit tãms zutu." 
Psalms147:9 Bãmb n kõt rũmsã b rɩɩbo, la gãabg kamb sã n kelme, bãmb kõt-b-la rɩɩbo." 
Psalms147:10 Ka wed-moaag pãng n noogd bãmb sũuri, la ka ninsaal yãoog pãng n kõt-b sũ-noog ye." 
Psalms147:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur nooma ne sẽn zoet-b bãmbã, la ne neb nins sẽn maand tẽeb ne bãmb nonglmã." 
Psalms147:12 Zeruzalɛm, kils Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Sɩyõ, pẽg f Wẽnnaamã!" 
Psalms147:13 Bala, b paasda fo kʋɩlemsã kʋɩlen-kuyã pãnga. B ningda kambã sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã barka." 
Psalms147:14 Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd fo soolmã pʋga. Bãmb n kõt foom bõn-koaadl tɩ seke. 
Psalms147:15 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b noorã saag dũniyã gilli. Bãmb gomdã saaga ne tʋʋlem. 
Psalms147:16 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ neez rʋʋg wa pe-kõbdo, bãmb yɛdga meenem wa tompeglem." 
Psalms147:17 Bãmb fẽrgda b sapɩlem-zeremse. Ãnda soab n tõe n yals bãmb waoodẽ wã? 
Psalms147:18 Bãmb tʋmda b gomdã t'a yẽneg-ba. Bãmb sã n kɩt tɩ sebgã yiki, koomã zoetame." 
Psalms147:19 Bãmb vẽnega b goamã ne a Zakoobe, la b vẽneg b noyã ne b no-tũudsã ne Israyɛlle." 
Psalms147:20 Bãmb ka maan bũmb a woto n kõ buud a taabã fãa ba a yembr ye. Bu-bãmb ka mi bãmb no-tũudsã ye. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms148:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Zĩnd-y saasẽ n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pa-y yĩngr n pẽg bãmba! 
Psalms148:2 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa bãmb malegsã, pẽg-y bãmba! Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa bãmb tãb-biisã, pẽg-y bãmba!" 
Psalms148:3 Bɩ wĩntoogã ne kiuugã pẽg bãmba! Bɩ ãdsã fãa sẽn kõt vẽneemã pẽg bãmba! 
Psalms148:4 Bɩ sẽn be-b hal saasẽ-saasẽ wã pẽg bãmba, la bɩ koomã sẽn be sa-gãongã yĩngrã, pẽg bãmba!" 
Psalms148:5 Bɩ bãmb fãa pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã! Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome, n naan bãmba." 
Psalms148:6 Bãmb vigl-b-la wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga. Bãmb vigla noor sẽn paad wakat fãa. 
Psalms148:7 Tẽng zug rãmba, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bɩ koom pʋgẽ parwẽnã, ne zĩ-zulumsã fãa pẽg bãmba." 
Psalms148:8 Bugum ne sapɩlem, la neez ne wulgu, foom a sobg sẽn sakd bãmb noore," 
Psalms148:9 tãmse, yãmb a kunkubã fãa, tɩɩs sẽn womd biisi, yãmb a sɛɛdr tɩɩse," 
Psalms148:10 rũmsi, yãmb a we-rũmsã fãa, bõn-vuudsi, liuuli," 
Psalms148:11 dũniyã nanambse, ninsaalbã fãa, na-biisi, dũniyã bʋ-kaoodb gilli," 
Psalms148:12 kom-bɩɩs ne pʋg-sadba, nin-kẽemba, kom-bãoonego," 
Psalms148:13 pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã! Bala, bãmb yʋʋrã bal n yaa kãsenga. Bãmb yʋʋrã ziir buiida yĩngr la tẽnga." 
Psalms148:14 Bãmb paasa b nebã pãnga, tɩ yaa pẽgr bãmb nin-nongdsã fãa yĩnga, la Israyɛll sẽn yaa buud ning sẽn pẽ bãmbã yĩnga! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Psalms149:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga! Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab bãmb nin-nongdsã nebã sʋka! 
Psalms149:2 Bɩ Israyɛll nebã maan sũ-noog b naandã yĩnga! Bɩ Sɩyõ kom-dibli wã kɩdem b rĩmã yĩnga! 
Psalms149:3 Bɩ b sao n pẽg bãmb yʋʋrã. Bɩ b wẽ gãngãoogo, la b wẽ pɛndg n pẽg bãmba!" 
Psalms149:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur nooma ne b nebã. Bãmb fãaga naong rãmbã, n waoog-ba." 
Psalms149:5 Bɩ Wẽnnaam nin-nongdsã kɩdem n waoog-ba. Baa b sã n wa be b gãasẽ, bɩ b kaas ne sũ-noogo!" 
Psalms149:6 Bãmb noyã pida ne Wẽnnaam pẽgre, tɩ zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiib be bãmb nugẽ." 
Psalms149:7 Bãmb dat n doka b sũur ne bu-zẽmsã, la b sɩbg buud toay-toayã," 
Psalms149:8 n sẽb b rĩm-dãmbã ne bãense, la b balg b nin-kãsemsã ne kutu," 
Psalms149:9 n kɩt tɩ b reeg sɩbgr ning sẽn dag n gʋls b yĩngã! Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ Wẽnnaam nin-nongdsã fãa zu-zẽkre. Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Psalms150:1 Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pẽg-y Wẽnnaam b ro-sõngã pʋga! Pẽg-y bãmb sa-gãongã sẽn be yĩngrã pʋga, zĩig ning bãmb pãngã sẽn beẽ wã!" 
Psalms150:2 Pẽg-y bãmb b tʋʋm-kãsemsã yĩnga! Pẽg-y bãmb wa sẽn zems b kãosengã! 
Psalms150:3 Peeb-y baorg n pẽg bãmba! Pẽg-y bãmb ne wɩɩga, la ruudga, ne pɛndga!" 
Psalms150:4 Wẽ-y gãngãoogo, la y sao n pẽg bãmba! Pẽg-y bãmb ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi, la ne meenem!" 
Psalms150:5 Pẽg-y bãmb ne kɛm sẽn yaa noogo! Pẽg-y bãmb ne waag sẽn tar bʋr-noogo! 
Psalms150:6 Bɩ bũmb nins fãa sẽn vʋʋsd ne yõorã pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! 
Proverbs1:1 A Davɩɩd biig a Salmo sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã yel-bũna. 
Proverbs1:2 Yel-bõn-kãensã yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ninsaal tõe n paam yam, la remsgo, n tõog n wʋm yam goam võore." 
Proverbs1:3 La a paam yam vẽnegr zãmsg sẽn yaa: zemsgo, sɩda, la tɩrlem." 
Proverbs1:4 La sẽn na n yɩl n kõ zɩtbã minim, la kom-bɩɩsã yam la bãngre." 
Proverbs1:5 Yam soab sã n kelge, a na paam yam n paase, la sẽn tar-a bãngr me sã n kelge, a na tõog n tɛ neb a taaba." 
Proverbs1:6 La a tõog n wʋm yel-bũnã ne yel-soalmã võyã, la yam dãmbã goamã ne b yel-solgdsã." 
Proverbs1:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees yaa bãngr sɩngre. La yalembã kisa yam la remsgo. 
Proverbs1:8 M biiga, sak f ba remsgo, la f ra kɩɩs f ma zãmsg ye." 
Proverbs1:9 Bãmb na n yɩɩ maanf sẽn yaa neer sẽn be f zugẽ, la kĩndi sẽn be f loorẽ." 
Proverbs1:10 M biiga, yel-wẽn-maandb sã n dat n belg foom tɩ f maan wẽnga, bɩ f ra sak ye." 
Proverbs1:11 Bãmb sã n yeel foom: «Wa tɩ d bao zĩig n soond n paam ned zɩɩm n daage. Wa tɩ d bẽd neb sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yell zaalem yĩng bala," 
Proverbs1:12 n vel bãmb vɩɩs wa kɩɩm-kulg sẽn vend kũum to-to wã. D vel-b mum wa neb sẽn sigd yaoogẽ. 
Proverbs1:13 Woto, tõnd na n paama laog buud toor-toore, n pids d dotã ne paoongo." 
Proverbs1:14 Bɩ f wa tɩ fo me na n paama f pʋɩɩr ne tõndo, La d laogã na n naaga taab zĩ-yende.»" 
Proverbs1:15 M biiga, ra tũ bãmb ye, zãag f meng ne sor ning nin-bãmbã sẽn tũudã." 
Proverbs1:16 Bala, bãmb zoetame n na n tɩ maan wẽnga, la bãmb yãgd n na n tɩ raaga zɩɩm." 
Proverbs1:17 Bõn-yɩgdr kõn yã tãoog bẽdb tɩ leb n yõk-a ye. 
Proverbs1:18 La nin-bãmbã wẽnegd n bẽta b mense, n daagd b mens zɩɩm." 
Proverbs1:19 Fãad yel-manesem yaa a woto. Yẽnda bẽta a menga, la a vɩɩmã na n sãamame." 
Proverbs1:20 Yam bee soay zut n kelemdẽ, n zẽkda a koɛɛg n gomd daasẽ." 
Proverbs1:21 La a bee kʋʋng sʋk n zẽkd a koɛɛg n kelemdẽ, la a be tẽngã noor n yetẽ:" 
Proverbs1:22 «Zɩtba, yãmb na n pa y zɩɩlmã pʋgẽ hal tɩ ta dabʋre? La yãmb a nin-paoogdbã, y na n kell n paooga y taab hal tɩ ta dabʋre? La yãmb a yalembã, dabʋr la y na n bao bãngre?" 
Proverbs1:23 Reeg-y m saglsã, la m na pʋdg m sɩɩgã y zutu, n kɩt tɩ y bãng m goamã." 
Proverbs1:24 Mam sẽn bool yãmb tɩ y zãgsã yĩnga, la m tud m nug tɩ ned ba a yembr ka tol n gesã," 
Proverbs1:25 la y sẽn zãgs m saglsã, n ka geelg m keoogrã baa bilfã," 
Proverbs1:26 yãmb me sã n wa n be toog pʋgẽ, mam me na n la-y lame. La rabeem sã n wa yõk-y tɩ y rigda, mam na n yaal-y lame." 
Proverbs1:27 Rabeemã sã n wa kẽ yãmb wa saag sebgo, tɩ sãoongã wa y zut wa sɩlmande, yel-pakrã ne sũ-sãangã sã n wa wa y zutu," 
Proverbs1:28 wakat-kãnga, y na n boola maam, la m ka na n leok-y ye. Y na n bao maam la y ka na n yãnd-m ye." 
Proverbs1:29 Bala, yãmb kisga bãngre, la yãmb ka yãk yam n na n zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
Proverbs1:30 Yãmb sẽn dag n ka reeg m saglsã, la y sẽn kisg m keoogrã fãa wã yĩngã," 
Proverbs1:31 y na n dɩ y tʋʋmã biisi, la y na n tɩga ne y mens saglse." 
Proverbs1:32 Bala, zɩt kõn deeg yellã n na n kʋ-a, la yalembã sẽn ka tagsdã n menesd-ba." 
Proverbs1:33 La sẽn kelgd-a maam zĩi ne bãane. Yẽnda na n vɩɩmda ne bãane, n ka tol n yɛɛsdẽ tɩ yel-beed na n wa paam-a ye.»" 
Proverbs2:1 M biiga, fo sã n sak n deeg mam goamã, la f sã n bĩng m tõodã f sũurẽ," 
Proverbs2:2 fo sã n yok f tʋbr n kelg yam zãmsgã neere, la f sak n bao tɩ wʋm a võore," 
Proverbs2:3 n yẽe! Fo sã n bao bãngre, la fo sã n zẽk f koɛɛg n bao yam-sõngo," 
Proverbs2:4 fo sã n bao-a wa f sẽn baood wanzuri to-to wã, la f sã n maag f yĩng n bao-a wa f sẽn baood arzegsã," 
Proverbs2:5 woto, f na wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees võore, la f bãng Wẽnnaam." 
Proverbs2:6 Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt yam, la bãngr ne yam-sõng yita bãmb noorẽ." 
Proverbs2:7 Bãmb tara sõngr nin-tɩrsã yĩnga. La bãmb yaa gãong burkĩmbã yĩnga. 
Proverbs2:8 Bãmb kogenda neb nins sẽn kẽnd zemsgã soay zutã, la b gũud pʋ-peelem dãmbã." 
Proverbs2:9 Woto la f na n bãng zemsgo, ne sɩd la tɩrlem võore, sẽn dat n togs tɩ soay nins fãa sẽn dabd naar zĩigẽ wã." 
Proverbs2:10 Bala, fo na n paama yam, la bãngrã na n kõo foom sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs2:11 Tagsgã na n kogla foom, la bãngrã na n gũ-f-lame," 
Proverbs2:12 n fãag foom so-wẽngã zugu, la ne ned ning sẽn gomd gom-yoodo," 
Proverbs2:13 la ne neb nins sẽn basd-b tɩrlem soayã, n kẽnd soay sẽn yaa lik pʋgẽ wã." 
Proverbs2:14 Nin-bãmb maanda sũ-noog ne wẽngã maanego, la b kɩdemd b tʋʋm-yoodã maaneg yĩnga." 
Proverbs2:15 Nin-bãmb yel-manesmã yaa kɛga, la b tʋʋmã fãa yaa goalmã." 
Proverbs2:16 Rẽndã n na n fãag foom ne pʋg-yoodre, la a fãag-f ne pʋg-sãang sẽn gomd no-noom goamã." 
Proverbs2:17 Sẽn bas-a a bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ sɩdã, la a yĩm yẽnda ne a Wẽnnaamã kaoolã." 
Proverbs2:18 Ade, yẽnda yel-manesmã rabda ne-a kũum zĩigẽ, la a soayã tar-a lame n dabd kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Proverbs2:19 Neb nins fãa sẽn kẽnd-b yẽnda nengẽ wã ka lebgd ye. Bãmb ka leb n tõe n yãnd vɩɩm sor n tũ ye. 
Proverbs2:20 Dẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ f rɩk nin-sõamyã mamsgo, la f rɩk nin-tɩrsã mamsgo." 
Proverbs2:21 Bala, yaa nin-tɩrsã n na n vɩɩmd dũni zugu, La yaa burkĩmbã n na n pa be n vɩɩmde." 
Proverbs2:22 B na n menesa nin-wẽnsã tẽngã pʋga. La b võ zãmb dãmbã wa mood n yiis tẽngã. 
Proverbs3:1 M biiga, ra yĩm m zãmsgã ye, tall m noyã neer f sũur pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs3:2 Tɩ woto n na n kõ-f yõ-woko, n kɩt tɩ f vɩɩmd n zĩnd ne bãane." 
Proverbs3:3 Ra sak n bas maan-sɩd la pʋ-peelem ye, pid bãmb f loorẽ, la f gʋls bãmb f sũur pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs3:4 Woto, Wẽnnaam ne nebã na n pẽga foom, la b sũur na n yɩɩ noog ne-fo." 
Proverbs3:5 Bɩ f teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne f sũur fãa, la f ra teeg f meng bãngr ye." 
Proverbs3:6 Bɩ f tẽeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yelle, bũmb nins fãa f sẽn maandã pʋgẽ, la bãmb n na n manega f soayã." 
Proverbs3:7 Ra tags tɩ f tara yam tɩ sek ye. Zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la zãag f meng ne wẽnga." 
Proverbs3:8 Bõn-kãng n na n kõ f yĩnsã laafɩ, la a kõ f kõabã keelem." 
Proverbs3:9 Waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne f paoongo, la f koodã dẽenem biisi." 
Proverbs3:10 Woto, f baoã na n pida ne koodo, la f sĩmsã fãa na n pida ne reezẽ rãam." 
Proverbs3:11 M biiga, ra kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saab remsgã ye, la f ra kisg bãmb keoogrã ye." 
Proverbs3:12 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab keoogda b sẽn nong-a soaba, wa ba sẽn keoogd a bi-nongr to-to wã." 
Proverbs3:13 Bark bee ned ning sẽn tar-a yamã zugu. Bark bee ned ning sẽn paam-a bãngr zugu. 
Proverbs3:14 Bala, yam tara yõod n yɩɩd wanzuri, la a tara nafr n yɩɩd sãnem." 
Proverbs3:15 Yam tara yõod n yɩɩd kĩndi halaale. La bõn-neebã fãa ka tõe n dɩk n mak ne-a ye. 
Proverbs3:16 Yõ-wok bee yam dɩtgo, tɩ arzegs ne ziir be a goabga." 
Proverbs3:17 Yẽnda soayã yaa neeba, la a so-bugsã fãa yaa vɩ-bãane." 
Proverbs3:18 Yam yaa vɩɩm tɩɩg ned ning sẽn tar-a wã yĩnga, la ned sã n tar yam, a tara sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs3:19 Yaa ne yam la Sẽn-Ka-Saab yẽbg dũniyã, la yaa ne bãngr la b lugl sa-gãongã." 
Proverbs3:20 Yaa ne b bãngrã la b kɩt tɩ koom bund n yit tẽngã zugu, la b kɩt tɩ sawatã sikd sa-koom." 
Proverbs3:21 M biiga, gãd yam ne bãngr neere, la f ra bas-b tɩ b zãag ne-f ye." 
Proverbs3:22 Bala, b na n kõ-f-la vɩɩm, la b na n gũu foom." 
Proverbs3:23 Woto, fo na n kẽndame n ka yɛɛsdẽ ye, la f naoor me kõn lak bũmb ye." 
Proverbs3:24 Fo sã n kẽ gãaga, rabeem kõn yõk-f ye, la f sã n gãe, f gõeem na n yɩ-f-la noogo." 
Proverbs3:25 Da zoe rabeem ne yell na n wa ling-f ye, wall nin-wẽns sẽn na n wa rat n zab ne foom ye." 
Proverbs3:26 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ fo sõangda, la b na n gũu foom tɩ f ra lʋɩ bẽdg pʋgẽ ye." 
Proverbs3:27 Fo sã n tar pãn-tõog tɩ sõnge, bɩ f ra zãgs tɩ sõng neb nins sẽn tog ne sõngrã ye." 
Proverbs3:28 Fo sã n tar n tõe n kõ ned dũndã, bɩ f ra yeel a soab t'a kẽng la a wa beoog ye." 
Proverbs3:29 Ned sã n vɩ bãan ne foom, bɩ f ra bao tɩ maan-a wẽng ye." 
Proverbs3:30 Ra zab ne ned zaalem, t'a yaool n ka maan-f bũmb ye." 
Proverbs3:31 Ra maan sũ-kiir ne nin-wẽnga, la f ra togs a manesmã ye." 
Proverbs3:32 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kisa nin-wẽnga, la b yaa nin-tɩrsã zoa." 
Proverbs3:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kãab-wẽng bee nin-wẽng yirẽ, la bãmb ningda nin-tɩrg soolem barka." 
Proverbs3:34 Sẽn-Ka-Saab paoogda nin-paoogdbã, la bãmb maanda sik-m-mens rãmbã neere." 
Proverbs3:35 Yam dãmbã na n paama waoogr tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre, la yalembã na n paama paoogre." 
Proverbs4:1 M kamba, sak-y y ba remsgo, Kelg-y neer n paam bãngre." 
Proverbs4:2 Bala, mam kõo yãmb zãms-sõngo, dẽ, bɩ y ra bas-y m zãmsgã ye." 
Proverbs4:3 Sɩdã, mam me rag n yaa biig tɩ m ba so-ma, la m yɩɩ m ma bi-yend a sẽn dag n nonge." 
Proverbs4:4 La m ba rag n sagenda maam n yetẽ: «Bĩng m noyã neer f sũurẽ. Tall m tõodã n paam n vɩɩmde. 
Proverbs4:5 Bao yam ne bãngre, ra yĩm mam goamã, la f ra wẽnemd n bas-b ye." 
Proverbs4:6 Bɩ f ra bas yam t'a na n gũ-f lame. Nong-a t'a na n kogl-f lame. 
Proverbs4:7 Fo sã n dat n yɩ yam soaba, bɩ f bao yam. La f maan f sẽn tõe tɛk fãa n bao bãngre." 
Proverbs4:8 Waoog-a t'a na n kɩtame tɩ f yɩ nin-kãsenga. Fo sã n gãd-a neere, a na n kõ-f-la ziiri." 
Proverbs4:9 A na n fõgna f zugã ne sõmblem maanfo, la a fõgen f zugã ne maanf sẽn tar ziiri." 
Proverbs4:10 M biiga, kelg la f reeg m goamã, n paam yõ-woko." 
Proverbs4:11 Mam zãmsa foom yam sore, Mam tall-f lame n tɩ kẽes tɩrlem soay zutu." 
Proverbs4:12 Woto, bũmb kõn gɩdg f kẽnd ye, la f sã n zoetẽ, f kõn lak bũmb ye." 
Proverbs4:13 Sak m demsgã neere, n da bas-a ye. Tall-a t'a na n kõ-f-la vɩɩm." 
Proverbs4:14 Ra maan wa nin-wẽnsã ye, la f ra rɩk tʋʋm-wẽns maandbã sor ye." 
Proverbs4:15 Gil-a, la f ra tũ-a ye, loog la f bas-a!" 
Proverbs4:16 Bala, bãmb ka gãanded n gũs tɩ b ka reng n maan wẽng ye. Bãmb sã n ka maan ned pʋ-toogo, b ka tõe n gũs ye." 
Proverbs4:17 Bala, wẽng maaneg yaa bãmb dɩɩbo, la pʋ-toogã yaa bãmb bõn-yũudla." 
Proverbs4:18 La nin-tɩrsã sor wẽnda wa sõor sẽn pukdi, t'a vẽenemã paasdẽ, hal n wa ta wĩnto-sʋka." 
Proverbs4:19 La nin-wẽnsã sor yaa wa yʋngo, bãmb ka mi bũmb ning sẽn na n lub bãmbã ye." 
Proverbs4:20 M biiga, kelg m goamã neere, la f yok f tʋb n kelg m saglsã," 
Proverbs4:21 Ra tol n yĩm m saglsã ye, tall bãmb f sũurã pʋgẽ kãenkãe." 
Proverbs4:22 Bala, b kõta neb nins fãa sẽn deegd bãmbã vɩɩm, la b kõt yĩnsã fãa laafɩ." 
Proverbs4:23 Maan gũusg ne f sũurã tagsg n yɩɩd bũmb fãa, bala, ninsaal vɩɩm yita a sũur pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs4:24 Da sak tɩ f noor gom zĩrẽ goam ye, la bɩ f zãag f noorã ne zãmb goamã." 
Proverbs4:25 Bɩ f ninã ges f taoore, la bɩ f gesgã tees tɩrg f taoore." 
Proverbs4:26 Maneg sor ning fo sẽn tũudã, tɩ f soayã fãa tõe n yɩ sõama." 
Proverbs4:27 Ra bʋdg n leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye, zãag f meng ne wẽnga." 
Proverbs5:1 M biiga, kelg m yam-goamã neere, la f yok f tʋb n kelg m sẽn sagend-f ne bãngrã," 
Proverbs5:2 n tõog n paam gũus-m-menga, la tɩ f noorã tõe n gom pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Proverbs5:3 Bala, pʋg-yoodr noor goam yaa wa sɩɩdo, la a bʋgsame n yɩɩd kaam." 
Proverbs5:4 La baoosgo, a wat n lebga toog liga, n wãagd wa zabr sʋʋg sẽn tar noy a yiibu." 
Proverbs5:5 Yẽnda kẽnd n dabda kũum zĩigẽ, la yẽnda sorã rɩka kɩɩm-kulg sor tɩrga." 
Proverbs5:6 Yẽnda ka manegd vɩɩmã sor ye, yẽnda bee tudgr pʋgẽ n ka miẽ ye." 
Proverbs5:7 Dẽ wã yĩnga m kamba, kelg-y maam. Ra zãag-y mens ne m goamã ye." 
Proverbs5:8 Zãag-y y mens ne pagb a woto buudu, La y ra tol n pẽneg b roogã noor ye." 
Proverbs5:9 Sã n ka rẽ, bõn-kãng na n kɩtame tɩ neb a taab paoog-fo, la b kɩt tɩ nin-toaag sãam f vɩɩmã," 
Proverbs5:10 la a kɩt tɩ sãamb wa soog f paoongã, tɩ neb fo sẽn ka mi wa rɩ f tʋʋmã yõodo," 
Proverbs5:11 la a kɩt tɩ f wa gãe n wõosdẽ, fo yĩnsã sẽn sãamdã yĩnga." 
Proverbs5:12 Wakat-kãnga, fo na n yeelame yaa: «Kato! Bõe yĩng tɩ mam kisg remsgã? Bõe yĩng tɩ mam ka sak n deeg keoogrã?" 
Proverbs5:13 Mam maana a wãn n ka kelg m karen-saam-dãmbã noore, la m ka yok m tʋb me n kelg b zãmsgã?»" 
Proverbs5:14 La kellẽ-la bilf tɩ yel-beed paam maam, nebã tiging la buudã sʋka.»" 
Proverbs5:15 Yũ fo bulgã koom, yũ koom ning sẽn yit f bãkã pʋgã," 
Proverbs5:16 Fo na n basame tɩ f kʋɩlgã koom raagd raasẽ? Bɩ f na n basame t'a zoet soayã zutu? 
Proverbs5:17 Bɩ f pagã yɩ foom f yembr dẽnd bala! Da sak tɩ nin-sãams naag foom n lagm-a ye. 
Proverbs5:18 Bɩ f kɩt t'a paam naare, la f maan sũ-noog ne f bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ paga." 
Proverbs5:19 Bala, yẽnda tara nonglem wʋsgo, la a pida ne bʋgsem. Bɩ yẽnda bĩisã kõ foom sũ-noog wakat fãa, la bɩ yẽnda nonglmã soog foom." 
Proverbs5:20 M biiga, yaa bõe tɩ f na n nong pag a to? Bõe yĩng tɩ f na n mogs pʋg-sãang bĩisa?" 
Proverbs5:21 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nee ninsaal yel-manesem, la bãmb geta a sẽn dabd zĩig ning fãa." 
Proverbs5:22 Nin-wẽng lʋɩta a meng kongr pʋga. Yẽnda meng yel-wẽnã n wẽnegd n yõk-a. 
Proverbs5:23 Yẽnda kiida a sẽn ka paam remsg yĩnga, la yẽnda menemda a yalemdã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Proverbs6:1 M biiga, fo sã n dɩk sard n yeel f to t'a samdã foom n na n yao, wall f sã n dɩk sard tɩ f na n yaoo sãan samde," 
Proverbs6:2 n wa mik tɩ f gom n yõka f menga, fo noorã goam sã n yõk-f wa bẽdgo," 
Proverbs6:3 ad fo sẽn tog n maan n fãag f menga. Fo sẽn lʋɩ f zoa wã nugẽ wã yĩnga, kẽng n tɩ yãnd f zoa wã, n sik f meng n bõos-a ne pẽdgre, n yeel-a t'a bas f taale." 
Proverbs6:4 Da bao gõeem bɩ suusg baa bilf ye," 
Proverbs6:5 Bɩ f fãag f meng wa walg sẽn fãag a meng tãoos nugẽ, la wa liuul sẽn tõog n fãag a meng tãoogẽ." 
Proverbs6:6 Kʋɩɩma, kẽng n tɩ ges gũuri. Ges a sẽn maandã n dɩk yam." 
Proverbs6:7 Bãmb ka tar naaba, la b ka tar taoor soaba, tɩ b sokd kãsem ye." 
Proverbs6:8 La baoosgo, sɩpaolgo, bãmb tigsda b rɩɩbo. La bõn-bɩʋʋng wakate, b wʋkda b rɩɩb n bĩngdẽ." 
Proverbs6:9 Kʋɩɩma, fo na n pa f gãagẽ hal tɩ ta wakat-bʋgo? Wakat-bʋg la f na n nek n yiki?" 
Proverbs6:10 Fo yetame tɩ f rat n gũsa bilfu, tɩ f na n suusa bilfu, n kalemd f nus n gãe." 
Proverbs6:11 Woto, naong na n soos n linga foom wa wagdre, la pɛtã na n linga foom wa fãada." 
Proverbs6:12 Sẽn gomd-a zĩrẽ goam ka nin-tɩrg ye, a yaa nin-yaalga." 
Proverbs6:13 Yẽnda wẽgsda a nin n gomd ne a nao, la a bilsd ne a nusi." 
Proverbs6:14 Yẽnda sũurã pida ne tʋʋm-dẽgdo, yẽnda tagsda wẽng maaneg wakat fãa, la yẽnda wata ne zaba." 
Proverbs6:15 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ sãoongã na n wa ling-a. La yẽnda na n sãamame tɩ tɩɩm kaẽ ye." 
Proverbs6:16 Bũmb a yoob n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kisi, la a yopoe soabã yaa yel-beed bãmb nifẽ." 
Proverbs6:17 Yaa tɩtaam-gesgo, ne zelemd sẽn gomd zĩrẽ goamã, la nus sẽn daagd bʋʋm soab zɩɩm," 
Proverbs6:18 n paas sũur sẽn tagsd n dat n maan wẽnga, ne nao sẽn yãgd n na n tɩ maan wẽnga," 
Proverbs6:19 la kaset zĩrẽ soab sẽn yagd zĩrẽ, ne ned sẽn wat ne zab ba-biis ne taab sʋka." 
Proverbs6:20 M biiga, sak f ba noore, la f ra zãgs f ma zãmsg ye." 
Proverbs6:21 Bĩng zãms-kãens f sũurẽ wakat fãa, la f rɩk-b n pid f loorẽ." 
Proverbs6:22 La gom-kãens na n yãaga foom f kẽnã pʋgẽ, la b na n gũu foom f gõeem wakate, fo sã n wa yik f gãagẽ, gom-kãens na n sagl-f lame." 
Proverbs6:23 Bala, noyã yaa wa fɩtla, la zãmsgã yaa wa vẽenem, la remsgã ne keoogrã yaa vɩɩm sore." 
Proverbs6:24 B na n gũu foom ne pʋg-yoogo, la ne pʋg-sãang sẽn gomd no-noom goamã." 
Proverbs6:25 Bɩ f ra tʋlg pag a woto buud a neermã yĩng ye, la f ra bas t'a ninã gesg kɩt t'a ratmã kẽ-f ye." 
Proverbs6:26 Bala, bur-gɩrg sekda pʋg-yoodr yaoodo, la pag sã n tar sɩd la a yood ne-fo, yaa f vɩɩmã la a rat n sãame." 
Proverbs6:27 Ned tõe n sagla bugum a gɩfẽ t'a fuug ka rɩ bugum bɩ? 
Proverbs6:28 Bɩ ned tõe n taba bug-saall tɩ bugmã ka yõog a naoã? 
Proverbs6:29 A yaa woto me ne ned sẽn dood a to paga. Ned ning sẽn na n sɩɩs-a a to pag paamda sɩbgre. 
Proverbs6:30 Kom sã n tar ned t'a zuk rɩɩb n na n dɩ, bɩ b ra kisg-a t'a yaa wagdr ye," 
Proverbs6:31 La b sã n ling yẽnda n yõke, a na n yaoo bũmbã a sẽn dɩkã naoor a yopoe. La a na n kɩsa bũmb ning fãa a sẽn tar a zakẽ wã." 
Proverbs6:32 La sẽn yood-a ne a to pag yaa yam-kaalg soaba. Yaa sẽn dat-a n sãam a meng vɩɩm n maand a woto. 
Proverbs6:33 Yẽnda na n paama pãbr la paoogre, la a yãndã ka na n tol n sɛ ye." 
Proverbs6:34 Bala, pʋg-sɩd sũ-kiir wata ne a sũ-puug-kãsenga, la yẽnda sũ-dokrã daare, nimbãan-zoeer ka na n zĩnd ye." 
Proverbs6:35 La a ka na n sak yaood ye. Ba b sã n kõ yẽnda kũun wʋsgo, a ka na n tol n sak ye." 
Proverbs7:1 M biiga, tall m goamã neere, la f ra yĩm m noyã ye." 
Proverbs7:2 Bɩ f tall m noyã neer n paam vɩɩmde, la f gũus ne m zãmsgã neer wa f nin-beellã." 
Proverbs7:3 Pid bãmb f nug-biẽ, la f gʋls bãmb f sũurẽ." 
Proverbs7:4 Yeel yam yaa: «Fo yaa mam tão-poaka,» la f bool bãngr tɩ f roagda." 
Proverbs7:5 Woto, b na n gũu foom ne f to paga, la ne pʋg-sãang sẽn gomd no-noom goamã." 
Proverbs7:6 Mam dag n yɛsa m doog võorẽ, n lɩkdẽ n get yɩnga." 
Proverbs7:7 La mam yãnda kom-bɩɩsã sʋk ned a yembr sẽn yaa yam-kaalg soaba. Mam yãame tɩ ned a yembr bãmb sʋkã ka tar yam ye. 
Proverbs7:8 Yẽnda rag n tũuda sor sẽn yeg pʋg-yoodrã sẽn beẽ wã. Yẽnda bʋdgame n dɩk pʋg-yoodrã zak sore. 
Proverbs7:9 Rag n yaa zaabre, zĩ-sobd wakate. Zĩigã rag n sobgame tɩ lebg lika." 
Proverbs7:10 La ade, pag n yi n seg yẽnda, la a futã yermã yaa pʋg-yoodr fut yerem, n tar sɩlem tagsg a sũurẽ." 
Proverbs7:11 A nonga goam n ka zoet yãnd ye, la a ka tõe n zĩnd zakẽ ye." 
Proverbs7:12 A sã n ka be soayã zutu, a bee raasẽ wã, bɩ sotiisẽ n gũudẽ." 
Proverbs7:13 Ade, yẽnda gãda bi-bɩɩgã n moka, la a kenga a sũur n yeel bi-bɩɩgã yaa:" 
Proverbs7:14 «Mam dag n pʋlmame n na maan zems-n-taar maoongo. Dẽ, yaa rũndã la mam pids pʋlen-kãnga." 
Proverbs7:15 Yaa rẽnda yĩng la m sẽn yi n na n seg foomã. Mam dag n baood-f lame la m yãnd-f lame. 
Proverbs7:16 Mam manega m gãagã n tɩʋ, yaa peen-neeb sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs sẽn yi Ezɩpte." 
Proverbs7:17 La mam yuga m gãagã ne parfẽ buud toor-toor sẽn tar yũ-noogo. 
Proverbs7:18 Bɩ f wa tɩ d maan nonglem ne taab tɩ beoog vẽege, la d maan nonglem sũ-noog ne taaba." 
Proverbs7:19 Bala, mam sɩdã ka be yir ye, a toga so-woko." 
Proverbs7:20 A zɩɩ ligd wʋsg ne korg n looge, la a ka na n wa tɩ ka ki-peoolgã sasa ye." 
Proverbs7:21 A no-noomã yĩnga, a tõoga bi-bɩɩgã, la a no-minimã yĩnga, bi-bɩɩgã saka a sẽn datã." 
Proverbs7:22 Dẽ, tao-tao bala, bi-bɩɩgã wẽnemdame n pʋg-a n looge, wa naaf b sẽn tar n dabd kʋʋbo, la wa b sẽn sẽb yalem n dabd sɩbgre," 
Proverbs7:23 hal tɩ peemd n wa kõs yẽnda n sãag t'a ki, wa luiil sẽn yɩk n tɩ lʋɩ tãoogẽ, n ka mi tɩ na n tũ ne a yõor ye." 
Proverbs7:24 Dẽ wã yĩnga, m kamba, kelg-y maam neere, la y tags m goamã yell neere." 
Proverbs7:25 Bɩ f ra bʋdg n tũ pag a woto buud ye, la f ra tũ soay nins a sẽn tũudã n wa menem ye." 
Proverbs7:26 Bala, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg lʋɩ. La neb nins yẽnda sẽn kʋ wã rag n tara pãense." 
Proverbs7:27 La yẽnda zakã yaa kɩɩm-kulg sore, la yaa sor sẽn dabd kũum zĩigẽ.»" 
Proverbs8:1 Yam boondame, la bãngr zẽkda a koɛɛga." 
Proverbs8:2 Yam yasa kunkubã zutu, la soayã noyã, ne so-palen-paasẽ," 
Proverbs8:3 la a yas tẽngã rignoyẽ, ne so-badsẽ n kelemdẽ n yetẽ:" 
Proverbs8:4 «Ninsaalba, yãmb la m sẽn boondã! Ãdem biisi, yaa yãmb la m gomd ne!" 
Proverbs8:5 Yãmb a zɩtba, bao-y bãngre! La yam-ka-sek-b rãmba, bao-y yam." 
Proverbs8:6 Kelg-y neere, bala m tara koe-kãseng n na n togs-yã, la mam noorã na n togsa tɩrlem goamã." 
Proverbs8:7 Bala, mam noorã gomda sɩda, la gom-wẽns goam yaa yel-beed ne maam." 
Proverbs8:8 Mam noorã goam fãa yaa tɩrse, la sɩlem bɩ gom-yood ka be b sʋk ye." 
Proverbs8:9 B fãa yaa vẽenes ne ned ning fãa sẽn tar-a yam, la ned sã n paam bãngre, a mikdame tɩ mam goamã yaa sɩda." 
Proverbs8:10 Sak-y m demsgã la y bas wanzuri, bao-y bãngr n yɩɩd sãnem halaale." 
Proverbs8:11 Bala, maam a yam tara yõod n yɩɩd kĩndi halaale, la bõn-sõama ba a yembr ka tõe n dɩk n mak ne maam ye.»" 
Proverbs8:12 Maam a yam bee gũus-m-meng pʋgẽ, mam miime tɩ tags n paam bãngre." 
Proverbs8:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees yaa wẽng kisgri. Maam a yam kisa tɩtaam ne wuk-m-menga, la tʋʋm-wẽnse, ne zĩrẽ." 
Proverbs8:14 Maam n kõt saglg la m wilgd sẽn yaa neere. Yaa maam la bãngre, la pãng yaa maam n so." 
Proverbs8:15 Yaa maam la nanambsã tar n dɩt b naam, la yaa maam la bʋ-kaoodbã tar n vigind tõod sẽn yaa tɩrse." 
Proverbs8:16 Yaa mam maasem yĩng la nanambsã so b soolmã, tɩ kãsem-dãmbã ne bʋ-kaoodbã kaood bʋʋdã tɩrga." 
Proverbs8:17 Mam nonga sẽn nong-b maamã. La sẽn baood-b maamã na n yãnda maam. 
Proverbs8:18 Arzegs ne ziir bee ne maam, la paoong sẽn ka sɛta, ne tɩrlem." 
Proverbs8:19 Mam biisã yaa sõama n yɩɩd sãnem, b yɩɩda sãnem halaale. La b tara yõod n yɩɩd wanzuri halaale." 
Proverbs8:20 Mam kẽnda tɩrlem sor zugu, la yaa pʋ-peelem soay pʋsẽ la m kẽnda." 
Proverbs8:21 Mam dat n kõo sẽn nong-b maamã paoong tɩ b sooge, la m pids b rotã ne arzegse." 
Proverbs8:22 Hal kʋdemd wẽndẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab reng n naana maam pipi, n yaool n naan bũmbã fãa." 
Proverbs8:23 Bãmb naana maam tɩ bũmb baa fɩ nan ka be ye. B naana maam hal sɩngr wakate, sẽn deng dũniyã sẽn nan ka naane." 
Proverbs8:24 B roga maam tɩ ko-kãsemsã rag n nan ka be ye, la rẽ tɩ kʋɩls sẽn bund koom me rag n nan ka be ye." 
Proverbs8:25 La bãmb sẽn wa n dog maamã, tɩ b nan ka naan tãmsã ye, la rẽ tɩ kunkubã me rag n nan ka be ye." 
Proverbs8:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n naan maamã tɩ tẽn-gãongã ne wetã rag n nan ka be ye, la rẽ tɩ b rag n nan ka naan pipi tom-beell ba a yembr ye." 
Proverbs8:27 Bãmb sẽn wa n yɛdgd sa-gãongã tɩ mam dag n zoe n beeme. B sẽn wa n kargd zĩ-zulumsã ko-ninã toadgã tɩ mam dag n beeme. 
Proverbs8:28 Bãmb sẽn wa n kɩt tɩ sawatã tigimd yĩngrã, la b kɩt tɩ zĩ-zulumsã ko-ninã pus n yi ne pãngã," 
Proverbs8:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn wa n yãkd ko-kãsengã todsã, n yeel ko-kãsengã tɩ b ra long n yi b todsẽ wã, b sẽn wa n na n yẽbg dũniyã n ning-a a zĩigẽ wã," 
Proverbs8:30 mam dag n bee bãmb sɛɛgẽ wa tʋʋmdã soaba, n kõt bãmb sũ-noog daar fãa, n kɩdemd b taoor wakat fãa." 
Proverbs8:31 Mam dag n deemda dũniyã bãmb sẽn naanã zugu, la m sũurã rag n nooma m sẽn vɩ ninsaalbã sʋkã yĩnga." 
Proverbs8:32 Dẽ wã yĩnga, m kamba, kelg-y maam! Neb nins sẽn sakd-b mam saglgã paamda sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs8:33 Sak-y m demsgã n lebg yam dãmba, la y ra zãgs-a ye." 
Proverbs8:34 Sẽn kelgd-a maam paamda sũ-noogo. Yẽnda bee mam dignoorẽ beoog fãa, yẽnda yɛsa mam digno-koakẽ n gũudẽ." 
Proverbs8:35 Bala, ned sã n paam maam, a paama vɩɩm, la a paamda Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglem." 
Proverbs8:36 La ned sã n beeg maam, a maanda a meng wẽnga, la sẽn kis-b maamã nonga kũum." 
Proverbs9:1 Yam me a roogo, n lugl a ra-lugds a yopoe," 
Proverbs9:2 Yẽnda kʋ a rũng la a segl a reezẽ rãam, la a maneg a rɩɩb taabl n dɩgle." 
Proverbs9:3 Yẽnda tʋma a tʋmtʋmd-pogsã tɩ b kẽng tẽngã kunkubã zut n moondẽ n yetẽ: 
Proverbs9:4 «Yãmb a zɩtba, wa-y-yã!» La a yet yalembã yaa:" 
Proverbs9:5 «Wa-y n dɩ-y m dɩɩbã, la y yũ m reezẽ rãamã m sẽn seglã." 
Proverbs9:6 Bas-y y yalemdã n paam n vɩɩmde. Bɩ y tũ-y bãngr sore.

Proverbs14:17 Sũ-tʋʋn-ned maanda yalem-tʋʋma, la ned sã n tar tags-wẽnse, a maandame tɩ b kisg-a." 
Proverbs14:18 Zɩtbã pʋɩɩr yaa yalemdo, la bãngr yaa yam soab maanfo." 
Proverbs14:19 Nin-wẽnsã na n wõgemda nin-sõamyã wã taoore, la wẽnem dãmbã na n wõgemda tẽngã rignoyẽ." 
Proverbs14:20 Baa naong soab zo-rãmb kis-a lame, la arzɛk soab zo-rãmb yaa wʋsgo." 
Proverbs14:21 Ned sẽn paoogd a to maanda yel-wẽna, la bark bee sẽn zoet-a naong rãmb nimbãaneg zugu." 
Proverbs14:22 Neb nins sẽn baood n maan wẽngã na n menemame, la sẽn maand-b neerã paamda nonglem la sɩda." 
Proverbs14:23 Tʋʋmd buud fãa sẽn tʋm ne wɩsg-m-meng tara yõodo, la gom-toog wata ne naong bala." 
Proverbs14:24 Yam soab arzɛk n yaa a maanfo, la yalem na n kell n pa a yalemdã pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs14:25 Kaset sɩd soab fãagda neb vɩɩm, la zĩrẽ-be-ned tudgda a taaba." 
Proverbs14:26 Ned ning sẽn zoet-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab pɛlg yaa kãenkãe, la a kambã na n paama zĩ-soalgdga." 
Proverbs14:27 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees kõta vɩɩm, la a kɩtdame tɩ ned gil kũum bẽdgo." 
Proverbs14:28 Tẽng neb sã n waoogẽ, rĩm tara waoogre, la neb sã n kaẽ, rĩm naam sɛtame." 
Proverbs14:29 Sũ-maasem soab tara yam wʋsgo, la sũ-tʋʋn-ned wilgda a yalemdo." 
Proverbs14:30 Yam-gãneg kõta yĩns vɩɩm, la sũ-kiir yaa wa bãag sẽn dɩt kõaba." 
Proverbs14:31 Sẽn namsd-a naong soab tʋʋsda a naandã, la sẽn maand-a nimbãan-ned neer waoogda a naandã." 
Proverbs14:32 Nin-wẽng tʋʋm n lubd-a, la baa nin-tɩrg kũum wakate, a ket n tara tẽebo." 
Proverbs14:33 Yam bee bãngd sũurẽ, la b ka tõe n yãnd-a yalembã sʋk ye." 
Proverbs14:34 Tɩrlem n zẽkd tẽnga, la yel-wẽnã yaa nebã yãnde." 
Proverbs14:35 Rĩm nonga tʋmtʋmd sẽn tar gũus-m-menga, la a sũur puuda ne sẽn wat-a ne yãnde." 
Proverbs15:1 Leok-bʋgsg sigsda sũuri, la gom-kɛgeng paasda sũ-puugri." 
Proverbs15:2 Yam dãmb goam kɩtdame tɩ bãngr baoob tar yamleoogo, la yalembã noor yiisda yalem-goam bala." 
Proverbs15:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nee zĩigã fãa, la bãmb geta nin-wẽnsã ne nin-sõamyã." 
Proverbs15:4 Gom-nood yaa wa vɩɩm tɩɩga, la gom-wẽns sãamda sũuri." 
Proverbs15:5 Yalem kisa a ba remsgo, la sẽn deegd-a keoogr wilgdame t'a tara yam." 
Proverbs15:6 Nin-tɩrg yir pida ne arzegse, la nin-wẽng paoong wata ne toogo." 
Proverbs15:7 Yam dãmb goam pida ne bãngre, la yalem sũur tagsg ka woto ye." 
Proverbs15:8 Nin-wẽnsã maoong yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la nin-tɩrsã pʋʋsg tata bãmb yam." 
Proverbs15:9 Nin-wẽnsã yel-manesem yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la bãmb nonga ned ning sẽn baood-a tɩrlem." 
Proverbs15:10 Sẽn bʋdg-a n bas sor na n paama sɩbg-toaaga, la sẽn kis-a keoogr na n kiime." 
Proverbs15:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nee bũmb ning sẽn be kɩɩm-kulg la zĩ-zulumsẽ wã. Sẽn yɩɩd fãa, bãmb nee bũmb ning sẽn be ninsaal sũur pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs15:12 Nin-paoogd ka nong tɩ b keoog-a ye. Yẽnda ka kẽnd yam dãmbã nengẽ ye. 
Proverbs15:13 Ned sũur sã n noomẽ, a noor bee laado, la sũ-pa-noaang maagda gĩina." 
Proverbs15:14 Sẽn tar-a yam baooda bãngre, la yalem noor pita ne yalem-goam bala." 
Proverbs15:15 Nimbãan-ned daar fãa vɩɩmã yaa toog bala, la sũ-noog soab maanda tigr daar fãa." 
Proverbs15:16 F sã n tar paoong bilf n zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n são f sẽn na n tar paoong wʋsgo, n yaool n zĩ ne yɩɩre." 
Proverbs15:17 Neb sẽn dɩt medg la b nong taaba, n são neb sẽn wãbd nemd la b kis taaba." 
Proverbs15:18 Sũ-yikr soab bolgda zabre, la sũ-maasem soab kiisda zabre." 
Proverbs15:19 Kʋɩɩm sor pida ne gõose, la nin-tɩrg sor yaa so-kõodre." 
Proverbs15:20 Biig sẽn tar yam kõta a ba sũ-noogo, la bi-yalem paoogda a ma." 
Proverbs15:21 Yam-kaalg soab yalemdã noom-a lame, la yam soab rɩkda a sor tɩrga." 
Proverbs15:22 Yẽsg sã n kae, saagr ka paamd pidsg ye, la sagendb sã n yaa wʋsgo, tõogr beeme." 
Proverbs15:23 Ned sã n bãng gomd leokre, a sũur yaa noogo, la gomd b sẽn leok sẽn zems a wakat kõta sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs15:24 Yam-sõng soab sor dabda ne-a vɩɩm zĩigẽ, t'a tõe n zãag a meng ne kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Proverbs15:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab lubda wuk-m-mens rãmbã roto, la bãmb kogenda pʋg-kõor soolem." 
Proverbs15:26 Tags-wẽns yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, la goam sẽn gom ne nonglem yaa yɩlemde." 
Proverbs15:27 Ned sã n nong zãmb paoongo, a wata ne zu-beed a meng zak pʋga, la sẽn kis-a zãmb kũun na n vɩɩmdame n kaoose." 
Proverbs15:28 Nin-tɩrg tagsdame n yaool n leoke, la nin-wẽnsã noy yiisda gom-wẽnse."

Proverbs16:3 Rɩk f yɛlã n bas ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la f sẽn saagdã fãa na paam pidsgu."

Proverbs16:12 Tʋʋm-wẽns maaneg yaa yel-beed rĩm-dãmbã nifẽ. Bala, yaa tɩrlem n paasd bãmb naamã pãnga."

Proverbs16:15 Rĩm noor yõgeng kõta vɩɩm, la b nonglem yaa wa sigr saaga." 
Proverbs16:16 F sẽn na n paam yam n são f sẽn na n paam sãnem halaale, la f sẽn na n paam bãngr n são f sẽn na n paam wanzuri."

Proverbs16:25 Sor tõeeme n yaa tɩrg ned nifẽ, t'a baoosg yaool n yaa kũum."

Proverbs17:2 Tʋmtʋmd sẽn tar yam, na n sooga biig sẽn ningd a ba yãnde, la yẽnda na n lagma kambã n paam dogem pʋɩɩre." 
Proverbs17:3 B zugda wanzuri ne sãnem n yɩlg-b boaagẽ, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n makd ninsaalbã sũyã." 
Proverbs17:4 Ned sã n maand wẽnga, a nonga gom-wẽns kelgre, la zĩrẽ-be-ned kelgda zĩrẽ goamã." 
Proverbs17:5 Sẽn yaand-a nimbãan-ned paoogda a naandã, la ned sã n laad toog sẽn paam ned yĩnga, a na n paama sɩbgre."

Proverbs17:10 Keoog-vuk kẽeda yam soaba, n yɩɩd f sẽn na n wẽ yalem naoor koabga." 
Proverbs17:11 Nin-wẽng ka baood bũmb tɩ ka kɩɩsg ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b na n tʋm nin-toaag a nengẽ.

Proverbs17:13 B sã n maan ned neer t'a lebs wẽnga, wẽng kõn zãag ne nin-kãng soab yir ye." 
Proverbs17:14 Fo sã n sɩng zabre, yaa wa f sẽn kãsg ko-koaka. Reng n loog tɩ zabrã ra wa sɩng ye." 
Proverbs17:15 Ned sẽn kõt nin-wẽng bʋʋm, ne ned sẽn mongd nin-tɩrg bʋʋm yaa yel-beed Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ." 
Proverbs17:16 Ligd sẽn be yalem nugẽ yõod yaa bõe? Yaa sẽn na n da yam bɩ? La yẽnda zugã sẽn ka wã! 
Proverbs17:17 F zoa nong-f-la wakat fãa, la yel-pakr wakate, yaa f ba-biig n sõngd-fo." 
Proverbs17:18 Yam-kaalg soab n wẽend a to yĩnga, la a rɩkd sard ned a to yĩnga."

Proverbs17:22 Sũ-noog wata ne yĩns laafɩ, la sũ-sãang kʋɩɩsda kõaba." 
Proverbs17:23 Nin-wẽng solgdame n deegd kũuni, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b ra bʋ bʋʋd tɩrg ye." 
Proverbs17:24 Yam pẽe ne nin-yẽesenga, la yalem bas n geta hal yɩɩga." 
Proverbs17:25 Bi-yalem sãamda a ba sũuri, la a kõt a ma sũ-toogo." 
Proverbs17:26 A ka sõama tɩ b yaoolg nin-tɩrg ye, la a ka zems tɩ b pãb ned sẽn zems waoogr ye." 
Proverbs17:27 Ned sẽn tõe a noor tara yam. Ned sẽn tõe a meng tara bãngre. 
Proverbs17:28 Baa yalem sã n sĩnd n ka gomda, b rɩkd-a-la wa yam soaba. La ned sẽn ka yaagd a noor tara bãngre."

Proverbs18:2 Ka bãngr la yalem dat ye. A rat n wilga a meng tagsg bala. 
Proverbs18:3 Nin-wẽng sẽn beẽ, paoogr bee be. La tʋʋm-yood sẽn beẽ, yãnd bee be." 
Proverbs18:4 Ninsaal noor goam yaa ko-zulums ne ko-zoetem, la a yaa yam bulga." 
Proverbs18:5 Ka sõma tɩ b kõ nin-wẽng bʋʋm, n mong nin-tɩrg bʋʋm bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye." 
Proverbs18:6 Yalem no-goam wata ne zaba, a no-goamã n wat ne pãb-taaba." 
Proverbs18:7 Yalem no-goam n wãad-a, la a mengã no-goam n yõkd-a wa bẽdgo." 
Proverbs18:8 Tẽn-kãn-ned goam yaa wa rɩ-noodo, f sã n dɩt-a, a kẽedame n ta hal f pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs18:9 Ned sẽn basd a tʋʋmd n ka tʋmdẽ, ne sẽn sãamd-a yaa ba-biisi." 
Proverbs18:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yaa gãsg sẽn tar pãnga, nin-tɩrg sã n zoe n tɩ kẽ be, yell kõn paam-a ye." 
Proverbs18:11 Arzɛk soab arzɛk n yaa a pãnga. Yẽnda tagsdame t'a arzɛkã yaa wa lalg sẽn zãnte. 
Proverbs18:12 Ned sã n zẽkd a menga, lʋɩɩs n pʋgde, la ned sã n sikd a menga, ziir n pʋgde." 
Proverbs18:13 Ned sã n ka kelg n tɩg n yaool n leoke, a wilgda a yalemdo, la a na n paama yãnde." 
Proverbs18:14 Ninsaal pɛl-kɛgeng n tebended-a a bãag wakate, la a sã n kong raoodo, ãnda n na n sõng-a t'a yiki?" 
Proverbs18:15 Sẽn tar-a yam paamda bãngre, la yam soab kelgd n baooda bãngre." 
Proverbs18:16 Ned kũun n pagsd a soayã, n kɩtdẽ t'a tõe n kẽng nin-kãsems taoore." 
Proverbs18:17 Sẽn deng-a a yell togsg kõta a meng bʋʋm, la a zabd-n-taagã sã n wa, lebga kɩɩs-taaba." 
Proverbs18:18 Poeer sɛɛsda zaba, la a welgda pãens-rãmbã yɛl ne taaba." 
Proverbs18:19 F sã n paoog f ba-biiga, a kolgr yaa toog n yɩɩd tẽng sẽn tar pãnga. Zabr pagda sũur wa na-yir dignoy-pagdse." 
Proverbs18:20 Ninsaal noor goam n kõt-a rɩɩbo, la yaa a zelemdã n kɩtd t'a pʋg pitẽ." 
Proverbs18:21 Zelemd n tõe tɩ ned vɩɩmde, zelemd n tõe tɩ ned ki. La sẽn nong-a goam na n dɩ a goamã biisi." 
Proverbs18:22 Ned sã n paam paga, a paama sũ-noogo, yẽnda paama kũun Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ." 
Proverbs18:23 Naong soab gomdame n wẽed kãntɩɩga, la arzɛk soab leokda ne gãgse." 
Proverbs18:24 Fo zo-rãmb kẽer tõe n waa ne toog f zugu, la f zoa ning tõe n nong-f lame n yɩɩd f ma-biiga." 
Proverbs19:1 Naong soab sẽn vɩ ne burkĩndlim n são zĩrẽ-be-neda. Zĩrẽ-be-ned yaa yalma. 
Proverbs19:2 Zɩɩlem ka sõma ned ba a yembr yĩng ye, la ned sã n yãgdẽ, a tudgdame." 
Proverbs19:3 Yaa ninsaal yalemdã n wat ne a tudgri, la yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab la yẽnda yikd a sũuri." 
Proverbs19:4 Arzɛk kɩtdame tɩ ned zo-rãmb lebg wʋsgo, la naong soab zo-rãmb loogdame n bas-a." 
Proverbs19:5 B ka na n bas kaset zĩrẽ soab taal ye. Sẽn yagd-a zĩrẽ ka na n põs sɩbgr ye. 
Proverbs19:6 Neb wʋsg baooda nin-kãseng sõm, la kõat yaa neb fãa zoa." 
Proverbs19:7 Naong soab saam-biis fãa kis-a lame, t'a zo-rãmb me zãagd n basd-a. A baood-b lame n na n gom ne, la a ka yãt-b ye." 
Proverbs19:8 Sẽn baood-a bãngr nonga a menga, la sẽn talld-a bãngr neer paamda sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs19:9 B ka na n bas kaset zĩrẽ soab taal ye, la sẽn yagd-a zĩrẽ na n menemame." 
Proverbs19:10 Yalem ka tog ne naar ye, la sẽn yɩɩda, yamb me ka tog n soog na-biis ye." 
Proverbs19:11 Sẽn tar-a yam ka yikd a sũur tao-tao ye, a zu-zẽkrã yaa a sẽn basd b sẽn beeg yẽnda wã taalã." 
Proverbs19:12 Rĩm sũ-yikr yaa wa gɩgemd kɛlenga, la a nonglem yaa wa meenem sẽn dʋʋgd mood zugu." 
Proverbs19:13 Bi-yalem yaa a ba yel-pakre, la pag zabr yaa wa koom sẽn tosd n ka sɛtẽ ye." 
Proverbs19:14 Ned tõe n kõ a biig zaka, la paoongo, la pag sẽn tar yam, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab kũuni." 
Proverbs19:15 Kʋɩʋʋng kẽesda ned gõeem, la kom na n yõka sẽn ka nong-a tʋʋmde." 
Proverbs19:16 Sẽn deegd-a noor gũud-a a vɩɩm, la sẽn ka gũusd-a ne a yel-manesem na n kiime." 
Proverbs19:17 Sẽn sõngd-a nimbãan-ned pengda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb na n dola yẽnda." 
Proverbs19:18 Rems f biig f sẽn ket n tõe n dems-a wakate, la f ra tʋlg a kũum ye." 
Proverbs19:19 Sẽn yikd-a sũur segda ne sɩbgre. F sã n bas-a n ka sɩbge, a na n leb n paasa beoogo." 
Proverbs19:20 Kelg saglgo, la f sak remsgo, n tõog n paam yam." 
Proverbs19:21 Ninsaal saagda bũmb wʋsgo, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab raabã n na n pidsi." 
Proverbs19:22 B sẽn baood bũmb ning ninsaal nengẽ, yaa t'a maan pʋ-peelem. F sẽn na n yaa naong soaba, n são f sẽn na n yaa zĩrẽ-be-neda." 
Proverbs19:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees kõta yõ-woko, la a kɩtdame tɩ ned rɩ n tɩge, n kẽ n gãand tɩ yel-wẽng ka paam-a ye." 
Proverbs19:24 Kʋɩɩm tʋmda a nug laagẽ, la a ka leemsd bũmb ye." 
Proverbs19:25 F sã n wẽ nin-paoogda, yam-kaalg soab maanda gũusgu. Keoog bãngda, la yẽnda na n paama bãngr n paase." 
Proverbs19:26 Biig sẽn namsd a ba, la a rigd a ma, yaa biig sẽn wat ne yãnd la paoogre." 
Proverbs19:27 M biiga, fo sã n ka sak remsgo, f na n zãaga f meng ne bãngre." 
Proverbs19:28 Kaset soab sẽn yaa nin-yaalg toor ka be ne bʋ-kao-tɩrg ye. Nin-wẽnsã noy pida ne wẽng bala. 
Proverbs19:29 Nin-paoogd toga ne sɩbgre, la yalem poor toga ne pãbre." 
Proverbs20:1 Reezẽ rãam yũub wata ne paoogr goamã, rã-toos yũub wata ne rãmbgo, la sẽn basd-a tɩ rãam soog-a ka na n tol n paam yam ye." 
Proverbs20:2 Gɩgem-poll kɛleng sẽn kẽesd rabeem to-to wã, rĩm sũ-puugr me yaa a woto. Sẽn yikd-a rĩm sũur baooda kũum." 
Proverbs20:3 Ninsaal waoogr yaa a sẽn na n zãag a meng ne zaba. La sẽn yaa-a yalem fãa baooda zaba. 
Proverbs20:4 Waood yĩng kɩtdame tɩ kʋɩɩm zãgs koobo, la tigsg wakat sã n ta, yẽnda ka na n kẽeb bũmb ye." 
Proverbs20:5 Ninsaal sũur pʋgẽ saagr wẽnda wa koom sẽn be zĩ-zulumsẽ. Sẽn tar-a bãngr n mi a sẽn na n toog-a to-to. 
Proverbs20:6 Neb wʋsg yetame tɩ b yaa nin-sõamyã, la f sã n bao pʋ-peelem soab b sʋkã, f kõn yã ye." 
Proverbs20:7 Nin-tɩrg sã n kẽnd ne burkĩndlim, a kamb tara sũ-noog a loogr poore." 
Proverbs20:8 Rĩm sã n zĩ n kaood bʋʋdo, a feesdame n bãng sõama ne wẽng n bake." 
Proverbs20:9 Ãnda n tõe n yeele: «Mam pʋg yaa pɛɛlga, la m yɩlga m meng ne m yel-wẽnã zãnga?»" 
Proverbs20:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kis n yɩɩd fãa, yaa zãmb zɩslem makdga, la zãmb poɛɛm magdga." 
Proverbs20:11 Yaa biig tʋʋmdẽ la b tõe n bãng a yel-manesmã sã n na n yɩɩ sõama la tɩrga. 
Proverbs20:12 Tʋbr kelgdame tɩ nif getẽ, la bãmb b yiibã fãa yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naane." 
Proverbs20:13 Da nong gõeem n wa lebg naong soab ye. Puk f nini, tɩ f na n paam n dɩ n tɩgame." 
Proverbs20:14 Raad yetame: «Yaa toogo! Yaa toogo!» La yẽnda sã n wa zãage, a maanda sũ-noog ne bũmb ning a sẽn da wã." 
Proverbs20:15 Baa sãnem ne kĩndi sã n yaa wʋsgo, bũmb sẽn tar yõod n yɩɩd fãa yaa goam sẽn wat ne bãngre." 
Proverbs20:16 Ned sã n dɩk sard ne foom ned a to yĩnga, bɩ f reeg a fuugu. La sã n yaa sãan yĩnga, bɩ f kɩt t'a gãneg bũmbu." 
Proverbs20:17 Zãmb dɩɩb noomame, la a sã n wa kẽ noorẽ, a lebgda wa kuga." 
Proverbs20:18 Saglg n sõngd ned t'a saagr pidi. Reng n bao yam-sõng n yaool n kẽng zabrẽ. 
Proverbs20:19 Tẽn-kãn-ned pugsda yɛla, la ned sẽn gomd wʋsg toga ne zãagre." 
Proverbs20:20 Ned sã n kãab a ba ne a ma wẽnga, yẽnda fɩtlã na n kii lik pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs20:21 Arzɛk sẽn paam n ka nams ka tõe n zĩnd bark ye. 
Proverbs20:22 Da yeel tɩ f na n maana wẽng n lebs wẽng ye. Teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b na n fãaga foom. 
Proverbs20:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kisa makdg sẽn magd ne wẽgbo. Zãmb makdg ka sõama ye. 
Proverbs20:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n wilgd ninsaal a sore. Ninsaal na n yɩ a wãn n bãng a sore? 
Proverbs20:25 Ned sã n pʋlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab bũmb n ka reng n tagse, yaa bẽdg la a bẽd a menga." 
Proverbs20:26 Rĩm sẽn tar yam feesdame n bãng nin-wẽnsã, n kɩt tɩ b sɩbg-ba." 
Proverbs20:27 Ninsaal vʋʋsmã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab fɩtla, a feesda ninsaal sũ-zulungã pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs20:28 Yaa pʋ-peelem ne sɩd n gũud rĩma, la yaa sõmblem n tebended a rĩungã." 
Proverbs20:29 Kom-bɩɩsã pãng n yaa b nag-teoogo, la nin-kẽembã zoob-peend n yaa b waoogre." 
Proverbs20:30 Poglg sẽn zabd tõe n kɩtame tɩ ned bas wẽng maanego. La pãbr tõe n demsa tags-wẽnsã zãngã. 
Proverbs21:1 Rĩm sũur bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugẽ wa ko-sore. Bãmb wẽnemded-a lame n teesd b sẽn datẽ. 
Proverbs21:2 Ninsaal tagsdame t'a yel-manesmã fãa zemsame, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n feesd ninsaalbã sũyã." 
Proverbs21:3 Ned sã n kẽnd ne tɩrlem la a maand sẽn zemse, nooma Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũuri, n yɩɩd maando." 
Proverbs21:4 Nin-wẽns geta ne tɩtaam, la b wukd b mense, la b sẽn maandã fãa yaa yel-wẽna." 
Proverbs21:5 Ned sã n mag n yaool n tʋme, a paamda yõodo, la ned sã n tʋmd ne yãgbo, naong n na n yõk-a." 
Proverbs21:6 Yag zĩrẽ n paam arzegs yaa bũmb sẽn ka tar yõodo, la yaa sẽn baood-b kũumã n maand a woto." 
Proverbs21:7 Nin-wẽnsã wẽnemã n na n loog ne-ba. Bala, bãmb ka rat n maan sẽn zems ye."

Proverbs21:9 F sẽn na n gãe bɛoong zug n são f sẽn na n gãe ro-yɛng pʋg ne pʋg-zab-zabda.

Proverbs21:11 B sã n sɩbg nin-paoogda, yam-kaalg soab rɩkda yam. La b sã n zãms yam soaba, a paamda bãngr n paase." 
Proverbs21:12 Nin-tɩrg gũusd n geta nin-wẽns zags sẽn yaa a soaba, la yẽnda tusd-b lame n kẽesd toog pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs21:13 Ned sã n yẽt a tʋb n ka kelgd nimbãan-ned kɛlenga, yẽnda me na n wa kelemdame tɩ ned ka leokd-a ye." 
Proverbs21:14 Kũun sẽn solg n kõ maagda sũuri. Kũun sẽn deeg n sui sigsda sũ-puugri. 
Proverbs21:15 Bʋʋd sã n kaood tɩrga, nin-tɩrg tara sũ-noogo, la nin-wẽng yɛɛsdame." 
Proverbs21:16 Ned sẽn zãagd a meng ne yam sor na n zĩnda kɩɩms sʋka. 
Proverbs21:17 Sẽn nong-a yõ-noogr na n zĩnda ne naongo. Sẽn nong-a reezẽ rãam ne rɩ-nood kõn tol n paam arzɛk ye. 
Proverbs21:18 Nin-wẽng na n deega toog nin-tɩrg zĩigẽ, la zãmb soab na n deega toog pʋ-peelem soab zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs21:19 F sẽn na n be we-raoogẽ, n são f sẽn na n zĩ ne pʋg-zab-zabd sẽn yaa sũ-tʋʋl-neda." 
Proverbs21:20 Paoong sẽn tar yõodo, ne naar bee yam soab yiri, la yalem dɩta a paoong zãnga." 
Proverbs21:21 Ned sã n baood tɩrlem la maan-neere, a na n paama vɩɩm ne tɩrlem, la waoogre." 
Proverbs21:22 Yam soab tõe n kẽe gãndaad tẽngẽ n sãam pãng ning b sẽn dag n teegã. 
Proverbs21:23 Ned sã n tõe a noor la a gũusd ne a no-goam, a kogenda a meng ne yel-pakre." 
Proverbs21:24 B boonda ned sẽn yaa tɩta-ned la wuk-m-meng soaba, tɩ nin-paoogda. Yẽnda tʋʋmã fãa pida ne tɩtaam." 
Proverbs21:25 Kʋɩɩm datmã n kʋʋd-a, bala, a nusã zãgsa tʋʋmde."
