Proverbs22:1 Yʋ-noog n são arzegs wʋsgo, la f sẽn na n paam nebã pẽgr n são sãnem la wanzuri." 
Proverbs22:2 Arzɛk soab ne naong soab tara yẽgen-yɛnga: yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naan b fãa. 
Proverbs22:3 Gũus-m-meng soab yãta yell n zoe n soonde, la zɩtbã zãgsda soondgo, n bao yell n kõ b mense." 
Proverbs22:4 Sik-m-meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees kõta arzɛka, la ziir ne yõ-woko." 
Proverbs22:5 Tʋʋm-kɛg soab sor gãnega ne bẽds la gõose. Ned ning sẽn nong-a a vɩɩm zãagda a meng ne so-kãnga. 
Proverbs22:6 Zãms biig a yel-manesem sẽn tog n yɩ to-to. Woto, ba a sã n wa kʋʋl me, a ka na n bas-b ye." 
Proverbs22:7 Arzɛk soab n so naong rãmba, la ned sã n tɩ reeg samd ned a to nengẽ, a lebga a soabã yamba." 
Proverbs22:8 Sẽn bʋt-a wẽng na n kẽeba toogo, la pãng ning yẽnda sẽn tar n maand wẽngã na n sɛɛme." 
Proverbs22:9 Maan-neer soab na n paama barka, bala, yẽnda rɩkda a rɩɩb n dɩlgd naong rãmba." 
Proverbs22:10 Rig nin-paoogda tɩ zabr sɛ, tɩ nokoɛɛm ne tʋy me sɛ." 
Proverbs22:11 Ned sã n nong pʋ-peelem la a gomd ne sõmblem, a yaa rĩm zoa." 
Proverbs22:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kogenda bãngre, la bãmb sãamda zãmb dãmbã goamã." 
Proverbs22:13 Kʋɩɩm yetame: «Gɩgemd n be yɩnga! M sã n yi, a na n kʋ-m lame!»" 
Proverbs22:14 Pʋg-yoodr no-goam yaa wa bog-zulunga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sẽn yik ne-a soabã n lʋɩt be. 
Proverbs22:15 Biig sũur pida ne yalemdo, la f sã n dems-a ne wẽedo, a na n basa a yalemdã." 
Proverbs22:16 B tõeeme n namsd naong soaba, n mik b kõt-a-la arzegse, la sẽn kõt-a arzɛk soab a paasd-a meng naongo." 
Proverbs22:17 Kɩll f tʋbr n kelg yam dãmb goamã, yok f yam n deeg m bãngrã." 
Proverbs22:18 Fo sã n bĩng-b f sũur pʋgẽ la f togsd-b daar fãa, b na n kõ-f-la sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs22:19 Sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ fo teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n kõo foom bãngr dũndã." 
Proverbs22:20 Mam gʋlsa yel-bũn pis-tã sẽn yaa sagls la bãngr n na n kõ foom," 
Proverbs22:21 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ fo bãng tɩ sɩd goamã yaa vẽenese. Woto, f na n tõog n leoka sẽn tʋm-a foomã ne sɩd goamã." 
Proverbs22:22 Ra fã naong soab a sẽn ka pãng yĩng ye, la f ra maan nimbãan-ned pãng bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye." 
Proverbs22:23 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zab n sõng-b lame, la b na n sãama neb nins sẽn sãamd-b bãmbã vɩɩm." 
Proverbs22:24 Ra yõg zood ne sũ-tʋʋl-neda, la f ra rɩk sũ-pu-ned n maan f tũud-n-taag ye." 
Proverbs22:25 Sã n ka rẽ, f wat n dɩka a zʋgdã tɩ wa lebg bẽdg f mengã yĩnga." 
Proverbs22:26 Da rɩk sard n yeel tɩ f na n yaoo ned a to samd ye. 
Proverbs22:27 Bala, fo sã n ka tõog n yao, b na n wa sik-f lame la b rɩk f gãagã n looge." 
Proverbs22:28 Da yẽrg kʋdem wẽndẽ toadg kugrã fo yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n viglã ye. 
Proverbs22:29 Ned sã n maand a tʋʋmd sõama, a ka na n tʋm nin-zaals yĩng ye, a na n tʋma rĩm-dãmb yĩnga." 
Proverbs23:1 F sã n zĩ n dɩt ne nin-naaba, bɩ f maan gũusg ne bũmb ning sẽn be f taoorã." 
Proverbs23:2 Fo sã n yaa yão-be-ned bɩ f yõk f menga. 
Proverbs23:3 Da tʋlg a rɩ-noodã ye, tɩ yaa belgr dɩɩbo." 
Proverbs23:4 Da nams f meng n pʋg arzegs ye, la ra sak tɩ bõn-kãng lebg f zu-loɛɛg ye." 
Proverbs23:5 Fo yonga f nin n get arzegse? Bãng tɩ b na n wa loogame, bala, b mii pɩgs pusbu, la b na n yɩka wa sɩlga, n loog saasẽ." 
Proverbs23:6 Ra rɩ nin-wẽng rɩɩb ye, la f ra tʋlg a rɩ-noodã ye." 
Proverbs23:7 Bala, a yel-manesmã yaa wa a tagsgã sẽn yaa to-to wã. Yẽnda na n yeela foom tɩ f rɩ la f yũ, t'a sũurã yaool n ka be ne foom ye." 
Proverbs23:8 Woto, fo na n wʋba bũmb ning fo sẽn dɩ wã, la f na n sãama gom-nood nins fo sẽn dag n gomã." 
Proverbs23:9 Da gom ne yalem ye, bala, yẽnda na n kisga fo yam goamã." 
Proverbs23:10 Da yẽrg kʋdem-wẽndẽ toadg kugr ye, la f ra reeg kɩɩbs pʋʋg n soog ye." 
Proverbs23:11 Bala, bãmb gũudã tara pãnga, la b na n zab n sõnga bãmba." 
Proverbs23:12 Segl f sũur n deeg remsgo, la f wɩng ne bãngrã goam kelgre." 
Proverbs23:13 Da bas biig n ka rems-a ye, bala, wẽed ka kʋʋd biig ye." 
Proverbs23:14 Fo sã n wẽ-a, f na n fãag-a-la ne kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Proverbs23:15 M biiga, fo sã n paam yam, mam me sũur na n yɩɩ noogo." 
Proverbs23:16 Fo noorã sã n togsd sɩd goamã, mam na n kɩdma ne sũ-no-kãsenga." 
Proverbs23:17 Da maan sũ-kiir ne yel-wẽn-maandbã ye, la bɩ f zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab daar fãa." 
Proverbs23:18 Bala, daar n be, tɩ bũmb ning fo sẽn tẽedã ka na n vaal ye." 
Proverbs23:19 M biiga, kelg n paam yam, la f tũ sor sẽn yaa tɩrga." 
Proverbs23:20 Ra tũ sẽn yũud-b rãam n tɩgdã, la f ra tũ sẽn wãbd-b nemd n tɩgdã ye." 
Proverbs23:21 Bala, rã-yũud ne yão-be-ned kẽesda a meng naongo. La sẽn nong-a gõeem na n yelga fu-kʋdse." 
Proverbs23:22 Kelg f ba tɩ yaa yẽnda n dog foom, la f ra paoog f ma, a sẽn lebg pʋg-yãang yĩng ye." 
Proverbs23:23 Bao sɩdã, la f ra bas-a ye, la f bao yam, ne zãmsg la bãngre." 
Proverbs23:24 Nin-tɩrg ba kɩdemdame, la sẽn dog-a yam soab maanda sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs23:25 Bɩ f ba ne f ma maan sũ-noogo, la bɩ pag ning sẽn dog-a foomã kɩdem ne sũ-noogo!" 
Proverbs23:26 M biiga, kɩs sɩd ne maam, la f rɩk m mamsg ne sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs23:27 La f bãng tɩ pʋg-yoodr yaa wa bog-zulunga, la pʋg-sãang yaa wa bul-sẽka." 
Proverbs23:28 Yẽnda solgd n bẽta neb wa fãada, la yẽnda kɩtdame tɩ neb wʋsg lebg zãmb dãmb n tudgdẽ." 
Proverbs23:29 Ãnda rãmb la toog paamda? Ãnda rãmb n maand m bãngẽ? Ãnda rãmb la zabã? Ãnda rãmb n yẽgemd n ka sɛtẽ wã? Ãnda rãmb n paamd poglg zaalem yĩnga? Ãnda rãmb la nin-moaama? 
Proverbs23:30 Yaa sẽn kaoosd-b reezẽ rãam yũub zĩigẽ wã, la sẽn yũud-b reezẽ rãam toay-toay sẽn kalemd taabã." 
Proverbs23:31 Ra ges reezẽ rãamã sẽn moogã ye, ra ges a sẽn yaa neer wamdã pʋgã ye, la f ra yeel t'a sakda yũub ye." 
Proverbs23:32 A wat n baas n dũma wa waafo, n kɛ wa põeere." 
Proverbs23:33 Fo na n yãnda bõn-sãamse, la f na n yɩɩ mo-be-neda." 
Proverbs23:34 Fo na n wa lebga wa ned sẽn gãe ko-kãsengã sʋka, wa ned sẽn zao tɩɩg wil-gɛlengɛɛg zugu, tɩ sobg lengdẽ." 
Proverbs23:35 Yẽnda bee beenẽ n yetẽ: «B wẽe maam, la ka zab-m ye. B pãba maam, la m ka bãng ye. Mam na n neka wakat-bʋgo? M sã n neke, m na n leb n yũume!»" 
Proverbs24:1 Ra maan sũ-kiir ne nin-wẽns ye, la f ra bao tɩ naag-b ye." 
Proverbs24:2 Bala, bãmb tagsda sãoong yell bala, la b noyã sẽn yiisdã fãa yaa wẽnga." 
Proverbs24:3 Yam n met yiri, la yaa ne bãngr la yirã yalsd kãenkãe." 
Proverbs24:4 Yaa ne bãngre, la a ro-pʋsã fãa pit ne te-sõama buud toor-toor sẽn tar yõodo." 
Proverbs24:5 Ned yam n kõt-a pãnga. Ned sã n tar bãngre, a paamda pãng n paase." 
Proverbs24:6 Bala, yaa ne magb la f tõe n kẽng zabrẽ. Sagendb sã n yaa wʋsgo, f paamda tõogre." 
Proverbs24:7 Yam zãra ne yalma, Yaa rẽ t'a ka tõe n yaag a noor tẽngã rignoorẽ ye." 
Proverbs24:8 Ned sã n tagsd n dat n maan wẽnga, b boond-a lame tɩ zãmb naaba." 
Proverbs24:9 Yalem tagsg yaa yel-wẽn bala, la sẽn yaa yel-beed nebã nifẽ yaa nin-paoogda." 
Proverbs24:10 Fo sã n bas tɩ f raood boog yel-pakr wakate, f pãngã fãa lebga zaalem bala." 
Proverbs24:11 Fãag neb nins b sẽn yõg n dabd kʋʋbã. Gɩdg tɩ b ra kʋ b sẽn lengd-b rãmb n dabd kʋʋbã ye. 
Proverbs24:12 Fo sã n wa yeele: «Tõnd dag n ka bãng ye!» Bɩ f bãng tɩ sẽn feesd-a sũyã miime, ned ning sẽn gũud-a fo vɩɩmã neeme, la bãmb na n yaoo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde." 
Proverbs24:13 M biiga, rɩ sɩɩdo, bala sɩɩd yaa noogo, la sɩ-vak nooma noorẽ." 
Proverbs24:14 Woto me, bãng yam f meng yĩnga. F sã n paam-a, daar n be, tɩ f tẽebã ka na n vaal ye." 
Proverbs24:15 Da soos n dɩgl bẽdg nin-tɩrg yiri, n na n maan a wẽng ye, la f ra sãam a vʋʋsgã zĩig ye." 
Proverbs24:16 Bala, nin-tɩrg tõe n lʋɩɩ naoor a yopoe, la a na n leb n yikame. La toog na n luba nin-wẽnga." 
Proverbs24:17 Fo bɛ sã n lʋɩ, bɩ f ra maan sũ-noog ye. A sã n lak n na n lʋɩ bɩ f ra kɩdme," 
Proverbs24:18 tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab wa yã rẽ, tɩ b sũur sãam tɩ b bas n ka sɩbg-a ye." 
Proverbs24:19 Ra yik f sũur ne nin-wẽns ye, la f ra maan sũ-kiir ne-b ye." 
Proverbs24:20 Bala, nin-wẽnsã ka na n paam beoog neer ye. Bãmb vɩɩmã yaa wa fɩtl sẽn na n wa ki." 
Proverbs24:21 M biiga, zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la f zoe rĩma, la f ra naag neb nins sẽn baood tɩ yɛlã fãa tegsã ye." 
Proverbs24:22 Bala, toogã na n ling-b-la vugr bala, la ãnda n mi sɩbgr ning Wẽnnaam, bɩ rĩmã sẽn na n sɩbg bãmbã?" 
Proverbs24:23 Woto me yaa yam dãmb goam a taaba: Bʋʋd zĩigẽ, b ka tog n ges ned sẽn yaa-a soab n yaool n bʋ a bʋʋd ye." 
Proverbs24:24 Ned sã n yeel nin-wẽng t'a yaa tɩrga, b kãabd-a-la kãab-beedo, la nebã sũy yikda ne yẽnda." 
Proverbs24:25 La sẽn keoogd-b nin-wẽngã maanda neere. B na n paama bark la sũ-noogo. 
Proverbs24:26 Leokr sẽn leokd ne sɩd yaa zood hakɩɩk bãnde. 
Proverbs24:27 Tʋm f tʋʋmã yɩng fãa n sɛ, la f segl f pʋʋg neere, n yaool n me f zaka." 
Proverbs24:28 Da rõd f to zaalem yĩng ye. Fo rat n yaga zĩrẽ la? 
Proverbs24:29 Da saag n yeele: «A zagl sẽn maan maam to-to wã, m na n maan-a-la woto me n lebs ye. Bala, mam na n dola ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems-a tʋʋmde.»" 
Proverbs24:30 Mam tũu kʋɩɩm a ye pʋʋg sɛɛgẽ n looge, mam pɩʋʋga yam-kaalg soab reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg noore." 
Proverbs24:31 La ade, gõos n dag n yit zĩig fãa, tɩ mo-yoodã gãneg zĩig zãnga, la a lalgã sẽn me ne kugã rag n lʋɩɩme." 
Proverbs24:32 Mam maaga m yĩng n tags bũmb ning mam sẽn yã wã yelle, la m paama zãmsgo." 
Proverbs24:33 Gõeem bilf bala, suusg bilf bala, la gãand n tẽeg f nao n kalemd f nus bilf bala," 
Proverbs24:34 tɩ naong wa n soos n yõk-f wa wagdre, tɩ kom me soos n sig-f wa fãada." 
Proverbs25:1 Ad a Salmo yel-bũn a taaba, Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nebã sẽn tigsi." 
Proverbs25:2 Wẽnnaam waoogrã yaa b sẽn solgd b yɛlã. La rĩm waoogr yaa a sẽn veesd n bãng yɛlã n yaool n tʋma. 
Proverbs25:3 Ned sẽn ka tõe n bãng yaa yĩngr zãntlmã, tẽngã zulum sẽn yaa to-to, la bũmb ning sẽn be rĩm sũurẽ." 
Proverbs25:4 Bɩ b yiis wanzuri rẽgdo, la yõak na yõg laok sẽn yaa neere." 
Proverbs25:5 Bɩ rĩm yiis nin-wẽng a taoore, la tɩrlem na kɩt t'a zaoorã paam pãnga." 
Proverbs25:6 Da pẽg f meng rĩm taoore, la f ra ning f meng nin-bɛd zĩigẽ ye." 
Proverbs25:7 Bala, b sẽn na n yeel foom yaa: «Wa rʋ ka,» n são b sẽn na n sik foom naabã taoore." 
Proverbs25:8 Da yãg ne f to boolg bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye. Bala, a sã n gom n lub-fu, f na n maana a wãna?" 
Proverbs25:9 Fo sã n tar yell ne f to bɩ f bʋ ne-a, la f ra luk ned a to bãong ye." 
Proverbs25:10 Ka rẽ, a na n wa wʋmame n tʋʋd-fo, tɩ f ka leb n tõe n lebs f zelemd poorẽ ye." 
Proverbs25:11 Gomd sẽn gom a wakat yaa wa b sẽn dõog sãnem tɩ-biis wanzuri zugu. 
Proverbs25:12 Yam soab saglg tara yõod ne ned ning sẽn deegd-a n yɩɩd sãnem zũuri, la sãnem halaal yãndo." 
Proverbs25:13 Koe-toagsd sẽn togsd sɩd kengda a soaal pɛlga. Yẽnda wẽnda pems-maasg sẽn wẽed ned tigsg wakate. 
Proverbs25:14 Ned sã n wukd a meng n pʋlemdẽ t'a na n kõo kũun n yaool n ka pidsdẽ, a wẽnda wa sawat la sobg sẽn yikdi, tɩ saag yaool n ka niid ye." 
Proverbs25:15 Sũ-mar tõe naaba, la gomd sẽn gom ne sũ-mar wãada kõaba." 
Proverbs25:16 F sã n yãnd sɩɩdo, bɩ f yãk sẽn na n sek f rɩɩbo, la f gũus n da wa rɩ tɩ loog-f tɩ f wa wʋbdẽ ye." 
Proverbs25:17 Da nong n kẽnd f to zakẽ wakat fãa ye. Sã n ka rẽ, a yamã wat n yi-f lame t'a kisg-fu." 
Proverbs25:18 Ned sã n kɩt kaset zĩrẽ a to zugu, a wẽnda wa guug bɩ sʋʋga, wall peemd b sẽn sɩlse." 
Proverbs25:19 Ned sã n teeg zãmb soab yel-pakr wakate, wẽnda wa ned sẽn dat n wãb ne yẽnd sẽn vigsdi, wall ned sẽn dat n tik kar-kɩɩng n kẽne." 
Proverbs25:20 Ned sã n yɩɩnd sũ-sãang soab taoore, wẽnda wa a sẽn pilg a fuug waood wẽnde, la wa b sẽn dɩk zẽem n kalem miisim." 
Proverbs25:21 Kom sã n tar f bɛ bɩ f kõ-arɩɩb t'a rɩ, la ko-yũud sã n tar-a bɩ f kõ-a koom t'a yũ." 
Proverbs25:22 Fo sã n maan a woto, yaa wa fo sẽn dɩk bug-saall n dogl a zugu, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n dola foom." 
Proverbs25:23 Nug-rɩtg sobg wata ne saaga, la zĩrẽ-beed wata ne nen-gãnenga." 
Proverbs25:24 F sẽn na n gãe bɛoong zugu, n são f sẽn na n gãe ro-yɛng pʋg ne pʋg-zab-zabda." 
Proverbs25:25 Kiba-noog sẽn yi tẽn-zãrgẽ n wa, wẽnda wa ned sẽn yɛ tɩ b kõ-a ko-maasg t'a yũ." 
Proverbs25:26 Nin-tɩrg sã n zoe nin-wẽng nif n tũ-a, wẽnda wa bãk koom sẽn bendge, wall bulg koom sẽn põoge." 
Proverbs25:27 Ka sõama tɩ ned rɩ sɩɩd wʋsg tɩ loog ye, la ka sõama me tɩ ned bao a meng waoogr ye." 
Proverbs25:28 Ned sẽn ka tar yõk-m-meng wẽnda tẽng lalg sẽn lʋɩ n bas-a. 
Proverbs26:1 Wa sapɩlem sẽn ka tog ne tʋʋlg wẽndã, tɩ saag me ka tog ne tigsg wakatã, woto me, waoogr ka tog ne yalem ye." 
Proverbs26:2 Wa luiil bɩ sɩlaall sẽn yɩkd n loogdẽ wã, woto me, ned sã n ka maan bũmb tɩ b kãab a wẽnga, yaa zaalem." 
Proverbs26:3 Sãbsg yaa weef yĩnga, wĩir yaa bõang yĩnga, la dasaar yaa yalem poor yĩnga." 
Proverbs26:4 Da leok yalem wa sẽn zems a yalemdã ye. Ka rẽ, fo meng wat n wẽneg-a lame." 
Proverbs26:5 Leok yalem wa sẽn zems a yalemdã, t'a ra wa tẽed t'a tara yam ye." 
Proverbs26:6 Ned sã n tʋm yalem t'a tɩ togs koɛɛga, yaa wa a sẽn fiu a nao, n bao toog n kõ a menga." 
Proverbs26:7 Yalem sã n wẽed yel-bũna, wẽnda wa woabg sẽn kẽnd wobendo." 
Proverbs26:8 Ned sã n pẽg yalma, yaa wa a sẽn dɩk kugr n sẽbg loaabgẽ." 
Proverbs26:9 Yalem sã n wẽed yel-bũna, wẽnda wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam n zãad gõpayãndg a nugẽ." 
Proverbs26:10 Ned sã n dɩk yalem bɩ so-loaad a tʋʋmdẽ, a wẽnda tãb-tãood sẽn tãood n pogend neb a taaba." 
Proverbs26:11 Yalem lebda a yalem-tʋʋmẽ, wa baag sẽn lebd a wʋbdẽ." 
Proverbs26:12 F sã n yãnd ned sẽn tagsd t'a tara yam, bãng tɩ yalem n são nin-kãngã." 
Proverbs26:13 Kʋɩɩm yetame: «Rũm-toaag n yas sorẽ wã, gɩgemd n be sorã zugu.»" 
Proverbs26:14 Kʋɩleng sẽn be a lugrẽ n yilimd to-to wã, kʋɩɩm me bilimda a gãagẽ a woto." 
Proverbs26:15 Kʋɩɩm tʋmda a nug laagẽ, la a getame tɩ zẽk a nugã n wa a noorẽ wã yaa toogo." 
Proverbs26:16 Kʋɩɩm tagsdame tɩ yẽnda tara yam, n yɩɩd neb a yopoe sẽn mi tɩ leok ne yam." 
Proverbs26:17 So-loaad sẽn kẽed zabr sẽn ka a zabre, wẽnda wa ned sẽn yã baag n baood n gãd a tʋba." 
Proverbs26:18 Ned sã n tudg a to n yaool n yetẽ t'a reemdame, a wẽnda wa gãeeng sẽn wʋkd bugum n lobd yaare, la a tãood pe-zẽnem sẽn tõe n kʋ." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Raad sã n kae, bugum kiidame. Tẽn-kãn-ned me sã n ka be, zabr sɛtame." 
Proverbs26:21 Bug-saal bɩ ra-giis sẽn paasd bugum pãng to-to wã, zab-pirs me yãngda zabr a woto." 
Proverbs26:22 Tẽn-kãn-ned goam yaa wa rɩ-noodo, tɩ f sã n dɩt-a bɩ a sigd n tat hal f pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs26:23 Ned sã n gomd gom-nood t'a sũurã yaool n yaa wẽnga, a wẽnda wa b sẽn dɩk wanzuri sẽn ka yɩlge, n bolg tãnd laaga." 
Proverbs26:24 Sẽn kis-a a to solgda a meng ne no-noom goamã, t'a sũurã yaool n pid ne zãmbo." 
Proverbs26:25 Baa yẽnda sã n wa bʋk a koɛɛg n gomda, bɩ f ra tẽ-a ye. Bala, tags-beed wʋsg n be a sũurẽ wã." 
Proverbs26:26 Yẽnda tõe n maana sɩlem n lud a kisgrã, la baoosgo, a wẽnemã na n wa puka nebã fãa nifẽ." 
Proverbs26:27 Ned sã n tu bok n bẽd neda, a na n wẽneg n lʋɩ a pʋgẽ, la ned sã n bilg kugr tɩ zãb neda, kugrã na n lebg n zãb-a lame." 
Proverbs26:28 Ned sã n yagd zĩrẽ, a kisa a sẽn dõt-b rãmbã, la no-noom goam wata ne wãabo." 
Proverbs27:1 Ra pẽg f meng ne beoog yell ye, bala, fo ka mi rũndã daarã sẽn na n yɩ-a soab ye." 
Proverbs27:2 Bas tɩ ned a to pẽg-fo, la ra yɩ fo meng noor n pẽgd-f ye. Bas tɩ nin-zẽng pẽg-fo, la f ra pẽg f meng ye." 
Proverbs27:3 Kugr zɩsame, bĩisr zɩsame, la yalem sũ-puugr zɩslem yɩɩda bãmb fãa." 
Proverbs27:4 Sũ-puugr yaa wẽnga, la sũ-yikr ka sõama ye. La ãnda soab n tõe n yals sũ-ki-ned taoore?" 
Proverbs27:5 Keoogr sẽn yaa vẽenega, n são nonglem sẽn solge." 
Proverbs27:6 F zoa sã n togs-f sɩd tɩ zab-fo, a wilgda foom a nonglem. La f bɛ sã n mok-fo, yaa zãmb n be be." 
Proverbs27:7 Ned sã n dɩ n tɩge, a zãgsda sɩɩdo, la kom sẽn tar-a soab getame tɩ bõn-tɩɩsg buudã fãa yaa noogo." 
Proverbs27:8 Ned sẽn bas a yir yaa wa luiil sẽn bas a tʋko. 
Proverbs27:9 Kaam ne parfẽ kõta sũ-noogo, la f zoa sẽn sagend-f ne bʋgsem, n são f sẽn na n sagl f menga." 
Proverbs27:10 Da bas f zoa bɩ f ba zoa ye. La f ra kẽng f ma-biig nengẽ f yel-pakr wakat ye. Bala, f yak sẽn pẽ ne-f n são f ba biig sẽn zãr ne-fo." 
Proverbs27:11 M biiga, paam yam n noog m sũuri. Dẽ, ned sã n tʋʋs-ma, m na tõog n leok a soaba." 
Proverbs27:12 Gũus-m-meng soab yãta yell n zoe n soonde, la zɩtbã zãgsda soondgo, n bao yell n kõ b mense." 
Proverbs27:13 Ned sã n dɩk sard ne foom ned a to yĩnga, bɩ f reeg a fuugu. La sã n yaa sãan yĩng bɩ f kɩt t'a gãneg bũmbu." 
Proverbs27:14 Ned sã n sãd tõd-beoog n zẽk a koɛɛg n pʋʋs a yaka, b geelgda a pʋʋsgã wa kãab-beedo." 
Proverbs27:15 Pʋg-zab-zabd wẽnda wa saag sẽn minisd n ka sɛtẽ ye. 
Proverbs27:16 Ned sã n baood n gɩdg-a, wẽnda ned sẽn baood n gɩdg sebgo, wall ned sẽn baood n zã kaam a nug pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs27:17 A wa kut sẽn saasd kutã, ninsaal yam me n zulgd a to rẽnda." 
Proverbs27:18 Sẽn get-a kankang yell n dɩt a biisi, la sẽn get-a a soaal yell neer n paamd waoogre." 
Proverbs27:19 Wa ned sẽn get koomẽ n ne a nengã, woto me, f sã n get f to, f bãngda f menga." 
Proverbs27:20 Wa kɩɩm-kulg ne a zĩ-zulumsã sẽn ka tõe n pidã, woto me, ninsaal zɩ n yeel t'a raab pidame ye." 
Proverbs27:21 B yɩlgda wanzuri la sãnem boaagẽ. Woto me, ninsaal yʋ-noog n wilgd a sẽn yaa ned ninga." 
Proverbs27:22 Ba b sã n naag yalem ne bɩle n to teoogẽ, b ka na n tõog t'a yalemdã yi n bas-a ye." 
Proverbs27:23 Bãng f piisã sõma, n ges f peosg fãa yell neere." 
Proverbs27:24 Bala, arzɛk ka paad ne a soab wakat fãa ye, la maanf me ka bũmb sẽn paad zamaan woo zamaan n ka teemdẽ ye." 
Proverbs27:25 B wʋrda yamd tɩ mood leb n yita. B wʋrda yam-maas tãmsã zut n bĩngdẽ. 
Proverbs27:26 Woto, f na n paama f piisã kõbdo, n wʋg fuug n yeelge, la f na n koosa f boeesã, n da pʋ-paalle." 
Proverbs27:27 Fo bʋʋsã na n kõ-f-la bĩisim wʋsgo, tɩ f paam n dɩlg f menga, la f rɩlg f zak rãmba, ne f tʋmtʋmd-pogsã." 
Proverbs28:1 Nin-wẽng zoetame tɩ ned yaool n ka rigd-a ye, la nin-tɩrs pɛlg kegma ne b mens wa gɩgem-polle." 
Proverbs28:2 Tẽng neb sã n ka sakd b naaba, nanambsã lebgda wʋsgo. La tẽng naab sã n tar yam la bãngre, tẽngã zĩndida bãan n kaoose." 
Proverbs28:3 Naong soab sã n namsd ka-pãens rãmba, wẽnda wa sa-kẽeng sẽn niid n sãam koodo." 
Proverbs28:4 Sẽn kɩɩsd-b zãmsg pẽgda nin-wẽnse, la sẽn sakd-b zãmsg zabda ne nin-wẽnse." 
Proverbs28:5 Nin-wẽns ka wʋmd no-tũudr võor ye. La sẽn baood-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã wʋmda a fãa võore. 
Proverbs28:6 Naong soab sẽn kẽnd ne burkĩndlim, n são arzɛk soab sẽn tũud so-golemse." 
Proverbs28:7 Biig sẽn sakd wilgr tara yam, la sẽn tũud-a yão-be-neb ningda a ba yãnde." 
Proverbs28:8 Ned sã n dɩkd a ligd n pengd n baood yõodo, a baood n bĩngda sẽn zoet-a naong rãmb nimbãanega." 
Proverbs28:9 Ned sã n yẽd a tʋb n ka rat n kelg zãmsgo, a pʋʋsgã meng yaa yel-beedo." 
Proverbs28:10 Ned sã n tudg nin-tɩrg n kɩt t'a rɩk so-wẽnga, a na n wẽneg n lʋɩɩ bok ning a sẽn tu wã pʋgẽ. La burkĩmbã na n paama naar tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩre." 
Proverbs28:11 Arzɛk soab tagsdame t'a tara yam, la naong soab sẽn tar yam mii a yamã tɛka." 
Proverbs28:12 Nin-tɩrs sã n paam tõogre, yaa waoogr meng-menga. La nin-wẽns sã n deeg naam, ned fãa zoet n baooda a menga." 
Proverbs28:13 Sẽn solgd-a a kongr ka na n paam tõogr ye. La ned sã n vẽneg n togs a kongr n bas-a, a paamda nimbãan-zoeere." 
Proverbs28:14 Sẽn zoet-a Wẽnnaam wakat fãa tara barka! La sẽn kengd-a a sũur na n paama toogo. 
Proverbs28:15 Na-wẽng sã n maand nimbãan-dãmb pãnga, wẽnda wa gɩgemd sẽn kelemde, wa rigd-n-yĩidg sẽn yɩk n na n bir bũmbu." 
Proverbs28:16 Naab sẽn ka tar yam dɩkda weer bal tɩ yaa nebã fãabo. La sẽn kis-a zãmb paoong na n paama yõ-woko. 
Proverbs28:17 Nin-kʋʋd zoetame n na n tɩ lʋɩ bokẽ. Bɩ ned da gɩdg-a ye. 
Proverbs28:18 Sẽn kẽnd-a ne burkĩnd na n paama fãagre, la sẽn tũud-a so-golems na n wa lʋɩ a yembr zugu." 
Proverbs28:19 Sẽn kood-a a pʋʋg na rɩ n tɩge, la naong na sek sẽn pʋgd-a yel-yaalse." 
Proverbs28:20 Sẽn maand-a sɩd paamda barka, la sẽn dat-a n lebg arzɛk soab tao-tao na n wa paama sɩbgre." 
Proverbs28:21 A ka neer tɩ b tũus neb ye, la neb n be n maand wẽng rɩɩb bilf yĩnga." 
Proverbs28:22 Sũ-ki-ned zoet n pʋgda arzegse, la a ka mi tɩ pɛt n na n yõk-a ye." 
Proverbs28:23 Sẽn keoogd-a ned paamda bark n yɩɩd no-noom goam soaba. 
Proverbs28:24 Ned sã n zu a ba bɩ a ma, la a bas n yetẽ tɩ rẽ ka yel-wẽnde, yẽnda soab yaa sãamd tũud-n-taaga." 
Proverbs28:25 Rat-wʋsg soab wata ne zaba, la sẽn teeg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee naar pʋga." 
Proverbs28:26 Ned tõe n tagsdame t'a rɩka so-sõngo, n mik yaool n yaa sor sẽn dabd ne-a kũum zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs28:27 Sẽn kõt-a naong rãmb kõn kong bũmb ye, la sẽn yãt-a naong soab n mumd a nin n loogdẽ na n paama kãab-wẽnga." 
Proverbs28:28 Nin-wẽns sã n soog tẽnga, nebã fãa zoet n baooda b mense. La b sã n wa ki, nin-tɩrsã lebgda wʋsgo." 
Proverbs29:1 B sã n keoogd ned t'a nakd a kãare, sãoong n na n wa ling-a tɩ sẽn maand kae ye." 
Proverbs29:2 Nin-tɩrs sã n lebgd wʋsg tẽngẽ, ninbuiidã maanda sũ-noogo. La nin-wẽns sã n dɩt naam, ninbuiidã yãbdame." 
Proverbs29:3 Sẽn nong-a yam kõt-a ba sũ-noogo, la sẽn pʋgd-a pʋg-yoaadb sãamda a paoongo." 
Proverbs29:4 Rĩm sã n maand sẽn yaa tɩrga, a paasda tẽngã paoongo, la a sã n nong n deegd kũun wʋsgo, a sãamda tẽnga." 
Proverbs29:5 Ned sã n belgd a to ne no-noom goamã, yaa bẽdg la a ningd a meng nao tẽngre." 
Proverbs29:6 Nin-wẽns yel-wẽnã yaa bẽdg b mens yĩnga, la nin-tɩrsã kaasda ne sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs29:7 Nin-tɩrg tẽegda naong rãmb yelle, la nin-wẽng toog ka be ne-b ye." 
Proverbs29:8 Nin-paoogdb rãmbda tẽnga, la yam soab sigsda sũuri." 
Proverbs29:9 Yam soab sã n bʋʋd ne yalma, a gãnema a neng woo, a laadame woo, laafɩ kõn tol n zĩnd ye." 
Proverbs29:10 Nin-kʋʋdb kisa pʋ-peen-neda, la nin-tɩrsã gũuda b vɩɩmã." 
Proverbs29:11 Yalem wilgda a sũ-yikr zãnga, la yam soab gũusda a menga, n ka rat t'a rẽnd puk ye." 
Proverbs29:12 Naab sã n kelgd zĩrẽ goamã, a poorẽ dãmbã fãa lebgda nin-wẽnse." 
Proverbs29:13 Naong soab ne sẽn maand-a neb pãng tara bũmb sẽn wẽnd taaba: Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõt b yiibã fãa vɩɩm. 
Proverbs29:14 Rĩm sã n bʋʋd naong rãmb bʋʋd ne sɩda, a na n paasa a naamã pãng wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Proverbs29:15 Wẽed ne keoogr kõta biig yam, la biig sẽn ka yã wubr ningda a ma yãnde." 
Proverbs29:16 Nin-wẽns sã n lebgd wʋsgo, yel-kɛgã me paasdame. La nin-tɩrsã na n yãnda bãmb lʋɩɩse." 
Proverbs29:17 Rems f biiga, t'a na n kɩtame tɩ f paam vɩ-bãane, la a kõ-f sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs29:18 Vẽnegr sã n ka tẽngẽ, ned kam fãa maanda a sẽn date. La bark bee ned ning sẽn sakd zãmsgã zugu." 
Proverbs29:19 Ka ne goam la b sagend yamb ye, bala, ba a sã n wʋmdẽ me, a ka sakd ye." 
Proverbs29:20 Ned sã n ka tagsd n yaool n gome, b sẽn kelgd yalem n são." 
Proverbs29:21 Fo sã n põneg f yamb t'a paoodẽ, a wat n yɩɩ kʋɩɩma." 
Proverbs29:22 Sũ-pu-ned wata ne zaba, la Sũ-tʋʋn-ned maanda yel-wẽn wʋsgo." 
Proverbs29:23 Waoog-m-meng wata ne paoogre, la sik-m-meng wata ne waoogre." 
Proverbs29:24 Sẽn sõngd-a wagdr kis-a a menga, bala, yẽnda wʋmda kãab-wẽngã la a sĩnda." 
Proverbs29:25 Ninsaal zoees wata ne yelle, la yell kõn paam sẽn teeg-a Wẽnnaam ye." 
Proverbs29:26 Neb wʋsg baooda sõm ne nanambse, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kaood ned kam fãa bʋʋd wa sẽn zemse." 
Proverbs29:27 Nin-tɩrs sẽn kis n yɩɩd fãa yaa nin-wẽnse. La nin-wẽng me sẽn kis n yɩɩd fãa yaa nin-tɩrse. 
Proverbs30:1 Woto yaa a Yake biig a Agʋʋr goamã, a Agʋʋr goma ne a Itiyɛlle, yaa ne a Itiyɛll ne a Ukalle." 
Proverbs30:2 Sɩda, mam yaa yalem n yɩɩd nebã fãa, la m ka tar ninsaalbã yam baa bilf ye." 
Proverbs30:3 Mam ka zãms tɩ bãng yam ye, la mam ka tar pʋ-peelem dãmbã bãngr ye." 
Proverbs30:4 Ãnda n dʋ yĩngr n lebg n sigi? Ãnda n kogl a nus n kok pemsem? Ãnda n yondg koom a fuugẽ? Ãnda n naan tẽn-gãongã? A soab yʋʋr la a bõe, la a biigã yʋʋr la a bõe? Fo sã n miẽ, bɩ f togs-ma." 
Proverbs30:5 B makame n mik tɩ Wẽnnaam goamã fãa yaa sɩda, la a yaa gãong neb nins sẽn baood zĩ-lilldg bãmb nengẽ wã yĩnga." 
Proverbs30:6 Da paas bũmb Wẽnnaam goamã zug tɩ b wa zab ne-fo, la b ges-f wa zĩrẽ-be-ned ye." 
Proverbs30:7 Mam Wẽnnaam, m kot-y-la bũmb a yiibu. Kõ-y-b maam tɩ m na n ket n vɩ:" 
Proverbs30:8 Zãag-y-m ne zãmbo, la ne zĩrẽ-beedo. Da bas-y tɩ m yɩ naong soaba, la y ra bas tɩ m yɩ arzɛk soab me ye. Bɩ y kõ maam sẽn sekd m dɩɩbo," 
Proverbs30:9 tɩ m dɩ-n-tɩkã pʋgẽ, bɩ m da wa yeel tɩ m ka mi yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wall tɩ m naongã ra wa kɩt tɩ m zu, n paoog yãmb a Wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã ye." 
Proverbs30:10 Ra kãneg tʋmtʋmd ne a zu-soab ye, ka rẽ, a sã n kãab-fo, tũud-f lame." 
Proverbs30:11 Neb n be n kãabd b ba-rãmb wẽnse, la b ka ningd b ma-rãmb bark ye." 
Proverbs30:12 Neb n be n yetẽ tɩ b yaa yɩlma, n yaool n nan ka paam pekr ne b rẽgdã ye." 
Proverbs30:13 Neb n be n ka nand-b taaba, n get-b ne wuk-m-menga." 
Proverbs30:14 Neb n be tɩ b yẽnã yaa wa zabr sʋʋse, tɩ b yɛyã yaa wa sʋʋse, n dat n wãb nimbãan-dãmbã, ne naong rãmbã, n menes-b dũniyã zugu." 
Proverbs30:15 Dendeoog n tar a kom-pugli a yiibu: «A kõ maam, ne a kõ maam.» Bũmb a tãab n be n ka tɩgd ye, la naasẽ soabã zɩ n yeel tɩ sekame ye!" 
Proverbs30:16 Yaa kɩɩm-kulgu, la pʋg-kiiri, la tẽn-koɛɛng sẽn dat koom, la bugum sẽn zɩ n yeel tɩ «Sekame» ye." 
Proverbs30:17 Ned nif sã n sãag a ba, la a ka rat n sak a ma noore, ko-soog gãabd n na n feo yẽnda nini, la yɩbr-bi n na dɩ yẽnda nemdo." 
Proverbs30:18 Yel-soalem a tãab n be n yɩɩd mam tagsgo, la a naas n be mam sẽn ka wʋmd b võor ye:" 
Proverbs30:19 «Yaa pa-nand-tugr sẽn tũud sor ning yĩngr n yɩgda, waaf sẽn tũud sor ning pĩig zugu, koom koglg sẽn tũud sor ning ko-kãsengã zugu, la rao sẽn tũud sor ning n kẽngd pʋg-sad nengẽ.»" 
Proverbs30:20 Pʋg-yoodr manesem yaa a woto: Yẽnda maanda wẽng n bas n yetẽ t'a ka maan bũmbu, tɩ yaa wa a sẽn dɩ n sɛ, n bas n yẽes a noore." 
Proverbs30:21 Bũmb a tãab n be n tõe n kɩt tɩ dũniyã rigimdi, la a naas n be dũniyã sẽn ka tõe n sak n deeg ye:" 
Proverbs30:22 Yaa yamb sẽn lebg rĩma, yalem sẽn paamd n dɩt n tɩgda," 
Proverbs30:23 pʋg-sad b sẽn kis sẽn paam sɩda, la yem-poak sẽn deeg a zu-soben-poak zĩiga." 
Proverbs30:24 Bõn-vɩɩlɩ a naas n be tẽng zug n paoodẽ, n yaool n tar yam:" 
Proverbs30:25 Yaa gũuri. Bãmb ka pãng ye, la sɩpaolgo b tigsda b rɩɩbo." 
Proverbs30:26 Yaa kɩɩse. Bãmb pãngã paoodame, la b maanda b yiy pĩis bogdẽ." 
Proverbs30:27 Yaa sʋyã. Bãmb ka tar naab ye, la b yaool n yɩgda sull-sulli." 
Proverbs30:28 La bãngenlegsr f sẽn tõe n gãda f nugẽ, t'a yaool n be rĩm-dãmb zagsẽ." 
Proverbs30:29 Bũmb a tãab n be, m yet t'a naase, tɩ b sã n kẽnd bɩ be ra-sãnde." 
Proverbs30:30 Yaa gɩgemde. Rũmsã fãa sʋka, yaa yẽnda n yaa gãndaoogo. A ka targd bũmb baa fɩ taoor ye." 
Proverbs30:31 Yaa no-raoog sẽn dong a zugu, n gengd no-yãans sʋka, la boɛɛga, la rĩm sẽn lʋɩ a tãb-biis taoor n kẽnda." 
Proverbs30:32 Fo sã n dag n maana yalemdo, n baood n zẽk f menga, n lebg n tagse, bɩ f pĩ f noore." 
Proverbs30:33 B sã n fɩr bĩis-naare b yãkda kaam, b sã n wẽ ned yõore a yũnda zɩɩm, la sũur sã n yiki, wata ne zabre." 
Proverbs31:1 Woto yaa sagls rĩm a Lemuwɛll ma sẽn sagl-a. 
Proverbs31:2 M biiga, m na n yeela foom tɩ bõe? Mam meng bi-nongre, m na n yeela foom tɩ bõe? Mam pʋleng biiga, m na n yeela foom tɩ bõe?" 
Proverbs31:3 Da sɛɛs f pãng ne pagb ye, la f ra rɩk f meng n kõ sẽn wãad-a rĩm-dãmb ye." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuwɛlle, ka segd tɩ rĩm yũ rãam, la ka segd me tɩ nanambs me yũ rã-toos ye." 
Proverbs31:5 B sã n yũ, b tõe n wa yĩma no-tũuds nins b sẽn viglã, n ka zoe naong rãmb nimbãaneg ye." 
Proverbs31:6 Bɩ b bao rã-toos n kõ sẽn dɩk-b kũum sore, la b kõ sẽn zĩ-a ne sũ-toogã reezẽ rãam," 
Proverbs31:7 tɩ bãmb yũ n yĩm b naongã, la b ra leb n tẽeg b sũ-sãangã yell ye." 
Proverbs31:8 Yaag-f noor n gom n sõng muka, la sẽn ka tar-a sõangda." 
Proverbs31:9 Yaag-f noor n kao bʋʋd tɩrga, n sõng ka-pãens rãmbã ne naong rãmbã." 
Proverbs31:10 Pʋg-sõng yɩɩda sãnem, la a ka paamd naana ye." 
Proverbs31:11 A sɩdã kɩsa sɩd ne-a, la a na n dɩ a yõodo." 
Proverbs31:12 A ka maand a sɩdã wẽng ye, A vɩɩmã fãa tɛka, a maanda a sɩdã neere." 
Proverbs31:13 Yẽnda baooda pe-kõbd ne lamdo, n wĩid ne sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs31:14 Yẽnda yaa wa toandb koom kogendo, a kɩtdame tɩ b talld rɩɩb n yit zĩ-zãrsẽ n watẽ." 
Proverbs31:15 Yẽnda yikdame tɩ zĩig nan ka yẽeg ye, n kõt a zak rãmb dɩɩbo, n wilgd tʋmtʋmd-pogsã b tʋʋmde." 
Proverbs31:16 Yẽnda sã n yãnd pʋʋg sẽn ta a yam, a raad-a lame. A yiisda a meng ligd n kɩtẽ tɩ b sel reezẽ tɩɩse." 
Proverbs31:17 Yẽnda sẽbgda a kalle, n tʋmd a tʋʋma." 
Proverbs31:18 A neeme t'a tʋʋmdã tara nafre, la yẽnda ka kiisd a fɩtl yʋng ye." 
Proverbs31:19 Yẽnda rɩkda a gendre, n sɩng wĩibu." 
Proverbs31:20 Yẽnda sõngda naong rãmba, la a kõt nimbãan-dãmba." 
Proverbs31:21 Yẽnda ka yɛɛsd tɩ waood na n wa yõk a zak rãmb ye, bala, a zakã ned kam fãa yera fu-tagdo." 
Proverbs31:22 Yẽnda wʋgda fu-gobs a meng yĩnga, yẽnda yera fut sẽn wʋg ne peen-neeba, la ne gĩsg sẽn yaa miuugu." 
Proverbs31:23 A sɩdã sã n yi tẽngã rignoorẽ, n be kãsem-dãmbã sʋka, a tara waoogre." 
Proverbs31:24 Yẽnda wʋgda fut n koosdẽ, la lɛɛbdbã wat n tonda sɛɛg sẽbds a nengẽ." 
Proverbs31:25 Yẽnda tara pãng la ziiri, la a ka maand dabeem ne beoog yell ye." 
Proverbs31:26 Yẽnda gomda yam goamã, la a zãmsd nebã ne sõmblem." 
Proverbs31:27 A geta a zakã yell neere, la a ka rɩt kʋɩʋʋng rɩɩb ye." 
Proverbs31:28 A kambã gomda a yelle, n yetẽ t'a tara barka, la a sɩdã pẽgd-a lame n yetẽ:" 
Proverbs31:29 «Pagb wʋsg beeme n tar yel-manesem-sõamyã, la foom yẽe, m noanga, fo yɩɩda b fãa gilli!»" 
Proverbs31:30 Nagem tudgdame, la neerem yaa zaalem, la yaa pag ning sẽn zoet-a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã la b na n pẽge." 
Proverbs31:31 Bɩ b kõ-a tʋʋmã biis yõodo, la bɩ a tʋʋmã kɩt t'a paam pẽgr tẽngã rignoorẽ." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Woto yaa Koɛɛg soabã gomde. Yẽnda yaa a Davɩɩd biiga, n yaa Zeruzalɛm dĩma." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Koɛɛg soabã yeelame yaa: «Zaalem woo zaalem, bũmb fãa yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ninsaal sẽn maand tʋʋm nins fãa dũniyã zugã yõod bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Zamaan loogdame, tɩ zamaan a to wa, la dũniyã paada woto wakat fãa." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Sõor pukdame, la wĩndg lʋɩtame, la a yãgdame n dat n ta zĩig ning a sẽn na n leb n pukã." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Sebg kẽngda goabga, n wẽnemded n dabd rɩtgo. Sebgã gilgdame n gilgdẽ, la a lebd n dɩkda a pĩnd sorã n wẽnemdedẽ." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Kʋɩlsã fãa koom zoetame n kẽngd ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, la ko-kãsengã ka pit ye. A zoet n dabda zĩig ning ko-zoetem sẽn kẽngdẽ wã, n gilgdẽ n lebgd n wat be yɛsa." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Bũmb fãa tʋʋmd yaa toogo. Ned goam ka sekd-a ye. Bũmb nins nin sẽn yãtã ka sekd-a ye, la tʋbr sẽn wʋmd bũmb ninsã ka sekd-a ye." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Bũmb ning sẽn dag n zĩnd pĩndã n na n zĩndi. La bũmb ning sẽn dag n maan pĩndã n na n maane. Bõn-paalg ka be dũniyã zug ye. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Bũmb beeme tɩ neb gomd a yell n yetẽ tɩ b ges bõn-paalg bɩ? Bũmb ning sẽn dag n zĩnd pĩndã n be tõnd zamaanẽ. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 B ka tẽegd bũmb nins sẽn dag n zĩnd pĩndã yell ye. La bũmb ning sẽn na n wa maanã, neb nins sẽn na n wa wã ka na n tẽeg bõn-kãens yell ye.»" 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Maam a koɛɛg soab yɩɩ Israyɛll rĩm n zĩnd Zeruzalɛm. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Mam tagsame n na n bao ne yam n bãng bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand saasã tẽngrã võore. Wẽnnaam dɩka tʋʋm toog n kõ ninsaalbã. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Mam yãnda tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn maand saasã tẽngrã. Fãa yaa zaalem. Fãa yaa wa ned sẽn digd sobg bala. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Bũmb ning sẽn golem ka tõe n tẽeg ye. La bũmb ning sẽn paoog ka tõe n sõd ye. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Mam dag n tagsdame tɩ mam tara yam n yɩɩd neb nins fãa sẽn deng maam n soog Zeruzalɛmã. Mam yãnda yam la bãngr wʋsgo. 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Mam dag n tagsdame n dat n bãng yam ne zu-kaalgo, la yalemd võore. La mam mikame tɩ yõwã me yaa wa ned sẽn digd sobg bala." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Bala, ned yam sã n waoogẽ, a tara sũ-sãang wʋsgo. La ned sẽn paasd a meng bãngre, a paasda a meng toogo." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Mam tagsa m sũur pʋgẽ tɩ mam na n makame n maan sũ-noogo, la m bãng sũ-noog sẽn yaa-a soaba. La ade, yõwã me yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Mam yeelame tɩ laad yaa zu-kaalgo, la sũ-noog yõod yaa bõe?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Mam yãka yam n na n noog m sũur ne reezẽ rãam, la m gũus m meng n kẽn ne yam, la m loe m meng ne yalemd ning mam sẽn maandã, n tõog n bãng ninsaalbã sẽn maand bũmb ning dũniyã zug b vɩɩmã wakatã sã n zemsame." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Mam tʋma tʋʋm-kãsemse: Mam mee rot m mengã yĩnga, la m sel reezẽ tɩɩs m mengã yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Mam maana zẽed ne tɩɩs zĩisi, la m sel tɩɩs buud fãa sẽn womd biisã bãmb pʋse." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Mam maana bãgs sẽn na n zãgs tɩ-poalã bõeeb zĩiga. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Mam daa yem-daad la yem-pogse, ne b kamb nins b sẽn dog mam zakẽ wã. Mam daa baa rũm-bɛd ne rũm-bãooneg wʋsgo, n yɩɩd neb nins fãa sẽn deng maam n zĩnd Zeruzalɛmã." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Mam paama wanzuri ne sãnem wʋsgo, yaa rĩm-dãmbã ne soolem wʋsg laogo. Mam daa pagb ne raop sẽn yaa yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, la pʋg-bi wʋsg ninsaalb kambã sẽn nonge." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Woto, mam lebga kãseng n yɩɩd neb nins fãa sẽn da reng maam Zeruzalɛmã. Sẽn paase, mam yamã kell n paa ne maam." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Bũmb ning fãa mam ninã sẽn yãnd n datã, mam ka mong-b ye. Sũ-noog ning fãa mam sũurã sẽn dag n datã, mam ka mong-a ye. Bala, mam sũur yɩɩ noog ne m tʋʋmdã fãa. La mam tʋʋmdã fãa yõod yaa a woto." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 La mam tagsa tʋʋm nins fãa mam nus sẽn dag n maanã, la namsg nins fãa mam sẽn dag n namsã yelle. La ade, fãa yaa zaalem. A wẽnda wa ned sẽn digd sebgo. Bũmb sẽn tar yõod ka be dũniyã zug ye. Yam la yalemd ka võor ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Woto kɩtame tɩ mam tags n ges yam, la zu-kaalg ne yalemd yelle. Ges-y wɛ! Ned ning sẽn na n wa reeg-a rĩmã zĩigã na n wa maana bõe? Yaa bũmb ning b sẽn dag n zoe n maanã bala." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 La mam yãndame tɩ yam yõod yɩɩda yalemdo, wa vẽenem yõod sẽn yɩɩd likã." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Yam soab tara nin n getẽ, la yalem kẽnda lik bida pʋgẽ. La baa sẽn yaa woto wã, mam miime tɩ bãmb b yiibã fãa baoosg yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 La mam tagsa m sũur pʋgẽ tɩ yalem baoosg sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, mam me baoosg na n yɩɩ a woto. Dẽ, mam yamã yɩɩdem nafr yaa bõe? La mam tagsa m sũur pʋgẽ tɩ yõwã me yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Bala, b ka na n tẽeg yam soab yell n yɩɩd yalem ye. La wakat n wat tɩ b na n yĩm bãmb fãa yelle. Yalmã me na n kii wa yam soab sẽn na n ki wã." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Dẽ, mam kisga vɩɩmã, bala, tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn maand dũniyã zugã yaa wẽnse. Bala, fãa yaa zaalem, a wẽnda wa ned sẽn digd sebgo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Mam kisga tʋʋm nins fãa mam sẽn tʋm dũniyã zug ka wã, bala, mam na n loogame n bas-a ne ned ning sẽn na n wa reeg-a mam zĩigã." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 La ãndã n mi nin-kãng sã n na n yɩɩ yam soab wall yalma? Baoosgo, yaa yẽnda n na n soog mam tʋʋmã fãa, tʋʋm nins mam sẽn dag n tʋm ne yam dũniyã zugã. Woto me yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Woto yĩnga, mam sũurã sãama ne tʋʋm nins fãa mam sẽn dag n maan dũniyã zug ka wã yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Bala, nina tʋmda ne yẽesem la bãngr la tõogre, n bas a yõodã tɩ ned a to sẽn ka maan tʋʋmdã wa rɩke. Woto me yaa zaalem, la a yaa wẽng wʋsgo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ninsaal tʋʋmdã ne a namsgã fãa dũniyã zug ka wã yõod yaa bõe? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Yẽnda rasmã fãa yaa sũ-sãanga. La yẽnda yɛlã fãa yaa toogo. Baa yʋngo, yẽnda sũurã ka tar vʋʋsg ye. Yõwã me yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Bũmb ka be sẽn yaa noog ne ninsaal n yɩɩd a sẽn na n paam n dɩ la a yũ, n maan sũ-noog ne a tʋʋmd ye. La ne yõwã me, mam yãame t'a yita Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Bala, ãndã n tõe n dɩ n maan sũ-noogo, sã n ka maam?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ned manesem sã n tat Wẽnnaam yam, bãmb kõta a soab yam la bãngre, la sũ-noogo. La bãmb kõta yel-wẽn soab namsgo, t'a tʋm n wʋk n bĩng ned ning sẽn tat Wẽnnaam yamã. Woto me yaa zaalem, la a wẽnda wa ned sẽn digd sebgo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Bũmb fãa tara a wakate. Bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand dũniyã zugã tara b wakate. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Rogem tara a wakate, la kũum me tara a wakate. Selb tara a wakate, la võob me tara a wakate." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Kʋʋb wakat beeme, la tɩpg wakat me beeme. Siigr wakat beeme, la meeb wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Yãbr wakat beeme, la laad wakat me beeme. Wiisg wakat beeme, la saoog wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kug lobr wakat beeme, la b wʋkr wakat me beeme. Mobg taab wakat beeme, la zãag taab wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Baoob wakat beeme, la meneng wakat me beeme. Zãab wakat beeme, la lobr wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Fuug kẽegr wakat beeme, la a sẽeb wakat me beeme. Sĩndim wakat beeme, la goam wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Nonglem wakat beeme, la kisgr wakat me beeme. Zabr wakat beeme, la vɩ-bãan wakat me beeme." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Tʋmtʋmd sẽn tʋmdã, bõe yõod la a paamda?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Mam yãnda tʋʋmd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ ninsaalbã tɩ b maanã. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Wẽnnaam maana bũmb fãa sõama n zems a wakate. Bãmb ninga wakat sẽn ka sɛt tagsg ninsaal sũur pʋgẽ, baa ne yẽnda sẽn ka tõe n tags n bãng tʋʋmd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn maan hal sɩngr tɩ ta sɛɛbã." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 La mam miime tɩ bũmb ka be sẽn noom ninsaal n yɩɩd yẽnda sẽn na n paam sũ-noog la naar a vɩɩmã wakat ye. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ned sã n dɩtẽ la yũuda, la a paam sũ-noogo, a bãng tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam kũuni." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mam miime tɩ bũmb ning fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn maan paada wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Bũmb ka be n na n paas-a wall boog-a ye. Wẽnnaam n maan-a t'a yɩ woto tɩ nebã zoe bãmba. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Bũmb ning sẽn be wã rag n zĩnda pĩnda. La bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩndã rag n zoe n zĩndame. Wẽnnaam kɩtdame tɩ bũmb nins sẽn dag n loogã leb n wa. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 La sẽn paase, mam yãndame tɩ dũniyã ka, b basda bʋ-sɩdã n maand wẽnga, b basda tɩrlem n maand wẽnga." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Mam tagsa m sũur pʋgẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam na n kaoo nin-tɩrg la nin-wẽng bʋʋdo. Bala, yɛlã fãa tara b zĩiga, la tʋʋmd fãa tara a wakate." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mam tagsa ninsaal yell m sũur pʋgẽ, n yeel tɩ Wẽnnaam rag n makda ninsaalbã n na n ges tɩ b mensã tõe n bãng tɩ b yaa wa rũms bala." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn paamd ninsaalbã ne bũmb nins sẽn paamd rũmsã yaa bũmb a yembre. A yembr kiida wa a to. Bãmb b yiibã fãa yõy vʋʋsem yaa bũmb a yembre. Ninsaal ka yɩɩd rũng ye. La bũmbã fãa yaa zaalem"

Ecclesiastes4:11 Woto me, neb a yiib sã n gãe ne taaba, b wɩngda taab yĩnsi. La ned sã n yaa a yembre, a na n yɩɩ wãn n wɩng a yĩnga?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ned sã n tar pãng n tõe n tõog nin-yende, b sã n yaa b yiibu, b tõogr yaa toogo. La wĩir sã n kal a tãabo, a ka tõe n kaoog nana ye."

Ecclesiastes8:1 Ãnda n zem yam soaba? Ãnda n mi yɛlã võor bilgri? Ned yam kɩtdame t'a neng pɩnda, la yẽnda nin-toolem tekdame."

Ecclesiastes8:7 Sɩd me, yẽnda ka mi bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩnd ye. Ãnda n tõe n wilg yẽnda sẽn na n wa yɩ to-to?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ned ka be n so a vɩɩm n tõe n gɩdg-a ye. La ned me ka be n tar pãng ne a kũum daar ye. Yolsg ka be zabr pʋgẽ ye. Nin-toolem ka sõngd nin-toaag t'a põs ye. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Mam yãnda bõn-kãens fãa wakat ning mam sẽn tags n ges tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn maand dũni zug ka wã yellã. Wakat n be tɩ ninsaal tõe a to n maand-a wẽnga. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Mam yãndame tɩ b yãbd nin-wẽns yĩnga. Tẽngã nebã dag n yita zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ n watẽ, la b lebdẽ, bãmb yĩma nin-wẽnsã sẽn dag n maan bũmb ninsã yelle. Woto me yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Bãmb sẽn ka yãgd n kao tʋʋm-wẽns bʋʋd tao-tao wã yĩnga, ninsaalbã sũyã pida ne wẽng maaneg ratem." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Baa yel-wẽn-maand sã n maand wẽng naoor koabg n vɩɩmd n kaoose, baoosgo, mam miime tɩ sẽn zoet-b Wẽnnaamã na n paama sũ-noogo, bãmb sẽn zoet Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 La nin-wẽng ka na n tol n paam sũ-noog ye. Yẽnda ka na n vɩɩmd n kaoos n yɩɩg sulunsuk ye. Yẽnda sẽn ka zoet Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Bũmb a yembr n be dũniyã pʋg n yaa zaalem. Yaa tɩ nin-tɩrs n be n paamd sẽn zems nin-wẽns tʋʋmd yaoodo. La nin-wẽns me n be n paamd sẽn zems nin-tɩrs tʋʋmd yaoodo. La mam yetame tɩ woto me yaa zaalem. 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Dẽ, mam yeelame tɩ sũ-noog yaa sõama. Bala, bũmb ka be n yaa sõama ninsaal yĩng dũniyã ka, sã n ka t'a rɩ la a yũ la a maan sũ-noog ye. Yẽnda tog n paama woto, yẽnda tʋʋmã pʋgẽ dasem nins fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yẽnda t'a vɩɩmd dũniyã zug ka wã yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Mam sẽn wa n dat n bao n bãng yam sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, la m na n tags yell ning sẽn maand dũniyã zug ka wã yelle, tɩ ninsaal ka tõe n gũs wĩntoog ne yʋngã," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 mam tagsa Wẽnnaam tʋʋmã fãa yelle. La mam yãndame tɩ ninsaal ka tõe n bãng tʋʋmd ning fãa sẽn maand dũniyã zug ka wã yell ye. Bala, baa ninsaal sã n maood n dat n bãng a võore, yẽnda ka na n tol n yãnd-a ye. La baa yam soab sã n yeel t'a miime, yẽnda ka tõe n bãng a võorã ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Mam tagsame n dat n bãng bõn-kãens fãa yelle. La yõwã fãa yɩɩ vẽeneg tɩ nin-tɩrs la yam dãmb ne b tʋʋmã fãa bee Wẽnnaam nugẽ. Ninsaal ka mi nonglem ne kisgri n bak ye. Bãmb fãa bee yẽnda taoore. 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Yẽnda geta a yiibã fãa wa zaalem. Yel-bãmb fãa paamda nebã fãa. Yell ning sẽn paamd nin-tɩrg paamda nin-wẽnga. Yell ning sẽn paamd ned ning sẽn yaa-a yɩlemdã paamda ned ning sẽn ka-a yɩlemdã. Yell ning sẽn paamd ned ning sẽn maand-a maand paamda ned ning sẽn ka maand-a maando. Yell ning sẽn paamd nin-sõngã paamda yel-wẽnã soaba. Yell ning sẽn paamd ned ning sẽn wẽendã paamda ned ning sẽn ka wẽend-a wã. 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Bõn-kãngã fãa yaa wẽnga, la a bee bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand dũniyã zugã pʋgẽ. Bala, yɛlã paamda nebã fãa. La sẽn paase, ninsaalbã sũyã pida ne wẽnga, la yalemd bee b sũyã pʋsẽ, b vɩɩmã wakate. Dẽ poore, bãmb rabda kũum zĩigẽ." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 La ned ning sẽn ket n vɩ ne yõor nin-vɩɩs sʋkã ket n tara saagre. Bala, ba-vɩɩg n são gɩgemd sẽn ki." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Bala, nin-vɩɩs miime tɩ b na n kiime. La sẽn ki-bã ka leb n mi bũmbu, la b ka leb n paamd b tʋʋmd yaood ye. Bala, b ka leb n tẽr bãmb yell ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Bãmb nonglmã, bãmb kisgrã, ne bãmb sũ-kiirã me fãa sɛɛme. Bãmb ka leb n tar pʋɩɩr ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn maand dũniyã zugã ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Bɩ f kẽng n tɩ rɩ f rɩɩbo, la f yũ f reezẽ rãam ne sũ-noogo. Bala, Wẽnnaam zoe n sak n deega fo sẽn maandã." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Bɩ f yeelg fu-peels wakat fãa, la f ra sak n bas f zug n ka sõog kaam ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Maan sũ-noog ne pag ning fo sẽn nongã, vɩ-zaalg ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ foom dũniyã zugã wakate. Bala, yõwã la fo pʋɩɩr f vɩɩmã pʋga, la tʋʋmd ning fo sẽn maand dũniyã zugã pʋga." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Bũmb ning fo nug sẽn tõe n maan ne fo pãngã, bɩ f maan-a. Bala, tʋʋmde, tagsgo, la bãngr ne yam ka be kɩɩm-kulgu, zĩig ning fo sẽn dabdẽ wã ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Mam leb n yãndame tɩ dũniyã zug ka, ka neb sẽn zoet tao-tao n tõogd zoees ye. La ka gãndaadã n tõogd zabr ye. Ka yam dãmb n paamd rɩɩb ye. Ka bãngdbã n paamd arzegse, la ka nin-yẽesems n paamd pẽgr me ye. Bala, bãmb fãa paamda toog wall noogo." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Bala, ninsaal ka mi a wakate, walla b sẽn yõg zĩm ne gãmbrã, Toog me lingda ninsaalbã a woto, toog paamda bãmb b sabaab wakate, la wa b sẽn bẽd liuul ne nakalebtong n yõke." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Mam leb n yãnda bũmb a to me dũniyã zug sẽn yaa yam mamsgo, la a yaa bõn-kãseng mam nifẽ." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Yaa tɩ tẽn-bil n dag n be tɩ neb bilf be a pʋgẽ. La rĩm-kãseng n wa n na n zab ne-a, n me lal-bɛd n gũbg-a n dat n deeg-a." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 La naong soab a ye n be tẽngã pʋgẽ n tar yam. Yẽnda yamã yĩng kɩtame t'a tõog n fãag tẽngã. La ned ba a yembr ka tol n leb n tẽeg naong soabã yell ye. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 La mam yeelame: Yam n são pãnga. La baoosgo, b paoogda naong soab yam n ka kelgd yẽnda goam ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Yam dãmb sẽn maag b meng n gomd tɩ b kelgdẽ, n são yalemb naab kɛlenga." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Yam n são zab-teedo, la yel-wẽn maand a yembr sãamda bõn-sõama wʋsgo." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Zõos sẽn kiid parfẽ-maand kaam pʋgẽ, t'a yũug ka leb n yaa sõama wã, a kɩtdame tɩ kaamã põoge. Yalemd bilf me woogda yam la ziiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Yam soab sũur takd-a lame n lebd rɩtgo, la yalem sũur takd-a lame n lebd goabga." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Baa yalem sã n kẽnd sor zugu, yam ket n paoogd-a lame, yẽnda togsda nebã fãa t'a yaa yalma." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Naab sũur sã n yik ne foom, bɩ f ra zoe n bas f zĩig ye. Bala, sũ-maasem gɩdgda yel-wẽn-bɛda." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Mam yãnda wẽng a yembr dũniyã pʋga, a wẽnda taoor soab tudgr sẽn puki." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Yalemb zĩi zĩ-bɛdẽ, la arzegs rãmb zĩi paoogr zĩisẽ." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Mam yãnda yembs sẽn zao wiidi, tɩ nanambs kẽnd ne nao wa yembse." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ned ning sẽn tuud-a boko, a na n wẽneg n lʋɩɩ bog-kãng pʋga. La ned ning sẽn lubd lalga, waaf na n zĩnda beenẽ n dũm-a." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 La ned ning sẽn lagsd kuga, kugã na n pogl-a lame. Ned sã n wesd raado, a tõe n paama toog raadã wesb pʋgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Lar noor sã n mudi, tɩ b ka saas-a, a soab tog n wɩka a meng n kɛ. La yam yõodã, yaa a sẽn sõngd tɩ b tõogdẽ wã." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ned sã n mi waaf saolgr n bas tɩ waafã kɛ-a, sẽn mi-a waaf saolgrã goam ka leb n tar yõod ne-a ye." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Yam soab noor goam bee barka, la yalem noor kɩtdame t'a meneme." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Yẽnda goamã sɩngr yaa yalemdo, la yẽnda koɛɛgã baoosg yaa gãeemdo." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Yalem gomda wʋsgo. Ninsaal ka mi bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩndã ye. Ãnda n na n wilg yẽnda bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩnd yẽnda loogr poorẽ wã? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Yalem tʋʋmd yɛɛda yẽnda. Bala, yẽnda ka mi a sẽn na n tũ zĩig ning n kẽng tẽng pʋgẽ ye." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Foom a tẽng sẽn tar dĩm sẽn yaa bi-bɩɩga, tɩ f nanambsã rɩt yibeoog pĩndã, toog bee fo zugu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Foom a tẽng sẽn tar dĩm sẽn yaa na-biigã, bark bee fo zugu! Bala, fo nanambsã rɩta wakat sẽn zemse. Bãmb dɩt n baooda pãnga, b ka baood n kɩt tɩ b neng yilim ye." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ned nus sã n ka maand bũmbu, a roog sugr bõrgdame. La ned sã n bas t'a nus ka tʋmdẽ, a roog sugr yũundame." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 B maanda rɩɩb n dɩtẽ, n maand sũ-noogo. Reezẽ rãam kõta vɩɩm sũ-noogo, la f sã n tar ligdi, f maanda f sẽn dat fãa." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ra tʋʋs rĩmã, baa f sũur pʋgẽ ye. Ra tʋʋs arzɛk soab f ro-gãagẽ ye. Bala, yĩngr liuuli na n dɩka a rãamdã n looge, la bõn-yɩgdɩ na n dɩka yellã n tɩ togse." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Lob f bur koom zugu, bala, wakat sẽn wate, fo na n leb n paam-a lame." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Yãk fo sẽn tarã n pʋɩ ne neb a yopoe wall a nii, bala, fo ka mi toog ning sẽn na n wa zĩnd dũniyã zugã ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Saag sã n kʋɩ, a niida dũniyã zugu. Tɩɩg sã n lʋɩ rɩtg wall goabga, a paada zĩig ning a sẽn lʋɩẽ wã." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ned sã n gũusd sebgo, yẽndã ka na n bʋd baa fɩ ye. La ned sã n get sawato, yẽndã ka na n tigs baa fɩ ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Fo sẽn ka mi sobg sẽn tũud zĩig ningã, wall kõab sẽn sũgd taab to-to pag sẽn tʋt pʋgẽ wã, woto me, fo ka tõe n bãng tʋʋmd ning Wẽnnaam sẽn maandã fãa ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Bʋd f bõn-buud yibeoogo, la f ra bas f nus tɩ yɩ zaalem zaabr ye. Bala, fo ka mi bõn-buud ning sẽn na n sake, wall a yiibã fãa sã n na n yɩɩ sõama ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Vẽenem yaa noogo, la ned nin sã n yãt wĩndga, a sũur yaa noogo." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ned sã n vɩ n kaoos yʋʋm wʋsgo, bɩ a maan sũ-noog yʋʋm-kãens fãa pʋgẽ. La bɩ a tẽeg tɩ likã rasem na n yɩɩ wʋsgo. Bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n wa wã yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Bi-bɩɩga, maan sũ-noog f bi-bɩɩlmã wakate, la f noog f sũur f bɩʋʋngã wakate, n tũ soay nins f sũurã sẽn date, la f ninã sẽn getã. La bɩ f bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam na n bʋʋ ne foom bõn-kãens fãa yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Rẽ yĩngã, rig sũ-pa-noaang t'a loog n bas-fo, la f zãag f meng ne wẽnga. Bala, yãadem ne bi-bɩɩlem wakat yaa zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Tẽeg f naandã yell f bi-bɩɩlem wakate, tɩ f toogã wakat nan ka ta, tɩ yʋʋm nins fo sẽn na n wa yeel tɩ f ka tar sũ-noogã wakat nan ka kolge," 
Ecclesiastes12:2 la sẽn deng wĩndgã ne vẽenemã, la kiuugã ne ãdsã sẽn na n sobge, la sawat sẽn na n pʋgl saag n wa wã." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 La daar ning roog gũudbã sẽn na n digi, la gãndaadã sẽn na n ku, la pagb sẽn dag n be neerẽ n werdã sẽn na n bas werbo, b sẽn ka leb n waoogã yĩnga, la zĩig sẽn na n sobg tɩ neb sẽn dag n be roog võorẽ n getẽ wã ka leb n tõe n yãndã," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 la ki werb rãamd sẽn nan ka booge, tɩ kʋɩlems sẽn tees sor kɩrengã page, la ned sẽn nan ka wʋm liuul kɛleng t'a pɛleng yɩke," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 la pʋg-sadb nins fãa sẽn yɩɩndã koees pãng sẽn na n booge, la ned sẽn yɛɛsd zĩ-zãonglgo, tɩ sorã fãa pid ne rabeem, la amand tɩɩg sẽn ningd a puudu, tɩ sʋʋr lebg zɩsg a yĩnga, tɩ kapr tɩɩg biis ka leb n tar noosem ye. Bala, ninsaal dabda a roog sẽn ka sɛt zĩigẽ, la yãbdbã zoet n pɩʋʋmda soayã," 
Ecclesiastes12:6 tɩ wanzuri wĩirã nan ka tõsge, la tɩ sãnem tʋkã nan ka wãage, la tɩ yʋʋrã nan ka wã ko-bundmã zĩigẽ, la gʋlgã sẽn nan ka lʋɩ n kaoog bulgã pʋgã," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 la tomã sẽn nan ka lebg n leb tẽng tomẽ wã, wa a sẽn dag n yaa bũmb ning pĩndã, tɩ sɩɩgã leb n leb Wẽnnaam ning sẽn dag n kõ yẽnda wã nengẽ." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Koɛɛg Soabã yetame: «Zaalem fasɩ! Bũmb fãa yaa zaalem bala.» 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Koɛɛg soabã rag n tara yam. La sẽn paase, yẽnda zãmsa nebã tɩ b paam bãngre. Yẽnda tagsa yel-bũn wʋsg yɛla, n fees n bãng b võyã, la yẽnda manega bãmba." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Koɛɛg soabã maoome n paam gom-noodo. B gʋlsa gom-kãens wa sẽn zemse, la b yaa goam sẽn yaa sɩda." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Yam dãmbã goam wẽnda wa fu-pĩim, la seb-gʋlsdbã yaa wa kaads b sẽn ka. B yaa pe-kɩɩm dasaare." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 M biiga, bũmb ning sẽn keta, gũus f meng n paam zãmsg bõn-kãens pʋga. B sã n baood n gʋls sɛb wʋsgo, b kõn tol n gʋls n sɛ ye. La zãmsg wʋsg yaamsda yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kelg koɛɛgã fãa baoosgo. Zoe Wẽnnaam la f sak bãmb tõodã, bala, yaa woto la ninsaal fãa tog n maane." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Bala, Wẽnnaam na n bʋʋ tʋʋmã fãa bʋʋdo, la yɛl nins fãa sẽn dag n solgã, yel-sõama wã ne yel-wẽnsã bʋʋdo." 
SongOfSongs1:1 A Salmo yɩɩll sẽn yɩɩd yẽnda yɩɩl a taabã fãa. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Bɩ a mogs maam ne a noore! Bala, fo saagrã n são reezẽ rãam." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Fo parfẽ-rãmbã yũug nooma wʋsgo! Fo yʋʋrã yaa wa parfẽ yũ-noom sẽn sãeegde. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ pʋg-sadbã fãa nong foom. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Wa peeg maam tɩ d zoe. Rĩmã talla maam n kẽ a ro-pʋsẽ wã. Tõnd na n maana sũ-noog fo yĩnga, tõnd na n kɩdma fo yĩnga. Tõnd na n pẽga fo saagrã n yɩɩd reezẽ rãam. A zemsame tɩ b nong foom." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, mam yaa sablga, la m yaa neer wa Kedaar fu-roto, la a wa a Salmo fu-bʋgsã." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ra ges-y maam m sablmã yĩng ye. Yaa wĩntoog n wʋm maam. M ma-bi-raopã sũy yika ne maam tɩ b kɩt tɩ m kẽng b pʋtẽ n tɩ tʋme. Mam ka tʋm m meng pʋʋgẽ ye. 
SongOfSongs1:7 Kelg wɛ, m yam neda, fo wãbenda f piisã yɛɛnẽ? Fo gãnegda bãmb yɛɛnẽ tɩ b vʋʋsd wĩntoogo? Ra bas maam tɩ m yɩ wa gõaada, n bʋdg n tũ fo tũud-n-taasã rũms ye." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Pagbã fãa sʋka, foom bal la pʋg-neere, fo sã n ka mi, bɩ f kẽng n dɩk piisã naoã, n kɩɩm f bʋʋsã pe-kɩɩmbã yiyã sɛɛga." 
SongOfSongs1:9 M noanga, mam makda foom ne wed-yãang ning sẽn takd Faarõ saar-dãmbã." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Fo yɛgã yaa neeb n be fo tʋblondã sʋka. La fo yublã toga ne lo-yɛrga. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tõnd na n maana sãnem yãnd sẽn tẽgs ne wanzuri n kõ foom. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Wakat ning rĩmã sẽn zĩ n dɩtẽ wã, mam parfẽ wã kaam yũug piuugame." 
SongOfSongs1:13 M noangã yaa wa yolg sẽn pid ne parfẽ n be mam bĩisã sʋka. 
SongOfSongs1:14 M noangã yaa wa tɩ-puud sẽn be Ɛn-Gedi reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtẽ. 
SongOfSongs1:15 M noanga, fo yaa neere, fo yaa neer wʋsgo. Fo ninã yaa wa wall nini." 
SongOfSongs1:16 M noanga, fo yaa neer wʋsgo. Sɩda, fo noogda m sũuri. Yaa mood bal n yaa tõnd pĩiri." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Tõnd dotã sug-raad yaa sɛɛdr tɩɩs raado, la tõnd dotã lals luda ne sɩprɛs tɩɩs raado." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Mam yaa wa Saaron kũnkubã zut tɩ-puudu, la rulg lɛlem sẽn be tãn-lond pʋsẽ." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Rulg-lelemd sẽn yaa bũmb ning gõos sʋkã, m noangã me yaa woto kom-pugli sʋka." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Pom tɩɩg sẽn yaa bũmb ning tʋgr tɩɩs sʋkã, m noangã me yaa woto kom-bɩɩsã sʋka. Mam nong n zĩnda yẽnda maasmẽ, la yẽnda biisã nooma maam." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yẽnda talla maam n kẽ reezẽ rãam doogẽ, la tãb-kaoor ning yẽnda sẽn zẽk mam zugẽ wã yaa nonglem." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Keng-y maam ne reezẽ gila, la y paas maam pãng ne pom-dãmba, bala, yaa nonglem bãag n tar maam." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Bɩ a bas tɩ m kʋgl a goabg nugã, la a mobg maam ne a rɩtgã." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, mam kota yãmb tɩ y zoe yãgsã la y zoe walsã sẽn be weoogẽ wã, la y ra sak n nek nonglem t'a wakat nan ka ta ye." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Kelg-y-yã! Yaa m noangã rãamde. Ade, a watame. A yɩgda tãmsã zutu, n tĩimd kunkubã zutu." 
SongOfSongs2:9 M noangã yaa wa yãk la wal-bila. Gese, yẽnda yasa tõnd dapoorã. Yẽnda lɩkda peem-lɛɛgẽ wã n getẽ. Yẽnda bee rigno-pĩirẽ wã n lɩkdẽ." 
SongOfSongs2:10 M noangã goma ne maam n yeel yaa: «M zoa, m yam neda, yɩk n wa!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Bala, waood wẽnd loogame, saag yoogame, a loogame." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Tɩɩs ningda puud tẽng zugu. Yɩɩl wakat taame, la b wʋmda wall sẽn yãbd tõnd tẽngã pʋga." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Kankang womda pipi biisi, la reezẽ tɩɩs puud yũug yitame. M zoa, m yam neda, yɩk n wa!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 M walle, fo bee pĩis bogdẽ n solgd f meng pẽgsẽ. Sak tɩ m yãnd f neng la m wʋm f koɛɛga. Bala, fo koɛɛg yaa noogo, la fo neng yaa neere.»" 
SongOfSongs2:15 Yõg-y we-baasã, we-ba-bi nins sẽn sãamd reezẽ tɩɩsã. Bala, tõnd reezẽ tɩɩsã ningda puudu." 
SongOfSongs2:16 M noangã yaa mam dẽnda, la mam yaa m noangã rẽnda. Yẽnda wãbenda a rũmsã rulg-lɛlmã sʋka." 
SongOfSongs2:17 M noanga, zoe n wa wa yãka, la wa wal-poal sẽn zoet to-to tãmsã pẽgsẽ wã, tɩ zĩigã nan ka maag ye, tɩ maasmã nan ka kɩll ye." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Mam sẽn be m gãagẽ wã ne yʋngã, mam baoo mam sẽn nong-a soabã. Mam bao-a lame la m ka yãnd-a ye." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Moasã, mam na n yikame n gilg tẽngã n tũ a soayã la m kẽng nebã sẽn sõsdẽ wã, n bao m sẽn nong-a soabã. Mam bao-a lame la m ka yãnd-a ye." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Gũudb nins sẽn gũud tẽngã sega maam tɩ mam sok-b yaa: «Yãmb ka yãnd mam sẽn nong-a soabã?» 
SongOfSongs3:4 Mam sẽn loog gũudbã bal yee, la m sẽn yãnd m sẽn nong-a soabã. Mam gãda yẽnda, la m kõn tol n bas-a, hal tɩ m wa tall-a n tɩ kẽ m ma roogẽ, n kẽ sẽn dog-a maamã ro-gãagẽ." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, mam kota yãmb tɩ y zoe yãgsã la y zoe walsã sẽn be weoogẽ wã, la y ra sak n nek nonglem t'a wakat nan ka ta ye." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Yaa ãnda n yit we-raoogẽ wa miir ne parfẽ la wisd buud wʋsg bug-zõos sẽn nusdã n watẽ? 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ad a Salmo gãagã. Israyɛll tãb-bi-gãndaadã sʋka, sẽn yaa-b gãndãad n yɩɩdã pis-yopoe n gũbg yẽnda." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Bãmb fãa boba sʋʋse, n mi zabre. Ned kam fãa lulga zabr sʋʋg a sɛɛgẽ, b sẽn zoet tɩ neb na n wa ling bãmb ne yʋngã yĩnga." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Rĩm a Salmo maana a gãagã ne Libã tɩɩs raado. 
SongOfSongs3:10 B maana a ra-lugdsã ne wanzuri, la b maan a zugã ne sãnem, la b pil a zaoondedgã ne peen-miuugu. La Zeruzalɛm pagbã manega a pʋgã ne nonglem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Sɩyõ kom-pugli, yi-y n ges-y rĩm a Salmo sẽn fõgen maanf ning a ma wã sẽn fõgen yẽnda a pʋg-peegrã daar sẽn yaa yẽnda sũ-noog daarã." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ad fo sɩd yaa neere, m zoa, fo sɩd yaa neere! Fo ninã yaa wa wal sẽn be fu-bil ning fo sẽn pil f nengã pʋga. Fo zoobdã yaa wa bʋʋs sẽn be Galaad tãngã zug n sigda." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Fo yẽnã yaa wa pe-bi b sẽn dat n wõrse, n tall-b n tɩ so koom n lebg n watẽ. Peosg fãa tara a kĩnkir-taaga, peosg ka be n ka tar a kĩnkir-taag ye." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Fo no-bɩmsã yaa wa gĩs-miuugu, la fo goamã yaa noogo. Fo yɛgdgã yaa wa gernaad b sẽn boke, n be fu-bil ning fo sẽn pil f nengã pʋga." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Fo yublã yaa wa a Davɩɩd gãosgã b sẽn me n na n bĩng zab-teedo. Gãnd tusrã yaga beenẽ, Gãndaadã gãnd fãa yaga beenẽ." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Fo bĩis a yiibã yaa wa yãg-bi a yiib sẽn yaa kinkirsi, n wãbd yamd rulg lɛlmã sʋka." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Sẽn deng zĩig maagre, zĩigã fãa sẽn na n lebg maasem, mam na n zoee n kẽnga tãng ning miir sẽn beẽ wã, la kunkubr ning parfẽ yũug sẽn beẽ wã." 
SongOfSongs4:7 M noanga, fo yaa neere. Fo ka tar zang ye." 
SongOfSongs4:8 M pʋg-paala, wa tɩ d loog n bas Libã! Wa tɩ d yi Libã! Yals Amana tãngã zugu, ne Seniir la Hɛrmo tãmsã zutu, n ges gɩgma wã sẽn gãe zĩis ninsã, la tãms nins ãbs sẽn beẽ wã." 
SongOfSongs4:9 M pʋg-paala, m tão, fo noogda mam sũur wʋsgo. Fo sã n ges maam vugr bal tɩ mam yãnd fo lo-yɛrg a yembr bala, mam sũur yaa noogo." 
SongOfSongs4:10 M pʋg-paala, m tão, fo nonglmã yaa noogo. Fo nonglmã sãoo reezẽ rãam, fo kaam toay-toayã yũug yaa noog n yɩɩd parfẽ-rãmb buud a taabã fãa." 
SongOfSongs4:11 M pʋg-paala, fo no-bɩmsã tokda sɩɩdo. Sɩɩd ne bĩisim bee fo zelemdã tẽngre. Fo futã yũug wẽnda Libã yũ-noogã." 
SongOfSongs4:12 M pʋg-paala, m tão, fo wẽnda zẽed zĩig sẽn tar yãgre, la ko-bundum zĩig sẽn tar lalga, la bulg sẽn page." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Fo tɩ-tobendã yaa wa gernaad tɩɩs sẽn womd bi-noodo, n tar puud ne kaam." 
SongOfSongs4:14 A tara parfẽ ne safran la rudum sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la sinamon ne tɩɩs nins b sẽn tar n maand wisdu, la miir ne alowɛs la bũmb nins fãa yũug sẽn yaa noog wʋsgã." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Fo yaa wa ko-bundum sẽn be zẽed zĩisẽ, la bulg koom sẽn kõt vɩɩm, la ko-zoetem sẽn yit Libã." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Rɩtg sebgo, yiki! Goabg sebgo, wa! Wa-y n fug-y mam zẽedã zug t'a yũugã piuugi. Bɩ m noangã wa a zẽedã zĩigẽ n dɩ a tɩ-bi-noodã." 
SongOfSongs5:1 M tãoã, m pʋg-paala, mam dabda m zẽedã zĩigẽ. Mam gẽemda m miir ne m bõn-noodã. Mam dɩta m sɩ-vakã ne m sɩ-kaamã, la m yũud m reezẽ rãamã ne m bĩismã. M zo-rãmba, rɩ-y la y yũ-y-yã! Nin-nongdse, tɩgs-y y meng ne nonglem!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Mam dag n gõeeme la m sũurã rag n ka gõe ye. Mam wʋmda m noangã sẽn kabsd n yetẽ: «M tão, m noanga, m walle, m yam neda, pak tɩ m kẽ tɩ meenem madga mam zugu. Mam zoobdã pida ne yʋng meenem.» Mam pidga m fuugu." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Mam na n maana a wãn n leb n yeelg-a? Mam waasa m nao. Mam na n yɩ a wãn n leb n dẽgem-ba? 
SongOfSongs5:4 M noangã tʋma a nug kʋɩlengã võorẽ, tɩ m sũur yɩ noogo." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Mam yikame n na n pak tɩ m noangã kẽ, la miir madga mam nusã. Miir kaamã sẽn be m nus-biẽ wã sõoga kʋɩlen-kurã." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Mam pakame tɩ m noangã kẽ, la m noangã wẽnemdame n zoe n looge. Yẽnda sẽn dag n gom ne maamã, mam dag n ka leb n so m meng ye. Mam bao-a lame, la m ka yãnd-a ye. Mam bool-a lame, la a ka sak ye." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Gũudb nins sẽn gilgd tẽngã yãnda maam. Bãmb pãba maam n pogle. Gũudb nins sẽn gũud tẽngã lalsã rɩka fuug ning mam sẽn tar n pind m nengã. 
SongOfSongs5:8 Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, mam kota yãmb tɩ y sã n yãnd m noangã, bɩ y togs-a tɩ nonglem bãag n tar maam." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Fo sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd pagb a taabã, fo noangã tara bõe n yɩɩd a taabã? Togs tõndo! Fo noangã tara bõe n yɩɩd a taabã tɩ fo gomd ne tõnd woto?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 M noangã yaa pɛɛlg n pɩnda. Yẽnda sã n be raop tus piig sʋka, b ne-a lame." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Yẽnda zugã wẽnda sãnem halaale. Yẽnda zoobdã bɩrame n sob wa gãabgo. 
SongOfSongs5:12 Yẽnda ninã yaa wa wal sẽn be ko-soog noor n sood bĩisim, yaa bĩisim sẽn yaa wʋsg pʋga." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Yẽnda yegdsã yaa wa b sẽn sel tɩ-puudu, la tɩ-bãooneg sẽn tar yũ-noog kaalem pʋgẽ. Yẽnda no-bɩmsã yaa wa rulg lɛlem sẽn tosd miir koom." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Yẽnda nusã wẽnda sãnem-gils b sẽn ning kirzolit kug b pʋsẽ. Yẽnda yĩngã yaa wa wobg yẽn b sẽn maneg n pẽeg t'a pɩnda, n ning safɩɩr kug a pʋgẽ." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Yẽnda karsã wẽnda marbr kug ra-lugds sẽn lugl sãnem halaal nao zutu. Yẽnda nengã yaa wa Libã n yaa neer wa sɛɛdr tɩɩse. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Yẽnda goamã bʋgsame. Yẽnda yaa neer zãnga. Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, ade, m noangã n yaa a woto, ade, m zoa wã n yaa a woto." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Fo sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd pagb a taabã, fo noangã kẽnga yɛɛnẽ! Togs tõndo! Fo noangã kẽnga yɛɛnẽ togs tɩ d sõng-f n bao-a?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 M noangã kẽnga a zẽedẽ wã n ta zĩis nins b sẽn sel tɩ-bãooneg sẽn womd biis sẽn tar yũ-noodã zĩigẽ n na n tɩ wãben a rũmsã zẽedã zĩisẽ, la a bao rulg lɛlma." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mam yaa m noangã rẽnda, tɩ m noangã yaa mam dẽnda. Yẽnda wãbenda a rũmsã rulg lɛlem sʋka." 
SongOfSongs6:4 M noanga, fo tara ra-sãnd wa Tɩrsa tẽngã, fo yaa neer wa Zeruzalɛm. Nebã zoeta foom wa tãb-biis wʋsg sẽn zãad b tãb-kaoore." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Ra ges maam ye. Bala, fo ninã geosg namsda maam. Fo zoobdã yaa wa bʋʋs sẽn be Galaad tãngã zug n sigda." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Fo yẽnã yaa wa b sẽn tɩ so piis koom n lebg n watẽ. Peosg fãa tara a kĩnkir-taaga. Peosg ka be n ka tar a kĩnkir-taag ye. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Fo yegdsã wẽnda wa b sẽn bok gernaade, n be fu-bil ning fo sẽn pil f nengã pʋgẽ." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Rĩm-pogs yaa bãmb pis-yoobe, la pʋg-rɩkdsã yaa bãmb pis-nii, la b ka tõe n sõd pʋg-bi wã n sɛ ye." 
SongOfSongs6:9 A yembr bal n yaa m walle, n yaa m yam ned menga. Yẽnda yaa a ma bi-pugl-yende. Yẽnda yaa sẽn dog-a yẽnda wã bi-nongre. Pʋg-bi wã yãnd-a lame n yeel t'a tara sũ-noogo, la rĩm-pogsã ne pʋg-rɩkdsã me pẽg-a lame n yeele:" 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ãnda n pukd wa zĩ-yẽegre, n yaa neer wa kiuugu, n yãgd wa wĩntoogo, tɩ nebã zoet-a wa tãb-bi-kʋʋng sẽn zãad b tãb-kaoore?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Mam kẽnga zẽed zĩigẽ sẽn tar nobse, n na n tɩ ges ko-soodẽ tɩ-tobendã, la m ges reezẽ tɩɩsã sã n tobdame, la gernaad tɩɩsã sã n ningda puudu." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Mam dag n ka mi ye, la mam wa n mikame tɩ m bee m nebã nin-kãsems saar-dãmb pʋsẽ." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Sulamit-poaka, lebg n wa, lebg n wa, lebg n wa ka, lebg n wa tɩ d ges-fo. Yaa bõe tɩ y rat n ges Sulamit-poakã wa sul a yiib neb sẽn tigim taab n saoodẽ?" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Nin-kãseng bi-pugla, fo naoã sẽn be fo neooda wã pʋsã yaa neere! Fo gɛy wã yaa gils wa tʋʋm-mitb sẽn maan lo-yɛrg sogdse." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Fo taoorã yaa wa la-gilg b sẽn ning reezẽ rãam sẽn kalem ne bũmb sẽn tar yũ-noog a pʋga. Fo pʋgã wẽnda ka-rʋr sẽn be rulg lɛlem sʋka. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Fo bĩis a yiibã yaa wa yãg-bi a yiib sẽn yaa yãk a yembr kamba. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Fo yublã wẽnda gãosg sẽn me ne wob-yẽna. Fo ninã wẽnda Ɛsbon bãgsã koom sẽn be Bat-Rabim tẽngã rignoore. Fo yõorã wẽnda Libã gãosg sẽn teesd Damaas sẽnẽ. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Fo zugã wẽnda Karmell tãngã, fo zoobdã yaa wa gĩs sẽn yaa kẽeg haoo. Fo zoobdã bɩrame n vind rĩmã." 
SongOfSongs7:7 M noanga, m yam neda, fo yaa neere, foom n kõt maam yamleoogo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Fo yasrã wẽnda koang tɩɩga, fo bĩisã wẽnda reezẽ-gĩna." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Mam tagsame tɩ m na n dʋʋ koang tɩɩgã n gãd a wilã. Bɩ f bĩisã yɩ wa reezẽ-gĩna, tɩ fo vʋʋsmã yũug yɩ wa pom tɩɩg biis yũugu," 
SongOfSongs7:10 tɩ fo noorã goam yɩ wa rã-noogo, t'a pʋdgr yaa naana m noangã yĩnga, n sedgd gõen-gõetba no-bɩmsẽ." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Mam yaa m noangã rẽnda, la yẽnda yam loee ne maam." 
SongOfSongs7:12 M noanga, wa tɩ d kẽng weoogẽ n tɩ zĩnd tẽn-bãooneg pʋs ne yʋngo." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Bɩ d yik pĩnd n kẽng reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtẽ wã, n tɩ ges reezẽ tɩɩsã sã n tobdame n ningd puudu, la gernaad tɩɩsã sã n ningda puudu. Yaa beenẽ la mam na n saag-fo." 
SongOfSongs7:14 Mandragoor yũug yitame, la tɩ-bi-nood nins fãa sẽn yaa paals la kʋdã bee tõnd dignoyẽ wã. M noanga, mam bĩnga bãmb fo yĩnga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Fo sã n dag n yaẽ mam tão-raoogo, n yẽsem m ma bĩisã, mam sã dag n yãndẽ-la foom yɩnga, mam dag n na n mokẽ-la foom tɩ ned ka paoog maam ye." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Mam dag n na n tallẽ-la foom n wa m ma zakẽ tɩ f zãms maam, tɩ mam kõ foom reezẽ rãam sẽn yaa noogo, sẽn maan ne mam gernaad biis koom." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Bɩ a bas tɩ m kʋgl a goabg nugã, la a mobg maam ne a rɩtgã!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Zeruzalɛm kom-pugli, mam kota yãmb tɩ y ra nek nonglem t'a wakat nan ka ta ye." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ãnda la sẽn yit we-raoogẽ wã n kogl a noangã n watẽ wã? Mam neka foom pom tɩɩgã tẽngre. Yaa beenẽ la f ma rɩk f pʋga. Yaa beenẽ la yẽnda rɩk pʋg n dog foom. 
SongOfSongs8:6 Kɩt tɩ m yɩ wa bãnd fo sũurã pʋgẽ, la wa bãnd fo kangã zugu. Bala, nonglem tara pãng wa kũum, la nonglem-kãseng yaa toog wa kɩɩm-kulgu. A bug-witmã ka rɩt n kell ye. A zabda wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bugum." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Ko-kãsemsã ka tõe n kiis nonglem ye, la kʋɩlsã ka tõe n dɩ-a ye. Ned sã n dat n dɩk a yir paoong fãa n tek ne nonglem, yẽnda ka na n paam bũmb tɩ ka paoogr ye." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tõnd tara tão-poak sẽn yaa bilfu, a nan ka pus bĩis ye. Ned sã n bao tõnd tão-poakã n na n kẽ kãadem, d na n maana bõe n kõ tõnd tão-poakã?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Yẽnda sã n yaa wa lalga, tõnd na n mee wanzuri gãosg a zugu. Yẽnda sã n yaa wa rignoore, tõnd na n pag-a-la ne sɛɛdr da-peko." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Mam yaa wa lalga, la mam bĩisã yaa wa gãsdo, la mam yaa wa ned sẽn paam vɩ-bãan yẽnda nifẽ." 
SongOfSongs8:11 A Salmo rag n tara reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg Baall-Hamon. Yẽnda rɩka pʋtã n kɩs neb tɩ b gũ. Bãmb ned a yembr fãa wa n kɩsa a Salmo wanzuri ligd-koeems tusr a tɩ-biisã yĩnga. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Mam reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg ning mam sẽn tarã bee mam taoore. Wanzuri ligd-koeem tusrã yaa foom a Salmo n so, la ligd-koeems kobessi wã yaa reezẽ tɩɩs gũudb n so." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Fo sẽn be zẽed zĩisẽ wã, neb n kelgd foom: Kɩt tɩ m wʋm f koɛɛgã!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 M noanga, zoe wa yãka, zoe wa wal-bil tãms nins sẽn tar yũ-noodã zutu!" 
Isaiah1:1 Ad vẽnegr ning a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn paame, sẽn kẽed ne Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm wɛɛngẽ. Yɩɩ Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmb a Oozɩyaas ne a Zotam la a Akaaz ne a Ezekɩyaas zamaanẽ." 
Isaiah1:2 Saasẽ kelge, dũniyã, yok f tʋbr n kelge! Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gomde. Mam wuba kamba, la m zãms-ba, la b yik n kɩɩsa maam." 
Isaiah1:3 Naaf mi a soaala, la bõang mii zĩig ning yẽnda soaalã sẽn ningd yẽnda rɩɩbã. La Israyɛll ka mi baa fɩ ye, mam nebã yaa tʋb-pa-wʋmdba." 
Isaiah1:4 Toog bee bu-kãngã sẽn yaa yel-wẽn-maandã zugu, bãmb yaa koangdba, bãmb yaa tʋʋm-wẽns rãmba, bãmb yaa kom-wegemse! Bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb paooga Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã, bãmb wẽnemd n basa bãmba." 
Isaiah1:5 Yãmb sẽn ket n kɩɩsdẽ wã, y ratame tɩ b leb n wẽ yãmb zĩ-bʋgo? Zugã zãng ka tar laafɩ ye. Sũurã zãng bẽedame." 
Isaiah1:6 Sẽn sɩng ne nao-sɩlpamã n tãag zugã, zĩig ka leb n be sẽn tar laafɩ ye. Yaa sãmpoaga, yĩng bugbu, la noad sẽn wõsge, tɩ ned ka tɩpd-ba, wall a vil-b peende, wall a sõogd-b kaam me ye." 
Isaiah1:7 Yãmb tẽngã sãama zãnga. B yõoga yãmb tẽmsã bugum, sãamb wa n sãamda yãmb tẽn-gãongã y nifẽ. Yaa sãoong sẽn wẽnd sãamb sẽn wa n sãame." 
Isaiah1:8 Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã kell n paame n yaa wa pʋʋg roog sẽn be reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg pʋga. A wẽnda sẽok sẽn be kõnkõmbr pʋʋgẽ. Awẽnda wa tẽnga, bɛɛb sẽn gũbgi." 
Isaiah1:9 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sã n dag n ka basẽ tɩ neb bilf põse, tõnd dag n na n lebgẽ-la wa Sodom tẽngã, tõnd dag n na n wẽnegẽ-la Gomoore." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom tẽngã taoor dãmba, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! Gomoor nebã, yok-y y tʋb n kelg tõnd Wẽnnaamã tõodo!" 
Isaiah1:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam toog ka be ne yãmb maandã waooglem ye?» Mam ya n tɩga yãmb pe-raad maand sẽn yõogd bugmã ne y rũm-bɛdã kaamã. Yãmb lolsã ne y pe-bi wã la y boeesã zɩɩm ka noogd mam sũur ye. 
Isaiah1:12 Yãmb sẽn wat n yalsd mam taoorã, ãnda n kos yãmb tɩ y tabg mam samandẽ wã?" 
Isaiah1:13 Da-y leb-y n tall-y kũun sẽn ka yõod n wa kõ maam ye. Yãmb wisdã kũun yaa bõn-wẽng mam taoore. Yãmb wẽngã maaneg yĩnga, mam sũur ka noom ne yãmb ki-paalgã tigã, ne y vʋʋsg rayã, la ne y nebã tigindã ye." 
Isaiah1:14 Mam kisa yãmb kiu-paalsã ne y tigindã. Bãmb namsda maam, mam yamã yii bãmba." 
Isaiah1:15 Yãmb sã n zẽk y nusã n tees maam, mam mumda m nin n ka rat n yãnd yãmb ye. Baa ne yãmb sẽn pʋʋsd n yɩlemdẽ wã, mam ka kelgd ye. Yãmb nusã pida ne zɩɩm." 
Isaiah1:16 So-y koom, la y yɩlg y mense! Yiis-y tʋʋm-beedã mam taoore. Bas-y y tʋʋm-wẽnsã maanego." 
Isaiah1:17 Zãms-y tɩ maan sẽn yaa sõama. Bao-y tɩrlem, la y sõng b sẽn maand-b rãmb pãngã. Kao-y kɩɩb bʋʋd tɩrga, la y zab n sõng pʋg-kõore." 
Isaiah1:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «M kotame tɩ y wa tɩ d yẽs ne taaba. Baa yãmb yel-wẽnã sã n yaa miuug wa saag-pag-a-minamina, b na n lebga pɛɛlg wa lampalga. La baa b sã n yaa miuug wa monem, b na n lebga pɛɛlg wa pe-kõbdo." 
Isaiah1:19 Yãmb sã n sak n kelg maam, yãmb na n dɩɩ tẽngã bõn-sõamyã fãa." 
Isaiah1:20 La yãmb sã n zãgs n kɩɩs maam, zabr sʋʋg n na n kʋ yãmba!» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng noor n yeele." 
Isaiah1:21 Maana a wãn tɩ tẽng ning sẽn dag n yaa sakdã lebg yoob tẽnga? A rag n yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne zemsgo, la tɩrlem dag n bee beenẽ, la moasã, a pida ne nin-kʋʋdba." 
Isaiah1:22 Fo wanzuri wã lebga wãyã, yãmb reezẽ rãamã pula koom." 
Isaiah1:23 Fo nanambsã lebga kɩɩsdba, la b lebg wagda tũud-n-taase. Bãmb fãa nongame tɩ b kõt-b kũuni, la b zoet n pʋgd zãmb keoore. Bãmb ka kaood kɩɩb bʋʋd tɩrga, la pʋg-kõap yell gesg ka pak-b ye." 
Isaiah1:24 Woto yĩng kɩtame tɩ Saasẽ-pãng-soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam sẽn tar pãngã yetẽ: «Ad na n yɩɩ toogo! Mam na n maana m zabd-n-taasã wẽng n lebse, la m na n doka m sũur ne m bɛɛbã." 
Isaiah1:25 Zeruzalɛm, mam na n leb n tẽega m nugã fo zugu. Mam na n ninga foom boaagẽ n yiis f rẽgdã, wa b sẽn yẽnegd kugr boaagẽ n yiisd kut n basd wãyã, wa b sẽn dɩk zẽem n pek bũmbu. Mam na n yiisa fo tʋʋm-beedã wa namdo." 
Isaiah1:26 Mam na n leb n kõo foom bʋ-kaoodb wa pĩndã, la m kɩt tɩ sagendb zĩnd wa sɩngrẽ wã. Rẽ poore, b na n boola foom tɩ: tɩrlem tẽnga, la sɩd tẽnga.»" 
Isaiah1:27 Sɩyõ sã n kẽn zemsg pʋga, a na n paama fãagre, la neb nins sẽn na n bao tɩrlmã, na n paama fãagre." 
Isaiah1:28 La sãoong n na n paam kɩɩsdbã ne yel-wẽn-maandbã. Neb nins sẽn basd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã na n menemame. 
Isaiah1:29 Tɩ-bɛd nins yãmb sẽn dag n nongã yãnd na n yõka yãmba. Yãmb zẽed zĩisã y sẽn nongã yãnd na n yõka yãmba. 
Isaiah1:30 Bala, yãmb na n yɩɩ wa terebẽnt tɩɩg vãad sẽn zelge, wa zẽed zĩig sẽn ka leb n tar koom." 
Isaiah1:31 Sẽn tar-a pãngã na n yɩɩ wa gʋmdo, la a tʋʋmã na n yɩɩ wa bug-pãrga. Bãmb b yiibã fãa na n naaga taab n dɩ bugum tɩ ned ka be n na n kiis-a ye." 
Isaiah2:1 Woto yaa a Amots biig a Ezayi koɛɛga, a sẽn yãnd vẽnegr pʋgẽ, sẽn kẽed Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm wɛɛngẽ." 
Isaiah2:2 Wakat n wate, tɩ tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn tilg a zugã na n lug n yɩɩg tãms a taabã, a na n zẽkame t'a zãntlmã yɩɩg kunkubã zãntlem. La buud toay-toay fãa na n zoe n waa beenẽ." 
Isaiah2:3 Neb kʋʋng na n dabda beenẽ la b yetẽ: «Wa-y tɩ d rʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngã zugu, a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã roogẽ! Bãmb na n wilga tõnd b soayã, la tõnd na n tũu bãmb so-bugsã. Bala, tõogã na n yii Sɩyõ n wa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã na n yii Zeruzalɛm n wa." 
Isaiah2:4 Bãmb na n yɩɩ buud toay-toayã bʋ-kaooda, bãmb na n yɩɩ neb kʋʋng zab-paasda. B na n dɩka b zabr sʋʋsã n kud wãgse, la b rɩk b kãnã n kud goeto. Buud kõn tol n leb n yik zabr ne a to ye. La b kõn leb n zãms zabr sẽn zabd to-to ye.»" 
Isaiah2:5 «A Zakoob yagense, wa-y tɩ d kẽn Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽenemã pʋga.»" 
Isaiah2:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb basa a Zakoob buudã sẽn yaa y nebã, a sẽn pid ne yaang nebã manesmã, la a pid ne neb sẽn bʋgd bagr wa Filistẽ-dãmbã, la a maan zems-n-taar ne sãambã yĩnga." 
Isaiah2:7 A tẽngã pida ne wanzuri la sãnem, la yẽnda arzegs sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. A tẽngã pida ne wiidi, la ne saar-dãmb sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye." 
Isaiah2:8 Yẽnda tẽngã pida ne wẽn-naandse, nebã wõgemdedame n waoogd bãmb nus tʋʋmã, b wõgemdeda bãmb mengã nus sẽn maanã taoore." 
Isaiah2:9 Ninsaalbã na n paama yãnde. Nebã na n paama paoogre. Da-y kõ-y bãmb sugr ye! 
Isaiah2:10 Ninsaalba, zoe n tɩ kẽ-y pĩis bogdẽ, la f solg f meng tẽng tomẽ, n zãag f meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɛɛsgã, la ne bãmb naam-kãsengã pukri." 
Isaiah2:11 Tɩtaam dãmbã na n paama paoogre, la zẽk-m-mens rãmbã na n paama yãnde. Badaare, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã bal n na n paam zẽkre." 
Isaiah2:12 Bala, yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã daare. Bãmb na n sika tɩtaam la zẽk-m-meng fãa, la b sik bũmb ning fãa sẽn wukd a menga." 
Isaiah2:13 Bãmb na n sika Libã sɛɛdr tɩ-wogdã sẽn lugã, ne Basã tẽng sɛn tɩɩsã fãa." 
Isaiah2:14 Bãmb na n sirga tãms nins fãa sẽn lugi, la b sirg kunkub nins fãa sẽn zẽkã." 
Isaiah2:15 Bãmb na n siiga gãs-wogdã fãa, la b siig lals nins fãa sẽn tar pãngã." 
Isaiah2:16 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ Tarsɩɩs koom kogendã lisi, koom kogl-bɛd sẽn yaa neebã lisi." 
Isaiah2:17 Woto, b na n sika ninsaalbã tɩtaamã, la zẽk-m-mens rãmbã na n paama paoogre. Badaare, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n na n paam waoogre." 
Isaiah2:18 Bãmb na n menesa wẽn-naandsã fãa. 
Isaiah2:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n na n yik n kẽes dũniyã rabeem, bãmb na n zoe n tɩ kẽe pĩis bogdẽ, la b solg b meng tẽng tomẽ, n zãag b meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɛɛsgã, la ne bãmb naam-kãsengã pukri." 
Isaiah2:20 Badaare, ninsaalbã na n dɩka b wanzuri ne b sãnem wẽn-naandsã bãmb sẽn wõgemded n waoogdẽ wã n lob laoos ne zankiti." 
Isaiah2:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n na n yik n kẽes dũniyã rabeem, bãmb na n zoe n tɩ kẽe pĩis bogdẽ, la b solg b meng pĩis pẽgsẽ, n zãag b meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɛɛsgã, la ne bãmb naam-kãsengã pukri." 
Isaiah2:22 Dẽ wã, bɩ f ra leb n teeg ninsaal sẽn vʋʋsd ne yõ-bogdã ye. Ninsaal yõod zema bõe?" 
Isaiah3:1 N-yẽe! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Zu-soaba, n yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n yiisa bõn-teegds nins fãa Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda sẽn teegã. Bãmb na n yiisa rɩɩbã ne koomã fãa." 
Isaiah3:2 Bãmb na n yiisa gãndaoogã ne tãb-biigã la bʋ-kaoodã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã, ne bagã la kãsmã," 
Isaiah3:3 ne tãb-biis pis-nunu naabã la nin-kãsengã, ne sagendã, la yam soabã ne tɩ-rɩtã." 
Isaiah3:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kom-bãooneg yɩ bãmb nanambse, la m kɩt tɩ yãas soog bãmba." 
Isaiah3:5 Nebã sʋka, nebã na n maana taab pãnga. Bi-bilf na n zaba ne nin-kẽema, nin-yaalg na n zaba ne nin-kãsenga." 
Isaiah3:6 Hal tɩ ned gãd a saam-biig a ba zakẽ n yeele: «Foom n tar kasaabo, foom n na n yɩ tõnd naab n soog raboogã.»" 
Isaiah3:7 Badaare, nin-kãng me na n kelmame n yeele: «Mam ka logtore, m ka tar dɩɩb m yiri, la m ka tar kasaab ye. Da maan-y maam tɩ m yɩ y naab ye.»" 
Isaiah3:8 Ade, Zeruzalɛm lagsdame, la Zʋʋda sirgdame. Bala, bãmb goamã ne bãmb tʋʋmã kɩɩsda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La bãmb paoogda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã." 
Isaiah3:9 Bãmb nensã gãneng kɩta kaseto, tɩ bãmb ka zems ye. Bãmb sẽn maand b yel-wẽnã wa Sodom nebã sẽn dag n maandã, n ka solgdẽ wã yĩnga. Ad yaa toog n na n paam-ba! Bala, bãmb n segl to-kãng b mens yĩnga." 
Isaiah3:10 Yeel-y tɩ bũmb fãa na n yɩɩ neer nin-tɩrg yĩnga, bala, yẽnda na n dɩɩ a tʋʋmã yõodo." 
Isaiah3:11 Nin-wẽng na n paama toogo! Ka na n yɩ sõama yẽnda yĩng ye. Bala, yẽnda na n deega a nus tʋʋmã yaoodo." 
Isaiah3:12 Kom-bãooneg bal n tar mam nebã n namsdẽ, la yaa pagb n so bãmba. Mam nebã, yãmbã tɛtbã kẽesda yãmb moogo, bãmb menesda sor ning yãmb sẽn tũudã." 
Isaiah3:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yikame n na n bool bʋʋdo, bãmb yikame n na n kao nebã bʋʋdo." 
Isaiah3:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n bʋʋ ne b nebã kãsem-dãmba, la ne b nanambsã n yeele: «Yãmb sãama reezẽ tɩɩs pʋto! Yãmb zɛɛ naong rãmb teed n pids y roto." 
Isaiah3:15 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb wõrd mam nebã? Bõe yĩng tɩ y paoogd naong rãmbã? Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Isaiah3:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Sɩyõ kom-pugli wã sẽn yaa tɩtaam dãmbã yĩnga, bãmb sẽn nak b nens yĩngrã yĩnga, bãmb sẽn nagd ne b ninã yĩnga, la b sẽn kẽnd n tĩmsd b nao tɩ b buglã maand bʋʋrã yĩnga," 
Isaiah3:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Sɩyõ kom-pugli wã yɩ zu-kõodo. La b kɩt tɩ b rĩy lebg koɛɛla.» 
Isaiah3:18 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yãgsa fan-teedã fãa: yaa naoã buglã, zut gãmba wã ne pɛɛm sẽn send zutã," 
Isaiah3:19 b tʋblondã ne b nug-zũyã ne pɛɛlã b sẽn lut b nensã," 
Isaiah3:20 b zu-vindsã ne b kalembãensã sẽn be b naoẽ wã, la b yãgs bãmb sɛɛg kĩnkĩndi wã ne b parfẽ wã tʋgdã, la b se-gãnã," 
Isaiah3:21 b nugbĩnsã ne nugbĩnsã b sẽn ning yõyã. 
Isaiah3:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yeesa bãmb tigã fut ne b fu-bɛdã, la b yees b fu-yer-bɛdã, la b rees b nusẽ kordã." 
Isaiah3:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yiisa b nen-getsã ne b fu-faasensã la b peen-teegdsã ne b bãg-paasã. 
Isaiah3:24 Bõn-põosg yũug n na n deeg parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noog zĩiga, wĩy n na n deeg sɛɛg sẽbds zĩiga. Zu-koɛɛl n na n deeg zut sẽn pãnem zĩiga, bot na n deega nagem fu-yer-bɛd zĩiga. Bãnd sẽn ningd-b yãnd n na deeg b neermã zĩiga." 
Isaiah3:25 Fo raopã na n paa tãpẽ, la fo gãndaadã na n paa zabrẽ." 
Isaiah3:26 Zeruzalɛm tẽngã noy na n pida ne yãbr la wiisgu. Yẽnda nebã kaalem yĩnga, a na n zĩnda tomẽ n yãbe." 
Isaiah4:1 Badaare, pagb a yopoe na n gãda rao a yembr n yetẽ: «Tõnd na n dɩlgda d mense, la d yeelgd d mens futu. Yãmb we n sak tɩ d reeg yãmb yʋʋrã bala! Yiis d yãndã kõ-do.»" 
Isaiah4:2 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kɩt bũmb ning bul n yi wã na n waa ne neerem la ziiri. Tẽngã koodã na n paama waoogr la ziir Israyɛll bu-kellã yĩnga." 
Isaiah4:3 Dẽ, neb nins sẽn kell Sɩyõ wã, sẽn dat n togs tɩ sẽn kell-b Zeruzalɛmã, b na n boola bãmb tɩ pʋ-peelem dãmb Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. B na n gʋlsa neb nins fãa sẽn na n paam vɩɩm Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã yʋya." 
Isaiah4:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n dɩk b bʋ-kaoorã ne b pãngã n pek Sɩyõ kom-pugli wã n yiis b rẽgdã n sɛ, la b pek Zeruzalɛm ne zemsg sɩɩga, la ne sãoong sɩɩg n yiis zɩɩmã sẽn be yẽnda pʋgẽ wã n sɛ," 
Isaiah4:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana sawaodg ne bug-zõos t'a yɛdg n pid Sɩyõ tãngã zĩig fãa, n zĩnd b nebã tigind zut wĩndga, n yɩ bugum sẽn wit n kõt vẽenem yʋngo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab belmã na n yɩɩ wa zãnd n zĩnd bũmbã fãa zugu." 
Isaiah4:6 A na n yɩɩ wa sẽok sẽn kõt maasem wĩndga, tʋʋlg wakate, la a yɩ zĩ-soalgdga, ne solgr zĩiga, sobg wall sa-bɛd wakate." 
Isaiah5:1 Mam kotame tɩ y bas tɩ m yɩɩl m zoa wã yĩnga. Mam na n yɩɩla yɩɩll m noangã reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg yĩnga. Mam zoa wã rag n tara a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg sẽn be tãngã sigdgã zĩ-sõngẽ. 
Isaiah5:2 Mam zoa wã gudga tẽngã n vigs kugã n lebs n sel reezẽ tɩɩs bu-sõngo, la a me gãosg pʋʋgã sʋka, n tu reezẽ rãam wẽkr boko. Yẽnda rag n tagsdame t'a pʋʋgã na n woma reezẽ tɩɩs bi-sõama, la a woma bi-põaasa!" 
Isaiah5:3 Moasã, Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã, m kotame tɩ y yɩ bʋ-kaoodb maam ne m reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã sʋka!" 
Isaiah5:4 Bõe la mam dag n tog n maan m reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã yĩng n ka maane? Bõe yĩng tɩ mam tags t'a na n woma reezẽ-sõama t'a wa womd bi-põaasa? 
Isaiah5:5 Moasã, m kotame tɩ y bas tɩ m wilg-y mam sẽn na n maan m reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã bũmb ninga. Mam na n yãka a yãgrã n bas-a tɩ b sãam-a. Mam na n wura a lalgã tɩ b kẽ n tab-a ne nao." 
Isaiah5:6 Mam na n kɩtame t'a lebg raboogo. B ka na n leb n yos-a wall b ko-a ye. Gõos ne gõpayãnds n na n yi a pʋga. Mam na n kõo sawatã noore, n kɩt tɩ b ra leb n bas saag t'a ni beenẽ ye." 
Isaiah5:7 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋgã yaa Israyɛll nebã. La tɩɩs nins bãmb sẽn dag n nongã yaa Zʋʋda nebã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n tagsdame tɩ b na n yãnda zemsg beenẽ, la b mika zɩɩm daagr bala! Bãmb dag n tagsdame tɩ b na n yãnda tɩrlem beenẽ, la b mikame tɩ yaa b sẽn kʋʋd-b rãmbã kelems n be beenẽ." 
Isaiah5:8 Tood bee neb nins sẽn baood rot n paasd b rotã, la sẽn baood pʋt n paasd b rẽndã, hal tɩ zĩig ka leb n beẽ wã zugu. Zĩig ka leb n be tẽngã pʋgẽ neb a taab yĩng tɩ ka yãmb bal ye!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ad wẽeneg ning Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn wẽen tɩ mam wʋme: «Hakɩɩka, ro-bãmbã sẽn yaa wʋsgã na n sãamame, ned kõn leb n zĩnd ro-bɛd-bãmbã sẽn yaa neebã pʋs ye." 
Isaiah5:10 Baa reezẽ tɩɩs pʋʋg yalem sã n ta nao-yakem tus piiga, a ka na n wom tɩ yɩɩg konkong la pʋɩ-sʋk ye. La bõn-buud konkong piig na n woma bõn-koaadl konkong a ye la pʋɩ-sʋka.»" 
Isaiah5:11 Toog bee neb nins sẽn yikd yibeoog pĩnd n baood rãam sẽn yilimd nengã zugu, la sẽn yũud reezẽ rãam n lengd ne zaabrã zugu!" 
Isaiah5:12 Bãmb tigã zĩisẽ, yaa pends wẽebo, ruuds wãagre, gãngãad pãbre, wɩɩs peebgo, la rãam yũubu. La bãmb yaool n ka ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maand bũmb ningã ye. Bãmb ka ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab nus tʋʋmã ye." 
Isaiah5:13 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b na n yiis mam nebã n tɩ kẽes yembdo, b sẽn ka tar bãngrã yĩnga. Kom na n kʋʋ bãmb nanambsã, la ko-yũud na n kʋʋ mam nebã sẽn yaa kʋʋngã." 
Isaiah5:14 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ kɩɩm-kulg pak a kokoayã wʋsgo, n yaag a noorã yaolengo, tɩ tẽngã nanambsã ne b neb kʋʋngã na n sig beenẽ ne b bʋrgã la ne b sũ-noog kaasgã." 
Isaiah5:15 Ninsaal na n paama yãnde. Ninsaal na n paama paoogre, la tɩtaam dãmbã na n paama paoogre." 
Isaiah5:16 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n paama waoogr b bʋʋdã kaoob sẽn yaa tɩrgã pʋgẽ. Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa pʋ-peelem soabã na n wilga b pʋ-peelmã b bʋʋdã kaoob pʋga. 
Isaiah5:17 Piisã na n zĩnda beenẽ tɩ yɩ b wãbneg zĩiga, la sãamb n na n wa soog arzegs rãmbã sẽn zoe n basã." 
Isaiah5:18 Toog bee neb nins sẽn tɛt yel-wẽnã ne zãmb wĩyã, la sẽn tɛt yel-wẽnã wa b sẽn takd terok ne wĩirã zugu." 
Isaiah5:19 Bãmb yetame: «Bɩ Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã maan b tʋʋmdã tao-tao tɩ tõnd yãnde! Bɩ saagr ning bãmb sẽn saagdã paam pidsg tɩ tõnd bãnge!» 
Isaiah5:20 Toog bee neb nins sẽn boond wẽng tɩ sõama la b boond sõama tɩ wẽngã zutu. Bãmb geelgda lik wa vẽenem, la b geelgd vẽenem wa lika. Bãmb geelgda toog wa noogo, la b geelgd noog wa toogo!" 
Isaiah5:21 Toog bee neb nins sẽn tagsd tɩ b yaa yam dãmba, la sẽn tẽed tɩ b yaa bãngdbã zutu." 
Isaiah5:22 Toog bee neb nins sẽn yaa gãndaad ne reezẽ rãam yũubã, la neb nins sẽn mi rãam kaolengã zutu." 
Isaiah5:23 Bãmb deegda kũun n kõt nin-wẽng bʋʋm, la b mongd bʋʋm soab bʋʋm!" 
Isaiah5:24 Woto yĩnga, bug-witim sẽn dɩt mood to-to wã, la bugum sẽn dɩt wudg to-to wã, bãmb yẽgã na n yɩɩ wa bõn-põosgo, la bãmb puudã na n sʋʋga wa wubsgu. Bala, bãmb kɩɩsa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã tõogo, la bãmb paooga Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã gomdã."
