Isaiah5:25 Woto n kɩte, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yik ne b nebã. Bãmb zẽka b nug n wẽ-ba. Tãmsã rigimdame, kũumã rʋra tẽngã soay zut wa sagdo. La baoosgo, ne yõwã fãa, Wẽnnaam sũurã kell n ka sig ye. Bãmb nugã ket n zẽkame." 
Isaiah5:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽka tãb-kaoor neb nins sẽn be tẽn-zãrsẽ wã yĩnga. Bãmb fɩɩl n boola bãmb tɩ b yi dũniyã kɩremsã n wa. La gese, bãmb yãgdame n wat tao-tao." 
Isaiah5:27 Ned ka be bãmb sʋkã n yɛ, wall n keoosdẽ ye. Ned ka be bãmb sʋkã n suusdẽ, wall a gõe ye. Ned ka be bãmb sʋkã t'a sɛɛg sẽbdg loke, wall t'a neooda sẽbds kao me ye." 
Isaiah5:28 Bãmb pɛɛmã yaa sɩlemse, la b tãbdã rʋʋsame. Bãmb wiidã nao-bendã wẽnda kuga, la b saar-dãmbã nao wẽnda seb-kãsenga." 
Isaiah5:29 Bãmb kɛlengã yaa wa gɩgem-yãang kɛlenga. Bãmb kelemda wa gɩgem-poala, bãmb wũusdame, bãmb yõkda rũng n tall n loog n kẽng zĩig ning ned sẽn ka tõe n ta, tɩ ned ka tõe n yõk n deeg ye." 
Isaiah5:30 Badaare, b na n guglma bãmb zut wa ko-kãsengã sẽn guglumdã. B na n gesa tẽngã, la yaa lik ne toog bala. La sawad-taok n na n wa kɩt t'a vẽenemã lebg lika." 
Isaiah6:1 Rĩm a Oozɩyaas kũumã yʋʋmde, mam yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab vẽnegr pʋga, tɩ b zao naam geer sẽn zẽk wʋsg zugu. La bãmb fuugã tẽngr yɛdg n pida Wẽnd doogã." 
Isaiah6:2 Serafẽ-rãmb n dag n yas bãmb zugẽ wã. Bãmb ned kam fãa rag n tara pɩgs a yoobe. Bãmb tara a yiib n lut b nenga, la b tara a yiib n lut b naoã, la b tar a yiibã n yɩgda." 
Isaiah6:3 Bãmb dag n zẽkda b koees n yet taab yaa: «Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yaa Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba. Dũniyã fãa pida ne bãmb ziirã.»" 
Isaiah6:4 Bãmb koeesã rãamd rag n kɩtame tɩ Wẽnd doogã kʋɩlems tẽngr rĩmda, la roogã rag n pida ne bug-zõose." 
Isaiah6:5 Dẽ, mam yeelame yaa: «Mam paama toog bala! Mam ki yã! Bala, mam yaa nobɩn-dẽgd soaba, la mam bee neb sẽn yaa nobɩn-dẽgd rãmb sʋka. La mam nin yãnda rĩmã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã!»" 
Isaiah6:6 Serafẽ a yembr yɩkame n wat mam sẽnẽ, la a rag n yãka bug-saall ne yɩʋʋg tẽn-kugrã zug n zãad a nugẽ." 
Isaiah6:7 Yẽnda sɩɩsa mam noorã ne bug-saallã n yeele: «Yõwã sẽn sɩɩs fo nobɩmsã, b yiisa fo kongrã, la b kõo foom f yel-wẽndã sugri.»" 
Isaiah6:8 Dẽ, mam wʋma Zu-soabã sẽn yet yaa: «Ãnda la mam na n tʋme? Ãnda n na n kẽng tõnd yʋʋr yĩnga? La mam leokame: ‹Ad maam, tʋm-y maam!› »" 
Isaiah6:9 La bãmb yeelame yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ yeel nin-bãmbã yaa: ‹Yãmb kelgdame, la y ka wʋmd ye! Yãmb getame, la y ka ne ye!›" 
Isaiah6:10 Riglim nin-bãmbã sũyã, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ tʋb-pa-wʋmdba, n kɩt tɩ b ninã mume, tɩ b ninã ra leb n yãnd ye, tɩ b tʋbã ra tõog n wʋm me ye, tɩ b ra wa tõog n wʋm a võor ye. Maan a woto tɩ b ra wa tek yam n paam maagr ye.»" 
Isaiah6:11 La mam sokame yaa: «Zu-soaba, na n yɩɩ a woto hal tɩ ta dabʋre?» Bãmb leoka maam yaa: Hal tɩ ta wakat ning b sẽn na n sãam tẽmsã tɩ neb ka leb n be b pʋsẽ, la b sẽn na n sãam dotã tɩ neb ka leb n be b pʋsẽ, la b sẽn na n sãam tẽn-gãongã t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgã," 
Isaiah6:12 hal tɩ ta wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kɩt tɩ nebã zãag zĩiga, n bas tẽngã zãngã." 
Isaiah6:13 Baa tẽngã neb piig sʋk ned a yembr sã n kelle, bugum n na n dɩ-a, la wa b sẽn kɛɛd terebẽnt tɩɩg ne sɛn tɩɩg t'a viukã ketẽ wã, a viukã na n toba yagens sẽn welg toore." 
Isaiah7:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Akaaz sẽn yaa a Zotam biiga, n yaa a Oozɩyaas yagengã wakatẽ, Siiri rĩm a Retsin ne Israyɛll dĩm a Peka sẽn yaa a Remaliya biigã kẽng n na n tɩ zaba ne Zeruzalɛm, la b ka tõog n zab ne-a ye." 
Isaiah7:2 B togsa a Davɩɩd doogã neb n yeel yaa: «Siiri tãb-biisã kẽng n tɩ yãmba Efrayiim tẽngã.» Dẽ, a Akaaz ne a nebã sũy sɩnga rigb wa sobg sẽn miimd tʋgr tɩɩse." 
Isaiah7:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Ezayi yaa: «Mam kot-f lame tɩ foom ne f biig a Seyaar-Yasuub yi n seg a Akaaz ko-bao-kãsengã ko-sor noore, ga-loasdã pʋʋgã sor zugu." 
Isaiah7:4 Yeel-a yaa: ‹Gãneg f yam, da zoe rabeem ye. Ra bas tɩ f sũur kiuus nin-bãmbã b yiibã sẽn yaa ra-giis sẽn nukd bug-zõosã yĩng ye. Ra bas tɩ f sũur kiuus Siiri rĩm a Retsin ne a Remaliya biigã sũ-puugrã yĩng ye!" 
Isaiah7:5 Bala, Siiri ne Efrayiim la a Remaliya biigã saagd n dat n maana foom wẽnga.› » Bãmb yetame:" 
Isaiah7:6 «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ zab ne Zʋʋda nebã, d na n kẽesa tẽngã rabeem, tõnd na n pãb-a lame n wã, n modg-a t'a sak-do, la d yãk a Tabeyɛll biigã n kɩt t'a yɩ rĩm n soog Zʋʋda.»" 
Isaiah7:7 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bõn-kãng kõn tõog ye, rẽndã ka tõe n yɩ ye." 
Isaiah7:8 Bala, Siiri na-tẽng yaa Damaase, la a Retsin yaa Damaas tẽngã zug-soaba. A keta yʋʋm pis-yoob la a nu, tɩ Efrayiim sẽn sãamã ka leb n yɩ soolem ye." 
Isaiah7:9 Efrayiim na-tẽng yaa Samaari, la a Remaliya biigã n yaa Samaari tẽngã zug-soaba. Yãmb sã n ka tall tẽebo, yãmb ka na n tõog n yals ye!»" 
Isaiah7:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeel a Akaaz yaa: 
Isaiah7:11 «Kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã bãnde. Ba a sã n yaa kɩɩm-kulg zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, wall a sã n yaa hal yĩngr zĩ-zãrsẽ.»" 
Isaiah7:12 A Akaaz leokame: «Mam ka na n kos bũmb ye, mam ka na n mak Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ges ye.»" 
Isaiah7:13 Dẽ, a Ezayi yeelame: «Dĩm a Davɩɩd yagense, m kotame tɩ y kelge! Yãmb sẽn maan tɩ ninsaalbã yam yi yãmbã ka sek-y tɩ y rat n maan tɩ mam Wẽnnaamã me yam yi-yã?" 
Isaiah7:14 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Zu-soabã meng na n kõ yãmb bãnde. Ade, pa-kuil na n dɩka pʋga, n dog bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Emanuwɛlle, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Wẽnd-be-ne-do.›" 
Isaiah7:15 Yẽnda na n yũuda bĩis-gõeem la a rɩt sɩɩd hal n wa n bãng tɩ zãgs wẽng n maan neere. 
Isaiah7:16 La sẽn deng biigã sẽn na n bãng tɩ zãgs wẽng n maan neere, nebã na n zoe n basa rĩm-dãmb a yiib nins sẽn kẽesd yãmb dabeem-kãsengã tẽng t'a lebg vɩʋʋgo." 
Isaiah7:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ foom ne f nebã, la f ba wã roog neb yãnd ray buud sẽn nan zɩ n zĩndi, hal sẽn sɩng daar ning Efrayiim sẽn welg ne Zʋʋda wã. Yaa Asiiri rĩmã n na n wa ne yel-kãnga." 
Isaiah7:18 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n fɩɩl n boola zõos nins sẽn be Ezɩpt tẽngã Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã sẽn be kɩremsã, la sĩ wã sẽn be Asiiri soolmẽ wã." 
Isaiah7:19 Bãmb fãa na n wa siga tãn-londã sẽn be tãn-lug-lugã sʋkã, la pĩisã sẽgsẽ, la tuudã ne yam-maasã fãa zutu." 
Isaiah7:20 Badaare, Zu-soabã na n talla barg b sẽn tɩ peng Efrat kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde, yaa Asiiri rĩmã yell la b sẽn gomdã, n kõog yãmb zugã, ne y kar-kõbdã la b kõog y toɛɛngã." 
Isaiah7:21 Badaare, ned kam fãa na n gʋʋla nag-sãdg a yembr ne rũm-bãooneg a yiibu." 
Isaiah7:22 La bĩisim sẽn na n yɩ wʋsgã yĩnga, b na n dɩɩ bĩis-gõeem. Neb nins fãa sẽn na n pa tẽngẽ wã na n dɩɩ bĩis-gõeem ne sɩɩdo." 
Isaiah7:23 Badaare, zĩis nins fãa sẽn dag n tar reezẽ tɩɩs tusr sẽn zem wanzuri ligd tusrã na n lebga gõos la gõpayãndse." 
Isaiah7:24 Nebã na n kẽnga beenẽ ne tãp la pɛɛm n tɩ tãoose, bala, tẽngã na n lebga gõos la gõpayãndse." 
Isaiah7:25 La b sẽn dag n kood kunkub nins fãa sigdsẽ ne wãgsã, fo ka na n leb n saag n kẽng beenẽ, fo sẽn zoet gõosã ne gõpayãndsã yĩnga. B na n basda niig tɩ b kẽnd n wãbd beenẽ, beenẽ lebga piis ne bʋʋs gõob zĩiga.»" 
Isaiah8:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Rɩk wal-bedre, n gʋls a zug ne gʋls-biis kaoreng sẽn yaa naana. Gʋls a woto: ‹Mahɛɛr-Salall-Has-Baaze.›" 
Isaiah8:2 La mam dɩka wal-bedrã n wilg kaset dãmb a yiib sẽn yaa sɩd dãmba. Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Uuri ne a Yeberekiya biig a Zakari. 
Isaiah8:3 Mam kẽe ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs-poakã, la a rɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla.» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Pʋd biigã yʋʋr t'a Mahɛɛr-Salall-Has-Baaze." 
Isaiah8:4 Bala, sẽn deng biigã sẽn na n bãng tɩ bool a ba bɩ a ma wã, b na n wa wʋka Damaas arzegsã, la b zɛ Samaari laogã n tall n kẽng Asiiri rĩmã nengẽ.»" 
Isaiah8:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela maam yaa: 
Isaiah8:6 «Nin-bãmbã sẽn zãgs Sɩloe koomã sẽn zoet bãanem-bãanemã, n bas n maand sũ-noog Siiri rĩm a Retsin ne a Remaliya biigã sẽn yaa Israyɛll rĩmã yĩngã," 
Isaiah8:7 kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩt tɩ koom sẽn tar pãngã, Efrat kʋɩlgã koom sẽn yaa Asiiri rĩmã yik ne a ziirã fãa n zab ne bãmba. Yẽnda na n pida ko-soayã fãa n puugi, n gãndg a kʋɩl-kogsã fãa n loogdẽ." 
Isaiah8:8 Ko-kãng na n kãaga Zʋʋda, yẽnda na n lim-a lame n tãag a kokoayã. A Emanuwɛll na n yɛdga a pɩgsã n pid fo tẽngã zĩigã fãa.»" 
Isaiah8:9 Nebã, kaas-y-yã! B na n kẽesa yãmb dabeem! Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn be dũniyã zĩ-zãrsẽ wã, yok-y y tʋb n kelge! Segl-y y mens zabr yĩnga. Rabeem-kãseng na n yõka yãmba! Segl-y y mens zabr yĩnga. Rabeem-kãseng na n yõka yãmba!" 
Isaiah8:10 Yãmb dat bɩ y maan saagre, a ka na n tõog ye, yãmb dat bɩ y gome, a ka na n pids ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam bee ne tõndo." 
Isaiah8:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã sẽn wa n gãd maamã, bãmb sagla maam tɩ m da wa maan wa nin-bãmbã ye. Bãmb yeela maam yaa:" 
Isaiah8:12 «Nin-bãmbã sẽn set n dat n maan bũmb ning fãa wã, bɩ y ra geelg bõn-kãng wa bũmb sẽn na n tõog ye. Ra-y zoe-y bũmb nins bãmb sẽn zoetã ye. Ra-y yɛɛs-y bõn-kãng ye." 
Isaiah8:13 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã bal la yãmb tog n ges tɩ b yaa pʋ-peelem soaba. Bãmb bal la yãmb tog n zoe, yaa bãmb la yãmb tog n yɛɛse." 
Isaiah8:14 Bãmb na n yɩɩ zĩig sẽn welg toore, la b leb n na n yɩɩ kugr neb sẽn lakda, bãmb yaa pĩig kugr sẽn lubda, Israyɛll buud a yiibã yĩnga. Bãmb yaa bẽdg ne tãoog Zeruzalɛm nebã yĩnga." 
Isaiah8:15 Neb wʋsg na n laka bãmb n lʋɩ, bãmb na n lʋɩɩme n wã, bẽdgã na n yõka bãmba, tɩ b gãd-ba." 
Isaiah8:16 Bĩng kaset-kãngã, sog tõ-kãngã n bĩng m karen-biisã sʋka." 
Isaiah8:17 Mam gũuda Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb wẽnemd n basa a Zakoob buudã. Mam maanda tẽeb ne bãmba." 
Isaiah8:18 Mam mengã ne kamb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ maamã yaa bãnde, la bõn-bãnd sẽn wilgd bũmb ning sẽn na n wa maan Israyɛll pʋgẽ, bõn-kãng yita Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn be Sɩyõ tãngã zugã nengẽ.»" 
Isaiah8:19 B sã n wa yeel yãmba: «Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y neb sẽn sogsd kɩɩmse, la y sok kinkir-bagbã sẽn walemd la b yẽgemdẽ wã. Buud fãa ka sokd a Wẽnnaam sɩda? B ka sokd kɩɩms nin-vɩɩs yĩng sɩda?»" 
Isaiah8:20 Bɩ y leok yaa: «D tog n wẽnemd n gesa Zu-soabã tõogã ne b kasetã.» Nebã sã n ka sak n gom a woto, b ka na n yãnd beoogã vẽegr ye." 
Isaiah8:21 Bãmb na n pɩʋʋga tẽngã ne namsgo, la kom. Kom sẽn na n nams bãmbã yĩnga, bãmb sũyã na n yikame, la b na n kãaba b rĩmã ne b Wẽnnaamã wẽnga. Bãmb na n wẽnemd n nak n gesa yĩngri," 
Isaiah8:22 la bãmb na n sulg n gesa tẽnga, n mik tɩ yaa sũ-sãanga, lik bida la yel-pak-kãsems bala. B na n tusa bãmb n kẽes lik bida pʋga." 
Isaiah8:23 Lik bida wã ka na n zĩnd tẽng ning sẽn paamd toog moasã wã pʋgẽ wakat fãa ye. Wakat sẽn loogã, Zu-soabã sã n kɩtame tɩ Zabulõ ne Neftali tẽngã paam yãnde, wakat sẽn watã, b na n kɩtame tɩ sor ning sẽn yegd ko-kãsengã, ne tẽng ning sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã rʋʋndã sẽn yaa buud toay-toayã soolmã paam ziiri." 
Isaiah9:1 Neb nins sẽn dag n kẽnd lik bida pʋgẽ wã, yãnda vẽen-kãsenga. Vẽenem yãga neb nins sẽn zĩ lik bida tẽngẽ wã zugu." 
Isaiah9:2 Zu-soaba, yãmb kɩtame tɩ nebã fɩɩge, yãmb kɩtame tɩ b paam sũ-no-kãsenga. Bãmb kɩdemda yãmb taoor wa neb sẽn kɩdemd tigsg wakate, b maanda sũ-noog wa neb sẽn pʋɩt te-zɛɛdem." 
Isaiah9:3 Bala, yãmb yiisa bãmb yembd ning b sẽn dag n be wã pʋga, yãmb kaooga rasaar ning b sẽn dag n tar n pãbd bãmb poayã, yãmb kaooga bɛyã gʋlgã, wa yãmb sẽn maan Madiyã-rãmbã lʋɩɩs daarã." 
Isaiah9:4 B na n loba neooda nins fãa b sẽn tab tẽng zabr wakatã bugmẽ, la b lob fut nins fãa zɩɩm sẽn bolã bugmẽ, tɩ bugmã rɩ-b zãnga." 
Isaiah9:5 Bala, b roga biig n kõ-do, b kõo tõnd bi-ribla. B kõo yẽnda noor t'a na n soog soolem. La b na n boonda yẽnda tɩ sagend sẽn yaa sõama wʋsgo, Wẽnnaam sẽn tar pãnga, ba sẽn paad wakat sẽn ka sɛta, la vɩ-bãan naaba." 
Isaiah9:6 Yẽnda naamã na n yalgame, yẽnda na n waa ne vɩ-bãan sẽn ka sɛta, a Davɩɩd naam geerã ne yẽnda soolmã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n paasa a soolmã pãnga, la a na n zã-a-la ne zemsgo la tɩrlem, sẽn sɩng ne moasã la wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã nonglem-kãsengã n na n kɩt t'a yɩ a woto." 
Isaiah9:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma koɛɛg a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga. Koɛɛgã siga Israyɛll soolmã zugu. 
Isaiah9:8 Nebã fãa na n bãnga bõn-kãnga. Efrayiim soolmã nebã ne Samaari nebã na n bãngame. Nin-bãmb dag n gomda ne wuk-m-meng la zẽk-m-meng n yetẽ yaa: 
Isaiah9:9 Tãn-koɛɛmã lalg lʋɩɩme, tõnd na n me-a-la ne kug-peesdɩ. B kɛɛ wom-sees tɩɩsã, la tõnd na n ledga bãmb ne sɛɛdr tɩ-bɛdã." 
Isaiah9:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame t'a Retsin zabd-n-taasã tõog bãmba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab paasa bãmb bɛɛbã pãnga. 
Isaiah9:11 Siiri nebã na n bee yaangã, tɩ Filistẽ-dãmbã be nin-taoore, la bãmb na n yaaga b noy n vel Israyɛlle. La ne rẽ fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã ka na n sig ye. Bãmb nugã na n ket n zẽkame." 
Isaiah9:12 Baoosgo, Israyɛll nebã ka na n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn pãbd bãmbã nengẽ ye. Bãmb ka na n wẽnemd n bao Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã ye." 
Isaiah9:13 Dẽ, daar a yembr pʋgẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n fiuuga Israyɛll zugã, la b kʋʋg a zʋʋrã, b na n kʋʋga koangã willi, la b kʋʋg tãnwiigã." 
Isaiah9:14 Zugã yaa kãsem-dãmbã ne nanambsã, tɩ zʋʋrã yaa no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn kõt zĩrẽ zãmsgã." 
Isaiah9:15 Nin-bãmbã taoor-dãmbã kẽesd-b-la moogo, la neb nins bãmb sẽn tɛtã menemame." 
Isaiah9:16 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Zu-soabã sũur ka na n yɩ noog ne bãmb kom-bɩɩsã ye. Bãmb ka na n zoe b pʋg-kõapã ne b kɩɩbsã nimbãaneg ye. Bala, bãmb fãa yaa wẽn-kɩɩsdba, la nin-wẽnse. Bãmb noyã fãa gomda yalem-goamã. La ne rẽ fãa, bãmb sũ-yikrã ka sig ye. Bãmb nugã ket n zẽkame." 
Isaiah9:17 Bala, wẽnemã rɩta wa bugum, a rɩta wa bugum sẽn dɩt gõos ne gõpayãndse, a rɩta weoogã kãgrã tɩ bug-zõ-taok zẽkdẽ." 
Isaiah9:18 Saasẽ-Pãng-soabã sũ-kãbrã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã kok bugum, la nebã lebga bugum dɩɩbo. Ned baa a yembr ka zoet a to nimbãaneg ye." 
Isaiah9:19 B wãbda rɩtgo, la kom ket n tara bãmba. Bãmb dɩta goabga, la b ket n ka tɩgd ye. Ned kam fãa wãbda a nug nemdo." 
Isaiah9:20 Manaase wãbda Efrayiim, tɩ Efrayiim me wãbd Manaase. Bãmb b yiibã naaga taab n zabd ne Zʋʋda. La ne rẽ fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã ka sig ye. Bãmb nugã ket n zẽkame." 
Isaiah10:1 Toog na n paama neb nins sẽn vigind wẽng maaneg tõodã, la sẽn gʋlsd pãn-maaneg noyã," 
Isaiah10:2 la sẽn mongd ka-pãens-rãmbã bʋʋm, sẽn wẽgd naong rãmbã sẽn be mam nebã sʋkã, la sẽn dɩkd pʋg-kõapã tɩ lebg b paoongo, la b fãad kɩɩbsã!" 
Isaiah10:3 Yãmb na n maana a wãn n põs sɩbgrã daare, daar ning sɩbgrã sẽn na n yi zĩ-zãrg n wa wã? Yãmb na n zoe n kẽnga ãnda nengẽ n tɩ paam sõngre? Yãmb na n tɩ bĩnga y arzegsã yɛɛnẽ?" 
Isaiah10:4 Yãmb sẽn tõe n maan bũmb ning bala, yaa tɩ y naag yembsã n kuudẽ, wall y ki n naag b sẽn kʋ-b rãmbã. La ne rẽ fãa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã ket n ka sig ye. Bãmb nugã ket n zẽkame." 
Isaiah10:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Toog na n paama Asiiri nebã, bãmb yaa mam sũ-yikrã dasaare! Asiiri nug n zãad guugã mam sẽn tar n wilgd m sũ-yikrã." 
Isaiah10:6 Mam bas-a lame n zabd ne nin-wẽnsã. Mam tʋmd-a lame t'a tɩ zab ne neb nins sẽn yikd mam sũurã, t'a kẽng n tɩ zɛ teed wʋsgo, la a tab bãmb wa sor zug begdo." 
Isaiah10:7 La Asiiri ka tagsd tɩ yaa maam n tʋm-a ye. Asiiri ka tol n tagsd a woto ye. Yẽnda tagsg yaa tɩ sãame, yẽnda tagsd n na n menesa buud wʋsgo.»" 
Isaiah10:8 Bala, yẽnda yetame: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam tãb-biis nanambsã ka zem dĩm-dãmb la?" 
Isaiah10:9 Bũmb ning sẽn paam Kalno tẽngã ka paam Karkemiis tẽngã la? Bɩ sẽn paam Hamat tẽngã ka paam Arpaad tẽngã? Bɩ sẽn paam Samaari tẽngã ka paam Damaas tẽngã? 
Isaiah10:10 Mam nugã sẽn tõog n ta soolem nins sẽn dag n pʋʋsd wẽn-naandsã, tɩ bãmb bõn-naandsã sõor yaool n dag n yɩɩd Zeruzalɛm ne Samaari bõn-naandsã," 
Isaiah10:11 woto me, mam sẽn maan Samaari ne a wẽn-naandsã to-to wã, mam kõn maan Zeruzalɛm ne a bõn-naandsã me a woto sɩda?»" 
Isaiah10:12 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n wa n pids b tʋʋmdã fãa Sɩyõ tãngã zug Zeruzalɛm n sɛ, bãmb na n sɩbga Asiiri rĩma a wuk-m-mengã ne a tɩtaamã tagsg yĩnga." 
Isaiah10:13 Bala, yẽnda yeelame: «Yaa ne mam kangã pãnga, ne m yamã la m bãngrã, la m tõog n sãam neb wʋsg tẽms todse, n wʋk b arzegsã, la mam yɩɩ gãndaoog n sik rĩm-dãmb b naamẽ." 
Isaiah10:14 Mam nug paama neb wʋsg arzegse, wa gɛl sẽn be tʋkẽ, la mam wʋka dũniyã zãnga, wa b sẽn wʋkd gɛl bũmb sẽn zãndg n base. La ned ba a yembr ka pigimdid a pɩgsa, wall a yaag a noor n yeel tɩ bũmb ye." 
Isaiah10:15 Rẽ yĩnga, lar tõe n wuka a meng ne sẽn tar-a yẽnda n kɛɛdẽ wã la? Ra-wãad-sʋʋg tõe n zẽka a meng ne sẽn tar-a yẽnda n wãadẽ wã la? Yaa wa dasaar sẽn yuumd a zãada! Yaa wa guug sẽn zẽkd a zãada!" 
Isaiah10:16 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n kɩt tɩ Asiiri soolmã neb nins sẽn nobã faage. La yẽnda nin-kãsemsã sʋka, toog n na n widgi, n dɩt wa bugum sẽn dɩt to-to wã." 
Isaiah10:17 Israyɛll vẽenemã na n lebga bugum, tɩ yẽnda Pʋ-Peelem Soabã lebg bug-witim, n dɩ Asiiri gõosã ne a gõpayãndsã n sãam-b zãng daar a yembr pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah10:18 Bãmb na n sãama Israyɛll kãgrã ne a tɩɩs zĩigã sẽn yaa ziirã zãnga. Yẽnda na n lebga wa bãad pãng sẽn sɛ. 
Isaiah10:19 Yẽnda kãgrã tɩɩs nins sẽn na n kellã sõor na n yɩɩ bilfu, tɩ baa bi-bilf tõe n sõd-ba.»" 
Isaiah10:20 Badaare, Israyɛll bu-kellã ne a Zakoob buudã neb nins sẽn põsã ka na n leb n teeg soab ning sẽn dag n pãbd-a bãmbã ye. Bãmb na n teega Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã ne sɩda." 
Isaiah10:21 Bu-kell n na n lebg n wa Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam nengẽ: yaa a Zakoob buudã neb nins sẽn kellã. 
Isaiah10:22 Baa Israyɛll sẽn yaa fo nebã sã n yaa wʋsg wa ko-kãsengã noor bĩisrã, yaa neb bilf bal n na n kelle, n lebg n wa. B zoe n yãka yam tɩ sãoongã na n zĩndame. Yaa tɩrlem bal n na n pid n puugi." 
Isaiah10:23 Bala, sãoongã sẽn na n zĩndã yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yãk yam n na n kɩt t'a zĩnd tẽngã zãng fãa pʋga." 
Isaiah10:24 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame yaa: «Mam nebã, yãmb dãmb sẽn be Sɩyõ, da-y zoe-y Asiiri nebã ye! Bãmb pãbda yãmb ne guugu, bãmb zẽkda b rasaar n pãbd yãmb wa Ezɩpt nebã sẽn dag n maan yãmbã." 
Isaiah10:25 La keta bilf bala, tɩ mam sũ-yikrã sɛ. Mam sũ-yikrã na n sãama bãmba." 
Isaiah10:26 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n zẽka b kalwaas n pãb bãmb wa b sẽn dag n pãb Madiyã nebã Orɛɛb pĩigã kugr zĩigẽ wã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽka b dasaarã ko-kãsengã zug wa b sẽn dag n zẽk-a Ezɩpt tẽngã. 
Isaiah10:27 Badaare, bãmb na n sika b zɩɩbã n bas f bãgdã, la b yiis b yubl balgrã n bas f yublã. Fo na n nobame hal tɩ f yubl balgrã kaooge.»" 
Isaiah10:28 Asiiri nebã taa Ayat n pɩʋʋg Migron n tɩ bas b teedã Mikmaase. 
Isaiah10:29 Bãmb wẽdga kunkubã sʋk n yeel yaa: «Tõnd na n gãanda Geba!» Rama tẽng nebã rigda ne rabeem, tẽng ning b sẽn boond t'a Sayull Gibeya wã ninga tĩiga." 
Isaiah10:30 Bat-Galim tẽnga, kelme! Layiisa tẽnga, maan gũusgu! Anatot tẽnga, m yãbd-fo!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmena nebã zoet n kẽeda moogo, Gebim tẽng nebã baooda soondg zĩiga." 
Isaiah10:32 Badaar bala, Asiiri nebã tɩ yalsa Noob tẽnga, n zẽk b nug n na n zab ne Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã, n na n zab ne kunkubr ning Zeruzalɛm sẽn be a zugã." 
Isaiah10:33 Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n kaoo wilã ne pãng n lubi. B na n kɛɛ tɩɩs nins sẽn yaa lug-lugã, b na n luba sẽn lug-b n yɩɩdã tẽnga." 
Isaiah10:34 B na n kɛɛ kãgrã tɩɩs ne lar n lubi, la Libã tɩɩsã ne b ziirã na n lʋɩɩme." 
Isaiah11:1 La wil-poll n na n tão n yi a Izayi viukẽ wã, yẽnda yẽgã na n tãoo tɩ-tobengo." 
Isaiah11:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã na n siga yẽnda zugu: yaa yam ne bãngr sɩɩga, la saglg ne raood sɩɩga, ne minim la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem zoees sɩɩga." 
Isaiah11:3 Yẽnda na n zoee Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem ne sũ-noogo, yẽnda ka na n kao bʋʋdã wa sẽn zems yẽnda ninã sẽn ne wã ye. Yẽnda ka na n welg yɛlã wa sẽn zems yẽnda tʋb sẽn wʋm ye." 
Isaiah11:4 Yẽnda na n kaoo ka-pãens rãmbã bʋʋd ne zemsgo. A na n bʋʋ tẽngã nimbãan-nebã bʋʋd wa sẽn zemse. Yẽnda na n wẽe dũniyã ne a noorã dasaare, la a kʋ nin-wẽnsã ne a noorã pemsem." 
Isaiah11:5 Tɩrlem na n yɩɩ yẽnda sɛɛg sẽbdga, la maan-sɩd na n yɩɩ yẽnda kur-wĩiri." 
Isaiah11:6 Rigd-n-yĩidg ne peosg na n vɩɩmda ne taaba, ãbg na n naaga bull n gãande, nag-bil ne gɩgem-polle, la rũm-nobds na n zĩnda ne taaba, la bi-bilf n na n yɩ bãmb pe-kɩɩma." 
Isaiah11:7 Rigd-n-yĩidg ne nag-yãang na n wãba yamd ne taaba, la b kambã na n naaga taab n gãande. Gɩgemd na n wãba yamd wa naafo." 
Isaiah11:8 Biig sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ na n deema ruruug bok noore, la bi-sigdg na n tʋma a nug põeer bokẽ." 
Isaiah11:9 Mam tãn-sõngã fãa zugu, bãmb ka na n maan to bũmb ye, sãoong buud kõn tol n leb n zĩnd ye. Bala, dũniyã gill na n pida ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab bãngre, wa ko-kãsengã sẽn pidã." 
Isaiah11:10 Badaare, a Izayi yẽgrã na n tilga wa tãb-kaoor nebã yĩnga. Bu-zẽmsã na n baoo yẽnda, la yẽnda vʋʋsg zĩigã na n talla ziiri." 
Isaiah11:11 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leb n tẽega b nug n fãag b buud ning sẽn kellã, yaa neb nins sẽn pa Asiiri ne Ezɩptã, la sẽn pa-b Patroos ne Kuusã, la Elam ne Sineyaar la Hamatã, ne tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbg tɩ b be ko-kãsengã sʋkã." 
Isaiah11:12 B na n zẽka tãb-kaoor buud toay-toayã yĩnga, la b kɩt tɩ Israyɛll neb nins b sẽn dag n digã tigme, b na n leb n deega Zʋʋda neb nins sẽn sãeeg n be dũniyã ween-vɩɩs a naasã." 
Isaiah11:13 Efrayiim nebã sũ-kiirã na n sɛɛme, la b na n menesa Zʋʋda bɛɛbã. Efrayiim nebã ka na n leb n maan sũ-kiir ne Zʋʋda nebã ye. La Zʋʋda nebã ka na n leb n zab ne Efrayiim nebã ye." 
Isaiah11:14 Bãmb na n naaga taab n zab ne Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn be nin-taoorã, la b naag taab n zɛ neb nins sẽn be yaangã. Bãmb na n sooga Edom ne Moaab nebã, la Amo-rãmbã na n saka bãmba." 
Isaiah11:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kʋɩɩsa Ezɩpt ko-kãsengã. Bãmb na n tẽega b nug Efrat kʋɩlgã zugu, n fʋʋs-a ne pãng n kɩt t'a welg ko-soay a yopoe, tɩ b tõe n pid neooda n pɩʋʋg-a." 
Isaiah11:16 B na n tuka sor bãmb neb nins sẽn ketã yĩnga, yaa bãmb neb nins sẽn pa Asiiri wã yĩnga. Wa b sẽn dag n tuk sor Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, daar ning bãmb sẽn yi Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Isaiah12:1 Badaare, fo na n yeelame yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam pʋʋsda yãmb barka. Bala, yãmb sũur dag n yika ne maam, la yãmb sũurã leb n sigame, yãmb belsa maam." 
Isaiah12:2 Gese, Wẽnnaam yaa mam fãagda, mam maanda tẽebo, la m kõn zoe rabeem ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pãnga, la b yaa mam pãn-kãsenga. Bãmb yaa mam fãagda.»" 
Isaiah12:3 Yãmb na n kẽnga fãagr bulgẽ wã n tɩ toog koom ne sũ-noogo. 
Isaiah12:4 Badaare, yãmb na n yeelame yaa: «Pʋʋs-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab barka, bool-y bãmb yʋʋrã, n moon bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã nebã sʋka. La y tẽeg tɩ bãmb yʋʋrã yaa kãsenga." 
Isaiah12:5 Yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, bãmb maana tʋʋm-neeba. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ dũniyã gill fãa bãng tʋʋm-bãmba." 
Isaiah12:6 Sɩyõ tẽng nebã, kaas-y sũ-noog ne kɩdeng kaasgo! Bala, Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã yaa kãsenga!»" 
Isaiah13:1 Woto yaa Sɩbgr koɛɛg Babilond tẽngã yĩnga. Yaa koɛɛg a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn deege. 
Isaiah13:2 Tilg-y tãb-kaoor tãn-beellã zugu, la y zẽk y koɛɛg tɩ b wʋme, n zẽk y nug n kams-b tɩ b wa tũ nin-kãsemsã rignoyẽ n kẽ." 
Isaiah13:3 Mam kõo neb nins sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã noore, mam leb n boola sũ-yikrã gãndaadã me, sẽn maand-b sũ-noog mam tõogrã yĩngã." 
Isaiah13:4 Bʋrg n yit tãmsã zutu, la yaa wa neb kʋʋng bʋrgo! Yaa buud toay-toayã sẽn tigim taabã bʋʋre! Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n tigimd b tãb-biisã zabr yĩnga." 
Isaiah13:5 Tãb-biisã yita tẽms sẽn be zĩ-zãrsẽ, b yita saasã kɩremsã fãa n watẽ, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n wat ne b sũ-puugr zab-teedã n na n sãam tẽngã zãnga." 
Isaiah13:6 Yãb-y n wiis-yã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã kolgame. Ra-kãng wata wa sãoong sẽn yit Sẽn-Tõe-Fãa wã nengẽ." 
Isaiah13:7 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ nebã fãa gĩin maage, tɩ ned kam fãa raood sɛ." 
Isaiah13:8 Rabeem-kãseng na n yõka bãmba, toog la namsg na n paama bãmba, la bãmb na n wẽndgda wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem. Bãmb na n yɛɛsame n ges taaba, bãmb nemsã midgame." 
Isaiah13:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã watame, yaa to-kãseng daare, la sũ-kãbr ne sũ-yik-kãseng daare. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la a menes yel-wẽn-maandbã." 
Isaiah13:10 Bala, ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã ne b sulã kõn leb n kõ b vẽenem yɛs ye. La wĩntoogã pukr wakate, a na n sobgame, la kiuugã vẽenem kõn leb n tãoos ye." 
Isaiah13:11 Mam na n sɩbga ninsaalbã, wẽng ning b sẽn maanã yĩnga, la m sɩbg nin-wẽnsã b kongrã yĩnga. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tɩtaam dãmbã wuk-m-mengã sɛ, Mam na n sika nin-toosã b zẽk-m-mengã pʋga." 
Isaiah13:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sãnem halaal yãab sẽn yaa toog to-to wã, bɩ ninsaal yãab toolem yɩɩg rẽnda. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ninsaal yãab lebg toog wa Ofɩɩr tẽng sãnem." 
Isaiah13:13 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam na n miim saasã, la tẽn-gãongã yẽbgr na n digimdame, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sũ-kãbrã yĩnga, la b sũ-yik-kãsengã daar yĩnga." 
Isaiah13:14 Dẽ, b sẽn lingd walg t'a yɛɛs n zoet to-to wã, la wa piis sẽn ka tar ned sẽn na n tigim-bã, ned kam fãa na n lebg n kuila a nebẽ, ned kam fãa na n zoe n leba a tẽngẽ." 
Isaiah13:15 Bãmb sẽn na n paam neb nins fãa, b na n kõs-b lame n kʋ, la b na n kʋʋ neb nins b sẽn yõgã ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Isaiah13:16 B na n kʋʋ bãmb kambã n dʋʋg b nifẽ, b na n zɛ b rotã teedo, la b gãand bãmb pagbã ne pãnga." 
Isaiah13:17 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Meed-rãmbã tɩ zab ne bãmba. Meed-rãmb ka baood wanzuri, la b toor ka ne sãnem me ye." 
Isaiah13:18 Bãmb na n tãoo kom-bɩɩsã ne b tãbdã n kʋ, la b ka na n zoe kamb sẽn nan yi b ma pʋgẽ nimbãaneg ye. Bãmb ka na n maan nimbãan-zoeer ne kom-dibli ye." 
Isaiah13:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Babilond sẽn yaa tẽn-neer n yɩɩd tẽmsã a taabã lebg a woto. Tẽn-kãng sẽn tar ziirã yĩnga a yaa Kalde rãmbã waoog-m-meng tẽnga. A na n lebga wa Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n sãam Sodom ne Gomoor tẽmsã. 
Isaiah13:20 Ned kõn tol n leb n tilg a yir Babilond tẽngã, la neb kõn leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ zamaan woo zamaan ye. Araab-rãmbã kõn leb n tilg b fu-roog beenẽ, la pe-kɩɩmbã me kõn leb n gãneg b rũms beenẽ ye." 
Isaiah13:21 Beenẽ na n lebga we-rũms gãag zĩiga. Yẽnda ro-vɩɩdã na n pida ne vitu, la naneoond na n gãee beenẽ, tɩ boees yɩgd n tirsd beenẽ." 
Isaiah13:22 Kata na n yãba tẽngã na-yiyã pʋse, la we-baas na n yãba a tẽngã ro-neebã pʋse. Babilond sãoongã daar kolgdame, la a rasmã ka na n kaoos ye." 
Isaiah14:1 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zoe a Zakoob yagensã nimbãanega, bãmb na n leb n yãka Israyɛll n kõ-b vʋʋsg b tẽngẽ wã. Sãamb n na n naag bãmb tɩ b tɩ lagem a Zakoob roogã nebã." 
Isaiah14:2 Bu-zẽms n na n deeg Israyɛll nebã n tall-b n tɩ kẽes b tẽngẽ wã, la Israyɛll nebã na n sooga bãmb beenẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-gãongã zugu, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ yem-daado, la yem-pogse. Neb nins sẽn dag n kẽes Israyɛll nebã yembdã, Israyɛll na n kẽes-b-la yembdo, Israyɛll nebã na n sooga neb nins sẽn dag n namsd bãmbã." 
Isaiah14:3 Dẽ, daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kõ yãmb vʋʋsg y namsgã ne y toogã, la y yembdã b sẽn dag n namsd yãmbã loogr poore," 
Isaiah14:4 pʋd-y yɩɩll Babilond dĩmã wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: «Maana a wãna? Dĩm-toaagã menemame! Wuk-m-meng soabã ka leb n beẽ ye! 
Isaiah14:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kaooga nin-wẽnsã rasaare, b kaooga nanambsã naam dasaarã." 
Isaiah14:6 B menesa sẽn dag n pãbd-a nebã ne sũ-kãbr n ka basdẽ wã. B menesa sẽn dag n so-a buud a taabã ne sũ-yikr tɩ vʋʋsg ka beẽ wã. 
Isaiah14:7 Tẽngã zãng paama vʋʋsg la vɩ-bãane. Nebã kaasda ne sũ-noogo.» 
Isaiah14:8 Sɩprɛs tɩɩsã ne sɛɛdr tɩɩsã la Libã tɩɩsã maanda sũ-noog yẽnda wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: «Fo sẽn lʋɩ wã tɛka, tɩ-kɛɛdbã ka leb n wat n kɛɛd tõnd ye.»" 
Isaiah14:9 Kɩɩm-kulg sẽn be tẽngrã rigimdame n na n deeg foom f waoongã daare. Fo yĩng kɩtame tɩ b nek sẽn ki-bã, b neka dũniyã nin-kãsemsã, la b kɩt tɩ bu-zẽmsã rĩm-dãmb fãa yik b naam gɛyã zutu." 
Isaiah14:10 Bãmb fãa goma ne foom n yeel yaa: «Fo me pãngã sɛɛ wa tõndo, fo me lebga wa tõnd bala!»" 
Isaiah14:11 B sika foom ne f wuk-m-mengã, la f ruudsã wãagr kɩɩm-kulgu. Lebga zũnzũy n be fo gãagẽ wã, zũnzũy wã n lebg fo fu-goabga." 
Isaiah14:12 Kayto! Ãdg sẽn yãgda, tõd-beoog ãdga, fo yii saasẽ n lʋɩ tẽnga! Fo sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ buud a taabã sakd foomã, b luba foom!" 
Isaiah14:13 Fo rag n yetame: «Mam na n dʋʋ n taa saasẽ, mam na n zẽka m naamã geer n zʋʋg Wẽnnaam ãdsã, Mam na n zaoonda sɛk tãngã zugu, tãng ning sẽn be rɩtg hal zĩ-zãrgẽ wã." 
Isaiah14:14 Mam na n dʋʋ yĩngr hal sawatẽ, mam na n yɩɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-To.»" 
Isaiah14:15 La b sika foom kɩɩm-kulgu, b sika foom bog-zulungã pʋga." 
Isaiah14:16 Neb nins sẽn na n yãnd foom na n yonga b nin n get foom. B na n maaga b meng n ges foom n yeele: «Rẽ yĩnga, ka rao-kãngã n dag n kɩtd tɩ dũniyã miimdẽ, la a kɩtdẽ tɩ soolem-dãmbã rigd ne rabeemã la?" 
Isaiah14:17 Ka yẽnda n dag n kɩtd tɩ dũniyã lebgd we-raoogo, la a wãad a tẽmsã n ka basd yembsã tɩ b loogã wɛɛ?»" 
Isaiah14:18 N-yẽe, buud toay-toayã rĩm-dãmb fãa gãanda b yaadẽ ne ziiri, bãmb ned kam fãa kẽ a roogẽ." 
Isaiah14:19 La foom yẽ, b loba foom yɩng n zãag f yaoogã, wa b sẽn lob tɩɩg wil-yooko, wa neb b sẽn kʋ ne zabr sʋʋg n wʋk n tɩ lob bog-zulungã kug zutu, wa kũum b sẽn tabe." 
Isaiah14:20 B ka na n mum foom n naag bãmb yaoogã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, fo sãama f tẽngã, fo kʋ f nebã. B kõn tol n leb n pʋd nin-wẽnsã yʋʋr ye." 
Isaiah14:21 Segl-y kom-dibli wã kʋʋbo, b ba-rãmbã kongr yĩnga! Tɩ b ra tol n yik n deeg tẽngã n yãmbe, n pids dũniyã gill ne sãoong ye." 
Isaiah14:22 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Mam na n yik n zaba ne bãmba, mam na n menesa Babilond yʋʋrã, ne a nebã sẽn kellã ne a kambã la a yagensã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah14:23 Mam na n kɩtame t'a lebg yʋgempɛl zĩiga la bãoogo, mam na n pɩɩs-a-la ne sãoong saaga. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Isaiah14:24 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã wẽename n yeele: Mam sẽn yãk yam n na maan bũmb ningã ka na n vaal ye, mam sẽn saagd n dat n maanã na n pidsame." 
Isaiah14:25 Mam na n wãa Asiiri m tẽngẽ wã, mam na n tab-a-la m tãmsã zutu. B na n yiisa a yubl balgrã, la b sik a zɩɩbã sẽn be mam nebã bãgdẽ wã." 
Isaiah14:26 Woto yaa saagr ning mam sẽn saagd n na n maan dũniyã gillã, yaa nug sẽn n na n zab ne soolem dãmbã fãa wã la woto." 
Isaiah14:27 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n maan saag-kãnga. Ãnda n tõe n gɩdg-a t'a ka pidsi? Bãmb nugã zẽkame. Ãnda n na n kok-a t'a ka wẽ? 
Isaiah14:28 B togsa sɩbgr koe-kãngã rĩm a Akaaz kũumã yʋʋmd n yeele: 
Isaiah14:29 Filistẽ-dãmbã fãa, da-y maan-y sũ-noogo, dasaar ning b sẽn dag n tar n pãbd yãmbã sẽn kao wã yĩng ye! Bala, waafã yagensẽ wã, põeer n na n yi beenẽ, la a biigã na n yɩɩ wag-bɛɛg sẽn yɩgda." 
Isaiah14:30 Dẽ, sẽn ya-b nimbãan-neb n yɩɩd fãa wã na n paam n dɩ n tɩgame, naong rãmbã na n gãee ne bãane. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yagensã ki kom, ne fo neb nins sẽn na n kellã." 
Isaiah14:31 Rig-noore, kelme! Tẽnga, yãb n wiisi! Filistẽ-dãmbã fãa, rig-y-yã! Bala, bug-zõos n yɩt n watẽ, la ned kõn serg n bas a zĩig ye." 
Isaiah14:32 B na n leoka bu-kãngã koe-toagsdbã tɩ bõe? B leok tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yẽbg Sɩyõ, tɩ bãmb nebã nimbãan-nebã na n paama zĩ-soalgdg beenẽ." 
Isaiah15:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Moaab tẽngã yĩnga. B sãam-a-la yʋn-yɛng bala! Aar-Moaab lebga sɩddd... B sãam-a-la yʋn-yɛng bala! Kɩɩr-Moaab lebga sɩddd... 
Isaiah15:2 B rabda pʋʋsg roogẽ wã ne Dibõ, la b kẽnd maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã n na n tɩ yãbe. Moaab yãbd n wiisda Nebo tẽngã, ne Medba tẽngã yĩnga. Zutã fãa põngame, la toeemsã fãa wõrsame." 
Isaiah15:3 Moaab tẽngã soayã zutu, nebã yeelga bot n kẽnda. La tẽngã bɛɛnd zut ne raasã pʋse, ned kam fãa yãbda nintãm n wiisd wʋsgo." 
Isaiah15:4 Hɛsbon ne Eleyall nebã kaasdame, la b wʋmda b koees hal Yahats tẽnga. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Moaab tãb-biisã kelemdẽ, Moaab pɛlengã yɩkame." 
Isaiah15:5 Mam kelemda Moaab yĩnga. Neb n zoe n ta hal Soaar tẽnga, b taa hal Eglat-Selisiya tẽnga. Bala, bãmb bee Luyit tãngã rʋʋdg zugu, n kẽnd la b yãbda. Bãmb bee Horonayim tẽngã sor zug n kẽnd la b wiisd sãoongã yĩnga." 
Isaiah15:6 Bala, Nimrim kʋɩlgã koom kʋɩɩme, tɩɩsã kʋɩɩme, mo-maasã kʋɩɩme, la yam-maas ka tol n leb n beẽ ye." 
Isaiah15:7 Woto yĩng n kɩte, tɩ b wʋkd b paoongã sẽn ketã, b sẽn dag n tõog n bĩng laog ninsã n na n tall n kẽng Solɛɛs ko-soogã rʋʋndã." 
Isaiah15:8 Bala, kelemsã pida Moaab soolmã gilli. Yẽnda kelemsã zẽk n tata hal Eglayiim tẽnga, a kelemsã zẽkame n tat Beer-Elim tẽnga." 
Isaiah15:9 Dimon kʋɩlsã koom mooga ne zɩɩm. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tood a taab leb n paam Dimonde. Mam na n tʋma gɩgemd t'a zab ne Moaab neb nins sẽn põsã, la a zab ne neb nins sẽn kell tẽngã pʋgã." 
Isaiah16:1 Tʋm-y neb tɩ b tall pe-ribl n tɩ kõ tẽngã soaalã. Tʋm-y bãmb tɩ b yi Sela n pɩʋʋg we-raoogã, n kẽng Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã tãngẽ wã." 
Isaiah16:2 Moaab kom-pugli wã na n tigma taab Arno kʋɩlgã zĩ-rʋʋgdgẽ wã, wa liuul sẽn yɩk n baood a menga, la wa liuun-bi sẽn sãeeg n bas b tʋko." 
Isaiah16:3 Moaab kom-pugli wã yetame: «Maan-y tigingu, yãk-y yam, yɛdg-y y maasmã wĩnto-sʋka, n lud b sẽn digd b rãmbã wa yʋngo, la y ra luk zoɛtbã bãong ye." 
Isaiah16:4 Bas-y Moaab nebã sẽn zoetã tɩ b wa zĩnd yãmb sʋka, sak-y n yɩ-y zĩ-soalgdg bãmb yĩnga, tɩ sẽn sãamd-a fãa wã ra wa paam-b ye! Bala, sẽn maand-a neb a taab pãngã sɛɛb wakat taame, sãoongã sɛɛme, sẽn wõrd-a neb a taabã menema tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah16:5 Maan-sɩdã na n kɩtame tɩ naam geerã paam pãnga. La sẽn na n zaoond-a beenẽ wã na n yɩ a Davɩɩd yageng sẽn yaa sɩd soaba. Yẽnda na n yɩɩ bʋ-kaood sẽn baood zemsgo, la sẽn kaood bʋʋd ne tɩrlem.»" 
Isaiah16:6 Tõnd wʋma Moaab nebã wuk-m-mengã kibare. Bãmb wuk-m-mengã yaa n looga nugu. Tõnd wʋma bãmb sek-m-mengã ne b wuk-m-mengã, la b tɩtaamã ne b pẽg-m-mengã sẽn ka yõodã." 
Isaiah16:7 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ Moaab nebã wiisd b mensã yĩnga, bãmb ned kam fãa wiisdame. Yãmb sidgda Kɩɩr-Haresɛt sẽn lebg raboodã yĩnga, n maand sũ-sãan-kãsenga." 
Isaiah16:8 Bala, Hɛsbon tẽngã bõn-koaadl kiidame. Buud toay-toayã taoor dãmb kɛɛ Sibma tẽng reezẽ tɩ-sõamyã. Reezẽ tɩɩgã rag n tẽeme n tãag Yazɛɛre, n tud n kẽ we-raoogã. A wilã tẽeme n gãndg yamsem kʋɩl-kãsengã." 
Isaiah16:9 Woto kɩtame tɩ mam na n yãb Sibma reezẽ tɩɩgã, wa Yazɛɛr sẽn yãbd-a wã. Hɛsbon ne Eleyale, mam na n madga yãmb ne m nintãm, bala, yãmb bõn-koaadlã rɩkr ne reezẽ tɩɩsã wobr wakat kelemsã sɛɛme." 
Isaiah16:10 Sũ-noogã ne kɩdengã sɛɛ pʋtẽ wã. Sũ-noog kaasg ne kilsg ka leb n be reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtẽ wã ye! Reezẽ-woabdb ka leb n wẽkd reezẽ rãam sĩmsẽ ye. Mam kɩtame tɩ sũ-noog kaasg sɛ. 
Isaiah16:11 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam sũurã sidgd Moaab yĩng wa pɛndg n zãeede. Mam sidgda Kɩɩr-Harɛɛs yĩnga. 
Isaiah16:12 Moaab leb n kẽnga maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã. A kẽnga a zĩ-sõngẽ wã la a ka tõe n paam bũmb ye. 
Isaiah16:13 Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ Moaab wɛɛngẽ wã. 
Isaiah16:14 La moasã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yʋʋm a tãab sẽn wate, wa sẽn zems yʋʋm sõor ning tʋmtʋmd sẽn tʋmd yaood yĩngã, Moaab ziirã na n lebga paoogre. Baa yẽnda neb kʋʋngã sẽn yaa to-to wã, neb nins sẽn kellã na n yɩɩ bilf bala, la b ka na n zeng bũmb ye.»" 
Isaiah17:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Damaas yĩnga. Damaas ka na n leb n yɩ tẽng ye, a na n lebga tom-dʋre." 
Isaiah17:2 B na n basa Arowɛɛr tẽmsã wakat fãa yĩnga, Tẽn-bãmb na n lebga rũms zĩiga, tɩ b gãe beenẽ tɩ ned ka maan bãmb bũmb ye." 
Isaiah17:3 B na n sãama Efrayiim pãng zĩigã, ne Damaas soolmã, la Siiri neb nins sẽn ketã baoosg na n yɩɩ wa Israyɛll nebã ziir sẽn loogã. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Isaiah17:4 Badaare, a Zakoob yagensã ziir na n woogame, la b sẽn nobã, b na n faagame." 
Isaiah17:5 Yẽnda na n yɩɩ wa b sẽn tigsd bõn-koaadl zĩ-yɛnga, la wa bõn-koaadl tigsd nug sẽn tigsd ka-zutu. Na n yɩɩ wa b sẽn yiisd bɩle Refayit longẽ wã." 
Isaiah17:6 Biis bilf nins sẽn ket a pʋgẽ wã na n zemsa wa b sẽn pãb oliiv tɩɩg will ne raado, tɩ biis a yiib bɩ a tãab kell a wil-gelengeesẽ wã, la wa a biis a naas wall a nu sẽn be tɩɩg zugu. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã n yeele." 
Isaiah17:7 Badaare, ninsaalbã na n nak n gesa b naandã, bãmb na n wẽnemda b nens n ges Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem Soabã." 
Isaiah17:8 Bãmb kõn leb n ges tẽn-kugã sẽn yaa bãmb nus tʋʋmã, wall b ges Aseera ra-lugdsã ne wisd yõogr zĩisã bãmb mens nus sẽn maanã ye." 
Isaiah17:9 Badaare, b na n basa Israyɛll tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n dig buud nins sẽn dag n vɩ tɩɩsã tẽngrã, la tãmsã zutã tɩ b zoe n bas b tẽmsã wakat sẽn loogã. La tẽn-bãmb fãa na n lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋdo." 
Isaiah17:10 Bala, fo yĩma Wẽnnaam ning sẽn fãag-a foomã yelle, la fo ka tẽeg pĩig ning sẽn yaa fo pãngã yell ye. Woto n kɩte, tɩ fo send tɩɩs sẽn yaa neeba, fo sela bu-zẽms tɩɩse." 
Isaiah17:11 La daar ning meng fo sẽn sel-bã, fo yãndame tɩ b tobame. Vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, fo sẽn bʋd bũmb ningã ninga puudu. Ka-keemã daare, tigsg ka leb n beẽ n ye. La ka-keemã ka tar tɩɩm ye." 
Isaiah17:12 Toogo! Neb kʋʋng bʋrg n sãt wa ko-kãsengã sẽn guglumdã. Neb kʋʋng kelems n sãt wa ko-kãsems sẽn tar pãng bʋrgo. 
Isaiah17:13 Yaa neb kʋʋng bʋrg sẽn wẽnd ko-kãseng bʋrgo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab lengd-b lame tɩ b zoet n zãagd yɩɩga. B rigda bãmb wa tãng zug seb-kãseng sẽn dɩkd ka-fɩɩba, la wa sɩlmand sẽn dɩkd wudgu." 
Isaiah17:14 Zaabr sã n ta b kẽesda rabeem, la sẽn deng beoogã vẽegre, b ka leb n beẽ ye! Neb nins sẽn fãad tõndã pʋɩɩr la woto. Neb nins sẽn zɛɛd tõnd teedã pʋɩɩr n yaa a woto." 
Isaiah18:1 Toog bee tẽng ning sẽn be Kuus kʋɩlgã rʋʋnd tɩ b wʋmd bõn-yɩgdɩ wã pɩgs rãamdã zugu! 
Isaiah18:2 Fo sẽn tʋmd neb tɩ b kẽnd ne koom kogend sẽn maan ne tãnwĩis n pɩʋʋgd ko-kãsengã! Koe-toagsdb sẽn tʋʋle, kẽng-y buud nins neb sẽn yaa nin-wogd n tar da-sãndã nengẽ, kẽng-y neb nins b sẽn yɛɛsd hal b sɩngr wakatã nengẽ, bãmb yaa buud sẽn tar pãng n tõe n sãam fãa, la b tẽngã pɩʋʋma ne kʋɩlse." 
Isaiah18:3 Yãmb fãa sẽn be dũni zugu, yãmb dãmb sẽn be tẽng zugu, b sã n wa tilg tãb-kaoorã tãngã zugu, yãmb na n yãame. La b sã n wa peeb baorgã, yãmb na n wʋmame." 
Isaiah18:4 Bala, ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Mam bee m sẽn beẽ wã ne bãan n getẽ, mam yasa kɛpɩ wa wĩntoog sẽn tãoosd a vẽenemã, la wa sawaodg sẽn sikd meenem tigsg wakatã." 
Isaiah18:5 Dẽ, sẽn deng bõn-koaadl tigsgu, reezẽ tɩɩsã sã n wa ning puud n sɛ, puudã sã n lebg biis n mooge, b na n yosa reezẽ tɩɩsã wil-poalã ne goeto, la b yãgs-ba, n yolem tobendã." 
Isaiah18:6 B na n basa b fãa n kõ tãms zut yɩbrendo, ne we-rũms sẽn be tẽng zugu. Sẽoogo, beenẽ na n yɩɩ yɩbrend zĩiga, la waood wẽnde, we-rũmsã fãa na n wa zĩnda be.»" 
Isaiah18:7 Wakat-kãnga, buud neb sẽn yaa nin-wogd n tar da-sãnde, neb b sẽn yɛɛsd hal b sɩngr wakate, buud sẽn tar pãng n tõe n sãam fãa, tɩ b tẽngã pɩʋʋm ne kʋɩlsã, na n waa ne kũun n wa kõ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã. B na n talla kũun-kãens n kẽng zĩig ning Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba yʋʋrã sẽn beẽ wã, Sɩyõ tãngã zugu." 
Isaiah19:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Ezɩpt nebã yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab zomba sawaodg kẽnd sẽn tʋʋle, la b wata Ezɩpte. Ezɩpt tẽng wẽn-naandsã rigda ne rabeem bãmb taoore, la Ezɩpt nebã pɛleng yɩgdame." 
Isaiah19:2 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã zab taaba, ned ne a ba-biig na n zaba taaba, la ned ne a zoa na n zaba taaba, tẽng na n yika zabr ne a to, la soolem na n zaba ne soolem a to." 
Isaiah19:3 Ezɩpt tẽng nebã yam na n menemame, mam na n zũndga bãmb saagrã. Bãmb na n tɩ soka wẽn-naandse, la b sok kɩɩmse, b na n kẽnda kinkir-bagb ne bag-bʋgdb nengẽ." 
Isaiah19:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ zu-soben-toos soog Ezɩpte, la rĩm sẽn yaa nen-keglem soab n na n soog bãmba. Maam a Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Isaiah19:5 Ko-kãsengã koom na n kʋɩɩme, kʋɩlgã koom na n sɛɛme n lebg koɛɛnga." 
Isaiah19:6 Ko-soayã koom na n põogame, Ezɩpt tẽng Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã koom na n yõbgame n kʋɩ, la tãnwĩisã ne rudmã na n zelgame." 
Isaiah19:7 Nill kʋɩlgã noorã ne a sɛtmẽ wã na n lebga vɩʋʋgo! B sẽn na n bʋd bũmb ning fãa Nill kʋɩlgã koom noor na n kʋɩɩme. Sebg n na n kãag-a n loog t'a meneme. 
Isaiah19:8 Zĩm-yõagdbã na n yãbame n wiisi, neb nins fãa sẽn lobd zĩm-leoos Nill kʋɩlgẽ wã fãa na n yãbame. Sẽn lobd-b zĩm-gãmba koomã pʋgẽ wã sũy na n sãamame." 
Isaiah19:9 Neb nins sẽn tʋmd ne lẽ gĩsã na n paama yãnde, sẽn gursd-b lamdã ne sʋn-wʋgdbã gĩin na n maagame." 
Isaiah19:10 Tẽngã sʋn-wʋgdbã na n paama sũ-sãanga. Tʋmtʋmdb nins fãa sẽn tʋmd n deegd yaoodã sũy na n sãamame. 
Isaiah19:11 Sowan tẽng nanambsã tolg n yaa yalemba, Yam dãmb nins sẽn sagend Faarõ wã yaa nin-yaals sulli. Maana a wãn tɩ yãmb saag n na n yeel Faarõ a woto: «Mam yaa sẽn tar-b yamã biiga, n yaa kʋdem-wẽndẽ rĩm-dãmbã yagenga!" 
Isaiah19:12 Ezɩpt rĩma, fo yam dãmbã bee yɛɛnẽ? Kɩt tɩ bãmb wilg-f bũmbã fãa, la b wilg saagr ning Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn dat n maan Ezɩptã!" 
Isaiah19:13 Sowan tẽng nanambsã ka tar yam ye. Noof tẽng nanambsã belgda b mense. Yẽnda buudã taoor dãmbã kẽesda Ezɩpt nebã moogo. 
Isaiah19:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ nen-yiling yõk Ezɩpt nebã, n na n kɩt tɩ Ezɩpt ka leb n mi a sẽn maand ye. A wẽnda wa rã-yũud sẽn lengd la a wʋbdẽ." 
Isaiah19:15 La Ezɩpt ka na n tõog n maan bũmb ning zugã ne zʋʋrã sẽn maandã, ne koang tɩɩgã will ne tãnwĩigã sẽn maandã ye.»" 
Isaiah19:16 Badaare, Ezɩpt nebã sã n yãnd Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn zẽk b nugã n na n zab ne bãmbã, bãmb na n diga ne rabeem wa pagba." 
Isaiah19:17 Zʋʋda tẽngã na n kẽesa Ezɩpt tẽngã rabeem. Wakat ning fãa b sẽn na n tẽeg Zʋʋda tẽngã yell bãmb taoore, bãmb na n diga ne rabeem, saagr ning Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn saagd n dat n sɩbg Ezɩpt tẽngã yĩnga." 
Isaiah19:18 Badaare, tẽms a nu n na n zĩnd Ezɩpt soolmã pʋg n gomd Kana-rãmbã buud goamã, la b na n wẽena ne Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yʋʋre. Tẽn-bãmb tẽng a yembr yʋʋr na n boondame tɩ Ɩɩr-Herɛɛse, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹sãoong tẽnga.›" 
Isaiah19:19 Badaare, tẽn-kugr n na n zĩnd Ezɩpt soolmã tẽn-sʋka, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la kug-vigindg n na n zĩnd soolmã toadgẽ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Isaiah19:20 Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã bãnde, la b kaset Ezɩpt soolmã pʋga. Wakat ning bãmb namsdbã sẽn namsd bãmbã, b sã n kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b na n tʋma fãagd t'a wa bãmb nengẽ n wa zab n fãag-ba." 
Isaiah19:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã bãng bãmba. Ezɩpt nebã na n bãnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab badaare. Bãmb na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan maando, la b kõ bãmb kũuni, n maan pʋleng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b na n pidsa b pʋlengã." 
Isaiah19:22 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n sɩbg Ezɩpt nebã, bãmb n na n leb n maag-ba. Ezɩpt nebã na n lebg n waa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sak n deega b kosgã n maag-ba." 
Isaiah19:23 Badaare, sor na n yi Ezɩpt n dabd Asiiri. Asiiri nebã na n kẽnda Ezɩpt tẽnga, la Ezɩpt nebã na n kẽnda Asiiri, la Ezɩpt nebã ne Asiiri nebã na n naaga taab n pʋʋsd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Isaiah19:24 Badaare, Israyɛll na n yɩɩ tãabẽ soab n naag Ezɩpt ne Asiiri n paam bark dũniyã zugu." 
Isaiah19:25 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n ninga bãmb bark n yeele: «Bark bee Ezɩpt sẽn yaa mam nebã zugu, bark bee Asiiri sẽn yaa mam nug tʋʋmdã zugu, la bark bee Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam meng rẽndã zugu.»" 
Isaiah20:1 Yʋʋmd ning Asiiri naab a Sargon sẽn tʋm a tãb-biis nanambs naab ningã sẽn ta Asdood tẽngã, a zaba ne Asdood tẽngã n deeg-a." 
Isaiah20:2 Wakat-kãnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n goma ne a Amots biig a Ezayi n yeel-a yaa: «Kẽnge! Sẽk botã sẽn be fo sɛɛgẽ wã, la f piid f neooda wã n bas nao-zaala.» Dẽ, a Ezayi maana a woto. Yẽnda kẽna beelle, la nao-zaala." 
Isaiah20:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam tʋmtʋmd a Ezayi sẽn kẽn beelle, la a kẽn nao-zaal to-to wã, na n yɩɩ bãnde la makr Ezɩpt ne Kuus yĩnga, yʋʋm a tãab tõre." 
Isaiah20:4 Woto me, Asiiri rĩma na n yõga Ezɩpt nebã ne Kuus tẽng nebã n tall-b n tɩ kẽes yembdo. B na n yõga b kom-bɩɩsã ne b nin-kẽembã n kɩt tɩ b kẽn bɛɛla, la nao-zaala, tɩ b kɩgbã be yɩnga. Rẽ na n yɩɩ yãnd Ezɩpt nebã yĩnga." 
Isaiah20:5 Dẽ, rabeem ne yãnd na n yõka neb nins sẽn dag n teeg Kuusã, la Ezɩpt sẽn dag n yaa bãmb zu-zẽkrã.»" 
Isaiah20:6 Badaare, soolem ning sẽn be koom noorã neb na n yeelame: «Ges-y bũmb ning sẽn paam tõnd sẽn dag n teeg-b rãmbã, tõnd sẽn dag n kẽngd-b rãmb nengẽ tɩ b sõngd tõnd la b fãagd tõnd Asiiri rĩmã nugẽ wã. Moasã, tõnd na n maana a wãn n põse?»" 
Isaiah21:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg we-raoog ning sẽn be ko-kãseng noorã yĩnga. Sãamdã yii tẽng sẽn kẽesd rabeem pʋgẽ n tũud we-raoogã n wat wa sob-kãseng sẽn pɩʋʋgd Negɛɛve. 
Isaiah21:2 Ad vẽnegr sẽn yaa wẽng mam sẽn paame: Zãmb soabã zãmbdame, la sãamdã sãamdame. Elam soolem nebã, yik-y n zãb-y-yã! Gũbg-y Medi! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sidgrã fãa sɛ." 
Isaiah21:3 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam põaagã bondge, toog tara maam, toog tara maam wa pag sẽn dat n doge. Bõn-kãng sãama mam sũur tɩ m ka leb n wʋmdẽ ye. Toogã kɩtame tɩ mam ninã ka leb n neẽ ye." 
Isaiah21:4 Mam yamã menemame, mam pɛlengã yɩkame tɩ rabeem kẽ maam. Mam sẽn dag n nong zĩ-sobdã, zĩ-sobd lebga rabeem ne maam." 
Isaiah21:5 B waa ne rɩɩbo, gũudbã gũudame, lebga rɩɩbo, la yũubu. Nanambse, yik-y-yã! Sõog-y gãndã kaam!" 
Isaiah21:6 Bala, Zu-soabã goma ne maam n yeel yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ kɩt tɩ tẽn-gũudã yals a zĩigẽ, n togs a sẽn ne bũmb ningã." 
Isaiah21:7 Yẽnda na n yãnda saar-dãmb sẽn sog wiid sẽn yegl taab yiib-yiib n watẽ, ne bõens sẽn tong taaba, la yʋgmã sẽn tong taaba, bɩ a maan gũusgu, a gũus neere.»" 
Isaiah21:8 Dẽ, tẽn-gũudã kelma wa gɩgemd n yeel yaa: «Zu-soaba, mam bee gãosgã zug daarã tõr wakat fãa, la mam yasa m gũubã zĩigẽ yʋngã tɛk fãa." 
Isaiah21:9 Ade, mam nee neb sẽn zao saar-dãmb sẽn sog wiid sẽn yegl taab yiib-yiib n watẽ!» Yẽnda leb n yeelame yaa: «A lʋɩɩme, Babilond lʋɩɩme! Bãmb luba Babilond wẽnnaam-dãmbã bõn-naands fãa tẽng tɩ b wã!»" 
Isaiah21:10 Mam nebã, b pãba yãmb wa b sẽn pãbd kood zɛɛgẽ, la mam togsa yãmb bũmb ning mam sẽn wʋm Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã nengẽ wã." 
Isaiah21:11 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Duma yĩnga. Koɛɛg n zẽkd Seyɩɩr n yet maam yaa: «Gũuda, yʋngã kibar yaa a wãna? Gũuda, yʋngã kibar yaa a wãna?»" 
Isaiah21:12 La gũuda leokame yaa: «Yibeoog watame la yʋng me watame. Yãmb sã n dat n sok bɩ y soke! Lebg-y n wa-y-yã, n-yẽe, wa-y-yã!»" 
Isaiah21:13 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Araabi tẽngã yĩnga. Dedan neb sẽn tũud taab wʋsg n kẽnda, yãmb na n gãanda Araabi wetã pʋs yʋn-kãngã!" 
Isaiah21:14 Tema tẽng nebã, wa-y ne koom n wa kõ ko-yũud sẽn tar-b rãmbã, la y yi ne rɩɩb n seg neb nins sẽn zoetã." 
Isaiah21:15 Bala, b rigda bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga, b wõoga zabr sʋʋg n pʋgd-ba, tɩ tãp rʋʋs n pʋgd bãmba. Bãmb zoet n na n põsa zabr yel-beedo." 
Isaiah21:16 Bala, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel maam: «Keta yʋʋmde, wa sẽn zems yʋʋmd tʋmtʋmd sẽn tʋmd yaood yĩngã, tɩ Kedaar ziirã zãng meneme." 
Isaiah21:17 La Kedaar tãb-biis nins sẽn yaa tãb-tãood-gãndaadã sõor na n kella bilf bala.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã n yeel t'a na n yɩɩ woto. 
Isaiah22:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg vẽnegr tãng longã yĩnga. Bõe yĩng tɩ foom ne f nebã fãa zoet n dʋʋd bɛɛnd zutu," 
Isaiah22:2 Fo sẽn yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bʋrgo, la ne neb wʋsg rãamde, tẽng sẽn kɩdemd n maand sũ-noogo? Fo nebã sẽn ki wã ka zabr sʋʋg n kʋ-b ye, bãmb ka ki zabr pʋgẽ ye." 
Isaiah22:3 Fo tãb-biis nanambsã fãa naaga taab n ning tĩiga. Tãb-tãoodbã yõga bãmb n maan yembse. Zeruzalɛm, b kɩtame tɩ fo nebã fãa lebg yembse, bãmb yaool n dag n zoeeme n zãag zĩiga." 
Isaiah22:4 Rẽ n kɩte tɩ mam yetẽ: «Wẽnemd-y y nens n da leb n ges maam ye. Bas-y maam tɩ m yãb n wiisi. Da bao-y tɩ bels maam, Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã sãoong yĩng ye." 
Isaiah22:5 Bala, yaa pelen-yɩk daare, bedsg daare, la sũ-sãang daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba sẽn tʋm vẽnegr tãng longã pʋgẽ, b na n pãba lalsã n lubi, la b na n kelemdame tɩ tat tãmsã n kot sõngre." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam boba loko. Zabr saar-dãmb sẽn pid ne neb tɩ wiid tatẽ n wate. Kɩɩr tẽng nebã yiisa b gãndã. 
Isaiah22:7 Zeruzalɛm, fo tãn-lond nins sẽn yaa neeb n yɩɩdã pida ne zabr saar-dãmba, la wed-rʋʋdbã yasa f tẽngã rignoorẽ n dat n zab ne-fo." 
Isaiah22:8 B yiisa bũmb ning sẽn dag n kogend Zʋʋda wã.» Badaare, fo wẽnemdame n teeg zab teed nins sẽn be roog ning sẽn boond tɩ ‹Libã tɩɩs roogã› pʋgã." 
Isaiah22:9 La yãmb tɩ mikame t'a Davɩɩd tẽngã lals wura zĩis wʋsgo. Yãmb koka koom n bĩng ko-bao-bilã pʋga," 
Isaiah22:10 yãmb sõda Zeruzalɛm dota, n pãb rot kẽer n wã n wʋk b tãndã n yẽd lalgã võyã." 
Isaiah22:11 Yãmb mee ko-baoor lals a yiibã sʋka, n na n dɩk ko-bao-kʋdrã koom n ning be. La yãmb ka wẽnemd y neng n ges soab ning sẽn maan-a bõn-kãensã ye, yãmb ka ne soab ning sẽn dag n deng n naan bãmb hal daar zãrã ye." 
Isaiah22:12 Badaare, Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã boonda yãmb tɩ y wa yãb n wiisi, la y põng y zut n sẽgen boto." 
Isaiah22:13 La gese, yãmb bas n maanda sũ-noog n kɩdemdẽ! La y kʋʋd rũm-bɛda, la y koot rũm-bãoonego, n wãbd nemd la y yũud reezẽ rãam n yetẽ: «Bɩ d rɩ la d yũ, bala, beoogo, d na n kiime!»" 
Isaiah22:14 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã vẽnega maam bõn-kãng n yeele: «Yãmb na n kiime n ka tol n paam sugr y kong-kãngã yĩng ye.» Maam a Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. 
Isaiah22:15 Ade, Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Kẽng balem-naab a Sebna sẽn get na-yirã yellã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa:" 
Isaiah22:16 Fo soo bõe ka, la fo kĩi ne ãnda ka, n wa tol n yik n tuud f yaoog ka? Ned fãa yik n tuuda a yaoog kunkubr zugu. Ned fãa yik n tuuda a vʋʋsg zĩig pĩig zugu!" 
Isaiah22:17 Gese, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n lobga foom hal yɩɩga, bãmb na n vila foom," 
Isaiah22:18 n lobg-f tɩ f bilim wa kuit-n-giling sẽn bilimd zĩ-yaleng zugu. La fo na n paa beenẽ n ki. Fo saar-dãmbã sẽn tar ziirã na n paa beenẽ. Fo sẽn yaa f zu-soabã zak yãndã yĩnga. 
Isaiah22:19 Mam na n diga foom n yiis f zĩigẽ wã. Mam na n võoga foom n yiis f tʋʋmdẽ wã. 
Isaiah22:20 Badaare, mam na n boola mam tʋmtʋmd a Eliyakim sẽn yaa a Hilkiiza biigã." 
Isaiah22:21 Mam na n dɩka fo fuugã n yeelg yẽnda, mam na n dɩka fo sẽbdgã n sẽbg yẽnda, la m dɩk f naamã n ning a nugẽ. Yẽnda na n yɩɩ Zeruzalɛm nebã, ne Zʋʋda buudã ba." 
Isaiah22:22 Mam na n dɩka a Davɩɩd roogã kʋɩlen-bil n ning yẽnda nugẽ. Yẽnda sã n pake, ned kõn tõog n pag ye. Yẽnda sã n page, ned kõn tõog n pak ye." 
Isaiah22:23 Mam na n kaa yẽnda wa baaf zĩig sẽn tar pãng zugu, la yẽnda na n yɩɩ wa geer sẽn tar ziir a buudã yĩnga.»" 
Isaiah22:24 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa yẽnda buudã ziirã na n wa yagla yẽnda zugu, wil-kãsemsã ne wil-bãoonegã, baa ne te-bãoonegã fãa, hal ne sĩmsã n tɩ tãag yʋyã." 
Isaiah22:25 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Badaare, b na n feooga baaf ning sẽn be zĩig ning sẽn tar pãngã zugã, b na n kɛ-a lame t'a lʋɩ, la b na n sãama zɩɩb ning sẽn dag n be yẽnda zugã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Isaiah23:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Tɩɩr tẽngã yĩnga. Tarsɩɩs koom kogendo, yãb-y n wiis-y-yã, bala, b sãama y tẽngã! Rot ka leb n beẽ ye! Kõom zĩig ka leb n beẽ ye! Bãmb sẽn wa n yi Sɩpr n watẽ wã la b wilg bãmb bõn-kãense." 
Isaiah23:2 Yãmb dãmb sẽn be tẽms koom sẽn gũbgã pʋga, tɩ Sɩdõ toandbã rag n kẽnd ko-kãsengã zug n wat n pit beenẽ wã, bɩ rabeem kẽ-yã, tɩ y lebg mugsi!" 
Isaiah23:3 Sihoor bõn-koaadlã, Nill kʋɩlgã koodã sẽn dag n pɩʋʋgd ko-kãsengã yaa yẽnda paoongo! La yẽnda rag n lebga bu-zẽmsã raaga." 
Isaiah23:4 Sɩdõ, fo sẽn yaa ko-kãseng pãng zĩigã, zoe yãnde! Bala, ko-kãsengã gomdame n yetẽ yaa: «Mam ka paam dogem toog ye, mam ka rog ye, la m ka wub kom-dibli wall kom-pugli ye." 
Isaiah23:5 Koɛɛgã sã n ta Ezɩpt tẽngã, b na n diga ne rabeem, wa b sẽn dag n wʋm Tɩɩr yellã.»" 
Isaiah23:6 Pɩʋʋg-y n kẽng-y Tarsɩɩse. Koomã sʋk tẽms nebã, yãb-y n wiis-y-yã." 
Isaiah23:7 Tẽng ning sẽn dag n kõt yãmb sũ-no-kãsengã la woto bɩ? Tẽn-kãngã sɩng n bee hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, yẽnda naoã rag n kẽnda ne yẽnda zĩ-zãrgẽ." 
Isaiah23:8 Ãnda n yãk yam n na n sɩbg Tɩɩr a woto? Tɩɩr yaa tẽng sẽn dag n tar naam n pʋɩta, tɩ yẽnda toandbã yaa nanambse, la dũniyã nebã fãa rag n waoogda a lɛɛbdbã." 
Isaiah23:9 Yaa Saasẽ-pãng-soabã n yãk yam-kãngã, n na n kɩt tɩ bũmb ning fãa sẽn tar dasãndã wuk-m-meng sɛ, la b kɩt tɩ bũmb ning fãa sẽn tar waoogr dũniyã zugã lebg zaalem." 
Isaiah23:10 Tarsɩɩs tẽn-neere, pɩʋʋg f tẽngã wa b sẽn pɩʋʋgd Nill kʋɩlgã, zɩɩb ka leb n be tẽngã ye." 
Isaiah23:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega b nugã ko-kãsengã zugu. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ soolem-dãmb rigimdi. Bãmb kõo noor tɩ b sãam Kana pãng zĩisã. 
Isaiah23:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Sɩdõ tẽn-neere, da leb n maan sũ-noog yɛs ye, b maana foom pãng wa b sẽn yõg pa-kuili. Yik n pɩʋʋg n kẽng Sɩpr sẽnẽ! Baa beenẽ, yãmb ka na n paam vʋʋsg ye.»" 
Isaiah23:13 Ad Kalde rãmbã tẽnga, ned ka leb n ket beenẽ ye. Asiiri nebã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg we-rũms zĩiga. Bãmb mee gũudb gãsd zabr yĩnga, bãmb sarma Tɩɩr tẽngã na-yiyã, n kɩt t'a lebg tom-dʋya." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarsɩɩs koom kogendo, yãb-y n wiis-y-yã! Bala, b sãama yãmb pãng zĩigã zãnga!" 
Isaiah23:15 Wakat-kãnga, b na n yĩma Tɩɩr tẽngã yell hal tɩ ta yʋʋm pis-yopoe, wa sẽn zems rĩm yʋʋm sẽn kaoosd to-to wã. La yʋʋm pis-yopoe wã loogr poore, Tɩɩr tẽngã na n lebga wa yɩɩll b sẽn yɩɩnd pʋg-yoodr wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ:" 
Isaiah23:16 Pʋg-yoodr b sẽn yĩm f yelle, rɩk pɛndg n gilg tẽngã! Wẽedẽ la f yɩɩnd f yɩɩlã, tɩ nebã tõe n leb n tẽeg f yelle!" 
Isaiah23:17 Yʋʋm pis-yopoe wã poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leb n gesa Tɩɩr tẽngã yelle, la Tɩɩr tẽngã na n leb n sɩng n deegda yaood a tʋʋm-dẽgdã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n maana yoob ne dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã gilli." 
Isaiah23:18 B na n dɩka yẽnda sẽn paam bũmb ningã ne a yaoodã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La b ka na n tigs bõn-kãnga, b ka na n bĩng-a me ye. Yõod ning yẽnda sẽn paamã na n yɩɩ neb nins sẽn be-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã n na n sooge, n dɩt n tɩgda, la b yeelgd fu-neeba." 
Isaiah24:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sãama tẽngã n kɩt t'a lebg weoogo. Bãmb na n zũndga tẽngã n sãeeg a nebã. 
Isaiah24:2 Yell ning sẽn na n paam maan-kʋʋdã na n paama nin-zaalga. Yell ning sẽn na n paam zu-soabã na n paama yamba. Yell ning sẽn na n paam zu-soben-poakã na n paama yem-poaka. Yell ning sẽn na n paam koaasdã na n pama raada. Yell ning sẽn na n paam sẽn kõt-a samdã na n paama sam-soaba. Yell ning sẽn na n paam sẽn tar-b n pengdẽ wã na n paama sẽn tog n yao-a wã. 
Isaiah24:3 B sãama tẽngã zãnga, la b zɛɛ a teedã zãnga. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah24:4 Tẽnga bee sũ-sãang pʋga, a yɛɛme. Dũni gill yɛɛme n sãamdẽ. Tẽngã nin-kãsemsã me pãng sɛɛme." 
Isaiah24:5 Tẽngã nebã n wẽneg n sãam tẽngã. Bala, bãmb kɩɩsda tõodã, b tõdga Sẽn-Ka-Saab noyã, la b sãama kaool ning sẽn be wakat fãa wã." 
Isaiah24:6 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ kãab-wẽngã sãamd tẽngã, la tẽngã nebã tog n paama sɩbgre. Bõn-kãng n kɩt tɩ bugum dɩ tẽngã nebã, la sẽn kell-bã sõor ka leb n yaa wʋsg ye." 
Isaiah24:7 Reezẽ rãam ka leb n wẽkdẽ ye, reezẽ tɩɩs zelgame. Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n maand sũ-noogã wẽeda siri." 
Isaiah24:8 Gãngãoog ka leb n maand noog ye, sũ-noog bʋrg sɛɛme, pɛndg ka leb n maand noog ye." 
Isaiah24:9 Neb ka leb n yũud reezẽ rãam la b yɩɩndẽ ye, rãam noor lebga toog ne rã-yũudbã." 
Isaiah24:10 Tẽng ning sẽn wã-a wã sãama zãnga. Rotã fãa pagame tɩ ned ka leb n kẽed be ye. 
Isaiah24:11 Nebã yãbda tẽngã soay zutu, bala, reezẽ rãam ka leb n be ye. Sũ-noog buudã fãa loogame. B riga kɩdeng t'a yi tẽngã." 
Isaiah24:12 Lebga sãoong bal n be tẽngã pʋga, b luba kʋɩlemsã tɩ lebg raboogo." 
Isaiah24:13 Bala, bũmb ning sẽn be tẽngã pʋgã, bũmb ning sẽn be nebã sʋkã, yaa wa oliiv wobr wakate, wa b sẽn wob reezẽ n loog tɩ lebg yiisgu." 
Isaiah24:14 Nin-bãmb zẽkda b koeese, bãmb kaasda ne sũ-noogo, sẽn be-b nin-taoorã kilsda ne sũ-noogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab naamã yĩnga." 
Isaiah24:15 Dẽ wã, waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩis nins wĩndg vẽenem sẽn tãoosdã pʋgẽ, waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr tẽms nins sẽn be koom sʋkã pʋgẽ!" 
Isaiah24:16 Tõnd wʋmda yɩɩl sẽn yit dũniyã kɩrems fãa n yetẽ: «Bɩ tɩrlem soabã reeg ziiri!» La mam yetame: «Mam menemame! Mam menemame! Ad yaa toog mam yĩnga! Zãmb dãmbã zãmbdame. Lebga zãmbgo! Zãmb dãmbã zãmbdame. 
Isaiah24:17 Dũni-rãmba, pelen-yɩk ne boko, la gãmbr na n yõka yãmba!" 
Isaiah24:18 Sẽn zoet-a n na n põs pelen-yɩkã, a na n lʋɩɩ bokã pʋga, la sẽn be-a bokã pʋg n dat n yi wã, gãmbrã n na n yõk-a. Bala, saasẽ kʋɩlems pakame, la dũniyã yẽbgr rigimdame." 
Isaiah24:19 Tẽngã maana mugnum, tẽngã wãame, tẽngã miimdame," 
Isaiah24:20 tẽngã lengda wa ned sẽn yũ rãam n tɩg n lengdẽ, a kɩllda wa pʋʋg roogo. Yẽnda beegrã zɩsg-a lame, yẽnda lʋɩɩme n ka na n leb n yik ye.»" 
Isaiah24:21 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sɩbga saasẽ pãens rãmbã sẽn be saasẽ wã, la b na n sɩbga tẽng zug rĩm-dãmbã sẽn be tẽng zugã." 
Isaiah24:22 B na n tigma bãmb wa bi-bees n kẽes bokẽ. B na n tɩ paga bãmb bi-bees roog pʋga, la sã n wa kaoose, b na n sɩbga bãmba." 
Isaiah24:23 Kiuugã na n paama paoogre, wĩndgã me na n paama yãnde. Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yaa rĩm Sɩyõ tãngã zug Zeruzalɛm, la b ziirã pukda bãmb kãsem dãmbã taoore." 
Isaiah25:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa mam Wẽnnaam. Mam na n pʋʋsa yãmb barka, la m na n pẽga yãmb yʋʋrã, bala, yãmb pidsa tʋʋm-kãsems nins yãmb sẽn dag n yeel hal daar zãr tɩ y na n maaname wã. B yaa bũmb sẽn ka viigda la sẽn ka vaanda." 
Isaiah25:2 Bala, yãmb kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg kug-rʋre. Tẽng ning sẽn dag n tar pãngã lebga tom-dʋre. Sãambã na-yirã menema tẽngã pʋga, la b kõn tol n leb me-a ye." 
Isaiah25:3 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ pãens rãmbã waoogd yãmba, la buud toay-toayã sẽn yaa nin-toosã tẽng zoeta yãmba." 
Isaiah25:4 Bala, yãmb yɩɩ pãng zĩig ka-pãens rãmbã yĩnga, la y yɩ zĩ-soalgdg nimbãan-nebã yĩnga, b yel-pakr wakate, n yaa soondg zĩig saag sẽn niid ne pãng wakate. Yãmb yaa maasem tʋʋlg wakate. Bala, nin-toosã vʋʋsem wẽnda sa-kẽeng sẽn pãbd lalga." 
Isaiah25:5 Yãmb sẽn kɩtd tɩ tʋʋlg sɛ zĩ-koɛɛngẽ wã, yãmb tõogame tɩ sãambã bʋrg sɛ, Sawaodg maasem sẽn sɛɛsd tʋʋlg to-to wã, yãmb kɩtame tɩ nin-toosã tõogr yɩɩl sɛ." 
Isaiah25:6 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n maana tigr sẽn tar rɩ-nood tãn-kãngã zug nebã fãa yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ tigr sẽn tar reezẽ rã-kʋdgo, la rɩ-nood ne nemd sẽn tar kaam, ne reezẽ rã-kʋdg sẽn yɩlge." 
Isaiah25:7 Tãn-kãng zug la bãmb na n sãam peen-lill ning sẽn lud-a nebã fãa wã. Peen-kãng rag n luda buud toay-toayã fãa. 
Isaiah25:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sãama kũum pãng wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga. Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yẽesa nemsã fãa nintãmã. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb nebã yãndã sɛ dũniyã fãa pʋga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Isaiah25:9 Badaare, b na n yeelame yaa: «Yaa bãmb la tõnd Wẽnnaam! Tõnd dɩka d teegrã n teeg bãmba, la bãmb fãaga tõndo. Bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tõnd sẽn teeg a soabã, wa-y tɩ d maan sũ-noogo, d kɩdem bãmb fãagrã yĩnga!" 
Isaiah25:10 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã bee tãn-kãngã zugu!» B na n taba Moaab zĩig pʋgẽ, wa b sẽn tabd mood bir-bok pʋga." 
Isaiah25:11 Yẽnda bee beenẽ n tẽegd a nus wa ko-rugd sẽn tẽegd a nus n dugd koom. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame t'a wuk-m-mengã sɛ, la b kell n kɩt t'a nusã bẽds me sɛ." 
Isaiah25:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tusa fo lalsã sẽn me n zẽk n tar pãngã n lubi. Bãmb na n siig-b lame, b na n lub-b-la tẽngã tom pʋga." 
Isaiah26:1 Badaare, b na n yɩɩla Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋg n yeele: «Tõnd tara tẽng sẽn tar pãnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana lalg ne pãng zĩig n na n fãag tõndo." 
Isaiah26:2 Pak-y kʋɩlemsã tɩ buud ning sẽn yaa tɩrg n maand sɩdã kẽ. 
Isaiah26:3 Ned ning yam sẽn ka yuusdã, yãmb kõta a soab vɩ-bãane. Yãmb kõt-a-la vɩ-bãan a sẽn dɩk a teegrã n teeg yãmbã yĩnga." 
Isaiah26:4 Rɩk-y y teegrã n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab wakat fãa. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n yaa pĩig kugr wakat fãa." 
Isaiah26:5 Bãmb sika neb nins sẽn dag n be tãn-lug-lug zugã. Bãmb n lub tẽng ning sẽn dag n be tãng zugã. Bãmb lub-a-la tẽnga, bãmb lub-a-la tomẽ." 
Isaiah26:6 B taba yẽnda ne naoã. Naong rãmbã taba yẽnda ne b nao. Nimbãan-nebã na n taba yẽnda n looge.» 
Isaiah26:7 Tɩrlem yaa nin-tɩrg sore. Yãmb sẽn yaa tɩrlem soabã, yãmb manega nin-tɩrg sore." 
Isaiah26:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb tõogã sẽn tuk sor ningã zugu, tõnd maanda tẽeb ne yãmba. Tõnd sẽn dat fãa yaa tɩ bool yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Isaiah26:9 N-yẽe! Yʋngo, mam data yãmba, mam sũ-zulmã pʋga, mam baooda yãmba. Bala, yãmb bʋ-kaoorã sã n wa maand a tʋʋmd dũniyã zugu, dũniyã neb zãmsda tɩrlem." 
Isaiah26:10 B sã n zoe nin-wẽng nimbãanega, a ka zãmsd tɩrlem maaneg ye. Yẽnda maanda wẽng tɩrlem tẽngã pʋga, la a toog ka be ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab naamã ziir ye." 
Isaiah26:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb nugã zãntame hal tɩ bãmb ka ne-a ye. Bãmb na n yãnda yãmb sẽn tar nonglem-kãseng ning y nebã yĩngã, tɩ bõn-kãng yãnd yõk-ba. Woto, bugum n na n dɩ yãmb bɛɛbã." 
Isaiah26:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb vigla vɩ-bãan tõnd yĩnga. Sɩd me, tʋʋm nins fãa tõnd sẽn maanã, yaa yãmb n maand-b n kõt tõndo." 
Isaiah26:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, zu-soben-dãmb a taab sẽn ka yãmb sooga tõndo, la yaa yãmb y yembr yʋʋrã bal la tõnd ket n boondẽ." 
Isaiah26:14 Zu-soben-bãmb kiime n ka na n leb n vʋʋg ye. Bãmb lebga wa maasem bala, b ka na n leb n yik ye. Sɩda, yãmb kẽesa y toog n sãam bãmba, yãmb menesa bũmb ning sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ b tẽeg b yellã!" 
Isaiah26:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb paasa y nebã sõore, yãmb fɩɩga y nebã n waoog y yʋʋrã. Yãmb yalga tẽngã todsã fãa." 
Isaiah26:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b baoo yãmba. Yãmb sẽn dems bãmbã yĩnga, b pʋʋsame n kos sugri." 
Isaiah26:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa tʋtr-pʋg sẽn dat n dog n kũmd dogem toog to-to wã, tõnd me bee yãmb taoor n maand a woto!" 
Isaiah26:18 Tõnd dɩka pʋg n nams ne rogem toogo, tõnd sẽn dogã, yaa wa sobg bal la d dog yã. Tõnd ka maan bũmb sẽn wat ne fãagr dũniyã yĩng ye, la d ka wa ne neb dũniyã pʋg ye." 
Isaiah26:19 Fo kũumã na n leb n paama vɩɩm, sẽn ki-bã na n leb n vʋʋgame. Yãmb dãmb sẽn be tẽng tomẽ wã, nek-y-yã, kaas-y ne sũ-noogo! Bala, yãmb meenemã yaa meenem sẽn kõt vẽenem. La tẽn-gãongã na n basa sẽn dag n be-b lik pʋgã tɩ b wa vẽenemẽ." 
Isaiah26:20 Mam nebã, kẽng-y n tɩ kẽ-y y rotẽ, la y lebs kʋɩlemsã n pag n be pʋgẽ. Solg-y wakat bilf pʋgẽ, hal tɩ sũ-puugrã wakat looge." 
Isaiah26:21 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yi b zĩigẽ wã, n wa sɩbg dũniyã nebã b kongrã yĩnga. Tẽn-gãongã na n basa zɩɩm ning yẽnda sẽn dag n daagã tɩ puki, la a ka na n leb n tõog n solg neb nins yẽnda sẽn dag n kʋ wã ye." 
Isaiah27:1 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n dɩka b zabr sʋ-bedrã sẽn dɩte, la sẽn tar pãngã, n sɩbg parwẽndã sẽn yaa wag-zoɛtgã, parwẽndã sẽn yaa wag-gõdem-gõdmã, la b na n kʋʋ wag-bɛɛgã sẽn be ko-kãsengẽ wã." 
Isaiah27:2 Badaare, pʋd-y yɩɩll reezẽ tɩɩg sẽn kõt reezẽ-rã-noogã yĩnga." 
Isaiah27:3 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa a gũuda, mam zãgsda yẽnda koom wakat fãa. Mam gũuda yẽnda wĩndg la yʋngo, tɩ b ra wa n maan-a bũmb ye." 
Isaiah27:4 Mam sũur ka leb n puud ne yẽnda ye. Gõpayãnds ne gõos sã n be beenẽ, mam na n võ-b lame, la mam na n ninga b fãa bugum." 
Isaiah27:5 Bũmb sẽn be yaa tɩ b wa soond mam nengẽ, yaa tɩ b bao vɩ-bãan ne maam, yaa tɩ b bao tɩ vɩɩmd bãan ne maam!" 
Isaiah27:6 Wakat sẽn wate, a Zakoob yagensã na n kɩɩ yẽga, Israyɛll buudã na n pusa yagense, la a na n womame t'a biisã pid dũniyã." 
Isaiah27:7 Rẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽ b nebã wa b sẽn wẽ neb nins sẽn dag n pãbd bãmbã bɩ? Sẽn-Ka-Saab kʋʋ bãmb nebã wa b sẽn kʋ neb nins sẽn dag n kʋʋd bãmb nebã bɩ?" 
Isaiah27:8 Yãmb kaoo bãmb bʋʋdo, n tus-ba, n dig-b tɩ b looge. Bãmb fʋʋs-b-la ne sob-kãseng n dig-ba, yaa yaang sob-kẽeng sẽn yik daar a yembr n dɩk-ba." 
Isaiah27:9 Yaa woto n na n kɩt t'a Zakoob yagensã paam b kongrã sugri. Ad b sẽn na n paam b yel-wẽnã sugrã sẽn na n wa ne bũmb ninga: Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-kugã kug fãa lebg zom wa b sẽn wer goore. Aseera ra-lugdsã ne wisd yõogr zĩisã ka na n leb n yals ye. 
Isaiah27:10 Bala, tẽng ning sẽn tar pãngã lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, yaa zĩig b sẽn base, t'a lebg wa we-raoogo. Nag-bi wã wat n wãbda beenẽ, la b gãe beenẽ n sɛɛsd tɩɩsã vãado." 
Isaiah27:11 Wilã sã n kʋɩ, b kaood-b lame. La pagbã wat n ning-b-la bugum. Bala, bãmb yaa neb sẽn ka mi võor ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b naandã ka zoe bãmb nimbãaneg ye. Sẽn naan-a bãmbã ka paam nimbãan-zoeer b yĩng ye." 
Isaiah27:12 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n miima tɩɩsã, sẽn sɩng ne Efrat kʋɩlgã n tɩ tãag Ezɩpt ko-soogã. La b na n wʋka yãmb a Israyɛll nebã yembr-yembre!" 
Isaiah27:13 Badaare, b na n peeba baor-bedre, dẽ, neb nins sẽn dag n menem n be Asiiri tẽngã, ne neb nins sẽn sãeeg n be Ezɩpt tẽngã na n waame. Bãmb na n wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tãn-sõngã sẽn be Zeruzalɛmã zugu." 
Isaiah28:1 Kayto! Efrayiim rã-yũudbã naam puglã na n paama toogo, tɩ-puud nins sẽn yaa yẽnda ziir n be kunkubr ning sẽn tar long sẽn bʋgs zugã zelgame. Yaa neb nins reezẽ rãam sẽn lubdã, bãmb na n paama toogo!" 
Isaiah28:2 Zu-soabã gãndaoog sẽn tar raood n wate, a wata wa sob-kãseng sẽn tũnug sapɩlma, yaa sob-fugdg sẽn sãamda, wa sa-kẽeng sẽn niid ko-bɛd sẽn tar pãnga. Yẽnda na n luba tẽngã ne pãnga." 
Isaiah28:3 B na n taba Efrayiim rã-yũudbã naam puglã ne nao," 
Isaiah28:4 la tɩ-puud nins sẽn yaa neeb n be kunkubr ning sẽn tar long sẽn bʋgs zug n zelgã na n yɩɩ wa kankan-dẽeng sẽn bɩ, tɩ bõn-bɩʋʋng nan ka ta ye. Ned sẽn fãsg-a yee, la a sẽn leems-a." 
Isaiah28:5 Badaare, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n yɩɩ b nebã sẽn kellã naam pugla la, b waoogr maanfo." 
Isaiah28:6 Bãmb na n yɩɩ zemsg sɩɩga, n soog ned ning sẽn zaoond-a n na n kao bʋʋdã, la b yɩ pãng n soog neb nins sẽn zabd ne bɛyã, tɩ b rig-a n tɩ tãag tẽngã noore." 
Isaiah28:7 Bãmb me yũu reezẽ rãam n zʋbsdẽ, rã-toosã kɩtame tɩ bãmb nens yilimdẽ. Maan-kʋʋdbã ne sẽn yãt-b vẽnegrã yũu reezẽ rãam n zʋbsdẽ, rãamã sooga bãmb zãnga, rã-toosã kɩtame tɩ bãmb nens yilimdẽ. Bãmb yãabã kɩtame tɩ b zʋbsdẽ, b yamã yuusda b yam-yãkrã pʋga." 
Isaiah28:8 Bãmb taabl-dãmbã fãa pida ne b wʋbdã, la b rẽgdã, tɩ vɩʋʋg ka leb n beẽ ye." 
Isaiah28:9 Bãmb yetame: «Ãnda la a Ezayi rat n zãms bãngre? Ãnda la yẽnda rat n kɩt t'a wʋm koɛɛgã võore? Sã n ka kamb sẽn nan bas bĩisim, yaa kamb sẽn nan sig n bas b ma." 
Isaiah28:10 Yaa noor ne noore, yaa tõog ne tõogo, toadg ne toadga, yaa bilf ka, la bilf ka sẽnẽ." 
Isaiah28:11 Beneere, yaa bɩ-bɩt-bɩte, goam sẽn ka tar võore, yaa goam buud a to la bãmb na n gom ne nin-bãmbã.»" 
Isaiah28:12 Bãmb dag n yeel-b lame yaa: «Ad vʋʋsgo! Bas-y sẽn yɛɛ-a wã t'a vʋʋse. Ad yaa vʋʋsgo!» La bãmb ka sak n kelg ye. 
Isaiah28:13 Ne nin-bãmbã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã na n yɩɩ wa: Yaa noor ne noore, yaa tõog ne toogo, toadg ne toadga, yaa bilf ka, la bilf ka sẽnẽ. Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b sã n kẽnd bɩ b lagsd n lʋɩt zãmbɛɛl n kaoodẽ, bɩ bẽodgã paam-b n yõke." 
Isaiah28:14 Nin-tʋʋdba, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga, yãmb-dãmb sẽn so Zeruzalɛm nebã!" 
Isaiah28:15 Yãmb yetame: «Tõnd maana kaool ne kũum, tõnd maana yẽsg ne kɩɩm-kulgu. Sẽn na n yɩl tɩ sãoongã sã n wa, wa ko-pɛm sẽn fõt n wat ne pãnga, bɩ a ra paam tõnd ye. Tõnd dɩka zĩrẽ tɩ yaa tõnd zĩ-lilldga, la d rɩk belgr tɩ yaa d solgr zĩiga.»" 
Isaiah28:16 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yetẽ: «Ade, mam vigla kugr sẽn tar pãng Sɩyõ. Yaa kugr sẽn yaa sõama n be soakã zĩigẽ, yaa kugr sẽn tar yõodo, la a vigla kãenkãe. Sẽn teeg-a kug-kãng ka baood n zoe ye." 
Isaiah28:17 Mam vigla zemsg tɩ yaa magdga, la tɩrlem tɩ yaa zemsg makdga. Sapɩlem na n looga ne zĩrẽ-beed zĩ-lilldgã, ko-zoetmã na n kãaga zĩ-solgdsã fãa n looge.»" 
Isaiah28:18 Yãmb sẽn maan kaool ning ne kũumã na n vaalame. Yãmb sẽn maan yẽsg ning ne kɩɩm-kulgã ka na n tõog ye. Sãoongã sẽn fõt n wat ne pãng wa ko-pɛmã sã n wa, a na n sãama yãmba." 
Isaiah28:19 A sẽn na n pɩʋʋg wakat ning fãa, a na n kãaga yãmba. Bala, a na n pɩʋʋga yibeoog fãa, la ne wĩndg la yʋngo, la a bʋrgã bal na n kẽesa rabeem." 
Isaiah28:20 Gãagã na n yɩɩ koɛɛg wʋsg tɩ ned ka tõe n tẽeg a meng a zug ye. La fu-goabgã na n yɩɩ bilf tɩ ka sekd pilb ye. 
Isaiah28:21 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yika zabr ne bãmb wa Paratsim tãngã sɛɛgã. Bãmb na n yik n maana b tʋʋmd wa b sẽn dag n maan Gabawõ tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, yaa tʋʋm-kãseng ning bãmb sẽn maanã, b na n yik n maana tʋʋm-bãnde, b na n pidsa tʋʋmd sẽn yaa bõn-lingdga." 
Isaiah28:22 Moasã, da yɩ-y nin-tʋʋdba, tɩ b ra wa tak yãmb sẽbdsã tɩ lebg kãenkãe ye. Bala, b yãka yam n na n sãam tẽnga zãnga. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n togs maam." 
Isaiah28:23 Yok-y y tʋb n kelg maam! Gũus-y y meng n kelg mam koɛɛgã! 
Isaiah28:24 Ka-koaad sã n dat n war a pʋʋg n bʋde, a tara warb bal n ka basdẽ la? Yẽnda koodame la a bẽesdẽ n ka basdẽ la?" 
Isaiah28:25 Yẽnda sã n maneg a zĩigã n sɛ, a fẽrgda siili la a fẽrg kĩu, a bʋta ki runug-runuga, n yãk zĩig n bʋd orze, la a bʋd bõn-koaadl a taab kɩremsã." 
Isaiah28:26 Yẽnda Wẽnnaam zãmsa yẽnda a sẽn tog n maane, Wẽnnaamã zãms-a-la bõn-kãnga." 
Isaiah28:27 B ka tog n pãb siil ne rasab ye, la b ka tog n tab kĩu ne sarɛt ye. B fʋkda kĩu teoogẽ, la b pãbda ki ne dasaare." 
Isaiah28:28 B tog n wera bɩle n maan buri, la b ka tog n pãbd-a n ka basdẽ ye. B sã n bilimd sarɛtã ne te-sogdɩ wã, bɩle wã zugu, a ka wãad ye." 
Isaiah28:29 Bõn-kãng fãa yita Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã nengẽ. Bãmb saagrã yaa sõama, la b sẽn tar yam ningã yaa kãsenga." 
Isaiah29:1 Ariyɛlle, Ariyɛlle, tẽng ning pʋg a Davɩɩd sẽn tilg a tãb-sikã, fo na n paama toogo. Yʋʋmd loogdame tɩ yʋʋmd a to wa, bas-y tɩ tigã watẽ la b loogdẽ." 
Isaiah29:2 Mam na n namsa Zeruzalɛm, tɩ lebg sidgr la wõosgo. La tẽngã na n lebga maoong kʋʋb bug-toaalg ne maam." 
Isaiah29:3 Mam na n tilga m tãb-sikã n gũbg foom. Mam na n gɩda foom ne tãb-biisi, la m zam tom-dʋy n zab ne foom." 
Isaiah29:4 B na n sika foom tɩ f be tẽng n gomda. Fo goamã ka leb n zẽkd n yɩɩd wubsg ye. Fo koɛɛgã rãamd na n yita wa kɩɩm koɛɛg sẽn walemde, la fo na n paa tẽng tomẽ n walemdẽ." 
Isaiah29:5 Fo bɛɛbã sẽn yaa wʋsgã sõor na n yɩɩ wa tom-bãanega. Nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa nin-toosã na n yɩɩ wa wudg sẽn zẽkda. La tao-tao bala, wakat yɛng pʋgẽ," 
Isaiah29:6 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n waa ne sa-kelemse, la tẽn-digimdgu, la bʋr-kãsenga, ne seb-kãsenga, la sa-kẽenga, la ne bug-witim sẽn dɩta." 
Isaiah29:7 Zãmsd sẽn yaa to-to wã, la ned sẽn paam vẽnegr to-to yʋngã, neb wʋsg nins sẽn zabd ne Zeruzalɛmã me na n yɩ a woto. Yaa neb nins fãa sẽn na n zab ne-a, n sãam a pãng zĩisã n baood n nams-a wã." 
Isaiah29:8 Dẽ, wa kom sẽn tar ned t'a zãms n dɩtẽ wã, n yaool n nek n mik t'a pʋg yaa vɩʋʋgã, la ko-yũud sẽn tar ned t'a zãms n yũud koomã, n wa nek n mik t'a yɛɛme t'a koees yaa koɛɛngã, a na n yɩɩ woto me ne buud toay-toay wʋsgã sẽn na n zab ne Sɩyõ tãngã." 
Isaiah29:9 Kell-y n pa-y yɛɛsg pʋg n kaoose! Mum-y y ninã n lebg zoense! Bãmb nens yilimdame la b yaool n ka yũ reezẽ rãam ye. Bãmb lengdame la b yaool ka yũ rã-toaag ye. 
Isaiah29:10 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lobga yãmb gõe-kãseng pʋga, bãmb muma yãmb a no-rɛɛsdbã nini, la b pil yãmb a yãtbã zut ne peen-lilli." 
Isaiah29:11 Ne yãmba, b sẽn vẽneg yel-kãensã fãa wã wẽnda wa sebr b sẽn gʋls goam a pʋgẽ n yaool n sog-a, n dɩk-a n kõ ned sẽn mi kaorengo, n yeel-a: «M kotame tɩ f karem sẽn gʋlsã,» t'a leoke: «Mam ka tõe n karm-a ye, bala, b sog-a lame.»" 
Isaiah29:12 Wall wẽnda wa b sẽn dɩk sebr n kõ ned sẽn ka mi kaorengo, n yaool n yeel-a: «M kotame tɩ f karem sebrã!» T'a leoke: «Mam ka mi kaoreng ye.»" 
Isaiah29:13 Zu-soabã yetame: «Nin-bãmbã me sã n kolg maam, b waoogda maam ne noor bala, la b sũyã zãra ne maam, bãmb sẽn zoet maamã yaa zãmsg b sẽn deeg ninsaalb nengẽ bala." 
Isaiah29:14 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam na n kell n maan bõn-bãn tɩ yɩ lingr ne lingr nin-bãmbã yĩnga. Yam-dãmbã yamã na n sɛɛme, la bãngdbã bãngr na n zoe n baoo zĩig n solge.»" 
Isaiah29:15 Toog na n paama neb nins sẽn solgd b mens n na n zãag ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, sẽn na n yɩl n solg b saagrã! Bãmb maanda b tʋʋmã likẽ, la b yetẽ: «Ãnda n ne tõndo? Ãnda soab n mi tõnd sẽn maandã?»" 
Isaiah29:16 Yãmb sẽn maandã yaa lebende! A zemsame tɩ b ges yagbã wa yagd bɩ? Bũmb tõe n yeela a naandã tɩ ka yẽnda n naan-a sɩda? Rʋk tõe n yeela sẽn yaga yẽnda wã t'a ka tar bãngre? 
Isaiah29:17 Yãmb ka mi tɩ keta bilf bala, tɩ Libã tek n lebg tɩɩs zĩiga, tɩ b geelg tɩɩs zĩigã wa kãgre." 
Isaiah29:18 Badaare, wʋms na n wʋma sebrã goamã. Zoens nin na n pukame tɩ b yi lik ne lik bida pʋg n neẽ." 
Isaiah29:19 Sik-m-mens rãmbã na n paama sũ-no-kãseng Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋga, la sẽn yaa-b naong rãmbã n tɩ yɩɩd ninsaalbã sʋkã na n kɩdma Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yĩnga." 
Isaiah29:20 Bala, nin-toaag ka na n leb n zĩnd ye. La wẽnem soabã na n menemame, b na n menesa neb nins fãa sẽn dag n wũg n dat n maan wẽngã." 
Isaiah29:21 Yaa neb nins sẽn dag n balgd nebã bʋʋd zĩigẽ, la b bẽt bʋ-kaoodbã tẽngã noorã, n kɩtdẽ tɩ b paalgd bʋʋm soab zaalmã." 
Isaiah29:22 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag a Abrahaamã yeta a Zakoob yagensã yaa: «Moasã, yãnd kõn leb n yõk a Zakoob yagensã ye. Bãmb neng kõn tol n leb n sulg ye." 
Isaiah29:23 Bala, bãmb kambã sã n yãnd mam nus tʋʋm nins mam sẽn maan bãmb sʋkã, bãmb na n waooga mam yʋʋrã. Bãmb na n waooga a Zakoob Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, b na n zoee Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã." 
Isaiah29:24 Neb nins yam sẽn dag n menema na n paama bãngre, la sẽn dag n yẽgemd-bã na n deega zãmsgo.»" 
Isaiah30:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Kom-tõtsã na n paama toogo! Bãmb maanda yam-yãkr sẽn ka yit mam nengẽ ye. Bãmb maanda kaool mam sẽn ka yeel tɩ b maane, n paasd bãmb yel-wẽnã waooglem." 
Isaiah30:2 Bãmb kẽngda Ezɩpt n ka yals n sok maam ye, n na n tɩ kẽ Faarõ pãng zĩigẽ wã n soonde. La b baooda zĩ-soalgdg Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Isaiah30:3 Faarõ pãng zĩigã na n wẽneg n yɩɩ yãmb yãnde. La zĩ-soalgdg ning y sẽn baood Ezɩpt tẽngã na yɩ y paoogre. 
Isaiah30:4 Bãmb nanambsã zoe n bee Soan, tɩ b koe-toagsdbã zoe n ta Haneese." 
Isaiah30:5 Bãmb fãa na n dɩɩ yãnd buud ning sẽn ka tõe n sõng bãmbã yĩnga, buud ning sẽn ka tõe n wa sõng-ba, la sẽn ka tõe n wa kõ-b sõngrã, bu-kãng na n yɩ bãmb yãnd la b paoogre.»" 
Isaiah30:6 Sɩbgr koɛɛg Negɛɛv we-rũmsã yĩnga. Bãmb dɩka b arzegs n zɩlg b bõense, la b rɩk b paoong n zɩlg b yʋgma, n na n pɩʋʋg tẽng ning sẽn tar sũ-sãang la yel-pakrã, zĩig ning gɩgem-yãang ne gɩgem-daoog sẽn yitẽ wã, la ruruug ne wag-toaag sẽn yɩgd n yitẽ wã, n na n tɩ kõ neb sẽn ka na n tol n yɩ sõngr bãmb yĩngã!" 
Isaiah30:7 Bala, Ezɩpt tẽng sõngrã yaa zaalem la vɩʋʋgo. Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam boond tẽn-kãng tɩ ‹Rahaab sẽn ka maand bũmbu.›" 
Isaiah30:8 Moasã, kẽng n gʋls bõn-kãngã wals zut bãmb nifẽ, la f gʋls-a sebr pʋga, tɩ wakat sẽn wate, bɩ bõn-kãng yɩ kaset wakat fãa." 
Isaiah30:9 Bala, bãmb yaa nin-tõtse, b yaa zĩrẽ-be-neb kamba, n yaa neb sẽn ka rat n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã ye." 
Isaiah30:10 Bãmb yeta yãtbã yaa: «Bɩ y ra leb n paam pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ye!» La b yet sẽn paamd-b vẽnegrã yaa: «Da leb-y n paam-y vẽnegr sẽn zems tõnd yĩng ye. Gom-y ne tõnd gom-noodo, la y paam vẽnegr sẽn ka sɩd ye!" 
Isaiah30:11 Bʋdg-y n bas-y sorã, bʋdg-y n bas-y so-bukã, Da leb-y n gom-y ne tõnd Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soab a Wẽnnaam yell ye!»" 
Isaiah30:12 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soab a Wẽnnaam yetẽ yaa: «Yãmb sẽn zãgs gom-kãngã wã yĩnga, la yãmb sẽn dɩk y teegrã n teeg y pãngã ne y yel-kɛgã yĩnga, n dɩk bãmb tɩ lebg yãmb bõn-tɛɛgdgã," 
Isaiah30:13 kong-kãng na n lebga wa võor sẽn be lal-zãonglg sẽn kɩll n dat n lʋɩ zugu, la a na n lʋɩɩ tao-tao wakat a yembr pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah30:14 A na n wãa zõg-zõg wa yagb rʋko. A na n zõgsame n lebg peese, la b ka na n bas-a t'a põs ye. A pedsã ka na n kell tɩ sek tall n mok bugum bug-toaalgẽ, wall b tall n tɩ toog koom bulgẽ ye.»" 
Isaiah30:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soab a Wẽnnaam yetame: «Yaa yãmb sẽn na n tek yam n zĩnd bãane, la yãmb na n paam fãagre, yaa vɩ-bãan ne kɩs sɩd pʋg la yãmb na n paam pãnga. La yãmb ka tʋlg bõn-kãng ye!»" 
Isaiah30:16 Yãmb yetame: «Ayo! Tõnd na n zomba wiid n zoe!» Yãmb sɩd na n zomba wiid n zoe! Yãmb yetame: «Tõnd na n zomba wed-tʋʋls n zoe!» Rẽ kɩtame tɩ sẽn digd-b yãmbã na n zoe ne tʋʋlem. 
Isaiah30:17 Nin-yend bala, bɛɛbã nin-yend na n tãsa bãmb neb tusr tɩ b zoe. Bãmb neb a nu sã n tãs yãmba, yãmb na n zoeeme. Yãmb na n zoeeme hal n tɩ yals wa tãb-kaoor sẽn lugl tãng zugu, la wa tãb-kaoor sẽn be kunkubr zugu." 
Isaiah30:18 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gũud wakat n na n ning yãmb barka, rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b na n yik n zoe yãmb nimbãanega. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bʋ-tɩrg soaba. Bark bee neb nins fãa sẽn tẽed bãmbã zugu!" 
Isaiah30:19 N-yẽe! Sɩyõ nebã, yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn be Zeruzalɛm, yãmb ka na n leb n yãb yɛs ye! Yãmb sã n kelme, b na n wʋmame, la b na n zoee yãmb nimbãanega. Bãmb sã n wʋm yãmb kelemsã bala, b na n leoka yãmba." 
Isaiah30:20 Zu-soabã na n kõ-y-la rɩɩb y yel-pakr wakate, la b kõ yãmb koom y namsg pʋga. Yãmb Karen-saambã kõn leb n zãag n bas yãmb ye. Yãmb meng nin na n yãnda y Karen-saambã." 
Isaiah30:21 Yãmb sã n dabd goabg bɩ rɩtgo, yãmb tʋbr na n wʋma koe-kãngã y poorẽ sẽn yete: «ad sorã, tu-y-yã-a.»" 
Isaiah30:22 Ges-y wanzuri wã b sẽn bolg yãmb wẽn-naandsã wa bõn-dẽgdo, la y ges sãnemã b sẽn bolg yãmb wẽn-naandsã b sẽn maan ne kutã wa bõn-dẽgdo. Yãmb tog n fãeega b pedsã wa bõn-dẽgdo. Yeel-b tɩ b yi kaanẽ n looge." 
Isaiah30:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni bõn-buudã yãmb sẽn bʋd tẽn-gãongã zugã yĩnga. La tẽn-gãongã sẽn na n kõ yãmb rɩɩb ninsã na n yɩɩ wʋsgo, la rɩ-noodo. Badaare, yãmb rũmsã na n tɩ wãba zĩ-yalemsẽ." 
Isaiah30:24 Niigã ne bõens nins sẽn kood yãmb pʋtẽ wã na n paama yamd sẽn ning yamsem, na n yɩɩ yamd b sẽn yelg ne kaorgo." 
Isaiah30:25 Kʋʋbã daar sã n ta tɩ gãsdã siigdẽ, ko-soay ne ko-zoetem n na n zĩnd tãn-lug-lugã ne kunkub-zãonglsã zutu." 
Isaiah30:26 Daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n tɩp b nebã poglgã, la b maag b sẽn dag n pãb bãmbã noadã, kiuugã vẽenem na n yɩɩ wa wĩntoog vẽenem, la wĩntoogã vẽenem na n paasa naoor a yopoe wa rasem a yopoe vẽenem." 
Isaiah30:27 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yita zĩ-zãrg n watẽ. Bãmb sũ-yikrã yaa kãseng n wat ne toogo. Bãmb noorã pida ne sũ-yikri, la b zelemdã yaa wa bugum sẽn dɩta." 
Isaiah30:28 Bãmb vʋʋsmã yaa wa koom sẽn zoet ne pãng n limd n tat kokoayã. Bãmb na n goo buud toay-toayã ne sũ-sãang goaadga. La b ning tudgr salbr nebã noyã pʋse. 
Isaiah30:29 Yãmb na n yɩɩla wa b sẽn yɩɩnd tigr daar yʋngo, yãmb na n maana sũ-noog wa ned sẽn peebd wɩɩg la a kẽnda, n dabd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngẽ wã, n dabd Israyɛll pĩigẽ wã." 
Isaiah30:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ b koɛɛg sãd ne pãnga, la b na n wilga b kangã sẽn na n wẽ ne sũ-yik-kãsenga, la ne bug-witim sẽn dɩta, ne sa-kẽenga la sob-kãseng sẽn fẽrgd sapɩlma." 
Isaiah30:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã rãamd sã n yi, rabeem na n yõka Asiiri nebã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wẽe bãmb ne b rasaarã." 
Isaiah30:32 Wakat ning fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk yam n na n wẽ bãmbã, b na n wʋma gãngãoong ne pɛndg rãamde. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zẽka b kangã n zab ne-ba." 
Isaiah30:33 Bala, b zoe n segla wʋngã n sɛ. B vigla wʋngã rĩmã yĩnga, wʋngã zulmame, a yalmame. Yẽnda wʋngã pida ne bugum la raad wʋsgo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab vʋʋsmã rɩt-a-la wa kidbr ko-soogo." 
Isaiah31:1 Toog bee neb nins sẽn kẽnd Ezɩpt n baood sõngrã zutu. Bãmb dɩka b teegrã n teeg wiidi, b teega b saar-dãmba sẽn yaa wʋsgã, la b teeg b wed-rʋʋdbã sẽn tar pãngã, n ka wẽnemded n get Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã, la b ka baood Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye!" 
Isaiah31:2 Baoosgo, bãmb me yaool n tara yam, n tõe n kɩt tɩ toog wa. Bãmb ka lebsd b noor poorẽ ye. Bãmb zabda ne nin-wẽns yiri, la b zabd ne wẽng maandbã sõngrã." 
Isaiah31:3 Ezɩpt nebã yaa ninsaalb bala, b ka Wẽnnaam ye. Bãmb wiidã yaa nemd bala, b ka sɩɩs ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n tẽeg b nugã bala, sẽn wat-a n na n sõngã lakd n lʋɩɩme, b sẽn sõngd a soabã na n lʋɩɩme, la bãmb fãa na n naaga taab n sãame." 
Isaiah31:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Wa gɩgemde, la wa gɩgem-poll sẽn yõkd rũng n gãe n wũundẽ, tɩ baa pe-kɩɩmbã sã n boond taab la b kelemd n dat n zab ne-a bɩ a ka yɛɛsdẽ wã, la baa bãmb wʋsg sã n bugsd-a bɩ rabeem ka tar-a wã, woto me, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n siga Sɩyõ tãngã ne kunkubrã zug n zabe.»" 
Isaiah31:5 Liuuli sẽn yɛdgd b pɩgs to-to wã, woto me, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n kogla Zeruzalɛm. Bãmb na n sõng-a lame la b fãag-a, b na n kogl-a lame la b gũ-a." 
Isaiah31:6 Israyɛll nebã, lebg-y n wa-y yãmb sẽn kɩɩs a soab wʋsgã nengẽ!" 
Isaiah31:7 Badaare, yãmb ned kam fãa na n basa a wanzuri wẽn-naandsã ne a sãnem wẽn-naandsã sẽn yaa yãmb nusã sẽn pid ne yel-wẽnã sẽn maanã." 
Isaiah31:8 Zabr sʋʋg sẽn ka ninsaalb rẽnd n na n kʋ Asiiri nebã, yaa zabr sʋʋg sẽn ka ninsaal sʋʋg n na n sãam-ba. Bãmb na n zoeeme n dat n põs zabr sʋʋga. La b na n kẽesa bãmb kom-bɩɩsã tʋʋm-wɛgl pʋga." 
Isaiah31:9 Rabeem na n yõka bãmb pĩigã t'a zoe, la yẽnda nanambsã na n yɛɛsame n zoe n bas b tãb-kaoorã. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Bãmb bugmã bee Sɩyõ la b wʋngã bee Zeruzalɛm." 
Isaiah32:1 Dẽ, rĩma na n dɩɩ naamã ne tɩrlem. La nanambsã na n sooga soolmã ne zemsgo." 
Isaiah32:2 Bãmb ned kam fãa na n yɩɩ wa zĩ-lilldg sobg wakate, la wa soondg zĩig sa-kẽeng wakate, bãmb na n yɩɩ wa ko-soay sẽn zãgsd zĩig sẽn kʋɩ, la wa pĩ-kãseng maasem sẽn buiid tẽn-gãong sẽn yaa koɛɛnga." 
Isaiah32:3 Woto, neb nins sẽn ne wã nin ka na n leb n mum ye, la neb nins tʋb sẽn wʋmdã na n kell n wʋmdame." 
Isaiah32:4 Neb nins sẽn ka yalsd n wʋm yell n tɩg n yaool n goma na n yaas n bao n wʋma a võore. Bidsã zɛlmã na n lakame tɩ b gomd tʋʋlg-tʋʋlga la sõama. 
Isaiah32:5 B kõn leb n bool yalem tɩ nin-sõng ye. La b kõn bool zɩtbã tɩ nin-sõamyã ye. 
Isaiah32:6 Bala, yalem gomda yalem goamã, t'a sũurã tagsd wẽng maanego, la a maanda tʋʋm-dẽgdo, n gomd n paoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yẽnda basda kom sẽn tar b rãmbã tɩ b gãe kom, la a mongd ko-yũud sẽn tar-b rãmbã koom." 
Isaiah32:7 Zãmb soab zab-teed yaa sɩlem-wẽnse. Yẽnda saagda sɩlem saagr n dat n yag zĩrẽ n sãam nimbãan-nebã yelle, baa ne naong rãmb nins sẽn be b bʋʋm zugã." 
Isaiah32:8 La nin-sõng saagda saag-sõmyã, la a ka basd saag-sõmyã tɩ vaal ye." 
Isaiah32:9 Pagb nins sẽn sek b mensã, kelg-y maam! Kom-pugli nins sẽn nand b mensã, yok-y y tʋb n kelg mam koɛɛgã!" 
Isaiah32:10 Ka ne yʋʋmd la rasem bilf sẽn wate, yãmb sẽn nand y mengã, y na n digame. Bala, reezẽ wobr na n sɛɛme, la tigsg kõn leb n zĩnd ye." 
Isaiah32:11 Yãmb a nand-m-mens rãmba, zoe-y rabeem! Yãmb a nand-m-mens rãmba, rig-y ne rabeem! Yees-y y futã n bas y zaala, n dɩk bot n sẽgen y sɛɛga!" 
Isaiah32:12 B yãbdame n wiisdẽ n pĩisd y yãad pʋ-sõama wã yĩnga, la reezẽ tɩɩsã sẽn womdã yĩnga." 
Isaiah32:13 B yãbd n wiisda gõosã ne gõpayãndsã sẽn yit mam nebã tẽn-gãongã zugã yĩnga. B yãbd n wiisda tẽng ning sẽn maand sũ-noog ne a zags nins fãa sẽn dag n kɩdemdã yĩnga.
