Isaiah32:14 Bala, b basa na-yirã, b basa tẽng ning sẽn dag n pid ne nebã, Ofɛll ne gãosgã na n lebga bogd wakat fãa yĩnga. Bãmb na n lebga we-bõens ne rũms wãbneg zĩiga." 
Isaiah32:15 Na n yɩɩ woto hal n tãag Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩɩgã sẽn na n yi yĩngr n sig tõnd zugu, tɩ we-raoog lebg zẽed zĩiga, tɩ zẽed zĩig pag wa kãgre." 
Isaiah32:16 Dẽ, zemsg na n zĩnda we-raoogẽ wã, la tɩrlem na n zĩnda zẽedã zĩigẽ." 
Isaiah32:17 Tɩrlmã tʋʋmd na n yɩɩ vɩ-bãane, la tɩrlmã tʋʋmd biis yaa yam-gãnega, la vɩ-bãan wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga." 
Isaiah32:18 Mam nebã na n zĩnda vɩ-bãan zĩig pʋga, n vɩɩmd rot sẽn tar gũudum pʋga, n zĩnd zĩis sẽn tar vʋʋsgo, la yĩn-maasem pʋga." 
Isaiah32:19 La sapɩlem n na n sãam kãgrã, la tẽngã na n lʋɩɩ tẽng zãnga." 
Isaiah32:20 Yãmb na n paama sũ-noogo, yãmb na n bʋda koom sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, la yãmb na n basa y niigã ne y bõensã n ka loe ye." 
Isaiah33:1 Fo sẽn sãamd neb a taaba, tɩ b yaool n ka sãam foomã, la f zãmbd neb a taab tɩ b ka zãmb foomã, fo na n paama toogo! Fo sã n wa sãam neb a taabã n sɛ, b na n sãama foom. Fo sã n wa zãmb neb a taabã n sɛ, b na n zãmba foom." 
Isaiah33:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega! Tõnd dɩka d teegrã n teeg yãmba. Bɩ y yɩ tõnd pãng yibeoog fãa, la y yɩ tõnd fãagr d yel-pakr wakate!" 
Isaiah33:3 Bʋrgã rãamd kɩtame tɩ nebã zoetẽ. Yãmb sã n yiki, buud toay-toayã sãeegdame." 
Isaiah33:4 B zɛɛda yãmb paoongã wa sʋy sẽn dɩt koodo. B rengda taab wa sʋy sẽn dengd taab to-to wã. 
Isaiah33:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽkame n yɩɩd fãa, bala, bãmb bee hal yĩngri. Bãmb pidsa Sɩyõ ne zemsgo la tɩrlem." 
Isaiah33:6 Yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã, yãmb na n vɩɩmda ne bãane. Yam ne Wẽnnaam bãngr na n yɩɩ arzɛk sẽn fãagd yãmba. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoees yaa laogo." 
Isaiah33:7 Ade, gãndaadã bee yɩng n wiisdẽ. Vɩ-bãan koe-toagsdbã yãbdame n wiisdẽ." 
Isaiah33:8 Soayã kell n paa vɩɩdo. So-loaadb ka leb n beẽ ye. Na-toaagã sãama kaoolã, yẽnda paooga tẽmsã, la a ka nand ned ba a yembr ye." 
Isaiah33:9 Tẽngã bee sũ-sãang pʋga, la a sãamdame. Yãnd tara Libã tãngã t'a kʋɩtẽ. Saaron tẽn-nabdrã lebga wa rasempʋɩɩga. Basã ne Karmell tɩɩsã vãad sʋʋgame." 
Isaiah33:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Moasã, mam na n yikame, moasã, mam na n yalsa yĩngri, moasã, mam na n paama zẽkre." 
Isaiah33:11 Yãmb dɩka mo-pui pʋga, yãmb na n doga moogo. Yãmb vʋʋsmã yaa wa bugum, la a na n dɩɩ yãmba." 
Isaiah33:12 Nebã na n yɩɩ wa kõab sẽn dɩ bugum wʋng pʋga, b na n yɩɩ wa b sẽn kɛ gõos n ning bugmẽ." 
Isaiah33:13 Yãmb dãmb sẽn be zĩ-zãrgẽ, kelg-y mam sẽn maan bũmb ningã! La yãmb dãmb sẽn pẽ wã, ges-y mam pãngã sẽn tõe n maan bũmb ninga!" 
Isaiah33:14 Rabeem kẽe yel-wẽn-maandbã sẽn be Sɩyõ wã, wẽn-kɩɩsdbã rigdame. Ãnda n be tõnd sʋkã n tõe n yals bugum ning sẽn dɩt-a wã taoore? Ãnda n be tõnd sʋkã n tõe n yals bug-saal ning sẽn ka tol n kiidẽ wã taoore?" 
Isaiah33:15 Yaa ned ning sẽn kẽnd-a ne tɩrlem, la a gomd sɩda, n ka baood n maan zãmb n paam paoongo, la a pĩmsd a nus n ka rat n deeg zãmb kũuni, n yẽt a tʋb n ka rat n wʋm tɩ b gomd zɩɩm daagr yelle, la a mumd a nin n ka rat n ges sẽn yaa wẽng ye." 
Isaiah33:16 Nin-kãngã soab na n zĩnda zĩ-zãonglsẽ. Pĩis sẽn tar pãng na n yɩɩ yẽnda pãng zĩiga. B na n kõo yẽnda rɩɩbo, la koom kõn paoog-a ye.»" 
Isaiah33:17 Fo nin na n yãnda rĩma b ziirã pʋga, bãmb na n yãnda tẽngã ne a yalmã fãa." 
Isaiah33:18 Fo na n tagsa bũmb ning sẽn kẽes foom dabeemã yelle. Seb-gʋndã bee yɛɛnẽ? Yaood dɛɛgdã bee yɛɛnẽ? Sẽn dag n gilgd-a n get gãsdã bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Isaiah33:19 Fo kõn leb n yãnd buud ning sẽn yaa tɩta-nedã ye, buud ning sẽn gomd tɩ ned ka wʋmdẽ wã, buud sẽn gomd gom-zẽng tɩ ned ka wʋmdẽ wã." 
Isaiah33:20 Ges Sɩyõ, tẽng ning pʋg tõnd sẽn maand d tigã! Fo nin na n yãnda Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa yam-gãneg tẽngã. Yaa fu-roog sẽn kõn tol n viigi, b kõn tol n leb n vigs biili wã ye. La b kõn tol n leb n logs a wĩyã ye." 
Isaiah33:21 Sɩdã, yaa tẽn-kãng pʋg la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wilg b sõmblem tõnd yĩnga. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ d zĩigã lebg kʋɩlse, n tar ko-so-yalemse, n yaa zĩig zabr koom kogend sẽn kõn tũ ye, la koom kogl-bɛd ka na n pɩʋʋg-a ye." 
Isaiah33:22 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd bʋ-kaooda, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd naaba, yaa bãmb n yaa tõnd dĩma. Bãmb n yaa tõnd fãagda." 
Isaiah33:23 Fo wĩyã yolsame. B ka leb n sẽb kãenkãe ne tãb-kaoor daoogã ye, b ka leb n tar bãmb n loet kogendã pɛɛlã n tẽegdẽ ye. Dẽ, b na n pʋɩɩ taab te-zɛɛdem wʋsgo. Koms-rãmbã meng na n naag n zɛɛ teedã." 
Isaiah33:24 La tẽngã ned kõn yeel t'a ka keem ye! Neb nins sẽn be tẽn-kãng pʋgã na n paama b kongrã sugri. 
Isaiah34:1 Buud toay-toayã, kolg-y n kelg-y-yã! Neba, yok-y y tʋb n kelge! Bɩ tẽngã ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã kelge, la bɩ dũniyã ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn yit yẽnda pʋgẽ wã kelge!" 
Isaiah34:2 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã na n siga buudã fãa zugu, la bãmb sũ-kãbrã na n siga b tãb-biisã fãa zugu. Bãmb na n sãam-b-la zãnga, b na n kʋʋ bãmba." 
Isaiah34:3 B na n wʋka bãmb kũumã n lobe, bãmb kũumã yũug rukdame, la bãmb zɩɩmã na n zoee tãmsã zutu." 
Isaiah34:4 Ãdsã sẽn be yĩngrã fãa na n far n dʋʋgame. B na n pila sa-gãongã wa seb-vãoogo, la yẽnda tãb-biisã na n sʋʋga wa reezẽ tɩɩg bɩ kankang vãad sẽn sʋʋgdã." 
Isaiah34:5 Bala, mam zabr sʋʋgã tɩga zɩɩm saasẽ, la a sigda Edom zugu, a sigda neb nins mam sẽn na n sãam zãngã zugu, n kao b bʋʋdo." 
Isaiah34:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zabr sʋʋgã pida ne zɩɩm, kaam mad-a lame, yaa pe-ribli wã ne boeesã zɩɩm, kaamã yaa pe-raadã yiim kaam. Bala, b na n maana maoong Bosra Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la koodg wʋsg n na n zĩnd Edom tẽngã." 
Isaiah34:7 We-niigã na n naaga bãmb n ki, la nag-yãansã ne lolsã na n kiime. Bãmb tẽn-gãongã yũu zɩɩm, la kaam madga a tomã." 
Isaiah34:8 Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-dokr daare, yaa yʋʋmd b sẽn na n sɩbg sẽn nams-b Sɩyõ wã n lebse." 
Isaiah34:9 Edom ko-soodã na n gãnega sũudu, t'a tẽngã tom rɩ bugum wa kidbri. A tẽn-gãongã na n koka bugum wa sũudu sẽn dɩt bugum." 
Isaiah34:10 La a na n wita wĩndg ne yʋng n ka kiidẽ ye. Tẽngã bug-zõosã na n dukda wakat fãa. Tẽn-kãng na n kell n yɩɩ raboog zamaan woo zamaane, la ned kõn leb n pɩʋʋg a pʋgẽ ye." 
Isaiah34:11 Tẽngã na n lebga bakard ne yʋgempɛl zĩiga. Be na n lebga viut ne gãabd gãag zĩiga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tẽega sãoong wiirã n mak-a, la b kɩt t'a lebg vɩ-raoogo." 
Isaiah34:12 Nanambsã kõn leb n zĩnd beenẽ n kos rĩm ye. B nanambsã fãa ba a yembr kõn leb n zĩnd ye. 
Isaiah34:13 Gõos na n yi a na-yiyã pʋse, sɩlg-nao-yẽes ne gõpayãnds na n yii b tãn-soben-dotã pʋse. Beenẽ na n lebga we-baas zĩiga, la naneend gãag zĩiga." 
Isaiah34:14 We-yũus ne kata na n segda taab beenẽ, la boees na n yãbda beenẽ n boond taaba. Zĩ-kãng na n lebga yʋng zĩn-dãmb sõasg zĩiga, b na n kẽnd n vʋʋsda beenẽ." 
Isaiah34:15 Waaf na n maana a põk beenẽ n lob a gɛla, a na n põgend-b lame n wek a kamba. Yɩbrendã na n tigma taab beenẽ." 
Isaiah34:16 Bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sebrã n karme! Gom-bãmb ba a yembr ka na n paoog ye. Bala, yaa bãmb meng noor n yeele, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩɩgã n na n tigim-ba." 
Isaiah34:17 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan poeer bãmb yĩnga, la yaa bãmb meng nug n dɩk wĩir n mak tẽn-kãngã. Bãmb na n soog-a-la wakat fãa yĩnga, la b na n paa beenẽ zamaan woo zamaane." 
Isaiah35:1 We-raoogã ne tẽng ning sẽn kʋɩ wã na n maana sũ-noogo. Zĩ-koɛɛngã na n kɩdma ne sũ-noog n ning puud wa sõse. 
Isaiah35:2 A na n ninga puud wʋsg n kɩdem n lange, n yɩɩl kɩdengo, la ne sũ-noog kaasgo. B na n kõo yẽnda Libã ziirã, la a na n paama Karmell ne Saaron neermã. Bãmb na n yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã, b na n yãnda tõnd Wẽnnaamã neermã." 
Isaiah35:3 Keng-y nus nins sẽn ka tar pãngã, la paas-y rũm nins sẽn keoosdã pãnga." 
Isaiah35:4 Yeel-y neb nins pelens sẽn yɩgdã yaa: «Keng-y y mens n da zoe rabeem ye. Ade, yãmb Wẽnnaamã bee ka! Sũ-dokrã ne Wẽnnaam keoorã watame. Bãmb na n waa b toor n wa fãag yãmba." 
Isaiah35:5 Dẽ, zoens nin na n pugsame, la wʋms tʋb na n yoosame." 
Isaiah35:6 Dẽ, woabg na n yɩk n tiimsa wa yĩisri, la mugs zɛlmã na n lakame tɩ b kaas ne sũ-noogo. Bala, koom na n pusga we-raoogẽ, la ko-soay na n zoee zĩ-koɛɛngã pʋga." 
Isaiah35:7 Rasempʋɩɩg na n lebga bãoogo, la tẽn-koɛɛng na n lebga ko-budum zĩiga. Zĩig ning sẽn dag n yaa we-baas gãag zĩigã, a na n lebga tãnwĩis ne rudum zĩiga." 
Isaiah35:8 B na n tuka so-kõodr beenẽ, n pʋd sorã yʋʋr tɩ ‹sor sẽn welg toore. Ned ning sẽn yaa rẽgd ka rɩkd so-kãng ye. So-kãng yaa sẽn tũud-b yẽnda wã yĩnga, la yalembã sã n dɩk so-kãnga, b ka na n menem ye." 
Isaiah35:9 Gɩgmã ka na n leb n zĩnd so-kãng zug ye. Rũm-toos ka na n wa so-kãng pʋg ye, b kõn tol n leb n yãnd bãmb beenẽ ye. Yaa neb nins sẽn paam fãagrã bal n na n kẽn beenẽ." 
Isaiah35:10 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yols-b rãmbã na n lebg n waame. Bãmb na n lebg n waa Sɩyõ ne sũ-noog kaasgo. Bãmb nensã na n pɩla ne sũ-noog wakat sẽn kõn sa. Kɩdeng ne sũ-noog na n wa sega bãmba, la sũ-pa-noaang ne sidgr na n zoe n baoo zĩiga.»" 
Isaiah36:1 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a naaslẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib wa n zaba ne Zʋʋda tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã n deeg-ba." 
Isaiah36:2 Asiiri rĩmã zĩnda Lakiis n tʋm a tãb-biis naabã ne tãb-biis wʋsgã rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ Zeruzalɛm. La tãb-biis naabã kẽng n tɩ yalsa ko-bao-kãsengã sẽn beẽ wã, ga-loasdã pʋʋg sor zugu." 
Isaiah36:3 Dẽ, a Hilkiiza biig a Eliyakim sẽn yaa rĩm a Ezekɩyaas balem-naabã, ne a Sebna sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã, la a Azaf biig a Yoa sẽn yaa seb-bĩngdã yiime n seg Asiiri rĩmã tãb-biis naabã." 
Isaiah36:4 La tãb-biis naabã yeela bãmb yaa: «M kotame tɩ y yeel a Ezekɩyaas woto: ‹Ade, rĩm-kãsengã sẽn yaa Asiiri rĩmã yetame: Fo teega bõe?" 
Isaiah36:5 Mam yeta foom, fo tẽedame tɩ gom-vɩɩd kõta sagls ne pãng tɩ f tõe n kẽng zabr bɩ? Moasã wã, yaa ãnda la fo teeg n yik n dat n kɩɩs maam?›" 
Isaiah36:6 Gese, fo rɩka f teegrã n teeg Ezɩpte, Ezɩpt yaool n yaa wa tãnwĩ-kaoongo, n kõsd ned ning fãa sẽn tik yẽnda wã nugu. Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ maanda a woto ne neb nins fãa sẽn dɩk b teegr n teeg yẽnda wã.»" 
Isaiah36:7 Daar ninga, fo na n yeela maam yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã la tõnd teeg yã. La ka Wẽnnaam-kãng maoong kʋʋb zĩisã ne a tẽn-kugã la a Ezekɩyaas sẽn dag n sãam n bas tẽn-kugr a yembr n yeel Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã tɩ yaa tẽn-kug-kãng taoor la b na n wõgemded n waoogd Wẽnnaamã la!" 
Isaiah36:8 Moasã, mam kota foom, tɩ f maan sard ne mam soaalã sẽn yaa Asiiri rĩmã, la sã n mikame tɩ yãmb tara wed-rʋʋdb sẽn tõe n zomb wiidi, mam na n kõo yãmb wiid tus a yiibu." 
Isaiah36:9 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb tõe n diga mam soaalã tʋmtʋmd ning sẽn yaa-a bilf n yɩɩdã meng t'a serge? Yãmb sẽn teeg Ezɩptã yaa b sẽn tar saar-dãmb ne wed-rʋʋdbã yĩnga." 
Isaiah36:10 Sẽn paas me, yãmb tẽedame tɩ maam n soog m meng n wa zab ne tẽn-kãngã n sãam-a tɩ ka tũ ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab raab la? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel maam yaa: ‹Zab ne tẽn-kãngã n sãam-a.› »" 
Isaiah36:11 A Eliyakim ne a Sebna la a Yoa yeela sõgen-kãsengã yaa: «Tõnd kotame tɩ y gom ne tõnd ne Aram-dãmbã goamã, tɩ tõnd wʋmdame. Da gom-y ne tõnd ne Zʋʋda nebã goam tɩ neb nins sẽn be lalgã zugã wa wʋm ye.»" 
Isaiah36:12 Sõgen-kãsengã yeela bãmb yaa: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ mam soaalã koɛɛgã yaa yãmb ne y soaalã yĩng bal la? Koɛɛgã yaa neb nins sẽn be-b lalgã zugã me yĩnga. Bãmb ne yãmb na n dɩ y bĩndã la y yũ y rʋʋd-koomã.» 
Isaiah36:13 Dẽ, sõgen-kãsengã yaasa yĩngr n zẽk a koɛɛg n gom ne Zʋʋda buudã goam n yeele: «Kelg-y Asiiri rĩmã sẽn yaa rĩm-kãsengã koɛɛga." 
Isaiah36:14 Asiiri rĩmã yetame: ‹Ra sak-y t'a Ezekɩyaas belg yãmb ye. Bala, yẽnda ka tõe n fãag yãmb ye." 
Isaiah36:15 Da bas-y t'a belg yãmb tɩ y wa tẽed tɩ y sã n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b na n fãaga yãmba, la b ka na n sak tɩ Asiiri rĩmã tõog yãmb tẽngã ye." 
Isaiah36:16 Da kelg-y rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ye.› Asiiri rĩmã yetame: ‹Bɩ y bao zems-n-taar ne maam. Bas-y tɩ m soog-yã. Woto, yãmb ned kam fãa na n dɩ a reezẽ tɩɩsã biis ne a kankamã, la a tõog n yũ a bulgã koom," 
Isaiah36:17 hal tɩ mam wa tall yãmb n kẽng tẽng sẽn wẽnd yãmb tẽngã. Yaa tẽng sẽn tar bɩle ne reezẽ rãam, la rɩɩb ne reezẽ tɩɩse." 
Isaiah36:18 Da sak-y t'a Ezekɩyaas belg yãmb n yeel tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n fãag-y lame ye. Rẽ yĩnga, buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmb tõog n fãag-b-la Asiiri rĩmã nugẽ sɩda?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamat-rãmbã ne Arpaad nebã wẽnnaam-dãmb bee yɛɛnẽ? Sefarvayim wẽnnaam-dãmbã bee yɛɛnẽ? Wẽnnaam-kãens tõog n fãaga Samaari tẽngã mam nugẽ sɩda? 
Isaiah36:20 Tẽn-bãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, Wẽnnaam bʋg n tõog n fãag a tẽng mam nugẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wa tõog n fãag Zeruzalɛm mam nugẽ?»" 
Isaiah36:21 Dẽ, bãmb sĩnda b noore, n ka leok yẽnda tɩ bũmb ye. Bala, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas rag n yeelame yaa: «Da leok-y-yã-a ye.»" 
Isaiah36:22 A Hilkiiza biig a Eliyakim sẽn yaa na-yirã zak naabã, ne a Sebna sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã ne a Azaf biig a Yoa sẽn yaa seb-bĩngdã pãrsa b futu, n lebg n leb rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ, n tɩ togs-a goam nins fãa Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã sẽn gomã." 
Isaiah37:1 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã wã, a pãrsa a fut n yeelg boto, n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
Isaiah37:2 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas tʋma a Eliyakim sẽn yaa na-yirã zak naabã ne a Sebna sẽn yaa seb-gʋndã, la maan-kʋʋdbã kãsem-dãmbã, a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã nengẽ. La b fãa yeelga bot n kẽnge." 
Isaiah37:3 Bãmb yeela a Ezayi yaa: «A Ezekɩyaas yeelame: ‹Rũndã daarã yaa yel-pakr daare, sɩbgr la yãnd daare. Bala, rogem daar taame, la pãng ka be n na n dog ye." 
Isaiah37:4 Daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n wʋma goamã Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã b sẽn tʋm t'a wa tʋʋs Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã to-to wã. Tõeeme tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã na n sɩbg-b-la goam nins yẽnda sẽn gom tɩ bãmb wʋma yĩnga. Woto wã, bɩ y pʋʋs Wẽnnaam neb nins sẽn ketã yĩnga.»" 
Isaiah37:5 Dẽ, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn tʋm b rãmbã kẽnga Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi nengẽ." 
Isaiah37:6 La a Ezayi yeela bãmb yaa: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n kẽng n tɩ yeel y soaalã bũmb ninga: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Da zoe rabeem ne goam nins Asiiri rĩmã tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn gom n paoog maam tɩ fo wʋmã ye. 
Isaiah37:7 Gese, mam na n tʋma sɩɩg yẽnda nengẽ. Yẽnda na n wʋma yell kibare n lebg n leb a tẽngẽ wã, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ yẽnda beenẽ ne zabr sʋʋga.› »" 
Isaiah37:8 Asiiri rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã wʋmame t'a soaalã yii Lakɩɩse, n na n tɩ zab ne Libna tẽngã. La yẽnda kẽng n tɩ paam-a-la beenẽ." 
Isaiah37:9 Dẽ, Asiiri rĩmã wʋmame tɩ b yetẽ tɩ Kuus tẽng rĩm a Tiraka watame n na n wa zab ne yẽnda. La Asiiri rĩmã sẽn wʋm woto, a tʋma koe-toagsdb rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a yaa:" 
Isaiah37:10 «Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas yaa: Ra bas tɩ Wẽnnaam ning fo sẽn teegã belg foom, n yeel tɩ Asiiri rĩmã kõn tõog n deeg Zeruzalɛm ye!»" 
Isaiah37:11 Fo mengã wʋma Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã sẽn dag n maan tẽms a taabã fãa bũmb ningã. B sãam-b-la zãnga. Tɩ fo tagsdẽ tɩ f na n põsame! 
Isaiah37:12 Dẽ yĩnga, Goozã ne Haarã la Retsɛf ne Edɛn nebã sẽn be Telasaarã, sẽn yaa buud toay-toay nins mam ba-rãmbã sẽn sãamã wẽnnaam-dãmb tõog n fãag-b lame sɩda?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamat rĩmã ne Arpaad rĩmã la Sefarvayim tẽng rĩmã ne Hena rĩma la Iva rĩmã bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Isaiah37:14 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas reega sebrã koe-toagsdbã nugẽ n karme, la a yik n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã n tɩ lak sebrã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Isaiah37:15 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: 
Isaiah37:16 «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaam, n zao serubẽ-rãmb zugu, yaa yãmb y yembr bal n yaa dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽnga." 
Isaiah37:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelge! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, puk-y y nin n gese! Kelg-y goam nins fãa a Senakeriib sẽn tʋm n tʋʋsd yãmb a Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ wã!" 
Isaiah37:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa sɩd tɩ Asiiri rĩm-dãmbã sãama soolem-dãmbã ne b tẽmsã zãnga," 
Isaiah37:19 n wʋk b wẽnnaam-dãmbã n yõog bugum, n menes-b zãnga. Sɩdã, wẽnnaam-bãmb rag n ka wẽnnaam-dãmb sɩd-sɩd ye. Bala, rag n yaa raad ne kug wẽn-naands ninsaalb nus sẽn maane." 
Isaiah37:20 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, fãag-y tõnd a Senakeriib nugẽ, tɩ dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa bãng tɩ yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab y yembr bal n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!»" 
Isaiah37:21 Dẽ, a Amots biig a Ezayi tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel rĩm a Ezekɩyaas yaa: «Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, fo sẽn pʋʋs a soab Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib wɛɛngẽ wã la woto:" 
Isaiah37:22 Ad sɩbgr gomd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom yẽnda wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: ‹Sɩyõ tẽn-neere, a yaanda foom, la a paoogd foom, Zeruzalɛm tẽn-neere, a bee fo poorẽ n gõmsda a zugu." 
Isaiah37:23 Yaa ãnda la fo sẽn tʋʋs la f paoogã? Yaa ne ãnda la fo sẽn zẽk f koɛɛgã? Fo zẽka f neng yĩngr n zabd ne Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã! 
Isaiah37:24 Fo tũnuga f tʋmtʋmdbã n paoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: Mam sẽn tar saar-dãmb wʋsgã yĩnga, mam tõog n dʋʋ tãms sẽn lug zutu, n tõog n ta hal Libã yaangã. Mam kɛɛ yẽnda sɛɛdr tɩ-wogdã, ne a sɩprɛs tɩɩs nins sẽn yaa neeb n yɩɩdã, mam tãaga a yaoolem tʋg-bɛdã sẽn be tãmsã zutã." 
Isaiah37:25 Mam tuu buls n yũ b koom, mam nao na n kʋɩɩsa Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã fãa koom." 
Isaiah37:26 Fo ka bãng tɩ yaa hal daar zãr la mam segl bõn-kãensã, la mam maana bãmb hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ? Moasã, mam kɩtdame tɩ b paamd pidsgu, fo tʋʋmd yaa f kɩt tɩ tẽms nins sẽn tar pãngã lebg raboodo." 
Isaiah37:27 Tẽn-bãmb nebã ka tar pãng ye, rabeem la yãnd n tar-ba. Bãmb wẽnda wa moog sẽn be weoogẽ, la wa mo-maasa, la wa gãosg zug moogo, la wa weoog pʋgẽ moog sẽn kʋɩ n ka paam n bɩ ye." 
Isaiah37:28 Gese, mam mii fo zĩndg wakate, la f yiib ne f kõom wakate. Mam leb n mii wakat ning fo sẽn gʋngde, n dat n zab ne maamã." 
Isaiah37:29 Bala, fo yika f sũur ne maam, la fo wuk-m-men-goamã zẽk n taa mam tʋbẽ, mam na n dɩka m bãngã n sog fo yõorã, la m ning fo noorã salbre, n kɩt tɩ f lebg n tũ sor ning fo sẽn tũ n wa wã n lebe.› »" 
Isaiah37:30 Ad bãnd ning mam sẽn kõt foom a Ezekɩyaase: Rõandã, nebã na n dɩɩ ka-yiisdim, la vẽere, b na n dɩɩ ka-yogdo, la yʋʋm-yɩta, bʋd-y-yã la y tigsi, la y sel reezẽ tɩɩs n dɩ b biisi." 
Isaiah37:31 Neb nins sẽn põs Zʋʋda buudã sʋk n ketẽ wã, na n kɩɩ yẽg tẽn-gãongã pʋga, la b na n woma biis b wilã zutu." 
Isaiah37:32 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã nonglem-kãsengã na n kɩtame tɩ bu-kell yi Zeruzalɛm, la tɩ neb sẽn põs yi Sɩyõ tãngã zugu." 
Isaiah37:33 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab gom Asiiri rĩmã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: ‹Yẽnda ka na n kẽ tẽn-kãngã pʋg ye, la a kõn tol n tão peemd ye. Yẽnda kõn tol n zẽk a gãong ye, la a kõn tol n zam tom-dʋr n zab ne-a ye." 
Isaiah37:34 Yẽnda sẽn tũ sor ning n wa wã, a na n lebg n tũu so-kãng n lebe, la yẽnda kõn tol n kẽ tẽn-kãngã pʋg ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah37:35 Mam na n kogla tẽn-kãngã n fãag-a, mam mengã yʋʋrã yĩnga, la m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yĩnga.›" 
Isaiah37:36 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yiime n kẽng Asiiri nebã tãb-sikẽ, n tɩ kʋ raop tus koabg la pis-nii la a nu. B sẽn yik yibeoogo, b mikame tɩ bãmb fãa yaa kũum n dʋrẽ!" 
Isaiah37:37 Dẽ, Asiiri rĩm a Senakeriib lebg n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Niniivi." 
Isaiah37:38 La yẽnda sẽn wa n be a wẽn-naandg a Nisrok pʋʋsg roogẽ wã, yẽnda kambã, a Adarmelɛk ne a Sarɛtsɛɛr kẽng n tɩ kʋ-a-la ne zabr sʋʋga, la b bas n zoe n kẽng Araara tẽnga. La a biig a Asaradon n led yẽnda zĩigẽ n lebg rĩma." 
Isaiah38:1 Wakat-kãnga, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas lʋɩɩ bãag sẽn dat n kʋ-a. La a Amots biig a Ezayi sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã wa n yeel-a lame yaa: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Maneg f zakã yɛla. Bala, fo ka na n leb n vɩɩmd ye. Fo na n kiime.»" 
Isaiah38:2 Rĩm a Ezekɩyaas wẽnemda a neng n tees roogã lalgã, n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele:" 
Isaiah38:3 Yẽnda pʋʋsame n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m kotame tɩ y tẽeg m yelle, m kotame tɩ y tẽeg tɩ mam dag n tũuda yãmb ne sɩda la ne m sũur fãa, la mam maana sẽn noom yãmba!» La a Ezekɩyaas yãba nintãm wʋsgo." 
Isaiah38:4 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Ezayi n yeele:" 
Isaiah38:5 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Ezekɩyaas tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda ba a Davɩɩd Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam wʋma fo pʋʋsgã, mam yãnda fo nintãmã. Mam paasda fo vɩɩmã yʋʋm piig la a nu." 
Isaiah38:6 Mam na n fãaga foom ne tẽn-kãngã Asiiri rĩmã nugẽ. Mam na n kogla tẽn-kãngã.› » 
Isaiah38:7 A Ezayi yeelame: «Ad bãnd ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõt foom n wilgdẽ tɩ b na n maana wa b sẽn yeelã: 
Isaiah38:8 ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ wĩndgã targe, tɩ maasmã leb poorẽ nao-yakem piig a Akaaz rʋʋdgã zugu. La wĩndgã targ n leba poorẽ nao-yakem piig rʋʋdgã zugu.› »" 
Isaiah38:9 Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sũur gomde. Yaa yẽnda sẽn lʋɩ bãagã n ka ki wã poore. 
Isaiah38:10 Mam dag n yeta m meng yaa: «Mam vɩɩmã sẽn wa n noomẽ wã, la mam na n loog n kẽng kɩɩm-kulg rignoorẽ. Mam ka paam m yʋʋmã sẽn ketã ye!»" 
Isaiah38:11 Mam dag n yetame: «Mam ka na n tol n leb n yãnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab nin-vɩɩs sʋk dũni ka ye. Mam ka na n leb n yãnd ned ninsaalb sʋk dũni ka ye! 
Isaiah38:12 B viiga mam doogã n zãag ne maam, wa b sẽn viig pe-kɩɩm fu-roogo. Mam vɩɩmã tata a tɛk wa sʋn-wʋgd sẽn wãagd a gĩsga. B yiisa maam m tʋʋmd pʋga. Wĩndg sẽn wat n na n kẽ tɩ yãmb baasa maam!" 
Isaiah38:13 Beoogã ne a na n vẽege, tɩ yãmb baasa maam. Bãmb wõra mam kõabã wa gɩgemd sẽn wõrd kõaba. Wĩndg sẽn wat n na n kẽ tɩ yãmb baasa maam!" 
Isaiah38:14 Mam fɩɩnda wa sɩlaalle, mam wũusda wa manwalle. M nimbãanega pʋga, mam zẽkda m neng yĩngri. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, sõng-y maam tɩ m namsdame!" 
Isaiah38:15 Mam na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Bãmb leoka maam, la yaa bãmb mengã n maane. Mam na n kẽna ne sik-m-meng m vɩɩmã tɛka, toog sẽn tar maamã yĩnga." 
Isaiah38:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb sõmblmã n kɩtd tɩ nebã vɩ. Bãmb yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam tar vɩɩm. Yãmb leb n vigla maam n kõ maam vɩɩm." 
Isaiah38:17 Mam sũ-sãangã tekame n lebg vɩ-bãane. Yãmb yamã loee ne maam hal tɩ y fãag-m ne yaoogo, bala, yãmb loba mam yel-wẽnã y zãnkuidgẽ." 
Isaiah38:18 Bala, ka kɩɩm-kulg n na pẽg yãmb ye, leb n ka kũum n na n waoog yãmb ye. Neb nins sẽn sigd-b bokẽ wã ka leb n maand tẽeb ne yãmb sɩdã ye." 
Isaiah38:19 Ad yaa nin-vɩɩsã bal n tõe n pẽg yãmb wa mam sẽn pẽgd yãmb dũndã wã. Ba-rãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b kamb bãng yãmb sɩdã. 
Isaiah38:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga maam! Tõnd na n wẽ d yʋʋm-teedã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg daar fãa n tãag d vɩɩmã tɛka.» 
Isaiah38:21 A Ezayi rag n yeelame: «Bao-y kankam-koeems n to n wa bɛ nod-kɛgengã, la a Ezekɩyaas na n põsame.»" 
Isaiah38:22 A Ezekɩyaas rag n sokame tɩ bãnd ning sẽn wilgd tɩ yẽnda na n leb n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã yaa bʋgo. 
Isaiah39:1 Wakat-kãnga, a Baladan biig a Merodak-Baladan sẽn yaa Babilond dĩmã tʋma neb a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ ne sebre, la kũuni. Bala, yẽnda wʋmame t'a Ezekɩyaas lʋɩɩ bãaga, la a leb n paama laafɩ." 
Isaiah39:2 A Ezekɩyaas sũur yɩɩ noog ne bõn-kãnga. Yẽnda wilga b sẽn tʋm-b rãmbã yẽnda arzɛkã bĩngr zĩisã, wanzuri wã ne sãnemã, la parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogã, ne kaam toay-toayã, la ne a zab-teedã fãa bĩngr zĩiga, ne teed nins fãa sẽn be yẽnda laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ wã. Bũmb ka be a Ezekɩyaas zakẽ wã ne a soolmẽ wã, t'a ka wilg neb nins Babilond dĩmã sẽn tʋmã ye." 
Isaiah39:3 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Ezayi waa rĩm a Ezekɩyaas nengẽ n wa yeel-a yaa: «Nin-bãmbã wa n yeelame tɩ bõe? La b yii yɛɛnẽ?» A Ezekɩyaas leokame yaa: «Bãmb yii tẽn-zãrga, b yii Babilond soolmẽ wã n wa n na n yãnd maam.»" 
Isaiah39:4 A Ezayi leb n sokame yaa: «Bãmb yãnda bõe fo zakẽ wã?» La a Ezekɩyaas leokame: «Bãmb yãnda bũmb ning fãa sẽn be mam zakẽ wã. Bũmb ka be mam laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ mam sẽn ka wilg-b ye.» 
Isaiah39:5 Woto, a Ezayi yeela a Ezekɩyaas yaa: «Bɩ y kelg Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã koɛɛga!" 
Isaiah39:6 Daar n wate, tɩ b na n wʋk bũmb ning fãa sẽn be fo zakẽ wã, ne fo yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n bĩng bũmb ning hal tɩ ta rũndã wã n tall n kẽng Babilonde. Bũmb kõn tol n kell ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Isaiah39:7 B na n yõga kom-dibli nins sẽn yaa yãmb meng kom-dogdsã n tall n loog tɩ b tɩ lebg zu-soben-dãmb Babilond dĩmã na-yir pʋga. 
Isaiah39:8 A Ezekɩyaas leoka a Ezayi yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg ning fo sẽn togsã yaa sõama.» A leb n yeelame: «Bala, mam sẽn ket n vɩ wã wakate, na n yɩɩ vɩ-bãane, la laafɩ.»" 
Isaiah40:1 Yãmb Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Bels-y mam nebã, bels-y-ba." 
Isaiah40:2 Gom-y n paas-y Zeruzalɛm daoodo, moon-y n yeel-y t'a yembdã sɛɛme, t'a paama a kongrã sugri, t'a zoe n deega a yel-wẽnã sɩbgr naoor a yiib Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ.»" 
Isaiah40:3 Ned n kelemd n yetẽ: «Tuk-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sor we-raoogã pʋga! Kõog-y so-kõodr tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ wã tõnd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga! 
Isaiah40:4 Bɩ y sĩd londã, la y sarem tãmsã ne kunkubã fãa! Kɩt-y tɩ tãn-bɛda lebg zĩ-pɛɛla, la y kɩt tɩ tãmsã sẽgsã lebg zĩ-yalemse!" 
Isaiah40:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã na n pukame, tɩ nebã fãa naag taab n yãnd-a.» Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng noor n yeele." 
Isaiah40:6 Koɛɛg n yet yaa: «Moone!» Tɩ b soke: «M moon n yeel tɩ bõe?» T'a yeele: «Moon n yeel tɩ ninsaal buud fãa yaa wa moodo, la a neermã fãa wẽnda weoog mo-pui." 
Isaiah40:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sebgã sã n wẽ moodã, a kʋɩtame, la a mo-pui wã zelgdame. Sɩd-sɩdã, nebã wẽnda moodo." 
Isaiah40:8 Mood kʋɩtame, la mo-pui zelgdame. La tõnd Wẽnnaamã gomd paada wakat fãa!»" 
Isaiah40:9 Sɩyõ-rãmba, yãmb sẽn yaa b rãmb sẽn wat ne koe-noogã, rʋ-y tãn-lug-lug zugu. Zeruzalɛm, zẽk f koɛɛg ne pãnga, fo sẽn wat ne koe-noogã. Zẽk f koɛɛg la f ra zoe rabeem ye. Yeel Zʋʋda tẽmsã yaa: «Yãmb Wẽnnaamã beeme!»" 
Isaiah40:10 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab wata ne pãnga, bãmb yãoog pãng tõeeme tɩ b rɩ naam. Ade, bãmb zãada b yaood n watẽ, bãmb keoor dengda bãmb taoore." 
Isaiah40:11 Bãmb dɩlgda b nebã wa pe-kɩɩm sẽn wãbenegd a rũmsi, bãmb na n tẽega b nug n tigim b piisã, n kãag-b n mobg b menga. Bãmb lekda pe-yãansã sẽn yẽsemd kambã." 
Isaiah40:12 Ãnda soab n mak ko-kãsengã ne a nug pʋga? Ãnda n mak yĩngr ne nug-yakemde? Ãnda n mak tẽn-gãongã tom fãa ne makdga? Ãnda n dɩk tãmsã ne kunkubã n ning zɩslem makdg pʋg n make? 
Isaiah40:13 Ãnda n mak Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã, la ãnda n yaa bãmb sagenda?" 
Isaiah40:14 Wẽnnaam zĩnd n yẽsa ne ãnda n na n paam n wʋm bũmb võore? Ãnda n zãms bãmb zemsgo? Ãnda n zãms bãmb bãngre? Ãnda n kɩt tɩ bãmb bãng yam sore? 
Isaiah40:15 Bu-zẽmsã wẽnda wa koom sẽn be yʋʋr pʋg n tosdẽ, bãmb sõorã zemsa wa wubsg sẽn be zɩslem makdg zugu. Tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã yaa faasg wa wubsg sẽn dukda." 
Isaiah40:16 Libã tɩɩsã raad ka sekd bugum yõgneg ye. La a rũmsã ka sekd maoong sẽn yõogd bugum maaneg ye. 
Isaiah40:17 Bu-zẽmsã fãa yaa zaalem bãmb taoore. Bãmb geta bu-zẽmsã wa zaalem la vɩʋʋgo. 
Isaiah40:18 Ãnda la yãmb na n dɩk n mak ne Wẽnnaam? Yãmb na n dɩka bõe n wẽneg Wẽnnaam? 
Isaiah40:19 Tʋʋm-mit n maand bõn-naandga, tɩ yõak bolg-a ne sãnem n bao wanzuri yãmd n ning-a." 
Isaiah40:20 Ned sã n yaa naong soab tɩ looge, n ka tõe n maan kũun-kãnga, a baooda raoog sẽn ka põogda, n kɩs tʋʋm-mit t'a maan bõn-naandg sẽn ka yẽrgda." 
Isaiah40:21 Yãmb ka mi la? Yãmb ka wʋm la? B ka reng n togs yãmb bõn-kãens hal sɩngr wẽndẽ la? Yãmb ka wʋm dũniyã yẽbgr võor la? 
Isaiah40:22 Bãmb bee dũni gilgã zugẽ, n get dũni-kãngã nebã tɩ b yaa wa sʋyã. Bãmb yɛdga sa-gãongã wa peen-faasga, bãmb yɛdg-a lame tɩ lebg wa fu-roog n na n zĩnd a pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah40:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kɩt tɩ nanambs lebg zaalem, n kɩt tɩ dũni bʋ-kaoodb lebg ka võore." 
Isaiah40:24 B sẽn nan ka sel bãmba, la b sẽn nan ka bʋd bãmba, la bãmb sẽn nan ka kɩ yẽga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fʋʋs bãmb zug tɩ b kʋɩ. Sob-kãseng n wa n dɩk bãmb wa moodo." 
Isaiah40:25 Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã sokdame yaa: «Ãnda la y na n dɩk n mak maam, n tags tɩ mam wẽnda a soaba?" 
Isaiah40:26 Zẽk-y y nens n ges yĩngri! Ãnda soab n naan bõn-kãensã fãa n kɩt tɩ b fãa pukd wa tãb-biisi? Bãmb boonda ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre, la yaa ne bãmb pãn-tõ-kãsengã ne b pãn-kãsengã.»" 
Isaiah40:27 A Zakoob yagense, Israyɛll buudu, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ: «Mam beoog vɩɩmã solga ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam sẽn segd n paam bũmb ningã loogdame tɩ mam Wẽnnaamã ka miẽ ye?»" 
Isaiah40:28 Fo ka mi bõn-kãng la? Fo ka wʋm bõn-kãng la? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Wẽnnaamã sẽn paad wakat fãa wã n naan dũniyã ween-vɩɩsã fãa. Bãmb pãng ka sɛta, la b ka yɛɛd me ye. Ned ka tõe n bãng bãmb yamã tɛk ye." 
Isaiah40:29 Bãmb kõta ned ning sẽn yɛ wã pãnga, la ned ning pãng sẽn booge, bãmb paasda a soab pãnga." 
Isaiah40:30 Kom-pogd pãng boogdame tɩ b yɛ, kom-bɩɩs wat n baas n lʋɩɩme." 
Isaiah40:31 Sẽn tẽed-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã pãng palemdame. Bãmb yɩgda wa pa-nand-tugri, bãmb zoetame n ka yɛɛdẽ ye, bãmb kẽndame la b pãng ka sɛt ye!" 
Isaiah41:1 Tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgi, bas-y bʋʋr n kelg maam! Bɩ nebã keng b pelse, bɩ b kolg n gome! Bɩ d kolg n bʋ ne taaba." 
Isaiah41:2 Yaa ãnda n yik yaang raoã sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn paamd tõogr zĩig ning fãa yẽnda naoor sẽn tabgẽ wã? Ãnda n dɩk soolem-dãmb n ning yẽnda nugẽ, la b sik rĩm-dãmbã? Yẽnda zabr sʋʋgã neema bãmb wa wubsgu, yẽnda tãpã kɩtame tɩ bãmb lebg wa mood sobg sẽn dɩkda." 
Isaiah41:3 Raoã rigd-b lame n pɩʋʋg b sʋk n loog ne tõogre, n tũ sor ning yẽnda naoor sẽn zɩ n tabgẽ wã." 
Isaiah41:4 Ãnda n tʋme, ãnda n maan bõn-kãnga? Yaa soab ning sẽn kɩt-a tɩ zamaan fãa be hal sɩngr wẽndẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa dẽenem soaba, la mam bee ne yaoolem-dãmbã me." 
Isaiah41:5 Tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã yãnd-b lame tɩ rabeem yõk-ba. Dũniyã ween-vɩɩsã fãa rigdame. Bãmb fãa kolgdame, b watame." 
Isaiah41:6 Bãmb sõngda taaba, tɩ ned kam fãa yet a to yaa: «Keng f pɛlga!»" 
Isaiah41:7 Tʋʋm-mit paasda sẽn yẽnegd-a kutã raoodo. Sẽn zãad-a zãar n kutẽ wã paasda a to pãnga. Yẽnda yeta sẽn sũgunda wã yaa: «Yaa sõama» La bãmb kaada wẽn-naandgã ne põent-rãmba, sẽn na n yɩl t'a ra miim ye." 
Isaiah41:8 La foom a Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã, foom a Zakoob mam sẽn yãkã, fo yaa mam zoa a Abrahaam yagenga!" 
Isaiah41:9 Maam n yãk foom dũniyã ween-vɩɩsã fãa pʋgẽ, la m bool foom tɩ f yi zĩ-zãrsẽ n wa, n yeel foom yaa: «Fo yaa mam tʋmtʋmda, maam n yãk foom, mam kõn bas foom ye!" 
Isaiah41:10 Da zoe rabeem ye, bala, mam bee ne foom. Da maan yɩɩr ye, bala, mam yaa fo Wẽnnaam. Mam kõta foom pãnga, la m na n wa sõnga foom, mam na n tebenda foom ne m nug-rɩtg sẽn tõogdã." 
Isaiah41:11 Neb nins fãa sũy sẽn puud ne foomã na n paama yãnd ne paoogre. Sẽn zabd-b ne foomã na n lebga zaalem n meneme. 
Isaiah41:12 Fo na n gẽesa f zabd-n-taasã n ka yãnd ye, B na n sãama bãmb tɩ b lebg zaalem la vɩʋʋgo." 
Isaiah41:13 Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaam, soab ning sẽn gãta fo nug-rɩtg n yet-f yaa: Da zoe rabeem ye. Mam wat n na n sõnga foom." 
Isaiah41:14 Zakoobe, fo sẽn yaa wa zũnzuur balã, da zoe rabeem ye, Israyɛlle, fo yaa zũnzuur bala. Mam wa n na n sõnga foom. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo fãagda, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã n yeele." 
Isaiah41:15 Gese, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yɩ wa soang b sẽn toose, n yaa paalle, n tar noy a yiib sẽn dɩte. Fo na n wãame, la f neem tãmse, fo na n kɩtame tɩ kunkub lebg wa wudgu." 
Isaiah41:16 Fo na n yelga bãmb tɩ sobg rɩk n looge, sob-kãseng na n sãeega bãmba. La sã n yaa ne foom, fo na n maana sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Fo na n kɩdma Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yĩnga." 
Isaiah41:17 Nimbãan-nebã ne naong rãmbã baooda koom n ka paamdẽ ye. Ko-yũud kʋɩɩsa bãmb zɛlma. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leoka bãmba. Maam a Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ka na n bas-b ye. 
Isaiah41:18 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kʋɩls ko-zoetem pus n yi soay kɩremse, la m kɩt tɩ ko-budum yi tãms lond pʋse. Mam na n teka we-raoogã t'a lebg kʋɩlga, la m tek tẽn-koɛɛngã t'a lebg ko-budum zĩiga." 
Isaiah41:19 Mam na n sela sɛɛdr tɩɩse, ne akasɩya tɩɩse, la miir la oliiv tɩɩs we-raoogã pʋga. Mam na n lagma sɩprɛs tɩɩse, orme tɩɩs ne tɩɩs buud toay-toay n sel Araba tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ zugu." 
Isaiah41:20 Tɩ bãmb fãa tõe n yãnd la b bãnge, la b naag taab n tags n bãng tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug n maan bõn-kãng fãa, la b tõe n bãng tɩ yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã n naan yẽnda.»" 
Isaiah41:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «gom-y n fãag-y y menga. A zakoob rĩmã yetame yaa: ‹wa-y ne kaseto. 
Isaiah41:22 Bɩ b kolg n gome. La bɩ b togs tõnd bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩndi. Togs-y sẽn loog pĩnda, Togs-y tõnd bũmb ning sẽn zĩnd pĩnda, dẽ, tõnd na n tags n bãnga sẽn wate. Wall y wilg tõnd yɛl nins sẽn wate." 
Isaiah41:23 Togs-y bũmb nins sẽn nan be taoor n watẽ wã, dẽ, tõnd na n bãngame tɩ yãmb yaa wẽnnaam-dãmba. Bɩ y maan bũmb sẽn yaa sõama bɩ wẽnga, tɩ tõnd fãa tõe n puk d nin n yãnde." 
Isaiah41:24 Gese, yãmb yaa zaalem bala, la yãmb tʋʋmã me yaa zaalem tɩ ned ka mi-b ye. Sẽn yãk-a yãmb tɩ y yaa a wẽnnaamã maana yel-beedo." 
Isaiah41:25 Mam kɩtame tɩ ned yi hal nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ n wa. Sẽn yit-a hal yaangã pʋʋsda ne mam yʋʋre, yẽnda na n taba nanambsã wa tãndo, a na n tab-b-la wa yagb sẽn tabd yagd to-to wã." 
Isaiah41:26 Ãnda n togs-a hal sɩngr wẽndẽ tɩ tõnd bãng tɩ ket n zãra? Ãnda n togs bõn-kãng tɩ tõnd bãng n yeel tɩ yaa tɩrga? Ned ba a yembr ka togs-a ye, ned ka maan tɩ d wʋm ye, la ned ka wʋmd yãmb goam ye.»" 
Isaiah41:27 Soab ning sẽn yɩ-a pipi n wa Sɩyõ wã yetame: «Bãmb bee ka!» Mam tʋma ned Zeruzalɛm t'a tɩ togs koe-noogo. 
Isaiah41:28 Mam gesame la ned ka be ye. Ned ka be bãmb sʋkã n tõe n kõ saglg ye. Mam dag na n sokẽ-la bãmb tɩ b leok-ma! 
Isaiah41:29 Bãmb fãa yaa zaalem, bãmb tʋʋmã yaa zaalem. Bãmb wẽn-naandsã yaa wa sobg la vɩʋʋgo." 
Isaiah42:1 Ad mam tʋmtʋmd mam sẽn sõngda, yaa mam nin-tũusdg mam sẽn nonge. Mam ninga m sɩɩgã yẽnda zugu. Yẽnda na n kɩtame tɩ tɩrlem zĩnd bu-zẽmsã sʋka." 
Isaiah42:2 Yẽnda ka na n kelem wall zẽk a koɛɛg ye. Ned kõn wʋm yẽnda koɛɛg soay zut ye. 
Isaiah42:3 Yẽnda ka na n kaoog tãnwĩig ning sẽn gõdã ye. Yẽnda ka na n kiis fɩtl bugum sẽn dat n ki ye. La a na n kɩtame tɩ bʋ-kao-tɩrg zĩndi. 
Isaiah42:4 Yẽnda pãng ka na n sɛ, la a raood ka na n booge, hal t'a wa kɩt tɩ tɩrlem zĩnd dũni zugu. Bala, tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã gũuda yẽnda tõogã." 
Isaiah42:5 Ade, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn naan saasẽ n ning a zĩigẽ wã, la b yɛdg tẽn-gãongã ne a pʋgẽ teedã, n yaa soab ning sẽn kõt nebã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã vɩɩmã, la b kɩt tɩ bũmb nins sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã tar vʋʋsmã yetame:" 
Isaiah42:6 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bool foom tɩrlem yĩnga, la mam gãda fo nugu, la m gũuda foom n na n kɩt tɩ f yɩ kaool buud a taabã yĩnga, la f yɩ vẽenem bu-zẽmsã yĩnga," 
Isaiah42:7 n kɩt tɩ zoens nin pugsi, la f yiis yembs bi-bees roogẽ, la f yiis b sẽn balg b rãmb lik-bida pʋgẽ wã." 
Isaiah42:8 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam yʋʋr la woto. Mam kõn dɩk m ziirã n kõ ned a to ye, la m kõn dɩk m waoogrã n kõ wẽn-naands ye." 
Isaiah42:9 Bũmb nins sẽn zĩnd pĩndã loogame, moasã, mam togsda yãmb yel-paala, la mam wilgd-b-la yãmb tɩ b nan ka wa ye.»" 
Isaiah42:10 Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalg Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, yɩɩl-y n pẽg-y bãmb dũni ween-vɩɩsã fãa pʋga. Bɩ sẽn kẽnd-b ko-kãsengã zugã, la yãmb dãmb sẽn be tẽms koom sẽn gũbg pʋgẽ wã ne y nebã, pẽg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Isaiah42:11 Bɩ we-raoogã ne a tẽmsã, ne Kedaar nebã sẽn be tẽn-bãoonegã pʋgẽ wã zẽk b koeese! Bɩ Sela tẽng nebã kaas ne sũ-noogo! Bɩ b pa tãmsã zut n kaas tõogr kaasgo!" 
Isaiah42:12 Bɩ b waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bɩ b pẽg bãmb tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã pʋga!" 
Isaiah42:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yita wa gãndaoogo, bãmb yaa wa tãpsoab sẽn nong zabre. Bãmb kaasda zabr kaasgo, bãmb kelemdame, bãmb tõogda b bɛɛbã." 
Isaiah42:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam sĩnda m noor hal daar zãra, mam yõka m meng n ka gom ye. Mam dag n yãbda wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem. Mam dag n sesdame tɩ mam vʋʋsmã rat n yõke." 
Isaiah42:15 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tãmsã ne kunkubã lebg we-raoogo, mam na n kɩtame tɩ mo-maasã fãa kʋɩ. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-koɛɛng puk kʋɩlg pʋgẽ, la m kɩt tɩ kʋɩlsã koom kʋɩ." 
Isaiah42:16 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ zoens kẽn sor b sẽn dag n ka mi zugu. Mam na n tall-b lame n tũ so-bugs b sẽn dag n ka mi pʋga. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ lik-bida lebg vẽenem bãmb taoore, la m kɩt tɩ so-rʋdã lebg saalga. Mam na n maana bõn-kãngã, la m ka na n tol n bas bãmb ye." 
Isaiah42:17 Neb nins sẽn dɩk b teegr n teeg bõn-naandsã, ne neb nins sẽn get wẽn-naandsã b sẽn naan ne kutã n yetẽ tɩ bãmb n yaa b wẽnnaam-dãmbã na n targame n paam yãnde.»" 
Isaiah42:18 Wʋmse, kelg-y-yã! Zoense, puk-y y nin n gese!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ãnda n yaa zoang tɩ sã n ka mam tʋmtʋmdã? Ãnda n yaa wʋng wa koe-toagsd ning mam sẽn tʋmã? Ãnda n yaa zoang wa soab ning sẽn paam vɩ-bãanã, n yaa zoang wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdã?" 
Isaiah42:20 Fo yãnda bũmb wʋsgo, la fo ka maan gũusg ye. Fo yoka f tʋb n yaool n ka wʋm ye." 
Isaiah42:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩrlmã yĩnga, taa bãmb yam tɩ b kɩt tɩ tõogã yɩ kãsenga, n yaa sõama." 
Isaiah42:22 B fãa nin-kãense, la b zɛ b teedã! B bẽda bãmb fãa n yõg n tɩ pag bokẽ, b tɩ pʋga bãmb bi-bees roogẽ. B fãa bãmba, tɩ ned ka be n na n fãag-b ye! B zɛɛ bãmb teedã, tɩ ned ka be n na n yeel tɩ b lebs ye!" 
Isaiah42:23 Ãnda n be yãmb sʋkã n na n sak n kelg bõn-kãnga? Ãnda soab n na n yok a tʋbr n kelg sẽn wat beoogã? 
Isaiah42:24 Ãnda n bas a Zakoob yagensã fãadb nugẽ, la ãnda n bas tɩ b zɛ Israyɛll nebã? Ka Sẽn-Ka-Saab la? La ka tõnd n beeg bãmb la? Woto fãa yaa bãmb sẽn ka tʋlg n na n tũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab soayã, la b ka kelg bãmb tõodã." 
Isaiah42:25 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sik b sũ-puugrã Israyɛll nebã zugu, la b tʋm zabr bãmb yĩnga. Zabrã widga zĩig fãa tɩ bãmb ka wʋmd a võor ye. A sãama bãmba, la bãmb ka bao yam ye." 
Isaiah43:1 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn naan-a foom a Zakoobã, sẽn naan-a foom a Israyɛllã yetame: «Da zoe rabeem ye. Bala, mam fãagda foom. Mam boonda foom ne f yʋʋre, fo yaa maam dẽnda!" 
Isaiah43:2 Fo sã n pɩʋʋgd koom, mam na n zĩnda ne foom. Fo sã n dʋʋgd kʋɩlse, koomã ka na n loog ne foom ye. Fo na n kẽna bugum pʋga, la bugmã kõn dɩ foom ye, bug-witmã kõn sãam foom ye." 
Isaiah43:3 Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaam, Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yaa fo fãagda. Mam dɩka Ezɩpt n yao n deeg foom, la m dɩk Kuus ne Seba n kɩs fo zĩigẽ." 
Isaiah43:4 Fo sẽn tar yõod mam nifẽ wã yĩnga, b sẽn waoog foomã, la mam sẽn nong-fã yĩnga, mam dɩka neb n kɩs fo zĩigẽ, n dɩk buud n yao fo vɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Isaiah43:5 Da yɛɛs ye. Bala, mam bee ne foom. Mam na n talla fo yagensã sẽn be yaangã n wa, la m kɩt tɩ fo nebã yi nin-taoor n wa tigim taaba." 
Isaiah43:6 Mam na n yeela rɩtg rãmbã tɩ b kɩs-yã! La m yeel goabg rãmbã tɩ b ra gɩdg-y ye! B kɩt tɩ mam kom-dibli wã yi tẽn-zãrsẽ n wa, la f kɩt tɩ m kom-pugli wã yi dũniyã kɩremsã n wa." 
Isaiah43:7 Yaa neb nins fãa sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã, mam sẽn naan-b rãmb mam waoogr yĩngã, neb nins sẽn yaa mam nus tʋʋmdã.»" 
Isaiah43:8 Bɩ b kɩt tɩ nin-bãmb sẽn yaa zoensã wa! Baa ne b sẽn tar ninã, b ka ne ye. Baa ne b sẽn tar tʋbã, b ka wʋmd ye." 
Isaiah43:9 Bɩ soolem-dãmbã fãa wa tigim taaba. La bɩ buudã naag taaba! Bãmb sʋkã ned a bõe n togs bãmb bõn-kãnga? La nin-bʋg bãmb sʋkã n wilg tõnd sẽn yɩ to-to pĩndã? Bɩ b wa ne b kaset rãmb tɩ b wilg tɩ yaa sɩda! Bɩ nebã kelg-b n yeel tɩ yaa sɩda! 
Isaiah43:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yãmb yaa mam kaset dãmba, la yãmb yaa mam tʋmtʋmdb mam sẽn yãke, sẽn na n yɩl tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ y tẽeda maam, n miẽ tɩ yaa maam, la sẽn deng maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be b sẽn naanẽ, la a to me ka be sẽn na n leb n zĩnd ye." 
Isaiah43:11 Yaa maam bala, maam m yembr bal n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Sã n ka maam, fãagd a to ka be ye." 
Isaiah43:12 Maam n wilgi, maam n fãage, ka wẽnnaam-sãang n be yãmb sʋkã ye. Dẽ wã, yãmb yaa mam kaset dãmba, tɩ yaa maam la Wẽnnaam. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!" 
Isaiah43:13 Hal sẽn sɩng badaare, yaa maam, la ned ka tõe n deeg bũmb mam nugẽ ye. Mam sã n maan tʋʋmde, ãnda n tõe n kɩɩse?" 
Isaiah43:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb fãagda, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yetame: «Yaa yãmb yĩng la mam sẽn tʋm ned t'a zab ne Babilondã. Mam n na n kɩt t'a zoɛtbã lisi. Kalde-rãmbã na n lisa ne b koom kogendã sẽn kõt bãmb tõogrã." 
Isaiah43:15 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã, yaa Israyɛll naandã n yaa yãmb dĩma.»" 
Isaiah43:16 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bãmb n tukd sor ko-kãsengã pʋgã, bãmb n tukd so-buk koom sẽn tar pãngã zugu," 
Isaiah43:17 bãmb n dag n kɩt tɩ saar-dãmb ne wiid la tãb-bi-sull naag taab n zabe. Bãmb lʋɩɩme n ka na n tol n leb n yik ye. B kiime, bãmb dɩɩ bugum wa fɩtl gĩsga." 
Isaiah43:18 Da-y leb-y n tags-y sẽn loogã yelle, la y ra leb n geelg bõn-kʋdã ye." 
Isaiah43:19 Ade, mam na n maana bõn-paalse, bõn-kãng sɩngame n pukdẽ, yãmb ka ne bõn-kãng la? Mam na n pãrga sor we-raoogã pʋga, la m kɩt tɩ kʋɩls zĩnd zĩ-peen-daagẽ." 
Isaiah43:20 We-rũmsã na n waooga maam, yaa we-baasã ne naneendã. Bala, mam kɩtdame tɩ koom zĩnd we-raoogẽ, la m kɩtdẽ tɩ kʋɩls zĩnd zĩ-peen-daasẽ, tɩ mam nebã mam sẽn yãkã tõe n yũ." 
Isaiah43:21 Mam neb nins mam sẽn naanã na n pẽga maam.» 
Isaiah43:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: A Zakoob yagense, ka maam la yãmb sẽn boolã ye! Israyɛll nebã, yãmb yam yii ne maam!" 
Isaiah43:23 Yãmb ka tall y maoong peosg wall y maoong bʋʋg n wa maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ maam ye. Yãmb maandã ka waoogd maam ye. Mam ka modg yãmb n kɩt tɩ y tall kũun n wa, m ka nams yãmb n kɩt tɩ y tall wisd n wa ye." 
Isaiah43:24 Yãmb ka ra parfẽ sẽn tar yũ-noog ne ligd n kõ maam ye. La y ka kõ maam yãmb maandã kaam tɩ sek-m ye. La sẽn be yaa tɩ yãmb modga maam n kẽes yembd y yel-wẽnã yĩnga, mam yɛɛ ne yãmb kongrã." 
Isaiah43:25 Maam m yembr bal n tõe n yẽes yãmb beegrã. La m ka na n leb n tẽeg yãmb yel-wẽnã yell ye. 
Isaiah43:26 Bɩ y tẽeg yell ning yãmb sẽn tar ne maamã, tɩ d bʋ ne taaba. Bɩ yãmb mengã gom n yiis y menga." 
Isaiah43:27 Yãmb pipi yaabã kongame, yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã kɩɩsa maam." 
Isaiah43:28 Dẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ y zĩ-sõngẽ nanambsã lebg bõn-dẽgdo. Mam basame tɩ kãab-wẽng paam a Zakoob yagensã, la m bas tɩ Israyɛll nebã paam tʋʋsgo." 
Isaiah44:1 Mam tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobe, Israyɛll nebã mam sẽn yãkã, kelg-y moasã!" 
Isaiah44:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn naan-a foomã, la a yag foom f ma pʋgẽ wã, soab ning sẽn sõngd foomã yetame: «Mam tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobe, Israyɛll nebã mam sẽn yãke, da zoe rabeem ye." 
Isaiah44:3 Bala, mam na n pʋdga koom tẽn-gãong sẽn kʋɩ zugu, la m kɩt tɩ kʋɩls koom zoe tẽn-koɛɛng zugu. Mam na n pʋdga m sɩɩgã yãmb kambã zugu, la m pʋdg m barkã yãmb yagensã zugu." 
Isaiah44:4 Bãmb na n bulame n yi moogã sʋka, wa tãnwĩis sẽn be bãoog noore.»" 
Isaiah44:5 Ned a yembr na n yeelame yaa: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnda!» Tɩ ned a to rat tɩ b bool yẽnda t'a Zakoobe. La ned a to na n gʋlsa a nug zug yaa: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so,» la a yeel tɩ b bool yẽnda t'a Israyɛlle." 
Isaiah44:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã rĩm la b fãagdã, n yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Mam yaa dẽenem la yaoolem. Sã n ka maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye." 
Isaiah44:7 Ãnda soab n yaa wa maam? Bɩ a zẽk a koɛɛg n togse! A yik n yals mam taoor n togs sẽn yɩ to-to, bɩ a wilg bũmb ning sẽn zĩnd hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, wakat ning mam sẽn vigl ninsaalbã! La a togs bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩndã, la a wilg bũmb ning sẽn be taoor n watẽ wã!" 
Isaiah44:8 Da-y yɛɛs-y ye, Da-y zoe-y rabeem ye. Mam ka togs yãmb bõn-kãng hal daar zãra, la m wilg yãmb sẽn na n yɩ to-to sɩda? Yãmb yaa mam kaset dãmba. Dẽ yĩnga, Wẽnnaam a to beeme tɩ ka maam sɩda? Pĩig a to ka be ye. Mam ka mi pĩig a to sẽn be ye." 
Isaiah44:9 Neb nins sẽn naand-b bõn-naandsã fãa yaa zaalem. La bãmb tʋʋm nins ligd sẽn yaa toogã ka na n leb n tall nafr ye. Bãmb yaa b bõn-naandsã kaset dãmba, bõn-naandsã ka tar nini, b ka tar bãngre, la rẽ n na n yɩ b yãnde." 
Isaiah44:10 Ãnda n maand wẽnde wall a rõog bõn-naandg n yaool n ka na n paam nafr ne-a? 
Isaiah44:11 Ade, yẽnda poorẽ dãmbã fãa na n dɩɩ yãnde. Sẽn naan-b bãmbã yaa ninsaalb bala. Bɩ bãmb fãa naag taaba, bɩ b naag taab n wa, n naag taab n yɛɛs la b rɩ yãnde." 
Isaiah44:12 Sãy sẽn kut lar to-to wã, a rɩkda yẽnda n ning bug-saal sẽn moog pʋgẽ, n yiis-a n dɩk zãar n kud-a, la yaa ne yẽnda kangã pãng la a tʋmda. Kom sã n yõk sãyã, a ka tar pãng ye. La a sã n ka yũ koom, a pãngã sɛtame." 
Isaiah44:13 Ra-pɛɛsd tẽegda wĩiri, n dɩk goor n maan a naandã, la a rɩk pɛsg n naan-a, yẽnda rɩkda makdg n maan a naandã. A maand-a lame t'a wẽneg ninsaala, n kɩt t'a tar ninsaal yasre, la a rɩk-a n tɩ ning roogẽ." 
Isaiah44:14 Yẽnda kɛɛda sɛɛdr tɩɩs raado, wall a kɛɛg sɩprɛs bɩ sɛn tɩɩg ra-bɩlma, rẽ t'a bas-a lame t'a lebg bedr kãgrã tɩɩs sʋka. Sã n ka rẽ bɩ a sel tɩɩg buud sẽn boond tɩ sedaar tɩ saagã koom kɩt t'a lebg bedre." 
Isaiah44:15 Ninsaalbã tar-b lame n tugund bugum. B tugunda raoogã bugum n wootẽ. Wakat kẽere, b yõgend-a-la bugum n segl rɩɩbo, n leb n pɛɛsd-a t'a yaa wẽnnaam, n wõgemded n waoogd-a. Yẽnda rɩkd-a lame n maan bõn-naandg n wõgemded a taoor n pʋʋsdẽ." 
Isaiah44:16 Yẽnda rɩkda raadã pʋɩ-sʋk n tugl bugum, raadã pʋɩ-sʋkã la yẽnda tar n sẽed a nemdo, la a kɩɩmdame n dɩt n tɩgda. Yẽnda woota bugmã la a yetẽ: ‹Ha! Ha! Mam woota bugum, mam nee a bug-witmã!" 
Isaiah44:17 La a rɩk sẽn ketã n maan wẽnnaam sẽn yaa bõn-naandga, n wõgemded yẽnda taoor n waoogd-a, yẽnda wõgemdeda a taoor n pʋʋsd-a,› yẽnda pʋʋsd-a lame n yetẽ: ‹Bɩ f fãag maam, bala, fo yaa mam Wẽnnaam!›" 
Isaiah44:18 Nin-bãmbã ka tar bãngr wall yam ye. Bãmb ninã mumame tɩ b ka tõe n yãnd ye. La b tagsgã kɩdame tɩ b ka wʋmd a võor ye. 
Isaiah44:19 Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tol n tagsdẽ ye, la a ka tar bãngr wall yam n tõe n yeel tɩ: ‹Mam loba raadã pʋɩ-sʋkã bugmẽ, mam segla rɩɩb bug-saalã zugu, mam kɩɩma nemd n wãbe, la mam dɩka sẽn kellã n maan yel-beedo!› A ka tõe n yeel tɩ yaa raoog la yẽnda sẽn pʋʋsdã ye!" 
Isaiah44:20 Rẽ wã, yaa tompeglem bal la yẽnda pʋgda. A tagsgã belg-a lame n kẽes moogo, la a kõn tol n fãag yẽnda ye. A ka na n yeel tɩ: ‹Rẽ yĩnga, mam sẽn zãad m nug-rɩtgã ka belgr bũmb sɩda?› »" 
Isaiah44:21 Zakoobe, tẽeg bõn-kãngã, Israyɛll buudu, tẽeg tɩ fo yaa mam tʋmtʋmda. Maam n naan foom tɩ f yɩ mam tʋmtʋmda. Israyɛlle, mam kõn tol n yĩm f yell ye." 
Isaiah44:22 Mam yẽesa fo tʋʋm-beedã wa sawato, la m yiis f yel-wẽnã wa wulgu. Lebg n wa mam nengẽ, bala, maam n yaa fo fãagda." 
Isaiah44:23 Bɩ saasẽ kaas ne sũ-noogo, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmame. Dũniyã zĩ-zulumsi, kils-y-yã! Tãmse, kelm-y sũ-noog kɛlenga! Kãgre, bɩ foom ne f pʋgẽ tɩɩsã me kilsi! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga a Zakoob buudã, n wilg bãmb ziirã Israyɛll pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah44:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb fãagdã, sẽn naan-a yãmb y ma pʋgẽ wã yetame: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, maam n naan bũmb fãa. Maam m yembr n yɛdg sa-gãongã, yaa maam n naan tẽn-gãongã." 
Isaiah44:25 Mam kɩtdame tɩ zĩrẽ bãngdbã bãn lebg zaalem, la m kɩt tɩ bagbã yam meneme. Mam kɩtdame tɩ yam dãmbã leb poorẽ, n kɩt tɩ b bãngrã lebg yalemdo." 
Isaiah44:26 Mam kɩtdame tɩ mam tʋmtʋmdã goam paam pidsgu, la m kɩt tɩ mam koe-toagsdbã saagr pidsi. Mam goma Zeruzalɛm wɛɛngẽ n yeele: ‹Neb na n leb n zĩnda Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ, la b na n lebs n mee Zʋʋda tẽmsã, mam na n lebs n yika a raboodã.›" 
Isaiah44:27 Mam yeela ko-zulumsã yaa: ‹kʋɩ-y-yã!› Mam na n kʋɩɩsa yãmb kʋɩlsã koom. 
Isaiah44:28 Mam goma a Siruus wɛɛngẽ n yeel yaa: ‹A Siruus yaa mam pe-kɩɩma! Yẽnda na n pidsa mam datmã fãa. Yẽnda na n yeelame: Bɩ y lebs n me Zeruzalɛm, bɩ y yẽbg Wẽnnaam doogã!› »" 
Isaiah45:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomda ne bãmb nin-tũusdg a Siruus bãmb sẽn gãd a soab nug-rɩtgã n yetẽ: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tõog bu-zẽmse, la m kɩt tɩ f kao rĩm-dãmb sɛɛg sẽbdse, la m pags tẽms noy kʋɩlems fo taoore, n kɩt tɩ tẽmsã ra tol n leb n pag abada." 
Isaiah45:2 Mam mengã n na n lʋɩ fo taoore, mam na n sarma kunkubã, mam na n wãa zũud kʋɩlemsã, la m kao kut kʋɩlen-kuyã." 
Isaiah45:3 Mam na n kõo foom arzegs nins sẽn busã, yaa arzegs nins sẽn solgã, tɩ fo bãng tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã mii foom ne f yʋʋre." 
Isaiah45:4 Yaa mam tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobe, a Israyɛll sẽn yaa soab ning mam sẽn yãkã maasem yĩng la mam bool foom ne f yʋʋre. Mam kõo foom waoogr tɩ fo nan ka mi maam ye." 
Isaiah45:5 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab a to ka be ye. Sã n ka maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye. Mam segla foom zabr yĩng tɩ fo nan ka mi maam ye." 
Isaiah45:6 Yaa sẽn na n yɩl tɩ nebã bãng tɩ sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tãag nin-taoore, sã n ka maam, sẽn ketã yaa zaalem. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la a to ka be ye." 
Isaiah45:7 Maam n naan vẽenem la m kɩt tɩ lik bida beẽ. Maam n wat ne vɩ-bãane, la maam n wat ne toogo. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe n maan bõn-kãensã fãa." 
Isaiah45:8 Bɩ saasã sẽn be yĩngrã tose, la bɩ sawatã bas tɩrlem t'a ni! Bɩ tẽn-gãongã pusg tɩ fãagr yi, tɩ tɩrlem me naag n yi wakat-yɛnga! Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tõe n maan bõn-kãensã fãa." 
Isaiah45:9 Sẽn zabd-a ne sẽn yag-a yẽnda wã na n paama toogo, yẽnda yaa rʋko, n be rʋgd a taabã sʋka! Rẽ yĩnga, yagdã tõe n soka sẽn yagd-a yẽnda wã tɩ yaa bõe la yẽnda maand sɩda? Wall a yeel tɩ fo tʋʋmdã ka võore!" 
Isaiah45:10 Ned sã n yeel biig baaba: ‹Bõe yĩng tɩ fo rogdẽ?› La a yeel pag tɩ: ‹Bõe yĩng tɩ fo rogdẽ?› Nin-kãng soab na n paama toogo. 
Isaiah45:11 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, n yaa Israyɛll naandã yetame: ‹B rat n soka maam n bãng sẽn wat beoogo, b rat n wilga maam m sẽn tog n maan m kambã wɛɛngẽ, la mam nus tʋʋmdã sẽn tog n yɩ to-to bɩ?" 
Isaiah45:12 Yaa maam n naan dũniyã, la m naan ninsaalbã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. Yaa mam meng nus n yɛdg sa-gãongã, la yaa maam n kɩt t'a ãdsã fãa beẽ." 
Isaiah45:13 Maam n yãk a Siruus wa sẽn zems mam tɩrlmã, la m na n manega a soayã fãa. Yẽnda na n lebs n mee mam tẽngã, la a bas mam nebã sẽn be yembdã tɩ b looge, n ka reeg yaood wall kũun ye. Yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.› »" 
Isaiah45:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ezɩpt tẽngã neb tʋʋm yõodo, ne Kuus toandbã teedo, la Seba tẽng nin-wobdã teedã na n waa yãmb nengẽ, n wa lebg yãmb dẽnda. Nin-kãens na n pʋga yãmb poore, bãmb na n waa ne b bãensã, la b na n wõgemda yãmb taoore, n maan b pʋʋsgã yãmb nengẽ. Wẽnnaam bee yãmb nengẽ bala, la Wẽnnaam a to ka leb n beẽ ye. Wẽnnaam-dãmb a taabã yaa zaalem!»" 
Isaiah45:15 Israyɛll Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa fãagda, yãmb sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn solg y menga!" 
Isaiah45:16 Sẽn peesd-b wẽn-naandsã rɩɩ yãnde, bãmb fãa paama paoogre. Bãmb fãa loogda ne yãnde." 
Isaiah45:17 La Israyɛll paama Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãagr wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga. Yãmb kõn tol n leb n paam yãnde, y kõn tol n leb n paam paoogre." 
Isaiah45:18 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasã naandã n gomde. Bãmb n yaa dũniyã naanda, bãmb n naan-a n kɩt t'a yasẽ, la b ka naan-a t'a yaa zaalem ye. B naan-a lame tɩ neb tõe n zĩnd a pʋgẽ. Bãmb yetame: «Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la sã n ka maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye.»" 
Isaiah45:19 Mam ka soos n gom ye, ka dũniyã zĩ-lik pʋgẽ la mam gomẽ ye. Mam ka yeel a Zakoob yagensã tɩ b bao maam zĩ-vɩʋʋgẽ ye! Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab togsda tɩrlem, mam togsda sẽn yaa tɩrga!" 
Isaiah45:20 Bɩ yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn põs n yi bu-zẽmsã sʋkã tigim taab n wa! Naag-y taab n kolge! Neb nins sẽn zãad bõn-naands sẽn yaa raad sẽn peesã ka tar bãngr ye. Bãmb pʋʋsda wẽnnaam sẽn ka tõe n fãag-b ye. 
Isaiah45:21 Togs-y yellã! Wa-y n yals-y taoor n gom n yiis y menga! Bɩ b fãa tigim n yẽs ne taaba! Ãnda soab n kɩt tɩ b wʋm bõn-kãng hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ, la a sɩng n togs bõn-kãng hal pĩnda? Ka maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab la? Sã n ka maam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye. Sã n ka maam, Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa tɩrg n yaa fãagd ka be ye. Wẽnnaam a to ka tol n leb n beẽ ye." 
Isaiah45:22 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn be dũniyã ween-vɩɩsã fãa wã, wẽnemd-y n ges-y maam n paam fãagre! Bala, yaa maam la Wẽnnaam, Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye." 
Isaiah45:23 Mam wẽenda ne m meng tɩ gomd ning sẽn yi mam noorẽ wã yaa tɩrga, la a kõn tol n tek ye. Rũmã fãa na n yĩgimda mam taoore, la zɛlmã fãa na n wẽena ne mam yʋʋre." 
Isaiah45:24 B na n goma mam yell n yeel tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab b yembr nengẽ bal la tɩrlem la pãng be. La neb nins sũyã sẽn dag n yik ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã na n lebg n waa bãmb nengẽ ne yãnde. 
Isaiah45:25 Israyɛll yagensã fãa na n paama tɩrlem Sẽn-Ka-Saab maasem yĩnga, la yaa bãmb pʋg la b na n paam zu-zẽkre." 
Isaiah46:1 Wẽn-naandg a Bɛll yĩgimdame, la wẽn-naandg a Nebo kɩlldame. B rɩkda b wẽn-naandsã n zɩlg rũmsi, la b zɩlgd-b rũms sẽn yɛ zutu. La a lebga zɩɩb rũng ning sẽn zɩt-a wã yĩnga!" 
Isaiah46:2 Bãmb fãa naaga taab n zõrẽ, bãmb fãa yĩgimdame, bãmb ka tõe n fãag rũmsã sẽn zɩt bãmbã ye. La bãmb mensã rabda yembd pʋga." 
Isaiah46:3 A Zakoob buudu, kelg-y maam, yãmb dãmb sẽn yaa Israyɛll bu-kellã, yãmb yaa neb nins mam sẽn zã hal yãmb sẽn dag n ket y ma pʋgẽ, maam n ges y yell hal tɩ y ket y ma pʋgẽ!" 
Isaiah46:4 Maam n na n kell n ges y yell n tãag y kʋʋlem wakate, mam na n zãa yãmb hal n tãag y zoob-peend wakate. Maam n maan a woto ne yãmba, la m dat n leb n zãa yãmba, n tebend yãmb la m yols-yã." 
Isaiah46:5 Yãmb na n dɩka maam n mak ãnda n yeel tɩ maam ne yẽnda soab n zem taaba? Yãmb na n yeelame tɩ maam ne ãnda soab n wẽnd taaba? 
Isaiah46:6 Nebã zukda b kordã pʋg sãnemã, la b magd wanzuri ne zɩslem magdga. Bãmb yaooda yõak t'a rõog sãnem ne wanzuri wẽn-naandg n kõ-ba, la bãmb wõgemdeda wẽn-naandgã taoor n pʋʋsd-a." 
Isaiah46:7 Bãmb tʋkd-a lame n palg b bãgdẽ, n tall-a n tɩ ning a zĩigẽ. Wẽn-naandgã yasame n ka yẽrgd a sẽn beẽ wã ye! Ba b sã n kelem n bool-a, a ka tõe n leoke, la a ka tõe n fãag ned a yel-pakr pʋg ye." 
Isaiah46:8 Bɩ y tẽeg bõn-kãng yell n yɩ raopa! Yel-wẽn-maandba, tags-y bõn-kãng yelle!" 
Isaiah46:9 Tẽeg-y hal wakat sẽn loogã yelle. Bala, mam yaa Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye. Mam yaa Wẽnnaam, la mam ka tar mak-n-taag ye." 
Isaiah46:10 Hal sɩngrẽ, mam dengd n togsa bũmb ning sẽn na n wa zĩndã, la m togsda bũmb hal wakat sẽn zãr t'a nan ka maan ye. Mam yetame: Mam saagrã na n pidsame, la mam na n maana bũmb ning m sẽn dat n maanã." 
Isaiah46:11 Mam boonda sɩlg t'a yi yaang n wa, mam kɩtdame tɩ ned ning sẽn pidsd-a mam saagrã yi tẽn-zãrg n wa. Mam sã n yeel bũmbu, mam kɩtdame t'a paam pidsgu. Mam sã n yãk yam n na n maan bũmbu, mam maand-a lame." 
Isaiah46:12 Sũ-keelem dãmbã, yãmb dãmb sẽn zãr ne tɩrlmã, kelg-y maam!" 
Isaiah46:13 Mam kɩtame tɩ mam tɩrlmã kolgdẽ, a ka zãr ye. La mam fãagrã ka na n kaoos n wa ye. Mam na n waa ne fãagr Sɩyõ pʋgẽ, mam na n kõo Israyɛll mam ziirã." 
Isaiah47:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Babilond tẽn-neere, sig n zĩnd tomẽ! Kalde rãmbã tẽn-neere, zĩnd tẽng tɩ f naamã sɛɛme! B kõn leb n bool foom tɩ tẽn-neere, la tẽng sẽn tar ra-sãnd ye." 
Isaiah47:2 Rɩk ne-biis n wer zom, pilg f nengã peendã, la f kool f fu-yergã n bas f gɛyã n dʋʋg kʋɩlse!" 
Isaiah47:3 B na n yãnda f zaalã, b na n yãnda fo paoogrã. Mam na n doka m sũuri, Mam ka na n bas tɩ ned gɩdg maam ye." 
Isaiah47:4 Tõnd fãagdã yʋʋr boondame tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-soaba. Bãmb yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba. 
Isaiah47:5 Kalde nebã, zĩnd-y sɩddd... n kẽ lik bida pʋga! B kõn leb n bool foom tɩ soolem-dãmb naab ye." 
Isaiah47:6 Mam sũur dag n yika ne m nebã, mam dag n paooga mam nebã, mam dag n dɩk-b lame n bas fo nugẽ, la fo ka zoe bãmb nimbãaneg ye. Fo namsa bãmb nin-kẽembã wʋsgo." 
Isaiah47:7 Fo rag n yetame: «Mam na n kell n yɩɩ naab wakat fãa!» Fo ka tags bõn-kãensã fãa yell ye, fo ka tags yɛlã sẽn na n wa yɩ to-to wã ye." 
Isaiah47:8 Moasã, vɩ-noanga, kelg koe-kãngã, fo zĩi ne pel-kɛgeng n yetẽ: «Ned ka be n ta maam ye! Mam kõn tol n yɩ pʋg-kõor ye, la b kõn tol n dees mam kambã n bas-m ye!»" 
Isaiah47:9 Yel-bãmbã b yiibã n na n paam foom wakat-yɛnga, daar a yembr pʋgẽ: yaa f kambã kaalem ne f pʋg-kõtã. Baa fo bag-bʋgdbã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, la baa ne fo tɩɩmã rɩɩb sẽn tar pãngã, yel-bãmbã b yiibã na n lʋɩɩ fo zug ne b pãngã tɛka." 
Isaiah47:10 Fo rag n dɩka f teegrã n teeg wẽng maaneg n yetẽ: «Ned ba a ye ka ne maam ye!» Fo yamã ne f bãngrã lebga f zugã, tɩ fo rag n yetẽ: «Ned ka be n ta maam ye!»" 
Isaiah47:11 Toog n na n paam foom, tɩ fo ka bãng a sẽn yitẽ ye. Sãoong n na n wa fo zugu, tɩ fo ka mi fo sẽn na n maaneg ye. Toog n na n wa ling foom tɩ f ka bãng ye." 
Isaiah47:12 Dẽ wã, fo we n kell n pa f tɩ-rɩɩrã pʋga, kell n pa f bag-bʋgrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã pʋga. Fo namsa f meng bãmb yĩng hal f yãadem wakate! Tõeeme tɩ f na n paama nafr a pʋga, tõeeme tɩ f na n tũnuga be n kẽes rabeem!" 
Isaiah47:13 Fo saglsã kosg kɩtame tɩ fo yɛ. Dẽ wã, bɩ sẽn mi-b yĩngr yɛla, la sẽn get-b ãds n togsd yɛlã, la sẽn tar-b bũmb ki-paalg fãa n togsdẽ wã, yik n fãag-fo!" 
Isaiah47:14 Bãmb na n yɩɩ wa moodo, bugum n na n dɩ bãmba. Bãmb ka na n põs bug-witmã ye. Ka na n yɩ bug-saal ned sẽn tõe n wʋm a bur ye, leb n ka na n yɩ bug-saal b sẽn tõe n zĩnd n wood ye." 
Isaiah47:15 Bag-bʋgdbã ne tɩtã-rãmb fo sẽn nams f meng b nengẽ wã na n yɩɩ a woto. Neb nins fo sẽn maan leebg ne-b hal f yãadmẽ wã ned kam fãa na n yeebame n tudi. La fo kõn tol n paam fãagd ye! 
Isaiah48:1 A Zakoob buudu, kelg-y-yã, yãmb yʋʋr sẽn yaa Israyɛllã, la yãmb sẽn yaa Zʋʋda yagensã, yãmb maanda yẽesem ne rẽndã. Yãmb wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, la y boond Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, tɩ yaool n ka ne sɩda la zemsg ye!" 
Isaiah48:2 B yaool n boonda yãmb tɩ tẽn-sõngã nebã, la yãmb teega Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, soab ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-soabã." 
Isaiah48:3 Mam togsa bũmb ning sẽn maandã yell hal daar zãra. Mam mengã noor n gom n kɩt tɩ b wʋm-a. La tao-tao bala, mam kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãng zĩndi." 
Isaiah48:4 Mam miime tɩ yãmb yaa sũ-keglem dãmba, n miẽ tɩ yãmb yublã yaa kɛgeng wa kutu, la y rĩyã yaa wa zũudu." 
Isaiah48:5 Mam dag n togsa yãmb bõn-kãng hal daar zãra, mam kɩtame tɩ yãmb wʋm bõn-kãng t'a nan ka wa ye, tɩ yãmb ra wa yeel tɩ yaa yãmb wẽn-naandgã wall y bõn-naandgã b sẽn yẽneg kut n dõog a soabã, n maan bõn-kãng n kõ yãmb ye." 
Isaiah48:6 Yãmb wʋmdame! Ges-y bõn-kãensã fãa! Yãmb ka na n dɩk-a n togs la? Sẽn sɩng ne moasã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb wʋm bõn-paal kibare, yaa bõn-paal sẽn dag n solg tɩ yãmb ka miẽ ye." 
Isaiah48:7 Ka hal daar zãr la b naan bãmb ye, yaa moasã bal la b naan-ba. Hal tɩ ta moasã yãmb dag n nan zɩ n wʋm-a ye, yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb da wa yeel tɩ yãmb dag n mii bõn-kãng tiir ye." 
Isaiah48:8 Yãmb ka wʋm baa fɩ, yãmb ka bãng baa fɩ, yãmb tʋbr ka reng n wʋm bũmb ye. Bala, mam dag n miime tɩ yãmb yaa zãmb dãmba. B rag n boonda foom hal f ma pʋgẽ tɩ ‹tõata.›" 
Isaiah48:9 Mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, mam basda m sũ-yikrã. B sẽn kõt maam waoogr ningã yĩnga, mam yõkda m meng ne foom n ka rat n sãam-f ye." 
Isaiah48:10 Ade, mam yɩlga foom, la m ka yɩlg-f wa b sẽn yɩlgd wanzuri ye. Mam ninga foom toog boaag pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah48:11 Yaa mam mengã yĩnga, yaa mam mengã yĩng la m maan-yã. Mam na n yɩ a wãn n bas tɩ b paoog maam! Mam ka na n dɩk m waoogrã n kõ ned a to ye." 
Isaiah48:12 A Zakoob buudu, kelg-y maam, foom a Israyɛll mam sẽn boole! Yaa maam, yaa maam la dẽenem, leb n yaa maam la yaoolem." 
Isaiah48:13 Mam meng nug n vigl dũniyã, la mam nug-rɩtg n yɛdg saagã. Mam sã n bool-ba, b naagda taab n wa mam taoore." 
Isaiah48:14 Bɩ yãmb fãa tigim taab n kelge! Ãnda bãmb sʋkã n tõog n togs bõn-kãnga? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong a soabã n na n tõog n maan bãmb raabã, n zab ne Babilonde, la yẽnda nugã na n zɩsga Kalde rãmbã zugu." 
Isaiah48:15 Yaa maam, maam m yembr bal n gome, mam boola yẽnda n kɩt t'a wa, la a na n tõoga a tʋʋmdã." 
Isaiah48:16 Kolg-y maam n kelge! Hal sɩngr wẽndẽ, mam ka solg n gom ye. La hal yel-kãensã sɩngrẽ, mam dag n beeme. Moasã, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma maam ne bãmb sɩɩgã." 
Isaiah48:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo fãagda, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yetame: «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa fo Wẽnnaam, mam na n zãmsa foom f meng sõngr yĩnga, maam n tɛt foom sor ning fo sẽn be wã zugu." 
Isaiah48:18 Fo sã n dag n sakẽ-la mam noyã, fo vɩ-bãanã rag n na n yɩɩ wa kʋɩlg koom, la fo tɩrlmã rag n na n zoeta wa ko-kãsengã ko-zoetem!" 
Isaiah48:19 Fo yagensã rag n na n yɩɩ wʋsg wa bĩisri, tɩ f yagen-tʋbrakẽesã yɩ wa tom. La bãmb yʋʋrã rag n ka na n menem mam taoor ye.»" 
Isaiah48:20 Yi-y n bas-y Babilond tẽngã, zoe-y n yi-y Kalde rãmbã sʋka! Zẽk-y y koɛɛg ne sũ-noog n moon n kɩt tɩ nebã wʋm bõn-kãngã. Togs-y-yã-a t'a sãeeg n ta dũni tɛk fãa, yeel-y tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãaga b tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobe!" 
Isaiah48:21 Ko-yũud kõn tol n yõk bãmb weo-raoog ning pʋg bãmb sẽn tat-bã ye. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ koom pusg pĩig zug tɩ b yũ, bãmb na n pãrga pĩig tɩ koom zoe." 
Isaiah48:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Vɩ-bãan ka be nin-wẽns yĩng ye.» 
Isaiah49:1 Tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã, kelg-y maam! Neb nins sẽn be zĩ-zãrsã, kelg-y-yã! Sẽn-Ka-Saab boola maam tɩ m ket m ma pʋgẽ. Bãmb pʋda mam yʋʋr tɩ m ma nan ka rog maam ye." 
Isaiah49:2 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam noorã yɩ wa sʋ-rɩtga, bãmb lilla maam ne b nugã maasem. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam yɩ wa pĩim sẽn yaa sɩlenga, bãmb solga maam bãmb lokã pʋga." 
Isaiah49:3 La bãmb yeela maam yaa: «Israyɛlle, fo yaa mam tʋmtʋmda, mam na n tũnuga foom n wilg m ziirã.»" 
Isaiah49:4 La mam yeelame: «Mam namsa m meng zaalem, mam sɛɛsa m pãngã zaalem yĩnga.» Hakɩɩka, mam bʋʋm bee Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, mam keoor bee Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Isaiah49:5 Moasã Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdame, bãmb n naan maam m ma pʋgẽ, tɩ mam tõe n yɩ bãmb tʋmtʋmda, n tall a Zakoob yagensã n lebg n wa, tɩ Israyɛll nebã tõe n tigim bãmb nengẽ. Mam paama waoogr Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ, bala, mam Wẽnnaam n yɩ mam pãnga." 
Isaiah49:6 Bãmb yeela maam: «Mam sẽn yãk foom tɩ f yɩ mam tʋmtʋmdã nan ka baa fɩ ye, mam yãka foom tɩ f leb n yik a Zakoob yagensã, la f lebg n tall Israyɛll bu-kellã n wa. Mam yãka foom tɩ f yɩ vẽenem bu-zẽmsã yĩnga, tɩ mam fãagrã tõe n ta dũniyã tɛk fãa.»" 
Isaiah49:7 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fãagdã, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yeta soab ning sẽn paam paoogrã, soab ning nebã sẽn get wa yel-beedã, soab ning sẽn yaa nanambsã yambã, rĩm-dãmbã na n yãnd-a lame n yik yĩngri, nanambs na n yãnda yẽnda n wõgemde, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn zems teegrã yĩnga, Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã sẽn yãk foomã yĩnga." 
Isaiah49:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Nimbãan-zoeerã wakate, mam leoka foom, la fãagrã daare, mam sõnga foom. Mam gũu foom n kɩt tɩ fo yɩ kaool nebã yĩnga, n na n leb n yik tẽngã, la m kõ nebã b soolmã sẽn dag n sãamã." 
Isaiah49:9 Mam na n yeela b sẽn balg-b rãmbã: ‹Yi-y-yã!› La m yeel sẽn be-b lik bida pʋgã: ‹puk-y-yã!› Bãmb na n pukame n paam dɩɩb soayã zutu, la b na n paama yamd so-bugsã fãa zutu." 
Isaiah49:10 Kom kõn leb n yõk bãmb ye, ko-yũud kõn leb n yõk bãmb ye. Sob-tʋʋlg ne wĩndg walem kõn leb n nams bãmb ye. Bala, sẽn zoet-a bãmb nimbãanegã n na n tɛ bãmba, la a talla bãmb n kẽng ko-budum zĩigẽ." 
Isaiah49:11 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ mam tãmsã fãa lebg soayã, la mam na n pidsa londã fãa." 
Isaiah49:12 Gese, bãmb ta n sɛɛme, bãmb bee zĩ-zãrsẽ n watẽ, b watame, kẽer yita rɩtg tɩ kẽer yit nin-taoore, la kẽer yita Sinim tẽnga." 
Isaiah49:13 Saase, kils-y ne sũ-noogo! Dũniyã, kɩdme! Tãmse, kaas-y ne sũ-noogo! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab belsda b nebã, bãmb zoeta b nimbãan-nebã nimbãanega.»" 
Isaiah49:14 Sɩyõ tẽngã rag n yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa maam, mam Zu-soabã yĩma mam yelle!»" 
Isaiah49:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame: Pag tõe n yĩma biig ning a sẽn yẽsemdã yell sɩda? Yẽnda ka na n zoe biig ning sẽn yi yẽnda pʋgẽ wã nimbãaneg sɩda? Baa yẽnda sã n tõe n yĩm a yelle, mam kõn tol n yĩm fo yell ye." 
Isaiah49:16 Gese, mam gʋlsa fo yʋʋrã m nug-pʋsã zug ne kɩtga, fo lalsã bee mam taoor wakat fãa." 
Isaiah49:17 Neb nins sẽn na n lebs n me foomã zoet n watame, Sẽn sãam-b foom n kɩt tɩ fo lebg raboogã na n yi fo pʋgẽ n looge." 
Isaiah49:18 Zẽk f neng n ges sẽn gilg foomã, bãmb fãa tigma taab n wat fo nengẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yetame: «Mam wẽendame, tɩ fo na n pida bãmb wa fan-teoogo. Fo na n sẽbg-a-la f sɛɛg wa pʋg-bil sɛɛg sẽbdga." 
Isaiah49:19 Ade, fo tẽngã sẽn dag n lebg raboogã, la zĩis nins sẽn dag n sãamã, tẽn-kãngã sẽn dag n wã wã, na n lebga sẽk ne fo nebã sẽn na n wa kẽ beenẽ wã. Neb nins sẽn dag n sãamd foomã na n zãagame." 
Isaiah49:20 Fo kamb nins f sẽn dag n be kɛɛngã na n wa yeela foom yaa: ‹Zĩigã yaa sẽk ne tõndo. Bao-y zĩig n kõ-d tɩ d zĩndi.› 
Isaiah49:21 Fo na n soka f meng yaa: Ãnda n dog kom-bãmbã n kõ maam? Bala, mam dag n ka leb n tar biig ye. Mam dag n yaa kiiri. B rag n diga maam tɩ m kẽng tẽn-zẽnga. Ãnda n wub bãmba? Mam dag n vɩ m yembre. La kom-bãmbã rag n bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Isaiah49:22 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n zẽka m nug tɩ yɩ bãnd bu-zẽmsã yĩnga, mam na zẽka m tãb-kaoor n tees buud a taabã. Bãmb na n buga fo kom-dibli wã n wa, la b zombg fo kom-pugli wã gʋbl n wa." 
Isaiah49:23 Rĩm-dãmb n na n yaool fo kambã, la bãmb rĩm-pogsã na n yɩɩ fo kom-yaoondba. Bãmb na n wõgemda fo taoore, n fõgen b nens tẽnga, n lelem fo naoã wubsgã. Dẽ la fo na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la neb nins sẽn dɩk b teegr n teeg maamã kõn paam yãnd ye.»" 
Isaiah49:24 B tõe n deega bũmb ning gãndaoog sẽn yõkã bɩ? Rẽ yĩnga, nin-toaag sẽn yõk bũmb ningã tõe n fãagame n zoe bɩ?" 
Isaiah49:25 Sɩd me, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B na n tõog n deega gãndaoog sẽn dag n yõgã, la b na n fãaga neb nins nin-toaag sẽn dag n yõgã. Mam na n zaba ne neb nins sẽn zabd ne foomã, la mam na n fãaga fo kambã." 
Isaiah49:26 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn namsd foomã wãb b mens nemdo. La m kɩt tɩ b yũ b mens zɩɩm wa reezẽ rã-paalga. Woto, nebã fãa na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo fãagda, n yaa fo yoalsda la a Zakoob Pãng-Soaba.»" 
Isaiah50:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Welgr kaset sebr ning sẽn wilgd tɩ mam diga Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa yãmb ma wã bee yɛɛnẽ? Bɩ mam dɩka yãmb n koos ne m sam soab a bõe? Yaa yãmb beegrã yĩng la b koos yãmba, la yaa yãmb kongrã yĩng la b sẽn dig yãmb ma wã." 
Isaiah50:2 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam wa n ka mik neda? Bõe yĩng tɩ mam bool tɩ ned ka leoke? Dẽ yĩnga, mam nugã yaa koɛɛg n ka tõe n fãag yãmb la? Mam ka tar pãng n tõe n fãag yãmb la? Mam sã n tãs ko-kãsengã, a kʋɩtame. Mam tõe n kɩtame tɩ kʋɩls lebg we-raoogo. Koomã kaalem yĩnga, bãmb zĩmã na n põogame, ko-yũud na n kʋʋ bãmba." 
Isaiah50:3 Mam luta saasã ne lika, la m kɩt t'a yeelg boto.»" 
Isaiah50:4 Zu-soabã a Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam zelemd sẽn mi goam wa karen-biiga, tɩ mam tõe n bãng n gom n bels ka-pãng soabã. Yibeoogo, bãmb nekdame, bãmb nekda maam tɩ m yok m tʋbr n kelg wa karen-biis sẽn kelgd to-to wã." 
Isaiah50:5 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yoka mam tʋbre, la mam ka kɩɩs bãmb ye, mam ka leb poorẽ ye." 
Isaiah50:6 Mam wẽnemda m poor n kõ neb nins sẽn dag n pãbd maamã, la m wẽnemd m yɛgdg n kɩs neb nins sẽn dag n võod-b mam toɛɛngã. Mam ka solg m meng ne neb nins sẽn paoogd maam la b tʋbsd maam kolkoodã ye." 
Isaiah50:7 La Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sõnga maam. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam ka paam yãnd ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam keng m neng wa pĩiga, n miẽ tɩ mam ka na n tol n paam yãnd ye." 
Isaiah50:8 Sẽn kõt-a maam bʋʋmã kolgame! Ãnda soab n dat n dõd maam? Bɩ d yals n bʋ ne taaba! Ãnda soab n tar yell ne maam? Bɩ a soab wa kolg maam! 
Isaiah50:9 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wa sõnga maam. Ãnda soab n tõe n mong maam bʋʋm? Bãmb fãa na n kʋdga wa fuugu, la mogd na n dɩɩ bãmba." 
Isaiah50:10 Ãnda soab n be yãmb sʋkã n zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n na n kelg bãmb tʋmtʋmdã koɛɛgã? Ned ning sẽn kẽnd lik bida pʋgẽ, tɩ vẽenem ka beẽ, bɩ a soab teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la a rell bãmb yʋʋrã, n teeg a Wẽnnaamã!" 
Isaiah50:11 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn yõgen bugum, la y zãad pɛɛm sẽn yaa bug-vɩlensã, Tall-y y pɛɛmã sẽn yaa bug-vɩlensã y sẽn yõgnã n kẽ-y y bugmẽ wã, kẽ-y wʋngã pʋga! Yaa mam meng nug n kɩt tɩ bõn-kãng paam yãmba. Yãmb na n kii toog pʋgẽ!" 
Isaiah51:1 Yãmb dãmb sẽn pʋgd tɩrlmã, yãmb dãmb sẽn baood Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, kelg-y maam! Wẽnemd-y n ges-y pĩig ning b sẽn yãk n pees yãmbã, la bok ning b sẽn tu n yiis yãmb a pʋgẽ wã." 
Isaiah51:2 Wẽnemd-y n ges-y yãmb ba a Abrahaam, la y wẽnemd n ges y ma a Saara. Bala, mam boola yẽnda wakat ninga yẽnda sẽn dag n yaa a yembrã, la mam ning-a-la bark n kɩt t'a fɩɩge." 
Isaiah51:3 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zoee Sɩyõ nimbãanega, bãmb zoe a raboodã nimbãanega. Bãmb na n kɩtame t'a we-raoogã lebg wa Edɛn, la b kɩt t'a tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ lebg wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽed zĩiga. Kɩdeng ne sũ-noog na n leb n zĩnda a pʋgẽ, la bark pʋʋsg ne yɩɩl na n leb n zĩnda beenẽ." 
Isaiah51:4 Mam nebã, maag-y y meng n kelg maam! Mam buudu, yok-y y tʋbr n kelge! Bala, tõogã na n yii mam nengẽ. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ mam bʋ-kao-tɩrgã puki, n yɩ vẽenem buud a taabã yĩnga." 
Isaiah51:5 Mam tɩrlmã kolgame, mam fãagrã na n pukame, la mam na n kaoo buud a taabã bʋʋd ne pãnga. Tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã na n maana tẽeb ne maam. Bãmb geta mam pãngã." 
Isaiah51:6 Nak-y n ges-y yĩngri, la y sulg n ges dũniyã sẽn be tẽngã. Bala, yĩngr na n looga wa bug-zõose, dũniyã na n kii wa fuugu, a nebã na n kiida wa zõose. Mam fãagrã na n paa wakat fãa, la mam tɩrlmã kõn tol n sɛ ye." 
Isaiah51:7 Yãmb dãmb sẽn mi tɩrlmã, neb nins sẽn ka tar mam tõogã b sũurẽ, kelg-y maam! Ra zoe-y ninsaalbã paoogr ye, la y ra bas tɩ bãmb tʋya yɛɛs yãmb ye." 
Isaiah51:8 Bala, mogd n na n dɩ bãmb wa fuugu, zũnzũiy na n dɩɩ bãmb wa pe-kõbd gĩsga. La mam tɩrlmã na n paa wakat fãa, tɩ mam fãagrã pa zamaan woo zamaane." 
Isaiah51:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, nek-y-yã! Wilg-y y pãngã! Wilg-y y pãngã wa kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã, wa zamaan ning sẽn loogã pʋgẽ wã! Ka yãmb n dag n sãam a Rahaab la y kõs wag-bɛɛgã la?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ka yãmb n dag n kɩt tɩ ko-kãsengã koom kʋɩ sɩda? Ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ zĩ-zulumsẽ koom kʋɩ la? Ka yãmb n pãrg sor zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, n tuk sor tɩ yãmb sẽn fãag-b rãmbã loog sɩda?" 
Isaiah51:11 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag neb ninsã na n lebg n waame, bãmb na n waa Sɩyõ ne sũ-noogo, b na n paama sũ-noog sẽn ka sɛta. Kɩdeng ne sũ-noog na n sega bãmba, la sũ-sãang ne sidgr na n zoeeme." 
Isaiah51:12 Yaa maam bala, maam m yembr bal n belsd foom. Bõe yĩng tɩ fo yɛɛsd ninsaal sẽn yaa kiidã, ninsaal baoosg sẽn yaa wa moodã?" 
Isaiah51:13 Fo yĩmda Sẽn-Ka-Saab yelle, yaool n yaa bãmb n naan foom! Bãmb n yɛdg sa-gãongã la b naan dũniyã! Wakat fãa fo zoeta rabeem sẽn namsd-a foomã sũ-puugrã yĩnga, wa a na n pukame n sãam foom, la namsdã sũ-puugrã bee yɛ?" 
Isaiah51:14 Sã n yɩ bilfu, sẽn dag n be-a bi-bees roog n namsdẽ wã na n paama lohorem. Yẽnda ka na n ki bokã pʋga, la rɩɩb ka na n paoog yẽnda ye." 
Isaiah51:15 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa fo Wẽnnaam, maam n dãmbd ko-kãsengã n kɩt t'a ko-wĩisã guglumdẽ. Bãmb yʋʋr boondame tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba." 
Isaiah51:16 Mam ninga mam goamã fo noorẽ, la m luda foom ne mam nugã maasem, n yɛdg sa-gãong la m kɩt tɩ tẽn-gãong beẽ, la m yeel Sɩyõ yaa: «Yãmb yaa mam nebã!»" 
Isaiah51:17 Zeruzalɛm, neke, bɩ f nek n yiki! Fo yũu Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugr dãamã sẽn be b nugẽ wã, fo yũ-a lame n tãag wamdã sɛɛga, tɩ f neng yilimdẽ!" 
Isaiah51:18 Kamb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dogã sʋka, ba a yembr ka be n na n tɛ yẽnda ye. Yẽnda sẽn wub kamb ninsã fãa sʋka, ba a yembr ka be n na n gãd yẽnda nug n peeg-a ye." 
Isaiah51:19 Yel-bãmbã b yiibã sẽn paam foomã, ãnda soab n na n yãb foom? Wãabo, la sãoong paama foom, kom la tẽn-kũum paama foom. Ãnda soab n na n bels foom?" 
Isaiah51:20 Fo kambã konga pãnga, n gãe soayã zut zĩigã fãa, wa walg sẽn lʋɩ tãoogẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã wʋm-b lame, Wẽnnaam tãs-b lame." 
Isaiah51:21 Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa nimbãan-neda, m kotame tɩ f kelge, fo neng yilimdame, la ka reezẽ rãam n yilimd fo nengã ye." 
Isaiah51:22 Ade, fo Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn sõngd b nebã yetame: «Mam na n deega mam sũ-puugr bõn-yũudlã sẽn yilimd nengã fo nugẽ, la fo kõn leb n yũ-a n baas ye!" 
Isaiah51:23 Mam na n dɩk-a lame n kõ neb nins sẽn dag n namsd foomã. Bãmb dag n yeta foom yaa: ‹Zõond tɩ tõnd tab n looge!› Fo rag n wẽnemda f poor n kõ bãmb tɩ b tab wa tẽn-gãong n looge. So-loaadb taba fo poorã wa sore.» 
Isaiah52:1 Sɩyõ, neke, bɩ f neke! Yeelg f pãngã! Zeruzalɛm tẽng sẽn welg toore, yeelg f fan-teedã! Bala, neb sẽn ka kẽ bãongo, la neb sẽn yaa rẽgd ka na n leb n wa fo pʋgẽ ye." 
Isaiah52:2 Zeruzalɛm, yik n pĩms f wubsgã, la f zĩndi! Sɩyõ tẽn-neer sẽn be yembd pʋgã, lok f sẽbdsã sẽn sẽb f yublã!" 
Isaiah52:3 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B koosa yãmb zaalem yĩnga, la b ka na n yao ligd n fãag foom ye.»" 
Isaiah52:4 Bala, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Hal pĩnda, mam nebã rag n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda sãand weoog Ezɩpt tẽnga. La Asiiri nebã namsa bãmb zaalem.»" 
Isaiah52:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «La b sẽn yõg mam nebã zaalmã, bõe la mam be ka n maandẽ?» Neb nins sẽn namsd bãmbã kaasdame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam yʋʋrã paamda paoogr wakat fãa." 
Isaiah52:6 Woto kɩtame tɩ mam nebã na n bãng mam yʋʋrã. Badaare, bãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa maam n gomd n yetẽ: «Ad maam!»" 
Isaiah52:7 Ade, ned ning sẽn dʋʋd tãmsã zut n togsd koe-noogã nao tara ra-sãnde, yẽnda togsda vɩ-bãan koɛɛgã, la a moond sũ-noog koɛɛga, n togsd fãagr koɛɛg n yet Sɩyõ yaa: «Fo Wẽnnaamã yaa rĩma!»" 
Isaiah52:8 Fo tẽn-gũudbã koees rãamd zẽkdame. Bãmb naaga taab n zẽkd b koees n kaasd sũ-noog kaasgo. Bala, bãmb nee Sẽn-Ka-Saab neng ne neng tɩ b lebg n wat Sɩyõ." 
Isaiah52:9 Zeruzalɛm raboodo, naag-y taab n kaas sũ-noog kaasgo! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab belsda b nebã, bãmb fãagda Zeruzalɛm." 
Isaiah52:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga b pʋ-peelem kangã tɩ buud a taabã fãa yãnde. La dũniyã kɩremsã fãa na n yãnda tõnd Wẽnnaamã fãagre. 
Isaiah52:11 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn tʋkd Sẽn-Ka-Saab lagdã, yi-y beenẽ n looge! Loog-y-yã! Da sɩɩs-y bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgd ye! Yi-y bõn-kãens sʋka! Yɩlg-y y mense!" 
Isaiah52:12 Da yi-y ne yãgb ye, da loog-y ne zoees ye. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee yãmb taoore, Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã na n pʋga yãmb poore." 
Isaiah52:13 Ade, mam tʋmtʋmdã na n tɩlgame. A na n yikame, a na n dʋʋme n kẽng yĩngri." 
Isaiah52:14 Neb wʋsg sẽn yãnd-a n yɛɛs to-to wã, yaa t'a sẽn yaa to-to wã, a nengã sẽn sãamã rag n ka leb n wẽnd ninsaala, la a yalẽ wã rag n ka leb n wẽnd ninsaalbã sẽn yaa a soabã ye." 
Isaiah52:15 Woto me, bãmb na n mesa neb wʋsg n yɩlg-ba, Rĩm-dãmb na n sĩnda b noor yẽnda taoore. Bala, bãmb na n yãnda b sẽn zɩ n wʋm tɩ b gomdã, la bãmb na n wʋma bũmb ning b sẽn zɩ n wʋmã võore." 
Isaiah53:1 Ãnda soab n tẽ bũmb ning b sẽn dag n togs tõndã? Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga ãnda soab b pãngã? 
Isaiah53:2 Bãmb bɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor wa tɩ-bi-polle, bãmb yii wa yẽgend sẽn tob n yi tẽn-koɛɛng zugu. Bãmb dag n ka tar ra-sãnd wall neerem, tɩ tõnd dat n ges-b ye, la bãmbã yasrã rag n ka tar bũmb tõnd sẽn dat ye." 
Isaiah53:3 Nebã paoog-b lame, b bas-b lame, bãmb dag n yaa ned sẽn paam toogo, la bãmb minima namsgo, bãmb lebga wa soab ning nebã sẽn wẽnemd b nens n base, b paooga bãmba, la tõnd dag n ka nand-b ye." 
Isaiah53:4 Sɩdã, yaa tõnd namsgã la bãmb deeg yã, la bãmb deega tõnd toodã. La tõnd gesa bãmb wa Wẽnnaam sɩbgr sẽn lʋɩ ned zug t'a namsdẽ." 
Isaiah53:5 B kõsa bãmb lʋgrã tõnd tʋʋm-beedã yĩnga, b pogla bãmb tõnd kongrã yĩnga. Sɩbgr ning sẽn wa ne tõnd vɩ-bãanã lʋɩɩ bãmb zugu, la yaa bãmb sẽn paam poglgã yĩng la tõnd paam maagre." 
Isaiah53:6 Tõnd fãa rag n yeebda wa piisi, ned kam fãa rag n maanda a sẽn date. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ tõnd fãa kongrã lʋɩ bãmb zugu." 
Isaiah53:7 B namsa bãmb n leng-ba, la bãmb ka tol n yaag b noor ye. Bãmb sĩnda b noor wa peosg b sẽn tar n dabd kʋʋb zĩigẽ, wa pe-bil sẽn sĩnd a noor a wõrsdbã taoorã, bãmb ka tol n yaag b noor ye." 
Isaiah53:8 B yõka bãmb ne pãnga, n kao b bʋʋdo. Bãmb zamaanẽ wã ned a bõe n maan sũ-sãang bãmb yĩnga? B yiisa bãmb dũni nin-vɩɩs sʋka, la yaa mam nebã tʋʋm-beedã yĩng la bãmb paam sɩbgre." 
Isaiah53:9 Baa ne bãmb sẽn ka tol n maan wẽngã, la baa bãmb noor sẽn ka tol n gom zãmb goamã, b tuu bãmb yaoog nin-wẽnsã yaad sʋka, la b naaga bãmb ne arzegs rãmb n mume." 
Isaiah53:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk yam n na n sãam b tʋmtʋmdã ne namsgo. Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb dɩka bãmb tɩ b yɩ sugr kũun maoongo, bãmb na n paama yagense, la b na n vɩɩmd n kaoosame, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋlsmã paam pidsg bãmb maasem yĩnga." 
Isaiah53:11 Bãmb sẽn paam toogã yĩnga, b na n yãnda vẽenem, la b na n tɩga ne bãmb bãngre. Mam tʋmtʋmdã sẽn yaa tɩrlem soabã na n waa ne tɩrlem buud wʋsg yĩnga, la b na n deega bãmb kongrã." 
Isaiah53:12 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam na n naag bãmb ne nin-kãsems n kõ kũuni. Bãmb na n naaga pãens rãmb n pʋɩ te-zɛɛdem. Bala, bãmb rɩka b meng n kõ kũum, la b sõda bãmb n naag tʋʋm-beed rãmbã. Dẽ, bãmb deega neb wʋsg yel-wẽna, la bãmb kẽe sʋk n paas zabrã koangdbã yĩnga." 
Isaiah54:1 Pʋg-kiiri, fo sẽn ka rogã, kaas ne sũ-noogo! Fo sẽn ka bãng rogem toogã, yɩɩl ne sũ-noog la tõogre. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «B sẽn bas pag ningã kamb na n yɩɩ wʋsg n yɩɩg pag ning sẽn ket a sɩdã yirã.»" 
Isaiah54:2 Yalg f fu-roogã, bɩ f tẽeg f fu-roogã pɛɛla, n da bas-a t'a yɩ sẽk ye! Paas f wĩyã woglem la f paas f biili wã pãnga." 
Isaiah54:3 Bala, fo na n yalga goabg la rɩtgo. Fo yagensã na n sooga buud a taabã, la b na n pidsa tẽms nins sẽn dag n yaa raboodã." 
Isaiah54:4 Da zoe rabeem ye, bala, fo kõn tol n paam yãnd ye. Da sulg f zug ye, bala, fo kõn tol n paam paoogr ye. N-yẽe! Fo na n yĩma f pʋg-sademdẽ yãndã yelle, la fo kõn tol n leb n tẽeg f pʋg-kõtẽ paoogrã yell ye." 
Isaiah54:5 Bala, soab ning sẽn naan-a foomã n yaa fo sɩda. Bãmb yʋʋr boondame tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba. Bãmb yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã n yaa fo fãagda. B boonda bãmb tɩ dũni gill Wẽnnaam." 
Isaiah54:6 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebg n boonda foom, wa pag sɩd sẽn bas-a t'a be sũ-sãang pʋga. Fo Wẽnnaamã sokdame: «Ned tõe n basa a bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ paga?»" 
Isaiah54:7 Mam dag n basa foom wakat bilf pʋgẽ, la mam na n leb n deega foom ne nimbãan-zoeer kãsenga." 
Isaiah54:8 Mam sũur dag n puuga wʋsg ne foom, tɩ mam dag n wẽnemd n bas foom wakat bilf pʋgẽ, la ne nonglem sẽn ka sɛta, mam na n zoee fo nimbãanega. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo fãagdã n yeele." 
Isaiah54:9 Ne maam, a na n yɩɩ wa a Nowe wakatẽ wã. Mam dag n wẽename t'a Nowe wakatẽ koomã buud ka na n leb n zĩnd dũni zug ye. Dẽ, mam wẽendame me tɩ m kõn tol n leb n yik m sũur ne foom, la m kõn tol n leb n tãs foom ye." 
Isaiah54:10 Baa tãmsã sã n looge, baa kunkubã sã n miimdẽ, mam nonglmã fo yĩngã kõn tol n looge, la mam zems-n-taar kaoolã kõn tol n miim ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn zoet fo nimbãanegã n yeele." 
Isaiah54:11 Zeruzalɛm sẽn be nimbãaneg pʋga, saag sob-kẽeng pãba foom, la ned ba a yembr ka belsd foom ye! Mam na n lebs n mee foom ne kug-sõama. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yẽbgrã yɩ ne safɩɩr kugri." 
Isaiah54:12 Mam na n maana fo peem-leesã ne kug-neeba. La m maan f kʋɩlemsã ne kug-neeba, la fo lalgã fãa na n yɩɩ ne kug sẽn tar yõodo." 
Isaiah54:13 Fo kambã fãa na n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab karen-biisi, la fo kambã na n paama vɩ-bãan wʋsgo." 
Isaiah54:14 Tɩrlmã na n kõo foom pãnga. Zãag f meng ne maan ned pãnga. Fo kõn leb n zoe rabeem ye, la yɛɛsg kõn leb n paam-fo, a kõn tol n leb n pẽneg foom ye." 
Isaiah54:15 Ned sã n zabd ne foom, ka maam n tʋm a soab ye. Ned ning sẽn dat-a n zab ne foom na n lʋɩɩme." 
Isaiah54:16 Maam n naan sãeyã, t'a zugd bug-saal n kut zab-teed wa a sẽn date. La yaa maam n naan sãamd t'a sãam bãmba." 
Isaiah54:17 Zab-teoog ning fãa b sẽn maan n na n zab ne foomã kõn tol n tõog n maan foom bũmb ye. La ned ning fãa sẽn na n yik-a bʋʋd zĩigẽ n dõd foom, fo na n kɩtame t'a kong bʋʋm. Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋmtʋmdbã pʋɩɩr la woto, tɩrlem ning sẽn yit mam nengẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah55:1 Hey! Yãmb dãmb fãa ko-yũud sẽn tarã, wa-y koom zĩigẽ! Baa sẽn ka tar-a ligd bɩ a wa! Wa-y n da-y rɩɩb n dɩ, wa-y n da-y reezẽ rãam ne bĩisim! Yaa zaalem, ka yaood ligd ye!" 
Isaiah55:2 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dɩkd y ligd n daad bũmb ning sẽn ka rɩɩbo? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb namsd y mens bũmb sẽn ka pit pʋg yĩnga? Dẽ wã, kelg-y maam tɩ y na n dɩɩ rɩ-sõngo, la yãmb na n paama rɩ-nood n dɩ n tɩge." 
Isaiah55:3 Yok-y y tʋbr n kelg la y wa mam nengẽ. Kelg-y-yã, la y na vɩɩmde. Mam na n maana kaool sẽn ka sɛt ne yãmba, yaa nonglem ning mam sẽn tar a Davɩɩd yĩng wakat fãa wã yĩnga." 
Isaiah55:4 Mam kɩtame tɩ yẽnda yɩ kaset soab buud a taabã yĩnga, la a yɩ naab n soog buud a taabã." 
Isaiah55:5 Fo na n boola bu-zẽms fo sẽn ka mi, la bu-zẽms sẽn ka mi foom na n zoee n waa fo nengẽ. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soab n kɩt tɩ fo tar waoogrã maasem yĩnga." 
Isaiah55:6 Bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab wakat ning yãmb sẽn ket n tõe n yãnd-ba. Bool-y bãmb wakat ning bãmb sẽn ket n pẽ ne yãmba. 
Isaiah55:7 Bɩ nin-wẽng bas sor ning a sẽn tũudã, la bɩ tʋʋm-wẽns maandã bas a tags wẽnsã, n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn kõt sugr wʋsgã, tõe n zoe yẽnda nimbãanega." 
Isaiah55:8 Bala, mam tagsdã ka yembr ne yãmb tagsdã ye, la yãmb soayã ka yembr ne mam soayã ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah55:9 Yĩngr ne tẽng sẽn zãr ne taab to-to wã, mam soayã me zãra ne yãmb soayã a woto, la mam tagsdã zãra ne yãmb tagsdã." 
Isaiah55:10 Ade, wa saag sẽn niidã, la wa neez sẽn yit yĩngr n sigd n ka lebgd n leb t'a ka madg tẽn-gãongã n kɩt t'a bʋkã, tɩ bõn-biisã bul n yi n kõ ka-koaad bõn-koaadla, n kɩt tɩ kom sẽn tar a soabã paam dɩɩbã," 
Isaiah55:11 woto me, gomd ning sẽn yit mam noorẽ wã, ka na n lebg n wa mam nengẽ n ka maan a tʋʋmde, n ka pids mam tʋlsmã, la a ka maan bũmb ning yĩng mam sẽn tʋm-a t'a maanã ye." 
Isaiah55:12 N-yẽe! Yãmb na n yii ne sũ-noogo, la b na n tɛɛ yãmb vɩ-bãan pʋga. Tãmsã ne kunkubã na n kaasa ne sũ-noog yãmb taoore, la weoogã tɩɩs fãa na n pãba nug-pogse." 
Isaiah55:13 Gõosã zĩig na n lebga sɩprɛs tɩɩs zĩiga, la mirt tɩɩs na n deega mood zĩiga. A na n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã zẽkr yĩnga, la a na n yɩɩ bãnd sẽn paad wakat sẽn ka sɛta, la a kõn tol n menem ye." 
Isaiah56:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Sak-y tɩ zemsg zĩndi, la y maan wa sẽn zems tɩrlmã. Bala, mam fãagrã waoong kolgame, la mam tɩrlmã rat n pukame." 
Isaiah56:2 Bark bee ned ning sẽn maand mam sẽn yeelã zugu, ninsaal ning fãa sẽn yaa sakda, la a sakd vʋʋsg daarã n ka sãamd-a, n gũusd a meng n ka maand tʋʋm-wẽnse.»" 
Isaiah56:3 Bɩ sãan sẽn sakd Sẽn-Ka-Saab ra yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n welga maam ne b nebã» ye! Bɩ zu-soab ra yeele: «Mam yaa tɩ-koɛɛnga.» 
Isaiah56:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Zu-soben-dãmb nins sẽn sakd mam vʋʋsg rayã, n yãk yam n maand sẽn noom maamã, la b yalsd kãenkãe mam kaoolã pʋgẽ wã," 
Isaiah56:5 mam na n kõo bãmb kug-vigindg ne yʋʋr sẽn yaa sõama n yɩɩd kom-dibli la kom-pugli mam doogẽ wã, la mam zakẽ wã. Mam na n kõo bãmb yʋʋr wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga, la a kõn tol n menem ye."
