Isaiah56:6 Sãamb nins sẽn loe b mens ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n maand bãmb tʋʋmdã la b nong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã, hal n lebg bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn sakd vʋʋsg rayã n ka rat n sãam-bã, la b yalsd kãenkãe mam kaoolã pʋgã," 
Isaiah56:7 mam na n talla bãmb n dʋ mam tãng ning sẽn welg toorã zugu, la m kɩt tɩ b paam sũ-noog mam pʋʋsg roogã pʋga. Mam na n deega bãmb maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne b maand a taabã mam tẽn-kugrã zugu. Bala, b na n boola mam doogã tɩ ‹pʋʋsg roog buudã fãa yĩnga.›" 
Isaiah56:8 Ade, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam ning sẽn tigim Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n sãeegã yetame: «Mam na n tigma neb a taab n naag yẽnda nebã m sẽn dag n zoe n tigmã.»" 
Isaiah56:9 We-rũmsã fãa ne rũms nins sẽn be tʋgẽ wã, wa-y n dɩ-y-yã!" 
Isaiah56:10 Israyɛll tẽn-gũudbã fãa yaa zoense, la b ka mi baa fɩ. Bãmb yaa wa baas sẽn yaa mugsi, n ka tõe n wes ye. Bãmb zãmsdame, bãmb tʋʋmd yaa gãaga, bãmb nonga gõeem." 
Isaiah56:11 Bãmb yaa wa baas sẽn yaa yão-be-rãmba, bãmb ka tol n tɩgd ye. Bãmb yaa pe-kɩɩmb sẽn ka tol n mi baa fɩ ye. B fãa yaa neb sẽn maand b sẽn date, ned kam fãa baooda a meng sõngr bala." 
Isaiah56:12 Bãmb yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ m na n waa ne reezẽ rãam, tõnd na n yũu rã-toose! Beoog me, d na n leb n maana a woto. Rãamã sẽn ketã yaa wʋsgo!»" 
Isaiah57:1 Nin-tɩrg kiidame tɩ ned ba a yembr toog ka ye. B mumda nin-sõamyã tɩ ned ba ye ka mi tɩ b sẽn mum nin-tɩrgã yaa sẽn na n yɩl t'a põs toog ye. 
Isaiah57:2 Sẽn kẽnd-a zemsg sor zug na n kẽe vɩ-bãan pʋga. Yẽnda na n gãanda a gãagẽ n vʋʋse. 
Isaiah57:3 Yãmb a pʋg-bag-bʋgd kambã, pʋg-koos-m-meng kambã, yãmb dãmb sẽn maand yoobo, kolg-y ka!" 
Isaiah57:4 Ãnda soab la yãmb sẽn yaandã? Ãnda la yãmb yaagd y noy hãa n wõogd y zelemd n paoogdẽ wã? Yãmb ka kom-wegems bal la, yãmb ka zĩrẽ-be-neb buud sɩda?" 
Isaiah57:5 Yãmb bee tɩ-bɛd tẽngr n wɩngd ne wẽngã ratem, la y be tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn tar maasmã tẽngre, n koot kom-bãoonegã ko-soayã pʋs ne tãmsã sẽgsẽ." 
Isaiah57:6 Yãmb pʋɩɩrã bee ko-soogã kug-saalã sʋka, yãmb pʋɩɩr la rẽndã. Yãmb daagda maand koom bãmb yĩnga, la y kõt bãmb maand sẽn yõogd bugum kũuni. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Bõn-kãensã fãa tõe n belsa mam sũur sɩda?»" 
Isaiah57:7 Yãmb dɩgla y gãas tãms sẽn zẽk n yaa lug-lug zutu. Yãmb dʋʋda beenẽ n maand maando. 
Isaiah57:8 Yãmb dɩkda y wẽn-naandgã n ning y kʋɩlengã pẽkẽ, lugrã poore. Bala, yãmb zãaga y meng ne maam, n yees y fut n dʋ y gãag zug n maneg zĩiga, n maand pʋleng ne raopa, la y nong n gãe ne bãmbã, yãmb geta bãmba." 
Isaiah57:9 Yãmb baoo kaam n zoe n kẽng a Melɛk nengẽ, yãmb paasa y parfẽ wã waooglem, la y tʋm y tʋmtʋmdbã tɩ b kẽng zĩ-zãrgẽ, yãmb kɩtame tɩ b sud n tãag hal kɩɩm-kulgu." 
Isaiah57:10 Yãmb sẽn kẽn wʋsgã yĩnga, yãmb yɛɛme la y ka yeel tɩ y na n basame tɩ lʋɩ ye! Yãmb ket n tara pãnga, la fo ka tol n yɛ me ye." 
Isaiah57:11 Ãnda soab la yãmb dag n zoeta, ãnda soab n yɛɛs yãmb tɩ y yag zĩrẽ, n ka leb n tẽr mam yelle, la y ka tagsd mam yelle? Rẽ yĩnga, ka mam sẽn sĩnd m noor hal daar zãrã sɩda? Sẽn paas me, yãmb ka zoet maam ye." 
Isaiah57:12 Mam na n moona yãmb tɩrlmã ne y tʋʋmã, la b ka na n tall yõod ne yãmb ye." 
Isaiah57:13 Yãmb kɛleng wakate, bɩ yãmb wẽn-naandsã y sẽn tigsã fãag-yã! Sebg n na n loog ne bõn-kãensã fãa, b na n fʋʋsa bãmb tɩ b looge. La ned ning sẽn dɩka maam n maan a zĩ-soalgdga, a na n sooga tẽngã tɩ yɩ a pʋɩɩre, la a na n deega mam tãng ning sẽn welg toorã n sooge." 
Isaiah57:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yeelame yaa: «Tuk-y sore, tuk-y sore, maneg-y sorã, la y yiis bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa gɩdgr mam nebã sor zugã!" 
Isaiah57:15 Bala, soab ning sẽn yɩɩd fãa wã, la sẽn paad wakat sẽn kõn sa wã, tɩ b yʋʋrã welg toorã yetame: «Mam bee hal yĩngr zĩig sẽn welg toor pʋgẽ, la m bee ne ned ning sũur sẽn sãame, soab ning sẽn be paoogr pʋgã, mam bee ne soab ning sɩɩgã sẽn yɛ, n na n bels sũ-pa-noaang soabã." 
Isaiah57:16 Mam ka na n zab ne bãmb wakat fãa ye, la m ka na n yik m sũur wakat fãa ye. Bala, yaa mam taoor la ninsaal sɩɩgã baasda, yaa vʋʋsem ning mam sẽn naanã." 
Isaiah57:17 Bãmb zoe-bõnã yĩnga, mam sũurã puugame tɩ m sɩbg-ba, la m solga m meng m sũ-puugrã pʋga. La bãmb sẽn yaa kɩɩsdbã yĩnga, b maana wa b sẽn date." 
Isaiah57:18 Mam yãnda bãmb manesmã, la m na n maag-b lame. Mam na n tɛɛ bãmba, la m bels bãmb wʋsgo, bãmb ne neb nins sẽn yãbd bãmbã." 
Isaiah57:19 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yɩɩl yi bãmb noyẽ wã.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab mengã yetame: «Sẽn be-b zĩ-zãrsã ne neb nins sẽn pẽ wã na n paama vɩ-bãane. Mam na n maag-b lame!» 
Isaiah57:20 La nin-wẽnsã wẽnda wa ko-kãsengã sẽn lengd n ka tõe n yals sɩɩ wã, tɩ yẽnda koomã kãagd rẽgdã n gudgd begdã." 
Isaiah57:21 Mam Wẽnnaamã yeelame: «Vɩ-bãan ka be nin-wẽns yĩng ye.» 
Isaiah58:1 Wɩk f meng n kelem la f ra sĩnd ye! Zẽk f koɛɛg wa baorg n togs mam nebã b beegrã, togs a Zakoob yagensã b yel-wẽnã!" 
Isaiah58:2 Bãmb baooda maam beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, bãmb dat n bãnga mam soayã, wa buud sẽn maand sẽn zemse, wa bãmb ka bas b Wẽnnaam tɩrlmã ye. Bãmb kota maam tɩrlem bʋ-kaoore, bãmb dat n kolga Wẽnnaam." 
Isaiah58:3 Sã n mikame tɩ yãmb ka ne, bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd loet noore? Sã n mikame tɩ yãmb ka mi, bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd na n mong d meng rɩɩbo? Daar ning yãmb sẽn loet noorã, yãmb tʋmda y mens tʋʋma, la y namsd y tʋmtʋmdbã." 
Isaiah58:4 Ade, yãmb sã n loe noore, yaa zab taab ne nokoɛɛma, la y maand pʋ-toog n pãbd taab nug-gila. Yãmb ka loet noorã wa a sẽn tog n yɩ to-to daar pʋgẽ wã ye, la Wẽnnaam ka tõe n zĩnd yĩngr n wʋm ye." 
Isaiah58:5 Rẽ yĩnga, yaa no-loeer a woto buud la mam dat sɩda, yaa ned sẽn mongd a meng bũmb daar pʋgẽ? Yaa ned sẽn sulgd a zug wa tãnwĩiga, la a yeelg bot n gãe tompeglmẽ la? Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb boonda yõwã tɩ no-loeere? Yõwã yaa daar sẽn tat Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam sɩda?" 
Isaiah58:6 Ad no-loeer ning buud sẽn tat mam yam: Logs-y wẽng maaneg loetsã, yiis-y yembsã b yembdã pʋga, kõ-y neb nins b sẽn namsdã lohorem, la y kao b sẽn balg b rãmbã fãa balgrã." 
Isaiah58:7 No-loeer sẽn noom maam yaa yãk f rɩɩb n kõ kom sẽn tar a soaba, la peeg nimbãan-nebã sẽn ka tar zĩigã n kuil f yiri. Bao fut n yeelg neb nins sẽn yaa bɛɛlã, la f ra solg f meng ne f ba-biig ye." 
Isaiah58:8 Dẽ, yãmb vẽenemã na n puka wa zĩ-yẽegre, la y na n paama maagr tao-tao. Yãmb tɩrlmã na n lʋɩɩ yãmb taoore, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã na n pʋga yãmb poore." 
Isaiah58:9 Dẽ, yãmb sã n boole, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leokame. Yãmb sã n bool n kos sõngre, b yetame: «Ad maam!» Yãmb sã n ka kɩt tɩ balgr ning sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã zãag ne-fo, la y kɩt tɩ pãn-maanegã sɛ, la y bas nebã paoogre, la y bas y sẽn gomd gom-wẽnsã tɩ sɛ," 
Isaiah58:10 yãmb sã n dɩk y meng rɩɩb n kõ kom sẽn tar-a soabã, la y kõ naong soab rɩɩb t'a rɩ n tɩge, yãmb vẽenem na n yãga lik bida pʋga, la yãmb lik bida na n lebga vẽenem wa wĩntoogo." 
Isaiah58:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tɛɛ yãmb wakat fãa, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb paam dɩɩb zĩ-peen-daagẽ n dɩ n tɩge, la b na n leb n kõo yãmb yĩnsã pãnga. Yãmb na n yɩɩ wa zẽed zĩig sẽn tɩg koom, la y yɩ wa kʋɩlg koom sẽn ka tol n sɛtẽ ye." 
Isaiah58:12 Yãmb maasem yĩnga, b na n lebs n mee hal pĩnd rabo-kʋdã, yãmb na n lebs n mee hal pĩnd zamaanẽ dotã b zĩigẽ. B na n boola yãmb tɩ ‹neb sẽn maneg lal-wedse›, la ‹neb sẽn manegd soay tɩ neb tõe n wa zĩnd tẽngẽ wã.›" 
Isaiah58:13 Yãmb sã n yõk y naoor vʋʋsg daarã, la y sã n ka tʋm y tʋʋmã mam daarã sẽn welg toorã daare, yãmb sã n maan sũ-noog ne vʋʋsg daarã, yãmb sã n dɩk Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã tɩ yɩ daar sẽn segd ne waoogre, yãmb sã n waoog vʋʋsg daarã n ka maan y sẽn date, n ka tʋm y meng tʋʋmã, la y ka yals n bao gom-wogdo," 
Isaiah58:14 dẽ, yãmb na n maana y sũ-noogã ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb dʋ tẽngã zĩ-zãongls zutu, la m dɩlg yãmb ne y yaab a Zakoob rogem-pʋɩɩrã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng noor n yeele." 
Isaiah59:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã ka koɛɛg n ka tõe n fãag tõnd ye, bãmb ka tʋb-kɩd n ka tõe n wʋm ye." 
Isaiah59:2 La yaa yãmb kongrã n welgd yãmb ne y Wẽnnaamã, yãmb yel-wẽnã n kɩt tɩ bãmb wẽnemd n bas yãmba, yaa yãmb yel-wẽnã n gɩdg tɩ bãmb ka tõe n kelg yãmb ye." 
Isaiah59:3 Bala, yãmb nusã rẽgmã ne zɩɩm, tɩ yãmb kongrã rẽgem yãmb nug-bi wã. Yãmb noyã yagda zĩrẽ, la yãmb zɛlma wã gomda zãmb goam." 
Isaiah59:4 Ned ba a yembr ka be n gomd ne pʋ-peelem ye, ned ba a yembr ka be n togsd sɩd bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye. Bãmb dɩka b teegrã n teeg vɩʋʋgo, la b gomd goam sẽn ka sɩda. Bãmb saagda wẽnem maanego, la a rogda wẽnga." 
Isaiah59:5 Bãmb wũunduda põeer gɛla, la b wʋgd sʋlg gãmbdo. Ned ning sẽn wãb-a bãmb gɛlã kiidame. La b sã n wãag b gelle, yaa põeer n yit beenẽ." 
Isaiah59:6 Bãmb gãnegãmbdã ka sekd fuug wʋgb ye, bãmb tʋʋmã ka tõe n dɩk n pil b mens ye. Bãmb tʋʋmã yaa tʋʋm-wẽnse, bãmb nusã pida ne nen-kegl-tʋʋma." 
Isaiah59:7 Bãmb naoã rabda wẽng maanego, bãmb tʋʋla ne bʋʋm soab zɩɩm daagre. Bãmb tagsg yaa tɩ maan wẽng bala. Sãoong ne wẽng bee bãmb soayã zutu." 
Isaiah59:8 Bãmb ka mi vɩ-bãan sor ye, la tɩrlem ka be bãmb sẽn pɩʋʋgẽ ye. Bãmb tugda so-golemse, la ned ning fãa sẽn tũud so-kãens ka mi vɩ-bãan ye." 
Isaiah59:9 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ zemsg zãr ne tõndo, la tɩrlem ka tõe n pẽneg tõnd ye. Tõnd dag n tẽeda vẽenem, la ade, d bee lik bida pʋga, tõnd dag n gũuda zĩ-yẽegre, la tõnd kẽnda lik-kãseng pʋga." 
Isaiah59:10 Tõnd babenda wa zoang sẽn tigsd lalga, tõnd babenda wa ned nin sẽn ka ne. Tõnd lagsd n lʋɩta wĩnto-sʋk wa zĩ-sobdo, tõnd vɩɩme la d yaool n yaa wa neb sẽn ki bala." 
Isaiah59:11 Tõnd fãa kaasda wa rigd-n-yĩidsi, tõnd wũusda wa manwala. Tõnd dag n gũuda zemsgo, la d ka paam fɩ. Tõnd dag n data fãagre, la a zãaga ne tõndo!" 
Isaiah59:12 Bala, tõnd beegrã yaa wʋsg yãmb taoore, la tõnd yel-wẽnã kõta kaset tɩ d ka zems ye. Tõnd beegrã bee ne tõndo, la tõnd mii d kongrã." 
Isaiah59:13 Tõnd kɩɩsame la d zãmb Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tõnd leba poorẽ n zãag ne d Wẽnnaamã. Tõnd gomda nen-kegl-goam ne kãnegr goamã, tõnd gomda zĩrẽ-be-goamã, la d tagsd zĩrẽ d sũyã pʋse," 
Isaiah59:14 n kɩt tɩ zemsg targ n bas-do, tɩ tɩrlem zãag ne-do. Bʋ-tɩrg ka leb n be bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye, la maan sɩd ka kẽed beenẽ ye." 
Isaiah59:15 Sɩdã menemame, la b fãada ned ning sẽn ka maand wẽnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab neeme tɩ zemsg ka leb n beẽ ye, tɩ bõn-kãng ka noom bãmb ye." 
Isaiah59:16 Bãmb yãame tɩ ned ba a yembr ka tol n beẽ ye. Bãmb sũur sãama ned sẽn ka be n na n kẽes a toogã yĩnga. Dẽ, bãmb mengã nug n kõt bãmb tõogre, la bãmb della b mengã tɩrlem." 
Isaiah59:17 Bãmb yeelga tɩrlem wa gãn-tika, n fõgen fãagr wa kut pugla. Bãmb yeelga sũ-dokr wa fuugu, la b pil b mengã ne nonglem-kãseng wa fuugu." 
Isaiah59:18 Bãmb na n lebs n yaoo ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde. Sũ-puugr na n yɩ b zabd-n-taasã rẽnda, bãmb na n dola b bɛɛbã wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmde. Bãmb na n yaoo tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmde." 
Isaiah59:19 Woto, yaang la taoor dãmbã na n zoee Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã ne b ziirã. Zabd-n-taagã sã n wa, wa ko-zoetem, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sebgã na n diga yẽnda t'a zoe." 
Isaiah59:20 Fãagd n na n wa fãag Sɩyõ, la a fãag a Zakoob yagens nins sẽn bas b tʋʋm-beedã n lebg n wa wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah59:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Ad kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne bãmbã: Mam Sɩɩgã sẽn be ne foomã, la a be mam goam nins mam sẽn ning fo noorẽ wã zugã, na n zĩnda fo noorẽ wã, la a zĩnd fo yagensã ne f yagens yagensã noy pʋse. Yaa sẽn sɩng ne moasã la wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Isaiah60:1 Yik n yãge, fo vẽenemã watame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã yãgda fo zugu." 
Isaiah60:2 Ade, lik bida luda dũniyã gilli, tɩ buud toay-toayã be lik pʋgẽ. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yika fo zugu, bãmb ziirã puka fo zugu." 
Isaiah60:3 Bu-zẽms na n kẽna fo vẽenemẽ wã, la rĩm-dãmb na n kẽna fo vẽenemã sẽn tãoosda pʋga." 
Isaiah60:4 Zẽk f neng n ges sẽn gilg foomã fãa. Bãmb fãa tigimda taab n wat fo nengẽ. Fo kom-dibli wã yita zĩ-zãrgẽ n watẽ, neb bugda fo kom-pugli wã b nusẽ." 
Isaiah60:5 Fo sã n yãnd bãmba, fo nengã na n pɩlame, fo sũurã na n yɩɩ noog wʋsgo, la yaa ko-kãsengã arzegsã sẽn wat fo nengẽ wã, ne bu-zẽmsã laogã sẽn wat fo nengẽ wã yĩnga." 
Isaiah60:6 Fo tẽngã na n pida ne yʋgma wʋsgo. Yaa Madiyã ne Efa tẽng yʋgma, la b fãa yita Seba tẽnga. Bãmb zɩta sãnem ne wisd n watẽ, n moond Sẽn-Ka-Saab pẽgrã." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedaar tẽng rũm-kʋʋngã na n tigma fo nengẽ. La Nebayot tẽng pe-raadã na n yɩɩ fo tʋʋmdã yĩnga. B na n dɩka bãmb n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum mam tẽn-kugrã zugu, la m na n deega b maoongã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ mam doogã sẽn tar ziirã yãge." 
Isaiah60:8 Yaa ãnda rãmb la sẽn yɩgd wa sawatã, la b yɩgd wa manwal sẽn dabd b roogẽ?" 
Isaiah60:9 Bala, tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã maanda tẽeb ne maam. La yaa Tarsɩɩs tẽng koom kogendã n be taoor n dabd n na n tɩ tall fo kambã sẽn be zĩ-zãrgẽ wã n wa, ne b wanzuri wã la b sãnemã, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã sẽn kɩt tɩ fo tar ziirã yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Isaiah60:10 Sãamb n na n lebs n me fo tẽngã lalse, la b rĩm-dãmb na n tʋma yãmb yĩnga. Bala, mam sũ-puugrã wakate, mam sɩbga foom, la mam sõmblmã pʋga, mam zoee fo nimbãanega." 
Isaiah60:11 Fo kʋɩlemsã na n pagsa wakat fãa, wĩndg ne yʋngo, b kõn tol n leb n pag ye. La yaa sẽn na n yɩl n bas tɩ bu-zẽmsã laogã ne b rĩm-dãmbã la b poorẽ dãmbã tõog n kẽ fo pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah60:12 Bala, buud ning ne soolem ning sẽn ka na n sak foomã na n sãamame. B na n sãama bu-zẽm-kãense." 
Isaiah60:13 Libã tẽng ziirã na n waa fo nengẽ, yaa sɩprɛs raad ne orme la buyiis raado. Bãmb fãa na n wa paasa mam sɛk roogã zĩig neerlem. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ zĩig ning mam sẽn dogend m naoã paam ziiri." 
Isaiah60:14 Sẽn dag n paoogd-b foomã kamb na n sulga b mens n wa fo nengẽ, bãmb na n wa wõgemda fo naoã tẽngre. Yaa sẽn dag n yaand-b foomã fãa. Bãmb na n boola foom tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽnga›, la ‹Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã Sɩyõ.›" 
Isaiah60:15 B rag n bas-f lame la b kisg-fu, tɩ ned rag n ka pɩʋʋgd fo sẽnẽ ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo paam waoogr wakat fãa, la m kɩt tɩ f paam sũ-noog zamaan woo zamaane." 
Isaiah60:16 Fo na n yẽsma buud a taab bĩisim, fo na n yẽsma rĩm-dãmb bĩisa. Woto, fo na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo fãagda, n yaa a Zakoob yagensã pãng soaba." 
Isaiah60:17 Mam na n waa ne sãnem t'a reeg zũud zĩiga, la m wa ne wanzuri t'a reeg kut zĩiga. La m wa ne zũud t'a reeg raad zĩiga. La m wa ne kut t'a reeg kug zĩiga. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ vɩ-bãan gũ foom, la m kɩt tɩ tɩrlem soog foom." 
Isaiah60:18 B kõn leb n wʋm tɩ b gomd nen-kegl-tʋʋm yell fo tẽngã pʋga, wall zɛɛbo, wall sãoong fo soolmẽ wã ye. Fo na n pʋda f lalsã yʋʋr tɩ ‹fãagre›, la f pʋd f tẽngã noy kʋɩlems yʋʋr tɩ ‹pẽgre.›" 
Isaiah60:19 Wĩndga, wĩntoogã kõn leb n yɩ fo vẽenem ye, la yʋngo kiuugã kõn leb n kõ foom a vẽenem ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n yɩ fo vẽenem wakat fãa, yaa fo Wẽnnaamã n na n yɩ fo ziiri." 
Isaiah60:20 Fo wĩntoogã kõn leb n kẽ ye, la fo kiuugã kõn leb n paam ki-lik ye. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n yɩ fo vẽenem wakat fãa. Fo sũ-sãangã rayã na n sɛɛme." 
Isaiah60:21 Fo nebã zãng na n yɩɩ nin-tɩrse, bãmb na n sooga tẽngã wakat fãa. Yaa tɩ-tobeng ning mam sẽn selã, yaa mam mengã n tʋm woto, n na n wilg mam ziirã." 
Isaiah60:22 Ned ning sẽn yaa-a bilfã na n lebga neb tusri, la sẽn paood-a n yɩɩdã na n lebga buud sẽn tar pãnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame t'a wakatã sã n ta bɩ yɩ tao-tao." 
Isaiah61:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã bee mam zugu, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka maam. Bãmb tʋma maam tɩ m togs koe-noogã naong-rãmba, la m bels sũ-sãang-rãmbã, tɩ m togs b sẽn balg b rãmbã fãagr koɛɛga, la m togs sẽn be-b bi-bees roogã tɩ b na n paama yolsgo." 
Isaiah61:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma maam tɩ m moon nonglem yʋʋmde, tɩ m moon tõnd Wẽnnaamã sũ-dokr daarã, la m bels sũ-sãang rãmbã," 
Isaiah61:3 tɩ m kɩt tɩ Sɩyõ nebã sẽn be sũ-sãang pʋgã leb n paam sũ-noogo, la m yãk tompeglmã sẽn be b zutẽ wã, la m teeg b zutã ne waoogr peende, n sõog sũ-noog kaam la ka sũ-sãang ye. La m yeelg-b ziir fuug la ka nimbãaneg ye. B na n boonda bãmb tɩ ‹tɩrlem terebẽnt tɩɩse›, n yaa tɩɩs ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sele›, sẽn wilgd tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara ziiri." 
Isaiah61:4 Bãmb na n lebs n mee kʋdem-wẽndẽ raboodã, la b lebs n maneg hal pĩnd zĩis nins sẽn dag n sãamã. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ tẽms nins sẽn dag n yaa we-rasempʋɩɩsã leb n paam meebo, yaa tẽms nins sẽn dag n sãam n dɩg zamaan woo zamaanã." 
Isaiah61:5 Sãamb n na n wa beenẽ, n wa gũ yãmb rũm-bãoonegã, tẽn-taas neb n na n yɩ yãmb koaadba, la b yɩ reezẽ tɩɩs gũudba." 
Isaiah61:6 La yãmba, b na n boola yãmb tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan-kʋʋdba›, tɩ ‹tõnd Wẽnnaamã tʋmtʋmdba.› Yãmb na n dɩɩ buud a taabã arzegse, la yãmb na n yeelga bãmb ziirã." 
Isaiah61:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B sẽn dag n ning bãmb yãndã yĩnga, bãmb na n deega pʋɩɩr a yiibu. Bãmb sẽn dag n paamd paoogrã, b na n kaasa ne sũ-noog b pʋɩɩrã yĩnga, b na n paama pʋɩɩrã naoor a yiibu, la bãmb sũ-noogã ka na n tol n sɛ ye." 
Isaiah61:8 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga zemsgo, la m kisa wẽgb ne wẽnem. Mam na n keoo bãmb wa sẽn segde, la m maan kaool sẽn ka sɛt ne bãmba." 
Isaiah61:9 Buud a taabã na n bãnga bãmb yagensã, la b bãng bãmb pendã nebã, bu-zẽmsã sʋka. Neb nins fãa sẽn na n yãnd bãmbã na n bãngame tɩ b yaa buud Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ning barka.»" 
Isaiah61:10 Mam paamda m sũ-noogã Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, mam na n kɩdma wʋsg mam Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Bala, bãmb yeelga maam fãagr fuugu, la b yeelg maam tɩrlem kobre, wa pʋg-paal sɩd sẽn fõgend a maanfo, wa maan-kʋʋd sẽn fõgen a pugl-neere, la wa pʋg-paal sẽn ning a fan-teedo." 
Isaiah61:11 Sɩd me, wa bõn-buud sẽn bund n yit tẽn-gãongã zugã, la wa zẽed zĩigẽ zẽ-buud sẽn bund n yitã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ tɩrlem, ne pẽgr bul n yi a woto buud a taabã fãa nifẽ." 
Isaiah62:1 Sɩyõ yĩnga, mam ka na n sĩnd ye. Zeruzalɛm yĩnga, mam ka na n zĩnd sɩɩ ye. Hal tɩ yẽnda tɩrlmã yãmb zĩig fãa wa vẽenem, tɩ yẽnda fãagrã yãmb zĩig fãa wa b sẽn yõgen bug-vɩlenga." 
Isaiah62:2 Dẽ, buud a taabã na n yãnda fo tɩrlmã, la rĩm-dãmbã fãa na n yãnda fo ziirã. Bãmb na n boola foom ne yʋ-paalg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng noor sẽn na n pʋdã." 
Isaiah62:3 Fo na n yɩɩ ziir maanf Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã pʋga, la wa naam peen-vindg fo Wẽnnaamã nugẽ." 
Isaiah62:4 B kõn leb n bool foom tɩ b sẽn bas a soabã ye. B kõn leb n bool fo tẽngã tɩ raboog ye. B na n boola foom tɩ ‹mam sũ-noog sẽn be ne a soaba›, la b bool f tẽngã tɩ ‹pag b sẽn peege.› Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur nooma ne foom, la b na n leb n sak n deega f tẽngã tɩ yɩ a paga." 
Isaiah62:5 Wa bi-bɩɩg sẽn kẽed kãadem ne pʋg-sadã, woto me, fo kom-dibli wã na n leb n maana kãadem ne foom, la wa rao sũur sẽn noom ne a pʋg-paal to-to wã, woto me, fo Wẽnnaamã sũur na n yɩɩ noog ne foom." 
Isaiah62:6 Zeruzalɛm, mam ninga tẽn-gũudb fo lalsã zutu. La wĩndg ne yʋngo, bãmb ka na n sĩnd ye. Yãmb dãmb sẽn tẽegd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yellã, vʋʋsg ka be yãmb yĩng ye!" 
Isaiah62:7 Da bas-y tɩ b vʋʋs ye, pẽdg-y-b hal tɩ b wa lebs n me Zeruzalɛm, n kɩt t'a paam waoogr dũniyã zugu." 
Isaiah62:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽena ne b meng nug-rɩtgo, la ne b kangã pãng n yeele: «Mam ka na n leb n dɩk fo koodã n kõ f bɛɛbã tɩ b rɩ ye, la bu-zẽms kõn leb n yũ fo reezẽ rãamã f sẽn nams n paamã ye." 
Isaiah62:9 La neb nins sẽn tigs b bɩle na n dɩ-a lame, b na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la neb nins sẽn wob reezẽ na n yũu reezẽ rãam mam zĩ-sõngã samandẽ." 
Isaiah62:10 Zeruzalɛm nebã, yi-y-yã! Yi-y tao-tao la y bas tẽngã, Tuk-y sor nebã yĩnga, vigs-y-yã a kugã! La y rʋʋs tãb-kaoor bu-zẽmsã yĩnga!" 
Isaiah62:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã kɩremsã fãa wʋm a rãamde.» Yeel-y Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã yaa: «Fo fãagdã watame, la a zãada a yaoodã n watẽ, yẽnda keoorã reng-a-la taoore." 
Isaiah62:12 B na n boola bãmb tɩ ‹bu-sõngo›, la ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn fãag-b rãmbã.› La foom a Zeruzalɛm, b na n boola foom tɩ ‹b sẽn bao a soaba, la tẽng ning b sẽn ka base.› »" 
Isaiah63:1 Yaa ãnda la sẽn yit Edomã, ãnda n yit Botsra sẽn yaa Edom na-tẽngã, n yer fu-miid sẽn yaa neer wʋsgã? A kẽnda ne raoodo la ne pãnga. Yaa maam n gomd ne tɩrlem, la m tara pãn-tõog tɩ fãage." 
Isaiah63:2 Yaa bõe tɩ fo futã yaa miidu, bõe yĩng tɩ fo futã yaa miid wa ned sẽn tabd reezẽ reezẽ wẽkr koglgẽ futu?" 
Isaiah63:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yaa maam m yembr n tab bãmb wa b sẽn tabd reezẽ reezẽ wẽkr koglgẽ, nebã fãa sʋka, ned ka naag maam ye. Mam taba bãmb m sũ-puugrã pʋga, mam neema bãmb m sũ-yikrã pʋga. Bãmb zɩɩmã mada mam futã, mam futã fãa rẽgmame." 
Isaiah63:4 Bala, mam tagsame tɩ yaa mam sũ-dokr daare, la mam fãagrã yʋʋmd taame." 
Isaiah63:5 Mam gesame la m ka yãnd ned sẽn na n sõng maam ye. Mam sũur sãama ne ned sẽn ka be n na n sõng maamã. Dẽ, mam kangã pãng kõo maam tõogre, mam sũ-puugrã sõnga maam." 
Isaiah63:6 Mam taba bu-zẽms m sũ-puugrã pʋga, mam sũ-puugrã pʋga, mam kɩtame tɩ bãmb nens yilme, la mam daaga bãmb zɩɩm tẽn-gãongã zugu." 
Isaiah63:7 Mam na n tẽega Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan bũmb ning b sõmblmã pʋgã yelle. Mam na n tẽega bãmb tʋʋm-yɛɛsdsã sẽn zems pẽgrã yelle. Mam na n tẽega maan-neer ning fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan tõnd yĩngã. Mam na n tẽega bãmb sõmblem-kãsengã Israyɛll buudã yĩngã. Mam na n tẽega maan-neer ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan Israyɛll nebã yĩngã, wa sẽn zems b nimbãan-zoeer ne b nonglem-kãsengã yelle.»" 
Isaiah63:8 Bãmb yeelame: «Sɩdã, bãmb yaa mam nebã, bãmb yaa mam kamb sẽn ka yagd zĩrẽ ye! Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩ bãmb fãagda." 
Isaiah63:9 Bãmb yel-pakrã fãa pʋga, rag n yaa yel-pakr yẽnda me yĩnga. Dẽ, bãmb ka tʋm koe-toagsd wall malɛɛk ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab mengã n wa n fãag bãmba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã ne b nimbãan-zoeerã pʋga, b meng n leb n fãag bãmba, bãmb tebla bãmba, la b zã bãmb daar fãa hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ." 
Isaiah63:10 La bãmb yɩɩ kɩɩsdb n sãam bãmb Sɩɩgã sũuri. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽnemdame n lebg b bɛ, n wẽneg n zab ne bãmb b toore.»" 
Isaiah63:11 Woto, bãmb nebã tẽega wakat sẽn loogã yelle, bãmb tẽega a Moyiis wakatẽ wã yell n sokdẽ yaa: «Soab ning sẽn kɩt-a tɩ bãmb pe-kɩɩmbã ne bãmb piisã pɩʋʋg ko-kãsengã n loogã bee yɛɛnẽ? Soab ning sẽn dag n kɩt-a tɩ b Sɩɩgã be bãmb pʋsã bee yɛɛnẽ?" 
Isaiah63:12 Soab ning sẽn dag n be a Moyiis sɛɛgẽ, n tẽegd b nug sẽn tar pãng n kɩtdẽ tɩ ko-kãsengã welgd bãmb taoore, tɩ bãmb yʋʋrã paamd waoogr wakat fãa wã bee yɛɛnẽ?" 
Isaiah63:13 Soab ning sẽn dag n kɩt-a tɩ bãmb pɩʋʋg zĩ-zulumsẽ n loogã, wa weef sẽn pɩʋʋgd we-raoog n ka lagsdẽ wã bee yɛɛnẽ?" 
Isaiah63:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã talla bãmb n kẽng vʋʋsg zĩigẽ, wa rũms sẽn sig tãng long pʋga. Yãmb tɛ y nebã a woto n kɩt tɩ yãmb yʋʋrã paam ziiri.»" 
Isaiah63:15 Zĩnd-y yĩngr saasẽ, zĩnd-y y yi-sõngã sẽn tar ziirã pʋga, n sulg n gese. Yãmb nonglem-kãsengã ne y pãngã bee yɛɛnẽ? Bɩ y ra mong maam y nimbãan-zoeerã ne y sõmblem-kãsengã ye." 
Isaiah63:16 Bala, yãmb n yaa tõnd baaba, tõnd yaab a Abrahaam ka mi tõnd ye, la Israyɛll me ka mi tõnd tiir ye. Yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd ba. Yãmb yʋʋr boondame tɩ tõnd fãagda, la yãmb yʋʋrã yaa woto wakat fãa." 
Isaiah63:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb bas tõnd tɩ d yeebd n zãag ne yãmb soayã? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb kɩt tɩ tõnd yaa tõatb n ka leb n zoet yãmba? Bɩ y lebg n wa tõnd sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã yĩnga, lebg-y n wa-y buud ning sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã yĩnga!" 
Isaiah63:18 Yãmb nebã sẽn welg toor yãmb yĩngã sooga tẽngã wakat bilf yĩng bala, tõnd bɛɛbã taba yãmb zĩ-sõngã pʋga." 
Isaiah63:19 Hal daar zãra, tõnd lebga wa neb yãmb sẽn ka so ye. Tõnd lebga wa neb b sẽn ka boond ne yãmb yʋʋrã ye. Yãmb sã n yaool n dag n pãrgẽ sa-gãongã n sigi, tãmsã rag n na n sirgẽ-la yãmb taoore." 
Isaiah64:1 Bugum sẽn wit boaag pʋgẽ to-to wã, la koom sẽn kɛɛd t'a walem zẽkdẽ wã, yãmb bɛɛbã na n bãnga yãmb yʋʋrã, la bu-zẽmsã na n diga yãmb taoore." 
Isaiah64:2 Wakat ning yãmb sẽn maan bõn-yɛɛsds nins tõnd sẽn dag n ka tẽedã, yãmb sigame tɩ tãmsã sirg yãmb taoore." 
Isaiah64:3 Ned nan ka wʋm a buudu, la b zɩ n wʋm tɩ b gomda, la ned nif nan ka yãnd wẽnd a to ba a ye, t'a tõog n maan a woto tɩ b wʋme, sã n ka yãmb y yembr bala." 
Isaiah64:4 Yãmb dag n kẽnd n segda soab ning sẽn tar sũ-noog n kẽnd wa sẽn zems tɩrlmã, yãmb segda neb nins sẽn tẽr yãmb soayã yellã, yãmb yaa soab ning sẽn fãagd tõnd wakat fãa. La yãmb sũurã yika tõnd sẽn maan yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Isaiah64:5 Tõnd fãa lebga neb sẽn yaa rẽgdo, la tõnd sẽn maand d tɩrlem tʋʋmã fãa wẽnda fu-rẽgdo. Tõnd fãa zelga wa vãad sẽn ki, tɩ tõnd kongrã kãagd tõnd wa sebgo." 
Isaiah64:6 Ned ba a yembr ka leb n boond yãmb yʋʋrã ye, ned ka be n yẽegd a meng n baood yãmb ye. Bala, yãmb wẽnemd n basa tõndo, la yãmb basa tõnd tɩ d boog d kongrã yĩnga." 
Isaiah64:7 Ne rẽndã fãa, yãmb yaa tõnd ba. Tõnd yaa yagdo, la yãmb n yaa tõnd yagbã. Tõnd fãa yaa yãmb nus tʋʋma." 
Isaiah64:8 Ra-y yik-y y sũur tɩ loog ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ra-y tẽeg-y tõnd kongrã yell wakat fãa ye. Tõnd kotame tɩ y gese, tõnd fãa yaa yãmb nebã." 
Isaiah64:9 Yãmb tẽmsã sẽn welg toorã lebga we-raoogo, Sɩyõ lebga we-raoogo, Zeruzalɛm lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋgo." 
Isaiah64:10 Tõnd doogã sẽn welg toor n tar ziirã, zĩig ning tõnd yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n pẽgd yãmbã, zĩ-kãng rɩɩ bugum zãnga. Bũmb ning fãa sẽn tar yõod tõnd yĩngã lebga raboogo." 
Isaiah64:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yõwã fãa pʋgẽ, yãmb na n paa sɩɩ n ka maan bũmbu? Yãmb na n sĩnda y noore, n sãam tõnd sũur hal tɩ looge?" 
Isaiah65:1 Mam basame tɩ sẽn dag n ka kot-b maam bũmbã bao maam, mam basame tɩ sẽn dag n ka baood-b maamã yãnd maam. Mam yeela buud ning sẽn dag n ka pʋʋsd ne mam yʋʋrã yaa: «Mam bee ka, mam bee kaanẽ!" 
Isaiah65:2 Mam tuda buud ning sẽn nak a kãarã m nus n ka bas ye, yaa buud sẽn tũud so-wẽng n maand wa a sẽn date." 
Isaiah65:3 Mam tuda buud ning sẽn yals mam taoor n kɩɩsd maamã wakat fãa wã m nusi. Bu-kãng maanda maand zẽed zĩisẽ, la a yõogd wisd n kõt wẽn-naandse." 
Isaiah65:4 Bãmb zĩis yaa yaadẽ, la yʋngo, b gõee tãms bogdẽ, b yaa neb sẽn wãbd kurkuy nemdo, la bãmb lagdã pʋse, bõn-dẽgd n be beenẽ.»" 
Isaiah65:5 Bãmb yetame: «Zãag f menga, ra kolg maam ye. Bala, mam na n welga foom toore.» Bõn-kãens wẽnda bug-zõos sẽn yit mam yõ-rotẽ wã, wa bugum sẽn dɩt daar fãa n ka sɛtẽ ye." 
Isaiah65:6 Ade, bõn-kãng gʋlsa mam taoor n yeele: «Mam ka na n sĩnd ye, sɩd-sɩdã, mam na n yaoo bãmba, m na n yaoo bãmb tɩ seke.»" 
Isaiah65:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n lagma yãmb kongrã la ne y ba-rãmbã kongr n yao bãmba. B ba-rãmbã rag n yõoga wisd tãmsã zutu, la b paoog maam kunkubã zutu. Mam na n yaoo bãmb sẽn maan tɩ loogã, mam na n yaoo bãmb mens b tʋʋmã yĩnga.»" 
Isaiah65:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Reezẽ gĩnd sã n tar koom, b yetame tɩ b ra sãam-a tɩ bark n be a pʋgẽ! Mam na n maana a woto m tʋmtʋmdbã yĩnga, sẽn na yɩl n da sãam zãng ye." 
Isaiah65:9 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yagens yi a Zakoob pʋgẽ, la m kɩt tɩ yagens yi a Zʋʋda sẽn yaa mam tãmsã soaalã pʋgẽ. Mam sẽn yãk neb ninsã na n deega rẽndã n sooge, la mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n zĩnda beenẽ." 
Isaiah65:10 Saaron tẽn-nabdrã na n lebga rũm-bãooneg wãbneg zĩiga, la Akoor longã na n lebga rũm-bɛd gãag zĩiga, yaa mam neb nins sẽn lebg n baood maamã yĩnga.»" 
Isaiah65:11 La yãmb dãmb sẽn basd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, la y yĩmd mam tãn-sõngã yellã, n kõt Gaad nebã rɩɩbo, la y pidsd Meni-rãmbã wamd ne bõn-yũudlã," 
Isaiah65:12 mam na n basa yãmb tɩ zabr sʋʋg sãam-yã, la yãmb fãa na n yĩgimda y rũmã zut tɩ b kood-yã. Bala, mam boolame tɩ yãmb ka sak ye. Mam gomame la yãmb ka kelg ye. La yãmb maana bũmb nins fãa sẽn ka noom maam, yãmb yãka bũmb nins sẽn ka tol n kõt maam sũ-noogã.»" 
Isaiah65:13 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n dɩɩme, la kom na n yõka yãmba. Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n yũume, la ko-yũud na n yõka yãmba. Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n maana sũ-noogo, la yãmb na n paama yãnde." 
Isaiah65:14 Mam tʋmtʋmdbã na n kaasa ne sũ-noogo, tɩ b sũur yaa noogo, la yãmb na n wiisa sũ-toog pʋga, y na n kelma ne sũ-pa-noaanga." 
Isaiah65:15 Yãmb yʋʋrã na n yɩɩ kãab-wẽng bũmb tɩ neb nins mam sẽn yãkã tar n wẽend n yetẽ yaa: ‹Bɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ f ki a woto!› La b na n pʋda b tʋmtʋmdbã yʋʋr a to. 
Isaiah65:16 Ned sã n dat n ning a meng bark tẽngã pʋga, a na n ninga a meng bark ne Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa ãminã yʋʋre. La ned sã n na n wẽen tẽngã pʋgẽ, a na n wẽena ne Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa ãminã yʋʋre. Bala, b na n yĩma yel-pakr nins sẽn dag n zĩnd pĩndã yelle, b na n solga bãmb mam nifẽ.»" 
Isaiah65:17 Sɩd me, mam na n maana yĩngr-paalga, la dũni-paalga. B kõn tol n leb n tẽeg sẽn zĩnd pĩndã yell ye, b kõn leb n tags a yell ye." 
Isaiah65:18 Bas-y rẽ, la y maan sũ-noogo, la y kɩdem daar fãa bũmb ning mam sẽn naanã yĩnga. Bala, mam naanda Zeruzalɛm kɩdeng yĩnga, la naan a nebã sũ-noog yĩnga." 
Isaiah65:19 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm yɩ mam kɩdengo, la m na n kɩtame tɩ mam nebã yɩ mam sũ-noogo. B kõn tol n leb n wʋm yãbr wall kelems beenẽ ye." 
Isaiah65:20 Beenẽ, bi-pɛɛlg kõn dog n wẽneg n ki rasem a wãn pʋgẽ ye, la nin-kẽem kõn ki t'a daar ka ta ye. Bala, ned sẽn ki a yʋʋm koabg yaa bi-bɩɩga, la yel-wẽn-maand sẽn ki a yʋʋm koabga, b geelgda yẽnda wa ned sẽn paam kãab-wẽnga." 
Isaiah65:21 Bãmb na n mee rot n zĩnd b pʋse. B na n sela tɩɩs n dɩ b biisi. 
Isaiah65:22 Bãmb kõn me b rot tɩ ned a to reeg n kẽ ye. B kõn sel tɩɩs tɩ ned a to reeg n soog n dɩ ye. Bala, mam nebã rasem na n kaoosa wa tɩɩse. La neb nins mam sẽn yãkã na n dɩɩ b nus tʋʋmã yõodo." 
Isaiah65:23 Bãmb kõn tʋm n nams zaalem ye, b kõn dog kamb sẽn na n wẽneg n ki b nifẽ ye. Bala, bãmb na n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ning neb nins barkã yagense, la bãmb kambã na n paa ne bãmba." 
Isaiah65:24 Mam na n leokame tɩ b nan ka bool maam ye. Bãmb sẽn wat n ket n gomdã tɩ mam wʋmame. 
Isaiah65:25 Rigd-n-yĩidg ne pe-bil na n lagma taab n wãb yamdo, gɩgemd na n wãba yamd wa naafo, la tẽng tom na n yɩɩ waaf rɩɩbo. Mam tãn-sõngã fãa zugu, wẽng kõn leb n zĩnd beenẽ, la sãoong kõn leb n zĩnd beenẽ ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah66:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Saasẽ yaa mam geere, dũni yaa mam nao roagendga. Ro-bʋg buud la yãmb tõe n me n kõ maam? Mam vʋʋsg zĩig la zĩ-bʋgo?" 
Isaiah66:2 Bõn-kãensã fãa yaa mam nug n maane, yaa woto la bũmb fãa wa n beẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Ad mam sẽn na n wẽnemd m neng n ges a soaba: yaa sik-m-meng soab sẽn be sũ-sãang pʋga, n zoet mam goamã rabeem n digda." 
Isaiah66:3 Sẽn kʋʋd-a naaf n maan maoongo, wẽnda wa a sẽn kʋʋd ninsaala. Sẽn maand-a peosg bɩ bʋʋg maando, wẽnda wa ned sẽn pãbd baaga. Sẽn wat-a ne kũuni, wẽnda wa a sẽn wat ne kurkur zɩɩm. Sẽn wat-a ne wisd kũuni, wẽnda wa a sẽn pʋʋsd wẽn-naandse. Nin-bãmb fãa sũy yaa noog ne b manesmã, la bãmb maanda sũ-noog ne b yel-yoodã." 
Isaiah66:4 Mam me maanda sũ-noog bãmb tõodã yĩnga, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb sẽn zoet bũmb ningã paam-ba. Bala, mam boolame la ned ka sak ye. Bala, mam gomame la bãmb ka kelg ye. La bãmb maana mam sẽn ka rate, n yãk bũmb ning sẽn ka tol n noom maamã.»" 
Isaiah66:5 Yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã rabeem n digdã, kelg-y bãmb koɛɛga: «Ad yãmb saam-biis nins sẽn kis yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩngã sẽn yeta: ‹Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab puk b ziirã tɩ d yãnd yãmb sũ-noogã!› La yaa bãmb n na n paam yãnde.»" 
Isaiah66:6 Bʋrg n zẽkd tẽngã pʋga, kelems n yit Wẽnd doogẽ wã. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n keood b bɛɛbã wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã." 
Isaiah66:7 Yẽnda rogame n ka yãnd n kũm dogem ye. Yẽnda roga bi-ribl tɩ rogem toog nan ka sɩng ye. 
Isaiah66:8 Ãnda soab n zoe n wʋm yell a woto? Ãnda soab n zoe n yãnd bũmb a woto? Tẽng tõe n doga daar a yembr pʋgẽ sɩda? B tõe n doga buud zĩig pʋgẽ la? Sɩyõ pa yãnd n kũm dogem la a rog a kambã ye! 
Isaiah66:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Mam na kɩt tɩ pag yik rogem n leb n gɩdg-a t'a ra roge? Mam sẽn kɩt tɩ pag rogdẽ wã, mam na gɩdg bi-pɛɛlg rogem? Yaa fo Wẽnnaamã n yeele.»" 
Isaiah66:10 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn nong Zeruzalɛmã, naag-y yẽnda n maan sũ-noogo, kɩdm-y Zeruzalɛm yĩnga. Yãmb dãmb sẽn dag n maand sũ-sãang yẽnda yĩngã, lagm-y yẽnda n maan sũ-noogo," 
Isaiah66:11 tɩ yãmb tõe n paam yẽnda bĩisã sẽn kõt belsgã n yẽsem n tɩge, la y paam yẽnda ziirã noosem tɩ sek-yã." 
Isaiah66:12 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, mam wẽnemda vɩ-bãan n tees yẽnda wa kʋɩlg koom, la m wẽnemd buud a taabã ziirã n tees yẽnda wa ko-zoetem sẽn fõta. Yẽnda na n kõo yãmb tɩ y yẽsme. B na n dɩka yãmb n pẽgne, la b zaoolg yãmb b naoẽ n saage." 
Isaiah66:13 Wa ned ma sẽn belsd-a to-to wã, mam na n belsa yãmb a woto. Yãmb na n paama belsg Zeruzalɛm." 
Isaiah66:14 Yãmb na n yãnda bõn-kãng tɩ yãmb sũyã yɩ noogo, la yãmb na n leb n paama pãng wa moodo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã bãng bãmb pãngã, la b kɩt tɩ bãmb bɛɛbã bãng bãmb sũ-yikrã.»" 
Isaiah66:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee bugum pʋg n watẽ, la bãmb saar-dãmbã wẽnda seb-kãsenga. Bãmb wat n na n pidsa b sũ-yikrã ne toolem, la b na n lenga nebã ne bug-witim." 
Isaiah66:16 Yaa ne bugum la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kao bʋʋdã, bãmb na n kaoo nebã fãa bʋʋd ne b meng zabr sʋʋgã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n kʋ-b rãmbã na n yɩɩ wʋsgo." 
Isaiah66:17 Neb nins sẽn kõ b mense, la sẽn yɩlg b mens n na n kẽng zẽedã zĩisẽ wã, pʋgda taab yembr-yembre, sẽn be-a sʋkã poorẽ sẽn wãbd-b kurkur nemdã, bɩ rũms sẽn yaa bõn-dẽgdo, la yõensã, bãmb fãa na n naaga taab n sãam zãnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!" 
Isaiah66:18 Mam mii b tʋʋmã ne b tagsgã. Wakat taame tɩ b na n tigim buud a taabã fãa sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toorã. Bãmb na n waame, la b na n yãnda mam ziirã." 
Isaiah66:19 Mam na n ninga bãnd bãmb sʋka. Mam na n tʋma bãmb neb kẽer sẽn põsã buud a taab nengẽ. Bu-bãmb yaa Tarsɩɩse, Pulli ne Luud sẽn yaa tãb-tãoodbã, yaa Tuball ne Gɛrs sẽn yaa tẽn-zãrs koom sẽn gũbgi, n nan ka wʋm tɩ b gomd mam yelle, la b nan ka yãnd mam ziirã. La bãmb na n goma mam ziirã yell bu-zẽms sʋka." 
Isaiah66:20 B na n talla yãmb saam-biisã fãa sẽn dag n be buud a taabã sʋkã n leb n wa tɩ yɩ kũun Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, b na n zombga bãmb wiidi, saar-dãmb zutu, la terok-rãmb sẽn bas vɩʋʋg pʋse, ne bõn-weese, la yʋgma zutu, n tall-b n wa mam tãn-sõngã zug Zeruzalɛm. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. A na n yɩɩ wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn ning b kũun lagd sẽn yaa yɩlma pʋs n tar n wat Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
Isaiah66:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n yãka maan-kʋʋdb ne Leevi neb bãmb sʋka.» 
Isaiah66:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sẽn kɩt tɩ yĩngr-paalgã ne dũni-paalgã kaoosd mam taoor to-to wã, yãmb yagensã ne yãmb yʋʋrã me na n kaoosa a woto." 
Isaiah66:23 Kiu-paalg woo kiu-paalga, la vʋʋsg daar woo vʋʋsg daare, bãmb fãa na n wa wõgemda mam taoore.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Isaiah66:24 La bãmb sã n yi, b na n yãnda neb nins sẽn kɩɩs maamã kũum sẽn dʋre. Bala, bãmb zũnzũiyã ka kiida, la bãmb bugmã me ka kiid ye. Bãmb na n yɩɩ bõn-põosg ninsaal buud fãa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah1:1 Ad a Zeremi goamã. A Zeremi yaa a Hilkiiza biiga. A Hilkiiza yaa Anatot sẽn be Benzame buudã soolmẽ wã maan-kʋʋdbã ned a yembre. 
Jeremiah1:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi wakat ning a Amon biig a Zoziyaas sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a tãablẽ. 
Jeremiah1:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Zeremi wakat ning a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn dɩt a naamã, n tɩ tãag a Zoziyaas biig a Sedesiyaas sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩm sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembrẽ wã baoosgo, la hal n tãag wakat ning b sẽn tall Zeruzalɛm nebã n tɩ kẽes yembd pʋg kiuug a nu soabã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah1:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Jeremiah1:5 ‹Sẽn deng mam sẽn nan ka yag foom f ma pʋgẽ, mam dag n zoe n mii foom. Sẽn deng f ma sẽn nan ka rog foom, mam dag n zoe n welga foom toore, n kɩt tɩ f yaa m no-rɛɛs buudã fãa yĩnga.›" 
Jeremiah1:6 La mam yeelame yaa: ‹Kayto! Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam ka mi goam ye. Mam yaa yãaga!" 
Jeremiah1:7 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: ‹Da yeel tɩ f yaa yãag ye! Bala, fo na n kẽnga mam sẽn na n tʋm foom b rãmb nengẽ wã nengẽ, n tɩ yeel bãmb bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn na n wilg foomã." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ra zoe bãmb ye, bala mam bee ne foom n na n fãag foom. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.›" 
Jeremiah1:9 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽega b nug n sɩɩs mam noorã n yeel maam yaa: Ade, mam ninga m goamã fo noorẽ." 
Jeremiah1:10 Ade, rũndã, mam kõta foom noor tɩ f võ, la f pãb n wã, la f sãame, la f siig buud toay-toayã ne soolem toay-toayã, la f lebs n me la f sele." 
Jeremiah1:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: ‹Zeremi, foom nee bõe? La mam leokame tɩ m nee tɩɩg ning sẽn ningd-a puud tao-tao wã willa." 
Jeremiah1:12 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: ‹Fo sẽn yã wã yaa sɩda, bala mam gũusda m gomdã n na n pids-a tao-tao.›" 
Jeremiah1:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne maam naoor a yiibẽ soab n sok maam yaa: ‹Fo nee bõe?› La mam yeelame tɩ m nee rʋk sẽn kɩll wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg sẽnẽ n kɛɛda, t'a noorã tees wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ goabg sẽnẽ." 
Jeremiah1:14 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: ‹Fo sẽn ne bũmb ningã wilgdame tɩ toog na n yii wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg sẽnẽ, n wa paam tẽngã nebã fãa." 
Jeremiah1:15 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Ade, mam na n boola buud toay-toayã sẽn be wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg soolem-dãmbã pʋgẽ wã. Bãmb na n waame, la b rĩm-dãmbã ned kam fãa na n vigla a naam geer Zeruzalɛm tẽngã rignoyẽ. B na n gũbga a lalgã ne Zʋʋda tẽms a taabã fãa." 
Jeremiah1:16 Mam na n kaoo bãmb bʋʋdo, tʋʋm-wẽns nins fãa b sẽn maanã yĩnga: bãmb sẽn bas maam n yõogd wisd n kõt buud a taabã wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la b wõgemded n waoog bõn-naandsã sẽn yaa b nug tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah1:17 La foom a Zeremi, yik n sẽbg f sɛɛga, n togs bãmb bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel foomã. Ra zoe bãmb tɩ m wa kɩt tɩ rabeem yõk foom bãmb nifẽ ye." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ade, Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã ne b nanambsã la b maan-kʋʋdbã ne tẽngã nebã fãa na n zaba ne foom, la mam na n kõo foom pãng rũndã, tɩ f yɩ wa tẽng sẽn gũbg ne lalga, la f yɩ wa kut ra-lugdga, la f yɩ wa zũud lalg tẽngã nebã fãa taoore, tɩ b ka tõe n tõog foom ye. Bala, mam bee ne foom n na n fãag foom. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.›" 
Jeremiah1:19  
Jeremiah2:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Jeremiah2:2 «Kẽng n tɩ zẽk f koɛɛg n gom ne Zeruzalɛm nebã n yeel-b tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam tẽra yãmb bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ pʋ-peelmã yelle. Yãmb dag n nonga maam wa pʋg-paal sẽn nong a sɩda, n tũ maam we-raoogẽ wã, zĩig ning bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yiẽ wã." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb dag n yaa neb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng wa bɩle dẽenem biisi. Ned ning fãa sẽn sɩɩs-a yãmb rogenda taal a meng zugu, la toog na n paama a soaba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah2:4 A Zakoob yagense, yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã!" 
Jeremiah2:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam maana bõe sẽn yaa wẽnga, tɩ y yaab-rãmbã yãnd n zãag b mens ne maam? Bãmb pʋga sẽn ka yõodo, tɩ b mensã lebg neb sẽn ka yõodo." 
Jeremiah2:6 Bãmb ka soke: Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning sẽn dag n yiis-a tõnd Ezɩpt tẽngã bee yɛɛnẽ? Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning sẽn dag n lʋɩ-a tõnd taoor we-raoogã sẽn tar londo, ne ware, la lik bida tɩ ned yir ka be beenẽ wã bee yɛɛnẽ ye." 
Jeremiah2:7 La mam talla bãmb n wa tẽng sẽn tar tɩ-womds tɩ b tõe n dɩ a biisi, ne a bõn-sõamyã. La bãmb wa n dẽgma m tẽngã n kɩt tɩ m sẽn so wã fãa lebg wẽnga." 
Jeremiah2:8 Maan-kʋʋdbã ka sok tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee yɛɛnẽ ye. Tõogã karen-saam-dãmb ka mi maam ye. Taoor dãmbã zãgsa maam. No-rɛɛsdbã togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne Baall yʋʋre, n waoog bũmb sẽn ka tar yõodo." 
Jeremiah2:9 Yaa woto tɩ m yetẽ tɩ m tara yell ne yãmba, la ne yãmb kambã kamba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kẽng-y Sɩpr tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã n tɩ gese, la y tʋm neb tɩ b kẽng Kedaar n tɩ ges neere, n bãng bũmb a woto buud sã n ka be beenẽ." 
Jeremiah2:11 Buud beeme n tek a wẽnnaam-dãmba, baa ne b sẽn ka wẽnnaam-dãmb sɩd-sɩdã? Mam nebã yẽ, bãmb dɩka waoogr ning mam sẽn kõ bãmbã n tek ne bũmb sẽn ka yõodo." 
Jeremiah2:12 Saasẽ, bɩ y rigimd n zoe rabeem, la y yɛɛse! Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah2:13 Bala, mam nebã maana yel-wẽn a yiibu. Bãmb basa mam sẽn yaa vɩɩm ko-bundum b yĩngã, n tu ko-bao n kõ b mense. La b ko-baoã yaool n yaa võy n ka tõe n tall koom ye." 
Jeremiah2:14 Israyɛll nebã yaa yembs sɩda? Bãmb doga yembd pʋgẽ sɩda? La yaa bõe yĩng tɩ buud a taab na n soog-ba? 
Jeremiah2:15 Gɩgem-poal yik n teedga ne bãmb n kelemdẽ. Bãmb kelemdame tɩ b koees sãta. Bãmb wata ne sãoong b tẽngã pʋgẽ. Bãmb tẽmsã rɩɩ bugum tɩ ned ka leb n be b pʋsẽ ye. 
Jeremiah2:16 Baa Memfiis ne Takpanees nebã põngda yãmb zutu. 
Jeremiah2:17 Yel-kãngã sẽn paam yãmbã ka yãmb sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa y Wẽnnaamã, wakat ning b sẽn yãag yãmb sorã zugã sɩda?" 
Jeremiah2:18 La moasã, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dɩk Ezɩpt sore? Yãmb dabdame n na n tɩ yũ Nill kʋɩlgã koom la? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb dɩk Asiiri sore? Yãmb dabdame n na n tɩ yũ Efrat kʋɩlgã koom la?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Bɩ wẽng ning y sẽn maanã rɩ-yã, la bɩ y sẽn bas maamã sɩbgr lʋɩ y zugu, tɩ y bãng tɩ yãmb sẽn bas maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam n ka leb n zoet maamã wata ne wẽng la toogo. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Jeremiah2:20 Yãmb zẽkda y zug ne maam hal daar zãra, n yetẽ tɩ y ka leb n dat yembdã ye. Kũnkub-bɛdã zut ne tɩɩsã tẽngre, yãmb pɛɛlma wa pʋg-yoodre." 
Jeremiah2:21 Mam dag n sela yãmb tɩ y yaa wa reezẽ tɩ-sõngo, la wa tɩɩg sẽn yaa sõama hal wʋsgo. La maana a wãn tɩ yãmb tek n lebg wa reezẽ tɩɩg sẽn ka leb n yaa sõama?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Baa yãmb sã n so koom ne zẽem la ne safãnd wʋsgo, y yel-wẽnã na n ket n beeme tɩ m neẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Zu-soabã n yeele." 
Jeremiah2:23 Yãmb ka tar zug n na n yeele: «Tõnd ka rẽgem d mens ye, tõnd ka tũ Baall-dãmbã ye!» Ges-y y sorã sẽn tɩ be long pʋgã. Ges-y y sẽn maandã. Yãmb wẽnda wa yʋgem-yãang sẽn saad n yeebdẽ!" 
Jeremiah2:24 Yãmb wẽnda wa we-bõn-yãang sẽn be we-raoogẽ tɩ bõn-daoog ratem tar-a t'a virsdẽ. Ãnda n tõe n gɩdg-a t'a ra maan a sẽn datã? A baoob ka be namsg ye. A yãab yaa naana a rʋʋb wakate. 
Jeremiah2:25 Israyɛll nebã, gũus-y y mense, sã n ka rẽ, yãmb na n wa zoee nao-zaala, la y koeesã me na n kʋɩɩme! La yãmb yeelame tɩ rẽ ka yell ye, tɩ y nonga bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmba, la y na n pʋg-b lame." 
Jeremiah2:26 Israyɛll nebã na n paama yãnde. Bãmb ne b rĩm-dãmbã la b nanambsã ne b maan-kʋʋdbã la b no-rɛɛsdbã na n paama yãnde, wa wagdr b sẽn lingi." 
Jeremiah2:27 Bãmb boonda raoog tɩ b ba, la b yeel kugr tɩ yaa yẽnda n dog-ba. Bãmb wẽnemda b nense, la b tud maam b kudg n ka get maam ye. La toogã sã n yaool n paam bãmba, bãmb yetame: «Yik-y n fãag-y-do!»" 
Jeremiah2:28 Zʋʋda nebã, y wẽnnaam-dãmb nins y sẽn dag n maan n kõ y mensã bee yɛɛnẽ? Bãmb sã n tõe n fãag yãmb toog wakate, bɩ b yik n fãag-yã! Bala, yãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã sõor zema y tẽmsã sõore!" 
Jeremiah2:29 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame: «Yãmb zabda ne maam bõe poore? Yãmb fãa zãgsa maam. 
Jeremiah2:30 Mam sẽn sɩbg yãmb kambã yaa zaalem bala. Yãmb ka sak n tũ m demsgã ye. Yãmb kʋʋ no-rɛɛsdb nins mam sẽn dag n tʋm yãmb nengẽ wã, wa gɩgem-toaag sẽn kʋʋd to-to wã." 
Jeremiah2:31 Yãmb a zamaan-kãngã nebã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã! Mam dag n yaa wa we-raoog ne Israyɛll bɩ? Bɩ tẽng sẽn yaa lik ne bãmba? Mam nebã, bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ y rat n maana y yam, la y ka rat n lebg n wa mam nengẽ?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Pʋg-sad tõe n yĩma a fan-teed sɩda? Pʋg-paal tõe n yĩma a fuugu? La mam nebã yaool n yĩma mam yell hal daar zãra. 
Jeremiah2:33 Yãmb mi y sẽn nong-b rãmbã baoobo, la baa pagb nins sẽn yaa wẽns n yɩɩdã, fo kõt-b-la zãmsg sẽn ka sõama." 
Jeremiah2:34 Bũmb ning sẽn kẽesd yãmb moogã, yaa nimbãan-dãmb ne neb sẽn ka tar yellã zɩɩm sẽn mad y futã noyã, tɩ y yaool n ka ling-b tɩ b kaood roog n baood n dɩk bũmbã.»" 
Jeremiah2:35 La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb yetame: «Tõnd tara bʋʋm, bɩ b ra yik b sũur ne tõnd ye!» La mam yetame: «Beneere, mam na n bʋʋ ne yãmba, y sẽn yeel tɩ y ka maan yel-wẽnã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah2:36 Yaa bõe tɩ y tekd yam tao-tao woto? Ezɩpt me na n ninga yãmb yãnde, wa Asiiri sẽn dag n ning yãmb yãndã." 
Jeremiah2:37 Yãmb na n kʋka y zut n yi Ezɩpte. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa yãmb sẽn teeg-b rãmbã. Nin-bãmb ka na n tõog n sõng yãmb ye." 
Jeremiah3:1 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ned sã n dig a pag tɩ ned a to rɩk-a, a sɩdã tõe n leb n peeg-a lame sɩda? A sã n leb n peeg-a, a ka na n dẽgem tẽngã zãng sɩda? La yãmb a Israyɛll nebã, yãmb maana wa pʋg-yoodr sẽn tar dolsen-dãmb wʋsgo. Yãmb na n lebg n waa mam nengẽ sɩda?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Zẽk-y y nens n ges tãn-bɛɛlã zutu. Rẽ yĩnga, tãng bee bãmb sʋkã yãmb sẽn ka maan wa yoaadb a zug sɩda? Yãmb yasa sor noor n gũud y rolsen-dãmba, wa Araab sẽn gũud neb we-raoog pʋgẽ. Yãmb dẽgma tẽngã ne y yoobã, la ne y wẽngã maanego." 
Jeremiah3:3 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ saag ka ni sigri, la sẽoog me ye. La baoosgo, yãmb nensã yaa wa pʋg-yoodr nenga. Yãnd ka tar yãmb ye." 
Jeremiah3:4 La moasã, yãmb saag n boonda maam tɩ y ba, la y zoa meng hal y yãadem wakate," 
Jeremiah3:5 la y yetẽ: Bãmb na n pa b sũ-yikrã pʋg wakat fãa bɩ? Bãmb sũur na n kell n yika ne tõnd n ka basdẽ bɩ? Yaa woto la yãmb dag n gomda, la y baas n ket n maand wẽnga, la y sɩd tõogame me!»" 
Jeremiah3:6 Rĩm a Zoziyaas zamaanẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Fo yãnda Israyɛll nebã sẽn maan wa pʋg-yoodrã bɩ? Bãmb basa maam n dʋ tãms nins fãa sẽn yaa lug-lugã zutu, la b kẽng tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn tar maasmã tẽngre, n tɩ maan yoobo." 
Jeremiah3:7 La mam dag n tagsame tɩ b sã n maan yõwã fãa n sɛ, b na n lebgame n wa mam nengẽ, la bãmb ka lebg n wa ye. La bãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã yãnda bãmba." 
Jeremiah3:8 Baa ne mam sẽn dig Israyɛll nebã b yoobã fãa yĩng n kõ-b basg sebrã, mam yãame tɩ Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa bãmb saam-biisã sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã ka tol n zoe rabeem ye. Bãmb me kẽnga be n tɩ maan yoobo." 
Jeremiah3:9 Bãmb maana yoob ne kug la raad tɩ yaa n loog nugu, n dẽgem tẽngã." 
Jeremiah3:10 La ne rẽ fãa, Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã saam-biisã sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ne b sũyã fãa ye. B rag n ka be sɩdã pʋg ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah3:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Baa ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa yoaadbã sẽn bas maamã, bãmb tɩrlem n baas n yɩɩd Zʋʋda nebã sẽn yaa zãmb dãmbã.»" 
Jeremiah3:12 Bãmb yeela maam tɩ m kẽng n zẽk m koɛɛg n tees rɩtg sẽnẽ, n togs gom-kãensã: «Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa yoaadba, lebg-y n wa-y-yã! Bala, mam ka na n leb n gãnem m neng ne yãmb ye. Mam yaa nonglem soaba. Mam sũur ka na n yik n ka sigd ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah3:13 Sak-y n deeg-y bal tɩ y kongame. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã la y zãgs yã. Yãmb kẽngame n tɩ waoog bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem tẽngre, n ka kelg mam goamã ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah3:14 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Kom-wegemse, lebg-y n wa-y-yã, bala yaa maam la y soaala. Mam na n yãka nin-yɛng-yɛng tẽng fãa pʋgẽ, la neb a yiib-yiib buud fãa pʋgẽ, n tall n kẽng Sɩyõ." 
Jeremiah3:15 Mam na n kõo yãmb taoor dãmb sẽn ta m yam tɩ b soog-y ne bãngre, la ne yam-sõngo.»" 
Jeremiah3:16 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Yãmb sã n lebg wʋsg n dog kamb tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wakat-kãense, b ka na n leb n gom y kaoolã koglgã yell ye. Bãmb ka na n tags a yelle, wall b tẽeg a yell ye. B ka na n bao-a, wall b maan a to ye." 
Jeremiah3:17 Wakat-kãnga, b na n boola Zeruzalɛm tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab naam geere.› Bu-zẽmsã fãa na n tigma be ne mam yʋʋre, la b na n basa b sũ-keglmã." 
Jeremiah3:18 Wakat-kãense, Zʋʋda buudã na n naaga Israyɛll buudã, tɩ b tũ taab n yi tẽng ning sẽn be rɩtgã, n kẽng tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ b yaab-rãmbã.»" 
Jeremiah3:19 Mam dag n nongẽ lame n geelg yãmb n naag m kambã, n kõ-y tẽng sẽn tar bõn-sõamyã, tẽng sẽn yaa buud toay-toayã fãa tẽn-neere. Mam dag n tagsame tɩ y na n boolẽ-la maam tɩ y ba, n ka wẽnemd n bas maam ye." 
Jeremiah3:20 La yãmb a Israyɛll nebã zãmba maam wa pag sẽn zãmb a sɩdã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Jeremiah3:21 B wʋmda Israyɛll neb yãbre, la b se-yõkr tãn-bɛɛlã zutu. Bala, bãmb bʋdgame n bas sorã, n yĩm Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Jeremiah3:22 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb a nin-tõtse, lebg-y n wa-y tɩ m kɩt tɩ y lebg sɩd dãmba.» Bãmb yeelame: «Ad-y tõndo, d wata yãmb nengẽ, bala, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam.»" 
Jeremiah3:23 Sɩda, pʋʋsg ning sẽn maand kunkubã zutã, ne bʋrg ning sẽn yit tãmsã zutã yaa zĩrẽ bala. Sɩd-sɩdã, Israyɛll nebã fãagr yita Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã nengẽ." 
Jeremiah3:24 Hal tõnd yãadem wakate, yãndã sẽn yaa Baallã rɩɩ arzɛk ning d yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n tʋm n paamã. A rɩɩ b piisã ne b niigã la b kambã." 
Jeremiah3:25 Bɩ d gãand d yãndã zugu, la bɩ d paoogrã pil-du. Bala, tõnd ne d yaab-rãmbã maana yel-wẽn n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã hal d yãadem wakat tɩ ta rũndã. Tõnd ka sak n deeg bãmb koɛɛgã ye." 
Jeremiah4:1 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sã n lebg n wa mam nengẽ, yãmb sã n yiis bõn-naands nins mam sẽn kisã mam taoore, la y ka leb n saad n yeebdẽ," 
Jeremiah4:2 yãmb sã n wẽen ne maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋr ne sɩd la tɩrlem ne zemsgo, buud a taabã na n kosa maam tɩ m ning-b barka, la b na n pẽga maam.»" 
Jeremiah4:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa: «Kãas-y y pʋtã la y ra bʋd gõos sʋk ye. 
Jeremiah4:4 Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, Kẽes-y y mens bãong Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, la y yiis y sũurã rẽgdã, tɩ m sũurã ra wa n puug n wɩng wa bugum, n dɩ yãmb y tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga, tɩ ned ka be n na n kiis-a ye.»" 
Jeremiah4:5 «Moon-y Zʋʋda nebã koe-kãngã la y kɩt tɩ Zeruzalɛm nebã wʋme. Peeb-y baorg tẽngã pʋgẽ, zẽk-y y koees n yeel nebã yaa: ‹Zoe-y n tɩ tigm-y tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã pʋsẽ!" 
Jeremiah4:6 Zẽk-y tãb-kaoor n tees Sɩyõ sẽnẽ! Zoe-y la y ra yals ye! Bala, mam kɩtame tɩ toog ne sãan-kãseng yi wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã n watẽ." 
Jeremiah4:7 Gɩgemd fão n yi a gãagẽ, sẽn sãamd-a soolem-dãmbã yi a zĩigẽ n watẽ. A na n sãama y tẽngã, a na n kɩtame tɩ y tẽmsã lebg raboodo. Ned ka na n tol n leb n zĩnd b pʋsẽ ye.› »" 
Jeremiah4:8 Woto yĩnga, bɩ y sẽgen bot n yãb n wiisi! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur ket n puuda ne tõnd n ka basdẽ ye." 
Jeremiah4:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Wakat-kãnga, rĩm-dãmbã ne nanambsã raood na n sɛɛme. Maan-kʋʋdbã pelens na n yɩkame, la Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã na n yɛɛsame.»" 
Jeremiah4:10 La mam yeelame: «Kayto! Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb belga nin-bãmbã! Yãmb belga Zeruzalɛm nebã zãnga. Yãmb yeela bãmb tɩ b na n zĩnda ne bãane, la sʋʋg yaool n zoe n bee koakoayẽ!»" 
Jeremiah4:11 Wakat-kãnga, b na n yeela Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa: «Sob-tʋʋlg yita we-raoogã pʋg ne tãn-bɛɛlã zutu, n wat b nin-nongdsã zutu. A ka wat n na n yelg-ba, a ka wat n na n kãag-ba." 
Jeremiah4:12 Sob-toaag ning maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kɩt tɩ watẽ wã yɩɩda bũmb a woto. Moasã, mam meng n na n kao bãmb bʋʋdo.»" 
Jeremiah4:13 Ade, bɛ wã wata wa sawato! A saar-dãmbã tʋʋlem wẽnda wa sob-kãsenga. A wiidã zoees tʋʋlem yɩɩda sɩlse. Ad toog paam tõndo! Tõnd sãam n sɛɛme!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Zeruzalɛm nebã, yiis-y wẽngã y sũyã pʋsẽ, n paam fãagre. Yãmb na n kell n pa y tags-wẽnsã pʋg hal tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Bala, koɛɛg n yit Dan n togsd bõn-kãnga, la d wʋmda koe-beed sẽn yit Efrayiim soolmã sẽn be tãms sʋkã sẽnẽ." 
Jeremiah4:16 Keoog-y buud toay-toayã, la y moon n togs Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa: «Bɛɛb n yi tẽn-zãrgẽ n watẽ. Bãmb zẽkda b koees n tãsd Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsã." 
Jeremiah4:17 B na n gũbga Zeruzalɛm wa gũudb sẽn gũbg pʋʋgo, b sẽn kɩɩs maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah4:18 Yaa y manesmã ne y tʋʋmã n kɩt tɩ bõn-kãng na n paam-yã. Yaa tʋʋm-wẽnsã y sẽn maanã n kɩt tɩ to-kãngã na n paam yãmba, n kẽ yãmb n tãag y sũyã.»" 
Jeremiah4:19 M pʋg zabda! M pʋg zabda! M sũur zabdame n dat n pusgi! Mam sũur digdame tɩ m ka tõe n sĩnd m noor ye. Bala, mam wʋmda baorg peebgo, la zabr kaasgo!" 
Jeremiah4:20 Bãmb gomda sãoong woo sãoong yell bala! Tẽngã fãa sãam n sɛɛme! B na n sãama d sik zĩisã wakat-yɛnga, b na n sãama d fu-rotã nif kamsg pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah4:21 Mam na n yãta tãb-kaoore, la m wʋmd baorg peebg hal tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Sɩd-sɩdã, mam nebã ka tar yam ye. Bãmb ka mi maam ye. Bãmb yaa yalemba, b ka tar bãngr ye. Bãmb sẽn mi yaa wẽng maaneg bala, b ka tol n mi neer maaneg ye.»" 
Jeremiah4:23 Mam gesa dũniyã, la ade, a ka tar yalẽ ye, a yaa vɩʋʋgo. Mam gesa saasẽ, la m yãame t'a ka leb n tar a vẽenemã ye." 
Jeremiah4:24 Mam gesa tãmsã la ade, b rigimdame, la kunkubã fãa miimdame." 
Jeremiah4:25 Mam gesame la ade, ned ka be ye, la yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa yɩgame n looge." 
Jeremiah4:26 Mam gesame la ade, zĩig ning sẽn dag n tar tɩɩsã lebga zĩ-peen-daaga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã yĩnga, zĩ-kãng tẽmsã fãa sãamame." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Tẽngã fãa na n lebga raboogo, la m yaool n ka na n sãam-a zãng ye." 
Jeremiah4:28 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ tẽngã fãa be sũ-sãang pʋga, tɩ saasẽ lebg lik bida. Yaa maam n yeele, la m yam-yãkr la a woto. Mam ka maand m bãngẽ, la m kõn lebs m noor poorẽ me ye.»" 
Jeremiah4:29 Sɩyõ nebã sẽn wʋm saar-dãmbã ne tãb-tãoodbã rãamdã, b fãa zoeeme. B zoe n tɩ soonda tuudẽ, b zoe n tɩ rʋʋ pĩis zutu. Tẽmsã lebga vɩɩdo, ned ka leb n be b pʋsẽ ye." 
Jeremiah4:30 La yãmb a Zeruzalɛm nebã, yaa bõe tɩ y yeelg fu-miidu, la y ning sãnem fan-teedo, la y ning y nin kɩrʋ? Yãmb sẽn nags y mens n yaa neerã yaa zaalem. Yãmb dolsen-dãmbã ka leb n dat-y ye, b sẽn baood yaa y kũum." 
Jeremiah4:31 Mam wʋmda kelems sẽn wẽnd pag sẽn kũmd dogem kelemse. Yaa kelems sẽn wẽnd pag sẽn kũmd a pʋg-sadem dogem kelemse. Yaa Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã koɛɛga. A tẽega a nus n yãbd n sesd n yetẽ: «Toog paam maam! M lʋɩɩ nin-kʋʋdb nusẽ!» 
Jeremiah5:1 Saag-y Zeruzalɛm soayã zutu. Kẽng-y raasã pʋs n tɩ ges neere, la y sok n gese, y na n yãnda ned sẽn maand tɩrga, la sẽn baood tɩ maan sɩda. Yãmb sã n yãnd ned a woto, mam na n kõo Zeruzalɛm nebã sugri." 
Jeremiah5:2 Baa bãmb sã n yeele: «D wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre,» yaa zĩrẽ-be-wẽeneg la bãmb wẽenda." 
Jeremiah5:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rẽ yĩnga, ka pʋ-peelem dãmb la yãmb baood sɩda? Yãmb wẽ-b lame la ka zab bãmb ye. Yãmb dag n dat n sãam-b lame, la b ka sak n deeg remsg ye. Bãmb kenga b nens n yɩɩg pĩig kugri. Bãmb ka sak n na n lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ ye." 
Jeremiah5:4 Mam dag n yetame tɩ b yaa naong rãmb bala. Bãmb maanda wa neb sẽn ka tar yam. Bãmb ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab raabã, la b ka mi b Wẽnnaamã tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã ye." 
Jeremiah5:5 Mam na n kẽnga nin-kãsemsã nengẽ, n tɩ gom ne-ba, bala, bãmb n mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab raabã, bãmb n mi b Wẽnnaamã tɩrlem bʋ-kaoorã. La bãmb fãa yaa a yembre: Bãmb kaoo yubl balgrã, bãmb kaoo loeesã, bãmb basa Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah5:6 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ bɛɛbã na n yi wa gɩgemd sẽn yi kãgrẽ n zab ne-ba, wa tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ digd-n-yĩidga, n zendem bãmba. Bɛɛbã na n sora bãmb tẽmsã noy wa ãbga, n yõgd neb nins fãa sẽn yit-b beenẽ wã n zendemdẽ. Bala, bãmb beegrã yaa wʋsgo, la b kɩɩsgã tara yãngr bala." 
Jeremiah5:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Zeruzalɛm nebã, bõn-kãng yĩng la m na n kõ-y sugr bɩ? Yãmb kambã basa maam, n wẽend ne bõn-zaals sẽn ka Wẽnnaam ye. Mam dag n kõo bãmb bũmb fãa tɩ seke, la bãmb baas n maana yoobo. Bãmb wẽdgda taab pʋg-yoaadb rotẽ." 
Jeremiah5:8 Bãmb wẽnda wa wed-nobdse, tɩ b ned kam fãa yãbd n pʋgd a to paga.»" 
Jeremiah5:9 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam ka tog n sɩbg neb a woto buud sɩda? Mam ka tog n dok m sũur ne buud a woto sɩda? 
Jeremiah5:10 Rʋ-y b lalsã n kẽ n sãam b reezẽ tɩɩsã pʋto, la y ra sãam-b zãng ye. Kɛ-y b wilã, bala, bãmb ka maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rẽnd ye." 
Jeremiah5:11 Bala, Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã, zãmba maam zãnga.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bãmb kɩɩsame tɩ b ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bãmb yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tõe n maan fɩ ye. Toog ka na n paam tõnd ye. Tõnd ka na n yãnd zabr bɩ kom ye! 
Jeremiah5:13 No-rɛɛsdbã yaa sobg bala. Bãmb ka tar Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomd ye.» 
Jeremiah5:14 Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Yãmb sẽn gom a woto wã yĩnga, ad bũmb ning sẽn na n paam yãmba: Mam na n ninga m goamã fo noorẽ tɩ b yɩ wa bugum, la nin-kãensã na n yɩɩ wa raad tɩ bugmã rɩ-ba.»" 
Jeremiah5:15 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Israyɛll nebã, ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud sẽn yit zĩ-zãrgẽ wa zab ne-yã. Yaa buud sẽn tar pãng hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ. Yãmb ka mi b buudã sẽn gomd gomd ning ye, yãmb ka na n wʋm b sẽn gomdã võor me ye." 
Jeremiah5:16 Bãmb logdã kʋʋdame. Bãmb fãa yaa gãndaado. 
Jeremiah5:17 Bãmb na n dɩ y koodã ne y rɩɩbã. Bãmb na n sãama y kambã ne y piisã la y niigã. B na n dɩ y reezẽ tɩɩsã ne y kankamsã fãa. B na n sãama y tẽms nins y sẽn teegã, y tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã.»" 
Jeremiah5:18 La maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ baa ne wakat-kãnga, m ka na n sãam-y zãng ye." 
Jeremiah5:19 B sã n sok tɩ yaa bõe tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã maand bãmb woto fãa, bɩ f leok-b tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb sẽn bas maam n tũ bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb y tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, woto me, bu-zẽmsã na n sooga yãmb tẽng a to sẽn ka yãmb dẽnd pʋgẽ.»" 
Jeremiah5:20 Togs-y-yã a Zakoob buudã koe-kãngã, la y taas-a Zʋʋda nebã. Yeel-b tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa:" 
Jeremiah5:21 «Kelg-y-yã! Yalemb sẽn ka tar bãngre, yãmb tara nini, la y ka ne ye. Yãmb tara tʋba, la y ka wʋmd ye.»" 
Jeremiah5:22 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ y ka zoet-ma, la y ka rigd ne rabeem m taoore? Ka maam n ning bĩisrã ko-kãsengã noor t'a yɩ a toadg wakat fãa la? Baa ko-wĩisã sã n lengdẽ, b ka tar pãng ne-a ye. La baa b sã n guglumdẽ, b ka tõe n gãndg-a ye." 
Jeremiah5:23 Nin-bãmbã yaa sũ-keen-nebã, la tõatba. Bãmb wẽnemd n basa maam n looge.»" 
Jeremiah5:24 Bãmb ka yete: «Wa-y tɩ d zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, bala, bãmb n kõt tõnd sigr saag ne yaoolem saaga, la b kõt-d bõn-bɩʋʋng fãa wã» ye." 
Jeremiah5:25 Yaa yãmb kongrã n kɩt tɩ bõn-kãens vaale. Yaa y yel-wẽnã n gɩdg tɩ y ka paam naar ye. 
Jeremiah5:26 Bala, nin-wẽns n be m nebã sʋka. Bãmb sora wa ned sẽn bẽd tãoog n na n yõk liuula. Bãmb gãnega gãmbr n yõgd ninsaalba." 
Jeremiah5:27 Wa ko-yong sẽn pid ne liuuli to-to wã, woto me, bãmb dotã pida ne zãmbo. Bãmb maanda a woto n lebgd nin-kãsemse, la arzegs-rãmba." 
Jeremiah5:28 Bãmb nobame tɩ b nens põeeda. Bãmb maanda wẽng hal tɩ loog nugu. Bãmb ka kaood bʋʋd wa sẽn zems ye. Bãmb ka kaood kɩɩbs bʋʋd tɩrg ye. Bãmb maanda a woto n tɩlgdẽ. Bãmb toog ka be ne naong rãmb bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye. 
Jeremiah5:29 Mam kõn sɩbg nin-bãmbã buud sɩda? Mam kõn dok m sũur ne bu-kãngã sɩda? Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah5:30 Bũmb ning sẽn maand tẽngã pʋgẽ wã sãamda sũuri, a yaa wẽng wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah5:31 No-rɛɛsdbã yagda zĩrẽ, la maan-kʋʋdbã maanda b sẽn date, tɩ mam nebã me nong rẽnda. La yãmb na n maana bõe bõn-kãens loogr zugẽ?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Benzame buudu, zoe-y n yi-y Zeruzalɛm! Tɩ bao-y zĩig n soonde! Peeb-y baorg Tekoa. Zẽk-y tãb-kaoor Bet-Hakerɛm pʋgẽ! Bala, toog yita wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg n watẽ, na n yɩɩ sãoon-kãsenga!" 
Jeremiah6:2 Sɩyõ yaa tẽn-neer n tar da-sãnd tɩ b nong-a, la mam na n sãam-a lame!" 
Jeremiah6:3 Nanambs na n kẽnga be ne b tãb-biisi, wa pe-kɩɩmb sẽn peegd b rũms n na n tɩ wãbnege. Bãmb tilga b fu-rot n gũbg-a n dat n zab ne-a. Bãmb ned kam fãa na n sãama zĩig ning sẽn be-a taoore." 
Jeremiah6:4 Bãmb na n yeelame: «Sũ-y tãp n tɩ zab ne-a! D tɩ zab ne-a wĩnto-sʋka! Toog paama tõndo! Wĩndg kẽedame, la zaabr maasem sigdame." 
Jeremiah6:5 Wa-y tɩ d tɩ zab ne-a yʋngo, d tɩ sãam Zeruzalɛm do-neebã.»" 
Jeremiah6:6 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Kɛ-y raado. Zam-y tãnd n gilg Zeruzalɛm lalgã n zab ne-a. Tẽngã zemsa sɩbgre. B namsda neb wʋsg a pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah6:7 Wa bulg koom sẽn bund to-to wã, tẽngã neb maanda wẽng wakat fãa. B wʋmda b sẽn maand neb wẽng rãamde, la sãoong bʋrg a pʋgẽ. Mam nee toog ne sãmpoag wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah6:8 Zeruzalɛm nebã, gũus-y y meng neere, tɩ mam da wa bas yãmb n kɩt tɩ y tẽngã lebg raboogo, tɩ ned ka leb n tõe n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye!»" 
Jeremiah6:9 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «B na n yiisa Israyɛll bu-kellã wa b sẽn yiisd reezẽ. Saag-y-yã-a zãng wa reezẽ-woabd sẽn wobd reezẽ reezẽ tɩɩg zugu.» 
Jeremiah6:10 Ãnda la mam na n gom ne? Ãnda n na n yɩ mam kaset soab tɩ b sak n kelge? Ade, bãmb yẽda b tʋb n ka rat n wʋm ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yaa wa laad bãmb yĩnga. Bãmb ka nong n wʋm-a ye." 
Jeremiah6:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã reeg n tara maam, hal tɩ m ya n yɛ n ka tõe n gɩdg-a ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bas tɩ sũ-puugrã nams kambã soayã zutu, la a nams ra-sãmbã b tiging zĩisẽ. B na n yõga pagbã ne raopã, la nin-kẽembã ne nin-kẽem-kulkuudã me n tall n looge." 
Jeremiah6:12 Mam sã n wa tẽeg m nugã n sɩbg tẽngã nebã, bãmb dotã ne b pʋtã la b pagb na n lebga neb a taab rẽnda. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah6:13 Bala, kom-bãoonegã ne nin-kẽembã fãa baooda b mens nafr bala. No-rɛɛsdbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã fãa yagda zĩrẽ." 
Jeremiah6:14 Bãmb ka tɩpd mam nebã poglg sõama ye. B yetame tɩ laafɩ beeme, tɩ laafɩ yaool n ka be ye." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bãmb sẽn maan yel-beedã yãnd tar-b lame bɩ? Baa bilfu! Bãmb ka mi yãn-zoeer ye. Woto yĩnga, bãmb na n naaga neb nins sẽn lʋɩtã n lʋɩ. Mam sã n wa sɩbg-ba, b na n lʋɩɩme. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah6:16 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yaas-y soayã zut n gese, Sok n bãng kʋdem-wẽndẽ soayã sẽn beẽ. Sok-y n bãng-y so-sõngã sẽn beẽ. Tũ-y so-kãng tɩ y na n vɩɩmda bãane.» La nebã yeelame: «Tõnd ka na n tũ so-kãng ye.»" 
Jeremiah6:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam yãka gũudb yãmb yĩnga, n yeel-b tɩ b maan gũusg tɩ baorgã peebg ra wa ling-b ye. La bãmb yeelame: «Tõnd ka na n gũus ye.»" 
Jeremiah6:18 Buud a taabã, kelg-y-yã! Yãmb fãa sẽn tigmã, bãng-y bũmb ning sẽn na n paam bãmbã." 
Jeremiah6:19 Dũni rãmba, kelg-y-yã! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam nin-kãense. Na n yɩ b tags-wẽnsã biisi. Bala, bãmb ka kelg mam goamã ye. Bãmb zãgsa m tõodã." 
Jeremiah6:20 Wisd sẽn yit Seba yõod ne maam yaa bõe? Parfẽ sẽn yit zĩ-zãrsẽ yõod ne maam yaa bõe? Mam ka na n deeg y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã ye. Y maandã ka noom maam ye. 
Jeremiah6:21 Woto yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: mam na n ninga bõn-lakdg bãmb taoore, tɩ ned ne a biiga, ned ne a yaka, la ned ne a zoa lak n lʋɩ, la bãmb fãa na n sãamame.»" 
Jeremiah6:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, neb n yit tẽng ning sẽn be rɩtgã n watẽ. Bu-kãseng n yit dũniyã kɩremsã n watẽ." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bãmb zãeesda b tãbdo, la b zãad kãna, Bãmb yaa nin-toos sẽn ka tar nimbãan-zoeer ye. Bãmb bʋrgã wẽnda ko-kãsengã bʋrgo. Bãmb zomba wiidi, bãmb tonga taab wa nin-yende, n wat n na n zab ne foom a Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã." 
Jeremiah6:24 Tõnd wʋma kibarã, la tõnd gĩin maagame. Sũ-sãang yõka tõndo. Toog paama tõnd wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ra-y yi-y n kẽng-y pʋtẽ, la y ra kẽng soayã zut me ye. Bala, y bɛ wã bee be ne zabr sʋʋse. Zĩigã fãa yaa pelen-yɩgre." 
Jeremiah6:26 Mam nebã, sẽgen-y boto, la y bilim tompeglmẽ. Yãb-y ne sũ-sãang wa ned sẽn yãbd a bi-yɛng kũum. Yãb-y n wiis-y-yã, bala, sãamdã watame, a na n wa linga tõnd n zab ne-do.»" 
Jeremiah6:27 Mam yãka foom a Zeremi, tɩ f yɩ soab ning sẽn na n mak mam nebã, tɩ fo tõe n mak-ba, n bãng b sẽn yaa neb ninsi, la f mak-b n bãng b yel-manesmã sẽn yaa-a soaba." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bãmb fãa yaa tõatb meng-menga, la tẽn-kãn-nebã. Bãmb sũyã yaa wa zũudu, la wa kutu. B fãa yaa sãamdba." 
Jeremiah6:29 Zugdã zugame tɩ wɩng wʋsgo, tɩ bugmã na n kɩt tɩ namdã meneme, la a zugbã yaa zaalem bala." 
Jeremiah6:30 B na n boola bãmb tɩ «wanzuri b sẽn lobe.» Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãgs-b lame." 
Jeremiah7:1 Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel a Zeremi: 
Jeremiah7:2 Kẽng n tɩ yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak rignoor n moon n yeel yaa: Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Zʋʋda neb sẽn tũud rigno-kãensã n kẽed n wõgemded n waoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, kelg-y-yã!" 
Jeremiah7:3 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Maneg-y y yel-manesmã ne y tʋʋmã, tɩ m bas-y tɩ y zĩnd zĩ-kãngã." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ra teeg-y zĩrẽ goamã nebã sẽn togsdã ye. B yetame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã la woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã la woto!»" 
Jeremiah7:5 Yãmb sã n maneg y yel-manesmã ne y tʋʋmã, la y maan wa sẽn zems ne taaba," 
Jeremiah7:6 la y ka nams sãambã ne kɩɩbsã la pʋg-kõapã, yãmb sã n ka raag bʋʋm dãmbã zɩɩm zĩ-kãngã, la y ka pʋg bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb n wa ne toog y meng zugu," 
Jeremiah7:7 mam na n kɩtame tɩ y kell n zĩnd zĩ-kãngã, tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ y yaab-rãmbã kʋdem-wẽndẽ tɩ b soog zamaan woo zamaanã." 
Jeremiah7:8 La gese, yãmb teega zĩrẽ goam sẽn ka yõodo." 
Jeremiah7:9 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb tõeeme n zuud la y kʋʋda, la y yooda, la y wẽend zĩrẽ wẽenego, la y yõogd wisd n kõt wẽn-naandg a Baalle, la y waoogd bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb yãmb sẽn ka mi," 
Jeremiah7:10 n yaool n wat n yas mam taoor do-kãngã mam yʋʋrã sẽn be-a pʋgẽ wã pʋg n maand yel-be-kãensã, n yetẽ tɩ yãmb paama fãagre?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Rẽ yĩnga, yãmb geta ro-kãngã b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã wa wagda soondg zĩig la? Mam nee fãa. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah7:12 M kot-y lame tɩ y kẽng Sɩlo sẽn yaa mam zĩigã, zĩig ning mam sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ m yʋʋrã zĩnd kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã. Tɩ ges-y mam sẽn maan-a bũmb ninga, wẽng ning Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah7:13 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb sẽn maan bõn-kãens fãa wã yĩnga, mam sẽn gom ne yãmb n leb n gom n ka tol n bas tɩ yãmb ka kelgã, mam sẽn bool yãmb tɩ y ka sakã yĩnga," 
Jeremiah7:14 ad mam sẽn na n maan ro-kãngã b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã, roog ning yãmb sẽn teeg-a wã, la zĩig ning mam sẽn dag n kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã to-to: Mam na n maan-a-la wa m sẽn dag n maan Sɩlo wã." 
Jeremiah7:15 Mam na n diga yãmb tɩ y zãag ne-ma, wa m sẽn dag n dig y saam-biisã sẽn yaa Efrayiim buudã fãa wã.»" 
Jeremiah7:16 La foom a Zeremi, ra pʋʋs maam nin-kãensã yĩng ye. Ra zẽk f koɛɛg wall f yõk maam sɛɛg ye. Bala, mam ka na n kelg-f ye." 
Jeremiah7:17 Fo ka ne bãmb sẽn maand bũmb nins Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋs ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutã la? 
Jeremiah7:18 Kambã wʋkda raado, tɩ ba-rãmbã tugund bugum, tɩ pagbã nagd zom n maand miisd saasẽ dĩm-poakã yĩnga. La bãmb toogda reezẽ rãam n kõt wẽnnaam-dãmb a taab n sãamd mam sũuri." 
Jeremiah7:19 La maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Rẽ yĩnga, yaa mam sũur la b sãamd sɩda? Ka b mensã sũy la b sãamd n ningd b mens yãnd sɩda?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Zu-soabã yetẽ: «Ade, mam sũ-puug-kãsengã na n siga zĩ-kãngã zugu, la a sig nebã ne rũmsã, la tɩɩsã ne pʋtã la tẽngã bɩle zugu. A na n dɩɩ wa bugum sẽn ka kiida.»" 
Jeremiah7:21 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Y sã n dat bɩ y naag-y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã ne y maand a taabã nemd n wãbe! 
Jeremiah7:22 Bala, wakat ning mam sẽn yiis y yaab-rãmbã Ezɩptã, mam ka yeel bãmb tɩ bũmbu, la m ka kõ-b noor sẽn kẽed ne maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne maand a taab wɛɛngẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah7:23 Ad mam sẽn kõ bãmb noor ninga: «Sak m koɛɛgã tɩ m na n yɩɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam, tɩ yãmb yɩ mam nebã. Sak-y n maan-y bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ y maanã tɩ y vɩɩm yɩ noogo.»" 
Jeremiah7:24 La bãmb ka sak n kelge, bãmb yẽda b tʋba. Bãmb maana wa sẽn zems b sũ-keglmã, n tõdg b na ges maam n tud b kudga." 
Jeremiah7:25 Hal sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning y yaab-rãmbã sẽn yi Ezɩptã n tãag rũndã, mam tʋma m tʋmtʋmdbã fãa sẽn yaa m no-rɛɛsdbã yãmb nengẽ wakat fãa n ka bas ye." 
Jeremiah7:26 La bãmb ka sak n kelg ye, bãmb yẽda b tʋba. Bãmb kenga b sũur n maan sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd b yaab-rãmbã." 
Jeremiah7:27 Zeremi, baa fo sã n togs bãmb gom-kãensã fãa, b ka na n kelg ye. Fo sã n bool-ba, b ka na n leok-f ye." 
Jeremiah7:28 Dẽ, bɩ f yeel-ba: «Bu-kãngã ka sak n kelg maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã, la b reeg m demsgã ye. Sɩdã ka leb n be ye, bãmb noy ka leb n togsd sɩd ye.»" 
Jeremiah7:29 Zeruzalɛm nebã, põng-y y zutã n lob y pʋleng zoobdã! Rʋ-y tãn-bɛɛlã zut n yãb n wiisi! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa buud ning sẽn kɩt tɩ b sũurã yikã, la b zãgs-a." 
Jeremiah7:30 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Zʋʋda nebã beega maam. Bãmb dɩka b bõn-naands nins mam sẽn kisã n ning roog ning b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã pʋga, n dẽgm-a." 
Jeremiah7:31 Bãmb mee maoong kʋʋb zĩisi, zĩig ning b sẽn boond tɩ Tofɛtã sẽn be Bɛn-Hinom longã pʋgẽ wã, n dɩk b kom-pugli la b kom-dibli n maan maand n yõog bugum b zutu. Bõn-kãng yaa bũmb mam sẽn ka yeel bãmb tɩ b maan ye. M nan zɩ n tags bũmb a woto yell meng ye.»" 
Jeremiah7:32 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bõn-kãng yĩnga, wakat n wate, tɩ b ka na n leb n bool-a tɩ Tofɛt bɩ Bɛn-Hinom ye. B na n bool-a lame tɩ kʋʋb longo. Bala, b na n mumda kũum Tofɛte, weer sẽn ka be yĩnga." 
Jeremiah7:33 Nin-kãensã kũum na n lebga yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms rɩɩbo, tɩ ned ka be n na n dig bãmb ye." 
Jeremiah7:34 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kɩdeng ne sũ-noog yɩɩla, la pʋg-paal ne pʋg-paal sɩd yɩɩl sɛ Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsã pʋse, ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutu: tẽngã na n lebga vɩʋʋgo.»" 
Jeremiah8:1 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Wakat-kãnga, b na n vaaga Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã ne a nanambsã la maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã, la Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa kõabã b yaadã pʋse," 
Jeremiah8:2 n dʋʋg wĩndgã ne kiuugã la yĩngr ãdsã bãmb sẽn dag n nong la b waoogdẽ la b pʋgd la b baoodẽ la b wõgemded b taoor n waoogd-bã vẽenemẽ. B ka na n naag-b taaba, la b ka na n mum-b me ye. B na n lebga birg tẽn-gãongã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah8:3 La bu-wẽn-kãng neb nins fãa sẽn ket n be dũniyã zugã, zĩis nins fãa mam sẽn na n dig-b tɩ b tɩ kẽngã, b na n yeelame tɩ b sẽn kiid n são. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah8:4 Yeel-b tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Ned lʋɩtame n ka yik bɩ? Bɩ ned sã n bʋdge, a ka lebgd n wa sor zugu?" 
Jeremiah8:5 La yaa bõe tɩ Zeruzalɛm nin-kãensã bas maam n kɩɩsd maam wakat fãa? Bãmb kẽngda taoor ne zãmbã maanego, bãmb ka sak n na n lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye." 
Jeremiah8:6 Mam maaga m meng n kelge, la sɩd ka be bãmb goamẽ wã ye. Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka maand a bãngẽ ne wẽng ning a sẽn maanã ye. Bãmb ka sokde: «Bõe la d maan sẽn yaa wẽnga.» Ned kam fãa maanda wa a sẽn date, wa wed-moaag sẽn zoet n kẽed zabr pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah8:7 Baa raong sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã mi a sẽn na n toeem tẽng wakate, la wall ne sɩlaall la kʋɩl-peosg me mi b sẽn tog n lebg wakat ninga. La mam nebã ka mi maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-tũudsã ye.»" 
Jeremiah8:8 Yãmb yetame tɩ y yaa yam dãmba, y sẽn tar Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõogã yĩnga. Yaa sɩda, la maana a wãn tɩ gʋlsdbã gʋlsd n tekd tõogã t'a lebgd zĩrẽ?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Yam dãmbã ninga b mens yãnde. Bãmb yɛɛsame n ka leb n mi b sẽn dabdẽ ye. Bãmb sẽn zãgs Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã, bõe yam la bãmb tara?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Yaa woto yĩnga, tɩ mam na n dɩk b pagbã n kõ neb a taaba, la neb a taab na n deega bãmb pʋto. Bala, kom-bãoonegã ne nin-kẽembã fãa baooda b mens nafr bala. No-rɛɛsdbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã fãa yagda zĩrẽ." 
Jeremiah8:11 Bãmb ka tɩpd mam nin-nongdsã poglg sõama ye. Bãmb yetame tɩ laafɩ beeme, tɩ laafɩ yaool n ka beẽ ye." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bãmb sẽn maan yel-beedã yãnd tar-b lame bɩ? Baa bilfu! Bãmb ka mi yãn-zoeer ye. Woto yĩnga, bãmb na n naaga neb nins sẽn lʋɩtã n lʋɩ. Mam sã n wa sɩbg-ba, b na n lʋɩɩme. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah8:13 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n woba b biisã fãa, la reezẽ biis ka na n leb n zĩnd reezẽ tɩɩg zug ye. Kankam ka na n leb n zĩnd kankang zug ye. Hal ba b vãadã na n kʋɩɩme. Bũmb ning mam sẽn dag n kõ bãmbã loogame.»" 
Jeremiah8:14 Nebã yeelame: «Yaa bõe tɩ d zĩ zaalem? Wa-y tɩ d lagem taab n yik n kẽng tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã n tɩ kẽ be n ki, bala Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ tõnd ki. Bãmb yũnuga tõnd koom sẽn tar zẽnem, tõnd sẽn beeg bãmbã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tõnd dag n gũuda vɩ-bãane, la bõn-sõng ka wat ye. Tõnd dag n gũuda maagre, la rabeem bal n tar tõndo." 
Jeremiah8:16 Tõnd wʋmda d bɛɛbã wiidi sɛsg Dan sẽnẽ. B wed-raadã sã n kelme, tẽn-gãongã fãa rigimdidame. Bãmb watame n na n sãam tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, la tẽngã nebã fãa.»" 
Jeremiah8:17 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n tʋma wiis la wag-toose, la ka wiis b sẽn tõe n nanem ye. B na n kɛ-y lame.»" 
Jeremiah8:18 Mam toogã yɩɩda maam, mam sũur sãama hal wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah8:19 Mam wʋmda m nebã m sẽn nongã sẽn be tẽn-zãrgẽ n kelemd n yetẽ: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka leb n be Sɩyõ la? Sɩyõ rĩmã ka leb n beẽ la?» La Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ b waoogd b bõn-naandse, ne bu-zẽmsã yel-yoodã n sãamd m sũuri?»" 
Jeremiah8:20 Tigsg wakat loogame, tʋʋlg wakat rabda a sɛɛbo, la tõnd ket n nan ka paam fãagr ye." 
Jeremiah8:21 Mam sũur sãamame, mam nebã m sẽn nongã sãoong yĩnga. Mam bee lik pʋgẽ, la sãoong rɩta maam." 
Jeremiah8:22 Tɩɩm ka leb n be Galaad la? Tɩp ka leb n be beenẽ la? Bõe yĩng tɩ m nebã m sẽn nongã bãag ka sãoogdẽ? 
Jeremiah8:23 Mam sã n dag n tõeẽ tɩ m zugã yɩ wa bulga, tɩ m ninã bul nintãm wa bulg ko-nini, m dag n na n yãbẽ-la wĩntoog ne yʋngo, mam nebã m sẽn nongã sẽn ki wã yĩnga!" 
Jeremiah9:1 Mam nong n paamẽ-la sik zĩig we-raoogã pʋg wa so-toagdba, n bas m nebã n looge. Bala, b fãa yaa yoaadba, b fãa yaa zãmb dãmba." 
Jeremiah9:2 Bãmb rõnega b zɛlmã wa tãpo, n yagd zĩrẽ. Bãmb sẽn tar pãng tẽngã pʋgẽ wã ka sɩd la b maand ye. Bãmb tʋʋmd yaa wẽng woo wẽng maanego, la bãmb ka mi maam ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bɩ ned kam fãa gũus a meng ne a to, la bɩ ned ra leb n tẽ a saam-biis me ye. Bala, neb maanda zãmb n belgd b saam-biisi, la zoa kãnegda neb ne taaba." 
Jeremiah9:4 Bãmb fãa zãmbda taaba, sẽn togsd-a sɩd ka be ye. Bãmb zãmsa b zɛlma wã zĩrẽ yagbo, bãmb maana wẽng n ka leb n tõe n tek ye." 
Jeremiah9:5 Bãmb tʋʋmd yaa zãmbg woo zãmbgo. Bãmb maanda zãmb n ka rat n leb n bãng maam ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah9:6 Woto yĩnga, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yeelame: «Mam na n ninga bãmb boaag pʋg n mak-ba. M nebã maana wẽnga. Yaa bõe la m na n maan-b moasã?" 
Jeremiah9:7 Bãmb zɛlma wã yaa wa pe-zẽnem. Bãmb goamã yaa belgr bala. Bãmb gomda laafɩ goam ne b yags n bẽt-ba.» 
Jeremiah9:8 Mam na n sɩbga bãmb bõn-kãens yĩnga. Mam kõn dok m sũur ne buud a woto sɩda? Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah9:9 Mam na n zĩnda tãmsã zut n yãb n wiisi. Mam na n zĩnda rũmsã wãbneg zĩisẽ we-raoogẽ wã n wiisi. Bala, b wãkame, tɩ ned ka leb n pɩʋʋgd be ye. B ka leb n wʋmd rũms rãamd beenẽ ye. Yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã ne we-rũmsã fãa zoeeme." 
Jeremiah9:10 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm lebg kug-rʋre, la we-baas yiri. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda tẽmsã lebg zĩ-vɩɩdo, tɩ ned ka leb n zĩnd beenẽ yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ãnda soab n tar yam n tõe wʋm bõn-kãensã võore? Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ ned ning bõn-kãens bilgrã togse. Bõe yĩng tɩ tẽngã sãame, n lebg wa we-raoog sẽn dɩ bugum tɩ ned ka leb n tũud be n loogdẽ?" 
Jeremiah9:12 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Yaa bãmb sẽn bas m tõog ning mam sẽn kõ bãmba, n ka kelg m noorã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah9:13 La bãmb loba b nens kɛɛng n maan wa sẽn zems b sũ-keglmã, n waoog Baall-dãmb wa b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n zãms bãmbã." 
Jeremiah9:14 Woto yĩnga, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam na n kõo bãmb zẽed sẽn yaa toog liga tɩ b rɩ, la m kõ-b ko-zẽnem tɩ b yũ." 
Jeremiah9:15 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n kẽng bu-zẽms bãmb ne b yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka mi sʋka. La m na n kɩtame tɩ b rig bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga, hal tɩ m menes-b zãnga.»" 
Jeremiah9:16 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Tags-y-yã! Bool-y pagb sẽn mi yãbrã tɩ b wa. Kẽng-y n tɩ bool-y sẽn mi-b yãbr sõamã wã tɩ b wa! 
Jeremiah9:17 Bɩ b wa tao-tao n wa wiis tõnd yĩnga. La bɩ d yãb tɩ d nintãmã yi wa ko-bundum. 
Jeremiah9:18 Bala, b wʋmda wiisg sẽn yit Sɩyõ n yetẽ: «Kayto! Tõnd sãamame! Yãnd tara tõndo! Bala, tõnd yi n basa tẽngã. B luba tõnd dotã." 
Jeremiah9:19 Pagba, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã. Wʋm-y bũmb nins bãmb sẽn yetã! Zãms-y y kom-pugli yãbre, la y zãms y pʋg-taabã wiisgu." 
Jeremiah9:20 Kũum tũu tõnd dotã võyẽ n kẽ. A kẽe tõnd do-neebã pʋse. A kɩtame tɩ kamb menem soay zutu, la a kɩt tɩ ra-sãmb menem daas pʋse." 
Jeremiah9:21 Bɩ foom a Zeremi yeel tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ kũum na n dʋra tẽng wa birg sẽn be pʋt pʋsẽ, la wa b sẽn kẽeb ki n dʋʋg n bas n loog tɩ ned ka wʋk-a ye!»" 
Jeremiah9:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bɩ yam soab ra maan sũ-noog ne a yamã ye. Bɩ gãndaoog ra maan sũ-noog ne a gãndaalmã ye. Bɩ arzɛk soab me ra maan sũ-noog ne a arzɛkã ye! 
Jeremiah9:23 Ned sã n dat n maan sũ-noogo, bɩ a maan sũ-noog a sẽn tar yam la a mi maam, la a miẽ tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tʋmd ne nonglem la tɩrlem ne zemsg dũniyã zugã yĩnga. Bala, yaa bõn-kãens n noom maam.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah9:24 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Wakat n wate, tɩ m na n sɩbg neb nins fãa sẽn kẽ yĩng bãongã:" 
Jeremiah9:25 Yaa Ezɩpt ne Zʋʋda la Edom ne Amo nebã, la Moaab ne we-raoogã neb nins sẽn kõogd b yɛɛmã. Bala, buud toay-toayã fãa ka kẽ bãong ye, la Israyɛll buudã fãa sũyã ka kẽ bãong ye.»" 
Jeremiah10:1 Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet-yã!" 
Jeremiah10:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ra bao-y tɩ zãms buud a taabã minindã ye. La ra yɛɛs-y ne bãn nins sẽn be yĩngrã wa buud a taabã ye. 
Jeremiah10:3 Bala, bu-bãmb minindã yaa zaalem. B kɛɛgda raoog kãgrẽ tɩ tʋʋm-mit rɩk a lar n pees-a." 
Jeremiah10:4 B nagsd-a-la ne wanzuri la ne sãnem n bao zãar ne kaadg n ka-a t'a ra lʋɩ ye.» 
Jeremiah10:5 Bõn-naands-kãens yaa wa b sẽn dɩk zug peoog n fõgen da-giuug pʋʋg pʋgẽ. Bãmb ka gomd ye. Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b zãad-ba, b sẽn ka tõe n kẽn b toorã yĩnga. Ra zoe-y bãmb ye. Bala, bãmb ka tõe n maan wẽng bɩ neer ye." 
Jeremiah10:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb to ka be ye. Yãmb yaa kãsenga, la y yʋʋrã yaa kãseng n tar pãnga." 
Jeremiah10:7 Buudã fãa rĩmã, ãnda soab n ka na n zoe yãmba? Yãmb seka zoeese. Bala, buud toay-toayã fãa yam dãmbã sʋka, ne b soolem-dãmbã fãa pʋse, yãmb ka tar to ye." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bãmb fãa yaa yalemb la zɩtba. Bãmb bõn-naandsã yaa raad bala, b ka tõe n wilg ned bũmb ye!" 
Jeremiah10:9 Wanzuri yita Tarsɩɩse, la sãnem yita Ufaaze. Tʋʋm-mitbã rɩkd-b lame, la yõak bond-b lame, la b yeelgd-b-la fu-moaama ne fu-miidu. Bõn-kãens fãa yaa ninsaalb minim tʋʋm bala." 
Jeremiah10:10 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa sɩd Wẽnnaam. Bãmb n yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ. Bãmb n yaa rĩm wakat fãa. Tẽngã rigimdida bãmb sũ-yikrã yĩnga. Buud ba a yembr ka tõe n yals bãmb sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ ye. 
Jeremiah10:11 Yeel-y bãmb tɩ wẽnnaam-dãmb nins sẽn ka naan yĩngr la tẽngã na n menema dũniyã zugu. 
Jeremiah10:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab naana tẽngã ne b meng pãnga. Bãmb yamã kɩtame tɩ dũniyã beẽ, la b yɛdga sa-gãongã ne b bãngrã." 
Jeremiah10:13 Bãmb sã n zẽk b koɛɛgã, koomã sẽn be yĩngrã tigimda taaba. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sawat zẽk n ta dũniyã kɩremsã fãa. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sa-yãgb sikd sa-koom, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ sebgã yit a sẽn beẽ wã n fugda." 
Jeremiah10:14 Nebã fãa lebga zɩtba, n ka tar bãngr ye. Yõak bõn-naandg yãnd tar-a lame. Bala, bãmb yaa zĩrẽ bõn-naandse, la vɩɩm ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah10:15 Bãmb yaa zaalem. Bãmb yaa zĩrẽ tʋʋmã. Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n wa ges b yellã, b na n sãamame." 
Jeremiah10:16 A Zakoob yagensã Wẽnnaam ka woto ye. Bala, bãmb n yaa bũmb fãa naanda, la bãmb yãka Israyɛll buudã n maan b nebã. Bãmb yʋʋr la Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba." 
Jeremiah10:17 Zeruzalɛm nebã, wʋk-y y teed tɩ y bɛɛbã gũbg-y-lame!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n lobga tẽngã nebã wa loaabg kugr tɩ b zãage. Mam na n dɩdg-b lame tɩ b ka tõog n põs ye.»" 
Jeremiah10:19 Zeruzalɛm nebã yetame: Toog paama tõndo. Tõnd poglgã ka maagd ye. Tõnd dag n tagsame tɩ d toogã tɛk la woto, la d sak n deegame." 
Jeremiah10:20 Tõnd fu-roogã sãamame. B tõsa a wĩyã. Tõnd ka leb n tar kamb ye, b fãa loog n basa tõndo. Bãmb ka leb n be ye. Ned ka be sẽn na n leb n tilg d fu-roogã n yɛdg a pɛɛlã ye." 
Jeremiah10:21 Bala, tõnd nebã nanambs yaa zɩtba. Bãmb ka sok n bãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam ye. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ bãmb ka tar bãngre, la woto me n kɩt tɩ b nebã fãa sãeege." 
Jeremiah10:22 Kelg-y bʋrg rãamde! A kolgdame! Bʋr-kãseng n yit tẽng ning sẽn be nug-rɩtgã. A tãb-biisã na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda tẽmsã lebg raboodo, la we-baas gãas zĩisi." 
Jeremiah10:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam miime tɩ ninsaal ka tar noor ne a vɩɩm sẽn na n yɩ bũmb ning ye. Ninsaal ka so a meng vɩɩm yell ye." 
Jeremiah10:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, rems-y tõnd wa sẽn zems y tɩrlmã, la y ra rems tõnd wa sẽn zems y sũ-yikrã ye. Sã n ka rẽ, tõnd na n menema zãnga." 
Jeremiah10:25 Pʋdg-y y sũ-yikrã bu-zẽmsã sẽn ka mi yãmbã zutu, la buud nins sẽn ka pʋʋsd ne yãmb yʋʋrã zutu. Bala, bãmb dɩ a Zakoob yagensã zãnga, n sãam b yiyã." 
Jeremiah11:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa: 
Jeremiah11:2 «Kelg kaool-kãngã goamã, n dɩk-b n taas Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã!»" 
Jeremiah11:3 Yeel bãmb tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Kãab-wẽng bee ned ning fãa sẽn ka sakd kaool-kãngã goamã zugu!» 
Jeremiah11:4 Yaa kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne y yaab-rãmbã daar ning mam sẽn yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn dag n yaa toog wa kut boaagã. Mam yeela bãmb tɩ b kelg maam, la b maan bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn yeel-bã. Woto, bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah11:5 La m na n pidsa m wẽeneg ning mam sẽn dag n wẽen ne y yaab-rãmbã n yeel tɩ m na n kõo bãmb tẽng sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsgã. Rẽ la yãmb sẽn tar dũndã wã. La mam yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y kɩt t'a yɩ woto.»" 
Jeremiah11:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam: «Moon gom-kãens fãa Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋsẽ ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutu, n yeel-b tɩ b kelg kaool-kãngã goamã n sak-ba." 
Jeremiah11:7 Bala, mam sẽn dag n yiis y yaab-rãmbã Ezɩptã, mam keooga bãmb n ka bas ye, n yeel-b tɩ b sak m goamã. La mam kell n sagla nebã hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah11:8 La bãmb ka sak n kelg ye. Bãmb ned kam fãa maana wa sẽn zems a sũ-keglmã. Mam yeela bãmb tɩ b sak m kaoolã goamã, la bãmb ka sak ye. Woto, mam maana bãmb wa sẽn zems goam nins fãa sẽn be kaoolã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Jeremiah11:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã lagma taab n kɩɩs maam. 
Jeremiah11:10 Bãmb leb n maana yel-wẽn nins b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n kɩɩs mam noor n maanã. Bãmb baoo buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmbã n waoog-ba. Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã sãama kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne b yaab-rãmbã.
