Jeremiah11:11 Woto yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam bãmb tɩ b ka tõog n põs ye. La baa bãmb sã n bool maam, mam ka na n kelg-b ye." 
Jeremiah11:12 La Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã na n tɩ kelem n boola wẽnnaam-dãmb nins bãmb sẽn dag n yõogd wisd n kõtẽ wã n kos sõngre, la wẽnnaam-kãens ka na n sõng bãmb b toogã wakat ye." 
Jeremiah11:13 Bala, yãmb a Zʋʋda nebã wẽnnaam-dãmbã sõor yaa wʋsg wa y tẽmsã sõore. Yãnd tẽn-kug nins yãmb sẽn me n na n yõogd wisd b zut n kõt Baallã sõor yaa wʋsg wa Zeruzalɛm soayã." 
Jeremiah11:14 Bɩ foom a Zeremi ra pʋʋs maam, la f ra kelem n bool maam nin-bãmbã yĩng ye. Bala, bãmb sã n bool maam b toogã pʋgẽ, mam ka na n kelg-b ye.› »" 
Jeremiah11:15 Bõe la mam nebã mam sẽn nongã leb n baood mam doogã pʋgẽ? Bãmb tẽedame tɩ b tõe n maana pʋleng ne maoong n gɩdg b sãoongã bɩ? Bãmb tagsdame tɩ b tõe n maana woto n põs la? 
Jeremiah11:16 Mam dag n pʋda yẽnda yʋʋr tɩ oliiv tɩ-sõng sẽn womd bi-sõama. La bʋr-kãseng pʋgẽ, mam na n yõoga a vãadã bugum, la m kao a wilã." 
Jeremiah11:17 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn sel yãmb a Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã yetame tɩ toog na n waa yãmb zutu, wẽng ning yãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga. Yãmb yõoga wisd n kõ Baalle, n kɩt tɩ m sũurã puugi." 
Jeremiah11:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga maam n kɩt tɩ m bãng bũmb nins m bɛɛbã sẽn saagd mam wɛɛngẽ. 
Jeremiah11:19 La mam dag n yaa wa peosg b sẽn tɛt n na n tɩ kʋ. Mam dag n ka bãng tɩ b seta taab n dat n maan maam wẽng ye. Bãmb yeelame: «Bɩ d sãam tɩɩgã ne a biisã, la d kɩt t'a yʋʋrã menem bõn-vɩɩsã sʋka, tɩ b ra leb n tẽeg a yell ye." 
Jeremiah11:20 La Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yaa bʋ-kaood-tɩrga. Bãmb feesda nebã tagsgã ne b sũyã. Bas-y tɩ m yã y sẽn na n dok y sũur ne nin-kãensã. Bala, mam basa m yɛlã fãa ne yãmba." 
Jeremiah11:21 Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma Anatot neb nins sẽn dat n kʋ maamã wɛɛngẽ. Nin-kãens yetame tɩ m sã n leb n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, b na n kʋʋ maam.»" 
Jeremiah11:22 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetẽ: «Ade, mam na n sɩbga nin-kãense. Bãmb ra-sãmbã na n paa tãpẽ, la kom na n kʋʋ b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã." 
Jeremiah11:23 Yʋʋmd ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg Anatot nebã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam-ba, la ned ba a yembr ka na n kell ye.»" 
Jeremiah12:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa tɩrg wʋsg ne m wa yet tɩ m tara yell ne yãmba. La baoosgo, mam dat n goma ne yãmb tɩrlem bʋ-kaoor yelle. Yaa bõe tɩ nin-wẽns paamd tõogre, tɩ sẽn zãmbd-b yãmbã me zĩ bãane?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Yãmb sela bãmb wa tɩɩse, tɩ b kɩ yẽg n bɩ n wom biisi. Bãmb gomda yãmb yell wʋsgo, la b sũyã yaool n zãra ne yãmba." 
Jeremiah12:3 La yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb mii maam, yãmb nee maam. Yãmb feesa maam n yãnd tɩ m sũurã tagsg bee ne yãmba. Yiis-y nin-wẽnsã kɛɛng wa piis b sẽn yõg n na n tɩ kʋ. Welg-y bãmb toor kʋʋbã daar yĩnga." 
Jeremiah12:4 Warã na n zĩnda tẽngã pʋg hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Pʋtã mood na n kʋɩta a woto hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Rũmsã ne bõn-yɩgdɩ wã kiime, tẽn-kãng nebã sẽn maan wẽng n yeel tɩ Wẽnnaam ka na n yãnd b manesmã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah12:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo sã n ka tõe n tũ sẽn zoet-b ne nao n zoe, fo na n maana wãn n tõog n wags ne wiidi? Fo sã n be tẽng sẽn gãe bãan pʋgẽ tɩ f yam gãe, fo na n maana a wãn moasã Zʋrdẽ kãgrã pʋgẽ?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Sɩd me, baa fo ba-biisã, fo buud meng zãmbda foom, n naagd f bɛɛbã n zabd ne-fo. B sã n wa gomd no-noom goam ne foom, bɩ f ra tẽ bãmb ye.»" 
Jeremiah12:7 Mam basa m doogã, mam basa neb nins sẽn yaa mam soolmã. Mam basa m nin-nongdsã m bɛɛbã nugẽ." 
Jeremiah12:8 Mam nebã sẽn yaa mam soolmã yik n zabda ne maam wa gɩgemd sẽn be kãgrẽ. Bãmb zẽkda b koɛɛg ne maam. Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ mam kisg-ba. 
Jeremiah12:9 Dẽ yĩnga, mam nebã sẽn dag n yaa mam soolmã lebga wa luiin-gʋlem tɩ sɩlsã laand n dat n wẽ-a bɩ? Tigm-y we-rũmsã fãa gilli! Tigm-y-b n tall-b n wa tigrã zĩigẽ!" 
Jeremiah12:10 Rũm-kɩɩmb wʋsg tabda mam reezẽ pʋʋgã n sãamdẽ. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ pʋʋg ning mam sẽn nongã lebg we-raoogo, b kɩtame t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo." 
Jeremiah12:11 B kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo. Tẽngã bee sũ-sãang pʋga. A sãamame n be mam taoore. Tẽngã fãa sãamame, la ned kae n yãbd-a ye." 
Jeremiah12:12 Sẽn sãamd-b fãa wã bee we-raoogã soayã fãa zut n watẽ. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sʋʋgã sãamda tẽngã zĩisã fãa, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n tõe n vɩɩmd bãan yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah12:13 Bãmb dag n bʋda bɩle, la b na n kẽeba gõose. B namsa b meng zaalem bala, Yãmb koodã yãnd tar-y lame, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puug-kãsengã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah12:14 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet mam yag-wẽnsã fãa sẽn sãamd tẽng ning mam sẽn pʋɩ n kõ Israyɛll buudã sẽn yaa mam nebã wɛɛngẽ. Woto yĩnga, mam na n diga bãmb n yiis-b b tẽngẽ wã, la m na n yiisa Zʋʋda nebã bãmb sʋka." 
Jeremiah12:15 La m sã n yiis bãmb n sɛ, m na n leb n zoee bãmb nimbãanega, n kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa leb n leb a soolmẽ, la a tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah12:16 Bãmb sã n togs m nebã n maan wa bãmba, la b sã n wẽen ne maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋr wa b sẽn dag n zãms m nebã tɩ b wẽen ne Baallã, bãmb me na n paama zĩig m nebã sʋka." 
Jeremiah12:17 La b sã n ka sak n kelge, mam na n dig-b lame n yiisi, la m na n menes-b lame. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah13:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ ra kur-wĩir sẽn wʋg ne gĩsi, n sẽbg f sɛɛga, la f ra los-a koomẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah13:2 Dẽ, mam kẽngame n tɩ ra kur-wĩirã wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel maamã, n sẽbg m sɛɛga." 
Jeremiah13:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam naoor a yiibẽ soaba, n yeele:" 
Jeremiah13:4 «Rɩk kur-wĩirã fo sẽn dag n da n sẽbg f sɛɛgã, n kẽng Efrat kʋɩlgã noor n tɩ solg-a pĩig kugr bokẽ.»" 
Jeremiah13:5 Mam sɩd kẽnga Efrat kʋɩlgã noor n tɩ solg kur-wĩirã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã." 
Jeremiah13:6 La rasem wʋsg loogr zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m kẽng Efrat kʋɩlgã noor n tɩ rɩk kur-wĩirã bãmb sẽn dag n yeel maam tɩ m tɩ solgã n wa." 
Jeremiah13:7 Dẽ, mam leb n kẽnga Efrat kʋɩlgẽ wã n tɩ bao zĩig ning mam sẽn dag n tɩ solg kur-wĩirã. La mam tɩ mikame t'a sãamame n ka leb n yaa sõama yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah13:8 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Jeremiah13:9 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: «Yaa woto me la m na n sãam Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã b tɩtaam-kãsengã yĩnga. 
Jeremiah13:10 Bãmb yaa nin-wẽns sẽn ka sakd n kelg mam goamã ye. B maanda wa sẽn zems b sũ-keglmã, la b zoet n pʋgda bu-zẽms wẽn-naands n wõgemded b taoor n waoogd-ba. Woto yĩnga, bɩ b lebg wa kur-wĩ-kãngã sẽn ka leb n tar yõodã." 
Jeremiah13:11 Mam dag n dɩka Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã n sẽbg m menga, wa ned sẽn dɩk sẽbdg n sẽbg a sɛɛga, tɩ b tõe n yɩ mam neba, n lebg mam zu-zẽkr ne m pẽgr la m ziiri, la bãmb ka kelg ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah13:12 Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Ko-waoosã fãa maana reezẽ rãam suiib yĩnga.» La b sã n yeele: «Tõnd n ka mi tɩ ko-waoosã fãa maana reezẽ rãam suiib yĩng bɩ?» 
Jeremiah13:13 Bɩ f yeel-b tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Ade, mam na n tɩgsa tẽn-kãngã nebã fãa ne rĩm-dãmbã sẽn zĩ a Davɩɩd naam geerã zugã, la maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã, la Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa reezẽ rãam tɩ b nens yilme." 
Jeremiah13:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ba-rãmb ne b kamb fão taaba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Mam ka na n bas-b ba a yembr ye, mam ka na n zoe ned ba a yembr nimbãaneg ye. Bũmb kõn tõog n gɩdg maam tɩ m ka sãam-b ye.»" 
Jeremiah13:15 Kelg-y-yã, yok-y y tʋba! Da leb-y n wuk-y y mens ye! Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gomda." 
Jeremiah13:16 Waoog-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, tɩ b ra wa kɩt tɩ lik bida wa, tɩ y naoor wa lak tãmsã zĩ-sobdã pʋg ye. Yãmb na n gũu vẽenem, la b na n kɩtame tɩ vẽenem lebg lika. B na n kɩtame t'a lebg lik bida." 
Jeremiah13:17 Yãmb sã n ka kelge, mam na n yãba m yembr y tɩtaamã yĩnga. Mam nintãm na n daagame. Mam na n yãba nintãm, b sẽn na n tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã n kẽng yembdã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah13:18 Togs rĩmã ne a ma wã yaa: «Zĩnd-y tẽnga, bala yãmb naamã pugl lʋɩɩme, yãmb naam maanfã sẽn yaa neerã fõk n lʋɩɩme." 
Jeremiah13:19 B paga Negɛɛv tẽmsã rignoy tɩ ned ka tõe n pak-b ye. B yõga Zʋʋda tẽngã neb fãa n tall n kẽng yembdo. B talla b fãa n tɩ kẽes yembdo. Ned ba a yembr ka pa ye.» 
Jeremiah13:20 Zeruzalɛm nebã, zẽk-y y neng n gese. Ges-y neb nins sẽn yi tẽng ning sẽn be wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ nug-rɩtg n watẽ wã. Neb nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb tɩ y gʋʋl wa piis tɩ rag n yaa y waoogrã bee yɛ?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Fo sẽn kɩt tɩ neb nins minim foom n lebg fo sõsd-n-taasã sã n wa yik n dat n soog foom, fo na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Yaa toog bal n na n wʋm foom wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Jeremiah13:22 La fo sã n wa sokd f meng tɩ maana a wãn tɩ yel-kãngã wa lʋɩt f zugu, bɩ f bãng tɩ yaa fo kongrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩngã la b sẽn kool fo fuugã la b yõg-fã." 
Jeremiah13:23 Kuus ned tõe n teka a yĩn-gãong bɩ? Ãbg tõe n teka a kõbg bɩ? Woto sã n dag n tõeẽ, rẽnd yãmb sẽn minim wẽngã maanegã, y ka tõe n maan neere?" 
Jeremiah13:24 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeege, wa we-raoog sobg sẽn dɩkd moodo." 
Jeremiah13:25 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo pʋɩɩr la woto, pʋɩɩr ning mam sẽn kõ foomã la woto, fo sẽn yĩm mam yelle, n tẽ zĩrẽ wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah13:26 Mam na n pilga fo fuugã n lud f nenga, tɩ nebã yãnd fo yãndã." 
Jeremiah13:27 Fo yoobã tʋʋmã ne f sẽn kaasd wa wed-raoog sẽn kelemd to-to n baood wed-yãangã, la f sẽn maand yoob n ningd f meng yãndã, mam yãnda bõn-kãens fãa gilli.» Mam yãnda f bõn-naands nins mam sẽn kisã tãmsã zutu, la wetã pʋse! Kayto! Zeruzalɛm, bõe yĩng tɩ f ka rat n yɩlg f meng ne f rẽgdã? Na n yɩ a woto n ta dabʋre?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi warã wakat n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah14:2 Zʋʋda nebã bee sũ-sãang pʋga. Bãmb tẽmsã sãamdame. Bãmb nebã gãee tẽng ne sũ-sãanga. Zeruzalɛm kelemsã zẽkd n kuiisa saasẽ. 
Jeremiah14:3 Nanambsã tʋma neb nins b sẽn so wã tɩ b tɩ bao koom n wa. Bãmb kẽnga kʋɩlsẽ wã, la b ka yã koom ye. Bãmb lebg n waa ne yʋ-vɩɩdo. Yãnd tar-b lame tɩ b sulg b zutu." 
Jeremiah14:4 Tẽngã sẽn pusã yĩnga, la saag me sẽn ka leb n niid tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, yãnd tara koaadbã tɩ b sulg b zutu." 
Jeremiah14:5 Baa walg sẽn be weoogẽ wã sã n doge, a basda a biigã n zoe, yamd kaalem yĩnga." 
Jeremiah14:6 We-bõensã yasa tãn-bɛɛlã zutu, n sesd wa we-baase, tɩ b ninã yiigi, bãmb sẽn baood yamd n ka paamdẽ wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah14:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tõnd kongrã sã n kɩt kaset tɩ tõnd ka tar bʋʋm, bɩ y maan y sẽn na n maanega, y yʋʋrã yĩnga. Tõnd kɩɩsgã yaa wʋsgo, tõnd beega yãmba." 
Jeremiah14:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll tẽebo, la Israyɛll fãagd yel-pakr wakate, bõe yĩng tɩ y maand wa sãan tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, la wa so-toagd sẽn tũ tẽngẽ n na n yõg gãag-sobendo?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Yaa bõe tɩ y maand wa ned b sẽn yɛɛse, la wa gãndaoog sẽn ka tõe n sõng neb a taaba? Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaool n bee tõnd sʋka, la d boonda yãmb yʋʋrã d sʋka. Da bas-y tõnd ye!" 
Jeremiah14:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomda nin-kãensã wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: «Bãmb nong n saada zĩig fãa, n ka zĩ zĩ-yend ye! Woto, bãmb ka ta maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam ye. Moasã m na n tẽega b yel-wẽnã yell n sɩbg-ba.»" 
Jeremiah14:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Da pʋʋs n kos sõngr nin-bãmbã yĩng ye. 
Jeremiah14:12 Ba b sã n loe noore, mam ka na n kelg b sũ-sãang kelemsã ye. Ba b sã n wa ne maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne bõn-koaadl kũuni, mam ka na n deeg ye. Mam na n kʋ b fãa gill ne zabr sʋʋga, la ne kom la bã-longdse.»" 
Jeremiah14:13 La mam leokame: «Kayto! Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, no-rɛɛsdbã yet-b lame tɩ b ka na n yãnd zabr bɩ kom ye, la yãmb na n kõo bãmb vɩ-bãan sɩd-sɩd zĩ-kãnga.»" 
Jeremiah14:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «No-rɛɛsdbã yagda zĩrẽ n yetẽ tɩ yaa ne mam yʋʋr la b gomda. Mam ka tʋm-ba, m ka kõ-b noor tɩ b gome, m ka gom ne-b me ye. B sẽn togsd yãmbã yaa zĩrẽ vẽnegre, ne bagre, la zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-zaala, la belgr bõn-naandse!" 
Jeremiah14:15 No-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn gomd ne mam yʋʋr n yetẽ tɩ zabr bɩ kom ka na n zĩnd tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, tɩ mam yaool n ka tʋm-bã, ad maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet bãmb wɛɛngẽ: ‹Zabr sʋʋg ne kom n na n kʋ no-rɛɛsdb-kãens zãnga." 
Jeremiah14:16 La neb nins bãmb sẽn togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã me, zabr sʋʋg ne kom na n kʋʋ bãmb n lob Zeruzalɛm soayã zutu, tɩ ned ka be n na n mum bãmb ne b pagbã la b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ wẽng ning bãmb sẽn maandã leb-ba.› »" 
Jeremiah14:17 Ad fo sẽn na n togs bãmb koɛɛg ninga: Mam nintãm daagda wĩntoog ne yʋng n ka sɛtẽ ye. Bala, yãmb kɩtame tɩ to-kãseng paam mam nin-nongdsã." 
Jeremiah14:18 Mam sã n yi n kẽng weoogẽ, mam yãta neb sẽn pa tãp pʋgẽ. Mam sã n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ, yaa komã sẽn koms-b rãmbã la m yãta. No-rɛɛsdbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã saagda tẽngã, b ka wʋmd yellã võor ye." 
Jeremiah14:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb basa Zʋʋda la? Yãmb yam yii Sɩyõ? Yaa bõe tɩ y pogl tõnd hal tɩ d sãmpogrã ka tõe n maage? D dag n tẽedame tɩ yɛlã na n wa zemsame, la bõn-sõng ka be ye. D dag n tẽeda maagre, la yaa pelen-yɩk bal la d zĩ ne." 
Jeremiah14:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, d miime tɩ d maana sẽn ka neere, d deegame tɩ d ba-rãmbã kongame. Tõnd fãa beega yãmba." 
Jeremiah14:21 Yãmb yʋʋrã yĩnga, ra bas-y tɩ y naam geerã sẽn pid ne ziirã paam paoogr ye. Tẽeg-y y kaool ning y sẽn dag n maan ne tõndã yelle, la y ra sãam-a ye." 
Jeremiah14:22 Bu-zẽmsã zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, bʋg n tõe n kɩt tɩ saag ni? Yaa sa-gãongã n kɩtd tɩ saagã niid bɩ? Ka yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩda? Yãmb la d teeg yã! Bala, yãmb la bõn-kãens fãa naanda." 
Jeremiah15:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Ba a Moyiis ne a Sãmwɛll sã n wa yals mam taoore, mam ka na n zoe nin-bãmbã nimbãaneg ye. Rig-b tɩ b menem mam taoor n bao zĩiga." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ba b sã n sok foom tɩ yɛɛnẽ la b na n kẽnge, bɩ f leok-b tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Sẽn tog-a ne kũum, bɩ a ki! Sẽn tog n pa-a tãpẽ, bɩ a pa tãpẽ! Sẽn tog n ki-a kom, bɩ a ki kom! Sẽn tog-a ne yembdo, bɩ a loog yembdo!»" 
Jeremiah15:3 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n sɩbga bãmb ne tood a naase: zabr sʋʋg na n kʋʋ bãmba, baas na n zendma bãmba, yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms na n dɩɩ bãmb n kɩt tɩ b meneme." 
Jeremiah15:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa sã n yãnd bãmba, bɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-ba, Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas sẽn yaa a Manaase biigã sẽn maan bũmb nins Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah15:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Zeruzalɛm nebã, ãndã n na n zoe yãmb nimbãaneg n yãb-yã? Ãnda n na n bʋdg n sok n bãng yãmb gãase?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yãmb basa maam, yãmb tuda maam y kudga. Woto yĩnga, mam zẽka m nug n sãamd yãmba. Mam yam ya n yii ne yãmb nimbãaneg zoeese." 
Jeremiah15:7 Mam yelgda bãmb tẽn-kãngã rignoyẽ wã mam kʋʋ bãmb kambã, mam menesa m nebã, la bãmb ka tek yam ye." 
Jeremiah15:8 Mam kɩtame tɩ b pʋg-kõapã sõor yɩ wʋsgo, n yɩɩd bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã. Mam kɩtame tɩ sãamd wa wĩnto-sʋka, n kʋ ra-sãmbã tɩ toog ne rabeem yõk b ma-rãmb wakat a ye pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah15:9 Sẽn dog-a kom-dibli a yopoe wã pãng sɛɛme t'a vʋʋsem leebdẽ. A wĩndgã lʋɩɩ wĩnto-sʋka. Yãnd tar-a lame t'a zĩ ne paoogre. Mam na n basa sẽn kell-bã b bɛɛbã nusẽ tɩ b kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Jeremiah15:10 M ma, toog bee mam zugu, fo sẽn dog maamã yĩnga! Tẽngã neb fãa zabda ne maam, la b fãa kɩɩsda maam! Mam ka tar ned samde, ned me ka tar mam samde. La b fãa yaool n kãabda maam wẽnga." 
Jeremiah15:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Hakɩɩka, mam fãaga yãmb y na yɩ neer yĩnga. Hakɩɩka, mam zab n sõnga yãmb toog ne yel-pakr wakate.»" 
Jeremiah15:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeelame: «Kut tõe n kaoogame sɩda? Nug rɩtg sẽnẽ kutã ne zũud tõe n kaooga nana sɩda? 
Jeremiah15:13 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b fã yãmb arzegsã ne y paoongã, tɩ yɩ yaood yel-wẽn nins fãa yãmb sẽn maan y soolmã fãa pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah15:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg y bɛɛbã yembse, tẽng yãmb sẽn ka mi pʋgẽ. Bala, mam sũurã na n puuga hal wʋsgo, n dɩ yãmb wa bugum.»" 
Jeremiah15:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb miime! Tẽeg-y m yell n sõng-ma, la y rok m sũur ne m namsdbã, n da kaoos waoong tɩ b wa maan-m wẽng ye. Bɩ y bãng tɩ yaa yãmb yĩng la mam paam paoogre." 
Jeremiah15:16 Mam sẽn wʋm y goamã, m deegame. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb n so maam, la y goamã kõo maam sũ-noog n kɩt tɩ m kɩdemdẽ." 
Jeremiah15:17 Mam ka zĩnd ne laadb n maan sũ-noog ye. Yãmb nugã modga maam tɩ m zĩnd m yembre, bala yãmb kɩtame tɩ m sũur yiki." 
Jeremiah15:18 Yaa bõe tɩ m namsgã ka sɛtẽ? Yaa bõe tɩ m poglgã zabd n ka maagdẽ? Yãmb belga maam wa kʋɩlg sẽn tar koom dũndã, n ka tar koom beoog ye." 
Jeremiah15:19 Woto yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo sã n lebg n wa, mam na n deega foom, n kɩt tɩ f leb n yɩ m tʋmtʋmda. Fo sã n bas gom-yaals n gom gom-sõamyã, fo na n leb n yɩ m no-rɛɛsa. Yaa nebã n tog n lebg n wa fo nengẽ, ka foom n tog n lebg n bao bãmb zĩig ye." 
Jeremiah15:20 La nin-bãmb nifẽ, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yɩ wa zũud lalg nebã sẽn ka tõe n sãam ye. Bãmb na n zaba ne foom, la b ka na n tõog-f ye. Bala, mam bee ne foom n na n fãag-fo, la m yols-fo. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah15:21 Mam na n fãaga foom nin-wẽns nusẽ, mam na n yolsa foom nin-toos nusẽ.»" 
Jeremiah16:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: 
Jeremiah16:2 «Ra kẽ kãadem n dog kamb zĩ-kãngã ye. 
Jeremiah16:3 Bala, ad bũmb nins sẽn na n paam kamb nins sẽn na n dog zĩ-kãngã, la sẽn na n paam b ba-rãmbã ne b ma-rãmbã sẽn na n dog-bã:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Bãas n na n kʋ-ba, la neb ka na n yãb b yĩnga, wall b mum-b ye. Bãmb na n yɩɩ birg tẽn-gãongã yĩnga. B na n paa tãpẽ, la kom na n kʋʋ bãmb tɩ b lebg yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms rɩɩbo.»" 
Jeremiah16:5 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ra kẽng ned yiri, b sẽn yãbd b ned sẽn ki yĩng ye. Ra yãb b nedã yĩnga, la ra bels-b ye. Bala, mam yiisa m laafɩ wã ne m nonglmã, la m nimbãan-zoeerã nin-bãmbã sʋka. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah16:6 Nanambs ne nin-tals na n kii tẽn-kãngã pʋga, la b ka na n mum bãmb wall b yãb b yĩng ye. Ned ka na n bog a menga, wall a põng a zug a yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah16:7 B ka na n naag ned ning ned sẽn ki wã n dɩ la b yũ, la b bels-a ye, baa sã n yaa a ba bɩ a ma n ki." 
Jeremiah16:8 Ra kẽng ned yiri, a sẽn maand tigr yĩnga, n naag-a n dɩ la f yũ ye.»" 
Jeremiah16:9 Bala, ade, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sũ-noog ne kɩdeng rãamde, la pʋg-paal sɩd ne pʋg-paal yɩɩl sɛ zĩ-kãngã yãmb zamaanẽ wã tɩ y yã.»" 
Jeremiah16:10 Fo sã n togs nin-bãmbã gom-kãensã fãa tɩ b sok foom: «Bõe yĩng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãk yam n na n kɩt tɩ to-kãseng a woto paam-do? Tõnd beegrã yaa bõe? Bõe yel-wẽn la tõnd maan n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã?» 
Jeremiah16:11 Dẽ, bɩ f leok bãmb tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yaa yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn bas maam la b kɩɩs mam zãmsgã, n yaool n tũ bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb n wõgemd n waoog-bã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah16:12 La yãmba, yãmb maana sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩd y yaab-rãmbã. Yãmb ned kam fãa maanda wa sẽn zems a sũ-keglmã, n ka kelgd maam ye." 
Jeremiah16:13 Mam na n diga yãmb n yiis tẽn-kãngã, tɩ y kẽng tẽng yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka mi pʋga. Beenẽ, yãmb na n waoogda bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmb wĩntoog ne yʋngo, bala mam ka na n leb n zoe y nimbãaneg ye.»" 
Jeremiah16:14 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ: «Wakat n wate, tɩ ned ka na n leb n wẽen ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt pʋgẽ wã yʋʋr ye." 
Jeremiah16:15 Bãmb na n wẽena ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, soab ning sẽn yiis-a Israyɛll nebã nug-rɩtg tẽngẽ wã, la tẽms nins fãa mam sẽn kɩt tɩ b sãeeg n kẽngã pʋgẽ wã! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b lebg n wa tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ.»" 
Jeremiah16:16 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n tʋma neb wʋsg tɩ b wa yõg-b wa ned sẽn yõgd zĩm. Dẽ poore, m na n kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg rig bãmb n yiis tãmsã fãa ne kunkubã fãa zutu, la hal baa tãmsã bogdẽ." 
Jeremiah16:17 Bala mam nin geta bãmb yel-manesmã fãa, la b kongrã ka solg ne maam ye." 
Jeremiah16:18 Pipi bũmbu, mam na n dola bãmb b kongrã ne b yel-wẽnã naoor a yiibu, bala bãmb dẽgma mam tẽngã, n pids m soolmã ne b yel-yoodã kũum la b tʋʋm-beedã.»" 
Jeremiah16:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yaa mam pãnga, la m pãng zĩiga, la m zĩ-soalgdg yel-pakr wakate! Buud toay-toay na n yii dũniyã kɩremsã fãa n wa yãmb nengẽ, la b na n yeelame: Tõnd yaab-rãmbã reega zĩrẽ tɩ yaa b pʋɩɩre, la a yaa bũmb sẽn ka yõodo." 
Jeremiah16:20 Ned tõe n maana a wẽnnaam-dãmb n kõ a menga, tɩ b yaool n ka sɩd wẽnnaam-dãmb bɩ?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Yaa woto n kɩte, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ b bãng tɩ m tara noor la pãn-kãsenga. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ m yʋʋr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Jeremiah17:1 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Zʋʋda nebã kongr gʋlsa ne kut gʋlsdga. A gʋlsa ne kut kɩtg b sũyã pʋse, la b tẽn-kugã yɩɩl zutu." 
Jeremiah17:2 Woto yĩnga, bãmb kambã na n tẽegda b tẽn-kugã yelle, ne b wẽn-naan-poak a Aseera ra-lugdsã sẽn be kunkubã zut tɩɩs nins sẽn tar-b maasmã tẽngrã." 
Jeremiah17:3 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wʋk y arzegsã ne y paoongã, y yel-wẽn nins yãmb sẽn maan y tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah17:4 Yãmb na n basa y tẽngã mam sẽn kõ yãmbã, la m na n kɩtame tɩ y lebg y bɛɛbã yembs tẽng yãmb sẽn ka mi pʋgẽ. Bala, m sũurã yikame n wit wa bugum sẽn ka na n tol n ki ye.»" 
Jeremiah17:5 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Toog bee ned ning sẽn bas maam n dɩk a teegr n teeg ninsaala, n baood sõngr yẽnda nengẽ wã zugu!" 
Jeremiah17:6 Yẽnda wẽnda wa tuug sẽn be tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ, n ka tol n tar sũ-noog ye. Yẽnda bee we-raoogã zĩig ning sẽn yaa kugã sʋka, la yamsem zĩig tɩ ned ba a yembr ka be beenẽ ye." 
Jeremiah17:7 Bark bee ned ning sẽn teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la sẽn dell bãmbã zugu!" 
Jeremiah17:8 Yẽnda yaa wa tɩɩg sẽn be koom noore, t'a yẽgã tão n ta koomã. Tʋʋlg ka wẽed-a ye, a vãadã ka kʋɩt ye. War wakate, rabeem ka tar-a ye, a womda biis wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah17:9 Ninsaal sũurã pida ne zãmb n yɩɩd bũmb fãa, la a yaa wẽng wʋsgo! Ãnda n tõe n bãng-a?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n feesd ninsaal sũuri, n mi a sẽn tagsd bũmb ninga, n keood ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a yel-manesmã, la a tʋʋmã biisi." 
Jeremiah17:11 Ned sẽn maan zãmb n paam arzegs yaa wa koadeng sẽn wũund gɛl a sẽn ka lobe. A arzɛkã na n loog n bas-a-la a vɩɩmã pʋɩ-sʋka, t'a lebg wa yalem bala.»" 
Jeremiah17:12 Naam geer sẽn tar ziir n be yĩngr hal sɩngr wakate. Yaa be la tõnd sɛk zĩigã. 
Jeremiah17:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll tẽebo, neb nins fãa sẽn basd-b yãmbã na n paama yãnde. Bãmb na n menema wa ned yʋʋr sẽn gʋls tẽng tom zugu, bala, bãmb basa yãmb sẽn yaa vɩɩm ko-bundgã." 
Jeremiah17:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y maag maam tɩ m paam laafɩ. Fãag-y maam tɩ m paam yolsgo, bala, yãmb la m pẽgda." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ad b sẽn yet maam: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã bee yɛɛnẽ? Bɩ a paam pidsg moasã!» 
Jeremiah17:16 Yãmb miime tɩ ka maam n tʋlg tɩ toog paam-b ye, la mam ka rat b sãoong me ye. Yãmb mii bũmb nins mam sẽn yeelã." 
Jeremiah17:17 Bɩ y ra kɩt tɩ rabeem yõk maam ye. Yãmb yaa mam zĩ-lilldg toog wakate. 
Jeremiah17:18 Kɩt-y tɩ yãnd yõk m namsdbã, la y ra bas tɩ b paam maam ye. Kɩt-y tɩ rabeem yõk-ba, la y ra bas tɩ rabeem kẽ maam ye. Kɩt-y tɩ toog wa sãam-ba." 
Jeremiah17:19 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel maam: «Kẽng n tɩ yals nebã zakã rignoor ning Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn tũud n kẽedẽ la b yitã, la Zeruzalɛm zakã rignoy a taabã fãa me," 
Jeremiah17:20 n yeel-b yaa: Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmba, Zʋʋda nebã, yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn yaa Zeruzalɛm neb n tũud rigno-kãensã n kẽedẽ wã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga!»" 
Jeremiah17:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Gũus-y y mense, n da wa tʋk zɩɩb vʋʋsg daarã, wall y tall zɩɩb n tũ Zeruzalɛm dignoyẽ wã n kẽ ye." 
Jeremiah17:22 Da yiis-y zɩɩb y rotã pʋs vʋʋsg daarã, la y ra maan tʋʋmd ba a yembr ye. Kɩt-y tɩ vʋʋsg daarã yɩ daar sẽn welg toore, wa m sẽn dag n yeel y yaab-rãmbã." 
Jeremiah17:23 Yãmb yaab-rãmbã ka kelge, b ka kɩll b tʋbr n kelg ye. Bãmb loba b nens kɛɛng n ka rat n wʋm la b sak remsg ye." 
Jeremiah17:24 La maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb sã n kelg maam neere, n ka tʋk zɩɩb n tũ tẽn-kãngã rignoyẽ vʋʋsg daarã, yãmb sã n kɩt tɩ vʋʋsg daarã yɩ daar sẽn welg toore, la y sã n ka maan tʋʋmd ba a yembr vʋʋsg daarã," 
Jeremiah17:25 rĩm-dãmb sẽn zao a Davɩɩd naamã goeel zugu, n kẽnd ne wiidi wall saar-dãmba, ne b kug-zĩidbã, la Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, nin-bãmbã fãa na n tũuda tẽngã rignoyẽ n kẽedẽ, la neb na n be a pʋgẽ wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah17:26 Neb na n yii Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsẽ wã ne Zeruzalɛm tẽn-kɩremsẽ wã, la Benzame tẽngẽ wã, ne tẽms nins sẽn be kunkub la tãms sʋkã, la Negɛɛve, n tall maoong sẽn yõogd bugum, ne maoong a to, la bõn-koaadl kũuni ne wisdu, ne bark pʋʋsg kũuni, n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
Jeremiah17:27 La yãmb sã n ka kelg maam, y sã n ka kɩt tɩ vʋʋsg daarã yɩ daar sẽn welg toore, y sã n kɩɩs n tʋk zɩɩb n tũ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã rignoyẽ wã vʋʋsg daarã n kẽ, mam na n ninga tẽngã rignoy bugum, la bugmã na n dɩta Zeruzalɛm na-yiyã, n ka tol n kiidẽ ye.› »" 
Jeremiah18:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa: 
Jeremiah18:2 Yik n kẽng yagbã yir tɩ yaa beenẽ la m na n gom ne-fo. 
Jeremiah18:3 Dẽ, mam kẽnga yagbã yir n tɩ yã t'a zĩ a yagd-doogẽ n yagdẽ." 
Jeremiah18:4 Rʋk ning yagbã sẽn yagdã sãamame, la yẽnda rɩk a yagdã n leb n maan rʋk a to sẽn ta a yam." 
Jeremiah18:5 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka maam yaa: 
Jeremiah18:6 Israyɛll nebã, dẽ yĩnga, mam ka tõe n maan yãmb wa yagbã sẽn maandã sɩda? Yagdã sẽn yaa bũmb ning yagbã nugẽ wã, yãmb me yaa a woto mam nugẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah18:7 Mam sã n gom buud bɩ soolem yelle, n yeel tɩ m na n viig-a lame, la m siig-a, n kɩt t'a meneme," 
Jeremiah18:8 t'a tek yam n bas wẽng ning a sẽn dag n maandã, mam me na n teka yam n bas wẽng ning m sẽn dag n saagd a yĩngã." 
Jeremiah18:9 Mam sã n gom buud bɩ soolem yelle, n yeel tɩ m na n me-a lame la m tilg-a," 
Jeremiah18:10 t'a kɩɩs n maan sẽn ka noom maam, mam me na n teka yam n bas maan-neer ning m sẽn dag n saagd n dat n maanã." 
Jeremiah18:11 La moasã, mam kota foom tɩ f yeel Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa: Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam segenda toog y yĩnga, mam saagda zabr y yĩnga. Dẽ, bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa tek yam n bas a manesem-wẽnsã. Tek-y y manesmã ne y tʋʋmã!»" 
Jeremiah18:12 La nebã na n yeelame: «Ra nams-y y meng ye! Tõnd ned kam fãa na n maana wa a sẽn tagsde, d na n maana wa sẽn zems d sũ-keglmã.»" 
Jeremiah18:13 Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Sok buud a taabã n gese, ãndã n wʋm bũmb a woto? Israyɛll nebã maana wẽng wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah18:14 Pĩisã sẽn be weoogẽ wã koom sɛtame sɩda? Libã tãmsã kʋɩls koom sẽn yaa maasgã kʋɩtame sɩda? 
Jeremiah18:15 Mam nebã yaool n yĩma mam yelle. Bãmb yõogda wisd n kõt belgr wẽnnaam-dãmba. B belga bãmb tɩ b bʋdg n bas b kʋdem-wẽndẽ soayã, n kɩt tɩ b tũ so-bugsi, la soay sẽn ka kõoge." 
Jeremiah18:16 B kɩtame tɩ bãmb tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo. B kɩtame t'a lebg yɛɛsg bũmb wakat fãa. Neb nins fãa sẽn tũud be n loogdẽ wã sã n yãnd-a, b pɛleng yɩkdame tɩ b gird b zutu." 
Jeremiah18:17 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b bɛɛbã rig-b tɩ b sãeeg wa sobg sẽn yi yaang n dɩkd bũmbu. B sãoongã wakate, mam na n wẽnemda m neng n bas-ba.»" 
Jeremiah18:18 Nebã yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d sɩɩg taab noor n kɩt t'a Zeremi meneme! Bala, tõnd ka na n kong maan-kʋʋdb sẽn na n zãms tõndo, wall yam dãmb saglgo, wall Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs koɛɛg ye. Wa-y tɩ d kãneg-a, la d ra kelg a sẽn togsd goam ninsã fãa ye!»" 
Jeremiah18:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg-ma! Kelg-y bũmb nins m bɛɛbã sẽn yetã!" 
Jeremiah18:20 Yel-sõmd yaood yaa beem la? Bãmb tuu bok n dat tɩ m lʋɩ a pʋgẽ. Tẽeg-y tɩ mam dag n yalsa yãmb taoore, n yõk yãmb sɛɛg bãmb yĩnga, tɩ y sũurã ra wa puug ne-b ye." 
Jeremiah18:21 Woto yĩnga, kɩt-y tɩ kom ne zabr sʋʋg kʋ b kambã. Kɩt-y tɩ b kambã ki, la y kɩt tɩ b pagbã lebg pʋg-kõapa. Kɩt-y tɩ bã-longds kʋ b raopã, tɩ b ra-sãmbã pa tãpẽ." 
Jeremiah18:22 Kɩt-y tɩ b wʋm b kelems b yiyã pʋsẽ, wakat ning b bɛɛbã sẽn na n wa ling bãmb n wʋk b teedã. Bãmb tuu bok n dat n bẽd maam, bãmb dɩgla bẽdg mam naoã sẽn na n tabgẽ wã." 
Jeremiah18:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb mii saagr nins fãa b sẽn saagd n dat n kʋ maamã. Ra kõ-b sugr b yel-wẽnã yĩng ye. Ra yẽes-y bãmb yel-wẽnã ye! Bas-y tɩ b lʋɩ y nifẽ! Sɩbg-y bãmb y sũ-yikrã pʋgẽ!" 
Jeremiah19:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ ra yʋʋre, la f kɩt tɩ kãsem-dãmb kẽer ne maan-kʋʋdbã nin-kẽemb kẽer yãag-fo." 
Jeremiah19:2 Yi n kẽng Bɛn-Hinom longã sẽn be sa-peesã rignoorẽ wã, n tɩ togs goam nins bãmb sẽn na n kõ maamã." 
Jeremiah19:3 Yeel Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll nebã Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ to-kãseng paam zĩ-kãngã tɩ ned sã n wʋm bɩ a pɛleng yɩke." 
Jeremiah19:4 Bala, bãmb basa maam n yõogd wisd n kõt buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb bãmb ne b yaab-rãmbã la Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã sẽn ka mi, n dẽgem zĩ-kãngã. Bãmb pidsa zĩ-kãngã ne bʋʋm dãmb zɩɩm." 
Jeremiah19:5 Bãmb mee maoong kʋʋb zĩis Baall yĩnga, n dɩk b kamb n maan maand n yõogd bugum tẽn-kugã zut n kõ Baalle. Mam yaool n ka kõ-b noor bɩ tõog tɩ b maan woto ye, la a nan ka wa m yamẽ tɩ m yeel bãmb tɩ b maan bũmb a woto ye." 
Jeremiah19:6 Woto yĩnga, mam yeelame tɩ wakat n wate, tɩ b ka na n leb n bool zĩ-kãngã tɩ Tofɛt wall Bɛn-Hinom long ye. B na n bool-a lame tɩ nin-kʋʋb longo. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah19:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bũmb nins Zʋʋda nebã ne Zeruzalɛm nebã sẽn dat n maanã lebg zaalem zĩ-kãngã pʋgẽ. La bãmb mensã, zabr sʋʋg n na n kʋ b nebã. B bɛɛb na n tõog-b lame tɩ b pa tãp pʋgẽ. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ b lebg yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms rɩɩbo." 
Jeremiah19:8 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-kãngã lebg bõn-yɛɛsdga. So-loaadbã fãa na n yãnda a poglgã tɩ b pɛleng yɩke. Bãmb na n yɛɛsame n fɩɩle. 
Jeremiah19:9 B bɛɛbã sẽn baood bãmb n dat n kʋ wã na n wa gũbga b tẽngã. La bãmb na n zĩnda yɩɩr ne pelen-yɩk pʋga, halɩ tɩ b wa wãbd b mensã kambã, la b wãbd taaba.»" 
Jeremiah19:10 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Wãag yʋʋrã neb nins sẽn tũ foomã nifẽ," 
Jeremiah19:11 n yeel-b tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Woto me, mam na n wãa nin-kãensã ne tẽn-kãngã wa rʋk b sẽn wã tɩ ka tõe n leb n maneg abada. Neb na n muma b kũum Tofɛte, zĩig a to sẽn ka be wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah19:12 Mam na n maana zĩ-kãngã ne a nebã a woto. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-kãngã lebg wa Tofɛte. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah19:13 Zeruzalɛm dotã ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã rotã, rot nins fãa b sẽn dag n yõogd wisd b zut yĩngr ãds yĩngã, la b pʋdgd bõn-yũudl b zut buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩngã, na n dẽgma wa Tofɛt zĩigã.»" 
Jeremiah19:14 A Zeremi yii Tofɛte, zĩig ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n tʋm-a t'a tɩ togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, n kẽng n tɩ yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã pʋgẽ n yeel nebã fãa yaa:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ mam sẽn gom toog ning yellã paam tẽn-kãngã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa. Bala, bãmb nebã kɩɩsa maam n ka reeg m goamã ye." 
Jeremiah20:1 A Imeer biig a Pasewʋʋr sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋda, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã gũudbã naabã wʋma pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-kãensã a Zeremi sẽn togsã." 
Jeremiah20:2 La a Pasewʋʋr yõka a Zeremi n pãbe, n balg-a Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak rignoor ning sẽn boond tɩ Benzame digno-kãsengã." 
Jeremiah20:3 La vẽkembeoogo, a Pasewʋʋr baaga a Zeremi t'a Zeremi yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka pʋd y yʋʋr t'a Pasewʋʋr ye. B pʋd-y lame t'a Magoor-Misaabe, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹yɛɛsg n be zĩigã fãa.›" 
Jeremiah20:4 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb ne y zo-rãmbã fãa yɛɛse. Y bɛɛbã na n kʋʋ yãmb ne zabr sʋʋs y nifẽ. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ Babilond dĩmã wa yõg Zʋʋda nebã fãa n tall n kẽng Babilonde, la b kʋ bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Jeremiah20:5 La bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b bɛɛbã wʋk arzegsã fãa ne b paoongã la b te-sõamy wã fãa sẽn be tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã paoongã fãa n kẽng Babilonde." 
Jeremiah20:6 La foom a Pasewʋʋre, foom ne f zakã rãmb fãa na n kẽnga Babilond n tɩ yɩ yembse, n ki tɩ b mum yãmb be. Na n yɩɩ yãmb ne y zo-rãmb nins yãmb sẽn dag n togs zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã.»" 
Jeremiah20:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb belga maam, la mam deega belgrã. Yãmb wõra maam n tõoge. Nebã laada maam daar fãa. Nebã fãa yaanda maam." 
Jeremiah20:8 Bala, wakat fãa, mam sã n gomda, mam zẽkda m koɛɛg n yetẽ: «Wẽnga! Sãoongo!» Yãmb goamã yĩnga, mam paamda paoogr ne yaalg wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah20:9 Mam sã n yeel tɩ m ka na n leb n togs Sẽn-Ka-Saab yelle, wall m gom ne bãmb yʋʋre, a lebgda wa bugum m sũurã pʋgẽ, a bee m kõabã pʋsẽ. Mam maoodame n dat n sĩndi, la m ka tõe ye." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mam wʋmda neb wʋsg sẽn wɩt maam n yetẽ: «A ‹Yɛɛsg-n-be-zĩigã-fãa!› » Wilg-y-yã a sẽn beẽ! Wilg-y-yã a zĩiga! Mam zo-rãmbã fãa geta maam n gũud m lʋɩɩse. Bãmb yetame: «Wa-y tɩ d belg-a tɩ daarning bɩ d tõog n dok d sũur ne-a. 
Jeremiah20:11 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ne maam wa gãndaoog sẽn tar pãnga. Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam namsdbã na n lak n lʋɩ. Bãmb ka na n tõog maam ye. Bãmb na n dɩɩ yãnde, b sẽn ka tõogã yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ yãnd sẽn ka na n sɛ abada, hal tɩ b ka leb n tõe n yĩm a yell ye." 
Jeremiah20:12 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, yãmb n feesd nin-tɩrga, yãmb n mi sẽn be ninsaal tagsgẽ la a sũurẽ. Bas-y tɩ m yãnd y sẽn na n dok y sũur ne-b to-to. Bala, mam basa m yɛlã fãa ne yãmba." 
Jeremiah20:13 Yɩɩl-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, pẽg-y bãmba! Bala, bãmb fãagda nimbãan-ned nin-wẽns nugẽ." 
Jeremiah20:14 Bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd daar ning m ma sẽn dog maamã zugu! Bɩ raarã ra zĩnd bark ye! 
Jeremiah20:15 Bɩ kãab-wẽng zĩnd ned ning sẽn dag n kẽng m ba nengẽ n tɩ togs-a t'a paama bi-ribla, tɩ kiba-kãng kõ-a sũ-noogã zugu!" 
Jeremiah20:16 Bɩ nin-kãng yɩ wa tẽms nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sãam n ka zoe b nimbãanegã! Bɩ a wʋm toog kelems yibeoogo, la zabr kelems wĩnto-sʋka." 
Jeremiah20:17 Bõe t'a ka kʋ maam tɩ m ket m ma pʋgẽ? M ma wã pʋg n dag na n yɩẽ mam yaoogo, tɩ m kell n pa be wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah20:18 Bõe tɩ m yi m ma pʋgẽ n na n yãnd toog ne sũ-sãanga, la m na n ki ne yãnde?»" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Zeremi, wakat ning rĩm a Sedesiyaas sẽn tʋm a Malkiya biig a Pasewʋʋr ne a Maseya biig a Sofoni sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdã t'a tɩ yeele:" 
Jeremiah21:2 D kotame tɩ y sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ-do. Bala, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar zabda ne tõndo. Daarninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n maana bõn-bãnd tõnd yĩng n kɩt t'a lebg n looge." 
Jeremiah21:3 La a Zeremi yeela bãmb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Sedesiyaas yaa: 
Jeremiah21:4 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tãb-biisã ra leb n zab ne Babilond dĩmã, la Kalde nebã sẽn gũbg yãmbã ye. Mam na n tigim-b-la tẽngã pʋga." 
Jeremiah21:5 La mam mengã n na n tẽeg m nug sẽn tar pãngã n zab ne yãmb ne sũ-yikri, la sũ-puugri ne sũ-kãbr wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah21:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bã-loangdg sẽn yaa kɛgeng kʋ tẽn-kãngã nebã ne a rũmsã fãa.› » 
Jeremiah21:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Dẽ poore, mam na n basa Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a tʋmtʋmdbã, la neb nins sẽn põs bã-longdsã ne komã la zabr sʋʋgã, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar ne bãmb bɛɛb nins sẽn baood bãmb n dat n kʋ wã nugẽ. Babilond dĩmã na n kʋʋ bãmb ne sʋʋs n ka bas bãmb tɩ b põse, wall b zoe b nimbãaneg ye.»" 
Jeremiah21:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi t'a yeel nebã yaa: «Ade, mam ninga vɩɩm sor ne kũum sor yãmb taoore." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ned sã n pa tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, zabr sʋʋg wall kom bɩ bã-loangdg n na n kʋ a soaba. La soab ning sẽn na n yi n dɩk a meng n kõ Kalde neb nins sẽn gũbg Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, b ka na n kʋ a soab ye, a na n vɩɩmdame." 
Jeremiah21:10 Bala, mam wẽnemdeda m neng n tees tẽn-kãngã, la ka a neer yĩng ye, yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ toog paam-a. B na n basa tẽngã Babilond dĩmã nugẽ, t'a ning-a bugum.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah21:11 Ad koɛɛg Zʋʋda rĩmã zak yĩnga: Kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! 
Jeremiah21:12 A Davɩɩd yagense, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Bʋ-y bʋʋdã tɩrg yibeoog fãa. Fãag-y b sẽn fãad a soabã namsdã nugẽ, tɩ y tʋʋm-wẽnsã ra wa kɩt tɩ m sũurã yik wa bugum, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n kiis-a ye." 
Jeremiah21:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn be longẽ wã ne tẽn-nabdrẽ, pĩigã zugã, mam zabda ne-yã! Yãmb dãmb sẽn yete: Ãnda n na n sig n wa zab ne tõndo? Ãnda n na n tõog n kẽ tõnd zĩ-solgdsẽ wã?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Mam na n sɩbga yãmb wa sẽn zems y tʋʋmã. Mam na n ninga y kãgrã bugum, tɩ bugmã rɩ zĩis nins fãa sẽn gũbgã.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah22:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Kẽng Zʋʋda rĩmã na-yirã n tɩ togs gom-kãensã." 
Jeremiah22:2 Yeel yẽnda yaa: Zʋʋda rĩmã, fo sẽn zao a Davɩɩd naam geerã, foom ne f tʋmtʋmdbã la f nebã sẽn tũud rigno-kãensã n kẽedẽ wã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã!»" 
Jeremiah22:3 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bʋ-y bʋʋdã tɩrg n fãag b sẽn fãad a soabã namsdã nugẽ. Ra maan-y sãambã ne kɩɩbsã la pʋg-kõapã pãng ye. Ra maan-y-b wẽnga, la y ra raag bʋʋm soab zɩɩm zĩ-kãngã ye." 
Jeremiah22:4 Bala, yãmb sã n sɩd sak gom-kãensã, a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋka, rĩm-dãmb ka na n kong sẽn na n zaoond a Davɩɩd naam geerã, n tũud ro-kãngã rignoyã n kẽedẽ, la b zao saar-dãmb ne wiid ye. Bãmba, b tʋmtʋmdbã, ne b nebã." 
Jeremiah22:5 La yãmb sã n ka sak gom-kãensã, mam wẽenda ne m menga, tɩ ro-kãngã na n lebga raboogo. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah22:6 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet Zʋʋda na-yirã wɛɛngẽ: «Fo yaa neer wa Galaad ne Libã tãngã. Mam yaool n na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg we-raoogo, la m kɩt tɩ f lebg tẽng ned sẽn ka leb n be a pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah22:7 Mam yãka sãamdb tɩ b wat n na n zab ne-yã. Bãmb ned kam fãa zãada a zab-teoogo. Bãmb na n kɛɛ yãmb sɛɛdr tɩɩs nins sẽn ya-b neeb n yɩɩdã n yõog bugum. 
Jeremiah22:8 Buud wʋsg na n tũu tẽn-kãngã sɛɛgẽ n looge.» Bãmb na n sokda taaba: Bõe yĩng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan tẽn-kãsen-kãngã a woto? 
Jeremiah22:9 La b na n leok-b lame n yeele: Yaa tẽn-kãngã nebã sẽn bas Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam kaoolã, n wõgemd n waoog buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmba, la b sak-bã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yaa a woto." 
Jeremiah22:10 Ra yãb-y sẽn ki-a wã yĩng ye. Ra sãam-y y sũur a yĩng ye. Yãb-y sẽn loogd-a wã yĩnga, bala, yẽnda ka na n leb n wa, la a ka na n leb n yãnd a ba-yirã ye." 
Jeremiah22:11 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoziyaas biig a Salum wɛɛngẽ, soab ning sẽn dag n led-a a ba wã sẽn loogã zĩigẽ n dɩt naamã n yeele: «Yẽnda ka na n tol n leb n wa ye." 
Jeremiah22:12 Bala, yẽnda na n kii tẽng ning b sẽn na n tall-a n kẽngã pʋgẽ. Yẽnda ka na n leb n yãnd tẽn-kãngã abada.»" 
Jeremiah22:13 Toog bee ned ning sẽn maand wẽgd n met a roog zugu! Yẽnda maanda zãmb n met a yĩngr doogo, la a kɩtdẽ t'a taab tʋmd zaalem, t'a ka kõt bãmb b yaood ye." 
Jeremiah22:14 Yẽnda yetame: «Mam na n mee ro-kãseng sẽn tar ro-pʋs sẽn yaa yalems yĩngr doogẽ wã m mengã yĩnga.» Yẽnda ningda a roogã peem-leese, la a ningd-a ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raado, la a bolgd-a-la ne goor sẽn yaa miuugu!" 
Jeremiah22:15 Fo tagsdame tɩ yaa f sẽn maneg f roogã ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raadã yĩng n kɩt tɩ fo yaa rĩm bɩ? Fo ba wã rag n tar n dɩtame la a yũuda, la ne rẽ fãa, yẽnda rag n maanda sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrga, tɩ bũmb baa fɩ ka paoog-a ye." 
Jeremiah22:16 Yẽnda rag n kaooda naong rãmb ne nimbãan-dãmb bʋʋd tɩrga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab bãngr yɩɩda a woto la? 
Jeremiah22:17 La foom, fo gesg la f tagsg pʋgẽ, fo sẽn baood yaa f meng nafr bala, f baood n daaga sẽn ka tar-a yell zɩɩm, la f wõr neb n maan-b pãnga." 
Jeremiah22:18 Woto yĩnga, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta, Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim wɛɛngẽ: «B ka na n yãb a yĩng ye. B ka na n yeel tɩ ‹toogo, m saam-biiga›, wall ‹toogo, m tão-poak ye! B ka na n yãb a yĩng ye. B ka na n yeele: Toogo, m soaala›, wall ‹toogo, m dĩm› ye!" 
Jeremiah22:19 B na n muma yẽnda wa bõang bala, b na n vuu yẽnda n yiis Zeruzalɛm n tɩ lobe." 
Jeremiah22:20 Zeruzalɛm nebã, rʋ-y Libã tãngã zug n yãbe! Kɩt-y tɩ y koees sãd Basã tãngã zugu! Rʋ-y Abarim tãngã zug n kelme! Bala, b sãama f rolsen-dãmbã fãa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n goma ne yãmb wakat ning y sẽn dag n zĩ bãanã, la yãmb yeelame tɩ y kõn deeg ye. Yãmb yel-manesem la a woto hal y bi-bɩɩlem wakate, la y ka kelg maam ye." 
Jeremiah22:22 Sebg na n dɩka y nanambsã, la b na n wʋka neb nins sẽn nong yãmbã n tɩ maan yembse. La yãmb na n paama yãnd ne paoogr y wẽngã fãa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah22:23 Yãmb sẽn be Libã wã, yãmb sẽn maan y tʋgdã sɛɛdr tɩɩsã zutã, toog sã n wa yãmb zutu, y na n wõosame. Yãmb na n kũsa wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem.»" 
Jeremiah22:24 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ tɩ baa Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim biig a Koniya sã n dag n yaẽ mam nug tikr bãnd n be mam dɩtg nugẽ wã, mam dag n na n pidgẽ-yã-a lame n lobe." 
Jeremiah22:25 Mam na n basa foom neb nins sẽn dat n kʋ foomã nugẽ, la fo sẽn zoet-b rãmbã nugẽ, sẽn dat n togs tɩ Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar ne Kalde nebã." 
Jeremiah22:26 Mam na n diga foom ne f ma-roakã tɩ y kẽng tẽng yãmb sẽn ka rog a pʋgẽ n tɩ ki be. 
Jeremiah22:27 Bãmb kõn tol n lebg n wa tẽn-kãngã bãmb sẽn dat n yãnd ne b sũur fãa wã pʋgẽ ye. 
Jeremiah22:28 Rẽ yĩnga, a Koniya yaa wa bõn-zaok tɩ ned ka leb n dat-a la? Bõe tɩ b rig yẽnda ne a kambã tɩ b kẽng tẽng bãmb sẽn ka mi?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Tẽnga! Tẽnga! Tẽnga! Kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã! 
Jeremiah22:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Gʋls-y rao-kãng wa ned sẽn ka paam biiga, la wa ned sẽn ka na n tol n paam tõogr a vɩɩmã pʋgẽ ye. Bala, yẽnda ka na n tol n paam yageng sẽn na n zaoond a Davɩɩd naam geerã n soog Zʋʋda ye.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah23:1 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Toog bee nanambs nins sẽn kɩt tɩ mam nebã sãamdẽ la b sãeegdẽ wã zugu!» 
Jeremiah23:2 Woto yĩnga, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yet nanambs nins sẽn zãad bãmb nebã: «Yaa yãmb n kɩt tɩ mam nebã sãeeg n looge. Yãmb dig-b lame n ka ges b yell ye. La moasã, mam na n gesa yãmb yell y tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah23:3 «Mam mengã na n kɩtame tɩ m neb nins sẽn ketã yi tẽms nins fãa mam sẽn dig bãmb tɩ b kẽngã n lebg n wa yiri. La bãmb na n doga kamba, la b na n fɩɩgame n lebg wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah23:4 Mam na n kõo bãmb nanambs sẽn na n soog-ba, la rabeem ka na n leb n yõk bãmb ye. Ned kõn leb n yɛɛs bãmba, la bãmb ned ba a yembr kõn menem ye.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah23:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n kɩt t'a Davɩɩd yageng a yembr sẽn yaa nin-tɩrg lebg rĩm n dɩ naam, n soog nebã ne yam, la a kaood buudã ne zemsg la ne tɩrlem tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah23:6 Yaa yẽnda wakat la Zʋʋda nebã na n paam fãagre, tɩ Israyɛll nebã zĩnd ne bãane. B na n boola rĩmã yʋʋr tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd tɩrlem.»" 
Jeremiah23:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ wakat n wate, tɩ nebã ka na n leb n yeel tɩ: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã sẽn yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã yʋʋr ye." 
Jeremiah23:8 Fo na n yeelame: ‹Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, soab ning sẽn dag n dig-a Israyɛll nebã tɩ b kẽng rɩtg sẽnẽ ne tẽms a taabã pʋsẽ, n yaool n lebg n tɩ tall bãmb n wa tɩ b zĩnd b tẽngã pʋgẽ wã.› »" 
Jeremiah23:9 Koɛɛg no-rɛɛsdbã yĩnga: Mam sũur sãamame, la m kõabã fãa rigdame. Mam yaa wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam, la wa ned sẽn yũ reezẽ rãam n tuumdẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne b gom-sõamy wã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah23:10 Bala, tẽngã pida ne yoaadba. Kãab-wẽngã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã be sũ-sãan-kãseng pʋga. Rũmsã wãbneg zĩis sẽn be we-raoogã pʋgẽ wã kʋɩɩme. Bãmb zoet n dabda wẽng maanego. Bãmb sũur keemame tɩ maan sẽn kis bala." 
Jeremiah23:11 No-rɛɛsdbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã rẽgma b mense. Baa mam doogã pʋga, mam yãta b tʋʋm-wẽnsã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah23:12 Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ b sorã na n yɩ sals ne lika. B na n tusa bãmb tɩ b lʋɩ, bala, yʋʋmd ning b sẽn na n sɩbg bãmbã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam-ba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah23:13 Mam yãame tɩ Samaari no-rɛɛsdbã maana yɛl sẽn ka sakd togsgo: Bãmb togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne a Baall yʋʋre, bãmb kẽesa Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã moogo." 
Jeremiah23:14 La Zeruzalɛm no-rɛɛsdbã nengẽ, mam yãnda yɛl sẽn yaa wẽng n yɩɩda: Bãmb yaa yoaadba, bãmb pʋgda zĩrẽ-beedo. Bãmb paasda nin-wẽns pãnga, hal tɩ ned ka be n dat n bas wẽngã maaneg ye. Mam geta bãmb fãa wa Sodom nebã, la Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa wa Gomoor nebã." 
Jeremiah23:15 Woto yĩnga, ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yet no-rɛɛsdbã wɛɛngẽ: «Mam na n kõo bãmb rɩɩb sẽn yaa toog liga tɩ b rɩ, la m kɩt tɩ b yũ koom sẽn tar zẽnem. Bala, Zeruzalɛm no-rɛɛsdbã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã fãa pid ne rẽgdo.»" 
Jeremiah23:16 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Da kelg-y pĩnd-n-bãngr goam nins no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn togsd yãmbã ye. Bãmb belgda yãmb ne gom-vɩɩdo. Bãmb sẽn togsd goam ninsã ka yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorẽ ye. Yaa bãmb mensã sũy tagsgo.» 
Jeremiah23:17 Bãmb tol n yeta neb nins sẽn paoogd Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã yaa: «Bũmb kõn maan yãmb ye!» Bãmb yeta neb nins fãa sẽn keng b sũyã yaa: «Toog kõn paam yãmb ye!» 
Jeremiah23:18 Bala, ãnda soab n zĩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigingã pʋga, n yãnd la a wʋm b goamã? Ãnda n kelg b goamã neer la a wʋm-a?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ade, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sobg n fugdi. Yaa sũ-puug-kãsenga, a bee nin-wẽnsã zut n gõnemdẽ." 
Jeremiah23:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã ka na n sigi, tɩ b ka maan b sẽn dat n maanã, la b pids b saagrã ye. Wakatã sã n ta, yãmb na n wʋma bõn-kãng võore." 
Jeremiah23:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam ka tʋm no-rɛɛsdb-kãensã ye, la b saad n zoetame. Mam ka kõ-b gomd ye, la bãmb togsda pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Jeremiah23:22 Bãmb sã n dag n zĩndẽ mam tigingẽ wã, b rag n na n dɩkẽ-la m goamã n togs m nebã, n kɩt tɩ b bas b manesem-wẽnsã ne b tʋʋm-wẽnsã." 
Jeremiah23:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ne yambẽ bal n ka ne yɩɩg la?»" 
Jeremiah23:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Rẽ yĩnga, ned tõe n soondame tɩ m ka yãnd-a sɩda?» Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam ka be yĩngr la tẽng sɩda?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Mam wʋma bũmb nins no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yetã. Bãmb yagda zĩrẽ, n yetẽ tɩ yaa ne mam yʋʋr la b gomda. Bãmb yetame tɩ b zãmsa zãmsdo, tɩ b paama vẽnegre." 
Jeremiah23:26 Zãmb na n zĩnda no-rɛɛsdbã sũy pʋsẽ tɩ b togsd zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goam hal tɩ ta dabʋre? 
Jeremiah23:27 Bãmb togsda taab b zãmsdã n dat tɩ m nebã yĩm m yʋʋrã wa b yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n yĩm mam yell a Baall yĩngã. 
Jeremiah23:28 Bɩ no-rɛɛs ning sẽn paam-a zãmsd togs a zãmsdã, la bɩ ned ning sẽn tar-a mam goamã togs m goamã vẽenega! Bõe lagem-n-taar n be wudg ne ki sʋka? Maam Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah23:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam goamã ka wẽnd bugum sɩda? A ka wẽnd wa zãar sẽn wãad pĩig kugr sɩda? 
Jeremiah23:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, mam na n zaba ne no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn zuud mam goamã taab nengẽ n yetẽ tɩ yaa maam n gomã.»" 
Jeremiah23:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, mam na n zaba ne no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn gomd b mens goam n yaool n yetẽ tɩ yaa maam n gomã.»" 
Jeremiah23:32 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n zaba ne no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn togsd zĩrẽ zãmsdo, n tudgd mam nebã ne b zĩrẽ wã, la ne b gom-vɩɩdã, tɩ yaool n ka maam n tʋm-ba, la m ka kõ-b noor me ye. Bãmb ka tar yõod ne m nebã ye.»" 
Jeremiah23:33 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Zeremi, nin-bãmbã wall no-rɛɛs bɩ maan-kʋʋd sã n sok foom tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgr koɛɛgã yaa bʋgo, la zɩɩbã yaa bʋgo, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ yaa bãmb mensã la zɩɩbã, la f yeel-b tɩ mam na n dig-b-lame tɩ b zãag ne maam." 
Jeremiah23:34 La no-rɛɛs wall maan-kʋʋd bɩ ned a to sã n yeel tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgr koɛɛgã la woto, mam na n sɩbga yẽnda ne a zakã rãmb fãa.»" 
Jeremiah23:35 Dẽ, bɩ ned kam fãa sok a to ne a saam-biig a woto: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame tɩ bõe? Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ bõe?»" 
Jeremiah23:36 La y ra tol n leb n gom Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgr koɛɛgã yell ye. Bala, yaa ned kam fãa gomd n na n yɩ a sɩbgr koɛɛga, yãmb sẽn golemd Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam goamã yĩnga.›" 
Jeremiah23:37 Sok no-rɛɛsdbã yaa: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab leokame tɩ bõe? Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ bõe?› 
Jeremiah23:38 La yãmb sã n ket n yetẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩbgr koɛɛga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb sẽn gom a woto tɩ mam yaool n kɩt tɩ b yeel yãmb tɩ y ra yeel a woto wã," 
Jeremiah23:39 mam na n yĩma yãmb yelle. Mam na n basa yãmba, la m bas tẽng ning m sẽn dag n kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã." 
Jeremiah23:40 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y paam paoogr wakat fãa tɩ yɩ yãnd ned sẽn kõn tol n yĩm ye.» 
Jeremiah24:1 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yõk Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim biig a Zekoniya, ne Zʋʋda nanambsã la tʋʋm-mitbã ne sãabã n yiis Zeruzalɛm n tall n kẽng Babilondã poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga maam kankam pet a yiib sẽn dɩg Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noore." 
Jeremiah24:2 Peoog a yembr kankam dag n yaa sõama wʋsgo, n yaa wa dẽenem biisi." 
Jeremiah24:3 La peoog a yembrã kankam dag n yaa põaas tɩ ned ka tõe n dɩ ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka maam yaa: «Zeremi, fo nee bõe?» La mam leokame tɩ m nee kankam pet a yiibu, tɩ peoog a yembrã kankam yaa sõama wʋsgo, t'a yembrã kankam yaa põaas tɩ ned ka tõe n dɩ ye." 
Jeremiah24:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam: 
Jeremiah24:5 «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame yaa: ‹Mam geta Zʋʋda neb nins b sẽn yõg zĩ-kãngã n tall n kẽng Kalde nebã tẽngẽ wã wa kankam-kãensã sẽn yaa sõama wã." 
Jeremiah24:6 Mam na n gesame tɩ b paam vɩ-noogo, la m kɩt tɩ b lebg n wa tẽn-kãngã. Mam na n vigl-b lame, m ka na n sãam-b ye. Mam na n sel-b lame, m ka na n võ-b ye." 
Jeremiah24:7 Mam na n kõo bãmb yam tɩ b bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bãmb sã n lebg n wa mam nengẽ ne b sũur fãa, b na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam.› »" 
Jeremiah24:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n maana Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a nanambsã la Zeruzalɛm neb nins sẽn kell n zĩnd tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã, ne sẽn be-b Ezɩpt tẽngã, wa kankam nins sẽn põog tɩ ned ka tõe n dɩ wã." 
Jeremiah24:9 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b lebg pelen-yɩk la yel-beed dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa yĩnga. Zĩig ning fãa mam sẽn na n dig bãmb tɩ b kẽnge, b na n paooga bãmba, la b na n lebga yel-bũndi. B na n yaala bãmb la b kãab-b wẽnga." 
Jeremiah24:10 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ zabr sʋʋg ne kom la bã-longds kʋ bãmb tɩ b menem dũniyã, n ka leb n zĩnd tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ bãmb ne b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah25:1 Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Zeremi Zʋʋda nebã fãa wɛɛngẽ. Yɩɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, sẽn yaa Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar naamã reegr pipi yʋʋmdã." 
Jeremiah25:2 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yalsa Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa taoore, n togs koɛɛg Zʋʋda nebã fãa wɛɛngẽ n yeele:" 
Jeremiah25:3 «Zʋʋda rĩm a Amon biig a Zoziyaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a tãablẽ tɩ ta rũndã, yaa yʋʋm pisi la a tãab la Sẽn-Ka-Saab gom ne maam. Mam togs-a-la yãmb n ka bas ye. Mam togs-a-la yãmb la y ka kelg ye." 
Jeremiah25:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋma b tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã yãmb nengẽ, b leb n tʋm-b lame n ka bas ye, la yãmb ka kelg ye. Yãmb ka yok y tʋbr n kelg ye.»" 
Jeremiah25:5 Bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã rag n yetame: «M kotame tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa bas a manesem-wẽngã ne a tʋʋm-wẽnsã, la y na n zĩnda tẽng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã hal daar zãr zamaan woo zamaanã." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ra tũ-y buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmb n waoog-ba, la ra wõgemd-y n waoog-y-b ye. Ra sãam-y mam sũur ne y nusã tʋʋm ye. Woto, m ka na n maan-y bũmb ye." 
Jeremiah25:7 La yãmb ka kelg maam ye. Yãmb yika mam sũur tɩ m sɩbg yãmb y nusã tʋʋmã, n kɩt tɩ toog paam-yã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah25:8 Woto yĩnga, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Yãmb sẽn kɩɩs n ka sak m goamã yĩnga," 
Jeremiah25:9 mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud nins fãa sẽn be wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtgã, ne Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa m tʋmtʋmdã, wa zab ne tẽn-kãngã nebã, la ne buud nins sẽn gũbg-a wã. Mam na n menesa bãmb n kɩt tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋg wakat fãa yĩnga, tɩ neb sã n yãnd-a, bɩ b yɛɛs n fɩɩle." 
Jeremiah25:10 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sũ-noog kɩdengo, la sũ-noog yɩɩl sɛ b sʋka. B ka na n leb n wʋm pʋg-paal ne pʋg-paal sɩd yɩɩl rãamd ye. B kõn leb n wʋm neer werb rãamd ye, la b kõn leb n yãnd fɩtl bugum ye." 
Jeremiah25:11 Tẽn-kãngã fãa na n lebga raboogo, zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la b na n yõga bu-kãensã n tɩ kẽes yembd Babilond yʋʋm pis-yopoe." 
Jeremiah25:12 La yʋʋm pis-yopoe wã sã n wa n pidi, mam na n sɩbga Babilond dĩmã ne soolem-kãng nebã b beegrã yĩnga. La m na n maana Kalde nebã tẽng me a woto, n kɩt t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋg wakat fãa yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah25:13 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn dag n yeel tẽn-kãngã wɛɛngẽ tɩ b gʋls seb-kãngã pʋgẽ wã paam-a. Yaa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn dag n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr nins soolem-dãmbã wɛɛngẽ wã. 
Jeremiah25:14 Bala, buud sẽn tar pãens ne rĩm-kãsems na n sooga bãmba, la mam na n lebsa bãmb me wa sẽn zems b manesmã ne nusã tʋʋmã.»" 
Jeremiah25:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yeela maam yaa: Reeg reezẽ rãam wam-kãngã sẽn be mam nugẽ, n pid ne sũ-puugr dãamã, n tɩ yũnug buud nins fãa mam sẽn tʋmd foom b nengẽ wã." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bɩ bãmb yũ n tuum la b zʋbse, zabr sʋʋgã mam sẽn tʋmd b sʋkã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah25:17 Dẽ, mam deega wamdã Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugẽ n tɩ yũnug buud nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n tʋm maam b nengẽ wã." 
Jeremiah25:18 Mam sɩnga ne Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda tẽmsã, ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã ne a nanambsã, n kɩt tɩ b lebg ra-boodo, la zĩ-vɩɩdo, tɩ nebã sã n yãnd-b bɩ b yɛɛs n fɩɩle, a kãab-wẽngã yĩnga. Yaa rẽ n kɩt t'a ket n yaa woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah25:19 Sẽn pʋgd yaa bu-kãensã: Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ ne a tʋmtʋmdbã la a nanambsã, ne a nebã fãa," 
Jeremiah25:20 la sãambã fãa sẽn be Ezɩptã, ne Uts tẽng rĩm-dãmbã fãa, la Filistẽ nebã rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn be Askelon ne Gaaza, la Ekron ne Asdood zĩis nins sẽn ketã," 
Jeremiah25:21 la Edom ne Moaab la Amo nebã," 
Jeremiah25:22 ne Tɩɩr la Sɩdõ ne tẽms nins sẽn be ko-kãsengã rʋʋndã rĩm-dãmb fãa," 
Jeremiah25:23 la Dedan ne Tema la Buuz tẽmsã nebã, ne neb nins sẽn kõogd b yɛɛmã," 
Jeremiah25:24 la Arabi rĩm-dãmbã ne neb nins sẽn be we-raoogã pʋgẽ wã rĩm-dãmb fãa," 
Jeremiah25:25 ne Zimri la Elam ne Medi rĩm-dãmbã fãa," 
Jeremiah25:26 la rĩm-dãmbã fãa sẽn be tẽms nins sẽn be rɩtgã, sẽn pẽ-ba, la sẽn zãr-b ne taabã, la soolem nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã. La sẽn na n yɩ-a yaoolem soab n yũ yaa Babilond dĩmã." 
Jeremiah25:27 Yeel bãmb tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Yũ-y-yã! Yũ-y tɩ y nens yilim tɩ y wʋbe, n lʋɩ n da leb n yik ye, y sẽn yã zabr sʋʋgã mam sẽn tʋm y sʋkã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah25:28 «La bãmb sã n zãgs tɩ b ka na n deeg wamdã sẽn be fo nugẽ wã n yũ, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Yaa tɩlɛ tɩ y yũ! Y na yũ-a lame!›" 
Jeremiah25:29 Bala, mam na n sɩnga toogã ne tẽng ning b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã. La yãmb tẽedame tɩ b na n basa yãmb taal bɩ? B ka na n bas-y taal ye, mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ zabr zĩnd dũniyã nebã fãa zugã yĩnga. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah25:30 Woto yĩnga, bɩ foom a Zeremi togs-b pĩnd-n-bãngr goam bõn-kãensã fãa wɛɛngẽ n yeel-b yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee yĩngr n tãsdẽ, b be b zĩ-sõngẽ wã n zẽkd-b koɛɛga. Bãmb be b zĩigẽ wã n tãsdẽ. Bãmb zẽkda b koɛɛg n kaasd wa neb sẽn wobd reezẽ, reezẽ wobr wakate, la wa neb sẽn tabd reezẽ, reezẽ wẽkr koglg pʋgẽ, n zabd ne dũniyã nebã fãa." 
Jeremiah25:31 Bʋrg n sãt n tat dũniyã tɛk fãa. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara yell ne buudã fãa, bãmb yika bʋʋd ne bãmb fãa. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b kʋʋd nin-wẽnsã ne zabr sʋʋga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah25:32 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Toog paamda buud a ye, n long a to. Sob-kẽeng n yi dũniyã zĩ-zãrsẽ n watẽ." 
Jeremiah25:33 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kʋ neb ninsã kũum na n dʋra tẽng dũniyã kɩreng a yembr n tɩ tãag kɩreng a to. B ka na n yãb b yĩng ye. La b ka na n tigim-b zĩ-yɛnga, la b ka na n dɩk-b n mum ye. Bãmb na n lebga põosg tẽn-gãongã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah25:34 Nanambse, zẽk-y y koees n yãbe! Gãand-y tom pʋgẽ n bilme! Bala, wakat taame tɩ b na n kood yãmb n yʋlme. Yãmb na n lʋɩɩ wa laok sẽn tar yõodo." 
Jeremiah25:35 Soondg zĩig ka leb n be nanambsã yĩng ye! Nebã taoor dãmb ka leb n tar b sẽn kẽedẽ ye. 
Jeremiah25:36 Kelg-y nanambsã kelemse! Kelg-y nebã taoor dãmb kaasgo! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sãama zĩig ning b sẽn dag n dɩlgd b nebã." 
Jeremiah25:37 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã yĩng kɩtame, tɩ bãmb tẽngã zĩ-sõamy wã lebga sɩddd..." 
Jeremiah25:38 Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa bãmb tẽngã, wa gɩgem-poll sẽn bas a gãag zĩiga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã sẽn wat ne sãoongã yĩnga, bãmb sũ-puug-kãsengã kɩtame tɩ b tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo.»" 
Jeremiah26:1 A Yoyakim biig a Zoziyaas sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã naamã sɩngre, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeele:" 
Jeremiah26:2 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Kẽng n tɩ yals Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋga, n gom ne neb nins fãa sẽn yit Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsẽ wã fãa, n wat n wõgemded maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, n togs bãmb goam nins fãa mam sẽn yet foomã, n da bas ba a yembr ye.›" 
Jeremiah26:3 Daarninga, b na n kelgame tɩ b ned kam fãa bas a manesem-wẽngã. Sã n yɩ a woto, mam na n basa wẽng ning m sẽn dag n saagd n dat n maan-b b tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩngã." 
Jeremiah26:4 Yeel-b tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb sã n ka sak n kẽn wa sẽn zems mam tõogã m sẽn kõ yãmbã," 
Jeremiah26:5 la y ka kelg mam tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã mam sẽn tʋm yãmb nengẽ naoor wʋsg tɩ y ka kelg-bã," 
Jeremiah26:6 mam na n maana ro-kãngã wa m sẽn maan Sɩlo wã, la m kɩt tɩ tẽn-kãngã lebg kãab-wẽnga, buud nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã yĩnga.› »" 
Jeremiah26:7 Maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã la nebã fãa wʋma a Zeremi sẽn gomd gom-kãensã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã. 
Jeremiah26:8 La a Zeremi sẽn gom goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda t'a togs nebã fãa wã n sɛ, maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã la nebã fãa yõka yẽnda n yeel-a yaa: «Fo na n kiime!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre, n yetẽ tɩ ro-kãngã na n yɩɩ wa Sɩlo, tɩ la tẽn-kãngã na n lebga raboog tɩ ned ka leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ?» Dẽ, nebã fãa gũbga a Zeremi Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah26:10 Zʋʋda nanambsã sẽn wʋm bõn-kãnga, b yii rĩmã zakẽ n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, la bãmb zĩnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ rigno-paallã." 
Jeremiah26:11 Dẽ, maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã goma ne nanambsã la nebã fãa n yeel-b yaa: «Rao-kãngã toga ne kũum, bala, a togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-toos sẽn kẽed ne tẽn-kãngã wɛɛngẽ, wa yãmb sẽn wʋmã.»" 
Jeremiah26:12 La a Zeremi yeela nanambsã fãa ne nebã fãa yaa: «Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n tʋm maam tɩ m wa togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam nins fãa yãmb sẽn wʋme, sẽn kẽed ne ro-kãngã la tẽn-kãngã wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Jeremiah26:13 Moasã, bɩ y tek y yel-manesmã ne y tʋʋmã. Kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛgã, tɩ b bas toog ning b sẽn dag n saagd n na n kɩt tɩ wa yãmb zugã vaale." 
Jeremiah26:14 Sã n yaa sẽn kẽed ne mam wɛɛngẽ, ade, mam bee y nugẽ. Maan-y sẽn ta yãmb yam, la sẽn zems y nifẽ." 
Jeremiah26:15 La bãng-y tɩ y sã n kʋ maam, mam zɩɩmã raagr taal na n zĩnda y zugu, la tẽn-kãngã ne a nebã me zugu. Bala, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sɩd tʋm maam tɩ m wa togs yãmb gom-kãensã fãa.»" 
Jeremiah26:16 Dẽ, nanambsã ne nebã fãa yeela maan-kʋʋdbã ne no-rɛɛsdbã yaa: «Rao-kãngã ka tog ne kũum ye. Bala, yaa ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, la a gom ne tõndo.»" 
Jeremiah26:17 Tẽngã kãsem-dãmb kẽer yikame n yeel nebã fãa yaa: 
Jeremiah26:18 «Wakat ning a Ezekɩyaas sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã, Moresɛt dao a Miise rag n togsa Zʋʋda nebã fãa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeele: ‹Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yeta: Sɩyõ na n lebga wa pʋʋg b sẽn gudgi. Zeruzalɛm na n lebga raboogo, la tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn be-a zugã na n lebga kãgre.›" 
Jeremiah26:19 Dẽ yĩnga, Zʋʋda rĩm a Ezekɩyaas ne Zʋʋda nebã fãa kʋʋ no-rɛɛs a Miise la? Ayo, rĩm a Ezekɩyaas zoee Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b sik b sũuri. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa toog ning b sẽn dag n saagd n na n kɩt tɩ wa bãmb zugã tɩ vaale. Tõnd na n maana yel-kãseng a woto n dogl yell d mens zut sɩda?»" 
Jeremiah26:20 Rao a yembr me n dag n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. Yẽnda yʋʋr ya a Uuri, n yaa Kiryat-Yeyarim dao a Semaya biiga. A Uuri togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-toos sẽn kẽed ne tẽn-kãng wɛɛngẽ, wa a Zeremi sẽn dag n togs goam ninsã." 
Jeremiah26:21 Rĩm a Yoyakim ne a gãndaadã la a nanambsã fãa wʋma gom-kãense, la rĩmã baoome n na n kʋ a Uuri. La a Uuri sẽn wʋm dẽnda, rabeem yõka yẽnda t'a zoe n kẽng Ezɩpte." 
Jeremiah26:22 Dẽ, rĩm a Yoyakim tʋma a Akboor biig a Ɛlnatan ne neb kẽer Ezɩpte." 
Jeremiah26:23 Bãmb tɩ yiisa a Uuri Ezɩpte, n tall-a n wa rĩm a Yoyakim nengẽ. La rĩmã kʋʋ yẽnda zĩig pʋgẽ ne zabr sʋʋga, n dɩk a kũumã n tɩ lob tẽngã nebã yaadẽ." 
Jeremiah26:24 La sã n yaa ne a Zeremi, a Safan biig a Ayikam kogla yẽnda, n ka bas tɩ nebã paam-a n kʋ ye." 
Jeremiah27:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim biig a Sedesiyaas naamã sɩngr wakate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab togsa a Zeremi gom-kãngã:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam: «Maan loets ne balgr ra-tuiids n pid f loorã." 
Jeremiah27:3 Maan a taab n tʋm koe-toagsdb nins sẽn wa Zeruzalɛm Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas nengẽ wã, tɩ b tɩ kõ Edom dĩmã ne Moaab rĩmã, la Amo nebã rĩmã ne Tɩɩr dĩmã, la Sɩdõ rĩmã.»" 
Jeremiah27:4 Yeel koe-toagsdbã tɩ b tɩ yeel b soaadbã yaa: «Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta: Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y y soaadbã yaa: 
Jeremiah27:5 ‹Yaa maam n tẽeg m nug n naan dũniyã ne ninsaalbã la rũmsã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã ne m pãn-kãsengã, la m dɩkda dũniyã n kõt soab ning sẽn ta-a mam yam." 
Jeremiah27:6 Moasã, mam dɩka tẽn-kãensã fãa n ning Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã nugẽ. Mam dɩka baa we-rũmsã n ning yẽnda nugẽ t'a soog-ba." 
Jeremiah27:7 Buud toay-toayã fãa na n saka yẽnda ne a biigã la a yagengã, hal n tãag wakat ning yẽnda me tẽngã sẽn na n sak buud a taab sẽn tar pãng ne rĩm-kãsemsã." 
Jeremiah27:8 Buud wall soolem sã n yeel t'a ka sak t'a Nebukatnedzaar soog-a, mam na n sɩbga bu-kãng ne zabr sʋʋga, la ne kom la bã-longdse. Mam na n sãam-a-la zãng ne mam mengã nugu. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah27:9 La sã n yaa ne yãmba, ra kelg-y no-rɛɛsdbã ne y bagbã la neb nins sẽn bilgd-b yãmb y zãmsd toay-toayã võorã, ne sẽn sogsd-b kɩɩmsã, la sẽn boond-b sɩɩsã ye. Bãmb yeta yãmb tɩ Babilond dĩmã ka na n soog yãmb ye." 
Jeremiah27:10 La b sẽn yaool n yet yãmbã yaa zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, n dat n zãag yãmb ne y tẽngã, tɩ mam dig yãmb n menes-yã." 
Jeremiah27:11 La tẽng ning sẽn na n sak-a tɩ Babilond dĩmã balg a yublã la a sak n tũ a raabo, mam na n bas-a lame t'a zĩnd a tẽngẽ ne bãane, n ko. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah27:12 Yaa koe-kãng me la mam dag n togs Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaase: Sak-y tɩ Babilond dĩmã balg y yublã. Sak-y tɩ yẽnda ne a nebã soog-yã, tɩ y paam n vɩɩmde!" 
Jeremiah27:13 Bõe yĩng tɩ f na n bas tɩ zabr sʋʋg ne kom la bã-longds kʋ foom ne f nebã? Bõn-kãens n yaool n na n paam buud ning sẽn na n zãgs-a n ka sak tɩ Babilond dĩmã soog-a wã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeelã." 
Jeremiah27:14 Da kelg-y no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn yet tɩ Babilond dĩmã ka na n soog yãmbã ye. Bala, b sẽn togsd yãmbã yaa zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã!" 
Jeremiah27:15 Ka maam n tʋm bãmb ye. Bãmb yetame tɩ b gomda ne mam yʋʋre, la ka sɩd ye. B maanda a woto, n dat tɩ mam dig yãmb n menes yãmb ne neb nins sẽn togsd yãmb pĩnd-n-bãngr gom-kãensã wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah27:16 Mam yeela maan-kʋʋdbã ne nin-bãmbã fãa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Da kelg-y no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn yet yãmb tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu, b na n talla Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed sẽn be Babilondã n wa ka wã goam ye. Bãmb sẽn togsdã yaa zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Jeremiah27:17 Da kelg-y bãmb ye. Sak-y Babilond dĩmã noore, n paam n vɩɩmde. Bõe yĩng tɩ y na n bas tɩ tẽn-kãngã lebg raboogo?»" 
Jeremiah27:18 A Zeremi leb n yeelame yaa: «Nin-kãensã sã n yaa no-rɛɛsdb hakɩɩka, la sã n sɩd yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gom ne bãmba, bɩ b yõk Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sɛɛga, tɩ b ra sak tɩ b tall teed nins sẽn pa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, ne Zʋʋda rĩmã na-yirã, la Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã, n kẽng Babilond ye." 
Jeremiah27:19 Bala, ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yete, sẽn kẽed ne ra-lugdsã ne sĩn-bedrã la rogendsã, ne teed a taabã sẽn pa Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã wɛɛngẽ." 
Jeremiah27:20 Yaa teed nins Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n base, wakat ning a sẽn yõk Zʋʋda rĩm a Zekoniya sẽn yaa a Yoyakim biigã, la Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm kãsem-dãmbã fãa, n tall n kẽng Babilondã." 
Jeremiah27:21 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta, teed nins sẽn pa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ne Zʋʋda rĩmã na-yirã la Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ wã wɛɛngẽ:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‹B na n talla te-bãmb fãa n kẽng Babilonde, la b na n paa be, hal n tãag daar ning mam meng sẽn na n tall-b n lebg n wa zĩ-kãngã.› Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah28:1 Yʋʋm-kãng pʋgẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas naamã sɩngrẽ, a sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, kiuug a nu soabã pʋgẽ, Gabawõ tẽng ned a Azʋʋr biig a Hananiya sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsã goma ne maam Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, maan-kʋʋdbã ne nebã fãa taoore, n yeele:" 
Jeremiah28:2 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Mam kaooda balgr ning Babilond dĩmã sẽn dag n balg yãmbã!" 
Jeremiah28:3 Keta yʋʋm a yiibu, tɩ mam kɩt tɩ b tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teed nins fãa Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n wʋk zĩ-kãngã n tall n kẽng Babilondã, n lebg n wa." 
Jeremiah28:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b tall Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim biig a Zekoniya, ne Zʋʋda neb nins fãa b sẽn dag n yõg n tall n kẽng Babilondã n wa, bala, mam na n kaoo Babilond dĩmã balgrã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah28:5 A Zeremi leoka a Hananiya maan-kʋʋdbã ne nebã fãa sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã taoore. 
Jeremiah28:6 No-rɛɛs a Zeremi yeelame: Ãmina! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt t'a yɩ woto! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩt tɩ pĩnd-n-bãngr goam nins fo sẽn togsã yɩ sɩda, la b kɩt tɩ b tall Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã teedo, ne neb nins fãa b sẽn yõg n tall n kẽng yembd Babilondã n lebg n wa zĩ-kãngã!" 
Jeremiah28:7 La bũmb sẽn be bala, m kotame tɩ f kelg gom-kãngã m sẽn na n yeel foom ne nebã fãa wã neere:" 
Jeremiah28:8 No-rɛɛsdb n zĩnd kʋdem-wẽndẽ sẽn deng maam ne foom, n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n wilg tɩ zabr ne tood la bã-longds na n zĩnda tẽms wʋsg ne soolem-kãsems pʋsẽ." 
Jeremiah28:9 La no-rɛɛs sã n wa yetẽ tɩ vɩ-bãan na n zĩndame, yaa a sẽn yeelã sẽn wat n paam pidsgã, la b na n bãng t'a sɩd yaa no-rɛɛs Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋme." 
Jeremiah28:10 Dẽ, no-rɛɛs a Hananiya yiisa balgrã sẽn dag n pid no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yublã, n kaoog-a." 
Jeremiah28:11 La a Hananiya yeela nebã fãa taoore: Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Ka ne yʋʋm a yiibu, na n yɩɩ woto. Mam na n sãama balgr ning Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n balg buud toay-toayã fãa wã. Dẽ zugẽ, a Zeremi rɩka a sor n looge." 
Jeremiah28:12 No-rɛɛs a Hananiya sẽn kaoog balgrã sẽn dag n be a Zeremi yublẽ wã poore, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeele:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Hananiya tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo tõe n kaoo balgr sẽn maan ne raoogo, la fo na n maana kut balgr n ledg a zĩigẽ.»" 
Jeremiah28:14 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Mam ninga kut balgr buud toay-toayã fãa yublẽ, tɩ b sak Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaare, la yẽnda na n sooga bãmba. Mam kɩtame tɩ yẽnda soog baa ne we-rũmsã.»" 
Jeremiah28:15 La no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yeela a Hananiya: Hananiya, m kot-f lame tɩ f kelg neere! Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tʋm foom ye, tɩ fo yaool n pirsd nebã tɩ b teeg zĩrẽ." 
Jeremiah28:16 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam na n menesa foom dũniyã zugu. Rõandã bala, fo na n kiime, fo sẽn kɩt tɩ nebã kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah28:17 Sɩd me, yʋʋm-kãng bala, no-rɛɛs a Hananiya kii kiuug a yopoe soabã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah29:1 No-rɛɛs a Zeremi zĩnda Zeruzalɛm n tʋm sebr tɩ b tɩ kõ kãsem-dãmb nins sẽn kellã ne maan-kʋʋdbã, la no-rɛɛsdbã ne neb nins fãa a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b yõg Zeruzalɛm n tall n kẽng Babilondã." 
Jeremiah29:2 B sẽn tʋm sebrã yɩɩ wakat ning b sẽn yiis rĩm a Zekoniya ne a ma wã, la zakã tʋmtʋmdbã, ne Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nanambsã, la tʋʋm-mitbã ne sãabã Zeruzalɛm n tall-b n kẽng yembdã zugẽ." 
Jeremiah29:3 La Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas tʋma a Safan biig a Eleyaza, ne a Hilkiiza biig a Gemariya ne sebrã tɩ b tɩ kɩs Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaare. Ad goam nins sẽn be sebrã pʋgẽ:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yet neb nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b yõg Zeruzalɛm n tall n kẽng yembd Babilondã: 
Jeremiah29:5 Me-y rot n zĩnd b pʋsẽ! Sel-y tɩɩs n dɩ b biisi. 
Jeremiah29:6 Kẽ-y kãadem n dog kamba. Bao-y pagb n kõ y kom-dibli wã, la bao sɩdb n kõ y kom-pugli wã tɩ bãmb me rog kamba. Rog-y n fɩɩg-y zĩig ning yãmb sẽn beẽ wã, la y ra bas tɩ y sõor boog ye." 
Jeremiah29:7 Bao-y tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd tẽng ning mam sẽn kɩt tɩ b tall yãmb n kẽngã pʋgẽ, la y pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab a yĩnga, bala tẽngã sã n zĩ bãane, yãmb me na n zĩnda bãane." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta: Da sak-y tɩ no-rɛɛsdbã ne bag-bʋgdbã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã tudg-y ye. Da rɩk-y y zãmsdã wa bũmb sẽn yaa sɩd ye. 
Jeremiah29:9 Bala, bãmb yetame tɩ b sẽn togsd yãmb pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ninsã yaa ne mam yʋʋre, la ka sɩd ye. Ka maam n tʋm bãmb ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah29:10 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb sẽn na n zĩnd Babilondã sã n wa pid yʋʋm pis-yopoe, mam na n sõnga yãmba, n pids kãab-noog ning m sẽn dag n kãab yãmbã, n kɩt tɩ y lebg n wa zĩ-kãngã." 
Jeremiah29:11 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam mii saagr ning m sẽn saagd yãmb yĩngã. Ka saagr sẽn na n wa ne toog yãmb zug ye, yaa vɩ-bãan saagre, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ y beoog vɩɩmã yɩ neere, la tɩ y paam tẽeb pidsgu." 
Jeremiah29:12 Dẽ, yãmb na n boola maam la y pʋʋs maam, la m na n leok-y lame." 
Jeremiah29:13 Yãmb na n baoo maam, la y na n yãnda maam. Bala, yãmb na n baoo maam ne y sũyã fãa." 
Jeremiah29:14 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam na n basame tɩ y yãnd-ma, la m na n leb n manega yãmb yellã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y yi soolem ninsi, la tẽms nins fãa mam sẽn dag n dig yãmb tɩ y kẽngã. Mam na n talla yãmb n lebg n wa zĩ-kãngã m sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b yiis yãmb n tɩ kẽes yembdã." 
Jeremiah29:15 Yãmb yaool n yetame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ no-rɛɛsdb gom ne yãmb Babilond tẽngã pʋga.› » 
Jeremiah29:16 La ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta, rĩm ning sẽn led a Davɩɩd zĩigẽ n dɩt naamã wɛɛngẽ, la nebã fãa sẽn be tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã, ne y saam-biisã sẽn be ne yãmb yembdã pʋgẽ wã wɛɛngẽ:" 
Jeremiah29:17 «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Mam na n tʋma zabr sʋʋg ne kom la bã-longds b yĩnga, la m kɩt tɩ b lebg wa kankam-põaas ned sẽn ka tõe n dɩ ye, b põogrã keelem." 
Jeremiah29:18 Mam na n diga bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga, la kom ne bã-longdse. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa sã n yãnd bãmb bɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-ba. Soolem nins fãa mam sẽn na n dig bãmb tɩ b kẽngã pʋsẽ, nebã na n gesa yãmb wa kãab-beedo, wall bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem, wall yãnd bũmbu," 
Jeremiah29:19 b sẽn ka kelg mam goamã yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Mam yaool n tʋma m tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã yãmb nengẽ n ka bas ye. La yãmb ka kelg-b ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› » 
Jeremiah29:20 La yãmb dãmb fãa mam sẽn kɩt tɩ b yiis Zeruzalɛm n tall n kẽng yembd Babilondã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã!" 
Jeremiah29:21 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yete, a Kolaya biig a Akaab ne a Maseya biig a Sedesiyaas sẽn gom zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ne mam yʋʋrã wɛɛngẽ, n yetẽ: «Mam ningda bãmb Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nugẽ, la a na n kɩtame tɩ b pãb bãmb yãmb taoore." 
Jeremiah29:22 B na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda neb nins fãa sẽn be yembd Babilondã rɩk nin-bãmbã b yiibã yʋy n kãabd kãab-beedo, n yetẽ: Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan foom wa b sẽn maan a Sedesiyaas ne a Akaab n kɩt tɩ b sẽ bãmb bugmẽ wã." 
Jeremiah29:23 Bala, bãmb maana yalem-tʋʋm Israyɛlle, n maan yoob ne b taab pagba, n yag zĩrẽ ne mam yʋʋre, tɩ mam yaool n dag n ka kõ-b noor ye. Mam mii bõn-kãnga, la m yaa kaset soaba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah29:24 Yeel Nehelam tẽng rao a Semaya," 
Jeremiah29:25 tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Fo gʋlsa sɛb ne f meng yʋʋr n tʋm tɩ b tɩ kõ Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa, ne maan-kʋʋd a Sofoni sẽn yaa a Maaseya biigã, la maan-kʋʋdb a taabã. Ad goam nins fo sẽn gʋls seb-kãens pʋsẽ:" 
Jeremiah29:26 «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka foom tɩ f yɩ maan-kʋʋd n led maan-kʋʋd a Zehozada zĩigẽ, tɩ fo tõe n gũ Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn zʋbsd n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, bɩ f kɩt tɩ b sẽb a soab ne bãense, la b balg a yublã ne kutu." 
Jeremiah29:27 La yaa bõe tɩ fo ka tãs Anatot rao a Zeremi sẽn maand a meng no-rɛɛs yãmb sʋkã? 
Jeremiah29:28 Yẽnda tol n tʋma neb tõnd nengẽ Babilond ka, tɩ b wa togs tõnd koe-kãnga: Yãmb na n zĩnda yembdã pʋg n kaoose! Me-y rot n zĩnd be! Sel-y tɩɩs n dɩ b biisi!»" 
Jeremiah29:29 Maan-kʋʋd a Sofoni karma seb-kãng n kõ no-rɛɛs a Zeremi. 
Jeremiah29:30 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa: 
Jeremiah29:31 Tʋm tɩ b tɩ yeel neb nins b sẽn yõg n tall n kẽng Babilondã yaa: Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yete, Nehelam tẽng rao a Semaya wɛɛngẽ: A Semaya togsa yãmb pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n dat tɩ yãmb teeg zĩrẽ, tɩ m yaool n ka tʋm-a ye." 
Jeremiah29:32 Woto yĩnga, ad maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: Nehelam dao a Semaya sẽn maan tɩ nebã kɩɩs Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga, mam na n sɩbga yẽnda ne a yagensã. Yẽnda buudã ned ba a yembr ka na n zĩnd nin-bãmbã sʋk ye. Yẽnda ka na n yãnd maan-neer ning mam sẽn na n maan m nebã ye." 
Jeremiah30:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa: 
Jeremiah30:2 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Gʋls bũmb nins mam sẽn yeel foomã sebr pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah30:3 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n maneg Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã yellã tɩ lebg sõama. Mam na n tall-b lame n lebg n wa tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ b yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ, tɩ b soog-a.› Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah30:4 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gom Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã wɛɛngẽ: 
Jeremiah30:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Tõnd wʋmda bʋrg sẽn wat ne yɛɛsgo. Yaa rabeem bala, vɩ-bãan ka leb n be ye." 
Jeremiah30:6 M kotame tɩ y sok n gese, rao rogdame la? La yaa bõe tɩ m neẽ tɩ raopã fãa teeg b seese, wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem? Bõe yĩng tɩ b fãa nensã pelge?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Kayto! Ra-kãng na n yɩɩ ra-kãsenga, na n yɩɩ daar sẽn ka wẽnd a taaba. Na n yɩɩ toog daar a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga, la b na n paama fãagr n yi a pʋgẽ.›" 
Jeremiah30:8 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Badaare, mam na n kaoo balgr ning sẽn be bãmb yublẽ wã, mam na kaoo b loetsã. Bãmb ka na n leb n tʋm sãamb yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah30:9 Bãmb na n tʋma maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã, ne a Davɩɩd mam sẽn na n yãk t'a yɩ bãmb dĩmã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah30:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yetame: ‹La foom a Zakoob sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã, da zoe rabeem ye! Israyɛll nebã, da bas-y tɩ y pɛleng yɩk ye! Bala, mam na n fãaga yãmb tẽn-zãrg ning y sẽn beẽ wã, la m fãag y yagensã tẽng ning b sẽn be yembd pʋgẽ wã. Israyɛll nebã na n lebg n waame, la b na n leb n zĩnda yam-gãneg ne vɩ-bãan pʋga, la ned kõn zĩnd sẽn na n kẽes-b rabeem ye." 
Jeremiah30:11 Bala, mam bee ne yãmba, n na n fãag-yã. Mam na n sãama buud nins fãa mam sẽn dig yãmb tɩ y sãeeg n be b sʋkã, la m ka na n sãam yãmb ye. M na n demsa yãmb ne tɩrlem, m ka na n bas-y taal n ka sɩbg-y ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah30:12 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb sãmpogrã ka tõe n maag ye. Yãmb poglgã ya n zabda hal wʋsgo. 
Jeremiah30:13 Ned ka be n sõngd yãmb ye, Ned ka be n na n tɩp y nodrã ye. Tɩɩm ka be yãmb yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah30:14 Neb nins fãa sẽn dag n nong yãmbã yĩma y yelle, n ka leb n baood y zĩig ye. Bala, mam wẽe yãmb wa bɛ sẽn wẽed to-to wã. Mam sɩbga yãmb sɩbg-toaaga, yãmb kongrã sẽn waoogã yĩnga, yãmb yel-wẽnã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah30:15 Bõe yĩng tɩ y kelemd y sãmpogrã yĩnga? Bõe yĩng tɩ y kelemd y poglgã sẽn ka maagdã yĩnga? Mam maan-y-la woto, y kongrã sẽn waoogã yĩnga, y yel-wẽnã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah30:16 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ neb nins fãa sẽn sãamd-b yãmbã na n sãame. Sẽn kis-b yãmbã fãa na n kẽnga yembdo. Sẽn namsd-b yãmbã na n paama namsgo, la mam na n basame tɩ b fã sẽn fãad-b yãmbã fãa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Mam na n lebs n manega yãmb yellã, mam na n maaga y poglgã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. B boonda yãmb tɩ b sẽn dig-b rãmbã, n yetẽ tɩ Sɩyõ nebã yaa neb b sẽn ka leb n baood b zĩig ye.»" 
Jeremiah30:18 Ade, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n lebs n manega a Zakoob yagensã fu-rot nins sẽn sãamã. Bãmb rotã nimbãaneg tara maam. B na n lebs n mee bãmb tẽmsã b raboodã zĩigẽ, la b lebs n me b ro-neebã b zĩ-kʋdẽ wã." 
Jeremiah30:19 Bãmb na n yɩɩla pẽgr yɩɩla. B na n wʋma bãmb laad be. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b fɩɩg n lebg wʋsgo, la bãmb sõorã kõn leb n boog ye. Neb a taabã na n waooga bãmba, b kõn leb n paoog bãmb ye." 
Jeremiah30:20 Bãmb kambã na n leb n yɩɩ wa b sẽn dag n yaa-a soab pĩndã. Bãmb na n leb n tigma taab mam taoore. Mam na n sɩbga neb nins fãa sẽn namsd bãmbã. 
Jeremiah30:21 Bãmb sʋkã ned a yembr n na n yɩ b naaba. Sẽn na n soog-a bãmbã na n yɩɩ bãmb buudã neda. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda kolg maam, la yẽnda na n kolga maam, bala, ned ka na n saag n kolg maam, tɩ sã n ka maam n bool-a soab ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah30:22 Yãmb na n leb n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ade, yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sobg n fugdi. A fugda hal wʋsgo, a bee nin-wẽnsã zut n gõnemdẽ." 
Jeremiah30:24 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã ka na n sigi, tɩ b ka maan b sẽn datã, la b pids b saagrã ye. Wakatã sã n ta, yãmb na n wʋma bõn-kãng võore.»" 
Jeremiah31:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Wakat-kãnga, mam na n yɩɩ Israyɛll buud toay-toayã fãa rĩmã, la bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã." 
Jeremiah31:2 Ade, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam wilga m nonglem ne neb nins sẽn põs zabr sʋʋg n be we-raoogẽ wã. Israyɛll nebã kẽnd n dabda vʋʋsg zĩigẽ.›" 
Jeremiah31:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩnda yɩɩg n puk b meng ne maam n yeele: ‹Mam nonga foom ne nonglem sẽn ka sɛta. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ mam na n nong foom n ka basdẽ ye. 
Jeremiah31:4 Israyɛll tẽn-neere, mam na n lebs n mee foom, b na n lebs n me-f lame yɛsa. Fo na n leb n dɩka f gãngãado, n yi n saoodẽ la f laadẽ." 
Jeremiah31:5 Fo na n leb n sela reezẽ tɩɩs Samaari tãmsã zutu. Neb nins sẽn na n sel tɩɩsã na n dɩ b yõodo.› 
Jeremiah31:6 Bala, wakat n wate, tɩ gũudbã na n kelem Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã n yeele: ‹Wa-y tɩ d kẽng Sɩyõ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã nengẽ!› »" 
Jeremiah31:7 Bala, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: Kaas-y ne sũ-noog a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga. Kɩdm-y n yɩɩg-y buud toay-toayã fãa! Zẽk-y y koees n pẽg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele: Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, fãag-y y nebã! Fãag-y Israyɛll bu-kellã!" 
Jeremiah31:8 Mam tara bãmb n yit wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã n watẽ. Mam yiisa bãmb dũniyã kɩremsã fãa n wat n na n tigme. Bãmb sʋkã, zoense, koms-rãmba, pagb sẽn tʋte, ne pagb sẽn kũmd dogem na n zĩnda be. Yaa bu-kãseng n lebg n wat zĩ-kãngã." 
Jeremiah31:9 Bãmb watame la b yãbda, la m tɛta bãmb b se-yõkrã pʋga Mam tɛta bãmb so-tɩrg b sẽn ka tõe n lak n lʋɩ zugu, n dabd ko-zoetem zĩisẽ. Bala, mam lebga ba Israyɛll nebã yĩnga, la a Efrayiim yaa mam bi-rẽenga." 
Jeremiah31:10 Buud toay-toayã fãa, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã, la y moon-a tẽn-zãrsã sẽn be koom sʋkã nebã n yeele: «Soab ning sẽn sãeeg-a Israyɛll nebã na n lebg n tigim-b lame, la b na n gũu Israyɛll nebã wa pe-kɩɩm sẽn gũud a piisi." 
Jeremiah31:11 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n fãagd a Zakoob yagensã, n deegd bãmb neb sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩd bãmbã nugẽ." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bãmb na n waame, n kaas ne sũ-noog Sɩyõ tãngã zugu. Bãmb na n kaoog n wa reega bõn-sõamy nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn segl b yĩngã: ‹Yaa koodo, reezẽ rã-paalga, ka-paalga, la rũm-bãooneg ne rũm-bɛda. Bãmb vɩɩmã na n yɩɩ wa zẽed zĩig sẽn paam koom tɩ seke. Bãmb pãng kõn tol n leb n sɛ ye.›" 
Jeremiah31:13 Dẽ, pʋg-sadb na n saoome n maan sũ-noogo. Kom-bɩɩs ne nin-kẽemb na n naaga taab n maan sũ-noogo. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b sũ-sãangã lebg kɩdengo, la m na n bels-b lame. Bãmb toogã poore, mam na n kõ-b-la sũ-noogo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã paam nem-kaam n wãb n tɩge, la m na n tɩgsa m nebã ne m bõn-neebã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah31:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B wʋmda kelems sẽn yit Rama, yaa sũ-toog kelemse. Yaa a Rasɛll n yãbd a kambã yĩnga. A kambã kaalem yĩnga, a ka sakd belsg ye.»" 
Jeremiah31:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Sĩnd la f ra leb n yãb ye. Yẽes f nintãm. Bala, f na n paama keoor f tʋʋmã yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Fo kambã na n yii b bɛɛbã tẽngẽ n lebg n wa.»" 
Jeremiah31:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Tẽeb ket n bee fo beoog vɩɩmã yĩnga. Fo kambã na n lebg n wa b soolmẽ wã. 
Jeremiah31:18 Mam wʋmda Efrayiim buudã sẽn yẽgemd n yetẽ: Yãmb demsa tõndo, la d saka remsgã wa nag-bil sẽn ka yã wõrbo. Tall-y tõnd n lebg n wa, la d na n sak n waame. Bala, yãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah31:19 Tõnd sẽn wẽnemd n bas yãmbã, d maanda d bãngẽ. Yãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ tõnd bãng d kongrã, tõnd sũur sãamame tɩ d pĩis d gɛya. Yãnd tara tõnd tɩ d zut surẽ, bala, tõnd bi-bɩɩlem wakatẽ paoogrã ket n be d zugu." 
Jeremiah31:20 A Efrayiim yaa mam bi-nongre, Mam nonga yẽnda ne m sũur fãa. Mam sã n gomd a yelle, m ket n tagsda a yelle. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ rogem yĩn-sidg tar maam a yĩnga. Yaa sɩda, a nimbãaneg tara maam. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah31:21 Israyɛll nebã, ning-y y bãnã, lug-y y sor wilgdsã! Ges-y y sorã, Tags-y sor ning yãmb sẽn tũudã yelle. Israyɛll tẽn-neere, lebg n wa tẽn-kãensã sẽn yaa fo rẽndã pʋse!" 
Jeremiah31:22 Bi-tõtre, fo na n yeeba a woto tɩ ta dabʋre? Bala, bõn-paalg la Sẽn-Ka-Saab maan dũniyã zugu. Pag n baood rao a toore!" 
Jeremiah31:23 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: mam sã n wa lebs n maneg Israyɛll nebã yelle, ad b sẽn na n leb n gom goam nins Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋsẽ: Sɩyõ tãn-sõng sẽn yaa tɩrlem zĩiga, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ning fo zug barka!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Koaadbã ne rũm-gũudbã na n zĩnda Zʋʋda ne a tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ. 
Jeremiah31:25 Bala, mam kõta sẽn yɛ-bã koom tɩ b yũ, la m tɩgsda neb nins pãng sẽn sɛ wã." 
Jeremiah31:26 Dẽ zugẽ, mam nekame, la m gõeemã yɩ-m-la noogo." 
Jeremiah31:27 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n pids Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda tẽmsã ne neb la rũmsi."
