Jeremiah31:28 Mam sẽn dag n gũus bãmb n võ-b la m pãb-b n wã, la m sãam-b la m menes-bã, n kɩt tɩ toog paam-bã, woto me, mam na n gũus-b lame, n lebs n me-b la m sel-ba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah31:29 Wakat-kãnga, b ka na n leb n yeele: «Ba-rãmb dɩɩ reezẽ-kãse, tɩ kamb yẽn deeg n zãab» ye." 
Jeremiah31:30 Ned kam fãa na n ki a meng kongr yĩnga. Ned ning sẽn dɩ-a reezẽ-kãse, a meng yẽn n na n zãabe." 
Jeremiah31:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n maan kaool-paalg ne Israyɛll buudã, la ne Zʋʋda buudã." 
Jeremiah31:32 La ka na n yɩ wa kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne b ba-rãmbã, daar ning mam sẽn gãd bãmb nus n tall-b n yiis Ezɩpt tẽngã ye. Bãmb sãama kaool-kãngã, baa ne mam sẽn yaa bãmb Zu-soabã. Maam Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah31:33 La ad kaool ning mam sẽn na n maan ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn na n yɩ to-to da-kãens loogr poore: Ka na n leb n yɩ kug-wals zut la mam na n gʋls m tõodã ye. Mam na n ning-b-la bãmb pʋ-tẽerẽ, mam na n gʋls-b-la b sũyã pʋse. Mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, la bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah31:34 Tẽngã pʋgẽ, ned ba a yembr ka na n leb n zãms a to ye. Ned ka na n zãms a ba-biiga, n yeel-a t'a sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab noorã ye. Bala, b fãa na n saka maam, sẽn sɩng ne sẽn yaa-a bilf n yɩɩd bãmb sʋkã, tɩ ta sẽn yaa-a kãseng n yɩɩdã. Mam na n kõo bãmb sugr b kongrã yĩnga, mam ka na n leb n tẽeg b yel-wẽnã yell ye.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah31:35 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame: «Ãnda n kɩt tɩ wĩndgã beẽ, n kõt vẽenem wĩntoogo? Ãnda n kɩt tɩ kiuugã ne ãdsã vẽenem yãgd yʋngo? Ãnda n kɩt tɩ ko-kãsengã rãmbdẽ, t'a ko-wĩisã tãoosdẽ? Yaa soab ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã.»" 
Jeremiah31:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sã n wa sak tɩ tõ-kãensã mam sẽn vigl tɩ be wakat fãa wã ka leb n beẽ, Israyɛll nebã me kõn leb n yɩ mam buud wakat fãa ye.»" 
Jeremiah31:37 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B sã n tõog n mak yĩngrã n bãng a zãntlem, la b tõog n mak tẽn-gãongã n bãng a zulum, mam me na bas Israyɛll yagensã fãa, bũmb nins fãa b sẽn maanã yĩnga.» Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah31:38 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wakat n wate, tɩ nebã na n lebs n me Zeruzalɛm tẽngã Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, sẽn sɩng ne Hananeyɛll gãosgã n tãag rignoor ning sẽn be tẽngã lalg gõdrẽ wã." 
Jeremiah31:39 B na n sõoga tẽngã toadg n tãag Garɛɛb kũnkubgã, n wẽnemd n tees Gowate." 
Jeremiah31:40 Sẽn sɩng ne kũum ne maand tompeglem longã zãnga, ne zĩ-koodsã fãa n tall n tãag Sedrõ ko-soogã, ne tẽngã lalg gõdr sẽn be wiidã rignoorã sẽn be yaang sẽnẽ wã na n welga toor maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. B kõn tol n leb n võog wall b siig bũmb ba a yembr beenẽ ye." 
Jeremiah32:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi wakat ning Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piilẽ, la wakat ning a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn deeg naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ wã." 
Jeremiah32:2 Wakat-kãnga, Babilond dĩmã tãb-biis rag n kẽng n tɩ gũbga Zeruzalɛm, la rẽ tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas rag n kɩtame tɩ b yõk no-rɛɛs a Zeremi n pag rĩmã na-yiri, gũudbã zakẽ." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas yõka a Zeremi n page. Bala, rĩmã yeelame tɩ bõe yĩng t'a Zeremi togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ b na n basa tẽn-kãngã Babilond dĩmã nugẽ t'a soog-a." 
Jeremiah32:4 Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas kõn põs Kalde rãmbã ye. B na n basa yẽnda Babilond dĩma nugẽ. Yẽnda na n yalsa Babilond dĩmã taoore, t'a gom ne yẽnda neng ne nenga." 
Jeremiah32:5 Dẽ zugẽ, b na n talla a Sedesiyaas n kẽng Babilonde, t'a pa beenẽ n ta wakat ning mam sẽn na n wa ges a yelle. Yãmb sã n yik zabr ne Kalde rãmbã, y kõn tõog-b ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah32:6 La a Zeremi yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Jeremiah32:7 «Fo baaba-bil a Salum biig a Hananeyɛll na n wa yãnda foom n yeel tɩ f ra a pʋʋgã sẽn be Anatotã, tɩ foom bal n tar noor tɩ ra-a.»" 
Jeremiah32:8 Mam baaba-bilã biig a Hananeyɛll sɩd waa mam nengẽ, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeel maam gũudbã zakẽ wã, n yeel maam yaa: «Ra m pʋʋgã sẽn be Anatote, Benzame buudã tẽngẽ wã, bala, foom bal n tar noor tɩ ra-a. Dẽ yĩngã, m kot-f lame tɩ f ra-a tɩ yɩ f soolem.» Dẽ, mam bãngame tɩ rag n sɩd yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga." 
Jeremiah32:9 Dẽ, mam daa pʋʋgã sẽn be Anatotã ne a Anameyɛlle, n yao wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piig la a yopoe." 
Jeremiah32:10 Mam gʋlsa raab kaset sebre, n pag-a n ning m nug-tikr bãnd a zugu. Mam baoo neb tɩ b wa yɩ kaset dãmba, la m mak ligdã ne zɩslem makdga." 
Jeremiah32:11 Dẽ poore, mam dɩka raabã kaset sebrã m sẽn pag n ning m nug-tikr bãnd a zugu, tɩ noyã ne no-gãnegdɩ wã be a pʋgẽ wã, ne raabã kaset seb-yiibingã sẽn dag n ka pagã," 
Jeremiah32:12 n kɩs a Baruk sẽn yaa a Neriya biiga, n yaa a Maaseya yagengã. Ad neb nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã: yaa mam baaba-bilã biig a Anameyɛlle, ne kaset dãmbã sẽn dag n tik b nus raabã kaset sebr zugã, n paas Zʋʋda neb nins sẽn dag n be gũudbã zakẽ wã." 
Jeremiah32:13 Mam kõ a Baruk noor nin-bãmbã fãa taoor n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah32:14 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Reeg seb-kãensã sẽn yaa raabã kaset sebrã sẽn pagã, ne sebr ning sẽn pakã, n ning-b tãnd laok pʋgẽ, tɩ b tõe n kaoose." 
Jeremiah32:15 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: B na n leb n daa rot ne pʋto, la reezẽ tɩɩs pʋt tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Jeremiah32:16 Mam sẽn kɩs a Neriya biig a Baruk raabã kaset sebrã zugẽ, mam pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele:" 
Jeremiah32:17 «Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n tẽeg y nug n naan yĩngr la tẽng ne y pãn-kãsengã. Bũmb ka be yãmb sẽn ka tõe ye." 
Jeremiah32:18 Yãmb wilgda y nonglem hal n tãag zamaan tusri, la y sɩbgd kamb b ba-rãmb beegr yĩnga. Yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam-kãsenga, y yaa gãndaoogo. Y yʋʋr yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba!" 
Jeremiah32:19 Yãmb saagrã yaa kãsemse, la y tʋʋm-kãsemsã tara ra-sãnde. Yãmb puka y nin n get ninsaalbã fãa, la y ronda ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a yel-manesem, la wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã biisi." 
Jeremiah32:20 Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋga, yãmb maana bãn ne bõn-yɛɛsdse, la y ket n maand-b-la baa ne rũndã, Israyɛll pʋgẽ, ne ninsaalbã fãa sʋka, tɩ y yʋʋrã saag zĩigã fãa. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ ket n yaa a woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah32:21 Yãmb tẽega y nug n maan bãn ne bõn-yɛɛsdse, n yiis Israyɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã Ezɩpt ne y pãn-kãsengã, n kẽes nebã rabeem-kãsenga." 
Jeremiah32:22 Yãmb kõ-b-la tẽng ning y sẽn dag n wẽen tɩ y na n kõ b yaab-rãmbã. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne bĩisim la sɩɩdo. 
Jeremiah32:23 Bãmb kẽe tẽn-kãng n deeg-a n sooge, la b yaool n ka kelg yãmb koɛɛgã ye. Bãmb ka sak n tũ yãmb tõodã ye. B kɩɩsame n ka maan bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn dag n yeel-b tɩ b maanã ye. Yaa rẽ yĩng la y sẽn kɩt tɩ to-kãensã fãa paam-bã." 
Jeremiah32:24 B zamda tom-dʋy n na n deeg tẽngã. B na n basa tẽngã Kalde rãmbã sẽn zabd ne-a wã nugẽ. B na n tõog-a-la ne zabr sʋʋga, la ne kom la bã-longdse. Yãmb meng neeme tɩ y sẽn dag n gom bũmb ning yellã pidsg wakat taame." 
Jeremiah32:25 La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam tɩ m da pʋʋg ne ligdi, kaset dãmb taoore, baa ne tẽngã sẽn be Kalde rãmbã nugẽ wã!»" 
Jeremiah32:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa: 
Jeremiah32:27 «Ade, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa bõn-vɩɩsã fãa Wẽnnaam. Bũmb ka be sẽn yaa toog ne maam ye." 
Jeremiah32:28 Woto yĩnga, mam na n ninga tẽngã Kalde rãmbã ne Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nugẽ, t'a soog-a. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah32:29 Kalde rãmbã sẽn zabd ne tẽn-kãngã wã na n kẽ a pʋgẽ, n ning-a bugum. B na n yõo rot nins sẽn tar gãsd tɩ b rag n kɩɩsd maam n dʋʋd b zut n yõogd wisd a Baall yĩnga, la b kõt bu-zẽmsã wẽnnaam-dãmbã bõn-yũudl kũun b pʋsẽ wã.»" 
Jeremiah32:30 «Sɩd me, Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã maana sẽn yaa wẽng mam nifẽ bal hal b yãadem wakate. Israyɛll nebã yika mam sũurã ne b nusã tʋʋmã." 
Jeremiah32:31 Sẽn sɩng ne daar ning b sẽn me tẽn-kãngã wã tɩ ta rũndã, mam sũur yika ne tẽn-kãngã, a puuga mam sũuri. Yaa woto tɩ m ka leb n dat n yãnd-a m taoor ye." 
Jeremiah32:32 Wẽng ning fãa Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã sẽn maanã sãama mam sũuri, bãmb ne b rĩm-dãmbã, la b nanambsã, ne b maan-kʋʋdbã, la b no-rɛɛsdbã la Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bãmb ka wẽnemd n tees maam ye, b tuda maam b kãare. Mam ka yɛ ne bãmb zãmsg ye, la b yaool n kɩɩsa maam n ka sak m demsgã ye." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bãmb ninga b yel-beedã roog ning b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã pʋgẽ, n dẽgm-a." 
Jeremiah32:35 Bãmb mee maoong kʋʋb zĩis a Baall yĩnga, Bɛn-Hinom longã pʋga, n dɩkd b kom-pugli ne b kom-dibli n maand maand n kõt b wẽnnaam a Molɛke. Mam yaool n ka yeel-b tɩ b maan bũmb a woto ye. Bũmb a woto zɩ n wa mam tagsgẽ meng ye. Bãmb maana yel-beed a woto, n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda buudã lʋɩ kongr pʋga.»" 
Jeremiah32:36 Moasã, ad maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeta, tẽn-kãngã yãmb sẽn gomd a yell n yetẽ t'a na n paa Babilond dĩmã nugẽ, tɩ zabr sʋʋg ne kom la bã-longds sãam-a wã:" 
Jeremiah32:37 «Mam na n yiis-b-la tẽms nins mam sẽn dag n dig-b ne m sũ-yikrã la m sũ-puug-kãsengã tɩ b kẽngã, n wa tigim zĩ-kãngã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b zĩnd ne bãane." 
Jeremiah32:38 Bãmb na n leb n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah32:39 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b paam yam a yembre, la manesem a yembre, tɩ b tõe n zoe maam daar fãa, tɩ bãmb ne b kambã sẽn na n wa led bãmb zĩigẽ wã tõe n vɩɩmd vɩ-noogo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Mam na n maana kaool sẽn paad wakat fãa ne bãmba, la m kõn leb n wẽnemd n bas bãmb ye. Mam na n maan-b-la neere, la m na n kɩtame tɩ b zoe maam n da wa zãag ne maam ye." 
Jeremiah32:41 Mam na n maan-b-la neer ne sũ-noogo. Mam na n vigla bãmb tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ kãenkãe ne m sũur fãa la ne m yamã fãa.» 
Jeremiah32:42 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sẽn kɩt tɩ yel-be-kãseng a woto fãa paam nin-bãmbã wã, woto me, mam na n maan-b-la neer ning fãa mam sẽn dag n gom b wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Jeremiah32:43 Tẽn-kãngã yãmb sẽn yet t'a yaa zĩ-vɩʋʋg tɩ ned wall rũng ka leb n be beenẽ, la y yetẽ t'a na n paa Kalde rãmbã nugẽ wã, b na n daa pʋt a pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benzame buudã tẽngẽ, ne Zeruzalɛm tẽn-kɩremsã pʋse, la Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋse, ne tẽms nins sẽn be tãms sʋkã pʋse, la sẽn be-b kunkub sʋkã pʋse, ne sẽn be-b Negɛɛvã pʋse, b na n daada pʋt ne ligdi, la b gʋlsd raab kaset sɛb n pagdẽ, la b baood kaset dãmba. Bala, mam na n lebs n manega b yellã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah33:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Zeremi naoor a yiibẽ soaba, wakat ning b sẽn dag n ket n pag yẽnda gũudbã zakẽ wã n yeel-a yaa:" 
Jeremiah33:2 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn maand bõn-kãensã wã, n naand-b n kɩtdẽ tɩ b beẽ wã, soab ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Bool maam tɩ m na n leok-f lame. M na n togs-f-la bõn-kãsems sẽn na n maane, yel-solgds fo sẽn dag n ka tõe n bãnge." 
Jeremiah33:4 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã gomda tẽn-kãngã nebã roto, ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã yiy b sẽn sãam tɩ lebg tom-dʋy zabr yĩngã wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ:" 
Jeremiah33:5 ‹Kalde nebã sã n wa na n zab ne tẽn-kãngã, b na n pids-a-la ne neb nins mam sẽn na n kʋ m sũ-yikrã pʋgẽ wã kũum. Bala, mam solga m neng ne tẽn-kãngã nebã, b wẽngã fãa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah33:6 Mam na n yols-b lame, la m maag-ba, la m na n kõo bãmb vɩ-bãan ne yam-gãnega." 
Jeremiah33:7 Mam na n lebsa Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll nebã b zĩisẽ, tɩ b leb n yɩ wa pĩnda." 
Jeremiah33:8 Mam na n yɩlga bãmb ne yel-wẽn nins b sẽn maan n beeg maamã. Mam na n kõ-b-la sugri, yel-wẽn nins b sẽn maan n beeg maam la b kɩɩs maamã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah33:9 Dũniyã rãmb fãa sã n yãnd bõn-neeb nins mam sẽn maan n kõ tẽn-kãngã wã, b na n pẽga maam la b waoog maam tɩ m sũur yɩ noogo. B sã n yãnd bõn-neebã ne naar ning mam sẽn maan n kõ tẽngã, rabeem-kãseng na n yõka bãmb tɩ b rigi.› »" 
Jeremiah33:10 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb yetame tɩ zĩ-kãngã yaa vɩʋʋgo, tɩ ned wall rũng ka leb n be beenẽ ye. Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋse, ne Zeruzalɛm soayã sẽn yaa vɩɩdã zutu, b na n leb n wʋma" 
Jeremiah33:11 sũ-noog la kɩdeng yɩɩla, la pʋg-paal sɩdã ne pʋg-paalã sẽn yɩɩnd n yetẽ: ‹Pʋʋs-y Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã barka, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab pida ne sõmblem, la b nonglmã paada wakat sẽn ka sɛta! Bala, mam na n lebsa tẽn-kãngã nebã b zĩigẽ tɩ leb n yɩ wa pĩnda. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah33:12 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Zĩ-kãngã yaa vɩʋʋg tɩ ned wall rũng ka leb n be a pʋgẽ ye. La a tẽmsã fãa pʋse, pe-kɩɩmb na n paama zĩig n gʋʋl b piisi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tẽms nins sẽn be tãms sʋkã ne tẽms nins sẽn be kunkub zutã, la tẽms nins sẽn be Negɛɛv ne tẽms nins sẽn be Benzame yagensã tẽngẽ ne Zeruzalɛm la Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋse, b na n leb n sõta b piisi. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah33:14 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n maan bõn-neeb nins mam sẽn kãab Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã." 
Jeremiah33:15 Wakat-kãng sã n ta, mam na n kɩtame tɩ nin-sõng yi a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋka. Yẽnda na n kɩtame tɩ tɩrlem ne bʋ-kao-tɩrg zĩnd tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah33:16 Wakat-kãense, Zʋʋda nebã na n paama fãagre, la Zeruzalɛm nebã na n vɩɩmda ne bãane. B na n boola Zeruzalɛm tɩ «Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd tɩrlem.»" 
Jeremiah33:17 Bala Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: A Davɩɩd yagensã sʋka, b kõn tol n kong ned sẽn na n soog Israyɛll rĩungã ye." 
Jeremiah33:18 La Leevi buudã sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋdbã sʋka, b kõn kong neb sẽn na n maand maoong sẽn yõogd bugum ne bõn-koaadl kũuni, la maand a taab ye." 
Jeremiah33:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah33:20 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeta a woto: Ned sã n tõog n sãam kaool ning mam sẽn maan tɩ be wĩntoog ne yʋng sʋka, tɩ wĩntoog ne yʋng ka leb n beẽ," 
Jeremiah33:21 woto me, kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩdã na n sãamame. Yẽnda ka na n paam yageng sẽn na n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã ye. La a na n yɩɩ woto me ne Leevi nebã maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn maand mam tʋʋmdã." 
Jeremiah33:22 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yagensã ne Leevi buudã sẽn maand maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã lebg wʋsgo. Bãmb na n lebga wʋsg wa ãdsã sẽn be saasẽ tɩ ned ka tõe n bãng b sõorã, la wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã." 
Jeremiah33:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah33:24 Fo ka wʋmd bũmb nins nin-kãensã sẽn yeta la? Bãmb yetame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãgsa buud a yiib nins b sẽn dag n yãkã. Yaa woto n kɩte, tɩ b paoogd mam nebã, n yetẽ tɩ bãmb ka leb n yaa soolem yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah33:25 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yaa maam n maan kaool wĩntoog ne yʋng sʋka, la m vigl tõod nins sẽn be saasẽ la tẽngã." 
Jeremiah33:26 Woto yĩnga, mam ka tõe n zãgs a Zakoob ne m tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd yagensã, n ka yãk a Davɩɩd yagensã sʋk neb nins sẽn na n soog a Abrahaam ne a Izak la Zakoob yagensã ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b lebg n wa b tẽngẽ, bala mam zoeta b nimbãanega." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar ne a tãb-biisã fãa la soolem nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n so wã, la nebã fãa rag n yika zabr ne Zeruzalɛm la a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa. Yaa wakat-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab gom ne a Zeremi n yeel-a yaa:" 
Jeremiah34:2 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Kẽng Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: Mam na n dɩka tẽn-kãngã n ning Babilond dĩmã nugẽ, t'a sãam-a ne bugum." 
Jeremiah34:3 La fo ka na n tõog n põs yẽnda ye. B na n yõka foom n kõ-a. Foom ne Babilond dĩmã na n yãnda taab neng ne nenga. Yẽnda na n goma ne foom, la fo na n kẽnga Babilonde." 
Jeremiah34:4 La bɩ f kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet foom a Sedesiyaas sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã!› Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet fo wɛɛngẽ: ‹Fo ka na n pa tãpẽ ye. 
Jeremiah34:5 Fo na n kii ne bãane.› La b na n maana foom wa b sẽn dag n maan fo yaab-rãmbã sẽn yaa rĩm-dãmb nins sẽn zĩnd sẽn deng foomã. B na n yõoga wisd sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la b wiis n yeele: ‹Kayto, tõnd dĩmã konga pãnga! Bala, yaa maam n gom gom-kãngã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah34:6 No-rɛɛs a Zeremi togsa Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas gom-kãensã fãa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã pʋga. 
Jeremiah34:7 La wakat-kãng tɩ Babilond dĩmã tãb-biisã rag n yika zabr ne Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda tẽms a taabã, la Lakɩɩs ne Azeka, bala Zʋʋda tẽms nins fãa sẽn dag n ketã sʋka, rag n yaa tẽn-bãmb n dag n gũbg ne lalse." 
Jeremiah34:8 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas sẽn maan kaool ne Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa n moon n yeel-b tɩ yembsã paama lohormã zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Zeremi." 
Jeremiah34:9 Ned fãa rag n tog n basa a yem-daadã ne a yem-pogs nins fãa sẽn yaa Ebre nebã. Ned ba a yembr ka tog n leb n dɩk Zʋɩf n maan a yamb yɛs ye. Yaa a saam-biiga. 
Jeremiah34:10 Dẽ, Zeruzalɛm nanambsã fãa ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n maan kaoolã sakame n kõ b yem-daadã ne b yem-pogsã lohorem, n ka leb n dɩk-b n maan yembs ye. B sakame n bas-b tɩ b looge." 
Jeremiah34:11 La rẽ zugẽ, bãmb lebsa b noorã poorẽ, n leb n tall yem-daadã ne yem-pogsã b sẽn dag n kõ lohormã n wa." 
Jeremiah34:12 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah34:13 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam maana kaool ne yãmb yaab-rãmbã daar ning mam sẽn yiis bãmb yembdã pʋg Ezɩpt tẽngã, n yeel-b yaa:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Yʋʋm a yopoe zugẽ, yãmb ned kam fãa na n basa Ebre ned sẽn yaa a saam-biig sẽn koos a meng ne-yã. A na n tʋm n kõo foom yʋʋm a yoobe, la rẽ zugẽ, bɩ f bas-a t'a looge.› La yãmb yaab-rãmbã ka kelg maam ye. Bãmb ka sak n maan bũmb nins mam sẽn yeelã ye." 
Jeremiah34:15 Rũndã yãmb dag n teka yam, n maan sẽn tat mam yam: Yãmb ned kam fãa mooname n yeel t'a sakame n na n kõ a yembs lohorem. Yãmb maana kaool mam taoore, roog ning b sẽn boond mam yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah34:16 La yãmb lebsa y noor poorẽ, n leb n bool yem-daadã ne yem-pogsã y sẽn dag n kõ lohorem n bas-b tɩ b loogã, la y modg-b tɩ b lebg n yaa yãmb yembse." 
Jeremiah34:17 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb ned kam fãa rag n tog n kõ a yamb lohorem, t'a yaa y saam-biiga, la yãmb ka kelg maam ye.› Woto yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n basame tɩ zabr sʋʋg ne bã-longds la kom kʋ yãmba, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa sã n yãnd yãmba, bɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-ba." 
Jeremiah34:18 Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nanambsã, la zu-soben-dãmba ne maan-kʋʋdbã ne tẽngã nebã fãa rag n maana kaool ne maam, n pasg maoongã nag-bil n tũ a boag a yiibã sʋka. La nin-bãmb kɩɩsa kaoolã b sẽ maan mam taoorã, n ka maan bũmb ning b sẽn pʋlmã ye. Woto yĩnga, mam na n maana bãmb wa nag-bilã b sẽn pasgã." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Mam na n bas-b-la b bɛɛbã sẽn baood n kʋ bãmbã nugẽ, la bãmb na n yɩɩ yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ ne we-rũms rɩɩbo." 
Jeremiah34:21 Mam na n basa Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a nanambsã b bɛɛbã sẽn dat n kʋ bãmbã nugẽ. Mam na n basa bãmb Babilond tãb-biisã sẽn zoe n zãag ne yãmbã nugẽ. 
Jeremiah34:22 Mam na n kõo noor tɩ b lebg n wa tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, n zab n deeg-a, n ning-a bugum. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda tẽmsã lebg raboogo, tɩ ned ka leb n zĩnd beenẽ yɛs ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah35:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi wakat ning a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn dag n dɩt naam Zʋʋda wã n yeel-a yaa: 
Jeremiah35:2 Kẽng a Rekaab yagensã nengẽ n tɩ gom ne-ba. Tall-b n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ro-pʋg a yembr pʋgẽ, n kõ-b reezẽ rãam." 
Jeremiah35:3 Dẽ, mam tɩ peega a Habatsiniya biig a Zeremi biig a Yazaniya, ne a saam-biisã, la a kom-dibli wã fãa, n paas a Rekaab yagensã fãa," 
Jeremiah35:4 n tall-b n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, roog ning b sẽn kõ a Igdaliya sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam daoã biig a Hanan kambã. Ro-kãng pẽe nanambsã roogo, la a be a Salum biig a Maaseya sẽn yaa rigno-gũudã zugu." 
Jeremiah35:5 Mam dɩgla wũmbli sẽn pid ne reezẽ rãam a Rekaab yagensã taoore, ne wama, la m yeel-b yaa: Yũ-y reezẽ rãam!" 
Jeremiah35:6 La bãmb leokame yaa: Tõnd ka na n yũ reezẽ rãam ye, bala a Rekaab biig a Yonadaab sẽn yaa tõnd yaabã yeela tõnd yaa: ‹Bɩ yãmb ne y kambã ra tol n yũ reezẽ rãam ye." 
Jeremiah35:7 Bɩ yãmb da me roto, wall y bʋd bõn-buudu, wall y sel reezẽ tɩɩse, wall y tall reezẽ tɩɩs me ye. Yãmb vɩɩmã tɛka, y na n zĩnda fu-rot pʋse. Woto, yãmb na n vɩɩmd n kaoosa tẽn-kãngã yãmb sẽn yaa sãamb a pʋgẽ wã." 
Jeremiah35:8 Tõnd saka bũmb nins fãa tõnd yaab a Yonadaab sẽn dag n yeel tõndã. Dẽ wã, tõnd mensã wall d pagbã ne d kom-dibli wã la d kom-pugli wã ka na n tol n yũ reezẽ rãam abada." 
Jeremiah35:9 Tõnd ka met rot n kẽedẽ, d leb n ka tar reezẽ tɩɩs d sẽn kood me ye." 
Jeremiah35:10 Tõnd gãee fu-rot pʋse. Tõnd sakda bũmb nins fãa tõnd yaab a Yonadaab sẽn yeel tõndã, n ka kɩɩsd ba a yembr ye." 
Jeremiah35:11 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn wa n yãmb tẽn-kãngã wã, tõnd yãka yam n na n zoe n kẽng Zeruzalɛm, sẽn na yɩl n põs Babilond ne Siiri tãb-biisã! Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ tõnd be Zeruzalɛm." 
Jeremiah35:12 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi yaa:" 
Jeremiah35:13 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Kẽng n tɩ yeel Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb ka sakd mam demsgã, la y ka kelgd mam goamã?»" 
Jeremiah35:14 A Rekaab biig a Yonadaab yeela a yagensã tɩ b ra yũ reezẽ rãam ye. Sɩd me, hal tɩ ta rũndã, bãmb saka b yaabã noore, n ka yũud reezẽ rãam ye. La mam meng yaool n goma ne yãmb n ka tol n bas ye, la yãmb ka kelg maam ye." 
Jeremiah35:15 Mam tʋma m tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa m no-rɛɛsdbã fãa yãmb nengẽ, tɩ b wa yeel yãmba, tɩ m kotame tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa wẽnemd n bas a manesem-wẽngã, la a maan sẽn zemse. B yeela yãmb tɩ y bas bu-zẽmsã wẽnnaam-dãmb waoogre, tɩ yãmb tõe n pa tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ. La yãmb ka sak n kelg maam ye." 
Jeremiah35:16 A Rekaab biig a Yonadaab sakda noor ning b yaabã sẽn kõ bãmbã, la nin-bãmbã ka kelgd maam ye!" 
Jeremiah35:17 Woto yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog ning mam sẽn dag n yeel t'a na n paama Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa wã paam-ba, mam sẽn gom ne bãmb tɩ b ka kelgã yĩnga, la m sẽn bool bãmb tɩ b ka sakã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah35:18 Dẽ, a Zeremi yeela a Rekaab yagensã yaa: «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Yãmb sẽn sak y yaab a Yonadaab noore, n maan bũmb nins fãa a sẽn yeel yãmbã yĩnga,›" 
Jeremiah35:19 maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Ned kõn tol n kong a Rekaab biig a Yonadaab yagensã sʋk sẽn na n yals mam taoor ye.› » 
Jeremiah36:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn deeg naamã tɩ yʋʋm-naaslẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi n yeele:" 
Jeremiah36:2 «Rɩk seb-pindg n gʋls goam nins fãa mam sẽn togs foom Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda la bu-zẽmsã wɛɛngẽ, sẽn sɩng ne a Zoziyaas zamaanã, daar ning mam sẽn gom ne foomã, hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah36:3 Daarninga, Zʋʋda buudã na n bãnga toog ning mam sẽn segend b yĩngã, tɩ bãmb ned kam fãa tõe n wẽnemd n bas a manesem-wẽngã. Woto, mam na n kõ-b-la sugr b kongrã ne b yel-wẽnã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah36:4 A Zeremi boola a Neriya biig a Baruki, n kɩt t'a gʋls goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs yẽnda wã, la a Baruk gʋls-b-la seb-pindg pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah36:5 Dẽ poore, a Zeremi yeela a Neriya biig a Baruk yaa: «B sẽn pag maam tɩ m ka tõe n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã yĩnga," 
Jeremiah36:6 bɩ fo meng kẽng n tɩ karem Sẽn-Ka-Saab goam nins mam sẽn kɩt tɩ fo gʋls seb-pindgã pʋgẽ wã. Karem-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋg no-loeer daare, tɩ nebã kelge, la f karem-b tɩ neb nins sẽn na n yi Zʋʋda tẽms toor-toor n wa wã me kelge." 
Jeremiah36:7 Daarninga, b se-yõkrã na n taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, la b na n basa b manesem-wẽnsã. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã ne b sũ-puugrã yaa kãseng nin-kãensã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah36:8 A Neriya biig a Baruk kell n maana wa no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. Yẽnda karma Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋga. 
Jeremiah36:9 Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm-nuunẽ, yʋʋmdã kiuug a wɛ soabã pʋgẽ, b mooname n yeele, tɩ Zeruzalɛm nebã fãa ne neb nins fãa sẽn yi Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋgẽ n kẽng Zeruzalɛmã maan no-loeer Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Jeremiah36:10 La a Baruk karma a Zeremi goam nins sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ wã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ rigno-paallã pʋgẽ, tɩ nebã wʋme. Yẽnda karma sebrã seb-gʋlsd a Gemariya sẽn yaa a Safan biigã roogã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab zakã rignoorẽ wã pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah36:11 A Safan biig a Gemariya biig a Miise sẽn wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab goam nins sẽn be sebrã pʋgẽ wã," 
Jeremiah36:12 yẽnda sigame n kẽng seb-gʋlsdã roog sẽn be rĩmã zakẽ wã, n tɩ mik tɩ nanambsã fãa bee be: yaa seb-gʋlsd a Elisama ne a Semaya biig a Delaya, la a Akoor biig a Ɛlnatan, ne a Safan biig a Gemariya, la a Hananiya biig a Sedesiyaase, ne nanambs a taabã fãa." 
Jeremiah36:13 A Miise rɩka goam nins fãa a Baruk sẽn wa n karemd sebrã pʋgẽ tɩ yẽnda kelgdẽ wã, n tɩ togs nebã." 
Jeremiah36:14 Dẽ, nanambsã fãa tʋma a Kuusi biig a Selemiya biig a Netaniya biig a Yehuudi t'a tɩ yeel a Baruk t'a tall sebr ning yẽnda sẽn dag n karem tɩ nebã kelgã n wa. La a Neriya biig a Baruk rɩka seb-pindgã n tall n kẽng bãmb nengẽ." 
Jeremiah36:15 Bãmb yeelame t'a karem sebrã tɩ b kelge. La yẽnda karmame tɩ b kelge. 
Jeremiah36:16 Bãmb sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã fãa wã, bãmb yɛɛsame n ges taab n yeel a Baruk yaa: «Yaa tɩlɛ ne tõnd tɩ d wilg rĩmã gom-kãensã fãa.»" 
Jeremiah36:17 Bãmb soka a Baruk yaa: «Tõnd kotame tɩ f togs tõnd fo sẽn maan to-to n gʋls gom-kãensã fãa wã. Yaa a Zeremi n togs foom tɩ f gʋls la? 
Jeremiah36:18 A Baruk yeelame: Yaa a Zeremi n togs maam gom-kãensã fãa tɩ m gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah36:19 La nanambsã yeela a Baruk tɩ yẽnda ne a Zeremi kẽng n tɩ soonde, la b ra sak tɩ ned bãng b sẽn soond zĩig ningã ye.»" 
Jeremiah36:20 Dẽ poore, nanambsã basa sebrã seb-gʋlsd a Elisama roogẽ wã, la b kẽng na-zakẽ wã rĩmã nengẽ, n tɩ rɩk goamã fãa n togs rĩmã." 
Jeremiah36:21 Rĩmã tʋma a Yehuudi t'a tɩ rɩk sebrã n wa. La a Yehuudi tɩ rɩka sebrã seb-gʋlsd a Elisama roogẽ wã, n kẽng n tɩ karem tɩ rĩmã ne nanambs nins sẽn yas ne rĩmã wʋme." 
Jeremiah36:22 Yaa yʋʋmdã kiuug a wɛ soabã pʋgẽ, rag n yaa waood wẽnde. La rĩmã rag n tugla bugum n wootẽ." 
Jeremiah36:23 La a Yehuudi sã n karem gʋlsmã ruls a tãab bɩ a naase, rĩmã rɩkda a sʋʋg n wãag a sẽn karem zĩig ningã, n los bugmã pʋgẽ. Yẽnda maana a woto hal tɩ sebrã rɩ bugum zãnga." 
Jeremiah36:24 La baoosgo, rĩmã ne a tʋmtʋmdb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã sẽn wʋm gom-kãensa wã, b ka yɛɛs wall b pãrs b fut ye." 
Jeremiah36:25 La ba a Ɛlnatan ne a Delaya la a Gemariya sẽn gɩdg t'a ra yõog sebrã bugmã, yẽnda ka kelg bãmb ye." 
Jeremiah36:26 La rĩmã kõ a biig a Yerakmeyɛll ne a Azriyɛll biig a Seraya, la a Abdiyɛll biig a Selemiya noore, tɩ b yõk seb-gʋlsd a Baruk ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab solg-b lame." 
Jeremiah36:27 Rĩmã sẽn yõog sebr ning sẽn tar a Zeremi goam nins a Baruk sẽn gʋlsã zugẽ," 
Jeremiah36:28 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi t'a rɩk sebr a to n gʋls goam nins fãa sẽn dag n be pipi sebrã pʋgẽ tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim yõog bugmã. 
Jeremiah36:29 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi t'a tɩ yeel dĩm a Yoyakim yaa: «Foom n yõog sebrã bugum, n yaool n sokd a Zeremi tɩ yaa bõe t'a gʋls n yeel tɩ Babilond dĩmã na n sãama tẽn-kãngã, n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã." 
Jeremiah36:30 Woto yĩnga, mam yeelame tɩ Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim biig bɩ a yageng ka na n deeg a Davɩɩd naamã ye. Yẽnda sã n ki, b na n dɩgla a kũumã wĩndgẽ tɩ wĩntoog wʋm-a, la b bas a yĩngã yʋng tɩ waoodã wʋm-a." 
Jeremiah36:31 Mam na n sɩbga yẽnda ne a yagensã la a tʋmtʋmdbã b kongrã yĩnga, n kɩt tɩ tood nins fãa mam sẽn dag n togs Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã paam-ba, bãmb sẽn ka kelgã yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah36:32 Dẽ, a Zeremi rɩka seb-pindg a to n kõ seb-gʋlsd a Baruk sẽn yaa a Neriya biigã, n yeel-a t'a gʋls goam nins fãa sẽn dag n be sebr ning Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim sẽn yõog bugmã pʋgã. Goam wʋsg sẽn wẽnd gom-bãmbã buud a taab la b paas sebrã pʋga." 
Jeremiah37:1 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar rɩka Zʋʋda rĩungã n kõ a Zoziyaas biig a Sedesiyaase, t'a led a Yoyakim biig a Koniya zĩigẽ." 
Jeremiah37:2 A Sedesiyaas ne a tʋmtʋmdbã la tẽngã nebã ned ba a ye ka sak n deeg goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi wã ye. 
Jeremiah37:3 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas tʋma a Selemiya biig a Yukall ne maan-kʋʋd a Maaseya biig a Sofoni, tɩ b tɩ kos Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi t'a pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã bãmb yĩnga." 
Jeremiah37:4 Wakat-kãng t'a Zeremi rag n ket n bee nebã sʋka, n tar lohorem tɩ kẽng a sẽn datẽ, bala, b rag n nan ka kẽes-a roog ye." 
Jeremiah37:5 A Faarõ tãb-biisã yii Ezɩpte, la Kalde nebã sẽn dag n gũbg Zeruzalɛm n dat n zab ne-a wã sẽn wʋm kiba-kãnga, b loogame." 
Jeremiah37:6 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yaa:" 
Jeremiah37:7 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Kẽng-y n tɩ yeel-y Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y wa sok maamã yaa: Ade, a Faarõ tãb-biisã sẽn wat n na n sõng yãmbã lebg n kuiisa Ezɩpte." 
Jeremiah37:8 La Kalde nebã na n lebg n waame n wa zab ne tẽn-kãngã n tõog-a n ning-a bugum.» 
Jeremiah37:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Da belg-y y mense, n tagsdẽ tɩ Kalde nebã loogame n ka na n leb n wa yãmb nengẽ ye! Bãmb ka na n zãag ye." 
Jeremiah37:10 Bala, baa yãmb sã n dag n tõogẽ Kalde tãb-biisã sẽn zabd ne yãmbã fãa, baa sã n dag n yaa sãmpoagb bal n kelle, bãmb ned kam fãa na n yik n yi a fu-roogẽ n ning tẽn-kãngã bugum.»" 
Jeremiah37:11 Wakat ning Kalde tãb-biisã sẽn loog n bas Zeruzalɛm, Faarõ tãb-biisã sẽn dag n watã yĩnga," 
Jeremiah37:12 a Zeremi rag n baood n yii Zeruzalɛm n kẽng Benzame nebã tẽngẽ n tɩ zĩnd be, sẽn na yɩl n paam dogem pʋɩɩr a buudã sʋka." 
Jeremiah37:13 A Zeremi sẽn ta rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Benzame nebã rignoorã, a Hananiya biig a Selemiya biig a Yiriya sẽn yaa gũudbã naabã rag n yasa beenẽ. Yẽnda yõka no-rɛɛs a Zeremi n yeele: Fo rat n kẽe Kalde nebã." 
Jeremiah37:14 La a Zeremi yeelame: «Ka sɩd ye. Mam ka rat n kẽ Kalde nebã ye.» La a Yiriya ka kelg a Zeremi ye. Yẽnda yõka a Zeremi n tall n kẽng nanambsã nengẽ. 
Jeremiah37:15 Nanambsã sũy yika ne a Zeremi tɩ b pãb-a n kẽes seb-gʋlsd a Zonatã roogẽ wã. Bala, b rag n deega ro-kãng n maan bi-bees roogo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yɩɩ woto tɩ b kẽes a Zeremi bul-koɛɛng pʋgẽ t'a zĩnd be rasem wʋsgo. 
Jeremiah37:17 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas tʋmame tɩ b tɩ tall a Zeremi n wa, la yẽnda sẽn ta rĩmã nengẽ, rĩmã soos n soka yẽnda yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo foom koɛɛg tɩ f togs maam bɩ?» La a Zeremi leokame tɩ n-yẽe, la a yeele: «B na n basa yãmb Babilond dĩmã nugẽ.»" 
Jeremiah37:18 A Zeremi leb n yeela rĩm a Sedesiyaas yaa: «Bõe beegr la m beeg yãmb ne y tʋmtʋmdbã la y nebã tɩ y kẽesd-m doogo? 
Jeremiah37:19 La y no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn dag n togsd yãmb pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yetẽ tɩ Babilond dĩmã ka na n leb n wa zab ne yãmb ne tẽn-kãngã nebã bee yɛɛnẽ? 
Jeremiah37:20 M dĩm la m soaala, m kotame tɩ y kelg maam moasã, n deeg m se-yõkrã. Ra kɩt-y tɩ b leb n tall maam n tɩ kẽes seb-gʋlsd a Zonatã roogẽ wã, tɩ m wa pa be n ki ye!»" 
Jeremiah37:21 Dẽ, rĩm a Sedesiyaas kõo noor n yeel tɩ b tɩ pag a Zeremi gũudbã zakẽ, n kɩt tɩ b raad bur-gilg a yembr daar fãa bur-wẽedbã nengẽ n wat n kõt-a, hal tɩ burã sẽn be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã fãa wa sɛ. Woto, a Zeremi paa gũudbã zakẽ." 
Jeremiah38:1 A Matan biig a Sefatiya ne a Pasewʋʋr biig a Gedaliya, la a Selemiya biig a Yukalle, ne a Pasewʋʋr biig a Malkiya wʋma goam nins a Zeremi sẽn togs nebã fãa wã. Yẽnda rag n yetame:" 
Jeremiah38:2 «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ zabre, kom la bã-longds n na n kʋ neb nins sẽn na n pa tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã. La ned ning fãa sẽn na n yi n kẽng Kalde nebã nengẽ ka na n ki ye. A na n vɩɩmdame.»" 
Jeremiah38:3 A Zeremi leb n yeela nebã tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n basa tẽn-kãngã Babilond dĩmã tãb-biis nugẽ, la a na n deeg-a lame n sooge.»" 
Jeremiah38:4 Dẽ poore, nanambsã yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Kɩt-y tɩ b kʋ rao-kãngã! Bala, yaa yẽnda n boogd tãb-biis nins sẽn ket tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã ne neb a taabã raood ne gom-kãensã. Yẽnda ka rat nebã ne neer ye. A sẽn baood yaa tɩ yel-beed paam-ba.»" 
Jeremiah38:5 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas leoka bãmb yaa: «Yẽnda la woto, a bee yãmb nugẽ. Maam a rĩmã ka tõe n gɩdg yãmb ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:6 Dẽ, nanambsã yõka a Zeremi, n bao wĩy n sik-a rĩmã biig a Malkiya bulgã sẽn be gũudbã zakẽ wã pʋga. La bulgã rag n ka tar koom ye, yaa begd bala. Dẽ, a Zeremi suda begdã pʋga." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kuus ned a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk sẽn yaa na-yirã sõgena wʋmame tɩ b loba a Zeremi bulg pʋgẽ. La wakat-kãng tɩ rĩmã rag n zĩi tẽngã rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Benzame nebã rignoorã. 
Jeremiah38:8 La a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk yii na-yirã n kẽng n tɩ yeel dĩmã yaa: 
Jeremiah38:9 «M dĩma, la m soaala, bũmb nins fãa nin-bãmbã sẽn maan Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi wã yaa wẽnga. Bãmb yõk-a lame n tɩ lob bulgã pʋgẽ. La rɩɩb sẽn ka leb n be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, a na n kii kom.»" 
Jeremiah38:10 Dẽ, rĩmã kõo Kuus rao a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk noor n yeel-a yaa: «Yãk neb pis-tã kaanẽ tɩ b tɩ sõng-f n yiis Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi bulgẽ wã t'a ra wa ki ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:11 Dẽ, a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk yãka nebã n kẽng na-yirã laog bĩngr doogã tẽngre, n vaees n yãk fu-kʋda, n naag ne wĩy n sik a Zeremi nengẽ bulgã pʋga." 
Jeremiah38:12 Kuus rao a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk yeela a Zeremi yaa: «M kotame tɩ f ning fu-kʋd-kãensã f bãg-peedẽ wã, n yaool n dɩk wĩ-kãensã n gaage.» La a Zeremi maana a woto." 
Jeremiah38:13 Dẽ, bãmb taka a Zeremi ne wĩyã n yiis bulgẽ wã. A Zeremi kell n paa gũudbã zakẽ." 
Jeremiah38:14 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas kɩtame tɩ b tɩ tall Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi n wa yẽnda nengẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoor a tãabẽ soabã noore. La rĩmã yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Zeremi, mam dat n soka foom bũmbu. Ra sak n solg maam bũmb ba a yembr ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:15 Dẽ, a Zeremi soka rĩm a Sedesiyaas yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam sã n togs yãmb sɩda, y ka na n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ma? Mam sã n sagl-yã, y ka na n deeg ye!»" 
Jeremiah38:16 La rĩm a Sedesiyaas soos n wẽena ne a Zeremi n yeel-a yaa: «Mam wẽenda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋre, sẽn naan-a tõndã, tɩ m ka na n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-fo, wall m bas-f nin-kãensã sẽn dat n kʋ foomã nugẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:17 Dẽ, a Zeremi yeela rĩm a Sedesiyaas yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Yãmb sã n yi n dɩk y meng n kõ Babilond dĩmã nanambse, y na n fãaga y mense, la b ka na n sãam tẽn-kãngã ne bugum me ye. Yãmb ne y buudã na n kell n vɩɩmdame." 
Jeremiah38:18 La yãmb sã n ka sak n yi n dɩk y meng n kõ Babilond dĩmã nanambse, Kalde rãmbã na n tõoga tẽn-kãngã n ning-a bugum, la yãmb ka na n põs ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:19 Rĩm a Sedesiyaas yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Zʋʋda nebã sẽn dɩk b mens n kõ Kalde rãmbã rabeem tara maam. Mam zoeta b na n wa rɩk maam n bas Zʋʋda nebã nugẽ tɩ b nams-ma.» 
Jeremiah38:20 La a Zeremi leokame: «B ka na n bas yãmb bãmb nugẽ ye. M kot-y lame tɩ y kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel maam tɩ m togs-y koɛɛg ningã. Woto, bũmb kõn maan yãmba, la y na n vɩɩmdame." 
Jeremiah38:21 La yãmb sã n zãgs tɩ y kõn yi, ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vẽneg maam:" 
Jeremiah38:22 ‹Ade, b na n talla pagb nins fãa sẽn pa Zʋʋda rĩmã na-yirã n tɩ kõ Babilond dĩmã nanambse, la pagbã na n yeelame: Yãmb zo-rãmbã belga yãmb n tõoge. La yãmb naoã sẽn wa n sud begdã pʋgẽ wã, bãmb targ n leba poorẽ.›" 
Jeremiah38:23 B na n talla y pagbã ne y kambã fãa n tɩ kõ Kalde nebã, la yãmb ka na n põs bãmb ye. Babilond dĩmã na n yõka yãmba, la a ning tẽn-kãngã bugum.»" 
Jeremiah38:24 A Sedesiyaas yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Ra saag tɩ ned wʋm gom-kãensã ye. Woto, f ka na n ki ye." 
Jeremiah38:25 Nanambsã sã n wʋm tɩ mam goma ne foom, n wa fo nengẽ n wa yeel foom tɩ b kotame tɩ f rɩk goam nins mam sẽn yeel foomã, ne bũmb nins fo sẽn togs maamã n togs-ba, n da solg bũmb ba a yembre, tɩ ka rẽ b na n kʋʋ foom," 
Jeremiah38:26 bɩ f leok-b yaa: «Mam wa n yõka rĩmã sɛɛga, n yeel-a t'a kɩt tɩ b ra leb n kẽes maam a Zonatã roogẽ wã tɩ m wa pa be n ki ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:27 Nanambsã fãa kẽnga a Zeremi nengẽ n tɩ sok-a, la a Zeremi leoka bãmb wa rĩmã sẽn dag n yeel yẽnda wã. La bãmb basa yẽnda laafɩ, bala, gomdã ka yi tɩ ned wʋm ye." 
Jeremiah38:28 A Zeremi kell n paa gũudbã zakẽ hal tɩ ta daar ning Babilond nebã sẽn wa n zab ne Zeruzalɛm n tõogã. La b sẽn tõog Zeruzalɛmã zugẽ. 
Jeremiah39:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-wɛɛlẽ, yʋʋmdã kiuug piig soabã pʋgẽ, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar waa Zeruzalɛm ne a tãb-biisã fãa, n gũbg-a n na n zab ne-a." 
Jeremiah39:2 La a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembrẽ, yʋʋmdã kiuug a naasẽ soabã rasem a wɛ daare, Babilond nebã pooga tẽngã lalga." 
Jeremiah39:3 Dẽ, Babilond dĩmã nanambsã kẽngame n tɩ zĩnd tẽngã rignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ tẽn-sʋk rignoorã. Yaa a Nergall-Saretsɛɛr ne a Samgaar-Nebu, la sõgen-kãseng a Sarsekim ne tãb-biisã na-kãseng a Nergall-Saretsɛɛre, ne Babilond dĩmã nanambs a taabã fãa." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a tãb-biisã fãa sẽn yã bãmba, b yii tẽngã rignoor ning sẽn be lals a yiib sʋk rĩmã zẽed zĩigẽ wã ne yʋng n zoe n kẽng Araba sẽnẽ." 
Jeremiah39:5 La Kalde tãb-biisã riga bãmb n tɩ yõk a Sedesiyaas Zeriko tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ wã n tall n kẽng Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nengẽ Ribla sẽn be Hamat tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, t'a bʋ a bʋʋdo." 
Jeremiah39:6 Babilond dĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kood a Sedesiyaas kambã a nifẽ Ribla, la a kɩt tɩ b kood Zʋʋda nin-kãsemsã fãa me," 
Jeremiah39:7 n yaool n kɩt tɩ b kɩɩd a Sedesiyaas ninã, la b sẽb-a ne zũud bãens n tall-a n kẽng Babilonde." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kalde nebã ninga na-yirã ne nebã rot bugum, la b lub lals nins sẽn gũbg Zeruzalɛmã." 
Jeremiah39:9 La gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan peega neb nins sẽn pa tẽngã pʋgẽ wã ne neb nins sẽn dag n yi n dɩk b mens n kõ Babilond dĩmã, la neb a taabã sẽn ketã n kɩt tɩ b tall-b n kẽng Babilonde." 
Jeremiah39:10 La badaare, gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan basa naong rãmbã sẽn ka tar baa fɩ wã tɩ b pa Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋgẽ, la a kõo bãmb reezẽ tɩɩs ne pʋto." 
Jeremiah39:11 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kõo gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan noor sẽn kẽed ne a Zeremi wɛɛngẽ n yeele: 
Jeremiah39:12 «Peeg-a n tɩ ges a yell neere, la f ra sak n maan-a wẽng ye. Maan a sẽn dat bũmb ninsã n kõ-a.»" 
Jeremiah39:13 La gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan ne sõgen-kãseng a Nebusasban la tãb-biisã na-kãseng a Nergall-Saretsɛɛre, ne Babilond dĩmã nanambsã fãa" 
Jeremiah39:14 tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yiis a Zeremi gũudbã zakẽ n tall-a n wa kɩs a Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya t'a yãag-a t'a kuili. Dẽ, a Zeremi zĩnda nebã sʋka." 
Jeremiah39:15 Wakat ning a Zeremi sẽn wa n be gũudbã zakẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa:" 
Jeremiah39:16 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel Kuus rao a Ebɛɛd-Melɛk tɩ maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bũmb ning mam sẽn dag n yeel tẽn-kãngã wɛɛngẽ wã paam pidsgu, la ka na n yɩ a manegr yĩng ye, na n yɩ a sãoong yĩnga.› La daar ning sẽn yaa bõn-kãng pidsgã daarã na n yɩɩ fo nifẽ." 
Jeremiah39:17 La badaare, mam na n fãaga foom n ka bas tɩ f lʋɩ neb nins sẽn kẽesd foom dabeemã nugẽ ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah39:18 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f põse, la f ka na n ki ne zabr sʋʋg ye. Fo na n vɩɩmdame, fo sẽn teeg maamã yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah40:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi gũudb a naab a Nebuzaradan sẽn wa n kɩt tɩ b yiis-a Rama wã zugẽ. B sẽn wa n yiisd a Zeremi wã, rẽ tɩ b rag n balg-a-la ne bãense, n naag-a ne neb a taabã b sẽn yõg Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda n tar n dabd yembd Babilondã." 
Jeremiah40:2 Gũudbã naabã kɩtame tɩ b tall a Zeremi n wa t'a yeel-a yaa: Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã rag n yeelame tɩ toog n na n paam tẽn-kãngã. 
Jeremiah40:3 La b sɩd kɩtame t'a yɩ wa b sẽn dag n yeelã, yãmb sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n ka kelg bãmb noorã yĩnga. Bũmb ning b sẽn dag n yeelã n paam yãmba." 
Jeremiah40:4 Rũndã bala, mam baagda bãens nins sẽn balg fo nusã. Sã n taa fo yam tɩ f na n tũ maam n kẽng Babilonde, bɩ f wa tũ tɩ m na n gesa f yelle. Sã n leb n ka ta f yam tɩ f na n tũ maam n kẽng Babilonde, ka yell ye. Ade, tẽngã fãa la woto. Kẽng zĩig ning sẽn noom foom, wall zĩig ning sẽn ta fo yam." 
Jeremiah40:5 La a Zeremi sẽn kaoosd n ka leokdẽ wã, gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan leb n yeelame: «Lebg n leb a Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya Babilond dĩmã sẽn yãk t'a lebg Zʋʋda tẽmsã naabã nengẽ n tɩ zĩnd ne-a, n pa nebã sʋka. F sã n leb n dat me, bɩ f kẽng zĩig ning fãa fo sẽn datẽ.» La gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan kõ-a-la bɩle ne kũuni, n yaool n bas-a t'a looge." 
Jeremiah40:6 La a Zeremi kẽnga a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya nengẽ Mitspa n tɩ zĩnd ne yẽnda, neb nins sẽn kell tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã sʋka." 
Jeremiah40:7 Zʋʋda tãb-biis nanambs nins fãa sẽn dag n be weoogẽ wã, ne b nebã wʋmame tɩ Babilond dĩmã yãka a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya n kɩt t'a lebg tẽngã naaba, n na n soog pagbã ne raopã ne b kambã, la naong rãmbã b sẽn dag n bas tẽngã pʋgẽ n ka yõg n tall n kẽng Babilondã." 
Jeremiah40:8 Dẽ, Zʋʋda tãb-biis nanambsã ne b nebã kẽnga a Gedaliya nengẽ Mitspa. Nanamb-kãens yʋy la woto: yaa a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛlle, a Kareyak kamb a Yohanan ne a Zonatan, la a Tãnkumet biig a Seraya, ne Netofa rao a Zezaniya ne bãmb nebã." 
Jeremiah40:9 A Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya wẽena ne bãmb la ne b nebã n yeele: Sak-y Kalde nebã n da zoe rabeem ye. Kell-y n pa-y tẽngã pʋga, n sak Babilond dĩmã tɩ y na n vɩɩmda bãane." 
Jeremiah40:10 La sẽn kẽed ne mam wɛɛngẽ, mam na n kell n paa Mitspa yãmb yʋʋr yĩnga, Kalde neb nins sẽn watã taoore. La yãmba, tigs-y reezẽ rãam ne bõn-koaadla, la kaam n bĩng y rʋgd pʋsẽ, la y pa tẽms nins yãmb sẽn beẽ wã pʋsẽ." 
Jeremiah40:11 La Zʋɩf-rãmb nins sẽn dag n be Amo nebã nengẽ Moaabã ne Edom la tẽms a taabã pʋsã me wʋmame tɩ Babilond dĩmã basa Zʋʋda neb kẽer tẽngã pʋgẽ, n yãk a Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya t'a soog-ba." 
Jeremiah40:12 La Zʋɩf-rãmbã fãa yii zĩis nins fãa b sẽn dag n dig-b tɩ b kẽngã, n lebg n wa. Bãmb kẽnga a Gedaliya nengẽ Mitspa sẽn be Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã. La beenẽ, bãmb tigsa reezẽ rãam ne bõn-koaadl wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah40:13 A Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs nins sẽn be weoogẽ wã kẽnga a Gedaliya nengẽ Mitspa," 
Jeremiah40:14 n tɩ yeel-a yaa: Yãmb ka bãng tɩ Amo rĩm a Baalis tʋma a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll t'a wa kʋ yãmb la? La a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya ka reeg bãmb goamã ye. 
Jeremiah40:15 Dẽ, a Kareyak biig a Yohanan soos n yeela a Gedaliya Mitspa yaa: «M kotame tɩ y bas tɩ m kẽng n tɩ kʋ a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛlle. Ned kõn tol n bãng ye. Bõe yĩng tɩ d na n bas t'a kʋ yãmba? Bõe yĩng tɩ Zʋʋda neb nins fãa sẽn wa n tigim yãmb nengẽ wã na n sãeege, tɩ sẽn ket-bã sãame?»" 
Jeremiah40:16 A Ayikam biig a Gedaliya leoka a Kareyak biig a Yohanan yaa: «Da maan bõn-kãngã ye. Fo sẽn yet bũmb ning a Ismayɛll wɛɛngẽ wã ka sɩd ye.» 
Jeremiah41:1 Dẽ zugẽ, yʋʋmdã kiuug a yopoe soabã pʋgẽ, a Elisama biig a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll sẽn yaa na-biigã kẽnga a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya nengẽ Mitspa. Yẽnda kẽnga beenẽ ne rĩmã zakẽ nin-kãsems ne b nebã. La bãmb sẽn wa n zĩ be n dɩt ne taabã wakate," 
Jeremiah41:2 a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll ne a neb piigã yikame n kʋ a Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya ne zabr sʋʋga. Yɩɩ woto tɩ b kʋ ned ning Babilond dĩmã sẽn dag n yãk t'a yɩ tẽngã naabã. 
Jeremiah41:3 A Ismayɛll leb n kʋʋ Zʋɩf-rãmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne a Gedaliya Mitspa wã, ne Kalde tãb-biis nins sẽn dag n be beenẽ wã." 
Jeremiah41:4 B sẽn kʋ a Gedaliya tɩ zaamẽ tɩ ned ba a yembr dag n ka miẽ wã," 
Jeremiah41:5 neb pis-nii n yi Sɩkɛm ne Sɩlo la Samaari n kẽng Mitspa. Bãmb dag n põnga b toeemsã, la b pãrs b futã, la b bog b mens ne sʋʋse. Bãmb dag n zãada bõn-koaadl kũun ne wisdu, n na n tɩ maan maoong Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã." 
Jeremiah41:6 A Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll yii Mitspa n na n tɩ seg bãmba, la a rag n kẽndame la a yãbda. La yẽnda sẽn ta b sẽn beẽ wã, a yeel-b lame yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya nengẽ.»" 
Jeremiah41:7 La bãmb sẽn ta tẽngã pʋgẽ, a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll ne neb nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã yõga bãmb n koode, n wʋk-b n lob bulgẽ." 
Jeremiah41:8 La neb piig n dag n be bãmb sʋkã n yeel a Ismayɛll yaa: «Ra kʋ tõnd ye. Bala, tõnd tara bɩle ne Oorz la kaam ne sɩɩd sẽn solg weoogẽ.» Dẽ, a Ismayɛll basa bãmb n ka naag-b ne b saam-biisã n kʋ ye." 
Jeremiah41:9 Bulg ning pʋg a Ismayɛll sẽn dag n kʋ nebã n lobã yaa a Gedaliya bulga. Yaa bulg ning rĩm a Aaza sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ b tu, yẽnda sẽn dag n zoet Israyɛll dĩm a Basa wã yĩnga. Yaa bul-kãng la a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll sẽn pids ne kũumã." 
Jeremiah41:10 A Ismayɛll yõga neb nins fãa sẽn dag n ket n be Mitspa wã: yaa rĩmã kom-pugli wã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n ket Mitspa tɩ gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan rɩk-b n gũnug ne a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya wã. A Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll peega neb nins b sẽn yõgã n kẽng Amo nebã tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah41:11 La a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã wʋma wẽng ning fãa a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll sẽn maanã. 
Jeremiah41:12 Bãmb peega raopã fãa n kẽng n na n tɩ zab ne a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛlle. La b tɩ paam-a-la Gabawõ ko-ralmã noore. 
Jeremiah41:13 La neb nins fãa a Ismayɛll sẽn yõgã sẽn yãnd a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, bãmb sũur yɩɩ noogo." 
Jeremiah41:14 La neb nins fãa a Ismayɛll sẽn dag n yõg n yiis Mitspa wã wẽnemdame n tɩ naag a Kareyak biig a Yohanande. 
Jeremiah41:15 La a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll ne a neb a nii n põs n zoe n kẽng Amo nebã tẽngẽ t'a Yohanan ka paam-b ye. 
Jeremiah41:16 La a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã peega neb nins sẽn kellã fãa yẽnda sẽn tall Mitspa n wa a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll nengẽ wã: yaa raop sẽn mi zabre, pagba, kamba, ne sõgen-kambã. A talla nin-bãmbã fãa n yi Gabawõ n lebg n wa. Yaa Ismayɛll-kãng n dag n kʋ a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya." 
Jeremiah41:17 Dẽ, bãmb dɩka sore, n tɩ yals Kimham sik zĩigã sẽn pẽ Betlehɛmã, n yaool n na n yi be n kẽng Ezɩpte," 
Jeremiah41:18 n zãag ne Kalde nebã bãmb sẽn dag n yɛɛsde, a Netaniya biig a Ismayɛll sẽn kʋ a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya wã yĩnga. Yaa Babilond dĩmã n dag n yãk a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya t'a lebg tẽngã naaba." 
Jeremiah42:1 Tãb-biis nanambsã fãa, a Kareyak biig a Yohanande, a Osaya biig a Yezaniya ne nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne nin-tals n tãag nanambs kolgame," 
Jeremiah42:2 n yeel Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yaa: «D wẽed-f-la kãntɩɩga, tɩ f wʋm tõnd se-yõkrã. Pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã tõnd ne neb nins fãa sẽn ketã yĩnga. Bala, tõnd sõorã rag n yaa wʋsgo, la fo neeme tɩ moasã, yaa tõnd bilf bal n kete." 
Jeremiah42:3 Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã wilg tõnd d sẽn tog n kẽngẽ, la d sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga!»" 
Jeremiah42:4 La Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yeela bãmb yaa: «M wʋma y kosgã. Mam na n pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn kosã, la leokr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n leok yãmbã, m ka na n solg-y bũmb baa fɩ ye.»" 
Jeremiah42:5 Nebã yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa sɩd la tɩrlem soabã kao tõnd bʋʋdo, tõnd sã n ka maan wa sẽn zems bũmb nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n tʋm foom tɩ f wa togs tõndã." 
Jeremiah42:6 Sã n yaa noog wall toogo, tõnd na n saka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã, soab ning tõnd sẽn tʋm foom b nengẽ wã. Tõnd sũur na n yɩɩ noog tɩ sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã.»" 
Jeremiah42:7 Rasem piig loogr zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi." 
Jeremiah42:8 Dẽ, a Zeremi boola a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs nins sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda wã, la nebã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne nin-tals n tãag nanambse," 
Jeremiah42:9 n yeel-b yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã, soab ning yãmb sẽn tʋm maam b nengẽ tɩ m tɩ yõk b sɛɛg y yĩngã yetame:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‹Yãmb sã n kell n pa tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ, mam na n vigl-y lame, m ka na n sãam-y ye. Mam na n sel-y lame, m ka na n võ-y ye. Bala, mam sũur sãama ne mam sẽn kɩt tɩ toog ning paam yãmbã." 
Jeremiah42:11 Da zoe-y Babilond dĩmã ye. Da zoe-y yãmb sẽn yɛɛsd-a soabã ye. Bala, mam bee ne yãmb n na n yols-yã, la m fãag yãmb a nugẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah42:12 Mam na n zoee yãmb nimbãanega, yẽnda me na n zoee yãmb nimbãanega, n tall yãmb n leb y tẽngẽ wã.› »" 
Jeremiah42:13 La yãmb sã n yeele: «Tõnd ka na n zĩnd tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ ye!» La y sã n ka sak n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã," 
Jeremiah42:14 la y sã n yeele: «Tõnd na n kẽnga Ezɩpte. Beenẽ, d ka na n yãnd zabre, d ka na n wʋm baorg peebgo, la rɩɩb kõn paoog-d me ye. Yaa beenẽ la d na n tɩ zĩndi.»" 
Jeremiah42:15 Beneere, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet yãmb a Zʋʋda bu-kellã. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Yãmb sã n kɩɩs n yeel tɩ y na n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda sãand Ezɩpt tẽnga," 
Jeremiah42:16 bɩ y bãng tɩ zabrã yãmb sẽn yɛɛsdã na n paam-y-la Ezɩpte, la komã yãmb sẽn zoetã ka na n bas yãmb Ezɩpt ye. La yaa beenẽ la y na n ki." 
Jeremiah42:17 Neb nins fãa sẽn na n yãk yam n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd sãand Ezɩptã, zabr ne kom la bã-longds n na n kʋ-ba, la bãmb ned ba a yembr kõn põs toog ning mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ wa b zugã ye.»" 
Jeremiah42:18 Bala, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Yãmb naoor sã n tabg Ezɩpt tẽnga, mam sũur sẽn dag n yik ne Zeruzalɛm nebã to-to wã, m sũur na n puuga ne yãmb a woto me. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ nebã sã n yãnd yãmb bɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-ba, b na n gesa yãmb wa kãab-beedo, wall bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem, wall paoogr bũmbu, la yãmb kõn tol n leb n yãnd zĩ-kãngã ye.»" 
Jeremiah42:19 Yãmb a Zʋʋda bu-kellã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeta yãmba: «Ra kẽng-y Ezɩpt ye! Bɩ y bãng neer tɩ mam keooga yãmb dũndã." 
Jeremiah42:20 Yãmb belgda y mense, bala yãmb tʋma maam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ n yeel yaa: ‹Pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã tõnd yĩnga. La bũmb ning fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn na n yeel tɩ d maane, tõnd na n maaname!›" 
Jeremiah42:21 Mam togsa yãmb bõn-kãng rũndã. La yãmb ka sak n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, la y ka kelg bũmb nins fãa bãmb sẽn yeel tɩ m togs yãmbã ye." 
Jeremiah42:22 Rẽ yĩngã, bãng-y tɩ moasã, zabr ne kom la bã-longds na n kʋʋ yãmb zĩig ning y sẽn dat n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd sãandã pʋgẽ.»" 
Jeremiah43:1 A Zeremi sẽn togs nebã fãa goam nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn yeel yẽnda t'a togs bãmbã n sɛ," 
Jeremiah43:2 a Osaya biig a Azariya ne a Kareyak biig a Yohanande, ne nin-bãmbã fãa sẽn yaa tɩta-nebã yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Bũmb ning fo sẽn yetã yaa zĩrẽ! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã ka tʋm foom tɩ f wa yeel tõnd tɩ d ra kẽng n tɩ zĩnd sãand Ezɩpt ye." 
Jeremiah43:3 Yaa a Neriya biig a Baruk bal n pirsd foom n dat tɩ fo kẽes tõnd yellẽ, n bas tõnd ne Kalde nebã tɩ b kʋ-do, wall b yõg-d n tɩ kẽes yembd Babilonde.»" 
Jeremiah43:4 La a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs fãa la nebã fãa ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel bãmb tɩ b pa Zʋʋda soolmẽ wã ye. 
Jeremiah43:5 Dẽ, a Kareyak biig a Yohanan ne tãb-biisã nanambs fãa peega Zʋʋda bu-kellã, neb nins b sẽn dag n dig tɩ b kẽng buud a taabã nengẽ tɩ b lebg n wa Zʋʋda wã:" 
Jeremiah43:6 yaa pagba, raopa, kamba, rĩmã kom-dibli. Yaa neb nins fãa gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan sẽn dag n bas ne a Safan biig a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya wã, n paas ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi, la a Neriya biig a Baruki." 
Jeremiah43:7 Dẽ, bãmb ka sak n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bãmb kẽnga Ezɩpte, n ta Takpaneese." 
Jeremiah43:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zeremi Takpanees n yeele: 
Jeremiah43:9 «Bao kug-bɛd n tu bok n bus-b Takpanees tẽngã pʋga, Faarõ zakã rignoorẽ, Zʋʋda nebã nifẽ." 
Jeremiah43:10 Yeel Zʋʋda nebã tɩ maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b tɩ tall Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa m tʋmtʋmdã n wa ka. Mam na n kɩtame t'a tilg a naam geerã kug-kãensã mam sẽn solgã zutu, la a na n tilga a zãndã kug-bãmb zutu." 
Jeremiah43:11 Yẽnda na n wa kɩtame tɩ toog paam Ezɩpt tẽngã. Sẽn tog-b ne kũum na n kiime! Sẽn tog-b ne yembd na n looga yembdo! Sẽn tog n pa-a tãpẽ na n paa tãpẽ! 
Jeremiah43:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt wẽnnaam-dãmbã rot rɩ bugum. A na n ning-b-la bugum, n tall-b n kẽng yembdo. Yẽnda na n fãa Ezɩpt nebã zãnga, wa rũm-kɩɩm sẽn kʋʋd a fuug karense, la a na n tõog-b lame." 
Jeremiah43:13 Yẽnda na n wãa Bɛt-Semees kug-vigindsã sẽn be Ezɩptã, la a ning Ezɩpt wẽnnaam-dãmbã rot bugum.› »" 
Jeremiah44:1 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn togs a Zeremi, sẽn kẽed ne Zʋʋda neb nins fãa sẽn be Ezɩpte, Migdolle, Takpaneese, la Nof ne Patroos tẽngã wɛɛngẽ:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Ade, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Yãmb yãnda mam sẽn kɩt tɩ tood nins fãa paam Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsã fãa wã. Tẽn-bãmb lebga raboodo, tɩ ned ka leb n be beenẽ ye." 
Jeremiah44:3 La yaa wẽng ning bãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga. Bãmb yõoga wisd n waoog wẽn-sãams bãmb ne yãmb la y yaab-rãmbã sẽn ka mi, n beeg maam." 
Jeremiah44:4 Mam tʋma m tʋmtʋmdbã fãa sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã yãmb nengẽ n ka base, tɩ b wa kos yãmb tɩ y ra maan yel-be-kãngã m sẽn kisã ye!" 
Jeremiah44:5 La bãmb yẽda b tʋb n ka kelg ye. B ka wẽnemd n bas wẽng ning b sẽn dag n maandã ye, b rag n kell n yõogda wisd n kõt bu-zẽms wẽnnaam-dãmba." 
Jeremiah44:6 Woto yĩnga, mam sũ-yikrã ne m sũ-puugrã widga wa bugum n dɩ Zʋʋda tẽmsã ne Zeruzalɛm soayã, tɩ b lebg raboodo, la zĩ-vɩɩdo, n ket n yaa a woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah44:7 Moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab a Wẽnnaam, n yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sokdame yaa: yaa bõe tɩ y maand y mens wẽng wʋsg a woto, n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda pagbã ne raopã la kambã ne kom-peelsã menem tɩ ned ka leb n ketẽ?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Yãmb nusã tʋʋm yikda mam sũuri, y sẽn yõogd wisd n waoogd Ezɩpt wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩnga. Yãmb yaool n yaa sãamb tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ. Yãmb maana y mens tɩ b na n kʋ-yã, la y lebga kãab-beed ne paoogr bũmb dũniyã soolem-dãmbã fãa sʋka." 
Jeremiah44:9 Yãmb yĩma wẽng ning y yaab-rãmbã ne Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmbã la b pagbã sẽn maanã, la wẽng ning yãmb mensã ne y pagbã sẽn maanã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn maan Zʋʋda soolmã ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutã la?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Hal tɩ ta rũndã, bãmb ka sãam b sũuri, b ka maan dabeem, la b ka sak tõodã ne noy nins mam sẽn kõ yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã ye." 
Jeremiah44:11 Woto yĩnga, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Mam yãka yam n na n sɩbg-yã, la m na n menesa Zʋʋda nebã fãa." 
Jeremiah44:12 Mam na n deega Zʋʋda bu-kellã, neb nins sẽn yãk yam n na n tɩ zĩnd sãand Ezɩptã fãa n kɩt tɩ b ki beenẽ. Zabr sʋʋg ne kom na n kʋʋ bãmba. Bãmb fãa na n kiime, sẽn sɩng ne nin-talsã tɩ ta nanambsã. Zabr ne kom n na n kʋ bãmba, la neb nins fãa sẽn na n yãnd bãmbã, rabeem-kãseng n na n yõk-ba. B na n geta bãmb wa bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem, kãab-beedo, la paoogr bũmbu." 
Jeremiah44:13 Mam na n sɩbga neb nins sẽn be Ezɩptã ne zabr sʋʋga, la kom ne bã-longdse, wa m sẽn dag n sɩbg Zeruzalɛm nebã." 
Jeremiah44:14 Zʋʋda bu-kellã sẽn wa n na n zĩnd sãand Ezɩpti, n dag n tagsd n dat n lebg n leb Zʋʋda wã, ned ba a yembr bãmb sʋkã ka na n põse, wall a zoe ye. Bala, bãmb ka na n tõog n lebg n kuil ye. Yaa neb bilf bal n na n põse.»" 
Jeremiah44:15 Raop nins fãa sẽn dag n mi tɩ b pagbã rag n yõogda wisd n kõt wẽn-sãamsã, la pagb nins sẽn dag n tigim be wʋsgã, ne neb nins fãa sẽn dag n be Patroos Ezɩpt soolmã pʋgẽ wã leoka a Zeremi yaa:" 
Jeremiah44:16 «Tõnd ka rat n kelg goam nins fo sẽn togs tõnd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã ye. 
Jeremiah44:17 Tõnd dat n maana bũmb nins tõnd sẽn dag n yeelã: d na n yõoga wisd n kõ saasẽ dĩm-poakã, la d kõ-a bõn-yũudl kũuni, wa tõnd mensã ne d yaab-rãmbã, la d rĩm-dãmbã ne d nanambsã sẽn dag n maan Zʋʋda soolem tẽmsã pʋs ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutã. Wakat-kãnga, tõnd dag n dɩtame n tɩgda, d sũy rag n yaa noogo, la toog ka tol n paam tõnd ye." 
Jeremiah44:18 La sẽn sɩng ne wakat ning tõnd sẽn bas n ka leb n yõogd wisd la d maand bõn-yũudl kũun n kõt saasẽ dĩm-poakã, tõnd konga bũmb fãa, la zabr sʋʋg ne kom kʋʋ tõndo.»" 
Jeremiah44:19 La pagbã yeela a Zeremi yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, tõnd sẽn yõogd wisd saasẽ dĩm-poakã yĩng la d kõt-a bõn-yũudl kũunã, tõnd sɩdbã ka mi tɩ tõnd maand miisd sẽn yaa a mamsgo, la d kõt-a bõn-yũudl kũun la?»" 
Jeremiah44:20 Dẽ, a Zeremi yeela nin-bãmbã, pagbã ne raopã fãa sẽn dag n leok a woto wã yaa:" 
Jeremiah44:21 «Dẽ yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩma wisdã yãmb ne y yaab-rãmbã, la y rĩm-dãmbã ne y nanambsã la tẽngã nebã fãa sẽn yõog Zʋʋda tẽmsã ne Zeruzalɛm soayã zutã yell la? Bãmb ka leb n tẽr a yell la?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam dag n yii ne yãmb tʋʋm-wẽnsã ne yel-beed nins yãmb sẽn maanã. La yãmb tẽngã lebga raboogo, la zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, ne kãab-beedo, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n be beenẽ ye. Yaa rẽ n kɩt t'a ya a woto hal tɩ ta rũndã." 
Jeremiah44:23 Yãmb sẽn yõog wisdã yĩnga, la y sẽn maan yel-wẽn n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga, la yãmb sẽn ka kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga, la y sẽn ka sak n tũ bãmb tõogã ne b noyã la b tʋlsmã yĩng n kɩte, tɩ toog a woto paam-yã, la rẽ me n kɩt tɩ ket n yaa a woto hal tɩ ta rũndã wã.»" 
Jeremiah44:24 A Zeremi leb n yeela nebã fãa la pagbã fãa yaa: Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa Zʋʋda neb n be Ezɩptã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã!" 
Jeremiah44:25 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Yãmb ne y pagbã pidsa bũmb nins y noyã sẽn togsã. Bala, yãmb yeelame: «Tõnd dat n pidsa d sẽn pʋlem tɩ d na n maana bũmb ninsã. D na n yõoga wisd n tɩ kõ saasẽ dĩm-poakã, la d kõ-a bõn-yũudl kũuni!» Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ y maan wa y sẽn yeelã. Pids-y y sẽn pʋlem bũmb ningã." 
Jeremiah44:26 Woto yĩnga, yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn yaa Zʋʋda neb n be Ezɩptã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã! Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam wẽenda ne m mengã yʋ-kãsengã, tɩ Zʋʋda ned ba a yembr kõn tol n leb n pʋd mam yʋʋrã ye. Ezɩpt tẽngã gill fãa pʋga, ned ba a yembr ka na n leb n wẽen ne Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋr ye!" 
Jeremiah44:27 Mam na n gũusa bãmba, la ka b manegr yĩng ye. Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ toog paam-ba. Zabr sʋʋg ne kom na n kʋʋ Zʋʋda neb nins fãa sẽn be Ezɩptã, hal n sãam-b zãnga." 
Jeremiah44:28 Neb bilf nins sẽn na n põs zabr sʋʋgã na n yii Ezɩpt n lebg n wa Zʋʋda tẽngã pʋga. La Zʋʋda bu-kellã fãa, neb nins fãa sẽn wa n na n zĩnd sãand Ezɩptã na n bãnga sã n yaa mam gomdã, wall bãmb gomdã n na n paam pidsgu.»" 
Jeremiah44:29 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ad bãnd ning sẽn na n wilg tɩ mam na n sɩbga yãmb zĩ-kãngã pʋgẽ, tɩ y tõe n bãng tɩ mam sẽn gom yãmb wɛɛngẽ wã na n paama pidsgu, n wa ne toog yãmb zugu." 
Jeremiah44:30 Ad maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: Mam na n basa Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Hofra a bɛɛbã sẽn dat n kʋ-a wã nugẽ, wa m sẽn dag n bas Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa yẽnda bɛ n dag n baood n kʋ-a wã nugẽ wã.»" 
Jeremiah45:1 Wakat ning a Neriya biig a Baruk sẽn wa n gʋlsd goam nins Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn dag n togsd yẽnda wã sebr zugu, rẽ tɩ yaa a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn yaa Zʋʋda rĩmã sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-naaslẽ. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi yeela a Baruk yaa:" 
Jeremiah45:2 «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn yet foom a Baruk wɛɛngẽ: 
Jeremiah45:3 ‹Fo yetame: Kayto! Toog bee mam zugu! Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo maam toog n paas m yɩɩrã. Mam pãng sɛɛme, m sidgrã yĩnga, la m ka tar vʋʋsg ye!› »" 
Jeremiah45:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zeremi t'a yeel a Baruk yaa: «Beneere, mam siigda bũmb ning m sẽn dag n me wã, la m võogda bũmb ning m sẽn dag n selã. Bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ tẽngã gill fãa pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah45:5 La foom, fo baood n maana bõn-kãsemse! Da bao bõn-kãens ye! Bala, mam kɩtame tɩ toog na n paam ninsaalbã buud fãa, la m na n gũu fo vɩɩmã zĩig ning fãa fo sẽn na n kẽngẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi, sẽn kẽed ne soolem-dãmbã wɛɛngẽ." 
Jeremiah46:2 Yaa sẽn kẽed ne Ezɩpt wɛɛngẽ, la sẽn kẽed ne Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ Neko tãb-biisã wɛɛngẽ. Tãb-biisã rag n bee Efrat kʋɩlgã noore, Karkemiis soolmã pʋga. Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar rag n zaba ne bãmb n tõoge. Wakat-kãng tɩ yaa Zʋʋda rĩm a Zoziyaas biig a Yoyakim sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-naaslẽ." 
Jeremiah46:3 Segl-y gãn-bi wã ne gãn-bɛdã. Kẽng-y zabrã zĩigẽ! 
Jeremiah46:4 Sog-y wiidã! Wed-rʋʋdba, zomb-y y wiidã! Fõgn-y y kut pugli n yals y zĩigẽ! Segl-y y kãnã! Yeelg-y y gãn-tigsã!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam neẽ tɩ bãmb yɛɛsame? Bãmb tardame n lebd poorẽ. B tõoga bãmb gãndaadã, Bãmb zoetame, b zoetame n ka wẽnegd b poorẽ ye. Zĩigã fãa lebga pelen-yɩka! Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah46:6 Bɩ sẽn tʋʋl-a ne zoees ra tõog n zoe ye! Bɩ gãndaoog ra tõog n põs ye! Bãmb lakdame n lʋɩt tẽngã nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ, Efrat kʋɩlgã noore." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ãnda la sẽn fudgd wa Nill kʋɩlgã koom sẽn pid n daagdẽ wã? 
Jeremiah46:8 Yaa Ezɩpt n fudgd wa Nill kʋɩlgã koom sẽn pid n daagdẽ wã. A yetame: Mam na n zẽkame n lim dũniyã. Mam na n menesa tẽmsã ne nebã. 
Jeremiah46:9 Wed-rʋʋdba, zomb-y-yã! Saar-dãmba, fõd-y n kẽ-y-yã! Kuus ne Put gãndaad sẽn tõe n tall gãn-bi n zabe, la Luud gãndaad nins sẽn mi tãp yãagrã, yik-y n kẽng-y-yã!" 
Jeremiah46:10 Rũndã yaa Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã daare. Yaa sũ-dokr daare, yaa daar b sẽn na n dok b sũur ne b bɛɛbã. Zabr sʋʋg vargdame. A rɩtame n yũud bãmb zɩɩm n tɩgda. Yaa maoong Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yĩnga, wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã pʋgẽ, Efrat kʋɩlgã noore." 
Jeremiah46:11 Ezɩpt tẽn-neere, m yãbd-fo! Kẽng Galaad n tɩ bao kaam! Fo sẽn tɩpd f mengã yaa zaalem, tɩɩm sẽn tõe n maag foom ka be ye." 
Jeremiah46:12 Buud a taabã wʋmda f yãndã yelle, la f kelemsã zẽk n pida dũniyã gilli, bala, gãndaadã kanda taab n lʋɩtẽ, bãmb naaga taab n lʋɩtẽ." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi, sẽn kẽed ne Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn wat n na n sãam Ezɩptã wɛɛngẽ:" 
Jeremiah46:14 «Moon-y-yã-a Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋgẽ, togs-y-yã-a Migdoll nebã, togs-y-yã-a Nof ne Takpanees nebã n yeel-b yaa: ‹Segl-y y mens tɩ ned fãa yik n yals a zĩigẽ, bala, zabr sʋʋg gũbga yãmb n vargdẽ!" 
Jeremiah46:15 Maana a wãn tɩ f wẽnnaam a Apiisi zoetẽ? Fo loalgã ka tõe n yals ye, bala Sẽn-Ka-Saab lubd-a lame." 
Jeremiah46:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ tãb-bi-kʋʋng lakd n lʋɩtẽ.› Bãmb kanda taab n lʋɩt n yetẽ: Yik-y tɩ d kuil d nebã nengẽ, d leb d ba-yirã, n zãag d mens ne sãamdã sʋʋga." 
Jeremiah46:17 Sẽn kẽed ne Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ wɛɛngẽ, bool-y-yã-a tɩ ‹Bʋrg soab sẽn ka leb n tõe n maan baa fɩ.› »" 
Jeremiah46:18 Maam a rĩm ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Bɛ wã waoong ka na n vaal ye. Na n yɩɩ wa Taboor tãngã sẽn be tãms a taabã sʋkã, la wa Karmell tãngã sẽn zẽk n tʋʋg ko-kãsengã!" 
Jeremiah46:19 Ezɩpt sẽn yaa tẽn-neerã nebã, segl-y y teed tɩ y na n looga yembdo! Bala, Nof na n sãamame, bugum na n dɩ-a lame, la ned kõn leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah46:20 Ezɩpt yaa wa nag-sadg sẽn yaa neere. Keoodr yita wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã n watẽ. 
Jeremiah46:21 A tãb-biisã yaa wa lull sẽn be yãgrẽ. Bãmb me lebg n zoetame, B naaga taab n zoetẽ, sẽn tõe n yals-a ka be ye. Bala, b sãoongã daar taame, b sɩbgrã daar taame." 
Jeremiah46:22 B zoetame n fɩɩnd wa waafo, bala, bɛɛbã wat n na n zaba ne bãmba, la b zãada lay wa tɩ-kɛɛdba." 
Jeremiah46:23 Baa ne b weoogã sẽn wẽnd wa ka tõe n kẽ a pʋgẽ wã, b bɛɛbã kɛɛda a tɩɩsã, bala b sõorã yɩɩda kalwaare, la ned ka tõe n bãng b sõorã ye." 
Jeremiah46:24 Yãnd tara Ezɩpt tẽn-neerã nebã. B basa bãmb wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã neb nugẽ. 
Jeremiah46:25 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Ade, mam na n sɩbga Amon sẽn be No wã nebã, ne Faarõ, la Ezɩpt nebã ne b wẽnnaam-dãmbã la b rĩm-dãmbã. Mam na n na n sɩbga Faarõ ne neb nins fãa sẽn teeg yẽnda wã." 
Jeremiah46:26 Mam na n bas-b-la neb nins sẽn baood bãmb n dat n kʋ wã nugẽ: yaa Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaare, ne neb nins sẽn be yẽnda zakẽ wã. Dẽ poore, nebã na n leb n zĩnda Ezɩpt wa kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah46:27 La sã n yaa ne foom a Zakoob sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã, da zoe rabeem ye! Israyɛll nebã, da boog-y y raood ye! Bala, mam na n fãaga yãmb tẽn-zãrg ning y sẽn beẽ wã, la m fãag y yagensã tẽng ning b sẽn be yembd pʋgẽ wã. A Zakoob yagensã na n lebg n waame, la b na n leb n zĩnda yam-gãneg ne vɩ-bãan pʋga, la ned kõn tol n kẽes bãmb dabeem ye." 
Jeremiah46:28 Foom a Zakoob sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã, da zoe rabeem ye! Bala, mam bee ne foom. Mam na n menesa buud nins fãa mam sẽn dag n dig yãmb tɩ y tɩ zĩnd b sʋkã, la sã n yaa ne foom, mam ka na n sãam-f ye. La baoosgo, mam n na n demsa foom wa sẽn zemse. Mam ka na n bas foom taal ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel b no-rɛɛs a Zeremi Filistẽ-dãmbã wɛɛngẽ, sẽn deng Faarõ sẽn na n sãam Gaaza wã:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Ade, koom zẽka wĩntoog sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtg tẽngã sẽnẽ, a lebga ko-zoetem sẽn tar pãnga. A fõtame n limd tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, a lima tẽngã ne a nebã fãa. Nebã kelemdame, tẽngã nebã fãa wiisdame," 
Jeremiah47:3 bãmb sẽn wʋmd wiidã naobend rãamde, la saar-dãmbã nao rãamdã yĩnga. Ba-rãmb ka wẽnemded b poorẽ n na n peeg b kamb ye, bala, b fãa raood boogame." 
Jeremiah47:4 Filisti tẽngã gill fãa sãoong taame. Yaa daar b sẽn na n sãam neb nins sẽn be Tɩɩr ne Sɩdõ n sõngdẽ wã, bala Sẽn-Ka-Saab wãa Filisti, ne Kaftoor sẽn yaa tẽng koom sẽn gũbgã." 
Jeremiah47:5 B kõoga Gaaza t'a lebg zĩ-peelle. B ka leb n wʋmd ned rãamd Askelon pʋgẽ ye, neb nins sẽn dag n ket tẽn-nabdrẽ wã me ka leb n be ye. Yãmb na n boga y mens hal tɩ ta dabʋre?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Kayto! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sʋʋga, fo na n vargame n tɩ tek zĩ-bʋg n ka tol n vʋʋse? Leb f wʋʋgẽ, pa be n vʋʋs la f bas woto." 
Jeremiah47:7 La f na n yɩ a wãn n vʋʋse? Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n kõ-a noor t'a kẽng Askelon ne ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ! Yaa beenẽ la b yeel-a t'a teese! 
Jeremiah48:1 Koɛɛg Moaab yĩnga. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Toog paama Nebo tẽngã! B sãam-a lame! Yãnd tara Kiriyatayim tẽngã, bala, b zab n deeg-a lame! Yãnd tara Misgaab nebã, la b pɛleng yɩkame." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moaab ziirã sɛɛme! Neb bee Hɛsbõ n segend n na n wa maan-a wẽnga. Wa-y tɩ d kɩt tɩ Moaab menem buud a taabã sʋka! Madmen tẽng nebã, zabr sʋʋg na n kɩtame tɩ b ka leb n wʋm yãmb me rãamd ye. B rigda yãmb ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Jeremiah48:3 B wʋmda kelems sẽn yit Horonayim! Yaa sabaab ne sãoon-kãsenga! 
Jeremiah48:4 Moaab sãamame! B wʋmda a kambã kelemse. 
Jeremiah48:5 Bala, kelemsã zẽkdame n tũud Luyit tãngã rʋʋdga, la b wʋmda neb nins sũy sẽn sãam tɩ b yãbdã bɛɛb kelemse, Horonayim tãngã sigdgẽ." 
Jeremiah48:6 Zoe-y n fãag-y y mense, n yɩ wa we-bõanga." 
Jeremiah48:7 Bala, yãmb sẽn dɩk y teegrã n teeg y tʋʋmã ne y arzegsã yĩnga, b na n zab n tõoga yãmb me, la b na n talla wẽn-naandg a Kemoos ne a maan-kʋʋdbã la a nanambsã, n kẽng yembdo." 
Jeremiah48:8 Sẽn sãamd-a fãa wã na n sãama tẽmsã fãa, tẽng ba a yembr ka na n põs ye. B na n sãama tãn-longã ne tẽn-nabdrã. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah48:9 Kõ-y Moaab nebã pɩgs tɩ b yɩk n zãage! A tẽmsã na n lebga zĩ-vɩɩdo, la ned ka na n leb n zĩnd b pʋsẽ ye." 
Jeremiah48:10 Kãab-wẽng bee ned ning sẽn maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab tʋʋmdã ne rok-m-zugẽ wã zugu! Ned ning sʋʋg zɩɩm sẽn ka madã na n paama kãab-wẽnga! 
Jeremiah48:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: Hal Moaab nebã yãadem wakate, b rag n zĩi ne bãane, tɩ b rag nan ka tall bãmb n kẽng yembd ye. B rag n yaa wa reezẽ rãam b sẽn bas t'a tisgi. B ka ning-a teoog a to pʋgẽ, la a noorã ne a yũugã me ka tek ye." 
Jeremiah48:12 Yaa woto tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ: Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ neb rɩk-a n kiig laok a to pʋgẽ. B na n zuka a lagdã la b sãam a ko-waoosã." 
Jeremiah48:13 Wẽn-naandg a Kemoos yãnd na n yõka Moaab nebã, wa Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n teeg Betɛll n paam yãndã." 
Jeremiah48:14 Moaab nebã, maana a wãn tɩ yãmb yetẽ tɩ y yaa gãndaad n mi zabre?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moaab sãamame, bug-zõos n dukd a tẽmsã pʋsẽ. B tɛta a ra-sãmbã n dabd kʋʋbo. Rĩm ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Jeremiah48:16 Sabaab n wat Moaab tẽngã zugu, Toog na n paam-a-la tao-tao." 
Jeremiah48:17 Yãmb fãa sẽn gũbg Moaab tẽngã, yãmb fãa sẽn mi a yʋʋrã, yãb-y-yã-a yĩng n yeele: «Kayto! A naam dasaarã sẽn tar pãng la ziirã kaoome." 
Jeremiah48:18 Diyõ tẽn-neerã nebã, Sig f ziirã geer zugu! Sig n zĩnd tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu, bala Moaab sãamdã yika zabr ne foom, a sãamda fo pãng zĩisã." 
Jeremiah48:19 Arowɛɛr nebã, Yals-y sorã noor n gũusi! Sok-y zoɛtbã ne sẽn põs-bã n gese, yaa bõe n maane?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Yãnd tara Moaab nebã: B pɛleng yɩkame. Kaas-y-yã, kelm-y-yã! Kẽng-y Arno kʋɩlgã noore, n moon n yeel tɩ Moaab sãamame!" 
Jeremiah48:21 Bʋ-kaoor waa tẽng ning sẽn yaa tẽn-nabdrã zugu, ne tẽn-bãmba fãa zutu: yaa Holon, Yatsa, Mefaate," 
Jeremiah48:22 Diyõ, Nebo, Bɛt-Diblatayim," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyatayim, Bɛt-Gamulli, Bɛt-Meyõ," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriyote, Bosra, ne Moaab soolem tẽmsã fãa, sẽn pẽ-b la sẽn zãr-ba.»" 
Jeremiah48:25 Moaab pãngã sɛɛme, a kangã kaoome. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah48:26 Yũnug-y-yã-a t'a tɩge, bala, yẽnda yik n zabda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Kɩt-y tɩ Moaab bilim a wʋbdẽ wã, tɩ nebã yaal yẽnda me!" 
Jeremiah48:27 Fo me rag n yaala Israyɛlle! Rẽ yĩnga, Israyɛll dag n bee wagda sʋk sɩda, tɩ fo gõmsd f zug n gomd n paoogd yẽnda?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Moaab nebã, bas-y tẽmsã n yi n tɩ zĩnd piisã sʋka! Maan-y wa wall sẽn gãndgd bog-zulung n tʋɩt a tʋkã!" 
Jeremiah48:29 Tõnd wʋma Moaab nebã tɩtaamã yelle. Bãmb tɩtaamã ya n looga nugu. Bãmb dag n wukda b mens la b zẽkd b mense, n tẽed tɩ b seka b mense." 
Jeremiah48:30 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam mi b tɩtaamã tiiri, la rẽ fãa yaa zaalem. Bãmb wuk-m-mengã yaa zaalem." 
Jeremiah48:31 Yaa woto n kɩte, tɩ mam wiisd Moaab nebã yĩnga, mam yãbda Moaab nebã yĩnga. M maanda yɩɩr Kɩr-Herɛɛs yĩnga." 
Jeremiah48:32 Sibma nebã, mam yãbda yãmb n yɩɩd Yazɛɛr nebã. Yãmb dag n yaa wa reezẽ tɩɩga, tɩ y wilã tẽ n gãndg yamsem kʋɩl-kãsengã, hal n ta Yazɛɛre, la sãamdã wa n sãama y koodã ne y reezẽ biisã." 
Jeremiah48:33 Sũ-noog ne kɩdeng ka leb n be Moaab tẽngã ne a pʋtã pʋsẽ ye. Mam kɩtame tɩ reezẽ rãam sɛ sĩmsã pʋse. B ka leb n tabd reezẽ la b kilsdẽ ye. B ka leb n kilsd reezẽ wobr wakat ye. 
Jeremiah48:34 Hɛsbõ nebã kelems zẽkd n tata Eleyale ne Yahaatse, la sẽn sɩng ne Sowaar tɩ ta Honorayim, hal n tãag Eglat-Selisiya. Baa Nimrim koomã kʋɩɩme." 
Jeremiah48:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam dat n sãama Moaab zãnga. Mam dat n sãama neb nins sẽn dʋʋd maoong kʋʋb zĩis n yõogd wisd Moaab wẽnnaam-dãmbã yĩngã. 
Jeremiah48:36 Yaa woto tɩ m sidgd Moaab yĩng wa ned sẽn peebd wɩɩga. Mam sidgda Kɩɩr-Haresɛt nebã yĩng wa ned sẽn peebd wɩɩga, bala arzegs nins bãmb sẽn dag n paamã loogame." 
Jeremiah48:37 Bãmb ned kam fãa põnga a zug ne a toɛɛnga, la a bog a nusi, la a sẽgen boto." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moaab nebã rot zut ne raasã pʋsẽ yaa wiisgu, bala mam wãa Moaab wa b sẽn wã rʋk tɩ ned ka leb n dat-a ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah48:39 Kayto! Moaab wãame! Ges-y-yã a nebã sẽn wiisdi! B lebgd n zoeta ne yãnde! Moaab lebga bɛɛb laada, la rabeem-kãseng a yagsã fãa nifẽ." 
Jeremiah48:40 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Ade, bɛ wã yɩkda wa pa-nand-tugri, n laand Moaab tẽngã zugu." 
Jeremiah48:41 B reega Moaab tẽmsã, b reega a pãng zĩisã. Badaare, gãndaadã na n lebga rabɛɛmba, wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moaab na n sãamame, a ka na n leb n zĩnd n yɩ buud ye. Bala, a wuka a meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Jeremiah48:43 Moaab nebã, Pelen-yɩk ne bog-zulung la bẽdg wata fo yĩnga. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah48:44 Sẽn zoet-a n dat n põs pelen-yɩkã na n lʋɩɩ bog-zulungã pʋga, la bẽdg na n yõka sẽn tõog-a n yi bog-zulungã pʋgẽ wã. Bala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãensã fãa paam Moaab nebã, yʋʋmd ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg bãmbã pʋgẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah48:45 Zoɛtbã pãng sɛɛme, tɩ b yalsd Hɛsbõ n dat n soonde. La bugum zẽkda Hɛsbõ tẽngã pʋga. Bug-vɩlens yita Sɩhon na-yirã sẽn beẽ wã, n dɩt Moaab tãmsã seese, la a rɩt neb nins sẽn nong zabrã." 
Jeremiah48:46 Yãmb sẽn yaa Moaab nebã, toog bee yãmb zugu! Yãmb a neb nin sẽn dag n waoogd wẽnnaam a Kemoosã menemame! Bala, b yõga y kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli wã n tall n loog yembdo." 
Jeremiah48:47 La maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wakat n wate, tɩ m na n lebs Moaab nebã b pĩnd zĩigẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeta.» Moaab sɩbgrã tɛk la a woto." 
Jeremiah49:1 Sẽn kẽed ne Amo nebã wɛɛngẽ: Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Israyɛll nebã ka tar kom-dibli la? Bãmb ka tar kom-dibli sẽn na n wa soog b tẽngã la? La yaa bõe tɩ wẽnnaam a Milkom reeg Gaad buudã tẽng n sooge, t'a nebã soog Gaad tẽmsã?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ b wʋm zabr kelems Raba sẽn yaa Amo nebã na-tẽngã. A na n sãamame n lebg tom dʋya, la a tẽn-kɩremsã na n dɩɩ bugum. Dẽ, Israyɛll nebã na n leb n deega b tẽngã neb nins sẽn dag n dig bãmb n deeg-a wã nugẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah49:3 Hɛsbõ nebã, wiis-y tɩ Ayi sãamame! Raba kom-pugli, kelm-y-yã! Sẽgen-y bot n yãb-a, la y yeeb goabg la rɩtgo! Bala b yõka bãmb dĩmã ne a maan-kʋʋdbã la a nanambsã, n dabd yembdo." 
Jeremiah49:4 Raba tẽn-neere, bõe yĩng tɩ f wukd f meng f tãn-londã sẽn kõt bɩle sõama wã yĩnga? Fo rag n teega f paoongã n yetẽ tɩ ãndã n tõe n wa zab ne foom?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Beneere, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Mam kɩtame tɩ rabeem yit zĩigã fãa, n wat n na n yõk yãmba. B na n diga yãmba, tɩ ned kam fãa zoe n bao a menga, la ned ka na n kell sẽn na n tigs zoɛtbã ye." 
Jeremiah49:6 La rẽ poore, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Amo nebã leb b tẽngẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah49:7 Koɛɛg Edom wɛɛngẽ. Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sokdame yaa: Teman nebã ka leb n tar yam la? Sẽn tar-b bãngrã ka leb n kõt sagls la? Bãmb yamã menemame la?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan nebã, lebg-y n zoe-y-yã! Kẽng-y n tɩ bao-y zĩig n soonde! Bala, mam na n tʋma sãoong a Ezayu yagensã yĩnga. Wakat taame tɩ mam na n sɩbg bãmba." 
Jeremiah49:9 Reezẽ-woabdb sã n wa fo nengẽ, bãmb ka na n bas bũmb ned sẽn tõe n wa paam n yiis ye. Wagda sã n wa fo nengẽ ne yʋngo, bãmb na n sãama b sẽn tõe n sãame." 
Jeremiah49:10 Sɩd me, mam wʋka a Ezayu yagensã paoong gilli. Mam sãama a zĩ-solgdsã, t'a ka leb n tõe n soond ye. B na n basame tɩ b sãam a yagensã, ne a saam-biisã la a yagsã. B ka na n leb n zĩnd ye." 
Jeremiah49:11 Bas-y y kɩɩbsã, tɩ maam n na n sõng-b tɩ b vɩɩmde, la bɩ y pʋg-kõapã teeg maam!" 
Jeremiah49:12 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Neb nins sẽn dag n ka segd ne sɩbgrã sã n paam sɩbgre, b na n basa foom a Edom n ka sɩbg bɩ? Ayo! B ka na n bas foom ye, b na n sɩbga foom me.»" 
Jeremiah49:13 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam wẽenda ne m mengã, tɩ b na n basame tɩ b sãam Bosra, t'a lebg raboogo, n paam paoogre, la kãab-wẽnga. Yẽnda tẽmsã fãa na n lebga rabood wakat sẽn ka sɛt yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah49:14 Mam wʋma koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, la b tʋma ned bu-zẽmsã nengẽ ne koɛɛg t'a tɩ yeele: «Tigm-y taab n wa zab ne Edom! Yik-y zabr ne-a!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Edom, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg bilf bu-zẽmsã fãa sʋka, la ninsaalbã na n paooga foom wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah49:16 Fo sẽn be pĩisã bogdẽ wã, fo sẽn tɩ be kunkubã zutã, bãng tɩ f sẽn dag n kẽesd nebã rabeemã ne f tɩtaamã kẽes-f-la moogo. Ade, baa fo sã n tɩ tɩʋ f tʋkã yĩngr n lug wa pa-nand-tugri, mam na n sika foom beenẽ. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah49:17 Edom na n sãamame. A toodã yĩnga, so-loaadbã fãa na n yãnd-a lame tɩ b pɛleng yɩke. Bãmb na n yɛɛsame n fɩɩle." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Ade, na n yɩɩ wa Sodom ne Gomoor la b tẽn-kɩremsã sãoongã. Ned ka na n leb n zĩnd Edom ye. Ninsaal kõn leb n zĩnd be yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah49:19 Mam na n waa wa gɩgemd sẽn yit Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor weoogã pʋgẽ, n dig Edom nebã tɩ b fão n yi n bas b tẽngã wakat-yɛng pʋgẽ. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ m sẽn yãk-a soabã soog Edom. Bala, ãnda soab n zem maam? Ãnda soab n tar noor ne maam? La na-bʋg n tõe n yals mam taoore?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Woto yĩnga, kelg-y saagr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn saagd Edom nebã wɛɛngẽ, la b sẽn segend n dat n maan Teman nebã bũmb ninga! Sɩd me, b na n tɛ-b lame n loog wa rũm-bãoonego! B na n sãama b soolmã." 
Jeremiah49:21 Bãmb lʋɩɩsã bʋrg kɩtame tɩ dũniyã rigimdi. B sũ-sãangã kelems zẽkd n tata hal rʋdem ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ. 
Jeremiah49:22 Bɛ wã yɩkame n laand wa pa-nand-tugri, n fõt n dat n sig Bosra tẽngã zugu, la badaare, Edom gãndaadã sũy na n kiuusa wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem." 
Jeremiah49:23 Koɛɛg Damaas wɛɛngẽ. Yãnd tara Hamat ne Arpaad nebã, bala b wʋma koe-beedo, tɩ b gĩin maage. B yaa wa ko-kãsengã koom sẽn lengde, n ka leb n tõe n yals sɩɩ ye." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaas nebã raood boogame, tɩ b wẽnemd n zoetẽ. Rabeem yõka bãmb tɩ b rigda. Yel-pakr ne toog tara bãmba, wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem." 
Jeremiah49:25 Kayto! B basa tẽng ning sẽn dag n kõt maam waoogrã, tẽng ning sẽn dag n kõt maam sũ-noogã." 
Jeremiah49:26 Sɩd me, badaare, a ra-sãmbã lʋɩta a soayã zutu, la b kʋ a raop nins fãa sẽn tõe n kẽng zabrã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah49:27 Mam na n ninga Damaas lalgã bugum, la bugmã na n dɩ a Bɛn-Hadaad na-yiyã." 
Jeremiah49:28 Sẽn kẽed ne Kedaar la Hatsoor soolem-dãmbã, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn zab ne n tõogã wɛɛngẽ. Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yik-y n zab-y ne Kedaar nebã. Sãam-y buud sẽn be yaangã!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Reeg-y bãmb fu-rotã ne b rũmsã, yãk-y b pɛɛlã ne b teedã fãa la ne b yʋgma wã. Kaas-y b zug n yeel tɩ toog yita zĩigã fãa n wat b zutu!" 
Jeremiah49:30 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Hatsoor nebã, zoe-y tao-tao n tɩ bao zĩig n soonde! Bala, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar saagd n dat n wa zaba ne yãmba. A segendame n dat n wa zab ne-yã!" 
Jeremiah49:31 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yik-y n zab-y ne buud ning sẽn zĩ bãane, tɩ b pɛlg yaa kɛgengã! A ka tar dignoy la kʋɩlen-kuy ye. A vɩɩ a yembre." 
Jeremiah49:32 B na n fãa bãmb yʋgma wã ne b rũmsã sẽn yaa wʋsgã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ nin-kãens sẽn põng b zutã sãeeg zĩigã fãa. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sabaab yi zĩigã fãa n wa sãam-ba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah49:33 Hatsoor na n lebga we-baas yiri, a na n yɩɩ zĩ-vɩʋʋg wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Ned ka na n leb n zĩnd tẽn-kãng ye. Ninsaal kõn leb n zĩnd be yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ad koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ no-rɛɛs a Zeremi, sẽn kẽed ne Elam wɛɛngẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas naamã sɩngr wakate." 
Jeremiah49:35 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Mam na n kaoo Elam nebã tãpã sẽn yaa b pãngã yẽgrã. 
Jeremiah49:36 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sebd a naas yi saasẽ kɩrems a naasã n wa fug Elam. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sob-bãmb fãa sãeeg-ba, la buud ka be tɩ Elam neb nins b sẽn digã ka na n kẽng ye." 
Jeremiah49:37 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Elam nebã rig rabeem b bɛɛbã taoore. Bãmb na n diga rabeem neb nins sẽn baood n kʋ bãmbã taoore. Mam sũ-puugrã pʋga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ toog paam bãmba. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b rig bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga, hal n kʋ bãmb zãnga." 
Jeremiah49:38 Mam na n ninga m naamã geer Elam, la m na n menesa Elam dĩmã ne a nanambsã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah49:39 La wakat sẽn wate, mam na n lebs n manega Elam nebã yelle. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah50:1 Woto yaa koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tũnug no-rɛɛs a Zeremi n togse, Babilond sẽn yaa Kalde rãmbã tẽngã wɛɛngẽ." 
Jeremiah50:2 Togs-y buud toay-toayã koe-kãngã! Kɩt-y tɩ b wʋm-a, zẽk-y tãb-kaoore! Kɩt-y tɩ b wʋm-a, la y ra solg-a ye! Yeel-y tɩ b reega Babilonde! Yãnd tara a Bɛlle! A Merodak pɛleng yɩkame! N-yẽe, yãnd tara yẽnda bõn-naandsã, b pɛleng yɩkame!" 
Jeremiah50:3 Bala, buud n yit wĩndg sẽn lʋɩtẽ dɩtgo, n wat n na n zab ne Babilonde. B na n kɩtame t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, tɩ ninsaal bɩ rũng ra leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye. Bala, b fãa loogame." 
Jeremiah50:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã na n tũu taab n lebg n wa. Wakat-kãnga, b na n kẽndame la b yãbd n baood Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã.»" 
Jeremiah50:5 Bãmb na n soka Sɩyõ zĩiga, n wẽnemd b nens n tees beenẽ n yeele: «Wa-y tɩ d rɩk d mens n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n maan kaool sẽn paad wakat fãa, ned sẽn kõn tol n yĩm ye!»" 
Jeremiah50:6 Mam nebã rag n yaa wa piis sẽn meneme. Bãmb pe-kɩɩmbã rag n kẽesd-b-la moogo, b rag n basa bãmb tɩ b gilimd tãmsã zutu. Bãmb dag n kɩtame tɩ b yeebd tãmsã ne kunkubã zutu, n wa yĩm b vʋʋsg zĩigã yelle." 
Jeremiah50:7 Sẽn seg-a bãmb yõgd-b lame n wãbdẽ, la b bɛɛbã rag n yetame: Tõnd ka beeg ye. La nin-bãmbã maana yel-wẽn n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tɩrlem soabã. Bãmb beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, soab ning bãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n teegã." 
Jeremiah50:8 Zoe-y n yi-y Babilonde! Yi-y n bas-y Kalde nebã tẽnga! Yi-y wa boees sẽn lʋɩ bʋʋs taoor n zoetẽ! 
Jeremiah50:9 Bala, ade, mam kɩtame tɩ bu-kãsems tigim taab n yi tẽng ning sẽn be nug-rɩtgã, n wa zab ne Babilond tẽngã. Bãmb na n teedgame n zab n deeg-a. Bãmb pɛɛmã na n yɩɩ wa gãndaoog nug sẽn noom pɛɛmã. A ka lebgd n kuil zaalem ye." 
Jeremiah50:10 B na n fãa Kalde nebã. Ned ning fãa sẽn na n fã-a bãmb sũur na n yɩɩ noogo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah50:11 Yãmb dãmb sẽn fã mam soolmã, maan-y sũ-noogo! Kɩdm-y-yã! Yɩg-y n tirs-y wa nag-sãdse! Kelm-y wa wed-raado!" 
Jeremiah50:12 Yãn-kãseng tara y ma wã! Pag ning sẽn dog-a yãmbã zĩi ne paoogre! Yẽnda n yaa poorẽ tẽmsã fãa sʋka. A yaa we-raoogo, zĩ-koɛɛnga, la zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Jeremiah50:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã yĩnga, ned kõn leb n zĩnd Babilond pʋgẽ ye. B na n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã zãng lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo. Sẽn pɩʋʋgd-a Babilond fãa pɛleng na n yɩkame. B na n yɛɛsame n fɩɩle, a poglgã fãa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah50:14 Teedg-y n zab-y ne Babilonde. Yãag-y y tãbd n gũbg-a! Tão-y-yã-a n da zoe y pɛɛmã bõn ye! Bala, yẽnda maana yel-wẽn n beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Jeremiah50:15 Kaas-y zabr kaasg n gũbg-a n zab ne-a! A rʋʋga a zab-teedo. A gãsdã rʋʋgdame, t'a lalsã sirgdẽ: Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n dokd b sũuri! Rok-y y sũur ne-a! Maan-y-yã-a wa yẽnda me sẽn dag n maanã!" 
Jeremiah50:16 Menes-y neb nins sẽn bʋt la b kẽebd Babilond tẽngã pʋgẽ bõn-bɩʋʋng wakatã! Sãamdã zabr sʋʋg yĩnga, bɩ ned kam fãa leb a buudẽ. Bɩ ned kam fãa zoe n kẽng a tẽngẽ."
