Jeremiah50:17 Israyɛll yaa wa pe-menemdg gɩgmã sẽn digi. Sẽn yɩ-a pipi n wãb yẽnda yaa Asiiri rĩmã, la sẽn yɩ-a yaoolem n kao yẽnda kõabã yaa Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaare." 
Jeremiah50:18 Woto yĩnga, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: Ade, mam na n sɩbga Babilond dĩmã ne a tẽngã, wa m sẽn dag n sɩbg Asiiri rĩmã." 
Jeremiah50:19 Mam na n talla Israyɛll nebã n lebg n wa b tẽngẽ wã. Bãmb na n dɩɩ Karmell ne Basã koodã, la b na n dɩɩ Efrayiim soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã ne Galaadã bɩle n tɩge." 
Jeremiah50:20 Badaare, la wakat-kãnga, b na n baoo kongr Israyɛll nebã nengẽ, la b ka na n yãnd ye. B na n baoo Zʋʋda nebã yel-wẽnã, la b kõn tol n yãnd ye. Bala, mam na n kõo neb nins mam sẽn na n bas n ka kʋ wã sugri. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah50:21 Kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne Meratayim ne Pekood tẽmsã nebã! Kʋ-y bãmb n sãam-b zãnga! Maan-y-b wa mam sẽn yeel yãmbã! Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah50:22 Zabr bʋrg ne sãoon-kãseng n be tẽngã pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah50:23 Maana a wãna? Zãarã sẽn dag n wãad dũniyã fãa wã kaoogame, a wãame. Babilond lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋg buudã fãa sʋka!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Babilonde, mam dɩgla bẽdg fo yĩnga, la fo lʋɩɩ a pʋgẽ n ka bãng ye. B yãnda foom n yõke, bala, fo baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab noore." 
Jeremiah50:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab paka b zab-teedã bĩngr zĩig n yiis b sũ-puugr zab-teedã. Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã rat n maana tʋʋmd Kalde rãmbã tẽngẽ. 
Jeremiah50:26 Yi-y dũniyã kɩremsã fãa n wa zab ne-a! Fõgs-y-yã a baoã, wʋk-y-yã a teedã n zam wa koodo! Sãam-y bãmb zãng n da bas b ned ba a yembr tɩ kell ye!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Kʋ-y bãmb gãndaadã wa lols b sẽn tar n dabd kʋʋb zĩigẽ. Toog bee bãmb zugu! Bãmb daarã taame, bãmb sɩbgrã daar taame." 
Jeremiah50:28 Neb sẽn yi Babilond tẽng n zoe n põsã wilgda Sɩyõ pʋgẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã rokda b sũuri. Bãmb dokda b sũur b roogã yĩnga. 
Jeremiah50:29 Bool-y tãb-tãoodbã tɩ b wa zab ne Babilonde! Bool-y neb nins fãa sẽn mi tãp tãoobã tɩ b wa zab ne-a! Tilg-y y tãb-sikã n gũbg-a, n da bas ned ba a yembr t'a põs ye! Yao-y-yã-a wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã, maan-y-yã-a wa a sẽn dag n maanã, bala, yẽnda wuka a meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã." 
Jeremiah50:30 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b na n kʋ a kom-bɩɩsã soayã zutu. Badaare, b na n kʋʋ yẽnda tãb-biisã fãa. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah50:31 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Tẽng sẽn yaa wuk-m-meng soaba, mam zabda ne foom, bala, fo daarã taame. Wakat ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg foomã taame." 
Jeremiah50:32 Tẽng sẽn yaa wuk-m-meng soabã na n lak n lʋɩɩme, tɩ ned ka be n na n sõng-a t'a yik ye. Mam na n ninga a tẽmsã bugum, t'a rɩ a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa." 
Jeremiah50:33 Ad Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yeta: B namsa Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda nebã. Neb nins fãa sẽn yõg bãmb n maan yembsã ka rat n bas-b tɩ b loog ye. 
Jeremiah50:34 La bãmb fãagdã tara pãnga. Bãmb yʋʋr la Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba. Yaa fãagd-kãng n na n zab n sõng bãmba, n kɩt tɩ vɩ-bãan wa tẽngã pʋga, la b kɩt tɩ Babilond nebã rig ne rabeem." 
Jeremiah50:35 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Bɩ zabr sʋʋg kʋ Kalde nebã! Bɩ a kʋ Babilond nebã ne a nanambsã la a yam dãmbã. 
Jeremiah50:36 Bɩ zabr sʋʋg kʋ pẽg-m-mens rãmbã! Bɩ b lebg yalemba! Bɩ zabr sʋʋg kʋ gãndaadã! Bɩ b pelens yɩke! 
Jeremiah50:37 Bɩ zabr sʋʋg kʋ a wiidã ne a saar-dãmbã, la sãamb nins fãa sẽn be bãmb sʋkã! Bɩ b lebg wa pagba! Bɩ zabr sʋʋg sãam-a tɩ b wʋk a paoongã! Bɩ b fã bãmb gilli!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Bɩ war kʋɩɩs b kʋɩlsã! Bɩ b kʋɩ zãnga! Bala, a tẽngã pida ne bõn-naandse. Pelen-yɩgrã kɩtame tɩ b zʋbsdẽ." 
Jeremiah50:39 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ beenẽ na n lebg we-yũus ne kata, la naneend gãag zĩiga. Na n maana zamaan-dãmba, tɩ ned ka leb n zĩnd beenẽ ye." 
Jeremiah50:40 Na n yɩɩ wa Sodom ne Gomoor la b tẽn-kɩremsã sãoongã. Ned wall rũng kõn leb n zĩnd be ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah50:41 Ade, neb n yit tẽng ning sẽn be nug-rɩtgã n watẽ. Yaa bu-kãseng ne rĩm-dãmb sẽn tar pãng n yi dũniyã zĩ-zãrsẽ n watẽ." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bãmb zẽgsda b tãbdo, la b zãad kãna. Bãmb yaa nin-toos sẽn ka tar nimbãan-zoeer ye. Bãmb bʋrgã wẽnda ko-kãsengã bʋrgo. Bãmb zomba wiidi, bãmb tonga taab wa nin-yende, n wat n na n zab ne foom a Babilond tẽn-neerã." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babilond dĩmã wʋma b kibar t'a raood booge. Yel-pakr paam-a lame toog tar-a-la wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem. 
Jeremiah50:44 Mam na n waa wa gɩgemd sẽn yit Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã noor kãgrã pʋgẽ, n dig Babilond nebã tɩ b fão n yi n bas b tẽngã wakat-yɛng pʋgẽ. La mam na n kɩtame tɩ m sẽn yãk-a soabã soog Babilonde. Bala, ãnda soab n zem maam? Ãnda soab n na sok maam tɩ bõe la m maanda? La na-bʋg n tõe n yals mam taoore?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Woto yĩnga, kelg-y saagr ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn saagd Babilond ne Kalde nebã wɛɛngẽ, la b sẽn segend n dat n maan Kalde nebã bũmb ninga! Sɩd me, b na n tɛ-b lame n loog wa rũm-bãoonego! B na n sãama b soolmã." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babilond lʋɩɩme tɩ tẽn-gãongã rigimdi, la buud a taabã wʋma Babilond nebã kelemse." 
Jeremiah51:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam kɩtame tɩ sãoong sob-kẽeng na n yik n sãam Babilond ne Kalde nebã." 
Jeremiah51:2 Mam na n tʋma bu-zẽms tɩ b wa sãeeg Babilond n bas tẽngã vɩʋʋgo. Bala, a toogã daar sã n ta, neb na n yii zĩig fãa n wa zab ne-a." 
Jeremiah51:3 Bɩ b yãag tãp n tees sẽn yãag-a a tãpã, yãag-y n tees-y sẽn yeelg-a a gãntik n wukd a mengã! Da bas-y-yã a bi-bɩɩg ba a yembr t'a põs ye! Kʋ-y-yã a tãb-biisã fãa gilli!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Bɩ b pogl n lʋɩ n ki Kalde nebã tẽngẽ, bɩ b kõs-b tɩ b ki n dʋr Babilond soayã zutu." 
Jeremiah51:5 Bala, Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda Wẽnnaamã ka bas-b pʋg-kõt ye. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã ka bas-ba, baa ne b sẽn pids b tẽngã ne wẽng n beeg Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã ye." 
Jeremiah51:6 Zoe-y n yi-y Babilonde! Bɩ ned kam fãa zoe n fãag a menga! Da naag-y Babilond n sãam a kongrã yĩng ye! Bala, yaa wakat Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dokd b sũuri, la b na n yaoo Babilond wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilond dag n yaa wa sãnem wamd sẽn pid ne rãam n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugẽ, tɩ dũniyã nebã fãa yũ tɩ b nens yilimdẽ. Bu-zẽmsã yũu wamdã pʋg reezẽ rãamã, tɩ rẽ kɩt tɩ b zʋbsdẽ." 
Jeremiah51:8 La tao-tao bala, Babilond lʋɩɩme, a wãa zãnga! Yãb-y-yã a yĩnga, bao-y kaam n sõog a poglgã, tɩ daarninga, a na sãooge." 
Jeremiah51:9 Tõnd makame n tɩp Babilonde, la a ka sãoog ye. Wa-y tɩ d bas-a, tɩ ned kam fãa kuil a tẽngẽ. Bala, a sɩbgrã yell zẽk n taa saasã, a zẽkame n tãag sawatã." 
Jeremiah51:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ tõnd tɩrlem puki. Wa-y tɩ d kẽng Sɩyõ n tɩ togs bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sẽn maanã.» 
Jeremiah51:11 Sɩls-y y pɛɛmã n pids y logdo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dat n sãam Babilondã yĩnga, b neka Medi rĩm-dãmbã yam. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-dokr la woto, yaa sũ-dokr Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah51:12 Zẽk-y tãb-kaoor tɩ d zab ne Babilond n sãam a lalsã! Paas-y gũudbã sõore. Kɩt-y tɩ gũudbã yals b zĩigẽ. Kɩt-y tɩ neb tɩ soond soayã zutu! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk yam tɩ b na n maana bũmb ningã, b na n maan-a lame. Yaa b sẽn dag n yeel Babilond nebã wɛɛngẽ wã!" 
Jeremiah51:13 Foom a Babilond sẽn dag n be kʋɩl-kãsems noor n tar arzegs wʋsgã, fo wakat taame, wa sẽn zems f yão-beedã." 
Jeremiah51:14 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã wẽena ne b meng n yeele: N-yẽe, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bɛɛbã tãb-biis wʋsg kẽ fo pʋgẽ wa kalwaare, la b na n kaasa fo zugu, wa reezẽ wobr wakat kaasgo." 
Jeremiah51:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab naana tẽngã ne b meng pãnga. Bãmb yamã kɩtame tɩ dũniyã beẽ, la b yɛdga sa-gãongã ne b bãngrã." 
Jeremiah51:16 Bãmb sã n zẽk b koɛɛgã, koomã sẽn be yĩngrã tigimda taaba. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sawat zẽk n ta dũniyã kɩremsã fãa. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ sa-yãgb sikd sa-koom, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ sebgã yit a sẽn beẽ wã n fugda." 
Jeremiah51:17 Nebã fãa lebga zɩtba, n ka tar bãngr ye. Yõak bõn-naandg yãnd tar-a lame. Bala, bãmb yaa zĩrẽ bõn-naandse, la vɩɩm ka be bãmb pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah51:18 Bãmb yaa zaalem. Bãmb yaa zĩrẽ tʋʋmã. Wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n wa ges b yellã, b na n sãamame." 
Jeremiah51:19 A Zakoob yagensã Wẽnnaam ka woto ye. Bala, bãmb n yaa bũmb fãa naanda, la bãmb yãka Israyɛll buudã n maan b nebã. Bãmb yʋʋr la Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba." 
Jeremiah51:20 Fo yɩɩ mam zãar ne m zab-teoogo. Yaa foom la m tall n beds buud toay-toaya, la m sãam soolem toay-toaya." 
Jeremiah51:21 Foom la m tall n beds weefã ne a rʋʋdã, la a saarã ne a soabã." 
Jeremiah51:22 Foom la m tall n beds pagbã ne raopã, la nin-kẽembã ne kom-bɩɩsã, la ra-sãmbã ne kom-pugli wã." 
Jeremiah51:23 Mam talla foom n beds pe-kɩɩmb ne b piisi, la ka-koaad ne a niigi, la gʋvɛrneer-dãmb ne taoor dãmba." 
Jeremiah51:24 Mam na n lebsa Babilond ne Kalde nebã fãa wẽng ning bãmb sẽn maan Sɩyõ pʋgẽ wã yĩng y nifẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Jeremiah51:25 Sãoong tãnga, fo sẽn dag n sãamd dũni wã gillã, mam zabda ne foom! Mam na n tẽega m nug n tus foom, tɩ f yi pĩisã zut n bilim n lʋɩ. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg wa tãng sẽn dɩ bugum. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ned kõn tõog n yãk roog soakẽ kugri, wall roog yẽbgr kugr fo zug ye. Bala, fo na n lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋg wakat fãa." 
Jeremiah51:27 Zẽk-y tãb-kaoor tẽngã pʋgẽ n peeb baorg buud toay-toayã sʋka! Kɩt-y tɩ buud toay-toayã teedg n zab ne Babilonde. Kɩt-y tɩ Ararat ne Minimi la Askenaaz soolem-dãmbã tigim taab n zab ne-a. Yãk-y tãb-biis nanambs tɩ b zab ne-a. Kɩt-y tɩ wiidã wa wa kalwaare. 
Jeremiah51:28 Kɩt-y tɩ buud toay-toay ne Medi rĩm-dãmbã la a gʋvɛrneer-dãmbã ne a taoor-dãmbã fãa la tẽngã fãa bãmb sẽn so wã teedg n zab ne-a! 
Jeremiah51:29 Tẽngã rigimdame, a miima wakat ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn pids b saagrã sẽn kẽed ne Babilond wɛɛngẽ wã. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Babilond lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n be a pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babilond gãndaadã basa zabr n zĩ b pãng zĩisẽ wã pʋsẽ. Bãmb pãng sɛɛme tɩ b lebg wa pagba. B ninga bãmb dotã bugum, b kaoo tẽngã rignoy kʋɩlen-kũyã." 
Jeremiah51:31 Koeesã yõsemda taaba, koe-toagsdbã zoet n yõsda taaba, n na n tɩ togs Babilond rĩmã tɩ bɛɛbã reega a tẽngã n yãmb-a zĩig zãnga," 
Jeremiah51:32 tɩ b reega zĩ-rʋʋgdsã la b ning bãtã bugum, tɩ zab-zabdbã pelens yɩke." 
Jeremiah51:33 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Babilond sẽn dag n yaa tẽn-neerã lebga wa zɛɛg ki pãbr wakate. Sã n yɩ bilfu, a tigsgã wakat na n taame." 
Jeremiah51:34 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar beesa maam n wãbe. Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ m lebg wa la-vɩʋʋgo. Yẽnda vela maam wa wag-bɛɛga. Yẽnda pidsa a pʋgã ne bõn-sõamy nins mam sẽn dag n tarã, n yaool n wʋk maam.»" 
Jeremiah51:35 Sɩyõ nebã na n yeelame: «Bɩ wẽng ning Babilond sẽn maan tõndã lʋɩ a zugu! Zeruzalɛm nebã na n yeelame: Bɩ tõnd zɩɩmã raagr yell zĩnd Kalde nebã zugu!» 
Jeremiah51:36 Woto yĩnga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n zaba fo zabre, mam na n doka fo sũuri. Mam na n kʋɩɩsa Babilond ko-kãsengã ne a ko-bundsã." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babilond na n lebga kug-rʋre, a na n lebga we-baas yiri, la zĩ-vɩʋʋgo. A na n lebga bõn-yɛɛsdga, la ned kõn leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah51:38 Babilond nebã naagda taab n yãbd wa gɩgem-poala, bãmb wũusda wa gɩgem-bi." 
Jeremiah51:39 Yão-beed sã n wa tar bãmba, mam na n maana tigr b yĩnga, n kɩt tɩ b yũ rãam tɩ b nens yilim tɩ b maan sũ-noogo, n gũs wakat fãa gõeem n ka leb n nek abada. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah51:40 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yɩ wa pe-bi b sẽn tar n dabd kʋʋb zĩigẽ, la wa pe-raad ne boeese.»" 
Jeremiah51:41 Maana a wãn tɩ b tõog n deeg Sesake? Dũniyã gill sẽn dag n pẽgd-a soabã ziir sɛɛme! Maana a wãn tɩ Babilond lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋg buud toay-toayã fãa sʋka? 
Jeremiah51:42 Ko-kãsengã rɩɩ Babilonde, a ko-wĩ-kãsemsã lim-a lame." 
Jeremiah51:43 A tẽmsã lebga raboodo, tẽngã lebga zĩ-koɛɛnga, la tẽn-nabd-koɛɛnga. Lebga tẽng ned sẽn ka leb n be-a pʋgẽ ye. Ninsaal buud ka leb n tũud be n loogdẽ yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah51:44 Mam na n sɩbga Babilond nebã wẽnnaam a Bɛlle, n kɩt t'a wʋk a sẽn dag n velã. Bu-zẽmsã ka na n leb n sũ taab a nengẽ yɛs ye. Baa Babilond lalgã lʋɩɩme!" 
Jeremiah51:45 Mam nebã, zoe-y n yi-y tẽn-kãng pʋga! Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa zoe n fãag a menga, n zãag ne maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puug-kãsengã," 
Jeremiah51:46 tɩ y raood da wa booge, la tɩ rabeem da wa yõk-yã, koees nins b sẽn na n wa togs tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩng ye. Bala, rõandã, b yetame tɩ woto, vẽere, n yet tɩ woto. Tẽngã zĩig fãa lebga wẽnga, naab fãa zabda ne a to!" 
Jeremiah51:47 Woto yĩnga, ade, wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n sɩbg Babilond bõn-naandsã. La tẽngã nebã fãa na n paama yãnde. Sẽn ki-bã fãa kũumã na n pida tẽngã." 
Jeremiah51:48 Saasẽ la tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be b pʋsẽ wã na n kaasa ne sũ-noogo, bũmb nins sẽn paam Babilondã yĩnga. Sɩd me, sãamdb na n yii nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ, n wa zab ne-a. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilond kɩtame tɩ b kʋ neb dũniyã fãa pʋgẽ, la moasã, b na n kʋʋ Babilond nebã, b sẽn kʋ Israyɛll nebã yĩnga." 
Jeremiah51:50 Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn põs zabr sʋʋgã, da yals-y ye! Zĩnd-y yɩɩg n tẽeg maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yelle, la y ra yĩm Zeruzalɛm yell ye!" 
Jeremiah51:51 Yãnd yõka tõndo, d sẽn wʋm paoogr goamã yĩnga. D nens pida ne yãnde, bala, bu-zẽms wa n kẽe Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zĩ-sõamẽ wã." 
Jeremiah51:52 Yaa woto tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ: «Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n sɩbg Babilond bõn-naandsã. A tẽngã fãa pʋgẽ, b na n wʋma sẽn paam-b sãmpoagã fãa wõosgo." 
Jeremiah51:53 Baa Babilond sã n dʋ yĩngr n me lalg sẽn tar pãng beenẽ, la ba a sã n kogl a pãng zĩisã tɩ ned ka tõe n ta beenẽ, mam na n tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ sãam-a. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah51:54 B wʋmda kelems Babilond tẽngã pʋgẽ. Sãoong kãseng bʋrg yita Kalde nebã tẽngẽ. 
Jeremiah51:55 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sãamd Babilonde, n kɩt tɩ b ka leb n wʋmd a rãamd ye. A bɛɛbã wata ne bʋr-kãseng wa ko-kãsengã sẽn guglumd to-to wã." 
Jeremiah51:56 N-yẽe! Sẽn sãamd-a fãa wã watame n na n zab ne Babilonde! B yõga a tãb-biisã, b kaoo a tãbdã, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn sɩbgda, la b yaooda ned kam fãa wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmde." 
Jeremiah51:57 Mam na n yũnuga yẽnda nanambsã, a yam dãmbã, a gʋvɛrneer-dãmbã, ne a taoor dãmbã la a gãndaadã rãam tɩ b gũs wakat fãa gõeem n ka leb n nek abada. Rĩm ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Jeremiah51:58 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «B na n luba Babilond lal-tagdã, la b yõog a tẽngã rignoy kʋɩlen-zãntlsã bugum. Nebã namsda b mens zaalem, tɩ tẽmsã yaool n na n dɩ bugum. La bãmb namsgã yaa zaalem bala.»" 
Jeremiah51:59 Woto yaa koɛɛg no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn kõ a Maaseya biig a Neriya biig a Seraya. Yaa wakat ning a Seraya sẽn tũ Zʋʋda rĩm a Sedesiyaas n na n kẽng Babilondã, la rẽ tɩ yaa rĩm a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ wã. A Seraya rag n yaa sõgen-kãsenga." 
Jeremiah51:60 A Zeremi gʋlsa sebr n wilg tood nins fãa sẽn na n paam Babilondã, la goam nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne Babilond wɛɛngẽ wã." 
Jeremiah51:61 A Zeremi yeela a Seraya yaa: «Fo sã n ta Babilonde, bɩ f mao n karem gom-kãensã fãa." 
Jeremiah51:62 Karem-b n yeel yaa: ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb meng n gom zĩ-kãngã wɛɛngẽ, n yeel tɩ b na n sãam-a lame n kɩt t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋg wakat fãa, tɩ ninsaalb wall rũms ra leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye.›" 
Jeremiah51:63 Fo sã n karem seb-kãngã n sɛ, bɩ f loe-a ne kugr n tɩ lob Efrat kʋɩlgẽ wã," 
Jeremiah51:64 la f yeel tɩ yaa a woto la Babilond na n lis n ka leb n duk yĩngri, toog ning mam sẽn na n kɩt tɩ wa yẽnda zugã yĩnga.› » «La bãmb namsgã yaa zaalem bala.» A Zeremi goamã baoosg la woto." 
Jeremiah52:1 A Sedesiyaas sẽn wa n na n lebg rĩmã t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a yembre, la yẽnda rɩɩ naamã Zeruzalɛm yʋʋm piig la a yembre. A ma yʋʋr dag n yaa a Amutalle, n yaa Libna tẽng ned a Zeremi bi-pugla." 
Jeremiah52:2 A Sedesiyaas maana sẽn yaa wẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab nifẽ wa a Yoyakim. 
Jeremiah52:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã yĩng n kɩt tɩ yel-kãngã paam Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda nebã, hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tol n dig-b n zãag ne b menga. A Sedesiyaas kɩɩsa Babilond dĩmã noore." 
Jeremiah52:4 A Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm-wɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig soabã rasem piig daare, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yika ne a tãb-biisã fãa n zab ne Zeruzalɛm. Bãmb tilga b tãb-sikã n gũbg tẽngã, la b tu bok n gilg-a zĩig zãnga." 
Jeremiah52:5 Babilond nebã gũbga Zeruzalɛm tẽngã n tãag a Sedesiyaas sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembrẽ. 
Jeremiah52:6 Kiuug a naas soabã rasem a wɛ daare, komã wɩnga tẽngã pʋga, hal tɩ tẽngã nebã ka leb n tar dɩɩb baa bilf n na n dɩ ye." 
Jeremiah52:7 Dẽ, Babilond dãmbã pooga võor tẽngã lalgẽ. La rĩm a Sedesiyaas ne a tãb-biisã fãa soosa ne yʋngo, n tũ tẽngã noor ning sẽn be lals a yiibã sʋk rĩmã zẽed zĩig sɛɛgẽ wã, n yi n zoe n kẽng Araba tẽn-nabdrã sẽnẽ. La Kalde rãmbã rag n gũbga tẽngã." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kalde rãmbã tãb-biisã riga rĩm a Sedesiyaas n tɩ paam-a Zeriko tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngã zĩigẽ, la rĩmã tãb-biisã zoe n sãeegame." 
Jeremiah52:9 Dẽ, bãmb yõka rĩmã n tall n kẽng Ribla sẽn be Hamat soolmẽ wã, Babilond dĩmã nengẽ, t'a bʋ a bʋʋdo." 
Jeremiah52:10 Babilond dĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kood rĩm a Sedesiyaas kom-dibli wã a Sedesiyaas nifẽ, la a kɩt tɩ b kood Zʋʋda nanambs nins fãa sẽn be Ribla wã." 
Jeremiah52:11 Dẽ poore, yẽnda kɩtame tɩ b kɩɩd a Sedesiyaas ninã, la b sẽb-a ne zũud bãense. Babilond dĩmã talla yẽnda n tɩ kẽes bi-bees roog Babilond t'a pa be n tãag a kũum." 
Jeremiah52:12 Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a wɛɛlẽ, kiuug a nu soabã rasem piig daare, a Nebuzaradan sẽn dag n yaa Babilond dĩmã gũudb naabã waa Zeruzalɛm." 
Jeremiah52:13 Yẽnda ninga Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã ne rĩmã zakã, la Zeruzalɛm dotã fãa bugum. Yẽnda ninga ro-bɛdã fãa bugum." 
Jeremiah52:14 Kalde tãb-biisã fãa sẽn dag n be ne gũudbã naabã sãama lals nins sẽn karg n gũbg Zeruzalɛmã. 
Jeremiah52:15 Gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan talla tẽngã neb kẽer sẽn yaa naong rãmbã, ne sẽn kell-bã, la neb nins sẽn dag n dɩk b mens n kõ Babilond dĩmã, n paas tʋʋm-mitb nins sẽn kellã, n tɩ kẽes yembdo." 
Jeremiah52:16 La yẽnda yãka naong rãmb kẽer n bas tɩ b pa tẽngã pʋgẽ n ko reezẽ tɩɩsã la b ko pʋtã. 
Jeremiah52:17 Kalde rãmbã wãa zũud ra-lugdsã sẽn dag n be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã pʋgẽ wã, ne tebendsã la zũud sĩn-bedrã sẽn be beenẽ wã, n wʋk zũudã fãa n tall n kẽng Babilonde." 
Jeremiah52:18 Bãmb wʋka tompeglem laasã ne pɛll-dãmbã la sʋʋsã, ne zɩɩm mesb laasã, la wisd yõogr laasã, n paas zũud teed nins fãa b sẽn tar n maand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã tʋʋmdã." 
Jeremiah52:19 Gũudbã naab leb n wʋka sĩn-bãoonegã ne bugum laasã, la zɩɩm mesb laasã ne tompeglem laasã, la fɩtl dogendsã ne wisd yõogr laasã, la bõn-yũudl wamã, la bũmb nins fãa sẽn maan ne sãnem la wanzuri wã." 
Jeremiah52:20 Rĩm a Salmo sẽn dag n maan ra-lugds a yiibã ne sĩn-bedrã, la niig piig la a yiibã sẽn dag n yaa tebendsã Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã yĩngã fãa rag n yaa teed sẽn maan ne zũudu, la b rag n ka tõe n bãng b zɩslmã tɛk ye." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ra-lugds a yiibã rag n zema taaba. B zãntlmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a nii, tɩ wĩir woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a yiib gilg-ba. B pʋsã yaa yogdo, t'a yembr fãa taglem tat nug-bil woglem." 
Jeremiah52:22 Zũud pugl n be ra-lugdg fãa zugu, la pugl fãa zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. La b rõoga gãmbr ne gernaad biis sẽn maan ne zũud gilli. La b rag n maana ra-lugdg a to wã ne a gernaad-dãmbã me a woto." 
Jeremiah52:23 Gernaad biis pis-wɛ la a yoob n dag n be ra-lugdsã kɩremsã, tɩ gernaad-dãmb koabg rag n karg n gũbg gãmbrã." 
Jeremiah52:24 Gũudbã naab yõka maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Seraya ne maan-kʋʋr kãsem-pʋgdg a Sofoni, n paas rigno-gũudb a tãabã." 
Jeremiah52:25 Tẽngã pʋga, yẽnda yõka tãb-biis naab a yembre, la a yõg rĩmã kug-zĩidbã sʋk neb a yopoe sẽn dag n be tẽngã pʋga, ne tãb-biis naabã seb-gʋlsd ning sẽn dag n get-a tẽngã tãb-biis yãkr yellã, n paas nebã sʋk neb pis-yoob sẽn dag n be tẽngã tẽn-sʋka." 
Jeremiah52:26 Gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan talla bãmb n kẽng Babilond dĩmã nengẽ Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:27 La Babilond dĩmã kɩtame tɩ b kʋ bãmb Ribla, Hamat soolmã pʋgẽ. Yɩɩ woto la b tall Zʋʋda nebã n tɩ kẽes yembd n zãag ne b tẽngã." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ad neb nins a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yõg n tall n kẽng yembdã sõore: yʋʋmd a yopoe soabã pʋgẽ, yɩɩ Zʋʋda neb tus a tã la pisi la a tã." 
Jeremiah52:29 A Nebukatnedzaar sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a niinẽ, yẽnda yõga Zeruzalɛm neb kobs nii la pistã la a yiibu n tall n loog yembdo." 
Jeremiah52:30 A sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a tãablẽ, gũudbã naab a Nebuzaradan yõga Zʋʋda neb 745 n tall n loog yembdo. B sẽn yõg neb ninsã fãa sõor yaa neb." 
Jeremiah52:31 B sẽn tall Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakẽ n tɩ kẽes yembdã tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yopoɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig la a yiib soabã rasem pisi la a nu daare, Babilond dĩm a Evɩll-Merodak sẽn deeg a naamã yʋʋmde, a yiisa Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakẽ bi-bees roogo." 
Jeremiah52:32 A Evɩll-Merodak goma gom-nood ne a Yoyakẽ, n maan-a neere, n kõ-a naam sẽn yɩɩd rĩm-dãmb nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne yẽnda Babilond tẽngã." 
Jeremiah52:33 Woto, Babilond dĩm a Evɩll-Merodak kɩtame t'a Yoyakẽ yees a bi-bees roog futã n toeem futu, la a rag n naagda yẽnda n dɩt daar fãa hal n tãag a yõor tɛka." 
Jeremiah52:34 Dẽ, yɩɩ Babilond dĩm a Evɩll-Merodak n ges rĩm a Yoyakẽ yell daar fãa, hal n tãag a Yoyakẽ yõor tɛka." 
Lamentations1:1 Kayto! Tẽng ning neb wʋsg sẽn dag n be a pʋgã lebga tẽn-vɩʋʋgo. A lebga wa pʋg-kõore. Yẽnda rag n yaa kãseng buudã fãa sʋka, yẽnda rag n yaa rĩm-poaka, n so soolem wʋsgo, la b kẽes-a-la tʋʋm-wɛgl pʋga." 
Lamentations1:2 Yẽnda yãbda yʋngã tõre, la a nintãmã sedgda a yegdsã zutu. Neb nins sẽn dag n nong yẽnda wã, ned baa a ye ka belsd yẽnda ye. Yẽnda zo-rãmbã fãa zãmba yẽnda, b lebga yẽnda bɛɛba." 
Lamentations1:3 B namsa Zʋʋda n yiis-a n kẽng tẽng a to n tɩ kẽes yembd sẽn yaa toog pʋga. Yẽnda zĩnda buud a taab sʋk n ka yã vʋʋsg ye. Neb nins sẽn da rigd yẽnda wã paama yẽnda a sũ-sãangã pʋga. 
Lamentations1:4 Sɩyõ soayã bee sũ-sãang pʋga, bala, ned ka leb n be b zut n wat tigr ye. Tẽngã noyã fãa sãamame. A maan-kʋʋdbã wõosdame. A pʋg-sadbã sũy sãamame. A meng tara sũ-toogo." 
Lamentations1:5 Yẽnda bɛɛbã tõog-a lame, a bɛɛba zĩi ne yam-gãnega. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kõo yẽnda sũ-sãanga, a beegrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga, la bɛyã yiisa yẽnda kom-bãoonegã n kẽes yembd pʋga." 
Lamentations1:6 Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã ziir sɛɛme. A nanambsã yaa wa yãgs sẽn ka yãt yam-maasa, la b ka tar pãng tɩ zoe n põs sẽn digd-a bãmbã ye." 
Lamentations1:7 Zeruzalɛm namsgã ne a toogã wakate, yẽnda tẽega bõn-neeb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n tar pĩndã yelle. Bɛyã sẽn lubd a nebã tɩ sõangd kaẽ wã, bɛɛbã yãnda yẽnda n la a lʋɩɩsã." 
Lamentations1:8 Zeruzalɛm maana yel-wẽn wʋsgo, rẽ kɩtame t'a lebg bõn-dẽgdo. Neb nins fãa sẽn da waoogd yẽnda wã paoogda yẽnda moasã. Bãmb yãame t'a yaa zaala. La yẽnda meng wẽeda sir n tarda." 
Lamentations1:9 A rẽgda bee a fuugã zugu, la yẽnda ka tags yẽnda a sẽn na n yɩ a soab beoog ye. Yẽnda lʋɩɩ yaoolg kãseng pʋga. La ned ka be n na n bels-a ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ges-y mam namsgã, bala, bɛyã tõogame!" 
Lamentations1:10 Bɛyã tẽega a nug n deeg Zeruzalɛm bõn-sõama wã. Buud a taabã waa n kẽe yẽnda zĩ-sõngã pʋgẽ. Yaa buud ning yãmb sẽn yeel tɩ b ra wa yãmb nebã tiging pʋgẽ wã. 
Lamentations1:11 Yẽnda nebã fãa wõosdame n baood dɩɩbo. Bãmb dɩgsa b bõn-neebã n tek ne rɩɩbo, tɩ b tõe n paam n fãag b yõyã. Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ges-y-yã, ges-y mam sẽn paamd paoogr to-to." 
Lamentations1:12 Yãmb fãa sẽn tũud ka n loogdẽ wã, bɩ y tags n gese. Toog bee sẽn zem toog ning sẽn paam maamã bɩ? Sẽn-Ka-Saab namsa maam daar ning bãmb sũ-puugrã sẽn wɩngã." 
Lamentations1:13 Bãmb zĩnda yĩngr n tʋm bugum tɩ sig n dɩ mam kõabã, bãmb tab-b lame. Bãmb ninga gãmbr mam naoã tẽngre. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam targ n leb poorẽ. Bãmb kõo maam yam-yoogo, la mam sũur sãamda daar fãa." 
Lamentations1:14 Bãmb nugã wʋga mam beegrã mam beegrã kala taaba, b zẽkdame n yẽt mam koakoayã. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam pãngã sɛ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rɩka maam n kõ mam sẽn ka tõe-b rãmbã." 
Lamentations1:15 Zu-soabã basa gãndaad nins fãa sẽn dag n be ne maamã. Bãmb boola tãb-biisã tɩ b wa tigim n zab ne maam n menes mam kom-bɩɩsã. Zu-soabã taba Zʋʋda tẽn-neerã reezẽ rãam wẽkr koglg pʋgẽ. 
Lamentations1:16 Yaa bãmb yĩng la mam yãbd tɩ m nintãm daagdẽ. Bala, bɛlsd ning sẽn dag n tõe n kɩt tɩ mam vɩɩm yɩ noogã zãaga ne maam. Mam kambã tara sũ-sãanga, bala, bɛyã tõogame." 
Lamentations1:17 Sɩyõ teesda a nusi, la ned ka bels-a ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ neb nins sẽn gũbg a Zakoob buudã na n yɩɩ bãmb bɛɛba. Zeruzalɛm lebga bõn-dẽgd bãmb sʋka." 
Lamentations1:18 Zu-soabã yaa tɩrga, yaa maam n kɩɩs bãmb noore. Nebã fãa, m kotame tɩ y kelge, la y ges mam sũ-sãangã. Mam pʋg-sadbã ne m da-sãmbã kẽe yembd pʋga." 
Lamentations1:19 Mam boola m zo-rãmba, la bãmb zãmba maam. Mam maan-kʋʋdbã ne m kãsem-dãmbã kii tẽngã pʋgẽ, wakat ning b sẽn dag n baood dɩɩb n na n fãag b yõyã." 
Lamentations1:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ges-y mam toogã. Mam pʋga bendgame. Mam sũurã digda m pʋgẽ. Bala, mam kɩɩsa wʋsgo. Zabr sʋʋg kʋʋ mam kambã soay zutu, la yiyã pʋs me yaa kũum n be be." 
Lamentations1:21 B wʋma mam sẽn wẽed siri, la ned ka be sẽn belsd maam ye. Mam bɛɛbã fãa wʋma mam toogã yell n maand sũ-noogo, bala, yaa yãmb n maane. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ daar ning yãmb sẽn yãkã wa, bɩ y kɩt tɩ bãmb me yɩ wa maam." 
Lamentations1:22 Bɩ y kɩt tɩ bãmb wẽngã fãa wa yãmb taoore, la y maan bãmb wa yãmb sẽn maan maam m yel-wẽnã fãa yĩngã. Bala, mam wẽeda sir wʋsgo, la m sũur sãamame." 
Lamentations2:1 Kayto! Zu-soabã sũ-puugr pʋga, b luda Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã ne sawato! Zu-soabã tusa Israyɛll ziirã t'a yi saasẽ n wa lʋɩ dũni zugu. Bãmb ka tẽeg b naoã roagendgã yell bãmb sũ-puugrã daar ye." 
Lamentations2:2 Zu-soabã sãama a Zakoob yagensã yiyã fãa n ka zoe bãmb nimbãaneg ye. Bãmb sũ-yikrã pʋga, bãmb luba Zʋʋda tẽn-neerã pãng zĩisi. Bãmb sika soolmã ne a nanambse, n kɩt tɩ b ta tẽng ne paoogre." 
Lamentations2:3 Bãmb sãama Israyɛll pãngã fãa b sũ-kãbrã pʋga. Bãmb fooga b nug-rɩtgã n lob poorẽ n bas bãmb b bɛɛbã taoore. Bãmb widga bug-witim a Zakoob tẽngã pʋg t'a rɩt n gilgd zĩigã fãa. 
Lamentations2:4 Bãmb dʋʋsa b tãp wa bɛy sẽn maanda, n zẽk b nug-rɩtg wa ned sẽn maand ne a zabd-n-taaga, n sãam bũmb nins fãa sẽn dag n yaa neerã. Bãmb kiiga b sũ-kãbrã wa bugum Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã roog zugu." 
Lamentations2:5 Zu-soabã lebga wa bɛyã. Bãmb sãama Israyɛlle. Bãmb sãama a naam dotã fãa n pãb a pãng zĩisã n lubi. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda tẽn-neerã wõosgã ne a wiisgã lebg wʋsgo. 
Lamentations2:6 Bãmb sãama bãmb doogã wa zẽed zĩiga. Bãmb sãama bãmb sɛk-zĩigã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ b yĩm tigr la vʋʋsg rayã Sɩyõ tẽngã pʋga. Bãmb sũ-yik-kãsengã pʋgẽ, bãmb paooga rĩm-dãmbã ne maan-kʋʋdbã." 
Lamentations2:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam yii ne bãmb tẽn-kugrã, bãmb ka leb n nand bãmb sɛk-zĩigã. Bãmb dɩka Sɩyõ na-yirã lalsã n bas ne bɛyã. Kelems yika Sẽn-Ka-Saab roog pʋgẽ wa tigr daare." 
Lamentations2:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yãka yam n dat n sãam Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã lalse. Bãmb tẽega wĩiri, la b ka yõbg b nugã hal tɩ b sãam fãa. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ pãng zĩigã ne lalgã siigi. Bãmb ned kam fãa lʋɩɩme." 
Lamentations2:9 A kʋɩlemsã suda tẽngã pʋga. Bãmb sãama a ra-bɩlmã, b kaoo a kʋɩlen-kuyã. A rĩmã ne a nanambsã bee buud toay-toay sʋka. Tõog ka leb n beẽ ye. Yẽnda Wẽnnaamã no-rɛɛsdb ka leb n paamd vẽnegre sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ ye." 
Lamentations2:10 Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã kãsem-dãmbã zĩi tẽnga, bãmb mukame. Bãmb yuga b zut tom. Bãmb yeelga boto. Zeruzalɛm pʋg-sadbã sulga b zut tẽnga." 
Lamentations2:11 Mam yãbame tɩ ninã pãng sɛ. Mam sũur pida ne sũ-sãanga. Mam yam bondga m pʋgẽ, mam nebã tẽn-neerã sẽn sãamdã yĩnga. Bala, kom-bãoonegã ne nusẽ kambã sobdame n lʋɩt tẽng zĩ-sõsdsẽ." 
Lamentations2:12 Kambã sẽn sobd n lʋɩt tẽngã soay zut wa neb sẽn paam poglgã, la b sẽn be b ma-rãmbã nusẽ n dat n ki wã, b sokda b ma-rãmbã yaa: «Ki ne reezẽ rãam bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Lamentations2:13 Zeruzalɛm nebã, mam na n yeelame tɩ bõe ne yãmb yellã? Mam na n maka yãmb ne bõe? Sɩyõ tẽn-neere, mam na n yãnda bõe sẽn zem foom, la mam na n yãnda bõe belsg n bels foom? Bala, fo sãoongã yaa kãseng wa ko-kãsenga. Ãnda n na n tõog n maag foom?" 
Lamentations2:14 Fo no-rɛɛsdbã paama zĩrẽ vẽnegre sẽn yaa zaalem n kõ foom. Bãmb ka puk f yel-wẽnã n fãag foom ne yembd ye. Bãmb togsa foom zĩrẽ bãngr goam sẽn yaa belgre. 
Lamentations2:15 Neb nins fãa sẽn loogd be wã pãbda b nus yãmb wɛɛngẽ. Bãmb fɩɩndame, la b gõmsd b zut Zeruzalɛm tẽn-neerã wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: «Tẽng ning b sẽn boond tɩ ‹neer zãngã› la dũniyã gill sũ-noogã la woto bɩ?»" 
Lamentations2:16 Fo bɛɛbã fãa yaagda b noy n gomd foom wẽnga. Bãmb fɩɩndame, n wãbd b yẽna. Bãmb yetame: «Tõnd vela yẽnda. Yaa ra-kãngã la tõnd sɩd da gũuda. Tõnd ta-a lame! Tõnd yãnd-a lame!»" 
Lamentations2:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maana bãmb sẽn dag n dat n maan bũmb ningã. Bãmb pidsa b gomdã bãmb sẽn dag n togs hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã. Bãmb sãamda yãmb tɩ nimbãan-zoeer kaẽ ye. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ yãmb bɛɛbã maan sũ-noog yãmb sãoongã yĩnga. Bãmb paasa yãmb namsdbã pãnga. 
Lamentations2:18 Bãmb boonda Zu-soabã ne b sũyã fãa. Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã lalga, bɩ f bas f nintãm tɩ raag wa ko-zoetem wĩntoog ne yʋngo. Ra kõ f meng vʋʋsg ye. Ra bas f ninã tɩ b vʋʋs ye." 
Lamentations2:19 Yiki! Kelem yʋng gũudum wakat sɩngr n togs f pʋgã fãa Zu-soabã taoore. Zẽk f nus n tees bãmb n kos f kom-bãoonegã vɩɩm yĩnga, kom sẽn tar bãmb tɩ b sobd n lʋɩt soayã fãa zutã yĩnga." 
Lamentations2:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tags-y n ges-y-yã. Yaa ãnda la yãmb sẽn maand woto wã? A zemsame tɩ pagbã wãb kamb nins b sẽn dogã bɩ, kom-bãooneg nins bãmb sẽn sɩd nongã? A zemsame tɩ b kʋ maan-kʋʋdbã ne Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdbã Zu-soabã sɛk-zĩigã pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
Lamentations2:21 Nin-kẽembã ne kom-pogdã gãee tẽngã soay zutu. B kʋʋ mam da-sãmbã ne m pʋg-sadbã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yaa yãmb n kʋ bãmb yãmb sũ-puugrã daare. Yãmb kooda bãmb n ka bas ba a yembr ye. 
Lamentations2:22 Yãmb boola mam pelen-yɩgrã t'a yi zĩigã fãa n wa, wa tigr daare. Daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur sẽn puugã, ned ka põse, wall kell ye. Mam bɛyã sãama neb nins mam sẽn dag n wub n nongẽ wã." 
Lamentations3:1 Mam yaa soab ning sẽn paam namsgo, bãmb sũ-yikr da-saarã pãb a soabã." 
Lamentations3:2 Bãmb taee maam, n tall maam n kẽng lik pʋgẽ, la ka vẽenemẽ ye." 
Lamentations3:3 Sɩdã, bãmb zẽkda b nug naoor wʋsg n namsd maam wĩntoog tɛka." 
Lamentations3:4 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam yĩngã ne m gãongã zelge, la bãmb kaoo mam kõaba." 
Lamentations3:5 Bãmb sẽbga maam n gũbg maam ne zẽnem-toaaga, la ne namsgo." 
Lamentations3:6 Bãmb zĩndga maam lik pʋgẽ wa neb nins sẽn ki hal daar zãra. 
Lamentations3:7 Bãmb mee lalg n gũbg maam tɩ mam ka tõe n yi ye. Bãmb balga maam ne bãens sẽn yaa zɩsgo. 
Lamentations3:8 La mam sã n zẽk m koɛɛg n kos sõngre, bãmb yẽta b tʋb mam pʋʋsgã yĩnga." 
Lamentations3:9 Bãmb mee kug n gɩd mam sorã. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ m tek sore. 
Lamentations3:10 Bãmb yɩɩ wa rigd-n-yĩidg sẽn sor mam yĩnga, wa gɩgemd sẽn sor n gũudẽ." 
Lamentations3:11 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ mam bʋdg n bas m sore, bãmb zendma maam. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ vɩɩmã sãame." 
Lamentations3:12 Bãmb yãaga b tãpã mam yĩnga, n tees maam n na n tão ne b peemdã." 
Lamentations3:13 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b lokã pɛɛm vʋdg maam n kẽ m sũ-zulmẽ wã. 
Lamentations3:14 Mam nebã fãa laada maam, bãmb dɩka maam tɩ m lebg bãmb yɩɩlle." 
Lamentations3:15 Bãmb tɩgsa maam ne bõn-toodo. Bãmb yũnuga maam zẽnem-toaaga. 
Lamentations3:16 Bãmb kaoo mam yẽn ne kug bãoonego. Bãmb taba maam tompeglem pʋga. 
Lamentations3:17 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ vɩ-bãan zãag ne maam. Mam yĩma naar yelle. 
Lamentations3:18 Mam yeelame tɩ m ka leb n tar tẽeb ne beoog neer ye. Mam ka leb n tẽed tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sõnga maam ye. 
Lamentations3:19 Bɩ y tẽeg mam namsgã ne m yeebgã yelle, mam zẽnem-toaagã ne m zẽnemã yelle." 
Lamentations3:20 Mam ket n tẽegda b yell wakat fãa. La mam yam bondga m pʋgẽ. 
Lamentations3:21 Ad bũmb ning mam sẽn tagsd m sũurẽ. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam maand tẽebo. 
Lamentations3:22 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonglmã ka sɛte, la bãmb nimbãan-zoeerã ka tar tɛk ye." 
Lamentations3:23 Yibeoog fãa, bãmb leb n lebgda paalse. Yãmb sɩdã yaa kãsenga." 
Lamentations3:24 Mam yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam pʋɩɩre. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam maand tẽeb ne bãmba.» 
Lamentations3:25 Sẽn-Ka-Saab maanda neb nins sẽn teeg bãmbã la b baood bãmbã neere. 
Lamentations3:26 Ned sã n sĩnd bal n gũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãagre, yaa neere." 
Lamentations3:27 Yaa neer tɩ rao fãa zãms tɩ tʋk a bi-bɩɩlem wakat yubl-balgre. 
Lamentations3:28 Bɩ a zĩnd a yembr bal n sĩnd sɩddd... Bala, b ratame tɩ yɩ a woto." 
Lamentations3:29 Bɩ a ning a noor wubsg pʋgẽ tɩ daar ninga, a na paam sõngre." 
Lamentations3:30 Bɩ yẽnda wẽnemd a yɛgdg n kõ sẽn wẽed-a yẽnda pɛkã. Bɩ a sak tɩ paoogr sek-a. 
Lamentations3:31 Bala, Zu-soabã ka basd ned zãng n ka leb n bao zĩig ye." 
Lamentations3:32 Bãmb sã n kõ ned sũ-sãanga, bãmb zoeta a soab nimbãaneg wa sẽn zems bãmb nonglem-kãsengã." 
Lamentations3:33 Bala, bãmb ka namsd ninsaalbã n kõt b sũ-sãang ne yamleoog ye." 
Lamentations3:34 B sã n tab tẽngã neb nins sẽn be-b bi-bees roogã fãa ne naoã," 
Lamentations3:35 la b bʋ ned bʋʋd kegr Sẽn-Ka-To nifẽ," 
Lamentations3:36 la b sã n maan ned pãng a bʋʋd kaood wakate, Zu-soabã ka ne bõn-kãng sɩda?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ãnda n na n yeel tɩ bũmb maan t'a sɩd maane, tɩ sã n ka Zu-soabã n kõ noore?" 
Lamentations3:38 Rẽ yĩnga, tood ne noog fãa ka yit Sẽn-Ka-To nengẽ la?" 
Lamentations3:39 Yaa bõe tɩ nin-vɩɩg yẽgemdẽ? Bɩ ned kam fãa yẽgem a meng yel-wẽn yĩnga. 
Lamentations3:40 D tags d soayã yelle, la d fees-ba, n lebg n leb Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ." 
Lamentations3:41 Bɩ tõnd zẽk d sũyã ne d nusã n tees Wẽnnaam sẽn be yĩngrã n yeele: 
Lamentations3:42 Tõndo, tõnd wegmame n kɩɩs yãmba, la yãmb ka kõ tõnd sugr ye." 
Lamentations3:43 Yãmb luda y meng ne y sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ n dig tõndo. Yãmb kʋʋme, n ka bas ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye." 
Lamentations3:44 Yãmb pila sawaodg tɩ ned pʋʋsg ka tõe n pɩʋʋg n ta yãmb nengẽ ye. 
Lamentations3:45 Yãmb gesa tõnd wa sagdo, yãmb kɩtame tɩ tõnd lebg paoogr bũmb buudã fãa sʋka." 
Lamentations3:46 Tõnd bɛɛbã fãa yaagda b noy n gomd tõnd wẽnga. 
Lamentations3:47 Tõnd pʋɩɩrã lebga yɛɛsgo la boko. Yaa zɛɛbo, la sãoongo." 
Lamentations3:48 Mam nintãmã raagda wa kʋɩlg ko-zoetem mam buudã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã sãoong yĩnga. 
Lamentations3:49 Mam ninã pida ne nintãm wakat fãa n ka sɛt ye, la vʋʋsg me ka be ye." 
Lamentations3:50 Hal tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn be saasẽ wã sulg n yãnde. 
Lamentations3:51 Mam ninã zabdame, mam tẽngã kom-pugli wã fãa yellã yĩnga." 
Lamentations3:52 Neb nins sẽn dɩt beem ne maam zaalmã rigda maam wa liuul n ka basdẽ ye. 
Lamentations3:53 Bãmb sagla maam bok pʋgẽ vɩɩga, la bãmb loba maam ne kuga." 
Lamentations3:54 Koomã lima mam zugu la mam yeelame: «Mam kiime.» 
Lamentations3:55 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam sẽn be hal bokã zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, mam boola yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Lamentations3:56 Yãmb wʋma mam sẽn yeel yãmb tɩ y ra yẽd-y y tʋb ne mam sirã la ne mam kɛlengã ye. 
Lamentations3:57 Daar ning mam sẽn kos yãmbã, yãmb kolga maam n yeel tɩ m da zoe rabeem ye." 
Lamentations3:58 Zu-soaba, yãmb sõnga maam ne m bʋʋdã yelle. Yãmb fãaga mam vɩɩm." 
Lamentations3:59 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb yãnda b sẽn maan maam wẽngã. Bɩ y kao m bʋʋdã tɩrg n kõ-ma." 
Lamentations3:60 Yãmb yãnda bãmb sẽn dok b sũur ne maam to-to wã. Yãmb yãnda bãmb fãa sẽn saagd saagr ning n dat n maan maam wẽngã. 
Lamentations3:61 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb wʋma bãmb paoogr goamã la bãmb sẽn yẽsd ne taab n dat n maan maam bũmb ningã." 
Lamentations3:62 Yãmb wʋma mam bɛɛbã goamã la bãmb sẽn tagsd daar fãa n dat n maan maam bũmb ningã. 
Lamentations3:63 Ges-y-yã, bãmb sã n zĩẽ wall b sã n yasẽ, maam n lebg b yɩɩlle." 
Lamentations3:64 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n yaoo bãmb wa sẽn zems b nusã tʋʋmã." 
Lamentations3:65 Yãmb na n diglma bãmb sũyã, la y kɩt tɩ kãab-wẽng sig bãmb zutu." 
Lamentations3:66 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n diga bãmb ne sũ-puugri, n sãam bãmb tɩ b ra leb n zĩnd yãmb saasã tẽngr ye." 
Lamentations4:1 Kayto! Sãnemã ka leb n pɩnd ye. Sãnem halaalã tekame. B sãeega kug sẽn welg toorã n pid so-tiisã fãa. 
Lamentations4:2 Sɩyõ kom-dibli wã sẽn tar yõod wa sãnem halaalã, kayto! B geta bãmb wa yagd laas sẽn yaa yagb nus tʋʋmde." 
Lamentations4:3 Baa we-baas basda b bĩis tɩ b kamb yẽsme, la mam buudã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã lebga nin-toos wa we-raoogẽ naneendo." 
Lamentations4:4 Ko-yũud tara bi-pɛɛlg hal t'a zelemd tabend a ragsendaka. Kom-bãooneg kota rɩɩbo, la ned ka kõt bãmb ye." 
Lamentations4:5 Neb nins sẽn da rɩt rɩ-noodã kiida soayã zutu. Neb nins sẽn dog n tuk naarã vɛɛsda tãmpʋʋr n baood rɩɩbo. 
Lamentations4:6 Mam buudã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã yel-wẽnã yɩɩda Sodom nebã rẽnda, b luba Sodom nebã wakat yɛng pʋgẽ tɩ ned nug ka sɩɩs bãmb ye." 
Lamentations4:7 B na-biisã rag n yaa neeb n yɩɩd neeze, bãmb peelmã rag n yɩɩda bĩisim, bãmb yĩngã rag n yaa miuug wa koray. Bãmb nens rag n pɩnda wa safɩɩr kugri." 
Lamentations4:8 Bãmb nensã sobga wa saala. Ned sã n yãnd bãmb sor zugu, a ka leb n tõe n bãng-b ye. Bãmb gãong tabendeda b kõabã n kʋɩt wa raado." 
Lamentations4:9 B sẽn kʋʋd-b rãmb ne zabr sʋʋgã n são kom sẽn kʋʋd b-rãmbã. Bãmb pãng sɛtame tɩ b lʋɩt tẽnga, bala, pʋtã bõn-koaadl biis ka leb n beẽ ye." 
Lamentations4:10 Mam buudã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã sãoong wakate, baa pagb nins sẽn dag n yaa nimbãan-zoɛtbã, b rɩgsa b kambã ne b nus n dʋg n wãbe." 
Lamentations4:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab basame tɩ b sũurã fudg n tãag a tɛka. Bãmb kiiga b sũ-puugrã tʋʋlem n widg bugum Sɩyõ tẽngã pʋgẽ, tɩ bugmã rɩ a yẽbgrã fãa zãnga." 
Lamentations4:12 Dũniyã rĩm-dãmbã la neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽng zugã ka tẽ tɩ namsdbã ne bɛɛbã na n tũu Zeruzalɛm tẽngã rignoyẽ n kẽ ye. 
Lamentations4:13 Bõn-kãng yaa a no-rɛɛsdbã yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la a maan-kʋʋdbã kongr yĩnga, bãmb sẽn daag nin-tɩrsã zɩɩm a pʋgẽ wã yĩnga!" 
Lamentations4:14 Bãmb dag n yeebda wa zoens sẽn be soay zutu. Zɩɩm dẽgma bãmb tɩ ned ka tõe n sɩɩs bãmb fut ye. 
Lamentations4:15 Nebã kelmame n yeel bãmb yaa: «Lak-y-yã, rẽgdo!» «Loog-y-yã, loog-y ka n da sɩɩs bũmb ye!» Bãmb sẽn wa n zoet n yeebdẽ wã, buud a taabã nebã rag n yetame yaa: «Bãmbã ka na n pa kaanẽ n kaoos ye.»" 
Lamentations4:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng kɩtame tɩ bãmb sãeege. Bãmb ka waoog maan-kʋʋdbã, la b ka zoe nin-kẽembã nimbãaneg ye." 
Lamentations4:17 Tõnd dag n gũuda sõngr zaalem, tɩ d nin pãng booge. Tõnd dag n gũuda buud a to fãagre, la a ka fãag tõnd ye." 
Lamentations4:18 Bãmb dag n gũusda tõnd sẽn dabdẽ, sẽn na n yɩl n gɩdg tõnd tɩ d da kẽng d zĩisẽ wã ye. Tõnd sɛɛb wakat rag n kolgdame, la tõnd dasmã rag n pidame. Tõnd sɛɛb taame!" 
Lamentations4:19 Tõnd digdbã zoeta tao-tao n yɩɩd sɩls sẽn yɩgd yĩngri. Bãmb diga tõnd ne pãng tãmsã zutu. Bãmb solgame n bẽd tõnd we-raoog pʋgẽ. 
Lamentations4:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk a soab t'a yaa tõnd vɩɩmã gũudã lʋɩɩ bãmb bogdã pʋsẽ. Yẽnda yaa soab ning tõnd sẽn dag n gomd a yell n yetẽ tɩ tõnd na n zĩnda yẽnda maasmẽ n vɩɩmd buud a taabã sʋkã. 
Lamentations4:21 Edom nebã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã bee Uts tẽnga, maan-y sũ-noog n kɩdme. Bõn-yũudlã na n taa yãmb nengẽ me. Yãmb me na n yũ-a lame n tɩge, n piid y futã n kẽn y zaala." 
Lamentations4:22 Sɩyõ nebã sẽn yaa mam nin-nongdsã, yãmb kongrã sɩbgr sɛɛme. Bãmb ka na n leb n yiis yãmb n tɩ kẽes yembd yɛs ye. Edom nebã, b na n sɩbga yãmb y kongrã yĩnga. B na n puka yãmb yel-wẽnã." 
Lamentations5:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, tẽeg-y bũmb ning sẽn paam tõndã yelle. Tags-y la y ges tõnd yãndã yelle." 
Lamentations5:2 B rɩka tõnd pʋɩɩrã n kõ sãambã, tõnd sẽn ka mi-b rãmbã reega tõnd yiyã n sooge." 
Lamentations5:3 Tõnd yaa kɩɩbs sẽn ka ba, la d ma-rãmbã yaa wa pʋg-kõapa." 
Lamentations5:4 Tõnd daada koom ne ligd n yũuda. Tõnd yaooda ligd n yaool n paam d raado. 
Lamentations5:5 Neb nins sẽn digd tõndã paama tõnd n yõke. Tõnd yɛɛ zãnga, la b ka basd tõnd tɩ d vʋʋs ye." 
Lamentations5:6 Tõnd tẽega d nus n tees Ezɩpt ne Asiiri sẽnẽ n na n paam dɩɩb n dɩ. 
Lamentations5:7 Tõnd ba-rãmbã kongame, bãmb ka leb n be ye, la yaa tõnd n deegd bãmb yel-wẽnã sɩbgre." 
Lamentations5:8 Yembs n so tõndo, la ned ka sẽn na n fãag tõnd bãmb nusẽ ye." 
Lamentations5:9 Tõnd gẽnegda d yõy n baood dɩɩbo, la neb bee we-raoog pʋgẽ ne sʋʋs n dat n kʋ tõndo." 
Lamentations5:10 Komã wɩnga tõnd wʋsg hal tɩ tõnd gãndã yõog wa wʋng bugum sẽn dɩ. 
Lamentations5:11 Bãmb yõga pagbã n sãam bãmb Sɩyõ tẽngã pʋgẽ. La b maana pʋg-sadbã me woto Zʋʋda tẽmsã pʋsẽ. 
Lamentations5:12 Bãmb yõga nanambsã n luuli. Bãmb ka waoog nin-kẽembã ye. 
Lamentations5:13 B kɩtame tɩ kom-bɩɩsã tʋk neere, la kom-dibli wã tʋka raad n lengdẽ." 
Lamentations5:14 Nin-kẽembã ka leb n kẽnd tẽngã noor ye. La kom-bɩɩsã ka leb n yɩɩnd ye. 
Lamentations5:15 Tõnd sũ-noogã sɛɛme. Tõnd saoogã lebga sũ-sãanga. 
Lamentations5:16 Tõnd maanfã sẽn dag n fõg tõnd zugã lʋɩɩme. Toog bee tõnd zutu, bala, tõnd kongame." 
Lamentations5:17 Bõn-kãng yĩng n kɩt tɩ tõnd namsd d sũyã pʋse, tɩ tõnd nensã sobda." 
Lamentations5:18 Bala, Sɩyõ tãngã sãamame, tɩ waas gõod beenẽ." 
Lamentations5:19 La yãmba, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb paada wakat sẽn ka sɛta. Yãmb naam geerã na n paa zamaan fãa." 
Lamentations5:20 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb na n yĩm tõnd yell wakat fãa? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb na n bas tõnd n kaoos wakat wʋsgo? 
Lamentations5:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y wẽnemd tõnd neng n tees yãmba, la tõnd na leb n wa yãmb nengẽ. Leb-y n kõ-y tõnd dasem nins sẽn yaa wa kʋdem-wẽndẽ dẽnda." 
Lamentations5:22 Yãmb basa tõnd zãng fasɩ bɩ, yãmb sũurã puuga ne tõnd hal tɩ loog bɩ?" 
Ezekiel1:1 Mam yʋʋm pis-tã soabã pʋgẽ, yʋʋmdã kiuug a naasẽ soabã rasem a nu daare, mam sẽn wa n be ne yembsã Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã, saasã pakame, la mam paama Wẽnnaam vẽnegre." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kiuugã rasem a nu wã daar kell n zemsda ne rĩm a Yoyakẽ sẽn be yembd pʋgã tɩ yʋʋm nuunẽ. 
Ezekiel1:3 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maan-kʋʋd a Buuzi biig a Ezekɩyɛlle, Kebaar kʋɩlgã noore, Kalde nebã soolem pʋga. Yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã zĩnd a Ezekɩyɛll zugu." 
Ezekiel1:4 Mam dag n getame, la ade, sob-kãseng ne sawad-taok n yi nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ n watẽ, la bug-vɩleng sẽn kɩt tɩ vẽenem yãgda, n gilg sawaodgã. La vẽenem sẽn wẽnd bug-pãrs n dag n yit bugmã tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel1:5 La bugmã tẽn-sʋka, bũmb n dag n be beenẽ n wẽnd bõn-vɩɩs a naase, tɩ b yalẽ wã wẽnd ninsaala." 
Ezekiel1:6 La bõn-vɩɩg fãa rag n tara nens a naase, la pɩgs a naase." 
Ezekiel1:7 Bãmb karsã rag n yaa tɩrse, la b naoã rag n wẽnda nag-bil nao-bendo, la b rag n pɩnda wa zũud b sẽn duug tɩ pɩnda." 
Ezekiel1:8 Bãmb kɩrems a naasã fãa, b rag n tara nus wa ninsaal nusi, tɩ be b pɩgsã tẽngre. La bãmb b naasã ned kam fãa rag n tara a nense, la a pɩgsa." 
Ezekiel1:9 La bãmb pɩgsã rag n soka taaba, la bãmb sã n da rat n kẽne, b ka wẽnemded ye, bãmb ned kam fãa rag n kẽnda a taoor tɩrg bala." 
Ezekiel1:10 Bãmb ned kam fãa taoor nengã wẽnda ninsaal nenga, la b rɩtg nengã wẽnda gɩgemd nenga, tɩ b goabg nengã wẽnd loalg nenga, tɩ b poorẽ nengã wẽnd pa-nand-tugr nenga." 
Ezekiel1:11 Bãmb ned kam fãa pɩgs a yiib n yɛdg n tees yĩngr n sok taaba, tɩ bãmb pɩgs a yiib lud b yĩngã." 
Ezekiel1:12 La bãmb ned kam fãa rag n kẽnda a taoor tɩrga. Bãmb dag n kẽnda zĩig ning sɩɩgã sẽn yet bãmb tɩ b kẽngã, la b sã n kẽnda b ka wẽnemded ye." 
Ezekiel1:13 Bõn-vɩɩsã rag n wẽnda wa bug-saala. Bãmb dag n wẽnda bug-witim, la bug-vɩlense. La bugum n dag n pɩʋʋmd b sʋkã. Bugmã rag n tãoosda vẽenem, la sa-yãgb n dag n yit bugmã pʋga." 
Ezekiel1:14 La bõn-vɩɩsã rag n zoet n kẽngdame la b watẽ, wa sa-tãse." 
Ezekiel1:15 Mam dag n geta bõn-vɩɩsã, la bãmb sɛɛgẽ, ruzãnt n dag n dɩg tẽng bõn-vɩɩsã ned kam fãa nens a naasã taoore." 
Ezekiel1:16 La ruzãnt-dãmbã rag n yãgda wa kirzoliti, la a naasã fãa rag n wẽnda taaba. Bãmb yalẽ wã ne b naandã rag n wẽnda wa ruzãnt fãa saga a to pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel1:17 Bãmb sẽn dat n kẽng kɩreng ning fãa kɩrems a naasã sʋka, b ka baood n wẽnemd ye." 
Ezekiel1:18 Bãmb b naasã fãa ruzãnt-dãmbã rag n yaa zãonglg wʋsgo, n pid ne nin b zĩig fãa." 
Ezekiel1:19 La bõn-vɩɩsã sã n dag n kẽnda, ruzãnt-dãmbã me yegda bãmba. La bon-vɩɩsã sã n zẽk yĩngri, ruzãnt-dãmbã me tũud n zẽkame." 
Ezekiel1:20 Sɩɩgã sẽn kẽndẽ fãa, bõn-vɩɩsã me kẽnda be. Bala, bõn-vɩɩsã sɩɩg rag n bee b ruzãnt-dãmbẽ wã." 
Ezekiel1:21 Bõn-vɩɩsã sã n dag n kẽnda, ruzãnt-dãmbã kẽndame. La b sã n yalse, ruzãnt-dãmbã me yalsdame, b sã n zẽkdẽ, ruzãnt-dãmbã me naagd n zẽkdame, bala, sẽn vɩ-a wã sɩɩg rag n bee ruzãnt-rãmbã pʋse." 
Ezekiel1:22 La bũmb sẽn wẽnd sa-gãongo, n pɩnd wa vɛɛr n kẽesd dabeem n dag n be bõn-vɩɩsã zugẽ n laandẽ." 
Ezekiel1:23 La sa-gãongã tẽngre, bãmb dag n yɛdga b pɩgs a yiibã tɩrg n sɩɩs taaba, la bãmb ned kam fãa pɩgs a yiib a taabã rag n luda a yĩngã." 
Ezekiel1:24 Bõn-vɩɩsã sã n dag n kẽnda, mam wʋmda b pɩgsã rãamd sẽn wẽnd ko-kãsengã bʋrgo, bɩ Pãng-Soabã koɛɛga. La bʋrgã rag n yaa kãseng wa tãb-bi-kʋʋng bʋrgo. La b sã n yalse, b sikda b pɩgsã." 
Ezekiel1:25 La koɛɛg n dag n yit sa-gãongã sẽn dag n be bõn-vɩɩsã zugẽ wã zugẽ, la bãmb sã n dag n yalse, b sikda b pɩgsã." 
Ezekiel1:26 La sa-gãongã sẽn be bõn-vɩɩsã zugẽ wã zugẽ, bũmb n dag n be beenẽ n wẽnd safɩɩre, n leb n wẽnd geere. La bũmb ning sẽn wẽnd geerã zugu, bũmb n dag n be beenẽ t'a yalẽ wã wẽnd ninsaala." 
Ezekiel1:27 Mam leb n yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd bug-pãrse, n yaa wa bugum n pɩnd zĩigã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne yẽnda sɛɛgã sẽnẽ n tãag yĩngri, la sẽn sɩng ne yẽnda sɛɛgã sẽnẽ n tãag tẽngre. Mam leb n yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd bugum vẽenem sẽn gũbg yẽnda." 
Ezekiel1:28 La vẽenem ning sẽn dag n gũbg yẽnda wã rag n wẽnda wa saag gomtɩʋʋg sẽn pukd sawatẽ saag niib daarã. A yalẽ wã rag n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã wẽnego. La mam sẽn yã bõn-kãngã, mam lʋɩɩme n fõgen m neng tẽnga, la mam wʋma ned sẽn gomda koɛɛga." 
Ezekiel2:1 Koɛɛgã yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, yik n yals yĩngr tɩ m gom ne-fo.»" 
Ezekiel2:2 La a sẽn yeel maam woto wã bal yee, sɩɩg n wa n kẽ maam n kɩt tɩ m yik n yals yĩngri. Dẽ, mam dag n kelgda ned ning sẽn gomd-a ne maamã." 
Ezekiel2:3 A yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, yaa maam n tʋmd foom Israyɛll nebã nengẽ, buud ning sẽn yaa tõatã nengẽ, buud ning sẽn kɩɩs-a maamã nengẽ. Bãmb ne b yaab-rãmbã kɩɩsa maam hal n tãag rũndã." 
Ezekiel2:4 Mam tʋmda foom nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa sũ-keglem dãmb ne nin-tõtsã nengẽ tɩ f tɩ yeel-b tɩ yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gomde. 
Ezekiel2:5 B kelgɩ woo, b ka kelg woo, b na n bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs n be b sʋka. Bala, bãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata." 
Ezekiel2:6 La foom a ninsaala, da zoe bãmb ye, da zoe b goamã rabeem ye. Bala, fo bee ne neb sẽn yaa wa gõose, la wa gõ-payãndse la fo na n zĩnda nams zutu. Da zoe b goamã rabeem ye, la ra bas tɩ b nensã yɛɛs foom ye. Bala, yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata." 
Ezekiel2:7 Bãmb kelgɩ foom woo, b ka kelg-f woo, togs-b mam goamã! Bala, b yaa nin-tõtse." 
Ezekiel2:8 La foom a ninsaala, kelg mam sẽn yet foomã: ‹Ra yɩ tõat wa nin-bãmbã sẽn yaa buud sẽn yaa tõatã ye! Yaag f noor n deeg mam sẽn na n kõ foomã n wãbe!› »" 
Ezekiel2:9 Mam gesame, la m yãnda nug sẽn tẽeg n tees maam n zãad seb-pindga." 
Ezekiel2:10 La b pilga sebrã mam taoore, la a pʋga ne a poorã fãa rag n tara gʋlsem. La goam ning sẽn gʋls be wã yaa wiisgu, yãbr la wõosg goamã." 
Ezekiel3:1 Dẽ, sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã yeelame yaa: «Ninsaala, wãb bũmb ning fo sẽn ne wã, reeg seb-pind-kãngã n wãbe! La f kẽng n tɩ gom ne Israyɛll nebã.»" 
Ezekiel3:2 La mam yaaga m noorã, t'a kɩt tɩ mam wãb sebrã." 
Ezekiel3:3 La yẽnda yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, wãb sebr ning mam sẽn kõ foomã n pids f pʋga!» La mam wãba sebrã, la a yɩɩ noog mam noorẽ wã wa sɩɩdo." 
Ezekiel3:4 A leb n yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, kẽng Israyɛll buudã nengẽ, n tɩ togs-b mam goamã." 
Ezekiel3:5 Bala, ka buud sẽn gomd goam fo sẽn ka mi, wall goam fo sẽn ka tõe n wʋm a võor nengẽ la mam tʋmd foom ye. Yaa Israyɛll buudã nengẽ." 
Ezekiel3:6 Ka buud toor-toor sẽn gomd goam fo sẽn ka mi, wall goam fo sẽn ka tõe n wʋm a võor nengẽ la mam tʋmd foom ye. Sã n dag n yaẽ nin-bãmb nengẽ la mam tʋm foom, b rag n na n kelgẽ-la foom." 
Ezekiel3:7 La Israyɛll buudã ka na n dat n kelg foom ye, bãmb sẽn ka rat n kelg maamã yĩnga. Bala, Israyɛll buudã fãa yaa tõatba, n yaa sũ-keglem dãmba." 
Ezekiel3:8 Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f nengã yɩ kɛgenga, wa bãmb dẽndã, la m kɩt tɩ f yɩ sũ-keglem soab wa bãmba." 
Ezekiel3:9 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f nengã kʋɩ wa diyaama sẽn yaa kɛgeng n yɩɩd pĩigã. Ra zoe-b ye, la f ra bas tɩ b kẽes-f rabeem ye. Bala, b yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata.»" 
Ezekiel3:10 Sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, yok f tʋb n kelg goam nins mam sẽn togsd foomã, n dɩk-a n bĩng f sũurẽ." 
Ezekiel3:11 Yik n kẽng f buudã neb sẽn be yembd pʋgã nengẽ n tɩ gom ne bãmba. B kelgẽ woo, b ka kelg woo, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeta.»" 
Ezekiel3:12 Dẽ zugẽ, Sɩɩgã zẽka maam, la mam wʋma koe-kãseng mam poorẽ wã sẽn yet yaa: «Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã paam pẽgre, b sẽn beẽ wã pʋga.»" 
Ezekiel3:13 La mam wʋma bõn-vɩɩs a naasã pɩgsã sẽn pãbd taab bʋrgo, la ruzãnt-rãmbã bʋrgo, la koe-kãseng sẽn sãta." 
Ezekiel3:14 Sɩɩgã zẽka maam n tall n looge. La mam looga ne sũ-toogo, la sũ-puugri, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab nug sẽn tar pãngã rag n sooga maam." 
Ezekiel3:15 La mam taa yembs nins sẽn be Tɛll-Avɩɩv tẽngã sẽn be Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã nengẽ, la mam paa bãmb sʋk beenẽ rasem a yopoe ne sũ-sãan-kãsenga." 
Ezekiel3:16 La rasem a yopoe wã zugẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel3:17 «Ninsaala, mam kɩtame tɩ fo lebg gũud Israyɛll buudã yĩnga. Kelg gomd ning sẽn na n yi mam noorẽ wã, n keoog-b n kõ-ma." 
Ezekiel3:18 Mam sã n yeel nin-wẽng t'a na n kiime, tɩ fo ka keoog-a, fo sã n ka gome, n keoog nin-wẽngã t'a bas a manesem-wẽngã n fãag a vɩɩmã, a na n ki a kongrã pʋga, la mam na n ning foom taal a zɩɩmã raagr yĩnga." 
Ezekiel3:19 La fo sã n keoog nin-wẽngã t'a baas n ka bas a manesem-wẽngã ne a so-wẽngã, yẽnda na n ki a kongrã pʋga, taal ka nan zĩnd fo zug ye." 
Ezekiel3:20 Nin-tɩrg sã n bas a tɩrlmã, n maan wẽnga, mam na n ninga kug-lakdg yẽnda taoore, t'a lak n lʋɩ n ki. Fo sã n ka keoog-a, a na n ki-a yel-wẽnã pʋga. B ka na n leb n tẽeg tɩrlem tʋʋm nins yẽnda sẽn dag n maanã yell ye. La mam na n ninga foom taal a sẽn ki wã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel3:21 La fo sã n keoog nin-tɩrg n yeel-a t'a ra maan yel-wẽnã, t'a sak n ka maan yel-wẽnã, yẽnda na n põsame n vɩɩmde, a sẽn paam keoogrã yĩnga, la fo na n põsame.»" 
Ezekiel3:22 La beenẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã leb n siga mam zugu. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Yi n kẽng tãn-longẽ wã, tɩ m na n goma ne-f beenẽ.»" 
Ezekiel3:23 Dẽ, mam yi n kẽnga tãn-longẽ wã, la mam yãnda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã sẽn be beenẽ, wa mam sẽn dag n yãnd-a Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã. Dẽ, mam lʋɩɩme n fõgen m neng tẽnga." 
Ezekiel3:24 Sɩɩgã kẽe maam n kɩt tɩ mam yik n yals yĩngri. La a yeel-a maam yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ pag f meng f roogẽ wã. 
Ezekiel3:25 Foom a ninsaala, b na n sẽba foom ne wĩya, tɩ fo ra yi n kẽng bãmb sʋk ye." 
Ezekiel3:26 La mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo zelemdã tabend f ragsendakã, tɩ f lebg muk n ka tõe n leng-b ye. Bala, bãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata." 
Ezekiel3:27 La mam sã n wa gom ne foom, m na n laka f zelemdã tɩ f yeel-b yaa: ‹Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Sẽn na n kelg-a bɩ a kelge, la sẽn ka rat n kelg-a bɩ a ra kelg ye. Bala, bãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata.› »" 
Ezekiel4:1 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela maam yaa: «Foom a ninsaala, rɩk tãn-koeemd n dɩgl f taoore, n sõog Zeruzalɛm tẽngã naand a zugu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Maan wa b sẽn dat n gũbg-a n zab ne-a, tu bok n gũbg-a, n zam tom-dʋy n gilg-a. Tilg tãb-sigs n gilg-a, la f tilg zab-teed nins b sẽn tar n tãad lals n lubdẽ wã n gilg-a." 
Ezekiel4:3 Bɩ f rɩk kut laag n tilg t'a yɩ wa kut lalg foom ne tẽngã sʋka. La f wẽnemd f neng n tees tẽngã n yeel tɩ b gũbg-a n zab ne-a. Bɩ b gũbg-a tɩ yɩ bãnd Israyɛll buudã yĩnga. 
Ezekiel4:4 Foom, bɩ f gãand f nug-goabgã zugu, la f rɩgl Israyɛll buudã kongr beenẽ. Fo sẽn na n gãand f nug-goabgã zug tɛk fãa, fo na n zɩɩ Israyɛll buudã kongrã." 
Ezekiel4:5 La maam, mam na n kõo foom rasem sõor ning fo sẽn na n zɩ Israyɛll buudã kongrã. Yaa rasem kobs-tã la pis-wɛ, wa sẽn zems Israyɛll buudã sẽn zĩnd kongr pʋgã yʋʋm sõore." 
Ezekiel4:6 Fo sã n wa n pids rasem-kãens sõorã, bɩ f wẽnemd n gãand f nug-rɩtgã zugu, n tʋk Zʋʋda buudã kongr dasem pis-naase. Mam kõta foom daar a ye yʋʋmd fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel4:7 Dẽ zugẽ, bɩ f wẽnemd f nengã la f zẽk f nug zaal n tees Zeruzalɛm tẽngã b sẽn gũbgã, n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Ezekiel4:8 La gese, mam na n sẽba foom ne wĩyã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ f ra tõog n lebg f nugu, hal tɩ daar ning b sẽn yãk n kõ foomã ta." 
Ezekiel4:9 La bɩ fo rɩk bɩle ne Oorz la bɛng ne lãntiy la ki ne kĩu, n ning bũmb pʋg n kalem n tall n maan bur n wãb rasem kobs-tã la pis-wɛ wã fãa fo sẽn na n gãand f nug-goabgã zugã." 
Ezekiel4:10 Fo na n magda f rɩɩbã n dɩtẽ. La daar fãa, na n yɩɩ sutg pʋgẽ dɩɩb la fo na n dɩt wakat-kãng fãa pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel4:11 La fo na n yũuda koom wũmbl pʋgẽ daar fãa, wakat-kãng fãa pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel4:12 Fo na n wãbda Oorz miisdu. La f na n kɩtame tɩ b rõos-a ninsaal bĩn-koeems zugu, n kɩɩm-a nebã fãa nifẽ.»" 
Ezekiel4:13 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Yaa woto la Israyɛll kambã na n dɩt b rɩ-rẽgdã, buud nins fãa pʋgẽ mam sẽn na n dig-b tɩ b kẽngã sʋka.»" 
Ezekiel4:14 La mam yeelame: «Kayto! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, hal mam yãadem wakat n tãag rũndã, mam zɩ n dẽgem m meng ye. Mam zɩ n wãb rũng sẽn ki a toore, bɩ we-rũng sẽn zendem n base, wall nem-dẽgd buud ba a yembr nan ka kẽ mam noorẽ ye.»" 
Ezekiel4:15 Bãmb yeela maam yaa: «Beneere, bas ninsaal bĩndã, tɩ m kõ-f nag-bĩnd tɩ f rõos f miisdã be.»" 
Ezekiel4:16 Bãmb leb n yeela maam: «Ninsaala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ rɩɩb menem Zeruzalɛm. Nebã na n magda b rɩɩbã n dɩtẽ, la b magd b koomã n yũud ne pelen-yɩgre." 
Ezekiel4:17 Woto, rɩɩb ne koom na n paoog-b lame, la bãmb ned kam fãa na n zĩi ne pelen-yɩka. Bãmb na n põoga b kongrã pʋga.»" 
Ezekiel5:1 Foom a ninsaala, rɩk zabr sʋʋg sẽn dɩte, n tall-a wa barga, n põng f zugã ne f toɛɛngã. Dẽ zugẽ, bɩ f rɩk zɩslem makdga, n mak zoobdã, n weel-a rʋyã." 
Ezekiel5:2 B sã n wa gũbg tẽngã n zab n deeg-a n sɛ, bɩ f rɩk zoobdã rʋr a yembr n yõog bugum tẽngã sʋka. La f rɩk rʋr a yembr n kʋʋs ne sʋʋgã n lob n gilg tẽngã. La f rɩk rʋr a yembrã n fãeeg tɩ sebgã rɩke, tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ b rig-b ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel5:3 La fo na n yãka zoobdã bilf n yod f fuugã noore. 
Ezekiel5:4 La f leb n yãk bilf n los bugmã pʋg tɩ bugmã rɩ. La bugum n na n yi be n dɩ Israyɛll buudã zãnga. 
Ezekiel5:5 Ad Zu-soabã Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Zeruzalɛm la woto, mam ning-a-la buud toay-toayã sʋka, la tẽmsã gũbg-a lame." 
Ezekiel5:6 La yẽnda kɩɩsa mam noyã ne m no-tũudsã. Yẽnda tʋʋm-wẽnsã yɩɩga tẽms a taabã sẽn gũbg yẽnda wã, bala, bãmb basa mam noyã ne m no-tũudsã." 
Ezekiel5:7 La bõn-kãens yĩnga, ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: ‹Yãmb sẽn yik n kɩɩs maam n yɩɩd buud a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmbã, la y ka tũ m noyã ne m no-tũudsã, la y sẽn ka tũ baa buud a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmbã minindã yĩnga,›" 
Ezekiel5:8 bõn-kãens yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Gese, mam mengã zabda ne foom, la m na n kao-f bʋʋd buud toay-toayã nifẽ.›" 
Ezekiel5:9 Mam na n sɩbga foom ne sɩbgr mam sẽn na zɩ n sɩbge, la mam sẽn kõ n tol n leb n sɩbge. La bõn-kãens fãa yaa yel-beed nins fãa fo sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel5:10 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m na n kɩt tɩ ba-rãmb wãb b kamba, tɩ kamb wãb b ba-rãmba. Mam na n kaoo yãmb bʋʋd n kɩt tɩ y neb nins sẽn na n kellã sãeeg zĩigã fãa." 
Ezekiel5:11 Yãmb sẽn dẽgem mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã ne y yel-yoodã, la y yel-beedã yĩnga, mam wẽenda ne m mengã tɩ mam me na n bas-y lame, la m ka na n zoe y nimbãaneg ye. Mam ka na n bas yãmb ned ba a yembr tɩ põs ye." 
Ezekiel5:12 Fo nebã sʋka, nin-yɛng neb a tãab sʋk na n kii ne bã-loangdga, bɩ kom. La nin-yɛng neb a tãab sʋk na n kii ne zabr sʋʋga, la mam na n sãeega neb a taabã zĩig zãnga, n kɩt tɩ b rig-b ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel5:13 Mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne bãmb n tãag a tɛka, m na n doka m sũurã ne bãmba, tɩ m sũurã yaool n sigi. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gom ne bãmb m nonglem-kãsengã pʋgẽ, mam sũurã sẽn na n yik ne bãmb n tãag a tɛkã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel5:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg raboogo, la buud a taabã sẽn gũbg foomã na n yaal-f-la so-loaadbã fãa nifẽ." 
Ezekiel5:15 Buud a taabã sẽn gũbg foomã na n yaala foom, la b tʋ foom, la fo na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn wat ne sũ-sãanga, la saglgo, ne bãmb yĩnga, wakat ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg foom sɩbg-kãsengã, m sũ-yikrã ne m sũ-puugrã pʋgẽ wã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome." 
Ezekiel5:16 Mam sã n wa na n kɩt tɩ komã kẽ bãmb n sãam-b wa b sẽn tãood ned pɛɛmã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ komã wa sãam yãmba. Mam na n waa ne kom n paas tood nins fãa sẽn zoe n paam yãmbã, la m na n deega y rɩɩbã n bas-yã." 
Ezekiel5:17 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kom wa kʋ-yã, la m kɩt tɩ rũm-toos kʋ y kambã. Bã-longds ne zɩɩm daagr na n pɩʋʋga y sʋka, la m na kɩtame tɩ zabr sʋʋg wa kʋ-yã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome.»" 
Ezekiel6:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Ezekiel6:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees Israyɛll tãmsã n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel yaa:" 
Ezekiel6:3 ‹Israyɛll tãmse, kelg-y Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã! Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gomd ne tãmsã ne kunkubã, la bogdã ne londã n yetẽ: ‹Mam mengã n na n kɩt tɩ b wa zab ne yãmba, n kɩt tɩ b menes y maoong kʋʋb zĩisã." 
Ezekiel6:4 B na n sãama y tẽn-kugã, la b wã y wisd yõogr laasã, la b kʋ y nebã n dʋʋg y wẽn-naandsã taoore." 
Ezekiel6:5 Mam na n dʋʋga Israyɛll nebã kũum b wẽn-naandsã taoore. Mam na n sãeega y kõabã n gilg y tẽn-kugã. 
Ezekiel6:6 Yãmb sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, b na n kɩtame tɩ y tẽmsã lebg raboodo, la b sãam y maoong kʋʋb zĩisã. Woto, yãmb tẽn-kugã zĩis na n lebga raboodo, b na n wã y wẽn-naandsã tɩ b menem zãnga, b na n wã y wisd yõogr laasã, la b na n menesa yãmb nus tʋʋmã." 
Ezekiel6:7 Yãmb sʋkã neb n na n ki. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ yaa maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel6:8 La baoosgo, yãmb sã n wa sãeeg n be tẽmsã fãa pʋse, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb neb kẽer põs zabr sʋʋga, buud toay-toayã sʋka." 
Ezekiel6:9 Dẽ, bãmb sã n wa be buud toay-toayã sʋka, zĩig ning b sẽn na n tall bãmb n tɩ kẽes yembdã, yãmb neb nins sẽn põsã na n tẽega mam yelle, soab ning sẽn sãam-a bãmb sũyã sẽn yaa yoaadb sũyã sẽn wẽnemd n zãag ne maamã, la bãmb ninã sẽn dag n get b wẽn-naandsã ne yoob gesgã. Bãmb yam na n yi b mense, b tʋʋm-wẽnsã ne b yel-beedã fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel6:10 Woto, bãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la mam sẽn gom tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ to-kãngã paam-bã ka zaalem yĩng ye.»" 
Ezekiel6:11 Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Mobg f noor n gir f zug Israyɛll buudã yel-beedã yĩnga, la ne bãmb sẽn na n ki ne zabr sʋʋgã yĩnga, la kom ne bãn-longdsã yĩng n yeel tɩ kayto!" 
Ezekiel6:12 Sẽn be-a zĩ-zãrgẽ na n kii ne bã-loangdga, la sẽn pẽ-a na n kii ne zabr sʋʋga, la sẽn na n põs-a n ka ki, kom n na n kʋ-a. Mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne bãmb n tãag a tɛka." 
Ezekiel6:13 Dẽ, kũumã sã n wa rʋr bãmb wẽn-naandsã sʋka, n gilg b tẽn-kugã, n be b kunkubã ne tãmsã zutu, ne b tɩɩs sẽn tar maasmã tẽngre, la b tɩ-bɛdã sẽn yaa bĩmm wã tẽngre, zĩig ning bãmb sẽn yõogd kũun sẽn tar yũ-noog b wẽn-naandsã fãa yĩngã, b na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel6:14 Mam na n tẽega m nug n zab ne bãmb n kɩt tɩ tẽngã lebg vɩʋʋgo, la a na n yɩɩ zĩ-vɩʋʋg n yɩɩd Dibla we-raoogã, zĩis nins fãa bãmb sẽn be wã pʋgẽ. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel7:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Ezekiel7:2 «La foom a ninsaala, ad maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gomd ne Israyɛll tẽn-gãongã n yetẽ: ‹Sɛɛbã wakat taame! La tẽngã kɩrems a naasã sɛɛb wakat watame." 
Ezekiel7:3 Moasã, sɛɛbã wakat taa fo yĩnga. Mam sũurã na n yika ne foom. Mam na n kaoo fo bʋʋd wa sẽn zems f manesmã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yel-beedã sɩbgr wa f zugu." 
Ezekiel7:4 Mam ka na n zoe f nimbãaneg ye. Mam ka na n bas ned ba a yembr t'a põs ye. Bala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yel-beedã fãa wa f zugu. Fo yel-beedã na n zĩnda f pʋgẽ. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› »" 
Ezekiel7:5 Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Toogo! Toog sẽn ka tar to n wate! 
Ezekiel7:6 Sɛɛbã watame! Sɛɛbã waame n sɛ! A yik n wata fo yĩnga! A na n waame! 
Ezekiel7:7 Tẽngã nebã, yãmb me wakatã watame, daarã watame, pelen-yɩk daarã watame! Sũ-noog kaasg ka na n leb n zĩnd tãmsã zut ye!" 
Ezekiel7:8 Moasã, mam segl n sɛɛme, n na n sik m sũ-puugrã fo zugu. Mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd n tãag a tɛka. Mam na n kaoo fo bʋʋd wa sẽn zems f manesmã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yel-beedã sɩbgr wa f zugu." 
Ezekiel7:9 Mam ka na n zoe f nimbãaneg ye, mam ka na n bas ned ba a yembr t'a põs ye. Bala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yel-beedã wa f zugu. Fo yel-beedã na n zĩnda f pʋgẽ. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn sɩbgda." 
Ezekiel7:10 Ade, daarã waame, a watame! Wakatã watame! Dasaarã ningda puudu! Tɩtaamã lebgda wʋsgo!" 
Ezekiel7:11 Pãn-maanegã yikame n yals n na n yɩ wẽngã dasaare: Bãmb bũmb ba a yembr ka na n pa ye! Bãmb paoongã na n sɛɛme! Bãmb nebã na n sɛɛme! Bãmb ziirã na n sɛɛme. 
Ezekiel7:12 Wakat watame, daarã kolgdame! Bɩ sẽn daad-a ra maan sũ-noog ye. Bɩ sẽn koosd-a ra maan sũ-sãang ye! Bala, mam sũ-puug-kãsengã yika ne tẽngã arzegs fãa." 
Ezekiel7:13 Sɩdã, ned sã n dag n koos a bũmbu, ba a sã n ket n vɩ, a ka na n leb n paam a bũmbã ye. Bala, vẽnegr ning sẽn gomd tẽngã paoongã fãa yellã pidsg ka na n vaal ye. Ned kõn tõog n kogl a vɩɩm a kongr yĩng ye." 
Ezekiel7:14 B peebda baorgo, b segl n sɛɛme, la ned ba a yembr ka kẽnd zabr ye. Bala, mam sũ-puug-kãsengã yika ne tẽngã arzegs fãa." 
Ezekiel7:15 Yɩnga, zabr sʋʋga! Pʋgẽ, bã-longds la kom! Sẽn be-a weoogẽ na n kii ne zabr sʋʋga. La sẽn be-a tẽngã pʋga, kom la bã-loangdg n na n kʋ-a." 
Ezekiel7:16 Bãmb neb nins sẽn põsã zoet n dʋʋda tãmsã zut wa walã sẽn be londã pʋsã. Bãmb ned kam fãa wõosda a meng kongr yĩnga. 
Ezekiel7:17 Bãmb fãa nus pãng sɛɛme, b rũmã fãa komsame." 
Ezekiel7:18 Bãmb sẽgenda boto, la b rigda ne rabeem. Yãnd tara bãmb fãa, bãmb zutã fãa põngame." 
Ezekiel7:19 Bãmb na n loba b wanzuri wã soayã zutu, la bãmb sãnemã na n yɩɩ bõn-dẽgdo, la b wanzuri wã ne b sãnemã, ka na n tõog n fãag-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã daar ye. Bãmb wanzuri wã ne b sãnemã ka tõe n dɩk n ning b noorẽ, la b ka tõe n pids bãmb pʋs me ye. Bala, yaa bõn-kãens n yɩ bãmb kug-lakdga, la yaa bõn-kãens n wa ne b kongrã." 
Ezekiel7:20 Bãmb wuka b mens ne b fan-teedã, bãmb ninga b yel-beedã ne b yel-yoodã naand b fan-teedã zutu. Yaa rẽ tɩ m na n kɩt tɩ b lebg bõn-dẽgd b yĩnga." 
Ezekiel7:21 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sãamb wa fã-ba, la m bas tɩ b lebg tẽngã nin-wẽns laogo, tɩ b tõe n dẽgem-ba." 
Ezekiel7:22 Mam na n tud-b-la m kudga, la b na n dẽgma m laogã bĩngr zĩiga. Fãadb n na n kẽ beenẽ n dẽgm-a." 
Ezekiel7:23 Segl sogle! Bala, tẽngã pida ne zɩɩm daagre, a pida ne pãn-maanego." 
Ezekiel7:24 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud nins sẽn yaa wẽns n yɩɩd buud a taabã wa reeg b yiyã n sooge. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ pãens-rãmbã wuk-m-meng sɛ, la b na n dẽgma bãmb zĩ-sõama wã." 
Ezekiel7:25 Yellã daar watame, nebã na n baoo vɩ-bãane, la vɩ-bãane ka na n zĩnd ye!" 
Ezekiel7:26 Na n yɩɩ toog woo, toogo, na n yɩɩ koe-beed woo, koe-beedo. Bãmb kota no-rɛɛsdbã tɩ b kõ bãmb vẽnegre, maan-kʋʋdbã ka leb n mi tõogã n na n zãms nebã ye, la kãsem-dãmbã ka leb n tar saglg n na n sagl nebã ye." 
Ezekiel7:27 Rĩmã zĩi ne sũ-sãanga, nanambsã sũy pida ne sũ-sãanga, la tẽngã nebã nus rigdame. Mam na n sɩbga bãmb wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã, mam na n kaoo bãmb bʋʋdo, wa bãmb sẽn kaood bʋʋdã to-to wã. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel8:1 B sẽn yõg Israyɛll buudã n kẽes yembd tɩ yʋʋm-yoaablẽ, kiuug a yoob soabã dasem a nu daare, mam dag n zĩ m zakẽ wã, tɩ Zʋʋda kãsem-dãmbã zĩ mam taoore, la Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã gãda maam." 
Ezekiel8:2 Mam gesame, la ade, mam yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaala. La sẽn sɩng a sɛɛgã tɛk n tar n dabd tẽngrã rag n yaa wa bugum. La a sɛɛgã tɛk n tar n dabd zugẽ wã rag n yãnga ne vẽenem sẽn yãgda." 
Ezekiel8:3 Yẽnda tẽega bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaal nug n gãd mam zoobdã. Dẽ, sɩɩgã zẽka maam yĩngri, n tall maam Wẽnnaam vẽnegr pʋsẽ n kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ sik maam tẽngã noor ning sẽn be nug-rɩtgã, zĩig ning sũ-kiir wẽn-naandgã sẽn be, n nekd Wẽnnaam sũ-kiirã." 
Ezekiel8:4 La Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ziir dag n bee be. La bãmb yalẽ wã rag n yaa wa mam sẽn dag n yãnd-a longã pʋgã. 
Ezekiel8:5 La Wẽnnaam yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, mam kotame tɩ f zẽk f nengã n ges rɩtg sẽnẽ! La mam zẽka m neng n ges nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã, n yãnd wẽn-naandg ning sẽn nekd Wẽnnaam sũ-kiirã, t'a be rignoor ning sẽn dabd tẽn-kugrã sẽnẽ wã rɩtgo, kõomã zĩigẽ.»" 
Ezekiel8:6 Bãmb leb n yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo nee Israyɛll buudã sẽn maandã bɩ? Fo nee yel-be-kãsems nins bãmb sẽn maan n kɩt tɩ mam zãag ne m zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã bɩ? La fo na n leb n yãnda yel-be-kãsems a taaba.»" 
Ezekiel8:7 Dẽ, bãmb talla maam n kẽng zakã noore. La mam yãame tɩ lalgã tara võore." 
Ezekiel8:8 La bãmb leb n yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, m kotame tɩ f poog lalgã!» Dẽ, mam poogã lalgã, la lebga noore." 
Ezekiel8:9 Wẽnnaam leb n yeela maam yaa: «Kẽ n ges yel-be-wẽns nins bãmb sẽn maand ka wã!» 
Ezekiel8:10 Mam kẽeme n gese, la mam yãnda bõn-yɩgdɩ ne rũms buud fãa sẽn yaa yel-yoodo, ne Israyɛll buudã wẽn-naands fãa b sẽn kar lalgã zug n gilgi." 
Ezekiel8:11 La Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmb pis-yopoe n dag n yɛs beenẽ, la a Safan biig a Yazaniya dag n yasa bãmb taoore, la b fãa rag n zãada wisd tʋgdo, tɩ wisdã bug-zõos nukdẽ." 
Ezekiel8:12 Bãmb leb n yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo nee Israyɛll buudã kãsem-dãmb sẽn be lik pʋgẽ n maand bũmb ninsã bɩ? Bãmb ned kam fãa roog pida ne wẽn-naandse.» Bãmb yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka ne tõnd ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa tẽngã!»" 
Ezekiel8:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo na n leb n yãnda b sẽn maand yel-beed a taab sẽn yɩɩd woto.»" 
Ezekiel8:14 Dẽ, bãmb leb n talla maam n kẽng Wẽnd doogã rignoor ning sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã. La pagb n dag n zĩ beenẽ n yãbd wẽn-naandg a Tamuuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 La bãmb leb n yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo ka ne sɩda? Fo na n leb n yãnda yel-beed a taab sẽn yɩɩd woto.»" 
Ezekiel8:16 Bãmb leb n talla maam n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zak pʋgẽ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoore, zãongã ne tẽn-kugrã sʋka, raop sõor sẽn kolg pisi la a nu n dag n wẽnemd b poor n tees Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, tɩ b nensã get yaanga. Bãmb dag n wõgemdedame n teesd yaang n waoogd wĩntoogã." 
Ezekiel8:17 La bãmb yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo ka ne sɩda? Dẽ yĩnga, Zʋʋda buudã nebã sẽn maand yel-beed ninsã ka sek-ba, tɩ b ket n kẽngd taoor n kɩɩsd maam n pidsd tẽngã ne pãn-maanego? Ade, bãmb baooda mam noore." 
Ezekiel8:18 Mam na n sɩbg-b-la ne sũ-puugri. Mam ka na n zoe bãmb nimbãanega, la m ka na bas bãmb ned ba a yembr t'a põs ye. Bãmb sã n wa zẽk b koees n kelem n bool maam, mam ka na n kelg-b ye.»" 
Ezekiel9:1 Dẽ zugẽ, mam wʋma Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg sẽn zẽk n yetẽ: «Yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn tog n sɩbg tẽngã, kolg-y-yã! Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa wa ne a sãoong zab-teoogo!" 
Ezekiel9:2 Dẽ, raop a yoob n yi rignoor ning sẽn tees nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ tɩ b boond tɩ rigno-zãntlgã n wa, la bãmb ned kam fãa rag n zãada a sãang zab-teoog a nugẽ. La rao a yembr n dag n be bãmb sʋkã n yer lamd gĩs-bãaneg fuug tɩ gʋlsem sẽn wẽnd ned sẽn gʋls be a sẽbdgẽ wã. Bãmb wa n yalsa zũud tẽn-kugrã sɛɛgẽ." 
Ezekiel9:3 Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ziir zẽkame n bas Serubẽ-rãmbã, zĩig ning a sẽn dag n beẽ wã, n kẽng Wẽnd doogã rignoor sẽnẽ. La a boola soab ning sẽn yer-a lamd gĩs-bãaneg fuugã, tɩ gʋlsem sẽn wẽnd ned sẽn gʋls be a sẽbdgẽ wã.»" 
Ezekiel9:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Saag tẽngã pʋga, saag Zeruzalɛm tẽnga pʋga, n ning neb nins fãa sẽn wẽed sir la b wõosd tʋʋm-beed nins fãa sẽn maand tẽngã pʋgã yĩngã dĩir bãnde.»" 
Ezekiel9:5 La mam nifẽ, a yeela neb a taabã yaa: «Pʋgl-y-yã-a n saag tẽngã n kʋ nebã. Da zoe-y nimbãaneg ye, la y ra bas ned ba a yembr ye." 
Ezekiel9:6 Kʋ-y la y sãam nin-kẽembã, kom-bɩɩsã, pʋg-sadbã, pagbã, la zagsã neb fãa. Bas-y ned ning fãa sẽn tar-a bãndã, la y sɩng ne mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã! Dẽ, bãmb sɩnga ne kãsem-dãmb nins sẽn dag n be Wẽnd doogã noorã.»" 
Ezekiel9:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela bãmb yaa: «Kɩt-y tɩ roogã rẽgme, la y kɩt t'a zagsã pid ne kũum! Yi-y-yã!» Dẽ, bãmb yiime n kẽ tẽngã pʋgẽ n kʋ." 
Ezekiel9:8 La bãmb sẽn wa n ket n kʋʋd tɩ mam yasẽ wã, mam lʋɩɩme n fõgen m neng tẽng n kelem n yeel yaa: «Kayto! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb na n sãama Israyɛll bu-kellã zãnga, n puug y sũurã ne Zeruzalɛm?»" 
Ezekiel9:9 Bãmb leoka maam n yeel yaa: «Israyɛll ne Zʋʋda buudã kongr yaa kãseng tɩ looge. Tẽngã pida ne zɩɩm daagre, la zãmbo, bala, bãmb yetame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab basa tẽngã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka ne baa fɩ ye." 
Ezekiel9:10 Yaa rẽ yĩng tɩ mam ka na n zoe b nimbãaneg ye, la m ka na n bas ned ba a yembr ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yel-manesmã taal lebg n lʋɩ b zugu.»" 
Ezekiel9:11 Rao ning sẽn yer-a lamd gis-bãaneg fuugã tɩ gʋlsem be a sẽbdgẽ wã lebg n wa yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa: «Ade, mam maana bũmb ning yãmb sẽn kõ maam noor tɩ m maanã.»" 
Ezekiel10:1 Mam gesame, la ade, sa-gãong ning sẽn be Serubẽ-rãmbã zugẽ wã zugu, bũmb n dag n be beenẽ n wẽnd safɩɩre. Serubẽ-rãmbã zugẽ, bũmb n dag n be beenẽ t'a yalẽ wã wẽnd geere." 
Ezekiel10:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela rao ning sẽn dag n yer-a lamd gĩs-bãaneg fuugã yaa: «Kẽ ruzãntã sẽn be Serubẽ-rãmbã tẽngrã pʋga, n yõng bug-saal Serubẽ-rãmbã sʋk ne f nusã n lob tẽngã zugu!» La a kẽnga beenẽ mam nifẽ." 
Ezekiel10:3 Raoã sẽn ta wã tɩ Serubẽ-rãmbã rag n yasa roogã nug-rɩtgo, la sawad-taok n dag n pid pʋgẽ zakã." 
Ezekiel10:4 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã yii Serubẽ-rãmbã zugẽ n zẽk n tɩ be roogã rigno-koakẽ. La sawad-taokã pida roogã, la zakã pida ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã vẽenem." 
Ezekiel10:5 Serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgsã bʋrgã rãamd rag n sãtame hal n tat pipi samandã, la b bʋrgã rag n wẽnda Pãng-Soabã koɛɛg b sẽn wat n gomdã." 
Ezekiel10:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel ned ning sẽn yer lamd fuugã t'a yãk bugmã sẽn be ruzãntã pʋg Serubẽ-rãmbã sʋkã, kẽngame n tɩ yals ruzãntã sɛɛga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Dẽ, serubẽ-rãmbã ned a yembr tẽega a nugu, n yãk bugmã sẽn be bãmb sʋkã, n ning ned ning sẽn yer lamd gĩs-bãaneg fuugã nusẽ t'a zã n yi." 
Ezekiel10:8 Bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaal nus n dag n be serubẽ-rãmbã pɩgsã tẽngre. 
Ezekiel10:9 Mam gesame, la ade, ruzãnt-rãmb a naas n dag n be serubẽ-rãmbã sɛɛga, rat n yeel tɩ serubẽ fãa sɛɛgẽ, ruzãnt a yembr n be be. La ruzãnt-bãmb rag n pɩnda wa kirzoliti." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ruzãnt-dãmb a naasã fãa yalẽ rag n wẽnda taaba, la ruzãnt fãa rag n wẽnda wa a be a to pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel10:11 Bãmb sẽn dat n kẽng kɩreng ning fãa kɩrems a naasã sʋka, b ka baood n wẽnemd ye. Bãmb sã n kẽnda, b ka wẽnemded ye. Bãmb kẽnda neng fãa sẽn teesẽ n ka wẽnemdedẽ ye." 
Ezekiel10:12 Serubẽ-rãmbã yĩngã tõre, b poayã, b nusã, b pɩgsã, ne b ruzãnt-rãmb a naasã fãa rag n pida ne nin b zĩigã fãa." 
Ezekiel10:13 La mam wʋma b sẽn boond ruzãnt-dãmbã tɩ bõn-gilsi. 
Ezekiel10:14 Serubẽ fãa rag n tara nens a naase. Pipi soabã neng rag n yaa serubẽ nenga, la a yiibẽ soabã neng rag n yaa ninsaal nenga, tɩ tãabẽ soabã neng yaa gɩgemd nenga, tɩ naasẽ soabã yaa pa-nand-tugr nenga." 
Ezekiel10:15 La Serubẽ-rãmbã zẽka yĩngri. Rag n yaa bõn-vɩɩg ning mam sẽn dag n yãnd Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã. 
Ezekiel10:16 Serubẽ-rãmbã sã n dag n kẽnda, ruzãnt-rãmbã me tũuda bãmb n kẽnda. La b sã n dag n yidg b pɩgsã n na n yɩke, ruzãnt-rãmbã sẽn be b sɛɛgẽ wã me tũud n yɩkdame." 
Ezekiel10:17 La serubẽ-rãmbã sã n dag n yalse, ruzãnt-rãmbã me yalsdame. La b sã n dag n zẽke, ruzãnt-rãmbã me tũuda bãmb n zẽke. Bala, bõn-vɩɩgã sɩɩg rag n bee ruzãnt-dãmbã pʋsẽ." 
Ezekiel10:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã yii Wẽnd doogã noor n kẽng n tɩ yals Serubẽ-rãmbã zugẽ. 
Ezekiel10:19 Serubẽ-rãmbã yidga b pɩgsã n yɩk n loog ne b ruzãnt-rãmbã mam nifẽ. La bãmb tɩ yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã noor ning sẽn be yaangã, la Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ziir dag n bee yĩngri, bãmb zugẽ wã." 
Ezekiel10:20 Rag n yaa bõn-vɩɩg ning mam sẽn dag n yãnd Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã tẽngrã, Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã, la mam bãngame tɩ yaa serubẽ-rãmba." 
Ezekiel10:21 Serubẽ fãa rag n tara nens a naas ne pɩgs a naase, la bãmb pɩgsã tẽngre, bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaal nus n dag n be beenẽ." 
Ezekiel10:22 Bãmb nensã wẽnda nens nins mam sẽn dag n yãnd Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã. B yalẽ wã rag n yaa a yembre, rag n yaa bãmb bala. Bãmb ned kam fãa rag n kẽnda a taoor tɩrg bala." 
Ezekiel11:1 Sɩɩg n zẽk maam n tall n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã rignoor ning sẽn tees-a yaang sẽnẽ. Rignoorẽ wã, raop pisi la a nu n dag n be beenẽ. La bãmb sʋkã, mam yãnda a Azʋʋr biig a Yazaniya ne a Benaya biig a Pelatɩya sẽn yaa nebã nanambsã." 
Ezekiel11:2 Sɩɩgã yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, yaa nin-bãmbã la sẽn set sed-wẽnsã, la b saagd saag-wẽns tẽn-kãngã pʋgã.»" 
Ezekiel11:3 Bãmb yetame: «Tõnd ka segl n sɛ tɩ me rot ye. Bala, tẽngã yaa wa rʋko, tɩ tõnd yaa wa nemdo!»" 
Ezekiel11:4 Woto yĩnga, ninsaala, togs-b pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n mong-b bʋʋm." 
Ezekiel11:5 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɩɩgã waa mam zugu, n yeel maam yaa: Yeel a woto: «Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Israyɛll buudu! Yaa woto la yãmb gomda! La bũmb nins sẽn be yãmb tagsgẽ wã, mam miime." 
Ezekiel11:6 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ yãmb sẽn kʋ neb nins tẽn-kãngã pʋgẽ wã sõor paase. Yãmb pids-a soayã ne kũum. 
Ezekiel11:7 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame, tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ: «Neb nins yãmb sẽn kʋ n dʋʋg tẽngã pʋgã yaa wa nemdo, la tẽngã yaa wa rʋko, la sã n yaa ne yãmba, b na n diga yãmb n yiis tẽngã pʋga.› »" 
Ezekiel11:8 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb zoeta zabr sʋʋga, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wa zab ne yãmb ne zabr sʋʋga.»" 
Ezekiel11:9 Mam na n yiis-a yãmb tẽngã pʋga, mam dɩka yãmb n bas ne bu-zẽmse! La mam na n kaoo yãmb bʋʋdo." 
Ezekiel11:10 Yãmb na n kii ne zabr sʋʋga, mam na n kaoo yãmb bʋʋd Israyɛll tẽngã toadgẽ, la woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel11:11 Tẽngã ka na n yɩ wa rʋk yãmb yĩnga, tɩ yãmb yaa wa nemd a pʋgẽ ye: «Yaa Israyɛll toadgã sẽnẽ la m na n kao y bʋʋdo." 
Ezekiel11:12 Woto, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, yãmb ka sak mam tõodã ne m noyã ye. Yãmb bas n tũu buud a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmbã minindu.»" 
Ezekiel11:13 Dẽ, mam sẽn ket n togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã wakate, la a Benaya biig a Pelatɩya sẽn be kũumẽ. Mam lʋɩ n fõgna m neng tẽng n kelem n yeele: «Kayto! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb meng n na n baas Israyɛll bu-kellã!»" 
Ezekiel11:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel11:15 «Ninsaala, yaa fo saam-biisã, ne fo roagdbã, la Israyɛll buudã zãng ne Zeruzalɛm nebã n gomd n yetẽ: ‹Zãag-y y meng ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, b kõo tõnd tẽn-kãngã tɩ d sooge.› »" 
Ezekiel11:16 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, bɩ f togs bãmb tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel la woto: «Baa mam sã n dag n yiisa bãmb n sãeeg-b bu-zẽmsã sʋka, baoosgo, wakat bilf pʋgẽ, mam yɩɩ zĩig sẽn welg toor bãmb yĩng tẽng ning bãmb sẽn kẽngã pʋgẽ.»" 
Ezekiel11:17 Yaa rẽ tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ yaa: «Ade, mam na n tigsa yãmb buud a taabã fãa sʋka, mam na n yiisa yãmb tẽms nins yãmb sẽn sãeeg n tɩ beẽ wã, la m leb n kõ yãmb Israyɛll tẽngã." 
Ezekiel11:18 Bãmb sã n wa ta Israyɛll tẽngẽ wã, b na n menesa yel-yoodã ne yel-beedã fãa sẽn be beenẽ wã." 
Ezekiel11:19 Mam na n kõo bãmb sũur a yembre, la m kõ yãmb yam-paalga. Mam na n yãka b sũurã sẽn yaa wa kugrã, n lebs n ning sũur sẽn yaa neongo," 
Ezekiel11:20 tɩ b tõe n sak m tõodã ne m minindã, la b tũ-ba. Woto, bãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel11:21 La sã n yaa ne neb nins sũyã sẽn noom ne b mens yel-yoodã la yel-beedã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yel-manesmã taal lebg n lʋɩ b zugu. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel11:22 Serubẽ-rãmbã sẽn dag n be ne ruzãnt-rãmbã yidga b pɩgsã, la Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ziir dag n bee yĩngri, bãmb zugẽ." 
Ezekiel11:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã zẽkame n bas tẽngã n tɩ be tãng ning sẽn be tẽngã yaangã zugu. 
Ezekiel11:24 Sɩɩg n zẽk maam vẽnegr pʋgẽ, n tall n kẽng yembsã sẽn be Kalde rãmbã soolem pʋgẽ wã sʋka, ne Wẽnnaam sɩɩgã pãnga. La mam sẽn dag n paam vẽnegr ningã zẽk n loogame n bas maam." 
Ezekiel11:25 Dẽ, mam togsa yembsã koees nins fãa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vẽneg maamã." 
Ezekiel12:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel12:2 «Ninsaala, fo bee ne buud sẽn yaa tõata. Bãmb tara nin n tog n yã, la b ka rat n yãnd ye, b tara tʋb n tog n kelge, la b ka rat n kelg ye. Bala, bãmb yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata." 
Ezekiel12:3 La foom a ninsaala, sẽb f teed yembd kẽnd yĩnga. Yi n loog yembd wĩnto-sʋk bãmb nifẽ! Yi zĩig ning fo sẽn beẽ wã n kẽng yembd zĩig a to, bãmb nifẽ. Daarninga, b na yãnd tɩ b yaa buud sẽn yaa tõata." 
Ezekiel12:4 Fo na n yiisa f teedã wĩnto-sʋk bãmb nifẽ, la fo na n yii zaabr n loog bãmb nifẽ, wa yembsã." 
Ezekiel12:5 Poog lalgã bãmb nifẽ, n tũ be n yi ne f teedã." 
Ezekiel12:6 Rɩk f teedã n palg f bãok bãmb nifẽ. Yi ne f teedã ne lika. Lud f nengã n da ges tẽngã ye. Bala, mam datame tɩ yɩ bãnd Israyɛll buudã yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel12:7 Dẽ, mam maana wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag yeel maamã: Mam yiisa m teedã wĩnto-sʋka, wa ned sẽn dabd yembd teedo. La sẽn ta zaabre, mam pooga lalgã ne m nugu, n yiis m teedã ne lika, n palg-a m bãok bãmb nifẽ." 
Ezekiel12:8 La vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa:" 
Ezekiel12:9 «Ninsaala, dẽ yĩnga, Israyɛll buudã sẽn yaa tõatã ka sok foom n ges yaa bõe la f maand sɩda?»" 
Ezekiel12:10 Yeel bãmb tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Sɩbgr koe-kãngã yaa naab ning sẽn be-a Zeruzalɛmã yĩnga, la Israyɛll buudã sẽn be beenẽ wã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel12:11 Yeel yaa: Ade, mam yaa bãnd yãmb yĩnga. Mam sẽn maan bũmb ningã, yaa bõn-kãng n na n paam pidsg bãmb yĩnga: bãmb na n looga yembdo." 
Ezekiel12:12 Naab ning sẽn be bãmb sʋkã na n dɩka a teed n palg a bãok ne lik n yi. B na n pooga lalgã n yiis-a beenẽ. Yẽnda na n luda a nengã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n da ges tẽngã ye." 
Ezekiel12:13 Mam na n tẽega m gãmbrã yẽnda zugu, la yẽnda na n lʋɩɩ mam bẽdga pʋga. Mam na n talla yẽnda n kẽng Babilonde, Kalde rãmbã tẽngẽ. La yẽnda nif ka na n yãnd tẽngã ye, a na paa beenẽ n ki." 
Ezekiel12:14 Mam na n sãeega neb nins fãa sẽn gũbg yẽnda wã, a sõgen-kambã, a gũudbã ne a tãb-biisã fãa zĩig zãnga, n kɩt tɩ b rig bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel12:15 Mam sã n wa sãeeg bãmb buud toay-toayã sʋka, la tẽmsã fãa pʋse. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel12:16 La mam na n basa bãmb neb kẽer bãmb sʋkã sẽn na n põs zabr sʋʋg ne kom la bãn-longdsã, tɩ bãmb tõe n togs yel-beed nins bãmb sẽn maan bu-zẽms nins bãmb sẽn na n kẽngã sʋka. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel12:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel12:18 «Ninsaala, fo na n dɩta f rɩɩbã la f rigda, la f yũud f koomã ne rabeem la yɛɛsgo," 
Ezekiel12:19 la fo na n goma ne tẽngã neb n yeel-b yaa: ‹Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gomd ne Zeruzalɛm nebã sẽn be Israyɛll soolmã pʋgã n yetẽ: ‹Bãmb na n dɩta b rɩɩbã ne rigbu, n yũud b koomã ne pelen-yɩka. Bala, tẽngã na n sãamame, la b na n yiisa bũmb nins fãa sẽn be-a pʋgẽ wã, wẽng ning neb nins fãa sẽn be beenẽ wã sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel12:20 Tẽms nins neb sẽn be b pʋsẽ wã na n lebga raboodo, la tẽngã na n sãamame. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel12:21 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Ezekiel12:22 «Ninsaala, yaa bõe yel-bũnd la sẽn gilgd yãmb sʋk Israyɛll tẽngã pʋgẽ wã? Yãmb yetame: ‹Wakatã wogendame tɩ vẽnegr ba a yembr ket n ka paamd pidsg ye!›" 
Ezekiel12:23 Bõn-kãng yĩng bɩ f yeel-b yaa: Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-bũn-kãngã sɛ. B ka na n leb n wẽ-a Israyɛll pʋgẽ ye.› Yeel-b tɩ wakat n wate, tɩ vẽnegr buud fãa na n paam pidsgu." 
Ezekiel12:24 Vẽnegr sẽn yaa belgre, ne zĩrẽ bãngr goam kõn leb n zĩnd Israyɛll soolmã pʋg ye." 
Ezekiel12:25 Bala, mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la mam sẽn na n yeel bũmb ningã, m na n yeel-a lame. Yaa gomd sẽn na n paam pidsg yãmb zamaanã pʋga, n ka leb n kaoos ye. Buud sẽn yaa tõata, mam sẽn na n yeel bũmb ningã, m na n pids-a lame. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel12:26 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Ezekiel12:27 «Ninsaala, ad Israyɛll buudã sẽn yete: Vẽnegr ning a sẽn tarã yaa wakat sẽn ket n be taoor yĩnga. Yẽnda sẽn togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ninsã yaa wakat sẽn ket n zãr yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel12:28 Woto yĩnga, yeel-b tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Gomd ning fãa mam sẽn na n yeel na n paama pidsg n ka leb n kaoos ye. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel13:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel13:2 «Ninsaala, gom pĩnd-n-bãngr goam Israyɛll no-rɛɛsdbã wɛɛngẽ.» Bɩ f yeel no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn togsd b mens tagsgã yaa: «Kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga!" 
Ezekiel13:3 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹No-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn yaa yalemb n togsd b mens tagsgo, n yaool n ka yã baa fɩ wã na n paama toogo!›" 
Ezekiel13:4 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb no-rɛɛsdbã wẽnda we-baas sẽn be rabood sʋka!" 
Ezekiel13:5 Yãmb ka kẽng lalgã zĩis nins sẽn lʋɩ wã, n tɩ lebs n me n gũbg Israyɛll nebã n sõng-b ne zabrã Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã daar ye.»" 
Ezekiel13:6 Bãmb vẽnegrã yaa belgre, la bãmb sẽn togsdã yaa zĩrẽ-beedo. Bãmb yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n ka tʋm bãmb ye. La bãmb yaool n gũuda b goamã pidsgu." 
Ezekiel13:7 Vẽnegr nins yãmb sẽn tarã ka belgr sɩda? Yãmb goamã ka zĩrẽ sɩda? Yãmb gomdame n yetẽ tɩ ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta! Tɩ mam yaool n ka yeel tɩ bũmb ye.» 
Ezekiel13:8 Woto yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb goamã sẽn yaa belgr tɩ y vẽnegrã yaa zĩrẽ-beedã yĩnga, mam na n zaba ne yãmba. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel13:9 Mam na n sɩbga no-rɛɛsdb nins vẽnegr sẽn yaa belgrã, la b togsd zĩrẽ-be-goamã.
