Bãmb ka na n leb n paam zĩig mam nebã tiging pʋg ye, b ka na n gʋls bãmb yʋy Israyɛll buudã sebr pʋgẽ ye, la bãmb ka na n leb n tɩ kẽ Israyɛll tẽngã pʋg ye. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel13:10 Bãmb sẽn tudgd mam nebã n yetẽ tɩ vɩ-bãan beeme, tɩ vɩ-bãan yaool n kaẽ wã yĩng kɩtame tɩ mam nebã met lalga, tɩ bãmb pʋgd n bond ne goore." 
Ezekiel13:11 Woto, bɩ f yeel neb nins sẽn bond-b lalgã ne goorã yaa: «Lalgã na n lʋɩɩme! Sa-kẽeng n wate, la sapɩlmã na n dʋʋgame. La sob-bɛd n na n kɩt tɩ fãa wã." 
Ezekiel13:12 Dẽ yĩnga, lalgã sã n lʋɩ, b ka na n sok yãmb n ges goorã y sẽn bolgã bee yɛɛnẽ sɩda?»" 
Ezekiel13:13 Woto yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sũ-yikrã pʋga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ sob-bɛd fugi. La m sũ-puugrã pʋga, sa-kẽeng n na n wa, la sapɩlem n na n dʋʋg ne sũ-puugri, n wa ne sãoongo." 
Ezekiel13:14 Mam na n pãba lalg ning yãmb sẽn dag n bol ne goorã n wã, mam na n lub-a-la tẽnga, t'a yẽbgrã puki. La a n na n lʋɩɩme n zãb yãmb n menes-y zãnga. Woto la yãmb na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel13:15 Mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne lalgã, la ne neb nins sẽn bond-b lalgã ne goorã n tãag a tɛka. La m na n yeela yãmb yaa: «Lalgã ka leb n be ye! Neb nins sẽn bond-a wã ka leb n be ye." 
Ezekiel13:16 Israyɛll no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn dag n gomd Zeruzalɛm wɛɛngẽ, la b yetẽ tɩ b yãnda vẽnegr n yetẽ tɩ vɩ-bãan na n zĩndame tɩ vɩ-bãan yaool n kaẽ wã, ka leb n be ye! Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel13:17 Foom a ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees f buudã kom-pugli sẽn togsd b mens tagsgã, n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam b wɛɛngẽ!" 
Ezekiel13:18 Yeel tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Pagb nins sẽn sẽt gãn tɩ nebã tar n loet b nug-sũgsã, la b wʋgd zug pɛɛl neb buud fãa yĩngã, n dat n paam n soog b vɩɩmã na n paama toogo! Yãmb maanda a woto n dat n soog mam nebã vɩɩm, n yaool n kogend y rẽndã bɩ?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Nug pʋgẽ Oorz ne rɩɩb bilf yĩnga, yãmb paoogda maam m nebã taoore. Yãmb yagda zĩrẽ ne mam nebã tɩ b kelgd yãmb zirẽ-beedã, la y kɩtdẽ tɩ b kʋʋd neb nins sẽn dag n ka tog n ki wã, la y kɩtdẽ tɩ b basd b sẽn dag n tog n kʋ-b rãmbã tɩ b vɩɩmde.»" 
Ezekiel13:20 Woto yĩnga, ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Mam kisa yãmb nusã gãnã y sẽn tar n yõgd m nebã wa liuuli wã. Mam na n deega bãmb ne pãng yãmb nugẽ, la m fãag neb nins yãmb sẽn yõgd wa liuuli wã." 
Ezekiel13:21 Mam na n pãrsa y pɛɛlã me, la m fãag m nebã y nugẽ. Yãmb ka na n leb n tall bõn-kãens tɩ yɩ bẽdg yãmb nusẽ ye. Woto la yãmb na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel13:22 Yãmb sẽn boogd nin-tɩrg raood ne y zirẽ-beedã, tɩ mam yaool n ka sãam a sũurã yĩnga, la yãmb sẽn paasd nin-wẽng raood t'a ka basd a manesem-wẽngã n paam n vɩɩmdã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel13:23 yãmb ka na n leb n paam zĩrẽ vẽnegre, la y ka na n leb togs zĩrẽ pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ye. Mam na n fãaga m nebã yãmb nusẽ. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel14:1 Israyɛll nebã kãsem-dãmb kẽer waa mam nengẽ, n zĩnd mam taoore." 
Ezekiel14:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel14:3 «Ninsaala, nin-kãensã sũyã loee ne b wẽn-naandsã. Bãmb dɩgenda bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ kug-lakdg b yĩngã, la sẽn kɩtd tɩ bãmb lʋɩt kongr pʋgẽ wã b taoore. Dẽ yĩnga, mam na bas tɩ nin-bãmbã sok maam n na n bãng bũmbu?»" 
Ezekiel14:4 Woto yĩnga, gom ne-b n yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Israyɛll buudã ned ning fãa sũur sẽn loe ne a wẽn-naandse, la sẽn dɩgend bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ kug-lakdg a yĩnga, la sẽn kɩtd t'a lʋɩt kongr pʋgẽ wã a taoorã sã n wa no-rɛɛsã nengẽ, yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n leok-a, yẽnda wẽn-naandsã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel14:5 Woto, Israyɛll buudã neb nins sẽn zãag b mens ne maam b wẽn-naandsã fãa yĩngã sũy na n kao b bʋʋdo." 
Ezekiel14:6 Woto yĩnga, yeel Israyɛll buudã tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Wẽnemd-y n bas-y y wẽn-naandsã, bas-y y yel-beedã fãa!" 
Ezekiel14:7 Bala, Israyɛll buudã ned ning fãa, la sãan ning fãa sẽn be Israyɛll pʋgẽ sã n zãag a meng ne maam t'a sũurã loe ne a wẽn-naandsã, yẽnda sã n dɩk bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ kug-lakdg a yĩng n kɩt t'a lʋɩ kongr pʋgẽ wã n dɩgl a taoore, la a sã n wa no-rɛɛsã nengẽ, n na n kɩt t'a sok maam bũmbu, yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab meng n na n leok yẽnda." 
Ezekiel14:8 Mam na n wẽnemdame n zab ne nin-kãng soaba, n kɩt t'a lebg bãnde, la yel-bũndi. Mam na n yiis-a-la m nebã sʋka. Woto, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel14:9 No-rɛɛsã sã n bas tɩ b belg-a, la a sã n togs koɛɛga, yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n belg no-rɛɛs-kãnga. Mam na n tẽega m nug yẽnda zug n kɩt t'a menem Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã sʋka." 
Ezekiel14:10 No-rɛɛsã kongr sẽn yaa to-to wã, neb nins sẽn sokd-b yẽnda wã me kongr na n yɩ a woto. Bãmb kongrã taal na n zĩnda b zugu," 
Ezekiel14:11 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Israyɛll buudã ra leb n kẽ moog n zãag ne maam, la b ra leb n maan yel-wẽn nins fãa b sẽn maanã, n dẽgem b mens ye. Dẽ, bãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel14:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel14:13 «Ninsaala, tẽng sã n maan sẽn kis n beeg maam, tɩ mam tẽeg m nugã yẽnda zug n kɩt tɩ rɩɩb sɛ a pʋgẽ, mam sã n kɩt tɩ kom kẽ a pʋgẽ, mam sã n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã," 
Ezekiel14:14 la sã n mikame tɩ nin-bãmbã b tãabã be a pʋgẽ, a Nowe ne a Dãniyɛll la a Zoobe, bãmb na n fãaga b mensã vɩɩm b tɩrlmã yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel14:15 Mam sã n kɩt tɩ rũm-toos kẽ tẽngã n kʋ kambã, tɩ tẽngã lebg vɩʋʋg tɩ ned ka leb n tõe n tũ be rũm-kãens yĩnga," 
Ezekiel14:16 tɩ nin-bãmbã b tãabã be beenẽ, mam wẽenda ne m mengã tɩ b ka na n tõog n fãag bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugl ye, bãmb mens bal n na n paam fãagre, tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel14:17 Bãmb sã n kɩt tɩ zabr sʋʋg kẽ tẽngã, bɩ mam sã n yeel tɩ zabr sʋʋg gilg tẽngã, wall mam sã n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã," 
Ezekiel14:18 tɩ nin-bãmbã b tãabã be tẽngã pʋgẽ, mam wẽenda ne m meng tɩ bãmb ka na n tõog n fãag bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugl ye, yaa bãmb mens bal n na n paam fãagre." 
Ezekiel14:19 Mam sã n kɩt tɩ bã-loangdg kẽ tẽngã, mam sã n yik m sũurã ne bãmb n na n daag zɩɩm n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã," 
Ezekiel14:20 t'a Nowe ne a Dãniyɛll la a Zoob be beenẽ, mam wẽenda ne m meng tɩ bãmb ka na n tõog n fãag bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugl b tɩrlmã yĩng ye. Yaa b mens bal la b na n fãage. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel14:21 N-yẽe! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Baa ne mam sẽn kɩt tɩ m sɩbg-kãsems a naasã sẽn yaa zabr sʋʋg la kom la rũm-toos ne bã-longds paam Zeruzalɛmã, n na n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã," 
Ezekiel14:22 neb kẽer n na n põs n yi beenẽ, yaa kom-dibli la kom-pugli. Bãmb na n waa yãmb nengẽ, la yãmb na n yãnda b yel-manesmã ne b tʋʋmã n paam belsgo, toogã ne bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn kɩt tɩ paam Zeruzalɛmã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel14:23 Yãmb sã n yãnd b yel-manesmã ne b tʋʋmã sẽn yaa to-to wã, y na n paama belsgo. Woto la y na n bãng tɩ mam sẽn maan Zeruzalɛm bũmb nins fãa wã ka zaalem yĩng ye. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel15:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel15:2 «Ninsaala, dẽ yĩnga, reezẽ tɩɩg raoog sãoo tɩɩs a taabã raad ne bõe? Yẽnda wilã tara yõod n yɩɩd weoogã tɩɩs a taabã wil bɩ?" 
Ezekiel15:3 B tõe n dɩka a raadã n pees bũmb bɩ? Ned tõe n dɩka a raadã n pees baaf sẽn tõe n yagl bũmb bɩ? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ayo, b ningd-a-la bugmẽ, tɩ bugmã rɩ-a. La bugmã sã n wa rɩ a kɩrems a yiibã tɩ tẽn-sʋkã ket n dɩt bugum, b tõe n leb n dɩk-a lame n maan bũmb bɩ?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ade, a sẽn wa n ket n yaa mumdã, b rag n ka tõe n dɩk-a n pees bũmb tɩ b ka sokd bugum sẽn dɩ-a ye.»" 
Ezekiel15:6 Beneere! Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B sẽn naagd reezẽ tɩɩs raad ne tɩɩsã taabã raad n yõogd bugum to-to wã, mam na n maana Zeruzalɛm nebã me a woto." 
Ezekiel15:7 Mam na n wẽnemdame n zab ne bãmba. Baa bãmb sã n põs n yi bugmẽ wã, bugmã na n dɩ-b lame. Mam sã n wa wẽnemd n zab ne bãmba, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel15:8 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, bãmb sẽn maan sẽn kisã yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel16:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel16:2 «Ninsaala, wilg Zeruzalɛm nebã b yel-beedã!»" 
Ezekiel16:3 Yeel-b yaa: «Ad maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet Zeruzalɛm: ‹Fo yẽgrã ne f rogmã zĩig yaa Kana. Fo baaba wã rag n yaa Amoor neda, tɩ f ma wã yaa Hɛt buudu." 
Ezekiel16:4 La fo rogmã daare, b ka wãag fo yũuga, b ka so f koom n na n yiis f rẽgdã, b ka bil foom ne yamsem la b ka vil foom ne pɛɛl ye." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ned ba a yembr ka yãb fo nimbãaneg n na n maan bõn-kãensã ba a yembr fo yĩng n na n kɩt tɩ f põs ye. B rɩka foom n tɩ lob weoogẽ f rogmã daare, bala, b rag n kisga foom.›" 
Ezekiel16:6 Mam wa n loogda fo sɛɛgẽ, n yãnd foom tɩ f tẽbd f zɩɩmã pʋga, tɩ m yeel foom: ‹Fo na n vɩɩmda f zɩɩmã pʋga!› » Mam yeta foom: «Fo na n vɩɩmda f zɩɩmã pʋga!" 
Ezekiel16:7 Mam kɩtame tɩ f sõorã yɩlem naoor tus piiga, wa moodã sẽn be weoogẽ wã. Fo yẽegame, fo bɩtame n lebgd neer zãnga. Fo bĩisã pusame, tɩ f zoobdã yi n lebg wogdo, la fo yaool n dag n yaa f zaala." 
Ezekiel16:8 Mam wa n loogda fo sɛɛgẽ, la m gesa foom n mik tɩ f wakatã taame, yaa nonglmã wakate. Mam tẽega m fuugã noor n lud fo yãndã, n wẽen ne foom, la m maan kaool ne foom. Woto, fo lebga maam n so. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel16:9 Mam soo foom koom, n pek f yĩngã zɩɩmã, la m ning-f parfẽ." 
Ezekiel16:10 Mam baoo fuug b sẽn kãd n yeelg foom, la m bao neooda sẽn maan ne dofẽ gãong n pid-fu, la m kõ-f lamd gĩs-bãaneg peende, la m pil-f ne peen-neere." 
Ezekiel16:11 Mam nagsa foom ne fan-teedo, n ning f nusã zũyã, la m ning f loorã kĩndfu." 
Ezekiel16:12 Mam ninga f yõorã nug-bĩnga, la m ning-f tʋblondo, n fõgen-f maanf sẽn tar da-sãnde." 
Ezekiel16:13 Woto, b nagsa foom ne sãnem la wanzuri fan-teedo, la b yeelg foom ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg peen-neere, la peen-bʋgsgo, ne peend b sẽn kãde. Zom-bãaneg ne sɩɩd la kaam n dag n yaa fo rɩɩbo. Fo rag n lebgda neer n paasdẽ, n lebg wa rĩm-poaka." 
Ezekiel16:14 Fo yʋʋr yii buud a taabã sʋka, f neermã yĩnga. Bala, fo neermã rag n ka tar to, mam sẽn nags foom ne ziir ningã yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel16:15 «La fo kɩsa sɩd ne f neermã n maan yoobo, f yʋʋrã sẽn saagã yĩnga. Fo maana yoob ne so-loaad fãa, n bas t'a soog foom." 
Ezekiel16:16 Fo rɩka f fu-neeb kẽere, n maneg f maand kʋʋb zĩisã, n maan yoob beenẽ. Bũmb a woto zɩ n zĩndi, la a kõn tol n zĩnd me ye." 
Ezekiel16:17 Fo rɩka f fan-teedã sẽn maan ne sãnem la wanzuri wã mam sẽn dag n kõ foomã, n maan bõn-naands sẽn wẽnd daopa, n maan yoob ne-ba." 
Ezekiel16:18 Fo rɩka f fut nins b sẽn kãdã n pil wẽn-naandsã. La f rɩk m kaamã ne m wisdã n kõ-ba. 
Ezekiel16:19 Ad bũmb ning sẽn maane: Fo rɩka m dɩɩbã mam sẽn dag n kõ foomã, ne zom-bãanegã la kaamã ne sɩɩdã mam sẽn dag n tar n dɩlgd foomã, n tɩ kõ wẽn-naandsã, tɩ yɩ kũun sẽn tar yũ-noog b yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel16:20 Fo rɩka f kom-dibli wã ne f kom-pugli wã fo sẽn dag n kõ maamã n maan maoong n kõ wẽn-naandsã tɩ b rɩ! Fo yoobã rag n ka sek-fo? 
Ezekiel16:21 Fo rɩka mam kambã n maan maoong n yõog bugum n kõ wẽn-naandsã. 
Ezekiel16:22 Fo yel-beedã fãa ne f yoobã pʋga, fo ka tẽeg f bi-bɩɩlem wakatã yelle, wakat ning fo sẽn dag n yaa beelle, la f sẽn dag n be f zɩɩmã pʋgẽ n tẽbdã ye." 
Ezekiel16:23 Wẽng ning fo sẽn maanã poore, ad na n yɩɩ toog woo toog fo yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel16:24 Fo mee ro-bãoonego, la zĩ-zãongls raasã fãa kɩremse." 
Ezekiel16:25 Fo mee f zĩ-zãonglsã sor fãa noore, n kɩt tɩ f neermã lebg yel-beedo, n dɩk f mengã n kõ so-loaad fãa, n kɩt tɩ f yoobã paam pãnga." 
Ezekiel16:26 Fo maana yoob ne Ezɩpt nebã sẽn yaa fo yags sẽn tar raoolem sẽn yaa bɛdã. Fo sẽn kɩt tɩ f yoobã lebg wʋsgã yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam sũurã yiki. 
Ezekiel16:27 La ade, mam zẽka m nug n sɩbg foom n boog f sẽn so wã. Mam basa foom Filistẽ-dãmbã kom-pugli sẽn yaa fo bɛɛbã nugẽ, la yãnd yõka bãmb fo manesem-wẽngã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel16:28 La rẽ sẽn ka sek foomã yĩnga, fo yoo ne Asiiri rãmbã. Fo yoo ne bãmba, tɩ rẽ kell n ka sek foom ye." 
Ezekiel16:29 Fo kɩtame tɩ f yoobã ne Kana nebã lebg wʋsg Kalde rãmbã soolem pʋgẽ. La rẽ me baas n kell n ka sek foom ye.» 
Ezekiel16:30 «Fo sẽn maan bõn-kãensã sẽn yaa pʋg-yood-kãseng tʋʋmdã, fo ka võor ye! Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel16:31 Fo sẽn wa n me f rotã soayã fãa noyã, la f me f zĩ-zãonglsã raasã fãa pʋsẽ wã, fo ka tol n deeg yaood wa pʋg-yoaadb a taabã ye." 
Ezekiel16:32 Pʋg-yoodr basda a sɩd n maand yoob ne sãamba. 
Ezekiel16:33 B kõta pʋg-yoaadbã fãa kũuni, la sã n yaa ne foom, foom n kõ f rolsen-dãmbã fãa kũuni. Fo kõo bãmb kũun tɩ b yi zĩisã fãa n wa maan yoob ne foom." 
Ezekiel16:34 Fo ka maan wa pʋg-yoaadb a taabã fãa f yoobã pʋg ye. Ned dag n ka baood fo zĩig ye. Sẽn yaa foom n yaood bãmb tɩ ka bãmb n yaood foomã yĩnga, fo maana f yellã lebende.»" 
Ezekiel16:35 Woto yĩnga, pʋg-yoodre, kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga!" 
Ezekiel16:36 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo sẽn yees f fut n yals f zaal n maan yoob ne f rolsen-dãmbã fãa wã yĩnga, la ne f wẽn-naandsã fãa wã, la fo sẽn maan yel-beed buud fãa n tol n dɩk f kambã n maan maoong n kõ-bã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel16:37 mam na n tigma fo rolsen-dãmbã fãa fo sẽn dag n maand sũ-noog ne wã, la fo sẽn nong-b rãmbã fãa, ne fo sẽn dag n kis-b rãmb fãa wã, n kɩt tɩ b yi zĩig fãa n wa zab ne foom. Mam na n yeesa f futã, n kɩt tɩ b yãnd f yãndã fãa." 
Ezekiel16:38 Mam na n kaoo fo bʋʋd wa b sẽn kaood pʋg-yoaadbã, ne pagb nins sẽn daagd-b zɩɩmã bʋʋdo. La mam na n daaga fo zɩɩm, m sũ-yikrã ne m sũ-kiirã pʋga." 
Ezekiel16:39 Mam na n basa foom bãmb nugẽ. Bãmb na n luba f rotã f sẽn dag n me wã, la b sãam f zĩ-zãonglsã. Bãmb na n yeesa fo futã, la b rees f fãn-teedã n bas foom f zaala, zaal zãng fasɩ." 
Ezekiel16:40 Bãmb na n pirsa neb kʋʋng tɩ b lob foom kuga, la b bees foom ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel16:41 Bãmb na n ninga f rotã bugum, n sɩbg foom pagb kʋʋng nifẽ. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yoobã sɛ, la fo ka na n leb n yao f rolsen-dãmbã ned ba a yembr ye." 
Ezekiel16:42 Mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne foom n tãag a tɛka, la mam sũ-kiirã na n zãaga ne foom. Mam sũurã na n sigame n ka leb n yik ne foom ye." 
Ezekiel16:43 Fo sẽn ka tẽeg bũmb nins mam sẽn dag n maan f yĩng f yãadem wakatã yĩnga, la fo sẽn maan bõn-kãens fãa n yik m sũurã yĩnga, beneere, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yel-manesmã taal lebg n lʋɩ f zugu. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Dẽ yĩnga, fo ka maan yoob n paas f yel-beed a taabã fãa sɩda?»" 
Ezekiel16:44 Ade, yel-bũn-wẽedbã fãa na n wẽeda yel-bũn-kãngã fo wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ: «Ma sẽn yaa bũmb ningã, a bi-pugl me yaa a woto!»" 
Ezekiel16:45 Fo yaa f ma bi-pugl halaale, fo yaa pag ning sẽn dag n kisg a sɩdã ne a kambã bi-pugla. Fo sɩd yaa pagb nins sẽn kis b sɩdbã ne b kambã ma-biiga. Yãmb ma wã rag n yaa Hɛt neda, yãmb ba wã rag n yaa Amoor neda." 
Ezekiel16:46 Fo kẽem-bi-puglã sẽn be fo nug-goabgã yaa Samaari ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, tɩ fo yao-bi-puglã sẽn be f nug-rɩtgã yaa Sodom ne a tẽn-bãoonegã." 
Ezekiel16:47 Fo rɩka bãmb manesmã, la sẽn paase, fo maana yel-beed nins bãmb sẽn maanã, tɩ rẽ ka sek foom ye, tɩ fo leb n maan tʋʋm-beed f manesmã fãa pʋg n yɩɩd bãmba." 
Ezekiel16:48 Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: «Fo yao bi-pugl a Sodom ne a tẽn-bãoonegã ka maan wẽng wa foom ne f tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn maanã ye. 
Ezekiel16:49 Ad kongr ning fo yao-bi-pugl a Sodom sẽn kongã: yẽnda maana tɩtaam, yẽnda rag n dɩt n tɩgdame, yẽnda ne a tẽn-bãoonegã rag n vɩɩ bãan n ka yɛɛsd yelle, la b rag n ka maand baa fɩ n na n paas naong-rãmbã ne nimbãan-dãmbã raood ye." 
Ezekiel16:50 Bãmb zẽka b mens n maan yel-beed mam taoore. Dẽ, mam sẽn yãnd bõn-kãngã mam menes-b lame." 
Ezekiel16:51 La sã n yaa ne Samaari, yẽnda ka maan fo yel-wẽnã pʋɩ-sʋk meng ye. Fo yel-beedã sõor yɩɩ wʋsg n yɩɩd yẽnda rẽndã. La yel-beed nins fãa fo sẽn maanã kɩtame tɩ fo kẽem-bi-puglã ne f yao-bi-puglã sẽn maanã ka baa fɩ ye." 
Ezekiel16:52 Fo sẽn dag n ningd f tão-pogsã taalã, bɩ fo me paam yãnde, yel-wẽn nins fo sẽn maanã yĩnga. Fo sẽn maan yel-wẽn-kãensã wã yĩng kɩtame tɩ fo lebg yel-be-maand n yɩɩd bãmba, la yaa yel-be-bãmb n kɩt tɩ bãmb lebg tɩrs n yɩɩd foom. Bɩ fo me rɩ yãnde, la f paam paoogre, fo sẽn kɩt tɩ f tão-pogsã lebg tɩrsã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel16:53 Mam na n lebs n manega Sodom ne Samaari, ne b tẽn-bãoonegã yelle, la m lebs n maneg fo me yellã bãmb sʋka," 
Ezekiel16:54 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ fo paam yãnd bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn maanã yĩnga, tɩ yɩ belsg bãmb yĩnga." 
Ezekiel16:55 Fo tão-pogsã sẽn yaa Sodom ne a tẽn-bãoonegã, la Samaari ne a tẽn-bãoonegã na n lebga wa b sẽn dag n yaa to-to pĩndã. La foom ne f tẽn-bãoonegã me na n lebga wa y sẽn dag n yaa to-to pĩndã." 
Ezekiel16:56 Fo rag n wɩta f tão-poak a Sodom f tɩtaamã pʋgẽ," 
Ezekiel16:57 sẽn deng wẽng ning fo sẽn maanã pukri, wakat ning Edom tẽn-bãoonegã ne a tẽn-kɩremsã fãa, la Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽn-bãoonegã sẽn wa n paoogd foom, la b yaand foom zĩig zãngã." 
Ezekiel16:58 Fo yãn-tʋʋmã ne f yel-beedã taal na n zĩnda f zugu. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Ezekiel16:59 Bala, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n maana foom wa fo sẽn maanã. Fo sãama kaoolã n sãbs f wẽenegã." 
Ezekiel16:60 La mam me na n tẽega m kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne foom f bi-bɩɩlem wakatã yelle, n vigl kaool sẽn paad wakat fãa fo yĩnga." 
Ezekiel16:61 Fo sã n wa reeg f tão-pogsã sẽn yaa f kẽem-dãmb ne f yaopã, fo na n tẽega f manesmã yelle, tɩ yãnd yõk-fo. Mam na n dɩka bãmb n kõ foom tɩ b yɩ fo kom-pugli, la ka kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne foomã yĩng ye." 
Ezekiel16:62 Mam na n leb n maana kaool ne foom, la fo na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo," 
Ezekiel16:63 tɩ mam sã n wa kõ foom sugr bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn maanã yĩnga, bɩ f tẽeg tɩ yãnd yõk-fo, tɩ f ka tol n tõe n leb n yaag f noore, yãndã yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel17:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel17:2 «Ninsaala, wẽ Israyɛll nebã yel-bũnd n togs-b kibare.»" 
Ezekiel17:3 Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Pa-nand-tug-kẽengã sẽn tar pɩg-bɛd kõbd sẽn yaa wogdã, t'a kõbgã yaa neerã, yɩkame n ta Libã, n yãk sɛɛdr tɩɩgã wil-gelengɛɛgã." 
Ezekiel17:4 Yẽnda kaooga a will ning sẽn sãd n yɩɩd a taabã, n tall n kẽng toandbã tẽngẽ, n tɩ sela lɛɛbdbã tẽngẽ." 
Ezekiel17:5 Yẽnda yãka tẽngã tɩ-tobeng a yembre, n tɩ ning tɩɩs bõeeb zĩigẽ. Yẽnda tɩ sel-a-la ko-kãseng noore, a sel-a-la wa yɩlga." 
Ezekiel17:6 Tɩ-tobengã yiime n lebg reezẽ tɩ-kẽenga, la a rag n yaa pãare. A wilã rag n tãoome n tees pa-nand-tug-kẽengã sẽnẽ, t'a yẽgã sud n kẽ tẽngã. Tɩ-toabengã lebga reezẽ tɩɩga, n pus n maan wila." 
Ezekiel17:7 Pa-nand-tugr a to me n dag n be n yaa bedre, n tar pɩg-bɛd t'a kõbdã yaa wʋsgo. Reezẽ tɩɩgã kɩ a yẽgã ne yão-beed zĩig ning b sẽn dag n sel-a wã n tão a yẽgã n tees pa-nand-tugrã sẽnẽ, la a wilã wẽnemd n tees-a lame n dat t'a kõ-a koom." 
Ezekiel17:8 La b rag n sel-a-la zĩ-sõngẽ koom sẽn yaa wʋsg noore, t'a tõe n tão wil n wom biisi, n lebg reezẽ tɩɩg sẽn tar da-sãnde.»" 
Ezekiel17:9 Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, tɩ-kãngã na n yẽegame sɩda? Pipi pa-nand-tugrã ka na n võ a yẽgã la a yor a biisã n bas-a t'a kʋɩ, t'a wil-tobendã fãa wãk sɩda? A võogr ka baood pãnga, wall neb wʋsg ye." 
Ezekiel17:10 B sẽn sel-a wã, a na n yẽegame sɩda? Sob-tʋʋlg sã n yi yaang n wa wẽ-a, a ka na n kʋɩ sɩda? A na n paa zĩig ning a sẽn yiẽ wã n kʋɩ.»" 
Ezekiel17:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel17:12 «Mam kotame tɩ f sok buud ning sẽn yaa tõatã n gese, b wʋmda yel-bũn-kãngã võor bɩ? Yeel-b tɩ Babilond dĩmã kẽnga Zeruzalɛm n tɩ yõk rĩmã ne a nanambsã n tall n kẽng Babilonde." 
Ezekiel17:13 La a yãka na-biig a yembr rĩmã pendẽ, n maan kaool ne-a n kɩt t'a wẽene. La a tall tẽngã nin-kãsemsã n looge," 
Ezekiel17:14 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ rĩungã ra tol n yẽege, la b ra tol n zẽk b zugu, la b sak a kaoolã n tõog n vɩɩmde." 
Ezekiel17:15 La rĩmã tõdgame n kɩɩs-a, la a tʋm neb Ezɩpt tɩ b tɩ kos wiidi, ne tãb-biis wʋsg n wa kõ-a. Ned ning sẽn maand a woto wã na n tõogame sɩda? A na n tõog n põsame? Yẽnda ka tõe n sãam kaoolã n tõog n põs ye!" 
Ezekiel17:16 Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: «Hakɩɩka! Yaa rĩm ning sẽn kɩt tɩ yẽnda lebg rĩmã tẽngẽ, soab ning wẽeneg yẽnda sẽn sãbse, n sãam kaoolã, yaa nin-kãng nẽngẽ Babilond la a na n ki." 
Ezekiel17:17 B sã n wa Zeruzalɛm n wa zam tom-dʋy la b tu bogd n na n menes neb wʋsg zabrã wakate, Faarõ ne a tãb-bi-kʋʋngã la a neb wʋsgã ka na n tõog n zab n sõng-b ye." 
Ezekiel17:18 Yẽnda sẽn sãam kaoolã, a sãbsa wẽenegã. Yẽnda rag n dɩka sard n maan bõn-kãensã fãa. Yẽnda ka na n põs ye!»" 
Ezekiel17:19 Woto yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: «Hakɩɩka! Yaa mam wẽenegã la Israyɛll dĩmã sẽn sãbsã, yaa mam kaoolã la a sẽn sãamã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãngã taal zĩnd a zugu." 
Ezekiel17:20 Mam na n loba m gãmbr n tilg-a, la m bẽdgã na n yõk-a lame. Mam na n talla yẽnda n kẽng Babilonde, la beenẽ, mam na n bʋ ne yẽnda sẽn maan sẽn kis n beeg maamã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel17:21 Yẽnda tãb-bi-sulã neb nins fãa sẽn zoe wã na n paa tãpẽ. La tãb-biis nins sẽn na n kell-bã na n sãeega zĩig zãnga. Woto la y na n bãng tɩ yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome.» 
Ezekiel17:22 Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Mam na n yãka sɛɛdr tɩ-wok wil-gelengɛɛg n sele. Mam na n yãka wil-poll yẽnda wil nins sẽn sãdã zut n tɩ sel tãn-lug-lug zug m toore. 
Ezekiel17:23 Mam na n tɩ sel-a-la Israyɛll tãng ning sẽn lug n yɩɩd a taabã zugu. Yẽnda na n tãoo wil n wom biisi, la yẽnda na n lebga sɛɛdr tɩɩg sẽn tar da-sãnde. Liuuli buud fãa na n zĩnda yẽnda tẽngre, a wilã maasmẽ." 
Ezekiel17:24 Woto, weoogã tɩɩs fãa na n bãngame tɩ yaa maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yaa maam n sik tɩɩg ning b sẽn dag n zẽkã, la m zẽk tɩɩg ning b sẽn dag n sikã, la yaa maam n kʋɩɩs tɩ-maasrã, la m kɩt tɩ tɩ-koɛɛngã ning puudu. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome, la m na n maan-a lame.»" 
Ezekiel18:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel18:2 «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb wẽed yel-bũn-kãngã Israyɛll pʋgẽ n yetẽ: ‹Ba-rãmbã n dɩ reezẽ-kãse, tɩ kambã yẽn deeg n zãabe.›" 
Ezekiel18:3 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: «Yãmb kõn leb n wẽ yel-bũn-kãngã Israyɛll pʋgẽ ye. 
Ezekiel18:4 Ninsaalbã fãa yaa maam n so. Ba-rãmbã ne kambã fãa yaa maam n so. Yaa ned ning sẽn maan-a yel-wẽnã n na n ki. 
Ezekiel18:5 Ned sã n yaa nin-tɩrga, n maand wa sẽn zemse, la a maand tɩrlem," 
Ezekiel18:6 n ka rɩt tãms zut maand rɩɩbo, la a ka waoogd Israyɛll nebã wẽn-naandsã, la a ka maand rẽgd ne a to paga, la a ka kẽed ne pag sẽn yãnd a kiuugu," 
Ezekiel18:7 la a ka kɩtd tɩ ned tʋm a tʋʋmd t'a ka yao-a, la a lebsd bũmb ning b sẽn gãneg ne yẽnda n deeg bũmbu, la a ka baood n wẽg neda, la a yãkd a rɩɩb n kõt kom sẽn tar-a soaba, la a kõt sẽn ka tar-a fuug fuugu," 
Ezekiel18:8 la a ka pengd ned n baood yõod wall roaglenga, la a ka maand sẽn ka tɩrga, la a kaood neb a yiib sẽn tar yell ne taab bʋʋd wa sẽn zemse," 
Ezekiel18:9 la a kẽnd wa sẽn zems mam noyã ne m no-tũudsã, la a maand sɩda, nin-kãng yaa tɩrga, la a na n vɩɩmdame. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel18:10 «Nin-kãng sã n dog biig t'a yaa fãad la nin-kʋʋd n maand yel-wẽn-kãensã buud a yembr n beeg a ba-biiga," 
Ezekiel18:11 baa yẽnda ba wã sã n zɩ n maan yel-wẽn-kãens ba a yembre, biigã sã n dɩ tãms zut maand rɩɩbo, la a maan rẽgd ne a to paga," 
Ezekiel18:12 la a kɩt tɩ naong soab ne nimbãan-ned tʋm a tʋʋmd t'a ka yao-ba, la a maand wẽgbo, la a ka lebsd bũmb ning b sẽn gãneg ne yẽnda n deeg bũmbu, la a waoogd wẽn-naandse, la a tʋmd tʋʋm-beedo," 
Ezekiel18:13 la a pengd neb n baood yõodo, wall roaglenga, bi-kãng na vɩɩmd sɩda? Ayo! A ka na n vɩɩmd ye. A sẽn maan yel-be-kãensã wã yĩnga, b na n kʋ-a lame. Bɩ yẽnda zɩɩm zĩnd a meng zugu." 
Ezekiel18:14 La nin-kãng soab sã n tar biig sẽn yãnd yel-wẽn nins fãa a ba wã sẽn maanã, t'a neẽ, la a ka maan wa a ba wã," 
Ezekiel18:15 n ka rɩ tãms zut maand rɩɩbo, la a ka waoog Israyɛll buudã wẽn-naandse, n ka maan dẽgd ne a to paga," 
Ezekiel18:16 la a ka kɩtd tɩ ned tʋm a tʋʋmd t'a ka yao-a, la a ka baood tɩ b gãneg bũmb ne-a, n ka baood n wẽg neda, la a kõt kom sẽn tar-a soab rɩɩbo, ne sẽn ka tar-a fuug fuugu," 
Ezekiel18:17 n ka maand naong soab pãnga, la a ka pengd ned n baood yõod wall roaglenga, n kẽnd wa sẽn zems mam noyã ne m no-tũudsã, nin-kãng soab ka na n ki a ba wã kongr yĩng ye. A na n vɩɩmdame." 
Ezekiel18:18 Yaa yẽnda ba wã n maan a saam-biig pãnga, la a wẽg-a, n maan sẽn ka neer a meng nebã sʋka. Yaa yẽnda n na n ki a kongrã yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel18:19 La yãmb sokame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ ba kongr ka lʋɩt biig zugu? Yaa tɩ biigã maana sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrga. Yaa t'a kẽna wa sẽn zems mam noyã fãa la a sak-ba. Dẽ, a na n vɩɩmdame." 
Ezekiel18:20 Yaa ned ning sẽn maan-a yel-wẽnã n na n ki. Ba kongr ka lʋɩt biig zug ye, la biig kongr ka lʋɩt ba zug ye. Nin-tɩrg tɩrlem n pʋgd-a, la nin-wẽng wẽnemã n pʋgd-a.»" 
Ezekiel18:21 Nin-wẽng sã n bas yel-wẽn nins fãa a sẽn dag n maanã n sak m noyã fãa, n maan wa sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrga, a na n vɩɩmdame, a ka na n ki ye." 
Ezekiel18:22 B kõn leb n tẽeg beegr nins fãa a sẽn dag n maanã yell ye. Yẽnda sẽn maan tɩrlmã yĩnga, a na n vɩɩmdame." 
Ezekiel18:23 Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sokdame: «Dẽ yĩnga, mam sɩd ratame tɩ nin-wẽng ki sɩda? Bɩ mam datame t'a bas a manesmã n paam n vɩɩmde?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Nin-tɩrg sã n bas a tɩrlmã n maan sẽn ka tɩrga, a sã n maan tʋʋm-beed nins fãa nin-wẽng sẽn maanã, a na vɩɩmd sɩda? B kõn tol n leb n tẽeg a tɩrlem tʋʋm nins fãa yẽnda sẽn maanã ba a yembr yell ye. Yẽnda sẽn maan sẽn kisã, la a sẽn maan yel-wẽnã yĩnga, a na n kiime." 
Ezekiel18:25 Yãmb yetame: ‹Zu-soabã manesmã ka zems ye.› Israyɛll buudu, m kotame tɩ y kelge! Dẽ yĩnga, yaa mam manesmã n ka zemse? Ka yãmb manesmã n ka zems sɩda?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Nin-tɩrg sã n bas a tɩrlmã n maan sẽn ka tɩrg n ki bõn-kãng yĩnga, a ki a sẽn ka maan sẽn yaa tɩrgã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel18:27 La nin-wẽng sã n bas wẽnemã a sẽn dag n maandã n maan sẽn zemse, la sẽn yaa tɩrga, a na n fãaga a vɩɩm." 
Ezekiel18:28 Yẽnda sã n bao yam n kõ a menga, n bas a beegr nins fãa a sẽn dag n maanã, a na n vɩɩmdame. A ka na n ki ye." 
Ezekiel18:29 Israyɛll buudã yetame: ‹Zu-soabã manesmã ka zems ye.› La rẽ yĩnga, Israyɛll buudu, yaa mam manesmã n ka zems sɩda? Ka yãmb manesmã n ka zemse?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Israyɛll buudu, yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam na n kao yãmb ned kam fãa bʋʋd wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Tek-y yam n bas kɩɩsgã fãa, tɩ kug-lakdg ra wa zĩndi, n kɩt tɩ y kong ye." 
Ezekiel18:31 Zãag-y mens ne kɩɩsg nins fãa y sẽn kɩɩsã. Palm-y y sũyã, la y paam yam-paalga. Israyɛll buudu, bõe yĩng tɩ y na n ki?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Mam daab yaa tɩ yãmb ned ba a yembr da ki ye. Dẽ wã, tek-y yam n paam n vɩɩmde. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel19:1 Foom, pʋd sũ-sãang yɩɩll Israyɛll nanambsã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel19:2 Yeel yaa: «Yãmb ma wã rag n yaa bõe? Yẽnda rag n yaa gɩgem-yãanga, yẽnda rag n gãee gɩgmã sʋka. Yaa gɩgem-poalã sʋk la yẽnda wub a kambã." 
Ezekiel19:3 Yẽnda wuba a biig a yembr t'a bɩ n lebg gɩgem-polle, n zãms zendengo, la a wãba ninsaalba." 
Ezekiel19:4 Buud a taabã wʋmame tɩ b gomd a yelle, la yẽnda lʋɩ b bokã pʋgẽ tɩ b yõk-a. Bãmb ninga a yõorã bãng n tall-a n kẽng Ezɩpti." 
Ezekiel19:5 La gɩgem-yãangã sẽn yã t'a gũubã yaa zaalem, t'a sẽn dag n tẽed bũmb ningã ka na n yɩ wã, a leb n yãka a biig a to a kambã sʋka, n wub t'a lebg gɩgem-polle." 
Ezekiel19:6 Yẽnda rag n kẽnda gɩgma wã sʋka, n tol n lebg gɩgem-polle. La a zãmsa zendengo, la a wãba ninsaalba." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yẽnda yõga pʋg-kõap n gãand ne pãnga, la a luba b pãng zĩisã n kɩt tɩ b tẽmsã lebg zĩ-vɩɩdo. Yẽnda kɛlengã kɩtame tɩ tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã sãame." 
Ezekiel19:8 Bu-zẽms nins sẽn dag n karg n gũbg yẽnda wã yii zĩig zãng n wa zab ne yẽnda. Bãmb loba yẽnda gãmbr n na n yõke, la yẽnda lʋɩ b bokã pʋgẽ tɩ b yõk-a." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bu-zẽmsã gaaga yẽnda ne bãng n ning yʋk pʋga. B talla yẽnda n kẽng Babilond dĩmã nengẽ. B tall-a lame n tɩ pag pãng zĩis pʋga, tɩ b ra leb n tol n wʋm yẽnda koɛɛg Israyɛll tãmsã zut ye.»" 
Ezekiel19:10 Fo ma wã rag n wẽnda wa reezẽ tɩɩg wa foom. B rag n sela yẽnda koom noore, t'a rag n womd sõama, n tar wil wʋsgo, koomã sẽn waoogã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel19:11 Yẽnda rag n tara wil sẽn tar pãnga, tɩ b tõe n tall-b n maan naam dasaba. A woglmã rag n zʋʋga tɩɩsã fãa. A sẽn dag n yaa wokã yĩnga, la a wilã sẽn yaa wʋsgã kɩtame tɩ b ne-a." 
Ezekiel19:12 Bãmb võog-a-la ne sũ-yikr n lub tẽnga, la yaang sob-tʋʋlg n wa n kʋɩɩs a biisã tɩ b sʋʋge. B kʋʋsa a wil nins sẽn tar pãngã n bas-b tɩ b kʋɩ, la bugum dɩ-b lame." 
Ezekiel19:13 La moasã, b tɩ sel-a-la we-raoogẽ wã, tẽng sẽn kʋɩ tɩ koom ka be a pʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel19:14 Bugum n yi a wilẽ wã, n dɩ a wil-tobendã ne a biisã. La a ka leb n tar wil sẽn tar pãnga, tɩ b tõe n dɩk n maan naam dasab ye. Woto yaa sũ-sãang yɩɩlle, b yɩɩnd-a-la ne sũ-sãanga." 
Ezekiel20:1 Yembdã loogr zugẽ tɩ yʋʋm yopoɛɛlẽ, kiuug a nu soabã rasem piig daare, Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã sʋk neb kẽer wa n zĩnda mam taoor n na n sok Sẽn-Ka-Saab n bãng b raabo." 
Ezekiel20:2 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel20:3 Ninsaala, gom ne Israyɛll kãsem-dãmbã n yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Yaa sẽn na n bao mam daab la y sẽn wa wã bɩ? Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ tɩ m kõn bas tɩ y sok maam bũmb ye. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel20:4 Fo ka na n bʋ bãmb bʋʋd sɩda? Ninsaala, fo ka na n bʋ bãmb bʋʋdo? Wilg bãmb yel-beed nins bãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn maanã!" 
Ezekiel20:5 Yeel bãmb tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Daar ning mam sẽn yãk Israyɛll nebã, mam zẽka m nug n wẽen ne a Zakoob yagensã, la m vẽneg m meng ne bãmb Ezɩpt tẽnga. Mam zẽka m nug n wẽen ne bãmb n yeel tɩ m yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel20:6 Badaare, mam zẽka m nug n wẽen ne bãmb n yeel tɩ m na n yiisa bãmb Ezɩpt tẽng n tall n kẽng tẽng mam sẽn zoe n yãk n bĩng-ba, tẽng sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsgo, tẽng sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd tẽmsã fãa." 
Ezekiel20:7 Mam yeela bãmb yaa: Bɩ yãmb ned kam fãa lob yel-yood nins a sẽn get tɩ noom-a wã! Da rẽgm-y y mens ne Ezɩpt wẽn-naandsã ye! Mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. 
Ezekiel20:8 Bãmb tõdgame n ka sak n na n kelg maam ye. Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka bas yel-yood nins a sẽn dag n get tɩ noom-a wã ye. La bãmb ka bas Ezɩpt wẽn-naandsã ye. Mam dag n yeelame tɩ m na n basame tɩ m sũ-kãbrã sig bãmb zug Ezɩpt tẽnga, tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ m sũ-puugrã rɩ bãmb n tãag a tɛka." 
Ezekiel20:9 La baoosgo, mam maana a woto mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, sẽn na yɩl tɩ mam yʋʋrã ra paam paoogr buud nins Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n beẽ wã ye. Mam dag n vẽnega m meng ne bu-kãens n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã yi Ezɩpt tẽnga." 
Ezekiel20:10 Mam yiisa bãmb Ezɩpt tẽng n tall-b n kẽng we-raoogã pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel20:11 Mam kõo bãmb m noyã la m wilg bãmb m no-tũuds nins ninsaal sẽn tog n tũ n paam n vɩɩmdã. 
Ezekiel20:12 Sẽn paas me, mam kõo bãmb m vʋʋsg rayã tɩ yɩ bãnd maam ne bãmb sʋka, tɩ b tõe n bãng tɩ yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n welg bãmb toore." 
Ezekiel20:13 La Israyɛll buudã kɩɩsa maam we-raoogã pʋga. Bãmb ka tũ m noyã ne m no-tũuds nins ninsaal sẽn tog n tũ n paam n vɩɩmdã ye. Bãmb rẽgma mam vʋʋsg rayã hal tɩ loog nugu. Mam yeelame tɩ m na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne bãmb we-raoogã pʋga, sẽn na n yɩl n menes-b zãnga." 
Ezekiel20:14 Baoosg zãnga, mam maana woto m yʋʋrã yĩnga, tɩ m yʋʋrã ra wa paam paoogr bu-zẽms nins sʋk mam sẽn yiis bãmb b nifẽ Ezɩpt tẽngã ye." 
Ezekiel20:15 La we-raoogã pʋgẽ, mam zẽka m nug n wẽen tɩ m ka na n leb n tall bãmb n taas tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kãab bãmbã ye. Yaa tẽng sẽn tar bĩisim ne sɩɩd wʋsgo, n yaa neer n yɩɩd tẽms a taabã fãa." 
Ezekiel20:16 Mam sẽn wẽen woto wã yaa tɩ bãmb kɩɩsa m minindã, la b ka sak m tõodã ye, la b sãama m vʋʋsg rayã, bãmb sũyã sẽn dag n loe ne b wẽn-naandsã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel20:17 La mam zoee bãmb nimbãaneg n ka sãam bãmb ye, la m ka menes bãmb zãng we-raoogã pʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel20:18 Mam yeela bãmb kambã we-raoogã pʋgẽ yaa: «Ra tũ-y y ba-rãmbã noyã, ra sak-y b no-tũudsã, la y ra rẽgem y mens ne b wẽn-naandsã ye." 
Ezekiel20:19 Mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Sak-y m noyã, la y kẽn wa sẽn zems m no-tũudsã." 
Ezekiel20:20 Welg-y mam vʋʋsg rayã toore, tɩ b yɩ bãnd maam ne yãmb sʋka, tɩ nebã tõe n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Ezekiel20:21 La kambã me yik n kɩɩsa maam. Bãmb ka sak m noyã, la b ka kẽn wa sẽn zems m no-tũuds nins ninsaal sẽn tog n tũ n paam n vɩɩmdã ye. Bãmb dẽgma mam vʋʋsg rayã. Mam yeelame tɩ mam na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd ne bãmb we-raoogã pʋg n tãag a tɛka." 
Ezekiel20:22 Baoosgo, mam yõbga m nugu, n maan a woto m yʋʋrã yĩnga, tɩ m yʋʋrã ra wa paam paoogr bu-zẽms nins sʋk mam sẽn yiis bãmb b nifẽ Ezɩpt tẽngã ye." 
Ezekiel20:23 We-raoogã pʋgẽ, maam n leb n zẽk m nug n wẽen n yeel bãmb tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n kẽ bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la m kɩt tɩ b sãeeg n zĩnd tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ." 
Ezekiel20:24 Bala, bãmb dag n ka sakd m minindã ye. Bãmb dag n kɩɩsda m tõodã la b sãamd m vʋʋsg rayã, n bas n get b yaab-rãmbã wẽn-naandse." 
Ezekiel20:25 Yaa maam n leb n kõ bãmb tõod sẽn ka sõmbe, la minind b sẽn ka tõe n tũ n paam n vɩɩmd ye." 
Ezekiel20:26 Mam kɩtame tɩ b rẽgem b mens ne b kũunã, bãmb sẽn wa n dɩkd b kom-dẽemsã n yõogd bugmã. Mam bas-b-la woto sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ sũ-sãang yõk-ba, tɩ b bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel20:27 Woto yĩnga, ninsaala, gom ne Israyɛll buudã n yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãmb yaab-rãmbã rag n leb n maana sẽn kis n paoog maam." 
Ezekiel20:28 Mam talla bãmb n ta tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n zẽk m nug n wẽen tɩ m na n kõo bãmbã pʋga, la bãmb wẽnemd n gesa kunkub nins fãa sẽn zẽkã, la b ges tɩɩg ning sẽn tar maasem wʋsgã. Bãmb maana b maandã beenẽ, la b wa ne b kũun n yik m sũuri. Bãmb waa ne kũun toor-toor sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la b raag b bõn-yũudl kũunã." 
Ezekiel20:29 Mam soka bãmb yaa: Maoong kʋʋb zĩig ning yãmb sẽn kẽngẽ wã yaa bõe? Dẽ, b ket n boonda zĩ-kãens tɩ maoong kʋʋb zĩis hal tɩ ta rũndã.»" 
Ezekiel20:30 Woto yĩnga, yeel Israyɛll buudã tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Da maan-y wa y yaab-rãmbã n dẽgem y mens ye. Da maan-y lagem-n-taar ne bãmb yel-yoodã ye." 
Ezekiel20:31 Yãmb sẽn wa ne y kũunã, la y sẽn dɩk y kamb n maan maand n yõog bugmã, yãmb dẽgma y mens ne y wẽn-naandsã fãa hal tɩ ta rũndã. Israyɛll buudu, mam na bas tɩ yãmb sok maam bũmbu? Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ tɩ m ka na n bas tɩ y sok maam bũmb ye!" 
Ezekiel20:32 Yãmb sẽn tagsd n dat bũmb ningã kõn tol n yɩ ye.» Yãmb yetame: «Tõnd dat n yɩɩ wa buud a taabã, wa buud nins sẽn be tẽms a taab pʋsã. Tõnd datame n waoog tɩɩsã ne kugã.»" 
Ezekiel20:33 Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ, hakɩɩka, mam na n sooga yãmb ne pãnga, la m tẽeg m nugã n sɩbg-y ne sũ-yikri." 
Ezekiel20:34 Mam na n tẽega m nugã sẽn tar pãngã n yiis yãmb tẽms nins yãmb sẽn sãeeg n be b pʋsẽ wã ne sũ-yikri. 
Ezekiel20:35 Mam na n talla yãmb n kẽng bu-zẽmsã we-raoogẽ, la m na n bʋʋ ne yãmb beenẽ neng ne nenga." 
Ezekiel20:36 Mam sẽn bʋ ne y yaab-rãmbã Ezɩpt we-raoogã pʋgã, mam na n bʋʋ ne yãmb me. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel20:37 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb pɩʋʋg mam gʋlgã tẽngre, la mam na n tɛɛ yãmb wa sẽn zems kaoolã." 
Ezekiel20:38 Mam na n yiisa tõatbã ne sẽn kɩɩsd-b maamã yãmb sʋka. Mam na n yiis-b-la tẽng ning pʋg b sẽn be n yaa sãambã, la bãmb ka na n leb Israyɛll tẽngẽ wã ye. Dẽ, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel20:39 Yãmb a Israyɛll buudu, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bɩ ned kam fãa kell n waoog a wẽn-naandse! La bãng-y tɩ rẽ zugẽ, yãmb na n kelga maam. Yãmb kõn leb n wa ne kũuni, la y waoog y wẽn-naandsã n sãam m yʋ-sõngã ye." 
Ezekiel20:40 Bala, yaa mam tãn-sõngã zugu, Israyɛll tãn-lug-lugã zugu, la Israyɛll buudã fãa, ne neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã na n waoog maam. Yaa beenẽ la mam na n deeg bãmb ne sũ-noogo, la m yeel-y tɩ y wa ne y yamleoog kũunã, ne y dẽenem biis kũunã, la bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn dat n kõ wã." 
Ezekiel20:41 Mam sã n wa yiis yãmb buud a taabã sʋka, la m yiis yãmb tẽms nins yãmb sẽn dag n sãeeg n be b pʋsẽ wã n wa tigme, mam na n deeg-y-la wa kũun sẽn tar yũ-noogo. Mam na n tũnuga yãmb n wilg m sõmblmã yãmb sʋka, tɩ buud a taabã fãa yãnde." 
Ezekiel20:42 Mam sã n tall yãmb n lebg n leb Israyɛll tẽngẽ wã, tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n zẽk m nug n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõ y yaab-rãmbã, yãmb na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel20:43 Yaa beenẽ la yãmb na n tẽeg y manesmã, ne bũmb nins fãa y sẽn dag n maan n dẽgem y mensã yelle. Yãmb na n kisga y mense, tʋʋm-wẽns nins fãa yãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel20:44 Israyɛll buudu, mam sã n wa maan bõn-kãng ne yãmb mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, la ka wa sẽn zems yãmb manesem-wẽngã ne y tʋʋm-kɛgã, yãmb na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel21:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel21:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees nug-goabg sẽnẽ n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n mong-a bʋʋm. Togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n keoog Negɛɛv weoogã." 
Ezekiel21:3 Yeel Negɛɛv weoogã yaa: ‹Kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga.› Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame. ‹Mam na n yõgna bugum fo pʋgẽ t'a rɩ tɩ-maasã fãa ne tɩ-koeemsã fãa. Bug-kãng sẽn witã ka na n tol n ki ye. Bugmã na n dɩɩ nensã fãa, sẽn sɩng ne nug-goabg n tɩ tãag nug-rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel21:4 Nebã fãa na n yãame tɩ yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yõgen bugmã, la a ka na n tol n ki ye.› »" 
Ezekiel21:5 Dẽ, mam yeelame yaa: «Wii! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, b gomda mam yell n yetẽ tɩ mam wẽeda yel-bũn bala.»" 
Ezekiel21:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel21:7 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees Zeruzalɛm sẽnẽ n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n mong a pʋʋsg zĩisã bʋʋm. La f togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n sagl Israyɛll nebã." 
Ezekiel21:8 Yeel Israyɛll tẽn-gãongã tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Ade, mam zabda ne foom. Mam na n wõoga m zabr sʋʋg n menes nin-tɩrsã ne nin-wẽnsã sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã." 
Ezekiel21:9 Mam sẽn na n menes nin-tɩrsã ne nin-wẽnsã yĩnga, mam sʋʋgã na n yi a wʋʋgẽ n kʋ b fãa, sẽn sɩng ne nug-goabg n tɩ tãag nug-rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel21:10 Woto, bãmb fãa na n bãngame tɩ yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n wõog m sʋʋgã, la m ka na n leb n sui-a a wʋʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel21:11 La foom a ninsaala, wõose, sulg ne sũ-sãanga, wõos bãmb nifẽ." 
Ezekiel21:12 La b sã n sok foom tɩ yaa bõe tɩ f wõosdẽ, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ yaa kibar n wate, la a sã n wa, nebã fãa sũy na n sãamame tɩ b nusã pãng sɛ, tɩ b yamã yuusi, tɩ b rũmã rigi. Ade, a watame, a taame. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel21:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel21:14 «Ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã! Yeel tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Zabr sʋʋga! Zabr sʋʋga! Sʋʋga saasame, b sõog-a lame t'a pɩnda." 
Ezekiel21:15 B saas-a-la kʋʋb yĩnga. B ruug-a lame t'a tõe n yãge. Yaa tõnd sũur na yɩ noog sɩda? M biigã dasaar paoogda tɩɩg buudã fãa. 
Ezekiel21:16 B rɩk-a lame n kɩs tɩ b ruugi, tɩ nug tõe n tall-a n zabe. B saas-a lame, b saasa zabr sʋʋgã, b sõog-a lame n ning-a nin-kʋʋdã nugẽ." 
Ezekiel21:17 Ninsaala, yãb n wiisi. Bala, b wõoga sʋʋgã n na n sɩbg m nebã. B wõog-a lame n na n sɩbg Israyɛll nanambsã fãa. B naaga bãmb ne m nebã n kʋ ne sʋʋgã. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f pĩis f ger ne sũ-sãanga." 
Ezekiel21:18 Bala, yaa makre. La dasaar ning sẽn paoogd-a wã sã n sãame, na n yɩɩ bõe moasã? Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel21:19 Foom a ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, pãb nug-pogse. Bɩ sʋʋgã kɛ naoor a yi, a kɛ naoor a tã. Sʋʋgã yaa sãoong sʋʋga, yaa sãoon-kãseng sʋʋg n gũbg bãmba." 
Ezekiel21:20 Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ bãmb raoodã booge, la sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ pãn-komsem wʋsg kẽ-ba. Mam na n diga bãmb ne zabr sʋʋg b rignoyẽ wã fãa, Kayto! B maan-a lame t'a tõe n yãgda. B maan-a-la kʋʋb yĩnga." 
Ezekiel21:21 B sẽn na n bool foom zĩig ning fãa, bɩ f kɛ n leb rɩtgo, segl n kɛ n leb goabga!" 
Ezekiel21:22 Mam me na n pãba nug-pogse, la m na n basame tɩ m sũ-puugrã maan a tʋʋmd n tãag a tɛka. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maam n yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel21:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel21:24 «Foom a ninsaala, tuk soay a yiib Babilond dĩmã zabr sʋʋg sẽn na n tũ n wa. Soay a yiibã fãa na n yii tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ. Gʋls bãnd n ning sor fãa sẽn dabd tẽng fãa pʋgẽ sɩngrẽ." 
Ezekiel21:25 Tuk sor zabr sʋʋgã sẽn na n tũ n wa Raba sẽn yaa Amo nebã tẽngẽ wã ne Zʋʋda la Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa tẽng sẽn gũbg ne lalsã. 
Ezekiel21:26 Bala, Babilond dĩmã tɩ yalsa so-palempaasẽ, a yalsa so-pɩʋʋgẽ n na n bʋg bagre. Yẽnda zugsda a loko, la a sokd a bõn-naandse, la a get rũng sãoorẽ." 
Ezekiel21:27 La bagrã bãnd ning sẽn dag n be a rɩtg nugẽ wã yãka Zeruzalɛm, tɩ b na n yãk zab-teed nins b sẽn tar n tãad rot n lubdẽ wã n tɩ zab ne-a, n kɩt tɩ sãoong zĩndi, tɩ b kaas zabr kaasg a yĩnga. B na n tilga zab-teed nins b sẽn tar n tãad rot n lubdẽ wã n tees a rignoyã, b na n zama tom dʋya, la b tu bok n gũbg-a." 
Ezekiel21:28 Zeruzalɛm dãmbã wẽenegã yĩnga, bãmb tagsdame tɩ bagrã Babilond dĩmã sẽn bʋgã yaa zaalem.» La Babilond dĩmã tẽeg-b-la b kongrã, la rẽnda yĩng n kɩt tɩ b na n tall-b n kẽng yembdã." 
Ezekiel21:29 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yaa yãmb sẽn puk y beegrã, la y yel-manesmã fãa sẽn wilg y yel-wẽnã yĩng n kɩt tɩ b tẽeg y kongrã yelle, bala, tẽeg-kãng na n waa ne sɩbgr yãmb zugu. Yãmb na n lʋɩ Babilond dĩmã nugẽ." 
Ezekiel21:30 Foom a Israyɛll na-wẽng sẽn yaa nin-kʋʋda, fo sɩbgrã daar watame, yaa daar ning kongrã sẽn na n ta a tɛka!»" 
Ezekiel21:31 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yãk a zug peen-vindgã, fõk a naam maanfã. Bũmbã fãa na n tekame! Sẽn zẽkã na n paama sikri, la sẽn sikã na n paama zẽkre." 
Ezekiel21:32 Raboogo, raboogo! Yaa raboog bala! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm lebg raboogo. Bũmbã fãa zoe n tekame! La yõwã ka na n zĩndi, hal tɩ soab ning sẽn na n kao-a bʋʋdã wa, tɩ m kõ-a tẽngã.»" 
Ezekiel21:33 Foom a ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã! Yeel tɩ ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gomde, Amo nebã ne b paoogrã wɛɛngẽ. Yeel yaa: ‹Sʋʋgã! B wõoga sʋʋgã, b sõog-a-la kʋʋb yĩnga, b sõog-a-la sãoong yĩnga, b sõog-a lame t'a tõe n yãge!›" 
Ezekiel21:34 Yãmb belgr vẽnegrã ne y zĩrẽ bagrã pʋgẽ, b na n kooda yãmb nin-wẽnsã sʋka. B kooda yãmb neb nins daarã sẽn wate, wakat ning kongrã sẽn na n ta a tɛkã." 
Ezekiel21:35 Lebs-y y sʋʋgã a wʋʋgẽ. Bala, mam na n kaoo fo bʋʋd zĩig ning b sẽn naan foomã, tẽng ning fo sẽn yitẽ wã." 
Ezekiel21:36 Mam na n sika m sũ-yikrã yãmb zugu. Mam sũ-puugrã na n dɩɩ yãmb wa bugum. Mam na n basa yãmb nin-toos nusẽ, mam na n basa yãmb neb sẽn mi sãoong nusẽ." 
Ezekiel21:37 Bugum na n dɩɩ yãmba. Y zɩɩm na n daaga y tẽngã pʋgẽ. B ka na n leb n tẽeg yãmb yell yɛs ye. Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Ezekiel22:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel22:2 «Foom a ninsaala, fo na n kaoo bʋʋdã bɩ? Fo na n kaoo tẽng ning sẽn daagd zɩɩmã bʋʋd bɩ? Wilg yẽnda a tʋʋm-beedã fãa!" 
Ezekiel22:3 Yeel tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Ad tẽng sẽn daagd zɩɩm a pʋgẽ, n na n kɩt t'a daarã ta, la a maand wẽn-naands n dẽgemd a menga!›" 
Ezekiel22:4 Fo raaga zɩɩm n mong f meng bʋʋm, la f rẽgem f meng ne wẽn-naandsã fo sẽn maanã. Fo sẽn maan a woto wã kɩtame tɩ f daarã na n ta tao-tao, la fo wakatã ta a tɛka. Yaa woto yĩng n kɩt tɩ mam bas tɩ buud a taabã paoog foom, la m bas tɩ tẽmsã fãa yaal foom." 
Ezekiel22:5 Sẽn pẽ-b foomã ne sẽn zãr-b ne foomã na n yaala foom, fo yʋʋrã sẽn sãamã ne f tʋʋm-lɛblã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel22:6 Ad Israyɛll nanambsã sẽn yaa to-to: Bãmb ned kam fãa rɩkda a pãngã n daagd zɩɩm fo pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel22:7 Ned toog ka leb n be ne a ba ne a ma fo pʋgẽ ye. B maanda sãambã pãng fo pʋgẽ. B kɩtdame tɩ kɩɩbs ne pʋg-kõap tʋmd fo pʋgẽ tɩ b ka yaood-b ye. 
Ezekiel22:8 Fo paoogda bũmb nins sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã, fo rẽgemda mam vʋʋsg rayã." 
Ezekiel22:9 Tẽn-kãn-neb n be fo pʋgẽ n kãnd neb tɩ b raagd taab zɩɩm. Neb n dɩt maand nemd tãmsã zut fo pʋgẽ. La b maand yãn-tʋʋm f pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel22:10 Neb n gãe b ba-rãmb pagb fo pʋgẽ. Neb n yõgd pagb b sẽn yãnd b kiuug n lebg rẽgd wakate. 
Ezekiel22:11 Rao fãa maanda yel-beed ne a to paga, rao fãa maanda yãn-tʋʋm n dẽgemd a bi-paga. Ned fãa yõgda a tão-poak sẽn yaa a baaba bi-puglã." 
Ezekiel22:12 Neb n sakd n deegd kũun n daagd zɩɩm fo pʋgẽ. Fo pengda ligd n modgdẽ tɩ b lebs-f ne roaglenga. Fo maanda f taab pãng n wẽgd-ba, n yaool n yĩmd mam yelle. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel22:13 «Ade, mam na n pãba nug-pogs wẽgbã fo sẽn maanã yĩnga, la zɩɩmã b sẽn daag fo pʋgẽ wã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel22:14 Dẽ wã, daar ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg foomã, fo pɛlg na n yɩɩ kãenkãe sɩda? Fo nusã na n talla pãng sɩda? Mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maam n yeele, la m na n maana wa m sẽn yeelã." 
Ezekiel22:15 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f sãeeg n kẽ bu-zẽmsã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ f sãeeg n zĩnd tẽmsã fãa pʋse, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f rẽgdã loog zãng n bas-fo." 
Ezekiel22:16 Fo mengã na n dẽgma f meng buud a taabã nifẽ, woto, fo na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel22:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel22:18 «Foom a ninsaala, Israyɛll buudã wẽnda wãy mam nifẽ. Bãmb fãa wẽnda zũudu, b wẽnda waasdo, b wẽnda kutu, b wẽnda namd b sẽn yẽneg boaagẽ. Bãmb yaa wanzuri wãyã." 
Ezekiel22:19 Woto yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb fãa sẽn lebg wa wãyã yĩnga, mam na n tigma yãmb Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ.›" 
Ezekiel22:20 B sẽn ningd wanzuri bɩ zũud wall kutu, wall waasd bɩ namd boaagẽ n zugd to-to wã, woto me, mam na n tigma yãmb m sũ-yikrã ne m sũ-puugrã pʋga, m na n zama yãmba, n yẽneg-yã." 
Ezekiel22:21 Mam na n zama yãmb n zug m sũ-puugrã bugum t'a rɩ yãmba, n yẽneg-y tẽngã pʋga." 
Ezekiel22:22 Wanzuri sẽn yẽnegd to-to boaagẽ wã, b na n yẽnega yãmb tẽngã pʋgẽ me a woto. Dẽ, yãmb na bãng tɩ yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n sik m sũ-puugrã yãmb zugu.»" 
Ezekiel22:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel22:24 «Foom a ninsaala, yeel Zeruzalɛm yaa: ‹Fo yaa tẽng sẽn ka paam yɩlgre, la sẽn ka paam tɩ sa-koom tosg a zug sũ-puugrã daar ye." 
Ezekiel22:25 Yẽnda no-rɛɛsdbã seta taab a pʋgẽ. Gɩgemd sẽn kelemd la a zendemd rũng a sẽn yõkã to-to wã, woto me, yẽnda no-rɛɛsdbã kʋʋda nebã, n wʋkd b arzegsã, ne b te-sõama wã, n kɩtdẽ tɩ pʋg-kõapã sõor lebgd wʋsg tẽngã pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel22:26 Yẽndã maan-kʋʋdbã kɩɩsda mam tõodã, la b rẽgemd bũmb nins sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã. Bãmb ka mi bũmb ning sẽn welg toorã ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa rẽgdã n bak ye. Bãmb ka kɩtd tɩ nebã bãng bũmb ning sẽn yaa rẽgdã ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa yɩlemdã n bak ye. Bãmb toog ka ne mam vʋʋsg rayã ye, bãmb paooga m yʋʋrã bãmb sʋka." 
Ezekiel22:27 Yẽnda nanambsã bee a pʋg wa rigd-n-yĩids sẽn zendemd rũng b sẽn yõke. Bãmb daagda zɩɩm, b menesda nebã, sẽn na n yɩl n tõog n maan b wẽgbã." 
Ezekiel22:28 Yẽnda no-rɛɛsdbã tara goor b sẽn bonda, b tara belgr vẽnegre, ne zĩrẽ bagre. Bãmb yetame: Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame!› Tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n ka yeel tɩ bũmb ye." 
Ezekiel22:29 Tẽngã neb maanda taab pãnga, bãmb wẽgda taaba, bãmb kɩtdame tɩ naong rãmb ne nimbãan-neb tʋmdẽ tɩ b ka yaood-ba, la b maand sãan pãng n ka tũud tɩrlem sor ye." 
Ezekiel22:30 Mam baoo ned bãmb sʋkã sẽn na n me lalga, ned sẽn na n yals mam taoor lalgã võorẽ, n yõk maam sɛɛg tẽngã yĩnga, tɩ m da sãam-a, la mam ka yãnd ye." 
Ezekiel22:31 Mam sikda m sũ-yikrã bãmb zugu, mam menesda bãmb ne m sũ-puugrã bugum. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yel-manesmã taal lebg n lʋɩ b zugu. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel23:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel23:2 «Ninsaala, pagb a yiib n dag n be n yaa ma-biisi." 
Ezekiel23:3 Bãmb koosa b mens Ezɩpt tẽnga, bãmb koosa b mens b pʋg-sademdã wakate. B wẽbsa bãmb bĩis Ezɩpt tẽnga, b saaga bãmb pʋg-sademdẽ yãoogã beenẽ." 
Ezekiel23:4 Kãsmã yʋʋr dag n boondame t'a Ohola, tɩ yao wã yʋʋr boondẽ t'a Oholiba. Bãmb b yiibã rag n yaa mam pagba, la b roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli. Sã n yaa ne bãmb yʋyã wɛɛngẽ, a Ohola yaa Samaari, t'a Oholiba yaa Zeruzalɛm." 
Ezekiel23:5 La baa ne a Ohola sẽn dag n yaa mam pagã, a koosa a menga. Yẽnda rag nonga Asiiri nebã sẽn yaa a rolsen-dãmba, la a yagsã." 
Ezekiel23:6 Asiiri nebã rag n yera fut sẽn yaa miidu la moaama, bãmb dag n yaa gʋvɛrneer-dãmb la bʋ-kaoodba. Bãmb fãa rag n yaa kom-poal sẽn tar da-sãnde, n yaa wed-rʋʋdb sẽn zao wiidi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Yaa ne nin-bãmbã la yẽnda koos a menga. Yẽnda koosa a meng ne Asiiri nebã zu-raadã fãa. Yẽnda rẽgma a meng ne neb nins fãa yẽnda sẽn dag n nongã, a rẽgma a meng ne b wẽn-naandsã fãa." 
Ezekiel23:8 Yẽnda kell n ka bas a koos-m-mengã yẽnda sẽn dag n maand Ezɩpt tẽngã ye. Bala, nin-bãmbã rag n gãanda yẽnda a pʋg-sademdã wakate, b saaga yẽnda yãoogã t'a nan ka mi rao ye. La b kẽesa yẽnda koos-m-meng pʋga." 
Ezekiel23:9 Yaa woto n kɩt tɩ mam bas yẽnda Asiiri nebã sẽn yaa a rolsen-dãmbã yẽnda sẽn dag n nongã nugẽ. 
Ezekiel23:10 Bãmb n yees a futã n bas-a a zaala. Bãmb n yõg a kom-dibli wã ne a kom-pugli wã, la b kʋ yẽnda mengã ne zabr sʋʋga. Yẽnda yɩɩ mamsg pagb a taabã yĩnga. Bãmb sɩbga yẽnda.»" 
Ezekiel23:11 Yẽnda tão-poak a Oholiba yãnda bõn-kãense, la yẽnda sẽn dag n nong a rolsen-dãmbã to-to wã yɩɩga a kẽema. Yẽnda koos-m-mengã yɩɩga a kẽemã rẽndã." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yẽnda yam kẽe Asiiri nebã sẽn yaa a yagse, n yaa gʋvɛrneer-dãmb la bʋ-kaoodb sẽn yer fu-neeba, n yaa wed-rʋʋdb sẽn zao wiidi, tɩ b fãa yaa kom-poal sẽn tar da-sãndã." 
Ezekiel23:13 Mam yãndame tɩ yẽnda rẽgma a menga, tɩ b yiibã fãa yel-manesmã yaa bũmb a yembre." 
Ezekiel23:14 A Oholiba tol n paasa a koos-m-mengã pãnga. Yẽnda yãnda b sẽn gʋl raop naana lalg zugu, sẽn yaa Kalde raop wẽoneg b sẽn gʋl tɩ yaa miidu." 
Ezekiel23:15 Bãmb seesã rag n sẽba ne sẽbdse, tɩ b zutã vil ne peen-neeba. Bãmb fãa wẽonegã yaa nanambs wẽonego, n yaa wa Babilond nebã. B yaa wa neb sẽn yit Kalde." 
Ezekiel23:16 A Oholiba sẽn ges bãmbã bala, a yamã kẽ-b lame, t'a tʋm neb bãmb nengẽ Kalde tẽngã." 
Ezekiel23:17 Babilond-dãmbã waa yẽnda nengẽ n wa gãand ne-a n dẽgm-a ne b yoobã tʋʋmã. Yẽnda rẽgma a meng ne bãmb n yaool n lak a meng ne-ba. 
Ezekiel23:18 Yẽnda puka a koos-m-mengã, la a bas a mengã zaal tɩ b nebã yãnde. La mam laka m meng ne-a, wa m sẽn lak n bas a tão-poakã." 
Ezekiel23:19 Yẽnda yɩlma a koos-m-mengã n tẽeg a pʋg-sademdẽ koos-m-mengã a sẽn dag n maand Ezɩptã. 
Ezekiel23:20 Yẽnda yamã rag n kẽe yoaadb sẽn tar yo-bɛd wa bõense, n dʋʋt wa wiidã." 
Ezekiel23:21 Fo leb n sɩnga f pʋg-sademdẽ wakatẽ yãn-tʋʋmã maanego, wakat ning Ezɩpt nebã sẽn dag n saagd f yãoogã, tɩ f pʋg-sadem-bĩisã yamleoog yõk-bã." 
Ezekiel23:22 Woto yĩnga, Oholiba, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Gese, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f rolsen-dãmb nins fo sẽn basã zab ne foom. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b yi zĩig zãng n wa zab ne foom." 
Ezekiel23:23 Yaa Babilond nebã, ne Kalde nebã fãa, la Pekood ne Soa la Koa nebã, n paas Asiiri nebã fãa sẽn naag bãmba, b kom-poal sẽn tar da-sãnde, n yaa gʋvɛrneer-dãmbã ne bʋ-kaoodb gilli, la nanambse, tɩ b fãa zao wiidi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Bãmb na n waa ne zab-teed sẽn yaa saar-dãmb la ne zab-teed sẽn bilimdi, la ne neb kʋʋng wʋsgo, n wa zab ne foom. Bãmb na n yii zĩig zãng n wa zab ne foom ne gãn-bɛd la gãn-bi ne kut pugli. Mam basa bʋ-kaoorã ne bãmba, la bãmb na n kaoo fo bʋʋd wa sẽn zems bãmb tõodã." 
Ezekiel23:25 M na n basame tɩ m nonglmã sũ-kĩir dɩ foom. Bãmb na n namsa foom ne sũ-puugri. Bãmb na n wõrga f yõorã la b wõrs f tʋbã, la fo yagensã na n paa tãpẽ. Bãmb na n yõga fo kom-pugli wã ne f kom-dibli wã, la bugum n na n dɩ fo yagensã." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bãmb na n fãa f futã la b wʋk f fãn-teedã. 
Ezekiel23:27 M na n kɩtame tɩ f yãn-tʋʋmã ne f yoobã tʋʋm f sẽn sɩng n maand hal Ezɩptã sɛ. Fo kõn leb n tõog n doog f neng n ges bãmba, fo kõn leb n tẽeg Ezɩpt yell ye.»" 
Ezekiel23:28 Bala, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, mam na n basa foom neb nins fo sẽn kisã nugẽ, neb nins fo sẽn basã." 
Ezekiel23:29 Bãmb na n kisga foom n nams-fo, bãmb na n deesa bũmb nins fo sẽn tʋm n paamã n bas-f zaalem fasɩ. B na n yeesa f futã n bas-f f zaala, f tʋʋm-dẽgdã ne f yãn-tʋʋmã, la f koos-m-mengã tʋʋm yĩnga." 
Ezekiel23:30 B na n maana foom a woto, fo sẽn koos f meng ne buud a taabã yĩnga, la f sẽn dẽgem f meng ne bãmb wẽn-naandsã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel23:31 Fo rɩka f tão-poakã naoore. Sɩbgr wamd ning mam sẽn kõ yẽnda wã, mam na n dɩk-a lame n kõ foom.»" 
Ezekiel23:32 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo na n yũu bõn-yũudlã sẽn be wamd ning f tão-poakã sẽn tall n yũ wã. Wamdã yalmame la a zulmame, la a poorẽ, b na n laa foom la b yaal foom. Bũmb nins sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yaa wʋsgo." 
Ezekiel23:33 Fo na n yũume tɩ f neng yilim tɩ sũ-sãang yõk-fo. Fo tão-poak a Samaari wamdã yaa rabeem ne sãoong wamde," 
Ezekiel23:34 Fo na n yũ-a lame, f na n yũ-a-la zãnga, fo na n pãb-a lame n wã. Fo na n bõoda f bĩisã. Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel23:35 Woto yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo sẽn yĩm mam yellã, fo sẽn zãgs maam n tud maam f kudgã yĩnga, bɩ yãn-tʋʋmã ne f koos-m-mengã tʋʋm me leb-fo.»" 
Ezekiel23:36 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo na n kao a Ohola ne a Oholiba bʋʋd bɩ? Bilg bãmb b yel-beedã sẽn yaa to-to." 
Ezekiel23:37 Bala, bãmb kẽesa b mens yoob pʋgẽ, la b nusã pida ne zɩɩm. Bãmb maana yoob ne b wẽn-naandsã. La sẽn paase, bãmb sẽn dag n dɩk b kom-dibli nins n kõ maamã, bãmb lebg n dɩk-b n lame n kɩt tɩ b lebg wẽn-naandsã rɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ad b sẽn leb n maan maam bũmb ninga: Badaar bala, bãmb dẽgma mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã, la b rẽgem m vʋʋsg rayã." 
Ezekiel23:39 Bãmb dɩka b kom-dibli n maan maoong n kõ b wẽn-naandsã, la badaar bala, bãmb kẽng n tɩ rẽgma mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã. Yaa a woto la bãmb maan mam doogã pʋga." 
Ezekiel23:40 La sẽn paas rẽndã, b tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ bool raop tɩ b yi zĩ-zãrsẽ n wa. La yaa bãmb yĩng la fo yik n so koom n ning f nin kɩrʋ, la f maneg n ning fan-teedo." 
Ezekiel23:41 Fo rag n zĩi gãag sẽn tar ziir zugu, tɩ taabl dag dɩg f taoore, la fo rag n dogla m wisdã ne m kaamã a zugu." 
Ezekiel23:42 La b rag n wʋmda Saabe-rãmb neb wʋsg sẽn be ne-a wã sũ-noog koeese. Raop nins sẽn yi we-raoogã kɩremsã fãa n wa wã ninga bi-puglã ne a yao wã nus zũyã, la b fõgen-b maanf sẽn yaa neere.»" 
Ezekiel23:43 La mam yeela m meng yaa: «Baa ne sẽn maan-a yoob n kʋʋlã ket n pʋgda raopa! 
Ezekiel23:44 Raopã kẽnda bãmb nengẽ, b wata a Ohola la a Oholiba sẽn yaa yoaadbã nengẽ wa b sẽn kẽnd pʋg-yoaadb nengẽ." 
Ezekiel23:45 La nin-tɩrs n na n kao pʋg-bãmbã bʋʋd wa b sẽn kaood yoaadbã la neb sẽn daag zɩɩm bʋʋdã. Bala, bãmb yoome, la b raag zɩɩm.»" 
Ezekiel23:46 Ad maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Tigim neb kʋʋng tɩ b wa zab ne-ba, n kẽes-b rabeem-kãseng la b fã-ba.»" 
Ezekiel23:47 Bɩ kʋʋn-kãng lob-b ne kug la b kʋ-b ne zabr sʋʋse. Bɩ b kʋ b kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã, la b ning b rotã bugum." 
Ezekiel23:48 Woto, m na kɩt tɩ b yoobã fãa sɛ tẽngã pʋga. La pagba fãa na n dɩka yam n da leb n maan yoob ning yãmb sẽn maanã ye." 
Ezekiel23:49 La m na n kɩtame tɩ y yoobã sɩbgr sig y zugu, la y na n tʋka y wẽn-naandsã pʋʋsg sɩbgre. Mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa maam n yeele." 
Ezekiel24:1 B sẽn kẽ yembdã yɩ tɩ yʋʋm-wɛɛlẽ, kiuug piig soabã rasem piig daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel24:2 «Ninsaala, gʋls rũndã daarã sebr pʋg fo mengã yĩnga. Bala, yaa rũndã daarã bal la Babilond dĩmã na n wa gũbg Zeruzalɛm n zab ne-a." 
Ezekiel24:3 Wẽ buud ning sẽn yaa tõatã yel-bũnd n yeel-a tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Bao rʋko, rʋgl-a, la f ning koom a pʋga." 
Ezekiel24:4 Wʋk nemdã sẽn beesã n los rʋkẽ wã, yaa nem-sõama wã fãa, gɛy wã ne bãgdã. Pids rʋkã ne kõb-sõamã wã." 
Ezekiel24:5 Yãk pe-nobdsã, n zam kõabã rʋkã tẽngre. Rʋg-a t'a kɛ sõama tɩ kõabã sẽn be a pʋgã fãa bɩ.› »" 
Ezekiel24:6 Woto yĩnga, ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Toog bee tẽng ning sẽn daagd zɩɩmã zugu, fo yaa wa rʋk sẽn kẽ tẽngempiisim, t'a tẽngempiismã ka leb n tõe n yi ye. Vaag nemdã sẽn be rʋkẽ wã, sags-b yembr-yembr n da bao n maan poeer ye." 
Ezekiel24:7 Bala, zɩɩm ning yẽndã sẽn daagã keta a pʋgẽ. Yẽnda raag-a-la pĩig zugu, a ka raag-a tẽng n bus-a ne tom ye." 
Ezekiel24:8 Mam sũ-yikrã pʋga, mam doka m sũur n daag yẽnda zɩɩm pĩig zug tɩ b ra tõog n bus-a ye.»" 
Ezekiel24:9 Woto yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Toog bee tẽng ning sẽn daagd zɩɩmã zugu! Ade, mam me na n zama bugum daado." 
Ezekiel24:10 Zam daad wʋsg n yõgen bugum, n dʋg nemdã, n ning-a zõodo, hal t'a kõabã fãa kãbe." 
Ezekiel24:11 La f yaool n dɩk rʋg-vɩʋʋgã, n dogl bug-saalã zug t'a wɩnge, tɩ bugmã yõog zũudã tɩ rẽgdã fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã yẽnege." 
Ezekiel24:12 Modgrã fãa yaa zaalem, bugmã ka na n tõog tɩ tẽngempiismã sẽn pid-a wã yi ye!" 
Ezekiel24:13 Zeruzalɛm, fo rẽgdã pʋga, yãn-tʋʋm n be beenẽ. Mam dag n dat n yɩlga foom, la fo sẽn kell n ka lebg yɩlemdã, fo kõn leb n paam f rẽgdã yɩlgre, hal tɩ mam wa sik m sũ-puugrã fo zugu." 
Ezekiel24:14 Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Bõn-kãng na n waame, maam n na n pids-a. Mam kõn tol n bas tɩ bũmb ba a yembr vaale, mam kõn maan nimbãan-zoeere, la m kõn maan m bãngẽ ye. B na n kaoo fo bʋʋd wa sẽn zems f manesmã ne f tʋʋmã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel24:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel24:16 «Ninsaala, mam na n deega fo sẽn nong a soab n yɩɩd fãa wã wakat a ye pʋgẽ. Ra wiisi, ra yãbe, la f ra bas tɩ f nintãm dʋʋg ye." 
Ezekiel24:17 Sidg f sũurẽ, da maan wa ned n ki ye, vil f zu-vindga, wid f neooda, ra lud f no-kõbdã, la f ra rɩ neb a taab rɩɩb ye.»" 
Ezekiel24:18 Mam goma ne nebã yibeoogo, la zaabre, mam pagã kiime. La a vẽkembeoog yibeoogo, mam maana wa b sẽn dag n yeel maamã." 
Ezekiel24:19 Nebã soka maam yaa: «Bilg tõnd fo sẽn maand woto wã võore.» 
Ezekiel24:20 La mam leok-b lame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gom ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel24:21 «Yeel Israyɛll buudã tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam dẽgemda m zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã, zĩig ning sẽn yaa yãmb zu-zẽkre, n yaa y pãngã, la yãmb sẽn get a soab tɩ noom yãmbã, tɩ y yam loe ne a soabã. Yãmb kom-dibli wã ne y kom-pugli nins yãmb sẽn loog n bas Zeruzalɛmã na n kii ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel24:22 Dẽ, yãmb me na n maana wa maam. Yãmb ka na n lud y no-kõbdo, la y ka na n dɩ ned a to rɩɩb ye.› »" 
Ezekiel24:23 Yãmb na n vila y zu-vindga, la y wid y neooda, la y ka na n wiisi, y ka na n yãb ye. La yãmb na n wõosa y kongrã pʋga, n sidg ne taaba." 
Ezekiel24:24 A Ezekɩyɛll na n lebga bãnd yãmb yĩnga. Yãmb na n maana wa yẽnda sẽn maanã kɛpɩ. Woto, bõn-kãng sã n wa maane. Yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel24:25 Sã n yaa ne foom a ninsaala, sɩd hakɩɩka, daar ning mam sẽn na n sãam bãmb zu-zẽkrã sẽn yaa bãmb pãngã, bãmb sẽn get a soab tɩ noom bãmbã, tɩ b yam loe ne a soabã, la m sẽn na n sãam bãmb kom-dibli wã ne b kom-pugli wã daare," 
Ezekiel24:26 ned ning sẽn na n põs-a wã na n waa fo nengẽ, n wa togs foom bõn-kãnga." 
Ezekiel24:27 Badaare, fo zelemdã na n lakame tɩ f gom ne sẽn põs-a wã, la f kõn leb n yɩ muk ye. Fo na n yɩɩ bãnd bãmb yĩnga, woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel25:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: 
Ezekiel25:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd n tees Amo nebã sẽnẽ n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam b wɛɛngẽ." 
Ezekiel25:3 Yeel Amo nebã tɩ b kelg Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb laa ha, ha, ha›, b sẽn dẽgem m sɛk zĩigã, la b sãam m tẽngã n tall Zʋʋda nebã n kẽng yembdã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel25:4 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, mam na n basame tɩ buud nins sẽn be yaangã soog yãmba. Bãmb na n tilga b rot y tẽnga pʋgẽ n zĩnd be n dɩ y koodã la b yũ y tẽngã bĩisim." 
Ezekiel25:5 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Raba lebg yʋgma bãgre, tɩ Amo nebã tẽng lebg rũm-bãooneg bãgre. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel25:6 Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Yãmb wẽe nug-poak n yɩg n tirs ne sũ-noog n maan y toor kae ne toog ning sẽn paam Israyɛllã. 
Ezekiel25:7 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, bãng-y tɩ mam na n wilga yãmb m pãngã. Mam na n basame tɩ bu-zẽmsã fã yãmba. Mam na n yiisa yãmb buud a taabã sʋka, mam na n menesa yãmb tẽms pʋse, mam na n sãama yãmba. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel25:8 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Moaab nebã ne Seyɩɩr nebã yeelame tɩ Zʋʋda buudã me yaa wa buud a taabã fãa. 
Ezekiel25:9 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wa zab ne tẽms nins sẽn be Moaab toadgẽ wã. Bãmb na n zaba ne a tẽmsã, a tẽms nins sẽn yaa neeb n yɩɩdã. Yaa Bɛt-Yesimote, Baall-Mewõ ne Kiriyatayim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Mam na n naaga bãmb ne Amo nebã n kõ buud nins sẽn be yaangã tɩ b sooge, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b ra leb n tẽeg Amo nebã sẽn be buud a taabã sʋkã yell ye." 
Ezekiel25:11 Mam na n sɩbga Moaab nebã. Woto, b na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel25:12 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Edom nebã sẽn dok b sũur ne Zʋʋda buudã yĩnga, bãmb ninga b meng taale." 
Ezekiel25:13 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n tẽega m nug n zab ne Edom, mam na n menesa ninsaalbã ne rũmsã, mam na n kɩtame t'a lebg raboogo, sẽn sɩng ne Teman n tɩ tãag Dedan tẽngã. Bãmb na n paa tãpẽ." 
Ezekiel25:14 Mam na n tũnuga Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã n dok m sũur ne Edom. Israyɛll na n maana bãmb wa sẽn zems mam sũ-puugrã ne m sũ-kãbrã. Woto, bãmb na bãng mam sũ-dokrã sẽn yaa bũmb ninga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel25:15 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Filistẽ-dãmbã sẽn maan sũ-dokre, n dok b sũur ne kisgri, la ne b sũur fãa, n dat n sãamã yĩnga, la beem ning bãmb sẽn tar wakat fãa wã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel25:16 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n tẽega m nug Filistẽ-dãmbã zugu. Mam na n yiisa Kerɛt nebã, la m kɩt tɩ sẽn be-b ko-kãsengã noorã meneme." 
Ezekiel25:17 Mam na n doka m sũur ne bãmba, ne sũ-puug-kãsemse. Mam sã n wa rok m sũurã ne bãmb n sɛ, la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› »" 
Ezekiel26:1 Yembdã loogr zugẽ tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yembre, kiuugã pipi daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel26:2 «Ninsaala, Tɩɩr nebã goma Zeruzalɛm n yeel tɩ: ‹Ha, ha, ha! B wãa tẽng ning sẽn dag yaa nebã fãa rignoorã! Tõnd n na n deeg yẽnda zĩiga. D na n lebga arzegs rãmba, bala, Zeruzalɛm lebga raboogo!›" 
Ezekiel26:3 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Tɩɩr tẽnga, mam na n zaba ne foom! M na n kɩtame tɩ buud wʋsg wa zab ne foom, wa ko-kãsengã ko-wĩis sẽn zẽkdã." 
Ezekiel26:4 Bãmb na n sãama Tɩɩr lalsã, la b sarem a gãsdã. Mam na n kõoga tẽngã toma, n bas t'a pĩigã puki." 
Ezekiel26:5 Tɩɩr tẽngã na n lebga zĩm-gãmbã yɛdgr zĩig ko-kãsengã sʋka. Yaa maam n gome. B na n basame tɩ buud a taab fã bãmba. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Ezekiel26:6 La b na n sãama yẽnda tẽn-bãooneg nins sẽn gũbg yẽnda wã ne zabr sʋʋga. Woto, b na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel26:7 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Babilond naab a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa dĩm-dãmb dĩmã yi rɩtg sẽnẽ n wa zab ne Tɩɩr tẽngã. Yẽnda na n waa ne wiidi, saar-dãmba, wed-rʋʋdba, la tãb-bi-kʋʋngo." 
Ezekiel26:8 La yẽnda na n sãama fo kom-pugli nins sẽn be-b wetẽ wã ne zabr sʋʋga. Bãmb na n tuu bogd n zam tom-dʋy n gilg foom. La b na n tilga gãn wa lalg n kogl b meng n zab ne foom. 
Ezekiel26:9 Yẽnda na n tã y lalsã ne zab-te-bɛd n wã, la b siig y gãsdã ne ra-zoob-bɛda." 
Ezekiel26:10 Yẽnda na n wa ne wed-mo-kʋʋngo, hal tɩ wiidã wubsg lud yãmba, la b wiidi wã ne b saar-dãmbã na n kɩtame tɩ f lalsã rigimdi. La bãmb sã n wa na n tũ tẽnga rignoor n kẽ tẽnga pʋga, tɩ yaa wa tẽng b sẽn zoe n zab n deege." 
Ezekiel26:11 Yẽnda wiidã nao na n taba y tẽngã soayã fãa, a na n kʋ y nebã ne zabr sʋʋga, la a lub y kug-viginds sẽn yaa yãmb pãng zĩigã tẽnga." 
Ezekiel26:12 B na n wʋka y arzegsã tɩ yɩ b paoongo, la b zɛ yãmb leebgã teedo, la b siig y lalsã, la b lub y ro-neebã, la b wʋk y kugã ne y raadã, la y tẽngã tom n lob koomã pʋga." 
Ezekiel26:13 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y yɩɩlã bʋrg sɛ, tɩ b ra leb n wʋm pends rãamd ye." 
Ezekiel26:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y tẽngã lebg pĩig tɩ b yɛdgd zĩm-gãmbã a zugu. La b kõn tol n leb n me foom yɛs ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome. Yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Ezekiel26:15 Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn gomd ne Tɩɩr nebã n yetẽ: «Fo lʋɩɩsã rãamde, la sẽn kiidbã yãbrã, la nebã kʋʋb sã n wa yik fo pʋgẽ, tẽms nins sẽn be koom sʋkã ka na n dig sɩda?" 
Ezekiel26:16 La tẽms nins fãa sẽn be koom noorã nanambs na n siga b naamã gɛy zut n yees b naam futã, la b yees b fut nins b sẽn kãdã. Rabeem-kãseng na n kẽe bãmb tɩ b zĩnd tẽnga. La wakat fãa, bãmb na n yɛɛsdame, la b pɛleng na n yɩka fo yĩnga." 
Ezekiel26:17 Bãmb na n wiisa fo yĩng n yeel foom yaa: ‹Kayto! Foom a tẽng ning yʋʋr sẽn dag n yi, foom a tẽng ning ko-kãsengã zug nebã sẽn dag n wat n tigimdẽ, n yaa tẽng sẽn tar pãng ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã, fo sãamame n menem! Fo nebã rag n kẽesda tẽms nins sẽn gũbg foomã neb rabeem!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Moasã, tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã na n diga ne rabeem fo lʋɩɩsã daare. Tẽms nins ko-kãsengã sẽn gũbgã zĩi ne rabeem fo menengã yĩnga.›" 
Ezekiel26:19 N-yẽe! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam sã n wa kɩt tɩ fo lebg tẽng sẽn yaa raboogo, wa tẽms nins ned sẽn ka be b pʋsẽ wã. Mam sã n wa kɩt tɩ zĩ-zulumsẽ koom zẽk n lim foom, tɩ ko-kãsemsã lim foom," 
Ezekiel26:20 mam na n kɩtame tɩ f naag neb nins sẽn sigd zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, n bʋʋg sẽn ki-b hal kʋdem wẽndẽ wã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f zĩnd tẽngã zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, ne neb nins sẽn sigd bog-zulungẽ wã n yɩ wa kʋdem-wẽndẽ raboodã, tɩ ned ra leb n zĩnd f pʋgẽ ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ nin-vɩɩsã tẽng tall ziiri." 
Ezekiel26:21 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg bũmb sẽn kõt pelen-yɩka, la fo kõn leb n yɩ baa fɩ. B na n baoo foom la b kõn tol n leb n yãnd-f abada. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel27:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel27:2 «Ninsaala, wiis Tɩɩr tẽngã yĩnga!" 
Ezekiel27:3 Gom ne Tɩɩr tẽngã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noor n maand leebg ne nebã buud fãa wã, la sẽn wẽnemd n tees tẽms wʋsg sẽn be koom sʋkã, n yeel-a tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: ‹Tɩɩr tẽnga, fo rag n yetame tɩ fo yaa tẽng sẽn tar da-sãnde!" 
Ezekiel27:4 Fo todsã bee ko-kãsengã sʋka. Sẽn me-b foomã mee foom tɩ f yaa neer zãnga. 
Ezekiel27:5 Bãmb maana fo kɩremsã ne sɩprɛs tɩɩs raad sẽn yit Seniir tẽnga. Bãmb maana fo ra-lugdsã ne sɛɛdr tɩɩs raad sẽn yit Libã. 
Ezekiel27:6 Bãmb maana fo kogl-rugsdsã ne sɛn tɩɩs raad sẽn yit Basã, la b maan fo zĩndg zĩisã ne sɩprɛs tɩɩs raad sẽn yit Sɩpre, n nags-b ne wob-yẽna." 
Ezekiel27:7 B maana fo pɛɛlã b sẽn kãdã ne gĩs-bãaneg sẽn yit Ezɩpt tẽnga. B maana fo tãb-kaoorã pɛɛl ne peen-bãmba, la b maan fo fu-rotã ne peen-moaamã, la peen-miid sẽn yit Eliisa tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã." 
Ezekiel27:8 Sɩdõ ne Arvaad nebã n dag n yaa fo kogl-rugsdba, la foom a Tɩɩr tẽng yam-dãmbã n dag n yaa fo tʋmtʋmdb koom koglgã pʋga." 
Ezekiel27:9 Geball tẽng kãsem-dãmbã ne a tʋʋm-mitbã n dag n be ne foom n manegd bũmb nins fãa sẽn sãam koglgã pʋgã. Koom kogend nins fãa sẽn dag n kẽnd ko-kãsengã zugã, ne b tʋmtʋmdbã rag n wata fo nengẽ n daad fo teedã." 
Ezekiel27:10 Pɛrs-rãmbã, ne Luud-rãmbã la Put tẽng rãmbã rag n bee fo tãb-biisã sʋka, bãmb n dag n yaa fo zab-zabdba. B rag n yagenda b gãndã ne b kut pugli wã fo nengẽ. Bãmb dag n kɩtame tɩ fo paamd zu-zẽkre.›" 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvaad nebã ne fo tãb-biisã n dag n karg n gilg fo lalsã. La Gamaad nebã n dag n be fo gãsdẽ wã. Bãmb dag n yagenda b logdã n gilg fo lalsã, n kɩt tɩ fo yaa neer zãnga.› »" 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarsɩɩs tẽngã rag n leebda ne foom, fo sẽn dag n tar teed buud toor-toor sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga. Bãmb wata ne wanzuri, kutu, waasdo, la namdo, n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:13 Gɛrs tẽngã, ne Tuball la Mesɛk tẽmsã dag n leebda ne foom, b rag n wata ne yembse, la teed sẽn yõg ne zũudu, n tekd ne teed nins fo sẽn tarã." 
Ezekiel27:14 Togarma nebã rag n wata ne wiidi, la ne rũms sẽn tõe n tɛ teedo, la bõn-weese, n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedan tẽng nebã me rag n leebda ne foom. Tẽms wʋsg sẽn be koom sʋkã rag n tũnugda foom n leebdẽ. La b rag n yaooda foom ne wob-yẽna, la ra-sabl sẽn yaa sĩdma." 
Ezekiel27:16 Siiri nebã rag n leebda ne foom, fo sẽn dag n tar teed wʋsgã yĩnga. La b wat ne kug-sõama sẽn pɩnda, peen-miidu, pɛɛl b sẽn kãde, la peen-gʋlem, ne zẽems buud toor-toor wams sẽn yaa miid la kẽese, la kug-sõama buud sẽn yaa miidu, n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:17 Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll tẽmsã rag n leebda ne foom. Bãmb rag n wata ne bɩle sẽn yit Minit soolmẽ, ne bur-maas buud toor-toore, la sɩɩdo, ne kaam, la bãas tɩ-sõodem, n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damaas tẽngã rag n leebda ne foom, fo sẽn dag n tar teed buud toor-toor sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga. Bãmb dag n wata ne reezẽ rãam sẽn yit Elbõ ne pe-kõbd sẽn yaa pɛɛlga, n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:19 Vedan ne Yaavan sẽn be Uzall soolmẽ wã rag n wata ne kut b sẽn kudi, ne parfẽ sẽn tar yũ-noogo, n tekd ne fo teedã." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan nebã rag n leebda ne foom, n wat ne wed-moos zombg teedo." 
Ezekiel27:21 Araabi ne Kedaar tẽng nanambsã fãa rag n tũnugda foom n leebdẽ. Bãmb dag n koosda pe-ribli, ne pe-raado, la boees ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:22 Seba ne Rama lɛɛbdbã rag n wat n leebda fo nengẽ. Bãmb dag n wata ne parfẽ-rãmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo, la ne kug-sõama buud toor-toore, la sãnem n koosd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:23 Aarã ne Kane, la Edɛn, ne Seba, la Asiiri ne Kilmaad lɛɛbdbã rag n leebda ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:24 Bãmb dag n wata ne te-neeb n leebd ne foom: Yaa fut sẽn yaa miidu, fut b sẽn kãde, fu-gʋlem buud toor-toore, ne wĩy b sẽn kale, n tar pãnga, n leebd ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tarsɩɩs koom kogl-bɛdã n dag n zɩt fo teedã. Fo rag n tara arzegs la ziir wʋsgo, n be ko-kãsemsã sʋka." 
Ezekiel27:26 Kogl-rugsdbã talla foom n kẽn ko-kãsems zutu. Yaang sobg wa n sãama foom ko-kãsemsã sʋka. 
Ezekiel27:27 Fo lʋɩɩsã daare, fo arzegsã, fo leebgã, fo teedã, la fo pʋgẽ tʋmtʋmdbã, ne f te-manegdbã, ne neb nins sẽn manegd fo teed sẽn sãamã, la fo raadensã, ne tãb-biis nins sẽn be fo nengẽ wã, la zãma wã fãa sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã, b fãa gill na n paa ko-kãsemsã sʋka." 
Ezekiel27:28 Sẽn manegd-b teedã fo pʋgẽ wã yel-pakrã kelemsã kɩtame tɩ zĩis nins sẽn be koomã noorã rigimdi. 
Ezekiel27:29 Neb nins sẽn mi-b koglg rugsgã fãa na n sig n basa b koom kogendã, la koom kogendã pʋsẽ tʋmtʋmdbã, ne sẽn manegd-b kogendã teedã fãa na n yii ko-kãsengã pʋga. Bãmb na n yalsa tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu." 
Ezekiel27:30 Bãmb na n zẽka b koees n yãb fo yĩnga, bãmb na n kelma ne sũ-sãanga. Bãmb na n yuga b zut tom, bãmb na n bilma tompeglmẽ." 
Ezekiel27:31 Bãmb na n põnga b zut fo yĩnga, bãmb na n sẽgna boto, bãmb na n kelma ne sũ-sãang f yĩnga. Bãmb na n wiisa ne sũ-sãang fo yĩnga." 
Ezekiel27:32 Bãmb toogã pʋga, b na n wiisa ne sũ-sãanga, la b yãb fo yĩng n yeele: «Ãnda n dag n yaa wa Tɩɩr tẽnga? Ãnda n dag n yaa wa tẽng ning sẽn lebg sɩddd... ko-kãsengã sʋkã?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Wakat ning b sẽn dag n yiisd fo leebgã teedã ko-kãsemsã pʋsẽ wã, fo rag n tɩgsda neb kʋʋng buud toor-toore. Fo paoongã ne f teedã sẽn dag n yaa wʋsgã yĩnga, fo kɩtame tɩ dũniyã rĩm-dãmb lebg arzegs rãmba." 
Ezekiel27:34 La ko-kãsemsã sẽn wa n sãam foomã, fo teedã ne f zãma wã fãa sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã lisa ko-zulumsẽ wã." 
Ezekiel27:35 Tẽms nins fãa sẽn be koom sʋkã yɛɛsa fo yĩnga. Rabeem kẽe bãmb dĩm-dãmbã, bãmb nens yeegame." 
Ezekiel27:36 Tẽn-zẽmsã neb nins sẽn yaa lɛɛbdbã fɩɩnda fo wɛɛngẽ. Fo lebga bũmb sẽn wat ne pelen-yɩka. Fo ka leb n beẽ, la f kõn tol n leb n zĩnd abada.»" 
Ezekiel28:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel28:2 «Ninsaala, yeel Tɩɩr naabã tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Fo wuka f meng n yeele: Mam yaa wẽnnaam, mam zĩi wẽnnaam-dãmbã sʋka, ko-kãsemsã sʋka.› Fo yaool n ka wẽnnaam ye. Fo yaa ninsaal bala. Fo rɩkda f tagsgã wa wẽnnaam tagsgo!" 
Ezekiel28:3 Ade, fo tara yam n yɩɩd a Dãniyɛlle, la bũmb ba a yembr ka solg ne foom ye." 
Ezekiel28:4 Fo sẽn tar yam ne bãngrã yĩnga, fo paama arzegse. Fo paama sãnem ne wanzuri n bĩng f laogã roogẽ." 
Ezekiel28:5 Fo sẽn mi leebg sõama wã yĩnga, fo arzegsã lebga wʋsgo. La fo wuka f meng f arzɛkã yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel28:6 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Fo sẽn tagsd tɩ fo tagsgã yaa wa wẽnnaam tagsgã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel28:7 mam na n kɩtame tɩ nin-sãams wa zab ne foom. Bãmb yaa nin-toos bu-zẽmsã sʋka. Bãmb na n wõ b zabr sʋʋse, n sãam fo yamã sẽn tar ra-sãndã, la b rẽgem f ziirã." 
Ezekiel28:8 Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ f sig bokẽ, la fo na n kii kũ-miig ko-kãsemsã sʋka." 
Ezekiel28:9 Fo kʋʋdbã taoore, fo tõe n leb n yeelame tɩ fo yaa wẽnnaam sɩda? Fo kʋʋdbã nifẽ, fo yaa ninsaal bala, fo ka wẽnnaam ye." 
Ezekiel28:10 Fo na n kii nin-sãamsã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã nugẽ. Bala, yaa maam n gome. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel28:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel28:12 «Ninsaala, pʋd sũ-sãang yɩɩll Tɩɩr dĩmã yĩng n yeel tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Fo rag n zemsa zãnga, n pid ne yam n yaa neer zãnga.›" 
Ezekiel28:13 Fo rag n bee Wẽnnaam zẽedã zĩigẽ Edɛn. Fo rag n zera f futã ne kug-sõama buud toor-toore: Yaa sardoande, topaaze, diyama, kirzoliti, onigsi, zaspe, lapiis-lazuli, ɛskarbukli, emeroode, n paas sãnem. F sɩlsãgsã ne f wɩɩsã rag n be f yĩng f naanegã daare." 
Ezekiel28:14 Fo rag n yaa serubẽ sẽn yaa gũuda, tɩ f pɩgsã yɛdge. Mam dag n ninga foom maam a Wẽnnaam tãn-sõngã zugu, tɩ f kẽnd kug-sõama sẽn wit bugum sʋka." 
Ezekiel28:15 Fo manesmã rag n zemsa zãng f naanegã wakate, hal n tãag daar ning b sẽn yã tɩ fo maanda wẽngã." 
Ezekiel28:16 Fo leebgã sẽn paam pãngã yĩnga, fo sũurã rag n pida ne wẽnga, la fo maana yel-wẽnã. Woto yĩnga, serubẽ sẽn yaa gũuda, mam digda foom n yiisd maam a Wẽnnaam tãn-sõngẽ wã, la mam na n menesa foom n kɩt tɩ f ra leb n zĩnd kug-sõama sẽn wit bugmã sʋk ye." 
Ezekiel28:17 Fo ra-sãndã yĩnga, fo wuka f menga. La fo ziirã yĩnga, fo sãama f yamã. Woto yĩnga, mam lobda foom tẽnga, n kɩt tɩ f lebg rĩm-dãmb a taabã bõn-gɛtla." 
Ezekiel28:18 Fo kongrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, ne fo sẽn maan wẽng f leebgã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, fo rẽgma f pʋʋsg zĩisã. Rẽ yĩngã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum yi fo pʋgẽ n dɩ-fo, la m kɩt tɩ f lebg tompeglem dũni zugu, neb nins fãa sẽn get foomã nifẽ." 
Ezekiel28:19 Buud a taabã neb nins fãa sẽn mi foomã yɛɛsa wʋsg fo yĩnga. Fo lebga bũmb sẽn wat ne pelen-yɩka. Fo ka leb n beẽ, la f kõn tol n leb n zĩnd abada.»" 
Ezekiel28:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel28:21 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees Sɩdõ tẽngã sẽnẽ n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam a yĩnga." 
Ezekiel28:22 Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: ‹Sɩdõ, mam zabda ne foom! Mam na n wilga m ziirã fo pʋgẽ.› Mam sã n wa na n sɩbg yẽnda, b na bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Mam na n wilga m pʋ-peelmã yẽnda pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel28:23 Mam na n tʋma bã-loangdg beenẽ, la m kɩt tɩ zɩɩm daag yẽnda soayã zutu. B na n yii zĩig zãng n wa zab ne yẽnda ne zabr sʋʋga, n kʋ neb wʋsg n dʋʋg tẽngã pʋga. Woto la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel28:24 Dẽ, tẽms nins fãa sẽn karg n gũbg Israyɛll n paoogd-a wã sʋka, yẽnda kõn leb n yɩ gõ-payãndga, wall gõaag sẽn kõsd tɩ zabdẽ, Israyɛll yĩng ye. Woto la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel28:25 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sã n wa yiis Israyɛll buudã nebã sẽn sãeeg n be buud a taabã sʋkã n wa tigim-ba, mam na n wilga m pʋ-peelmã ne bãmb buud a taabã fãa nifẽ. Bãmb na n zĩnda b tẽngẽ wã, tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ m tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobã." 
Ezekiel28:26 Israyɛll buudã neb na n zĩnda beenẽ ne bãane, n me roto, la b sel reezẽ tɩɩse. Mam sã n wa sɩbg neb nins sẽn gũbg Israyɛll n dag n paoogd-a wã, Israyɛll buudã nebã na n zĩnda beenẽ ne bãane. Woto la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Ezekiel29:1 Yʋʋm piig soabã pʋga, kiuug piig soabã rasem piig la a yiibã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel29:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees Ezɩpt dĩm a Faarõ sẽnẽ, n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam yẽnda ne Ezɩpt tẽngã fãa wɛɛngẽ!" 
Ezekiel29:3 Yeel tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Foom a Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã, mam zabda ne foom! Bala, fo yaa wag-bɛ-kẽeng n gãe fo Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soay sʋk n yetẽ: Nill kʋɩl-kãngã yaa maam n so, maam n maan-a m mengã yĩnga!" 
Ezekiel29:4 Beneere, mam na n ninga f yɛyã bãnga, la m kɩt tɩ fo Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soay zĩm wa tabend f yĩngã, la m na n taka foom n yiis f Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soay sʋka, foom ne f Nill kʋɩlgã zĩm nins fãa sẽn na n tabl fo yĩngã." 
Ezekiel29:5 Mam na n basa foom we-raoogã pʋga, foom ne f Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soay zĩmã fãa. Fo na n kii tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu. B ka na n mum-f ye, f na n paa be n weele. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo yɩ we-rũms la yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ rɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel29:6 Woto, Ezɩpt nebã fãa na n bãngame, tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Bala, bãmb yɩɩ wa tãnwĩig ra-tikdg Israyɛll buudã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel29:7 Bãmb sẽn tik foomã, fo kaoome n pogl b bãokã. Bãmb sẽn tik foomã, fo kaoome, la fo komsa bãmb kɩɩlã zãnga.›" 
Ezekiel29:8 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b wa zab ne foom ne zabr sʋʋga, n menes ninsaalbã ne rũmsã sẽn be fo pʋgẽ wã." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ezɩpt tẽngã na n lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la raboogo. Woto la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› » Bala, yẽnda yetame: «Nill kʋɩlgã yaa maam n so, la yaa maam n maan-a." 
Ezekiel29:10 Woto n kɩt tɩ mam zabd ne foom ne f Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã fãa. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt tẽngã lebg raboogo. A na n yɩɩ raboogo, la zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, sẽn sɩng ne Migdoll n tɩ tãag Sɩyɛnde, ne Kuus todsã." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ninsaal naoor kõn tabg be, rũng naoor kõn tabg be. Yẽnda na n paa woto yʋʋm pis-naas tɩ ned ka zĩnd a pʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel29:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, n yɩ wa tẽms nins sẽn yaa zĩ-vɩɩdã, la yẽnda tẽmsã na n lebga zĩ-vɩɩdo, wa tẽms nins sẽn yaa raboodã, hal n tãag yʋʋm pis-naase. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt nebã sãeeg n kẽ buud a taabã sʋka. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb sãeeg n tɩ zĩnd tẽmsã fãa pʋse.»" 
Ezekiel29:13 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yʋʋm pis-naasã sã n wa pidi, mam na n tigsa Ezɩpt nebã sẽn sãeeg buud a taabã sʋkã." 
Ezekiel29:14 Mam na n lebsa Ezɩpt tẽngã a zĩigẽ. Mam na n leb n talla bãmb n wa Patroose, tẽng ning bãmb sẽn yitẽ wã, la beenẽ, bãmb na n vigla soolem sẽn ka pãnga." 
Ezekiel29:15 Bãmb soolmã pãng na n yɩɩ bilf n yɩɩd soolem-dãmb a taabã, la a ka na n leb n zẽk a meng n yɩɩg buud a taabã ye. Mam na n booga b pãngã, tɩ b ka leb n tõog n soog buud a taabã ye." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israyɛll buudã kõn leb n dɩk b teegr n teeg Ezɩpt nebã, tɩ yɩ tẽegre, kongr ning Israyɛll buudã sẽn dag n maanã, b sẽn dag n wẽnemd n dɩk b teegrã n teeg Ezɩptã yĩnga. Woto la bãmb na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› »" 
Ezekiel29:17 Yʋʋmd pisi la a yopoe soabã pʋgẽ, pipi kiuugã pipi daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel29:18 «Ninsaala, Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame t'a tãb-biisã modg b meng n maan tʋʋmd sẽn yaa toogo, n na n zab ne Tɩɩr nebã. Bãmb fãa zutã wa n kõogame, tɩ b bãgdã fãa meede. La Babilond dĩmã woo, a tãb-biisã woo, bãmb ba a yembr ka paam yaood tʋʋmd ning b sẽn maan n zab ne Tɩɩr tẽngã yĩng ye." 
Ezekiel29:19 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, ad maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: ‹Mam na n dɩka Ezɩpt tẽngã n sagl Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar nugẽ. Yẽnda na n looga ne Ezɩpt paoongã, n wʋk a teedã, la a fã tẽngã: rẽndã n na n yɩ yẽnda tãb-biisã yaoodo," 
Ezekiel29:20 tʋʋmd ning a sẽn maanã yĩnga. Mam dɩkda Ezɩpt tẽngã n ningd Babilond dĩmã nugẽ. Bala, yẽnda tãb-biisã tʋm n kõo maam.» Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame:" 
Ezekiel29:21 «Badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll buudã paam pãnga, la m kɩt tɩ foom a Ezekɩyɛll zelemdã lak tɩ f gom bãmb sʋka. Woto la bãmb na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel30:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel30:2 «Ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã! Yeel tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Wiis-y n yeel-y-yã: Ad yaa toog daare!›" 
Ezekiel30:3 Bala, daar n wate, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã kolgdame. Yaa sawad-taok daare: na n yɩɩ bu-zẽmsã wakate." 
Ezekiel30:4 Zabr sʋʋgã wata Ezɩpt tẽnga. B sã n wa kʋʋd Ezɩpt tẽng nebã, Kuus tẽng nebã na n zĩi ne yɩɩre. B na n zɛɛ Ezɩpt tẽng paoongã, la b na n kõoga a yẽbgrã." 
Ezekiel30:5 La Kuus ne Puut la Luud nebã, ne sãamb nins fãa sẽn kalem taab n be Araabi wã, la Libi nebã, ne kaoolã tẽngẽ kambã na n naaga bãmb n pa tãpẽ.› »" 
Ezekiel30:6 Ade, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ezɩpt tẽngã sẽn teeg-b rãmbã na n paa zabrẽ wã, la yẽnda sẽn wukd a meng ne pãng ningã na n sɛɛme. Bãmb na n paa tãpẽ, sẽn sɩng ne Migdoll n tɩ tãag Siyɛnde. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel30:7 Bãmb na n sãama wa tẽms nins sẽn sãamã, la Ezɩpt tẽmsã na n lebga raboodo, wa tẽms nins sẽn yaa raboodã." 
Ezekiel30:8 Mam sã n wa ning Ezɩpt tẽngã bugum, la m sãam a sõangdbã fãa, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel30:9 Badaare, koe-toagsdb na n yii mam nengẽ ne koom kogend n tɩ kɩt tɩ Kuus tẽngã sẽn gãe bãanã rigimdi. Ezɩpt sãoongã daare, bãmb neb kẽer na n zĩi ne yɩɩre. Ad a sẽn wate!"
