Ezekiel30:10 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n tũnuga Babilond dĩm a Nebukatnedzaar n menes Ezɩpt neb kʋʋngã." 
Ezekiel30:11 B na n talla yẽnda ne a nebã sẽn yaa nin-toos n yɩɩd buud a taabã n wa kɩt tɩ b sãam tẽngã. Bãmb na n wõ b zabr sʋʋse, n zab ne Ezɩpt tẽngã, n kɩt tɩ tẽngã pid ne kũum." 
Ezekiel30:12 Mam na n kʋɩɩsa Nill kʋɩlgã ko-soayã. Mam na n dɩka Ezɩpt nebã n koos ne nin-wẽnse. M na n kɩtame tɩ sãamb wa sãam tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.» 
Ezekiel30:13 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n menesa wẽn-naandsã la m yiis zĩrẽ wẽnnaam-dãmbã sẽn be Nof tẽngã pʋgã. Naab kõn leb n zĩnd Ezɩpt tẽngã pʋg ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ rabeem kẽ Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Ezekiel30:14 Mam na n sãama Patros tẽngã, la m ning Soan tẽngã bugum, la m sɩbg No tẽngã neb kʋʋngã." 
Ezekiel30:15 Mam na n sika m sũ-puugrã Sĩn tẽngã sẽn yaa Ezɩpt pãng zĩigã zugu, la m menes No tẽng neb kʋʋngã." 
Ezekiel30:16 Mam na n ninga Ezɩpt tẽngã bugum. Sĩn tẽngã nebã na n diga ne rabeem. B na n wãa No tẽng lalsã, la bɛɛbã na n zab n deega Nof tẽngã wĩnto-sʋka." 
Ezekiel30:17 Ond tẽngã ne Pi-Besɛt tẽngã kom-bɩɩs na n paa tãpẽ, la b na n talla tẽn-bãmb nebã n tɩ kẽes yembdo." 
Ezekiel30:18 Daar ning mam sẽn na n sãam balgr ning Ezɩpt sẽn balg nebã, n kɩt t'a sẽn wukd a meng ne pãng ningã sɛ wã, Takpanees tẽngã na n lebga lik bida. Sawad-taok n na n lud Takpaneese, la b na n talla a tẽmsã neb n tɩ kẽes yembdo." 
Ezekiel30:19 Mam na n sɩbga Ezɩpt tẽngã, la b na n bãngame tɩ maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel30:20 Yʋʋmd piig la a yembr soabã pʋgẽ, pipi kiuugã rasem a yopoe daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel30:21 «Ninsaala, mam kaooga Ezɩpt dĩm a Faarõ kangã! La ned ba a yembr ka wa ne tɩɩm n na n tɩp-a ye! La b ka wa ne pɛɛl sẽn na n vil a kangã t'a leb n paam pãng n tõog n gãd sʋʋg ye." 
Ezekiel30:22 Yaa rẽ tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-ka-Saab yetẽ: ‹Mam na n zaba ne Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã. Mam na n kaooga a kang ning sẽn tar-a pãngã ne kang ning sẽn zoe n kaoog-a wã, n kɩt t'a zabr sʋʋgã yi a nugẽ n lʋɩ." 
Ezekiel30:23 Mam na n sãeega Ezɩpt nebã n kẽes buud a taabã sʋka, m na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n zĩnd tẽms a taabã fãa pʋse." 
Ezekiel30:24 Mam na n paasa Babilond dĩmã kams pãnga, la m dɩk m zabr sʋʋgã n ning a nugẽ. Mam na n kaoo Ezɩpt dĩmã kamsã, t'a wõos Babilond dĩmã taoor wa ned sẽn dat n ki." 
Ezekiel30:25 Mam na n paasa Babilond dĩmã kams pãnga, la Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ kamsã pãng na n sɛɛme." 
Ezekiel30:26 Mam na n sãeega Ezɩpt nebã n kẽes buud a taabã sʋka, m na n kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n zĩnd tẽms a taabã fãa pʋse. Woto, b na n bãngame tɩ yaa maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel31:1 Yʋʋmd piig la a yembr soabã pʋgẽ, kiuug a tãab soabã pipi daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel31:2 «Ninsaala, yeel Ezɩpt rĩm a Faarõ ne a neb kʋʋngã yaa: ‹Fo wẽnda ãnda f kãosengã pʋgẽ?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ade, Asiiri rag n wẽnda wa Libã sɛɛdr tɩɩga, yẽnda rag n tara wil sẽn yaa neeba, n tar maasem wʋsgo. A rag n tãoome n yaa woko, t'a zugã rag n sãd n tat sawatã." 
Ezekiel31:4 Koomã rag n kɩtame t'a bɩ. Ko-bundmã rag n kɩtame t'a tão n lebg woko. Ko-zoetmã rag n tigimda a sɛɛgẽ wã, n lebgd n zoet n kẽed tɩɩs a taabã fãa sẽn be weoogã pʋgã." 
Ezekiel31:5 Yẽnda yẽgã sẽn dag n sag ko-kãsemsã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, a tãoome n zʋʋg tɩɩs a taabã fãa sẽn be weoogã pʋgã. Yẽnda wilã rag n yaa wʋsgo, n tão n yaa wogdo." 
Ezekiel31:6 Yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa rag n tʋɩta b tʋgd a wilẽ wã. We-rũmsã fãa rag n wat n dogda b kambã yẽnda tẽngre, la buud toay-toayã fãa neb rag n vɩ a maasmã tẽngre." 
Ezekiel31:7 Yẽnda sẽn dag n yaa bedre, t'a wilã tão n yaa wogdã kɩtame tɩ yẽnda tar da-sãnde. Bala, a yẽgã rag n saga ko-kãsemsã pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel31:8 Wẽnnaam zẽedã zĩigẽ sɛɛdr tɩɩsã ba a yembr ka yɩɩd-a ye. Sɩprɛs tɩɩsã woglem dag n ka yɩɩd a wilã ye. La palatan ba a yembr vãad zɩ n yɩ bĩmm wa yẽnda ye. La Wẽnnaam zẽedã pʋgẽ, tɩɩg ba a yembr dag n ka be n wẽnd-a ye." 
Ezekiel31:9 Mam dag n kɩtame t'a tar wil wʋsg n yaa neere, Edɛn zẽedã zĩigẽ, Wẽnnaam zẽedã pʋgẽ, tɩɩsã rag n maanda sũkiir ne yẽnda.»" 
Ezekiel31:10 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Yẽnda rag n yaa woko, la yẽnda zugã woglem dag n yɩɩda tɩɩs a taabã sẽn bĩmã. Yẽnda rag n wukda a meng a woglmã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel31:11 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam na n bas yẽnda buud toay-toay pãens rãmb nusẽ, tɩ b maan-a wa sẽn zems a wẽnemã. Mam diga yẽnda." 
Ezekiel31:12 Sãamb sẽn yaa buud toay-toayã nin-toosã, wa n kɛ-a lame n bas-a beenẽ, la a wilã kaoome n dʋʋg tãmsã zutu, la tãn-londã fãa pʋse, t'a wil-bãoonegã kao n dʋʋg tẽngã ko-soayã fãa pʋse. Dũniyã nebã buud fãa sẽn dag n vɩ a maasmẽ wã loogame n bas-a." 
Ezekiel31:13 Yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa wa n be a wilã sẽn kao wã zutu. La we-rũmsã fãa wa n maana b gãag zĩig yẽnda wil-bãoonegã sʋka. 
Ezekiel31:14 Na n yɩɩ woto, tɩ tɩɩs nins sẽn be koom noorã ba a yembr da leb n tõog n bɩ n lebg wok ye. Bãmb ba a yembr zug woglem kõn leb n zʋʋg tɩɩs a taabã sẽn bĩmã ye. Tɩ-bɛdã sẽn paamd koomã ba a yembr ka na n tõog n bɩ n lebg wok ye. Bala, bãmb fãa na n kiime, b na n siga tẽngã zĩ-zulumsẽ, n naag ninsaalbã, ne sẽn sigd-b bok pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Ezekiel31:15 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Daar ning sɛɛdr tɩɩgã sẽn sig kɩɩm-kulgã, mam kɩtame tɩ bũmb fãa maan sũ-sãanga. Yẽnda yĩng kɩtame tɩ mam yẽd bog-zulumsã, la m gɩdg kʋɩlsã. Ko-kãsemsã koom yalsame. Mam kɩtame tɩ lik zĩnd Libã, wetã tɩɩs fãa kʋɩɩ yẽnda yĩnga." 
Ezekiel31:16 Mam sẽn kɩt tɩ yẽnda sig kɩɩm-kulg n naag b rãmb nins sẽn sigd bok pʋgẽ wã, mam kɩtame tɩ yẽnda lʋɩɩsã bʋrg kɩt tɩ buud toay-toayã fãa rigi. Edɛn tɩɩsã fãa, ne Libã tɩɩsã sẽn yaa tɩ-neeb la sõama n yɩɩdã, la tɩɩs nins fãa sẽn paamd koomã, bãmb fãa sẽn be tẽngã zĩ-zulumsẽ wã paama belsgo." 
Ezekiel31:17 Bãmb me siga kɩɩm-kulg ne yẽnda, n naag b rãmb nins sẽn pa tãpẽ wã. Bãmb n dag n yaa sõangdba, n vɩ a maasmẽ wã buud a taabã sʋka." 
Ezekiel31:18 Edɛn tɩɩsã sʋka, ãndã n wẽnd foom, f ziirã ne f kãosengã pʋga? B yaool n na n kɩtame tɩ fo naag Edɛn tɩɩsã fãa n sig tẽngã zĩ-zulumsẽ. Fo na n gãanda sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã sʋka. Ad Faarõ ne a nebã baoosgo. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel32:1 Yʋʋmd piig la a yiib soabã pʋga, kiuug piig la a yiibẽ soabã pipi daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel32:2 «Ninsaala, pʋd sũ-sãang yɩɩll Faarõ sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã yĩng n yeel yaa: ‹Fo bee bu-zẽmsã sʋk wa gɩgem-polle, la fo yaa wa wag-bɛɛg sẽn be ko-kãsemsã pʋse, fo rag n be f kʋɩlsã pʋs n lisd n pukdẽ, fo naoã rag n bendgda koomã, fo rag n dãmbda b ko-wĩisã.›" 
Ezekiel32:3 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹M na n kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg wa tigme, tɩ m yɛdg m gãmbrã fo zugu. Bãmb na n vuuga foom ne m gãmbrã n yiisi." 
Ezekiel32:4 M na n basa foom tẽn-koɛɛngã zugu, m na n tɩ lob-f-la weoogẽ wã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yĩngr bõn-yɩgdɩ wã fãa wa zĩnd fo zugu. La m na n kɩtame tɩ dũniyã rũmsã fãa wa wãb foom n tɩge." 
Ezekiel32:5 Mam na n sãeega f nemdã tãmsã zutu, la m pids tãn-londã ne f nem-zersã." 
Ezekiel32:6 Mam na n zãgsa tẽng ning fo sẽn be a pʋgẽ n dugdã ne fo zɩɩmã, hal n tãag tãmsã zutu, n pid f kʋɩl-wagdã." 
Ezekiel32:7 Fo sã n wa ki, m na n luda sa-gãongã, la m kɩt tɩ ãdsã sobge. Mam na n luda wĩndgã ne sawad-taoko, la kiuugã ka na n leb n kõ a vẽenem yɛs ye." 
Ezekiel32:8 Fo yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ vẽenem buudã fãa sẽn be yĩngrã lebg lika, la m kɩt tɩ f tẽngã gill lebg lik bida. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.›" 
Ezekiel32:9 Mam sã n wa kɩt tɩ buud toay-toay sẽn be tẽms fo sẽn dag n ka mi pʋs wʋm fo sãoongã kibare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ neb buud wʋsg sũy sãame." 
Ezekiel32:10 Mam na n sãama buud wʋsg neb fo yĩnga, la bãmb dĩm-dãmbã na n diga ne rabeem fo yĩnga. Mam sã n wa wõog m sʋʋgã bãmb taoore, bãmb ned kam fãa na n diga ne rabeem a mengã vɩɩm yĩng fo sãoongã daare.»" 
Ezekiel32:11 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Babilond dĩmã sʋʋg na n taa foom." 
Ezekiel32:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ gãndaad sẽn yaa nin-toos n yɩɩd buud a taabã fãa wã kʋ f neb kʋʋngã ne zabr sʋʋga. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt tɩtaamã sɛ, la b sãam a neb kʋʋngã fãa." 
Ezekiel32:13 M na n sãama a rũms nins fãa sẽn wat ko-kãsemsã noyã. Ninsaal naoor kõn leb n bendg koomã, la rũng nao-beong me kõn leb n bendg-a ye." 
Ezekiel32:14 Dẽ, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Ezɩpt koomã tisgi, la m kɩt tɩ b kʋɩlsã koom zoe wa kaam. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel32:15 Mam sã n wa kɩt tɩ Ezɩpt lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la m kɩt tɩ b vaag bũmb nins fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋgẽ wã n looge, mam sã n wa kʋ tẽngã neb fãa zãnga, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel32:16 Woto yaa sũ-sãang yɩɩlle, la b na n yɩɩl-a lame. Buud a taabã fãa kom-pugli na n yɩɩl-a lame. Bãmb na n yɩɩl-a-la Ezɩpt ne a neb kʋʋngã fãa yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel32:17 Yʋʋmd piig la a yiib soabã pʋgẽ, kiuugã rasem piig la a nu daarã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Ezekiel32:18 «Ninsaala, wõos Ezɩpt neb kʋʋngã yĩnga, la f kɩt tɩ bãmb ne buud a taabã sẽn tar pãensã tẽms sig dũniyã zĩ-zulumsẽ wã, n naag b rãmb nins sẽn sigd bokẽ wã." 
Ezekiel32:19 Fo yɩɩda ãnda ne ra-sãnde? Sig tɩ b gãneg-f n naag sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã! 
Ezekiel32:20 Ezɩpt neb kʋʋngã na n ki n naaga neb nins sẽn pa tãpẽ wã. Zabr sʋʋg waame. Sãam-y Ezɩpt ne a neb kʋʋngã! 
Ezekiel32:21 Gãndaad meng-mengã, ne Ezɩpt sõangdbã na n zĩnda kɩɩm-kulg n gom ne-a n yeele: Ad sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã sẽn ki zabrẽ wã watame n na n gãand ne tõndo." 
Ezekiel32:22 Ade, Asiiri ne a zãma wã fãa la woto. Ad yẽnda zãma wã sẽn pa tãpẽ wã yaad sẽn gũbg-a." 
Ezekiel32:23 B ninga bãmb yaadã bokã zĩ-zulumsẽ, n gũbg a yaoogã. Bãmb sẽn dag n kẽesd dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeemã paa tãpẽ." 
Ezekiel32:24 Ad Elam ne a zãma wã fãa yaad sẽn gũbg a yaoogã, bãmb fãa paa tãpẽ. Bãmb fãa sẽn dag n kẽesd dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeemã siga dũniyã zĩ-zulumsẽ n ka kẽ bãong ye. Bãmb naaga neb nins sẽn sigd bok pʋgẽ wã n dɩ yãnde." 
Ezekiel32:25 N-yẽe! B tʋɩɩ Elam dĩmã gãag a zãma wã fãa sẽn ki wã sʋka, tɩ b yaadã gũbg-a. Nin-bãmbã fãa sẽn ka kẽ bãongã paa tãpẽ, bala, bãmb dag n kẽesda dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeem, la bãmb naaga neb nins sẽn sigd bok pʋgẽ wã n dɩ yãnde. B ninga bãmb sẽn ki-bã sʋka." 
Ezekiel32:26 Mesɛk ne Tuball me bee be, la b zãma wã fãa yaad gũbga bãmba. Nin-bãmbã fãa sẽn ka kẽ bãongã paa tãpẽ, bala, bãmb dag n kẽesda dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeem." 
Ezekiel32:27 B ka gãneg bãmb n naag gãndaadã, b ka naag bãmb neb nins sẽn ka kẽ bãongã sẽn ki wã sʋk ye. Bãmb siga kɩɩm-kulg ne b zab-teedã, tɩ b kʋgl bãmb zutã ne b zabr sʋʋsã. Bãmb yel-wẽnã yaool n taba b kõabã, bala, bãmb dag n kẽesda dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeem." 
Ezekiel32:28 La sã n yaa ne foom a Faarõ, fo me na n kiime tɩ b mum foom n naag sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã sẽn ki zabrẽ wã.»" 
Ezekiel32:29 «Ad Edom ne a rĩm-dãmbã la a nanambsã. Baa ne bãmb sẽn dag n yaa gãndaadã, b rɩka bãmb n ning sẽn pa-b tãpẽ wã sʋka. B gãnega bãmb sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã sʋka, n naag sẽn sigd-b bok pʋgẽ wã." 
Ezekiel32:30 Ad tẽms nins fãa sẽn be nug-rɩtgã nanambsã, ne Sɩdõ nebã fãa sẽn naag sẽn ki-bã n sigã. Baa ne bãmb sẽn yɩ gãndaad n dag n kẽesd nebã rabeemã, bãmb dɩɩ yãnde. Nin-bãmbã sẽn ka kẽ bãongã gãeeme n naag sẽn pa-b tãpẽ wã, la bãmb ne sẽn sigd-b bokẽ wã rɩɩ yãnde." 
Ezekiel32:31 Faarõ na n yãnda bãmba, la a na n paama belsgo, yẽnda zãma wã fãa ne a nebã la a tãb-biisã fãa sẽn pa tãpẽ wã wɛɛngẽ. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel32:32 Bala, mam na n kẽesa dũniyã nin-vɩɩs rabeem. B na n gãnega Faarõ ne a zãma wã fãa neb nins sẽn ka kẽ-b bãongã sʋka, n naag b rãmb nins sẽn pa tãpẽ wã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel33:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel33:2 «Ninsaala, gom ne f buudã nebã! Yeel-b yaa: ‹Mam sã n kɩt tɩ b wa n na n zab ne tẽngã ne zabr sʋʋga, tɩ tẽngã neb yãk ned a yembr bãmb sʋkã n kɩt t'a yɩ gũuda," 
Ezekiel33:3 nin-kãng sã n yãnd tɩ b wat n na n zaba ne tẽngã ne zabr sʋʋga, t'a peeb baorg n keoog nebã," 
Ezekiel33:4 ned sã n wʋm baorgã peebg n zãgs keoogrã, tɩ zabr sʋʋgã wa sãam-a, nin-kãng zɩɩmã taal be a meng zugu." 
Ezekiel33:5 Bala, yẽnda wʋma baorgã peebgo, n zãgs keoogrã. Woto, yẽnda zɩɩmã taal be a meng zugu. La sẽn sak-a keoogrã n na n fãag a vɩɩm." 
Ezekiel33:6 Gũudã sã n neẽ tɩ b wata ne zabr sʋʋgã, t'a ka peeb baorgã n keoog nebã, tɩ zabr sʋʋgã wa sãam neda, ned ning sʋʋgã sẽn na n sãamã kongr taal ka leb n be a meng zug ye. La yaa gũudã la mam na n ning taal nedã kũum yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:7 Foom a ninsaala, mam yãkda foom tɩ f yɩ Israyɛll buudã gũuda. Fo na n kelga m sẽn na n yeel foom bũmb ningã n keoog-b n yeel tɩ yaa maam n yeele." 
Ezekiel33:8 Mam sã n yeel nin-wẽng t'a na n kiime, tɩ f ka keoog-a, n yeel-a t'a bas a manesem-wẽngã n paam n vɩɩmde, a na n ki a kongrã pʋga, la mam na n ning foom taal a kũumã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:9 La foom, fo sã n keoog nin-wẽng a manesem-wẽngã wɛɛngẽ, t'a ka wẽnemd n bas a manesmã, a na n ki a beegrã pʋga, la fo na n fãag f vɩɩm.› »" 
Ezekiel33:10 «Foom a ninsaala, yeel Israyɛll buudã yaa: Yãmb yetame: ‹Tõnd beegrã ne d yel-wẽnã be d mens zutu, la yaa bãmb yĩng la tõnd be ka n wõosdẽ. Dẽ wã, tõnd na n maana a wãn n vɩɩmde?›" 
Ezekiel33:11 Yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: ‹Dẽ yĩnga, mam daab yaa tɩ nin-wẽng na ki bɩ, yaa t'a na tek yam n bas a manesem-wẽngã n paam n vɩɩmde! Wẽnemd-y-yã! Wẽnemd-y n bas-y y manesem-wẽngã! Israyɛll buudu, bõe tɩ yãmb tog n ki?›" 
Ezekiel33:12 Foom a ninsaala, yeel fo buudã neb yaa: ‹Nin-tɩrg tɩrlmã ka na n fãag-a daar ning a sẽn na n beegã ye. La nin-wẽng manesem-wẽngã ka na n lub-a daar ning a sẽn na n wẽnemd n bas a manesem-wẽngã ye. Baa ne nin-tɩrg tɩrlmã, a ka na n tõog n vɩɩmd a sẽn na n maan yel-wẽndã daar ye.›" 
Ezekiel33:13 Mam sã n yeel tɩ nin-tɩrg na n vɩɩmdame, t'a teeg a tɩrlmã n maan wẽnga, b ka na n leb n tẽeg yẽnda tɩrlem tʋʋmã yell ye. Yẽnda sẽn maan tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga, a na n kiime." 
Ezekiel33:14 Mam sã n yeel tɩ nin-wẽng na n kiime, t'a wẽnemd n bas a yel-wẽnã, n maan sẽn zems la sẽn yaa tɩrga," 
Ezekiel33:15 yẽnda sã n lebs bũmb ning b sẽn gãneg ne yẽnda wã, la a lebs yẽnda sẽn dag n maan wẽgb n paam bũmb ningã, n sak m tõodã sẽn kõt vɩɩmã, n ka leb n maan sẽn ka tɩrga, a ka na n ki ye, a na n vɩɩmdame." 
Ezekiel33:16 B kõn leb n tẽeg yel-wẽn nins yẽnda sẽn dag n maanã ba a yembr yell ye. Yẽnda sẽn maan sẽn zems la sẽn yaa tɩrgã yĩnga, a na n vɩɩmdame." 
Ezekiel33:17 Fo buudã neb yetame: ‹Zu-soabã sẽn maandã ka zems ye!› La yaool n yaa bãmb sẽn maandã n ka zemse. 
Ezekiel33:18 Nin-tɩrg sã n bas a tɩrlmã n maan sẽn ka tɩrga, a na n kii bõn-kãng yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:19 La nin-wẽng sã n bas a manesem-wẽngã, n sak n maan sẽn zems la sẽn yaa tɩrga, yẽnda na n vɩɩmda bõn-kãng yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:20 La yãmb yetame: ‹Zu-soabã sẽn maandã ka zems ye!› Israyɛll buudu, mam na n kaoo yãmb ned kam fãa bʋʋd wa sẽn zems a yel-manesem.»" 
Ezekiel33:21 Tõnd sẽn wa n be yembdã tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yiibu, kiuug piig soabã rasem a nu daarã, la ned a yembr paam n põs n yi Zeruzalɛm n wa mam nengẽ n yeel maam yaa: «B reega tẽngã!»" 
Ezekiel33:22 Nin-kãng sẽn na n wa mam nengẽ wã daar ne yibeoogã ket tɩ beoogo, Zu-soabã sɩɩsa maam zaabr wakate, n kɩt tɩ mam zelemdã lake. Dẽ, mam zelemdã lakame tɩ mam ka leb n yaa muk ye." 
Ezekiel33:23 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel33:24 «Ninsaala, yaa woto la neb nins sẽn be Israyɛll tẽngã rabood pʋsẽ wã yeta: ‹A Abrahaam rag n yaa a yembre, la a reega tẽngã n sooge. Tõnd yaa neb kʋʋngo, la b kõo tõnd tẽngã tɩ d sooge.›" 
Ezekiel33:25 Woto yĩnga, bɩ f yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Yãmb wãbda rũng ne a zɩɩm, la y waoogd wẽn-naandse. Yãmb daagda zɩɩm. La yãmb tẽedame tɩ y na n sooga tẽngã la?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Yãmb teega y zabr sʋʋse, yãmb maanda yel-beedo, yãmb ned kam fãa maanda rẽgd ne a to paga. La yãmb tẽedame tɩ y na n sooga tẽngã la?›" 
Ezekiel33:27 Ad fo sẽn na n yeel tɩ bũmb ninga: ‹Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Hakɩɩka! Mam wẽenda ne m menga, tɩ neb nins sẽn be tẽngã rabood pʋsẽ wã fãa na n paa tãpẽ, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ sẽn be-b wetẽ wã lebg we-rũms rɩɩbo, la bã-loangdg na n kʋʋ sẽn be-b tãms sẽgsẽ wã, ne sẽn be-b tãms bogdẽ wã." 
Ezekiel33:28 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽngã lebg zĩ-vɩuʋg zãnga. Yẽnda sẽn wukd a meng ne pãng ningã na n sɛɛme. Israyɛll tãmsã na n sãamame, la ned kõn leb n loog beenẽ ye." 
Ezekiel33:29 Mam sã n wa sãam tẽngã zãng n kɩt t'a lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋg zãnga, yel-beed nins fãa b sẽn maanã yĩnga, wakat-kãng la b na n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.›" 
Ezekiel33:30 La foom a ninsaala, fo buudã neb gomda fo yell b lalsã seesẽ, la b rotã rig-noyẽ, bãmb ned kam fãa gomda ne a ba-biig n yetẽ: ‹M kotame tɩ y wa kelg koɛɛg sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ!›" 
Ezekiel33:31 Bãmb kʋʋngã wata fo nengẽ, mam nebã zĩi fo taoore, n kelgd fo goamã, la b ka maand wa fo sẽn yetã ye.› Bala, bãmb gomda no-noom goamã, la b sũyã yaool n pida ne yão-beedo." 
Ezekiel33:32 Ne bãmba, fo yaa wa yɩɩn-yɩɩnd sẽn tar koe-noogo, n yɩɩnd ne yʋʋm-teed tɩ noomẽ. Bãmb kelgda fo goamã, la b ka rɩkd-a n ning a nao-kẽndr zug ye. B kelgda f saglsã la b ka tũud ye." 
Ezekiel33:33 Bõn-kãens sã n wa wa, la b wa n sɛɛme, la bãmb na yaool n bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs n dag n be bãmb sʋka.»" 
Ezekiel34:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel34:2 «Ninsaala, togs Israyɛll pe-kɩɩmbã pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel tɩ m yaa Zu-soaba, la m yetame: ‹Israyɛll pe-kɩɩmbã na n paama toogo. Bala, bãmb dɩlgda b mens n basd piisã! La yaool n yaa pe-kɩɩmbã n dag n tog n dɩlg piisã." 
Ezekiel34:3 Yãmb dɩlgda y mens ne piisã bĩisim, la y yeelgd fut sẽn maan ne piisã kõbdo, la y kʋʋd pe-nobdsã n wãbdẽ." 
Ezekiel34:4 Yãmb ka ges pe-wagã yell n paas-b pãng ye. Yãmb ka tɩbs bãad-dãmbã, la sẽn pogl-bã ye. Yãmb ka lek piis nins sẽn dag n bʋdgã ye, la y ka bao sẽn dag n menem-bã ye. Yãmb soog-b-la ne pãng la weoogre." 
Ezekiel34:5 Woto, pe-kɩɩm sẽn ka be wã yĩnga, piisã sãeegame n lebg we-rũms fãa rɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel34:6 Mam piisã sãeegã tãmsã la kunkubã fãa zutu, mam piisã sãeega zĩis fãa dũniyã zugu, la ned ba a ye ka be sẽn get b yelle, ned ba a yembr ka baood-ba.› »" 
Ezekiel34:7 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Israyɛll pe-kɩɩmba, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta:" 
Ezekiel34:8 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã wẽendame n yetẽ: Hakɩɩka! Mam piisã sẽn sãamã yĩnga, pe-kɩɩmbã sẽn bas m piisã tɩ b yɩ we-rũms rɩɩbã yĩnga, la b sẽn dag n ka get b yellã yĩnga, piisã lebga we-rũms rɩɩbo. M pe-kɩɩmbã ka ges b yell ye. B basa piisã gesg n ges b meng yelle.»" 
Ezekiel34:9 Woto yĩnga, Israyɛll pe-kɩɩmba, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Ezekiel34:10 Ad maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «M na n zaba ne-yã, la m na n deega m piisã n ka leb n bas tɩ y zã m piisã, n dɩlg y mens bal ye. M na n fãaga m piisã y noorẽ wã, la b kõn leb n yɩ yãmb dɩɩb ye.»" 
Ezekiel34:11 Ad maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Moasã, mam meng n na n ges m piisã yell m toore, la m kɩɩm-ba." 
Ezekiel34:12 Wa piis sẽn mi n sãeeg tɩ pe-kɩɩmã tigimd-b to-to wã, mam me na n tigma m piisã zĩis nins fãa b sẽn dag n sãeeg sãoongã la lik bida daarã." 
Ezekiel34:13 M na n yiisa bãmb buud a taabã sʋka, n tigim bãmb tẽmsã fãa pʋsẽ, n tall bãmb n wa b tẽngẽ wã. M na n wãbnega bãmb Israyɛll tãmsã zutu, la bãg-faansã pʋse, la tẽngã zĩis nins fãa sẽn tõe n zĩndã pʋse." 
Ezekiel34:14 M na n talla bãmb n kẽng yam-sõmy zĩisẽ. La bãmb zĩig na n yɩɩ Israyɛll tãmsã zutu. Beenẽ b na n paama vʋʋsg la yam-maas zĩiga. 
Ezekiel34:15 Mam na n kɩɩma m piisã m toore, mam na n kõ-b-la vʋʋsgo. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel34:16 Mam na n baoo peosg ning sẽn menem-a wã, mam na n talla sẽn kẽ-a moogã n wa. Mam na n tɩbsa karg sẽn kaoog-a wã, m na tɩpsa sẽn bẽed-a wã, n kɩt t'a sãoog n paam pãnga. La mam na n kʋʋ peosg ning sẽn nob n tar pãngã. M na n kɩɩma mam piisã ne tɩrlem." 
Ezekiel34:17 La ne yãmba, mam piisi, ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam na n yɩɩ bʋ-kaood piisã ne taab sʋka, la pe-raadã ne boeesã sʋka." 
Ezekiel34:18 Yãmb sẽn wãbd yam-maasã ka sek yãmb tɩ y bas n tabd yamdã sẽn ketã? Yãmb sẽn yũud ko-yɩlemdã ka sek yãmb tɩ y bas n bendgd koomã ne y naoã," 
Ezekiel34:19 n kɩt tɩ mam piisã na n wãb yamd nins y sẽn tabã, la b yũ koom ning y naoã sẽn bendgã!»" 
Ezekiel34:20 Bõn-kãng yĩnga maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam meng n na n bʋ bʋʋd ning sẽn be rũm-waga ne rũm-nobdsã sʋkã. 
Ezekiel34:21 Bala, yãmb a pe-nobdsã tusa pe-wagã ne y lʋga, la y bãgdo, la y tã bãmb ne y yɩɩlã halɩ tɩ b fãa yi bãgrẽ wã n sãeege." 
Ezekiel34:22 Mam na n fãaga m piisã tɩ b ra leb n lʋɩ fãadb nugẽ ye. La mam na n kaoo piisã ne taab bʋʋdo. 
Ezekiel34:23 La mam na n yãka pe-kɩɩm a yembr bal sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd t'a lʋɩ bãmb taoore, n kɩɩm-ba. Yaa yẽnda n na n yɩ b pe-kɩɩma." 
Ezekiel34:24 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, la mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd n na n yɩ bãmb naaba. Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel34:25 Mam na n maana vɩ-bãan kaool ne bãmba, n kɩt tɩ rũm-toosã menem tẽngã pʋga, la bãmb na n zĩnda we-raoogã pʋg ne bãane." 
Ezekiel34:26 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb ne sẽn gũbg mam tãn-sõngã fãa zĩnd barka. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni a wakate, la na n yɩɩ bark saaga." 
Ezekiel34:27 Tɩɩsã na n womame, la tẽngã koodã me na n womame, bãmb na n zĩnda b tẽngã pʋg ne bãane. Mam sã n wa kao bãmb balgrã loeese, la m fãag bãmb neb nins sẽn kẽes bãmb yembdã nusẽ, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel34:28 Bu-zẽmsã kõn leb n fã bãmb ye. La we-rũmsã me kõn leb n wãb bãmb ye. Bãmb na n vɩɩmda ne bãane, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka be sẽn na n kẽes bãmb dabeem ye." 
Ezekiel34:29 Mam na n kõo bãmb pʋt sẽn yaa sõama, la kom kõn leb n yõk bãmb tẽngã pʋg ye. La buud a taabã kõn leb n paoog bãmb ye." 
Ezekiel34:30 Woto bãmb na bãng tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã bee ne bãmb sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Ezekiel34:31 N-yẽe, yãmb a piisã m sẽn kɩɩmdã, bãng-y tɩ y yaa ninsaalba, la mam yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam! Yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel35:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel35:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f nengã n tees Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Ezekiel35:3 ‹Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋka, mam na n yika zabr ne foom, m na n tẽega m nugã fo zugu n kɩt tɩ f lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo." 
Ezekiel35:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f tẽmsã lebg raboodo, la f tẽngã gill na n sãamame. Woto, fo na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel35:5 Fo sẽn dɩt beem ne Israyɛll wakat fãa n bas-b tɩ bɛɛbã kʋ-b ne sʋʋg b beegrã wakatã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel35:6 mam wẽenda ne m mengã, tɩ m na n daaga fo zɩɩm, la zɩɩmã na n pʋga foom, fo sẽn kisg zɩɩmã yĩnga, zɩɩm n na n pʋg foom." 
Ezekiel35:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la m na n menesa neb nins sẽn tũud beenẽ n loogdẽ wã." 
Ezekiel35:8 Mam na n pidsa yẽnda tãmsã zut ne kũum. La neb nins sẽn pa tãpẽ wã kũum na n dʋra fo kunkubã zutu, ne f tãn-londã pʋse, la f bogdã fãa pʋse." 
Ezekiel35:9 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la ned kõn leb n zĩnd beenẽ ye. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.› »" 
Ezekiel35:10 Fo yeelame: «Buud a yiibã sẽn yaa tẽms a yiibã na n yɩɩ mam dẽnda, la mam na n deeg-b lame n sooge.» Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n dag n be beenẽ." 
Ezekiel35:11 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, mam wẽenda ne m meng n yetẽ tɩ mam me na n dola yãmb ne sũ-yikri la ne sũ-kiiri, wa yãmb sẽn maan bãmb y sẽn kisg-bã pʋgẽ wã. La mam sã n wa n sɩbg yãmba, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb bãng mam sẽn yaa ned ninga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel35:12 Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab wʋma tʋy nins fãa yãmb sẽn tʋ Israyɛll tãmsã. Yãmb yeelame: «B lebga zĩ-vɩɩdo, b rɩk-b lame n kõ tõnd tɩ b lebg tõnd dɩɩbo!" 
Ezekiel35:13 Yãmb gom n paooga maam, yãmb goma wuk-m-men-goam n paoog maam. Mam meng wʋma gom-kãense.»" 
Ezekiel35:14 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Tẽngã fãa sã n wa maand sũ-noogo, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Yãmb sẽn maan sũ-noog Israyɛll buudã soolem sẽn lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgã yĩnga, mam me na n maana yãmb a woto. Foom a Seyɩɩr soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, fo na n lebga zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, foom ne Edom soolmã gilli! Woto, b na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel36:1 «Foom a ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam Israyɛll tãmsã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: ‹Israyɛll tãmse, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã!›" 
Ezekiel36:2 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Bɛɛbã yaala yãmb n yeele: ‹N-faa! N-faa! Yẽnda kʋdem-wẽndẽ tãmsã lebga tõnd dẽnda!" 
Ezekiel36:3 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Hakɩɩka! Neb sẽn yi zĩig zãng n baood n na n kɩt tɩ yãmb lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgo, la b modg yãmba, n dat n kɩt tɩ yãmb lebg soolem a taab rẽndã, ne yãmb sẽn lebg nebã fãa sõasg zĩigẽ yel-bũndã yĩnga," 
Ezekiel36:4 Israyɛll tãmse, kelg-y Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga!› Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeta tãmsã ne kunkubã, la bogdã, ne tãn-londã, la tẽms nins sẽn lebg raboodã ne tẽms nins sẽn ka tar-b nebã. Yaa tẽms b sẽn fã, la tẽms soolem a taab nins sẽn gũbg bãmbã sẽn paooge.»" 
Ezekiel36:5 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam sũurã puugame tɩ m gomd ne Israyɛll yagsã, sẽn yɩɩd fãa, Edom soolmã fãa, sẽn yik ne kɩdeng la tɩtaam, n deeg m tẽngã n sooge, la b fã a rũmsã.»" 
Ezekiel36:6 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam Israyɛll zugu! Yeel tãmsã, ne kunkubã, ne kʋɩlsã la bãtã, tɩ m yaa Zu-soaba, la m gomda ne nonglem-kãsenga, la ne sũ-puugri, buud a taabã sẽn paoog yãmbã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel36:7 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam zẽkda m nug n wẽend n yetẽ: ‹Hakɩɩka!› Buud a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmbã na n paama yãnd b mensã tʋy yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel36:8 La yãmb a Israyɛll tãmse, tɩɩsã na n tãoo wil yãmb zutu, n wom biis Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã yĩnga. Bala, bõn-kãens waoong ta n sɛɛme." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ade, mam bee ne yãmba, la m na n wẽnemda m nengã n tees y sẽnẽ, n kɩt tɩ b leb n war tẽngã n bʋde." 
Ezekiel36:10 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb sẽn yaa Israyɛll buudã gill nebã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg n paase. Nebã na n leb n wa kẽe tẽmsã pʋse, la b na n lebs n mee raboodã." 
Ezekiel36:11 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y nebã ne y rũmsã fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg n paase. Bãmb na n fɩɩgame n lebg wʋsgo. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ y pid tẽngã wa pĩnda, la mam na n maana yãmb neer n yɩɩd pĩnda. Woto, yãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel36:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ ninsaalb kẽn yãmb zutu. Yaa Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã. Bãmb na n deega foom n sooge. Fo na n yɩ bãmb pʋɩɩre, la fo kõn leb n kʋ bãmb kambã ye." 
Ezekiel36:13 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «B yetame tɩ y rɩɩ ninsaalba, la y kʋ y buudã meng kamba." 
Ezekiel36:14 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, fo kõn leb n dɩ ninsaalba, la fo kõn leb n kʋ f buudã kamb ye. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel36:15 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f ra leb n wʋm buud a taabã tʋyã, neb a taabã paoogr kõn leb n zĩnd fo zug ye. Yãmb kõn leb n yɩ kug-lakdg y tẽngã yĩng ye. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel36:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel36:17 «Ninsaala, kelge: Israyɛll buudã sẽn wa n ket b tẽngẽ wã, b rẽgm-a-la ne b manesmã, la ne b tʋʋmã. Bãmb manesmã rag n wẽnda wa pag sẽn yaa rẽgd a pekr wakatã." 
Ezekiel36:18 Dẽ, mam sũurã puuga ne bãmb hal wʋsgo, bala, bãmb sẽn daag zɩɩm tẽngã pʋgẽ wã, la bãmb sẽn waoog wẽn-naandsã yĩng rẽgma bãmba." 
Ezekiel36:19 Mam kɩtame tɩ b sãeeg n be buud toay-toayã sʋka, bãmb sãeegame n be tẽmsã fãa pʋse. Mam kaoo bãmb bʋʋd wa sẽn zems b tʋʋmã la b manesmã." 
Ezekiel36:20 Bãmb sẽn ta buud toay-toayã tẽms nins fãa pʋga, bãmb sãamda mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã. Sɩd me, nebã rag n gomda bãmb yell n yetẽ: ‹Nin-bãmbã yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nebã! Bãmb yii Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽngẽ wã!›" 
Ezekiel36:21 Woto, mam dag n datẽ lame n koglg m yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã, yʋʋr ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n sãamd buud nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n kẽngẽ wã sʋkã.»" 
Ezekiel36:22 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, yeel Israyɛll buudã tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Israyɛll buudu, ka yãmb yĩng la mam sẽn maan a woto wã ye. Yaa mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã yĩnga, yʋʋr ning yãmb sẽn dag n sãam buud nins fãa yãmb sẽn dag n be b sʋkã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel36:23 Mam na n wilgame tɩ m yʋ-kãsengã b sẽn sãam buud toay-toayã sʋkã, yʋʋr ning yãmb sẽn dag n sãam bu-bãmb sʋkã, yaa yʋʋr sẽn welg toore. Woto, mam sã n wa wilg m pʋ-peelmã ne yãmb buud toay-toayã nifẽ, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo! Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel36:24 Mam na n yiisa yãmb bu-zẽmsã sʋka, mam na n tigim-y-la tẽmsã fãa pʋs n tall-y n lebg n wa y tẽngẽ wã." 
Ezekiel36:25 Mam na n dɩka ko-yɩlemd n zãgs yãmba, la yãmb na n yɩɩ yɩlma. Mam na n yɩlga yãmb n yiis y rẽgdã ne y bõn-naandsã." 
Ezekiel36:26 Mam na n kõo yãmb sũ-paalga, la yam-paalga, m na n yiisa sũur ning sẽn yaa kãenkãe wa kugrã yãmb yĩngẽ wã, la m kõ yãmb sũur sẽn yaa ninsaal sũuri." 
Ezekiel36:27 Mam na n ninga m sɩɩgã yãmb pʋsẽ, n kɩt tɩ y sak mam no-tũudsã ne m noyã." 
Ezekiel36:28 Yãmb na n zĩnda tẽng ning mam sẽn dag n kõ yãmb yaab-rãmbã pʋgẽ. Yãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel36:29 Mam na n yiisa yãmb dẽgdã fãa. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ kood zĩndi, la m na n kɩtame t'a fɩɩge. Mam ka na n leb n kɩt tɩ kom yõk yãmb ye." 
Ezekiel36:30 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tɩɩsã wom biis wʋsgo, la m kɩt tɩ pʋtã bõn-koaadl fãa sake, tɩ kom da leb n yõk yãmb tɩ y paam paoogr buud toay-toayã sʋk ye." 
Ezekiel36:31 Dẽ, yãmb na n tẽega y tʋʋm-wẽnsã ne y manesmã sẽn ka sõama wã yelle. La yãmb ka n leb n tõog n ges y mensã, yãmb kongrã ne y tʋʋm-beedã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel36:32 Bãng-y tɩ ka yãmb yĩng la mam sẽn maand a woto wã ye. Israyɛll buudu, zoe-y yãnde, la bɩ y manesmã yãnd yõk-yã! Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel36:33 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Daar ning mam sẽn na n yɩlg yãmb ne y kongrã fãa wã, mam na n lebs n pidsa tẽmsã ne nebã, la b na n lebs n mee raboodã." 
Ezekiel36:34 B na n leb n koo tẽng ning sẽn dag n lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgã pʋga, tẽng ning b sẽn dag n sãam so-loaadbã fãa nifẽ wã." 
Ezekiel36:35 La b na n yeelame: ‹Tẽn-kãngã sẽn dag n lebg zĩ-vɩʋʋgã lebga wa Edɛn zẽed zĩiga. Tẽn-bãmbã sẽn dag n lebg raboodo, n yaa zĩ-vɩɩdo, n sãam zãngã fãa lebga pãng zĩisi tɩ neb be b pʋsẽ!" 
Ezekiel36:36 Woto, buud toay-toay nins sẽn na n kell-bã sẽn gũbg yãmbã na n bãngame tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n lebs n me b sẽn dag n kõogã, la m sel b sẽn dag n võ wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gome, la m na n maan-a lame.› »" 
Ezekiel36:37 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n leb n basa Israyɛll buudã tɩ b kos maam sõngre, la m na n leoka b kosgã, n kɩt tɩ b fɩɩg n lebg wʋsg wa piisi." 
Ezekiel36:38 La tẽms nins sẽn yaa raboodã na n pida ne nebã, wa rũms sẽn welg toore, wa Zeruzalɛm sẽn dag n pit ne maand rũmsã to-to tigã wakatã. Woto, b na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel37:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã gãda maam. Sẽn-Ka-Saab Sɩɩgã rɩka maam n tɩ sik tãn-long pʋga. Tãn-longã rag n pida ne kõaba. 
Ezekiel37:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ mam gilg n ges kõabã, la b rag n yaa wʋsg longã pʋga, la b rag n kʋɩɩ hal wʋsgo." 
Ezekiel37:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab soka maam yaa: «Ninsaala, kõb-kãensã tõe n leb n paama vɩɩm bɩ?» La mam leokame: «Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n mi bõn-kãense!»" 
Ezekiel37:4 Dẽ, bãmb yeela maam: «Togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel kõabã yaa: ‹Kõb-koeemse, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga!»" 
Ezekiel37:5 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeta yãmb a kõabã yaa: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ vʋʋsem wa kẽ yãmba, tɩ y leb n vɩɩmde." 
Ezekiel37:6 Mam na n kõo yãmb gĩina, n kɩt tɩ yĩn-nemd zĩnd y zugu, la m lud-y ne yĩn-gãongo, la mam na n kõo yãmb vʋʋsem n kɩt tɩ y paam vɩɩm. Woto, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel37:7 Mam togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam wa bãmb sẽn yeel maamã. La mam sẽn wa n gomdã wakate, bʋrg n maane. Tẽngã rigimdame, la kõaba sersame n kolg taaba." 
Ezekiel37:8 Mam gesame, la m yãame tɩ b tara gĩina. Yĩn-nemd sɩngame n tobdẽ, la yĩn-gãong n lud-ba, la b yaool n dag n nan ka tar vʋʋsem b pʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel37:9 Bãmb yeela maam: «Ninsaala, togs vʋʋsmã pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã. Togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel vʋʋsmã tɩ Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Vʋʋsem, yi ween-vɩɩs a naasã n wa! Vʋʋsem, wa fʋʋs nin-bãmbã b sẽn kʋ wã zutu, tɩ b leb n paam vɩɩm.› »" 
Ezekiel37:10 Dẽ, mam togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam wa b sẽn yeel maamã, la vʋʋsmã wa n kẽ-b lame, tɩ b leb n paam vɩɩm, n yik n yals b nao zutu. Bãmb dag n yaa tãb-biis wʋsgo, b rag n yaa tãb-bi-kʋʋngo." 
Ezekiel37:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n yeela maam: «Ninsaala, kõab-kãensã yaa Israyɛll buudã fãa. Bala bãmb yetame: ‹Tõnd wẽnda kõab sẽn kʋɩ, tõnd saagrã fãa sɛɛme! Tõnd ka tõe n leb n yɩ bũmb ye.› »" 
Ezekiel37:12 Woto yĩnga, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam nebã, ade, mam na n pagsa y yaadã n yiis yã, la m tall-y n lebg n leb Israyɛll tẽn-gãongã zugu." 
Ezekiel37:13 Mam nebã, m sã n wa pags y yaadã n yiis-yã, y na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel37:14 Mam na n ninga m sɩɩgã y pʋsẽ, la y na vɩɩmdame. Mam na n tall-y lame tɩ y leb n wa y tẽngẽ wã! Woto, yãmb na yaool n bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel37:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel37:16 «Foom, a ninsaala, rɩk ra-peok n gʋls a zug woto: ‹Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn naag yẽnda wã yĩnga.› Rɩk raoog a to n gʋls a zugu: ‹A Zozɛf sẽn yaa a Efrayiim daoogã, ne Israyɛll buudã fãa sẽn naag yẽnda wã yĩnga.›" 
Ezekiel37:17 Rɩk raadã n kolg taaba, tɩ b yɩ wa raoog a yembr fo nugã pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel37:18 La fo buudã neb sã n wa kos-f tɩ f bilg-b bõn-kãng võore," 
Ezekiel37:19 bɩ f yeel-b tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Mam dɩkda a Zozɛf raoogã sẽn be a Efrayiim nugẽ wã ne Israyɛll buud nins sẽn naag yẽnda wã. Mam na n lagem-b-la ne Zʋʋda raoogã n kɩt tɩ b yɩ raoog a yembre. La bãmb na n yɩɩ bũmb a yembr mam nugã pʋga.› 
Ezekiel37:20 La raad nins fo sẽn na n gʋls b zutã, fo na n zã-b-la f nugẽ bãmb nifẽ." 
Ezekiel37:21 Yeel bãmb tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Ade, mam na n yiisa Israyɛll nebã buud nins sʋk bãmb sẽn kẽngẽ wã. Mam na n tigma bãmb zĩig zãng n tall-b n leb n wa b tẽngẽ wã." 
Ezekiel37:22 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb lebg bu-yɛng tẽngã pʋgẽ, Israyɛll tãmsã zutu. Rĩm-yɛng bal n na n soog bãmba, bãmb ka na n leb n yɩ buud a yiib ye, la b ka na n leb n welg n yɩ soolem-dãmb a yiib ye." 
Ezekiel37:23 Bãmb kõn leb n dẽgem b mens ne b wẽn-naandsã, la b yel-yoodã, la ne b beegrã buud fãa ye. Mam na n fãaga bãmb ne zĩis nins fãa bãmb sẽn zĩnd n maan yel-wẽnã, la m yɩlg-ba. Bãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la maam, mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel37:24 Mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd n na n yɩ bãmb dĩma, la bãmb pe-kɩɩm na n yɩ a yembr bala. Bãmb na n tũu mam noyã, la b sak mam no-tũudsã n dɩk-b n ning b nao-kẽndr zugu." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bãmb na n zĩnda tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ m tʋmtʋmd a Zakoobã pʋgẽ, tẽng ning yãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n zĩnd a pʋgẽ wã. Bãmb ne b kambã la b yagensã na n zĩnda beenẽ wakat fãa yĩnga, la mam tʋmtʋmd a Davɩɩd n na n yɩ bãmb naab wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel37:26 Mam na n maana vɩ-bãan kaool ne bãmb wakat fãa yĩnga, la a na n yɩɩ kaool sẽn paad wakat fãa. Mam na n vigla bãmba, n kɩt tɩ b fɩɩge, la m vigl m zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã b sʋk wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel37:27 Mam na n zĩnda b sʋka. Mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, la bãmb na n yɩɩ mam nebã." 
Ezekiel37:28 B sã n wa vigl mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã bãmb sʋk wakat fãa yĩnga, buud a taabã na bãng tɩ maam la Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la yaa maam n kɩt tɩ Israyɛll nebã yaa buud sẽn welg toore.› »" 
Ezekiel38:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel38:2 «Ninsaala, wẽnemd f neng n tees Goog tẽng sẽn be Magoog soolem pʋgã sẽnẽ, n yaa Roos ne Tuball la Mesɛk tẽmsã naabã, n togs-a pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Ezekiel38:3 Yeel-a tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: ‹Foom a Goog sẽn yaa Roos ne Mesɛk la Tuball naabã, mam zabda ne foom!" 
Ezekiel38:4 Mam na n ninga fo yɛyã bãnga, n tɛ foom ne f tãb-biisã fãa ne pãng n yiisi, la f wiidã ne f wed-rʋʋdbã fãa sẽn yer fu-neebã, n yaa neb kʋʋng sẽn zãad gãn-bɛd ne gãn-bi, tɩ b fãa mi zabr sʋʋg tall n zabã." 
Ezekiel38:5 Pɛrs ne Kuus la Put tãb-biisã sẽn zãad gãn-bɛd ne gãn-bi la b fõg kut pugli wã na n tũu bãmb n yi. 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomeer tãb-bi-sulã fãa ne Togarma buudã neb sẽn yit nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ zĩ-zãrsẽ wã fãa, n yaa kʋʋngã bee ne foom." 
Ezekiel38:7 Bɩ foom ne f zãmã wã fãa sẽn tigim fo nengẽ n gũbg foomã segl y mense. Segl f meng tɩ foom n na n lebg b gũuda. 
Ezekiel38:8 Rasem wʋsg loogr zugẽ, b na n lebs n paasa foom pãnga. Yʋʋm sẽn wate, fo na n wa zaba ne tẽng ning neb sẽn põs zabr sʋʋga, n yi buud kʋʋng sʋk n wa tigim Israyɛll tãmsã sẽn dag n yaa rabood wakat fãa wã zutu. Bãmb yii neb buud toor-toor sʋka, la b fãa na n zĩnda ne bãane." 
Ezekiel38:9 Foom ne f tãb-biisã fãa, la ne bu-kʋʋng ning sẽn be ne foomã na n tɩ buii tẽngã wa sob-kãsenga, la wa sawad-taoko.»" 
Ezekiel38:10 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, tags-wẽns n na n wa f sũurẽ, la fo na n saaga saag-wẽnga.»" 
Ezekiel38:11 Fo na n yeelame: «Mam na n kẽng n tɩ zaba ne tẽng sẽn yaa vɩʋʋgo, mam na n zaba ne neb sẽn vɩ ne yam-gãnega, n zĩ ne bãane, tɩ b fãa be tẽms sẽn ka tar lals pʋse, tẽms sẽn ka tar rignoy tɩ b sokd kʋɩlen-kuy ye." 
Ezekiel38:12 Mam na n zɛɛ teedo, mam na n fãame. Fo na n tẽega f nug n zab ne neb sẽn lebs n me rabood n kẽ, neb sẽn yi buud toay-toay sʋk n lebg n wa, n tar rũmsi, ne arzegse, n be dũniyã tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel38:13 Seba ne Dedan nebã, la Tarsɩɩs ne a tẽn-kɩremsã lɛɛbdbã, ne b gɩgem-poalã fãa na n soka foom yaa: ‹Fo wat n na n zɛɛ teed la? Fo sẽn tigim zãmã-kãngã wã yaa sẽn wat n na n fã, la f wʋk wanzuri ne sãnem, la f kãag rũms ne arzegse, la f wʋk teed wʋsg n loog la?› »" 
Ezekiel38:14 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam n wilg Goog tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «N-yẽe, wakat ning Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã sẽn wat n zĩ ne bãanã, la fo na n bãng bõn-kãnga." 
Ezekiel38:15 Foom ne neb wʋsg ning sẽn be ne foomã, tɩ b fãa zao wiidi, n yaa zãmã kʋʋngo, n yaa tãb-bi-kʋʋngã, na n yii fo sẽn beẽ wã nug-goabg zĩ-zãrgẽ, n wa." 
Ezekiel38:16 Fo na n wa zaba ne Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã, wa sawat sẽn lud tẽngã. Bõn-kãng na n zĩnda wakat sẽn wate. Googe, mam sã n wa wilg m pʋ-peelmã ne foom buud toay-toayã nifẽ, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo wa zab ne m tẽngã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b bãng maam.»" 
Ezekiel38:17 Ade, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Rẽ yĩnga, ka fo yell la mam sẽn dag n tũnug mam tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa Israyɛll no-rɛɛsdbã n gom hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã sɩda? Wakat-kãense, bãmb dɩka yʋʋm wʋsg n wilg tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo wa zab ne mam nebã." 
Ezekiel38:18 Wakat-kãnga, daar ning Goog sẽn na n wa zab ne Israyɛll tẽngã, badaare, mam sũurã na n puuga wʋsgo, hal tɩ m nengã gãneme. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel38:19 Mam sũ-ki-kãsengã ne m sũ-puugrã sẽn wit wa bugmã pʋga, hakɩɩka, mam yetame tɩ baraare, tẽn-digimd-kãseng na n zĩnda Israyɛlle." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ zĩmã ne yĩngr liuuli wã, ne we-rũmsã, ne bõn-vuudsã sẽn saagd tẽn-gãongã zugã, la ninsaalbã sẽn be dũni zugã fãa na n diga mam taoore. B na n kõoga tãmsã, la pĩisã kɩrems na n siigame, lals buudã fãa na n lʋɩɩ tẽnga." 
Ezekiel38:21 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b zab ne yẽnda ne zabr sʋʋg mam tãmsã fãa zutu, ned kam fãa na n dɩka a zabr sʋʋg n wẽnemd n zab ne a ba-biiga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel38:22 Mam na n sɩbga yẽnda ne bã-loangdga, la ne zɩɩm daagre. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sa-bɛd ni, tɩ sapɩlem dʋʋge, la m kɩt tɩ bugum ne kidbr sig yẽnda ne a tãb-bi-sulã zutu, la b sig neb kʋʋng nins sẽn be ne yẽnda wã zugu." 
Ezekiel38:23 Mam na wilga m kãosengã ne m pʋ-peelmã, la m kɩt tɩ buud wʋsg bãng maam. Woto, bãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Ezekiel39:1 Foom a ninsaala, togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam Goog wɛɛngẽ n yeel tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Googe, mam zabda ne foom, fo sẽn yaa Roos ne Mesɛk la Tuball tẽmsã naabã!" 
Ezekiel39:2 Mam na n talla foom ne pãnga, la m peeg foom n yiis nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ zĩ-zãrsẽ wã, n wa ne-f Israyɛll tãmsã zutu." 
Ezekiel39:3 Mam na n penga f tãpã sẽn be f goabg nugẽ wã tɩ lʋɩ, la m kɩt tɩ pɛɛmã sẽn be f rɩtg nugẽ wã lʋɩ tẽnga." 
Ezekiel39:4 Foom ne f tãb-bi-sulã fãa, ne neb nins sẽn be ne foomã na n lʋɩɩ Israyɛll tãmsã zutu. Mam na n basame tɩ y lebg yɩbrend ne bõn-yɩgdɩ buud fãa, la we-rũms buud toor-toor dɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel39:5 Fo na n kii weoogã pʋga. Bala, yaa maam n gome. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel39:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Magoog tẽngã zugu, ne neb nins sẽn zĩ ne bãan tẽms nins sẽn be koom sʋkã sʋka. Woto, bãmb na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Ezekiel39:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã bãng mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã. La m ka na n tol n leb n bas tɩ b sãam m yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã ye. Woto, buud toay-toayã na n bãngame tɩ mam yaa Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n yaa Israyɛll Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã." 
Ezekiel39:8 Bõn-kãens fãa watame, bõn-kãens na n yɩɩme. Yaa daar ning mam sẽn gom a yellã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel39:9 Dẽ, Israyɛll tẽmsã neb na n yiime. Bãmb na n wʋka zab-teedã n yõog bugum: yaa gãn-bi wã ne gãn-bɛdã, la tãbdã, ne pɛɛmã, la rasabã ne kãnã." 
Ezekiel39:10 Bãmb ka na n leb n kẽ weoog n bao raado, la b ka na n leb n kẽ kãgrẽ n kɛ raad ye. Bala, yaa zab-teedã la bãmb na n tar n tugund bugum. Bãmb na n zɛɛ sẽn dag n zɛɛd-b bãmbã, la b fã sẽn dag fãad-b bãmbã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel39:11 Badaare, mam na n yãka yaad zĩig Israyɛll pʋgẽ n kõ Googe. Yaa so-loaadbã long sẽn be yamsem ko-kãsengã yaangã. Yaadã zĩ-kãng gɩda so-loaadbã sore. Yaa zĩ-kãng la b na n mum Goog ne a kʋʋngã fãa. La b na n boonda zĩ-kãng tɩ Goog kʋʋngã longo." 
Ezekiel39:12 Israyɛll buudã na n muma neb kʋʋngã, sẽn na yɩl n yɩlg tẽngã, la bõn-kãng na n dɩka kiuug a yopoe." 
Ezekiel39:13 Tẽngã nebã fãa na n muma bãmba, la daar ning mam sẽn na n puk m ziirã, bõn-kãng na n yɩɩ bãmb zu-zẽkre. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel39:14 Bãmb na n yãka neb tɩ b gilgd n get tẽngã wakat fãa. So-loaadbã na n sõngda nin-bãmb tɩ b wʋkd kũum nins sẽn ket n dʋr tẽngã n mumdẽ, sẽn na yɩl n yɩlg tẽngã. Bãmb na n dɩka kiuug a yopoe n bao kũumã." 
Ezekiel39:15 So-loaadb-kãens na n gilga tẽngã, la ned a yembr sã n wa yãnd ninsaal kõaba, a na n ninga bãnd zĩ-kãng sɛɛgẽ, tɩ yao-tuudbã tõe n dɩk-b n tɩ mum Goog kʋʋngã longẽ wã." 
Ezekiel39:16 Tẽng a yembr yʋʋr yaa Hamona, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Kʋʋngo.› B na n maana a woto n yɩlg tẽngã.»" 
Ezekiel39:17 Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Foom a ninsaala, yeel bõn-yɩgdɩ buud fãa, ne we-rũmsã fãa yaa: ‹Yi-y zĩig zãng n wa tigim, tigm-y taab mam maoongã maaneg yĩnga. Maoong ning mam mengã sẽn na n maan yãmb yĩngã. Yaa maoon-kãseng ning mam sẽn na n maan Israyɛll tãmsã zutã! Yãmb na n wãba nemd la y yũ zɩɩm." 
Ezekiel39:18 Yãmb na n wãba tãb-bi-gãndaadã nemdo! Yãmb na n yũu dũniyã nanambs zɩɩm. Bãmb yaa wa pe-raado, la wa pe-ribli, wa boeese, wa lolse, bãmb fãa yaa Basã tẽng rũm-nobdse." 
Ezekiel39:19 Mam maoongã daare, maoong ning mam sẽn maand yãmb yĩngã, yãmb na n wãba nem-kaam n tɩge, la y na n yũu zɩɩm hal tɩ y nens yilme." 
Ezekiel39:20 Mam dɩɩbã zĩigẽ, yãmb na n wãba wiid nemdo, rũms sẽn tɛt teed nemdo, la gãndaadã ne tãb-biisã fãa nemd n tɩge. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel39:21 Mam na n puka m ziirã buud toay-toayã sʋka. Buud toay-toayã fãa na n yãnda sɩbgr nins mam sẽn na n puk m pãngã ne bãmb n kao b bʋʋdã to-to. 
Ezekiel39:22 Sẽn sɩng ne badaare, Israyɛll buudã na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam.› »" 
Ezekiel39:23 Woto, buud a taabã na n bãngame tɩ yaa b beegrã yĩnga, ne a sẽn maan sẽn kis n beeg maamã yĩnga, la b sẽn tall Israyɛll nebã n kẽng tẽn-zẽngã. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ mam wẽnemd m neng n bas-b b bɛɛbã nugẽ, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b fãa pa tãpẽ." 
Ezekiel39:24 Mam maana bãmb wa sẽn zems b tʋʋm-dẽgdã ne b beegrã, la m wẽnemda m neng n bas-ba." 
Ezekiel39:25 Bõn-kãens yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n lebsa a Zakoob yagensã b zĩigẽ, la m zoe Israyɛll buudã fãa nimbãanega, la m na n wilga m sũ-ki-kãsengã m yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel39:26 Baa bãmb sã n wa be b tẽngẽ wã n zĩ ne bãan tɩ ned ka be n na n yɛɛs-ba, b na n ket n tẽra b yãn-tʋʋmã ne b tʋʋm-kiti wã b sẽn dag n maan n beeg maamã yelle." 
Ezekiel39:27 Mam sã n tɩ yiis bãmb neb buud toay-toayã sʋka, mam sã n wa yiis bãmb b bɛɛbã tẽmsẽ n tigim n tall n wa b tẽngẽ wã, mam na n wilga m pʋ-peelmã ne bãmb buud wʋsg nifẽ." 
Ezekiel39:28 Mam sã n wa sãeeg bãmb buud toay-toayã sʋka, mam na n leb n tigim-b-la b tẽngẽ wã. Mam ka na n bas bãmb sʋkã ned ba a yembr beenẽ ye. Woto, bãmb na bãng tɩ mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel39:29 Mam sẽn na n pʋdg m sɩɩgã Israyɛll buudã zugã yĩnga, m ka na n leb n wẽnemd n bas bãmb abada. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel40:1 Tõnd sẽn loog yembdã tɩ yʋʋm pisi la a nuunẽ, yʋʋmdã sɩngre, pipi kiuugã rasem piig soabã daare, Zeruzalɛm sãoongã loogr tɩ yʋʋm piig la a naaslẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab nugã gãda maam, n tall maam n kẽng beenẽ." 
Ezekiel40:2 Wẽnnaam talla maam vẽnegr toay-toay pʋgẽ, n kẽng Israyɛll n tɩ sik maam tãng a yembr sẽn yaa tãn-luglug zugu. La tãngã nug-goabg sẽnẽ, rot n dag n be beenẽ n wẽnd tẽnga." 
Ezekiel40:3 La b sẽn tall maam n tɩ sik beenẽ wã, mam yãnda rao a yembre, t'a yalẽ wã wẽnd zũudu. Yẽnda rag n zãada lamd gĩs-bãaneg wĩir ne raoog sẽn tar n magd a nugẽ, n yas tẽngã noore." 
Ezekiel40:4 Raoã yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, puk f nini, la f yok f tʋba! Ges mam sẽn na n wilg foom bũmb ningã neere. Bala, yaa bõn-kãng gesg yĩnga la m sẽn tall foom n wa ka wã. Wilg Israyɛll buudã bũmb nins fãa fo sẽn na n yãndã.»" 
Ezekiel40:5 La ade, mam yãame tɩ lalg n gũbg Wẽnnaam doogã. La raoã rag n zãada raoog woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩg a yoobe, la kãntɩɩg fãa rag n paasa nug-yakemde. Yẽnda maka lalgã taglem, n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe, t'a zãntlmã me yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe." 
Ezekiel40:6 La yẽnda kẽnga rignoor ning sẽn be yaangã, n kẽn n dʋ rʋʋdsã n mak rigno-koakã, n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe." 
Ezekiel40:7 B maka ro-bãoonegã n mik tɩ b woglmã ne b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yoob-yoobe. La ro-bil fãa ne a to sʋk yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. Rignoor ning sẽn be hal pʋgẽ n pẽ zãongã taglem yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe. 
Ezekiel40:8 Yẽnda maka zãongã sẽn be pʋgẽ rignoorẽ wã, n mik t'a yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe," 
Ezekiel40:9 la a mak rignoorẽ zãongã, n mik t'a yaa kãntɩɩg a nii, t'a ra-lugdsã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu." 
Ezekiel40:10 La ro-bãooneg nins sẽn tees yaang n tong taab t'a tãab be goabga, t'a tãab be rɩtgã fãa rag n zema taaba, la ra-lugdsã sẽn be kɩreng fãa wã rag n zema taaba." 
Ezekiel40:11 Yẽnda maka rignoorã yalem n mik t'a yaa kãntɩɩg piiga, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a tãabo." 
Ezekiel40:12 Ro-bãoonegã taoore, vɩʋʋg n dag n be kɩrems a yiibã fãa t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre. La ro-bil fãa woglem ne a yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a yoob-yoobe." 
Ezekiel40:13 Yẽnda maka ro-bil fãa yĩngr ne a to sʋka, la vɩʋʋg ning sẽn dag n be rignoyã ne taab sʋkã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:14 Yẽnda maka ra-lugdsã me n mik tɩ b yaa kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe. La zakã lalg rag n gũbga rignoorẽ zãongã. 
Ezekiel40:15 Vɩʋʋg ning sẽn dag n be yɩng rignoorã ne zãongã sʋkã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ro-bãoonegã rag n tara peem-lees sẽn pɩg ne raado, la b ning pʋgẽ ra-lugdsã n gilgi. B rag n ninga zãndã me peem-lees n gilg pʋgẽ wã, n teesd pʋgẽ zakã sẽnẽ. B rag n gʋla koms vãad naand pugẽ ra-lugdsã zutu." 
Ezekiel40:17 Raoã talla maam n kẽ pipi samandã pʋgẽ. La beenẽ, b mee roto, la b rag n manega zakã n gãneg ne kug n pam n gilgi. Rotã rag n yaa bãmb pis-tã." 
Ezekiel40:18 B sẽn maneg n pamã woglem zemsa ne rotã noy woglem. Rag n yaa zag-yɩngã b sẽn pamã. 
Ezekiel40:19 Raoã maka vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be sẽn sɩng ne yɩngã no-bilã, n tãag pʋgẽ zakã yɩng tɛka, n mik tɩ yaang n tãag nug-goabga yaa kãntɩɩg koabga." 
Ezekiel40:20 Raoã maka pipi samandã noor ning sẽn tees nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã zãntlmã ne a yalmã. 
Ezekiel40:21 Yẽnda ro-bãoonegã rag n yaa bãmb b yoobe: a tãab kɩreng a yembre, a tãab kɩreng a to, la a ra-lugdsã ne a zãondã zãntlmã ne a yalmã rag n zema pipi rignoorã: a zãntlmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Yẽnda peem-leesã ne a zãondã, la a komsã b sẽn dag n gʋlã rag n yaa a yembr ne rignoor ning sẽn be yaangã rẽndã. B rag n tũuda rʋʋdg sẽn tar kogs a yopoe, n paamd n kẽed yẽnda zãondã sẽn be rʋʋdsã neng-taoorã pʋse." 
Ezekiel40:23 Rignoor n dag n be pʋgẽ zakã n tot ne nug-rɩtg rignoorã, wa a to wã me sẽn be yaangã. Raoã maka vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be rignoor ne a to sʋka, n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg koabga." 
Ezekiel40:24 Dẽ poore, raoã talla maam n kẽng rignoor ning sẽn be nug-goabgã. Yẽnda maka a ra-lugdsã ne a zãondã n mik tɩ b zema taaba." 
Ezekiel40:25 Rignoorã ne a zãondã rag n tara peem-lees wa peem-lees a taabã n gilgi. Bãmb woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, tɩ b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:26 B rag n tũuda rʋʋdg sẽn tar kogs a yopoe, n paamd n kẽed yẽnda zãondã sẽn be rʋʋdsã neng-taoorã pʋse. B rag n gʋla koms vãad naand ra-ludgsã kɩrems fãa." 
Ezekiel40:27 Pʋgẽ zakã rag n tara rignoor sẽn tees nug-goabga. Raoã maka vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be rignoor ne a to sʋka, sẽn teesd nug-goabg sẽnẽ wã, n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg koabga." 
Ezekiel40:28 Rẽ poore, raoã talla maam n tũ nug-goabg noorã n kẽ pʋgẽ zakẽ wã. Yẽnda maka rigno-kãnga, la a rag n yaa a yembr ne rignoy a taabã." 
Ezekiel40:29 Zakã ro-bãoonegã ne a ra-lugdsã la a zãondã rag n yaa a yembr ne b taabã. Rigno-kãng ne a zãondã rag n tara peem-lees n gilgi. B woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, tɩ b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Zãond wʋsg n dag n be beenẽ n gilgi, la b woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu, tɩ yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a nu-nu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Zakã zãondã rag n tota ne pipi samandã. B rag n gʋla koms vãad a ra-lugdsã zutu, la a rag n tara rʋʋdg sẽn tar koag a nii tɩ b tũud n dʋʋdã." 
Ezekiel40:32 Raoã talla maam n kẽng pʋgẽ zakã pʋg sẽn teesd yaang sẽnẽ wã. Yẽnda maka rignoorã, la a yaa a yembr ne a taabã." 
Ezekiel40:33 Yẽnda ro-bãoonegã ne a ra-lugdsã la a zãondã fãa rag n zema taaba. Rigno-kãng ne ro-bãoonegã rag n tara peem-lees n gilgi. Bãmb woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, tɩ b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:34 A zãondã rag n tota ne pipi samandã. B rag n gʋla koms vãad naand ra-lugdsã kɩremsã fãa, a rag n tara rʋʋdg sẽn tar koag a nii tɩ b tũud n dʋʋda." 
Ezekiel40:35 La raoã talla maam n kẽng nug-rɩtg rignoorã. A makame, la no-kãng me yaa a yembr wa a taabã." 
Ezekiel40:36 Yẽnda rag n tara ro-bãoonego, ne ra-lugdsi, la zãond sẽn ning peem-lees n gilgi. A woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Yẽnda zãondã rag n tota ne pipi samandã. La b rag n gʋla koms vãad naand a ra-lugdsã zutu, rʋʋdg sẽn tar koag a nii tɩ b tũud n dʋʋda." 
Ezekiel40:38 Roog a yembr n dag n be beenẽ t'a rignoorã be rignoyã ra-lugds sʋka. Yaa beenẽ la b rag n pekd maoong sẽn yõog bugmã rũmsi. 
Ezekiel40:39 Zakã rignoorẽ zãongã pʋga, taabl-dãmb a yiib n dag n be kɩreng a yembre, t'a yiib me be kɩreng a to. Yaa taabl-bãmb zut la b rag n maand maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maandã, la beegr maandã." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ned sã n dag n kẽed nug-goabg rignoorã, yɩngã yaa taabl-dãmb a yiib n be kɩreng a yembre, tɩ taabl-dãmb a yiib be rignoorẽ zãongã sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel40:41 Rignoorẽ wã rag yaa taabl-dãmb a nii n be beenẽ, a naas n be kɩreng a yembrã t'a naas be kɩreng a to wã. B rag n tog n kʋʋ maoongã taabl-bãmb zutu." 
Ezekiel40:42 Taabl-dãmb a naas me n dag n be, b sẽn pees ne kuga, maand sẽn yõogd bugmã maaneg yĩnga. B woglmã ne b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembr la pʋɩ-sʋk-sʋka, tɩ b zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre. Yaa bãmb zut la b rag n tog n dogl teed nins sẽn tar n kʋʋd maand sẽn yõogd bugmã ne maand a taabã." 
Ezekiel40:43 Taabl-dãmbã kɩrems rag n tara kogs sẽn ta nug-pʋg yalem n gilgi. B rag tog n dogla kũunã maand nemd taabl-dãmbã zutu. 
Ezekiel40:44 Pʋgẽ dignoorã yɩnga, yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã rot dag n bee beenẽ, pʋgẽ zakã pʋga. A yembr n dag be nug-rɩtg rignoorã, t'a noorã teesd nug-goabga, t'a to wã be nug-goabg rignoorã, t'a noorã teesd nug-rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel40:45 Dẽ, raoã yeela maam yaa: «Roog ning sẽn tees-a nug-rɩtgã yaa maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋmd Wẽnd doogã tʋʋmdã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel40:46 Roog ning neng sẽn tees-a nug-goabgã yaa maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn tʋmd tẽn-kugrã tʋʋmdã yĩnga. Leevi yagensã sʋka, yaa a Sadok yagensã bal n tõe n kolg Sẽn-Ka-Saab n tʋm maan-kʋʋrã tʋʋmde.»" 
Ezekiel40:47 Raoã maka Wẽnd doogã zakã, la a yaa zem taaba, a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg koabga, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg koabga, a kɩremsã ka yɩɩd to ye. Tẽn-kugrã rag n dɩga Wẽnd doogã neng-taoore." 
Ezekiel40:48 Raoã talla maam n kẽes Wẽnd doogã zãongẽ. Yẽnda maka zãongã ra-lugdsi, n mik tɩ kɩreng fãa yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. Rignoyã sẽn be kɩrems a yiibã fãa yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a tãab-tãabo." 
Ezekiel40:49 Zãong ning sẽn tũud n kẽed Wẽnd doogã noorã woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a yembre. B rag n tũuda rʋʋds n kẽedẽ. Ra-lugd-bɛd n dag n yeg ra-lugdsã goabg la a rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel41:1 Raoã talla maam n kẽ Wẽnd doogã pʋga. La a maka ra-lugdsã n mik tɩ b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yoob-yoobe, wa sẽn zems fu-roogã yalmã." 
Ezekiel41:2 Roogã noor yalem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg piiga, la a lals nins sẽn be rignoorã kɩremsã goabg la a rɩtgã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu-nu. Raoã maka roogã woglem tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg pis-naase, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Dẽ zugẽ, a kẽe ro-taoorã n mak rignoorã ra-lugdsã n mik t'a taglmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu, la rignoorã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yopoe." 
Ezekiel41:4 Yẽnda maka roogã meng woglem n mik t'a yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi. La raoã yeela maam tɩ ro-taoorã yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa." 
Ezekiel41:5 Raoã maka Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ lalgã n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe, tɩ ro-bãooneg nins sẽn be Wẽnd doogã kɩremsã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a naas-naase." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ro-bãmb dag n dogla taab zutu, la b sõorã zãng yaa bãmb pis-tã la a tãabo. Ro-bãmb dag n meeme n sok ne zakã lalga, la b rag n ka tõk Wẽnd doogã meng ye." 
Ezekiel41:7 Rotã sẽn dogl taab zutã yalem dag n paasdame n dʋʋd yĩngri, la ned sã n dat n dʋ yĩngrã, a rʋʋd n gilgdame. Bala, rʋʋdg n dag n gilg roogã n dabd yĩngr dotã. Woto, yĩngr dotã rag n tara vɩʋʋg n yɩɩd rot a taabã. Ned sã n be tẽngr doogã n dat n dʋ hal yĩngr soabã, a tũuda tẽn-sʋk roogã." 
Ezekiel41:8 Mam gesa rotã sẽn dag n gilg Wẽnd doogã zãntlem. Rotã sẽn dag n gilgã zãntlem dag n yaa kãntɩ-wogd a yoobe, sẽn sɩng ne b yẽbgrã n tãag b yĩngrã." 
Ezekiel41:9 Ro-bãmb yɩng lalsã taglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a nu. Vɩʋʋg n dag n be rot nins sẽn gũbg Wẽnd doogã," 
Ezekiel41:10 ne ro-bãooneg nins sẽn tom taab yɩng lalgã zugã sʋka, tɩ b yalem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pisi n gilgi." 
Ezekiel41:11 Rot nins sẽn tom taab yɩng lalgã zugã roog fãa rignoor teesa vɩʋʋgã. Noor a yembr n dag n be goabga, t'a yembr be rɩtgo, la vɩʋʋgã sẽn gilgã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a nu." 
Ezekiel41:12 Roog ning sẽn dag n be Wẽnd doogã taoor n teesd zakã pʋgẽ wã yalem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-yopoe. Roogã lalg sẽn gilgã taglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a nu, t'a woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-wɛ." 
Ezekiel41:13 Raoã maka Wẽnd doogã, n mik t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg koabga. Wẽnd doogã neng taoor vɩʋʋgã ne roogã menga, la roogã lals woglem me rag n yaa kãntɩɩg koabga." 
Ezekiel41:14 Wẽnd doogã taoor neng yalem ne vɩʋʋg ning sẽn tees yaang sẽnẽ wã yalem me yaa kãntɩɩg koabga. 
Ezekiel41:15 Raoã maka roog ning sẽn dag n me Wẽnd doogã poorã woglem, ne vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be goabg la rɩtgã woglem, n mik tɩ yaa kãntɩɩg koabga. Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ doogã ne yɩng zãondã," 
Ezekiel41:16 la rigno-kogsã ne peem-leesã b sẽn dag n ning yãrsã la vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be tẽngr n gilg ro-toam a tãab-tãabã n tees rigno-kogsã, bãmb fãa rag n maneg n luda ne raado, sẽn sɩng ne a tẽngã n tɩ tãag peem-leesã, la peem-leesã rag n pagame." 
Ezekiel41:17 Wẽnd doogã rignoorã yĩngrã n tɩ tãag a pʋgẽ wã, la yɩng lalgã zãng sẽn gilgã, pʋgẽ ne yɩng fãa, b rag n magame," 
Ezekiel41:18 n gʋl serubẽ-rãmb ne koms tɩɩs vãad naande. La serubẽ ne a to sʋka, b rag n ninga koang tɩɩg vãoogo. Serubẽ fãa rag n tara nens a yiibu:" 
Ezekiel41:19 neng a yembrã sẽn yaa ninsaal nengã wẽnemd n teesa koang tɩɩgã vãoogo, tɩ neng a to wã sẽn yaa gɩgem-poll nengã wẽnemd n tees koang tɩɩgã vãoog a to wã. La Wẽnd doogã zĩigã fãa sẽn gilgã rag n yaa a woto." 
Ezekiel41:20 Sẽn sɩng ne roogã tẽng n tɩ tãag rignoorã yĩngrã, b rag n gʋla serubẽ-rãmb ne koang tɩɩg vãado." 
Ezekiel41:21 Wẽnd doogã rignoyã yĩngr da-lugdsã rag n yaa magdo, la zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã taoor me rag n yaa maoko." 
Ezekiel41:22 Tẽn-kugrã rag n maana ne raado, t'a zãntlmã yaa kãntɩɩg a tãabo, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu. A pẽgsã sẽn be a woglmã sɛtmẽ wã ne pʋgẽ wã gãnega ne raado. Raoã yeela maam yaa: «Yõwã yaa taabl ning sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoorã.»" 
Ezekiel41:23 Wẽnd doogã ne zĩig sẽn welg toorã rag n tara rignoy a yiibu. 
Ezekiel41:24 Rignoyã rag n tara kʋɩlems a yiib-yiibu, la kʋɩleng fãa rag n pakd n della a to. Kʋɩlems a yiib rellda kʋɩleng a yembre, tɩ kʋɩlems a yiib rell kʋɩleng a to wã." 
Ezekiel41:25 Wẽnd doogã rignoy zutu, b rag n gʋla serubẽ-rãmb la koang tɩɩg vãado, wa b sẽn dag n gʋl lalsã zutã. Zãong ning sẽn be Wẽnd doogã yɩngã neng zugu, b rag kaa ra-neeba." 
Ezekiel41:26 Peem-lees sẽn dag n tar yãrs ne koms tɩɩs vãad n dag n be zãongã zĩig fãa. B rag n bee Wẽnd doogã rot nins sẽn tom taab n gilgã zutu, ne ra-neebã b sẽn ka wã zutu." 
Ezekiel42:1 Raoã peega maam n yi n kẽng yɩng zakã sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã, la yẽnda talla maam n tɩ kẽ ro-bãooneg nins sẽn dag n be zĩ-vɩʋʋgã ne roogã neng taoore, n be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã." 
Ezekiel42:2 B maka roogã neng ning rɩtg rignoorã sẽn be wã, n mik t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg koabga, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Nen-kãng rag n tota pʋgẽ zakã woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg pisi wã, n tot yɩng zakã zĩig ning b sẽn gãneg ne kugã. Zĩis nins b sẽn tũud n dʋʋdã rag n tota taaba, n tom taab b tãab-tãabo." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ro-bãoonegã taoore, zĩig b sẽn tũud n loogdẽ n dag n be beenẽ, t'a pʋgẽ wã sẽnẽ yalem yaa kãntɩɩg piiga, tɩ sor be beenẽ t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre. B kõomã zĩis teesa nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel42:5 Yĩngr dotã rag n yaa bãooneg n yɩɩd tẽngr dotã ne tẽn-sʋk rotã. Bala, b sẽn tũud zĩig ning n dʋʋdã rag n dɩɩ rotã." 
Ezekiel42:6 Rotã rag n toma taab b tãabo, la bãmb dag n ka tar da-lugds wa rotã sẽn tarã ye. Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ rot nins sẽn be-b yĩngrã yalem ka ta sẽn be-be tẽngrã ne sẽn be-b sʋkã ye. Rag n yaa woto hal n tãag yĩngri." 
Ezekiel42:7 Yɩng lal-gũbrã sẽn kell n zemsd ne ro-bãooneg nins sẽn be yɩng zakã sẽnẽ, n be rotã taoorã woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu." 
Ezekiel42:8 Sɩdã, rot nins sẽn dag n teesd yɩng zakã sẽnẽ wã woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu, la Wẽnd doogã neng woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg koabga." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ro-bãoon-bãmb tẽngre, kõom zĩig n dag n be beenẽ n teesd yaang sẽnẽ, tɩ sẽn yit-b yɩng zakã tũud beenẽ n kẽedẽ." 
Ezekiel42:10 Rot a taab me n dag n be zakã lal-gũbrã kɩreng ning sẽn be yaangã, n teesd zĩ-vɩʋʋgã ne roogã." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ro-bãoon-bãmb taoore, zĩig n dag n be beenẽ tɩ b tũud n loogdẽ. Bãmb yalẽ wã rag n yaa wa rot nins sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã. B woglmã ne b yalmã fãa yaa a yembre. B zĩis nins b sẽn tũud n yitã, ne b yasrã la b kõomã zĩisã fãa rag n wẽnda taaba." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ro-bãooneg nins sẽn be-b nug-goabg sẽnẽ wã kõomã zĩis me rag n yaa a woto. Kõom zĩig n dag n be zĩig ning b sẽn tũud n loogdẽ wã neng taoore, n yaa zĩig sẽn kell n be lal-gũbrã sẽn be yaangã sẽnẽ wã, la yaa beenẽ la b tũud n kẽedẽ." 
Ezekiel42:13 Raoã yeela maam yaa: «Ro-bãooneg nins sẽn be nug-goabgã ne nug-rɩtgã, sẽn be zĩ-vɩʋʋgã taoorã yaa rot sẽn welg toore. Yaa ro-bãmb pʋs la maan-kʋʋdbã na n wat n yalsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n dɩt bũmb nins sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã. Yaa beenẽ la bãmb na n wat n bĩngd bũmb nins sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã: bõn-koaadl kũunã, yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maandã, ne zems-n-taar maandã. Zĩ-kãng yaa zĩig sẽn welg toore." 
Ezekiel42:14 Maan-kʋʋdbã sã n kẽ zĩ-kãnga, b ka tog n yi zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋg n kẽng yɩng zakã sẽnẽ ye. B tog n yeesa fut nins b sẽn yeelg n maan b tʋʋmdã, n bas zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋga. Bala, fu-bãmb welga toore. Bãmb tog n baoo fut a taab n yeelg n yaool n yi n yals nebã taoore.»" 
Ezekiel42:15 Raoã sẽn mag Wẽnd doogã pʋgã n sɛ, a talla maam n tũ rignoor ning sẽn tees yaangã n yi, n sɩng vɩʋʋg ning sẽn gilg roogã magbo." 
Ezekiel42:16 Yẽnda maka yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã ne rasaar ning woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobã, n mik t'a fãa yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu." 
Ezekiel42:17 Yẽnda maka kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã ne rasaar ning woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobã, n mik t'a yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu." 
Ezekiel42:18 Yẽnda maka kɩreng ning sẽn teesd nug-goabg sẽnẽ wã ne rasaar ning b sẽn dag n tar n magdã, n mik t'a yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu." 
Ezekiel42:19 Yẽnda wẽnemdame n tees nin-taoor sẽnẽ, n dɩk rasaar ning b sẽn tar n magdã, n mak-a n mik t'a yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu." 
Ezekiel42:20 Yẽnda maka lalgã n gilg a kɩrems a naasã fãa, n mik t'a woglmã yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu, t'a yalmã me yaa rasaarã naoor kobs-nu. B rag n ninga lal-kãng n welg bũmb nins sẽn welg toorã ne bõn-zaalsã." 
Ezekiel43:1 Raoã talla maam n kẽng noor ning sẽn be-a yaang sẽnẽ wã. 
Ezekiel43:2 La ade, mam yãnda Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã ziir sẽn puk yaang sẽnẽ n watẽ. Bãmb koɛɛgã rãamd dag n wẽnda ko-kãsemsã rãamde. La dũniyã rag n yãgda ne bãmb ziirã." 
Ezekiel43:3 Vẽnegr ning mam sẽn dag n ne wã wẽnda vẽnegr ning mam sẽn dag n yãnd tẽngã sãoong wakatã. La vẽneg-kãens rag n wẽnda vẽnegr ning mam sẽn dag n yãnd Kebaar kʋɩlgã noorã. La mam wõgemdame n fõgen m neng tẽnga. 
Ezekiel43:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã tũu yaang sẽnẽ dignoorã n kẽ Wẽnd doogã pʋga. 
Ezekiel43:5 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã zẽka maam n kẽes pʋgẽ zakẽ wã, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã rag n pita Wẽnd doogã." 
Ezekiel43:6 Mam wʋma ned sẽn dag n be roogã pʋg n gomd ne maam, la rao n dag n yɛs mam sɛɛgẽ." 
Ezekiel43:7 Raoã yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, zĩ-kãngã yaa mam geerã zĩiga, la mam naoã tilgr zĩiga. Mam na n paa zĩ-kãngã wakat fãa yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã sʋka. Israyɛll buudã ne b rĩm-dãmbã ka na n leb n dẽgem mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã ne yoobã, la ne rĩm-dãmbã kũum sẽn be b maoong kʋʋb zĩisẽ wã ye." 
Ezekiel43:8 Bãmb dag n ningda b rigno-koakã n yegend mam digno-koakã, la b ningd b rignoyã yĩngr da-lugdsã n yegend m doogã yĩngr da-lugdsã. Yaa lalg bal n dag n be maam ne bãmb sʋka. Bãmb dag n maanda a woto n dẽgemd mam yʋʋrã sẽn welg toorã ne yel-beedã b sẽn maanã. Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam menes bãmb m sũ-puugrã pʋga." 
Ezekiel43:9 Moasã, Israyɛll kambã na n zãaga b yoobã ne b rĩm-dãmbã kũum ne maam, la mam na n zĩnda bãmb sʋk wakat fãa." 
Ezekiel43:10 La foom a ninsaala, bilg Israyɛll buudã Wẽnd doogã yalẽ sẽn yaa to-to: bɩ yãnd yõk-b b kongrã yĩnga, la bɩ b mak roogã mamsgo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Yãndã sã n yõk bãmb bũmb nins fãa b sẽn maanã yĩnga, bɩ f wilg-b ro-kãng yalẽ wã, a yasrã, a zĩis nins b sẽn tũud n yitã, ne a zĩis nins b sẽn na n tũud n kẽedẽ wã, a naana wã fãa ne a no-tũudsã fãa, n paas ne a naana wã fãa la a tõodã fãa. Rɩk bilg-kãens n wilg-ba. Bãmb na n gesa naana wã fãa ne a no-tũudsã fãa, n kell n maan a woto." 
Ezekiel43:12 Woto yaa tõog ning sẽn kẽed ne Wẽnd doogã wɛɛngẽ wã. Tãngã zug tẽn-sʋkã, ne vɩʋʋg ning fãa sẽn gilg tãngã yaa zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩda. Woto yaa tõog ning sẽn kẽed ne Wẽnd doogã wɛɛngẽ wã.»" 
Ezekiel43:13 Ad tẽn-kugrã b sẽn magã sẽn yaa to-to. B mag-a-la ne kãntɩɩse, la kãntɩɩg fãa woglem zugu, b paasa nug-yakemde. Bok ning sẽn gilg tẽn-kugrã zulum dag n yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre, t'a yalmã me yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre. Kogsr ning b sẽn maan n gilg bokã yalem dag n yaa nug-yakemde. Kogsrã n dag n tebend tẽn-kugrã." 
Ezekiel43:14 Bokã sẽn be tẽngã n tɩ tãag tẽngr soakã yaa kãntɩɩg a yiibu, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre. La pipi soakã n tɩ tãag a yiibẽ soabã yaa kãntɩɩg a naase, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre." 
Ezekiel43:15 Bugmã tuglg zĩig rag n yaa kãntɩɩg a naase. Yɩɩl a naas n dag n be bugmã tuglg zĩig zugu. 
Ezekiel43:16 Bugmã tuglg zĩig woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a yiibu, t'a yalmã me rag n yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a yiibu, la a rag n yaa maoko." 
Ezekiel43:17 A soakã kɩrems a naasã kɩreng fãa woglem dag n yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a naas-naase, t'a yalmã me yaa kãntɩɩg piig la a naas-naase. La kogsrã b sẽn dag n ning n gilg-a wã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka. Bokã sẽn gilg-a wã yalem yaa kãntɩɩg a yembre, la a rʋʋdsã rag n teesa yaang sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel43:18 Raoã yeela maam yaa: Ninsaala, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ad no-tũuds nins sẽn kẽed ne tẽn-kugrã wɛɛngẽ, daar ning b sẽn na n me-a wã yĩnga, sẽn na yɩl n maand maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, la b mesd zɩɩmã a zugã." 
Ezekiel43:19 Bao loalg n kõ Leevi maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn yaa a Sadok yagensã, la sẽn kolgd maam n maand tʋʋmdã, tɩ b maan yel-wẽnã sugr kũun maoongo. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel43:20 Rɩk a zɩɩmã n ning yɩɩl a naasã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã zugã, la tẽn-kugrã soakã zĩigẽ kɩrems a naasã ne a kogsrã sẽn gilgã zugu. Fo na n maana a woto, n yiis tẽn-kugrã yel-wẽnã, la f maan sugr kosg a yĩnga." 
Ezekiel43:21 Fo na n dɩka loalg ning b sẽn kʋ yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩngã, n tɩ yõog zĩig b sẽn yãk Wẽnd doogã zak pʋg bõn-kãng yĩnga, n zãag ne zĩig sẽn welg toorã." 
Ezekiel43:22 Rasem a yiib soabã, fo na n talla boɛɛg sẽn ka tar zanga, n wa maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga, tɩ b yiis yel-wẽnã tẽn-kugrã zug wa b sẽn dag n maan ne loalgã." 
Ezekiel43:23 Fo sã n maan yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoongã n sɛ, bɩ f ges n yãk loalg sẽn ka tar zanga, ne pe-raoog rũm-bãoonegã sʋk sẽn ka tar zanga," 
Ezekiel43:24 n tall-b n wa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, tɩ maan-kʋʋdbã yugl-b yamsem, la b rɩk-b n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Ezekiel43:25 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa halɩ n tãag rasem a yopoe, fo na n kʋʋ boɛɛg a yembr yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga. Sẽn paase, fo na n waa ne loalg sẽn ka tar zanga, ne pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zang b sẽn yãk rũm-bãoonegã sʋka." 
Ezekiel43:26 Rasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, b na n yiisa yel-wẽnã tẽn-kugrã zugu, n yɩlg-a, la b welg-a toor mam yĩnga." 
Ezekiel43:27 Dasem a yopoe wã sã n wa pidi, sẽn sɩng ne rasem a nii daarã, maan-kʋʋdbã na n maanda yãmb maand sẽn yõodg bugmã, ne y zems-n-taar maandã tẽn-kugrã zugu, la mam na n sak n deeg-y lame. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel44:1 Raoã talla maam n lebg n kẽng zĩig sẽn welg toorã yɩng rignoor ning sẽn be yaang sẽnẽ wã. Rigno-kãng rag n pagame. 
Ezekiel44:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Rigno-kãngã tog n paga wakat fãa, la b ka tog n pak-a ye. Ned ka tog n tũ beenẽ n kẽ ye. Bala, yaa beenẽ la maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã tũ n kẽ. A tog n kell n pagame n pa woto." 
Ezekiel44:3 La naabã tõe n zĩnda beenẽ n dɩ a rɩɩbã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, a sẽn yaa naabã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n tũuda rignoorẽ zãongã n kẽedẽ la a tũud be n yita.»" 
Ezekiel44:4 Raoã talla maam n kẽng rignoor ning sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã, Wẽnd doogã taoore. Mam gesame, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã rag n pita Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã! Mam lʋɩɩme n fõgen m neng tẽnga." 
Ezekiel44:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Ninsaala, maan gũusgu! Puk f nin n gese, la f yok f tʋb n kelg bũmb nins fãa mam sẽn na n wilg foomã, sẽn kẽed ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã no-tũudsã ne a tõodã fãa wɛɛngẽ wã. Maan gũusg ne Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ kõom, la ne zĩig sẽn welg toorã yiib zĩisã fãa." 
Ezekiel44:6 Yeel Israyɛll buudã sẽn yaa tõatbã tɩ maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame yaa: ‹Israyɛll buudu, mam yamã ya n yii ne y yel-beedã fãa!" 
Ezekiel44:7 Yãmb basame tɩ sãamb sẽn ka sakd maam, la sẽn ka kẽ bãong kẽed mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ, n dẽgemd mam doogã. Wakat ning y sẽn wat ne mam burã ne nem-kaamã, la ne zɩɩmã, yãmb sãama m kaoolã, n maand y yel-beedã fãa." 
Ezekiel44:8 Yãmb ka maan bũmb ning sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã tʋʋm ye. Yãmb dɩka nin-bãmbã tɩ b ledg yãmb zĩig n maand tʋʋmdã mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ.» 
Ezekiel44:9 Ade, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yetame: «Sãan ba a yembr sũur sẽn ka paam tekre, la yĩng sẽn ka kẽ bãong ka na n kẽ mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋg ye. Sãamb nins sẽn be Israyɛll nebã sʋkã ned ba a yembr ka na n kẽ be ye.»" 
Ezekiel44:10 Sẽn kẽed ne Leevi neb nins sẽn zãag b mens ne maamã wɛɛngẽ, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn kẽ moogo, n wẽnemd n bas maam n pʋgd b wẽn-naandsã, bãmb kongrã na n lʋɩ b mens zutu." 
Ezekiel44:11 Bãmb na n tʋma mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋga, bãmb na n yɩɩ Wẽnd doogã noy gũudba. B na n tʋma mam doogã yĩnga. Bãmb na n maana maand sẽn yõogd bugum ne maand a taabã nebã yĩnga. Bãmb na n yalsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n maan b tʋʋmdã nebã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel44:12 Bãmb sẽn maan maand n kõ wẽn-naandsã, n yɩ kug-lakdg Israyɛll buudã yĩngã, b sẽn wa ne kongrã yĩnga, maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab zẽkda m nug n wẽend n yetẽ tɩ bãmb kongrã taal na n lʋɩ b zugu." 
Ezekiel44:13 Bãmb kõn tol n leb n kolg maam n maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmdã mam yĩng ye. Bãmb kõn leb n kolg bũmb nins fãa sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã, ne bũmb nins sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã ye. Bãmb yãndã ne yel-beedã b sẽn maanã taal na n lʋɩ b zugu." 
Ezekiel44:14 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ b maan Wẽnd doogã tʋʋmde. Bãmb na n maana Wẽnd doogã tʋʋm fãa ne tʋʋm nins fãa sẽn be beenẽ n segd ne maanegã. 
Ezekiel44:15 Sã n yaa ne Leevi buudã maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn yaa a Sadok yagensã sẽn ges m zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã yelle, wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn wa n kẽ moog n zãag ne maamã, bãmb na n waa mam taoore, n maan tʋʋmdã mam yĩnga. Bãmb na n yalsa mam taoore, n dɩk nem-kaamã ne zɩɩmã n kõ maam. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bãmb na n kẽeda mam zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋga. Bãmb na n yalsa mam taablã taoore, n maand tʋʋmdã mam yĩnga, la yaa bãmb n na n get mam tʋʋmdã yelle." 
Ezekiel44:17 Bãmb sã n wa ta pʋgẽ zakã rignoyẽ, bãmb na n yeelga b fut nins sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanegã. B ka tog n yeelg fuug ba a yembr sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbd ye. Bãmb ka tog n kẽ zakã pʋga, wall Wẽnd doogã pʋg ne fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbd ye." 
Ezekiel44:18 Bãmb na n vila b zutã ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg peende, la b sẽgen bɛnd sẽn wʋg ne lamd gĩs-bãanega. Bãmb ka tog n sẽbg sẽbdg sẽn midgd yĩng ye." 
Ezekiel44:19 Bãmb sã n wa yit n na n kẽ yɩng zakã pʋg n kẽng nebã sẽn beẽ wã, b tog n deng n yeesa fut nins b sẽn yeelg n maan tʋʋmdã n dʋʋg zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã rot pʋse. Bãmb na n dɩka fut a taab n yeelge, tɩ nebã ra wa sɩɩs b futã n lebg neb sẽn welg toor ye." 
Ezekiel44:20 Maan-kʋʋdbã ka tog n põng b zutã koɛɛl ye. B ka tog n bas b zoobdã me tɩ kẽ wʋsg n loog ye. Bãmb tog wõrsda b zoobdã. 
Ezekiel44:21 Maan-kʋʋd ba a yembr sẽn yũ reezẽ rãam ka tog n kẽ pʋgẽ zakã pʋg ye. 
Ezekiel44:22 Bãmb ka tog n kẽ kãadem ne pʋg-kõore, wall ne pag a sɩd sẽn bas ye. Bãmb tog n kẽe kãadem ne Israyɛll buudã bi-pugl sẽn ka mi raoa, wall ne pʋg-kõor sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋd a to sẽn ki n base." 
Ezekiel44:23 Maan-kʋʋdbã na n zãmsa mam nebã, tɩ b bãng bũmb ning sẽn welg toorã, ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa bõn-zaalsã n bake. Bãmb tog n kɩtame tɩ mam nebã bãng bũmb sẽn yaa rẽgdã ne bũmb ning sẽn yaa yɩlemdã n bake." 
Ezekiel44:24 Yell sã n wa beẽ, bãmb n na n kɩt tɩ b tũ wala sẽn zemsã, la b kao bʋʋdã wa sẽn zems mam noyã. Bãmb na n saka mam tõodã ne m no-tũudsã mam tigã fãa pʋse, la b kɩt mam vʋʋsg rayã yɩ ray sẽn welg toore." 
Ezekiel44:25 Maan-kʋʋd ka tog n kolg kũum n dẽgem a meng ye. Yẽnda sẽn tõe n kolg kũum ning n dẽgem a menga, yaa a ba bɩ a ma, a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugla, a ba-bi-raoog bɩ a ba-bi-poak sẽn nan ka kẽ kãadem kũum." 
Ezekiel44:26 Maan-kʋʋdã sã n wa yɩlg a meng n sɛ, b tog n kõo yẽnda rasem a yopoe." 
Ezekiel44:27 La daar ning yẽnda sẽn na n leb n kẽ zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã sẽn be pʋgẽ zakã pʋgã n na maan a tʋʋmdã zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ wã, a tog n maana maoong a meng yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel44:28 Ad maan-kʋʋdbã pʋɩɩre: maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa bãmb pʋɩɩre. Bɩ y ra kõ bãmb zĩig Israyɛll tẽngã pʋg ye. Maam n yaa bãmb pʋɩɩre. 
Ezekiel44:29 Bãmb dɩɩb na n yɩɩ bõn-koaadl kũunã, ne yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maandã ne zems-n-taar maandã. La bũmb ning fãa b sẽn welg toor mam yĩng Israyɛll pʋgẽ wã na n yɩɩ bãmb dẽnda." 
Ezekiel44:30 Bõn-koaadl buudã fãa dẽenem biisi, la yãmb sẽn na n yãk bũmb ning fãa mam yĩng yaa maan-kʋʋdbã n so. Yãk-y zom-nagdgã me dẽenem pʋɩɩr n kõ maan-kʋʋdã tɩ barkã tõe n sig y yiyã pʋse." 
Ezekiel44:31 Maan-kʋʋdbã ka tog n wãb rũng sẽn ki a toore, wall rũnga, rũng a to sẽn zendem nemd ye, sã n yaa liuula, wall rũnga." 
Ezekiel45:1 Yãmb sã n wa maan poeer n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ buud fãa ne a pʋɩɩre, yãmb na n yãka zĩig sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, t'a woglmã yɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piiga. Zĩ-kãng tiirã zãng na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:2 Zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã na n yɩɩ maoko, t'a woglmã ne a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg kobs-nu. La vɩʋʋg yalem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg pis-nu n gilg a zãngã." 
Ezekiel45:3 Zĩ-kãng woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piigã pʋga, fo na n yãka zĩiga, zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã yĩnga, ne zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩd fãa wã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:4 Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ zĩig sẽn welg toor b sẽn yãk tẽngã pʋga. Zĩ-kãng yaa maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tʋmd zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋg rẽnda. Bãmb bee Sẽn-ka-Saab taoor n tʋmd bãmb yĩnga. Bãmb dotã na n zĩnda beenẽ, la zĩ-kãng na n welga toore, zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:5 Yãk-y zĩig woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piiga, ne rot pisi, n kõ Leevi nebã sẽn tʋmd Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ wã." 
Ezekiel45:6 Leb-y n yãk-y zĩig yalem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus a nu, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, tɩ yaa kũun sẽn welg toore. Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ tẽngã soolem, n yaa Israyɛll buudã fãa rẽnda." 
Ezekiel45:7 Naabã na n sooga zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa zĩig sẽn welg toorã, ne tẽngã sẽn so wã kɩrems a yiibã, sẽn yaa zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa zĩig sẽn welg toorã, ne tẽngã sẽn so wã wogellã, nin-taoor kɩrengã sẽn teesd nin-taoorã sẽnẽ wã, ne yaang kɩrengã sẽn teesd yaangã sẽnẽ wã, t'a woglmã zems pʋɩɩr a yembre, sẽn sɩng ne toadgã sẽn be nin-taoorã, n tɩ tãag toadgã sẽn be yaangã." 
Ezekiel45:8 Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ naabã zĩiga, la a soolem Israyɛll pʋgẽ. Mam nanambsã kõn leb n wẽg mam nebã ye. Bãmb na n basa tẽngã tɩ Israyɛll buudã sooge, wa sẽn zems Israyɛll buud toay-toayã." 
Ezekiel45:9 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Israyɛll nanambse, y sẽn maandã ya n looga nugu! Ya-y n bas-y pãn-maanegã ne sãoongã, la y maan sẽn zems la sẽn yaa tɩrga. Bas-y mam nebã fãabo. Yaa maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel45:10 Bɩ ned kam fãa mag ne zɩslem makdg la bõn-magdɩ sẽn yaa sõama. 
Ezekiel45:11 Bõn-magds a yiibã, efa la bat tog n zema taaba. Bãmb piig n pit makdg sẽn yaa omɛɛre." 
Ezekiel45:12 Sã n yaa zɩslmã magbo, sɩkl yaa geera rãmb pisi. La min yaa sikl-dãmb pis-yoobe." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ad yãmb sẽn na n yãk Kũunã to-to: Yãmb na n weela y bɩle wã ne y koodã zĩis pis-yoob n yãk a yembr n kɩse. 
Ezekiel45:14 La y weel y kaamã zĩis koabg n yãk a yembr n kɩse. 
Ezekiel45:15 Israyɛll rũm-bãg nins sẽn be yamdã sẽn yaa wʋsg zĩigẽ n tar dũms sõor sẽn tat kobessi wã pʋgẽ, yãk-y peosg a yembre, wall bʋʋg a yembre. Rũm-bãmb na n yɩɩ bõn-koaadl maoongã ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, la ne zems-n-taar maoongã, sẽn na yɩl n yiis bãmb yel-wẽnã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Ezekiel45:16 Tẽngã nebã fãa tog n yãka kũun-kãng n kõ Israyɛll naabã. 
Ezekiel45:17 Naabã n na n maan maand sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne bõn-koaadl kũunã, la bõn-yũudl kũunã, tigã zĩisẽ, ki-paalã tig zĩisẽ, ne vʋʋsg rayã wakate, n paas tig nins fãa Israyɛll buudã sẽn na n maanã pʋse. Yẽnda n na n maand yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoongã, la a kõt bõn-koaadl kũunã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, la zems-n-taar maandã, sẽn na n yɩl n yiis Israyɛll buudã yel-wẽnã.»" 
Ezekiel45:18 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Pipi kiuugã pipi daare, bɩ f bao loalg sẽn ka tar zanga, n maan maoong n yiis zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã yel-wẽnã." 
Ezekiel45:19 Maan-kʋʋdã na n yãka yel-wẽnã yiisg maoongã zɩɩm, n ning Wẽnd doogã kʋɩleng ra-lugdsã zutu, ne tẽn-kugrã yẽbgrã kɩrems a naasã, n paas pʋgẽ zakã kʋɩlems ra-lugds zutu." 
Ezekiel45:20 Fo na n leb n maana a woto kiuugã rasem a yopoe wã daare, ned ning sẽn tudg-a n maan yel-wẽnã, wall sẽn maan-a yel-wẽnã ne yĩdgã yĩnga. Yãmb na n maana a woto Wẽnd doogã yel-wẽnã yiisg yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:21 Pipi kiuugã rasem piig la a naasã daar na n yɩɩ Pak tigr yãmb yĩnga. Yaa rasem a yopoe tigri. Badaare, b na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka rã-bɩlle." 
Ezekiel45:22 Badaare, naabã na n maana loalg maoongo, yẽnda mengã ne tẽngã nebã fãa yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:23 Tigrã rasem a yopoe wã fãa pʋga, daar fãa, naabã na n baoo lols a yopoe ne pe-raad a yopoe sẽn ka tar zanga, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Rasem a yopoe wã fãa pʋga, daar fãa, yẽnda na n baoo boɛɛg n maan maoong yel-wẽnã sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:24 Loalg bɩ pe-raoog fãa tũnugda ne zom peoogo, la kaam ne sĩn-bila." 
Ezekiel45:25 La kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem piig la a nu wã daare, tigrã rasem a yopoe wã fãa wakate, naabã na n maana yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoongã, ne maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, la a kõ bõn-koaadl kũunã ne kaamã kũunã, wa a sẽn maan pĩndã.»" 
Ezekiel46:1 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Pʋgẽ zakã rignoor sẽn tees yaang sẽnẽ wã tog n paga rasem a yoobã sẽn yaa tʋʋm dayã, n yaool n pak-a vʋʋsg daarã, ne ki-paalgã." 
Ezekiel46:2 Naabã na n tũu yɩng rignoorã zãong n kẽ, n tɩ yals kʋɩlengã ra-lugds sɛɛga. Maan-kʋʋdbã na n maana naabã maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã, ne a zems-n-taar maandã. Naabã na n wõgemda rigno-koakẽ wã, la a lebg n yi, la b ka tog n pag kʋɩlengã tɩ ka ta zaabr ye." 
Ezekiel46:3 Tẽngã neb na n wa wõgemda Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor rigno-kãng noore, vʋʋsg rayã ne ki-paalsã wakate." 
Ezekiel46:4 Naabã sẽn na n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab vʋʋsg daarã, tog n yɩɩ ne pe-bi a yoob sẽn ka tar zanga, ne pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zanga." 
Ezekiel46:5 A tog n baoo bõn-koaadl kũun zom peoog a yembr n tũnug pe-raoogã, la a bao a sẽn tare, n tũnug pe-bi wã. La zom peoog fãa paasda kaam lens a yiibu." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ki-paalg yiib daare, naabã na n waa ne loalg sẽn ka tar zanga, ne pe-bi a yoob sẽn ka tar zãnga, la pe-raoog sẽn ka tar zãnga." 
Ezekiel46:7 Loalgã tũnugda ne zom peoogo, pe-raoogã me tũnugda ne zom peoogo. Sã n yaa ne pe-bi wã, a kõta wa sẽn zems a paoongo. La zom peoog fãa paasda kaam lens a yiibu." 
Ezekiel46:8 Naabã sã n na n kẽ, a tog n tũu rignoorẽ zãongã n kẽ, la a leb n tũ beenẽ n yi." 
Ezekiel46:9 Tẽngã neb sã n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoor n na n wõgemd n waoog-b tigã wakate, ned sã n tũ nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ dignoorã n kẽ, a tog n tũu nug-goabg sẽnẽ dignoorã n yi. La ned sã n tũ nug-goabg sẽnẽ dignoorã rignoorã n kẽ, a tog n tũ nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ dignoorã n yi. Fo sẽn tũ rignoor ning n kẽ wã, f ka tog n leb n tũ beenẽ n yi ye. Yaa rignoor ning sẽn tot-a foomã la f na n tũ n yi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Nebã sã n wa kẽedẽ, naabã me tog n naag n kẽeme. B sã n wa leb n yita, a tog n naag n yiime.»" 
Ezekiel46:11 Tigã wakate, nebã sã n tigim taaba, b tog n tũnuga loalgã ne bõn-koaadlã kũun peoog a yembre, la pe-raoogã me tũnugda ne bõn-koaadlã kũun peoog a yembre. Sã n yaa ne pe-bi wã, b kõta b sẽn tare. La zom wamd fãa paasda kaam lens a yiibu." 
Ezekiel46:12 Naabã sã n dat n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum ne yamleoogo, wall zems-n-taar maoong ne yamleoog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, yaa yaang sẽnẽ rignoorã la b tog n pak t'a kẽ. Yẽnda na n maana a maoong sẽn yõogd bugmã ne a zems-n-taar maoongã wa a sẽn minim n maand vʋʋsg daarã n yaool n yi. La a sã n wa yi, bɩ b lebs rignoorã n page." 
Ezekiel46:13 Daar fãa, fo na n baoo pe-bil sẽn tar yʋʋmd n ka tar zanga, n maan maoong sẽn yõogd bugum Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩng yibeoog fãa." 
Ezekiel46:14 Yibeoog fãa, fo na n waa ne bõn-koaadl kũuni, n paas ne zom wamde, la kaam wũmbla sẽn na n nag zomã. Yaa kũun Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga. Tõ-kãng yaa wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel46:15 Yibeoog fãa b na n kõo pe-bilã, zomã ne kaamã sẽn tũnugd-a wã tɩ yɩ maoong sẽn yõogd bugum wakat fãa yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel46:16 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Naabã sã n yãk zĩig n kõ a biig a yembre, zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ bi-kãng kambã soolem. Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ bãmb dogem pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel46:17 La yẽnda sã n yãk zĩig a sẽn so wã pʋg n kõ a tʋmtʋmd a yembre, tʋmtʋmdã na n sooga zĩ-kãng hal n tãag bas-taal yʋʋmdã, tɩ zĩigã yaool n leb n lebg naabã rẽnda. Woto, naabã sẽn so wã fãa na n yɩ a kambã rẽnd bala." 
Ezekiel46:18 Naabã ka tog n deeg zĩig ba a yembr nebã sẽn so wã pʋg ye. A ka tog n deeg nebã zĩis n bas-b ye. Yaa yẽnda mengã sẽn so wã pʋg la a tog n yãk n kõ a kambã, sẽn na yɩl tɩ mam nebã ra sãeege, tɩ b ned kam fãa zãag ne a zĩig ye.»" 
Ezekiel46:19 Raoã talla maam n tũ kõomã zĩig ning sẽn be rignoorã sẽnẽ wã, rot nins sẽn welg toor maan-kʋʋdbã yĩnga, rot nins noy sẽn tees nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã. Zĩig n dag n be zakã yaang neng taoore."
