Ezekiel46:20 Yẽnda yeela maam yaa: «Yaa zĩ-kãngã la maan-kʋʋdbã na n dʋgd sugr kosg maoongã ne yel-wẽnã sugr kosg maoongã nemdo, la yaa zĩ-kãng me la b tog n dʋgd bõn-koaadl kũunã, sẽn na n yɩl n da wa tall-b n kẽng yɩng zakã pʋga, n kɩt tɩ nebã lebg neb sẽn welg toor ye.»" 
Ezekiel46:21 Dẽ poore, raoã yiisa maam n kẽes yɩng zakã pʋga, n kɩt tɩ mam kẽng zakã gõad a naasã zĩisẽ. La zak n dag n be zakã gõdr fãa zĩigẽ." 
Ezekiel46:22 Zakã gõad a naasã zĩisẽ, zags n dag n be beenẽ n yaa zag-bãoonego. B woglmã rag n yaa kãntɩɩg pis-naase, tɩ b yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg pis-tã. Bãmb b naasã fãa sẽn be gõadẽ wã rag n zema taaba." 
Ezekiel46:23 B naasã fãa rag n tara lal-gũbri, la b rag n manega ragend zĩis n dɩdg lal-gũbrã n gilgi." 
Ezekiel46:24 Raoã yeela maam yaa: «Ro-bãmbã yaa rɩɩb seglg roto, zĩis nins neb nins sẽn tʋmd Wẽnd doogã pʋgã sẽn na n wat n dʋgd nebã maand nemdo.»" 
Ezekiel47:1 Raoã talla maam n lebg n wa Wẽnd doogã rignoor sẽnẽ. La koom n dag n bund n yit rigno-kaok tẽngre, yaang sẽnẽ, bala Wẽnd doogã rignoor dag n teesa yaanga. Koomã rag n zoeta Wẽnd doogã nug-goabg kɩrengã tẽngre, tẽn-kugrã nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel47:2 Yẽnda kɩtame tɩ mam tũ sor ning sẽn dabd nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ dignoorẽ wã n yi, la a kɩt tɩ mam gilg Wẽnd doogã yɩngã hal n tãag yaang sẽnẽ dignoorã yɩnga. La koomã rag n zoeta nug-rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Raoã sẽn wa yi n na n tees yaang sẽnẽ wã, a rag n zãada wĩir a nugẽ, la yẽnda maka kãntɩɩg tusri, n yeel maam tɩ m dʋʋge, la koomã rag n tekda m nao-sũgsi." 
Ezekiel47:4 A leb n maka kãntɩɩg tusri, n yeel maam tɩ m dʋʋge, la koomã rag n tata m dũma. Yẽnda leb n maka kãntɩɩg tusri, n yeel maam tɩ m dʋʋge, la koomã rag tata m sɛɛga." 
Ezekiel47:5 A leb n maka kãntɩɩg tusri, la a lebga ko-zoetem tɩ mam ka tõe n dʋʋg ye. Koomã lebga zulunga, tɩ rag n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ f rugi. Rag n yaa ko-zoetem tɩ ned rag n ka tõe n dʋʋg ye." 
Ezekiel47:6 Raoã soka maam yaa: «Ninsaala, fo yãame?» La yẽnda leb n talla maam n wa ko-zoetmã noore." 
Ezekiel47:7 La sẽn ta beenẽ, mam yãame tɩ tɩɩs wʋsg n dag n be ko-zoetmã noor goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel47:8 Yẽnda yeela maam yaa: «Ko-kãngã rabda yaanga, n na n sig tẽn-nabd-koɛɛngẽ wã, n tɩ kẽ yamsem ko-kãsengã pʋga. La a sã n wa kẽ ko-kãsengã pʋga, koomã na n lebga sõama." 
Ezekiel47:9 Koomã sẽn ta zĩig ning fãa, bõn-vɩɩlɩ wã fãa na n vɩɩmdame. Zĩmã me na n lebga wʋsgo, bala, ko-kãng na n zoe n taa beenẽ, la yamsem ko-kãsengã na n lebga sõama, la vɩɩm na n zĩnda zĩig ning fãa ko-zoetmã koomã sẽn na n ta wã." 
Ezekiel47:10 Woto, zĩm-yõagdbã na n yɛsa beenẽ. Bãmb na n yɛdga b zĩm-gãmbã wã sẽn sɩng ne Ɛn-Gedi n tɩ ta Ɛn-Eglayim. Zĩm-kãens na n yɩɩ wa ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ zĩmã, wa sẽn zems b buudu. B na n yɩɩ wʋsg-wʋsgo." 
Ezekiel47:11 A bãtã ne a bulsã koom ka na n tek ye. B na n kell n yɩɩ yamsem. 
Ezekiel47:12 Ko-zoetmã noore, goabg la rɩtgo, tɩ-rɩts buud toor-toor n na n yi be. Bãmb vãadã kõn tol n kʋɩ, la b biisã me kõn tol n sɛ ye. Kiuug fãa, b na n womda bi-paala, bala, koomã yita zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã pʋga. B na n dɩta a biisã, la b tar a vãadã n tɩpdẽ.»" 
Ezekiel47:13 Ade, Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n pʋɩ n kõ Israyɛll buud piig la a yiibã tɩ yɩ b pʋɩɩrã tods la woto. A Zozɛf buudã tog n paama pʋɩɩr a yiibu." 
Ezekiel47:14 Tẽngã na n yɩɩ yãmb soolem, wa mam sẽn dag n zẽk m nug n wẽen n yeel tɩ m na n kõ y yaab-rãmbã. Dẽ, tẽngã yaa yãmb pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ad tẽngã todse: Nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã, yaa sẽn sɩng ne ko-kãsengã, sor ning sẽn yit Ɛtlon sẽnẽ wã, hal n tãag Sedaad tẽngã kõomã zĩigẽ wã," 
Ezekiel47:16 ne Hamate, la Berota ne Sibrayim sẽn be Damaas soolmã ne Hamat soolmã sʋkã, la Hatsɛɛr-Tikon sẽn be Horan toadgã sẽnẽ wã." 
Ezekiel47:17 Dẽ, toadgã na n yɩɩ sẽn sɩng ne ko-kãsengã, ne Hatsaar-Eyinon la Damaase, ne Safon sẽn be nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ wã, la Hamat toadgã: Beenẽ n na n yɩ nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã." 
Ezekiel47:18 Yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã na n yɩɩ sẽn sɩng ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã sẽn be Horan ne Damaas sʋkã, la Galaad ne Israyɛll tẽngã sʋkã. Yãmb na n maka sẽn sɩng ne nug-rɩtg toadgã, n tɩ tãag yamsem ko-kãsengã yaangã. Beenẽ n na n yɩ yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã." 
Ezekiel47:19 Nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã sẽn be nug-goabg sẽnẽ wã na n yɩɩ sẽn sɩng ne Tamaar n tall n tãag Meriba sẽn be Kadɛɛsã koomã, n tɩ tãag ko-zoetmã sẽn be ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ wã. Beenẽ n na n yɩ nug-rɩtg kɩrengã sẽn be rɩtgã." 
Ezekiel47:20 Nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã na n yɩɩ ko-kãsengã, sẽn sɩng ne toadgã n tall n tãag Hamat tẽngã kõom zĩigẽ: Beenẽ n na n yɩ nin-taoor kɩrengã." 
Ezekiel47:21 Yãmb na n pasa tẽn-kãngã n pʋɩ taaba, wa sẽn zems Israyɛll buudã sõore." 
Ezekiel47:22 Maan-y poeer n pʋɩ tẽngã tɩ yɩ yãmb pʋɩɩre, la sãambã sẽn be yãmb sʋk n na n dog kambã me pʋɩɩre. Yãmb tog n geelga bãmb wa tẽngã neb sẽn be Israyɛll nebã sʋka. Bãmb me na n naaga yãmb n paam pʋɩɩr Israyɛll buud toay-toayã sʋka, wa sẽn zems poeerã sẽn yãkã." 
Ezekiel47:23 Woto, yaa buud ning pʋg sãanã sẽn na n zĩndã pʋgẽ, la yãmb na n kõ-a a pʋɩɩrã. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel48:1 Ad Israyɛll buud toay-toayã yʋya: «Sẽn sɩng ne nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã sẽn yegd Ɛtlon sẽn be Hamatã sor wogellã, ne Hatsaar-Eyinonde, la Damaas toadgã sẽn be nug-rɩtg Hamat sẽnẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ tãag nin-taoorã, yaa Dan buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:2 Sẽn yegd a Dan buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n ta nin-taoore, yaa Asɛɛr buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:3 Sẽn yegd Asɛɛr buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoore, yaa Neftali buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:4 Sẽn yegd Neftali buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoore, yaa Manaase buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:5 Sẽn yegd Manaase buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoore, yaa Efrayiim buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:6 Sẽn yegd Efrayiim buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoore, yaa Rubɛn buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:7 La sẽn yegd Rubɛn buudã toadg sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoore, yaa Zʋʋda buudã pʋɩɩre.»" 
Ezekiel48:8 Sẽn yegd Zʋʋda buudã toadgã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã, yãmb na n yãka zĩig yalem sẽn tat kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, t'a woglmã yaa wa pʋɩɩr nins sẽn sɩng yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã sʋk a yembre, la zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã na n zĩnda yẽnda tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel48:9 Zĩig ning yãmb sẽn na n yãk Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piiga." 
Ezekiel48:10 Zĩ-kãng b sẽn yãk t'a yaa toorã na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdbã rẽnda. A nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, a nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus piiga, a yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus piiga, la a nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩigã sẽn welg toorã na n zĩnda zĩ-kãng tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel48:11 Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdb nins b sẽn yãk a Sadok yagensã sʋk n welg toorã rẽnda. Bãmb dag n maanda mam tʋʋmdã, la b ka kẽ moog wakat ning Israyɛll nebã sẽn dag n kẽ moogã, la wa Leevi nebã me sẽn dag n kẽ moogã ye." 
Ezekiel48:12 Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ bãmb dẽnda, n yɩ zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩda, zĩig b sẽn yãke, tẽngã zĩis nins b sẽn yãkã sʋka, n yegl Leevi buudã toadgã." 
Ezekiel48:13 Leevi buudã zĩig na n yegla maan-kʋʋdbã zĩig toadga. A nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, a nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus piiga, a yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus piiga, la a nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel48:14 Bãmb ka tõe n yãk zĩig ba a yembr beenẽ n koos ye. B ka tõe n dɩk tẽngã zĩ-kãens b sẽn yãkã n tek ne bũmbu, wall b rɩk-b n kõ ned ye. Bala, b welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Ezekiel48:15 Zĩig ning b sẽn yãk n welg toor t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu wã pʋgẽ, zĩig n na n kelle, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg tus a nu. Zĩ-kãng sẽn na n kellã na n yɩ zĩ-zaalle, la neb yiya, ne zĩ-vɩɩdo. Tẽngã na n zĩnda tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel48:16 Ad tẽngã b sẽn mag tɩ yaa to-to: a nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu, t'a nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu, t'a yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu, t'a nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Zĩisã sẽn be tẽngã kɩremsã b sẽn magã la woto: nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg kobessi la pis-nu, t'a nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg kobessi la pis-nu, t'a yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg kobessi la pis-nu, t'a nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg kobessi la pis-nu." 
Ezekiel48:18 Zĩig ning b sẽn yãk n welg toorã woglmã sẽn kellã, yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piiga, t'a nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã yaa kãntɩɩg tus piiga. Zĩ-kãng bõn-koaadlã n dɩlgd neb nins sẽn tʋmd tẽngã yĩngã." 
Ezekiel48:19 Neb nins sẽn na n ko beenẽ wã na n yii Israyɛll buud toor-toorã fãa pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel48:20 Zĩig ning b sẽn na n yãkã tõr woglem yãmb sẽn na n welg toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã, woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu, t'a yalmã me yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu. Zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa zĩig sẽn welg toorã pʋgẽ, yãmb na n yãka pʋɩɩr a yembr pʋɩɩr a naas sʋka, tɩ yɩ tẽngã rẽnda." 
Ezekiel48:21 Zĩig ning sẽn na n kell-a wã na n yɩɩ naabã rẽnda. Yaa kɩrems a yiibu: zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa zĩig sẽn welg toorã kɩreng a yembre, ne zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa tẽngã rẽndã kɩreng a yembre, sẽn sɩng ne kɩreng ning woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu wã, hal n tãag yaang sẽnẽ toadgã, ne sẽn sɩng ne nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩreng ning woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus pisi la a nu wã, hal n tãag nin-taoor sẽnẽ toadgã. Pʋɩ-kãng sẽn yaa wa pʋɩɩr a taabã na n yɩɩ naabã rẽnda. Zĩig ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa toorã ne Wẽnd doogã zĩig ning sẽn welg toorã na n zĩnda tẽn-sʋka." 
Ezekiel48:22 Leevi nebã sẽn so zĩig ningã wogellã, ne zĩig ning sẽn yaa tẽngã rẽndã wogellã, naabã sẽn na n soog-a soabã na n zĩnda tẽn-sʋka, Zʋʋda toadgã ne Benzame toadgã sʋka. Zĩ-kãng na n yɩɩ naabã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ad Israyɛll buud a taabã pʋɩɩre: Sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã, yaa Benzame buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:24 Sẽn yegd Benzame buudã pʋɩɩrã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã yaa Sɩmyõ buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:25 Sẽn yegd Sɩmyõ buudã pʋɩɩrã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã yaa a Isakaar buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:26 Sẽn yegd Isakaar buudã pʋɩɩrã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã yaa Zabulõ buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:27 Sẽn yegd Zabulõ buudã pʋɩɩrã, sẽn sɩng ne yaang n tɩ ta nin-taoorã yaa Gaad buudã pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:28 Sẽn yegd Gaad buudã toadgã, nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã sẽn dabd nug-goabg sẽnẽ wã, toadgã na n yɩɩ sẽn sɩng ne Tamaar tẽngã, n tɩ tãag Meriba sẽn be Kadɛɛsã koomã, hal n tãag Ezɩpt ko-soogã, n dabd ko-kãsengã sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel48:29 Woto n yaa tẽng ning yãmb sẽn na n maan poeer n pʋɩ n kõ Israyɛll buud toay-toayã. Rẽndã n na n yɩ bãmb pʋɩɩre. Maam a Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Ezekiel48:30 Ad tẽngã rignoyã: nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu wã," 
Ezekiel48:31 yaa rignoy nins Israyɛll buud toay-toayã yʋy sẽn be b zutã. Rignoy a tãab n be nug-rɩtgo: rignoor a yembre yaa Rubɛn buudã yĩnga, t'a yembr yaa Zʋʋda yĩngã, t'a yembr yaa Leevi buudã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel48:32 Yaang sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu wã, yaa rignoy a tãab n be beenẽ: a yembr yaa Zozɛf buudã yĩnga, a yembr Benzame yĩnga, a yembr Dan buudã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel48:33 Nug-goabg sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu wã, rignoy a tãab n be beenẽ: a yembr yaa Simeyõ buudã yĩnga, a yembr Isakaar buudã yĩnga, a yembr Zabulõ buudã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel48:34 Nin-taoor sẽnẽ kɩrengã woglem sẽn yaa kãntɩɩg tus a naas la kobs-nu wã, rignoy a tãab n be beenẽ: a yembr yaa Gaad buudã yĩnga, a yembr Asɛɛr buudã yĩnga, a yembr Neftali buudã yĩnga." 
Ezekiel48:35 Tẽngã b sẽn mag n gilgã zãng yaa kãntɩɩg tus piig la a nii. La sẽn sɩng ne rũndã, tẽngã yʋʋr na n yɩ Adonayi-Sama, sẽn dat n togs tɩ ‹Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee ka.› »" 
Daniel1:1 Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, Babilond rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yika zabr ne Zeruzalɛm n tɩ gũbg-a." 
Daniel1:2 La Zu-soabã basame t'a Nebukatnedzaar tõog Zʋʋda rĩm a Yoyakim n yõk-a, la a wʋk Wẽnnaam doogã teed kẽere. La a talla teedã n kẽng Sineyaar tẽnga, n tɩ bĩng-b a wẽnnaam-dãmbã roogẽ, b laogã bĩngr zĩigẽ." 
Daniel1:3 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yeela a sõgen-kãseng a Asepenaaz t'a ges Israyɛll na-kombsã ne b nin-kãsemsã sʋka," 
Daniel1:4 n yãk kom-bɩɩs kẽer sẽn ka tar zang b yĩngẽ wã, la sẽn yaa ra-sãmbã, n tar yam buud fãa, la bãngr ne minim, n tõe n tʋm na-yirã. La bɩ b zãms-b Kalde rãmbã buud goamã, ne sɛbã kaorengo." 
Daniel1:5 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kõo noor tɩ b yãkd yẽnda meng rɩɩbã ne a reezẽ rãamã daar fãa, n kẽnd n kõt-ba. B rag n dat n wub-b-la woto yʋʋm a tãabo, tɩ rẽ poore, bɩ b yaool n tall-b n wa tɩ b be rĩmã sɛɛgẽ n tʋmd dĩmã tʋʋmã." 
Daniel1:6 Zʋʋda kom-bɩɩs nins b sẽn yãkã sʋka, a Dãniyɛll ne a Hananiya, la a Misayɛlle ne a Azariya rag n bee be." 
Daniel1:7 Rĩmã sõgen-kãsengã teka bãmb yʋya: A pʋda a Dãniyɛll t'a Bɛlsatzaare, n pʋd a Hananiya t'a Sadrake, n pʋd a Misayɛll t'a Mesake, la a pʋd a Azariya t'a Abednego." 
Daniel1:8 La a Dãniyɛll yãka yam t'a ka na n dɩ rĩmã rɩɩbã, la a yũ a reezẽ rãamã n dẽgem a meng ye. Dẽ, a kosa sõgen-kãsengã t'a ra modg yẽnda t'a rẽgem a meng ye." 
Daniel1:9 Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ sõgen-kãsengã sũur noom ne a Dãniyɛlle, t'a zoet a nimbãanega." 
Daniel1:10 Sõgen-kãsengã yeela a Dãniyɛll yaa: «Mam zoeta rĩmã sẽn yaa mam soaalã, bala, yaa bãmb n kõ maam noor n wilg b sẽn tog n kõt yãmb rɩɩb ninsi, la b sẽn tog n kõt-y bõn-yũudl ninga. Dẽ, bãmb sã n wa n mik tɩ yãmb nensã yõbame n ka pɩnd wa y kom-bɩ-taasã, yãmb baoo yell n kõ maam, la rĩmã na n fiuuga mam zugã.»" 
Daniel1:11 Dẽ, a Dãniyɛll yeela sõgen-kãsengã sẽn dag n yãk ned ning t'a gũud yẽnda ne a Hananiya, ne a Misayɛll la a Azariya wã yaa:" 
Daniel1:12 «Bɩ y kõt tõnd bõn-koaadl biis ne zẽ-vãad bal tɩ d rɩtẽ, la ko-zaalg tɩ d yũuda, tɩ d ges ka ne rasem piig pʋgẽ na n yɩ a wãna." 
Daniel1:13 Rẽ zugẽ, bɩ y ges tõnd nensã ne kom-bɩɩs nins sẽn dɩt rĩmã rɩɩbã nensã, la y yaool n maan y sẽn dat ne-do, wa sẽn zems yãmb sẽn yã bũmb ningã.»" 
Daniel1:14 Gũudã maana wa b sẽn kosã, n mak-b rasem piiga." 
Daniel1:15 La rasem piigã zugẽ, b mikame t'a Dãniyɛll dãmb nobame tɩ b nensã pɩnda, la b yaa neeba, n yɩɩd kom-bɩɩs a taabã sẽn dag n dɩt rĩmã rɩ-noodã." 
Daniel1:16 La sẽn sɩng ne wakat-kãnga, gũuda basda rĩmã yir rɩ-noodã ne reezẽ rãamã, la a kõt a Dãniyɛll dãmb bõn-koaadl biis ne zẽ-vãad bal tɩ b rɩtẽ." 
Daniel1:17 Wẽnnaam kõo kom-bɩ-bãmbã b naasã bãngre, la yam tɩ b tõog n bãng sɛbã fãa kaoreng ne yẽesem, la a Dãniyɛll dag n tara bãngr n tõe n bilg vẽnegr ne zãmsd fãa võyã." 
Daniel1:18 La daar ning rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yãk tɩ b tog n tall kom-bɩɩsã n wa a nengẽ wã sẽn ta, sõgen-kãsengã tall-b lame n kẽnge." 
Daniel1:19 Rĩmã sõsa ne kom-bɩɩsã fãa. La bãmb fãa sʋkã, rĩmã ka yã bi-bɩɩg ba a yembr sẽn yaa wa a Dãniyɛll ne a Hananiya, la a Misayɛll ne a Azariya ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ b yãk bãmb tɩ b be rĩmã sɛɛgẽ n tʋmdẽ." 
Daniel1:20 Yɛl nins fãa sẽn kẽed ne yam la bãngrã wɛɛngẽ, rĩmã sã n sokd n dat n bãng b võore, a mikdame t'a Dãniyɛll dãmb yɩɩda tɩtã-rãmba, ne bãngdbã sẽn be yẽnda soolmã fãa pʋgẽ wã naoor piiga." 
Daniel1:21 La a Dãniyɛll kell n paa na-yirã hal n tãag rĩm a Siruus naamã deegr yʋʋmde. 
Daniel2:1 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn deeg naamã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, a zãmsa zãmsdo, tɩ zãmsdã namsd-a wʋsgo, hal t'a ka leb n tõe n gũs ye." 
Daniel2:2 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame tɩ b bool tɩtã-rãmbã, ne bãngdbã, la bag-bʋgdbã ne Kalde rãmbã bãngdbã fãa, tɩ b wa bilg yẽnda a zãmsdã võore. La bãmb fãa waa rĩmã nengẽ." 
Daniel2:3 Rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Mam zãmsa zãmsdo, la a namsda maam wʋsgo, tɩ m dat zãmsdã võor n bãnge.»" 
Daniel2:4 Kalde rãmbã goma ne rĩmã ne Aram tẽng goam n yeele: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã! Bɩ y togs tõnd y zãmsdã, la tõnd na n bilga yãmb a võore!»" 
Daniel2:5 La rĩmã leok-b lame n yeel yaa: «Ade, mam yãka yam, tɩ yãmb sã n ka tõog n togs maam m zãmsdã, la y tõog n kõ maam a bilgrã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b bees yãmba, la b sãam y zagsã n kɩt tɩ b lebg raboodo." 
Daniel2:6 La yãmb sã n tõog n togs maam m zãmsdã, la y tõog n bilg a võorã, mam na n kõo yãmb kũun wʋsgo, la waoog-kãsenga. Dẽ yĩngã, togs-y maam m zãmsdã, la y bilg a võorã.»" 
Daniel2:7 Kalde rãmbã leb n leoka rĩmã naoor a yiibẽ soab n yeele: «N-na! Bɩ y togs tõnd y zãmsdã, la tõnd na bilg yãmb a võorã.»" 
Daniel2:8 Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame: «Sɩd-sɩdã, mam miime tɩ yãmb rat n dɩka weere, yãmb sẽn yã tɩ mam ka lebd poorẽ ne m yam-yãkrã yĩnga." 
Daniel2:9 Dẽ wã, yãmb sã n ka togs maam m zãmsdã, yãmb fãa na n paama sɩbgre. Yãmb zemsa taab n dat n togs maam zĩrẽ goamã, la gom-vɩɩdo, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ wakatã looge. Mam sẽn dat bala, yaa tɩ y togs maam m zãmsdã, dẽ, mam na bãng tɩ yãmb sɩd tõe n bilga maam a võorã.»" 
Daniel2:10 Kalde rãmbã yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Ned ka be dũniyã zug ka, n tõe n maan bũmb ning yãmb sẽn kotã ye. Sẽn paas me, rĩm nan ka zĩndi, ba a naamã ne a pãngã sẽn yaa to-to, n yeel tɩtã-rãmba, ne bãngdbã, wall Kalde rãmbã bãngdbã tɩ b maan bũmb a woto ye." 
Daniel2:11 N-na! Yãmb sẽn kot bũmb ningã yaa toog wʋsgo. La ned ka be sẽn tõe n bãng bõn-kãngã n togs yãmba, sã n ka wẽnnaam-dãmbã bala. La wẽnnaam-dãmb-kãens me ka be ninsaalb sʋk ye.»" 
Daniel2:12 Gom-kãng kɩtame tɩ rĩmã sũur yik hal wʋsgo, t'a kõ noor n yeel tɩ b kʋ Babilond bãngdbã fãa." 
Daniel2:13 B moona zĩig fãa n wilg tɩ b na n kʋʋ bãngdbã fãa. La b baoo a Dãniyɛll ne a tũud-n-taasã me n na n kʋ. 
Daniel2:14 La a Dãniyɛll goma ne rĩmã gũudbã naab a Aryoke ne yam la gũus-m-menga. Bala, yaa Aryok n dag n yi n na n kʋ Babilond bãngdbã." 
Daniel2:15 A Dãniyɛll yeela a Aryok sẽn yaa rĩmã gũudbã naabã yaa: «Bõe yĩng tɩ rĩmã yãk yam n na n wa ne sɩbg-toaag a woto?» La a Aryok rɩka yellã n bilg a Dãniyɛlle. 
Daniel2:16 La a Dãniyɛll kẽnga rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ kos-b tɩ b kõ yẽnda weere, t'a na n kõo rĩmã a zãmsdã bilgri." 
Daniel2:17 Dẽ poore, a Dãniyɛll lebg n kuila a yiri, n tɩ rɩk yellã n togs a Hananiya ne a Misayɛlle, la a Azariya sẽn yaa yẽndã tũud-n-taasã." 
Daniel2:18 Dag n yaa sẽn na n kos saasẽ Wẽnnaamã tɩ b maan nimbãan-zoeer yel-solem-kãngã wɛɛngẽ, tɩ b ra kʋ yẽnda ne a tũud-n-taasã, la ne Babilond bãngdbã me ye." 
Daniel2:19 Dẽ, badaar yʋngo, Wẽnnaam vẽnega a Dãniyɛll yel-solem-kãng zãmsd pʋgẽ. La a Dãniyɛll waooga saasẽ Wẽnnaamã." 
Daniel2:20 A Dãniyɛll yeelame: «Bɩ Wẽnnaam yʋʋr paam waoogr zamaan woo zamaane. 
Daniel2:21 Yam ne pãng yaa bãmb n so. Bãmb n tekd wakate, la yɛla, Bãmb n kõt rĩm-dãmb naam, Bãmb n sikd rĩm-dãmb b naamẽ, Bãmb n kõt yam-dãmbã yam, la b kõt bãngdbã me bãngre." 
Daniel2:22 Bãmb n vẽnegd yel-soalmã, Bãmb n mi bũmb ning sẽn solg lik pʋga, Bãmb sẽn beẽ, yaa vẽenem wakat fãa." 
Daniel2:23 Mam yaab-rãmbã Wẽnnaam, mam pẽgda yãmba, la m waoogd-y-yã, Yãmb sẽn kõ maam yam la pãngã yĩnga, bala, yãmb n vẽneg maam ne bũmb ning tõnd sẽn kos yãmbã, Yãmb n vẽneg tõnd ne yell ning sẽn pak rĩmã!»" 
Daniel2:24 Rẽ zugẽ, a Dãniyɛll yikame n kẽng a Aryok nengẽ. Yaa a Aryok la rĩmã sẽn dag n kõ noor t'a kɩt tɩ b kʋ Babilond bãngdbã. A Dãniyɛll yeela a Aryok yaa: «Bɩ y ra kʋ Babilond bãngdbã ye. Tall-y maam n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ, tɩ mam na n togs-b-la b zãmsdã võore.»" 
Daniel2:25 A Aryok peega a Dãniyɛll tao-tao n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel yaa: «Mam yãnda Zʋʋda yembsã sʋk ned a yembr sẽn na n kõ yãmb y zãmsdã bilgri.» 
Daniel2:26 Rĩmã yeela a Dãniyɛll b sẽn pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Bɛlsatzaarã yaa: «Yaa sɩd tɩ fo tõe n togsa maam m zãmsdã, la f bilg-ma a võore?»" 
Daniel2:27 A Dãniyɛll yalsa rĩmã taoor n leok n yeele: «Yel-solemd ning rĩmã sẽn dat n bãng a võorã, ka bãngdbã, wall bãngdb ne tɩtã-rãmb n tõe n bilg yãmb a võorã ye." 
Daniel2:28 La Wẽnnaam a yembr n be saasẽ, n tõe n vẽneg yel-soalem võyã, yaa Wẽnnaam-kãng n vẽnegd rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar ne bũmb ning sẽn na n wa n zĩnd yaoolem wakate. Ad zãmsd ning yãmb sẽn zãmsã, ne yãab nins yãmb sẽn paam y gãagẽ wã sẽn yɩ to-to." 
Daniel2:29 N-na, yãmb dag n gãe y gãagẽ, la yãmb tagsa bũmb nins sẽn wat yelle. La soab ning sẽn vẽnegd yel-soalmã kɩtame tɩ yãmb bãng bũmb ning sẽn wate." 
Daniel2:30 B sẽn vẽneg maam ne yel-solem-kãngã wã, ka rat n yeel tɩ mam tara yam n yɩɩd ninsaalbã fãa ye. La yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ yãmb bãng y zãmsdã võore, la y bãng bũmb ning sẽn be yãmb tagsgẽ wã." 
Daniel2:31 N-na, yãmb zãmsdã pʋga, yãmb yãnda bõn-naandg sẽn yaa kãsenga. Bõn-naandgã dag n bedmame, n pɩnd hal wʋsgo. La a ra yasa yãmb taoorã, t'a gesg be rabeem." 
Daniel2:32 Bõn-naandgã zugã rag n yaa sãnem halaale, t'a yãoogã ne a nusã rag n yaa wanzuri, t'a pʋgã ne a gɛy wã rag n yaa zũudu." 
Daniel2:33 A karsã rag n yaa kutu, t'a naoã bɛk yaa kutu, tɩ begr a yembrã yaa yagdo." 
Daniel2:34 La yãmb sẽn ket n get-a wã wakate, kug-bedr n yi yĩngri, tɩ ka ned n sɩɩs-a ye. Kugrã lʋɩ n wẽe bõn-naandgã naoã sẽn yaa kut ne yagdã tɩ b wã n lebg zom-zom." 
Daniel2:35 Dẽ, kutã ne yagdã la zũudã ne wanzuri wã, la sãnemã fãa lebga zom-zom n sãeeg wa wudg sẽn be zɛɛgẽ zĩ-likr wakate, tɩ sobg rɩk-b n looge, la bũmb ka kell ye. La kugr ning sẽn lʋɩ n wẽ bõn-naandgã n wã wã lebga tãn-kãseng n pid dũniyã gilli." 
Daniel2:36 N-na! Yamb zãmsdã la woto. Moasã, tõnd na n bilga a võorã n kõ-yã." 
Daniel2:37 N-na, yãmb yaa rĩm-dãmbã rĩmã. Saasẽ Wẽnnaamã kõo yãmb rĩungã, la b kõ yãmb pãn-tõogo, ne pãnga, la ziiri." 
Daniel2:38 Wẽnnaam rɩka ninsaalbã fãa, ne we-rũmsã ne liuuli wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã, n ning yãmb nugẽ, ba b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa. La b kɩt tɩ yãmb soog bãmb fãa. Dẽ, yaa yãmb la zugã sẽn yaa sãnemã." 
Daniel2:39 Yãmb loogr zugẽ, rĩung a to pãng sẽn ka ta yãmb n na n pʋgl n zĩndi. La tãabẽ soab sẽn yaa zũudu, n na n pʋgle. La yẽnda na n sooga dũniyã gilli." 
Daniel2:40 Rẽ poore, rĩung a naasẽ soab sẽn tar pãng wa kut n na n zĩndi. Kut sẽn tõe n wẽ bũmb n wã t'a lebg zom-zom to-to wã, rĩun-kãng na n wãa soolem a taabã sẽn deng n beẽ wã n neem-b zãnga." 
Daniel2:41 La yãmb sẽn yãnd a naoã ne a nao-bi wã tɩ bɛk yaa yagd tɩ bɛk yaa kutã, rat n yeelame tɩ soolem-kãng na n welga toor-toore. La yãmb sẽn yã kutã sẽn kalem ne yagdã, rat n wilgame tɩ kut pãng n na n kell n zĩnd a pʋgẽ." 
Daniel2:42 La nao-bi wã bɛk sẽn yaa kut tɩ bɛk yaa yagdã, rat n yeelame tɩ soolem-kãng begr a yembrã na n talla pãnga, tɩ begr a to wã ka tar pãng ye." 
Daniel2:43 Yãmb sẽn yã kutã ne yagdã sẽn kalem taabã rat n yeelame tɩ buud nins sẽn be soolem-kãens pʋgẽ wã na n baoo lagem-n-taar ne taaba. La wa kut ne yagd sẽn ka tõe n kalem taabã, bãmb ka na n tõog n lagem taab ye." 
Daniel2:44 Rĩm-bãmbã wakatã, saasẽ Wẽnnaamã na n kɩtame tɩ rĩung sẽn ka sãamd zĩndi. La buud a to neb kõn tol n tõog n deeg rĩun-kãng ye. Yẽnda na n wãa soolem-bãmb fãa n menes-ba, la a na n zĩnda wakat sẽn kõn sa." 
Daniel2:45 Woto, yãmb sẽn yã kugr ning sẽn yi tãngã zug tɩ ka ned n sɩɩs-a wã sẽn lʋɩ n wẽ kutã ne zũudã, la yagdã ne wanzuri wã, la ne sãnemã, rat n yeelame tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam-kãsengã n kɩte, tɩ rĩmã na n bãng bũmb ning sẽn tog n wa zĩnd yaoolem wakate. Zãmsdã yaa sɩda, la yãmb tõe n kɩsa sɩd t'a bilgrã me yaa sɩda.»" 
Daniel2:46 Dẽ, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wõgemda a Dãniyɛll taoor n waoog-a, la a yeel tɩ b maan maoongo, n yõog wisd a Dãniyɛll yĩnga." 
Daniel2:47 Rĩmã goma ne a Dãniyɛll n yeele: «Fo sẽn tõog n bãng yel-solem-kãngã wã, Sɩd-sɩdã, mam miime tɩ yãmb Wẽnnaamã yaa wẽnnaam-dãmbã Wẽnnaam, la rĩm-dãmbã Soaala. Bãmb n vẽnegd yel-soalmã.»" 
Daniel2:48 Dẽ poore, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar zẽka a Dãniyɛll n kõ-a naam, ne kũun-kãsems wʋsgo. Rĩmã kɩtame t'a Dãniyɛll lebg Babilond soolmã naaba, la Babilond tẽngã yam-dãmbã fãa na-kãsenga." 
Daniel2:49 La a Dãniyɛll kosa rĩmã t'a kɩt t'a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego yɩ Babilond soolmã taoor-dãmb n get soolmã yɛla. La a Dãniyɛll mengã kell n paa na-yirã. 
Daniel3:1 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame tɩ b naan sãnem bõn-naandga, la a woglmã taa kãntɩɩg pis-yoobe, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg a yoobe. A Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame tɩ b tɩ lugl-a Dura tẽn-nabdrẽ wã, Babilond soolmã pʋga." 
Daniel3:2 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool tẽngã kug-zĩidbã, kombɛɛmbã, soolem kãsem-dãmbã, sagendbã, ligd-gũudbã, bʋ-kaoodbã, tõog yel-gɛtbã, ne soolem toay-toayã nanambs fãa, tɩ b wa tigim taab bõn-naandgã bark ningr yĩnga." 
Daniel3:3 Dẽ, tẽngã kug-zĩidbã, kombɛɛmbã, soolem kãsem-dãmbã, sagendbã, ligd-gũudbã, bʋ-kaoodbã, tõog yel-gɛtbã, ne soolem toay-toayã nanambs fãa, tigma taab bõn-naandgã a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn luglã taoore, n na n ning-a barka." 
Daniel3:4 Dẽ, rĩmã koe-moaandã zẽka a koɛɛg n yeele: «Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa tẽms toor-toore, ne buud toor-toore, la buud goam toor-toor nebã, kelg-y-yã! Ad rĩmã sẽn yet yãmba:" 
Daniel3:5 Yãmb sã n wʋm baorgã ne wɩɩgã peebgo, la koalã ne pendsã, la ruudsã wẽebo, la tãntãadã peebgo, ne yʋʋm-teed buud toay-toay rãamde, bɩ y fãa wõgemd n waoog sãnem bõn-naandgã rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn luglã." 
Daniel3:6 La ned ning fãa sẽn kɩɩs-a n ka wõgemd n waoog bõn-naandgã, wakat-kãng bala, b na n loba a soab bugum wʋng sẽn wɩng wʋsg pʋgẽ.»" 
Daniel3:7 Dẽ, tẽms toay-toayã ne buud toay-toayã, la buud goam toay-toayã nebã fãa sẽn wʋm baorgã ne wɩɩgã peebgã, la koalã ne pendsã, la ruudsã wẽebã, la tãntãadã peebgã, ne yʋʋm-teed buud toay-toayã rãamdã, b wõgemdame n waoog sãnem bõn-naandgã a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn luglã." 
Daniel3:8 La wakat-kãng bala, Kalde rãmbã kolga rĩmã n kãneg zʋɩf-rãmbã." 
Daniel3:9 Kalde rãmbã yeelame: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-y-yã! 
Daniel3:10 Yãmb mengã n yeele, tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n wʋm baorgã ne wɩɩgã peebgã, la koalã ne pendsã la ruudsã wẽebã, la tãntãadã peebgã, ne yʋʋm-teed buud toay-toayã rãamdã, bɩ a wõgemd n waoog sãnem bõn-naandgã." 
Daniel3:11 La y yeelame me, tɩ ned ning sẽn ka sak n wõgemd-a n waoog sãnem bõn-naandgã, bɩ b lob a soabã wʋng sẽn wɩng wʋsg pʋgẽ." 
Daniel3:12 Ad-y zʋɩf-rãmb kẽer n be, n ka pʋʋsd yãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la b ka waoogd yãmb sãnem bõn-naandgã y sẽn luglã me ye. Yaa a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego sẽn yaa zʋɩf-rãmb nins yãmb sẽn yãk tɩ b yɩ Babilond soolmã taoor-dãmbã, bãmb kɩɩsa tõog ning yãmb sẽn yãkã.»" 
Daniel3:13 La bõn-kãng puuga rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sũurã wʋsgo, t'a yeel tɩ b tall a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego n wa. La b tall-b lame n wa rĩmã taoore." 
Daniel3:14 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yeela bãmb yaa: «Sadrake! Mesake! Abednego! Yaa sɩd tɩ yãmb yãka yam tɩ y ka na n waoog mam wẽnnaam-dãmbã ne sãnem bõn-naandgã mam sẽn luglã? 
Daniel3:15 Moasã bɩ y segl y mense, tɩ wakat ning b sẽn na n leb n peeb baorgã ne wɩɩgã, la b wẽ kondã ne pɛndgã la ruudgã, la b peeb tãntãoogã, la b wẽ yʋʋm-teedã buud fãa wã, bɩ y wõgemd n waoog sãnem bõn-naandgã mam sẽn luglã. La yãmb sã n ka sak n wõgemd n waoog-a, wakat-kãng bala, b na n loba yãmb wʋng sẽn wɩng wʋsg pʋgẽ. La d na gese, wẽnnaam-bʋg n na n wa fãag yãmb mam nugẽ.»" 
Daniel3:16 A Sadrak rãmb yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Ka tɩlɛ tɩ tõnd leok yãmb yel-kãngã wɛɛngẽ ye. 
Daniel3:17 Sã n yaa tɩ yãmb na n loba tõnd wʋngã bug-witim pʋgẽ, tõnd Wẽnnaam ningã tõnd sẽn tũudã tõe n fãaga tõndo, la bãmb na n fãaga tõnd wʋngã bug-witim pʋgẽ, la b fãag tõnd yãmb nugẽ." 
Daniel3:18 N-na! Baa tõnd Wẽnnaamã sã n ka fãag tõndo, tõnd ka na n wõgemd n waoog yãmb wẽnnaam-dãmbã ne y sãnem bõn-naandgã y sẽn luglã ye!»" 
Daniel3:19 Dẽ, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sũurã puuga wʋsg ne a Sadrak rãmba, hal t'a nengã teke. La a yeelame tɩ b wɩng wʋngã t'a tʋʋlmã yɩɩg raasenkamã naoor a yopoe." 
Daniel3:20 Dẽ, rĩmã yeela a tãb-biis nins sẽn ya-b wẽbã tɩ b sẽb a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego, n lob wʋngã sẽn wɩng wʋsgã pʋgẽ." 
Daniel3:21 La wakat-kãng bala, b sẽba bãmb b tãabã ne b fu-yordã, la b zutã pɛɛlã ne b fu-yerdɩ a taabã, n lob bãmb wʋng sẽn wɩng wʋsgã pʋgẽ." 
Daniel3:22 Noor ning rĩmã sẽn dag n kõ wã sẽn yaa kãenkãe wã yĩnga, b wɩnga wʋngã tɩ loog nugu. Dẽ, bugmã kʋʋ neb nins sẽn tall a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego n tɩ lob bugmẽ wã." 
Daniel3:23 La nin-bãmb b tãabã b sẽn sẽbã, a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego lʋɩɩ wʋngã sẽn wɩng wʋsgã pʋgẽ." 
Daniel3:24 La wakat-kãng bala, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar yɛɛsame n yik tao-tao. La a yeela a kug-zĩidbã yaa: «Ka neb a tãab la tõnd sẽn lob bugmẽ wã sɩda?» La b leoka rĩmã tɩ yaa woto bala." 
Daniel3:25 La rĩmã yeelame: «Mam yaool n nee neb a naas sẽn be bugmẽ wã n kẽnd tɩ bũmb ka sẽb-ba, la b ka namsd me ye. La a naasẽ soabã wẽnda wẽnnaam-dãmb biig a yembre.»" 
Daniel3:26 Dẽ, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kolga wʋngã noor n bool yaa: «Sadrake, Mesake, Abednego, Wẽnnaam sẽn ka to tʋmtʋmdba, yi-y n wa-y ka!» La a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego yii bugmã pʋga." 
Daniel3:27 Rĩmã kug-zĩidbã ne a laog-gũudbã, la a soolem kãsem-dãmbã ne a sagendbã gũmame n na n ges-ba, la b mikame tɩ bugmã ka tõog n maan nin-bãmbã b tãabã bũmb ye. La ba b zoobdã ka gõoneme, bugmã ka sɩɩs b futã, la bugum yũug rag n ka tol n be b yĩngẽ wã me ye." 
Daniel3:28 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel yaa: «Bɩ a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego Wẽnnaamã paam pẽgre. Bala, bãmb tʋma b malɛɛk t'a wa n fãag b tʋmtʋmdbã. A Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego kɩsa sɩd ne b Wẽnnaamã, n kɩɩs rĩmã noore, n gẽneg b yõore, n ka sak n na n wõgemd n waoog Wẽnnaam a to tɩ sã n ka bãmb Wẽnnaamã bal ye." 
Daniel3:29 Moasã, ad noor ning mam sẽn kõte: Ned ning fãa, ba a sẽn yaa buud ning neda, wall a sẽn gomd buud goam ninga, a soabã sã n paoog a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego Wẽnnaamã, b na n bees-a lame, la b wã a zakã n kɩt t'a lebg raboogo. Bala, Wẽnnaam a to ka be n tõe n fãag ned wa Wẽnnaam-kãngã sẽn maanã ye.»" 
Daniel3:30 Dẽ poore, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar kɩtame tɩ b zẽk a Sadrak ne a Mesak la a Abednego n kõ-b naam Babilond soolmã pʋga." 
Daniel3:31 Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar tʋma koɛɛg nebã buud fãa nengẽ, la soolem toay-toayã nengẽ, ne neb nins sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toorã fãa sẽn be dũniyã gill fãa zugã nengẽ, n yeel yaa: «Bɩ y vɩɩmd ne bãane!" 
Daniel3:32 Mam gesame tɩ yaa neere, tɩ m wilg bõn-bãn ne bõn-yɛɛsds nins Wẽnnaam sẽn ka to wã sẽn maan n kõ maamã." 
Daniel3:33 Bãmb bõn-bãnã yaa kãsemse! La Bãmb bõn-yɛɛsdsã tara pãnga! Bãmb dɩta naam wakat sẽn ka sɛta. La Bãmb rĩungã paada zamaan woo zamaane!» 
Daniel4:1 «Maam a Nebukatnedzaar dag n vɩɩ bãan m na-yirã pʋga, n be m na-zakẽ wã tɩ m vɩɩm yaa noogo." 
Daniel4:2 Mam zãmsa zãmsdo, la zãmsdã yɛɛsa maam. La tagsd nins m sẽn da tagsd m gãagẽ wã, ne vẽnegr nins mam sẽn yã wã rag n kẽesda maam dabeem." 
Daniel4:3 Dẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ b bool yam dãmb nins fãa sẽn be Babilond soolmã pʋgẽ wã, tɩ b tõe n wa bilg maam m zãmsdã võore." 
Daniel4:4 La tɩtã-rãmb ne bãngdbã, la bag-bʋgdbã ne Kalde rãmbã bãngdbã fãa waame. Dẽ, mam togsa bãmb m zãmsdã, la bãmb ned ba a ye ka tõog n bilg maam a võorã ye." 
Daniel4:5 Rẽ zugẽ, a Dãniyɛlle, b sẽn boond-a soab t'a Bɛlsatzaar wa mam wẽnnaamã yʋʋrã waa mam nengẽ, la wẽnnaam-sõmyã sɩɩgã rag n bee ne yẽnda. Mam togsa yẽnda m zãmsdã n yeele:" 
Daniel4:6 «Bɛlsatzaare, fo yaa bãngdbã fãa naaba, la mam miime tɩ Wẽnnaam-sõmyã sɩɩgã bee ne foom, la yel-solemd ba a yembr ka be t'a bilgr yaa toog ne foom ye. Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ f bilg maam m zãmsdã võore." 
Daniel4:7 Ad bũmb nins mam sẽn yã m zãmsdã pʋga. Wakat ningã mam sẽn wa n gãe m gãagẽ wã: Mam yãnda tɩ-wok bedr sẽn yas dũniyã tẽn-sʋka. 
Daniel4:8 Tɩɩgã ra lebgda woko, n paamd pãnga, t'a zugã tẽkd sa-gãongã. La baa neb nins sẽn dag n be dũniyã kɩremsã fãa wã ra ne-a lame." 
Daniel4:9 Tɩɩgã vãadã rag n yaa neere, la a rag n woma biis wʋsgo. Tɩɩgã biisã tõe n dɩlga bõn-vɩɩsã fãa. We-rũmsã rag n paamda maasem tɩɩgã tẽngre. Liuuli nins sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã ra maanda b tʋgd tɩɩgã wilã zutu. La bõn-vɩɩsã fãa rag n paamda b rɩɩb tɩɩgẽ wã." 
Daniel4:10 La zãmsdã pʋga, mam dag n ket n getame, la ade, mam yãnda malɛɛk a yembr sẽn yaa gũuda, t'a yi yĩngr n sigi." 
Daniel4:11 Malɛɛkã tãsa ne pãng n yeele: Kɛ-y tɩɩgã n lubi, la y kɛ a wilã. Yolm-y-yã a vãadã, la y yor a biisã n fẽrge. Bɩ we-rũmsã zoe n yi a tẽngrã, tɩ liuuli wã me yɩk n bas a wilã." 
Daniel4:12 Bas-y-yã a viukã ne a yẽgã tɩ b kell n pa tẽn-gãongã pʋga, La y sẽb-a ne bãens la zũud n gũbgi, n bas-a weoogã moog sʋka, tɩ meenemã rʋʋg-a. La bɩ yamd yɩ yẽnda rɩɩbo, wa rũmsã." 
Daniel4:13 B na n teka a yamã sẽn yaa ninsaal dẽndã tɩ lebg we-rũng yam. La yẽnda na n yɩ a woto hal tɩ ta yʋʋm a yopoe. 
Daniel4:14 Yam-yãk-kãngã yaa noor gũudbã sẽn kõ, La no-kãng yaa malɛgsã yam-yãkre. Sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ bõn-vɩɩsã bãnge, tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To wã n so ninsaalbã rĩungã fãa, bãmb kõt-a-la b sũur sẽn noom ne a soaba. La yaa bãmb n tõe n kɩt tɩ nin-talg wa lebg naaba." 
Daniel4:15 Ad maam a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa rĩmã sẽn yã bũmb ning m zãmsdã pʋgã. Moasã, bɩ foom a Bɛlsatzaar bilg maam m zãmsdã võore. Bala, mam soolmã yam-dãmbã fãa ka tõe n bilg maam a võorã ye. La fo tõe n bilg-a lame. Bala, wẽnnaam-sõmyã sɩɩgã bee ne foom.»" 
Daniel4:16 Woto, a Dãniyɛll b sẽn boond t'a Bɛlsatzaarã yɛɛsa wakat bilfu, t'a tagsgã namsd-a. La rĩmã yeelame: «Bɛlsatzaare, ra sak tɩ mam zãmsdã ne a bilgrã yɛɛs foom ye.» La a Bɛlsatzaar leoka rĩmã yaa: «M soaala, m da nongẽ lame tɩ y zãmsdã yɩ yãmb bɛɛbã yĩnga, t'a võorã yɩ sẽn kis-b yãmbã yĩnga!" 
Daniel4:17 Tɩɩgã yãmb sẽn yã tɩ lebgd bedrã, hal t'a pãngã paasdẽ, t'a zugã tẽkd sa-gãongã, tɩ sẽn be-b dũniyã kɩremsã fãa ne-a wã," 
Daniel4:18 t'a vãadã rag n yaa neerã, t'a biisã yaa wʋsg n sekd bõn-vɩɩsã fãa rɩlgrã, tɩ we-rũmsã wat n sõsd a tẽngrã, tɩ liuuli wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã wat n zaoonded a wilã zutã," 
Daniel4:19 n-na! Yaa yãmb la tɩɩgã. Yãmb lebga kãseng n tar pãnga, la yãmb kãosengã zẽkame hal n tat saasẽ, la yãmb naamã taa dũniyã kɩremsã fãa." 
Daniel4:20 N-na! Yãmb yãnda malɛɛk sẽn yaa gũudã sẽn yi yĩngr n sig n yeel yaa: ‹Kɛ-y tɩɩgã n lubi, la y sãam-a, la y bas a viukã ne a yẽgã tẽn-gãongã pʋga, la y sẽb-a ne bãens la zũudu, t'a zĩnd weoogã moog sʋka, tɩ meenemã rʋʋg-a, t'a naag rũmsã n wãb yamdo, hal tɩ ta yʋʋm a yopoe.›" 
Daniel4:21 N-na! Ad zãmsdã võore: Ad bũmb ning Sẽn-Ka-To sẽn yãk yam n na n maan rĩmã sẽn yaa m soaalã: 
Daniel4:22 ‹B na n diga yãmb n yiis ninsaalbã sʋka, tɩ yãmb tɩ vɩɩmd ne we-rũmsi. La b na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb wãbd yamd wa niigã. Meenem na n dʋʋga yãmba, la yãmb na n vɩɩmda a woto tɩ ta yʋʋm a yopoe, hal tɩ yãmb wa n bãng tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-To n so ninsaalbã naamã fãa, la bãmb kõt-a-la b sẽn dat-a soaba." 
Daniel4:23 B sẽn yeel tɩ b bas tɩɩgã viukã ne a yẽgã tẽngã pʋgẽ wã rat n yeelame tɩ wakat ning yãmb sẽn na n wa n bãng tɩ soab ning sẽn be-a saasẽ wã n so bũmb fãa wã, la b na n leb n lebs yãmb y naamã." 
Daniel4:24 N-na! Yaa rẽ yĩnga, tɩ m kot-y tɩ y sak n deeg m saglgã: Bas-y y yel-wẽnã n maan sẽn yaa tɩrga, la y bas y tʋʋm-beedã n zoe nimbãan-dãmbã nimbãanega, tɩ tõe tɩ y vɩɩmd ne bãan n kaoose.»" 
Daniel4:25 Bũmb nins fãa a Dãniyɛll sẽn togs rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar wɛɛngẽ wã paama pidsgu. 
Daniel4:26 Kiis piig la a yiib loogr zugẽ, daar a yembre, Babilond tẽngã pʋga, rĩmã rag n bee a na-yirã yĩngr doogã zugu, n kẽnd n gilimdẽ." 
Daniel4:27 Rĩmã yeelame: «Ges Babilond tẽn-kãsengã, yaa ne m pãngã, la mam tõog n me-a t'a lebg na-tẽnga, mam mengã waoogr ne m ziir yĩnga.»" 
Daniel4:28 La rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn nan ket n gomda, koɛɛg n yi yĩngr n yeele: «Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaare, kelg-y tɩ yaa yãmb la b sẽn gomd ne wã. B reega y rĩungã n bas-yã." 
Daniel4:29 B na n diga yãmb n yiis ninsaalbã sʋka, tɩ yãmb tɩ vɩɩmd ne we-rũmsi. B na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb wãbd yamd wa niigã. La a na yɩɩ a woto hal tɩ ta yʋʋm a yopoe, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-To n so ninsaalbã naamã, la bãmb kõt-a-la b sẽn dat-a soaba.»" 
Daniel4:30 La zĩig pʋgẽ bala, gomdã paama pidsg rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar zugu. B rig a Nebukatnedzaar n yiis ninsaalbã sʋka, t'a tɩ wãbd yamd wa niigã. La meenem dʋʋga a Nebukatnedzaare. La a zoobdã yiime hal n lebg wa sɩlg kõbdo, t'a nug-yẽesã ne a nao-yẽesã lebg wa liuul nao-yẽese." 
Daniel4:31 La yʋʋm a yopoe wã sẽn wa n pidi, rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar gomame n yeel yaa: «Maam a Nebukatnedzaar naka m neng n ges yĩngri, la mam yamã leb n wa a zĩigẽ. Dẽ, mam pẽga Sẽn-Ka-To, n waoog-ba, la m balem soab ning sẽn vɩ-a wakat sẽn ka sɛtã. Bãmb soo bũmbã fãa wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga. La bãmb dɩta naam zamaan woo zamaane." 
Daniel4:32 Dũniyã nebã fãa yaa wa zaalem bãmb taoore. Bãmb maanda b sẽn dat ne malɛgsã sẽn be saasẽ wã, la ne ninsaalbã sẽn be dũniyã zugã. Ned ka be n tar pãng n tõe n kɩɩs bãmb b naamẽ wã ye. La ned me ka be n tõe n sok tɩ yaa bõe la b maand ye." 
Daniel4:33 La wakat-kãng bala, mam yamã leb n waame. La mam leb n paama m naamã ne m ziirã, la m waoogrã. Mam kug-zĩidbã ne m nin-kãsemsã leb n baoo mam zĩiga. La mam leb n leba m zaoorẽ wã. La mam naamã rag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ." 
Daniel4:34 Moasã, maam a Nebukatnedzaar pẽgda saasẽ dĩm-kãsengã, la m waoogd-ba, n balemd-ba. Bãmb tʋʋmã fãa yaa sɩda, la b soayã yaa tɩrse. Yaa bãmb bal n tõe n sik wuk-m-mens rãmbã.»" 
Daniel5:1 Daar a yembre, rĩm a Bɛlsatzaar maana tig-kãsenga, a nin-kãsems tusrã yĩnga. La yẽnda yũu reezẽ rãam bãmb nifẽ." 
Daniel5:2 La rĩm a Bɛlsatzaar yũu reezẽ rãamã n tɩge. Dẽ, a yeelame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ wʋk sãnemã ne wanzuri wã laasã yẽnda ba a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n wʋk Zeruzalɛm Wẽnd doogã pʋgẽ wã, n tall n wa tɩ yẽnda ne a pagbã, la a pʋg-rɩkdsã ne a nin-kãsemsã tall n yũ rãam." 
Daniel5:3 B kẽngame n tɩ tall sãnem laasã b sẽn dag n wʋk Wẽnnaam doogã pʋg Zeruzalɛmã, n tall n wa. La rĩmã ne a nin-kãsemsã la a pagbã ne a pʋg-rɩkdsã tall-b lame n yũ reezẽ rãam." 
Daniel5:4 Bãmb yũu reezẽ rãamã, la b waoog sãnem ne wanzuri, la zũudu, ne kut la raad ne kug wẽn-naandsã." 
Daniel5:5 La wakat-kãng bala, b yãnda nug-bi sẽn wẽnd ninsaal nug-bi sẽn gʋlsd na-yirã lalg sẽn bolã zugu, fɩtl-doagendga neng-taoorã. Rĩmã rag n nee nugã sẽn gʋlsdã." 
Daniel5:6 La rĩmã pɛleng yɩkame, t'a yamã bondge, t'a gĩinã maage, t'a rũmã pãbd taaba." 
Daniel5:7 La rĩmã tãsame, n yeel tɩ b tɩ bool bãngdbã ne Kalde rãmbã bãngdbã, ne bag-bʋgdbã tɩ b wa. Dẽ, rĩmã yeela bãmb yaa: «Ned ning sẽn na n tõog-a n karm-a gʋlsmã, la a bilg a võorã n kõ-ma, b na n yeelga a soabã naam fuugu, la b pid a soabã kokor sãnem yãndo, la b kõ-a naam n kɩt t'a yɩ tãabẽ-soab mam soolmã nanambs sʋka.»" 
Daniel5:8 Rĩmã yam-dãmbã fãa waame. La bãmb ned baa a yembr ka tõog n karem gʋlsmã, la a bilg rĩmã a võor ye." 
Daniel5:9 Bõn-kãng kɩtame tɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk rĩm a Bɛlsatzaare, t'a nengã yeege, la yẽnda nin-kãsemsã rag n zĩi ne yɩɩre." 
Daniel5:10 La rĩmã ma sẽn wʋm goam nins rĩmã ne a nin-kãsemsã sẽn gomdã, a kẽe roog ning pʋg b sẽn dag n be n maand tigrã, n yeel rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã! Ra-y n sak-y tɩ y tagsgã nams-y ye. Ka tɩlɛ tɩ y bas tɩ rabeem yõk-y ye." 
Daniel5:11 Ned a yembr n be yãmb soolmẽ wã n tar wẽnnaam-sõmyã sɩɩga. Yãmb ba wã zamaanẽ, b mikame t'a yaa ned sẽn tar vẽnegre, bãngre la a tar yam wa wẽnnaam-dãmbã yam. Dẽ kɩtame, tɩ rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn yaa yãmb ba wã yãk-a n kɩt t'a lebg tɩtã-rãmb ne bãngdbã, la Kalde rãmba bãngdbã ne bag-bʋgdbã fãa naaba. Yaa yãmb ba wã n dag n maan woto." 
Daniel5:12 Rao a Dãniyɛlle, yãmb ba wã sẽn pʋd-a soab yʋʋr t'a Bɛltasaarã, b mikame t'a yaa ned sẽn tar yam ne bãngre, n yɩɩd nebã fãa, n tõe n bilg zãmsdo, ne yel-soalem võyã, la a tõe n wilg yel-tood manegr soayã. Bɩ y kɩt tɩ b bool a Dãniyɛll t'a wa bilg a võorã n kõ-yã.»" 
Daniel5:13 Dẽ, b talla a Dãniyɛll n kẽng rĩmã nengẽ. La rĩmã soka a Dãniyɛll yaa: «Yaa foom la a Dãniyɛll bɩ? Fo yaa yembs nins mam ba a Nebukatnedzaar sẽn dag n yõg Zʋʋda n tall n wa ka wã ned a yembr bɩ?" 
Daniel5:14 Mam wʋmame tɩ b gomd fo yell n yetẽ tɩ fo yaa ned sẽn tar wẽnnaam-sõmyã sɩɩga, tɩ la f tara vẽnegre, la bãngre, ne yam wʋsgo." 
Daniel5:15 Ade, b talla yam-dãmbã ne bãngdbã n wa mam nengẽ, n yeel-b tɩ b karem gʋlsmã fo sẽn ne wã, la b bilg a võor n kõ-ma. La bãmb ka tõog ye." 
Daniel5:16 B yeela maam tɩ fo yaa ned sẽn tõe n kõ yel-soalem bilgri, la f tõe n wilg yel-tood manegr soayã. Dẽ wã, fo sã n tõog n karem gʋlsmã fo sẽn ne wã, la f bilg a võorã n kõ maam, b na n yeelga foom naam fuugu, la b pid fo yublã sãnem yãndo, la b kɩt tɩ f lebg soolmã naab a tãabẽ soaba.»" 
Daniel5:17 A Dãniyɛll leoka rĩmã yaa: «N-na, y tõe n talla y kũunã, y leb n tõe n dɩk-a lame n kõ ned a to. La baoosgo, mam na n karma gʋlsmã, la m bilg a võorã n kõ-yã." 
Daniel5:18 N-na! Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To wã rag n kõo yãmb ba a Nebukatnedzaar rĩungã, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ rĩm-kãseng sẽn tar waoogre, la ziiri." 
Daniel5:19 La Wẽnnaam sẽn dag n zẽk bãmb tɩ b lebg rĩm-kãsengã yĩng kɩtame, tɩ buudã fãa, ne soolem toay-toayã fãa, ne nebã buud fãa sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toorã rigd bãmb taoor ne rabeem. Rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar dag n kʋʋda a sẽn dat-a soaba, la a basd a sẽn dat-a soaba. Bãmb dag n zẽkda b sẽn dat-a soaba, la b sikd b sẽn dat-a soaba." 
Daniel5:20 La rĩmã sẽn wuk b meng n diglim b sũurã n lebg tɩta-neda yĩng kɩtame, tɩ Wẽnnaam sik bãmb b naamẽ wã, n kɩt tɩ b ziirã sɛ." 
Daniel5:21 La b riga rĩm a Nebukatnedzaar n yiis ninsaalb sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b yamã menem, tɩ b lebg wa rũnga, la bãmb rag n tɩ vɩɩ ne we-rũmsi, la b rag n kõta bãmb yamd wa naafo. La meenem dʋʋga bãmba, hal tɩ ta wakat ning bãmb sẽn wa n bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To wã n so ninsaalbã fãa naamã n kõt b sẽn dat-a soabã." 
Daniel5:22 La yãmb a Bɛlsatzaar sẽn yaa bãmb biigã, yãmb bãnga bõn-kãensã fãa, la y ka sak n sik y meng ye." 
Daniel5:23 Yãmb zẽka y meng n kɩɩs Zu-soabã sẽn be saasẽ wã. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ b tall Zu-soabã roogã laasã n wa kõ yãmba, tɩ yãmb ne y nin-kãsemsã, la y pagbã, ne y pʋg-rɩkdsã tall-b n yũ reezẽ rãam. Yãmb waooga y wẽn-naandsã sẽn maan ne wanzuri, la sãnem, la zũudu, ne kutu, la raad ne kugã. Bãmb yaa wẽnnaam-dãmb sẽn ka ne, la b ka wʋmde, la b ka tar bãngr ye. Yãmb ka waoog Wẽnnaam ning sẽn so-a yãmb vɩɩmã, ne bũmb nins fãa yãmb sẽn maandã ye." 
Daniel5:24 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Wẽnnaam tʋm nug t'a wa gʋls gʋlsem ning yãmb sẽn ne wã." 
Daniel5:25 Ad gʋlsem ning sẽn gʋlsã: Sõdame, Sõdame, Makame, Welgame." 
Daniel5:26 Ad gʋlsmã bilgri: Sõdame: Rat n yeelame tɩ Wẽnnaam sõda yãmb naamã rasmã, la a sɛɛme." 
Daniel5:27 Makame: Rat n yeelame tɩ Wẽnnaam maka yãmb ne zɩslem makdga, la b mikame tɩ yãmb zɩslmã ka ta ye." 
Daniel5:28 Welgame: Rat n yeelame tɩ b pʋɩɩ yãmb soolmã n kõ Meed-rãmbã ne Pɛrs-rãmbã.» 
Daniel5:29 La wakat-kãng bala, rĩm a Bɛlsatzaar kõo noor tɩ b yeelg a Dãniyɛll naam fuugu, la b pid a yublã sãnem yãndo, la b moon n yeel t'a Dãniyɛll lebga naab a tãabẽ soab soolmã pʋga." 
Daniel5:30 Yʋn-kãng bala, b kʋʋ Babilond-dãmbã rĩm a Bɛlsatzaare." 
Daniel6:1 La Meed-rãmbã ned a Daryuus sẽn wa n na n deeg naamã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-yoob la a yiibu. 
Daniel6:2 Rĩm a Daryuus tagsame tɩ yaa neer t'a yãk nanambs koabg la pisi, n kɩt tɩ b zĩnd soolmã zĩig fãa yẽnda yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Daniel6:3 La rĩm a Daryuus yãka taoor dãmb a tãab tɩ b soog nanambsã fãa, la a Dãniyɛll dag n yaa taoor dãmb a tãabã ned a yembre. Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ bũmb sã n beẽ, bɩ nanambsã tɩ yãnd taoor dãmbã n togse, tɩ ned ra wa maan rĩmã yell ye." 
Daniel6:4 La a Dãniyɛll dag n tara yam n yɩɩd nanambsã ne taoor dãmbã, hal tɩ rĩmã rag n tagsd n dat n kɩt t'a lebg soolmã fãa taoor soaba." 
Daniel6:5 Woto kɩtame, tɩ nanambsã ne yam-dãmbã dag n baood bũmb n na n dõd a Dãniyɛll soolmã yɛl wɛɛngẽ. La bãmb ka tol n yãnd bũmbu, wall bãnd n tõog n dõd a Dãniyɛll ye. Bala, a Dãniyɛll dag n yaa nin-tɩrga, tɩ b ka tõe n yãnd zʋg-wẽng a zugu, wall kongr ye." 
Daniel6:6 Dẽ, nin-bãmb yeelame: «Tõnd ka na n tõog n yãnd bũmb n dõd a Dãniyɛlle, sã n ka tɩ tõnd na n bẽd-a-la a Wẽnnaamã tõog wɛɛngẽ.»" 
Daniel6:7 Woto, taoor dãmb a yiibã, ne nanambsã zemsa taab noor a yembre, n kẽng rĩm a Daryuus nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a yaa: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã!" 
Daniel6:8 Yãmb soolmã taoor dãmbã, ne tẽngã laog yel-gɛtbã, la nanambsã, ne sagendbã, la kombɛɛmbã fãa tagsame tɩ yaa neere, tɩ yãmb yiis tõog sẽn ka viigda, n wilg tɩ ka ne rasem pis-tã pʋgẽ, ned sã n bas yãmb n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam a to, wall a pʋʋs ned a to, bɩ b lob a soab gɩgmã wã bokẽ." 
Daniel6:9 N-na! Bɩ y sak n vigl tõ-kãngã, la y tik y nugu, tɩ ned ka tõe n tek-a, wa Meed-rãmbã ne Pɛrs-rãmbã tõog sẽn ka tõe n tekã.»" 
Daniel6:10 Dẽ, rĩm a Daryuus vigla tõogã, n ning a nug-tikr bãnde." 
Daniel6:11 A Dãniyɛll sẽn wʋm tɩ b vigla tõ-kãngã wã, a rʋ a yĩngr doogã zugu, n pags a peem-lees nins sẽn teesd Zeruzalɛm sẽnẽ wã. La daar fãa, yẽnda ra yĩgimdida be naoor a tãabo, n pʋʋsd a Wẽnnaamã, la a pẽgd bãmba, wa yẽnda sẽn minim n maandẽ wã." 
Daniel6:12 La nin-bãmb tũu taab tao-tao n kẽng n tɩ mik t'a Dãniyɛll pʋʋsd a Wẽnnaamã n kot sõngre. 
Daniel6:13 Dẽ, bãmb lebg n leba rĩmã nengẽ n tɩ yeel-b yaa: «N-na! Yãmb ka vigl tõog n tik y nug n yeel tɩ rasem pis-tã wã pʋgẽ, ned ning sẽn bas-a yãmb n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam a to, wall a pʋʋs ned a to, b na n loba a soab gɩgmã wã bokẽ sɩda?» La rĩmã leokame tɩ yaa woto bala, wa sẽn zems Meed-rãmbã ne Pɛrs-rãmbã tõogã sẽn ka tekdã." 
Daniel6:14 Dẽ, bãmb leb n yeela rĩmã yaa: «N-na! A Dãniyɛll sẽn yaa Zʋʋda yembsã sʋk ned a yembrã ka tol n nand yãmba, la a ka nand y tõog ning yãmb sẽn vigl n tik y nugã ye. Yẽnda pʋʋsda a Wẽnnaamã naoor a tãab daar fãa." 
Daniel6:15 La rĩmã sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, a sũurã sãama hal wʋsgo. La a maoo ne a sũur fãa n dat n fãag a Dãniyɛlle. La hal tɩ ta wĩndgã kõom, rĩmã baoo yẽnda sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n tõog n fãag a Dãniyɛlle." 
Daniel6:16 La nin-bãmbã lebg n tũu taab tao-tao n wa rĩmã nengẽ n yeel-a yaa: «N-na! Bãng-y tɩ Meed-rãmbã ne Pɛrs-rãmbã tõog yetame tɩ rĩm sã n vigl tõogo, wall b rɩk noore, n tik b nugu, tõ-kãng ka tõe n tek ye.»" 
Daniel6:17 Dẽ, rĩmã yeelame tɩ b tɩ tall a Dãniyɛll n wa n lob gɩgma wã bokẽ. La rĩmã yeela a Dãniyɛll yaa: «Bɩ fo Wẽnnaamã fo sẽn tũud ne f sũur fãa wã fãag foom.»" 
Daniel6:18 B rɩka kugr n lud bokã noore. La rĩmã ninga a meng nugbĩngã bãnd kugrã zugu, t'a kug-zĩidbã me ning b rẽnda, tɩ b sẽn yãk yam ning a Dãniyɛll wɛɛngẽ wã ra viig ye." 
Daniel6:19 Rẽ poore, rĩmã lebg n kuila a yiri. La badaar yʋngo, rĩmã ka rɩ, a ka sak t'a pag ba a yembr pẽneg-a, la a ka tol n gũs me ye." 
Daniel6:20 La rĩmã sãda beoogo, zĩigã sẽn dat n yẽeg sasa, n wudg tao-tao n kẽng gɩgma wã bokẽ." 
Daniel6:21 Rĩmã sẽn kolg bokã, a zẽka a koɛɛg n bool a Dãniyɛll ne sũ-sãang n yeel yaa: «Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ tʋmtʋmd a Dãniyɛlle, fo Wẽnnaamã fo sẽn tũud ne f sũur fãa wã tõog n fãaga foom ne gɩgmã wã bɩ?»" 
Daniel6:22 La a Dãniyɛll leoka rĩmã yaa: «N-na! Wẽnd na kaoos-yã! 
Daniel6:23 Mam Wẽnnaamã tʋma b malɛɛk t'a wa mum gɩgmã wã noy tɩ b ka tõog n maan maam bũmb ye. Bala, Wẽnnaam gesame tɩ mam tara bʋʋm bãmb nifẽ. N-na! Mam ka maan bũmb sẽn yaa wẽng n beeg yãmb me ye.»" 
Daniel6:24 Dẽ, rĩmã sũur yɩɩ noog wʋsgo, la a kɩtame tɩ b yiis a Dãniyɛll gɩgmã wã bokẽ. La b sẽn yiis a Dãniyɛllã, b ka tol n yãnd poglg baa bilf a yĩngẽ wã ye. Bala, yẽnda teega a Wẽnnaamã." 
Daniel6:25 La rĩmã kõo noor tɩ b tɩ yõg neb nins sẽn dõd-b a Dãniyɛllã n wa lob gɩgmã wã bokẽ, bãmb ne b kambã la b pagbã fãa. La sẽn deng bãmb sẽn na n lʋɩ bokã pʋgã, gɩgmã wã koka bãmb n wõr b kõabã zãnga." 
Daniel6:26 Dẽ poore, rĩm a Daryuus gʋlsa sɛb n tʋm dũniyã buud fãa sẽn be tẽmsã fãa pʋs n gomd gom-zẽnã nengẽ n yeele: «Bɩ y zĩnd ne bãane!" 
Daniel6:27 Mam kõta noor tɩ mam soolmã gill fãa pʋga, bɩ nebã fãa zoe a Dãniyɛll Wẽnnaamã la b waoog-ba. Bala, bãmb yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ, la bãmb paada wakat sẽn kõn sa. Bãmb soolem kõn tol n sãam ye, la bãmb naamã ka tar sɛɛb ye." 
Daniel6:28 Yaa bãmb n fãagda, la b yolsdẽ, Bãmb n maand bãna la bõn-yɛɛsdse, saasẽ la dũniyã zug me. Yaa bãmb n fãag a Dãniyɛll tɩ gɩgmã wã ka kʋ-a ye." 
Daniel6:29 La bõn-kãens zugẽ, a Dãniyɛll lebga nin-kãseng rĩm a Daryuus zamaanẽ, la ne Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus zamaanẽ.»" 
Daniel7:1 Babilond dĩm a Bɛlsatzaar naamã pipi yʋʋmdã pʋgẽ, a Dãniyɛll sẽn wa n be a gãagẽ, a zãmsa zãmsdo, la a paam vẽnegre. La rẽ zugẽ, a Dãniyɛll gʋlsa bõn-kãng n wilg a sẽn yɩ to-to ball-balle." 
Daniel7:2 A Dãniyɛll yeelame: «Ade, mam yʋngẽ zãmsdã pʋga, mam dag n getame, la mam yãnda sobg sẽn yi dũniyã kɩrems a naasã n wa wẽ ko-kãsengã." 
Daniel7:3 La rũm-bɛd a naas n yi koomẽ wã, la bãmb baa a yembr dag n ka wẽnd a to ye." 
Daniel7:4 Pipi rũngã ra wẽnda wa gɩgemde, la a rag n tara sɩlg pɩgsa. La mam sẽn ket n getẽ, mam yã b sẽn võ a pɩgsã. La b yik-a lame n yals yĩngr a naoã zutu, wa ninsaal sẽn yas to-to wã, la b kõo yẽnda ninsaal yam." 
Daniel7:5 La mam yãnda rũng a yiibẽ soab sẽn wẽnd rigd-n-yĩidga. Rũn-kãng rag n yik n yas a poorẽ naoã zutu, la a ra zãada sĩ-biis a tãab a noorẽ.» La b yeel-a lame yaa: «Yik n wãb nemd wʋsgo.»" 
Daniel7:6 Rẽ zugẽ, mam dag n getame, la mam yãnda rũng a to sẽn wẽnd ãbga, la a rag n tara pɩgs a naas sẽn yaa liuul pɩgs a poorã zugu, la rũn-kãng rag n tara zut a naase, la b kõ-a-la naam." 
Daniel7:7 Dẽ poore, mam dag n ket n geta m yʋngã vẽnegr pʋgẽ, la ade, mam yãnda rũng a naasẽ soab sẽn yaa bõn-bãnde, n kẽesd rabeem, t'a pãngã yaa kãseng wʋsgo. La a rag n tara yẽn-bɛd sẽn yaa kutu. Yẽnda rag n gʋsdame n wãbdẽ la a zendemdẽ, la a tabd sẽn kellã ne a naoã. Yẽnda yaa toor zãnga, n ka tol n wẽnd rũms nins mam sẽn dag n zoe n yãndã ye, la a rag n tara yɩɩl piiga." 
Daniel7:8 La mam sẽn ket n get yɩɩlã wakate, mam yãnda yɩɩn-bil a yembr sẽn yi bãmb sʋkã, n võ pipi yɩɩlã a tãabo, la yɩɩn-bilã rag n tara nin wa ninsaal nini, la a tar noor sẽn gomd tɩtaam goamã." 
Daniel7:9 Mam sẽn wa n getẽ wã, mam yãndame tɩ b vigind naam gɛya, la nin-kẽem kulkuug n wa n zaoond be, bãmb fuugã rag n yaa pɛɛlg faddd... wa lamdo, tɩ b zugã zoobd pelg wa pe-bil kõbdo, bãmb geerã rag n yaa wa bug-witim, t'a naoã yaa wa bug-saala." 
Daniel7:10 La bugum n dag n yit bãmb taoorã, n zoet wa kʋɩlg koom. Neb tus kẽema n tʋmd bãmb yĩnga, la neb tus kẽema ka tɛk n yas bãmb taoore. Bʋ-kaoodbã zĩndame, la b laka sɛba." 
Daniel7:11 Dẽ, mam dag n ket n getame, yɩɩllã sẽn dag n gomd tɩtaam goamã yĩnga. La mam sẽn wa n ket n getẽ wã wakate, mam yãnda b sẽn kʋ rũng a naasẽ soabã, n dɩk-a n lob bugmẽ wã, tɩ bugmã rɩ-a." 
Daniel7:12 La b reega rũms a taabã naamã n bas-ba, la b basame tɩ rũm-kãens na n kell n vɩɩmde, n tãag wakat b sẽn yãke." 
Daniel7:13 Mam dag n ket n geta m yʋng vẽnegrã pʋga, la mam yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaal t'a zao sawatã n sigda. La bũmbã sẽn wẽnd ninsaalbã kẽng n kolga nin-kẽem kulkuugã, la b kɩtame t'a pẽneg nin-kẽem kulkuugã." 
Daniel7:14 La b kõo yẽnda ninsaalbã pãnga, waoogre, la naam. La nebã buud fãa, ne soolem-dãmbã fãa, la ninsaalbã sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toorã, tʋmda yẽnda yĩnga. La yẽnda pãnga paada wakat sẽn ka sɛta, la a pãngã ka tar sɛɛb ye. La yẽnda naamã ka na n tol n sãam ye." 
Daniel7:15 Maam a Dãniyɛll yamã bondgame, la vẽnegr ning mam sẽn yã wã kẽesa maam dabeem." 
Daniel7:16 La mam kolga neb nins sẽn dag n yas beenẽ wã ned a yembr n sok-a n na n bãng bõn-kãensã fãa võore. La yẽnda bilga maam vẽnegrã võor n yeel yaa: 
Daniel7:17 «Rũm-bɛd a naasã fo sẽn yãndã mamsda rĩm-dãmb a naas sẽn na n wa zĩnd dũniyã zugu. 
Daniel7:18 La Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To nin-sõamyã na n deega soolmã n soog wakat sẽn kõn sa.» 
Daniel7:19 Rẽ zugẽ, mam baoome n na n bãng rũng a naasẽ soabã sẽn yaa toor ne a taabã võore. Rũn-kãng rag n yaa bõn-bande, n tar yẽn sẽn yaa kutu, t'a nao-yẽesã yaa zũudu. La yẽnda wãbdame la a zendemdẽ, la a tabd sẽn kellã ne a naoã." 
Daniel7:20 La mam baoome me n na n bãng yɩɩl piigã sẽn dag n be yẽnda zugẽ wã, ne yɩɩll ning sẽn yaool n puk-a bãmb sʋk n kɩt tɩ yɩɩl a tãabã lʋɩ wã võore. Yɩɩn-kãng rag n tara nini, la noor sẽn gomd tɩtaam goamã, la yẽnda wẽnda wa a tara pãng n yɩɩd yɩɩl a taabã." 
Daniel7:21 La mam sẽn ket n getẽ, mam yãame tɩ yɩɩn-kãng yika zabr ne Wẽnnaam nin-sõamyã, la a tõoga bãmba," 
Daniel7:22 hal tɩ nin-kẽem kulkuugã wa n na n kao Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To nin-sõamyã bʋʋdo. La wakat wa n taame tɩ nin-sõamyã tõog n deeg naamã n sooge. 
Daniel7:23 Nin-kãng goma ne maam n yeele: «Rũng a naasẽ soabã mamsda soolem a naasẽ soab sẽn na n wa n zĩnd dũniyã zugu. La soolem-kãng na n yɩɩ toor ne soolem a taabã. La a na n dɩɩ dũniyã gilli, n tab-a ne a nao n sãame." 
Daniel7:24 Yɩɩl piigã mamsda rĩm-dãmb piig sẽn na n pʋgl taab n zĩnd soolem-kãng pʋga. La a to n na n pʋgl bãmb n zĩndi. La yẽnda na n yɩɩ toor ne pipi rãmbã, la a na n luba rĩm-dãmb a tãabo." 
Daniel7:25 Yẽnda na n goma goam sẽn paoogd Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To, la a na n namsa Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To nin-sõamyã. A na n makame n na n tek wakatã, la a tek Wẽnnaam nebã wẽn-tũudmã tõodã. La b na n basame t'a soog nin-sõamyã yʋʋm a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Daniel7:26 Rẽ zugẽ, b na n bʋ a bʋʋdo, la b reeg a naamã n bas-a, la b sãam-a t'a menem zãng wakat sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga." 
Daniel7:27 La b na n dɩka soolem nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã naamã, ne b pãngã n kõ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To nin-sõamyã tɩ b sooge. Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-To soolmã paada wakat fãa, la pãens rãmbã fãa na n waooga bãmba, la b sak-ba.»" 
Daniel7:28 Yaa koɛɛgã baoosg la woto. Dẽ, maam a Dãniyɛll yamã bõdmame, la rabeem kẽe maam wʋsgo, hal tɩ m nengã teke, la mam bĩnga bõn-kãensã fãa m sũurẽ." 
Daniel8:1 Rĩm a Bɛlsatzaar naamã reegr yʋʋm a tãab soabã pʋga, maam a Dãniyɛll leb n yãnda vẽnegr a to, la yaa mam pipi vẽnegrã mam sẽn yã tɩ loogã poore." 
Daniel8:2 Vẽneg-kãng pʋgẽ, mam yãame tɩ mam bee Suuz sẽn yaa Elam soolem na-tẽngã pʋga, Ulayi kʋɩlgã noore." 
Daniel8:3 Mam zẽka m neng n gese, la mam yãnda pe-raoog sẽn yas kʋɩlgã noore, n tar yɩɩl a yiibu. A yɩɩlã rag n yaa wogdo, la a yembr n dag n yaa wok n yɩɩd a to wã. La sẽn yaa a wokã n yɩ yaoolem soab n yi." 
Daniel8:4 La mam yãndame tɩ pe-raoogã tãad goabg la rɩtgo, la nin-taoore, la rũng baa a yembr rag n ka tõe n yals n zab ne-a ye. La b rag n ka tõe n fãag ned a nugẽ ye. Yẽnda rag n maanda a sẽn date, la a pãngã rag n tara paasgo." 
Daniel8:5 La mam sẽn nan ket n tagsd bõn-kãng yelle, mam nee boɛɛg sẽn yi nin-taoor n zoet n gilgd tẽn-gãongã gilli, t'a naoã yaool n ka sɩɩsd tẽng ye. La boɛɛgã rag n tara yɩɩn-bedr a yembr a ninã sʋka." 
Daniel8:6 Yẽnda sẽn ta pe-raoog ning sẽn tar yɩɩl a yiibã mam sẽn dag n yãnd t'a yas kʋɩlgã noorã sẽn beẽ wã, a wudga ne a pãngã tɛk fãa n babsd-a." 
Daniel8:7 La mam yãnda boɛɛgã sẽn kolgd pe-raoogã ne sũ-yikri. La a tãaga pe-raoogã, n kao a yɩɩl a yiibã fãa, la pe-raoogã rag n ka tar pãng n tõe n zab ne-a ye. La a luba pe-raoogã tẽnga, n tab-a ne a naoã, la ned dag n ka be n na n fãag pe-raoogã boɛɛgã nugẽ ye." 
Daniel8:8 Boɛɛgã pãng rag n tara paoosgo, la a pãngã sẽn wa n lebg wʋsgã, yɩɩn-bedrã kaoome. La yɩɩn-bɛd a naas n led a zĩigẽ n yi n teesd yĩngr ween-vɩɩs a naasã. Rẽ poore, b na n lebsa zĩ-sõngã zĩigẽ." 
Daniel8:9 Yɩɩll sẽn yaa bilf wʋsg n yi yɩɩn-bãmb sʋkã yɩɩll a yembr zĩigẽ, la a lebga bedr wʋsg n tees rɩtgo, yaanga, la tees tẽn-neer n yɩɩdã sẽnẽ." 
Daniel8:10 Yɩɩn-bilfã zẽkame n tãag saasẽ tãb-biisã, la a kɩtame tɩ tãb-bi-kãens kẽer ne ãdsã lʋɩ tẽnga, la yẽnda tab-b lame." 
Daniel8:11 Yẽnda tol n zẽkame n tãag tãb-biisã Naabã, a rẽgma maoong ning sẽn maand daar fãa wã maanego, ne a zĩ-sõngã." 
Daniel8:12 Yɩɩn-bilã tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga, n tõog n soog saasẽ tãb-biisã ne maoong ning sẽn tog n maan daar fãa wã. Yɩɩn-bilã loba sɩdã tẽnga, n paama tõogr a tʋʋmã fãa pʋga." 
Daniel8:13 La mam wʋma pʋ-peelem soab a yembr sẽn gomde, la pʋ-peelem soab a to yeela yẽnda yaa: «Vẽnegrã sẽn kẽed ne daar fãa maoongã wɛɛngẽ wã, ne tʋʋm-wẽnsã wɛɛngẽ wã, la zĩig sẽn welg toorã wɛɛngẽ wã, ne a sẽn tõog tãb-biisã n tabã na n kaoosame n ta dabʋr n yaool n pidsi?»" 
Daniel8:14 Pipi pʋ-peelem soabã yeela maam yaa: «Yaa zaabr la yibeoog tusr la kobs-tã loogr zugẽ, la b na n lebs n maneg zĩis nins sẽn welg toorã.»" 
Daniel8:15 La maam a Dãniyɛll sẽn wa n ket n get vẽnegrã, la m baood n wʋm a võorã, mam yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaal sẽn wa n yals mam taoore." 
Daniel8:16 La mam wʋma ninsaal koɛɛg sẽn yi Ulayi kʋɩlgã sẽnẽ n kelem n yeel yaa: «Gabriyɛlle, bilg nin-kãngã vẽnegrã võore." 
Daniel8:17 Dẽ, malɛɛk a Gabriyɛll kẽngame n kolg zĩig ning mam sẽn dag n be wã, la mam yɛɛsame, n lʋɩ n fõgen m neng tẽnga. La a yeela maam yaa: Ninsaal biiga, bãng tɩ vẽnegrã wilgda yɛlã sẽn na n yɩ to-to yaoolem wakate.»" 
Daniel8:18 Malɛɛk a Gabriyɛll sẽn wa n ket n gomd ne maamã wakate, mam sobgame tɩ m nengã ket n fõg tẽnga. La a sɩɩsa maam n kɩt tɩ m yik n yals zĩig ning mam sẽn dag n beẽ wã." 
Daniel8:19 La malɛɛk a Gabriyɛll yeela maam yaa: Mam na n vẽnega foom bũmb ning sẽn na n zĩnd sũ-puugrã loogr zugẽ, bala, b yãka wakatã sɛɛb daare." 
Daniel8:20 Pe-raoogã fo sẽn yã ne yɩɩl a yiibã mamsda Meed-rãmbã ne Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm-dãmba. 
Daniel8:21 Boɛɛgã sẽn tar kõbd wʋsgã mamsda Gɛrɛs rĩmã. La yɩɩn-bedrã sẽn dag n be a ninã sʋkã mamsda pipi rĩmã. 
Daniel8:22 La yɩɩllã sẽn kao tɩ yɩɩl a naasã led a zĩigẽ n yi wã mamsda soolem-dãmb a naas sẽn na n wa n zĩnd soolem-kãng pʋgẽ, la soolem-kãens ka na n paam pãng wa yẽnda ye." 
Daniel8:23 La soolem a naasã sɛɛb wakat sã n ta, wẽngã maaneg sã n wa n loog nugu, rĩm sẽn yaa tɩta-ned la sɩlem soab n na n zĩndi." 
Daniel8:24 Rĩm-kãng pãngã na n tara paasgo, la ka na n yɩ ne a meng pãng ye. Yẽnda na n waa ne sãoong-kãsenga, la a na n paama tõogr bũmb ning fãa a sẽn maandã pʋgẽ, la a na n sãama pãens rãmba, ne Wẽnnaam pʋ-peelem dãmbã." 
Daniel8:25 La a sɩlmã yĩnga, a na n tõog n tudga neb a taabã, la a na n wuka a meng a sũur pʋgẽ, la a na n sãama neb wʋsg sẽn dag n vɩ ne bãane, la a na n yik n zaba ne nanambs naabã. La yẽnda na n sãamame tɩ ka tũ ne ned nug ye." 
Daniel8:26 Vẽnegr ning sẽn kẽed ne zaabr la yibeoog maandã wɛɛngẽ wã yaa bũmb sẽn yaa sɩda. Bɩ f bĩng-a f sũurẽ n da gom a yell tɩ ned wʋm ye. Bala, a yaa wakat sẽn ket n zãr yelle." 
Daniel8:27 Maam a Dãniyɛll pãngã sɛɛme, la mam yɩɩ bãad rasem bilfu, la mam yĩnsã sẽn sigi, mam yiime n tɩ tʋm rĩmã yĩnga. La vẽnegrã yɩka mam pɛlenga, la mam ka tol n wʋm a võor ye." 
Daniel9:1 A Asuyeruus biig a Daryuus sẽn yaa Meed-rãmbã buud nedã sẽn wa n lebg Babilond soolem dĩmã pipi yʋʋmdã pʋga, maam a Dãniyɛll karma sɛbã pʋse, n bãng tɩ na n taa yʋʋm pis-yopoe tɩ Zeruzalɛm sãoongã yaool n sɛ, wa Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Zeremi sẽn dag n yeelã:" 
Daniel9:2  
Daniel9:3 Dẽ, mam loee noore, la m yeelg sũ-sãang fuugu, n yug m zug tompeglem, n na n pʋʋs Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam ne se-yõkre." 
Daniel9:4 Mam pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã, n sak n deeg tɩ d kongame n yeele: «Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, yãmb yaa kãsenga, la yãmb zemsa zoeese. Yãmb gũuda y kaoolã, la y zoeta neb nins sẽn nong yãmb la b sakd yãmb tõodã nimbãanega!" 
Daniel9:5 Tõnd kongame, tõnd beegame, d yɩɩ nin-wẽnse la kɩɩsdba, la tõnd wẽnemdame n bas yãmb tõodã ne y noyã." 
Daniel9:6 Yãmb tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã goma ne tõnd dĩm-dãmbã ne d nanambsã, la d yaab-rãmbã ne tẽngã nebã fãa, ne yãmb yʋʋre. La tõnd ka kelg-b ye." 
Daniel9:7 Zu-soaba, yãmb yaa tɩrlem soaba, la rũndã daarã, yãndã bee tõnd sẽn yaa Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã zugu, la Israyɛll gillã fãa neb zugu. Yaa sẽn pẽ-ba, la sẽn zãr-bã. Bãmb bee tẽms nins yãmb sẽn dag n dig-b tɩ b kẽngã pʋse, b sẽn kɩɩs yãmbã yĩnga." 
Daniel9:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãnd tara tõnd ne d rĩm-dãmbã, la d nanambsã ne d yaab-rãmbã, bala tõnd beega yãmba." 
Daniel9:9 Tõnd Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, tõnd kɩɩsa yãmba, la yãmb yaa nimbãan-zoɛta, la sugr soaba." 
Daniel9:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã tũnuga b no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn yaa bãmb tʋmtʋmdbã, n kõ tõnd bãmb tõodã, la tõnd ka reeg ye." 
Daniel9:11 Israyɛll nebã fãa kɩɩsa yãmb a Wẽnnaam tõogã, la b wẽnemdame n ka kelg yãmb koɛɛgã ye. Rẽ kɩtame tɩ kãab-wẽng ning b sẽn gʋls a Moyiis sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã tõod sebr pʋgẽ wã paam tõndo, tõnd sẽn beeg yãmbã yĩnga." 
Daniel9:12 Wẽnnaam pidsa goam nins bãmb sẽn dag n gom n yeel tɩ b na n sɩbga tõnd ne d nanambs nins sẽn dag n so tõndã. Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ to-kãseng paam tõnd a Zeruzalɛm nebã, la saagã tẽngre, toog a woto buud nan zɩ n zĩnd ye." 
Daniel9:13 Tõ-kãensã fãa paama tõnd wa sẽn gʋls Wẽnnaam tʋmtʋmd a Moyiis tõodã sebr pʋgẽ wã, la tõnd ka kos Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b sik sũur ne-d ye. Tõnd ka wẽnemd n bas d yel-wẽnã, n tẽ tɩ yãmb sɩd na n maana wa y sẽn yeelã ye." 
Daniel9:14 Woto kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab bas tɩ to-kãngã paam tõndo. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã yaa tɩrlem soab b tʋʋmã fãa pʋse. La yaa tõnd n ka kelg bãmb koɛɛgã bala." 
Daniel9:15 La moasã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam, yaa yãmb n yiis y nebã Ezɩpt tẽngã ne y nugã sẽn tar pãngã, tɩ yãmb yʋʋrã yi hal tɩ ta rũndã. La tõnd kongame, tõnd beega yãmba." 
Daniel9:16 Zu-soaba, yãmb tɩrlem tʋʋmã yĩnga, bɩ y sik y sũur ne Zeruzalɛm sẽn yaa yãmb tẽnga, la y tãn-sõngã. Bala, tõnd kongrã ne d ba-rãmbã beegrã yĩnga, neb nins sẽn gũbg tõndã paoogda Zeruzalɛm ne yãmb nebã." 
Daniel9:17 Moasã, tõnd Wẽnnaam, bɩ y kelg y tʋmtʋmdã pʋʋsgã ne a se-yõkrã, la y mengã waoogr yĩnga, bɩ y wẽnemd y nimbãan-zoeer nengã n ges y zĩ-sõngã sẽn sãamã!" 
Daniel9:18 Mam Wẽnnaam, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelge! Puk-y y nin n ges tõnd tẽngã, tẽng ning b sẽn boond yãmb yʋʋrã a pʋgẽ wã sẽn lebg raboogã. Ka tõnd tʋʋm-sõamã yĩng la tõnd sẽn yõkd yãmb sɛɛg woto wã ye. La yaa yãmb nimbãan-zoeerã sẽn yaa kãsengã yĩnga." 
Daniel9:19 Zu-soaba, kelg-y-do! Kõ-y-d sugri! Zu-soaba, kɩll-y y tʋbr n kelg-do! Y mengã waoogr yĩnga, bɩ y maan d sẽn kotã, la y ra kaoos ye. Bala, tẽngã yaa yãmb tẽnga, la nebã yaa yãmb nebã.»" 
Daniel9:20 Mam dag n ket n bee pʋʋsg pʋga, n togsd m kongrã, ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa mam buudã kongrã, la m pʋʋsd Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã, la m yõkd bãmb sɛɛg b tãn-sõngã yĩnga." 
Daniel9:21 Mam dag n ket n bee pʋʋsg pʋga, la sẽn zems zaabr maoong maaneg wakate, malɛɛk a Gabriyɛll sẽn yaa ned ning mam sẽn dag n yãnd mam pipi vẽnegrã pʋgẽ wã yɩka ne tʋʋlem n wa mam nengẽ." 
Daniel9:22 Malɛɛk a Gabriyɛll goma ne maam n yeel yaa: «Dãniyɛlle, mam sẽn wa moasã wã, yaa sẽn na n vẽneg fo yamã.»" 
Daniel9:23 Hal fo se-yõkrã sɩngrẽ, Wẽnnaam tʋma koɛɛga, la mam waame n na n togs foom koe-kãnga. Bala, fo yaa Wẽnnaam nin-nongre. Kelg koɛɛgã neere, la f wʋm vẽnegrã võore." 
Daniel9:24 Ade, b yãka yʋʋm a yopoe naoor pis-yopoe, fo nebã ne tẽn-sõngã yĩnga, n na n kɩt tɩ tʋʋm-beedã ne kongrã sɛ, tɩ yel-wẽnã me tõe n paam pekre, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ tɩrlem puk wakat fãa, tɩ vẽnegrã ne pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã paam pidsgu, la b welg zĩig sẽn welg toor n yɩɩdã toore." 
Daniel9:25 Dẽ wã, bɩ f bãng bõn-kãngã, la f wʋm a võore: Sẽn sɩng ne daar ning b sẽn togs koɛɛgã n yeel tɩ b lebs n me Zeruzalɛmã, hal tɩ ta Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdgã zamaanẽ, yaa yʋʋm a yopoe naoor a yopoe. La yʋʋm a yopoe naoor pis-yoob la a yiibã wakate, b na n lebs n mee Zeruzalɛm zĩisã, la b lebs n me a lalsã. Rẽ na n yɩɩ toog wakate." 
Daniel9:26 Yʋʋm a yopoe naoor pis-yoob la a yiibã loogr zugẽ, b na n kʋʋ Wẽnnaam nin-tũusdgã, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka na n sõng-a ye. La naab a to ne a neb n na n wa, bãmb na n sãama tẽngã ne zĩ-sõngã. La b na n sãam-a-la ne sũ-puug-kãsenga, tɩ yɩ naabã baoosgo. B yãka yam tɩ sãoongã na n kaoosame, hal tɩ tãag zabrã sɛɛbo." 
Daniel9:27 La yʋʋm a yopoe wã sẽn wat n dabd sɛɛbo, a na n maana weoogr kaool ne neb wʋsgo. La yʋʋm a tã la pʋɩ-sʋkã sã n ta, naabã na n kɩtame tɩ b bas maoongã maanego, ne kũunã kɩsgo. Sãamdã na n maana tʋʋm-wẽns hal tɩ loog nugu. La a na n maana woto, hal tɩ wakat ning b sẽn yãk n na n sãam-a wã wa ling-a.»" 
Daniel10:1 Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm a Siruus sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm tãablẽ, a Dãniyɛll b sẽn pʋd a soab yʋʋr t'a Bɛlsatzaarã paama koɛɛg sẽn yit Wẽnnaam nengẽ, la yaa koɛɛg sẽn yaa sɩda, la a wilgdame tɩ zab-kãseng n na n zĩndi. La a Dãniyɛll sẽn deeg koɛɛgã, a tagsame n bãng a võore." 
Daniel10:2 Wakat-kãnga, maam a Dãniyɛll maana sũ-sãang rasem pisi la a yembre." 
Daniel10:3 La hal tɩ rasem pisi la yembrã wa pidi, mam ka tol n dɩ rɩ-noogo, la m ka leems neongo, wall m fʋrg reezẽ rãam, la m ka maneg m meng ye." 
Daniel10:4 Pipi kiuugã rasem pisi la a naasã daare, mam dag n bee kʋɩl-kãseng ning b sẽn boond tɩ Tɩgrã noore." 
Daniel10:5 La mam sẽn zẽk m neng n gese, mam yãnda ned sẽn yer fu-pɛɛlga, n sẽbg a sɛɛg ne sẽbdg sẽn yaa sãnem halaale." 
Daniel10:6 Yẽnda yĩngã rag n wẽnda wa kug-neere, t'a nengã pɩnd wa sa-yãgbo, la a ninã yaa wa bug-witim, t'a naoã ne a nusã yaa wa zũud b sẽn duug tɩ pɩnda, la a sã n gomda, a koɛɛgã wẽnda wa neb-kʋʋng n gomde." 
Daniel10:7 La neb nins sẽn dag n be ne maamã ka yãnd vẽnegrã ye. Yaa maam a Dãniyɛll bal n yãnd vẽnegrã. La baoosgo, rabeem-kãseng n yõk bãmb tɩ b zoe n tɩ soonde." 
Daniel10:8 Dẽ, maam m yembr bal n kell pa n yãnd vẽnegrã. La mam gĩinã maagame, tɩ mam nengã bonge, la mam dag n ka leb n tar pãng baa bilf meng ye." 
Daniel10:9 La mam sẽn wʋm nedã koɛɛgã rãamdã, mam sobgame n lʋɩ tɩ m nengã fõgen tẽnga." 
Daniel10:10 La gese, ned nug n wa n sɩɩs maam n kɩt tɩ mam yĩgimd m dũmã zugu, tɩ m nusã tik tẽng tɩ m digda." 
Daniel10:11 La nedã yeela maam yaa: «Wẽnnaam nin-nongr a Dãniyɛlle, kelg bũmb nins mam sẽn na n togs foomã neere. Yik n yals zĩig ning fo sẽn beẽ wã. Bala, b tʋma maam fo nengẽ.» Nedã sẽn yeel maam woto n sɛ, mam yikame n yas n digda." 
Daniel10:12 Nedã yeela maam yaa: «Dãniyɛlle, ra zoe rabeem ye. Bala, sẽn sɩng ne pipi daarã fo sẽn yãk yam n sik f meng fo Wẽnnaamã taoor n dat n bãng yɛlã võorã, b wʋma fo kosgã. La yaa bõn-kãng yĩng la mam sẽn wa wã." 
Daniel10:13 Ad yaa sɩɩg ning sẽn yaa Pɛrs-rãmbã soolem gũudã n tek n gɩdg maam dasem pisi la a yembre. La a Mikayɛll sẽn yaa gũudbã nanamb-bɛdã ned a yembrã wa n zab n sõnga maam. Dẽ wã, yaa Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm-dãmb nengẽ la mam dag n tek n beẽ." 
Daniel10:14 Moasã, mam waame n na n wilg foom bũmb ning sẽn na n wa n paam fo nebã yaoolem wakatã. Bala, vẽnegr a yembr n ket wakat-kãng wɛɛngẽ.»" 
Daniel10:15 La yẽnda sẽn wa n ket n gomd ne maamã, mam sulga m neng tẽnga, n da ka n tõe n gom ye." 
Daniel10:16 La gese, mam yãnda bũmb sẽn wẽnd ninsaala, la a sɩɩsa mam no-bɩmsã. La mam yaaga m noor n sɩng goamã. Mam yeela ned ning sẽn yas-a mam taoorã yaa: «M soaala, vẽnegrã kɩtame tɩ mam yamã bondge, la mam ka leb n tar pãng baa bilf ye." 
Daniel10:17 M soaala, mam sẽn yaa yãmb tʋmtʋmdã na n yɩ a wãn n tõog n gom ne yãmba? Bala moasã wã, mam ka leb n tar pãng baa bilfu, la mam vʋʋsem yõkdame." 
Daniel10:18 La sẽn wẽnd-a ninsaalbã leb n sɩɩsa maam, n leb n kõ maam pãnga." 
Daniel10:19 Yẽnda yeela maam yaa: ‹Wẽnnaam nin-nongre, ra zoe rabeem ye. Gãneg f yam! Keng f meng n paam daoodo!› La yẽnda sẽn dag n gomd ne maamã wakate, mam leb n paama pãng n tõog n gom n yeele: M soaala, bɩ y gome! Bala, yãmb leb n kõ-m-la pãnga.»" 
Daniel10:20 Nedã soka maam yaa: «Fo mii bũmb ning sẽn wa ne maam fo nengẽ wã bɩ? Mam waame n na n togs foom bũmb ning sẽn gʋls sɩdã sebr pʋgẽ wã. La moasã, mam na n lebg n tɩ zaba ne sɩɩg ning sẽn yaa Pɛrs-rãmbã soolem gũudã, la Gɛrs-rãmbã soolem gũudã na n waame. La sã n ka yãmb gũud a Mikayɛll a yembr bala, ned baa a yembr ka na n sõng maam n zab ne-b ye.»" 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 Mam me zĩnda ne yẽnda n sõng-a la m tebl-a, Meed-rãmbã ned a Daryuus sẽn wa n lebg rĩmã yʋʋmde." 
Daniel11:2 Moasã, mam sẽn na n togs foomã yaa koɛɛg sẽn yaa sɩda. Ade, rĩm-dãmb a tãab n na n pʋgl taab n yɩ Pɛrs-rãmbã rĩm-dãmba. Rẽ zugẽ, naasẽ soab sẽn tar arzegs wʋsg n yɩɩd a taabã n na n zĩndi. La yẽnda arzegsã na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda paam pãnga, yẽnda na n maana a sẽn tõe tɛk n yik zabr ne Gɛrk-rãmbã soolem." 
Daniel11:3 La rĩm a yembr sẽn yaa gãndaoog n na n yik n soog nebã ne pãnga, n maand a sẽn date." 
Daniel11:4 La yẽnda naamã sẽn wat n paam pãngã, a soolmã na n wãame, n welg n kẽ dũniyã ween-vɩɩs a naasã. Yẽnda pendã ned ka na n tol n led a zĩigẽ n dɩ naamã ye. Yaa neb a taab n na n deeg naamã, la bãmb naamã pãng ka na n ta na-kãng rẽndã ye." 
Daniel11:5 La goabg tẽng rĩmã pãng na n tara paasgo. La rĩm-kãng nanambsã ned a yembr pãng na n yɩɩga yẽnda, la na-kãng naamã na n talla pãnga." 
Daniel11:6 La yʋʋm bilf loogr zugẽ, bãmb na n maana kaool ne taaba. La goabg tẽng rĩmã na n dɩka a bi-pugl n kõ rɩtg tẽng rĩmã, n bao zems-n-taare. La bi-puglã ka na n tõog tɩ kaoolã yals ye. Bala, b na n kʋʋ yẽnda, la b kʋ a ba wã ne a sɩdã la biigã ne b tʋmtʋmdbã wakat-kãng bala." 
Daniel11:7 La wakat-kãnga, bi-puglã buudã ned a yembr n na n yik n led a ba wã sẽn yaa Ezɩpt rĩmã zĩigẽ, n kẽng rɩtg rĩmã tãnsobengẽ wã, tẽngã sẽn gũbg ne lalsã pʋgẽ, n tɩ zab ne-a, n deeg a tẽngã n sooge." 
Daniel11:8 La nin-kãng na n wʋka tẽngã laogã sẽn yaa wẽn-naandsã, ne a sãnem la a wanzuri laasã, n tall n kẽng Ezɩpt tẽngã. Rẽ zugẽ, na n maana yʋʋmã, tɩ b ka leb n zab ne rɩtg rĩmã ye." 
Daniel11:9 Rẽ poore, rɩtg rĩmã na n kẽnga Ezɩpt rĩmã soolmẽ, n yaool n lebg n leb a tẽngẽ." 
Daniel11:10 Rɩtg rĩmã kom-dibli na n tigsa tãb-bi-kʋʋngo, n segl zabre. La bãmb ned a yembr ne a tãb-biisã na n yika zabre, n pasg toadgã n fõt wa kʋɩlg sẽn pid n fudgdẽ. La a sã n lebg n watẽ, a na n tees n zaba ne bɛyã tẽng sẽn gũbg ne lalsã." 
Daniel11:11 La Ezɩpt rĩmã sũur na n yikame t'a yi n kaoog zabr ne rɩtg rĩmã. La rɩtg rĩmã na n yii ne tãb-bi-kʋʋng n seg-a, la Ezɩpt rĩmã na n tõoga tãb-bi-kʋʋn-kãnga." 
Daniel11:12 La Ezɩpt rĩmã na n wuka a meng a tõogrã yĩnga, la baa ne yẽnda sẽn tõog n sãam tãb-biis wʋsgã, yẽnda ka na n paam tõogr ye." 
Daniel11:13 Bala, wakat bilf loogr zugẽ, rɩtg rĩmã na n lebg n tigsa tãb-biis sẽn yaa wʋsg n yɩɩd pipi rãmbã, n lebg n wa. Rɩtg rĩmã na n waa ne tãb-bi-kʋʋng sẽn tar zab-teed sẽn tar pãng wʋsgo." 
Daniel11:14 Wakat-kãnga, neb wʋsg na n yikame n dat n zab ne Ezɩpt rĩmã, la neb kẽer sẽn yaa fo meng buud neb sẽn yaa nen-kegems na n yikame n dat n pids vẽnegrã, la b ka na n tõog ye." 
Daniel11:15 Rɩtg rĩmã na n yika zabr ne tẽms sẽn gũbg ne lalse, la a na n tõog-b lame. La Ezɩpt tãb-bi-kʋʋngã ne b gãndaadã ka na n paam pãng n tõog n yals n zab ne-a ye." 
Daniel11:16 Rɩtg rĩmã na n maana a sẽn dat ne Ezɩpt rĩmã, tɩ ned ka be n na n tõog n yals n zab ne-a ye. La yẽnda na n sãama bũmb nins fãa sẽn be yẽnda sorã zugu, n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd tẽng ning sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd fãa wã pʋgẽ." 
Daniel11:17 Dẽ, rɩtg rĩmã na n baoome n dat n tall a soolmã pãng fãa n wa yõg zood ne Ezɩpt rĩmã, n dɩk a bi-pugl n kõ-a t'a maan a paga, sẽn na yɩl n paam-a n sãame. La sɩlem-kãng ka na n zems ye." 
Daniel11:18 Dẽ, rɩtg rĩmã na n wẽnemdame n zab ne tẽms nins koom sẽn gũbgã, n tõog n deeg tẽms wʋsgo. La tãb-biis naab a yembr n na n yik n kɩt tɩ rɩtg rĩmã wuk-m-mengã sɛ, la a kɩt t'a tʋʋm-beedã leb-a." 
Daniel11:19 Dẽ zugẽ, rɩtg rĩmã na n lebg n leba a meng tẽngã sẽn gũbg ne lalsã pʋgẽ. La a ka na n paam sõngr ye. Yẽnda na n kiime tɩ b ka leb n wʋm a rãamd ye." 
Daniel11:20 Ned ning sẽn na n led-a yẽnda zĩigẽ wã na n kɩtame tɩ nin-toaag wa zɛ soolmã roog ning sẽn yaa-a neer n yɩɩd fãa wã teedo. La rasem bilf zugẽ, b na n kʋ-a lame, tɩ ka tũ ne sũ-puugri, wall ne zabr ye." 
Daniel11:21 La nin-yaalg sẽn ka tar waoogre, la sẽn dag n ka tog n yɩ naab n na n deeg yẽnda naamã. Yẽnda na n maana sɩlem, n wa wakat ning soolmã sẽn gãe bãanã, n deeg-a." 
Daniel11:22 Tãb-bi-kʋʋng na n yikame n fõt n wat n na n zab ne yẽnda, la yẽnda na n sãam-b lame, la a tol n kʋ kaoolã nebã taoor soaba." 
Daniel11:23 Nebã na n maana kaool ne yẽnda, la rẽ zugẽ, yẽnda na n tũnuga rẽ n maan sɩlem, la baa ne yẽnda poorẽ dãmbã sẽn ka waoogã, yẽnda pãngã na n tara paasgo." 
Daniel11:24 Yẽnda na n kẽe tẽngã zĩis nins sẽn yaa zĩ-sõama wã tɩ ka tũ ne zabr ye. La yẽnda na n maana bũmb a ba-rãmbã ne a yaab-rãmbã sẽn zɩ n maane. A na n wʋka te-zɛɛdmã, laogã, ne arzegsã yẽnda sẽn dag n paamã n pʋɩ nebã, la a maan sɩlem, n tõog tẽms nins sẽn tar pãngã. La bõn-kãng na n kaoosa wakat bilf bala." 
Daniel11:25 Yẽnda na n lʋɩɩ tãb-bi-kʋʋng taoor ne raoodo, la sẽn tar pãng wʋsgo, n kẽng n tɩ zab ne Ezɩpt rĩmã. La Ezɩpt rĩmã na n yii ne tãb-bi-kʋʋng sẽn tar pãnga, n seg-a n zab ne-a. La Ezɩpt rĩmã ka na n tõog rɩtg rĩmã ye. Bala, b na n zãmb-a lame." 
Daniel11:26 Yaa neb nins sẽn na n naag Ezɩpt rĩmã n dɩ wã, n na n wẽneg n sãam dĩmã. Zabrã na n yɩɩga tãb-biisã pãnga, la wʋsg na n kiime." 
Daniel11:27 Rĩm-dãmb a yiibã na n zĩnd n dɩɩ ne taaba, la ned kam fãa sẽn baood a to ne wẽngã yĩnga, b na n goma zĩrẽ goam ne taaba. La b sẽn dag n dat n maanã ka na n tõoge, tɩ sã n ka wakat ning b sẽn yãkã n ta ye." 
Daniel11:28 Rɩtg rĩmã na n lebg n leba a tẽngẽ wã ne arzegs wʋsgo. Yẽnda sũurã na n yika ne Wẽnnaam nin-sõamyã. La a na n maana a sẽn date, n yaool n lebg n leb a tẽngẽ wã." 
Daniel11:29 La wakat ning b sẽn yãkã sã n ta, yẽnda na n lebg n tɩ zaba ne Ezɩpt rĩmã. La wakat-kãngã, yɛlã ka na n yɩ wa pipi wã ye." 
Daniel11:30 Neb n na n yi Kitim ne koom kogend n tɩ zab ne-a. La yẽnda sũurã na n sãamame t'a lebg n na n kuili. Dẽ, yẽnda sũ-puugrã pʋga, a na n tees n zaba ne Wẽnnaam nin-sõamyã. A na n leb n paama zems-n-taar ne neb nins sẽn na n bas Wẽnnaam kãab-sõngã." 
Daniel11:31 Yẽnda na n tʋma tãb-bi-sul tɩ b kẽng zĩ-sõngã b sẽn leb n gũbgã, n tɩ maan bũmb sẽn kisi, n dẽgem-a la b gɩdg tɩ b ra leb n maan daar fãa maoongã n kõ Wẽnnaam ye. La bãmb na n lugla sãamdã bõn-naandgã tẽn-kugrã zugu." 
Daniel11:32 Rɩtg rĩmã na n goma no-noom goam n belg neb kẽer tɩ b bas Wẽnnaam kaoolã. La neb nins sẽn ket n sakd Wẽnnaamã na n kell n yalsa kãenkãe. 
Daniel11:33 Yam dãmbã sẽn be nebã sʋkã na n zãmsa neb wʋsg tɩ b paam bãngre. La wakat bilf pʋgẽ, b na n kʋʋ neb kẽer bãmb sʋkã ne zabr sʋʋga, la b yõog kẽer bugum, la b yõg kẽer n kẽes yembdo, la b zɛ kẽer paoongo." 
Daniel11:34 B sẽn wat n kʋʋd neb kẽerã wakate, b na n paama sõngr bilfu. La neb wʋsg sẽn yaa pʋ-libsim dãmb na n naaga bãmba." 
Daniel11:35 B na n kʋʋ yam dãmbã sʋk neb kẽere, la rẽ na n waa ne nebã yɩlgre, la b pekre, tɩ b lebg sõama, hal tɩ sɛɛbã wakat Wẽnnaam sẽn yãkã ta, bala rag n nan ka sɛɛbã wakat nand ye." 
Daniel11:36 La rɩtg rĩmã na n maana a sẽn date. A na n wuka a menga, n pẽg a meng n yeel tɩ yẽnda yɩɩda wẽnnaam-dãmbã fãa, la a na n goma gom-bɛd n paoog wẽnnaam-dãmb Wẽnnaamã. La a na n paama tõogr hal tɩ ta Wẽnnaam sũ-puugrã daare. Bala, Wẽnnaam sẽn yeelã na n paama pidsgu." 
Daniel11:37 Yẽnda ka na n tol n waoog a yaab-rãmbã wẽnnaam-dãmbã, wall pagbã sẽn nong n waoogd Wẽnnaam ningã ye. Yẽnda ka na n waoog Wẽnnaam ba a yembr ye. Bala, yẽnda na n tagsame t'a yɩɩda b fãa." 
Daniel11:38 A na n basa bãmb fãa, n waoog tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lals wẽnnaamã, sẽn yaa Wẽnnaam ning yẽnda yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n ka mi wã. Yẽnda na n waooga wẽnnaam-kãng ne sãnem la wanzuri, la ne kug buud sẽn tar yõodo, ne kũun buud toor-toore." 
Daniel11:39 Yẽnda na n teega Wẽnnaam-kãngã, n yik zabr ne tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã. La yẽnda na n waooga neb nins sẽn sakd yẽnda wã, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ nanambs n soog neb wʋsgo, la a kõ-b zĩis tɩ yɩ b keoore." 
Daniel11:40 La wakat ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa sɛɛbã wakatã sã n ta, Ezɩpt rĩmã na n zaba ne rɩtg rĩmã. La rɩtg rĩmã na n talla a saar-dãmbã, ne a wed-rʋʋdbã, la a koom kogend wʋsg n fõd n kẽ-a wa sob-kẽenga, n kẽ b tẽmsã n pasg n looge." 
Daniel11:41 Rɩtg rĩmã na n kẽe tẽng ning sẽn yaa neer n yɩɩd fãa wã pʋgẽ, la a na n kʋʋ neb wʋsgo. La Edom ne Moaab la Amo-rãmbã taoor dãmbã na n zoe n põsame t'a ka paam-b ye." 
Daniel11:42 Yẽnda na n zab n deega tẽms a taab wʋsgo, la baa Ezɩpt tẽngã ka na n põs ye." 
Daniel11:43 Yẽnda na n wʋka Ezɩpt tẽngã arzegsã n sooge: Yaa sãnem, wanzuri, ne Ezɩpt tẽngã teed nins fãa sẽn tar yõodã. La Libi ne Kuus nebã na n pʋga yẽnda." 
Daniel11:44 La yẽnda na n wʋma kibay sẽn yit yaang la rɩtgo, tɩ rabeem-kãseng yõk-a, t'a yik ne sũ-puug-kãsenga, n tɩ kʋ neb tus-kẽema." 
Daniel11:45 Yẽnda na n tilga a naamã fu-rot ko-kãsemsã ne tãn-sõngã sẽn yaa neerã sʋka. La kũumã na n linga yẽnda beenẽ, tɩ ned ka be n na n fãag-a ye." 
Daniel12:1 Sẽn wẽnda ninsaalbã leb n yeela maam yaa: «Wakat-kãnga, gũudbã na-kãseng a Mikayɛll sẽn yaa yãmb nebã gũudã na n waame, la na n yɩɩ to-kãseng wakate. Hal ninsaalb sẽn be dũni tɛk tɩ tãag badaare, to-kãseng a woto buud nan ka zĩnd ye. La badaare, b na n fãaga fo neb nins yʋy sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋgẽ wã." 
Daniel12:2 La neb wʋsg sẽn gãe tẽng tomẽ na n vʋʋgame. Kẽer na n vʋʋgame n paam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sa, tɩ kẽer vʋʋg n paam yãnde, n vɩɩmd paoog-kãseng pʋg wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga.»" 
Daniel12:3 La yam dãmbã na n pɩnda wa sa-gãongã, la neb nins sẽn zãms neb a taabã tɩ b tũ tɩrlem sorã na n pɩnda wa ãds wakat fãa n ka sɛtẽ ye." 
Daniel12:4 La bɩ foom a Dãniyɛll solg gom-kãense, la f pag sebrã hal tɩ ta yaoolem wakate. Neb wʋsg na n karma sebrã n paam bãngr n paase.»" 
Daniel12:5 La maam a Dãniyɛll sẽn ket n getẽ, mam yãnda neb a yiib a taab sẽn yik n yas yĩngri. A yembrã yasa kʋɩlgã noore, t'a yembrã be kʋɩlgã rʋʋnde." 
Daniel12:6 Bãmb ned a yembr yeela ned ning sẽn yer-a fu-peels n yas koomã zugã yaa: «Bõn-yɛɛsds-kãensã sɛɛbã daar na n yɩɩ dabʋre?» 
Daniel12:7 La mam wʋma ned ning sẽn yer-a fu-peels n yas koomã zugã sẽn gomde. La yẽnda zẽka a nus a yiibã n tees yĩngr n wẽen ne sẽn vɩ-a wakat sẽn kõn sa wã yʋʋr n yeele: «Bõn-yɛɛsdsã na n kaoosa yʋʋm a tãab la pʋɩ-sʋka. Wẽnnaam nin-sõamyã pãng sẽn na n sɛ wakat ningã, yaa wakat-kãng la bõn-yɛɛsds-kãensã fãa me na n sɛ.»" 
Daniel12:8 Maam a Dãniyɛll wʋma goamã, la m ka wʋm a võor ye. La mam sokame: M soaala, yel-bãmbã na n sɛɛ dabʋre?" 
Daniel12:9 La b leoka maam yaa: «Dãniyɛlle, ra yɛɛs ye. Bala, gom-bãmbã tog n solgame, hal tɩ ta wakatã sɛɛbã.»" 
Daniel12:10 Neb wʋsg na n paama yɩlgre, la pekre, n lebg sõama. Nin-wẽnsã na n ket n maanda wẽngã, la bãmb ned ba a ye ka na n wʋm yɛlã võor ye. La yam dãmbã na n wʋma a võore." 
Daniel12:11 Hal sẽn sɩng wakat ning b sẽn na n gɩdg daar fãa maoongã maanegã, ne wakat ning b sẽn na n lugl sãamdã bõn-naandgã, na n yɩɩ rasem tusr la kobs-yi la pis-wɛ." 
Daniel12:12 Bark bee ned ning sẽn na n yals-a n gũ tɩ ta rasem tusr la kobs-tã la pis-tã la a nu wã daarã zugu. 
Daniel12:13 La bɩ foom a Dãniyɛll kell n yals kãenkãe n tãag yɛlã sɛɛb wakate. La fo na n paama vʋʋsgo, n yik n deeg f keoor yaoolem daarã." 
Hosea1:1 Ad koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Beeri biig a Ooze, Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmb a Oozɩyaas ne a Yotam la a Akaaz ne a Ezekɩyaas wakate, la a Zoaas biig a Zeroboaam sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã wakate." 
Hosea1:2 Ad goam nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tũnug a Ooze n togsã sɩngre. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Ooze yaa: «Kẽng n tɩ peeg pʋg-yoodr n maan f paga, t'a rog yoodem kamba, Bala, tẽn-kãngã nebã basa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, wa pag sẽn bas a sɩd n kẽng yoobo.»" 
Hosea1:3 Dẽ, a Ooze kẽngame n tɩ peeg a Diblayim bi-pugl a Gomeer n maan a paga. A Gomeer dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla." 
Hosea1:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Ooze yaa: «Pʋd biigã yʋʋr t'a Zɩzreyɛlle, bala, keta wakat bilfu, tɩ mam dok m sũur ne a Zehu roogã, bãmb sẽn daag zɩɩm Zɩzreyɛllã yĩnga. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛll doogã rĩung sɛ." 
Hosea1:5 Badaare, mam na n kaooga Israyɛll tãpã, Zɩzreyɛll tẽn-nabdrẽ wã.»" 
Hosea1:6 A Gomeer leb n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-pugla. B yeela yẽnda yaa: «Pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Lo-Ruhama, sẽn dat n togs tɩ b sẽn ka zoet-a soab nimbãanega. Bala, mam ka na n leb n zoe Israyɛll nebã nimbãanega, n kõ-b sugr yɛs ye.»" 
Hosea1:7 La mam na n zoee Zʋʋda nebã nimbãanega. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã na n fãag-b lame. La ka na n yɩ ne tãp wall zabr sʋʋga, wall ne zabr bɩ ne wiidi, wall ne saar-dãmba, la mam na n fãag bãmb ye." 
Hosea1:8 A Lo-Ruhama sẽn bas bĩisim, a Gomeer leb n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla." 
Hosea1:9 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela yẽnda yaa: «Pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Lo-Ami, Sẽn dat n togs tɩ ka m neb ye. Bala, yãmb ka mam neba, la mam me ka baa fɩ yãmb yĩng ye.»" 
Hosea2:1 Israyɛll nebã sõor na n yɩɩ wa bĩisrã sẽn be ko-kãsengã noore, tɩ b ka tõe n sõd-b n bãng a sõor ye. Zĩig ning b sẽn dag n yet bãmb tɩ: ‹Yãmb ka mam neb ye›, b na n bool-b lame tɩ: ‹Wẽnnaam sẽn vɩ kamba.›" 
Hosea2:2 Wakat-kãnga, Zʋʋda nebã ne Israyɛll nebã na n lagma taaba, la b na n yãka naab a yembr t'a soog-ba. Bãmb na n sooga tẽngã, bala, Zɩzreyell daarã na n yɩɩ ra-kãsenga." 
Hosea2:3 Bool-y y saam-biisã tɩ ‹mam nebã›, la y bool y tãopã tɩ ‹b sẽn zoet-b rãmb nimbãanega.›" 
Hosea2:4 Bool-y y ma wã bʋʋdo, bool-y-yã-a bʋʋd t'a ka mam paga, la mam me ka a sɩd ye! Bɩ a yiis yoobã bãn sẽn be a nengã zugã, la sẽn be a bĩisã sʋkã." 
Hosea2:5 Sã n ka rẽ, mam na n yees-a lame n bas-a a zaala, wa a ma sẽn dog-a to-to wã. Mam na n kɩtame t'a lebg wa we-raoogo, la wa tẽng sẽn kʋɩ, la ko-yũud n na n kʋ-a." 
Hosea2:6 Mam ka na n zoe a kambã nimbãaneg ye, bala, bãmb yaa yoodem kamba." 
Hosea2:7 N-yẽe, bãmb ma wã maana yoobo. Sẽn dog-a bãmbã ninga a meng yãnde. Bala, yẽnda yeelame: «M na n pʋga m dolsen-dãmbã, bãmb n kõt-m dɩɩb ne koom, la b kõt-m fut sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdo, la lẽ gĩsi, ne kaam la bõn-yũudla!»" 
Hosea2:8 Ade, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n gɩdga f sorã ne gõose. Mam na n mee lalg n zẽk t'a ra leb n tõog n yãnd a sorã ye." 
Hosea2:9 Yẽnda na n pʋga a rolsen-dãmbã, la a kõn tõog n paam-b ye. A na n bao-b lame, la a kõn yãnd-b ye. Dẽ, a na n yeelame: «Mam na n lebg n leba m sɩd-kʋdgẽ wã, tɩ beenẽ wã n são moasã wã.»" 
Hosea2:10 Yẽnda ka mi tɩ yaa maam n dag n kõt-a koodã ne reezẽ rãamã, la kaamã, ne wanzuri wã, la sãnemã b sẽn dag n tar n waoogd wẽn-naandg a Baallã ye!" 
Hosea2:11 Woto yĩngã, mam na n lebs n deega m koodã ne m reezẽ rãamã b wakate. La m lebs n deeg m futã sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdã, la ne lamd gĩs-bãaneg fuugã sẽn dag n lut a yãndã." 
Hosea2:12 La moasã, mam na n yeesa a futã n ning-a yãnd a roelsen-dãmbã nifẽ, la ned kõn tõog n fãag-a mam nugẽ ye."
