Hosea2:13 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yẽnda kɩdengã ne a tigã la a ki-paalã ne a vʋʋsg rayã la a tig a taabã fãa sɛ. 
Hosea2:14 Mam na n sãama a reezẽ tɩɩsã ne a kankamsã. Yẽnda rag n gomda b yell n yetẽ: «Woto fãa yaa yaood mam dolsen-dãmbã sẽn yao maam!» La mam na n kɩtame, t'a lebg kãgr tɩ we-rũmsã wãb-a." 
Hosea2:15 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n sɩbg-a lame, ray nins yẽnda sẽn yõog wisd n kõ a Baallã yĩnga. Yẽnda rag n ningda tʋblond ne muizãan n kẽnd a roelsen-dãmbã nengẽ, la maam, yẽnda yaool n yĩm mam yelle.»" 
Hosea2:16 Woto yĩnga, mam na n belg-a lame n tɛ-a n kẽng we-raoogẽ wã, la m na n belm-a lame." 
Hosea2:17 La beenẽ, mam na n lebs-a-la a reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, la m kɩt tɩ Akoor longã lebg tẽeb sɩngre. Beenẽ, yẽnda na n saka wa a pʋg-sademdẽ wã, la wa wakat ning a sẽn dag n yi Ezɩptã." 
Hosea2:18 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Badaare, fo na n boola maam: «M sɩda,» f kõn leb n bool maam tɩ: «M Baalle, m soaal» ye." 
Hosea2:19 Mam na n kɩtame t'a Baall-dãmbã yʋyã ra leb n yi fo noorẽ ye. B kõn leb n pʋd b yʋyã meng ye. 
Hosea2:20 Badaare, mam na n maana kaool bãmb yĩng ne we-rũmsã, la yĩngr liuuli wã, la tẽngã bõn-vuudsã. Mam na n kaoo tãbd ne zabr sʋʋse, n kɩt tɩ zabr sɛ tẽngã pʋgẽ, la bãmb na n zĩnda ne bãane." 
Hosea2:21 Mam na n yɩɩ fo sɩd wakat sẽn ka sɛta, la fo na n yɩɩ mam paga, tɩrlem, maan-sɩda, nonglem, la nimbãan-zoeer pʋga." 
Hosea2:22 Fo na n yɩɩ mam pag maan-sɩd pʋga, la fo na n bãnga maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Hosea2:23 Badaare, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leokame. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ saagã ni, la saagã na n ni n kõo tẽngã koom," 
Hosea2:24 Tẽngã na n kõo koodo, la divẽ ne kaam. La Zizreyɛll ka na n kong bũmb ye." 
Hosea2:25 Mam na n bʋda mam mengã yĩng tẽngã pʋgẽ, m na n zoe a Lo-Ruhama nimbãanega. Mam na n boola a Lo-Ami tɩ: ‹mam nebã!› La yẽnda na n boola maam tɩ: ‹Mam Wẽnnaam!›" 
Hosea3:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: Leb n kẽng n tɩ nong pag ning sẽn dag n bas-a foom n tɩ rɩk rao a to n maan yoobã, wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn nong Israyɛll nebã, baa ne b sẽn wẽnemd n bas bãmb n tũud buud a taab wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la b nong wẽn-naandsã." 
Hosea3:2 Dẽ, mam yaoo wanzuri wakɩ-koeems piig la a nu, ne Oorz peoog la pʋɩ-sʋka, n peeg m pagã." 
Hosea3:3 La mam yeela yẽnda yaa: «Pa ne maam n kaoose, n da leb n maan yoob ye. Ra tɩ zĩnd ne rao a to, la mam me na n maana a woto ne foom.»" 
Hosea3:4 Bala, Israyɛll nebã na n kaoosame n ka paam dĩma, wall naaba, wall maoongo, wall kug-vigindga, wall maan-kʋʋr fuugu, wall bõn-naandg ye." 
Hosea3:5 Dẽ poore, Israyɛll nebã na n lebg n waame. Bãmb na n baoo Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã, la a Davɩɩd sẽn yaa bãmb dĩmã. Wakat n wate, tɩ bãmb na wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ ne rabeem, n bao bãmba, la b bao b sõmblmã." 
Hosea4:1 Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛga! Sẽn-Ka-Saab tara yell ne tẽngã nebã, bala, sɩd ne maan-neere, la Wẽnnaam bãngr ka be tẽngã pʋgẽ ye." 
Hosea4:2 Tẽngã pida ne kãab taab wẽnga, la zãmbo, ne nin-kʋʋre, la wagdem, ne yoobo, la maan taab pãnga. Wakat fãa yaa zɩɩm daagr woo zɩɩm daagre." 
Hosea4:3 Woto n kɩte, tɩ sũ-sãang na n kẽ tẽngã. Tẽngã nebã ne we-rũmsã, la yĩngr liuuli wã, hal baa ne zĩmã sẽn be ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ wã na n sãamame." 
Hosea4:4 La bɩ ned ba a yembr da bao n bʋ ne a to ye. Bɩ ned da ning a to taal ye. Maan-kʋʋda, yaa ne foom la mam tar yelle!" 
Hosea4:5 Fo na n laka wĩndga, la no-rɛɛsã sẽn be ne foomã na n laka yʋngo, la mam na n sãama f ma wã." 
Hosea4:6 Mam nebã sãamdame, bãngr kaalem yĩnga. Fo sẽn zãgs bãngrã yĩnga, mam me na n zãgsa foom, tɩ f ka leb n yɩ maan-kʋʋd yɛs ye. Fo sẽn yĩm f Wẽnnaamã tõogã yĩnga, mam me na n yĩma f kambã yelle." 
Hosea4:7 Maan-kʋʋdbã sõor paasdame, la b kongrã me paasdame, la mam na n teka b waoogrã tɩ lebg paoogre." 
Hosea4:8 Bãmb tũnugda mam nebã yel-wẽnã n paamd n dɩtẽ, bãmb pirsd-b lame tɩ b maand kongr nins bãmb mensã sẽn maandã." 
Hosea4:9 Yell ning sẽn na n paam nebã, n na n paam maan-kʋʋdã me. Mam na n sɩbga yẽnda a manesem-wẽnsã yĩnga, la m na n lebsa yẽnda wa sẽn zems a tʋʋmã." 
Hosea4:10 Bãmb na n dɩɩme, la b kõn tɩg ye, Bãmb na n yoome, la b kõn fɩɩg ye, bala, bãmb basa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Hosea4:11 Yoobo, la reezẽ rãam, ne reezẽ rã-paalg menesda ned yam." 
Hosea4:12 Mam nebã sokda raad b sẽn peese. Bãmb dasaarã n gomd ne-ba. Yoobã sɩɩg kẽes-b-la moogo, n kɩt tɩ b zãag ne b Wẽnnaamã." 
Hosea4:13 Bãmb maanda maand tãmsã zutu, bãmb yõogda wisd kunkubã zutu, la sɛn tɩɩse, ne pepliye tɩɩse, la terebẽnt tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem wʋsg tẽngre. Woto yĩngã, yãmb kom-pugli na n yoome, la yãmb bi-pagbã na n yɩɩ yoaadba." 
Hosea4:14 La m ka na n sɩbg y kom-pugli wã, wall y bi-pagbã b yoobã yĩng ye. Bala, yãmb mensã kẽeda ne pʋg-yoaadba, n naagd pʋʋsg zĩisẽ pʋg-yoaadbã n maand maando. Yãmb yaa neb sẽn ka tar yam, la y na n sãamame!" 
Hosea4:15 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb basa maam wa pag sẽn bas a sɩd n kẽng yoobo. La bɩ Zʋʋda nebã ra maan wa yãmba, n kong bʋʋm ye. Da kẽng-y Gilgall ye, ra kẽng-y Bet-Avɛn ye, la ra wẽen-y ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn vɩ wã yʋʋr ye!" 
Hosea4:16 Israyɛll nebã yaa tõatb wa nag-sadga, la moasã Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wãbnega bãmb wa pe-bil sẽn be zĩ-yalengẽ n wãbdẽ." 
Hosea4:17 Efrayiim nebã tũuda wẽn-naandse. Bas-y-ba! 
Hosea4:18 Bãmb ka yãt n yũ n sɛ, la b leb n lʋɩ yoobã pʋgẽ ye. Bãmb nanambsã nonga paoogre." 
Hosea4:19 Sebg n na n dɩk bãmba, la yãnd na n yõk-b-la b maandã yĩnga." 
Hosea5:1 Maan-kʋʋdba, kelg-y-yã! Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y neere! Na-yir dãmba, yok-y y tʋb n kelge! Yãmb la bʋ-kaoodã sẽn gomd ne wã, bala, yãmb yɩɩ wa kũusr Mitspa, la wa tãoog b sẽn bẽd Taboor tãngã zugu." 
Hosea5:2 Kɩɩsdbã yel-wẽnã looga nugu, la maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sɩbga b fãa." 
Hosea5:3 Mam mii Efrayiim buudã, la Israyɛll ka tar bũmb sẽn solg ne maam ye. Efrayiim nebã, yãmb yoome, la Israyɛll nebã rẽgma b mense." 
Hosea5:4 A Israyɛll nebã manesem kɩtame, tɩ b ka tõe n lebg n wa b Wẽnnaamã nengẽ ye, bala yoobã sɩɩg kẽ-b lame, b sẽn ka mi Wẽnnaamã yĩnga." 
Hosea5:5 Israyɛll nebã wuk-m-mengã kaooda b bʋʋdo. Israyɛll ne Efrayiim nebã kongr na n yɩɩ kug-lakdg b yĩnga, la Zʋʋda buudã me na n naag n lakame." 
Hosea5:6 Bãmb na n kẽnga Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ ne b rũm-bɛd la b rũm-bãoonego, n tɩ bao bãmba, la b kõn tol n yãnd-b ye, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab zãaga b meng ne bãmba." 
Hosea5:7 Bãmb zãmba Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bala, b roga tãmpĩ-bi, la moasã ki-paalgã na n dɩɩ bãmb ne b paoongã." 
Hosea5:8 Peeb-y baorg Gɩbeya, la y peeb baorg Rama! Kaas-y zabr kaasg Bɛt-Avɛn! Benzame nebã, gũus-y y poorẽ!" 
Hosea5:9 Sɩbgrã daare, Efrayiim na n sãamame. Mam yeta Israyɛll nebã bũmb sẽn ka na n vaal ye." 
Hosea5:10 Zʋʋda nanambsã yaa wa neb sẽn sersd zĩis todse, la mam sũurã na n puuga ne bãmb wa ko-zoetem." 
Hosea5:11 B namsda Efrayiim nebã, n mongd-b bʋʋm, bala, bãmb pʋgda sebgo." 
Hosea5:12 La mam na n yɩɩ wa mogd Efrayiim nebã yĩnga, la wa solenkẽeg Zʋʋda buudã yĩnga." 
Hosea5:13 Efrayiim nebã yãnda b bãagã, la Zʋʋda nebã yãnda b nod-kɛgengã. Efrayiim nebã kẽnga Asiiri, n tɩ tʋm neb Yarɛɛb rĩmã nengẽ, la rĩm-kãng ka na n tõog n maag y bãagã, wall a tɩp y nodrã ye." 
Hosea5:14 Bala, mam yaa wa gɩgemd Efrayiim nebã yĩnga, la wa gɩgem-poll Zʋʋda buudã yĩnga. Mam na n tɛɛ bãmb n gʋs la m looge, Mam na n yõka bãmb n tall n loog tɩ ned ka tõe n fãag bãmb ye." 
Hosea5:15 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n loogame, la m na n lebg n wa m zĩigẽ wã, hal tɩ b sak n deeg tɩ b kongame, n bao maam. Bãmb yel-pakrã pʋga, b na n baoo maam ne b sũyã fãa." 
Hosea6:1 Dẽ, yãmb na n yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d lebg n leb Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ! Bala, bãmb n zendem tõndo, la bãmb n na n maag-do. Bãmb n pogl-do, la bãmb n na n tɩp d noadã." 
Hosea6:2 Rasem a yiib sã n paase, bãmb na n vʋʋg-d lame, la rasem a tãabẽ daarã, bãmb na n zẽk-d lame tɩ d zĩnd ne bãmba." 
Hosea6:3 Bɩ d bao ne d sũyã tɩ bãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab fãa, bala, bãmb na n waa wa zĩ-yẽegre, la b waoongã ka na n vaal ye. Bãmb na n waa wa saaga, B na n waa wa sigr saag sẽn bʋkd tẽn-gãongã.»" 
Hosea6:4 Efrayiim nebã, mam na n maana yãmb bõe? Zʋʋda nebã, bõe la mam na n maan yãmba? Yãmb nonglmã wẽnda wa yibeoog sawaodgo, la wa yibeoog pĩnd meenem sẽn mesgd to-to wã." 
Hosea6:5 Rẽ n kɩt tɩ m tũnugd no-rɛɛsdbã n zabd ne-yã, la m kʋʋd-y ne m noorã goamã. Mam bʋ-kaoorã na n tãoosa wa vẽenem." 
Hosea6:6 Ka maoong n noogd mam sũur ye, yaa maan-neere. La ned sẽn mi Wẽnnaam nooma maam n yɩɩd maand sẽn yõogd bugum." 
Hosea6:7 Yãmb kɩɩsa kaoolã wa Ãdem tẽngã. Yaa beenẽ la yãmb zãmb maam. 
Hosea6:8 Galaad yaa nin-wẽns tẽnga. Bãmb sẽn pɩʋʋgẽ fãa, b raagda zɩɩm." 
Hosea6:9 Maan-kʋʋdbã yaa wa fãadb sẽn sor n gũud neda. Bãmb bee Sɩkɛm sorã zug n kʋʋd nebã. Yõwã yaa yel-beed meng-menga! 
Hosea6:10 Israyɛll tẽngã pʋga, mam yãnda yel-beedo! Yaa be la Efrayiim nebã maan yoobo, la be la Israyɛll nebã rẽgem b mense." 
Hosea6:11 La yãmb Zʋʋda nebã, mam segenda tigsg daar yãmb yĩnga, wakat ning mam sẽn na n lebs n maneg m nebã yellã." 
Hosea7:1 Wakat ning mam sẽn wat n dat n maag Israyɛll nebã, la Efrayiim nebã kongrã ne Samaari nebã tʋʋm-wẽnsã pukda. Bala, bãmb yaa zirẽ-be-nebã. Wagda kaooda rot n kẽedẽ, tɩ fãadb pid yɩnga." 
Hosea7:2 Bãmb ka tol n tagsd tɩ mam ket n tẽra tʋʋm-wẽns nins fãa b sẽn maandã ye. Moasã, bãmb tʋʋmã gũbg-b lame n be mam taoore." 
Hosea7:3 Bãmb maanda tʋʋm-wẽns n noogd rĩmã sũuri, la b belgd nanambsã ne b zĩrẽ wã." 
Hosea7:4 Bãmb fãa yaa yoaadba. Bãmb wẽnda wa wʋng bur-wẽed sẽn wɩnge, t'a sã n nag zomã n sɛ, a basdame n ka leb n tusd bugmã, hal tɩ zom-nagdgã wuki." 
Hosea7:5 Tõnd dĩmã tigr daare, nanambsã yũu divẽ tɩ b nens yilme, la rĩmã rɩka a meng n kõ nin-yaalse." 
Hosea7:6 Bãmb sũyã pida ne zãmbo, wa wʋng sẽn pid ne bugum. Yʋngã tõre, a maagdame, la yibeoogo, a widgdame n yãnge." 
Hosea7:7 Bãmb fãa wɩnga wa wʋnga. Bãmb kʋʋda b nanambsã, bãmb dĩm-dãmbã fãa lʋɩtame, la bãmb ned ba a yembr ka boond maam ye." 
Hosea7:8 Efrayiim nebã naaga bu-zẽmsã. Efrayiim lebga wa bur-maas sẽn ka lebge. 
Hosea7:9 Sãambã sɛta b pãnga tɩ b ka miẽ ye. Kʋʋlem yõk-b lame tɩ b ka miẽ ye. 
Hosea7:10 Israyɛll nebã tɩtaamã kaooda b bʋʋdo, bãmb ka wa lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa b Wẽnnaamã nengẽ ye. La ne rẽ fãa, bãmb ka baood Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye." 
Hosea7:11 Efrayiim nebã lebga wa manwall sẽn ka yam ye. Bãmb kota Ezɩpt nebã tɩ b wa sõng-ba Bãmb kẽnga Asiiri. 
Hosea7:12 La bãmb sẽn dabd Asiiri wã wakate, mam tẽega m gãmbre n kɩt tɩ b lʋɩ be wa yĩngr liuuli. Mam sɩbg-b-la wa sẽn zems m sẽn dag n keoog-b b nebã sʋkã." 
Hosea7:13 Efrayiim nebã na n paama toogo! Bala, bãmb zoe n zãaga ne maam! Mam yaool n da rat n fãag-b lame! Bãmb yaga maam zĩrẽ." 
Hosea7:14 Bãmb ka kelemd n boond maam ne sɩd ye. Bãmb bee b gãagẽ n wiisdẽ Bãmb wãada b mense, n tẽed tɩ b na n paama bõn-koaadl ne divẽ, la b zãagda b mens ne maam." 
Hosea7:15 Mam zãmsa bãmba la m kõ-b pãnga, la bãmb segend n dat n maana maam wẽnga." 
Hosea7:16 Bãmb ka leb n baood mam zĩig ye. Bãmb yaa wa tãp sẽn golme. Bãmb nanambsã na n paa tãpẽ, b tɩtaam-goamã yĩnga, la b na n yaala bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Hosea8:1 Rɩk f baorg n peebe. Sɩlg n laand Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã zugu, bala bãmb kɩɩsa mam kaoolã la b kɩɩsa mam tõogã." 
Hosea8:2 Bãmb na n kelem n boola maam n yeele: Wẽnnaam! Tõnd Israyɛll nebã mii yãmba! 
Hosea8:3 Israyɛll nebã zãgsa neer maanego, la bɛ na n diga bãmba." 
Hosea8:4 B yãka rĩm-dãmb ne nanambse, n ka sok maam ye. Bãmb dɩkda b wanzuri wã ne b sãnemã, n maan wẽn-naandse, la bõn-kãng n na n kẽes-b moogo." 
Hosea8:5 Samaari nebã, mam kisa yãmb sãnem nag-bilã. Mam sũur puuga ne yãmba. Dabʋr la y na n yɩ neb sẽn ka tar yelle?" 
Hosea8:6 Yãmb sãnem nag-bilã yita Israyɛlle. Ka Wẽnnaam n naan-a ye, yaa tʋʋm-mit n dõog-a. Woto yĩnga, b na n wãa Samaari nag-bilã." 
Hosea8:7 Bãmb bʋda sebgo, la b na n tigsa saag sebgo. Bãmb ka na n paam kaaf ye, La sẽn na n yi-bã kõn wom biis ye. B sã n wom me, sãamb n na n dɩ-ba." 
Hosea8:8 B rɩta Israyɛll nebã! Moasã bãmb bee buudã sʋka, wa laok sẽn ka leb n tar yõod ye." 
Hosea8:9 Bala, bãmb kẽnga Asiiri. We-bõangã yɛsa yɩɩga. Toog paama Efrayiim nebã, bãmb sõm-baoorã yĩnga." 
Hosea8:10 Baa ne toogã sẽn paam bãmb buudã sʋkã, mam na n tigma bãmba, n kɩt tɩ nanambsã rĩm nams-ba." 
Hosea8:11 A Efrayiim maana tẽn-kug ka tɛka, n na n yiis b yel-wẽnã, la tẽn-kugã yĩng kɩtame tɩ b maan yel-wẽnã." 
Hosea8:12 Baa mam sã n gʋls m tõogã yɛl fãa n kõ-ba, b na n geelg-b-la wa bõn-sãamse." 
Hosea8:13 Bãmb kʋʋda rũms n maand maand mam yĩnga, n wẽneg n wãbd rũmsã nemdo, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka reegd-b ye. Moasã, bãmb ka yĩmd b beegrã ye. Bãmb sɩbgda bãmb b yel-wẽnã yĩnga, la b na n lebg n leba Ezɩpte." 
Hosea8:14 A Israyɛll nebã yĩma b naandã n me ro-bɛda. Zʋʋda nebã mee tẽn-bɛd wʋsg sẽn gũbg ne lalse. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum dɩ pãng zĩisã. 
Hosea9:1 Israyɛll nebã, da maan-y sũ-noog ye, ra kɩdm-y wa buud a taabã ye. Bala, yãmb basa y Wẽnnaamã n maan yoobo, la y reega yaood sẽn ka zems zeesã fãa zĩisẽ." 
Hosea9:2 Zeesã ne divẽ wẽkr zĩisã ka na n kõn yãmb sũ-noog ye. 
Hosea9:3 Efrayiim nebã ka na n pa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽngẽ wã ye, bãmb na n leba Ezɩpte, la Asiiri me, bãmb na n dɩɩ rɩɩb sẽn ka yɩlemde." 
Hosea9:4 Bãmb ka na n leb n wa ne bõn-yũudl kũuni, n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. Bãmb maandã ka na n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-noog ye. A na n yɩɩ wa sũ-sãang rɩɩbo, la neb nins fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a wã na n dẽgma b mense. Bãmb dɩɩbã na n pa b pʋsẽ bala, a ka na n kẽ Wẽnnaam doogẽ wã ye." 
Hosea9:5 Yãmb na n maana bõe daar ning sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigrã daare? 
Hosea9:6 Bala, sãoongã yĩnga, bãmb zoetame, la Ezɩpt tẽngã na n deega bãmba, la b na n muma bãmb Memfis tẽnga. Mood na n dɩɩ bãmb paoongã, la gõos na n yii bãmb sik zĩisẽ wã." 
Hosea9:7 Daar ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n sɩbg bãmbã watame. Toogã daar watame. Israyɛll nebã na n paama toogo! No-rɛɛsã na n lebga yalma, la neb nins sẽn tar Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã na n zʋbsame, yãmb beegrã sẽn yaa wʋsgã, la y sẽn yaa zab-zabdbã yĩnga." 
Hosea9:8 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsã sẽn gũud Efrayiim nebã bee ne mam Wẽnnaamã. Bẽds bee bãmb soayã fãa zutu. Zabr bee bãmb Wẽnnaamã roogẽ. 
Hosea9:9 Bãmb pida ne wẽnga, wa Gibeya nebã wakatẽ. Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka yĩm bãmb kongrã ye, la b na n sɩbga bãmb b yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Hosea9:10 Mam yẽnda Israyɛll nebã, wa reezẽ biis sẽn be we-raoog pʋgẽ. Mam yãnda b ba-rãmbã wa kankam-kãse, la wa kankang bi-rẽemse. La bãmb kẽng n tɩ waooga Baall-Pewoore, n tɩ maan yãn-tʋʋmã, la b lebga yel-beed wa b sẽn nong-a soabã." 
Hosea9:11 Sã n yaa ne Efrayiim, a ziirã na n yɩk n looga wa liuula, rogem kõn leb n doge, pag kõn leb n zã pʋga, pag kõn leb n kẽ pʋga." 
Hosea9:12 Bãmb sã n gʋʋnd b kambã, mam na n kʋ-b lame tɩ b na n ka lebg raop ye. Mam sã n wa zãag n bas-ba, b na n paama toogo." 
Hosea9:13 Mam sẽn get a Efrayiima, a yaa wa koms tɩɩs b sẽn sel ko-bundum noore, la Efrayiim na n yiisa a kambã n kɩs b kʋʋd-ba." 
Hosea9:14 Zu-soaba, kõ-y sɩbgre! Sɩbg bʋg la yãmb na n sɩbg-ba? Kɩt-y tɩ b pagba pʋs yita! Tɩ b ra leb n tõog n yẽsem kamb ye." 
Hosea9:15 Bãmb wẽngã fãa pʋka Gilgalle! Yaa beenẽ la mam kisg bãmba. Bãmb yel-manesem wẽngã yĩnga, mam na n diga bãmb n yiis m doogã pʋga. Mam ka na n kell n nong bãmb ye. Bãmb nanamsã yaa kɩɩsdba." 
Hosea9:16 B luba Efrayiim, a yẽgã kʋɩɩme, a kõn leb n wom biis ye. La baa bãmb sã n dog kamba, mam na n kɩtame tɩ kamb nins bãmb sẽn nongã ki." 
Hosea9:17 Mam Wẽnnaamã na n basa Efrayiim dãmbã. Bala, b pa kelg bãmb ye. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ b na n lebg yɛɛbdba bu-zẽmsã sʋka." 
Hosea10:1 Israyɛll dag n yaa reezẽ tɩɩg sẽn be zĩ-sõngẽ, n womd biisi. La a biisã sõor sẽn dag n lebgd wʋsgã, a paasda a tẽn-kugã me sõore. A paoongã sẽn dag n paasdã, a manega a kug-vigindsã tɩ b lebg neeba." 
Hosea10:2 Bãmb yaa yam a yiib rãmba. Moasã, bãmb kongrã na n luɩ b zugu. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wãa bãmb tẽn-kugã." 
Hosea10:3 La moasã, bãmb yetame: Tõnd ka tar dĩm ye. Bala, tõnd ka zoe Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem ye. La rĩmã, bõe la a na n maan tõnd yĩnga?" 
Hosea10:4 Bãmb wẽeda nokoɛɛma, n wẽend zĩrẽ-be-wẽenego, la b maand kaoola. Sɩbgrã na n yii wa tɩɩg sẽn tar zẽnem sẽn yit pʋt vũgsẽ." 
Hosea10:5 Samaari nebã na n zoee rabeem Bet-Avɛn nag-sadsã poorẽ. Nebã na n yãb n kaasa a yĩnga. La maan-kʋʋdb nins sẽn waoogd-a wã na n diga ne rabeem a yĩnga, la a ziirã sẽn na n yi n bas-a wã yĩnga." 
Hosea10:6 B na n dɩk-a lame n kõ Asiiri, t'a yɩ yaood rĩm-kãsengã yĩnga. Yãnd na n yõka Efrayiim buudã, Israyɛll saag-wẽnsã yãnd na n yõk-a lame." 
Hosea10:7 Samaari wãame, la a rĩmã yaa wa tɩɩg will sẽn daeed koom zugu." 
Hosea10:8 B na n sãama maoong kʋʋb zĩis nins Israyɛll sẽn dag n maand yel-wẽn-kãsemsã b zutã. Gõos ne tuud na n yii b tẽn-kugã zutu. Bãmb na n yeela tãmsã tɩ b bus-ba, la b yeel kunkubã tɩ b lʋɩ n yẽeg-ba." 
Hosea10:9 Hal sẽn sɩng Gɩbeya, foom a Israyɛll maana yel-wẽna. Bãmb paa yel-wẽn-kãens pʋga, la zabrã na n paama nin-wẽnsã Gɩbeya." 
Hosea10:10 Mam na n sɩbg-b-la wa m sẽn date. B beegr a yiibã yĩnga, buud toay-toay na n tigma taaba n zab ne bãmba." 
Hosea10:11 A Efrayiim dag n yaa nag-sad-wubdg sẽn nong n tabd koodo. La maam n balg a yublã sẽn yaa neerã. Mam soga Efrayiim buudã ne wãka, Zʋʋda na n koome. La Zakoob buudã na n taka wãkã." 
Hosea10:12 Israyɛll nebã, maan-y sẽn yaa tɩrga, la y maan sẽn zems sɩda. Tuk-y pʋ-paalle! Wakat taame tɩ y tog n bao Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, hal tɩ b wa kɩt tɩ tɩrlem zĩnd yãmb sʋka." 
Hosea10:13 Yãmb bʋda wẽnga, n tigs zãmbo, Yãmb dɩɩ zĩrẽ yagb rɩɩbo. Israyɛlle, fo sẽn teeg f meng pãngã, la f teeg f gãndaadã sõorã yĩnga," 
Hosea10:14 bʋr-kãseng na n yii fo nebã sʋka, la fo tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã na n sãama wa a Salman sẽn zab ne Bɛt-Arbɛlle, n sãam-a wa b sẽn kʋ ma n naag a kambã." 
Hosea10:15 Yaa woto n na n paam Betɛlle, wẽng ning yãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga. Zĩigã sã n yẽege, Israyɛll dĩmã na n sãamame." 
Hosea11:1 Israyɛll sẽn dag n yaa bi-bɩɩgã wakate, Mam dag n nong-a lame. Mam zĩnda Ezɩpt n bool m biigã." 
Hosea11:2 La b zãaga b mens ne sẽn boond-b bãmbã. Bãmb maana maand a Baall yĩnga. La b yõog wisd bõn-naandsã yĩnga. 
Hosea11:3 Mam meng n gãd Efrayiim nebã nusi n zãms-b kẽna, la b rag n ka mi tɩ maam n tɩp-b ye." 
Hosea11:4 Mam tɛɛ bãmb ne ninsaalb loeese, la mam loee bãmb ne nonglem loeese. Mam yaa soab ning sẽn sikd bãmb zɩɩbã, la mam dag n kõt-b-la rɩɩbo." 
Hosea11:5 Bãmb ka na n lebg n leb Ezɩpt ye. Bãmb sẽn zãgs tɩ b ka na n lebg n wa mam nengẽ wã yĩnga, Asiiri nedã n na n yɩ bãmb dĩma." 
Hosea11:6 Zab na sãama bãmb tẽmsã, la b na n menesa b kʋɩlemsã. Zabrã na n sãam-b lame, bãmb sẽn maan b mens raabã yĩnga." 
Hosea11:7 Mam nebã ka rat n bas b kɩɩsgã ye. B boonda bãmb tɩ b naag taab n yiki, La bãmb ka yik ye." 
Hosea11:8 Efrayiim nebã, mam na n basa yãmb wãn-wãna? Israyɛll nebã, mam na n fãaga yãmb wãn-wãna? Mam na n maana yãmba. Mam sẽn maan Adma tẽngã nebã bɩ? Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yɩ wa Seboyim nebã bɩ? Mam yam leebdame. Mam nimbãan-zoeerã paasame." 
Hosea11:9 Mam ka na n maan wa sẽn zems m sũ-puugrã ye, mam ka na n lebg n wa n sãam Efrayiim nebã ye, bala, mam ka ninsaal ye, mam yaa Wẽnnaam. Mam yaa pʋ-peelem soab n be yãmb sʋka, Mam ka na n lebg n wa tẽngã pʋg ne sũ-puugr ye." 
Hosea11:10 Bãmb na n tũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kelma wa gɩgemde, La b kambã na n yii yaang n wa ne rabeem." 
Hosea11:11 Bãmb na n yɩga Ezɩpt wa liuuli, n wa ne rabeem, Bãmb na n yii Asiiri n wa wa manwalle. La m na n kɩtame tɩ b zĩnd b tẽngẽ wã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeta." 
Hosea12:1 Efrayiim nebã gũbga maam ne zĩrẽ, la Israyɛll nebã gũbga maam ne zãmbo. Zʋʋda nebã yam ket n yuusda Wẽnnaam taoore, la b sakda pʋ-peelem soabã." 
Hosea12:2 Efrayiim nebã kɩɩmda sebgo, la b rigd yaang sogbo. Daar fãa, bãmb zãmbã ne b wẽngã paasdame. Bãmb maanda kaool ne Asiiri, la b maand kaam n talld n kẽngd Ezɩpte." 
Hosea12:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab bʋʋda ne Zʋʋda nebã. La b na n kaoo a Zakoob bʋʋdo, n maan-a wa sẽn zems a yel-manesmã ne a tʋʋmã." 
Hosea12:4 A Zakoob sẽn dag n nan ket n be a ma pʋgẽ, yẽnda soga a kẽem nao-kãsenkãare, la yẽnda sẽn wa n lebg raoa, a maoo ne Wẽnnaam." 
Hosea12:5 Yẽ maoo ne malɛk n tõoge. Yẽnda yãbame n kos-a sõngre. Yẽnda yãnda Wẽnnaam Betɛlle. La yaa beenẽ la bãmb gom ne tõndo. 
Hosea12:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba. La b miime tɩ bãmb yʋʋr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. 
Hosea12:7 La foom, fo na n lebg n wa f Wẽnnaamã nengẽ. Kell n pa f sɩdã pʋga, la f maan sẽn yaa tɩrga. Teeg f Wẽnnaamã wakat fãa!" 
Hosea12:8 Kana nebã zãada zãmb makds b nusẽ. Bãmb nong n belgda nebã. 
Hosea12:9 Efrayiim nebã yetame: Sɩda, tõnd lebga arzegs rãmba. Tõnd paama arzegse, la yaa ne tõnd nus tʋʋmã. B kõn yã kongr tõnd zug sẽn yaa yel-wẽnd ye." 
Hosea12:10 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, Hal Ezɩpt tẽnga. Mam na n leb n kɩtame tɩ yãmb zĩnd fu-rotẽ, wa ray nins yãmb sẽn maand y tigã wakate." 
Hosea12:11 Mam goma ne no-rɛɛsdbã. Mam kɩtame tɩ bõn-makdsã lebg wʋsgo, la m tũnug no-rɛɛsdbã n wẽ yel-bũna." 
Hosea12:12 Galaad nebã maana wẽnga, la bãmb ka zem baa fɩ ye. Bãmb maanda lols maand Gilgalle. La bãmb tẽn-kugã na n yɩɩ wa kug rʋy sẽn be pʋt vũgsẽ," 
Hosea12:13 A Zakoob zoe n kẽnga Siiri, La a Israyɛll tʋm n kõo ned n paam paga. Yẽnda kɩɩma rũms tɩ b kõ-a paga." 
Hosea12:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ no-rɛɛs yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpte, La b kɩt tɩ no-rɛɛs gũ Israyɛll nebã." 
Hosea12:15 Efrayiim nebã maan n waa ne sũ-yikr la sũ-toogo. Bãmb Zu-soabã na n kɩtame tɩ b zɩɩmã Efrayiim nebã sẽn daagã zĩnd d mens zutu. La b kɩt tɩ b yellã zĩnd b mens zutu. 
Hosea13:1 Efrayiim nebã sã n dag n gome. Nebã rigda ne rabeem. Bãmb n dag n so Israyɛlle. La bãmb sẽn waoog Baall n beegã, B kiime" 
Hosea13:2 Moasã bãmb yel-wẽnã paasdame, Bãmb dõoga bõn-naandg ne b wanzuri wã, la b maan wẽn-naands b toore. Bõn-kãens fãa yaa tʋʋm-mitb nus tʋʋma. B yeta bãmb wɛɛngẽ yaa: Neb nins sẽn maand maoong ne ninsaalbã, b tõe n moka lolse!" 
Hosea13:3 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ b na n yɩ wa yibeoog wulgu, wa yibeoog meenem sẽn mesgdã, wa wudg sobg sẽn dɩkd zɛɛgẽ, la wa bug-zõos sẽn yit roog võorẽ." 
Hosea13:4 Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam. Hal sẽn sɩng Ezɩpte, Yãmb ka mi Wẽnnaam a to, sã n ka maam ye. La fãagd a to ka be sã n ka maam ye" 
Hosea13:5 Maam n bãng yãmb we-raoogã pʋga, tẽng sẽn yaa koɛɛng pʋgẽ." 
Hosea13:6 Bãmb paama yamd zĩig n wãb n tɩge. Bãmb sẽn bãng tɩ b wãb n tɩgame, b wuka b mens n yĩm mam yelle." 
Hosea13:7 Mam lebga wa gɩgemd bãmb yĩnga. Mam na n gũusa bãmb wa ãbg sẽn be sor zugu. 
Hosea13:8 Mam na n sega bãmba, wa b sẽn wʋk rũm-toaag kamb t'a zabdẽ. Mam na n pãrsa bãmb yãadã Mam na n wãba bãmb beenẽ wa gɩgem-yãanga, We-rũmsã na n beesa bãmba." 
Hosea13:9 Israyɛll nebã, woto na n yɩɩ yãmb sãoongo, Yãmb sõangd yaool n dag n yaa maam." 
Hosea13:10 Yãmb dĩmã bee yɛɛnẽ moasã? Bɩ a wa sõng yãmb tẽmsã fãa pʋse. Yãmb bʋ-kaoodbã bee yɛɛnẽ? Bʋ-kaoodb nins yãmb sẽn dag n gomd b wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ tɩ b kõ yãmb dĩm ne nanambsã. 
Hosea13:11 Mam kõo yãmb dĩm m sũ-yikrã wakate. La m deeg-a-la m sũ-puugrã wakate. 
Hosea13:12 B gʋlsa Efrayiim nebã kongrã ne b yel-wẽnã n bĩngi. 
Hosea13:13 Bãmb na n namsa wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem. La yaa biig sẽn ka yam, Yẽnda rogem taame, La a ka rat n yi a ma pʋgẽ ye." 
Hosea13:14 Mam na n fãaga bãmb kɩɩm-kulgu, La m na n fãag-b-la ne kũum. Kũum, fo toog bee yɛɛnẽ? Kɩɩm-kulgu, fo sãoong bee yɛɛnẽ? Mam ka leb n tar nimbãan-zoeer ye!" 
Hosea13:15 Baa bãmb sẽn womd biis b ba-biisã sʋkã, seobgã na n yii yaanga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sobg sẽn yit we-raoogã pʋga, n wa kʋɩɩs a koomã ne a bulsã. Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n wa fã laogã sẽn yaa te-sõama fãa." 
Hosea14:1 B na n ninga Samaari nebã taale, Bala, b kɩɩsa b Wẽnnaamã. La b na n paa tãpẽ. B na n f kʋʋ bãmb kom-bãoonegã, la b weed b pagb nins sẽn tʋtã pʋse." 
Hosea14:2 Israyɛll nebã, lebg-y n wa-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ. Bala, yãmb lakame n lʋɩ y kongrã pʋga." 
Hosea14:3 Segl-y goam n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, n yeel-y bãmb yaa: Kõ-y-d sugr d beegrã fãa yĩnga. La y reeg bõn-sõamyã nins tõnd sẽn kõt yãmbã. Tõnd na n kõo yãmb la d pẽg yãmba." 
Hosea14:4 Asiiri ka na n fãag tõnd ye. Tõnd ka na n zomb wiidi ye, Tõnd ka na n leb n bool d nus tʋʋmã tɩ d wẽnnaam-dãmb ye. Bala, yaa yãmb nengẽ la kɩɩbsã paamd nimbãan-zoeere." 
Hosea14:5 Mam na n yiisa bãmb ka-tẽebã, Mam na n nong-b-la ne yamleoogo. Bala, mam sũ-puugrã ne-b sɛɛme." 
Hosea14:6 Mam na yɩɩ wa meenem Israyɛll nebã yĩnga. Bãmb na n toba wa tɩ-puudu. La b na n kɩɩ yẽg wa Libã tɩɩse. 
Hosea14:7 A wilã na n tẽeme, la b na n yɩɩ neeb wa oliiv tɩɩse, tɩ b yũ-noogã yɩ wa Libã tɩɩsã yũ-noogo." 
Hosea14:8 Neb nins sẽn zĩ a maasmẽ wã na n lebg n waame. B na n kɩtame tɩ b wom biisi. La b na n toba wa reezẽ tɩɩse. B yʋʋrã na n yii wa Libã tɩɩsã. 
Hosea14:9 Efrayiim nebã, Bõe yõod la mam leb n tar ne wẽn-naandsã? Maam n na n leok yãmb kosgo, la m ges y yelle. Mam na n yɩɩ wa sɩprɛs tɩɩg sẽn tobd wakat fãa wã. Yaa mam nengẽ la yãmb biisã yita." 
Hosea14:10 Ãnda n tar yam, n tõe n wʋm bõn-kãensã võore. La a tõe n bãng-ba? Sẽn-Ka-Saab soayã yaa sõama. Nin-tɩrsã na n kẽna b zutu, la kɩɩsdã na n kẽn n lagsame." 
Joel1:1 Woto yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg b sẽn kõ a Petuwɛll biig a Zowɛlle. 
Joel1:2 Kãsem-dãmbã, kelg-y-yã! Tẽngã nebã fãa, yok-y y tʋb n kelge! Rẽ yĩnga, bũmb a woto zoe n zĩnda yãmb zamaanẽ, bɩ yaa y yaab-rãmbã zamaanẽ la a zĩnd yã?" 
Joel1:3 Rɩk-y-yã-a n togs y kambã, tɩ bãmb me wa rɩk-a n togs b kambã, tɩ b kambã me wa rɩk-a n togs zamaan ning sẽn watã!" 
Joel1:4 Bõn-koaadl nins zũnzũyã sẽn bas n ka rɩ wã, sʋ-kitrzĩgnis n dɩ-ba, sʋ-kitrzĩgnisã sẽn bas b rãmb n ka rɩ wã, nesneed n dɩ-ba, nesneedã sẽn bas bũmb ningã, kalwaar n dɩ-a." 
Joel1:5 Sẽn yũ-b rãam n tuumdẽ wã, nek-y-yã, yãb-y-yã! Yãmb a rã-yũudbã fãa, wiis-y-yã, yãmb sẽn ka na n leb n paam vĩy biis koom n yũ wã yĩnga!" 
Joel1:6 Bala, bu-zẽng n wa n yãmb m tẽngã. A tara pãnga, tɩ b ka tõe n sõd-a n sɛ ye. A tara yẽn wa gɩgemd yẽna, t'a yeerã keglem yaa wa gɩgem-yãang yeere." 
Joel1:7 A sãama mam reezẽ tɩɩsã, la a sãam m kankamsã zãnga. A fʋka reezẽ tɩɩsã pagd n bas-b pɛɛlg faddd..." 
Joel1:8 Yãb n wiis wa pʋg-paal sẽn sẽgen bot n yãbd a pʋg-sademdẽ sɩda! 
Joel1:9 Bõn-koaadl kũuni, ne bõn-yũudl kũun ka leb n wat Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã ye. Maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã bee sũ-sãang pʋga." 
Joel1:10 Pʋtã fãa sãamame, tẽn-gãongã bee sũ-sãang pʋga. Bala, b sãama koodã, reezẽ rãam ka leb n beẽ ye, kaam ka leb n beẽ ye." 
Joel1:11 Ka-koaadba, maan-y sũ-sãanga, sẽn send-b reezẽ tɩɩse, wiis-y-yã, bala, bɩle wã ne orzã sãamame, pʋtã bõn-koaadl sãama zãnga." 
Joel1:12 Reezẽ tɩɩsã kʋɩɩme, tɩ kankamsã wãke. Gernaad tɩɩsã, ne komsã la pom tɩɩsã, ne pʋtã pʋs tɩɩs fãa kʋɩɩme, ninsaalbã kɩdeng sɛɛme." 
Joel1:13 Maan-kʋʋdba, sẽgn-y bot n yãb n wiisi! Tẽn-kug zĩisẽ tʋmtʋmdba, kelm-y-yã! Yãmb dãmb sẽn tʋmd mam Wẽnnaamã yĩngã, wa-y-yã, yeelg-y bot yʋngã tõre! Bala, b ka leb n wat ne bõn-koaadl kũuni, ne bõn-yũudl kũun tõnd Wẽnnaamã roogẽ ye." 
Joel1:14 Yãk-y daar no-loeer yĩnga, moon-y tigin-kãseng daare, tigm-y kãsem-dãmbã, ne tẽngã nebã fãa, tigm-y-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã roogẽ, la y kelem n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saabo!" 
Joel1:15 Kayto, ad yaa toog daare! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã kolgdame. Daarã wata wa sãoong sẽn yit Pãng-Soab nengẽ." 
Joel1:16 Tõnd dɩɩbã sɛ d nifẽ, sũ-noogã ne kɩdengã sɛɛ tõnd Wẽnnaamã roog pʋgẽ!" 
Joel1:17 Bõn-buudã pa b bogdẽ n ka yi ye. Bao wã yaa vɩɩdo, tɩ koodã bĩngr zĩis sãam zãnga, bõn-koaadlã sẽn kʋɩ wã yĩnga." 
Joel1:18 Rũmsã yãbdame, tɩ niigã zoet n ka mi b sẽn kẽedẽ ye. Bala, b ka leb n tar yamd ye. Baa rũm-bãoonegã namsdame." 
Joel1:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa yãmb la m boonda! Bala, bugmã rɩɩ we-raoogã yamd zãnga, tɩ bug-witmã rɩ pʋtã pʋsẽ tɩɩsã fãa." 
Joel1:20 Hal baa weoogã rũms sesd n baooda yãmba, bala, kʋɩlsã koom kʋɩɩme, la bugmã rɩɩ we-raoogã yamd zãnga." 
Joel2:1 Peeb-y baorg Sɩyõ! Kelm-y mam tãn-sõngã zugu. Bɩ tẽngã nebã fãa rig ne rabeem! Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã watame, la a taame n sɛ." 
Joel2:2 Yaa lik ne lik bida daare, na n yɩɩ sawat sẽn yaa lik tuu daare, ra-kãng wata wa zĩ-yẽegr sẽn pukd tãmsã zutu. Yaa buud sẽn yaa wʋsgo, n tar pãnga, Bu-kãng buud zɩ n zĩndi, la a buud kõn tol n leb n zĩndi, hal baa zamaan ning sẽn watã pʋgẽ ye." 
Joel2:3 Bu-kãng na n waa wa bugum sẽn dɩta, a taoor yaa bug-witim n dɩtẽ, t'a poorẽ yaa bugum n dɩtẽ. Sẽn deng a waoongã, tẽngã rag n yaa wa Edɛn zẽedã zĩiga, la a loogrã poore, tẽngã sãama zãnga, n lebg we-raoogo. Bũmb ka tõe n zoe n põs-a ye." 
Joel2:4 Bãmb bʋrgã wẽnda wiid sẽn zoete, bãmb zoeta wa wed-rʋʋdba." 
Joel2:5 B maanda bʋrg wa saar-dãmba, wa saar-dãmb sẽn yi tãms zut n zoet n sigda. B bʋrgã wẽnda bug-witim bʋrgo. B wata wa tãb-biis sẽn tar pãng sẽn teedg n na n zabe." 
Joel2:6 Nebã sã n yãnd b sẽn watã, lebga rabeem la rigbu, tɩ nebã fãa nens bendge." 
Joel2:7 Bãmb zoeta wa gãndaado, b gãensda lals wa zabr pʋgẽ gãndaado. B ned kam fãa teesa tɩrg n kẽnda, n ka bʋdgd n bas a sor ye." 
Joel2:8 Bãmb ned ba a yembr ka tusd a to ye. Ned kam fãa rɩka a sore. Bãmb wẽdgda pɛɛmã sẽn fɩɩndã sʋk n loogdẽ, la b ka sãeegd n bas taab ye." 
Joel2:9 Bãmb kẽe tẽngã ne pãnga, n zoet lalsã zut n tũud peem-leesẽ wã n kẽed rotã pʋs wa wagda." 
Joel2:10 B sã n watẽ, tẽn-gãongã rĩmdame, tɩ saasã miimdẽ, tɩ wĩndgã ne kiuugã lebgd lika, tɩ ãdsã vẽenem ki." 
Joel2:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab lʋɩ b tãb-biisã taoor n tãsdẽ, bãmb tãb-biisã sõor yaa kʋʋngo, sẽn sakd-b bãmb noorã tara pãnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã yaa ra-kãsenga, la a seka yɛɛsg wʋsgo. Dẽ, ãndã n na n tõog n põs ra-kãnga?" 
Joel2:12 Moasã yɛsa, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Lebg-y n wa-y mam nengẽ ne y sũyã fãa, wa-y ne no-loeere, ne yãbr la wiisgu!" 
Joel2:13 Da pãrs-y y fut ye, maneg-y y sũyã, n lebg n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã nengẽ, bala, b yaa sugr soaba, la nimbãan-zoeer soaba, bãmb sũur ka yikd tao-tao ye, la b yaa nonglem-kãseng soaba, bãmb sã n sɩbge, b sũurã sãamdame." 
Joel2:14 Ãnda n mi b sã n ka na n tek yam, wall b sã n ka na n ning bark b sã n wa pɩʋʋgdẽ? Wa-y ne bõn-koaadl kũuni, la bõn-yũudl kũuni, n wa kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã." 
Joel2:15 Peeb-y baorg Sɩyõ! Yãk-y daar no-loeer yĩnga, moon-y tigin-kãseng daare!" 
Joel2:16 Tigm-y nebã, segl-y tiging sẽn welg toore! Tigm-y kãsem-dãmbã, la y tigim kambã, baa ne kom-peelsã sẽn ket n yẽsemdẽ wã fãa! Bɩ yi-kãad-paalsã yi b rotẽ wã, tɩ pʋg-paalsã me yi b rotẽ!»" 
Joel2:17 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdbã sẽn tʋmd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩngã yals tẽn-kugrã ne zãongã sʋk n yãb n yeele: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, zoe-y y nebã nimbãanega! Da-y ning-y yãmb nebã yãnde, tɩ b wa lebg yel-bũnd buud a taabã yĩnga, tɩ b yetẽ tɩ bãmb Wẽnnaamã bee yɛɛnẽ ye.»" 
Joel2:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab nonga b tẽngã ne nonglem-kãsenga. Bãmb zoee b nebã nimbãanega. 
Joel2:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka b nebã n yeele: «Mam na n leb n kõo yãmb koodo, la m kõ-y reezẽ rã-paalga, ne kaam, yãmb na n tɩgame. Mam ka na n leb n bas tɩ yãmb paam yãnd buud a taabã taoor ye." 
Joel2:20 Mam na n diga yãmb nug-rɩtg bɛɛbã tɩ b zãag ne-yã, mam na n dig-b lame n tɩ kẽes tẽn-koɛɛng sẽn yaa vɩ-raoog pʋgẽ, m na n diga b tãb-biis nins sẽn deng taoorã n kẽes ko-kãsengã sẽn be yaangã pʋga, la m dig b tãb-biis nins sẽn pa poorẽ wã n kẽes ko-kãsengã sẽn be nin-taoorã pʋga. Bãmb na n põogame tɩ b yũugã zẽke, b põogrã yũug na n wulumda zĩig zãnga, bãmb sẽn maan yel-bɛdã yĩnga." 
Joel2:21 Tẽnga, ra zoe rabeem ye, bɩ f maan sũ-noog n kɩdme, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab maanda tʋʋm-kãsemse!" 
Joel2:22 We-rũmsi, da zoe-y rabeem ye. Bala, yamd leb n tobda we-raoogẽ wã, la tɩɩsã leb n womda biisi, kankamsã ne reezẽ tɩɩsã wom n zõondame." 
Joel2:23 Sɩyõ nebã, kɩdm-y-yã, la y maan sũ-noog ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã, bala, bãmb kɩtame tɩ dẽenem saag ni wa sẽn zems a wakate, bãmb sika sa-kẽeng yãmb yĩnga, bãmb kɩtame tɩ dẽenem ne yaoolem saag ni wa pĩndã." 
Joel2:24 Zeesã na n leb n pida ne koodo, la sĩmsã na n leb n pida ne reezẽ rã-paalga, la kaam." 
Joel2:25 Mam na n lebsa yãmb y koodã, sʋ-kitrzĩgnisã ne nesneedã la kalwaarã ne zũnzũyã sẽn dɩ wã. Bãmb yaa mam tãb-bi-kʋʋng m sẽn tʋm tɩ b zab ne yãmba." 
Joel2:26 Yãmb na n dɩɩme n tɩge, la y na n pẽga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã yʋʋre, bãmb sẽn maan tʋʋm-kãsems n kõ yãmbã yĩnga.» B yeelame: «Mam nebã kõn tol n leb n paam yãnd ye.»" 
Joel2:27 Yaa woto la y na n bãng tɩ mam bee ne Israyɛlle, la mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaam, la Wẽnnaam a to ka be ye. Mam yetame: «Mam nebã kõn tol n leb n paam yãnd ye.»" 
Joel3:1 Rẽ zugẽ, mam na n sika m Sɩɩgã ninsaalbã buud fãa zugu: yãmb kom-dibli la y kom-pugli na n yɩɩ no-rɛɛsdba, yãmb nin-kẽembã na n paama zãmsdo, tɩ yãmb kom-bɩɩsã paam vẽnegre." 
Joel3:2 Wakat-kãnga, mam na n sika m Sɩɩgã baa ne yem-daadã ne yem-pogsã zutu." 
Joel3:3 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãn puk yĩngr ne tẽngã zugu: na n yɩɩ zɩɩm ne bugum, la bug-zõose." 
Joel3:4 Wĩndgã na n tekame n lebg lika, tɩ kiuugã tek n lebg zɩɩm, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã sẽn yaa ra-kãseng sẽn sek yɛɛsgã yaool n wa." 
Joel3:5 La yaa neb nins fãa sẽn na n bool Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã bal n na n põse. Bala, Sɩyõ tãngã zugu, ne Zeruzalɛm, neb kẽer n na n põs wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dag n yeelã, la nin-bãmb yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn bool-b rãmbã." 
Amos1:1 Woto yaa a Amoos koeese. Yẽnda yaa Tekoa tẽng rũm-gʋʋnd a yembre. Wẽnnaam vẽnega yẽnda ne bũmb toay-toay sẽn kẽed ne Israyɛll wɛɛngẽ, Zʋʋda rĩm a Oozɩyaas wakate, la a Zoaas biig a Zeroboaam sẽn yaa Israyɛll rĩmã wakate, yʋʋm a yiib sẽn deng tẽn-digimdgã." 
Amos1:2 A Amoos yeelame: Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee Sɩyõ n tãsdẽ, bãmb bee Zeruzalɛm n zẽkd b koɛɛga. Pe-kɩɩmbã rũms wãbneg zĩis kʋɩɩme, la Karmell tãngã zug lebga ware. Damaas nebã" 
Amos1:3 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Damaas yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb namsa Galaad nebã, wa b sẽn pãbd ned ne kut rasaare," 
Amos1:4 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum dɩ rĩm a Azayɛll buudã, la bugmã na n dɩ a Bɛn-Hadaad pãng zĩisã." 
Amos1:5 Mam na n kaoo Damaas tẽngã kʋɩlemse, la m menes Bikat-Avɛn nebã, la m sãam Bɛt-Edɛn nebã rĩm ning sẽn dɩt-a naamã, Mam na n talla Aram nebã n tɩ kẽes yembd Kɩɩr tẽnga, Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Filistẽ-dãmbã" 
Amos1:6 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Gaaza yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb yõga buud tõr nebã, n tɩ kẽes-b yembd Edom." 
Amos1:7 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Gaaza tẽngã zugu, n dɩ a pãng zĩisã" 
Amos1:8 Mam na n menesa Asdood nebã fãa, ne Askelon ned ning sẽn zãad-a naam dasaarã. Mam na n sãama Ekrõ nebã, ne Filistẽ-dãmbã neb nins sẽn kellã. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Feniisi nebã" 
Amos1:9 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Fenisi nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb yõga buud tõr nebã, n tɩ kẽes yembd Edom, la b ka tẽeg kaool ning b sẽn dag n maan ne Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa b ba-biisã yell ye." 
Amos1:10 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Tɩɩr tẽngã zugu, n dɩ a pãng zĩisã Edom nebã" 
Amos1:11 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Edom nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb diga Israyɛll nebã sẽn yaa b saam-biisã ne zabr sʋʋga, n ka zoe b nimbãaneg ye. Bãmb ka tol n sik b sũur ne Israyɛll nebã ye, la kisgrã rag n ket n beeme." 
Amos1:12 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Teman zugu, n dɩ Bostra pãng zĩisã. Amo nebã" 
Amos1:13 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Amo nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb weeda Galaad tẽng pagb nins sẽn tʋtã pʋse, sẽn na yɩl n yalg b soolmã." 
Amos1:14 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Raba zugu, n dɩ a pãng zĩisã. Nebã sẽn na n wa kelem zabrã daarã, la sebgã fugb daare," 
Amos1:15 B na n yõga Amo nebã rĩm ne a nanambsã n tɩ kẽes yembdo. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Amos2:1 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Moaab nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bãmb yõoga Edom dĩmã kõab bugum n maan goore." 
Amos2:2 Woto yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Moaab tẽngã zugu, n dɩ a pãng zĩisã sẽn be Keriyotã, la Moaab nebã na n kii bʋr-kãseng pʋgẽ, ne zabrã bʋrg la bardã peebg pʋgẽ." 
Amos2:3 La m na n menesa b rĩmã, la m kʋ nanambs nins fãa sẽn be ne yẽnda wã. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos2:4 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Zʋʋda nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bala, bãmb zãgsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab tõodã, la b ka sak n deeg bãmb noyã ye. Zʋʋda nebã basame tɩ wẽn-naandsã kẽes-b moogo, yaa wẽn-naands nins bãmb yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n pʋʋsdã." 
Amos2:5 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bugum sig Zʋʋda zugu, la m kɩt tɩ Zeruzalɛm pãng zĩisã rɩ bugum." 
Amos2:6 Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Israyɛll nebã yel-kɛg a tãabã yĩnga, m yeel tɩ naasẽ soabã yĩnga, mam sẽn yeelã ka na n vaal ye: Bala, bãmb koosa nin-tɩrg ligd yĩnga, la b koosa naong soabã neooda yĩnga." 
Amos2:7 Bãmb fãada naong rãmbã paoongo, baa ne tom ning sẽn be b zutẽ wã. B mongda naong rãmb bʋʋm bʋʋd zĩigẽ. Biig ne a ba kẽeda ne pag a yembre, n paoogd mam yʋ-sõngã." 
Amos2:8 Naong rãmbã sẽn gãneg fut nins ne bãmbã, B tara rẽ n tʋɩt tẽn-kugã fãa zĩisẽ n gãe, la b be b wẽn-naandgã roogẽ, n yũud reezẽ rãamã b sẽn yaoolg nebã tɩ b yao wã." 
Amos2:9 Mam yaool n sãama Amoor-dãmbã bãmb nifẽ, Amoor-dãmbã rag n zẽk n taa sɛɛdr tɩɩs woglem, tɩ b pãngã tat sɛn tɩɩse. La mam sãama b sẽn wom biis ninsã, la m võ b yẽgã me." 
Amos2:10 Mam yaool n yiisa yãmb Ezɩpte, n tɛ yãmb we-raoogã pʋgẽ yʋʋm pis-naase, tɩ yãmb tõe n soog Amoor nebã tẽnga." 
Amos2:11 Mam yãka neb yãmb kom-dibli wã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛsdba, la m yãk neb yãmb kom-bɩɩsã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b yɩ neb sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩnga. Israyɛll nebã, ka woto sɩda? Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos2:12 La yãmb kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn welg toorã yũ reezẽ rãam, la y yeel m no-rɛɛsdbã tɩ b ra leb n togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam ye." 
Amos2:13 Beneere, mam na n neema yãmb zĩig pʋgẽ, wa ned saar sẽn zɩlg ki sẽn tabd moodo." 
Amos2:14 Sẽn tõe-a zoees ka na n paam zĩig n soond ye. Pãensã rãmb pãng na n lebga zaalem, la gãndaoog kõn tõog n fãag a meng ye" 
Amos2:15 Tãb-tãoodbã kõn tõog n yalse, sẽn tõe-a zoees kõn tõog n põs ye. La wed-rʋʋd kõn tõog n fãag a yõor ye." 
Amos2:16 Baa sẽn tɩ yaa-a gãndaoog n yɩɩd fãa wã na n zoe n basa a zab-teed badaare. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. 
Amos3:1 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb dãmb fãa sẽn yaa buud ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yiis Ezɩpt yembdã pʋgẽ wã, kelg-y koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet yãmb wɛɛngẽ!" 
Amos3:2 Dũniyã buud fãa sʋka, yaa yãmb bal la mam yãk yã. Yaa rẽ yĩng n kɩte, tɩ mam na n sok yãmb tʋʋm-beed nins fãa yãmb sẽn maanã võore" 
Amos3:3 Neb a yiib tõe n tũu taab tɩ b ka reng n yẽs ne taab sɩda? 
Amos3:4 Gɩgemd wat n kelemda weoogẽ, tɩ sã n ka a paama bũmb n yõke? Gɩgem-poll wat n be a põkẽ n kelemdẽ, tɩ sã n ka a yõka bũmbu?" 
Amos3:5 Tãoog tõe n zĩnd tẽng n yõk liuul tɩ sã n ka b ninga bẽdgo? Tãoog ka fisgd tɩ sã n ka bũmb la a yõkɩ ye! 
Amos3:6 Kũng na wẽ tẽng pʋgẽ tɩ neb pɛleng ka yɩke? Yel-beed tõe n paama tẽng tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab zɩ tiiri? 
Amos3:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka maand bũmbu, tɩ b ka reng n vẽneg-a ne b tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã ye." 
Amos3:8 Gɩgemd sã n kelme, ãndã n ka na n yɛɛse? Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n gome, ãnda soab n tõe n ka togs bãmb koɛɛgã?" 
Amos3:9 Moon-y Asdood ne Ezɩpt pãng zĩisẽ wã n yeele: «Tigm-y taab Samaari tãmsã zutu, n ges zũnglg ninga, la namsg ning b sẽn namsd nebã Samaari tẽngã pʋgẽ wã.»" 
Amos3:10 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Bãmb ka mi tɩ maan sɩd ye, bãmb pidsda b pãng zĩisã ne paoong b sẽn deeg ne pãnga." 
Amos3:11 Bõn-kãens yĩnga, Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yetame: Bɛ wã na n gũbga tẽngã n sãam a pãng zĩisã, la a fã laogã sẽn be a na-yiyã pʋsẽ wã." 
Amos3:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wa gɩgemd sẽn mi n yõk rũnga, tɩ pe-kɩɩm dig-a n deeg kars a yiib bɩ tʋb-bɛkã, Israyɛll nebã sẽn be Samaari wã ne neb nins sẽn be Damaas n gãe b gã-bʋgses zutã me na n paama fãagr a woto!" 
Amos3:13 Kelg-y la y keoog a Zakoob buudã! Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. 
Amos3:14 Daar ning mam sẽn na n sɩbg Israyɛll nebã b tʋʋm-beedã yĩngã, Mam na n sãama Betɛll tẽn-kugã, la tẽn-kugã yɩɩl na n kao n dʋʋga tẽnga," 
Amos3:15 Mam na n luba tẽn-bɛdã roto, la m lub tẽn-bãoonegã roto, la m menes rot nins b sẽn nags ne wob-yẽnã, la rot wʋsg na n sãamame. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:1 Samaari pagbã sẽn nob wa Basan nag-wubdsã, n be Samaari tãngã zugã, Kelg-y-yã! Yãmb namsda ka-pãens rãmbã, la y maand nimbãan-dãmbã pãnga, la y yet y sɩdbã tɩ b tall n wa tɩ y yũ." 
Amos4:2 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sõmblmã pʋga, b wẽename n yeele: Wakat n wat yãmb yĩnga, tɩ b na n wa yõg yãmb ne gaagds n yiisi, la b yiis yãmb yagensã ne leoose." 
Amos4:3 Yãmb ned kam fãa na n tũu tẽngã lalsã võyẽ n yi, la yãmb na n zoe n teesa nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:4 Israyɛll nebã! Wa-y Betɛll Wẽnd doogẽ wã n kɩɩs maam, la y kẽng Gilgall n tɩ kɩɩs maam n paase! Maan-y y maandã yibeoogo, la y wa ne y piig pʋɩɩrã rasem a tãabã daare!" 
Amos4:5 Yõog-y y bark pʋʋsg maandã ne bur sẽn ning rã-bɩlle! Moon-y n togs-y y yamleoog kũunã, tɩ yaa woto la y nonga. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:6 Ad bũmb nins mam sẽn kõ yãmba: Yãmb tẽmsã fãa pʋse, rɩɩb ka be y sẽn na ning y noorẽ ye, rɩɩb ka be zĩig ba a yembr ye. La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:7 Kiuug a tãab sẽn deng tigsgã wakate, mam mong-y-la saaga. Mam kɩtame tɩ saag ni tẽng a yembre, n bas a yembre. Tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ saag ni zĩig a yembre, n bas a yembre, la war kẽe zĩig ning sẽn ka paam-a saagã," 
Amos4:8 Tẽms a yiib wall a tãab neb yeebdame, n dabd tẽng a yembr pʋgẽ, n na n bao koom n yũ, la b lebg n waa ne ko-yũudu. La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:9 Mam kɩtame tɩ wãoong ne gãnem sãam y koodã, la m kɩt tɩ zũnzũy sãam y zẽedã ne y reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã, la y kankamã ne y oliiv tɩɩsã. La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:10 Mam kɩtame tɩ bã-loangdg yõk yãmba, wa m sẽn dag n kɩt t'a yõk Ezɩpt nebã. Mam kɩtame tɩ y kom-bɩɩsã pa tãp pʋgẽ, la m kɩt tɩ b rees y wiidã. Mam kɩtame tɩ neb nins sẽn ki yãmb tãb-sikẽ wã yũug zẽk n ta yãmba. La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:11 Mam sãama yãmba, wa m sẽn dag n sãam Sodom ne Gomoorã, la yãmb yɩɩ wa raoog b sẽn yiis bugmẽ La ne rẽ fãa, yãmb ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos4:12 Woto yĩnga, Israyɛll nebã, yãmb na n yãnda m sẽn na n sɩbg yãmb to-to! Dẽ wã, segl-y y mens n seg y Wẽnnaamã!" 
Amos4:13 Bala, yaa bãmb n maan tãmsã ne sebgã, la b wilg ninsaal b tagsgo. Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ yibeoog lebg lika. Bãmb tabda tãms nins sẽn yaa lug-lugã zut n kẽnda. Bãmb yʋʋr yaa Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã." 
Amos5:1 Israyɛll nebã, kelg-y sũ-sãang yɩɩll m sẽn yɩɩnd yãmb yĩnga" 
Amos5:2 Israyɛll sẽn yaa wa pʋg-neerã lʋɩɩme, la a kõn tol n yik ye, A lʋɩ n dɩga a meng tẽn-gãongã zugu, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n doog-a ye." 
Amos5:3 Bala, ad Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn yete, Israyɛll buudã wɛɛngẽ: Tẽng ning sẽn dag n tʋmd tãb-biis tusr zabrẽ wã ka leb n tar sẽn yɩɩd tãb-biis koabg ye. La tẽng ning sẽn dag n tʋmd tãb-biis koabgã ka leb n tar sẽn yɩɩd tãb-biis piig ye." 
Amos5:4 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg Israyɛll nebã yĩnga: Bao-y maam n paam n vɩɩmde 
Amos5:5 Da bao-y maam Betɛll ye, la y ra kẽng Gilgall me ye Ra kẽng-y Bɛɛrseba ye. Bala, b na n yõga Gilgall nebã n kẽng yembdo, la Betɛll na n sãama zãnga," 
Amos5:6 Bao-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab n paam n vɩɩmde, tɩ b ra wa kɩt tɩ bugum dɩ a Zozɛf buudã, n sãam-a zãnga, tɩ Betɛll ned ba a ye ka tõog n kiis-a ye." 
Amos5:7 Yãmb kaooda bʋʋd kɛga, n mongd bʋʋm dãmb bʋʋm." 
Amos5:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab n naan Pelyaad-dãmbã ne Oriyõ-rãmbã Bãmb n kɩtd tɩ lik lebg vẽenem, la b tõe tɩ wĩndg lebg yʋngo. Bãmb n tõe tɩ ko-kãsengã koom zẽk n kuil saasẽ, n lebg n wa tẽn-gãongã zugu: Bãmb yʋʋr yaa Zu-soaba" 
Amos5:9 Bãmb sãamda gãndaoogo, la b sãamd pãng zĩig me." 
Amos5:10 Yãmb kisa sẽn togsd-a sɩd bʋʋd zĩigẽ, la sẽn gomd-a ne pʋ-peelem." 
Amos5:11 Yãmb taba naong soab ne y nao, n deeg a ki ne pãnga. Yãmb mee rot ne kug-peesdse, la y ka na n kẽ b pʋsẽ ye. Yãmb sela reezẽ tɩɩs sẽn yaa sõama, la y ka na n yũ b reezẽ rãam ye." 
Amos5:12 Bala, mam miime tɩ yãmb beegrã looga nugu, la y yel-wẽnã yaa wʋsgo. Yãmb namsda nin-tɩrga, la y reegd kũuni, n mongd naong soab bʋʋm bʋʋd zĩigẽ." 
Amos5:13 Woto yĩnga, sẽn tar-b yamã sĩndame, wakat a woto sẽn yaa toogã yĩnga." 
Amos5:14 Bas-y wẽng n maan sẽn yaa neere, n paam n vɩɩmde, Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n zĩnda ne yãmba, wa y sẽn tagsdã." 
Amos5:15 Kisg-y wẽng la y nong sẽn yaa neere, la y kao bʋʋd sẽn yaa tɩrg y bʋʋdã zĩisẽ, tɩ daar ninga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na zoe a Zozɛf buudã sẽn ketã nimbãanega." 
Amos5:16 Woto yĩnga, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Zĩigã fãa na n yɩɩ wiisgu. Soayã zutu, nebã na n yeelame: Kayto! Kayto! B na n boola neb nins sẽn be pʋʋgẽ, tɩ b wa naag wiisdbã n wiisi, la b bool neb nins sẽn mi-b kʋʋr yãbrã tɩ b wa yãbe." 
Amos5:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Mam sã n wa pɩʋʋg yãmb sʋkã n looge, reezẽ tɩɩs pʋtã fãa pʋs na n yɩɩ wiisgu." 
Amos5:18 Kayto! Neb nins sẽn gũud Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã na paam toogo! Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã na n nafa yãmb ne bõe? A ka na n yɩ vẽenem ye, a na n yɩɩ lik bida." 
Amos5:19 Badaar na n yɩɩ wa ned sẽn zoet n na n põs gɩgemd n tɩ seg ãbga, n ta a yir n tik a lalg tɩ waaf kɛ-a." 
Amos5:20 Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã ka na n yɩ vẽenem ye. A na n yɩɩ lik daare. Vẽenem kõn tol n zĩnd badaar ye, Na n yɩɩ lik bida daare." 
Amos5:21 Mam kisa yãmb tigã, mam ka rat n wʋm yãmb tigindã rãamd ye." 
Amos5:22 Yãmb sã n wa mam nengẽ ne y maand sẽn yõogd bugmã la y bõn-koaadl kũunã, mam ka na n deeg-b ye. Yãmb zems-n-taar maandã ne y rũm-nobdsã, mam ka na n geelg-b ye." 
Amos5:23 Zãag-y maam ne y yɩɩlã sẽn yaa bʋʋrã, Mam ka na n kelg y kʋlã wẽeb ye." 
Amos5:24 Kɩt-y tɩ tɩrlem zoe wa ko-bundum, tɩ pʋ-peelmã yɩ wa kʋɩlg koom sẽn ka sɛt ye." 
Amos5:25 Israyɛll nebã, yãmb sẽn zĩnd we-raoogã pʋg yʋʋm pis-naasã, yãmb maana maand la y wa ne kũun n kõ maam sɩda?" 
Amos5:26 La yãmb yaool n tʋkda a Sikut sẽn yaa y rĩmã ne a Kiyun sẽn yaa y Wẽn-naandgã ãdgã. 
Amos5:27 Woto yĩnga, mam na n yõga yãmb n kẽes yembdo, tẽng zãrem sẽn yɩɩd Damaase. Soab ning yʋʋr sẽn yaa Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeta." 
Amos6:1 Sẽn vɩ-b Sɩyõ tẽngã pʋg ne bãanã na n paama toogo! Sẽn be-b Samaari tãngã zug tɩ b sũur keemẽ wã, ne tẽn-kãsengã nin-kãsems Israyɛll nebã sẽn kẽnd-b rãmb nengẽ wã na n paama toogo!" 
Amos6:2 Kẽng-y Kalne n tɩ gese, la y yi be n kẽng Hamat sẽn yaa tẽn-kãsengã, la y lebg n kẽ Gat sẽn yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽngã n tɩ gese: Tẽn-bãmb sãoo soolem-kãensã bɩ? Bɩ b soolmã yɩɩda yãmb soolmã?" 
Amos6:3 Yãmb baood n targa toogã daar sẽn watã, la yaool n yaa wẽngã wakat la y kɩtd t'a pẽnegdẽ" 
Amos6:4 Yãmb gãee y gãasã sẽn nags ne wob-yẽnã zutu, ne y goeen-bʋgsã zutu, n wãbd pe-ra-poal ne nag-bi-nobds nemdo," 
Amos6:5 la y wẽed y kʋla. Yãmb maana yʋʋm-teed wa a Davɩɩde 
Amos6:6 Yãmb yũuda reezẽ rãam ne zɩɩm mesb laase, la y rɩkda dẽenem biis kaam n ningd y mens zutu, A Zozɛf buudã sãoong ka namsd bãmb ye!" 
Amos6:7 Woto yĩnga, bãmb n na n yɩ pipi b sẽn na n yõg n kẽes yembdo, la neb nins sẽn gãe b gãasẽ wã tig na n sɛɛme." 
Amos6:8 Zu-soabã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã wẽename n yeele: Mam kisa a Zakoob buudã sẽn wukd b mensã, la m kisa a na-yiyã. Mam na n basame tɩ bɛɛbã sãam Samaari tẽngã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã." 
Amos6:9 La raop piig sã n kell zak a yembr pʋgẽ, b na n kiime." 
Amos6:10 Ned sã n wa n na n wʋk a roagdb kũum n yi a roogẽ, n na n tɩ yõog bugum, la a wʋk a kõabã n na n yõog bugum, a na n soka ned ning sẽn be roogã yaangã yaa: Ned a to keta fo nengẽ bɩ? La sẽn be-a roogã yaangã na n leokame: Ned ba a yembr ka ket ye. La a na n leb n yeelame: Sĩnd la f ra pʋd Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋr ye!" 
Amos6:11 Gese, Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdame n yetẽ: Ro-bedr na n lebga raboogo, la ro-bil na n wãame." 
Amos6:12 Wed-moos tõe n zoee pĩig kugr zug sɩda? Ned me tõe n koo ko-kãsengã pʋg ne niig sɩda? La yaa bõe tɩ yãmb tekd sɩd tɩ lebg zĩrẽ, la y tekd tɩrlem tɩ lebg wẽnga?" 
Amos6:13 Yãmb pẽgda y meng ne Lo-Dabaar sẽn yaa tẽn-bilã. Yãmb yetame: Ka ne tõnd meng pãng la d tõog n zab n deeg Karnayim sẽn yaa tẽng sẽn tar pãngã sɩda? 
Amos6:14 Maam a Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Israyɛll nebã! Mam na n kɩtame tɩ buud a yembr yik zabr ne yãmba, n nams yãmb sẽn sɩng ne Hamat tẽngã rignoore, n tãag ko-zoetmã zĩ-koɛɛngã." 
Amos7:1 Ad bũmb ning Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg maam vẽnegr pʋgẽ: Daar a yembre, moodã sẽn wa n leb n sɩngd yiibã wakate, sʋy n dag n wekde. Rag n yaa rĩmã bɩle tigsg loogr zugẽ." 
Amos7:2 B sẽn wa n dɩt tẽngã moodã zãnga wakate, mam yeelame: Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, m yõkd-y-la sɛɛga, tɩ y kõ y nebã sugri! A Zakoob yagensã na n maana wãn n põse? Bãmb sõorã ka waoog ye." 
Amos7:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab teka yam, n yeel tɩ yell a woto ka na n zĩnd ye." 
Amos7:4 Ad bũmb a to Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn leb n wilg maam: Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam rag n kaooda bʋʋdã ne bugum, la bugmã rag n dɩta ko-kãsengã sẽn be tẽn-gãongã tẽngrã ne pʋtã." 
Amos7:5 Mam yeelame: Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam, m kot-y lame tɩ y bas woto! A Zakoob yagensã na n maana wãn n põse? Bãmb ka pãng ye." 
Amos7:6 Dẽ, Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab teka yam, n yeel tɩ yell a woto me ka na n zĩnd ye." 
Amos7:7 Dẽ poore, ad bũmb a to Zu-soabã sẽn leb n wilg maam: B rag n yasa namd lalg zugu, n zãad makdga." 
Amos7:8 Zu-soabã soka maam yaa: ‹Amoose, fo nee bõe?› La mam yeelame tɩ m nee makdga. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: Mam makda m nebã ne makdga, la m ka na n leb n kõ-b sugr yɛs ye." 
Amos7:9 A Izak maoong kʋʋb zĩisã na n sãamame, Israyɛll pʋʋsg zĩisã na n lebga raboodo. La m na n sãama a Zeroboaam buudã ne zabr sʋʋga." 
Amos7:10 A Amatsɩya sẽn yaa Betɛll maan-kʋʋr kãsmã tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛll dĩm a Zeroboaam, t'a Amoos baood n dat n sãama yãmb Israyɛll buudã sʋka. Tẽngã neb yam yii ne a goamã." 
Amos7:11 Ad a Amoos sẽn yeele: A Zeroboaam na n paa tãpẽ, La b na n yõga Israyɛll nebã n kẽes yembdo, n zãag-b ne b tẽngã." 
Amos7:12 A Amatsɩya yeela a Amoos yaa: «Bãngda, zoe n kẽng n tɩ soond Zʋʋda tẽnga, n togs f pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã beenẽ n paamd f noor dɩɩbo," 
Amos7:13 la f ra togs pĩnd-n-bãngr goam Betɛll kaanẽ ye. Bala, yaa zĩig rĩmã sẽn kẽnd n waoogd Wẽnnaam, la a leb n yaa soolmã zĩ-sõngo.»" 
Amos7:14 La a Amoos leoka a Amatsɩya yaa: «Mam ka no-rɛɛsa, m leb n ka no-rɛɛs biig me ye. Mam yaa rũm-gʋʋnda, la m senda kankamse." 
Amos7:15 Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yãk maam m sẽn wa n gũud m dũmsã wakate, n yeel maam yaa: ‹Kẽng Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã nengẽ n tɩ yɩ m no-rɛɛsa." 
Amos7:16 Moasã, foom a Amatsɩya sẽn yet maam tɩ m da togs Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel bũmb ning Israyɛll nebã wɛɛngẽ, ne a Izak buudã wɛɛngẽ wã, kelg Zu-soabã koɛɛga.› »" 
Amos7:17 Bõn-kãng yĩnga, ad Zu-soabã sẽn yeta: ‹Fo pagã na n lebga pʋg-yoodr tẽngã pʋgẽ, fo kom-dibli wã ne f kom-pugli wã na n paa tãpẽ, b na n deesa fo zĩisã n pʋɩ n kõ neb a taaba, fo na n tɩ kii tẽn-zẽnga, la b na n yõga Israyɛll nebã n tɩ kẽes yembdo, n zãag-b ne b tẽngã.›" 
Amos8:1 Ad bũmb ning Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg maam vẽnegr a to pʋgẽ. Vẽneg-kãng pʋgẽ, mam yãnda peoog sẽn pid ne tɩɩs bi-moaama." 
Amos8:2 La b soka maam yaa: Amoose, fo nee bõe? La mam yeelame tɩ m nee peoog sẽn pid ne tɩɩs bi-moaama. La Zu-soabã yeela maam yaa: Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã sɛɛb wakat taame. Mam ka na n leb n kõ-b sugr ye." 
Amos8:3 Badaare, na-yirã pʋgẽ yɩɩlã na n lebga wiisgu. Maam a Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam n yeele. B na n zama kũumã zĩig fãa. B ka na n leb n wʋm bʋrg ye." 
Amos8:4 Kelg-y-yã, yãmb dãmb sẽn maand nimbãan-nebã pãngã, la y namsd tẽngã ka-pãens-rãmbã," 
Amos8:5 Yãmb yetame: «Rabʋr la ki-paalgã na n sɛ, tɩ d paam n koosd d koodã? La dabʋr la vʋʋsg daarã na n looge, tɩ d paam n fõgs d bao wã?» Tõnd na n wẽga d la-magdɩ wã, la d tall d zɩslem magdsã n zãmbe, la d rʋg d koosmã raaga." 
Amos8:6 Tõnd na n daa naong rãmbã ne ligdi, la d koos nin-koamã neooda yĩnga. Tõnd na n koosa baa ne ka-pedsã." 
Amos8:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wẽena ne Israyɛll zu-zẽkr tẽngã n yeele: «Mam ka na n tol n yĩm y tʋʋmd ba a yembr ye.» 
Amos8:8 Bãmb tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-gãongã rigimdi. Sũ-sãang na n paama neb nins fãa sẽn be tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ wã A na n zẽkame n lebg n lʋɩ, wa Ezɩpt tẽng Nill kʋɩlgã." 
Amos8:9 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yetame: Badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ wĩntoogã kẽ wĩnto-sʋka, la m kɩt tɩ dũniyã lebg lik wĩntoog wakate." 
Amos8:10 Mam na n teka y tigã tɩ lebg sũ-sãanga, la m tek y yɩɩlã fãa tɩ lebg wiisgu. Mam na n sẽgen-y-la sũ-sãang futu, la m põng y fãa zutã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sũ-sãang kẽ tẽngã, wa ned bi-ribl-yend sẽn ki t'a yãbda, la a baoosg na n yɩɩ sũ-toogo." 
Amos8:11 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam yeelame yaa: Wakat n wate, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ kom kẽ tẽngã, la ka na n yɩɩ rɩɩb kom, wall koom sẽn kae n yũud yĩng ye. Na n yɩɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã kelgr kom la a ko-yũud n na n yõk-ba." 
Amos8:12 Bãmb na n yeeb n kẽnga goabg la rɩtgo, ne yaang la taoore, n baood n na n wʋm Sẽn-Ka-Saab goamã, la b ka na n wʋm-a ye." 
Amos8:13 Badaare, pʋg-sad-neebã ne ra-sãmbã na n kii ko-yũudu." 
Amos8:14 Bãmb wẽenda ne Samaari wẽn-naan-yoogã n yetẽ: «Tõnd wẽenda ne f wẽn-naandg a Dan, la d wẽend ne Bɛɛrseba wẽn-naandgã!» La b na n lʋɩɩme n ka leb n yik abada ye" 
Amos9:1 Mam yãnda Zu-soabã sẽn yas tẽn-kugrã taoor n yetẽ: Wẽ ra-lugdsã tɩ roogã miime, n lʋɩ n zãb nebã fãa! Mam na n kʋʋ bãmb yagensã ne zabr sʋʋga. Bãmb sʋkã ned ba a yembr ka na n paam n zoe, la sẽn zoet-bã ba a yembr ka na n tõog n põs ye." 
Amos9:2 Bãmb sã n tɩ kẽ kɩɩm-kulgu, mam na n yiisa bãmb be. Bãmb sã n dʋ yĩngri, mam na n sika bãmb be." 
Amos9:3 Bãmb sã n tɩ soond Karmell tãngã zugu, mam na n tɩ baoo bãmb be n yõg-ba, Bãmb sã n zoe n tɩ kẽ ko-kãsengã yaang n na n soonde, mam na n kɩtame tɩ wiis kɛ-ba" 
Amos9:4 Baa bãmb bɛɛbã sã n yõg-b n tɩ kẽes yembdo, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ bãmb ne zabr sʋʋga. Mam na n gũusa bãmba, la ka na n yɩ b manegr yĩng ye, na n yɩ b sãoong yĩnga." 
Amos9:5 Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sɩɩsa tẽngã t'a rigimdi. Sũ-sãang paama neb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã A zẽkdame n lebgd n lʋɩtẽ, wa Ezɩpt Nill kʋɩlgã." 
Amos9:6 Bãmb tilga b yir saasẽ, la b yɛdg b sa-gãongã tẽngã zugu, b kɩtdame tɩ koom yi ko-kãsengẽ wã, n pid tẽn-gãongã: Bãmb yʋʋr yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Amos9:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Israyɛll nebã, yãmb yɩɩda Kuus nebã la? Ka maam n yiis Israyɛll nebã Ezɩpte, wa m sẽn yiis Filistẽ-dãmbã Kaftoore, la wa m sẽn yiis Siiri nebã Kiirã la?" 
Amos9:8 Maam a Zu-soab a Wẽnnaam geta yel-wẽn-maandbã soolem. M na n kɩtame t'a menem dũniyã zugu, la m ka na n sãam a Zakoob roogã zãng ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Amos9:9 Mam na n kõo bɛ wã noore, n yeel-a t'a miim Israyɛll buudã buud a taabã fãa sʋka, wa b sẽn tar goaadg n good koodo, la kugr ba a yembr ka na n lʋɩ tẽng ye." 
Amos9:10 Yel-wẽn-maandb nins fãa sẽn be mam nebã sʋkã yetame: Ra kɩt-y tɩ toog pẽneg tõnd ye. Ra kɩt-y tɩ toog paam tõnd ye. 
Amos9:11 Badaare, mam na n lebsa a Davɩɩd soolmã sẽn yaa wa roog sẽn dat n lʋɩ wã n me. Mam na n yẽda a võyã, n lebs n me a raboodã, Mam na n lebs n me-a lame, t'a leb n yɩ wa a sẽn dag n yaa-a soab pĩndã." 
Amos9:12 Woto, bãmb na n sooga Edom neb nins sẽn kellã, la soolem nins fãa mam sẽn dag n so wã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maand bõn-kãens fãa. Yaa maam n yeele." 
Amos9:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Wakat n wate, tɩ kẽer na n fẽrgdẽ tɩ kẽer pʋgd n tigsdẽ, tɩ kẽer na n send reezẽ tɩɩs tɩ kẽer pʋgd n wobda, tɩ reezẽ rã-paalg na n sodgd tãmsã zutu, la kunkubã fãa zutu." 
Amos9:14 Mam na n lebsa Israyɛll sẽn yaa mam nebã b zĩigẽ. Bãmb na n lebs n me b tẽmsã sẽn sãamã, n kẽ be n zĩndi. Bãmb na n sela reezẽ tɩɩse, n yũ a reezẽ rãamã, Bãmb na n maana zẽed zĩisi, n dɩ a biisã." 
Amos9:15 Mam na n zĩniga bãmb tẽms nins mam sẽn kõ bãmbã pʋse, la ned ka na n leb n tõog n yiis bãmb be ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã n yeele." 
Obadiah1:1 Vẽnegr a Abdyaas sẽn paame. Ad Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet Edom soolmã wɛɛngẽ: «Tõnd wʋma koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ, la b tʋma ned bu-zẽmsã nengẽ ne koɛɛga.» Koɛɛgã yetame: «Yik-y-yã! D yik n zab ne Edom soolmã!» D zab ne-a!" 
Obadiah1:2 Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg bilf bu-zẽmsã fãa sʋka, la nebã na n paooga foom wʋsgo." 
Obadiah1:3 Fo tɩtaamã kẽes-f-la moogo, bala, fo bee pĩisã bogdẽ, fo tilga f rotã tãms zutu, la f yetẽ: «Ãnda n tõe n sik maam?»" 
Obadiah1:4 Baa fo sã n yɩk n kuil yĩngr wa pa-nand-tugri, baa fo tɩʋ f tʋkã ãdsã sʋka, mam na n sika foom be. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!" 
Obadiah1:5 Wagda bɩ fãadb sã n wa fo nengẽ ne yʋngo, bãmb ka na n wã foom sɩda? Ka b sẽn tõe n wʋk bal la b na n wʋke? Reezẽ-woabdb sã n wa fo reezẽ pʋʋgẽ, b na n basa bũmb tɩ ka reezẽ sẽn na n yiisi?" 
Obadiah1:6 B vɛɛsa a Ezayu yagensã! B zũndga yẽnda arzegsã! 
Obadiah1:7 B na n diga foom n yiis f soolmẽ wã: Bala, sẽn maan-b kaool ne foomã zãmbda foom, fo zo-rãmbã n so foom, sẽn naagd-b foom n dɩtẽ wã tũnugda beenẽ n bẽt foom. Bãmb yeta fo wɛɛngẽ: «A ka leb n tar yam ye.»" 
Obadiah1:8 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, mam na n menesa Edom soolem yam dãmbã, mam na n menes a Ezayu soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã bãngdbã." 
Obadiah1:9 Teman tẽnga, b na n kẽesa fo gãndaadã rabeem, sẽn na yɩl n kʋ neb nins sẽn be a Ezayu soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, n menes-b fãa!" 
Obadiah1:10 Wẽng ning fo sẽn maan fo ba-biig a Zakoob yagensã yĩnga, fo na n paama yãnde, la b na n menes-f-la wakat sẽn kõn sa yĩnga." 
Obadiah1:11 Daar ning bu-zẽmsã sẽn wa n wʋkd bũmb nins sẽn dag n kõt Zeruzalɛm pãngã n loogdẽ, daar ning sãambã sẽn wa n tũ Zeruzalɛm tẽngã noy n kẽ n maan poeer n pʋɩ-a, tɩ fo sĩnd n getẽ wã, fo me yaa wa bãmb sʋkã ned a yembre." 
Obadiah1:12 Da maan sũ-noog f ba-biigã yel-pakr daar ye. Da maan sũ-noog a toogã daar ye. Da kɩdem Zʋʋda nebã sãoong daar ye. Da gom n paoog f ba-biigã b yel-pakrã daar ye. 
Obadiah1:13 Da kẽ mam nebã tẽng pʋg b sãoongã daar ye. Bɩ fo me ra yãnd f saam-biisã toog b sãoongã daar n maan sũ-noog ye. La b sãoongã daare, bɩ f ra sɩɩs bũmb ning sẽn dag n kõt-b pãngã ye." 
Obadiah1:14 Da yals so-tiisẽ n kʋ sẽn zoet-b n na n põsã ye! Da yõg neb nins sẽn põs-bã n ning b bɛɛbã nugẽ toogã daar ye!» 
Obadiah1:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã kolgda bu-zẽmsã fãa yĩnga. B na n maana foom wa fo sẽn maanã, b na n dola foom f tʋʋmã." 
Obadiah1:16 Edom tẽnga, bãng tɩ fo sẽn yũ mam sũ-puugr bõn-yũudlã m tãn-sõngã zug to-to wã, bu-zẽmsã me na n yũ-a-la a woto wakat fãa. Bãmb na n yũ-a lame, b na n gag-a lame, la na n yɩɩ wa bãmb ka tol n zĩnd ye." 
Obadiah1:17 Neb n na n põs n zĩnd Sɩyõ tãngã zugu. Sɩyõ na n leb n lebga zĩ-sõngo, la a Zakoob buudã na n leb n deega b sẽn so wã." 
Obadiah1:18 A Zakoob buudã na n lebga wa bugum, la a Zozɛf buudã na n lebga wa bug-witim, t'a Ezayu buudã lebg wa moodo, tɩ b rɩ-a n sãam-a zãnga. A Ezayu buudã ned ba a yembr ka na n põs ye. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!" 
Obadiah1:19 Negɛɛv nebã na n sooga Ezayu soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã, la sẽn be-b kunkub sʋkã na n sooga Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽnga. Bãmb na n sooga Efrayiim ne Samaari tẽngã. La Benzame yagensã na n sooga Galaade." 
Obadiah1:20 Israyɛll tãb-biis nins b sẽn dag n yõg n kẽng tẽn-zẽmsã, na n sooga Kana nebã tẽngã, hal n tãag Sarɛpta, la Zeruzalɛm neb nins b sẽn dag n yõg tɩ b be Sefaraadã na n sooga Negɛɛv tẽmsã." 
Obadiah1:21 Fãagdb na n dʋʋ Sɩyõ tãngã, n kao a Ezayu soolem ning sẽn be tãms sʋkã neb bʋʋdo. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab n na n dɩ naam." 
Jonah1:1 Daar a yembre, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Amitayi biig a Zonaas yaa:" 
Jonah1:2 «Yik n kẽng Niniiv sẽn yaa tẽn-kãsengã pʋgẽ, n tɩ moon n yeel tẽngã nebã, tɩ b wẽnemã zẽk n taa maam.»" 
Jonah1:3 La a Zonaas yikame n na n zoe n kẽng Tarsɩɩse, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n zãag ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. La a sẽn ta Zafa tẽnga, a yãnda koom kogl-bedr sẽn dabd Tarsɩɩse, la yẽnda yaoome n kẽ n naag koom koglgã rãmba, n na n kẽng Tarsɩɩs n zãag ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo." 
Jonah1:4 La b sẽn wa n be ko-kãsengã zugu, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ sob-kãseng yik koomã zug n fugda, tɩ ko-pɛmã yikdẽ, hal tɩ koom koglgã rat n wã." 
Jonah1:5 Dẽ, rabeem yõka kogl-rugsdbã, tɩ ned kam fãa kelemd n boond a wẽnde. La bãmb wʋka koglgã pʋgẽ teedã n lobd koomẽ wã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ koglgã lebg faasga. La rẽ t'a Zonaas ra yikame n sig koglgã tẽngr doogã n gãe n gõe n wẽed gũsum." 
Jonah1:6 Dẽ, koom koglgã taoor soab kolga a Zonaas n sok-a yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ f gãe n gõe? Fo me yik n bool f Wẽnnaamã, tɩ tõe tɩ b zoe d nimbãanega, tɩ d da ki ye.»" 
Jonah1:7 La koglgã pʋg nebã goma ne taab n yeel yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d maan poeer n bãng sẽn yaa ned ning yĩng la yel-kãngã paamd tõndo.» La bãmb maana poeere, la poeerã wilgame tɩ yaa a Zonaase." 
Jonah1:8 Dẽ, bãmb yeela a Zonaas yaa: «Yaa fo yĩng la yel-kãngã sẽn paam tõndã. Dẽ wã, togs tõnd tʋʋmd ning fo sẽn tʋmde! Fo yita yɛɛnẽ? Fo yaa tẽn-bʋg neda? La fo yaa bu-bʋg neda?»" 
Jonah1:9 La a Zonaas leoka bãmb n yeel yaa: «Mam yaa Ebre buudã neda, la m pʋʋsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa saasẽ Wẽnnaamã. Yaa bãmb n naan ko-kãsengã, la tẽn-gãongã.»" 
Jonah1:10 La rabeem-kãseng yõka neb nins sẽn dag n be koglgã pʋgã. Bala, a Zonaas ra yeela bãmb tɩ yẽnda zoetame n na n zãag ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Dẽ, bãmb yeela a Zonaas yaa: «Yaa bõe tɩ fo maand a woto?»" 
Jonah1:11 La bãmb leb n soka a Zonaas yaa: «Tõnd na n maana foom bõe n paam tɩ koomã sigi?» Bala, wakat-kãng tɩ ko-pɛmã rag n paamda pãng n paasdẽ." 
Jonah1:12 A Zonaas leok-b lame yaa: «Mam miime tɩ yaa mam yellã yĩng n kɩt tɩ sob-kẽen-kãngã lengd yãmba. Rẽ wã, bɩ y rɩk maam n lob ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ, la koomã na n sigame.»" 
Jonah1:13 Koom koglgã pʋg nebã rag n maoodame n dat n ta kʋɩl-koakã, la b ka tõog ye, ko-pɛmã sẽn dag n lengd bãmb wʋsg n yɩɩd pĩndã yĩnga." 
Jonah1:14 Dẽ, bãmb yõka Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg n yeel yaa: «Tõnd kot-y lame tɩ y ra bas tɩ d ki nin-kãngã yellã yĩng ye. Da rɩk-y pʋ-peen-ned yell n dogl tõnd zug ye. Bala, yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n maan y raabo.»" 
Jonah1:15 Dẽ, bãmb dɩka a Zonaas n lob koomẽ wã. La wakat-kãng bala, sob-kãsengã yõkame, tɩ ko-pɛmã sigi." 
Jonah1:16 Woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab rabeem kãseng yõk-b lame. Dẽ, bãmb maana maoong n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b maan pʋleng ne bãmba." 
Jonah2:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ zĩn-bedr wa vel a Zonaase. La yẽnda paa zĩnfã pʋgẽ dasem a tãabo. 
Jonah2:2 Dẽ, a Zonaas zĩnda zĩnfã pʋgẽ n pʋʋs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã n yeel yaa:" 
Jonah2:3 «Mam yel-pakrã pʋgẽ, mam kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la bãmb leoka maam. Mam zĩnda kɩɩm-kulgu, n bool yãmb n kos tɩ y sõng-ma, la yãmb wʋma mam kosgã." 
Jonah2:4 Yãmb loba maam zĩ-zulungẽ, ko-kãsengã sʋka, la ko-wĩis gũbga maam, tɩ ko-pɛmã ne ko-wĩisã wẽed maam.»" 
Jonah2:5 Mam da yeta m meng yaa: «Yãmb diga maam tɩ m zãag ne yãmba, la mam yaool n nongẽ lame n leb n yãnd y ro-sõngã." 
Jonah2:6 Koomã lima maam zãnga, la ko-zulungã gũbga maam, la kʋɩl-moodã ra vila m zugã." 
Jonah2:7 La mam sig n taa hal tãmsã yẽgẽ, la kɩɩm-kulg kʋɩlemsã ra paga maam wakat fãa yĩnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaam, yãmb yiisa maam bog-zulungã pʋg vɩɩga." 
Jonah2:8 La mam vɩɩmã sẽn wa n dat n sɛ wã wakate, mam pʋʋsa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la mam pʋʋsgã zẽk n taa yãmb nengẽ, A ta y ro-sõngã pʋga." 
Jonah2:9 Neb nins sẽn waoogd wẽn-naandsã sẽn ka tar yõodã, zãagda b mens ne yãmb zoodã." 
Jonah2:10 La sã n yaa ne maam, mam na n maana maoong n kõ yãmba, la m pʋd bark pʋʋsg yɩɩl n waoog-yã. La m pids m pʋlengã m sẽn maanã. Bala, yaa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n fãagde!»" 
Jonah2:11 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne zĩnfã t'a kẽng n tɩ wʋk a Zonaas kʋɩl-koakẽ wã." 
Jonah3:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Zonaas naoor a yiibẽ soab n yeel-a yaa: 
Jonah3:2 «Yik n kẽng Niniiv sẽn yaa tẽn-kãsengã pʋgẽ, n tɩ togs koɛɛg ning mam sẽn togs foomã.»" 
Jonah3:3 Dẽ, a Zonaas yikame n kẽng Niniiv wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeel yẽnda wã. Niniiv tẽngã rag n yaa tẽn-kãseng Wẽnnaam nifẽ. La a yalmã ra tata rasem a tãab kẽnde." 
Jonah3:4 La a Zonaas sɩngame n kẽn daar a yembr Niniiv tẽngã pʋga. La a ra moondame n yetẽ yaa: «Ade, keta rasem pis-naas bala, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sãam Niniiv tẽngã.»" 
Jonah3:5 Dẽ, Niniiv tẽngã neb tẽe Wẽnnaam. La bãmb mooname n yeel nebã fãa tɩ b loe noore. La sẽn sɩng ne kãsma, n tɩ tãag yao-zʋʋga, nebã fãa yeelga sũ-sãang fut n zĩnd tompeglmẽ." 
Jonah3:6 La Niniiv naabã sẽn wʋm kibarã, a yika a naamã geer zug n yeeg a naamã kobre, la a yeelg sũ-sãang fuug n zĩnd tompeglmẽ." 
Jonah3:7 Dẽ poore, Niniiv naabã kɩtame tɩ b moon Niniiv tẽngã pʋg n yeel yaa: «Rĩmã ne a kug-zĩidbã wilgdame tɩ ninsaalbã ra rɩ rɩɩbo, la bɩ rũmsã fãa, sã n yaa rũm-bɛd wall rũm-bãoonego, ra wãb yamdo, la b ra yũ koom me ye." 
Jonah3:8 La bɩ ninsaalbã ne rũmsã fãa yeelg sũ-sãang futu, tɩ ned kam fãa kelem n bool Wẽnnaam ne a sũur fãa, la a wẽnemd n bas a manesem-wẽngã, ne a tʋʋm-wẽnsã a sẽn da maandã!" 
Jonah3:9 Bala, ãndã n mi Wẽnnaam sã n ka na n sik b sũuri, tɩ d paam n põse?»" 
Jonah3:10 Wẽnnaam yãnda Niniiv nebã yel-manesmã, n mik tɩ b rag n basda b tʋʋm-beedã. Dẽ, Wẽnnaam teka yam ne sɩbgr ning bãmb sẽn dag n dat n sɩbg Niniiv nebã, la b basame n ka sɩbg-b ye." 
Jonah4:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan bũmb ningã ka tol n yɩ a Zonaas noog ye. Dẽ kɩtame t'a Zonaas sũurã yiki. 
Jonah4:2 La a Zonaas pʋʋsa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeel yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, ka woto la m sẽn da pĩnd n yeel mam sẽn wa n ket n be m tẽngẽ wã sɩda? Yaa rẽ yĩng la m sẽn da zoet n na n kẽng Tarsɩɩsã. Bala, mam miime tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam, y yaa sugr kõata, la nimbãan-zoɛta, la yãmb sũurã ka yikd tao-tao ye. Y tara nonglem wʋsgo, la yãmb basda sɩbgr ning y sẽn dag n tog n sɩbgã tɩ vaale." 
Jonah4:3 La sẽn lebg woto wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, bɩ y reeg m vɩɩmã. Bala mam sẽn kiid n são m sẽn vɩ.»" 
Jonah4:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka a Zonaas yaa: «Fo tagsdame tɩ fo tara bʋʋm la f sẽn yikd f sũurã woto wã bɩ?» 
Jonah4:5 Dẽ, a Zonaas yii Niniiv tẽngã pʋga, n kẽng tẽngã yaang n tɩ zĩndi. La a tii sẽok beenẽ n kẽ a maasmẽ n zĩ n gũud bũmb ning sẽn na n paam Niniiv tẽngã." 
Jonah4:6 La Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ tɩɩg yi tẽn-gãongã zug t'a maasmã bui a Zonaase, t'a sũ-pa-noaangã tõe n sɛ. La a Zonaas sũurã yɩɩ noog wʋsg tɩɩgã yĩnga." 
Jonah4:7 La a vẽkembeoog yi-beoog pĩnda, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ zũnzũur wa kẽ tɩɩgã n dɩ-a t'a zelge." 
Jonah4:8 La sõ-bɩɩmd wakate, Wẽnnaam kɩtame tɩ sob-tʋʋlg yi yaang sẽnẽ n wa, la wĩntoogã pãba a Zonaas zugã t'a pãngã sɛ t'a lʋɩ. Dẽ, yẽnda yeelame yaa: «Mam sẽn kiid n são m sẽn vɩ.»" 
Jonah4:9 La Wẽnnaam soka a Zonaas yaa: «Dẽ yĩnga, fo sẽn puug f sũur tɩɩgã kũum yĩngã, fo tara bʋʋm sɩda?» La a Zonaas leoka Wẽnnaam n yeel yaa: «M sũurã sẽn puug tɩ m dat n ki wã, m tara bʋʋm.»" 
Jonah4:10 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela a Zonaas yaa: «Fo yãbda tɩɩgã nimbãanega, la yaool n ka foom n kɩt t'a yi, la ka foom n kɩt t'a bɩ me ye. Tɩɩgã yii yʋn-yɛnga, n lebg n ki yʋn-yɛnga." 
Jonah4:11 Niniiv yaa tẽn-kãsenga. Neb sẽn vɩ-a pʋgẽ sõor yɩɩda neb tus koabg la pisi, tɩ rũms wʋsg-wʋsg me be beenẽ. La tẽngã nebã ka tol n mi sẽn yaa sõamã ne wẽng n bak ye. Rẽ wã, mam na n yɩ a wãn n ka zoe tẽn-kãngã nimbãanega.»" 
Micah1:1 Ad koɛɛg ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn kõ a Miise sẽn yaa Moresɛt tẽng nedã, Zʋʋda rĩm-dãmb a Zotam, ne a Akaaze, la a Ezekɩyaas sẽn wa n dɩt-b naamã wakatã, la ad vẽnegr ning yẽnda sẽn yã sẽn kẽed ne Samaari la Zeruzalɛm wɛɛngẽ wã:" 
Micah1:2 «Nebã fãa, kelg-y-yã! Bɩ dũniyã ne bũmb nins fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã kelg neere! Zu-soab a Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zĩnda b ro-sõngã pʋg n yɩ kaset soab n ning yãmb taale!" 
Micah1:3 Gese, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yita b zĩigẽ wã, bãmb sigdame n kẽnd dũniyã zĩ-zãonglsã zutu." 
Micah1:4 Tãmsã yẽnegda bãmb naoã tẽngre, tɩ tẽn-nabdrã pusd wa bugum sẽn dɩt sɩ-ribdu, la wa koom sẽn yi tãng zug n sigda." 
Micah1:5 La bõn-kãens fãa yaa a Zakoob yagensã beegrã yĩnga, yaa Israyɛll buudã kongrã yĩnga. Yaa ãnda rãmb n kɩt tɩ Zakoob buudã beege? Ka Samaari nebã la! La ãnda rãmb n kɩt tɩ Zʋʋda buudã waoogd wẽn-naandse? Ka Zeruzalɛm nebã la!" 
Micah1:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Samaari tẽngã lebg raboogo, la reezẽ pʋʋgo. M na n kɩtame tɩ Samaari tẽngã kugã bilim n dʋʋg tãn-longã pʋga, la m kɩt tɩ tẽngã meeb yẽbgr puki." 
Micah1:7 B na n pãba a wẽn-naandsã fãa n wã, n wʋk a paoongã fãa n yõog bugum, mam na n sãama b wẽn-naandsã, bala teedã bãmb sẽn tigmã fãa, yaa ne bãmb yoobã yaood la b rɩk n da. La b na n dɩka bõn-kãens n tɩ yao pʋg-yoaadba.»" 
Micah1:8 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ maam a Miise na n yãb n wiisi, n piid m neooda n kẽn nao-zaal la beelle. Mam na n yãbame n wiis wa we-baaga, m na n yãba wa naneoong kamba." 
Micah1:9 Samaari sẽn paam sɩbgr ningã sãam-a-la zãnga. La a sãoongã sãag n ta Zʋʋda, a sãag n ta m nebã tẽng dignoorẽ Zeruzalɛm." 
Micah1:10 Da moon-y kiba-kãng Gat tẽngã pʋg ye, ra yãb-y Ako tẽngã pʋg ye. Mam na n bilma tomẽ Bɛt-Leyafra." 
Micah1:11 Safɩɩr tẽng nebã, loog-y zaal ne yãnde, Sahanan tẽng nebã ka saagd n na n yi ye. Bɛt-Esɛll tẽng nebã wiisg yĩng kɩtame, tɩ yãmb ka tõe n paam a sõngr ye." 
Micah1:12 Maarot tẽng nebã maanda yɩɩre, ne b vɩɩmã sẽn na n yɩ-a soaba. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩtame tɩ toog wa, la a taa Zeruzalɛm tẽngã rignoyã." 
Micah1:13 Lakɩɩs tẽng nebã, sog-y wiidã saar-dãmba, Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã beegr sɩnga ne yãmba, bala, b yãame tɩ yaa yãmb n kɩte, tɩ Israyɛll nebã maan yel-wẽnã." 
Micah1:14 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ yãmb ne Moresɛt-Gat tẽng nebã tog n bas taaba. Ade, Akziib rotã na n yɩɩ belgr dot Israyɛll rĩm-dãmbã yĩnga." 
Micah1:15 Maaresa nebã! Mam na n leb n kɩtame tɩ ned a to wa soog yãmba. Israyɛll ziirã na n loog n taa hal Adulam. 
Micah1:16 Zʋʋda nebã! Wõrs-y y zoobdã, põng-y y zutã, kõog-y y zutã koɛbla, wa yɩbreng zugu, y kom-nongdsã yĩnga, bala, b na n yõg-b lame n tall n kẽng yembd n zãag ne yãmba." 
Micah2:1 Toog bee neb nins sẽn tagsd n dat n maan wẽngã zutu. Bãmb gãe b gãagẽ n saagd wẽnga, tɩ beoog sã n vẽeg bɩ b pids-a, bãmb sẽn tar pãn-tõog n tõe n pids-a wã yĩnga." 
Micah2:2 Bãmb sã n dat ned pʋʋg n deege, b reegd-a lame. La b sã n dat ned roog n deege, b reegd-a lame n sooge. Bãmb maanda ned ne a zak rãmb pãnga, n deegd bũmb nins b sẽn so wã." 
Micah2:3 Yaa rẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ yaa: «Ade, mam segendame n na n sɩbg nin-bãmbã rãmba. Yãmb kõn tõog n põse, la y kõn leb n tõog n kẽn ne zu-zẽkr ye, bala, yaa toog wakate.»" 
Micah2:4 Badaare, b na n dɩka yãmb tɩ y lebg yel-bũndi, la b pʋt sũ-sãang yɩɩl yãmb wɛɛngẽ n yetẽ, «Ade, b sãama tõnd zãng fasɩ! B reesda mam nebã zĩisi! Maana a wãn tɩ b wa reesd tõnd zĩisi? B reesa tõnd pʋtã n pʋɩ kɩɩsdba!»" 
Micah2:5 Yaa rẽ tɩ Wẽnnaam nebã sã n wa pʋɩt b zĩisã, yãmb sʋkã ned ba a yembr kõn paam pʋɩɩr ye." 
Micah2:6 B rag n zʋbsdame n yetẽ: «Da-y zʋbs-y ye, da-y zʋbs-y-yã a woto tɩ wẽnd wa tõnd paoogrã ka na n tol n sɛ ye." 
Micah2:7 Zakoob yagense, rẽ yĩnga, d tog n goma a woto sɩda? Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-marã sɛɛme la? Bãmb minim n maanda a woto sɩda? Rẽ yĩnga, mam goamã ka gom-nood ned ning sẽn kẽnd-a tɩrlem pʋg yĩng sɩda?»" 
Micah2:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Sẽn nan ka kaoose, yãmb yikame n lebg mam nebã bɛɛba. Bala, neb sã n yi zabr zĩigẽ n wat ne bãane, yãmb yekd-b lame n yeesd b fu-tagdã." 
Micah2:9 Yãmb digda mam nebã pagba, tɩ ned kam fãa yi n bas a roog a sẽn nonge. La mam sẽn kõ b kambã waoogr ningã, yãmb yiisd-a-la wakat fãa yĩnga." 
Micah2:10 Yik-y n loog-y tɩ yãmb ka leb n tõe n paam vʋʋsg zĩ-kãngã ye. Yãmb tʋʋm-dẽgdã yĩnga, y na n sãamame, la sãoongã na n yɩɩ kãsenga.»" 
Micah2:11 Ned sã n yik a meng yĩng n yagd zĩrẽ n yeele: «Yãmb sã n kõ maam reezẽ rãam la rã-toos tɩ m yũ, mam na n togsa pĩnd-n-bãngr goam y yĩnga» yaa nin-kãng soabã n tog ne yãmba." 
Micah2:12 N-yẽe, mam na n tigma yãmb fãa sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagensã, la m tigim Israyɛll bu-kellã. Mam na n tigma bãmb wa piis sẽn be yãgr pʋgẽ, la wa rũms sẽn be b wãbneg zĩigẽ. B na n leb n wʋma neb rãamd tẽngã pʋga." 
Micah2:13 Sẽn pakd-a sorã na n lʋɩɩ bãmb taoore, la b na n paka sorã n yi be n looge. Bãmb dĩma yiime n be bãmb taoore, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab bee bãmb taoore." 
Micah3:1 Maam a Miise yetame: «A Zakoob yagensã taoor dãmba, Israyɛll buudã nanambse, m kot-y lame tɩ y kelge! Dẽ yĩnga, ka yãmb n dag n tog n bãng sẽn yaa tɩrg sɩda?" 
Micah3:2 Yãmb yaool n kisa sẽn yaa sõama, la y nong sẽn yaa wẽnga. Yãmb sɩɩda m nebã n yãgsd b gãndã, la y seend b yĩngã nemd n basd kõaba." 
Micah3:3 Bãmb wãbda mam nebã, Bãmb puunda b gãndã, la b wõrd b kõabã. Bãmb beesd-b-la wa nemd sẽn be rʋkẽ, wa nemd sẽn be bugum dʋkẽ." 
Micah3:4 Dẽ, bãmb na n wa kelem n boola Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka na n leok bãmb ye. Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n solga b nengã ne bãmba, wẽng ning bãmb sẽn maanã yĩnga.»" 
Micah3:5 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet no-rɛɛsdb nins sẽn tudgd mam nebã: «B sã n kõ bãmb tɩ b rɩ, b yetame tɩ yell kae ye. La b sã n ka kõ bãmb tɩ b rɩ, bãmb yikda zabr ne a soabã." 
Micah3:6 Bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame, tɩ na n lebg wa yʋng yãmb yĩnga, la y ka na n leb n paam vẽnegr ye. Na n lebga lik bida yãmb yĩnga, tɩ y ka leb n tõe n paam yãab ye. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ zĩigã sobg no-rɛɛsdb-kãens yĩnga, la daarã na n lebga lik b yĩnga." 
Micah3:7 Bãngdbã fãa na n paama yãnde, la bagbã na n paama paoogre, bãmb fãa na n luda b nemsã, yãndã yĩnga. Bala, Wẽnnaam ka na n leb n leokd-b ye.»" 
Micah3:8 La sã n yaa ne maam a Miise, Wẽnnaam Sɩɩgã pid-m-la ne pãnga, la tɩrlem, ne raoodo, tɩ m tõe n togs a Zakoob yagensã b kongrã, la m wilg Israyɛll nebã b yel-wẽnã." 
Micah3:9 Zakoob yagensã taoor dãmba, Israyɛll buudã nanambse, m kot-y lame tɩ y kelge! Yãmb dãmb sẽn kis tɩrlem, la y golemd sẽn yaa tɩrgã!" 
Micah3:10 Yãmb daagda zɩɩm n met Sɩyõ, la y maand zãmb n met Zeruzalɛm." 
Micah3:11 Zeruzalɛm nanambsã reegda kũun n yaool n kao bʋʋdo. Bãmb maan-kʋʋdbã zãmsda nebã n deegd yaoodo, la b no-rɛɛsdbã togsda pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã n deegd wanzuri. Bãmb yaool n tika Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yetẽ yaa: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn be tõnd sʋkã yĩnga, yel-beed kõn tol n paam-d ye.»" 
Micah3:12 Woto, yãmb yel-manesmã yĩng kɩtame, tɩ Sɩyõ na n lebg wa pʋʋg b sẽn gudgi. N-yẽe! Zeruzalɛm na n lebga raboogo, tɩ tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn be-a zugã lebg kãgre." 
Micah4:1 Wakat n wate, tɩ tãng ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã sẽn tilg a zugã na n lug n yɩɩg tãms taabã, la a na n zẽkame t'a zãntlmã yɩɩg kunkubã zãntlem, La nebã na n zoe n waa beenẽ." 
Micah4:2 Buud wʋsg na n dabda beenẽ la b yetẽ: «Wa-y tɩ d rʋ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tãngã zugu, a Zakoob Wẽnnaamã roogẽ! Bãmb na n wilga tõnd b soayã, la tõnd na n tũu bãmb so-bugsã. Bala, bãmb tõogã na n yii Sɩyõ, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab gomdã na n yii Zeruzalɛm wa." 
Micah4:3 Bãmb na n yɩɩ neb wʋsg bʋ-kaooda, bãmb na n yɩɩ buud nins sẽn tar pãngã zab-paasda, baa ne sẽn be-b zĩ-zãrsã. B na n dɩka b zabr sʋʋsã n kud wãgse, la b rɩk b kãnã n kud goeto. Buud kõn tol n leb n yik zabr ne a to ye, la b kõn leb n zãms zabr sẽn zabd to-to ye." 
Micah4:4 Ned kam fãa na n zĩnda a reezẽ tɩɩg ne a kankang tẽngre, tɩ ned ka be n tõe n kẽes-b rabeem ye. Yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã meng noor n yeele.»" 
Micah4:5 Buud a taabã ned kam fãa kẽnda ne a wẽnnaam yʋʋre, la tõndo, tõnd kẽnda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab daar fãa, la wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Micah4:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, mam na n tigma sẽn dag n keoosd-bã, la m tigim sẽn dag n sãeeg-bã, ne m sẽn dag n sɩbg-b rãmbã." 
Micah4:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sẽn keoosd-bã yɩ bu-kelle, la m kɩt tɩ sẽn sãeeg-bã yɩ buud sẽn tar pãnga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ bãmb rĩm Sɩyõ tãngã zugu, sẽn sɩng ne moasã, hal tɩ ta wakat sẽn ka sɛta." 
Micah4:8 Foom, fo yaa gãsg piisã yĩnga. Sɩyõ tẽn-neer kunkubga, fo yaa pãng zĩiga. Fo na n leb n paama f pĩnd rĩungã. Zeruzalɛm, fo na n leb n lebga soolmã na-tẽnga.»" 
Micah4:9 Moasã, bõe yĩng tɩ f kelemdẽ? Fo ka leb n tar dĩm la? Fo sagendã kiime n bas-f tɩ toog tar-f wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem la?" 
Micah4:10 Zeruzalɛm tẽn-neere, yãbe, la f kũs wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem! Bala, moasã, fo na n yi n basa tẽngã, n tɩ zĩnd weoogẽ, la fo na n kẽnga hal Babilonde. Yaa beenẽ la b na fãag foom, yaa beenẽ la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n deeg foom f bɛɛbã nugẽ." 
Micah4:11 Ade, moasã, buud wʋsg tigma taab n na n zab ne foom. Bãmb yetame: «Bɩ Sɩyõ paam paoogre! Bɩ a yɩ bõn-gɛtl tõnd nifẽ!»" 
Micah4:12 Gese, nin-bãmbã ka mi Sẽn-Ka-Saab tagsgã ye, la b ka wʋmd b sẽn saagd n dat n maanã võor ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab tigma bãmb wa b sẽn kals bɩle n ning zɛɛgẽ," 
Micah4:13 Sɩyõ tẽn-neere! Yik n tab koodã! Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yɩɩlã lebg kut yɩɩla, la m kɩt tɩ f nao-bendã lebg zũud nao-bendo, fo na n taba buud wʋsg neb n bedse, n dɩk b zãmbã teed n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b arzegsã n kõ dũniyã fãa soaalã." 
Micah4:14 Moasã, Zeruzalɛm dãmba, bog-y y yĩnsã! Bɛɛbã gũbga tõndo, la b na n wẽe Israyɛll bʋ-kaoodã yɛgdg ne dasaare." 
Micah5:1 «Foom Betlehɛm Efrata, baa ne fo sẽn yaa buud sẽn paood Zʋʋda buud wʋsg sʋkã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ naab yi fo pʋgẽ, n soog Israyɛll nebã, La yẽnda yẽgrã sɩnga hal pĩnda, kʋdem-wẽndẽ." 
Micah5:2 Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n bas Israyɛll nebã, hal tɩ pag ning sẽn na n dog-a wã roge. Dẽ poore, yẽnda saam-biisã sẽn kellã, na n lebg n leba Israyɛll nebã nengẽ." 
Micah5:3 La yẽnda na n yikame n ges a nebã yell ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab pãnga, wa pe-kɩɩm sẽn dɩlgd a piisi. Yẽnda na n gesa b yell ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yẽnda Wẽnnaamã yʋʋr sẽn tar ziirã, la yẽnda nebã nan zĩnda be. Bala, moasã, bãmb na n yɩɩ kãseng dũniyã tɛk fãa." 
Micah5:4 La yẽnda na n waa ne vɩ-bãane! Asiiri nebã sã n wa yãmb tõnd tẽngã, la b kẽ d na-yiyã pʋse, tõnd na n kɩtame tɩ nanambs a yopoe, ne nin-kãsems a nii zab ne-ba." 
Micah5:5 Bãmb na n sooga Asiiri tẽngã ne zabr sʋʋga, la a Nimrood tẽngã neb ne munumuni.»" 
Micah5:6 A Zakoob buudã neb nins sẽn kellã na yɩɩ wa meenem sẽn yit Sẽn-Ka-Saab nengẽ buud wʋsg sʋka, la wa saag sẽn madgd moodo. Bãmb ka teeg ninsaal pãnga, la b ka baood baa fɩ ninsaalb nengẽ ye." 
Micah5:7 A Zakoob buudã neb nins sẽn kellã, sẽn be bu-zẽms sʋk ne buud wʋsg sʋkã na n yɩɩ wa gɩgemd sẽn be we-rũms sʋka. Bãmb na n yɩɩ wa gɩgem-poll sẽn be piis sʋka, n pɩʋʋgd n tabd n tat n gʋsda, tɩ ned ka be n na n fãag-b ye." 
Micah5:8 Israyɛll nebã! Yik-y n zab-y ne y zabd-n-taasã, la y menes y bɛɛbã zãnga!" 
Micah5:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, badaare, mam na n menesa y wiidã, la m sãam y saar-dãmbã." 
Micah5:10 Mam na n menesa y soolmã tẽmsã, la m lub y pãng zĩisã fãa." 
Micah5:11 Mam na n menesa y tɩtã tʋʋma, la bag-bʋgd kõn leb n zĩnd yãmb sʋk ye." 
Micah5:12 M na n menesa y bõn-naandsã fãa, la y kug-vigindsã. Yãmb kõn leb n wõgemd n waoog bũmb nins yãmb nus sẽn naanã ye." 
Micah5:13 Mam na n vigsa a Aseera ra-lugdsã, la m sãam y tẽmsã." 
Micah5:14 Mam na n doka m sũurã ne bu-zẽms nins sẽn ka kelg maamã ne sũ-yikri, la sũ-puug-kãsenga.»" 
Micah6:1 M kotame tɩ y kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yeta: «Togs-y yẽgengã võore, tɩ tãmsã ne kunkubã kelge!»" 
Micah6:2 Tãmse! Kelg-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn bʋʋd ne b nebã. Yãmb sẽn yaa tẽngã yẽbgr sẽn be wakat fãa wã, kelg-y-yã! Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab rat n bʋʋ ne m nebã, la m tara yell ne Israyɛlle." 
Micah6:3 Mam nebã, m maan-y-la bõe? M nams-y-la ne bõe? Leok-y-ma!" 
Micah6:4 Bala, mam yiisa yãmb Ezɩpt tẽnga. Mam fãaga yãmb y yembdã pʋga. Mam tʋma a Moyiis ne a Aarõ, la a Miryam tɩ b wa lʋɩ yãmb taoore." 
Micah6:5 Mam nebã, m kotame tɩ y tẽeg Moaab rĩm a Balak sẽn dag n sagl a Balaam t'a maan bũmb ningã, la a Bewoor biig a Balaam sẽn leok yẽnda to-to wã. Tẽeg-y bũmb nins sẽn maan yãmb y sẽn wa n na n pɩʋʋg Sitim n kẽng Gilgallã yelle, tɩ yãmb tõe n bãng tɩ maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn maan bũmb ninsã zemsame." 
Micah6:6 Bõe la mam na n tall n kẽng Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore? M na n talla bõe n tɩ wõgemd Wẽnnaam sẽn be saasẽ wã taoore? Mam na n waa bãmb taoor ne maand sẽn yõogd bugum bɩ? Bɩ m na n waa bãmb taoor ne nag-bi sẽn tar yʋʋmde? 
Micah6:7 Mam sã n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saab pe-raad tusa, wall m kõ-b kaam sẽn yaa wʋsg wa ko-zoetem, bãmb sũur na n yɩɩ noog bɩ? Mam na n dɩka m bi-rẽeng n kõ-b n paam m beegrã sugr bɩ? Mam na n dɩka m bi-roak n kõ-b n paam m yel-wẽnã sugri bɩ?" 
Micah6:8 Ninsaala, b kɩtame tɩ fo bãng sẽn yaa sõamã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn dat tɩ f maan bũmb ning bala, yaa tɩ f maan sẽn yaa tɩrga, la f nong maan-neere, la f kẽn ne f Wẽnnaamã ne sik-m-menga." 
Micah6:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg moonda tẽnga pʋgẽ, sẽn tar-b yamã zoeta bãmb yʋʋrã. Kelg-y sɩbgr koɛɛga" 
Micah6:10 Dẽ yĩnga, mam na n sakame tɩ nin-wẽnsã tigsd laog b sẽn paam ne zãmbã, la bãmb tar zãmb-makdsã n magd tɩ yikd mam sũurã?" 
Micah6:11 Mam tõe n kõ neb nins sẽn tar-b zãmb makdsã bʋʋm sɩda? 
Micah6:12 Tẽngã arzegs rãmb maanda wẽnga, tẽnga neb yagda zĩrẽ, bãmb noyã gomda belgr goamã." 
Micah6:13 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ mam me na n sɩbg yãmb tɩ y namse, la m sãam yãmb y yel-wẽnã yĩnga." 
Micah6:14 Yãmb na n dɩɩme, la y kõn tɩg ye, kom na n ket n tara yãmba! Yamb na n kẽgsame, la y kõn yã zĩig n bĩng ye, la bũmb ning fo sẽn bĩngã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ b zab ne yãmb n deeg-a." 
Micah6:15 Yãmb na n bʋdame, la y kõn kẽeb ye, y na n wõda oliiv kaam, la y kõn paam-a n zɛ ye, y na n wẽka reezẽ biis koom, la kõn yũ a reezẽ rãamã ye." 
Micah6:16 Nebã sakda a Omri no-tũudsã, la b rɩkd a Akaab roogã rãmb manesmã fãa, tɩ yãmb sakd bãmb saglsã. Woto yĩnga, mam na n basame tɩ y sãame, n kɩt tɩ y lebg bɛɛb laada, la mam nebã paoogr na n lʋɩɩ yãmb zugu." 
Micah7:1 Toog tara maam, bala, mam yaa wa ned sẽn wa n na n wob tɩ-biisi, sɩpaolg wẽnde, la wa ned sẽn wa reezẽ yiisgu, reezẽ wobr poore. Tɩ reezẽ gĩnd ba a ye ka be sẽn na n dɩ ye, la kankam-dẽems nins mam sẽn nongã ba a ye ka be ye."
