Micah7:2 Sɩd soab ba a ye ka be tẽngã pʋg ye, la nin-tɩrg ba a ye ka be nebã sʋk ye, bãmb fãa sor n baood n daaga zɩɩm, ned kam fãa rɩgla bẽdg a saam-biig yĩnga." 
Micah7:3 Bãmb sẽn mi yaa wẽng maaneg bala. Naab ka maand neer tɩ b ka reeg bũmb ye, Bʋ-kaoodã ka kaood bʋʋd t'a ka reeg kũun ye, Nin-kãsemsã wilgda b yão-beedã, la b naagd taab n tʋmd b tʋʋm-beedo." 
Micah7:4 Bãmb sʋkã neb nins sẽn são-b b taabã yaa wa gõose. La bãmb sʋkã nin-tɩrsã wẽnda gõ-payãndse. Gũudbã sẽn dag n gomd daar ning yellã taame, yaa daar ning fo sẽn na n yals n togs f yɛlã fãa wã. Moasã, bãmb na n paama yãnde." 
Micah7:5 Da-y kɩs-y sɩd ne a zoa ye, la y ra rɩk y teegr n teeg y taab ye. Baa ne pag ning sẽn gãe gãag a ye zug ne foomã taoore, bɩ y ra yaag y noor ye." 
Micah7:6 Bala, bi-ribl paoogda a ba, tɩ bi-pugl zabd ne a ma, tɩ bi-pag zabd ne a sɩd ma. La ned kam fãa meng zak rãmb lebga a bɛɛba." 
Micah7:7 La sã n yaa ne maam, mam na n gũu Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n yals n gũu Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam fãagrã. Mam Wẽnnaamã na n kelga maam." 
Micah7:8 Mam bɛyã, ra maan sũ-noog mam wɛɛngẽ ye, bala, baa mam sã n lʋɩ, m yikdame. La baa mam sã n zĩ lik pʋgẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa mam vẽenem." 
Micah7:9 Mam sẽn beeg Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yĩnga, mam na n sak n deega b sũ-puugrã, hal tɩ b wa zab n sõng maam, n lebs maam m bʋʋmã. Bãmb na n talla maam n kẽng vẽenemẽ, la m na n yãnda bãmb tɩrlem tʋʋmã." 
Micah7:10 Mam bɛ wã na n yãndame, la yãnd na n yõk-a lame. Bala, yẽnda rag n yetame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa fo Wẽnnaamã bee yɛ?» B na n taba bãmb wa sor zug begd tɩ mam yãnde." 
Micah7:11 Daar ning b sẽn na n lebs n me y tẽngã lalsã, badaare, b na n yalga yãmb tẽngã todse." 
Micah7:12 La badaare, neb na n yii sẽn sɩng ne Asiiri, la Ezɩpt tẽmsã, la sẽn sɩng ne Nill kʋɩlgã n tãag Efrat kʋɩlgã, la sẽn sɩng ne ko-kãsengã noor n tãag a to, sẽn sɩng ne tãng a yembr n tãag a to n wa fo nengẽ." 
Micah7:13 La dũni wã fãa sẽn kellã na n sãamame, tẽngã nebã tʋʋm-wẽnsã yĩnga." 
Micah7:14 Dɩk-y y dasaarã n tɛ y nebã, yãmb nebã yaa yãmb n so, Bãmb zĩ b yembr kãgrẽ, tɩ b pʋtã gũbg-ba. Tall-y-b wa pĩndã, n tɩ wãbneg Basan ne Galaad tẽmsã mo-maasẽ wã." 
Micah7:15 Mam na n wilga bãmb tʋʋm-kãsemse, wa wakat ning mam sẽn dag n yiis bãmb Ezɩpt tẽngã." 
Micah7:16 Buud a taabã baa ne b pãnga sẽn yaa to-to wã fãa, na n yãnda bõn-kãens tɩ yãnd yõk-ba. Bãmb na n pĩ b noyã, la b tʋbã ka na n leb n wʋm ye." 
Micah7:17 Bãmb na n moga tẽngã tom wa wiisi, wa tẽngã bõn-vuuds buudã fãa, bãmb na n yii b pãng zĩisẽ wã ne rigbu, n wa yãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa tõnd Wẽnnaamã nengẽ, la bãmb na n yɛɛsame n zoe yãmba." 
Micah7:18 Wẽnnaam-bʋg n be n yaa wa yãmba, n kõt bu-kellã sẽn yaa yãmb dẽndã a beegr sugri, la a ka geelgd a kongrã? Yãmb sũ-yikrã ka paad wakat fãa ye. Bala, y sũur noomame tɩ wilg y sõmblem." 
Micah7:19 Yãmb na n leb n zoee tõnd nimbãanega, la y ka na n leb n geelg tõnd kongrã ye. Yãmb na n loba tõnd yel-wẽnã fãa ko-kãsenga zĩ-zulums pʋga." 
Micah7:20 Yãmb na n wilga a Zakoob yagensã y nonglem, la y wilg a Abrahaam yagensã y sõmblem, wa y sẽn dag n wẽen ne d yaab-rãmbã kʋdem-wẽndẽ wã." 
Nahum1:1 Seb-kãngã yaa sɩbgr koɛɛg sẽn kẽed ne Niniiv tẽngã wɛɛngẽ. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n vẽneg Ɛlkoos tẽng rao a Nahum koe-kãngã. 
Nahum1:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn ka rat tɩ b rɩk bãmb waoogrã n kõ Wẽnnaam a to ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab rokda b sũuri, bãmb sũ-puug-kãsengã pʋga. Bãmb dokda b sũur ne kɩɩsdbã. Bãmb ka basd b bɛɛbã taal ye." 
Nahum1:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sũ-mar soaba. Bãmb pãngã yaa kãsenga. Bãmb ka basd koangd n ka sɩbg-a ye. Bãmb sã n kẽnda, sob-kãseng n yikdi." 
Nahum1:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sã n tãs ko-kãsengã, a kʋɩtame Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ kʋɩlsã fãa kʋɩtẽ, tɩ Basan yam-maasã kʋɩtẽ, tɩ Karmell tãngã lʋgrẽ yamdã zelgdẽ, tɩ Libã tɩ-puudã kʋɩtẽ." 
Nahum1:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab kẽnda tãmsã zut tɩ b miimdẽ, tɩ kunkubã sirgdẽ. Bãmb tabda tẽn-gãongã t'a wʋgemdedẽ, dũniyã gill fãa ne a nebã rigda bãmb taoore." 
Nahum1:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sã n puugi, ãnda n tõe n põse? Ãnda n tõe n põs bãmb sũ-puugrã? Bãmb sũ-puugrã rɩta wa bugum, tɩ baa pĩig kugã pusd bãmb taoore" 
Nahum1:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa sõngo, bãmb yaa zĩ-lilldg yel-pakr wakate. Bãmb geta sẽn solgd-b bãmb nengẽ wã yelle." 
Nahum1:8 La wa koom sẽn kãagd bũmb fãa to-to n loogdẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n menesa b bɛɛbã zãnga. Bãmb na n dig-b lame n tɩ kʋ-b zãng fasɩ." 
Nahum1:9 Saag-wẽn-bʋs la yãmb saagd ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo? Bãmb na n menesa b bɛɛbã yel-pakrã ka na n yɩ naoor a yiib ye. 
Nahum1:10 Baa bɛɛbã sã n kal taab wa gõose, la ba b sã n yũu rãam tɩ b nens yilimdẽ, bugum n na n dɩ-b zãng wa mo-koeemse." 
Nahum1:11 Niniiv tẽnga, ned ning sẽn saagd n dat n zab ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabã yii fo pʋgẽ. Ned ning sẽn da saagd n dat n wa ne sãoongã yii fo pʋgẽ." 
Nahum1:12 Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet Zʋʋda nebã: Baa yãmb bɛɛbã fãa sã n naag taaba, baa b waooglmã ne b pãngã sẽn zem to-to, b na n menemame tɩ bũmb ka kell ye. Mam sẽn bas tɩ b namsd yãmb woto wã, Yaa sẽn na yɩl n da leb n nams yãmb ye." 
Nahum1:13 Moasã, mam na n kaoo yãmb yubl balgrã, la m kao y bãensã." 
Nahum1:14 Niniiv tẽnga, ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet fo wɛɛngẽ: «Fo yʋʋrã na n menema zãnga. Mam na n sãama f raad wẽn-naandsã, ne f kut wẽn-naandsã sẽn be f pʋʋsg roogẽ wã. Mam na n segla f yaoogo, bala, fo ka tar yõod baa bilf ye.»" 
Nahum2:1 Zʋʋda nebã, koe-toagsd n be tãmsã zut n watẽ. Yẽnda wata ne koe-noogo, la laafɩ koɛɛga! Dẽ yĩngã, bɩ y maan y tigã, la y pids y pʋlendã! Bala, sãamdã ka na n leb n pɩʋʋg yãmb sʋk ye. Yẽnda pãngã sɛɛ zãnga." 
Nahum2:2 Niniiv rãmba, tãb-biis n wat n na n zab ne yãmba, Bɩ y gũ y tẽngã lalse, la y gũ y soayã! Sẽbg-y y sɛɛga, la y paam daood n yɩ gãndaado." 
Nahum2:3 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab lebsda a Zakoob yagensã b waoogrã, la b lebsd Israyɛll a ziirã. Bala, fãadbã rag n fãa bãmba, n sãam bãmb wa b sẽn kao wila." 
Nahum2:4 Tãb-biisã gãnd yaa miidu, Gãndaadã yera fu-miidu. B saar-dãmbã b sẽn segl zabrã yĩngã pãrda wa bugum, tɩ b kãnã zẽgsdẽ." 
Nahum2:5 Saar-dãmbã zoeta soayã zut ne tʋʋlem, n pɩʋʋmd zĩisã fãa wa bug-vɩlense, la b zoeta ne tʋʋlem wa sa-yãgbo" 
Nahum2:6 Niniiv rĩmã tigsda a tãb-bi-gãndaadã, la b kẽndame n lagsdẽ. Zab-zabdbã zoet n wata tẽngã lalg sẽnẽ, la b soonda lalgã poore." 
Nahum2:7 Tẽngã rignoy nins sẽn tees kʋɩlsã sẽnẽ wã pagsame, la na-yirã neb pɛleng yɩkame tɩ b rigda." 
Nahum2:8 B rɩka wẽn-poakã naandã n looge, t'a tʋmtʋmd-pogsã wũusd wa manwala, n pĩisd b yãado." 
Nahum2:9 Niniiv tẽngã lebga wa ko-baoor sẽn wurg t'a koomã raagdẽ, B boonda tãb-biisã sẽn zoetã n yetẽ: «Yals-y-yã! Yals-y-yã!» La bãmb ned ba a yembr ka wẽnemded a poorẽ ye." 
Nahum2:10 B rag n yetame: «Zɛ-y wanzuri wã! Zɛ-y sãnemã!» Tẽngã laogã ka tar tɛk ye. Laog buud toor-toor sẽn tar yõod bee be. 
Nahum2:11 Zɛɛbo! Wãabo! Sãoongo! Nebã fãa raood sɛɛme, tɩ b rũmã pãbd taaba. Bãmb digda ne rabeem, tɩ b nensã bondge." 
Nahum2:12 Gɩgma wã gãag zĩig bee yɛ? Gɩgem-poalã sẽn dag n paamd b rɩɩb ziig ningã bee yɛ? Gɩgem-daoogã ne gɩgem-yãangã sã n da yi n bas gɩgem-bi wã, ned ka be n na n saag n sɩɩs-b ye." 
Nahum2:13 Gɩgem-daoogã rag n yit n yõgd n gʋsdame, n wat n kõt gɩgem-yãangã ne gɩgem-bi wã, gɩgemdã gãag zĩig pida ne rũms a sẽn yõg nemdo." 
Nahum2:14 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Niniiv tẽnga, mam na n zaba ne foom! Mam na n ninga fo saar-dãmbã bugum, la fo kom-bɩɩsã sẽn yaa wa gɩgem-poalã na n paa tãp pʋgẽ. Fo kõn leb n tõog n fã dũniyã nebã paoong yɛs ye. La b kõn leb n wʋm fo koe-toagsdbã rãamd ye.»" 
Nahum3:1 Ade, tẽng ning sẽn daagd-a zɩɩmã na paam toogo! Yẽnda pida ne zãmb la fãabo, la a ka basd a fãabã ye." 
Nahum3:2 Tẽngã pʋga, b wʋmda kalwaas-rãmb sẽn fɩɩnde, ne saar-dãmb nao rãamde, la wiid nao-kida, la zabr saar-dãmb bʋrgo." 
Nahum3:3 Zabrã yikame, Zab-zabdbã sʋʋs pɩndame, tɩ kãnã pɩʋʋmd wa sa-yãgbo. Kũumã rʋra zĩigã fãa, kũumã zama taaba. B sõorã ka tar tɛk ye. Naoor sẽn tabgdẽ fãa yaa kũum." 
Nahum3:4 La rẽ fãa yaa pʋg-yoodrã yoobã yĩnga. Yẽnda maana yoob naoor ka tɛka, la yẽnda rɩka a neermã n belg buud a taabã. Yẽnda maana sɩlem n tus buud a taabã, n kẽes yembd pʋga." 
Nahum3:5 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetẽ yaa: Mam na n zaba ne foom! Mam na n pilga f fuugã n tãag f nengã, tɩ buud a taabã yãnd f sẽn yaa zaalã, tɩ soolem-dãmbã yã f yãndã." 
Nahum3:6 Mam na n vu-f-la begdẽ, n ning f yãnd nebã nifẽ." 
Nahum3:7 Woto, ned ning sẽn yãnd-a foom fãa, a na n loba a neng kɛɛng n yeele: «Niniiv tẽnga, fo sãamame. Ãnda n na n yãb-fo? M na n yãnda bɛlsd yɛɛnẽ n kõ-fo?»" 
Nahum3:8 Niniiv tẽnga, fo sãoo No-Amon tẽngã Nill kʋɩlgã sẽn dag n gũbgã la? Ko-kãseng n dag n yaa yẽnda lal-gũbri." 
Nahum3:9 Kuus ne Ezɩpt n dag n kõt yẽnda teegre, la Put ne Libi n dag n sõngd yẽnda zabr wakate." 
Nahum3:10 La ne rẽ fãa, b yõga No-Amon tẽng nebã, n tall-b n tɩ kẽes yembdo. Bãmb bɛɛbã neema bãmb kom-pogdã so-tiisẽ, la b yõg a nanambsã n sẽb ne bãense. Gãndaadã yõga bãmb kãsem-dãmbã, n pʋɩ taab n maan-b yembse." 
Nahum3:11 Niniiv tẽnga, fo me neng na n yilma wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam, la fo na n baoo zĩig sẽn na soonde, sẽn na yɩl n paam n põs f bɛɛbã." 
Nahum3:12 Fo lalsã fãa yaa wa kankang bi-rẽems sẽn bɩ, tɩ b sã n miimd-a bɩ a kankamã lʋɩt sẽn dat-a n dɩ fãa noorẽ." 
Nahum3:13 Ade, fo tãb-biisã yaa nin-saan-pagb gilli. Fo rignoyã pagsa b toore, tɩ f bɛɛbã tũud be n kẽedẽ. Bugum dɩta fo rignoyã kʋɩlen-kũyã." 
Nahum3:14 Niniiv tẽnga, Wi koom n bĩng zabrã yĩnga! Maneg f lalsã n me! Kẽ begdẽ n tab tãndo, La f rɩk f tãn-koeem-wamã!" 
Nahum3:15 La baa ne rẽ fãa, bãng tɩ bugum n na n dɩ-fo. Fo na n paa tãpẽ! Bugmã na n dɩ-f-la wa kalwaar sẽn dɩt koodo. Bɩ fo nebã zama taab wa kalwaare! Bɩ b zam taab wa sʋyã!" 
Nahum3:16 Niniiv tẽnga, fo lɛɛbdbã sõor dag n lebga wʋsgo, tɩ b sõorã yɩɩd yĩngr ãdse, n yẽnegd wa kalwaar sẽn dɩ bɩle n sɛ n bas n yɩke." 
Nahum3:17 Fo rigno-gũudbã rag n yaa wʋsg wa sʋyã, tɩ fo tʋmtʋmdbã rag n yaa wʋsg wa kalwaare, tɩ zĩig sã n maage, bɩ b rʋʋgd tuud zutu. La sõorã sã n puki, b yɩkdame tɩ ned ka mi b sẽn teesẽ ye." 
Nahum3:18 Asiiri rĩma, fo kombɛɛmbã gõeeme. Fo gãndaadã ka leb n maand rãamd ye! Fo nebã sãeegame n be tãmsã zutu, tɩ ned ka be n na n tigim-b ye." 
Nahum3:19 Fo poglgã ka tar tɩɩm ye, Fo nodrã na n tũu ne f yõore. Neb nins fãa sẽn na n wʋm tɩ b gomd fo yellã na n maana sũ-noogo, bala, ãnda n be tɩ fo ka maan-a wẽnga?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Ad sɩbgr koɛɛg Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Habakuk sẽn deeg vẽnegr pʋgẽ. 
Habakkuk1:2 B yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam na n kelem n boola yãmb n kos sõngr tɩ ta dabʋre, tɩ y yaool n kelg-ma? Mam na n kelem n boola yãmb tɩ y fãag-d ne wõr-taabã tɩ ta dabʋre, tɩ y yaool n fãag-do?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb bas tɩ m yãt tʋʋm-wẽnsã, bõe yĩng tɩ y get tõnd tɩ d be namsg pʋga? Sãoong ne wõr-taabã gũbga maam. Lebga zab taaba, tɩ nokoɛɛmã rãamd zẽkdẽ." 
Habakkuk1:4 Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n sakd tõogã ye. Bʋ-tɩrg ka tol n leb n beẽ ye, bala, nin-wẽnsã gũbga nin-tɩrga. Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ bʋ-kɛgã reeg bʋ-tɩrsã zĩiga.»" 
Habakkuk1:5 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela b nebã yaa: «Ges-y bu-zẽmsã sʋka, ges-y tɩ y pɛleng yɩke, tɩ yɩ lingr ne-yã. Bala, bũmb n maand yãmb wakate, la b sã n dag n yeel yãmba, yãmb ka na n tẽ ye." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Kalde rãmbã sẽn yaa nin-toose, la nin-wẽnsã paam pãnga. Bãmb pɩʋʋgda soolem-kãsemse, n deesd zĩis n soogdẽ, tɩ yaool n ka bãmb dẽnd ye." 
Habakkuk1:7 Bu-kãng yaa bu-toaaga, la b seka zoeese. Yẽnda viginda a meng tɩrlem ne a naam." 
Habakkuk1:8 Yẽnda wiidã zoees tʋʋlem yɩɩda ãbga, bãmb zabdame n yɩɩd zaab-noor kata. Bãmb wed-rʋʋdbã yita zĩ-zãrgẽ n fõt n watẽ, b yɩgda wa pa-nand-tugr sẽn fõt n wat n na n dɩk a rɩɩbo." 
Habakkuk1:9 Kalde rãmbã fãa watame n dat n wõre. Bãmb naka b neng n tees tɩrg bala. Bãmb yõga neb sẽn yaa wʋsg wa bĩisr n maan yembse. 
Habakkuk1:10 Bu-kãng toog ka be ne rĩm-dãmba, la b laada nanambse. Bãmb ka yɛɛsd tẽms sẽn gũbg ne lals ye. Bãmb zamda tãnd n dʋʋd n deesd tẽn-bãmba." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bãmb pɩʋʋgd n loogda wa sob-raoogo, b maanda wẽnga, la bãmb pãngã n yaa b Wẽnnaam!»" 
Habakkuk1:12 Mam Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, m Pʋ-Peelem-Soaba, ka yãmb n sɩng n be hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ la? Tõnd ka na n ki ye! Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yãmb n yãk Babilond nebã tɩ b kao tõnd bʋʋdo. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa m Pĩig Kugri, yãmb n yãk bãmb tɩ b sɩbg tõndo." 
Habakkuk1:13 Yãmb ninã yaa yɩlem wʋsgo, n ka tõe n ges wẽng ye. Yãmb ka tõe n sak n getẽ tɩ b maand wẽngã ye. La yaa bõe yĩng tɩ y sĩnd n get zãmb dãmbã? Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb sĩnd n getẽ tɩ nin-wẽng sãamd sẽn yaa-a tɩrg n yɩɩd yẽnda wã?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Yãmb maanda ninsaalbã wa ko-kãsengã pʋgẽ zĩma, y maand-b-la wa bõn-kẽndsã sẽn ka tar soaalã!" 
Habakkuk1:15 Babilond nebã yõgda bãmb fãa wa b sẽn yõgd zĩm ne lɛooga. B vuuga bãmb ne gãmbr n yiisi, n yãgsd bãmb n ningd zũnunsẽ, n maand sũ-noog n kɩdemdẽ." 
Habakkuk1:16 Rẽ kɩtame, tɩ b maand maand b gãmba wã yĩnga, la b yõogd wisd n kõt b zũnunsã. B yetame tɩ yaa bãmb yĩng la b paam naare, bãmb yĩng la b paam rɩ-nood n dɩtẽ." 
Habakkuk1:17 Rẽ yĩnga, b na n tara b gãmba wã zukri, la b tar buud a taabã n sãamdẽ tɩ nimbãan-zoeer ka beẽ?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Mam na n dʋʋ m gũubã zĩigẽ, la m na n yalsa lalgã zugu. Mam na n gũume n ges Wẽnnaam sẽn na n yeel maam tɩ bũmb ninga, la mam me sẽn na n leok tɩ bũmb ning m yẽgengã wɛɛngẽ." 
Habakkuk2:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka maam n yeele: «Gʋls vẽnegr ning fo sẽn yã wã, gʋls-a vẽeneg kug-wals zutu, t'a kaoreng tõe n yɩ naana." 
Habakkuk2:3 Bala, yaa vẽnegr sẽn na n wa paam pidsgu, a wakatã sã n ta, ka na n yɩ belgr ye, la a ka na n vaal n ka pids ye. Ba a sã n kaoosdẽ, bɩ f kell n gũ-a, bala, a ka na n pa n ka paam pidsg ye.»" 
Habakkuk2:4 «Gese, bãmb wukda b mense, n ka maand sẽn yaa tɩrg ye, la nin-tɩrg na n vɩɩmda a tẽebã yĩnga." 
Habakkuk2:5 Hakɩɩka, reezẽ rãam belgda neda, wuk-m-meng soab ka zĩ sɩɩ ye. Bãmb yaaga b noy wa kɩɩm-kulgu, bãmb yaa wa kũum sẽn ka tɩgdã. B kãaga bu-zẽmsã fãa n naag b menga, bãmb tigma buud toay-toayã fãa b nengẽ.»" 
Habakkuk2:6 Bu-bãmb fãa na n wẽneg n yaala bãmba, n dɩk-b tɩ b lebg yel-bũndi. Bãmb na n yetame: «Gese, toog bee ned ning sẽn wʋkd a sẽn ka so zugu, yãmb na n fãa nebã hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Yaa sam bal la a wʋkd n samd a menga!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Yãmb sẽn tar-b rãmb samã na n wa ling-y lame, bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ y rig ne rabeem. Bãmb me na n fãa yãmb paoongã!" 
Habakkuk2:8 Yãmb sẽn fã buud toay-toay paoongã yĩnga, neb nins sẽn ketã na n fãa yãmba. Bala, yãmb daaga zɩɩm, la y maan tẽms a taabã pãnga, n maan tẽmsã ne b nebã fãa wẽnga.»" 
Habakkuk2:9 «Toog bee ned ning sẽn zãmbd a taab n baood yõod a roagdb yĩngã zugu. Yẽnda maanda a woto sẽn na n yɩl n kogl a menga, wa liuul sẽn tɩʋ a tʋk zĩ-zãonglgẽ, tɩ bũmb da wa maan-a ye." 
Habakkuk2:10 Woto yaa yãnd bal la yãmb bao n na n kõ y buudã. Yãmb sẽn sãam buud wʋsg nebã, yaa yell bal la y rogend y meng zugu." 
Habakkuk2:11 Baa kugã sẽn be lalsã zutã na n kelmame, tɩ sug-raoogã sẽn be sugrã zugã reesdẽ.»" 
Habakkuk2:12 «Toog bee ned ning sẽn daagd zɩɩm n met tẽngã zugu. Toog bee ned ning sẽn maand zãmb n tilgd tẽngã zugu!» 
Habakkuk2:13 «Rẽ ka bugum sẽn yit Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã nengẽ sɩda? Ninsaalbã tʋmdame n namsd b mens zaalem bala, nebã naongã ka tar yõod ye." 
Habakkuk2:14 Bala, dũni wã na n pida ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab ziirã bãngre, wa ko-kãsengã koom sẽn pid n saalã.»" 
Habakkuk2:15 «Toog bee ned ning sẽn yũnugd a taab rãam, la a yũnugd-b zẽnem tɩ b nens yilimdẽ, t'a tõe n yãnd b yãndã zugu." 
Habakkuk2:16 Yãmb ka waoogd y mens ye, yãmb paoogda y mense. Bɩ yãmb me yũ n fʋgs y bɛɛla! Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yũnuga yãmb b sũ-puugrã rãam, tɩ yãmb waoogrã lebg paoogre!" 
Habakkuk2:17 Bala, wẽng ning yãmb sẽn maan Libã wã na n dɩ-y lame. B na n sãama rũms nins sẽn dag n sãamdã, b sẽn daag ninsaalb zɩɩmã yĩnga, b sẽn maan tẽmsã wẽngã yĩnga, yaa b sẽn maan tẽmsã ne b nebã fãa wẽngã yĩnga.»" 
Habakkuk2:18 Wẽn-naandgã yõak sẽn yõgdã yõod bee yɛɛnẽ? Yẽnda yaa kut b sẽn yẽneg bala, la a yaa belgr bũmb bala. Yõak na n maana a wãn n leb n dɩk a teegr n teeg yẽnda, tɩ yaool n yaa wẽn-naands sẽn yaa mugsi?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Toog bee ned ning sẽn gomd-a ne ra-giig n yetẽ: «Yik n yalse!» La a yet kugr sẽn ka gomdã: «Nek n yiki!» Rẽ yĩnga, yẽnda tõe n kõo ned bãngr sɩda? B bolg-a-la ne sãnem la wanzuri bala, la vɩɩm yaool n ka be a pʋgẽ ye." 
Habakkuk2:20 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab be b ro-sõngã pʋga. Bɩ dũniyã gill yɩ sɩddd... bãmb taoore! 
Habakkuk3:1 Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs a Habakuk pʋʋsgo, a yẽgengã wɛɛngẽ:" 
Habakkuk3:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, mam dag n wʋmame tɩ b gomd yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã yelle. Yãmb tʋʋm-kãsemsã kẽesa maam dabeem. Maan-y tʋʋm-kãens tõnd zamaanẽ wã. Kɩt-y tɩ tõnd zamaanẽ nebã bãng y tʋʋm-kãsemsã! La y sũ-yikrã pʋga, tẽeg-y y nimbãan-zoeerã yelle!" 
Habakkuk3:3 Wẽnnaam yii Teman n watẽ, Pʋ-Peelem-Soabã yii Paarã tãngã n watẽ. Bãmb vẽenemã sẽn yãgdã luda sa-gãongã, tɩ b waoogrã pid dũniyã gilli." 
Habakkuk3:4 Bãmb yaa wa vẽenem sẽn yãgde. Vẽenem sẽn yãgd n yit bãmb nugẽ wã, la bãmb pãngã solga beenẽ." 
Habakkuk3:5 Bã-longds n dengd bãmb taoore, tɩ yĩn-wɩngr pʋgd b poore." 
Habakkuk3:6 Bãmb yalsame n mag tẽngã, bãmb gesame n kɩt tɩ ninsaalb pɛleng yɩke. Pĩnd zamaanẽ tãmsã miimame. Tɩ kʋdem-wẽndẽ zamaanẽ kunkubã sirgdẽ, zĩ-kãens rag n yaa bãmb so-tũudsi." 
Habakkuk3:7 Mam neeme tɩ b menesa Kusan tẽng nebã fu-roto, la b zũndga Madiyã nebã rot suga." 
Habakkuk3:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, yaa ne kʋɩlsã la y yik y sũurã la? Rẽ yĩnga, yaa kʋɩlsã n kɩt tɩ y sũurã yik la? Yãmb sũurã sẽn puugã yaa ne ko-kãsengã la? Yãmb zombda y wiidi, yãmb zombda y tõogr saar-dãmba." 
Habakkuk3:9 Yãmb rʋʋsa y tãpo, yãmb wẽenegã yaa pɛɛm sẽn yit y noorẽ. Yãmb kɩtdame tɩ kʋɩls pus tẽn-gãongã zug n bundẽ." 
Habakkuk3:10 Tãmsã yãnda yãmb n digda, Sa-koom kiiga ne pãnga, tɩ b wʋmd bog-zulumsã sẽn kuglumdi, t'a koomã tãoosd n kuiis yĩngri." 
Habakkuk3:11 Yãmb pɛɛmã sẽn fɩɩnd n loogdẽ wã, tɩ y kãndã sẽn pɩndã fõt n loogdẽ wã, kɩtame tɩ wĩntoogã ne kiuugã pa b zĩigẽ n ka serg ye." 
Habakkuk3:12 Yãmb sũur puugame n saagd dũniyã, yãmb tabda bu-zẽmsã ne sũ-kãbre." 
Habakkuk3:13 Yãmb yiime n na n fãag y nebã, Yãmb yi n na n fãaga y nin-tũusdgã. Yãmb sãamda nin-wẽng roog sugri, y sãamd-a-la zãng tɩ bũmb ka kell ye." 
Habakkuk3:14 Yãmb wẽneg n deega bɛɛbã pɛɛm n kõs b nanambsã zutu. Nanambsã yaool n dag n fõta wa sobg n wat n na n sãam maam. B zoet n watame la b kaasd ne sũ-noogo, tɩ wẽnd wa b sẽn solg n paam nimbãan-ned n sãame." 
Habakkuk3:15 Yãmb pãrga sor ko-kãsengã pʋg y wiidã yĩnga, y pãrg-a-la ko-pɛmã sẽn tar pãngã sʋka." 
Habakkuk3:16 Mam sẽn wʋm bʋrgã, mam põaagã bendgame. Bʋrgã kɩtame tɩ m no-bɩmsã rigda, tɩ mam kõabã wãgda, tɩ m naoã gĩin maage. La m dag n yasa sɩɩ n gũudẽ, m dag n gũuda sũ-sãangã daare, m dag n gũuda daar ning tõnd sẽn na n tɩ zab ne sẽn zabd-b ne tõndã." 
Habakkuk3:17 Bala, kankang ka ningd puud ye. Reezẽ tɩɩs ka womd biis ye. Oliiv tɩɩs ka womd ye, la pʋtã bõn-koaadl me ka womd ye. Rũm-bãooneg ka be wubrẽ ye. Rũm-bɛd ka be yãgrẽ ye." 
Habakkuk3:18 La baa ne rẽ fãa, mam na n maana sũ-noog ne Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Mam na n kɩdma ne Wẽnnaam sẽn yaa mam fãagdã." 
Habakkuk3:19 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Zu-soabã yaa mam pãnga. Bãmb kɩtdame tɩ mam naoã keng wa wals nao. La bãmb n sõngd-m tɩ m kẽnd kunkub zutu. Yaa yɩɩlã naab yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne yʋʋm-teed sẽn tar susi. 
Zephaniah1:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Sofoni, a Amo biig a Zoziyaas sẽn wa n dɩt Zʋʋda naamã wakate. A Sofoni yaa a Kusi biiga t'a Kusi yaa a Gedaliya biiga, t'a Gedaliya yaa a Amariya biiga, t'a Amariya yaa a Ezekɩyaas biiga." 
Zephaniah1:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Ade, mam na n sãama bõn-vɩɩs nins fãa sẽn be dũniyã zugã." 
Zephaniah1:3 Mam na n sãama ninsaalbã ne rũmsã fãa, la m sãam liuuli wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngrã fãa, ne zĩmã sẽn be ko-kãsengã pʋgã, mam na n sãama nin-wẽnsã ne b tʋʋm-beedã fãa, la m menes ninsaalbã fãa dũniyã zugu. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!»" 
Zephaniah1:4 Mam na n tẽega m nugã n sɩbg Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm nebã, la m na n menesa bũmb ning sẽn ket zĩ-kãngã pʋgẽ, n yaa wẽn-naandg a Baall dẽndã, la m menes a Baall tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa a maan-kʋʋdbã." 
Zephaniah1:5 Mam na n menesa neb nins fãa sẽn dʋʋd rot zut n wõgemded n waoogd yĩngr ãdsã, la m menes neb nins sẽn wõgemded maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, n yaool n wẽend ne tẽn-kugr a Milkom yʋʋrã." 
Zephaniah1:6 Mam na n menesa neb nins sẽn basd maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saabã, ne neb nins sẽn ka baood maamã la sẽn ka baood-b mam saglgã." 
Zephaniah1:7 Sĩnd-y sɩɩ Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saabã taoore, bala, bãmb daarã kolgame! Sẽn-Ka-Saab seglame n na n maan maoongo, la bãmb welga neb nins bãmb sẽn boolã toore." 
Zephaniah1:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: Mam maoongã daare, mam na n sɩbga nanambsã, ne na-biisã, la neb nins fãa sẽn yer bu-zẽms futã." 
Zephaniah1:9 Badaare, mam na n sɩbga neb nins sẽn gãndgd Wẽnd doogã rigno-koakã, la neb nins sẽn pidsd b soaalã roog ne wẽng la zãmbã." 
Zephaniah1:10 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, b na n wʋma kelems sẽn yit dignoor ning b sẽn boond tɩ Zĩm Dignoorã sẽnẽ, la b wʋm wiisg sẽn yit Sag-paallã pʋgẽ, ne bʋr-kãseng sẽn yit tãmsã sẽnẽ." 
Zephaniah1:11 Maktɛɛs tẽng nebã, wiis-y-yã! Bala, Kana tẽngã neb na n sãama zãnga, la lɛɛbdbã fãa na n kiime." 
Zephaniah1:12 Badaare, mam na n widga fɩtl n vɛɛs Zeruzalɛm, la m na n sɩbga neb nins sẽn zĩ-b bãane, n tagsdẽ tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tõe n maan sõama bɩ wẽngã." 
Zephaniah1:13 B na n zɛɛ bãmb paoongã, la b sãam b rotã, bãmb meta roto, la b ka na n kẽ b pʋsẽ ye, bãmb senda reezẽ tɩɩse, la b ka na n yũ b reezẽ rãamã ye.»" 
Zephaniah1:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã sẽn yaa ra-kãsengã kolgame, a kolgame, la a wata tao-tao! Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã rãamd sã n wa zẽkdẽ, baa ne gãndaadã na n wiisa ne sũ-toogo!" 
Zephaniah1:15 Daarã na n yɩɩ sũ-puugr daare, a na n yɩɩ toog la yel-pakr daare, namsg la sãoong daare, yaa lik la lik bida daare, sawad-taok la lik tuu daare." 
Zephaniah1:16 Badaare, tãb-biis na n peeba bardo, n kaas zabr kaasgo, n zab ne tẽms nins sẽn gũbg ne lalsã, la b zab ne b lalsã gõdsẽ gãs-bɛdã." 
Zephaniah1:17 Mam na n kẽesa ninsaalbã yel-pakr pʋga, bãmb na n kẽna wa zoense, bala, bãmb beega Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. B zɩɩmã na n daaga zĩig zãng wa tom sẽn yɛdge, la bãmb yãadã na n yʋlma zĩig zãng wa sagdo." 
Zephaniah1:18 Bãmb wanzuri wã ne b sãnemã, ka na n tõog n fãag-b Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã daar ye. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-yikrã bugum na n dɩɩ dũniyã fãa, bala, na n yɩɩ to-kãseng daare, la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n sãama dũniyã nebã zãnga." 
Zephaniah2:1 Buud sẽn ka zoet yãnde, tigm-y taab n tagse," 
Zephaniah2:2 sẽn deng yam-yãkrã daar sẽn na n wa ling yãmbã, sẽn deng daarã sẽn na n wa loog wa sobg sẽn dɩkd wudgu, la sẽn deng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puug-kãsengã daar sẽn na n wa sig yãmb zugã, ne sẽn deng Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã daar sẽn na n wa sig yãmb zugã!" 
Zephaniah2:3 Bɩ yãmb a sik-m-mens rãmbã fãa sẽn be tẽngã pʋgã bao Sẽn-Ka-Saabo. Yãmb dãmb sẽn sakd noy nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn luglã, bao-y tɩrlem, la y bao sik-m-menga, tɩ daar ninga, y na paam n põs Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũ-puugrã daare." 
Zephaniah2:4 Bala, Gaaza tẽngã na n lebga vɩʋʋgo, b na n sãama Askalon tẽngã, la b rig Asdood nebã ne wĩnto-sʋk n yiisi, la b wã Ekron tẽngã." 
Zephaniah2:5 Kerɛt buudã neb sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã, yãmb na paam toogo! Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yet yãmb wɛɛngẽ: «Kana sẽn yaa Filistẽ-dãmbã tẽnga, mam na n sãama foom, la ned kõn leb n zĩnd f pʋgẽ ye." 
Zephaniah2:6 Soolem ning sẽn be ko-kãsengã noorã, na n tekame n lebg yamd zĩiga, la pe-kɩɩmbã rũms wãbneg zĩiga, la yãg zĩis piisã yĩnga." 
Zephaniah2:7 Soolem-kãng na n lebga Zʋʋda roogã bu-kellã rẽnda. Bãmb na n tɩ wãbna b rũmsã beenẽ, la zaabre, bãmb na n tɩ gãanda Askalon rotã pʋse. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã na n wa n sõnga bãmb n lebs n maneg b yellã.»" 
Zephaniah2:8 Mam wʋma tʋy nins Moaab nebã sẽn tʋ mam nebã, la paoogr ningã Amo nebã sẽn paoog bãmbã. Bãmb paoogda mam nebã, la b reeg b zĩisã n sooge." 
Zephaniah2:9 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã sẽn vɩ wã wẽend n yetẽ: «Ade, Moaab na n lebga wa Sodom, la Amo tẽngã na n lebga wa Gomoore. Tẽngã na n pida ne gõose, la a lebg yamsem zĩisi, b na n sãam-a-la wakat fãa yĩnga. Mam nebã bu-kellã na n zɛɛ bãmba, la b reeg b tẽngã n sooge." 
Zephaniah2:10 Bõn-kãng na n paama bãmb b wuk-m-mengã yĩnga, bala, bãmb tʋʋsa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã nebã, la b paoog-ba." 
Zephaniah2:11 Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n zoe bãmb nimbãaneg ye, bãmb na n sãama dũniyã fãa wẽnnaam-dãmbã, la buud toay-toayã tẽms nins fãa koom sẽn gũbgã neb na n pa b sẽn beẽ wã n wõgemd n waoog Sẽn-Ka-Saabo.»" 
Zephaniah2:12 Yãmb a Kuus tẽng nebã, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb pa tãpẽ." 
Zephaniah2:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tẽega b nugã n tees rɩtg kɩrengã la b na n menesa Asiiri tẽngã, bãmb na n sãama Niniiv tẽngã, la tẽngã na n lebga koɛɛng wa raoogo." 
Zephaniah2:14 Tẽnga fãa na n yɩɩ yir rũms zĩiga, la we-rũms buud toor-toor na n zĩnda be. Bakardã ne yʋgempɛlã na n kẽe ra-lugdsã pugli pʋsẽ n gãande. B na n wʋma viut yãbr rotã võyẽ, la sẽn sɩng ne tẽngã rignoorã fãa lebga raboogo, bala, b na n luba sɛɛdr tɩɩsã ra-lugdsã fãa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Tẽng ning sũur sẽn dag n noom ne-a mengã, n tagsdẽ tɩ bũmb ka tõe n maan yẽnda wã, n yetẽ tɩ ned ka be sẽn zem yẽnda wã, ade, yẽnda lebga raboogo, la we-rũms gãag zĩiga, ned ning fãa sẽn loogd be, na n fɩɩlame la a mobg a noore." 
Zephaniah3:1 Toog bee tẽng ning sẽn yaa a tõatã zugu, bala, yẽnda nebã rẽgma b mense, la b maand taab pãnga!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Bãmb ka sak n kelg Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b ka sak n deeg b remsgã ye. Bãmb ka sak n teeg Sẽn-Ka-Saab ye. La b ka kolg b Wẽnnaamã ye." 
Zephaniah3:3 Bãmb nanambsã sẽn be b sʋkã wẽnda wa gɩgmã sẽn kelemde, la b bʋ-kaoodbã yaa wa zaabr rigd-n-yĩidsi, bãmb ka yõkd n wãb n kell beoog yĩng ye." 
Zephaniah3:4 Bãmb no-rɛɛsdbã yaa bi-beese, la zãmb dãmba, bãmb maan-kʋʋdbã rẽgemda bũmb nins sẽn welg toor Wẽnnaam yĩngã, la b kɩɩsd tõogã." 
Zephaniah3:5 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaool n bee tẽngã pʋga, n yaa tɩrlem soaba, la b ka maand sẽn ka zems ye. Yibeoog fãa, bãmb pukda b tɩrlmã n ka basdẽ ye. La nin-wẽng ka mi yãnd ye." 
Zephaniah3:6 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam menesa soolem wʋsgo, mam sãama b lalsã gõdsẽ gãsdã, mam kɩtame tɩ b soayã lebg vɩɩdo, tɩ ned ka leb n kẽnd soayã zut ye. B tẽmsã fãa sãamame tɩ ned ka leb n be b pʋsẽ ye." 
Zephaniah3:7 Mam dag n yetame tɩ Zeruzalɛm nebã na n zoeẽ-la maam, la b sak m demsgã, woto, mam dag n kõn menesẽ-b ye. La wakat fãa mam sã n sɩbg-ba, b ket n kẽngda taoor ne tʋʋm-wẽnsã maanego.»" 
Zephaniah3:8 Dẽ wã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Beneere, gũ-y daar ning mam sẽn na n yik n bʋ ne yãmbã, bala, mam yãka yam n na n tigim bu-zẽmsã, la m tigim soolem toay-toayã, n dok m sũur ne-ba, tɩ m sũ-kãbrã rɩ-ba. Bala, mam sũ-puugrã bugum na n dɩɩ dũniyã zãnga.»" 
Zephaniah3:9 «Dẽ, mam na n yɩlga buudã fãa nobɩmsã, tɩ b fãa tõe n waoog maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab ne yam a yembre." 
Zephaniah3:10 Baa mam neb nins fãa sẽn sãeeg n be Kuus kʋɩlsã rʋʋndã na n waa ne kũuni, n wa waoog maam.»" 
Zephaniah3:11 «Badaare, mam nebã! Yãnd kõn leb n yõk yãmba, tʋʋm nins yãmb sẽn maan n kɩɩs maamã yĩng ye. Bala, wakat-kãnga, mam na n yiisa wuk-m-mens rãmbã, dẽ, fo kõn leb n maan f tɩtaamã mam tãn-sõngã zug ye." 
Zephaniah3:12 Mam na n basa naong rãmbã, ne ka-pãens rãmbã yãmb sʋka, la bãmb na n paama gũudum maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋrã yĩnga." 
Zephaniah3:13 La Israyɛll nebã bu-kellã kõn leb n maan sẽn yaa kegre, la b kõn leb n yag zĩrẽ ye. Bãmb kõn leb n gom n tudg taab ye. Bãmb na n tõog n dɩɩme la b gũsi, tɩ ned ba a ye ka be sẽn na n yɛɛs-b ye.»" 
Zephaniah3:14 Sɩyõ tẽngã nebã, kils-y-yã! Israyɛll nebã, kaas-y ne sũ-noogo! Zeruzalɛm nebã, kɩdm-y ne y sũyã fãa!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka na n leb n sɩbg yãmb ye. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ y bɛɛbã toeem sore. Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll dĩmã bee ne yãmba, yãmb kõn leb n yɛɛs tɩ toog na n wa paam-y ye." 
Zephaniah3:16 Badaare, b na n yeelame: «Zeruzalɛm nebã, da-y zoe-y rabeem ye. Sɩyõ nebã, da-y boog-y raood ye!»" 
Zephaniah3:17 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã bee ne yãmba, b yaa gãndaoog sẽn fãagd yãmba, yãmb na n yɩɩ bãmb sũ-noogo. La bãmb sẽn nong yãmbã yĩnga, b na n sĩnda b noore, bãmb na n zẽka b koɛɛg n kaas ne kɩdeng yãmb wɛɛngẽ." 
Zephaniah3:18 Zeruzalɛm tẽnga, mam na n leb n tigma neb nins b sẽn yiis fo nengẽ n kẽng zĩ-zãrgẽ, tɩ b ka leb n tõe n maan sũ-noogã. La m yiis yãndã sẽn dag n be b zugã." 
Zephaniah3:19 Wakat-kãnga, mam na n sɩbga neb nins sẽn namsd yãmbã. Mam na n tɩpa sẽn pogl-bã, la m lebg n tall neb nins b sẽn yõg n kẽng tẽn-zẽmsã n wa, n kɩt tɩ b paam waoogr la yʋ-zẽk dũniyã zĩig ning fãa b sẽn dag n paoogd bãmbã." 
Zephaniah3:20 Wakat-kãnga, mam na n tall-y lame n lebg n wa, Wakat-kãnga, mam na n tigm-y lame. Bala, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yʋʋrã yi, la m kɩt tɩ y paam waoogr dũniyã buud fãa sʋka. Wakat ning mam sẽn na n lebs yãmb y zĩigẽ wã, yãmb mensã nin na n yãndame. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Haggai1:1 Rĩm a Daryʋʋs sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a yoob soabã pipi daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab tũnuga b no-rɛɛs a Aaze n gom ne a Saltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll sẽn dag n yaa Zʋʋda soolem gʋvɛrneerã, ne a Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn dag n yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã. B yeela bãmb yaa:" 
Haggai1:2 «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Nin-bãmbã yetame: Wakatã nan ka ta ye. Wakat ning b sẽn segd n lebs n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã nan ka ta ye.› » 
Haggai1:3 Rẽ n kɩte, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tũnug b no-rɛɛs a Aaze n gom ne bãmb n yeele:" 
Haggai1:4 «Rẽ yĩnga, zemsame tɩ yãmb be ro-neeb pʋsẽ, tɩ mam doogã yaool n lʋɩ zãnga?»" 
Haggai1:5 Moasã, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame yaa: «Tags-y n ges-y yãmb sẽn yaa-a soabã." 
Haggai1:6 Yãmb bʋda wʋsgo, la y tigsa bilfu. Yãmb dɩtame, la y ka tɩgd ye. Yãmb yũudame, la y nens ka yilimd ye. Yãmb yera futu, la y waoodã ka yit ye. La sẽn dɩkd-a yaood sã n deeg a ligdi, yaa wa a sui-a-la kor-wurung pʋga.»" 
Haggai1:7 Ade, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Tags-y n ges-y yãmb sẽn yaa-a soabã." 
Haggai1:8 Rʋ-y tãngã zug n tɩ bao raad n lebg n wa me m doogã, tɩ m sũur yɩ noog ne-a tɩ m wilg m ziirã beenẽ. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Haggai1:9 Yãmb dag n tẽeda wʋsgo, la y wa n yasa ne bilfu, tɩ y wʋk rẽndã n kuili, la mam fʋʋs-a lame t'a looge. Bõe yĩng tɩ m maan a woto? Yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n sokde. Yaa mam doogã sẽn lʋɩ, tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa bas-a, n bas n get a meng roog yellã yĩnga." 
Haggai1:10 Yaa rẽ n kɩte, tɩ saag ka leb n niida, tɩ tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadl ka womd ye." 
Haggai1:11 Mam kɩtame tɩ war kẽ tẽngã, tɩ tãmsã zut kʋɩ, tɩ bɩle wã, ne reezẽ rãamã la kaamã sɛ, la m kɩt tɩ tẽn-gãongã bõn-koaadl kʋɩ, tɩ ninsaalb ne rũms namsdẽ, la y tʋʋmã fãa yɩɩ zaalem." 
Haggai1:12 A Saltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛlle, ne a Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã, la neb a taabã fãa kelga Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛga, wa sẽn zems no-rɛɛs a Aaze sẽn togsã, la wa sẽn zems Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã sẽn tʋm-a t'a togsã. La rabeem yõka nebã Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore." 
Haggai1:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab koe-toagsd a Aaze goma ne nebã n yeel-b tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam bee ne yãmba. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!» 
Haggai1:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab neka a Saltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll sẽn yaa Zʋʋda gʋvɛrneerã yam, la b nek a Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã yam, ne neb a taabã fãa. Bãmb wa n sɩnga Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã roog meeb tʋʋmde." 
Haggai1:15 Yaa rĩm a Daryʋʋs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a yoob soabã rasem pisi la a naas daare." 
Haggai2:1 Kiuug a yopoe soabã rasem pisi la a yembrã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne b no-rɛɛs a Aaze n yeel-a yaa:" 
Haggai2:2 «Mam kot-f lame tɩ f gom ne a Saltiyɛll biig a Zorobabɛll sẽn yaa Zʋʋda gʋvɛrneerã, ne a Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã, ne neb a taabã n yeel-b yaa:" 
Haggai2:3 Yãmb sʋkã nin-bʋg n dag n yãnd Wẽnnaam doogã sẽn dag n tar ziir ningã? La yãmb sẽn get-a rũndã wã, a yaa a wãn-wãna? M mi tɩ yãmb yetame t'a ka baa fɩ yãmb nifẽ la?»" 
Haggai2:4 Moasã, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Zorobabɛlle, paam daoodo! A Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã, paam daoodo! Yãmb a tẽngã gill fãa nebã, paam-y raoodo! Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Tʋm-y-yã! Bala, mam bee ne yãmba, yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Haggai2:5 Yãmb sẽn wa n yit Ezɩpt tẽngã, mam kõo yãmb m gomdã ne m sɩɩgã sẽn be yãmb sʋkã. Da zoe-y rabeem ye!»" 
Haggai2:6 Bala, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Keta bilfu, keta bilf bala, tɩ mam kɩt tɩ saasẽ la tẽng rigimdi, la m kɩt tɩ ko-kãsengã ne tẽn-gãongã rigimdi." 
Haggai2:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽmsã fãa zũndgi. B na n wʋka laog nins fãa sẽn tar yõodã n wa, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ ro-kãngã pid ne ziiri. Yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Haggai2:8 Wanzuri wã yaa maam n so, la sãnemã me yaa maam n so. Yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Haggai2:9 Ro-kãngã sẽn na n paam ziir ningã, na n yɩɩga a sẽn dag n tar pĩndã. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ vɩ-bãan zĩnd zĩ-kãngã. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Haggai2:10 Rĩm a Daryʋʋs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug a wɛ wã rasem pisi la a naasã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne no-rɛɛs a Aaze n yeele:" 
Haggai2:11 «Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹M kotame tɩ f sok maan-kʋʋdbã a woto: Ned sã n dɩk maoong nemd n ning a fuugẽ," 
Haggai2:12 ned sã n dɩk maoong nemd n sẽbg a fuug noorẽ, t'a fuugã noor sɩɩs buri, rɩɩbo, reezẽ rãam, kaam, wall sẽn yaa rɩɩb ning fãa, rẽ yĩnga, bõn-kãng me na n lebga bũmb sẽn welg toor bɩ?» La maan-kʋʋdbã leokame tɩ ayo!" 
Haggai2:13 Dẽ, a Aaze yeelame yaa: «La ned sã n sɩɩs kũum n dẽgem a menga, n sɩɩs bũmb a yembr bõn-kãensã sʋka, bõn-kãng lebga rẽgd bɩ?» La maan-kʋʋdbã leokame yaa: «N-yẽe, a lebga bõn-dẽgdo.»" 
Haggai2:14 Dẽ, a Aaze yeelame yaa: «Nin-bãmbã me yaa woto, nimbuiidã sẽn yas mam taoorã me yaa a woto. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Bãmb nusã tʋʋm fãa me yaa a woto. B sẽn wat ne bũmb ning tẽn-kugrẽ wã yaa bõn-dẽgdo.»" 
Haggai2:15 Mam kot-y lame tɩ y maan gũusg moasã. Maag-y y meng n ges bũmb ning sẽn na n maan sẽn sɩng ne rũndã daarã, la wakat sẽn watã. Sẽn deng b sẽn na n dɩk tãn-koeemd n dogl a to zug Wẽnnaam doogã meeb wɛɛngẽ," 
Haggai2:16 b sã n dag n tog n paam ka-bɛɛl peoog pisi, b wat n yasa ne ka-bɛɛl peoog piiga. B sã n kẽng reezẽ rãam wẽkr n tẽed yʋy pis-nu, b wat n yasa ne yʋy pisi bala." 
Haggai2:17 Mam kɩtame tɩ wãoongo, gãnem ne la sapɩlem sãam y koodã, tɩ b zelge, tɩ yãmb nusã tʋʋm lebg zaalem, la yãmb baas n ka lebg n wa mam nengẽ ye. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Haggai2:18 Mam kot-y lame tɩ y maan gũusg ne bũmb ning sẽn na n maan sẽn sɩng ne rũndã daarã, la wakat sẽn watã. Sẽn sɩng ne kiuug a wɛ soabã rasem pisi la a naasã daare, sẽn sɩng ne Wẽnnaam doogã yẽbgr daare, bɩ y gũus n gese!" 
Haggai2:19 Rẽ yĩnga, kood leb n keta baoorẽ sɩda? Baa reezẽ tɩɩsã, kankamsã, gernaad tɩɩsã ne oliiv tɩɩsã ka tol n wom ye. Sẽn sɩng ne rũndã, mam na n leb n ninga barka." 
Haggai2:20 Kiuugã rasem pisi la a naasã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab leb n goma ne a Aaze naoor a yiibẽ soab n yeele:" 
Haggai2:21 «Togs Zʋʋda gʋvɛrneer a Zorobabɛll tɩ mam na n kɩtame tɩ saasẽ la tẽng rigimdi. 
Haggai2:22 Mam na n luba soolem-dãmbã nanambse. Mam na n sãama bu-zẽmsã soolem-dãmbã pãnga. Mam na n luba saar-dãmb ne b wed-rʋʋdba, n kɩt tɩ wiid ne b wed-rʋʋdb rʋʋg tẽnga. Ned kam fãa na n wẽneg n kʋ a ba-biig ne zabr sʋʋga.»" 
Haggai2:23 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Badaare, mam na n dɩka foom a Zorobabɛll sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmd a Saltiyɛll biigã. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele, tɩ m na n dɩka foom n kɩt tɩ f yɩ nug-tikr bãnde, bala, yaa foom la mam yãk yã. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Zechariah1:1 Dĩm a Daryʋʋs naamã yʋʋm a yiibẽ soabã kiuug a nii soabã pʋga, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne b no-rɛɛs a Zakari. A Zakari yaa a Berekɩya biiga, t'a Berekɩya yaa no-rɛɛs a Ido biiga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame tɩ b yeel Israyɛll nebã yaa:" 
Zechariah1:2 «Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũur yika wʋsg ne yãmb yaab-rãmbã. 
Zechariah1:3 Yeel-b tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Lebg-y n wa-y mam nengẽ. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. La mam me na n lebg n waa yãmb nengẽ!› Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.» 
Zechariah1:4 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã leb n yeelame: «Da yɩ-y wa y yaab-rãmbã ye. Wakat sẽn looge, no-rɛɛsdbã rag n moondame n yet bãmb tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame yaa: ‹M kot-y lame tɩ y bas y manesem-wẽnsã ne y tʋʋm-wẽnsã n lebg n wa mam nengẽ!› La bãmb ka kelg ye. Bãmb maana b toog kae ne maam ye. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Zechariah1:5 Yãmb yaab-rãmbã bee yɛɛnẽ? La no-rɛɛsdbã vɩɩme n ka kiidẽ la? 
Zechariah1:6 La ne rẽ fãa, goam nins la noy nins mam sẽn dag n kɩt tɩ mam tʋmtʋmdbã sẽn yaa no-rɛɛsdbã togsã, ka ta y yaab-rãmbã sɩda?» Bãmb lebg n waame n wa yeel yaa: «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba maana tõnd wa b sẽn dag n yãk yam n na n maanã, b maana tõnd wa sẽn zems d nao-kẽndrã ne d yel-manesmã.»" 
Zechariah1:7 Rĩm a Daryʋʋs sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yiiblẽ, kiuug piig la a yembr soabã sẽn yaa Sebat kiuugã rasem pisi la a naasã daare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zakari sẽn yaa a Berekɩya biiga, n yaa a Ido yagenga, n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab no-rɛɛsã vẽnegr pʋgẽ:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ad bũmb ning maam a Zakari sẽn yãnd badaar yʋngã: «Mam yãnda rao sẽn zao wed-zẽega, n yas tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem n be bog-zulungã pʋgã sʋka. La wiid sẽn yaa wed-zẽese, la wed-bĩis-naar ne wed-peels n dag n yas yẽnda poorẽ wã.»" 
Zechariah1:9 Mam soka wed-rʋʋdã yaa: «M soaala, nin-bãmbã yaa ãnda rãmba?» La malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã yeela maam yaa: «Mam na n wilga foom bãmb sẽn yaa neb ninsi.»" 
Zechariah1:10 La ned ning sẽn dag n yas tɩɩsã sẽn tar maasmã sʋk yeelame yaa: «Bãmb yaa neb nins Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tʋm tɩ b saag n ges dũniyã.» 
Zechariah1:11 Dẽ, bãmb yeela Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã sẽn yas tɩɩsã sʋkã yaa: «Tõnd gilgame n ges dũniyã, la d mikame tɩ dũniyã gill bee vʋʋsg ne vɩ-bãan pʋga.»" 
Zechariah1:12 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã leb n yeelame yaa: «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soaba, yãmb na n basame n ka zoe Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda tẽmsã nimbãaneg hal tɩ ta dabʋre? Bala, yãmb sũurã rag n yika ne bãmb hal yʋʋm pis-yopoe sẽn looge.»" 
Zechariah1:13 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab leoka malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomda ne maamã ne pɛlg kengr koɛɛga, la raood paasg koɛɛga." 
Zechariah1:14 Dẽ, malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomda ne maamã yeela maam yaa: «Moon n yeel yaa: Ade, Saasẽ-pãng-soabã yetame: ‹Mam nonga Zeruzalɛm, mam nonga Sɩyõ hal wʋsgo," 
Zechariah1:15 la mam sũurã yika wʋsg ne buud nins sẽn vɩ-bãanã. Mam sũurã yaool n dag n yika bilf bala. La bãmb leb n wa paasa toogã.» 
Zechariah1:16 Rẽ kɩtame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetẽ yaa: «Mam na n lebg n waa Zeruzalɛm ne nimbãan-zoeere, b na n lebs n mee mam doogã beenẽ.» Yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. La b na n tẽega wĩir n lebs n me Zeruzalɛm." 
Zechariah1:17 Malɛɛkã leb n yeela maam yaa: «‹Moon yɛs n yeel tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Mam tẽmsã na n leb n paama bõn-sõama tɩ sek-ba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leb n belsa Sɩyõ. Bãmb na n leb n yãka Zeruzalɛm.› » 
Zechariah2:1 Mam zẽka m neng n gese, la mam yãnda yɩɩl a naase." 
Zechariah2:2 Dẽ, mam soka malɛɛk ning sẽn gomd-a ne maamã yaa: «Yɩɩn-bãmbã b naasã võor yaa bõe?» Malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «Yɩɩl a naasã bilgda buud nins sẽn tar pãngã sẽn sãeeg Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll la Zeruzalɛm nebã.»" 
Zechariah2:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga maam sãeeb a naase. 
Zechariah2:4 Mam sokame yaa: «Bãmb wat n na n maana bõe?» La malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «Yɩɩlã sẽn sãeeg Zʋʋda nebã tɩ ned ba a yembr ka leb n tõe n doog a zugã, sãeebã waame n na n kɩt tɩ rabeem yõk buud a taabã, n sãam b pãngã, b sẽn zab ne Zʋʋda nebã yĩnga, la yaa sẽn na n yɩl n sãeeg-ba.»" 
Zechariah2:5 Vẽnegrã pʋga, mam sẽn zẽk m neng n gese, mam yãnda rao sẽn zãad wĩir sẽn tar n magd a nugẽ." 
Zechariah2:6 Mam soka raoã yaa: «Fo rabda yɛɛnẽ?» La a leoka maam yaa: «Mam dat n tɩ maka Zeruzalɛm n bãng a yalmã ne a woglmã.» 
Zechariah2:7 La malɛɛk ning sẽn gomd-a ne maamã sẽn kẽnde, malɛɛk a to n yi n seg-a," 
Zechariah2:8 n yeel-a yaa: «Wudg n tɩ yeel bi-bɩ-kãngã yaa: ‹Zeruzalɛm na n yɩɩ tẽng sẽn ka tar lalga, ninsaalbã ne rũmsã sẽn na n lebg wʋsg a pʋgẽ wã yĩnga.› »" 
Zechariah2:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam mengã na n zĩnda ne yẽnda, n yɩ wa bugum lalg n gũbg-a, la m be a pʋgẽ, n yaa yẽnda ziiri.»" 
Zechariah2:10 Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Haya! Haya! Zoe-y n bas-y nug-rɩtg tẽngã n wa, bala, maam n dag n sãeeg yãmb tɩ y kẽng dũniyã kɩrems a naasã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Zechariah2:11 Haya! Sɩyõ nebã, yãmb dãmb sẽn be Babilond tẽn-neerã pʋgẽ wã, zoe-y n põs-y-yã!»" 
Zechariah2:12 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, soab ning sẽn gom-a wã tʋma maam ne koɛɛga, buud nins sẽn fã yãmbã wɛɛngẽ n yeele: «Ned sã n sɩɩs yãmba, yaa wa a sẽn tuk mam nifu!" 
Zechariah2:13 N-yẽe! Mam na n yik n zaba ne bãmba, n kɩt tɩ b yembsã wẽneg n zɛ bãmba, tɩ yãmb bãng tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n tʋm maam." 
Zechariah2:14 Sɩyõ nebã, kils-y ne sũ-noogo, Sɩyõ tẽn-neerã, kɩdme! Bala, mam wat n na n zĩnda fo pʋgẽ. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Zechariah2:15 Badaare, buud wʋsg na n dɩka b mens n kõ Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, n lebg mam nebã. Mam na n zĩnda fo pʋgẽ.» Dẽ, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ." 
Zechariah2:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n leb n sooga Zʋʋda, tɩ lebg b rẽnda n yaa b pʋɩɩre, tẽng ning sẽn welg toorã pʋga. Bãmb na n leb n yãka Zeruzalɛm." 
Zechariah2:17 Bɩ ninsaalbã fãa sĩnd Sẽn-Ka-Saab taoore, bala, bãmb yikame n yit b ro-sõngẽ wã." 
Zechariah3:1 Sẽn-Ka-Saab wilga maam maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Zozoe sẽn yas Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã taoore. La a Sʋtãan dag n yasa malɛɛkã nug-rɩtg n na n dõd-a. 
Zechariah3:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela Sʋtãanã yaa: «Sʋtãana, bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab leng-fo! Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yãk Zeruzalɛmã leng-fo! Rẽ yĩnga, rao-kãngã ka wẽnd raoog b sẽn yiis bugmẽ sɩda?»" 
Zechariah3:3 A Zozoe rag n yera fu-rẽgd n yas malɛɛkã taoore. 
Zechariah3:4 Malɛɛkã yeela neb nins sẽn dag n yas a Zozoe sɛɛgẽ wã yaa: «Yees-y-yã a fu-rẽgdã!» Dẽ poore, a yeela a Zozoe yaa: «Gese, mam yiisa fo kongrã, la m na n lebs n yeelg foom tigr futu.»" 
Zechariah3:5 Mam yeelame yaa: «Vil-y-yã a zugã ne peen-vindg sẽn yaa yɩlemde!» Dẽ, b vila a zugã ne peen-vindg sẽn yaa yɩlemde, la b yeelg-a futu. La Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã rag n yasa beenẽ." 
Zechariah3:6 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛkã yeela a Zozoe yaa:" 
Zechariah3:7 «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Fo sã n tũ mam noyã, la f sak mam tõodã, yaa foom n na n soog m doogã, foom n na n ges m doogã zags yelle, la mam na n kõo foom lohorem tɩ f zĩnd neb nins sẽn be ka wã sʋka.› »" 
Zechariah3:8 Maan-kʋʋr kãsem a Zozoe, mam kot-f lame tɩ f kelge, bɩ fo tʋmd-n-taasã sẽn zĩ fo taoorã me kelge, bala, nin-bãmbã yaa bãnde. Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-bullã sẽn yaa mam tʋmtʋmdã wa." 
Zechariah3:9 Sɩd me, mam ninga kugr a Zozoe taoore, la kug-kãngã a yembrã zugu, nin a yopoe n be beenẽ. Mam mengã na n gʋlsa gʋlsem a zugu. Yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. Mam na n yiisa tẽn-kãngã kongrã daar a yembr pʋgẽ." 
Zechariah3:10 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Badaare, yãmb na n boola taab n kẽng y reezẽ tɩɩsã ne y kankamsã tẽngre." 
Zechariah4:1 Malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã lebg n wa neka maam wa b sẽn nekd ned a gõeemẽ. 
Zechariah4:2 Yẽnda soka maam yaa: «Fo nee bõe?» La mam leokame: «Mam nee fɩtl doagendg sẽn yaa sãnem gilli, n tar tʋk sẽn be a yĩngrã, la fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe n dog a zugu, la fɩtl fãa tara yõgneg zĩis a yopoe sẽn be a zugẽ wã." 
Zechariah4:3 Oliiv tɩɩs a yiib n yas n yeg-a, a yembr bee tʋkã rɩtgo, t'a yembrã be a goabga." 
Zechariah4:4 Mam leb n soka malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã yaa: «M soaala, bõn-kãensã rat n yeelame tɩ bõe?»" 
Zechariah4:5 La malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «Fo ka mi bõn-kãensã sẽn dat n yeel tɩ bũmb ning sɩda?» Dẽ, mam leokame: «Ayo, m soaala!»" 
Zechariah4:6 Dẽ, malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: «Ad Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg a Zorobabɛll yĩnga: ‹Ka ne gãndaalem, leb n ka ne pãng me ye. Yaa ne mam sɩɩgã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Zechariah4:7 Tãn-kãsenga, fo yaa ãnda a Zorobabɛll taoore? B na n sarma foom. A Zorobabɛll na n yãka mam doogã pãng kugr beenẽ, la nebã na n kilsame n yeel tɩ ‹pẽgre, bɩ a paam pẽgre!›" 
Zechariah4:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Zechariah4:9 ‹Yaa a Zorobabɛll nus n yẽbg ro-kãngã, la yaa yẽnda nusã n na n me-a n baase, dẽ, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ.›" 
Zechariah4:10 Woto wã, ãnda la sẽn paoog tʋʋmdã sẽn sɩng bilfã? B sã n wa yãnd namdã sẽn be a Zorobabɛll nugẽ wã, b na n kɩdmame. Fɩtl-dãmb a yopoe wã mamsda Sẽn-Ka-Saab ninã sẽn get dũniyã gill fãa wã.»" 
Zechariah4:11 Dẽ, mam soka malɛɛkã yaa: «Oliiv tɩɩs a yiibã sẽn yas fɩtl doagendgã rɩtg ne a goabgã mamsda bõe?»" 
Zechariah4:12 Mam leb n sok-a-la naoor a yiibẽ soab yaa: «Oliiv tɩɩs wil a yiibã sẽn be sãnem soay a yiibã sãnem-koom sẽn tũud n yitẽ wã sɛɛgã mamsda bõe?» 
Zechariah4:13 Malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «Fo ka mi bãmb sẽn mamsd bũmb ning sɩda?» La mam yeelame: «Ayo, m soaala!»" 
Zechariah4:14 Dẽ, a yeela maam yaa: «Bãmb yaa neb a yiib nins b sẽn pʋdg ka-paalgã b zutã, bãmb yasa dũni gill soaalã taoore.»" 
Zechariah5:1 Mam leb n zẽka m neng n gese, la mam paama vẽnegr yɛsa. Mam yãnda seb-pindg sẽn laand yĩngri." 
Zechariah5:2 La malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: «Fo nee bõe?» Mam leokame: «Mam nee seb-pindg sẽn laande, t'a woglmã yaa kãntɩɩg pisi, t'a yalmã yaa kãntɩɩg piiga.»" 
Zechariah5:3 Dẽ, Malɛɛkã yeela maam yaa: «Yaa kãab-wẽngã n yit n na n zab ne tẽngã zãngã. Sɩd me, kãab-wẽngã yetame tɩ b na n diga wagda wã fãa n yiis tẽngã, a leb n yeelame tɩ b na n diga sẽn wẽend-b zĩrẽ wẽenegã n yiis tẽngã.»" 
Zechariah5:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame: «Mam na n yiis a kãab-wẽngã t'a tõe n kẽ wagdrã roogẽ, ne sẽn wẽend-a zĩrẽ wẽeneg ne mam yʋʋrã roogẽ, n pa be n sãam yẽnda ne a raadã la a kugã.»" 
Zechariah5:5 Malɛɛk ning sẽn dag n gomd-a ne maamã yiime n yeel maam yaa: «M kotame tɩ f nak f neng n gese. Ges yaa bõe la sẽn yitã.» 
Zechariah5:6 La mam sokame tɩ yaa bõe la woto. T'a leok maam tɩ yaa peoog la sẽn watã. A leb n yeelame yaa: «Yaa bãmb yel-wẽnã sẽn be tẽngã zĩig fãa wã la woto.» 
Zechariah5:7 Wakat-kãnga, peoogã limdã sẽn yaa namdã fõkame, la pag n dag n zĩ peoogã pʋga." 
Zechariah5:8 Malɛɛkã yeelame yaa: «Yaa wẽnemã.» La a lebs n dĩ-a n kẽes peoogã pʋga, n lebs namdã limd n fõgne." 
Zechariah5:9 Dẽ, mam nak n gesame, la mam yãnda pagb a yiib sẽn yita. Sebgã rag n wẽeda b pɩgsã. Bãmb dag n tara pɩgs wa bakaorg pɩgsa. Bãmb zẽka peoogã t'a be yĩngr ne tẽng sʋka." 
Zechariah5:10 Mam soka malɛɛk ning sẽn gomd-a ne maamã yaa: «Bãmb dɩka peoogã n dabd yɛɛnẽ?» 
Zechariah5:11 Malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «B rabd n na n tɩ mee roog Sineyaar tẽng n kõ-a. B sã n me roogã n sɛ, b na n ning-a-la beenẽ, t'a pa be.»" 
Zechariah6:1 Mam leb n nak n gesame, la mam paama vẽnegre. Mam yãnda saar-dãmb a naas sẽn yit tãms a yiibã sʋk n watẽ. Tãmsã rag n yaa zũud tãmse." 
Zechariah6:2 B rag n soga pipi saarã ne wed-mo-zẽese, n sog yiibẽ saarã ne wed-mo-sablse." 
Zechariah6:3 La b soga saar a tãabẽ soabã ne wed-mo-peelse, la b sog saar a naasẽ soabã ne wed-mo-pẽrem-pẽrem sẽn tar pãnga." 
Zechariah6:4 Mam leb n soka malɛɛk ning sẽn gomd-a ne maamã yaa: «M soaala, bãmbã yaa bõe?»" 
Zechariah6:5 La malɛɛkã leoka maam yaa: «Bãmb yaa yĩngr sebd a naasã. Bãmb yii zĩig ning b sẽn dag n beẽ wã, dũni gill fãa soaalã taoorã.»" 
Zechariah6:6 Wed-mo-sablsã sẽn tɛt saar a yembrã yi n teesa nug-rɩtg tẽmsã sẽnẽ, tɩ wed-mo-peelsã yi n pʋgl bãmba. La wed-mo-pẽrem-pẽrmã yi n teesa nug-goabg tẽmsã sẽnẽ." 
Zechariah6:7 Wed-moos nins sẽn tar-b pãngã rag n yiime n kot n na n saag dũniyã. La yẽnda kõ-b-la noor n yeele: «Kẽng-y-yã! Saag-y dũniyã!» Dẽ, saar-dãmbã saaga dũniyã." 
Zechariah6:8 Malɛɛkã boola maam n yeel yaa: «Gese, wed-moos nins sẽn yi n tees nug-rɩtg tẽmsã sẽnẽ wã na n sika mam sɩɩgã nug-rɩtg tẽngã zugu.»" 
Zechariah6:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne maam n yeel yaa: 
Zechariah6:10 «Reeg kũun neb nins sẽn yi yembd pʋg n wa wã nengẽ, reeg kũun a Hɛldayi ne a Tobiya la a Yedaya nengẽ. Bɩ f kẽng f toor a Sofoni biig a Zoziyaas yirã rũndã, bala, b sẽn yi Babilond n wa wã, yaa beenẽ la b kẽng yã." 
Zechariah6:11 Bao wanzuri ne sãnem n maan maanf n fõgen a Yehosadak biig a Zozoe sẽn yaa maan-kʋʋr kãsmã.» 
Zechariah6:12 Dẽ poore, yeel a Zozoe yaa: «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Ade, ned ning yʋʋr sẽn boond tɩ bõn-bullã, yẽnda sẽn beẽ wã, a na n bula beenẽ, la yẽnda na n mee Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã." 
Zechariah6:13 Yaa yẽnda n na n me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã. Yẽnda na n yeelga naam teedo, yẽnda na n zaoonda a naam geerã n dɩ naam, maan-kʋʋd me n na n zaoond a geere, la bãmb b yiibã fãa na n wʋmda taab sõama.›" 
Zechariah6:14 La maanf-rãmbã na n paa Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã, tɩ b tar n tẽegd a Kelɛm ne a Tobiya la a Yedaya yelle, la b tẽegd a Sofoni biig a Kɛn yelle.»" 
Zechariah6:15 Neb nins sẽn be zĩ-zãrsẽ wã na n waame, n wa me Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogã, woto, yãmb na n bãngame tɩ yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ. Yãmb sã n sak Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa yãmb Wẽnnaamã koɛɛg neere, bõn-kãng na n paama pidsgu." 
Zechariah7:1 Rĩm a Daryʋʋs sẽn deeg a naamã tɩ yʋʋm naaslẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zakari kiuug a wɛ soabã b sẽn boond tɩ Kislɛv kiuugã rasem a naas daare." 
Zechariah7:2 A Betɛll rag n tʋma a Saretsɛɛr ne a Regɛm-Melɛk ne yẽnda nebã, tɩ b tɩ yõk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg n ges b sũurã kõn sigi," 
Zechariah7:3 la b tɩ sok Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã roogã maan-kʋʋdbã, ne no-rɛɛsdbã yaa: «Mam tog n kell n yãbame n tãag kiuug a nu soabã, la m loe noore, wa mam sẽn dag n maan hal yʋʋm zãrã bɩ?»" 
Zechariah7:4 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã goma ne maam n yeele: 
Zechariah7:5 «Yeel tẽngã nebã fãa ne maan-kʋʋdbã yaa: ‹Yãmb sẽn loe noor n wiis kiuug a nu soabã ne kiuug a yopoe soabã, hal yʋʋm pis-yopoe sẽn loogã pʋgẽ wã, rẽ yĩnga, sɩd yaa mam yĩng la yãmb loe noorã sɩda?" 
Zechariah7:6 Yãmb sẽn dɩt la y yũudã, ka yãmb mensã yĩng la y rɩt la y yũud sɩda?" 
Zechariah7:7 Rẽ yĩnga, ka koe-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab rag n tũnug b no-rɛɛsdbã hal kʋdem-wẽndẽ n moon n togsã sɩda? Wakat-kãng tɩ Zeruzalɛm ne tẽms nins sẽn dag n gũbg yẽnda wã rag n pida ne nebã, n gãe bãane. Rẽ tɩ Negɛɛv ne tẽms nins sẽn be kunkub sʋkã rag n pida ne nebã?»" 
Zechariah7:8 Sẽn-Ka-Saab goma ne a Zakari n yeele: 
Zechariah7:9 «Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Kao-y bʋʋdã tɩrga, maan-y taab neere, la y zoe taab nimbãanega." 
Zechariah7:10 Ra maan-y pʋg-kõor ne kɩɩb pãnga, la y ra maan sãan ne naong soab pãng ye. Da tags-y y sũyã pʋs n dat n maan taab wẽng ye.›" 
Zechariah7:11 La bãmb zãgsame tɩ b ka na n kelg ye. Bãmb kɩɩsame n yẽd b tʋba, sẽn na n yɩl n da wʋm ye." 
Zechariah7:12 Bãmb diglma b sũyã wa diyama, sẽn na n yɩl n da kelg tõogã ne goam nins Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã Sɩɩgã sẽn tũnug kʋdem-wẽndẽ no-rɛɛsdbã n kõ bãmbã ye.» Dẽ, bõn-kãng yĩng kɩtame tɩ Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sũurã yiki." 
Zechariah7:13 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yeelame: «Mam sẽn bool bãmbã, b ka kelg ye. Dẽ wã, bãmb sã n wa bool maam, mam me ka na n kelg ye." 
Zechariah7:14 Mam sãeega bãmb n kẽes bu-zẽms nins fãa bãmb sẽn dag n ka mi wã sʋka. Bãmb loogame n bas b tẽngã t'a sãam zãnga, tɩ ned ka leb n kẽnd a pʋga, la b ka ne ned sẽn pɩʋʋgd beenẽ me ye. Tẽng ning sẽn dag n yaa tẽn-noogã sãamame.»" 
Zechariah8:1 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã goma ne maam n yeele: 
Zechariah8:2 «Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Mam nonga Sɩyõ, mam nong-a-la ne nonglem-kãsenga, nonglem ning mam sẽn tar yẽnda yĩngã yaa kãseng n dɩt maam wa bugum.› »" 
Zechariah8:3 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Mam na n lebg n waa Sɩyõ, la m na n zĩnda Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ. B na n pʋda Zeruzalɛm tɩ «pʋ-peelem Tẽnga» la Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã tãn-sõngo.»" 
Zechariah8:4 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Nin-kẽemba, pagb la raopa, b ned kam fãa na n tika a rasaare, n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Zeruzalɛm nebã seg taabã zĩisẽ, bãmb yʋʋmã sẽn yaa wʋsgã yĩnga." 
Zechariah8:5 Kom-dibli la kom-pugli na n pida tẽngã nebã seg taabã zĩisẽ n deemdẽ.» 
Zechariah8:6 Maam Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Sã n mikame tɩ badaare, bu-kellã tagsdame tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yɩ, dẽ yĩnga, mam me tog n tagsame tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yɩ la? Yaa maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Zechariah8:7 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «N-yẽe! Mam na n fãaga m nebã n yiis-b tẽms sẽn be yaanga, la nin-taoorã pʋgẽ." 
Zechariah8:8 Mam na n lebg n tall-b lame n wa, la bãmb na n zĩnda Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ. Bãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, n yaa sɩd soaba, la tɩrlem soaba.»" 
Zechariah8:9 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Yãmb dãmb sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã no-rɛɛsdbã sẽn togs wakat ning b sẽn yẽbg Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã roogã, la wakat ning b sẽn na n me-a wã, paam-y raoodo!" 
Zechariah8:10 Bala, sẽn deng rũndã, ninsaalbã rag n ka tar yaoodo, la rũmsã ka tʋmd n kẽesd yõod ye. Bɛɛbã yĩnga, ned ka tõe n yi n gõ la a wa bãan ye. Bala, mam dag n basa ninsaalbã fãa ne taaba.»" 
Zechariah8:11 Moasã, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Mam ka na n leb n maan bu-kellã wa m sẽn maan pĩndã ye." 
Zechariah8:12 Sɩd me, mam na n waa ne vɩ-bãan bõn-buudu. Reezẽ tɩɩsã na n woma biisi, tẽn-gãongã na n saka bõn-koaadla. Sa-gãongã na n sika a meenem, la mam na n kɩtame tɩ bõn-kãng fãa lebg mam nebã bu-kellã rẽnda." 
Zechariah8:13 Dẽ, Zʋʋda buudu, Israyɛll buudu, yãmb sẽn dag n lebg kãab-wẽng bãnd bu-zẽmsã sʋk to-to wã, woto me, mam na n fãaga yãmba, la yãmb na n lebga buud sẽn tar barka. Da zoe-y rabeem ye, paam-y raoodo!»" 
Zechariah8:14 Bala, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Yãmb yaab-rãmbã rag n kɩtame tɩ mam sũurã yiki, tɩ mam yãk yam n na n sɩbg yãmba, la m ka maan m bãngẽ ye. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele!" 
Zechariah8:15 Woto me, mam lebg n yãkda yam moasã, n yeel tɩ badaare, m na n maana Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda buudã neere. Dẽ wã, da zoe-y rabeem ye!" 
Zechariah8:16 Ad yãmb sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga: «Gom-y sɩd ne taaba! Kao-y bʋʋdã ne tɩrlem la ne sɩda, y bʋ-kaoorã zĩisẽ." 
Zechariah8:17 Bɩ ned ra tags a sũurẽ n dat n maan a to wẽng ye. Bɩ y kisg zĩrẽ wẽenego. Bala, mam kisa yel-bãmbã fãa. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele!»" 
Zechariah8:18 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã goma ne maam a woto: 
Zechariah8:19 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Kiuug a naasẽ soabã no-loeerã, ne a nu soabã no-loeerã, la kiuug a yopoe soabã no-loeerã, ne kiuug piig soabã no-loeerã, na n lebga kɩdeng la sũ-noog rayã, b na n lebga tigr kɩdeng day Zʋʋda buudã yĩnga. Dẽ wã, nong-y sɩda, ne vɩ-bãane.»" 
Zechariah8:20 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Neb buud toor-toor ne tẽms wʋsg neb na n leb n wa pida Zeruzalɛm. 
Zechariah8:21 Tẽng a yembr neb na n kẽng n tɩ yeela tẽng a to rãmb yaa: «Wa-y tɩ d kẽng n tɩ yõk Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg n ges b sũurã ka na n sigi. D kẽng n tɩ bao Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã.» La ned kam fãa na n leokame: «Mam me na n tũume n kẽnge!» 
Zechariah8:22 Neb kʋʋng wʋsg ne soolem-dãmb sẽn tar pãng n na n wa Zeruzalɛm n wa bao Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, n yõk bãmb a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sɛɛg n ges b sũurã ka na n sigi." 
Zechariah8:23 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Badaare, neb sẽn gomd goam buud toor-toor pʋgẽ neb piig na n gãda Zʋɩf a yembr fãa fuug noor n yeele: ‹Tõnd na n tũu yãmb n kẽnge. Bala, tõnd wʋmame tɩ Wẽnnaam bee ne yãmba.› »" 
Zechariah9:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛgã taa Hadrak tẽnga, n sãag n tɩ tek Damaas tẽnga. Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab n so ninsaala, wa b sẽn so Israyɛll buudã fãa wã." 
Zechariah9:2 Koɛɛgã taa Hamat tẽngã sẽn yaa yẽnda yakã, ne Tɩɩr la Sɩdõ tẽnga sẽn tar yam wʋsgã." 
Zechariah9:3 Tɩɩr tẽngã mee lalg n gũbgi, yẽnda zama wanzuri wa tom, la a zam sãnem wa soay zut tãndo." 
Zechariah9:4 La Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n deega bõn-kãnga, bãmb na n luba a lal-gũbrã ko-kãsengã pʋga, la bugum n na n dɩ tẽngã." 
Zechariah9:5 Askalon na n yãnda bõn-kãens tɩ rabeem yõk-a. Gaaza me na n diga ne rabeem, Ekrõ me na n diga ne rabeem bala, bãmb sẽn ning b tẽebã tẽng ning zugã na n paama yãnde. Gaaza rĩmã na n menemame. Ned ka na n leb n zĩnd Askalon ye." 
Zechariah9:6 Bu-kalem-kalem na n zĩnda Asdood tẽnga. Woto, mam na n yiisa Filistẽ-dãmbã wuk-m-mengã." 
Zechariah9:7 Mam na n yiisa zɩɩmã sẽn be b noorẽ wã, la m yiis nem-yoodã sẽn be b yẽnẽ wã, dẽ, yẽnda me na n yɩɩ bu-kell tõnd Wẽnnaamã yĩnga. Yẽnda na n paama a zĩig Zʋʋda buudã sʋka, la Ekrõ nebã na n yɩɩ wa Zebuus-rãmbã." 
Zechariah9:8 Mam na n tilga m tãb-sik m doogã sɛɛga, n kogl-a ne tãb-biis buud fãa, la ne neb nins sẽn saad n pɩʋʋmd beenẽ wã la nin-toaag ba a yembr kõn leb n pɩʋʋg beenẽ n nams-a ye. Bala, moasã wã, mam mengã nin get-b lame." 
Zechariah9:9 Sɩyõ tẽn-neere, kɩdem ne sũ-noogo! Zeruzalɛm tẽn-neere, bɩ f kilsi! Ade, fo rĩmã wata fo nengẽ. Bãmb yaa tɩrlem soaba, la tõaagda, n yaa sik-m-meng soaba, n zao bõanga, bãmb zaoo bõan-bila, bõan-yãang biiga." 
Zechariah9:10 Bãmb na n menesa saar-dãmbã Efrayiim pʋgẽ, la b menes wiidã Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ. Bãmb na n kaoo zabr tãpã, la b na n moona vɩ-bãan koɛɛg bu-zẽmsã yĩnga. Bãmb naamã na n sɩnga ko-kãseng a yembr n tɩ tãag a to, a na n sɩnga kʋɩlgã, n tɩ tãag dũniyã tɛka." 
Zechariah9:11 «Sã n yaa ne yãmba, kaool ning mam sẽn tall zɩɩm n maan ne yãmbã yĩnga, mam na n yiisa fo yembsã bul-koɛɛngã pʋgẽ." 
Zechariah9:12 Yembs nins sẽn be tẽeb pidsg gũudum pʋgã, lebg-y n wa-y tẽng sẽn tar pãngã pʋga.» Rũndã bala, mam yetame: «Mam na n lebs n kõo foom bũmb fãa naoor a yiibu." 
Zechariah9:13 Bala, mam dʋʋsda m tãpo, yaa Zʋʋda. Mam ningd-a-la pɛɛma, yaa Efrayiim. Mam na n pirsa Sɩyõ nebã, tɩ b yik n zab ne Gɛrɛɛs nebã. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb yɩ wa gãndaoog zabr sʋʋga." 
Zechariah9:14 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n puka bãmb zugẽ, la bãmb pĩimã na n kẽnga wa sa-yãgbo. Wẽnnaam Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n peeba baorgo, la b na n tũu nug-goabg sob-kãseng n wa." 
Zechariah9:15 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã na n gũu b nebã. Bãmb na n sãamame, la b wer loaabg kugã. Bãmb na n yũume, bãmb na n kɛɛ wa reezẽ rãam, bãmb na n pida wa zɩɩm mesb laaga, wa tẽn-kugrã kɩrems sẽn pid ne zɩɩmã." 
Zechariah9:16 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã na n fãaga bãmb badaare, wa pe-kɩɩm sẽn fãagd a piisi. Bala, bãmb tẽngã pʋgẽ, b na n yɩɩ wa kug-neeb sẽn be maanf zug n pɩnda." 
Zechariah9:17 N-yẽe! Yaa sõama, yaa neere! Koodã na n kɩtame tɩ kom-dibli paam pãnga, la reezẽ rã-paalg na n kõo kom-pugli wã pãnga.»" 
Zechariah10:1 Kos-y Sẽn-Ka-Saab tɩ b tʋm saaga, kos-y tɩ b tʋm yaoolem saaga. Yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n wat ne sa-ko-bɛda. Bãmb na n kɩtame tɩ sa-koom ni wʋsgo, la b kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa pʋʋg bõn-koaadl yi." 
Zechariah10:2 Bala, bõn-naandsã sẽn yetã yaa wẽnse. La bagbã vẽnegr yaa zĩrẽ-beed bala. Bãmb zãmsdã yaa belgr zãmsdo, bãmb belsg goamã yaa zaalem. Yaa rẽ n kɩt tɩ nebã yeebd wa piisi. Bãmb sũyã sãamame, b sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩmã yĩnga." 
Zechariah10:3 «Mam sũurã puuga ne pe-kɩɩmbã, mam na n sɩbga boeesã. Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã gesa Zʋʋda buudã sẽn yaa bãmb piisã yelle. Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b lebg b weef sẽn tar ziir zabr zĩigẽ." 
Zechariah10:4 Roogã soak zĩigẽ kugrã na n yii Zʋʋda buudã pʋga, baafã ne zabr tãpã na n yii beenẽ. Nanambsã fãa me na n yii beenẽ." 
Zechariah10:5 Bãmb na n yɩɩ wa gãndaad sẽn be zabr zĩigẽ, bãmb na n zabame, n tab b zabd-n-taasã wa soay zut begdo. Bãmb na n zabame, bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n zĩnda ne-ba, la sẽn zao-b wiidã na n dɩɩ yãnde." 
Zechariah10:6 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda buudã paam pãnga, la m na n fãaga a Zozɛf buudã. Mam na n leb n lebs-b-la b zĩigẽ wã, bala, mam zoeta b nimbãanega, bãmb na n yɩɩ wa mam dag n ka bas-b ye. Mam yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaam, la m na n leok-b lame." 
Zechariah10:7 Efrayiim buudã neb na n paama raood wa gãndaoogo. Bãmb na n paama sũ-noog wa b yũu reezẽ rãam. Bãmb kambã sã n yãnd bãmba, b na n kɩdmame, n maan sũ-noog Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga." 
Zechariah10:8 Mam na n fɩɩl n bool-b lame n tigme, bala, yaa maam n fãagd bãmba, la b na n leb n fɩɩga wa pĩndã." 
Zechariah10:9 Mam na n sãeega bãmb bu-zẽmsã sʋka, la bãmb na n zĩnda zĩ-zãrsẽ wã n tẽeg mam yelle. Bãmb ne b kambã na n vɩɩmdame, la b na n lebg n waame." 
Zechariah10:10 Mam na n tall-b lame n yi Ezɩpt n lebg n wa. Mam na n yiisa bãmb Asiiri n tall-b n wa tigme. Mam na n kẽesa bãmb Galaad ne Libã tẽngã pʋga, la ne rẽ fãa, zĩigã ka na n sek-b ye." 
Zechariah10:11 Bãmb na n pɩʋʋga sũ-sãang ko-kãsengã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n wẽe ko-kãsengã ko-pɛmã, la Nill kʋɩlgã ko-zulumsã na n kʋɩɩme. B na n sika Asiiri, a zẽk-m-mengã yĩnga, la Ezɩpt tẽngã naam na n sɛɛme." 
Zechariah10:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb paam pãng Sẽn-Ka-Saab pʋga, la b na n kẽnda ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele.»" 
Zechariah11:1 Libã tẽnga, pak f kʋɩlemse, tɩ bugum dɩ f sɛɛdr tɩɩsã." 
Zechariah11:2 Sɩprɛs tɩɩga, yãbe, bala, sɛɛdr tɩɩgã lʋɩɩme, tɩ-bɛdã sãamame. Basã sɛn tɩɩse, yãb-y-yã, Bala, b kɛɛ kãgr ning ned sẽn dag n ka tõe n kẽ a pʋgẽ wã!" 
Zechariah11:3 B wʋmda pe-kɩɩmbã yãbre, bala, b sãama bãmb ra-sãndã. B wʋmda gɩgem-poalã yãbre, bala, b luba Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã kãgrã." 
Zechariah11:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã yeelame yaa: «Kɩɩm piis nins b sẽn tog n kʋ wã," 
Zechariah11:5 Neb nins sẽn daad bãmbã kʋʋda bãmb tɩ ned ka sokdẽ ye. Neb nins sẽn koosd bãmbã ned kam fãa yetame: ‹Bɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab paam pẽgre, bala, mam lebga arzɛk soaba!› La sẽn kɩɩmd-b piisã ned ba a yembr ka zoet piisã nimbãaneg ye." 
Zechariah11:6 Ayo, mam ka na n leb n zoe tẽngã neb nimbãaneg ye. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele. Sɩd me, mam na n basa ned kam fãa a to nugẽ, la a rĩm nugẽ. Rĩm-dãmbã na n sãama tẽngã, la mam ka na n fãag ned ba a yembr ye.»" 
Zechariah11:7 Dẽ, mam kɩtame tɩ b kɩɩm piisã b sẽn tog n kʋ wã raadbã yĩnga. Mam dɩka rasab a yiibu, n pʋd a yembr yʋʋr t'a ‹Bʋgsem›, la m pʋd yembrã t'a ‹Lagem-n-taare›, la mam gesa m piisã yelle." 
Zechariah11:8 La mam menesa pe-kɩɩmb a tãabã kiuug a yembr pʋgẽ. Mam maana sũ-mar ne piisã n konge, la bãmb me yamã wa n yii maam." 
Zechariah11:9 Dẽ, mam yeelame: «Mam ka na n leb n kɩɩm yãmb ye! Bɩ sẽn segd n ki-a ki! Tɩ sẽn na n menem-a menem! La bɩ sẽn na n põs-bã wãb taaba!»" 
Zechariah11:10 Mam dɩka m dasaar ning sẽn boond t'a ‹Bʋgsmã› n kaooge, n na n sãam kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne nebã fãa wã." 
Zechariah11:11 Kaoolã sãama badaare, la piisã lɛɛbdb sẽn dag n get maamã bãngame tɩ rag n yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab n gomde." 
Zechariah11:12 Dẽ, mam yeela bãmb yaa: «A sã n taa yãmb yam, bɩ y yao maam m yaoodã, la sã n ka ta y yam bɩ y base.» Woto, bãmb maka wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-tã n yao maam." 
Zechariah11:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Lob wanzuri wã tɩ yagbã wʋke. Bãmb sẽn yãnd yaood sẽn segd ne maam la woto.» Mam dɩka wanzuri wakɩ-koeems pis-tã wã n tɩ lob Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã tɩ yagbã wʋke. 
Zechariah11:14 Rẽ poore, mam kaooga m dasaar a yiibẽ soabã sẽn boond t'a ‹Lagem-n-taarã›, n sãam ba-biir lagem-n-taarã sẽn be Zʋʋda ne Israyɛll sʋkã." 
Zechariah11:15 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeela maam yaa: «Moasã, rɩk pe-kɩɩm-yalmã teedo!" 
Zechariah11:16 Bala, mam na n yãka pe-kɩɩm tẽngã pʋga. La yẽnda ka na n tɩ gẽes rũms nins sẽn menemdã ye. Yẽnda ka na n bao peosg ning sẽn meneme, a ka na n tɩp peosg ning sẽn pogle, a ka na n ges peosg ning sẽn tar laafɩ wã yell ye. Yẽnda na n wãbda pe-nobdsã, la a fʋgsd b nao-bendã.»" 
Zechariah11:17 Toog bee zãmb pe-kɩɩm ning sẽn basd-a piisã zugu! Bɩ zabr sʋʋg koms a kangã, la a pusg a rɩtg nifã! Bɩ a kangã kʋɩ! Bɩ a rɩtg nifã pãng booge!" 
Zechariah12:1 Sɩbgr koɛɛga. Sẽn-Ka-Saab koɛɛg Israyɛll wɛɛngẽ. Ade, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa soab ning sẽn yɛdg sa-gãongã la b vigl tẽngã, n kɩt tɩ sɩɩg be ninsaalb pʋgẽ wã yetame:" 
Zechariah12:2 «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm lebg bõn-yũudl sẽn yilimd neng soolem nins fãa sẽn gũbgã yĩnga. Wakat ning b sẽn n wa n gũbg Zeruzalɛmã, a na n yɩɩ woto ne Zʋʋda nebã." 
Zechariah12:3 Badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zeruzalɛm lebg kug-zɩsg nebã buud fãa yĩnga. Neb nins fãa sẽn na n tʋlg n zẽk-a wã na n pogla b mense. La dũniyã buud toay-taoyã fãa na n tigma taab n zab ne-a.»" 
Zechariah12:4 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ nen-yiling yõk wed-moosã fãa, la m kɩt tɩ neb nins sẽn zombd bãmbã gãeeme. La m na n gũu Zʋʋda buudã, n lobg bu-zẽmsã wed-moosã zondo." 
Zechariah12:5 Zʋʋda nanambsã na n tagsa b sũyã pʋs a woto: ‹Zeruzalɛm nebã yaa tõnd pãnga, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã sẽn yaa bãmb Wẽnnaamã maasem yĩnga.› »" 
Zechariah12:6 Badaare, mam na n kɩtame tɩ Zʋʋda buudã nanambs yɩ wa bugum sẽn be raad sʋka, la wa bug-vɩleng sẽn be mood tẽngre. Bãmb na n sãama soolem nins fãa sẽn gũbg bãmb goabg la rɩtgã, la Zeruzalɛm na n kell n pa a zĩigẽ wã Zeruzalɛm." 
Zechariah12:7 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n deng n fãaga Zʋʋda buudã fu-roto, sẽn na n yɩl t'a Davɩɩd buudã ne sẽn be-b Zeruzalɛmã ziir ra wa yɩɩg Zʋʋda buudã ye." 
Zechariah12:8 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kogla Zeruzalɛm nebã. Ned sã n be bãmb sʋkã n ka tar pãnga, badaare, a na n talla pãng wa a Davɩɩde, la a Davɩɩd buudã na n yɩɩ wa Wẽnnaam, a na n yɩ wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab malɛɛk sẽn be bãmb taoore." 
Zechariah12:9 Badaare, mam na n maana m sẽn tõe tɛk n sãam soolem nins fãa sẽn na n wa zab ne Zeruzalɛmã," 
Zechariah12:10 mam na n kɩtame tɩ nimbãan-zoeer ne se-yõkr sɩɩg sig a Davɩɩd buudã ne Zeruzalɛm nebã zugu, la bãmb na n wẽnemd n gesa maam, bãmb na n wẽnemd n gesa soab ning bãmb sẽn dag n kõsã. Bãmb na n yãba a yĩnga, wa ned sẽn yãbd a bi-yend yĩnga. Bãmb na n yãba yẽnda yĩng wʋsg wa ned sẽn yãbd a pipi bi-ribl yĩnga." 
Zechariah12:11 Badaare, Zeruzalɛm yãbrã na n yɩɩ kãseng wa Hadaad-Rimon sẽn yãb to-to Megido longẽ wã." 
Zechariah12:12 Tẽngã na n yãbame, roog fãa neb na n yãba toore: a Davɩɩd buudã neb roog na n yãba toore, tɩ pagbã me yãb toore. A Natã buudã neb roog na n yãba toore, tɩ pagbã me yãb toore." 
Zechariah12:13 A Leevi buudã neb roog na n yãba toore, tɩ pagbã me yãb toore. A Sɩmeyi roogã neb na n yãba toore, tɩ pagbã me yãb toore." 
Zechariah12:14 Rot a taabã neb fãa na n yãba toore, tɩ pagbã me yãb toore." 
Zechariah13:1 Badaare, ko-bundum n na n pusg n yi a Davɩɩd buudã ne Zeruzalɛm nebã yel-wẽnã ne b rẽgdã pekr yĩnga." 
Zechariah13:2 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Badaare, mam na n yiisa wẽn-naandsã yʋy tẽngã pʋga, la b kõn tol n leb n tẽeg bãmb yell ye. La m na n yiisa no-rɛɛsdbã me tẽngã pʋga, ne b rẽgdã sɩɩgã." 
Zechariah13:3 Dẽ, ned sã n ket n be beenẽ n maand no-reesg tʋʋmde, yẽnda meng ba wã ne a ma wã, sẽn dog-b yẽnda wã, na n yeela yẽnda yaa: ‹Fo tog n kiime, bala, fo togsda zĩrẽ-be-goam ne Sẽn-Ka-Saab yʋʋre.› » La yẽnda ba wã ne a ma wã na n kõs-a-la wakat ning a sẽn togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã." 
Zechariah13:4 Badaare, no-rɛɛs fãa sã n wa togsd pĩnd-n-bãngr goamã, yãnd na n yõk-a-la a vẽnegrã yĩnga. Bãmb kõn leb n yeelg fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbd n belg nebã ye." 
Zechariah13:5 Bãmb ned kam fãa na n yeelame yaa: «Mam ka no-rɛɛs ye, mam yaa ka-koaada. Hal mam bi-bɩɩlem wakate, mam tʋmd n kõta ned ning sẽn da-a maamã.»" 
Zechariah13:6 Dẽ, b na n sok-a lame yaa: ‹Yaa bõe poglg la sẽn be fo yãoogẽ wã?› La a na n leokame yaa: ‹Mam kẽnga neb nins sẽn nong maamã zakẽ tɩ b pogl-ma.› »" 
Zechariah13:7 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Zabr sʋʋga, yik n zab ne mam pe-kɩɩmã, zab ne soab ning sẽn be ne maamã! Wẽ pe-kɩɩmã, la piisã na n sãeegame, la mam mengã nug n na n wa wẽ pe-bi wã." 
Zechariah13:8 Dẽ, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: Tẽngã pʋga, neb a tãab sʋka, neb a yiib n na n ki, b na n sãamame, la sẽn kell-a wã na n vɩɩmdame." 
Zechariah13:9 La m na n dɩka sẽn kell-a wã n ning bugmẽ, mam na n yẽnega yẽnda wa b sẽn yẽnegd wanzuri, mam na n zuga yẽnda wa b sẽn zugd sãnem. Yẽnda na n boola mam yʋʋrã, la mam na n leok-a lame. Mam na n yeelame yaa: «Bãmb n yaa mam nebã.» La bãmb na n yeelame: «Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yaa tõnd Wẽnnaam.»" 
Zechariah14:1 Ade, daar n wat sẽn yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab daare, tɩ b na n dɩk yãmb paoongã n pʋɩ yãmb nifẽ." 
Zechariah14:2 Mam na n tigma buudã fãa Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ zabr yĩnga. B na n deega Zeruzalɛm tẽngã, n sãam a rotã, la b gãand a pagbã ne pãnga. Tẽngã nebã pʋɩ-sʋk na n kẽe yembdo, la b ka na n menes neb nins sẽn kell tẽngã pʋgẽ wã ye." 
Zechariah14:3 Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yiime n zab ne bu-zẽmsã. Bãmb na n zaba ne bãmba, wa b sẽn zabd to-to zabr wakatã." 
Zechariah14:4 Badaare, bãmb na n tabga oliiv tɩɩs tãngã sẽn be yaang Zeruzalɛmã neng taoorã zugu. Oliiv tɩɩs tãngã na n pãrga yaang n tãag nin-taoore, tɩ lebg lon-kãsenga. Tãngã pʋɩ-sʋk a yembr na n targ n leba nug-rɩtg sẽnẽ, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk a yembrã targ n leb nug-goabg sẽnẽ." 
Zechariah14:5 La yãmb na n zoe n kẽe mam tãmsã longẽ, bala, mam tãmsã lond na n tɩ tãaga Atsalle. Yãmb na n zoee wa y yaab-rãmbã sẽn dag n zoe n na n põs tẽn-digimdgã, Zʋʋda rĩm a Oozɩyaas wakatã. Dẽ, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa mam Wẽnnaamã na n waame, la pʋ-peelem dãmbã fãa na n tũu bãmb n wa." 
Zechariah14:6 Badaare, vẽenem ka na n zĩndi, la waood ne galaas na n zĩndame." 
Zechariah14:7 Ra-kãng na n yɩɩ toor zalle, la yaa Sẽn-Ka-Saab bal n mi daarã, wĩndg ne yʋng ka na n zĩnd ye, la zaabr sã n ta, vẽenem na n zĩndame." 
Zechariah14:8 Badaare, koom n na n pusg Zeruzalɛm, koomã pʋɩ-sʋk na n zoee n teesa ko-kãseng ning sẽn be yaang sẽnẽ wã, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk a yembrã zoe n tees ko-kãseng ning sẽn be nin-taoor sẽnẽ. A na n yɩɩ woto sẽoog la sɩpaolgo." 
Zechariah14:9 Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ dũniyã fãa rĩma. Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n yɩɩ b yembre, la yaa bãmb yʋʋrã bal n na n zĩndi." 
Zechariah14:10 Tẽngã fãa na n lebga tẽn-nabd-koɛɛnga, sẽn sɩng ne Geba n tãag Rimon sẽn be Zeruzalɛm goabgã. B na n zẽka Zeruzalɛm yĩngr t'a kell n pa a zĩigẽ wã, sẽn sɩng ne Benzame rig-noorã n tãag no-kʋdgã zĩigẽ, hal n tãag rignoor ning sẽn be lal-gõdrẽ wã, la sẽn sɩng ne Hananeyɛll gãosgã n tɩ tãag rĩmã reezẽ rãam wẽkr kogendã zĩigẽ." 
Zechariah14:11 Neb na n leb n zĩnda beenẽ, la sãoong kõn leb n zĩnd ye. La Zeruzalɛm tẽngã na n gãanda bãane." 
Zechariah14:12 Ad toog ning Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn na n tall n sɩbg buud nins sẽn zab ne Zeruzalɛmã: b na n kɩtame tɩ bãmb ned kam fãa põog n ket n vɩ. Bãmb ninã na n põoga b bogdẽ, tɩ b zɛlmã wã põog b noyã pʋse." 
Zechariah14:13 Badaare, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n kɩtame tɩ pelen-yɩg-kãseng zĩnd bãmb sʋka. Bãmb ned kam fãa wẽnemd n gãda a to, la b na n zaba ne taaba." 
Zechariah14:14 Zʋʋda na n zĩnda Zeruzalɛm pʋgẽ n zabe, la b na n wʋka bu-zẽms nins fãa sẽn gũbg bãmbã arzegse, yaa sãnem, wanzuri ne fut hal wʋsgo." 
Zechariah14:15 To-kãng me na n yõka wed-moosã, bõn-weesã, yʋgma wã, bõensã, ne rũms nins fãa sẽn be bãmb tãb-sigsẽ wã. To-kãng na n yɩɩ wa a to wã bala." 
Zechariah14:16 Dẽ, buud nins fãa sẽn wa n zab ne Zeruzalɛmã, neb nins sẽn põsã na n wata yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd n waoogd rĩmã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, la b maand zãn tigrã." 
Zechariah14:17 La buud nins sẽn be dũniyã zugã sã n ka kẽng Zeruzalɛm n tɩ wõgemd n waoog rĩmã sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã, saag ka na n ni bãmb tẽngẽ wã ye." 
Zechariah14:18 Ezɩpt buudã neb sã n ka kẽnge, saag ka na n ni b tẽngẽ wã ye. Yaa to-kãng la Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n tall n sɩbg buud ning sẽn ka na n kẽng-a n tɩ maan zãn tigrã." 
Zechariah14:19 Sɩbg-kãng la b na n sɩbg Ezɩpti, ne buud nins fãa sẽn ka kẽng n tɩ maan zãn tigrã." 
Zechariah14:20 Badaare, b na n gʋlsa wiidã loamba wã zut woto: «Welga toor Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga!» La rʋgdã sẽn be Sẽn-Ka-Saab roogẽ wã na n yɩɩ wa zɩɩm mesb laasã sẽn be tẽn-kugrã taoorã." 
Zechariah14:21 Rʋgd nins fãa sẽn be Zeruzalɛm ne Zʋʋda wã na n welga toor Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yĩnga. Neb nins fãa sẽn na n wa maan maoong na n talla rʋg-bãmb n dʋg maoongã nemdo. La toandb kõn leb n zĩnd Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã roogẽ wakat-kãng ye. 
Malachi1:1 Ad sɩbgr koɛɛg Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn tũnug a Malasɩ n gom ne Israyɛll nebã. 
Malachi1:2 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yeelame yaa: «Mam nonga yãmba.» La yãmb yetame: «Bõe n wilgd tɩ y nonga tõndo?» «A Ezayu dag n ka a Zakoob ba-biig sɩda? Ne rẽ fãa, mam nonga a Zakoobe. Maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab n yeele." 
Malachi1:3 Mam yaool n kisga a Ezayu. Mam kɩtame t'a tãmsã lebg zĩ-vɩɩdo, n kɩt t'a soolmã lebg we-baasã sẽn be we-raoogẽ wã zĩiga.»" 
Malachi1:4 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Edom nebã sã n yeele: ‹B sãama tõnd tẽngã, la tõnd na n leb n me d raboodã.› B rat bɩ b lebs n me-a, tɩ m na n leb n wã-a lame! B na n boola tẽngã tɩ wẽng maaneg soolem, b na n bool-a lame tɩ buud Sẽn-Ka-Saab sũurã sẽn puud ne wakat fãa wã." 
Malachi1:5 Yãmb nin na n yãnda bõn-kãense, la yãmb mens na n yeelame tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yaa kãsenga, hal baa sẽn gãndg Israyɛll todsã!" 
Malachi1:6 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Biig waoogda a ba, tɩ yamb waoogd a Zu-soabã. Sã n yaa tɩ mam yaa yãmb Ba, waoogr ning b sẽn tog n waoog maamã bee yɛɛnẽ? La sã n yaa tɩ mam yaa yãmb Zu-soaba, zoees ning yãmb sẽn tog n zoe maamã bee yɛɛnẽ? Yãmb a maan-kʋʋdbã paoogda mam yʋʋrã, n yaool n sokdẽ: ‹Tõnd maana bõe n paoog yãmb yʋʋrã?›" 
Malachi1:7 Ade, yãmb tallda rɩ-rẽgd n wat m tẽn-kugrã zugu. La y yaool n sokdẽ: ‹Tõnd maana bõe n dẽgem yãmba?› Yaa yãmb sẽn yeel tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã yaa bõn-zaalgã." 
Malachi1:8 Yãmb sẽn talld rũng sẽn yaa zoang n wat n na n maan maoongã, ka bõn-wẽng sɩda? Yãmb sẽn talld rũng sẽn yaa woabg bɩ bãad n wat tẽn-kugrẽ wã, ka bõn-wẽng sɩda? Mam kotame tɩ y rɩk rũng a woto buud n tɩ kõ y tẽngã gʋvɛrneer n gese, a sũur na yɩ noog ne yãmba? Yãmb tẽedame t'a na n deeg-y-la sõama sɩda? Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soab n yeele." 
Malachi1:9 Moasã, mam kot-y lame tɩ y maan y sẽn tõe n sigs Wẽnnaam sũurã, tɩ b tõe n zoe tõnd nimbãanega! Bala, yellã yita yãmb nengẽ. Bãmb na n deeg-y-la sõama sɩda? Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi1:10 Ãnda n be yãmb sʋkã, n na n pag Wẽnd doogã kʋɩlemse, tɩ yãmb ra leb n yõgen bugmã mam tẽn-kugrã zug zaalem? Mam sũur ka noom ne yãmba, la y kũunã me ka tat mam yam ye. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi1:11 Bala, sẽn sɩng yaang n tãag nin-taoore, mam yʋʋrã yaa kãseng buud toor-toorã fãa sʋka. B yita zĩig zãng n wat n yõogd wisd mam yʋʋrã yĩnga, la b wat ne kũun sẽn yaa yɩlemde. Bala, mam yʋʋrã yaa kãseng buud toor-toorã fãa sʋka. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi1:12 La yãmba, yãmb paoogda maam n yetẽ: ‹Zu-soabã tẽn-kugrã yaa rẽgdo, la a sẽn wat ne rɩɩb ningã yaa bõn-zaalga.›" 
Malachi1:13 La yãmb yetame tɩ y namsda y mens zaalem, la y maand y toog kae ne maam. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. Yãmb sẽn talld rũms nins n wat n kõt maamã yaool n yaa wagdem dũmsi, rũm-wobse, wall rũms sẽn yaa bãad-rãmba. Kũun a woto buud la yãmb talld n wat n kõt maam! Mam na reeg yãmb nusã kũun-kãngã sɩda? Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi1:14 Kãab-wẽng bee zãmb soab zugu, yẽnda sẽn tar pe-raoog sẽn yaa sõama a rũms sʋka, n yaool n dɩk rũng sẽn tar zang n maan maoong n na n pids a pʋleng ne Zu-soabã yĩnga. Bala, maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: ‹Mam yaa rĩm-kãsenga, la mam yʋʋrã seka zoees buud toor-toorã sʋka.› »" 
Malachi2:1 Moasã, ad bũmb ning mam sẽn yet yãmb a maan-kʋʋdbã!" 
Malachi2:2 «Ade, yãmb sã n ka kelge, la y sã n ka yãk yam n kõ mam yʋʋrã waoogre, mam na n tʋma kãab-wẽngã yãmb sʋka, la m kɩt tɩ y barkã lebg kãab-wẽnga. N-yẽe, mam na n kɩtame tɩ y barkã lebg kãab-wẽnga, yãmb sẽn ka kelg m keoogrã yĩnga.» Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi2:3 Yãmb yĩng kɩtame tɩ mam na n leng y yagensã. La m bol y nensã ne y maandã bĩndu, y sẽn kʋ rũms nins n maan y tigã bĩndu. La b na n talla yãmb ne bĩndã n looge." 
Malachi2:4 Dẽ la yãmb na n bãng tɩ yaa maam n yeel yãmb koe-kãngã, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ kaool ning mam sẽn maan ne Leevi buudã yagensã kell n pa. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi2:5 Mam kaoolã rag n bee ne Leevi buudã, la rag n yaa vɩɩm ne vɩ-bãane. Mam kõo bãmb bõn-kãense, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b zoe maam, la bãmb sɩd zoee maam. Bãmb zoee mam yʋʋrã rabeem." 
Malachi2:6 Bãmb noyã rag n togsda sɩd zãmsgã, zãmb rag n ka be bãmb no-bɩmsẽ wã ye. Bãmb dag n kẽnda ne maam, pʋ-peelem la tɩrlem pʋgẽ, n kɩt tɩ neb wʋsg wẽnemd n bas b kongrã." 
Malachi2:7 Bãngr bee maan-kʋʋdã noorẽ. Bala, yaa yẽnda nengẽ la nebã na n wa sok n bãng tõogã sẽn tog n tũ to-to, a sẽn yaa Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã no-rɛɛsã yĩnga." 
Malachi2:8 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «La yãmb a maan-kʋʋdbã bʋdg n basa sorã. Yãmb dɩka tõog n kɩt tɩ neb wʋsg kẽ moogo, la y sãama kaool ning mam sẽn dag n maan ne Leevi buudã." 
Malachi2:9 Mam me na n basame tɩ nebã fãa paoog yãmb la b ning-y yãnde, yãmb sẽn ka sak mam goamã yĩnga, la y sẽn dɩkd tõogã n bakd neb n kaood bʋʋdã yĩnga.»" 
Malachi2:10 Rẽ yĩnga, tõnd fãa ka ba a yembr la? Ka Wẽnnaam a yembr n naan tõnd fãa la? La yaa bõe tɩ d zãmbd taab n sãamd kaool ning Wẽnnaam sẽn maan ne d yaab-rãmbã?" 
Malachi2:11 Zʋʋda nebã maana zãmbo. Yel-beed la b maan Zeruzalɛm ne Israyɛlle. Bala, Zʋʋda nebã paooga Sẽn-Ka-Saab zĩ-sõngã b sẽn nongã, bãmb sẽn peeg pagb sẽn waoogd wẽn-sãamsã yĩnga." 
Malachi2:12 Ned ning sẽn maand-a woto, Sẽn-Ka-Saab na n menes-a lame, tɩ ned ka be n na n yeel tɩ bũmb ye. B na n yiis-a-la a Zakoob yagensã sʋka, b na n menesa ned ning sẽn wat-a ne kũun n kõt bãmbã. Baa a sã n yaa maan-kʋʋda." 
Malachi2:13 Ad bũmb a yiibẽ soab yãmb sẽn leb n maandẽ: yãmb madgda Sẽn-Ka-Saab tẽn-kugrã ne y nintãmã, la y yãbrã, ne y wõosgã, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn ka leb n wẽnemded n get y kũunã, la yãmb nusã kũun sẽn ka leb n tat bãmb yamã yĩnga." 
Malachi2:14 La yãmb sokdame: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yaa a woto?» Yaa tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab yɩɩ kaset soaba, foom ne pag ning fo sẽn peeg f bi-bɩɩlem wakatã, pag ning fo sẽn zãmbã, baa ne yẽnda sẽn yaa fo zĩid-n-taaga, n yaa pag ning fo sẽn maan kãadem ne wã." 
Malachi2:15 Ned ba a yembr sẽn tar yam zɩ n maan a buud ye. Ned a yembr bal n maan a woto. Bala, yẽnda rag n baood n paama biig ning Wẽnnaam sẽn kãab yẽnda wã. Dẽ wã, gũus-y y mens ne y tagsgã. Bɩ ned da wa zãmb pag ning yãmb sẽn peeg y bi-bɩɩlem wakatã ye." 
Malachi2:16 Bala, Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã yetame: «Mam kisa ned sẽn digd a paga, wa mam sẽn kis ned sẽn maand wẽngã. Yaa maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab sẽn yaa Israyɛll Wẽnnaamã n yeele. Dẽ wã, gũus-y y mens ne y tagsgã, la y ra maan zãmb ye.»" 
Malachi2:17 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam yii ne yãmb goamã, la yãmb sokdame: «D maana bõe tɩ b yam yi-du?» Yãmb yetame tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn maand wẽng tata Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam. La y leb n yetẽ tɩ yaa ned a woto buud n noogd bãmb sũuri! Wall y sokdẽ: «Wẽnnaam ning sẽn kaood bʋʋdã bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Malachi3:1 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Ade, mam tʋmda m koe-toagsdã t'a reng maam taoor n maneg sore. Yẽnda na n wa a roogẽ wã ne lingri. Yaa Zu-soab ning yãmb sẽn baoodã, yaa kaoolã koe-toagsd ning yãmb sẽn datã. A watame.»" 
Malachi3:2 Bãmb waoongã daare, ãnda soab n na n tõog n vɩɩmde, bãmb sã n wa puki, ãndã n na n tõog n yalse? B na n yɩɩ wa boaag bugum, B na n yɩɩ wa fu-pɛgd sẽn pekd fuugu." 
Malachi3:3 Yẽnda na n zĩnda wa ned sẽn zĩ n yẽnegd wanzuri n yɩlgd-a. Yẽnda na n yɩlga Leevi yagensã, a na n yɩlga bãmb wa b sẽn yɩlgd sãnem ne wanzuri to-to wã, la bãmb na n yɩɩ neb sẽn tõe n tall kũun n wa Sẽn-Ka-Saab yĩnga, wa sẽn zems tɩrlmã." 
Malachi3:4 Dẽ, Zʋʋda ne Zeruzalɛm kũunã na n taa Sẽn-Ka-Saab yam wa pĩndã, wa yʋʋm nins sẽn loogã." 
Malachi3:5 Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Ade, mam na n wa y nengẽ, n wa kao y bʋʋdo. M na n yika tao-tao n mong nin-bãmbã bʋʋm: yaa bagbã, ne yoaadbã, la neb nins sẽn ka pidsd b pʋlengã, la sẽn zãmbd-b b tʋmtʋmdba, ne pʋg-kõap la kɩɩbse, la b maand sãamb pãnga, n ka zoet maamã." 
Malachi3:6 Bala, maam a Sẽn-Ka-Saab ka tek ye. La yãmb dãmb sẽn yaa a Zakoob yagense, b ka menes yãmb ye.»" 
Malachi3:7 Hal sẽn sɩng ne y yaab-rãmbã wakate, yãmb bʋdg n basa mam noyã, yãmb ka sak-b ye. Lebg-y n wa-y mam nengẽ, tɩ mam me lebg n wa yãmb nengẽ. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele. La yãmb sokdame: «Tõnd tog n maana bõe n lebg n wa?»" 
Malachi3:8 Ad mam sẽn leokd yãmba: «Dẽ yĩnga, ninsaal tog n zuu Wẽnnaam sɩda? Yãmb yaool n zuuda maam, la y sokdẽ: ‹Tõnd zuu yãmb ne bõe?› Yaa piig pʋɩɩrã ne nonglem kũunã pʋg la yãmb zuud maam!" 
Malachi3:9 Ade, kãab-wẽng paamda yãmb buudã tõre, bala, yãmb zuuda maam!»" 
Malachi3:10 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Tall-y piig pʋɩɩrã fãa n wa laogã bĩngr doogẽ, tɩ rɩɩb tõe n zĩnd m doogẽ wã. M kotame tɩ y mak maam a woto, la mam na n paka yĩngr kʋɩlemsã y yĩnga, n kɩt tɩ barkã sig yãmb zugu, hal tɩ seke!" 
Malachi3:11 Mam na n lenga sẽn sãamd-a wã, n gɩdg-a t'a ra sãam y koodã ye. La y reezẽ tɩɩsã ka na n pa n ka wom biis y pʋtẽ wã ye. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi3:12 Buud toor-toorã fãa na n yeelame tɩ bark bee yãmb zugu. Bala, yãmb tẽngã na n yɩɩ tẽn-noogo. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele.»" 
Malachi3:13 Sẽn-Ka-Saab yetame: «Ade, yãmb goma maam gom-kegemse, la y yaool n yeele: ‹Tõnd goma yãmb yell wẽng ne taab a wãn-wãna?›" 
Malachi3:14 Yãmb yeelame: ‹Tõnd sẽn sakd Wẽnnaamã yaa zaalem bala. Tõnd sẽn maand bãmb tʋʋmdã, la d kẽnd ne sũ-sãang Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yĩngã, nafa tõnd ne bõe?" 
Malachi3:15 Moasã, tõnd yetame tɩ tɩtaam dãmbã tara barka, bala, bãmb maanda wẽnga, la ne rẽ fãa, b tɩlgdame. Bãmb makda Wẽnnaam, la b ka paamd sɩbgr ye!»" 
Malachi3:16 Dẽ, sẽn zoet-b Sẽn-Ka-Saabã goma ne taaba. Sẽn-Ka-Saab kɩlla b tʋbre, n wʋme. B gʋlsa tẽegr sebr bãmb taoore, n na n tẽegd neb nins sẽn zoet Sẽn-Ka-Saabo, la b waoogd bãmb yʋʋrã yelle." 
Malachi3:17 Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: Bãmb na n yɩɩ mam dẽnda, b na n yɩɩ mam mengã soolem, daar ning mam sẽn segendã yĩnga. Mam na n zoee bãmb nimbãanega, wa ned sẽn zoet a biig sẽn sakd-a nimbãanegã." 
Malachi3:18 Woto, yãmb na n leb n yãnda welgr ning sẽn be nin-tɩrg ne nin-wẽng sʋka, la welgr ning sẽn be sẽn sakd-b Wẽnnaam ne sẽn ka sakd-b Wẽnnaamã sʋka." 
Malachi3:19 Bala, daarã watame, a na n yɩɩ toog daare, wa bugum wʋnga. Tɩtaam dãmbã ne sẽn maand-b wẽngã na n yɩɩ wa moodo. Daarã sẽn watã na n dɩɩ bãmb zãnga, a ka na n tol n bas bãmb yẽgende, tɩ b pa gomd b wilã ye. Maam a Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã n yeele." 
Malachi3:20 La ne yãmb dãmb sẽn zoet mam yʋʋrã, tɩrlem wĩndg na n puka yãmb yĩnga, la a na n waa ne maagre. Yãmb na n yitame n yɩgd n tirsd wa nag-bi sẽn be yãgrẽ." 
Malachi3:21 Ade, Saasẽ-Pãng-Soabã yetame: «Daar ning mam sẽn segendã daare, yãmb na n taba nin-wẽnsã, bala, bãmb na n yɩɩ wa tompeglem yãmb naoã tẽngre.»" 
Malachi3:22 «Tẽeg-y tõog ning m sẽn dag n kõ m tʋmtʋmd a Moyiisã. Orɛɛb tãngã zugu, mam dag n kõo yẽnda noy la no-tũuds Israyɛll nebã fãa yĩngã." 
Malachi3:23 Mam tʋmda m no-rɛɛs a Eli yãmb nengẽ, tɩ Sẽn-Ka-Saab daarã sẽn yaa ra-kãsenga, la a kẽesd rabeemã nan ka ta ye." 
Malachi3:24 Daarã na n kɩtame tɩ ba-rãmb leb n nong b kamba, la a kɩt tɩ kamb leb n nong b ba-rãmba, tɩ m da wa kãab tẽngã wẽng n kɩt t'a sãam ye.»" 
Luke3:25 sẽn yaa a Matatyaas biiga, sẽn yaa a Amoos biiga, sẽn yaa a Nahum biiga, sẽn yaa a Esli biiga, sẽn yaa a Nagayi biiga,"
